Genesis1:1 U rangani Mudzimu o sika ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi. 
Genesis1:2 Ḽifhasi ḽo vha ḽi si na tshivhumbeo, nahone hu si na tshithu khaḽo; ho vha hu na swiswi, ḽifhasi ḽó tibwa nga dzivha, hone Muya wa Mudzimu o alama kha maḓi." 
Genesis1:3 Mudzimu a ri, “Nga hu vhe na tshedza!” tshedza tsha mbo ḓi vha hone." 
Genesis1:4 Mudzimu a sedza a vhona tshedza tshi tshavhuḓi, a fhandekanya tshedza na swiswi." 
Genesis1:5 Tshedza Mudzimu a ri tshi pfi masiari, swiswi a ri ḽi pfi vhusiku. Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa u ranga." 
Genesis1:6 Mudzimu a ri, “Nga hu vhe na lutombo vhukati ha maḓi, lu fhandekanye maḓi na maḓi.”" 
Genesis1:7 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ita lutombo, a fhandekanya maḓi a fhasi ha lutombo na a nṱha halwo, zwa mbo ralo." 
Genesis1:8 Lutombo Mudzimu a ri lu pfi ḽiṱaḓulu. Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili." 
Genesis1:9 Mudzimu a ri, “Maḓi a re fhasi ha lutombo nga a kuvhangane fhethu huthihi, mavu a sale khagala!” Zwa mbo ralo." 
Genesis1:10 Mavu Mudzimu a ri a pfi shango, maḓi o kuvhanganaho Mudzimu a ri a pfi lwanzhe. Mudzimu a sedza a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis1:11 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ri, “Shango nga ḽi medze zwimela: zwimela zwi no aṋwa mbeu, na miri ya mitshelo i no aṋwa mitshelo i re na mbeu ngomu hayo, i tshi ya nga tshakha dzayo dzo fhambanaho!” Zwa mbo ralo –" 
Genesis1:12 shango ḽa medza zwimela: zwimela zwi no aṋwa mbeu zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na miri i aṋwaho mitshelo i re na mbeu ngomu hayo, i tshi ya nga tshakha dzayo. Mudzimu a sedza a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis1:13 Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru." 
Genesis1:14 Mudzimu a ri, “Nga hu vhe na zwiedza lutomboni lwa ḽiṱaḓulu, zwi fhandekanye masiari na vhusiku, zwi vhe zwiga zwi no sumbedza khalaṅwaha na maḓuvha na miṅwaha," 
Genesis1:15 zwi vhe zwiedza lutomboni lwa ḽiṱaḓulu, zwi vhonetshele ḽifhasi.” Zwa mbo ralo." 
Genesis1:16 Mudzimu o ita zwiedza zwivhili zwihulwane – tshihulwane tsha vha tsha u vhusa masiari, tshiṱuku tsha vha tsha u vhusa vhusiku; a ita na dziṋaledzi." 
Genesis1:17 Mudzimu a dzi vhea lutomboni lwa ḽiṱaḓulu uri dzi vhonetshele ḽifhasi," 
Genesis1:18 dzi vhuse masiari na vhusiku, dzi fhandekanye tshedza na swiswi. Mudzimu a sedza, a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis1:19 Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa." 
Genesis1:20 Mudzimu a ri, “Maḓini nga hu tshatshame zwisikwa zwi tshilaho, nṱha ha ḽifhasi hu fhufhe zwiṋoni, zwi buḓekanye lutombo lwa ḽiṱaḓulu.”" 
Genesis1:21 Zwenezwo Mudzimu a sika mabuka mahulwane a lwanzheni na zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwi tshatshamaho maḓini zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo. Mudzimu a sedza a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis1:22 Mudzimu a zwi shudufhadza a ri, “Bebani ni ande ni ḓadze lwanzhe, zwiṋoni zwi ande shangoni!”" 
Genesis1:23 Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu." 
Genesis1:24 Mudzimu a ri, “Ḽifhasi nga ḽi vhe na zwisikwa zwi tshilaho zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo – zwifuwo na zwisikwa zwi kokovhaho mavuni, na phukha dza ḓaka, zwoṱhe zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo.” Zwa mbo ralo." 
Genesis1:25 Mudzimu o vhumba phukha dza ḓaka dzi tshi ya nga tshakha dzadzo, na zwifuwo zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na zwisikwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo. Mudzimu a sedza a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis1:26 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ri, “Nga ri vhumbe muthu ri tshi ḓifanyisa, a fane na riṋe, a vhuse khovhe dza lwanzheni, na zwiṋoni, na zwifuwo, na ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe, na zwipuka zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni.”" 
Genesis1:27 Mudzimu a vhumba muthu a tshi ḓifanyisa; o mu vhumba a tshi fana na Mudzimu; o vha vhumba muṅwe e munna muṅwe e musadzi. 
Genesis1:28 Mudzimu a vha shudufhadza a ri, “Bebani ni ande; ḓadzani ḽifhasi ni ḽi kunde; vhusani dzikhovhe na zwiṋoni na zwipuka zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni!”" 
Genesis1:29 Zwenezwo Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi ni kumedza zwimela zwoṱhe zwi aṋwaho mbeu zwi re shangoni, na miri yoṱhe ya mitshelo i re na mbeu ngomu hayo; zwi ḓo vha zwone zwiḽiwa zwaṋu." 
Genesis1:30 Phukha dzoṱhe na zwiṋoni na swisikwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni, zwoṱhe zwi femaho, ndi zwi kumedza maṱari na hatsi; zwi ḓo vha zwiḽiwa zwazwo.” Zwa mbo ralo." 
Genesis1:31 Mudzimu a sedza zwoṱhe zwe a zwi ita, a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi vhukuma. Ḽa kovhela, ḽa tsha, ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi." 
Genesis2:1 Ha vha hu hone ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwo khunyelela, na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo." 
Genesis2:2 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili Mudzimu a vha o fhedza mushumo wawe wa u sika, a si tsha sika tshithu, a awela." 
Genesis2:3 Mudzimu a ri ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽi vhe na mashudu, ḽi vhe ḽikhethwa, nge a awela ngaḽo ó fhedza mushumo wawe woṱhe wa u sika." 
Genesis2:4 Hayo ndi one mafhungo a u sikwa ha ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi. Musi Muṋe washu Mudzimu a tshi ita ḽifhasi na ḽiṱaḓulu 
Genesis2:5 ho vha hu sa athu vha na tshiṱaka fhano fhasi, hu sa athu mela na tshimela; Muṋe washu Mudzimu o vha a sa athu nisela ḽifhasi mvula, nahone ho vha hu si na muthu a no lima mavu," 
Genesis2:6 fhasi ho tou phulea zwisima zwa maḓi, a ṋukadza mavu oṱhe." 
Genesis2:7 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a vhumba muthu nga mavu, ningoni dzawe a vhudzulela mufemo u ṋeaho vhutshilo, muthu a mbo ḓi thoma u tshila." 
Genesis2:8 Zwino Muṋe washu Mudzimu o vha o lima tsimu Edeni thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha; henefho a vhea muthu we a mu vhumba. 
Genesis2:9 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a medza miri ya tshakha dzoṱhe mavuni, miri ye ya vha i tshi takadza muthu a tshi i vhona, ine ya ḓifha. Vhukati ha tsimu a medza muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo, na muri u ṋeaho ṱhalukanyo ya zwivhuya na zwivhi." 
Genesis2:10 Edeni ho vha hu tshi ela mulambo u sheledzaho iyo tsimu, u bva henefho wa fhandekana wa bva milambo miṋa." 
Genesis2:11 Wa u thoma u pfi Phishoni; u ela u tshi mona na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Havila, hune ha wanala musuku." 
Genesis2:12 (Musuku wa iḽo shango ndi wavhuḓi; henefho hu na zwiḓolo zwi sa sokou wanala, na matombo a mutengo muhulu.)" 
Genesis2:13 Mulambo wa vhuvhili u pfi Gihoni; u ela u tshi mona na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Kushu. 
Genesis2:14 Mulambo wa vhuraru u pfi Thigirisi; u ela u tshi tsa na shango ḽa Ashuru nga vhubvaḓuvha. Wa vhuṋa u pfi Yufuratha. 
Genesis2:15 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a dzhia muthu a mu vhea tsimuni ya Edeni uri a shume khayo, a i linde." 
Genesis2:16 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a laya muthu a ri, “U nga ḓi ḽa muri muṅwe na muṅwe afho tsimuni," 
Genesis2:17 hone muri u ṋeaho ṱhalukanyo ya zwivhuya na zwivhi u songo u ḽa; wa vhuya wa u ḽa, vhukuma u ḓo fa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a ri, “A si zwavhuḓi muthu a tshi dzula e eṱhe. Ndi ḓo mu vhumbela mufarisi o mu fanelaho.”" 
Genesis2:19 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a dzhia mavu a vhumba phukha dza shango na zwiṋoni, a zwi ḓisa ha muthu u vhona uri a nga zwi vhidza hani; madzina e muthu a zwi vhidza ngao a mbo ḓi vha madzina azwo." 
Genesis2:20 Huno muthu o rina madzina a zwifuwo, na zwiṋoni, na phukha dzoṱhe dza shango, hone a si wane mufarisi o mu fanelaho." 
Genesis2:21 Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu a tshi eḓedza muthu khofhe khulu; musi a tshee o eḓela, a bvisa luvhabvu lwawe, afho fhethu a hu thivha nga ṋama." 
Genesis2:22 Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu a tshi vhumba musadzi nga luvhabvu lwe a lu bvisa kha muthu, a mu ḓisa khae." 
Genesis2:23 Muthu a tshi mu vhona a ri, “Zwino ndi hone ndo wana a no nga nṋe; ndi shaka ḽanga vhukuma; u ḓo pfi ‘musadzi’, nge a bviswa kha munna.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ndi zwine munna a ḓo ṱutshela khotsi awe na mme awe, a vhofhekana na musadzi wawe, vha vha ṋama nthihi." 
Genesis2:25 Munna na musadzi, vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho, vho vha vhe fhedzi, vha sa shoni." 
Genesis3:1 Ṋowa yone yo vha yo thanya u fhira phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka dze Muṋe washu Mudzimu a dzi vhumba. Ya vhudzisa musadzi ya ri, “Nṋa vhukumakuma Mudzimu o amba a ri ni songo vhuya na ḽa na muri na muthihi u re tsimuni?”" 
Genesis3:2 Musadzi a fhindula ṋowa a ri, “Miri i re tsimuni ri a i ḽa," 
Genesis3:3 hone Mudzimu o ri muri u re vhukati ha tsimu ri songo vhuya ra u ḽa, ri songo vhuya ra u kwama, ri sa ḓo fa.”" 
Genesis3:4 Ṋowa ya vhudza musadzi ya ri, “A si zwone, ni nga si fe na kathihi!" 
Genesis3:5 Ndi uri Mudzimu u a ḓivha uri arali na u ḽa ni ḓo bonyolowa na nga Mudzimu, na vho ḓivha zwivhuya na zwivhi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ndi hone musadzi a tshi vhona uri uyo muri u a ḽiwa, na uri muthu a tshi u lavhelesa u a takadza nahone u a ṱoḓea uri muthu a wane vhuṱali; a u fula, a ḽa, a ṋea-vho na munna wawe we a vha e nae henefho, na ene a ḽa." 
Genesis3:7 Ndi hone maṱo avho vhuvhili havho a tshi bonyolowa, vha thoma u vhona uri vha fhedzi; vha rungekanya maṱari a muhuyu, vha ḓiitela vhupila." 
Genesis3:8 Nga madekwana hu tshi vho rotholela, munna na musadzi wawe vha pfa mutsindo wa Muṋe washu Mudzimu a tshi khou tshimbila tsimuni, vha dzhena mirini ya tsimu vha dzumbama Muṋe washu Mudzimu." 
Genesis3:9 Hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu a vhidzelela muthu a ri, “U ngafhi?”" 
Genesis3:10 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndo u pfa u tsimuni, nda ofha, ngauri ndo vha ndi fhedzi. Ndi zwe nda dzumbama.”" 
Genesis3:11 Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi nnyi we a u vhudza uri u fhedzi? Izwi a wo ngo ḽa uḽa muri we nda ri u songo u ḽa?”" 
Genesis3:12 Muthu a ri, “Musadzi hoyu we vha mpha uri ndi dzule nae, ndi ene we a fula mutshelo kha muri a nṋea, nṋe nda ḽa.”" 
Genesis3:13 Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu a tshi vhudzisa musadzi a ri, “Wo ita zwithu-ḓe?” Musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Ndo fhurwa nga ṋowa, nda ḽa.”" 
Genesis3:14 Mudzimu a vhudza ṋowa a ri, “Nge wa ita zwenezwo, wo teketelwa! Kha zwifuwo zwoṱhe na phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka ndi iwe fhedzi une wa ḓo kokovha nga thumbu, wa ḽa buse vhutshilo hau hoṱhe, nge wa ita hezwo!" 
Genesis3:15 Ndi ḓo u luṱanya na musadzi, na vhana vhau na vhawe vha ḓo vhengana; ṅwana wawe u ḓo u pwasha ṱhoho, iwe wa mu luma tshirethe.”" 
Genesis3:16 A tshi vhudza musadzi a ri, “Ndi ḓo andisa vhuṱungu hau u tshi beba vhana; u ḓo beba vhana u tshi tambula; tshau hu ḓo vha u ṱuvha munna wau; ene u ḓo u vhusa.”" 
Genesis3:17 A tshi vhudza munna a ri, “Iwe nge wa thetshelesa musadzi wau, wa ḽa muri we nda ri u songo vhuya wa u ḽa, mavu o teketelwa nga mulandu wau; vhutshilo hau hoṱhe u ḓo ḽa zwi bvaho khao nga u shuma wa tambula." 
Genesis3:18 A ḓo u medzela mipfa na mitshutshungu; u ḓo ḽa zwimela zwa ḓaka. 
Genesis3:19 U ḓo ḽa tsha biko, u swika u tshi vhuelela mavuni e wa bviswa khao; u buse, u ḓo vha buse.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adamu a ri musadzi wawe u pfi Efa, ngauri o vha mme a vhathu vhoṱhe." 
Genesis3:21 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a itela Adamu na musadzi wawe zwiambaro zwa mukumba a vha ambadza. 
Genesis3:22 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a ri, “Muthu zwino u vho nga riṋe, u vho ḓivha zwivhuya na zwivhi; a songo vhuya a tendelwa u swikisa tshanḓa tshawe na kha muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo, a u fula a ḽa, a vho ḓo tshila lini na lini.”" 
Genesis3:23 Muṋe washu Mudzimu a mu thatha tsimuni ya Edeni uri a lime mavu e a bviswa khao. 
Genesis3:24 O ri u pandela muthu, afho phanḓa ha tsimu ya Edeni a vhea vhakherube, na banga ḽa khavhu ya mulilo ḽi no penyisa phanḓa na murahu, u linda nḓila i yaho murini u ṋeaho vhutshilo." 
Genesis4:1 Adamu o dzhenisa musadzi wawe Efa nḓuni, Efa a vhifha muvhilini a beba Kaini, a ri, “Muṋe washu o mpfarisa nda beba munna.”" 
Genesis4:2 Ngavhuya a beba murathu wawe Abele. Abele o vha o fuwa dzinngu, Kaini a tshi lima masimu." 
Genesis4:3 Musi ho no fhela tshifhinga, Kaini a ḓisa mitshelo ye a lima, a i ita nduvho a ṋekedza Muṋe washu." 
Genesis4:4 Abele ene a nanga ngwana ya tanzhe, yo nonaho i no bva kha sambi ḽawe, a ṋekedza miraḓo yayo yavhuḓi. Muṋe washu a takalela Abele na nduvho yawe," 
Genesis4:5 hone a si takalele Kaini na nduvho yawe. Zwenezwo Kaini a sinyuwa nga maanḓa, a sinyalala." 
Genesis4:6 Muṋe washu a vhudzisa Kaini a ri, “Ndi mini wo sinyuwa? Ndi mini wo sinyalala?" 
Genesis4:7 Khezwi u sa iti zwivhuya, wa ṱanganedzwa. Hone wa sa ita zwivhuya, vhutshinyi ho u lalela vothini ḽau; vhu ṱoḓa u u ḽa, hone iwe wo fanela u vhu kunda.”" 
Genesis4:8 Huno muṅwe musi Kaini a vhudza murathu wawe a ri, “Nga ri bve ri ye ḓakani.” Musi vhe ḓakani a thoma u lwa na murathu wawe Abele a mu vhulaha." 
Genesis4:9 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudzisa Kaini a ri, “Murathu wau Abele u ngafhi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “A thi ḓivhi! Kani ndi nṋe mulisa wa murathu wanga?”" 
Genesis4:10 Muṋe washu a ri, “Wo ita zwithu-ḓe? A u pfi malofha a murathu wau a tshi khou nṱavhela mukosi e mavuni?" 
Genesis4:11 Zwino wo teketelwa, wo thathwa mavuni ayo e a aṱama mulomo a nwa malofha a murathu wau we wa mu vhulaha." 
Genesis4:12 U ḓo ri u tshi lima mavu a si tsha u ṋea zwiḽiwa. U ḓo tendeleka na ḽifhasi u sa aweli.” 
Genesis4:13 Kaini a vhudza Muṋe washu a ri, “Ṱhamu yanga ndi nga si kone u i konḓelela." 
Genesis4:14 Ṋamusi u khou nthatha shangoni, ndi ḓo dzumbama tshifhaṱuwo tshau; ndi ḓo tendeleka na ḽifhasi ndi sa aweli; ane a vhuya a ṱangana na nṋe u ḓo mmbulaha.”" 
Genesis4:15 Huno Muṋe washu a amba nae a ri, “A zwo ngo ralo; arali muthu a vhulaha Kaini, u ḓo lifhedzwa kaṱanu na kavhili.” Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhea Kaini luswayo, uri hu si vhe na a no ri u mu wana a mu vhulaha." 
Genesis4:16 Huno Kaini a ṱuwa maṱoni a Muṋe washu, a yo dzula shangoni ḽa Mutendeleko, vhubvaḓuvha ha Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini a dzhenisa musadzi wawe nḓuni, a vhifha muvhilini a beba Enokho. Zwenezwo Kaini o vha a tshi khou fhaṱa muḓi, a u rina dzina ḽa ṅwana wawe Enokho." 
Genesis4:18 Enokho a beba Iradi, khotsi a Mehuyaele, khotsi a Methushaele, khotsi a Lamekhe." 
Genesis4:19 Lamekhe a vhinga vhasadzi vhavhili, muṅwe a tshi pfi Ada, muṅwe a tshi pfi Tsila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada a beba Jabala; ene a vha khotsi a vhathu vha no fuwa zwifuwo vha tshi dzula dzidenndeni. 
Genesis4:21 Murathu wawe o vha a tshi pfi Jubala; ene o vha khotsi a vhathu vha no lidza mbila na zwiṱiringo. 
Genesis4:22 Tsila na ene a vha na ṅwana a no pfi Thubala Kaini; ene o vha a tshi fula zwithu zwa tshakha dzoṱhe nga tshirongana na ngweḓi. Khaladzi a Thubala Kaini o vha a tshi pfi Naama. 
Genesis4:23 Lamekhe a rendela vhasadzi vhawe tshirendo a ri, “Ada na Tsila, nthetsheleseni! Ipfani maipfi anga, inwi vhasadzi vha Lamekhe! Ndo vhulaha munna nge a mphula mbonzhe! Ndo vhulaha muṱhannga nge a nkhuvhadza!" 
Genesis4:24 Kaini u lifhedzelwa kaṱanu na kavhili. Lamekhe ene u ḓo lifhedzelwa lwa mahumi maṱanu na mavhili na kaṱanu na kavhili!” 
Genesis4:25 Adamu a dovha a dzhenisa musadzi wawe nḓuni, a beba mutukana, a ri u pfi Sethe, nge a ri, “Mudzimu o nṋea muṅwe ṅwana vhudzuloni ha Abele, vhunga Kaini o mu vhulaha.”" 
Genesis4:26 Sethe a vha na ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri u pfi Enosi. Misi yeneyo vhathu vha thoma u rabela Muṋe washu." 
Genesis5:1 Ngea mafhungo a lutsinga lwa Adamu. Zwiḽa Mudzimu a tshi sika muthu o mu fanyisa na Ene muṋe. 
Genesis5:2 O vha sika muṅwe e munna muṅwe e musadzi, a vha shudufhadza a ri vha pfi muthu." 
Genesis5:3 Musi Adamu o no vha na miṅwaha ya 130, a vha na ṅwana wa mutuka a no fana nae, wa tshivhumbeo tshi no tou nga tshawe vhukuma; a ri u pfi Sethe." 
Genesis5:4 Musi ho no bebiwa Sethe, Adamu a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 800, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:5 Adamu o tshila miṅwaha ya 930, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:6 Sethe ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 105, a vha khotsi a Enosi," 
Genesis5:7 musi o no beba Enosi, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 807, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:8 Sethe o tshila miṅwaha ya 912 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:9 Enosi ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 90, a vha khotsi a Kenani," 
Genesis5:10 musi o no beba Kenani, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 815, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:11 Enosi o tshila miṅwaha ya 905 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:12 Kenani ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 70, a vha khotsi a Mahalalele," 
Genesis5:13 musi o no beba Mahalalele, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 840, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:14 Kenani o tshila miṅwaha ya 910 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalele ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 65, a vha khotsi a Jarede," 
Genesis5:16 musi o no beba Jarede, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 830, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:17 Mahalalele o tshila miṅwaha ya 895 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:18 Jarede ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 162, a vha khotsi a Enokho," 
Genesis5:19 musi o no beba Enokho, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 800, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:20 Jarede o tshila miṅwaha ya 962 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:21 Enokho ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 65, a vha khotsi a Methushaele," 
Genesis5:22 musi o no beba Methushaele, a dovha a fhedza miṅwaha ya 300 a tshi ḓi konana na Mudzimu, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:23 Enokho o tshila miṅwaha ya 365 yo ṱangana. 
Genesis5:24 Enokho o vha a tshi konana na Mudzimu, a vhuya a nyamalala nge Mudzimu a mu dzhia a mu ṱuwisa." 
Genesis5:25 Methushaele ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 187, a vha khotsi a Lamekhe," 
Genesis5:26 musi o no beba Lamekhe, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 782, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:27 O tshila miṅwaha ya 969 yo ṱangana a konou fa. 
Genesis5:28 Lamekhe ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 182, a vha na ṅwana wa mutuka," 
Genesis5:29 a ri u pfi Nua, nge a ri, “Onoyu u ḓo ri khuthadza kha mishumo yashu na kha u tambula hashu ri tshi lima mavu e Muṋe washu a teketela.”" 
Genesis5:30 Musi Lamekhe o no beba Nua, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 595, a beba vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis5:31 Lamekhe o tshila miṅwaha ya 777 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis5:32 Nua ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 500, a vha khotsi a Semu na Hamu na Jafethe." 
Genesis6:1 Musi vhathu vha tshi thoma u anda fhano fhasi, hu tshi bebwa na vhana vha vhasidzana," 
Genesis6:2 vha no pfi vharwa vha Mudzimu vha vhona avho vhananyana vha vhathu vho naka, vha dzea ane vha tou mu funa." 
Genesis6:3 Huno Muṋe washu a ri, “Muya wanga a u tsha ḓo dzula tshoṱhe muthuni; u a fa; maḓuvha awe a ḓo vha miṅwaha ya 120.”" 
Genesis6:4 Misi iyo, na ngavhuya, ho vha hu na miswonḓa fhano fhasi, nge vha no pfi vharwa vha Mudzimu vha ya ha vhananyana vha vhathu vha beba vhana navho. Avho vhana ndi vhone vhahali vha kale, vhanna vha bvumo." 
Genesis6:5 Muṋe washu a vhona uri vhuvhi ha vhathu fhano fhasi ho no hulela, a vhona na uri mihumbulo yoṱhe i bvaho mbiluni dzavho yo dzula yo tshingamela vhuvhini fhedzi misi yoṱhe." 
Genesis6:6 Muṋe washu a ḓisola zwe a vhuya a vhumba muthu fhano fhasi, mbilu yawe ya vhavha." 
Genesis6:7 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ḓo fhedza vhathu vhe nda vha vhumba, ndi ḓo vha thutha fhano fhasi – vhathu na dziphukha, na zwivhumbwa zwi kokovhaho mavuni, na zwiṋoni, ngauri ndi a ḓisola ndi ri ndo zwi vhumbelani.”" 
Genesis6:8 We Muṋe washu a vha a tshi mu takalela ndi Nua fhedzi. 
Genesis6:9 Mafhungo a Nua ngea: Nua o vha e muvhuya; kha vhathu vha misi yawe o vha e ene fhedzi a sa solisei. O vha a tshi konana na Mudzimu. 
Genesis6:10 Nua o vha e na vhana vhararu vha vhatuka, Semu na Hamu na Jafethe." 
Genesis6:11 Zwino Mudzimu a vhona shango ḽo tshinyala, vhathu vha tshi huvhadzana." 
Genesis6:12 Mudzimu a vhona shango ḽo tou tshinyala tshoṱhe, vhathu vhoṱhe fhano fhasi vhó tou ḓikumedza u tshinya." 
Genesis6:13 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi amba na Nua a ri, “Ndi ḓo fhedza vhathu vhoṱhe; shango ḽo no ḓala u levhelana; vhukuma ndi ḓo lozwa zwoṱhe – vhathu na ḽifhasi." 
Genesis6:14 Zwenezwo ḓifhaṱele tshikepe nga miri yo khwaṱhaho, u ite phera ngomu hatsho, u tshi fhome nga tshikonṱiri ngomu na nnḓa." 
Genesis6:15 U tshi fhaṱe nga u rali: u navha hatsho tshi vhe mithara dza 150, vhuphara tshi vhe mithara dza 25, u ya nṱha tshi vhe mithara dza 15." 
Genesis6:16 Itsho tshikepe u tshi fulele, u sie tshikhala tshi no ita hafu ya mithara vhukati ha ṱhanga na nga matungo. Kwea vothi nga matungo. U ite zwitizi zwiraru." 
Genesis6:17 Nṋe nga ndoṱhe ndi ḓo ḓisa muḓalo wa maḓi kha ḽifhasi a lozwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwi re fhasi ha lutombo; zwi ḓo lovha zwoṱhe, vhathu na dziphukha." 
Genesis6:18 Huno ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga na iwe; u ḓo dzhena tshikepeni – iwe na vhana vhau vha vhatuka, na musadzi wau na vhasadzi vha vhana vhau." 
Genesis6:19 Ngomu tshikepeni u longe zwivhili-zwivhili zwa zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho – tshiduna na tshisadzi; u ḓitshidze nazwo. 
Genesis6:20 Hu ḓo ḓa zwivhili-zwivhili zwa zwiṋoni zwa tshakha dzoṱhe, na zwa zwifuwo zwa tshakha dzoṱhe; zwi ḓo ḓa ha iwe uri zwi tshidzwe." 
Genesis6:21 U longe tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwiḽiwa zwine zwa ḓo ḽiwa; u zwi vhulunge, zwi vhe zwiḽiwa zwau na zwazwo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nua a ita zwoṱhe nga he Mudzimu a mu laya. 
Genesis7:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Nua a ri, “Dzhena tshikepeni, iwe na muṱa wau woṱhe; ndo vhona e iwe fhedzi a re muvhuya kha vha murafho houno." 
Genesis7:2 Phukha dzoṱhe dzi ḽiwaho u longe zwiduna zwiṱanu na zwivhili na zwisadzi zwiṱanu na zwivhili zwa lushaka luṅwe na luṅwe, dzi sa ḽiwi u longe mbili, tshiduna na tshisadzi." 
Genesis7:3 U longe na zwiṋoni zwa lushaka luṅwe na luṅwe, zwiduna zwiṱanu na zwivhili na zwisadzi zwiṱanu na zwivhili, uri tshakha dzazwo dzo fhambanaho dzi si lovhe fhano shangoni." 
Genesis7:4 Hu ḓo ri ho no fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili u bva zwino, ḽifhasi nda ḽi nisela mvula ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao, nda lozwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwe nda zwi vhumba, zwa si tsha vha hone fhano fhasi.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nua a ita zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. 
Genesis7:6 Ḽifhasi ḽi tshi ḓelwa nga muḓalo wa maḓi, Nua o vha o no vha na miṅwaha ya 600." 
Genesis7:7 Nua na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na musadzi wawe na vhasadzi vha vhana vhawe vha dzhena tshikepeni uri vha tinye muḓalo wa maḓi. 
Genesis7:8 Ha ḓa zwivhili-zwivhili zwa phukha dzi ḽiwaho na dzi sa ḽiwi, na zwa zwiṋoni, na zwa zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni," 
Genesis7:9 tshiduna na tshisadzi, zwa dzhena tshikepeni, nga he Mudzimu a laya Nua." 
Genesis7:10 Musi ho no fhela ayo maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, ḽifhasi ḽa ḓelwa nga muḓalo wa maḓi." 
Genesis7:11 Nua o ri o no vha na miṅwaha ya 600, nga ḓuvha ḽa 17 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili – ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ha phulea zwisima zwoṱhe zwa mativha mahulu, mabuli oṱhe a muḓalo wa maḓi a ngei ṱaḓulu a vulea," 
Genesis7:12 mvula ya nela ḽifhasi ya fhedza maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao. 
Genesis7:13 Nga ḓuvha ḽeneḽo Nua na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka, Semu na Hamu na Jafethe, vha dzhena tshikepeni khathihi na musadzi wawe na vhasadzi vha vhana vhawe vhararu," 
Genesis7:14 vha dzhena na phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka dzi tshi ya nga tshakha dzadzo, na zwifuwo zwoṱhe zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi tshi ya nga tshakha dzazwo, na zwoṱhe zwi re na phapha." 
Genesis7:15 Ho ḓa zwivhili-zwivhili zwa zwivhumbwa zwi femaho, zwa ḓa ha Nua zwa dzhena tshikepeni." 
Genesis7:16 Phukha dzo dzhenaho dzo vha dzi tshiduna na tshisadzi tsha zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho, nga he Mudzimu a laya Nua. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mu hoṋela ngomu." 
Genesis7:17 Ha fhela maḓuvha a 40 ḽifhasi ḽi tshi khou ḓi hulelwa nga muḓalo wa maḓi. Musi maḓi a tshi ḓi anda, a takula tshikepe tsha papamala tsha si tsha kwama fhasi." 
Genesis7:18 Maḓi a takuwa a anda zwihulu a ḓadza ḽifhasi, tshikepe tsha papamala nṱha ha maḓi." 
Genesis7:19 A takuwa zwihulu a ḓadza ḽifhasi, thavha dzoṱhe dza miṱumba dzi re fhasi ha lutombo dza tibedzwa," 
Genesis7:20 maḓi a takuwa a tibedza dzithavha, a fhira miṱumba ya dzithavha nga mithara ṱhanu na mbili," 
Genesis7:21 zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho kha ḽifhasi zwa lovha – zwiṋoni na zwifuwo na phukha dza ḓaka na mutshatshame woṱhe wa zwivhumbwa fhano fhasi, na vhathu vhoṱhe;" 
Genesis7:22 zwoṱhe zwi femaho zwa shangoni ḽo omaho zwa fa. 
Genesis7:23 Muṋe washu o lozwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho, zwa si tsha vha hone fhano fhasi – vhathu na dziphukha na zwivhumbwa zwi kokovhaho mavuni na zwiṋoni, zwa tou swielwa fhano fhasi, ha sala Nua fhedzi na vhe vha vha vhe nae tshikepeni." 
Genesis7:24 Maḓi a ḓadza ḽifhasi ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha a 150. 
Genesis8:1 Huno Mudzimu a elelwa Nua na phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka na zwifuwo zwe zwa vha zwi nae tshikepeni, a ḓisa muya wa vhudzula ḽifhasi, maḓi a thoma u tsa," 
Genesis8:2 zwisima zwa mativha na mabuli a muḓalo wa maḓi a re lutomboni zwa hoṋiwa, mvula ya pfula." 
Genesis8:3 Maḓi o tibaho ḽifhasi a fhungudzea nga zwiṱuku. Musi hu tshi fhela maḓuvha a 150, maḓi a vha o no fhungudzea," 
Genesis8:4 nga ḓuvha ḽa 17 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili, tshikepe tsha dzula kha thavha ya Ararathi." 
Genesis8:5 Maḓi a ḓi fhungudzea a tshi ya u swika nga ṅwedzi wa fumi, huno nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi miṱumba ya dzithavha ya thoma u vhonala." 
Genesis8:6 Musi ho no fhela maḓuvha a 40, Nua a vula fasiṱere ḽa tshikepe ḽe a vha o kwea," 
Genesis8:7 a ruma funguvhu, ḽa ḓi fhufha ḽi tshi ya phanḓa na murahu maḓi o tibaho ḽifhasi a vhuya a xa." 
Genesis8:8 A konou ruma ḽiivha u yo sedza arali maḓi o no tsa, mavu a tshi vho vhonala." 
Genesis8:9 Hone ḽiivha ḽa si wane fhethu hune ḽa nga kavha hone, ngauri shango ḽo vha ḽi tshee ḽo ḓala maḓi; ḽa humela ha Nua tshikepeni. A bvisa tshanḓa tshawe, a dzhia ḽiḽa ḽiivha a ḽi humisela hune a vha hone ngomu tshikepeni." 
Genesis8:10 A lindela maṅwe maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, a dovha a ruma ḽiivha." 
Genesis8:11 Huno musi ḽiivha ḽi tshi humela khae nga madekwana, ḽa ḓa ḽo khuba ṱari ḽiṋu ḽa muolivi. Ndi hone Nua a tshi vho ḓivha uri maḓi a re shangoni o tsa." 
Genesis8:12 A lindela ha fhela maṅwe maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, a dovha hafhu a ruma ḽiivha, ḽone ḽa si tsha vhuya." 
Genesis8:13 Huno nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga, Nua ó no vha na miṅwaha ya 601, maḓi a vha o no xa shangoni. Ndi hone Nua a tshi rula ṱhanga ya tshikepe, a vhona uri mavu a nṱha o oma." 
Genesis8:14 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 27 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili ḽifhasi ḽa vha ḽo no oma tshoṱhe. 
Genesis8:15 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi amba na Nua a ri," 
Genesis8:16 “Ibva tshikepeni, iwe na musadzi wau na vhana vhau na vhasadzi vhavho." 
Genesis8:17 Vulela tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwivhumbwa dzi re na iwe – zwiṋoni na zwifuwo na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwine zwa kokovha mavuni, uri zwi ḓadze ḽifhasi, zwi bebe, zwi ande khaḽo.”" 
Genesis8:18 Huno Nua a bvela nnḓa, khathihi na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka, na musadzi wawe, na vhasadzi vha vhana vhawe." 
Genesis8:19 Phukha dzoṱhe na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni, na zwiṋoni zwoṱhe – zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho shangoni, zwa bva tshikepeni zwi tshi tevhekana nga dzitshakha." 
Genesis8:20 Huno Nua a fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari, a dzhia zwiṅwe zwa zwifuwo zwoṱhe zwi ḽiwaho na zwiṋoni zwi ḽiwaho, a ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo khayo." 
Genesis8:21 Muṋe washu a pfa zwi tshi nukhelela, a amba nga mbilu a ri, “A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda teketela mavu nga mulandu wa muthu, hufha nzulele yawe yo tshingamela vhuvhini u bva hanani hawe. A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda lozwa zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho sa zwe nda ita." 
Genesis8:22 “Musi shango ḽi tshee hone, zwifhinga zwa u zwala na u kaṋa, u rothola na u fhisa, tshilimo na vhuriha, vhusiku na masiari, zwi ḓo ḓi vha hone.”" 
Genesis9:1 Huno Mudzimu a shudufhadza Nua na vhana vhawe, a amba navho a ri, “Bebani ni ande ni ḓadze ḽifhasi." 
Genesis9:2 Phukha dzoṱhe dza shango dzi ḓo ni ofha, na zwiṋoni, na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho mavuni, na khovhe dzoṱhe dza lwanzheni – zwoṱhe hezwo zwo kumedzwa zwanḓani zwaṋu." 
Genesis9:3 Zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwi tshatshamaho fhano fhasi zwi ḓo vha zwiḽiwa zwaṋu. Vhunga ndo ni ṋea zwimela, zwino ndi ni ṋea zwithu zwoṱhe uri ni zwi ḽe," 
Genesis9:4 hone ṋama ine ya kha ḓi vha na malofha ngomu hayo ni i ile; malofha ndi vhutshilo. 
Genesis9:5 Ane a fhaladza malofha aṋu ndi ḓo mu lifhedza, ngauri malofha aṋu ndi hone vhutshilo haṋu; phukha ya vhulaha muthu, i ḓo vhulawa; muthu a vhulaha muṅwe u ḓo vhulawa." 
Genesis9:6 “Wa shulula malofha a muthu, na iwe u ḓo vhulawa nga muthu; Mudzimu o vhumba muthu a tshi ḓifanyisa." 
Genesis9:7 Inwi bebani ni ande, ḓadzani ḽifhasi ni tshatshame khaḽo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Mudzimu o amba na Nua na vhana vhawe a ri," 
Genesis9:9 “Zwino ndi vhofha mulanga na inwi na vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu vhane vha kha ḓi ḓo bebwa," 
Genesis9:10 na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi na inwi – zwiṋoni na zwifuwo na phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka – zwoṱhe zwe na bva nazwo tshikepeni, zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho fhano fhasi." 
Genesis9:11 Ndi vhofha mulanga wanga na inwi, ndi ri: Zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho a zwi tsha ḓo dovha zwa lozwiwa nga muḓalo wa maḓi; a hu tsha ḓo dovha ha vha na muḓalo wa maḓi une wa ḓo lozwa ḽifhasi.”" 
Genesis9:12 Mudzimu a ri, “Ngetshi tshiga tsha mulanga une nda ḓo u vhofha na inwi, inwi na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwine zwa vha na inwi, mulanga wa mirafho yoṱhe ine ya kha ḓi ḓa:" 
Genesis9:13 Ndo vhea musingavhadzimu wanga makoleni, u ḓo vha tshone tshiga tsha mulanga une nda u vhofha na ḽifhasi." 
Genesis9:14 Arali nda ḓisa makole a tiba ḽifhasi, ha vhonala musingavhadzimu makoleni," 
Genesis9:15 ndi ḓo elelwa mulanga wanga we nda vhofha na inwi na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwa tshakha dzoṱhe. Maḓi ha tsha ḓo dovha a ḓala a lozwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho. 
Genesis9:16 Ha vhuya ha vhonala musingavhadzimu makoleni, ndi ḓo u vhona nda elelwa mulanga wanga wa lini na lini we nda vhofha na zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho zwa tshakha-tshakha fhano fhasi.”" 
Genesis9:17 Mudzimu a amba na Nua a ri, “Hetsho ndi tshone tshiga tsha mulanga we nda u vhofha na zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho fhano fhasi.”" 
Genesis9:18 Vhana vha Nua vhe vha bva tshikepeni ndi Semu na Hamu na Jafethe (Hamu ndi khotsi a Kanana). 
Genesis9:19 Havho ndi vhone vhana vha Nua vhararu vha vhatuka; ndi vhone vho bebaho vhathu vhe vha sala vha tshi balangana na shango. 
Genesis9:20 Nua o vha e mulimi; a mbo ḓi thoma u lima tsimu ya minḓirivhe. 
Genesis9:21 A ri u nwa waini yayo a kambiwa, a lala denndeni a songo fuka tshithu." 
Genesis9:22 Huno Hamu khotsi a Kanana a vhona khotsi awe vhe fhedzi, a yo vhudza vhakomana vhawe vhe vha vha vhe nnḓa." 
Genesis9:23 Semu na Jafethe vha dzhia nguvho, vha i kapea mahaḓani avho ya tou buḓa, vha dzhena nga tsha murahu, vha fukedza khotsi avho, vha lavhelesa thungo uri vha si vhone khotsi avho vhe fhedzi." 
Genesis9:24 Nua a kambuluwa a karuwa, a pfa zwe ṅwana wawe muṱuku a mu ita," 
Genesis9:25 a ri, “Kanana nga a teketelwe! U ḓo vha phuli i nyadzeaho ya vhana vha mme awe.”" 
Genesis9:26 A ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Semu; ngavhe Kanana a tshi vha phuli ya Semu!" 
Genesis9:27 Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi engedzedza shango ḽa Jafethe; ngavhe Jafethe a tshi dzula denndeni dza Semu, Kanana a vha phuli yawe!”" 
Genesis9:28 Huno musi muḓalo wa maḓi wo no fhira, Nua a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 350." 
Genesis9:29 Nua a tshila miṅwaha ya 950 yo ṱangana, a konou fa." 
Genesis10:1 Vhaḓuhulu vha Semu na Hamu na Jafethe, vhana vha Nua, ngevha. Vho vha beba ho no fhira muḓalo wa maḓi." 
Genesis10:2 Vhana vha Jafethe vha vhatuka ndi Gomere na Magogo na Madai na Javani na Thubala na Meshekhe na Thirasi. 
Genesis10:3 Vhana vha Gomere vha vhatuka ndi Ashikenasi na Rifathi na Thogarama. 
Genesis10:4 Vhana vha Javani ndi Elisha na Tharashishi na Vhakipirosi na Vhadodani. 
Genesis10:5 Vhenevho ndi vhomakhulukuku wa vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe, vha balangana na mashango avho zwi tshi ya nga nyambo na mitupo na tshakha dzavho." 
Genesis10:6 Vhana vha Hamu ndi Kushu na Mitsiraimi na Phuthi na Kanana. 
Genesis10:7 Vhana vha Kushu ndi Seba na Havila na Sabutha na Raama na Sabuthekha. Vhana vha Raama ndi Sheba na Dedani. 
Genesis10:8 Kushu ndi khotsi a Nimirodo; ene o ḓo vha muhali muhulu wa u ranga fhano shangoni. 
Genesis10:9 Na Muṋe washu o vhona e muzwimi wa nungo. Ndi zwine ha pfi, “Mukene u nga Nimirodo, ane Muṋe washu a vhona e muzwimi wa nungo.”" 
Genesis10:10 O ranga u vhusa Babele na Erekhe na Akhadi na Khalane e shangoni ḽa Shinari. 
Genesis10:11 U bva shangoni ḽeneḽo a ya Ashuru, a fhaṱa miḓi ya Ninive na Rehobotho Iri na Khala" 
Genesis10:12 na Reseni, une wa vha vhukati ha Ninive na Khala, wone muḓi muhulu." 
Genesis10:13 Mitsiraimi ndi khotsi a vhathu vha Ludi na Anamu na Lehabu na Nafuthu 
Genesis10:14 na Phathirosi na Khasilu (ene khotsi a Vhafilista) na Khafuthoro. 
Genesis10:15 Tanzhe ḽa Kanana ndi Sidoni, ha tevhela Hethe" 
Genesis10:16 na Vhajebusi na Vhaamori na Vhagirigashi 
Genesis10:17 na Vhahivi na Vhaariki na Vhasini 
Genesis10:18 na Vhaaravadi na Vhatsemari na Vhahamathi. Ngavhuya vha mitupo ya Kanana vha balangana," 
Genesis10:19 mikano ya Kanana ya bva Sidoni ya swika Gerara ya guma Gaza, ya vhuya ya guma Sodoma na Gomora na Adima na Tseboimi, u vhuya u swika Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ndi vhone vhana vha Hamu zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho na nyambo, zwi tshi ya nga mashango avho na dzitshakha." 
Genesis10:21 Semu mukomana wa Jafethe na ene a beba vhana. Ndi ene makhulukuku wa vhana vhoṱhe vha Ebere, vhone Vhaheberu." 
Genesis10:22 Vhana vha Semu ndi Elamu na Ashuru na Ariphakhadi na Ludi na Aramu. 
Genesis10:23 Vhana vha Aramu ndi Utsi na Hulu na Gethere na Mashi. 
Genesis10:24 Ariphakhadi ndi khotsi a Shela khotsi a Ebere. 
Genesis10:25 Ebere o vha na vhana vhavhili: muṅwe o vha a tshi pfi Phelege, ngauri misi yawe vhathu vha ḽifhasi vho vha vho fhandekana; murathu wawe o vha a tshi pfi Jokotani." 
Genesis10:26 Jokotani ndi khotsi a Alimodadi na Shelefe na Hatsaramavethe na Jera 
Genesis10:27 na Hadoramu na Uzali na Dikila 
Genesis10:28 na Obala na Abimaele na Sheba 
Genesis10:29 na Ofiri na Havila na Jobaba. Vhoṱhe havho ndi vhana vha Jokotani. 
Genesis10:29 na Ofiri na Havila na Jobaba. Vhoṱhe havho ndi vhana vha Jokotani. 
Genesis10:30 Shango ḽe vha vha vha tshi dzula khaḽo ndi u bva Mesha u swika Sefara, shangoni ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ḽa zwivhanga." 
Genesis10:31 Havho ndi vhone vhana vha Semu zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho na dzinyambo, zwi tshi ya nga mashango avho na dzitshakha." 
Genesis10:32 Ndi yone mitupo ya vhana vha Nua vha vhatuka zwi tshi ya nga lutsinga lwa vhubvo havho kha tshakha dzavho. Tshakha dzo balanganaho na ḽifhasi ho no fhira muḓalo wa maḓi dzi bva kha vhenevho. 
Genesis11:1 Huno shango ḽoṱhe ḽo vha ḽi na luambo luthihi na maambele a no fana. 
Genesis11:2 Huno musi vhathu vha tshi ṱutshela vhubvaḓuvha vha wana mudavhi shangoni ḽa Shiniari, vha dzula hone." 
Genesis11:3 Vha vhudzana vha ri, “Iḓani ri forome zwidina ri zwi fhise zwavhuḓi!” Vha fhaṱa nga zwidina vha litsha matombo, vha shuma nga tshikonṱiri vha litsha matope." 
Genesis11:4 Vha ri, “Iḓani, nga ri ḓifhaṱele muḓi u re na mutsheṱo u no guma nga makole, ri vhe na bvumo, ri si tsha ḓo balangana na ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe!”" 
Genesis11:5 Huno Muṋe washu a tsela fhasi u ḓa u ṱola uyo muḓi na mutsheṱo we vhathu vha vha vha tshi khou u fhaṱa. 
Genesis11:6 Muṋe washu a ri, “Khezwi, vhoṱhe ndi lushaka luthihi, vha amba luambo luthihi; ndi hone vha tshi tou thoma mishumo yavho! A hu tshee na tshine vha ḓo ri u dzudzanya uri vha tshi ite, tsha vha kunda." 
Genesis11:7 Iḓani ri tsele fhasi ri yo piringanya luambo lwavho, uri vha tshi amba vha si tsha pfana!”" 
Genesis11:8 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vha balanganya na ḽifhasi vha tshi bva henefho, uyo muḓi vha si tsha u fhaṱa." 
Genesis11:9 Ndi zwe wa pfi Babele, nge Muṋe washu a piringanya luambo lwa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe henefho. U bva henefho Muṋe washu a vha balanganya na ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Genesis11:10 Vhaḓuhulu vha Semu ngevha: Musi ho no fhela miṅwaha mivhili tshee muḓalo wa maḓi wa fhira, Semu ó no ḓi vha na miṅwaha ya ḓana, a konou vha khotsi a Ariphakhadi." 
Genesis11:11 Musi o no vha khotsi a Ariphakhadi, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 500, a beba vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:12 Musi Ariphakhadi o no vha na miṅwaha ya 35 a vha khotsi a Shela. 
Genesis11:13 Musi o no beba Shela, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 403, a beba vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:14 Musi Shela o no vha na miṅwaha ya 30 a vha khotsi a Ebere. 
Genesis11:15 Musi o no beba Ebere, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 403, a beba vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:16 Musi Ebere o no vha na miṅwaha ya 34, a vha khotsi a Phelege." 
Genesis11:17 Musi o no beba Phelege, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 430, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:18 Musi Phelege o no vha na miṅwaha ya 30, a vha khotsi a Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Musi o no beba Reu, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 209, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:20 Musi Reu o no vha na miṅwaha ya 32, a vha khotsi a Serugu." 
Genesis11:21 Musi o no beba Serugu, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 207, a beba vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:22 Musi Serugu o no vha na miṅwaha ya 30, a vha khotsi a Nahoro." 
Genesis11:23 Musi o no beba Nahoro, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 200, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:24 Musi Nahoro o no vha na miṅwaha ya 29, a vha khotsi a Thera." 
Genesis11:25 Musi o no beba Thera, a dovha a tshila miṅwaha ya 119, a vha na vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatukana vha vhasidzana." 
Genesis11:26 Musi Thera o no vha na miṅwaha ya 70, a vha khotsi a Abramu na Nahoro na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Vhaḓuhulu vha Thera ngevha: Thera o vha khotsi a Abramu na Nahoro na Harani, Harani a vha khotsi a Loto." 
Genesis11:28 Harani o fela Uru wa Vhakhaladia, shangoni ḽe a bebwa khaḽo. Izwo ndi musi khotsi awe Thera a tshi kha ḓi tshila." 
Genesis11:29 Abramu na Nahoro vhuvhili havho vha dzea vhasadzi. Musadzi wa Abramu o vha a tshi pfi Sarai, wa Nahoro a tshi pfi Milikha; o vha e ṅwananyana wa Harani khotsi a Milikha na Isikha." 
Genesis11:30 Huno Sarai o vha e muumba, a si na ṅwana." 
Genesis11:31 Thera a dzhia ṅwana wawe Abramu na muḓuhulu wawe Loto ṅwana wa Harani, na Sarai mazwale wawe musadzi wa Abramu, vha pfuluwa Uru wa Vhakhaladia vha livha Kanana. Huno musi vha tshi swika Harani vha mbo ḓi dzula hone." 
Genesis11:32 Thera o tshila miṅwaha ya 205, a fela Harani." 
Genesis12:1 Muṋe washu o amba na Abramu a ri, “Pfuluwa shangoni ḽa hau, u ṱutshele vhathu vha hau na muṱa wa khotsi au, u pfulutshele shangoni ḽine nda ḓo u sumbedza." 
Genesis12:2 Ndi ḓo u ita lushaka luhulu, nda u shudufhadza; ndi ḓo hudza dzina ḽau; u ḓo ḓisela vhathu mashudu!" 
Genesis12:3 Ndi ḓo shudufhadza vhane vha u shudufhadza; ane a vhuya a u sema, ndi ḓo mu teketela; tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓo wana mashudu nga iwe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Ndi hone Abramu a tshi pfuluwa nga he Muṋe washu a mu vhudza; Loto a ṱuwa nae. Abramu a tshi pfuluwa Harani o vha e na miṅwaha ya 75. 
Genesis12:5 O ṱuwa na musadzi wawe Sarai na Loto ṅwana wa murathu wawe na thundu yoṱhe ye vha vha vhe nayo, na phuli dze vha dzi wana Harani, vha takuwa vha livha shangoni ḽa Kanana, vha vhuya vha swika." 
Genesis12:6 Abramu a buḓekanya shango a vhuya a swika fhethu ha muri muhulu wa More muḓini wa Shikheme. O wana Vhakanana vha tshi kha ḓi dzula shangoni iḽo," 
Genesis12:7 hone Muṋe washu a ḓa ha Abramu a ri, “Shango heḽi ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhana vhau.” Henefho a fhaṱela Mune washu we a ḓa khae aḽiṱari." 
Genesis12:8 U bva henefho a tshimbila o livha zwivhangani zwi re vhubvaḓuvha ha Bethele, a akha dennde yawe, Bethele o hu sumbela vhukovhela, Ai o hu sumbela vhubvaḓuvha. Henefho a fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari, a mu rabela." 
Genesis12:9 Ndi hone Abramu a tshi takuwa a tshimbila o livha tshipembe. 
Genesis12:10 Huno ha wa nḓala shangoni iḽo, Abramu a tsela Egipita a yo dzula hone tshifhinganyana, nge nḓala ya vha i khulu." 
Genesis12:11 Musi a tshi ṱoḓou dzhena Egipita, a vhudza musadzi wawe Sarai a ri, “Ndi a ḓivha uri no naka;" 
Genesis12:12 musi Vhaegipita vha tshi ni vhona vha ḓo ri, ‘Hoyu ndi musadzi wawe,’ vha mmbulaha, inwi vha ni litsha na tshila." 
Genesis12:13 Inwi ni vha vhudze uri ni khaladzi anga, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo mpfara zwavhuḓi vha tshi itela inwi, vha nnditsha nda tshila vha tshi itela inwi.”" 
Genesis12:14 Musi Abramu a tshi swika Egipita, Vhaegipita vha vhona uri Sarai ndi musadzi wa lunako vhukuma." 
Genesis12:15 Musi magota a Farao vha tshi vhona Sarai, vha mu khoḓa vha tshi vhudza Farao, Sarai a dzhiwa a iswa pfamoni ya Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Farao a tonda Abramu a tshi itela Sarai, a mu fha nngu na kholomo na donngi dza mboho na dza tsadzi, na phuli dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi, na dzigamela." 
Genesis12:17 Huno Muṋe washu a ḓisela Farao na muṱa wawe vhulwadze vhu ofhisaho nga mulandu wa Sarai musadzi wa Abramu. 
Genesis12:18 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vhidzisa Abramu. A mu vhudzisa a ri, “No nnyita zwithu-ḓe? Ndi mini ni songo mmbudza uri ndi musadzi waṋu?" 
Genesis12:19 Ndi mini no ri ndi khaladzi aṋu, nda vhuya nda mu dzhia nda mu ita musadzi wanga? Zwino-ha, musadzi waṋu ngoyu! Mu dzhieni ni ṱuwe!”" 
Genesis12:20 Ndi hone Farao a tshi ruma vhalanda vhawe uri vha fhelekedze Abramu na musadzi wawe na zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo. 
Genesis13:1 Huno Abramu a ṱuwa Egipita a livha Negeve e na musadzi wawe na thundu yawe, na Loto a ṱuwa nae." 
Genesis13:2 Abramu o vha o pfuma zwihulu nga thakha na siliva na musuku. 
Genesis13:3 U bva Negeve a tendeleka a tshi ṱoka a tshi ṱokolola a vhuya a swika Bethele, fhaḽa marubini awe vhukati ha Bethele na Ai," 
Genesis13:4 he a ranga u fhaṱa aḽiṱari. Henefho Abramu a rabela. 
Genesis13:5 Huno Loto o vha a tshi ḓi tendeleka na Abramu. Na ene o vha e na masambi a dzinngu na kholomo, na dzidennde." 
Genesis13:6 Hone pfulo yo vha i sa eḓani uri vha dzule fhethu huthihi, ngauri vho vha vhe na thakha nnzhi lwe u dzula vhoṱhe zwa si tende." 
Genesis13:7 Vhalisa vha Abramu na vha Loto vha thoma u fhiriṱana – hafhu na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi vho vha vha tshi dzula-vho henefho shangoni ḽeneḽo. 
Genesis13:8 Abramu a vhudza Loto a ri, “Nṋe na inwi ri songo vhuya ra fhiriṱana; na vhalisa vhashu vha songo lwa, hufha ri vhathihi." 
Genesis13:9 Shango a ḽo ngo aṱama naa? Nga ri fhandekane; arali inwi na ṱutshela thungo ya tshamonde, nṋe ndi ḓo ṱutshela thungo ya tshauḽa; arali na ṱutshela thungo ya tshauḽa, nṋe ndi ḓo ṱutshela thungo ya tshamonde.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loto a livha-livha a vhona govha ḽoṱhe ḽa Jorodani u swika Tsuara ḽi na maḓi manzhi, ḽi tshi nga Ngade ya Muṋe washu, ya Edeni, ḽi tshi nga shango ḽa Egipita. (Hezwo zwo itea miḓi ya Sodoma na Gomora i sa athu phusukanywa.)" 
Genesis13:11 Loto a ḓikhethela govha ḽoṱhe ḽa Jorodani, a takuwa a livha vhubvaḓuvha; vhanna avho vhavhili vha mbo ḓi fhandekana," 
Genesis13:12 Abramu a dzula shangoni ḽa Kanana, Loto a dzula vhukati ha miḓi ya govhani, a vhuya a akha dennde dzawe tsini ha Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Huno vhathu vha Sodoma vho vha vhe vhavhi, vha tshi khakhela Muṋe washu zwihulu." 
Genesis13:14 Musi Loto na Abramu vho no fhandekana, Muṋe washu a amba na Abramu a ri, “Takusa maṱo au u henefho hune wa vha hone, u sedze devhula na tshipembe, vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela." 
Genesis13:15 Shango ḽoṱhe ḽine wa ḽi vhona ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea iwe na vhana vhau, ḽa vha ḽaṋu lini na lini." 
Genesis13:16 Ndi ḓo andisa vhana vhau vha nga buse ḽa ḽifhasi; arali hu na ane a nga kona u vhala buse, izwo na vhana vhau a nga vha vhala." 
Genesis13:17 Takuwa u tshimbile u tshi tandula masia oṱhe a shango heḽi, ndi khou ḽi ṋea iwe.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ndi hone Abramu a tshi hwala dennde dzawe, a yo dzula tsini ha miri mihulu ya Mamuri muḓini wa Hebroni, a fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari henefho." 
Genesis14:1 Misi yeneyo Amurafele khosi ya Shiniari na Ariokho khosi ya Elasara na Khedorolaomere khosi ya Elamu na Thidiala khosi ya tshakha nnzhi 
Genesis14:2 vha yo lwa na Bera khosi ya Sodoma na Birisha khosi ya Gomora na Shinaba khosi ya Adima na Shemebere khosi ya Tseboimi na khosi ya Bela (Bela ndi Tsuara). 
Genesis14:3 Mahosi hayo maṱanu o ima oṱhe a bva pfumo a yo lwa govhani ḽa Sidimu (Govha ḽa Sidimu ndi Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo). 
Genesis14:4 Ho vha ho fhela miṅwaha ya 12 vha tshi luvha Khedorolaomere, hone nga ṅwaha wa 13 vha mu shandukela." 
Genesis14:5 Huno nga ṅwaha wa 14 Khedorolaomere na mahosi e a ima nae vha bva pfumo, vha kunda Vharefai vha Ashtherotho Karanaimi na Vhazuzi vha Hamu, na Vhaemi vha vha kunda mudavhini wa Kiriathaimi," 
Genesis14:6 Vhahori vha vha kunda zwivhangani zwa shango ḽa Seiri, u vhuya u swika Elepharani tsini ha phanga." 
Genesis14:7 Zwenezwo vha humela murahu, vha ya Tshisimani tsha Khaṱhulo (ndi Kadeshe), vha kunda shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhaamaleke na ḽa Vhaamori vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Hatsatsoni Thamara." 
Genesis14:8 Ndi hone mahosi a Sodoma na Gomora na Adima na Tseboimi na Bela (Bela ndi Tsuara) vha tshi takutshedza vha ima na mmbi dzavho govhani ḽa Sidimu," 
Genesis14:9 vha lwa na Khedorolaomere khosi ya Elamu na Thidiala khosi ya tshakha nnzhi na Amurafele khosi ya Shiniari na Ariokho khosi ya Elasara – mahosi maṋa a tshi lwa na maṱanu. 
Genesis14:10 Zwino govha ḽa Sidimu ḽo vha ḽo ḓala milindi ya tshikonṱiri; musi mahosi a Sodoma na Gomora a tshi shavha, vha wela ngomu hayo, vhaṅwe vha shavhela zwivhangani." 
Genesis14:11 Mahosi aḽa maṋa a thuba thundu yoṱhe ya Sodoma na Gomora, na zwiḽiwa zwavho zwoṱhe, vha konou ṱuwa." 
Genesis14:12 Vha hwala na Loto ṅwana wa murathu wa Abramu, vha ṱuwa nae na thundu dzawe, ngauri o vha a tshi dzula Sodoma." 
Genesis14:13 Muṅwe we a ponyoka a ḓa ha Abramu wa Muheberu a mu vhudza hayo mafhungo. Abramu o vha a tshi dzula tsini ha miri mihulu ya Mamuri wa Muamori, murathu wa Eshkolo na Anere. Vhoṱhe vhenevho vho vha vho vhofha mulanga na Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Musi Abramu a tshi pfa uri shaka ḽawe ḽo thubiwa, a vhidza vhanna vha 318 vho bebwaho muṱani wawe, vho gudiswaho zwa nndwa, a tevhela aḽa mahosi a vhuya a swika Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Abramu a khethekanya vhanna vhawe vha ita zwigwada zwivhili, vha vha wela vhukati ha vhusiku, vha vha kunda, vha vha vhilimedza u vhuya u swika Hoba, devhula ha Damasko." 
Genesis14:16 A dzhiulula thundu yoṱhe, a vhuya na shaka ḽawe Loto na thundu dzawe, khathihi na vhasadzi na vhaṅwe vhathu vhoṱhe." 
Genesis14:17 Musi Abramu o no vhuya a tshi bva u kunda Khedorolaomere na mahosi e a ima nae, khosi ya Sodoma ya ya u mu ṱanganedza govhani ḽa Shave (ndi govha ḽa Khosi)." 
Genesis14:18 Zwenezwo Melkitsedeke khosi ya Salema a ḓa na vhurotho na waini. O vha e tshifhe wa Mudzimu Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu. 
Genesis14:19 O shudufhadza Abramu a ri, “Abramu nga a shudufhadzwe nga Mudzimu Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
Genesis14:20 Nga hu rendwe Mudzimu Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu we a mu kumedza maswina awe.” Ndi hone Abramu a tshi mu ṋea tshafumi tsha zwithu zwoṱhe zwe a thuba. 
Genesis14:21 Khosi ya Sodoma ya vhudza Abramu ya ri, “Kha vha mphe vhathu, thundu vha ḓidzhiele zwavho.”" 
Genesis14:22 Hone Abramu a vhudza khosi ya Sodoma a ri, “Ndo imisa tshanḓa nda anela Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi," 
Genesis14:23 nda ri a thi nga ṱanganedzi tshithu tshavho na tshithihi – na harani zwayo kana luzwa lwa navhula, vhone vha sa ḓo ri, ‘Ndi nṋe ndo pfumisaho Abramu.’" 
Genesis14:24 Nṋe a thi nga ṱanganedzi tshithu; zwine nda ḓo ṱanganedza ndi zwe zwa ḽiwa nga vhanna vhanga; hone vhe vha bva pfumo na nṋe, Anere na Eshkolo na Mamuri, vhone kha vha wane mukovhe wavho.”" 
Genesis15:1 Musi zwo no ralo, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Abramu nga bono ḽa ri, “Abramu, u songo ofha, ndi Nṋe tshiṱangu tshau, ndi tou vha yone pfufho yau khulu.”" 
Genesis15:2 Abramu a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, nṋe u nga nṋea mini? Hufha na ṅwana ndi si na. Ifa ḽanga ḽi ḓo ḽiwa nga Eliesere wa Damasko?”" 
Genesis15:3 Abramu a dovha a ri, “A wo ngo nṋea vhana; phuli i re muṱani wanga u ḓo vha ene muḽaifa wanga.”" 
Genesis15:4 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa khae ḽa ri, “Hoyo munna a nga si vhe ene muḽaifa wau; a no ḓo vha muḽaifa wau ndi ṅwana ane wa ḓo mu beba.”" 
Genesis15:5 A dzhia Abramu a bvela nae nnḓa, a ri, “Sedza ṱaḓulu u vhone dziṋaledzi. U nga kona u dzi vhala naa?” Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Vhana vhau vha ḓo anda nga u ralo.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abramu a fulufhela Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a vhona u fulufhela hawe hu hone u ita zwi re zwone." 
Genesis15:7 Muṋe washu a dovha a amba na Abramu a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee we a u pfulusa Uru wa Vhakhaladia nda u ṋea shango heḽino uri ḽi vhe ḽau.”" 
Genesis15:8 Abramu a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo zwi ḓivha hani uri ḽi ḓo vha ḽanga?”" 
Genesis15:9 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Nnḓisele tholehadzi na mbudzi na thutha, iṅwe na iṅwe i na miṅwaha miraru, na ḽiivha na fhondo ḽa ḽiivha.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abramu a mu ḓisela zwoṱhe hezwo, a zwi fhandula nga vhukati, a vhekanya zwipiḓa izwo zwo livhana, zwiivha zwone a si zwi fhandule nga vhukati." 
Genesis15:11 Maanga a tsela kha izwo zwitumbu, Abramu a a shusha." 
Genesis15:12 Musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi vho kovhela Abramu e nga khofhe mbwandaa, a farwa nga nyofho, a tibwa nga swiswi ḽihulu." 
Genesis15:13 Muṋe washu a amba nae a ri, “Ḓivha uri vhana vhau vha ḓo dzula shangoni ḽi si ḽavho vhe vhatsinda, vha itwa dziphuli vha tambudzwa ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 400." 
Genesis15:14 Huno lushaka lune lwa vha ita dziphuli ndi ḓo lu rwa, vhone vha fhedza nga u pfuluwa vhe na thundu nnzhi." 
Genesis15:15 Iwe naho zwo ralo u ḓo yo eḓela na vhokhotsi au nga mulalo, wa swiṱwa wo no kalaha zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis15:16 Hu ḓo ri kha murafho wa vhuṋa, vhaḓuhulu vhau vha vhuelela henefhano, ngauri hezwino Vhaamori a vha athu khunyeledza vhuvhi havho.”" 
Genesis15:17 Musi ḓuvha ḽo no kovhela, ho no vha na swiswi, ha bvelela ṋanḓo i dubaho vhutsi na khavhu ya mulilo, ya fhira vhukati ha izwo zwipiḓa." 
Genesis15:18 Musi wonoyo Muṋe washu a vhofha mulanga na Abramu a ri, “Shango heḽino ndi ḽi ṋea vhana vhau, u bva mulamboni wa Egipita u swika mulamboni muhulu wa Yufuratha –" 
Genesis15:19 shango ḽa Vhakeni na Vhakenisi na Vhakadimoni 
Genesis15:20 na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vharefai 
Genesis15:21 na Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhagirigashi na Vhajebusi.” 
Genesis16:1 Huno Sarai musadzi wa Abramu o vha a sa athu mu bebela ṅwana. O vha e na phuli yawe ya musidzana wa Muegipita a no pfi Hagara. 
Genesis16:2 Huno a vhudza Abramu a ri, “Muṋe washu o nnzima vhana; phuli yanga ya musidzana ngei, nga vha mu dzhenise nḓuni; khamusi ene a nga mphaṱela muṱa.” Abramu a tenda zwe zwa ambiwa nga Sarai," 
Genesis16:3 Sarai a dzhia Hagara phuli yawe ya musidzana wa Muegipita, a mu ṋea munna wawe uri a vhe musadzi wawe. Zwenezwo Abramu o vha o no vha na fumi ḽa miṅwaha e Kanana." 
Genesis16:4 Abramu a dzhenisa Hagara nḓuni, a vhifha muvhilini. Musi a tshi vho ḓivha uri o vhifha muvhilini, a vho thoma u nyadza Sarai muṋe wa muṱa." 
Genesis16:5 Ndi hone Sarai a tshi vhudza Abramu a ri, “Ndi tshi tambula nga u rali ndi mulandu wavho. Ndi nṋe ndo vha kumedzaho iyi phuli yanga, hone zwino a tshi vho vhona uri o vhifha muvhilini, u vho nnyadza; ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi haṱula a re na mulandu kha nṋe na vhone!”" 
Genesis16:6 Abramu a ri, “Phuli yaṋu i zwanḓani zwaṋu; mu iteni zwine na funa.” Ndi hone Sarai a tshi tambudza Hagara; a vhuya a mu shavha." 
Genesis16:7 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a wana Hagara phangani, tshisimani tsha maḓi tshi re tsini ha gondo ḽi yaho Shuru." 
Genesis16:8 Muruṅwa a ri, “Iwe Hagara phuli ya Sarai, u bva ngafhi? U ya ngafhi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi khou shavha Sarai muṋe wa muṱa.”" 
Genesis16:9 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Humela ha muṋe wa muṱa u mu luvhe.”" 
Genesis16:10 Muruṅwa a dovha a ri, “Ndi ḓo andisa vhana vhau ha si vhe na ane a nga kona u vha vhala.”" 
Genesis16:11 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a dovha a mu vhudza a ri, “Zwino wo vhifha muvhilini, u ḓo vha na ṅwana wa mutukana. U ḓo mu rina dzina ḽa Ishmaele (Mudzimu-o-pfa), ngauri Yahavee o pfa u tambula hau." 
Genesis16:12 Uyo mutukana u ḓo vha munna a no nga mbiḓi i sa langiwi nga muthu; u ḓo lwa na vhathu vhoṱhe, vhoṱhe vha ḓo lwa nae; a hu na shaka ḽawe ḽine a ḓo pfana naḽo.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagara a rina Muṋe washu we a amba nae dzina a ri, “Ndi Iwe Mudzimu ane a mmbona”, nge a ri, “Vhukuma, we a mmbona, nṋe ndo mu vhona-vho!”" 
Genesis16:14 Ndi zwine tshisima itsho tsha pfi Lakhai Roi (Tshisima tsha a tshilaho ane a mmbona). Tshi vhukati ha Kadeshe na Berede. 
Genesis16:15 Hagara a bebela Abramu ṅwana wa mutuka, Abramu a ri uyo ṅwana u pfi Ishmaele." 
Genesis16:16 Abramu o vha e na miṅwaha ya 86 musi Hagara a tshi mu bebela Ishmaele. 
Genesis17:1 Musi Abramu e na miṅwaha ya 99, Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza ene a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe. U fanela u tshila u tshi ita zwine nda funa u sa ṱahedzi," 
Genesis17:2 ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga na iwe nda andisa vhana vhau zwihulu.” 
Genesis17:3 Abramu a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo. Mudzimu a amba nae a ri," 
Genesis17:4 “A vha Nṋe, mulanga une nda vhofha na iwe ngoyu: u ḓo vha khotsi a tshakha nnzhi." 
Genesis17:5 A u tsha ḓo pfi Abramu (Khotsi anga Mudzimu ndi muhulu), u vho ḓo pfi Abrahamu (Khotsi a magogo), ngauri ndo u ita khotsi a tshakha nnzhi." 
Genesis17:6 Ndi ḓo ita uri u vhe na vhana vhanzhi; ndi ḓo vhumba dzitshakha nga iwe; kha iwe hu ḓo bva mahosi. 
Genesis17:7 Ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga wa lini na lini na iwe na vhana vhau vha mirafho i kha ḓi ḓaho, nda vha Mudzimu wau na vhana vhau." 
Genesis17:8 Shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Kanana hune zwino wa vha mutsinda, ndi ḓo u ṋea ḽa vha ḽau na vhana vhau lini na lini; Nṋe ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wavho.”" 
Genesis17:9 Mudzimu a dovha a amba na Abrahamu a ri, “A vha iwe u vhulunge mulanga wanga – iwe na vhana vhau na mirafho i kha ḓi ḓaho." 
Genesis17:10 Hoyu ndi mulanga we nda vhofha na iwe na vhana vhau. Mulanga une na fanela u u vhulunga ngoyu: vhoṱhe vha muṱa wau vha tshinnani vha fanela u fumbiswa. 
Genesis17:11 No fanela u fumba; tshi ḓo vha tshone tshiga tsha mulanga we nda vhofha na inwi. 
Genesis17:12 Na kha mirafho i ḓaho mutuka muṅwe na muṅwe a fumbiswe e na maḓuvha maṱanu na mararu, naho i phuli yo bebwaho muṱani wau, na o rengwaho kha mutsinda a si wa hau." 
Genesis17:13 O bebwaho muṱani waṋu kana o rengwaho a fumbiswe, tshenetsho tshi ḓo vha tshiga tsha mulanga wanga tshi re muvhilini waṋu; u ḓo vha mulanga wa lini na lini." 
Genesis17:14 Munna a songo fumbaho u ḓo bvisiwa kha lushaka lwa hawe; o vhofholola mulanga wanga.” 
Genesis17:15 Mudzimu a dovha a vhudza Abrahamu a ri, “A vha Sarai musadzi wau, ha tsha pfi Sarai, u vho ḓo pfi Sara (Mufumakadzi wa musanda)." 
Genesis17:16 Ndi ḓo mu shudufhadza a u bebela ṅwana wa mutukana. Ndi ḓo mu shudufhadza a vha mme a dzitshakha; u ḓo beba mahosi a no ḓo vhusa vhathu.” 
Genesis17:17 Abrahamu a mbo ḓi wa nga tshifhaṱuwo, a sea a ḓivhudzisa a ri, “Munna o no ḓi vhaho na miṅwaha ya ḓana a nga kha ḓi beba ṅwana naa? Sara a nga beba ṅwana o no ḓi vha na miṅwaha ya 90?”" 
Genesis17:18 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi vhudza Mudzimu a ri, “Ngavhe u tshi shudufhadza Ishmaele zwawe a tshila!”" 
Genesis17:19 Mudzimu a ri, “Aiwa, Sara musadzi wau u ḓo u bebela ṅwana wa mutukana; u ḓo pfi Isaka (Tshiseo); ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga wanga nae na vhaḓuhulu vhawe, wa vha wa lini na lini." 
Genesis17:20 A vha Ishmaele, ndo zwi pfa zwe wa amba: Ngoho ndi ḓo mu shudufhadza; u ḓo beba nda andisa vhana vhawe. U ḓo vha khotsi a vhavhusi vha 12; ndi ḓo mu ita lushaka luhulu." 
Genesis17:21 Hone mulanga wanga ndi ḓo u vhofha na Isaka ane Sara a ḓo u bebela ene mwakani nga tshifhinga tshenetshi.” 
Genesis17:22 Musi Mudzimu o fhedza u amba na Abrahamu a mu ṱutshela a gonya ṱaḓulu. 
Genesis17:23 Musi wonoyo Abrahamu a mbo dzhia ṅwana wawe Ishmaele na vhoṱhe vho bebwaho muṱani wawe na vho rengwaho, muṅwe na muṅwe wa tshinnani a re muṱani wawe, a vha fumbisa sa zwe Mudzimu a mu vhudza." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahamu o fumba e na miṅwaha ya 99; 
Genesis17:25 ṅwana wawe Ishmaele o vha e na miṅwaha ya 13; 
Genesis17:26 Abrahamu na ṅwana wawe Ishmaele vho fumba vhoṱhe musi wonoyo muthihi," 
Genesis17:27 ha fumba na vhoṱhe vha tshinnani vha muṱa wa Abrahamu, vho bebelwaho muṱani wawe khathihi na vho rengwaho kha vhatsinda." 
Genesis18:1 Abrahamu o vha a tshi dzula tsini ha miri mihulu ya Mamuri. Muṅwe musi ó dzula muṋangoni wa dennde yawe masiari tshivhangalala, Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza ene." 
Genesis18:2 Abrahamu a tshi posa maṱo a vhona vhanna vhararu vho ima henefho tsini. A ri u vha vhona a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a takuwa muṋangoni wa dennde yawe a yo vha ṱanganedza, a gwadama." 
Genesis18:3 A ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, arali vha tshi ntakalela vha songo mphira." 
Genesis18:4 Nga vha litshe hu ḓiswe maḓinyana vha ṱambe milenzhe, vha awele murunzini hoyu." 
Genesis18:5 Nga vha litshe ndi vha wanele zwiḽiwanyana, vha netuluwe, vha konou fhira zwavho. Hufha vho no ḓi swika ha mulanda wavho.” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi zwone, ita zwine wa amba.”" 
Genesis18:6 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi gidimela ha Sara denndeni, a ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni dzhie vhukhopfu vhutete ha ndilo tharu, ni suke ni bike mikonde ya vhurotho.”" 
Genesis18:7 A gidimela sambini ḽawe, a nanga ṋamana thethe yavhuḓi, a i ṋea phuli yawe, uyo a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya u i lugisa." 
Genesis18:8 Abrahamu a ḓisa mukhaha wa makheṱhe na wa luvhisi na iḽa ṋama yo bikwaho, a zwi vhea phanḓa havho. Musi vha tshi khou ḽa ene a ima tsini navho murunzini a tshi khou vha ṋekedza." 
Genesis18:9 Vhone vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Musadzi wau Sara u ngafhi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “U denndeni.”" 
Genesis18:10 Muṅwe wavho a ri, “Ndi ḓo dovha nda vhuya mwakani nga tshifhinga tshenetshi; ndi ḓo wana musadzi wau Sara e na ṅwana wa mutukana.” Zwino Sara o vha e murahu ha Abrahamu muṋangoni wa dennde a tshi khou thetshelesa." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahamu na Sara vho vha vho no ḓi vha vha maḓuvha, miṅwaha yavho yo no ḓi vhala, Sara o no pfuka miṅwaha ya u beba vhana." 
Genesis18:12 Sara a ḓisetshela nge a humbula a ri, “Hufha ndo no kegula, na munna wanga o no kalaha, ndi nga dovha nda tama munna naa?”" 
Genesis18:13 Muṋe washu a vhudzisa Abrahamu a ri, “Ndi mini Sara o sea a ri, ‘Vhukuma ndi nga wana ṅwana zwino ndo no kegula naa?’" 
Genesis18:14 Hu na maḓembe ane a nga kunda Yahavee naa? Ndi ḓo vhuya mwakani nga tshifhinga tsho tiwaho, nda wana Sara e na ṅwana wa mutukana.”" 
Genesis18:15 Sara o vha o farwa nga nyofho, ndi zwe a zwifha a ri, “A tho ngo sea.” Hone Muṋe washu a ri, “Wo sea.”" 
Genesis18:16 Musi vhaḽa vhanna vha tshi vho takuwa vha tshi ṱuwa, Abrahamu a vha fhelekedza, vha swika hune vha kona u vhona Sodoma thungo ya fhasi." 
Genesis18:17 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi nga dzumbela Abrahamu zwine nda ṱoḓa u zwi ita naa?" 
Genesis18:18 Hufha a tshi ḓo vha lushaka luhulu lwa maanḓa, tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi tshi ḓo wana mashudu ngae." 
Genesis18:19 Ndo mu nanga uri a kone u laya vhana vhawe na vhaḓuhulu uri vha tshimbile nḓilani yanga, vha ite zwi re zwone zwi ntakadzaho, uri Abrahamu ndi mu itele zwoṱhe zwe nda mu fulufhedzisa.”" 
Genesis18:20 Muṋe washu a ri, “Mukosi wa u pomoka Sodoma na Gomora wo no hulela; vhutshinyi havho ho no tou ṋaṋa;" 
Genesis18:21 litshani ndi tse ndi yo vhona arali zwine vha ita zwo vhifha u fana na mukosi we wa swika kha Nṋe. Arali zwi songo ralo ndi ḓo zwi ḓivha.” 
Genesis18:22 Muṋe washu a sala henefho o ima na Abrahamu, vhaḽa vhanna vhavhili vha ṱuwa vha livha Sodoma." 
Genesis18:23 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi sendela tsini ha Muṋe washu a ri, “U tshi kumba vhavhi u ḓo kumba na vhavhuya naa?" 
Genesis18:24 Arali afho muḓini hu na vhavhuya vha 50? U ḓo u kumba woṱhe, wa si u khathutshele u tshi itela vhavhuya vha 50 vha re ngomu hawo naa?" 
Genesis18:25 U nga si tou ralo wa lozwa vhavhuya na vhavhi, vhavhuya na vhavhi wa vha ita zwi fanaho! Hufha u muhaṱuli wa shango ḽoṱhe, u nga ri u tshi haṱula wa khakha?”" 
Genesis18:26 Muṋe washu a ri, “Arali nda wana vhavhuya vha 50 muḓini wa Sodoma, ndi ḓo u khathutshela woṱhe ndi tshi itela vhenevho.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahamu a dovha a amba a ri, “Vhunga zwino ndo luma mbilu nda amba na Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, hone ndi si tshithu ndi tshi tou vha buse na milora," 
Genesis18:28 zwino kha vhavhuya arali ho ṱahela vhaṱanu uri vha vhe 50? U ḓo lozwa muḓi woṱhe nge ha ṱahela avho vhaṱanu naa?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Arali nda wana vha 45 ndi nga si u lozwe.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahamu a dovha hafhu a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Zwino arali ha wanala hu na vha 40?” Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ḓo u khathutshela ndi tshi itela avho vha 40.”" 
Genesis18:30 Abrahamu a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a songo sinyuwa, nga a nnditshe ndi ambe. Zwino arali ha wanala hu na vha 30?” Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi nga si zwi ite arali nda wana hu na vha 30.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahamu a ri, “Vhunga ndo no ḓi luma mbilu nda amba na Muṋe wa zwoṱhe – zwino arali ha tou wanala vha 20?” Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ḓo u khathutshela ndi tshi itela avho vha 20.”" 
Genesis18:32 Abrahamu a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a sa sinyuwi, a tshi nnditsha nda tou amba holuno luthihi fhedzi – zwino arali ha wanala vha fumi fhedzi?” Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ḓo u khathutshela ndi tshi itela vhenevho vha fumi.”" 
Genesis18:33 Musi Muṋe washu o fhedza u amba na Abrahamu, a ṱuwa, Abrahamu a humela hayani." 
Genesis19:1 Vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhavhili vha swika Sodoma nga madekwana, vha wana Loto o dzula khoroni ya muḓi. A tshi vha vhona, a takuwa a yo vha ṱanganedza, a kotama a vhuya a gwadama," 
Genesis19:2 a ri, “Vhaṋe vhanga, vha songo fhira, kha vha ḓe nḓuni yanga. Vha ḓo ṱamba milenzhe vha kuvhama henefha, vha konou vuwa vha tshi fara lwendo lwavho matshelo nga matsheloni.” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Aiwa, ri ḓo lala nnḓa.”" 
Genesis19:3 Hone ene a sivhelela a ita lunzili, vha vhuya vha ṱuwa nae vha dzhena nḓuni yawe. A vha lugisela zwiḽiwa, a bika vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa, vha ḽa." 
Genesis19:4 Huno vha sa athu yo kuvhama, vhanna vhoṱhe vha muḓi wa Sodoma, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vha bva masia oṱhe a muḓi, ha si sale na muthihi, vha tanga iyo nnḓu," 
Genesis19:5 vha vhidzelela Loto vha ri, “Vhaḽa vhanna vhe vha u dalela madekwana ano vha ngafhi? Vha bvisele nnḓa ri lale navho!”" 
Genesis19:6 Loto a bvela nnḓa u yo vha ṱanganedza muṋangoni, a sia o vala vothi," 
Genesis19:7 a ri, “Aiwa nandi vha hashu, ni songo ita vhuvhi ho raloho." 
Genesis19:8 Vhonani, nṋe ndi na vhana vhavhili vha vhasidzana vha sa athu dzhena nḓuni na muthu wa munna. Litshani ndi ni ḓisele vhone ni ite zwine na funa ngavho. Hone avha vhanna ndi vhaeni vha re nḓuni yanga, ndo fanela u vha tsireledza, ni songo vha ita tshithu.”" 
Genesis19:9 Vhone vha ri, “Ibva nḓilani! Wo ḓa fhano u mutsinda, zwino u vho ḓiita khosi! Ri ḓo u ita zwi no fhira zwa havho!” Vha tshi ralo vha ḓi kombetshedza Loto, vha sendela vha tshi ri vha pwashe vothi." 
Genesis19:10 Hone vhaḽa vhanna vha re nga ngomu vha kokodzela Loto ngomu nḓuni, vha vala vothi." 
Genesis19:11 Vha mbo ḓi pofudza vhaḽa vhanna vhe vha vha vhe muṋangoni wa nnḓu, vha tou pofula vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vha si tsha kona u vhona muṋango." 
Genesis19:12 Vhaḽa vhanna vhavhili vha vhudzisa Loto vha ri, “U na muṅwe muthu fhano – vhakwasha kana vhana vha vhatukana na vha vhasidzana, kana muṅwe muthu fhano muḓini ane a vha wa hau? Vha bvise hafhano;" 
Genesis19:13 fhethu fhano ri khou ṱoḓa u hu phusukanya. Mukosi u no swika ha Muṋe washu u tshi pomoka vhathu vhaho wo no hulela lwe a vhuya a ri ruma uri ri ḓe ri hu phusukanye.” 
Genesis19:14 Ndi hone Loto a tshi yo amba na vhakwasha vhawe vhe vha vha vho no fulufhedzisa u vhinga vhananyana vhawe, a ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni bve fhethu fhano, Muṋe washu u ṱoḓa u hu phusukanya!” Hone vhakwasha vhawe vha vhona unga u khou swaswa." 
Genesis19:15 Musi mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka, vharuṅwa vha ṱuṱuwedza Loto vha ri, “Ṱavhanya u dzhie musadzi wau na vhananyana vhau vhavhili vha re fhano, ni sa ḓo lovha na muḓi uno musi u tshi lifhedzwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Huno a tshi kha ḓi timatima, vhaḽa vhanna vhavhili vha mu fara nga tshanḓa na musadzi wawe na vhananyana vhawe vhavhili, vha vha endedza vha bva afho muḓini, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha khathutshela." 
Genesis19:17 Musi vha tshi khou vha bvisa, muṅwe wavho a ri, “Shavhani ni sa ḓo fa! Ni songo sedza murahu, nahone ni songo vhuya na ima huṅwe fhano mudavhini! Shavhelani dzithavhani, ni sa ḓo kumbiwa!”" 
Genesis19:18 Huno Loto a vha fhindula a ri, “Aiwa nandi vhaṋe vhanga!" 
Genesis19:19 Vho ntakalela, vho nnyita nga vhuthu vhuhulu vha ntshidza. Hone u shavhela dzithavhani ndi nga si kone; khombo i nga ḓo mpfara ndi tshee nḓilani nda fa." 
Genesis19:20 Kha vha vhone, kuḓi ngoku fhano tsini hune nda nga shavhela hone, na u vha kuṱuku ndi kuṱuku. Nga vha litshe ndi shavhele hone, hufha ku kuṱuku. Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo tshila.”" 
Genesis19:21 Muruṅwa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, na zwenezwo ndi ḓo u tendela; a thi nga phusukanyi muḓi une wa khou u amba." 
Genesis19:22 Hone ṱavhanya u gidimele hone, ngauri a thi koni u ita tshithu u sa athu swika khawo.” (Ndi zwine uyo muḓi wa pfi Tsuara.)" 
Genesis19:23 Musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi bva, Loto a vha a tshi swika Tsuara." 
Genesis19:24 Muṋe washu a nisela Sodoma na Gomora tsevhela i fhisaho i tshi bva ha Muṋe washu ṱaḓulu. 
Genesis19:25 A phusukanya iyo miḓi na mudavhi woṱhe, khathihi na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho afho muḓini, na zwimela zwa shango." 
Genesis19:26 Musadzi wa Loto a sedza murahu a mbo ḓi shanduka phuphu ya muṋo. 
Genesis19:27 Nga matshelo Abrahamu a fhindutshela fhaḽa fhethu he a vha o ima na Muṋe washu," 
Genesis19:28 a sedza Sodoma na Gomora nga thungo ya fhasi, na govha ḽoṱhe ḽa Jorodani, a vhona shango ḽoṱhe ḽi tshi duba buluvhutsi, zwi tshi nga vhutsi vhu no duba vhu tshi bva ṋanḓoni." 
Genesis19:29 Huno musi Mudzimu a tshi phusukanya miḓi ya govha ḽa Jorodani he Loto a vha a tshi dzula hone, a lamukisa Loto khomboni nge a elelwa Abrahamu." 
Genesis19:30 Loto na vhananyana vhawe vha pfuluwa Tsuara vha yo dzula dzithavhani, nge a vha a tshi ofha u dzula Tsuara. Ene na vhananyana vhawe vhavhili vha yo dzula bakoni." 
Genesis19:31 Muṅwe musi mukomana a vhudza murathu a ri, “Khotsi ashu vho kalaha, nahone a hu na munna shangoni ḽino ane a nga ri vhinga sa zwine zwa itwa mashangoni oṱhe." 
Genesis19:32 Nga ri nwise khotsi ashu waini ri dzhene navho nḓuni, ri vhumbe lutsinga lwa muṱa wa hashu nga khotsi ashu.”" 
Genesis19:33 Vhusiku honoho vha nwisa khotsi avho waini, mukomana a kuvhama navho, khotsi awe vha si vhe na nzhele nazwo uyo ṅwananyana a tshi kuvhama na musi a tshi vuwa." 
Genesis19:34 Nga matshelo mukomana a vhudza murathu a ri, “Madekwe ndo kuvhama na khotsi anga; nga ri dovhe ri vha nwise waini ṋamusi nga madekwana, inwi ni dzhene ni kuvhame navho uri ri vhumbe lutsinga lwa muṱa wa hashu nga khotsi ashu.”" 
Genesis19:35 Ndi hone vha tshi dovha u nwisa khotsi avho waini vhusiku honoho, murathu a kuvhama navho. Na zwenezwo a vho ngo vha na nzhele nazwo a tshi kuvhama na musi a tshi vuwa." 
Genesis19:36 Vhananyana vha Loto vhuvhili havho vha mbo ḓi vhifha muvhilini nga khotsi avho," 
Genesis19:37 mukomana a vha na ṅwana wa mutukana, a pfi Muaba (Ndo-mu-wana-kha-baba); ndi ene khotsi a Vhamuaba vha misi ino." 
Genesis19:38 Murathu na ene a vha na ṅwana wa mutukana, a pfi Benami (Ṅwana-wa-shaka-ḽanga); ndi ene khotsi a Vhaamoni vha misi ino." 
Genesis20:1 Zwino Abrahamu a pfuluwa henefho a ya dzinguni ḽa Negeve, a dzula vhukati ha Kadeshe na Shuru. A dovha a pfuluwa a yo dzula Gerara." 
Genesis20:2 Abrahamu e henefho a vhudza vhathu a tshi amba Sara musadzi wawe a ri, “Ndi khaladzi anga.” Ndi hone Abimelekhe khosi ya Gerara a tshi vhidzisa Sara a mu dzhia." 
Genesis20:3 Hone ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga madekwana Mudzimu a ḓa ha Abimelekhe muloroni a ri, “U ḓo fa nga mulandu wa musadzi we wa mu dzhia; u na munna wawe.”" 
Genesis20:4 Zwino Abimelekhe o vha a sa athu sendela tsini ha Sara, ndi zwe a fhindula a ri, “Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, vhukuma u nga lozwa lushaka lu si na mulandu naa?" 
Genesis20:5 A thi ri Abrahamu o mmbudza a ri, ‘Ndi khaladzi anga’? Na ene muṋe Sara o ri, ‘Ndi khaladzi anga.’ Hezwo a tho ngo zwi ita nga khole.”" 
Genesis20:6 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi amba nae muloroni a ri, “Ee, ndi a zwi ḓivha uri izwo a wo ngo zwi ita nga khole, ndi zwe na Nṋe nda si u litshe u tshi nkhakhela nga u mu kwama." 
Genesis20:7 Zwino humisa musadzi wa hoyo munna, ngauri ndi muporofita; u ḓo u rabelela wa tshila. Hone wa sa mu humisa, u ḓivhe uri iwe na vhathu vhau vhoṱhe ni ḓo fa.”" 
Genesis20:8 Nga matshelo ḽi tshi tou tsha Abimelekhe a vhidza magota awe oṱhe, a vha vhudza zwoṱhe zwe a pfa; vha farwa nga nyofho khulu." 
Genesis20:9 Ndi hone Abimelekhe a tshi vhidza Abrahamu a ri, “No ri ita mini? Ndo ni khakhela ngani ni tshi vhuya na nnzhenisa mulanduni mungafha, nṋe na muvhuso wanga? No nnyita zwi sa itwi!”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimelekhe a sengisa Abrahamu a ri, “Izwi no zwi itelani?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndo humbula nda ri, ‘Vhukuma fhano Mudzimu ha ofhiwi, vha ḓo mmbulaha vha tshi mmbulahela musadzi wanga.’" 
Genesis20:12 Ene ndi khaladzi anga, ndi ṅwananyana wa khotsi anga, naho e si wa mme anga; a dovha a vha musadzi wanga." 
Genesis20:13 Huno zwiḽa Mudzimu a tshi ita uri ndi ṱuwe muṱani wa khotsi anga ndi tendeleke na shango, ndo mu vhudza nda ri, ‘Arali ni tshi mpfuna, hoṱhe hune ra ya, ni tshi nnyamba ni ri: Ndi khaladzi anga.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Ndi hone Abimelekhe a tshi ḓisa nngu na kholomo na dziphuli, dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi, a ṋea Abrahamu, a dovha a mu ṋea Sara musadzi wawe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimelekhe a ri, “Shango ḽanga ngeḽi, kha vha dzule hune vha funa.”" 
Genesis20:16 A amba na Sara a ri, “Ndi khou ṋea khaladzi avho mangwende a 1 000 a siliva. Hetshi ndi tshipfumelo tsha mulandu wa zwe nda vha khakhela; ndi tshi bvisa vhoṱhe vha re navho vha tshi zwi vhona; vhone musadzi vho ṱamba mulandu tshoṱhe.”" 
Genesis20:17 Zwenezwo Abrahamu a rabela Mudzimu, Mudzimu a fhodza Abimelekhe na mufumakadzi wawe na phuli dzawe dza vhasadzi uri vha dovhe vha vhe na vhana," 
Genesis20:18 ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o fara ṋowa dza vhasadzi vhoṱhe muṱani wa Abimelekhe a tshi lifhedzela Sara musadzi wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis21:1 Zwino Muṋe washu a ita Sara nga vhuthu nga he a vha o no ḓi dzula o amba; Muṋe washu a itela Sara zwe a fulufhedzisa. 
Genesis21:2 Sara a vha muthu wa thovhela a bebela Abrahamu ṅwana wa mutuka Abrahamu ó no ḓi kalaha; izwo zwo itea nga tshenetshiḽa tshifhinga tshe Mudzimu a fulufhedzisa. 
Genesis21:3 Abrahamu a ri uyo ṅwana we a bebelwa nga Sara u pfi Isaka. 
Genesis21:4 Musi Isaka e na maḓuvha maṱanu na mararu, Abrahamu a mu fumbisa nga he Mudzimu a amba." 
Genesis21:5 Abrahamu o vha e na ḓana ḽa miṅwaha musi ṅwana wawe Isaka a tshi bebwa. 
Genesis21:6 Sara a ri, “Mudzimu o ita uri ndi see; vhoṱhe vhane vha zwi pfa vha ḓo ntsea.”" 
Genesis21:7 A dovha a ri, “Ndi nnyi we a vha a tshi nga vhudza Abrahamu uri Sara u ḓo vhuya a mamisa ṅwana? Zwino khezwi, ndo mu bebela ṅwana wa mutukana ene o no ḓi kalaha!”" 
Genesis21:8 Ṅwana a aluwa, a lumulwa. Huno musi wonoyo we Isaka a litshiswa ḓamu, Abrahamu a ita vhuṱambo vhuhulu." 
Genesis21:9 Hone Sara a vhona uri ṅwana we Hagara wa Muegipita a bebela Abrahamu, u a kola." 
Genesis21:10 Sara a vhudza Abrahamu a ri, “Nga vha thathe musadzi hoyo wa phuli na ṅwana wawe; ṅwana wa musadzi wa phuli a songo kovhekana ifa na ṅwananga Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Mafhungo ayo a dina Abrahamu zwihulu, ngauri o vha a tshi kwama ṅwana wawe." 
Genesis21:12 Hone Mudzimu a vhudza Abrahamu a ri, “U songo dinalea nga uyo mutukana na phuli yau ya musadzi; thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwine Sara a u vhudza, ngauri vhana vha lutsinga lwau vha ḓo bva kha Isaka." 
Genesis21:13 Ṅwana wa phuli ya musadzi na ene ndi ḓo mu ita lushaka, ngauri ndi ṅwana wau.”" 
Genesis21:14 Musi ḽi tshi tsha hu tshee nga matsheloni, Abrahamu a dzhia zwiḽiwa na mukhwama wa maḓi wa mukumba, a ṋea Hagara. A mu hwesa mahaḓani, a mu thatha na ṅwana. Hagara a ṱuwa a tendeleka na soga ḽa Bierisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Musi maḓi a re mukhwamani o no fhela, Hagara a sia ṅwana fhasi ha tshiṅwe tshiṱaka," 
Genesis21:16 a ṱuwa a yo dzula fhasi henefho tsini, hune muthu a tshi posa musevhe wa swika, nge a humbula a ri, “Ndi nga si tou sedza mutukana wanga a tshi khou fa.” A dzula a thoma u lila." 
Genesis21:17 Mudzimu a pfa mutukana a tshi khou lila, muruṅwa wa Mudzimu a huwelela Hagara e makoleni a ri, “Hagara, wo dinwa ngani? U songo ofha tshithu; Mudzimu o pfa tshililo tsha ṅwana henefho he a lala hone." 
Genesis21:18 Takuwa u takuse ṅwana, u mu fare nga tshanḓa; ndi ḓo mu ita lushaka luhulu.”" 
Genesis21:19 Zwenezwo Mudzimu a bonyolosa maṱo a Hagara, a vhona tshisima tsha maḓi, a yo ḓadza mukhwama nga maḓi, a ṋea mutukana uri a nwe." 
Genesis21:20 Mudzimu a ḓi vha na uyo mutukana a tshi aluwa, a dzula sogani a vha muzwimi," 
Genesis21:21 a dzula sogani ḽa Pharani, mme awe a mu wanela musadzi a no bva Egipita." 
Genesis21:22 Misi yeneyo Abimelekhe a ḓa na Phikholo mulangammbi wawe, a amba na Abrahamu a ri, “Mudzimu u navho kha zwoṱhe zwine vha ita." 
Genesis21:23 Zwino kha vha nnyanele nga Mudzimu uri a vha nga mphuri, nṋe na vhana vhanga na vhaḓuhulu vhanga. Vhunga nṋe ndo vha itela vhuthu, na vhone nga vha nnyitele vhuthu, vha vhu itele na shango ḽine vha khou dzula khaḽo vhe mutsinda.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahamu a ri, “Ndi ana uri ndi ḓo ralo.”" 
Genesis21:25 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi gungulela Abimelekhe nga mulandu wa tshisima tsha maḓi tsho dzhiwaho nga vhalanda vha Abimelekhe. 
Genesis21:26 Hone Abimelekhe a ri, “A thi ḓivhi we a zwi ita. Na vhone Vho-Abrahamu a vho ngo mmbudza, ndi hone ndi tshi thoma u zwi pfa ṋamusi.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi ḓisa nngu na kholomo a dzi ṋea Abimelekhe, vhanna avho vhavhili vha vhofha mulanga." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahamu a khetha ngwana ṱhanu na mbili dza tsadzi dzi tshi bva kha sambi ḽawe. 
Genesis21:29 Abimelekhe a vhudzisa Abrahamu a ri, “Idzi ngwana ṱhanu na mbili dza tsadzi dze vha dzi khethela thungo ndi dza mini?”" 
Genesis21:30 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha ṱanganedze ngwana hedzi ṱhanu na mbili dzi no bva tshanḓani tshanga, vhu vhe vhuṱanzi ha uri ndi nṋe ndo bwaho tshisima hetshi.”" 
Genesis21:31 Fhethu henefho ha pfi Bierisheba (Bidzi ḽa muano), ngauri ndi hone he vhanna avho vhavhili vha anelana vha vhofha mulanga." 
Genesis21:32 Musi vho no fhedza u vhofha mulanga afho Bierisheba, Abimelekhe na Phikholo mulangammbi wawe vha humela shangoni ḽa Vhafilista." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahamu a ṱavha muri wa muthamarisika henefho Bierisheba, a rabela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa lini na lini." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahamu a dzula shangoni ḽa Vhafilista tshifhinga tshilapfu. 
Genesis22:1 Ngavhuya Mudzimu a linga Abrahamu, a mu vhudza a ri, “Abrahamu!” Abrahamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Mudzimu a ri, “Dzhia mutukana wau muthihi fhedzi Isaka, ane wa mu funa, u ye dzinguni ḽa Moria, thavhani ine nda ḓo u sumbedza, u mu ite tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho henefho.”" 
Genesis22:3 Nga matshelo Abrahamu a fhinduwa a vhelesa donngi yawe. A ṱuwa na phuli dzawe mbili na mutukana wawe Isaka. A fhanza khuni dzo eḓanaho dza tshiṱhavhelo, a livha he Mudzimu a mu vhudza." 
Genesis22:4 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru Abrahamu a tshi posa maṱo a vhona fhethu afho hu tshi kha ḓi vha kule. 
Genesis22:5 A vhudza phuli dzawe a ri, “Salani na donngi henefha, nṋe na mutukana ri ḓo fhirela hafhaḽaa. Musi ro no luvha Mudzimu ri ḓo vhuya ha inwi.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahamu a dzhia khuni dza tshiṱhavhelo a dzi hwesa mutukana wawe Isaka, ene muṋe a fara mulilo na lufhanga. Musi avho vhavhili vha tshi khou tshimbila vhoṱhe," 
Genesis22:7 Isaka a vhudzisa khotsi awe Abrahamu a ri, “Baba!” Abrahamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi mini ṅwananga?” Isaka a ri, “Mulilo na khuni ngezwi, hone ngwana ya tshiṱhavhelo i ngafhi?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahamu a fhindula a ri, “Ṅwananga, Mudzimu Ene muṋe u ḓo ḓisa ngwana ya tshiṱhavhelo.” Vha ḓi tshimbila vhoṱhe." 
Genesis22:9 Musi vha tshi swika fhethu he Mudzimu a mu vhudza, Abrahamu a fhaṱa aḽiṱari henefho, a vhekanya khuni nṱha hayo. A vhofha mutukana wawe Isaka, a mu ladza kha aḽiṱari nṱha ha khuni." 
Genesis22:10 Abrahamu a isa tshanḓa a dzhia lufhanga uri a shidzhe ṅwana wawe. 
Genesis22:11 Hone muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a mu vhidzelela e ṱaḓulu a ri, “Abrahamu! Abrahamu!” Abrahamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano!”" 
Genesis22:12 Muruṅwa a ri, “U songo vhuya wa kwama uyo mutukana. U songo mu ita tshithu. Zwino ndi a zwi ḓivha uri u ofha Mudzimu, ngauri a wo ngo nnzima na ṅwana wau muthihi fhedzi.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahamu a tshi posa maṱo, a vhona thutha yo fashwa ṋanga tshiṱakani. A mbo ḓi yo dzhia iyo thutha a i ita tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho vhudzuloni ha ṅwana wawe." 
Genesis22:14 Henefho fhethu Abrahamu a ri hu pfi, “Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓisa tshililelwa.” Na ṋamusi hu kha ḓi pfi, “Thavhani ya Muṋe washu hu ḓo ḓiswa tshililelwa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a dovha a vhidzelela Abrahamu e ṱaḓulu 
Genesis22:16 a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi ana nga Nṋe muṋe, ndi ri nge wa ita hezwo, wa si nnzime mutukana wau muthihi fhedzi," 
Genesis22:17 vhukumakuma ndi ḓo u shudufhadza nda andisa vhaḓuhulu vhau vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni, vha nga muṱavha wa khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe. Vhaḓuhulu vhau vha ḓo dzhia miḓi ya maswina avho ya vha yavho." 
Genesis22:18 Tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓo wana mashudu nga vhana vhau, nge wa nthetshelesa.’ ”" 
Genesis22:19 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi humela phulini dzawe, vha ṱuwa vhoṱhe vha ya Bierisheba. Abrahamu a dzula Bierisheba." 
Genesis22:20 Ngavhuya Abrahamu a vhudzwa upfi, “Milikha na ene u na vhana; o bebela murathu wau Nahoro vhana vha vhatuka:" 
Genesis22:21 Utsi ndi ene tanzhe; vharathu vhawe ndi Buzi na Kemuele khotsi a Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 na Khesede na Hazo na Philidashi na Jidilafu na Bethuele.” 
Genesis22:23 Bethuele a vha khotsi a Rabeka. Milikha o bebela Nahoro murathu wa Abrahamu vhana havho vhaṱanu na vhararu. 
Genesis22:24 Musadzi wawe wa phuli we a vha a tshi pfi Riuma, na ene a vha na vhana vha vhatuka: Teba na Gahama na Thahashi na Maakha." 
Genesis23:1 Sara o tshila a vhuya a swika miṅwaha ya 127. 
Genesis23:2 O fela Kiriathi Araba (Hebroni), shangoni ḽa Kanana. Abrahamu a yo lila Sara a tou ṱavha mukosi." 
Genesis23:3 Abrahamu a sia mufu wawe a yo amba na Vhahithi, a ri," 
Genesis23:4 “Nṋe ndi mutsinda, ndi tou vha ṱhunḓu vhukati haṋu; nthengiseleni fhethu ha zwalo fhano ha haṋu uri ndi kone u swiṱa mufu wanga.”" 
Genesis23:5 Vhahithi vha fhindula Abrahamu vha ri," 
Genesis23:6 “Muṋe wanga, nga vha ri thetshelese! Ri a vha hulisa unga vhe muthu we Mudzimu a mu ṋea vhuhulwane. Kha vha ḓinangele tshalo tshashu tsha khwiṋe vha swiṱe mufu wavho. A hu na na muthihi washu ane a nga hana vha tshi swiṱa mufu wavho tshaloni tshawe.”" 
Genesis23:7 Abrahamu a takuwa a kotamela fhasi phanḓa ha Vhahithi vhaṋe vha shango ḽeneḽo," 
Genesis23:8 a vha vhudza a ri, “Arali ni tshi zwi funa ndi tshi swiṱa mufu wanga, nthetsheleseni ni nnyambele na Efroni ṅwana wa Tsohara," 
Genesis23:9 uri a nthengisele bako ḽa Makhaphela ḽine ḽa vha ḽawe; ḽi henefho lukomboni lwa tsimu yawe. Mu vhudzeni a nthengisele nga mutengo wo ḓalaho uri hu vhe fhethu hanga ha zwalo.” 
Genesis23:10 Efroni wa Muhithi o vha o dzula henefho na vhathu vha hawe, a fhindula Abrahamu Vhahithi vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa, vhe vha vha vhe khoroni ya muḓi wawe," 
Genesis23:11 a ri, “Aiwa muṋe wanga, nga vha nthetshelese: Ndi vha ṋea iyo tsimu na bako ḽi re ngomu hayo. Ndi vha ṋea vhathu vhanga vha tshi zwi vhona. Nga vha swiṱe mufu wavho.”" 
Genesis23:12 Abrahamu a dovha a kotamela fhasi phanḓa ha vhathu vha shango iḽo," 
Genesis23:13 a amba na Efroni vha tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Nga vha nthetshelese: Ndi ḓo bvisa mutengo wa tsimu yoṱhe. Nga vha u ṱanganedze uri ndi kone u swiṱa mufu wanga henefho.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efroni a fhindula Abrahamu a ri," 
Genesis23:15 “Muṋe wanga, nga vha nthetshelese: tsimu ya maseṱha a maḓana maṋa ndi mini kha nṋe na vhone? Vhone nga vha swiṱe mufu wavho.”" 
Genesis23:16 Abrahamu a tenda zwe Efroni a amba, a mu kalela mutengo we a u amba Vhahithi vha tshi zwi pfa: maḓana maṋa a mangwende a siliva zwi tshi tevhedza kukalele kwo teaho kwa vhavhambadzi." 
Genesis23:17 Zwenezwo tsimu ya Efroni i re Makhaphela tsini ha Mamuri, khathihi na bako na miri yoṱhe u guma lukomboni lwa tsimu, zwa vha" 
Genesis23:18 zwa Abrahamu, ya pfi ndi thundu yawe Vhahithi vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa, vhe vha vha vho ḓa khoroni ya muḓi." 
Genesis23:19 Ndi hone Abrahamu a tshi swiṱa musadzi wawe Sara bakoni ngomu tsimuni ya Makhaphela tsini ha Mamuri, Hebroni, shangoni ḽa Kanana." 
Genesis23:20 Zwenezwo tsimu na bako ḽi re ngomu hayo zwa vha zwa Abrahamu zwi tshi bva kha Vhahithi, ha vha fhethu hawe ha zwalo." 
Genesis24:1 Abrahamu o vha o no kalaha, o no vha wa maḓuvha. Muṋe washu o vha o mu shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwe a ita." 
Genesis24:2 A amba na phuli yawe khulwane muṱani wawe, ene mukoma wa zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo, a ri, “Longa tshanḓa tshau tswaroni dzanga."
