Genesis24:3 Ndi ṱoḓa uri u ane nga Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, uri a u nga ṱoḓeli ṅwananga musadzi kha vhananyana vha Vhakanana vhane nda dzula navho," 
Genesis24:4 u ḓo ya shangoni ḽa hashu mashakani anga, wa yo ṱoḓela ṅwananga Isaka musadzi henengei.”" 
Genesis24:5 Phuli ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Zwino arali uyo musadzi a sa funi u vhuya na nṋe fhano shangoni ḽino? Kani ndi humisele ṅwana wavho shangoni iḽo ḽine vha bva khaḽo?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahamu a ri, “U vhone uri u songo humisela ṅwananga henengei." 
Genesis24:7 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu o mpfulusa muṱani wa khotsi anga, shangoni ḽe nda bebwa khaḽo, a amba na nṋe a mpfulufhedzisa nga muano a ri, ‘Vhana vhau ndi ḓo vha ṋea shango iḽi’; Ene u ḓo ruma muruṅwa wawe a u ranga phanḓa uri u kone u ṱoḓela ṅwananga musadzi a tshi bva henengei." 
Genesis24:8 Arali uyo musadzi a sa funi u vhuya na iwe, izwo u ḓo vha wo vhofhololwa kha uno muano une wa nnyanela. Tenda wa si humise ṅwananga a vhuelela henengei.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ndi hone iyo phuli i tshi longa tshanḓa tswaroni dza muṋe wayo Abrahamu ya mu anela uri i ḓo ita nga u ralo. 
Genesis24:10 Zwenezwo phuli ya dzhia gamela dza fumi dza muṋe wayo ya dzhena nḓilani, ya ṱuwa na zwithu zwavhuḓi zwa tshakha-tshakha zwa muṋe wayo, ya fara lwendo ya ya Misopothamia, ya livha muḓini wa Nahoro." 
Genesis24:11 A tshi swika a ita uri gamela dzi gwadame tsini ha bidzi nnḓa ha muḓi; ho vha hu tshi vho ṱoḓou vha madekwana, tshifhinga tshine vhasadzi vha bva vha tshi yo ka maḓi." 
Genesis24:12 Ene a rabela a ri, “Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa muṋe wanga Abrahamu, ita uri ṋamusi zwi nnakele, u itele muṋe wanga Abrahamu vhuthu." 
Genesis24:13 Vhona, ndo ima hafhano tsini ha bidzi hei; vhananyana vha vhathu vha no dzula muḓini uyu vha khou bva, vha ḓa u ka maḓi." 
Genesis24:14 Musidzana ane ndi tshi amba nae nda ri, ‘Rula mvuvhelo yau ndi nwe maḓi,’ ene a ri, ‘Kha vha nwe, ndi ḓo nwisa na gamela dzavho,’ ngavhe a tshi vha ene we wa mu khethela mulanda wau Isaka. Ndi ḓo ḓivha nga zwenezwo uri muṋe wanga wo mu itela vhuthu.”" 
Genesis24:15 A sa athu fhedza u rabela, ha swika Rabeka o vhea mvuvhelo kha shaḓa. Ndi uḽa ṅwananyana wa Bethuele ṅwana wa Milikha, we a vha e musadzi wa Nahoro murathu wa Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:16 Uyo musidzana o vha o nakesa, hu si na munna we a vha o no mu dzhenisa nḓuni. A tsela bidzini, a ḓadza mvuvhelo yawe, a huma." 
Genesis24:17 Phuli ya Abrahamu ya ṱavhanya u ya khae ya ri, “Nkeleni-vho maḓi mvuvheloni yaṋu.”" 
Genesis24:18 Musidzana a ri, “Nga vha nwe muṋe wanga,” a ṱavhanya a rula mvuvhelo a i fara nga zwanḓa, a mu fha a nwa." 
Genesis24:19 Musi o no mu fha maḓi a nwa, a ri, “Na gamela dzavho ndi ḓo dzi kela maḓi a u nwa, dzi vhuye dzi dzimule ḓora.”" 
Genesis24:20 Zwenezwo a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya u shululela mvuvhelo yawe kha mukungwa, a gidimela bidzini a ka maṅwe maḓi, a ka o eḓanaho gamela dzoṱhe." 
Genesis24:21 Uyo munna a sokou tshete, a mu lavhelesa nga vhusedzi a tshi ṱoḓa u ḓivha arali Muṋe washu o ita uri lwendo lwawe lu mu nakele." 
Genesis24:22 Musi gamela dzo no fhedza u nwa, uyo munna a bvisa tshiṅina tsha musuku tshi no ambarwa ningoni, tshi no lemela giramu ṱhanu na nthihi, na vhukunda vhuvhili ha musuku vhu no lemela giramu dza 110, a mu ambadza." 
Genesis24:23 Uyo munna a ri, “Ni ṅwana wa nnyi? Mmbudzeni nandi, hu na vhulalo nḓuni ya khotsi aṋu hune riṋe ra nga eḓela hone?”" 
Genesis24:24 Musidzana a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe ṅwana wa Bethuele, ṅwana wa Nahoro; mme a khotsi anga ndi Milikha.”" 
Genesis24:25 A dovha a ri, “Ri na maṱanga manzhi na zwiḽiwa zwa zwifuwo, na vhulalo hune vha nga eḓela hone.”" 
Genesis24:26 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi kotamela fhasi a luvha Muṋe washu," 
Genesis24:27 a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa muṋe wanga Abrahamu; o ḓi fulufhedzea, muṋe wanga a si litshe u mu itela vhuthu. A vha nṋe, Muṋe washu o nnyendedza lwendoni lwanga nda swika muṱani wa mashaka a muṋe wanga.”" 
Genesis24:28 Musidzana a gidima a yo vhudza vha muṱa wa mme awe zwithu hezwo. 
Genesis24:29 Zwino Rabeka o vha e na khaladzi a no pfi Labani, onoyo a gidimela ha uḽa munna a re ngei tshisimani." 
Genesis24:30 Ndi nge a ri a tshi tou vhona tshiṅina na vhukunda zwe zwa vha zwo ambarwa nga khaladzi awe, na u pfa khaladzi awe Rabeka a tshi anetshela zwe a vhudzwa nga uyo munna, a mbo ḓi takuwa a ya khae, a mu wana a tshee o ima tsini na gamela dzawe tshisimani," 
Genesis24:31 a ri, “Kha vha ḓe vhone vho shudufhadzwaho nga Muṋe washu! Vho imelani fhano nnḓa? Ndo vha lugisela nnḓu na vhulalo ha dzigamela.”" 
Genesis24:32 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi ya muṱani na Labani, gamela dza rulwa mihwalo, dza ḓiselwa maṱanga na zwiḽiwa, ha ḓiswa na maḓi awe na a vhanna vhe a ḓa navho, a u ṱamba milenzhe," 
Genesis24:33 ha vhewa zwiḽiwa phanḓa havho. Hone ene a ri, “A thi nga ḓo ḽa ndi sa athu amba zwine nda fanela u ni vhudza.” Labani a ri, “Nga vha ri vhudze.”" 
Genesis24:34 Ene a ri, “Nṋe ndi phuli ya Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:35 Muṋe washu o shudufhadza muṋe wanga zwihulu, a pfuma. O mu ṋea nngu na kholomo na siliva na musuku na phuli dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi na dzigamela na dzidonngi." 
Genesis24:36 Sara mufumakadzi wa muṋe wanga o mu bebela ṅwana wa mutuka ó no ḓi kegula, muṋe wanga a kumedza uyo ṅwana zwoṱhe zwine a vha nazwo." 
Genesis24:37 Muṋe wanga o nnyanisa a ri, ‘U songo vhuya wa ṱoḓela ṅwananga musadzi kha vhananyana vha Vhakanana, vhane nda dzula shangoni ḽavho," 
Genesis24:38 iwe iya muṱani wa khotsi anga, kha vha mutupo wa hashu, u ṱoḓele ṅwananga musadzi.’" 
Genesis24:39 Nṋe nda vhudzisa muṋe wanga nda ri, ‘Zwino arali uyo musadzi a sa funi u vhuya na nṋe?’" 
Genesis24:40 Ene a fhindula a ri, ‘Muṋe washu ane nda tshila ndi tshi konana nae u ḓo ruma muruṅwa wawe a tshimbila na iwe, a nakisa lwendo lwau uri u wanele ṅwananga musadzi kha mutupo wa hashu, kha muṱa wa khotsi anga." 
Genesis24:41 Huno arali wa ya ha vha mutupo wa hashu, vha hana u u ṋea uyo musidzana, u ḓo vha wo vhofhololwa kha muano uno une wa nnyanela, a u nga vhi na mafhanza.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Ṋamusi ndi tshi swika tshisimani ndo ri, ‘Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa muṋe wanga Abrahamu, arali u tshi zwi funa, ita uri lwendo lwanga lwe nda lu fara lu nake." 
Genesis24:43 Vhona, ndo ima tsini ha tshisima; ita uri musidzana ane a ḓo ri a tshi ḓa u ka maḓi, nda amba nae nda ri: Edzonu mpha maḓinyana a re mvuvheloni yaṋu ndi nwe," 
Genesis24:44 ene a mmbudza a ri: Kha vha nwe, ndi ḓo kela na gamela dzavho – nga a vhe ene we Muṋe washu a mu nangela ṅwana wa muṋe wanga.’" 
Genesis24:45 Huno ndi sa athu fhedza u rabela nga mbilu, Rabeka a mbo ḓi swika o vhea mvuvhelo yawe kha shaḓa. A tsela tshisimani u ka maḓi, nṋe nda amba nae nda ri, ‘Mpheni-vho maḓi ndi nwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 A ṱavhanya a rula mvuvhelo kha shaḓa a ri, ‘Kha vha nwe, ndi ḓo kela na gamela dzavho.’ Ndi hone ndi tshi nwa, a kela na dzigamela." 
Genesis24:47 Nda mu vhudzisa nda ri, ‘Ni ṅwana wa nnyi?’ Ene a ri, ‘Ndi ṅwana wa Bethuele ṅwana wa Nahoro; mme a khotsi anga ndi Milikha.’ Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi mu ambadza tshiṅina ningoni na vhukunda zwanḓani," 
Genesis24:48 nda kotamela fhasi nda luvha Muṋe washu. Nda renda Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa muṋe wanga Abrahamu, we a nnyendedza a nnakisela lwendo, nda wanela ṅwana wa Abrahamu musadzi a re muḓuhulu wa murathu wa muṋe wanga." 
Genesis24:49 Zwino arali ni tshi ḓo fulufhedzea, muṋe wanga na vha itela vhuthu, mmbudzeni; arali ni tshi landula, ni mmbudze, uri ndi ṱoḓe huṅwe.”" 
Genesis24:50 Labani na Bethuele vha fhindula vha ri, “Hezwo zwi bva kha Muṋe washu; a hu na tshine ra nga ni vhudza." 
Genesis24:51 Rabeka ngoyu; mu dzhieni ni ṱuwe, a vhe musadzi wa ṅwana wa muṋe waṋu, sa zwe Muṋe washu a amba.”" 
Genesis24:52 Musi phuli ya Abrahamu i tshi pfa zwe vha amba, a kotamela fhasi a gwadamela Muṋe washu," 
Genesis24:53 a konou bvisa maṱeleṱele a siliva na musuku na nungu na zwifuko a ṋea Rabeka; a dzhia na zwifhiwa zwa mutengo muhulu a ṋea khaladzi a Rabeka na mme awe. 
Genesis24:54 Ndi hone iyo phuli na vhanna vhe ya vha i navho vha tshi ḽa vha nwa, vha eḓela henefho. Musi vha tshi vuwa nga matshelo phuli ya Abrahamu ya ri, “Kha vha litshe ndi humele ha muṋe wanga.”" 
Genesis24:55 Hone khaladzi a Rabeka na mme awe vha fhindula vha ri, “A ni litshi musidzana a dzula na riṋe maḓuvha ane a nga ḓi ita fumi, na konou ṱuwa?”" 
Genesis24:56 Hone ene a vha fhindula a re, “Vha songo mpfareledza hezwino Muṋe washu ó ita uri lwendo lwanga lu nake. Kha vha litshe ndi humele ha muṋe wanga.”" 
Genesis24:57 Vhone vha ri, “Litshani ri vhidze musidzana a ḓifhindulele ene muṋe.”" 
Genesis24:58 Vha mbo ḓi vhidza Rabeka vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ni ṱuwa na uyu munna naa?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ṱuwa nae.”" 
Genesis24:59 Ndi hone vha tshi litsha khaladzi avho Rabeka a ṱuwa na phuli ya Abrahamu na vhaḽa vhanna vhe ya ḓa navho; na phuli ye ya mu lela ya ṱuwa nae. 
Genesis24:60 Vha shudufhadza Rabeka vha ri, “Khaladzi ashu, ngavhe ni tshi vha mme a vhana vha zwigidi na zwigidi; ngavhe vhana vhaṋu vha tshi thuba miḓi ya maswina avho.”" 
Genesis24:61 Ndi hone Rabeka na pheletshedzi dzawe vha tshi ḓilugisa, vha namela gamela dzavho, vha ṱuwa na uyo munna. Zwenezwo iyo phuli ya dzhia Rabeka ya ṱuwa." 
Genesis24:62 Zwino Isaka o vha a tshi khou bva tshisimani tshi no pfi Lakhai Roi; o vha a tshi dzula Negeve. 
Genesis24:63 Muṅwe musi nga madekwana a vha a tshi khou ḓitshimbilela zwawe. A tshi posa maṱo a vhona gamela dzi tshi khou swika. 
Genesis24:64 Rabeka na ene a tshi posa maṱo a vhona Isaka. A tsa kha gamela yawe," 
Genesis24:65 a vhudzisa phuli a ri, “Uḽa munna henefho nnḓa a no khou ḓa u ri ṱanganedza ndi nnyi?” Phuli ya fhindula ya ri, “Ndi muṋe wanga.” Zwenezwo Rabeka a dzhia ṅwenda wawe a khurumela." 
Genesis24:66 Ndi hone phuli i tshi vhudza Isaka zwoṱhe zwe ya ita. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka a dzhenisa Rabeka denndeni ya mme awe Sara, a mu vhinga. A vha musadzi wawe, a mu funa; a pfa o khuthadzwa, a si tsha lilela mme awe." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahamu a vhinga muṅwe musadzi, we a vha a tshi pfi Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Ketura a mu bebela Zimirani na Jokoshani na Medani na Midiani na Ishibaka na Shua. 
Genesis25:3 Jokoshani o vha khotsi a Sheba na Dedani; vhana vha Dedani ndi Vhaashuri na Vhaletushi na Vhaleumi. 
Genesis25:4 Vhana vha Midiani ndi Epha na Efere na Hanokho na Abida na Elidaa. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vhaḓuhulu vha Ketura. 
Genesis25:5 Abrahamu o siela Isaka ifa ḽawe ḽoṱhe. 
Genesis25:6 O ri a tshi kha ḓi tshila, vhana vha vhasadzi vhawe vha dziphuli a vha ṋea zwifhiwa a ri vha ṱutshele ṅwana wawe Isaka vha ye shangoni ḽa vhubvaḓuvha." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahamu o tshila miṅwaha ya 175," 
Genesis25:8 a fa o lalama, e mukalaha, ó no vha wa maḓuvha, a oroswa ha vha hawe." 
Genesis25:9 Vhana vhawe Isaka na Ishmaele vha mu swiṱa bakoni ḽa Makhaphela tsini ha Mamuri, tsimuni ya Efroni ṅwana wa Tsohara wa Muhithi;" 
Genesis25:10 ndi tsimu ye Abrahamu a i renga kha Vhahithi. Abrahamu a swiṱwa henefho na musadzi wawe Sara. 
Genesis25:11 Musi Abrahamu o no fa, Mudzimu a shudufhadza ṅwana wawe Isaka; onoyo zwenezwo o vha a tshi dzula tsini ha tshisima tsha Lakhai Roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ngevha vhana vha Ishmaele ṅwana wa Abrahamu we a bebelwa nga Hagara, phuli ya Sara ya Muegipita." 
Genesis25:13 Ngea madzina a vhana vha Ishmaele vha vhatuka; a tevhekana nga kutevhekanele kwavho vha tshi bebwa, ndi: Nabayotho ene tanzhe ḽa Ishmaele, na Kedara na Adibiele na Mibisamu" 
Genesis25:14 na Mishima na Duma na Masa 
Genesis25:15 na Hadadi na Thema na Jeturu na Nafishi na Kedema. 
Genesis25:16 Ndi vhone vhana vha Ishmaele; ayo ndi one madzina a vhavhusi vha matsinde a fumi na vhavhili zwi tshi ya nga miḓana yavho na dzigammba dzavho. 
Genesis25:17 Ishmaele o tshila miṅwaha ya 137, a fa a yo lala na vha hawe." 
Genesis25:18 Vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha dzula muvhunduni u no bva Havila u swika Shuru, tsini ha mukano wa Egipita, muthu o livha Ashuri. Ndi hone hu tshi itea zwe Ishmaele a ambiwa hu tshi pfi, “A hu na shaka ḽawe ḽine a ḓo pfana naḽo.”" 
Genesis25:19 Ngea mafhungo a Isaka ṅwana wa Abrahamu. Abrahamu o vha khotsi a Isaka. 
Genesis25:20 Isaka o vha e na miṅwaha ya 40 musi a tshi vhinga Rabeka ṅwana wa Bethuele wa Muaramu wa Phadani Aramu; Rabeka o vha e khaladzi a Labani wa Muaramu. 
Genesis25:21 Isaka a rabela Muṋe washu a tshi itela musadzi wawe nge a vha e muumba. Muṋe washu a fhindula thabelo yawe, musadzi wawe Rabeka a vhifha muvhilini." 
Genesis25:22 A pfa vhana vha tshi khou kuḓana muvhilini wawe, a ri, “Ndi mini hu tshi itea zwo raliho kha nṋe?” Ndi hone a tshi ya a vhudzisa Muṋe washu." 
Genesis25:23 Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri, “Muvhilini wau hu na tshakha mbili; idzo tshakha mbili dzi ḓo fhandekanyiwa; luṅwe lushaka lu ḓo kunda luṅwe; mukomana u ḓo shumela murathu.”" 
Genesis25:24 Musi tshifhinga tshawe tsha u vhofholowa tshi tshi swika, a beba mawela." 
Genesis25:25 Wa u thoma a tshi bebwa a wanala o tswuka, muvhili wawe woṱhe u tshi nga nguvho ya vhukuse; vha ri u pfi Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Ngavhuya ha bebwa murathu wawe, ó fara Esau nga tshirethe; uyo a pfi Jakopo. Isaka o vha e na miṅwaha ya 60 musi vha tshi bebwa." 
Genesis25:27 Vhatukana avho vha aluwa, Esau a vha muzwimi makone, munna a no ṱwa ḓakani, Jakopo ene o vha e munna o vuḓaho, a tshi dzula hayani." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka o vha a tshi tama ṋama ya phukha dza ḓaka, ndi zwe a vha a tshi funa Esau, hone Rabeka o vha a tshi funa Jakopo." 
Genesis25:29 Muṅwe musi Jakopo a tshi khou ita muthotho, Esau a ḓa a tshi bva ḓakani o farwa nga nḓala." 
Genesis25:30 A amba na Jakopo a ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni mphe muthotho hoyo mutswuku, hoyo mutswuku nandi, ndi na nḓala!” (Ndi zwe ḽiṅwe a vha a tshi pfi Edomo.)" 
Genesis25:31 Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Thomani ni nthengisele vhukomana.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau a ri, “Vhukomana hanga vhu khou mpfarisani ndi tshi khou fa nga nḓala?”" 
Genesis25:33 Hone Jakopo a ri, “Thomani ni nnyanele.” Zwenezwo a mu anela muano, a rengisela Jakopo vhukomana hawe." 
Genesis25:34 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ṋea Esau vhurotho na muthotho. Esau a ḽa, a nwa, a takuwa a ṱuwa. Ngauralo Esau o nyadza vhukomana hawe." 
Genesis26:1 Zwino afho shangoni ha wa nḓala – i si iḽa nḓala ya misi ya Abrahamu – Isaka a pfulutshela Gerara shangoni ḽa Abimelekhe khosi ya Vhafilista. 
Genesis26:2 Muṋe washu a ḓa ha Isaka a ri, “U songo tsela Egipita; dzula henefha shangoni ḽine nda u vhudza uri u dzule hone." 
Genesis26:3 Dzula hafhano shangoni heḽi tshifhinganyana, Nṋe ndi ḓo vha na iwe nda u shudufhadza. Mashango haya oṱhe ndi ḓo a ṋea iwe na vhaḓuhulu vhau, nda khwaṱhisa muano we nda anela khotsi au Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Ndi ḓo andisa vhaḓuhulu vhau vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni, nda vha ṋea mashango haya oṱhe; vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi vha ḓo wana mashudu nga vhana vhau," 
Genesis26:5 nge Abrahamu a nthetshelesa, a ita zwine nda zwi ṱoḓa na zwe nda mu vhudza, a vhulunga milayo yanga.”" 
Genesis26:6 Zwenezwo Isaka a dzula Gerara. 
Genesis26:7 Musi vhathu vha henefho fhethu vha tshi mu vhudzisa nga musadzi wawe, ene a ri, “Ndi khaladzi anga,” nge a vha a tshi ofha u ri, “Ndi musadzi wanga.” A humbula a ri, “Rabeka o naka; vhanna vha fhano vha nga mmbulaha.”" 
Genesis26:8 Musi Isaka o no vha na maḓuvha e henefho, Abimelekhe khosi ya Vhafilista a ṱodzimela nga fasiṱere, a vhona Isaka a tshi khou vhanḓa musadzi wawe Rabeka." 
Genesis26:9 Ndi hone Abimelekhe a tshi vhidzisa Isaka a ri, “Vhukumakuma hoyu ndi musadzi waṋu! Ndi mini no ri ndi khaladzi aṋu?” Isaka a mu fhindula a ri, “Ndi nge nda humbula uri ndi nga vhulahelwa ene.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimelekhe a ri, “Edzonu vhona zwe na nnyita! Muṅwe wa avha vhanna o vha a tshi nga ḓi dzhenisa musadzi waṋu nḓuni, na vha no ri hwesa mulandu.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ndi hone Abimelekhe a tshi vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Ane a vhuya a kwama uyu munna kana musadzi wawe, vhukumakuma u ḓo vhulawa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaka a lima shangoni ḽeneḽo, ṅwaha u tshee wonoyo a kaṋa kaḓana nge Muṋe washu a mu shudufhadza." 
Genesis26:13 A pfuma, lupfumo lwawe lwa ḓi anda lu tshi ya, a vhuya a vha mupfumi muhulu." 
Genesis26:14 O vha na maṱambi manzhi a nngu na kholomo, na dziphuli, lwe Vhafilista vha thoma u mu itela vivho," 
Genesis26:15 vha thivha mabidzi oṱhe o bwiwaho nga phuli dza khotsi awe Abrahamu misi iḽa, Vhafilista vha sala vha tshi a ḓadza mavu." 
Genesis26:16 Abimelekhe a amba na Isaka a ri, “Nga vha pfuluwe shangoni ḽashu, a ri tsha vha kona.”" 
Genesis26:17 Ndi hone Isaka a tshi pfuluwa a yo fhaṱa govhani ḽa Gerara a dzula hone. 
Genesis26:18 Isaka a fukula mabidzi e a bwiwa misi ya khotsi awe Abrahamu e Vhafilista vha vha vho a thivha Abrahamu o no fa, a a rina madzina eneaḽa e a rinwa nga khotsi awe." 
Genesis26:19 Phuli dza Isaka dza bwa govhani dza tumbula tshisima tsha maḓi a elaho henefho. 
Genesis26:20 Hone vhalisa vha Gerara vha luṱana na vhalisa vha Isaka vha ri, “Maḓi aya ndi ashu!” Zwenezwo a ri itsho tshisima tshi pfi Eseke (Maluṱa), nge vha luṱana nae." 
Genesis26:21 Ndi hone vha tshi bwa ḽiṅwe bidzi, na ḽone vha dovha vha ḽi lwela; ndi zwe a ri ḽi pfi Sithina (Vhuswina)." 
Genesis26:22 A ṱuwa henefho a bwa ḽiṅwe bidzi, ha si vhe na ane a ḽi lwela. A ri ḽi pfi Rehobotho (Ḽo aṱama), nge a ri, “Zwino Muṋe washu o ri ḓisa shangoni ḽo aṱamaho; ri ḓo anda shangoni ḽino.”" 
Genesis26:23 U bva henefho a ya Bierisheba. 
Genesis26:24 Vhusiku honoho Muṋe washu a ḓa khae a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu wa khotsi au Abrahamu. U songo ofha tshithu, ndi na iwe; ndi ḓo u shudufhadza nda andisa vhaḓuhulu vhau ndi tshi itela mulanda wanga Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Isaka a fhaṱa aḽiṱari henefho, a rabela Muṋe washu. A akha dennde henefho, phuli dzawe dza bwa bidzi." 
Genesis26:26 Abimelekhe a ḓa u dalela Isaka a tshi bva Gerara, e na Ahuzathi mueletshedzi wawe na Phikholo mulangammbi wawe." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi nndalela, hufha no vha ni tshi mmbenga na nthatha?”" 
Genesis26:28 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro tou zwi vhona zwavhuḓi uri Yahavee u na vhone; ndi zwe ra ri, ‘Nga ri anelane ri vhofhe mulanga,’" 
Genesis26:29 uri vhone a vha nga ri huvhadzi, vhunga na riṋe rí songo vha kwama, ró ḓi vha fara zwavhuḓi, ra vha pfulusa nga mulalo. Zwi a vhonala uri Yahavee o vha shudufhadza.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isaka zwenezwo a vha itela vhuṱambo, vha ḽa vha nwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ḽi tshi tsha avho vhanna vha vhofha mulanga nga muano. Isaka a onesana navho, vha mu ṱutshela nga mulalo." 
Genesis26:32 Musi wonoyo phuli dza Isaka dza ḓa dza mu vhudza nga bidzi ḽe dza bwa. Vha ri, “Ro wana maḓi!”" 
Genesis26:33 A ri ḽi pfi Sheba (Muano). Na ṋamusi dzina ḽa muḓi ḽi kha ḓi pfi Bierisheba (Bidzi ḽa muano). 
Genesis26:34 Musi Esau e na miṅwaha ya 40, a vhinga Judithi ṅwananyana wa Bieri wa Muhithi, a vhinga na Basimatha ṅwananyana wa Eloni wa Muhithi." 
Genesis26:35 Avho vhasadzi vha ita uri Isaka na Rabeka vha dzule vha tshi ḽa mbilu. 
Genesis27:1 Musi Isaka o no kalaha, maṱo awe o no neta a si tsha kona u vhona, a vhidza Esau ṅwana wawe muhulwane, a mu vhudza a ri, “Ṅwananga!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaka a ri, “Zwino ndo no kalaha, musi wa lufu lwanga a thi u ḓivhi." 
Genesis27:3 Zwino-ha, dzhia zwihali zwau – mukutu na vhura – u ye ḓakani u yo nnzwimela phukha ya ḓaka." 
Genesis27:4 U mmbikele zwiḽiwa zwa u ḓifha zwine nda zwi funa, u nnḓisele zwone uri ndi ḽe, ndi u shudufhadze nga mbilu yoṱhe ndi sa athu fa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Zwino Rabeka o vha a tshi khou thetshelesa musi Isaka a tshi khou amba na ṅwana wawe Esau. Esau a tshi bva a tshi ya ḓakani u yo zwima phukha uri a vhuye nayo," 
Genesis27:6 Rabeka a vhudza ṅwana wawe Jakopo a ri, “Vhona, ndo pfa khotsi au vha tshi khou vhudza Esau mukomana wau vha tshi ri," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Nnḓisele phukha u mmbikele zwiḽiwa zwa u ḓifha ndi ḽe, uri ndi u shudufhadze maṱoni a Muṋe washu ndi sa athu fa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Zwino-ha ṅwananga, thetshelesa zwavhuḓi u ite zwine nda u vhudza:" 
Genesis27:9 Ibva u ye sambini, u nnḓisele mbudzana mbili dzi no fhira dzoṱhe, uri ndi bikele khotsi au zwiḽiwa zwi ḓifhaho, zwone zwine vha zwi funa." 
Genesis27:10 U ḓo zwi isa ha khotsi au, vha ḽa, uri vha u shudufhadze vha sa athu fa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Jakopo a fhindula mme awe Rabeka a ri, “Hufha mukomana wanga Esau e munna a re na mahaha, nṋe a thi na mahaha." 
Genesis27:12 Zwino arali khotsi anga vha mphuphuledza? Ndi vho ḓo nga ndi khou vha itela vhukwila, nda vho teketelwa nda si tsha shudufhadzwa.”" 
Genesis27:13 Mme awe vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Ṅwananga, nga hu teketelwe nṋe. Iwe ita zwine nda u vhudza: tshimbila u yo nnzhiela mbudzana hedzo.”" 
Genesis27:14 Ndi hone a tshi yo dzi dzhia, a dzi ḓisa ha mme awe, Rabeka a bika zwiḽiwa zwi ḓifhaho, zwone zwine khotsi awe vha zwi funa." 
Genesis27:15 Zwenezwo Rabeka a dzhia zwiambaro zwa ṅwana wawe muhulwane Esau, zwa maṱeleṱele, zwe Rabeka a vha e nazwo ngomu nḓuni, a ambadza ṅwana wawe muṱuku Jakopo." 
Genesis27:16 A dovha a mu ambadza mukumba wa mbudzana zwanḓani na mukuloni hune ha si vhe na mahaha. 
Genesis27:17 A konou ṋekedza ṅwana wawe Jakopo zwiḽiwa zwi ḓifhaho, na vhurotho he a vhu bika." 
Genesis27:18 Jakopo a ya ha khotsi awe a ri, “Muṋe wanga!” Isaka a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano ṅwananga. Ndi nnyi?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakopo a amba na khotsi awe a ri, “Ndi nṋe Esau tanzhe ḽavho. Ndo ita zwe vha mmbudza. Kha vha vuwe vha dzule, vha ḽe ṋama ya phukha vha kone u ntshudufhadza nga mbilu yoṱhe.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaka a vhudzisa ṅwana wawe a ri, “Khefha u songo vhuya wa lenga na u i wana, ṅwananga?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho ndi Ene we a ita uri zwi nnakele.”" 
Genesis27:21 Ndi hone Isaka a tshi vhudza Jakopo a ri, “Sendela tsini ndi kone u u kwama ṅwananga, ndi ḓivhe arali vhukumakuma e iwe ṅwananga Esau kana u si ene.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakopo a sendela tsini ha khotsi awe Isaka, vha mu phuphuledza vha ri, “Ipfi ndi ḽa Jakopo, zwanḓa zwone ndi zwa Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Ho ngo mu ḓivha, nge zwanḓa zwawe zwa vha zwi na mahaha unga zwa mukomana wawe Esau; zwenezwo a mu shudufhadza." 
Genesis27:24 A vhudzisa a ri, “Vhukumakuma u ṅwananga Esau naa?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe.”" 
Genesis27:25 Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Ṅwananga, ḓisa ṋama ya phukha yau ndi ḽe, ndi kone u u shudufhadza nga mbilu yoṱhe.” Jakopo a mu ṋea a ḽa; a mu ḓisela waini a nwa." 
Genesis27:26 Khotsi awe Isaka vha amba nae vha ri, “Iḓa fhano ṅwananga u nkhise.”" 
Genesis27:27 Ene a ya khavho vha mu khisa. Musi Isaka a tshi pfa munukho wa zwiambaro zwawe, a mu shudufhadza a ri, “Ṅwananga u nukhelela unga ḓaka ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi shudufhadza." 
Genesis27:28 Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi u wisela ṅwando u bvaho ṱaḓulu, a ita uri masimu au a vhibvele, wa kaṋa mavhele manzhi na nḓirivhe dza waini." 
Genesis27:29 Ngavhe tshakha dzi tshi u shumela, vhathu vha mashango vha u luvha. Ngavhe u tshi vhusa vhana vha khotsi au, vhana vha mme au vha u luvha. Vhane vha u teketela ngavhe vha tshi teketelwa, vhane vha u shudufhadza vha shudufhadzwa.”" 
Genesis27:30 Musi Isaka o no fhedza u mu shudufhadza, Jakopo a tshi kha ḓi tou bva u takuwa he a vha e na khotsi awe, mukomana wawe Esau a vha a tshi dzhena a tshi bva u zwima." 
Genesis27:31 Na ene a lugisa zwiḽiwa zwa u ḓifha, a zwi ḓisa ha khotsi awe. A amba navho a ri, “Khotsi anga, kha vha vuwe vha dzule vha ḽe ṋama ya phukha ye nda vha ḓisela, uri vha kone u ntshudufhadza.”" 
Genesis27:32 Khotsi awe Isaka vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi iwe nnyi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe tanzhe ḽavho Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka a tshenuwa a tou tetemela a ri, “Zwino ndi nnyi-ha we a zwima phukha a i ḓisa ha nṋe? U tshi swika ndo vha ndi tshi kha ḓi tou bva u i ḽa, nda mu shudufhadza – ngoho ene u ḓo vha na mashudu.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau a tshi pfa maipfi a khotsi awe, a thoma u lila a tshi tou tshema lu ṱungufhadzaho, a amba na khotsi awe a ri, “Kha vha ntshudufhadze na nṋe, baba!”" 
Genesis27:35 Hone vhone vha ri, “Murathu wau o ḓa nga vhufhura a dzhia mashudu au.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau a ri, “A tshi pfi Jakopo ho ngo rinwa zwavhuḓi? Zwino lwo no vha lwa vhuvhili a tshi mphura: O thoma a nnzhiela vhukomana, zwino o nnzhiela mashudu!” Zwenezwo a vhudzisa a ri, “A vho ngo vhuya vha ntsiela maṅwe mashudu?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka a fhindula a ri, “Ndo mu ita muvhusi wau, mashaka awe oṱhe nda vha ita phuli dzawe, nda mu ṋea mavhele na nḓirivhe dza waini. Zwino tshine nda nga kha ḓi u itela tshone ndi mini ṅwananga?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau a vhudza khotsi awe a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha tou vha na mashudu mathihi fhedzi? Nṋe a vha ntshudufhadzi-vho?” Esau a lila a tou ṱavha mukosi." 
Genesis27:39 Khotsi awe Isaka a mu fhindula a ri, “U ḓo dzula kule na lupfumo lwa ḽifhasi, kule na ṅwando u bvaho ṱaḓulu." 
Genesis27:40 U ḓo tshila nga pfumo, wa shumela murathu wau. Hone u ḓo ri u tshi mu vutshela, wa bvula dzhogo yawe mutsingani wau wa i laṱa kule.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau a fara Jakopo nga mbilu nga mulandu wa mashudu e khotsi awe vha mu ṋea. A amba nga mbilu a ri, “Maḓuvha a u lilela khotsi anga o sendela; ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo vhulaha murathu wanga Jakopo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Musi Rabeka a tshi vhudzwa zwe ṅwana wawe muhulwane Esau a amba, a vhidzisa ṅwana wawe muṱuku Jakopo, a mu vhudza a ri, “Mukomana wau Esau u khou ṱoḓa u ḓilifhedzela nga u u vhulaha." 
Genesis27:43 Zwino-ha ṅwananga, ita zwine nda amba: Ṱavhanya u shavhele ha khaladzi anga Labani ngei Harani." 
Genesis27:44 U dzule navho tshifhinganyana u swika mbiti dza mukomana wau dzi tshi dzika. 
Genesis27:45 Hu ḓo ri mukomana wau a songo tsha u sinyutshela, ó no hangwa zwe wa mu ita, nda konou u laedzela uri u vhuye. Zwi nga mpfarisani ni tshi fa noṱhe nga ḓuvha ḽithihi vhuvhili haṋu?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rabeka a vhudza Isaka a ri, “Ndo netiswa nga vhutshilo nga mulandu wa vhasadzi havha vha Vhahithi. Arali na Jakopo a vhinga musadzi wa ḽino shango a no bva kha vhasadzi vha Vhahithi vha no nga havha, ndi ḓo vha ndi si tshee na tshine nda tshilela tshone.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka a vhidzisa Jakopo, a mu shudufhadza, a mu laya a ri, “U songo vhinga musadzi wa Mukanana." 
Genesis28:2 Ṱavhanya u mbo ḓi ya Phadani Aramu, muṱani wa Bethuele khotsi a mme au. Ḓiwanele musadzi henefho, kha vhananyana vha Labani malume wau." 
Genesis28:3 Ngavhe Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe a tshi u shudufhadza, a ita uri u bebe, vhana vhau vha ande, u vhe khotsi a tshakha nnzhi." 
Genesis28:4 Ngavhe iwe na vhaḓuhulu vhau a tshi vha ṋea mashudu a Abrahamu, uri u dzhie shango ḽine zwino wa khou dzula khaḽo u mutsinda, shango ḽe Mudzimu a ḽi ṋea Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis28:5 Ndi hone Isaka a tshi ri Jakopo a ṱuwe, a ṱuwa a ya Phadani Aramu, ha Labani ṅwana wa Bethuele wa Muaramu. Labani ndi khaladzi a Rabeka, mme a Jakopo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Zwino Esau a zwi pfa uri Isaka o shudufhadza Jakopo a mu ruma Phadani Aramu uri a yo wana musadzi hone, na uri a tshi mu shudufhadza o mu laya a ri, “U songo vhinga musadzi wa Mukanana,”" 
Genesis28:7 a pfa na uri Jakopo o thetshelesa khotsi awe na mme awe a ya Phadani Aramu. 
Genesis28:8 Esau a thoma u vha na nzhele ya uri vhasadzi vha Vhakanana a vha takadzi khotsi awe Isaka. 
Genesis28:9 Zwenezwo a ya ha Ishmaele a vhinga Mahalathi khaladzi a Nebayotho, ṅwana wa Ishmaele ṅwana wa Abrahamu, na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhasadzi vhawe a ḓi dzula navho." 
Genesis28:10 Jakopo a takuwa Bierisheba a livha Harani. 
Genesis28:11 A ri u kovhelelwa huṅwe fhethu, a lala henefho. A dzhia ḽiṅwe tombo henefho a siamela, a eḓela." 
Genesis28:12 A lora a tshi khou vhona nḓila ya tshitizi tsho ima fhasi, nga nṱha hayo i tshi swika makoleni, vharuṅwa vha Mudzimu vha tshi gonya vha tshi tsa ngayo." 
Genesis28:13 Ngei nṱha hayo ho vha ho ima Muṋe washu, a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa makhulu wau Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa Isaka. Shango ḽe wa lala khaḽo ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea iwe na vhaḓuhulu vhau." 
Genesis28:14 Vhaḓuhulu vhau vha ḓo anda unga thorwana dza mavu, na ḓala ni tshi ya vhukovhela na vhubvaḓuvha, ni tshi ya devhula na tshipembe. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi vha ḓo wana mashudu nga iwe na vhana vhau." 
Genesis28:15 Nṋe ndi na iwe, ndi ḓo u londola hoṱhe hune wa ya, nda u vhuisa shangoni heḽino. A thi nga u litshi; ndi ḓo vhuya nda khunyeledza zwe nda u fulufhedzisa.”" 
Genesis28:16 Musi Jakopo a tshi vuwa khofheni a elekanya a ri, “Vhukumakuma Muṋe washu u hone hafhano fhethu; nṋe ndo vha ndi sa zwi ḓivhi.”" 
Genesis28:17 A farwa nga nyofho a ri, “Fhethu afha hu ofhisa hani! Hafhano ndi nḓuni ya Mudzimu, a hu na zwiṅwe; hei ndi khoro ya ḽiṱaḓulu.”" 
Genesis28:18 Ḽi tshi tsha Jakopo a fhinduwa a dzhia tombo ḽe a vha o ḽi siamela, a ḽi imisa sa phuphu a ḽi tevhulela mapfura." 
Genesis28:19 Fhethu afho a ri hu pfi Bethele (Nnḓu ya Mudzimu). Kale muḓi wo vha u tshi pfi Lusi. 
Genesis28:20 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ana a ri, “Arali Mudzimu a vha na nṋe, a nndondola lwendoni ulu lwe nda lu fara, a mpha zwiḽiwa nda ḽa, na zwiambaro nda ambara," 
Genesis28:21 nda vhuya nda humela muṱani wa khotsi anga nga mulalo, ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo vha Mudzimu wanga," 
Genesis28:22 tombo heḽi ḽe nda ḽi imisa sa phuphu ḽi ḓo vha nnḓu ya Mudzimu; zwoṱhe zwine a ḓo nṋea ndi ḓo mu ṋea tsha fumi tshazwo.” 
Genesis29:1 Huno Jakopo a dovha a fara lwendo lwawe, a swika shangoni ḽa tshakha dza vhubvaḓuvha." 
Genesis29:2 Henefho a vhona bidzi ḓakani, na maṱambi mararu a nngu o shuvhama tsini haḽo, ngauri maṱambi ayo o vha a tshi nwa maḓi bidzini ḽeneḽo. Tombo ḽe ḽa vha ḽo vala mulomo wa bidzi ḽo vha ḽi ḽihulwane." 
Genesis29:3 Musi maṱambi oṱhe o kuvhangana henefho, vhalisa vho vha vha tshi kungulusa tombo iḽo ḽa bva mulomoni wa bidzi, nngu dza konou nwa. Ngavhuya vha konou dovha vha kungulusela tombo vhudzuloni haḽo ḽa vala mulomo wa bidzi." 
Genesis29:4 Jakopo a vhudzisa vhalisa a ri, “Vha hashu, ni bva ngafhi?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri bva Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Ene a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Vho-Labani muḓuhulu wa Nahoro ni a vha ḓivha naa?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ee, ri a vha ḓivha.”" 
Genesis29:6 Jakopo a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Vho takala naa?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ee, vho takala; ṅwananyana wavho Rahele ngoyu a tshi khou ḓa na nngu.”" 
Genesis29:7 Ene a ri, “Vhonani, hu tshee masiari tshivhangalala, a tshi athu vha tshifhinga tsha u kuvhanganya maṱambi a nngu. Nwisani nngu maḓi ni dzi humisele pfuloni.”" 
Genesis29:8 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri nga si kone, ri ḓo thoma ra lindela maṱambi a nngu a tshi kuvhangana oṱhe, tombo ḽa kunguluswa ḽa bva mulomoni wa bidzi. Ndi hone ri tshi ḓo nwisa nngu.”" 
Genesis29:9 Musi a tshi kha ḓi amba navho, Rahele a mbo ḓi swika na nngu dza khotsi awe, ngauri o vha e ene mulisa wadzo." 
Genesis29:10 Jakopo a tshi vhona Rahele ṅwananyana wa Labani malume wawe, na nngu dza Labani, a mbo ḓi kungulusa tombo a ḽi bvisa mulomoni wa bidzi, nngu dza malume awe dza nwa maḓi." 
Genesis29:11 Zwenezwo Jakopo a khisa Rahele, a thoma u lila a tshi tou ṱavha mukosi." 
Genesis29:12 O vha o vhudza Rahele uri ndi ene shaka ḽa khotsi awe, ndi ene ṅwana wa Rabeka. Ndi hone Rahele a tshi gidima a yo vhudza khotsi awe." 
Genesis29:13 Labani a tshi tou pfa mafhungo a Jakopo ṅwana wa khaladzi awe, a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a yo mu ṱanganedza. A mu kuvhatedza, a mu khisa, a vhuya nae hayani hawe; henefho Jakopo a vhudza Labani zwoṱhe zwo iteaho." 
Genesis29:14 Labani a vhudza Jakopo a ri, “Inwi ni tou vha malofha a hashu.” Musi Jakopo o no dzula na Labani ṅwedzi woṱhe," 
Genesis29:15 Labani a amba nae a ri, “Ni nga sokou ntshumela fhedzi nge na vha shaka ḽanga? Mmbudzeni malamba ane na a ṱoḓa.”" 
Genesis29:16 Zwino Labani o vha e na vhananyana vhavhili; muhulwane o vha a tshi pfi Lea, muṱuku a tshi pfi Rahele." 
Genesis29:17 Maṱo a Lea o vha a sa penyi; Rahele ene o vha e na tshivhumbeo tshavhuḓi, ó nakesa." 
Genesis29:18 Jakopo o vha a tshi funana na Rahele, ndi zwe a ri, “Ndi ḓo vha shumela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili, vha konou mpha ṅwananyana wavho muṱuku Rahele.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani a ri, “Ndi khwiṋe u mu ṋea iwe u fhira u mu ṋea mutsinda. Iwe dzula fhano na nṋe.”" 
Genesis29:20 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi shuma miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili uri a fhiwe Rahele, hone iyo miṅwaha o vhona i tshi tou nga maḓuvha a si gathi, nge a vha a tshi funa Rahele." 
Genesis29:21 Musi miṅwaha iyo miṱanu na mivhili yo no fhela, Jakopo a vhudza Labani a ri, “Nga vha mphe musadzi wanga, ndi ṱoḓa u mu dzhenisa nḓuni.”" 
Genesis29:22 Labani a kuvhanganya vhathu vhoṱhe vha henefho a ita munyanya. 
Genesis29:23 Hó no vha madekwana, a dzhia ṅwananyana wawe Lea a mu ṋea Jakopo, Jakopo a mu dzhenisa nḓuni." 
Genesis29:24 (Labani o dzhia phuli yawe ya musidzana, Zilipha, a i ṋea ṅwananyana wawe uri i vhe phuli yawe ya musidzana.)" 
Genesis29:25 Musi ḽi tshi tsha, ha wanala hu na Lea! Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi vhudza Labani a ri, “Ndi mini izwi zwe vha nnyita? Hufha ndo vha shumela uri ndi wane Rahele, zwino ndi mini vho mphura?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labani a fhindula a ri, “Fhano ha hashu zwi a ila murathu a tshi vhingiwa mukomana a sa athu vhingwa." 
Genesis29:27 Litsha vhege ya munyanya wa uyu ṅwananyana i fhele, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo u fha na hoyu muṱuku Rahele, wa konou shuma miṅwe miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili nge nda u fha ene.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakopo a ita nga u ralo. A fhedza vhege e na Lea, Jakopo a konou mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Rahele a vha musadzi wawe." 
Genesis29:29 Labani a dzhia phuli yawe ya musidzana Biliha a i ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Rahele, ya vha phuli yawe ya musidzana." 
Genesis29:30 Jakopo a dzhenisa Rahele nḓuni, a funa Rahele u fhira Lea. A shumela Labani miṅwe miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili." 
Genesis29:31 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi vhona uri Lea ha funiwi, a ita uri a bebe vhana, Rahele a vha muumba." 
Genesis29:32 Lea a vhifha muvhilini a beba ṅwana wa mutukana. A ri u pfi Rubeni, nge a ri, “Muṋe washu o vhona u tambula hanga; vhukuma munna wanga zwino u ḓo mpfuna.”" 
Genesis29:33 A dovha a vhifha muvhilini, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri, “Muṋe washu o dovha a mpha hoyu, nge a vhona uri a thi funwi.” A ri u pfi Simioni." 
Genesis29:34 A dovha a vhifha muvhilini, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri, “Zwino munna wanga u ḓo pfana na nṋe, nge nda mu bebela vhatuka vhararu.” Ndi zwe a ri u pfi Livi." 
Genesis29:35 A dovha hafhu a vhifha muvhilini, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri, “Zwino ndi ḓo renda Muṋe washu.” A ri u pfi Juda. Zwenezwo a si tsha vha na vhana." 
Genesis30:1 Musi Rahele a tshi vhona uri ha bebeli Jakopo vhana, a thoma u vhivha mukomana wawe. A vhudza Jakopo a ri, “Nga vha mphe vhana; vha sa mpha ndi a fa!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakopo a mu sinyutshela a ri, “Kani ndi nṋe Mudzimu? Ndi Ene we a ni kundisa u wana vhana!”" 
Genesis30:3 Rahele a ri, “Biliha phuli yanga ya musidzana ngoyu. Nga vha mu dzhenise nḓuni a mmbebele vhana, uri na nṋe ndi kone u fhaṱa-vho muṱa ngae.”" 
Genesis30:4 Ndi hone Rahele a tshi ṋea Jakopo phuli yawe Biliha a vha musadzi wawe. Jakopo a mu dzhenisa nḓuni," 
Genesis30:5 a vhifha muvhilini, a mu bebela ṅwana wa mutukana." 
Genesis30:6 Rahele a ri, “Muṋe washu o ntsengela; o thetshelesa tshililo tshanga, a nṋea ṅwana wa mutukana.” Ndi zwe a ri u pfi Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliha phuli ya Rahele a dovha a vhifha muvhilini a bebela Jakopo mutukana wa vhuvhili. 
Genesis30:8 Rahele a ri, “Ndo lwa nndwa khulu na mukomana wanga, nda kunda.” Ndi zwe a ri u pfi Nafuthali." 
Genesis30:9 Lea a tshi vhona uri o no ima u wana vhana, a dzhia Zilipha phuli yawe ya musidzana a mu ṋea Jakopo uri a vhe musadzi wawe." 
Genesis30:10 Zilipha phuli ya Lea ya bebela Jakopo ṅwana wa mutukana. 
Genesis30:11 Lea a ri, “Ndi mashudu mangafhani!” a ri u pfi Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Zilipha phuli ya Lea ya bebela Jakopo mutukana wa vhuvhili. 
Genesis30:13 Lea a ri, “Ndo takala hani! Vhasadzi vha ḓo ri ndi na mashudu.” A ri u pfi Ashere." 
Genesis30:14 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga tshifhinga tsha musi hu tshi kaṋiwa goroi, Rubeni a bva a ya masimuni, a wana mitshelo, a i fha mme awe Lea. Rahele a amba na Lea a ri, “Nga vha mphe-vho mitshelo ya ṅwana wavho.”" 
Genesis30:15 Lea a mu fhindula a ri, “Zwe na nnzhiela munna a zwo ngo eḓana naa? Zwino ni ṱoḓa u dzhia na mitshelo ya ṅwananga?” Rahele a ri, “Ndi zwone, Vho-Jakopo vha ḓo vha dzhenisa nḓuni vhusiku ha ṋamusi, tenda vhone vha mpha mitshelo ya ṅwana wavho.”" 
Genesis30:16 Jakopo a tshi vhuya masimuni nga madekwana, Lea a yo mu ṱanganedza, a ri, “Vha fanela u nnzhenisa nḓuni, ndo vha renga nga mitshelo ya ṅwananga.” Vhusiku honoho Jakopo a dzhenisa Lea nḓuni." 
Genesis30:17 Mudzimu a thetshelesa thabelo ya Lea, a mbo ḓi vhifha muvhilini, a bebela Jakopo ṅwana wa vhuṱanu wa mutukana." 
Genesis30:18 Lea a ri, “Mudzimu o mpfufha nge nda fha munna wanga phuli yanga ya musidzana.” Ndi zwe a ri ṅwana u pfi Isakhara." 
Genesis30:19 Lea a dovha a vha muthu wa thovhela, a bebela Jakopo ṅwana wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi wa mutukana." 
Genesis30:20 Zwino Lea a ri, “Mudzimu o mpha tshifhiwa tsha mutengo muhulu. Zwino ndi hone munna wanga a tshi ḓo nkhulisa, nge nda mu bebela vhatuka vhaṱanu na muthihi.” A ri ṅwana u pfi Zebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Ngavhuya a beba musidzana a ri u pfi Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi elelwa Rahele; a thetshelesa thabelo yawe, a ita uri a bebe ṅwana." 
Genesis30:23 Rahele a vhifha muvhilini, a beba mutukana, a ri, “Mudzimu o ṱusa u nyadziwa hanga.”" 
Genesis30:24 A ri uyo ṅwana u pfi Josefa, a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi dovha a nnyengedza muṅwe mutukana.”" 
Genesis30:25 Musi Rahele o no beba Josefa, Jakopo a amba na Labani a ri, “Kha vha litshe ndi ṱuwe ndi vhuelele ha hashu." 
Genesis30:26 Kha vha nṋee vhasadzi vhanga na vhana vhanga vhe vha mpha nge nda tou vha shumela, ndi kone u ṱuwa. Vhone vha a ḓivha uri ndo vha shumela zwingafhani.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani a mu fhindula a ri, “Arali ni tshi ntakalela, dzulani na nṋe. Ndo vhonisa nda pfa uri Yahavee o ntshudufhadza a tshi itela inwi.”" 
Genesis30:28 A dovha a ri, “Mmbudzeni malamba ane na a ṱoḓa, ndi ḓo ni fha.”" 
Genesis30:29 Jakopo a mu vhudza a ri, “Vha a zwi ḓivha uri ndo vha shumela hani, na uri thakha yavho ndi tshi i londola yo anda hani." 
Genesis30:30 Zwiṱukuṱuku zwe vha vha vhe nazwo ndi sa athu ḓa zwo anda nga maanḓa, nahone Muṋe washu o vha shudufhadza hoṱhe he nda vha ndi hone. Hone zwino, muṱa wanga ndi ḓo u shumela lini?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi ni fhe mini?” Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Vha songo mpha tshithu. Hone arali vha nnyitela tshithu hetshi tshithihi fhedzi, ndi ḓo ḓi londola maṱambi a nngu dzavho nda dzi lisa:" 
Genesis30:32 Kha vha ri ndi tandule maṱambi a nngu dzavho ṋamusi ndi khethe khwana kana thamahana, ngwana dzoṱhe tswana na mbudzi dzoṱhe thamahana kana khwana. Dzenedzo dzi ḓo vha dzone malamba anga." 
Genesis30:33 U fulufhedzea hanga hu ḓo nṱanzilela nga tshifhinga tshi ḓaho, musi vha tshi sedza muholo we vha nkholela. Mbudzi iṅwe na iṅwe ine nda vha nayo ine ya si vhe khwana kana thamahana, kana ngwana ine ya si vhe tswana nga i pfi ndo i tswa.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani a ri, “Ro pfana. Nga zwi tou ralo.”" 
Genesis30:35 Hone musi wonoyo Labani a mbo ḓi khetha mbokoṱo dzoṱhe tseha kana thamaha na mbudzi dzoṱhe dza tsadzi khwana kana thamahana, dzoṱhe dze dza vha dzi na muvhala mutshena, na ngwana dzoṱhe tswana, a ri dzi liswe nga vhana vhawe vha vhatuka." 
Genesis30:36 A ṱuwa nadzo a fara lwendo lwa maḓuvha mararu, Jakopo ene a sala a tshi londola nngu dza Labani." 
Genesis30:37 Jakopo a dzhia matavhi maṋu a mupopuliri na mualimondo na mupulatani a tsheṱa mitalo mitshena khao nga u kwatula makwati, ha vhonala thanda tshena ya nga ngomu ya matavhi." 
Genesis30:38 A vhea matavhi ayo o kwatulwaho mikungwani ya maḓi na hoṱhe hune dza nwa hone, uri a livhane na nngu musi dzi tshi ḓa u nwa maḓi," 
Genesis30:39 thutha dza hwela tsadzi henefho phanḓa ha ayo matavhi. Dza dzwala ngwana tsehana kana khwana kana thamahana. 
Genesis30:40 Jakopo a khethela ngwana thungo, hone a ita uri dziṅwe dzoṱhe dzi lavhelese tsehana na tswana dze dza vha dzi dza Labani. Nga u ralo a khetha dzawe nngu a si tende dzi tshi ṱangana na dza Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Ho vha hu tshi ri musi tsadzi dzi re na ḓafu dzo siama, Jakopo a vhea aḽa matavhi mikungwani phanḓa hadzo uri dzi hwelane dzó sedza matavhi," 
Genesis30:42 hone arali izwo zwifuwo zwi zwirole, o vha a sa vhei matavhi phanḓa hazwo. Zwenezwo zwirole zwo vha zwa Labani, zwi re na ḓafu zwa vha zwa Jakopo." 
Genesis30:43 Ngauralo Jakopo a pfuma, a vha na maṱambi mahulu a nngu na phuli dza vhasidzana na dza vhanna, na dzigamela na dzidonngi." 
Genesis31:1 Jakopo a pfa uri vhana vha Labani vho vha vha tshi khou ri, “Jakopo o dzhia zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi zwa khotsi ashu; lupfumo lwe lwa vha lu lwa khotsi ashu lwo no vha lwawe.”" 
Genesis31:2 Jakopo a zwi vhona uri Labani ha tsha mu sedza sa kale. 
Genesis31:3 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Jakopo a ri, “Humela shangoni ḽa vhokhotsi au, mashakani au; Nṋe ndi ḓo vha na iwe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Jakopo a laedzela Lea na Rahele uri vha ḓe pfuloni he maṱambi awe a vha e hone. 
Genesis31:5 A vha vhudza a ri, “Ndi vhona uri khotsi aṋu a vha tsha ntsedza sa kale, hone Mudzimu wa khotsi anga o ḓi vha na nṋe." 
Genesis31:6 Inwi ni a zwi ḓivha uri ndo shumela khotsi aṋu nga nungo dzanga dzoṱhe," 
Genesis31:7 hone khotsi aṋu vho mphura vha shandukisa kafumi muholo we ra langana. Naho zwo ralo Mudzimu ho ngo vha tendela u nkhuvhadza. 
Genesis31:8 He vha ri, ‘Khwana dzi ḓo vha dzau,’ maṱambi oṱhe o mbo ḓi dzwala khwana; he vha ri, ‘Tsehana dzi ḓo vha dzau,’ maṱambi oṱhe o mbo ḓi dzwala tsehana." 
Genesis31:9 Zwino-ha, ndi Mudzimu we a dzhia thakha ya khotsi aṋu a i fha nṋe." 
Genesis31:10 “Nga tshifhinga tsha musi zwifuwo zwi tshi dzwala ndo vhuya nda lora ndi tshi khou sedza nda vhona mbokoṱo dzine dza hwela maṱambi dzi tshi nga ndi tseha na nkhwe kana thamaha. 
Genesis31:11 Muruṅwa wa Mudzimu a amba na nṋe muloroni a ri, ‘Jakopo!’ Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, ‘Ndi fhano!’" 
Genesis31:12 Ene a ri, ‘Sedza u vhone uri mbokoṱo dzoṱhe dzi no hwela maṱambi ndi tseha na nkhwe na thamaha, ngauri ndo zwi vhona zwoṱhe zwine Labani a khou u ita." 
Genesis31:13 Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu we wa mu vhona Bethele he wa tevhulela phuphu mapfura, wa nnyanela. Zwino ṱavhanya u pfuluwe shangoni ḽino, u vhuele shangoni ḽa haṋu.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ndi hone Rahele na Lea vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe ri kha ḓi vha na mukovhe kha ifa ḽa khotsi ashu lini?" 
Genesis31:15 A thi ri khotsi ashu vha vho ri sedza sa vhatsinda. Vho tou ri rengisa, vha dovha vha ḽa na thundu yo ri rengaho." 
Genesis31:16 Vhukuma lupfumo lwoṱhe lwe Mudzimu a lu dzhiela khotsi ashu ndi lwashu na vhana vhashu. Zwino vhone nga vha ite zwe Mudzimu a vha vhudza.” 
Genesis31:17 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi namedza vhana vhawe na vhasadzi gamela," 
Genesis31:18 a khada thakha yawe yoṱhe, a ṱuwa khathihi na thundu yawe yoṱhe ye a i wana Phadani Aramu, a humela ha khotsi awe Isaka shangoni ḽa Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Muṅwe musi Labani o ya u vheula nngu dzawe vhukuse, Rahele a tswa zwitungulo zwa khotsi awe." 
Genesis31:20 Jakopo na ene a dovha a fhura Labani wa Muaramu nga u shavha a songo mu vhudza. 
Genesis31:21 Ndi hone a tshi shavha na zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo, a pfuka mulambo wa Yufuratha, a livha makwarani a Giliadi." 
Genesis31:22 Huno nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru Labani a vhudzwa uri Jakopo o shavha. 
Genesis31:23 Labani a ramba mashaka awe, a londa Jakopo a fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, a mu fara makwarani a Giliadi." 
Genesis31:24 Zwenezwo Mudzimu a ḓa ha Labani wa Muaramu nga muloro vhusiku, a amba nae a ri, “U vhone, u songo vhuya wa sengisa Jakopo tshithu na tshithihi tshe a ita.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani a tshi swika ha Jakopo a wana o akha dennde yawe thavhani dza Giliadi, Labani na mashaka awe na vhone vha ṱoka mishasha yavho henefho." 
Genesis31:26 Ndi hone Labani a tshi amba na Jakopo a ri, “No ita mini? No mphura, nahone no hwala vhananyana vhanga na ṱuwa navho unga mathubwa a nndwani." 
Genesis31:27 Ndi mini no tou ṋenga na mphura? Ndi mini ni songo mmbudza, uri ndi ni fhelekedze nga dakalo na nyimbo hu tshi lila mirumba na mbila?" 
Genesis31:28 A no ngo vhuya na nnditsha nda onesana na vhaḓuhulu vhanga na vhananyana vhanga. No ita zwithu zwa vhutsilu. 
Genesis31:29 Nṋe ndi na maanḓa a uri ndi ni huvhadze; hone madekwe Mudzimu wa khotsi aṋu o mmbudza a ri, ‘U vhone, u songo vhuya wa sengisa Jakopo na tshithu na tshithihi tshe a ita!’" 
Genesis31:30 Zwino ndi zwone, no ṱuwa nge na ṱuvha u humela muṱani wa khotsi aṋu; hone ndi mini no tswa midzimu yanga?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakopo a fhindula Labani a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi ofha, ndi tshi ri vhone vha ḓo nnzhiela vhananyana vhavho nga khani." 
Genesis31:32 Hone arali vha wana a re na midzimu yavho, onoyo kha a fe. Henefha maṱoni a mashaka ashu, nga vha ḓisedzele arali nṋe ndi na tshine tsha vha tshavho fhano; arali tshi hone nga vha tshi dzhie.” Jakopo a tshi ralo o vha a sa ḓivhi uri Rahele o tswa izwo zwitungulo." 
Genesis31:33 Ndi hone Labani a tshi dzhena denndeni ya Jakopo na ya Lea na ya phuli mbili dza vhasadzi, a si wane tshithu. A ri u bva denndeni ya Lea a dzhena kha ya Rahele." 
Genesis31:34 Zwino Rahele o vha o dzhia zwitungulo a zwi longa ngomu ha sala ya gamela yawe, a dzula nṱha hazwo. Labani a sedza hoṱhe denndeni a si wane tshithu." 
Genesis31:35 Rahele a vhudza khotsi awe a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha songo sinyuwa ndi sa koni u takuwa ndi tshi vha vhona; ndi khou vhona ṅwedzi.” Zwenezwo Labani a sedza zwitungulo a si vhuye a zwi wana." 
Genesis31:36 Ndi hone hu tshi vho sinyuwa Jakopo, a ḽela Labani vhuhali. A ri, “Ndo tshinyani? Tshivhi tshe nda ita ndi tshifhio lune vha vhuya vha tou nnzwima?" 
Genesis31:37 Vhunga zwino vho guduba thundu yanga yoṱhe, tshe vha tshi wana tshi re tsha muṱani wavho ndi tshifhio? Kha vha tshi vhee hafha phanḓa ha mashaka ashu, vha vhe vhone vha no haṱula riṋe vhavhili." 
Genesis31:38 Ndo no ḓi dzula navho nda fhedza miṅwaha ya 20 zwino. Nngu dzavho na mbudzi dzavho dzo vha dzi sa fholodzi, na thutha dza maṱambi avho a tho ngo vhuya nda dzi ḽa." 
Genesis31:39 Zwifuwo zwo fhafhulwaho nga zwivhanda a tho ngo vhuya nda vha ḓisela zwone; nṋe ndi nṋe we nda lifha. Vhone vho nndifhisa zwoṱhe zwe zwa tswiwa vhusiku kana masiari. 
Genesis31:40 Ndo vha ndi tshi swa nga ḓuvha masiari, vhusiku ndi tshi pfa phephe, ndi tshi lala ndo linda ndi sa fari khofhe." 
Genesis31:41 Zwa ḓi ralo ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 20 ndi mushumi wavho. Ndo vha shumela miṅwaha ya 14 uri ndi fhiwe vhananyana vhavho vhavhili, miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi ndi tshi shuma uri ndi wane maṱambi a nngu dzavho, vhona vha ḓi shandukisa muholo wanga lu sa gumi." 
Genesis31:42 Ngavhe Mudzimu wa khotsi anga, Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, Mudzimu a ofhisaho wa Isaka, a si ime na nṋe, vho vha vha tshi ḓo ri ndi ṱuwe ndi si na tshithu. Hone Mudzimu o vhona vhuleme hanga na u ḓinetisa ndi tshi shuma nga zwanḓa zwanga, ndi zwe madekwe a nnyimelela.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani a fhindula Jakopo a ri, “Vhasadzi havha ndi vhananyana vhanga, vhana havha ndi vhana vhanga, maṱambi haya a nngu ndi anga. Zwoṱhe zwine na zwi vhona ndi zwanga. Zwino ṋamusi ndi nga huvhadza hani avha vhananyana vhanga, kana vhana vhe vha vha beba?" 
Genesis31:44 Ndi khwiṋe ri tshi vhofha mulanga, nṋe na inwi, ri imise tshihumbudzi tshine tsha ḓo ri humbudza mulanga uyo.”" 
Genesis31:45 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi dzhia tombo a ḽi imisa ḽa vha tshihumbudzo. 
Genesis31:46 A vhudza mashaka awe a ri, “Kuvhanganyani matombo.” Vhone vha dzhia matombo vha a khokha, vha ḽa henefho he vha khokha matombo." 
Genesis31:47 Labani nga Tshiaramu a ri iyo thulwi i pfi Jegara Sahadutha (Thulwi ya vhuṱanzi), Jakopo nga Tshiheberu a ri i pfi Galiede (Thulwi ya vhuṱanzi)." 
Genesis31:48 Labani a ri, “Hei thulwi ndi ṱhanzi yanga na inwi ṋamusi.” Ndi zwe ya pfi Galiede." 
Genesis31:49 Ḽiṅwe yo vha i tshi pfi Mitsipha (Tshiingamo), nge Labani a dovha a ri, “Ngavhe Yahavee a tshi ri londola nṋe na inwi musi ri kule na kule." 
Genesis31:50 Arali na tambudza vhananyana vhanga kana na dzea vhaṅwe vhasadzi, nangwe hu tshi ḓo vha hu si tshee na muṅwe a re na riṋe, ḓivhani uri Mudzimu ndi ṱhanzi yanga na inwi.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labani a dovha a vhudza Jakopo a ri, “Thulwi iyi ndi tshihumbudzo tshashu nṋe na inwi tshe nda tshi ṱoka tsha ima, ngetshi." 
Genesis31:52 Thulwi hei ndi ṱhanzi, tshihumbudzo hetshi na tshone ndi ṱhanzi ya uri nṋe a thi nga fhiri thulwi hei nda pfukela siani ḽaṋu nda ḓa nda ni huvhadza, na uri inwi a ni nga fhiri thulwi hei na tshihumbudzo hetshi na pfukela siani ḽanga na ḓa na nkhuvhadza." 
Genesis31:53 Ngavhe mudzimu wa Abrahamu na mudzimu wa Nahoro, midzimu ya vhokhotsi avho, i tshi vha yone vhahaṱuli vhashu, nṋe na inwi.” Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ana nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu a ofhisaho wa khotsi awe Isaka." 
Genesis31:54 A ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo henefho makwarani, a vhidza mashaka awe uri vha ḓe vha ḽe nae. Musi vho fhedza u ḽa vha eḓela henefho." 
Genesis31:55 Ḽi tshi tsha hu tshee nga matsheloni Labani a onesana na vhaḓuhulu vhawe na vhananyana vhawe a vha shudufhadza. Ndi hone a tshi ṱuwa a humela hayani. 
Genesis32:1 Musi na Jakopo o fara yawe nḓila, vharuṅwa vha Mudzimu vha ṱangana nae." 
Genesis32:2 Jakopo a tshi vha vhona a ri, “Hoyu ndi mushasha wa Mudzimu!” A ri afho fhethu hu pfi Mahanaimi (Mishasha mivhili)." 
Genesis32:3 Jakopo a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha mu ranga phanḓa vha ya ha mukomana wawe Esau shangoni ḽa Seiri kha ḽa Edomo. 
Genesis32:4 A vha laya a ri, “Ni tshi vhudza muṋe wanga Esau ni ri, ‘Mulanda wavho Jakopo u ri: Ndo vha ndi tshi dzula na Labani, nda dzula henengei u swika zwino." 
Genesis32:5 Ndi na kholomo na donngi, nngu na mbudzi, phuli dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi. Zwino ndi khou swikisa malaedzwa haya ha muṋe wanga, ndi ri ngavhe vha tshi nṱanganedza nga mulalo.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Musi vhaḓinḓa vha tshi humela ha Jakopo, vha ri, “Ro ya ha mukomana wavho Esau, vha khou ḓa u vha ṱanganedza, vha khou ḓa na vhanna vha 400.”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakopo a ofha zwihulu a tou hanganea. A fhandekanya vhathu vhe vha vha vhe nae vha bva zwigwada zwivhili, a fhandekanya na maṱambi a nngu na a kholomo na a gamela nga u ralo." 
Genesis32:8 A elekanya a ri, “Arali Esau a tshi swika a lwa na tshigwada tshithihi, khamusi tshigwada tsho salaho tshi nga ḓi ponyoka tsha shavha.”" 
Genesis32:9 Zwenezwo Jakopo a rabela a ri, “Mudzimu wa makhulu wanga Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa khotsi anga Isaka, Iwe Muṋe washu, wo mmbudza wa ri, ‘Humela shangoni ḽa hau ha mashaka au, ndi ḓo ita uri zwi u nakele.’" 
Genesis32:10 Muṋe washu, a tho ngo fanelwa nga vhuthu hoṱhe he wa nnyitela na u fulufhedzea he wa sumbedza nṋe mulanda wau. Ndi tshi wela mulambo uyu wa Jorodani ndo vha ndi tshi tou vha na mbaḓa yanga fhedzi, hone zwino ndo no vha na zwigwada zwivhili." 
Genesis32:11 Ndi a rabela ndi ri, ntshidze zwanḓani zwa mukomana wanga Esau; ndi a ofha uri u ḓo ḓa a lwa na nṋe a vhulaha vhomme na vhana vhavho." 
Genesis32:12 Hufha wo ri, ‘Vhukuma ndi ḓo ita uri zwi u nakele, nda andisa vhaḓuhulu vhau vha nga muṱavha wa lwanzhe, une wa si kone u vhaliwa nga u anda.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 A lala henefho. Kha zwe a vha e nazwo a nangela mukomana wawe tshifhiwa: 
Genesis32:14 maḓana mavhili a mbudzi dza phambala na mbokoṱo dza 20, nngu dza tsadzi dza 200 na thutha dza 20," 
Genesis32:15 gamela dza tsadzi dza 30 na vhana vhadzo, kholomo dza tsadzi dza 40 na mboho dza fumi na donngi dza tsadzi dza 20 na mboho dza fumi." 
Genesis32:16 A ri vhashumi vhawe vha dzi londole, sambi ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi thungo, a vhudza vhashumi vhawe a ri, “Nthangeni phanḓa ni sie tshikhala vhukati ha masambi.”" 
Genesis32:17 A laya o rangaho phanḓa a ri, “Arali mukomana wanga Esau a ṱangana na iwe a u vhudzisa a ri, ‘U wa nnyi? U ya ngafhi? Muṋe wa zwifuwo izwi zwoṱhe zwine wa khou zwi swoga ndi nnyi?’" 
Genesis32:18 iwe u mu fhindule u ri, ‘Ndi zwa mulanda wavho Jakopo; ndi tshifhiwa tshi no khou iswa ha muṋe wanga Esau; Jakopo u khou ri tevhela.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Jakopo a laya na wa vhuvhili na wa vhuraru na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha no khou swoga maṱambi ayo a ri, “Na inwi ni tshi ṱangana na Esau ni ambe zwi fanaho." 
Genesis32:20 Ni songo hangwa u ri, ‘Mulanda wavho Jakopo u khou ri tevhela.’ ” Jakopo o humbula a ri, “Ndi ḓo rudza mbilu yawe nga zwifhiwa hezwi zwe nda zwi rangisa phanḓa; ngavhuya ndi tshi vho mu vhona, khamusi u ḓo nṱanganedza nga mulalo.”" 
Genesis32:21 Nangoho zwifhiwa zwa Jakopo zwa mu ranga phanḓa, hone ene muṋe a lala henefho mushashani." 
Genesis32:22 Vhusiku honoho Jakopo a vuwa a dzhia vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili na phuli mbili dza vhasadzi na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vha 11, a wela mulambo wa Jaboko nga ḓambuwoni." 
Genesis32:23 Musi o no vha wedza mulambo a wedza na thundu dzawe dzoṱhe. 
Genesis32:24 Zwenezwo Jakopo o vha o no sala e eṱhe, ha ḓa munna a ita tsimbe nae ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha." 
Genesis32:25 Huno munna uyo a tshi vhona uri ha koni u kunda Jakopo, a rwa Jakopo kha khundu dza fhirea a tshi khou ita tsimbe na uyo munna." 
Genesis32:26 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi ri, “Ḽo tsha, nnditshe ndi ṱuwe.” Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nga si u litshe wa ṱuwa u sa athu ntshudufhadza.”" 
Genesis32:27 Uyo munna a mu vhudzisa a ri, “U pfi nnyi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi pfi Jakopo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi ri, “A u tsha ḓo pfi Jakopo, u vho ḓo pfi Israele, nge wa ita tsimbe na Mudzimu na vhathu wa konḓelela.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakopo a ri, “Zwino mmbudze uri u pfi nnyi.” Huno Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi mini u tshi vhudzisa dzina ḽanga?” Ndi hone a tshi shudufhadza Jakopo henefho." 
Genesis32:30 Jakopo a ri, “Ndo vhona Mudzimu ndo livhana nae, hone ndi si fe.” Ndi zwe a ri afho fhethu hu pfi Phenuele (Tshifhaṱuwo tsha Mudzimu)." 
Genesis32:31 Jakopo a tshi ṱuwa Phenuele, ḓuvha ḽa vha ḽi tshi bva, a tshi khou ṱudza nge a vha o fhirea khundu." 
Genesis32:32 Ndi zwine u swika ṋamusi Vhaisraele vha ila luṱale lwa khuli, nge Jakopo a rwiwa kha khundu tsini na luṱale lwonolwo." 
Genesis33:1 Jakopo a tshi sedza a vhona Esau a tshi khou ḓa na vhanna vhawe vha 400; zwenezwo a kovhekanya vhana, vhaṅwe a vha kovhela Lea, vhaṅwe a vha kovhela Rahele, vhaṅwe a vha kovhela vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili vha dziphuli." 
Genesis33:2 A rangisa vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili vha dziphuli phanḓa na vhana vhavho, ha tevhela Lea na vhana vhawe, ha konou tevhela Rahele na Josefa vha salela murahu." 
Genesis33:3 Jakopo ene muṋe a ranga phanḓa, a shuvhama fhasi mavuni kaṱanu na kavhili hezwi a tshi vho sendela tsini ha mukomana wawe." 
Genesis33:4 Hone Esau a gidima a yo ṱanganedza Jakopo a mu kuvhatedza a mu khisa. Vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho vha thoma u lila. 
Genesis33:5 Esau a tshi sedza a vhona vhasadzi na vhana. A vhudzisa a ri, “Avha vhane na vha navho ndi vhonnyi?” Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi vhana vhe Mudzimu nga vhuthu hawe a vha fha nṋe mulanda wavho.”" 
Genesis33:6 Ndi hone hu tshi swika phuli dza vhasadzi na vhana vhavho, vha gwadamela Esau." 
Genesis33:7 Ha tevhela Lea na vhana vhawe vha gwadama. Ha konou tevhela vha u fhedzisela, Josefa na Rahele, na vhone vha gwadama." 
Genesis33:8 Esau a ri, “Zwiḽa zwe nda ṱangana nazwo zwi tshi khou swogiwa ndi zwa mini?” Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nduvho ya uri muṋe wanga vha ntakalele.”" 
Genesis33:9 Hone Esau a ri, “Murathu wanga, nṋe ndo no ḓi vha na zwinzhi. Zwine na vha nazwo nga zwi vhe zwaṋu.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakopo a ri, “Aiwa nandi! Arali vha tshi ntakalela nga vha ṱanganedze nduvho hei i no bva kha nṋe. Ndo ḓa u vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshavho zwa nga ndi u swika phanḓa ha Mudzimu, vhone vha nṱanganedza nga mbilu tshena." 
Genesis33:11 Vhone nga vha ṱanganedze mashudu e a ḓiswa khavho, ngauri Mudzimu o nnyitela vhuthu, ndi na zwoṱhe zwine nda zwi lila.” Jakopo a tou sivhelela, Esau a vhuya a zwi ṱanganedza." 
Genesis33:12 Ndi hone Esau a tshi ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe; ndi ḓo ni fhelekedza.”" 
Genesis33:13 Hone Jakopo a mu fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga vha a ḓivha uri vhana ndi vhatete, nahone ndi fanela u londola nngu na kholomo dza tsadzi dzine dza kha ḓi mamisa. Arali dza tou tshimbilesa ḓuvha ḽithihi zwaḽo, dzoṱhe dzi ḓo fa." 
Genesis33:14 Zwino muṋe wanga nga vha nthange phanḓa, nṋe ndi tshimbile nga u tou ongolowa ndi tshi khada zwifuwo, ndi tshi endedza vhana, ndi vhuye ndi swike ha muṋe wanga shangoni ḽa Seiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau a ri, “Zwino litshani ndi sie vhaṅwe vhanna vhanga na inwi.” Jakopo a fhindula a ri, “Izwo vha vhuya vha zwi itelani? Vhone muṋe wanga nga vha tou ntakalela fhedzi.”" 
Genesis33:16 Musi wonoyo Esau a mbo ḓi takuwa a humela Seiri. 
Genesis33:17 Jakopo ene a livha Sukotho, a ḓifhaṱela hone, thakha yawe a i fhaṱela madanga. Ndi zwine afho fhethu ha pfi Sukotho (Madanga)." 
Genesis33:18 Jakopo a tshi vhuya a tshi bva Phadani Aramu, o vhuya a swika muḓini wa Shikheme kha ḽa Kanana nga mulalo, a dzula tsini ha muḓi." 
Genesis33:19 A renga tsimu kha vhana vha Hamoro, khotsi a Shikheme, nga mangwende a ḓana a siliva, a akha dennde yawe henefho." 
Genesis33:20 A fhaṱa aḽiṱari, a ri i pfi “Mudzimu wa Israele ndi Ene Mudzimu”." 
Genesis34:1 Zwino Dina, ṅwananyana we Lea a mu bebela Jakopo, a ṱuwa a yo dalela vhasidzana vha shango ḽeneḽo." 
Genesis34:2 Shikheme ṅwana wa Hamoro wa Muhivi, muvhusi wa muvhundu wonoyo, a mu vhona, a mu dzhia a mu tshipa." 
Genesis34:3 Mbilu ya uyo muṱhannga yo vha yo ungwa nga Dina ṅwananyana wa Jakopo, a funa uyo musidzana a mu ambisa." 
Genesis34:4 Shikheme a vhudza khotsi awe Hamoro a ri, “Nga vha nnzetshele uyu musidzana a vhe musadzi wanga.”" 
Genesis34:5 Musi Jakopo a tshi pfa uri ṅwananyana wawe Dina o shatwa tshika, vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vho vha vhe malisoni na thakha yawe; a fhumula a si zwi ambe u swika vha tshi vhuya hayani." 
Genesis34:6 Ndi hone Hamoro khotsi a Shikheme a tshi yo amba na Jakopo," 
Genesis34:7 a swika mazha na vhana vha Jakopo vha tshi vhuya malisoni. Vha tshi pfa zwe zwa itea, vha ṱungufhala vha sinyuwa, nge Shikheme a ita zwi shonisaho na Muisraele nga u dzhenisa ṅwananyana wa Jakopo nḓuni – zwithu zwi no ila." 
Genesis34:8 Huno Hamoro a vha vhudza a ri, “Mutukana wanga Shikheme u funa ṅwana waṋu nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe. Zwino mu ṋeeni ene a vhe musadzi wawe." 
Genesis34:9 Kha ri dzetshelane; ri ṋeeni vhananyana vhaṋu, ni ḓidzhiele vhananyana vhashu." 
Genesis34:10 Ni nga ḓi dzula na riṋe, shango ngeḽi. Dzulani khaḽo, vhambadzani thundu yaṋu khaḽo, rengani mashango khaḽo.”" 
Genesis34:11 Ndi hone Shikheme a tshi vhudza khotsi a Dina na khaladzi dzawe a ri, “Ni songo nkhana, ndi ḓo ni ṋea zwoṱhe zwine na nkhumbela." 
Genesis34:12 Mmbudzeni lumalo lwa muselwa na tshifhiwa tshine nda fanela u tshi ḓisa, tshi vhe tshihulwane nga hune na funa; ndi ḓo bvisa zwine na ri ndi bvise, tenda na mpha musidzana a vha musadzi wanga.”" 
Genesis34:13 Vhana vha Jakopo vha fhindula nga nḓila ya vhufhura vha tshi amba na Shikheme na khotsi awe Hamoro, nge khaladzi avho Dina a vha o shatwa tshika;" 
Genesis34:14 vha ri, “Zwo raloho ri nga si zwi ite; ri nga si dzhie khaladzi ashu ra mu ṋea munna a songo fumbaho. Izwo zwi a shonisa." 
Genesis34:15 Ri nga ni tendela arali ra pfana kha tshithu tshithihi fhedzi: uri ni nge riṋe nga u fumbisa vhalume vhaṋu vhoṱhe. 
Genesis34:16 Ndi hone ri tshi ḓo ni ṋea vhananyana vhashu, ra ḓidzhiela vhaṋu vha vha vhashu. Ri ḓo dzula na inwi ra vha lushaka luthihi." 
Genesis34:17 Hone arali ni sa tendi u fumbiswa, ri ḓo dzhia khaladzi ashu ra ṱuwa.”" 
Genesis34:18 Hamoro na ṅwana wawe Shikheme vha pfana na mafhungo e vha vhudzwa. 
Genesis34:19 Uyo muṱhannga o vha e ene a no huliswa u fhira vhoṱhe vha muṱani wa khotsi awe. Ho ngo tsha vhuya a lenga u ita zwe vha amba, nge a vha a tshi takadzwa nga ṅwananyana wa Jakopo." 
Genesis34:20 Zwenezwo Hamoro na ṅwana wawe Shikheme vha ya khoroni ya muḓi wavho u yo amba na vhanna vha havho vhadzulapo vha uyo muḓi, vha ri," 
Genesis34:21 “Havha vhathu vha dzula na riṋe nga mulalo. Nga vha dzule shangoni ḽashu, vha vhambadze thundu dzavho khaḽo; ndi hunzhi hune vha nga dzula, shango ḽo aṱama. Ri nga vhinga vhananyana vhavho, na vhone vha vhinga vhashu." 
Genesis34:22 Hone avha vhanna vha ri vhalume vhashu vhoṱhe vha fumbiswe, unga vhone vhaṋe vho fumba, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo tenda u dzula na riṋe ra vha lushaka luthihi." 
Genesis34:23 Thakha yavho na thundu yavho na zwiṅwe zwifuwo zwavho zwoṱhe zwi nga si vhe zwashu naa? Zwenezwo nga ri tende zwine vha amba, vha ḓo konou dzula na riṋe.”" 
Genesis34:24 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha uyo muḓi vha tenda zwe zwa ambiwa nga Hamoro na ṅwana wawe Shikheme; vhalume vhoṱhe vha uyo muḓi vha fumbiswa. 
Genesis34:25 Hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru, musi vha sa athu fhola, vhana vhavhili vha Jakopo, Simioni na Livi, khaladzi dza Dina, vha dzhia mafumo avho vha dia uyo muḓi vhathu vha songo vhuya vha zwi humbulela, vha vhulaha vhalume vhoṱhe;" 
Genesis34:26 vha vhulaha na Hamoro na ṅwana wawe Shikheme, vha dzhia Dina nḓuni ya Shikheme vha ṱuwa." 
Genesis34:27 Vhaṅwe vhana vha Jakopo vha wela zwitumbu vha ṱangula muḓi, nge khaladzi avho a itwa zwi shonisaho." 
Genesis34:28 Vha dzhia maṱambi a avho vhathu a dzinngu na kholomo na dzidonngi na iṅwe thundu yavho yoṱhe i re muḓini, na zwi re masimuni," 
Genesis34:29 vha hwala lupfumo lwavho lwoṱhe na vhasadzi vhavho vhoṱhe na vhana, vha thuba zwoṱhe zwi re dzinḓuni." 
Genesis34:30 Jakopo a vhudza Simioni na Livi a ri, “No nnḓisela khombo nga u nnduṱanya na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi, vhadzulapo vha ḽino shango. Riṋe ri vha si gathi, zwino arali vha ima vhoṱhe vha lwa na nṋe, vha nndia, nṋe na muṱa wanga ri ḓo lozwiwa.”" 
Genesis34:31 Hone vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ngavhe ri tende khaladzi ashu a tshi itwa unga phombwe naa?”" 
Genesis35:1 Mudzimu a vhudza Jakopo a ri, “Gonya Bethele u dzule hone, henefho u mphaṱele aḽiṱari, Nṋe we nda ḓa kha iwe zwiḽa u tshi khou shavha mukomana wau Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi amba na muṱa wawe na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae, a ri, “Laṱani midzimu isili ine na vha nayo, ni ḓikumulule, ni ambare zwiṅwe zwiambaro." 
Genesis35:3 Zwino iḓani, nga ri gonye Bethele; henefho ndi ḓo fhaṱela Mudzimu aḽiṱari; ndi Ene we a nnyaravha musi ndi khomboni, a ḓi vha na nṋe hoṱhe he nda ya.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ndi hone avho vhathu vha tshi ṋea Jakopo midzimu yoṱhe isili ye vha vha vhe nayo, na zwitungulo zwa zwiṅina zwa nḓevheni, Jakopo a zwi bwela fhasi ha muri muhulu henefho Shikheme." 
Genesis35:5 Ndi hone vha tshi pfuluwa, Mudzimu a ita uri miḓi yoṱhe yo vha tangaho i vha ofhe, ha si vhe na ane a vha tevhelela." 
Genesis35:6 Jakopo na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha swika Lusi, hune zwino ha pfi Bethele, shangoni ḽa Kanana." 
Genesis35:7 Henefho a fhaṱa aḽiṱari, a ri i pfi Mudzimu wa Bethele, ngauri ndi hone he Mudzimu a ḓidzumbululela ene zwiḽa a tshi khou shavha mukomana wawe." 
Genesis35:8 Zwino Dibora muleli wa Rabeka a fa, a swiṱwa fhasi ha muri muhulu tshipembe ha Bethele; wa pfi Muri wa Tshililo." 
Genesis35:9 Musi Jakopo a tshi vhuya Phadani Aramu, Mudzimu a dovha a ḓa khae a mu shudufhadza." 
Genesis35:10 Mudzimu a mu vhudza a ri, “Iwe u pfi Jakopo, hone a u tsha ḓo pfi Jakopo, u vho ḓo pfi Israele.” A ri dzina ḽawe ndi Israele." 
Genesis35:11 Mudzimu a amba nae a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe; beba vhana vha ande. U ḓo vha khotsi a lushaka na dzitshakha; u ḓo beba mahosi." 
Genesis35:12 Shango ḽe nda ḽi ṋea Abrahamu na Isaka, na iwe ndi u ṋea ḽone, nda ḽi ṋea na vhaḓuhulu vhau.”" 
Genesis35:13 Zwenezwo Mudzimu a gonya a mu sia henefho fhethu he a vha a tshi khou amba nae. 
Genesis35:14 Jakopo a ṱoka tombo ḽa tshihumbudzo ḽa ima henefho fhethu he Mudzimu a amba nae, a tevhulela thevhula nṱha haḽo, a shela na mapfura nṱha haḽo." 
Genesis35:15 Jakopo a ri fhethu afho he Mudzimu a amba nae hu pfi Bethele. 
Genesis35:16 Jakopo na muṱa wawe vha pfuluwa Bethele. Musi vha tshi vho sendela Efratha, tshifhinga tsha Rahele tsha u vhofholowa tsha swika; zwa mu konḓela nga maanḓa." 
Genesis35:17 Musi vhuṱungu ha u beba ho no tou hulela, mubebisi a mu vhudza a ri, “Vha songo ofha tshithu, vho dovha u beba mutukana.”" 
Genesis35:18 Hone ene o vha a tshi vho welela; musi a tshi khou fa, a ri ṅwana u pfi Binoni (Ntshengedzeni), hone khotsi awe a ri u pfi Benyamini (Mashudu)." 
Genesis35:19 Rahele a fa, a swiṱwa nḓilani ya u ya Efratha, hune zwino ha pfi Betlehema." 
Genesis35:20 Jakopo a imisa tombo ḽa tshihumbudzo nṱha ha tshalo tshawe. Tshihumbudzo itsho tshi sumba hune tshalo tsha Rahele tsha vha hone, na ṋamusi." 
Genesis35:21 Israele a dovha a pfuluwa, a akha dennde yawe o no fhira Migidala Edere (Ḓingo ḽa masambi)." 
Genesis35:22 Musi Israele a tshi khou dzula dzinguni ḽeneḽo, Rubeni a dzhena nḓuni na musadzi wa khotsi awe wa phuli a no pfi Biliha, Israele a zwi pfa. Jakopo o vha e na vhana vha vhatuka vha 12." 
Genesis35:23 Vhana vha Lea ndi: Rubeni tanzhe ḽa Jakopo, na Simioni na Livi na Juda na Isakhara na Zebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Vhana vha Rahele ndi: Josefa na Benyamini. 
Genesis35:25 Vhana vha Biliha phuli ya Rahele ya musadzi ndi: Dani na Nafuthali. 
Genesis35:26 Vhana vha Zilipha phuli ya Lea ya musadzi ndi: Gadi na Ashere. Ndi vhone vhana vha Jakopo vhe vha bebwa Phadani Aramu. 
Genesis35:27 Jakopo a ya hayani ha khotsi awe Isaka muḓini wa Mamuri, tsini ha Kiriathi Araba (Hebroni), he Abrahamu na Isaka vha vhuya vha dzula hone." 
Genesis35:28 Isaka o tshila miṅwaha ya 180," 
Genesis35:29 a fa a oroswa ha vha hawe, ó kalaha ó no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha. Vhana vhawe Esau na Jakopo vha mu swiṱa." 
Genesis36:1 Ngea mafhungo a Esau, ene Edomo." 
Genesis36:2 Esau o dzea vhasadzi vhawe kha vhasadzi vha Kanana: Ada ṅwananyana wa Eloni wa Muhithi, na Oholibama; Oholibama ndi ṅwana wa Ana, ṅwana wa Tsibioni wa Muhivi;" 
Genesis36:3 a dzea na Basimatha ṅwananyana wa Ishmaele, khaladzi a Nebayotho." 
Genesis36:4 Ada a bebela Esau Elifasi, Basimatha a beba Reuele," 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama a beba Jeushu na Jalamu na Kora. Ndi vhone vhana vha Esau vha vhatuka, vhe a vha bebelwa Kanana." 
Genesis36:6 Esau a dzhia vhasadzi vhawe na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana na thakha yawe na zwiṅwe zwifuwo zwawe zwoṱhe na thundu yoṱhe ye a i wana Kanana, a pfulutshela shangoni ḽe ḽa vha ḽi kule na murathu wawe Jakopo." 
Genesis36:7 Thundu yavho yo vha yo andesa lune vha nga si kone u dzula vhoṱhe; shango ḽe vha vha vha tshi dzula khaḽo ḽo vha ḽi sa vha eḓani vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho nge vha vha vhe na thakha nnzhi. 
Genesis36:8 Zwenezwo Esau, ene Edomo, a yo dzula makwarani a Seiri – ndi ḽone ḽa Edomo." 
Genesis36:9 Ngea mafhungo a Esau khotsi a Vhaedomo musi e makwarani a Seiri. 
Genesis36:10 Ngea madzina a vhana vha Esau vha vhatuka: Ndi Elifasi, ṅwana wa Ada musadzi wa Esau, na Reuele, ṅwana wa Basimatha musadzi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Vhana vha Elifasi vha vhatuka ndi: Themana na Omara na Tsefo na Gathama na Kenasi. 
Genesis36:12 Elifasi ṅwana wa Esau o vha e na musadzi wa phuli-vho; ndi Thimina we a mu bebela Amaleke. Vhaḓuhulu vha Ada musadzi wa Esau ngevha: 
Genesis36:13 Vhana vha Reuele vha vhatuka ndi: Nahatha na Zera na Shama na Miza. Avho ndi vhone vhaḓuhulu vha Basimatha musadzi wa Esau. 
Genesis36:14 Vhana vha vhatuka vha musadzi wa Esau, Oholibama ṅwananyana wa Ana, muḓuhulu wa Tsibioni, vhe a vha bebela Esau ndi: Jeushu na Jalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ngea magota a vhaḓuhulu vha Esau: Vhana vha vhatuka vha Elifasi tanzhe ḽa Esau vhe vha vha magota ndi Themana na Omara na Tsefo na Kenasi 
Genesis36:16 na Kora na Gathamu na Amaleke. Havho ndi vhone magota a lutsinga lwa Elifasi shangoni ḽa Edomo; ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Ada. 
Genesis36:17 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Reuele ṅwana wa Esau wa mutuka vhe vha vha magota ndi: Nahathi na Zera na Shama na Miza. Hayo ndi one magota a lutsinga lwa Reuele shangoni ḽa Edomo; ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Basimatha musadzi wa Esau. 
Genesis36:18 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Oholibama musadzi wa Esau vhe vha vha magota ndi: Jeushu na Jalamu na Kora. Hayo ndi one magota a lutsinga lwa musadzi wa Esau, Oholibama ṅwananyana wa Ana." 
Genesis36:19 Ndi vhone vhana vha Esau, ene Edomo. Hayo ndi one magota avho." 
Genesis36:20 Ngevha vhana vha vhatuka vha Seiri wa Muhori, vhone vhadzulapo vha kale vha shango ḽa Edomo: Ndi Lothani na Shobala na Tsibioni na Ana" 
Genesis36:21 na Dishoni na Etsere na Dishani. Havho vhana vha Seiri ndi one magota a Vhahori kha ḽa Edomo. 
Genesis36:22 Vhana vha Lothani vha vhatuka ndi: Hori na Hemamu. Thimina o vha e khaladzi a Lothani. 
Genesis36:23 Vhana vha Shobala vha vhatuka ndi: Alavani na Manahathi na Ebala na Shefo na Onamu. 
Genesis36:24 Vhana vha Tsibioni vha vhatuka ndi: Aya na Ana. Hoyo ndi uḽa Ana we a tumbula zwipise sogani musi a tshi khou lisa donngi dza khotsi awe Tsibioni. 
Genesis36:25 Vhana vha Ana ndi: Dishoni na Oholibama ṅwananyana wa Ana. 
Genesis36:26 Vhana vha Dishoni vha vhatuka ndi: Hemedana na Eshebani na Ithirani na Kherani. 
Genesis36:27 Vhana vha Etsere vha vhatuka ndi: Bilihani na Zaavani na Akani. 
Genesis36:28 Vhana vha Dishani vha vhatuka ndi: Utsi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Ndi one magota a Vhahori. Ndi Lothani na Shobala na Tsibioni na Ana 
Genesis36:30 na Dishoni na Etsere na Dishani. Hayo ndi one magota a Vhahori zwi tshi ya nga matsinde avho shangoni ḽa Seiri. 
Genesis36:31 Ngea mahosi e a vhusa Edomo hu sa athu vhuya ha vhusa na khosi na nthihi ya Israele: 
Genesis36:32 Bela ṅwana wa Bioro o vha khosi ya Edomo. Musanda wawe wo pfi Dinihaba. 
Genesis36:33 Bela o ri u fa, Jobaba ṅwana wa Zera a no bva Botsora a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:33 Bela o ri u fa, Jobaba ṅwana wa Zera a no bva Botsora a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba o ri u fa, Hushamu a no bva shangoni ḽa Vhathemana a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba o ri u fa, Hushamu a no bva shangoni ḽa Vhathemana a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu a ri u fa, Hadadi ṅwana wa Bebadi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe. Ndi ene we a kunda Vhamidiani shangoni ḽa Muaba. Musanda wawe wa pfi Avithi." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi a ri u fa, Samula a no bva Masireka a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:37 Samula a ri u fa, Shaulo a no bva Rehobotho-tsini-ha-mulambo a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:38 Shaulo a ri u fa, Baali Hanani ṅwana wa Akhiboro a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
Genesis36:39 Baali Hanani a ri u fa, Hadadi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe. Musanda wawe wa pfi Phau; musadzi wawe o vha a tshi pfi Mehetabele ṅwananyana wa Matirede, ṅwananyana wa Mesahaba." 
Genesis36:40 Ngevha magota a Esau, zwi tshi ya nga madzina na mitupo na madzingu: Thimina na Aliva na Jethethe" 
Genesis36:41 na Oholibama na Ela na Phinoni 
Genesis36:42 na Kenasi na Themana na Mibitsara 
Genesis36:43 na Magadiele na Iramu. Hayo ndi one magota a Edomo, zwi tshi ya nga vhudzulo havho shangoni ḽe vha vha vha tshi dzula khaḽo. Havho ndi vhone vha lutsinga lwa Esau khotsi a Vhaedomo." 
Genesis37:1 Jakopo o vha a tshi dzula shangoni ḽe khotsi awe vha vha vha tshi dzula khaḽo, ḽa Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Mafhungo a Jakopo ngea: Josefa a tshi kha ḓi vha muṱhanngana wa miṅwaha ya 17, o vha a tshi lisa maṱambi a nngu na vhakomana vhawe vhana vha Biliha na vha Zilipha, vhasadzi vha khotsi awe, ene a hevhedza khotsi avho musi vha tshi ita zwo vhifhaho." 
Genesis37:3 Huno Israele o vha a tshi funa Josefa u fhira vhana vhawe vhoṱhe, nge a mu bebelwa o no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha; a mu rungela nguvho ya maṱeleṱele." 
Genesis37:4 Huno vhakomana vhawe vha tshi vhona uri khotsi avho u mu funa u fhira vhone vhoṱhe, vha thoma u mu vhenga, vha si tsha amba nae zwavhuḓi." 
Genesis37:5 Muṅwe musi Josefa a lora muloro, huno a tshi u vhudza vhakomana vhawe, vha tou ṋaṋa u mu vhenga." 
Genesis37:6 A vha hanelela muloro wawe a ri, “Edzonu thetshelesa muloro we nda u lora:" 
Genesis37:7 Ro vha ri masimuni ri tshi khou vhofha khuḽane dza goroi, kathihi fhedzi khuḽane yanga ya mbo ḓi takuwa ya ima ye tswiti, dzaṋu khuḽane dza tanga yanga, dza i gwadamela.”" 
Genesis37:8 Vhakomana vhawe vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Ni ṱoḓa u vha khosi yashu? Ni vhona unga ni ḓo ri vhusa naa?” Vha vho mu vhenga lwa u tou kalula, vha tshi mu vhengela zwe a lora na zwe a amba." 
Genesis37:9 A dovha a lora, a ḓi vhudza vhakomana vhawe a ri, “Edzonu thetshelesa, ndo dovha nda lora, nda vhona ndi tshi khou gwadamelwa nga ḓuvha na ṅwedzi na ṋaledzi dza 11.”" 
Genesis37:10 Musi a tshi zwi vhudza khotsi awe na vhakomana vhawe, khotsi awe vha mu kaidza vha ri, “Muloro uyo we wa u lora ndi muloro-ḓe? Vhukuma nṋe na mme au na vhakomana vhau ri ḓo ḓa ra gwadama fhasi phanḓa hau naa?”" 
Genesis37:11 Vhakomana vhawe vha thoma u vha na vivho, hone khotsi awe vha vhulunga ayo mafhungo mbiluni yavho." 
Genesis37:12 Huno vhakomana vhawe vho vha vho bva na masambi a khotsi avho a dzinngu vho ya u dzi lisa Shikheme. 
Genesis37:13 Israele a vhudza Josefa a ri, “A thi ri vhakomana vhau vha khou lisa masambi a nngu thungo dza Shikheme. Iḓa ndi u rume khavho.” Josefa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone.”" 
Genesis37:14 Khotsi awe vha ri, “Tshimbila u yo vhona arali vhakomana vhau vha tshi kha ḓi vha vho takala khathihi na zwifuwo, u vhuye u tshi mmbudza.” Khotsi awe vha mu ruma a takuwa a ṱuwa vhe govhani ḽa Hebroni. Josefa a tshi swika Shikheme," 
Genesis37:15 muṅwe munna a ṱangana nae a tshi khou tendeleka na ḓaka, a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni khou ṱoḓa mini?”" 
Genesis37:16 Josefa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi khou ṱoḓa vhakomana vhanga. Vha nga mmbudza hune vha khou lisa hone masambi avho a dzinngu?”" 
Genesis37:17 Uḽa munna a fhindula a ri, “Vho ṱuwa hafhano. Ndo pfa vha tshi ri, ‘Nḓarieni Dothani.’ ” Ndi hone Josefa a tshi tevhela vhakomana vhawe, a vha wana Dothani." 
Genesis37:18 Huno vhone vha mu vhona a tshee kule, a sa athu swika khavho, vha luka vhunwa ha u mu vhulaha." 
Genesis37:19 Vha vhudzana vha ri, “Mulori ngouḽaa u khou ḓa!" 
Genesis37:20 Kha ri mu vhulahe ri mu pose dindini; ri ḓo ri o pondiwa nga tshivhanda; ndi hone ri tshi ḓo vhona arali zwe a lora zwi tshi ḓo itea naa.” 
Genesis37:21 Musi Rubeni a tshi zwi pfa, a linga u mu lamukisa zwanḓani zwavho, a ri, “Ri songo tou mu vhulaha." 
Genesis37:22 Ni songo fhaladza malofha. Mu poseni dindini heḽino hafhano ḓakani, ni songo vhuya na mu huvhadza.” Rubeni a tshi ralo o vha a tshi ṱoḓa u mu lamukisa khavho, uri a mu humisele ha khotsi awe." 
Genesis37:23 Zwenezwo Josefa a tshi swika ha vhakomana vhawe, vha mu bvula iḽa nguvho yawe – nguvho yawe ya maṱeleṱele ye a vha o ambara," 
Genesis37:24 vha mu dzhia, vha mu posa dindini. Huno iḽo dindi ḽo vha ḽi si na maḓi." 
Genesis37:25 Vha dzula fhasi vha ḽa zwiḽiwa zwavho, vha tshi sedza vha vhona kharavani ya Vhaishmaele vha tshi bva Giliadi. Gamela dzavho dzo vha dzo hwala zwilungalungane na ṋonzhe na zwinukheleli vha tshi khou zwi isa Egipita." 
Genesis37:26 Juda a vhudza vharathu vhawe a ri, “Arali ra vhulaha murathu washu ra fukedza malofha awe ri ḓo wanani?" 
Genesis37:27 Nga ri mu rengisele Vhaishmaele, ri songo mu huvhadza; hufha e murathu washu; ri vhathihi, ri malofha mathihi.” Vharathu vhawe vha tenda." 
Genesis37:28 Zwenezwo vhashavhi vha Midiani vha tshi swika, vhakomana vha Josefa vha mu bvisa dindini, vha mu rengisela Vhaishmaele nga zwipiḓa zwa 20 zwa siliva, vhenevho vha mu dzhia vha ya nae Egipita." 
Genesis37:29 Musi Rubeni a tshi humela ngei dindini, a tshi vhona Josefa a si tsheeho, a kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe." 
Genesis37:30 A humela ha vharathu vhawe a ri, “Uḽa mutukana ha tsheeho! Nṋe ndi ḓo itani zwino?”" 
Genesis37:31 Zwenezwo vha dzhia nguvho ya Josefa, vha vhulaha mbudzi, vha lovhea iyo nguvho malofhani." 
Genesis37:32 Vha dzhia iḽa nguvho ya maṱeleṱele vha i isa ha khotsi avho vha ri, “Ro wana nguvho hei. Vhone nga vha i sedze vha vhone arali i ya ṅwana wavho.”" 
Genesis37:33 Jakopo a i ḓivha a ri, “Ndi nguvho ya ṅwananga! O pondiwa nga tshivhanda! Vhukuma Josefa o tou ṱhukhukanywa!”" 
Genesis37:34 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe, a ambara madzanganda, a fhedza maḓuvha manzhi a tshi khou lila ṅwana wawe." 
Genesis37:35 Vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha ḓa vha mu fhumudza, ene a si tende u fhumudzwa; a ri, “Ndi nga si fhumule, ndi ḓo lila nda vhuya nda ya tshaloni nda tevhela ṅwananga.” Khotsi awe a ḓi mu lila." 
Genesis37:36 Vhaḽa Vhamidiani vha rengisa Josefa ngei Egipita, vha mu rengisela Photifara muṅwe wa magota a Farao, we a vha e mulangammbi wa u linda pfamo." 
Genesis38:1 Misi yeneyo Juda a ṱutshela vhana vha khotsi awe, a yo dzula na munna wa Adulamu a no pfi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Henefho Juda a vhona ṅwananyana wa muṅwe munna wa Mukanana a no pfi Shua. A mu vhinga a mu dzhenisa nḓuni; 
Genesis38:3 a vhifha muvhilini, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri u pfi Ere." 
Genesis38:4 A dovha a vhifha muvhilini a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri u pfi Onani." 
Genesis38:5 A dovha hafhu a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, a ri u pfi Shela. Uyo o mu bebela muḓini wa Akhazibi." 
Genesis38:6 Juda a ṱoḓela tanzhe ḽawe Ere musadzi; o vha a tshi pfi Thamara. 
Genesis38:7 Hone Muṋe washu a vhona Ere tanzhe ḽa Juda e muvhi; ndi zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhulaha. 
Genesis38:8 Ndi hone Juda a tshi vhudza Onani a ri, “Dzhenisa musadzi wa mukomana wau nḓuni, u mu khunyeledzele pfanelo dzau sa murathu wa munna wawe uri u bebele mukomana wau vhana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Hone Onani a zwi ḓivha uri avho vhana a vha nga vhi vhawe; ndi zwe a ri musi a tshi dzhenisa musadzi wa mukomana wawe nḓuni, a tevhulela mbeu yawe fhasi uri a si bebele mukomana vhana." 
Genesis38:10 Muṋe washu o vhona zwe a ita zwo vhifha; ndi zwe na ene a mu vhulaha. 
Genesis38:11 Ndi hone Juda a tshi vhudza Thamara musadzi wa ṅwana wawe a ri, “Iyo dzula u tshilikadzi muṱani wa khotsi au ṅwananga Shela a vhuye a aluwe.” Ndi nge a humbula a ri, “Na Shela a nga kha ḓi fa unga vhakomana vhawe.” Ndi hone Thamara a tshi ṱuwa a yo dzula muṱani wa khotsi awe." 
Genesis38:12 Hó no fhela tshifhinga tshilapfu, musadzi wa Juda ṅwananyana wa Shua a fa. Musi Juda o no rudza mbilu, i si tsha vhavha, a gonya Thimina he vhanna vha vha vha tshi khou vheula nngu dzawe, khonani yawe Hira wa Adulamu a ṱuwa nae." 
Genesis38:13 Huno Thamara a tshi pfa upfi, “Khotsi a munna wau vha khou ya Thimina u vheula nngu dzavho,”" 
Genesis38:14 a bvula nguvho dzawe dza tshilikadzi, a khurumela ṅwenda uri a ḓikhakhise, a dzula fhasi khoroni i dzhenaho Enaimi, muḓi u re tsini ha gondo ḽi livhaho Thimina. Ndi nge a vhona uri naho Shela o no aluwa, ha athu kumedzwa ene uri a vhe musadzi wawe." 
Genesis38:15 Musi Juda a tshi mu vhona, a humbula uri ndi phombwe nge a vha o khurumela." 
Genesis38:16 Nga u sa ḓivha uri ndi musadzi wa ṅwana wawe, a ya khae nga thungo ha gondo a ri, “Iḓani zwino ndi ni dzhenise nḓuni.” Thamara a vhudzisa a ri, “Vha tshi nnzhenisa nḓuni vha ḓo mpha mini?”" 
Genesis38:17 Juda a ri, “Ndi ḓo ni fha mbudzana i no bva sambini ḽanga.” Thamara a ri, “Vha ḓo mpha tshiṅwe tshine nda ḓo sala ndo tshi fara u swika vha tshi i ḓisa.”" 
Genesis38:18 Juda a ri, “Ndi nga ni fha mini tshine na ḓo sala no fara?” Thamara a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha mphe rinngi yavho ya luswayo na geḓane yayo na mbaḓa ye vha fara.” Juda a zwi dzhia a mu ṋea, a konou mu dzhenisa nḓuni, a mu vhifhisa muvhilini." 
Genesis38:19 Thamara a ṱuwa a swika a bvula ṅwenda wawe, a dovha a ambara zwiambaro zwawe zwa tshilikadzi." 
Genesis38:20 Zwino-ha, Juda a ruma khonani yawe wa Adulamu a isa iḽa mbudzana uri tshiḽa tshe uḽa musadzi a sala o tshi fara tshi vhuye, hone uyo musadzi a si mu wane." 
Genesis38:21 Uyo munna a vhudzisa vhanna vha dzulaho henefho a ri, “Uḽa musadzi wa phombwe we a vha e tsini ha nḓila ngei Enaimi u ngafhi?” Vhone vha ri, “A ho ngo vhuya ha vha na musadzi wa phombwe hafhano.”" 
Genesis38:22 Uyo munna a humela ha Juda a ri, “Uḽa musadzi a tho ngo mu wana. Na vhanna vha no dzula henengei vho ri a ho ngo vhuya ha vha na musadzi wa phombwe henefho.”" 
Genesis38:23 Ndi hone Juda a tshi ri, “Nga a dzule na zwine a vha nazwo, ri sa ḓo ḓiseisa nga vhathu; tenda ndo isa mbudzana heino khae, inwi no ro sa mu wana.”" 
Genesis38:24 Musi ho no fhela miṅwedzi miraru, Juda a vhudzwa upfi, “Thamara musadzi wa ṅwana wavho u na mulandu wa vhupombwe; zwino ri tshi khou amba o no ḓi vhifha muvhilini.” Juda a ri, “Nga a bviselwe nnḓa a fhiswe, a fe!”" 
Genesis38:25 Musi a tshi khou bviswa, a ruma munna a isa mafhungo ha khotsi a munna wawe a ri, “Zwine nda vha nazwo ndi zwa muṋe wa thundu hei.” A dovha a ri, “Kha vha sedze vha vhone arali vha tshi ḓivha uri rinngi iyi ya luswayo na geḓane yayo na mbaḓa ndi zwa nnyi?”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda a ḓivha iyo thundu a ri, “A si ene o khakhaho, ho khakha nṋe, nge nda si mu fhe ṅwananga Shela uri a vhe musadzi wawe.” Zwa ri u ralo Juda a si tsha dovha a mu dzhenisa nḓuni." 
Genesis38:27 Musi tshifhinga tshawe tsha u vhofholowa tshi tshi swika, a wanala e na mawela a vhatukana muvhilini wawe."
