Genesis38:28 Musi a tshi khou beba, muṅwe ṅwana a bvisa tshanḓa; mubebisi a fara itsho tshanḓa a tshi vhofhelela harani tswuku a ri, “Hoyu ndi ene we a thoma u swika.”" 
Genesis38:29 Huno uyo a humisa tshanḓa, muṅwe ngae a bvela nnḓa, mubebisi a ri, “Khezwo, wo ḓivulela nḓila!” Onoyo a pfi Pheretse (Mvulanḓila)." 
Genesis38:30 Ha konou bebwa muṅwe ngae we a vha o vhofhelelwa harani tswuku tshanḓani, onoyo a pfi Zera (Vhutswuku)." 
Genesis39:1 Huno Josefa o vha o no iswa Egipita; Photifara wa Muegipita, gota ḽa Farao, mulangammbi wa pfamo ya musanda, a mu renga kha Vhaishmaele vhe vha mu isa henengei." 
Genesis39:2 Muṋe washu o vha e na Josefa, zwa mu nakela, a dzula muṱani wa muṋe wawe wa Muegipita." 
Genesis39:3 Muṋe wawe a zwi vhona uri Muṋe washu u nae, na u vhona uri Muṋe washu u mu nakisela zwoṱhe zwine a ita," 
Genesis39:4 a thoma u takalela Josefa, a vha mudzulatsini wawe. Photifara a vhea Josefa uri a lange zwa muṱa wawe, a mu kumedza zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo." 
Genesis39:5 U bva tshifhinga tshe a mu vhea uri a lange zwa muṱa wawe na zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo, Muṋe washu a shudufhadza muṱa wa uyo Muegipita a tshi itela Josefa; Muṋe washu a shudufhadza zwoṱhe zwe Photifara a vha e nazwo, hoṱhe muṱani na tsimuni," 
Genesis39:6 zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo a zwi kumedza Josefa uri a zwi londole, Photifara a si tsha ḓidina nga tshithu arali zwi si zwiḽiwa zwine a ḽa fhedzi. Huno Josefa o vha o vhumbea zwavhuḓi, o naka." 
Genesis39:7 Ngavhuya mufumakadzi wa muṋe wawe a mu emula a ri, “Nga ri dzhenisane nḓuni!”" 
Genesis39:8 Josefa a hana, a fhindula mufumakadzi wa muṋe wawe a ri, “Nga vha vhone, nṋe ndi langa zwoṱhe, muṋe wanga a vha tsha ḓidina nga tshithu fhano muṱani; zwoṱhe zwine vha vha nazwo vho zwi kumedza nṋe uri ndi zwi londole." 
Genesis39:9 A hu na ane a vha muhulwane fhano muṱani u fhira nṋe. Muṋe wanga a vha nnzivhisi tshithu arali vhe si vhone fhedzi nge vha vha mufumakadzi wavho. Zwino ndi nga itelani vhuvhi vhungafho nda khakhela Mudzimu?” 
Genesis39:10 Naho uyo mufumakadzi o amba na Josefa a dovha misi yoṱhe, Josefa a lamba u mu dzhenisa nḓuni, naho hu u tou dzula nae." 
Genesis39:11 Muṅwe musi Josefa a ya nḓuni a tshi yo shuma mishumo yawe; henefho ngomu ho vha hu si na na muthihi wa vhashumi vha nḓuni. 
Genesis39:12 Uyo mufumakadzi a fara Josefa nga khanzu a ri, “Nga ri dzhenisane nḓuni!” Hone Josefa a shavha a bva nḓuni, a sia khanzu yawe yo farwa nga uyo mufumakadzi." 
Genesis39:13 Musi uyo mufumakadzi a tshi vhona uri Josefa o shavha a bva nḓuni a sia khanzu yawe zwanḓani zwawe," 
Genesis39:14 a vhidza vhashumi vhawe vha nḓuni a ri, “Vhonani, uyu Muheberu o ḓiswa kha riṋe uri a tambe nga riṋe! O dzhena hafhano a tshi ri a ntshipe, nṋe nda ṱavha mukosi." 
Genesis39:15 Musi a tshi pfa ndi tshi ṱavha mukosi, a mbo ḓi shavha a bva nḓuni a sia khanzu yawe ndo i fara.”" 
Genesis39:16 A vhea khanzu ya Josefa tsini hawe u swika muṋe wawe a tshi vhuya hayani. 
Genesis39:17 Ndi hone a tshi mu vhudza ayo mafhungo a ri, “Iḽa phuli ya Muheberu ye vha ri ḓisela yone yo ḓa kha nṋe ya tamba nga nṋe." 
Genesis39:18 Hone musi ndi tshi thoma u ṱavha mukosi, a shavha a bva nḓuni, a sia khanzu yawe ndo i fara.”" 
Genesis39:19 Musi muṋe wa Josefa a tshi pfa mafhungo e a vhudzwa nga mufumakadzi wawe a tshi ri, “Phuli yavho yo nnyita tshauri na tshauri,” a sinyuwa zwihulu." 
Genesis39:20 Muṋe wa Josefa a mu dzhia a mu hoṋela dzhele, henefho he ha vha ho valelwa zwivhotshwa zwa khosi. Huno musi Josefa e henefho dzhele," 
Genesis39:21 Muṋe washu o vha e nae; a mu itela vhuthu, a ita uri mulindadzhele a mu takalele." 
Genesis39:22 Mulindadzhele a ita uri Josefa a lange vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho farwa dzhele, a ita uri a lavhelese zwoṱhe zwi no itwa henefho." 
Genesis39:23 Zwoṱhe zwine zwa londolwa nga Josefa mulindadzhele a si tsha zwi londa, nge Muṋe washu a vha e na Josefa, a ita uri zwoṱhe zwine a ita zwi mu nakele." 
Genesis40:1 Ngavhuya, ndumi na mubiki vha khosi ya Egipita vha khakhela muṋe wavho khosi ya Egipita." 
Genesis40:2 Farao a sinyutshela ayo magota awe mavhili, ndumi khulwane na mubiki muhulwane," 
Genesis40:3 a vha valela nḓuni ya mulangammbi wa pfamo ya musanda, henefho he Josefa a vha o hoṋelwa hone." 
Genesis40:4 Mulangammbi wa pfamo ya musanda a vha kumedza Josefa, a vha londola. Huno musi o no ḓi vha maḓuvha vho valelwa," 
Genesis40:5 avho vhanna vhavhili, ndumi na mubiki wa khosi ya Egipita, vhe vha vha vho valelwa dzhele, vhoṱhe vha lora vhusiku honoho vhuthihi, muloro muṅwe na muṅwe ú na zwine wa amba." 
Genesis40:6 Musi Josefa a tshi ḓa khavho nga ḽa matshelo nga matsheloni, a vhona uri vho ṱungufhala." 
Genesis40:7 Zwenezwo a vhudzisa magota a Farao vhe vha vha vho valelwa nae nḓuni ya muṋe wawe a ri, “Zwifhaṱuwo zwaṋu zwo ṱungufhalelani ṋamusi?”" 
Genesis40:8 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe vhuvhili hashu ro lora miloro, hone a hu na ane a nga i ṱalutshedza.” Josefa a vha vhudza a ri, “A thi ri ṱhalutshedzo dzi bva kha Mudzimu? Edzonou nnyanetshela miloro yaṋu.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ndi hone ndumi khulwane i tshi vhudza Josefa muloro wayo. A mu vhudza a ri, “Muloroni wanga ndo vhona munḓirivhe;" 
Genesis40:10 munḓirivhe wonoyo wo vha u na thavhi tharu. Wa ri u kulukusha, wa mbo ḓi fhufhumisa, wa vha na zwiṱokola zwa nḓirivhe dzo vhibvaho." 
Genesis40:11 Ndo vha ndo fara tshinwelo tsha Farao, nda dzhia idzo nḓirivhe nda dzi hamulela tshinweloni tsha Farao, nda mu ṋekedza a ṱanganedza.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa a mu vhudza a ri, “Muloro uyo u amba hezwi: Thavhi idzo tharu ndi maḓuvha mararu." 
Genesis40:13 Musi ho fhela maḓuvha mararu Farao u ḓo ni hudza, a ni humisela mushumoni waṋu, na ṋekedza Farao tshinwelo a ṱanganedza, sa zwe na vha ni tshi ḓi zwi ita ni tshi kha ḓi vha ndumi yawe." 
Genesis40:14 Hone musi zwi tshi ni nakela ni nkhumbule ni nnyitele vhuthu; nnyambeleni ha Farao a mmvise hafhano dzhele. 
Genesis40:15 Ndi uri ndo tou hwalwa nga khombekhombe ndi tshi bva shangoni ḽa Vhaheberu, na fhano a hu na tshe nda tshinya zwine nda nga vhuya nda longwa dindini heḽino.”" 
Genesis40:16 Zwino mubiki muhulwane a tshi vhona uri Josefa o ṋea ṱhalutshedzo i takadzaho, a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Na nṋe ndo lora muloro: Ndo vha ndo hwala zwirundu zwiraru zwa khekhe ṱhohoni." 
Genesis40:17 Tshirunduni tsha nṱha ho vha hu na tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwo bagelwaho Farao, hone zwiṋoni zwo vha zwi tshi khou ḽa izwo zwiḽiwa zwi re tshirunduni nṱha ha ṱhoho yanga.”" 
Genesis40:18 Josefa a ri, “Muloro uyo u amba hezwi: Zwirundu zwiraru zwi amba maḓuvha mararu." 
Genesis40:19 Hu ḓo ri u fhela maḓuvha mararu Farao a ni humbula, a ni nembeledza kha thanda, zwiṋoni zwa ḽa ṋama yaṋu.”" 
Genesis40:20 Zwino ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ḽa vha ḽa mabebo a Farao, a itela magota awe oṱhe vhuṱambo, a vhofholola ndumi khulwane na mubiki muhulwane magota awe a tshi zwi vhona." 
Genesis40:21 A vhuedzedza ndumi khulwane mushumoni wayo, ya dovha ya ṋekedza Farao tshinwelo a ṱanganedza," 
Genesis40:22 hone mubiki muhulwane a nembeledzwa, sa zwe Josefa a vha vhudza a tshi vha ṱalutshedza miloro." 
Genesis40:23 Hone ndumi khulwane a yo ngo vhuya ya elelwa Josefa, yo mu hangwa." 
Genesis41:1 Hó no fhela miṅwaha mivhili, Farao a lora muloro. O lora o ima tsini ha mulambo wa Nile," 
Genesis41:2 a vhona kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dzavhuḓi dza tsadzi, dzo nonaho, dzi tshi bva mulamboni, dza fula ṱhangani." 
Genesis41:3 Dza tevhelwa nga dziṅwe kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dza tsadzi, dzo vhifhaho, dzo ondaho, dzi tshi bva mulamboni wa Nile, dza ima tsini na dziḽa dziṅwe philiphilini ya mulambo." 
Genesis41:4 Kholomo idzo dza u vhifha dzo ondaho dza mila kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dzavhuḓi dzo nonaho. Zwenezwo Farao a mbo ḓi karuwa. 
Genesis41:5 A dovha a fara khofhe, a lora muloro wa vhuvhili. A lora a tshi khou vhona ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza thoro, dzo ḓalela dzo vhibva, dzo mela kha tsinde ḽithihi." 
Genesis41:6 Ha tevhela dziṅwe ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza thoro dza mbo ḓi mela, dzi tsekene dzo fhiswa nga muya wa phangani." 
Genesis41:7 Idzo ṱhotshe tsekene dza thoro dza mila dziḽa ṱhanu na mbili dzo ḓalelaho dzo vhibvaho. Zwenezwo Farao a karuwa, a wana uri ndi muloro." 
Genesis41:8 Ḽi tshi tsha mbilu yawe ya dinalea, a vhidzisa vhotshifhe vhoṱhe vha mingome na vhaṱali vha Egipita. Farao a vha vhudza miloro yawe, hone ha si vhe na ane a kona u mu ṱalutshedza yone." 
Genesis41:9 Ndi hone ndumi khulwane a tshi amba na Farao a ri, “Ṋamusi ndi khou elelwa vhutshinyi hanga!" 
Genesis41:10 Farao vho vhuya vha ri sinyutshela vha ri hoṋela dzhele, nṋe na mubiki muhulwane, ngei nḓuni ya mulangammbi wa pfamo ya musanda." 
Genesis41:11 Vhuvhili hashu ra lora miloro vhusiku vhuthihi, muloro muṅwe na muṅwe ú na zwine wa amba." 
Genesis41:12 Henefho ro vha ri na muṱhanngana wa Muheberu, phuli ya mulangammbi wa pfamo ya musanda. Ro mu anetshela miloro yashu, ene a ri ṱalutshedza yone, a tshi ṱalutshedza muṅwe na muṅwe zwine muloro wawe wa amba zwone." 
Genesis41:13 Zwithu zwa bvelela nga he a ri ṱalutshedza: Nṋe ndo vhuedzedzwa mushumoni wanga, uḽa muṅwe munna a nembeledzwa.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vhidzisa Josefa, a ṱavhanya a bviswa dzhele, a vheulwa a ambara zwiṅwe zwiambaro, a ḓa phanḓa ha Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Ndo lora muloro, a hu na ane a kona u u ṱalutshedza. Hone ndo pfa hu tshi pfi inwi na vhudzwa muloro ni kona u u ṱalutshedza.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa a fhindula Farao a ri, “Izwo nṋe a thi zwi koni, ndi Mudzimu a no ḓo ṋea Farao ṱhalutshedzo i takadzaho.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vhudza Josefa a ri, “Ndo lora ndo ima khunzikhunzini ya mulambo wa Nile," 
Genesis41:18 henefho mulamboni ha bva kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dzavhuḓi dza tsadzi dza u nona, dza fula ṱhangani." 
Genesis41:19 Ha tevhela dziṅwe kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dza tsadzi dzo vhifhaho, dzo ondaho. Kholomo dzo vhifhaho zwingafho a thi athu vhuya nda dzi vhona shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis41:20 Idzo kholomo dza u onda dzo vhifhaho dza mila dziḽa ṱhanu na mbili dza u nona dze dza ranga u bvelela. 
Genesis41:21 Hone naho dzo no dzi mila a hu na we a vha a tshi nga ri dzo dzi mila; dzo ḓi sala dzo vhifha. Ndi hone ndi tshi karuwa. 
Genesis41:22 Miloroni yanga ndo vhona na ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza thoro dzo vhibva lwa u naka, dzo mela kha tsinde ḽithihi." 
Genesis41:23 Ha tevhela dziṅwe ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza mela dzo puta, dzo sekena, dzo tou swa nga muya wa phangani." 
Genesis41:24 Idzo ṱhotshe dzo sekenaho dza mila dziḽa ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dzavhuḓi. Izwo ndo zwi vhudza vhotshifhe vha mingome, hone a hu na we a kona u nṱalutshedza zwone.”" 
Genesis41:25 Josefa a fhindula Farao a ri, “Miloro ya Farao i amba zwithihi, i a fana. Mudzimu o dzumbululela Farao zwine a ṱoḓa u zwi ita." 
Genesis41:26 Kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dzo nonaho ndi miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili; ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza thoro dzavhuḓi na dzone ndi miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili; miloro iyo yoṱhe i amba zwithihi. 
Genesis41:27 Kholomo ṱhanu na mbili dzo vhifhaho dzo ondaho dze dza dzi tevhela ndi miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili, u ḓi nga ṱhotshe ṱhanu na mbili dza thoro dzo sekenaho dzo swaho nga muya wa phangani: Ndi miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓala." 
Genesis41:28 Ndi zwenezwo zwe nda vhudza Farao nda ri: Mudzimu o sumbedza Farao zwine a ṱoḓa u ita. 
Genesis41:29 Hu khou ḓa miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓalo shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita," 
Genesis41:30 hone hu ḓo tevhela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓala. Zwenezwo a hu tsha ḓo vhuya ha humbulwa uri ho vhuya ha vha na nḓalo kha ḽa Egipita; shango ḽi ḓo tou fa nga nḓala. 
Genesis41:31 A hu na muthu ane a kha ḓi ḓo elelwa uri ho vhuya ha vha na nḓalo shangoni, ngauri nḓala i no ḓo tevhela i ḓo vha i tshi ofhisa." 
Genesis41:32 Tshe tsha ita uri Farao vha lore luvhili mafhungo a fanaho, ndi uri mafhungo ayo Mudzimu o a elekanya a fhedza, nahone Mudzimu ha nga lengi u zwi ita." 
Genesis41:33 “Zwino-ha, Farao nga vha ṱoḓe muthu wa ṱhalukanyo na vhuṱali, vha mu vhee uri a lange shango ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis41:34 Farao nga vha vhee vhalavhelesi shangoni, vha dzhie tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiṱanu tsha khaṋo ya Egipita miṅwaha heyo miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓalo." 
Genesis41:35 Vho fanela u kuvhanganya zwiḽiwa zwoṱhe zwa heyo miṅwaha ya nḓalo ine ya khou ḓa, vha vhulunge goroi i tshi langwa nga Farao, i vhulungwe miḓini uri vhathu vha ḓo kona u wana zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis41:36 Hezwo zwiḽiwa zwi fanela u vhetshelwa thungo uri shango ḽoṱhe ḽi kone u ḽa miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓala ine ya ḓo wa fhano Egipita, uri shango ḽi si fe nga nḓala.”" 
Genesis41:37 Maano ayo Farao na magota awe vha vhona e avhuḓi. 
Genesis41:38 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ri nga wanafhi muṅwe ane a nga uyu munna, ane muya wa Mudzimu wa dzula khae?”" 
Genesis41:39 Farao a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Vhunga Mudzimu o ni dzumbululela zwithu hezwo zwoṱhe, a hu na a re na ṱhalukanyo na vhuṱali unga inwi." 
Genesis41:40 Inwi ni ḓo langa zwa pfamo yanga; vhathu vhanga vhoṱhe vho fanela u thetshelesa zwine na amba. Khuluṋoni hei ndi yone fhedzi i no ḓo ita uri nṋe ndi vhe muhulwane kha inwi.” 
Genesis41:41 Farao a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Ndi khou ni vhea muvhusi wa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita.”" 
Genesis41:42 Ndi hone Farao a tshi bvula rinngi yawe ya luswayo kha munwe wawe a i longa kha munwe wa Josefa. A mu ambadza khanzu ya maṱeleṱele, mukuloni a mu ambadza geḓane ya musuku." 
Genesis41:43 A mu namedza gariki ya tshanḓa tsha Farao, vhathu vha huwelela phanḓa hawe vha ri, “Ibvani nḓilani, ibvani nḓilani!” Ha vha u mu vhea mulangi wa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis41:44 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vhudza Josefa a ri, “Nṋe ndi Farao, hone kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita a hu na ane a ḓo ita tshithu a songo vhudzwa nga inwi.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farao a ri Josefa u pfi Tsafunathi Phania, a mu ṋea Asinathi ṅwananyana wa Photifera tshifhe wa Oni, a vha musadzi wawe. Josefa a tandula shango ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis41:46 Josefa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 30 a tshi thoma u shumela Farao khosi ya Egipita. Josefa a ṱuwa ha Farao a tandula shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita. 
Genesis41:47 Miṅwaha iyo miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓalo shango ḽa bveledza khaṋo khulu. 
Genesis41:48 Josefa a kuvhanganya zwiḽiwa zwoṱhe zwe zwa waniwa miṅwaha iyo miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓalo kha ḽa Egipita, a zwi vhulunga miḓini. Muḓini muṅwe na muṅwe a vhea zwiḽiwa zwe zwa limiwa masimuni o u tangaho." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa a vhulunga goroi nnzhi ya tou anda unga muṱavha wa lwanzhe; yo vha yo anda lwe a si tsha i ṅwala, ngauri yo vha i si na vhukono." 
Genesis41:50 Musi miṅwaha ya nḓala i sa athu swika, Josefa a bebelwa vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka nga Asinathi ṅwananyana wa Photifera, tshifhe wa muḓi wa Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Josefa a ri tanzhe ḽawe ḽi pfi Manase, a ri, “Ndi nge Mudzimu a ntonda uri ndi hangwe u tambula hanga, ndi hangwe na muṱa wa khotsi anga.”" 
Genesis41:52 Ṅwana wa vhuvhili wa mutuka a ri u pfi Efraimi, a ri, “Ndi nge Mudzimu a nṋea vhana shangoni ḽe nda tambula khaḽo.”" 
Genesis41:53 Miṅwaha iḽa miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓalo kha ḽa Egipita ya fhela," 
Genesis41:54 ha thoma miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ya nḓala, nga he Josefa a amba. Ha wa nḓala na kha maṅwe mashango oṱhe, hone shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita ho vha hu na zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis41:55 Huno vhathu vhoṱhe vha Egipita vha tshi vho thoma u pfa nḓala, vha lilela Farao uri a vha ṋee zwiḽiwa. Farao a vhudza Vhaegipita vhoṱhe a ri, “Iyani ha Josefa ni ite zwine a ni vhudza.”" 
Genesis41:56 Musi nḓala yo no ṱanganya shango ḽoṱhe, Josefa a vula zwisiku, a rengisela Vhaegipita goroi, nge nḓala ya vha i khulu kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis41:57 Vhathu vha mashango oṱhe vha ḓa Egipita u renga goroi kha Josefa, nge nḓala ya vha i khulu mashangoni oṱhe." 
Genesis42:1 Jakopo a zwi pfa uri hu na mavhele Egipita. Ndi hone a tshi amba na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka a ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi sokou dzula no lavhelesana?”" 
Genesis42:2 A dovha a ri, “Ndo pfa uri Egipita hu na mavhele. Tselani henengei ni yo ri ṱunḓela, ri tshile ri si fe.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ndi hone vhakomana vha Josefa vha fumi vha tshi tsela Egipita u yo renga mavhele. 
Genesis42:4 Hone Jakopo a tshi vha ruma a vho ngo ṱuwa na Benyamini murathu wa Josefa, nge Jakopo a ofha uri a nga welwa nga khombo." 
Genesis42:5 Zwenezwo vhana vha Israele vha ṱuwa na vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ya u renga mavhele, ngauri shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Kanana ho vha ho wa nḓala." 
Genesis42:6 Zwino Josefa o vha e ene muvhusi wa shango ḽa Egipita, a tshi rengisela vhathu vhoṱhe mavhele. Musi vhakomana vha Josefa vha tshi swika, vha mu gwadamela zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwa ita na u kwama fhasi." 
Genesis42:7 Josefa a tshi tou vhona vhakomana vhawe, a vha ḓivha, hone a ḓiita mutsinda, a vha ḽela vhuhali, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni bva ngafhi?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri bva shangoni ḽa Kanana, ro ḓa u renga zwiḽiwa.”" 
Genesis42:8 Naho Josefa o ḓivha vhakomana vhawe, vhone a vho ngo mu ḓivha." 
Genesis42:9 Ndi hone a tshi elelwa miloro yawe ye ya amba vhone. A vha vhudza a ri, “Ni dziṱholi! No ḓa u vhona he shango ḽashu ḽa si tsireledzwe!”" 
Genesis42:10 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Aiwa muṋe wanga, riṋe vhalanda vhavho ro tou ḓa u renga zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis42:11 Roṱhe ri vhana vha munna. Riṋe vhalanda vhavho ri a fulufhedzea, a ri dziṱholi lini.”" 
Genesis42:12 Ene a vha vhudza a ri, “A si zwone hezwo, no ḓa u vhona he shango ḽashu ḽa si tsireledzwe.”" 
Genesis42:13 Hone vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe vhalanda vhavho ro vha ri vharathu na vhakomana vha 12, ri vhana vha munna a no dzula shangoni ḽa Kanana. Phedzi yashu o sala na khotsi ashu; muṅwe ha tsheeho.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndo no ḓi ni vhudza nda ri: Ni dziṱholi!" 
Genesis42:15 Ndi ḓo ni linga nga u rali: Ndi khou ana nga vhutshilo ha Farao ndi ri, a ni nga ṱuwi fhano phedzi yaṋu a sa athu ḓa fhano." 
Genesis42:16 Rumani muṅwe waṋu a yo dzhia murathu waṋu; vhaṅwe vhaṋu vha ḓo vha vho hoṋelwa dzhele, uri zwi vhonale arali ni tshi khou amba ngoho. Arali ni sa ambi ngoho, vhukuma ndi ana nga vhutshilo ha Farao ndi ri, ni dziṱholi!”" 
Genesis42:17 A vha hoṋela dzhele vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu. 
Genesis42:18 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru Josefa a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋe ndi ofha Mudzimu, zwenezwo arali ni tshi ṱoḓa u tshila itani hezwi:" 
Genesis42:19 Arali ni vhanna vha fulufhedzeaho, siani muṅwe waṋu fhano dzhele, inwi vhaṅwe ni dzhie mavhele ni a ise miṱani yaṋu i no khou ṋoka nga nḓala." 
Genesis42:20 Hone ni nnḓisele phedzi ya muṱa wa haṋu, uri zwi vhonale uri ni khou amba ngoho, ni sa ḓo fa.” Vha mbo ḓi ita zwenezwo." 
Genesis42:21 Vha vhudzana vha ri, “Vhukuma ri khou tambudzelwa murathu washu. Ro zwi vhona uri o vha o hanganea hani a tshi khou ri luvhelela uri a tshile, hone ra si thetshelese; ndi zwine ra welwa nga khombo heino.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni a vha vhudza a ri, “A tho ngo ni vhudza nda ri ni songo khakhela uḽa mutukana? Hone inwi a no ngo thetshelesa! Zwino ri lifhedzelwa malofha awe.”" 
Genesis42:23 Vho vha vha sa ḓivhi uri Josefa u khou vha pfa, nge a vha a tshi amba navho nga muṱalutshedzi." 
Genesis42:24 Ene a vha tsiruwa a thoma u lila, a dovha a huma a yo amba navho. A ita uri Simioni a ṱuwiswe khavho, a vhoxwa vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Genesis42:25 Josefa a ri saga dzavho dzi ḓadzwe goroi, tshelede ya muṅwe na muṅwe i longwe sagani yawe, vha ṋewe na mbuvha. Musi vho no itelwa zwenezwo," 
Genesis42:26 vha hwesa dzidonngi mavhele avho, vha ṱuwa." 
Genesis42:27 He vha lala hone vhusiku, muṅwe a vula saga yawe uri a bvise zwiḽiwa zwa donngi yawe, a mbo ḓi vhona tshelede mulomoni wa saga yawe." 
Genesis42:28 A vhudza vhana vha khotsi awe a ri, “Tshelede yanga yo humiswa, ngei i ngomu sagani yanga.” Mbilu dzavho dza tou ṋoka, vha lavhelesana vha tshi khou tetemela vha ri, “Mudzimu o ri ita zwithu-ḓe?”" 
Genesis42:29 Musi vha tshi swika ha khotsi avho Jakopo shangoni ḽa Kanana, vha mu anetshela zwoṱhe zwe vha itwa, vha ri," 
Genesis42:30 “Munna ane a vhusa iḽo shango o ri ḽela vhuhali, a ri ita unga ri dziṱholi dzo ḓaho u tandula iḽo shango." 
Genesis42:31 Hone riṋe ro mu vhudza ra ri, ‘Riṋe ri vhanna vha fulufhedzeaho, a ri dziṱholi." 
Genesis42:32 Ri vhakomana na vharathu vha 12; ri vhana vha munna muthihi. Muṅwe ha tsheeho, wa phedzi o sala Kanana na khotsi ashu.’" 
Genesis42:33 Ndi hone uyo munna ane a vhusa iḽo shango a tshi ri vhudza a ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ḓivha uri ni vhanna vha fulufhedzeaho nga hezwi: Litshani ndi sale na muṅwe waṋu, ni dzhie zwiḽiwa ni ṱuwe ni isele miṱa yaṋu i no khou ṋoka nga nḓala." 
Genesis42:34 Hone ni nnḓisele phedzi ya muṱa wa haṋu, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ḓivha uri a ni dziṱholi, ni vhanna vha fulufhedzeaho. Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni ṋea ṅwana wa khotsi aṋu, na konou ita zwa u ḓitshimbilela fhano shangoni ḽino.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Musi vha tshi khou shulula saga dzavho, sagani ya muṅwe na muṅwe ha wanala mukhwama wa tshelede! Musi vhone na khotsi avho vha tshi vhona mikhwama ya tshelede, vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Genesis42:36 Khotsi avho Jakopo a vha vhudza a ri, “No ntshaisa vhananga. Josefa ha tsheeho, Simioni ha tsheeho, zwino ni ṱoḓa u dzhia na Benyamini. Vhonani uri ni khou nkonḓisela hani vhutshilo!”" 
Genesis42:37 Ndi hone Rubeni a tshi ri, “Vha nga ḓi vhulaha vhana vhanga vha vhatuka vhuvhili havho arali nda sa vhuya na Benyamini nda mu ḓisa khavho. Kha vha nkumedze ene, ndi ḓo mu londola nda vhuya nae.”" 
Genesis42:38 Hone Jakopo a ri, “Ṅwananga a nga si ṱuwe na inwi; mukomana wawe o fa, ho sala ene e eṱhe. Arali a huvhala lwendoni lune na khou lu fara, ndi ḓo fa nga mbilu ndo tshena ṱhoho ndo rano.”" 
Genesis43:1 Huno nḓala yo vha i tshee khulu shangoni. 
Genesis43:2 Zwenezwo musi vho no fhedza goroi i no bva Egipita, khotsi avho a vha vhudza a ri, “Vhuelelani ni yo ri rengela zwiḽiwanyana.”" 
Genesis43:3 Hone Juda a mu vhudza a ri, “Houḽa munna o tou ri vhudza o khwaṱhisa a ri, ‘A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda ni ṱanganedza ni si na murathu waṋu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Arali vha tenda ri tshi ṱuwa na murathu washu, ri ḓo ya ra vha rengela zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis43:5 Hone arali vha sa tenda ri tshi ṱuwa nae a ri nga yi, ngauri uḽa munna o ri vhudza a ri, ‘A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda ni ṱanganedza ni si na murathu waṋu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Israele a vhudzisa a ri, “No itelani ni tshi nngwedza khomboni nga u vhudza uyo munna uri ni na muṅwe murathu?”" 
Genesis43:7 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Uyo munna o ri vhudzisesa a tshi ṱoḓa u ḓivha zwa riṋe vhaṋe na zwa muṱa wa hashu. O ri vhudzisa a ri, ‘Khotsi aṋu vha kha ḓi tshila naa? Ni na muṅwe murathu naa?’ Riṋe tshashu ho vha hu u fhindula mbudziso dzawe. Ro vha ri tshi nga zwi ḓivha ngani uri u ḓo ri, ‘Ni vhuye na murathu waṋu’?”" 
Genesis43:8 Ndi hone Juda a tshi vhudza khotsi awe Israele a ri, “Kha vha ri mutukana hoyu a ṱuwe na nṋe, ri mbo ḓi ṱuwa zwino, uri riṋe na vhone na vhana vhashu ri tshile ri si fe." 
Genesis43:9 A vha nṋe ndi a khwaṱhisa uri a hu na tshi no ḓo mu wela; mafhungo awe kha a hweswe nṋe; arali nda sa vhuya nae nda mu ḓisa ha vhone, nda mu vhea phanḓa havho, mulandu u ḓo vha wanga vhutshilo hanga hoṱhe." 
Genesis43:10 Vhukuma arali ro vha ri songo lenga ndi musi ri tshi ḓo vha ro no ḓi ya ra vhuya ra ita luvhili.” 
Genesis43:11 Ndi hone khotsi avho Israele a tshi vha vhudza a ri, “Arali zwo fanela u ralo, izwo itani hezwi: Dzhiani zwiṅwe zwibveledzwa zwavhuḓi zwa shango ḽino ni longe sagani dzaṋu ni ṱuwe nazwo ni yo ṋea uyo munna i vhe nduvho – zwiḓolonyana na mutolinyana wa zwilungi na ṋonzhe i nukhelelaho na thebvu na nḓuhu." 
Genesis43:12 Ni fare na tshelede i no lingana na iḽa kavhili, ngauri no fanela u humisa tshelede iḽa yo longwaho milomoni ya saga dzaṋu. Khamusi vho tou khakha." 
Genesis43:13 Ṱuwani na murathu waṋu ni mbo ḓi ṱavhanya u humela kha uḽa munna. 
Genesis43:14 Ngavhe Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe a tshi ni khathutshela uri ni tshi swika ha uyo munna a litshe Simioni na Benyamini vha vhuye na inwi. A vha nṋe, arali nda felwa, ndo ḓi felwa zwanga.”" 
Genesis43:15 Ndi hone avho vhanna vha tshi dzhia iyo nduvho na iḽa tshelede yo vhalwa kavhili, vha ṱuwa na Benyamini. Vha ṱavhanya u tsela Egipita, vha swikiswa ha Josefa." 
Genesis43:16 Musi Josefa a tshi vhona Benyamini e navho, a vhudza mukoma wa nnḓu yawe a ri, “Dzhiani vhanna havha ni vha ise nḓuni yanga, ni ṱhavhe tshifuwo, ni lugise tshiswiṱulo; vha ḓo swiṱula na nṋe.”" 
Genesis43:17 Uyo munna a ita zwe Josefa a mu vhudza, a dzhia avho vhanna a vha isa nḓuni ya Josefa." 
Genesis43:18 Zwino vhanna avho vha tshi iswa nḓuni yawe vha pfa vho farwa nga nyofho. Vha elekanya vha ri, “Ro ḓiswa hafhano nga mulandu wa tshelede ye ya dzheniswa sagani dzashu luḽa lwa u thoma. U ṱoḓa u ri zhongondedza a ri kunda a ri fara a ri ita dziphuli, a dzhia donngi dzashu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Vha ya ha mukoma wa Josefa vha amba nae tshifhingoni tshi yaho nḓuni," 
Genesis43:20 vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ro vhuya ra ḓa fhano lwa u thoma ra renga zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis43:21 Hone he ra lala hone ra vula saga dzashu, muṅwe na muṅwe washu a wana tshelede yawe yoṱhe i songo ṱumbuliwa, i henefho mulomoni wa saga yawe. Zwino ro vhuya nayo," 
Genesis43:22 ra dovha ra ḓa na iṅwe tshelede ya u renga zwiḽiwa. A ri ḓivhi uri we a longa tshelede yashu sagani dzashu ndi nnyi.” 
Genesis43:23 Ene a ri, “Ndi zwone, ni songo ofha tshithu. Mudzimu waṋu, Ene Mudzimu wa khotsi aṋu, ndi Ene o ni ṋeaho tshelede ye na i wana sagani dzaṋu; tshelede yaṋu ndo i ṱanganedza.” Ndi hone a tshi ḓisa Simioni khavho." 
Genesis43:24 Uyo mukoma a isa avho vhanna nḓuni ya Josefa, a vha ṋea maḓi uri vha ṱambe milenzhe, donngi dzavho a dzi ṋea zwiḽiwa." 
Genesis43:25 Vha lugisa zwifhiwa zwine vha ḓo zwi ṋea Josefa a tshi swika masiari, ngauri vho vha vho no zwi pfa uri vha ḓo swiṱula nae." 
Genesis43:26 Josefa a tshi ḓa hayani, vha mu ṋea nduvho dze vha ḓa nadzo nḓuni yawe, vha gwadama ṱhoho dza kwama fhasi." 
Genesis43:27 A vhudzisa uri vho vuwa hani, a konou ri, “Mukalaha khotsi aṋu vhe na mmbudza vha vuwa hani? Vha kha ḓi tshila naa?”" 
Genesis43:28 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Mulanda wavho khotsi ashu vha kha ḓi tshila, vho takala.” Vha mu hulisa nga u gwadama." 
Genesis43:29 Musi a tshi sedza a vhona murathu wawe Benyamini, ene ṅwana wa mme awe, a vhudzisa a ri, “Uyu ndi ene phedzi ya muṱa wa haṋu we na mmbudza ngae?” A ri, “Mudzimu a u ite nga vhuthu, ṅwananga.”" 
Genesis43:30 Josefa a ri u vhona murathu wawe, zwa ritha mbilu yawe, a ṱavhanya a bvela nnḓa, a ṱoḓa hune a nga dzula hone a lila. A dzhena pfamoni yawe a lilela hone." 
Genesis43:31 A ṱamba khofheni, a dovha a bvela nnḓa, a ḓikhwaṱhisa, a ri, “Avhani zwiḽiwa.”" 
Genesis43:32 Ene vha mu avhela thungo, na Vhaegipita vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ḽa nae vha vha avhela thungo, ngauri Vhaegipita a vha ḽi na Vhaheberu, izwo zwi a ila kha Vhaegipita." 
Genesis43:33 Avho vhanna vho vha vho dzudzwa phanḓa ha Josefa vho tou tevhekana zwi tshi ya nga u bebwa havho, u bva kha tanzhe u swika kha phedzi; vha kanuka vha sedzana." 
Genesis43:34 Musi vha tshi avhelwa mikovhe yavho i tshi bva ḓafulani ya Josefa, mukovhe wa Benyamini wa fhira ya vhaṅwe kaṱanu. Ndi hone vha tshi ḽa, vha nwa nae vha vhuya vha dzelela." 
Genesis44:1 Zwino Josefa a vhudza vhakoma vha nnḓu yawe a ri, “Ḓadzani saga dza havha vhanna nga zwiḽiwa zwinzhi nga hune vha kona u hwala, tshelede ya muṅwe na muṅwe ni i longe mulomoni wa saga yawe." 
Genesis44:2 Ni longe tshinwelo tshanga tsha siliva mulomoni wa saga ya wa phedzi wa muṱani wa havho, ni longe na tshelede yawe ya u renga mavhele.” Uyo a ita nga he Josefa a mu vhudza." 
Genesis44:3 Musi mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka, avho vhanna vha ṱuwa na donngi dzavho." 
Genesis44:4 Huno vha sa athu vha kule na muḓi, Josefa a vhudza mukoma wawe a ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni tevhele havhaḽa vhanna, ni tshi swika khavho ni ri, ‘Ndi mini ni tshi lifhedza zwivhuya nga zwivhi?" 
Genesis44:5 Itshi a si tshinwelo tshine muṋe wanga a nwa ngatsho a bvumba ngatsho naa? No ita vhuvhi!’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Musi mukoma a tshi swika khavho, a dovholola ayo maipfi." 
Genesis44:7 Hone vhone vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Ndi mini muṋe wanga a tshi amba zwo raloho? Riṋe ri nga si ite zwo raloho!" 
Genesis44:8 Hufha ro ri ri tshi bva shangoni ḽa Kanana ra ita na u vhuya na iḽa tshelede ye ra i wana milomoni ya saga dzashu, ra vha ṋea. Zwino ri nga tswa hani siliva kana musuku nḓuni ya muṋe wavho?" 
Genesis44:9 Arali vha wana muṅwe washu e nayo, nga a vhulawe; riṋe vhaṅwe roṱhe nga ri itwe phuli dza muṋe wanga.”" 
Genesis44:10 Ene a ri, “Izwo ndi zwone, zwine na amba zwi ḓo tou ralo. Ane a wanala e natsho u ḓo vha phuli yanga; inwi vhaṅwe noṱhe a ni nga vhi na mulandu.”" 
Genesis44:11 Muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a mbo ḓi tsisela saga yawe fhasi, a i vula." 
Genesis44:12 Ndi hone mukoma a tshi sedza a thoma nga tanzhe a fhedzisela nga wa phedzi. Tshinwelo tsha wanala sagani ya Benyamini. 
Genesis44:13 Zwo no ralo, vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho. Vhoṱhe vha hwesa donngi dzavho mihwalo, vha humela muḓini." 
Genesis44:14 Josefa o vha a tshi kha ḓi vha nḓuni musi Juda na vhana vha khotsi awe vha tshi dzhena, vha ḓiposa fhasi phanḓa hawe." 
Genesis44:15 Josefa a vha vhudza a ri, “No ita zwithu-ḓe? No vha ni sa ḓivhi uri munna a no nga nṋe u kona u ḓivha zwithu nga u bvumba?”" 
Genesis44:16 Juda a fhindula a ri, “Ri ḓo fhindula muṋe wanga ra ri mini? Ri nga ri mini? Ri nga ḓikupula hani mulandu? Mudzimu o dzumbulula mulandu washu, zwino ri dziphuli dzavho muṋe wanga, riṋe na uyo we a wanwa e na tshinwelo.”" 
Genesis44:17 Huno Josefa a ri, “Nṋe zwo raloho ndi nga si zwi ite! Onoyo munna we a wanala e na tshinwelo ndi ene a no ḓo vha phuli yanga e eṱhe. Inwi vhaṅwe noṱhe ḓiṱutsheleni nga mulalo ni humele ha khotsi aṋu.”" 
Genesis44:18 Ndi hone Juda a tshi sendela a ri, “Ndi a vha humbela muṋe wanga, nga vha litshe ndi ambe navho muṋe wanga. Navho vha tshi eḓana na Farao vha songo ntsinyutshela." 
Genesis44:19 Vhone muṋe wanga vho ri vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Ni na khotsi kana murathu naa?’" 
Genesis44:20 Riṋe ra fhindula ra ri, ‘Ri na khotsi vho no ḓi vhaho vha maḓuvha; hu na ṅwana muṱuku wa mutuka we vha mu bebelwa vho no ḓi kalaha. Mukomana wawe o fa, ndi ene ṅwana wa mme awe e eṱhe o salaho, khotsi awe a vha mu funi zwone.’" 
Genesis44:21 Ndi hone vhone vha tshi ri vhudza vha ri, ‘Mu ḓiseni ha nṋe ndi tou mu vhona nga anga maṱo.’" 
Genesis44:22 Riṋe ra vhudza vhone muṋe wanga ra ri, ‘Uyo mutukana ha koni u ṱutshela khotsi awe; arali a ṱutshela khotsi awe vha ḓo fa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Hone vhone vho ri vhudza vha ri, ‘Na sa ḓa na murathu waṋu wa phedzi, a ni tsha ḓo vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshanga.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Musi ri tshi humela ha mulanda wavho khotsi anga, ra vha vhudza zwe vhone muṋe wanga vha amba." 
Genesis44:25 Ndi hone khotsi ashu vha tshi ri, ‘Humani ni yo renga zwiṅwe zwiḽiwanyana.’" 
Genesis44:26 Hone riṋe ra ri, ‘Arali ra ṱuwa na murathu washu wa phedzi, ndi hone ri tshi nga ya; ra sa ṱuwa nae a ri koni u tsela hone. A ri koni u vhona tshifhaṱuwo tsha uyo munna ri si na murathu washu wa phedzi.’" 
Genesis44:27 Mulanda wavho khotsi anga vha ri vhudza vha ri, ‘Ni a ḓivha uri musadzi wanga o mmbebela vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka." 
Genesis44:28 Muṅwe wavho o nṱutshela, nṋe nda ri: Vhukuma uyo o ṱhukhukanywa. Tshi tsheetsho a tho ngo tsha dovha nda mu vhona." 
Genesis44:29 Arali na nnzhiela na uyu, a huvhala, ni ḓo ita uri ndi fe nga mbilu ndo tshena ṱhoho ndo rano.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Zwino-ha, mulanda wavho khotsi ashu a vha tsha ṱoḓa u fhambana na uyu mutukana; arali ra mu sia," 
Genesis44:31 ri tshi swika vha vhona uri mutukana haho, vha ḓo fa. Ri ḓo vha ro ita uri khotsi ashu vha fe nga mbilu vho tshena ṱhoho vho ralo." 
Genesis44:32 Nṋe ndo fulufhedzisa khotsi anga ndo tou khwaṱhisa nda ri a hu na tshi no ḓo wela hoyu mutukana. Ndo ri, ‘Arali nda sa vhuya nae nda mu ḓisa ha vhone, kha vha nkhwese mulandu khotsi anga, vhutshilo hanga hoṱhe!’" 
Genesis44:33 Zwino-ha, ndi humbela uri nṋe ndi sale fhano ndi vhe phuli yavho vhudzuloni ha hoyu mutukana, vha litshe uyu mutukana a hume na vhakomana vhawe." 
Genesis44:34 Nṋe ndi nga humela hani ha khotsi anga, uyu mutukana ndi si nae? Aiwa nandi! Ndi nga si kone u konḓelela ndi tshi vhona u vhavha ha mbilu ya khotsi anga.”" 
Genesis45:1 Zwenezwo Josefa a pfa a si tsha kona u konḓelela hezwi e na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi mu shumela, a takusa ipfi a ri, “Noṱhe nṱutsheleni!” Josefa a tshi sala a tshi ḓidzumbululela vhakomana vhawe, vhaṅwe vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vho no bva." 
Genesis45:2 Hone a lila a tou ṱavha mukosi lwe na Vhaegipita vha zwi pfa, mafhungo ayo a vhuya a swika pfamoni ya Farao." 
Genesis45:3 Josefa a vhudza vhakomana vhawe a ri, “Ndi nṋe Josefa! Vhukumakuma khotsi anga vha kha ḓi tshila naa?” Vhakomana vhawe vha si kone u mu fhindula; vho vha vho hanganea vha tshi mu vhona." 
Genesis45:4 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi vhudza vhakomana vhawe a ri, “Sendelani tsini hanga.” Musi vho no sendela tsini hawe a ri, “Ndi nṋe murathu waṋu Josefa we na mu rengisa a iswa Egipita." 
Genesis45:5 Hone zwino ni songo ṱungufhala, ni songo ḽa mbilu nge na nthengisa, ndi Mudzimu we a nthuma nda ni ranga phanḓa uri ni tshidzwe." 
Genesis45:6 Uno u tou vha ṅwaha wa vhuvhili tshee nḓala ya wa shangoni; hu kha ḓi ḓo fhela miṅwaha miṱanu hu sa limiwi, hu sa kaṋiwi." 
Genesis45:7 Mudzimu o nthuma nda ni ranga phanḓa uri lushaka lwa haṋu lu si fe tshoṱhe shangoni, ni tshile, hu vhe na vhanzhi vha tshidzwaho." 
Genesis45:8 Zwenezwo a si inwi no nnḓisaho fhano, ndi Mudzimu, o nnyita khotsi a Farao, ndi langa zwoṱhe zwa muṱa wawe, ndi vhusa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Genesis45:9 “Ṱavhanyani ni humele ha khotsi anga, ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Ṅwana wavho Josefa u ri: Mudzimu o nnyita muvhusi wa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita. Kha vha ḓe ngeno ha nṋe, vha songo tsha lenga." 
Genesis45:10 Vha ḓo dzula shangoni ḽa Gosheni hune vha ḓo vha tsini hanga, vhone na vhana vhavho na vhaḓuhulu vhavho na maṱambi a nngu dzavho na kholomo dzavho na thundu yavho yoṱhe." 
Genesis45:11 Ndi ḓo vha londola vhe henefho, ngauri hu kha ḓi ḓa miṅwe miṅwaha miṱanu ya nḓala; nṋe a thi funi vha tshi fa nga nḓala, vhone na muṱa wavho na zwoṱhe zwine vha vha nazwo.’ Ni vha vhudze nga u ralo." 
Genesis45:12 “Ni khou zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo, na murathu wanga Benyamini u khou zwi vhona uri ndi wanga mulomo u no khou amba na inwi." 
Genesis45:13 Vhudzani khotsi anga uri ndo huliswa hani fhano Egipita, ni vha vhudze na zwoṱhe zwe na zwi vhona. Ṱavhanyani ni yo dzhia khotsi anga ni vha ḓise fhano.”" 
Genesis45:14 Ndi hone a tshi kuvhatedza murathu wawe Benyamini a lila; na Benyamini a mu kuvhatedza-vho a tshi khou lila. 
Genesis45:15 A kuvhatedza vhakomana vhawe vhoṱhe a tshi khou lila; ndi hone vhakomana vhawe vha tshi konou amba nae. 
Genesis45:16 Mafhungo a uri vhakomana vha Josefa vho ḓa a swika pfamoni ya Farao. Farao a ri u zwi pfa a takala, na magota awe vha takala." 
Genesis45:17 Farao a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Vhudzani vhakomana vhaṋu ni ri, ‘Itani hezwi: Hwesani donngi dzaṋu mihwalo, ni humele shangoni ḽa Kanana," 
Genesis45:18 ni dzhie khotsi aṋu na miṱa yaṋu ni ḓe navho fhano ha nṋe. Ndi ḓo ni ṋea shango fhano Egipita ḽi fhiraho oṱhe; ni ḓo ḓiphiṋa nga mapfura a shango.’ 
Genesis45:19 Na inwi ndi khou ni ruma; vha vhudzeni ni ri, ‘Itani hezwi: Dzhiani dzigoloi dzi no bva shangoni ḽa Egipita, ni ḓo namedza vhana vhaṋu na vhasadzi vhaṋu. Dzhiani khotsi aṋu ni vhuye navho." 
Genesis45:20 Thundu yaṋu ni songo i londa, ni ḓo wana zwivhuya zwi no fhira zwoṱhe fhano Egipita.’ ”" 
Genesis45:21 Vhana vha Israele vha ita zwe vha vhudzwa. Josefa a vha ṋea dzigoloi sa zwe Farao a amba, a vha ṋea na mbuvha ya u ḽa nḓilani." 
Genesis45:22 Muṅwe na muṅwe a mu ṋea zwiambaro zwiswa, Benyamini a mu ṋea maḓana mararu a mangwende a siliva na zwiambaro zwiṱanu zwiswa." 
Genesis45:23 Khotsi awe a vha rumela fumi ḽa donngi dzo hwala zwibveledzwa zwavhuḓivhuḓi zwa Egipita, na donngi dza fumi dza tsadzi dzo hwala mavhele na vhurotho na mbuvha ine khotsi awe vha ḓo ḽa nḓilani." 
Genesis45:24 Ndi hone a tshi ri vhakomana vhawe vha ṱuwe, a vha vhudza maipfi awe a u fhedzisela a ri, “Ni songo enda ni tshi rovhedzana nḓilani.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ndi hone vha tshi ṱuwa Egipita. Musi vha tshi swika shangoni ḽa Kanana, ha khotsi avho Jakopo," 
Genesis45:26 vha mu anetshela vha ri, “Josefa u kha ḓi tshila. Vhukuma ndi ene muvhusi wa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita.” Jakopo zwa mu somela, a si vhuye a tenda zwine vha amba." 
Genesis45:27 Hone musi vha tshi mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwe Josefa a vha vhudza, a tshi vhona na dzigoloi dze Josefa a dzi rumela uri dzi ḓe dzi mu dzhie, a dzivhuluwa." 
Genesis45:28 Ndi hone Israele a tshi ri, “Ndi vho tenda! Ṅwananga Josefa u kha ḓi tshila. Ndi ḓo ṱuwa nda yo mu vhona ndi sa athu fa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Israele o pfuluwa na thundu yawe yoṱhe, a swika Bierisheba. Henefho a ṋekedza Mudzimu wa khotsi awe Isaka zwiṱhavhelo." 
Genesis46:2 Vhusiku honoho Mudzimu a amba na Israele e kha bono a ri, “Jakopo, Jakopo!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano.”" 
Genesis46:3 Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu, ndi Mudzimu wa khotsi au. U songo ofha u tsela Egipita; ndi ḓo u ita lushaka luhulu henengei." 
Genesis46:4 Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo ya na iwe Egipita; Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo dovha nda vhuya na iwe. Tshanḓa tsha Josefa ndi tshone tshine tsha ḓo u vala maṱo u tshi fa.” 
Genesis46:5 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ṱuwa afho Bierisheba. Vhana vha Israele vha endedza khotsi avho Jakopo na vhana vhavho na vhasadzi vhavho nga dzigoloi dze Farao a dzi rumela uri dzi ye dzi vha dzhie. 
Genesis46:6 Vha dzhia thakha yavho na zwoṱhe zwe vha zwi wana shangoni ḽa Kanana, vha pfulutshela Egipita, Jakopo na muṱa wawe woṱhe –" 
Genesis46:7 vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana na vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana – vhana vhawe vhoṱhe o vha dzhia a pfulutshela navho Egipita. 
Genesis46:8 Madzina a vhana vha Israele vho pfulutshelaho Egipita ngea: Ndi Jakopo, na Rubeni tanzhe ḽawe," 
Genesis46:9 na vhana vha Rubeni vha vhatuka: Enokho na Phalu na Esromu na Kharami. 
Genesis46:10 Vhana vha Simioni vha vhatuka ndi Jemuele na Jamini na Ohadi na Jakhini na Tsohara, na Saulo ṅwana wa musadzi wa Mukanana." 
Genesis46:11 Vhana vha Livi vha vhatuka ndi Gerisoni na Kehathi na Mirari. 
Genesis46:12 Vhana vha Juda vha vhatuka ndi Ere na Onani na Shela na Pheretse na Zera (Ere na Onani vho fela shangoni ḽa Kanana), na Esromu na Hamuli, vhana vha Pheretse." 
Genesis46:13 Vhana vha Isakhara ndi Thola na Phua na Jashubu na Shimironi. 
Genesis46:14 Vhana vha Zebuloni vha vhatuka ndi Serede na Eloni na Jahaliele. 
Genesis46:15 Ndi vhone vhana vhe Lea a bebela Jakopo shangoni ḽa Phadani Aramu, hu sa vhalwi ṅwananyana wawe Dina. Vha vhatuka na vhasidzana vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi 33." 
Genesis46:16 Vhana vha Gadi vha vhatuka ndi Tsefoni na Hagi na Shuni na Etsiboni na Eri na Arodi na Areli. 
Genesis46:17 Vhana vha Ashere vha vhatuka ndi Jimina na Ishiva na Ishivi na Beria na khaladzi avho Sera. Vhana vha Beria vha vhatuka ndi Hebere na Malakhiele. 
Genesis46:18 Ndi vhone vhana vha Zilipha ṅwananyana wa phuli we Labani a mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Lea; ndi vhone vhe a vha bebela Jakopo. Vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi 16. 
Genesis46:19 Vhana vha Rahele musadzi wa Jakopo ndi Josefa na Benyamini. 
Genesis46:20 Josefa o vha na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka shangoni ḽa Egipita: ndi Manase na Efraimi, vhe a vha bebelwa nga Asinathi ṅwananyana wa Photifera tshifhe wa muḓi wa Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Vhana vha Benyamini vha vhatuka ndi Bela na Bekhere na Ashibele na Gera na Naamani na Ekhi na Roshi na Muphimi na Huphimi na Aridi. 
Genesis46:22 Havho ndi vhone vhana vha vhatuka vhe Rahele a vha bebela Jakopo. Vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi 14. 
Genesis46:23 Ṅwana wa Dani wa mutuka ndi Hushimi. 
Genesis46:24 Vhana vha Nafuthali vha vhatuka ndi Jahatsiele na Guni na Jetsere na Shileme. 
Genesis46:25 Ndi vhone vhana vha Jakopo vha vhatuka vhe a vha bebelwa nga Biliha, we Labani a mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Rahele. Vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi 7." 
Genesis46:26 Vhathu vhe vha pfulutshela Egipita na Jakopo, vha malofha awe vhukuma, hu sa vhaliwi vhasadzi vha vhana vhawe, vho vha vhe 66." 
Genesis46:27 Vhana vha vhatuka vhe Josefa a vha bebelwa Egipita vho vha vhe vhavhili. Vha muṱa wa Jakopo vho pfulutshelaho Egipita vho vha vhe 70. 
Genesis46:28 Israele o ruma Juda uri a mu range phanḓa a ye ha Josefa, uri Josefa a ṱangane nae Gosheni. Musi vha tshi swika shangoni ḽa Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Josefa a lugiselwa gariki yawe, a yo ṱangana na khotsi awe Israele shangoni ḽa Gosheni. A tshi swika a kuvhatedza khotsi awe, a lila tshifhinga tshilapfu." 
Genesis46:30 Israele a amba na Josefa a ri, “Zwino ndi nga ḓi ḓifela zwanga, tenda ndo zwi vhona nga anga maṱo uri ni kha ḓi tshila.”" 
Genesis46:31 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi amba na vhakomana vhawe na vha muṱa wa khotsi awe a ri, “Ndi ḓo ya ha Farao nda mu vhudza aya mafhungo nda ri, ‘Vhakomana vhanga na vha muṱa wa khotsi anga vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Kanana vho ḓa ha nṋe." 
Genesis46:32 Vhanna avho ndi vhalisa, vha fuwa zwifuwo, vho ḓa na masambi a nngu na kholomo na thundu yavho yoṱhe.’" 
Genesis46:33 Zwino-ha, arali Farao a ni vhidza a ni vhudzisa a ri, ‘Ni shuma mushumo-ḓe?’" 
Genesis46:34 ni fhindule ni ri, ‘U bva hanani hashu riṋe vhalanda vhavho ro ḓi vha vhalisa vha zwifuwo, u ḓi nga vhomakhulukuku washu.’ Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo kona u dzula shangoni ḽa Gosheni.” (Ndi uri Vhaegipita vho vha vha tshi nyala vhalisa vhoṱhe vha zwifuwo.)" 
Genesis47:1 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi ya ha Farao a ri, “Khotsi anga na vhana vhavho vho ḓa vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa Kanana na masambi avho a nngu na kholomo na thundu yavho yoṱhe, zwino vha shangoni ḽa Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 O vha o ṱuwa na vhakomana vhawe vhaṱanu, a vha swikisa ha Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Farao a vhudzisa vhakomana vhawe a ri, “Ni shuma mushumo-ḓe?” Vhone vha fhindula Farao vha ri, “Riṋe vhalanda vhavho ri vhafuwi, u ḓi nga vhomakhulukuku washu.”" 
Genesis47:4 Vha dovha vha vhudza Farao vha ri, “Ro ḓa u dzula shangoni ḽino, ngauri shango ḽa Kanana ḽo welwa nga nḓala khulu, zwino masambi ashu a dzinngu a dzi tshee na pfulo. Nga vha ri tendele ri dzule shangoni ḽa Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ndi hone Farao a tshi vhudza Josefa a ri, “Vhunga zwino khotsi aṋu na vhakomana vhaṋu vho swika," 
Genesis47:6 shango ḽa Egipita ndi ḽavho. Litshani khotsi aṋu na vhakomana vhaṋu vha dzule mapfurani a shango. Nga vha dzule Gosheni. Arali hu na vha re na vhukoni khavho, ni ri vha ingamele vhalisa vha thakha yanga.”" 
Genesis47:7 Josefa a ḓisa khotsi awe Jakopo a vha swikisa ha Farao. Jakopo a shudufhadza Farao. 
Genesis47:8 Farao a vhudzisa Jakopo a ri, “Vha na miṅwaha mingana?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakopo a fhindula Farao a ri, “Miṅwaha ye nda i fhedza ndi tshi khou tendeleka ndi tshi ṱoka ndi tshi ṱokolola ndi 130. Miṅwaha yanga yo vha i si gathi nahone yo ḓala zwi konḓaho, a i eḓani na miṅwaha ya vhokhotsi anga ye vha i fhedza vha tshi khou tendeleka vha tshi ṱoka vha tshi ṱokolola.”" 
Genesis47:10 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi shudufhadza Farao, a takuwa a ṱuwa." 
Genesis47:11 Josefa a ṋea khotsi awe na vhakomana vhawe vhudzulo kha ḽa Egipita, a vha ṋea shango ḽa mapfura, dzinguni ḽa Ramisese, sa zwe Farao a amba." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa a ṋea khotsi awe na vhakomana vhawe na muṱa wa khotsi awe woṱhe zwiḽiwa, zwi tshi ya nga tshivhalo tsha vhana vhavho." 
Genesis47:13 Shangoni ḽoṱhe ho vha hu si na zwiḽiwa; nḓala yo vha i khulu lwe vhathu vha shango ḽa Egipita na vha shango ḽa Kanana vha vha vha tshi khou fa nga nḓala. 
Genesis47:14 Josefa a kuvhanganya tshelede yoṱhe ye vhathu vha Egipita na vha Kanana vha renga ngayo mavhele, a i isa pfamoni ya Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Musi tshelede ya vhathu vha shango ḽa Egipita na ya vha shango ḽa Kanana yo no fhela yoṱhe, Vhaegipita vha ḓa ha Josefa vha ri, “Nga vha ri fhe zwiḽiwa; ri a tou lovha vha tshi zwi vhona naa? Tshelede yashu yoṱhe yo fhela.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa a fhindula a ri, “Ḓisani thakha yaṋu; na nṋea thakha yaṋu ndi ḓo ni ṋea zwiḽiwa arali tshelede yaṋu yo fhela.”" 
Genesis47:17 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓisa zwifuwo zwavho ha Josefa, ene a vha ṋea zwiḽiwa, vhone vha mu fha dzibere, dzinngu, dzimbudzi, kholomo, kana dzidonngi. Ṅwaha wonoyo woṱhe a vha ṋea zwiḽiwa vhone vha tshi mu ṋea zwifuwo zwavho." 
Genesis47:18 Musi ṅwaha wonoyo wo no fhela, vha dovha vha ḓa khae nga ṅwaha u tevhelaho, vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Muṋe wanga, a ri koni u vha dzumbela: vhukuma tshelede yashu yoṱhe yo fhela, zwifuwo zwashu zwo no vha zwavho muṋe wanga. A hu na tsho salaho tshine ra nga vha ṋea muṋe wanga, ho tou sala mivhili yashu na masimu ashu." 
Genesis47:19 Ri a tou lovha vha tshi zwi vhona, riṋe na masimu ashu? Nga vha ri renge na masimu ashu vha ri ṋee zwiḽiwa; riṋe ri ḓo vha phuli dza Farao na masimu ashu. Hone nga vha ri fhe mbeu ri zwale, ri kone u tshila ri si fe, shango ḽi sa ḓo sala ḽi si na muthu.”" 
Genesis47:20 Ngauralo Josefa a rengela Farao masimu oṱhe a Egipita. Vhaegipita vhoṱhe nga muthihi nga muthihi vha rengisa masimu avho nge vha vha vho welwa nga nḓala khulu, masimu oṱhe a vha a Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Vhathu Josefa a vha ita dziphuli, shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita nga he ḽa guma." 
Genesis47:22 Masimu e a si a renge ndi a vhotshifhe fhedzi, ngauri vhotshifhe vho vha vha tshi wana mukovhe une vha ṋewa nga Farao. Zwenezwo vhone a vho ngo rengisa masimu avho." 
Genesis47:23 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi vhudza vhathu a ri, “Vhonani, zwino ndo ni renga na masimu aṋu ndi tshi ni rengela Farao. Mbeu ngei ine na ḓo ri u lima na zwala." 
Genesis47:24 Hone musi ni tshi kaṋa no fanela u ṋea Farao tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiṱanu tsha khaṋo yaṋu. Zwipiḓa zwiṋa kha zwiṱanu i ḓo vha mbeu ine na ḓo zwala masimuni aṋu, na zwiḽiwa zwa inwi vhaṋe na miṱa yaṋu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Vho ri tshidza. Arali vha nga ri ita nga vhuthu, ri ḓo ḓi vha phuli dza Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi vhea mulayo une wa amba masimu a Egipita; u ri: tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiṱanu tsha khaṋo tshi ṋewa Farao. Mulayo wonoyo u kha ḓi vha hone na ṋamusi. Ndi masimu a vhotshifhe e oṱhe e a si vhe a Farao. 
Genesis47:27 Vhaisraele vho vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Egipita, kha ḽa Gosheni. Vho ḽi ṋewa ḽa vha ḽavho, vha beba vha anda zwihulu." 
Genesis47:28 Jakopo a dzula shangoni ḽa Egipita a fhedza miṅwaha ya 17; vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe ho vha miṅwaha ya 147. 
Genesis47:29 Musi tshifhinga tsha Israele tsha u fa tsho no sendela, a vhidza ṅwana wawe Josefa a mu vhudza a ri, “Arali u tshi ntakalela, longa tshanḓa tswaroni dzanga u ane uri u ḓo nnyitela vhuthu wa fulufhedzea; u songo ntswiṱa fhano Egipita." 
Genesis47:30 Musi ndi tshi yo eḓela na vhokhotsi anga, nkhwale ndi ṱuwe fhano Egipita, u ntswiṱe tshaloni tshavho.” Josefa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓo ita zwine vha khou amba.”" 
Genesis47:31 Jakopo a ri, “Nnyanele.” Josefa a mu anela. Israele a luvha Mudzimu henefho vhulaloni hawe." 
Genesis48:1 Ngavhuya Josefa a ḓa a vhudzwa ha pfi, “Khotsi avho vha a lwala.” A dzhia vhana vhawe vhavhili vha vhatuka a ṱuwa navho a ya ha khotsi awe." 
Genesis48:2 Musi Jakopo a tshi vhudzwa upfi, “Ṅwana wavho Josefa khoyo o ḓa u vha vhona,” Israele a vusa nungo dzawe, a vuwa vhulaloni a dzula." 
Genesis48:3 Jakopo a vhudza Josefa a ri, “Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe o ḓa kha nṋe ngei Lusi shangoni ḽa Kanana, a ntshudufhadza," 
Genesis48:4 a mmbudza a ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ita uri u bebe vhana, ni ande. Kha iwe hu ḓo bva tshakha nnzhi; shango heḽi ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhaḓuhulu vhau ḽa vha ḽavho lini na lini.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Zwino vhana vhau vhavhili vha vhatuka vhe wa vha bebelwa shangoni ḽa Egipita nṋe ndi sa athu ḓa ha iwe fhano Egipita, vha ḓo vhaliwa sa vhanga; Efraimi na Manase vha ḓo vha vhana vhanga u ḓi nga Rubeni na Simioni." 
Genesis48:6 Hone vhana vhe wa vha navho wo no vha na avho, vha ḓo vhaliwa sa vhau; shango ḽine vha ḓo ḽi wana ḽi ḓo vhidzwa nga madzina a vhakomana vhavho Efraimi na Manase." 
Genesis48:7 “Musi ndi nḓilani ndi tshi khou vhuya Phadani, nda felwa nga mme au Rahele. Ho vha hu shangoni ḽa Kanana, ri nḓilani ri tshi vho sendela Efratha, vha swiṱwa tsini ha nḓila i no ya Efratha – ndi amba Betlehema.”" 
Genesis48:8 Huno Israele a tshi vhona vhana vha Josefa vhavhili vha vhatuka, a vhudzisa a ri, “Avha ndi vhonnyi?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa a fhindula khotsi awe a ri, “Ndi vhana vhanga vha vhatuka vhe Mudzimu a mpha vhone ndi fhano.” Jakopo a ri, “Vha ḓise ha nṋe ndi vha shudufhadze.”" 
Genesis48:10 Maṱo a Israele o vha a si tsha vhona nga u hula, a si tsha vhona zwavhuḓi. Josefa a ita uri vha sendele tsini hawe, Jakopo a vha khisa, a vha kuvhatedza." 
Genesis48:11 Ndi hone Israele a tshi vhudza Josefa a ri, “Ndo vha ndi songo humbula uri ndi ḓo dovha nda u vhona, hone Mudzimu o ita uri ndi vhone na vhana vhau.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefa a vha sudzulusa tsini ha zwirumbi zwa khotsi awe, a gwadama ṱhoho ya kwama fhasi." 
Genesis48:13 Josefa a vha fara nga tshanḓa vhuvhili havho, Efraimi a mu fara nga tshanḓa tshauḽa uri a vhe thungo ya tshamonde tsha Israele, Manase a mu fara nga tshanḓa tshawe tshamonde uri a vhe thungo ya tshauḽa tsha Israele, a vha ḓisa tsini hawe." 
Genesis48:14 Huno Israele a onyolosa tshanḓa tshawe tshauḽa a tshi vhea kha ṱhoho ya Efraimi, ene muṱuku, tshamonde a tshi vhea kha ṱhoho ya Manase, a fhambanya zwanḓa zwawe – Manase o vha e mukomana." 
Genesis48:15 Ndi hone a tshi shudufhadza Josefa a ri, “Ngavhe Mudzimu we a shumelwa nga vhokhotsi anga Abrahamu na Isaka a tshi shudufhadza vhatukana havha! Mudzimu we a ḓi vha mulisa wanga tshee nda bebwa u swika ṋamusi ngavhe a tshi vha shudufhadza!" 
Genesis48:16 Ngavhe muruṅwa we a nndamukisa khomboni dzoṱhe a tshi vha shudufhadza! Ngavhe vha tshi vhidzwa nga dzina ḽanga na nga madzina a vhokhotsi anga Abrahamu na Isaka. Ngavhe vha tshi anda fhano fhasi vha tou vha mavhuthu!” 
Genesis48:17 Josefa a vhona uri khotsi awe vha khou vhea tshanḓa tshavho tshauḽa ṱhohoni ya Efraimi, zwa mu dina. A dzhia tshanḓa tsha khotsi awe a linga u tshi sudzulusa ṱhohoni ya Efraimi uri a tshi vhee ṱhohoni ya Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefa a hanedza khotsi awe a ri, “Vha songo ita nga u ralo, baba! Mukomana ndi hoyu: kha vha vhee tshanḓa tshavho tshauḽa ṱhohoni yawe.”" 
Genesis48:19 Hone khotsi awe vha hana vha ri, “Ndi a zwi ḓivha ṅwananga, ndi a zwi ḓivha. Na ene u ḓo beba lushaka; na ene u ḓo vha muhulwane. Nangwe zwo ralo murathu wawe u ḓo mu fhira, vhawe vhaḓuhulu vha ḓo vha magogo a dzitshakha.”" 
Genesis48:20 Musi wonoyo a mbo ḓi vha shudufhadza a ri, “Ngavhe Vhaisraele vha tshi shudufhadzana nga madzina aṋu, vha ri, ‘Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi u ita unga Efraimi na Manase!’ ” Ngauralo Jakopo o rangisa Efraimi phanḓa ha Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ndi hone Israele a tshi vhudza Josefa a ri, “Zwino ndi tsini na u fa, hone Mudzimu u ḓo vha na inwi, u ḓo ni vhuedzedza shangoni ḽa vhokhotsi aṋu." 
Genesis48:22 A vha nṋe, ndi u ṋea Shikheme, shango ḽi no fhira ḽa vhakomana vhau, ḽiḽa ḽe nda ḽi dzhiela Vhaamori nga pfumo ḽanga na vhura hanga.”" 
Genesis49:1 Jakopo o vhidza vhana vhawe a ri, “Kuvhanganani ndi ni vhudze zwi no ḓo itea kha inwi misi i ḓaho:" 
Genesis49:2 “Inwi vhana vha Jakopo, kuvhanganani ni thetshelese; thetshelesani khotsi aṋu Israele." 
Genesis49:3 “Iwe Rubeni u tanzhe ḽanga, u nungo dzanga, u mutshelo wa u ranga wa musi ndi tshi vha munna; u vhugala ha u ranga, u maanḓa a u ranga;" 
Genesis49:4 a u nga vhi wa u ranga, u nga muḓalo wa maḓi a sa langei; wo gonya vhulaloni ha khotsi au, wa vhu shata mashika; hoyu o gonya vhulaloni hanga." 
Genesis49:5 “Simioni na Livi ndi mukomana na murathu; mafumo avho ndi zwihali zwi huvhadzaho. 
Genesis49:6 A thi nga ḓidzhenisi kha zwa vhukwila havho, a thi nga konani navho. Vho sinyuwa vha vhulaha vhathu, vho holefhadza dzimboho nga khole." 
Genesis49:7 Nga hu teketelwe mbiti dzavho, ndi dza tshiṱuhu; u sinyuwa havho hu a ofhisa. Ndi ḓo vha thalanganya vhukati ha vhana vha Jakopo, ndi ḓo vha balanganya vhukati ha Vhaisraele." 
Genesis49:8 “Iwe Juda, vhana vha khotsi au vha ḓo u khoḓa. U ḓo vhusa maswina au, vhana vha khotsi au vha ḓo u gwadamela." 
Genesis49:9 Juda ndi ndawana; ṅwananga, u ḓo bva wa yo ponda, wa vhuya; u ḓo nga ndau i tshi tumba ya shuvhama, kana ndawana: ndi nnyi ane a nga i ṱunga?" 
Genesis49:10 Luḓo lwa vhuhosi lu ḓo dzula lu tshanḓani tsha Juda, mbaḓa ya muvhusi i ḓo dzula i phanḓa hawe, ha vhuya ha swika ane zwa vha zwawe; onoyo dzitshakha dzi ḓo mu luvha." 
Genesis49:11 Minḓirivhe ya Juda i ḓo ḓala lune na donngi dzawe dza si i fhedze; u ḓo vhofhelela donngi yawe na munḓirivhe, ya tsadzi a i vhofhelela na davhi ḽawo ḽo nakesaho. U kuvha nguvho yawe nga waini yo tswukaho unga malofha;" 
Genesis49:12 maṱo awe o tou tswukuluwa nga waini, maṋo awe o tou tshena nga mukhaha." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebuloni u ḓo dzula khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe, ha vha vhuimazwikepe; u ḓo ṋekana masakha na Sidoni." 
Genesis49:14 “Isakhara ndi donngi ya nungo i no lala vhukati ha maputo mavhili. 
Genesis49:15 A tshi vhona vhuawelo hawe vhu havhuḓi, shango ḽawe ḽi tshi takadza, a kotama a hweswa muhwalo, a shumiswa unga phuli." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani u ḓo lwela vhathu vhawe, vhunga na ene e ḽiṅwe ḽa matsinde a Israele." 
Genesis49:17 Ngavhe Dani a tshi nga mbeḓa i re gondoni, a nga vuluvulu ḽi re nḓilani, ḽine ḽa luma bere tshirethe, munameli wayo a wa nga tshitiko." 
Genesis49:18 “Muṋe washu, ndo lavhelela u tshidzwa nga Iwe." 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi u ḓo zhongondedzwa nga tshigwada tsha mavemu, ene a lwa navho a vha ṱangula." 
Genesis49:20 “Ashere u ḓo ḽa mapfura, u ḓo bveledza zwiḽiwa zwo teaho khosi." 
Genesis49:21 “Nafuthali ndi phala i no tshimbila hune ya funa, i no dzwala phalana dza u naka." 
Genesis49:22 “Josefa ndi muri u aṋwaho mitshelo, u re tsini ha tshisima, une matavhi awo a adza a tiba luvhondo." 
Genesis49:23 Vho faraho vhura vho rambana, vha mu vutshela vha mu posa nga misevhe." 
Genesis49:24 Hone vha tshi posa vhura havho ha kundwa, zwanḓa zwavho zwa sokou oma nga Ramaanḓa wa Jakopo, nga dzina ḽa Mulisa wa Israele, Ene Bako ḽavho," 
Genesis49:25 nga Mudzimu wa khotsi au ane a u tika, nga Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe ane a u shudufhadza. O u shudufhadza nga mashudu a bvaho ṱaḓulu makoleni, mashudu a zwisima zwihulu zwi re fhasi, mashudu a mikando na mbebo." 
Genesis49:26 Mashudu a khotsi au a fhira mashudu a thavha dza kale, na zwi takadzaho zwa zwivhanga zwa lini na lini. Ngavhe a tshi tsela kha ṱhoho ya Josefa, kha phanḓa ya we a khethwa kha vhakomana vhawe." 
Genesis49:27 “Benyamini ndi ḓalerwa ḽa vhuhali; nga matsheloni ḽi mila tshe ḽa ponda, nga madekwana ḽi kovhekanya zwe ya thuba.”" 
Genesis49:28 Vhoṱhe havho vha vhumba matsinde a Israele a 12. Hezwo ndi zwe khotsi avho a vha vhudza. O vha shudufhadza, a ṋea muṅwe na muṅwe mashudu o mu teaho." 
Genesis49:29 Ndi hone Jakopo a tshi laya vhana vhawe a ri, “Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi oroswa ha vha hashu. Ni ntswiṱe na vhokhotsi anga, bakoni ḽi re tsimuni ya Efroni wa Muhithi," 
Genesis49:30 bakoni ḽi re tsimuni ya ngei Makhaphela, tsini na Mamuri, shangoni ḽa Kanana. Tsimu iyo yo rengwa nga Abrahamu kha Efroni wa Muhithi uri i vhe zwalo zwawe." 
Genesis49:31 Henefho ho swiṱwa Abrahamu na musadzi wawe Sara; henefho ho swiṱwa Isaka na musadzi wawe Rabeka; ndi hone he nda swiṱa Lea. 
Genesis49:32 Ndi amba tsimu na bako ḽi re ngomu hayo zwe zwa rengwa kha vhana vha Hethe.” 
Genesis49:33 Musi Jakopo o no fhedza u laya vhana vhawe, a humisela milenzhe yawe vhulaloni hawe, a mbo welela, a oroswa ha vha hawe." 
Genesis50:1 Zwa ri u itea, Josefa a ḓiposa nṱha ha khotsi awe, miṱodzi yawe ya tou tevhuwa, a vha khisa." 
Genesis50:2 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi vhudza vhalanda vhawe vha dziṅanga uri vha ḓodze tshitumbu tsha khotsi awe mishonga, tshi si sine. Dziṅanga dza ḓodza tshitumbu tsha Israele mishonga uri tshi si sine," 
Genesis50:3 vha fhedza maḓuvha a 40 vha tshi khou ita uyo mushumo, ngauri zwi ita maḓuvha a 40 u ḓodza tshitumbu mishonga uri tshi si sine. Vhaegipita vha mu lila maḓuvha a 70." 
Genesis50:4 Musi tshifhinga tsha u mu lila tsho no fhela, Josefa a vhudza vha muṱa wa Farao a ri, “Arali ni tshi ntakalela, swikisani mafhungo haya ha Farao, ni ri," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Khotsi anga vho nnyanisa vha ri: Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi fa; ndi na tshalo tshe nda ḓibwela tshone shangoni ḽa Kanana, u ntswiṱe henefho. Zwino-ha, ndi khou humbela thendelo uri ndi gonye henengei ndi yo swiṱa khotsi anga, ndi ḓo konou vhuya.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao a fhindula a ri, “Iyani ni yo swiṱa khotsi aṋu ni tshi tevhedza muano we vha ni anisa.”" 
Genesis50:7 Josefa a yo swiṱa khotsi awe, vhashumi vhoṱhe vha Farao vhaḓivhalea vha pfamo vha ṱuwa nae, na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha shango ḽa Egipita," 
Genesis50:8 na muṱa wa Josefa na vhakomana vhawe na muṱa wa khotsi awe. A ho ngo sala muthu shangoni ḽa Gosheni, ho tou sala vhana vhavho fhedzi, vha sala na masambi avho a nngu na kholomo dzavho." 
Genesis50:9 Vha fhelekedzwa nga dzigariki na vhanameli vha dzibere. Ḽo vha ḽi gogo ḽihulu. 
Genesis50:10 Musi vha tshi swika luvhanḓeni lwa u fhulela lwa Atadi vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, vha vusa tshililo tshihulu, zwa ita maḓuvha, Josefa a lila khotsi awe maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
Genesis50:11 Musi Vhakanana, vhadzulapo vha shango ḽeneḽo vha tshi vhona hu tshi itwa tshililo itsho luvhanḓeni lwa u fhulela lwa Atadi, vha ri, “Hetsho ndi tshililo tsha Egipita.” Ndi zwe vha ri fhethu afho hu pfi Abele Mitsiraimi (Tshililo tsha Vhaegipita)." 
Genesis50:12 Vhana vha Jakopo vha mu itela zwe a vha laya uri vha mu itele," 
Genesis50:13 vha mu hwala vha mu isa shangoni ḽa Kanana, vha mu swiṱa bakoni tsimuni ya Makhaphela, tsini ha Mamuri, tsimuni ye Abrahamu a i renga kha Efroni wa Muhithi uri i vhe fhethu ha zwalo zwawe." 
Genesis50:14 Musi vho no swiṱa Jakopo, Josefa a humela Egipita, ene na vhakomana vhawe, khathihi na vhoṱhe vhe vha ḓa nae vha tshi ḓa u swiṱa khotsi awe." 
Genesis50:15 Vhakomana vha Josefa vha tshi vhona uri khotsi avho vho no fa vha ri, “Zwino arali Josefa a ri u a ri lifhedza vhuvhi hoṱhe he ra vhu ita hu ḓo itea mini?”" 
Genesis50:16 Ndi hone vha tshi ruma muḓinḓa a ya ha Josefa a swikisa mafhungo a no ri, “Khotsi avho vha sa athu fa vho ri laya vha ri," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Ni vhudze Josefa ni ri: Yawee, hangwelani vhakomana vhaṋu vhutshinyi na vhuvhi havho na zwoṱhe zwe vha ni ita. Zwino-ha, ri a vha humbela, nga vha ri hangwele vhutshinyi riṋe vhalanda vha Mudzimu wa khotsi avho.’ ” Josefa a tshi pfa mafhungo e vha a swikisa khae a lila." 
Genesis50:18 Ha ḓa vhakomana vhawe vhone vhaṋe vha ḓa vha gwadama phanḓa hawe, vha ri, “Ro ḓa ha vhone, ri phuli dzavho.”" 
Genesis50:19 Hone Josefa a vha fhindula a ri, “Ni songo ofha tshithu; nṋe ndi nga ḓivhea vhuimoni ha Mudzimu naa?" 
Genesis50:20 Vhunwa he na nndukela hone, Mudzimu o vhu shandula ha vha zwivhuya nga he a dzudzanya, uri a khunyeledze zwine zwa khou itea zwino, ha tshidzwa vhathu vhanzhi." 
Genesis50:21 Zwenezwo ni songo ofha tshithu; a vha nṋe ndi ḓo ni londola na vhana vhaṋu.” Ngauralo a vha rudza mbilu a amba navho nga vhulenda. 
Genesis50:22 Huno Josefa a dzula Egipita na muṱa wa khotsi awe. Josefa o tshila miṅwaha ya 110. 
Genesis50:23 O vhona vhaḓuhulu vha Efraimi, na vhana vha Makhiri, ṅwana wa Manase, vho ri u bebwa a vha takula marumbini awe ha vha u vha ita vhana vhawe." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa a vhudza vhakomana vhawe a ri, “Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi fa. Hone vhukuma Mudzimu u ḓo ni elelwa a ni itela vhuthu, a ni bvisa shangoni heḽino, a ni isa shangoni ḽe a fulufhedzisa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo nga muano.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefa a tou anisa vhana vha Israele a ri, “Musi Mudzimu a tshi ni elelwa a ni ita nga vhuthu, vhukuma ni hwale marambo anga ni ṱuwe nao.”" 
Genesis50:26 Josefa a fa e na miṅwaha ya 110. Vho mu ḓodza mishonga uri tshitumbu tshawe tshi si sine, vha mu ladza bogisini ḽawe ḽa mufu henefho Egipita." 
Exodus1:1 Ngea madzina a vhana vha Israele vha vhatuka vhe vha ya Egipita na Jakopo, muṅwe na muṅwe na muṱa wawe." 
Exodus1:2 Ndi Rubeni na Simioni na Livi na Juda," 
Exodus1:3 na Isakhara na Zebuloni na Benyamini," 
Exodus1:4 na Dani na Nafuthali na Gadi na Ashere. 
Exodus1:5 Vha lutsinga lwa Jakopo vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe vhathu vha 70. Josefa ene o vha o no ḓi vha Egipita. 
Exodus1:6 Huno ngavhuya Josefa a fa; na vhana vha khotsi awe vha vhatuka, na vhoṱhe vha murafho wonoyo, vha fa." 
Exodus1:7 Hone vhaḓuhulu vha Israele vha vha na vhana vha anda vha tshi ya vha ḓadza shango. 
Exodus1:8 Huno kha ḽa Egipita ha thoma u vhusa khosi ntswa ye ya vha i sa ḓivhi tshithu nga Josefa. 
Exodus1:9 Iyo khosi ya vhudza vhalanda vhayo ya ri, “Vhonani, avha vhathu vha Vhaisraele vho no andesa, vha na maanḓa, vha vho ri fhira." 
Exodus1:10 Kha ri vha lukele tshimbevha uri vha si tsha dovha vha andesa, vha sa ḓo ri hu tshi vuwa nndwa vha ima na maswina ashu, vha lwa na riṋe vha ponyoka vha shavha fhano shangoni ḽino.”" 
Exodus1:11 Zwenezwo vha vhea vhalangaphuli uri vha lange Vhaisraele vha vha kandeledze nga mishumo i lemelaho. Ndi zwe vha fhaṱela Farao miḓi ya maḓulu ya Phithomu na Ramisese. 
Exodus1:12 Hone Vhaegipita vha tshi ḓi ṋaṋa u vha kandeledza, vhone vha ḓi ṋaṋa u anda vha ḓadza shango, Vhaegipita vha thoma u ofha Vhaisraele," 
Exodus1:13 vha vha farisa tsha u konḓa," 
Exodus1:14 vha vha konḓisela vhutshilo nga u vha shumisa mishumo i konḓaho ya vumba na zwidina na mishumo yoṱhe ya masimuni; vha vha lemedza kha mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe. 
Exodus1:15 Ndi hone khosi ya Egipita i tshi amba na vhadzadzefhadzi vha Vhaheberu. Muṅwe o vha a tshi pfi Shifira muṅwe a tshi pfi Phua. 
Exodus1:16 A vha vhudza a ri, “Musi ni tshi dzadzefhadza vhasadzi vha Vhaheberu ni sedze uri ho bebwa mbeu-ḓe. Arali ha bebiwa mutukana, ni mu vhulahe, arali ha bebiwa musidzana ni mu litshe a tshile.”" 
Exodus1:17 Hone vhadzadzefhadzi vho vha vha tshi ofha Mudzimu, vha nyadza ndaela ya khosi ya Egipita, vha litsha vhatukana vha tshila." 
Exodus1:18 Ndi hone khosi ya Egipita i tshi vhidzisa vhadzadzefhadzi, ya vha vhudzisa ya ri, “No itelani ni tshi litsha vhatukana vha tshila?”" 
Exodus1:19 Vhone vha fhindula Farao vha ri, “Vhasadzi vha Vhaheberu a vha ngi vhasadzi vha Vhaegipita, vha na nungo; vha ṱavhanya u vhofholowa mudzadzefhadzi a sa athu swika khavho.”" 
Exodus1:20 Avho vhadzadzefhadzi Mudzimu a vha tonda. Vhathu vhone vha ḓi anda vha tshi ya, vha vha na maanḓa mahulu." 
Exodus1:21 Vhunga vhadzadzefhadzi vho vha vha tshi ofha Mudzimu, Ene a vha ṋea miṱa yavho." 
Exodus1:22 Ndi hone Farao a tshi laya vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe a ri, “Vhatukana vhoṱhe vhane vha bebiwa nga Vhaheberu ni vha pose mulamboni, hone vhasidzana ni vha litshe vha tshile.”" 
Exodus2:1 Ho vha hu na munna wa tsinde ḽa Livi we a vha o dzea musadzi wa Mulivi. 
Exodus2:2 Musadzi a vhifha muvhilini a beba ṅwana wa mutukana. Nga u vhona lunako lwa uyo ṅwana, a mu dzumba miṅwedzi miraru." 
Exodus2:3 Musi a si tsha kona u mu dzumba, a mu wanela tshirundu tsha ṱhanga, a tshi fhoma nga tshigonṱiri, a longa uyo ṅwana ngomu hatsho, a tshi vhea vhukati ha ṱhanga lumemeni lwa mulambo." 
Exodus2:4 Khaladzi a ṅwana a ima kule u vhona tshine tsha nga itea khae. 
Exodus2:5 Huno ṅwananyana wa Farao a tsela mulamboni u yo ṱamba, vhananyana vhane vha mu shumela vhone vha tshi khou tshimbila khunzikhunzini ya mulambo. A vhona tshirundu vhukati ha ṱhanga, a ruma mushumi wawe wa musidzana uri a yo tshi dzhia." 
Exodus2:6 Ene muṋe a vula a sedza, a vhona ṅwana wa mutukana a tshi khou lila; a mu pfela vhuṱungu. A ri, “Hoyu ndi ṅwana wa muṅwe wa Vhaheberu.”" 
Exodus2:7 Ndi hone khaladzi a uyo ṅwana a tshi vhudzisa ṅwananyana wa Farao a ri, “Ndi yo vha ṱoḓela muleli kha vhasadzi vha Vhaheberu ane a ḓo vha mamisela uyu ṅwana naa?”" 
Exodus2:8 Ṅwananyana wa Farao a mu fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, tshimbilani!” Musidzana uyo a ya a vhuya na mme a ṅwana vhukuma." 
Exodus2:9 Ṅwananyana wa Farao a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha ṱuwe na ṅwana hoyu vha mmamisele ene a vhuye a thanye. Nṋe ndi ḓo vha pfufha.” Ndi hone uyo musadzi a tshi dzhia uyo ṅwana a yo mu lela." 
Exodus2:10 Musi uyo ṅwana o no thanya, a mu isa ha ṅwananyana wa Farao, a vha ṅwana wawe. A ri u pfi Mushe nge a ri, “Ndo mu ṋula maḓini.”" 
Exodus2:11 Musi Mushe o no vha munna, a tshimbila a tshi dalela vhathu vha hawe, a vhona vha tshi konḓiselwa vhutshilo, zwa mu ḽisa mbilu. A vhona Muegipita a tshi khou rwa Muheberu wa hawe." 
Exodus2:12 A livha-livha a vhona hu si na muthu, a mbo ḓi vhulaha Muegipita a mu dzumba muṱavhani." 
Exodus2:13 Nga matshelo a vhuya, a wana Vhaheberu vhavhili vha tshi khou lwa. A vhudzisa o levhaho a ri, “Ni rwelani wa haṋu?”" 
Exodus2:14 Uyo munna a fhindula a ri, “No vhewa nga nnyi uri ni vhe muvhusi na muhaṱuli washu? Kani ni ṱoḓa u mmbulaha-vho unga uḽa Muegipita?” Mushe a farwa nga nyofho. A elekanya a ri, “Vhukumakuma zwe nda ita zwi vho ḓivhiwa.”" 
Exodus2:15 Musi Farao a tshi pfa mafhungo ayo a linga uri Mushe a vhulawe, hone Mushe a shavha Farao a livha shangoni ḽa Midiani. A swika a dzula fhasi tsini ha iṅwe bidzi." 
Exodus2:16 Huno tshifhe wa Midiani o vha e na vhananyana vhaṱanu na vhavhili. Vha ḓa u ka maḓi uri vha ḓadze mikungwa nngu dza khotsi avho dzi nwe. 
Exodus2:17 Ha swika vhalisa vha vha thatha, hone Mushe a vha lamulela a nwisa nngu dzavho." 
Exodus2:18 Musi vha tshi humela ha khotsi avho Reuele, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Khezwi ṋamusi no ṱavhanya u vhuya?”" 
Exodus2:19 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Muṅwe Muegipita o ri lamulela kha vhalisa, a ita na u ri kela maḓi a nwisa sambi ḽa nngu.”" 
Exodus2:20 A vhudzisa vhananyana vhawe a ri, “Zwino u ngafhi? No mu sielani henengei? Iyani ni mu vhidze a ḓe a ḽe na riṋe.”" 
Exodus2:21 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vho tenda u dzula na uyo munna, Reuele a mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Tsiphora a vha musadzi wawe." 
Exodus2:22 Tsiphora a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, Mushe a ri u pfi Gerisoni (Ndi mueni), nge a ri, “Ndi mutsinda shangoni ḽisili.”" 
Exodus2:23 Hó no fhela miṅwaha minzhi, khosi ya Egipita ya fa. Vhaisraele vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi gomela vhupulini, vha ṱavha mukosi uri Mudzimu a vha farise. Tshililo tshavho tsha swika ha Mudzimu." 
Exodus2:24 Mudzimu a pfa u gomela havho, a humbula mulanga wawe we a vhofha na Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo." 
Exodus2:25 Mudzimu a sedza u tambula ha Vhaisraele, zwa mu dina." 
Exodus3:1 Mushe o vha a tshi khou lisa sambi ḽa nngu dza Jethero makhulu wawe, tshifhe wa Midiani. O khada sambi ḽawe ḽa nngu a buḓekanya phanga, a swika Horebe, thavhani ya Mudzimu." 
Exodus3:2 Henefho Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza ene nga tshivhumbeo tsha khavhu ya mulilo, a tshi khou duga ngomu ha tshiṱaka. Mushe a sedza, a vhona tshiṱaka tshi no khou duga, hone tshi sa swi." 
Exodus3:3 Mushe a ri, “Kha ndi sendele ndi sedze bono heḽi ḽi kanukisaho, ndi vhone uri ndi mini tshiṱaka tshi sa swi.”" 
Exodus3:4 Zwino Muṋe washu a mu vhona a tshi sendela uri a sedze, Mudzimu a mu vhidzelela e vhukati ha tshiṱaka a ri, “Mushe, Mushe!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano!”" 
Exodus3:5 Mudzimu a ri, “U songo sendela tsini. Bvula navhula dzau, fhethu he wa ima hone ndi mavu makhethwa." 
Exodus3:6 Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi au, Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa Isaka, Mudzimu wa Jakopo.” Mushe a tshi pfa zwenezwo a khurumela, ngauri o vha a tshi ofha u sedza Mudzimu." 
Exodus3:7 Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhukuma ndo vhona u tambudzwa ha vhathu vhanga ngei Egipita. Ndo pfa tshililo tshavho vha tshi ṱavha mukosi nga mulandu wa vhashumisi vhavho. Vhukuma ndi ḓivha u tambula havho." 
Exodus3:8 Ndo tsa uri ndi vha lamulele zwanḓani zwa Vhaegipita, ndi vha pfuluse shangoni ḽeneḽo ndi vha ise shangoni ḽa manona ḽo aṱamaho, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi, haya ha Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Zwino tshililo tsha Vhaisraele tsho swika ha Nṋe, ndo vhona uri Vhaegipita vha vha kandeledza hani." 
Exodus3:10 Zwenezwo iḓa, ndi u ruma ha Farao u yo pfulusa Vhaisraele vhathu vhanga shangoni ḽa Egipita.”" 
Exodus3:11 Mushe a vhudzisa Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi nṋe nnyi ane nda nga ya ha Farao nda pfulusa Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa Egipita?”" 
Exodus3:12 Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi ḓo vha na iwe, tshiga tshine wa ḓo ḓivha ngatsho uri ndi Nṋe ndo u rumaho ngetshi: u ḓo ri wo no pfulusa vhathu Egipita, na ṋekedza Mudzimu nduvho thavhani heino.”" 
Exodus3:13 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhudzisa Mudzimu a ri, “Zwino ndi ḓo takuwa nda ya ha Vhaisraele nda vha vhudza nda ri, ‘Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu o nthuma ha inwi.’ Huno arali vha mmbudzisa vha ri u pfi nnyi, ndi ḓo vha fhindula mini?”" 
Exodus3:14 Mudzimu a fhindula Mushe a ri, “Ndi ane nda vha Ene.” A dovha a ri, “U vhudze Vhaisraele u ri, ‘ arehone ndi Ene o nthumaho ha inwi.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Mudzimu a dovha a vhudza Mushe a ri, “U vhudze Vhaisraele u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu, Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa Isaka, Mudzimu wa Jakopo, o nthuma ha inwi.’ Heḽi ndi ḽone dzina ḽanga misi yoṱhe; mirafho yoṱhe i ḓaho yo fanela u nthabela ngaḽo.”" 
Exodus3:16 Mudzimu a tshi isa phanḓa a ri, “Iyo kuvhanganya vhahulwane vha Israele u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu o ḓisumbedza nṋe, Ene Mudzimu wa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo. O mmbudza a ri: Vhukuma ndo ni sedza nda vhona zwoṱhe zwine Vhaegipita vha ni ita." 
Exodus3:17 Zwino-ha, ndo elekanya u ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita hune na khou kandeledzwa, nda ni isa shangoni ḽa Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi.’" 
Exodus3:18 Vha ḓo thetshelesa maipfi au. U ṱuwe na vhahulwane vha Israele ni ye ha khosi ya Egipita ni mu vhudze ni ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu o ḓa u ṱangana na riṋe. Zwino nga vha ri tendele ri fare lwendo lwa maḓuvha mararu ri ye phangani ri yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu washu zwiṱhavhelo.’" 
Exodus3:19 A vha Nṋe ndi a ḓivha uri khosi ya Egipita a nga si ni tendele ni tshi ṱuwa arali a sa tou kombetshedzwa. 
Exodus3:20 Ndi ḓo sumbedza maanḓa anga, nda lifhedza Egipita nga zwimangadzo zwoṱhe zwine nda ḓo zwi shuma henengei. Ndi hone Farao a tshi ḓo konou ni litsha na ṱuwa." 
Exodus3:21 “Ndi ḓo ita uri Vhaegipita vha tonde vhathu havho uri musi ni tshi pfuluwa, ni si ṱuwe ni si na tshe na fara." 
Exodus3:22 Musadzi muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo humbela muhura wawe na musadzi ane a dzula nḓuni yawe, a humbela vhulungu na siliva na musuku na zwiambaro. Izwo ni zwi ambadze vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vhasidzana, u ralo hu ḓo vha u ṱangula Vhaegipita.”" 
Exodus4:1 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi fhindula a ri, “Zwino arali vha sa tenda kana vha si thetshelese maipfi ane nda vha vhudza, vha ri, ‘Yahavee ho ngo ḓisumbedza iwe’?”" 
Exodus4:2 Muṋe washu a mu fhindula a vhudzisa a ri, “Wo fara mini?” Mushe a ri, “Wo fara mini?” Mushe a ri, “Ndi mbaḓa.”" 
Exodus4:3 Muṋe washu a ri, “I pose fhasi.” Ndi hone Mushe a tshi i posa fhasi, ya shanduka ya vha ṋowa, ene a i shavha." 
Exodus4:4 Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri, “I fare nga mutshila.” Ene a i fara, iyo ṋowa ya ri i tshanḓani tshawe ya shanduka ya vha mbaḓa." 
Exodus4:5 Muṋe washu a ri, “Ita zwenezwo uri vha tende uri Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa Isaka, Mudzimu wa Jakopo, vhukuma o ḓisumbedza iwe.”" 
Exodus4:6 Muṋe washu a dovha a amba na Mushe a ri, “Longa tshanḓa tshau gopwani.” Mushe a longa tshanḓa tshawe gopwani ḽawe. Musi a tshi tshi bvisa, tshanḓa tshawe tsha bva tshi na zwilonda, tsho tshena unga gabugu." 
Exodus4:7 Muṋe washu a ri, “Dovha u longe tshanḓa tshau gopwani.” Mushe a vhuedzedza tshanḓa tshawe gopwani. Musi a tshi tshi bvisa, tsha bva tsho fhola tshi tshi fana na muvhili wawe woṱhe." 
Exodus4:8 Muṋe washu a ri, “Arali vha sa u fulufhela, vha sa tenda vha tshi vhona tshiga tsha u thoma, hetsho tshiga tsha vhuvhili tshi ḓo ita uri vha tende." 
Exodus4:9 Hone arali vha sa tendi vha tshi vhona zwiga hezwo zwivhili, vha si thetshelese zwine wa amba, u ke maḓi mulamboni wa Nile u a shele fhasi, ayo maḓi e wa a ka mulamboni a ḓo shanduka a vha malofha henefho fhasi.”" 
Exodus4:10 Mushe a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Aiwa nandi Muṋe wanga, nṋe a thi athu vhuya nda vha muthu ane a kona u amba zwavhuḓi, zwiḽa u sa athu amba na nṋe, na tshee wa thoma u amba na nṋe. Ndi tshi amba ndi a ongolowa, ndi thoma u ṱoḓa maipfi.”" 
Exodus4:11 Muṋe washu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “We a ṋea muthu mulomo wawe ndi nnyi? Ndi nnyi ane a mu ita uri a vhe tshimuma kana dzinganḓevhe, a mu ita uri a kone u vhona kana a mu litsha e bofu? A si Nṋe Yahavee naa?" 
Exodus4:12 Zwino tshimbila, ndi ḓo u farisa uri u kone u amba, nda u vhudza zwine wa fanela u zwi amba.”" 
Exodus4:13 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa nandi Muṋe wanga, a u rumi muṅwe naa!”" 
Exodus4:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi sinyutshela Mushe, a mu fhindula a ri, “Hu na mukomana wau Aroni wa Mulivi, haho? Ndi a ḓivha uri ene u kona u amba zwavhuḓi. Nazwino u nḓilani u khou ḓa u u ṱanganedza. Musi a tshi u vhona mbilu yawe i ḓo takala." 
Exodus4:15 U ḓo amba nae wa mu vhudza malaedzwa ane a fanela u a swikisa. Nṋe ndi ḓo ni farisa vhuvhili haṋu na kona u amba, nda ni laya zwine na fanela u ita." 
Exodus4:16 Aroni u ḓo amba na vhathu a tshi ambela iwe; u ḓo vha ene mulomo wau, iwe wa nga mudzimu ane a mu hevhedza." 
Exodus4:17 Ṱuwa wo fara mbaḓa heyo, u ḓo ita ngayo maḓembe.”" 
Exodus4:18 Mushe a ṱuwa a vhuelela ha makhulu wawe Jethero, a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha ntendele ndi humele ha mashaka anga ngei Egipita ndi yo vhona arali vha tshi kha ḓi tshila.” Jethero a fhindula a ri, “Tshimbilani nga mulalo.”" 
Exodus4:19 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe e Midiani a ri, “Ṱuwa, humela Egipita ngauri vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓa u u vhulaha vho fa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi dzhia musadzi wawe na ṅwana wawe wa mutuka, a vha namedza donngi, a fara lwendo lwa u humela shangoni ḽa Egipita; a ṱuwa o fara mbaḓa ya Mudzimu." 
Exodus4:21 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Zwino vhunga u tshi khou humela Egipita, ḓilugisele u itela Farao zwimangadzo zwoṱhe zwe nda u ṋea maanḓa a uri u zwi ite. A vha Nṋe ndi ḓo konḓisa mbilu yawe, ha nga litshi vhathu vha ṱuwa." 
Exodus4:22 Zwenezwo u vhudze Farao u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Israele ndi tanzhe ḽanga ḽa mutuka." 
Exodus4:23 Ndo u vhudza nda ri litsha ṅwana wanga a ṱuwe a yo nṋekedza nduvho. Iwe u hana a tshi ṱuwa. Ndi zwone! Nṋe ndi ḓo vhulaha tanzhe ḽau.’ ” 
Exodus4:24 Musi Mushe e lwendoni, o lala nḓilani vhusiku, Muṋe washu a ḓa a ṱangana nae, a nga u a mu vhulaha." 
Exodus4:25 Tsiphora a mbo doba tombo ḽa vhuhali, a fumbisa ṅwana wawe wa mutukana, a dzhia ulwo lukanda a lu kwamisa vhudzimu ha Mushe. Tsiphora a ri, “Vhukuma vhone vha munna wanga wa malofha!”" 
Exodus4:26 O ri, “Munna wanga wa malofha,” a tshi amba u fumba. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi litsha Mushe a tshila." 
Exodus4:27 Muṋe washu a amba na Aroni a ri, “Ṱuwa u ye phangani u yo ṱanganedza Mushe.” Ndi hone Aroni a tshi ṱuwa a yo ṱanganedza Mushe thavhani ya Mudzimu, a mu kuvhatedza." 
Exodus4:28 Zwenezwo Mushe a vhudza Aroni zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a amba musi a tshi mu ṋea mushumo wawe na zwiga zwoṱhe zwe a ri a zwi ite. 
Exodus4:29 Ndi hone Mushe na Aroni vha tshi ṱuwa vha yo kuvhanganya vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Vhaisraele. 
Exodus4:30 Aroni a vha anetshela zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe, Mushe a ita zwiga vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Exodus4:31 Vhathu vha zwi tenda, vha pembela nge Muṋe washu a londa Vhaisraele, a vhona u tambula havho; vha gwadama vha luvha." 
Exodus5:1 Ngavhuya Mushe na Aroni vha ṱuwa vha ya ha Farao vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele o ri, ‘Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha ye phangani vha yo ita vhuṱambo ha u nnduvha.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Farao a fhindula a ri, “Yahavee ndi nnyi, ane nda fanela u mu thetshelesa nda litsha Vhaisraele vha ṱuwa? Yahavee a thi mu ḓivhi nahone a thi nga litshi Vhaisraele vha ṱuwa.”" 
Exodus5:3 Vha fhindula vha ri, “Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu o ḓa u ṱangana na riṋe. Nga vha ri tendele-ha ri fare lwendo lwa maḓuvha mararu ri ye sogani ri yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu washu tshiṱhavhelo, a sa ḓo ri ḓisela dwadze kana a ri fhedza nga pfumo.”" 
Exodus5:4 Khosi ya Egipita ya vha vhudza ya ri, “Mushe na Aroni, khezwi ni tshi ṱoḓa u litshisa vhathu mushumo wavho? Humelani mushumoni waṋu.”" 
Exodus5:5 Farao a dovha a ri, “Vhathu avha vho no andesa, zwino ni vho ṱoḓa u vha litshisa na mushumo?”" 
Exodus5:6 Musi wonoyo Farao a laya vhalangi vha dziphuli vha Vhaegipita na vhalavhelesi vha Vhaisraele a ri," 
Exodus5:7 “U swika zwino no vha ni tshi ṋea vhathu havha maṱanga a u foroma zwidina. Ni songo tsha vha ṋea maṱanga, vha litsheni vha yo kuvhanganya maṱanga vhone vhaṋe." 
Exodus5:8 Naho zwo ralo ni vhone uri tshivhalo tsha zwidina tshi ḓi vha tshenetshiḽa, ni songo vhuya na fhungudza. Vha a bvafha, ndi zwine tshililo tshavho tsha ri, ‘Ri litsheni ri yo ṋekedza Mudzimu washu tshiṱhavhelo.’" 
Exodus5:9 Vhanna havha vha shumiseni lwa u tou kalula, uri vha si wane tshifhinga tsha u thetshelesa mazwifhi.”" 
Exodus5:10 Vhalangaphuli vha Vhaegipita na vhalavhelesi vha Vhaisraele vha bva vha yo amba na Vhaisraele vha ri, “Farao o amba a ri, ‘A thi nga ni ṋei maṱanga." 
Exodus5:11 Ibvani ni yo kuvhanganya maṱanga inwi vhaṋe hune na nga a wana hone. Hone tshivhalo tsha zwidina tshi ḓi vha tshenetshiḽa.’ ” 
Exodus5:12 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi balangana na shango ḽa Egipita u yo kuvhanganya zwiguthe zwa maṱanga. 
Exodus5:13 Vhashumisi vha dziphuli vha vha kombetshedza vha ri, “Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe tshaṋu ndi u foroma zwidina zwenezwiḽa zwe na vha ni tshi foroma ni tshi kha ḓi ṋewa maṱanga.”" 
Exodus5:14 Vhashumisaphuli vha Vhaegipita vha rwa vhalavhelesi vha Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vho vha vhea uri vha lavhelese mushumo, vha ri, “Khezwi ṋamusi ni songo foroma zwidina zwi no lingana na zwiḽa zwa kale?”" 
Exodus5:15 Vhalavhelesi vha Vhaisraele vha ya ha Farao vha gungula, vha ri, “Khezwi vha tshi ri tambudza nga u rali?" 
Exodus5:16 A vha ri ṋei maṱanga, naho zwo ralo hu ḓi pfi, ‘Itani zwidina!’ Zwino ro ita na u rwiwa! Ro khakhelwa vhafuwi!”" 
Exodus5:17 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ni a bvafha, a hu na zwiṅwe, ndi zwine na ri ndi ni litshe ni ṱuwe ni yo ṋekedza Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo." 
Exodus5:18 Ni mbo ḓi humela mushumoni waṋu. A ni nga ḓo ṋewa maṱanga, hone no fanela u ḓi swikisa mbalo yeneiḽa ya zwidina.”" 
Exodus5:19 Vhalavhelesi vha Vhaisraele vho vhona zwithu zwi tshi vho vhifha musi vha tshi vhudzwa upfi a vha nga fhungudzelwi tshivhalo tsha zwidina zwine vha fanela u zwi foroma nga ḓuvha. 
Exodus5:20 Musi vha tshi ṱuwa ha Farao vha ṱangana na Mushe na Aroni vha wana vhó vha lindela. 
Exodus5:21 Vha vhudza Mushe na Aroni vha ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vhona zwe na ita a ni lifhedza nga he zwa ni fanela! No ri vhengisa nga Farao na magota awe. No vha ṋea pfumo ḽa u ri vhulaha.”" 
Exodus5:22 Mushe a dovha a rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndi mini u tshi itela vhathu avha tshiṱuhu? Ndi mini wo nthuma fhano?" 
Exodus5:23 Tshee nda swika ha Farao nda amba nae nga dzina ḽau, o thoma u tambudza lushaka ulu, hone Iwe a hu na tshe wa ita u lamulela vhathu vhau.”" 
Exodus6:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Zwino u ḓo vhona ndi tshi lifhedza Farao. Ndi ḓo mu kombetshedza u vha litsha vha ṱuwa. Vhukuma u ḓo kombetshedzea uri a vha pfuluse shangoni ḽawe.”" 
Exodus6:2 Mudzimu a amba na Mushe a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Exodus6:3 Ndo ḓisumbedza Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo ndi tshi pfi Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe. A tho ngo ḓiḓivhadza khavho nga dzina ḽanga ḽa Yahavee. 
Exodus6:4 Ndo ita na u vhofha mulanga navho nda ri ndi ḓo vha ṋea shango ḽa Kanana ḽe vha dzula khaḽo vhe vhatsinda. 
Exodus6:5 Ndo pfa tshigomelo tsha Vhaisraele vhó itwa dziphuli nga Vhaegipita, nda elelwa mulanga wanga." 
Exodus6:6 Zwino vhudza Vhaisraele u ri, ‘Ndi Nṋe Yahavee. Ndi ḓo ni rula mihwalo ye na hweswa nga Vhaegipita. Ndi ḓo ni vhofholola na si tsha vha phuli dzavho. Ndi ḓo onyolosa tshanḓa tshanga tsha maanḓa, nda vha lifhedza, nda ni lamulela." 
Exodus6:7 Ndi ḓo ni ita vhathu vhanga vhukuma, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu waṋu. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu, we a ni rula muhwalo wa Vhaegipita." 
Exodus6:8 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo ni isa shangoni ḽe nda ana nda ri ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo, nda ḽi ṋea inwi ḽa vha ḽaṋu. Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo zwi ita hezwi!’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Izwo Mushe a zwi vhudza Vhaisraele, hone vha si mu thetshelese, nge vha vha vho kulekana nungo nga u konḓa ha vhupuli." 
Exodus6:10 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri," 
Exodus6:11 “Ṱuwa u ye ha Farao khosi ya Egipita, u mu vhudze a litshe Vhaisraele vha pfuluwe shangoni ḽawe.”" 
Exodus6:12 Hone Mushe a fhindula Muṋe washu a ri, “Hufha na Vhaisraele vha songo nthetshelesa, Farao a nga nthetshelesa hani, nahone nṋe ndi muthu a sa koni u amba zwavhuḓi?”"
