Exodus6:13 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a vha vhudza uri vhuvhili havho vha ye ha Farao khosi ya Egipita, vha pfuluse Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus6:14 Vhaṋe vha miṱa ndi havha: Vhana vha Rubeni, ene tanzhe ḽa Israele, ndi Hanokho na Phalu na Esromu na Kharami. Ndi yone mitupo ya Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Simioni ndi Jemuele na Jamini na Ohadi na Jakhini na Tsohara, na Saulo ṅwana wa musadzi wa Mukanana. Ndi yone mitupo ya Simioni." 
Exodus6:16 Madzina a vhana vha vhatuka vha Livi ndi Gerisoni na Kehathi na Mirari. Livi o tshila miṅwaha ya 137. 
Exodus6:17 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Gerisoni ndi Libini na Shimei na mitupo yavho. 
Exodus6:18 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Kehathi ndi Amuramu na Izhara na Hebroni na Uziele. Uziele o tshila miṅwaha ya 133. 
Exodus6:19 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Mirari ndi Mahali na Mushi. Ndi yone mitupo ya Livi, na vhokhotsi avho." 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu o dzea Jokhobede makhadzi wawe, Jokhobede a mu bebela Aroni na Mushe. Amuramu o tshila miṅwaha ya 137." 
Exodus6:21 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Izhara vho vha vhe Kora na Nephege na Zikhiri. 
Exodus6:22 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Uziele ndi Mishaele na Elitsafani na Sithiri. 
Exodus6:23 Aroni o dzea Elisheba khaladzi ya Nahashoni ṅwana wa Aminadaba, Elisheba a mu bebela Nadaba na Abihu na Eliasara na Ithamara." 
Exodus6:24 Vhana vha vhatuka vha Kora ndi Asiri na Elikana na Abiasafu. Ndi yone mitupo ya Vhakora. 
Exodus6:25 Eliasara ṅwana wa Aroni wa mutuka o dzea muṅwe wa vhananyana vha Phuthiele, onoyo a mu bebela Finiasi. Ndi vhone vhaṋe vha miṱa ya Vhalivi zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho." 
Exodus6:26 Aroni na Mushe ndi vhone vhe vha vhudzwa nga Muṋe washu a ri, “Pfulusani Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa Egipita vho khethekana nga matsinde.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ndi vhone vhe vha amba na Farao khosi ya Egipita, vha tshi ri Vhaisraele vha pfuluwe Egipita. Ndi vhenevho Mushe na Aroni." 
Exodus6:28 Musi we Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe shangoni ḽa Egipita," 
Exodus6:29 o mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee. Vhudza Farao khosi ya Egipita zwoṱhe zwine nda u vhudza.”" 
Exodus6:30 Mushe a vhudza Muṋe washu a ri, “Hufha ndi muthu a sa koni u amba, Farao a nga nthetshelesa hani?”" 
Exodus7:1 Muṋe washu a fhindula Mushe a ri, “Vhona, ndi ḓo ita uri u nge mudzimu u na Farao, Aroni mukomana wau u ḓo nga muporofita wau." 
Exodus7:2 Iwe tshau ndi u mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwine Nṋe nda u vhudza, ene Aroni mukomana wau u ḓo vhudza Farao uri a litshe Vhaisraele vha pfuluwe shangoni ḽawe." 
Exodus7:3 Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo konḓisa mbilu ya Farao nda ita zwiga zwinzhi na zwimangadzo shangoni ḽa Egipita. 
Exodus7:4 Farao a nga si ni thetshelese, zwenezwo ndi ḓo tsikeledza Egipita nga tshanḓa tsha maanḓa nda lifhedza, nda pfulusa matsinde a vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele, vha ṱuwa shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus7:5 Vhaegipita vhoṱhe vha ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi ndi tshi angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda rwa Egipita, nda pfulusa Vhaisraele vhukati havho.”" 
Exodus7:6 Mushe na Aroni vha thetshelesa, vha ita zwenezwo zwe Muṋe washu a vha vhudza." 
Exodus7:7 Mushe o vha e na miṅwaha ya 80, Aroni e na miṅwaha ya 83 musi vha tshi amba na Farao." 
Exodus7:8 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a ri," 
Exodus7:9 “Arali Farao a ni vhudza uri ni ite maḓembe, u vhudze Aroni uri a dzhie mbaḓa yawe a i pose fhasi phanḓa ha Farao, i ḓo shanduka ya vha ḽiṋowa.”" 
Exodus7:10 Ndi hone Mushe na Aroni vha tshi takuwa vha ya ha Farao, vha ita nga he Muṋe washu a vha laya ngaho. Aroni a posa mbaḓa yawe fhasi phanḓa ha Farao na magota awe, ya shanduka ya vha ḽiṋowa." 
Exodus7:11 Farao na ene a vhidzisa vhaṱali vhawe na dziṅanga, na vhone vha ita zwenezwo nga madambi avho," 
Exodus7:12 vha posa mbaḓa dzavho fhasi dza shanduka dza vha dziṋowa. Hone lubaḓa lwa Aroni lwa mila mbaḓa dza dziṅanga. 
Exodus7:13 Naho zwo ralo Farao a ḓi ita tshipimbi, a si thetshelese Mushe na Aroni, sa zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o amba." 
Exodus7:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Farao u na tshipimbi. U hana u litsha vhathu vha ṱuwa." 
Exodus7:15 U fhindutshele khae musi a tshi ya mulamboni wa Nile, u mu lindele khunzikhunzini ya mulambo. U ṱuwe wo fara luḽa lubaḓa lwe lwa shanduka lwa vha ḽiṋowa." 
Exodus7:16 U mu vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu o nthuma ha iwe uri ndi u vhudze ndi ri: Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha ye phangani u nnduvha. Hone u swika zwino a u athu thetshelesa.’" 
Exodus7:17 Mafhungo a Yahavee ngea, u ri, ‘U ḓo tenda uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee nga hezwi: ndi ḓo rwa maḓi a mulambo nga lubaḓa lwe nda lu fara, a shanduka a vha malofha." 
Exodus7:18 Khovhe dzi re mulamboni dzi ḓo fa, mulambo u ḓo nukha lwa u tou nengisa lune Vhaegipita vha ḓo nengwa u nwa maḓi awo.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Vhudza Aroni uri a dzhie lubaḓa lwawe, a angaladze tshanḓa tshawe nṱha ha maḓi a Egipita, nṱha ha milambo na migero na mativha na thannge dzoṱhe, maḓi a shanduke a vhe malofha shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, na kha midzio ya thanda na matombo.”" 
Exodus7:20 Mushe na Aroni vha ita nga he Muṋe washu a vha laya ngaho. Aroni a angaladza lubaḓa lwawe Farao na magota awe vha tshi zwi vhona, a rwa maḓi a mulambo, ayo maḓi oṱhe a mulambo a mbo ḓi shanduka a vha malofha." 
Exodus7:21 Khovhe dzi re mulamboni dza fa, mulambo wa nukha lwa u tou nengisa lwe Vhaegipita vha si tsha kona u nwa maḓi awo. Shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita ḽo vha ḽo ḓala malofha." 
Exodus7:22 Hone dziṅanga dza Egipita dza ita-vho zwenezwo nga manditi avho. Zwenezwo Farao a ita tshipimbi, a si thetshelese Mushe na Aroni, sa zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o amba." 
Exodus7:23 Farao a rembuluwa a ṱuwa a humela pfamoni yawe, a si vhuye a zwi londa hezwo." 
Exodus7:24 Vhaegipita vhoṱhe vha bwa zwisima vha tshi tsa na mabama a mulambo vha tshi ṱoḓa maḓi a u nwa, nge vha wana maḓi a mulambo a sa nwei." 
Exodus7:25 Maḓi a fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili a sa nwei, u bva tshee Muṋe washu a rwa mulambo wa Nile." 
Exodus8:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Iya ha Farao u mu vhudze u ri, ‘Ngea mafhungo a Yahavee, u ri: Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha yo nnduvha." 
Exodus8:2 Arali wa hana vha tshi ṱuwa ndi ḓo ḓisa zwiḓula shangoni ḽau ḽoṱhe. 
Exodus8:3 Mulambo wa Nile u ḓo tshatshama zwiḓula; zwi ḓo vhuya zwa dzhena na nḓuni yau, zwa dzhena na pfamoni, zwa tumba nṱha ha mmbete wau, zwa dzhena nḓuni dza magota au na nḓuni dza vhalanda vhau, zwa dzhena zwivhasoni zwau na midzioni ine wa bika ngayo." 
Exodus8:4 Izwo zwiḓula zwi ḓo ita na u thamutshela nṱha hau, zwa thamutshela nṱha ha vhalanda vhau na nṱha ha magota au.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Vhudza Aroni uri a fare lubaḓa lwawe a angaladze tshanḓa nṱha ha milambo na migero na thannge uri zwiḓula zwi tshatshame shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita.”" 
Exodus8:6 Ndi hone Aroni a tshi angaladza tshanḓa tshawe nṱha ha maḓi a Egipita, ha bva zwiḓula zwa phapha shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus8:7 Hone dziṅanga dza ita-vho zwenezwo nga manditi avho, zwiḓula zwa tshatshama shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus8:8 Farao a vhidzisa Mushe na Aroni a ri, “Rabela Yahavee a ṱuwise zwiḓula hezwi kha nṋe na vhalanda vhanga; ndi ḓo litsha vhathu havha vha ṱuwa vha yo ṋekedza Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mushe a fhindula Farao a ri, “Ndi zwone. Nga u vha hulisa ndi ri vha vhe vhone vha no vhea tshifhinga tshine nda ḓo rabelela vhone na magota avho na vhalanda vhavho. Ndi hone zwiḓula zwoṱhe zwi tshi ḓo vha ṱutshela, zwa sala mulamboni wa Nile fhedzi.”" 
Exodus8:10 Farao a ri, “Matshelo.” Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Zwi ḓo itea nga hune vha amba. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Yahavee Mudzimu washu a hu na ane a eḓana nae." 
Exodus8:11 Zwiḓula zwi ḓo ṱutshela vhone na nnḓu yavho na magota avho na vhalanda vhavho, zwa yo dzula mulamboni.”" 
Exodus8:12 Musi Mushe na Aroni vho no ṱuwa ha Farao, Mushe a luvhelela Muṋe washu uri a ṱuse zwiḓula zwe a ḓisela Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Muṋe washu a ita zwe Mushe a mu humbela, zwiḓula zwi re nḓuni na miṱani na ḓakani zwa mbo fa." 
Exodus8:14 Vhaegipita vha zwi khokha zwa ita dzithulwi, shango ḽoṱhe ḽa tou nukha zwone." 
Exodus8:15 Musi Farao a tshi vhona o no rulwa iyo khwara, a dovha a ita tshipimbi, sa zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o amba, a hana u thetshelesa Mushe na Aroni." 
Exodus8:16 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Vhudza Aroni uri a angaladze lubaḓa lwawe a rwe mavu; a ḓo shanduka a vha vhunyunyu.”" 
Exodus8:17 Mushe a mu vhudza, Aroni a fara lubaḓa a angaladza tshanḓa tshawe a rwa mavu. Ha ḓa vhunyunyu ha luma vhathu na zwifuwo; shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita mavu a shanduka a vha vhunyunyu." 
Exodus8:18 Dziṅanga dza linga u bveledza vhunyunyu nga manditi adzo, zwa kunda. Vhunyunyu ha luma vhathu na zwifuwo." 
Exodus8:19 Dziṅanga dza vhudza Farao dza ri, “Hezwi zwo itwa nga Mudzimu.” Hone Farao a ḓi ita tshipimbi, a hana u thetshelesa Mushe na Aroni, sa zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o amba." 
Exodus8:20 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “U fhinduwe u yo lindela Farao a tshi ya mulamboni. U mu vhudze u ri, ‘Ngea mafhungo a Yahavee, u ri: Litsha vhathu vhanga vha yo nnduvha." 
Exodus8:21 Arali wa sa litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwa ndi ḓo u ḓisela phuvhe, dza ḓela na magota au na vhathu vhau dza dzhena nḓuni dzau. Nnḓu dza Vhaegipita dzi ḓo ḓala phuvhe, dzi ḓo tou phapha na fhasi." 
Exodus8:22 Hone shango ḽa Gosheni, hune ha dzula vhathu vhanga, ndi ḓo ḽi tsireledza musi wonoyo, henefho a hu nga vhi na phuvhe, ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi fhano shangoni ḽino." 
Exodus8:23 Ndi ḓo sumbedza phambano ya vhathu vhanga na vhau. Tshiga hetsho tshi ḓo vhonala matshelo.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Muṋe washu a zwi ita hezwo, ha ḓa guma ḽa phuvhe ḽa dzhena nḓuni ya Farao na nḓuni dza magota awe na shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, dza tshinyadza shango." 
Exodus8:25 Farao a vhidzisa Mushe na Aroni, a ri, “Ṱuwani ni yo ṋekedza Mudzimu waṋu tshiṱhavhelo, hone ni zwi ite shangoni ḽino!”" 
Exodus8:26 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Izwo zwi nga si vhe zwone. Riṋe ri ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu washu tshiṱhavhelo tsha zwifuwo, Vhaegipita vha vhona izwo zwi tshi ila u zwi shidzha. Arali ra ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo Vhaegipita vha tshi zwi vhona, zwa vha sinyusa, vha nga si ri kanḓe nga matombo naa?" 
Exodus8:27 Ro fanela u fara lwendo lwa maḓuvha mararu ri ye phangani ri yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu washu tshiṱhavhelo, sa zwe a ḓi ri laya.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓo ni litsha na ṱuwa na ya sogani na yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu tshiṱhavhelo, tenda na si ye kule. Na nṋe ni nthabelele.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mushe a ri, “Ndi tshi tou ṱuwa fhano, ndi ḓo rabela Yahavee. Matshelo nga matsheloni phuvhe dzi ḓo ṱutshela vhone Farao na magota avho na vhalanda vhavho. Tshi re hone vha songo dovha vha ri fhura vha dzivhisa vhathu vha tshi yo ṋekedza Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi ṱuwa ha Farao a yo rabela Muṋe washu. 
Exodus8:31 Muṋe washu a ita zwe Mushe a mu humbela, phuvhe dza ṱutshela Farao na magota awe na vhalanda vhawe, ha si sale na nthihi zwayo." 
Exodus8:32 Farao a ḓi dovha a ita tshipimbi, a si tende Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Exodus9:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Iya ha Farao u mu vhudze u ri, ‘Ngea mafhungo a Yahavee Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu, u ri: Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha yo nnduvha." 
Exodus9:2 Arali wa hana vha tshi ṱuwa wa dovha wa vha fareledza," 
Exodus9:3 tshanḓa tsha Yahavee tshi ḓo rwa zwifuwo zwau mafuloni, bere na donngi na gamela na kholomo na nngu zwi ḓo welwa nga dwadze dza fa dzoṱhe." 
Exodus9:4 Yahavee u ḓo ṱalula zwifuwo zwa Israele na zwa Egipita: zwine zwa vha zwa Vhaisraele a hu nga vhi na tshithihi tshine tsha ḓo fa. 
Exodus9:5 Yahavee o no vhea tshikhathi, u ri matshelo u ḓo ḓisa khombo heyo shangoni ḽoṱhe.’ ”" 
Exodus9:6 Nga matshelo Muṋe washu a ita zwe a amba, zwifuwo zwoṱhe zwa Vhaegipita zwa fa, hone zwa Vhaisraele ha si fe na tshithihi." 
Exodus9:7 Farao a londolosa, a wana uri ndi ngoho: ho vha hu si na tshifuwo tsha Vhaisraele na tshithihi tsho faho. Naho zwo ralo, Farao a dovha a ita tshipimbi, a si tende vhathu vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Exodus9:8 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a ri, “Putani milora i si gathi nga zwanḓa i tshi bva ṋanḓoni, Mushe a i hashe muyani Farao a tshi zwi vhona." 
Exodus9:9 I ḓo balangana ya nga buse shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, hoṱhe-hoṱhe shangoni ḽa Egipita i ḓo ḓisa zwitshimbili zwine zwa bvisa zwilonda zwi re na vhulwa kha vhathu na zwifuwo.”" 
Exodus9:10 Ndi hone vha tshi dzhia milora ṋanḓoni, vha ima phanḓa ha Farao, Mushe a i hasha muyani. Ya ḓisa zwitshimbili kha vhathu na zwifuwo zwa bvisa zwilonda zwi re na vhulwa," 
Exodus9:11 ṅanga dza si tsha kona u livhana na Mushe nge mivhili yadzo ya vha yo phapha zwitshimbili unga Vhaegipita vhoṱhe. 
Exodus9:12 Hone Muṋe washu a ita uri Farao a vhe na tshipimbi, a hana u vha thetshelesa, sa zwe Muṋe washu a vha o dzula o amba." 
Exodus9:13 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Fhindutshela ha Farao, u mu vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu u ri: Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha yo nṋekedza nduvho." 
Exodus9:14 Holuno ndi ḓo ḓisa khombo dzanga dzoṱhe dzi wele kha iwe na magota au na vhalanda vhau, dza tou vhaisa mbilu yau, uri u zwi ḓivhe uri a hu na muṅwe ane a nga Nṋe ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Exodus9:15 Ngavhe ndi angaladze tshanḓa tshanga ndi rwe iwe na vhalanda vhau nga dwadze, no vha ni tshi ḓo vha no lozwiwa tshoṱhe ni si tsheeho fhano shangoni." 
Exodus9:16 Hone ndo ni litsha na tshila ndi tshi itela uri ni vhone maanḓa anga na uri bvumo ḽanga ḽi pfale ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe. 
Exodus9:17 Naho zwo ralo u kha ḓi ita tshipimbi, u dzivhisa vhathu vhanga vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Exodus9:18 Zwenezwo, matshelo nga tshifhinga tshenetshi ndi ḓo nisa ḓumbu ḽa tshifhango tshi sa athu vhuya tsha vhonwa Egipita tshee ḽa tewa." 
Exodus9:19 Zwino ita uri zwifuwo zwau na zwoṱhe zwi re zwau zwi re nnḓa zwi khude. Vhathu na zwifuwo na zwoṱhe zwi re nnḓa, zwi siho nḓuni, tshifhango tshi ḓo zwi nela zwa fa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Maṅwe magota a Farao a tshenuswa nga zwe Muṋe washu a amba, vha ḓisa phuli dzavho na zwifuwo zwavho nḓuni," 
Exodus9:21 hone vhe vha si londe zwe Muṋe washu a amba vha litsha dziphuli dzavho na zwifuwo zwavho nnḓa. 
Exodus9:22 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Angaladza tshanḓa tshau tshi livhe ṱaḓulu uri tshifhango tshi nele shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, tshi nele vhathu na zwifuwo na zwoṱhe zwine zwa mela masimuni shangoni ḽa Egipita.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mushe a angaladza lubaḓa lwawe lwa livha ṱaḓulu, Muṋe washu a vhea mutsindo, a nisa tshifhango, lupenyo lwa rwa ḽifhasi. Muṋe washu a nisela shango ḽa Egipita tshifhango." 
Exodus9:24 Tshifhango tsha wa, lupenyo lu tshi khou vhaimedza vhukati hatsho, ha vha na ḓumbu ḽihulu ḽa tshifhango tshi sa athu vhuya tsha vhonwa kha ḽa Egipita tshee vha thoma u vha lushaka." 
Exodus9:25 Shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita tshifhango tsha rwa zwithu zwoṱhe zwi re nnḓa, vhathu na zwifuwo. Tsha rwa zwimela zwoṱhe zwi re masimuni, tsha fhanzekanya miri yoṱhe i re ḓakani." 
Exodus9:26 He ha si we tshifhango ndi shangoni ḽa Gosheni fhedzi hune ha dzula Vhaisraele. 
Exodus9:27 Farao a vhidzisa Mushe na Aroni a ri, “Ndi a tenda uri ndi na mulandu. Yahavee u ita zwi re zwone, nṋe na vhalanda vhanga ri khou ita zwi si zwone." 
Exodus9:28 Rabela Yahavee a imise mibvumo na tshifhango. Ndi ḓo ni litsha na ṱuwa, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na dzula fhano.”" 
Exodus9:29 Mushe a mu fhindula a ri, “Ndi tshi tou bva fhano muḓini ndi ḓo imisa zwanḓa zwanga zwa livha ha Yahavee. Mibvumo i ḓo ima, tshifhango tsha si tsha wa, uri vha ḓivhe uri ḽifhasi ndi ḽa Yahavee." 
Exodus9:30 Hone a vha vhone na magota avho, ndi a zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri a vha athu swika hune vha ofha Yahavee Mudzimu washu.”" 
Exodus9:31 Muḓali na baḽi zwo tshinyadzwa, nge baḽi ya vha i tshi khou shela thoro, muḓali u tshi khou ṱuma lurere." 
Exodus9:32 Hone a ho ngo vha na goroi yo tshinyalaho ngauri yone i vhibvela murahu. 
Exodus9:33 Mushe a ṱuwa ha Farao a bvela nnḓa ha muḓi. A takusela zwanḓa zwawe ha Muṋe washu, mibvumo na tshifhango zwa ima, mvula ya si tsha dovha ya na." 
Exodus9:34 Musi Farao a tshi vhona uri mvula na tshifhango na mibvumo zwo ima, a dovha a ita vhuvhi. A dovha a ita tshipimbi, ene na magota awe." 
Exodus9:35 Farao a vha na tshipimbi, a si tende Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa, sa zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o zwi amba nga mulomo wa Mushe." 
Exodus10:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Mushe a ri, “Takuwa u ye ha Farao, ngauri ndi Nṋe we nda konḓisa mbilu yawe na dza magota awe uri ndi ite zwiga hezwi zwanga khavho," 
Exodus10:2 uri u kone u vhudza vhana vhau na vhaḓuhulu zwe nda shonisa Vhaegipita na zwiga zwe nda vha ofhisa ngazwo, uri noṱhe ni ḓivhe uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Exodus10:3 Zwenezwo Mushe na Aroni vha ṱuwa vha ya ha Farao, vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Vhaheberu u ri, ‘U ḓo hana u nnduvha u swika lini? Litsha vhathu vhanga vha ṱuwe vha yo nṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo." 
Exodus10:4 Arali wa hana vhathu vhanga vha tshi ṱuwa, izwo matshelo ndi ḓo ḓisa nzie dza magerere shangoni ḽau." 
Exodus10:5 Dzi ḓo tou phapha fhasi dza ita guma lune na mavu a si tsha ḓo vhonala. Dzi ḓo gunedza zwe zwa ni salela, zwoṱhe zwi songo fhedzwaho nga tshifhango; dzi ḓo ḽa miri yaṋu yoṱhe ine ya mela masimuni." 
Exodus10:6 Dzi ḓo ḓadza nnḓu dzau na dza magota au na dza Vhaegipita vhoṱhe. Zwi ḓo vha zwine vhokhotsi aṋu na vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha sa athu zwi vhona tshee vha dzula shangoni ḽino u swika zwino.’ ” Mushe a rembuluwa a ṱuwa ha Farao. 
Exodus10:7 Magota a Farao a mu vhudza a ri, “Uyu munna u ḓo ri ṱulela khombo u swika lini? Kha vha litshe vhanna avha vha ṱuwe vha yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu wavho tshiṱhavhelo. A vha zwi vhoni uri Egipita zwino ḽi vho ṱoḓou lovha tshoṱhe?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ndi hone Mushe na Aroni vha tshi humiselwa ha Farao, a vha vhudza a ri, “Ṱuwani zwaṋu ni yo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu tshiṱhavhelo. Hone hu ṱuwa vhafhio?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Ri ḓo ṱuwa na vhaṱhannga vhashu na vhakalaha vhashu. Ri ḓo ṱuwa na vhana vhashu vha vhatuka na vhasidzana na nngu dzashu na kholomo dzashu, ngauri ri yo itela Yahavee vhuṱambo.”" 
Exodus10:10 Farao a vha goḓa a ri, “Ngavhe Yahavee a tshi vha na inwi arali nda vhuya nda ni litsha na ṱuwa na vhasadzi vhaṋu na vhana vhaṋu! Zwi khagala uri ndi vhukwila." 
Exodus10:11 Zwi sa itwi ndi zwenezwo! Nga hu ṱuwe vhanna fhedzi vha yo ṋekedza Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo, hufha no vha ni tshi khou ṱoḓa zwenezwo.” Ha ri u ambiwa zwenezwo vha mbo pandelwa phanḓa ha Farao." 
Exodus10:12 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Angaladza tshanḓa tshau u sumbe shango ḽa Egipita, hu ḓe magerere a tshoṱhele shango ḽa Egipita a ḽe zwimela zwaḽo zwoṱhe, zwoṱhe zwo siwaho nga tshifhango.”" 
Exodus10:13 Mushe a angaladza lubaḓa lwawe a sumba shango ḽa Egipita, Muṋe washu a ḓisa muya wa vhubvaḓuvha shangoni, wa tita masiari eneo oṱhe na vhusiku. Nga matsheloni uyo muya wa vhubvaḓuvha wa vha wo no ḓisa magerere." 
Exodus10:14 Magerere a ṱanganya shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, a kavha vhuponi hoṱhe ha Egipita. O vha o andesa, e lutsinga lu sa athu vhuya lwa vhonwa, nahone lune lwa si tsha ḓo dovha lwa vhonwa." 
Exodus10:15 A phapha fhasi mavu a vhuya a tou swifhala ngao, a ḽa zwimela zwoṱhe zwa shango na mitshelo yoṱhe ya miri ye ya vha yo siwa nga tshifhango. Ho vha hu songo tsha sala vhudala kha muri kana tshimela masimuni kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus10:16 Farao a ṱavhanya a vhidzisa Mushe na Aroni, a ri, “Ndo khakhela Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu, nda khakhela na inwi." 
Exodus10:17 Nkhangweleni vhuvhi hanga, holuno luthihi fhedzi, ni rabele Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu a ntsudzulusela bulayo heḽi nandi!”" 
Exodus10:18 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi ṱuwa ha Farao a yo rabela Muṋe washu. 
Exodus10:19 Muṋe washu a ḓisa muya u no bva vhukovhela wa fhunga wa vhuya wa vho tou vusa maanḓa, wa hwala magerere wa a isa Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga. A ho ngo vhuya ha sala na nzie na nthihi shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus10:20 Hone Muṋe washu a ita uri Farao a dovhe a ite tshipimbi, a si tende Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Exodus10:21 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Mushe a ri, “Angaladza tshanḓa tshau tshi sumbe ṱaḓulu, hu ḓe swiswi ḽi tibe shango ḽa Egipita, swiswi ḽine muthu a nga a sa ḽi fara nga tshanḓa.”" 
Exodus10:22 Mushe a angaladza tshanḓa tshawe a sumba ṱaḓulu, ha fhela maḓuvha mararu swiswi ḽo tou bodo shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus10:23 Ho vha hu si na muthu ane a kona u vhona muṅwe kana u tshimbila, ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha mararu, hone hune ha dzula Vhaisraele ho vha hu na tshedza." 
Exodus10:24 Farao a vhidzisa Mushe, a ri, “Iyani u ṋekedza Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo, hone nngu na kholomo dzi sale fhano. Vhana vhaṋu na vhone ni ṱuwe navho.”" 
Exodus10:25 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Kani-ha vhone vha ḓo ri ṋea zwifuwo zwa tshiṱhavhelo na nduvho i fhiswaho zwine ra ḓo ṋekedza Yahavee Mudzimu washu?" 
Exodus10:26 Na zwifuwo zwashu ro fanela u ṱuwa nazwo, a ho ngo fanela u sala na kholomo na nthihi, ro fanela u luvha Yahavee Mudzimu washu nga zwifuwo zwashu, riṋe vhaṋe a ri ḓivhi tshiṱhavhelo tshine ra ḓo ṋekedza Yahavee, zwi ḓo vhonwa ro no swika afho fhethu.”" 
Exodus10:27 Hone Muṋe washu a ita uri Farao a vhe na tshipimbi, a si tsha tenda vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Exodus10:28 Farao a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ṱuwani maṱoni anga! Ni vhone! Ndi songo tsha ni vhona, musi une nda dovha nda ni vhona ni ḓo fa!”" 
Exodus10:29 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Vho amba zwone, a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha mmbona.”" 
Exodus11:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ho sala bulayo ḽithihi fhedzi ḽine nda ḓo ḽi ḓisela Farao na ḽa Egipita. Hó no itea zwenezwo u ḓo ni litsha na ṱuwa tshoṱhe. Vhukuma u ḓo tou ni pandamedza!" 
Exodus11:2 Laya vhathu uri munna muṅwe na muṅwe na musadzi muṅwe na muṅwe a humbele muhura wawe nungu dza siliva na musuku.” 
Exodus11:3 Muṋe washu a ita uri Vhaegipita vha hulise Vhaisraele, Mushe ene a vha na bvumo ḽihulu shangoni ḽa Egipita, vhukuma magota a Farao na vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi vhona Mushe e muthu muhulwane." 
Exodus11:4 Mushe a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Vhukati ha vhusiku ndi ḓo buḓekanya shango ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus11:5 Matanzhe oṱhe a vhathu vha Egipita a ḓo fa, u thoma nga tanzhe ḽa Farao u guma nga tanzhe ḽa musadzi wa phuli a kuyaho goroi, na matanzhe oṱhe a kholomo." 
Exodus11:6 Shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita hu ḓo vha na mukosi u sa athu pfiwa, nahone a u tsha ḓo dovha wa pfiwa." 
Exodus11:7 Hone kha Vhaisraele, muthu kana tshifuwo, na mmbwa zwayo a i nga vhuyi ya vha huvha, uri ni ḓivhe uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi ṱalula Vhaegipita kha Vhaisraele.’" 
Exodus11:8 Ndi hone magota aṋu haya oṱhe a tshi ḓo ḓa ha nṋe vha gwadama phanḓa hanga vha ri: Ṱuwa, iwe na vhathu vhau vhoṱhe! Ho no itea izwo ndi ḓo ṱuwa.” Mushe a ṱuwa ha Farao o sinyuwa zwihulu." 
Exodus11:9 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Mushe a ri, “Farao a nga si ni thethelese; izwo zwi ḓo ita uri ndi ite maḓembe manzhi shangoni ḽa Egipita.”" 
Exodus11:10 Maḓembe oṱhe hayo Mushe na Aroni vho a ita Farao a tshi zwi vhona. Hone Muṋe washu a ita uri Farao a vhe na tshipimbi, a si litshe Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa shangoni ḽawe." 
Exodus12:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni vhe shangoni ḽa Egipita a ri," 
Exodus12:2 “Ṅwedzi hoyu ni vho ḓo u ita ṅwedzi wa u ranga, nga u vhe wone ṅwedzi wa u ranga ṅwaha." 
Exodus12:3 Laya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe u ri, ‘Nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa houno ṅwedzi munna muṅwe na muṅwe o fanela u bvisa tshifuwo sambini ḽawe ḽa nngu kana ḽa mbudzi, muṱa muṅwe na muṅwe u vhe na tshithihi: muṱa muthihi u vhe na tshifuwo tshithihi." 
Exodus12:4 Arali vha muṱa muthihi vhe vhaṱuku lune vha nga si kone u ḽa itsho tshifuwo vha tshi fhedza, uyo munna nga a baḓekane na mudzulelani wawe, zwi tshi ya nga mbalo ya vhathu. Hezwi ni tshi dzudzanya mbalo ya vhathu vhane vha nga kona u ḽa itsho tshifuwo vha fhedza, ni thome u sedza uri muthu muthihi a nga ḽa zwingafhani." 
Exodus12:5 “ ‘Itsho tshifuwo tsho fanela u vha tshi si na luvhadzi, tshi vhe tshiduna tshi sa fhiri ṅwaha muthihi, ni nga ḓi nanga kha nngu kana mbudzi." 
Exodus12:6 Ni tshi valele u swika ḓuvha ḽa fumi na vhuṋa ḽa ṅwedzi, nga ḽeneḽo ḓuvha zwivhidzo zwoṱhe zwa vhathu vha Israele zwi ḓo shidzha izwo zwifuwo nga madekwana." 
Exodus12:7 Vhathu vha dzhie maṅwe malofha azwo vha ḓodze mihangammbwa na zwiaramo zwa dzinnḓu hune vha khou ḽela hone. 
Exodus12:8 Vhusiku honoho ṋama i ḽiwe yo gotshwa muliloni; i ḽiwe na vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa na miroho i kalakataho. 
Exodus12:9 Ni songo vhuya na i ḽa i mbisi kana yo bikiwa, i tou gotshiwa muliloni yoṱhe – ṱhoho na khwanḓa na miraḓo ya zwa ngomu." 
Exodus12:10 Ni songo sia iṅwe ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha; zwine zwa sala ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha ni zwi fhise. 
Exodus12:11 Ni i ḽe nga tshihaḓu, nó vhofha khundu nga bannda, nó ambara navhula milenzheni, nó fara mbaḓa nga tshanḓa. Ndi vhuṱambo ha Paseka vhune ha itelwa u hulisa Nṋe Yahavee." 
Exodus12:12 Vhusiku honoho ndi ḓo buḓekanya shango ḽa Egipita nda vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe a shango ḽa Egipita, a vhathu na a zwifuwo. Ndi ḓo lifhedza midzimu yoṱhe ya Egipita, ndi Nṋe Yahavee!" 
Exodus12:13 Nnḓu dzine na dzula khadzo dzi ḓo swaiwa nga malofha. Ndi tshi vhona malofha ndi ḓo ni pfuka, na ponyoka khombo i lozwaho musi ndi tshi lifhedza shango ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus12:14 Ḓuvha heḽi ni ḽi ite ḓuvha ḽa tshihumbudzo, ni ite vhuṱambo ngaḽo vhu vhe ha u hulisa Nṋe Yahavee. Ni ḓivhadze mirafho yoṱhe i ḽi ite ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo lini na lini." 
Exodus12:15 “ ‘Ni fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ni tshi ḽa vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa. Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ni bvise mbilisa yoṱhe nḓuni dzaṋu, ngauri ane a vhuya a ḽa vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa u bva nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga u swika ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a thathwe kha vhathu vha Israele." 
Exodus12:16 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga na nga ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni vhe na guvhangano ḽikhethwa. Nga maḓuvha eneo ni songo shuma tshithu; ni tou tendelwa fhedzi u ḓibikela zwiḽiwa. 
Exodus12:17 Vhuṱambo ha vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa vhu fanela u ḓi dzula vhu tshi itwa ngauri ndo pfulusa matsinde aṋu shangoni ḽa Egipita nga ḓuvha ḽeneḽo. Na mirafho yoṱhe i ḓaho i ite vhuṱambo nga ḓuvha heḽo; hei ndi ndaela i sa shanduki. 
Exodus12:18 Nga ṅwedzi wa u ranga, u thoma nga madekwana a ḓuvha ḽa 14 u swika nga madekwana a ḓuvha ḽa 21, ni ḽe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa." 
Exodus12:19 Hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili hu si na mbilisa nḓuni dzaṋu, ngauri ane a vhuya a ḽa vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa u fanela u thathwa kha vhathu vha Israele, a nga vha e mutsinda kana e mudzulapo o bebwaho henefho." 
Exodus12:20 Ni songo ḽa vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa; hoṱhe hune na vha hone ni ḽe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa.’ ” 
Exodus12:21 Mushe a vhidzisa vhahulwane vha Israele a vha vhudza a ri, “Ṱuwani ni yo nanga nngu kana mbudzi ni tshi itela miṱa yaṋu, ni shidzhe tshiṱhavhiwa tsha Paseka." 
Exodus12:22 Ni dzhie davhi ḽa muhisopo, ni i longe malofhani ane a vha sambeloni, ni ḓodze zwiaramo na mihangammbwa nga malofha a no bva sambeloni. Hu songo vha na ane a linga u bva nḓuni ḽi sa athu tsha." 
Exodus12:23 Hu ḓo ri Muṋe washu a tshi buḓekanya ḽa Egipita a tshi lifhedza Vhaegipita, a tshi vhona malofha kha zwiaramo na kha mihangammbwa, a fhira iḽo vothi a si tende mulozwi a tshi dzhena mahayani aṋu a ni vhulaha." 
Exodus12:24 Ni vhulunge milayo hei, inwi na vhana vhaṋu, i vhe ndaela ya lini na lini." 
Exodus12:25 Musi ni tshi dzhena shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ni fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo ni ṋea ḽone, ni vhulunge enea maitele." 
Exodus12:26 Musi vhana vhaṋu vha tshi ni vhudzisa vha tshi ri, ‘Maitele aya a amba mini?’" 
Exodus12:27 ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Ndi tshiṱhavhelo tsha Paseka tshine tsha itelwa u hulisa Muṋe washu; o fhira nnḓu dza Vhaisraele vhe Egipita, a vhulaha Vhaegipita a tsireledza nnḓu dzashu.’ ” Vhathu vha gwadama vha luvha." 
Exodus12:28 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa, vha yo ita zwenezwo zwe Muṋe washu a laedza Mushe na Aroni." 
Exodus12:29 Vhukati ha vhusiku Muṋe washu a vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe shangoni ḽa Egipita – tanzhe ḽa Farao, we a vha a tshi ḓo vha khosi, na matanzhe oṱhe, na ḽone tanzhe ḽa tshivhotshwa tshe tsha vha tshi dzhele, na matanzhe a kholomo dzoṱhe." 
Exodus12:30 Farao na magota awe na Vhaegipita vhoṱhe vha vuwa vhusiku, ha vuwa tshililo tshihulu Egipita, ngauri ho vha hu si na nnḓu i si na mufu." 
Exodus12:31 Vhusiku honoho Farao a vhidzisa Mushe na Aroni, a ri, “Takuwani, inwi na Vhaisraele, ni ṱuwe fhano kha vhathu vhanga. Ṱuwani ni yo luvha Yahavee sa zwe na humbela." 
Exodus12:32 Dzhiani mbudzi dzaṋu na nngu na kholomo ni ṱuwe. Ni nkhumbelele-vho mashudu.” 
Exodus12:33 Vhaegipita vha vhudza vhathu vhó khwaṱhisa uri vha ṱavhanye u ṱuwa afho shangoni, vha ri, “Na sa ṱuwa ri nga ḓo fa roṱhe.”" 
Exodus12:34 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi hwala bwindi ḽavho ḽa vhurotho mahaḓani, ḽi tshi ḓi vha ḽi si na mbilisa, midzio ya u bika ngayo yo putelwa nga zwifuko zwavho." 
Exodus12:35 Vhaisraele vha ita zwe Mushe a vha vhudza, vha humbela Vhaegipita thundu ya siliva na musuku, na zwifuko." 
Exodus12:36 Muṋe washu a ita uri Vhaegipita vha hulise Vhaisraele, vha vha ṋea zwe vha vha humbela. U ralo ha vha u ṱangula Vhaegipita." 
Exodus12:37 Vhaisraele vha takuwa Ramisese vha livha Sukotho. Vho vha vha tshi nga vha vhanna vha 600 000 vha tshi khou tshimbila nga milenzhe, hu sa vhalwi miṱa yavho." 
Exodus12:38 Na vhaṅwe vhathu vha si Vhaisraele vha baḓekana navho vhe vhanzhi, vha tshi khou khada masambi avho a nngu na mbudzi na kholomo dzi si na vhukono." 
Exodus12:39 Vha baga dzikhekhe dzi si na mbilisa nga bwindi iḽo ḽa vhurotho ḽe vha ṱuwa naḽo Egipita, ngauri bwindi iḽo ḽa vhurotho ḽo vha ḽi si na mbilisa. Vho vha vho tou thathwa Egipita, vha si vhuye vha lenga, na mbuvha ya lwendoni vho vha vha si na." 
Exodus12:40 Vhaisraele vho dzula Egipita miṅwaha ya 430. 
Exodus12:41 Musi wonoyo vha vha vha tshi khou fhedza miṅwaha ya 430, matsinde oṱhe a vhathu vha Muṋe washu vha pfuluwa Egipita." 
Exodus12:42 Vhusiku he Muṋe washu a lala o lindela uri a vha pfuluse shangoni ḽa Egipita, ho pfi hu itwe mulindelo wa u hulisa Muṋe washu nga mirafho yavho yoṱhe i tevhekanaho." 
Exodus12:43 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe na Aroni a ri, “Ndaela dza Paseka ngedzi: Paseka i songo ḽiwa nga mutsinda," 
Exodus12:44 hone phuli ifhio na ifhio ye na i renga nga tshelede i nga ḓi ḽa arali no i fumbisa. 
Exodus12:45 Zwi songo ḽiwa nga mutsinda kana mushumi o tou tholiwaho. 
Exodus12:46 Zwiḽiwa zwoṱhe zwo fanela u ḽiwa muṱani wonoyo we zwa gotshiwa khawo; na thango ya ṋama zwayo i songo vhuya ya bviselwa nnḓa. Ni songo vhuya na vunḓa marambo a itsho tshifuwo. 
Exodus12:47 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha vhulunge vhuṱambo ha Paseka. 
Exodus12:48 Arali ni tshi dzula na mutsinda ane a funa u ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka uri a hulise Muṋe washu, vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshinnani vha muṱa wawe vho fanela u fumbiswa, ndi hone a tshi nga tendelwa uri a ite-vho uho vhuṱambo, ngauri u vho nga mudzulapo o bebwaho henefho. Hone muthu a songo fumbaho a songo vhuya a zwi ḽa." 
Exodus12:49 Ndaela dzenedzo dzi vhusa mudzulapo o bebwaho henefho na mutsinda a re vhukati haṋu.” 
Exodus12:50 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha thetshelesa, vha tevhedza ndayo dze Muṋe washu a ṋea Mushe na Aroni." 
Exodus12:51 Musi wonoyo Muṋe washu a pfulusa Vhaisraele na matsinde avho shangoni ḽa Egipita. 
Exodus13:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus13:2 “Matanzhe oṱhe a zwiduna kha ḽa Israele a sumelwe Nṋe, tshiduna tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine tsha ranga u bebwa, a nga vha muthu kana tsha vha tshifuwo, ndi tshanga.”" 
Exodus13:3 Mushe a vhudza vhathu a ri, “Dzulani ni tshi elelwa ḓuvha heḽi; ndi ḓuvha ḽe na pfuluwa ngaḽo Egipita he na vha ni dziphuli, na bviswa nga maanḓa a Muṋe washu; ni songo ḽa vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa nga ḓuvha heḽo." 
Exodus13:4 Ṋamusi, nga ṅwedzi wa Avivi, ni khou pfuluwa Egipita." 
Exodus13:5 Huno-ha, ni ite vhuṱambo honoho nga ṅwedzi wonoyo une Muṋe washu a ni isa shangoni ḽa Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi, shango ḽe a anela vhokhotsi aṋu a ri u ḓo ni ṋea ḽone, shango ḽi no ela mukhaha na ṋotshi." 
Exodus13:6 Ni fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ni tshi ḽa vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa, zwino nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni ite vhuṱambo ha u hulisa Muṋe washu." 
Exodus13:7 Maḓuvha eneo maṱanu na mavhili hu ḽiwe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa; ni songo vhuya na ḽa vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa, ni songo vhuya na dzula na mbilisa vhuponi haṋu hoṱhe." 
Exodus13:8 “Musi wonoyo ni ṱalutshedze vhana vhaṋu ni ri, ‘Hezwi zwi itelwa zwe Muṋe washu a ri itela ri tshi pfuluwa Egipita.’" 
Exodus13:9 Maitele hayo a ḓo vha tshone tshihumbudzo, a nga tshiga tsho vhofhelelwaho tshanḓani tshaṋu kana kha phanḓa, zwenezwo mulayo wa Muṋe washu u ḓo dzula u mulomoni waṋu, ngauri Muṋe washu o ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita nga tshanḓa tsha maanḓa." 
Exodus13:10 Ni ite vhuṱambo hovhu ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe nga tshifhinga tsho vhewaho. 
Exodus13:11 “Musi Muṋe washu a tshi ni isa shangoni ḽa Vhakanana, a ni ṋea ḽone ḽa vha ḽaṋu, sa zwe a anela inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu a ri u ḓo zwi ita," 
Exodus13:12 ni kumedze Muṋe washu vhatukana vhoṱhe vho rangaho u bebwa, na zwifuwo zwoṱhe zwa zwiduna zwo rangaho u dzwalwa. Zwoṱhe zwenezwo ndi zwa Muṋe washu." 
Exodus13:13 Hone tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa donngi ni ḽi rengulule nga nngu kana mbudzi. Arali na sa ḽi rengulula ni ḽi vunḓe mutsinga. Ni rengulule na matanzhe oṱhe a vhatukana. 
Exodus13:14 “Arali misi i ḓaho vhana vhaṋu vha tshi ni vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Izwi zwi amba mini?’ ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Ro vha ri dziphuli shangoni ḽa Egipita, hone Muṋe washu o ri pfulusa nga maanḓa awe." 
Exodus13:15 Musi Farao a tshi ita tshipimbi a tshi ri hanisa u pfuluwa, Muṋe washu a vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe shangoni ḽa Egipita, a vhathu na a zwifuwo. Ndi zwine ra ṋekedza Muṋe washu tshiṱhavhelo tsha zwiduna zwoṱhe zwo rangaho u dzwaliwa, ra rengulula matanzhe oṱhe a vhatuka.’" 
Exodus13:16 Maitele ayo a ḓo vha tshihumbudzi, a nga tshithu tshe na tshi vhofhelela kha tshanḓa kana kha phanḓa; a ḓo ri humbudza uri Muṋe washu o ri pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita nga tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa.”" 
Exodus13:17 Musi Farao o tendela vhathu uri vha pfuluwe, Mudzimu ho ngo vha litsha vha tshi fara gondo ḽi yaho shangoni ḽa Vhafilista, naho ḽo vha ḽi ḽone ḽa u khauledza. Mudzimu o ri vha nga ṱangana na nndwa vha kulea nungo vha humela Egipita." 
Exodus13:18 Mudzimu o bvisa vhathu nga nḓila ya u mona ya sogani i yaho Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga. Vhaisraele vho pfuluwa Egipita vho kungela zwihali. 
Exodus13:19 Mushe o pfuluwa na marambo a Josefa, ngauri Josefa o vha o anisa Vhaisraele a ri, “Vhukumakuma Mudzimu u ḓo ni lamulela. Musi ḓuvha iḽo ḽi tshi swika ni pfuluwe na marambo anga.”" 
Exodus13:20 Vha tshimbila u bva Sukotho vha ya vha awela Ethamu lumemeni lwa phanga. 
Exodus13:21 Muṋe washu a vha ranga phanḓa, masiari o vha e tshivhumbeo tsha phuphu ya gole ḽi vha sumbedzaho nḓila, vhusiku e tshivhumbeo tsha phuphu ya mulilo uri a vha vhonetshele, zwenezwo vha kona u tshimbila vhusiku na masiari." 
Exodus13:22 Phuphu ya gole yo vha i tshi ḓi dzula i tshi vha phanḓa ha vhathu masiari, phuphu ya mulilo i phanḓa havho vhusiku." 
Exodus14:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus14:2 “Vhudza Vhaisraele vha humele murahu vha ṱoke mishasha phanḓa ha Phi Hahirotho, vhukati ha Migidolo na lwanzhe, u lavhelesa Baali Tsifoni. Ni ṱoke mishasha yaṋu tsini ha lwanzhe u livhana na fhethu henefho." 
Exodus14:3 Farao a tshi humbula u ḓo ri, ‘Vhaisraele vha khou tendeleka na shango vha tshi ya phanḓa na murahu, soga ḽo vha thivhela nḓila.’" 
Exodus14:4 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo ita uri Farao a dovhe a ite tshipimbi, a bve a ni tevhele. Hone ndi ḓo kunda Farao na mmbi yawe ndi tshi itela uri ndi huliswe. Ndi hone Vhaegipita vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.” Vhaisraele vha ita nga u ralo." 
Exodus14:5 Musi khosi ya Egipita i tshi vhudzwa uri vhathu vho shavha, ene na magota awe vha ḓisola vha ri, “Ro itani ri tshi tendela Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa vha si tsha ri shumela?”" 
Exodus14:6 Ndi hone Farao a tshi panelwa gariki yawe ya nndwa, a kuvhanganya mmbi yawe," 
Exodus14:7 a takutshedza e na gariki dza nndwa dza 600 dzi fhiraho dzoṱhe, na gariki dzoṱhe dza nndwa dza Egipita, dzoṱhe dzó namelwa nga vhanna vhararu-vhararu." 
Exodus14:8 Muṋe washu a ita uri Farao khosi ya Egipita a ite tshipimbi, a tevhelela Vhaisraele, vhone vha tshi khou ṱuwa vha sa ofhi tshithu." 
Exodus14:9 Vhaegipita vha vha pandamedza vhe na bere dzavho dzoṱhe na gariki dza Farao dza nndwa na vhanameli vhawe vha dzibere na mmbi i tshimbilaho nga milenzhe, vha vha fara he vha vha vho ṱoka mishasha tsini ha lwanzhe, tsini na Phi Hahirotho u livhana na Baali Tsifoni." 
Exodus14:10 Musi Farao a tshi swika, Vhaisraele vha lavhelesa, vha vhona Vhaegipita vha tshi khou vha tevhelela! Vhaisraele vha farwa nga nyofho vha lilela Muṋe washu." 
Exodus14:11 Vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “U vhuya vha ri ḓisa fhano phangani uri ri fele hone, Egipita ho vha hu si tshee na zwalo kani? U ri pfulusa Egipita ndi hone vho ri tonda?" 
Exodus14:12 A si zwenezwo zwe ra vha vhudza ri tshee Egipita kani? Ro amba ra ri nga vha ri litshe zwashu ri ḓi vha phuli dza Vhaegipita! U vha phuli dza Vhaegipita zwi fhira u fela sogani!” 
Exodus14:13 Mushe a fhindula vhathu a ri, “Ni songo ofha tshithu! Imani no khwaṱha, ni ḓo vhona zwine Muṋe washu a ḓo ita uri a ni tshidze ṋamusi; Vhaegipita havha vhane na khou vha vhona ṋamusi, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na vha vhona." 
Exodus14:14 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni lwela, sokonu dzika.”" 
Exodus14:15 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Ndi mini u tshi kha ḓi nndilela nga u rali? Vhudza Vhaisraele vha tshimbile." 
Exodus14:16 A vha iwe imisa lubaḓa lwau u angaladze tshanḓa tshau nṱha ha lwanzhe, u vulele Vhaisraele nḓila vha wele lwanzhe vha tshi kanda mavuni o omaho." 
Exodus14:17 Nṋe ndi ḓo ita uri Vhaegipita vha vhe na tshipimbi, vha vha tevhele. Ndi ḓo huliswa nga u kunda Farao na mmbi yawe yoṱhe – gariki dzawe dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo." 
Exodus14:18 Musi ndi tshi vho huliswa nge nda kunda Farao na gariki dzawe dza nndwa na mmbi yawe, Vhaegipita vha ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Exodus14:19 Zwenezwo muruṅwa wa Mudzimu we a vha a tshi khou tshimbila phanḓa ha mmbi ya Israele, a bva he a vha e hone, a ya murahu havho. Phuphu ya gole ya ṱuwa phanḓa he ya vha i hone ya ya ya ima murahu havho," 
Exodus14:20 ya ḓa vhukati ha Vhaegipita na Vhaisraele. Vhusiku hoṱhe gole ḽa ḓisa swiswi sia ḽiṅwe, sia ḽiṅwe ḽa ḓisa tshedza, mmbi dza si vhuye dza sendelana ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha." 
Exodus14:21 Mushe a angaladza tshanḓa tshawe nṱha ha lwanzhe. Muṋe washu a sukumedzela lwanzhe murahu nga muya wa vhubvaḓuvha u no vhudzulesa vhusiku hoṱhe, lwanzheni ha sala hu shango ḽo omaho. Maḓi a fhandekana," 
Exodus14:22 Vhaisraele vha wela lwanzhe vha tshi kanda ho omaho, hu na mbondo dza maḓi sia ḽavho ḽa tshauḽa na sia ḽa tshamonde." 
Exodus14:23 Vhaegipita vha vha tevhelela vha vha sala murahu, vha dzhena lwanzheni na bere dzoṱhe dza Farao na gariki dzawe dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo." 
Exodus14:24 Musi mapfuvhi a sa athu tswuka Muṋe washu a sedza mmbi ya Vhaegipita e kha phuphu ya mulilo ya gole, iyo mmbi ya ḓaḓa." 
Exodus14:25 Muṋe washu a ita uri milinga ya gariki dzavho dza nndwa i ṱomowe dza si tsha kona u tshimbila. Vhaegipita vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Nga ri shavhe Vhaisraele, Yahavee u khou lwa na Vhaegipita a tshi lwela vhone!”" 
Exodus14:26 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Angaladza tshanḓa tshau nṱha ha lwanzhe uri maḓi a ele a tshi ya murahu a kumbe Vhaegipita na gariki dzavho dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo.”" 
Exodus14:27 Mushe a angaladza tshanḓa tshawe nṱha ha lwanzhe, musi ḽi tshi tsha lwanzhe lwa humela vhudzuloni halwo. Vhaegipita vha tshi khou shavha vha wela ngomu halwo, Muṋe washu a posa Vhaegipita vhukati ha lwanzhe." 
Exodus14:28 Maḓi e a vha a tshi khou humela murahu a tibedza idzo gariki dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo vha mmbi yoṱhe ya Farao ye ya vha yo tevhela Vhaisraele lwanzheni, ha si sale na muthihi wavho." 
Exodus14:29 Hone Vhaisraele vho wela lwanzhe vha tshi kanda mavuni o omaho, hu na mbondo dza maḓi kha tshauḽa tshavho na tshamonde." 
Exodus14:30 Musi wonoyo, Muṋe washu o lamulela Vhaisraele kha Vhaegipita, Vhaisraele vha tshi sedza vha vhona Vhaegipita vho rambalala vho fa khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe." 
Exodus14:31 Vhaisraele vho vhona mishumo mihulu ye Muṋe washu a ita a tshi lifhedza Vhaegipita, vhathu vha ofha Muṋe washu, vha fulufhela Muṋe washu, na Mushe muḓinḓa wawe." 
Exodus15:1 Ndi hone Mushe na vhana vha Israele vha tshi imba luimbo lwa u hulisa Muṋe washu vha ri, “Ndi ḓo imbela Muṋe washu, o ḓiputela nga vhugala, bere na munameli o zwi posa lwanzheni." 
Exodus15:2 Muṋe washu ndi Ene nungo dzanga, ndi Ene luimbo lwanga, ndi Ene o ntshidzaho. Ndi Ene Mudzimu wanga, ndi a mu renda; ndi Mudzimu wa khotsi anga, ndi a mu hulisa." 
Exodus15:3 Muṋe washu ndi Muhali; u pfi Yahavee. 
Exodus15:4 O posa gariki dza nndwa na mmbi ya Farao lwanzheni; vhanameli vhadzo, vhone vhomakone, vho nwela khothe Lwanzheni lwa Ṱhanga." 
Exodus15:5 Mativha o vha tibedza; vho ṋupela fhasi unga tombo. 
Exodus15:6 “Muṋe washu, tshanḓa tshau tshauḽa tshi na maanḓa a kanukisaho, Muṋe washu, tshanḓa tshau tshauḽa tshi pwashekanya swina." 
Exodus15:7 Vhugala hau ndi vhuhulu, u kuekanye maswina au; u bvisa mbiti dzau dza vha fhisa unga maṱanga." 
Exodus15:8 U tshi tou fumula ningo yau, maḓi a mbo ḓi imiswa a si tsha ela, magabelo a ima e tswi unga luvhondo, ngomu tshivhindini tsha lwanzhe mativha a rindila." 
Exodus15:9 “Swina ḽo ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vha tevhelela nda vha fara, ndi ḓo kovhekanya zwe nda thuba, nda ḓiphiṋa ngazwo; ndi ḓo angaladza pfumo, thundu dzavho dza vha dzanga.’" 
Exodus15:10 Wo fema luthihi fhedzi, lwanzhe lwa vha tibedza; vho ṋupela unga mutobvu maḓini a ofhisaho." 
Exodus15:11 “Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi ane a nga Iwe kha midzimu? Ndi nnyi a re na vhugala vhukhethwa unga Iwe? U ofhisa nga zwihulu zwine wa ita; vhukuma u ita zwimangadzo." 
Exodus15:12 Wo angaladza tshanḓa tshau tshauḽa, ḽifhasi ḽa vha mila!" 
Exodus15:13 Vhathu vhe wa vha vhofholola wo vha endedza nga lufuno lwau lu sa shanduki; u ḓo vha isa shangoni ḽau ḽikhethwa nga maanḓa au. 
Exodus15:14 Tshakha dzi tshi pfa zwenezwo, dzi a tetemela; Vhafilista vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Exodus15:15 Vhavhusi vha Edomo zwino vho hanganea, vhahulwane vha Muaba vha farwa nga mutetemelo, vhadzulapo vha Kanana vha kulea nungo." 
Exodus15:16 Vha ḓo farwa nga nyofho vha tshenuwa; vha ḓo rindila vha nga tombo nga maanḓa a tshanḓa tshau, Muṋe washu, vhathu vhau vha vhuya vha fhira – vhathu vhau vhe wa ḓiwanela." 
Exodus15:17 U ḓo vha ḓisa wa vha sima thavhani ine ya vha yau, fhethu he wa hu ita vhudzulo hau, Iwe Muṋe washu, hukhethwa ha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ho fhaṱwaho nga zwanḓa zwau." 
Exodus15:18 Muṋe washu u ḓo vha khosi lini na lini.” 
Exodus15:19 Bere dza Farao na gariki dzawe dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo, vhukuma vho dzhena lwanzheni, Muṋe washu a ita uri maḓi a lwanzhe a humele murahu a vha tibedze, hone Vhaisraele vha tshi wela lwanzhe vho tshimbila mavuni o omaho." 
Exodus15:20 Muporofita Miriamu, khaladzi a Aroni, a dzhia murumba, vhasadzi vhoṱhe vha mu tevhela vha tshi khou lidza mirumba, vha tshi khou tshina." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu a vha ranga phanḓa a tshi khou imba a tshi ri, “Imbelani Muṋe washu, o ḓiputela nga vhugala, o posa bere na munameli lwanzheni.”" 
Exodus15:22 Mushe a ri Vhaisraele vha takuwe Lwanzheni lwa Ṱhanga, vha livhe phangani ya Shuru, vha tshimbila vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu vha sa wani maḓi." 
Exodus15:23 Vha swika Mara, hone maḓi a henefho o vha a tshi kalakata lwe vha si kone u a nwa; ndi zwe fhethu afho ha pfi Mara (Makalakata)." 
Exodus15:24 Vhathu vha gungulela Mushe vha ri, “Ri ḓo nwa mini?”" 
Exodus15:25 Mushe a rabela Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a mu sumbedza luṅwe lutanda. Mushe a dzhia ulwo lutanda a lu posa maḓini ayo, maḓi a vho ḓifha. Henefho ndi he Muṋe washu a vha ṋea milayo uri vha tshile vha tshi i tevhedza, henefho ndi hone he a vha linga." 
Exodus15:26 Muṋe washu a ri, “Arali na thetshelesa ipfi ḽa Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu zwavhuḓi, na ita zwine nda vhona zwi zwone, na vhulunga ndaela dzanga na tevhedza pfanelo dzoṱhe dze nda vhea, a thi nga ni ḓiseli khombo dzi no nga dziḽa dze nda dzi ḓisela Vhaegipita, ngauri ndi Nṋe Yahavee ane nda ni fhodza.”" 
Exodus15:27 Vha swika Elimu, vha wana hu na zwisima zwa maḓi zwa fumi na zwivhili na miri ya mitshevho ya 70; henefho vha ṱoka mishasha yavho tsini ha maḓi." 
Exodus16:1 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha takuwa Elimu vha dovha vha fara lwendo, vha swika phangani ya Sini, vhukati ha Elimu na Sinai. Ḽo vha ḽi ḓuvha ḽa 15 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili tshee vha pfuluwa Egipita." 
Exodus16:2 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha thoma u gungulela Mushe na Aroni henefho phangani," 
Exodus16:3 vha vha vhudza vha ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu o ri vhulaha zwashu shangoni ḽa Egipita. Henengei ro vha ri tshi kona u dzula fhasi ra ḽa ṋama, ra ḽa zwiḽiwa ra fura! Zwino vho ri hwala vha ri ḓisa fhano phangani uri roṱhe ri fe nga nḓala!”" 
Exodus16:4 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Zwino ndi ḓo ni nisela zwiḽiwa zwi tshi bva ṱaḓulu. Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe vhathu vha fanela u bva vha kumbela zwo eḓanaho ḓuvha ḽithihi. Ndi funa u vha linga nga u rali uri ndi vhone arali vha tshi ḓo tevhedza mulayo wanga kana vha sa ḓo u tevhedza." 
Exodus16:5 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi musi vha tshi lugisa zwe vha vhuya nazwo, zwi eḓane maḓuvha mavhili.”" 
Exodus16:6 Mushe na Aroni vha vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ri, “Ṋamusi nga madekwana ni ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Muṋe washu we a ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus16:7 Nga matsheloni ni ḓo vhona vhugala ha Muṋe washu, ngauri o zwi pfa ni tshi mu gungulela. A ni gunguleli riṋe, hufha riṋe ri si tshithu!”" 
Exodus16:8 Mushe a ri, “Nga madekwana Muṋe washu u ḓo ni fha ṋama na ḽa, nga matsheloni u ḓo ni fha zwiḽiwa na ḽa na fura, ngauri Muṋe washu o zwi pfa ni tshi mu gungulela. A ni gunguleli riṋe, hufha riṋe ri si tshithu, ni khou gungulela Muṋe washu.”" 
Exodus16:9 Mushe a vhudza Aroni a ri, “Nga vha vhudze Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ri, ‘Sendelani tsini ha Muṋe washu; o ni pfa ni tshi gungula.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Musi Aroni a tshi khou amba na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele, vha lavhelesa phangani, kha gole ha vhonala lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu." 
Exodus16:11 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus16:12 “Ndo pfa u gungula ha Vhaisraele. Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Nga madekwana ni ḓo ḽa ṋama, nga matsheloni ni ḓo ḽa zwiḽiwa na fura. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Mudzimu-ḓe, Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Nangoho zwa ralo, madekwana eneo ha ḓa khwali dza tou ḓadza gammba, nga matsheloni ha wanala ho wa ṅwando wo mona na mishasha." 
Exodus16:14 Musi ṅwando u tshi fhufha, fhasi ha wanala hu na zwiṅwe zwithu zwitete zwi no nga luvhanda, zwi tshi nga mahaḓa." 
Exodus16:15 Vhaisraele vha tshi zwi vhona, vha si zwi ḓivhe, vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Ndi mini izwi?” Mushe a vha vhudza a ri, “Izwi ndi zwiḽiwa zwine Muṋe washu a ni ṋea uri ni ḽe." 
Exodus16:16 Ndaela ya Muṋe washu i ri: Muṅwe na muṅwe o fanela u dobela zwo eḓanaho, muthu muthihi a wane zwi no eḓana ḽitha mbili, zwi tshi ya nga mbalo ya vhathu vha re muṱani waṋu. Muṅwe na muṅwe a dobelele vha no dzula denndeni yawe.”" 
Exodus16:17 Vhaisraele vha ita zwenezwo. Vhaṅwe vha dobela zwinzhi, vhaṅwe vha dobela zwi si gathi." 
Exodus16:18 Huno vha tshi ela zwe vha dobela, munna we a dobela zwinzhi o vha a si na zwo kalulaho, munna we a dobela zwiṱuku o vha a si na zwiṱukusa. Muṅwe na muṅwe a wana ó dobela zwo mu eḓanaho." 
Exodus16:19 Mushe a vha vhudza a ri, “Hu songo vha na ane a zwi vhetshela matshelo.”" 
Exodus16:20 Hone vhaṅwe vha si thetshelese Mushe, zwiṅwe vha zwi vhetshela ḽa matshelo, zwa bva mbundudzi, zwa nukha u sina; Mushe a vha sinyutshela." 
Exodus16:21 Vha vho zwi dobela matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi dobela zwo mu eḓanaho. Musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi vho fhisa zwa ṋoka." 
Exodus16:22 Zwino nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi vha dobela izwo zwiḽiwa luvhili, zwa muthu muthihi zwa vha ḽitha nṋa. Vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha vhathu vha ḓa vha zwi vhudza Mushe," 
Exodus16:23 ene a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndaela ya Muṋe washu ngei: Matshelo ndi ḓuvha ḽa u awela tshoṱhe, ndi Sabatha khethwa ya Muṋe washu. Hadzingani zwine na funa u hadzinga, bikani zwine na funa u bika, zwoṱhe zwo salaho ni zwi vhetshele ḽa matshelo.”" 
Exodus16:24 Vhukuma vha zwi vhetshela ḽa matshelo, sa zwe Mushe a vha laya, zwa si nukhe u sina, na mbundudzi zwa si vhe nadzo." 
Exodus16:25 Mushe a ri, “Zwi ḽeni ṋamusi ngauri ṋamusi ndi Sabatha ya u hulisa Muṋe washu; ṋamusi ngei nnḓa a ni nga wani tshithu." 
Exodus16:26 Ni zwi dobele maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a ni nga wani tshithu, ndi Sabatha.”" 
Exodus16:27 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili vhaṅwe vha bva mishashani vha yo dobela, hone vha si wane tshithu." 
Exodus16:28 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ni ḓo hana u vhulunga ndaela dzanga na milayo yanga u swika lini?" 
Exodus16:29 Vhonani! Ndo ni vhetshela Sabatha, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi nda ni ṋea zwiḽiwa zwa maḓuvha mavhili ndi tshi itela zwenezwo; muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a dzule henefho hune a vha hone; nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili hu songo vha na ane a ṱuwa hayani hawe.”" 
Exodus16:30 Zwenezwo nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili vhathu vha litsha u shuma mishumo yavho yoṱhe. 
Exodus16:31 Vhathu vha Israele vha ri izwo zwiḽiwa zwi pfi mana (“Ndi zwithu-ḓe?”). Zwo vha zwi tshi nga mbeu ṱhukhu tshena, muthu a tshi ḽa zwi tshi nga tshimbundwa tsho itwaho nga ṋotshi." 
Exodus16:32 Mushe a ri, “Ndaela ya Muṋe washu ngei: Dzhiani ḽitha mbili dzazwo, ni zwi vhetshele vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu, uri vha vhone zwiḽiwa zwe nda ni fusha ngazwo phangani musi ndi tshi ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita.”" 
Exodus16:33 Mushe a vhudza Aroni a ri, “Kha vha dzhie mvuvhelo vha longe mana a ḽitha mbili vha vhee phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, a vhetshelwe vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu.”" 
Exodus16:34 Aroni a ita zwenezwo, a longa ḽitha mbili dza mana ngomu mvuvheloni, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe, a vhea mana phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga, uri a dzule henefho." 
Exodus16:35 Vhaisraele vha ḽa mana miṅwaha ya 40, vha vhuya vha swika shangoni ḽine ḽa dzulwa khaḽo; vho ḽa mana vha vhuya vha swika mukanoni wa shango ḽa Kanana." 
Exodus16:36 Ḽitha mbili ndi tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwa fumi zwa epha. 
Exodus17:1 Muṋe washu o laya vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele uri vha takuwe phangani ya Sinai. Vha enda vha tshi ṱoka mishasha vha vhuya vha i ṱoka Rafidimu. Hone henefho ho vha hu si na maḓi ane vhathu vha nga nwa. 
Exodus17:2 Vha gungulela Mushe vha ri, “Nga vha ri fhe maḓi a u nwa.” Mushe a ri, “Khezwi ni tshi nngungulela? Ndi mini ni tshi linga Muṋe washu?”" 
Exodus17:3 Vhathu vha tshi pfa vho oma mikulo nga ḓora vha gungulela Mushe vha ri, “Ndi mini vho ri pfulusa Egipita? Vho vha vha tshi itela uri riṋe na vhana vhashu na zwifuwo zwashu ri fe nga ḓora?”" 
Exodus17:4 Mushe a rabela Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhathu avha ndi ḓo vha ita hani? Vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi nkanḓa nga matombo!”" 
Exodus17:5 Muṋe washu a fhindula Mushe a ri, “Dzhia vhaṅwe vha vharangaphanḓa vha Israele u fhire navho phanḓa ha vhathu, u ṱuwe na luḽa lubaḓa lwe wa rwa ngalwo maḓi a Nile, u mbo ḓi ṱuwa." 
Exodus17:6 Ndi ḓo vha ndo ima phanḓa hau hafhaḽa nṱha ha tombo, thavhani ya Horebe. U rwe tombo, maḓi a ḓo gubunyea a tshi bva khaḽo uri vhathu vha nwe.” Mushe a mbo ita zwenezwo vhahulwane vha Israele vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Exodus17:7 Afho fhethu ho pfi Masa (Malingoni) na Miriba (Khanini) nga mulandu wa lugungulo lwa Vhaisraele na nge vha linga Muṋe washu vha tshi ri, “Muṋe washu u na riṋe kana ha na riṋe naa?”" 
Exodus17:8 Vhaamaleke vho ḓa vha lwa na Vhaisraele henefho Rafidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Mushe a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Ḓinangele vhanna, matshelo ni bve ni yo lwa na Vhaameleke. Zwenezwo nṋe ndi ḓo vha ndo ima muṱumbani wa tshikwara ndo fara lubaḓa lwa Mudzimu.”" 
Exodus17:9 Mushe a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Ḓinangele vhanna, matshelo ni bve ni yo lwa na Vhaameleke. Zwenezwo nṋe ndi ḓo vha ndo ima muṱumbani wa tshikwara ndo fara lubaḓa lwa Mudzimu.”" 
Exodus17:10 Joshua a ita zwe Mushe a mu vhudza, a bva a yo lwa na Vhaameleke, Mushe na Aroni na Huru vhó gonya muṱumba wa tshikwara." 
Exodus17:10 Joshua a ita zwe Mushe a mu vhudza, a bva a yo lwa na Vhaameleke, Mushe na Aroni na Huru vhó gonya muṱumba wa tshikwara." 
Exodus17:11 Hezwi Mushe o imisa zwanḓa zwawe, ho vha hu tshi kunda Vhaisraele, musi zwanḓa zwawe zwi tshi vhuela fhasi ha mbo kunda Vhaameleke." 
Exodus17:12 Hone zwanḓa zwa Mushe zwa neta, vha dzhia tombo vha ḽi vhea fhasi hawe, a dzula nṱha haḽo, Aroni na Huru vha tika zwanḓa zwawe, muṅwe o ima sia ḽino muṅwe o ima sia ḽiḽa; zwanḓa zwawe zwa khwaṱha ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela." 
Exodus17:13 Joshua a kunda Vhaameleke tshoṱhe. 
Exodus17:13 Joshua a kunda Vhaameleke tshoṱhe. 
Exodus17:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Hezwi zwine zwa khou itea zwi ṅwale buguni uri zwi si hangwiwe, u vhudze Joshua wo tou khwaṱhisa uri ndi ḓo lozwa Vhaameleke vha si tsha humbulwa fhano fhasi.”" 
Exodus17:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Hezwi zwine zwa khou itea zwi ṅwale buguni uri zwi si hangwiwe, u vhudze Joshua wo tou khwaṱhisa uri ndi ḓo lozwa Vhaameleke vha si tsha humbulwa fhano fhasi.”" 
Exodus17:15 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi fhaṱa aḽiṱari a ri i pfi “Muṋe washu ndi tshiphuga tshanga”," 
Exodus17:16 nge a ri, “Anani no fara khuluṋoni ya Muṋe washu! Muṋe washu u ḓo lwa na Vhaameleke nga mirafho na mirafho!”" 
Exodus18:1 Jethero tshifhe wa Midiani, khotsi a musadzi wa Mushe, a pfa zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu a itela Mushe na vhathu vha hawe vha Israele, na zwe Muṋe washu a pfulusa Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Exodus18:2 Mushe o vha o humisa Tsiphora musadzi wawe, Jethero khotsi a Tsiphora a dzula nae" 
Exodus18:3 na vhana vhawe vhavhili vha vhatuka. Muṅwe wa avho vhana o vha a tshi pfi Gerisoni nge Mushe a ri, “Ndi mutsinda shangoni ḽisili.”" 
Exodus18:4 Dzina ḽa muṅwe ḽo vha ḽi tshi pfi Eliasara nge a ri, “Mudzimu wa khotsi anga o mpfarisa a ntshidza nda si vhulawe nga Farao.”" 
Exodus18:5 Zwenezwo Jethero makhulu wa Mushe a ḓa na musadzi wa Mushe na vhana vhawe phangani he a ṱoka mushasha wawe, thavhani ya Mudzimu." 
Exodus18:6 Mushe a vhudzwa upfi, “Makhulu wavho Jethero ngevha, vho ḓa u vha dalela, vho ḓa na musadzi wavho na vhana vhawe vhavhili vha vhatuka.”" 
Exodus18:7 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi bva a yo ṱanganedza makhulu wawe, a gwadama a mu kuvhatedza vha vhudzisana mutakalo, vha konou dzhena denndeni." 
Exodus18:8 Mushe a vhudza makhulu wawe zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ita Farao na Vhaegipita, a tshi itela u tshidza Vhaisraele, na zwoṱhe zwi konḓaho zwe zwa itea nḓilani, na zwe Muṋe washu a vha lamulela." 
Exodus18:9 Jethero a takalela zwe Muṋe washu a itela Israele vhuthu a tshi vha lamukisa zwanḓani zwa Vhaegipita. 
Exodus18:10 Zwenezwo Jethero a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Yahavee we a ni tshidza kha Vhaegipita na kha Farao, o lamulela vhathu vhawe vhupulini ha Vhaegipita" 
Exodus18:11 musi vha tshi ni levhela. Zwino ndi vho zwi ḓivha uri Yahavee ndi muhulwane kha midzimu yoṱhe.” 
Exodus18:12 Ndi hone Jethero makhulu wa Mushe a tshi ṋekedza Mudzimu tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, na zwiṅwe zwiṱhavhelo. Aroni a ḓa na vhahulwane vha Israele vha ḽa vhoṱhe na makhulu wa Mushe phanḓa ha Mudzimu." 
Exodus18:13 Nga matshelo Mushe a ita mushumo wa u senga mafhungo a vhathu, vha kuvhangana khae u bva nga matsheloni u swika nga madekwana." 
Exodus18:14 Musi makhulu wa Mushe a tshi vhona mushumo u lemelaho une Mushe a ḓinetisa ngawo a tshi itela vhathu, a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi ḓinetisa nga u rali vha tshi itela vhathu? Khezwi vha tshi dzula afha vhe vhoṱhe vhathu vho kuvhangana u bva nga matsheloni u swika nga madekwana?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mushe a fhindula makhulu wawe a ri, “Ndi uri vhathu vha ḓa ha nṋe vha tshi vhudzisa zwine Mudzimu a zwi funa." 
Exodus18:16 Arali vha khakhelana vha ḓa ha nṋe, nṋe nda vha pfumedzanya nda vha funza ndaela dza Mudzimu na zwine a vha laya.”" 
Exodus18:17 Jethero a mu vhudza a ri, “Izwo a si zwone." 
Exodus18:18 Vha ḓo vhuya vha fhela nungo, ha ri vhone ha ri vhathu zwa fana. Mushumo hoyo u a lemelesa, vha nga si u kone vhe vhoṱhe." 
Exodus18:19 Nga vha thetshelese nyeletshedzo yanga, Mudzimu u ḓo vha navho. Vhone vho vha vho fanela vha tshi ambela vhathu ha Mudzimu vha swikisa mafhungo avho khae." 
Exodus18:20 Nga vha vha funze ndaela dza Mudzimu na zwine a vha laya; nga vha vha funze kutshilele na zwine vha fanela u zwi ita. 
Exodus18:21 Huno kha vhathu havha nga vha nange vhanna vhane vha kona, vhane vha ofha Mudzimu, vha fulufhedzeaho, vha sa pfani na zwa tshanḓanguvhoni, vha vha vhee uri vha vhe vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu: vharangaphanḓa vha no langa tshigidi, vha ḓana, vha mahumi maṱanu, vha fumi." 
Exodus18:22 Nga vha ite uri vhathu avho vha shumele vhathu vha tshi vha sengisela mafhungo avho tshifhinga tshoṱhe. Milandu i konḓaho vha nga i ḓisa kha vhone, hone milandu miṱuku vha nga i dzudzanya vhone vhaṋe, u ralo ha vha u vha leludzela zwithu na u ṱhaḓulana muhwalo na vhone." 
Exodus18:23 Arali vha ita nga u ralo, vha tshi tevhedza zwine Mudzimu a vha laya, vha nga si nete, vhathu vhoṱhe havha vha ḓo ya mahayani avho vho fushea.”" 
Exodus18:24 Mushe a thetshelesa nyeletshedzo ya makhulu wawe a ita zwe vha mu vhudza," 
Exodus18:25 a nanga vhanna vha konaho kha Vhaisraele a vha vhea uri vha lange vhathu; vharangaphanḓa vha tshigidi, vha ḓana, vha mahumi maṱanu, na vha fumi." 
Exodus18:26 Vha shumela vhathu vha tshi vha pfumedzanya tshifhinga tshoṱhe. Milandu i konḓaho vha i ḓisa ha Mushe, milandu miṱuku vha i haṱula vhone vhaṋe." 
Exodus18:27 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi tendela makhulu wawe uri vha ṱuwe, vha humela shangoni ḽa havho." 
Exodus19:1 Vhaisraele vho ri u fhedza miṅwedzi miraru yo ḓalaho vho pfuluwa shangoni ḽa Egipita vha swika phangani ya Sinai. 
Exodus19:2 Vha ṱuwa Rafidimu vha dovha vha fara lwendo, vha tshi swika phangani ya Sinai vha ṱoka mishasha yavho henefho phangani u livhana na thavha." 
Exodus19:3 Mushe zwenezwo a takuwa a gonya ha Mudzimu, Muṋe washu a mu vhidza e thavhani a ri, “Hezwi zwi vhudze vha nnḓu ya Jakopo, vhana vha Israele, u ri," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Inwi vhaṋe no vhona zwe nda ita Vhaegipita, na zwe nda ni hwala zwa nga ndo tou ni takula nga phapha dza goni nda ni ḓisa ha Nṋe muṋe." 
Exodus19:5 Ndi zwone, arali na thetshelesa ipfi ḽanga na nambatela mulanga wanga, ni ḓo vha lushaka lwanga vhukuma lwe nda lu nanga kha tshakha dzoṱhe, ngauri ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ndi ḽanga." 
Exodus19:6 Ndi ḓo ni ita lushaka lwa vhotshifhe vha nnduvhaho, na vha lushaka lwo sumelwaho Nṋe.’ Hayo ndi one maipfi ane wa fanela u vhudza Vhaisraele.”" 
Exodus19:7 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi ṱuwa, a vhidzisa vhahulwane vha vhathu, a vha vhudza zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ri zwi itwe." 
Exodus19:8 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindula nga ipfi ḽithihi vha ri, “Zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a amba, ri ḓo zwi ita.” Mushe a swikisa phindulo ya vhathu ha Muṋe washu." 
Exodus19:9 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ndi khou ḓa ha iwe ndo fuka gole ḽidenya uri vhathu vha zwi pfe ndi tshi amba na iwe, vha kone u dzula vha tshi u fulufhedza misi yoṱhe i ḓaho.” Mushe a swikisa phindulo ya vhathu ha Muṋe washu." 
Exodus19:10 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Iya kha vhathu u vha vhudze uri vha ḓikumulule, vha vhe vha tshi ḓilugisa ṋamusi na matshelo. Vha vhudze vha kuvhe zwiambaro zwavho," 
Exodus19:11 vha ḓilugisele mbamatshelo, ngauri nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ndi ḓo tsela thavhani ya Sinai vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Exodus19:12 U vhee mukano u mona na thavha, u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Ni vhone ni sa ḓo gonya thavha, kana na kwama tsinde ḽayo. Ane a vhuya a kwama iyo thavha tshawe ndi u vhulawa." 
Exodus19:13 Hu songo vha na ane a mu vhea tshanḓa, o fanela u tou kanḓwa nga matombo kana a pfulwa nga musevhe, a nga vha e muthu kana tshifuwo, a songo vhuya a litshwa a tshila.’ Musi phalaphala i tshi lila hu ḓo gonya vhenevho vho tiwaho.”" 
Exodus19:14 Mushe a tsela kha vhathu a tshi bva thavhani, a vha vhudza uri vha ḓikumulule, vha kuvhe zwiambaro zwavho." 
Exodus19:15 Zwenezwo Mushe a vhudza vhathu a ri, “Ḓilugiseleni ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru, ni songo dzhenisana nḓuni.”" 
Exodus19:16 Zwino ḽi tshi tsha nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ha pfala mibvumo thavhani, ha vhonala lupenyo na gole ḽidenya, ha pfala phalaphala i tshi lila, ngomu mishashani vhathu vhoṱhe vha tetemela." 
Exodus19:17 Zwenezwo Mushe a endedza vhathu vha bva mishashani vha yo ṱangana na Mudzimu, vha ima tsindeni ḽa thavha." 
Exodus19:18 Thavha ya Sinai yoṱhe yo vha yo pilwa nga buluvhutsi, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o tsela khayo e ngomu ha mulilo. Iḽo buluvhutsi ḽa duba unga vhutsi vhu bvaho kha ṋanḓo, thavha yoṱhe ya dzinginyea lu ofhisaho." 
Exodus19:19 Mubvumo wa phalaphala wa ḓi hula u tshi ya. Mushe a amba, Mudzimu a mu fhindula nga mubvumo." 
Exodus19:20 Muṋe washu o vha o tsela kha thavha ya Sinai, a ima muṱumbani wa thavha. Muṋe washu a vhidza Mushe uri a ḓe muṱumbani wa thavha, Mushe a gonya a ya." 
Exodus19:21 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Tsela fhasi u vhudze vhathu vha si pfuke mukano we vha vhetshelwa vha tshi ri vha ḓa u vhona Yahavee; vha zwi ita hu ḓo fa vhanzhi vhavho." 
Exodus19:22 Vhotshifhe, vhanna vhane vha swika tsini hanga, na vhenevho vho fanela u ḓikumulula, ndi sa ḓo vha vhulaha.”" 
Exodus19:23 Mushe a fhindula Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhathu vha nga si kone u gonya thavha ya Sinai, hufha wo ri kaidza Iwe muṋe zwiḽa u tshi ri, ‘Vhea mukano u mona na thavha, hu itwe fhethu hukhethwa.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Tsela fhasi u yo dzhia Aroni u dovhe u gonye nae ngeno. Hone u songo tendela vhotshifhe kana vhathu vha tshi pfuka mukano vha gonyela ngeno hanga, ndi sa ḓo vha lozwa.”" 
Exodus19:25 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi tsela kha vhathu a amba navho. 
Exodus20:1 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi vhea milayo hei yoṱhe a ri," 
Exodus20:2 “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau we a u pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita he wa vha u phuli. 
Exodus20:3 “U songo vha na miṅwe midzimu, Mudzimu wau ndi Nṋe ndi ndoṱhe." 
Exodus20:4 “U songo ḓifulela mudzimu kana wa ita tshifanyiso na tshithihi tsha zwi re ngei ṱaḓulu kana fhano fhasi kana tshi re maḓini fhasi ha mavu," 
Exodus20:5 wa tshi gwadamela wa tshi rerelela; Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau ndi Mudzimu a sa vhangiswi, ndi vhila mulandu wa khotsi kha vhana na vhaḓuhulu, u swika kha murafho wa vhuraru na wa vhuṋa wa vhane vha mmbenga;" 
Exodus20:6 ndi tonda mirafho ya zwigidi na zwigidi ya vhane vha mpfuna vha tevhedza ndaela dzanga. 
Exodus20:7 “U songo tamba nga dzina ḽa Yahavee Mudzimu wau, ngauri Yahavee a nga si litshe u lifhedza ane a tamba nga dzina ḽawe." 
Exodus20:8 “Elelwa ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha u ḽi ite ḽikhethwa. 
Exodus20:9 U shume maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, u khunyeledze mishumo yau yoṱhe," 
Exodus20:10 hone ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ndi ḓuvha ḽa Yahavee Mudzimu wau, ndi ḽa u awela. U songo shuma tshithu nga ḓuvha heḽo, iwe na ṅwana wau wa mutuka na wa musidzana na vhashumi vhau vha vhanna kana vha vhasadzi, na zwifuwo zwau na mutsinda ane wa dzula nae." 
Exodus20:11 Ndi uri Yahavee o ita ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na lwanzhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo nga maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, nga ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a awela, ndi zwe Yahavee a shudufhadza ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha a ḽi ita ḽikhethwa." 
Exodus20:12 “Hulisa khotsi au na mme au uri u lalame shangoni ḽine Yahavee Mudzimu wau au ṋea ḽone. 
Exodus20:13 “U songo vhulaha muthu. 
Exodus20:14 “U songo ita vhupombwe. 
Exodus20:15 “U songo tswa. 
Exodus20:16 “U songo vhaisa muṅwe nga u ṱanzilela mazwifhi. 
Exodus20:17 “U songo emula nnḓu ya muṅwe. U songo emula musadzi wa muṅwe, kana mushumi wawe wa munna kana wa musadzi, kana kholomo yawe, kana donngi yawe, kana tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi re tsha muṅwe.”" 
Exodus20:18 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha tetemela nga nyofho vha tshi pfa mibvumo, vha tshi vhona lupenyo, vha tshi pfa phalaphala i tshi lila, vha tshi vhona thavha i dubaho buluvhutsi, vha ima kule." 
Exodus20:19 Vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “Vhone vhaṋe nga vha ambe na riṋe, ri ḓo thetshelesa, hone Mudzimu Ene a songo amba na riṋe, ri nga fa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mushe a fhindula vhathu a ri, “Ni songo ofha tshithu, Mudzimu o ḓa u ni linga, uri ni dzule ni tshi mu ofha, ni si tshinye.”" 
Exodus20:21 Zwenezwo vhathu vha ima kule, Mushe a sendela tsini ha gole ḽitswu ḽe Mudzimu a vha e khaḽo." 
Exodus20:22 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Vhudza Vhaisraele u ri, ‘Inwi vhaṋe no zwi vhona uri ndo amba na inwi ndi ṱaḓulu." 
Exodus20:23 Ni songo fula midzimu ya siliva, na midzimu ya musuku ni songo i ita, luvhani Nṋe ndi ndoṱhe." 
Exodus20:24 “ ‘Ni fanela u mphaṱela aḽiṱari ya mavu, ni nṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho khayo na zwiṱhavhelo zwa u konana na Mudzimu zwi tshi bva kha masambi aṋu a nngu kana a kholomo. Hoṱhe hune nda ḓo ita uri dzina ḽanga ḽi humbulwe ndi ḓo ḓa ha inwi nda ni shudufhadza." 
Exodus20:25 Arali na mphaṱela aḽiṱari ya matombo, ni songo i fhaṱa nga matombo o vhaḓwaho ngauri arali na a vhaḓa nga tshezela, ni a a kumadza." 
Exodus20:26 Ni songo gonya aḽiṱari yanga nga zwiṱepisi, ni sa ḓo vhonelwa.’" 
Exodus21:1 “Milayo ine wa fanela u vhudza Vhaisraele ngei: 
Exodus21:2 “Arali i tshi renga phuli ya Muheberu, i shume i fhedze miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi. Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a nga ḓi ḓiṱutshela zwawe, nga a vhofhololwe, a songo lifha tshithu." 
Exodus21:3 Arali o ḓa a sa athu dzea, a ṱuwe a si na musadzi. Arali o ḓa o no dzea, a ṱuwe na musadzi wawe." 
Exodus21:4 Arali muṋe wawe a mu ṋea musadzi, uyo musadzi a mu bebela vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhazidzana, musadzi na vhana vha ḓo vha vha muṋe wawe, uyo munna a ṱuwe e eṱhe." 
Exodus21:5 Hone arali phuli ya ḓivhadza ya ri, ‘Ndi funa muṋe wanga na musadzi wanga na vhana vhanga, a thi funi u vhofhololwa,’" 
Exodus21:6 zwenezwo muṋe wawe a ye a ime nae phanḓa ha Mudzimu, a mu endedze tsini ha vothi kana muhangammbwa. Muṋe wawe a mu phule nḓevhe nga luunzhi. Ndi hone a tshi ḓo konou vha phuli yawe vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
Exodus21:7 “Arali munna a rengisa ṅwana wawe wa musidzana a vha phuli, ha dovhi a vhofholowa unga phuli dza vhanna." 
Exodus21:8 Arali a sa takadzi muṋe wawe ane a tama u mu dzea uri a vhe musadzi wawe, izwo o fanela u dovha a rengululwa nga khotsi awe, muṋe wawe ha na pfanelo ya u mu rengisela vhatsinda, ngauri o mu shandukela." 
Exodus21:9 “Arali munna a renga phuli uri i vhe musadzi wa ṅwana wawe wa mutuka, o fanela u mu fara unga ṅwana wawe wa musidzana." 
Exodus21:10 “Arali munna a dzea musadzi wa vhuvhili, o fanela u ḓi ṋea musadzi wawe wa u ranga zwiḽiwa na zwiambaro a mu dzhenisa nḓuni unga kale." 
Exodus21:11 Arali a mu fhura kha hezwo zwithu zwiraru, a nga ḓi ḓiṱutshela, o vhofholowa ha si lifhiwe tshithu." 
Exodus21:12 “Ane a huvhadza muthu a mu vhulaha, na ene o fanela u fa." 
Exodus21:13 Arali a songo tou mu vhulaha nga khole, e Mudzimu we a mu kumedza zwanḓani zwawe, izwo ndi ḓo ni nangela hune muvhulahi a nga shavhela hone." 
Exodus21:14 Hone arali muthu a luka vhunwa a vhulaha muṅwe nga khole, nangwe e aḽiṱarini yanga mu bviseni a vhulawe." 
Exodus21:15 “Ane a vhuya a rwa khotsi awe kana mme awe, u a vhulawa." 
Exodus21:16 “Ane a tswa muthu a ṱuwa nae a yo mu rengisa kana a wanala e nae, o fanela u vhulawa." 
Exodus21:17 “Ane a teketela khotsi awe kana mme awe o fanela u vhulawa. 
Exodus21:18 “Arali vhathu vha lwa, muṅwe a rwa muṅwe nga tombo kana nga vili lune uyo muthu naho a songo fa, a lala thovhoni," 
Exodus21:19 uyo we a mu rwa a nga si vhe na mulandu arali uyo o rwiwaho a vuwa thovhoni a kona u tshimbila-tshimbila, nangwe a tshi tou gogoḓela nga mugo. Naho zwo ralo uyo we a mu rwa o fanela u lifha zwe a ita uri a si kone u ḓishumela, a dovha a mu onga a vhuya a fhola tshoṱhe." 
Exodus21:20 “Arali muthu a rwa phuli yawe ya munna kana ya musadzi nga thanda, iyo phuli ya fela henefho, o fanela u lifhedzwa." 
Exodus21:21 Hone arali iyo phuli ya tshila ya fhedza ḓuvha ḽithihi kana mavhili, muṋe wayo a songo lifhedzwa ngauri iyo phuli ndi yawe o i renga." 
Exodus21:22 “Arali vhanna vha ri vha tshi lwa vha huvhadza musadzi o vhifhaho muvhilini a tshinyalelwa, naho a songo huvhala tshoṱhe, munna o mu huvhadzaho o fanela u bvisa mulifho une wa ṱoḓiwa nga muṋe wa musadzi, a u bvise zwó no tendelwa nga khoro." 
Exodus21:23 Hone arali uyo musadzi a fa, vhutshilo ho fanela u lifhiwa nga vhutshilo," 
Exodus21:24 ḽiṱo ḽi lifhiwe nga ḽiṱo, ḽiṋo ḽi lifhiwe nga ḽiṋo, tshanḓa nga tshanḓa, lwayo nga lwayo," 
Exodus21:25 u fhisa nga u fhiswa, mbonzhe nga mbonzhe, u zwimba nga u zwimba." 
Exodus21:26 “Arali muthu a rwa ḽiṱo ḽa phuli yawe ya munna kana ya musadzi, ḽa si tsha vhona, u fanela u mu vhofholola ya vha yone ndifho ya iḽo ḽiṱo." 
Exodus21:27 Arali a kula ḽiṋo ḽa phuli yawe ya munna kana ya musadzi, o fanela u mu vhofholola wa vha wone mulifho wa iḽo ḽiṋo." 
Exodus21:28 “Arali kholomo ya runga munna kana musadzi ya mu vhulaha, iyo kholomo yo fanela u kanḓwa nga matombo. Ṋama yayo i songo ḽiwa, hone muṋe wa iyo kholomo ha nga vhi na mulandu." 
Exodus21:29 Hone arali iyo kholomo yo vha i tshi ḓi runga vhathu, muṋe wayo a vhudzwa a si i lange, zwenezwo arali kholomo yeneyo ya vhulaha munna kana musadzi, yeneyo kholomo yo fanela u kanḓwa nga matombo, muṋe wayo a vhulawa." 
Exodus21:30 Arali a pfi a bvise tshipfumelo, o fanela u bvisa tshenetsho tshine ha pfi a pfumelwe ngatsho, uri a konou vhofhololwa." 
Exodus21:31 Arali kholomo ya runga mutukana kana musidzana, muṋe wayo u fanela u lifha hu tshi tevhedzwa mulayo wonoyo." 
Exodus21:32 Arali kholomo ya runga phuli ya munna kana ya musadzi, muṋe wayo o fanela u lifhela muṋe wa phuli nga mangwende a 30 a siliva, iyo kholomo i kanḓwe nga matombo." 
Exodus21:33 “Arali muthu a litsha dindi ḽi songo thivhiwa kana a bwa dindi a si ḽi thivhe, ha wela kholomo kana donngi ngomu haḽo," 
Exodus21:34 zwenezwo muṋe wa mulindi o fanela u lifha tshinyalelo, o fanela u bvisa tshelede a lifhele muṋe wa itsho tshifuwo, itsho tshifuwo tsho faho tsha vha tshawe." 
Exodus21:35 Arali kholomo ya muṅwe ya huvhadza ya muṅwe ya fa, muṋe wa iyo kholomo i tshilaho o fanela u i rengisa avho vhavhili vha kovhekana tshelede, vha dovha vha kovhekana na iyo kholomo yo faho." 
Exodus21:36 Huno arali zwi tshi ḓivhea uri iyo kholomo yo vha i tshi ḓi runga dziṅwe, muṋe wayo a si i lange, muṋe wayo o fanela u lifha kholomo nga kholomo, itsho tshifuwo tsho faho tsha vha tshawe." 
Exodus22:1 “Arali muthu a tswa kholomo kana nngu a i ṱhavha kana a i rengisa, o fanela u lifha kholomo nthihi nga kholomo ṱhanu, nngu nthihi a i lifhe nga nngu nṋa." 
Exodus22:2 “Arali ha farwa fobvu ḽi tshi khou pwasha nnḓu ḽa fa, uyo murwi ha na mulandu wa u shulula malofha." 
Exodus22:3 Hone arali zwa itea ḽo no tsha, murwi u ḓo vha na mulandu wa u shulula malofha. Fobvu vhukuma ḽo fanela u lifha, hone arali a si na tshithu, o fanela u rengiswa u vhe wone mulifho wa vhufobvu." 
Exodus22:4 Arali tshifuwo tsho tswiwaho tsha wanala tshi tshi kha ḓi tshila e natsho, i nga vha i kholomo kana donngi kana nngu, o fanela u zwi lifha kavhili." 
Exodus22:5 “Arali muthu a fulisa zwifuwo zwawe pfuloni kana tsimuni ya minḓirivhe, a litsha zwifuwo zwawe zwi tshi fula tsimuni ya muṅwe, o fanela u lifha nga zwavhuḓi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe zwi bvaho tsimuni yawe." 
Exodus22:6 “Arali muthu a funga mulilo tsimuni yawe, wa fhisa tsheṋe wa pfukela tsimuni ya muṅwe, wa fhisa mavhele ane a khou mela kana o remiwaho a khokhiwa kana tsimu yoṱhe, uyo o fungaho mulilo o fanela u lifha iyo tshinyalelo." 
Exodus22:7 “Arali muthu a tenda u farela muṅwe tshelede kana thundu, izwo zwithu zwa tswiwa nḓuni yawe, arali iḽo fobvu ḽa wanala, ḽo fanela u lifha izwo zwithu kavhili." 
Exodus22:8 Huno arali fobvu ḽa si wanale, uyo munna we a vha o vhulunga idzo thundu dza mutengo muhulu, o fanela u anela Mudzimu uri ho ngo tswa thundu dza khonani yawe." 
Exodus22:9 Kha milandu ine vhathu vhavhili vha lwela tshithu tsho xelaho muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ri ndi tshawe, kana ndi kholomo kana donngi kana mbudzi kana nguvho, vha fanela u isa mafhungo ha Mudzimu. Ane Mudzimu a sumba uri a si yawe, o fanela u lifha kavhili." 
Exodus22:10 “Arali muthu a tenda u swiswiwa donngi ya muṅwe kana kholomo kana nngu kana tshiṅwe tshifuwo, itsho tshifuwo tsha fa kana tsha huvhala kana tsha thubiwa, ha si vhe na ṱhanzi," 
Exodus22:11 uyo munna nga a anele Muṋe washu uri ho ngo tswa tshifuwo tsha muṅwe. Arali itsho tshifuwo tshi songo tswiwa, muṋe watsho o fanela u tenda uri ndi tshinyalelo, uyo munna a si mu lifhele." 
Exodus22:12 Hone arali itsho tshifuwo tsho tswiwa, uyo munna o fanela u lifhela muṋe watsho." 
Exodus22:13 “Arali tsho pondiwa nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka, uyo munna o fanela u ḓisa miraḓo yatsho yo salaho vhu vhe vhuṱanzi, ho ngo fanela u lifha." 
Exodus22:14 “Arali munna a pamba tshifuwo kha muṅwe, tsha swika tsha huvhala kana tsha fa muṋe watsho a siho tsini, uyo munna o fanela u tshi lifha." 
Exodus22:15 Hone arali izwo zwa itea muṋe watsho e henefho, uyo munna ho ngo fanela u lifha. Arali muṋe watsho o tou tshi swiswa, tshinyalelo i ḓo vha yo lifhiwa nga wonoyo mutengo wa u tshi hirisa." 
Exodus22:16 “Arali munna a ṱonḓola musidzana a songo malwaho, o fanela u mu mala a mu vhinge." 
Exodus22:17 Hone arali khotsi a uyo musidzana a hana uyo munna a tshi mu vhinga, o fanela u mu lifha nga tshelede i no eḓana na ya u mala musidzana a sa athu dzheniswa nḓuni nga munna." 
Exodus22:18 “Musadzi ane a ita zwa manditi ni songo mu litsha a tshila. 
Exodus22:19 “Munna ufhio na ufhio ane a lala na tshifuwo nga a vhulawe. 
Exodus22:20 “Ane a vhuya a ṋekedza miṅwe midzimu tshiṱhavhelo arali e si Nṋe Yahavee, nga a lozwiwe." 
Exodus22:21 “U songo tambudza mutsinda kana wa mu konḓisela vhutshilo, elelwa uri na iwe wo vha u mutsinda Egipita." 
Exodus22:22 U songo tambudza tshilikadzi kana tsiwana. 
Exodus22:23 Arali wa zwi ita, Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo vha fhindula musi vha tshi mmbidzelela," 
Exodus22:24 nda sinyuwa nda ni vhulaha nndwani; vhasadzi vhaṋu vha ḓo sala vhe tshilikadzi, vhana vhaṋu vha sala vha si na vhokhotsi." 
Exodus22:25 “Arali vhathu vhanga vha re vhashai wa vha adzima tshelede, u songo ita unga vhaadzimisi vha tshelede, wa ri i tshi vhuya i vhuye na mavhoḓa." 
Exodus22:26 Arali wa fara nguvho ya muṅwe u tshi itela uri a lifhe mulandu wau, u fanela u i humisela khae ḽi sa athu kovhela," 
Exodus22:27 ngauri ndi lwone lupila lune a vha nalwo fhedzi lwa u mu dudedza. U ḓo lala o fukani? Musi a tshi nṱavhela mukosi uri ndi mu farise, ndi ḓo mu fhindula ngauri ndi na tshilidzi." 
Exodus22:28 “U songo teketela Mudzimu, na murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vha haṋu u songo mu teketela." 
Exodus22:29 “Nṋekedze nduvho i no bva kha mavhele au na waini yau na mapfura a muolivi nga tshifhinga tshazwo. Nkumedze tanzhe ḽau ḽa mutuka. 
Exodus22:30 Mphe na zwiranzhe zwa kholomo dzau na nngu dzau. Matanzhe a zwiduna nga zwi dzule na vhomme azwo maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru ni zwi ṋekedze Nṋe." 
Exodus22:31 “Inwi ni vhathu vhanga, zwenezwo ni songo ḽa ṋama ya phukha ifhio na ifhio yo vhulawaho nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka, yeneyo i fheni dzimmbwa." 
Exodus23:1 “U songo isa phungo, u songo tikedza muthu a re na mulandu nga u ṱanzilela mazwifhi." 
Exodus23:2 U songo tevhela vhunzhi ha vhathu musi vha tshi khakha kana musi vha tshi ṱanzilela zwi piringedzaho khaṱhulo mbuya. 
Exodus23:3 Na mushai arali e na mulandu u songo mu imelela tsengoni. 
Exodus23:4 “Arali wa vhona kholomo kana donngi ya swina ḽau yo xela, i humisele khae." 
Exodus23:5 Arali donngi yawe yo wiswa nga muhwalo, mu farise a vuse iyo donngi; u songo sokou fhira." 
Exodus23:6 “U songo kundisa mushai u wana khaṱhulo mbuya tsengoni. 
Exodus23:7 U songo pomoka muthu nga zwithu zwi siho, nahone muthu a si na mulandu a songo vhulawa, ngauri ane a vhuya a ita vhuvhi ho raloho ndi ḓo mu haṱulela u laṱwa." 
Exodus23:8 U songo ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni, ngauri tshanḓanguvhoni tshi pofulisa vhathu vha si tsha vhona zwi re zwone, zwa vhaisa vha si na mulandu." 
Exodus23:9 “U songo tambudza mutsinda; u a zwi ḓivha uri mutsinda u ḓipfa o tou ita hani, ngauri na iwe wo vha u mutsinda Egipita." 
Exodus23:10 “Lima tsimu yau u ite miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi, u kaṋe zwe ya zwi bveledza." 
Exodus23:11 Hone nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili i litshe i lale, u songo vhuya wa kaṋa tshi melaho khayo. Vhashai vha ḓo ḽa zwi melaho henefho, phukha dza ḓaka dza wana zwo salaho. Na tsimu yau ya minḓirivhe na miri ya miolivi u songo i kaṋa nga ṅwaha wonoyo." 
Exodus23:12 “U shume maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi nga vhege, hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili u songo shuma, uri kholomo dzau na donngi dzi awele, na phuli dzau na vhatsinda vha netuluwe." 
Exodus23:13 “Thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwe Nṋe Yahavee nda u vhudza. U songo rabela midzimu miṅwe; na madzina ayo u songo vhuya wa bula. 
Exodus23:14 “Ita vhuṱambo vhuraru nga ṅwaha u tshi itela u nkhulisa. 
Exodus23:15 “Nga ṅwedzi wa Avivi, ṅwedzi we wa pfuluwa ngawo Egipita, u ite vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa nga maitele e nda u laya. U songo ḽa vhurotho ho vangwaho mbilisa maḓuvha eneo maṱanu na mavhili a vhuṱambo uho. U songo vhuya wa ḓa wa nnduvha ú songo fara nduvho." 
Exodus23:16 “Ita na vhuṱambo ha Khaṋo, vhuṱambo ha zwiranzhe zwa zwe wa lima masimuni au, na vhuṱambo ha Mavhuyahaya, mafheloni a ṅwaha musi u tshi kuvhanganya zwe wa kaṋa masimuni." 
Exodus23:17 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Vhaisraele vho fanela u ḓa vha luvha Nṋe Muṋe wazwo Yahavee kararu nga ṅwaha. 
Exodus23:18 “U tshi nṋekedza malofha a tshiṱhavhelo, u songo ṋekedza na vhurotho vhu re na mbilisa, nahone mapfura a tshiṱhavhelo tshine wa ṋekedza u songo a vhea u swika nga matshelo." 
Exodus23:19 “U nange zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe zwa zwiranzhe zwa zwe wa kaṋa masimuni au u zwi ḓise nḓuni ya Yahavee Mudzimu wau. “U songo bika ngwana kana mbudzana nga mukhaha wa mme ayo. 
Exodus23:20 “Ndi ḓo ruma muruṅwa a u ranga phanḓa a u tsireledza musi wo fara lwendo, a u endedza a u isa fhethu he nda u lugisela." 
Exodus23:21 U mu thetshelese, u ite zwine a u vhudza. U songo mu vutshela, o ruṅwa nga Nṋe, a nga si u hangwele vhushandukwa honoho." 
Exodus23:22 Hone arali wa mu thetshelesa, wa ita zwoṱhe zwine a u laya, Nṋe ndi ḓo lwa na maswina au oṱhe; vha lwaho na iwe vha lwa na Nṋe." 
Exodus23:23 Muruṅwa wanga u ḓo u ranga phanḓa, a u swikisa shangoni ḽa Vhaamori na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vhakanana na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi, Nṋe ndi ḓo vha lozwa." 
Exodus23:24 U songo gwadamela midzimu yavho kana wa i luvha, nahone u songo edzisa zwa vhurereleli havho. U lozwe midzimu yavho, u pwashekanye phuphu dzavho dza matombo." 
Exodus23:25 Arali wa luvha Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau, ndi ḓo u shudufhadza nga zwiḽiwa na maḓi nda fhodza malwadze au oṱhe." 
Exodus23:26 Shangoni ḽa hau a hu nga vhi na musadzi ane a tshinyalelwa kana a vha muumba. Ndi ḓo ita uri u lalame. 
Exodus23:27 “Ndi ḓo ita uri vhathu vhane vha lwa na iwe vha nnyofhe. Vhathu vhane wa lwa navho ndi ḓo vha fhiriṱanya, nda ita uri maswina au oṱhe a rembuluwe a u shavhe." 
Exodus23:28 U ḓo ri u tshi sendela nda ruma mabu a thatha Vhahivi na Vhakanana na Vhahithi. 
Exodus23:29 A thi nga vha thathi nga ṅwaha muthihi; arali nda ralo shango ḽi nga ḓo sala ḽi si na muthu, wa ḓo wana zwivhanda zwo ḓalesa." 
Exodus23:30 Tshine nda ḓo ita ndi u vha thatha nga zwiṱuku nga zwiṱuku, na vhuya na anda na dzhia shango." 
Exodus23:31 Mikano ya shango ḽau ndi ḓo i vhea ya guma nga Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga na lwanzhe lwa Vhafilista na phanga na mulambo wa Yufuratha. Ndi ḓo kumedza vhadzulapo vha iḽo shango zwanḓani zwau, wa vha pandela vha u shavha." 
Exodus23:32 U songo vhofha mulanga navho kana midzimu yavho. 
Exodus23:33 Vha songo dzula shangoni ḽau, vha sa ḓo u fhura wa nkhakhela. U nga ḓo luvha midzimu yavho, wa vha wo ḓifasha nga tshikwekwe.”" 
Exodus24:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Iya u dzhie Aroni na Nadaba na Abihu, na vhahulwane vha 70 vha Israele, ni gonye ngeno ha Nṋe, ni gwadame ni luvhe ni tshee kule." 
Exodus24:2 Iwe Mushe u woṱhe u swike tsini hanga; vhaṅwe vha songo sendela, na lushaka lwoṱhe lu songo sendela.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mushe a ṱuwa a vhudza vhathu zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhudza na zwe a mu laya. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindula nga ipfi ḽithihi vha ri, “Ri ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a amba.”" 
Exodus24:4 Zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a amba, Mushe a tou zwi ṅwala, ḽi tshi tou tsha nga matshelo a fhaṱa aḽiṱari tsindeni ḽa thavha, a imisa matombo a 12, ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽo imela tsinde ḽithihi ḽa matsinde a 12 a Vhaisraele."
