Exodus24:5 Zwenezwo a vhudza vhaṱhannga vhaṅwe vha Israele uri vha ṋekedze Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na zwa dzimbohwana zwa vha zwa u konana na Mudzimu. 
Exodus24:6 Mushe a dzhia hafu ya malofha a gonya nao a a shela masambeloni, maṅwe o salaho a a shela kha aḽiṱari." 
Exodus24:7 A dzhia Bugu ya Mulanga a i vhalela vhathu vho thetshelesa, vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri ḓo thetshelesa Muṋe washu ra ita zwoṱhe zwe a ri laya.”" 
Exodus24:8 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi dzhia malofha a handulula vhathu ngao, a ri, “Haya ndi malofha a u khwaṱhisa mulanga we Muṋe washu a vhofha na inwi, wo fara milayo yoṱhe heyo.”" 
Exodus24:9 Mushe a gonya na Aroni na Nadaba na Abihu na vhahulwane vha Israele vha 70. 
Exodus24:10 Vha vhona Mudzimu wa Israele, fhasi ha ṋayo dzawe ho vha hu na zwine zwa nga luvhanḓe lwa safire, lwa muvhala wa denga u no fana na lutombo." 
Exodus24:11 Mudzimu ho ngo vhuya a vhaisa vhaḓivhalea avho vha Israele; vho sokou vhona Mudzimu, vha ḽa vha nwa henefho." 
Exodus24:12 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Gonya kha Nṋe ngeno thavhani u dzule henefho musi ndi tshi u ṋea maḓaba a matombo a na mulayo na ndaela zwe nda ṅwala uri ndi vha funze.”" 
Exodus24:13 Mushe a takuwa e na mushumeli wawe Joshua, vha gonya thavha ya Mudzimu." 
Exodus24:13 Mushe a takuwa e na mushumeli wawe Joshua, vha gonya thavha ya Mudzimu." 
Exodus24:14 A vhudza vhahulwane a ri, “Ni ri lindele henefha mishashani u swika ri tshi vhuya ha inwi. Ni ḓo sala na Aroni na Huru; a re na mafhungo a ye khavho.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mushe a mbo ḓi gonya thavha. Ha mbo ḓa gole ḽa tiba thavha," 
Exodus24:16 lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwa dzula kha thavha ya Sinai, ya tibwa nga gole ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili Muṋe washu a vhidzelela Mushe e ngomu ha gole." 
Exodus24:17 Vhaisraele vho vhona lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lu tshi nga mulilo u dugaho muṱumbani wa thavha. 
Exodus24:18 Mushe a dzhena ngomu ha gole a gonya thavha a dzula hone maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao. 
Exodus25:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus25:2 “Vhudza Vhaisraele uri nduvho dzine vha ḓo mpha vha dzi vhetshele thungo. U ṱanganedze nduvho hedzo dzi tshi bva kha muthu muṅwe na muṅwe ane mbilu yawe ya vha na dzangalelo ḽa u ṋea. 
Exodus25:3 Nduvho dzine wa ḓo vha bvisisa ndi dzi no nga hedzi: musuku, siliva, musinaseṱha," 
Exodus25:4 vhukuse ha denga na ha muridili na vhutswuku, zwiambaro zwo itwaho nga lukhaha na nga vhukuse ha mbudzi," 
Exodus25:5 mukumba wa thutha wo fhomiwa wa ita mutswuku, mukumba wo sukiwaho, thanda ya muunga ya mivhalavhala," 
Exodus25:6 mapfura a mbone, zwilungi zwa mapfura a u ḓola na zwa zwioro," 
Exodus25:7 matombo a onikisi na nungu dza u ṱama nguvho ya tshifhe muhulu na tshipilakhana tshawe. 
Exodus25:8 Vha mphaṱele nnḓu khethwa uri ndi kone u dzula vhukati havho. 
Exodus25:9 Kufhaṱele na thundu dzoṱhe dzaho ni tevhedze tshifanyiso tshine nda ḓo ni sumbedza. 
Exodus25:10 “Vha vhaḓe mbulungelo nga thanda ya muunga, vhunavha vhu vhe senthimitha dza 110, u aṱama i vhe senthimitha dza 66, u lapfa u ya nṱha i vhe senthimitha dza 66." 
Exodus25:11 Nga nnḓa na nga ngomu ni i fhome nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, ni ite lubomo lwa musuku u mona nayo." 
Exodus25:12 U i itele mikungelo miṋa ya musuku ya u hwala ngayo, u i kungele milenzheni yayo miṋa, sia ḽino ḽi vhe na mikungelo mivhili, ḽiḽa-vho ḽi vhe na mivhili." 
Exodus25:13 U vhaḓe na thanda dza muunga u dzi fhome nga musuku," 
Exodus25:14 u dzi longe kha mikungelo nga matungo a mbulungelo, idzo ndi dza u hwala mbulungelo." 
Exodus25:15 Idzo thanda dzi dzule mikungeloni ya mbulungelo, dzi songo vhuya dza ṱomowa." 
Exodus25:16 Ngomu ha mbulungelo u vhulunge milayo ine nda ḓo u ṋea. 
Exodus25:17 “U dovhe u vhaḓe tshitibo tsha musuku u songo vangiwaho, vhunavha tshi vhe senthimitha dza 110, u aṱama tshi vhe senthimitha dza 66." 
Exodus25:18 Magumoni a tshitibo ngeno na ngeno u ite vhakherube vhavhili vha musuku; u vha ite nga musuku wo fuliwaho. 
Exodus25:19 U ite mukherube wa u thoma sia ḽino, wa vhuvhili u mu ite sia ḽiḽa, u vha kungele magumoni a tshitibo uri vha vhe tshithu tshithihi na tshitibo." 
Exodus25:20 Avho vhakherube vha vhe na phapha dzo ṱharamuwaho dzo imela nṱha uri dzi tibedze tshitibo. Vhakherube vho fanela u lavhelesana, zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwo lavhelesa tshitibo." 
Exodus25:21 Maḓaba a re na vhuṱanzi ha milayo ine nda ḓo u ṋea u a longe ngomu ha mbulungelo u a tibe nga tshenetsho tshitibo. 
Exodus25:22 Ndi ḓo ḓa nda ṱangana na iwe henefho, henefho nṱha ha tshitibo, vhukati ha vhakherube vhavhili vha re nṱha ha mbulungelo ya mulayo, wa konou nnḓivha nda u ṋea ndayo dzanga dzoṱhe dzine wa ḓo vhudza Vhaisraele." 
Exodus25:23 “U vhaḓe ḓafula nga thanda ya muunga, vhunavha ḽi vhe senthimitha dza 88, vhuphara ḽi vhe senthimitha dza 44, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ḽi vhe senthimitha dza 66." 
Exodus25:24 U ḽi fhome nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, u mona naḽo ḽoṱhe u ḽi ṱame nga lubomo lwa musuku." 
Exodus25:25 U ite lumeme lwa vhuphara ha milimitha dza 75 u mona naḽo, u lu ṱame nga lubomo lwa musuku u mona nalwo." 
Exodus25:26 U ḽi itele mikungelo miṋa ya musuku, u i mometshedze matungo maṋa, hune ha vha na milenzhe." 
Exodus25:27 Mikungelo ya u ṱoma thanda dza u hwala iḽo ḓafula yo fanela u vha tsini ha ulwo lumeme. 
Exodus25:28 Idzo thanda u dzi ite nga thanda ya muunga, u dzi fhome nga musuku. Iḽo ḓafula ḽi hwalwe ngadzo." 
Exodus25:29 Ḓafula u ḽi itele dzindilo na zwidongo na dzimvuvhelo na zwinwelo zwa u ṋekedza waini, izwo u zwi ite nga musuku u songo vangiwaho," 
Exodus25:30 ḽi konou vhewa phanḓa hanga, nṱha haḽo u dzule wo vhea vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Nṋe." 
Exodus25:31 “U ite tshivheambone nga musuku u songo vangiwaho wo fuliwaho. Tshiraho na tsinde ḽatsho na maluvha atsho a u tshi nakisa – pfungwi na nḓevhe dza maluvha – nga zwi vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi natsho. 
Exodus25:32 Hu ṱoṱomowe matavhi maṱanu na ḽithihi a tshi bva matungo atsho, mararu kha ḽino sia, mararu kha ḽiḽa." 
Exodus25:33 Davhi ḽa u thoma ḽi vhe na maluvha mararu a tshivhumbeo tsha maluvha a mualimondo, dzuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi vhe na pfungwi na nḓevhe. Davhi ḽa vhuvhili na ḽone ḽi vhe na maluvha mararu a tshivhumbeo tsha maluvha a mualimondo, dzuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi vhe na pfungwi na nḓevhe; matavhi oṱhe maṱanu na ḽithihi a ḓi ralo-vho o ṱoṱomowa a tshi bva kha tshivheambone." 
Exodus25:34 Tshivheambone tshone tshiṋe tshi vhe na maluvha maṋa a tshivhumbeo tsha maluvha a mualimondo, dzuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi na pfungwi na nḓevhe." 
Exodus25:35 Pfungwi nthihi i vhe fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a u thoma ane a ṱoṱomowa a tshi bva kha tshivheambone, iṅwe i vhe fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a tevhelaho, iṅwe ya vha fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a u fhedzisela, zwi ḓi fana na matavhi maṱanu na ḽithihi ane a ṱoṱomowa a tshi bva kha tshivheambone." 
Exodus25:36 Pfungwi na matavhi zwi vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi na tshivheambone, zwoṱhe zwo itwa nga tshipiḓa tshithihi tsha musuku u songo vangiwaho wo tou fuliwa." 
Exodus25:37 “Itsho tshivheambone u tshi itele mbone ṱhanu na mbili u dzi vhee nṱha hatsho uri dzi vhonetshele phanḓa hatsho. 
Exodus25:38 Zwifaredzi zwa thambo dzatsho na zwigubu zwatsho zwi vhe zwa musuku u songo vangiwaho. 
Exodus25:39 U dzhie musuku u songo vangiwaho wa khilogiramu dza 35 u ite hetsho tshivheambone na zwipiḓa zwatsho zwoṱhe ngawo. 
Exodus25:40 U vhone uri u tshi ite u tshi tevhedza tshifanyiso tshe wa sumbedzwa ngei thavhani. 
Exodus26:1 “Dennde ine nda luvhiwa khayo, ngomu hayo u i ite nga mapesa a fumi a lukhaha lu songo vangiwaho lwo lukiwa nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku. Kha mapesa ayo a lukhaha u luke zwifanyiso zwa vhakherube." 
Exodus26:2 Vhunavha ha pesa ḽithihi vhu vhe mitha dza 14, vhuphara haḽo vhu vhe mitha mbili, mapesa oṱhe a eḓane." 
Exodus26:3 Mapesa maṱanu a ṱumekanywe, na ayo maṅwe maṱanu a ḓi itwa nga u ralo." 
Exodus26:4 U ṱumetshedze nkhwe dza sila ḽa denga kha lupendelo lwa pesa ḽa u fhedzisela ḽa ayo mapesa, u dovhe u ite nga u ralo kha lupendelo lwa pesa ḽa u fhedzisela ḽa ayo maṅwe." 
Exodus26:5 U ṱumetshedze nkhwe dza 50 kha pesa ḽa u thoma, u dovhe u ṱumetshedze nkhwe dza 50 kha lupendelo lwa pesa ḽa u fhedzisela ḽa ayo maṅwe u tshi dzi vhambedza na dziḽa dza u thoma." 
Exodus26:6 U ite dzihuka dza 50 dza musuku dza ṱumekanya ayo mapesa. Zwenezwo iyo dennde i ḓo vha tshithu tshithihi. 
Exodus26:7 “U ite na mapesa nga vhukuse ha mbudzi, a u fulela iyo dennde; ayo a vhe 11." 
Exodus26:8 Vhunavha ha pesa ḽithihi vhu vhe mitha dza 15, vhuphara vhu vhe mitha mbili, mapesa ayo oṱhe a 11 a eḓane." 
Exodus26:9 U ṱumekanye maṱanu a ayo mapesa a vhe ḽithihi, maṅwe maṱanu na ḽithihi o salaho a vhe ḽiṅwe. Ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi u ḽi pete ḽi fulele phanḓa ha dennde." 
Exodus26:10 U ṱumetshedze nkhwe dza 50 kha lupendelo lwa pesa ḽa u fhedzisela ḽa hayo o ṱumekanaho a u thoma, u ḓi ralo na kha lupendelo lwa pesa ḽa u fhedzisela ḽa hayo a vhuvhili." 
Exodus26:11 U ite dzihuka dza 50 dza musinaseṱha u dzi longe kha dzinkhwe, dzi farakanye iyo dennde i vhe tshithu tshithihi." 
Exodus26:12 “Vhunga hu tshi ḓo vha ho sala pesa ḽithihi ḽa dennde, hafu ya iḽo pesa u i nembeledze murahu ha dennde." 
Exodus26:13 Tshipiḓa tsha hafu mitha tsho salaho masia oṱhe u navha na mapesa a dennde tshi nembelele matungo a dennde tshi vhe lupila lwayo. 
Exodus26:14 “U dovhe u ite lupila lwa dennde nga mikumba ya thutha yo fhomiwa nga phomo tswuku, na lupila lwa mikumba yo sukiwaho u fulele nṱha hayo." 
Exodus26:15 “Iyo dennde u i itele thikho nga thanda ya muunga, i ime i tou tswiti." 
Exodus26:16 Thikho iṅwe na iṅwe i vhe na vhunavha ha mitha ṱhanu, vhuphara vhu vhe senthimitha dza 75." 
Exodus26:17 Thikho iṅwe na iṅwe i longwe na mikungelo mivhili i fanaho, u ralo na kha thikho dzoṱhe dza dennde." 
Exodus26:18 U ite thikho dza 20 sia ḽa tshipembe ḽa dennde. 
Exodus26:19 U ite zwiraho zwa 40 zwa siliva zwi no ḓo dzhena nga fhasi ha idzo thikho, zwiraho zwivhili fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe zwa u tika mikungelo." 
Exodus26:20 Sia ḽa devhula ḽa dennde ḽi vhe thikho dza 20," 
Exodus26:21 dzi tikwe nga zwiraho zwa siliva zwa 40, zwivhili fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Exodus26:22 Murahu ha dennde, nga vhukovhela, u ite thikho ṱhanu na nthihi." 
Exodus26:23 U ite thikho mbili khuḓani dza murahu ha dennde. 
Exodus26:24 Thikho idzo dzi paṱekanywe u bva fhasi u swika nṱha, u vhuya u swika nga mukungelo wa u thoma. Thikho mbili dzine dza vhumba khuḓa idzo mbili dzi itwe nga u ralo." 
Exodus26:25 Zwenezwo hu ḓo vha na thikho ṱhanu na tharu na zwiraho zwadzo zwa 15 zwa siliva, zwivhili zwi fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Exodus26:26 “U ite mbalelo dza u rambalala nga thanda ya muunga, ṱhanu dza u paṱekanya thikho sia ḽithihi ḽa dennde," 
Exodus26:27 ṱhanu dza u paṱekanya thikho sia ḽiṅwe, ṱhanu dza u paṱekanya thikho hune dennde ya guma hone nga vhukovhela." 
Exodus26:28 Luvhalelo lwa u rambalala lwa vhukati, lune lwa ḓo vha vhukati u ya nṱha, lu thome mugumoni uno lu swike kha uḽa." 
Exodus26:29 Idzo thikho dzi fhomiwe musuku, dzi vhe na mikungelo ya musuku ya u fara mbalelo dzo rambalalaho, na dzone dzi fhomiwe musuku." 
Exodus26:30 U fhaṱe iyo dennde nga u ralo u tshi tevhedza pulane ye wa sumbedzwa ngei thavhani. 
Exodus26:31 “U ite lupila nga ṅwenda wavhuḓi wo lukiwaho nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku. U lukiwe tshifanyiso tsha vhakherube. 
Exodus26:32 U u nembeledze kha phuphu nṋa dza thanda ya muunga dzo fhomiwaho musuku, wo longwa dzihuka dza musuku, wo ṱumetshedzwa kha zwiraho zwa siliva." 
Exodus26:33 U nembeledze pesa ḽi tshi bva kha dzihuka, iḽo pesa ḽi ḓo fhandekanya Hukhethwa na Hukhethwakhethwa. Murahu ha iḽo pesa u vhee mbulungelo ya mulanga." 
Exodus26:34 Tshitibo u tshi vhee nṱha ha mbulungelo ngomu ha Hukhethwakhethwa. 
Exodus26:35 Ḓafula u ḽi vhee nnḓa ha Hukhethwakhethwa thungo ya devhula ya dennde, u vhee tshivheambone tshó livhana naḽo thungo ya tshipembe." 
Exodus26:36 “Muṋangoni wa dennde u ite pesa ḽa ṅwenda wavhuḓi wo lukiwaho nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, zwi ṱamiwe nga mivhalavhala nga makone wa u luka." 
Exodus26:37 Ṅwenda uyo u u itele phuphu ṱhanu dza thanda ya muunga, dzi fhomiwe nga musuku, dzi longwe dzihuka dza musuku. Idzo phuphu u dzi itele zwiraho zwiṱanu zwa musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:1 “U fhaṱe aḽiṱari nga thanda ya muunga, i vhe na masia a eḓanaho, vhunavha i vhe mitha mbili na hafu, vhuphara i vhe mitha mbili na hafu, vhulapfu u ya nṱha i vhe mitha na hafu." 
Exodus27:2 Khuḓani nṋa dzayo u ṱumetshedze ṋanga, idzo ṋanga dzi vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi nayo. I fhomiwe musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:3 Aḽiṱari yone u i itele khali dza u fara milora i no bva kha mapfura; u ite na mpfo na masambelo a u handulula na dziforogo na ndongo dza mulilo. Midzio yoṱhe ya aḽiṱari u i ite nga musinaseṱha. 
Exodus27:4 “U ite na tshiṱhaṱhi tsha musinaseṱha, khuḓani nṋa dzatsho u ṱumetshedze mikungelo ya musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:5 Itsho tshiṱhaṱhi u tshi vhee fhasi ha mulinga wa aḽiṱari, tshi swike vhukati ha aḽiṱari u ya nṱha." 
Exodus27:6 U vhaḓe thanda dza muunga dza u hwala aḽiṱari ngadzo, u dzi fhome musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:7 U dzi ṱome kha mikungelo, uri dzi vhe masia oṱhe a aḽiṱari musi i tshi hwaliwa." 
Exodus27:8 Aḽiṱari u i ite unga bogisi ḽa thanda; i itwe nga he wa sumbedzwa ngei thavhani. 
Exodus27:9 “Iyo dennde u i itele muṱa. Thungo ya tshipembe u nembeledze mapesa a lukhaha lwavhuḓi a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 50 sia ḽithihi. 
Exodus27:10 Phuphu dzao dza musinaseṱha dza 20 dzi kwewe kha zwiraho zwa musinaseṱha zwa 20 dzi vhe na dzihuka na mbalelo dza siliva. 
Exodus27:11 Na thungo ya devhula u nembeledze mapesa a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 50, na phuphu dza 20 dzo kwewa kha zwiraho zwa musinaseṱha, dzi na dzihuka dzadzo na mbalelo dza siliva." 
Exodus27:12 U buḓekanya vhuphara ha muṱa thungo ya vhukovhela u nembeledze mapesa a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 25, phuphu dzao dza fumi dzo kwewa kha zwiraho zwa fumi." 
Exodus27:13 Vhuphara ha muṱa thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha, vhu vhe mitha dza 25." 
Exodus27:14 Kha sia ḽiṅwe ḽa muṋango u nembeledze mapesa a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 7,5, phuphu dzao dzi vhe tharu dzo kwewa kha zwiraho zwiraru." 
Exodus27:15 Sia ḽiṅwe ḽa muṋango na hone u nembeledze mapesa a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 7,5, phuphu dzao dzi vhe tharu dzo kwewa kha zwiraho zwiraru." 
Exodus27:16 Muṋango u dzhenaho muṱani u vhe na lupila lwa vhulapfu ha mitha dza fumi lwo itwaho nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi lwo lukiwaho nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, lwa ṱamiwa nga muluki makone, phuphu dzalwo dzi vhe nṋa dzo kwewaho kha zwiraho zwiṋa." 
Exodus27:17 Phuphu dzoṱhe dzo tangeledzaho muṱa dzi ṱanganywe nga mbalelo dza siliva; huka dzadzo dzi vhe dza siliva, zwiraho zwadzo zwi vhe zwa musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:18 Vhunavha ha muṱa vhu vhe mitha dza 50, vhuphara vhu vhe mitha dza 25, vhulapfu u ya nṱha vhu vhe mitha mbili na hafu. Mapesa oṱhe a itwe nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi, zwiraho zwi vhe zwa musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:19 Thundu yoṱhe ine ya shuma denndeni na khokho dzayo dzoṱhe na dza muṱa, zwi vhe zwa musinaseṱha." 
Exodus27:20 “U vhudze Vhaisraele vha u ḓisele mapfura a muolivi a songo vangiwaho, a luvhone, uri khavhu ya luvhone i dzule i tshi khou duga." 
Exodus27:21 Aroni na vhana vhawe vha funge luvhone denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, nnḓa ha lupila lune lwa vha phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga. Lu dzule lu tshi duga henefho phanḓa hanga u bva nga madekwana ḽi vhuye ḽi tshe. Ndaela hei i dzule i tshi tevhedzwa nga Vhaisraele na vhaḓuhulu vhavho lini na lini." 
Exodus28:1 “Vhidzisa mukomana wau Aroni a bve kha Vhaisraele a ḓe ha iwe, a ḓe na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka, Nadaba na Abihu na Eliasara na Ithamara, vha vhe vhotshifhe vha ntshumele." 
Exodus28:2 Mukomana wau Aroni u mu rungele zwiambaro zwikhethwa a vhe na tshileme, a vhonale o ambara dza maṱeleṱele." 
Exodus28:3 U vhudze vhatsila vhomakone, vhe nda vha ṋea vhukoni, vha rungele Aroni zwiambaro uri a vhumbiwe tshifhe a ḓikumedze Nṋe." 
Exodus28:4 Zwiambaro zwine vha fanela u zwi runga ngezwi: tshipilakhana na bannda ya u pakata na phuraphura na hemmbe yo lukwaho na muthini na bannda. Vha rungele mukomana wau Aroni na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka zwiambaro zwikhethwa, uri vha vhe vhotshifhe vhane vha ntshumela." 
Exodus28:5 Avho vhatsila vha shumise ludede lwa musuku na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwo lukiwaho zwavhuḓi. 
Exodus28:6 “Vha ite bannda ḽa u pakata nga ludede lwa musuku na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwo lukiwaho zwavhuḓi, u vhe mushumo wa muluki makone." 
Exodus28:7 Ḽo fanela u vha na pfuṋelo mbili dza mahaḓani dzo ṱumekanywaho naḽo uri dzi farakanye ṱhodzi dzaḽo mbili. 
Exodus28:8 Khaḽo ho fanela u ṱumetshedzwa kubannda kwo lukwaho zwavhuḓi, kwa sila ḽi no fana na ḽa iḽo bannda, ku vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi naḽo, ku itwe nga ludede lwa musuku na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwavhuḓi." 
Exodus28:9 U dzhie matombo mavhili a onikisi u ṅwale madzina a vhana vha Israele vha vhatuka khao," 
Exodus28:10 u tsheṱe madzina avho maṱanu na ḽithihi kha ḽiṅwe tombo, maṱanu na ḽithihi kha ḽiṅwe, vha tshi tevhekana nga kubebelwe kwavho." 
Exodus28:11 U wane mutsheṱi makone a ṅwale ayo madzina a vhana vha Israele kha matombo ayo mavhili, a fhomiwe nga musuku." 
Exodus28:12 Matombo ayo mavhili u a vhofhelele kha pfuṋelo dza mahaḓani dza bannda ya u pakata, a vhe tshihumbudzo tsha matsinde a Israele a 12. Aroni u ḓo hwala madzina avho mahaḓani awe uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi dzule ndi tshi elelwa vhathu vhanga." 
Exodus28:13 U dzinge maluvha mavhili a musuku a u a ṱama," 
Exodus28:14 u ite na geḓane mbili dza musuku u songo vangiwaho dzo lukwa unga thambo, u kungele idzo geḓane kha ayo maluvha." 
Exodus28:15 “U ite tshipilakhana tshine tshifhe a ḓo vhona ngatsho musi a tshi haṱula milandu. Tshi itwe nga vhomakone vhukuma, vha tshi ite nga zwenezwo zwo itaho bannda ḽa u pakata, tshi itwe nga ludede lwa musuku na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwo hoṱiwaho zwavhuḓi." 
Exodus28:16 Vhulapfu na vhuphara hatsho zwi eḓane, tshi petwe luvhili, vhulapfu tshi vhe senthimitha dza 25, vhuphara tshi vhe senthimitha dza 25." 
Exodus28:17 U tshi rungelele miṱaladzi miṋa ya matombo a mutengo muhulu. Kha muṱaladzi wa u ranga u rungelele rubi na thophasi na ganethe. 
Exodus28:18 Kha muṱaladzi wa vhuvhili u rungelele tombo ḽa muroxwe na safire na daimane. 
Exodus28:19 Kha muṱaladzi wa vhuraru u rungelele thekhoisi na agethe na amethisi. 
Exodus28:20 Kha muṱaladzi wa vhuṋa u rungelele berili na khanelia na jasipere. Matombo ayo oṱhe a nambatedzwe kha musuku. 
Exodus28:21 Ayo matombo a ṅwalwe madzina a vhana vha vhatuka vha Israele, a vhe 12 a nge madzina a re khao. A koriwe unga tshikandiso tsha luswayo, ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi vhe na dzina ḽa muṅwe wa matsinde a fumi na mavhili a Israele." 
Exodus28:22 Tshipilakhana u tshi itele geḓane dza musuku u songo vangiwaho dzo sombiwa unga thambo. 
Exodus28:23 Itsho tshipilakhana u tshi itele mikungelo mivhili ya musuku, u i ṱumetshedze kha khuḓa dzatsho mbili dza nṱha." 
Exodus28:24 U pfuṋele idzo geḓane mbili dza musuku kha mikungelo iyo mivhili yo ṱumetshedzwaho kha khuḓa dza tshipilakhana. 
Exodus28:25 Dziṅwe ṱhodzi dza idzo geḓane u dzi pfuṋele kha aḽa maluvha mavhili, uri a ṱumekane na pfuṋelo dza mahaḓani dza bannda ya u pakata, nga phanḓa." 
Exodus28:26 U ite mikungelo mivhili ya musuku u i ṱumetshedze khuḓani mbili dza fhasi dza tshipilakhana, kha lupendelo lwa ngomu, tsini na bannda ḽa u pakata." 
Exodus28:27 U dovhe u ite miṅwe mikungelo mivhili ya musuku, u i ṱumetshedze fhasi phanḓa ha pfuṋelo mbili dza mahaḓani dza bannda ḽa u pakata, tsini na ho ṱumiwaho, nṱha ha kubannda kwo lukiwaho kwa bannda ḽa u pakata." 
Exodus28:28 U vhofhekanye mikungelo ya tshipilakhana na mikungelo ya bannda ya nṱha nga thambo dala, uri tshipilakhana tshi dzule nṱha ha kubannda kwo lukiwaho, tshi si rembeḓe tsha litshana na bannda ya u pakata." 
Exodus28:29 Itsho tshipilakhana tsha u haṱula tshi ḓo ita uri musi Aroni a tshi dzhena Hukhethwa, a vhe o kungela madzina a matsinde a Israele khanani yawe uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi dzule ndi tshi elelwa vhathu vhanga." 
Exodus28:30 Kha itsho tshipilakhana tsha u haṱula u nambatedze na madeṅwa makhethwa uri Aroni a vhe e nazwo khanani yawe musi a tshi dzhena hune Nṋe Yahavee nda vha hone. Zwenezwo Aroni a tshi ḓa phanḓa ha Nṋe Yahavee, khanani yawe u ḓo dzula o ambara tshine tsha nga mu farisa u haṱula Vhaisraele." 
Exodus28:31 “U ite phuraphura ine ya ambarwa na bannda ya u pakata, u i ite nga vhukuse ha denga." 
Exodus28:32 Vhukati hayo i vhe na buli ḽa u dzhenisa ṱhoho, u mona na iḽo buli hu vhe na lubomo lwo lukiwaho unga mutsinga wa dzhasi ḽa tsimbi uri i si kheruwe." 
Exodus28:33 Lupendelo lwa fhasi u lu ṱame nga maramba a denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwavhuḓi lwo lukiwaho, vhukati hu vhe na ḓilogo dza musuku." 
Exodus28:34 Ḓilogo dza musuku na maramba zwi tevhekane zwi tshi mona na lupendelo lwa fhasi lwa phuraphura. 
Exodus28:35 Aroni a i ambare musi a tshi shuma mushumo wawe wa vhutshifhe uri hu pfale ḓilogo dzi tshi lila musi a tshi dzhena Hukhethwa hune Nṋe Yahavee nda vha hone na musi a tshi bva, zwenezwo a nga si fe." 
Exodus28:36 “U ite ḓaba ḽa musuku u songo vangiwaho ḽi koriwe maipfi haya a u ri, ‘ ndo kumedzwa yahavee’ sa zwiḽa muthu a tshi tsheṱa khandiso." 
Exodus28:37 U lu vhofhelele phanḓa ha muthini nga thambo ya denga. 
Exodus28:38 Aroni a lu ambare kha phanḓa yawe, uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi kone u ṱanganedza zwoṱhe zwine Vhaisraele vha nṋekedza, naho vhathu vha nga vha vha tshi khakha musi vha tshi zwi ṋekedza. Aroni a dzule o lu ambara kha phanḓa uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi vha takalele." 
Exodus28:39 Hemmbe u i luke nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi, u ite muthini nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi, na muvhofho wo lukiwaho nga muluki makone." 
Exodus28:40 “Vhana vha Aroni u vha itele hemmbe na muvhofho na muṅadzi uri vha vhe na tshileme na lunako. 
Exodus28:41 Izwo u zwi ambadze Aroni mukomana wau na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka. Zwenezwo u vha vhumbe vhotshifhe nga u vha ḓodza nga mapfura a muolivi u vha kumedze Nṋe vha ntshumele. 
Exodus28:42 U vha itele dzishothi dza lukhaha dzi vha pile u bva khunduni u swika zwirumbini, vha si vhonelwe." 
Exodus28:43 Aroni na vhana vhawe vha zwi ambare musi vha tshi dzhena denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe na musi vha tshi sendela aḽiṱarini u yo ntshumela vhe Hukhethwa uri vha sa ḓo khakha vha fa. Iyo ndi ndayo ya lini na lini ya Aroni na vhaḓuhulu vhawe. 
Exodus29:1 “Khea maitele ane wa fanela u a tevhela musi u tshi vha kumedza uri vha ntshumele vhe vhotshifhe. Dzhia mbohwana nthihi na thutha mbili dzi si na luvhadzi," 
Exodus29:2 na vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa, na khekhe dzi si na mbilisa dzo vangiwaho mapfura na makokisi a si na mbilisa o shashiwaho nga mapfura zwi tshi itwa nga vhukhopfu havhuḓi ha goroi." 
Exodus29:3 U zwi longe mufaroni u zwi ṋekedze zwi mufaroni; u zwi ṋekedze khathihi na mbohwana na thutha mbili. 
Exodus29:4 “U ḓise Aroni na vhana vhawe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, vha ṱambe muvhili nga maḓi." 
Exodus29:5 U dzhie zwiambaro, Aroni u mu ambadze hemmbe na khanzu ya bannda ya u pakata, na yone bannda ya u pakata na tshipilakhana, u mu vhofhe nga muvhofho wo lukiwaho wa bannda ya u pakata." 
Exodus29:6 U mu ambadze muthini ṱhohoni, u vhofhelele khare khethwa khawo." 
Exodus29:7 Zwenezwo u dzhie mapfura u a shululele ṱhohoni yawe, u ralo hu vhe u mu ta." 
Exodus29:8 “Wo no fhedza u ḓise vhana vhawe u vha ambadze hemmbe. 
Exodus29:9 U vha vhofhe khundu nga mivhofho, u vha ambadze na mithini ṱhohoni. Vha ḓo vha vho vhumbwa vhotshifhe nga ndaela ya lini na lini. Aroni na vhana vhawe u vha ambadze nga u ralo." 
Exodus29:10 “U ḓise mboho phanḓa ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe. Aroni na vhana vhawe vha vhee zwanḓa zwavho ṱhohoni yayo. 
Exodus29:11 U ṱhavhe phulu yeneyo henefho phanḓa hanga muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe. 
Exodus29:12 U dzhie maṅwe malofha ayo u a ṋange nga munwe u a ḓodze ṋanga dza aḽiṱari. Wo no fhedza u shululele malofha o salaho fhasi ha aḽiṱari. 
Exodus29:13 U dzhie mapfura oṱhe ane a pila miraḓo ya ngomu na phudwane ya tshivhindi na tswio mbili na mapfura adzo o dzi pilaho, u zwi fhise kha aḽiṱari." 
Exodus29:14 Ṋama ya mboho na mukumba wayo na vhutoko hayo, u zwi fhisele nnḓa ha mushasha, ngauri ndi nduvho i no ṋetshedzelwa u hangwela vhotshifhe vhutshinyi havho." 
Exodus29:15 “Wo no fhedza u dzhie thutha nthihi. Aroni na vhana vhawe vha vhee zwanḓa zwavho kha ṱhoho yayo. 
Exodus29:16 U ṱhavhe iyo thutha, u dzhie malofha ayo u a shululele nnḓa u mona na aḽiṱari." 
Exodus29:17 Wo no fhedza u tshetshekanye iyo thutha nga zwiendanungo, u ṱanzwe miraḓo yayo ya nga ngomu na milenzhe yayo u zwi vhee nṱha ha ṱhoho na zwiṅwe zwipiḓa." 
Exodus29:18 Zwenezwo u konou fhisa thutha yoṱhe kha aḽiṱari. Heyo i ḓo vha nduvho i fhiswaho, u nukhelela hayo hu ḓo takadza Nṋe Yahavee. Tshi ḓo vha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha u nkhulisa." 
Exodus29:19 “Wo no fhedza u dzhie iḽa thutha iṅwe. Aroni na vhana vhawe vha vhee zwanḓa zwavho kha ṱhoho yayo. 
Exodus29:20 U ṱhavhe iyo thutha, u dzhie maṅwe malofha ayo u a ḓodze kha nḓevhe ya Aroni ya tshauḽa, na kha nḓevhe dza vhana vhawe dza tshauḽa na kha magunwe a zwanḓa zwavho zwauḽa na kha magunwe a ṋayo dzavho dza tshauḽa, maṅwe malofha o salaho u a shululele nnḓa u mona na aḽiṱari." 
Exodus29:21 U dzhie maṅwe malofha o salaho nṱha ha aḽiṱari khathihi na mapfura, u handulule Aroni ngao na zwiambaro zwawe, u handulule na vhana vhawe na zwiambaro zwavho uri ene na zwiambaro zwawe na vhana vhawe na zwiambaro zwavho zwi vhe zwo kumedzwa Nṋe." 
Exodus29:22 “U dzhie mapfura a thutha kha zwipiḓa zwi re na mapfura: mutshila na mapfura ane a pila miraḓo ya nga ngomu na phudwane ya tshivhindi na tswio mbili na mapfura ane a dzi pila na tshizwa tshauḽa, ngauri iyo ndi yone thutha ya u vha ambadza." 
Exodus29:23 U dzhie mukonde wa vhurotho na khekhe yo itwaho nga mapfura na kokisi, zwi tshi bva mufaroni wa vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa ho ṋekedzwaho Nṋe Yahavee," 
Exodus29:24 zwoṱhe u zwi vhee zwanḓani zwa Aroni na zwa vhana vhawe, u vha vhudze vha zwi ṋekedze Nṋe nga u zwi imisela nṱha." 
Exodus29:25 Zwo no ralo u ḓo zwi dzhia khavho wa zwi fhisa kha aḽiṱari, nṱha ha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, zwi tshi nukhelela lwa u ntakadza. Hetsho tshi ḓo vha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha u nkhulisa." 
Exodus29:26 “U dzhie tshiakha tsha thutha ya u vhumba Aroni, u tshi dzungudze phanḓa ha Nṋe Yahavee i vhe nduvho i imiselwaho nṱha; wonoyo u ḓo vha mukovhe wau." 
Exodus29:27 U nkumedze tshiakha tsha thutha ye ya ṱhavhiwa musi Aroni na vhana vhawe vha tshi vhumbwa vhotshifhe: tshiakha tshe tsha imiselwa nṱha na tshizwa tshe tsha ṋekedzwa. 
Exodus29:28 Uyo u vhe musumo wa lini na lini une Vhaisraele vha fanela u bvisa vha ṋea Aroni na vhana vhawe. Ndi uri uyo ndi musumo une Vhaisraele vha fanela u bvisa wa vha wa nga musi vha tshi ṋekedza nduvho dzavho dza u konana na Nṋe. 
Exodus29:29 “Zwiambaro zwa Aroni zwa vhutshifhe zwi ṋewe vhaḓuhulu vhawe musi a tshi fa, vha zwi ambare musi vha tshi ḓodziwa, vha tshi vhumbwa vhotshifhe." 
Exodus29:30 Ṅwana wa Aroni ane a ḓo sala a tshi vha tshifhe ene o no fa, a dzhena denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe uri a shume Hukhethwa, o fanela u zwi ambara maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
Exodus29:31 “U dzhie thutha ya u vha vhumba, u bike ṋama yayo fhethu hukhethwa." 
Exodus29:32 Aroni na vhana vhawe vha ḽe ṋama ya iyo thutha na vhurotho vhu re mufaroni, vhe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe." 
Exodus29:33 Vha ḽe zwe zwa ṋekedzwa zwa vha tshipfumelo tshavho musi vha tshi vhumbwa vhotshifhe, vha tshi kumedzwa Mudzimu. Hone muthu muṅwe a si tshifhe a songo zwi ḽa, ngauri ndi zwikhethwa." 
Exodus29:34 Arali ha sala ṋama ya thutha ya u vhumba vhotshifhe kana vhurotho, ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha, zwenezwo zwo salaho u zwi fhise. Zwi songo ḽiwa ngauri ndi zwikhethwa." 
Exodus29:35 Aroni na vhana vhawe, vhukumakuma u vha ite zwenezwo zwe nda u laya, u fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili u tshi vha vhumba vhotshifhe." 
Exodus29:36 “Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa hayo maḓuvha u ṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho tshi vhe tshipfumelo tsha vhutshinyi. U tshi ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshine tsha vha tshipfumelo tsha vhutshinyi u ḓo vha u tshi khou kumulula aḽiṱari. Zwenezwo u i ḓodze nga mapfura a muolivi i vhe khethwa. 
Exodus29:37 U ite nga u ralo ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili. Zwenezwo aḽiṱari i ḓo vha i khethwa tshoṱhe; tshine tsha vhuya tsha i kwama, na tshone tshi vho ḓo vha tshiila." 
Exodus29:38 “Zwine wa fanela u zwi ṋekedza aḽiṱarini ngezwi: ngwana mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe u ya ho ya. 
Exodus29:39 Ngwana ya u thoma u i ṋekedze nga matsheloni, iṅwe u i ṋekedze nga madekwana." 
Exodus29:40 Ngwana ya u thoma u i ṋekedze na khilogiramu na hafu ya vhukhopfu vhusekene ha goroi ho vangwa na litha nthihi ya mapfura a muolivi a songo vangwaho. U tevhule litha nthihi ya waini i vhe nduvho. 
Exodus29:41 Ngwana ya vhuvhili u i ṋekedze nga madekwana, u i ṋekedze na vhukhopfu na mapfura a muolivi na waini zwi no eḓana na zwa nga matsheloni. Heyo ndi nduvho i fhiswaho ine ya itelwa u hulisa Nṋe Yahavee, i tshi nukhelela i a ntakadza." 
Exodus29:42 Heyo nduvho i fhiswaho i dzule i tshi ṋekedzwa nga mirafho na mirafho, muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe hune nda vha hone. Ndi hone hune nda ḓo ṱangana na iwe nda amba na iwe." 
Exodus29:43 “Henefho ndi ḓo ṱangana na Vhaisraele, lupenyo lwanga lu kombodzaho lu ḓo ita uri afho fhethu hu vhe hukhethwa." 
Exodus29:44 Ndi ḓo ita uri dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe na aḽiṱari zwi vhe zwikhethwa, Aroni na vhana vhawe ndi ḓo ḓikhethela vhone vha ntshumela vhe vhotshifhe." 
Exodus29:45 Ndi ḓo dzula na Vhaisraele, nda vha Mudzimu wavho." 
Exodus29:46 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho we a vha pfulusa Egipita uri ndi kone u dzula navho. Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho. 
Exodus30:1 “U ite aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwioro, u i ite nga thanda ya muunga." 
Exodus30:2 Vhunavha na vhuphara vhu eḓane, vhunavha i vhe hafumitha, vhuphara i vhe hafumitha, vhulapfu u ya nṱha i vhe mitha. Ṋanga dzayo dzi vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi nayo." 
Exodus30:3 Nga nṱha hayo na matungo ayo u mona nayo na ṋanga dzayo, zwi fhomiwe nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, i ṱamiwe nga lubomo lwa musuku u mona nayo." 
Exodus30:4 U ṱumetshedze mikungelo mivhili ya musuku khayo fhasi ha lubomo masia ayo mavhili o fhambanaho, iyo ndi ya u ṱoma thanda dzine ya hwalwa ngayo." 
Exodus30:5 Idzo thanda u dzi ite nga thanda ya muunga, u dzi fhome nga musuku." 
Exodus30:6 Iyo aḽiṱari u i vhee phanḓa ha lupila lune lwa nembelela phanḓa ha mbulungelo i re na milayo, u livhana na tshitibo tshine tsha tiba mbulungelo i re na milayo, fhethu hune nda ḓo ṱangana na iwe." 
Exodus30:7 Henefho Aroni o fanela u fhisa zwioro matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe musi a tshi ḓa u lugisa mbone. 
Exodus30:8 A ḓi ralo musi a tshi ḓa u funga mbone nga madekwana. Nṋe Yahavee ni ḓi nndubisela nduvho ya zwioro, zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Exodus30:9 Kha aḽiṱari heyo u songo ṋekedza zwioro zwi songo tiwaho nga Yahavee; hu songo ṋekedzwa tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho kana nduvho ya mbeu nahone u songo tevhulela nduvho ya waini khayo. 
Exodus30:10 Aroni a ite maitele a u pfumelwa luthihi nga ṅwaha kha ṋanga dza aḽiṱari nga malofha a tshiṱhavhelo tsha u ni pfumelela vhutshinyi. Izwo zwi itwe ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe. Ni ite nga u ralo zwi tshi ya nga mirafho nga mirafho. Heyo aḽiṱari ndi khethwa-khethwa, i kumedzwe Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Exodus30:11 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus30:12 “Musi u tshi vhala Vhaisraele, munna muṅwe na muṅwe a bvise tshipfumelo tsha vhutshilo hawe tshi ṋewe Nṋe, uri a si welwe nga khombo musi hu tshi vhaliwa vhathu." 
Exodus30:13 Muṅwe na muṅwe a re mbaloni iyo a bvise tshelede i ṱoḓeaho, a bvise giramu ṱhanu na nthihi dza siliva hu tshi tevhedzwa muelo wo tiwaho wa thembele, hezwo zwi ṋekedzwe Nṋe." 
Exodus30:14 Munna muṅwe na muṅwe ane a vhaliwa, wa miṅwaha ya 20 na u fhira, a bvise tshelede yeneyo." 
Exodus30:15 Mupfumi a songo bvisa i fhiraho iyo, na mushai a songo bvisa ṱhukhu kha iyo musi vha tshi nṋea itsho tshipfumelo tsha vhutshilo havho." 
Exodus30:16 U kuvhanganye iyo tshelede i tshi bva kha Vhaisraele i shumiswe u londola dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe. Muthelo uyo u ḓo vha tshipfumelo tsha vhutshilo havho, Nṋe Yahavee nda ḓo konou elelwa u vha tsireledza.”" 
Exodus30:17 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus30:18 “Ita sambelo ḽa musinaseṱha ḽi vhe na tshiraho tsha musinaseṱha. U ḽi vhee vhukati ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe na aḽiṱari, u shele maḓi ngomu haḽo." 
Exodus30:19 Aroni na vhana vhawe vha ṱambe zwanḓa zwavho na milenzhe nga ayo maḓi. 
Exodus30:20 Vha ṱambe vha sa athu dzhena denndeni kana vha sa athu sendela tsini ha aḽiṱari u ṋekedza nduvho i fhiswaho. Ndi hone vha sa ḓo fa. 
Exodus30:21 Vho fanela u ṱamba zwanḓa zwavho na milenzhe yavho, uri vha si fe. Hoyo ndi mulayo une wa fanela u vhulungwa nga vhone na vhaḓuhulu vhavho zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho.”" 
Exodus30:22 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus30:23 “Dzhia zwilungi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe, khilogiramu ṱhanu na nthihi dza mire ya tshiluḓi, khilogiramu tharu dza khinamoni ine ya nukhelela u ḓifha, khilogiramu tharu dza musengele u nukhelelaho" 
Exodus30:24 na khilogiramu ṱhanu na nthihi dza khasia, zwoṱhe zwó kaliwa nga mielo i tendelwaho. U zwi ṱanganye na ḽitha nṋa dza mapfura a muolivi," 
Exodus30:25 u ite mapfura makhethwa a u ḓodza, o ṱanganywa zwavhuḓi na zwioro nga kuvangele kwa muvangi makone." 
Exodus30:26 Ayo mapfura a ḓodze dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe na mbulungelo i re na milayo," 
Exodus30:27 na ḓafula na thundu dzaḽo dzoṱhe, na tshivheambone na thundu dzatsho dzoṱhe, na aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwioro," 
Exodus30:28 na aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo na thundu dzayo dzoṱhe, na sambelo na tshiraho tshaḽo." 
Exodus30:29 Izwo zwithu u zwi kumedze Nṋe, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo vha zwikhethwakhethwa, na tshine tsha zwi kwama tshi ḓo vha tshikhethwa." 
Exodus30:30 U ḓodze Aroni na vhana vhawe, u vha vhumbe vhotshifhe vhane vha shumela Nṋe." 
Exodus30:31 U vhudze Vhaisraele uri haya ndi mapfura anga makhethwa a u ḓodza zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho. 
Exodus30:32 A songo ḓodza vhathu zwavho nahone u songo ita muṅwe muvango une wa fana nawo. One ndi makhethwa, ni a sedze e makhethwa." 
Exodus30:33 Ane a vhuya a ita maṅwe ane a fana nao, kana a a ḓodza muṅwe muthu ane a si vhe tshifhe, ha tsha ḓo vhaliwa na vhathu vhanga.”" 
Exodus30:34 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Dzhia mielo i eḓanaho ya zwilungi zwi ḓifhaho, ṋonzhe na onikha na galabanumu na zwioro zwi songo vangiwaho." 
Exodus30:35 Izwo u ite ngazwo zwioro, zwi vangiwe nga kuvangele kwa muvangi makone, u zwi lunge muṋo uri zwi dzule zwo kuna zwi zwikhethwa." 
Exodus30:36 Tshipiḓa tshazwo u tshi kuye tshi vhe luvhanda, u lu ise denndeni ya hune nda ḓo ṱangana na iwe, u lu vhee phanḓa ha mbulungelo i re na milayo. Izwo zwioro ni zwi sedze zwi zwikhethwakhethwa." 
Exodus30:37 Ni songo ḓiitela zwioro zwa muvango une wa nga wonoyo. Zwi sedzeni sa zwithu zwikhethwa zwo kumedzwaho Nṋe. 
Exodus30:38 Arali muṅwe a ḓiitela tshiḓolo tshine tsha nga tshenetsho, ha tsha ḓo vhaliwa na vhathu vhanga.”" 
Exodus31:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Exodus31:2 “Ndo nanga Betsalele, ṅwana wa Uri muḓuhulu wa Huru, ane a bva kha tsinde ḽa Juda," 
Exodus31:3 nahone ndo mu ḓadza Muya wanga. Ndo mu ṋea ṱhalukanyo na vhutsila na vhukoni ha mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe wa u ita makolo – 
Exodus31:4 wa u ita dzipulane dza zwa vhutsila na u zwi fhoma musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha; 
Exodus31:5 wa u tsheṱa nungu dza u ṱama; wa u vhaḓa thanda; na mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe wa zwa vhutsila. 
Exodus31:6 Ndo nanga na Oholiaba ṅwana wa Ahisamakha, a no bva kha tsinde ḽa Dani, uri a shume nae. Nda dovha nda ṋea vhatsila vhoṱhe vhukoni vhuhulu, uri vha kone u ita zwoṱhe zwe nda ri zwi itwe:" 
Exodus31:7 dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe na mbulungelo i re na milayo na tshitibo tshayo na thundu yoṱhe ya dennde," 
Exodus31:8 na ḓafula na thundu dzaḽo na tshivheambone tsha musuku u songo vangiwaho na thundu yatsho yoṱhe, na aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwioro," 
Exodus31:9 na aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo na thundu dzayo dzoṱhe na sambelo na tshiraho tshaḽo," 
Exodus31:10 na zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele zwa tshifhe Aroni na vhana vhawe zwine vha zwi ambara musi vha tshi shuma mushumo wa vhutshifhe," 
Exodus31:11 na mapfura a u ḓodza na zwioro zwi nukhelelaho u ḓifha zwa fhethu hukhethwa. Vha tshi ita zwithu hezwo vha zwi ite vha tshi tevhedza vhukuma zwe nda u laya.” 
Exodus31:12 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe 
Exodus31:13 uri a vhudze Vhaisraele a ri, “Vhulungani Sabatha, ḓuvha ḽanga ḽa u awela, ngauri ndi tshiga vhukati hanga na inwi tsha misi yoṱhe i ḓaho, tshi no sumbedza uri Nṋe Yahavee ndo ni ita vhathu vhanga." 
Exodus31:14 No fanela u vhulunga ḓuvha ḽa u awela ngauri ndi ḽikhethwa. Ane a si ḽi vhulunge, a shuma nga ḓuvha ḽeneḽo, a vhulawe, a songo tsha vhalwa kha lushaka." 
Exodus31:15 Ni na maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi a u shuma mishumo yaṋu, hone ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ndi ḓuvha ḽa u awela tshoṱhe, ḽo kumedzwa Nṋe Yahavee. Ane a vhuya a shuma nga heḽo ḓuvha a vhulawe." 
Exodus31:16 Vhaisraele vha vhulunge heḽo ḓuvha zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho, ḽi vhe tshiga tsha mulanga." 
Exodus31:17 Ndi tshiga tsha lini na lini vhukati ha Vhaisraele na Nṋe, ngauri Nṋe Yahavee ndo ita ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi nga maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili nda litsha u shuma nda awela.”" 
Exodus31:18 Musi Mudzimu o fhedza u amba na Mushe thavhani ya Sinai, a mu ṋea maḓaba mavhili a matombo e Mudzimu Ene muṋe a vha o ṅwala milayo khao." 
Exodus32:1 Musi vhathu vha tshi vhona uri Mushe o no dzulesa thavhani, ha tsha vhuya, vha kuvhanganela Aroni vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Uyo munna Mushe we a ri pfulusa Egipita a ri ḓivhi uri o welwa nga mini, vhone nga vha ri itele mudzimu une wa ḓo ri endedza.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni a vha vhudza a ri, “Bvulani zwiṅina zwa musuku zwa vhasadzi vhaṋu na vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana zwe vha ambara, ni zwi ḓise ngeno ha nṋe.”" 
Exodus32:3 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi bvula zwiṅina zwavho zwa musuku, vha zwi ḓisa ha Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Ene a dzhia izwo zwiṅina a zwi ṋokisa nga mulilo, a fula musuku wa ita lubomo, a vhumba mboho ya musuku. Vhathu vha ri, “Israele, ngoyu mudzimu wau we a u pfulusa Egipita.”" 
Exodus32:5 Ndi hone Aroni a tshi fhaṱa aḽiṱari phanḓa ha mboho ya musuku a ḓivhadza a ri, “Matshelo hu ḓo vha na vhuṱambo ha u hulisa Muṋe washu.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ḽi tshi tsha nga matshelo vha ḓisa zwifuwo zwine zwa ḓo fhiswa zwa vha tshiṱhavhelo, zwiṅwe zwa vha zwa u ḽa zwa vha zwa nduvho ya u konana na Mudzimu. Vhathu vha dzula fhasi vhuṱamboni, vha ḽa vha nwa vha takuwa vha tshina zwa vhuḓabaḓaba." 
Exodus32:7 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Mushe a ri, “Ṱavhanya u hume u tsele fhasi ngauri vhathu vhau vhe wa vha pfulusa Egipita vho tshinya, vho nndandula." 
Exodus32:8 Vho no ḓi ṱutshela nḓila ye nda vha laya uri vha fare yone, vho vhumba mboho nga musuku wo ṋokiswaho, vha i luvha, vha i ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo. Vha ri ndi yone mudzimu wavho we a vha pfulusa Egipita." 
Exodus32:9 Ndi a ḓivha uri vhathu avha vha na tshipimbi. 
Exodus32:10 Zwino u songo linga u nthivhela. Ndo vha sinyutshela, ndi ṱoḓa u vha lozwa. Litsha ndi dzhie iwe na vhaḓuhulu vhau ndi ni ite lushaka luhulu.”" 
Exodus32:11 Hone Mushe a luvhelela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe a ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi mini u tshi sinyutshela vhathu vhau vhe wa vha pfulusa Egipita wó angaladza tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa?" 
Exodus32:12 Kani u ṱoḓa Vhaegipita vha tshi ri, ‘Koṱo, o vha itela vhukwila a tshi vha pfulusa; o itela uri a vha vhulahele dzithavhani, a vha lozwe tshoṱhe fhano shangoni’? Kanda mbiti dzau dzi ofhisaho. Vha humele, u songo ḓisela vhathu vhau khombo." 
Exodus32:13 Edzou elelwa vhaḓinḓa vhau Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo, vhe wa vha anela nga Iwe muṋe, wa vha fulufhedzisa wa ri, ‘Vhana vhaṋu ndi ḓo vha andisa vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni, shango ḽoṱhe ḽe nda fulufhedzisa ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu ḽa vha ḽavho lini na lini.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi rembulusa mbilu yawe, a si tsha ḓisela vhathu vhawe khombo ye a ri u ṱoḓa u vha ḓisela yone." 
Exodus32:15 Mushe a huma a tsa thavha o fara maḓaba mavhili a milayo, o ṅwalwa masia oṱhe, nga phanḓa na nga murahu." 
Exodus32:16 Maḓaba ayo o vha o vhaḓwa nga Mudzimu, na u ṅwalwa o ṅwalwa nga Mudzimu o tou tsheṱa ayo maḓaba." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua a pfa vhathu vha tshi khou ṱavha mukosi, a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Hu pfala mukosi wa nndwa ngei mishashani.”" 
Exodus32:17 Joshua a pfa vhathu vha tshi khou ṱavha mukosi, a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Hu pfala mukosi wa nndwa ngei mishashani.”" 
Exodus32:18 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Hoyo mukosi a si muḓalo wa vho kundaho, a si u lila ha vho kundwaho hoyo mukosi; ndi pfa mukosi wa luimbo lwa vha re vhuṱamboni.”" 
Exodus32:19 Musi Mushe a tshi swika tsini ha mishasha, a tshi vhona mbohwana na vhathu vha tshi khou tshina, a sinyuwa zwihulu. A laṱa aḽa maḓaba e a vha o a fara, a pwashekana henefho tsindeni ḽa thavha." 
Exodus32:20 A dzhia iḽa mboho ye vha vha vho i vhumba, a i fhisa a i kuya ya ita luvhanda, a lu hasha nṱha ha maḓi, a a nwisa Vhaisraele." 
Exodus32:21 Mushe a vhudzisa Aroni a ri, “Vhathu avha vho ni itani ni tshi vhuya na vha ovhisa mulandu mungafha?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni a fhindula a ri, “Vha songo ntsinyutshela, muṋe wanga. Vha a ḓivha uri vhathu avha vho tshingamela hani vhuvhini." 
Exodus32:23 Vho mmbudza uri ndi vha itele mudzimu une wa ḓo vha endedza, vha ri, ‘A ri ḓivhi uri uyo Mushe we a ri pfulusa Egipita o welwa nga mini.’" 
Exodus32:24 Nṋe nda vha vhudza nda ri, ‘A re na nungu dza musuku ndi nnyi?’ Vhone vha bvula vha ḓisa ha nṋe. Nṋe nda posa muliloni, ha bvelela mboho yenei!”" 
Exodus32:25 Mushe a vhona uri Aroni o ita uri vhathu vha si tsha langea, vha vho ḓiita matsilu maswina avho a tshi zwi vhona." 
Exodus32:26 Ndi hone a tshi ima khoroni ya mishasha a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Ane a ima na Muṋe washu nga a ḓe fhano!” Ndi hone Vhalivi vhoṱhe vha tshi kuvhangana khae." 
Exodus32:27 Mushe a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u khou vhudza muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu uri a fare pfumo ḽawe, a tshimbile na mishasha yoṱhe u bva khoroni heino u swika kha iṅwe, a vhulahe muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu fara, a songo khathutshela na ṅwana wa khotsi awe kana khonani dzawe kana vhahura vhawe.”" 
Exodus32:28 Vhalivi vha tenda, vha vhulaha vhanna vhane vha nga swika 3 000 musi wonoyo." 
Exodus32:29 Mushe a vhudza Vhalivi a ri, “Ṋamusi no ḓikumedza na vha vhotshifhe vha u shumela Muṋe washu nga u vhulaha vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vhana vha vhokhotsi aṋu, zwenezwo Muṋe washu o ni ṋea mashudu.”" 
Exodus32:30 Nga matshelo Mushe a amba na vhathu a ri, “No ovha mulandu muhulu. Huno zwino ndi ḓo gonya thavha nda humela ha Muṋe washu; khamusi a nga ni hangwela mulandu waṋu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi humela ha Muṋe washu a swika a ri, “Vhathu havha vho ovha mulandu muhulu. Vho ḓivhumbela mudzimu nga musuku." 
Exodus32:32 A u vha hangweli zwavho naa? Hone arali u sa vha hangweli, izwo thutha dzina ḽanga buguni ye wa ṅwala madzina a vhathu vhau.”" 
Exodus32:33 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Madzina ane nda ḓo a thutha buguni yanga ndi a avho vho nkhakhelaho." 
Exodus32:34 Zwino ṱuwa u endedze vhathu u vha ise he nda u vhudza. Muruṅwa wanga u ḓo u ranga phanḓa, hone hu khou ḓa tshifhinga tshine nda ḓo lifhedza mulandu wa vhathu havha.”" 
Exodus32:35 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓisela vhathu dwadze nge vha kombetshedza Aroni uri a vhumbe mboho ya musuku. 
Exodus33:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ṱuwani hafha fhethu, iwe na vhathu vhe wa vha pfulusa Egipita, ni ye shangoni ḽe nda fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo na vhaḓuhulu vhavho." 
Exodus33:2 Ndi ḓo ruma muruṅwa a ni ranga phanḓa nda thatha Vhakanana na Vhaamori na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi. 
Exodus33:3 Ni khou ya shangoni ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi. Hone Nṋe a thi nga ṱuwi na inwi ngauri ni vhathu vha tshipimbi, ndi nga ḓo ni lozwa nḓilani.”" 
Exodus33:4 Vhathu vha tshi pfa hezwo, vha thoma u lila, vha si tsha ambara nungu." 
Exodus33:5 Muṋe washu o vha o laya Mushe uri a vha vhudze a ri, “Ni vhathu vha tshipimbi. Arali nda ṱuwa na inwi naho tsha tou vha tshifhinganyana zwatsho, ndi nga ni lozwa tshoṱhe. Zwino bvulani nungu dzaṋu, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo vhona zwine nda ḓo ni ita.”" 
Exodus33:6 Vhaisraele tshee vha ṱuwa thavhani ya Horebe, a vho ngo tsha ambara nungu." 
Exodus33:7 Hoṱhe he Vhaisraele vha ṱoka mishasha, Mushe o dzhia dennde khethwa a i akha kulenyana na mishasha. Yo vha i tshi pfi dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. Muṅwe na muṅwe we a vha a tshi ṱoḓa u vhudzisa Muṋe washu tshiṅwe, o vha a tshi bva a ya khayo." 
Exodus33:8 Musi Mushe a tshi bva a tshi ya hone, vhathu vho vha vha tshi takuwa vha ima muṋangoni wa dennde dzavho vha sedza Mushe a vhuya a dzhena khayo." 
Exodus33:9 Musi Mushe o no dzhena ngomu, phuphu ya gole yo vha i tshi tsela fhasi ya ima muṋangoni wa dennde, Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe e kha iḽo gole." 
Exodus33:10 Vhathu vha tshi tou vhona phuphu ya gole i muṋangoni wa dennde, vho vha vha tshi gwadama miṋangoni ya dennde dzavho." 
Exodus33:11 Muṋe washu o vha a tshi amba na Mushe vho livhana zwifhaṱuwo, unga muthu a tshi amba na khonani yawe, Mushe a konou humela mishashani. Hone muṱhannga we a vha a tshi mu farisa, ene Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a ḓi sala denndeni." 
Exodus33:11 Muṋe washu o vha a tshi amba na Mushe vho livhana zwifhaṱuwo, unga muthu a tshi amba na khonani yawe, Mushe a konou humela mishashani. Hone muṱhannga we a vha a tshi mu farisa, ene Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a ḓi sala denndeni." 
Exodus33:12 Mushe a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ngoho uri wo mmbudza uri ndi endedze vhathu ndi vha ise shangoni heḽiḽa, hone a wo ngo mmbudza uri u ḓo nthuma na nnyi. Hufha wo ri wo nnanga ndi vhe muḓinḓa wau, wa ri u a ntakalela." 
Exodus33:13 Arali nangoho u tshi ntakalela, mmbudze zwe wa dzudzanya, uri ndi u ḓivhe ndi ḓi dzula ndi tshi ita zwine zwa u takadza. U elelwe na uri wo nanga lushaka holu uri lu vhe lwau.”" 
Exodus33:14 Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ṱuwe na iwe Nṋe muṋe uri ndi u rudze mbilu?”" 
Exodus33:15 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Arali wa sa ṱuwa na riṋe, u songo tenda ri tshi ṱuwa fhano fhethu." 
Exodus33:16 Zwi ḓo vhonala hani uri u a ri takalela nṋe na vhathu vhau arali wa sa ṱuwa na riṋe? Arali wa vha na riṋe zwi ḓo sumbedza phambano yashu na tshakha dziṅwe dzi re fhano fhasi.” 
Exodus33:17 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ndi ḓo ita zwenezwo zwe wa nkhumbela, ngauri ndi a u ḓivha zwavhuḓivhuḓi nahone ndi a u takalela.”" 
Exodus33:18 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi humbela a ri, “Ndi humbela uri u ntsumbedze lupenyo lwau lu kombodzaho.”" 
Exodus33:19 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓo ita uri lupenyo lwanga lwoṱhe lu fhire phanḓa hau nda bula dzina ḽanga ḽa Yahavee u tshi zwi pfa. Ndi khathutshela ane nda funa, nda pfela vhuṱungu ane nda funa." 
Exodus33:20 Tshifhaṱuwo tshanga u nga si kone u tshi vhona; muthu a mmbona a nga si tsha dovha a tshila. 
Exodus33:21 Hone hafha tsini hanga hu na fhethu hune wa nga ima nṱha ha tombo. 
Exodus33:22 Musi lupenyo lwanga lu tshi fhira, ndi ḓo u longa bakoni ḽa tombo nda u tsireledza nga tshanḓa tshanga u swika ndi tshi fhira." 
Exodus33:23 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo bvisa tshanḓa tshanga wa mmbona ndo u furalela, hone tshifhaṱuwo tshanga a tshi vhonwi.”" 
Exodus34:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Vhaḓa maḓaba mavhili a matombo ane a fana na a u thoma, Nṋe ndi ḓo ṅwala khao maipfi eneaḽa e a vha e kha aḽa a u thoma, e iwe wa a pwashekanya." 
Exodus34:2 Matshelo ḽi tshi tou tsha u ḓilugise, u gonye thavha ya Sinai, u ḓo ṱangana na Nṋe henefho muṱumbani wayo." 
Exodus34:3 U songo gonya na muthu, hu songo vhonala muthu e kha thavha, na nngu na kholomo dzi songo fula tsindeni ḽa thavha.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhaḓa maṅwe maḓaba mavhili a matombo, nga matshelo ḽi tshi tou tsha a a hwala a gonya nao thavhani ya Sinai, sa zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya." 
Exodus34:5 Muṋe washu a tsela fhasi e kha gole, a ima nae henefho, a bula dzina ḽawe ḽa Yahavee." 
Exodus34:6 Muṋe washu a fhira phanḓa hawe a ḓivhadza a ri, “Nṋe Yahavee, Nṋe Yahavee, ndi Mudzimu ane a vha na tshilidzi na khathutshelo, a thi fheli mbilu, ndi na vhuthu vhuhulu, ndi a fulufhedzea." 
Exodus34:7 Ndi dzula ndi na lufuno ha vhuya ha fhira mirafho na mirafho, nda hangwela vhathu milandu yavho na vhutshinyi na vhuvhi havho, hone a thi litshi u lifhedza milandu yavho na kha vhana na vhaḓuhulu, ha vhuya ha fhira murafho wa vhuraru na wa vhuṋa.”" 
Exodus34:8 Mushe a ṱavhanya a gwadama fhasi a luvha. 
Exodus34:9 Mushe a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, arali nangoho u tshi ntakalela ndi u humbela uri u ṱuwe na riṋe. Vhathu havha vha na tshipimbi, hone ri hangwele milandu yashu na vhuvhi hashu, u ri ṱanganedze ri vhe vhathu vhau.”" 
Exodus34:10 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Zwino ndi vhofha mulanga na lushaka lwau lwoṱhe. Ndi ḓo ita zwimangadzo vha tshi zwi vhona, vha vhona zwi sa athu vhuya zwa itwa huṅwe fhethu fhano fhasi kha dziṅwe tshakha. Vhathu vhoṱhe vhane wa dzula navho vha ḓo vhona mishumo yanga; ndi ḓo u itela tshithu tshi ofhisaho." 
Exodus34:11 Thetshelesa milayo ine nda u ṋea ṋamusi. Ndi ḓo thatha Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi vha ni shavha. 
Exodus34:12 Ni songo vhuya na vhofha mulanga na vhathu vha shango ḽine na khou ya khaḽo, ngauri itsho tshi nga ḓo vha tshikwekwe tshine tsha ḓo ni fasha." 
Exodus34:13 Inwi ni thuthekanye aḽiṱari dzavho, ni pwashe matombo avho a zwitungulo, zwiga zwa Ashera mudzimu wavho wa musadzi ni zwi reme." 
Exodus34:14 “Ni songo luvha muṅwe mudzimu, ngauri Nṋe Yahavee ndi pfi Thivhangiswi, ndi Mudzimu a sa vhangiswi." 
Exodus34:15 Ni songo vhuya na vhofha mulanga na vhathu vha heḽo shango, ngauri musi vha tshi luvha midzimu yavho ya vhuaḓa, vha tshi i ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, vha nga ḓo ni vhidza uri ni baḓekane navho, na vho ḓo ḽa zwiḽiwa zwine vha zwi sumela midzimu yavho." 
Exodus34:16 Vhana vhaṋu vha nga ḓo dzea vhasadzi havho vha vhatsinda, vha vha ita uri vha ntshandukele, vha luvhe midzimu yavho ya vhuaḓa." 
Exodus34:17 “Ni songo fula midzimu ya tsimbi na i luvha. 
Exodus34:18 “Dzulani ni tshi ita vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa. Nga ṅwedzi wa Avivi ni ḽe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa ni fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, sa zwe nda ni laya, ngauri no pfuluwa Egipita nga ṅwedzi wonoyo." 
Exodus34:19 “Tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa ṅwana wa mutuka na tshifuwo tsha tshiduna tsha kholomo kana nngu ndi zwanga. 
Exodus34:20 Hone donngi iṅwe na iṅwe ya tanzhe ni i rengulule nga ngwana. Arali na sa i rengulula, ni i vunḓe mutsinga. Ni rengulule vhana vhaṋu vhoṱhe vha vhatuka. Hu songo vha na ane a ḓa phanḓa hanga a songo fara tshithu." 
Exodus34:21 “Ni na maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi ane na nga shuma mishumo yaṋu ngao, hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni songo shuma, na nga tshifhinga tsha u lima kana tsha u kaṋa ni songo shuma." 
Exodus34:22 “Ni ḓi ita vhuṱambo ha Dzivhege musi ni tshi thoma u kaṋa goroi yaṋu ya u ranga; ni ḓi ita vhuṱambo ha Mavhuyahaya tshifhefho musi ni tshi kaṋa zwa masimuni. 
Exodus34:23 “Vhanna vha haṋu vhoṱhe vha ḓe vha nnduvhe luraru nga ṅwaha, Nṋe Yahavee, Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Exodus34:24 Musi ndo no thatha dzitshakha u swikani haṋu, ndo no engedza shango ḽaṋu, a hu nga vhi na ane a ḓo emula shango ḽaṋu tshifhinga tsha honoho vhuṱambo vhuraru." 
Exodus34:25 “Musi ni tshi nṱhavhela tshifuwo ni songo ṋekedza vhurotho ho itwaho nga mbilisa. Tshifuwo tshine na tshi ṱhavhela vhuṱambo ha Paseka ni songo vhea muraḓo watsho ufhio na ufhio u swika ḽa matshelo. 
Exodus34:26 “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ni dzhie zwa u thoma zwe na zwi kaṋa masimuni ni zwi ḓise nḓuni ya Yahavee. “Ni songo bika ngwana kana mbudzana nga mukhaha wa mme ayo.” 
Exodus34:27 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Ṅwala maipfi haya, ngauri mulanga une nda khou u vhofha na iwe na Vhaisraele wo tewa nṱha hao.”" 
Exodus34:28 Mushe a dzula henefho na Muṋe washu a fhedza maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao, a sa ḽi tshithu, a sa nwi tshithu. Mushe a ṅwala maipfi a mulanga kha ayo maḓaba, yone Milayo ya fumi." 
Exodus34:29 Mushe a tshi tsa thavhani ya Sinai ó fara Milayo ya fumi, tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha vhonala tshi tshi khou penya nge a vha a tshi khou amba na Muṋe washu, hone ene o vha a sa zwi ḓivhi." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni na vhathu vhoṱhe vha sedza Mushe vha vhona a tshi khou penya, vha ofha u sendela tsini hawe." 
Exodus34:31 Huno Mushe a vha vhidza, Aroni na vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha vhathu vha ya khae, Mushe a amba navho." 
Exodus34:32 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi kuvhangana ha Mushe, ene a vha ṋea milayo yoṱhe ye a ṋewa nga Muṋe washu thavhani ya Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Musi Mushe o fhedza u amba navho, a khurumela lupila." 
Exodus34:34 Mushe a tshi dzhena denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu uri a ambe na Muṋe washu, o vha a tshi khurumula lupila. Musi a tshi bvela nnḓa o vha a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele zwoṱhe zwe a laiwa uri a zwi ambe," 
Exodus34:35 vhone vha ḓi vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tshi tshi khou penya. Ene a dovha a khurumela luḽa lupila u swika a tshi dovha u vhuelela u amba na Muṋe washu. 
Exodus35:1 Mushe a vhidza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu o ri ni ite hezwi:" 
Exodus35:2 Ni na maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi ane na ḓo shuma mishumo yaṋu ngao, hone ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽi itwe ḽikhethwa, ḽi vhe ḽa u awela, ḽo kumedzwaho Muṋe washu. Ane a vhuya a shuma nga heḽo ḓuvha nga a vhulawe." 
Exodus35:3 Ni songo vhuya na vhasa na mulilo mahayani aṋu nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha.” 
Exodus35:4 Mushe a vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a ri, “Muṋe washu o laya a ri:" 
Exodus35:5 Ṋekedzani Yahavee nduvho. Muṅwe na muṅwe a ḓise nduvho nga u tou funa hawe. A nga ḓisa musuku kana siliva kana musinaseṱha; 
Exodus35:6 lukhaha lwavhuḓi; denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku; sila ḽo itwaho nga vhukuse ha mbudzi; 
Exodus35:7 mukumba wa thutha wo fhomiwa nga phomo tswuku; mukumba wo sukiwaho wa vhibva; thanda ya muunga; 
Exodus35:8 mapfura a mbone; zwilungi zwa mapfura a u ḓodza, na zwa zwioro," 
Exodus35:9 matombo a onikisi na dziṅwe nungu dza u mometshedza kha bannda ya u pakata ya tshifhe muhulu na kha tshipilakhana tshawe. 
Exodus35:10 “Vhatsila vha haṋu vhoṱhe vha ḓe vha ite zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ri zwi itwe: 
Exodus35:11 Dennde na ṱhanga yayo na lupila lwayo lwa nnḓa na dzihuka dzayo na thikho dzayo na mabaphathi ayo a tsimbi na phuphu dzayo na zwiraho zwayo; 
Exodus35:12 mbulungelo na thanda dzayo dza u hwala na tshitibo tshayo na pesa ḽa lupila lune lwa i tsireledza; 
Exodus35:13 ḓafula na thanda dzaḽo na thundu dzaḽo dzoṱhe; vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu; 
Exodus35:14 tshivheambone tsha luvhone na thundu dzatsho; mbone na mapfura adzo; 
Exodus35:15 aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwioro, na thanda dzayo; mapfura a u ḓodza vhotshifhe; zwioro zwone zwiṋe na pesa ḽa lupila lwa muṋangoni wa dennde;" 
Exodus35:16 aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo na musinaseṱha wayo wo mometshedzwaho na thanda dzayo dza u i hwala na thundu dzayo dzoṱhe; na sambelo na tshiraho tshaḽo; 
Exodus35:17 mapesa a u pila muṱa; na phuphu dzao khathihi na zwiraho zwadzo; na lupila lu re muṋangoni wa muṱa; 
Exodus35:18 khokho dza dennde na dza muṱa na thambo dzadzo; 
Exodus35:19 na zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele zwine vhotshifhe vha ambara musi vha tshi shuma Hukhethwa – zwiambaro zwikhethwa zwa tshifhe Aroni na zwa vhana vhawe.” 
Exodus35:20 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ṱuwa," 
Exodus35:21 muṅwe na muṅwe ane a pfa mbilu yawe i tshi tou zwi funa a ḓisa nduvho ha Muṋe washu ya u fhaṱa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. Vha ḓisa zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṱoḓea musi hu tshi luvhiwa na zwa u ita zwiambaro zwa vhotshifhe. 
Exodus35:22 Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi tou zwi funa, vhanna na vhasadzi, vha ḓisa ṱhavhiso dza u nakisa zwiambaro, na zwiṅina na dzirinngi na vhulungu na tshakha dzoṱhe dza nungu dza musuku, vha zwi kumedza Muṋe washu." 
Exodus35:23 Muṅwe na muṅwe we a vha e na lukhaha lwavhuḓi, denga, muridili kana vhukuse vhutswuku, sila ḽa vhukuse ha mbudzi, mukumba wa thutha wo fhomiwa nga phomo tswuku, kana mukumba wo sukwaho, a zwi ḓisa." 
Exodus35:24 Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi kona u bvisa siliva kana musinaseṱha vha ḓisela Muṋe washu zwifhiwa zwavho, na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe na thanda ya muunga ine ya nga shumiswa kha muṅwe mushumo vha i ḓisa." 
Exodus35:25 Vhasadzi vhoṱhe vha vhatsila vha ḓisa ṱhale dza lukhaha lwavhuḓi na ṱhale dza denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku zwe vha vha vho hoṱa. 
Exodus35:26 Vhoṱhe vhe vha pfa mbilu dzavho dzi tshi tou zwi funa vha hoṱa na ṱhale dza vhukuse ha mbudzi. 
Exodus35:27 Vharangaphanḓa vha ḓisa matombo a onikisi na dziṅwe nungu dza u mometshedzwa kha bannda ya u pakata na kha tshipilakhana. 
Exodus35:28 Vha ḓisa na zwilungi na mapfura a mbone, zwa mapfura a u ḓodza na zwioro," 
Exodus35:29 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhane vha zwi funa vha ḓisela Muṋe washu zwifhiwa zwavho vha tshi itela mushumo we a laya Mushe uri a ite, vhoṱhe, vhanna na vhasadzi vhe vha pfa mbilu dzavho dzi tshi tou zwi funa, vha ḓisela Muṋe washu zwi no nga zwenezwo." 
Exodus35:30 Mushe a vhudza Vhaisraele a ri, “Muṋe washu o nanga Betsalele ṅwana wa Uri, muḓuhulu wa Huru, wa tsinde ḽa Juda." 
Exodus35:31 Muṋe washu o mu ḓadza Muya wa Mudzimu, a mu ṋea vhutsila na vhukoni na ṱhalukanyo ya mishumo yoṱhe ya zwa makolo," 
Exodus35:32 na u ita pulane dza zwa vhutsila na u fula musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha; 
Exodus35:33 na u vhaḓa nungu dza u mometshedza; na u vhaḓa thanda; na mishumo miṅwe ya zwa makolo. 
Exodus35:34 Muṋe washu o khetha ene na Oholiaba ṅwana wa Ahisamakha, wa tsinde ḽa Dani, a vha ṋea vhukoni ha u funza vhaṅwe vhutsila havho." 
Exodus35:35 O vha ṋea vhutsila ha mishumo yoṱhe ine ya itwa nga vhakori na vhapulani na vhaluki vha lukhaha na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, na maṅwe masila. Vha a kona u shuma mishumo yoṱhe nahone ndi vhatsila vhane vha kona u ita dzipulane.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Betsalele na Oholiaba na vhaṅwe vhatsila vhoṱhe vhe Muṋe washu a vha ṋea vhutsila na ṱhalukanyo, vhane vha ḓivha u ita zwoṱhe zwi ṱoḓeaho kha u fhaṱa dennde heyo khethwa, vha ite zwoṱhe nga he Muṋe washu a laya.”" 
Exodus36:2 Mushe a vhidza Betsalele na Oholiaba na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vhanna vha vhatsila vhe Muṋe washu a vha ṋea vhukoni, khathihi na vhoṱhe vhe vha pfa mbilu dzi tshi tou zwi funa, Mushe a vha vhudza uri vha thome mushumo." 
Exodus36:3 Ene a vha ṋea nduvho dzoṱhe dze Vhaisraele vha dzi ḓisa uri dzi fhaṱe dennde. Hone Vhaisraele vha ḓi ḓisela Mushe nduvho dzavho, musi muṅwe na muṅwe ḽi tshi tsha." 
Exodus36:4 Ndi hone vhatsila vhe vha vha vha tshi khou shuma vha tshi ya 
Exodus36:5 vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “Vhathu vha khou ḓisa zwi no fhira zwine zwa ṱoḓea kha mushumo we Muṋe washu a laya uri u itwe.”" 
Exodus36:6 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi isa ndaela mishashani yoṱhe uri hu songo vha na ane a kha ḓi bvisa tshithu tsha dennde khethwa; zwenezwo vhathu vha si tsha dovha u ḓisa. 
Exodus36:7 Zwe zwa vha zwo no ḓi ḓiswa zwo vha zwo eḓana u fhedzisa mushumo woṱhe zwa dovha zwa sala. 
Exodus36:8 Vhatsila vha konesaho kha avho vhe vha vha vha tshi khou shuma vha fhaṱa dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu. Vha i fhaṱa nga mbemba dza fumi dza lukhaha vhukuma lwo lukiwa nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, lwa oliwa makolo a vhakherube." 
Exodus36:9 Luvhemba luṅwe na luṅwe lwo vha lu tshi eḓana masia oṱhe, vhunavha lu mitha dza 14, vhuphara lu mitha mbili." 
Exodus36:10 Vha rungekanya mbemba ṱhanu dza ita pesa ḽithihi, mbemba dziḽa dziṅwe ṱhanu na dzone vha ḓi dzi rungekanya-vho dza ita pesa ḽithihi." 
Exodus36:11 Vha ita nkhwe dza sila ḽa denga lumemeni lwa luvhemba lwa nnḓa kha pesa ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. 
Exodus36:12 Vha rungelela nkhwe dza 50 kha luvhemba lwa u thoma lwa pesa ḽa u thoma na nkhwe dza 50 dzi no fana nadzo kha luvhemba lwa u fhedzisela lwa pesa ḽa vhuvhili. Nkhwe dzo vha dzo vhambela. 
Exodus36:13 Vha ita dzihuka dza 50 dza musuku dzine dza farakanya ayo mapesa mavhili a ita ḽithihi, uri dennde i vhe nthihi yoṱhe." 
Exodus36:14 Zwino vha konou ita lupila lwa u fukedza dennde nga mbemba dza 11 dza sila ḽo itwaho nga vhukuse ha mbudzi. 
Exodus36:15 Dzoṱhe dza eḓana, vhunavha dza vha mitha dza 15, vhuphara dza vha mitha mbili." 
Exodus36:16 Vha rungekanya mbemba ṱhanu dza ita pesa ḽithihi, dziḽa dziṅwe ṱhanu na nthihi vha dzi rungekanya-vho dza ita pesa ḽithihi." 
Exodus36:17 Vha rungelela nkhwe dza 50 lumemeni lwa luvhemba lwa u fhedzisela lwa pesa ḽa u thoma, na nkhwe dza 50 lumemeni lwa luvhemba lwa u fhedzisela lwa pesa ḽa vhuvhili." 
Exodus36:18 Vha ita huka dza 50 dza musinaseṱha dza u farakanya ayo mapesa mavhili uri a vhe lupila luthihi. 
Exodus36:19 Vha ita dziṅwe phila mbili, luṅwe lwa itwa nga mukumba mutswuku wa thutha, luṅwe lwa itwa nga mukumba wo sukwaho, lwa ita lupila lwa nnḓa." 
Exodus36:20 Vha ita thikho dza dennde nga muunga dza tou tswiti. 
Exodus36:21 Thikho iṅwe na iṅwe yo vha i na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu na vhuphara ha senthimitha dza 75," 
Exodus36:22 na mikungelo mivhili i fanaho, uri idzo thikho dzi kone u farakana. Thikho dzoṱhe dzo vha dzi na mikungelo yeneyo." 
Exodus36:23 Vha vhaḓa thikho dza 20 dza sia ḽa tshipembe," 
Exodus36:24 na zwiraho zwa 40 zwi no dzhena fhasi hadzo, fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe hú na zwiraho zwivhili zwa u tika mikungelo yawo mivhili." 
Exodus36:25 Vha vhaḓa thikho dza 20 dza sia ḽa devhula ḽa dennde," 
Exodus36:26 na zwiraho zwa 40 zwa siliva, fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe hu na zwivhili." 
Exodus36:27 Na nga murahu ha dennde sia ḽa vhukovhela vha vhaḓa thikho ṱhanu na nthihi 
Exodus36:28 na thikho mbili dza dzikhuḓa. 
Exodus36:29 Thikho hedzo dza dzikhuḓa dzo vha dzo farakanywa nga fhasi, dza paṱekanywa hoṱhe u ya nṱha. Thikho mbili dzo longwaho khuḓani dzo vha dzo itwa nga u ralo." 
Exodus36:30 Ndi uri ho vha hu na thikho ṱhanu na tharu dzi na zwiraho zwa 16 zwa siliva, zwivhili zwi fhasi ha thikho iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Exodus36:31 Vha ita mabaphathi o rambalalaho, vha a ita nga thanda ya muunga, maṱanu a thikho dza sia ḽithihi ḽa dennde," 
Exodus36:32 maṱanu a thikho dza ḽiḽa ḽiṅwe sia-vho, na maṱanu a thikho dza sia ḽa vhukovhela, nga murahu." 
Exodus36:33 Baphathi ḽa vhukati ḽo rambalalaho, ḽo longwaho vhukati ha thikho u ya nṱha, ḽo vha ḽi tshi bva kha sia ḽino ḽa dennde ḽa swika kha ḽiḽa." 
Exodus36:34 Idzo thikho dza fhomiwa musuku, vha dzi longa mikungelo ya musuku ya u fara mabaphathi o rambalalaho, na one o fhomiwa musuku." 
Exodus36:35 Vha ita pesa ḽa lupila nga lukhaha ḽo lukwa nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku ḽo oliwa zwifanyiso zwa vhakherube. 
Exodus36:36 Vha vhaḓa phuphu nṋa dza muunga dza u tika iḽo pesa ḽa lupila, dzo fhomiwa nga musuku, vha dzi longa dzihuka dza musuku. Vha ita zwiraho zwiṋa zwa siliva zwa u fara idzo phuphu." 
Exodus36:37 Muṋangoni wa dennde vha ita pesa ḽa lupila ḽa lukhaha ḽo lukwa nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku lwo ṱamiwa nga makolo. 
Exodus36:38 Iḽo pesa ḽa lupila vha ḽi vhaḓela phuphu ṱhanu dza longwa dzihuka, nṱha hadzo na mbalelo dzadzo dza fhomiwa musuku, vha ita zwiraho zwiṱanu zwa musinaseṱha zwa idzo phuphu." 
Exodus37:1 Betsalele a vhaḓa mbulungelo nga thanda ya muunga, vhunavha hayo ha ita mitha na kotara, vhuphara ya ita senthimitha dza 75, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ya ita senthimitha dza 75." 
Exodus37:2 Ngomu hayo na nnḓa a i fhoma musuku u songo vangiwaho, a i itela lubomo lwa musuku u mona nayo." 
Exodus37:3 A i itela mikungelo miṋa ya musuku ya u i hwala, a i mometshedza kha milenzhe yayo miṋa, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi na mikungelo mivhili." 
Exodus37:4 A vhaḓa thanda dza u i hwala nga thanda ya muunga, dza fhomiwa musuku," 
Exodus37:5 a dzi longa kha mikungelo sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa mbulungelo uri i hwalwe ngadzo. 
Exodus37:6 A ita tshitibo nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, vhunavha hatsho tsha ita mitha na kotara, vhuphara tsha ita senthimitha dza 75." 
Exodus37:7 A vhumba vhakherube vhavhili nga musuku wo fuliwaho," 
Exodus37:8 a vhea muthihi sia ḽino ḽa tshitibo, muṅwe sia ḽiḽa ḽatsho. A vha ita uri vha vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi na tshitibo." 
Exodus37:9 Avho vhakherube vha lavhelesana vhe nṱha ha itsho tshitibo, phapha dzavho dzó ṱharamuwa dza tshi tibedza." 
Exodus37:10 Betsalele a vhaḓa ḓafula nga thanda ya muunga, vhunavha haḽo ḽa vha mitha, vhuphara ḽa vha hafu ya mitha, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ḽa vha senthimitha dza 75." 
Exodus37:11 A ḽi fhoma musuku u songo vangiwaho, a ḽi itela lubomo lwa musuku u mona naḽo." 
Exodus37:12 A ḽi itela mulinga wa vhuphara ha milimitha dza 75 u mona naḽo, a mometshedza lubomo lwa musuku u mona na uyo mulinga." 
Exodus37:13 A ḽi itela mikungelo miṋa ya u fara ya musuku, a i mometshedza khuḓani dzayo nṋa, hune ha vha na milenzhe." 
Exodus37:14 Mikungelo ya u fara thanda dza u hwala iḽo ḓafula yo vha yo vhewa tsini ha mulinga. 
Exodus37:15 Idzo thanda dza u hwala mbulungelo a dzi vhaḓa nga thanda ya muunga a dzi fhoma musuku. 
Exodus37:16 A fula thundu dza ḓafula nga musuku u songo vangiwaho: dzindilo na zwidongo na dzimvuvhelo na midzio ya u tevhula nduvho ya waini. 
Exodus37:17 Betsalele a ita tshivheambone nga musuku u songo vangiwaho. A ita tshiraho tshatsho na tsinde ḽatsho nga musuku wo fuliwaho. Maluvha atsho na pfungwi na nḓevhe, zwo vha zwi tshipiḓa tshithihi natsho." 
Exodus37:18 Ha ṱoṱomowa matavhi maṱanu na ḽithihi nga matungo atsho, mararu e sia ḽino, mararu e kha ḽiḽa." 
Exodus37:19 Ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa ayo matavhi maṱanu na ḽithihi ḽo vha ḽi na maluvha mararu o ḽi ṱamaho o vhumbea unga mualimondo u tshi fhufhumisa, e na pfungwi na nḓevhe." 
Exodus37:20 Tsinde ḽa tshivheambone ḽo vha ḽi na maluvha maṋa o ḽi ṱamaho o vhumbea unga mualimondo u tshi fhufhumisa, e na pfungwi na nḓevhe." 
Exodus37:21 Ho vha hu na pfungwi nthihi fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a u thoma o ṱoṱomowaho a tshi bva kha tshivheambone, ḽiṅwe ḽi fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a tevhelaho, ḽiṅwe ḽi fhasi ha matavhi mavhili a u fhedzisela, matavhi oṱhe e maṱanu na ḽithihi." 
Exodus37:22 Pfungwi na matavhi na tshivheambone zwo vha zwo momekana zwo fulwa musuku u songo vangiwaho. 
Exodus37:23 A ita mbone ṱhanu na mbili dza tshivheambone, a ita na zwiṱunyi zwatsho na zwifaredzi nga musuku u songo vangiwiho." 
Exodus37:24 O ita tshivheambone na zwithu zwatsho zwoṱhe nga musuku u songo vangiwiho wa khilogiramu dza 35. 
Exodus37:25 Betsalele a fhaṱa aḽiṱari nga thanda ya muunga, ya vha ya u fhisela zwioro. Masia oṱhe ayo o vha a tshi eḓana, vhunavha hayo vhu hafu ya mitha, vhuphara vhu hafu ya mitha, vhulapfu u ya nṱha vhu mitha. Ṋanga dzayo khuḓani dzayo nṋa dzo vha dzo momekana nayo." 
Exodus37:26 A fhoma nṱha hayo na masia ayo maṋa oṱhe na ṋanga dzayo nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, a i mometshedza lubomo lwa musuku u mona nayo." 
Exodus37:27 A i itela mikungelo mivhili ya musuku ya u hwala ngayo, a i mometshedza fhasi ha lubomo masia mavhili, uri i kone u fara thanda dzine ya hwalwa ngadzo." 
Exodus37:28 Idzo thanda o dzi vhaḓa nga thanda ya muunga, a dzi fhoma musuku." 
Exodus37:29 Betsalele a ita na mapfura makhethwa a u ḓodza na zwioro, a zwi ṱanganya na mapfura a u ḓola sa muvangi mukoni." 
Exodus38:1 Betsalele a fhaṱa aḽiṱari nga thanda ya muunga, ya vha ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo: Masia ayo o vha a tshi eḓana, vhunavha vhu mitha mbili na hafu, vhuphara vhu mitha mbili na hafu, vhulapfu u ya nṱha vhu mitha na hafu." 
Exodus38:2 A ita maṋanga nṱha ha khuḓa nṋa, a vha tshipiḓa tshithihi na aḽiṱari. Yoṱhe a i fhoma musinaseṱha." 
Exodus38:3 A ita na thundu yoṱhe ya aḽiṱari: ndongo dza u fara milora na dzifosholo na masambelo a u handulula na dziforogo na ndongo dza mulilo. Zwoṱhe hezwo zwithu o zwi ita nga musinaseṱha. 
Exodus38:4 A ita tshiṱhaṱhi tsha musinaseṱha a tshi vhea fhasi ha mulinga wa aḽiṱari, uri u ya nṱha tshi swike vhukati ha aḽiṱari." 
Exodus38:5 A ita mikungelo miṋa ya u hwala a i mometshedza khuḓani nṋa. 
Exodus38:6 A ita thanda nṋa dza u hwala a dzi fhoma nga musinaseṱha," 
Exodus38:7 a dzi longa kha mikungelo sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa aḽiṱari, uri i kone u hwalwa ngadzo. A ita phakho ya aḽiṱari nga makwati." 
Exodus38:8 Betsalele a ita sambelo ḽa musinaseṱha na tshiraho tshaḽo tsha musinaseṱha, a zwi ita nga zwivhoni zwa vhasadzi vhane vha shuma muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Exodus38:9 Dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu Betsalele a i itela muṱa nga mapesa a lukhaha. Vhulapfu ha mapesa a sia ḽa tshipembe ho vha hu mitha dza 50," 
Exodus38:10 ó tikwa nga phuphu dza musinaseṱha dza 20 dzi ngomu zwirahoni zwa musinaseṱha zwa 20, dzi na dzihuka na mbalelo dza siliva." 
Exodus38:11 Uyo muṱa sia ḽa devhula wo vha wo ḓi ralo. 
Exodus38:12 Sia ḽa vhukovhela ho vha hu na mapesa a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 25, na phuphu dza fumi na zwiraho zwa fumi dzi na dzihuka na mbalelo dza siliva." 
Exodus38:13 Vhuphara ha sia ḽa vhubvaḓuvha, muṋangoni wa phanḓa, dza vha mitha dza 25." 
Exodus38:14 Sia ḽiṅwe ḽa muṋango ho vha hu na mapesa o nembelelaho a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 7,5, ó tikwa nga phuphu tharu dzo longwa kha zwiraho zwiraru." 
Exodus38:15 Sia ḽiṅwe, masia oṱhe a muṋango wa muṱa, ho vha hu na mapesa o nembelelaho a vhulapfu ha mitha dza 7,5, e na phuphu dzao tharu dzo longwa kha zwiraho zwiraru." 
Exodus38:16 Mapesa oṱhe o tangaho muṱa o vha o itwa nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi. 
Exodus38:17 Zwiraho zwa idzo phuphu zwo vha zwo itwa nga musinaseṱha, dzihuka na mbalelo na vhupila ha ṱhodzi dza phuphu ho itwa nga siliva. Phuphu dzoṱhe dzo tangaho muṱa dzo vha dzo ṱanganywa nga mbalelo dza siliva." 
Exodus38:18 Pesa ḽa muṋango wa muṱa ḽo vha ḽo itwa nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi ḽó lukwa nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, ḽo ṱamiwa nga makolo. Ḽo vha ḽi ḽa vhunavha ha mitha dza fumi, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ḽi mitha mbili na hafu, u ḓi nga mapesa a muṱa." 
Exodus38:19 Ḽo vha ḽo tikwa nga phuphu nṋa dzi re na zwiraho zwa musinaseṱha. Huka dzadzo na vhupila ha ṱhodzi dzadzo na mbalelo dzadzo dzo vha dzo itwa nga siliva. 
Exodus38:20 Khokho dzoṱhe dza dennde na dza muṱa wo i tangaho dzo vha dzi dza musinaseṱha. 
Exodus38:21 Ngoyu mutevhe wa thundu yo fhaṱaho dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu he ha vha ho vhewa maḓaba mavhili a matombo o ṅwalwaho Milayo ya fumi. Mushe o ri uyo mutevhe u ṅwalwe, wa ṅwalwa nga Vhalivi, vha shuma vha tshi langwa nga Ithamara ṅwana wa tshifhe Aroni." 
Exodus38:22 Betsalele, ṅwana wa Uri, muḓuhulu wa Huru, wa tsinde ḽa Juda, o ita zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ri zwi itwe a tshi amba na Mushe." 
Exodus38:23 Mutikedzi wawe, Oholiaba ṅwana wa Ahisamakha, wa tsinde ḽa Dani, o vha e mutsheṱi na muoli na muluki wa lukhaha lwavhuḓi lwa denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku." 
Exodus38:24 Musuku woṱhe we wa kumedzwa Muṋe washu uri u shumiswe denndeni khethwa wo kaliwa wa lemela khilogiramu dza 1 000, u tshi kaliwa nga muelo wo tendelwaho." 
Exodus38:25 Siliva i no bva kha mbalo ya vhathu yo kaliwa ya lemela khilogiramu dza 3 430, u tshi kaliwa nga muelo wo tendelwaho." 
Exodus38:26 Mutengo hoyo ndi zwoṱhe zwo bviswaho nga vhathu vhoṱhe vho ṅwalisaho hu tshi vhalwa vhathu, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi bvisa giramu dza 6, zwó kaliwa nga muelo wo tendelwaho. Ho vha hu na vhanna vha 603 550 vha miṅwaha ya 20 kana u fhira vhe vha ṅwaliswa hu tshi vhaliwa vhathu." 
Exodus38:27 Kha siliva, ya khilogiramu dza 3 400 yo shuma u ita zwiraho zwa ḓana zwa dennde khethwa na pesa, tshiraho tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho itwa nga siliva ya khilogiramu dza 34." 
Exodus38:28 Betsalele a dzhia khilogiramu dza 20 dza siliva yo salaho a ita ngayo mbalelo dza tsimbi na dzihuka dza dziphuphu na vhupila ha ṱhodzi dzadzo. 
Exodus38:29 Musinaseṱha we wa kumedzwa Muṋe washu wo vha u tshi lemela khilogiramu dza 2 425. 
Exodus38:30 Betsalele o u dzhia a ita ngawo zwiraho zwa phuphu dza muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu, na aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha na tshiṱhaṱhi tshayo tsha musinaseṱha na thundu yoṱhe ya aḽiṱari," 
Exodus38:31 na zwiraho zwa muṱa wo tangeledzwaho nga matungo, na muṋango wa muṱa na khokho dzoṱhe dza dennde na muṱa wo i tangeledzaho nga matungo." 
Exodus39:1 Vha ita zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele nga denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku zwine vhotshifhe vha ḓo ambara musi vha tshi shuma hukhethwa. Vha itela Aroni zwiambaro zwikhethwa zwa vhutshifhe sa zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Exodus39:2 Vha ita bannda ya u pakata nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na ṱhale dza musuku. 
Exodus39:3 Vha fula mapesa a musuku, vha a tumukanya a ita mbemba dza u mometshedza kha lukhaha lwavhuḓi na kha denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, wa vhonala u mushumo wa mutsila." 
Exodus39:4 Vha ita zwibannda zwivhili zwa mahaḓani vha tshi itela bannda ya u pakata vha zwi rungelela masia ayo uri i kone u pfuṋelwa. 
Exodus39:5 Kha bannda ya u pakata ho rungelelwa bannda yo lukiwaho zwavhuḓi, yo itwaho nga zwi fanaho na zwenezwo, uri i vhe tshipiḓa tshithihi nayo, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Exodus39:6 Vha lugisa matombo a onikisi vha a govhela nga thale dza musuku; a tsheṱiwa madzina a fumi na mavhili a vhana vha Israele nga nḓila ya vhutsila. 
Exodus39:7 Vha a nambatedza kha kubannda kwa mahaḓani kwa bannda ya u pakata uri a humbudze Mudzimu matsinde a 12 a vhathu vha Israele, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Exodus39:8 Vha ita tshipilakhana nga zwithu zwi fanaho na zwenezwo zwe vha ita ngazwo bannda ya u pakata na makolo a fanaho na eneaḽa. 
Exodus39:9 Masia oṱhe o vha a tshi eḓana nahone dzi mbemba mbili, vhunavha vhu senthimitha dza 25, vhuphara vhu senthimitha dza 25." 
Exodus39:10 Vha mometshedza miduba miṋa ya matombo a mutengo muhulu khatsho: kha muduba wa u ranga vha nambatedza rubi na thophasi na ganethe; 
Exodus39:11 kha muduba wa vhuvhili vha nambatedza muroxwe na safire na daimane; 
Exodus39:12 kha muduba wa vhuraru vha nambatedza hiyasinthi na agathi na amethisi; 
Exodus39:13 kha muduba wa vhuṋa vha nambatedza berili na onikisi na jasipere. Ayo a govhelwa nga thale dza musuku. 
Exodus39:14 Ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa matombo ayo a 12 ḽo vha ḽo tsheṱiwa dzina ḽa muṅwe wa vhana vha Israele zwi tshi imela matsinde a 12 a vhathu vha Israele. 
Exodus39:15 Tshipilakhana vha tshi itela dzigeḓane nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, wo sombiwa unga ṱhale." 
Exodus39:16 Vha ita maluvha mavhili a musuku na rinngi mbili dza musuku, idzo rinngi mbili vha dzi rungelela kha khuḓa dza nṱha dza tshipilakhana." 
Exodus39:17 Vha pfuṋela dziḽa ṱhale mbili dza musuku kha idzo rinngi mbili," 
Exodus39:18 ṱhodzi dziṅwe mbili dza idzo ṱhale vha dzi pfuṋela kha ayo maluvha mavhili, nga u ralo vha dzi pfuṋela nga phanḓa kha zwibannda zwa mahaḓani zwa bannda ya u pakata." 
Exodus39:19 Vha ita rinngi mbili dza musuku vha dzi rungelela kha khuḓa dza fhasi dza tshipilakhana kha lumeme lwa ngomu ha bannda ya u pakata. 
Exodus39:20 Vha ita dziṅwe rinngi mbili dza musuku vha dzi rungelela kha tshipiḓa tsha fhasi tsha phanḓa ha izwo zwibannda zwa mahaḓani zwivhili zwa bannda ya u pakata, tsini ha lupendelo, nṱha ha bannda iḽa yo lukwaho zwavhuḓi." 
Exodus39:21 Vha vhofhekanya dzirinngi dza tshipilakhana na dzirinngi dza bannda ya u pakata nga ṱhale dza denga, sa zwenezwiḽa zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe, uri tshipilakhana tshi dzule nṱha ha bannda, tshi si rembeḓe." 
Exodus39:22 Phuraphura ine ya ḓa nṱha ha bannda ya u pakata yo vha yo lukwa nga vhukuse ha denga. 
Exodus39:23 Buli ḽa ṱhoho ḽo vha ḽo khwaṱhiswa nga lubomo lwo lukiwaho uri ḽi si kheruwe. 
Exodus39:24 Vha ṱama lupendelo lwa fhasi lwa phuraphura nga zwivhuvhi zwa denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku na lukhaha lwavhuḓi lwo lukiwaho. 
Exodus39:25 Vha ita na dziḓilogo dza musuku u songo vangiwaho vha dzi vhea u mona na lupendelo lwa fhasi lwa phuraphura vhukati ha zwivhuvhi," 
Exodus39:26 dziḓilogo na zwivhuvhi zwo ṱoredzana hoṱhe u mona na lupendelo lwa fhasi lwa phuraphura ya mushumo, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Exodus39:27 Vha ita hemmbe dza Aroni na vhana vhawe," 
Exodus39:28 na muthini na gebisi na shothi dza lukhaha," 
Exodus39:29 na bannda ya lukhaha lwavhuḓi na denga na muridili na vhukuse vhutswuku, zwo ṱamiwa nga makolo, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Exodus39:30 Vha ita na phuleithi, tshone tshiga tshikhethwa tsha u ḓikumedza, nga musuku u songo vangiwaho, vha ṅwala khayo vha ri, “ ndo kumedzwa yahavee.”" 
Exodus39:31 Vha tshi vhofhelela nga phanḓa ha muthini nga luṱale lwa denga, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Exodus39:32 Mushumo woṱhe wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu wa khunyeledzwa. Vhaisraele vha ita zwoṱhe nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe vha si siedze na tshithihi. 
Exodus39:33 Vha ḓisa iyo dennde ha Mushe na thundu dzayo dzoṱhe, dzihuka dzayo na thikho dzayo na mbalelo dzayo dza tsimbi na phuphu dzayo na zwiraho zwayo," 
Exodus39:34 na vhupila ha mukumba wa thutha ho fhomiwa nga phomo tswuku, na vhupila ha mukumba wo sukiwaho; pesa ḽa u pila," 
Exodus39:35 na mbulungelo ya milayo na thanda dzayo na tshitibo tshayo," 
Exodus39:36 na ḓafula na thundu dzaḽo dzoṱhe na vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu; 
Exodus39:37 tshivheambone tsha musuku u songo vangiwaho na mbone dzatsho na thundu dzatsho dzoṱhe na mapfura a mbone," 
Exodus39:38 na aḽiṱari ya musuku na mapfura a u ḓodza, na zwioro; na pesa ḽa lupila lwa muṋango wa dennde," 
Exodus39:39 na aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha na tshiṱhaṱhi tshayo tsha musinaseṱha na thanda dzayo na thundu dzayo dzoṱhe, na sambelo na tshiraho tshaḽo," 
Exodus39:40 na mapesa a u pila muṱa na phuphu dzawo na zwiraho, na pesa ḽa muṋango wa muṱa na thambo dzaḽo, na khokho dza dennde na thundu yoṱhe ine ya shuma denndeni," 
Exodus39:41 na zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele zwine vhotshifhe vha zwi ambara vhe fhethu hukhethwa, zwiambaro zwikhethwa zwa tshifhe Aroni na vhana vhawe." 
Exodus39:42 Vhaisraele vho ita mushumo woṱhe nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Exodus39:43 Mushe a sedza zwoṱhe a vhona uri zwoṱhe vho zwi ita nga he Muṋe washu a laya. Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vha shudufhadza. 
Exodus40:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri," 
Exodus40:2 “Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga u imise dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe. 
Exodus40:3 Ngomu hayo u longe mbulungelo i re na Milayo ya fumi, u nembeledze pesa ḽa lupila phanḓa hayo." 
Exodus40:4 U dzhenise ḓafula u vhee thundu dzaḽo nṱha haḽo. U dzhenise na tshivheambone, nṱha hatsho u vhee mbone." 
Exodus40:5 Phanḓa ha mbulungelo u vhee aḽiṱari ya musuku ya u fhisela zwioro, u nembeledze pesa ḽa lupila muṋangoni wa dennde." 
Exodus40:6 Phanḓa ha dennde u vhee aḽiṱari ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo. 
Exodus40:7 U vhee sambelo vhukati ha dennde na aḽiṱari u ḽi ḓadze maḓi. 
Exodus40:8 U ite muṱa u mona na dennde, u nembeledze pesa ḽa lupila muṋangoni wa muṱa." 
Exodus40:9 “Wo no fhedza u nkumedze iyo dennde na thundu yayo yoṱhe nga u i shela mapfura makhethwa, ndi hone i tshi ḓo vha khethwa." 
Exodus40:10 Wo no fhedza izwo u nkumedze aḽiṱari na thundu yayo yoṱhe nga u i shela mapfura, ndi hone i tshi ḓo vha khethwa tshoṱhe." 
Exodus40:11 U nkumedze na sambelo na tshiraho tshaḽo nga u ralo. 
Exodus40:12 “U ḓise Aroni na vhana vhawe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, u vha vhudze vha ṱambe." 
Exodus40:13 U ambadze Aroni zwiambaro zwikhethwa, u mu ḓodze mapfura, u nkumedze ene, uri a ntshumele e tshifhe." 
Exodus40:14 U ḓise vhana vhawe u vha ambadze dzihemmbe. 
Exodus40:15 Wo no ralo u kone u vha ḓodza mapfura, zwi nge u tshi ḓodza khotsi avho mapfura, uri vha ntshumele vhe vhotshifhe. U ḓodzwa mapfura uho hu ḓo vha ita vhotshifhe, vhone na vhana vhavho vha vha vhotshifhe lini na lini.”" 
Exodus40:16 Mushe a ita zwoṱhe nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya; ho ngo siedza na tshithihi. 
Exodus40:17 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga wa ṅwaha wa vhuvhili tshee vha pfuluwa Egipita, dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu ya imiswa." 
Exodus40:18 Mushe a longa zwiraho zwayo vhudzuloni hazwo, a imisa thikho dzayo, a longa mbalelo dza u rambalala dza tsimbi, a imisa phuphu dzayo." 
Exodus40:19 Mushe a fulela iyo dennde, nṱha a fukedza lupila lwa nnḓa, nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya." 
Exodus40:20 Ndi hone a tshi dzhia aḽa maḓaba mavhili a milayo a dzi longa ngomu ha mbulungelo. A longa thanda kha mikungelo ya mbulungelo, a i tiba nga tshitibo." 
Exodus40:21 Ndi hone a tshi longa mbulungelo ngomu ha dennde, a nembeledza pesa ḽa lupila. U ralo ha vha u pila mbulungelo, nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya." 
Exodus40:22 Mushe a longa ḓafula denndeni ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu, thungo ya devhula nnḓa ha pesa ḽa lupila,"
