Numbers8:16 Ndo dzhia vhone vha vha vhanga vhudzuloni ha matanzhe a vhatuka a Vhaisraele, ndi vhanga ndi ndoṱhe." 
Numbers8:17 Zwiḽa ndi tshi vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe Egipita, ndo khetha tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa mutuka ḽa muṱa muṅwe na muṅwe wa Vhaisraele nda ri ndi ḽanga, na tanzhe ḽa tshifuwo tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe." 
Numbers8:18 Zwino ndi khou dzhia Vhalivi vhudzuloni ha matanzhe oṱhe a Vhaisraele," 
Numbers8:19 nahone ndi dzhia Vhalivi nda vha ṋea Aroni na vhana vhawe vha vha tshifhiwa tshi bvaho kha Vhaisraele, vha shumele Vhaisraele denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, vha pfumelele Vhaisraele vha vha tsireledze kha khombo ine ya nga vha vhulaha arali vho sendela tsini ha fhethu hukhethwa.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ndi hone Mushe na Aroni na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi kumedza Vhalivi sa zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Numbers8:21 Vhalivi vha ḓikumulula, vha kuvha zwiambaro zwavho, Aroni a vha kumedza Muṋe washu vha vha tshifhiwa tshawe. A ita na u vha pfumelela uri a vha kumulule." 
Numbers8:22 Vhathu vha ita zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe a tshi amba Vhalivi. Zwenezwo Vhalivi vha mbo ḓi tea u shuma denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu vha tshi langwa nga Aroni na vhana vhawe. 
Numbers8:23 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri," 
Numbers8:24 “Mulivi muṅwe na muṅwe wa munna u bva kha wa miṅwaha ya 25 u ḓo shuma mishumo yo fanelaho denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe," 
Numbers8:25 musi a tshi swika miṅwaha ya 50 u ḓo awedzwa. 
Numbers8:26 Ngavhuya a nga ḓi farisa Vhalivi vha hawe vha tshi shuma mishumo yavho yo fanelaho denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, hone a songo ita mushumo na muthihi nga ene muṋe. U dzudzanye mishumo ya Vhalivi nga u ralo.”" 
Numbers9:1 Muṋe washu o amba na Mushe phangani ya Sinai nga ṅwedzi wa u ranga wa ṅwaha wa vhuvhili Vhaisraele vho no pfuluwa Egipita, a ri," 
Numbers9:2 “Nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wonoyu, musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi kovhela, Vhaisraele vha tevhedze maitele a Paseka hu tshi tevhelwa milayo yoṱhe na ndayo dzayo.”" 
Numbers9:3  
Numbers9:4 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhudza vhathu uri vha tevhedze maitele a Paseka," 
Numbers9:5 nga madekwana a ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga vha ita nga u ralo vhe phangani ya Sinai. Vhathu vha ita zwoṱhe nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Numbers9:6 Hone ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhanna vhe vha vha vho kumala nge vha kwama tshitumbu, vhenevho vha kundwa u ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka musi wonoyo. Vha ṱuwa vha ya ha Mushe na Aroni" 
Numbers9:7 vha ri, “Ro kumala nge ra kwama tshitumbu, hone ndi mini ri tshi dzivhiswa u ṋekedza nduvho ya Muṋe washu na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele?”" 
Numbers9:8 Mushe a vha fhindula a ri, “Lindelani u swika ndi tshi wana ndaela i bvaho ha Muṋe washu.”" 
Numbers9:9 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe 
Numbers9:10 uri a vhudze Vhaisraele a ri, “Arali muṅwe waṋu kana vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu vho kumadzwa nga u kwama tshitumbu kana vhe kule vho fara lwendo, hone vha tshi funa u ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka," 
Numbers9:11 ni a tendelwa u vhu ita naho ho fhela ṅwedzi muthihi, nga madekwana a ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili. Ni ite vhuṱambo uho nga vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa na maṱari a kalakataho." 
Numbers9:12 Ni songo sia muladza wa izwo zwiḽiwa ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha, nahone ni songo vhuya na vunḓa shambo na ḽithihi ḽa izwo zwifuwo. Itani vhuṱambo ha Paseka ni tshi tevhedza ndayo dzoṱhe." 
Numbers9:13 Hone muthu a songo kumalaho, a songo faraho lwendo a ya kule, arali a sa ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka, ha tsha ḓo vhalwa na vhathu vhanga, nge a si nṋekedze nduvho nga tshifhinga tsho vhewaho. O fanela u pfa vhuṱungu nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi hawe." 
Numbers9:14 “Arali mutsinda ane a dzula na inwi a tshi funa u ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka, o fanela u vhu ita a tshi tevhedza milayo yoṱhe na ndayo dzoṱhe. Mulayo wonoyo u kwama vhoṱhe, a nga vha o bebelwaho henefho kana e mutsinda.”" 
Numbers9:15 Musi we dennde ya mbulungelo ya mulanga ya akhiwa, ha ḓa gole ḽa alama nṱha hayo. Vhusiku iḽo gole ḽo vha ḽi tshi nga mulilo." 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 Musi ḽi tshi takuwa, Vhaisraele vho vha vha tshi ḓi ṱokolola mishasha, vha dovha vha ṱoka mishasha fhethu he ḽa tsela fhasi." 
Numbers9:18 Vhathu vho ṱokolola mishasha nge vha vhudzwa nga Muṋe washu, vha dovha vha ṱoka mishasha nge a vha vhudza. Arali gole ḽi tshi kha ḓi vha ḽo alama dennde, vho vha vha tshi ḓi dzula mishashani yeneyo." 
Numbers9:19 Arali gole ḽa alama nṱha ha dennde tshifhinga tshilapfu, vho vha vha tshi thetshelesa Muṋe washu vha si pfuluwe." 
Numbers9:20 Tshiṅwe tshifhinga gole ḽo vha ḽi tshi alama nṱha ha dennde maḓuvha a si gathi, ya vha ndaela ya Muṋe washu ya uri vha dzule henefho, vha dovha vha pfuluwa vha tshi tevhedza ndaela ya Muṋe washu." 
Numbers9:21 Tshiṅwe tshifhinga gole ḽo vha ḽi tshi dzula henefho u bva nga madekwana u swika nga matsheloni, gole ḽi tshi tou takuwa na vhone vha takuwa vha fara lwendo. Kana ḽo takuwa masiari kana vhusiku, hezwo gole ḽi tshi tou takuwa, vha mbo thoma u tshimbila." 
Numbers9:22 Arali gole ḽi tshee ḽo alama nṱha ha dennde naho a vha maḓuvha mavhili kana ṅwedzi kana maḓuvha manzhi, vho vha vha sa tshimbili vha fhirela phanḓa, hone arali ḽi tshi takuwa, vho vha vha tshi fhirela phanḓa." 
Numbers9:23 Vho vha vha tshi ṱoka mishasha vha i ṱokolola nga u thetshelesa zwine Muṋe washu a vha laya a tshi vhudza Mushe, ene a vhudza vhathu." 
Numbers10:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers10:2 “Ita phalaphala mbili dza siliva yo fuliwaho dzine wa ḓo vhidza vhathu ngadzo uri vha kuvhangane, na musi hu tshi ṱokololwa mishasha." 
Numbers10:3 Arali phalaphala dzoṱhe vhuvhili hadzo dzi tshi lidzwa ha lapfiswa mubvumo, vhathu vhoṱhe vha kuvhangane muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe." 
Numbers10:4 Hone arali hu tshi lidzwa phalaphala nthihi, zwenezwo hu kuvhangana vharangaphanḓa vha mitupo fhedzi." 
Numbers10:5 Arali hu tshi lidzwa lwa u thoma, hu ḓo bva vha matsinde a thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha," 
Numbers10:6 hu tshi lidzwa lwa vhuvhili, hu ḓo bva vha matsinde a thungo ya tshipembe. Ndi uri hu tshi lidzwa phalaphala vhathu vha ṱokolole mishasha," 
Numbers10:7 hone arali hu tshi vhidzwa vhathu uri vha kuvhangane, hu lidzwa ha lapfiswa mibvumo." 
Numbers10:8 Idzo phalaphala dzi lidzwe nga vhotshifhe vhana vha Aroni. Wonoyo ndi mulayo une na fanela u u vhulunga lini na lini. 
Numbers10:9 “Musi ni nndwani shangoni ḽa haṋu, ni tshi lwa na swina ḽe ḽa ni thoma, lidzani phalaphala dzenedzo. Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu ndi ḓo ni elelwa nda ni lamulela kha maswina aṋu." 
Numbers10:10 Na misi ya madakalo – nga vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi Muswa na vhuṅwe-vho vhuṱambo haṋu no fanela u lidza idzo phalaphala musi ni tshi ṋekedza nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho na dza u konana na Nṋe. Nṋe Mudzimu waṋu ndi ḓo ni humbula ngazwo. Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu.” 
Numbers10:11 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 20 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili tshee vhathu vha pfuluwa Egipita, gole ḽo alamaho nṱha ha dennde ya mbulungelo ya mulanga ḽa takuwa," 
Numbers10:12 Vhaisraele vha thoma lwendo lwavho vha tshi bva phangani ya Sinai. Gole ḽa ḓa ḽa ima sogani ḽa Pharani. 
Numbers10:13 Vha thoma u tshimbila nge Muṋe washu a vha laya nga Mushe. 
Numbers10:14 Misi yoṱhe vha tshi tshimbila, vho vha vha tshi ḓi tevhekana nga nḓila yeneyo. Vhe vha ḓi ranga phanḓa ndi khethekanyo i rangwaho phanḓa nga Juda, vha tshi langwa nga Nahashoni ṅwana wa Aminadaba." 
Numbers10:15 Tsinde ḽa Isakhara ḽo vha ḽi tshi langwa nga Nathaniele ṅwana wa Tsuara. 
Numbers10:16 Tsinde ḽa Zebuloni ḽo vha ḽi tshi langwa nga Eliaba ṅwana wa Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Ndi hone hu tshi akhululwa dennde, ha takuwa vha mutupo wa Gerisoni na wa Mirari, vha i hwala." 
Numbers10:18 Ha tevhela vha khethekanyo ya vho rangwaho phanḓa nga tsinde ḽa Rubeni, vha takuwa, tshigwada nga tshigwada, vha tshi langwa nga Elitsuru ṅwana wa Shedeuru." 
Numbers10:19 Tsinde ḽa Simioni ḽo vha ḽi tshi langwa nga Shelumiele ṅwana wa Tsurishadai," 
Numbers10:20 ḽa Gadi ḽi tshi langwa nga Eliasafa ṅwana wa Deuele. 
Numbers10:21 Zwino ha takuwa Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi vhó hwala zwithu zwikhethwa. Musi vha tshi swika mishashani ine vha khou ya khayo, vha wana dennde yo dovha u akhiwa." 
Numbers10:22 Ha tevhela vha khethekanyo ya vho rangwaho phanḓa nga tsinde ḽa Efraimi, vha takuwa, tshigwada nga tshigwada, vha tshi langwa nga Elishama ṅwana wa Amihudu." 
Numbers10:23 Tsinde ḽa Manase ḽo vha ḽi tshi langwa nga Gamaliele ṅwana wa Phedatsuru," 
Numbers10:24 ḽa Benyamini ḽi tshi langwa nga Abidani ṅwana wa Gidoni. 
Numbers10:25 Ha fhedzisela vha khethekanyo yo rangwaho phanḓa nga tsinde ḽa Dani, vhone vho vha vhe vhalindi vha murahu vha khethekanyo dzoṱhe, vha takuwa, tshigwada nga tshigwada, vha tshi langwa nga Ahiesere ṅwana wa Amishadai." 
Numbers10:26 Tsinde ḽa Ashere ḽo vha ḽi tshi langwa nga Phagiele ṅwana wa Okhorani," 
Numbers10:27 ḽa Nafuthali ḽi tshi langwa nga Ahira ṅwana wa Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Vhathu vho vha vha tshi tshimbila vho tevhekana nga u ralo, tshigwada nga tshigwada, musi Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱokolola mishasha vha tshi fara lwendo." 
Numbers10:29 Mushe a humbela mulamu wawe Hobaba ṅwana wa Reuele wa Mumidiani a ri, “Ri ḓo ṱuwa ri tshi takuwa ra livha fhethu he Muṋe washu a ri u ḓo ri ṋea hone. O fulufhedzisa uri Vhaisraele zwi ḓo vha nakela, zwenezwo nga ri ṱuwe roṱhe, ri ḓo ni tonda-vho.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobaba a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa, nṋe ndi humela ha hashu.”" 
Numbers10:31 Mushe a ri, “Aiwa nandi, ni songo ri ṱutshela. Ni a ḓivha hune ra nga ṱoka hone mishasha fhano sogani, ndi inwi ane na nga ri endedza." 
Numbers10:32 Arali na ṱuwa na riṋe, mashudu oṱhe ane Muṋe washu a ri ṋea a ḓo vha aṋu-vho.”" 
Numbers10:33 Musi vhathu vha tshi ṱuwa Sinai, thavhani khethwa, vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu vha tshi khou tshimbila. Mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu yo ḓi vha ranga phanḓa uri i vha wanele hune vha nga ṱoka mishasha." 
Numbers10:34 Vha ḓi tshimbila nga u ralo vha tshi takuwa nga matsheloni, gole ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓi vhonala nṱha havho masiari." 
Numbers10:35 Musi mbulungelo ya mulanga i tshi takuwa, Mushe o vha a tshi ri, “Muṋe washu, takuwa, balanganya maswina au, vhane vha u vhenga nga vha tou shavha!”" 
Numbers10:36 Nahone musi i tshi ima o vha a tshi ri, “Muṋe washu, vhuelela kha vha zwigidi na zwigidi zwa Vhaisraele.”" 
Numbers11:1 Vhathu vha thoma u gungulela Muṋe washu nga zwine zwa vha dina. Muṋe washu a zwi pfa, a sinyuwa a posa mulilo vhukati havho, wa duga vhukati havho wa fhisa sia ḽiṅwe ḽa mishasha." 
Numbers11:2 Vhathu vha lilela Mushe uri vha lamulelwe, Mushe a rabela Muṋe washu, mulilo wa dzima." 
Numbers11:3 Ndi zwe afho fhethu ha pfi Thabera (Mudugumo), ngauri henefho mulilo wa Muṋe washu wo duga vhukati havho." 
Numbers11:4 Ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhatsinda vhane vha tshimbila na Vhaisraele. Vhenevho vha pfa vha tshi tamesa ṋama, na Vhaisraele vhone vhaṋe vha thoma u lila vha ri, “Arali ro vha ri tshi nga wana ṋama zwashu!" 
Numbers11:5 Ngei Egipita ro vha ri tshi ḽa khovhe dzoṱhe dzine ra funa, ri sa rengi. Ri kha ḓi elelwa maranga na mabvani na nyala ya maṱari na galikhi." 
Numbers11:6 Huno zwino ro kulea nungo. A ri na tshine ra ḽa, ri tou ḽa mana fhedzi misi yoṱhe!”" 
Numbers11:7 (Mana o vha a tshi nga mbeu tsekene, a muvhala wa tshirulwane tshi no nga tshitshena." 
Numbers11:8 O vha a tshi wela mishashani vhusiku a tshi wa na ṅwando. Nga matshelo ḽi tshi tsha vhathu vha tshimbila vha tshi a doba, vha a kuya kana vha a sinḓa mutulini a ita vhukhopfu, vha konou u a bika vha ita zwigaku. Muthu a tshi ḽa o vha a tshi nga vhurotho ho bagwaho nga mapfura a muolivi.)" 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Mushe a pfa vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi khou lila vho ima nga zwigwada miṋangoni ya mishasha yavho. Muṋe washu a vha sinyutshela, na Mushe zwa mu dina," 
Numbers11:11 a vhudzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi mini u tshi nnḓisela khombo yo raliho? Wo ntsinyutshela zwine wa nkhwesa muhwalo wa vhathu avha vhoṱhe?" 
Numbers11:12 Kani-ha ndi nṋe we nda vhifha muvhilini nga havha vhathu? Ndi nṋe ndo vha bebaho naa? Ndi mini u tshi ri ndi vha takule, unga muongi a tshi takula lutshetshe, ndi vha ise shangoni ḽe wa fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho nga muano?" 
Numbers11:13 Ndi ḓo wanafhi ṋama ine nda nga ṋea vhathu vhangafhangafha? Vha ḓi dzula vha tshi nndilela vha tshi ri, ‘Ri fhe ṋama ri ḽe!’" 
Numbers11:14 Vhathu avha vhoṱhe ndi nga si vha hwale ndi ndoṱhe, muhwalo uyu u a nndemela." 
Numbers11:15 Arali u tshi ḓo nnyita nga u rali, nkhathutshele u mbo ḓi mmbulaha zwino, uri ndi si tsha ṱwa ndi tshi tambula.”" 
Numbers11:16 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Nnḓisele vhahulwane vha Israele vha 70 vhane wa ḓivha vhe vharangaphanḓa na magota a vhathu, u vha ḓise kha Nṋe denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, uri vha ime henefho na iwe." 
Numbers11:17 Nṋe ndi ḓo tsa nda amba na iwe henefho, na vhone ndi ḓo vha ṋea-vho Muya we nda mu longa kha iwe. Vha ḓo u ṱhaḓula muhwalo wa vhathu havha, uri iwe u si u hwale u woṱhe." 
Numbers11:18 Zwino vhudza vhathu u ri, ‘Ḓikumululeni ni ḓilugisele ḽa matshelo, ni ḓo vuwa ni tshi wana ṋama na ḽa. Yahavee o ni pfa ni tshi lila ni tshi ri ni tama ṋama na uri ngei Egipita zwo vha zwi khwiṋe. Zwino ndi ḓo ni ṋea ṋama na ḽa." 
Numbers11:19 A ni nga i ḽi ḓuvha ḽithihi kana mavhili kana maṱanu kana fumi kana mahumi mavhili fhedzi," 
Numbers11:20 ni ḓo i ḽa ṅwedzi woṱhe, ya vhuya ya ni nukhela, na si tsha i funa. Hezwo zwi ḓo itea nge na landula Yahavee ane a dzula na inwi, na mu gungulela na ri ngavhe ri songo pfuluwa Egipita.’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Mushe a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndí fhano ndi na vhanna vha 600 000 vha no bva pfumo, vhaṅwe ndi sa vhali, zwino iwe wa ri u ḓo vha ṋea ṋama vha ḽa ṅwedzi woṱhe!" 
Numbers11:22 Arali vha ṱhavhelwa masambi a nngu na a kholomo vha nga ḽa vha fura naa? Arali vha fashelwa khovhe dzoṱhe dza lwanzheni vha nga ḽa vha fura?” 
Numbers11:23 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Tshanḓa tshanga ndi tshipfufhi kani? Zwino ndi hone u tshi ḓo vhona arali zwe nda amba zwi tshi ḓo itea kana zwi sa nga itei!”" 
Numbers11:24 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi bvela nnḓa a vhudza vhathu zwe Muṋe washu a amba. A kuvhanganya vhahulwane vhavho vha 70, a vha imisa u mona na dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu." 
Numbers11:25 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi tsela fhasi e kha gole a amba nae. Vhahulwane avho a vha ṋea-vho Muya we a ṋea Mushe. Musi Muya a tshi ḓa khavho, vha nyanyuwa vha porofita, hone vha si tsha dovha." 
Numbers11:26 Vhavhili vha avho vhahulwane vha 70, Elidadi na Medada, vho vha vho sala mishashani, vhá songo ya denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu naho vho vha vho ṅwalwa na vhaḽa vhaṅwe. Henefho mishashani Muya a ḓa khavho, vha thoma u porofita." 
Numbers11:27 Muṅwe muṱhanngana a gidima a yo vhudza Mushe uri Elidadi na Medada vha khou porofita mishashani. 
Numbers11:28 Ndi hone Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu we a vha e mushumeli wa Mushe tshee a vha muṱhanngana, a tshi amba a ri, “Mushe muṋe wanga, a vha vha kaidzi zwavho?”" 
Numbers11:28 Ndi hone Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu we a vha e mushumeli wa Mushe tshee a vha muṱhanngana, a tshi amba a ri, “Mushe muṋe wanga, a vha vha kaidzi zwavho?”" 
Numbers11:29 Mushe a fhindula a ri, “Ni khou lwela nṋe kani? Nṋe ndi ri ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ṋea vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe Muya wawe, vhoṱhe vha porofita!”" 
Numbers11:30 Ndi hone Mushe na vhaḽa vhahulwane vha 70 vha Israele vha tshi humela mishashani. 
Numbers11:31 Zwino Muṋe washu a ruma muya wa khada khwali dzi tshi bva lwanzheni, wa ita uri dzi kavhe fhasi u mona na mishasha lune dza ita thulwi i no swika mitha u ya nṱha, dza ḓala dza swika vhukule vhune ha nga ita lwendo lwa ḓuvha ḽoṱhe matungo oṱhe." 
Numbers11:32 Zwenezwo ḓuvha ḽoṱhe heḽo na vhusiku hoṱhe na nga matshelo ḓuvha ḽoṱhe, vhathu vha ṱwa vha tshi fara khwali; a hu na we a kuvhanganya dzi sa swiki khilogiramu dza tshigidi. Vha dzi anea u mona na mishasha uri dzi ome." 
Numbers11:33 Musi ṋama i tshee milomoni yavho, Muṋe washu a vha sinyutshela a vha ḓisela dwadze ḽi ofhisaho." 
Numbers11:34 Henefho fhethu ha pfi Kibrotho Hataava (Zwalo-zwa-vha-miḽo) nge ha swiṱwa vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi tamesa ṋama. 
Numbers11:35 U bva henefho vhathu vha fhirela Hatserotho, vha ṱoka mishasha henefho." 
Numbers12:1 Mushe o vha o dzea musadzi wa Mukushu, Miriamu na Aroni vha mu sola" 
Numbers12:2 vha ri, “Muṋe washu o amba nga mulomo wa Mushe fhedzi naa? Riṋe ho ngo amba nga milomo yashu naa?” Muṋe washu a pfa zwe vha amba." 
Numbers12:3 (Mushe o vha e munna wa u ḓiṱukufhadza, a tshi ḓiṱukufhadza u fhira vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi.)" 
Numbers12:4 Muṋe washu a mbo ḓi amba na Mushe na Aroni na Miriamu a ri, “Inwi vhuraru haṋu iḓani denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe.” Vha ya," 
Numbers12:5 Muṋe washu a tsela fhasi e kha phuphu ya gole, a ima muṋangoni wa dennde, a vhidzelela a ri, “Aroni! Miriamu!” Vhuvhili havho vha sendela vha ima phanḓa," 
Numbers12:6 Muṋe washu a ri, “Zwino thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze! “Arali hu na muporofita wa Yahavee kha inwi ndi ḓidzumbululela ene nga mabono, nda amba nae nga miloro." 
Numbers12:7 Hone ndi tshi amba na muḓinḓa wanga Mushe a thi ambi nga u ralo, ndi kona u mu fulufhedza muṱani wanga woṱhe." 
Numbers12:8 Ene ndi amba nae zwi tshi tou pfala ro livhana zwifhaṱuwo, ndi sa ambi nga dzithai, na tshifhaṱuwo tshanga o no tshi vhona! Zwino ndi mini ni sa tati u sola muḓinḓa wanga Mushe?”" 
Numbers12:9 Muṋe washu a mbo ṱuwa ó sinyuwa," 
Numbers12:10 na gole ḽa mbo takuwa denndeni, lukanda lwa Miriamu lwa mbo ḓi phapha vhulwadze vhu ofhisaho, lwa tshena sa gabugu. Aroni a tshi mu lavhelesa a vhona o phapha uho vhulwadze," 
Numbers12:11 a amba na Mushe a ri, “Yawee muṋe wanga, vha songo litsha ri tshi rwiwa nga ṱhamu nga mulandu wa tshivhi tshe ra ita nga vhutsilu hashu." 
Numbers12:12 Vha songo mu litsha a nga ṅwana o bebwaho o fa ane a tshi bva thumbuni ya mme awe hafu ya ṋama ya vha yo ḽiwa.” 
Numbers12:13 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi lilela Muṋe washu a ri, “Yawee, Mudzimu, mu fhodze nandi!”" 
Numbers12:14 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Arali khotsi awe o vha o mu pfela mare khofheni, o vha a si nga shoni a fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili naa? Zwino litshani a dzule nnḓa ha mitsheṱo a fhedze vhege, a konou vhuiswa.”" 
Numbers12:15 Miriamu a bviselwa nnḓa ha mishasha a dzula hone a fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, vhathu vha si tsha fhirela phanḓa a vhuya a vhuedzedzwa mishashani." 
Numbers12:16 Ndi hone vha tshi pfuluwa Hatserotho vha yo ṱoka mishasha sogani ḽa Pharani. 
Numbers13:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers13:2 “Nanga murangaphanḓa muthihi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa Vhaisraele, u vha rume vha yo ṱola shango ḽa Kanana, ḽine nda khou ṋea Vhaisraele.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mushe a thetshelesa, a ruma vharangaphanḓa vha tshi bva sogani ḽa Pharani. Vhenevho ndi havha:" 
Numbers13:4 Tsinde Murangaphanḓa Rubeni Shamua ṅwana wa Zakhuru Simioni Shafati ṅwana wa Hori Juda Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune Isakhara Igala ṅwana wa Josefa Efraimi Hoshea ṅwana wa Nunu Benyamini Phalati ṅwana wa Rafu Zebuloni Gadiele ṅwana wa Sodi Manase Gadi ṅwana wa Susi Dani Amiele ṅwana wa Gemali Ashere Sethuru ṅwana wa Mikaele Nafuthali Nahabi ṅwana wa Vofusi Gadi Geuele ṅwana wa Makhi 
Numbers13:5 Ndi dzone ṱholi dze Mushe a dzi ruma u yo ṱola shango. Mushe a ri dzina ḽa Hoshea ṅwana wa Nunu ḽi vho pfi Joshua. 
Numbers13:5 Ndi dzone ṱholi dze Mushe a dzi ruma u yo ṱola shango. Mushe a ri dzina ḽa Hoshea ṅwana wa Nunu ḽi vho pfi Joshua. 
Numbers13:6 Mushe a tshi vha ruma u yo tandula shango ḽa Kanana a vha vhudza a ri, “Ni tshi bva fhano ni livhe devhula ni dzhene Negeve, ni konou livha mivhunduni." 
Numbers13:7 Ni tandule uri iḽo shango ḽo tou ita hani, vhathu vha no dzula henefho ndi vhangana, na uri vha na maanḓa mangafhani." 
Numbers13:8 Na sedza arali shango ḽi ḽavhuḓi kana ḽi si ḽavhuḓi, ni dovhe ni sedze arali vhathu avho vha tshi dzula ḓoroboni dzi si na luhura kana vha tshi dzula miḓini yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo." 
Numbers13:9 Ni sedze arali mavu aḽo o vhibvela kana lu lukwara, ḽi na miri kana ḽi si na. Ni tshi vhuya ni ite maanḓa uri ni vhuye na mitshelo ya shango ḽeneḽo.” (Tsho vha tshi tshifhinga tshine nḓirivhe dza thoma u vhibva.)" 
Numbers13:10 Ndi hone avho vhanna vha tshi livha thungo ya devhula, vha tandula shango u bva phangani ya Tsini thungo ya tshipembe u vhuya u swika Rehobo, tsini ha Phara ya Hamathi thungo ya devhula." 
Numbers13:11 Vho thoma nga u dzhena Negeve vha swika Hebroni, he ha vha hu tshi dzula vha mitupo ya Ahimani na Sheshai na Thalamai, vha lutsinga lwa Anaki. (Hebroni wo ri u fhaṱiwa ha fhela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ha konou fhaṱiwa Tsuani u re Egipita.)" 
Numbers13:12 Vha swika Govhani ḽa Eshkolo, henefho vha rema davhi ḽe ḽa vha ḽi na tshiṱokola tsha nḓirivhe, vha ita mutingati vha tshi hwala tsho nembelela kha thanda. Vha dzhia na magranada na mahuyu." 
Numbers13:13 Hafho fhethu ho vha hu tshi pfi Govhani ḽa Eshkolo (Tshiṱokola) nge Vhaisraele vha fula tshiṱokola tsha nḓirivhe henefho. 
Numbers13:14 Musi vho no fhedza maḓuvha a 40 vha tshi khou tandula iḽo shango, avho vhanna vha dziṱholi vha humela" 
Numbers13:15 ha Mushe na Aroni na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vhe Kadeshe sogani ḽa Pharani. Vha swikisa vhuṱanzi ha zwe vha zwi vhona, vha sumbedza vhathu mitshelo ye vha vhuya nayo," 
Numbers13:16 vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “Ro tandula shango ra wana ḽi tshi tou ela mukhaha na ṋotshi, mitshelo yaḽo ngei." 
Numbers13:17 Hone vhathu vhane vha dzula khaḽo vha ro vha na maanḓa, miḓi yavho ndi mihulu vhukuma nahone yo tangedzwa nga mitsheṱo. Ro ita na u vhona vhaḓuhulu vha Anaki vha miswonḓa henefho." 
Numbers13:18 Negeve hu dzula Vhaamaleke, zwivhangani hu dzula Vhahithi na Vhajebusi na Vhaamori; tsini ha Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango, na u tsa na mulambo wa Jorodani, hu dzula Vhakanana.”" 
Numbers13:19 Khalebe a kwengweledza vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi khou gungulela Mushe, a ri, “Nga ri mbo ḓi gonya zwino ri dzhie iḽo shango, vhukuma ri ḓo zwi kona.”" 
Numbers13:20 Hone vhaṅwe vhanna vhe vha vha vho ṱuwa na Khalebe vha ri, “Aiwa nandi, a ri na nungo dzine ra nga imedzana navho, vhathu vha hafho fhethu vha ri fhira nga maanḓa.”" 
Numbers13:21 Zwenezwo vha anḓadza mafhungo o shandeaho vhukati ha Vhaisraele vha tshi amba iḽo shango ḽe vha vha vho ya u ḽi tandula, vha ri, “Shango heḽiḽa a ḽi dzulwi, ḽi tou ḽa vhadzulapo vhaḽo nahone muṅwe na muṅwe we ra mu vhona ndi mulapfulapfu," 
Numbers13:22 ra ita na u vhona miswonḓa henefho, vha lutsinga lwa Anaki. Ra pfa ri vhaṱuku sa nzie, na vhone vha vhona ro tou ralo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Vhusiku honoho vhoṱhe vha lala vha tshi ṱavha mukosi vha tshi lila. 
Numbers14:2 Vhaisraele vha gungulela Mushe na Aroni vha ri, “Ngavhe ro fela zwashu Egipita kana hanefhano phangani!" 
Numbers14:3 Ndi mini Muṋe washu a tshi khou ri isa shangoni ḽiḽa uri ri yo ḽiwa nga pfumo? Vhasadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu vha ḓo thubiwa. A si khwiṋe ri tshi humela Egipita?” 
Numbers14:4 Vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nga ri nange murangaphanḓa ri humele Egipita!”" 
Numbers14:5 Ndi hone Mushe na Aroni vha tshi wa nga zwifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganaho henefho. 
Numbers14:6 Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune, vhaṅwe vha dziṱholi dze dza vha dzo ya u ṱola shango, vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho," 
Numbers14:6 Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune, vhaṅwe vha dziṱholi dze dza vha dzo ya u ṱola shango, vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho," 
Numbers14:7 vha vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganaho vha ri, “Shango ḽe ra ḽi buḓekanya ra ḽi tandula ndi ḽavhuḓivhuḓi." 
Numbers14:8 Arali Muṋe washu a tshi ri takalela, u ḓo ri endedza ra dzhena shangoni ḽeneḽo, shango ḽi no ela mukhaha na ṋotshi." 
Numbers14:9 Tshaṋu ni songo shandukela Muṋe washu nahone ni songo ofha vhathu vhane vha dzula khaḽo. Ri ḓo vha mila. Muṋe washu u na riṋe, yavho midzimu i nga si vha tsireledze; ni songo vha ofha.”" 
Numbers14:10 Huno vhathu vhoṱhe vha vho ri vha vha kanḓa nga matombo, hone kathihi fhedzi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha vhona lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lu kombodzaho lu tshi vhonetshela denndeni ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu." 
Numbers14:11 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Vhathu avha vha ḓo nnyadza u swika lini? Ndo vha itela maḓembe manzhi. Vha ḓo hana u mpfulufhela u swika lini?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela dwadze nda vha lozwa, hone iwe ndi ḓo u ita khotsi a lushaka luhulu lwa maanḓa a no fhira avho!”" 
Numbers14:13 Huno Mushe a vhudza Muṋe washu a ri, “Wo pfulusa vhathu avha shangoni ḽa Egipita nga maanḓa au. Musi Vhaegipita vha tshi pfa zwe wa ita vhathu vhau," 
Numbers14:14 vha ḓo zwi vhudza vhathu vhane vha dzula shangoni heḽi. Vhathu havha vho no ḓi zwi pfa uri Iwe Muṋe washu u na riṋe, ri tou u vhona nga maṱo, gole ḽau ḽi alama nṱha hashu, u tshimbila phanḓa hashu u kha phuphu ya gole masiari, vhusiku u kha phuphu ya mulilo." 
Numbers14:15 Zwino arali wa vhulaha vhathu vhau vhoṱhe, tshakha dze dza pfa bvumo ḽau dzi ḓo ri," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Yahavee o kundwa u swikisa avha vhathu shangoni ḽe a vha fulufhedzisa, ndi zwe a sokou vha lozwa phangani!’" 
Numbers14:17 Zwino-ha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ri sumbedze maanḓa au nandi, u ite zwe wa ri fulufhedzisa musi u tshi ri," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Nṋe Yahavee a thi sokou fhela mbilu, ndi sumbedza vhathu lufuno lwanga luhulu na u fulufhedzea hanga, ndi hangwela vhathu vhutshinyi na vhushandukwa. Naho zwo ralo a thi nga litshi u lifhedza vhana na vhaḓuhulu u swika kha murafho wa vhuraru na wa vhuṋa ndi tshi lifhedza vhutshinyi ha vhabebi vhavho.’" 
Numbers14:19 Zwino Muṋe washu, ngauri u na lufuno luhulu lu sa shanduki, a u dovhi wa hangwela vhathu avha vhutshinyi havho, unga wo ḓi vha hangwela tshee vha pfuluwa Egipita u swika ṋamusi?”" 
Numbers14:20 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo vha hangwela unga wo nkhumbela." 
Numbers14:21 Hone ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga, Nṋe ane vhugala hanga ha ḓadza ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe," 
Numbers14:22 ndi ri a hu na na muthihi wa vhathu avha ane a ḓo tshila a swika shangoni ḽeneḽiḽa. Vho vhona lupenyo lwanga lu kombodzaho na maḓembe e nda ita Egipita na fhano phangani, hone vha ḓi nṱunga vha dovha, vha hana u nthetshelesa vha dovha." 
Numbers14:23 Vha nga si vhuye vha vhona shango ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho. Na muthihi we a nnyadza a nga si ḽi vhone. 
Numbers14:24 Hone mulanda wanga Khalebe o vha na muya u sa fani na wavho, u nthetshelesa nga mbilu yoṱhe, ene ndi ḓo mu swikisa shangoni ḽe a tandula, ḽi ḓo vha ḽa vhaḓuhulu vhawe," 
Numbers14:25 magovhani ane zwino ha dzula Vhaamaleke na Vhakanana. Matshelo ni hume ni dzhene sogani no livha sia ḽa Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga.” 
Numbers14:26 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a ri," 
Numbers14:27 “Avha vhathu vhavhi vha ḓo nngungulela u swika lini? Ndo zwi pfa Vhaisraele havha vha tshi gungula! 
Numbers14:28 Zwino vha vhudze u ri, ‘Vhukumakuma ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga, ndi ḓo ni ita zwenezwo zwe na humbela. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Numbers14:29 Ni ḓo fa zwitumbu zwaṋu zwa balangana na soga heḽi nge na nngungulela, muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu u thoma kha wa miṅwaha ya 20, we a vhalwa kha tshivhalo tsha vhathu, ha nga dzheni shangoni heḽo." 
Numbers14:30 Ndo ni fulufhedzisa uri ni ḓo dzula khaḽo, hone ndi vho ana ndi ri, a hu na na muthihi waṋu a no ḓo dzula khaḽo arali e si Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune fhedzi, na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu." 
Numbers14:30 Ndo ni fulufhedzisa uri ni ḓo dzula khaḽo, hone ndi vho ana ndi ri, a hu na na muthihi waṋu a no ḓo dzula khaḽo arali e si Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune fhedzi, na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu." 
Numbers14:31 Ni tshi gungula no ri vhana vhaṋu vha ḓo thubiwa, hone Nṋe ndi ḓo vha swikisa shangoni ḽe inwi na ḽi landula, ḽi ḓo vha haya havho." 
Numbers14:32 Inwi ni ḓo fela henefhano phangani hei. 
Numbers14:33 Vhana vhaṋu vha ḓo tendeleka phangani hei vha fhedza miṅwaha ya 40, vha tshi tambudzelwa vhushandukwa haṋu, na vhuya na fa noṱhe na fhela phano phangani." 
Numbers14:34 Ni ḓo tambudzelwa vhuvhi haṋu na fhedza miṅwaha ya 40, ṅwaha muthihi u ḓo imela ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa maḓuvha e na a fhedza ni tshi khou tandula shango iḽo. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi tshi lwa na inwi zwo tou ita hani!" 
Numbers14:35 Ndi a ana uri hezwo ndi ḓo zwi ita inwi vhathu vhavhi vhane vha kuvhangana uri vha lwe na Nṋe. Ni ḓo fa noṱhe hafhano phangani na vhuya na fhela. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ” 
Numbers14:36 Vhanna vhe Mushe a vha o vha ruma uri vha yo tandula shango, vho vhuya vho shanda mafhungo, zwa ita uri vhathu vha gungulele Muṋe washu." 
Numbers14:37 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a vha ḓisela dwadze vha fa. 
Numbers14:38 Kha dziḽa ṱholi dza 12 vhe vha si fe ndi Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune fhedzi. 
Numbers14:38 Kha dziḽa ṱholi dza 12 vhe vha si fe ndi Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune fhedzi. 
Numbers14:39 Musi Mushe a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele zwe Muṋe washu a amba, vha lila lu ṱungufhadzaho." 
Numbers14:40 Ḽi tshi tsha nga matshelo vha takuwa uri vha gonye mivhunduni, vha tshi ri, “Zwino ro ḓiimisela u ya fhethu he Muṋe washu a ri vhudza. Ri a tenda uri ro tshinya.”" 
Numbers14:41 Hone Mushe a ri, “Zwino ndi mini ni tshi dovha u nyadza ndaela ya Muṋe washu? Zwi nga si ni nakele!" 
Numbers14:42 Ni songo ya; Muṋe washu ha na inwi, maswina aṋu a ḓo ni kunda." 
Numbers14:43 Musi ni tshi imedzana na Vhaamaleke na Vhakanana, ni ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo. No shandukela Muṋe washu, a nga si ime na inwi.”" 
Numbers14:44 Naho zwo ralo vha ḓi futelela u gonya zwivhangani, hu uri mbulungelo ya mulanga a yo ngo bva mishashani, na Mushe ho ngo bva." 
Numbers14:45 Ndi hone Vhaamaleke na Vhakanana vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula henefho vha tshi vha thoma, vha vha kunda, vha vha pandamedza u swika Horoma." 
Numbers15:1 Muṋe washu a ṋea Mushe 
Numbers15:2 ndayo hedzi dzine Vhaisraele vha fanela u dzi tevhedza musi vha tshi swika shangoni ḽe a vha a tshi khou yo vha fha ḽone: 
Numbers15:3 Arali ni tshi ṋekedza Muṋe washu tshiṱhavhelo, tshi nga vha tshi tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho kana tsha u khunyeledza muano kana ya vha nduvho ine muthu a tou i ṋekedza nga u funa hawe kana ya vha nduvho vhuṱamboni haṋu vhune na ḓi vhu ita, ni nga ṋekedza mboho kana nngu kana mbudzi, nduvho iyo i nukhelelaho i takadza Muṋe washu." 
Numbers15:4 Muthu ane a ṋekedza Muṋe washu nngu kana mbudzi ya tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, tshifuwo tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi ḓe na khilogiramu ya vhukhopfu ho vangwaho ḽitha nthihi ya mapfura a muolivi zwi vhe nduvho ya thoro, khathihi na ḽitha ya waini." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Arali hu tshi ṋekedzwa thutha hu ṋekedzwe na khilogiramu mbili dza vhukhopfu ho vangwaho mapfura a muolivi a ḽitha na hafu, i vhe nduvho ya thoro," 
Numbers15:7 khathihi na waini ya ḽitha na hafu. I ḓo vha nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Muṋe washu. 
Numbers15:8 Arali tshi tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho tshi fhiswaho kana tsha u khunyeledza muano kana nduvho ya u konana na Mudzimu," 
Numbers15:9 hu ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya thoro, khilogiramu tharu dza vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi a ḽitha mbili," 
Numbers15:10 khathihi na ḽitha mbili dza waini. I ḓo vha nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Muṋe washu. 
Numbers15:11 Hezwo ndi zwone zwine zwa ḓo ṋekedzwa na mboho kana thutha kana nngu kana mbudzi iṅwe na iṅwe. 
Numbers15:12 Musi hu tshi ṋekedzwa zwifuwo zwo vhalaho, na nduvho ine ya zwi fhelekedza i ḓi engedzwa-vho i eḓanele." 
Numbers15:13 Muṅwe na muṅwe o bebelwaho Israele a ite zwenezwo musi a tshi ṋekedza nduvho ya zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Muṋe washu." 
Numbers15:14 Na kha mirafho i ḓaho, mutsinda kana muṅwe-vho ane a dzula na inwi tshifhinganyana kana tshoṱhe, arali a tshi ṋekedza nduvho ine ya fhiswa nga mulilo, nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Muṋe washu, a ite zwenezwo vhukumakuma zwine na ita." 
Numbers15:15 Vhathu vha vhe na milayo i fanaho, ya inwi na vhatsinda vhane vha dzula na inwi, heyo ndi ndayo ya lini na lini ya mirafho ine ya kha ḓi ḓa. Inwi na vhatsinda ni ḓo fana maṱoni a Yahavee," 
Numbers15:16 ni ḓo vhuswa nga milayo na ndayo dzi fanaho, inwi na vhatsinda vhane vha dzula na inwi." 
Numbers15:17 Muṋe washu a ṋea Mushe 
Numbers15:18 ndayo hedzi uri dzi tevhedzwe nga Vhaisraele musi vha tshi swika shangoni ḽe a vha a tshi khou yo vha ṋea ḽone: A ri 
Numbers15:19 musi goroi yo liṅwaho henefho i tshi ḽiwa, iṅwe i vhetshelwe thungo i ṋekedzwe Muṋe washu." 
Numbers15:20 Musi ni tshi baga vhurotho, mukonde wa u thoma wa vhurotho ha u thoma ho bagiwaho nga goroi ntswa i ṋekedzwe Muṋe washu. I ṋekedzwe unga goroi ine na tou fhula." 
Numbers15:21 Na nga mirafho i ḓaho, ni ṋekedze Muṋe washu iyo nduvho ya zwiliṅwa zwaṋu zwa u thoma." 
Numbers15:22 Zwino arali na tshenuwa nó kundwa u tevhedza iṅwe ya idzo ndayo dze Muṋe washu a dzi ṋea Mushe, hone ní songo ita nga khole," 
Numbers15:23 kana na kundwa u khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ni laya nga Mushe u bva ḽeneḽo ḓuvha ḽa u thoma na ngavhuya, zwa vhofha na vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu –" 
Numbers15:24 arali uho vhukhakhi ho itwa nga u shaya nḓivho ha tshivhidzo, tshi fanela u ṋekedza mboho i vhe tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, u nukhelela hatsho hu ḓo takadza Muṋe washu, tshi ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya thoro yo teaho na nduvho ya waini. Vha dovhe vha ṋekedze mbokoṱo i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo." 
Numbers15:25 Tshifhe a pfumelele tshivhidzo tsha Vhaisraele, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo hangwelwa vhutshinyi havho, ngauri uho vhukhakhi vha ḓo vha vha songo vhu ita nga khole nahone vho ḓisa nduvho yavho ya tshipfumelo ya vha nduvho ya zwiḽiwa i ṋekedzwaho Muṋe washu." 
Numbers15:26 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Vhaisraele na vhatsinda vhane vha dzula navho vha ḓo hangwelwa vhutshinyi havho, nge muṅwe na muṅwe a ita uho vhukhakhi." 
Numbers15:27 Arali muthu a khakha hu si nga khole, o fanela u ṋekedza phambala ya ṅwaha muthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo." 
Numbers15:28 Henefho aḽiṱarini tshifhe u ḓo ita maitele a u pfumelela uyo munna vhutshinyi hawe, ndi hone a tshi ḓo vha o hangwelwa." 
Numbers15:29 Ndayo yeneyo i fanela u tevhedzwa nga muṅwe na muṅwe ane a tshinya a sa iti nga khole, a nga vha muthu o bebwaho Israele kana mudzulapo wa mutsinda." 
Numbers15:30 Huno ane a tshinya nga khole, a nga vha o bebwa kha ḽa Israele kana e mutsinda, u na mulandu wa u nyadza Yahavee, onoyo nga a tumulwe tshivhidzoni," 
Numbers15:31 nge a nyadza ipfi ḽa Yahavee, a pfuka ndayo dzawe. A tshi tumulwa ndi mulandu wawe." 
Numbers15:32 Ho vhuya ha ri Vhaisraele vha tshi kha ḓi vha sogani, ha wanala munna a tshi khou reḓa khuni nga Sabatha." 
Numbers15:33 Munna uyo a dzhiwa a iswa ha Mushe na Aroni na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe," 
Numbers15:34 a lindiwa, ngauri vho vha vha sa ḓivhi zwine a fanela u itwa zwone." 
Numbers15:35 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Mushe a ri, “Munna uyo nga a vhulawe, vhathu vhoṱhe nga vha mu ise nnḓa ha mishasha vha mu kanḓe nga matombo a fe.”" 
Numbers15:36 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi mu isa nnḓa ha mishasha, vha mu kanḓa nga matombo a fa, nga he Muṋe washu a vha laya." 
Numbers15:37 Muṋe washu a laya Mushe 
Numbers15:38 uri a vhudze Vhaisraele a ri, “Rungelelani zwivhuvhi khuḓani dza zwiambaro zwaṋu, kha tshivhuvhi tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe ni rungelele thambo ya muvhala wa denga. Izwo zwi itwe nga mirafho yoṱhe i kha ḓi ḓaho." 
Numbers15:39 Zwivhuvhi izwo zwi ḓo vha tshihumbudzo. Ni tshi zwi vhona ni ḓo elelwa ndayo dzanga na dzi tevhedza, ndi hone ni sa ḓo mpfuralela na tevhela nyemulo dza mbilu dzaṋu na maṱo aṋu." 
Numbers15:40 Zwivhuvhi izwo zwi ḓo ni humbudza u tevhedza ndaela dzanga dzoṱhe, na ḓo konou vha vhathu vho ḓikumedzaho Mudzimu waṋu." 
Numbers15:41 Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu, ndo ni pfulusa Egipita uri ndi vhe Mudzimu waṋu. Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu.”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora ṅwana wa Izhara, muṅwe wa Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi, o vhuya a shandukela Mushe. Vhaṅwe vhararu vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni vha ima nae, ndi Dathani na Abiramu vhana vha Eliaba, na Ono ṅwana wa Phelethe, na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vha 250, vharangaphanḓa vha vhaḓivhalea vho nangwaho kha tshivhidzo." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Vha kuvhanganela Mushe na Aroni vha vha vhudza vha ri, “Zwine na ita zwo no tou kalula! Vhathu havha vhoṱhe ndi vha Muṋe washu, a si inwi vhavhili fhedzi. Muṋe washu u na riṋe roṱhe. Zwino inwi Mushe ndi mini ni tshi ḓiita muhulwane wa vhathu vha Muṋe washu?”" 
Numbers16:4 Mushe a tshi zwi pfa a ḓiposa fhasi a rabela. 
Numbers16:5 Ndi hone a tshi amba na Kora na tshigwada tshawe a ri, “Matshelo ḽi tshi tsha Muṋe washu u ḓo ri sumbedza ane a vha wawe, we a ḓinangela ene, ane a nga swika khae aḽiṱarini. We a nanga, u ḓo tenda a tshi sendela khae." 
Numbers16:6 Matshelo ḽi tshi tsha inwi Kora na tshigwada tshaṋu tshoṱhe ni dzhie zwidongo zwa mulilo, ni longe masimbe a mulilo na zwioro khazwo, ni zwi ise aḽiṱarini. Ndi hone ri tshi ḓo vhona uri we Muṋe washu a mu nanga kha riṋe ndi nnyi! Inwi Vhalivi ndi inwi no kalulaho!”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Mushe a dovha a amba na Kora a ri, “Inwi Vhalivi, thetshelesani!" 
Numbers16:9 Ni vhona e mafhungo maṱuku izwi zwe Mudzimu wa Israele a ni khetha kha tshivhidzo tsha Vhaisraele, uri ni kone u sendela tsini hawe, ni shume mishumo yaṋu denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, ni tshi shumela tshivhidzo itshi?" 
Numbers16:10 O ita uri inwi na Vhalivi vhaṅwe vhoṱhe ni huliswe nga u ralo, zwino ni vho ṱoḓa u ḓidzhiela na vhutshifhe!" 
Numbers16:11 Ni tshi gungulela Aroni zwawe zwi na mini-vho? Aroni ndi ene nnyi-vho? Hone inwi na tshigwada tshaṋu tshoṱhe no tou ita vhukwila ha u shandukela Muṋe washu.” 
Numbers16:12 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhidzisa Dathani na Abiramu vhana vha Eliaba, hone vhone vha ri, “Riṋe a ri nga ḓi!" 
Numbers16:13 Zwe vha ri pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita ḽi elaho mikhaha na ṋotshi uri vha ri vhulahele fhano phangani a zwo ngo eḓana naa? Zwino vha vho ḓiita muvhusi washu kani? 
Numbers16:14 Nahone a vho ngo ri ḓisa shangoni ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi kana vha ri ṋea masimu a goroi na a minḓirivhe uri zwi vhe zwashu, zwino vha khou linga u ri fhura. Riṋe ri nga si ḓe!”" 
Numbers16:15 Mushe a sinyuwa a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “U songo ṱanganedza nduvho dzine avha vhanna vha u ṋekedza. A hu na na muthihi wavho we nda mu khakhela, hufha na donngi yavho na nthihi ndi songo dzhia.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mushe a amba na Kora a ri, “Matshelo inwi na vhanna vha 250 vhane vha ima na inwi ni ḓe denndeni ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu ni ime phanḓa ha Muṋe washu; Aroni na ene u ḓo vha e hone." 
Numbers16:17 Muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a dzhie tshidongo tshawe tsha mulilo a ṋuṋedze zwioro, ni konou zwi ḓisa aḽiṱarini; na Aroni u ḓo ḓisa yawe.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ndi hone munna muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi dzhia tshidongo tshawe tsha mulilo, a longa masimbe a mulilo, a ṋuṋedza zwioro, vha ima muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu vhe na Mushe na Aroni." 
Numbers16:19 Ndi hone Kora a tshi kuvhanganya vhathu vhoṱhe, vha ima vho livhana na Mushe na Aroni muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. Lupenyo lu kombodzaho lwa Muṋe washu lwa vhonwa nga vhathu vhoṱhe." 
Numbers16:20 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a ri," 
Numbers16:21 “Sendelani kule na tshigwada hetsho uri ndi kone u vha lozwa kathihi fhedzi.” 
Numbers16:22 Huno Mushe na Aroni vha wa nga zwifhaṱuwo vha ri, “Yawee Mudzimu, u tshisima tsha vhutshilo hoṱhe, u nga sinyutshela vhathu vhoṱhe hó tshinya muthu muthihi?”" 
Numbers16:23 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers16:24 “Vhudza vhathu vha sendele kule na dennde dza Kora na Dathani na Abiramu.” 
Numbers16:25 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi takuwa a livha ha Dathani na Abiramu, vharangaphanḓa vha Israele vha mu fhelekedza." 
Numbers16:26 A kaidza vhathu a ri, “Sendelani kule na dennde dza vhanna havha vhavhi, ni songo kwama na tshithihi tshi re tshavho, ni sa ḓo swielwa navho nga mulandu wa vhuvhi havho.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ndi hone vha tshi sendela kule na dennde dza Kora na Dathani na Abiramu. Dathani na Abiramu vho vha vho bvela nnḓa vho ima miṋangoni ya dennde dzavho, vhe na vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vhavho." 
Numbers16:28 Mushe a vhudza vhathu a ri, “Zwino ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu o nthuma uri ndi ite zwithu hezwi zwoṱhe, a zwo ngo dzudzanywa nga nṋe." 
Numbers16:29 Arali vhanna avha vha tou fa nga u fa havho vhá songo tou lifhedzwa nga Mudzimu, ndi ḓo vha ndi songo rumiwa nga Mudzimu." 
Numbers16:30 Hone arali Muṋe washu a ita tshiṅwe tshithu tshi sa athu pfiwa, ḽifhasi ḽa vulea ḽa vha mila na zwoṱhe zwi re zwavho, vha tsela vhudzulavhafu vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri vhanna avha vho nyadza Muṋe washu.”" 
Numbers16:31 Musi a tshi tou fhedza u amba, mavu e Dathani na Abiramu vha ima khao a vulea," 
Numbers16:32 a vha mila na miṱa yavho, khathihi na vhoṱhe vhane vha ima na Kora na thundu yavho yoṱhe." 
Numbers16:33 Zwenezwo vha tsela vhudzulavhafu vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, khathihi na thundu yavho. Ḽifhasi ḽa dovha ḽa valea ḽa vha tibedza, vha ngalangala." 
Numbers16:34 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha tshi pfa mukosi wa avho vhathu vha mbo shavha nga u ofha u milwa-vho nga mavu. 
Numbers16:35 Ha ḓa mulilo u tshi bva ha Muṋe washu wa fhisa vhaḽa vhanna vha 250 vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ṋekedza zwioro. 
Numbers16:36 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers16:37 “Vhudza Eliasara ṅwana wa tshifhe Aroni a bvise zwidongo zwa mulilo zwa musinaseṱha afho kha zwitumbu zwa vhanna avho vho fhiswaho nga mulilo, masimbe ayo a re zwidongoni zwa mulilo a a balanganye huṅwe fhethu, ngauri zwidongo izwo ndi zwikhethwa." 
Numbers16:38 Zwo vha zwikhethwa musi zwi tshi ṋekedzwa aḽiṱarini ya Yahavee. Zwino dzhia zwidongo zwa mulilo zwa vhanna havho vhe vha vhulawa nga mulandu wa vhuvhi havho, u dzi fule dzi ite lubaba lusekene lu tibedze aḽiṱari. Izwo hu ḓo vha u kaidza Vhaisraele.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ndi hone tshifhe Eliasara a tshi dzhia zwidongo izwo zwa mulilo, a zwi fulisa zwa ita lubaba lusekene lwa u tibedza aḽiṱari." 
Numbers16:40 Izwo ho vha hu u kaidza Vhaisraele uri ane a si vhe wa lutsinga lwa Aroni a songo sendela aḽiṱarini a dubisela Muṋe washu zwioro. Arali a ralo u ḓo lozwiwa unga Kora na vhanna vhe vha ima nae. Izwo zwoṱhe zwo itwa nga he Muṋe washu a laya Eliasara nga mulomo wa Mushe. 
Numbers16:41 Nga matshelo Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha gungulela Mushe na Aroni vha ri, “No vhulaha vhathu vha Muṋe washu!”" 
Numbers16:42 Musi vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganela Mushe na Aroni, vha rembulutshela denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, vha vhona gole ḽo alama khayo, ho bvelela lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lu kombodzaho." 
Numbers16:43 Mushe na Aroni vha yo ima phanḓa ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. 
Numbers16:44 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers16:45 “Ṱutshela kule ha vhathu havho, ndi ḓo vha lozwa kathihi fhedzi!” Vhuvhili havho vha wa nga zwifhaṱuwo," 
Numbers16:46 Mushe a vhudza Aroni a ri, “Nga vha mbo ḓi dzhia tshidongo tshavho tsha mulilo, vha longe masimbe a mulilo a no bva kha aḽiṱari, vha ṋuṋedze zwioro kha ayo masimbe. Vha gidimele natsho hune vhathu vha vha hone, vha vha pfumelele. Nga vha ṱavhanye! Muṋe washu o no sinyuwa, na bulayo ḽo no thoma.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aroni a thetshelesa, a dzhia tshidongo tshawe tsha mulilo, a gidimela vhukati ha vhathu. Musi a tshi vhona uri bulayo ḽo no ḓi thoma, a ṋuṋedza zwioro kha masimbe, a pfumelela vhathu." 
Numbers16:48 Bulayo iḽo ḽa mbo fhela, a sala o ima vhukati ha vha tshilaho na vho faho." 
Numbers16:49 Vhathu vho faho vho vha vhe 14 700, hu sa vhalwi na vhe vha fa nga muvhango wa Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Musi bulayo ḽi si tsheeho, Aroni a humela ha Mushe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Numbers17:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers17:2 “Vhudza Vhaisraele vha u fhe mbaḓa dza 12, murangaphanḓa wa tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a ḓise luthihi. U ṅwale dzina ḽa munna muṅwe na muṅwe kha lubaḓa lwawe," 
Numbers17:3 u konou ṅwala dzina ḽa Aroni kha lubaḓa lwo imelaho Livi. Murangaphanḓa wa tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe u ḓo vha na lubaḓa luthihi. 
Numbers17:4 Mbaḓa idzo u dzi ise denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, u dzi vhee phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga, hune nda ṱangana na inwi." 
Numbers17:5 Mbaḓa ya munna we nda mu nanga i ḓo ṱuma lurere. Ndi ḓo pfuvhisa zwine Vhaisraele vha dzula vha tshi u gungulela nga u ralo.” 
Numbers17:6 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi amba na Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe wa vharangaphanḓa vhavho a mu ṋea lubaḓa, lubaḓa luthihi lwó imela tsinde ḽithihi, dza ita fumi na mbili, lubaḓa lwa Aroni lwa vhewa nadzo." 
Numbers17:7 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhea mbaḓa idzo dzoṱhe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu denndeni ya mbulungelo ya mulanga. 
Numbers17:8 Nga matshelo Mushe a tshi dzhena denndeni ya mbulungelo ya mulanga, a vhona uri lubaḓa lwa Aroni, lwe lwa vha lwo imela tsinde ḽa Livi, lwo ṱuma lurere. Lwo vha lwo kulukusha, lwa fhufhumisa, lwa aṋwa maalimondo o vhibvaho!" 
Numbers17:9 Mushe a dzhia mbaḓa dzoṱhe a dzi sumbedza Vhaisraele. Vha vhona zwe zwa itea, murangaphanḓa muṅwe na muṅwe a dzhia lubaḓa lwawe." 
Numbers17:10 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Vhuedzedza lubaḓa lwa Aroni phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Yahavee. Lu vhulungwe lu dzule lu tshi humbudza mavhanga ayo uri vha sa litsha u gungula vha ḓo fa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mushe a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. 
Numbers17:12 Vhaisraele vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “Zwino ndi hone ro fhela! Vhukuma ro lovha!" 
Numbers17:13 Arali ane a sendela tsini ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu a tshi fa, zwino roṱhe ndi tshifa ro fa!”" 
Numbers18:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Aroni a ri, “Ha khakhea tshithu hukhethwa, ndi mulandu wau na vhana vhau na vhaṅwe Vhalivi, hone mulandu wa u khakhela vhutshifhe u ḓo hwaliwa nga iwe na vhana vhau ni noṱhe." 
Numbers18:2 Vhidza mashaka au, vha tsinde ḽa Livi, vha shume na iwe, vha u farise musi iwe na vhana vhau ni tshi khou shuma denndeni ya mbulungelo ya mulanga." 
Numbers18:3 Vho fanela u khunyeledza mushumo wavho na pfanelo dzavho dza dennde nga u farisa, hone vha songo sendela tsini ha zwithu zwikhethwa na aḽiṱari. Arali vha sendela tsini hazwo, noṱhe iwe na vhone ni ḓo fa." 
Numbers18:4 Nga vha shume na iwe vha khunyeledze pfanelo dzavho dza mishumo yoṱhe ya dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, hone ni songo shuma na muthu a songo teaho." 
Numbers18:5 Iwe na vhana vhau no fanela u khunyeledza pfanelo dza fhethu hukhethwa na aḽiṱari, uri ndi si tsha dovha nda sinyutshela Vhaisraele." 
Numbers18:6 Ndi Nṋe we nda khetha mashaka au Vhalivi kha Vhaisraele uri vha vhe tshifhiwa tshau. Vho kumedzwa Nṋe, uri vha kone u shuma mishumo yavho denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe." 
Numbers18:7 Huno iwe na vhana vhau fhedzi, inwi ni khunyeledze pfanelo dza vhutshifhe kha zwa aḽiṱari na zwi re ngomu fhethu hukhethwa. Hezwo zwithu zwi londolwe nga inwi, ngauri ndo ni ṋea tshifhiwa tsha vhutshifhe. Muthu a songo fanelaho ane a vhuya a sendela tsini ha zwithu zwikhethwa u ḓo vhulawa.”" 
Numbers18:8 Muṋe washu a amba na Aroni a ri, “Ndi khou u ṋea misumo yoṱhe ine Vhaisraele vha nnduvha ngayo. Ndi khou zwi ṋea iwe na vha lutsinga lwau uri zwi vhe mukovhe wau lini na lini." 
Numbers18:9 Kha nduvho khethwa-khethwa dzi sa fhiswi aḽiṱarini, dzau ndi hedzi: nduvho dza thoro, nduvho dza tshipfumelo na nduvho dza mulifho. Zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṋekedzwa Nṋe zwí nduvho khethwa ndi zwau na vhana vhau." 
Numbers18:10 Hezwo zwithu u zwi ḽele hukhethwa, zwi ḽiwe nga vhanna fhedzi, u zwi sedze zwi zwikhethwa." 
Numbers18:11 “Na misumo yoṱhe i imiselwaho nṱha ine Vhaisraele vha bvisa vha i ṋekedza Nṋe ndi yau. Ndi khou zwi ṋea iwe na vhana vhau vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana lini na lini. Vhoṱhe vha muṱa wau vho kumululwaho vha nga ḓi zwi ḽa. 
Numbers18:12 “Ndi u ṋea zwavhuḓi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe kha zwibveledzwa zwa u ranga zwine Vhaisraele vha nṋea ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe: mapfura a muolivi na waini na goroi. 
Numbers18:13 Zwoṱhe ndi zwau. Vhoṱhe vha muṱa wau vho kumululwaho vha nga ḓi zwi ḽa. 
Numbers18:14 “Zwoṱhe zwa Israele zwine zwa kumedzwa Nṋe tshoṱhe ndi zwau. 
Numbers18:15 “Tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa ṅwana kana ḽa tshifuwo ḽine Vhaisraele vha ḽi ṋekedza Nṋe ndi ḽau. Hone iwe wo fanela u ṱanganedza mulifho wa u rengulula tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa ṅwana, u lixwe nga tanzhe ḽa tshifuwo tsho kumululwaho." 
Numbers18:16 Vhana vha ḓo rengululwa vhe na ṅwedzi muthihi nga mutengo wo vhewaho wa mangwende maṱanu a siliva, hu tshi tevhedzwa zwikalo zwa hukhethwa." 
Numbers18:17 Hone tanzhe ḽa kholomo na ḽa nngu na mbudzi ayo ha rengululwi, ndi anga tshoṱhe, a itwe zwiṱhavhelo. Handulula aḽiṱari nga malofha azwo, u fhise mapfura azwo i vhe nduvho ya zwiḽiwa; ndi nduvho i nukhelelaho i ntakadzaho." 
Numbers18:18 Ṋama yazwo yone ndi yau, u ḓi nga ya tshiakha na ya tshizwa tsha mulenzhe wa tshauḽa zwa misumo i imiselwaho nṱha." 
Numbers18:19 “Misumo yoṱhe ine Vhaisraele vha nṋekedza ndi i ṋea iwe na vhana vhau vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana lini na lini. Hoyo ndi mulanga u sa vhofhololwi we nda vhofha na iwe na vhaḓuhulu vhau.” 
Numbers18:20 Muṋe washu a amba na Aroni a ri, “Iwe a u nga wani thundu dzine dza ḓo vha dzau, nahone a u nga wani mukovhe wa shango ḽa Israele une wa ḓo vha wau. Mukovhe wau ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Numbers18:21 Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhalivi vhone ndo vha ṋea tshafumi tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine Vhaisraele vha nṋekedza. Hoyo ndi wone muholo wavho vha tshi shuma u londola dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe." 
Numbers18:22 Vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vha songo tsha sendela tsini ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, vha sa ḓo ḓiovhela ṱhamu ya lufu." 
Numbers18:23 U bva zwino ndi Vhalivi fhedzi vhane vha ḓo londola dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe, vha hwala pfanelo dzoṱhe dzayo. Heyo ndi ndayo ya misi yoṱhe ine ya kwama na vhaḓuhulu vhau. Vhalivi a vha nga vhi na mukovhe wa shango kha ḽa Israele," 
Numbers18:24 ngauri mukovhe wavho ndo vha ṋea tshafumi tshine Vhaisraele vha nṋekedza wa vha musumo wanga. Ndi zwe nda vha vhudza uri a vha nga vhi na mukovhe wa shango unga vhaṅwe Vhaisraele.” 
Numbers18:25 Muṋe washu a laya Mushe 
Numbers18:26 uri a vhudze Vhalivi a ri, “Musi ni tshi ṱanganedza tshafumi tshi bvaho kha Vhaisraele tshine Muṋe washu a ni ṋea uri tshi vhe tshaṋu, ni ṋee Muṋe washu tshafumi tshatsho u vhe musumo wawe." 
Numbers18:27 Musumo hoyo u ḓo dzhiwa u une wa eḓana na nduvho ine ya itwa nga mulimi ya mavhele na waini. 
Numbers18:28 Ngauralo u ḓo dovha wa ṋekedza musumo une wa vha wa Muṋe washu u no bva kha zwafumi zwoṱhe zwine na ṱanganedza zwi tshi bva kha Vhaisraele. Musumo hoyo wa Muṋe washu ni u ṋee tshifhe Aroni. 
Numbers18:29 Ni u ṋee u tshi bva kha zwavhuḓi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe zwine na zwi ṱanganedza. 
Numbers18:30 Musi no no ṋekedza mukovhe wavhuḓi u fhiraho yoṱhe, zwi salaho zwi ḓo vha zwaṋu, sa mulimi a tshi dzhia zwo salaho kha nduvho ine a i ṋekedza, ya goroi na mapfura a muolivi." 
Numbers18:31 Inwi na miṱa yaṋu ni nga ḓi ḽa zwo salaho huṅwe na huṅwe, ngauri ndi muholo waṋu wa mushumo une na shuma denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Numbers18:32 Arali na zwi ḽa ni nga si vhe na mulandu, tenda ni tshi ḓo vha no ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwavhuḓi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe. Hone ni vhone ni sa ḓo shata zwifhiwa zwikhethwa zwa Vhaisraele tshika nga u ḽa tshifhiwa tshifhio na tshifhio hu sa athu ṋekedzwa mukovhe u fhiraho zwoṱhe; na ralo ni ḓo vhulawa.”" 
Numbers19:1 Muṋe washu a laya Mushe na Aroni 
Numbers19:2 uri vha laye Vhaisraele ndayo hedzi vha ri, “Ni ḓise kholomo ya dzothwa i si na badzi, i sa athu vhuya ya lima, ni i ṋee tshifhe Eliasara." 
Numbers19:3 Yo fanela u bviselwa nnḓa ha mishasha, ya ṱhavhiwa a tshi zwi vhona." 
Numbers19:4 Ndi hone Eliasara a tshi ḓo dzhia maṅwe malofha ayo, a a donzwa nga munwe wawe a a shasha a tshi ya kha dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, a ita kaṱanu na kavhili." 
Numbers19:5 Kholomo yoṱhe, khathihi na mukumba na ṋama na malofha na vhula, zwi fhiswe tshifhe a tshi zwi vhona." 
Numbers19:6 Ndi hone a tshi ḓo konou dzhia thanda ya mukedara na davhi ḽa muhisopo na thambo tswuku, a zwi posa muliloni," 
Numbers19:7 a konou kuvha zwiambaro zwawe, a ṱamba muvhili, a konou dzhena mishashani, hone u ḓo vha a tshee o kumala ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela." 
Numbers19:8 Munna we a fhisa itsho tshifuwo na ene o fanela u kuvha zwiambaro zwawe, a ṱamba muvhili, hone na ene u ḓi dzula o kumala ḽi vhuye ḽi kovhele." 
Numbers19:9 Ndi hone muṅwe munna a songo kumalaho a tshi ḓo kuvhanganya milora ya iḽa kholomo a i vhea fhethu ho kumululwaho nnḓa ha mishasha, ya vhetshelwa vhathu vha Israele uri vha i shumise maḓini a u kumulula. Maitele hayo ndi a u pfumelela vhathu." 
Numbers19:10 Munna ane a kumba milora o fanela u kuvha zwiambaro zwawe, hone u ḓi dzula o kumala ḽi vhuye ḽi kovhele. Ndayo heyo ndi ya lini na lini ya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe khathihi na vhatsinda vhane vha dzula navho.”" 
Numbers19:11 “Muthu ane a vhuya a kwama tshitumbu u ḓo vha o kumala ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili. 
Numbers19:12 O fanela u ṱamba nga maḓi a u kumulula muthu nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru na nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili, ndi hone a tshi ḓo vha o kumululwa. Hone arali a sa ḓikumululi nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru na nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili, u ḓo vha a songo kumululwa." 
Numbers19:13 Muthu ane a vhuya a kwama tshitumbu, a si ḓikumulule, u dzula o kumala, ngauri ho ngo handululwa nga maḓi a u kumulula muthu, a nga shata dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu tshika, nahone u ḓo tumulwa kha Vhaisraele." 
Numbers19:14 Arali muṅwe muthu a fela denndeni, nnyi na nnyi a re afho denndeni nga tshifhinga tsha lufu lwonolwo kana ane a dzhena ngomu hayo u ḓo vha o kumala ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
Numbers19:15 Mvuvhelo iṅwe na iṅwe na khali zwi re denndeni yeneyo, zwi si na zwitibo zwi ḓo vha zwo kumala." 
Numbers19:16 Arali muthu a kwama muthu we a vhulawa kana we a tou ḓifela zwawe ḓakani kana arali a kwama shambo ḽa muthu kana tshalo, onoyo u ḓo vha o kumala ha vhuya ha fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
Numbers19:17 “Muthu uyo o kumalaho a tshi kumululwa, hu fanela u dzhiwa milora ya kholomo khunwana ye ya fhiswa i tshi vha tshipfumelo, i shelwe khalini, hu shelwe na maḓi a no bva tshisimani." 
Numbers19:18 Hu ḓe munna a songo kumalaho a dzhie davhi ḽa muhisopo, a ḽi mbwandamedze maḓini, a handulule dennde na zwoṱhe zwi re ngomu hayo na vhathu vhe vha vha vhe henefho. Munna uyo o fanela u handulula na muthu we a kwama shambo ḽa muthu kana tshitumbu tsha o ḓifelaho na o vhulawaho, kana tshalo." 
Numbers19:19 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru na ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili uyo munna a songo kumalaho u fanela u handulula uyo muthu o kumalaho nga maḓi, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a mu kumulule. Muthu uyo we a kumululwa u fanela u kuvha zwiambaro zwawe, a ṱambe muvhili, nga madekwana eneo u ḓo vha o kumululwa." 
Numbers19:20 “Muthu we a kumala a si ḓikumulule, u dzula o kumala, nge a vha a songo handululwa nga maḓi a u kumulula muthu. Muthu onoyo a nga shata hukhethwa ha Muṋe washu tshika, nahone u ḓo tumulwa kha tshivhidzo." 
Numbers19:21 Iyo ndi ndayo yavho ya lini na lini. Munna ane a handulula muthu nga maḓi a u mu kumulula na ene u fanela u kuvha zwiambaro zwawe, nahone muthu ane a kwama maḓi a u kumulula u ḓo vha o kumala ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela." 
Numbers19:22 Tshine muthu o kumalaho a kwama, na tshone tsho kumala, nahone ane a tshi kwama u ḓo vha o kumala ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela.”" 
Numbers20:1 Nga ṅwedzi wa u thoma vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha swika phangani ya Tsini, vha ṱoka mishasha yavho Kadeshe. Miriamu o fela henefho a swiṱwa hone." 
Numbers20:2 Fhethu he vha ṱoka hone mishasha ho vha hu si na maḓi, zwenezwo vhathu vha kuvhanganela Mushe na Aroni" 
Numbers20:3 vha semana navho vha ri, “Ngavhe ro lovha na vhaḽa vha hashu zwiḽa vha tshi lovha phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
Numbers20:4 Ndi mini vho ḓisa tshivhidzo tsha Muṋe washu fhano sogani? Vho itela uri ri fele fhano na zwifuwo zwashu? 
Numbers20:5 Ndi mini vho ri pfulusa Egipita vha ri ḓisa fhethu fhano hune ra tambula hu sa meli tshithu? A hu na mavhele na mahuyu na nḓirivhe na magranada. Na maḓi a u nwa a hu na!” 
Numbers20:6 Mushe na Aroni vha ṱutshela vhathu vha ya vha ima muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. Vha wa nga zwifhaṱuwo, vha vhona lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lu kombodzaho." 
Numbers20:7 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers20:8 “Dzhia lubaḓa lwa Aroni lu re phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga, iwe na mukomana wau Aroni ni konou kuvhanganya tshivhidzo tshoṱhe. Henefho phanḓa havho u ambe na tombo heḽiḽa ḽine wa ḽi vhona, maḓi a ḓo gubunyea a tshi bva khaḽo. Ngauralo u ḓo bvisela vhathu maḓi kha tombo, vha nwa khathihi na zwifuwo zwavho.” Mushe a ya a dzhia ulwo lubaḓa sa zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya." 
Numbers20:9  
Numbers20:10 Mushe na Aroni vha kuvhanganya vhathu vhoṱhe phanḓa ha tombo, Mushe a ri, “Inwi mashandukwa, thetshelesani! Ri ni bvisele maḓi kha tombo iḽi?”" 
Numbers20:11 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi angaladza luḽa lubaḓa, a rwa ḽiḽa tombo luvhili ngalwo, maḓi a gubunyea vhathu vha nwa na zwifuwo zwa nwa." 
Numbers20:12 Hone Muṋe washu a kaidza Mushe na Aroni, a ri, “Zwino nge na si mpfulufhele tshoṱhe, na si sumbedze Vhaisraele vhukhethwa hanga, vhathu havha ni nga si vha swikise shangoni ḽe nda fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo vha ṋea ḽone.”" 
Numbers20:13 Hezwo zwo itea Miriba he vhathu vha gungulela Muṋe washu, henefho he a vha sumbedza uri Ene ndi mukhethwa." 
Numbers20:14 Mushe a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha tshi bva Kadeshe vha ya ha khosi ya Edomo, vha swika vha ri, “Ndi riṋe mashaka avho, vha matsinde a Israele. Vhone vha a ḓivha u tambula hashu," 
Numbers20:15 zwe vhomakhulukuku washu vha ya Egipita, ra dzula hone miṅwaha minzhi. Vhaegipita vho tambudza vhomakhulukuku washu na riṋe," 
Numbers20:16 riṋe ra lilela Muṋe washu, Ene a pfa tshililo tshashu, a ruma muruṅwa, a ri pfulusa Egipita, zwino ro swika Kadeshe, masakhani aṋu." 
Numbers20:17 Nga vha ri tendele ri fhire nga shango ḽavho. Riṋe na kholomo dzashu ri nga si pambuwe gondoni kana ra dzhena masimuni kana masimuni a minḓirivhe, a ri nga nwi maḓi a bidzi dzavho. Ri ḓo tou longondo nga gondo ra vhuya ra bva shangoni ḽavho.”" 
Numbers20:18 Huno Vhaedomo vha fhindula vha ri, “A ri tendi ni tshi fhira nga vhukati ha shango ḽashu! Arali na linga, ri ḓo ni bvela pfumo.”" 
Numbers20:19 Vhaisraele vha ri, “Ri ḓo tshimbila gondoni fhedzi, arali riṋe kana zwifuwo zwashu ra nwa maḓi aṋu ri ḓo lifha, ri khou tou humbela nḓila zwashu, a hu na zwiṅwe.”" 
Numbers20:20 Vhaedomo vha dovha vha ri, “Ri a hana!” Ndi hone vha tshi bva na mmbi ya maanḓa uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele." 
Numbers20:21 Vhaisraele vha huma vha fara iṅwe nḓila nge Vhaedomo vha hana Vhaisraele vha tshi fhira nga shangoni ḽavho. 
Numbers20:22 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha takuwa Kadeshe vha swika thavhani ya Horo," 
Numbers20:23 masakhani a Edomo. Henefho Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Aroni a ri," 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni a nga si dzhene shangoni ḽe nda fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea Vhaisraele, u ḓo fa, nge noṱhe vhuvhili haṋu na nyadza ndayo yanga musi ni Miriba." 
Numbers20:25 Dzhia Aroni na ṅwana wawe Eliasara ni gonye thavha ya Horo," 
Numbers20:26 henefho u bvule Aroni zwiambaro zwa vhutshifhe, u zwi ambadze ṅwana wawe Eliasara. Aroni u ḓo iswa ha vha hawe, u ḓo fela henefho.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mushe a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. Vha gonya thavha ya Horo vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Numbers20:28 Mushe a bvula Aroni zwiambaro zwa vhutshifhe, a zwi ambadza ṅwana wawe Eliasara. Aroni a fela henefho muṱumbani wa thavha. Mushe na Eliasara vha huma vha tsela fhasi." 
Numbers20:29 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha zwi pfa uri Aroni o tshinyala, vhoṱhe vha mu lila vha fhedza maḓuvha a 30." 
Numbers21:1 Musi khosi ya Vhakanana ya Aradi, thungo ya tshipembe kha ḽa Kanana, i tshi zwi pfa uri Vhaisraele vha khou ḓa vho fara nḓila ya Atharimu, ya vha dia ya thuba vhaṅwe vhavho." 
Numbers21:2 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi anela Muṋe washu muano vha ri, “Arali wa kumedza vhathu avha zwanḓani zwashu, ri ḓo u kumedza vhone tshoṱhe na miḓi yavho, ra vha lozwa.”" 
Numbers21:3 Muṋe washu a thetshelesa khumbelo yavho, a vha farisa vha kunda Vhakanana. Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi vha lozwa tshoṱhe, vha phusukanya miḓi yavho, afho fhethu vha ri hu pfi Horoma (Ndozwo)." 
Numbers21:4 Vhaisraele vha ṱuwa thavhani ya Horo vho fara gondo ḽo livhaho Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga, vha tshi ri vha tou mona na shango ḽa Edomo. Huno vhathu vhe nḓilani vha fhela mbilu," 
Numbers21:5 vha amba mavhi nga Mudzimu na Mushe, vha gungula vha ri, “Ndi mini no ri pfulusa Egipita uri ri fele fhano phangani? A hu na zwiḽiwa! A hu na maḓi! Zwiḽiwa hezwi zwi sa furisi ri nga si tsha zwi konḓelela!”" 
Numbers21:6 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vha rambela ṋowa dzi re na vhuṱungu, dza vha luma ha fa Vhaisraele vhanzhi." 
Numbers21:7 Vhathu vha ḓa ha Mushe vha ri, “Ro tshinya nge ra amba mavhi nga Mudzimu na nga vhone. Zwino nga vha rabele uri Muṋe washu a ṱuwise ṋowa hedzi.” Mushe a rabelela vhathu." 
Numbers21:8 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe uri a ite ṋowa, a i fhahee kha thanda; muthu we a lumiwa a i lavhelesa, u ḓo tshila." 
Numbers21:9 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi ita ṋowa ya musinaseṱha, a i fhahea kha thanda. Muthu ó lumiwa nga ṋowa o vha a tshi ri u sedza iyo ṋowa ya musinaseṱha a tshila." 
Numbers21:10 Vhaisraele vha fhirela phanḓa, vha ṱoka mishasha yavho Obothi." 
Numbers21:11 Musi vho no ṱuwa afho fhethu, vha yo ṱoka mishasha matumbani a Abarimu a re phangani vhubvaḓuvha ha shango ḽa Muaba." 
Numbers21:12 Vha konou ṱoka mishasha govhani ḽa Zerede. 
Numbers21:13 Vha takuwa henefho vha fhirela phanḓa, vha ṱoka mishasha thungo ya devhula ha mulambo wa Arinoni, sogani, hune ha thoma shango ḽa Vhaamori. (Mulambo wa Arinoni ndi one masakha a Vhamuaba na Vhaamori.)" 
Numbers21:14 Ndi zwine Bugu ya Nndwa dza Muṋe washu ya ri, “... Wahebe u re dzinguni ḽa Sufa, na magovha, mulambo wa Arinoni," 
Numbers21:15 na zwigodi zwa magovha ane a vhuya a swika Ari, a livha na masakhani a Muaba.”" 
Numbers21:16 Vha takuwa henefho vha livha fhethu hune ha pfi Bidzi, henefho Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Kuvhanganya vhathu, Nṋe ndi ḓo vha fha maḓi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Zwenezwo Vhaisraele vha imba luimbo holu vha ri, “Bidzi, maḓi au nga a gubunyee; riṋe ri ḓo a resha nga luimbo –" 
Numbers21:18 bidzi ye ya bwiwa nga vhavhusi na vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu, yo bwiwa nga luḓo lwa vhuhosi, na nga mbaḓa dzavho.” Vha takuwa phangani vha livha Mathana," 
Numbers21:19 vha takuwa henefho vha livha Nahaliele, vha takuwa Mahaliele vha livha Bamothi," 
Numbers21:20 vha takuwa Bamothi vha livha govhani shangoni ḽa Muaba, he muṱumba wa thavha ya Phisiga wa ingamela phanga." 
Numbers21:21 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori vha yo mu vhudza vha ri," 
Numbers21:22 “Nga vha litshe ri fhire nga shangoni ḽavho. A ri nga pambuwi gondoni ra dzhena masimuni avho kana masimuni a minḓirivhe, a ri nga nwi maḓi a bvaho bidzini dzavho, ri ḓo tou longondo nga gondo ra vhuya ra bva shangoni ḽavho.”" 
Numbers21:23 Huno Sihoni a si tende Vhaisraele vha tshi fhira shangoni ḽawe. A kuvhanganya mmbi yawe a bva a ya Jahatsi hu re sogani, a yo lwa na Vhaisraele." 
Numbers21:24 Hone Vhaisraele vha mu kunda nndwani vha dzhia shango ḽawe u bva mulamboni wa Arinoni u swika devhula ha Jaboko, hone vho ḽi dzhia u swika nga Vhaamoni fhedzi, ngauri masakha a Vhaamoni o vha o tsireledzwa vhukuma." 
Numbers21:25 Vhaisraele vha thuba miḓi yoṱhe ya Vhaamori, khathihi na Hesheboni na ḓorobo dzoṱhe dzi re tsini nawo, vha dzula khadzo." 
Numbers21:26 Hesheboni wo vha u musanda wa Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori, o vha o lwa na khosi ya u ranga ya Muaba, a thuba shango ḽawe ḽoṱhe u swika nga mulambo wa Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ndi zwine vharendi vha imba vha ri, “Iḓani Hesheboni, nga u fhaṱwe; muḓi wa Sihoni nga u vuswe." 
Numbers21:28 Muḓini wa Hesheboni ho bva mulilo, muḓini wa Sihoni ha bva khavhu, ya fhisa Ara muḓi wa Muaba, vhadzulapo vha zwivhangani zwa Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Iwe Muaba wo welwa nga khombo! Inwi vharereleli vha Khemosho, no lozwiwa! O ṅala vhatukana vhawe vhanna vha Muaba vha vha tshavhi, vhananyana vhawe vha thubwa nga Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori." 
Numbers21:30 Ro vha pfula nga misevhe, vha lovha u bva Hesheboni u swika Diboni. Ro vha rambaladza u swika Nofa, tsini ha Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Vhaamori," 
Numbers21:32 Mushe a ruma dziṱholi muḓini wa Jazere. Vhaisraele vha thuba ḓorobo dzi re tsini nawo, vha thatha Vhaamori vha dzulaho henefho." 
Numbers21:33 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi huma vha fara gondo ḽi yaho Bashani. Ogo khosi ya Bashani a bva na mmbi yawe yoṱhe uri a yo ṱangana navho a lwe navho Edrei. 
Numbers21:34 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “U songo mu ofha. Ndo u kumedza ene na vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe na shango ḽawe. U mu ite zwenezwo zwe wa ita Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori, we a vha a tshi vhusa Hesheboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi vhulaha Ogo na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vha si sie na muthihi a tshi tshila, vha dzhia shango ḽawe ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Numbers22:1 Vhaisraele vha fhirela phanḓa vha ṱoka mishasha midavhini ya Muaba vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, u livhana na Jerikho." 
Numbers22:2 Musi khosi ya Muaba, Balaka ṅwana wa Tsiphoro, a tshi pfa zwe Vhaisraele vha ita Vhaamori," 
Numbers22:3 na uri Vhaisraele vho vha vhe vhangana, ene na vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Numbers22:4 Vhamuaba vha vhudza vhahulwane vha Vhamidiani vha ri, “Gogo heḽi ḽi ḓo ṱuwa ḽi tshi lozwa zwoṱhe zwo ri tangaho, unga phulu i tshi fula hatsi ḓakani.” Khosi ya Muaba misi iyo o vha e Balaka ṅwana wa Tsiphoro." 
Numbers22:5 Ene a ruma vhaḓinḓa u yo vhidza Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro, we a vha e Phethoro tsini ha mulambo wa Yufuratha shangoni ḽa Amawa. Vha mu swikisela malaedzwa a no bva kha Balaka a no ri, “Nga vha zwi ḓivhe uri ho ḓa lushaka lu tshi bva Egipita, vhathu vhalwo vha khou ḓala hoṱhe-hoṱhe, vho no ṱoka mishasha masakhani anga." 
Numbers22:6 Vho anda u fhira riṋe, nga vha ḓe vha nteketelele vhone. Khamusi ndi hone ri tshi ḓo kona u vha kunda ra vha thatha vha ṱuwa shangoni ḽino. Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri vhone ane vha mu shudufhadza u wana mashudu, ane vha teketela u welwa nga khombo.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ndi hone vhahulwane vha Muaba na Midiani vha tshi ṱuwa na tshiṱanze tsha u teketela, vha ya ha Biliamu, vha swikisa malaedzwa a Balaka." 
Numbers22:8 Biliamu a vha vhudza a ri, “Lalani fhano, matshelo ndi ḓo ni vhudza zwine Yahavee a mmbudza.” Ndi hone vhahulwane vha Muaba vha tshi dzula na Biliamu." 
Numbers22:9 Mudzimu a ḓa ha Biliamu a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Vhanna avha vha no khou dzula na iwe ndi vhonnyi?”" 
Numbers22:10 Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “Balaka khosi ya Muaba, ṅwana wa Tsiphoro, o vha ruma ha nṋe" 
Numbers22:11 a ri hu na lushaka lu no bva Egipita lwo ḓadzaho shango ḽoṱhe. U ṱoḓa ndi tshi mu teketelela vhone uri a lwe navho, a vha thathe vha ṱuwe.”" 
Numbers22:12 Mudzimu a vhudza Biliamu a ri, “U songo ṱuwa na vhanna havha nahone u songo teketela Vhaisraele, ngauri Nṋe ndo vha shudufhadza.”" 
Numbers22:13 Nga matshelo Biliamu a ya ha vhaḓinḓa vha Balaka a ri, “Humelani hayani, Yahavee o hana ndi tshi ṱuwa na inwi.”" 
Numbers22:14 Vha humela ha Balaka, vha mu vhudza uri Biliamu o hana u vhuya navho." 
Numbers22:15 Ndi hone Balaka a tshi ruma vhaṅwe vhahulwane vhanzhi vhe vha vha vhe vhaḓivhalea u fhira vhaḽa vha u thoma. 
Numbers22:16 Vha ya ha Biliamu vha swikisa malaedzwa a no ri, “Balaka ṅwana wa Tsiphoro u ri, ‘Hu songo vha na tshi vha kundisaho u ḓa ha nṋe nandi!" 
Numbers22:17 Ndi ḓo vha pfufha zwihulu, nda ita zwoṱhe zwine vha amba. Nga vha ḓe vha nteketelele vhathu havha nandi.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Huno Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “Naho Balaka a mpha siliva yoṱhe na musuku woṱhe zwi re pfamoni yawe, ndi nga si kone u pfuka ndaela ya Yahavee Mudzimu wanga nangwe hu kha mafhungo maṱuku." 
Numbers22:19 Huno lalani fhano, u ḓi nga vhaḽa vhaṅwe, uri ndi ḓivhe arali Yahavee e na zwiṅwe zwine a ṱoḓa u mmbudza.”" 
Numbers22:20 Vhusiku honoho Mudzimu a ḓa ha Biliamu a ri, “Vhunga avha vhanna vho ḓa u u vhidza, ṱuwa navho, hone u ite zwenezwo fhedzi zwine nda u vhudza.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi vuwa nga matsheloni a adza maalo kha donngi yawe, a ṱuwa na vhahulwane vha Muaba." 
Numbers22:22 Mudzimu o vha o sinyuwa nge Biliamu a vha a tshi khou ya. Musi Biliamu o namela donngi yawe, a tshi khou fhelekedzwa nga vhashumi vhawe vhavhili, muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ima gondoni a mu thivhela nḓila." 
Numbers22:23 Musi donngi i tshi vhona muruṅwa o ima henefho o ṱomola banga, ya pambuwa nḓilani ya dzhena masimuni. Biliamu a rwa iyo donngi a i vhuedzedza gondoni." 
Numbers22:24 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi ima he nḓila ya sekena, vhukati ha masimu mavhili a minḓirivhe, hu re na mutsheṱo wa matombo masia oṱhe." 
Numbers22:25 Donngi i tshi vhona muruṅwa, ya mbo ḓi ṱuwa yo livha mutsheṱo, ya pwanyeledza mulenzhe wa Biliamu na mutsheṱo. Biliamu a dovha a i rwa." 
Numbers22:26 Muruṅwa a dovha a fhirela phanḓa, a ima fhethu ho sekenaho hu si na fhethu hu fhireaho sia ḽa tshauḽa kana tshamonde." 
Numbers22:27 Donngi i tshi vhona muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu ya tou lala fhasi. Biliamu a fhela mbilu, a thoma u rwa iyo donngi nga ṱhamu." 
Numbers22:28 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ṋea donngi maanḓa a u kona u amba, ya amba na Biliamu ya ri, “Ndo vha tshinyani? Vho nthwelani vha ita luraru?”" 
Numbers22:29 Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nge wa nnyita tsilu! Arali ndo vha ndi na banga ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo u shidzha zwino.”" 
Numbers22:30 Donngi ya fhindula ya ri, “Kani a si nṋe donngi yavho ye vha ḓi i namela u swika ṋamusi? Ndo no vhuya nda vha ita zwo raliho naa?” Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “A u athu.”" 
Numbers22:31 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi bonyolosa maṱo a Biliamu a vhona muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o ima gondoni o ṱomola banga ḽawe. Biliamu a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo. 
Numbers22:32 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini wo rwa donngi yau luraru nga u rali? Ndo ḓa fhano u u thivhela, ngauri wo vha u songo fanela u fara lwendo ulu." 
Numbers22:33 Hone donngi yau yo mmbona ya pambuwa nḓilani luraru. Arali yo vha i songo pambutshela thungo, vhukumakuma ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo u vhulaha zwino, donngi nda i litsha.”" 
Numbers22:34 Biliamu a fhindula muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndo tshinya. A tho ngo zwi ḓivha uri iwe wo ima nḓilani uri u nthivhele. Zwino arali u sa zwi takaleli ndi ḓo humela hayani.”" 
Numbers22:35 Huno muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a vhudza Biliamu a ri, “Ṱuwa na vhanna havho, hone u ambe zwenezwo fhedzi zwine nda u vhudza.” Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi ṱuwa na vhahulwane vha Balaka." 
Numbers22:36 Musi Balaka a tshi zwi pfa uri Biliamu u khou ḓa, a yo mu ṱanganedza Ara, muḓi une wa vha mulamboni wa Arinoni masakhani a ḽa Muaba." 
Numbers22:37 Balaka a vhudza Biliamu a ri, “Ndi mini vha songo ḓa ndi tshi vha vhidza lwa u thoma? Vho vhona unga ndi nga si vha pfufhe lu vha fushaho?”" 
Numbers22:38 Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndo ḓa khavho zwino. Hone ndi na maanḓa-ḓe? Ndi amba zwenezwo fhedzi zwine Mudzimu a mmbudza.”" 
Numbers22:39 Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi ṱuwa na Balaka vha ya Kiriathi Hutsotho," 
Numbers22:40 henefho Balaka a vhulaha kholomo na nngu, iṅwe ṋama a i ṋea Biliamu na vhahulwane vhe a vha e navho." 
Numbers22:41 Nga matshelo Balaka a dzhia Biliamu a gonya nae Tshikwara tsha Baali; e henefho o vha a tshi kona u vhona Vhaisraele kha sia ḽithihi. 
Numbers23:1 Biliamu a amba na Balaka a ri, “Nga vha mphaṱele aḽiṱari ṱhanu na mbili fhano, vha nnḓisele mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaka a ita zwe a vhudzwa nga Biliamu, ene na Biliamu vhuvhili havho vha ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho na thutha kha aḽiṱari iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Numbers23:3 Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi amba na Balaka a ri, “Nga vha ime hafha tsini ha tshiṱhavhelo tshavho, nṋe ndi imele nga thungo, khamusi Yahavee u ḓo ḓa a ṱangana na nṋe. Ndi ḓo vha vhudza zwine a nnzumbululela zwone.” Biliamu a ṱuwa e eṱhe a yo ima lukwarani." 
Numbers23:4 Nangoho Mudzimu a ṱangana nae, Biliamu a ri, “Ndo fhaṱa aḽiṱari ṱhanu na mbili, kha iṅwe na iṅwe yadzo nda ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho na thutha.”" 
Numbers23:5 Muṋe washu a longa malaedzwa awe mulomoni wa Biliamu a mu vhudza uri a humele ha Balaka a yo mu vhudza ayo malaedzwa. 
Numbers23:6 Biliamu a huma a wana Balaka a tshee o ima tsini ha tshiṱhavhelo tshawe, e na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Muaba." 
Numbers23:7 Biliamu a bula vhuporofita a ri, “Balaka o nnḓisa ndi tshi bva Aramu, khosi ya Muaba ya nthamba ndi thavhani dza vhubvaḓuvha. A ri, ‘Iḓa u nteketelele Jakopo, iḓa u panzhilele Israele.’" 
Numbers23:8 Ndi nga teketela hani vhe Mudzimu a si vha teketele? Ndi nga panzhilela hani vhe Mudzimu a si vha panzhilele? 
Numbers23:9 Ndi vha vhona ndi miṱumbani ya makwara, ndi vha sedza ndi zwikwarani. Ndi vhona lushaka lwo ḓikhethaho, lu no vhona lu sa fani na dziṅwe tshakha." 
Numbers23:10 Ndi nnyi ane a nga vhala buse ḽa Jakopo kana a ḓivha na tshipiḓa zwatsho tsha Vhaisraele? Nga ndi fe-vho lwa vha si na muhoyo, ngavhe ndi tshi fa unga vhone!”" 
Numbers23:11 Ndi hone Balaka a tshi vhudza Biliamu a ri, “Vho nnyitani? Ndo vha ḓisa fhano uri vha teketele maswina anga, hone tshe vhone vha ita ho vha u vha shudufhadza.”" 
Numbers23:12 Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi amba zwenezwo fhedzi zwine nda vhudzwa nga Yahavee.”" 
Numbers23:13 Ndi hone Balaka a tshi vhudza Biliamu a ri, “Nga ri ṱuwe roṱhe ri ye huṅwe fhethu hune vha nga kona u vhona Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, ngauri fhano vha tou vhona vhaṅwenyana, a vha vha vhoni vhoṱhe. Nga vha nteketelele vhone vhe henefho fhethu.”" 
Numbers23:14 Balaka a dzhia Biliamu a mu isa tshiingamoni muṱumbani wa thavha ya Phisiga. Na henefho a fhaṱa aḽiṱari ṱhanu na mbili, a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho na thutha kha aḽiṱari iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Numbers23:15 Biliamu a amba na Balaka a ri, “Nga vha ime hafha tsini ha tshiṱhavhelo tshavho, nṋe ndi yo ṱangana na Mudzimu hafhaḽaa.”" 
Numbers23:16 Muṋe washu a ṱangana na Biliamu, a mu vhudza zwine a fanela u zwi amba, a mu humisela ha Balaka uri a mu vhudze malaedzwa awe." 
Numbers23:17 Ndi hone a tshi humela ha Balaka a wana a tshee o ima tsini ha tshiṱhavhelo tshawe e na vhahulwane vha Muaba. Balaka a vhudzisa a ri, “Yahavee o ri mini?”" 
Numbers23:18 Biliamu a bula vhuporofita hovhu a ri, “Balaka, takuwa u thetshelese, iwe ṅwana wa Tsiphoro, mpfe!" 
Numbers23:19 Mudzimu ha ngi muthu, ha zwifhi, a si muthu wa ṋama, ha shanduki. A amba tshithu, ha tshi iti kani? A fulufhedzisa tshithu, a nga kundwa u tshi khunyeledza naa?" 
Numbers23:20 Ndo laiwa uri ndi shudufhadze. Mudzimu o shudufhadza, nṋe ndi nga si zwi shandukise." 
Numbers23:21 Kha ḽa Jakopo a hu vhonali khombo, kha ḽa Israele a hu na maṱungu. Yahavee Mudzimu wavho u navho, vhukati havho hu pfala muḓalo wa u ṱanganedza Khosi." 
Numbers23:22 Mudzimu o vha pfulusa Egipita, u vha lwela unga ṋari." 
Numbers23:23 Jakopo a nga si loiwe, Vhaisraele vha nga si panzhilelwe; zwino hu tshi ambiwa Jakopo na Vhaisraele hu ḓo pfi, ‘Vhonani zwe Mudzimu a ita!’" 
Numbers23:24 Lushaka ulu lu takuwa unga ndau ya tsadzi, vha takuwa unga ndau i sa aweli i sa athu ḽa tshe ya ponda, ya nwa malofha a tshe ya vhulaha.”" 
Numbers23:25 Ndi hone Balaka a tshi amba na Biliamu a ri, “Vha songo tsha vha teketela, vha songo tsha vha shudufhadza, kha vha sokou ḓifhumulela!”" 
Numbers23:26 Biliamu a fhindula a ri, “A tho ngo vha vhudza uri ndo fanela u ita zwoṱhe zwine Yahavee a amba?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balaka a vhudza Biliamu a ri, “Nga vha ḓe ndi vha ise huṅwe fhethu. Khamusi Mudzimu u ḓo zwi takalela uri vha nteketelele vhone vhe henefho.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balaka a dzhia Biliamu a mu isa muṱumbani wa thavha ya Phioro, yo ingamelaho phanga." 
Numbers23:29 Biliamu a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha mphaṱele aḽiṱari ṱhanu na mbili henefhano, vha nnḓisele mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaka a ita zwe Biliamu a amba, a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho na thutha kha aḽiṱari iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Numbers24:1 Zwino Biliamu a vhuya a vhona uri Muṋe washu u funa a tshi shudufhadza Vhaisraele, a si tsha thoma u ṱuwa unga zwiḽa a tshi ri a thome a dzumbululelwe, ó tou rembuluwa a lavhelesa phangani." 
Numbers24:2 Biliamu a tshi sedza a vhona Vhaisraele vho ṱoka mishasha zwi tshi ya nga matsinde avho. Muya wa Mudzimi a ḓa khae," 
Numbers24:3 a bula vhuporofita a ri, “Hovhu ndi vhuporofita ha Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro, ndi vhuporofita ha muthu ane iṱo ḽawe ḽa vhona ḽa phuletshedza," 
Numbers24:4 ndi vhuporofita ha muthu ane a pfa maipfi a Mudzimu, a no vhona bono ḽi no bva ha Ramaanḓaoṱhe, muthu ane a ri o shuvhama, maṱo a bonyolowa." 
Numbers24:5 Iwe Jakopo, dennde dzau dzo naka hani, vhudzulo hau ho naka hani, iwe Israele!" 
Numbers24:6 Dzo adza na magovha, dzi nga miṱanga tsini ha mulambo, dzi nga zwikhopha zwa mabindamutshe zwo ṱavhiwaho nga Yahavee, dzi nga mikedara i re tsini ha maḓi." 
Numbers24:7 Hu ḓo ela maḓi a tshi bva kha mvuvhelo dzavho; mbeu yavho i ḓo wana maḓi manzhi. Khosi yavho i ḓo fhira Agaga, muvhuso wavho u ḓo vha muhulu." 
Numbers24:8 Mudzimu o vha pfulusa Egipita, vha na nungo dzi no nga dza ṋari. Vha mila tshakha dzi lwaho navho, vha vunḓekanya marambo avho, vha vha runga nga misevhe yavho." 
Numbers24:9 Vha a tumba, vha shuvhama unga ndau, vha nga ndau ya tsadzi, vha nga vuswa nga nnyi? Ngavhe hu tshi shudufhadzwa vhane vha ni shudufhadza, vhane vha ni teketela ngavhe vha tshi teketelwa!”" 
Numbers24:10 Balaka a sinyutshela Biliamu. A putela Biliamu mavili a ri, “Ndo vha vhidzela u teketela maswina anga, zwino vho no vha shudufhadza luraru lwoṱhe." 
Numbers24:11 Zwino nga vha ṱuwe vha mbo ḓi ya hayani! Ndo vha ndo vha fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo vha pfufha zwihulu, hone Yahavee o vha kundisa u wana iyo pfufho.”" 
Numbers24:12 Biliamu a fhindula Balaka a ri, “Hufha ndo vhudza vhaḓinḓa vhe vha vha ruma ha nṋe nda ri," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Naho Balaka a nṋea pfamo yawe yo ḓala siliva na musuku, ndi nga si kone u ita tshithu nga u funa hanga nda pfuka ndaela ya Yahavee, tshi nga vha tshivhuya kana tshivhi.’ Ndo fanela u amba zwenezwo fhedzi zwine Yahavee a mmbudza uri ndi ambe.”" 
Numbers24:14 Biliamu a vhudza Balaka a ri, “Zwino ndi khou humela ha vha hashu, hone ndi sa athu ṱuwa nga vha litshe ndi vha vhudze zwine Vhaisraele vha ḓo ita vhathu vhavho misi i ḓaho.”" 
Numbers24:15 Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi bula vhuporofita a ri, “Hovhu ndi vhuporofita ha Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro, ndi vhuporofita ha muthu ane a maṱo awe a vhona a phuletshedza," 
Numbers24:16 ndi vhuporofita ha muthu ane a pfa maipfi a Mudzimu, muthu ane a vha na nḓivho i no bva kha Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, muthu a no vhona bono ḽi no bva kha Ramaanḓaoṱhe, ane a lala o ruḓa maṱo." 
Numbers24:17 Ndi a mu vhona, hone hu si zwino, ndi a mu ṱalela, hone ndi sa sedzi tsini. Hu ḓo ḓa ṋaledzi i tshi bva kha Jakopo, hu ḓo vuwa luḓo lwa vhuhosi lu tshi bva kha Israele. U ḓo pwashekanya ṱhoho dza vha Muaba, a devhekanya madethele a vhana vhoṱhe vha Sethe." 
Numbers24:18 Vhaedomo vha ḓo kundwa, Vhaseiri maswina a Israele vha ḓo shandukiswa, hone Vhaisraele vha ḓo vha na maanḓa." 
Numbers24:19 Hu ḓo ḓa muvhusi a tshi bva kha vha Jakopo, a lozwa vho ponyokaho lufu afho muḓini.”" 
Numbers24:20 Zwino Biliamu kha bono ḽawe a vhona Vhaamaleke a bula vhuporofita a ri, “Amaleke o vha e wa u thoma kha dzitshakha, hone u ḓo guma nga u lovha.”" 
Numbers24:21 Biliamu a vhona Vhakeni kha bono ḽawe a porofita a ri, “Hune wa dzula hone wo tsireledzea, wo fhaṱa tshiṱaha tshau luwani," 
Numbers24:22 naho zwo ralo Vhakeni vha ḓo lozwiwa, musi Ashuru a tshi ni isa vhuthubwani.”" 
Numbers24:23 Ndi hone a tshi dovha a bula vhuṅwe vhuporofita a ri, “Yawee, ndi nnyi ane a nga tshila arali Mudzimu a tshi rali?" 
Numbers24:24 Hu ḓo tala zwikepe zwi tshi bva khunzikhunzini dza Kithimi, zwa kunda Ashuru na Ebere, hone na vhone vha ḓo lovha tshoṱhe.”" 
Numbers24:25 Ndi hone Biliamu a tshi takuwa a humela hayani, na Balaka a fara nḓila yawe." 
Numbers25:1 Musi Vhaisraele vho ṱoka mishasha Govhani ḽa Miunga, vhanna vha thoma u ita vhuaḓa nga u dzhenisa vhasadzi vha Muaba nḓuni." 
Numbers25:2 Vhasadzi vhenevho vho vha vhidza vhuṱamboni ha nduvho dzavho, he ha vha hu tshi luvhiwa midzimu ya Muaba. Vhaisraele vha ḽa zwiḽiwa zwa henefho, vha luvha mudzimu wa Vhamuaba," 
Numbers25:3 Baali wa Phioro, vha shumela wone. Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a vha sinyutshela," 
Numbers25:4 a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Dzhia vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha Israele, u ite zwine nda u vhudza, u vha vhulahe u vha vhambe masiari tshivhangalala, ndi hone ndi si tsha ḓo sinyutshela Vhaisraele.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mushe a vhudza vhahulwane vha Vhaisraele a ri, “Muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a vhulahe vhanna vhoṱhe vha tsinde ḽawe vhe vha yo luvha Baali wa Phioro.”" 
Numbers25:6 Muṅwe wa Vhaisraele a dzhia musadzi wa Mumidiani a mu dzhenisa nḓuni Mushe a tshi zwi vhona, na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Israele tshi tshi zwi vhona musi vha tshi khou tsengisa miṱodzi vhe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu."
