Numbers25:7 Musi Finiasi ṅwana wa Eliasara ṅwana wa tshifhe Aroni a tshi zwi vhona, a takuwa a sia tshivhidzo, a yo dzhia pfumo," 
Numbers25:8 a tevhela uyo Muisraele denndeni yawe, vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho a vha runga nga pfumo, a runga Muisraele pfumo ḽa phuletshedza ḽa dzhena thumbuni ya uyo musadzi. Ha mbo ḓi vha u fhela ha bulayo iḽo kha Vhaisraele," 
Numbers25:9 hone vhe vha vhulawa nga iḽo bulayo vho vha vhe 24 000. 
Numbers25:10 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers25:11 “Finiasi ṅwana wa Eliasara, ṅwana wa tshifhe Aroni, o dzikisa mbiti dzanga nda si tsha sinyutshela Vhaisraele. O hana zwa u luvha muṅwe mudzimu arali e si Nṋe, ndi zwe nda si vha lozwe vhoṱhe nga mbiti dzanga." 
Numbers25:12 Zwenezwo mu vhudze uri ndi khou vhofha nae mulanga wa mulalo," 
Numbers25:13 wa uri tshifhe u ḓo vha ene, na vhaḓuhulu vhawe, lini na lini, nge a si tende ndi tshi nyadziwa, a ita uri Vhaisraele vha hangwelwe vhutshinyi havho.”" 
Numbers25:14 Muisraele we a vhulawa na musadzi wa Mumidiani o vha a tshi pfi Zimiri ṅwana wa Salu, muṅwe murangaphanḓa wa tsinde ḽa Simioni." 
Numbers25:15 Musadzi uyo wa Mumidiani we a vhulawa o vha a tshi pfi Khozibi ṅwananyana wa Tsuru, muṅwe wa vharangaphanḓa vha Midiani." 
Numbers25:16 Muṋe washu a laya Mushe a ri," 
Numbers25:17 “Vhamidiani vha iteni maswina ni vha vhulahe," 
Numbers25:18 nge vha ni ita maswina zwiḽa vha tshi ni retshela zwikwekwe thavhani ya Phioro, na nga mulandu wa khaladzi avho Khozibi, ṅwananyana wa muṅwe murangaphanḓa wa Vhamidiani, musadzi we a vhulawa zwiḽa ho ḓa dwadze nga mulandu wa zwa Phioro.”" 
Numbers26:1 Musi dwadze ḽo no fhira, Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe na Eliasara ṅwana wa tshifhe Aroni a ri," 
Numbers26:2 “Vhalani vhathu zwi tshi ya nga miṱa ya vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele, ni vhale vhanna vhoṱhe u bva kha miṅwaha ya 20 vho teaho u bva pfumo.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mushe na Eliasara vha ita zwe Muṋe washu a amba, vha kuvhanganya vhanna vhoṱhe vha miṅwaha yeneyo. Vha kuvhangana magovhani a Muaba tsini ha mulambo wa Jorodani ho livhanaho na Jerikho. Vhaisraele vho pfuluwaho Egipita ngevhano:"

Numbers26:10 mavu a vulea a vha mila, vha fa na Kora na vhane vha ima nae zwiḽa mulilo u tshi fhisa vhanna vha 250 vha fhela, vha vha tshiga tsha u kaidza vhathu." 
Numbers26:11 Hone vhana vha Kora vha si swe.)

Numbers26:31 na Asriele na Shikheme 
Numbers26:32 na Shemida na Hefere.

Numbers26:39 na Shefufamu na Hufamu.

Numbers26:54 U kovhekanye shango nga u ita madeṅwa, tsinde ḽine ḽa vha na vhathu vhanzhi ḽi wane shango ḽihulwane, tsinde ḽine ḽa vha na vhathu vha si gathi ḽi wane shango ḽiṱuku.”"

Numbers26:58 Vha lutsinga lwavho vho vha vha tshi angaredza na mitupo ya Libini na Hebroni na Mahali na Mushi na Kora. Kehathi o vha e khotsi a Amuramu," 
Numbers26:59 we a vha o dzea Jokhebede muḓuhulu wa Livi, we a bebwa Egipita. Jokhebede a bebela Amuramu vhatukana vhavhili, Aroni na Mushe, na khaladzi avho Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni o vha e na vhana vhaṋa vha vhatuka, ndi Nadaba na Abihu na Eliasara na Ithamara." 
Numbers26:61 Nadaba na Abihu vho fa musi vha tshi ṋekedza Muṋe washu mulilo u si mukhethwa. 
Numbers26:62 Vhalivi vha tshinnani vhe vha vha vhe na ṅwedzi muthihi na u fhira afho vho vha vhe 23 000. Vhone vho ṅwalelwa thungo, a vho ngo ṱanganywa na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele, nge vha vha vha songo wana mukovhe kha ḽa Israele." 
Numbers26:63 Vha mitupo yoṱhe heyo vho ṅwalwa nga Mushe na Eliasara musi vha tshi vhala vhathu magovhani a Muaba tsini ha mulambo wa Jorodani u livhana na Jerikho. 
Numbers26:64 Ho vha hu si tshee na munna na muthihi we a vha a tshi kha ḓi tshila kha vhe vha ṅwalwa nga Mushe na Aroni musi vha tshi vhala vhathu lwa u thoma phangani ya Sinai. 
Numbers26:65 Muṋe washu o vha o amba uri vhoṱhe vha ḓo fela phangani, ha sala Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune, na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu fhedzi." 
Numbers26:65 Muṋe washu o vha o amba uri vhoṱhe vha ḓo fela phangani, ha sala Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune, na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu fhedzi." 
Numbers27:1 Ho vha hu na vhananyana vha Tselofihadi ṅwana wa Hefere, ṅwana wa Giliadi, ṅwana wa Makhiri, ṅwana wa Manase, ṅwana wa Josefa. Ndi Mahala na Nua na Hogola na Milikha na Thiritsa. Vhone vho ḓa" 
Numbers27:2 vha ima phanḓa ha Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara na vharangaphanḓa na vhathu vhoṱhe muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu vha ri," 
Numbers27:3 “Khotsi ashu vho fela sogani vha si sie na mutuka na muthihi. Vhone vho vha vha sa imi na Kora a tshi shandukela Muṋe washu, vho fa nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi havho vhone vhaṋe." 
Numbers27:4 Dzina ḽa khotsi ashu ḽo fanela uri ḽi si tsha vhidzwa vhukati ha Vhaisraele nge vha tou fa vha si na vhana vha vhatuka naa? Nga vha ri kovhele-vho shango hune ha vha na mashaka a khotsi ashu.” 
Numbers27:5 Mushe a swikisa mafhungo avho ha Muṋe washu," 
Numbers27:6 Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri," 
Numbers27:7 “Zwe vhananyana vha Tselofihadi vha humbela ndi zwone, vha kovhele shango hune ha vha na mashaka a khotsi avho. Litsha ifa ḽa khotsi avho ḽi tshi vha ḽavho." 
Numbers27:8 Vhudza Vhaisraele uri arali munna a fa a si sie ṅwana wa mutuka, ṅwananyana wawe o ḓi fanela u vha muḽaifa." 
Numbers27:9 Arali a si na ṅwananyana, ḽi waniwa nga vharathu vhawe." 
Numbers27:10 Arali a si na vharathu ḽi waniwa nga vhokhotsimunene wawe. 
Numbers27:11 Arali a si na vharathu kana vhokhotsimunene, ḽi waniwa nga shaka ḽawe ḽa tsini, ḽa vha ḽawe. Vhaisraele vha zwi sedze zwi mulayo, sa zwe Nṋe Yahavee nda u laya.”" 
Numbers27:12 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Gonya thavha ya Abarimu u vhone shango ḽine nda khou ṋea Vhaisraele." 
Numbers27:13 Hu ḓo ri musi wo no ḽi vhona wa konou fa, unga mukomana wau Aroni," 
Numbers27:14 ngauri noṱhe vhuvhili haṋu no nyadza ndayo yanga musi ni phangani ya Tsini. Zwiḽa vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi nngungulela vhe Miriba, a no ngo vha sumbedza maanḓa anga makhethwa.” (Miriba ndi tshisima tshi re Kadeshe sogani ḽa Tsini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mushe a rabela a ri," 
Numbers27:16 “Mudzimu Muṋe washu, Iwe tshisima tsha vhutshilo hoṱhe, a u nangi munna ane a nga kona u vha murangaphanḓa wa vhathu havha naa," 
Numbers27:17 ane a kona u vha tshimbidza o vha ranga phanḓa, uri vhathu vhau vha si nge vhathu vha si na mulisa?”" 
Numbers27:18 Muṋe washu a fhindula Mushe a ri, “Dzhia Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, munna a na Muya wanga, u vhee zwanḓa zwau ṱhohoni yawe." 
Numbers27:18 Muṋe washu a fhindula Mushe a ri, “Dzhia Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, munna a na Muya wanga, u vhee zwanḓa zwau ṱhohoni yawe." 
Numbers27:19 Mu imise phanḓa ha tshifhe Eliasara na vhathu vhoṱhe, henefho phanḓa havho vhoṱhe u ḓivhadze uri ndi ene a no ḓo sala o ima vhuimoni hau." 
Numbers27:20 Iwe u mu kumedze maanḓa au uri vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha mu thetshelese. 
Numbers27:21 U ḓo ḓitika nga tshifhe Eliasara; onoyo u ḓo ḓivha nga madeṅwa makhethwa zwine nda zwi funa, a endedza Joshua na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele mafhungoni avho oṱhe.”" 
Numbers27:21 U ḓo ḓitika nga tshifhe Eliasara; onoyo u ḓo ḓivha nga madeṅwa makhethwa zwine nda zwi funa, a endedza Joshua na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele mafhungoni avho oṱhe.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mushe a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. A imisa Joshua phanḓa ha tshifhe Eliasara na vhathu vhoṱhe," 
Numbers27:22 Mushe a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. A imisa Joshua phanḓa ha tshifhe Eliasara na vhathu vhoṱhe," 
Numbers27:23 a vhea Joshua zwanḓa nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya, a ḓivhadza uri ndi ene a no ḓo ima vhuimoni hawe." 
Numbers27:23 a vhea Joshua zwanḓa nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya, a ḓivhadza uri ndi ene a no ḓo ima vhuimoni hawe." 
Numbers28:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe 
Numbers28:2 uri a laye Vhaisraele uri vha ṋekedze Mudzimu nduvho dza zwiḽiwa, i vhe nduvho i nukhelelaho ine ya mu takadza, i ṋekedzwe nga zwifhinga zwo vhewaho." 
Numbers28:3 Nduvho dza zwiḽiwa dzine dza fanela u ṋekedzwa Muṋe washu ngedzi: nduvho yo fhiswaho ya nga misi ndi thuthana mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi dzi si na luvhadzi. 
Numbers28:4 Thuthana ya u thoma i ṋekedzwe nga matsheloni, ya vhuvhili i ṋekedzwe nga madekwana," 
Numbers28:5 iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya thoro ya vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi, ho vangiwa ḽitha nthihi ya mapfura avhuḓivhuḓi a muolivi." 
Numbers28:6 Heyo ndi nduvho ya misi yoṱhe ine ya tou fhiswa tshoṱhe, ndi ye ya ranga u ṋekedzwa thavhani ya Sinai ya vha nduvho ya zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Yahavee." 
Numbers28:7 Nduvho ya waini ine ya ṋekedzwa na thuthana ya u ranga, ndi ḽitha nthihi ya waini i tshi tou tevhulelwa fhasi u mona na aḽiṱari." 
Numbers28:8 Nga madekwana hu ṋekedzwe thuthana ya vhuvhili nga maitele a no fana na a nduvho ya matsheloni, khathihi na nduvho yayo ya waini. Na yone ndi nduvho ya zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Yahavee." 
Numbers28:9 Nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha hu ṋekedzwe thuthana mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi dzi si na luvhadzi na khilogiramu mbili dza vhukhopfu dzo vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi i vhe nduvho ya thoro, hu ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya waini." 
Numbers28:10 Nduvho heyo yo fhiswaho yo fanela u ṋekedzwa nga Sabatha iṅwe na iṅwe, i ingiwe kha nduvho ya misi yoṱhe ine ya ṋekedzwa na nduvho yayo ya waini." 
Numbers28:11 Mathomoni a ṅwedzi muṅwe na muṅwe Yahavee a ṋekedzwe nduvho i fhiswaho: mbohwana mbili na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers28:12 Nduvho ya thoro hu ṋekedzwa vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu; thutha i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili; 
Numbers28:13 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. Nduvho hedzo dzi fhiswaho ndi nduvho dza zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i takadzaho Muṋe washu." 
Numbers28:14 Nduvho ya waini yo teaho ndi ḽitha mbili dza waini dzine dza ṋekedzwa na mboho iṅwe na iṅwe, thutha i ṋekedzwe na ḽitha nthihi na hafu dza waini, thuthana nthihi i ṋekedzwe na ḽitha nthihi ya waini. Heyo ndi ndayo ya nduvho i fhiswaho ine ya ṋekedzwa nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi muṅwe na muṅwe ṅwaha woṱhe." 
Numbers28:15 Nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe na nduvho yayo ya waini i ingiwe nga nduvho ya mbokoṱo i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo. 
Numbers28:16 Vhuṱambo ha Paseka ha u hulisa Yahavee vhu itwe nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga. 
Numbers28:17 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 15 hu thoma vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa ha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, maḓuvha eneo hu ḽiwe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa." 
Numbers28:18 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa vhuṱambo uho ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, hu songo shumiwa na mushumo na muthihi." 
Numbers28:19 Hu ṋekedzwe Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshi vhe nduvho ya zwiḽiwa: mbohwana mbili na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi dzi si na luvhadzi. 
Numbers28:20 Hu ṋekedzwe nduvho ya thoro yo tewaho ya vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu, thutha i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili," 
Numbers28:21 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. 
Numbers28:22 Hu ṋekedzwe na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo, ngauralo hu ḓo vha ho itwa maitele a u ni pfumelela." 
Numbers28:23 Hezwo zwi ṋekedzwe zwi tshi ingiwa kha nduvho dzi fhiswaho dza misi yoṱhe dza matsheloni. 
Numbers28:24 Ngauralo hu ṋekedzwe Yahavee nduvho ya zwiḽiwa hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, iyo ndi nduvho ine ya nukhelela i no mu takadza. Hezwo zwi ṋekedzwe zwi tshi ingiwa kha nduvho ya misi yoṱhe i fhiswaho na nduvho ya waini." 
Numbers28:25 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, ni songo shuma mushumo na muthihi." 
Numbers28:26 Musi no fhedza vhege ṱhanu na mbili nó ḽa Paseka, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa vhuṱambo ha Khaṋo, musi ni tshi ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho ya mavhele maswa, ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, ni songo shuma na mushumo na muthihi." 
Numbers28:27 Ṋekedzani nduvho i fhiswaho i vhe nduvho i nukhelelaho ine ya takadza Muṋe washu: mbohwana mbili na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers28:28 Ni ṋekedze nduvho ya thoro yo tewaho ya vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu, thutha i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili," 
Numbers28:29 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. 
Numbers28:30 Ni ṋekedze na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo. 
Numbers28:31 Ni ṋekedze hezwo na nduvho ya zwiḽiwa zwi tshi ingiwa kha nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe na nduvho ya thoro. Zwifuwo zwoṱhe zwi ṋekedzwe zwi si na luvhadzi. 
Numbers29:1 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, hu songo shumiwa mushumo na muthihi nga heḽo ḓuvha. Nga ḓuvha ḽeneḽo hu lidzwe dziphalaphala." 
Numbers29:2 Ṋekedzani Muṋe washu nduvho i fhiswaho, nduvho i nukhelelaho i no mu takadza: mbohwana nthihi na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:3 Ni ṋekedze nduvho ya thoro yo tewaho ya vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu, thutha i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili," 
Numbers29:4 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. 
Numbers29:5 Ni ṋekedze na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo. 
Numbers29:6 Hezwo ni zwi ṋekedze zwi tshi ingiwa kha nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe yo teaho ya ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi na nduvho yaḽo ya thoro, na nduvho yo fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe na nduvho yayo ya thoro na nduvho ya waini. Nduvho hedzo dza zwiḽiwa ndi nduvho dzi nukhelelaho dzi takadzaho Yahavee." 
Numbers29:7 Nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, ni songo ḽa zwiḽiwa, ni songo shuma mushumo na muthihi, ni ḓidzivhise zwoṱhe." 
Numbers29:8 Ni ṋekedze Yahavee nduvho i fhiswaho, nduvho i nukhelelaho i no mu takadza: mbohwana nthihi na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:9 Ni ṋekedze nduvho ya thoro yo teaho ya vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu, thutha i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili," 
Numbers29:10 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. 
Numbers29:11 Ni ṋekedze na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo, i tshi ingiwa kha mbudzi ine ya ṋekedzwa hu tshi tevhedzwa maitele a u pfumelela vhathu, na nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe i na nduvho yayo ya thoro na nduvho ya waini." 
Numbers29:12 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 15 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni kuvhangane ni luvhe. Ni ite vhuṱambo honoho ni tshi hulisa Muṋe washu hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili. Ni songo shuma mushumo na muthihi. 
Numbers29:13 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ni ṋekedze Yahavee nduvho ya zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i no takadza: mbohwana dza 13 na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:14 Ni ṋekedze nduvho ya thoro yo tewaho ya vhukhopfu ho vangiwaho mapfura a muolivi: mboho iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu tharu, thutha iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu mbili," 
Numbers29:15 thuthana iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na vhukhopfu ha khilogiramu nthihi. 
Numbers29:16 Ni ṋekedze na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo. Hezwo ni zwi ṋekedze zwi tshi ingiwa kha nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe i na nduvho yayo ya thoro na nduvho ya waini. 
Numbers29:17 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili ni ṋekedze mbohwana dza 12 na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:18 Ni dzi ṋekedze na dziṅwe nduvho dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga. 
Numbers29:19 Ni ṋekedze na mbokoṱo nthihi i vhe nduvho ya tshipfumelo, i tshi ingiwa kha nduvho i fhiswaho ya misi yoṱhe i na nduvho yayo ya thoro na nduvho ya waini." 
Numbers29:20 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ni ṋekedze mbohwana dza 11 na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:21 Ni dzi ṋekedze na dziṅwe nduvho dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga. 
Numbers29:22  
Numbers29:23 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa ni ṋekedze mbohwana dza fumi na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:24 Ni dzi ṋekedze na nduvho dziṅwe dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili. 
Numbers29:25  
Numbers29:26 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu ni ṋekedze mbohwana ṱhanu na nṋa na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:27 Ni dzi ṋekedze na nduvho dziṅwe dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili. 
Numbers29:28  
Numbers29:29 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi ni ṋekedze mbohwana ṱhanu na tharu na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:30 Ni dzi ṋekedze na dziṅwe nduvho dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili. 
Numbers29:31  
Numbers29:32 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni ṋekedze mbohwana ṱhanu na mbili na thutha mbili na thuthana dza 14 dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:33 Ni dzi ṋekedze na dziṅwe nduvho dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili. 
Numbers29:34  
Numbers29:35 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru ni kuvhangane ni luvhe, ni songo shuma mushumo na muthihi." 
Numbers29:36 Ni ṋekedze Muṋe washu nduvho i fhiswaho i vhe nduvho ya zwiḽiwa, nduvho i nukhelelaho i no mu takadza: mbohwana nthihi na thutha nthihi na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili dza ṅwaha muthihi, dzoṱhe dzi vhe dzi si na luvhadzi." 
Numbers29:37 Ni dzi ṋekedze na dziṅwe nduvho dzoṱhe dze na ṋekedza nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili. 
Numbers29:38  
Numbers29:39 Hedzo ndi dzone ndayo dzine dza amba nga nduvho dzi fhiswaho na nduvho dza thoro na nduvho dza waini na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu dzine na fanela u dzi ṋekedza Yahavee nga vhuṱambo ho vhewaho, hu sa vhaliwi dzine na dzi ṋekedza ni tshi khunyeledza muano kana dzine na dzi ṋekedza nga u tou funa." 
Numbers29:40 Mushe a vhudza Vhaisraele zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya. 
Numbers30:1 Mushe o ṋea vharangaphanḓa vha matsinde a Vhaisraele ndayo hedzi a ri," 
Numbers30:2 “Arali munna a fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu tshithu nga muano kana a ana a ri u ḓo ḓiilisa tshithu, a songo pfuka zwe a fulufhedzisa, nga a ite zwoṱhe zwe a ri u ḓo zwi ita." 
Numbers30:3 “Musidzana arali a kha ḓi dzula muṱani wa khotsi awe, a ita muano a ri u ḓo ṋea Muṋe washu tshiṅwe tshithu kana a fulufhedzisa u ḓiilisa tshiṅwe tshithu," 
Numbers30:4 khotsi awe a zwi pfa a si mu dzivhise, o fanela u ita zwoṱhe zwe a ana na zwe a fulufhedzisa." 
Numbers30:5 Huno arali khotsi awe a ri u zwi pfa a mu dzivhisa, zwenezwo muano a u tsha shuma. Muṋe washu a nga si mu vhone mulandu, hufha o dzivhiswa nga khotsi awe!" 
Numbers30:6 “Arali musidzana o fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu tshithu nga muano, a nga vha o u ita nga u tou funa kana a sa londi, kana o fulufhedzisa u ḓiilisa tshiṅwe tshithu, a sala a tshi dzewa," 
Numbers30:7 munna wawe a ri u zwi pfa a si mu dzivhise, o fanela u khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe a ana na zwe a fulufhedzisa." 
Numbers30:8 Huno arali munna wawe a ri u zwi pfa a mu hanisa a tshi khunyeledza uyo muano, zwenezwo muano a u tsha shuma. Muṋe washu a nga si mu vhone mulandu." 
Numbers30:9 “Tshilikadzi kana musadzi o ṱaliwaho o fanela u khunyeledza tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine a ana na zwoṱhe zwe a fulufhedzisa a ri u ḓo ḓiilisa zwone. 
Numbers30:10 “Arali musadzi o vhingwaho a fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu tshithu nga muano, kana a ana a ri u ḓo ḓiilisa tshiṅwe tshithu," 
Numbers30:11 munna wawe a ri u zwi pfa a si mu dzivhise, o fanela u ita zwoṱhe zwe a ana na zwe a fulufhedzisa." 
Numbers30:12 Hone arali munna wawe a ri u zwi pfa a mu dzivhisa u khunyeledza uyo muano, zwenezwo muano a u tsha shuma. Muṋe washu a nga si mu vhone mulandu, ngauri u ḓo vha e munna we a mu kundisa u khunyeledza uyo muano." 
Numbers30:13 Munna wawe u na pfanelo ya u khwaṱhisa kana u pfuvhisa muano ufhio na ufhio kana zwoṱhe zwe uyo musadzi a fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo ḓidzivhisa zwone. 
Numbers30:14 Huno arali uyo munna a pfa zwa uyo muano a si mu dzivhise musi wonoyo, uyo musadzi o fanela u ita zwoṱhe zwe a ana na zwe a fulufhedzisa. Munna o khwaṱhisa muano nge a ri u zwi pfa a si hane." 
Numbers30:15 Huno arali ngavhuya munna a vho pfuvhisa uyo muano, u na mulandu.”" 
Numbers30:16 Hedzo ndi dzone ndayo dze Muṋe washu a laya Mushe zwi tshi ambelwa miano ine ya itwa nga musadzi o vhingwaho kana musidzana ane a kha ḓi dzula muṱani wa khotsi awe. 
Numbers31:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers31:2 “Lifhedza Vhamidiani zwe vha ita Vhaisraele. U ḓo ri wo no ita hezwo, wa konou fa.”" 
Numbers31:3 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhudza vhathu a ri, “Ḓilugiseni ni bve pfumo ni yo lwa na Vhamidiani ni lifhedzele Muṋe washu." 
Numbers31:4 Kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa Vhaisraele hu bve vhanna vha tshigidi vha ye nndwani.” 
Numbers31:5 Ndi hone hu tshi nangiwa vhanna vha tshigidi vhane vha bva pfumo kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe, vho ṱangana vha ita vhanna vha 12 000." 
Numbers31:6 Mushe a ri vha ye nndwani vho rangwa phanḓa nga Finiasi ṅwana wa tshifhe Eliasara, onoyo o vha o fara thundu khethwa na phalaphala ya u vha langa." 
Numbers31:7 Vha dia Midiani, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe, vha vhulaha vhanna vhoṱhe," 
Numbers31:8 khathihi na mahosi maṱanu a Midiani: Evi na Rekeme na Tsuru na Huru na Reba. Vha vhulaha na Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro. 
Numbers31:9 Vhaisraele vha thuba vhasadzi na vhana vha Vhamidiani, vha dzhia kholomo dzavho na masambi avho a nngu, vha vha ṱangula lupfumo lwavho lwoṱhe," 
Numbers31:10 vha fhisa miḓi yavho yoṱhe na mishasha. 
Numbers31:11 Vha dzhia thundu yoṱhe ye vha i thuba, khathihi na vhathu na zwifuwo," 
Numbers31:12 vha zwi isa ha Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara na vhathu vha Israele vhe mishashani, midavhini ya Muaba tsini ha Jorodani u livhana na Jerikho." 
Numbers31:13 Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara na vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha vhathu vha bva mishashani u yo ṱanganedza mmbi. 
Numbers31:14 Mushe a sinyutshela vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane vha tshigidi tsha vhathu na vhalangagomane vha ḓana ḽa vhathu, vhe vha vhuya vha tshi bva nndwani." 
Numbers31:15 Mushe a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini vhasadzi avha vhoṱhe ni songo vha vhulaha?" 
Numbers31:16 Ḓivhani uri ndi vhone vhe vha ita zwe vha funzedzwa nga Biliamu, vha fhura Vhaisraele uri vha shandukele Muṋe washu nga zwe vha ita thavhani ya Phioro. Ndi zwe zwa ita uri vhathu vha Muṋe washu vha fe nga dwadze." 
Numbers31:17 Zwino vhulahani vhatukana vhoṱhe na vhasadzi vhoṱhe vho no ḓivhanaho na munna," 
Numbers31:18 ni ḓisiele vhasidzana vhoṱhe vha sa athu ḓivhana na munna. 
Numbers31:19 Zwino inwi noṱhe no vhulahaho muthu kana no kwamaho tshitumbu no fanela u dzula nnḓa ha mishasha na fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili. Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru na nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni ḓikumulule khathihi na vhasadzi vhe na vha thuba. 
Numbers31:20 Ni kumulule na zwoṱhe zwo itwaho nga mukumba kana nga vhukuse ha mbudzi kana thanda.” 
Numbers31:21 Tshifhe Eliasara a amba na vhanna vho vhuyaho nndwani a ri, “Ndayo dze Muṋe washu a laya Mushe ngedzi." 
Numbers31:22 Tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi sa swi, tshi no nga musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha na tsimbi na thini na mutobvu, tsho fanela u bviswa tshika nga u tshi vhavha nga mulilo. Zwiṅwe zwoṱhe ni zwi ṱanzwe nga maḓi, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo vha zwo kumululwa." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ni kuvhe zwiambaro zwaṋu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha no ḓikumulula na ḓo konou dzhena mishashani.”" 
Numbers31:25 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe na tshifhe Eliasara na vhahulwane vha miṱa ni vhale zwoṱhe zwo thubwaho khathihi na vhathu na zwifuwo. 
Numbers31:27 U fhandekanye zwo thubwaho nga zwipiḓa zwivhili, tshiṅwe tshipiḓa tshi kovhekanywe vhahali vho bvaho pfumo, tshiṅwe tshi kovhekanywe vhoṱhe vho salaho." 
Numbers31:28 Kha mukovhe wa vhahali vho bvaho pfumo u bvise musumo wa Yahavee wa tshithihi kha zwa 500, zwi nga vha vhathu kana kholomo kana donngi kana nngu kana mbudzi." 
Numbers31:29 Izwo u zwi fhe tshifhe Eliasara u vhe mukovhe wanga. 
Numbers31:30 Kha tshipiḓa tsho kovhekanywaho Vhaisraele u bvise tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwa 50, vha nga vha vhathu kana kholomo kana donngi kana nngu kana mbudzi kana zwiṅwe zwifuwo. Izwo u zwi fhe Vhalivi vhane vha londola dennde ya u ṱangana na Nṋe.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara vha ita zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Numbers31:32 Mutevhe wa thundu yo thubiwaho nga vhahali ngoyu, hu sa vhalwi zwe vha ḓidzhiela: nngu na mbudzi 675 000, kholomo 72 000, donngi 61 000, vhasidzana vha sa ḓivhani na munna 32 000." 
Numbers31:33  
Numbers31:34  
Numbers31:35  
Numbers31:36 Tshipiḓa tsho kovhekanywaho vhahali ndi nngu na mbudzi dza 337 500, kha dzenedzo, dza 675 dzo vha musumo wa Muṋe washu; kha kholomo dza 36 000 dza vhahali, dza 72 dzo vha musumo wa Muṋe washu; kha donngi dza 30 500 dza vhahali, dza 61 dzo vha musumo wa Muṋe washu; kha vhasidzana vha 16 000 vho kovhelwaho vhahali, vha 32 vho vha musumo wa Muṋe washu."

Numbers31:39  
Numbers31:40  
Numbers31:41 Mushe a dzhia uyo musumo wa Muṋe washu a u fha tshifhe Eliasara, nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya." 
Numbers31:42 Mukovhe wa vhathu wo vha u tshi eḓana na wa vhahali: ndi nngu na mbudzi dza 337 500 na kholomo dza 36 000 na donngi dza 30 500 na vhasidzana vha 16 000.

Numbers31:46  
Numbers31:47 Kha mukovhe wonoyo Mushe o bvisa tshithihi kha 50 a mathubwa na zwifuwo, nga he Muṋe washu a mu laya, a zwi ṋea Vhalivi vhe vha vha vha tshi londola dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Numbers31:48 Ndi hone vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane vha no langa tshigidi na vha no langa ḓana vha tshi ya ha Mushe," 
Numbers31:49 vha swikisa mafhungo haano vha ri, “Ro vhala vhahali vhane ra vha langa ra wana hu si na o ṱahelaho." 
Numbers31:50 Zwino ro ḓisa thundu dza musuku: magidiphoo na vhukunda na dzirinngi na zwiṅina na vhulungu zwe muṅwe na muṅwe washu a zwi dzhia. Ri zwi ṋekedza Muṋe washu uri ri ḓipfumelele phanḓa hawe.” 
Numbers31:51 Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara vha ṱanganedza madzanga oṱhe a musuku. 
Numbers31:52 Musuku woṱhe wo bviswaho nga vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane we Mushe na Eliasara vha u ṋekedza Muṋe washu uri u vhe musumo wawe wo vha u tshi lemela u ṱoḓou swika kha khilogiramu dza 200. 
Numbers31:53 Muhali muṅwe na muṅwe o vha o ḓidzhiela zwe a ṱangula. 
Numbers31:54 Mushe na Eliasara vha ṱanganedza musuku u no bva kha vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane vha u isa denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, wa vha tshihumbudzo tsha Vhaisraele phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
Numbers32:1 Matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi vho vha vhe na kholomo na nngu nnzhi. Musi vha tshi vhona shango ḽa Jasere na ḽa Giliadi ḽo fanela zwifuwo," 
Numbers32:2 vha ya ha Mushe na tshifhe Eliasara na vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu vha ri," 
Numbers32:3 “Dzingu heḽi ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi kunda u swikani ha Vhaisraele uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, ḽa miḓi ya Atarotho na Diboni na Jazere na Nimira na Hesheboni na Eliale na Sibima na Nebo na Bioni, ḽo fanela zwifuwo, zwino riṋe ri na zwifuwo zwinzhi." 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 Arali vha tshi ri takalela, iḽo shango nga ḽi ṋewe riṋe ḽi vhe ḽashu, vha songo ita uri ri wele mulambo wa Jorodani ri yo dzula hangei seli.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mushe a fhindula vhathu vha Gadi na vha Rubeni a ri, “Vhaisraele vha haṋu vha ḓo ya nndwani inwi no dzula fhano naa?" 
Numbers32:7 Ndi mini ni tshi kula Vhaisraele nungo uri vha si wetshele shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a vha ṋea? 
Numbers32:8 Ndi zwenezwo zwe vhokhotsi aṋu vha ita zwiḽa ndi tshi vha ruma ri Kadeshe Barania uri vha yo tandula shango. 
Numbers32:9 Vho swika govhani ḽa Eshkolo vha vhona shango, hone musi vha tshi vhuya, vha kula vhathu nungo uri vha si dzhene shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a vha ṋea." 
Numbers32:10 Muṋe washu a sinyuwa musi wonoyo a ana a ri," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Zwino nge vha si ntevhele nga mbilu yoṱhe, vhanna vhoṱhe u bva kha vha miṅwaha ya 20 vhe vha pfuluwa Egipita, a hu na na muthihi wavho ane a ḓo vhona shango ḽe nda ḽi fulufhedzisa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo nga muano.’" 
Numbers32:12 Vhe vha khathutshelwa mbilu ndi vhavhili fhedzi, ndi Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune wa Mukenisi na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu; havho a vho ngo vhuya vha shandukela Muṋe washu." 
Numbers32:12 Vhe vha khathutshelwa mbilu ndi vhavhili fhedzi, ndi Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune wa Mukenisi na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu; havho a vho ngo vhuya vha shandukela Muṋe washu." 
Numbers32:13 Muṋe washu o sinyutshela Vhaisraele, a ita uri vha tendeleke sogani vha fhedza miṅwaha ya 40, ha vhuya ha fa murafho woṱhe wa vhe vha ita zwi sa mu takadzi." 
Numbers32:14 Zwino ni tshigwada tsha vhatshinyi, ni ita zwenezwiḽa zwa vhokhotsi aṋu, ni khou dovha u ṱunga Muṋe washu uri mbiti dzawe dzi dovhe dzi wele Vhaisraele." 
Numbers32:15 Arali inwi vhathu vha Rubeni na Gadi na mu shandukela zwino, u ḓo dovha a ṱutshela vhathu havha fhano sogani, nahone arali vha lozwiwa, mulandu ndi waṋu.”" 
Numbers32:16 Vha ḓa ha Mushe vha ri, “A ri thomi u fhaṱa zwashu madanga fhano a zwifuwo zwashu na miḓi ya vhasadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu?" 
Numbers32:17 Hone ró ḓiimisela u shoma nga tshihaḓu ra ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa ra vhuya ra vha swikisa shangoni ḽavho. Zwenezwo vhasadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu vha ḓo vha vho dzula miḓini yo fhaṱeledzwaho, vho tsireledzea kha vhadzulapo vha shango ḽino." 
Numbers32:18 Ri nga si humele hayani hashu Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha sa athu wana shango ḽe vha ṋewa uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. 
Numbers32:19 Riṋe ri nga si kovhekane navho shango seli ha Jorodani, ngauri riṋe ro no ḓi wana mukovhe washu seli na luno vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vha vhudza a ri, “Arali vhukumakuma ni tshi amba zwone, ḓilugiseleni hafha phanḓa ha Muṋe washu uri ri kone u bva pfumo." 
Numbers32:21 Vhahali vhaṋu vhoṱhe nga vha wele Jorodani, vha die maswina avho vho rangwa phanḓa nga Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a vhuya vha kunda" 
Numbers32:22 a dzhia iḽo shango. Nó no ita izwo ni nga ḓi humela murahu ngauri ni ḓo vha no khunyeledza pfanelo dzaṋu kha Muṋe washu na kha Vhaisraele vha haṋu. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo tenda uri shango ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani ndi ḽaṋu. 
Numbers32:23 Hone arali na sa ita zwe na fulufhedzisa, ni ḓo vha ni tshi khou khakhela Muṋe washu. Ni songo vhuya na khakha, ni sa ḓo lifhedzelwa vhuvhi haṋu." 
Numbers32:24 Zwino-ha, fhaṱani miḓi ya vhasadzi vhaṋu na vhana vhaṋu, na madanga a nngu dzaṋu, tenda na ita zwe na fulufhedzisa!”" 
Numbers32:25 Vhathu vha Gadi na Rubeni vha vhudza Mushe vha ri, “Ri ḓo ita zwine vha ri laya." 
Numbers32:26 Vhasadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu na kholomo dzashu na nngu dzashu zwi ḓo sala fhano miḓini ya Giliadi. 
Numbers32:27 Hone riṋe, munna muṅwe na muṅwe washu o shomaho, u ḓo wela seli u yo lwa ro ranga mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu phanḓa, nga hune vhone vha amba.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi laya tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na vhahulwane vha miṱa ya matsinde a Israele a ri," 
Numbers32:28 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi laya tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na vhahulwane vha miṱa ya matsinde a Israele a ri," 
Numbers32:29 “Arali vhathu vha Gadi na Rubeni vha wela Jorodani vho shoma vho ranga mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu phanḓa, nahone arali vha ni farisa na kunda iḽo shango, izwo vha fheni ḽa Giliadi ḽi vhe ḽavho." 
Numbers32:30 Hone arali vha sa wela Jorodani vha bva pfumo na inwi, izwo vha vho ḓo wana mukovhe wavho wa shango shangoni ḽa Kanana na inwi.”" 
Numbers32:31 Vhathu vha Gadi na Rubeni vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri ḓo ita zwe Muṋe washu a amba." 
Numbers32:32 Ri ḓo wela seli ro ranga mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu phanḓa, ra dzhena shangoni ḽa Kanana ro fara mafumo, hone mukovhe washu wa shango une ra ḓo u wana u ḓo vha seli na ḽino ḽa Jorodani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi amba na vhathu vha Gadi na Rubeni na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase ṅwana wa Josefa, a vha ṋea muvhuso wa Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori na wa Ogo khosi ya Bashani, shango ḽoṱhe na miḓi yaḽo na mivhundu yo i tangaho." 
Numbers32:34 Vha tsinde ḽa Gadi vha vusa miḓi ya mitsheṱo ya Diboni na Atarotho na Aruere 
Numbers32:35 na Atirotho Shafani na Jazere na Jogoboha 
Numbers32:36 na Bethe Nimira na Bethe Harani, khathihi na madanga a zwifuwo." 
Numbers32:37 Vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni vha vusa Hesheboni na Eliale na Kiriathaimi," 
Numbers32:38 na Nebo na Baali Mioni (heḽo dzina ḽo ḓo shandukiswa), na Sibima. Miḓi ye vha i vusa vha i rina madzina maswa." 
Numbers32:39 Vha mutupo wa Makhiri ṅwana wa Manase vha dia shango ḽa Giliadi, vha ḽi thuba, vha thatha Vhaamori vhe vha vha vhe henefho." 
Numbers32:40 Mushe ḽa Giliadi a ḽi ṋea vha mutupo wa Makhiri, vha lutsinga lwa Manase, vha dzula henefho." 
Numbers32:41 Jairi, wa lutsinga lwa Manase, a dia miṅwe miḓi ya mishasha a i thuba, a ri i pfi Miḓi ya Jairi." 
Numbers32:42 Noba a dia Kenathi na miḓi i re tsini nawo a hu thuba a hu rina dzina ḽawe a ri hu pfi Noba. 
Numbers33:1 Mafhungo haya a sumbedza madzina a fhethu he Vhaisraele vha ṱoka mishasha musi vho no pfuluwa Egipita zwi tshi ya nga matsinde avho vho rangwa phanḓa nga Mushe na Aroni. 
Numbers33:2 Mushe o ṅwala dzina ḽa fhethu hoṱhe he vha ṱoka mishasha ó vhudzwa nga Muṋe washu. 
Numbers33:3 Vhaisraele vho pfuluwa Egipita nga ḓuvha ḽa 15 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma wa ṅwaha, nga ḓuvha ḽi tevhelaho Paseka ya u thoma. Vho ṱuwa muḓini wa Ramisese Vhaegipita vha tshi zwi vhona, vhó tsireledzwa nga Muṋe washu," 
Numbers33:4 Vhaegipita vha tshi khou swiṱa matanzhe a vhatuka vhe Muṋe washu a vha vhulaha. Muṋe washu a tshi ita hezwo ho vha u haṱula midzimu ya Egipita. 
Numbers33:5 Vhaisraele vha ṱuwa Ramisese vha ṱoka mishasha Sukotho. 
Numbers33:6 Vha fhira vha ṱoka mishasha Ethamu lumemeni lwa phanga. 
Numbers33:7 U bva henefho vha humela murahu vha ya Phi Hahirotho, vhubvaḓuvha ha Baali Tsifoni, vha ṱoka mishasha tsini ha Migidolo." 
Numbers33:8 Vha ṱuwa Phi Hahirotho vha wela Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga vha dzhena phangani ya Shuru, musi vho tshimbila maḓuvha mararu vha ṱoka mishasha Mara." 
Numbers33:9 U bva henefho vha ya Elimu, vha ṱoka mishasha hone, nge ha vha hu na zwisima zwa 12 zwa maḓi na mitshevho ya 70 henefho." 
Numbers33:10 Vha ṱuwa Elimu vha ṱoka mishasha Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga. 
Numbers33:11 U bva henefho vha ṱoka mishasha phangani ya Sini. 
Numbers33:12 Vha konou ṱoka mishasha Dofuka," 
Numbers33:13 ngavhuya vha ṱoka mishasha Alushi. 
Numbers33:14 Vha ri u takuwa afho vha ṱoka mishasha Rafidimu vha wana hu si na maḓi ane vha nga nwa. 
Numbers34:1 Muṋe washu a ṋea Mushe 
Numbers34:2 ndayo hedzi dza Vhaisraele a ri, “Musi ni tshi dzhena Kanana, shango ḽine nda khou ni ṋea ḽone, masakha a shango ḽaṋu a ḓo vha haya:" 
Numbers34:3 Masakha a thungo ya tshipembe a ḓo thoma phangani ya Tsini a tshimbila na masakha a Edomo. A ḓo thoma vhubvaḓuvha hune Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo lwa guma hone thungo ya tshipembe. 
Numbers34:4 Zwino a konou livha tshipembe a tshi ya Pharani ya Phame a fhirela phanḓa a swika Tsini a vhuya a swika tshipembe Kadeshe Barania. Zwenezwo a livha vhukovheladevhula u ya Hatsara Adara a fhirela Atsimoni," 
Numbers34:5 u bva henefho a ḓo livha govhani na masakhani a Egipita a fhelela Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. 
Numbers34:6 “Masakha a vhukovhela a ḓo vha Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango. 
Numbers34:7 “Masakha a devhula a ḓo tou tswi u bva Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango u ya thavhani ya Horo," 
Numbers34:8 u bva henefho a livha Pharani ya Hamathi. A ḓo fhirela phanḓa a tshi ya Tsedada," 
Numbers34:9 a fhirela Zifironi, a guma Hatsara Enani." 
Numbers34:10 “Masakha a vhubvaḓuvha a ḓo tou tswi a tshi bva Hatsara Enani a tshi ya Shefamu. 
Numbers34:11 U bva henefho a ḓo konou livha tshipembe a tshi ya Harabele, vhubvaḓuvha ha Aini, a fhirela mivhunduni khunzikhunzini ya vhubvaḓuvha ya dzivha ḽa Khinirethe," 
Numbers34:12 a konou fhirela tshipembe a tshi tsa na mulambo wa Jorodani a tshi ya Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo. “Haya a ḓo vha one masakha a shango ḽaṋu thungo dzoṱhe.” 
Numbers34:13 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele a ri, “Heḽo ndi ḽone shango ḽine na ḓo wana nga u ita madeṅwa, shango ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi ṋea matsinde maṱanu na maṋa na hafu." 
Numbers34:14 Tsinde ḽa Rubeni na ḽa Gadi na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha vho no ḓi kovhelwa shango ḽavho, zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho," 
Numbers34:15 vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, u livhana na Jerikho.”" 
Numbers34:16 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Numbers34:17 “Tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu vha ḓo kovhekanya vhathu shango. 
Numbers34:17 “Tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu vha ḓo kovhekanya vhathu shango. 
Numbers34:18 U dzhie na murangaphanḓa muthihi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a farise vha tshi kovha shango.” 
Numbers34:19 Vhanna vho nangwaho nga Muṋe washu ngevha: Juda Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune Simioni Samuele ṅwana wa Amihudu Benyamini Elidadi ṅwana wa Khisiloni Dani Buki ṅwana wa Jogoli Manase Haniele ṅwana wa Efodo Efraimi Kemuele ṅwana wa Shifitani Zebuloni Elitsafani ṅwana wa Pharanakha Isakhara Phalatiele ṅwana na Azani Ashere Ahihudu ṅwana wa Shelomi Nafuthali Phedahele ṅwana wa Amihudu

Numbers34:29 Havho ndi vhone vhanna vhe Muṋe washu a vha hwesa mushumo wa u kovhela Vhaisraele mikovhe yavho shangoni ḽa Kanana. 
Numbers35:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe midavhini ya Muaba tsini ha Jorodani u livhana na Jerikho a ri," 
Numbers35:2 “Vhudza Vhaisraele uri kha mashango e vha kovhelwa vho fanela u ṋea Vhalivi miṅwe miḓi ine vha ḓo dzula khayo na pfulo u mona na iyo miḓi. 
Numbers35:3 Heyo miḓi i ḓo vha ya Vhalivi, vha ḓo dzula khayo. Pfulo i ḓo vha ya kholomo dzavho na masambi a nngu na zwiṅwe zwifuwo." 
Numbers35:4 Pfulo i ḓo ita mitha dza 450 u bva mutsheṱoni wa muḓi 
Numbers35:5 uri hu vhe na fhethu ha tshikwea hune ha ita mitha dza 900 masia oṱhe, vhubvaḓuvha, tshipembe, vhukovhela, devhula, muḓi u vhe vhukati." 
Numbers35:6 Vhalivi vha ṋewe miḓi miṱanu na muthihi ya vhushavhelo hune muthu a nga kona u shavhela hone arali a tshenuwa o vhulaha muṅwe a songo humbula. Vha dovhe vha ṋewe miṅwe miḓi ya 42," 
Numbers35:7 na mashango ayo a pfulo, yo ṱangana i vhe miḓi ya 48." 
Numbers35:8 Tshivhalo tsha miḓi ya Vhalivi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe zwi ḓo ya nga vhuhulwane ha shango ḽa tsinde ḽeneḽo.” 
Numbers35:9 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe 
Numbers35:10 uri a vhudze Vhaisraele a ri, “Musi ni tshi wela mulambo wa Jorodani, ni tshi dzhena shangoni ḽa Kanana," 
Numbers35:11 ni nange miḓi ya vhushavhelo hune muthu a nga kona u shavhela hone arali a tshenuwa o vhulaha muṅwe a songo humbula. 
Numbers35:12 Henefho u ḓo vha o tsireledzea kha shaka ḽa uyo ḽine ḽa funa u lifhedza. Muthu ane a pomokwa ha pfi o vhulaha muthu, a songo vhulawa á sa athu sengiswa khoroni." 
Numbers35:13 Nangani miḓi miṱanu na muthihi," 
Numbers35:14 miraru vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, miraru shangoni ḽa Kanana." 
Numbers35:15 Heyo i ḓo vha miḓi ya vhushavhelo ya Vhaisraele na vhatsinda vho ḓaho u dzula tshifhinganyana kana u dzula tshoṱhe. Muthu ane a vhulaha muṅwe á songo humbula a nga shavhela kha muṅwe wayo. 
Numbers35:16 “Huno arali munna a vhulaha muṅwe nga tshihali tsha tsimbi kana tombo kana thanda, u na mulandu wa u vhulaha muthu, onoyo a vhulawe." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 Shaka ḽa tsini ḽa uyo mufu ḽi na pfanelo ya u vhulaha iyo phondi. Arali a mu wana a mu vhulahe. 
Numbers35:20 “Arali munna a tshi vhenga muṅwe a mu vhulaha nga u mu wisela fhasi kana nga u mu posa nga tshiṅwe tshithu," 
Numbers35:21 kana nga u mu rwa nga vili, u na mulandu wa u vhulaha muthu, onoyo nga a vhulawe. Shaka ḽa tsini ḽa uyo mufu ḽi na pfanelo ya u vhulaha iyo phondi. Arali a mu wana nga a mu vhulahe." 
Numbers35:22 “Huno arali muthu a vhulaha muṅwe ane a si mu vhenge, hu nga kha ḓi vha nga u tou mu wisela fhasi kana nga u mu kovhola nga tshiṅwe tshithu, hone hu si nga khole," 
Numbers35:23 kana a posa tombo á songo ranga a sedza, a tshenuwa o vhulaha muthu á songo humbula u mu huvhadza, nahone e si swina ḽawe," 
Numbers35:24 mafhungoni o raloho khoro nga i haṱule vha tshi sedza mulandu vha lamule muvhulahi na mulifhedzi. 
Numbers35:25 Khoro i fanela u tsireledza uyo munna a re na mulandu wa u vhulaha muthu uri a si lifhedzwe nga shaka ḽa mufu, nahone vho fanela u mu vhuedzedza muḓini wa vhushavhelo he a vha o shavhela hone. O fanela u dzula henefho hu vhuye hu fe tshifhe muhulu wa tshifhinga tshenetsho." 
Numbers35:26 Arali uyo munna a re na mulandu wa u vhulaha muthu a bva afho muḓini wa vhushavhelo he a shavhela hone," 
Numbers35:27 shaka ḽa mufu ḽa ṱangana nae ḽa mu vhulaha, u lifhedza ha u ralo a si vhupondi." 
Numbers35:28 Munna a re na mulandu wa u vhulaha muthu o fanela u dzula muḓini wa vhushavhelo hu vhuye hu fe tshifhe muhulu, ó no fa a nga ḓi humela hayani." 
Numbers35:29 Ndayo hedzo dzi kwama inwi na vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu vhoṱhe hune na dzula hone. 
Numbers35:30 “Munna ane a pomokwa u fanela u wanala e na mulandu a vhulawa arali hu na ṱhanzi mbili kana dzi fhiraho idzo, ha vhulawi arali o vhonwa nga ṱhanzi nthihi fhedzi." 
Numbers35:31 Phondi a i lifhi, i tou vhulawa." 
Numbers35:32 Arali munna o shavhela muḓini wa vhushavhelo, ni songo mu tendela a tshi lifha uri a humele hayani tshifhe muhulu a sa athu fa." 
Numbers35:33 Arali na ita nga u ralo, shango ḽine na dzula khaḽo ni ḓo ḽi shata tshika. Vhupondi vhu kumadza shango, nahone a hu na maṅwe maitele a u kumulula shango ḽe muthu a vhulawa khaḽo arali hu si u vhulaha phondi." 
Numbers35:34 Shango ḽine na dzula khaḽo ni songo ḽi kumadza, ngauri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, ndi dzula na Vhaisraele.”" 
Numbers36:1 Vhahulwane vha miṱa ya mutupo wa Giliadi ṅwana wa Makhiri, ṅwana wa Manase, ṅwana wa Josefa, vha ya ha Mushe na vhaṅwe vharangaphanḓa na vhahulwane vha miṱa ya Vhaisraele," 
Numbers36:2 vha ri, “Muṋe washu o vha laya uri vha kovhe shango nga u ita madeṅwa. A vha laya na uri mukovhe wa shaka ḽashu Tselofihadi u ṋewe vhananyana vhawe." 
Numbers36:3 Zwino arali vha dzewa nga vhanna vha maṅwe matsinde a Vhaisraele, mukovhe wavho u vho ḓo vha wa tsinde ḽeneḽo, mukovhe wo kovhelwaho riṋe wa vho ḓo fhungudzea." 
Numbers36:4 Hu ḓo ri nga ṅwaha wa u vhuedzedza thundu, musi thundu yoṱhe yo rengiswaho i tshi vhuedzedzwa ha muṋe wayo wa u ranga, mukovhe wa vhananyana vha Tselofihadi u ḓo engedza wa tsinde ḽa vho vha dzeaho, wa vha wo bviswa tshoṱhe kha tsinde ḽashu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi laya Vhaisraele nga ndayo heino i bvaho ha Muṋe washu, a ri, “Zwine vha tsinde ḽa Manase vha amba ndi zwone," 
Numbers36:6 zwenezwo Muṋe washu u ri vhananyana vha Tselofihadi vha nga ḓi dzewa nga ane vha tou funa, hone a vhe e wa tsinde ḽa havho." 
Numbers36:7 Mukovhe wa Muisraele muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo ḓi dzula u wa tsinde ḽa hawe. 
Numbers36:8 Musadzi muṅwe na muṅwe ane a kovhelwa ifa ḽa tsinde ḽa Vhaisraele o fanela u dzewa nga munna wa tsinde ḽeneḽo. Ngauralo Muisraele muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo wana ifa ḽa vhokhotsi awe," 
Numbers36:9 uyo mukovhe wa si pfukele kha ḽiṅwe tsinde. Tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi ḓo vha na mukovhe waḽo.” 
Numbers36:10 Ndi hone Mahala na Thiritsa na Hogola na Milikha na Nua, vhananyana vha Tselofihadi, vha tshi ita zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe, vha dzewa nga dzikhaladzi dzavho." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Vha dzewa nga vha mitupo ya tsinde ḽa Manase ṅwana wa Josefa, mikovhe yavho ya ḓi dzula kha tsinde ḽa khotsi avho." 
Numbers36:13 Heyo ndi yone milayo na ndayo dze Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele nga Mushe vhe midavhini ya Muaba tsini na mulambo wa Jorodani u livhana na Jerikho. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Bugu iyi i ri vhudza maipfi a Mushe. Ndi mafhungo e a vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe musi vha tshee phangani seli ha Jorodani vhó livhana na Sufu, thungo dza Pharani na Thofele na Labani na Hatserotho na Dizahaba." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Muthu a tshi bva Horebe a tshi ya Kadeshe Barania nga nḓila ya Seiri dzithavhani, ndi lwendo lwa maḓuvha a 11." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mushe a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu laedza uri a vha vhudze zwone, ḽo vha ḽi ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ḽa ṅwedzi wa 11 wa ṅwaha wa 40 tshee vha pfuluwa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Vho vha vho no kunda Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori we a vha a tshi dzula Hesheboni, na Ogo khosi ya Bashani we a vha a tshi dzula Ashtharotho thungo dza Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Henengei seli ha Jorodani shangoni ḽa Muaba, ndi hone he Mushe a ṱalutshedza vhathu Mulayo wa Muṋe washu. A ri," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Mudzimu Muṋe washu o amba na riṋe ri Horebe a ri, ‘Tshifhinga tsho fhela zwino tsha u dzula thavhani iyi." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Takuwani ni fare lwendo lwa u ya thavhani dza Vhaamori na thungo dza tshakha dzo ṋekanaho masakha navho, vha no dzula govhani ḽa Jorodani na dzithavhani na zwigodini na Negeve na tsini ha lwanzhe – shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Kanana khathihi na Libanoni, u swika mulamboni muhulu wa Yufuratha." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Shango heḽo ndo ni ṋea, iyani ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu; Nṋe Yahavee ndo ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo nda tou khwaṱhisa nga muano nda ri ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhone na vhaḓuhulu vhavho.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Zwenezwo nṋe nda ni vhudza nda ri, ‘Ndi nga si ni kone ndi ndoṱhe," 
Deuteronomy1:10 Mudzimu Muṋe washu o ni andisa lune na vho nga ṋaledzi dzi re lutomboni," 
Deuteronomy1:11 nahone ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu a tshi dovha a ni engedza lwa tshigidi a ni shudufhadza unga o ni fulufhedzisa. 
Deuteronomy1:12 Hone zwino vhunga no no anda nga u rali, khakhathi dzaṋu na zwililo zwine na ḓa nazwo na phambano dzaṋu ndi ḓo zwi kona hani ndi ndoṱhe?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nṋa a si khwiṋe tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi tshi ḓikhethela vhanna vha na vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo na nḓivho, nṋe nda ḓo konou vha vhea uri vha vhe vharangaphanḓa vhaṋu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Inwi na mbo fhindula na ri, ‘Zwine vha amba ndi zwone.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Nṋe nda mbo ṱanganedza vhahulwane vha matsinde aṋu, vhanna vha vhuṱali na nḓivho, nda vha ita magota a no langa vhathu vha tshigidi na a no langa vha ḓana na a no langa 50 na a no langa vha fumi uri vha vhe magota a matsinde aṋu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Nda mbo laya vharangaphanḓa vhaṋu nga hetsho tshifhinga nda ri: Ni thetshelese zwavhuḓi musi vhathu vha haṋu vha tshi ḓa na mafhungo avho, vha nga vha Vhaisraele vhavhili, kana muṅwe e wa mutsinda, inwi ni vhone uri ni ḓi haṱula ni tshi tevhedza mulayo." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ni tshi haṱula ni songo ita tshiṱalula, muheḓana na muḓivhalea ni vha fare nga u fana; ni songo ofha muthu, hufha khaṱhulo i ya Mudzimu. Mafhungo ane na pfa a tshi ni konḓela ni a fhirisele ngeno, ndi ḓo a sengulusa." 
Deuteronomy1:18 “Nga hetsho tshifhinga ndo ni laya nga u ralo nda ni vhudza zwoṱhe zwine na fanela u ita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Zwo no ralo ra takuwa Horebe ra buḓekanya phanga iyi khulu i ofhisaho ye na i vhona inwi vhaṋe, ra tshimbila ro livha thavhani dza Vhaamori nga he Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ri laedza, ra vhuya ra swika Kadeshe Barania." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Nṋe nda ni vhudza nda ri, ‘Ndi hone-ha no swika thavhani dza Vhaamori dzine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a khou ri ṋea dzone." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Asizwo-ha, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u khou ni ṋea shango, gonyani-ha ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, nga he Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu a ni vhudza; ni songo ofha, ni songo timatima.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Inwi noṱhe na mphindula na ri, ‘Kha ri thome u ruma vhaṅwe vhanna vha ri tandulele shango vha konou ri vhudza uri ri nga bva nga ngafhi na uri ri ḓo wana miḓi-ḓe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Nṋe nda pfa zwi tshi pfala, nda nanga vhanna vha 12 kha inwi, muthihi kha tsinde muthihi kha tsinde." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Vhenevho vha mbo ḓi takuwa vha gonya dzithavha, vha swika govhani ḽa Eshkolo (Minḓirivhe) vha ḽi tandula," 
Deuteronomy1:25 vha dzhia miṅwe mitshelo ye vha i wana henefho vha vhuya nayo, vha vhika vha ri, ‘Shango ḽine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a khou ri ṋea ndi ḽavhuḓi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Hone inwi a no ngo tsha tenda u gonya na dzhena shangoni heḽo, no landula ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu," 
Deuteronomy1:27 na sokou dzula denndeni dzaṋu ni tshi gungula ni tshi ri, ‘Muṋe washu u a ri vhenga, ndi zwe a ri pfulusa Egipita; u khou ṱoḓa u ri kumedza Vhaamori uri vha ri lozwe tshoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Ri kha ḓi gonyelani? Vha hashu vho yaho u tandula shango vho ri kula miraḓo vha tshi ri: Vhathu vha henefho vho anda, vha a ri fhira; mitsheṱo ya miḓi yavho i ṋanga makole; ro ita na u vhona miswonḓa, vhana vha Enaki.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Nṋe nda ni fhindula nda ri, ‘Ni songo vha ofha, ni songo vha tetemela," 
Deuteronomy1:30 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u khou ni ranga phanḓa, Ene u ḓo ni lwela; no vhona zwoṱhe zwe a ni itela Egipita;" 
Deuteronomy1:31 hufha na phangani no vhona uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni tsireledza hani, ó ni takula unga munna a tshi takula ṅwana wawe, a ni endedza nḓilani yoṱhe na vhuya na swika fhano.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 “Naho zwo ralo a no ngo fulufhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu – 
Deuteronomy1:33 onoyo Mudzimu we a ḓi ni ranga phanḓa nḓilani uri a ni ṱoḓele hune na nga ṱoka mishasha yaṋu, vhusiku a ni vhonetshela nḓila nga mulilo, masiari a ni tshimbidza nga gole." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Muṋe washu a pfa zwe na amba, a sinyuwa a ana a ri," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Ndi lushaka luvhi holu; na muthihi wavho a nga si vhuye a vhona shango ḽavhuḓi ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho nda tou khwaṱhisa nga muano. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Ane a ḓo ḽi vhona ndi Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune fhedzi; shango ḽe a kanda khaḽo ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea ene na vhana vhawe, ngauri o ntevhela mbilu i nthihi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 “Na nṋe Muṋe washu o ntsinyutshela nga mulandu waṋu, a ri, ‘Na iwe Mushe u nga si dzhene shangoni iḽo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ane a ḓo dzhena khaḽo ndi Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a re tshanḓa tshau; mu khwaṱhise, ndi ene ane a ḓo ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa vha ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Ane a ḓo dzhena khaḽo ndi Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a re tshanḓa tshau; mu khwaṱhise, ndi ene ane a ḓo ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa vha ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Vhushie haṋu he na ri vhu ḓo thubwa nga maswina, na zwana zwaṋu zwe zwa vha zwi sa athu ṱalukanya zwi re zwone na zwi si zwone, ndi vhone vhane vha ḓo dzhena khaḽo; ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhone ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Hone inwi humani, humelani phangani no livha thungo dza Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Ndi hone inwi ni tshi mphindula na ri, ‘Ro khakhela Muṋe washu! Kha vha litshe ri gonye ri yo lwa na vhaḽa vhathu ri khunyeledze zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ri vhudza!’ Muṅwe na muṅwe a mbo kungela zwihali zwawe, na vho vhona zwa u gonya thavhani dza Vhaamori zwi sa vhuyi zwa dina." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Hone Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Vha vhudze uri vha songo gonya, vha songo yo lwa na vhaḽa vhathu, Nṋe a thi nga tshimbili navho, maswina a ḓo vha kunda.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nṋe nda swikisa mafhungo kha inwi, hone na si thetshelese, na landula zwe Muṋe washu a amba, na ita tshipimbi na gonya dzithavha." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Vhaamori vha dzulaho thavhani dzenedzo vha mbo bva pfumo vha yo ni ṱanganedza nga vhuhali vhu no nga ha guma ḽa ṋotshi, vha ni kunda vha ni pandamedza u bva Seiri u swika Horoma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ndi hone ni tshi vho ḓisola na ḓa na lila phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, hone Muṋe washu a si ni thetshelese, a si pfe zwililo zwaṋu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ndi zwone zwe zwa ita uri ni dzule Kadeshe tshifhinga tshingafhongafho. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Ngavhuya ra takuwa ro livha phangani ri tshi tshimbila nga nḓila ya Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga, nga he Muṋe washu a mmbudza, ra fhedza maḓuvha ri tshi khou mona na Thavha dza Seiri," 
Deuteronomy2:2 Muṋe washu a vhuya a mmbudza a ri," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘No no fhedza maḓuvha ni tshi khou mona na thavha iyi, zwino ṱutshelani-ha thungo ya devhula." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Zwino vhudza vhathu u ri: Hu si kale ni ḓo pfuka mikano ya vhakomana vhaṋu vhana vha Esau vha no dzula Seiri; vha a ni ofha, hone inwi ni sedzese." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Ni songo lwa navho; a thi ni ṋei tshipiḓa na tshiṱukuṱuku tsha shango ḽavho, ndi amba na hune muthu a nga kanda a thi ni ṋei; shango ḽa Thavha dza Seiri ndo ḽi ṋea Esau uri ḽi vhe ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Zwiḽiwa zwine na ḓo ḽa na maḓi ane na ḓo nwa, ni renge khavho nga tshelede." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Hufha Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu ndo ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine na ita; ndo ni tsireledza lwendoni lwoṱhe ni tshi tshimbila phangani iyi khulu miṅwaha ya 40 yoṱhe; Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu ndo vha ndi tshi ḓi vha na inwi ni sa shayi tshithu.’ 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Zwenezwo ra fhira, ri si tsha fara nḓila i no bva Elathi na Etsioni Gebere ya fhira nga govha ḽa Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo, shango ḽa vhakomana vhashu vhana vha Esau vha no dzula Seiri ra ḽi sia nga thungo, ra fara nḓila ya phanga ya Muaba." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Ni songo lwa na Vhamuaba, ni songo vha dia, a tho ngo ni ṋea tshipiḓa na tshithihi tsha shango ḽavho uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, shango ḽa Ara ndo ṋea vhana vha Loto uri ḽi vhe ḽavho.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Hafhu kale ho vha hu tshi dzula Vhaemi shangoni heḽo, lushaka luhulu lwa maanḓa. Vho vha vhe miswonḓa unga Vhaenaki," 
Deuteronomy2:11 vha tshi pfi Vharefai unga Vhaenaki, hone Vhamuaba vho vha vha tshi ri ndi Vhaemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Seiri kale ho vha hu tshi dzula Vhahori, hone vhana vha Esau vha vha lozwa vha vha dzhiela shango vha dzula khaḽo, sa zwe Vhaisraele vha thatha maswina avho shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a vha ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽavho.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ri, ‘Takuwani ni wele mulambo wa Zerede,’ ra mbo u wela." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Tshee ra takuwa Kadeshe Barania ra vhuya ra wela mulambo wa Zerede ho vha ho no fhela miṅwaha ya 38, ha vhuya ha fa vhanna vhoṱhe vha bvaho pfumo vha murafho wonoyo unga Muṋe washu o vha o vha vhudza a khwaṱhisa nga muano." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Muṋe washu o vha rwa vha lovha vha vhuya vha fhela vhoṱhe mishashani. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Musi vhanna vhoṱhe vha bvaho pfumo vho no fa vha fhela," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Muṋe washu a amba na nṋe a ri," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Ṋamusi ni khou pfuka mikano ya shango ḽa Ara, ḽa Vhamuaba," 
Deuteronomy2:19 ni ḓo sendela tsini na Vhaamoni. Ni songo vha dia kana na lwa navho; a tho ngo ni ṋea tshipiḓa tsha shango ḽa Vhaamoni, ndo ḽi ṋea vhone vhana vha Loto uri ḽi vhe ḽavho.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Shango iḽo kale ḽo vha ḽi tshi pfi ndi ḽa Vharefai, nge ha vha hu tshi dzula Vharefai, hone Vhaamoni vho vha vha tshi ri ndi Vhazamazumu." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Na vhone vho vha vhe lushaka luhulu lwa maanḓa, vhe miswonḓa u fana na Vhaenaki, hone Vhaamoni vha tshi swika Muṋe washu a lozwa Vharefai, Vhaamoni vha dzhia shango ḽavho vha dzula khaḽo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Zwi ḓi nga zwe Muṋe washu a itela vhana vha Esau vha no dzula Seiri musi a tshi lozwa Vhahori u swikani havho, vhone vha dzhia shango ḽa Vhahori ḽa vha ḽavho, vha dzula hone, na ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Vhaavi vhone vho vha vha tshi dzula miḓini yavho u swika Gaza, ha ḓa Vhakhafithori vhe vha bva Khafithori, vha vha thatha vha yo dzula shangoni ḽavho.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Muṋe washu a dovha a ri, ‘Takuwani zwino ni wele mulambo wa Arinoni, ngauri ndi ni kumedza Sihoni Muamori, khosi ya Hesheboni. Mu thomeni ni mu die." 
Deuteronomy2:25 U bva ṋamusi ndi ḓo ita uri tshakha dzoṱhe dzi re fhasi ha lutombo dzi ni ofhe dzi ni teledze; dzi tshi pfa zwine na ita dzi ḓo ofha dza tou tetemela.’ 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ri tshi swika phangani ya Kedemotho nda ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Sihoni khosi ya Heshebono, nda mu vhudza mafhungo a mulalo nda ri," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Kha vha ri tendele ri fhire nga shangoni ḽavho; ri ḓo tshimbila nga nḓila fhedzi, a ri nga pambutsheli kha tshauḽa kana tshamonde," 
Deuteronomy2:28 zwiḽiwa zwine ra ḽa ri ḓo renga nga tshelede, na maḓi ane ra nwa ri ḓo renga nga tshelede, tenda vha ri litsha ra fhira," 
Deuteronomy2:29 sa zwiḽa vhana vha Esau vha no dzula Seiri na Vhamuaba vha no dzula Ara vho tenda ra fhira; ri khou tou funa u wela Jorodani ra wetshela shangoni ḽe Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ri ṋea.’ 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Hone Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni ho ngo tenda ri tshi fhira nga shangoni ḽawe; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ita uri a ite tshipimbi a konḓe uri Muṋe washu a kone u mu kumedza inwi, uri ni dzhie shango ḽawe. Vhukuma na ḽi dzhia." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Nṋe Sihoni na shango ḽawe ndo no ḓi thoma u ni ṋea, zwino inwi iyani ni mu die ni ḓidzhiele shango ḽawe!’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 “Ndi hone Sihoni na mmbi yawe yoṱhe vha tshi bva pfumo vha ḓa u lwa na riṋe Jahatsi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Mudzimu Muṋe washu a mbo mu kumedza riṋe, ra mu kunda khathihi na vhana vhawe na mmbi yawe yoṱhe," 
Deuteronomy2:34 ra dzhia miḓi yawe yoṱhe nga tshifhinga tshenetsho, miḓi yoṱhe ra i kumedza Muṋe washu nga u i thutha, ra si litshe na munna na muthihi kana musadzi kana ṅwana á songo vhulawa." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Tshe ra si lozwe ndi zwifuwo fhedzi; zwone ro zwi thuba khathihi na thundu dze ra wana miḓini ye ra i kunda. 
Deuteronomy2:36 A hu na muḓi na muthihi we ra kundwa u u dzhia, u bva Aruere u re khunzikhunzini dza Arinoni na muḓi u re ngomu govhani ḽa Arinoni, u swika Giliadi, a hu na muḓi we ra kundwa u u dzhia, Mudzimu Muṋe washu o ri ṋea yoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy2:37 He ra si sendele ndi shangoni ḽa Vhaamoni fhedzi, u tsa na mulambo wa Jaboko na miḓi i re dzithavhani, ngauri Mudzimu Muṋe washu o vha o ri dzivhisa." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Ra takuwa ra gonyela thungo dza Bashani. Ogo khosi ya Bashani a mbo bva pfumo na mmbi yawe yoṱhe a ḓa u lwa na riṋe Edrei. 
Deuteronomy3:2 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Ni songo mu ofha, ndo dzula ndo mu kumedza inwi khathihi na mmbi yawe yoṱhe na shango ḽawe. Mu iteni zwenezwo zwe na ita Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori we a vha a tshi dzula Hesheboni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Nangoho Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ri kumedza Ogo khosi ya Bashani na mmbi yawe yoṱhe, ra vha vhulaha vhoṱhe hu si sale na muthihi." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Misi iyo ra dzhia na miḓi yawe yoṱhe, ha si vhe na muḓi we ra sia; miḓi ye ra dzhia muvhusoni wa Ogo shangoni ḽa Aragobo kha ḽa Bashani i swika 60." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Miḓi iyo yoṱhe yo vha yo tangwa nga mitsheṱo milapfu, i na tswinga dzo khwaṱhaho, ri sa vhali ḓorobo nnzhi-nnzhi dzi si na mitsheṱo dze ra phusukanya." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Vhathu vha Bashani na vhone ro vha kumedza Mudzimu nga u vha vhulaha, vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana, sa zwe ra ita Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Zwe ra si zwi vhulahe ndi zwifuwo fhedzi, ro tou zwi thuba khathihi na thundu dze ra wana miḓini." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ndi hone he ra dzhia mashango a mahosi mavhili a Vhaamori e a vha a tshi dzula seli ha Jorodani, u bva mulambo wa Arinoni u swika thavhani ya Heremoni" 
Deuteronomy3:9 ine Vhasidoni vha ri ndi Sirioni, Vhaamori vha ri ndi Seniri," 
Deuteronomy3:10 ha vha u dzhia miḓi yoṱhe i re midavhini na ḽoṱhe ḽa Giliadi na Bashani u swika Salekha na Edrei, miḓi yoṱhe ya muvhuso wa Ogo i re Bashani.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Misi iyo ho vha ho tou sala Ogo khosi ya Bashani wa Vharefai fhedzi. Mmbete wawe wa tsimbi wo vha u tshi ita mitha nṋa vhulapfu, vhuphara ha ṱoḓou swika mitha mbili. U kha ḓi vha hone na ṋamusi muḓini wa Raba musanda wa Vhaamoni.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Musi ro dzhia mashango a Sihoni na Ogo, ndo ṋea matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi shango ḽoṱhe u bva Aruere bamani ḽa mulambo wa Arinoni na hafu ya tshipembe ya Giliadi dzithavhani khathihi na miḓi yaḽo;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 iṅwe hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase nda vha ṋea tshipiḓa tsho salaho tsha Giliadi na ḽoṱhe ḽa Bashani, he ha vha hu tshi vhusa Ogo.” (Ndi dzingu ḽoṱhe ḽa Arigobo ḽi re kha ḽa Bashani ḽe kale ḽa vha ḽi tshi pfi ḽa Vharefai." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jairi ṅwana wa Manase o dzhia shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Arigobo u swika Geshuru na Maakhathi, Bashani ḽa mbo rinwa dzina ḽa Jairi. Ndi zwine ḽa kha ḓi pfi Miḓi ya mishasha ya Jairi, na ṋamusi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Shango ḽa Giliadi ndo ḽi ṋea Makhiri," 
Deuteronomy3:16 shango ḽi re tshipembe tshaho nda ḽi ṋea matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi. Masakha a no vha khethekanya na Vhaamoni thungo ya devhula ndi mulambo wa Jaboko, thungo ya tshipembe ndi mulambo wa Arinoni, nga vhukati hawo," 
Deuteronomy3:17 thungo ya vhukovhela ndi govha ḽa Jorodani u bva dzivhani ḽa Khinirethe u swika vhubvaḓuvha ha Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo, mabamani a Phisiga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Misi iyo nda vhudza vhanna vha ayo matsinde nda ri, ‘Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni ṋea shango heḽi uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu; zwenezwo vhahali vhoṱhe vha no kona u bva pfumo nga vha wele mulambo wa Jorodani vha tshi ranga Vhaisraele vha maṅwe matsinde phanḓa." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Vhane vha ḓo sala miḓini ye nda ni ṋea ndi vhasadzi vhaṋu na vhana na zwifuwo fhedzi, ngauri ndi ḓivha uri ni na zwifuwo zwinzhi." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Inwi ni fanela u ṱuwa na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele Muṋe washu a vhuya a vha ladzela-vho shango unga inwi o ni ladzela ḽaṋu, na vhone vha wana shango ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ḓo vha ṋea seli ha Jorodani, ndi hone na inwi ni tshi ḓo vhuelela shangoni ḽe nda ni kovhela uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Joshua ene nda mu vhudza nda ri, ‘No vhona nga aṋu maṱo zwe Muṋe washu a ita mahosi aya mavhili, Sihoni na Ogo; ndi zwone zwine Muṋe washu a ḓo ita mivhuso yoṱhe ine na ḓo ṱangana nayo seli ha Jorodani." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Joshua ene nda mu vhudza nda ri, ‘No vhona nga aṋu maṱo zwe Muṋe washu a ita mahosi aya mavhili, Sihoni na Ogo; ndi zwone zwine Muṋe washu a ḓo ita mivhuso yoṱhe ine na ḓo ṱangana nayo seli ha Jorodani." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Ni songo vha ofha, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene ane a ḓo ni lwela.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Misi iyo ndo luvhelela Muṋe washu nda ri," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, wo sumbedza nṋe muḓinḓa wau vhuhulu hau na maanḓa au mahulu; ndi ufhio mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi ane a nga kona u ita mishumo mihulu i no nga yau?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 A thi weli zwanga Jorodani nda vhona-vho shango ḽavhuḓi ḽi re seli na ḽiḽa, thavha hedzi dzavhuḓi nandi, na dza Libanoni?’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Hone Muṋe washu a ntsinyutshela nga mulandu waṋu, a si tende zwe nda humbela. Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Fhumula, a thi tsha funa u pfa u tshi amba na Nṋe nga mafhungo haya." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Itou gonya nṱha ha thavha ya Phisiga u lavhelese vhukovhela na devhula na tshipembe na vhubvaḓuvha, u vhone shango nga maṱo fhedzi, ngauri u wela Jorodani u nga si wele." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Tshau ndi u laya Joshua wa mu khwaṱhisa wa mu ṱuṱuwedza, ngauri ndi ene ane a ḓo wedza vhathu, ndi ene ane a ḓo ita uri shango ḽine wa khou ḽi vhona vha ḽi wane.’" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Tshau ndi u laya Joshua wa mu khwaṱhisa wa mu ṱuṱuwedza, ngauri ndi ene ane a ḓo wedza vhathu, ndi ene ane a ḓo ita uri shango ḽine wa khou ḽi vhona vha ḽi wane.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Ndi hone-ha ri tshi vho dzula govhani ḽino u livhana na Bethe Phioro. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Zwino-ha Vhaisraele, ipfani milayo na ndaela dzine nda ni laya, ni dzi tevhedze, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila, na dzhena shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu a ḓo ni ṋea ḽa vha ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ni thanye, ni khunyeledze ndaela dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu dzine nda khou ni laya. Kha fhungo ḽine nda ni vhudza ni songo engedza tshithu, ni songo fhungudza tshithu." 
Deuteronomy4:3 No vhona nga aṋu maṱo zwe Muṋe washu a ita thembeleni ya Baali wa Phioro: vhoṱhe vhe vha tevhedza maitele a Baali wa Phioro, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o vha lozwa," 
Deuteronomy4:4 hone inwi vhe na dzula no fulufhedzea kha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na ṋamusi ni kha ḓi tshila noṱhe." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Vhonani, ndi khou ni laya yeneyo milayo na dzenedzo ndaela dze Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga a mmbudza, ndi zwone, ni zwi tevhedze musi ni tshi dzula shangoni ḽine na khou dzhena khaḽo zwino uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Tevhedzani milayo heyo ni i khunyeledze, ndi hone tshakha dzi tshi ḓo vhona uri ni na vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo; vha ḓo ri u pfa ndaela idzi dzaṋu vha ri, ‘Vhonani uri vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo ya lushaka ulu luhulu ndi zwingafhani!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ndi lufhio lushaka lune naho lwo hula hani, lwa vha na mudzimu walwo a re tsini halwo unga Yahavee Mudzimu washu e tsini na riṋe, ane musi ri tshi mu ṱavhela mukosi a si kundwe u ri phalala?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ndi lufhio lushaka, naho lwo hula hani, lu re na milayo mivhuya na ndaela mbuya dzi no fana na ndayo iyi ine nda khou ni laya ngayo ṋamusi?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Tshaṋu ni vhe na vhusedzi vhuhulu, ni ḓilondote uri ni si vhuye na hangwa zwithu hezwi zwe na vhona nga maṱo aṋu; nga zwi dzule mbiluni dzaṋu vhutshilo haṋu hoṱhe, ni zwi hanelele na vhana vhaṋu na vhaḓuhulu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Elelwani ḓuvha ḽe na ima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu thavhani ya Horebe, a mmbudza a ri, ‘Kuvhanganya tshivhidzo tshoṱhe ndi vha funze mafhungo ane vha fanela u a ḓivha, vha kone u nkhulisa maḓuvha oṱhe ane vha ḓo tshila fhano fhasi, vhone vha dovhe vha a funze vhana vhavho.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Inwi na sendela na ima tsini ha thavha, yone i tshi khou duga mulilo wa ita na u swika ngei makoleni, ha vha na gole na swiswi na buluvhutsi ḽihulu," 
Deuteronomy4:12 Muṋe washu a amba na inwi e ngomu muliloni ni sa vhuyi na vhona tshivhumbeo tshawe, ni tshi tou pfa ipfi ḽi tshi khou amba," 
Deuteronomy4:13 a ni vhudza a mulanga we a vhofha na inwi, na ndaela dzawo, yone Milayo ya fumi, a tou i ṅwala kha maḓaba mavhili a matombo." 
Deuteronomy4:14 A vha nṋe, Muṋe washu o nndaedza musi wonoyo uri milayo iyi na ndaela idzi ni dzi tevhedze musi no wetshela seli shangoni ḽine na ḓo ḽi wana ḽa vha ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Ni songo khakha! Elelwani uri musi Muṋe washu a tshi amba na inwi e ngomu muliloni ngei Horebe a no ngo vhuya na vhona tshivhumbeo tshawe. 
Deuteronomy4:16 Zwenezwo ni songo tshinya nga u ḓiitela mudzimu wa tshifanyiso, wa tshinna kana wa tshisadzi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 kana wa phukha ifhio na ifhio, kana tshiṋoni tshi fhufhaho," 
Deuteronomy4:18 kana tshithu tshi kokovhaho fhasi, kana khovhe i wanalaho maḓini." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Nahone ni songo ri ni tshi lavhelesa ṱaḓulu na vhona ḓuvha na ṅwedzi na dziṋaledzi na masambi oṱhe a re lutomboni, na fhurea na zwi gwadamela na zwi luvha, hezwo zwithu ndi zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a zwi kovhekanya tshakha dzoṱhe dzi re fhasi ha lutombo uri zwi vhe midzimu yavho." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Hone inwi Muṋe washu o ni dzhia a ni bvisa shondoni ḽa mulilo, Egipita, uri ni vhe lushaka lwawe vhukuma, sa zwine na vha zwone ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 “A vha nṋe Muṋe washu o ntsinyutshela nga mulandu wa zwiito zwaṋu, a ana a ri a thi nga weli Jorodani, a thi nga dzheni shango ḽavhuḓi ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ḓo ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Nṋe a thi nga weli Jorodani, ndi ḓo fela shangoni ḽino, vha no ḓo wela ndi inwi, ni yo wana shango iḽo ḽavhuḓi ḽa vha ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Ni vhone ni sa ḓo hangwa mulanga we Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a vhofha na inwi na vho ḓiitela mudzimu wa tshifanyiso tsha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni dzivhisa. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi mulilo u fhisaho zwoṱhe, ndi Mudzimu a sa vhangiswi." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Musi ho no fhela mirafho na mirafho ni shangoni ḽaṋu, ni songo tshinya nga u ita mudzimu naho u ufhio wa tshifanyiso; zwenezwo Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo vhona zwo vhifha, zwi a mu sinyusa." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ndi ri ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi ndi ṱhanzi ṋamusi, a ni nga dzulesi shangoni ḽine na khou wetshela khaḽo seli ha Jorodani, ni ḓo ṱavhanya u lovha ni khaḽo, vhukuma ni ḓo tou lovha tshoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Muṋe washu uḓo ni balanganya na dzitshakha, ha sala vha si gathi vhukati ha tshakha dzine Muṋe washu a ḓo ni khadela khadzo," 
Deuteronomy4:28 henefho na konou luvha midzimu yo itwaho nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu, midzimu ya thanda na tombo, midzimu i sa vhoni, i sa pfi, i sa ḽi, i sa nukhedzi." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Hone arali ni tshi vho ṱoḓa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga mbilu nthihi ni henefho, na mu ṱoḓa nga mbilu yoṱhe, ni ḓo mu wana." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Misi i ḓaho ni tshi vho tambula, nó welwa nga khombo hedzo dzoṱhe dze nda ni vhudza, ndi hone ni tshi vho ḓo rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na thetshelesa zwine a amba." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Nahone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Mudzimu wa tshilidzi, ha nga ni ṱutsheli, ha nga ni lozwi tshoṱhe, ha nga hangwi zwe a anela vhomakhulukuku waṋu musi a tshi vhofha mulanga navho." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Edzonu vhudzisa zwa misi ya kale ya musi ni sa athu vha hone, u bva tshee Mudzimu a sika muthu fhano shangoni, ni vhudzise shango ḽoṱhe nga he ḽa ya, ni pfe arali ho vhuya ha vha na ḓembe ḽingafhangafha, kana ḽo vhuya ḽa pfala zwaḽo –" 
Deuteronomy4:33 ndi amba zwa lushaka lu tshi pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu a tshi khou amba e ngomu muliloni, vha ri vho mu pfa vha si fe, unga inwi no mu pfa a tshi amba Ene muṋe na tshila." 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ni sedze arali muṅwe mudzimu o vhuya a luma mbilu a ḓa a ḓidzhiela lushaka a lu pfulusa vhukati ha luṅwe unga Muṋe washu o ni bvisa Egipita. Kani ho ngo tou rwa Vhaegipita nga mabulayo, a vha sumbedza maḓembe na zwimangadzo, a ni lwela Ene muṋe nga mishumo mihulu ya maanḓa, mishumo i ofhisaho?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 No sumbedzwa zwenezwo zwoṱhe uri ni kone u ḓivha uri Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu e eṱhe, a hu tshee na muṅwe." 
Deuteronomy4:36 O ita uri ni pfe ipfi ḽawe a tshi khou amba e ṱaḓulu a tshi ni laya, a ni sumbedza mulilo muhulu we a tsela fhasi e khawo, na pfa maipfi awe a tshi khou amba e muliloni." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Muṋe washu o tou funa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, a ḓinangela na inwi vhaḓuhulu vhavho, ndi zwe a ni pfulusa Egipita Ene muṋe nga maanḓa awe mahulu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 a thatha dziṅwe tshakha dzine dza ni fhira nga u anda na nga maanḓa, a ni isa mashangoni avho a ni ṋea one, unga ni tshi khou zwi vhona ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Ḓivhani-ha ṋamusi, zwi songo vhuya zwa ṱuwa mbiluni dzaṋu: Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi, a hu tshee na muṅwe." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Tevhedzani-ha milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe dzine nda khou ni laya ṋamusi, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela, inwi na vhana vhaṋu vhane vha kha ḓi ḓo bebiwa, na dzula tshoṱhe shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu a khou ni ṋea, na si tsha ṱavhanya u dzhielwa ḽone.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Zwo no ralo Mushe a nanga miḓi miraru seli ha Jorodani thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha. 
Deuteronomy4:42 Arali muthu a tshenuwa o vhulaha muṅwe, hone hu si nga khole, á songo thoma u vha o mu fara nga mbilu, onoyo a nga shavhela kha muṅwe wa yeneyo miḓi miraru uri a si vhulawe." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Shangoni ḽa Rubeni Mushe o nanga Betsere midavhini i re thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha u bva Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo, shangoni ḽa Gadi a nanga Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi, kha ḽa Manase a nanga Golani shangoni ḽa Bashani." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Afha hu vho tevhela ndayo ye Mushe a laya Vhaisraele ngayo; 
Deuteronomy4:45 ndi vhuṱanzi na milayo na ndaela dze Mushe a funza Vhaisraele musi vho no pfuluwa Egipita. 
Deuteronomy4:46 O vha laya musi vho ima govhani seli ha Jorodani u livhana na Bethe Phioro, shangoni ḽa Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori we a vha a tshi dzula Hesheboni; ndi uḽa Sihoni we Mushe na Vhaisraele vha mu dia musi vha tshi pfuluwa Egipita," 
Deuteronomy4:47 vha konou mu dzhiela shango ḽawe, vha dzhia na ḽa Ogo khosi ya Bashani. Ndi one mahosi mavhili a Vhaamori e a vha a tshi dzula seli ha Jorodani thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 shango ḽavho ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela mivhundu yoṱhe u bva Aruere khunzikhunzini dza mulambo wa Arinoni u swika thavhani ya Heremoni ine ḽiṅwe ya pfi Sirioni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 na govha ḽoṱhe ḽa Jorodani thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha u swika Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo mabamani a thavha ya Phisiga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mushe a vhidza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a vha vhudza a ri, “Hee inwi Vhaisraele, thetshelesani milayo na ndaela dzine nda khou ni laya ṋamusi ni tshi zwi pfa nga nḓevhe, ni zwi gude, ni zwi tevhedze, ni zwi khunyeledze." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Mudzimu Muṋe washu o vhofha mulanga na riṋe thavhani ya Horebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Mulanga uyo Muṋe washu ho ngo u vhofha na vhomakhulukuku washu, o u vhofha na riṋe roṱhe, riṋe vhane ra kha ḓi tshila ra vha hone fhano ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi amba na inwi ngei thavhani e muliloni, o amba na inwi no tou livhana zwifhaṱuwo." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Musi uyo nṋe ndo vha ndo ima vhukati ha Muṋe washu na inwi ndi tshi swikisa mafhungo a Muṋe washu kha inwi, ngauri no vha ni tshi ofha ni tshi vhona mulilo, na si tsha gonya thavha. “Muṋe washu o ri," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau we nda u pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita he wa vha u phuli. 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘U songo vha na miṅwe midzimu, Mudzimu wau ndi Nṋe ndi ndoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘U songo ḓiitela tshifanyiso na tshithihi tsha zwi re ngei ṱaḓulu kana fhano fhasi kana maḓini a re nga fhasi ha ḽifhasi," 
Deuteronomy5:9 wa tshi gwadamela wa tshi rerelela; Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau ndi Mudzimu a sa vhangiswi, mulandu wa vhokhotsi ndi u vhila kha vhana na kha vhaḓuhulu u swika kha murafho wa vhuraru na wa vhuṋa wa maswina anga," 
Deuteronomy5:10 hone vhane vha mpfuna vha tevhedza ndaela dzanga ndi vha ita nga vhuthu u swika kha mirafho ya tshigidi. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘U songo tamba nga dzina ḽa Yahavee Mudzimu wau, ngauri Yahavee a nga si litshe u lifhedza ane a tamba nga dzina ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Hulisa ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha u ḽi ite ḽikhethwa unga Yahavee Mudzimu wau o u laya. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Shuma zwau maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi u khunyeledze mishumo yau yoṱhe," 
Deuteronomy5:14 hone ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ndi ḽa Yahavee Mudzimu wau, ndi ḽa u awela; nga heḽo ḓuvha u songo shuma tshithu – iwe kana ṅwana wau, wa mutuka kana wa musidzana, kana mushumi wau, wa munna kana wa musadzi, kana phulu yau kana donngi yau kana tshifuwo tshifhio na tshifhio, kana mutsinda ane wa dzula nae. Na vhashumi vhau, vha vhanna kana vha vhasadzi, nga vha awele-vho unga iwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 U elelwe uri na iwe wo vha u phuli shangoni ḽa Egipita, Yahavee Mudzimu wau a u vhofholola nga mishumo mihulu ya maanḓa, ndi zwine Yahavee Mudzimu wau a u laya uri u vhulunge ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Hulisa khotsi au na mme au unga Yahavee Mudzimu wau o u laya, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo u nakela, wa fhedza miṅwaha minzhi u tshi dzula shangoni ḽine Yahavee Mudzimu wau a u ṋea." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘U songo vhulaha muthu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘U songo ita vhupombwe. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘U songo tswa. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘U songo vhaisa muṅwe nga u ṱanzilela mazwifhi. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘U songo emula musadzi wa muṅwe; u songo tshivha muṅwe nga nnḓu yawe, kana tsimu yawe, kana phuli yawe, ya munna kana ya musadzi, kana phulu yawe kana donngi yawe kana tshifhio na tshifhio tshi re tshawe.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Ndi one maipfi e Muṋe washu a amba na tshivhidzo tshaṋu tshoṱhe tsho kuvhangana, a amba e thavhani ngomu muliloni, hú na gole na buluvhutsi ḽihulu ḽo tibaho thavha, a amba nga ipfi ḽihulu, a konou ṅwala maipfi haya kha maḓaba mavhili a matombo, a mpha, a si tsha engedza maṅwe." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Inwi no ri u pfa ipfi ḽi tshi bva swiswini, thavha i tshi khou duga mulilo, vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha matsinde aṋu vha ḓa ha nṋe" 
Deuteronomy5:24 na ri, ‘Mudzimu Muṋe washu o ri sumbedza vhugala hawe na vhuhulu hawe, ra pfa na ipfi ḽawe ḽi tshi amba e muliloni! Ṋamusi ra zwi vhona uri muthu u a ḓi tshila naho Mudzimu o amba nae, ra akhamala." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Hone zwino ri khou ofha u lovha. Mulilo hoyu muhuluhulu u ḓo ri fhisa ra fa arali ra dovha ra pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu Muṋe washu. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ndi ufhio muthu wa ṋama ane a nga pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu a tshilaho a tshi amba e muliloni unga riṋe ri tshi khou mu pfa, a si lovhe?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Ndi khwiṋe hu tshi sendela iwe ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu wa pfa zwoṱhe zwine a amba, wa konou ri vhudza zwoṱhe zwine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a zwi amba. Riṋe ri ḓo zwi thetshelesa ra zwi ita!’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Muṋe washu a pfesesa zwe na amba, Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Ndo pfa zwe vhathu havha vha u vhudza vha tshi amba na iwe; zwoṱhe zwe vha amba ndi zwone." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ngavhe vha tshi dzula vhe na muya wonoyo wa u nnyofha na u tevhedza ndaela dzanga misi yoṱhe, zwa ralo ndi hone vhone na vhana vhavho zwi tshi ḓo vha nakela lini na lini." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Iya u vha vhudze uri vha humele zwavho denndeni dzavho," 
Deuteronomy5:31 huno iwe u ime fhano na Nṋe, ndi u laye ndi u vhudze ndayo dzanga dzoṱhe na milayo na ndaela zwine wa ḓo vha funza uri vha zwi tevhedze vhe shangoni ḽine nda ḓo vha ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽavho.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Ndi zwone, ivhani na vhusedzi uri ni ite zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni laya, ni songo pambutshela kha tshamonde kana tshauḽa." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Ni fare nḓila ye Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni sumbedza, ni songo bva khayo, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila, zwa ni nakela, na fhedza miṅwaha minzhi ni tshi dzula shangoni ḽine na ḓo ṋewa." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Ngei milayo na ndayo, na ndaela dze Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a nndaya uri ndi ni funze, ni zwi tevhedze musi ni tshi wetshela shangoni ḽine na khou ṋewa ḽone:" 
Deuteronomy6:2 Hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau u tevhedze milayo yawe yoṱhe na ndaela dzoṱhe dzine nda u laya – iwe na vhana vhau na vhaḓuhulu, maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hau, ndi hone u tshi ḓo lalama." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Thetshelesa Israele, u vhe na vhusedzi uri u zwi vhulunge, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo u nakela, na anda zwihulu shangoni iḽo ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi, unga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu o amba." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Israele, thetshelesa! Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu washu! Ndi Ene Muṋe washu e eṱhe!" 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ndi zwone, funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau nga mbilu yoṱhe, nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha zwone, nga nungo dzoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Nahone hezwi zwine nda ḓo u laya ṋamusi zwi songo vhuya zwa ṱuwa mbiluni yau. 
Deuteronomy6:7 U zwi ombedzele mbiluni dza vhana vhau, u ambe ngazwo musi wo dzula nḓuni, na musi u lwendoni, na musi u tshi yo lala na musi u tshi vuwa," 
Deuteronomy6:8 u zwi vhofhele tshanḓani na kha phanḓa uri tshi vhe tshiga," 
Deuteronomy6:9 u zwi ṅwale kha mihangammbwa ya nnḓu yau na kha mafhoro a muḓi. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Muṋe washu u ḓo u isa shangoni ḽe a anela vhomakhulukuku wau Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo, a vha fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo u ṋea ḽone, shango ḽi re na miḓi mihulu yavhuḓi ye iwe u si i fhaṱe," 
Deuteronomy6:11 na nnḓu dzo ḓalaho zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwi songo kuvhanganywaho nga iwe, na bidzi dzi songo bwiwaho nga iwe, na masimu a minḓirivhe na miolivi i songo ṱavhiwaho nga iwe; iwe u ḓo tou wana i hone, wa ḽa wa fura." 
Deuteronomy6:12 Zwenezwo u vhone uri u si hangwe Muṋe washu o u pfulusaho Egipita he wa vha u phuli; 
Deuteronomy6:13 tshau hu vhe u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau, u shumele Ene, u tshi ana u ane nga dzina ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy6:14 U songo luvha miṅwe midzimu, midzimu ya tshakha dzo ṋekanaho masakha na inwi;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau ndi Mudzimu a sa vhangiswi. U vhukati haṋu; a nga u sinyutshela a u lozwa wa si tsha wanala fhano shangoni. 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Ni songo ṱunga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu sa zwiḽa ni tshi mu linga ngei Masa (Malingoni). 
Deuteronomy6:17 Ni sedzese uri ni vhulunge milayo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na ndayo yawe na ndaela dzawe zwe a ni laya," 
Deuteronomy6:18 ni ite zwine a vhona zwi zwone, zwi zwivhuya, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela, na dzhena shangoni iḽo ḽavhuḓi ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu nga muano, na ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽaṋu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 a pandela maswina aṋu oṱhe vha ni shavha nga he a dzula o amba. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Arali nga tshifhinga tshi ḓaho ṅwana wau a u vhudzisa a ri, ‘Kha vha mpfunze-vho ndayo na milayo na ndaela zwe Mudzimu Muṋe washu a vha laya!’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 iwe u fhindule ṅwana wau u ri, ‘Ro vha ri phuli dza Farao shangoni ḽa Egipita, hone Muṋe washu a ḓa a ri pfulusa Egipita nga maanḓa awe mahulu." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Muṋe washu o ita zwiga na maḓembe mahulu a ofhisaho shangoni ḽa Egipita, a rwa Farao na vha hawe vhoṱhe ri tshi zwi vhona," 
Deuteronomy6:23 a ri pfulusa a ri endedza a ri swikisa shangoni ḽino ḽe a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku washu nga muano, a ri ṋea ḽone." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Huno Muṋe washu o ri laya uri ri tevhedze milayo hei yoṱhe, ri hulise Mudzimu Muṋe washu, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ḓi ri nakela, a ri ṋea vhutshilo unga ri tshi zwi vhona ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Arali ri tshi sedzesa ra tevhedza ndayo idzi dzoṱhe Muṋe washu a tshi ri vhona, nga he a ri laya, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo pfi ro ita zwone zwo fanelaho vhana vha mulanga.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ṱuwa a tshi ni swikisa shangoni ḽe na livha khaḽo uri a ni ṋee ḽone ḽi vhe ḽaṋu. U ḓo pandela tshakha nnzhi vha ni shavha – Vhahithi na Vhagirigashi na Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi – tshakha ṱhanu na mbili dzine dza ni fhira nga u anda na nga maanḓa.
