Deuteronomy7:2 Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo vha kumedza inwi, na vha kunda. Zwenezwo tshaṋu ndi u vha lozwa tshoṱhe, ni songo vhofha mulanga navho, ni songo vha khathutshela." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ni songo dzetshelana navho," 
Deuteronomy7:4 vha ḓo fhura vhana vhaṋu vha furalela Nṋe Yahavee vha luvha midzimu isili, Nṋe nda ni sinyutshela nda ni lozwa kathihi fhedzi." 
Deuteronomy7:5 “Tshine na fanela u vha ita ndi tshithihi fhedzi: Thuthani dziaḽiṱari dzavho, ni pwashe matombo makhethwa e vha imisa, ni reme thanda dzavho dza Ashera, zwifanyiso zwavho zwa midzimu ni zwi fhise nga mulilo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ni lushaka lukhethwa lwo ḓikumedzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; Muṋe washu o ḓinangela inwi kha tshakha dzoṱhe dzi dzulaho fhano fhasi, a ni nanga uri ni vhe lushaka lwawe vhukuma." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Muṋe washu a tshi ni funa a ni nanga a si nge inwi na vha lwone lushaka luhulu kha dzoṱhe, hufha ni vhaṱuku kha vhoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Muṋe washu o tou ni funa, a vhulunga muano we a anela vhomakhulukuku waṋu, ndi zwe Muṋe washu a ni pfulusa nga maanḓa awe mahulu, a ni vhofholola vhupulini na zwanḓani zwa Farao khosi ya Egipita," 
Deuteronomy7:9 uri ni kone u ḓivha uri Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene Mudzimudzimu, Mudzimu a fulufhedzeaho a vhulungaho mulanga wawe, vha mu funaho na vha tevhedzaho ndaela dzawe u vha itela vhuthu u swika kha mirafho ya tshigidi," 
Deuteronomy7:10 hone ane a mu vhenga a mu itela swili, Muṋe washu u a mu lifhedza, ha lengi u mu lozwa, vhukuma u a mu lifhedza." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ndi zwone, vhulungani ndayo na milayo na ndaela dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ni ite zwine dza amba." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Arali na thetshelesa milayo iyi, na i vhulunga, na i tevhedza, ndi hone na Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo vhulunga mulanga we a vhofha na inwi, a ḓi ni ita nga vhuthu unga o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu nga muano," 
Deuteronomy7:13 a ni funa a ni shudufhadza a ni andisa, a shudufhadza na vhana vhaṋu na masimu aṋu, na kaṋa goroi i si na vhukono na waini na mapfura a muolivi, kholomo dzaṋu na nngu na mbudzi dza ḓi anda dzi tshi ya ni tshi dzula shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a fhulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu a tou ana uri u ḓo vha ṋea ḽone." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Ni ḓo vha na mashudu a no fhira a tshakha dzoṱhe; a hu nga wanali na muthihi waṋu a si na ṅwana, kana tshifuwo tsha phanzhe." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni tsireledza kha maṱungu oṱhe, malwadze oṱhe a ofhisaho e na vha ni tshi a ḓivha Egipita a nga si tende na vhuthihi hao vhu tshi ni fara, a ḓo fhirela kha maswina aṋu." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Hone tshakha dzoṱhe dzine Muṋe washu a ḓo ni kumedza dzone ni pfi ni dzi lozwe; ni songo dzi khathutshela, ni songo luvha midzimu yadzo, i sa ḓo vha tshikwekwe tsha u ni fasha." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Ni songo tshenuwa na amba mbiluni na ri, ‘Tshakha idzi dzi a ri fhira, ri nga dzi thatha hani?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ni songo vha ofha, elelwani zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ita Farao na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Hufha no vhona nga aṋu maṱo uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o rwa Vhaegipita nga mabulayo mangafhani na zwiga zwingafhani na maḓembe mangafhani, na uri o ni pfulusa Egipita nga maanḓa mahulu a sa konadzei; ndi zwone zwine a ḓo ita na tshakha dzoṱhe dzine inwi na nga dzi ofha." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Vhane vha kha ḓi ḓo vha vho sala vhó ponyoka mabulayo ayo, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo vha shushedza vha shavha vha tshi tou nga vha khou pandamedzwa nga mabu, vha vhuya vha lovha tshoṱhe ni tshi swika." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ni songo vha ofha, hufha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu e na inwi, hufha e Mudzimu muhulu a ofhisaho." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Musi ni tshi swika, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo thatha tshakha idzo nga zwiṱuku nga zwiṱuku, ni nga si kone u vha fhedza kathihi fhedzi; mavhanda o vha a tshi nga anda a ni huvhadza." 
Deuteronomy7:23 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo vha kumedza inwi, a vha kanganyisa tshoṱhe vha vhuya vha fhela." 
Deuteronomy7:24 U ḓo ni kumedza na mahosi avho na vha vhulaha, madzina avho a sala a si tsha pfala fhano fhasi. A hu na muthu ane a ḓo imedzana na inwi, ni ḓo vha fhedza vhoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Zwifanyiso zwa midzimu yavho ni zwi fhise nga mulilo; ni songo tama siliva na musuku zwe zwa fhomiwa ngawo na u kwatula na ḓidzhiela zwone, zwi nga vha tshikwekwe tshine tsha ni fasha na gunea; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o dzula o zwi nengwa hezwo zwithu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Nahone ni songo ḓisa ayo maḓithu a nengisaho nḓuni dzaṋu, a ḓo ita uri na inwi ni pfi ni lozwiwe nga Mudzimu unga maswina aṋu; tshaṋu ndi u a nengwa ni sa vhuyi na funa na u a vhona; tshao ndi u fhiswa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Vhulungani milayo yoṱhe ine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ni i tevhedze, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila, na anda, na dzhena shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, na ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ni elelwe lwendo lwoṱhe lwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni tshimbidza phangani miṅwaha hei ya 40 yo fhelaho. O itela u ni ṱukufhadza na u ni linga uri zwi re mbiluni dzaṋu zwi ḓivhee, arali ni tshi ḓo vhulunga milayo yawe kana ni tshi ḓo i nyadza." 
Deuteronomy8:3 O ni ṱukufhadza a ni farisa nḓala a ni fusha nga mana, zwiḽiwa zwe na vha ni sa zwi ḓivhi, na vhomakhulukuku waṋu vho vha vha sa zwi ḓivhi. O itela u ni funza uri muthu ha tshili nga vhuswa fhedzi, u tshila nga zwenezwo zwine Muṋe washu a mu ṋea nga ipfi ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy8:4 “Miṅwaha hei yoṱhe ya 40 zwiambaro zwaṋu a zwo ngo ṱahala, milenzhe a yo ngo zwimba." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ḓivhani-ha fhungo iḽi: Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u laya inwi unga munna a tshi laya ṅwana wawe. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Zwenezwo vhulungani milayo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni si bve nḓilani dzawe, ni mu hulise." 
Deuteronomy8:7 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u khou ni isa shangoni ḽavhuḓi, shango ḽa milambo na zwisima zwine zwa tou ela zwi sa xi zwi no simuwa magovhani na dzithavhani," 
Deuteronomy8:8 shango ḽa goroi na baḽi, ḽa minḓirivhe na mihuyu na migranada, ḽa mapfura a muolivi, na ḽa ṋotshi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 A hu na ane a ḓo ḽa a si fure; a ni nga shayi tshithu; matomboni aḽo ni ḓo wana ngweḓi nnzhi, thavhani dzaḽo na bwa musina." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ni ḓo ḽa na fura, na renda Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga u vhona shango ḽavhuḓi ḽe a ni ṋea ḽone." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Hone ni zwi sedze uri ni si hangwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na si tsha tevhedza milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe na ndayo yoṱhe ine nda khou ni laya ṋamusi! 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ni songo ri no ḽa na fura na fhaṱa nnḓu dzavhuḓi na dzula khadzo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 kholomo dzaṋu na nngu dza anda, na vha na siliva na musuku munzhi, na thundu dzi sa konadzei," 
Deuteronomy8:14 na vho ḓihudza na hangwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na hangwa uri ndi Ene we a ni vhofholola vhupulini a ni pfulusa Egipita," 
Deuteronomy8:15 a ni endedza phangani khulu i ofhisaho ho andaho ṋowa dza vhuṱungu na phame, a ni ṋea maḓi a tshi bva kha tombo ḽo omaho ḽa tou te, shangoni ḽa gomelelo ḽi si na maḓi." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Hafhu ndi Ene we a ni fusha nga mana musi ni phangani, na ḽa zwiḽiwa zwe vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha vha vha sa zwi ḓivhi. O itela u ni ṱukufhadza na u ni linga uri zwi sale zwi tshi ni nakela." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Zwenezwo ni songo ri no tondwa zwingafhongafho na vho amba mbiluni na ri, ‘Lupfumo holu lwoṱhe ndo ḓiwanela nga maanḓa anga na nga u kona hanga.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Elelwani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; ndi Ene ane a ni ṋea maanḓa a u kona u wana lupfumo holwo, u vhulunga mulanga wawe we a u fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, unga ni tshi khou zwi vhona ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 “Hone arali na vhuya na hangwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na gidima murahu ha midzimu isili na i shumela na i luvha, vhukuma ndi khou ni eletshedza ṋamusi ndi ri, ni ḓo lovha!" 
Deuteronomy8:20 Arali na sa thetshelesa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na inwi ni ḓo lovha unga tshakha idzo dzine Muṋe washu a khou dzi lozwa ni tshi swika." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Vhaisraele, thetshelesani! Ni vho wela Jorodani zwino uri ni dzhene shangoni ḽaṋu ni thathe tshakha khulu dzi no ni fhira nga maanḓa ni ḓidzhiele miḓi yavho mihulu yo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo i ṋanzwaho makole." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Ni a zwi ḓivha uri hu na Vhaenaki, vhathu vhalapfu vha nungo khulu; no no ḓi pfa hu tshi pfi, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a nga imedzana na Vhaenaki?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Hone ḓivhani ṋamusi uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene a no ni ranga phanḓa sa mulilo u fhisaho zwoṱhe; Ene u ḓo vha kunda tshoṱhe vha ni luvha, na vha lozwa na dzhia mashango avho kathihi fhedzi unga Muṋe washu o ni vhudza." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Hone musi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi vha thatha vha ni shavha, ni songo amba mbiluni na ri, ‘Muṋe washu o ri ḓisa shangoni heḽi a ri ṋea ḽone nge a vhona vhuvhuya hashu!’ A si zwone, Muṋe washu ho ngo thatha tshakha idzi nga u vhona vhuvhuya haṋu, o vha thatha nga u vhona vhuvhi havho." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Inwi ni tshi vho fhiwa shango iḽi a si nga vhuvhuya haṋu kana nge na vha na mbilu mbuya, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u tou thatha tshakha idzi nga vhuvhi havho, vha ni shavha; u tou itela uri zwe a dzula o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo zwi si wele fhasi." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Tshaṋu ndi u ḓivha-ha uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ha khou itwa nga vhuvhuya haṋu a tshi ni ṋea shango iḽi ḽavhuḓi uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, hufha ni vhathu vha tshipimbi." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Edzonu humbula uri ndi lungana ni tshi sinyusa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu tshee na pfuluwa Egipita, na vhuya na swika henefhano; ni songo zwi hangwa: no ḓi vha vhathu vha u shandukela Muṋe washu!" 
Deuteronomy9:8 “Thavhani ya Horebe no sinyusa Muṋe washu lwe a ni sinyutshela a ṱoḓa u ni lozwa. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ndi amba zwa musi uḽa nṋe ndi tshi gonya thavha u yo dzhia maḓaba mavhili a matombo, maḓaba a mulanga we Muṋe washu a vhofha na inwi, nda dzula thavhani maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao ndi sa ḽi tshithu, na maḓi ndi sa nwi," 
Deuteronomy9:10 Muṋe washu a nṋea maḓaba mavhili a matombo o ṅwalwaho nga munwe wa Mudzimu. Khao ho vha ho ṅwalwa maipfi oṱhe e Muṋe washu a amba na inwi e ngomu muliloni nṱha ha thavha musi uḽa wa tshivhidzo. 
Deuteronomy9:11 “Musi ho fhela maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao, Muṋe washu a nṋea eneo maḓaba mavhili a matombo, maḓaba a mulanga," 
Deuteronomy9:12 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Takuwa u ṱavhanye u tsa thavhani, lushaka lwau lwe wa lu pfulusa Egipita lwo ita tshivhi tshi ofhisaho, a vho ngo lenga u pambuwa nḓilani ye nda vha laya; vho ḓiitela tshifanyiso tsha mudzimu.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Muṋe washu a isa phanḓa a ri, ‘Ndo no zwi vhona uri lushaka holu lwo tou ita hani, vha na tshipimbi." 
Deuteronomy9:14 U songo vha pfumelela, ndi khou ṱoḓa u vha lozwa nda thutha dzina ḽavho ḽa si tsha pfala fhano fhasi, nda dzhia iwe nda u ita lushaka lu no fhira vhone nga maanḓa na nga u anda.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi rembuluwa nda tsa thavha ndo fara aḽa maḓaba mavhili a mulanga nga zwanḓa zwanga zwivhili, thavha yone i tshi khou ḓi duga mulilo." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Nda swika kha inwi nda vhona vhutshinyi he na itela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu: no vha no ḓiitela tshifanyiso tsha mbohwana, a no ngo vhuya na lenga u pambuwa nḓilani ye Muṋe washu a ni laya." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Nṋe nda mbo dzhia aḽa maḓaba mavhili nda a posa fhasi ni tshi zwi vhona nda a pwasha. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Nda dovha nda yo ḓiposa fhasi phanḓa ha Muṋe washu sa zwiḽa zwa u thoma, nda ḓidzima zwiḽiwa na maḓi maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi hoṱhe he na ita, ni tshi ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, ni tshi tou mu levhela uri ni mu sinyuse." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ndo vha ndi tshi ofha mbiti khulu dza Muṋe washu, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o ni sinyutshela, o vha a tshi tou ṱoḓa u ni lozwa. Hone Muṋe washu o pfa thabelo yanga ndi tshi ni pfumelela na wonoyo musi." 
Deuteronomy9:20 “Na Aroni Muṋe washu o vha o mu sinyutshela lwe a vhuya a ṱoḓa u mu lozwa, hone nṋe nda rabela ndi tshi pfumelela Aroni wonoyo musi." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Huno tshithu tshiḽa tshivhi tshe na ita, iḽa mbohwana, nda i dzhia nda i fhisa nga mulilo nda i pwashekanya nda i sinḓa nda i kuya, nda dzhia milora yayo nda i posa muedzini u tsaho na thavha." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “A si afho fhedzi, na musi ri Thabera (Mudugumo) na Masa (Malingoni) na Kibrotho Hataava (Zwaloni-zwa-vha-miḽo) no vha ni tshi ḓi sinyusa Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy9:23 “Huṅwe ndi Kadeshe Barania. Musi ni henengei Muṋe washu o ri ni gonye ni yo dzhia shango ḽe a ni ṋea, inwi na landula zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni vhudza, ni si mu fulufhele, ni si thetshelese ipfi ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy9:24 U bva musi we nda thoma u ni ḓivha no vha ni tshi ḓi vha vhathu vha u shandukela Muṋe washu. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ndi zwe nda ṱwa ndo ḓiposa fhasi phanḓa ha Muṋe washu maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao. Ndi nge Muṋe washu a vha o amba uri u ḓo ni lozwa. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Nda rabela Muṋe washu nda ri: Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, u songo lozwa lushaka lwau nandi, vhathu vhau vhukuma vhe wa vha vhofholola nga vhuhulu hau wa vha pfulusa Egipita nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Deuteronomy9:27 A u elelwi zwau vhaḓinḓa vhau Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo naa? U songo londa u konḓa ha lushaka holu na vhuvhi havho na vhutshinyi havho! 
Deuteronomy9:28 Vhathu vha shango ḽe wa ri pfulusa khaḽo vha nga ḓo ri, ‘Yahavee o kundwa u isa lushaka holu shangoni ḽe a vha fulufhedzisa ḽone,’ kana vha ri, ‘A tshi vha pfulusa fhano ndi uri u tou vha vhenga, o itela uri a kone u vha vhulaha phangani!’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 U songo vha lozwa, hufha vhe vhathu vhau vhukuma vhe wa vha pfulusa nga maanḓa au mahulu wo angaladza tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudza a ri, ‘Dovha u ḓivhaḓele maḓaba mavhili a matombo a no fana na aḽa a u thoma, u konou gonya ngeno thavhani ha Nṋe, u ite mbulungelo ya thanda." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Eneaḽa maipfi e a vha o ṅwalwa kha aḽa maḓaba a u thoma e wa pwasha ndi ḓo a ṅwala kha ayo maḓaba, iwe wa konou a vhea mbulungeloni.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Nṋe nda mbo ita iḽa mbulungelo nga muunga, nda vhaḓa maṅwe maḓaba mavhili a matombo a no fana na aḽa a u thoma, nda gonya thavha ndo a fara." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Muṋe washu a ṅwala zwenezwiḽa zwe a vha o ṅwala kha aḽa a u thoma, iḽa milayo ya fumi ye a ni laya thavhani e muliloni musi wa tshivhidzo, musi ó no ṅwala a nṋekedza," 
Deuteronomy10:5 nṋe nda rembuluwa nda tsa thavhani nda vhea aḽa maḓaba mbulungeloni. A mbo dzula henefho, nga he Muṋe washu a laedza.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Vhaisraele vho takuwa zwisimani zwa vhana vha Jaakani vha ya Musera. Aroni a fa henefho, a swiṱwa, ṅwana wawe Eliasara a vha tshifhe vhudzuloni hawe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 U bva henefho Vhaisraele vha takuwa vha ya Gudugoda, vha konou fhirela Jotobatha, shango ḽi na maḓi manzhi a elaho." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ndi nga tshenetsho tshifhinga Muṋe washu a tshi khetha tsinde ḽa Vhalivi uri vha vhe vhone vha no hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga wawe na u ima hukhethwa hawe vha tshi mu shumela, na u shudufhadza vhathu nga dzina ḽawe, sa zwine vha kha ḓi zwi ita na ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ndi zwe Vhalivi vha kundwa u wana mukovhe wa shango unga vhaṅwe Vhaisraele; mukovhe wavho ndi Muṋe washu Ene muṋe, unga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o vha vhudza.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nṋe ndo vha ndi tshee ndo ima thavhani ndi na Muṋe washu maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao unga zwiḽa u thomani. Na hoyo musi Muṋe washu a mpfa, a si tsha funa u ni lozwa." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Muṋe washu a mphindula a ri, ‘Ndi zwone, takuwa u yo ranga lushaka phanḓa! Nga vha ye vha dzhie shango ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho, nda ana nda ri ndi ḓo vha ṋea ḽone.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Zwino-ha Vhaisraele, zwine Muṋe washu a ṱoḓa kha inwi ndi tshithihi fhedzi. Ndi u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na u ita zwoṱhe zwe a ni laya na u mu funa na u mu shumela nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone," 
Deuteronomy10:13 na u tevhedza milayo ya Muṋe washu na ndaela dzoṱhe dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela." 
Deuteronomy10:14 “Vhonani, maṱaḓulu oṱhe khathihi na ḽifhasi na zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo ndi zwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Naho zwo ralo, Muṋe washu o takalela vhomakhulukuku waṋu fhedzi a vha sumbedza lufuno lwawe luhulu, a khetha na vhaḓuhulu vhavho a tshi vha nanga kha tshakha dzoṱhe, unga ni tshi khou zwi vhona na ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy10:16 “Ndi zwone, laṱani tshipimbi tshaṋu; unga no fumba mivhili, fumbani-ha na mbiluni dzaṋu!" 
Deuteronomy10:17 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene Mudzimu wa midzimu, ndi Ene Muṋe wa vhaṋe, Mudzimu muhulu, Muhali a ofhisaho; ha ṱaluli, ha ṱanganedzi tshanḓanguvhoni;" 
Deuteronomy10:18 u imelela tsiwana na tshilikadzi musi vha tshi sengiswa; u funa na mutsinda, a mu ṋea zwiḽiwa na nguvho." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Zwenezwo na inwi ni fanela u funa vhatsinda; hufha inwi-vho no vha ni vhatsinda shangoni ḽa Egipita. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Hulisani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ni luvhe Ene! Ni songo tenda u fhambana nae, musi ni tshi ana ni ane nga dzina ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Dzulani ni tshi renda Ene; ndi Ene Mudzimu waṋu, ndi Ene we a ni itela mishumo iyo mihulu i ofhisaho ye na vhona nga maṱo aṋu!" 
Deuteronomy10:22 Musi vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha tshi tsela Egipita vho vha vhe vhathu vha 70 fhedzi, huno Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni andisa unga ṋaledzi dzi re lutomboni." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Funani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni vhulunge zwoṱhe zwe a vhofha na zwe a ni laya na milayo yawe yoṱhe na ndaela dzawe misi yoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Ṋamusi ni a zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni laya hani a tshi ni sumbedza vhuhulu hawe na tshanḓa tshawe tshihulu tsha maanḓa. Vhana vhaṋu a vho ngo zwi vhona," 
Deuteronomy11:3 hone inwi no vhona maḓembe awe na mishumo mihulu ye a ita Farao khosi ya Egipita na vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe shangoni ḽa Egipita. 
Deuteronomy11:4 No vhona zwe a ita mmbi ya Egipita na bere dzavho na gariki dzavho dza nndwa: No zwi vhona vha tshi kumbiwa nga maḓi a Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga zwiḽa vha tshi khou ni pandamedza, Muṋe washu a vha lozwa. Na ṋamusi vha tshee vho kulea nungo." 
Deuteronomy11:5 No vhona zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ni tonda ngazwo phangani na vhuya na swika henefhano. 
Deuteronomy11:6 No vhona zwe a ita Dathani na Abiramu vhana vha Eliaba ṅwana wa Rubeni, zwiḽa mavu a tshi aṱama a vha mila khathihi na miṱa yavho na dennde dzavho na thundu dzavho dzoṱhe, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi khou zwi vhona." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Mishumo yoṱhe heyo mihulu ye Muṋe washu a ita no zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Ndi zwone, tevhedzani ndayo dzoṱhe dzine nda khou ni laya ṋamusi, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha na maanḓa, na dzhena shangoni ḽine na khou wetshela khaḽo zwino, na ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽaṋu," 
Deuteronomy11:9 na fhedza miṅwaha na miṅwaha ni tshi dzula shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, a ana uri u ḓo ḽi ṋea vhone na vhaḓuhulu vhavho – shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 “Shango ḽine na yo dzhena khaḽo uri ni ḽi dzhie a ḽi fani na shango ḽa Egipita ḽine na bva khaḽo, ḽine muthu a ri o gobela mbeu yawe a dovha a ḓidina nga u sheledza sa ngade ya miroho," 
Deuteronomy11:11 ndi shango ḽa dzithavha na magovha, ḽi tou sheledzwa nga maḓi a mvula." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ndi shango ḽi vhavhalelwaho nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, u dzula a tshi ḽi londola u bva mathomoni a ṅwaha wa vhuya wa fhela." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Ndi zwone, arali ni tshi thetshelesa ndayo yanga ine nda ni laya ṋamusi, na funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na mu luvha nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone," 
Deuteronomy11:14 ndi hone a tshi ḓo nisela shango ḽaṋu mvula nga tshifhinga tsho teaho, mvula dza tseula na dza mibvumbi, na wana goroi nnzhi na waini na mapfura a muolivi a si na vhukono," 
Deuteronomy11:15 pfuloni zwifuwo zwaṋu zwa ḽa zwa fura, na inwi vhaṋe na ḽa na tou laṱa." 
Deuteronomy11:16 “Ni vhone ni sa ḓo fhurea na pambuwa nḓilani na luvha midzimu isili na i gwadamela. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni sinyutshela; u ḓo vala makole, mvula ya si tsha na, mavu a si tsha bveledza zwiḽiwa, na ṱavhanya u lovha na si tsha wanala shangoni iḽo ḽavhuḓi ḽine Muṋe washu a khou ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Zwenezwo ni vhulunge maipfi anga aya mbiluni dzaṋu a si vhuye a bva mihumbuloni yaṋu, ni a vhofhelele tshanḓani tsha vha tshiga tsha u ni humbudza, a vhe luswayo kha phanḓa," 
Deuteronomy11:19 ni a funze vhana vhaṋu, ni ambe ngao musi no dzula nḓuni na musi no fara lwendo na musi ni tshi yo lala na musi ni tshi vuwa," 
Deuteronomy11:20 ni a ṅwale kha mihangammbwa ya nnḓu dzaṋu na kha mafhoro aṋu. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo lalama khathihi na vhana vhaṋu ni tshi dzula shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, ni si lovhe lutombo lu sa athu balangana nṱha ha ḽifhasi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Arali vhukuma ni tshi ḓo tevhedza ndayo iyi ine nda ni laya ṋamusi, na i khunyeledza, na funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na si bve nḓilani dze a ni laedza, na si tende u fhambana nae," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Muṋe washu u ḓo thatha tshakha idzi dzoṱhe dza ni shavha, na kunda tshakha khulu dzi na maanḓa a no fhira aṋu na dzi dzhiela mashango." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Hoṱhe hune ṋayo dzaṋu dza kanda hu ḓo vha haṋu; masakha aṋu a ḓo guma nga phanga na Libanoni na mulambo wa Yufuratha, vhukovhela a guma nga Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango." 
Deuteronomy11:25 A hu nga vhi na muthu ane a imedzana na inwi; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ita uri vhathu vha mashango oṱhe ane ṋayo dzaṋu dza kanda khao vha ni ofhe vha tou tetemela, unga o ni fulufhedzisa." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Ni vhone! Ṋamusi ndi khou vhea zwivhili phanḓa haṋu uri ni khethe, ndi mashudu kana u teketelwa." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Arali na thetshelesa ndayo dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu dze nda ni laya ṋamusi, ni ḓo vha na mashudu." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Arali na sa thetshelesa ndayo dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na pambuwa nḓilani ye nda ni laya ṋamusi, na gidima murahu ha midzimu isili ye kale na vha ni sa i ḓivhi, ni ḓo teketelwa." 
Deuteronomy11:29 “Musi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ni swikisa shangoni ḽine na khou dzhena khaḽo zwino uri ni ḽi dzhie, ni fanela u bula maipfi a mashudu no ima thavhani ya Gerisimu, maipfi a u teketela ni a bule no ima thavhani ya Ebala." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Thavha idzo mbili ni ḓo dzi wana seli ha Jorodani musi no no pfuka nḓila i no bva vhubvaḓuvha govhani ḽa Jorodani hu no dzula Vhakanana. Dzo livhana na Giligala, tsini ha miri mihulwane ya More." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Vhukuma ni ḓo ṱuwa ni tshi wela Jorodani na yo dzhia shango ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a khou ni ṋea, ḽa vha ḽaṋu, na dzula khaḽo." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Vhulungani-ha milayo na ndaela dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Khei milayo na ndaela dzine na pfi ni dzi vhulunge musi ni shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu; ni zwi tevhedze maḓuvha oṱhe ane na tshila fhano shangoni. 
Deuteronomy12:2 “Ni phusukanye fhethu hoṱhe hune vhannḓa vhane na ḓo vha thatha mashangoni avho vha luvha midzimu yavho hone, thavhani dzoṱhe ndapfu na zwikwarani na fhasi ha miri yo bvukaho." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Ni thuthe aḽiṱari dzavho, ni pwashe matombo e vha imisela midzimu, thanda dzavho dza Ashera ni dzi fhise nga mulilo, zwifanyiso zwa midzimu yavho ni zwi reme, madzina ayo a songo tsha pfala henefho." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Tshiṅwe, ni songo edza maitele a tshakha hedzo musi ni tshi luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ḓikhethela fhethu ha dzina ḽawe; ndi henefho hune a ḓo wanala hone musi ni tshi mu ṱoḓa. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo na tshafumi na miṅwe mitendelo na nduvho dze na mu fulufhedzisa na dze na bvisa nga u tou funa, na matanzhe a kholomo na a nngu na a mbudzi, zwoṱhe ni yo mu ṋekedza henefho." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Ni zwi ḽe henefho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ni vhona, inwi na miṱa yaṋu ni tshi takalela zwoṱhe zwe na kona u shuma nge Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni shudufhadza." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “U swika ṋamusi roṱhe ro vha ri tshi ita nga he ra vhona zwo naka," 
Deuteronomy12:9 ngauri no vha ni sa athu dzhena shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu ni awele. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Hone ni ḓo ṱuwa ni tshi wela Jorodani uri ni kone u dzula shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea ḽone uri ni wane tshifhinga tsha u awela, ni dzule no ḓitakalela ni sa ofhi na ḽithihi ḽa maswina aṋu oṱhe thungo dzoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Nduvho dzoṱhe dzine nda ni laedza – dzi fhiswaho, na zwiṱhavhelo, na tshafumi, na miṅwe mitendelo, na mitendelo ye na tou fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu – nduvho hedzo dzoṱhe ni dzi ḓise henefho fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a khethela dzina ḽawe." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ni zwi ṱhavhe henefho ni zwi ḽe ni takale phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ní na vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, na vhashumi vhaṋu vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi, na Vhalivi vhane na dzula navho vha takale, ngauri vhone a vho ngo kovhelwa tshipiḓa tsha shango musi inwi ni tshi wana mikovhe yaṋu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 “Ni vhone uri ni si sokou ṋekedza nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho huṅwe na huṅwe hune na funa. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Fhethu hune Muṋe washu a ḓo hu khetha kha matsinde aṋu oṱhe, ndi henefho hune na ḓo ṋekedza nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho na dziṅwe dzoṱhe dzine nda ni laya." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Hone arali ni tshi tou tama ṋama, ni nga ṱhavha hoṱhe-hoṱhe hune na dzula na ḽa ṋama ye Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea a tshi ni shudufhadza; hu nga ḽa o kumalaho na o kumululwaho, zwi fana na musi ni tshi ḽa ntsa kana mbavhala." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Malofha fhedzi, one kha a vhe tshiila, ni a tevhulele fhasi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 “Hone tshafumi tsha goroi na waini na mapfura a muolivi na matanzhe a kholomo na nngu na mbudzi, na nduvho dze na fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu, na mitendelo ine na bvisa nga u tou funa, na miṅwe mitendelo yoṱhe, hezwo a no ngo tendelwa u zwi ḽa mahayani aṋu," 
Deuteronomy12:18 zwi ḽiwa phanḓa ha Muṋe washu fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a hu khetha; zwi ḽiwa nga inwi na vhana vhaṋu, vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, na vhashumi vhaṋu, vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi, khathihi na Vhalivi vhane na dzula navho; ni ḓo zwi ḽa na takala phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ni tshi humbula mashudu oṱhe e a ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Ni vhone ni sa ḓo hangwa Vhalivi, maḓuvha oṱhe ane na dzula shangoni ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Musi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo engedza shango ḽaṋu ḽi aṱame unga o ni fulufhedzisa, na vhona uri ni ḓo ḽa ṋama nga u tou pfa ni tshi i tama, iḽani zwaṋu nga hune na tama." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Fhethu hune Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ḓo khethela dzina ḽawe arali ni tshi vhona uri ndi kule, ni a ṱhavha zwaṋu kholomo kana nngu kana mbudzi dze Muṋe washu a ni ṋea, sa zwe nda ni laya, na ḓiḽela zwaṋu ni mahayani aṋu nga hune na tama." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Zwi fana na musi ni tshi ḽa ntsa kana mbavhala, vhoṱhe vha a ḽa, vho kumalaho na vho kumululwaho," 
Deuteronomy12:23 tenda na ila malofha, ngauri malofha ndi vhutshilo; musi ni tshi ḽa ṋama, ni songo ḽa vhutshilo hayo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Ni songo a ḽa, ni tou a tevhulela fhasi unga maḓi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Arali ni sa ḽi malofha zwi ḓo ni nakela, inwi na vhana vhaṋu, ngauri ni ḓo vha ni tshi ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy12:26 “Nduvho dzoṱhe dze na khethela Muṋe washu, na dze na mu fulufhedzisa, dzone ni ḓo dzi ḓisa fhethu he Muṋe washu a ḓikhethela hone," 
Deuteronomy12:27 na ṋekedza nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho dza ṋama na malofha kha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; malofha a shululelwe kha aḽiṱari, ṋama ni ḽe zwaṋu." 
Deuteronomy12:28 “Mafhungo oṱhe ane nda khou ni laya ni a tevhedze, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela lini na lini, inwi na vhana vhaṋu, ngauri ni ḓo vha ni tshi ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo lozwa tshakha dzine na ḓo ya u dzhia mashango adzo, a dzi thatha dza ni shavha, uri inwi ni dzule mashangoni adzo." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Huno zwi nga kha ḓi itea uri naho no no vha lozwa, na yo ṱoḓisesa zwa midzimu yavho na vhudzisa na ri, ‘Avha vhathu vho vha vha tshi luvha hani midzimu yavho? Na riṋe kha ri ite zwenezwo!’ Hezwo ni songo zwi ita." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ni songo luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga nḓila ine vhone vha luvha ngayo, ngauri zwoṱhe zwine zwa nengisa Muṋe washu zwine a tou zwi vhenga, ndi zwone zwine vha luvha midzimu yavho ngazwo; hufha vha tshi kona u fhisa na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana nga mulilo vha tshi vha ṋekedza midzimu yavho!" 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Ni songo litsha u vhulunga mafhungo oṱhe ane nda ni laya; ni songo engedza ipfi na ḽithihi, ni songo fhungudza na ḽithihi." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Arali ha bvelela muporofita kha inwi, kana muthu a no ṱalutshedza miloro, a ni fha tshiga kana ḓembe," 
Deuteronomy13:2 zwe a ni vhudza zwa mbo bvelela, uyo a konou ri, ‘Kha ri yo luvha midzimu isili,’ a tshi amba midzimu ine na si i ḓivhe," 
Deuteronomy13:3 ni songo thetshelesa zwiambo zwa uyo muporofita kana muṱalutshedzi wa miloro; ndi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ane a tou ni linga uri a vhone arali ni tshi mu funa nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Tevhelani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni ofhe Ene, ni vhulunge ndaela dzawe, ni pfe zwine a amba, ni mu luvhe; ni songo tenda u fhambana nae na luthihi." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Uyo muporofita kana muṱalutshedzi wa miloro kha a vhulawe ngauri u a ni fhura nga zwiambo zwawe, u ṱoḓa u ni luṱanya na Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu we a ni vhofholola vhupulini a ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita, u ṱoḓa u ni xedza uri ni bve nḓilani ye Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni laya; ni fanela u tou thutha vhuvhi hoho vhukati haṋu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Naho e mukomana wau ṅwana wa mme au, kana ṅwana wau we wa mu beba, kana musadzi wau, kana khonani yau ane wa mu funa unga iwe muṋe, arali a ḓa nga tshiphiri a ri, ‘Kha ri yo luvha midzimu isili,’ a tshi amba midzimu ye iwe na vhomakhulukuku wau na vha ni sa i ḓivhi," 
Deuteronomy13:7 a tshi amba midzimu ya tshakha dzo ni tangaho, kana ndi dzo ṋekanaho masakha na inwi, kana ndi tshakha dza kule-kule, u bva vhusendekamisi u ya vhusendekamisi," 
Deuteronomy13:8 u songo tenda zwine a amba, u songo mu thetshelesa, na u mu khathutshela u songo mu khathutshela, u songo mu pfela vhuṱungu, na u pfumelelwa ha pfumelelwi," 
Deuteronomy13:9 tshawe ndi u vhulawa. Kha hu thome iwe u posa tombo, hu konou tevhela lushaka lwoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Ni fanela u mu kanḓa nga matombo na mu vhulaha, ngauri u ṱoḓa u ni luṱanya na Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu we a ni vhofholola vhupulini a ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓo pfa zwo iteaho, vha ofha, ha si tsha dovha ha vha na ane a ita vhuvhi vhungafhongafho kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Zwi nga kha ḓi itea uri hu ḓe vhathu vha sa ḓivhalekani vha swika kha muṅwe wa miḓi ye Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ni dzule khayo, vha linga u xedza vhadzulapo vha uyo muḓi vha ri, ‘Kha ri yo luvha midzimu isili,’ vha tshi amba midzimu ye na vha ni sa i ḓivhi." 
Deuteronomy13:13  
Deuteronomy13:14 Zwenezwo ni fanela u sedza na u ṱoḓisesa na sengulusa eneo mafhungo. Arali zwa wanala uri vhukuma vhuvhi hoho vhu nengisaho ho itea vhukati haṋu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 ni fanela u vhulaha vhadzulapo vha uyo muḓi nga pfumo na u phusukanya na zwoṱhe zwi re khawo, na vhulaha na zwifuwo zwaho." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Thundu dzoṱhe dze na wana khawo ni dzi kuvhanganye vanḓani ḽa muḓi ni dzi fhise nga mulilo. Ngauralo ni ḓo vha no ita muḓi na thundu dzawo dzoṱhe nduvho ine na kumedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; a u tsha ḓo dovha wa vuswa, u ḓo dzula u matumba lini na lini." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ni songo vhuya na dzhia na tshithu na tshithihi tsha thundu hedzo dzo kumedzwaho Muṋe washu, ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo dzikisa mbiti dzawe, a ni khathutshela a ni ita nga vhuthu, a ni andisa unga o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ni ḓo vha no thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na vhulunga ndaela dzawe dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi, na ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Inwi ni vhana vha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; zwenezwo ni tshi lilela mufu ni songo ḓitshetshekanya kana na vheula mavhudzi a phanḓa a ṱhohoni unga vhannḓa. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ni vhathu vho ḓikumedzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; Muṋe washu o khetha inwi kha tshakha dzoṱhe dzi re fhano fhasi uri ni vhe lushaka lwawe vhukuma. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Ni songo ḽa tshithu tsho iledzwaho. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Phukha dzine dza ḽiwa ndi kholomo na nngu na mbudzi 
Deuteronomy14:5 na mbavhala na ḓavhu na khongoni na ngululu na phofu na ṋoni na tsephe na phukha dzi no nga dzenedzo 
Deuteronomy14:6 dzi re na khwanḓa mbili dzo fhandekanaho dza dovha dza dzeula. Ndi dzone dzine dza ḽiwa. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Dzi no dzeula hone dzi si na khwanḓa mbili, na dzi na khwanḓa mbili hone dzi sa dzeuli, dzone dzo iledzwa; ndi gamela na muvhuḓa na mbila. Dzone naho dzi tshi dzeula, a dzi na khwanḓa dzo fhandekanaho, dzo iledzwa." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Na nguluvhe yo iledzwa, ngauri naho i na khwanḓa dzo fhandekanaho, a i dzeuli, yo iledzwa. Phukha idzo ni songo dzi ḽa, na zwitumbu zwadzo a zwi kwamiwi." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Khovhe dzone hu ḽiwa dzi na zwibe na mudzedze khathihi na makwanda. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Hone dzi si na mudzedze na makwanda a dzi ḽiwi, dzo iledzwa." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Zwiṋoni hu ḽiwa zwoṱhe zwi sa ili u ḽiwa. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Zwo iledzwaho ndi ḽianga na goni na tshilaulane 
Deuteronomy14:13 na luvhimba na lurwanzhivha na zwi no nga zwenezwo," 
Deuteronomy14:14 na tshakha dzoṱhe dza mahunguvhu," 
Deuteronomy14:15 na mphwe na gombambudzi na musilisili na zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi no ḽa ṋama," 
Deuteronomy14:16 na makhwitha na maṅaaṅaa na tshiruxwe," 
Deuteronomy14:17 na dandila na ṱhame na ṱhungununu 
Deuteronomy14:18 na ḽiovhelwa na ḽiṋulakhovhe na khororo na vhonyamulemalema. 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Zwikhokhonono zwoṱhe zwi fhufhaho zwo iledzwa, a zwi ḽiwi." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Hone zwiṅwe zwi fhufhaho zwi sa ili u ḽiwa, ni a ḽa zwaṋu." 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Tshidu ni tshi ile. Ni nga tshi ṋea zwaṋu vhatsinda vhane na dzula navho kana na vha rengisela, hone inwi ni songo tshi ḽa, ni lushaka lukhethwa lwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. “Ni songo bika mbudzana nga mafhi a mme ayo." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ni fanela u bvisa tshafumi tsha zwiliṅwa zwi no liṅwa masimuni aṋu. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ni ḓe ni zwi ḽe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu henefho fhethu hune a ḓo khethela dzina ḽawe. Ni bvise tshafumi tsha goroi na waini na mapfura a muolivi, na matanzhe a kholomo na nngu na mbudzi, uri ni gude u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu misi yoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Hone arali Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni shudufhadza zwihulu, khaṋo ya anda lune na kundwa u hwala tshafumi, na dovha na vhona uri fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a khethela dzina ḽawe ndi kulesa," 
Deuteronomy14:25 zwenezwo ni nga rengisa tshafumi, na fara tshelede yatsho na ṱuwa nayo na ya fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a hu nanga," 
Deuteronomy14:26 ni tshi swika ni renge zwoṱhe zwine na tama nga iyo tshelede – ṋama ya kholomo na ya nngu, na waini na halwa na tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine na tama, ni mbo ḓi zwi ḽa henefho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni takale na miṱa yaṋu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Na Vhalivi vhane na dzula navho ni songo vhuya na vha hangwa, ngauri inwi ni tshi wana mukovhe wa shango vhone a vho ngo u wana." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Tshifhinga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe musi ho fhela miṅwaha miraru ni bvise tshafumi tsha khaṋo yoṱhe, ṅwaha uyo ni zwi vhulunge miḓini yaṋu," 
Deuteronomy14:29 izwo zwiḽiwa ndi zwa Vhalivi vha songo wanaho mukovhe wa shango, na vhatsinda vhane na dzula navho, na tsiwana na dzitshilikadzi, vha ḽe vha fure. Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Tshifhinga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe musi ho fhela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili ni thuthelane milandu yoṱhe ye na hadzimana. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ni zwi ite nga hei nḓila: “Muṅwe na muṅwe we Muisraele ngae a pamba tshithu khae u fanela u thutha mulandu, a songo tsha mu vhila milandu, ngauri u pfi ndi ṅwaha wa u thuthelana milandu ni tshi itela u hulisa Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Mutsinda ni nga mu lifhisa zwaṋu milandu yawe, hone Muisraele nga inwi ni thuthe milandu yawe." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Arali vhukuma na thetshelesa zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba na zwi vhulunga, na tevhedza ndaela dzoṱhe idzi dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi, a hu nga wanali mushai kha inwi, ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni shudufhadza ni shangoni ḽine a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni shudufhadza unga o ni vhudza, ha vha na tshakha nnzhi dzi no pamba kha inwi, inwi na si pambe kha muthu, na vhusa tshakha nnzhi, inwi na si vhuswe nga luṅwe lushaka na luthihi." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Arali muḓini muṅwe henefho shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea ha wanala Muisraele wa mushai, ni mu khathutshele, ni songo dzima Muisraele wa haṋu a re mushai." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ni fanela u mu pakulela na mu adzima zwine a shaya. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ni vhone uri ni si elekanye zwi sa ḓivhalekani na ri, ‘Hufha ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa u hangwelana milandu wo no sendela!’ na si tsha itela Muisraele wa haṋu vhuthu e kha vhushai hawe, na mu dzima. A nga u hwelela ha Muṋe washu, wa wanala u na mulandu!" 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mu ṋeeni zwine a shaya ni sa pfi mbilu u vhavha nga zwe na mu ṋea; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni shudufhadza a tshi itela zwenezwo zwe na tonda muṅwe, a ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma, zwoṱhe zwine na ita zwa ni nakela." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Vhashai a vha nga kundwi u vha hone shangoni ḽaṋu, ndi zwine nda ni vhudza nda ri: Tondani Vhaisraele vha haṋu vha vhaheḓana vha no shaya musi ni shangoni ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Arali wa renga munna kana musadzi wa Muheberu a vha phuli yau, a nga u shumela miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi, hone nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili u fanela u mu vhofholola a ṱuwa." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Nahone musi u tshi mu vhofholola a songo ṱuwa a si na tshe a fara tshe wa mu fha," 
Deuteronomy15:14 u mu pakulele a ṱuwe na mbudzi na nngu na goroi na waini na zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ni shudufhadza ngazwo. 
Deuteronomy15:15 Hafhu u elelwe uri na inwi no vha ni dziphuli shangoni ḽa Egipita, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni vhofholola, ndi zwine nda ni laya izwi zwithu ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Hone arali iyo phuli ya ri, ‘A thi tsha funa u ṱuwa, ndi a u funa, na muṱa wau ndi a u funa, ndi pfa ndo takala ndi fhano,’" 
Deuteronomy15:17 u dzhie luunzhi u mu phule nḓevhe luunzhi lu tshi ṱoka kha vothi, ndi hone a tshi ḓo vha phuli yau tshoṱhe; na phuli ya musadzi u mu ite nga u ralo." 
Deuteronomy15:18 “Hone arali wa vhofholola phuli ya ṱuwa, u songo vhona unga zwi a u konḓela, hufha o u shumela miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi, zwe wa bindula ngae zwi fhira luvhili zwe a vha a tshi ḓo hola arali o vha o tou tholiwa; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo u shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine wa shuma." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa tshiduna ḽa kholomo kana nngu kana mbudzi ni fanela u ḽi kumedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. Mboho i re tanzhe i songo lima, nngu kana mbudzi i re tanzhe i songo vheulwa." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Ni fanela u i ḓisa phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu fhethu he a ḓinangela, ni i ḓise henefho ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ni i ḽe ni na miṱa yaṋu." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Hone arali tanzhe iḽo ḽo holefhala, ḽi tshi ṱudza kana ḽi bofu kana ḽi na vhuhole vhufhio na vhufhio, ni songo ḽi ṱhavhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Ḽeneḽo ni ḽi ḽe hayani, ḽi ḽiwa nga muthu o kumalaho na o kumululwaho, zwi fana na musi ni tshi ḽa phala kana ntsa." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Tshine na ila ndi malofha ayo fhedzi, one ni fanela u a tevhulela fhasi sa maḓi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Ni songo hangwa ṅwedzi wa Avivi; nga wonoyo ṅwedzi ni itele Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu vhuṱambo ha Paseka, ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni pfulusa Egipita nga ṅwedzi wa Avivi hu vhusiku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a khethela dzina ḽawe, henefho ni fanela u ṱhavhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nngu kana mbudzi kana kholomo ya Paseka i vhe nduvho." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ni songo i ḽa na vhurotho vhu na mbilisa; maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili oṱhe ni ḽe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa. Vhu ḓo ni humbudza u tambula haṋu. Vhutshilo haṋu hoṱhe ni fanela u elelwa ḓuvha ḽe na pfuluwa Egipita, ni tshi ṱuwa nga tshikapikapi ni si na tshifhinga." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Hu fanela u fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili hu sa wanali mbilisa shangoni ḽaṋu ḽoṱhe. Ṋama ye na ṱhavhela Muṋe washu nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ni songo sia muladza wayo une wa nga ḽiwa nga matshelo. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Ni songo ṱhavha zwifuwo zwa nduvho ya Paseka miḓini yaṋu ye Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea," 
Deuteronomy16:6 ni zwi ṱhavhe henefho fhethu hune a khethela dzina ḽawe. Ni zwi ṱhavhe nga madekwana, ngauri ndi tshone tshifhinga tshe na takuwa ngatsho ni tshi pfuluwa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Ni gotshe ṋama ni i ḽe fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a hu nanga, nga matsheloni ni konou humela hayani." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ni ḽe vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi, ḽa vhu-7 ni kuvhangane ni ite vhuṱambo ha u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, nahone mishumo ni i litshe nga ḓuvha heḽo." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Musi ni tshi thoma u kaṋa mavhele ni vhale vhege ṱhanu na mbili 
Deuteronomy16:10 ni konou itela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu vhuṱambo ha Khaṋo. Nga vhuṱambo honoho ni ḓo ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nduvho ine na tou funa, ni tshi bvisa nga he a ni shudufhadza ngaho." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ni takale ni tshi vhonwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ní fhethu he a khethela dzina ḽawe, ni takale ní na muṱa woṱhe – vhana na vhashumi na Vhalivi vhane na dzula navho, na vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi dzine dza dzula shangoni ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Zwenezwo ni ḓo elelwa uri no vha ni dziphuli shangoni ḽa Egipita. Ndaela idzi ni dzi vhulunge ni dzi tevhedze. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Musi no vhuisa khaṋo ya goroi na dovha na vhuisa na ya waini, ni ite vhuṱambo ha Mishasha maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili," 
Deuteronomy16:14 ni takale munyanyani uyo na muṱa woṱhe – vhana na vhashumi na Vhalivi na vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi dzine dza dzula miḓini yaṋu. 
Deuteronomy16:15 Vhuṱambo uho ni vhu ite maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ni tshi itela u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nó kuvhangana fhethu he a ḓinangela. Nga ḽi vhe dakalo fhedzi, ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwe na lima na zwe na shuma." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Ngauralo vhanna vha haṋu vhoṱhe vha fanela u sendela phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu luraru nga ṅwaha vha tshi ḓa fhethu he a ḓinangela. Ndi nga vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa na ha Khaṋo na ha Mishasha. Hone ni songo swika ni si na nduvho," 
Deuteronomy16:17 muṅwe na muṅwe a ḓe na nduvho yawe a tshi bvisa nga he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a mu ṋea mashudu ngaho. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Miḓini yaṋu yoṱhe ine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, ni vhee vhahaṱuli na vhakoma. Vhenevho vha fanela u sengulusa mafhungo a vhathu vha haṱula vha tshi tevhedza mulayo." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Vha songo haṱulela thungo, vha songo vha na tshiṱalula, vha songo ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni; tshanḓanguvhoni tshi pofudza muṱali, tshi kundisa a re ngohoni u wana zwo mu fanelaho." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Inwi tshaṋu ndi u lwela khaṱhulo mbuya fhedzi, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila, na dzula shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Tsini ha aḽiṱari ye na fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ni songo ḓiṱokela thanda ya Ashera ya muri ufhio na ufhio. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Ni songo ḓiimisela phuphu ya tombo na i luvha; Muṋe washu u a zwi vhenga hezwo zwithu. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Ni songo ṱhavhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu kholomo kana mbudzi kana nngu i re na luvhadzi kana yo holefhalaho; hezwo Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u a zwi nengwa. 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Arali muḓini muṅwe wa haṋu we Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea ha wanala munna kana musadzi a itaho zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, nga u vhofholola mulanga wa Mudzimu waṋu," 
Deuteronomy17:3 a ya a shumela midzimu isili, a luvha ḓuvha kana ṅwedzi kana ṋaledzi – zwithu zwe nda si ni laye," 
Deuteronomy17:4 zwa swikiswa na pfa uri zwo ralo, zwenezwo ni fanela u sedza zwavhuḓi arali i ngoho, arali vhukuma zwithu hezwo zwi nengisaho zwo itwa kha Vhaisraele;" 
Deuteronomy17:5 zwa wanala uri ndi zwone, ni dzhie onoyo muthu o itaho vhuvhi vhungafho ni mu bvisele khoroni ya muḓi, ni mu kanḓe nga matombo a fe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kha a vhulawe arali hu na ṱhanzi mbili kana tharu; arali hu na ṱhanzi nthihi fhedzi ni songo mu vhulaha. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Ṱhanzi dzazwo kha vha vhe vhone vha u thoma u mu vhulaha, hu konou tevhela vhaṅwe vhoṱhe. Ngauralo ni ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi hoho ha si tsha pfala kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Zwi nga itea uri ni ṱangane na mafhungo a no ni kunda u haṱula – a nga vha a u ṱalula muthu we a vhulaha muṅwe nga khole kana we a sokou tshenuwa o no vhulaha, kana a u hanedza khaṱhulo, kana a u huvhadzana. Zwenezwo ni ye fhethu he Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ḓinangela," 
Deuteronomy17:9 ni swike ha vhotshifhe, vhone Vhalivi, ni vhudzise muhaṱuli ane iḽo ḓuvha ḽa vha diso ḽawe. Vhenevho vha ḓo ni haṱulela mafhungo," 
Deuteronomy17:10 na konou ita zwenezwo zwe vha ni vhudza vhe fhethu he Muṋe washu a hu nanga; ni tevhedze zwoṱhe zwine vha ni laya. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Vhukuma ndayo ine vha ni laya na khaṱhulo ine vha ni sumbedza, ndi zwone zwine na fanela u ita, ni songo vhuya na bva kha zwe vha ni vhudza." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Muthu ane a nyadza zwine zwa ambiwa nga tshifhe o imaho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi mu luvha thembeleni, kana a nyadza muhaṱuli onoyo, uyo muthu kha a fe; vhuvhi ho raloho kha vhu fhele vhu sa tsha pfala kha Vhaisraele." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo pfa zwo iteaho vha ofha vha si tsha ita tshipimbi. 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Musi ni tshi swika shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, na ḽi dzhia na dzula khaḽo, na langana u ḓivhumbela khosi unga dziṅwe tshakha dzoṱhe dze na ṋekana masakha nadzo," 
Deuteronomy17:15 ni ite uri ni vhee onoyo ane Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a mu nanga; ni nange Muisraele wa haṋu uri a vhe khosi yaṋu, ni songo nanga mutsinda a si Muisraele." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Hafhu khosi yaṋu i songo vha na bere nnzhi, nahone a songo tenda vhathu vha Israele vha tshi vhuelela Egipita u yo mu rengela dziṅwe bere; hufha Muṋe washu o amba a ri ni songo dovha na kanda Egipita." 
Deuteronomy17:17 A songo dzea vhasadzi vhanzhi, vha sa ḓo mu xedza a shandukela Muṋe washu; nahone a songo vha na lupfumo luhulu lwa siliva na musuku." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Musi o dzhena vhuhosi nga a ḓiitele kopi ya ndayo idzi dza Muṋe washu dzo ṅwalululwa kha bugu ya vhotshifhe, vhone Vhalivi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Bugu iyo a dzule nayo a i vhale maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hawe, uri a kone u guda u ofha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe, a vhulunge mafhungo oṱhe a ndayo idzi a tevhedze ndaela idzi," 
Deuteronomy17:20 ndi hone a sa ḓo ḓihudza a ḓifhima uri u fhira vhaṅwe Vhaisraele, nahone a nga si vhuye a bva kha mulayo. Ndi hone ene na vhana vhawe vha tshi ḓo lalama, vha vhusa Vhaisraele miṅwaha minzhi." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Tsinde ḽoṱhe la Vhalivi, vhane vhotshifhe vha bva khavho, a vha wani mukovhe wa shango unga vhaṅwe Vhaisraele, vhone vha ḓo ḽa mukovhe wa Muṋe washu – ndi nduvho dzi fhiswaho dzine vhathu vha mu ṋekedza." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Zwenezwo a vha wani mukovhe wa shango unga vhaṅwe Vhaisraele, mukovhe wavho ndi Muṋe washu, unga o dzula o vha vhudza." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Musi vhathu vha tshi ṱhavha kholomo kana nngu kana mbudzi ine ya ṋekedzwa ya vha nduvho, vhotshifhe vha fanela u ṋewa voho na luṱaha na magulu;" 
Deuteronomy18:4 na goroi ine na thoma u kaṋa, na waini ya u thoma na mapfura a u thoma a muolivi, na vhukuse ha u thoma ha nngu na mbudzi vhune na vheula ni fanela u ṋea vhone." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ndi uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o nanga vhone kha matsinde oṱhe uri vhone na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka vhoṱhe vha ime phanḓa hawe thembeleni vha tshi mu shumela misi yoṱhe. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Vhalivi vho balanganaho na miḓi yoṱhe ya Israele, arali vhone vha tshi tama u ḓa fhethu he Muṋe washu a hu nanga" 
Deuteronomy18:7 na u shumela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho thembeleni yawe unga vhaṅwe Vhalivi ngavho vho imaho thembeleni phanḓa ha Muṋe washu vha tshi mu shumela," 
Deuteronomy18:8 na vhone vha fanela u wana mukovhe wa zwiḽiwa u linganaho na wa vhaṅwe Vhalivi, ni sa vhuyi na sedza uri vho wana ifa ḽingafhani kha vhokhotsi avho." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Musi ni tshi swika shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, ni songo edza maitele a nengisaho a tshakha idzo." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Na muthihi waṋu a songo vha hone ane a ṋekedza ṅwana wawe midzimu nga u mu posa muliloni kha aḽiṱari dzayo kana a vha ṅanga ya ṱhangu kana mudziamanditi, kana a tungula kana a ita zwa vhuṱolo" 
Deuteronomy18:11 kana a lowa kana a tshina malombo kana a vhonisa kha mimuya ya vhafu. 
Deuteronomy18:12 Muthu a no ita hezwo u nengisa Muṋe washu. Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi thatha tshakha idzo a ni ṋea shango ḽadzo ndi nge dza mu nengisa nga maitele eneo. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Inwi ni shumele Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ni sa hoyi. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Tshakha idzo dzine na yo dzi thatha shangoni ḽadzo dzi vhonisa kha mingome na ṅanga dza ṱhangu, hone inwi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ha tendi ni tshi zwi ita." 
Deuteronomy18:15 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni ṋea muporofita a no nga nṋe, Muisraele nga inwi; ni thetshelese ene." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Zwi ḓo nga zwa ngei Horebe musi wa tshivhidzo tshihulu ni tshi humbela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ni tshi ri, ‘A ri tsha kona u thetshelesa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu Muṋe washu, a ri tsha kona u lavhelesa mulilo uyo muhulu, ri ofha u fa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 “Muṋe washu a mphindula a ri, ‘Zwine vha humbela ndi zwone." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndi ḓo vha ṋea muporofita a no nga iwe, Muisraele wa havho. Ndi ḓo vhea maipfi anga mulomoni wawe a ḓo konou vha vhudza zwoṱhe zwine nda mu laedza." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Muthu a sa thetshelesi maipfi anga ane uyo muporofita a ḓo amba nga dzina ḽanga, Nṋe ndi ḓo mu sengisa." 
Deuteronomy18:20 “ ‘Hone muporofita ane a ḓihudza a amba nga dzina ḽanga a tshi porofita zwe nda si mu laedze, kana a porofita nga madzina a midzimu isili, muporofita uyo nga a vhulawe.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Huno arali ni tshi timatima mbiluni na ri, ‘Zwino ri ḓo ḓivha hani uri vhuporofita uho a vhu bvi ha Yahavee?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 ndi ri ni ḓo zwi ḓivha nga u rali: Arali muporofita a tshi bvumba tshithu nga dzina ḽa Yahavee, zwa si bvelele nga u ralo, ndi hone uho vhuporofita vhu tshi ḓo vhonala vhu songo laedzwa nga Yahavee, uyo muthu o sokou ḓihudza a ḓiita muporofita, ni songo mu ofha." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo lozwa tshakha dzine a ni ṋea shango ḽadzo, na vha thatha na dzula miḓini yavho na nḓuni dzavho." 
Deuteronomy19:2 No ralo ni khethe miḓi miraru henefho shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu," 
Deuteronomy19:3 zwino muthu ane a tshenuwa o vhulaha muṅwe u ḓo kona u shavhela kha yeneyo miḓi. Ni khethekanye shango ḽaṋu ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, ḽi vhe zwipiḓa zwiraru, uri muṅwe na muṅwe a kone u swika khayo." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Arali muthu a tshenuwa o vhulaha muṅwe hu si nga khole, e si muthu we a dzula o mu fara nga mbilu, onoyo a nga shavhela miḓini iyo uri a si vhulawe." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Tsumbedzo ngei: Arali vhanna vhavhili vha tshi yo reḓa khuni ḓakani, ha ri muṅwe a tshi imisa tshanḓa uri a reme thanda, mbaḓo ya tshenuwa yo ṱomowa ya rwa uḽa muṅwe a fa; a no nga onoyo a nga shavhela ha muṅwe wa heyo miḓi a si vhulawe." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Arali muḓi u kule, shaka ḽa mufu ḽi re mulifhedzi ḽi nga mu sala murahu ḽa mu fara a sa athu swika, ḽa ri ḽi tshee ḽo sinyuwa, ḽa mu vhulaha a si na mulandu wo eḓanaho lufu, ngauri o vha a songo dzula o fara mufu nga mbilu." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ndi zwine nda ni laya uri ni khethe miḓi miraru. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Huno Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo dovha a engedza shango ḽe a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu, a ni ṋea shango ḽoṱhe ḽe a dzula o amba uri u ḓo ḽi ṋea vhomakhulukuku waṋu" 
Deuteronomy19:9 arali na vhulunga ndayo dzoṱhe dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi na dzi tevhedza, na funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na tevhela nḓila dzawe misi yoṱhe. Zwenezwo ni dovhe ni khethe miṅwe miḓi miraru ni tshi ḓadzisa iḽa ya u thoma." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Ni ite nga u ralo uri hu si vhulawe muthu a si na mulandu shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, ni sa ḓo ḓiovhela mulandu wa u shulula malofha." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Hone arali muthu a tshi dzula o fara muṅwe nga mbilu, a mu lalela a tshi ri a mu vhulahe, nangoho a mu vhulaha, onoyo naho a shavhela kha muṅwe wa yeneyo miḓi," 
Deuteronomy19:12 vhahulwane vha muḓi wa hawe vha fanela u yo mu dzhia henefho vha mu kumedza shaka ḽi re mulifhedzi uri ḽi mu vhulahe. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ni songo mu khathutshela, muthu a no sokou vhulaha muṅwe a si na mulandu tshawe ndi u lozwiwa a si tsha wanala kha Vhaisraele, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Ni songo sudzulusa mikano ya muṅwe; yo dzula yo vhewa nga vha kale uri i sumbe mikovhe ine na wana shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “A zwo ngo tendelwa uri hu ṱanziele muthu muthihi fhedzi khoroni a tshi vhea vhuṱanzi ha vhukhakhi kana vhutshinyi vhufhio na vhufhio; arali muthu o tshinya ni nga ṱanganedza vhuṱanzi arali ṱhanzi dzi mbili kana tharu. 
Deuteronomy19:16 “Arali ha ḓa ṱhanzi mmbi ya pomoka muthu nga u mu zwifhelela i tshi ṱoḓa u mu huvhadza fhedzi," 
Deuteronomy19:17 zwenezwo mupomoki na mupomokwa nga vha yo ima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu thembeleni, vha ime phanḓa ha vhotshifhe na vhahaṱuli vhane ḽa vha diso ḽavho musi uyo," 
Deuteronomy19:18 vhenevho vha ṱoḓisese mafhungo. Arali zwa wanala uri ṱhanzi iyo yo tou zwifhelela uyo muṅwe," 
Deuteronomy19:19 ni i ite zwenezwo zwe ya vha i tshi ṱoḓa u ita uḽa a si na mulandu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi vhu no nga honoho kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Vhathu vha ḓo pfa zwo iteaho, vha ofha, vhuvhi vhungafho ha si tsha itwa kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ni songo khathutshela ṱhanzi iyo, ni lifhedze vhutshilo nga vhutshilo, iṱo nga iṱo, iṋo nga iṋo, tshanḓa nga tshanḓa, mulenzhe nga mulenzhe." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Musi ni tshi bva pfumo ni tshi yo lwa na maswina aṋu, na vhona uri vha na bere na gariki dza nndwa, nahone vha a ni fhira nga u anda, ni songo vha ofha, hufha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu e na inwi, ndi Ene we a ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Musi ni sa athu thoma u lwa, tshifhe u fanela u sendela a amba na vhathu" 
Deuteronomy20:3 a ri, ‘Vhanna vha Israele, thetshelesani! Ṋamusi ni khou ya u dia maswina aṋu; ni songo tshenuwa, ni songo ofha, ni songo vha tetemela, ni songo hanganea ni tshi vha vhona." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u a ni fhelekedza uri a ni lwele a tshi lwa na maswina aṋu, u ḓo ita uri ni kunde.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Ndi hone vhakoma vha tshi fanela u amba na vhathu vha ri, ‘Ndi nnyi fhano ane a kha ḓi bva u fhaṱa nnḓu, hone a sa athu dzula khayo? Kha a humele hayani a sa ḓo fa nndwani nnḓu yawe ya dzhiwa nga muṅwe a dzula khayo." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ndi nnyi ane a kha ḓi bva u lima tsimu ya minḓirivhe, hone a sa athu wana tshifhinga tsha u fula nḓirivhe dzayo? Na ene kha a humele hayani a sa ḓo fa nndwani nḓirivhe dza ḽiwa nga muṅwe." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ndi nnyi ane a kha ḓi bva u dzea musidzana hone a sa athu mu vhinga? Na ene kha a humele hayani a sa ḓo fa nndwani musidzana wawe a dzewa nga muṅwe.’ 
Deuteronomy20:8 Vhakoma vha dovhe vha ambe na vhathu vha ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a ofha kana a tetemela? Na ene kha a humele hayani a sa ḓo ita uri na mbilu dza vhaṅwe dzi ṋoke vha ofhe vhoṱhe.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 “Musi vhakoma vho no fhedza u amba na vhathu, vha fanela u vhea vharangaphanḓa vha mmbi." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Musi ni tshi vho govhela muḓi uri ni lwe nawo ni range u linga u pfumedzana navho. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Arali vha tshi tenda u pfumedzana vha ni vulela khoro, vhadzulapo vhoṱhe vha muḓi vha ḓo vha phuli dzaṋu, ni vha kombetshedze u ni shumela." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Hone arali vha sa tendi u pfumedzana na inwi, vha lwa na inwi, inwi ni vha govhele." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu. Zwenezwo ni fanela u vhulaha vhanna vhoṱhe vha muḓi nga pfumo," 
Deuteronomy20:14 hone vhasadzi na vhana vhaṱuku na zwifuwo na thundu dzoṱhe dzi re muḓini dzine muthu a nga dzhia ni zwi thube, ni ḽe zwe na thubela maswina aṋu nó fhiwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ndi zwone zwine na ḓo ita miḓi yoṱhe i re kule-kule na shango ḽa haṋu, i si miḓi ya Vhakanana havha." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Miḓi ya tshakha idzi ine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri i vhe yaṋu, khayo ni songo litsha tshithu na si vhulahe," 
Deuteronomy20:17 ni fanela u lozwa zwoṱhe ni zwi kumedze Muṋe washu. Ndi Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi; vhenevho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni laedza uri ni vha lozwe," 
Deuteronomy20:18 u itela uri vha si ni funzedze u ita zwithu zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho zwine vhone vha luvha midzimu yavho ngazwo na vho khakhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Arali na lwa na muḓi na u govhela ha fhela maḓuvha manzhi, ni songo rema miri ya iḽo shango kana na i tshinya, hufha ni tshi ḓo sala ni tshi i ḽa, ni songo i rema! Kani-ha miri yo no vha maswina aṋu ni tshi vho ṱoḓa u lwa nayo?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Yeneyo miri ine na ḓivha uri a i ḽiwi, ndi yone fhedzi ine na nga i rema ni tshi itela u fhaṱa maḓingo a u pfula muḓi ni khao na vhuya na kunda uyo muḓi une wa lwa na inwi." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Arali shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu ha wanala muthu o vhulawaho ḓakani, hu si na muthu a no ḓivha uri o vhulawa nga nnyi," 
Deuteronomy21:2 zwenezwo vhahulwane vhaṋu na vhahaṱuli vha fanela u ela tshikhala tsha u bva kha tshitumbu u swika kha miḓi i re henefho tsini," 
Deuteronomy21:3 vhahulwane vha muḓi une wa wanala u wone u re tsini ha tshitumbu vha konou dzhia tholehadzi i sa athu vhewa dzhogo," 
Deuteronomy21:4 vha i isa mulamboni u elaho, hu songo limiwaho, hu songo gobelwaho mbeu, vha i vunḓa mutsinga henefho mulamboni." 
Deuteronomy21:5 “Zwenezwo hu ḓo sendela vhotshifhe, vhone Vhalivi, ngauri ndi vhone vhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a vha nanga uri vha mu shumele thembeleni, na u shudufhadza vhathu nga dzina ḽawe, na u haṱula mafhungo a u pomokana na a u huvhadzana." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha muḓi we tshitumbu tsha wanala tsini hawo vha ḓo ṱamba zwanḓa nṱha ha tholehadzi iyo yo vunḓiwaho mutsinga henefho mulamboni," 
Deuteronomy21:7 vha ṱanzilela vha ri, ‘A si zwanḓa zwashu zwo shululaho malofha aya, na maṱo ashu ho ngo zwi vhona zwi tshi itea.’" 
Deuteronomy21:8 Vha konou rabela vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu, iwe wo ri vhofhololaho, pfumelela lushaka lwau lwa Israele kha malofha a uyu muthu a si na mulandu, u songo ri hwesa mulandu wa malofha aya.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Ngauralo ni ḓo vha no thutha mulandu wa malofha a muthu a songo tshinyaho a si tsha vhilwa kha inwi, ngauri ni ḓo vha no ita zwine zwa takadza Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Arali ni tshi bvela maswina aṋu pfumo, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu, na thuba vhathu," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kha mathubwa ayo wa vhona musadzi o nakaho, wa funana nae wa mu dzea," 
Deuteronomy21:12 u fanela u mu isa hayani hau wa mu palula ṱhoho wa tshea na ṋala dzawe," 
Deuteronomy21:13 wa mu ambadza zwiambaro zwiswa, a ri u fhedza ṅwedzi woṱhe e nḓuni yau a tshi lilela vhabebi vhawe, ha vha hone u tshi ḓo tendelwa u mu vhinga wa mu dzhenisa nḓuni a vha musadzi wau." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Hone arali ngavhuya wa pfa u sa tsha mu takalela, u fanela u mu vhofholola uri a ye hune a funa; u songo mu rengisa kana wa mu ita phuli, ngauri o vha e musadzi wau." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Arali munna e na vhasadzi vhavhili, a tshi funa muṅwe u fhira muṅwe, vhoṱhe vha mu bebela vhana vha vhatukana, hone tanzhe e ṅwana wa musadzi a sa funwiho," 
Deuteronomy21:16 musi a tshi kovha ifa ho ngo tendelwa u ṋea ṅwana wa musadzi mufunwa ifa ḽa tanzhe a ḽi dzhiela ṅwana wa a sa funwi a re ene tanzhe vhukuma. 
Deuteronomy21:17 Onoyo a re tanzhe ḽo fanelaho, naho e ṅwana wa musadzi a sa funwi, u fanela u mu ṋea mikovhe mivhili ya thundu yawe yoṱhe, hufha e ene we a thoma u mu beba, o tewa nga ifa ḽa tanzhe." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Arali muthu e na ṅwana a no nyadza vhabebi a sa thetshelesi vha tshi mu laya, e khundavhalai," 
Deuteronomy21:19 khotsi awe na mme awe nga vha mu dzhie vha mu ise khoroni ha vhahulwane vha muḓi uyo," 
Deuteronomy21:20 vha vhudze vhahulwane vha ri, ‘Uyu ṅwana washu ndi khundavhalai, u a ri nyadza, ha ri thetshelesi, ndi khusha, ndi tshidakwa.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Zwenezwo vhanna vhoṱhe vha uyo muḓi vha fanela u mu kanḓa nga matombo vha mu vhulaha. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi uho ha si tsha pfala kha inwi. Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ḓo zwi pfa vha ofha. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Arali muthu o tshinya lwo eḓanaho lufu, na mu vhulaha nga u mu isa thamboni," 
Deuteronomy21:23 ni songo sia tshitumbu tshawe tsho nembelela murini ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela, ni fanela u mu swiṱa ḓuvha ḽeneḽo, ngauri muthu o nembeledzwaho o teketelwa nga Mudzimu; ni songo kumadza shango ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “U songo ri u tshi vhona kholomo ya muṅwe kana nngu kana mbudzi yó xela wa sokou i litsha; u fanela u i humisela khae. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Arali muṋe wayo a tshi dzula kule, kana arali u sa ḓivhi uri ndi nnyi, u fanela u dzhia tshifuwo itsho wa tshi khadela hayani hau, wa dzula natsho muṋe watsho a vhuya a tshi ṱoḓa, wa konou mu ṋea." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Zwi ḓi nga donngi kana tshiambaro kana thundu iṅwe na iṅwe ya muṅwe yo ngalangalaho, arali u tshi i wana u songo sokou i litsha." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Arali u tshi ṱangana na donngi kana kholomo ya muṅwe yó tsikeledzwa nga muhwalo nḓilani, u songo sokou i litsha, mu farise a i vuse." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Musadzi ha ambari tshiambaro tsha munna, zwi ḓi nga munna a sa ambari tsha musadzi; ane a nga ita hezwo u tou nengisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Arali u tshi wana tshiṱaha tsha tshiṋoni murini kana fhasi mavuni, wa vhona tshiṋoni tshi tshi khou alamela makumba kana tsho fukedza mafhondo, u songo dzhia mme khathihi na makumba;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 litsha mme a fhufhe u konou dzhia mafhondo, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo u nakela wa lalama." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Arali u tshi ḓifhaṱela nnḓu ntswa u fanela u vhiela muṱa u re nṱha ha ṱhanga nga guḓa uri muthu a sa ḓo wela fhasi e nṱha ha ṱhanga, a fa wa ovha mulandu wa malofha awe." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Zwi a ila u gobela thoro tsimuni ya minḓirivhe; arali wa zwi ita, khaṋo ya iyo mbeu khathihi na minḓirivhe i ḓo vha ya thembele." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “U songo pana phulu na donngi nga dzhogo nthihi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “U songo ambara tshiambaro tsho lukwaho nga vhukuse ho vanganaho na muḓali. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “U rungelele zwivhuvhi kha ṱhodzi nṋa dza tshiambaro tshau. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Arali munna a tshi dzea musadzi a mu dzhenisa nḓuni a vho mu nengwa 
Deuteronomy22:14 a thoma u mu tshinya dzina nga u mu pomoka zwi sa ḓivhalei, a ri, ‘Ndo dzea uyu musadzi nda mu dzhenisa nḓuni nda wana a si tshee musidzana wa phorelele,’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 zwenezwo vhabebi vha musadzi vha fanela u bvisa tsumbo ya uri ṅwana wavho o vha a tshee musidzana vha isa tsumbedzo khoroni vha i sumbedza vhahulwane vha muḓi," 
Deuteronomy22:16 khotsi a musadzi a amba na vhahulwane a ri, ‘Ndo ṋea uyu munna ṅwananga uri a vhe musadzi wawe, zwino u vho mu nengwa," 
Deuteronomy22:17 u mu pomoka zwithu zwi sa ḓivhalekani a tshi ri: Ndo wana ṅwana waṋu e si musidzana wa phorelele. Huno tsumbedzo ya uri ṅwananga ndi musidzana khei.’ A tshi ralo a adze sila ḽe vha lala khaḽo vha tshi dzhenisana nḓuni lwa u thoma ya vha tsumbo ya uri uyo ṅwana o vhingwa e musidzana. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Zwo no ralo vhahulwane vha muḓi vha fanela u dzhia uyo munna vha mu rwa nga ṱhamu," 
Deuteronomy22:19 vha dovha vha mu lifhisa maseṱha a ḓana vha a ṋee khotsi a musadzi, ngauri mukwasha o tshinya dzina ḽa musidzana wa phorelele wa Muisraele. Nahone ho ngo tendelwa u mu ṱala vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Hone arali munna o amba ngoho, arali zwo wanala uri musadzi o vha e si musidzana wa phorelele," 
Deuteronomy22:21 u fanela u bviselwa muṋangoni wa nnḓu ya khotsi awe, vhanna vha muḓi wawe vha mu kanḓa nga matombo vha mu vhulaha, ngauri o ita zwi shonisaho Israele, o ita vhupombwe a tshee nḓuni ya khotsi awe. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi uho." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Arali munna a farwa e na musadzi wa muṅwe vha fanela u vhulawa vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi uho kha Vhaisraele. 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Arali munna a tshi ṱangana na musidzana o no dzewaho nga muṅwe, a ṱangana nae muḓini a mu dzhenisa nḓuni," 
Deuteronomy22:24 ni fanela u vha dzhia vhuvhili havho na vha bvisela khoroni ya muḓi na vha kanḓa nga matombo na vha vhulaha. Musidzana ni tshi mu vhulaha ndi uri u ḓo vha a songo ṱavha mukosi, hone zwo itea ngomu muḓini, munna ene ni mu vhulahe ngauri u ḓo vha o tshinya musidzana o no dzewaho nga muṅwe munna. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhelisa vhuvhi uho." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Hone arali munna a tshi ṱangana na musidzana ḓakani a mu tshipa, ngeno uyo musidzana o no dzewa nga muṅwe munna, hu fanela u vhulawa uyo munna o mu tshipaho fhedzi," 
Deuteronomy22:26 musidzana ni songo mu ita tshithu, a hu na tshe a ita tsho eḓanwaho nga lufu; zwe a itwa zwi fana na musi munna o fara muṅwe a mu vhulaha." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Uyo munna o mu wana ḓakani, musidzana uyo o dzewaho nga muṅwe munna o ṱavha mukosi ha si vhe na we a mu lamulela." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Arali munna a tshi ṱangana na musidzana a sa athu fulufhedzisanaho na munna, a mu fara a mu tshipa zwa bvela khagala," 
Deuteronomy22:29 zwenezwo uyo munna o tshipaho musidzana u fanela u lifhela khotsi a musidzana maseṱha a 50 a dzea musidzana. Ho ngo tendelwa u mu ṱala lini na lini, ngauri o mu tshipa." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Hu songo vha na munna ane a nyadzisa khotsi awe nga u ita mmane musadzi. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Munna o luvhedzwaho kana o tumulwaho vhudzimu ha tsha vhalwa na tshivhidzo tsha Muṋe washu. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Muthu o bebiwaho nga khotsi na mme vha re mashaka a tsini ho ngo tendelwa u dzhena tshivhidzoni tsha Muṋe washu, na vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha songo dzhena tshivhidzoni tsha Muṋe washu u vhuya u swika kha murafho wa fumi." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Muamoni kana Mumuaba ha vhalwi na tshivhidzo tsha Muṋe washu; na vhaḓuhulu vhavho a vha vhalwi khatsho lini na lini. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Ndi uri zwiḽa ni nḓilani ni tshi bva Egipita, vhone a vho ngo ni ṱanganedza vha ni ṋea zwiḽiwa na maḓi, tshe vha ita vho tou thola Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro we a vha a tshi dzula Phethoro kha ḽa Misopothamia, vha mu ṋea tshelede uri a ḓe a ni teketele." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o tou sa tenda u ita zwe Biliamu a humbela, a mbo shandukisa mafhanza a vha mashudu, ngauri u a ni funa." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Zwenezwo ni songo vhuya na pfana navho, na u vha tonda ni songo vha tonda lini na lini." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Vhaedomo vhone ni songo vha sanda, ndi mashaka aṋu. Na Vhaegipita ni songo vha sanda, ngauri no vhuya na dzula shangoni ḽavho." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Arali Muedomo kana Muegipita a tshi dzula na inwi, vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha murafho wa vhuraru vha a vhalwa zwavho na tshivhidzo tsha Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Musi ni tshi bvela maswina aṋu pfumo, ni vhone uri ni si ite tshithu tshivhi na tshithihi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Arali muṅwe waṋu o kumala nga u lora a tevhula mbeu ya tsiko vhusiku, u fanela u bva mishashani yaṋu, a songo dzhena khayo." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ḽi ḓo ri ḽi sa athu kovhela, a ṱamba nga maḓi, ḽo no kovhela a konou vhuya." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Ni fanela u vha na fhethu hune na bvela hone, nnḓa ha mishasha, hune na ya hone ni tshi bvela nga nnḓa." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Kha thundu dzaṋu hu vhe na kutanda kwa u bwa. Ni ḓo ri ni tshi bvela nga nnḓa na thoma u bwa kudindi, na ri no fhedza na fukedza." 
Deuteronomy23:14 U vhuya zwa pfalwo ndi uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u na inwi mishashani yaṋu uri a ni lamulele, a kumedze maswina aṋu zwanḓani zwaṋu, ndi zwine mishasha yaṋu ya pfi i vhe mikhethwa; arali Muṋe washu a tshi vhona zwa vhuaḓa mishashani yaṋu, u ḓo ni ṱutshela." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Arali phuli ya shavha muṋe wayo ya swika kha iwe, u songo mu humisela ha muṋe wawe." 
Deuteronomy23:16 A nga ḓi dzula na iwe hune a funa muḓini muṅwe waṋu; u songo mu tambudza. 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Musidzana wa Muisraele a songo vhuya a vha phombwe ya thembeleni, na muṱhannga wa Muisraele a songo ralo." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Na tshelede ye vha wana nga yeneyo nḓila i songo vhuya ya ḓiswa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu uri ni lifhe zwe na mu fulufhedzisa; Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u nengiswa nga zwenezwo zwithu vhuvhili hazwo. 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Arali u tshi adzima Muisraele wa hau zwiṅwe – i nga vha tshelede kana zwiḽiwa kana tshifhio na tshifhio – u songo zwi vhila na mavhoḓa azwo. 
Deuteronomy23:20 Mutsinda u nga mu bvisisa zwawe mavhoḓa, hone Muisraele nga iwe u songo mu bvisisa, ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma shangoni ḽine na khou ya khaḽo uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Arali u tshi fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu tshithu, u songo lenga u tshi bvisa; u ḓo u sengisa wa wanala u na mulandu." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Arali u sa fulufhedzisi Muṋe washu tshithu, a u na mulandu," 
Deuteronomy23:23 hone arali wa bula nga u tou funa hau wa ri u ḓo ṋea Muṋe washu tshiṅwe tshithu, u fanela u khunyeledza zwe wa mu fulufhedzisa." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Arali u tshi dzhena tsimuni ya muṅwe ya minḓirivhe, u nga ḽa wa fura, tenda wa si fulele mufaroni." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Arali u tshi fhira nga tsimuni ya muṅwe ya goroi u nga ḓi ṱhukhula zwau ṱhotshe nga tshanḓa wa ḽa, tenda wa si tou tshea nga segere." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Arali munna a dzea musadzi, musi o no mu vhinga a pfa a si tsha mu takalela, nge a wana zwiṅwe zwi sa takadzi kha uyo musadzi, nga a mu ṋee luṅwalo lwa u ṱalana a mu litshe a ṱuwe." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Musadzi uyo o tendelwa u ṱuwa a dzewa nga muṅwe munna. 
Deuteronomy24:3 Hone arali na uyo munna wa vhuvhili a tshi mu nengwa a mu ṋea luṅwalo lwa u ṱalana nae a mu litsha a ṱuwa, kana uyo munna a lovha," 
Deuteronomy24:4 zwenezwo uḽa munna wawe wa u thoma we a ṱalana nae a songo tsha mu dzea, ngauri o no kumala, zwi ḓo nengisa Muṋe washu. Shango ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea ni songo ḽi hwesa mulandu wa vhutshinyi haṋu!" 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Munna ane a kha ḓi bva u vhinga musadzi a songo bva pfumo, nahone a songo kombetshedzwa u shuma muṅwe mushumo na muthihi. U fanela u vhofhololwa kha zwoṱhe a fhedza ṅwaha woṱhe, a dzula hayani a tshi takadza musadzi wawe we a dzea." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Ni songo ri ni tshi dzhia tsha u farela mulandu kha muthu na dzhia lwala lwawe lwa u kuya, naho i mbwane zwayo; ni ḓo vha no mu dzhiela zwiḽiwa zwawe." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Arali ha wanala muthu ane a thuba Muisraele wa hawe a mu ita phuli yawe kana a mu rengisa, fobvu iḽo ḽi fanela u vhulawa. Bvisani vhuvhi hoho kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Ni sedzese zwine na ita arali no farwa nga vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu kumadzaho. Tevhedzani zwoṱhe zwine Vhalivi, vhone vhotshifhe, vha ni laya vha tshi ni funza zwe nṋe nda vha laya; ni zwi tevhedze zwoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Elelwani zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ita Miriamu musi ni nḓilani ya u pfuluwa Egipita. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Arali muṅwe o pamba tshiṅwe tshithu kha iwe, u songo dzhena nḓuni yawe wa yo dzhia tsha u farela mulandu," 
Deuteronomy24:11 ima nnḓa u lindele muthu we a pamba itsho tshithu kha iwe a vhuya a tshi bvisa a u ṋea. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Arali uyo muthu e mushai, u songo vhuya wa lala wo fara tsha u farela wonoyo mulandu," 
Deuteronomy24:13 ḽi tshi kovhela u tshi humise uri a lale o fuka nguvho yawe, ndi hone a tshi ḓo u shudufhadza, na Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a vhona wo ita zwone." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Arali wo thola muthu wa mushai, a nga vha e Muisraele wa hau kana mutsinda a no dzula shangoni ḽa hau, muḓini wa hau, u songo mu farisa tsha u konḓa." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Mu fhe malamba awe ḓuvha ḽeneḽo, a songo vhuya a lala a songo a wana, ngauri ndi mushai, o fulufhela one; a nga rabela Muṋe washu a u hwelela, wa wanala u na mulandu." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Vhokhotsi vha songo fela mulandu wa vhana vhavho, zwi ḓi nga vhana, vha songo fela mulandu wa vhokhotsi; muṅwe na muṅwe nga a fele vhutshinyi hawe ene muṋe." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Ni songo kundisa mutsinda na tsiwana u wana pfanelo dzavho; ni songo dzhia nguvho ya tshilikadzi na farela mulandu ngayo. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Elelwani uri na inwi no vha ni dziphuli Egipita, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni vhofholola henefho, ndi zwine nda ni laya uri na inwi ni tonde vhaheḓana." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Arali ni tshi kaṋa goroi na sia khaṱha masimuni, ni songo ri ni tshi vho i humbula na huma na yo i dzhia, nga i dzhiwe nga mutsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi, ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo ni shudufhadza kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ni songo ri no no kulula miolivi yaṋu na huma na dovha u yo ṱoḓa nyolivi khayo, kha dzi ḽiwe nga vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Musi no fula nḓirivhe tsimuni yaṋu, ni songo huma na dovha u yo ṱala ṱhalane khayo, kha dzi ḽiwe nga vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Elelwani uri na inwi no vha ni phuli kha ḽa Egipita, ndi zwine nda ni laya u tonda vhaheḓana nga u ralo." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Arali vhanna vhavhili vha tshi isa mafhungo khoroni, a senguluswa, a si na mulandu a vhonwa a si na mulandu, a na mulandu a vhewa mulandu," 
Deuteronomy25:2 ha wanala o fanelwa nga ṱhamu, muhaṱuli u fanela u mu shuvhamisa, a ri a rwiwe ṱhamu dzo eḓanaho vhutshinyi hawe." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ni songo mu rwa ṱhamu dzi fhiraho 40, ni sa ḓo kalula ha vha u nyadzisa Muisraele wa haṋu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Phulu i no khou fhula ni songo i vhofha mulomo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Arali vhanna vhavhili vhana vha munna vha tshi dzula vhoṱhe, muṅwe wavho a fa a si na ṅwana wa mutuka, tshilikadzi ya mufu i songo dzhiwa nga muṅwe munna wa thungo, murathu nga mu dzee a ite pfanelo dzawe a bebele mukomana wawe vhana." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ṅwana wa tanzhe wa mutuka ane uyo musadzi a mu beba u fanela u vhidzwa nga dzina ḽa mufu uri dzina ḽawe ḽi sa ḓo fa ḽa si tsha pfala kha Vhaisraele. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Arali uyo munna a tshi landula musadzi wa mufu, uyo musadzi nga a ye khoroni ha vhahulwane a vha vhudze a ri, ‘Murathu wa munna wanga o hana u vusa dzina ḽa mukomana wawe kha Vhaisraele, ha tendi u nnzea.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ndi hone vhahulwane vha muḓi wawe vha tshi fanela u vhidza uḽa munna vha amba nae. Arali a tshi ḓi futelela a ri, ‘A thi tendi u mu dzea,’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 musadzi wa mukomana wawe u fanela u sendela khae vhahulwane vha tshi zwi vhona, a mu bvula thovho a mu pfela mare khofheni a ri, ‘Khezwo zwine zwa itwa munna a sa tendi u fhaṱa muṱa wa mukomana wawe.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 U bva zwenezwo Vhaisraele vha fanela u rina muṱa wawe ḽa u ri, ‘Muṱa wa Mubvulwathovho’!" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Arali vhanna vhavhili vha tshi khou lwa, musadzi wa muṅwe a phalala munna wawe a fara uḽa munna a khou lwaho nae nga vhudzimu," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ni fanela u mu tumula tshanḓa, ni songo mu khathutshela." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “U songo fhura vhathu u tshi kala, wa vha na matombo mavhili a sa eḓani," 
Deuteronomy25:14 kana wa vha fhura u tshi ela, wa vha na mielo mivhili nḓuni yau;" 
Deuteronomy25:15 matombo a u kala na mielo ya u ela nga zwi vhe zwo fanelaho zwi no eḓana, ndi hone u tshi ḓo lalama u shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Muṋe washu Mudzimu u nengwa vhoṱhe vha no fhura vhaṅwe. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Elelwani zwe Vhaamaleke vha ni ita musi ni tshi pfuluwa Egipita ni nḓilani," 
Deuteronomy25:18 zwiḽa vha tshi ni ḓa nga murahu vha ni dia musi no neta nga lwendo ni si tshee na nungo, vha vhulaha vhoṱhe vho salaho murahu, vha si vhuye vha ofha Mudzimu." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Zwenezwo musi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o no ni kundela maswina aṋu oṱhe thungo dzoṱhe, na dzula shangoni ḽine a ni ṋea uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, na dzula ni sa ofhi tshithu, ni fanela u lozwa Vhaamaleke vha si tsha humbulwa fhano fhasi ha lutombo. Ni songo vhuya na zwi hangwa." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Musi ni tshi swika shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, na dzula khaḽo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 ni fanela u dzhia zwiranzhe zwoṱhe zwa zwine na kaṋa shangoni ḽaṋu ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, na zwi vhea tshirunduni, na ya fhethu hune Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a khethela dzina ḽawe," 
Deuteronomy26:3 na swika ha tshifhe ane ḽa ḓo vha ḽi diso ḽawe heḽo ḓuvha na mu vhudza na ri, ‘Ndi khou bula ṋamusi phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau uri ndo dzhena shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku washu uri u ḓo ri ṋea.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Ndi hone tshifhe a tshi fanela u dzhia tshirundu kha iwe a tshi vhea fhasi phanḓa ha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu," 
Deuteronomy26:5 iwe wa konou bula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu wa ri, ‘Khotsi anga o vha e Muaramu a tendelekaho na shango. Vha tsela Egipita vhe vhathu vha si gathi vha dzula hone vha vhuya vha vha lushaka luhulu lwa maanḓa a sa konadzei." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Ndi hone Vhaegipita vha tshi ri itela tshiṱuhu vha tou ri kandeledza vha ri shumisa mushumo u lemelaho. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Riṋe ra ṱavhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku washu mukosi, a ri pfa, a vhona u tambula hashu na u shengela hashu na u kandeledzwa hashu," 
Deuteronomy26:8 Muṋe washu a ri pfulusa Egipita nga maanḓa mahulu a sa konadzei na nga mishumo mihulu i ofhisaho na nga zwiga na maḓembe," 
Deuteronomy26:9 a ri ḓisa fhano a ri ṋea shango heḽino, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Zwino-ha nṋe ndo ḓisa zwiranzhe zwa zwe nda kaṋa masimuni khezwi, ndi zwe Muṋe washu a nṋea.’ Wo no ralo wa konou zwi vhea phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau wa mu gwadamela wa mu luvha," 
Deuteronomy26:11 wa ḓiphiṋa nga zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau a ṋea muṱa wau – iwe na Vhalivi vhane wa dzula navho. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Misi yoṱhe hó fhela miṅwaha miraru musi u tshi bvisa tshafumi tsha zwoṱhe zwe wa kaṋa, u ḓo zwi ṋea Vhalivi na vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi uri vha kone u ḽa-vho miṱani yaṋu vha fure." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Zwenezwo u ḓo fanela u bula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu wa ri, ‘Ndo dzhia zwoṱhe zwo khethelwaho Muṋe washu muṱani wanga nda zwi kovhela Vhalivi na vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi ndi tshi khunyeledza ndaela dzau dzoṱhe dze wa nndaya, a hu na na ndaela ye nda pfuka kana nda i hangwa." 
Deuteronomy26:14 A tho ngo ḽa tshafumi ndi tshi khou lila mufu, a tho ngo zwi bvisa muṱani wanga ndó kumala, a tho ngo zwi ṋekedza midzimu ya vho faho, ndo thetshelesa zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga a amba, ndo tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe a nndaya." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Zwino-ha, edzou nndavhelesa u ṱaḓulu vhudzuloni hau vhukhethwa, u shudufhadze lushaka lwau lwa Israele na shango ḽe wa ri ṋea unga wo fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku washu, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi!’ ”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi ri, “Ṋamusi ḽino Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u khou ni laya uri ni tevhedze milayo hei yoṱhe na ndaela idzi dzoṱhe, ni dzi vhulunge ni dzi khunyeledze nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Ṋamusi no bula na ri Yahavee ndi Ene Mudzimu waṋu, na ri ni ḓo tshimbila nḓilani dzawe, na vhulunga milayo yawe na ndayo dzawe na ndaela dzawe, na thetshelesa zwine a amba." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Muṋe washu Ene a bula uri ni ḓo vha lushaka lwawe vhukuma unga o ni vhudza, a ri ni vhulunge milayo yawe yoṱhe," 
Deuteronomy26:19 a ri u ḓo ni ṋea vhuhulwane na fhira tshakha dzoṱhe, na khoḓwa, na vha na bvumo na vhugala, na vha lushaka lukhethwa lwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu unga o ni fulufhedzisa.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mushe a ima phanḓa ha vhathu e na vhahulwane vha Israele, a ri, “Vhulungani milayo yoṱhe ine nda ni laya ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Musi ni tshi wela Jorodani na wetshela shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, ni imise matombo mahulwane ni a hulunge nga galaga." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Musi ni tshi wetshela shangoni ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi, unga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu o ni fulufhedzisa, ni ṅwale maipfi oṱhe a mulayo uyu kha eneo matombo."
