Deuteronomy27:4 Musi ni tshi vho wela Jorodani, ni imise matombo aya ane nda ni laedza ṋamusi thavhani ya Ebala ni a hulunge nga galaga," 
Deuteronomy27:5 henefho ni fhaṱele Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu aḽiṱari ya matombo. A songo vhaḓwa nga tsimbi," 
Deuteronomy27:6 ni fhaṱe aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga matombo a songo vhaḓwaho, ni konou mu ṋekedza nduvho dzi fhiswaho khayo." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Ni dovhe ni ṱhavhe na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu, ni konou ḽa no takala henefho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Kha ayo matombo ni ṅwale maipfi oṱhe a mulayo uyu nga maḽeḓere ane muṅwe na muṅwe a kona u a vhala.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Ndi hone Mushe khathihi na Vhalivi, vhone vhotshifhe, vha tshi amba na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ri, “Vhaisraele, ni tshete ni thetshelese! Ṋamusi ḽino no vha lushaka lwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Thetshelesani-ha zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba ni thetshelese milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi!” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Ḽeneḽo ḓuvha Mushe a laya Vhaisraele a ri," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Musi no wela Jorodani, matsinde a Simioni na Livi na Juda na Isakhara na Josefa na Benyamini vha ime nṱha ha thavha ya Gerisimu vha shudufhadze lushaka." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Ashere na Zebuloni na Dani na Nafuthali vha ime nṱha ha thavha ya Ebala vha bule maipfi a u teketela lushaka. 
Deuteronomy27:14 “Vhalivi vha ambe nga ipfi ḽihulu vha vhudze vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha ri: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu ane a ita zwa tshiphiri a vhaḓa tshifanyiso tsha mudzimu kana a tou tshi fula. Muṋe washu o zwi nengwa, ndi mushumo wa zwanḓa zwa muthu!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu ane a nyala khotsi awe kana mme awe!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu ane a sudzulusa mikano ya muṅwe!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no pambusa bofu nḓilani!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu ane a kundisa mutsinda kana tsiwana kana tshilikadzi u wana zwo mu fanelaho!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu ane a dzhenisa mmane musadzi wa khotsi awe nḓuni, zwi fana na musi o vhonela khotsi!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no ita phukha musadzi!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no dzhenisa khaladzi awe ṅwana wa khotsi kana ṅwana wa mme nḓuni!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no dzhenisa makhulu mme a musadzi nḓuni!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no vhulaha muṅwe nga tshiphiri!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a no ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni tsha u vhulaha muthu a si na mulandu!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Muṋe washu u teketela muthu a sa vhulungi maipfi oṱhe a mulayo uyu, a sa a tevhedzi!’ “Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindule vha ri, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Arali ni tshi thetshelesa zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba, na zwi vhulunga na tevhedza milayo yoṱhe ine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo ni hulisa na fhira tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ni ḓo wana mashudu haya oṱhe a vha aṋu, ngauri no thetshelesa zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Ni ḓo vha na mashudu muḓini na masimuni. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Ni ḓo vha na mashudu na vha na vhana, na kaṋa zwinzhi, ha si vhe na kholomo kana mbudzi kana nngu i sa dzwali." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Ni ḓo vha na mashudu kha tshirundu tsha u kaṋa na kha khali ya u bika. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Ni ḓo vha na mashudu hoṱhe hune na kanda. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Maswina aṋu ane a ḓa u ni dia, Muṋe washu u ḓo a kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu. Vha ḓo ni dia vho rwa muduba muthihi, hone vha tshi vho shavha vha balangana vha shavhela thungo dzoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓisa mashudu maḓuluni aṋu na kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma, a ni shudufhadza shangoni ḽine a ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Arali ni tshi vhulunga milayo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na tevhedza nḓila dzawe, u ḓo khwaṱhisa zwe a ni fulufhedzisa, na vha lushaka lwawe lukhethwa," 
Deuteronomy28:10 tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dza vhona uri ni vhidzwa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, dza ni ofha." 
Deuteronomy28:11 “Muṋe washu u ḓo ni ṋea vhana vhanzhi vha sa vhalei na zwifuwo zwi sa vhalei na khaṋo i si na vhukono shangoni ḽe a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu uri u ḓo ni ṋea ḽone. 
Deuteronomy28:12 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni vulela ḽiṱaḓulu, tshone tshisiku tshawe tsha zwivhuya, a nisela shango mvula nga tshifhinga tsho teaho, a shudufhadza mishumo yaṋu yoṱhe, tshakha nnzhi dza pamba kha inwi, inwi ni si lile u pamba kha muthu." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Arali ni tshi pfa milayo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ni sa i pfuki, ni sa pambutsheli tshauḽa kana tshamonde, ni sa gidimi murahu ha midzimu isili na i luvha, zwenezwo Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri ni vhe ṱhoho ya dzitshakha ni si vhe mutshila wadzo, na dzula ni nṱha hu si fhasi." 
Deuteronomy28:14  
Deuteronomy28:15 “Hone arali na sa thetshelesa zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba, na si tevhedze milayo yawe yoṱhe na ndaela dzine nda ni laya ṋamusi, ni ḓo welwa nga khombo idzi dzoṱhe dza tou ni sala murahu." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni teketela muḓini na masimuni. 
Deuteronomy28:17 U ḓo teketela tshirundu tshaṋu tsha u kaṋa na khali ya u bika. 
Deuteronomy28:18 U ḓo teketela vhana vhane na vha beba na zwine na gobela na ṋamana na mbudzana na ngwana. 
Deuteronomy28:19 U ḓo ni teketela hoṱhe hune na kanda. 
Deuteronomy28:20 U ḓo ni ḓisela mafhanza, zwoṱhe zwine na shuma na zwine na linga zwa pfuvha na hanganea, na vhuya na lovha tshoṱhe kathihi fhedzi, nga mulandu wa vhuvhi he na ita ni tshi furalela Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy28:21 “Muṋe washu u ḓo ni ḓisela malwadze a tou ni nambatela a vhuya a ni fhedza tshoṱhe na si tsha wanala henefho shangoni ḽine na khou ya u ḽi dzhia uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu. 
Deuteronomy28:22 U ḓo ni rwa nga u ni tsikisa nga mahothi, na ḽiwa nga zwiṱhavhi na nga dali, a ni fhisa nga ḓuvha a ni rambela pfumo, a ni rwa nga phori na vhuri; zwi ḓo ni sala murahu na vhuya na lovha tshoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Lutombo lu ḓo oma lwe kwatsha, mavu aṋu a ḓo tou te unga tsimbi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri hu si tsha na mvula, na niwa nga buse na midziru na vhuya na lovha tshoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri ni kundwe nga maswina aṋu; ni tshi vha bvela pfumo ni ḓo bva no rwa muduba muthihi, ni tshi vho vha shavha na balangana na shavhela thungo dzoṱhe. Mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi vha ḓo tetemela vha tshi vhona khombo dzo ni welaho." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Zwitumbu zwaṋu zwi ḓo ḽiwa nga maṋoni na phukha dza ḓaka hu si vhe na a zwi shushaho. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni rwa nga zwilonda zwa Egipita na nga zwitshimbili kha maraho, na mapundu na phaḓi zwi sa lafhei." 
Deuteronomy28:28 U ḓo ni dzhenisa tshipengo, na pofula na ṱangana ṱhoho." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Ni ḓo phuphudzika masiari tshivhangalala unga bofu ḽi swiswini. A ni tsha ḓo nakelwa nga tshithu. Ni ḓo dzula ni tshi kandeledzwa, na ṱangulwa hu si vhe na mulamukisi." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Ni ḓo dzea musidzana a tshipiwa nga muṅwe, na fhaṱa nnḓu na si dzule khadzo, na lima masimu a minḓirivhe na si vhuye na thetshela mitshelo yao." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kholomo dzaṋu dzi ḓo ṱhavhiwa nga vhaṅwe na sokou lavhelesa, na thango ya ṋama na si i fhiwe. Ni ḓo dzhielwa donngi dzaṋu na si tsha dovha na dzi vhona. Nngu na mbudzi dzi ḓo dzhiwa dza ṋewa maswina aṋu dza si tsha vhuiswa." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Vhana vhaṋu vha ḓo dzhiwa vha fhiwa dziṅwe tshakha, na lavhelesa nḓila ine vha nga vhuya ngayo maṱo a vhuya a neta, zwi si farise tshithu." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Zwe na lima na zwoṱhe zwe na shuma na ḓinetisa zwi ḓo ḽiwa nga lushaka lune na si lu ḓivhe, maḓuvha oṱhe na sokou dzula ni tshi kandeledzwa na u tambudzwa" 
Deuteronomy28:34 na vhuya na penga tshoṱhe nga mulandu wa dambudzo ḽe na vhona. 
Deuteronomy28:35 “Muṋe washu u ḓo ni rwa nga zwilonda zwi vhavhaho zwa bva magonani na tswaroni, zwa tou phapha u bva ṋayoni u swika ṱhohoni, na kundwa mulafhi." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Muṋe washu u ḓo dzhia inwi na khosi yaṋu ine na nga ḓivhetshela a ni isa shangoni ḽa kule ḽa lushaka lune na si lu ḓivhe, na vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha songo vhuya vha lu ḓivha, henefho na shumela midzimu isili yo vhaḓwaho nga thanda na tombo." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Henefho tshakha dzoṱhe dzine Muṋe washu a ḓo ni balanganya nadzo dzi ḓo semana dza goḓana nga dzina ḽaṋu. 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Ni ḓo gobela mbeu nnzhi na kaṋa zwiṱuku, ngauri zwi ḓo ḽiwa nga magerere." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ni ḓo lima masimu a minḓirivhe na i ṱahulela, hone na si nwe waini yayo kana na ḽa nḓirivhe, i ḓo ḽiwa nga zwivhungu." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ni ḓo vha na miolivi i si na mbalo mashangoni aṋu oṱhe, hone mapfura ayo ni nga si a wane, nyolivi dzi ḓo moḓa dzi sa athu vhibva." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Ni ḓo beba vhana, hone vha nga si vhe vhaṋu, vha ḓo thubelwa mashangoni a kule." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Miri yaṋu yoṱhe na mavhele oṱhe zwi ḓo sala zwi tshi ḽiwa nga zwikhokhonono. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Vhatsinda vha no dzula shangoni ḽaṋu vha ḓo ḓi vha na maanḓa vha tshi ya, inwi na ḓi fhela maanḓa ni tshi ya." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Vha ḓo ni adzima tshelede, hone inwi na si vha adzime tshithu; vhone vha ḓo vha ṱhoho, inwi na vha vhalanda." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Khombo hedzo dzoṱhe dzi ḓo ni wela dza tou ni sala murahu dza ni fara na vhuya na lovha tshoṱhe arali ni sa thetshelesi zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba, ni sa vhulungi milayo yawe na ndaela dzine a ni laya." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Nga dzi vhe tshiga tsha u ni eletshedza uri ni vhe na nzhele misi yoṱhe, inwi na vhana vhaṋu." 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Arali ni sa shumeli Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga dakalo na mbilu tshena nga u vhona zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a ni ṋea," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ni ḓo shumela maswina ane Muṋe washu a ni rambela, na vha shumela ni tshi tambula nga nḓala na ḓora na tsiku na vhushai, vha ni hwesa dzhogo ya tsimbi muṱanani vha vhuya vha ni lozwa tshoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni rambela lushaka lu no bva kule-kule vhusendekamisi lwa ni zhuvhula unga goni. Ndi lushaka lune na sa ḓivhe luambo lwalwo," 
Deuteronomy28:50 lushaka lwa tshiṱuhu lu sa khathutsheli na mukalaha, na muṱhannga a vha mu pfeli vhuṱungu." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Vha ḓo ḽa ṋamana dzoṱhe na zwoṱhe zwe na lima vha vhuya vha ni lozwa; a vha nga ni sieli goroi kana waini kana mapfura a muolivi kana ṋamana kana ngwana kana kubudzana, vha ḓo ni ṱangula tshoṱhe na fa nga nḓala." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Vha ḓo govhela miḓi yaṋu yoṱhe vha ni valela ngomu, vha vhuya vha thutha mitsheṱo yayo milapfu yo khwaṱhiswaho ine na ḓitika ngayo, vha ni valela miḓini yaṋu yoṱhe shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḽa ṋama ya vhana vhaṋu vhe na vha beba vhe na ṋewa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, musi maswina a tshi ni govhela a ni tambudza nga nḓala." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Na munna wa muḓivhalea wa vhudele vhuhulu u ḓo ḽa a dzima murathu wawe na musadzi ane a mu funa na vhana vhawe vho salaho," 
Deuteronomy28:55 ṋama ya vhana vhawe vhane a vha ḽa a si kovhekane navho, nga u vhona uri a nga si fure. Ndi zwenezwo zwine zwa ḓo itea musi maswina aṋu a tshi ni govhela na tambula nga nḓala miḓini yaṋu yoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Na musadzi wa muḓivhalea wa ludzula na vhudele vhuhulu, a tataho na u kanda fhasi, u ḓo ḽa a dzima munna wawe ane a mu funa na vhana vhawe," 
Deuteronomy28:57 ṅwana wawe we a mu beba khathihi na shapho ḽawe a zwi ḽa tshiphirini. Ndi zwone zwine na ḓo ita musi maswina aṋu o ni govhela miḓini yaṋu yoṱhe a ni tambudza nga nḓala. 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ni vhone-ha uri ni vhulunge maipfi oṱhe a mulayo hoyu o ṅwalwaho kha bugu iyi, ni hulise dzina ḽi huliseaho ḽi ofhisaho ḽine ḽa pfi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Deuteronomy28:59 Na sa ralo Muṋe washu u ḓo ni ḓisela khombo khulu dzi ofhisaho dzi sa gumi, na malwadze a ofhisaho a sa gumi, inwi na vhana vhaṋu." 
Deuteronomy28:60 U ḓo ni ḓisela malwadze oṱhe a Egipita ane na a ofha, a tou ni nambatela," 
Deuteronomy28:61 a dovha a ḓisa na maṅwe malwadze oṱhe a songo ṅwaliwaho kha bugu iyi na khombo dzoṱhe dzi songo ṅwaliwaho khayo, na vhuya na lovha ngao." 
Deuteronomy28:62 No vha no anda unga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni, hone nge na si thetshelese zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba, hu ḓo sala vha si gathi." 
Deuteronomy28:63 “Unga u thomani Muṋe washu o takalela u ni tonda na u ni andisa, u vho ḓo takalela u ni lozwa zwino, a tou ni tupula shangoni ḽine na khou ya khaḽo u ḽi dzhia uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Muṋe washu u ḓo ni balanganya na dzitshakha u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi, henefho na ḓo konou shumela midzimu isili ye inwi na vhomakhulukuku waṋu na vha ni sa i ḓivhi, zwithu zwo vhaḓwaho nga thanda na tombo." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Henefho mashangoni a tshakha idzo Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri ni si tendelwe u awela, ni ḓo tou tendeleka naḽo, ngauri Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri ni dzule ni tshi ofha, ni swiswini ḽihulu, nó hanganea." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ni ḓo dzula no livhana na lufu, na dzula ni tshi ofha vhusiku na masiari, hu si na ho khudaho." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ḽi tshi tsha ni ḓo ri, ‘Ḽi ḓo kovhela lini?’ Ḽó no kovhela na ri, ‘Ḽi ḓo tsha lini?’ nga nyofho na nga zwi ofhisaho zwine na ḓo vhona." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Zwi ḓo swika hune Muṋe washu a ḓo ni humisela Egipita nga zwikepe, naho ndo ni vhudza nda ri ni nga si tsha hu vhona, henefho na linga u ḓivhambadza kha maswina aṋu ni vhe dziphuli, hu si vhe na ane a ni renga.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Musi Vhaisraele vhe Muaba, Muṋe washu o vhudza Mushe uri a dovhe a vhofhe mulanga navho, u vhe wa u ḓadzisa mulanga we a vhofha navho Horebe. Mafhungo a mulanga wonoyo khea:" 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mushe a kuvhanganya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a vha vhudza a ri, “No vhona nga aṋu maṱo zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ita shangoni ḽa Egipita a tshi rwa Farao na vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe na shango ḽawe ḽoṱhe –" 
Deuteronomy29:3 mabulayo e na vhona nga maṱo aṋu, na zwiga na maḓembe mahulu." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Naho zwo ralo, Muṋe washu ha athu ni ṋea ṱhalukanyo na maṱo a u vhona na nḓevhe dza u pfa, na ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy29:5 U ri, ‘Ndo ni endedza phangani miṅwaha hei yoṱhe ya 40; zwiambaro zwaṋu a zwo ngo ṱahala, na thovho dzaṋu a dzo ngo fhelela." 
Deuteronomy29:6 No vha ni sa ḽi vhurotho, na waini na halwa ni sa nwi, u itela uri ni kone u ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu.’" 
Deuteronomy29:7 Musi ni tshi swika fhano, Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni na Ogo khosi ya Bashani vho ri bvela pfumo vha tshi ri vha ḓo ri dia, riṋe ra vha kunda," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ra dzhia mashango avho ra a kovhela matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na iṅwe hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. 
Deuteronomy29:9 Vhulungani-ha milayo ya mulanga uyu ni i tevhedze, ndi hone zwoṱhe zwine na ita zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Ṋamusi no ima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. Noṱhe ni fhano: vharangaphanḓa, matsinde oṱhe, vhahulwane, vhakoma – vhoṱhe vha re Vhaisraele," 
Deuteronomy29:11 khathihi na vhana vhaṋu na vhasadzi na vhatsinda vhane na dzula navho, vhareḓi vha khuni na vhaki vha maḓi, vhoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Ni fhano uri noṱhe ni vhe na mukovhe kha mulanga wa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu une a vhofha na inwi ṋamusi nga muano. 
Deuteronomy29:13 Ṋamusi u ni ita lushaka lwawe, Ene u ḓo vha Mudzimu waṋu unga o ni vhudza, unga o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Nahone a si inwi ni noṱhe fhedzi vhane nda vhofha mulanga uyu navho une Muṋe washu a tou u anela, ndi u vhofha na vhane ra vha navho fhano he ra ima hone phanḓa ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu, khathihi na vhaḓuhulu vhashu vhane ra si vhe navho ṋamusi. Vhoṱhe vha vhoxwa nga mulanga uyu, vhoṱhe vha ḓo teketelwa arali vha u vhofholola." 
Deuteronomy29:15  
Deuteronomy29:16 “Ni a zwi ḓivha inwi vhaṋe uri Egipita ro vha ri tshi dzula hani na uri ro fhira hani vhukati ha mashango a dziṅwe tshakha ri tshi ḓa fhano. 
Deuteronomy29:17 No vhona midzimu yavho i nengisaho ya dzitshika yo itwaho nga thanda na tombo na siliva na musuku. 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ni vhone uri hu si vhe na muṅwe waṋu, kana ndi munna kana ndi musadzi kana ndi muṱa kana ndi tsinde ḽoṱhe, a re fhano ṋamusi ane a furalela Mudzimu Muṋe washu a yo luvha midzimu ya tshakha idzo. Ene u ḓo nga mudzi une wa mela wa vha tshimela tsha mulimo u kalakataho kha inwi." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Musi hu tshi bulwa maipfi a u teketela muthu a no vhofholola mulanga, onoyo a nga ḓi amba mbiluni a ri, ‘Nṋe zwi nga si nngwele, naho nda tshila ndi tshi tevhedza zwine nda funzedzwa nga tshipimbi tshanga!’ U ralo hu ḓo vha u ṱulela vhavhi na vhavhuya khombo." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Muṋe washu a nga si tende u hangwela onoyo muthu, mbiti dzawe dzi ḓo dzula dzi tshi mu dugela; u ḓo mu sinyutshela a mu shululela mafhanza oṱhe o ṅwalwaho kha bugu iyi. Muṋe washu u ḓo thutha dzina ḽa uyo muthu ḽa si tsha pfala fhasi ha lutombo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Muṋe washu u ḓo mu khethela thungo ha maṅwe matsinde a Israele uri a mu rwe nga khombo dzoṱhe dzo ṅwalwaho buguni iyi dzine dza pfi dzi ḓo wela muthu a no vhofholola mulanga. 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Musi vhana vhaṋu na vhaḓuhulu na vhatsinda vha no bva mashangoni a kule vha tshi vhona khombo dzo welaho shango iḽi, na malwadze e Muṋe washu a ḽi ḓisela, vha ḓo ri," 
Deuteronomy29:23 ‘Shango ḽoṱhe ḽo swa, ho sala tsevhela na muṋo, a ḽi tsha limea, a hu tsha mela na muri na muthihi, zwi fana na zwiḽa Muṋe washu a tshi phusukanya Sodoma na Gomora na Adama na Tseboimi, miḓi ye a i phusukanya ó sinyuwa mbiti dzawe dzi tshi duga.’" 
Deuteronomy29:24 “Ndi hone tshakha dzoṱhe dzi tshi ḓo vhudzisa dza ri, ‘Ndi mini Yahavee o ita shango heḽi zwithu izwi? Khezwi o ḽi sinyutshela zwingafhangafha?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Phindulo ya ḓo konou ri, ‘Ndi nge vha vhofholola mulanga wa Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku wavho – uḽa mulanga we a vhofha navho musi a tshi vha pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Vho ya vha shumela midzimu isili vha i gwadamela – midzimu isili ye vha vha vha sa i ḓivhi kale, midzimu ye Yahavee a vha a songo vha tendela u i luvha." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ndi zwe Yahavee a sinyutshela shango iḽi a ḽi rambela khombo dzoṱhe dzo ṅwalwaho buguni iyi," 
Deuteronomy29:28 ndi zwe a vha sinyutshela nga mbiti khulu a tou vha tupula shangoni ḽavho a vha posa shangoni ḽisili, unga na ṋamusi ni tshi khou vhona zwo ralo.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Muṋe washu Ene muṋe u ḓivha zwe a dzula o vhofha tshiphirini, hone o dzumbululela riṋe na vhana vhashu zwine a funa ri tshi zwi ita lini na lini: Tshashu ndi u tevhedza zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho mulayoni uyu." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Asizwo-ha, ndo vhea mashudu na khombo phanḓa haṋu. Zwino arali na sala ni tshi khetha khombo na welwa nga zwoṱhe hezwo zwe nda ni vhudza, na ri ní henengei tshakhani dzine Muṋe washu a ḓo vha o ni balanganya nadzo, na dzivhuluwa" 
Deuteronomy30:2 na vhuelela ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na vho thetshelesa zwe a amba, zwenezwi zwine nda ni laya ṋamusi, inwi na vhana vhaṋu na vho mu pfa nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone," 
Deuteronomy30:3 ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo ita uri zwi dovhe zwi ni nakele, a ni khathutshela, a ni vhuisa ni tshi bva tshakhani dzoṱhe dzine a ḓo vha o ni balanganya nadzo." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Nangwe na thathelwa vhusendekamisi, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni dzhia henengei a ni kuvhanganya a ni vhuisa." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni vhuedzedza shango ḽe ḽa vha ḽi ḽa vhomakhulukuku waṋu ḽa dovha ḽa vha ḽaṋu, a ni tonda a ni andisa u fhira na vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 “Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo fumbisa mbilu dzaṋu na dza vhana vhaṋu uri ni kone u mu funa nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone, na tshila," 
Deuteronomy30:7 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a konou ita uri khombo idzi dzoṱhe dzine nda dzi amba dzi wele maswina aṋu na vha ni vhengaho vhe vha ni sala murahu. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Huno inwi ni ḓo rembuluwa, na pfa zwine Muṋe washu a amba, na tevhedza ndaela idzi dzoṱhe dza Muṋe washu dzine nṋe nda ni laya ṋamusi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi ḓo ita uri ni vhuelwe nga zwinzhi kha zwoṱhe zwine na shuma, ni vhe na vhana vhanzhi, na zwifuwo zwi ande, na zwiliṅwa, zwoṱhe zwi ni nakele; Muṋe washu u ḓo dovha a takalela u ni tonda unga o takalela vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Inwi tshaṋu nga hu vhe u vhuelela ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone, na u thetshelesa zwine a ni vhudza na u vhulunga milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe dzo ṅwalwaho buguni iyi ya mulanga." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ndayo iyi ine nda ni laya ṋamusi a ni kundwi u i tevhedza; a i kulesa na inwi; 
Deuteronomy30:12 a i ṱoḓiwi ngei makoleni zwine na nga ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a nga gonya ṱaḓulu a yo ri dzhiela yone uri ri i pfe ri i tevhedze?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 A i wanali ngei kule seli ha lwanzhe zwine na nga amba na ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a nga wela seli ha lwanzhe a ri dzhiela yone, ra i pfa ra i tevhedza?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ipfi ḽi tsini-tsini na inwi, no no ḽi dzhenisa mbiluni, ni a kona u ḽi bula, hone ni fanela u ḽi tevhedza." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Asizwo-ha, ṋamusi ndo vhea zwivhili phanḓa haṋu. Ndo vhea vhutshilo na zwivhuya, nda dovha nda vhea lufu na zwivhi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Arali ni tshi funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu unga ndi tshi ni laya ṋamusi, na tevhela nḓila dzawe na vhulunga milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe na ndayo dzawe, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila, na anda, Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni shudufhadza shangoni ḽine na khou ya khaḽo uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Hone arali ni tshi furalela Muṋe washu na si tsha mu thetshelesa, na tenda u fhuriwa na yo luvha midzimu isili na shumela yone –" 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndi khou ni vhudza ṋamusi ndi ri: Vhukuma ni ḓo lovha, a ni nga vhuyi na fhedza miṅwaha ni shangoni ḽine na khou wetshela khaḽo ni tshi wela Jorodani ni tshi ri ni yo ḽi dzhia ḽi vhe ḽaṋu." 
Deuteronomy30:19 “Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi ndi ṱhanzi dzanga ṋamusi: Ndo vhea vhutshilo na lufu phanḓa haṋu, mashudu na khombo. Nangani-ha vhutshilo uri ni kone u tshila, inwi na vhana vhaṋu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 ni fune Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni thetshelese zwine a amba, ni songo tenda u fhambana nae; vhutshilo haṋu ndi Ene, ndi Ene u lalama haṋu musi ni shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mushe o amba na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a ri," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Nṋe ndo no vha na miṅwaha ya 120, a thi tsha kona u ni ranga phanḓa nndwani, nahone Muṋe washu o mmbudza a ri a thi nga weli Jorodani." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene ane a ḓo ni ranga phanḓa ni tshi wela, ndi Ene ane a ḓo lozwa tshakha idzi dzoṱhe dza ni shavha na konou dzhia mashango avho. Ni tshi wela, murangaphanḓa waṋu u ḓo vha Joshua, unga Muṋe washu o dzula o amba." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ndi Ene ane a ḓo ni ranga phanḓa ni tshi wela, ndi Ene ane a ḓo lozwa tshakha idzi dzoṱhe dza ni shavha na konou dzhia mashango avho. Ni tshi wela, murangaphanḓa waṋu u ḓo vha Joshua, unga Muṋe washu o dzula o amba." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Tshakha idzi Muṋe washu u ḓo dzi ita zwenezwo zwe a ita Sihoni na Ogo mahosi a Vhaamori na mashango avho, u ḓo vha lozwa." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu ni vha ite zwenezwo zwe nda ni laya. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Imani ni khwaṱhe, ni songo vha ofha, ni songo vha tetemela, hufha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a tshi khou ya na inwi, ha nga ni laṱedzi, ha nga ni ṱutsheli.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhidza Joshua, a mu laya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Imani ni khwaṱhe, ndi inwi ane na ḓo isa lushaka ulu shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho a ri u ḓo vha ṋea ḽone. Ndi inwi ane na ḓo vha endedza vha ḽi dzhia." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Ndi hone Mushe a tshi vhidza Joshua, a mu laya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Imani ni khwaṱhe, ndi inwi ane na ḓo isa lushaka ulu shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho a ri u ḓo vha ṋea ḽone. Ndi inwi ane na ḓo vha endedza vha ḽi dzhia." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Muṋe washu Ene muṋe u ḓo ni ranga phanḓa; u ḓo ḓi tshimbila na inwi, ha nga ni laṱedzi, ha nga ni ṱutsheli, ni songo vhuya na ofha tshithu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mushe o ṅwala mulayo wa Mudzimu a u ṋea vhotshifhe, vhone Vhalivi, vha hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Muṋe washu, na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele," 
Deuteronomy31:10 a vha laya a ri, “Tshifhinga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe musi ho fhela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili, nga ṅwaha wa u hangwelana milandu, vhuṱamboni ha Mishasha" 
Deuteronomy31:11 musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓa u dalela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu fhethu he a ḓinangela, ni vhale mulayo uyu Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa nga nḓevhe dzavho." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Hu vhe na tshivhidzo tsha vhathu vhoṱhe, vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana na vhatsinda vhane na dzula navho, uri noṱhe ni zwi pfe ni gude u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni vhulunge ndayo idzi dzoṱhe ni dzi tevhedze." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Ngauralo na vhana vhaṋu vha sa athu ḓivha mulayo wonoyo vha ḓo ḓipfela nga vhoṱhe vha guda u hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu misi yoṱhe ine na dzula shangoni ḽine na khou wetshela khaḽo ni tshi wela Jorodani uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu.” 
Deuteronomy31:14 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri u fe. Vhidza Joshua ni ime denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe ndi mu laye.” Ndi hone Mushe na Joshua vha tshi ya vha ima denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe a ri, “Tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri u fe. Vhidza Joshua ni ime denndeni ya u ṱangana na Nṋe ndi mu laye.” Ndi hone Mushe na Joshua vha tshi ya vha ima denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Muṋe washu a vhonala henefho denndeni e phuphuni ya gole, iyo phuphu ya gole ya ima muṋangoni wa dennde." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Muṋe washu a amba na Mushe a ri, “Hu si kale u ḓo fa. Wó no fa holu lushaka lu ḓo ntshandukela lwa yo ita vhupombwe na midzimu isili ya shango iḽo ḽine vha khou ya khaḽo. Vha ḓo nṱutshela vha vhofholola mulanga wanga we nda vhofha navho." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo vha sinyutshela nda vha ṱutshela-vho, nda vha furalela. Vha ḓo lovha vha welwa nga khombo nnzhi vha tambula zwinzhi. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ri, ‘Khombo idzi dzo ri wela ngauri Mudzimu washu ha tshee na riṋe.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Naho zwo ralo ndi ḓo ḓi vha furalela misi iyo nga mulandu wa vhuvhi hoṱhe he vha ita vha tshi tevhela midzimu isili. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Ḓiṅwaleleni-ha luimbo holu, ni lu gudise Vhaisraele uri vha kone u lu imba-vho uri matshelo luimbo ulu lu vhe vhuṱanzi ha u vha haṱula." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ndi ḓo vha swikisa shangoni ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho, shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi, hone vhone vha ḓo ri vho ḽa vha fura vha khwaṱha, vha mbo rembulutshela ha midzimu isili vha luvha yone, Nṋe vha nnyadza vha vhofholola mulanga wanga." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Musi khombo idzo nnzhi na madambudzo zwi tshi vho vha wela, luimbo holu lu ḓo vha vhudza uri zwi itwa ngani. Vha kha ḓi ḓo lu imba, lwa konou vha vhuṱanzi ha u vha laṱa. Nṋe ndi ḓivha mbilu dzavho na ṋamusi vha tshee fhano ndi sa athu vha swikisa shangoni ḽe nda vha fulufhedzisa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Zwo no ralo Mushe a ṅwala ulwo luimbo ḓuvha ḽeneḽo a lu gudisa Vhaisraele. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi laya Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu a ri, “Ndi iwe ane wa ḓo ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa wa vha swikisa shangoni ḽe nda vha fulufhedzisa; ima-ha u khwaṱhe, Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha na iwe!”" 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi laya Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu a ri, “Ndi iwe ane wa ḓo ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa wa vha swikisa shangoni ḽe nda vha fulufhedzisa; ima-ha u khwaṱhe, Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha na iwe!”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musi Mushe o fhedza u ṅwala mafhungo oṱhe a mulayo uyu buguni," 
Deuteronomy31:25 a laya Vhalivi vha hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Muṋe washu a ri," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Dzhiani bugu iyi ya mulayo ni i vhee tsini ha mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu uri i vhe ṱhanzi ni tshi laṱwa nga tshifhinga tshi ḓaho. 
Deuteronomy31:27 Nṋe ndi ḓivha uri ni vhadzia-u-shanduka na vhadzia-tshipimbi, hufha no shandukela Muṋe washu nṋe ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila, zwino musi ndo no fa zwi ḓo vha zwingafhani?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndi zwone, rambani vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha matsinde aṋu na vharangaphanḓa vhaṋu ndi kone u vha vhudza mafhungo aya ndi vha vhudze uri ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi ndi ṱhanzi dzanga," 
Deuteronomy31:29 ngauri ndi dzula ndi tshi zwi ḓivha uri musi ndo no fa a ni nga kundwi u tshinya na pambuwa nḓilani ye nda ni laya, ndi zwine na ḓo welwa nga khombo misi i ḓaho, ngauri ni ḓo ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, na mu ṱunga nga zwiito zwaṋu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Mushe a imba luimbo holu Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi khou thetshelesa, a vhuya a lu fhedza. O imba a ri," 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Hee, ḽiṱaḓulu, ivha ṱhanzi! Ipfa maipfi anga iwe shango!" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ndayo yanga nga i nge mvula i no ṋukadza mavu; maipfi anga nga a we sa ṅwando hatsini, a nge mibvumbi i no tshidza miri, a nge mvula ya tseula i no ṋukadza mutomba." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ndi ḓo renda dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, nda ḓivhadza vhuhulu ha Mudzimu washu." 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ndi Ene bako ḽashu ḽa u shavhela khaḽo. Mishumo yawe a i solisei, zwoṱhe zwine a ita ndi zwone. Ndi Mudzimu a fulufhedzeaho, ha khakhi, u ita zwi re zwone na zwivhuya fhedzi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 “Hone Vhaisraele vho mu shandukela, shonee, a vha tshee vhana vhawe! Ndi mashandukwa a vhukwila." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ndi zwone zwine na livhuha Muṋe washu ngazwo, inwi matsilu ni si na mihumbulo? A si Ene Khotsi aṋu kani? A si Ene Muvhumbi waṋu naa? A si Ene we a ni ita a ni ṋea vhutshilo?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Edzonu elelwa maḓuvha a kale-kale, ni humbule misi ya vhomakhulukuku, vhudzisani vhokhotsi aṋu vha ni vhudze, ni vhudzise vha kale, vhone vha ḓo ni ṱalutshedza." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a tshi kovhekanya dzitshakha mashango adzo, zwiḽa a tshi khethekanya vhathu, o vhekanya masakha a dzitshakha a tshi sedza tshivhalo tsha Vhaisraele." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ndi vhone mukovhe wa Muṋe washu, ndi vhone lushaka lwawe, Jakopo ndi lushaka lwawe vhukuma." 
Deuteronomy32:10 O vha wana phangani, sogani hu no lila dziphukha fhedzi, a vha kuvhatedza a vha tonda, a vha tsireledza unga tshanga ya iṱo." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Muṋe washu o hwala vhathu vhawe unga goni ḽi tshi phusukanya tshiṱaha ḽa rahela mafhondo nnḓa uri a gude u fhufha, ḽa fhufha nṱha hao ḽa a takula nga phapha. O vha hwala e eṱhe hu si na muṅwe mudzimu ngae." 
Deuteronomy32:12  
Deuteronomy32:13 O vha hwala vha kanda miṱumbani ya dzithavha, a vha kanzwa nga mapfura a shango, a vha fusha nga ṋotshi dzi tshi bva phakhoni, lutomboni ha ela mapfura," 
Deuteronomy32:14 vha ḽa luvhomba lwa kholomo na mukhaha wa mbudzi, na ngwana dzo nonaho, na thutha na thongo dza Bashani, na goroi yavhuḓi i fhiraho yoṱhe, a vha nwisa waini ya nḓirivhe dzi ḓifhaho." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Hone vha tshi ḽa vha fura, vha pfuma vha ḽa vha tou laṱa, ndi hone Jeshuruni a tshi vho thoma u pfunya, a landula Mudzimu o mu sikaho, a nyadza Bako ḽawe, vhushavhelo hawe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Vho ḓinangela midzimu isili, vha ṱunga Muṋe washu nga zwithu izwo zwi nengisaho," 
Deuteronomy32:17 vha ṋekedza madimoni zwiṱhavhelo – zwithu zwi si mudzimu, na midzimu ye vha vha vha sa i ḓivhi, ye vha tou ṱunḓa kha vhahura, hone vhokhotsi avho vho vha vha sa i ḓivhi;" 
Deuteronomy32:18 vha hangwa Khotsi o vha ṋeaho vhutshilo, vha sanda Ramaanḓa we a vha beba nga vhuṱungu." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Muṋe washu a tshi zwi vhona a sinyuwa, nge vhana vhawe vha mu ṱunga," 
Deuteronomy32:20 a ri, ‘Ndi a vha furalela, ndi vhone uri vha ḓo gumafhi. Ndi lushaka lwa mashandukwa, a vha fulufhedzei na zwiṱuku." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Hufha vho nṱutshela vha ḓinangela tshithu tshi si mudzimu, hufha vho nṱunga nga zwithu zwi sa tshidzi. Litshani ndi vha laṱe-vho ndi ḓinangele vha si vhathu, ndi vha ṱunge-vho nga lushaka lu sa ḓivhi tshithu." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Mbiti dzanga dzo funga mulilo; u ḓo duga wa swika na ngei fhasi vhafuni, wa fhisa shango na mitshelo yaḽo, wa duga wa swika na kha miteo ya dzithavha." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndi ḓo vha rambela khombo, nda vha pfula, misevhe yanga ya tou fhelela khavho –" 
Deuteronomy32:24 ndi nḓala na dali na malwadze a sa lafhei. Ndi ḓo vha rambela mavhanda a ḓaka khathihi na dziṋowa dza vhuṱungu. 
Deuteronomy32:25 Mikotoni vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, ngomu nḓuni vha fa nga nyofho – muṱhannga na musidzana, lushie na mukalaha, a hu nga ponyoki muthu." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndo ri: Litshani ndi vha balanganye, ndi vha lozwe vha si tsha humbulwa nga muthu!" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Hone maswina avho a nga nngoḓa, vha nga zwi shanda vha ri: A si Yahavee o itaho hezwo, ndi maanḓa ashu!’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Ndi lushaka lu shayaho maano, a vha na na ṱhalukanyo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ngavhe vhe na ṱhalukanyo ndi musi vho zwi vhona, vha ṱalukanya uri vha ḓo gumafhi." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Hufha swina ḽithihi ḽo pandamedza vha tshigidi! Hufha vhavhili vho gidimedza zwigidi zwa fumi! A si uri Bako ḽavho o vha laṱa naa? A si nge Yahavee a vha kumedza maswina naa? 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bako ḽa maswina a ḽi ngi ḽashu; na maswina a nga ḓipfela uri zwo ralo. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Hufha vhone vha tshi bva tsimuni ya minḓirivhe ya Sodoma, na phangani ya Gomora hu sa meli tshithu. Nḓirivhe dzavho ndi vhutulu, zwiṱokola zwadzo zwi a kalakata." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Waini yavho ndi vhuṱungu ha phakhuphakhu, ndi vhuṱungu ha tshitemahe tsha vhuhali.’" 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Muṋe washu o ri, ‘Hezwo zwoṱhe ndo zwi vhea mbiluni, nda zwi shatela." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Ndi ḓo vha rwa nda vha lifhedza musi une vha ḓo redzemuwa vha wa. Musi wa u lovha havho u tsini, zwo vha livhaho a zwi nga lengi.’" 
Deuteronomy32:36 “Muṋe washu u sengela vhathu vhawe, u khathutshela vhalanda vhawe nga u vhona vhó no kulea nungo, vha na nungo na vha si na nungo vha vho wa vhoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Ndi hone a tshi ḓo vhudzisa a ri, ‘Midzimu yavho i ngafhi zwino? A ngafhi mapako e vha vha vho shavhela khao?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 I ngafhi midzimu yo ḽaho mapfura a zwiṱhavhelo zwavho, ya nwa thevhula dzavho dza waini? Nga i vuwe i ni phalale, i vhe vhushavhelo haṋu!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Ivhani na nzhele nazwo zwino: Mudzimu ndi Nṋe, ndi Nṋe ndi ndoṱhe, a hu tshee na muṅwe. Ndi Nṋe ndi no vhulaha nda dovha nda tshidza; a no phula mbonzhe a dovha a lafha ndi Nṋe; a hu na a no lamukisa muthu zwanḓani zwanga." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ndi imisa tshanḓa tsha swika makoleni nda ana nda ri: Nga vhutshilo hanga, Nṋe ndi tshilaho lini na lini," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ndi ḓo ṱuṱula banga ḽanga ḽa penya, nda ḽi fara nda haṱula vhathu, nda rwa vhoṱhe vha mmbangisaho, nda lifhedza maswina anga." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Pfumo ḽanga ḽi ḓo ḽa ṋama, misevhe yanga ya tou kambiwa nga malofha, malofha a vho waho nndwani na vho thubiwaho, malofha a maswina anga a mavhudzi malapfu!’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Tshakha dzoṱhe, fhululedzani lushaka lwa Muṋe washu! U ḓo lifhedza malofha a vhalanda vhawe, a rwa maswina awe, a pfumedzana na shango ḽawe na lushaka lwawe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mushe a ḓa e na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a vhalela Vhaisraele luimbo ulwo lwoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mushe a ḓa e na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a vhalela Vhaisraele luimbo ulwo lwoṱhe." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Musi o no fhedza u vha vhalela 
Deuteronomy32:46 a amba navho a ri, “Sedzani uri ni elelwe maipfi aya oṱhe e nda ni laya ṋamusi. Ni laye na vhana vhaṋu uri vha vhulunge mafhungo oṱhe a mulayo uyu vha a tevhedze." 
Deuteronomy32:47 A si mahandana aya, ndi hone vhutshilo haṋu. Arali ni tshi tevhedza haya mafhungo, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhedza miṅwaha minzhi ni shangoni ḽine na khou wetshela khaḽo zwino ni tshi wela Jorodani uri ni ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽaṋu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo Muṋe washu a dovha a amba na Mushe a ri," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Gonya thavha ya Nebo fhano thavhani dza Abarimu shangoni ḽa Muaba u livhana na Jerikho, u lavhelese shango ḽa Kanana ḽine nda ḽi ṋea Vhaisraele uri ḽi vhe ḽavho." 
Deuteronomy32:50 U ḓo fa thavhani yeneyo ine wa ḓo i gonya, wa ya hune vha kale vha vha hone, zwi nge zwa mukomana wau Aroni a tshi fela thavhani ya Horo." 
Deuteronomy32:51 U sa dzhena Kanana ndi nge iwe na Aroni na vha ni sa fulufhedzei hangei maḓini a Miriba wa Kadeshe phangani ya Tsini, a no ngo sumbedza Vhaisraele vhukhethwa hanga." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Shango ḽine nda ḽi ṋea Vhaisraele u ḓo tou ḽi vhona ḽi henefho phanḓa hau, hone u dzhena khaḽo u a nga dzheni.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a sa athu fa o shudufhadza Vhaisraele," 
Deuteronomy33:2 a ri, “Muṋe washu u khou ḓa a tshi bva Sinai, u vhonetshela lushaka lwawe e Seiri, u sumbedza lupenyo lwawe e thavhani ya Pharani, u ḓa a tshi bva hu no dzula zwigidi na zwigidi zwa vharuṅwa vhó ima thungo ya tshanḓa tshawe tshauḽa." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Vhukuma matsinde a Israele u a vha funa, u tsireledza vhoṱhe vha re vhawe. Vhone vho ḓiposa milenzheni yawe vha tshi thetshelesa maipfi awe." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mushe o ri ṋea mulayo, ndi ḽone ifa ḽi takadzaho ḽa vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Muṋe washu o vha khosi ya Jeshuruni musi hu tshi kuvhangana vhahulwane vha lushaka, hu tshi ḓa matsinde oṱhe a Israele." 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Rubeni a songo lovha, nga a tshile, vhanna vhawe vha vhe vhanzhi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 A tshi amba Juda o ri, “Muṋe washu, ipfa zwine Juda a humbela, u mu vhuedzedze ha vharathu vhawe! Nga a vha lwele nga zwanḓa zwawe. Ivha nae musi e khomboni.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 A tshi amba Livi o ri, “Madeṅwa au makhethwa wo a kumedza ene, munna a fulufhedzeaho. Wo mu linga kusini kwa Milingo, wa mu sengisa maḓini a Tsengo." 
Deuteronomy33:9 O ri a tshi amba khotsi awe na mme awe a ri, ‘Thi vha vhoni!’ vharathu vhawe a ri, ‘Thi vha ḓivhi!’ na vhana vhe a vha beba a ri, ‘Thi vha ṱalukanyi!’ Vhalivi vho vhulunga zwe wa amba vha si pfuke mulanga wau." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Vha ḓo funza Jakopo ndaela dzau, mulayo wau vha u gudisa Israele. Vha ḓo vhea zwioro phanḓa hau, vha ṋekedza nduvho dza u fhiswa kha aḽiṱari yau." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Shudufhadza mushumo wawe Muṋe washu, u takalele zwine a ita. Maswina awe u a kule nungo, u rwe vha mu vhengaho vha si tsha vuwa.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 A tshi amba Benyamini o ri, “Mufunwa wa Muṋe washu u ḓo dzula a sa ofhi tshithu; u ḓikhudisa ngae misi yoṱhe; Muṋe washu u dzula o mu beba.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 A tshi amba Josefa o ri, “Muṋe washu u ḓo shudufhadza shango ḽau, wa welwa nga ṅwando u no bva nṱha, nga fhasi zwisima zwa si xe," 
Deuteronomy33:14 wa tondwa nga ḓuvha, wa fundwa ṅwedzi muṅwe na muṅwe," 
Deuteronomy33:15 wa wana mashudushudu a thavha dza kale-kale, na a zwikwara zwa misi ya kale," 
Deuteronomy33:16 na a shango na zwi re khaḽo; nga a takalelwe nga a dzulaho tshiṱakani tshi dugaho! Muṋe washu a sumbedze Josefa lufuno lwawe, ene munangiwa kha vhakomana vhawe." 
Deuteronomy33:17 U ḓo ḓiphiṋa nga maanḓa a mbohwana, ṋanga dzawe dza nga dza ṋari. Luṅwe luṋanga ndi zwigidi zwa Manase, luṅwe ndi zwigidi na zwigidi zwa Efraimi. U ḓo pandamedza tshakha ngadzo dza tou fhelela vhusendekamisi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 A tshi amba Zebuloni o ri, “Ngavhe Zebuloni zwi tshi mu nakela musi e lwanzheni nga mabindu; iwe Isakhara u takale u hayani!" 
Deuteronomy33:19 Vha ḓo vhidzela vhathu thavhani, henefho vha ṱhavha zwifuwo zwa nduvho dzo fanelaho. Vha ḓo ḽa lupfumo lwa lwanzhe na madzanga o fukedzwaho nga muṱavha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 A tshi amba Gadi o ri, “Muṋe washu o ṋea Gadi shango ḽo aṱamaho, nga ri mu rende ngazwo! U lalela vhathu unga ndau, a vha ṱhukhula zwanḓa na ṱhoho." 
Deuteronomy33:21 O ḓikhethela shango ḽa khwiṋe, a ḓivhetshela mukovhe wa murangaphanḓa. Vhahulwane vha matsinde vha tshi kuvhangana, ene a khunyeledza zwine Muṋe washu a funa, a bveledza khaṱhulo dza Muṋe washu kha Israele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 A tshi amba Dani o ri, “Dani ndi ndau ya maanḓa, i tshi vhona ṋowa i thamutshela thungo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 A tshi amba Nafuthali a ri, “Muṋe washu o shudufhadza Nafuthali, o mu tonda a tou mu fusha u bva lwanzheni shango ḽawe ḽi livha tshipembe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 A tshi amba Ashere a ri, “Ashere o shudufhadzwa u fhira na vhakomana vhawe; nga vha mu takalele vhoṱhe, a pfume a tou ṱamba milenzhe nga mapfura." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Tswinga dza mafhoro awe ndi tsimbi na musinaseṱha, a hu na musi une a si vhe na nungo." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “A hu na a no vhambedzwa na Mudzimu wa Jeshuruni! U ḓa u u lamulela o namela makole, u tala lutombo nga vhugala hawe." 
Deuteronomy33:27 “Dzhavhelo ḽau ndi Ene Mudzimu wa lini na lini, o u takula nga zwanḓa zwawe misi yoṱhe, a pandamedza maswina au phanḓa hau a ri, ‘Vha lozwe!’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ndi zwine Vhaisraele vha dzula vhugalani, vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo vha dzula thungo ha dzitshakha shangoni ḽa goroi na waini, hune lutombo lwa wa ṅwando." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Mashudu au ndi mangafhani Israele! A no nga iwe ndi nnyi? U lushaka lwo tshidzwaho nga Muṋe washu. Ndi Ene tshiṱangu tshau tshi u pilelaho, ndi Ene pfumo ḽau ḽine wa kunda ngaḽo. Maswina au a ḓo tou swenda phanḓa hau, iwe wa kanda miṱumbani ya zwikwara zwavho.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Mushe a takuwa phangani ya govha ḽa Muaba a gonya thavha ya Nebo, a vhuya a swika muṱumbani wa Phisiga u livhana na Jerikho. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mu sumbedza shango ḽoṱhe u bva Giliadi u swika Dani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 na ḽoṱhe ḽa Nafuthali na ḽa Efraimi na ḽa Manase na ḽa Juda u swika Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango," 
Deuteronomy34:3 na Negeve na govha ḽa Jerikho muḓi wa mitshevho, u vhuya u swika Tsuara." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri, “Ngeḽi shango ḽe nda fulufhedzisa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo nda ana nda ri ndi ḓo ḽi fha vhaḓuhulu vhavho. Zwino ndi tou u sumbedza uri u kone u ḽi vhona nga maṱo au, hone u wela a u nga wetsheli khaḽo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ndi hone Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a tshi fa henefho shangoni ḽa Muaba unga Muṋe washu o amba. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Muṋe washu a mbo mu swiṱa henefho govhani u livhana na Bethe Phioro shangoni ḽa Muaba. U swika na ṋamusi a hu na muthu a ḓivhaho uri tshalo tshawe tshi ngafhi. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mushe a tshi fa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 120, hone a tshi kha ḓi vhona zwavhuḓi, na maanḓa a tshi kha ḓi vha nao." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Vhaisraele vha lilela Mushe henefho govhani phangani ya Muaba vha fhedza maḓuvha a 30, maḓuvha a u lila a vhuya a fhela." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi thoma u thetshelesa Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu. O vha o ḓala muya wa vhuṱali, ngauri Mushe o vha o mu vhea zwanḓa; o tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a vha o laya Mushe." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi thoma u thetshelesa Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu. O vha o ḓala muya wa vhuṱali, ngauri Mushe o vha o mu vhea zwanḓa; o tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a vha o laya Mushe." 
Deuteronomy34:10 A ho ngo tsha dovha ha vha na muporofita a no nga Mushe kha Vhaisraele; ene, Muṋe washu o amba nae vho livhana zwifhaṱuwo." 
Deuteronomy34:11 A hu na muṅwe a no vhambedzwa nae kha zwiga na maḓembe zwe Muṋe washu a mu ruma uri a zwi ite shangoni ḽa Egipita uri a rwe Farao na vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe na shango ḽawe ḽoṱhe," 
Deuteronomy34:12 a hu na we a vhuya a ita mishumo yoṱhe mihulwane i ofhisaho sa ye Mushe a ita Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona. 
Joshua1:1 Musi Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu o no fa, Muṋe washu a amba na tshanḓa tsha Mushe, Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, a ri," 
Joshua1:2 “Mushe muḓinḓa wanga o fa. Zwino iwe na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe ḓilugiseni, ni wele mulambo wa Jorodani ni wetshele shangoni ḽine nda ni ṋea ḽone." 
Joshua1:3 Ndi ni ṋea shango ḽoṱhe ḽine na ḓo kanda khaḽo, sa zwe nda vhudza Mushe." 
Joshua1:4 Mukano wa shango ḽaṋu thungo ya tshipembe u ḓo thoma phangani wa swika thavhani dza Libanoni thungo ya devhula; thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha u ḓo bva mulamboni muhulu wa Yufuratha, wa buḓekanya shango ḽa Vhahithi, u swika Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango thungo ya vhukovhela." 
Joshua1:5 A hu na ane a ḓo kona u imedzana na iwe vhutshilo hau hoṱhe. Ndi ḓo vha na iwe unga ndo vha ndi na Mushe. Ndi ḓo dzula ndi na iwe, ndi nga si vhuye nda u ṱutshela." 
Joshua1:6 Ivha na nungo u ime wo khwaṱha, ndi iwe ane wa ḓo vha murangaphanḓa wa vhathu havha musi vha tshi dzhia shango ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho uri ndi ḓo vha ṋea ḽone." 
Joshua1:7 Ivha na nungo u ime wo khwaṱha tshoṱhe, u tevhedze ndayo dzoṱhe dze muḓinḓa wanga Mushe a u ṋea. U songo litsha kupiḓa na kuthihi kwadzo, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo u nakela hoṱhe hune wa ya." 
Joshua1:8 U ite uri misi yoṱhe ni tshi nnduvha bugu ya mulayo i vhalwe. I gude vhusiku na masiari, u vhone uri u tevhedze zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho khayo. Ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo u nakela wa zwi kona." 
Joshua1:9 Asizwo-ha, ndo u vhudza nda ri u vhe na nungo u ime wo khwaṱha! U songo ofha tshithu, u songo kulea nungo, Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wau ndi na iwe hoṱhe-hoṱhe hune wa ya.”" 
Joshua1:10 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhudza vhakoma 
Joshua1:11 uri vha tshimbile na mishasha, vha vhudze vhathu vha ri, “Lugisani mbuvha, ho sala maḓuvha mararu ni tshi wela mulambo wa Jorodani na dzhia shango ḽine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu.”" 
Joshua1:12 Joshua a vhudza vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni na ḽa Gadi na vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha, a ri," 
Joshua1:13 “Elelwani zwe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a ni vhudza a ri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni ṋea shango heḽi ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani ḽa vha haya haṋu na konou awela. 
Joshua1:14 Vhasadzi vhaṋu na vhana vhaṋu khathihi na kholomo dzaṋu vha nga ḓi sala zwavho fhano, hone vhahali vhaṋu vha ḓo wetshela seli na luḽa vhó ḓiṱama tshoṱhe vha ranga Vhaisraele vha haṋu phanḓa uri vha vha farise," 
Joshua1:15 Muṋe washu a vhuya a vha ṋea-vho vhuawelo unga o ṋea inwi, vha wana shango vhukovhela ha Jorodani ḽe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a vha ṋea, na konou vhuya na dzula hafhano shangoni ḽaṋu vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani ḽe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a ni ṋea ḽone.”" 
Joshua1:16 Vhone vha fhindula Joshua vha ri, “Ri ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwe vha ri vhudza; hoṱhe hune vha ri ruma ri ḓo ya." 
Joshua1:17 Ri ḓo vha thetshelesa unga ro vha ri tshi ḓi thetshelesa Mushe. Ri ri ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a tshi vha navho unga o vha e na Mushe! 
Joshua1:18 Muthu ane a vha vhangisa kana a nyadza zwine vha ri vhudza u ḓo vhulawa. Vhone nga vha vhe na nungo vha ime vho khwaṱha!” 
Joshua2:1 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi ruma ṱholi mbili dzi tshi bva Shitimu (Maungani), a vha laya uri vha yo tandula shango ḽa Kanana, zwihulwane muḓi wa Jerikho. Musi vha tshi swika muḓini uyo, vha yo eḓela nḓuni ya musadzi wa phombwe ane a pfi Rahaba." 
Joshua2:2 Khosi ya Jerikho ya pfa hu tshi pfi vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vho ḓa vhusiku honoho u ṱola shango," 
Joshua2:3 a isa ipfi ha Rahaba a ri, “Vhanna vha re nḓuni yau vho ḓa u ṱola shango ḽoṱhe! Vha bvise!”" 
Joshua2:4 Rahaba a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, vhaṅwe vhanna vho ḓa nḓuni yanga, hone ndo vha ndi sa ḓivhi he vha bva hone. Vho ṱuwa ḓuvha ḽi tshi kovhela khoro ya muḓi i sa athu valwa. A tho ngo vhudzisa hune vha ya hone. Arali vha ṱavhanya u vha tevhela, vha nga vha fara nḓilani.”" 
Joshua2:5  
Joshua2:6 Zwino Rahaba o vha o dzhia idzo ṱholi mbili a dzi isa ṱhangani ya nnḓu, a dzi dzumba fhasi ha maṱanga a savha, e a vha o a vhea henefho." 
Joshua2:7 Vhanna vha khosi vha bva afho muḓini, khoro ya valwa. Vha enda vha tshi ṱoḓa ṱholi dza Vhaisraele u swika maḓambuwoni a Jorodani." 
Joshua2:8 Musi ṱholi dzi sa athu eḓela vhusiku honoho, Rahaba a gonya ṱhangani ya nnḓu" 
Joshua2:9 a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndi a ḓivha uri Yahavee o ni ṋea shango ḽino. Roṱhe ri khou ni ofha, a hu na a songo kuleaho nungo." 
Joshua2:10 Ro zwi pfa uri Yahavee o xisa Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga ni tshi swika musi ni tshi pfuluwa Egipita. Ra pfa na zwe na ita Sihoni na Ogo, mahosi mavhili a Vhaamori vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani. Ro pfa uri no vha lozwa tshoṱhe." 
Joshua2:11 Ro ri u zwi pfa ra farwa nga nyofho, roṱhe ro kulea nungo nga inwi. Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu ndi Mudzimu wa makoleni ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi." 
Joshua2:12 Zwino anani ngae uri ni ḓo itela muṱa wanga vhuthu unga nṋe ndo ni fara nga vhuthu, ni ntsumbedze tshiga uri ndi kone u ni fulufhedza." 
Joshua2:13 Nnyaneleni uri ni ḓo tshidza khotsi anga na mme anga na vhana vha hashu, vhatuka na vhasidzana na miṱa yavho vhoṱhe! Ni songo tenda ri tshi vhulawa!”" 
Joshua2:14 Avho vhanna vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi ri vhulaha arali ra tenda ni tshi vhulawa! Arali vha sa ri ambulula, ri a vha fulufhedzisa uri musi Muṋe washu a tshi ri ṋea shango ḽino, ri ḓo vha itela vhuthu. Vha ḓo vhona, ri ḓo fulufhedzea.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rahaba o vha a tshi dzula nḓuni yo fhaṱiwaho ngomu mutsheṱoni wa muḓi, zwenezwo a tsisela avho vhanna fhasi nga thambo vha bva nga fasiṱere." 
Joshua2:16 A vha vhudza a ri, “Thomani ni yo dzumbama mabamani, vhanna vha khosi vha sa ḓo ni wana. Ni dzule henefho ni fhedze maḓuvha mararu u swika vha tshi vhuya, na ḓo konou ḓiṱutshela.”" 
Joshua2:17 Avho vhanna vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Ri ḓo khunyeledza muano we vha ri anisa" 
Joshua2:18 arali vhone vha ita hezwi: Musi ri tshi dia shango ḽa havho, vhone nga vha vhofhelele ludede holuno lutswuku kha fasiṱere ḽe vha ri bvisa ngaḽo. Vha kuvhanganye khotsi avho na mme avho na vhana vha havho na muṱa wa khotsi avho vhoṱhe ri wane vhe nḓuni yavho." 
Joshua2:19 Arali muṅwe a bva nḓuni a ya nnḓa a vhulawa, u ḓo vha u mulandu wawe, a si washu, hone a re nḓuni yavho a vhuya a huvhadzwa, mulandu ndi washu." 
Joshua2:20 Huno naho zwo ralo, arali vhone vha ri ambulula, riṋe a ri tsha ḓo khunyeledza zwe vha ri anisa.”" 
Joshua2:21 Uyo musadzi a tenda zwoṱhe, a vha litsha vha ṱuwa. Musi vho no ṱuwa, a vhofhelela ludede lutswuku kha ḽiḽa fasiṱere." 
Joshua2:22 Vhaḽa vhanna vha dziṱholi vha ya mabamani vha dzumbama. Vhanna vha khosi vha vha ṱoḓa nḓilani dzoṱhe vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu, hone vha si vha wane; vha humela Jerikho." 
Joshua2:23 Ndi hone avho vhanna vhavhili vha dziṱholi vha tshi tsa mabamani, vha wela mulambo, vha humela ha Joshua. Vha mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwe vha ṱangana nazwo," 
Joshua2:24 vha konou ri, “Vhukuma Muṋe washu o ri ṋea shango iḽo ḽoṱhe. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango vha a ri ofha.”" 
Joshua3:1 Nga matshelo Joshua na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tou fhinduwa, vha ṱuwa mishashani ya Shitimu, vha livha Jorodani, vha ṱoka mishasha henefho vho lindela u wela mulambo." 
Joshua3:2 Hó no fhela maḓuvha mararu vhakoma vha buḓekanya mishasha," 
Joshua3:3 vha vhudza vhathu vha ri, “Musi ni tshi vhona vhotshifhe, vhone Vhalivi, vhó hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, ni bve mishashani ni vha tevhele." 
Joshua3:4 Inwi ndi u thoma ni tshi ḓa fhano, zwenezwo vha ḓo ni sumbedza nḓila ine na ḓo i fara. Hone ni songo sendela tsini ha mbulungelo ya mulanga, ni tevhele nó sia tshikhala tsha khilomitha nthihi vhukati haṋu na yone.”" 
Joshua3:5 Joshua a dovha a vhudza vhathu a ri, “Ḓikumululeni Muṋe washu ngauri matshelo u ḓo ni itela maḓembe.”" 
Joshua3:6 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhotshifhe uri vha hwale mbulungelo ya mulanga vha tshimbile nayo phanḓa ha vhathu. Vhone vha ita zwe a amba. 
Joshua3:7 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Ṋamusi ndi ḓo thoma u u hulisa Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi na iwe sa zwe nda vha ndi na Mushe." 
Joshua3:8 Vhudza vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga uri musi vha tshi swika mulamboni, vha ri u kanda maḓini vha ime henefho.”" 
Joshua3:9 Joshua a vhudza Vhaisraele a ri, “Iḓani fhano ni pfe zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a amba." 
Joshua3:10 Vhukumakuma ni ḓo ri ni tshi swika a thatha Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhahivi na Vhapherisi na Vhagirigashi na Vhaamori na Vhajebusi. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Mudzimu a tshilaho u na inwi," 
Joshua3:11 musi mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe i tshi wela Jorodani yó ni ranga phanḓa. 
Joshua3:12 Zwino-ha, nangani vhanna vha 12, muthihi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa Vhaisraele." 
Joshua3:13 Vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Yahavee Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe vha ḓo ri u longa ṋayo dzavho maḓini, mulambo wa Jorodani wa si tsha ela, maḓi a no tsa a tshi ela a ḓo ima fhethu huthihi.”" 
Joshua3:14 Tsho vha tshi tshifhinga tsha u kaṋa, mulambo wa vha wo ḓala wa ita na u fhalala. Musi vhathu vha tshi takuwa mishashani uri vha yo wela Jorodani, vhotshifhe vha vha ranga phanḓa vho hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga. Ha ri milenzhe ya vhotshifhe i tshi tou kanda maḓini," 
Joshua3:15  
Joshua3:16 maḓi a si tsha ela, a raha a swika muḓini wa Adamu u re tsini ha Tsarethani. Maḓi a no ela a tshi tsela Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo o vha o tumuwa tshoṱhe, vhathu vha konou wela mulambo tsini ha Jerikho." 
Joshua3:17 Musi vhathu vha tshi khou tshimbila vha tshi wetshela seli nga ho omaho, vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu vha vha vhó ima mavuni o omaho vhukati ha mulambo vha sa sudzuluwi vhathu vhoṱhe vha vhuya vha wela seli." 
Joshua4:1 Musi lushaka lwoṱhe lwo no wela Jorodani, Muṋe washu a amba na Joshua a ri," 
Joshua4:2 “Khetha vhanna vha 12, muthihi kha tsinde muthihi kha tsinde," 
Joshua4:3 u vha vhudze vha dzhie matombo a 12 vhukati ha mulambo wa Jorodani, henefhaḽa he vhotshifhe vha vha vho ima hone, vha ṱuwe vho a hwala, vha a vhee fhasi hune na ḓo lala hone vhusiku ha ṋamusi.”" 
Joshua4:4 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhidza vhaḽa vhanna vha 12 vhe a vha o vha khetha," 
Joshua4:5 a vha vhudza a ri, “Dzhenani mulamboni wa Jorodani ni fhire phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, muṅwe na muṅwe a hwale tombo nga shaḓa ḽawe, zwi tshi tevhedza mbalo ya matsinde a Vhaisraele." 
Joshua4:6 Matombo hayo a ḓo humbudza vhathu zwe Muṋe washu a ita. Misi i ḓaho, arali vhana vhaṋu vha ni vhudzisa zwine ayo matombo a amba," 
Joshua4:7 ni vha vhudze uri maḓi a mulambo wa Jorodani o litsha u ela musi mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Yahavee i tshi wela uyu mulambo. Matombo hayo a ḓo dzula a tshi humbudza Vhaisraele zwe zwa itea hafhano.” 
Joshua4:8 Vhanna avho vha tevhedza zwe Joshua a amba. Vha dzhia matombo a 12 a tshi bva vhukati ha mulambo wa Jorodani, vha tshi tevhedza mbalo ya matsinde a Vhaisraele, vha a hwala vha a isa hune vha ḓo lala hone, vha a vhea fhasi henefho, nga he Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua." 
Joshua4:9 Joshua na ene a imisa matombo a 12 vhukati ha mulambo wa Jorodani, henefhaḽa he ha vha ho ima vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga. Matombo hayo a kha ḓi vha henefho na ṋamusi." 
Joshua4:10 Vhotshifhe vho ima vhukati ha Jorodani ha vhuya ha itwa zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua uri a vhudze vhathu vha zwi ite. Hezwo ndi zwe Mushe a ri zwi itwe. Vhathu vha wela mulambo nga u ṱavhanya. 
Joshua4:11 Musi vhoṱhe vho no vha seli na luḽa, vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Muṋe washu vha dovha vha ranga vhathu phanḓa." 
Joshua4:12 Vhanna vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni na ḽa Gadi na hafu ya vha tsinde ḽa Manase vho vha vho ḓilugisela nndwa, vha vha vhone vho rangaho vhathu phanḓa vha tshi wela mulambo, nga he Mushe a vha vhudza." 
Joshua4:13 Vhe vha vha vho shomela nndwa vha nga vha vho swika 40 000; vhenevho vha wela seli phanḓa ha Muṋe washu vha ya mudavhini wa Jerikho. 
Joshua4:14 Zwe Muṋe washu a ita uyo musi zwo ita uri Vhaisraele vha vhone Joshua e munna muhulwane, vha mu hulisa vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe, zwa nga vha tshi hulisa Mushe." 
Joshua4:15 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Joshua 
Joshua4:16 uri a vhudze vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo i na Mulayo uri vha bve mulamboni wa Jorodani. 
Joshua4:17 Joshua a ita nga u ralo," 
Joshua4:18 musi vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Muṋe washu vha tshi bva mulamboni, hezwi vha tshi tou kanda bamani, mulambo wa dovha u ela, wa dovha wa ḓala wa ita na u fhalala." 
Joshua4:19 Vhathu vho wela mulambo wa Jorodani nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma, vha yo ṱoka mishasha Giligala, vhubvaḓuvha ha Jerikho." 
Joshua4:20 Henefho Joshua a imisa matombo aḽa a 12 e a dzhiwa mulamboni wa Jorodani. 
Joshua4:21 Joshua a vhudza Vhaisraele a ri, “Misi i ḓaho, arali vhana vhaṋu vha ni vhudzisa zwine ayo matombo a amba," 
Joshua4:22 ni vha vhudze zwa musi Vhaisraele vha tshi wela mulambo wa Jorodani wo oma. 
Joshua4:23 Ni vha vhudze uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o xisa maḓi a Jorodani a tshi itela inwi na vhuya na wela seli, sa zwe a xisa maḓi a Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga ra lu wela." 
Joshua4:24 Muṋe washu o ita hezwo uri tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓivhe uri u na maanḓa, inwi ni hulise Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu misi yoṱhe.”" 
Joshua5:1 Mahosi oṱhe a Vhaamori vhukovhela ha Jorodani na mahosi oṱhe a Vhakanana u navha na Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango, vha zwi pfa uri Muṋe washu o xisa mulambo wa Jorodani, Vhaisraele vha wela. Vha farwa nga nyofho, vha kulea nungo vha si tsha vha na vhuhali ha u imedzana na Vhaisraele." 
Joshua5:2 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Ita phanga nga tombo ḽa ḽiangahwe u dovhe u fumbise Vhaisraele.”" 
Joshua5:3 Joshua a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhudza, a fumbisa Vhaisraele fhethu hu no pfi Muvhunduni wa u fumba." 
Joshua5:4 Ndi uri musi Vhaisraele vha tshi pfuluwa Egipita, vhanna vhoṱhe vho vha vho fumba, hone miṅwaha ya 40 ye vhathu vha fhedza phangani, a ho ngo vha na ṅwana na muthihi wa mutuka we a fumba. Na uri tshifhinga itsho tshi tshi vho ḓa u fhela, vhanna vhe vha vha vhe murole wa nndwa musi vha tshi pfuluwa Egipita, vho vha vho fa vhoṱhe nge vha nyadza Muṋe washu. Unga Muṋe washu o vha o ana, vho vha vha songo tendelwa u vhona shango ḽi elaho mukhaha na ṋotshi ḽe a vha o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho." 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Vhana vha vhatuka vha vhenevho vhanna vho vha vha songo fumba, wonoyo wo vha wone murafho muswa we Joshua a fumbisa." 
Joshua5:8 Musi vho no fumba vhoṱhe, lushaka lwoṱhe lwa dzula mishashani vha vhuya vha fhola." 
Joshua5:9 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Ṋamusi ndi hone ndo thutha u nyadziwa haṋu nga Vhaegipita.” Ndi zwe afho fhethu ha pfi Giligala; na ṋamusi hu kha ḓi vhidzwa nga dzina ḽeneḽo." 
Joshua5:10 Musi Vhaisraele vho ṱoka mishasha Giligala mudavhini wa Jerikho, vha ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka nga madekwana a ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi." 
Joshua5:11 Nga matshelo ḽa vha ḓuvha ḽa u ranga vha tshi ḽa zwiḽiwa zwo liṅwaho Kanana: thoro dzo hadzingwaho na vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa; 
Joshua5:12 zwenezwo mana a si tsha wa, Vhaisraele vha si tsha a wana. U bva ṅwaha wonoyo vha ḽa zwiḽiwa zwo liṅwaho Kanana." 
Joshua5:13 Ḽifiṅwe ḓuvha Joshua e tsini ha Jerikho, a lavhelesa a mbo ḓi vhona munna ó ima phanḓa hawe, ó fara banga. Joshua a ya khae a vhudzisa a ri, “Vha muṅwe wa vhahali vhashu kana vha swina naa?”" 
Joshua5:14 Uyo munna a fhindula a ri, “A thi muṅwe wa vhahali vhaṋu, a thi swina. Ndi mulangi wa mmbi ya Yahavee. Ndo ḓa u ni lwela.” Joshua a ḓiposa fhasi a luvha a ri, “Ndi nṋe muḓinḓa wavho muṋe wanga. Vha ṱoḓa ndi tshi ita mini?”" 
Joshua5:15 Mulangi wa mmbi ya Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a ri, “Bvula navhula dzau, wo ima fhethu hukhethwa.” Joshua a ita zwe a vhudzwa." 
Joshua6:1 Khoro dza Jerikho dza dzula dzo valwa, dza lindwa uri Vhaisraele vha si dzhene. Ho vha hu si na ane a dzhena kana a bva afho muḓini." 
Joshua6:2 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Jerikho ndi u kumedza zwanḓani zwau khathihi na khosi yawo na vhahali vhawo." 
Joshua6:3 Iwe na vhahali vhau ni mone uyo muḓi kathihi nga ḓuvha ni fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi. 
Joshua6:4 U nange vhotshifhe vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha range phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga, muṅwe na muṅwe ó fara phalaphala. Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili iwe na vhahali vhau ni mone uyo muḓi kaṱanu na kavhili, vhotshifhe vha tshi khou lidza phalaphala dzavho." 
Joshua6:5 Zwenezwo ni tshi pfa vha tshi lidza vha lidza luhuwa luthihi, vhanna vhoṱhe vha ṱavhe mukosi muhulu, mitsheṱo ya muḓi i ḓo wela fhasi. Zwenezwo mmbi yoṱhe i mbo ḓi livha muḓini i dzhene.”" 
Joshua6:6 Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu a vhidza vhotshifhe a vha vhudza a ri, “Hwalani mbulungelo ya mulanga, vhaṱanu na vhavhili vhaṋu vha range phanḓa hayo vho fara phalaphala.”" 
Joshua6:7 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhathu vhawe uri vha thome u mona uyo muḓi, vho faraho zwihali vhe phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu." 
Joshua6:8 Zwenezwo vha ita nga he Joshua a vha vhudza, vho faraho zwihali vha ranga phanḓa ha vhotshifhe vhaṱanu na vhavhili vhe vha vha vha tshi khou lidza phalaphala phanḓa ha Muṋe washu – ndi uri vho tevhelwa nga vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vho hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga," 
Joshua6:9 vhenevho vha tevhelwa nga vho faraho zwihali vha murahu, phalaphala dzi tshi khou ḓi lila." 
Joshua6:10 Hone Joshua o vha o laya vhathu vhawe uri vha si ṱavhe mukosi, vha si vhuye vha amba na ipfi na ḽithihi a vhuye a vha vhudze." 
Joshua6:11 Joshua a vhudza tshigwada tsha vhanna vhenevho uri vha hwale mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu vha mone muḓi kathihi, vha konou humela mishashani, vha eḓela henefho." 
Joshua6:12 Nga matshelo Joshua a fhinduwa, vhotshifhe na vhahali vha mona muḓi lwa vhuvhili nga kutevhekanele kwonokuḽa kwa mulovha: ha ranga vho faraho zwihali, ha tevhela vhotshifhe vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha tshi khou lidza phalaphala dzavho, ha tevhela vhotshifhe vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu, ha konou tevhela vho faraho zwihali vha murahu. Tshifhinga tshoṱhe hetsho ho vha hu tshi khou lila phalaphala." 
Joshua6:13  
Joshua6:14 Nga ḓuvha heḽo ḽa vhuvhili vha dovha vha mona uyo muḓi kathihi, vha konou humela mishashani. Vha ita nga u ralo vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi." 
Joshua6:15 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili vha vuwa mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka, vha mona muḓi kaṱanu na kavhili nga nḓila yeneiḽa. Ndi ḽeneḽo ḓuvha fhedzi ḽe vha mona uyo muḓi kaṱanu na kavhili." 
Joshua6:16 Vha tshi mona lwa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili, musi vhotshifhe vha tshi ṱoḓa u lidza phalaphala, Joshua a vhudza vhathu vhawe uri vha ṱavhe mukosi, a ri, “Muṋe washu o ni ṋea muḓi hoyu!" 
Joshua6:17 Uyu muḓi na zwoṱhe zwi re ngomu hawo zwo fanela u lozwiwa tshoṱhe, zwi vhe nduvho ya Muṋe washu. Hu sale Rahaba wa phombwe na muṱa wawe fhedzi, nge a dzumba ṱholi dzashu." 
Joshua6:18 Hone inwi ni songo dzhia na tshithihi tshine tsha fanela u lozwiwa; arali na dzhia, ni ḓo vha no ḓivhangela khombo, vhathu vha mishasha ya Vhaisraele vha lozwiwa." 
Joshua6:19 Zwithu zwoṱhe zwo itwaho nga siliva na musuku na musinaseṱha na tsimbi ya ngweḓi zwi vhetshelwe thungo, ndi zwa Muṋe washu. Zwi vhulungwe tshisikuni tsha lupfumo tsha Muṋe washu.”" 
Joshua6:20 Ndi hone vhotshifhe vha tshi lidza phalaphala. Vhaḽa vhathu vha ri u zwi pfa, vha mbo ṱavha mukosi muhulu, mitsheṱo ya wela fhasi. Zwenezwo mmbi yoṱhe ya gonya tshikwara ya dzhena muḓini, ya u thutha." 
Joshua6:21 Vha vhulaha vhoṱhe vha re afho muḓini nga mafumo avho, vhanna na vhasadzi, vhaṱuku na vhahulwane, vha vhulaha na kholomo na nngu na donngi." 
Joshua6:22 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhudza vhaḽa vhanna vhavhili vhe vha vha vhe dziṱholi a ri, “Dzhenani nḓuni ya iḽa phombwe ni mu bvise na muṱa wawe, nga he na mu fulufhedzisa.”" 
Joshua6:23 Vha ya vha bvisa Rahaba khathihi na khotsi awe na mme awe na khaladzi dzawe na muṱa wawe woṱhe. Vha vha dzhia vhoṱhe, muṱa na dziphuli, vha vha isa he vha tsireledzea tsini ha mishasha ya Vhaisraele." 
Joshua6:24 Ndi hone vha tshi fhisa uyo muḓi, vha u fhisa we lore khathihi na zwoṱhe zwi re ngomu hawo, vha sia zwo itwaho nga musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha na tsimbi ya ngweḓi, zwenezwo vha zwi dzhia vha zwi vhulunga tshisikuni tsha lupfumo lwa Muṋe washu." 
Joshua6:25 Huno Joshua a tshidza Rahaba na mashaka awe oṱhe, nge a dzumba dziḽa ṱholi mbili dze a dzi ruma Jerikho. Vhaḓuhulu vha Rabaha vho dzula kha ḽa Israele, na ṋamusi." 
Joshua6:26 Nga musi wonoyo Joshua a anisa vhathu muano houno a ri, “Munna ane a vhuya a linga u vusa muḓi wa Jerikho u ḓo teketelwa nga Muṋe washu. Munna ane a vhuya a tea muteo wawo u ḓo felwa nga tanzhe ḽawe ḽa mutuka; munna ane a vhuya a vusa dzikhoro dzawo u ḓo felwa nga phedzi yawe.”" 
Joshua6:27 Muṋe washu o vha e na Joshua, bvumo ḽawe ḽa pfala shangoni ḽoṱhe." 
Joshua7:1 Muṋe washu a tshi laya Vhaisraele uri vha songo dzhia tshithu na tshithihi Jerikho tsho fanelaho u kumedzwa Ene, a vho ngo zwi tevhedza. Muṅwe munna ane a pfi Akhani o nyadza ndaela heyo, zwenezwo Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele. Akhani o vha e ṅwana wa Kharami, e muḓuhulu wa Zabadi, wa mutupo wa Zera, wa tsinde ḽa Juda." 
Joshua7:2 Joshua o ruma vhaṅwe vhanna vha tshi bva Jerikho vha ya Ai, muḓi u re vhubvaḓuvha ha Bethele tsini ha Bethavene, a vha vhudza uri vha yo tandula iḽo shango. Musi vho no ralo," 
Joshua7:3 vho vhuya, vha vhika ha Joshua vha ri, “A zwi vhuyi zwa ṱoḓea roṱhe ri tshi yo dia Ai. Nga vha rume vhanna vhane vha nga vha zwigidi zwivhili kana zwiraru. Vha songo ḓidina nga u ruma mmbi yoṱhe uri i yo lwa, a si muḓi muhulwane.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ha mbo ya Vhaisraele vhane vha nga vha zwigidi zwiraru, hone vha pandamedzwa vha vhuya." 
Joshua7:5 Vhanna vha Ai vho vha pandamedza u bva khoroni ya muḓi u swika makwarani, vha vhulaha vhane vha nga swika 36 nḓilani vha tshi tsa tshivhanga. Vhaisraele vha kulea nungo vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Joshua7:6 Joshua na vharangaphanḓa vha Israele vha ṱungufhala vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho, vha ḓiposa fhasi phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu vha shuvhama henefho ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela, vha ḓihasha buse ṱhohoni dzavho u sumbedza u pfa havho vhuṱungu." 
Joshua7:7 Joshua a ri, “Yawee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu! Wo vhuya wa ri wedzelani mulambo wa Jorodani, wa ri kumedza Vhaamori uri vha ri lozwe? Ndi mini ri songo ḓidzulela zwashu seli na luḽa lwa mulambo wa Jorodani?" 
Joshua7:8 Yawee Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo ri mini hezwino Vhaisraele vho pandamedzwa nga maswina?" 
Joshua7:9 Vhakanana na vhoṱhe vha re fhano shangoni vha ḓo zwi pfa, vha ri tanga vha ri lozwa dzina ḽashu ḽa si tsha pfala shangoni. Zwino u ḓo ita mini uri dzina ḽau ḽi huliswe?”" 
Joshua7:10 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Vuwa! Wo shuvhamelani mavuni nga u rali?" 
Joshua7:11 Vhaisraele vho tshinya! Vho pfuka mulanga wanga we nda vha vhudza uri vha u vhulunge. Vho dzhia zwiṅwe zwithu zwe zwa pfi zwi kumedzwe Nṋe. Vho zwi tswa, vho zwifha, vha zwi ṱanganya na zwithu zwavho." 
Joshua7:12 Ndi zwine Vhaisraele vha si kone u imedzana na maswina avho. Vha vho pandamedzwa nga maswina nge zwino vhone vhaṋe vha vha vho laṱiwa uri vha lozwiwe! A thi tsha ḓo dzula na inwi arali na sa lozwa zwithu zwe na pfi ni songo zwi dzhia! 
Joshua7:13 Takuwa! Kumulula vhathu, u ite uri vha kone u ḓa phanḓa hanga. Vha vhudze vha ḓilugise matshelo, ngauri nga Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Inwi Vhaisraele, kha thundu dzaṋu ni na zwiṅwe zwithu zwe nda ri ni zwi lozwe! Ni nga si kone u imedzana na maswina aṋu ni sa athu laṱa zwithu hezwo!" 
Joshua7:14 Zwino-ha vha vhudze uri nga matsheloni vha ḓiḓise, tsinde nga tsinde. Hu ḓo sendela tsinde ḽine nda ḓo ḽi nanga, mutupo nga mutupo. Kha mutupo wonoyo hu ḓo sendela vhane nda vha nanga, muṱa nga muṱa. Ha konou sendela muṱa une nda u nanga, munna nga munna." 
Joshua7:15 Muthu ane a ḓo nangiwa a wanala e na thundu dzo iledzwaho u ḓo fhiswa khathihi na muṱa wawe, na zwoṱhe zwine a vha nazwo, ngauri o pfuka mulanga wanga, o ita zwa vhuṱudzi kha Vhaisraele.”" 
Joshua7:16 Ḽi tshi tsha hu tshee nga matsheloni Joshua a isa Vhaisraele, tsinde nga tsinde, ha mvaṱiwa tsinde ḽa Juda." 
Joshua7:17 Joshua a swikisa tsinde ḽa Juda, mutupo nga mutupo, ha mvaṱiwa mutupo wa Zera. Ndi hone a tshi swikisa vha mutupo wa Zera, muṱa nga muṱa, ha farwa muṱa wa Zabadi." 
Joshua7:18 A konou swikisa muṱa wa Zabadi, munna nga munna, ha farwa Akhani, ṅwana wa Kharami, muḓuhulu wa Zabadi, wa tsinde ḽa Juda." 
Joshua7:19 Joshua a mu vhudza a ri, “Ṅwananga, ambani ngoho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, ni bule vhutshinyi haṋu. Zwino mmbudzeni zwe na ita. Ni songo linga u nnzumbela.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akhani a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ngoho, ndo khakhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, zwe nda ita ngezwi." 
Joshua7:21 Kha zwithu zwe ra zwi thuba ndo vhona phuraphura ya u naka i no bva Babele na siliva ine ya nga lemela khilogiramu mbili na baphathi ḽa musuku ḽine ḽa lemela u fhira hafu ya khilogiramu, nda zwi emula nga maanḓa nda zwi dzhia. Vha ḓo zwi wana zwo bwelwa ngomu denndeni yanga, siliva i nga fhasi.”" 
Joshua7:22 Joshua a ruma vhaṅwe vhanna, vha gidimela denndeni iyo, vha wana izwo zwithu zwe zwa pfi zwi kumedzwe Muṋe washu zwó bwelwa henefho, siliva i nga fhasi." 
Joshua7:23 Vha zwi bvisa afho denndeni, vha zwi isa ha Joshua na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vha zwi adza fhasi phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
Joshua7:24 Joshua kathihi na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha fara Akhani, vha dzhia iḽa siliva na iḽa phuraphura na ḽiḽa baphathi ḽa musuku, vha fara na vhana vha Akhani vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana na kholomo na donngi na nngu, vha dzhia na dennde yawe, na zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo, vha zwi isa Govhani ḽa Akhoro (Khombo)." 
Joshua7:25 Joshua a ri, “Ndi mini wo ri ḓisela khombo nngafha? Muṋe washu zwino u ḓo u ḓisela khombo!” Vhathu vhoṱhe zwenezwo vha kanḓa Akhani nga matombo a vhuya a fa, vha kanḓa na muṱa wawe vha vha fhisa na thundu dzavho." 
Joshua7:26 Vha khokha matombo nṱha havho a ita thulwi, na ṋamusi i tshee hone. Ndi zwine afho fhethu ha kha ḓi pfi Govha ḽa Akhoro (Khombo). Zwenezwo mbiti dza Muṋe washu dza dzika." 
Joshua8:1 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “Dzhia vhahali vhoṱhe u gonye navho muḓini wa Ai. U songo ofha tshithu, u songo kulea nungo. Ndo u kumedza khosi ya Ai na vhathu vhayo na muḓi wayo na shango ḽayo." 
Joshua8:2 U ite muḓi wa Ai na khosi yawo zwenezwiḽa zwe wa ita muḓi wa Jerikho na khosi yawo, hone zwino, ni nga ḓi dzhia thundu dzawo na zwifuwo zwa vha zwaṋu. Ḓilugiseni uri ni lalele muḓi uyo vhá songo vhuya vha humbula, ni vha ḓe nga murahu.”" 
Joshua8:3 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi ḓilugisa uri a ye Ai na vhahali vhawe vhoṱhe vhomakone vha no swika 30 000, a ri vha ye vhusiku" 
Joshua8:4 a vha vhudza a ri, “Dzumbamani siani heḽiḽa ḽa muḓi, hone hu songo vha kule nawo, ni ḓilugisele u u tshoṱhela." 
Joshua8:5 Nṋe na vhanna vhanga ri ḓo ya ro livha uyo muḓi. Musi vhanna vha Ai vha tshi bva uri vha lwe na riṋe, riṋe ri ḓo rembuluwa ra shavha, sa zwe ra ita zwiḽa u rangani." 
Joshua8:6 Vha ḓo ri pandamedza ra vhuya ra vha kunga vha bva muḓini. Vha do vhona unga ri khou vha shavha sa zwe ra ita u rangani. 
Joshua8:7 Ndi hone inwi ni tshi ḓo takuwa he na vha dzumbama, na thuba muḓi. Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ni kumedza wone." 
Joshua8:8 Nó no thuba uyo muḓi ni u fhise nga mulilo, nga he Muṋe washu a ri laya. Ni ite nga u ralo.”" 
Joshua8:9 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vha ruma, vha ya vhudzumbamoni havho, vha lindela vhe henefho, vhukovhela ha muḓi wa Ai, vhukati ha Ai na Bethele. Joshua a lala na mmbi iḽa iṅwe." 
Joshua8:10 Ḽi tshi tsha Joshua a fhinduwa, a vhidza vhahali vhawe vha kuvhangana. Ene na vharangaphanḓa vha Israele vha vha ranga phanḓa vha ya Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Joshua na vhahali vha livha khoroni khulwane ya muḓi, vha ṱoka mishasha siani ḽa devhula, hú na govha vhukati havho na Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Joshua a dzhia vhanna vhane vha nga swika 5 000, a vha dzumba vhukovhela ha muḓi, vhukati ha Ai na Bethele." 
Joshua8:13 Vhahali vha dzudzanyelwa u lwa, vhoṱhe vha re mishashani devhula ha muḓi na vho lalelaho vhukovhela hawo. Joshua a mbo tsela govhani a lala henefho." 
Joshua8:14 Khosi ya Ai a tshi vhona vhanna vha Joshua, a si vhuye a lenga. Ene na vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe vha bva vha livha govhani ḽa Jorodani uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele henefhaḽa he vha lwa navho u rangani, a sa ḓivhi uri u khou ḓo tshoṱhelwa nga murahu." 
Joshua8:15 Joshua na vhanna vhawe vha ḓiita unga vha khou humela murahu, vha vha shavha vha livha phangani." 
Joshua8:16 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha uyo muḓi vha rambiwa uri vha vha pandamedze, huno vha tshi khou pandamedza Joshua, vha kungea vha swika kule na muḓi." 
Joshua8:17 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Ai na vha Bethele vha sala Vhaisraele murahu, muḓi wa sala wo vulea hu si na ane a u lwela." 
Joshua8:18 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Joshua a ri, “Sumba muḓi wa Ai nga pfumo ḽau, ndi u kumedza wone.” Joshua a ita zwe a vhudza." 
Joshua8:19 Hezwi a tshi tou imisa tshanḓa tshawe, vhanna vhe vha vha vho dzumbama vha mbo ḓi ri vukuluku vha tshoṱhela muḓi vha u thuba, vha mbo ḓi u funga nga mulilo." 
Joshua8:20 Musi vhanna vha Ai vha tshi sedza murahu, vha vhona hu tshi duba buluvhutsi. Vho vha vha si tshee na vhushavhelo ngauri na Vhaisraele vhe vha shavha vho livha phangani vho mbo ḓi rembuluwa vha lwa navho." 
Joshua8:21 Musi Joshua na vhanna vhawe vha tshi vhona uri vhaḽa vhaṅwe vho no thuba muḓi na uri buluvhutsi ḽawo ḽi khou duba, vha mbo rembuluwa vha thoma u vhulaha vhanna vha Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe ngomu muḓini zwino vha tsela fhasi vha ḓibaḓekanya na iyo mmbi. Zwenezwo vhanna vha Ai vha wana vho tangwa tshoṱhe nga Vhaisraele, vha vhulawa vhoṱhe. A hu na we a ponyoka, a hu na we a tshila," 
Joshua8:23 arali i si khosi ya Ai. Ene o tou thubiwa a iswa ha Joshua. 
Joshua8:24 Vhaisraele vho pandamedzelwaho phangani vha vhulaha maswina oṱhe henefhaḽa phangani he vha pandamedzelwa hone, vha konou humela Ai, vha vhulaha vhoṱhe vho salaho." 
Joshua8:25 Joshua a dzula o sumba muḓi wa Ai nga pfumo ḽawe, a si vhuye a ḽi vhea fhasi vhoṱhe vha re henefho vha sa athu vhulawa vhoṱhe. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Ai vho mbo ḓi vhulawa musi wonoyo – vhanna na vhasadzi vha 12 000." 
Joshua8:26  
Joshua8:27 Hone kholomo na thundu zwe zwa thubiwa henefho muḓini, Vhaisraele vho zwi dzhia nga he Muṋe washu a laya Joshua." 
Joshua8:28 Joshua a fhisa muḓi wa Ai a u sia u matumba. U tshee wo ralo na ṋamusi. 
Joshua8:29 Joshua a nembeledza khosi ya Ai murini, a litsha tshitumbu tshawe henefho ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela, a konou ri tshitumbu tshi ṱuwisiwe, tsha kudzwa fhasi muṋangoni wa khoro ya muḓi. Vha khokha matombo khatsho a ita thulwi khulu, na ṋamusi i tshee hone." 
Joshua8:30 Joshua a fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele aḽiṱari thavhani ya Ebala. 
Joshua8:31 A i fhaṱa a tshi tevhedza ndayo dze Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele, nga kuambele kwa Mulayo wa Mushe hu tshi pfi, “I vhe aḽiṱari yo fhaṱwaho nga matombo a songo vhaḓwaho nga musendo wa tsimbi.” Vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwa u fhisa khayo, vha ṋekedza na nduvho dza u konana nae." 
Joshua8:32 Henefho matomboni Joshua a ṅwalulula Mulayo we wa vha wo ṅwalwa nga Mushe, a u ṅwala Vhaisraele vha tshi khou sedza." 
Joshua8:33 Vhaisraele na vharangaphanḓa vhavho na vhakoma na vhahaṱuli khathihi na vhatsinda vha re navho, vha rwa muduba masia mavhili a mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu, vho livhana na vhotshifhe vha Vhalivi vho i hwalaho. Hafu ya vhathu vha ima vho furalela thavha ya Gerisimu, hafu iṅwe vha ima vho furalela thavha ya Ebala. Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu o vha o vha laya uri vha ite nga u ralo musi tshifhinga tshavho tsha u ṱanganedza mashudu tshi tshi swika." 
Joshua8:34 Zwenezwo Joshua a vhala Mulayo woṱhe a tshi tou ambela nṱha, a tshi vhala a mashudu khathihi na a u teketela, nga he zwa ṅwalwa buguni ya Mulayo." 
Joshua8:35 A ho ngo vha na ndayo na nthihi ya Mushe ye Joshua a si i vhalele tshivhidzo tshoṱhe. Ḽo vha ḽo angaredza na vhasadzi na vhana na vhatsinda vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula navho. 
Joshua9:1 Mahosi oṱhe vhukovhela ha Jorodani vha pfa uri Vhaisraele vho kunda maswina avho. Ndi mahosi oṱhe a mashango a re mivhunduni na zwigodini na hoṱhe u navha na Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango u swika Libanoni – ndi mahosi a Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi. 
Joshua9:2 Vhoṱhe vha mbo rambana vha ṱanganya mmbi dzavho uri vha lwe na Joshua na Vhaisraele. 
Joshua9:3 Vhahivi vha Gibioni vha pfa zwe Joshua a ita Jerikho na Ai," 
Joshua9:4 vha vhamba maano a u mu fhura. Vha dzhia mbuvha, vha hwesa donngi dzavho masaga o ṱahalaho na mikumba ya waini i re na zwinamo." 
Joshua9:5 Vha ambara madzanganda na navhula dzo ṱahalaho dzo namiwaho. Vhurotho havho ha mbuvha ho vha ho oma, ho tshakekana." 
Joshua9:6 Ndi hone vha tshi ya mishashani ya Giligala vha amba na Joshua na vhanna vha Israele vha ri, “Ri bva shangoni ḽa kule. Ri humbela uri ni vhofhe mulanga na riṋe.”" 
Joshua9:7 Vhanna vha Israele vha fhindula Vhahivi vha ri, “Ndi mini ri tshi fanela u vhofha mulanga na inwi? Khamusi ni dzula fhano tsini.”" 
Joshua9:8 Vhone vha vhudza Joshua vha ri, “Riṋe ri vhalanda vhavho.” Joshua a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi inwi vhonnyi? Ni bva ngafhi?”" 
Joshua9:9 Ndi hone vha tshi mu zwifhela vha ri, “Ri bva shangoni ḽa kule-kule muṋe washu, ro pfa zwa Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu. Ro pfa zwoṱhe zwe a ita Egipita" 
Joshua9:10 na zwe a ita mahosi a Vhaamori vhubvaduvha ha Jorodani: Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni na Ogo khosi ya Bashani we a vha a tshi dzula Ashtharotho. 
Joshua9:11 Vharangaphanḓa vhashu na vhathu vhoṱhe vha no dzula shangoni ḽa hashu vho ri vhudza uri ri lugise mbuvha ya lwendo, ri ḓe ri ṱangane na vhone. Ro vhudzwa uri ri vhe vhalanda vhavho, ri vha humbele uri vha vhofhe mulanga na riṋe." 
Joshua9:12 Kha vha dzou vhona vhurotho hashu. Musi ri tshi takuwa naho hayani, ri tshi fara lwendo lwa u ḓa u ṱangana navho, ho vha vhu tshi kha ḓi dudela. Hone nga vha dzou vhona, zwino ho no oma, ho no tou tshakekana." 
Joshua9:13 Musi ri tshi panga mikumba hei ya waini yo vha i miswa, zwino nga vha dzou vhona, yo no ṱahala. Zwiambaro zwashu na navhula zwo ṱahala nge ra tshimbila lwendo lulapfu.”" 
Joshua9:14 Vhanna vha Israele vha ṱanganedza zwiṅwe zwiḽiwa zwa vhenevho, hone vha si range u vhudzisa Muṋe washu ayo mafhungo." 
Joshua9:15 Joshua a vhofha mulanga wa vhukonani na vhathu vha Gibioni, a vha tendela uri vha tshile. Vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu vha Israele vha fulufhedzisa nga muano uri vha ḓo vhulunga uyo mulanga." 
Joshua9:16 Musi ho fhela maḓuvha mararu vhó no vhofha mulanga, Vhaisraele vha zwi pfa uri vhukuma avho vhathu vha dzula henefho tsini." 
Joshua9:17 Zwenezwo Vhaisraele vha takuwa vha fara lwendo, ho fhela maḓuvha mararu vha swika miḓini hune ha dzula avho vhathu: Gibioni na Khefira na Bierotho na Kiriathi Jiarimu." 
Joshua9:18 Hone Vhaisraele vha si kone u vha vhulaha, nge vharangaphanḓa vhavho vha vha vho vha fulufhedzisa nga muano nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha gungulela vharangaphanḓa nga ayo mafhungo," 
Joshua9:19 hone vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro vha fulufhedzisa nga muano nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele. Zwino a ri koni u vha ita tshithu." 
Joshua9:20 Ro fanela u vha litsha vha tshila nge ra vha fulufhedzisa; ra sa ralo Mudzimu u ḓo ri rwa. 
Joshua9:21 Kha vha tshile zwavho, hone vha fanela u ri reḓela khuni, vha ri kela maḓi.” Hoyo wo vha wone muhumbulo wa vharangaphanḓa." 
Joshua9:22 Joshua a ri vhathu vha Gibioni vha ḓiswe khae, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “No ri fhurelani na ri vhudza uri ni bva kule, hufha ni tshi dzula henefhano tsini?" 
Joshua9:23 Mudzimu o ni teketela nge na ita nga u ralo. Vhathu vha haṋu vha ḓo dzula vhe dziphuli, vha ḓo reḓa khuni dza thembele ya Mudzimu wanga vha ka maḓi ayo.”" 
Joshua9:24 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro ita nga u ralo muṋe wanga, nge ra pfa uri vhukumakuma ndi ngoho uri Yahavee Mudzimu wavho o vhudza muḓinḓa wawe Mushe uri a ni ṋee shango ḽoṱhe, ni vhulahe vhathu vha no dzula khaḽo musi ni tshi swika. Ro vha ri tshi ni ofha, ro vha ri tshi ofha uri ri ḓo fa, ndi zwe ra ita nga u ralo." 
Joshua9:25 Zwino ri zwanḓani zwavho, nga vha ri ite zwine vha vhona zwi zwone.”" 
Joshua9:26 Zwino Joshua o ita hezwi: o vha tsireledza, a si tende Vhaisraele vha tshi vha vhulaha." 
Joshua9:27 Naho zwo ralo a ḓi vha ita dziphuli, vha reḓela Vhaisraele khuni, vha vha kela maḓi, zwenezwo vha zwi shumela na aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu. Vho ḓi shuma mushumo wonoyo fhethu he Muṋe washu a hu nanga uri a luvhiwe hone, na ṋamusi." 
Joshua10:1 Adoni Tsedeke, khosi ya Jerusalema, a zwi pfa uri Joshua o thuba muḓi wa Ai a u lozwa tshoṱhe, a vhulaha khosi yawo, sa zwe a ita muḓi wa Jerikho na khosi yawo. A pfa na zwauri vhathu vha Gibioni vho vhofha mulanga na Vhaisraele nahone vha vho dzula navho."
