Joshua10:2 Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha farwa nga nyofho ngauri muḓi wa Gibioni wo vha u muhulu u tshi ḓi nga miḓi i re na khosi; wo vha wo hula u fhira wa Ai, nahone vhanna vhawo vho vha vhe vhahali." 
Joshua10:3 Ndi hone Adoni Tsedeke a tshi swikisa malaedzwa haano ha Hohamu khosi ya Hebroni na ha Phiramu khosi ya Jaramuthu na ha Jafia khosi ya Lakhishi na ha Debiri khosi ya Egiloni a ri," 
Joshua10:4 “Iḓani ni mpfarise ri die muḓi wa Gibioni, vho vhofha mulanga na Joshua na Vhaisraele.”" 
Joshua10:5 Mahosi hayo maṱanu a Vhaamori – a Jerusalema na Hebroni na Jaramuthu na Lakhishi na Egiloni – vha ṱanganya mmbi dzavho, vha tanga muḓi wa Gibioni, vha u dia." 
Joshua10:6 Vhanna vha Gibioni vha isa fhungo ha Joshua mishashani ya Giligala vha ri, “Vha songo ri laṱa muṋe wanga! Nga vha ṱavhanye vha ḓe vha ri phalale! Nga vha ri lamulele! Mahosi oṱhe a Vhaamori a no dzula mivhunduni vho ṱanganya mmbi dzavho, vho ḓa u ri dia!”" 
Joshua10:7 Ndi hone Joshua na mmbi yawe yoṱhe vha tshi takuwa Giligala, khathihi na vhahali vhawe vhahulwane." 
Joshua10:8 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua ri, “U songo vha ofha. Ndo no ḓi vha kumedza zwanḓani zwau. A hu na na muthihi wavho ane a ḓo kona u imedzana na iwe.”" 
Joshua10:9 Joshua na mmbi yawe vha tshimbila vhusiku hoṱhe u bva Giligala vha tshi ya Gibioni, vha wela Vhaamori vha songo humbula." 
Joshua10:10 Muṋe washu a ita uri Vhaamori vha tshi vhona mmbi ya Vhaisraele vha farwe nga nyofho. Vhaisraele vha vhulaha vhanzhi henefho Gibioni, vha vha pandamedza nga phara ya thavha ya Bethe Horoni, vha ḓi vha pandamedza vha sa vha litshi u vhuya u swika tshipembe Azeka na Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Musi Vhaamori vha tshi khou gidima vha tshi tsa nga phara vha tshi shavha mmbi ya Vhaisraele, Muṋe washu a vha ruthutha nga matombo mahulu a tshifhango u vhuya u swika Azeka. Vho vhulawaho nga matombo a tshifhango vho fhira vho vhulawaho nga Vhaisraele." 
Joshua10:12 Ḓuvha ḽe Muṋe washu a ita uri Vhaisraele vha kunde Vhaamori, Joshua a amba na Muṋe washu. A amba Vhaisraele vha tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Iwe ḓuvha, ima nṱha ha Gibioni u tou tsere; iwe ṅwedzi, ima nṱha ha Govha ḽa Ayaloni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Nangoho ḓuvha ḽa ima ḽe tsere, ṅwedzi wa si sudzuluwe, lushaka lwa vhuya lwa kunda maswina alwo. Hezwo zwo ṅwalwa buguni ya “A si na vhufhura”. Ḓuvha ḽo ima ḽe tsere vhukati ha lutombo, ḽa si kovhele ḽa fhedza ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Joshua10:14 A ho ngo vhuya ha vha na ḓuvha ḽi no nga heḽo, nahone u bva zwenezwo a ḽo ngo dovha ḽa vha hone, zwe Muṋe washu a thetshelesa muthu wa ṋama. Ndi uri Muṋe washu o vha a tshi lwa o ima na Vhaisraele!" 
Joshua10:15 Ho no fhela izwo, Joshua na mmbi yawe vha humela mishashani ya Giligala." 
Joshua10:16 Mahosi maṱanu a Vhaamori o vha o ponyoka a shavha, vha yo dzumbama bakoni ḽa Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Muṅwe muthu a vha tumbula, Joshua a vhudzwa he vha dzumbama hone." 
Joshua10:18 Joshua a ri, “Kungulusani matombo mahulwane a vale muṋango wa bako. Vheani vhalindi henefho," 
Joshua10:19 hone inwi ni songo dzula hone. Ni pandamedze maswina, ni vha wele nga murahu; ni songo vha litsha vha dzhena miḓini yavho! Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Joshua na vhanna vha Israele vha vha vhulaha lu ofhisaho, ha ponyoka vha si gathi, vha shavhela ngomu mitsheṱoni ya muḓi wavho vha si vhulawe." 
Joshua10:21 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Joshua vha humela khae mishashani ya Makeda hu si na o huvhalaho. Ho vha hu si na na muthihi afho shangoni we a vha a tshi nga fanywa u amba ḽivhi nga Vhaisraele. 
Joshua10:22 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi ri, “Vulani muṋango wa bako ni ḓise mahosi hayo maṱanu ha nṋe.”" 
Joshua10:23 Vha vula bako, vha bvisa mahosi a Jerusalema na Hebroni na Jaramuthu na Lakhishi na Egiloni" 
Joshua10:24 vha vha isa ha Joshua. Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhidza vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele vha ḓa khae, a vhudza vhahulwane vhe vha vha vho ṱuwa nae uri vha ḓe vha kande ayo mahosi mitsinga. Vhone vha ita nga u ralo." 
Joshua10:25 Joshua a konou vhudza vhahulwane vhawe a ri, “Ni songo ofha, ni songo kulea nungo. Ivhani na nungo ni ime no khwaṱha, ngauri hezwo ndi zwine Muṋe washu a ḓo ita maswina oṱhe ane a lwa na inwi.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhulaha ayo mahosi maṱanu a tou vha nembeledza kha miri miṱanu, vha litsha zwitumbu zwavho henefho ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela." 
Joshua10:27 Ḓuvha ḽi tshi kovhela Joshua a ṋea ndaela, zwitumbu zwavho zwa fhahululwa, zwa poswa bakoni ḽeneḽiḽa he vha vha vho dzumbama hone. Muṋango wa bako wa valwa nga matombo mahulu, na zwino a tshee henefho." 
Joshua10:28 Musi wonoyo Joshua a dia muḓi wa Makeda, a thuba na khosi yawo. A vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe afho muḓini, ha si vhe na we a siwa a tshi tshila. Khosi ya Makeda a i ita zwe a ita khosi ya Jerikho." 
Joshua10:29 Zwo no ralo, Joshua na mmbi yawe vha takuwa Makeda vha livha Libina, vha u govhela vha u dia." 
Joshua10:30 Muṋe washu a kumedza na uyo muḓi na khosi yawo zwanḓani zwa Vhaisraele. A ho ngo vha na we vha mu sia, vho vhulaha vhoṱhe. Na iyo khosi vha i ita zwe vha ita khosi ya Jerikho." 
Joshua10:31 Ho no fhela izwo, Joshua na mmbi yawe vha takuwa Libina vha livha Lakhishi, vha u govhela vha u dia." 
Joshua10:32 Muṋe washu a kumedza Vhaisraele muḓi wa Lakhishi vha u kunda nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili ḽa nndwa. A vho ngo sia na muthu na muthihi, vho vhulaha vhoṱhe afho muḓini, sa zwe vha ita Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Horamu khosi ya Gezere a ḓa u lamulela Lakhishi, hone Joshua a mu kunda na mmbi yawe, a si sie na muthihi wavho a tshi tshila." 
Joshua10:34 Zwenezwo Joshua na mmbi yawe vha takuwa Lakhishi vha livha Egiloni, vha u govhela vha u dia." 
Joshua10:35 Vha u thuba musi wonoyo, vha vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe vha henefho, sa zwe vha ita Lakhishi." 
Joshua10:36 Zwo no ralo Joshua na mmbi yawe vha takuwa Egiloni vha gonya mivhundu vha livha Hebroni, vha u dia" 
Joshua10:37 vha u thuba. Vha vhulaha khosi na vhathu vhoṱhe afho muḓini na ḓoroboni dzoṱhe dza henefho tsini. Joshua a ri uyo muḓi u lozwiwe tshoṱhe, sa zwe a ita Egiloni. A hu na we a siwa a tshi tshila afho muḓini." 
Joshua10:38 Ndi hone Joshua na mmbi yawe vha tshi humela Debiri, vha u dia." 
Joshua10:39 A u thuba na khosi yawo khathihi na ḓorobo dza henefho tsini. Vho vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe henefho. Joshua a ita Debiri na khosi yawo zwe a ita Hebroni na Libina na khosi yawo. 
Joshua10:40 Joshua a kunda shango ḽoṱhe. O kunda mahosi a mivhunduni na Negeve na midavhini i re tsini ha lwanzhe na midavhini ya vhubvaḓuvha. Ho ngo sia na muthihi a tshi tshila, vhoṱhe vho vhulawa. Hezwo ndi zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a laya." 
Joshua10:41 Joshua o vha kunda a dzhia ḽoṱhe u bva Kadeshe Barania thungo ya tshipembe u swika Gaza tsini ha lwanzhe, a angaredza dzingu ḽoṱhe ḽa Gosheni, na u ya devhula u vhuya u swika Gibioni." 
Joshua10:42 Joshua o kunda mahosi oṱhe hayo na mashango avho o bva pfumo luthihi ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o vha a tshi khou lwela Israele. 
Joshua10:43 Ngavhuya Joshua na mmbi yawe vha humela mishashani ya Giligala. 
Joshua11:1 Musi mafhungo a u kunda ha Vhaisraele a tshi swika ha Jabini khosi ya Hatsoro, ene a swikisa ipfi ha Jobaba khosi ya Madoni na ha mahosi a Shimironi na Akhashafu," 
Joshua11:1 Musi mafhungo a u kunda ha Vhaisraele a tshi swika ha Jabini khosi ya Hatsoro, ene a swikisa ipfi ha Jobaba khosi ya Madoni na ha mahosi a Shimironi na Akhashafu," 
Joshua11:2 na ha mahosi a dzulaho mivhunduni thungo ya devhula na govhani ḽa Jorodani tshipembe ha dzivha ḽa Khinirethe na midavhini i re tsini ha lwanzhe na u ṱutshela lwanzheni tsini ha Doro. 
Joshua11:3 A swikisa ipfi na ha Vhakanana masia oṱhe a mulambo wa Jorodani, na ha Vhaamori na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vhajebusi vha re mivhunduni, na ha Vhahivi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula tsindeni ḽa thavha ya Heremoni shangoni ḽa Mitsipha." 
Joshua11:4 Vha ḓa na vhahali vhavho vhoṱhe, yo vha i mmbi ya vhanna vho ḓalaho unga thoro dza muṱavha wa lwanzhe. Vho vha vhe na bere nnzhi na gariki dza nndwa." 
Joshua11:5 Mahosi hayo oṱhe a ṱanganya mmbi dzao, vha ḓa vhoṱhe vha ṱoka mishasha maroromani a Miromo uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele." 
Joshua11:6 Muṋe washu a vhudza Joshua a ri, “U songo vha ofha. Matshelo nga tshifhinga hetshino ndi ḓo vha ndo vha vhulaha vhoṱhe ndi tshi lwela Vhaisraele. U holefhadze bere dzavho, u fhise gariki dzavho dza nndwa.”" 
Joshua11:7 Ndi hone Joshua na vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe vha tshi vha tshoṱhela vha songo humbula, henefho maroromani a Miromo." 
Joshua11:8 Muṋe washu a vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa Vhaisraele vha vha kunda; Vhaisraele vha vha wela, vha vha pandamedza vha vha swikisa devhula Misirifotho Maimi na Sidoni, thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha vha vha swikisa govhani ḽa Mitsipha. Iyo nndwa ya lwiwa u swika hu si tshee na na muthihi wa maswina o salaho a tshi khou tshila." 
Joshua11:9 Joshua a vha ita zwe Muṋe washu a laya: o holefhadza bere dzavho, a fhisa gariki dzavho dza nndwa." 
Joshua11:10 Joshua zwenezwo a huma, a yo thuba Hatsoro, a vhulaha khosi yawo. Misi iyo Hatsoro wo vha u na maanḓa u fhira mivhuso yoṱhe heyo." 
Joshua11:11 Henefho vha vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe, ha si vhe na we a siwa a tshi tshila, uyo muḓi wa fhiswa we lore." 
Joshua11:12 Joshua a thuba miḓi yoṱhe heyo na mahosi ayo, a tshi vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe, nga he Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a laya." 
Joshua11:13 Hone Vhaisraele a vho ngo fhisa miḓi yo fhaṱwaho zwikwarani, we Joshua a fhisa ndi Hatsoro." 
Joshua11:14 Vhaisraele vho dzhia zwoṱhe zwa mutengo muhulu na kholomo miḓini heyo, zwa vha zwavho. Hone vhathu vhayo vho vha vhulaha vhoṱhe, ha si vhe na we a siwa a tshi tshila." 
Joshua11:15 Muṋe washu o vha o laya muḓinḓa wawe Mushe, Mushe a laya Joshua, Joshua a thetshelesa. Ho ngo siedza na tshithihi tshe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Joshua11:16 Joshua o thuba shango ḽoṱhe, shango ḽa mivhunduni na Negeve, na dzingu ḽoṱhe ḽa Gosheni khathihi na govha ḽa Jorodani." 
Joshua11:17 Iḽo shango thungo ya tshipembe ḽi thoma thavhani ya Halaka tsini ha Seiri u vhuya u swika Baali Gadi thungo ya devhula, govhani ḽa Libanoni, tshipembe ha thavha ya Heremoni. Joshua o lwa na mahosi a shango ḽeneḽo tshifhinga tshilapfu, hone a vha thuba vhoṱhe, a vha vhulaha." 
Joshua11:18  
Joshua11:19 Muḓi muthihi fhedzi we wa vhofha mulanga na Vhaisraele ndi Vhahivi vha Gibioni. Miṅwe yoṱhe yo kundwa nndwani. 
Joshua11:20 Muṋe washu o konḓisa mbilu dzavho uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele uri a vha lozwe tshoṱhe, vhoṱhe vha vhulawe hu si na khathutshelo. Hezwo ndi zwe Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Joshua11:21 Misi iyo Joshua a ṱuwa a yo lozwa lushaka lwa miswonḓa vhane vha pfi Vhaanaki vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa mivhundu, Hebroni na Debiri na Anabu na mashangoni oṱhe a mivhundu ya Juda na Israele. Joshua a vha lozwa tshoṱhe na miḓi yavho." 
Joshua11:22 A hu na na Muanaki na muthihi o siwaho shangoni ḽa Israele, he ha sala vha si gathi ndi Gaza na Gathi na Ashidodo." 
Joshua11:23 Joshua a thuba shango ḽoṱhe, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. Joshua a ḽi ṋea Vhaisraele ḽa vha ḽavho, a ḽi kovhekanya nga mikovhe, tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa wana mukovhe waḽo. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi awela nndwa." 
Joshua12:1 Vhaisraele vho vha vho no ḓi kunda shango ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani vha dzula khaḽo, u bva govhani ḽa Arinoni u gonya na govha ḽa Jorodani, u swika thavhani ya Heremoni thungo ya devhula." 
Joshua12:2 Mahosi e vha kunda ndi mavhili, muṅwe o vha Sihoni, khosi ya Vhaamori we a vha a tshi vhusa Hesheboni. Muvhuso wawe wo vha wo angaredza na hafu ya Giliadi: u bva Aruere, lumemeni lwa govha ḽa Arinoni, na muḓi u re vhukati ha govha ḽeneḽo, u vhuya u swika mulamboni wa Jaboko, masakhani a Amoni;" 
Joshua12:3 wa angaredza govha ḽa Jorodani u bva dzivhani ḽa Khinirethe tshipembe, u swika Bethe Jeshimotho, vhubvaḓuvha ha Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo, u livha tsindeni ḽa thavha ya Phisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Vha kunda na Ogo khosi ya Bashani. Ndi ene wa u fhedza wa Vharefai; o vha a tshi vhusa Ashtharotho na Edrei. 
Joshua12:5 Muvhuso wawe wo vha u tshi angaredza na thavha ya Heremoni na Salekha na ḽoṱhe ḽa Bashani u swika mikanoni ya Geshuru na Maakha, khathihi na hafu ya Giliadi u swika shangoni ḽa Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni." 
Joshua12:6 Mahosi hayo mavhili o kundwa nga Mushe na Vhaisraele. Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu o dzhia mashango avho a a ṋea matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. 
Joshua12:7 Joshua na Vhaisraele vhone vho kunda mahosi oṱhe shangoni ḽa vhukovhela ha Jorodani, u bva Baali Gadi govhani ḽa Libanoni u swika thavhani ya Halaka thungo ya tshipembe tsini ha Seiri. Joshua iḽo shango o ḽi kovhekanya matsinde a Israele, a vha ṋea uri ḽi dzule ḽi ḽavho." 
Joshua12:8 Mukovhe hoyo wo vha u tshi angaredza na shango ḽa mivhundu na midavhini i re tsini ha lwanzhe na govha ḽa Jorodani na midavhi yaḽo na Negeve. Shango heḽo ḽo vha ḽi tshi dzula Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhakanana na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi. 
Joshua12:9 Vhaisraele vho kunda mahosi a miḓi hei: Jerikho na Ai tsini ha Bethele 
Joshua12:10 na Jerusalema na Hebroni 
Joshua12:11 na Jaramuthu na Lakhishi 
Joshua12:12 na Egiloni na Gezere 
Joshua12:13 na Debiri na Gedere 
Joshua12:14 na Horoma na Aradi 
Joshua12:15 na Libina na Adulamu 
Joshua12:16 na Makeda na Bethele 
Joshua12:17 na Thaphua na Hefere 
Joshua12:18 na Afeke na Lasharoni 
Joshua12:19 na Madoni na Hatsoro 
Joshua12:20 na Shimironi Meroni na Akhashafu 
Joshua12:21 na Thaanakha na Megido 
Joshua12:22 na Kedeshe na Jokoniamu kha ḽa Kharamele," 
Joshua12:23 na Doro tsini ha lwanzhe, na Goimi kha ḽa Galelia" 
Joshua12:24 na Thiritsa. Mahosi vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi 31. 
Joshua13:1 Joshua zwino o vha o no kalahesa. Muṋe washu a amba nae a ri, “Wo kalahesa, hone hu kha ḓi vha na shango ḽihulu ḽine ḽa kha ḓi fanela u dzhiwa:" 
Joshua13:2 shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Filista na Geshuru," 
Joshua13:3 kathihi na shango ḽa Vhaavi u ya tshipembe. Ndi shango ḽine ḽa thoma mulambwanani wa Shihoro, masakhani na Egipita, u vhuya u swika masakhani na Ekroni thungo ya devhula, ḽo vha ḽi tshi pfi ndi ḽa Vhakanana; mahosi a Vhafilista o vha a tshi dzula Gaza na Ashidodo na Ashkeloni na Gathi na Ekroni." 
Joshua13:4 Hu kha ḓi vha na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhakanana u bva Ara, ḽe ḽa vha ḽi ḽa Vhasidoni, u vhuya u swika Afeke masakhani a Vhaamori;" 
Joshua13:5 shango ḽa Vhagebali; ḽoṱhe ḽa Libanoni u ya vhubvaḓuvha, u bva Baali Gadi tshipembe ha thavha ya Heremoni u swika Pharani ya Hamathi." 
Joshua13:6 Hu katelwa na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhasidoni, vhane vha dzula tshivhangani vhukati ha thavha dza Libanoni na Misirifotho Maimi. Vhathu vhoṱhe havho ndi ḓo vha thatha musi Vhaisraele vha tshi swika. U kovhekanye Vhaisraele iḽo shango nga mamvaṱe nga he nda u laya." 
Joshua13:7 Zwino-ha, kovhekanya maṅwe matsinde maṱanu na maṋa shango heḽo, na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase, vha ḽi dzhie ḽi vhe ḽavho.”" 
Joshua13:8 Matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase vho vha vho no ḓi wana shango ḽe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a vha o vha ṋea; ho vha vhubvaḓuvha ha mulambo wa Jorodani. 
Joshua13:9 Shango ḽavho ḽo vha ḽi tshi swika Aruere, lumemeni lwa govha ḽa Arinoni na muḓini u re vhukati ha govha ḽeneḽo, ḽa katela na muvhundu woṱhe u bva Medeba u swika Diboni," 
Joshua13:10 ḽa swika na masakhani a Amoni, ḽa katela na miḓi yoṱhe ye ya vha i tshi vhuswa nga Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori we a vha a tshi vhusa Hesheboni." 
Joshua13:11 Ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela na Giliadi na madzingu a Geshuru na Maakha na thavha yoṱhe ya Heremoni na ḽoṱhe ḽa Bashani u vhuya u swika Salekha. 
Joshua13:12 Ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela na muvhuso wa Ogo, ene wa u fhedzisela wa Vharefai, we a vha a tshi vhusa Ashtharotho na Edrei. Mushe o vha o kunda vhathu havho a vha thatha." 
Joshua13:13 Hone Vhaisraele a vho ngo thatha vhathu vha Geshuru na Maakha; vho ḓi dzula kha ḽa Israele u swika na ṋamusi. 
Joshua13:14 Tsinde ḽa Livi, Mushe o vha a songo vha fha shango. Vhone vho vha vho fanela u wana mukovhe wavho wa nduvho dza zwiḽiwa dzine dza ṋekedzwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele kha aḽiṱari, nga he Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe." 
Joshua13:15 Vha miṱa ya tsinde la Rubeni, Mushe o vha ṋea kupiḓa kwa shango uri ḽi vhe ḽavho." 
Joshua13:16 Shango ḽavho ḽo vha ḽi tshi swika Aruere lumemeni lwa govha ḽa Arinoni, na muḓini u re vhukati ha govha ḽeneḽo, ḽa katela na mivhundu yoṱhe yo monaho na Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela na Hesheboni na miḓi yoṱhe i re muvhunduni wonoyo: Diboni na Zwikwara zwa Baali na Bethe Baali Mioni 
Joshua13:18 na Jahatsi na Kedemotho na Mifaathi 
Joshua13:19 na Kiriathaimi na Sibima na Tserethe Shahara tshivhangani tsha govhani 
Joshua13:20 na Bethe Phioro na miedzi ya thavha ya Phisiga na Bethe Jeshimotho. 
Joshua13:21 Ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela na miḓi yoṱhe i re mivhunduni ya muvhuso woṱhe wa Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori, we a vha a tshi vhusa Hesheboni. Mushe o mu kunda, a kunda na vhavhusi vha Midiani: Evi na Rekeme na Tsuru na Huru na Reba. Vhoṱhe vho vhuya vha vhusa shango iḽo vhe magota a Sihoni." 
Joshua13:22 Kha vhe vha vhulawa nga Vhaisraele ho vha hu na uḽa mubvumbi ane a pfi Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro. 
Joshua13:23 Mulambo wa Jorodani wo vha u mukano wa vhukovhela wa tsinde ḽa Rubeni. Heyo ndi miḓi na miḓana yo ṋewaho miṱa ya tsinde ḽa Rubeni uri i vhe yavho. 
Joshua13:24 Miṱa ya tsinde ḽa Gadi, Mushe o i ṋea-vho tshipiḓa tsha shango uri ḽi vhe ḽavho." 
Joshua13:25 Shango ḽavho ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela Jazere na miḓi yoṱhe ya Giliadi na hafu ya shango ḽa Amoni u swika Aruere, u livhana na Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 shango ḽavho ḽo vha ḽi tshi thoma Hesheboni ḽa swika tshikwarani tsha Mitsipha na Betonimu, u bva Mahanaimi u swika mukanoni wa Lodebara." 
Joshua13:27 Govhani ḽa Jorodani ḽo vha ḽi tshi katela Bethe Haramu na Bethe Nimira na Sukotho na Tsafani, ndi tshipiḓa tsho salaho tsha muvhuso wa Sihoni khosi ya Hesheboni. Mukano wavho wa vhukovhela wo vha u mulambo wa Jorodani u swika dzivhani ḽa Khinirethe thungo ya devhula." 
Joshua13:28 Heyo yo vha miḓi na miḓana yo ṋewaho miṱa ya tsinde ḽa Gadi uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. 
Joshua13:29 Mushe o ṋea hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase tshipiḓa tsha shango uri ḽi vhe ḽavho a ḽi kovhekanya a tshi ya nga miṱa yavho. 
Joshua13:30 Shango ḽavho ḽo swika Mahanaimi ḽa katela ḽoṱhe ḽa Bashani, muvhuso woṱhe wa Ogo khosi ya Bashani khathihi na 60 a miḓana ya Jairi i re Bashani," 
Joshua13:31 ḽa katela na hafu ya Giliadi, khathihi na Ashtharotho na Edrei, misanda ya muvhuso wa Ogo kha ḽa Bashani. Ḽoṱhe heḽo ḽo ṋewa hafu ya vhaḓuhulu vha Makhiri ṅwana wa Manase, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua13:32 Mushe o kovhekanya shango ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jerikho na Jorodani nga u ralo musi e midavhini ya Muaba. 
Joshua13:33 Huno tsinde ḽa Livi Mushe ho ngo vha ṋea shango. O vha vhudza uri mukovhe wavho ndi Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele. 
Joshua14:1 Ngovhu vhuṱanzi ha musi shango ḽa Kanana vhukovhela ha Jorodani ḽi tshi kovhekanywa Vhaisraele: Vhathu vho kovhekanywa nga tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na vhahulwane vha miṱa ya matsinde a Vhaisraele. 
Joshua14:2 Mashango a matsinde maṱanu na maṋa na hafu vhukovhela ha Jorodani o kovhiwa nga u ita mamvaṱe, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe." 
Joshua14:3 Shango ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani Mushe o vha o no ḓi ḽi ṋea matsinde maṅwe mavhili na hafu yao. Vhaḓuhulu vha Josefa vho bva matsinde mavhili, Manase na Efraimi. Vhalivi vhone Mushe ho ngo vha ṋea mukovhe wa shango. Vhone vho tou ṋewa miḓi ya u dzula na pfulo ya kholomo na nngu dzavho." 
Joshua14:4  
Joshua14:5 Vhaisraele vho kovhekana shango nga he Muṋe washu a laya Mushe. 
Joshua14:6 Muṅwe musi vhaṅwe vhathu vha tsinde ḽa Juda vha ḓa ha Joshua e Giligala. Muṅwe wavho, Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune wa Mukenisi, a mu vhudza a ri, “Vha a zwi ḓivha vhone vhaṋe zwe Muṋe washu a vhudza Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu musi ri Kadeshe Barania a tshi amba nṋe na vhone Vho-Joshua." 
Joshua14:7 Ndo vha ndi na miṅwaha ya 40 zwiḽa Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a tshi nthuma ndi Kadeshe Barania uri ndi ye u ṱola shango heḽi. Ndo mu fha vhuṱanzi vhu fulufhedzeaho. 
Joshua14:8 Vhanna vhe nda ṱuwa navho vhone vho shushedza vhathu vha hashu, hone nṋe nda thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga ndi tshi fulufhedzea." 
Joshua14:9 Nge nda ita nga u ralo, Mushe o mpfulufhedzisa uri nṋe na vhana vhanga vhukumakuma ri ḓo wana shango ḽe nda kanda khaḽo ḽa vha ḽashu lini na lini." 
Joshua14:10 Huno zwino, nga vha vhone, ho no ḓi fhela miṅwaha ya 45 tshee Muṋe washu a zwi vhudza Mushe. Ndi zwiḽa Vhaisraele vha tshi khou buḓekanya phanga, Muṋe washu a ita uri ndi ḓi tshila sa zwe a fulufhedzisa. Kha vha ntsedze! Ndi na miṅwaha ya 85," 
Joshua14:11 ndi kha ḓi vha na nungo ṋamusi unga zwiḽa Mushe a tshi nthuma. Ndi kha ḓi vha na nungo dza u kona u ya nndwani kana dza u ita tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe. 
Joshua14:12 Zwino-ha, nga vha mphe shango heḽo ḽa muvhundu ḽe Muṋe washu a mpfulufhedzisa musi houḽa we nṋe na vhanna vhanga ra ḓisa vhuṱanzi. Ro vha vhudza zwenezwo ra ri lushaka lwa miswonḓa lune lwa pfi Vhaanaki vha henefho, nahone miḓi yo tangedzwa nga mitsheṱo. Khamusi Muṋe washu u ḓo vha na nṋe, nda vha thatha vha ṱuwa, nga he Muṋe washu a amba.”" 
Joshua14:13 Joshua a shudufhadza Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune a mu ṋea muḓi wa Hebroni wa vha wawe. 
Joshua14:14 Hebroni u tshee wa vhaḓuhulu vha Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune wa Mukenisi, nge a thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi fulufhedzea." 
Joshua14:15 Kale Hebroni wo vha u tshi pfi Muḓi wa Araba. Araba o vha e ene munna muhulwane kha Vhaanaki. Zwenezwo henefho shango ḽa lala. 
Joshua15:1 Tsinde ḽa Juda ḽo wana hoyu mukovhe wa shango zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho: Shango ḽo swika tshipembe u ya tshipembepembe ha phanga ya Tsini, masakhani a Edomo." 
Joshua15:2 Masakha ayo a tshipembe o vha a tshi thoma magumoni a tshipembe a Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo," 
Joshua15:3 a livha tshipembe u bva Pharani ya Phephenu u swika Tsini. A ḓa nga tshipembe ha Kadeshe Barania, a fhira nga Hetsironi, a vhuya a swika Adara, a livha Karaka," 
Joshua15:4 a ya Atsimoni, a tsa na kudambo ku re masakhani a Egipita, a ya Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. Masakha a guma henefho. Hayo o vha one masakha a Juda sia ḽa tshipembe." 
Joshua15:5 Masakha a vhubvaḓuvha o vha Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo, u vhuya u swika mulongani hune Jorodani wa ela u tshi dzhena khalwo. Masakha a devhula o thoma henefho," 
Joshua15:6 a guma Bethe Hogola, a ya devhula ha Bethe Araba. A livha nṱha Tomboni ḽa Bohani (Bohani o vha e ṅwana wa Rubeni)," 
Joshua15:7 a bva Govhani ḽa Khombo u swika Debiri, a konou livha devhula a tshi ya Giligala, ho livhanaho na Phara ya Adumimu sia ḽa tshipembe ḽa govha. Zwino a livha zwisimani zwa Eni Shemeshe, a bva a livha Eni Rogele," 
Joshua15:8 a livha nṱha a buḓekanya Govha ḽa Hinomu sia ḽa tshipembe ha mivhundu he ha vha ho no fhaṱiwa muḓi wa Jerusalema wa Vhajebusi. Masakha ayo a fhirela muṱumbani wa muvhundu vhukovhela ha Govha ḽa Hinomu, magumoni a devhula ha Govha ḽa Vharefai." 
Joshua15:9 U bva henefho a livha Zwisimani zwa Nefetua u ya miḓini ya tsini ha thavha ya Efroni. Henefho a livha Baala (ndi Kiriathi Jiarimu)," 
Joshua15:10 a mona vhukovhela ha Baala a livha shangoni ḽa mivhundu ḽa Seiri, a livha sia ḽa devhula ha thavha ya Jiarimu (ndi Khesaloni), a tsela fhasi Bethe Shemeshe, a fhira nga Thimina." 
Joshua15:11 Masakha zwino a livha muvhundu devhula ha Ekroni, a livha Shikironi, a fhira nga thavhani ya Baala, a livha Jabuniele, a guma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango," 
Joshua15:12 lwone lwa ita masakha sia ḽa vhukovhela. Ngomu masakhani eneo ho vha hu tshi dzula vhathu vha miṱa ya Juda. 
Joshua15:13 Tshiṅwe tshipiḓa tsha shango ḽa Juda tsho ṋewa Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune, wa tsinde ḽa Juda, nga he Muṋe washu a laya Joshua. O ṋewa Hebroni, muḓi wa Araba khotsi a Anaka." 
Joshua15:14 Khalebe o thatha vhaḓuhulu vha Anaka vha ṱuwa afho muḓini – vhone vha mutupo wa Sheshai na Ahimani na Thalamai. 
Joshua15:15 U ṱuwa henefho a yo dia vhathu vha no dzula Debiri. (Muḓi hoyo kale wo vha u tshi pfi Kiriathi Sefere.) 
Joshua15:16 Khalebe a ri, “Munna ane a nga kona u thuba Kiriathi Sefere ndi ḓo mu fha ṅwananyana wanga Akhasa a mu dzea.”" 
Joshua15:17 Othoniele, ṅwana wa Kenasi, ane a vha ṅwana wa khotsi a Khalebe, a thuba uyo muḓi, Khalebe a mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Akhasa a mu dzea." 
Joshua15:18 Musi wa mbingano Othoniele a ṱuṱuwedza Akhasa uri a humbele khotsi awe tsimu. Akhasa a tsa kha donngi yawe, Khalebe a mu vhudzisa tshine a tshi ṱoḓa." 
Joshua15:19 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ṱoḓa zwiko zwa maḓi. Shango ḽe vha nṋea ndi fhethu ho omelelaho.” Ndi hone Khalebe a tshi mu fha zwisima zwi re dzithavhani na zwi re govhani." 
Joshua15:20 Ngeḽi shango ḽe tsinde ḽa Juda ḽa ṋewa ḽa vha ḽavho zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. 
Joshua15:21 Miḓi ya tshipembepembe ya tsini na masakha a Edomo ye ya vha yavho, ndi Kabutsiele na Edere na Jaguru" 
Joshua15:22 na Kina na Dimona na Adada 
Joshua15:23 na Kedeshe na Hatsoro na Ithinani 
Joshua15:24 na Zifi na Telemu na Bialothi 
Joshua15:25 na Hatsoro na Hadata na Keriotho Esromu (ndi Hatsoro) 
Joshua15:26 na Amamu na Shema na Mulada 
Joshua15:27 na Hatsara Gada na Heshemoni na Bethe Phelethe 
Joshua15:28 na Hatsara Shuala na Bierisheba na Biziothia 
Joshua15:29 na Baala na Iimu na Etsemu 
Joshua15:30 na Elitholadi na Khisili na Horoma 
Joshua15:31 na Tsikilaga na Madamana na Sanisana 
Joshua15:32 na Lebaotho na Shilihimu na Aini na Rimoni. Yoṱhe yo ṱangana ndi miḓi ya 29, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:33 Miḓi i re midavhini i re tsini ha lwanzhe yo vha Eshthaolo na Tsora na Ashina 
Joshua15:34 na Zanua na Eni Ganimu na Thaphua na Enamu 
Joshua15:35 na Jaramuthu na Adulamu na Sokho na Azeka 
Joshua15:36 na Shaaraimi na Adithaimi na Gedera na Gederothaimi. Ndi miḓi ya 14 khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho. 
Joshua15:37 Miṅwe yo vha Tsenani na Hadasha na Migidala Gada 
Joshua15:38 na Diliani na Mitsipha na Jokothiele 
Joshua15:39 na Lakhishi na Botsikati na Egiloni 
Joshua15:40 na Khaboni na Lahamamu na Khithilishi 
Joshua15:41 na Gederotho na Bethe Dagoni na Naama na Makeda. Ndi miḓi ya 16 khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho. 
Joshua15:42 Ha dovha ha vha na Libina na Ethere na Ashani 
Joshua15:43 na Ifitha na Ashina na Netsibi 
Joshua15:44 na Keila na Akhazibi na Maresha. Ndi miḓi miṱanu na miṋa, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:45 Ho vha na Ekroni na ḓorobo dzawo 
Joshua15:46 na ḓorobo dzoṱhe u bva Ekroni u ya Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. 
Joshua15:47 Ha vha na Ashidodo na Gaza, na ḓorobo dzayo na miḓana yayo, u swika kudamboni masakhani a Egipita na khunzikhunzini dza Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango." 
Joshua15:48 Mivhunduni ho vha hu na Shamiri na Jathiri na Sokho 
Joshua15:49 na Dana na Kiriathi Sefere (ndi Debiri) 
Joshua15:50 na Anaba na Eshthemua na Animu 
Joshua15:51 na Gosheni na Holoni na Gilo. Ndi miḓi ya 11, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:52 Ho vha na Arabu na Duma na Eshani 
Joshua15:53 na Janimu na Bethe Thaphua na Afeka 
Joshua15:54 na Humuta na Kiriathi Araba (ndi Hebroni) na Tsioro. Ndi miḓi miṱanu na miṋa, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:55 Ha vha na Maoni na Kharamele na Zifi na Jutha 
Joshua15:56 na Jesriele na Jokodiamu na Zanua 
Joshua15:57 na Kaini na Gibia na Thimina. Ndi miḓi ya fumi, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:58 Ha vha na Halahulu na Bethe Tsuru na Gedoro 
Joshua15:59 na Maarathi na Bethe Anotho na Elithekoni. Ndi miḓi miṱanu na muthihi, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:60 Ha vha na Kiriathi Baali (ndi Kiriathi Jiarimu) na Raba. Ndi miḓi mivhili, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:61 Thungo dza phangani ha vha na Bethe Araba na Midini na Sikhakha," 
Joshua15:62 na Nibishani, Muḓi wa Muṋo na Eni Gedi. Ndi miḓi miṱanu na muthihi, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua15:63 Hone vhathu vha Juda vho vha vha sa koni u thatha Vhajebusi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema. Vhajebusi vha kha ḓi dzula henefho na vhathu vha Juda. 
Joshua16:1 Masakha a tshipembe a shango ḽe ḽa kovhelwa vhaḓuhulu vha Josefa o thoma Jorodani tsini ha Jerikho, vhubvaḓuvha ha zwisima zwa Jerikho, a ya phangani. A ṱuwa Jerikho a gonya mabama a swika Bethele." 
Joshua16:2 U bva Bethele a livha Lusi, a fhirela Atarotho, he ha vha hu tshi dzula Vhaarakhi." 
Joshua16:3 U bva henefho a livha vhukovhela, shangoni ḽa Vhajafulethi, u swika shangoni ḽa Bethe Horoni ḽa Fhasi. U bva henefho a livha Gezere a guma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango." 
Joshua16:4 Vhaḓuhulu vha Josefa, vha matsinde a Efraimi na Manase, vho kovhelwa shango ḽeneḽo ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Joshua16:5 Shango ḽa Efraimi ḽo vha heḽi zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho: Masakha avho o thoma Atarotho Adara a livha vhubvaḓuvha a swika Bethe Horoni ḽa Nṱha," 
Joshua16:6 u bva henefho a livha Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. Mikhimithathi vho vha vha tshi hu sumbela devhula. Vhubvaḓuvha ha henefho masakha a kombamela Thaanathi Shilo, a hu fhira nga vhubvaḓuvha a livha Janua." 
Joshua16:7 Zwino a tsa a tshi bva Janua a livha Atarotho na Naara, a swika Jerikho a guma mulamboni wa Jorodani." 
Joshua16:8 Masakha a livha vhukovhela u bva Thaphua a tshi ya Kudamboni kwa Kana a guma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. Ndi ḽone shango ḽe ḽa kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Efraimi uri ḽi vhe ḽavho zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho," 
Joshua16:9 zwa katela na dziṅwe ḓorobo na miḓana ye ya vha i ngomu ha masakha a Manase, ye ya vha yo kovhelwa vha Efraimi." 
Joshua16:10 Huno a vho ngo thatha Vhakanana vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Gezere, avho Vhakanana vho ḓi dzula na vha Efraimi u swika na ṋamusi, vho tou kombetshedzwa u shuma vhe phuli." 
Joshua17:1 Tshipiḓa tsha shango ḽa vhukovhela ha Jorodani ḽo kovhelwa miṅwe miṱa ya lutsinga lwa Manase tanzhe ḽa Josefa. Makhiri khotsi a Giliadi o vha e tanzhe ḽa Manase, e muhali nndwani; ene o kovhelwa Giliadi na Bashani vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani." 
Joshua17:2 Shango ḽa vhukovhela ha Jorodani ḽa kovhelwa vhaṅwe vha Manase zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho: Abiesere na Heleke na Asriele na Shikheme na Hefere na Shemida. Havho ndi vhone vhaḓuhulu vha Manase ṅwana wa Josefa, nahone vho vha vhe vhaṋe vha miṱa." 
Joshua17:3 Tselofihadi, ṅwana wa Hefere ṅwana wa Giliadi, ṅwana wa Makhiri, ṅwana wa Manase, o vha a si na vhana vha vhatuka, o vha e na vhananyana fhedzi. Vho vha vha tshi pfi Mahala na Nua na Hogola na Milikha na Thiritsa." 
Joshua17:4 Vho ya ha tshifhe Eliasara na ha Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na ha vharangaphanḓa, vha ri, “Muṋe washu o vhudza Mushe uri riṋe khathihi na mashaka ashu a tshinna a ri fhe tshipiḓa tsha shango uri ḽi vhe ḽashu.” Zwenezwo vha kovhelwa shango khathihi na mashaka avho a tshinna unga Muṋe washu o zwi amba." 
Joshua17:5 Ndi zwe Manase a wana mikovhe ya fumi i tshi ingwa kha ya Giliadi na Bashani sia ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani," 
Joshua17:6 vhunga vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha tshisadzi khathihi na vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha tshinna vho vha vho kovhelwa iḽo shango. Shango ḽa Giliadi ḽo vha ḽo kovhelwa vhaḓuhulu vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha Manase. 
Joshua17:7 Shango ḽa Manase ḽo vha ḽi tshi bva Ashere ḽa swika Mikhimithathi, vhubvaḓuvha ha Shikheme. Zwino masakha a livha tshipembe a angaredza vhathu vha Eni Thaphua." 
Joshua17:8 Shango ḽo tangaho Thaphua ḽo vha ḽa Manase, hone muḓi wa Thaphua u re masakhani wo vha wa vhaḓuhulu vha Efraimi." 
Joshua17:9 Masakha a tsela fhasi a livha Kudamboni kwa Kana. Miḓi ya tshipembe ha ukwo kudambo yo vha ya Efraimi, naho yo vha i shangoni ḽa Manase. Masakha a Manase a vha sia ḽa devhula ḽa ukwo kudambo, a yo guma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango." 
Joshua17:10 Efraimi o vha e thungo ya tshipembe, Manase e thungo ya devhula, Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango lwa vha masakha avho a vhukovhela. Thungo ya devhula vho ṋekana masakha na Ashere, vhubvaḓuvha-devhula vha ṋekana masakha na Isakhara." 
Joshua17:11 Shangoni ḽa Isakhara na ḽa Ashere, Manase o vha e na muḓi wa Bethe Shiani na wa Ibiliamu, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho, hu tshi angaredzwa na Doro (we wa vha u muvhunduni) na Endoro na Thaanakha na Megido, na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua17:12 Vhathu vha Manase hone a vho ngo kona u thatha vhathu vha dzulaho miḓini iyo, vhenevho Vhakanana vha ḓi dzula henefho." 
Joshua17:13 Na musi Vhaisraele vhó no vha na maanḓa, a vho ngo thatha Vhakanana vhoṱhe, vho tou vha ita phuli dzavho." 
Joshua17:14 Vhaḓuhulu vha Josefa vha vhudza Joshua vha ri, “Ndi mini vho ri kovhela kupiḓa kuthihi fhedzi uri ku vhe shango ḽashu? Muṋe washu o ri shudufhadza, ri vhanzhi.”" 
Joshua17:15 Joshua a fhindula a ri, “Arali no no anda, shango ḽa mivhunduni ḽó no vha ḽiṱuku ḽi si tsha ni eḓana, zwenezwo iyani maṱakani, ni ḓifhandele shangoni ḽa Vhapherisi na Vharefai.”" 
Joshua17:16 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Shango ḽa mivhundu ndi ḽiṱuku, ḽi nga si ri eḓane, hone Vhakanana vha re midavhini, vhoṱhe vha no dzula Bethe Shiani na miḓanani yo u tangaho na vha no dzula govhani ḽa Jesriele vha na gariki dza tsimbi dza nndwa.”" 
Joshua17:17 Joshua a vhudza vha nnḓu ya Josefa vha matsinde a Efraimi na Manase, a ri, “Vhukuma ni vhanzhi, nahone ni na maanḓa. A ni wani mukovhe muthihi fhedzi." 
Joshua17:18 Shango ḽa mivhunduni ḽi ḓo vha ḽaṋu. Naho ḽi na ḓaka, ni ḓo ḽi rema na ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽaṋu u bva kha ḽiṅwe sia u swika kha ḽiṅwe. Vhakanana vhone ni vha thathe vha ṱuwe, naho vhe na gariki dza nndwa dza tsimbi, vhe lushaka lwa maanḓa.”" 
Joshua18:1 Musi vho no kunda shango, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha kuvhangana Shilo, vha akha dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu." 
Joshua18:2 Ho vha hu tshi kha ḓi vha na matsinde maṱanu na mavhili a Vhaisraele vha sa athu kovhelwa mukovhe wavho wa shango. 
Joshua18:3 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi amba na Vhaisraele a ri, “Ni ḓo lindela u swika lini ni sa dzheni na dzhia shango ḽe na ṋewa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku waṋu?" 
Joshua18:4 Mpheni vhararu vhararu kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. Ndi ḓo vha ruma vha bva vha yo tandula shango iḽo ḽoṱhe vha ṅwale mukovho waḽo vha konou dovha vha vhuya kha nṋe. 
Joshua18:5 Shango iḽo vha ḓo ḽi kovhekanya ḽa bva zwipiḓa zwiṱanu na zwivhili; Juda u ḓo dzula shangoni ḽawe thungo ya tshipembe, Josefa a dzula shangoni ḽawe thungo ya devhula." 
Joshua18:6 Ni ṅwale mukovho wa khethekanyo hedzo ṱhanu na mbili ni u ḓise kha nṋe. Nṋe ndi ḓo konou ita madeṅwa nda ni vhudzisela ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu. 
Joshua18:7 Vhalivi vhone iḽo shango vha nga si kovhekane na inwi, mukovhe wavho ndi wa u vha vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu. Vha matsinde a Gadi na Rubeni na hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase vho no ḓi wana shango ḽavho vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, ḽe vha ṋewa nga Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu.”" 
Joshua18:8 Avho vhanna vha takuwa vha fara lwendo u yo ola mapa wa shango, Joshua ó thoma u vha laya a ri, “Tandulani shango ḽoṱhe ni ole mapa waḽo, ni konou vhuya kha nṋe. Nṋe ndi ḓo ni vhudzisela ha Muṋe washu nga u ita madeṅwa henefhano Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Ndi hone avho vhanna vha tshi yo tandula shango, vha dzula fhasi vha ola uri vha ḓo ḽi kovhekanya hani ḽa bva zwipiḓa zwiṱanu na zwivhili, vha ṅwala mutevhe wa miḓi, vha konou humela ha Joshua mishashani ya Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua a ita madeṅwa a vha vhudzisela ha Muṋe washu, tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa Vhaisraele ḽo salaho a ḽi kovhela tshipiḓa tsha shango." 
Joshua18:11 Shango ḽa tsinde ḽa Benyamini ndi ḽone ḽe ḽa thoma u kovhiwa zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. Shango ḽavho ḽo vha vhukati ha ḽa matsinde a Juda na Josefa. 
Joshua18:12 Sia ḽa devhula masakha avho o thoma Jorodani, a gonyela devhula ha Jerikho, a livha vhukovhela a tshi buḓekanya shango ḽa mivhundu u vhuya u swika phangani ya Bethavene." 
Joshua18:13 Masakha a gonya muvhundu tshipembe ha Lusi (hune ha dovha ha pfi Bethele), a tsela Atarotho Adara, nṱha ha thavha, tshipembe ha Bethe Horoni ḽa Fhasi." 
Joshua18:14 Masakha zwino a ṱutshela kha ḽiṅwe sia, a livha vhukovhela a tshi bva tshipembe ha thavha yeneyo, a livha Kiriathi Baali (ndi Kiriathi Jiarimu), muṅwe muḓi wa tsinde ḽa Juda. Hayo ndi one masakha a thungo ya vhukovhela." 
Joshua18:15 Masakha a thungo ya tshipembe o thoma lumemeni lwa Kiriathi Jiarimu a livha Zwisimani zwa Nefethua. 
Joshua18:16 U bva henefho a tsela tsindeni ḽa thavha yo ingamelaho Govha ḽa Hinomu hune Govha ḽa Vharefai ḽa guma hone thungo ya devhula. Zwino a livha tshipembe a tshi buḓekanya Govha ḽa Hinomu, tshipembe ha muṱoḓo wa Vhajebusi a tshi ya Eni Rogele." 
Joshua18:17 Zwino a livha devhula a tshi ya Eni Shemeshe, a konou livha Gelilotho, u lavhelesana na Phara ya Adumimu. Ayo masakha zwino a tsela Tomboni ḽa Bohani (Bohani ndi ṅwana wa Rubeni)," 
Joshua18:18 a fhira nga thungo ya devhula ya muṱoḓo wo ingamelaho govha ḽa Jorodani. U bva henefho a tsa a dzhena govhani," 
Joshua18:19 a fhira thungo ya devhula ya muṱoḓo wa Bethe Hogola, a fhelela mulomoni wa devhula wa Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo, hune mulambo wa Jorodani wa shela hone. Ndi one masakha a thungo ya tshipembe." 
Joshua18:20 Jorodani wo vha one masakha a vhubvaḓuvha. Ndi one masakha a shango ḽe ḽa kovhelwa miṱa ya tsinde ḽa Benyamini uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua18:21 Miḓi ya miṱa ya tsinde ḽa Benyamini yo vha i Jerikho na Bethe Hogola na Govha ḽa Ketsitsi 
Joshua18:22 na Bethe Araba na Tsemaraimi na Bethele 
Joshua18:23 na Avimu na Phara na Ofra 
Joshua18:24 na Kuḓi kwa Amoni na Ofini na Geba. Ndi miḓi ya 12, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua18:25 Ha dovha ha vha na Gibioni na Rama na Bierotho 
Joshua18:26 na Mitsipha na Khefira na Motsa 
Joshua18:27 na Rekeme na Iriphiele na Tharala 
Joshua18:28 na Tsela na Haelefe na Jebusi (ndi Jerusalema) na Gibia na Kiriathi Jiarimu. Ndi miḓi ya 14, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho. Ndi ḽone shango ḽe tsinde ḽa Benyamini vha kovhelwa ḽone uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:1 Mukovhe wa vhuvhili wo kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Simioni zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. Shango ḽavho ḽo tangelwa ngomu nga shango ḽo kovhelwaho tsinde ḽa Juda. 
Joshua19:2 Ho angaredza Bierisheba na Sheba na Mulada 
Joshua19:3 na Hatsara Shuala na Bala na Etsemu 
Joshua19:4 na Elitholadi na Bethuli na Horoma 
Joshua19:5 na Tsikilaga na Bethe Marikhabotho na Hatsara Susa 
Joshua19:6 na Bethe Lebaothi na Sharuheni. Ndi miḓi ya 13, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua19:7 Ha dovha ha vha na Aini na Rimoni na Ethere na Ashani. Ndi miḓi miṋa, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua19:8 Ha angaredza na ḓorobo dzoṱhe dzo tangaho iyo miḓi u vhuya u swika Baalathi Bieri (ndi Rama) thungo ya tshipembe. Ndi ḽone shango ḽe ḽa kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Simioni uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:9 Vhunga mukovhe wa Juda wo vha u muhulwane u tshi mu fhira, tshiṅwe tshipiḓa tsha shango ḽavho tsho ṋewa tsinde ḽa Simioni." 
Joshua19:10 Mukovhe wa vhuraru wo kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Zebuloni zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. Shango ḽe vha kovhelwa ḽo guma Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 U bva henefho masakha o livha vhukovhela a tshi ya Mareala, a kwama Dabeshethe na kudambo ku re vhubvaḓuvha ha Jokoniamu." 
Joshua19:12 Siani ḽiṅwe ḽa Saridi a livha vhubvaḓuvha a tshi ya masakhani a Khisilotho Thaboro, a konou livha Daberatha, a gonya Jafia." 
Joshua19:13 A fhirela phanḓa a tshi ya vhubvaḓuvha. U bva henefho a livha Gathi Hefere na Ethekatsini, a fhirela Rimoni a konou livha thungo ya Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Thungo ya devhula masakha o livha Hanathoni a guma Govhani ḽa Ifithahele. 
Joshua19:15 A angaredza Kathatha na Nahalala na Shimironi na Idala na Betlehema. Ndi miḓi ya 12, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua19:16 Miḓi heyo na ḓorobo dzayo yo vha shangoni ḽe ḽa kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Zebuloni uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:17 Mukovhe wa vhuṋa wo kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Isakhara, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:18 Shango ḽavho ḽo angaredza Jesriele na Khesulotho na Shuneme 
Joshua19:19 na Hafaraimi na Shioni na Anaharathi 
Joshua19:20 na Rabithi na Kishioni na Ebetse 
Joshua19:21 na Remethe na Eni Ganimu na Eni Hada na Bethe Phatsetse. 
Joshua19:22 Ayo masakha a kwama na Thaboro na Shahatsuma na Bethe Shemeshe a guma Jorodani. O angaredza miḓi ya 16, khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho." 
Joshua19:23 Miḓi heyo na ḓorobo dzayo yo vha i shangoni ḽo kovhelwaho Isakhara uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. 
Joshua19:24 Mukovhe wa vhuṱanu wo kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Ashere zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. 
Joshua19:25 Shango ḽavho ḽo angaredza Helikathi na Hali na Betheni na Akhashafu 
Joshua19:26 na Alamu Melekhe na Amadi na Mishala. Thungo ya vhukovhela ha kwama Kharamele na Shihoro Libinathi," 
Joshua19:27 ha livha vhubvaḓuvha. Masakha a livha Bethe Dagoni a kwama Zebuloni na Govha ḽa Ifithahele thungo ya devhula, nḓilani ya u ya Bethe Emeke na Neiele. A fhirela devhula a livha Khabulu," 
Joshua19:28 na Abudoni na Rehobo na Hamoni na Kana, u vhuya u swika shangoni ḽa Sidoni." 
Joshua19:29 Masakha zwino a livha Rama, a swika muḓini wa Tiro wo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo, wa konou livha Hosa wa guma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. Wa angaredza Mahalaba na Akhazibi" 
Joshua19:30 na Uma na Afeke na Rehobo. Ndi miḓi ya 22 na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho. 
Joshua19:31 Miḓi heyo na ḓorobo dzayo yo vha i shangoni ḽo kovhelwaho tsinde ḽa Ashere uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:32 Mukovhe wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi wo ṋewa tsinde ḽa Nafuthali zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. 
Joshua19:33 Masakha awo o thoma Helefu a livha murini muhulu wa Tsaananimu, a fhirela Adami Nekebe, a livha Jabuniele, a vhuya a swika Lakumu, a guma nga Jorodani." 
Joshua19:34 Henefho masakha a livha vhukovhela a tshi ya Asinotho Thaboro, u bva henefho a livha Hukoko, a kwama Zebuloni thungo ya tshipembe, na Ashere thungo ya vhukovhela, na Jorodani thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha." 
Joshua19:35 Miḓi yo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo yo vha i Tsidimu na Tsere na Hamathi na Rakathi na Khinirethe 
Joshua19:36 na Adama na Rama na Hatsoro 
Joshua19:37 na Kedeshe na Edrei na Eni Hatsoro 
Joshua19:38 na Ironi na Migidalele na Horeme na Bethe Anatha na Bethe Shemeshe. Ndi miḓi ya 19 khathihi na ḓorobo dzo i tangaho. 
Joshua19:39 Miḓi heyo na ḓorobo dzayo yo vha i shangoni ḽo kovhelwaho tsinde ḽa Nafuthali uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:40 Mukovhe wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wo kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Dani zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho. 
Joshua19:41 Shango ḽavho ḽo angaredza Tsora na Eshthaolo na Iri Shemeshe 
Joshua19:42 na Shaalabimu na Ayaloni na Ithila 
Joshua19:43 na Eloni na Thimina na Ekroni 
Joshua19:44 na Elitheke na Gibithoni na Baalathi 
Joshua19:45 na Jehudu na Bene Beraka na Gathi Rimoni 
Joshua19:46 na Meyarikoni na Rakoni, khathihi na shango ḽo tangaho Jopa." 
Joshua19:47 Musi vhathu vha Dani vha tshi dzhielwa shango ḽavho, vho ṱuwa vha ya Laishi vha u dia. Vho u thuba vha vhulaha vhathu vhawo, vha u dzhia wa vha wavho. Vha dzula henefho, vha ri muḓi uyo a u tsha pfi Laishi u vho pfi Dani, vha tshi u rinela makhulukuku wavho Dani." 
Joshua19:48 Miḓi heyo na ḓorobo dzayo yo vha i shangoni ḽe ḽa kovhelwa tsinde ḽa Dani uri ḽi vhe ḽavho, zwi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Joshua19:49 Musi Vhaisraele vho fhedza u kovhekana shango, vha kovhela Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu tshipiḓa tsha shango uri hu vhe hawe." 
Joshua19:50 Vho mu ṋea muḓi we a u humbela, nga he Muṋe washu a vha o vha laya. Ndi Thiminathi Sera, mivhunduni ya Efraimi. O vusa uyo muḓi a dzula henefho." 
Joshua19:51 Tshifhe Eliasara na Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na vharangaphanḓa vha miṱa ya matsinde a Israele vho kovhekanya zwipiḓa hezwo zwa shango nga u ita madeṅwa uri vha vhudzise Muṋe washu vhe Shilo, muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. Ngauralo vha vha vho fhedza u kovhekana shango." 
Joshua20:1 Muṋe washu o vhudza Joshua 
Joshua20:2 uri a vhudze Vhaisraele a ri, “Nangani miḓi ya vhushavhelo ye nda laya Mushe uri a ni vhudze ngayo." 
Joshua20:3 Muthu ane a vhulaha muṅwe á songo ita nga khole a nga kona u ya henefho a tshi shavha munna ane a ṱoḓa u mu lifhedza. 
Joshua20:4 A nga shavhela kha muṅwe wa miḓi heyo, a ya fhethu ha tsengo khoroni ya uyo muḓi, a ṱalutshedza vharangaphanḓa zwe zwa itea. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo mu tendela a dzhena afho muḓini, vha mu sumbedza hune a ḓo dzula, uri a dzule henefho." 
Joshua20:5 Arali munna ane a ṱoḓa u mu lifhedza a mu tevhela henefho, vhathu vha uyo muḓi vha songo mu kumedza uyo munna. Vho fanela u mu tsireledza, ngauri ho ngo vhulaha uyo muthu nga khole, o vha a songo mu fara nga mbilu." 
Joshua20:6 A nga ḓi dzula henefho muḓini a vhuya a sengiswa tshivhidzoni nahone ha vhuya ha fa tshifhe muhulu wa tshifhinga tshenetsho. Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi nga humela hayani muḓini wa hawe he a shavha a tshi bva hone.” 
Joshua20:7 Zwino vhukovhela ha Jorodani vha khetha Kedeshe kha ḽa Galelia, muvhunduni wa Nafuthali, na Shikheme mivhunduni ya Efraimi; na Kiriathi Araba (ndi Hebroni) mivhunduni ya Juda." 
Joshua20:8 Vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani mivhunduni ya phanga vhubvaḓuvha ha Jerikho, vha nanga Betsere shangoni ḽa Rubeni, na Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi, shangoni ḽa Gadi, na Golani kha ḽa Bashani, shangoni ḽa Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Yo vha yone miḓi ya vhushavhelo yo nangelwaho Vhaisraele vhoṱhe na vhatsinda vhoṱhe vha dzulaho navho. Muthu ane a vhulaha muṅwe á songo ita nga khole o vha a tshi nga tsireledzwa henefho a ponyoka munna ane a ṱoḓa u mu lifhedza; o vha a sa vhulawi a sa athu sengiswa vhathuni vha tshi zwi vhona. 
Joshua21:1 Vharangaphanḓa vha miṱa ya Vhalivi vha ya ha tshifhe Eliasara na ha Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu na ha vhaṋe vha miṱa ya matsinde oṱhe a Israele. 
Joshua21:2 Henefho Shilo shangoni ḽa Kanana vha vha vhudza vha ri, “Muṋe washu o laya nga mulomo wa Mushe uri riṋe ri ṋewe-vho miḓi ri dzule khayo, khathihi na shango ḽa pfulo ya kholomo dzashu, u mona na iyo miḓi.”" 
Joshua21:3 Vhaisraele vha mbo ṋea Vhalivi miṅwe miḓi na mashango a pfulo shangoni ḽavho, vha tshi tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu a laya." 
Joshua21:4 Miṱa ya Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi vho vha vhone vha u thoma u kovhelwa miḓi. Miṱa ya lutsinga lwa tshifhe Aroni vha kovhelwa miḓi ya 13 i re shangoni ḽa Juda na Simioni na Benyamini. 
Joshua21:5 Vhaṅwe vha mutupo wa Kehathi vho salaho vho kovhelwa miḓi ya fumi i re shangoni ḽa Efraimi na Dani na Manase wa vhukovhela. 
Joshua21:6 Vha mutupo wa Gerisoni vha kovhelwa miḓi ya 13 shangoni ḽa Isakhara na Ashere na Nafuthali na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha ḽi re Bashani. 
Joshua21:7 Miṱa ya mutupo wa Mirari vho kovhelwa miḓi ya 12 shangoni ḽa Rubeni na Gadi na Zebuloni. 
Joshua21:8 Vhaisraele vho kovhela Vhalivi miḓi heyo na mashango ayo a pfulo nga u ita madeṅwa nga he Muṋe washu a laya nga mulomo wa Mushe. 
Joshua21:9 Khea madzina a miḓi ya shangoni ḽa Juda na Simioni yo kovhelwaho 
Joshua21:10 vhaḓuhulu vha Aroni vha mutupo wa Kehathi, wa lutsinga lwa Livi. Vhenevho ndi vhone vho thomaho u wana mukovhe." 
Joshua21:11 Vho kovhelwa Muḓi wa Araba (Araba ndi khotsi a Anaka), une zwino wa pfi Hebroni, mivhunduni ya Juda, khathihi na pfulo ḽawo." 
Joshua21:12 Hone masimu a uyo muḓi, khathihi na ḓorobo dzawo, zwo vha zwo no ḓi ṋewa Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune uri zwi vhe zwawe." 
Joshua21:13 U engedza muḓi wa Hebroni (muṅwe wa miḓi ya vhushavhelo), kheino miḓi ye ya kovhelwa vhaḓuhulu vha tshifhe Aroni: Libina" 
Joshua21:14 na Jathiri na Eshthemua 
Joshua21:15 na Holoni na Debiri 
Joshua21:16 na Aini na Juta na Bethe Shemeshe, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo. Ndi miḓi miṱanu na miṋa ya matsinde a Juda na Simioni." 
Joshua21:17 Shangoni ḽa Benyamini vho ṋewa miḓi miṋa: Gibioni na Geba 
Joshua21:18 na Anathotho na Alimoni, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:19 Miḓi yoṱhe yo ṱangana ndi 13 khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo, zwo kovhelwa vhotshifhe vhaḓuhulu vha Aroni." 
Joshua21:20 Vhaṅwe vha miṱa vha Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi vho kovhelwa miṅwe miḓi i re shangoni ḽa Efraimi. 
Joshua21:21 Vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Shikheme na mashango awo a pfulo mivhunduni ya Efraimi (ndi muṅwe wa miḓi ya vhushavhelo), na Gezere" 
Joshua21:22 na Kibitsaimi na Bethe Horoni, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:23 Shangoni ḽa Dani vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Elitheke na Gibithoni 
Joshua21:24 na Ayaloni na Gathi Rimoni, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:25 Shangoni ḽa Manase ḽa vhukovhela vho kovhelwa miḓi mivhili: Thaanakha na Gathi Rimoni, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:26 Miṱa heyo ya mutupo wa Kehathi vho kovhelwa miḓi ya fumi yo ṱangana, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:27 Vha tshiṅwe tshigwada tsha Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Gerisoni, shangoni ḽa Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vho kovhelwa miḓi mivhili: Golani u re Bashani (Ndi muṅwe wa miḓi ya vhushavhelo) na Ashtharotho, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:28 Shangoni ḽa Isakhara vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Kishioni na Daberatha 
Joshua21:29 na Jaramuthu na Eni Ganimu, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:30 Shangoni ḽa Ashere vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Mishala na Abudoni 
Joshua21:31 na Helekatha na Rehobo, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:32 Shangoni ḽa Nafuthali vho kovhelwa miḓi miraru: Kedeshe u re Galelia, khathihi na mashango awo a pfulo (ndi muṅwe wa miḓi ya vhushavhelo), na Hamotho Doro na Karathani, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:33 Miṱa yo fhambanaho ya mutupo wa Gerisoni yo kovhelwa miḓi ya 13 yo ṱangana, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:34 Vhaṅwe Vhalivi vho salaho vha mutupo wa Mirari, shangoni ḽa Zebuloni vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Jokoniamu na Karitha" 
Joshua21:35 na Dimina na Nahalali, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:36 Shangoni ḽa Rubeni vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Betsere na Jahatsa 
Joshua21:37 na Kedemotho na Mifaathi, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:38 Kha tsinde ḽa Gadi vho kovhelwa miḓi miṋa: Ramotho u re Giliadi, khathihi na mashango awo a pfulo (ndi muṅwe wa miḓi ya vhushavhelo), na Mahanaimi" 
Joshua21:39 na Hesheboni na Jazere, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:40 Vha mutupo wa Mirari vho kovhelwa miḓi ya 12 yo ṱangana yoṱhe. 
Joshua21:41 Shangoni ḽe ḽa vha ḽi ḽa Vhaisraele, Vhalivi vho kovhelwa miḓi ya 48 yoṱhe yo ṱangana, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
Joshua21:42  
Joshua21:43 Zwo tou ralo Muṋe washu a tshi ṋea Vhaisraele shango ḽoṱhe ḽe a vha o fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho nga muano uri u ḓo vha ṋea. Huno vha ḽi dzhia, vha dzula henefho." 
Joshua21:44 Muṋe washu a ladza shango ḽavho ḽoṱhe, nga he a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho. Ho vha hu si na na muthihi wa maswina avho oṱhe we a vha a tshi kona u imedzana navho, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha kumedza maswina avho oṱhe." 
Joshua21:45 Muṋe washu a khunyeledza zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a fulufhedzisa Vhaisraele, a hu na ipfi na ḽithihi ḽe ḽa wela fhasi." 
Joshua22:1 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi kuvhanganya vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha," 
Joshua22:2 a vha vhudza a ri, “No ita zwoṱhe zwe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a ni vhudza uri ni ite, na zwoṱhe zwe nṋe nda ni laya no zwi ita." 
Joshua22:3 Tshifhinga tshoṱhe hetshi a no ngo vhuya na laṱedza Vhaisraele vha haṋu. No vha na vhuronwane na tevhedza ndayo dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. 
Joshua22:4 Zwino Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ladza shango ḽa Vhaisraele vha haṋu, unga o fulufhedzisa. Zwenezwo vhuelelani zwaṋu hayani, shangoni ḽe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a ni ṋea seli ha Jorodani." 
Joshua22:5 Ni songo litsha u tevhedza mulayo we Mushe a ni ṋea une wa ri, ‘Funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau, u ite zwine a zwi funa, u vhulunge milayo yawe, u songo vhuya wa fhambana nae, u mu shumele nga mbilu yau yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha zwone.’ ”" 
Joshua22:6 Joshua a vha shudufhadza a ri vha ṱuwe, vhone vha ya mahayani avho, a amba navho a ri, “Ni khou vhuelela hayani no pfuma vhukuma, ni na masambi manzhi a kholomo na siliva na musuku na musinaseṱha na tsimbi na zwiambaro zwinzhi. Kovhekanani na vha haṋu zwe na thuba kha maswina aṋu.” Vha mbo ḓi takuwa vha ya hayani. Shango ḽa Bashani vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani Mushe o vha o ḽi kovhela hafu ya tsinde ḽa Manase, hone iṅwe hafu ya iḽo tsinde o i kovhela shango ḽa vhukovhela ha Jorodani, hu re na mashango a maṅwe matsinde." 
Joshua22:7  
Joshua22:8  
Joshua22:9 Zwino vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vha vhuelela hayani. Vha sia vhaṅwe Vhaisraele Shilo shangoni ḽa Kanana, vha fara lwendo lwa u vhuelela shangoni ḽavho, shangoni ḽa Giliadi, ḽe vha vha vho ḽi dzhia unga Muṋe washu o vha laya nga mulomo wa Mushe." 
Joshua22:10 Musi matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vha tshi swika Gelilotho, vha tshi kha ḓi vha vhukovhela ha Jorodani, vha fhaṱa aḽiṱari khulu i si na vhukono henefho tsini ha Jorodani." 
Joshua22:11 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho salaho vha vhudzwa ha pfi, “Edzonu pfa! Vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na vha Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vho fhaṱa aḽiṱari Gelilotho, sia ḽino ḽashu ḽa Jorodani!”" 
Joshua22:12 Musi Vhaisraele vha tshi zwi pfa, vhathu vhoṱhe vha kuvhangana Shilo uri vha yo lwa na matsinde a vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani." 
Joshua22:13 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ruma Finiasi, ṅwana wa tshifhe Eliasara, a ya ha vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na vha Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha shangoni ḽa Giliadi." 
Joshua22:14 Finiasi a ṱuwa na vhanna vha fumi vha vhaḓivhalea, ha bva muthihi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa matsinde a vhukovhela, muṅwe na muṅwe e muṋe wa muṱa kha mitupo yeneyo ya Vhaisraele." 
Joshua22:15 Vha swika shangoni ḽa Giliadi, kha vhathu vha Rubeni na Gadi na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha," 
Joshua22:16 vha tshi ambela vhathu vhoṱhe vha Muṋe washu, vha vha vhudza vha ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi khakhela Mudzimu wa Israele nga u ita tshivhi tsho raliho? No shandukela Muṋe washu nga u ḓifhaṱela aḽiṱari hei! A ni tsha mu tevhela!" 
Joshua22:17 Edzonu elelwa vhuvhi hashu he ra ita ngei Phioro, zwiḽa Muṋe washu a tshi rwa vhathu vhawe nga dwadze. Ri kha ḓi tambula nga mulandu waho. Tshivhi tshe ra ita ndi tshiṱuku kani?" 
Joshua22:18 Zwino ni vho hana u mu tevhela naa? Arali na shandukela Muṋe washu ṋamusi, matshelo ha nga ḓo sinyutshela Vhaisraele vhoṱhe naa?" 
Joshua22:19 Zwino-ha, arali shango ḽaṋu ḽi songo tea uri ni luvhe khaḽo, pfulutshelani ngei ha hashu shangoni ḽa Muṋe washu, hune dennde ya u ṱangana nae ya vha hone. Ṱoḓani shango vhukati hashu, hone ni songo shandukela Muṋe washu kana na shandukela riṋe nga u fhaṱa iṅwe aḽiṱari, ngeno aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu i hone." 
Joshua22:20 Edzonu elelwa zwe Akhani ṅwana wa Zera a ita vhuvhi, a dzhia zwithu zwe ha pfi zwi lozwiwe. A si ene e eṱhe we a fela vhuvhi hawe, ho lifhedzwa vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele.”" 
Joshua22:21 Vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na vha Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vha fhindula vhaṋe vha miṱa vha matsinde a vhukovhela vha ri," 
Joshua22:22 “Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu e eṱhe! Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu e eṱhe! Ene ndi ṱhanzi ya uri izwi ro zwi itelani, ri funa uri na inwi ni zwi ḓivhe! Arali ro shanduka ra si tsha fulufhela Muṋe washu, ni songo tsha ri litsha ra tshila!" 
Joshua22:23 Arali ro ḓifhaṱela aḽiṱari ri tshi itela u shandukela Muṋe washu kana u fhisa zwiṱhavhelo khayo kana u fhisela nduvho dza thoro kana dza vhuthihi, litshani Muṋe washu Ene muṋe a ri lifhedze." 
Joshua22:24 Aiwa nandi! Ngoho hezwi ro zwi ita nge ra ofha uri matshelo vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu vha ḓo vhudza vhana vhashu vha ri, ‘Ni na mushumo-ḓe na Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele?" 
Joshua22:25 Hufha Jorodani o u ita mukano vhukati ha riṋe na inwi vhathu vha Rubeni na Gadi. A ni na mushumo na Muṋe washu!’ Ha mbo vha u dzivhisa vhaḓuhulu vhashu u luvha Muṋe washu. 
Joshua22:26 Ndi zwe ra fhaṱa aḽiṱari, a si ya u fhisela zwiṱhavhelo kana nduvho," 
Joshua22:27 i tou vha ṱhanzi vhukati ha riṋe na inwi, na mirafho i kha ḓi ḓaho, uri vhukumakuma ri luvha Muṋe washu hukhethwa hawe nga zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho na dza vhuthihi. Izwo ho vha hu u itela uri vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu vha sa ḓo ri vhashu a vha na mafhungo na Muṋe washu." 
Joshua22:28 Ro vha ri tshi ri arali izwo zwa vhuya zwa itea, vhaḓuhulu vhashu vho vha vha tshi nga ri, ‘Vhonani! Vhomakhulukuku washu vho fhaṱa aḽiṱari iyi i no fana na ya Muṋe washu. Yo vha i si ya u fhisela nduvho kana tshiṱhavhelo, i tou vha ṱhanzi vhukati ha riṋe na inwi.’" 
Joshua22:29 Vhukumakuma ri nga si shandukele Muṋe washu kana ra si tsha mu tevhela zwino, ra fhaṱa aḽiṱari ya u fhisa nduvho khayo kana ya u fhisela nduvho dza thoro kana zwiṱhavhelo. Ri nga si fhaṱe iṅwe aḽiṱari arali i si aḽiṱari ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu yo imaho phanḓa ha dennde ya u ṱangana nae.”" 
Joshua22:30 Tshifhe Finiasi na vhanna vha fumi vha vhaḓivhalea kha vhathu vhe vha vha vhe nae na vhaṋe vha miṱa vha matsinde a vhukovhela, vha pfa zwe vhathu vha matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Manase ḽa vhubvaḓuvha vha amba, vha pfa vho fushea." 
Joshua22:31 Finiasi ṅwana wa tshifhe Eliasara a vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ri vho zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu u na riṋe. Inwi a no ngo mu shandukela, zwenezwo no lamulela Vhaisraele uri Muṋe washu a si tsha vha rwa.”" 
Joshua22:32 Ndi hone Finiasi na vharangaphanḓa vha tshi ṱutshela vhathu vha Rubeni na Gadi shangoni ḽa Giliadi, vha humela Kanana ha Vhaisraele, vha vha anetshela zwo iteaho." 
Joshua22:33 Vhaisraele vha pfa vho fushea vha renda Mudzimu. Vha si tsha amba nga zwa u bva pfumo u yo phusukanya shango ḽe vhathu vha Rubeni na vha Gadi vha yo dzula khaḽo. 
Joshua22:34 Vhathu vha Rubeni na Gadi vha ri, “Aḽiṱari iyi ndi ṱhanzi yashu roṱhe ya uri Muṋe ashu ndi Mudzimu.” Zwenezwo vha ri i pfi Ṱhanzi." 
Joshua23:1 Musi ho no fhela tshifhinga tshilapfu Muṋe washu ó ladzela Vhaisraele shango ha si tsha vha na maswina a lwaho navho, Joshua ó no kalaha, ó no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha," 
Joshua23:2 a vhidza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vharangaphanḓa na vhahaṱuli na vhakoma, a vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ndo no kalaha, ndo no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha." 
Joshua23:3 No zwi vhona zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ita tshakha hedzi dzoṱhe a tshi itela inwi. Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o vha a tshi khou ni lwela. 
Joshua23:4 Matsinde aṋu ndo vha kovhela shango ḽa vha ḽavho, ndi shango ḽa tshakha dzine dza kha ḓi vha hone, khathihi na tshakha dzoṱhe dze nda dzi kunda, u bva mulamboni wa Jorodani thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha u swika Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango thungo ya vhukovhela." 
Joshua23:5 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo ita uri vha ni humele, u ḓo vha thatha vha ni shavha. Ni ḓo dzhia shango ḽavho, sa zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni fulufhedzisa." 
Joshua23:6 Ni songo litsha u tevhedza zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho buguni ya Mulayo ya Mushe. Ni songo vhuya na sia na kupiḓa na kuthihi. 
Joshua23:7 Ni songo vangana na tshakha hedzi dzo salaho vhukati haṋu kana na bula madzina a midzimu yavho kana na ana ngao kana na i luvha kana na i gwadamela. 
Joshua23:8 Tshaṋu nga hu vhe u nambatela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, sa zwe na ita u swika zwino." 
Joshua23:9 Muṋe washu o thatha tshakha khulu dza maanḓa dza shavha musi inwi ni tshi swika, a hu na we a kona u imedzana na inwi u swika na ṋamusi." 
Joshua23:10 Muthihi waṋu a nga kona u pandamedza vhanna vha tshigidi vha shavha ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u a ni lwela, unga o fulufhedzisa." 
Joshua23:11 Zwino-ha, ni songo litsha u funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu." 
Joshua23:12 Arali na mu shandukela, na ḓibaḓekanya na tshakha dzine dza kha ḓi vha vhukati haṋu, na dzetshelana navho," 
Joshua23:13 ni ḓivhe uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ha tsha ḓo thatha idzo tshakha dza shavha musi inwi ni tshi swika, tshavho, vha vho ḓo nga mulavhu kana khunḓa, vha ni pfisa vhuṱungu unga phamba muṱanani waṋu na mipfa maṱoni, na vhuya na lovha noṱhe na si tsha wanala shangoni heḽi ḽavhuḓi ḽe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni ṋea." 
Joshua23:14 “Zwino-ha, ḓuvha ḽanga ḽa u fa ḽo swika. Ni ḓivha nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o ni ṋea zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a ni fulufhedzisa. Zwoṱhe zwe a ni fulufhedzisa o zwi khunyeledza, a hu na na tshithihi tshe tsha si itee." 
Joshua23:15 Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu o khunyeledza zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a ni fulufhedzisa; ndi zwone, na khombo dzoṱhe dze a dzi bula u ḓo dzi khunyeledza nga u ralo, a vhuya a ni lozwa na si tsha wanala shangoni heḽi ḽavhuḓi ḽe a ni ṋea." 
Joshua23:16 Arali na vhofholola mulanga we Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni laya uri ni u vhulunge, na shumela miṅwe midzimu na i luvha, zwenezwo Muṋe washu u ḓo sinyuwa a ni lifhedza na lovha kathihi fhedzi shangoni heḽi ḽavhuḓi ḽe a ni ṋea.”" 
Joshua24:1 Ngavhuya Joshua a kuvhanganya matsinde oṱhe a Israele muḓini wa Shikheme. O vhidza vhahulwane na vharangaphanḓa na vhahaṱuli na vhakoma vha Israele, vha ḓa phanḓa ha Mudzimu." 
Joshua24:2 Joshua a vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Kale-kale vhomakhulukuku waṋu, Thera khotsi a Abrahamu na Nahoro, vho vha vha tshi dzula seli ha mulambo wa Yufuratha, vha tshi luvha miṅwe midzimu." 
Joshua24:3 Hone Nṋe nda dzhia makhulukuku waṋu Abrahamu nda mu bvisa shangoni ḽa seli ha Yufuratha, nda mu tshimbidza a buḓekanya shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Kanana. Nda mu fha vhaḓuhulu vhanzhi. Nda mu fha Isaka," 
Joshua24:4 Isaka nda mu fha Jakopo na Esau. Esau nda mu fha shango ḽa dzithavha ḽa Edomo uri ḽi vhe ḽawe, hone makhulukuku waṋu Jakopo na vhana vhawe vho ḓo pfulutshela Egipita." 
Joshua24:5 Ngavhuya nda ruma Mushe na Aroni, nda ita uri Vhaegipita vha welwe nga khombo khulu, hone inwi nda ni pfulusa." 
Joshua24:6 Nda pfulusa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Egipita, Vhaegipita vha vha tevhela nga gariki dza nndwa na vhanameli vhadzo. Hone musi vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha tshi swika Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga," 
Joshua24:7 vha nṱavhela mukosi uri ndi vha farise, nda ḓisa swiswi vhukati havho na Vhaegipita. Nda ita uri lwanzhe lu tibe Vhaegipita lu vha kumbe. No zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo zwe nda ita Vhaegipita. “ ‘No dzula phangani tshifhinga tshilapfu." 
Joshua24:8 Nda ni isa shangoni ḽa Vhaamori, vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani. Vho lwa na inwi, Nṋe nda vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu. Na dzhia shango ḽavho, ni tshi swika Nṋe nda vha lozwa." 
Joshua24:9 Zwino ha ḓa khosi ya Muaba, Balaka ṅwana wa Tsiphoro, a lwa na inwi. A ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Biliamu ṅwana wa Bioro, vha mu vhidza uri a ḓe a ni teketele." 
Joshua24:10 Huno Nṋe nda si thetshelese, nda ita uri Biliamu a ni ḓisele mashudu, ngauralo nda vha ndo ni lamulela zwanḓani zwa Balaka." 
Joshua24:11 Na wela mulambo wa Jorodani, na swika Jerikho. Vhanna vha Jerikho vha lwa na inwi, u ḓi nga Vhaamori na Vhapherisi na Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhagirigashi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi, hone Nṋe nda vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu." 
Joshua24:12 Musi ni tshi swika nda thatha mahosi mavhili a Vhaamori, vha shavha vha tshi nga vha khou pandamedzwa nga mabu. Izwo a no ngo zwi ita nga mafumo aṋu na vhura haṋu." 
Joshua24:13 Nda ni ṋea shango ḽe na si ḽi bvele biko na miḓi ye ya si fhaṱwe nga inwi. Zwino ni khou dzula henefho ni tshi ḽa minḓirivhe ye ni si zwale, na miolivi ye ni si ṱavhe.’ ”" 
Joshua24:14 Joshua a isa phanḓa a ri, “Zwinoha, hulisani Muṋe washu ni mu shumele ni tshi fulufhedzea ni si na muhoyo. Laṱani midzimu ye vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha vha vha tshi i luvha ngei seli ha Yufuratha na ngei Egipita, ni shumele Muṋe washu fhedzi." 
Joshua24:15 Arali ni sa funi u mu shumela, ḓinangeleni ṋamusi ane na ḓo mu shumela, i nga vha midzimu ye vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha vha vha tshi i shumela ngei seli ha Yufuratha kana midzimu ya Vhaamori, vhane na vho dzula shangoni ḽavho. A vha nṋe na muṱa wanga ri ḓo shumela Muṋe washu.”" 
Joshua24:16 Vhathu vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri nga si vhuye ra litsha u shumela Muṋe washu ra yo shumela midzimu!" 
Joshua24:17 Mudzimu Muṋe washu Ene muṋe o pfulusa riṋe na vhokhotsi ashu Egipita he ra vha ri dziphuli, a ita maḓembe mahulu ri tshi zwi vhona, a ri tsireledza lwendoni lwashu lwoṱhe, vhukati ha tshakha dzoṱhe dze ra fhira khadzo." 
Joshua24:18 Musi ri tshi swika shangoni ḽino, Muṋe washu a thatha tshakha dzoṱhe na Vhaamori vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽino. Zwino na riṋe ri ḓo shumela Muṋe washu, Mudzimu washu ndi Ene.”" 
Joshua24:19 Joshua a amba na vhathu a ri, “Inwi ni nga si kone u shumela Muṋe washu. Ene ndi Mudzimu mukhethwa, ha vhangiswi vhuhulu hawe, ha nga ni hangweli vhuvhi haṋu. Ha nga konḓeleli ni tshi tshinya na mu shandukela," 
Joshua24:20 arali na litsha u mu shumela na yo shumela midzimu isili, u ḓo ni shandukela-vho a ni ḓisela khombo. U ḓo ni lozwa naho o ranga u ni itela vhuthu.”" 
Joshua24:21 Vhathu vha fhindula Joshua vha ri, “Aiwa nandi! Riṋe ri ḓo shumela Muṋe washu.”" 
Joshua24:22 Joshua a vha vhudza a ri, “Ṱhanzi dzaṋu ndi inwi vhaṋe: no nanga u shumela Muṋe washu.” Vhone vha ri, “Ri dziṱhanzi.”" 
Joshua24:23 Joshua a ri, “Zwino-ha, laṱani kule midzimu heyo isili ine na vha nayo, mbilu dzaṋu dzi livhe ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele.”" 
Joshua24:24 Zwino vhathu vha vhudza Joshua vha ri, “Ri ḓo shumela Mudzimu Muṋe washu. Ri ḓo tevhedza ndayo dzawe.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi vhofha mulanga na Muṋe washu a tshi itela vhathu henefho Shikheme, a vha ṅwalela milayo na ndayo." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua a ṅwala idzo ndayo buguni ya Mulayo wa Mudzimu. A konou dzhia tombo ḽihulu a ḽi imisa henefho fhasi ha muri muhulu tsini ha hukhethwa ha Muṋe washu. 
Joshua24:27 Joshua a vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Tombo heḽi ḽi ḓo vha ṱhanzi yashu. Ḽo pfa maipfi oṱhe e Muṋe washu a ri vhudza. Zwenezwo ḽi ḓo vha ṱhanzi ya u ni rovhedza, ni si shandukele Muṋe washu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Ndi hone Joshua a tshi ri vhathu vha ṱuwe, muṅwe na muṅwe a vhuelela kha mukovhe wawe wa shango." 
Joshua24:29 Musi ho no fhela izwo, muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu, Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu a fa e na miṅwaha ya 110." 
Joshua24:30 Vha mu swiṱa shangoni ḽawe muḓini wa Thiminathi Sera mivhunduni ya Efraimi devhula ha thavha ya Gaashi. 
Joshua24:31 Vhaisraele vho shumela Muṋe washu misi yoṱhe Joshua a tshi kha ḓi tshila, na musi o no fa vha ḓi ralo vhahulwane vhe Joshua a fa a sia vha tshee hone, havhaḽa vhe vha vhona nga maṱo zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a itela Vhaisraele." 
Joshua24:32 Marambo a Josefa e Vhaisraele vha pfuluwa nao Egipita, o swiṱwa Shikheme, shangoni ḽe Jakopo a renga nga mangwende a ḓana a siliva, kha vhana vha Hamoro khotsi a Shikheme. Shango heḽo ḽo vha ifa ḽa vhaḓuhulu vha Josefa." 
Joshua24:33 Eliasara ṅwana wa Aroni na ene a fa, a swiṱwa Gibia, muḓanani u re mivhunduni ya Efraimi, we wa vha wo kovhelwa ṅwana wawe Finiasi." 
Judges1:1 Musi Joshua o no fa Vhaisraele vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu vha ri, “Ndi vhafhio vha matsinde ashu vho fanelaho u vha vhone vha u ranga u yo dia Vhakanana?”" 
Judges1:1 Musi Joshua o no fa Vhaisraele vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu vha ri, “Ndi vhafhio vha matsinde ashu vho fanelaho u vha vhone vha u ranga u yo dia Vhakanana?”" 
Judges1:2 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Tsinde ḽa Juda ndi vhone vhane vha fanela u ranga u ya. Ndi khou vha kumedza shango heḽi.”" 
Judges1:3 Vhathu vha Juda vha amba na vha Simioni vha ri, “Nga ri ṱuwe roṱhe shangoni ḽe ra kovhelwa ḽone, ri ḓo lwa na Vhakanana roṱhe, riṋe ra ḓo konou ya na vhoinwi shangoni ḽe na kovhelwa.” Matsinde a Simioni" 
Judges1:4 na Juda vha bva vhoṱhe pfumo. Muṋe washu a kumedza Vhakanana na Vhapherisi zwanḓani zwavho, vha vhulaha vhanna vha 10 000 muḓini wa Bezeke." 
Judges1:5 Vha wana Adoni Bezeke henefho vha lwa nae, vha kunda Vhakanana na Vhapherisi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni Bezeke a shavha, vha mu pandamedza, vha mu fara, vha mu tumula magunwe a zwanḓa na a milenzhe." 
Judges1:7 Adoni Bezeke a ri, “Ho vha hu na mahosi a 70 e nda a tumula magunwe a zwanḓa na a milenzhe a tshi ṱwa a tshi doba matshakatshaka fhasi ha ḓafula ḽanga. Mudzimu zwino o nndifhedza zwe nda vha ita.” Vha mu isa Jerusalema, a fela hone." 
Judges1:8 Vhanna vha Juda vha dia Jerusalema vha u thuba. Vha vhulaha vhathu vhawo vha u fhisa. 
Judges1:9 Vho no fhedza izwo vha ṱuwa vha yo lwa na Vhakanana vha no dzula mivhunduni na midavhini ya Negeve na midavhini i re tsini ha lwanzhe. 
Judges1:10 Vha yo dia Vhakanana vha no dzula muḓini wa Hebroni, we kale wa vha u tshi pfi Muḓi wa Araba. Henefho vha kunda vha mitupo ya Sheshai na Ahimani na Thalamai." 
Judges1:11 U bva henefho vhanna vha Juda vha yo dia vhathu vha no dzula Debiri. Misi iyo wo vha u tshi kha ḓi pfi Kuḓi kwa Sefere. 
Judges1:12 Muṅwe wavho we a vha a tshi pfi Khalebe a ri, “Munna ane a kona u thuba Kuḓi kwa Sefere ndi ḓo mu ṋea ṅwananyana wanga Akhisa, a mu dzea.”" 
Judges1:13 Othiniele, ṅwana wa Kenasi murathu wa Khalebe, a thuba uyo muḓi, zwenezwo Khalebe a mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Akhisa a mu dzea." 
Judges1:14 Musi wa munyanya wa mbingano a ṱuṱuwedza Othiniele uri a humbele khotsi awe tsimu. Musi Akhisa a tshi tsa kha donngi yawe, Khalebe a mu vhudzisa tshine a tshi ṱoḓa." 
Judges1:15 Akhisa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ṱoḓa maisha a maḓi. Shango ḽe vha nṋea ndi fhethu ho omelelaho.” Ndi hone Khalebe a tshi mu ṋea zwisima midavhini na magovhani." 
Judges1:16 Vhakeni vhaḓuhulu vha khotsi a musadzi wa Mushe, vho gonya na vhathu vha Juda vha tshi bva Muḓini wa Mitshevho, vha ya phangani tshipembe ha Aradi kha ḽa Juda. Henefho vha dzula vhukati ha vhathu." 
Judges1:17 Vhathu vha Juda vho rambana na vha Simioni, vha dia Vhakanana vha no dzula muḓini wa Tsefathi. Vha phusukanya uyo muḓi, ha vha u u kumedza Mudzimu, vha ri u pfi Horoma (Phusukanyo)." 
Judges1:18 Muṋe washu a farisa vhathu vha Juda, vha dzhia shango ḽa dzithavhani. Hone vha si thube Gaza na Ashkeloni na Ekroni na mashango o i tangaho. Vhathu havho vha dzulaho tsini ha lwanzhe vho vha vhe na gariki dza nndwa dza tsimbi, ndi zwe vhathu vha Juda vha kundwa u vha thatha uri vha ṱuwe." 
Judges1:19  
Judges1:20 Hebroni ho ṋewa Khalebe nga he Mushe a vha laya, Khalebe a thatha vhaḓuhulu vhararu vha Anaki na vhana vhavho afho muḓini." 
Judges1:21 Hone vhathu vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini a vho ngo thatha Vhajebusi vha no dzula Jerusalema, avho Vhajebusi vho ḓi dzula henefho na vhathu vha Benyamini, na ṋamusi." 
Judges1:22 Matsinde a Efraimi na Manase vha yo dia muḓi wa Bethele, we misi iyo wa vha u tshi pfi Lusi. Muṋe washu a vha farisa. Vha ruma ṱholi afho muḓini," 
Judges1:23  
Judges1:24 vha vhona muṅwe munna a tshi khou bva vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Ri sumbedze nḓila ya u dzhena afho muḓini, wa ralo a ri nga u huvhadzi.”" 
Judges1:25 Uyo munna a vha sumbedza, vhathu vha Efraimi na Manase vha vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe afho muḓini, vha litsha uyo munna na muṱa wawe." 
Judges1:26 Ngavhuya uyo munna a ya shangoni ḽa Vhahithi, a fhaṱa muḓi henefho, a ri u pfi Lusi; na ṋamusi dzina ḽawo ḽi tshee ḽeneḽo." 
Judges1:27 Vha tsinde ḽa Manase a vho ngo thatha vhathu vhane vha dzula miḓini ya Bethe Shiani na Thaanakha na Doro na Ibiliamu na Megido na vha ḓorobo dza henefho tsini; Vhakanana vho ḓi dzula henefho. 
Judges1:28 Musi Vhaisraele vho no anda, vha ita Vhakanana phuli dzavho, hone vha si vha thathe." 
Judges1:29 Vha tsinde ḽa Efraimi a vho ngo thatha Vhakanana vha no dzula muḓini wa Gezere, vhenevho Vhakanana vho ḓi dzula henefho navho." 
Judges1:30 Vha tsinde ḽa Zebuloni a vho ngo thatha vhathu vha no dzula miḓini ya Kithironi na Nahalala, vhenevho Vhakanana vho ḓi dzula henefho navho, vha vha ita phuli dzavho." 
Judges1:31 Vha tsinde ḽa Ashere a vho ngo thatha vhathu vha no dzula miḓini ya Akho na Sidoni na Ahalabu na Akhazibi na Heliba na Afeke na Rehobo. 
Judges1:32 Vhathu vha Ashere vho dzula na Vhakanana vha henefho, vhunga vha songo vha thatha uri vha ṱuwe." 
Judges1:33 Vha tsinde ḽa Nafuthali a vho ngo thatha vhathu vha no dzula miḓini ya Bethe Shemeshe na Bethe Anatha. Vhathu vha Nafuthali vho dzula na Vhakanana vha henefho, hone vha vha ita phuli dzavho." 
Judges1:34 Vhaamori vha kombetshedza tsinde ḽa Dani uri vha dzule mivhunduni vha si vha tendele vha tshi tsela zwigodini. 
Judges1:35 Vhaamori vha ḓi dzula thavhani ya Herese na Ayaloni na Shaalabimu vha tshi vhuswa hone nga matsinde a Efraimi na Manase, vha vha ita phuli dzavho." 
Judges1:36 Devhula ha Nngwa masakha a Vhaamori a buḓekanya Phara ya Dziphephenu. 
Judges2:1 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a bva Giligala a ya Bokhimu a amba na Vhaisraele a ri, “Ndo ni pfulusa Egipita, nda ni ḓisa shangoni ḽe nda fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku waṋu. Ndo ri, ‘Ndi nga si vhuye nda vhofholola mulanga we nda vhofha na inwi." 
Judges2:2 Inwi ni songo vhofha mulanga na muthihi na vhathu vha no dzula shangoni heḽino. Ni pwasehekanye aḽiṱari dzavho.’ Huno-ha no ita mini zwino? A no ngo tsha ita zwe nda ni vhudza. 
Judges2:3 “Zwino ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri vhathu avha a thi nga vha thathi vha ni shavha. Vha ḓo vha zwikwekwe zwa u ni fasha, midzimu yavho i ḓo vha tshikwekwe tsha u ni fasha.”" 
Judges2:4 Musi muruṅwa o fhedza u amba zwenezwo, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha thoma u lila," 
Judges2:5 ndi zwine afho fhethu ha pfi Bokhimu (Zwililo). Henefho vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo. 
Judges2:6 Joshua a onesana na Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe a yo dzula shangoni ḽe a kovhelwa ḽa vha ḽawe." 
Judges2:6 Joshua a onesana na Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe a yo dzula shangoni ḽe a kovhelwa ḽa vha ḽawe." 
Judges2:7 Vhaisraele vha shumela Muṋe washu Joshua a tshi kha ḓi tshila, na musi vharangaphanḓa vha tshi kha ḓi tshila vhe Joshua a fa a vha sia, ndi vhe vha vhona nga avho maṱo mishumo mihulu yoṱhe ye Muṋe washu a itela Vhaisraele." 
Judges2:7 Vhaisraele vha shumela Muṋe washu Joshua a tshi kha ḓi tshila, na musi vharangaphanḓa vha tshi kha ḓi tshila vhe Joshua a fa a vha sia, ndi vhe vha vhona nga avho maṱo mishumo mihulu yoṱhe ye Muṋe washu a itela Vhaisraele." 
Judges2:8 Muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu, Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, o fa e na miṅwaha ya 110." 
Judges2:8 Muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu, Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu, o fa e na miṅwaha ya 110." 
Judges2:9 A swiṱwa shangoni ḽe a kovhelwa ḽone muḓini wa Thiminathi Sera mivhunduni ya Efraimi, devhula ha thavha ya Gaashi." 
Judges2:10 Murafho wonoyo woṱhe na wone wa fa, murafho u tevhelaho wa hangwa Muṋe washu, vha hangwa na zwe a itela Vhaisraele." 
Judges2:11 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi khakhela Muṋe washu, vha thoma u shumela Vhobaali." 
Judges2:12 Vha litsha u luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku wavho, we a vha pfulusa Egipita, vha thoma u luvha miṅwe midzimu, midzimu ya tshakha dzi re tsini havho. Vha i gwadamela, u ralo ha vha u sinyusa Muṋe washu." 
Judges2:13 Vha litsha u luvha Muṋe washu, vha shumela Baali na Ashtharotho." 
Judges2:14 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele, a litsha mavemu a lwa navho a vha ṱangula. Muṋe washu a litsha maswina oṱhe a re tsini havho a tshi vha kunda, Vhaisraele vha si tsha kona u imedzana na maswina avho." 
Judges2:15 Misi yoṱhe vha tshi bva pfumo, Muṋe washu o vha a tshi lwa navho, sa zwe a vha anela uri u ḓo ita nga u ralo. Vha vhuya vha sala vhe khomboni khulu." 
Judges2:16 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓi ṋea Vhaisraele vharangaphanḓa vha vha lamukisa kha mavemu. 
Judges2:17 Hone Vhaisraele vha si thetshelese vharangaphanḓa vhavho. Vhaisraele Muṋe washu o vhona vha sa fulufhedzei, vha tshi luvha miṅwe midzimu. Vhokhotsi avho vho vha vha tshi thetshelesa zwine Muṋe washu a vha laya, hone murafho uyo muswa wa si tsha mu thetshelesa." 
Judges2:18 Misi yoṱhe musi Muṋe washu a tshi ḓi ṋea Vhaisraele murangaphanḓa muswa, o vha a tshi ḓi mu farisa, a lamukisa vhathu kha maswina avho musi onoyo murangaphanḓa a tshi kha ḓi tshila. Muṋe washu o vha a tshi vha khathutshela, ngauri vho vha vha tshi gomela musi vha tshi tambula vha tshi kandeledzwa." 
Judges2:19 Hone musi murangaphanḓa uyo a tshi fa, vhathu vho vha vha tshi anzela u humela kha maitele a kale, vha ita zwo vhifhaho u fhira vha murafho wo fhiraho, vha dovha vha shumela miṅwe midzimu vha i luvha, vha si tende u laṱa maitele avho mavhi." 
Judges2:20 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele a ri, “Lushaka holu lwo vhofholola mulanga uḽa we nda laya vhomakhulukuku wavho uri vha u tevhedze, vha si tsha nthetshelesa." 
Judges2:21 Zwenezwo a thi tsha ḓo thatha na lushaka na luthihi lwo salaho shangoni heḽi musi Joshua a tshi fa. 
Judges2:21 Zwenezwo a thi tsha ḓo thatha na lushaka na luthihi lwo salaho shangoni heḽi musi Joshua a tshi fa. 
Judges2:22 Ndi ḓo linga Vhaisraele ngavho uri ndi vhone arali vha tshi ḓo tevhela nḓila dzanga unga vhomakhulukuku wavho.” 
Judges2:23 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a tendela idzo tshakha uri dzi ḓi dzula henefho shangoni; ho ngo ita uri Joshua a vha kunde kathihi, ho ngo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa Joshua." 
Judges2:23 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a tendela idzo tshakha uri dzi ḓi dzula henefho shangoni; ho ngo ita uri Joshua a vha kunde kathihi, ho ngo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa Joshua." 
Judges3:1 Muṋe washu o sia dziṅwe tshakha afho shangoni a tshi itela u linga Vhaisraele vha sa athu bvaho pfumo kha ḽa Kanana. 
Judges3:2 Hezwo a zwi itela u gudisa murafho muṅwe na muṅwe wa Vhaisraele zwa nndwa, zwihulu avho vha sa athu vhuya vha bva pfumo." 
Judges3:3 Vho salaho afho shangoni ndi vha miḓi miṱanu ya Vhafilista, na Vhakanana vhoṱhe na Vhasidoni na Vhahivi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula thavhani dza Libanoni u bva thavhani ya Baali Heremoni u swika Pharani ya Hamathi." 
Judges3:4 Vho vha vho sielwa u linga Vhaisraele, u vhona arali Vhaisraele vha tshi ḓo thetshelesa ndayo dze Muṋe washu a ṋea vhomakhulukuku wavho nga Mushe." 
Judges3:5 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi dzula vhukati ha Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi," 
Judges3:6 vha dzetshelana navho vha luvha midzimu yavho. 
Judges3:7 Vhaisraele vha mbo ḓi hangwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho, vha mu khakhela, vha luvha zwitungulo zwa Baali na zwa Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele, a litsha Khushani Rishathaimi khosi ya Misopothamia-Devhula a vha kunda, a vha vhusa miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru." 
Judges3:9 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi lilela Muṋe washu, Ene a ruma munna wa u vha vhofholola. Hoyo munna ndi Othiniele, ṅwana wa Kenasi murathu wa Khalebe." 
Judges3:10 Muya wa Muṋe washu a ḓa khae, a vha murangaphanḓa wa Vhaisraele. Othiniele a bva pfumo, Muṋe washu a mu kumedza khosi ya Misopothamia." 
Judges3:11 Shango ḽa lala miṅwaha ya 40, Othiniele ṅwana wa Kenasi a vhuya a fa." 
Judges3:12 Vhaisraele vha dovha vha khakhela Muṋe washu. Nga zwenezwo Muṋe washu a ita uri Egiloni khosi ya Muaba a vhe na maanḓa a u kunda Vhaisraele. 
Judges3:13 Egiloni a baḓekana na Vhaamoni na Vhaameleke, vha kunda Vhaisraele vha thuba Jerikho, muḓi wa mitshevho." 
Judges3:14 Vhaisraele vha vhuswa nga Egiloni miṅwaha ya 18. 
Judges3:15 Vhaisraele vha lilela Muṋe washu, ene a ruma muṅwe munna uri a vha vhofholole. Hoyo munna ndi Ehudu, muḓuhulu wa Gera, wa tsinde ḽa Benyamini. O vha a tshi shuma nga tsha monde. Vhaisraele vha ruma Ehudu ha Egiloni khosi ya Muaba e na nduvho dza u mu ṋea." 
Judges3:16 Ehudu o vha o ḓifulela banga ḽa mutsheahoṱhe ḽa vhulapfu he ha vha vhu tshi nga ita hafu ya mitha. O vha o ḽi vhofhelela thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe fhasi ha zwiambaro zwawe. 
Judges3:17 Ehudu a dzhia idzo nduvho a dzi isa ha Egiloni. Egiloni o vha e muthu wa tshikikinini. 
Judges3:18 Musi Ehudu o no mu ṋea idzo nduvho, a vhudza vhanna vhe vha vha vho zwi hwala uri vha humele hayani." 
Judges3:19 Hone Ehudu ene muṋe a huma matomboni o vhaḓiwaho tsini ha Giligala, a vhuelela ha Egiloni, a mu vhudza a ri, “Thovhela, ndi na mafhungo a tshiphiri ane nda fanela u vha vhudza.” Khosi ya vhudza vhalanda vhayo ya ri, “Ibvani ri sale ri roṱhe.” Vhone vha bvela nnḓa." 
Judges3:20 Musi khosi i tshee yo dzula henefho i yoṱhe pfamoni yayo i rotholelaho nṱha ṱhangani, Ehudu a ya khae a ri, “Ndi na malaedzwa avho a no bva ha Mudzimu.” Khosi ya takuwa ya ima nga milenzhe." 
Judges3:21 Ehudu a mbo ḓi ṱomola ḽiḽa banga siani ḽawe ḽa tshauḽa nga tshanḓa tshawe tsha monde, a mbo ḓi runga khosi thumbu ngaḽo." 
Judges3:22 Banga ḽa dzhena ḽoṱhe ḽe mbwanda, khathihi na khaḓa dzaḽo, mapfura a mbo ḓi ḽi tibedza. Ehudu a si ḽi ṱomole thumbuni ya khosi, ḽa phuletshedza nga murahu, vhukati ha milenzhe yawe." 
Judges3:23 Ndi hone Ehudu a tshi bvela nnḓa, a vala mahothi, a a khiela," 
Judges3:24 a ṱuwa. Vhalanda vha tshi ḓa vha wana mahothi o khielwa, vha vhona unga khosi i ngomu, i khou ḓithusa." 
Judges3:25 Vha lindela vha vhuya vha hanganea, vha vhona khosi i sa vuli vothi. Ndi hone vha tshi dzhia khii vha vula. Vha wana muṋe wavho o rambalala fhasi o fa." 
Judges3:26 Ehudu a shavha vha tshee vho lindela. A fhira matombo aḽa o vhaḓiwaho, a shavhela Seira." 
Judges3:27 Musi a tshi swika henefho mivhunduni ya Efraimi, a lidza phalaphala ya u ramba Vhaisraele uri vha bve pfumo, a vha ranga phanḓa vha tsa mivhundu." 
Judges3:28 Ehudu a ri, “Ntevheleni! Muṋe washu o kumedza maswina aṋu Vhamuaba zwanḓani zwaṋu.” Vha tsa vha tevhela Ehudu, vha thuba maḓambuwo a Jorodani a u wetshela Muaba, vha si tende na muthihi a tshi wetshela seli." 
Judges3:29 Musi wonoyo vha vhulaha 10 000 zwa vhahali vhahulu vha Muaba; a hu na na muthihi wavho we a ponyoka a shavha. 
Judges3:30 Ndi hone he Vhaisraele vha kunda Vhamuaba, ḽa lala ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 80."
