Judges20:18 Vhaisraele vha ya fhethu hune ha luvhiwa hone Bethele, vhe henefho vha vhudzisa Mudzimu vha ri, “Ndi vha tsinde ḽifhio vhane vha fanela u thoma u lwa na vhathu vha Benyamini?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi Juda.”" 
Judges20:19 Ḽi tshi tsha Vhaisraele vha takuwa vha ṱoka mishasha tsini ha muḓi wa Gibia. 
Judges20:20 Vha ṱuwa vha yo dia mmbi ya Benyamini, vha vhea vhahali fhethu ho livhanaho na muḓi." 
Judges20:21 Vha Benyamini vha bva muḓini, ḓuvha ḽi sa athu kovhela vha vha vho no vhulaha vhahali vha 22 000 vha Israele." 
Judges20:22 Vhaisraele vha gonya vha yo lila phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela, vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu vha ri, “Ri dovhe ri gonye ri yo lwa na vhathu vha hashu vha Benyamini?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Gonyani ni yo lwa navho!” Ndi hone mmbi ya Vhaisraele i tshi pfa vhe na nungo, vha vhea vhahali vhavho henefhaḽa fhethu ha mulovha." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Vha dovha vha imedzana na mmbi ya Benyamini lwa vhuvhili. 
Judges20:25 Vha Benyamini vha dovha vha ḓa vha tshi bva Gibia, musi uyo vha vhulaha vhahali vha Israele vha 18 000 vho gudiswaho zwa nndwa." 
Judges20:26 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi gonya Bethele vha yo lila vho dzula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Musi wonoyo vha ḓidzima zwiḽiwa ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela, vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhuthihi." 
Judges20:27 Vhaisraele vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu. Misi yeneyo mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu yo vha i henefho," 
Judges20:28 Finiasi ṅwana wa Eliasara ṅwana wa Aroni e ene a shumelaho Muṋe washu henefho. Vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ri dovhe ri gonye ri yo lwa na vha hashu vhathu vha Benyamini kana ri songo ya naa?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Iyani. Matshelo ndi ḓo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu.”" 
Judges20:29 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi vhea vhahali vha lalela u mona na Gibia. 
Judges20:30 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru vha gonya vha yo lwa na vhathu vha Benyamini zwa nga zwenezwiḽa zwa u thoma. 
Judges20:31 Vhathu vha Benyamini vha bva uri vha ḓe vha lwe navho, vha kungelwa kule ha muḓi. Vha ita zwe vha ranga u zwi ita, vha thoma u vhulaha vhaṅwe Vhaisraele ḓakani na nḓilani ya u ya Bethele na nḓilani ya u ya Gibia, vha vhulaha Vhaisraele vhane vha nga swika 30." 
Judges20:32 Vha Benyamini vha ri, “Ro vha kunda unga zwiḽa u rangani.” Hone Vhaisraele vho vha vho vhamba maano a uri vha shavhe khole-khole, vha vha kungele kule ha muḓi vha ḓe magondoni," 
Judges20:33 ha pfi vhunzhi ha vha mmbi ya Vhaisraele vha tshi humela murahu, vha ḓo yo kuvhangana Baali Thamara. Vhaḽa vhe vha vha vho lalela u mona na Gibia vha mbo ḓi dzumbuluwa he vha vha vho dzumbana hone zwikwarani zwa Geba." 
Judges20:34 Ha vuwa vhanna vha 10 000 vhe vha tou nanguludzwa kha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vha dia Gibia, ngei nndwani hu tshi khou lwiwa lu ofhisaho, vha Benyamini vha sa zwi vhoni uri vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi lozwiwa." 
Judges20:35 Muṋe washu a ita uri Vhaisraele vha kunde vha Benyamini. Musi wonoyo Vhaisraele vha vhulaha vha Benyamini vha 25 100 vho faraho mafumo. 
Judges20:36 Ha vha hu hone vha Benyamini vha tshi thoma u zwi vhona uri vho kundwa. Vhanna vha mmbi ya Vhaisraele vho huma vha si tsha imedzana na vha Benyamini nge vha vha vho fulufhela vhanna vhe vha vha vhea uri vha lalele u mona na Gibia. 
Judges20:37 Havho vhanna vho ṱangana vha gidimela Gibia, vha balangana na muḓi, vha vhulaha vhathu vhoṱhe henefho." 
Judges20:38 Vhanna vha Israele vho vha vho pfana na vhanna vho lalelaho uri vha dubise buluvhutsi afho muḓini," 
Judges20:39 zwenezwo Vhaisraele vha pfi vha dzhene nndwa. Tshifhinga tshenetsho vhathu vha Benyamini vho vha vho no ḓi vhulaha Vhaisraele vha 30, vha amba vha ri, “Vhukuma ro vha kunda unga zwiḽa u rangani.”" 
Judges20:40 Hone musi buluvhutsi ḽi tshi thoma u duba ḽi tshi bva muḓini, vhathu vha Benyamini vha rembuluwa vha vhona buluvhutsi ḽa muḓi woṱhe ḽi tshi khou duba ḽi tshi ya lutomboni." 
Judges20:41 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi vha wela, vha Benyamini vha hanganea nge vha vhona uri vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi lovha." 
Judges20:42 Vha humela Vhaisraele vha shavhela sogani, hone vha tangiwa nga vhaḽa vho phusukanyaho muḓi," 
Judges20:43 vha tangiwa, vha pandamedzwa, vha enda vha tshi vhulawa u bva Nua u swika vhubvaḓuvha ha Gibia," 
Judges20:44 ha vhulawa 18 000, vhoṱhe vhe vhahali vha nndwa." 
Judges20:45 Ho tou ponyoka vhaṅwe vha shavha vho livha sogani Tomboni ḽa Rimoni, nḓilani Vhaisraele vha vhulaha vhaṅwe vha 5 000, vha tshi vha pandamedza vha dovha vha vhulaha vha no swika 2 000." 
Judges20:46 Ha vha uri vha Benyamini vho vhulawaho ndi 25 000 vhó ṱangana, vhoṱhe vhe vhahali vha nndwa." 
Judges20:47 Vhe vha kona u ponyoka ndi 600 fhedzi. Avho vho shavhela sogani, vha ya Tomboni ḽa Rimoni, vha dzula henefho vha fhedza miṅwedzi miṋa." 
Judges20:48 Vhaisraele vha rembuluwa vha yo lwa na vhaṅwe vhathu vha Benyamini, vha vhulaha vhoṱhe, vhathu na zwifuwo na zwoṱhe zwe vha wana miḓini vha zwi fhisa nga mulilo, vha fhisa na miḓi yoṱhe." 
Judges21:1 Zwiḽa Vhaisraele vho kuvhangana Mitsipha vho anela Muṋe washu vha ri, “A hu nga vhi na muthihi washu ane a ḓo tenda muthu wa Benyamini a tshi dzea ṅwananyana washu.”" 
Judges21:2 Zwino ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ya Bethele, vha dzula henefho phanḓa ha Mudzimu ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela. Vha ṱavha mukosi, vha lila lu ṱungufhadzaho, vha tshi ri," 
Judges21:3 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, ndi mini zwo raliho zwo itea kha Vhaisraele? Ḽiṅwe tsinde ḽa Israele ṋamusi a ḽi tsheeho!”" 
Judges21:4 Ḽi tshi tsha vhathu vha fhaṱa aḽiṱari henefho, vha ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho dza vhuthihi." 
Judges21:5 Vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Kani hu na tshigwada tsha matsinde a Israele tshi songo yaho guvhanganoni phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ngei Mitsipha?” (Ndi uri vho vha vho ana vho tou khwaṱhisa uri nnyi na nnyi a songo yaho Mitsipha a vhulawe.)" 
Judges21:6 Vhaisraele vha pfela vha havho vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vhuṱungu vha ri, “Ṋamusi ḽiṅwe tsinde ḽo tumulwa kha Israele." 
Judges21:7 Ndi tshini tshine ra nga ita uri vhanna vha Benyamini vho salaho vha wane vhasadzi? Ro anela Muṋe washu uri a ri nga vha ṋei na muthihi wa vhananyana vhashu.” 
Judges21:8 Musi vha tshi vhudzisa arali hu na tshigwada tsha matsinde a Israele tshi songo yaho guvhanganoni ḽa Mitsipha, vha wana uri henefho ho vha hu si na na muthihi a no bva Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi;" 
Judges21:9 hu tshi vhidzwa madzina a mmbi a ho ngo vha na muthihi a no bva Jabeshe we a fhindula. 
Judges21:10 Ndi hone vha itsho tshivhidzo vha tshi ruma vhahali vhavho na ndaela i no ri, “Tshimbilani ni yo vhulaha vhoṱhe vha Jabeshe, khathihi na vhasadzi na vhana." 
Judges21:11 Vhulahani vhanna vhoṱhe na vhasadzi vhoṱhe vho no ḓivhaho munna.” 
Judges21:12 Kha vhenevho vhathu vha Jabeshe vha wana hu na vhasidzana vha 400 vha sa athu ḓivha munna, zwenezwo vha vha ḓisa mishashani ya Shilo shangoni ḽa Kanana." 
Judges21:13 Ndi hone tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tshi tshi ruma muḓinḓa ha vhathu vha Benyamini vhe vha vha vhe Tomboni ḽa Rimoni vha ri nndwa nga i fhele. 
Judges21:14 Vha Benyamini vha vhuya, vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vha vha ṋea vhasidzana vha no bva Jabeshe vhe vha si vha vhulahe. Hone vho vha vha songo eḓana." 
Judges21:15 Vhathu vha pfela vha Benyamini vhuṱungu nge Muṋe washu a ita uri matsinde a Israele vha si tsha vha vhathihi. 
Judges21:16 Ndi hone vharangaphanḓa vha tshivhidzo vha tshi ri, “A hu tshee na vhasadzi kha tsinde ḽa Benyamini. Ri ḓo ita mini uri vhanna vho salaho ri vha wanele vhasadzi?" 
Judges21:17 Vhaisraele vha songo xelelwa nga ḽiṅwe ḽa matsinde avho a 12. Ro fanela u wana nḓila ya uri tsinde ḽa Benyamini ḽi ḓi sala ḽi hone," 
Judges21:18 hone a ri koni u vha tendela vha dzea vhananyana vhashu, ngauri ro teketela muṅwe na muṅwe washu ane a nga tenda wa Benyamini a tshi dzea ṅwana wawe.”" 
Judges21:19 Vha elekanya vha ri, “Hu ḓo ṱuwa hu tshi vha na vhuṱambo ha Muṋe washu ha ṅwaha nga ṅwaha muḓini wa Shilo.” (Shilo ndi devhula ha Bethele, tshipembe ha Lebona, vhubvaḓuvha ha gondo ḽi re vhukati ha Bethele na Shikheme.)" 
Judges21:20 Vha vhudza vha Benyamini vha ri, “Iyani u lalela masimuni a minḓirivhe" 
Judges21:21 ni linde. Musi vhasidzana vha Shilo vha tshi bva vha tshi yo tshina nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo, ni dzumbuluwe hafho masimuni a minḓirivhe; muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a dzhie musadzi nga khani kha avho vhasidzana, a ṱuwe nae a mu ise shangoni ḽa Benyamini." 
Judges21:22 Arali vhokhotsi avho kana khaladzi dzavho vha ḓa ha riṋe vha ri sengisa, ri ḓo vha vhudza ra ri, ‘Litshani vha dzule navho ngauri vhe ra vha wana nndwani a vho ngo lingana. Inwi a ni na mulandu wa u pfuka muano waṋu, hufha ni songo tou vha ṋea vhone.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Vhathu vha Benyamini vha ita zwenezwo, muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a nanga musadzi kha vhasidzana vhe vha vha vha tshi khou tshina afho Shilo, a mu hwala a ṱuwa nae. Ndi hone vha tshi humela shangoni ḽa havho, vha vusa miḓi yavho vha dzula khayo." 
Judges21:24 Ndi hone na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vha tshi ṱuwa afho fhethu, vha humela hayani ha matsinde avho na miṱa yavho na masimuni avho." 
Judges21:25 Misi yeneyo ho vha hu si na khosi Israele. Muṅwe na muṅwe o vha a tshi sokou ita zwine a vhona zwo fanela. 
Ruth1:1 Misi ya vharangaphanḓa ho vhuya ha wa nḓala shangoni, ha vha na muṅwe munna wa muḓi wa Betlehema kha ḽa Juda we a pfuluwa na musadzi wawe na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka, vha tshi yo ṱunḓa shangoni ḽa Muaba." 
Ruth1:2 Uyo munna o vha a tshi pfi Elimelekhe, musadzi wawe a tshi pfi Naumi, vhana vhawe ndi Mahaloni na Khilioni. Vho vha vhe vha Efratha vha Betlehema, shangoni ḽa Juda. Vho ri u swika shangoni ḽa Muaba vha dzula hone." 
Ruth1:3 Musi vhe Muaba, Elimelekhe a fa, Naumi a sala na vhatuka vhawe vhavhili." 
Ruth1:4 Vhenevho vho dzea vhasadzi vha Vhamuaba, Oripa na Rute. Vha dzula Muaba ha fhela miṅwaha ine ya nga swika fumi," 
Ruth1:5 ha vhuya ha fa na Mahaloni na Khilioni vhuvhili havho, mme avho a sala e tshilikadzi, na ṅwana a si tshee na." 
Ruth1:6 Musi Naumi a tshee Muaba, a pfa uri Muṋe washu o dovha a tonda vhathu vhawe a vha ṋea zwiḽiwa. Ndi hone a tshi ḓilugisa na vhasadzi vha vhana vhawe, a tshi ri u humela hayani," 
Ruth1:7 a mbo takuwa he a vha a tshi dzula hone, a fara lwendo e na vhomazwale vhawe vhavhili a tshi vhuelela shangoni ḽa Juda." 
Ruth1:8 Musi vhe nḓilani, Naumi a amba na vhomazwale vhawe a ri, “Humani ni ye mahayani aṋu ha vhomme aṋu; ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni tonda u ḓi nga inwi no ntonda na vhana vhanga zwiḽa vha tshee hone." 
Ruth1:9 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi dovha a ni ṋea vhanna, na dzula nga mulalo.” Ndi hone a tshi vha kuvhatedza a tshi ri u onesana navho. Vhone vha mbo ḓi thoma u lila vha tou ṱavha mukosi," 
Ruth1:10 vha ri, “Aiwa nandi, ri ṱuwa navho vha tshi vhuelela ha havho!”" 
Ruth1:11 Naumi a si tende, a ri, “Hai nandi vhananga, zwi nga farisa mini ni tshi ṱuwa na nṋe? Kani-ha ndi nga dovha nda beba vhatuka vha vha vhanna vhaṋu?" 
Ruth1:12 Humani zwaṋu, hufha ndo no kegula, ndi nga si tsha wana munna. Hone naho zwo vha zwi tshi nga itea uri ndi vhe na munna vhusiku ha ṋamusi nda beba vhana vha vhatuka," 
Ruth1:13 no vha ni tshi nga kona u lindela vha vhuya vha aluwa naa? No vha ni tshi nga landula vhaṅwe vhanna nó lindela vhana vhanga vha tshi thoma u aluwa naa? Aiwa nandi vhananga! Hafhu nṋe zwi a mmbavha u fhira inwi, tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsho nnziamedza.”" 
Ruth1:14 Naumi a ri u ralo vha mbo dovha u lila vha tou ṱavha mukosi. Ndi hone Oripa a tshi kuvhatedza mazwale wawe a onesana nae, hone Rute a mu nambatela." 
Ruth1:15 Naumi a mu kwengweledza a ri, “Hufha murathu waṋu o humela ha hawe hu na midzimu yawe, a ni mu tevheli?”" 
Ruth1:16 Rute a fhindula a ri, “Vha songo nkombetshedza u vha ṱutshela, hune vhone vha ya, na nṋe ndi ya navho; hune vha ḓo dzula hone, na nṋe ndi ḓo dzula henefho; lushaka lwa havho, na nṋe ndi lushaka lwanga; Mudzimu wavho na nṋe ndi Mudzimu wanga;" 
Ruth1:17 hune vha fela hone, na nṋe ndi ḓo fela hone nda swiṱwa henefho; ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi nthwa a dovha arali nda tenda u fhandekanywa navho; na lwone lufu a lu nga ri fhandekanyi!”" 
Ruth1:18 Naumi a tshi vhona uri Rute o ḓiimisela u ṱuwa nae, a si tsha mu dzivhisa." 
Ruth1:19 Vha mbo fhirela phanḓa vhoṱhe vha vhuya vha swika Betlehema. Musi vha tshi swika, phungo yavho ya mbo ṱanganya muḓi wa Betlehema, vhafumakadzi vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ndi Vho-Naumi avha?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naumi ene a ri, “A thi tsha pfi Naumi (Tshinakaho), ndi vho pfi Mara (Zwiavhavha), ngauri Ramaanḓaoṱhe o nnyita zwi vhavhaho vhukuma." 
Ruth1:21 Ndo ṱuwa ndi na muṱa, Muṋe washu a mmbuisa ndi si na tshithu. Ni kha ḓi mmbidzelani nga ḽa Naumi, hufha Muṋe washu o ntambudza, hufha Ramaanḓaoṱhe o nndivhanya na zwi lemelaho.”" 
Ruth1:22 Ngauralo Naumi o vhuya a tshi bva Muaba na mazwale wawe, Rute wa Mumuaba. Vho swika Betlehema vhathu vha tshi tou thoma u kaṋa bali." 
Ruth2:1 Elimelekhe munna wa Naumi o vha e na shaka ḽi no pfi Buasi, muḓivhalea o pfumaho." 
Ruth2:2 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Rute wa Mumuaba a amba na Naumi a ri, “Kha vha litshe ndi ye masimuni ndi yo ṱala ṱhalane tsimuni ya onoyo ane a nga ntendela.” Naumi a ri, “Ndi zwone ṅwananga.”" 
Ruth2:3 Rute a ya masimuni, a tshenuwa ó swika tsimuni ya Buasi shaka ḽa Elimelekhe, a ṱala ṱhalane a tshi tevhela vhakaṋi." 
Ruth2:4 Buasi a mbo swika masimuni a tshi bva Betlehema, a reshana na vhakaṋi a ri, “Muṋe washu a vhe na inwi!” Vhone vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Muṋe washu a vha shudufhadze!”" 
Ruth2:5 Buasi a vhudzisa mulangi wa vhakaṋi a ri, “Uḽa musidzana ndi wa nnyi?”" 
Ruth2:6 A fhindula a ri, “Ndi uḽa musadzi wa Mumuaba we a vhuya na Naumi shangoni ḽa Muaba." 
Ruth2:7 O humbela u ṱala ṱhalane dzo wiswaho nga vhakaṋi. Tshi tsheetsho tshe ḽa tsha ha aweli, ndi hone o thoma u awelanyana zwino murunzini.”" 
Ruth2:8 Ndi hone Buasi a tshi amba na Rute a ri, “Edzonu pfa ṅwananga, ni songo vhuya na ṱuwa na yo ṱala ṱhalane tsimuni ya muṅwe, tshaṋu ni tou ṱwa na vhashumi vhanga vha vhasidzana." 
Ruth2:9 Konḓelelani afha tsimuni ni tshi tevhela vhakaṋi, ndo vha vhudza uri vha songo ni dina. Na pfa ḓora ni ye mvuvheloni hedziḽa ni nwe maḓi e vhakaṋi vha ḓikela.”" 
Ruth2:10 Rute a mbo ḓi gwadama a losha a ri, “Vha nga nnyita hani nga vhuthu, vha vhuya vha tou ḓidina nga nṋe, hufha ndi mutsinda?”" 
Ruth2:11 Buasi a fhindula a ri, “Ndi uri ndo pfa zwoṱhe zwe na itela mazwale waṋu musi vho felwa nga munna, na tou ṱutshela khotsi aṋu na mme aṋu na shango ḽa haṋu na ḓa fhano ha hashu he na vha ni sa hu ḓivhi." 
Ruth2:12 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni pfufha a tevhedza zwivhuya zwe na ita. Ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele we na ḓa u khuda nga phapha dzawe a tshi ni ṋea pfufho khulu.” 
Ruth2:13 Rute a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha nnyitela vhuthu vhungafha na tshilidzi, vha amba na nṋe nga vhulenda, nṋe ndi sa vhuyi nda vha muṅwe wa vhashumi vhavho!”" 
Ruth2:14 Nga tshifhinga tsha u ṅwata, Buasi a mu vhidza a ri, “Sendelani ngeno ni ḽe, ṅwatani zwaṋu ni thothe kha muthotho washu wa nḓirivhe.” Rute a dzula fhasi na vhakaṋi, Buasi a mu ṋea goroi yo hadzingwaho, a ḽa a fura ya ita na u sala," 
Ruth2:15 a takuwa a isa phanḓa u ṱala ṱhalane. Buasi a laya vhakaṋi a ri, “Mu litsheni a ṱale na vhukati ha khuḽane dzo no vhoxwaho, ni songo mu halifhela," 
Ruth2:16 nahone ni ite ni tshi ṱomola khaṱha kha khuḽane ni wisele fhasi uri a kone u doba, ni songo mu kaidza.”" 
Ruth2:17 Rute a ḓi ṱala ṱhalane ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela. A tshi fhula bali a wana o ṱoḓou swikisa khilogiramu dza 13. 
Ruth2:18 A i dzhia a humela muḓini. Mazwale wawe vha vhona uri o ṱala nngafhani, a dovha a vha ṋea na yo hadzingwaho ye a sia musi o no ḽa a fura." 
Ruth2:19 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “No i ṱala ngafhi? No ṱala tsimuni ya nnyi ṋamusi? Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi shudufhadza onoyo munna we a ni tonda nga u rali!” Ndi hone Rute a tshi vha vhudza zwoṱhe zwe a ita tsimuni, a vha vhudza na uri muṋe wa tsimu iyo ndi Buasi." 
Ruth2:20 Naumi a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi shudufhadza uyo munna, ngauri hu riṋe ri tshilaho, hu vhanna vhashu vho faho, Muṋe washu o ri itela vhuthu roṱhe; hoyo munna ndi shaka ḽashu, ndi muṅwe wa vhalamuleli vhashu.”" 
Ruth2:21 Rute wa Mumuaba a ri, “O dovha a mmbudza uri ndi ṱwe na vhakaṋi vhawe khaṋo i vhuye i fhele.”" 
Ruth2:22 Naumi a fhindula a ri, “Zwo naka ṅwananga, ni ṱwe na vhashumi vhawe vha vhasidzana, tsimuni ya muṅwe vhathu vha nga ni kolela.”" 
Ruth2:23 Nangoho Rute a ḓi ṱwa na vhashumi vha Buasi ha vhuya ha fhela khaṋo ya baḽi na ya goroi, hayani a tshi ḓi dzula na mazwale wawe." 
Ruth3:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Naumi a amba na Rute mazwale wawe a ri, “Ṅwananga, ndi funa u ni ṱoḓela munna uri ni vhe na muṱa waṋu." 
Ruth3:2 A thi ri Buasi uḽa we na ṱwa na vhashumi vhawe ndi shaka ḽashu? Nga madekwana u ḓo vha a khou yo fhula baḽi luvhatani. 
Ruth3:3 Ṱambani ni ḓole zwinukheleli ni ambare ni tsele luvhatani. Hone a songo ni vhona a sa athu ṅwata na u nwa. 
Ruth3:4 Ni sedze fhethu hune a lala hone, ni konou sendela ni fukule nguvho ni lale tsini ha milenzhe yawe; ene u ḓo ni vhudza tshine na fanela u ita.”" 
Ruth3:5 Rute a tenda a ri, “Ndi ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine vha mmbudza.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ndi hone a tshi tsela luvhatani, a tshi swika a ita zwenezwiḽa zwe mazwale vha mu laya." 
Ruth3:7 Buasi o ri u ḽa na u nwa, mbilu yawe ya takala, a yo lala tsini ha thulwi ya baḽi, Rute a ḓa a tshi tou ṋengeledza, a fukula nguvho ya Buasi a lala tsini ha milenzhe yawe." 
Ruth3:8 Vhukati ha vhusiku Buasi a karuwa, a rembuluwa a pfa hu na musadzi o lalaho tsini ha milenzhe yawe," 
Ruth3:9 a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndiwe nnyi?” Rute a ri, “Ndi nṋe Rute muṋe wanga, ndi khou humbela uri vha mmbavhalele, ngauri vha shaka ḽashu.”" 
Ruth3:10 Buasi a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu u ḓo ni shudufhadza ṅwananga; ndi hone no sumbedza u fulufhedzea u fhira na zwiḽa zwa u thoma, ngauri a no ngo ṱaha na vhaṱhannga, vha vhashai kana vho pfumaho." 
Ruth3:11 Zwino-ha ṅwananga, ni songo ḽa mbilu, ndi ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine na humbela; vhathu vhoṱhe fhano ha hashu vha ni ḓivha ni musadzisadzi." 
Ruth3:12 Ni amba zwone, nṋe ndi shaka ḽaṋu, ndi fanela u ni londola. Hone hu na muṅwe munna a re shaka ḽa tsini u fhira nṋe." 
Ruth3:13 Eḓelani zwaṋu fhano. Arali matshelo onoyo a tshi ḓo tenda u ni dzea, ndi zwone; arali a sa funi ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri ndi ḓo ni dzea. Inwi eḓelani zwaṋu fhano ḽi vhuye ḽi tshe.”" 
Ruth3:14 Nangoho Rute a eḓela henefho tsini ha milenzhe ya Buasi, ḽi sa athu vhonadza a mbo vuwa uri a si vhonwe nga muthu, ngauri Buasi o vha o mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi khwiṋe vha sa zwi ḓivhi uri ho ḓa musadzi a eḓela fhano luvhatani.”" 
Ruth3:15 Rute a sa athu ṱuwa Buasi a ri a bvule nguvho a i ṱharamudze. Rute a ita nga u ralo, Buasi a shela baḽi ine ya nga swika khilogiramu dza 25, a mu hwesa." 
Ruth3:16 Buasi a humela muḓini, Rute ene a humela ha mazwale wawe. Vha mu vhudzisa uri o tshimbila hani, a vha hanelela zwoṱhe zwe Buasi a mu itela," 
Ruth3:17 a ri, “Vho ita na u nṋea khilogiramu dza 25 idzi dza baḽi, ngauri vho ri ndi songo humela kha vhone ndi songo fara tshithu.”" 
Ruth3:18 Naumi a ri, “Zwino sokonu lindela ṅwananga, ni ḓo vhona uri hu ḓo itea mini. Uḽa munna a nga si rudze mbilu, mafhungo u ḓo a dzudzanya ṋamusi.”" 
Ruth4:1 Nga matsheloni Buasi a bubela khoroni ya muḓi a dzula henefho. Ḽiḽa shaka ḽa tsini ḽe a ḽi amba ḽa fhira nga henefho. Buasi a mu vhidza a ri, “Wa hashu, nga vha thome u ḓa ngeno, vha dzule fhasi ri ambe.” Uḽa a ḓa a dzula." 
Ruth4:2 Buasi a dovha a vhidza vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha muḓi vha fumi a ri vha dzule-vho henefho. Musi vho no dzula fhasi," 
Ruth4:3 a vhudza shaka ḽawe a ri, “A thi ri Naumi o vhuya Muaba? Zwino u khou ṱoḓa u rengisa iḽa tsimu ya shaka ḽashu Elimelekhe," 
Ruth4:4 nṋe ndi tshi zwi pfa nda ri ndi fanela u vha luma nḓevhe nga ayo mafhungo. Zwino-ha, arali vha tshi i ṱoda nga vha i renge. Ṱhanzi ndi havha vhoṱhe vho dzulaho hafha, khathihi na vhahulwane avha vha muḓi. Arali vha tshi landula vha mmbudze uri ndi zwi ḓivhe. Ndi uri wa u thoma ane a fanela u i renga ndi vhone, ha konou ḓa nṋe.” Munna uyo a ri, “Ndi ḓo i renga.”" 
Ruth4:5 Buasi a ri, “Ndi zwone. Huno arali vha tshi renga iyo tsimu kha Naumi, vha ḓo wana na Rute wa Mumuaba, tshilikadzi ya shaka ḽashu, uri vha bebele mufu muḽaifa ane a ḓo wana tsimu iyo.”" 
Ruth4:6 Munna uyo a fhindula a ri, “Izwo ndi nga si kone u i renga, ngauri i nga si vhe ifa ḽa vhana vhanga. Vhone nga vha i renge, nṋe ndi nga si zwi kone.”" 
Ruth4:7 Zwino misi iḽa kha ḽa Israele, hu tshi dzudzanywa zwa thengo kana vhathu vha tshi renganyisa thundu, murengisi o vha a tshi bvula navhula yawe a i ṋea murengi ha vha u khwaṱhisa mafhungo." 
Ruth4:8 Ndi zwe uḽa munna a tshi ri Buasi a renge zwawe tsimu, a mbo ḓi bvula navhula." 
Ruth4:9 Ndi hone Buasi a tshi vhudza vhahulwane na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe hone a ri, “Ṋamusi noṱhe ni ṱhanzi dza uri thundu yoṱhe ye ya vha i ya Elimelekhe na vhana vhawe Khilioni na Mahaloni ndo i renga kha Naumi," 
Ruth4:10 nda dzhia na Rute wa Mumuaba tshilikadzi ya Mahaloni uri a vhe musadzi wanga, u itela uri thundu iyo i ḓi vha ya muṱa wa mufu, lutsinga lwawe lwa si tumuwe kha vhathu vha hawe na muḓini. Ṋamusi inwi ni dziṱhanzi.”" 
Ruth4:11 Vhahulwane na vhaṅwe vhathu vhoṱhe vho dzulaho khoroni vha mbo tenda vha ri, “Ri dziṱhanzi. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ita uri musadzi wavho a nge Rahele na Lea vhomakhulukuku wa Vhaisraele vhoṱhe. Nga zwi vha nakele mutuponi wa Efratha, vha vhe na bvumo Betlehema." 
Ruth4:12 Vhana vhane Muṋe washu a ḓo vha ṋea nga uyu musidzana, ngavhe vha tshi anda unga muṱa wa Pheretse ṅwana wa Juda na Thamara.”" 
Ruth4:13 Buasi a vhinga Rute a mu dzhenisa nḓuni. Muṋe washu a mu shudufhadza a vhifha muvhilini, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana." 
Ruth4:14 Vhasadzi vha dalela Naumi vha ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, o vha ṋea muḓuhulu ane a ḓo vha londola. Ngavhe uyo mutukana a tshi vha na bvumo kha Vhaisraele!" 
Ruth4:15 Musadzi wa ṅwana wavho u a vha funa, o vha tonda u fhira vhana vha vhatuka vhaṱanu na vhavhili. Zwino o vha bebela muḓuhulu ane a ḓo ita uri vha tshile zwavhuḓi a vha vhavhalela vho no kegula.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naumi a takula uyo ṅwana a mu lela a nga ndi wawe. 
Ruth4:17 Vhasadzi vha vhahura vha fhululedza vha ri, “Naumi o wana ṅwana wa mutukana,” vha ri u pfi Obede. Obede a vha khotsi a Isai, khotsi a Dafita." 
Ruth4:18 Lutsinga lwa Pheretse u swika kha Dafita asulu: Pheretse, Esromu, Ramu, Aminadaba, Nahashoni, Salimoni, Buasi, Obede, Isai, Dafita." 
Ruth4:19  
Ruth4:20  
Ruth4:21  
Ruth4:22  
1Samuel1:1 Ho vha hu na muṅwe munna wa mutupo wa Tsufu we a vha a tshi dzula Ramathaimi, mivhunduni ya Efraimi; o vha a tshi pfi Elikana, e ṅwana wa Jerohamu, ṅwana wa Elihu, ṅwana wa Thohu, ṅwana wa Tsufu, wa Efratha." 
1Samuel1:2 O vha e na vhasadzi vhavhili, muṅwe o vha a tshi pfi Hanna, muṅwe a tshi pfi Phenina. Phenina o vha e na vhana, Hanna ene o vha a si na ṅwana." 
1Samuel1:3 Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe Elikana o vha a tshi takuwa muḓini wa hawe a ya Shilo u luvha Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe na u mu ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo. Vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu henefho Shilo vho vha vhe vhana vha Eli vhavhili, Hofuni na Finiasi." 
1Samuel1:4 Ho vha hu tshi ri u swika ḓuvha ḽine Elikana a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo, a ṋea Phenina mukovhe wa iyo ṋama, khathihi na vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
1Samuel1:5 Huno Hanna o vha a tshi mu ṋea mukovhe u no eḓana mikovhe mivhili ngauri o vha a tshi mu funesa naho Muṋe washu o vha o mu dzima mbebo. 
1Samuel1:6 Zwenezwo Phenina muhadzinga wawe a ḓi mu kolela lwa u mu vhaisa, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o mu dzima mbebo. O vha a tshi ḓi mu kolela nga miṅwaha vha tshi ya u luvha nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, a ḓi mu dina lwe Hanna a vhuya a lila a si tsha funa na u ḽa." 
1Samuel1:7  
1Samuel1:8 Ndi hone Elikana munna wawe a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Hanna, ni lilelani? Ndi mini ni sa ḽi? Khezwi no dinalea? Ní na nṋe a ni vhoni zwi tshi fhira vhana vha fumi vha vhatukana kani?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Muṅwe musi vhe Shilo, vho no ḽa vho no nwa, Hanna a takuwa a ima. Zwino tshifhe Eli o vha o dzula vhudzuloni hawe tsini ha muhangammbwa wa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel1:10 Hanna a lila nga maanḓa nge mbilu yawe ya vha yo dinalea, a rabela Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel1:11 A fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, arali wa sedza vhuṱungu hanga, wa nnyelelwa, wa si nkhangwe, wa mpha ṅwana wa mutuka, ndi ḓo mu kumedza Iwe Muṋe washu maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hawe, nahone a nga si vhuye a vheulwa mavhudzi.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Musi a tshi khou ḓi rabela Muṋe washu, Eli a sedza mulomo wawe." 
1Samuel1:13 Hanna o vha a tshi khou rabela nga mbilu, milomo yawe i tshi sokou dzinginyea, hone ipfi ḽawe ḽi sa pfali. Eli a fhima uri o kambiwa," 
1Samuel1:14 a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi u kambwa-ḓe honoho? Thomani u kambuluwa!”" 
1Samuel1:15 Huno Hanna a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa muṋe wanga, a tho ngo kambiwa. Nṋe ndi musadzi o dinaleaho zwihulu. A tho ngo nwa waini kana halwa, ndo vha ndi tshi khou tou tevhulela Muṋe washu zwa mbiluni yanga." 
1Samuel1:16 Vha songo ri ndi musadzi muvhi, ndo vha ndi tshi khou rabela ngauri mbilu yanga yo lemelwa, ndo ṱungufhala zwihulu.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Eli a fhindula a ri, “Tshimbilani nó rudza mbilu, ngavhe Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi ni ṋea zwe na mu humbela.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hanna a ri, “Ngavhe zwine vha amba zwi tshi itea kha nṋe.” Ndi hone Hanna a tshi ḓiṱutshela, a ita na u ḽa zwiḽiwa, tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsho no takala." 
1Samuel1:19 Nga matshelo vha fhinduwa vha yo luvha Muṋe washu, vha konou humela Rama hayani havho. Elikana a dzhenisa Hanna musadzi wawe nḓuni, Muṋe washu a mbo ṋea Hanna zwe a humbela," 
1Samuel1:20 ṅwaha u tshi fhela a vha o no vhifha muvhilini; a beba ṅwana wa mutuka. Hanna a ri u pfi Samuele, nge a ri, “Ndi nge nda mu humbela kha Muṋe washu.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Ha dovha ha swika tshifhinga tsha uri Elikana na muṱa wawe vha gonye Shilo u ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho ya ṅwaha nga ṅwaha na u khunyeledza zwe a fulufhedzisa. 
1Samuel1:22 Huno itsho tshifhinga Hanna o sala hayani. O vhudza munna wawe a ri, “Musi mutukana uyu o no thanya, ndi ḓo mu dzhia nda yo mu kumedza Muṋe washu, a dzula thembeleni tshoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elikana munna wawe a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi zwone, itani zwine na vhona zwi zwavhuḓi. Dzulani fhano hayani a vhuya a thanya. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ita uri zwe a fulufhedzisa zwi itee.” Ndi hone Hanna a tshi dzula hayani a lela ṅwana wawe a vhuya a mu litshisa ḓamu." 
1Samuel1:24 Musi Hanna o no litshisa Samuele ḓamu, a mu dzhia a mu isa Shilo, a ṱuwa na mboho ya miṅwaha miraru na khilogiramu dza fumi dza vhukhopfu na gumbu ḽa mukumba ḽo ḓala waini. A dzhia Samuele zwenezwo a tshee muṱuku, a mu isa Shilo nḓuni ya Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel1:25 Musi vho no ṱhavha iyo mboho, vha dzhia ṅwana vha mu isa ha Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Hanna a vhudza Eli a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha kha ḓi nnyelelwa? Vhukuma ndi nṋe uḽa musadzi we a vha o ima hafha tsini havho a tshi khou rabela Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel1:27 Ndo vha ndi tshi khou humbela hoyu ṅwana nga thabelo, zwino Muṋe washu o mpha tshe nda mu humbela." 
1Samuel1:28 Zwino-ha, ndi mu kumedza Muṋe washu. U ḓo vha wa Muṋe washu vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe.” Ndi hone vha tshi luvha Muṋe washu henefho." 
1Samuel2:1 Ndi hone Hanna a tshi rabela a ri, “Ndi pembelela Muṋe washu; Muṋe washu o nnyombela shambo! Maswina anga ndi a vha sea. Ndi takalela zwe Iwe Muṋe washu wa mpha." 
1Samuel2:2 Muṋe washu ndi Ene mukhethwa e eṱhe, a hu na Mudzimu arali e si Iwe, a hu na bako ḽi no nga Mudzimu washu." 
1Samuel2:3 “Ni songo dzula ni tshi zuwa, ni songo bula maipfi a u ḓihudza, Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu ane a ḓivha zwoṱhe, zwine vhathu vha ita zwi kalwa nga Ene." 
1Samuel2:4 “Vhura ha vhahali ho vunḓea, hone vhe vha khukhulwa vho kungela nungo." 
1Samuel2:5 Vhe vha vha vha tshi ḽa vha fura, zwino ndi vhasingili vha u ṱoḓa zwiḽiwa; vhe vha vha vha tshi ṱwa na nḓala vha vho ḽa vha laṱa. Musadzi we a vha e muumba zwino o beba vhana vhaṱanu na vhavhili, hone mme a vhana vhanzhi o sala a si na ṅwana." 
1Samuel2:6 “Muṋe washu u a vhulaha, a dovha a tshidza, u isa vhathu vhudzulavhafu, a dovha a vha vusa." 
1Samuel2:7 Muṋe washu u a shaisa, a dovha a pfumisa, u a ṱukufhadza, a dovha a hulisa." 
1Samuel2:8 U vusa vhashai buseni, vhaheḓana a vha takula ḓaleḓaleni, a vha dzudza na vhavhusi, a vha vhea kha khuluṋoni ya khuliso. Miteo ya ḽifhasi ndi ya Muṋe washu, o tea shango khayo." 
1Samuel2:9 “U linda ṋayo dza vhathu vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho, hone vhavhi vha ngalangala swiswini. Muthu ha kundi nga nungo dzawe nandi." 
1Samuel2:10 Vhane vha vhangisa Muṋe washu vha ḓo lozwiwa, u ḓo vha bvumela e ngindii, ngindii e ṱaḓulu. Muṋe washu u ḓo haṱula shango ḽoṱhe, khosi ye a vhea u ḓo i ombela shambo, khosi ye a i ta u ḓo ita uri i kunde.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Ndi hone Elikana a tshi humela hayani Rama, hone mutukana Samuele a dzula Shilo, a shumela Muṋe washu a tshi londolwa nga tshifhe Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 Vhana vha Eli vho vha vha sa ḓivhalekani, Muṋe washu vho vha vha sa mu londi." 
1Samuel2:13 Zwino yo vha i nḓowelo ya vhotshifhe na vhathu uri musi muthu a tshi khou ṋekedza nduvho, musi ṋama i tshi khou bikwa, mushumi wa tshifhe o vha a tshi ḓa o fara forogo ya maṋo mararu," 
1Samuel2:14 a longa iyo forogo khalini dza u bika, tshe forogo iyo ya tshi ṱhavha tsha mbo vha tsha tshifhe. Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha ḓa Shilo u ṋekedza nduvho dzavho vho vha vha tshi itwa nga u ralo." 
1Samuel2:15 Hone zwino na musi mapfura a sa athu fhiswa, mushumi wa tshifhe o vha a tshi ḓa a vhudza munna ane a khou ṋekedza nduvho a ri, “Nga vha fhe tshifhe ṋama ya u gotsha, a nga si ṱanganedze ṋama yo no bikwaho, u ṱoḓa mbisi fhedzi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Arali munna uyo a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga hu thome u fhiswa mapfura, ni konou dzhia zwine na funa,” mushumi uyo o vha a tshi fhindula a ri, “Hai, kha vha ḓise zwino, arali vha sa i ḓisa, ndi ḓo i dzhia nga khani!”" 
1Samuel2:17 Tshivhi hetsho tsha avho vhaṱhannga Muṋe washu o vha a tshi vhona tshi tshihulu, ngauri vho vha vha tshi nyadza nduvho ine ya ṋekedzwa Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel2:18 Huno Samuele ene o vha a tshi shumela Muṋe washu. Samuele a tshi kha ḓi vha mutukana o vha a tshi vho ambara luvhemba lwa lukhaha lwa u pakata lu no nga lwa vhotshifhe. 
1Samuel2:19 Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe mme awe vho vha vha tshi ḓi mu rungela phuraphura ya lukhaha vha mu isela musi vha tshi gonya Shilo na munna wavho u ṋekedza nduvho ya ṅwaha nga ṅwaha. 
1Samuel2:20 Eli o vha a tshi ḓi shudufhadza Elikana na musadzi wawe a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni ṋea vhana vhane vha ḓo bebwa nga hoyu musadzi, vha thivha uḽa we a mu humbela nga thabelo a mu kumedza Muṋe washu.” Vho no fhedza izwo vha humela hayani." 
1Samuel2:21 Muṋe washu a tonda Hanna, a vhifha muvhilini, a dovha a beba vhatuka vhararu na vhasidzana vhavhili. Mutukana Samuele a aluwa a tshi shumela Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel2:22 Zwino Eli o vha o no kalaha zwihulu. A ḓi dzula a tshi pfa zwine vhana vhawe vha ita Vhaisraele vhoṱhe na uri vha dzhia vhasadzi vhane vha shuma muṋangoni wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu vha vha dzhenisa nḓuni. 
1Samuel2:23 Ndi hone a tshi vha vhudza a ri, “Izwi zwithu ni zwi itelani? Vhathu vhoṱhe vha mmbudza vhuvhi vhune na ita." 
1Samuel2:24 A si zwone vhananga, ni vho xedza vhathu vha Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel2:25 Arali munna a khakhela muṅwe munna, Mudzimu a nga mu pfumedzanya nae, hone arali munna a khakhela Muṋe washu u ḓo pfumelelwa nga nnyi?” Huno vha si thetshelese khotsi avho a tshi vha kaidza, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha a tshi funa u vha vhulaha." 
1Samuel2:26 Mutukana Samuele ene a aluwa a tshi takalelwa nga Muṋe washu na nga vhathu. 
1Samuel2:27 Zwino muṅwe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a ḓa ha Eli a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndo ḓidzumbulula zwavhuḓi kha nnḓu ya makhulukuku wau zwiḽa vhe phuli dza Farao ngei Egipita." 
1Samuel2:28 Ndo nanga makhulukuku wau kha matsinde oṱhe a Israele uri a vhe tshifhe wanga, a gonye aḽiṱarini yanga a fhise zwioro, a ambare luvhemba lwa u pakata phanḓa hanga. Nda ita na u ṋea nnḓu ya makhulukuku wau mukovhe wa nduvho dzoṱhe dza mbeu dza Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel2:29 Zwino ndi mini u tshi nyadza zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho zwine nda ri vhathu vhanga vha bvise? Ndi mini u tshi hulisa vhana vhau u fhira Nṋe nga u vha litsha vha tshi ḓinonisa nga miraḓo i fhiraho yoṱhe ya nduvho dzoṱhe dzine dza ṋekedzwa nga vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele?’ 
1Samuel2:30 “Zwino-ha, Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u khou ḓivhadza u ri, ‘Ndo fulufhedzisa uri nnḓu yau na ya makhulukuku wau vha ḓo dzula vha tshi ntshumela lini na lini.’ Hone zwino Muṋe washu u khou ḓivhadza u ri, ‘A zwi tsha ḓo ralo! Vhane vha nkhulisa ndi ḓo vha hulisa, hone vhane vha nnyadza vha ḓo nyadziwa-vho." 
1Samuel2:31 Hu khou ḓa tshifhinga tshine nda ḓo fhelisa vhutshifhe hau na ha muṱa wau, a hu na wa muṱa wau ane a ḓo lalama." 
1Samuel2:32 U ḓo vhona khombo i tshi wela nnḓu yanga. Naho Vhaisraele vha tshi ḓo tondiwa, kha vha lutsinga lwau a hu na ane a ḓo lalama." 
1Samuel2:33 Vha lutsinga lwau vhoṱhe vha ḓo fa vha songo lalama. Onoyo muthihi ane nda ḓo mu litsha zwawe a tshila a ntshumela e tshifhe, ndi ḓo zwi itela u pofulisa maṱo au nga miṱodzi na u ṱhavha mbilu yau." 
1Samuel2:34 Zwine zwa ḓo wela vhana vhau vhavhili Hofuni na Finiasi tshi ḓo tou vha tshiga tsha uri u zwi vhone; vhuvhili havho vha ḓo fa musi muthihi. 
1Samuel2:35 Ndi ḓo ḓinangela tshifhe muṅwe ane a ḓo fulufhedzea, onoyo u ḓo ita zwine nda zwi funa. Ndi ḓo mu ṋea vhaḓuhulu vhanzhi, a dzula a tshi shumela khosi yanga ye nda i nanga." 
1Samuel2:36 Ndi hone muṅwe na muṅwe wa lutsinga lwau o ponyokaho lufu a tshi ḓo ḓa a gwadama phanḓa ha tshifhe onoyo a humbela ḽingwende ḽa siliva na zwiḽiwanyana a luvhelela a ri: A thi tholiwi-vho zwanga nda shumela vhotshifhe ndi tshi wana zwiḽiwa!’ ” 
1Samuel3:1 Mutukana Samuele o shumela Muṋe washu a tshi londolwa nga Eli. Misi iyo ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo vha ḽi sa anzeli u pfala, na mabono o vha a si manzhi." 
1Samuel3:2 Maṱo a Eli o vha a sa tsha vhona zwavhuḓi. Muṅwe musi nga maḓautsha Eli a vha o ḓilalela vhulaloni hawe. 
1Samuel3:3 Luvhone lwa Mudzimu lwo vha lu sa athu dzima. Samuele ene o vha o eḓela thembeleni ya Muṋe washu he ha vha hu na mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu. 
1Samuel3:4 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi vhidza Samuele. Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano!”" 
1Samuel3:5 Samuele a gidimela ha Eli a ri, “Ndi fhano, ndo pfa vha tshi mmbidza.” Huno Eli a ri, “A tho ngo ni vhidza, humani ni yo eḓela.” Samuele a huma a yo eḓela." 
1Samuel3:6 Muṋe washu a dovha a vhidza Samuele, a vuwa a ya ha Eli a ri, “Ndi fhano, ndo pfa vha tshi mmbidza.” Huno Eli a ri, “Ṅwananga, a tho ngo ni vhidza, humani ni yo eḓela.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Huno Samuele o vha a sa athu ḓivha Muṋe washu, o vha a sa athu dzumbululelwa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel3:8 Muṋe washu a vhidza Samuele lwa vhuraru, Samuele a vuwa a ya ha Eli a ri, “Ndi fhano, ndo pfa vha tshi mmbidza.” Ndi hone Eli a tshi ṱalukanya uri ndi Muṋe washu a khou vhidzaho Samuele." 
1Samuel3:9 A mu vhudza a ri, “Ṱuwani ni yo eḓela, arali na pfa a tshi dovha u ni vhidza, ni fhindule ni ri, ‘Muṋe washu, amba, muḓinḓa wau u khou thetshelesa!’ ” Samuele a ṱuwa a yo lala vhulaloni hawe." 
1Samuel3:10 Muṋe washu a ḓa a ima henefho, a vhidzelela u ḓi nga zwiḽa u rangani a ri, “Samuele, Samuele!” Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu amba, muḓinḓa wau u khou thetshelesa!”" 
1Samuel3:11 Muṋe washu a amba na Samuele a ri, “Ndi ṱoḓa u ita tshiṅwe tshithu kha ḽa Israele, tshi ḓo ita uri nḓevhe dza muṅwe na muṅwe ane a zwi pfa dzi lume." 
1Samuel3:12 Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe nda vhudza Eli ndi tshi sanda muṱa wawe, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni." 
1Samuel3:13 Ndo no ḓi mu vhudza uri ndi ḓo rwa muṱa wawe lini na lini nga mulandu wa vhuvhi he a vha a tshi vhu ḓivha, vhana vhawe vho nnyefula a si vha kaidze." 
1Samuel3:14 Ndi zwe nda anela nnḓu ya Eli nda ri, ‘Mulandu wa nnḓu ya Eli u nga si pfumelwe nga tshiṱhavhelo kana nga nduvho.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samuele a yo eḓela ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha a konou vula miṋango ya nnḓu ya Muṋe washu. O vha a tshi ofha u vhudza Eli zwa bono ḽawe. 
1Samuel3:16 Huno Eli a mu vhidza a ri, “Samuele ṅwananga.” Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe washu o ni vhudzani? Ni songo nnzumbela. Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi ni pfisa vhuṱungu a dovha arali na nnzumbela na tshithihi tsha zwe a ni vhudza.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi mu vhudza zwoṱhe, a si vhuye a mu dzumbela na tshithihi. Eli a ri, “Ndi Muṋe washu, litshani a ite zwine a vhona zwi zwone.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Muṋe washu o ḓi vha na Samuele musi a tshi aluwa, ho ngo vhuya a litsha ipfi ḽawe na ḽithihi ḽi tshi wela fhasi." 
1Samuel3:20 Ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele u bva Dani u swika Bierisheba ḽa zwi vhona uri vhukumakuma Samuele ndi muporofita wa Muṋe washu. 
1Samuel3:21 Muṋe washu a ḓi vhonala Shilo, a ḓidzumbululela Samuele henefho nga ipfi ḽawe." 
1Samuel4:1 Ipfi ḽa Samuele ḽa pfiwa nga Vhaisraele vhoṱhe. Muṅwe musi Vhaisraele vha bva pfumo vha yo lwa na Vhafilista. Vhaisraele vha ṱoka mishasha Ebenezere, Vhafilista vha ṱoka yavho Afeke." 
1Samuel4:2 Vhafilista vha bvisa mmbi yavho u yo ṱangana na Vhaisraele, govholano ḽa phaḓalala, Vhaisraele vha kundwa nga Vhafilista, ha vhulawa Vhaisraele vhane vha nga swika 4 000 henefho nndwani." 
1Samuel4:3 Musi vhanna vha tshi humela mishashani, vhahulwane vha Israele vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi mini Muṋe washu o ita uri ri kundwe nga Vhafilista ṋamusi? Nga ri yo hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu i re Shilo ri i ḓise fhano i tshimbile na riṋe, i ri lamulele kha maswina ashu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ruma vhanna Shilo, vha vhuya na mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, we a dzula kha khuluṋoni vhukati ha vhakherube vhavhili. Vhana vha Eli vhavhili, Hofuni na Finiasi, vho vha vhe henefho vhe na mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu." 
1Samuel4:5 Musi mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu i tshi dzhena mishashani, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ṱavha mukosi mavu a tou dzinginyea." 
1Samuel4:6 Vhafilista vha tshi pfa uyo mukosi vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Mukosi uyo u re mishashani ya Vhaheberu ndi wa mini?” Musi vha tshi pfa uri mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu yo dzhena mishashani," 
1Samuel4:7 vha farwa nga nyofho vha ri, “Mudzimu wo dzhena mishashani. Zwo ri vhifhela! Zwa u rali a zwi athu vhuya zwa itea." 
1Samuel4:8 Ro welwa nga khombo! Ndi nnyi ane a ḓo ri lamulela zwanḓani zwa midzimu iyo ya maanḓa? Ndi vhaḽa vhadzimu vhe vha vhulaha Vhaegipita nga madwadze a sa konadzei ngei phangani. 
1Samuel4:9 Vhafilista, imani ni khwaṱhe! Ivhani vhanna ni sa ḓo vha phuli dza Vhaheberu unga vhone vho vha vhe phuli dzaṋu. Ivhani vhanna ni lwe!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Ndi hone Vhafilista vha tshi lwa, Vhaisraele vha kundwa, muṅwe na muṅwe a shavhela hayani. Ha vhulawa vhanzhi, ha vhulawa vhanna vha Israele vha 30 000 vha no lwa vhá songo namela bere." 
1Samuel4:11 Ha thubiwa na mbulungelo ya Mudzimu; vhana vha Eli vhavhili, Hofuni na Finiasi, na vhone vha vhulawa." 
1Samuel4:12 Musi wonoyo ha ḓa munna a no bva kha tsinde ḽa Benyamini, a gidima a tshi bva nndwani a ya Shilo; zwiambaro zwawe zwo vha zwo kherukana, ó ḓishela mavu ṱhohoni." 
1Samuel4:13 Musi a tshi swika a wana Eli o dzula kha tshidzulo tshawe tsini ha gondo ó lindela, ngauri o vha o dinalea nga mbulungelo ya Mudzimu. Uyo munna a tshi dzhena afho muḓini, a ḓivhadza zwe zwa itea, muḓi woṱhe wa vusa tshililo." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli a tshi pfa tshililo a vhudzisa a ri, “Tshililo itshi ndi tsha mini?” Uḽa munna a gidimela ha Eli u mu vhudza zwo iteaho." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli o vha o no vha na miṅwaha ya 98 nahone o pofula tshoṱhe. 
1Samuel4:16 Uḽa munna a vhudza Eli a ri, “Ndi kha ḓi bva u swika, ndi bva tshivhindini tsha nndwa, ndo shavha hone ṋamusi ḽino.” Eli a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ho iteani ṅwananga?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Uḽa muḓinḓa a fhindula a ri, “Vhaisraele vho pandamedzwa nga Vhafilista, ho tshinyala vhanzhi, na vhana vhavho vhavhili Hofuni na Finiasi vho vhulawa, na mbulungelo ya Mudzimu yo thubiwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Uyo munna a ri u bula mbulungelo ya Mudzimu, Eli a mbo wa nga tshitiko e tshidzuloni tshawe tsini ha khoro. A vunḓea mutsinga a fa, ngauri o vha o kalaha nahone e na muvhili. O vha e murangaphanḓa wa Israele miṅwaha ya 40." 
1Samuel4:19 Musadzi wa Finiasi ṅwana wa Eli o vha a songo takala muvhili, e tsini na u vhofholowa. Musi a tshi pfa mafhungo a u ri mbulungelo ya Mudzimu yo thubiwa na uri khotsi a munna wawe na munna wawe vho fa, a farwa nga maṱungu a vhudzadze a mbo ḓi vhofholowa, a ṋoka." 
1Samuel4:20 Musi a tshi khou fa, vhasadzi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou mu bebisa vha ri, “Ni songo ṱovhowa, no beba mutuka.” Hone ene ho ngo vhuya a fhindula kana a zwi londa." 
1Samuel4:21 21 Mutukana uyo a ri u pfi Ikhabodo (Vhugala-vhu-ngafhi?), a ri, “Vhugala ha Mudzimu ho pfuluwa Israele,” ngauri ho thubiwa mbulungelo ya Mudzimu, ha fa khotsi a munna wawe na munna wawe." 
1Samuel4:22 Ndi zwe a ri, “Vhugala ha Mudzimu ho pfuluwa Israele, ngauri mbulungelo ya Mudzimu yo thubiwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Musi Vhafilista vho no thuba mbulungelo ya Mudzimu Ebenezere, vha i hwala vha i isa Ashidodo," 
1Samuel5:2 vha i dzhenisa thembeleni ya mudzimu wavho Dagoni vha i vhea tsini ha Dagoni. 
1Samuel5:3 Musi vhathu vha Ashidodo vha tshi fhinduwa nga matshelo, vha vhona Dagoni wo wela fhasi nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu! Vha dzhia Dagoni vha u vhuedzedza vhudzuloni hawo." 
1Samuel5:4 Hone nga matshelo vha tshi vuwa vha vhona Dagoni wo wela fhasi nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu! Wo vha wo vunḓea ṱhoho na zwanḓa zwa wela tshiukhuvhani, ha sala mutumbu wawo fhedzi." 
1Samuel5:5 Ndi zwine na ṋamusi vhotshifhe vha Dagoni na vhaṅwe-vho vhane vha dzhena thembeleni ya Dagoni vha sa kande tshiukhuvha. 
1Samuel5:6 Tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsha ziamedza vhathu vha Ashidodo na vha shango ḽeneḽo, a vha ofhisa, a ita uri vha vhe na zwitshimbili marahoni." 
1Samuel5:7 Musi vhanna vha Ashidodo vha tshi vhona zwine zwa khou itea, vha ri, “Mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Vhaisraele i songo tsha dzula fhano na riṋe ngauri tshanḓa tshawe tsho tsikeledza riṋe na mudzimu washu Dagoni.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Ndi hone vha tshi vhidza vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha Vhafilista vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ri iteni nga mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele?” Vhavhusi vha fhindula vha ri, “Ṱuwisani mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele ni i ise Gathi.” Ndi hone vha tshi hwala mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele vha i isa Gathi." 
1Samuel5:9 Huno musi vho no i sudzulusa, tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsha rwa vhathu vha muḓi uyo vha hanganea. Muṋe washu a ḓisela vhathu vha Gathi khombo, vhoṱhe vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vha vha na zwitshimbili marahoni." 
1Samuel5:10 Ndi hone vha tshi hwala mbulungelo ya Mudzimu vha i isa muḓini wa Ekroni. Mbulungelo ya Mudzimu ya ri u dzhena Ekroni, vhathu vha Ekroni vha mbo ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Vho ḓisa mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele kha riṋe uri vha ri vhulahe na vhathu vha hashu.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ndi hone vha tshi kuvhanganya vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha Vhafilista vha ri, “Ṱuwisani mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele, nga i humele fhethu hayo, i sa ḓo vhulaha riṋe na vha hashu.” Lufu lwo vha lwo ṱanganya muḓi uyo vhathu vha tou hanganea, tshanḓa tsha Mudzimu tsho vha tsho u tsikeledza." 
1Samuel5:12 Vhe vha sala u fa vha vha na zwitshimbili marahoni, vhathu vha muḓi vha ṱavhela midzimu yavho mukosi uri i vha farise." 
1Samuel6:1 Mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu yo dzula shangoni ḽa Vhafilista ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwedzi miṱanu na mivhili," 
1Samuel6:2 Vhafilista vha vhidza vhotshifhe vhavho na mingome yavho vha ri, “Ri ḓo itani nga mbulungelo ya Yahavee? Ri vhudzeni uri ri ḓo i vhuedzedza hani fhethu hayo.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Arali na humisa mbulungelo ya Mudzimu wa Israele, ni songo i vhuedzedza i si na tshithu, lingani nga nungo dzoṱhe u mu rumela tshipfumelo. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fhola, na ḓo kona u ḓivha uri ndi mini tshanḓa tshawe tshi songo litsha u ni tsikeledza.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Vhafilista vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ri ḓo mu rumela tshipfumelo-ḓe?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Zwifanyiso zwiṱanu zwa zwitshimbili zwo vhumbwaho nga musuku, na mbevha ṱhanu dza musuku, zwi tshi ya nga tshivhalo tsha vhavhusi vha Vhafilista, ngauri dwadze ḽeneḽo ḽo wela noṱhe inwi na vhavhusi vhaṋu." 
1Samuel6:5 Vhumbani zwifanyiso zwa zwitshimbili na zwa mbevha dze dza tshinyekanya shango ḽashu, ni hulise Mudzimu wa Israele. Khamusi u ḓo sudzulusa tshanḓa tshawe kha inwi na kha midzimu yaṋu na shango ḽaṋu." 
1Samuel6:6 Ni kha ḓi itelani tshipimbi unga Vhaegipita na Farao? Musi a tshi vha sumbedza maanḓa awe, a vho ngo vhofholola Vhaisraele uri vha pfuluwe naa?" 
1Samuel6:7 “Zwino-ha, itani goloi ntswa, na kholomo mbili dza nzadze, dzi sa athu vhewa dzhogo. Kholomo idzo ni dzi pane kha iyo goloi, hone ṋamana dzadzo ni dzi swoge dzi dzhene dangani." 
1Samuel6:8 Ni dzhie mbulungelo ya Yahavee ni i longe ngomu goloini, bogisini ḽi re tsini hayo ni longe izwo zwithu zwa musuku zwine na zwi isa khae uri tshi vhe tshipfumelo. Goloi iyo nga i takuwe," 
1Samuel6:9 hone ni ḓi ita ni tshi i sedza. Arali ya gonya shangoni ḽayo, yo livha Bethe Shemeshe, ri ḓo ḓivha uri Yahavee ndi Ene o ri ḓiselaho khombo hei khulu. Hone arali ya sa livha hone ri ḓo ḓivha uri izwo a si tshanḓa tsha Yahavee tshe tsha ri rwa, zwo sokou itea-vho.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Ndi hone Vhafilista vha tshi ita zwenezwo zwe vha eletshedzwa. Vha dzhia kholomo mbili dza tsadzi dzo raloho, vha dzi pana kha goloi, ṋamana dzadzo vha dzi khadela dangani." 
1Samuel6:11 Vha vhea mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu kha goloi, tsini hayo vha vhea bogisi ḽi re na mbevha dza musuku na zwitshimbili zwo vhumbwaho." 
1Samuel6:12 Ndi hone idzo kholomo dzi tshi gonya dzo livha Bethe Shemeshe, dzi sa bvi gondoni, dzi tshi khou tshimbila dzi tshi lila, dzi sa vhuyi dza pambutshela tshauḽa kana tshamonde. Vhavhusi vha Vhafilista vha dzi tevhela vha vhuya vha swika masakhani a Bethe Shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:13 Zwino vhathu vha Bethe Shemeshe vho vha vha tshi khou kaṋa goroi yavho govhani. Vha tshi takusa maṱo vha vhona mbulungelo, vha takala vha tshi zwi vhona." 
1Samuel6:14 Goloi ya swika tsimuni ya Joshua wa Bethe Shemeshe, ya ima henefho tsini ha tombo ḽihulu. Vhathu vha fhanza matanda a goloi, vha ṱhavha idzo kholomo, vha dzi ṋekedza Muṋe washu tsha vha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho." 
1Samuel6:14 Goloi ya swika tsimuni ya Joshua wa Bethe Shemeshe, ya ima henefho tsini ha tombo ḽihulu. Vhathu vha fhanza matanda a goloi, vha ṱhavha idzo kholomo, vha dzi ṋekedza Muṋe washu tsha vha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho." 
1Samuel6:15 Vhalivi vha tsisa mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu, khathihi na bogisi ḽi re na zwithu zwa musuku, vha zwi vhea nṱha ha iḽo tombo ḽihulu. Musi wonoyo vhathu vha Bethe Shemeshe vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho dzo fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo." 
1Samuel6:16 Vhavhusi vhaṱanu vha Vhafilista vho vha vha tshi khou zwi vhona zwoṱhe hezwo, vha konou humela Ekroni wonoyo musi." 
1Samuel6:17 Vhafilista vha tshi ṋea Muṋe washu tshifhiwa tsha zwitshimbili zwiṱanu zwa musuku tsho vha tshipfumelo, vha Ashidodo na vha Gaza na vha Ashkeloni na vha Gathi na vha Ekroni, vhoṱhe vho bvisa tshithihi." 
1Samuel6:18 Vha ita na u isa mbevha dza musuku, muṅwe na muṅwe wa miḓi heyo ine ya vhuswa nga mahosi maṱanu a Vhafilista wa bvisa mbevha nthihi, vhoṱhe vha miḓi yo tangeledzwaho nga mitsheṱo na i songo tangeledzwaho. Tombo ḽihulu ḽe vha vhea mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu khaḽo ḽi kha ḓi vha ṱhanzi na ṋamusi henengei tsimuni ya Joshua wa Bethe Shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:18 Vha ita na u isa mbevha dza musuku, muṅwe na muṅwe wa miḓi heyo ine ya vhuswa nga mahosi maṱanu a Vhafilista wa bvisa mbevha nthihi, vhoṱhe vha miḓi yo tangeledzwaho nga mitsheṱo na i songo tangeledzwaho. Tombo ḽihulu ḽe vha vhea mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu khaḽo ḽi kha ḓi vha ṱhanzi na ṋamusi henengei tsimuni ya Joshua wa Bethe Shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:19 Huno Mudzimu a vhulaha vhanna vha 70 vha Bethe Shemeshe nge vha ṱolela ngomu ha mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu. Vhathu vha lila nge Muṋe washu a vha rwa zwingafho. 
1Samuel6:20 Vhanna vha Bethe Shemeshe vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi nnyi ane a nga ima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, hoyu Mudzimu mukhethwa? Mbulungelo i songo dzula fhano, hone i tshi ṱuwa i ḓo ya ha nnyi?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Vha ruma vhaḓinḓa ha vhathu vha Kiriathi Jiarimu vha swika vha ri, “Vhafilista vho vhuisa mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu. Iḓani ni i dzhie ni gonye nayo ha haṋu.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Ndi hone vhanna vha Kiriathi Jiarimu vha tshi ḓa vha dzhia mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu. Vha i dzhia vha i isa nḓuni ya Abinadaba we a vha a tshi dzula mabamani. Vha dzhia ṅwana wawe Eliasara vha mu kumedza Mudzimu uri a londole mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu. 
1Samuel7:2 Mbulungelo ya dzula Kiriathi Jiarimu tshifhinga tshilapfu, ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 20. Tshifhinga tshenetsho Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha lilela Muṋe washu uri a vha lamulele." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuele a amba na Vhaisraele a ri, “Arali ni tshi vhuelela ha Muṋe washu nga mbilu dzaṋu dzoṱhe, laṱani midzimu yaṋu isili, na zwifanyiso zwa mudzimu wa musadzi Ashtharotho. Ḓikumedzeni Muṋe washu tshoṱhe ni luvhe Ene fhedzi, ndi hone a tshi ḓo ni lamukisa zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Nangoho Vhaisraele vha laṱa zwifanyiso zwavho zwa Baali na Ashtharotho, vha luvha Muṋe washu fhedzi." 
1Samuel7:5 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi ri, “Vhaisraele vhoṱhe nga vha kuvhangane Mitsipha, nṋe ndi ḓo ni rabelela ha Muṋe washu.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Vha mbo kuvhangana Mitsipha, vha ka maḓi, vha a shulula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Musi wonoyo vha ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, vha bula vhuvhi havho vha ri, “Ro khakhela Muṋe washu.” Henefho Mitsipha Samuele a laya Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel7:7 Musi Vhafilista vha tshi zwi pfa uri Vhaisraele vho kuvhangana Mitsipha, mahosi a Vhafilista vha ḓa uri vha lwe navho. Vhaisraele vha zwi pfa, vha farwa nga nyofho vha tshi ofha Vhafilista." 
1Samuel7:8 Vha vhudza Samuele vha ri, “Vha songo litsha u ri ambela ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu, uri a ri lamukise zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi dzhia ngwana ine ya kha ḓi mama, a i ṋekedza Muṋe washu ya vha tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshoṱhe. Samuele a ambela Vhaisraele ha Muṋe washu nga thabelo uri a vha lamukise, Muṋe washu a pfa thabelo yawe." 
1Samuel7:10 Hezwi Samuele a tshi kha ḓi ṋekedza itsho tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, Vhafilista vha sendela uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele. Huno musi hoyo Muṋe washu a bvumela Vhafilista nga mubvumo muhulu, a ita uri vha hanganee, vha mbo kundwa nga Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel7:11 Vhanna vha Israele vha bva Mitsipha, vha pandamedza Vhafilista, vha enda vha tshi vha vhulaha nḓilani, vha vha swikisa Bethe Khara." 
1Samuel7:12 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi dzhia tombo a ḽi imisa vhukati ha Mitsipha na Shene. Afho fhethu a ri hu pfi Ebene Haezere a tshi ri, “Muṋe washu o ḓi ri farisa u vhuya u swika zwino.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Ha vha hone u kundwa ha Vhafilista, vha si tsha dovha vha dia shango ḽa Israele. Muṋe washu o vha a tshi ḓi lwa na Vhafilista misi yoṱhe Samuele a tshee hone." 
1Samuel7:14 Miḓi yoṱhe ye Vhafilista vha vha vho dzhiela Vhaisraele ya dovha ya dzhiululwa nga Vhaisraele, u bva Ekroni u swika Gathi. Vhaisraele vha dzhiulula shango ḽavho ḽoṱhe ḽe ḽa vha ḽo dzhiwa nga Vhafilista. Na Vhaamori vho vha vha si tsha lwa na Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuele a vha murangaphanḓa wa Israele misi yoṱhe ya vhutshilo hawe. 
1Samuel7:16 Ṅwaha nga ṅwaha o vha a tshi tendeleka na miḓi ya Bethele na Giligala na Mitsipha. Hoṱhe hafho fhethu o vha a tshi laya Vhaisraele. 
1Samuel7:17 Huno o no fhedza izwo a humela hayani hawe Rama, na henefho a laya Vhaisraele. Henefho Rama a fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari." 
1Samuel8:1 Musi Samuele o no kalaha, a vhea vhana vhawe uri vha vhe vharangaphanḓa vha Israele." 
1Samuel8:2 Tanzhe ḽawe o vha a tshi pfi Juele, wa vhuvhili a tshi pfi Abia, vhone vho vha vhe vharangaphanḓa muḓini wa Bierisheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Huno vhana vha Samuele a vho ngo kanda vhuṱalani hawe, vho ḓipfumisa nga u vhaisa vhaṅwe, vha ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni, vha tshinya khaṱhulo." 
1Samuel8:4 Ndi hone vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele vha tshi kuvhangana vha ya Rama ha Samuele. 
1Samuel8:5 Vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Nga vha vhone, vhone vho no kalaha, nahone vhana vhavho a vha kandi vhuṱalani havho. Zwino nga vha ri vhumbele khosi ine ya ḓo ri vhusa, u ḓi nga dziṅwe tshakha dzi nayo.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Huno Samuele zwa si mu takadze musi vha tshi ri, “Nga vha ri vhumbele khosi ine ya ḓo ri vhusa.” Ndi hone Samuele a tshi rabela Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel8:7 Muṋe washu a ri, “Thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwine vhathu vha u vhudza. Vhathu avha a vho ngo landula iwe, vho landula Nṋe uri ndi si vhe khosi yavho." 
1Samuel8:8 Vha khou u ita zwenezwo zwe vha ita Nṋe, tshee nda vha pfulusa Egipita u swika zwino, vho ḓi ntshandukela vha luvha miṅwe midzimu." 
1Samuel8:9 Zwino vha ṋee tshine vha ṱoḓa. Vha ṱalutshedze mafhungo haya zwavhuḓi, u vha vhudze zwine khosi ine ya ḓo vha vhusa ya ḓo ita.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Samuele o swikisa maipfi oṱhe a Muṋe washu kha vhathu vhe vha humbela khosi. 
1Samuel8:11 Samuele a ri, “Khosi ine ya ḓo ni vhusa i ḓo ita hezwi: U ḓo dzhia vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka a vha ita vhadziammbi, vhaṅwe a vha isa kha gariki dzawe dza nndwa, vhaṅwe vha fara bere dzawe, vhaṅwe vha gidima phanḓa ha gariki dzawe dza nndwa." 
1Samuel8:12 Vhaṅwe u ḓo vha ita vhalangammbi, vhaṅwe vhalangagomane, vhaṅwe vha mu limela masimu, vha kaṋa zwiliṅwa zwawe, vhaṅwe vha mu fulela zwihali zwa nndwa vha ita na thundu ya gariki dzawe dza nndwa." 
1Samuel8:13 Vhananyana vhaṋu u ḓo vha dzhia vha mu itela zwiḓolo zwi nukhelelaho, vha vha vhabiki vhawe na vhabagi vhawe." 
1Samuel8:14 U ḓo dzhia masimu aṋu avhuḓi a no fhira oṱhe na masimu a minḓirivhe na masimu a miolivi, a ṋea magota awe." 
1Samuel8:15 U ḓo ni dzhiela tshafumi tsha zwiliṅwa zwaṋu zwa thoro na tsha nḓirivhe dzaṋu a ṋea magota awe na vhalanda vhawe vha pfamoni. 
1Samuel8:16 Phuli dzaṋu dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi na vhaṱhanngana vhaṋu na kholomo dzaṋu dzi fhiraho dzoṱhe, na donngi, u ḓo dzhia zwa shumela ene." 
1Samuel8:17 U ḓo dzhia tshafumi tsha masambi aṋu a nngu, na inwi vhaṋe na vha phuli dzawe." 
1Samuel8:18 Musi wonoyo ni ḓo ṱavha mukosi na lila uri ni rulwe muhwalo we na hweswa nga khosi yeneyo ye na i nanga, hone Muṋe washu a nga si ni thetshelese.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Huno vhathu vha hana u thetshelesa Samuele vha ri, “Aiwa, ri ṱoḓa khosi ya u ri vhusa." 
1Samuel8:20 Ndi hone ri tshi ḓo nga dziṅwe tshakha, rí na khosi ine ya ri vhusa, a ri ranga phanḓa ri tshi bva pfumo, a ri lwela nndwani.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Samuele a thetshelesa maipfi oṱhe e vhathu vha amba, a ya a a vhudza Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel8:22 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Vha itele zwine vha zwi funa, u vha vhumbele khosi.” Ndi hone Samuele a tshi vhudza vhanna vha Israele a ri, “Zwino noṱhe ṱuwani ni ye hayani.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Ho vha hu na muṅwe Mubenyamini, munna wa mupfumi wa muḓivhalea we a vha a tshi pfi Kishi ṅwana wa Abiele, ṅwana wa Tseroro, ṅwana wa Bekhorathi, ṅwana wa Afia wa Benyamini." 
1Samuel9:2 Munna uyo o vha e na ṅwana wa mutuka a no pfi Saulo, wa lunako, wa nungo, hu si na ane a mu fhira kha Vhaisraele. Saulo o vha a tshi fhira vhoṱhe nga u lapfa, vhaṅwe vhathu vha tshi tou mu guma nga mutsinga." 
1Samuel9:3 Zwino donngi dza Kishi khotsi a Saulo dza xela, Kishi a vhudza ṅwana wawe Saulo a ri, “Ṱuwa na muṅwe wa phuli ni yo ṱoḓa donngi.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Ndi hone a tshi buḓekanya mivhundu ya Efraimi na shangoni ḽa Shalisha, hone vha si dzi wane. Vha fhirela phanḓa vha dzhena shangoni ḽa Shaalimu, hone donngi dzo vha dzi siho afho. Ndi hone vha tshi buḓekanya shango ḽa Benyamini, hone na henefho vha si dzi wane." 
1Samuel9:5 Musi vha tshi swika shangoni ḽa Tsufu Saulo a vhudza phuli ye ya vha i nae a ri, “Kha ri hume, khotsi anga vha sa vho ḓo litsha u elekanya zwa donngi vha vho ḽa mbilu nga riṋe.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Huno iyo phuli ya fhindula ya ri, “Muḓini uno hu na muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu. Munna uyo vhathu vha a mu hulisa. Zwoṱhe zwine a amba zwi a itea zwo tou ralo. Nga ri ye hone zwino. Khamusi a nga ri vhudza uri ri ṱutshele ngafhi.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo a vhudza phuli yawe a ri, “Arali ra ya ha uyo munna ri ḓo mu fha mini? Zwiḽiwa zwine zwa vha mikhwamani yashu zwo fhela. A ri na tshifhiwa tshine ra nga ṋea uyo muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu. Tshine ra vha natsho ndi mini?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Phuli ya dovha ya mu fhindula ya ri, “Nṋe ndi na ḽingwende ḽa siliva. Ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea uyo munna wa Mudzimu uri a ri vhudze nḓila ine ra fanela u i fara.” (" 
1Samuel9:9 Zwiḽa kale kha ḽa Israele arali muthu a tshi yo vhudzisa Mudzimu, o vha a tshi ri, “Nḓarieni ha muvhoni,” ngauri muporofita wa misi ino, kale o vha a tshi pfi muvhoni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo a vhudza phuli yawe a ri, “Ndi zwone, nḓarieni.” Ndi hone vha tshi livha muḓini he ha vha hu na uyo muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu." 
1Samuel9:11 Hezwi vha tshi khou gonya tshivhanga vho livha muḓi uyo, vha ṱangana na vhaṅwe vhasidzana vha tshi ya u ka maḓi, vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Muvhoni u hone naa?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Vhasidzana vha fhindula vha ri, “U hone, ngoyo henefho phanḓa haṋu. Ni ṱavhanye, o ḓa fhano muḓini wa hashu ṋamusi, ngauri vhathu vha khou ya u ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshikwarani." 
1Samuel9:13 Hezwi ni tshi tou dzhena muḓini, ni ḓo mu wana a sa athu gonya tshikwarani u yo ḽa. Vhathu vha nga si thome u ḽa a sa athu swika, ngauri ndi ene ane a fanela a shudufhadza tshiṱhavhelo, ndi hone vho vhidzwaho vha tshi ḓo kona u ḽa. Gonyani zwino, tshifhinga tshino ni nga mu wana.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ndi hone vha tshi gonya muḓini; vho no dzhena muḓini vha ṱangana na Samuele e nḓilani ya u ya tshikwarani. 
1Samuel9:15 Zwino Saulo a tshi ḓo vuwa a tshi ḓa, Muṋe washu izwo o vha o no dzumbululela Samuele a ri," 
1Samuel9:16 “Matshelo nga tshifhinga tshenetshi ndi ḓo ruma muṅwe munna ha iwe, u bva shangoni ḽa Benyamini. U mu ḓodze a vhe murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhanga vha Israele. Ene u ḓo lamulela vhathu vhanga kha Vhafilista. Ndo sedza u tambula ha vhathu vhanga, tshililo tshavho tsho swika kha Nṋe.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Samuele a vhona Saulo, Muṋe washu a mbo mu vhudza a ri, “Hoyo ndi ene munna we nda u vhudza ngae, ndi ene ane a ḓo linda vhathu vhanga.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Saulo a ṱangana na Samuele khoroni a mu vhudza a ri, “Ri khou vhudzisa hune ha dzula muvhoni.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe muvhoni, mphelekedzeni ri gonye tshikwarani, ngauri ṋamusi ri ḓo ḽa roṱhe, nga matsheloni ndi ḓo ni litsha na ḓiṱutshela, nahone ndi ḓo ni vhudza zwoṱhe zwi re mbiluni yaṋu." 
1Samuel9:20 Dza nga vha donngi dze na xedza mbamulovha, ni songo ḽa mbilu ngadzo, dzo wanala. Huno ndi nnyi ane a ṱulutshelwa nga Vhaisraele? A si inwi na muṱa wa khotsi aṋu naa?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi wa Benyamini, ndi wa tsinde ḽiṱukuṱuku kha Vhaisraele, muṱa wa hashu ndi wone muṱuku kha tsinde ḽa Benyamini! Zwino khezwi vha tshi amba na nṋe nga u ralo?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi isa Saulo na phuli yawe vhuḽeloni, a vha dzudza hu no dzula vhaḓivhalea. Ho vha ho kuvhangana vhane vha nga swika mahumi mararu a vhanna." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuele a vhudza mubiki a ri, “Ḓisani uḽa muraḓo wa ṋama ye nda ni ṋea, yeneiḽa ye nda ni vhudza uri ni i vhetshele thungo.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Mubiki a dzhia tshizwa a tshi vhea phanḓa ha Saulo. Samuele a ri, “Zwe na vha no vhetshelwa zwone ngezwi. Iḽani, tshee nda ri, ‘Ndo vhidza vhaeni,’ zwo vhetshelwa inwi uri ni zwi ḽe vhuṱamboni hovhuno.” Ndi hone Saulo a tshi swiṱula na Samuele." 
1Samuel9:25 Musi vho no tsela muḓini vha tshi bva tshikwarani, Samuele a amba na Saulo vhe ṱhangani ya nnḓu yawe." 
1Samuel9:26 Nga matshelo vha fhinduwa nga maḓautsha. Musi mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka, Samuele e ṱhangani ya nnḓu, a vhidza Saulo a ri, “Vuwani, ndi khou ṱoḓa u ni fhelekedza!” Saulo a vuwa, ene na Samuele vha bvela nnḓa vhoṱhe." 
1Samuel9:27 Vha tshi swika muledzoni wa muḓi, Samuele a amba na Saulo a ri, “Vhudza phuli yau i fhirele phanḓa.” Phuli ya fhirela phanḓa, Samuele a isa phanḓa a ri, “Inwi rangani u ima ndi ni vhudze zwe Mudzimu a amba.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi dzhia dzhomela ḽa mapfura a muolivi a a shela ṱhohoni ya Saulo, a mu kuvhatedza, a ri, “Mudzimu o ni ta uri ni vhe murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhawe." 
1Samuel10:2 Ni tshi ṱuwa fhano kha nṋe ṋamusi, ni ḓo ṱangana na vhanna vhavhili tsini ha tshalo tsha Rahele, ngei Tseletsa masakhani a ḽa Benyamini. Vha ḓo ni vhudza vha ri, ‘Donngi dze na bva ni tshi yo dzi ṱoḓa dzo wanala. Zwino khotsi aṋu a vha tsha vhuya vha dzi humbula, vha vho ḽa mbilu nga inwi, vha ḓi ṱolou gungula vha tshi ri: Zwino ṅwananga u ngafhi?’" 
1Samuel10:3 “U bva henefho ni ḓo tshimbila na swika murini muhulu wa Thaboro. Henefho ni ḓo ṱangana na vhanna vhararu vhane vha khou ya ha Mudzimu Bethele. Muṅwe u ḓo vha e na mbudzana tharu, muṅwe o hwala mikonde miraru ya vhurotho, muṅwe o hwala gumbu ḽa mukumba ḽa waini." 
1Samuel10:4 Vha ḓo ni resha vha ni ṋekedza mikonde mivhili ya vhurotho. Ni i ṱanganedze. 
1Samuel10:5 Ngavhuya ni ye muvhunduni wa Mudzimu u re Gibia hune ha vha na mishasha ya Vhafilista. Ni tshi dzhena muḓini ni ḓo ṱangana na vhaporofita vho rwa muduba vha tshi bva mivhunduni hu tshi khou lidzwa haripa na mirumba na zwiṱiringo na ngwala phanḓa havho, vhone vha tshi khou porofita." 
1Samuel10:6 Muya wa Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓa kha inwi e na maanḓa, na inwi na porofita navho, na shanduka na vha muṅwe muthu." 
1Samuel10:7 Musi zwiga izwo zwo no khunyelela, ni ite zwine na vhona zwi tshi ṱoḓea, ngauri Mudzimu u na inwi." 
1Samuel10:8 Tselani Giligala ni nthange phanḓa. Ndi ḓo ni tevhela nda ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhuthihi, hone ni nndindele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ndi vhuye ndi swike ha inwi ndi ni vhudze zwine na fanela u ita.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Saulo a ri u rembuluwa a tshi fhambana na Samuele, Mudzimu a mbo shandukisa mbilu ya Saulo, zwiga zwiḽa zwoṱhe zwa khunyelela musi wonoyo." 
1Samuel10:10 Musi vha tshi swika Gibia, a ṱangana na vhaporofita vho rwa muduba; Muya wa Mudzimu a ḓa khae e na maanḓa, na ene a porofita navho." 
1Samuel10:11 Musi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi mu ḓivha kale vha tshi vhona a tshi porofita na vhaporofita, vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Ndi tshini tsho welaho ṅwana wa Kishi? Saulo na ene o no vha muporofita naa?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Muṅwe munna wa muḓi wonoyo a mu nyefula a ri, “Khotsi avho ene ndi nnyi?” Ndi he ha thoma maambele a no ri, “Saulo na ene o no vha muporofita naa?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Musi Saulo o no fhedza u porofita, a gonya muvhunduni." 
1Samuel10:14 Zwino malume wa Saulo vha mu vhudzisa na phuli yawe, vha ri, “No vha ni ngafhi?” Saulo a ri, “Ro vha ri tshi khou ṱoḓa donngi. Huno ri tshi vhona dzi sa wanali, ra ya ha Samuele.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Malume wa Saulo vha ri, “Mmbudzeni zwe Samuele a ni vhudza.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Samuele o ri vhudza uri donngi dzo wanala.” Hone a si vhudze malume wawe zwe Samuele a mu vhudza nga vhuhosi." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuele a kuvhanganya Vhaisraele muḓini wa Mitsipha," 
1Samuel10:18 a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndo pfulusa Vhaisraele Egipita, nda ni lamulela kha maanḓa a Vhaegipita, na kha mivhuso yoṱhe ye ya vha i tshi ni kandeledza.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Huno zwino inwi no landula Mudzimu waṋu, Ene ane a ni lamulela khomboni dzoṱhe na kha zwi lemelaho. Huno inwi no ri, ‘Aiwa, ri vhumbele khosi ine ya ḓo ri vhusa.’ Zwino-ha, iḓani phanḓa ha Muṋe washu zwi tshi ya nga matsinde aṋu na mitupo yaṋu.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi sendedza matsinde oṱhe a Vhaisraele, ha nangwa tsinde ḽa Benyamini." 
1Samuel10:21 Samuele a sendedza tsinde ḽa Benyamini, mutupo nga mutupo, ha nangiwa mutupo wa Mathiri. Ha fhedzwa nga u nangwa Saulo ṅwana wa Kishi. Hone vha tshi mu ṱoḓa, a si wanale." 
1Samuel10:22 Vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu vha ri, “Munna uyo o no swika fhano naa?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ee, o dzumbama thunduni!”" 
1Samuel10:23 Vha gidima vha yo mu bvisa, musi o ima vhukati ha vhathu a vhonala a tshi vha fhira vhoṱhe nga u lapfa vha tshi mu guma kha mutsinga." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuele a vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Munna we a nangwa nga Muṋe washu ni khou mu vhona? Vhukuma a hu na ane a nga ene kha vhathu vhoṱhe.” Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi fhululedza vha ri, “Khosi nga i lalame!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Samuele a ṱalutshedza vhathu ndayo dza vhuhosi. A dzi ṅwala kha bugu, a i vhea phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Ndi hone Samuele a tshi vhofholola vhathu, muṅwe na muṅwe a livha hayani hawe." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo na ene a livha hayani hawe Gibia, a fhelekedzwa nga vhanna vha vhuhali vhe Mudzimu a kwama mbilu dzavho." 
1Samuel10:27 Huno vhaṅwe vha sa ḓivhalekani vha ri, “Muthu uyu a nga ri lamulela hani?” Vha mu nyadza vha si mu ṋee nduvho. Hone Saulo a si zwi londe." 
1Samuel11:1 Nahashi wa Muamoni a gonya a govhela muḓi wa Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi. Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Giliadi vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Nga vha vhofhe mulanga na riṋe, riṋe ri ḓo tenda u vhuswa nga vhone.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Huno Nahashi wa Muamoni a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga na inwi arali ndo nongola ḽiṱo ḽa tshauḽa ḽa muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu uri ndi shonise Vhaisraele vhoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Vhahulwane vha Jabeshe vha amba nae vha ri, “Nga vha ri fhe maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili uri ri kone u ruma vhaḓinḓa kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, arali ha sa vhe na a no ḓa u ri lamukisa ri ḓo ḓikumedza vhone.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Musi vhaḓinḓa vha tshi swika Gibia wa Saulo vha swikisa mafhungo ayo kha vhathu, vhathu vha lila vha tou ṱavha mukosi." 
1Samuel11:5 Zwenezwo Saulo o vha a tshi khou vhuya a tshi bva masimuni, a tshi khou khada phulu dzawe, a vhudzisa a ri, “Ho tshinyala mini? Ndi mini vhathu vha tshi lila?” Ndi hone vha tshi mu toololela zwe vhanna vha Jabeshe vha amba." 
1Samuel11:6 Saulo a ri u pfa zwine vha amba, Muya wa Mudzimu a mbo ḓa khae e na maanḓa, Saulo a tou duga nga mbiti." 
1Samuel11:7 A dzhia phulu mbili a dzi pandakula, a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha isa iyo miraḓo kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, vha tshi ḓivhadza vha tshi ri, “Hezwi ndi zwine zwa ḓo itwa phulu dza muṅwe na muṅwe ane a si thetshelese Saulo na Samuele.” Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ita uri vhathu vhoṱhe vha farwe nga nyofho, vha vhumbana vha vha tshithu tshithihi." 
1Samuel11:8 Saulo a vha kuvhanganya Bezeke. Henefho vha no bva Israele vho vha vhe 300 000, na 30 000 vha no bva Juda." 
1Samuel11:9 Vha vhudza vhaḓinḓa vho rumiwaho vha ri, “Vhudzani vhanna vha Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi ni ri, ‘Matshelo ḓuvha ḽi tshi ṱavha ni ḓo vha no lamukiswa.’ ” Ḽa vha dakalo." 
1Samuel11:10 Vha vhudza Vhaamoni vha ri, “Matshelo ri ḓo ḓikumedza inwi na ḓo konou ri ita zwine na funa.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Nga matshelo Saulo a khethekanya vhanna vhawe vha bva zwigwada zwiraru, mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka vha tshoṱhela mishashani ya Vhaamoni vha vha vhulaha ḓuvha ḽa vhuya ḽa ṱavha. Vho ponyokaho vha balangana, ha si vhe na vho salaho vhe vhavhili." 
1Samuel11:12 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi vhudza Samuele vha ri, “Ndi vhonnyi vhe vha vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Saulo u ḓo ri vhusa?’ Vhanna vhenevho nga vha ḓiswe ngeno ri vha vhulahe.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Huno Saulo a ri, “Hu songo vhulawa muthu ṋamusi, ngauri musi uno Muṋe washu o lamukisa Vhaisraele.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi amba na vhathu a ri, “Nḓarieni Giligala, ri khwaṱhise vhuhosi henefho.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ya Giligala vha khwaṱhisa uri Saulo ndi khosi vha tshi pfiwa nga Muṋe washu. Vha ṱhavha zwiṱhavhelo, vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho dza u konana nae. Saulo na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ita vhuṱambo vhuhulu vho takala." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuele a vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a ri, “Ndo thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwe na mmbudza nda ni vhumbela khosi." 
1Samuel12:2 Zwino ni na khosi, ndi ene murangaphanḓa waṋu. A vha nṋe, ndo kalaha, ndo tshena mmvi, nahone vhana vhanga ni navho fhano. Ndo vha murangaphanḓa waṋu u bva hanani hanga, na ṋamusi." 
1Samuel12:3 Nṋe ndi fhano, ṱanzilelani ni bule vhutshinyi hanga ni tshi pfiwa nga Muṋe washu na khosi ye a i nanga. Ndo vhuya nda dzhia phulu ya nnyi? Ndo vhuya nda dzhia donngi ya nnyi? Ndo vhuya nda fhura nnyi? Ndo vhuya nda kandeledza nnyi? Ndo vhuya nda ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni kha nnyi uri ndi tsinye iṱo? Arali ndo vhuya nda ita tshiṅwe tsha zwenezwo, ndi ḓo tshi lifha.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Vhone a vho ngo vhuya vha ri fhura kana vha ri kandeledza. A vho ngo vhuya vha dzhiela muthu tshithu tshanḓani tshawe.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samuele a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu ndi ṱhanzi ya uri inwi a no ngo wana tshe nṋe nda tshinya, na khosi ye a i nanga ndi ṱhanzi ṋamusi.” Vhone vha ri, “Ngoho, Muṋe washu ndi ṱhanzi.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi amba na vhathu a ri, “Ndi Muṋe washu we a vhea Mushe na Aroni a pfulusa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Egipita." 
1Samuel12:7 Zwino-ha, imani hafha, ndi ṱoḓa u hanedzana na inwi phanḓa ha Muṋe washu nga u ni humbudza mishumo mihulu yoṱhe ye Muṋe washu a itela inwi na vhomakhulukuku waṋu uri a ni tshidze." 
1Samuel12:8 “Jakopo na muṱa wawe vho pfulutshela Egipita, Vhaegipita vha sala vha tshi vha kandeledza, vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha lilela Muṋe washu uri a vha farise, a ruma Mushe na Aroni, vhenevho vha pfulusa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Egipita, vha ḓa vha vha dzudza shangoni ḽino." 
1Samuel12:9 Huno vhone vha hangwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho, ndi zwe a vha kumedza Sisera mulangammbi ya Hatsoro, na Vhafilista na khosi ya Muaba, vha lwa na vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
1Samuel12:10 Vhone vha lilela Muṋe washu uri a vha farise vha ri, ‘Ro tshinya, ro ṱutshela Muṋe washu ra luvha zwifanyiso zwa Baali na Ashtharotho. Huno zwino ri lamulele kha maswina ashu, ri ḓo u luvha.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ruma Jerubaali, ha tevhela Baraka, ha tevhela Jefutha, ha fhedza nga u ḓa nṋe Samuele, muṅwe na muṅwe washu a tshi ḓi ni lamukisa kha maswina aṋu o ni tangaho, na tshila no tsireledzea." 
1Samuel12:12 Hone no ri u vhona khosi Nahashi wa Vhaamoni a tshi ni ḓela, na mmbudza na ri, ‘Ri ṱoḓa khosi ine ya ḓo ri vhusa,’ naho Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu e Ene khosi yaṋu." 
1Samuel12:13 “Zwino khosi ye na i nanga ngei, ndi yone ye na i humbela, vhonani, Muṋe washu o ni ṋea khosi uri i ni vhuse." 
1Samuel12:14 Arali na hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, na mu shumela, na mu thetshelesa, na tevhedza ndayo dzawe, nahone arali inwi na khosi yaṋu na mu tevhela, zwi ḓo ni nakela." 
1Samuel12:15 Hone arali na sa thetshelesa Muṋe washu, arali na nyadza ndayo dzawe, u ḓo lwa na inwi unga o lwa na vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
1Samuel12:16 “Zwino-ha, imani ni khwaṱhe, ni vhone tshithu hetshi tshihulu tshine Muṋe washu a ḓo ni itela ni tshi zwi vhona!" 
1Samuel12:17 A si tshifhinga tsha u kaṋa zwino kani, tshi si na mvula? Hone ndi ḓo rabela Muṋe washu uri a ḓise mibvumo, a nise mvula. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi vhona uri no ita vhuvhi vhuhulu phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ni tshi humbela uri ni vhumbelwe khosi.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi rabela Muṋe washu, musi wonoyo Muṋe washu a ḓisa mibvumo, a nisa mvula. Zwenezwo vhathu vhoṱhe vha ofha Muṋe washu na Samuele zwihulu." 
1Samuel12:19 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha amba na Samuele vha ri, “Nga vha ri rabelele ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho uri ri si fe, ngauri kha vhuvhi hashu hoṱhe he ra ita ro dovha ra phapha mbulu kha iṅwe nga u ita vhuvhi ha u humbela u vhumbelwa khosi.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Naho no ita vhuvhi hoṱhe honoho ni songo ofha tshithu, tenda na si shandukele Muṋe washu, tshaṋu nga hu vhe u mu shumela nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
1Samuel12:21 Ni songo pambuwa na tevhela midzimu i si tshithu. A hu na tshivhuya tshine ya nga ni itela, a i koni u ni lamulela, a i farisi tshithu." 
1Samuel12:22 Muṋe washu a nga si landule vhathu vhawe, u ḓo ni lamulela a tshi itela dzina ḽawe ḽihulu, ngauri Muṋe washu o tou zwi takalela u ni ita vhawe." 
1Samuel12:23 A vha nṋe, ndi nga si khakhele Muṋe washu nga u litsha u ni rabelela. Ndi ḓo ni funza u fara nḓila yavhuḓi i re yone." 
1Samuel12:24 Hone ni ofhe Muṋe washu, ni mu shumele nga u fulufhedzea na nga mbilu yoṱhe. Elelwani zwihulu zwe a ni itela zwone." 
1Samuel12:25 Hone arali na ḓi dzula ni tshi tshinya, inwi khathihi na khosi yaṋu ni ḓo fhedzwa noṱhe.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo o vha o no ḓi fhedza ṅwaha muthihi kana mivhili e khosi ya Vhaisraele. 
1Samuel13:2 A nanga vhanna vha 3 000 kha Vhaisraele, vha 2 000 a vha vhea hune a vha hone Mikhimashi na mivhunduni ya Bethele, vha tshigidi a vha isa Gibia na ṅwana wawe Jonathani, shangoni ḽa tsinde ḽa Benyamini. Vhaṅwe vhanna Saulo a ri vha ḓiele mahayani." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathani a rema phuphu ya Vhafilista i re Geba, Vhafilista vha zwi pfa. Saulo a vhidza Vhaheberu nga u ruma vhaḓinḓa vha yo lidza phalaphala shangoni ḽoṱhe." 
1Samuel13:4 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha pfa ayo mafhungo a uri Saulo o dia mishasha ya Vhafilista ha vha u luṱana tshoṱhe na Vhafilista. Vhathu vha vhidzwa uri vha kuvhangane Giligala ha Saulo. 
1Samuel13:5 Vhalifista vha kuvhangana uri vha lwe na Vhaisraele, vhe na gariki dza nndwa dza 3 000 na vhanameli vhadzo vha 6 000 na vhahali vhe vha vha vho anda unga muṱavha wa lwanzhe. Vha gonya vha ṱoka mishasha Mikhimashi, vhubvaḓuvha ha Bethe Avene." 
1Samuel13:6 Musi Vhaisraele vha tshi vhona uri zwo vha vhifhela na uri mmbi yavho i khou kundwa, vha dzumbama mapakoni na maṱakani na makwarani na milindini na mabidzini." 
1Samuel13:7 Vhaṅwe Vhaheberu vha ita na u wela Jorodani vha wetshela shangoni ḽa Gadi na Giliadi. Saulo o vha a tshee Giligala, vhanna vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vho vha vha tshi tou tetemela nga nyofho." 
1Samuel13:8 Saulo a lindela maḓuvha e a vha o vhewa nga Samuele, hone Samuele a si swike Giligala, vhanna vha Saulo vha vho thoma u balangana." 
1Samuel13:9 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ri, “Nnḓiseleni tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu.” Saulo a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho." 
1Samuel13:10 Musi a tshi tou fhedza u fhisa itsho tshiṱhavhelo, Samuele a swika, Saulo a bva a yo mu ṱanganedza." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuele a mu vhudzisa a ri, “No ita mini?” Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Ndo vhona vhanna vha tshi vho balangana, vhone vha si tsha swika nga tshifhinga tshe ra langana. Nahone Vhafilista vho vha vha tshi vho kuvhangana Mikhimashi." 
1Samuel13:12 Ndi zwe nda humbula nda ri, ‘Zwino Vhafilista vha ḓo nnḓela fhano Giligala, vha nngwana ndi sa athu humbela mashudu kha Muṋe washu.’ Nda sokou ḓifunga nda ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samuele a ri, “No ita zwa vhutsilu. A no ngo tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ni laya, ngavhe ni zwi tevhedze o vha a tshi ḓo ita uri ni vhuse Israele misi yoṱhe." 
1Samuel13:14 Huno zwino muvhuso waṋu a u tsha ḓo ya thambo. Muṋe washu o no ḓiṱoḓela muṅwe ane mbilu yawe ya mu funa, onoyo o mu ta uri a vhe murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhawe, nge inwi na si tevhedze zwe Muṋe washu a ni laya.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi takuwa Giligala a gonya Gibia shangoni ḽa Benyamini, Saulo a vhala vhanna vhe vha vha vhe nae. Vho vha vha tshi nga vha 600." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo na ṅwana wawe Jonathani na vhanna vhe vha vha vhe navho vho vha vhe Geba shangoni ḽa Benyamini, Vhafilista vhó fhaṱa mishasha Mikhimashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Mishashani ya Vhafilista ha bva zwigwada zwiraru zwa vhaṱanguli. Tshiṅwe tsha livha Ofra shangoni ḽa Shuala," 
1Samuel13:18 tshiṅwe tsha livha Bethe Horoni, tsha vhuraru tsha livha masakhani o ingamelaho govha ḽa Tseboimi u livhana na phanga." 
1Samuel13:19 Ho vha hu si na mufulatsimbi na muthihi shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, nge Vhafilista vha vha vho ri Vhaheberu vha nga ḓo fula mapanga kana mafumo." 
1Samuel13:20 Ndi zwe Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ḓi ya ha Vhafilista u yo ṱuṱulisa malembe avho na dzipiki na dzimbaḓo na dzisegere. 
1Samuel13:21 Mutengo wa u ṱuṱulisa malembe na dzipiki wo vha u mangwende mavhili, wa u ṱuṱulisa malembe na dzipiki wo vha u mangwende mavhili, wa u ṱuṱulisa forogo dza maṋo mararu na dzimbaḓo na u lugisa nthi dza phulu wo vha u ḽingwende ḽithihi ḽiṱuku." 
1Samuel13:22 Ndi zwe musi wa nndwa ha vha hu si na muhali na muthihi a re na Saulo na Jonathani o faraho banga kana pfumo, ndi Saulo na ṅwana wawe Jonathani fhedzi vhe vha vha vhe na zwihali." 
1Samuel13:23 Zwino ho vha ho bva tshigwada tsha Vhafilista tsha yo linda phara ya Mikhimashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Muṅwe musi Jonathani ṅwana wa Saulo a vhudza muṱhannga we a vha o mu hwalela zwihali a ri, “Iḓani ri wetshele kha gomane ya Vhafilista.” Hone Jonathani a si vhudze khotsi awe ayo mafhungo." 
1Samuel14:2 Saulo o vha e Migironi masakhani a Gibia, o dzula fhasi ha mugranada. O vha e na vhanna vhane vha nga vha 600." 
1Samuel14:3 Tshifhe o ambaraho luvhemba lwa u pakata o vha e Ahia, ṅwana wa mukomana wa Ikhabodo, ane a pfi Ahitubu, ṅwana wa Finiasi, ṅwana wa Eli, tshifhe wa Muṋe washu muḓini wa Shilo. Vhanna avho vho vha vha sa ḓivhi uri Jonathani o ṱuwa." 
1Samuel14:4 Ho vha hu na luwa masia oṱhe a phara ye Jonathani a vha a tshi ṱoḓa u fhira khayo uri a swike kha gomane ya Vhafilista, luṅwe lwo vha lu tshi pfi Botsetse, luṅwe lu tshi pfi Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Luṅwe lwo vha lu thungo ya devhula lwo livhana na Mikhimashi, luṅwe lu thungo ya tshipembe lwo livhana na Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathani a vhudza muṱhanngana o mu hwalelaho zwihali a ri, “Iḓani ri wetshele mishashani ya mashuvhuru haaḽa. Khamusi Muṋe washu u ḓo ri farisa. A hu na tshine tsha kundisa Muṋe washu u tshidza vhathu, a nga vha tshidza nga vhathu vhanzhi, kana a vha tshidza nga vha si gathi.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Muhwali wawe wa zwihali a ri, “Nga vha ite zwoṱhe zwi re mbiluni yavho. Nga vha fhire phanḓa, ndi na vhone nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathani a ri, “Zwino iḓani, nga ri wetshele seli ri ye kha havhaḽa vhanna uri vha ri vhone." 
1Samuel14:9 Arali vha amba na riṋe vha ri, ‘Imani henefho ri vhuye ri swike kha inwi,’ ri ḓo ima henefho hune ra vha hone, ra si ye khavho." 
1Samuel14:10 Hone arali vha ri, ‘Iḓani ngeno!’ ri ḓo gonya ra ya, ngauri itsho tshi ḓo vha tshone tshiga tsha uri Muṋe washu o vha kumedza zwanḓani zwashu.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Ndi hone vhuvhili havho vha tshi ḓisumbedza vha vhonwa nga Vhafilista. Vhafilista vha ri, “Vhonani! Vhaheberu vho bva milindini ye vha dzumbana khayo.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Vhanna vha gomane vha vhidzelela Jonathani na muhwali wa zwihali zwawe vha ri, “Iḓani ngeno, ri ḓo ni sumbedza.” Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi vhudza muhwali wa zwihali zwawe a ri, “Ntevheleni, Muṋe washu o vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa Vhaisraele.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathani a gonya a tshi tou kokovha nga zwanḓa na ṋayo, muhwali wa zwihali zwawe a tshi khou mu tevhela. Jonathani a dzhena Vhafilista nga pfumo a vha kunda, muhwali wa zwihali zwawe a tevhela, a vhulaha vho waho." 
1Samuel14:14 Kha nndwa iyo ya u thoma Jonathani na muhwali wawe wa zwihali vha vhulaha vhanna vha 20 fhethu hune ha nga ita hafu ya hekhitha. 
1Samuel14:15 Ndi hone gomane yoṱhe i tshi farwa nga nyofho, vha re mishashani na shangoni, vhalindi na vhaṱanguli, na fhasi ha dzinginyea. Idzo dzo vha dzi nyofho dzo ḓiswaho nga Mudzimu." 
1Samuel14:16 Vhalindi vha Saulo vha re Gibia shangoni ḽa Benyamini vha vhona hu na vilinga Vhafilista vha tshi gidimela ngeno na ngei. 
1Samuel14:17 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vhudza vhanna vhe vha vha vhe nae a ri, “Vhalani vhahali ni vhone vha siho.” Vha tshi vhala vha wana uri Jonathani na muṱhannga wawe wa u hwala zwihali a vhaho." 
1Samuel14:18 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi amba na tshifhe Ahia a ri, “Ḓisani luvhemba lwa u pakata.” Misi iyo mbulungelo ya Mudzimu yo vha i na Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel14:19 Musi Saulo a tshi kha ḓi amba na tshifhe, vilinga ḽi re mishashani ya Vhafilista ḽa ḓi hulela. Saulo a vhudza tshifhe a ri, “A hu tshee na tshifhinga tsha u ṱwa ri tshi vhudzisa Muṋe washu!”" 
1Samuel14:20 Ndi hone na Saulo na vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe vha tshi kuvhangana, vha dzhena nndwani. Vha wana Vhafilista vho vilingana tshoṱhe, vha tshi vho rungana nga tshavho." 
1Samuel14:21 Vhaheberu vhaḽa vhe u rangani vha vha vhe na Vhafilista vhó gonya navho mishashani yavho, vha vhuelela ha Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe na Saulo na Jonathani." 
1Samuel14:22 Musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho dzumbama mivhunduni ya Efraimi vha tshi pfa uri Vhafilista vha khou shavha, na vhone vha dzhena iyo nndwa vha vha pandamedza." 
1Samuel14:23 Musi wonoyo Muṋe washu a tshidza Vhaisraele. Nndwa ya lwiwa ya vhuya ya fhira Bethe Avene. 
1Samuel14:24 Zwino Vhaisraele vho vhaisala heḽo ḓuvha nge Saulo a vha o vhofha vhathu nga muano, a ri, “Khombo nga i wele munna ane a ḽa zwiḽiwa ḽi sa athu kovhela, ndi sa athu lifhedza maswina anga!” Zwenezwo ha si vhe na muthihi wa vhahali we a kwama zwiḽiwa." 
1Samuel14:25 Mmbi yoṱhe ya swika ḓakani ho ḓalaho ṋotshi, zwigili zwo ḓala mutoli." 
1Samuel14:26 Musi vha tshi wana ṋotshi vha vhona dzo ḓala, naho zwo ralo ha si vhe na we a longa tshithu mulomoni, ngauri vho vha vha tshi ofha zwe vha ana."
