1Samuel14:27 Huno Jonathani o vha a songo zwi pfa uri khotsi awe o vhofha vhathu nga muano, zwenezwo a ṱhavha tshigili tsha ṋotshi nga ṱhodzi ya lubaḓa lwe a vha o lu fara, a takusa tshanḓa tshawe a isa mulomoni, a konou pfa e na nungo." 
1Samuel14:28 Ndi hone muṅwe wa vhahali a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Khotsi aṋu vho vhofha mmbi nga muano vha ri, ‘Munna ane a ḽa zwiḽiwa ṋamusi u ḓo welwa nga khombo!’ Ndi zwine vhanna avha vha si vhe na nungo.”" 
1Samuel14:29 Jonathani a ri, “Khotsi anga vho ḓisa khombo shangoni. Edzonu vhona uri ndi na nungo hani nge nda thetshelanyana ṋotshi idzi." 
1Samuel14:30 Ngavhe avha vhanna vha vhe vho ḽa zwe vha ṱangula maswina ndi musi zwo vha zwi khwiṋe. Vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vho vhulaha Vhafilista vhanzhi.” 
1Samuel14:31 Musi wonoyo Vhaisraele vha vhulaha Vhafilista u bva Mikhimashi u swika Ayaloni, vha vhuya vha neta tshoṱhe." 
1Samuel14:32 Vha mbo ḓi wela zwe vha thuba, vha dzhia nngu na kholomo na ṋamana, vha zwi shidzhela henefho fhasi, vha zwi ḽa khathihi na malofha." 
1Samuel14:33 Ndi hone muṅwe a tshi vhudza Saulo a ri, “Nga vha dzou vhona, vhanna avha vha khou khakhela Muṋe washu nga u ḽa ṋama khathihi na malofha.” Saulo a ri, “No khakha. Ṱavhanyani ni kunguluse tombo ḽihulu ni ḽi ḓise ngeno kha nṋe.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Ibvani ni yo vhudza vhanna ni ri, ‘Noṱhe ḓisani kholomo dzaṋu na nngu, ni dzi ṱhavhe fhano, ni dzi ḽe. Ni songo khakhela Muṋe washu nga u ḽa ṋama i kha ḓi vha na malofha.’ ” Muṅwe na muṅwe a ḓisa phulu yawe vhusiku honoho a i ṱhavha henefho." 
1Samuel14:35 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari. Ndi yone aḽiṱari ye a thoma u i fhaṱa. 
1Samuel14:36 Saulo a ri, “Nga ri tse ri yo londa Vhafilista vhusiku, ri vha ṱangule u swika ḽi tshi tsha, nahone ri songo vhuya ra litsha na muthihi wavho a tshila.” Vhanna vha fhindula vha ri, “Nga vha ite zwine vha vhona zwo tea.” Huno tshifhe a ri, “Nga ri range u vhudzisa Mudzimu.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vhudzisa Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi tse ndi yo londa Vhafilista? U ḓo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa Vhaisraele?” Hone Mudzimu a si mu fhindule heḽo ḓuvha." 
1Samuel14:38 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ri, “Noṱhe inwi vharangaphanḓa vha mmbi iḓani fhano, nga ri wane zwe ra tshinya ṋamusi." 
1Samuel14:39 Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ane a lamulela Vhaisraele, naho a vha ṅwananga Jonathani o tshinyaho, u fanela u fa.” Hone ha si vhe na munna na muthihi we a fhindula." 
1Samuel14:40 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe a ri, “Imani henengeo, nṋe na Jonathani ṅwananga ri ḓo ima nga ngeno.” Vhanna vha fhindula vha ri, “Nga vha ite zwine vha vhona zwo tea.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi rabela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a ri, “Mphindule zwi re zwone.” Jonathani na Saulo vha farwa nga madeṅwa, vhathu vhone vha wanala vho ṱamba." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo a ri, “Nṋe na ṅwananga Jonathani ri vhoniseni nga madeṅwa.” Madeṅwa a mvaṱa Jonathani." 
1Samuel14:43 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi amba na Jonathani a ri, “Mmbudzeni tshe na ita.” Jonathani a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndo tou thetshela mutolinyana nga ṱhodzi ya mbaḓa yanga. Ndi a fa zwanga.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo a ri, “Jonathani, arali na sa fa, Mudzimu nga a nthwe a dovhe.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Hone vhanna vha vhudza Saulo vha ri, “Hu fe Jonathani we a lamulela Israele zwingafhangafha? Na kathihi! Ri ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, luvhudzi na luthihi lwa ṱhoho yawe lu nga si wele fhasi, ngauri zwe a ita ṋamusi o vha a tshi khou fariswa nga Mudzimu.” Vhanna vha mbo pfumelela Jonathani, a si vhulawe." 
1Samuel14:46 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi litsha u pandamedza Vhafilista, vha humela mashangoni avho." 
1Samuel14:47 Saulo o ri u vhumbwa khosi ya Israele a lwa na maswina avho masia oṱhe: Vhamuaba na Vhaamoni na Vhaedomo na mahosi a Tsoba na Vhafilista. Hoṱhe he a lwa o kunda. 
1Samuel14:48 O lwa nga vhuhali a kunda Vhaamaleke, a lamulela Israele zwanḓani zwa avho vhe vha vha ṱangula." 
1Samuel14:49 Vhana vha Saulo vha vhatuka vho vha vhe Jonathani na Ishivi na Malakhishua. Ṅwananyana wawe muhulwane o vha a tshi pfi Meraba, muṱuku a tshi pfi Mikhala." 
1Samuel14:50 Mufumakadzi wawe o vha a tshi pfi Ahinuamu, ṅwananyana wa Ahimaatsi. Mulangi wa mmbi ya Saulo o vha a tshi pfi Abinere, ṅwana wa Nere. Nere o vha e khotsimunene wa Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi khotsi a Saulo na Nere, khotsi a Abinere, vho vha vhe vhana vha Abiele." 
1Samuel14:52 Saulo a tshi kha ḓi vha hone o vha a tshi ḓi dzula a tshi lwa na Vhafilista, nahone Saulo o vha a tshi ri u vhona munna wa maanḓa kana wa vhuhali a mu dzhenisa mmbini yawe." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuele a amba na Saulo a ri, “Ndi nṋe we nda ruṅwa nga Muṋe washu uri ndi ni ḓodze mapfura ni vhe khosi ya vhathu vhawe, zwino thetshelesani mafhungo a Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel15:2 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo lifhedza Vhaamaleke zwe vha ita Vhaisraele, zwe vha vha lalela nḓilani zwiḽa vha tshi bva Egipita." 
1Samuel15:3 Zwino iyani ni yo dia Vhaamaleke, ni phusukanye zwoṱhe zwine zwa vha zwavho. Ni songo sia tshithu, ni vhulahe vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana na dzitshetshe na kholomo na nngu na gamela na donngi.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ramba vhanna a vha khethekanya a vha vhala vhe Telemu: ho vha hu na vhahali vha 200 000 vha tshimbilaho nga milenzhe, na vhaṅwe vha 10 000 vha bvaho Juda." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo a livha muḓini wa Amaleke, a lalela mulambwanani." 
1Samuel15:6 A vhudza Vhakeni a ri, “Ṱuwani, siani Vhaamaleke uri ndi tshi vha lozwa ndi si paṱekanye na inwi, inwi no tonda Vhaisraele vhoṱhe musi vha tshi bva Egipita.” Vhakeni vha mbo ṱutshela Vhaamaleke." 
1Samuel15:7 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi dia Vhaamaleke nḓilani yoṱhe u bva Havila u swika Shuru, vhubvaḓuvha ha Egipita." 
1Samuel15:8 Saulo a fara Agaga khosi ya Vhaamaleke a si mu vhulahe, vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe a vha lozwa nga pfumo." 
1Samuel15:9 Hone Saulo na mmbi yawe vha litsha u vhulaha Agaga na nngu na kholomo dzavhuḓi na ṋamana dzo nonaho na ngwana dzo nonaho, zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi zwavhuḓi vha litsha u zwi vhulaha. Vho vha vha sa funi u zwi lozwa tshoṱhe, hone zwe zwa vha zwi tshi nyadzea zwi si na mushumo, vha zwi lozwa." 
1Samuel15:10 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa ha Samuele ḽa ri," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ndi pfa vhuṱungu Saulo ndo mu vhumba khosi; o ntshandukela, ho ngo ita zwe nda mu laya.” Samuele zwa mu dina, a lilela Muṋe washu vhusiku honoho hoṱhe." 
1Samuel15:12 Samuele a fhinduwa a yo ṱangana na Saulo, hone a vhudzwa upfi, “Saulo o ya Kharamele. Henefho o imisa tshihumbudzo tsha u ḓihulisa nahone o no rembuluwa o tsela Giligala.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samuele a ya ha Saulo, Saulo a mu resha a ri, “Muṋe washu a vhe navho! Ndo ita zwe Muṋe washu a nndaya.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Huno Samuele a ri, “Zwino khezwi ndi tshi pfa nngu na kholomo dzi tshi lila?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Vhanna vho vhuya nadzo dzi tshi bva ha Vhaamaleke, vho litsha nngu dzavhuḓi na kholomo dzavhuḓi vha si dzi vhulahe, vha tshi itela u ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho tshiṱhavhelo, hone zwiṅwe zwoṱhe ro zwi lozwa.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Samuele a amba na Saulo a ri, “Fhumulani! Litshani ndi ni vhudze zwe Muṋe washu a mmbudza madekwe.” Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha mmbudze.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele a ri, “Naho ni tshi vhona unga ni muṱuku, ni murangaphanḓa wa matsinde a Israele. Muṋe washu o ni vhumba khosi ya Israele." 
1Samuel15:18 Huno o ni ruma a ri, ‘Iyani u lozwa tshoṱhe vhathu havhaḽa vhavhi, Vhaamaleke, ilwani navho ni vhuye ni vha vhulahe vhoṱhe.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Ndi mini ni songo thetshelesa Muṋe washu? Khezwi no dzhia zwe na ṱangula na ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu?” 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo a ri, “Muṋe washu ndo mu thetshelesa. Ndo ya he Muṋe washu a nthuma hone. Vhaamaleke ndo vha lozwa tshoṱhe, nda vhuya na Agaga khosi yavho." 
1Samuel15:21 Vhanna vhone vho dzhia nngu na kholomo kha zwe ra thuba, dzi fhiraho dzoṱhe dzo kumedzwaho Mudzimu, uri dzi vhe tshiṱhavhelo dzi ṋekedzwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho fhano Giligala.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Hone Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Kani Muṋe washu u takalela nduvho dzi fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo u fhira muthu a tshi ita zwine a amba? U thetshelesa hu fhira tshiṱhavhelo, u tevhedza ndaela hu fhira nngu dzo nonaho." 
1Samuel15:23 U sa pfa hu nga vhutshinyi ha u tungula ṱhangu, u ḓihudza hu nga tshivhi tsha u gwadamela zwitungulo. Zwino nge na landula ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, na Ene o ni landula, a ni tsha vha khosi.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi amba na Samuele a ri, “Ndo tshinya. Ndo pfuka ndaela ya Muṋe washu na ndayo dzawe. Ndo vha ndi tshi ofha vhathu, ndi zwe nda tenda zwe vha mmbudza." 
1Samuel15:25 Zwino nga vha nkhangwele vhuvhi hanga nandi, vha hume na nṋe ri ye Giligala, ndi yo luvha Muṋe washu.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Huno Samuele a amba nae a ri, “Ndi nga si ṱuwe na inwi. No landula ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, na Muṋe washu o ni landula, ni nga si tsha vha khosi ya Israele!”" 
1Samuel15:27 Musi Samuele a tshi rembuluwa uri a ṱuwe, Saulo a fara lupendelo lwa phuraphura yawe, ya kheruwa." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuele a mu vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu o kherula muvhuso wa Israele wa ṱuwa kha inwi ṋamusi, o u ṋea muṅwe ane a fhira inwi." 
1Samuel15:29 Mudzimu ane a vha Ene Vhugala ha Israele ha zwifhi, ha ḓisoli, hufha a si muthu.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Ndo tshinya. Naho zwo ralo nga vha nkhulise nandi ri na vhahulwane vha vhathu vhanga na Vhaisraele, nga vha ṱuwe na nṋe, uri ndi yo luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi ṱuwa na Saulo, Saulo a luvha Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel15:32 Samuele a ri, “Ḓisani Agaga khosi ya Vhaamaleke.” Agaga a swika kha Samuele o ḓitakalela a tshi khou elekanya a ri, “Zwino a thi tsha ofha uri vha ḓo mmbulaha!”" 
1Samuel15:33 Huno Samuele a ri, “Pfumo ḽau ḽo ṱangula vhasadzi vha sala vha si na vhana; na mme au u ḓo sala a si na ṅwana.” Samuele a remekanya Agaga nga banga phanḓa ha Muṋe washu henefho Giligala." 
1Samuel15:34 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi ṱuwa a ya Rama, Saulo a ṱuwa a ya hayani hawe Gibia." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuele a vhuya a fa a sa athu dovha a vhonana na Saulo, hone a tshi ḓi ḽa mbilu nga u shanduka ha Saulo. Na Muṋe washu o vha a tshi pfa vhuṱungu zwe a ita uri Saulo a vhe khosi ya Israele." 
1Samuel16:1 Muṋe washu a amba na Samuele a ri, “U ḓo ḽa mbilu nga Saulo u swika lini? Ndo mu landula, a nga si tsha vha khosi ya Israele. Ḓadza luṋanga lwau mapfura u fare lwendo, ndi khou u ruma ha Isai wa Betlehema. Ndo nanga muṅwe wa vhana vhawe vha vhatuka uri a vhe khosi.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Huno Samuele a ri, “Ndi ḓo ya hani? Saulo a zwi pfa u ḓo mmbulaha.” Muṋe washu a ri, “Ṱuwa na tholehadzi u swike u ri, ‘Ndo ḓa u ṋekedza Muṋe washu tshiṱhavhelo.’" 
1Samuel16:3 U vhidze Isai a ḓe afho tshiṱhavheloni, ndi ḓo u sumbedza zwine wa fanela u ita. U nnḓodzele ane nda mu sumba.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele a ita zwe Muṋe washu a amba. Musi a tshi swika Betlehema, vhahulwane vha muḓi vha tetemela vha tshi mu ṱanganedza. Vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Vha ḓa nga mulalo?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Samuele a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓa nga mulalo, ndo ḓa u ṋekedza Muṋe washu tshiṱhavhelo. Ḓikumedzeni Mudzimu ri ṱuwe roṱhe ri yo ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo.” Ndi hone Isai na vhana vhawe a tshi vha kumedza Mudzimu, a ṱuwa navho vha yo ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo." 
1Samuel16:6 Musi vha tshi swika Samuele a vhona Eliaba, a elekanya a ri, “Vhukumakuma mutiwa wa Muṋe washu ngoyu!”" 
1Samuel16:7 Hone Muṋe washu a vhudza Samuele a ri, “U songo sedza tshivhumbeo tshawe na vhulapfu hawe, uyo ndo mu landula. Yahavee ha sedzi zwithu zwine muthu a sedza. Muthu u sedza zwine a zwi vhona nga maṱo, Yahavee u sedza mbilu.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Ndi hone Isai a tshi vhidza Abinadaba a ita uri a fhire phanḓa ha Samuele. Hone Samuele a ri, “Muṋe washu na onoyu ho ngo mu nanga.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Isai a ita uri hu fhire Shama, hone Samuele a ri, “Muṋe washu na onoyu ho ngo mu nanga.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Isai o ita uri vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha fhire phanḓa ha Samuele, hone Samuele a ḓi mu vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu ho ngo vha nanga havha.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi vhudzisa Isai a ri, “Vhana vhavho ndi vhenevha fhedzi?” Isai a fhindula a ri, “Hu kha ḓi vha na phedzi, ene u khou lisa nngu.” Samuele a ri, “Nga vha mu vhidzise, ri nga si ḽe ene a sa athu swika.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Ndi hone a tshi mu vhidzisa a ḓiswa. O vha e na vala ḽavhuḓi na tshivhumbeo tsho nakaho na maṱo a penyaho. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Takuwa u mu ḓodze, ndi onoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Ndi hone Samuele a tshi dzhia luṋanga lwa mapfura a mu ḓodza vhakomana vhawe vha tshi zwi vhona. U bva musi wonoyo Muya wa Muṋe washu a thoma u shuma kha Dafita e na maanḓa. Samuele a konou humela Rama. 
1Samuel16:14 Zwino Muya wa Muṋe washu o vha o ṱutshela Saulo, a vho tambudzwa nga muya wo ruṅwaho nga Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel16:15 Vhalanda vha Saulo vha amba nae vha ri, “Ri khou zwi vhona vha tshi ofhiswa nga muya muvhi wo ruṅwaho nga Mudzimu." 
1Samuel16:16 Nga vha ri rume muṋe washu, ri yo vha ṱoḓela muthu ane a kona u lidza haripa. Hu ḓo ri musi muya muvhi wo ruṅwaho nga Mudzimu u tshi vha ḓela, a vha lidzela, vha pfa vhe khwiṋe.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Saulo a amba na vhalanda vhawe a ri, “Wanani muthu ane a kona u lidza zwavhuḓi ni mu ḓise kha nṋe.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Muṅwe wa vhashumi a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndo vhona ṅwana wa Isai wa Betlehema ane a kona u lidza haripa. Ene u na tshivhindi nahone ndi muhali. Ndi makone wa u amba, u na tshivhumbeo tshavhuḓi. Muṋe washu u nae.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Isai a ri, “Nga vha rume ṅwana wavho Dafita a no khou lisa nngu a ḓe.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Ndi hone Isai a tshi dzhia donngi yo hwala vhurotho na mukumba u na waini na mbudzana a ruma ṅwana wawe Dafita a ṱuwa nazwo a zwi isa ha Saulo. 
1Samuel16:21 Dafita a swika ha Saulo a mu shumela. Saulo a takalela Dafita nga maanḓa, a vha muhwali wa zwihali zwa Saulo." 
1Samuel16:22 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi swikisa ipfi ha Isai ḽi no ri, “Nga vha litshe Dafita a ntshumele, ndi a mu takalela.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Musi muya wo ruṅwaho nga Mudzimu u tshi ḓela Saulo, Dafita o vha a tshi ḓi dzhia haripa a mu lidzela. Zwenezwo Saulo a dzivhuluwa, a pfa e khwiṋe, muya muvhi wa mu ṱutshela." 
1Samuel17:1 Zwino Vhafilista vha ramba mmbi dzavho uri vha bve pfumo, vha kuvhangana Sokho kha ḽa Juda. Vha ṱoka mishasha fhethu hune ha pfi Efese Damimu, vhukati ha Sokho na Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo na Vhaisraele vha kuvhangana, vha ṱoka mishasha govhani ḽa Ela, vha ḓilugisela u lwa na Vhafilista." 
1Samuel17:3 Vhafilista vha ima muvhunduni muṅwe, Vhaisraele vha ima kha muṅwe, vhukati havho ha vha na govha." 
1Samuel17:4 Ha ḓa ngweṋa i tshi bva mishashani ya Vhafilista. O vha a tshi pfi Goliada, wa muḓi wa Gathi. Vhulapfu hawe ho vha vhu tshi hovhelela mitha tharu." 
1Samuel17:5 Ṱhohoni o vha o ambara nguwane ya musinaseṱha, a ita na u ambara lupila lwa u ḓitsireledza lwa musinaseṱha lune lwa lemela khilogiramu dza 57." 
1Samuel17:6 Milenzhe o vha o i pila nga makamasi a musinaseṱha, shaḓani ḽawe o hwala banga ḽa musinaseṱha." 
1Samuel17:7 Thende ya pfumo ḽawe yo vha i ndenya i tshi nga luṱanga lwa muluki, ṱhodzi yaḽo ya tsimbi i tshi lemela khilogiramu dzine dza nga vha ṱhanu na mbili. O vha o rangwa phanḓa nga muhwali wa tshiṱangu tshawe." 
1Samuel17:8 Goliada a ima, a ṱambuludza Vhaisraele a ri, “No bvelani pfumo no rwa muduba? Nṋe ndo imela Vhafilista, inwi ni phuli dza Saulo. Nangani munna a tsele ngeno kha nṋe!" 
1Samuel17:9 Arali a tshi kona u lwa a mmbulaha, riṋe ri ḓo vha vhalanda vhaṋu, hone arali nda mu kunda nda mu vhulaha, inwi ni ḓo vha vhalanda vhashu na ri shumela.”" 
1Samuel17:10 A dovha a ri, “Ṋamusi ndi nyadza mmbi ya Israele! Bvisani munna ri lwe.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Saulo na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ri u pfa maipfi a uyo Mufilista vha hanganea, vha farwa nga nyofho." 
1Samuel17:12 Zwino Dafita o vha e ṅwana wa Muefratha ane a pfi Isai we a vha a tshi dzula Betlehema kha ḽa Juda. Isai o vha e na vhana vhaṱanu na vhararu vha vhatuka. Misi ya Saulo o vha o kalaha, o no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha." 
1Samuel17:13 Vhana vha Isai vhararu vhahulwane vho vha vho bva pfumo na Saulo. Wa tanzhe o vha e Eliaba, wa vhuvhili e Abinadaba, wa vhuraru e Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dafita o vha e ene phedzi. Avho vhararu vhahulwane vha bva pfumo na Saulo," 
1Samuel17:15 hone Dafita o vha a tshi ḓi ita a tshi ya ha Saulo a dovha a humela Betlehema a yo lisa nngu dza khotsi awe. 
1Samuel17:16 Mufilista uyo o vhuya a fhedza maḓuvha a 40, a tshi ḓi sendela nga matsheloni na nga madekwana, a yo pikisa Vhaisraele." 
1Samuel17:17 Zwino Isai a vhudza ṅwana wawe Dafita a ri, “Dzhia thoro hedzi dzo hadzingwaho dza khilogiramu dza fumi na mikonde hei ya fumi ya vhurotho u ṱavhanye u yo ṋea vhakomana vhau ngei mishashani yavho." 
1Samuel17:18 U dzhie na tshisi hedzi dza fumi u yo ṋea mulangammbi. U ḓo vhuya u tshi mmbudza uri vhakomana vhau vha vuwa hani na uri vha ri mini. 
1Samuel17:19 Vha na Saulo na vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele ngei govhani ḽa Ela, vha khou lwa na Vhafilista.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Dafita a fhinduwa, a sia nngu na mulisa, a hwala izwo zwiḽiwa, a tshimbila nga he a laiwa nga Isai. A swika mishashani musi mmbi i tshi khou bva i tshi yo ima vhuimoni hayo ha nndwa, i tshi khou ṱavha mukosi wa nndwa." 
1Samuel17:21 Vhaisraele na Vhafilista vha ima vho lavhelesana. 
1Samuel17:22 Dafita a sia zwithu zwawe na mulondoli wa thundu, a gidimela hune ha lwiwa, a resha vhakomana vhawe." 
1Samuel17:23 Musi a tshi khou amba navho, Goliada wa Mufilista, ene ngweṋa i no bva Gathi, a bvela khagala, a ḓi pikisa Vhaisraele Dafita a zwi pfa." 
1Samuel17:24 Vhaisraele vha tshi vhona uyo munna, vhoṱhe vha mu shavha vho farwa nga nyofho khulu." 
1Samuel17:25 Zwino Vhaisraele vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi ri, “Ni khou mu vhona uyu munna a tshi khou ḓi sendela? U khou ḓa u nyefula Israele. Khosi i ḓo pfumisa munna ane a nga mu vhulaha. I ḓo ita na u mu ṋea ṅwananyana wayo uri a vhe musadzi wawe, ya dovha ya litshisa muṱa wa hawe u bvisa mithelo ya Israele.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Dafita a vhudzisa vhanna vho imaho henefho tsini nae a ri, “Munna ane a vhulaha uyu Mufilista, a ita uri Vhaisraele vha si tsha nyadziwa, u ḓo ṋewani? Mufilista uyu wa shuvhuru ane a nyefula mmbi dza Mudzimu a tshilaho ndi nnyi?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Vhone vha dovholola zwe vha vha vha tshi khou amba vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Munna ane a mu vhulaha u ḓo itwa tsha uri na tsha uri.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Musi Eliaba mukomana wa Dafita muhulwane a tshi mu pfa a tshi khou amba na avho vhanna, a mu sinyutshela a mu vhudzisa a ri, “No ḓelani fhano? Dziḽa nngu no dzi sia na nnyi ngei sogani? Ndi a ḓivha uri ni a ḓihudza, ni na mbilu mmbi! No tou ḓa u vhona nndwa!”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Zwino ndo itani? Ndi songo vhuya nda amba?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Dafita a rembulutshela kha muṅwe a dovholola ayo mafhungo, vhanna vha ḓi mu fhindula unga zwiḽa u rangani." 
1Samuel17:31 Zwe Dafita a amba zwa pfiwa, zwa swikiswa ha Saulo, Saulo a mu vhidzisa." 
1Samuel17:32 Dafita a amba na Saulo a ri, “Hu songo vha na ane a kulea nungo nga hoyu Mufilista, nṋe ndi ḓo ya nda lwa nae.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Ni nga si kone u bva na yo lwa na hoyo Mufilista, ni kha ḓi vha mutukana, ene o ḓi vha muhali wa nndwa u bva hanani hawe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Huno Dafita a amba na Saulo a ri, “Nṋe ndi mulisa wa nngu dza khotsi anga. Musi hu tshi ḓa ndau kana biara ya hwala nngu sambini," 
1Samuel17:35 ndo vha ndi tshi i londa, nda i kovhola, nda lamukisa nngu mulomoni wayo. Musi i tshi rembulutshela kha nṋe, ndo vha ndi tshi i fara nga mamvele ayo, nda lwa nayo nda i vhulaha." 
1Samuel17:36 Hufha ndo no vhulaha ndau na biara, na Mufilista hoyu wa shuvhuru ndi ḓo mu ita zwenezwo, ngauri u nyefula mmbi dza Mudzimu a tshilaho." 
1Samuel17:37 Muṋe washu we a nndamukisa kha shimba ḽa ndau na ḽa biara u ḓo nndamukisa zwanḓani zwa hoyu Mufilista.” Saulo a vhudza Dafita a ri, “Tshimbilani, Muṋe washu a vhe na inwi.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ambadza Dafita zwihali zwawe: nguwane ya musinaseṱha na lupila lwa nndwa. 
1Samuel17:39 Dafita a vhofhelela banga ḽawe nṱha ha lupila, a edzisa u tshimbila, ngauri o vha a songo zwi ḓowela. Dafita a vhudza Saulo a ri, “Ndi nga si kone u tshimbila ndo zwi ambara; a tho ngo zwi ḓowela.” Ndi hone a tshi zwi bvula," 
1Samuel17:40 a fara mbaḓa yawe, a nanga matombo maṱanu a no suvhelela mulambwanani, a a longa mukhwamani wawe wa mulisa wa nngu, a fara gatho, a sendela tsini ha uyo Mufilista." 
1Samuel17:41 Zwenezwo uyo Mufilista a ḓi sendela tsini ha Dafita o rangwa phanḓa nga muhwali wa tshiṱangu tshawe. 
1Samuel17:42 A tshi sedza Dafita a vhona a tshi tou vha mutukana, e na vala ḽavhuḓi na tshivhumbeo tshavhuḓi, a mu nyadza." 
1Samuel17:43 Goliada a amba na Dafita a ri, “U vhona unga nṋe ndi mmbwa u tshi nnḓela na lubaḓa?” A teketela Dafita nga midzimu yawe a ri," 
1Samuel17:44 “Iḓa fhano, ṋama yau ndi ḓo i fha zwiṋoni zwi fhufhaho na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka!”" 
1Samuel17:45 Dafita a fhindula uyo Mufilista a ri, “Vhone vha nnḓela vho fara tshusa na pfumo na banga, hone nṋe ndi ḓa u lwa navho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, Mudzimu wa mmbi dza Israele, we vhone vha mu nyefula." 
1Samuel17:46 Ṋamusi ḽino Muṋe washu u ḓo vha kumedza nṋe, ndi ḓo vha vhulaha nda tumula ṱhoho yavho. Ṋamusi zwitumbu zwa mmbi ya Vhafilista ndi ḓo zwi fha zwiṋoni na zwivhanda, shango ḽoṱhe ḽa konou zwi ḓivha uri Mudzimu wa Israele u hone." 
1Samuel17:47 Vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganaho fhano vha ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu ha tshidzi nga banga kana pfumo, ngauri nndwa ndi ya Muṋe washu, noṱhe u ḓo ni kumedza zwanḓani zwashu.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Huno Goliada a tshi khou ḓi sendela tsini uri a mu thome, Dafita a ṱavhanya a gidimela hune ha lwiwa hone uri a ṱangane nae." 
1Samuel17:49 Dafita a longa tshanḓa mukhwamani wawe a bvisa tombo, a ḽi posa nga gatho a rwa Goliada kha phanḓa. Tombo iḽo ḽa sunguvhela kha phanḓa yawe, a wela fhasi nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
1Samuel17:50 Ngauralo Dafita o mu kunda nga gatho na tombo, a mu rwa a wela fhasi, a mu vhulaha a songo fara banga." 
1Samuel17:51 Dafita a gidima a ima nṱha hawe, a fara banga ḽa Goliada, a ḽi ṱomola kha tshilanda, a mu vhulaha, a tumula ṱhoho yawe nga ḽeneḽo banga. Musi Vhafilista vha tshi vhona uri muhali wavho o fa, vha rembuluwa vha shavha." 
1Samuel17:52 Ndi hone vhanna vha Israele na Juda vha tshi takuwa vha ṱavha mukosi, vha pandamedza Vhafilista vha vha swikisa muṋangoni wa Gathi na khoroni dza Ekroni. Zwitumbu zwavho zwa rambalala na gondo ḽa Shaarimu u vhuya u swika Gathi na Ekroni." 
1Samuel17:53 Musi Vhaisraele vha tshi vhuya u pandamedza Vhafilista, vha ṱangula mishasha yavho." 
1Samuel17:54 Dafita ene a dzhia ṱhoho ya Goliada, a i isa Jerusalema, zwihali zwa Goliada a zwi vhea denndeni yawe." 
1Samuel17:55 Musi Saulo o lavhelesa Dafita a tshi bva a tshi yo ṱangana na uḽa Mufilista, a vhudzisa Abinere ane a vha mulangammbi, a ri, “Abinere, uḽa muṱhannga ndi ṅwana wa nnyi?” Abinere a fhindula a ri, “Thovhele, nga vhutshilo havho, a thi mu ḓivhi.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Khosi ya ri, “Vhudzisani uri muṱhannga uyu ndi ṅwana wa nnyi?”" 
1Samuel17:57 Musi Dafita a tshi vhuya a tshi bva u vhulaha uḽa Mufilista, Abinere a mu dzhia a mu swikisa ha Saulo a tshee o fara ṱhoho ya Mufilista." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṱhannga, ni ṅwana wa nnyi?” Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe ṅwana wa mulanda wavho Isai wa Betlehema.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Musi Dafita o no fhedza u amba na Saulo, Jonathani a vha wa muya muthihi na Dafita, a mu funa unga ene muṋe." 
1Samuel18:2 U bva musi wonoyo Saulo a dzula na Dafita, a si tsha tenda a tshi humela hayani ha khotsi awe." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathani a vhofha mulanga na Dafita nge a vha a tshi mu funa unga ene muṋe. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathani a bvula badzhi ye a vha o ambara, a i ṋea Dafita, khathihi na lupila lwawe na banga ḽawe na vhura hawe na bannda yawe." 
1Samuel18:5 Zwoṱhe zwe Saulo a ruma Dafita uri a zwi ite zwa mu nakela, lwe Saulo a mu ṋea vhuimo vhuhulwane mmbini. Hezwo zwa takadza vhathu vhoṱhe khathihi na magota a Saulo." 
1Samuel18:6 Musi vhanna vha tshi vhuya hayani zwiḽa Dafita o no vhulaha uḽa Mufilista, vhasadzi vha bva miḓini yoṱhe ya Israele u yo ṱanganedza khosi Saulo vha tshi imba vha tshi fhululedza nga dakalo, vha tshi lidza mirumba na mbila," 
1Samuel18:7 vha tshina vha tshi imba vha ri, “Saulo o vhulaha zwigidi, hone Dafita o vhulaha zwigidigidi.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Saulo a tou duga nga mbiti, hezwo ho ngo zwi takalela, a ri, “Dafita hu pfi o vhulaha zwigidigidi, nṋe ndo tou vhulaha zwigidi fhedzi. Ho tou sala uri a nnzhiele vhuhosi!”" 
1Samuel18:9 U bva zwenezwo Saulo a sedza Dafita nga iṱo ḽivhi. 
1Samuel18:10 Nga matshelo uḽa muya muvhi wo ruṅwaho nga Mudzimu wa ḓa wa tou tsikeledza Saulo. O vha a tshi khou vhala-vhala nḓuni yawe, Dafita a tshi khou lidza haripa, sa zwe a vha a tshi ḓi ita. Saulo o vha o fara pfumo," 
1Samuel18:11 a ḽi posa a tshi khou ri, “Ndi ḓo paṱekanya Dafita na luvhondo.” Hone Dafita a mu tinya kavhili." 
1Samuel18:12 Saulo o vha a tshi ofha Dafita ngauri Muṋe washu o vha e nae, ó ṱutshela Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Ngavhuya Saulo a si tsha funa Dafita a tshi dzula nae, zwenezwo a mu ita mulangammbi wa vhanna vha tshigidi, Dafita a ranga mmbi phanḓa dzi tshi bva pfumo." 
1Samuel18:14 Zwoṱhe zwe Dafita a ita zwo vha zwi tshi mu nakela ngauri Muṋe washu o vha e nae. 
1Samuel18:15 Musi Saulo a tshi vhona zwi tshi mu nakela, a thoma u mu ofha." 
1Samuel18:16 Hone vhoṱhe vha Israele na vha Juda vho vha vha tshi funa Dafita ngauri o vha a tshi vha ranga phanḓa vha tshi bva pfumo. 
1Samuel18:17 Saulo a amba na Dafita a ri, “Ṅwananyana wanga muhulwane Mirabu ngoyu. Ndi ḓo ni ṋea ene uri ni mu dzee, tshi re hone ni ntshumele ni sa ofhi, ni lwe nndwa dza Muṋe washu.” Saulo mbiluni yawe o vha a tshi ri, “Nṋe ndi nga si mu vhulahe, nga a vhulawe nga Vhafilista!”" 
1Samuel18:18 Huno Dafita a amba na Saulo a ri, “Nṋe ndi nnyi-vho, vha muṱa wa hashu kana vha mutupo wa khotsi anga ndi vhonnyi kha ḽa Israele, zwine nda nga vha mukwasha wa khosi?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Zwino tshifhinga tshi tshi swika tsha uri Mirabu ṅwananyana wa Saulo a ṋewe Dafita, a vho ṋewa Adriele wa Mihola a vha musadzi wawe." 
1Samuel18:20 Zwino ṅwananyana wa Saulo we a vha a tshi pfi Mikhala o vha a tshi funana na Dafita, nahone vha tshi zwi vhudza Saulo, a zwi takalela," 
1Samuel18:21 a elekanya a ri, “Ndi ḓo mu ṋea ene uri a vhe tshikwekwe tsha u mu fasha uri Vhafilista vha mu vhulahe.” Ndi hone Saulo a tshi amba na Dafita a ri, “Zwino no dovha u wana nḓila ya u vha mukwasha wanga.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Zwino Saulo a laya magota awe a ri, “Ambani na Dafita tshiphirini ni ri, ‘Khosi i a ni takalela, na magota ayo a a ni takalela, zwino tendani u vha mukwasha wayo.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Vhone vha toololela Dafita ayo maipfi. Hone Dafita a ri, “Ni vhona unga ndi mafhungo maṱuku u vha mukwasha wa khosi? Nṋe ndi mushai, a thi ḓivhiwi.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Magota a Saulo a tshi mu vhudza zwe Dafita a amba," 
1Samuel18:25 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Vhudzani Dafita ni ri, ‘Khosi a i ṱoḓi thundu ine na fanela u bvisela muselwa, tshine ya tshi ṱoḓa ndi lukanda lwa phanḓa lwa zwitungulo zwa Vhafilista vha ḓana vhe na vha vhulaha, u ralo hu vhe u lifhedza maswina ayo.’ ” Vhunwa he Saulo a vhu luka ho vha hu ha u vhulahisa Dafita nga Vhafilista." 
1Samuel18:26 Musi magota a tshi vhudza Dafita mafhungo ayo, ene a takalela u vha mukwasha wa khosi. Ḓuvha ḽa munyanya wa mbingano ḽi sa athu swika," 
1Samuel18:27 Dafita na vhahali vhawe vha bva vha yo vhulaha Vhafilista vha 200. Dafita a ḓisa khanda dza phanḓa dza zwitungulo zwavho, a dzi swikisa ha khosi ya vha thakha ya u mala ṅwana wayo. Ndi hone Saulo a tshi mu ṋea ṅwananyana wawe Mikhala a vha musadzi wawe." 
1Samuel18:28 Musi Saulo a tshi zwi vhona uri Muṋe washu u na Dafita na uri ṅwananyana wawe Mikhala u funa Dafita," 
1Samuel18:29 Saulo a vho ṋaṋa u ofha Dafita, a vhuya a fa e swina ḽawe." 
1Samuel18:30 Vhalangammbi vha Vhafilista vha ḓi bva pfumo, misi yoṱhe vha tshi lwa, Dafita zwa mu nakela u fhira magota oṱhe a Saulo, a vha na bvumo." 
1Samuel19:1 Saulo a vhudza ṅwana wawe Jonathani na magota awe oṱhe uri vha vhulahe Dafita. Jonathani a ro vha a tshi funesa Dafita," 
1Samuel19:2 ndi zwe a mu vhudza a ri, “Khotsi anga vha khou ṱoḓa kubuli kwa u ni vhulaha. Matshelo nga matsheloni ni thanye, ni ṱuwe ni yo dzumbama ni ṱwe henefho." 
1Samuel19:3 Nṋe ndi ḓo bva nda yo ima na khotsi anga ḓakani hune na vha hone. Ndi ḓo amba navho nga inwi, nda ni vhudza zwe nda zwi wana.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathani a imelela Dafita a tshi amba na Saulo khotsi awe a vha vhudza a ri, “Thovhele vha songo khakhela mulanda wavho Dafita, hufha ene a songo vha khakhela; zwe a ita zwo tou vha farisa zwihulu." 
1Samuel19:5 O ḓifunga a yo vhulaha uḽa Mufilista, ha vha u kunda huhulu ha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe hu no bva ha Muṋe washu. Na vhone vho zwi vhona vha takala. Zwino ndi mini vha tshi funa u khakhela Dafita nga u sokou mu vhulaha a si na tshe a tshinya?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo a thetshelesa Jonathani, a ana a ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, Dafita a nga si vhulawe.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi vhidza Dafita a mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwe vha amba. A mu isa ha Saulo, Dafita a dzula na Saulo sa kale." 
1Samuel19:8 Ha dovha ha vuwa nndwa, Dafita a bva a yo lwa na Vhafilista. Dafita a vhulaha vhanzhi, lwe vha shavha." 
1Samuel19:9 Huno uḽa muya muvhi we wa ruṅwa nga Muṋe washu wa dovha wa ḓela Saulo o dzula pfamoni yawe o fara pfumo. Musi Dafita a tshi khou lidza haripa," 
1Samuel19:10 Saulo a linga u mu nambatedza kha luvhondo nga pfumo ḽawe, hone Dafita a mu tinya, Saulo a runga luvhondo. Vhusiku honoho Dafita a shavha." 
1Samuel19:11 Saulo a ruma vhanna nḓuni ya Dafita uri vha i linde, vha vuwe vha tshi mu vhulaha nga matsheloni. Huno Mikhala, musadzi wa Dafita, a mu sevha a ri, “Arali vha sa shavha vhusiku ha ṋamusi, matshelo vha ḓo vuwa vho fa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Ndi hone Mikhala a tshi bvisa Dafita nga fasiṱere a tsela fhasi, a shavha ha vha u ponyoka." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikhala a dzhia mudzimu wa zwitungulo a u eḓedza vhulaloni, a u fukedza nguvho, a u ambadza mamvele a mbudzi ṱhohoni." 
1Samuel19:14 Musi Saulo a tshi ruma vhanna uri vha fare Dafita, Mikhala a ri, “Dafita u a lwala.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Hone Saulo a humisa avho vhanna u yo vhona Dafita, a vha vhudza a ri, “Mu hwaleni nga vhulalo hawe ni mu ḓise fhano ndi mu vhulahe.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Hone musi vhanna vha tshi dzhena, vha wana mudzimu wa zwitungulo vhulaloni, ṱhohoni hu na vhukuse ha mbudzi." 
1Samuel19:17 Saulo a vhudzisa Mikhala a ri, “Ndi mini no mphura nga u rali, na nengisa swina ḽanga ḽa ponyoka?” Mikhala a fhindula a ri, “O mmbudza a ri, ‘Nnditsheni ndi ṱuwe, na sa nnditsha ndi ḓo ni vhulaha.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Musi Dafita o no ponyoka, a ya ha Samuele muḓini wa Rama, a mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwe Saulo a mu ita. Ndi hone Dafita na Samuele vha tshi ṱuwa vha yo dzula nḓuni ya vhaporofita." 
1Samuel19:19 Ha swika fhungo kha Saulo ḽa ri, “Dafita u nḓuni ya vhaporofita thungo dza Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Saulo a ruma vhahali uri vha yo fara Dafita. Hone vha vhona tshigwada tsha vhaporofita vha tshi khou porofita, na Samuele o ima henefho e murangaphanḓa wavho, Muya wa Mudzimu a tsela kha vhanna vha Saulo, na vhone vha thoma u porofita." 
1Samuel19:21 Saulo a vhudzwa ayo mafhungo, a dovha a ruma vhaṅwe, na vhone vha thoma u porofita. Saulo a dovha a ruma vhaṅwe lwa vhuraru, na vhone vha thoma u porofita." 
1Samuel19:22 Saulo ene muṋe a fhedza nga u takuwa a livha Rama, a ya tshisimani tshihulu tsha Sekhu, a vhudzisa a ri, “Samuele na Dafita vha ngafhi?” Vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Vha nḓuni ya vhaporofita thungo dza Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ya nḓuni ya vhaporofita kha ḽa Rama. Hone na ene Muya wa Mudzimu a tsela khae, a enda a tshi porofita a vhuya a swika Nayotho." 
1Samuel19:24 Saulo a bvula phuraphura dzawe, a porofita na Samuele a tshi khou zwi pfa. Saulo a lala e fhedzi masiari oṱhe na vhusiku hoṱhe. Ndi zwine murero wa ri, “Saulo na ene o no vha muporofita naa?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Dafita a shavha nḓuni ya vhaporofita kha ḽa Rama a ya ha Jonathani a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndo itani? Ndo tshinyani? Ndo khakhela khotsi aṋu nga mini, zwine vha vho ṱoḓa u mmbulaha?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathani a fhindula a ri, “Na kathihi! Ni nga si fe! Vhonani, khotsi anga vha nga si ite tshithu na tshithihi vha songo ranga u vhudza nṋe. Izwi vha nga nnzumbela hani? A zwo ngo ralo!”" 
1Samuel20:3 Huno Dafita a ana a ri, “Khotsi aṋu vha a zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri inwi ni a ntakalela, nahone vho amba vha ri, ‘Jonathani a songo zwi ḓivha hezwi, a sa ḓo vhaisala.’ Hai nandi, ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, nda dovha nda ana nga vhutshilo haṋu ndi ri, ndo tou ingamela lufu.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Jonathani a amba na Dafita a ri, “Ndi ni itele mini?”" 
1Samuel20:5 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ri, “Vhonani, matshelo ndi vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi muswa, ndo vha ndo fanela u swiṱula na khosi, hone litshani ndi yo dzumbama ḓakani u swika nga madekwana a mbamatshelo." 
1Samuel20:6 Arali khotsi aṋu vha vhona ndi siho, ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Dafita o nkhumbela uri ndi mu tendele a ṱavhanye a ye Betlehema muḓini wa hawe, ngauri vha mutupo wa hawe vhoṱhe vha khou ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha ṅwaha nga ṅwaha henefho.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Arali vha ri, ‘Ndi zwone,’ a zwi nga mmbifheli. Hone arali vha sinyuwa, ni ḓo zwi ḓivha uri vho ḓiimisela u nkhuvhadza." 
1Samuel20:8 A vha inwi, nnyiteleni vhuthu, ngauri no vhofha mulanga na nṋe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Arali ndi na mulandu, mmbulaheni inwi muṋe! Ni nga nkumedza khotsi aṋu hani?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathani a ri, “Na khathihi! Arali nda vhuya nda vha na lusevheḓi lwa uri khotsi anga vha ṱoda u ni vhulaha, ndi ḓo kundwa ngani u ni vhudza?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi ḓo vhudzwa nga nnyi arali khotsi aṋu vha ni fhindula nga vhuhali?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathani a ri, “Iḓani ri bve ri ye ḓakani.” Ndi hone vha tshi ṱuwa vhoṱhe." 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathani a amba na Dafita a ri, “Ngoho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ṱhanzi, vhukumakuma matshelo kana mbamatshelo nga hetshino tshifhinga ndi ḓo vhudzisa khotsi anga. Arali vha tshi ni takalela ndi ḓo swikisa ipfi ha inwi nda ni sevha." 
1Samuel20:13 Hone arali khotsi anga vha tshi ṱoḓa u ni huvhadza, nṋe nda si ni ḓivhise, nda si ni ṋengise, izwo Muṋe washu ngavhe a tshi nṱungufhadza zwihulu. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha na inwi u ḓi nga o vha na khotsi anga." 
1Samuel20:14 Hone inwi ni ḓi nnyitela vhuthu vhu no nga ha Muṋe washu arali ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila, uri ndi si vhulawe," 
1Samuel20:15 nahone ni songo vhuya na litsha u itela muṱa wa hashu vhuthu, na musi Muṋe washu o no lozwa maswina aṋu oṱhe fhano fhasi.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi vhofha mulanga na nnḓu ya Dafita a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi sengisa maswina a Dafita.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathani a ita uri Dafita a dovhe a khwaṱhise muano wawe wa uri u a mu funa, ngauri Jonathani o vha a tshi funa Dafita unga ene muṋe." 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathani a amba na Dafita a ri, “Matshelo ndi ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi muswa. Zwi ḓo vhonala uri a niho ngauri vhudzulo haṋu vhu ḓo vha vhu si na muthu." 
1Samuel20:19 Mbamatshelo ni tsele thungo ya tshipembe ni dzumbame he na dzumbama hone zwiḽa khakhathi iyi i tshi thoma, ni dzumbame nga thulwi ya matombo." 
1Samuel20:20 Nṋe ndi ḓo posa misevhe miraru matungo a iyo thulwi, nda nga ndi khou posa tshipfulwa." 
1Samuel20:21 Nda ḓo konou ruma mushumi wanga nda ri, ‘Iya u dzhia iḽa misevhe.’ Arali nda mu vhudza nda ri, ‘Vhona, misevhe i sia heḽi ḽau, iyo dzhia u i ḓise fhano,’ zwenezwo ni ḓe, ngauri ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri, ni ḓo vha no tshila, hu ḓo vha hu si na tshidini." 
1Samuel20:22 Hone arali nda vhudza uyo mutukana nda ri, ‘Misevhe ngeiḽaa phanḓa hau,’ zwenezwo ni fanela u ṱuwa, ngauri Muṋe washu u ḓo vha a tshi ri ni ṱuwe." 
1Samuel20:23 Zwino mafhungo e nṋe na inwi ra amba, Muṋe washu ndi ṱhanzi vhukati hanga na inwi lini na lini.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi yo dzumbama ḓakani, musi hu tshi swika vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi muswa, khosi ya dzula fhasi uri i ḽe." 
1Samuel20:25 Khosi ya dzula vhudzuloni hayo tsini ha luvhondo. Jonathani a dzula o livhana na khosi, Abinere a dzula tsini na Saulo, hone vhudzulo ha Dafita ha si vhe na muthu." 
1Samuel20:26 Musi uyo Saulo a si ambe tshithu, nge a elekanya a ri, “Dafita u fanela u vha o ṱangana na tshiṅwe tshithu tsha mu kumadza, vhukumakuma o kumala.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Hone nga matshelo, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili ḽa Ṅwedzi, vhudzulo ha Dafita ha dovha ha vhonala vhu si na muthu. Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vhudzisa ṅwana wawe Jonathani a ri, “Ndi mini uḽa ṅwana wa Isai a songo ḓa zwiḽiwani mulovha na ṋamusi?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathani a fhindula a ri, “Dafita o nkhumbela uri ndi mu tendele a ye Betlehema." 
1Samuel20:29 O ri, ‘Litshani ndi ṱuwe ngauri vha muṱa wa hashu vha khou ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo Betlehema, zwino mukomana wanga o ri ndi vhe ndi hone. Arali ni tshi zwi takalela, litshani ndi ṱuwe ndi yo vhona vhakomana vhanga.’ Ndi zwine a si khou swiṱula na thovhele ṋamusi.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Saulo a sinyutshela Jonathani, a mu vhudza a ri, “Ḽishandukwa ḓiwe, mudziamuvhango ndiwe! A thi zwi ḓivhi naa uri u khou ima na uḽa ṅwana wa Isai? U khou ḓishonisa wa shonisa na mme au vhe vha u beba!" 
1Samuel20:31 Ṅwana wa Isai a tshi kha ḓi tshila fhano fhasi, iwe u nga si vhuse shango heḽi. Zwino ruma vhathu vha yo mu dzhia a ḓe fhano, ngauri u fanela u fa!”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathani a vhudzisa khotsi awe a ri, “U felani? O tshinyani?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Hone Saulo a mu posa nga pfumo a tshi ri a mu vhulahe. Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi zwi ḓivha uri khotsi awe vho ḓiimisela u vhulaha Dafita. 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani a takuwa ḓafulani a tshi tou duga nga mbiti, ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ḽa vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi a si ḽe tshithu, nge a vha o dinwa nga zwi shonisaho zwine khotsi awe vha ita Dafita." 
1Samuel20:35 Nga matsheloni Jonathani a bva a ya ḓakani u yo ṱangana na Dafita. O vha e na kutukana," 
1Samuel20:36 a ku vhudza a ri, “Gidimani ni yo dzhia misevhe ine nda i posa.” Musi uyo mutukana a tshi khou gidima a posa musevhe phanḓa hawe." 
1Samuel20:37 Mutukana a tshi swika fhethu he ha wela musevhe wa Jonathani, Jonathani a mu vhidzelela a ri, “Musevhe a uho phanḓa haṋu naa?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Ndi hone a tshi ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Ṱavhanyani! Iyani nga u ṱavhanya! Ni songo ima!” Mutukana a doba uyo musevhe a humela ha muṋe wawe." 
1Samuel20:39 Mutukana o vha a sa ḓivhi tshithu ngazwo, zwo vha zwi tshi ḓivhiwa nga Jonathani na Dafita fhedzi." 
1Samuel20:40 Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi ṋea mutukana zwihali zwawe a ri, “Zwi dzhieni ni ṱuwe ni vhuelele muḓini.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Musi mutukana o no ṱuwa, Dafita a takuwa a tshi bva sia ḽa tshipembe ḽa iḽa thulwi ya matombo, a gwadama, a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha Jonathani kararu. Ndi hone vha tshi kuvhatedzana, vhoṱhe vha tsengisa miṱodzi, hone Dafita a tou lilesa." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathani a amba na Dafita a ri, “Tshimbilani nga mulalo, ngauri ro ana nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu ra ri ri ḓo vha dzikhonani ri tshi ri, ‘Muṋe washu ndi ṱhanzi yanga na inwi, na ya vhaḓuhulu vhanga na vhaṋu lini na lini.’ ” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ṱuwa, Jonathani a vhuelela muḓini." 
1Samuel21:1 Dafita a ya Nobo ha tshifhe Ahimelekhe. Ahimelekhe a mu ṱanganedza a tshi khou tetemela nga nyofho, a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini ni noṱhe? Khezwi ni songo ḓa na muṅwe?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dafita a fhindula tshifhe Ahimelekhe a ri, “Khosi yo nkhwesa maṅwe mafhungo ya mmbudza ya ri, ‘Hu songo vha na ane a ḓivha zwine wa tshimbilela zwone na ndayo dzau.’ Arali vhe vhanna vhane nda vha langa, ndo vha vhudza uri vha ṱangane na nṋe huṅwe fhethu." 
1Samuel21:3 Zwino-ha, vhone vha na mini? Nga vha mphe mikonde miṱanu ya vhurotho kana zwiṅwe-vho zwine vha vha nazwo.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Huno tshifhe a fhindula Dafita a ri, “A thi na vhurotho zwaho, ndi na vhurotho ho sumelwaho Mudzimu fhedzi, ni nga vhu ṋea avho vhanna arali vha songo dzhenisa vhasadzi nḓuni.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Vhukumakuma a ro ngo dzhenisa vhasadzi nḓuni, sa misi musi ndi tshi bva. Zwithu zwa avho vhanna zwi dzula zwi zwikhethwa na musi ro fara lwendo lune lwa si vhe lukhethwa. Zwino ṋamusi-ha zwi nga tou ngani?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Ndi hone tshifhe a tshi mu ṋea vhurotho ho sumelwaho Mudzimu, vhunga ho vha hu si na vhurotho henefho arali vhu si vhurotho ho sumelwaho Mudzimu, ho bviswaho ḓafulani ḽikhethwa ha thivhiwa nga vhurotho vhuswa." 
1Samuel21:7 Zwino muṅwe wa vhashumi vha Saulo o vha e henefho musi wonoyo; o vha o ḓa u khunyeledza pfanelo dzawe dza zwa vhurereleli. Uyo o vha e Doege wa Muedomo, mulisa muhulwane wa Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Dafita a vhudzisa Ahimelekhe a ri, “Vha na pfumo kana banga fhano naa? Nṋe a tho ngo ḓa na banga ḽanga na zwihali zwanga, ngauri khosi yo nthuma nga u ṱavhanya.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Tshifhe a fhindula a ri, “Banga ḽa Goliada wa Mufilista we na mu vhulaha govhani ḽa Ela ḽi fhano, ḽo putelwa nga sila nga murahu ha luvhemba lwa u atha. Arali ni tshi ḽi funa ḽi dzhieni, fhano a hu na banga, ndi ḽeneḽo fhedzi.” Dafita a ri, “A hu na ḽi no nga ḽone, nga vha mphe ḽone.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Musi wonoyo Dafita a shavha Saulo a ya ha Akhishi khosi ya Gathi. 
1Samuel21:11 Magota a Akhishi a mu vhudza a ri, “Uyu a si Dafita khosi ya iḽi shango? A si ene ane vha mu imba vha tshi tshina vha tshi ri, “ ‘Saulo o vhulaha zwigidi, Dafita o vhulaha zwigidigidi’?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Dafita a dzhenisa ayo maipfi mbiluni, a thoma u ofha Akhishi khosi ya Gathi." 
1Samuel21:13 Ndi zwe Dafita a ḓiita unga u a penga musi vhe hone, musi a tshi dzula navho a ḓiita mpengo, a sokou ṅwala-ṅwala mahothi a khoro, a litsha nthe dzi tshi ela na ndebvu dzawe." 
1Samuel21:14 Akhishi a vhudza magota awe a ri, “Vhonani uyu munna! U a penga! Ni mu ḓiselani kha nṋe?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ndi tou shaya mipengo zwine na vho nnḓisela uyu muthu uri a ite nga u rali phanḓa hanga? Munna uyu a nga dzhena pfamoni yanga?” 
1Samuel22:1 Dafita a ṱuwa Gathi a shavhela bakoni ḽa Adulamu. Musi vhakomana vhawe na vha nnḓu ya khotsi awe vha tshi zwi pfa, vha ya khae henefho." 
1Samuel22:2 Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho kandeledzwa kana vhe na milandu kana vha songo rudza mbilu vha kuvhangana khae, ene a vha murangaphanḓa wavho. O vha na vhanna vhane vha nga swika 400." 
1Samuel22:3 U bva henefho Dafita a ya Mitsipha kha ḽa Muaba, a amba na khosi ya Muaba a ri, “Vha nga litsha khotsi anga na mme anga vha ḓa vha dzula navho ndi vhuye ndi ḓivhe zwine Mudzimu a ḓo nnyitela?”" 
1Samuel22:4 Ndi hone a tshi vha sia na khosi ya Muaba, vha dzula nayo misi yoṱhe Dafita a tshee o dzumbama bakoni." 
1Samuel22:5 Huno muporofita Gadi a amba na Dafita a ri, “Ni songo dzula bakoni. Iyani shangoni ḽa Juda.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ṱuwa a ya maṱakani a Herethe." 
1Samuel22:6 Zwino Saulo a zwi pfa uri Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vho wanala. Saulo o vha o dzula fhasi ha muri wa muṱamarisiki, ó fara pfumo, muvhunduni u re Gibia, e na magota awe." 
1Samuel22:7 Saulo a amba navho a ri, “Inwi vhanna vha Benyamini, thetshelesani! Ṅwana wa Isai a nga ni ṋea noṱhe masimu na masimu a minḓirivhe naa? Noṱhe a nga ni ita vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane naa?" 
1Samuel22:8 Kani ndi zwone zwe noṱhe na nnyitela tshimbevha? A hu na na muthihi ane a mmbudza musi ṅwana wanga a tshi vhofha mulanga na ṅwana wa Isai. A hu na na muthihi waṋu ane a mpfela vhuṱungu kana a mmbudza uri ṅwana wanga o ṱuṱuwedza gota ḽanga uri ḽi nndalele, sa zwine a zwi ita ṋamusi.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Hone Doege wa Muedomo o vha o ima henefho na magota a Saulo, a ri, “Ndo vhona ṅwana wa Isai a tshi ḓa kha Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Ahitubu muḓini wa Nobo." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelekhe a mu vhudzisela kha Muṋe washu, a ita na u mu ṋea mbuvha na banga ḽa Goliada wa Mufilista.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhidzisa tshifhe Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Ahitubu na muṱa woṱhe wa khotsi awe, vhe vha vha vhe vhotshifhe henefho Nobo, vhoṱhe vha ḓa ha khosi." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa Ahitubu, zwino thetshelesa.” Ahimelekhe a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone muṋe wanga.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi mini u tshi nnyitela tshimbevha, iwe na ṅwana wa Isai, wa mu ṋea zwiḽiwa na banga wa ita na u mu vhudzisela ha Muṋe washu, a ntshandukela, a nndalela, sa zwine a khou zwi ita ṋamusi?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelekhe a fhindula khosi a ri, “Ndi nnyi wa magota avho oṱhe ane a fulufhedzea unga Dafita mukwasha wa thovhele, muhulwane wa vhane vha vha linda, ane a huliswa nga nnḓu yavho?" 
1Samuel22:15 Kani-ha iḽo ḓuvha ḽo vha ḽi ḽone ḽa u thoma ndi tshi mu vhudzisela ha Mudzimu? A zwo ngo ralo na kathihi! Thovhele vha songo mpomoka kana vha pomoka muṱa wa khotsi anga, ngauri nṋe mafhungo ayo oṱhe a thi a ḓivhi.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Huno khosi ya ri, “Vhukumakuma u ḓo fa iwe Ahimelekhe, iwe na muṱa wa khotsi au woṱhe.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza vhalindi vha re henefho tsini ya ri, “Vhulahani vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu, ngauri na vhone vho ima na Dafita. Vho zwi ḓivha uri u khou shavha, naho zwo ralo vha si ntsevhe.” Hone magota a khosi a vho ngo tenda u angaladza tshanḓa vha vhulaha vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel22:18 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Doege ya ri, “Iwe u vhulahe vhotshifhe havha.” Doege wa Muedomo a mbo vha vhulaha. Ḓuvha heḽo o vhulaha vhanna vha 85 vhe vha vha vho pakata luvhemba lwa lukhaha." 
1Samuel22:19 Saulo a ita na u vhulahisa vhadzulapo vhoṱhe vha muḓi wa Nobo hune ha dzula avho vhotshifhe: vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana na dzitshetshe na kholomo na donngi na nngu. 
1Samuel22:20 Hone Abiathara, ṅwana wa Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Ahitubu, a ponyoka a shavhela ha Dafita." 
1Samuel22:21 Ene a vhudza Dafita uri Saulo o vhulaha vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu. 
1Samuel22:22 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza Abiathara a ri, “Ḽiḽa ḓuvha musi Doege wa Muedomo e hone, ndo zwi ḓivha uri u ḓo vhudza Saulo. Muṱa wa khotsi aṋu u tshi vhulawa woṱhe ndi mulandu wanga." 
1Samuel22:23 Dzulani na nṋe, ni songo ofha tshithu, munna ane a khou ṱoḓa u ni vhulaha u ṱoḓa u vhulaha na nṋe. Ni na nṋe ni ḓo tsireledzea.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Dafita a vhudzwa upfi, “Vhafilista vha khou lwa na vhathu vha Keila nahone vha khou tswa mavhele ane a kha ḓi bva u kaṋiwa.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Dafita a vhudzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ye ndi yo lwa na Vhafilista naa?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Tshimbila u lwe na Vhafilista u lamukise muḓi wa Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Huno vhanna vhe vha vha vhe na Dafita vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Hufha fhano kha ḽa Juda ri tshi ofha. Zwino ri tshi ḓo ya Keila ra lwa na Vhafilista zwi ḓo tou ngani?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Dafita a dovha a vhudzisa Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a mu fhindula a ri, “Tsela Keila; ndi ḓo kumedza Vhafilista zwanḓani zwau.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi ya Keila, vha lwa na Vhafilista, vha dzhia thakha yavho vha ṱuwa nayo. O vhulaha Vhafilista vhanzhi, u ralo ha vha u tshidza vhathu vha Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ndi uri Abiathara ṅwana wa Ahimelekhe a tshi shavhela ha Dafita muḓini wa Keila, o ṱuwa na luvhemba lwa u pakata, lwa u vhudzisa Muṋe washu ngalwo." 
1Samuel23:7 Saulo a vhudzwa upfi Dafita o ya Keila, ene a ri, “Mudzimu o mu kumedza zwanḓani zwanga; Dafita o ḓihoṋela dzhele nge a dzhena muḓini u re na dzigethe na matsimbi.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Saulo a ramba mmbi yawe yoṱhe uri i bve pfumo, i tsele Keila, i govhele Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho." 
1Samuel23:9 Musi Dafita a tshi pfa uri Saulo u khou mu itela tshimbevha, a amba na tshifhe Abiathara a ri, “Nga vha ḓise luvhemba lwa u pakata.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Dafita a ri, “Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, nṋe muḓinḓa wau ndo zwi pfa uri Saulo u khou dzudzanya u ḓa Keila, uri a lozwe uyo muḓi nga mulandu wanga." 
1Samuel23:11 Vhadzulapo vha Keila vha ḓo nkumedza ene naa? Vhukumakuma Saulo u ḓo ḓa sa zwe nda pfa? Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, mmbudze.” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Saulo u ḓo ḓa.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Dafita a dovha a vhudzisa a ri, “Vhadzulapo vha Keila vha ḓo dzhia nṋe na vhanna vhane nda vha navho vha ri kumedza Saulo naa?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Vha ḓo ni kumedza Saulo.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vhane vha nga vha 600 vha tshi ṱuwa Keila vha ḓi fhirela phanḓa vha tshi bva fhano vha tshi dzhena fhano. Musi Saulo a tshi vhudzwa upfi Dafita o shavha Keila, a si tsha mu tevhela." 
1Samuel23:14 Dafita a dzula vhudzumbamoni ha phangani na mivhunduni ya phanga ya Zifi. Saulo a mu ṱoḓa misi yoṱhe, hone Mudzimu a si kumedze Dafita zwanḓani zwa Saulo." 
1Samuel23:15 Musi Dafita e Horeshe phangani ya Zifi, a pfa uri Saulo u khou ḓi ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha." 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathani ṅwana wa Saulo a ya ha Dafita muḓini wa Horeshe a mu khuthadza uri a fulufhele Mudzimu. 
1Samuel23:17 Jonathani a ri, “Ni songo ofha tshithu. Khotsi anga Saulo vha nga si vhuye vha ni ita tshithu. Ni ḓo vha khosi ya Israele, nṋe ndi ḓo tou vha tshanḓa tshaṋu. Na khotsi anga Saulo vha a zwi ḓivha.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Vhuvhili havho vha vhofha mulanga phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Ndi hone Jonathani a tshi humela hayani, Dafita a sala Horeshe." 
1Samuel23:19 Vhaṅwe vhathu vha no bva Zifi vha ya ha Saulo muḓini wa Gibia vha ri, “Dafita o dzumbama shangoni ḽashu ngei Horeshe thavhani ya Hakhila, tshipembe ha soga ḽa Judia." 
1Samuel23:20 Zwino thovhele nga vha ḓe shangoni ḽashu zwenezwo vha tshi zwi takalela, riṋe ri ḓo mu fara ra mu kumedza thovhele.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni shudufhadza nge na nnyitela vhuthu." 
1Samuel23:22 Tshimbilani ni dovhe ni vhe na ngoho. Wanani uri Dafita u anzela u ya ngafhi na uri ndi nnyi we a mu vhona henefho. Ndi pfa upfi ho ngo thanya zwone. 
1Samuel23:23 Wanani hoṱhe hune a dzumbama hone, ni konou vhuya na mafhungo a vhukuma. Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ṱuwa na inwi, arali e shangoni ḽeneḽo, ndi ḓo mu londa kha mitupo yoṱhe ya Juda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ndi hone vha tshi takuwa vha livha Zifi vha ranga Saulo phanḓa. Zwino Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vho vha vhe phangani ya Maoni vhukati ha soga, tshipembe ha phanga ya Judia." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulo na vhanna vhawe vha thoma u ṱoḓa, musi Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a tsela Tomboni, a dzula phangani ya Maoni. Saulo a tshi zwi pfa, a londa Dafita phangani ya Maoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo a vha a tshi khou tshimbila kha ḽino bama, Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vhone vha tshi khou tshimbila kha ḽiḽa, vha tshi tou gidima uri vha shavhe Saulo. Hezwi Saulo na mmbi yawe vha tshi khou govhela Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho uri vha vha fare," 
1Samuel23:27 ha ḓa muḓinḓa ha Saulo a ri, “Nga vha ṱavhanye vha ḓe! Vhafilista vha khou tshoṱhela shango.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Zwenezwo Saulo a litsha u londa Dafita, a yo ṱangana na Vhafilista. Ndi zwine fhethu afho ha pfi Luwa lwa Phandakano." 
1Samuel23:29 Dafita a ṱuwa a gonya vhudzumbamoni ha Engedi a dzula hone. 
1Samuel24:1 Musi Saulo a tshi vhuya u pandamedza Vhafilista a vhudzwa upfi, “Dafita u phangani ya Engedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Saulo a dzhia vhanna vha 3 000 vho tou nangiwa kha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, a bva a yo ṱoḓa Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho tsini ha matombo a Mbudzi dza Ḓaka." 
1Samuel24:3 Saulo a swika mapakoni a u valela nngu tsini ha nḓila, henefho ho vha hu na bako, Saulo a dzhena khaḽo uri a ḓithuse. Matsina Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vho vha vhe bvungwi henefho bakoni ḽeneḽo." 
1Samuel24:4 Vhanna avho vha ri, “Heḽi ndi ḽone ḓuvha ḽiḽa ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi amba zwiḽa a tshi vha vhudza a ri, ‘Swina ḽau ndi ḓo ḽi kumedza zwanḓani zwau wa ita zwine wa funa ngaḽo.’ ” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ḓa nga u tou ṋengeledza, a tshea khuḓa ya phuraphura ya Saulo." 
1Samuel24:5 Ngavhuya luvalo lwa Dafita lwa thoma u mu dina nge a tshea khuḓa ya phuraphura ya Saulo. 
1Samuel24:6 Dafita a amba na vhanna vhe a vha e navho a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a sa tendi ndi tshi ita muṋe wanga zwithu zwa u ralo, hufha e mutiwa wa Muṋe washu. Ndi songo vhuya nda isa tshanḓa khae, ndi mutiwa wa Muṋe washu.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Nga maipfi eneo Dafita a kaidza vhanna vhe a vha e navho, a si vha tendele vha tshi lwa na Saulo. Saulo a ṱuwa afho bakoni a fara nḓila yawe." 
1Samuel24:8 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi bva bakoni, a vhidzelela Saulo a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga!” Saulo a rembuluwa a tshi sedza, Dafita a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a luvha." 
1Samuel24:9 Dafita a vhudzisa Saulo a ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi thetshelesa vhathu vha tshi ri, ‘Dafita u ṱoḓa u vha huvhadza’?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ṋamusi ḽino vho zwi vhona nga avho maṱo zwe Muṋe washu a vha kumedza zwanḓani zwanga ngei bakoni. Ndo vha ndo humbula u vha vhulaha, hone nda litsha u vha vhulaha, nda ri, ‘Ndi nga si ise tshanḓa tshanga kha muṋe wanga, ngauri ndi mutiwa wa Muṋe washu.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Makhulu wanga, nga vha sedze nandi, nga vha sedze tshipiḓa hetshi tsha phuraphura yavho tshe nda tshi fara! Ndo tshea khuḓa ya phuraphura yavho ndi si vha vhulahe. Zwino nga vha pfesese uri nṋe a thi na mulandu wa u vha khakhela kana u vha shandukela. Nṋe a tho ngo vha khakhela, hone vhone vha khou nndonda uri vha mmbulahe." 
1Samuel24:12 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi haṱula a vhona a re na mulandu kha nṋe na vhone. Nahone ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi nndifhedzela zwe vhone vha nkhakhela, hone tshanḓa tshanga tshi nga si vhuye tsha vha kwama." 
1Samuel24:13 Vhunga murero wa vha kale u tshi ri, ‘Vhuvhi vhu itwa nga vhavhi,’ zwenezwo tshanḓa tshanga tshi nga si vhuye tsha vha kwama." 
1Samuel24:14 Khosi ya Israele yo vha i tshi khou londa nnyi? Vha khou pandamedza nnyi? Mmbwa yo faho? Dzedze? 
1Samuel24:15 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha muhaṱuli washu, a vhona a re na mulandu kha riṋe. Ngavhe a tshi sedza mafhungo anga a nndamulela, ngavhe a tshi sumbedza uri a thi na mulandu, nga u mponyokisa zwanḓani zwavho.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Musi Dafita a tshi fhedza u amba, Saulo a ri, “Dafita mukwasha wanga, ndi ipfi ḽaṋu iḽo?” Saulo a vusa tshililo lwe a tou ṱavha mukosi." 
1Samuel24:17 Saulo a ri, “Ni ita zwi re zwone u fhira nṋe. No nnyitela vhuthu, ngeno nṋe ndo ni ita zwo vhifhaho." 
1Samuel24:18 Zwenezwino ni kha ḓi bva u mmbudza zwivhuya zwe na nnyita, Muṋe washu o vha o nkumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu ni si mmbulahe." 
1Samuel24:19 Arali munna a wana a re swina ḽawe, u a mu litsha a ṱuwa a songo mu huvhadza naa? Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni pfufha zwavhuḓi nge na nnyitela vhuthu ṋamusi." 
1Samuel24:20 Vhukumakuma ndi a zwi ḓivha uri ni ḓo vha khosi, na uri muvhuso wa Israele u ḓo khwaṱha nga inwi." 
1Samuel24:21 Zwino nnyaneleni nga Muṋe washu uri a ni nga vhulahi vhaḓuhulu vhanga uri dzina ḽanga na ḽa muṱa wanga ḽi si hangwiwe tshoṱhe.” 
1Samuel24:22 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi anela Saulo. Saulo a humela hayani, hone Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha humela vhudzumbamoni havho." 
1Samuel25:1 Zwino Samuele a dzama, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha kuvhangana, vha mu lila, vha mu swiṱa hayani hawe muḓini wa Rama. Ndi hone Dafita a tshi tsela sogani ḽa Pharani." 
1Samuel25:2 Muṅwe munna wa Maoni o vha e na thundu henefho Kharamele. O vha o pfuma zwihulu, e na zwigidi zwiraru zwa nngu na tshigidi tsha mbudzi. Dzo vha dzi tshi khou vheulwa henefho Kharamele nga hetsho tshifhinga." 
1Samuel25:3 Munna uyo o vha a tshi pfi Nabali, musadzi wawe a tshi pfi Abigaili. Musadzi uyo o vha o ṱalifha nahone o naka, hone munna wawe vhutshilo hawe ho vha vhu tshi konḓa, a sa anḓani na muthu. O vha e Mukhalebe." 
1Samuel25:4 Musi Dafita e henefho phangani, a pfa uri Nabali u khou vheula nngu." 
1Samuel25:5 Ndi hone a tshi ruma vhaṱhannga vha fumi a vha vhudza a ri, “Iyani ha Nabali ngei Kharamele ni mu reshe nga dzina ḽanga." 
1Samuel25:6 Ni tshi swika ni mu vhudze ni ri, ‘Nga vha lalame! Ngavhe vhone na muṱa wavho vha tshi vha na mutakalo. Zwoṱhe zwine zwa vha zwavho zwi vhe na mutakalo!" 
1Samuel25:7 Zwino ndi pfa uri ndi tshifhinga tsha u vheula nngu. Musi vhalisa vhavho vha nngu vhe na riṋe a ro ngo vha dina, misi yoṱhe vhe Kharamele a ho ngo vhuya ha xela na tshithihi tshavho." 
1Samuel25:8 Nga vha vhudzise vhashumi vhavho, vha ḓo vha vhudza. Zwenezwo nga vha ṱanganedze vhaṱhannga vhanga nga vhuthu ngauri ri ḓa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo. Nga vha ṱanganedze avho vhalanda vhavho na nṋe ṅwana wavho Dafita, vha vha ṋee zwine vha vhona.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Vhaḽa vhanna vha no bva ha Dafita vha tshi swika, vha swikisa mafhungo ayo nga dzina ḽa Dafita, vha konou lindela." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali a hambekanya vhaḓinḓa vha Dafita a ri, “Dafita ndi nnyi? Uyo ṅwana wa Isai ndi nnyi? Maḓuvha ano hu na phuli nnzhi dzi no shavha vhaṋe vhadzo." 
1Samuel25:11 Ndi nga kona hani u dzhia zwiḽiwa zwanga na maḓi, na ṋama ye nda ṱhavhela vhavheuli vhanga, nda zwi ṋea vhanna vhane nda si ḓivhe na hune vha bva hone?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Vhaḽa vhanna vha bvaho ha Dafita vha mbo humela hune vha bva hone. Musi vha tshi swika vha mu toololela zwoṱhe. 
1Samuel25:13 Dafita a amba na avho vhanna a ri, “Kungelani zwihali zwaṋu.” Ndi hone vha tshi kungela zwihali zwavho, na Dafita a kungela zwawe. Ha takuwa vhane vha nga vha 400 vha ṱuwa na Dafita, vha 200 vha sala vho linda thundu." 
1Samuel25:14 Muṅwe wa vhashumi a vhudza Abigaili musadzi wa Nabali a ri, “Dafita o ruma vhaḓinḓa vha tshi bva phangani uri vha ḓe vha reshe muṋe washu, hone muṋe washu vho vha hambekanya." 
1Samuel25:15 Vhanna avho riṋe vho ri tonda vhukuma. A vho ngo ri dina, misi yoṱhe ri navho ngei pfuloni a ho ngo vhuya ha xela tshithu." 
1Samuel25:16 Misi yoṱhe ri tshi khou lisa nngu dzashu ri navho vho vha vha tshi tou vha mutsheṱo washu wo ri tsireledzaho vhusiku na masiari. 
1Samuel25:17 Zwino nga vha zwi elekanye, vha vhone uri vha nga itani, ngauri muṋe washu vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi welwa nga khombo, na muṱa wavho woṱhe. Hone ene ha ḓivhalekani, a hu na ane a nga amba nae.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili a si vhuye a fhedza tshifhinga, a mbo ḓi dzhia mikonde ya 200 ya vhurotho na mikumba mivhili ya waini na nngu ṱhanu dzo ṱhaṱhiwaho na khilogiramu dza 17 dza thoro dzo hadzingwaho na khekhe dza ḓana dza mpale wa nḓirivhe na khekhe dza 200 dza mpale wa mahuyu, zwa hweswa dzidonngi." 
1Samuel25:19 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhashumi vhawe a ri, “Fhirani phanḓa, nṋe ndi ḓo ni tevhela.” Hone ayo mafhungo a si a vhudze Nabali munna wawe." 
1Samuel25:20 Musi a tshi khou ḓa o namela donngi yawe a tshi tsa na phara, a tshenuwa ó ṱangana na Dafita na vhanna vhawe vha tshi khou tsela sia ḽawe, a vha ṱanganedza." 
1Samuel25:21 Dafita o vha a tshi kha ḓi bva u ri, “Zwiḽa ndi tshi linda thundu ya uyu munna ngei phangani ha si xele na tshithihi tshawe, zwo vha zwi mahandana fhedzi. Nṋe ndo mu itela zwivhuya ene a nnyita vhuvhi!" 
1Samuel25:22 Muṋe washu nga a nthwe nga maswina anga a dovhe arali ḽi tshi nga dovha ḽa tsha ndo sia muthihi zwawe wa Nabali a re munna.” 
1Samuel25:23 Musi Abigaili a tshi vhona Dafita, a ṱavhanya a tsa kha donngi yawe a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa hawe." 
1Samuel25:24 A wela milenzheni ya Dafita a ri, “Mulandu nga u vhe wanga ndi ndoṱhe, muṋe wanga. Nga vha litshe ndi ambe navho, nga vha thetshelese zwine nda vha vhudza." 
1Samuel25:25 Muṋe wanga vha songo londa zwa houḽa Nabali muthu a sa ḓivhalekani. U tou fana na dzina ḽawe, dzina ḽawe ḽi pfi Tsilu, u dzula a tshi ita zwa vhutsilu. Huno a vha nṋe a tho ngo vhona vhaḓinḓa vhavho vha tshi ḓa." 
1Samuel25:26 Zwino vhunga Muṋe washu o ita uri muṋe wanga vha si shulule malofha, vha si ḓilifhedzele nga zwanḓa zwavho, ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho na nga vhone ndi ri, maswina avho na vhoṱhe vhane vha ṱoḓa u vha huvhadza ngavhe vha tshi nga Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Ngavhe muṋe wanga vha tshi ṱanganedza nduvho iyi ine nda vha ṋea, vha tshi ṋea vhanna vhane vha vha navho." 
1Samuel25:28 Nga vha nkhangwele mulandu wanga, ngauri vhukumakuma Muṋe washu u ḓo vha vhumba khosi, vhone muṋe wanga na vhaḓuhulu vhavho, ngauri vha khou lwa nndwa dza Muṋe washu. Zwenezwo vha songo vhuya vha ovha mulandu vhutshilo havho hoṱhe." 
1Samuel25:29 Arali muṅwe a vha pandamedza uri a vha vhulahe, Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho u ḓo vha tsireledza unga munna a tshi linda nungu ya mutengo muhulu. Hone vhutshilo ha maswina avho u ḓo vhu posa kule unga muthu a tshi posa tombo nga gatho." 
1Samuel25:30 Musi Muṋe washu o no vha ṋea zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a vha fulufhedzisa, o no vha ita murangaphanḓa wa Israele," 
1Samuel25:31 muṋe wanga vha ḓo pfa luvaloni lwavho hu si na muhwalo u lemelaho wa u sokou shulula malofha kana wa u ḓilifhedzela. Nahone musi Muṋe washu o no ita uri zwi vha nakele vha songo nkhangwa nandi.” 
1Samuel25:32 Dafita a amba na Abigaili a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, we a vha ruma ṋamusi uri vha ḓe vha ṱangane na nṋe." 
1Samuel25:33 Ngavhe vha tshi shudufhadzelwa ṱhalukanyo yavho, nge vha ita uri ndi si shulule malofha ṋamusi, ndi si ḓilifhedzele nga zwanḓa zwanga." 
1Samuel25:34 Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a tshilaho, we a ita uri ndi si vha huvhadze, ndi ri, ngavhe vhone vha si ṱavhanye vha ḓa vha ṱangana na nṋe, ḽo vha ḽi tshi ḓo ri ḽi tshi tsha ha vha hu si tshee na na muthihi wa vhanna vha Nabali a tshilaho.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ṱanganedza zwe uyo musadzi a mu ḓisela, a ri, “Nga vha humele hayani nga mulalo. Maipfi avho ndo a pfa, ndi ḓo ita zwe vha nkhumbela.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaili a vhuelela ha Nabali, a wana Nabali e nḓuni a tshi khou ita vhuṱambo vhu no nga ha khosi. O vha o takalesa, o kambeswa. Abigaili a si vhudze Nabali tshithu ḽa vhuya ḽa tsha." 
1Samuel25:37 Zwino nga matsheloni Nabali o no kambuluwa, musadzi wawe a mu vhudza zwithu hezwo zwoṱhe, mbilu yawe ya kundelwa, a tou oma unga tombo." 
1Samuel25:38 Ho no fhela maḓuvha a fumi, Muṋe washu a rwa Nabali a fa." 
1Samuel25:39 Musi Dafita a tshi zwi pfa uri Nabali o fa, a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, o nndifhedzela kha Nabali we a nnyadza. O ita uri ndi si khakhe, a ita uri vhutshinyi ha Nabali vhu mu ḽe ṱhoho.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Abigaili, vha yo mu ambisa." 
1Samuel25:40 Vhashumi vhawe vha ya Kharamele vha swika vha vhudza Abigaili vha ri, “Dafita o ri ruma kha vhone uri ri ḓe ri vha vhinge vha vhe musadzi wawe.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigaili a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a ri, “Ndi fhano, ndo ḓiimisela u ni shumela, nda ṱanzwa milenzhe ya vhaḓinḓa vha muṋe wanga.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaili a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a namela ḓonngi, e na pheletshedzi dzawe ṱhanu, a dzewa nga vhaḓinḓa vha Dafita, a vha musadzi wa Dafita." 
1Samuel25:43 Dafita o vha o no dzea Ahinuamu a no bva Jesriele, zwino a vha e na vhasadzi vhavhili." 
1Samuel25:44 Huno Saulo o vha o dzhia ṅwananyana wawe Mikhala, musadzi wa Dafita, a mu ṋea Phalatiele ṅwana wa Laishi, we a vha a tshi bva Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Vhazifi vha ya ha Saulo muḓini wa Gibia vha ri, “Dafita o dzumbama tshikwarani tsha Hakhila u livhana na soga ḽa Judia.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Saulo a mbo tsela phangani ya Zifi, e na vhanna vha 3 000 vhe a vha nanga kha Vhaisraele, u yo ṱoḓa Dafita henefho." 
1Samuel26:3 Saulo a ṱoka mishasha yawe tsini ha gondo tshikwarani tsha Hakhila u livhana na soga ḽa Judia, hone Dafita o vha a tshi kha ḓi vha henefho phangani. A tshi vhona uri Saulo o mu tevhela henefho," 
1Samuel26:4 a ruma dziṱholi, a pfa uri vhukumakuma Saulo o swika." 
1Samuel26:5 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi takuwa a livha fhethu he Saulo a ṱoka mishasha. Dafita a vhona he ha lala Saulo na Abinere ṅwana wa Nere a re mulangammbi. Saulo o vha o lala ngomu mishashani, o tangwa nga mmbi." 
1Samuel26:6 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudzisa Ahimelekhe wa Muhithi na Abishai ṅwana wa Tseruya, murathu wa Juaba, a ri, “Ndi nnyi ane a ḓo ṱuwa na nṋe ra dzhena mishashani ra ya ha Saulo?” Abishai a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo ya navho.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ndi hone Dafita na Abishai vha tshi ya vhusiku vha swika hune mmbi ya vha hone, vha wana Saulo henefho o lala ngomu mishashani, pfumo ḽawe ḽo ṱhavha fhasi tsini na ṱhoho yawe. Abinere na vhahali vho vha vho lala vho mu tanga." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishai a amba na Dafita a ri, “Ṋamusi Mudzimu o kumedza swina ḽavho zwanḓani zwavho. Zwino nga vha litshe ndi mu runge luthihi fhedzi nga pfumo ḽawe ndi mu nambatedze na fhasi, ndi nga si mu runge luvhili.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Huno Dafita a amba na Abishai a ri, “Ni songo mu vhulaha! Ndi nnyi ane a nga isa tshanḓa kha mutiwa wa Muṋe washu a si ovhe mulandu?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dafita a isa phanḓa a ri, “Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu ndi ri, Muṋe washu Ene muṋe u ḓo mu vhulaha, tshifhinga tshawe tshi nga ḓi swika a dzama kana a ya nndwani a lovha." 
1Samuel26:11 Hone Muṋe washu u a nnzivhisa ndi tshi isa tshanḓa kha mutiwa wawe. Zwine na nga ita dzhiani pfumo na mvuvhelo ya maḓi zwi re tsini na ṱhoho yawe, ri ṱuwe.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi dzhia pfumo na mvuvhelo ya maḓi zwi re tsini na ṱhoho ya Saulo, vha ṱuwa. A hu na we a zwi vhona kana a zwi ḓivha, na we a vhuya a vuwa a hu na. Vhoṱhe vho vha vho fa nga khofhe ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o vha eḓedza khofhe khulu." 
1Samuel26:13 Dafita a wetshela seli na luḽa lwa govha, a ima nṱha ha tshikwara kulenyana, vhukati havho hú na tshikhala tsho aṱamaho." 
1Samuel26:14 Dafita a vhidzelela mmbi na Abinere ṅwana wa Nere a ri, “Abinere, ni ḓo mphindula naa?” Abinere a fhindula a ri, “Ndi iwe nnyi ane wa khou vhidzelela khosi?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dafita a ri, “Inwi ni munna a thi ri? Ane a nga inwi kha ḽa Israele ndi nnyi? Ndi mini ni songo linda khosi muṋe waṋu? Muṅwe muthu o vha o ḓa u lozwa khosi muṋe waṋu." 
1Samuel26:16 Zwe na ita a si zwavhuḓi. Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri, inwi na vhanna vhane na vha navho no fanela u vhulawa, nge na si linde muṋe waṋu mutiwa wa Muṋe washu. Edzonu sedza, pfumo ḽa khosi na mvuvhelo ya maḓi zwe zwa vha zwi dziṱhohoni dzavho zwi ngafhi?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Saulo a ḓivha ipfi ḽa Dafita a ri, “Dafita mukwasha wanga, ndi ipfi ḽaṋu iḽo?” Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, ndi ipfi ḽanga.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Dafita a dovha a ri, “Ndi mini muṋe wanga vha tshi kha ḓi mpandamedza? Ndo itani? Ndo tshinyani?" 
1Samuel26:19 Zwino thovhele nga vha thetshelese maipfi anga. Arali e Muṋe washu we a vha ṱuṱuwedza uri vha lwe na nṋe, khezwi vha sa mu pfumelwi nga nduvho i no nukhelela. Huno arali zwo itwa nga vhathu, nga vha teketelwe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu! Vho nthatha uri ndi si wane mukovhe shangoni ḽa Muṋe washu, vha ri, ‘Ṱuwa u yo shumela midzimu isili.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Zwino vha songo litsha malofha anga a tshi shulutshela fhasi kule na Muṋe washu. Khosi ya Israele yo bva i tshi yo ṱoḓa dzedze zwaḽo, zwa nga muthu a tshi zwima khanga thavhani.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Saulo a fhindula a ri, “Ndo tshinya. Dafita mukwasha wanga, vhuyani! Ndi nga si dovhe nda linga u ni vhulaha, ngauri ṋamusi no vhona vhutshilo hanga vhu ha mutengo muhulu. Vhukumakuma ndo vha tsilu, ndo khakha zwihulu.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Pfumo ḽa thovhele ngeḽi. Nga vha rume muṅwe wa vhaṱhannga vhavho a wetshele ngeno a ḓe a ḽi dzhie." 
1Samuel26:23 Muṋe washu u pfufha muṅwe na muṅwe ane a ita zwi re zwone, a fulufhedzea. Muṋe washu ṋamusi o vha kumedza zwanḓani zwanga, hone a tho ngo kona u isa tshanḓa tshanga kha mutiwa wa Muṋe washu." 
1Samuel26:24 Vhunga ndo litsha u vha vhulaha ṋamusi, ngavhe na nṋe Muṋe washu a tshi ntsireledza nda si fe, a ntshidza khomboni dzoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi amba na Dafita a ri, “Dafita mukwasha wanga, ngavhe ni tshi vha na mashudu, ni ḓo ita zwithu zwihulu, vhukumakuma zwi ḓo ni nakela.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ḓiṱutshela, Saulo a vhuelela hayani." 
1Samuel27:1 Dafita a elekanya a ri, “Muṅwe musi Saulo u ḓo vhuya a mmbulaha. Tsha khwiṋe tshine nda nga ita ndi u shavhela shangoni ḽa Vhafilista. Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ḓo litsha u nṱoḓa kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, nda ḓo konou mu ponyoka.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vha 600 vhe vha vha vhe nae vha tshi ṱuwa vha livha ha Akhishi ṅwana wa Maokho khosi ya Gathi. 
1Samuel27:3 Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha dzula Gathi na Akhishi. Munna muṅwe na muṅwe o vha e na muṱa wawe, na Dafita e na vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili, Ahinuamu a no bva Jesriele na Abigaili a no bva Kharamele, tshilikadzi ya Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Saulo a tshi pfa uri Dafita o shavhela Gathi, a litsha u mu ṱoḓa." 
1Samuel27:5 Dafita a amba na Akhishi a ri, “Arali vha tshi ntakalela, nga vha mphe muṅwe wa miḓi ya kule ndi dzule hone. Nṋe ndi nga dzula hani navho fhano musanda?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Musi wonoyo Akhishi a ṋea Dafita muḓi wa Tsikilaga, u bva zwenezwo wa mbo ḓi vha wa mahosi a Juda." 
1Samuel27:7 Dafita a dzula shangoni ḽa Vhafilista a fhedza ṅwaha na miṅwedzi miṋa. 
1Samuel27:8 Zwino Dafita na vhanna vhawe vha gonya vha yo ṱangula Vhageshuru na Vhagirisi na Vhaamaleke. U bva tsha kale tshakha idzo dzo vha dzi tshi dzula henefho shangoni ḽeneḽo vhukati ha Telamu na Shuru u vhuya u swika Egipita. 
1Samuel27:9 Musi Dafita a tshi tshoṱhela fhethu o vha a tshi vhulaha vhanna na vhasadzi, hone nngu na kholomo na donngi na gamela na zwiambaro o vha a tshi dzhia. Zwo no ralo a humela ha Akhishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Musi Akhishi a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ṋamusi no vha no yo ṱangula ngafhi?” Dafita o vha a tshi fhindula a ri, “Ro vha ro ya u tshoṱhela Negeve kha ḽa Juda,” kana, “Ro vha ro ya u tshoṱhela Negeve kha ḽa Jeramiele,” kana a ri, “Negeve kha ḽa Vhakeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Dafita ho ngo vhuya a litsha u vhulaha munna na muthihi kana musadzi na muthihi a ḓiswa Gathi, nge a humbula a ri, “Vha nga ḓo ri ambulula vha ri, ‘Dafita o ita hezwi.’ ” Dafita o ḓi ita nga u ralo misi yoṱhe a tshi kha ḓi dzula shangoni ḽa Vhafilista." 
1Samuel27:12 Akhishi o vha a tshi fulufhedza Dafita, a elekanya a ri, “O no luṱana tshoṱhe na Vhaisraele vha hawe, u vho ḓo shumela nṋe tshoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Misi yeneyo Vhafilista vha kuvhanganya mmbi dzavho uri vha yo lwa na Vhaisraele. Akhishi a amba na Dafita a ri, “Hafhu inwi na vhanna vhane na vha navho ni ḓo ima na nṋe musi ri tshi bva pfumo.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Vha ḓo zwi vhona nga vhone vhaṋe zwine nda kona u zwi ita.” Akhisi a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, ni ḓo vha mulindi wanga vhutshilo hanga hoṱhe.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Zwino Samuele o vha o no dzama, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha mu lila, vha mu swiṱa muḓini wawe wa Rama. Saulo o vha o thatha vhoṱhe vhabvumbi na mingome afho shangoni." 
1Samuel28:4 Vhafilista vha kuvhangana vha ṱoka mishasha Shuneme, Saulo na ene a ramba Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ṱoka mishasha Gilibua." 
1Samuel28:5 Saulo a tshi vhona mmbi ya Vhafilista, a farwa nga nyofho, mbilu yawe ya ḓala nyofho." 
1Samuel28:6 Saulo a vhudzisa Muṋe washu, hone Muṋe washu a si mu fhindule nga miloro kana nga madeṅwa makhethwa kana nga vhaporofita." 
1Samuel28:7 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vhudza magota awe a ri, “Nngwaneleni musadzi wa mungome, ndi ḓo mu vhudzisa.” Magota awe vha ri, “Ngei Endoro u hone.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi ḓikhakhisa, a ambara zwiṅwe zwiambaro, vhusiku a takuwa na vhanna vhavhili vha ya kha uyo musadzi. Saulo a ri, “Nga vha dzou mmbudzisela kha mimuya vha mmbidzele muya wa munna ane nda mu amba.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Huno uyo musadzi a vhudza Saulo a ri, “Vhukuma ni a ḓivha zwe Saulo a ita. O thatha mingome na vhabvumbi shangoni. Ndi mini ni tshi linga u nthetshela tshikwekwe uri ndi fe?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Saulo a anela uyo musadzi nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri, a vha nga lifhedzwi hezwi.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Ndi hone uyo musadzi a tshi vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi ni vhidzele nnyi?” Ene a ri, “Nga vha ri vhidzele Samuele.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Musi uyo musadzi a tshi vhona Samuele, a ṱavha mukosi a tou zhamba a vhudza Saulo a ri, “No mphurelani? Ndi inwi Saulo!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Khosi ya amba nae ya ri, “Vha songo ofha tshithu. Vha khou vhona mini?” Musadzi a ri, “Ndi khou vhona muya u tshi bva mavuni.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Saulo a vhudzisa a ri, “U fana na mini?” Musadzi a ri, “Hu khou ḓa mukalaha o ambaraho phuraphura.” Saulo a zwi ḓivha uri ndi Samuele, a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a shuvhama." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuele a amba na Saulo a ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi nndina nga u mmbidza?” Saulo a ri, “Ndi khomboni khulu. Vhafilista vha khou lwa na nṋe, nahone Mudzimu o mpfuralela. Ha tsha mphindula nga vhaporofita kana nga miloro. Zwino ndo vhidza vhone uri vha mmbudze zwine nda fanela u zwi ita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samuele a ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi vhudzisa nṋe, nga u vhona Muṋe washu o no ni furalela, o no vha swina ḽaṋu?" 
1Samuel28:17 Muṋe washu o ita zwe a dzula o zwi amba nga mulomo wanga. Muṋe washu o ni dzhiela muvhuso a u ṋea muṅwe wa vhahura vhaṋu ane a vha Dafita. 
1Samuel28:18 Muṋe washu o ni ita izwo ṋamusi nge na mu nyadza a tshi ni laya, na si lozwe Vhaamaleke tshoṱhe na zwoṱhe zwine vha vha nazwo." 
1Samuel28:19 Muṋe washu u ḓo kumedza inwi na Vhaisraele zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista, nahone matshelo inwi na vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka ni ḓo vha ni na nṋe hune nda vha hone. Muṋe washu u ḓo ita na u kumedza mmbi ya Israele zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Kathihi fhedzi Saulo a mbo ḓi wela fhasi a rambalala, o farwa nga nyofho nga zwe Samuele a amba. O vha o kulea nungo nge a vha a songo ḽa tshithu ḓuvha ḽoṱhe na vhusiku." 
1Samuel28:21 Uḽa musadzi a ya kha Saulo, a vhona o farwa nga nyofho khulu, a ri, “Nga vha vhone, ndo vha thetshelesa. Ndo ḓifunga nda ita zwe vha mmbudza." 
1Samuel28:22 Zwino nga vha thetshelese nṋe, vha litshe ndi vha fhe zwiḽiwa vha ḽe, uri vha wane nungo dza u tshimbila vha tshi ṱuwa.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Saulo a hana a ri, “Ndi nga si ḽe.” Hone magota awe vha ima na uyo musadzi vha mu fhembeledza, ene a vha thetshelesa. Saulo a vuwa fhaḽa fhasi he a vha o lala hone, a dzula nṱha ha mmbete." 
1Samuel28:24 Musadzi uyo a ṱavhanya a ṱhavha ṋamana ye a vha o i nonisa henefho hayani. A dzhia vhukhopfu a vhu suka ha ita bwindi, a baga vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa." 
1Samuel28:25 Ndi hone musadzi uyo a tshi dzhia izwo zwiḽiwa a zwi vhea phanḓa ha Saulo na magota awe, vha ḽa. Vhusiku honoho vha vuwa vha ṱuwa." 
1Samuel29:1 Vhafilista vha kuvhanganya mmbi dzavho dzoṱhe Afeke, Vhaisraele vha ṱoka mishasha tsini ha tshisima tshi re Jesriele." 
1Samuel29:2 Musi vhavhusi vha Vhafilista vha tshi khou tshimbila na zwigwada zwavho zwa ḓana na zwa tshigidi, Dafita na vhanna vhawe vho vha vha tshi khou tshimbila murahu vhe na Akhishi." 
1Samuel29:3 Vhalangammbi vha Vhafilista vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhaheberu avha vha khou itani fhano?” Akhishi a fhindula a ri, “Hoyu ndi Dafita we a vha e gota ḽa Saulo khosi ya Israele. O no fhedza ṅwaha na u fhira a tshi dzula na nṋe, nahone tshee a ṱutshela Saulo u swika zwino, a thi athu vhona vhuvhi hawe.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Hone vhalangammbi vha Vhafilista vha mu sinyutshela vha ri, “Munna hoyu nga vha mu humise a vhuelele fhethu he vha mu ṋea hone. A songo ṱuwa na riṋe nndwani, a nga ri shandukela musi nndwa yo ṱangana. A nga pfumedzana na muṋe wawe nga mini arali hu si nga u vhulaha vhanna vhashu?" 
1Samuel29:5 A thi ri uyu ndi ene Dafita ane vha mu imba vha tshi tshina vha tshi ri, “ ‘Saulo o vhulaha zwigidi, Dafita o vhulaha zwigidigidi’?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Ndi hone Akhishi a tshi vhidza Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi ana nga Yahavee a tshilaho ndi ri, no vha muthu a fulufhedzeaho, nahone ndo vha ndi tshi zwi takalela uri ri ṱuwe roṱhe ri ye nndwani. Tshee na ḓa kha nṋe, na ṋamusi, a thi athu vhona tshe na tshinya, hone vhavhusi a vha ni fulufhedzi." 
1Samuel29:7 Humani no rudza mbilu, ni songo ita na tshithihi tshine tsha dina vhavhusi vha Vhafilista.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Huno ndo itani? Vho wana ndo tshinyani tshee nda ḓa khavho u swika zwino? Ndi mini ndi sa yi u lwa na maswina a thovhele muṋe wanga?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akhishi a fhindula a ri, “Ndi a ḓivha uri no vha ni tshi ntakadza unga muruṅwa wa Mudzimu; ndi vhalangammbi vha Vhafilista, vhone vho ri ni songo ya na riṋe nndwani." 
1Samuel29:10 Zwino matshelo ni fhinduwe, inwi na vhalanda vha muṋe waṋu vhe vha ḓa na inwi, ni ṱuwe nga matsheloni mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi fhinduwa nga matsheloni vha humela shangoni ḽa Vhafilista, vhaḽa Vhafilista vha gonya Jesriele." 
1Samuel30:1 Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha swika Tsikilaga nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru. Zwino a wana Vhaamaleke vho ṱangula Negeve na Tsikilaga. Vho vha vho tshoṱhela na muḓi wa Tsikilaga vha u fhisa," 
1Samuel30:2 vha thuba vhasadzi na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe muḓini, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku. A vho ngo vhulaha na muthihi, vho tou thuba vhoṱhe musi vha tshi ṱuwa." 
1Samuel30:3 Musi Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi swika Tsikilaga, vha wana wo fhiswa nga mulilo, vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vho thubiwa." 
1Samuel30:4 Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha lila vha tou ṱavha mukosi u swika vha tshi kulea nungo vha si tsha kona u lila. 
1Samuel30:5 Vhasadzi vha Dafita vhavhili na vhone vho vha vho thubiwa, Ahinuamu a no bva Jesriele na Abigaili, tshilikadzi ya Nabali wa Kharamele." 
1Samuel30:6 Dafita o vha e khomboni khulu ngauri vhanna vhe a vha e navho vho vha vha tshi vho amba ḽa u mu kanḓa nga matombo, nga u dinalea vha tshi humbula vhana vhavho. Hone Dafita a wana nungo kha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe." 
1Samuel30:7 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi amba na tshifhe Abiathara ṅwana wa Ahimelekhe a ri, “Nga vha nnḓisele luvhemba lwa u pakata.” Abiathara a mu ḓisela lwone." 
1Samuel30:8 Dafita a vhudzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi tevhele mmbi iyi? Ndi ḓo i fara?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Vha tevhele. Vhukumakuma u ḓo vha fara wa lamukisa mathubwa.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Dafita na vhanna vha 600 vhe vha vha vhe nae vha swika Pharani ya Besoro, vhaṅwe vha sala hone," 
1Samuel30:10 ngauri vhaṅwe vhanna vha 200 vho vha vho netesa vha sa koni u pfuka phara. Hone Dafita na vhanna vha 400 vha fhirela phanḓa. 
1Samuel30:11 Vha ṱangana na muṅwe Muegipita ḓakani, vha mu ḓisa ha Dafita. Vha mu ṋea zwiḽiwa na maḓi a u nwa," 
1Samuel30:12 vha mu ṋea na tshipiḓa tsha khekhe ya mpale wa mahuyu na khekhe mbili dza mpale wa nḓirivhe. Muthu uyo a ḽa a pfa o dzivhuluwa, ngauri o vha o fhedza maḓuvha mararu na vhusiku hao a songo ḽa zwiḽiwa, a songo nwa maḓi." 
1Samuel30:13 Dafita a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe waṋu ndi nnyi, ni bva ngafhi?” A fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi Muegipita, ndi phuli ya muṅwe Muamaleke. Muṋe wanga o nṱutshela ndi tshi khou lwala, zwino o no vha maḓuvha mararu." 
1Samuel30:14 Ro yo ṱangula Negeve ḽa Vhakherethe na shango ḽa Juda na Negeve ḽa Khalebe, ra fhisa Tsikilaga.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dafita a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni nga ntsumbedza tshigwada itsho tsha vhaṱanguli?” Munna uyo a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha nnyanele zwi tshi pfiwa nga Mudzimu uri a vha nga mmbulahi kana vha nkumedza muṋe wanga, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo vha sumbedza vhone.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Ndi hone a tshi sumbedza Dafita nḓila vha fhirela phanḓa, vha vha wana vho balangana na shango, vha tshi khou ḽa, vha tshi khou nwa, vha tshi khou ḓiphiṋa nge vha vha vhe na zwinzhi zwe vha ṱangula shangoni ḽa Vhafilista na ḽa Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Dafita a lwa navho u bva nga lufhimavhaeni u swika nga ḽa matshelo nga madekwana, ha si vhe na muthihi wavho we a ponyoka, vhe vha shavha ndi vhaṱhannga vha 400 vhe vha namela dzigamela." 
1Samuel30:18 Dafita a dzhiulula zwoṱhe zwe Vhaamaleke vha vha vho dzhia, khathihi na vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili." 
1Samuel30:19 Ho vha hu si na tshi siho. Dafita o dzhiulula zwoṱhe a vhuya nazwo: vhathu vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vhatukana na vhasidzana, zwe zwa vha zwo ṱangulwa na zwiṅwe zwoṱhe zwe vha vha vho dzhia." 
1Samuel30:20 Dafita a dzhiulula masambi oṱhe a nngu na a kholomo, vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha zwi khada zwi phanḓa ha zwiṅwe zwifuwo, vha tshi ri, “Hezwi ndi zwo thubwaho nga Dafita.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi swika fhaḽa kha vhaḽa vhanna vha 200 vhe vha vha vho netesa vha si tsha kona u mu tevhela, vhe vha sala Pharani ya Besoro. Vha ḓa vha ṱanganedza Dafita na vhathu vhe a vha e navho. Musi Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi swika, Dafita a ya a vha resha nga dakalo." 
1Samuel30:22 Hone vhanna vhoṱhe vhavhi na vha sa ḓivhalei kha vhe vha vha vhe na Dafita vha ri, “Ri nga si kovhekane navho zwo ṱangulwaho zwe ra zwi dzhiulula, hufha vha songo ya na riṋe; vha nga tou dzhia vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vha ḓiṱutshele!”" 
1Samuel30:23 Huno Dafita a fhindula a ri, “A si zwone vha hashu, ni songo ita hezwo nga zwe Muṋe washu a ri ṋea. O ri tsireledza, mmbi dze dza lwa na riṋe a dzi kumedza zwanḓani zwashu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ndi nnyi ane a nga pfesesa zwine na amba? Na kathihi! Mukovhe wa vhanna vho salaho na thundu wo fanela u eḓana na wa vhe vha ya nndwani. Vhoṱhe vha ḓo kovhelwa zwi eḓanaho.” 
1Samuel30:25 Izwo Dafita a zwi ita mulayo na ndayo ya Vhaisraele u bva musi wonoyo, na ṋamusi."
