1Samuel30:26 Musi Dafita a tshi swika Tsikilaga, zwiṅwe zwe zwa ṱangulwa a zwi rumela ha vhahulwane vha Juda, vhe vha vha vhe khonani dzawe, a ri, “Tshifhiwa tshaṋu ngetsho tshi no bva kha zwe ra ṱangula maswina a Muṋe washu.”" 
1Samuel30:27 A zwi isa kha vha Bethele na Ramotho Negeve na Jathiri," 
1Samuel30:28 na kha vha Aruere na Sifimotho na Eshthemua," 
1Samuel30:29 na Rakhala, na ḓorobo dza Vhajeramiele na Vhakeni," 
1Samuel30:30 na vha re Horoma na Khorashani na Athakha 
1Samuel30:31 na Hebroni, na kha vha re huṅwe hoṱhe he Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha vhuya vha tendeleka hone." 
1Samuel31:1 Vhafilista vha lwa na Vhaisraele, ha shavha Vhaisraele, ha vhulawa vhanzhi henefho thavhani dza Gilibua." 
1Samuel31:2 Vhafilista vha pandamedza Saulo na vhana vhawe, vha vhulaha vhana vhawe Jonathani na Abinadaba na Malakhishua," 
1Samuel31:3 nndwa ya hulela he Saulo a vha e hone, a pfulwa nga musevhe wa maswina a huvhala nga maanḓa." 
1Samuel31:4 Saulo a amba na o mu hwalelaho zwihali a ri, “Ṱomola banga ḽau u mmbulahe, mashuvhuru aya a sa ḓo ḓa a mmbulaha nga nḓila i shonisaho.” Hone muhwali wa zwihali zwawe a hana nga mulandu wa nyofho. Ndi hone Saulo a tshi dzhia banga ḽawe a wela nṱha haḽo." 
1Samuel31:5 Muhwali wa zwihali a tshi vhona uri Saulo o fa, na ene a wela nṱha ha banga ḽawe a fa nae." 
1Samuel31:6 Ngauralo ho fa Saulo na vhana vhawe vhararu na muhwali wa zwihali zwawe na vhanna vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho musi wonoyo muthihi. 
1Samuel31:7 Musi Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe seli ha govha ḽa Jesriele na seli ha Jorodani vha tshi vhona uri mmbi ya Vhaisraele yo shavha na uri Saulo na vhana vhawe vho fa, vha ṱutshela miḓi yavho vha shavha. Vhafilista vha ḓa vha dzula khayo." 
1Samuel31:8 Nga matshelo Vhafilista vha tshi ḓa u ṱangula zwitumbu, vha wana Saulo na vhana vhawe vhararu vho rambalala thavhani dza Gilibua." 
1Samuel31:9 Vha tumula ṱhoho ya Saulo, vha mu bvula tshiambaro tsha nndwa, vha ruma vhaḓinḓa shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhafilista uri vha ḓivhadze ayo mafhungo thembeleni ya midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso na kha vhathu vha havho." 
1Samuel31:10 Vha dzhia tshiambaro tsha Saulo tsha nndwa vha tshi vhea thembeleni ya Ashtharotho mudzimu wa musadzi, tshitumbu tshawe vha tshi ombela kha mutsheṱo wa muḓi wa Bethe Shiani." 
1Samuel31:11 Musi vhathu vha Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi vha tshi pfa zwe Vhafilista vha ita Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 vhanna vha havho vhoṱhe vha re na vhuhali vha lala vha tshi tshimbila vhusiku vha tshi ya Bethe Shiani. Vha tsitsa tshitumbu tsha Saulo na zwa vhana vhawe afho luvhondoni lwa Bethe Shiani, vha humela Jabeshe, vha zwi fhisela hone." 
1Samuel31:13 Vha konou dzhia marambo avho vha a swiṱa fhasi ha muri wa muṱamarisiki henefho Jabeshe, vha ḓidzima zwiḽiwa vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
2Samuel1:1 Saulo ó no dzama, Dafita a vhuya a tshi bva u kunda Vhaamaleke, a dzula Tsikilaga maḓuvha mavhili." 
2Samuel1:2 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ha swika munna a tshi bva mishashani ya Saulo, zwiambaro zwawe zwo kherukana, ṱhohoni yawe o shela mavu. Musi a tshi swika ha Dafita a wa nga magona a luvha." 
2Samuel1:3 Dafita a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni bva ngafhi?” Munna uyo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi muthu we nda ponyoka mishashani ya Vhaisraele.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Ho itea mini? Mmbudzeni.” Munna uyo a fhindula a ri, “Vhanna vho shavha nndwani. Ho vhulawa vhanzhi. Na Saulo na ṅwana wawe Jonathani vho fa.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudzisa uyo muṱhannga we a swikisa ayo mafhungo a ri, “Ni ḓivha hani uri Saulo na ṅwana wawe Jonathani vho fa?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Muṱhannga uyo a fhindula a ri, “Ndo sokou tshenuwa ndi thavhani dza Gilibua, na Saulo e henefho o gogoḓela pfumo ḽawe, nda vhona dzigariki na vhanameli vhadzo vha tshi khou mu tanga." 
2Samuel1:7 A rembuluwa a mmbona, a mmbidzelela, nṋe nda ri, ‘Ndi fhano muṋe wanga!’" 
2Samuel1:8 Saulo a mmbudzisa a ri, ‘Ndi iwe nnyi?’ Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, ‘Ndi Muamaleke.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Ndi hone tshi mmbudza a ri, ‘Iḓani ni mbo ḓi nkhokhovhedza! Ndi kha ḓi tshila, hone ndo huvhala nga maanḓa.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi sendela tsini hawe nda mu vhulaha, ngauri ndo vha ndi tshi zwi ḓivha uri unga o no rambalala a nga si tsha tshila. Nda dzhia khare ya vhuhosi ye a vha o i ambara ṱhohoni na lukunda lwe a vha o lu ambara tshishashani, zwino ndo zwi ḓisa fhano ha vhothovhele.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vha tshi dzhia zwiambaro zwavho vha zwi kherukanya. 
2Samuel1:12 Vha ṱungufhala, vha lilela Saulo na ṅwana wawe Jonathani na mmbi ya Muṋe washu na vhathu vha Israele, nge avho vha vha vho fa nndwani. Vha lila ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela." 
2Samuel1:13 Dafita a vhudzisa uyo muṱhannga we a swikisa ayo mafhungo a ri, “Ni wa ngafhi?” Muṱhannga uyo a fhindula a ri, “A thi mupo wa shango, ndi ṅwana wa Muamaleke.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dafita a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini ni songo ofha u angaladza tshanḓa na vhulaha mutiwa wa Muṋe washu?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhidza muṅwe wa vhanna vhe a vha e navho a ri, “Iḓani ni mu vhulahe!” Munna uyo a mbo ḓi mu vhulaha." 
2Samuel1:16 Ndi uri Dafita o vha o vhudza Muamaleke a ri, “Malofha aṋu nga a vhe nṱha ha ṱhoho yaṋu. Mulomo waṋu ndi wone we wa ṱanzilela musi ni tshi ri, ‘Ndo vhulaha mutiwa wa Yahavee.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Dafita a imba luimbo lwa u lilela Saulo na Jonathani," 
2Samuel1:18 a ṋea ndaela ya uri luimbo ulwo lwa vhura lu funzwe vhathu vha Juda. Lwo ṅwalwa na Buguni ya A si na Vhufhura. Lu ri," 
2Samuel1:19 “Hee Israele, vhugala hau ho rambalala mivhunduni yau, vhahali vho ḽiwa nga pfumo!" 
2Samuel1:20 Ni songo zwi amba Gathi, ni songo zwi ḓivhadza mikotoni ya Ashkeloni, vhananyana vha Vhafilista vha sa ḓo pembela, vhasadzi vha mashuvhuru vha sa ḓo fhululedza." 
2Samuel1:21 “Inwi thavha dza Gilibua, ngavhe ni tshi teketelwa! Hu songo tsha wa ṅwando, hu songo tsha na mvula kha inwi, hu songo tsha mela thoro ya nduvho! Henefho ho kumala tshiṱangu tsha vhahali! Tshiṱangu tsha Saulo a tshi tsha ḓodzwa mapfura." 
2Samuel1:22 Vhura ha Jonathani ho vha vhu sa humi malofhani a vho vhulawaho, ṋamani ya vhahali, pfumo ḽa Saulo ḽo vha ḽi sa vhuyi fhedzi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Saulo na Jonathani, vha tshi kha ḓi tshila vho vha vha tshi funwa hani, vha tshi takalelwa hani! Na lufuni a vho ngo fhandekana. Vho vha vhe na luvhilo u fhira magoni, vhe na maanḓa u fhira ndau." 
2Samuel1:24 “Inwi vhananyana vha Israele, lilelani Saulo, ndi ene we a ni ambadza dza muridili, dza maṱeleṱele, a nakisa zwiambaro zwaṋu nga musuku." 
2Samuel1:25 “Vhahali vho ḽiwa nga pfumo! Jonathani o rambalala mivhunduni yau! 
2Samuel1:26 “Jonathani mukomana wanga, zwi vhavha hani wee! Vhukonani hashu ho vha vhu tshi ḓifha hani! U funana hashu ho vha hu tshi tou kanukisa, hu tshi takadza u fhira lufuno lwa vhasadzi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Vhahali vho ḽiwa nga pfumo! Zwihali zwa nndwa zwo lovha!” 
2Samuel2:1 Ngavhuya Dafita a vhudzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi gonye ndi ye kha muṅwe wa miḓi ya Juda?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ee, tshimbila.” Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi ye ngafhi?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Iya Hebroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ya Hebroni e na vhasadzi vhawe vhavhili, Ahinuamu wa Jesriele na Abigaili, tshilikadzi ya Nabali wa Kharamele." 
2Samuel2:3 Dafita a dzhia na vhanna vhe a vha e navho, muṅwe na muṅwe e na muṱa wawe, vha yo dzula Hebroni na miḓini yaho." 
2Samuel2:4 Ndi hone vhanna vha Juda vha tshi ḓa Hebroni, henefho vha vhumba Dafita khosi ya tsinde ḽa Juda. Musi Dafita a tshi zwi pfa uri vhanna vho swiṱaho Saulo ndi vha Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi," 
2Samuel2:5 a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya khavho vha pfi vha vha vhudze vha ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni shudufhadza nge muṋe waṋu Saulo na mu ita nga vhuthu nga u mu swiṱa." 
2Samuel2:6 Ngavhe Muṋe washu zwino a tshi ni ita-vho nga vhuthu a ni sumbedza u fulufhedzea hawe. Na nṋe ndi ḓo ni tonda nge na ita zwenezwo. 
2Samuel2:7 Zwino-ha, ivhani na nungo na tshivhindi, ngauri muṋe waṋu Saulo o dzama, nahone vha tsinde ḽa Juda vho vhumba nṋe khosi uri ndi vha vhuse.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Mulangammbi ya Saulo, Abinere ṅwana wa Nere, o vha o dzhia Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo a mu isa Mahanaimi," 
2Samuel2:9 a mu vhumba khosi ya Giliadi na Ashere na Jesriele na Efraimi na Benyamini na ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele. 
2Samuel2:10 Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo o vha e na miṅwaha ya 40 musi a tshi vhumbwa khosi ya Israele, a vhusa a fhedza miṅwaha mivhili. Naho zwo ralo tsinde ḽa Juda ḽa ḓi vhuswa nga Dafita." 
2Samuel2:11 Dafita o vhusa tsinde ḽa Juda e Hebroni a fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili na hafu. 
2Samuel2:12 Abinere ṅwana wa Nere, khathihi na vhanna vha Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo, vha ṱuwa Mahanaimi vha ya muḓini wa Gibioni." 
2Samuel2:13 Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya na vhanna vhe vha vha vhe na Dafita vha bva vha yo ṱanganedzana navho ishani ḽa Gibioni. Tshiṅwe tshigwada tsha dzula fhasi sia ḽiṅwe ḽa isha tshiṅwe tsha dzula kha ḽiṅwe sia. 
2Samuel2:14 Abinere a amba na Juaba a ri, “Nga ri wane vhaṅwe vhaṱhannga vha masia oṱhe vha takuwe vha ṱaṱisane nga u lwa phanḓa hashu.” Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ndi hone vha tshi takuwa vha vhaliwa, vha 12 vha sia ḽa Benyamini na Ishbaali na vha 12 vha sia ḽa Dafita." 
2Samuel2:16 Hone muṅwe na muṅwe a fara swina ḽawe nga ṱhoho, a ḽi ṱhavha lurumbu nga banga, vha wa mafhuri. Ndi zwe afho fhethu tsini ha Gibioni ha pfi Fhethu ha Mapanga." 
2Samuel2:17 Nndwa uyo musi ya mbo ṱangana i tshi ofhisa, Abinere na vhanna vha Israele vha kundwa nga vhanna vha Dafita." 
2Samuel2:18 Vhana vhararu vha Tseruya vho vha vhe henefho: ndi Juaba na Abishai na Asaele. Asaele o vha e na luvhilo lu no nga lwa phala; 
2Samuel2:19 a thoma u pandamedza Abinere a sa mu humeli. 
2Samuel2:20 Abinere a sedza murahu a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi inwi Asaele?” Asaele a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe!”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abinere a mu vhudza a ri, “Litshani u mpandamedza! Farani ḽiṅwe buḓo, ni pandamedze muṅwe wa vhaṱhannga ni mu ṱangule zwihali zwawe.” Hone Asaele a si mu humele." 
2Samuel2:22 Abinere a dovha a vhudza Asaele a ri, “Litshani u mpandamedza! Ndi mini ni tshi nkombetshedza u ni vhulaha? Ndi ḓo dovha nda livhana hani zwifhaṱuwo na mukomana waṋu Juaba?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Hone Asaele a si mu humele. Zwenezwo Abinere a posa pfumo ḽawe murahu ḽa runga Asaele kha thumbu ḽa phuletshedza muṱanani. Asaele a wela fhasi a mbo ḓi fela henefho. Munna muṅwe na muṅwe a ima musi a tshi swika fhethu he Asaele a wela hone a fa. 
2Samuel2:24 Hone Juaba na Abishai vha pandamedza Abinere, ḽa vhuya ḽa ṱoḓa u kovhela, vha swika muvhunduni wa Ama, tsini ha Gia nḓilani i yaho phangani ya Gibioni." 
2Samuel2:25 Ndi hone vhanna vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vha tshi mona Abinere nga murahu vha mu tanga. Vho ḓiita tshigwada vha ima muṱumbani wa muvhundu. 
2Samuel2:26 Abinere a vhidzelela Juaba a ri, “Nndwa yashu a i fheli naa? A ni vhoni uri izwi zwi ḓo fhedza nga u ṱungufhadza naa? Khezwi ni sa vhudzi vhanna vhaṋu uri vha humele vhakomana vhavho?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Nga Mudzimu a tshilaho, ngavhe ni si luṱanye vhanna nga zwiḽa zwe na amba, vhanna avha vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vho no humela vharathu vhavho nga matsheloni.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi lidza phalaphala, vhanna vhoṱhe vha litsha u pandamedza Israele, nndwa ya fhela." 
2Samuel2:29 Abinere na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha lala vha tshi tshimbila vhusiku honoho hoṱhe vha buḓa govha ḽa Jorodani. Vha wela Jorodani vha tshimbila na phara yoṱhe ya Bithironi vha vhuya vha swika Mahanaimi. 
2Samuel2:30 Juaba a vhuya a tshi bva u pandamedza Abinere, a kuvhanganya vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe, hu tshi vhaliwa vhahali vha Dafita ha wanala uri ho ṱahela vhanna vha 19, hu sa vhalwi Asaele." 
2Samuel2:31 Hone vhanna vha Dafita vho vha vho vhulaha vhanna vha 360 vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vhe vha vha vhe na Abinere. 
2Samuel2:32 Vha dzhia Asaele vha mu swiṱa tshaloni tsha khotsi awe tshi re Betlehema. Ndi hone Juaba na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi tshimbila vhusiku hoṱhe, vha swika Hebroni ḽi tshi tsha." 
2Samuel3:1 Nnḓu ya Saulo na ya Dafita dzo fhedza tshifhinga tshilapfu dzi tshi khou lwa, ya Dafita ya ḓi wana maanḓa i tshi ya, ngeno ya Saulo i tshi ḓi fhungudzea i tshi ya." 
2Samuel3:2 Vhana vha Dafita vha vhatuka vhe vha bebwa Hebroni ngevha: Tanzhe ndi Amunoni ṅwana wa Ahinuamu wa Jesriele; 
2Samuel3:3 wa vhuvhili ndi Khiliaba ṅwana wa Abigaili tshilikadzi ya Nabali wa Kharamele; wa vhuraru ndi Abisalomo ṅwana wa Maakha ṅwananyana wa Thalamai khosi ya Geshuru; 
2Samuel3:4 wa vhuṋa ndi Adonia ṅwana wa Hagithi; wa vhuṱanu ndi Shefatia ṅwana wa Abitala; 
2Samuel3:5 wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi ndi Ithiriamu ṅwana wa mufumakadzi wa Dafita a no pfi Egila. Vhoṱhe havho vho bebelwa Dafita a tshee Hebroni. 
2Samuel3:6 Misi vha nnḓu ya Saulo na ya Dafita vha tshi kha ḓi lwa, maanḓa a Abinere o ḓi hula a tshi ya nḓuni ya Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Zwino Saulo o vha e na musadzi wa phuli we a vha a tshi pfi Ritsipha ṅwananyana wa Aya. Ishbaali a vhudzisa Abinere a ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi dzhenisa musadzi wa khotsi anga wa phuli nḓuni?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abinere a sinyuwa zwihulu a tshi pfa zwe Ishbaali a amba, a fhindula a ri, “Ni vhona unga nṋe ndi tou vha mmbwa yo lalelaho, ine ya ima na Juda? U swika ṋamusi ndo ḓi vha a fulufhedzeaho kha nnḓu ya khotsi aṋu Saulo na kha muṱa wavho na khonani dzavho. A tho ngo vhuya nda ni kumedza zwanḓani zwa Dafita. Zwino inwi ni vho ntsengisela zwe nda khakha zwanga na uyu musadzi!" 
2Samuel3:9 Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi nthwa a dovha arali nda sa itela Dafita zwe Muṋe washu a mu fulufhedzisa nga muano," 
2Samuel3:10 nda dzhia muvhuso kha nnḓu ya Saulo nda imisa khuluṋoni ya Dafita uri a vhuse Israele na Juda u bva Dani u vhuya u swika Bierisheba.” 
2Samuel3:11 Ishbaali a si tsha vhuya a fhindula Abinere ḽiṅwe ipfi, nge a vha a tshi mu ofha." 
2Samuel3:12 Ndi hone Abinere a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Dafita uri vha swike vha ri, “Shango iḽi ndi ḽa nnyi? Vhone nga vha vhofhe mulanga na nṋe, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ima navho, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha luvha vhone.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Dafita a ri, “Ndi zwone. Nṋe ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga navho. Hone hu na tshithu tshithihi tshine nda tshi ṱoḓa kha vhone. Vha songo vhuya vha ḓa maṱoni anga arali vha sa ḓi na Mikhala ṅwananyana wa Saulo musi vha tshi ḓa u mmbona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo uri vha swike vha ri, “Vhuisani mufumakadzi wanga Mikhala, ndo mu mala nga khanda dza zwitungulo zwa Vhafilista vha ḓana.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ndi hone Ishbaali a tshi ṋea ndaela a ita uri Mikhala a dzhiwe kha munna wawe Phalatiele ṅwana wa Laishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Munna wawe a mu tevhela a tshi khou lila u vhuya u swika Bahurimu. Abinere a mu vhudza a ri, “Humela hayani!” A konou huma." 
2Samuel3:17 Abinere a amba na vhahulwane vha Israele a ri, “Ndi kale ni tshi tama u vhumba Dafita khosi uri a ni vhuse." 
2Samuel3:18 Zwino zwi iteni-ha! Muṋe washu o fulufhedzisa Dafita a ri, ‘Ndi ḓo lamulela vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista nga muḓinḓa wanga Dafita, nda vha lamulela na zwanḓani zwa maswina avho oṱhe.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abinere a dovha a amba na tsinde ḽa Benyamini nga tsha vhukoma, a konou ya Hebroni u yo vhudza Dafita zwoṱhe zwine Vhaisraele na vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vha zwi takalela." 
2Samuel3:20 Musi Abinere na vhanna vha 20 vhe a vha e navho vha tshi swika ha Dafita muḓini wa Hebroni, Dafita a vha itela vhuṱambo." 
2Samuel3:21 Ndi hone Abinere a tshi amba na Dafita a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, nga vha litshe ndi mbo ḓi ṱuwa ndi yo kuvhanganya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vha vhofhe mulanga navho, vha vhuse shango ḽoṱhe nga hune mbilu yavho ya funa.” Dafita a ri Abinere a ṱuwe, a tshimbila nga mulalo." 
2Samuel3:22 Matsina zwenezwo vhanna vha Dafita na Juaba vha vha vha tshi khou vhuya vha tshi bva u ṱangula maswina, vha vhuya na thundu nnzhi ye vha thuba, vha wana Abinere a si tsheeho Hebroni ha Dafita, ngauri Dafita o vha o tenda uri a ṱuwe, a ṱuwa nga mulalo." 
2Samuel3:23 Juaba na vhahali vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha tshi swika, a pfa upfi Abinere ṅwana wa Nere o vha o ḓa ha khosi na uri khosi yo ri a ṱuwe zwawe, a ṱuwa nga mulalo." 
2Samuel3:24 Juaba a livha ha khosi a swika a ri, “Vho ita zwithu-ḓe? Nga vha dzou vhona, Abinere o ḓa khavho. Ndi mini vho mu litsha a ṱuwa? Zwino o ṱuwa!" 
2Samuel3:25 Abinere ṅwana wa Nere vha a mu ḓivha, o vha o ḓa u vha fhura na u vha ṱolola hune vha tshimbilela hone na u ḓivha zwoṱhe zwine vha ita.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Juaba a ṱutshela Dafita, a ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha londe Abinere, vha mu wana bidzini ḽa Sira vha vhuelela nae. Hone Dafita o vha a sa zwi ḓivhi." 
2Samuel3:27 Zwino musi Abinere a tshi vhuelela Hebroni, Juaba a mu isa thungo e eṱhe khoroni, a nga u khou ṱoḓa u amba nae tshiphiri, a mbo runga Abinere thumbu, a fa. Nga u ralo Juaba o lifhedzela malofha a murathu wawe Asaele." 
2Samuel3:28 Ngavhuya, musi Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a ri, “Muṋe washu u a zwi ḓivha uri nṋe na muvhuso wanga a ri na mulandu na kathihi kha malofha a Abinere ṅwana wa Nere." 
2Samuel3:29 Ngavhe malofha awe a tshi wela ṱhohoni ya Juaba na kha nnḓu yoṱhe ya khotsi awe! Ngavhe nḓuni ya Juaba hu tshi dzula hu na muṅwe ane a lwala phophela kana vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu ofhisaho kana tshihole tshi tshimbilaho nga mugo kana a vhulawa nndwani kana a fa nga nḓala.” 
2Samuel3:30 Ndi uri Juaba na murathu wawe Abishai vho vhulaha Abinere nge a vhulaha murathu wavho Asaele nndwani Gibioni. 
2Samuel3:31 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza Juaba na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho a ri, “Kherukanyani zwiambaro zwaṋu ni ambare madzanganda, ni tshimbile no ṱungufhala phanḓa ha Abinere.” Khosi Dafita ene muṋe a tshimbila murahu ha bogisi ḽa mufu." 
2Samuel3:32 Vha swiṱa Abinere Hebroni, khosi ya lila ya tou ṱavha mukosi tshaloni tsha Abinere. Vhathu vhoṱhe na vhone vha lila." 
2Samuel3:33 Khosi Dafita a imbela Abinere luimbo lwa tshililo a ri, “Abinere o vha o fanela u fa lufu lu nyadzeaho naa?" 
2Samuel3:34 Zwanḓa zwaṋu zwo vha zwi songo vhofhiwa, ṋayo dzaṋu dzo vha dzi songo vhoxwa nga geḓane. No fa unga muthu a tshi vhulawa nga maviavhathu.” Vhathu vhoṱhe vha dovha u mu lilela." 
2Samuel3:35 Ndi hone vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓa vha khuthadza Dafita uri a ḽe hu tshi kha ḓi vha masiari, hone Dafita a ana a ri, “Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi nthwa a dovha arali nda thetshela vhurotho kana tshiṅwe tshithu zwatsho ḽi sa athu kovhela!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha zwi vhona, vha takala, vhukuma zwoṱhe zwe khosi ya ita zwo vha takadza." 
2Samuel3:37 Musi wonoyo vhathu vhoṱhe na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha zwi ḓivha uri khosi a yo ngo longa tshanḓa kha u vhulawa ha Abinere ṅwana wa Nere. 
2Samuel3:38 Ndi hone khosi i tshi amba na vhanna vhayo ya ri, “A ni zwi vhoni uri ṋamusi ho fa murangaphanḓa, ene munna muhulu kha ḽa Israele naa?" 
2Samuel3:39 Nahone ṋamusi, naho ndo vhumbwa khosi, ndi pfa ndi si na nungo, vhana havha vha Tseruya ndi nga si vha kone. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi lifhedza vhavhi havha nga he zwa fanela.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Musi Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo a tshi pfa uri Abinere o fela Hebroni, a kulea nungo, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe zwa vha akhamadza." 
2Samuel4:2 Zwino ṅwana wa Saulo o vha e na vhanna vhavhili vhe vha vha vhe vhalangagomane. Muṅwe o vha a tshi pfi Baana, muṅwe a tshi pfi Rekhaba, vho vha vhe vhanna vha Rimoni wa tsinde ḽa Benyamini, a no bva Bierotho. Bierotho ho vha hu tshi kha ḓi vha tshipiḓa tsha shango ḽa Benyamini" 
2Samuel4:3 nge vhathu vha Bierotho vha shavhela Githaimi, vha ḓi dzula henefho vhe ṱhunḓu, na ṋamusi." 
2Samuel4:4 Jonathani ṅwana wa Saulo o vha e na ṅwana wa mutuka we a vha e tshihole tsha ṋayo dzoṱhe vhuvhili hadzo. Musi mafhungo a lufu lwa Saulo na Jonathani a tshi pfala a tshi bva Jesriele, ene o vha e na miṅwaha miṱanu. Muleli wawe o mu doba a shavha nae, a shavha a tshi tou gidima lwe a mu wisa a holefhala. Ṅwana uyo o vha a tshi pfi Miribaali." 
2Samuel4:5 Zwino Rekhaba na Baana, vhana vha Rimoni wa Bierotho, vha takuwa vha livha muṱani wa Ishbaali vha swika masiari tshivhangalala, vha wana o kuvhama." 
2Samuel4:6 Vha dzhena ngomu-ngomu ha nnḓu sa vhane vha ṱoḓa u dzhia goroi, vha mu runga thumbu. Ndi hone Rekhaba na murathu wawe Baana vha tshi mbo ḓi ṋenga vha shavha." 
2Samuel4:7 Vho dzhena nḓuni musi ene o lala vhulaloni pfamoni yawe, vha mu runga a fa, vha mu tumula ṱhoho. Vha dzhia ṱhoho yawe vha ṱuwa nayo, vha lala vha tshi tshimbila vhusiku hoṱhe nga nḓila ya govha ḽa Jorodani." 
2Samuel4:8 Vha isa ṱhoho ya Ishbaali ha Dafita muḓini wa Hebroni, vha vhudza khosi vha ri, “Ngei ṱhoho ya Ishbaali ṅwana wa Saulo swina ḽavho we a linga u vha vhulaha. Ṋamusi Muṋe washu o lifhedzela thovhele muṋe wanga a lozwa Saulo na vhana vhawe.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Dafita a fhindula Rekhaba na murathu wawe Baana, vhana vha Rimoni wa Bierotho, a ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho we a nndamulela khomboni dzoṱhe," 
2Samuel4:10 musi ho ḓa munna a mmbudza a ri, ‘Saulo o fa,’ a tshi elekanya uri u khou mmbudza mafhungo a takadzaho, ndo mu fara nda mu vhulaha hangei Tsikilaga. Ndi yone pfufho ye nda mu pfufha ngayo ndi tshi mu pfufhela mafhungo awe!" 
2Samuel4:11 Zwino zwi nga tou ngani, musi vhavhi vho vhulaha munna a si na mulandu, vha mu vhulahela ngomu nḓuni yawe, vhulaloni hawe. Zwino ndi nga kundwa ngani u ni lifhedza zwe na mu vhulaha? Ndi ḓo ni lozwa na si tsha vha hone fhano fhasi!”" 
2Samuel4:12 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza vhanna vhawe, vha vha vhulaha. Vha vha tumula zwanḓa na ṋayo, zwitumbu zwavho vha zwi nembeledza tsini ha isha muḓini wa Hebroni. Huno ṱhoho ya Ishbaali vha i dzhia vha i swiṱa tshaloni tsha Abinere muḓini wa Hebroni." 
2Samuel5:1 Matsinde oṱhe a Israele vha ḓa ha Dafita e Hebroni vha ri, “Ri malofha mathihi na vhone." 
2Samuel5:2 Zwiḽa kale, musi Saulo a tshi kha ḓi vha khosi yashu, ndi vhone vhe vha vha vha tshi ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa musi vha tshi bva pfumo. Nahone Muṋe washu o vhudza vhone a ri, ‘Iwe u ḓo lisa vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele, wa vha muvhusi wavho.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Musi vhahulwane vhoṱhe vho ḓa ha khosi Dafita e Hebroni, a vhofha mulanga navho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, vha vhumba Dafita khosi ya Israele." 
2Samuel5:4 Dafita a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 30, a vhusa a fhedza miṅwaha ya 40." 
2Samuel5:5 O vhusa ḽa Juda e Hebroni a fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili na hafu, e Jerusalema o vhusa ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele na ḽa Juda a fhedza miṅwaha ya 33." 
2Samuel5:6 Khosi na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha takuwa vha livha Jerusalema u yo lwa na Vhajebusi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula henefho. Vhajebusi vha goḓa Dafita vha ri, “Fhano ha nga dzheni, u ḓo thivhelwa na nga mabofu na zwihole.” Vha tshi elekanya vho ri, “Dafita a nga si dzhene fhano.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Naho zwo ralo Dafita a thuba dzhavhelo ḽa Tsioni, wa mbo vha Muḓi wa Dafita." 
2Samuel5:8 Musi wonoyo Dafita a ri, “Muthu ane a ṱoḓa u kunda Vhajebusi nga a dzhene nga thanele ya maḓi a tshoṱhele zwenezwo zwihole na mabofu, one maswina a Dafita.” Ndi zwine ha pfi, “Mabofu na zwihole vha nga si dzhene thembeleni.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Dafita a pfulutshela dzhavheloni ḽa Tsioni a yo dzula hone a ri hu pfi Muḓi wa Dafita. Dafita a fhaṱa muḓi u mona naho, a thoma kha muṱoḓo wa thambalalo u no pfi Milo a tshi ya ngomu." 
2Samuel5:10 Dafita a ḓi vha na maanḓa a tshi ya ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe o vha e nae. 
2Samuel5:11 Zwino Hiramu khosi ya Tiro a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ḓa ha Dafita vhe na matanda a mikedara na vhavhaḓi na vhatsheṱi vha mitsheṱo, vha fhaṱela Dafita pfamo." 
2Samuel5:12 Dafita a zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu o mu vhumba khosi ya Israele nahone o hulisa muvhuso wawe a tshi itela vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele. 
2Samuel5:13 Dafita o ri u pfuluwa Hebroni a dzea vhafumakadzi vhanzhi, a dzea na vhasadzi vha dziphuli e Jerusalema, vha mu bebela vhana vhanzhi, vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
2Samuel5:14 Vhana vha Dafita vho bebwaho Jerusalema ndi: Shamua na Shobaba na Nathani na Solomoni 
2Samuel5:15 na Ibihara na Elishua na Nefege na Jafia 
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama na Eliada na Elifelete. 
2Samuel5:17 Vhafilista vha tshi pfa upfi Dafita o vhumbwa khosi ya Israele, mmbi yavho ya takuwa ya yo mu ṱoḓa uri i mu fare, hone Dafita a zwi pfa, a tsela dzhavheloni." 
2Samuel5:18 Zwino Vhafilista vho vha vho swika, vha ḓadza govha ḽa Refaimi." 
2Samuel5:19 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudzisa Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi ṱuwe ndi yo lwa na Vhafilista? Iwe u ḓo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwanga?” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Tshimbila, vhukumakuma ndi ḓo kumedza Vhafilista zwanḓani zwau.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ya Baali Pheratsimu, henefho a kunda Vhafilista. Dafita a ri, “Muṋe washu o kumba maswina anga a ntshavha, unga magabelo a tshi kumba.” Ndi zwine afho fhethu ha pfi Baali Pheratsimu (Mikumbela)." 
2Samuel5:21 Vhafilista vha tshi shavha vha sia midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso henefho, Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha zwi hwala vha ṱuwa nazwo." 
2Samuel5:22 Vhafilista vha dovha vha ḓa vha vhekanya mmbi dzavho Govhani ḽa Refaimi. 
2Samuel5:23 Dafita a vhudzisa Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “U songo tou gonya wo vha livha, itou vha mona nga murahu, u vha wele phanḓa ha miri ya maswi." 
2Samuel5:24 Hezwi u tshi tou pfa mutsindo matavhini a miri ya maswi, u ṱavhanye, ngauri ndi ḓo vha ndo u ranga phanḓa u yo dia mmbi ya Vhafilista.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Dafita a ita zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya, a vhilimedza Vhafilista u bva Geba u vhuya u swika Gezere." 
2Samuel6:1 Dafita a dovha a kuvhanganya vhanna vho nangwaho vha tshi bva kha Vhaisraele, vho ṱangana vha vha 30 000." 
2Samuel6:2 Dafita na vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe vha takuwa vha ya Baala kha ḽa Juda u yo dzhia mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu ine ya pfi ndi ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe ane khuluṋoni yawe ya vha vhakherube vha re nṱha ha mbulungelo. 
2Samuel6:3 Vha i bvisa hayani ha Abinadaba muvhunduni vha i takula vha i vhea kha gariki ntswa. Uza na Ahio, vhana vha Abinadaba vho vha vha tshi khou endedza iyo gariki" 
2Samuel6:4 ye ya vha yo hwala mbulungelo ya Mudzimu, Ahio a tshi khou tshimbila phanḓa hayo," 
2Samuel6:5 Dafita na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi khou tshina, vha tshi imba nga nungo dzavho dzoṱhe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, hu tshi lila haripa na mbila na mirumba na madende na tshele." 
2Samuel6:6 Musi vha tshi swika luvhanḓeni lwa u fhulela lwa Nakhoni, phulu dza khukhulwa, Uza a isa tshanḓa a tika mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu." 
2Samuel6:7 Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Uza nge a ita lunyadzo, zwenezwo Mudzimu a mbo ḓi mu vhulaha a fela henefho tsini ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu." 
2Samuel6:8 Dafita a sinyuwa nge Muṋe washu a tou fhandula Uza, na ṋamusi fhethu henefho hu pfi Pheretse Uza." 
2Samuel6:9 Dafita a pfa a tshi ofha Muṋe washu musi wonoyo a ri, “Mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu i nga ḓa kha nṋe hani?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Dafita a si tsha funa u ṱuwa na mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu a i isa Muḓini wa Dafita. A mbo ḓi i pambusa a i isa muṱani ya Obede Edomo, a no bva muḓini wa Gathi." 
2Samuel6:11 Mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu ya dzula muṱani wa Obede Edomo wa Gathi ya fhedza miṅwedzi miraru, Muṋe washu a shudufhadza Obede Edomo na muṱa wawe woṱhe." 
2Samuel6:12 Zwino khosi Dafita a pfa upfi, “Muṋe washu o shudufhadza muṱa wa Obede Edomo na zwoṱhe zwine a vha nazwo nge a dzula na mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ṱuwa a yo dzhia mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu muṱani wa Obede Edomo a i isa Muḓini wa Dafita hu tshi khou pembelwa." 
2Samuel6:13 Musi vho hwalaho mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu vho tshimbila maga maṱanu na ḽithihi, Dafita a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha mboho na ṋamana yo nonaho." 
2Samuel6:14 Dafita a pembela nga nungo dzawe dzoṱhe phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ó ambara luvhemba lwa u pakata lwa lukhaha. 
2Samuel6:15 Dafita na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ḓisa mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu Jerusalema vha tshi khou ṱavha mukosi nga dakalo, hu tshi lila phalaphala." 
2Samuel6:16 Musi mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu i tshi dzhena Muḓini wa Dafita, Mikhala ṅwananyana wa Saulo a ṱodzimela nga fasiṱere, a vhona khosi Dafita a tshi tou fhufha a tshi pembela phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, a mu nyadza mbiluni yawe." 
2Samuel6:17 Vha ḓisa mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu, vha i vhea vhudzuloni hayo ngomu denndeni ye Dafita a i akhela, Dafita a ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho dzi fhiswaho na dza u konana na Mudzimu." 
2Samuel6:18 Musi o no fhedza u ṋekedza nduvho dzi fhiswaho na dza u konana na Mudzimu, a shudufhadza vhathu nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
2Samuel6:19 Ndi hone muṅwe na muṅwe we a vha e kha gogo ḽa Vhaisraele Dafita a tshi mu ṋea mukonde wa vhurotho na mpale wa dzideithi na mpale wa nḓirivhe, vhoṱhe vhanna na vhasadzi. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha balangana vha ya mahayani avho." 
2Samuel6:20 Musi Dafita a tshi vhuelela hayani u yo shudufhadza muṱa wawe, Mikhala ṅwananyana wa Saulo a bva u yo mu ṱanganedza a ri, “Khosi ya Israele yo ḓiṱalula ṋamusi, yo ḓiṱana sa tsilu i tshi vhonwa nga phuli dza vhasidzana dza vhalanda vhayo!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi khou pembela phanḓa ha Muṋe washu we a nnanga a litsha khotsi aṋu kana muṅwe a no bva nḓuni yavho, a nta uri ndi vhuse vhathu vha Muṋe washu Vhaisraele, nahone ndi ḓo ḓi pembelela Muṋe washu." 
2Samuel6:22 Ndi kha ḓi ḓo kalula, ndi ḓo vhona ndi si tshithu, hone ndi ḓo huliswa nga vhasidzana havho vha dziphuli vhane na vha amba.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikhala ṅwananyana wa Saulo a vhuya a fa a si na ṅwana. 
2Samuel7:1 Musi khosi Dafita o no dzula pfamoni yawe, Muṋe washu ó no mu awedza a si tsha dinwa nga maswina awe oṱhe o mu tangaho," 
2Samuel7:2 a vhudza muporofita Nathani a ri, “Vha vhona zwi zwone naa nṋe ndi tshi dzula pfamoni yo ṱamiwaho nga mikedara, mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu yone i tshi dzula denndeni?”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathani a fhindula khosi a ri, “Zwine vha zwi humbula mbiluni yavho nga vha zwi ite, Muṋe washu u navho.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Vhusiku honoho ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Nathani ḽa ri," 
2Samuel7:5 “Tshimbila u yo vhudza muḓinḓa wanga Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Ndi iwe une wa ḓo mphaṱela nnḓu nda dzula ngomu hayo naa?" 
2Samuel7:6 Tshee nda pfulusa Vhaisraele Egipita, na ṋamusi, a thi athu vhuya nda dzula ngomu nḓuni. Ndo tendeleka ndi tshi bva fhano ndi tshi ya fhaḽa ndi tshi dzula denndeni." 
2Samuel7:7 Hoṱhe he nda tshimbila na Vhaisraele ndo no vhuya nda sola muṅwe wa vharangaphanḓa vhavho we nda mu laya uri a lise vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele naa? Kani-ha ndo vhuya nda ri: Ndi mini u songo mphaṱela nnḓu nga mikedara?’ 
2Samuel7:8 “Zwino-ha, vhudza muḓinḓa wanga Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Ndo u wana pfuloni u tshi khou lisa sambi ḽa nngu, nda u ita murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele." 
2Samuel7:9 Ndo ḓi vha na iwe hoṱhe he wa ya, nda vhulaha maswina au oṱhe a si tsha u dina. Zwino ndi ḓo ita uri u vhe na bvumo, unga ḽa one mahosi mahulu a ḽifhasi." 
2Samuel7:10 Vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele ndi ḓo vha ṋea vhudzulo, nda vha ṱavha uri vha vhe na haya hune ha vha havho, vha si tsha dinwa nga muthu. Vhavhi a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha vha kandeledza unga kale," 
2Samuel7:11 tshee nda vhea vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele. Ndi ḓo ita uri u awele, maswina au oṱhe a si tsha u dina. Ndi a u ḓivhadza uri ndi Nṋe ane nda ḓo fhaṱela iwe nnḓu:" 
2Samuel7:12 Musi u tshi fa, wa yo awela na vhokhotsi au, ndi ḓo ita uri muṅwe ṅwana wau a vhe khosi, ṅwana wa malofha au, nda khwaṱhisa muvhuso wawe." 
2Samuel7:13 Ndi ene ane a ḓo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga nnḓu, nda khwaṱhisa muvhuso wawe lini na lini." 
2Samuel7:14 Ndi ḓo vha khotsi awe, ene a vha ṅwana wanga. Musi a tshi khakha, ndi ḓo mu rwa unga khotsi a tshi rwa ṅwana wawe a tshi mu laya." 
2Samuel7:15 Huno a thi nga litshi u mu funa unga ndo litsha u funa Saulo, we nda mu sudzulusa uri iwe u kone u vha khosi." 
2Samuel7:16 Nnḓu yau ya vhuhosi na muvhuso wau zwi ḓo dzula zwi hone ndi tshi zwi vhona, khuluṋoni yau i ḓo khwaṱha lini na lini.’ ”" 
2Samuel7:17 Nathani a swikisa ha Dafita maipfi oṱhe – zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu dzumbululela. 
2Samuel7:18 Khosi Dafita a dzhena denndeni, a dzula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, a rabela a ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, ndi nṋe nnyi, muṱa wanga ndi mini, zwe wa vhuya wa ntswikisa hafhano?" 
2Samuel7:19 Zwa tou nga wo vhona zwi songo eḓana, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, wa vhuya wa tou amba na zwa misi i ḓaho zwa nnḓu yanga ya vhuhosi. Yawee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, muthu zwawe a no nga nṋe a nga fulufhedziswa zwo raloho naa?" 
2Samuel7:20 “Ndi nga kha ḓi u vhudza mini Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu? Hufha u tshi nnḓivha, ndi muḓinḓa wau." 
2Samuel7:21 Zwithu hezwo zwihulu wo zwi ita u tshi khunyeledza zwe wa dzula wo mpfulufhedzisa nga u funa hau, wa zwi dzumbululela nṋe." 
2Samuel7:22 Yawee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, u muhuluhulu! A hu na ane a nga Iwe. Ro zwi pfa nga dzashu nḓevhe ra zwi vhona: Mudzimu ndi Iwe u woṱhe." 
2Samuel7:23 Lushaka lune lwa nga vhathu vhau Vhaisraele ndi lufhio? Ndi lwone lushaka lu lwoṱhe fhano fhasi lwe Iwe Mudzimu wa ya u lu tshidza lwa vha lwau, dzina ḽau ḽa ḓivhiwa ḽa vha na bvumo, wa ita zwithu zwihulu zwi ofhisaho nga u thatha tshakha na midzimu yadzo dza shavha vhathu vhau, vhe wa vha lamulela Egipita." 
2Samuel7:24 Wo ita uri vhathu vhau Vhaisraele vha vhe vhau lini na lini, Iwe Muṋe washu wa vha Mudzimu wavho." 
2Samuel7:25 “Zwino-ha, Mudzimu Muṋe washu, khunyeledza zwe wa fulufhedzisa u tshi amba nṋe na nnḓu yanga, zwi vhe zwa lini na lini. Ita nga he wa fulufhedzisa," 
2Samuel7:26 uri bvumo ḽau ḽi vhe ḽihulu lini na lini. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ndi Mudzimu wa Israele!’ Ndi hone nnḓu yanga nṋe muḓinḓa wau Dafita i tshi ḓo pfumba u tshi zwi vhona." 
2Samuel7:27 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele, izwo wo zwi dzumbululela nṋe muḓinḓa wau zwiḽa u tshi ri, ‘Nṋe ndi ḓo u fhaṱela nnḓu.’ Ndi zwe nda wana nungo dza u swikisa thabelo iyi ha Iwe." 
2Samuel7:28 “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe Mudzimu! Maipfi au a a fulufhedzea, wo mpfulufhedzisa izwi zwivhuya." 
2Samuel7:29 Zwino ngavhe zwi tshi u takadza u shudufhadza nnḓu yanga, uri u ḓi dzula u tshi ri vhona, ngauri Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu wo amba wa shudufhadza nnḓu yanga, na zwino ri ḓo vha na mashudu lini na lini.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Ngavhuya Dafita a kunda Vhafilista, a vha luvhisa tshoṱhe a vha dzhiela muvhuso." 
2Samuel8:2 Dafita a kunda na Vhamuaba. Mathubwa a a ladza fhasi, kha vhararu vhaṅwe na vhaṅwe a vhulaha vhavhili a sia muthihi a tshila. Vhamuaba vha vha vhalanda vha Dafita vha thela muthelo." 
2Samuel8:3 Zwino Dafita a kunda Hadada Ezere khosi ya Tsoba, ṅwana wa Rehobo, musi Hadada Ezere a tshi khou ya uri a dovhe a luvhise shango u navha na mulambo wa Yufuratha." 
2Samuel8:4 Dafita a thuba vhanameli vha bere dza nndwa vha 1 700 na vhahali vha 20 000 vha tshimbilaho nga milenzhe. A sia bere dzi no lingana u kokodza gariki dza ḓana, dziṅwe dzoṱhe a dzi holefhadza." 
2Samuel8:5 Musi Vhaaramu vha Damasko vha tshi ḓa u phalala Hadada Ezere khosi ya Tsoba, Dafita a vhulaha vha 22 000 vhavho." 
2Samuel8:6 A vhea mmbi muvhusoni wa Vhaaramu vha Damasko, Vhaaramu vha mu luvha vha thela muthelo. Muṋe washu a ita uri Dafita a kunde hoṱhe he a ya." 
2Samuel8:7 Dafita a dzhia zwiṱangu zwa musuku zwa magota a Hadada Ezere, a zwi isa Jerusalema." 
2Samuel8:8 A dzhia na musinaseṱha munzhi miḓini ya Teba na Berothai, ye ya vha i tshi vhuswa nga Hadada Ezere." 
2Samuel8:9 Musi Thoi khosi ya Hamathi a tshi pfa upfi Dafita o kunda mmbi yoṱhe ya Hadada Ezere," 
2Samuel8:10 a ruma ṅwana wawe Joramu u yo resha khosi Dafita, na u mu fhululedza zwe a kunda Hadada Ezere, ngauri Hadada Ezere o vha a tshi ṱolou lwa na Thoi. Joramu a isela Dafita nduvho dza siliva na musuku na musinaseṱha." 
2Samuel8:11 Khosi Dafita a kumedza Muṋe washu idzo nduvho, sa zwe a ita nga siliva na musuku zwi no bva kha tshakha dzoṱhe dze a dzi kunda," 
2Samuel8:12 dza Vhaaramu na Vhamuaba na Vhaamoni na Vhafilista na Vhaamaleke. Dafita a kumedza na zwe a ṱangula Hadada Ezere khosi ya Tsoba, ṅwana wa Rehobo." 
2Samuel8:13 Dafita a vha na bvumo musi a tshi vhuya u vhulaha Vhaedomo vha 18 000 Govhani ḽa Muṋo. 
2Samuel8:14 Dafita a vhea mmbi kha ḽa Edomo ḽoṱhe, Vhaedomo vhoṱhe vha luvha Dafita. Muṋe washu a ita uri Dafita a kunde hoṱhe hune a ya." 
2Samuel8:15 Dafita o vhusa ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, misi yoṱhe a tshi tevhedza mulayo, a tshi tonda lushaka lwawe lwoṱhe." 
2Samuel8:16 Mulangammbi o vha e Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya, Jehoshafati ṅwana wa Ahiludu o vha e tshanḓa tsha khosi," 
2Samuel8:17 Tsadoko ṅwana wa Ahitubu na Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Abiathara vho vha vhe vhotshifhe, Seraya e muṅwaleli wa khosi," 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada e mulangi wa vhalindi vha Dafita, vhana vha Dafita vhe vhotshifhe vha musanda." 
2Samuel9:1 Muṅwe musi Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Hu tshee na muṅwe o salaho wa nnḓu ya Saulo ane nda nga mu itela zwivhuya ndi tshi itela Jonathani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Zwino ho vha hu na mushumi wa nnḓu ya Saulo we a vha a tshi pfi Tsiba. Vha mu vhidza uri a ḓe phanḓa ha Dafita, khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Ndi inwi Tsiba?” Tsiba a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe mulanda wavho muṋe wanga.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Hu tshee na muṅwe o salaho wa nnḓu ya Saulo ane nda nga mu itela zwivhuya zwa Mudzimu?” Tsiba a fhindula khosi a ri, “Hu kha ḓi vha na ṅwana wa Jonathani wa mutuka, ndi tshihole tsha milenzhe yoṱhe.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Zwino u ngafhi?” Tsiba a fhindula a ri, “U dzula Lodebara, muṱani wa Makhiri ṅwana wa Amiele.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Khosi Dafita a ruma vhathu Lodebara uri vha mu dzhie muṱani wa Makhiri ṅwana wa Amiele. 
2Samuel9:6 Musi Miribaali, ṅwana wa Jonathani ṅwana wa Saulo a tshi swika ha Dafita, a gwadama phanḓa hawe a mu hulisa. Dafita a ri, “Ndaa, Miribaali!” Miribaali a fhindula a ri, “Ndaa! Ndi fhano muṋe wanga.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Dafita a amba nae a ri, “Ni songo ofha tshithu, vhukumakuma ndi ḓo ni itela vhuthu ndi tshi itela khotsi aṋu Jonathani. Ndi ḓo dovha nda ni ṋea shango ḽoṱhe ḽe ḽa vha ḽi ḽa makhulu waṋu Saulo, nahone misi yoṱhe ni ḓo ḽa ḓafulani ḽanga.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Miribaali a gwadama a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi tou vha mini, zwine vha vhuya vha tou sedza nṋe mmbwa?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhidzisa Tsiba, mushumi wa Saulo, ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Miribaali muḓuhulu wa muṋe waṋu ndi mu ṋea zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi zwa Saulo na muṱa wawe." 
2Samuel9:10 Inwi na vhana vhaṋu na vhashumi vhaṋu ni ḓo mu limela tsimu, na mu kaṋela zwiliṅwa, uri vha hawe vha wane zwiḽiwa. Ene Miribaali muḓuhulu wa muṋe waṋu misi yoṱhe u ḓo ḽa ḓafulani ḽanga.” Tsiba ene o vha e na vhana vha 15 vha vhatuka na vhashumi vha 20." 
2Samuel9:11 Ndi hone Tsiba a tshi amba na khosi a ri, “Ndi ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine thovhele vha nndaya.” Miribaali a sala a tshi ḓi ḽa ḓafulani ḽa Dafita sa muṅwe wa vhana vha khosi." 
2Samuel9:12 Miribaali o vha e na kutukana ku no pfi Mika, huno muṱa woṱhe wa Tsiba vho vha vhe vhashumi vha Miribaali." 
2Samuel9:13 Miribaali a dzula Jerusalema, misi yoṱhe a vha a tshi ḽa ḓafulani ḽa khosi. O vha e tshihole tsha milenzhe yoṱhe." 
2Samuel10:1 Ngavhuya khosi ya Vhaamoni ya dzama, ṅwana wawe Hanunu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Samuel10:2 Dafita a ri, “Hanunu ṅwana wa Nahashi ndi ḓo mu itela vhuthu, sa zwe khotsi awe a nnyitela vhuthu.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Hanunu u yo mu ima maṱoni nge khotsi awe a dzama. Musi vhaḓinḓa vha Dafita vha tshi swika shangoni ḽa Vhaamoni," 
2Samuel10:3 vhaḓivhalea vha Vhaamoni vha vhudza Hanunu muṋe wavho vha ri, “Vha vhona unga Dafita u khou hulisa khotsi avho izwi a tshi ruma vhanna u vha ima maṱoni? Izwi a si ṱholi naa dze a dzi ruma u tandula muḓi, a sale a tshi u phusukanya?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Ndi hone Hanunu a tshi fara vhanna vha Dafita, a vha vheula ndebvu dza luṱaha luthihi, zwiambaro zwavho zwa fhafhulwa nga vhukati u guma nga maraho, vha pfi vha ṱuwe." 
2Samuel10:5 Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha yo ṱanganedza avho vhanna, nge vha vha vho shoniswa zwihulu. Khosi ya ri, “Dzulani Jerikho ndebvu dzaṋu dzi vhuye dzi mele, ni konou vhuya.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Zwino Vhaamoni vha tshi zwi vhona uri vho no luṱana na Dafita, vha yo rendela vhahali vha Aramu vha 20 000 kha Bethe Rehobo na Tsoba, kha khosi ya Maakha vha rendela vhanna vha 1 000, kha Tobo vha rendela vhanna vha 12 000." 
2Samuel10:7 Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a ruma Juaba uri a bve na mmbi yoṱhe ya vhahali." 
2Samuel10:8 Vhaamoni vha bva vha yo ima khoroni ya Raba musanda wavho, ngeno Vhaaramu vha Tsoba na Rehobo na vhanna vha Tobo na Maakha vho ima vhe vhoṱhe ḓakani." 
2Samuel10:9 Juaba a zwi vhona uri hu na mmbi dza maswina phanḓa hawe na murahu hawe, zwenezwo a nanga vhaṅwe vhahali vhomakone vha Israele, a vha vhea vho livhana na Vhaaramu." 
2Samuel10:10 Vhaṅwe vhanna vhoṱhe a ri vha langwe nga Abishai murathu wawe, a vha vhea vho livhana na Vhaamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Juaba a ri, “Arali Vhaaramu vha nkunda ni ḓe ni mphalale, hone arali Vhaamoni vha ni kunda, ndi ḓo ḓa nda ni phalala." 
2Samuel10:12 Khwaṱhani ri lwele vhathu vha hashu na miḓi ya Mudzimu washu ri sa ofhi. Muṋe washu u ḓo ita zwine a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi!” 
2Samuel10:13 Ndi hone Juaba na mmbi ye a vha e nayo vha tshi tshoṱhela Vhaaramu, vha mu shavha." 
2Samuel10:14 Vhaamoni vha tshi vhona uri Vhaaramu vha khou shavha, na vhone vha shavha Abishai vha dzhena muḓini. Juaba zwino a humela Jerusalema a tshi bva u lwa na Vhaamoni." 
2Samuel10:15 Vhaaramu vha tshi vhona uri vho kundwa nga Vhaisraele, vha ramba mmbi yavho yoṱhe." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadada Ezere a ramba Vhaaramu vha seli ha mulambo wa Yufuratha, vha ḓa Helamu vho rangwa phanḓa nga Shobakha mulangammbi wa Hadada Ezere wa Tsoba." 
2Samuel10:17 Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a ramba Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vha wela mulambo wa Jorodani, vha ya Helamu. Vhaaramu vha ima henefho uri vha ṱangane na Dafita, vha lwe nae." 
2Samuel10:18 Huno Vhaaramu vha shavha Vhaisraele, Dafita a vhulaha vhanameli vha dzigariki vha 700 na vhahali vha 40 000. A vhulaha na Shobakha mulangammbi, a fela henefho." 
2Samuel10:19 Musi mahosi oṱhe e a vha a tshi langwa nga Hadada Ezere a tshi vhona uri o kundwa nga Vhaisraele, vha pfumedzana na Vhaisraele vha vha luvha. Vhaaramu vha vho ofha u dovha vha ima na Vhaamoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Muṅwe musi nga ṱhumalurere, musi mahosi vha tshi bva pfumo, Dafita a ruma Juaba a bva na vhanna vha khosi, na mmbi yoṱhe ya Vhaisraele. Vha phusukanya shango ḽa Amoni vha govhela muḓi wa Raba. Huno Dafita a sala Jerusalema." 
2Samuel11:2 Muṅwe musi nga madekwana Dafita a vuwa vhulaloni hawe, a ḓitshimbilela ṱhangani ya pfamo. E henefho ṱhangani a vhonela muṅwe musadzi a tshi khou ṱamba muvhili. Musadzi uyo o vha o naka nga maanḓa." 
2Samuel11:3 Dafita a ruma muḓinḓa a yo vhudzisa uri uyo musadzi ndi nnyi. Munna uyo a ri, “Ndi Batshiba, ṅwananyana wa Eliamu, musadzi wa Uria wa Muhithi.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha yo mu dzhia, a ḓa ha Dafita, Dafita a mu dzhenisa nḓuni. Musadzi uyo o vha a tshi kha ḓi bva u fhedza u ḓikumulula maṱambo a ṅwedzi. Zwo no ralo a humela hayani." 
2Samuel11:5 Ṋowa ya uyo musadzi ya fara, a swikisa ipfi ha Dafita a ri, “Ndo vhifha muvhilini.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Zwino Dafita a ruma muḓinḓa a ya ha Juaba a ri, “Rumani Uria wa Muhithi a ḓe ha nṋe.” Juaba a mu ruma ha Dafita." 
2Samuel11:7 Uria a tshi swika khae, Dafita a mu vhudzisa uri Juaba u vuwa hani, na uri vhahali vha vuwa hani, na uri nndwa i khou tshimbila hani." 
2Samuel11:8 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza Uria a ri, “Iyani zwaṋu hayani ni awelenyana.” Uria a ṱuwa pfamoni, ó tevhedzwa nga tshifhiwa tshi no bva kha khosi," 
2Samuel11:9 hone a si ye hayani a tou eḓela muṋangoni wa pfamo na phuli dza musanda. 
2Samuel11:10 Dafita a vhudzwa upfi, “Uria ho ngo ya hayani.” A mu vhudzisa a ri, “Hufha ni tshi kha ḓi tou bva u vhuya ni tshi bva kule? Ndi mini ni songo ya hayani?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria a fhindula Dafita a ri, “Vhanna vha Israele na Juda vha nndwani na mbulungelo ya mulanga, mulangi wanga Juaba na magota awe vho fhaṱa mishasha ḓakani khagala. Zwino nṋe ndi nga ya hani hayani nda yo ḽa, nda nwa, nda dzhenisa musadzi wanga nḓuni? Nga vhutshilo ha thovhele, zwo raloho ndi nga si vhuye nda zwi ita!”" 
2Samuel11:12 Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Dovhani ni ṱwe fhano, ni ḓo huma matshelo.” Uria a ṱwa Jerusalema musi wonoyo na nga matshelo." 
2Samuel11:13 Dafita a mu vhidza vha ḽa vhoṱhe vha nwa vhoṱhe, Dafita a mu kambisa. Hone nga madekwana Uria a bva a yo lala thovhoni yawe na phuli dza musanda, a si ye hayani." 
2Samuel11:14 Nga matsheloni Dafita a ṅwalela Juaba luṅwalo, a ruma Uria uri a lu ise." 
2Samuel11:15 Luṅwaloni Dafita o vha o ṅwala a ri, “Ni rangise Uria phanḓa hune nndwa ya halifha, ni konou humela murahu uri a vhulawe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Zwino musi Juaba o no govhela muḓi, a vhea Uria fhethu hune a ḓivha uri hu na vhalwi vha vhuhali." 
2Samuel11:17 Musi vhanna vha muḓi vha tshi bva, vha tshi lwa na Juaba, vhaṅwe vhanna vha mmbi ya Dafita vha vhulawa, ha vhulawa na Uria wa Muhithi." 
2Samuel11:18 Juaba a ḓivhadza Dafita zwoṱhe zwa nndwani," 
2Samuel11:19 a laya muḓinḓa a ri, “Musi no no fhedza u anetshela khosi mafhungo aya a nndwa," 
2Samuel11:20 khosi i nga ḓi sinyuwa, ya ni vhudzisa ya ri, ‘Ndi mini no sendelesa tsini na muḓi ni tshi yo lwa? No vha ni sa zwi ḓivhi uri vha nga posa misevhe vhe mutsheṱoni?" 
2Samuel11:21 We a vhulaha Abimelekhe ṅwana wa Gidioni ndi nnyi? Ho ngo zhakiwa nga musadzi nga guyo ḽi tshi bva nṱha ha mutsheṱo a fela Thebetse? Ndi mini no sendelesa mutsheṱoni?’ Arali vha ni vhudzisa zwenezwo, ni vha fhindule ni ri, ‘Na mulanda wavho Uria wa Muhithi o fa.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Muḓinḓa a takuwa, musi a tshi swika a vhudza Dafita zwoṱhe zwe Juaba a mu ruma uri a zwi ambe." 
2Samuel11:23 Muḓinḓa a vhudza Dafita a ri, “Vhanna avho vho lwa na riṋe nga vhuhali vhuhulu, vha bva muḓini vha ḓa vha lwa na riṋe nnḓa, hone riṋe ra vha khada ra vha humisela khoroni ya muḓi." 
2Samuel11:24 Vhapfuli vha ri posa nga misevhe vhe nṱha ha mutsheṱo, vha vhulaha vhaṅwe vhahali vha thovhele, vha vhulaha na mulanda wavho Uria wa Muhithi.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Dafita a vhudza muḓinḓa a ri, “Vhudzani Juaba ni ri, ‘Izwo zwi songo ni dina, pfumo ḽi ḽa uno na uḽa. Ilwani na uyo muḓi nga nungo dzoṱhe ni u phusukanye.’ Ni ambe zwenezwo ni tshi ṱuṱuwedza Juaba.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Musi musadzi wa Uria a tshi pfa uri munna wawe o fa, a mu lila." 
2Samuel11:27 Ngavhuya tshifhinga tsha u lila tsho no fhela, Dafita a ita uri a ḓiswe pfamoni yawe, a vha mufumakadzi wawe, a mu bebela ṅwana wa mutuka. Huno zwe Dafita a ita zwa si takadze Muṋe washu." 
2Samuel12:1 Muṋe washu a ruma Nathani ha Dafita. Musi a tshi swika khae a ri, “Muḓini muṅwe ho vha hu na vhanna vhavhili, muṅwe o pfuma, muṅwe e mushai." 
2Samuel12:2 Mupfumi o vha e na sambi ḽihulu ḽa nngu na kholomo," 
2Samuel12:3 hone mushai o vha a si na tshithu, a tshi tou vha na ngwana ya tsadzi ye a tou i renga. O i londola, a i alusa hayani hawe na vhana vhawe. O vha a tshi kovhekana nayo zwiḽiwa zwawe, i tshi nwa nga tshinwelo tshawe, a i kuvhatedza ya eḓela. Yo vha i tshi tou nga ṅwananyana wawe." 
2Samuel12:4 Zwino muṅwe musi uyo mupfumi a dalelwa nga mueni, hone nga vhutshivha a si fune u ṱhavhela uyo mueni nngu yawe kana kholomo uri a ḽe. Tshe a ita ho vha u yo dzhia ngwana iḽa ya tsadzi ya uḽa mushai, a ṱhavhela mueni wawe.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Dafita a sinyutshela uyo mupfumi a vhudza Nathani a ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri munna o itaho zwo raloho o fanela u fa!" 
2Samuel12:6 Iyo ngwana o fanela u i lifha luṋa, nge a ita tshiṱuhu tsho raloho.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Nathani a vhudza Dafita a ri, “Munna onoyo ndi vhone! Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndo u ta wa vha khosi ya ḽa Israele, nda u lamulela zwanḓani zwa Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Nda u ṋea muvhuso wawe na vhasadzi vhawe. Ndo u vhumba khosi ya Israele na Juda. Ngavhe izwo zwi vhe zwi songo eḓana ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo u engedza zwiṅwe. 
2Samuel12:9 Ndi mini-ha wo nyadza ipfi ḽa Yahavee wa ita zwine a vhona zwo vhifha? Wo vhulaha Uria wa Muhithi nga pfumo, wa dzhia musadzi wawe a vha wau. Wo mu vhulahisa nga pfumo ḽa Vhaamoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Zwino-ha, pfumo a ḽi nga ṱutsheli nnḓu yau, nge wa nnyadza wa dzhia musadzi wa Uria wa Muhithi a vha wau.’" 
2Samuel12:11 “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ita uri muṅwe wa muṱa wau a u ḓisele khombo. Ndi ḓo u dzhiela vhafumakadzi vhau u tshi zwi vhona, nda vha ṋea muṅwe ane a vha tsini na iwe, a dzhenisa vhafumakadzi vhau nḓuni masiari tshivhangalala." 
2Samuel12:12 Iwe wo zwi ita tshiphirini, hone nṋe izwo zwithu ndi ḓo zwi bveledza masiari tshivhangalala Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza Nathani a ri, “Ndo khakhela Muṋe washu.” Nathani a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu o vha hangwela vhuvhi havho. Vha nga si fe." 
2Samuel12:14 Huno ṅwana ane vha ḓo bebelwa ene u ḓo fa, ngauri zwe vha ita zwo ita uri maswina a Muṋe washu a mu nyadze.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Ndi hone Nathani a tshi ṱuwa a ya hayani. Muṋe washu a lwadza ṅwana we musadzi wa Uria a bebela Dafita. 
2Samuel12:16 Dafita a rabela Mudzimu uri ṅwana a fhole, a ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, a dzhena pfamoni yawe, a ita vhusiku vhunzhi o lala fhasi." 
2Samuel12:17 Vhahulwane vha muṱa wawe vha sendela tsini hawe uri vha mu vuse afho fhasi, hone ene a hana, a si tende u ḽa zwiḽiwa navho." 
2Samuel12:18 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ṅwana a fa. Vhalanda vha Dafita vha ofha u mu vhudza uri ṅwana o fa, nge vha humbula vha ri, “Musi ṅwana a tshi kha ḓi tshila ro amba na Dafita, hone a si ri thetshelese. Ri nga mu vhudza hani uri ṅwana o fa? A nga ḓi ḓifunga.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Dafita a vhona vhalanda vhawe vha tshi khou hevhedzana, a zwi ḓivha uri ṅwana o fa. A vhudzisa a ri, “Ṅwana u kha ḓi tshila?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “O lovha.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vuwa fhaḽa, a ḓiambusa, a ḓola mapfura, a ambara zwiṅwe zwiambaro, a ya a luvha nḓuni ya Muṋe washu. A konou ya pfamoni yawe, a ri vha mu avhele zwiḽiwa, a ḽa." 
2Samuel12:21 Vhalanda vhawe vha tshi zwi vhona vha ri, “Nṋa ndi zwithu-ḓe zwine vha khou ita? Ṅwana a tshi kha ḓi tshila vho vha vha tshi ḓidzima vha lila, zwino ó lovha vha vho vuwa vha ita na u ḽa?”" 
2Samuel12:22 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Zwiḽa ṅwana a tshi kha ḓi tshila ndo ḓidzima zwiḽiwa nda lila. Ndo elekanya nda ri, ‘Hu ḓivha nnyi? Muṋe washu a nga kha ḓi nkhathutshela a litsha ṅwana a tshila.’" 
2Samuel12:23 Huno zwino o fa, ndi ḓo ḓidzimelani zwiḽiwa? Ndi nga dovha nda mu vhuisa naa? Nṋe ndi ḓo ya hune a vha hone, hone ene a nga si tsha vhuya kha nṋe.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi khuthadza mufumakadzi wawe Batshiba, a mu dzhenisa nḓuni. Batshiba a beba ṅwana wa mutukana, Dafita a ri u pfi Solomoni. Muṋe washu a funa uyo mutukana," 
2Samuel12:25 a ruma muporofita Nathani uri a mu rine ḽa Jedidia (Mufunwa-nga-Muṋe-washu). 
2Samuel12:26 Juaba o vha a tshi khou lwa na vha Raba musanda wa Vhaamoni, a thuba pfamo ḽa musanda." 
2Samuel12:27 Ndi hone a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Dafita vha ri, “Ndo lwa na vha Raba, nda thuba zwisima zwavho zwa maḓi." 
2Samuel12:28 Zwino nga vha kuvhanganye iṅwe mmbi yoṱhe, vha govhele muḓi vha u thube. Vha sa ḓa nṋe ndi nga thuba uyu muḓi wa mbo vha wanga.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi kuvhanganya mmbi yoṱhe, a livha Raba, a lwa na muḓi a u thuba." 
2Samuel12:30 Dafita a bvula mudzimu wavho Milikhomu khare ya vhuhosi ya musuku, tshileme tshayo tsho vha tshi tshi nga vha khilogiramu dza 35, nahone yo vha i na ndalama khayo. Dafita a dzhia iyo khare a i ambara ṱhohoni, a thuba zwithu zwinzhi afho muḓini," 
2Samuel12:31 vhathu vha afho muḓini a vha bvisela nnḓa, a vha shumisa nga dzisaha na tshezela dza tsimbi, na mbaḓo, vhaṅwe a vha vhaḓisa zwidina zwa matombo. Vhathu vha miḓi yoṱhe ya Vhaamoni a vha ita zwenezwo. Ndi hone Dafita na mmbi yawe yoṱhe vha tshi vhuelela Jerusalema." 
2Samuel13:1 Abisalomo ṅwana wa Dafita wa mutuka, o vha e na khaladzi awe wa lunako we a vha a tshi pfi Thamara. Amunoni, muṅwe ṅwana wa Dafita wa mutuka, a funa uyo Thamara." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni o vha a tshi funa khaladzi awe Thamara lwe a vhuya a ita na u lwala, ngauri Thamara o vha a tshi kha ḓi vha musidzana a sa athu ḓivha munna, zwi sa konadzei uri Amunoni a swike khae." 
2Samuel13:3 Zwino Amunoni o vha e na khonani we a vha a tshi pfi Jonadaba, ṅwana wa Shama mukomana wa Dafita. Jonadaba o vha o thanyesa." 
2Samuel13:4 Jonadaba a vhudzisa Amunoni a ri, “Ndi mini inwi ṅwana wa khosi ni tshi nga ni dzula no ṱungufhala misi yoṱhe? Mulandu ndi mini?” Amunoni a mu fhindula a ri, “Ndi funa Thamara khaladzi a Abisalomo murathu wanga, ndi tama u mu ita musadzi.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadaba a ri, “Iyani u lala ni ḓiite unga ni a lwala. Musi khotsi aṋu vha tshi ḓa u ni vhona ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Ndi ṱoḓa uri khaladzi anga Thamara a ḓe a mphe zwiḽiwa. Nga vha litshe a mmbikele ndi tshi zwi vhona uri ndi kone u mu sedza, a tou nṋekedza zwone ndi kone u ḽa.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Ndi hone Amunoni a tshi yo lala a ḓiita unga u a lwala. Musi khosi i tshi ḓa u mu vhona, Amunoni a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi ṱoḓa uri khaladzi anga Thamara a ḓe a mmbagele khokhisinyana ndi tshi zwi vhona, a tou nṋekedza dzone ndi kone u ḽa.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Dafita a vhidzisa Thamara pfamoni a ri, “Iyani nḓuni ya khaladzi aṋu Amunoni ni yo mu bikela zwiḽiwa.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Ndi hone Thamara a tshi ya nḓuni ya khaladzi awe Amunoni a mu wana o lala. Thamara a dzhia bwindi ḽa vhukhopfu, a ḽi lugisa, a baga khokhisi Amunoni a tshi zwi vhona," 
2Samuel13:9 a konou dzhia pani a mu avhela idzo khokhisi, hone Amunoni a hana u ḽa. Amunoni a ri, “Vhudzani vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha bve vha ṱuwe.” Nangoho vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha mu ṱutshela." 
2Samuel13:10 Ndi hone Amunoni a tshi vhudza Thamara a ri, “Ḓisani zwiḽiwa ngeno kamarani yanga, ni nṋekedze ndi kone u ḽa.” Thamara a dzhia vhurotho he a vhu baga a vhu isa ha khaladzi awe Amunoni kamarani yawe." 
2Samuel13:11 Musi Thamara a tshi ṋekedza Amunoni idzo khokhisi uri a ḽe, Amunoni a fara Thamara a ri, “Khaladzi anga, iḓani ndi ni dzhenise nḓuni!”" 
2Samuel13:12 Thamara a hana a ri, “Aiwa nandi khaladzi anga! Ni songo ntshipa. Zwo raloho zwi a ila Israele! Ni songo ita zwithu hezwo zwa vhupaṱi." 
2Samuel13:13 Zwino nṋe ndi ḓo tshimbila hani vhathuni? Zwino inwi? Ni vho ḓo nga phaṱhi kha ḽa Israele. Ambani na khosi nandi, vha nga si hane ni tshi mmbinga.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Hone Amunoni a hana u thetshelesa Thamara, vhunga o vha a tshi mu kunda nga nungo, a mbo ḓi mu tshipa." 
2Samuel13:15 Zwenezwo Amunoni a mbo thoma u nengwa Thamara tshoṱhe. Vhukumakuma a mu nengwa u fhira zwe a vha a tshi mu funa u thomani. A vhudza Thamara a ri, “Takuwani ni bve ni ṱuwe!”" 
2Samuel13:16 Thamara a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa, ni songo phapha mbulu kha iṅwe nga u nthatha!” Hone Amunoni a hana u thetshelesa Thamara." 
2Samuel13:17 A vhidza mushumeli wawe a ri, “Bvisani musadzi hoyu hafhano, ó no bva ni hoṋe vothi.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Ndi hone mushumeli wawe a tshi mu bvisela nnḓa, a konou hoṋa vothi. Thamara o vha o ambara tshiambaro tshilapfu tsha maṱeleṱele, itsho tsho vha tshi tshiambaro tshi no ambarwa nga vhananyana vha khosi vha sa athu ḓivha munna." 
2Samuel13:19 A ḓishela milora ṱhohoni, a kherukanya tshiambaro tshawe tshilapfu tsha maṱeleṱele tshe a vha o tshi ambara, a farelela ṱhoho nga tshanḓa, a ṱuwa, a enda a tshi honḓa a tou ṱavha mukosi." 
2Samuel13:20 Khaladzi awe Abisalomo a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Kani-ha ndi uḽa Amunoni khaladzi aṋu we a zwi ita? Fhumulani zwaṋu khaladzi anga, Amunoni ndi khaladzi aṋu. Ni songo zwi dzhenisa mbiluni.” Thamara a dzula nḓuni ya Abisalomo khaladzi awe, a pfa o dinalea sa musadzi o ṱangulwaho." 
2Samuel13:21 Musi khosi Dafita a tshi pfa zwoṱhe hezwo, a sinyuwa zwihulu." 
2Samuel13:22 Abisalomo a si vhuye a vhudza Amunoni tshithu, tshivhuya kana tshivhi; o tou vhenga Amunoni nge a tshinya khaladzi awe Thamara." 
2Samuel13:23 Ngavhuya ho no fhela miṅwaha mivhili Abisalomo o vha a tshi khou vheula nngu dzawe Baali Hatsoro, tsini ha muḓi wa Efraimi, a vhidza vhana vha khosi vhoṱhe uri vha vhe hone henefho." 
2Samuel13:24 A ya ha khosi a ri, “Thovhele, ndo vhidza vhavheuli vha nngu dzanga. Ndi khou takusa vhone vhamusanda na magota avho uri vha swike.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Aiwa nandi ṅwananga. Ri nga si kone u ḓa roṱhe, ri nga ḓo tou vha muhwalo waṋu.” Naho Abisalomo o sivhelela, khosi ya ḓi hana, vho tou mu tamela mashudu." 
2Samuel13:26 Ndi hone Abisalomo a tshi ri, “Arali vha sa nga koni, izwo kha vha litshe ri ṱuwe na mukomana wanga Amunoni.” Khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi ṱuwa nae?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Hone Abisalomo a ḓi ita lunzili, khosi ya vhuya ya tenda uri a ṱuwe na Amunoni na vhaṅwe vhana vha khosi vhoṱhe." 
2Samuel13:28 Abisalomo a laya vhanna vhawe a ri, “Thetshelesani! Musi Amunoni o fura waini o takala, nda ni vhudza nda ri, ‘Vhulahani Amunoni!’ zwenezwo ni mbo ḓi mu vhulaha. Ni songo ofha tshithu, hufha no laiwa nga nṋe. Imani no khwaṱha.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Zwenezwo vhanna vha Abisalomo vha ita Amunoni zwe Abisalomo a vha laya. Ndi hone vhana vha khosi vhoṱhe vha tshi namela meila dzavho vha shavha. 
2Samuel13:30 Musi vhe nḓilani, mafhungo a swika ha Dafita a no ri, “Abisalomo o vhulaha vhana vha khosi vhoṱhe, a ho ngo sala na muthihi wavho.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Khosi ya takuwa ya kherukanya zwifuko zwayo, ya lala fhasi mavuni, vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe vha ima henefho tsini vho kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho." 
2Samuel13:32 Hone Jonadaba, ṅwana wa Shama mukomana wa Dafita, a ri, “Thovhele vha songo humbula uri vhana vhavho vho vhulawa vhoṱhe, o faho ndi Amunoni fhedzi. Hezwo zwo vha zwi tshi vhonala na kha tshifhaṱuwo tsha Abisalomo tshee Amunoni a tshipa khaladzi awe Thamara." 
2Samuel13:33 Thovhele vha songo zwi londa zwine ha pfi vhana vha khosi vho vhulawa vhoṱhe. Ho vhulawa Amunoni fhedzi.” 
2Samuel13:34 Zwenezwo Abisalomo o vha o no shavha. Zwino munna we a vha a tshi khou linda, musi a tshi posa maṱo a vhona vhathu vhanzhi gondoni vhukovhela hawe, vha tshi tsa siani ḽa mivhundu thungo ya Horonaimi, a mbo yo ḓivhadza khosi." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadaba a vhudza khosi a ri, “Thovhele nga vha vhone vhana vhavho vho vhuya, zwo itea nga he nda amba.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Musi Jonadaba a tshi fhedza u amba, vhana vha khosi vha mbo ḓi dzhena vha tshi khou honḓa. Khosi na vhalanda vhayo na vhone vha lila lwa u ṱungufhadza." 
2Samuel13:37 Abisalomo a shavhela ha Thalamai ṅwana wa Amihudu, khosi ya Geshuru. Hone Dafita a ḓi lilela ṅwana wawe misi yoṱhe." 
2Samuel13:38 Abisalomo o ri u shavhela Geshuru, a dzula hone a fhedza miṅwaha miraru." 
2Samuel13:39 Musi khosi Dafita o no rudza mbilu nga zwa lufu lwa Amunoni, mbilu yawe ya vho ṱuvha u dovha u vhona Abisalomo." 
2Samuel14:1 Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya a zwi ḓivha uri khosi i khou ḽa mbilu nga Abisalomo. 
2Samuel14:2 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ruma muthu a ye Thekua, a yo dzhia muṅwe musadzi wa vhuṱali a vhuya nae. Juaba a vhudza uyo musadzi a ri, “Kha vha ḓiite unga vha khou lilela mufu, vha ambare zwiambaro zwa vha lilelaho mufu, vha si ḓole zwiḓolo. Vha ite unga musadzi o fhedzaho maḓuvha manzhi o ṱungufhalela mufu." 
2Samuel14:3 Vha ṱuwe vha ye ha khosi vha yo amba maipfi haya.” Juaba a mbo funzedza uyo musadzi zwine a ḓo amba. 
2Samuel14:4 Musadzi a mbo ya ha khosi, a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a tshi luvha khosi, a vhudza khosi a ri, “Yawee thovhele, a thi lamulelwi naa?”" 
2Samuel14:5 Khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Vha khou dinwa ngani?” Musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Vhukumakuma nṋe ndi tshilikadzi, munna wanga o fa." 
2Samuel14:6 Zwino ndi na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka. Vho tshenuwa vho lwa ḓakani ha vha hu si na ane a nga vha lamula. Muṅwe o rwa muṅwe a mu vhulaha. 
2Samuel14:7 Zwino mashaka anga oṱhe o mmvutshela, vha ri, ‘Ri kumedze uyo we a vhulaha murathu wawe uri ri mu vhulahe ri lifhedzele murathu wawe we a mu vhulaha, naho e ene muḽaifa.’ Vha ḓo thutha fulufhelo ḽanga ḽithihi fhedzi, dzina ḽa munna wanga ḽa sala ḽi si tsha vhidzwa, a si tshee na muḓuhulu fhano fhasi.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Khosi ya vhudza uyo musadzi ya ri, “Nga vha ye hayani, ndi ḓo vha dzivhisa nga tsha vhukoma.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Musadzi a fhindula khosi a ri, “Thovhela muṋe wanga, mulandu u ḓo hweswa nṋe na muṱa wa khotsi anga, thovhela na muvhuso wavho a vha na tshine vha nga solwa.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Arali muṅwe muthu a vha vhudza tshiṅwe tshithu, nga vha mu ḓise kha nṋe, a nga si tsha dovha a vha dina.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Thovhele nga vha tou ana nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho uri a vha nga tendi mulifhedzi wa malofha a tshi dovha a engedza ndozwo nga u vhulaha ṅwananga.” Khosi ya ri, “Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho ndi ri na luvhudzi na luthihi lwa ṱhoho ya ṅwana wavho a lu nga weli fhasi.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Ndi hone musadzi a tshi ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, nga vha litshe ndi vha vhudze ḽiṅwe ipfi ḽithihi.” Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Ndi zwone, nga vha ambe.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Musadzi a vhudza khosi a ri, “Ndi mini vhone vho khakhela vhathu vha Mudzimu nga zwo raloho? Musi thovhele vha tshi amba nga u ralo a si u ḓivhea mulandu naa? Hufha thovhele vha sa athu vhuisa ṅwana wavho o thathiwaho!" 
2Samuel14:14 Hufha ri tshi fa roṱhe. Ri nga maḓi ane a ri u tevhutshela fhasi a si tsha kumbelea. Hone Mudzimu ha dzhii vhutshilo, tshawe ndi u wana nḓila ya uri muthu o thathiwaho a songo dzula o luṱana nae." 
2Samuel14:15 Zwino thovhela muṋe wanga nṋe ndi tshi ḓa u vha vhudza hezwi ndi nge vhathu vha ntshenusa. Ndo elekanya nda ri, ‘Ndi ḓo amba na khosi, khamusi i ḓo ita zwine nda i humbela." 
2Samuel14:16 Khamusi khosi i ḓo tenda u ntshidza zwanḓani zwa munna uyo ane a khou linga u vhulaha nṋe na ṅwananga ra si tsha vha shangoni ḽe Mudzimu a ri ṋea.’ 
2Samuel14:17 Zwino ndi ri, ‘Ngavhe ipfi ḽa thovhele muṋe wanga ḽi tshi nthudza mbilu, ngauri thovhele muṋe wanga vha nga muruṅwa wa Mudzimu kha u ṱalukanya zwivhi na zwivhuya. Ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a tshi vha navho.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:18 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza uyo musadzi ya ri, “Vha songo litsha u fhindula zwine nda ḓo vha vhudzisa.” Musadzi a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, nga vha ambe.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Juaba ho ngo longa tshanḓa kha mafhungo aya naa?” Musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Nga vhutshilo ha thovhele muṋe wanga, a hu na ane a nga vha fhura vha sa zwi vhoni. Ndi zwone, ndi mulanda wavho Juaba we a nndaya uri ndi ite nga u ralo, a mpfunzedza zwoṱhe zwine nda fanela u amba." 
2Samuel14:20 Juaba o ita hezwi uri a shande mafhungo. Hone muṋe wanga vha na vhuṱali vhu no nga ha muruṅwa wa Mudzimu, vha ḓivha zwoṱhe zwine zwa itea shangoni.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Juaba ya ri, “Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo ita nga u ralo. Tshimbilani ni yo dzhia muṱhannga houḽa Abisalomo ni vhuye nae.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Juaba a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a tshi luvha khosi, a ri ngavhe khosi zwi tshi i nakela, a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, ṋamusi ndi a ḓivha uri vha a ntakalela, ngauri vho tenda zwe nda vha humbela.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi takuwa a ya Geshuru, a vhuya na Abisalomo a mu ḓisa Jerusalema." 
2Samuel14:24 Huno khosi ya ri, “Abisalomo nga a ye nḓuni yawe, hone a songo vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshanga.” Abisalomo a ya nḓuni yawe, a si vhone tshifhaṱuwo tsha khosi." 
2Samuel14:25 Kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele ho vha hu si na munna na muthihi we a vha a tshi khoḓelwa lunako lwawe unga Abisalomo. U bva ṱhohoni yawe u swika milenzheni yawe o vha a si na thando. 
2Samuel14:26 Mavhudzi awe o vha e madenya vhukuma, nahone o vha a tshi a vheula kathihi nga ṅwaha, musi o no lapfesa, a tshi lemela. O vha a tshi kona u lemela u fhira khilogiramu mmbili hu tshi tevhedzwa zwikalo zwa musanda." 
2Samuel14:27 Abisalomo o vha e na vhana vhararu vha vhatuka na ṅwananyana muthihi we a vha a tshi pfi Thamara. Onoyo o vha musadzi wa lunako. 
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomo o dzula miṅwaha mivhili Jerusalema a sa athu vhona tshifhaṱuwo tsha khosi. 
2Samuel14:29 Ndi hone a tshi vhidzisa Juaba uri a mu rume ha khosi, hone Juaba a hana u ḓa khae. A dovha a mu vhidzisa, ene a ḓi dovha a hana u ḓa." 
2Samuel14:30 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhashumi vhawe a ri, “Vhonani, tsimu ya Juaba i tsini na yanga, henefho tsimuni o lima baḽi. Iyani ni yo fhisa iyo tsimu.” Vhashumi vha Abisalomo vha mbo ya vha fhisa iyo tsimu." 
2Samuel14:31 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ya nḓuni ya Abisalomo, a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndi mini vhashumi vhaṋu vho fhisa tsimu yanga?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomo a fhindula Juaba a ri, “Nga vha vhone, ndo vha vhidzisa nda ri, ‘Nga vha ḓe ndi vha rume ha khosi vha yo vhudzisa vha ri: Ndo vhuelani ndi tshi bva Geshuru? Khwiṋe ndi musi ndi tshi kha ḓi vha henengei zwanga!’ Zwino-ha, ndi ṱoḓa u vhona tshifhaṱuwo tsha khosi, arali ndi na mulandu, khosi nga i mmbulahe zwanga.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ya ha khosi a i vhudza zwenezwo, khosi ya vhidzisa Abisalomo, Abisalomo a swika a dzhena, a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha khosi. Khosi ya mu kuvhatedza." 
2Samuel15:1 Ngavhuya Abisalomo a ḓiṱoḓela gariki na dzibere, a ḓinangela vhanna vha 50 uri vha gidime phanḓa hawe." 
2Samuel15:2 O vha a tshi fhinduwa a ima thungo ha nḓila yo livhaho khoroni ya muḓi. Musi muthu a tshi ḓisa mulandu une wa fanela u swikiswa musanda uri u sengiwe, Abisalomo o vha a tshi vhidza uyo muthu a ri, “Ni bva muḓini ufhio?” Muthu uyo o vha a tshi nga fhindula a ri, “Ndi bva kha tsinde ḽa uri ḽa Israele.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Zwenezwo Abisalomo o vha a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Vhonani, zwililo zwaṋu zwo tea, hone fhaḽa musanda a hu na ane a nga u pfa.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abisalomo o vha a tshi ḓi engedza a ri, “Ngavhe ndi muhaṱuli wa shango heḽi! Muṅwe na muṅwe a re na mbilaelo kana mulandu o vha a tshi ḓo ḓa ha nṋe a wana khaṱhulo mbuya.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Na musi muthu a tshi swika kha Abisalomo a gwadama phanḓa hawe, Abisalomo o vha a tshi isa tshanḓa tshawe a mu fara a mu kuvhatedza." 
2Samuel15:6 O vha a tshi ita nga u ralo kha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha ḓa ha khosi uri vha wane khaṱhulo mbuya, ngauralo a tswa mbilu dza vhanna vha Israele." 
2Samuel15:7 Musi ho no fhela miṅwaha miṋa, Abisalomo a humbela khosi a ri, “Nga vha litshe ndi ye Hebroni ndi yo khunyeledza zwe nda fulufhedzisa Muṋe washu." 
2Samuel15:8 Zwiḽa ndi tshi kha ḓi dzula Geshuru kha ḽa Aramu, ndo fulufhedzisa nda ri, ‘Arali Muṋe washu a mmbuedzedza Jerusalema, ndi ḓo luvha Muṋe washu.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Khosi ya vhudza Abisalomo ya ri, “Tshimbilani nga mulalo.” Abisalomo a takuwa a ya Hebroni." 
2Samuel15:10 Abisalomo o vha o ruma vhaḓinḓa nga tshiphiri matsindeni oṱhe a Israele a ri, “Musi ni tshi tou pfa phalaphala dzi tshi lila, ni ambe ni ri, ‘Abisalomo o vha khosi Hebroni.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abisalomo o vha o fhelekedzwa nga vhanna vha 200 vha no bva Jerusalema. Vho vha vho vhidzwa sa vhaeni vha ya nae vha sa ḓivhi tshivhidzelwa. 
2Samuel15:12 Musi Abisalomo a tshi khou ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, a vhidzisa na Ahithofele wa Gilo, we a vha e muṅwe wa vhaeletshedzi vha Dafita, uri a ḓe a tshi bva muḓini wa hawe wa Gilo. Zwino-ha tshimbevha tsha tou pfumba, vhane vha ima na Abisalomo vha ḓi anda vha tshi ya." 
2Samuel15:13 Ha ḓa muḓinḓa a vhudza Dafita a ri, “Vhanna vha Israele vha vho ima na Abisalomo.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza magota awe oṱhe e a vha e nae Jerusalema a ri, “Iḓani! Nga ri shavhe, ra sa ralo a hu na na muthihi washu ane a nga ponyoka Abisalomo. Nga ri mbo ḓi ṱuwa, a sa ḓo ṱavhanya u tshimbila a ri fara, a ri tshinyadza a vhulaha vhoṱhe vha re fhano muḓini!”" 
2Samuel15:15 Magota a khosi a fhindula a ri, “Ro ḓiimisela u ita zwoṱhe zwine thovhele muṋe washu vha zwi funa.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Khosi ya takuwa, na muṱa wayo woṱhe wa tevhela, hone ya sia vhasadzi vhayo vha dziphuli vha fumi uri vha sale vha tshi londola pfamo." 
2Samuel15:17 Zwenezwo khosi ya takuwa, vhathu vhoṱhe vha i tevhela, vha ima nḓuni ya u fhedzisela ya muḓi." 
2Samuel15:18 Magota awe oṱhe na vhalindi vha musanda vha vha vha tshi khou fhira phanḓa hawe. Vhahali vha 600 vhe vha mu tevhela vha tshi bva Gathi na vhone vha fhira. 
2Samuel15:19 Khosi ya amba na Ithai wa Gathi ya ri, “Ni tshimbilelani na riṋe? Humani ni yo dzula na khosi Abisalomo. Hufha ni mutsinda, ni tshavhi i no bva shangoni ḽa haṋu." 
2Samuel15:20 A si kale no swika fhano, zwino nṋe ndi nga tenda ni tshi tendeleka na riṋe ndi sa ḓivhi hune nda ya hone? Humani ni ṱuwe na vha haṋu. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni pfufhela vhuthu haṋu na u fulufhedzea haṋu.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Huno Ithai a fhindula khosi a ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho na nga thovhele muṋe wanga, hoṱhe hune thovhele muṋe wanga vha ḓo vha hone, kana hu a tshiliwa kana hu a fiwa, nṋe ndi ḓo vha henefho.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Dafita a vhudza Ithai a ri, “Ndi zwone, nga ri ṱuwe.” Ndi hone Ithai wa Gathi a tshi tshimbila na vhanna vhawe vhoṱhe na miṱa yavho vhe vha vha vhe nae." 
2Samuel15:23 Vhathu vhoṱhe na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho muḓini vha lila musi vhathu vha Dafita vha tshi fhira. Khosi ya wela mulambwana wa Kidroni, na vhathu vhoṱhe vha tevhela vha livha phangani." 
2Samuel15:24 Tsadoko na ene o vha e henefho, na Vhalivi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vho vha vho hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu. Vha vhea mbulungelo ya Mudzimu fhasi, Abiathara a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo vhathu vhoṱhe vha vhuya vha bva muḓini." 
2Samuel15:25 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Tsadoko ya ri, “Humiselani mbulungelo ya Mudzimu muḓini. Arali Muṋe washu a tshi ntakalela, muṅwe musi u ḓo mmbuisa nda dovha nda i vhona na hune ya dzula hone." 
2Samuel15:26 Hone arali a ri, ‘Thi u takaleli,’ ndi a zwi ṱanganedza, nga a nnyite zwine a vhona zwi zwone.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Khosi ya vhudza tshifhe Tsadoko ya ri, “Hufha ni tshi vhona uri hu khou iteani. Humelani muḓini nga mulalo na ṅwana waṋu Ahimaatsi na Abiathara na ṅwana wawe Jonathani." 
2Samuel15:28 Nṋe ndi ḓo ima maḓambuwoni ngei phangani u swika ni tshi ntsevha.” 
2Samuel15:29 Ndi hone Tsadoko na Abiathara vha tshi dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu vha i humisela Jerusalema, vha dzula henengei." 
2Samuel15:30 Huno Dafita a gonya Thavha ya Miolivi, a enda a tshi lila; o vha o khurumela, milenzheni a songo ambara navhula. Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho na vhone vho vha vho khurumela, vha enda vha tshi lila vha tshi gonya." 
2Samuel15:31 Zwino Dafita o vha o vhudzwa ha pfi, “Ahithofele ndi muṅwe wa vho itaho vhukwila na Abisalomo.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi rabela a ri, “Yawee Muṋe wanga, pfuvhisa vhueletshedzi ha Ahithofele.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Musi Dafita a tshi swika muṱumbani wa thavha, he vhathu vha vha vha tshi anzela u luvha Mudzimu, a ṱanganedzwa nga Hushai wa Muarakhi; zwiambaro zwawe zwo vha zwo kherukana, ṱhohoni o shela buse." 
2Samuel15:33 Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Arali vha tshimbila na nṋe vha ḓo vha muhwalo kha nṋe." 
2Samuel15:34 Hone arali vha humela muḓini vha vhudza Abisalomo vha ri, ‘Thovhela, ndi ḓo vha mulanda wavho; kale ndo vha ndi mulanda wa khotsi avho, huno zwino ndi ḓo vha mulanda wavho,’ vha linge nga nungo dzoṱhe u ntikedza nga u hanedza nyeletshedzo ya Ahithofele." 
2Samuel15:35 Vhotshifhe Tsadoko na Abiathara vha ḓo vha vhe navho henefho. Vha vha vhudze zwoṱhe zwine vha zwi pfa pfamoni ya musanda. 
2Samuel15:36 Vhana vhavho vhavhili, Ahimaatsi ṅwana wa Tsadoko na Jonathani ṅwana wa Abiathara, vha navho henengei. Vha vha rume vha ḓe vha mmbudze zwine vha zwi pfa.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Hushai khonani ya Dafita a swika Jerusalema musi Abisalomo a tshi khou dzhena muḓini. 
2Samuel16:1 Musi Dafita o no fhiranyana muṱumba wa thavha, a ṱangana na Tsiba mushumeli wa Miribaali. Onoyo o vha e na donngi mbili dzi na dzisala, dzo hwala mikonde ya 200 ya vhurotho, na khekhe dza 100 dza mpale wa nḓirivhe na khekhe dza 100 dza mahuyu na gumbu ḽa mukumba ḽo ḓala waini." 
2Samuel16:2 Khosi ya vhudzisa Tsiba ya ri, “Izwi zwithu no zwi ḓiselani?” Tsiba a fhindula a ri, “Donngi dzi ḓo namelwa nga vha muṱa wa musanda, vhurotho na mitshelo ndi zwiḽiwa zwa vhanna, waini ndi ya u netulusa vhane vha neta phangani.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudzisa ya ri, “Miribaali muḓuhulu wa muṋe waṋu Saulo u ngafhi?” Tsiba a mu fhindula a ri, “O sala Jerusalema, u khou vhona unga zwino Vhaisraele vha ḓo dovha vha mu fha muvhuso wa makhulu wawe Saulo.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Tsiba ya ri, “Zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi zwa Miribaali zwino ndi zwaṋu.” Tsiba a fhindula a ri, “Ndi gwadama nga u ḓiṱukufhadza. Thovhele muṋe wanga, ngavhe ndi tshi ḓi vha takadza!”" 
2Samuel16:5 Musi khosi Dafita a tshi swika Bahurimu, muṅwe wa mashaka a Saulo ane a pfi Shimei, ṅwana wa Gera, a bvela nnḓa u ḓa u mu ṱanganedza, a sendela a tshi khou mu teketela." 
2Samuel16:6 Shimei a thoma u posa Dafita na magota awe nga matombo, naho Dafita o vha o tangwa nga mmbi yoṱhe na vhalindi vhawe." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei a tshi teketela Dafita o ri, “Ṱuwa! Ṱuwa! Phondi yenei, tshigevhenga ndiwe!" 
2Samuel16:8 Muṋe washu o u lifhedza zwe wa shulula malofha a muṱa wa Saulo we wa mu dzhiela muvhuso. Muṋe washu o dzhia muvhuso a u ṋea ṅwana wau Abisalomo. U khomboni nga vhupondi hau!” 
2Samuel16:9 Abishai ṅwana wa Tseruya a amba na khosi a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, vha nga tenda mmbwa iyi yo faho i tshi vha teketela naa? Nga vha litshe ndi mu ele ndi mu tumule ṱhoho.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Hone khosi ya ri, “Inwi vhana vha Tseruya, aya a si mafhungo anga kana aṋu! Arali a tshi khou nteketela nge Muṋe washu a ri, ‘Teketela Dafita,’ ndi nnyi ane a nga vhudzisa a ri, ‘Ndi mini u tshi ita izwi?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi amba na Abishai na magota awe oṱhe a ri, “Ṅwananga we nda mu beba u khou linga u mmbulaha. Zwino uyu wa Benyamini ni mu londelani? Mu litsheni, litshani a teketele, o rumiwa nga Muṋe washu." 
2Samuel16:12 Khamusi Muṋe washu u ḓo vhona u ṱungufhala hanga a nnyitela zwivhuya nge nda teketelwa ṋamusi.” 
2Samuel16:13 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhawe vha tshi fhirela phanḓa vha tshi tshimbila nga nḓila, Shimei a tshi tshimbila nṱha bamani o ḓi vhambela nae, a tshi enda a tshi mu teketela, a tshi mu posa nga matombo, a tshi mu hasha nga tshika." 
2Samuel16:14 Khosi na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha vhuya vha swika he vha vha vha tshi ya hone vhó neta, vha awela henefho." 
2Samuel16:15 Abisalomo na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha dzhena Jerusalema. Na Ahithofele o vha e nae. 
2Samuel16:16 Ndi hone Hushai wa Muarakhi khonani ya Dafita a tshi ya ha Abisalomo a mu vhudza a ri, “Thovhele nga vha lalame! Thovhele nga vha lalame!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abisalomo a vhudzisa Hushai a ri, “Ndi hone u fulufhedzea kha khonani yavho izwi! Ndi mini vha songo ṱuwa nayo?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa, nṋe ndi ima na we a nangiwa nga Muṋe washu na nga vhathu havha, na nga Vhaisraele vhoṱhe. Ndi ḓo vha wa onoyo, nda ima na onoyo;" 
2Samuel16:19 hone ndi nga shumela nnyi arali e si ṅwana wa muṋe wanga? Unga ndo shumela khotsi avho, zwino ndi ḓo shumela vhone.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Musi vhahulwane vho no kuvhangana, Abisalomo a vhudzisa Ahithofele a ri, “Nga vha ri eletshedze. Ri ite mini?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofele a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha dzhie vhommane vhavho vhe khotsi avho vha vha sia uri vha londole pfamo, vha vha dzhenise nḓuni. Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri vho luṱana tshoṱhe na khotsi avho, zwa konou khwaṱhisa vhoṱhe vhane vha ima navho.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Ndi hone vha tshi akhela Abisalomo dennde nṱha ha ṱhanga ya pfamo, Abisalomo a dzhenisa vhommane vhawe nḓuni Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona." 
2Samuel16:23 Misi iyo nyeletshedzo ye ya vha i tshi ṋewa nga Ahithofele yo vha i tshi ṱanganedzwa ḽa nga ipfi ḽi bvaho ha Mudzimu. Hu Dafita, he Abisalomo, vho vha vha tshi sedza nyeletshedzo dzoṱhe dza Ahithofele nga u ralo." 
2Samuel17:1 Ahithofele a dovha a eletshedza Abisalomo a ri, “Nga vha litshe ndi nange vhanna vha 12 000 vhusiku vhuno ndi londe Dafita." 
2Samuel17:2 Ndi ḓo mu tshoṱhela musi o neta o kulea nungo. Ndi ḓo mu tshenusa, vhathu vhoṱhe vha re nae vha shavha, nda vhulaha khosi fhedzi," 
2Samuel17:3 nda kumba vhathu vhoṱhe nda vha ḓisa ha vhone. Arali ha fa munna ane vha mu ṱoḓa, vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo vhuya, vha vhuya ha si tsha vha na nndwa.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Abisalomo na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele vha vhona maano ayo e avhuḓi. 
2Samuel17:5 Hone Abisalomo a ri, “Vhidzani na Hushai wa Muarakhi, ri pfe uri ene u ri mini.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Hushai a tshi swika, Abisalomo a ri, “Ahithofele o ri eletshedza nga u rali. Ri ite zwine a amba naa? Arali vha sa zwi pfesesi, nga vha ri vhudze mihumbulo yavho.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai a fhindula Abisalomo a ri, “Nyeletshedzo i no bva kha Ahithofele holuno a si yavhuḓi." 
2Samuel17:8 Vhone vha a zwi ḓivha uri khotsi avho na vhanna vhavho ndi vhahali, vhó sinyuwa vha ofhisa unga biara ḓakani yo dzhielwa vhana vhayo. Zwi si izwo fhedzi, khotsi avho ndi muthu a ḓivhaho nndwa, vhusiku a vha dzuli na mmbi." 
2Samuel17:9 Na zwino vho dzumbama bakoni kana huṅwe fhethu. Arali Dafita a ranga u dia mmbi yavho, ane a zwi pfa u ḓo ri, ‘Vhane vha ima na Abisalomo vho kundwa.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Zwenezwo na muhali a sa ofhi, wa mbilu i no nga ya ndau, u ḓo ṋoka nga nyofho, ngauri Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha a zwi ḓivha uri khotsi avho ndi muhali, na uri vhane vha ima navho ndi vhahali vha nndwa." 
2Samuel17:11 Zwino ndi vha eletshedza uri nga vha litshe Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, u bva Dani u swika Bierisheba, vha kuvhangane kha vhone vhó anda unga muṱavha wa khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe, vhone vhaṋe vha vha range phanḓa vha bve pfumo." 
2Samuel17:12 Ndi hone ri tshi ḓo kona u mu dia hune ra nga mu wana hone, ri ḓo tou mu wela unga ṅwando u tshi wela fhasi. Hu ḓo ri ene, ha ri vhanna vhawe, ha si vhe na muthihi ane a sala a tshi tshila." 
2Samuel17:13 Arali a shavhela muḓini, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ḓo ḓisa dzithambo afho muḓini, ra kokodzela uyo muḓi govhani, ha sala hu si tsha wanala na kupiḓa kwawo na kuthihi.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abisalomo na vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele vha ri, “Nyeletshedzo ya Hushai wa Muarakhi i fhira iḽa ya Ahithofele.” Zwo vha zwo tou bva ha Muṋe washu a tshi piringanya nyeletshedzo yavhuḓi ya Ahithofele uri Abisalomo a welwe nga khombo." 
2Samuel17:15 Hushai a vhudza vhotshifhe Tsadoko na Abiathara a ri, “Ahithofele o eletshedza Abisalomo na vhahulwane vha Israele uri vha ite tshauri na tshauri, hone nṋe nda vha eletshedza uri vha ite nga u rali na nga u rali." 
2Samuel17:16 Zwino nga vha rume muḓinḓa nga u ṱavhanya a yo vhudza Dafita uri, ‘Vha songo tsha vhuya vha lala maḓambuwoni a phangani, nga vha wele Jorodani, vha songo vhuya vha kundwa, khosi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha sa ḓo farwa vha vhulawa.’ ”" 
2Samuel17:17 Jonathani na Ahimaatsi vho vha vho lindela tshisimani tsha Eni Rogele. Muṅwe mushumi wa musidzana o vha o fanela u yo vha vhudza, vhone vha yo vhudza khosi Dafita, ngauri vho vha vha songo fanela u vhonwa vha tshi dzhena muḓini." 
2Samuel17:18 Hone muṅwe muṱhannga a vha vhona, a vhudza Abisalomo. Ndi hone vhuvhili havho vha tshi ṱuwa nga u ṱavhanya, vha ya Bahurimu nḓuni ya muṅwe munna. Munna uyo o vha e na dindi tsini ha nnḓu yawe, vhone vha dzhena ngomu haḽo." 
2Samuel17:19 Musadzi wa uyo munna a dzhia tsha u tiba, a tshi ṱharamudza a tiba mulomo wa dindi, a shela thoro nṱha hayo, hu si na na muthihi a no ḓivha tshithu ngazwo." 
2Samuel17:20 Musi vhanna vha Abisalomo vha tshi swika nḓuni ya uyo musadzi vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ahimaatsi na Jonathani vha ngafhi?” Musadzi uyo a fhindula a ri, “Vho wela mulambo.” Vhanna avho vha ṱoḓa, vha si wane muthu, vha mbo ḓi humela Jerusalema." 
2Samuel17:21 Musi vhaḽa vhanna vho no ṱuwa, avho vhavhili vha bva dindini, vha ya vha sevha khosi Dafita. Vha vhudza Dafita vha ri, “Nga vha takuwe vha mbo wela mulambo zwino, Ahithofele o eletshedza uri vha itwe tshauri na tshauri.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Ndi hone Dafita na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha tshi takuwa vha wela Jorodani. Ḽi tshi tsha ho vha hu si tshee na a sa athu wela Jorodani. 
2Samuel17:23 Musi Ahithofele a tshi vhona uri nyeletshedzo yawe a yo ngo ṱanganedzwa, a hwesa donngi yawe sala, a takuwa a livha nḓuni yawe muḓini wa hawe. A dzudzanya mafhungo awe zwavhuḓi, a ḓinembeledza a fa, a swiṱwa tshaloni tsha khotsi awe." 
2Samuel17:24 Dafita a ya muḓini wa Mahanaimi, Abisalomo a wela Jorodani na vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele." 
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomo o vha o no vhea Amasa uri a vhe mulangammbi vhuimoni ha Juaba. Amasa o vha e ṅwana wa Muishmaele we a vha a tshi pfi Jethere, mme awe e Abigaili, murathu wa Tseruya mme a Juaba, Abigaili na Tseruya ndi vhananyana vha Nahashi." 
2Samuel17:26 Vhaisraele na Abisalomo vha ṱoka mishasha shangoni ḽa Giliadi.
