2Samuel17:27 Dafita a tshi swika Mahanaimi, a ṱanganedzwa nga Shobi ṅwana wa Nahashi wa mutuka, ane a bva muḓini wa Raba musanda wa Amoni, a ṱanganedzwa na nga Makhiri ṅwana wa Amiele ane a bva Lodebara, na nga Barasilai ane a bva Rogelimu kha ḽa Giliadi." 
2Samuel17:28 Vha ḓisa zwifuko zwa vhulaloni na dzindilo na midzio yo vhumbwaho nga vumba, na goroi na baḽi na vhukhopfu na thoro dzo hadzingwaho na ṋawa na phonḓa" 
2Samuel17:29 na ṋotshi na makheṱhe na nngu na tshisi na mukhaha wa kholomo uri Dafita na vhanna vhawe vha ḽe. Vha ri, “Vhathu vha na nḓala, vho neta, vha na ḓora nga u tshimbila phangani.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Dafita a kuvhanganya vhanna vhawe, a vha khethekanya nga zwigwada zwa tshigidi na zwa ḓana, a vhea vhalangammbi vha izwo zwigwada." 
2Samuel18:2 A ruma mmbi ya bva nga zwigwada zwiraru, i na Juaba na murathu wa Juaba ane a pfi Abishai, ṅwana wa Tseruya, na Ithai wa Gathi, muṅwe na muṅwe e mulangammbi wa tshigwada tshawe. Khosi ya vhudza vhanna vha mmbi ya ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo takutshedza nda bva na inwi nga tshavhukoma.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Vha songo bva na riṋe, arali ra shavha, riṋe vha nga si ri tevhele. Naho ha lovha hafu yashu vha nga si londe riṋe. Vhone vha fana na zwigidi zwa fumi zwashu. Ndi khwiṋe vha tshi tou ri khwaṱhisa vhe henefha muḓini.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Ndi ḓo ita zwine na vhona zwi zwone.” Khosi ya ima thungo ha khoro vhanna vhoṱhe vha tshi khou bva nga zwigwada zwa ḓana na zwa tshigidi." 
2Samuel18:5 Khosi ya laya Juaba na Abishai na Ithai ya ri, “Ni songo huvhadza ṅwananga Abisalomo nandi.” Vhanna vhoṱhe vha zwi pfa khosi i tshi laya mulangammbi muṅwe na muṅwe nga Abisalomo." 
2Samuel18:6 Mmbi ya livha ḓakani u yo lwa na Vhaisraele, nndwa ya lwelwa maṱakani a Efraimi." 
2Samuel18:7 Henefho mmbi ya Israele ya kundwa nga vhanna vha Dafita. Musi uyo zwo tou vhifha, ha vhulawa vhanna vha 20 000." 
2Samuel18:8 Nndwa ya angaredza shango ḽeneḽo ḽoṱhe, musi wonoyo vho vhulawaho nga mupo vha fhira vho vhulawaho nga pfumo." 
2Samuel18:9 Zwino Abisalomo a tshenuwa o ṱangana na vhanna vha Dafita. O vha o namela meila yawe, musi meila i tshi khou sera nga fhasi ha davhi ḽidenya ḽa muri muhulu, ṱhoho ya Abisalomo ya fashiwa nga uyo muri, a sala o nembelela tshikhalani, meila ye a vha o i namela ya ḓi gidima i tshi ya." 
2Samuel18:10 Muṅwe wa vhanna a zwi vhona a vhudza Juaba a ri, “Ndo vhona Abisalomo o nembelela murini.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Juaba a fhindula munna we a mu vhudza ayo mafhungo a ri, “Mini? No mu vhona? Ndi mini ni songo mu vhulaha henefho a wela fhasi? Ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo ni ṋea mangwende a fumi a siliva na bannda ḽa maṱeleṱele.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Hone uyo munna a fhindula a ri, “Naho vho vha vho mpha mangwende a tshigidi a siliva, ndo vha ndi nga si ise tshanḓa tshanga kha ṅwana wa khosi. Hufha khosi yo laya vhone na Abishai na Ithai riṋe ri tshi zwi pfa ya ri, ‘Ni songo huvhadza ṅwananga Abisalomo nandi.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Huno arali ndo vha ndo nyadza khosi nda vhulaha Abisalomo, khosi yo vha i tshi ḓo zwi pfa – i pfa zwithu zwoṱhe – vhone vho vha vha tshi vho ḓo nndaṱa.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Juaba a ri, “Ndi nga si ṱwe ndo ima ndi tshi khou fhedza tshifhinga na inwi.” Juaba a dzhia nthi tharu a runga Abisalomo kha khana Abisalomo a tshi kha ḓi tshila o nembelela henefho murini." 
2Samuel18:15 Vhahwalazwihali vha Juaba vha fumi vha mbo tanga Abisalomo vha mu fhedzisa. 
2Samuel18:16 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi lidza phalaphala, mmbi dza litsha u londa Vhaisraele nge Juaba a ri vha litshe." 
2Samuel18:17 Vha dzhia Abisalomo vha mu posa dindini ḽihulu henefho maṱakani, vha khokha thulwi khulu ya matombo nṱha hawe. Zwi tshi khou ralo Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha shavhela mahayani avho." 
2Samuel18:18 Musi Abisalomo a tshi kha ḓi tshila o imisa tombo ḽa ṱhodzi ndapfu Govhani ḽa Khosi, nge a ri, “A thi na ṅwana ane a ḓo ita uri dzina ḽanga ḽi si hangwiwe.” A rina iḽo tombo dzina ḽawe, na ṋamusi ḽi kha ḓi pfi Tshihumbudzo tsha Abisalomo." 
2Samuel18:19 Zwino Ahimaatsi ṅwana wa Tsadoko a ri, “Litshani ndi gidime ndi swikise mafhungo aya ha khosi uri Muṋe washu o mu lamulela zwanḓani zwa maswina awe.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Juaba a mu vhudza a ri, “Ṋamusi mafhungo ha swikiswi nga inwi. Ni nga ḓi swikisa mafhungo muṅwe musi, hone ṋamusi a hu yi inwi, ngauri ho vhulawa ṅwana wa khosi.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ruma phuli yawe ya Mukushu a ri, “Tshimbilani ni yo vhudza khosi zwe na zwi vhona.” Mukushu a gwadama phanḓa ha Juaba a gidima a ṱuwa." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaatsi ṅwana wa Tsadoko a dovha a vhudza Juaba a ri, “Naho ha itea mini, nga vha litshe ndi tevhele Mukushu nga luvhilo.” Hone Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Ṅwananga, ndi mini ni tshi ḓidina nga u ya? Hufha ni sa ḓo wana tshithu nga mafhungo aṋu.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimaatsi a ri, “Naho ha itea mini, ndi funa u gidima nda ya.” Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ri, “Gidimani zwaṋu!” Ahimaatsi a gidima nga nḓila ya govhani ḽa Jorodani a fhirela Mukushu." 
2Samuel18:24 Dafita o vha o dzula vhukati ha khoro ya ngomu na ya nnḓa, mulindi a gonya mutsheṱo a yo ima ṱhangani ya mafhoro. A tshi sedza nnḓa a vhona muṅwe munna a tshi khou gidima e eṱhe." 
2Samuel18:25 Mulindi a ḓivhadza khosi a tshi tou vhidzelela. Khosi ya ri, “Arali e eṱhe a nga vha a tshi khou ḓisa mafhungo mavhuya.” Munna uyo a ḓi sendela." 
2Samuel18:26 Zwino mulindi a vhona muṅwe-vho a tshi khou gidima, a vhidzelela mulindakhoro a ri, “Vhonani, hu na muṅwe munna, u khou gidima e eṱhe!” Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Na ene a nga vha a tshi khou ḓisa mafhungo mavhuya.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Mulindi a ri, “Ndi vhona unga wa u thoma u gidima unga Ahimaatsi ṅwana wa Tsadoko.” Khosi ya ri, “Ahimaatsi ndi muvhuya. U khou ḓisa mafhungo mavhuya.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaatsi a vhidzelela khosi a ri, “Zwoṱhe zwo luga!” Ahimaatsi a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa ha khosi a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho! O ri kumedza vhanna vhe vha vha vutshela thovhela muṋe wanga.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Uḽa muṱhannga Abisalomo ho ngo huvhala?” Ahimaatsi a fhindula a ri, “Ndo vhona hu na vilinga ḽihulu hezwi gota ḽavho Juaba a tshi khou nndaedza, a thi ḓivhi uri ho itea mini.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Khosi ya ri, “Imelani thungo ni lindele henefho.” Zwenezwo a bvela thungo a ima henefho." 
2Samuel18:31 Zwino ha swika na Mukushu a ri, “Thovhele muṋe wanga, nga vha pfe mafhungo mavhuya! Ṋamusi Muṋe washu o ita uri vha kunde vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vutshela.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Khosi ya vhudzisa Mukushu ya ri, “Muṱhannga uḽa Abisalomo ho ngo huvhala naa?” Mukushu a fhindula a ri, “Ngavhe zwo mu welaho zwi tshi wela maswina avho oṱhe na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vutshela vha tshi ṱoda u huvhadza thovhele muṋe wanga.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Khosi ya tetemela, ya gonya kamarani i re nṱha ha mafhoro ya lila, ya enda i tshi ri, “Yawee, ṅwananga Abisalomo! Ṅwananga, ṅwananga Abisalomo! Ngavhe ho fa nṋe hu si fe iwe! Yawee, ṅwananga, ṅwananga Abisalomo!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Juaba a vhudzwa upfi, “Khosi i khou ṱavha mukosi, i khou lila Abisalomo.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Musi wonoyo dakalo ḽa u takalela u kunda ḽa shanduka zwililo kha mmbi yoṱhe ya Dafita ngauri vho pfa hu tshi pfi, “Khosi yo ṱungufhalela ṅwana wayo.”" 
2Samuel19:3 Musi wonoyo vhanna vha ṋengeledza vha dzhena muḓini unga vhanna vha re na ṱhoni vha tshi ṋengeledza vha dzhena vha nga vho shavha nndwani. 
2Samuel19:4 Khosi ya khurumela ya tou ṱavha mukosi ya ri, “Yawee, ṅwananga Abisalomo! Ṅwananga, ṅwananga, Abisalomo!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Juaba a ya ha khosi a dzhena kamarani a ri, “Ṋamusi vho shonisa vhanna vhavho vhoṱhe vhane vha kha ḓi bva u vha tshidza vha tshidza na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, vha tshidza na vhafumakadzi vhavho na vhasadzi vhavho vha dziphuli." 
2Samuel19:6 Vhone vha funa vha vha vhengaho, vha vhenga vha vha funaho. Ṋamusi vho zwi sumbedza zwavhuḓivhuḓi uri vhalangammbi na vhanna vhavho a vha vha londi. Ndi khou zwi vhona uri vhone vho vha vha tshi ḓo takala ṋamusi arali Abisalomo a tshi khou tshila, riṋe roṱhe ro fa." 
2Samuel19:7 Zwino nga vha bve vha yo khuthadza vhanna vhavho. Nga Muṋe washu ndi ri arali vhone vha sa bvela nnḓa, a hu nga vhi na munna na muthihi ane a ḓo sala na vhone vhusiku vhuno. Hezwi zwi ḓo vha vhifhela u fhira khombo dzoṱhe dze dza vhuya dza vha wela u bva hanani havho u swika zwino.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vuwa ya yo dzula vhudzuloni hayo mafhoroni, vhanna vha vhudzwa upfi, “Khosi yo dzula mafhoroni,” vhoṱhe vha ḓa phanḓa hayo. Vhaisraele vhone vho vha vho shavhela mahayani avho." 
2Samuel19:9 Kha matsinde oṱhe a Israele, vhathu vho vha vha tshi vho solana vha tshi ri, “Khosi yo ri tshidza zwanḓani zwa maswina, ndi yone ye ya ri lamulela zwanḓani zwa Vhafilista. Huno zwino yo shavha shango nga mulandu wa Abisalomo." 
2Samuel19:10 Abisalomo we ra mu vhumba uri a ri vhuse, o fela nndwani. Zwino ndi mini ni sa vhuyi na amba zwa u vhuisa khosi?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Khosi Dafita a ruma muḓinḓa ha vhotshifhe Tsadoko na Abiathara a ri, “Vhudzisani vhahulwane vha Juda ni ri, ‘Ndi mini inwi ni tshi nga vha vha u fhedzisela u vhuedzedza khosi pfamoni yayo? Hufha zwine zwa khou ambiwa Israele ḽoṱhe zwo swika ha khosi pfamoni yayo!" 
2Samuel19:12 Inwi ni mashaka anga, ri vhathihi, ri malofha mathihi. Zwino ndi mini ni tshi nga vha inwi vha u fhedzisela u vhuisa khosi?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Ni vhudze Amasa ni ri, ‘Kani a ri vhathihi? A ri malofha mathihi? Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi nthwa a dovha arali u bva zwino nda sa ni ita mulangammbi wanga vhuimoni ha Juaba.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Dafita a tswa mbilu dza vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda vha tou nga munna muthihi. Vha swikisa ipfi ha khosi vha ri, “Nga vha vhuye, vhone na vhanna vhavho vhoṱhe.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Khosi ya vhuya, ya tshimbila ya swika Jorodani. Zwino vhanna vha Juda vho vha vho ḓa Giligala uri vha bve vha yo ṱanganedza khosi, vha i wedze Jorodani." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei ṅwana wa Gera wa Benyamini, a no bva Bahurimu, a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a tsa na vhanna vha Juda u yo ṱanganedza khosi Dafita." 
2Samuel19:17 O vha e na vha Benyamini vha tshigidi, khathihi na Tsiba, mulondoli wa muṱa wa Saulo, na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vha 15 na vhashumi vha 20. Vha gidimela Jorodani vha dzhena maḓini khosi i tshi zwi vhona," 
2Samuel19:18 vha wela nga ḓambuwoni u yo dzhia muṱa wa khosi na u tonda khosi nga zwine ya funa. Musi Shimei ṅwana wa Gera o wela Jorodani a wa a shuvhama phanḓa ha khosi 
2Samuel19:19 a ri, “Ngavhe muṋe wanga vha sa mpfari nga mbilu. Nga vha hangwe zwe nda tshinya musi we vha ṱuwa Jerusalema. Ngavhe thovhele vha tshi zwi bvisa mbiluni yavho." 
2Samuel19:20 Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri ndo tshinya hone ṋamusi ndo ḓa fhano nda vha wa u thoma wa nnḓu yoṱhe ya Josefa u ḓa nda ṱanganedza thovhele muṋe wanga.” 
2Samuel19:21 Ndi hone Abishai ṅwana wa Tseruya a tshi ri, “Shimei ho ngo fanela u vhulawa naa? Hufha o teketela we Muṋe washu a mu nanga uri a vhe khosi!”" 
2Samuel19:22 Dafita a fhindula a ri, “A thi funi na u zwi pfa hezwo inwi vhana vha Tseruya! Ṋamusi ni vhavutsheli vhanga! Ṋamusi ho fanela u vhulawa muthu kha ḽa Israele naa? Nṋe a thi zwi ḓivhi uri ṋamusi ndi khosi ya Israele naa?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Shimei ya ri, “Ni nga si vhulawe.” Khosi ya dovha ya fulufhedzisa Shimei nga muano." 
2Samuel19:24 Miribaali muḓuhulu wa Saulo, na ene a yo ṱanganedza khosi. Tshi tsheetsho tshe khosi ya ṱuwa u swika i tshi vhuya nga mifhululu, Miribaali o vha a sa athu vhuya a ṱamba milenzhe kana a fhungudza ndebvu dzawe kana a kuvha zwiambaro zwawe." 
2Samuel19:25 Musi a tshi bva Jerusalema u ḓa u ṱanganedza khosi, khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Miribaali, ndi mini ni songo shavha na nṋe?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Miribaali a ri, “Thovhela muṋe wanga, vhunga ndi tshihole, ndo ri, ‘Donngi yanga i ḓo hweswa sala nda i namela uri ndi ṱuwe na khosi.’ Hone Tsiba mushumi wanga o mpheṱa." 
2Samuel19:27 O nnzwifhelela kha thovhele muṋe wanga. Hone thovhele muṋe wanga vha nga muruṅwa wa Mudzimu, nga vha ite zwine vha vhona zwo fanela." 
2Samuel19:28 Vhaḓuhulu vhoṱhe vha makhulu wanga wa tshinna ho vha hu si na tsho vha teaho arali hu si u vhulawa nga thovhele muṋe wanga, naho zwo ralo vho nkhathutshela nda vho ḽa ḓafulani ḽavho. Ndi nga dovha nda humbela u lilelwa nga mini nga thovhele?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Khosi ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Mafhungo o fhela! Ndi ri inwi na Tsiba ni kovhekane masimu a Saulo.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Miribaali a vhudza khosi a ri, “Nga vha litshe Tsiba a dzhie zwoṱhe, tenda thovhele muṋe wanga vho vhuela hayani vho takala!”" 
2Samuel19:31 Barasilai wa Giliadi na ene a ḓa a tshi bva Rogelimu uri a wedze khosi Jorodani, a i fhelekedze a tshi bva henefho." 
2Samuel19:32 Zwino Barasilai o vha o no kalahesa, e na miṅwaha ya 80. O vha a tshi vhavhalela khosi zwiḽa i Mahanaimi, ngauri o vha o pfuma zwihulu." 
2Samuel19:33 Khosi ya amba na Barasilai ya ri, “Nga ri wele roṱhe ri yo dzula roṱhe Jerusalema, ndi ḓo vha vhavhalela.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Huno Barasilai a fhindula khosi a ri, “Ndi kha ḓi ḓo tshila miṅwaha mingana, zwine nda vhuya nda ṱuwa na thovhele nda yo dzula Jerusalema?" 
2Samuel19:35 Zwino ndi na makole a 80. Ndi kha ḓi vhuya nda thetshela tshi no ḓifha na tshi sa ḓifhi naa? Tshine nda ḽa kana nda nwa ndi kha ḓi tshi thetshela naa? Maipfi a vhaimbi ndi kha ḓi a pfa lini? Ndi nga tou vha muhwalo kha thovhele muṋe wanga. 
2Samuel19:36 Nga vha litshe ndi wedze thovhele mulambo ndi vha fhelekedze tshikhalanyana, hone thovhele vha kha ḓi ḓidinelani nga u mpfufha nga u rali?" 
2Samuel19:37 Nga vha litshe ndi hume uri ndi fele muḓini wa hashu tsini ha tshalo tsha khotsi anga na mme anga. Huno ṅwananga Khimihamu ngoyu. Nga vha litshe a wele na thovhele muṋe wanga. Nga vha mu itele tshine vha tou funa.” 
2Samuel19:38 Khosi ya ri, “Khimihamu u ḓo wela seli na nṋe, ndi ḓo mu itela tshine vha tou funa. Na tshine vha funa ndi tshi vha itela ndi ḓo vha itela.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi wela Jorodani, na khosi ya wela seli. Khosi ya kuvhatedza Barasilai ya mu shudufhadza, Barasilai a humela hayani hawe." 
2Samuel19:40 Khosi ya wetshela Giligala, Khimihamu a wela nayo. Mmbi yoṱhe ya Juda na tshipiḓa tsha mmbi ya Israele vho vha vho wedza khosi seli." 
2Samuel19:41 Hu si kale vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele vha ya ha khosi vha ri, “Ndi mini mashaka ashu vhanna vha Juda vho tswa khosi vha ṱuwa nayo, vha i endedza na muṱa wayo ya wela Jorodani khathihi na vhanna vhayo vhoṱhe?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda vha fhindula vhanna vha Israele vha ri, “Izwo ro zwi ita nge khosi ya vha shaka ḽashu ḽa tsini. Ndi mini zwi tshi ni sinyusa? Kani ro ḽeledza khosi? Ro vhuya ra dzhia tshithu tsha vha tshashu kani?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Ndi hone vhanna vha Israele vha tshi fhindula vhanna vha Juda vha ri, “Riṋe ri na mikovhe ya fumi kha khosi, vhukuma Dafita ndi washu u fhira u vha waṋu. Zwino ndi mini ni tshi ri nyadza? A si riṋe vhe ra thoma u amba uri khosi nga i vhuye naa?” Hone vhanna vha Juda vha fhindula nga vhuhali vhu no fhira ha vhanna vha Israele." 
2Samuel20:1 Henefho Giligala ho vha hu na muṅwe muthu a sa ḓivhalei a no pfi Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri wa tsinde ḽa Benyamini. Onoyo a lidza phalaphala a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Riṋe a ri na mukovhe kha Dafita, a ri na tshipiḓa kha ṅwana wa Isai. Inwi Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe nga a livhe hayani hawe!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Ndi hone vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele vha tshi ṱutshela Dafita vha tevhela Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri. Hone vhanna vha Juda vha sala na khosi yavho vha tshimbila nayo u bva Jorodani u swika Jerusalema. 
2Samuel20:3 Musi Dafita a tshi vhuelela pfamoni yawe Jerusalema, o dzhia vhasadzi vha fumi vha dziphuli vhe a ri vha sale vha tshi londola pfamo, a ita uri vha dzule nḓuni yavho vha tshi lindiwa. O vha a tshi vha vhavhalela, hone a si vha dzhenise nḓuni. Vho vha vha tshi dzula vho hoṋelwa vha vhuya vha fa, vha tshi tshila unga tshilikadzi." 
2Samuel20:4 Ndi hone khosi i tshi amba na Amasa ya ri, “Rambani vhanna vha Juda vha ḓe ha nṋe hu sa athu fhela maḓuvha mararu, na inwi ni vhe hone.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Hone musi Amasa a tshi yo ramba Vhajuda, a fhirisa tshifhinga tshe a vhetshelwa nga khosi." 
2Samuel20:6 Dafita a vhudza Abishai a ri, “Zwino Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri u ḓo ri ita zwo vhifhaho u fhira zwe ra itwa nga Abisalomo. Dzhiani vhanna vha mu londe, a sa ḓo wana miḓi i re na mitsheṱo a ri ponyoka a shavha.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Ndi hone vhanna vha Juaba na vhalindakhosi na vhahali vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha tshi takuwa Jerusalema vhe na Abishai vha yo londa Sheba. 
2Samuel20:8 Musi vhe tomboni ḽihulu ḽa Gibioni, Amasa a ḓa a vha ṱanganedza. Juaba o vha o ambara tshiambaro tshawe tsha nndwa, khunduni tsho vhofhiwa nga bannda i re na banga ngomu ha tshilanda tshaḽo. Musi a tshi khou tshimbila, banga ḽa bva kha tshilanda ḽa wela fhasi." 
2Samuel20:9 Juaba a amba na Amasa a ri, “Hu ita hani murathu?” Ndi hone Juaba a tshi fara ndebvu dza Amasa nga tshanḓa tshauḽa uri a mu kuvhatedze." 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa o vha a sa vhoni banga ḽe Juaba a ḽi fara, Juaba a mbo mu hushula thumbu ngaḽo, mala a wela fhasi. Amasa a sala a tshi fa a songo dovha a rungwa. Ni hone Juaba na murathu wawe Abishai vha tshi londa Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Muṅwe wa vhanna vha Juaba a ima tsini na Amasa a ri, “Ane a takalela Juaba, ane a vha wa Dafita, nga a tevhele Juaba!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa o vha o rambalala vhukati ha nḓila o ḓala malofha. Munna uyo a vhona uri mmbi dzoṱhe dzi ḓa dzi tshi ima henefho. Musi a tshi vhona uri muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi swika kha Amasa u a ima, a mu kokodzela tsimuni a bva nḓilani, a mu fukedza nga nguvho." 
2Samuel20:13 Musi Amasa o no sudzuluswa nḓilani vhanna vhoṱhe vha fhirela phanḓa vhe na Juaba u londa Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri. 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba a fhira nga mashangoni a matsinde oṱhe a Israele a ya muḓini wa Abele Bethe Maakha, vhoṱhe vha mutupo wa Bikhiri vha kuvhangana vha mu tevhela vha dzhena muḓini." 
2Samuel20:15 Mmbi yoṱhe ye ya vha i na Juaba ya ḓa ya govhela Sheba henefho muḓini wa Abele Bethe Maakha. vha ita thulwi dza mavu dza ḓitika nga mutsheṱo wa nnḓa, vha thoma u bwa nga fhasi ha mutsheṱo uri u wele fhasi." 
2Samuel20:16 Henefho muḓini ho vha hu na musadzi wa vhuṱali. A ḓa a ṱavha mukosi e mutsheṱoni a ri, “Aa! Aa! Vhidzani Juaba a ḓe fhano uri ndi ambe nae.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Juaba a ya khae, uyo musadzi a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi vhone Vho-Juaba?” Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe!” Musadzi a ri, “Nga vha thetshelese zwine nda amba.” Juaba a ri, “Ndi khou thetshelesa.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Musadzi a ri, “Kale-kale vhathu vho vha vha tshi anzela u ri, ‘Tshimbilani ni yo wana nyeletshedzo muḓini wa Abele,’ zwa konou naka zwoṱhe." 
2Samuel20:19 Riṋe ri vhadziamulalo na u fulufhedzea kha ḽa Israele. Vhone vha khou linga u lozwa muḓi une wa vha ene mme kha ḽa Israele. Vha khou ṱoḓa u phusukanya zwine zwa vha zwa Muṋe washu naa?” 
2Samuel20:20 Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Na kathihi! Izwo ndi nga si zwi ite, ngoho muḓi waṋu ndi nga si u phusukanye kana nda u lozwa!" 
2Samuel20:21 Mafhungo ho ngo tou ralo. Uḽa munna ane a pfi Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri, ane a bva mivhunduni ya Efraimi, o isa tshanḓa tshawe kha khosi a lwa na Dafita. Ri kumedzeni munna onoyo muthihi, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo ṱuwa fhano muḓini.” Musadzi a vhudza Juaba a ri, “Ri ḓo ni posa ṱhoho yawe nga mutsheṱoni.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Musadzi a vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe iyo nyeletshedzo yawe ya vhuṱali, vha tumula ṱhoho ya Sheba ṅwana wa Bikhiri vha i posa Juaba nga mutsheṱoni. Ndi hone Juaba a tshi lidza phalaphala, vhanna vhawe vha ṱuwa afho muḓini vha balangana, muṅwe na muṅwe a humela hayani hawe. Juaba a vhuelela ha khosi Jerusalema." 
2Samuel20:23 Mulangi wa mmbi yoṱhe ya Israele o vhe e Juaba; vhalindi vha khosi vho vha vha tshi langwa nga Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada," 
2Samuel20:24 mulangi wa vhane vha shuma nga khombekhombe e Adinoramu, tshanḓa tsha khosi e Josafati ṅwana wa Ahiludu." 
2Samuel20:25 Muṅwaleli wa khothe o vha e Sheva, vhotshifhe vhe Tsadoko na Abiathara." 
2Samuel20:26 Na Ira a no bva muḓini wa Jairi o vha e muṅwe wa vhotshifhe vha Dafita. 
2Samuel21:1 Dafita a tshee khosi ho vhuya ha wa nḓala ya fhedza miṅwaha miraru. Dafita a vhudzisa Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Saulo na nnḓu yawe vha na mulandu wa vhupondi, vho vhulaha Vhagibioni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Khosi ya vhidzisa Vhagibioni ya amba navho. Vhagibioni vho vha vha si Vhaisraele, vho vha vhe tsalela dza Vhaamori vhe Vhaisraele vha fulufhedzisa nga muano uri vha nga si vha vhulahe, hone Saulo a linga u vha lozwa nge mbilu yawe ya vha i tshi swela Vhaisraele na Vhajuda." 
2Samuel21:3 Dafita a vhudzisa Vhagibioni a ri, “Ndi ni itele mini? Ndi nga lifha ngani uri ni kone u shudufhadza vhathu vha Muṋe washu?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Vhagibioni vha mu fhindula vha ri, “A ri na pfanelo ya uri ri fhiwe siliva kana musuku nga Saulo kana nga nnḓu yawe, nahone a ri na pfanelo ya u vhulaha muṅwe Muisraele.” Dafita a vhudzisa a ri, “Zwino ni ṱoḓa ndi tshi ni itela mini?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Vhagibioni vha fhindula khosi vha ri, “Ho vha na munna we a ri lozwa, a ri itela vhunwa uri hu si sale na muthihi washu a tshi tshila kha ḽa Israele." 
2Samuel21:6 Nga vha ri kumedze vhaḓuhulu vhawe vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha vhanna ri vha vhulahe, ri vha ṱane phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ngei Gibia muḓini wa Saulo, we a vha o nangwa nga Muṋe washu uri a vhe khosi.” Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Ndi ḓo ni kumedza vhone.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Khosi ya khathutshela Miribaali ṅwana wa Jonathani, ṅwana wa Saulo, nge Dafita na Jonathani ṅwana wa Saulo vha vha vho anelana phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
2Samuel21:8 Huno khosi ya dzhia Arimoni na Miribaali, vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka vhe Ritsipha ṅwana wa Aya a vha bebela Saulo, a dzhia na vhana vhaṱanu vha vhatuka vha Mirabu ṅwananyana wa Saulo, vhe a vha o vha bebela Adriele ṅwana wa Barasilai, we a vha a tshi bva Mihola." 
2Samuel21:9 Dafita a vha kumedza Vhagibioni, vha vha vhulaha, vha vha ṱana tshikwarani phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Vhoṱhe vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha fa, vhó vhulawa musi khaṋo ya bali i tshi thoma." 
2Samuel21:10 Ritsipha ṅwananyana wa Aya a dzhia madzanganda awe a u lila vhafu a a adza kha tombo. U bva tshee khaṋo ya thoma, mvula ya vhuya ya shuluwa i tshi bva ṱaḓulu ya na kha izwo zwitumbu, Ritsipha ho ngo vhuya a litsha zwiṋoni zwi tshi ḽa izwo zwitumbu masiari kana phukha dza ḓaka vhusiku." 
2Samuel21:11 Musi Dafita a tshi vhudzwa zwe zwa itwa nga Ritsipha ṅwananyana wa Aya, musadzi wa Saulo wa phuli," 
2Samuel21:12 a ya Giliadi a dzhia marambo a Saulo na a ṅwana wawe Jonathani kha vhadzulapo vha Jabeshe. Vhenevho vho vha vho a dzhia nga tshiphiri khoroni ya Bethe Shiani, he Vhafilista vha a nembeledza vhó no vhulaha Saulo thavhani dza Gilibua." 
2Samuel21:13 Dafita a dzhia marambo a Saulo na a ṅwana wawe Jonathani a ita na u kuvhanganya marambo a vhaḽa vhanna vhaṱanu na vhavhili vhe vha vhulawa vha ṱaniwa. 
2Samuel21:14 Vha swiṱa marambo a Saulo na a ṅwana wawe Jonathani tshaloni tsha Kishi khotsi a Saulo muḓini wa Tsela shangoni ḽa Benyamini, vha ita zwoṱhe zwe khosi ya vha laya. Ho no fhela zwenezwo, Mudzimu a fhindula thabelo dzavho dza u rabelela shango." 
2Samuel21:15 Ho vhuya ha vha na nndwa ya Vhafilista na Vhaisraele. Dafita a tsa na vhanna vhawe u yo lwa na Vhafilista, a swika he a neta." 
2Samuel21:16 Muṅwe munna wa muswonḓa we a vha a tshi pfi Ishibi Benobo o vha o fara pfumo ḽa musinaseṱha ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi nga lemela khilogiramu tharu na hafu, o kungela banga ḽiswa, a elekanya uri a nga vhulaha Dafita." 
2Samuel21:17 Hone Abishai ṅwana wa Tseruya a ḓa a lamulela Dafita, a lwa na uyo munna wa muswonḓa a mu vhulaha. Ndi hone vhanna vha Dafita vha tshi mu fulufhedzisa vha ri, “Vhone vha luvhone lwa Israele, vha songo dovha vha bva na riṋe pfumo, uri luvhone lwashu lu si dzime.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Ngavhuya ha dohwa ha lwiwa na Vhafilista muḓini wa Gobo. Misi yeneyo Sibekhai wa Husha a vhulaha munna wa muswonḓa we a vha a tshi pfi Safu. 
2Samuel21:19 Ha dohwa hafhu ha lwiwa na Vhafilista henefho Gobo, Elihanani ṅwana wa Jairo wa Betlehema a vhulaha Goliada wa Gathi, we a vha e na pfumo ḽi re na mufhiṋi une wa eḓana na luṱanga lwa muhoṱi." 
2Samuel21:20 Ha dohwa hafhu ha lwiwa iṅwe nndwa Gathi. Henefho ho vha hu na munna wa muswonḓa mulapfulapfu. O vha e na minwe miṱanu na muthihi kha tshanḓa tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe na zwikunwane zwiṱanu na tshithihi kha lwayo luṅwe na luṅwe, zwoṱhe zwó ṱangana zwa ita 24. Na ene o vha e muḓuhulu wa Rafa." 
2Samuel21:21 O nyefula Vhaisraele, Jonathani ṅwana wa Shama mukomana wa Dafita a mbo mu vhulaha." 
2Samuel21:22 Havho vhaṋa vho vha vhe vhaḓuhulu vha Rafa wa Gathi, vho vhulawa nga Dafita na vhanna vhawe." 
2Samuel22:1 Dafita o imbela Muṋe washu luimbo holu musi Muṋe washu o mu lamulela zwanḓani zwa maswina awe oṱhe na zwanḓani zwa Saulo. 
2Samuel22:2 Dafita o ri: “Muṋe washu ndi bako ḽanga, ndi vhushavhelo hanga, ndi Mulamuleli wanga." 
2Samuel22:3 Mudzimu wanga ndi tombo ḽanga, Ene ane nda khuda ngae, ndi Ene tshiṱangu tshanga, pfumo ḽi nndwelaho. Ndo ḓitika ngae, ndi dzhavhelo ḽanga, ndi Mutshidzi wanga, u ntshidza kha vhanna vha tshiṱuhu." 
2Samuel22:4 Muṋe washu ndo ḓi mu vhidzelela ndó welwa nga maswina, a ntshidza, nga hu khoḓwe Ene." 
2Samuel22:5 “Ndo vha ndo kumbiwa nga magabelo a lufu, ndó khakhedzwa nga tshirulu tsha ndozwo." 
2Samuel22:6 Ndo vha ndo tandedzwa nga mambule a tshalo, ndó livhana na milavhu ya lufu," 
2Samuel22:7 nda ḓi vhidzelela Muṋe washu ndó khakhedzwa, Mudzimu wanga nda mu ṱavhela mukosi, Ene a pfa ipfi ḽanga e pfamoni yawe, mukosi wanga wa swika nḓevheni dzawe." 
2Samuel22:8 “Zwenezwo shango ḽa dzinginyea ḽa tetemela, miteo ya ḽiṱaḓulu ya tseka-tseka, ya tetemela ó sinyuwa." 
2Samuel22:9 Ningoni dzawe ha duba vhutsi, mulomoni wawe ha bva khavhu dza vhuhali, a pfela masimbe a mulilo fhasi." 
2Samuel22:10 Lutombo a lu peta a tsela fhasi, fhasi ha ṋayo dzawe hú na swiswi ḽitswu-ḽitswu," 
2Samuel22:11 a fhufha ó namela mukherube, a vhonala o tengama nga phapha dza muya," 
2Samuel22:12 a dzhia swiswi a fuka ḽone, thumba yawe e makole matswu a mvula," 
2Samuel22:13 phanḓa hawe he vhenge, vhenge, makole a shulula masimbe," 
2Samuel22:14 Muṋe washu a ritha mubvumo ṱaḓulu he ngindii, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a mbo ṱahisa ipfi ḽawe," 
2Samuel22:15 a posa misevhe yawe a vha balanganya, a thathabisa nḓadzi dzawe vha shavha vhó ḓaḓa." 
2Samuel22:16 Zwenezwo miedzi ya lwanzhe ya sala nnḓa, miteo ya ḽifhasi ya sala khagala u tshi vha kaidza Iwe Muṋe washu, hu tshi tita muya u bvaho ningoni dzau." 
2Samuel22:17 “Muṋe washu a onyolosa tshanḓa e ngei ṱaḓulu, a ntakula a nṋula mikumbelani," 
2Samuel22:18 a nndamukisa zwanḓani zwa swina ḽanga ḽa maanḓa na vha mmbengaho, ngauri nṋe ndo vha ndi nga si vha kone." 
2Samuel22:19 Vho nnzhongondedza ndó welwa nga zwo vhifhaho, fhedzi nda tou fa Muṋe washu," 
2Samuel22:20 Ene a nṋula vhukati havho. O ntshidza ngauri u a mpfuna. 
2Samuel22:21 “Muṋe washu o mpfufha nga zwo fanelaho a no fulufhedzea, a nṋea zwo fanelaho a si na mulandu," 
2Samuel22:22 ngauri ndo tevhedza nḓila dza Muṋe washu, a tho ngo tenda vhuvhi vhu tshi mphandekanya na Mudzimu wanga." 
2Samuel22:23 Milayo yawe yoṱhe a i ṱuwi mbiluni yanga, zwe a laya a tho ngo zwi sendedza kule." 
2Samuel22:24 Ene muṋe o vhona ndi sa solisei, tshanga ho ḓi vha u ofha u khakha." 
2Samuel22:25 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a mpfufha nga zwo fanelaho a no fulufhedzea, nge a vhona ndi si na mulandu." 
2Samuel22:26 “Vha vhuthu Iwe u ḓi vha ita-vho nga vhuthu; a sa solisei u mu pfufha nga zwi sa solisei; 
2Samuel22:27 vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho vha wana na Iwe u na mbilu tshena, hone vhadziavhumbulu vha wana u swina." 
2Samuel22:28 Iwe u tshidza vha ḓiṱukufhadzaho, wa ṱukufhadza vha u ḓihudza." 
2Samuel22:29 “Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe luvhone lwanga, wa pandela swiswi ḽo ntibaho, Iwe Mudzimu wanga." 
2Samuel22:30 Ndí na Iwe ndi wela mmbi nga pfumo, ndí na Mudzimu wanga ndi fhufha mitsheṱo." 
2Samuel22:31 Ndi Ene Mudzimu a sa khakhi, ḽine a amba ḽi ḓi wanala ḽi ngoho. Ndi Ene tshiṱangu tsha vhoṱhe vhane vha khuda ngae." 
2Samuel22:32 Nṋa hone Mudzimu ndi nnyi arali e si Ene Muṋe washu? Bako ḽa vhudzumbamo hashu ndi nnyi arali e si Mudzimu washu? 
2Samuel22:33 Ndi Ene Mudzimu we a nnyambadza nungo, nda tshimbila ndi sa khukhulwi." 
2Samuel22:34 U mpha luvhilo lwa phala, na nṱha ha thavha a thi khukhulwi." 
2Samuel22:35 Zwanḓa zwanga u zwi gudisa nndwa, zwa khwaṱha nda akha vhura ha tsimbi tswuku." 
2Samuel22:36 “U tshidzwa nga Iwe ndi tshone tshiṱangu tshanga, wa pfa thabelo yanga wa mpha vhuhulwane." 
2Samuel22:37 Ṋayo dzanga wo dzi ṋea vhukando nda sa redzemuwe. 
2Samuel22:38 Maswina anga ndo a pandamedza nda a fhedza, nda si vha humele vha sa athu fhela vhoṱhe." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndo vha kuyekanya tshoṱhe nda vha kandekanya nga ṋayo dzanga. 
2Samuel22:40 Wo mpha maanḓa a u dzhena nndwa, maswina anga wa a susumedza fhasi ha ṋayo dzanga." 
2Samuel22:41 Wo ita uri maswina anga a mphe zwitiko, nda fhedza vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi mmbenga." 
2Samuel22:42 Vho ṱavha mukosi vha shaya mulamuleli, vha vhidzelela Muṋe washu a si vha aravhe," 
2Samuel22:43 nda vha phusukanya sa mavu, nda vha kudza nnḓa vha nga lurofhe nḓilani." 
2Samuel22:44 “Wo nndamukisa vha hashu vha tshi mmvutshela, wa ntsireledza nda vha ṱhoho ya tshakha, nda luvhiwa na nga vhane nda si vha ḓivhe." 
2Samuel22:45 Vhatsinda vho ḓa vha khotha, vho ri u mpfa vha thetshelesa," 
2Samuel22:46 vha kulea miraḓo, vha bva mitsheṱoni yavho vha tshi tou khura nga nyofho." 
2Samuel22:47 “Muṋe washu u a tshila! Nga hu rendwe Ene bako ḽanga, nga hu huliswe Ene Mudzimu wanga, Ene tombo ḽine nda shavhela khaḽo." 
2Samuel22:48 Ndi Mudzimu we a mpha maanḓa a u ḓilifhedzela, tshakha a dzi ita vhalanda vhanga," 
2Samuel22:49 a nndamukisa zwanḓani zwa vha mmbengaho. Ndi Iwe we wa nṋea vhuhulwane nda fhira maswina anga, vhalevhi vha tshi mmvutshela wa ntshidza." 
2Samuel22:50 Muṋe washu, ndi zwine nda ḓo u renda vhukati ha dzitshakha, ndi ḓo renda dzina ḽau nga luimbo." 
2Samuel22:51 Khosi ye wa i ta wa i sumbedza lufuno lu sa dzinginyei, ya kunda maswina tshoṱhe – ene Dafita na vhaḓuhulu vhawe, zwino na lini na lini.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Maipfi a Dafita a u fhedzisela ngea, o ri: “Ngea mafhungo a Dafita ṅwana wa Isai, ndi mafhungo a munna we a huliswa, munna we a tiwa nga Mudzimu wa Jakopo, muimbi makone wa dzinyimbo wa Israele." 
2Samuel23:2 “Muya wa Muṋe washu o amba nga mulomo wanga, maipfi awe o vha e lulimini lwanga." 
2Samuel23:3 Mudzimu wa Israele o amba na nṋe, bako ḽa Israele o mmbudza a ri, ‘Muthu a no vhusa vhathu a ita zwi re zwone, a vhusa nga u ofha Mudzimu," 
2Samuel23:4 u nga tshedza tsha nga matsheloni ḓuvha ḽi tshi bvisa mulomo nga matsheloni hu si na makole, u nga tshedza mvula i tshi kha ḓi bva u pfula ine ya medza hatsi mavuni.’" 
2Samuel23:5 “Vhukuma nnḓu yanga a i nga shandukeli Mudzimu. O vhofha mulanga wa lini na lini na nṋe, a u vhekanya a u khwaṱhisa. Gundo ḽanga ḽoṱhe, dakalo ḽanga ḽoṱhe, zwi bva ha Ene. U mpha zwoṱhe zwine nda zwi tama." 
2Samuel23:6 Huno vhavhi vhoṱhe vha ḓo laṱwa nga thungo unga mipfa i sa kuvhanganywi nga tshanḓa. 
2Samuel23:7 Muthu ane a kwama mipfa, u i kuvhanganya nga tsimbi kana mufhiṋi wa pfumo, i fhiswa henefho hune ya vha hone.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Madzina a vhahali vha Dafita vha bvumo ngea: Wa u thoma o vha e Ishbaali wa mutupo wa Hakhimoni, we a vha e ene murangaphanḓa wa Vhararu; o vhuya a lwa na vhanna vha 800 nga pfumo a vha vhulaha vhoṱhe nndwani nthihi." 
2Samuel23:9 Wa vhuvhili wa avho vhararu vha bvumo ndi Eliasara ṅwana wa Dodo, wa mutupo wa Ahoho. Muṅwe musi Vhafilista vho vha vho kuvhanganela u bva pfumo, ene na Dafita vha vha thoma. Vhaisraele vha humela murahu," 
2Samuel23:10 hone ene a ima a si sudzuluwe, a lwa na Vhafilista u swika tshanḓa tshawe tshi tshi farwa nga nyamurali tsha omelela banga tsha si tsha kona u ḽi litsha. Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele gundo ḽihulu musi uyo. Ngavhuya Vhaisraele vha humela he Eliasara a vha e hone, vha tou ḓa u ṱangula zwitumbu zwa maswina." 
2Samuel23:11 Wa vhuraru wa avho vhararu vha bvumo o vha e Shama ṅwana wa Agee wa Harari. Vhafilista vho vha vho kuvhangana Lehi, he ha vha hu na tsimu ya eregisi. Vhaisraele vha shavha Vhafilista," 
2Samuel23:12 hone Shama a ima a si sudzuluwe henefho tsimuni, a i tsireledza, a vhulaha Vhafilista. Musi uyo Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele gundo ḽihulu." 
2Samuel23:13 Muṅwe musi nga tshifhinga tsha khaṋo, vhaṅwe vhararu kha vha 30 vha re vharangaphanḓa, vha tsela ha Dafita bakoni ḽa Adulamu, zwenezwo ho vha ho ḓa tshigwada tsha Vhafilista tsha ṱoka mishasha govhani ḽa Refaimi." 
2Samuel23:14 Tshifhinga tshenetsho Dafita o vha e vhudzumbamoni hawe thavhani, tshigwada tsha Vhafilista tshi Betlehema." 
2Samuel23:15 Dafita a pfa o farwa nga ḓora a tou fhihamelwa a ri, “Ngavhe muṅwe a tshi nkela maḓi a u nwa a no bva bidzini i re tsini na khoro ya Betlehema!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Vhanna avho vhararu vha vhuhali vha ḓifunga vha fhira vhukati ha mishasha ya Vhafilista, vha ka maḓi bidzini i re tsini na khoro ya Betlehema, vha a hwala vha a isa ha Dafita. Hone Dafita a hana u nwa ayo maḓi, a tou a tevhulela Muṋe washu ya vha nduvho," 
2Samuel23:17 a ri, “Yawee Muṋe washu, maḓi haya ndi nga a nwa hani? Zwi nga tou nga ndi khou nwa malofha a avha vhanna vhe vha ḓifunga vha tshi ya vha a ka!” Dafita a si nwe ayo maḓi. Uho ndi vhuhali ha avho vhanna vhararu vha bvumo." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai murathu wa Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya, o vha e ene murangaphanḓa wa Vha-30 vha bvumo. O vhuya a lwa na vhanna vha 300 e eṱhe a vha vhulaha, a vha na bvumo kha Vha-30." 
2Samuel23:19 O vha ene wa bvumo ḽihulu kha Vha-30, a vha ene murangaphanḓa wavho, hone o vha a si na bvumo ḽi no nga ḽa Vhararu." 
2Samuel23:20 Muṅwe muhali wa bvumo o vha e Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada wa Kabutsiele; ndi kanzhi a tshi sumbedza vhuhali hawe, hu tshi katelwa na vhahali vhavhili vha Muaba, vhana vha Ariele, vhe a vha vhulaha. O vhuya a tsela dindini musi wa gabugu a vhulaha ndau." 
2Samuel23:21 O vhulaha na Muegipita, munna wa muswonḓa we a vha o fara pfumo. Benaya a kovhola uyo Muegipita nga mugopi, a mu zhuvhulela pfumo, a mu vhulaha ngaḽo." 
2Samuel23:22 Uho ndi vhuhali ha Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada. O vha e na bvumo kha Vha-30. 
2Samuel23:23 O vha a tshi huliswa u fhira Vha-30, hone o vha a si na bvumo ḽi no nga ḽa Vhararu. Dafita a mu vhea uri a vhe muhulwane wa vhalindi vhawe." 
2Samuel23:24 Kha Vha-30 ho vha hu na: Asaele murathu wa Juaba, Elihanani ṅwana wa Dodo wa Betlehema," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama wa Harodo, Elika wa Harodo," 
2Samuel23:26 Heletse wa Phelete, Ira ṅwana wa Ikeshe wa Thekua," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiesere wa Anathotho, Mebunai wa Husha," 
2Samuel23:28 Tsalimoni wa Ahoho, Maharai wa Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebe ṅwana wa Baana wa Netofa, Ithai ṅwana wa Ribai wa Gibia kha ḽa Benyamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya wa Phirathoni, Hidai wa magovhani wa Gaashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abialiboni wa Araba, Asimavethe wa Bahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba wa Shaaliboni, Jasheni wa Gunu, Jonathani" 
2Samuel23:33 ṅwana wa Shama wa Harari, Ahiamu ṅwana wa Sharara wa Harari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifelete ṅwana wa Ahasibai wa Maakha, Eliamu ṅwana wa Ahithofele wa Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hetsiro wa Kharamele, Paarai wa Arabu," 
2Samuel23:36 Igala ṅwana wa Nathani wa Tsoba, Bani wa Gadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Tseleke wa Amoni, Naharai wa Bierotho, muhwali wa zwihali zwa Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira wa Jathiri, Garebe wa Jathiri," 
2Samuel23:39 na Uria wa Muhithi. Vhahali vhoṱhe vha bvumo vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 37. 
2Samuel24:1 Muṋe washu a dovha a sinyutshela Israele, a rumeledza Dafita a ri, “Iyo vhala vhathu vha Israele na vha Juda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Ndi hone khosi i tshi amba na Juaba na vhalangammbi vhe a vha e navho ya ri, “Iyani ni buḓekanye matsinde a Israele u bva Dani u swika Bierisheba ni ende ni tshi ṅwala vhahali uri ndi kone u ḓivha uri ndi vhangana.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Huno Juaba a fhindula khosi a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a tshi andisa mmbi kaḓana, nahone ngavhe thovhele vha tshi lalama vha zwi vhona zwi tshi itea. Hone ndi mini thovhele muṋe wanga vha tshi ṱoḓa ri tshi ita zwo raloho?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Naho zwo ralo khosi i si thetshelese maipfi a Juaba na vhalangammbi, vha ṱutshela khosi u yo ṅwala vhahali vha Israele." 
2Samuel24:5 Vha wela Jorodani, vha ṱoka mishasha tshipembe ha Aruere, muḓi u re vhukati ha govha, shangoni ḽa Gadi, u bva henefho vha fhirela devhula ha Jasere." 
2Samuel24:6 Vha livha Giliadi vha vhuya vha swika shangoni ḽi re fhasi ha Kadeshe. Zwino vha livha Dani, u bva Dani vha fhira nga ha Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Zwino vha livha tshipembe vha tshi ya muḓini wa Tiro wo tangeledzwaho nga mitsheṱo, vha fhirela miḓini yoṱhe ya Vhahivi na Vhakanana. Vha fhedza nga u ya Bierisheba tshipembe ha Juda." 
2Samuel24:8 Musi vho no ṱanganya shango ḽoṱhe, vha humela Jerusalema ho no fhela miṅwedzi miṱanu na miṋa na maḓuvha a 20." 
2Samuel24:9 Juaba a vhika tshivhalo tsha vhanna vhane vha nga kona u bva pfumo: Kha ḽa Israele ho vha hu na vhanna vha 800 000 vhe vha vha vha tshi kona u bva pfumo, kha ḽa Juda hu na vhanna vha 500 000." 
2Samuel24:10 Huno musi Dafita o no vhala vhathu zwa thoma u mu dina, a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndo tshinya nga maanḓa nga zwe nda ita. Zwino Muṋe washu, nkhangwele vhuvhi hanga nandi. Ndo ita zwithu zwa vhutsilu.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Musi Dafita a sa athu vuwa nga ḽa matshelo, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa vha ḽo no ḓa kha muporofita Gadi muvhoni wa Dafita ḽa ri," 
2Samuel24:12 “Tshimbila u yo vhudza Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Ndi khou u ṋea zwithu zwiraru zwine wa fanela u nanga khazwo. Nanga tshithihi tshine wa funa ndi tshi u ita tshone.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Ndi hone Gadi a tshi ya ha Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Vha nanga u welwa nga nḓala miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili, kana vha nanga u pandamedzwa nga maswina avho miṅwedzi miraru? Kana vha nanga hu tshi ḓa dwadze shangoni ḽavho ḽa fhedza maḓuvha mararu? Zwino-ha, nga vha elekanye, vha mmbudze ambadzifhele uri ndi kone u fhindula we a nthuma.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Dafita a fhindula Gadi a ri, “Ndo hanganea. Nga ri wele zwashu zwanḓani zwa Muṋe washu, ngauri khathutshelo yawe ndi khulu, hone ndi songo wela zwanḓani zwa vhathu.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓisa dwadze kha ḽa Israele u bva matsheloni eneo u swika tshifhinga tshe tsha vhewa, ha fa vhathu vha 70 000 u bva Dani u swika Bierisheba." 
2Samuel24:16 Musi muruṅwa a tshi angaladza tshanḓa tshawe uri a lozwe Jerusalema, Muṋe washu a ṱungufhala nga iyo khombo, a vhudza muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou lifhedza vhathu a ri, “Ndi zwone! Humisa tshanḓa tshau.” Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu zwenezwo o vha e luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Musi Dafita a tshi vhona muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou vhulaha vhathu, a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi nṋe we nda tshinya, nda khakha. Huno avha ndi nngu zwadzo. Vho itani? Tshanḓa tshau nga tshi lifhedze nṋe na nnḓu yanga.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Musi wonoyo Gadi a ya ha Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha gonye vha yo fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Dafita a gonya a tshi tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu a mu laya nga mulomo wa Gadi. 
2Samuel24:20 Musi Arauna a tshi sedza a vhona khosi na vhanna vhayo vha tshi khou ḓa khae, a bvela nnḓa a gwadama phanḓa ha khosi a tou wa nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna a ri, “Ndi mini thovhela muṋe wanga vho ḓa fhano ha nṋe?” Dafita a fhindula a ri, “Ndo ḓa u renga luvhata lwavho lwa u fhulela, uri ndi fhaṱele Muṋe washu aḽiṱari, uri dwadze ḽine vhathu vha ḽi lwala ḽi fhele.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna a amba na Dafita a ri, “Thovhela muṋe wanga nga vha dzhie tshine vha tou funa vha tshi ṋekedze. Phulu ngedzi dza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, zwifhulo ngezwi, dzhogo dza phulu ngedzi vha ite khuni.”" 
2Samuel24:23 Arauna a mbo ṋea khosi zwoṱhe hezwo, a ita na u vhudza khosi a ri, “Ngavhe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho a tshi ṱanganedza tshiṱhavhelo tshavho.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Huno khosi ya fhindula Arauna ya ri, “Aiwa nandi, ndi fanela u lu renga. Ndi nga si ṋekedze Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshe nda si tshi bvisele tshithu.” Dafita a renga ulwo luvhata lwa u fhulela na dziphulu a bvisa mangwende a 50 a siliva." 
2Samuel24:25 A fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari henefho a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhuthihi. Muṋe washu a pfa thabelo ya shango, dwadze ḽa Israele ḽa fhela." 
1Kings1:1 Khosi Dafita o vha o no kalaha, o lalama, naho vha tshi mu ambadza zwifuko a si tsha pfa vhududo." 
1Kings1:2 Ndi hone vhalanda vhawe vha tshi amba nae vha ri, “Thovhele nga vha litshe ri vha ṱoḓele musidzana a sa athu ḓivha munna a dzule navho a tshi vha londola. U ḓo lala tsini havho uri thovhele muṋe wanga vha dudelwe.”" 
1Kings1:3 Ndi hone vha tshi ṱoḓa musidzana o nakaho kha ḽa Israele ḽoṱhe, vha wana Abishaga wa Shuneme, vha mu ḓisa ha khosi." 
1Kings1:4 Musidzana uyo o vha o nakesa. O vha a tshi ṱwa na khosi a tshi i londola, hone khosi a yo ngo vhuya ya mu dzhenisa nḓuni." 
1Kings1:5 Zwino Adonia, ṅwana wa Dafita na musadzi wawe Hagithi, a ḓivhea phanḓa a ri, “Ndi nṋe ane nda ḓo vha khosi.” A ḓiwanela gariki na dzibere na vhanna vha 50 vhane vha ḓo gidima phanḓa hawe." 
1Kings1:6 Khotsi vho vha vho mu lema, vha si mu kaidze vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ni itelani nga u ralo?” Ho ri u bebwa Abisalomo ha bebwa ene. Na ene o vha o naka." 
1Kings1:7 Adonia a amba na Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya na tshifhe Abiathara, vhenevho vha mu tikedza." 
1Kings1:8 Hone tshifhe Tsadoko na Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada na muporofita Nathani na Shimei na Rei na vhahali vha Dafita vha si ime na Adonia. 
1Kings1:9 Muṅwe musi Adonia a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha dzinngu na dzikholomo na ṋamana dzo noniswaho Tomboni ḽa Ṋowa tsini ha tshisima tsha Eni Rogele. A ramba vharathu vhawe vhoṱhe, vhana vha khosi, na vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda vhe vha vha vhe magota a musanda," 
1Kings1:10 hone muporofita Nathani na Benaya na vhahali vha khosi na murathu wawe Solomoni a si vha rambe. 
1Kings1:11 Ndi hone Nathani a tshi vhudzisa Batshiba mme a Solomoni a ri, “A vho ngo zwi pfa uri Adonia ṅwana wa Hagithi o vha khosi muṋe washu Dafita vha sa zwi ḓivhi?" 
1Kings1:12 Zwino-ha, nga vha litshe ndi vha eletshedze uri vha kone u ḓitshidza vha tshidze na ṅwana wavho Solomoni." 
1Kings1:13 Nga vha ye ha khosi Dafita vha mu vhudze vha ri, ‘Thovhela muṋe wanga, a thi ri vho mpfulufhedzisa vha ri: Vhukumakuma Solomoni ṅwana wau u ḓo tevhela nṋe vhuhosini, a dzula kha khuluṋoni yanga? Zwino ndi mini Adonia o no vha ene khosi?’" 
1Kings1:14 Musi vhone vha tshee henengei vha tshi khou amba na khosi, nṋe ndi ḓo mbo ḓi dzhena nda khwaṱhisa zwe vha amba.”" 
1Kings1:15 Ndi hone Batshiba a tshi yo amba na khosi pfamoni yayo. Khosi yo vha yo no kalahesa, i tshi khou londolwa nga Abishaga wa Shuneme." 
1Kings1:16 Batshiba a khotha a losha khosi. Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Ni ṱoḓa mini?”" 
1Kings1:17 Batshiba a amba na khosi a ri, “Thovhele vho nnyanela nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho vha ri Solomoni ṅwananga u ḓo tevhela vhone vhuhosini, a dzula kha khuluṋoni yavho." 
1Kings1:18 Hone zwino Adonia o no vha ene khosi nahone thovhele muṋe wanga a vha zwi ḓivhi. 
1Kings1:19 O ṱhavha kholomo nnzhi na ṋamana dzo noniswaho, na nngu, a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo, a vhidza vhana vhoṱhe vha thovhele na tshifhe Abiathara na mulangammbi Juaba, hone ṅwana wavho Solomoni ho ngo vhidzwa." 
1Kings1:20 Thovhela muṋe wanga, maṱo a Vhaisraele vhoṱhe o sedza vhone, uri vha pfe nga vhone uri a no ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni yavho musi thovhele muṋe wanga vha si tsheeho ndi nnyi!" 
1Kings1:21 Zwa sa ralo, musi une vhone thovhele muṋe wanga vha dzama vha ladzwa na vhokhotsi avho, nṋe na ṅwananga Solomoni a ri nga ḽi lu ḓifhaho.”" 
1Kings1:22 Batshiba a tshi kha ḓi amba na khosi, muporofita Nathani a mbo ḓi swika." 
1Kings1:23 Vha vhudza khosi vha ri, “Muporofita Nathani u fhano.” A ya phanḓa ha khosi a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
1Kings1:24 Nathani a ri, “Kani-ha thovhele muṋe wanga vho amba uri Adonia u ḓo tevhela vhone vhuhosini, a dzula kha khuluṋoni yavho naa?" 
1Kings1:25 Ndi amba ngauri ṋamusi o no ṱhavha kholomo nnzhi na ṋamana dzo noniswa na nngu, a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo. O vhidza vhana vhoṱhe vha thovhele na vhalangammbi na tshifhe Abiathara. Zwenezwino vha khou ḽa nae, vha khou nwa nae vha tshi ri, ‘Thovhele Adonia nga a lalame!’" 
1Kings1:26 Hone nṋe na tshifhe Tsadoko na Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada na ṅwana wavho Solomoni ho ngo ri vhidza. 
1Kings1:27 Kani izwi ndi zwe vhone thovhele muṋe wanga vha ita vhá songo ḓivhadza vhalanda vhavho uri ane a ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni yavho musi thovhele muṋe wanga vha si tsheeho ndi ufhio?” 
1Kings1:28 Ndi hone khosi Dafita a tshi ri, “Vhidzani Batshiba a ḓe a dzhene.” Batshiba a ḓa a ima phanḓa ha khosi." 
1Kings1:29 Khosi ya ana ya ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, we a nndamukisa khomboni dzanga dzoṱhe," 
1Kings1:30 vhukumakuma ṋamusi ndi ḓo khunyeledza zwe nda ni anela nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele nda ri, ‘Solomoni ṅwana waṋu u ḓo tevhela nṋe vhuhosini a dzula kha khuluṋoni yanga vhudzuloni hanga.’ ”" 
1Kings1:31 Ndi hone Batshiba a tshi wa nga tshifhaṱuwo, a losha khosi a ri, “Ngavhe thovhele muṋe wanga vha tshi tshila lini na lini!”" 
1Kings1:32 Khosi Dafita a ri, “Vhidzani tshifhe Tsadoko a ḓe fhano na muporofita Nathani na Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada.” Musi vha tshi swika phanḓa ha khosi," 
1Kings1:33 ya vha vhudza ya ri, “Ṱuwani na vhalindi vhanga, ni yo namedza Solomoni meila yanga, ni tsele nae tshisimani tsha Gihoni." 
1Kings1:34 Henefho tshifhe Tsadoko na muporofita Nathani vha mu ḓodze mapfura vha mu vhumbe khosi ya Israele. Ni lidze phalaphala ni ṱavhe mukosi ni ri, ‘Khosi Solomoni nga a lalame!’" 
1Kings1:35 Ni gonye nae, a ḓe a dzule kha khuluṋoni yanga, a vhuse vhudzuloni hanga. Ndo mu vhea uri a vhe muvhusi wa Israele na Juda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada a fhindula khosi a ri, “Amen! Ngavhe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa thovhele muṋe wanga a tshi zwi khwaṱhisa." 
1Kings1:37 Vhunga Muṋe washu o vha e na thovhele muṋe wanga, ngavhe a tshi ḓi vha-vho na Solomoni, a ita uri muvhuso wawe u hule u fhira na wa muṋe wanga khosi Dafita!”" 
1Kings1:38 Ndi hone tshifhe Tsadoko na muporofita Nathani na Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada, na Vhakhrita na Vhaphelethe vhalindi vha musanda vha tshi yo namedza Solomoni meila ya khosi Dafita, vha mu isa tshisimani tsha Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Tshifhe Tsadoko a dzhia luṋanga lwa mapfura denndeni khethwa, a ḓodza Solomoni. Vha konou lidza phalaphala, vhathu vhoṱhe vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Khosi Solomoni nga a lalame!”" 
1Kings1:40 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha tevhela Solomoni, vha tshi khou lidza zwiṱiringo, vha tshi khou pembela zwihulu, lwe mavu a dzinginyea nga mutsindo." 
1Kings1:41 Adonia na vhaeni vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha zwi pfa musi vha tshi khou fhedzisa vhuṱambo havho. Juaba a ri u pfa phalaphala i tshi lila, a vhudzisa a ri, “Mukosi uyo u re muḓini ndi wa mini?”" 
1Kings1:42 Juaba a tshi kha ḓi amba, Jonathani ṅwana wa tshifhe Abiathara a vha o no swika. Adonia a ri, “Dzhenani. Muḓivhalea a no nga inwi o fanela u vha a tshi khou ri ḓela na mafhungo mavhuya.”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonathani a fhindula a ri, “Na kathihi! Khosi Dafita muṋe washu o vhumba Solomoni khosi." 
1Kings1:44 Khosi yo ruma tshifhe Tsadoko na muporofita Nathani na Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada khathihi na Vhakhrita na Vhaphelethe vhalindi vha musanda, vha mu fhelekedza vhó mu namedza meila ya khosi," 
1Kings1:45 tshifhe Tsadoko na muporofita Nathani vha mu ḓodza mapfura vha mu vhumba khosi tshisimani tsha Gihoni. U bva henefho vha gonya vha tshi pembela, muḓi wa tou bvuma. Ndi wone mukosi une na u pfa." 
1Kings1:46 Solomoni zwino o dzula kha khuluṋoni ya musanda. 
1Kings1:47 Na magota a musanda vho ḓa u fhululedza muṋe washu khosi Dafita vha tshi ri, ‘Ngavhe Mudzimu wavho a tshi ita uri dzina ḽa Solomoni ḽi vhe na bvumo ḽi no fhira ḽavho, muvhuso wawe wa hula u fhira wavho!’ Khosi Dafita a kotama a luvha e vhulaloni hawe," 
1Kings1:48 a ri, ‘Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, we a tendela maṱo anga uri ṋamusi a vhone ane a ḓo vha khosi vhudzuloni hanga.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Vhaeni vhoṱhe vha Adonia vha ri u pfa zwenezwo vha takuwa vho tshenuwa, vha balangana, muṅwe na muṅwe a fara nḓila yawe." 
1Kings1:50 Huno Adonia, nga u ofha Solomoni, a ṱuwa a ya a farelela ṋanga dza aḽiṱari." 
1Kings1:51 Solomoni a vhudzwa ha pfi, “Adonia u ofha khosi Solomoni, o farelela ṋanga dza aḽiṱari, u ri, ‘Khosi Solomoni nga a mpfulufhedzise ṋamusi uri ha nga mmbulahi nga pfumo.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomoni a fhindula a ri, “Arali Adonia a ḓisumbedza uri ndi muthu-muthu, na luvhudzi na luthihi lwa ṱhoho yawe a lu nga weli fhasi, hone arali a wanala e na vhukwila, u ḓo fa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Ndi hone khosi Solomoni a tshi ruma vhanna, vha yo mu dzhia kha aḽiṱari. Adonia a ḓa a gwadamela khosi Solomoni, Solomoni a ri, “Ṱuwani ni ye hayani haṋu.”" 
1Kings2:1 Musi tshifhinga tsha Dafita tsha u dzama tshi tshi sendela, a laya ṅwana wawe Solomoni a ri," 
1Kings2:2 “Hu si kale ndi ḓo tevhela vhanzhi. Inwi ni vhe na nungo, ni vhonale ni munna," 
1Kings2:3 ni tevhedze zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a ri zwi itwe. Tshimbilani nḓilani dzawe, ni tevhedze ndayo dzawe na milayo yawe na zwoṱhe zwe a laya, nga he zwa ṅwalwa kha Mulayo wa Mushe, ndi hone zwoṱhe zwine na ita zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela hoṱhe hune na ya," 
1Kings2:4 ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo khunyeledza zwe a mpfulufhedzisa a tshi ri, ‘Arali vhaḓuhulu vhau vha sedza kutshilele kwavho, nda vhona vha tshi tshila nga u fulufhedzea nga mbilu yavho yoṱhe na muya woṱhe, hu ḓo ḓi vha na muṅwe wavho a no ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Israele.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Zwino inwi muṋe ni a zwi ḓivha zwe Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya a nnyita, zwe a ita vhalangammbi vhavhili vha Israele, Abinere ṅwana wa Nere na Amasa ṅwana wa Jethere. O shulula malofha avho nga tshifhinga tsha mulalo zwa nga ndi nndwani, malofha avho a si na mulandu a khakhaṱhela kha bannda yawe khunduni na kha navhula dzi re ṋayoni dzawe." 
1Kings2:6 Ni mu lifhedze nga vhuṱali haṋu, a songo fa nga eṱhe." 
1Kings2:7 “Hone vhana vha Barasilai wa Giliadi ni vha itele vhuthu, vha ḽe na vhane vha ḽa ḓafulani ḽaṋu. Vho ntonda ndi tshi shavha mukomana waṋu Abisalomo." 
1Kings2:8 “Ni songo hangwa Shimei ṅwana wa Gera, wa Mubenyamini a no bva Bahurimu, o nteketela lu ṱungufhadzaho musi we nda shavhela Mahanaimi. Ndi zwiḽa a tshi ḓa u nṱanganedza Jorodani, ndo mu fulufhedzisa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu nda ri ndi nga si mu vhulahe." 
1Kings2:9 Huno zwino ni songo mu sedza sa a si na mulandu. Inwi ni munna wa vhuṱali, ni ḓo ḓivha zwine na fanela u mu ita. Naho o kalaha nga a fe nga tshihali.”" 
1Kings2:10 Dafita a dzama, a swiṱwa Muḓini wa Dafita." 
1Kings2:11 O vha o vhusa Israele a fhedza miṅwaha ya 40, miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili o vhusa e Hebroni, ya 33 o vhusa e Jerusalema." 
1Kings2:12 Solomoni a dzula kha khuluṋoni ya khotsi awe Dafita, muvhuso wawe wa ṱoka midzi." 
1Kings2:13 Liṅwe ḓuvha Adonia ṅwana wa Hagithi a ya ha Batshiba mme a Solomoni. Batshiba a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni khou ḓa nga mulalo?” Adonia a fhindula a ri, “Ndi khou ḓa nga mulalo." 
1Kings2:14 Hu na zwine nda funa u amba navho.” Batshiba a tenda a ri, “Ambani zwaṋu.”" 
1Kings2:15 Adonia a ri, “Vhunga vha tshi zwi ḓivha, muvhuso wo vha u wanga. Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho vha vho sedza nṋe uri ndi ḓo vha khosi yavho. Hone zwithu zwo shanduka, muvhuso wo ya kha murathu wanga, o u ṋewa nga Muṋe washu." 
1Kings2:16 Zwino hu na tshithu tshithihi tshine nda funa u vha humbela. Vha songo vhuya vha hana.” Batshiba a ri, “Humbelani zwaṋu.”" 
1Kings2:17 Adonia a ri, “Nga vha humbele khosi Solomoni a mphe Abishaga wa Shuneme a vhe musadzi wanga, ha humbela vhone khosi i nga si hane.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batshiba a tenda a ri, “Ndi zwone. Ndi ḓo ni ambela na khosi.”" 
1Kings2:19 Batshiba a ya ha khosi Solomoni a tshi yo ambela Adonia, khosi ya takuwa uri i mu ṱanganedze, ya wa nga tshifhaṱuwo phanḓa hawe, ya konou dzula kha khuluṋoni yayo. Khosi ya ri hu ḓiswe khuluṋoni ya mme a khosi, a dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tsha khosi." 
1Kings2:20 Batshiba a ri, “Ndi na khumbelo ṱhukhu ine nda fanela u i swikisa khavho. Vha songo hana.” Khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Mme anga, nga vha i swikise, ndi nga si hane.”" 
1Kings2:21 Ndi hone Batshiba a tshi ri, “Nga vha litshe Abishaga wa Shuneme a ṋewe mukomana wavho Adonia a mu dzee.”" 
1Kings2:22 Khosi Solomoni a fhindula mme awe a ri, “Khezwi vha tshi humbelela Adonia uri a ṋewe Abishaga wa Shuneme fhedzi? Khezwi vha sa mu humbeleli na vhuhosi ha vha hawe? Hufha e mukomana wanga, hufha na tshifhe Abiathara na Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya vha tshi ima nae.”" 
1Kings2:23 Ndi hone khosi Solomoni a tshi ana nga Muṋe washu a ri, “Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi nthwa a dovha arali Adonia a sa lifha nga ṱhoho yawe nge a humbela izwi!" 
1Kings2:24 Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, Ene we a ntika kha khuluṋoni ya khotsi anga Dafita, a khunyeledza zwe a fulufhedzisa, vhuhosi a ṋea nṋe na vhaḓuhulu vhanga, vhukumakuma ṋamusi Adonia u a fa!”" 
1Kings2:25 Ndi hone khosi Solomoni a tshi ruma Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada, uyo a ya a vhulaha Adonia." 
1Kings2:26 Khosi ya vhudza tshifhe Abiathara ya ri, “Iyani masimuni a haṋu ngei Anathotho. Inwi no vha no fanela u fa, hone zwino ndi nga si ni vhulahe, nge na hwala mbulungelo ya Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu phanḓa ha khotsi anga Dafita, na ita na u konḓelela vhuleme hoṱhe he khotsi anga vha ṱangana naho.”" 
1Kings2:27 Zwenezwo Solomoni a thatha Abiathara a si tsha vha tshifhe wa Muṋe washu, ha vha u khunyeledza ipfi ḽe Muṋe washu a ḽi amba Shilo, a tshi amba nnḓu ya Eli." 
1Kings2:28 Musi mafhungo ayo a tshi swika ha Juaba, ene we a ita tshimbevha na Adonia naho a songo ita tshimbevha na Abisalomo, a shavhela denndeni ya Muṋe washu, a farelela ṋanga dza aḽiṱari." 
1Kings2:29 Khosi Solomoni a vhudzwa upfi Juaba o shavhela denndeni ya Muṋe washu nahone u tsini na aḽiṱari. Solomoni a ruma Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada a ri, “Nga vha ye vha mu vhulahe!”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaya a dzhena denndeni ya Muṋe washu a amba na Juaba a ri, “Khosi i ri, ‘Bvelani nnḓa!’ ” Huno Juaba a hana a ri, “Aiwa, ndi ḓo fela henefha.” Benaya a swikisa mafhungo ayo ha khosi a ri, “Juaba o ri, ‘Ndi fela henefha aḽiṱarini.’ ”" 
1Kings2:31 Khosi ya vhudza Benaya ya ri, “Nga vha ite zwine a amba. Nga vha mu vhulahe vha mu swiṱe, vha ralo vha ḓo vha vho ṱanzwa nṋe na nnḓu ya khotsi anga malofha a si na mulandu e a shululwa nga Juaba." 
1Kings2:32 Muṋe washu u ḓo mu lifhedza malofha e a a shulula, ngauri o vhulaha vhanna vhavhili nga pfumo khotsi anga Dafita vha sa zwi ḓivhi. Vhuvhili havho, Abinere ṅwana wa Nere, mulangammbi wa Israele, na Amasa ṅwana wa Jethere, mulangammbi wa Juda, vho vha vhe vhathu-vhathu, vhe vhavhuya u fhira ene." 
1Kings2:33 Ngavhe mulandu wa malofha avho u tshi vhilwa kha Juaba na vhaḓuhulu vhawe lini na lini. Hone kha Dafita na vhaḓuhulu vhawe na kha nnḓu yawe na khuluṋoni yawe, ngavhe hu tshi vha na mulalo wa Muṋe washu lini na lini.”" 
1Kings2:34 Ndi hone Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada a tshi gonya a vhulaha Juaba, a mu swiṱa shangoni ḽa hawe sogani." 
1Kings2:35 Khosi ya vhea Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada uri a vhe mulangammbi vhuimoni ha Juaba, vhuimoni ha Abiathara a vhea tshifhe Tsadoko." 
1Kings2:36 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhidzisa Shimei ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Ḓifhaṱeleni nnḓu fhano Jerusalema, ni dzule henefha, ni songo vhuya na ya huṅwe fhethu." 
1Kings2:37 Musi une na ṱuwa na wela Govha ḽa Kidroni, vhukumakuma ni ḓo fa; na fa mulandu u ḓo vha u waṋu.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei a fhindula khosi a ri, “Zwine vha amba ndi zwavhuḓi. Ndi ḓo ita zwe thovhele muṋe wanga vha amba.” Shimei a dzula Jerusalema tshifhinga tshilapfu." 
1Kings2:39 Huno ngavhuya ho no fhela miṅwaha miraru, ha shavha phuli mbili dza Shimei dza ya ha Akhishi ṅwana wa Maakha, khosi ya Gathi. Shimei a vhudzwa upfi, “Phuli dzavho dzi ngei Gathi.”" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei a ri u pfa zwenezwo, a hwesa donngi yawe sala, a livha ha Akhishi muḓini wa Gathi a tshi yo ṱoḓa phuli dzawe, a dzi wana Gathi, a vhuya nadzo." 
1Kings2:41 Huno Solomoni a tshi vhudzwa upfi Shimei o vha o ṱuwa Jerusalema a ya Gathi, a dovha a vhuya," 
1Kings2:42 a vhidzisa Shimei a mu vhudza a ri, “Ndo ni anisa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu nda ni kaidza nda ri, ‘Musi une na ṱuwa na ya huṅwe fhethu, vhukumakuma ni ḓo fa!’ Inwi na mphindula na ri, ‘Zwine vha amba ndi zwavhuḓi. Ndi ḓo zwi ita.’" 
1Kings2:43 Zwino ndi mini ni songo tevhedza zwe na anela Muṋe washu na ita zwe nda ni laya?” 
1Kings2:44 Khosi ya vhudza Shimei ya ri, “Mbiluni yaṋu ni a zwi ḓivha zwoṱhe zwe na khakhela khotsi anga Dafita ngazwo. Zwino Muṋe washu u ḓo ni lifhedza zwe na tshinya." 
1Kings2:45 A vha nṋe Solomoni ndi ḓo shudufhadzwa, nahone khuluṋoni ya Dafita i ḓo dzula yo tsireledzwa phanḓa ha Muṋe washu lini na lini.”" 
1Kings2:46 Ndi hone khosi i tshi ruma Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada, a ya a vhulaha Shimei. Zwo no ralo vhuhosi ha Solomoni ha khwaṱha." 
1Kings3:1 Solomoni a vhinga ṅwananyana wa Farao khosi ya Egipita a vha shaka ḽawe. Solomoni a ḓisa uyo musadzi Muḓini wa Dafita a vhuya a fhedza u fhaṱa pfamo yawe na thembele ya Muṋe washu na mutsheṱo wo tangaho Jerusalema. 
1Kings3:2 Vhathu vho vha vha tshi kha ḓi ṋekedza nduvho dzavho aḽiṱarini dzi re zwikwarani ngauri dzina ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo vha ḽi sa athu fhaṱelwa thembele. 
1Kings3:3 Solomoni o sumbedza uri u funa Muṋe washu nga u tevhedza ndayo dza khotsi awe Dafita, hone na ene o vha a tshi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo a dubisa zwioro kha dziaḽiṱari dzi re zwikwarani." 
1Kings3:4 Khosi ya ya Gibioni u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, ngauri itsho tsho vha tshikwara tshi re na bvumo, Solomoni a ṋekedza tshigidi tsha zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho kha aḽiṱari yeneyo." 
1Kings3:5 Henefho Gibioni Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza Solomoni nga muloro vhusiku, Mudzimu a ri, “Humbela tshine wa funa ndi tshi u ṋea tshone.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomoni a fhindula a ri, “Khotsi anga Dafita mulanda wau wo mu ita nga vhuthu hau vhuhulu ngauri wo vhona a tshi fulufhedzea, a tshi ita zwi re zwone, a si na muhoyo. Wo ḓi mu sumbedza vhuthu honoho vhuhulu, wa mu ṋea ṅwana wa mutuka uri a dzule kha khuluṋoni yawe ṋamusi." 
1Kings3:7 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, wo mmbumba khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi anga Dafita. Hone ndi kha ḓi vha ṅwana, thi na nḓivho ya u vhusa vhathu." 
1Kings3:8 Ndi fhano vhukati ha vhathu vhe wa vha nanga, lushaka luhulu, vhathu vhanzhi vha sa vhalei." 
1Kings3:9 Zwenezwo nṋee mbilu i no kona u thetshelesa uri ndi kone u haṱula mafhungo a vhathu vhau ndi ṱalukanye zwi re zwone na zwi si zwone. Ndi nnyi ane a nga kona u vhusa lushaka holu lwau luhulu nga eṱhe?” 
1Kings3:10 Muṋe washu a takala nge Solomoni a humbela zwenezwo," 
1Kings3:11 Mudzimu a vhudza Solomoni a ri, “Vhunga wo humbela izwo, wa si humbele u lalama kana wa ḓihumbelela lupfumo kana lufu lwa maswina au, wa tou humbela mbilu i no kona u thetshelesa uri u kone u vhusa nga nḓila yo fanelaho," 
1Kings3:12 ndi ḓo ita zwe wa humbela. Ndi ḓo u ṋea mbilu ya vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo, zwine ha sa athu vhuya ha vha na muthihi we a vha nazwo nahone ha sa ḓo vha na muṅwe ane a ḓo dovha a vha nazwo." 
1Kings3:13 Ndi ḓo u ṋea na zwe wa si zwi humbele: lupfumo na tshileme, vhutshilo hau hoṱhe a hu na khosi ine ya ḓo eḓana na iwe." 
1Kings3:14 Arali wa tshimbila nḓilani dzanga, wa tevhedza ndayo dzanga na milayo yanga unga khotsi au Dafita, ndi ḓo ita uri u lalame.”" 
1Kings3:15 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi karuwa, a zwi ḓivha uri Mudzimu o amba nae muloroni. Solomoni a vhuelela Jerusalema, a ima phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu. A ri u fhedza a itela magota awe oṱhe vhuṱambo." 
1Kings3:16 Zwino muṅwe musi dziṅwe phombwe mbili dza ḓisa mulandu ha khosi Solomoni dza ima phanḓa hawe. 
1Kings3:17 Muṅwe wavho a ri, “Muṋe wanga, nṋe na musadzi hoyu ri dzula nḓuni nthihi. Nṋe ndo vha na ṅwana zwenezwo ri tshi dzula roṱhe." 
1Kings3:18 Huno nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ṅwananga ó bebwa, na uyu musadzi a vha na ṅwana. Ro vha ri tshi dzula roṱhe afho nḓuni, ho vha hu si na muṅwe muthu, ro vha ri tshi tou vha vhavhili fhedzi." 
1Kings3:19 “Vhukati ha vhusiku uyu musadzi a tsika ṅwana wawe a fa. 
1Kings3:20 Zwino a vuwa vhukati ha vhusiku, a dzhia ṅwananga we a vha e tsini hanga, nṋe ndi tshee ndo farwa nga khofhe, a mu isa vhulaloni hawe, a dzhia ṅwana wawe o faho a mu vhea vhulaloni hanga." 
1Kings3:21 Nga matshelo nda vuwa ndi tshi ri ndi nuse ṅwananga, nda wana o fa! Hone musi ndi tshi mu sedza zwavhuḓi nga tshedza tsha nga matsheloni, nda vhona uri a si ṅwananga we nda beba.”" 
1Kings3:22 Huno musadzi uyo muṅwe a ri, “A si zwone! Ṅwana a tshilaho ndi wanga, o faho ndi wau!” Hone musadzi wa u thoma a ḓi oma a tshi ri, “A si zwone! Ṅwana o faho ndi wau, a tshilaho ndi wanga!” Vha ṱaṱisana henefho phanḓa ha khosi." 
1Kings3:23 Khosi ya elekanya ya ri, “Muṅwe u ri, ‘Ṅwana a tshilaho ndi wanga, wau ndi o faho,’ ngeno muṅwe a tshi ri, ‘A si zwone! Ṅwana o faho ndi wau, a tshilaho ndi wanga!’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Ndi hone khosi i tshi ri, “Ḓisani banga!” Vha ḓisela khosi banga." 
1Kings3:25 Khosi ya ri, “Fhandulani ṅwana a tshilaho nga vhukati, muṅwe na muṅwe ni mu fhe lurumbu.”" 
1Kings3:26 Musadzi we ṅwana wawe a vha a tshi tshila a mu pfela vhuṱungu, a vhudza khosi a ri, “Yawee, muṋe wanga, nga vha fhe zwavho uyu musadzi ṅwana uyo a tshilaho! Vha songo mu vhulaha!” Hone uḽa muṅwe musadzi a ri, “Nṋe ndi nga si mu wane, na iwe u nga si mu wane. Nga a fhandulwe nga vhukati!”" 
1Kings3:27 Ndi hone khosi i tshi haṱula ya ri, “Ni songo mu vhulaha, musadzi hoyu wa u thoma ndi ene mme awe, nga a fhiwe ene.”" 
1Kings3:28 Musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi pfa iyo khaṱhulo ya khosi, vha hulisa khosi, nge vha vhona uri i na vhuṱali vhu no bva ha Mudzimu ha u vhusa nga khaṱhulo yo fanelaho." 
1Kings4:1 Khosi Solomoni o vha a tshi vhusa ḽa Israele ḽoṱhe. 
1Kings4:2 Vhakoma vhawe vhahulwane ngevha: Tshifhemuhulu: Azaria ṅwana wa Tsadoko. 
1Kings4:3 Vhaṅwaleli vha muvhuso: Elihorefe na Ahia, vhana vha Shisha. Tshanḓa tsha khosi: Josafati ṅwana wa Ahiludi." 
1Kings4:4 Mulangammbi muhulwane: Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada. Vhotshifhe: Tsadoko na Abiathara. 
1Kings4:5 Mulangi wa magota a madzingu: Azaria ṅwana wa Nathani. Tshifhe a re ene mueletshedzi wa khosi: Zabudi ṅwana wa Nathani. 
1Kings4:6 Mulangi wa pfamo: Ahishara. Mulangi wa vhashumi vha khombekhombe: Adoniramu ṅwana wa Abida. 
1Kings4:7 Solomoni o vhea vhavhusi vha 12 vha madzingu oṱhe a Israele, vhenevho vho vha vha tshi ḓisela khosi na muṱa wa musanda zwiḽiwa, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ḓisa zwiḽiwa zwa ṅwedzi muthihi nga ṅwaha." 
1Kings4:8 Madzina avho ngea: Beni Huru: mivhunduni ya Efraimi. 
1Kings4:9 Beni Dekere: Makatsi na Shaalabimu na Bethe Shemeshe na Eloni na Bethe Hanani. 
1Kings4:10 Beni Hesede: Arubotho na Sokho na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Hefere. 
1Kings4:11 Beni Abinadaba, we a vha o dzea Tafathi ṅwananyana wa Solomoni: dzingu ḽoṱhe ḽa Doro." 
1Kings4:12 Baana ṅwana wa Ahiludu: Thaanakha na Megido na dzingu ḽoṱhe ḽa Bethe Shiani tsini ha Tsarethani tshipembe ha Jesriele, u bva Bethe Shiani u swika Abele Mihola u wetshela Jokomiamu." 
1Kings4:13 Beni Gebere: Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi na miḓana ya dzidennde ya Giliadi ya vhaḓuhulu vha Jairi muḓuhulu wa Manase, na dzingu ḽa Arigobo kha ḽa Bashani, ndi miḓi ya 60 yo ṱangana, yo tangeledzwaho nga mitsheṱo i na tswinga dza musinaseṱha getheni." 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadaba ṅwana wa Ido: dzingu ḽa Mahanaimi. 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaatsi, we a vha o dzea Basimatha, muṅwe ṅwananyana wa Solomoni: shango ḽa Nafuthali." 
1Kings4:16 Baana ṅwana wa Hushai: dzingu ḽa Ashere na muḓi wa Alotho. 
1Kings4:17 Josafati ṅwana wa Pharua: shango ḽa Isakhara. 
1Kings4:18 Shimei ṅwana wa Ela: shango ḽa Benyamini. 
1Kings4:19 Gebere ṅwana wa Uri: shango ḽa Giliadi, he kale ha vha hu tshi vhusa Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori na Ogo khosi ya Bashani. Shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda ho vha hu na muvhusi muthihi." 
1Kings4:20 Vhathu vha Juda na Israele vho vha vho anda unga muṱavha wa lwanzhe, vha sa shayi tshithu, vho ḓitakalela." 
1Kings4:21 Solomoni o vha a tshi vhusa mivhuso yoṱhe u bva mulamboni wa Yufuratha u swika shangoni ḽa Vhafilista, u vhuya u swika masakhani a Egipita. Vhathu vha mashango hayo vho vha vha tshi thela muthelo, nahone vho vha vhalanda vha Solomoni vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
1Kings4:22 Zwiḽiwa zwe Solomoni a vha a tshi zwi ṱoḓa ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe zwo vha zwi litha dza 5 000 dza vhukhopfu vhutete na litha dza 10 000 dza vhukhopfu vhu songo sefiwaho; 
1Kings4:23 kholomo dza fumi dzi no ḽela tshidaleni na kholomo dza 20 dzi no tou fula; nngu na mbudzi dza ḓana khathihi na tholo na phuluvhulu na phala na khuhu dzo noniswaho. 
1Kings4:24 Ndi uri o vha a tshi vhusa mivhuso yoṱhe vhukovhela ha mulambo wa Yufuratha, u bva Thifisa u swika Gaza, hu na mulalo masia oṱhe." 
1Kings4:25 Musi Solomoni a tshi kha ḓi tshila, vhathu vha Juda na Israele u bva Dani u swika Bierisheba vho vha vha tshi tshila vha sa ofhi tshithu, munna muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi awela murunzini wa munḓirivhe wawe na muhuyu wawe." 
1Kings4:26 Solomoni o vha e na bere dza 4 000 dza gariki dza nndwa na bere dza 12 000 dza u namela nndwani. 
1Kings4:27 Magota a madzingu, muṅwe na muṅwe nga ṅwedzi wawe, o vha a tshi isa zwiḽiwa zwa khosi Solomoni na vhane vha ḽa ḓafulani ḽa khosi. Vho vha vha tshi ita uri hu si vhe na tshi ṱahelaho." 
1Kings4:28 Vha ita na u isa mukovhe wavho wa bali na maṱanga a bere dza u kokodza gariki dza nndwa na dziṅwe bere, vha zwi isa ho teaho." 
1Kings4:29 Mudzimu a ṋea Solomoni vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo khulu na nḓivho yo ṱanḓavhuwaho i sa elei i no nga muṱavha wa lwanzhe. 
1Kings4:30 Vhuṱali ha Solomoni ho vha vhu tshi fhira ha vhanna vhoṱhe vha vhubvaḓuvha, vhu tshi fhira na ha vhaṱali vhoṱhe vha Egipita." 
1Kings4:31 O vha o ṱalifha u fhira vhanna vhoṱhe, a tshi fhira na Ethani wa Esra, ó ṱalifha u fhira Hemani na Khalakholo na Darida vhana vha Maholo. Bvumo ḽawe ḽa ṱanganya tshakha dzoṱhe thungo dzoṱhe." 
1Kings4:32 O vhumba mirero ya 3 000, a sika nyimbo dzi no fhira 1 000." 
1Kings4:33 O fanyisedza nga zwimela, u bva kha mukedara wa Libanoni u swika kha muhisopo une wa mela luvhondoni. O ita na u funza nga phukha na zwiṋoni na zwikhokhonono na khovhe." 
1Kings4:34 Ho ḓa vhanna vha tshakha dzoṱhe vha thetshelesa vhuṱali ha Solomoni, vhó ruṅwa nga mahosi oṱhe a mashango e a pfa vhuṱali hawe vhu tshi ambiwa." 
1Kings5:1 Musi Hiramu khosi ya Tiro a tshi pfa uri Solomoni o ḓodzwa mapfura a vhumbwa khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Dafita, a ruma vhaḓinḓa vhawe ha Solomoni, ngauri o vha e khonani ya Dafita." 
1Kings5:2 Solomoni a humisela malaedzwa ha Hiramu a ri," 
1Kings5:3 “Vhone vha a ḓivha uri nndwa dze khotsi anga Dafita vha dzi lwa matungo oṱhe dzo vha kundisa u fhaṱela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho thembele, Muṋe washu a vhuya a ita uri vha kande maswina avho nga milenzhe." 
1Kings5:4 Huno zwino Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga o nndadzela shango masia oṱhe, a hu tshee na swina kana khombo." 
1Kings5:5 Zwenezwo ndo elekanya uri ndi fhaṱele dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga thembele, nga he Muṋe washu a vhudza khotsi anga Dafita a ri, ‘Ṅwana wau ane nda ḓo mu vhea kha khuluṋoni vhudzuloni hau u ḓo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga thembele.’" 
1Kings5:6 Zwino nga vha ṋee ndaela uri ndi remelwe mikedara thavhani ya Libanoni. Vhanna vhanga vha ḓo shuma na vhavho, nṋe ndi ḓo vha holela nga hune vhone vha i ta ngaho. Vhone vha a ḓivha uri riṋe a ri na vhatsila vhane vha kona u vhaḓa miri unga Vhasidoni.”" 
1Kings5:7 Hiramu a tshi pfa mafhungo a Solomoni, a takala nga maanḓa, a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Yahavee ṋamusi, ngauri o ṋea Dafita ṅwana wa vhuṱali uri a vhuse lushaka holu luhulu.”" 
1Kings5:8 Ndi hone Hiramu a tshi swikisa ipfi ha Solomoni a ri, “Mafhungo avho o swika kha nṋe, ndi ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine vha zwi ṱoḓa nda vha ṋea matanda a mikedara na mipaini." 
1Kings5:9 Vhanna vhanga vha ḓo a dzhia Libanoni vha a ḓisa lwanzheni, vha a vhofhekanya a vha magungwa vha a ḓisa nga lwanzheni vha a isa hune vhone vha hu amba. Henefho vha ḓo a vhofholola, vhanna vhavho vha konou a dzhia vha ṱuwa nao. Tshine nṋe nda tshi tama ndi uri vhone vha ṋee vha no dzula musanda wanga zwiḽiwa.”" 
1Kings5:10 Ngauralo Hiramu a ḓi isela Solomoni matanda oṱhe a mikedara na mipaini ane a a ṱoḓa," 
1Kings5:11 Solomoni a ṋea Hiramu dzithani dza maṱiriki dza 2 000 dza goroi na mapfura a muolivi a dzilitha dza 4 400 uri zwi ḽiwe nga muṱa wawe. Solomoni a ḓi itela Hiramu zwenezwo ṅwaha nga ṅwaha. 
1Kings5:12 Muṋe washu a ṋea Solomoni vhuṱali, nga he a mu fulufhedzisa ngaho. Hiramu na Solomoni vha ḓi dzula vha tshi pfana, vha ita na u vhofha mulanga." 
1Kings5:13 Khosi Solomoni a ṅwala vhashumi vha no bva kha ḽa Israele ḽoṱhe, vha vha vhanna vha 30 000." 
1Kings5:14 A vha ruma Libanoni vha tshi tou sielisana nga zwigwada zwa 10 000 nga ṅwedzi. Vho vha vha tshi fhedza ṅwedzi vhe Libanoni, vha fhedza miṅwedzi mivhili vhe hayani. Adoniramu o vha e ene ane a langa mushumo wonoyo wa khombekhombe." 
1Kings5:15 Solomoni o vha e na vhatsheṱi vha matombo vha 80 000 mivhunduni na vhahwali vha 70 000," 
1Kings5:16 a vhea vhanna vha 3 300 uri vha ingamele uyo mushumo vha tshi langa vhashumi. 
1Kings5:17 Khosi ya vha laya uri vha tsheṱe matombo mahulwane avhuḓi uri a vhe one a muteo wa thembele. 
1Kings5:18 Vhatsila vha Solomoni na Hiramu na vhanna vha Gebala vha tumula matanda vha a dzudzanya na matombo a u fhaṱa thembele. 
1Kings6:1 Solomoni o thoma u fhaṱela Muṋe washu thembele hó no fhela miṅwaha ya 480 tshee Vhaisraele vha pfuluwa Egipita, nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa tshee a thoma u vhusa Vhaisraele, nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili, ṅwedzi wa Zivi." 
1Kings6:2 Thembele ye khosi Solomoni a i fhaṱela Muṋe washu, yo vha i na vhunavha ha mitha dza 30 na vhuphara ha mitha dza fumi, na mitha dza 15 u lapfela nṱha." 
1Kings6:3 Vhuambarelo ho vha vhu mitha ṱhanu, vhuphara haḽo vhu mitha dza fumi, vhuphara hone vhu tshi eḓana na Hukhethwa hone huṋe." 
1Kings6:4 Mbondo dza thembele dzo vha dzi na mabuli o thivhiwa nga sase. 
1Kings6:5 U mona na mbondo dza nnḓa matungo na murahu ha thembele ho vha ho fhaṱiwa lufhera lu na zwitizi zwiraru. 
1Kings6:6 Lufhera lwa fhasi lwo vha lu na vhuphara ha mitha 2,5, tshitizi tsha vhukati tshi na vhuphara ha mitha tharu, tshitizi tsha nṱha tshi na vhuphara ha mitha 3,5. Luvhondo lwa thembele lwo vha lwo ḓi sekena lu tshi gonya na zwitizi, u itela uri phera dzi kone u ima nṱha ha luvhondo uri thanda dza phera dzi si dzhene luvhondoni lwa thembele." 
1Kings6:7 Matombo e a fhaṱa thembele o vha o vhaḓiwa ngei nnḓa he a bwiwa, lwe ha si pfale phosho ya hamula kana tshezela kana iṅwe-vho tsimbi ine ha shumiwa ngayo musi thembele i tshi khou fhaṱwa." 
1Kings6:8 Muṋango wa tshitizi tsha fhasi-fhasi wo vha u thungo ya tshipembe ya thembele, hú na zwiṱepisi zwine wa gonya ngazwo kha tshitizi tsha vhuvhili na tsha vhuraru." 
1Kings6:9 Huno khosi Solomoni a fhedza u fhaṱa thembele, a i fulela nga thanda na mabulannga a mukedara." 
1Kings6:10 A fhaṱa phera dza matungo oṱhe u lapfa na thembele. Vhulapfu ha lufhera luṅwe na luṅwe u ya nṱha ho vha hu mitha 2,5, nahone dzo vha dzo ṱumetshedzwa kha thembele nga thanda dza mukedara." 
1Kings6:11 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Solomoni ḽa ri," 
1Kings6:12 “Thembele iyi ine wa khou i fhaṱa, arali wa tevhedza ndaela dzanga, wa ita zwine ndayo dzanga dza amba, wa vhulunga milayo yanga, wa i thetshelesa, ndi ḓo khunyeledza nga iwe zwe nda fulufhedzisa Dafita khotsi au." 
1Kings6:13 Ndi ḓo dzula na Vhaisraele, nda si ṱutshele vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele.”" 
1Kings6:14 Huno Solomoni a vuledza u fhaṱa thembele. 
1Kings6:15 Mbondo dza ngomu dzo vha dzo tibedzwa nga mabaphathi a mukedara u bva fhasi u swika kha silini, fhasi thembeleni hó adziwa mabulannga a mupaini." 
1Kings6:16 Kamara ya ngomu-ngomu ine ya pfi Hukhethwakhethwa, yo vha yo fhaṱwa bvungwi ha thembele. Yone yo vha i na vhunavha ha mithara dza fumi, yó fhandekanywa na hukhethwa nga mabaphathi a mukedara u bva fhasi u swika kha silini." 
1Kings6:17 Kamara i re phanḓa ha Hukhethwakhethwa yo vha i na vhunavha ha mithara dza 20. 
1Kings6:18 Mabulannga a mukedara o vha o nakiswa nga phaphana na maluvha o vuleaho, zwó koriwa khao, ngomu hoṱhe ho vha ho tibedzwa nga mukedara, matombo a mbondo a sa vhonali." 
1Kings6:19 Bvungwi ha thembele ho vha ho fhaṱwa hukhethwa ha ngomu-ngomu he ha vha ho vhewa mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu. 
1Kings6:20 Hukhethwa ha ngomu-ngomu ho vha hu na vhunavha ha mitha dza fumi na vhuphara ha mitha dza fumi na vhulapfu u ya nṱha ha mitha dza fumi, ngomu hoṱhe hó fhomiwa musuku u songo vangiwaho. Aḽiṱari yo itwaho nga mutanda a mukedara, na yone ya fhomiwa musuku." 
1Kings6:21 Solomoni o fhoma ngomu ha thembele musuku u songo vangiwaho, phanḓa ha hukhethwa ha ngomu ha rambaladzwa geḓane dza musuku, na hone ha fhomiwa musuku." 
1Kings6:22 Ngomu ha thembele hoṱhe a hu fhoma musuku. Aḽiṱari ya hukhethwa ha ngomu-ngomu na yone a i fhoma musuku. 
1Kings6:23 Hukhethwa ha ngomu-ngomu a ita vhakherube vhavhili nga thanda ya muolivi, muṅwe na muṅwe e na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu." 
1Kings6:24 Lufhafha luthihi lwa mukherube wa u thoma lwo vha lu na vhulapfu ha mitha 2,5, luṅwe lufhafha lu mitha 2,5. U bva ṱhodzini ya luṅwe lufhafha u swika ṱhodzini ya luṅwe vhulapfu hadzo ho vha hu mitha ṱhanu." 
1Kings6:25 Mukherube wa vhuvhili na ene o vha e mitha ṱhanu, ngauri vhakherube avho vhavhili vho vha vha tshi fana nga vhuhulu na nga tshivhumbeo." 
1Kings6:26 Tshiimo tsha mukherube muṅwe na muṅwe tsho vha tshi mitha ṱhanu. 
1Kings6:27 Solomoni a vhea avho vhakherube kamarani ya ngomu-ngomu ya thembele, phapha dzavho dzó ṱharamuwa. Lufhafha lwa muṅwe mukherube lwa kwama luvhondo, lwa uḽa muṅwe na lwone lwa kwama luṅwe luvhondo, phapha dzavho dzone dza kwamana vhukati ha kamara." 
1Kings6:28 Vhakherube avho a vha fhoma musuku. 
1Kings6:29 Mbondoni hoṱhe u mona na thembele, hoṱhe kamarani ya ngomu na ya nnḓa ho vha ho ṱamiwa nga vhakherube vho vhaḓiwaho na miri ya mitshevho na maluvha o vuleaho." 
1Kings6:30 Fhasi ha kamara ya ngomu-ngomu na ya nnḓa ya thembele a ita na u hu shula nga musuku. 
1Kings6:31 Muṋangoni wa hukhethwa ha ngomu a kwea mahothi a thanda ya muolivi, mihangammbwa yao i na khuḓa ṱhanu." 
1Kings6:32 Mahothi o vha o vhaḓwa nga thanda ya muolivi, khao a vhaḓa vhakherube na mitshevho na maluvha o vuleaho, vhakherube na miri ya mitshevho a zwi fhoma musuku wo fuliwaho." 
1Kings6:33 Muṋangoni wa Hukhethwa a longa mihangammbwa ya khuḓa nṋa ya thanda ya muolivi nga u ralo. 
1Kings6:34 A vhaḓa na mahothi mavhili a mupaini, ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi na zwipiḓa zwivhili zwi tshi kona u vulwa nga u fhandekanywa." 
1Kings6:35 A kora vhakherube na mitshevho na maluvha o vuleaho khao, afho ho koriwaho a hu fhoma nga musuku wo fuliwaho." 
1Kings6:36 Solomoni a fhaṱa lutambwe u mona na thembele, guvha ḽí na maalo mararu a matombo o vhaḓiwaho na ḽialo ḽithihi ḽa thanda dza mukedara dzo tumulelwaho, maalo mararu a matombo, ḽithihi ḽa thanda ya mukedara, ḽi tshi ḓi gonya nga u ralo." 
1Kings6:37 Muteo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu wa tewa nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa, nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili, ṅwedzi wa Zivi." 
1Kings6:38 Nga ṅwaha wa 11 wa muvhuso wa Solomoni, nga ṅwedzi wa vhu-8, ṅwedzi wa Bulu, ha vha hu hone thembele yo fhela tshoṱhe u fhaṱiwa nga he ya dzudzanywa ngaho. Solomoni o fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili a tshi i fhaṱa." 
1Kings7:1 Solomoni a ita na u ḓifhaṱela pfamo, a fhedza miṅwaha ya 13 a tshi khou i fhaṱa." 
1Kings7:2 O fhaṱa na nnḓu ye ya vha i tshi pfi “Maṱaka a Libanoni”, ya vhunavha ha mitha dza 50 na vhuphara ha mitha dza 25 na vhulapfu u ya nṱha ha mitha dza 15, i na miduba miṋa ya phuphu dza mukedara dzo tika thanda dza mukedara." 
1Kings7:3 Nṱha ha balaga dzo ḓitikaho nga phuphu yo vha yo fulelwa nga mukedara, hú na balaga dza 45, muduba muṅwe na muṅwe u na 15." 
1Kings7:4 Mafasiṱere ayo o vha o rwa miduba miraru, muṅwe u nṱha ha muṅwe, o lavhelesana." 
1Kings7:5 Miṋango yoṱhe yo vha i na mihangammbwa ya khuḓa nṋa, yo vha i kha masia mapfufhi, miraru miraru kha luvhondo, yo lavhelesana." 
1Kings7:6 Solomoni a fhaṱa lukumbi lwa dziphuphu lwa vhunavha ha mitha dza 25 na vhuphara ha mitha dza 15. Phanḓa halwo ho vha hu na guḓa, ṱhanga yayo yó tikwa nga dziphuphu." 
1Kings7:7 Solomoni a fhaṱa holo ya khuluṋoni, ye ya vha i tshi pfi Holo ya Khaṱhulo, he a vha a tshi ḓo haṱula hone milandu, a i tibedza nga mabaphathi a mukedara u bva fhasi u swika nga silini." 
1Kings7:8 Pfamo ye a vha a tshi ḓo dzula khayo yo vha i murahurahu, kufhaṱelwe yo vha i tshi fana na dziṅwe nnḓu. Solomoni a ita na u fhaṱela mufumakadzi wawe ṅwananyana wa Farao pfamo i no fana na yeneyo holo." 
1Kings7:9 Zwifhaṱo zwoṱhe hezwo, u bva nnḓa u ya muṱani muhulu na u bva kha muteo u swika nṱha, zwo vha zwo fhaṱwa nga matombo avhuḓi o vhaḓiwa a tou eliwa, a tumulelwa nga saha masia oṱhe nnḓa na ngomu." 
1Kings7:10 Miteo yo vha yo tewa nga matombo mahulwane avhuḓi, maṅwe e na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu na hafu, maṅwe e na vhulapfu ha mitha nṋa." 
1Kings7:11 Mbondo dzo vha dzo fhaṱwa nga matombo avhuḓi, o vhaḓiwa a tou eliwa, na thanda dza mukedara." 
1Kings7:12 Muṱa muhulu wo vha wo tangwa nga luvhondo lwa maalo mararu a matombo o vhaḓiwaho na ḽialo ḽithihi ḽa thanda dza mukedara dzo tumulelwaho, lu tshi ḓi gonya nga u ralo, u fana na lutambwe lu monaho na thembele ya Muṋe washu na guḓa ḽayo." 
1Kings7:13 Khosi Solomoni a vhidzisa munna we a vha a tshi pfi Huramu, mutsila a dzulaho muḓini wa Tiro." 
1Kings7:14 Mufu khotsi awe vho vha vhe mutsila makone kha zwa u shuma nga musinaseṱha, vhone vho vha vhe vha Tiro, mme awe vho vha vhe vha tsinde ḽa Nafuthali. Huramu o vha e na vhuṱali, e na nḓivho ya zwa vhutsila. Ene a tenda musi Solomoni a tshi mu vhidza uri a lange mushumo woṱhe wa u shuma nga musinaseṱha." 
1Kings7:15 Huramu a fula phuphu mbili dza musinaseṱha, iṅwe na iṅwe i na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu na nṋa u ya nṱha, na mitha ṱhanu na nthihi u mona nayo, a dzi vhea muṋangoni wa thembele." 
1Kings7:16 A fula na ṱhoho mbili dza musinaseṱha, iṅwe na iṅwe i na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5, dza u vhea nṱha ha dzenedzo phuphu." 
1Kings7:17 Ṱhoho dzenedzo dzi re nṱha ha phuphu dzo vha dzo ṱamiwa nga sase ḽo lukiwaho nga geḓane, ṱhoho iṅwe na iṅwe i na geḓane ṱhanu na mbili." 
1Kings7:18 Huramu a ita miduba mivhili ya maramba a musinaseṱha a mona na dzenedzo geḓane dzo tandekanaho uri dzi ṱame idzo ṱhoho dzi re nṱha ha phuphu. Ṱhoho iṅwe na iṅwe a i ita zwenezwo. 
1Kings7:19 Ṱhoho dzi re nṱha ha phuphu ngomu guḓani dzo vha dzi na tshivhumbeo tsha maromboḓa, vhulapfu hadzo dzi mitha mbili." 
1Kings7:20 Ṱhohoni dza idzo phuphu mbili, nṱha ha tshipiḓa tsho vhumbwaho unga ndilo tsini ha geḓane dzo tandekanaho, ho vha hu na maramba a 200 o ita miduba u mona hoṱhe." 
1Kings7:21 Huramu a fhaṱa dziphuphu guḓani ḽa thembele. Phuphu ya thungo ya tshipembe a ri i pfi Jakhini, ya thungo ya devhula a ri i pfi Buasi." 
1Kings7:22 Ṱhoho nga nṱha dzo vha dzi na tshivhumbeo tsha maromboḓa. Ha vha hu hone mushumo wa phuphu wo khunyelela. 
1Kings7:23 Huramu a ita thannge ya tshitengelele ya musinaseṱha, u ya nṱha dzi mitha mbili na hafu, u buḓekanya vhukati hayo u bva kha ḽiṅwe sia u swika kha ḽiṅwe dzi mitha ṱhanu, u mona hoṱhe dzi mitha dza 15." 
1Kings7:24 Hoṱhe u mona lumemeni lwa nnḓa lwa iyo thannge ho vha hu na miduba mivhili ya phaphana dza musinaseṱha dze dza vha dzo fulwa dzo momekana dzoṱhe na thannge, dzoṱhe dzi 300." 
1Kings7:25 Thannge iyo yo vha yo ima nṱha ha miṱoḓo ya mboho dza 12 dza musinaseṱha dze dza vha dzo lavhelesa nnḓa, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe hú na tharu, devhula na vhukovhela na tshipembe na vhubvaḓuvha." 
1Kings7:26 Mbondo dza thannge dzo vha dzi milimitha dza 90 vhudenya. Lubomo lwayo lwo vha lu tshi nga lubomo lwa tshinwelo, lwo kombamela nnḓa unga nḓevhe dza maromboḓa. Thannge iyo yo vha i tshi fara maḓi a ḽitha dza 40 000." 
1Kings7:27 Huramu a ita na zwigoloi zwa fumi zwa musinaseṱha. Tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho vha tshi mitha mbili vhunavha na vhuphara, vhulapfu u ya nṱha tshi mitha na hafu." 
1Kings7:28 Zwigoloi izwo zwo vha zwo itwa nga mabaphathi o longwaho vhukati ha dzifureme," 
1Kings7:29 hú na zwifanyiso zwa dzindau na kholomo na vhakherube khao, nṱha ha fureme, na nṱha na fhasi ha dzenedzo ndau na mboho, ho vha hu na dzikhare." 
1Kings7:30 Tshigoloi tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho vha tshi na milinga miṋa ya musinaseṱha i na asi dza musinaseṱha. Khuḓani nṋa ho vha hu na thikho dza musinaseṱha dzo tikaho tshidzulo, thanda idzo dzo vha dzo ṱamiwa nga dzikhare." 
1Kings7:31 Kha sia ḽa ngomu ḽa tshidzulo ho vha hu na buli ḽa fureme ya tshitengelele, ḽo tsa ḽa ita hafu ya mitha.
