2Kings12:11 Musi tshelede yo no kalwa, vha i ṋea vhalavhelesi vha mushumo uyo wa u vusa thembele. Vha dzhia iyo tshelede vha holela vhavhaḓi na vhafhaṱi vha u lugisa thembele ya Muṋe washu," 
2Kings12:12 na vhafhaṱi vha mitsheṱo na vhavhaḓi vha matombo. Vha renga matanda na matombo a u fhaṱa uri thembele ya Muṋe washu i lugiswe, vha lifha na dziṅwe tshinyalelo dza u lugisa thembele." 
2Kings12:13 Tshelede yo ḓiswaho thembeleni a yo ngo shuma u ita ndongo dza siliva kana zwiṱunyathambo kana ndilo dza u handulula kana dziphalaphala kana muṅwe mudzio wa musuku kana siliva wa thembele ya Muṋe washu," 
2Kings12:14 yo vha ya u holela vhashumi vhe vha shuma ngayo u lugisa thembele. 
2Kings12:15 A vho ngo vhuya vha ṱoḓa vhuṱanzi kha vhe vha vha ṋekedza tshelede iyo uri vha holele vhashumi ngayo, ngauri avho vho vha vha tshi fulufhedzea." 
2Kings12:16 Tshelede ya nduvho dza tshipfumelo na nduvho dza vhutshinyi a yo ngo ḓiswa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, yo vha ya vhotshifhe." 
2Kings12:17 Nga tshifhinga tshenetsho Hazaele khosi ya Aramu a gonya a yo dia muḓi wa Gathi a u kunda, a konou rembulutshela u yo dia Jerusalema." 
2Kings12:18 Huno Juasi khosi ya Juda a dzhia thundu khethwa yoṱhe ye vhokhotsi awe mahosi a Juda, Josafati na Jehoramu na Ahasia vha dzi kumedza Mudzimu, na nduvho dze ene muṋe a kumedza Mudzimu, na musuku woṱhe we wa wanala mbulungeloni dza thembele ya Muṋe washu na pfamoni ya musanda, zwenezwo a luvha Hazaele khosi ya Aramu ngazwo. Ndi hone Hazaele a tshi ṱuwa Jerusalema." 
2Kings12:19 Maṅwe mafhungo a khosi Juasi na zwoṱhe zwe a ita o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda. 
2Kings12:20 Magota a khosi Juasi vha mu itela tshimbevha, vha mu vhulaha fhethu hune ha pfi Bethe Milo nḓilani ine ya tsela Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Magota vho mu vhulahaho ndi Jozabadi ṅwana wa Shimiathi na Jehozabadi ṅwana wa Shomere. Juasi a dzama a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita, ṅwana wawe Amasia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings13:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 23 wa muvhuso wa Juasi ṅwana wa Ahasia khosi ya Juda, Juahasi ṅwana wa Jehu a vha khosi ya Israele, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha ya 17." 
2Kings13:2 Juahasi a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu nga u kanda vhuṱalani ha vhuvhi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye, ene a si vhuye a vhu laṱa." 
2Kings13:3 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele, a ita uri vha kandeledzwe tshifhinga tshilapfu nga Hazaele khosi ya Aramu na ṅwana wawe Beni Hadadi." 
2Kings13:4 Ndi hone Juahasi a tshi rabela Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a mu thetshelesa nge a vhona khosi ya Aramu i tshi khou kandeledza Vhaisraele lwa tshiṱuhu." 
2Kings13:5 Muṋe washu a ḓisela Vhaisraele mutshidzi a vha tshidza zwanḓani zwa Vhaaramu. Zwenezwo Vhaisraele vha dovha vha dzula mahayani avho unga kale. 
2Kings13:6 Naho zwo ralo a vho ngo laṱa vhuvhi ha nnḓu ya Jerobiamu, we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye, vha ḓi vhu ita. Thanda ya Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi na yone ya ḓi sala yo ima Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Mmbi ya Juahasi yo vha i si tsheeho, ho vha ho tou sala bere dza 50 na gariki dza fumi na vhahali vha 10 000 vha tshimbilaho nga milenzhe, ngauri vhaṅwe khosi ya Aramu yo vha yo vha lozwa, ya vha kuya vha nga buse ḽa musi hu tshi fhuliwa." 
2Kings13:8 Maṅwe mafhungo a Juahasi na zwoṱhe zwe a ita na zwa vhuhali hawe o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele. 
2Kings13:9 Juahasi a dzama, a zwiṱwa Samaria. Ṅwana wawe Juasi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings13:10 Nga ṅwaha wa 37 wa muvhuso wa Juasi khosi ya Juda, Juasi ṅwana wa Juahasi a vha khosi ya Israele, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16." 
2Kings13:11 Juasi a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a si laṱe vhuvhi na vhuthihi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati, we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye, ene a ḓi vhu ita." 
2Kings13:12 Mafhungo maṅwe a Juasi na zwoṱhe zwe a ita na zwa vhuhali hawe, hu tshi katelwa na nndwa ye a lwa na Amasia khosi ya Juda, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings13:13 Juasi a dzama, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Samaria, ṅwana wawe Jerobiamu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings13:14 Zwino muporofita Elisha a lwala vhulwadze he a ḓo fa ngaho. Juasi khosi ya Israele a yo mu ṱola, a mu lilela a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Khotsi anga! Khotsi anga! Vhone gariki dza nndwa dza Israele na vhanameli vha dzibere dzavho!”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha a ri, “Nga vha dzhie vhura na misevhe,” khosi ya ita nga u ralo." 
2Kings13:16 Elisha a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha fare vhura.” Musi o no vhu fara, Elisha a vhea zwanḓa zwawe kha zwanḓa zwa khosi." 
2Kings13:17 Elisha a ri, “Nga vha vule fasiṱere ḽa vhubvaḓuvha,” khosi ya ḽi vula. Elisha a ri, “Nga vha pose musevhe!” Khosi ya posa musevhe. Elisha a ri, “Ndi musevhe wa u kunda ha Muṋe washu, musevhe wa u kunda Vhaaramu! Vhaaramu ni ḓo vha fhedza tshoṱhe Afeke.”" 
2Kings13:18 Elisha a konou ri, “Nga vha dzhie iyo misevhe,” khosi ya i dzhia. Elisha a vhudza khosi a ri, “Nga vha rwe fhasi.” Khosi ya rwa fhasi kararu, ya litsha." 
2Kings13:19 Muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a sinyutshela khosi a ri, “Vho vha vho fanela vho rwa fhasi kaṱanu kana kaṱanu na kathihi, ho vha hu hone vha tshi ḓo vha vho kunda Vhaaramu vha vha fhedza tshoṱhe. Huno zwino vha ḓo vha kunda luraru fhedzi.”" 
2Kings13:20 Elisha a fa, a swiṱwa. Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ho vha hu tshi ḓa vhaṱanguli vha Muaba vha tshoṱhela shango ḽa Israele." 
2Kings13:21 Muṅwe musi Vhaisraele vha tshi khou swiṱa muthu, zwenezwo vha vhona tshigwada tsha Vhamuaba, vha mbo ḓi posa tshitumbu tsha muthu uyo tshaloni tsha Elisha vha shavha. Tshitumbu tsha ri u kwama marambo a Elisha, uyo munna a vuwa a ima nga milenzhe." 
2Kings13:22 Hazaele khosi ya Aramu o vha a tshi khou kandeledza Vhaisraele misi yoṱhe ya muvhuso wa Juahasi. 
2Kings13:23 Hone Muṋe washu a vha khathutshela a vha pfela vhuṱungu. Ho ngo vha litsha vha tshi lozwiwa, o vha phalala a tshi itela mulanga we a vhofha na Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo. Ho ngo vhuya a laṱedza vhathu vhawe u swika na ṋamusi." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaele khosi ya Aramu a dzama, ṅwana wawe Beni Hadadi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings13:25 Ndi hone khosi Juasi ṅwana wa Juasi a tshi kunda Beni Hadadi ṅwana wa Hazaele a dzhiulula miḓi ye Beni Hadadi a i dzhia nndwani hu tshi lwiwa na Juahasi khotsi a Juasi. Juasi o kunda Beni Hadadi a ita luraru, a dzhiulula miḓi ya Vhaisraele." 
2Kings14:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Juasi ṅwana wa Juahasi khosi ya Israele, Amasia ṅwana wa Juasi a vha khosi ya Juda." 
2Kings14:2 Amasia a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 29. Mme awe vho vha vha tshi pfi Jehoadana, wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings14:3 Amasia o ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu, naho a songo swika kha makhulukuku wawe Dafita. O kanda vhuṱalani ha khotsi awe Juasi kha zwoṱhe." 
2Kings14:4 Naho zwo ralo ho ngo thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani; vhathu vho ḓi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo vha fhisa zwioro henengei. 
2Kings14:5 Musi muvhuso wa Amasia u tshi tou thoma u khwaṱha, a vhulaha magota vho vhulahaho vhamusanda khotsi awe." 
2Kings14:6 Naho zwo ralo a si vhulahe vhana vha vhatuka vha idzo phondi, a tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho buguni ya mulayo wa Mushe he Muṋe washu a laya a ri, “Vhokhotsi vha songo fela milandu ya vhana vhavho, na vhana vha songo fela milandu ya vhokhotsi avho, muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo fela vhutshinyi hawe.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amasia ndi ene we a kunda Vhaedomo vha 10 000 Govhani ḽa Muṋo, a thuba muḓi wa Sela nndwani, a ri u pfi Jokothiele, na ṋamusi u kha ḓi vhidzwa nga dzina ḽeneḽo." 
2Kings14:8 Ndi hone Amasia a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Juasi ṅwana wa Juahasi, ṅwana wa Jehu khosi ya Israele, vha isa khaedu a ri, “Nga vha ḓe ri lwe.”" 
2Kings14:9 Hone Juasi khosi ya Israele a fhindula Amasia khosi ya Juda a ri, “Mutshutshungu wa Libanoni wo vhuya wa ruma muḓinḓa a ya ha mukedara wa Libanoni a ri, ‘Litsha ṅwananyana wau a vhingwe nga ṅwananga.’ Hu si kale ha fhira phukha dza Libanoni dza kandekanya uyo mutshutshungu." 
2Kings14:10 Vha khou vhona vho kunda Vhaedomo, zwino vha vho ḓihudza. Nga vha ḓitakalele nge vha kunda, vha ḓidzulele zwavho hayani! Ndi mini vha tshi levha? A vha zwi vhoni uri vha khou ḓiṱulela khombo, vha dovha vha ṱulela shango ḽa Juda khombo?”" 
2Kings14:11 Hone Amasia a si zwi thetshelese. Ndi hone Juasi khosi ya Israele a tshi bva pfumo a yo lwa na Amasia khosi ya Juda, ha lwiwa Bethe Shemeshe kha ḽa Juda." 
2Kings14:12 Vhajuda vha kundwa nga Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe a shavhela hayani hawe." 
2Kings14:13 Juasi khosi ya Israele a thuba Amasia khosi ya Juda, ṅwana wa Juasi ṅwana wa Ahasia, henefho Bethe Shemeshe. Ndi hone Juasi a tshi ya Jerusalema a pwasha mutsheṱo wa Jerusalema u bva Khoroni ya Efraimi u swika Khoroni ya Khuḓa, tshikhala tshine tsha nga ita mitha dza 200." 
2Kings14:14 Juasi a dzhia musuku woṱhe na siliva yoṱhe na thundu yoṱhe ye ya vha i thembeleni ya Muṋe washu na mbulungeloni dza pfamo ya musanda, a ita na u thuba pfarela, a vhuelela Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Mafhungo maṅwe a Juasi, na zwe a ita, na vhuhali hawe nndwani a tshi lwa na Amasia khosi ya Juda, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings14:16 Juasi a dzama, a swiṱwa Samaria na mahosi a Israele, ṅwana wawe Jerobiamu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings14:17 Amasia khosi ya Juda, ṅwana wa Juasi, o tshila a fhedza miṅwaha ya 15 musi Juasi khosi ya Israele, ṅwana wa Juahasi ó no dzama." 
2Kings14:18 Mafhungo maṅwe a Amasia o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda. 
2Kings14:19 Vha langana Amasia Jerusalema, ene a shavhela muḓini wa Lakhishi, hone vha ruma vhathu vha mu tevhela Lakhishi vha mu vhulahela henengei." 
2Kings14:20 Tshitumbu tsha Amasia tsha iswa Jerusalema tsho hwalwa nga bere, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita." 
2Kings14:21 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vha tshi dzhia ṅwana wawe Azaria vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Amasia. O vha e na miṅwaha ya 16 a tshi vha khosi. 
2Kings14:22 Azaria ndi ene we a vusa muḓi wa Elathi, a u vhuedzedza Juda musi Amasia o no dzama." 
2Kings14:23 Nga ṅwaha wa 15 wa muvhuso wa Amasia ṅwana wa Juasi khosi ya Juda, Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Juasi a vha khosi ya Israele, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha ya 41." 
2Kings14:24 Jerobiamu a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a si vhuye a laṱa vhuvhi na vhuthihi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye." 
2Kings14:25 Ndi ene we a vhuedzedza masakha a Israele u bva Pharani ya Hamathi thungo ya devhula u swika Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo thungo ya tshipembe, zwi tshi tevhedza zwe zwa ambiwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, nga mulomo wa muḓinḓa wawe muporofita Jonasi ṅwana wa Amithai wa Gathi Hefere." 
2Kings14:26 Muṋe washu o vha o vhona u tambula hu ṱungufhadzaho ha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku. Ho vha hu si na ane a nga vha lamulela." 
2Kings14:27 Muṋe washu o vha a songo ḓiimisela u lozwa Vhaisraele tshoṱhe fhano fhasi, ndi zwe a vha tshidza nga Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Juasi." 
2Kings14:28 Mafhungo maṅwe a Jerobiamu na zwoṱhe zwe a ita na vhuhali hawe nndwani na zwe a vhuedzedza Damasko na Hamathi kha ḽa Israele (miḓi iyo yo vha i ya Jaudi), o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings14:29 Jerobiamu a dzama, a yo swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda. Ṅwana wawe Zakaria a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 27 wa muvhuso wa Jerobiamu khosi ya Israele, Uzia ṅwana wa Amasia a vha khosi ya Juda." 
2Kings15:2 A tshi thoma u vhusa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 16, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 52. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Jekholia wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings15:3 Uzia o ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Amasia;" 
2Kings15:4 o ro sa thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, vhathu vho ḓi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo vha dubisa zwioro henefho." 
2Kings15:5 Muṋe washu a tambudza Uzia nga vhulwadze vhu ofhisaho ha lukanda, a lwala a tshi dzula e eṱhe a vhuya a dzama. Jothamu ṅwana wa khosi o vha e murangaphanḓa wa vhahulwane vha shango a tshi langa pfamo." 
2Kings15:6 Mafhungo maṅwe a Uzia na zwoṱhe zwe a ita o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda. 
2Kings15:7 Uzia a dzama, a zwiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita, ṅwana wawe Jothamu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:8 Nga ṅwaha wa 38 wa muvhuso wa Uzia khosi ya Juda, Zakaria ṅwana wa Jerobiamu a vha khosi ya Israele, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi." 
2Kings15:9 Zakaria a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga vhokhotsi awe. Ho ngo laṱa vhuvhi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye." 
2Kings15:10 Shalumu ṅwana wa Jabeshe a itela khosi Zakaria tshimbevha, a mu dzhena nga pfumo, a mu vhulaha muḓini wa Ibiliamu, a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:11 Mafhungo maṅwe a Zakaria o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele. 
2Kings15:12 Ha mbo vha u khunyelela zwe Muṋe washu a vhudza Jehu zwiḽa a tshi ri, “Vhaḓuhulu vhau vha ḓo vha mahosi a Israele ha vhuya ha fhira murafho wa vhuṋa.”" 
2Kings15:13 Shalumu ṅwana wa Jabeshe o vha khosi ya Israele nga ṅwaha wa 39 wa muvhuso wa Uzia khosi ya Juda, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza ṅwedzi muthihi fhedzi." 
2Kings15:14 Menaheme ṅwana wa Gadi a takuwa Thiritsa a ya Samaria, a lwa na Shalumu ṅwana wa Jabeshe henefho Samaria, a mu vhulaha, a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:15 Mafhungo maṅwe a Shalumu na tshimbevha tshe a tshi ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings15:16 Menaheme a tshi bva Thiritsa, a dia muḓi wa Thaphua, a fhedza vhathu vhoṱhe vha re muḓini na vha shango ḽo u tangaho, nge vha hana u mu vulela khoro dzavho. A hushula thumbu dza vhasadzi vhoṱhe vho vhifhaho muvhilini." 
2Kings15:17 Menaheme ṅwana wa Gadi o vha khosi ya Israele nga ṅwaha wa 39 wa muvhuso wa Uzia khosi ya Juda, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha ya fumi." 
2Kings15:18 Menaheme a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu. Misi yoṱhe a tshi vhusa ho ngo vhuya a laṱa vhuvhi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye. 
2Kings15:19 Zwino Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru a dia shango, Menaheme a mu luvha nga siliva ya khilogiramu dza 34 000 uri a mu tikedze a khwaṱhise muvhuso wawe." 
2Kings15:20 Menaheme o wana iyo tshelede kha vhapfumi vha Israele nga u kombetshedza muṅwe na muṅwe uri a bvise mangwende a 50 a siliva i luvhe khosi ya Ashuru. Ndi hone khosi ya Ashuru a tshi ṱuwa shangoni iḽo a vhuelela shangoni ḽawe. 
2Kings15:21 Mafhungo maṅwe a Menaheme na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings15:22 Menaheme a dzama, a swiṱwa, ṅwana wawe Phekahia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:23 Phekahia ṅwana wa Menaheme a vha khosi ya Israele nga ṅwaha wa 50 wa muvhuso wa Uzia khosi ya Juda, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha mivhili." 
2Kings15:24 Phekahia a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu. Ho ngo vhuya a laṱa vhuvhi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye. 
2Kings15:25 Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia, we a vha e muswikeli wa khosi, a mu itela tshimbevha, e na vhanna vha 50 vha Giliadi, vha vhulaha Phekahia khathihi na Arigobo na Arie, dzhavheloni ḽa ngomu ḽa pfamo henefho Samaria. Pheka o ri u vhulaha Phekahia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings15:26 Mafhungo maṅwe a Phekahia na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings15:27 Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia a vha khosi ya Israele nga ṅwaha wa 52 wa muvhuso wa Uzia khosi ya Juda, a vhusa e Samaria, a fhedza miṅwaha ya 20." 
2Kings15:28 Pheka a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu. Ho ngo vhuya a laṱa vhuvhi ha Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye. 
2Kings15:29 Misi ya ene Pheka khosi ya Israele, Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru a ḓa a thuba miḓi ya Iyoni na Abele Bethe Maakha na Janua na Kedeshe na Hatsoro na shango ḽa Giliadi na Galelia na Nafuthali, a dzhia vhathu vha ayo mashango a vha isa vhuthubwani Ashuru." 
2Kings15:30 Ndi hone Hoshia ṅwana wa Ela a tshi itela Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia tshimbevha, a lwa nae, a mu vhulaha, a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe nga ṅwaha wa 20 wa muvhuso wa Jothamu ṅwana wa Uzia." 
2Kings15:31 Mafhungo maṅwe a Pheka na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings15:32 Jothamu ṅwana wa Uzia o vha khosi ya Juda nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia khosi ya Israele. 
2Kings15:33 Jothamu a tshi thoma u vhusa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16. Mme awe vho vha vha tshi pfi Jerusha ṅwananyana wa Tsadoko." 
2Kings15:34 Jothamu o vha a tshi takadza Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Uzia," 
2Kings15:35 o ro sa thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, vhathu vho ḓi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo vha fhisa zwioro henengei. Jothamu ndi ene we a vusa khoro ya devhula ya thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
2Kings15:36 Mafhungo maṅwe a Jothamu na zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings15:37 Misi yeneyo Muṋe washu a thoma u ruma Retsini khosi ya Aramu na Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia u ḓa u dia ḽa Juda. 
2Kings15:38 Jothamu a dzama, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita, ṅwana wawe Ahasi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings16:1 Ahasi ṅwana wa Jothamu o vha khosi ya Juda nga ṅwaha wa 17 wa muvhuso wa Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia. 
2Kings16:2 A tshi thoma u vhusa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 20, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16. Ho ngo kanda vhuṱalani havhuḓi ha makhulukuku wawe Dafita, ho ngo ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe." 
2Kings16:3 O kanda vhuṱalani ha mahosi a Israele, a ita na u ṋekedza ṅwana wawe wa mutuka a mu ita tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, a tshi tevhedza maitele a tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha Vhaisraele vha tshi swika." 
2Kings16:4 O ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo a fhisa zwioro zwitembeleni zwa zwikwarani, miṱumbani ya zwikwara na fhasi ha miri yoṱhe yo bvukaho." 
2Kings16:5 Retsini khosi ya Aramu, na Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia khosi ya Israele, vha gonya vha yo dia Jerusalema vha govhela Ahasi, hone vha si mu kunde." 
2Kings16:6 Misi yeneyo Retsini khosi ya Aramu a dovha a dzhia muḓi wa Elathi a u humisela kha Vhaedomo, a thatha vhathu vha Juda vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula henefho, Vhaedomo vha konou yo dzula muḓini wa Elathi, vha dzula henefho, na ṋamusi." 
2Kings16:7 Ahasi a ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru uri vha swike vha ri, “Nṋe ndi mulanda wavho, ndi tou vha ṅwana wavho. Nga vha ḓe vha nndamulele zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Aramu na khosi ya Israele vhane vha khou nndevhela.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahasi a dzhia siliva na musuku zwe zwa vha zwi thembeleni ya Muṋe washu na mbulungeloni dza pfamo ya musanda, a yo luvha ngazwo khosi ya Ashuru." 
2Kings16:9 Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru a tenda khumbelo ya Ahasi, a bva pfumo a dia Damasko a u thuba, a hwala vhadzulapo vhawo a vha isa Kiri, a vhulaha Retsini." 
2Kings16:10 Khosi Ahasi a ya Damasko u ṱanganedza Thigilathi Philisere, a vhona aḽiṱari Damasko, a rumela tshifhe Uria tshifanyiso tsha iyo aḽiṱari na zwidodombedzwa zwa nzudzanyo ya kufhaṱelwe kwayo." 
2Kings16:11 Tshifhe Uria a konou fhaṱa aḽiṱari a tshi tevhedza ndaela ye khosi Ahasi a mu rumela i tshi bva Damasko, a fhedza u i fhaṱa khosi Ahasi a sa athu vhuya." 
2Kings16:12 Musi khosi Ahasi a tshi vhuya a tshi bva Damasko, a vhona iyo aḽiṱari, a swika khayo, a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo khayo." 
2Kings16:13 A ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshawe tshi fhiswaho na nduvho ya thoro, a ita thevhula, a i handulula malofha a nduvho ya u konana na midzimu." 
2Kings16:14 Aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha ye ya kumedzwa Muṋe washu yo vha i vhukati ha aḽiṱari ntswa na thembele, zwino Ahasi a i dzhia a i isa sia ḽa devhula ḽa aḽiṱari yawe ntswa." 
2Kings16:15 Ndi hone khosi Ahasi a tshi laya tshifhe Uria a ri, “Kha aḽiṱari ntswa khulwane u ṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha matsheloni na nduvho ya thoro ya madekwana na tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha khosi na nduvho yawe ya thoro na tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha vhathu vhoṱhe nga shango na tshiṱhavhelo tshavho tsha thoro na thevhula yavho. Malofha oṱhe a zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo zwa zwifuwo, a handululwe kha aḽiṱari. Hone nṋe ndi ḓo luvha kha aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha ndi tshi vhonisa.”" 
2Kings16:16 Tshifhe Uria a ita zwenezwo zwe a laiwa nga khosi Ahasi. 
2Kings16:17 Khosi Ahasi a kwatula makwati o nakisaho zwigoloi nga matungo, a sudzulusa sambelo ḽi re kha mboho dza musinaseṱha dzo lu tikaho, a lu vhea kha muteo wa matombo." 
2Kings16:18 A thutha na ḓingo ḽawe ḽa u dzula khaḽo nga Sabatha ḽe ḽa vha ḽo fhaṱwa thembeleni, a thutha na muṋango wa khosi wa u dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, a tshi itela u takadza khosi ya Ashuru." 
2Kings16:19 Mafhungo maṅwe a khosi Ahasi na zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings16:20 Ahasi a dzama, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita, ṅwana wawe Hiskia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings17:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 12 wa muvhuso wa Ahasi khosi ya Juda, Hoshia ṅwana wa Ela a vha khosi ya Israele, a vhusa e Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na miṋa." 
2Kings17:2 Hoshia a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, naho vhuvhi hawe vhu songo swika kha ha mahosi a Israele o mu rangaho phanḓa." 
2Kings17:3 Shalamanesere khosi ya Ashuru a ḓa a dia Hoshia. Hoshia a vha gota ḽawe a thela muthelo wa Shalamanesere. 
2Kings17:4 Hone khosi ya Ashuru ya sala i tshi zwi wana uri Hoshia o i shandukela; o vha o ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Suu khosi ya Egipita uri vha vhofhe mulanga, a litsha na u thela muthelo wa khosi ya Ashuru we a vha a tshi u thela ṅwaha na ṅwaha. Ndi zwe Shalamanesere a mu fara a mu hoṋela dzhele." 
2Kings17:5 Shalamanesere khosi ya Ashuru a mbo dia shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, a govhela muḓi wa Samaria a fhedza miṅwaha miraru." 
2Kings17:6 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Hoshia, khosi ya Ashuru ya thuba Samaria, ya kumba Vhaisraele ya vha isa Ashuru vha vha mathubwa, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea muḓini wa Hala, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea tsini ha mulambo wa Haboro dzinguni ḽa Gozani, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea miḓini ya Mede." 
2Kings17:7 Zwoṱhe hezwo zwo itea nge Vhaisraele vha khakhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho we a vha pfulusa Egipita vha tshi khou kandeledzwa nga Farao khosi ya Egipita. Vho luvha miṅwe midzimu," 
2Kings17:8 vha tshi edzisa maitele a tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha vhone vha tshi swika, vha edzisa na maitele o ḓiswaho nga mahosi a Israele." 
2Kings17:9 Vhaisraele vha endela u nyefula Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho nga zwo bvaho nḓilani. Vha ḓifhaṱela zwitembele zwa u luvha midzimu miḓini yavho yoṱhe, kha ine ya tou vha na tshiingamo fhedzi, na kha yo tangeledzwaho nga mitsheṱo." 
2Kings17:10 Vha imisa matombo a zwitungulo na thanda dza Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi tshikwarani tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe na fhasi ha muri muṅwe na muṅwe wo bvukaho. 
2Kings17:11 Vha fhisa zwioro hoṱhe hune ha luvhiwa midzimu, unga tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha vha tshi swika. Vha ita zwithu zwo vhifhaho zwe zwa sinyusa Muṋe washu." 
2Kings17:12 Vha luvha midzimu i nengisaho, naho Muṋe washu o vha o ri, “Ni songo vhuya na ita zwi no nga zwenezwo.”" 
2Kings17:13 Muṋe washu o kaidza Vhaisraele na Vhajuda nga milomo ya vhaporofita vhawe na vhaḓinḓa vhawe vhoṱhe a ri, “Laṱani nḓila dzaṋu mmbi. Vhulungani ndayo dzanga, ni tshi tevhedza mulayo woṱhe we nda laya vhomakhulukuku waṋu uri vha u tevhedze, nda u swikisa kha inwi nga vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita.”" 
2Kings17:14 Hone vha si thetshelese, vha ita tshipimbi unga vhomakhulukuku wavho vhe vha si fulufhele Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho." 
2Kings17:15 Vha landula ndayo dzawe na mulanga we a vhofha na vhomakhulukuku wavho na zwe a vha laya. Vha luvha zwitungulo zwi si na mushumo, na vhone vhaṋe vha fhedza vhe si tshithu. Vha edzisa tshakha dzi dzulaho tsini navho, naho Muṋe washu o vha laya a ri, “Ni songo vha edzisa.”" 
2Kings17:16 Vha ṱutshela ndayo dzoṱhe dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho, vha ḓiitela zwitungulo zwivhili nga tshivhumbeo tsha mbohwana, na thanda ya Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi. Vha gwadamela masambi oṱhe a dziṋaledzi, vha luvha na Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Vha ṋekedza vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha vha ita zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho. Vha edzisa zwa u tungula na zwa manditi, vha tou ḓikumedza kha u ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ralo ha vha u mu sinyusa." 
2Kings17:18 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Vhaisraele, a si tsha funa u vha vhona, ha sala tsinde ḽa Juda fhedzi." 
2Kings17:19 Hone na tsinde ḽa Juda vha si tevhedze ndayo dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho. Vho edzisa zwo ḓiswaho nga Vhaisraele. 
2Kings17:20 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a landula lushaka lwoṱhe lwa Israele, a vha pfisa vhuṱungu, a vha kumedza vhaṱanguli u vhuya u swika a si tsha funa na u vha vhona." 
2Kings17:21 Musi Muṋe washu o no tumula Vhaisraele kha nnḓu ya Dafita, vha dzhia Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati vha mu vhumba khosi yavho. Jerobiamu a xedza Vhaisraele vha ṱutshela Muṋe washu, a vha itisa vhutshinyi vhuhulu." 
2Kings17:22 Vhaisraele vha ḓi omelela vhuvhi hoṱhe ha Jerobiamu, vha si vhu laṱe," 
2Kings17:23 Muṋe washu a vhuya a vha sudzulusa a si tsha vha vhona, nga he a dzula o vha vhudza nga milomo ya vhaporofita vhoṱhe vhaḓinḓa vhawe. Ndi zwe Vhaisraele vha hwaliwa shangoni ḽavho vha iswa vhuthubwani Ashuru, na zwino vha henengei." 
2Kings17:24 Khosi ya Ashuru ya dzhia vhathu miḓini ya Babele na Khutha na Iva na Hamathi na Sefaravaimi, ya vha dzudza miḓini ya Samaria vhudzuloni ha Vhaisraele vho iswaho vhuthubwani. Vha dzhia shango ḽa Samaria vha dzula miḓini yaḽo." 
2Kings17:25 Musi vha tshi thoma u dzula henefho, vho vha vha sa luvhi Muṋe washu, zwenezwo a vha rumela ndau dza vhulaha vhaṅwe vhavho." 
2Kings17:26 Mafhungo ayo a swikiswa ha khosi ya Ashuru ha pfi, “Vhathu vhe vha vha pfulusa vha vha dzudza miḓini ya Samaria a vha ḓivhi milayo ya mudzimu wa iḽo shango. O vha rumela ndau dzine dza khou vha fhedza ngauri a vha ḓivhi milayo yawe.”" 
2Kings17:27 Khosi ya Ashuru ya ri hu dzhiwe muṅwe wa vhotshifhe o iswaho vhuthubwani, a vhuye, a dzule shangoni ḽa Samaria a laye vhathu milayo ya mudzimu wa shango ḽeneḽo." 
2Kings17:28 Ndi hone muṅwe wa vhotshifhe vhe vha kumbiwa Samaria vha iswa vhuthubwani a tshi ḓa a dzula Bethele, a vha funza u luvha Muṋe washu." 
2Kings17:29 Naho zwo ralo, lushaka luṅwe na luṅwe lwa ḓiitela midzimu yalwo miḓini yalwo, vha i vhea zwitembeleni zwa zwikwarani zwo fhaṱwaho nga vhathu vha Samaria." 
2Kings17:30 Vhathu vha Babele vha ita tshitungulo tsha mudzimu Sukotho Benotho, vha Khutha vha ita tshitungulo tsha Neregala, vha Hamathi vha ita tshitungulo tsha Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 vha Iva vha ita tshitungulo tsha Nibahasi na Tharathaka, vha Sefaravaimi vha dzhia vhana vhavho vha vha fhisela Adiramelekhe na Anamelekhe midzimu ya Vhasefaravaimi." 
2Kings17:32 Vhathu havho vho vha vha tshi luvha Muṋe washu, vha dovha vha ita na u nanga vhathu vha havho uri vha vhe vhotshifhe vhavho vha zwikwarani." 
2Kings17:33 Vho vha vha tshi luvha Muṋe washu, vha dovha vha shumela na midzimu yavho vha tshi tevhedza maitele a tshakha dze vha ḓiswa vha tshi bva khadzo." 
2Kings17:34 Na ṋamusi vha tshee vho nambatela maitele avho eneaḽa a kale. A vha luvhi Muṋe washu, a vha tevhedzi milayo na ndaela na pfunzo na ndayo dze Muṋe washu a ṋea vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo, we a ri u pfi Israele." 
2Kings17:35 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi vhofha mulanga na Vhaisraele, o vha laya a ri, “Ni songo luvha miṅwe midzimu kana na i gwadamela kana na i shumela kana na i ṋekedza nduvho." 
2Kings17:36 Ni fanela u luvha Yahavee fhedzi. Ndi Ene we a ni pfulusa Egipita nga maanḓa mahulu o imisa tshanḓa, luvhani Ene ni mu gwadamele, ni mu ṋekedze nduvho." 
2Kings17:37 Ni vhone uri nga misi ni vhulunge milayo na ndaela na ndayo na pfunzo ye a ni ṅwalela. Ni songo vhuya na luvha miṅwe midzimu. 
2Kings17:38 Ni songo hangwa mulanga we a vhofha na inwi, ni songo luvha miṅwe midzimu." 
2Kings17:39 Tshaṋu nga hu vhe u luvha Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu, ndi Ene ane a ḓo ni lamulela kha maswina aṋu oṱhe.”" 
2Kings17:40 Naho zwo ralo vhathu avho vha si thetshelese, vha ḓi omelela maitele avho a kale." 
2Kings17:41 Na musi avho vhathu vha tshi khou luvha Muṋe washu, vho vha vha tshi ḓi shumela zwitungulo zwavho. Vhana vhavho na vhaḓuhulu vhavho vha kha ḓi edzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho na ṋamusi." 
2Kings18:1 Hiskia ṅwana wa Ahasi o vha khosi ya Juda nga ṅwaha wa vhuraru wa muvhuso wa Hoshia ṅwana wa Ela, khosi ya Israele." 
2Kings18:2 Hiskia a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 29. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Abia ṅwananyana wa Zakaria." 
2Kings18:3 O ita zwe zwa vha zwi tshi takadza Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga makhulukuku wawe Dafita." 
2Kings18:4 O thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, a pwashekanya matombo a zwitungulo, a remekanya thanda dza Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi. A ita na u vunḓekanya ṋowa ya musinaseṱha ye ya fuliwa nga Mushe, ngauri u swika zwenezwo Vhaisraele vho vha vha tshi ḓi i dubisela zwioro. Ṋowa iyo yo vha i tshi pfi Nehushthani." 
2Kings18:5 Hiskia o vha a tshi fulufhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele. A ho ngo vha na ane a nga Hiskia kha mahosi oṱhe a Juda, vho mu rangaho phanḓa na vho mu tevhelaho." 
2Kings18:6 O nambatela Muṋe washu a si vhuye a mu shandukela, a tevhedza ndayo dze Muṋe washu a ṋea Mushe." 
2Kings18:7 Muṋe washu o vha e nae, zwoṱhe zwe a ita zwa mu nakela. Hiskia a shandukela khosi ya Ashuru, a si tsha mu shumela." 
2Kings18:8 Hiskia a kunda Vhafilista, a kunda miḓi yoṱhe, mihulwane ya mitsheṱo na ine ya tou vha na tshiingamo fhedzi, u vhuya u swika Gaza na shango ḽo hu tangaho." 
2Kings18:9 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa khosi Hiskia, we wa vha u ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Hoshia ṅwana wa Ela, khosi ya Israele, Shalamanesere khosi ya Ashuru a dia Israele, a govhela muḓi wa Samaria." 
2Kings18:10 Musi hu tshi fhela ṅwaha wa vhuraru Vhaashuru vha dzhia uyo muḓi. Muḓi wa Samaria wo thubiwa nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi wa muvhuso wa Hiskia, we wa vha u ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Hoshia khosi ya Israele." 
2Kings18:11 Khosi ya Ashuru ya thuba Vhaisraele ya vha isa Ashuru, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea muḓini wa Hala, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea tsini ha mulambo wa Haboro dzinguni ḽa Gozani, vhaṅwe ya vha vhea miḓini ya Mede." 
2Kings18:12 Muḓi wa Samaria wo thuthwa nge Vhaisraele vha si thetshelese Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho, vha vhofholola mulanga wawe, vha nyadza zwoṱhe zwe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a vha laya. Ndayo idzo a vho ngo dzi thetshelesa, a vho ngo dzi tevhedza." 
2Kings18:13 Nga ṅwaha wa 14 wa muvhuso wa khosi Hiskia, Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru a dia miḓi yoṱhe ya Juda yo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo, a i thuba." 
2Kings18:14 Ndi hone Hiskia khosi ya Juda a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya ha Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru we a vha e muḓini wa Lakhishi a ri, “Ndo khakha. Nga vha nnditshe, nṋe ndi ḓo lifha zwoṱhe zwine vha ri ndi lifhe.” Khosi ya Ashuru ya lifhisa khosi Hiskia wa Juda siliva ya khilogiramu dza 10 000 na musuku wa khilogiramu dza 1 000." 
2Kings18:15 Hiskia a ṋea Sanakheribi siliva yoṱhe ye ya vha i thembeleni ya Muṋe washu na mbulungeloni dza pfamo ya musanda. 
2Kings18:16 Zwenezwo Hiskia khosi ya Juda a kwatula musuku we wa vha wo fhoma mahothi na mihangammbwa ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, a u ṋea Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru." 
2Kings18:17 Khosi ya Ashuru a ruma mmbi khulu i tshi bva Lakhishi i tshi yo dia khosi Hiskia e Jerusalema, i na mulangammbi wawe muhulu na gota ḽawe ḽihulwane na muḓinḓa muhulwane. Vha swika Jerusalema, vha ima tsini ha mugero une wa bva ishani ḽa nṱha, hu shumaho vhaluki vha masila." 
2Kings18:18 Vha vhidzisa khosi Hiskia, a ruma Eliakimu ṅwana wa Hilikia, we a vha a tshi langa pfamo, na Shebena muṅwaleli wa khosi, na Jua ṅwana wa Asafu, tshanḓa tsha khosi, vha bva vha yo ṱangana navho." 
2Kings18:19 Mulangammbi a vha vhudza a ri, “Tshimbilani ni yo vhudza Hiskia ni ri, ‘Thovhele muhulu khosi ya Ashuru u ri: Tshe wa ḓitika ngatsho ndi mini?" 
2Kings18:20 U vhona unga u amba ndi u kona nndwa? Ndi hone u na mmbi? Wo ḓitika nga nnyi, zwine wa vhuya wa ntshandukela?" 
2Kings18:21 Zwino vhona, u ḓitika nga Vhaegipita, lubaḓa holuḽa lwa luṱanga lwo vunḓeaho, lune arali muthu a lu gogoḓela lwa mu runga tshanḓa lwa mu huvhadza! Vhoṱhe vhane vha ḓitika nga Farao khosi ya Egipita vha ḓo wana o tou ralo." 
2Kings18:22 “ ‘Zwino arali wa ri ni ḓitika nga Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu, a si Ene we Hiskia a thutha zwitembele zwawe zwa zwikwarani, na aḽiṱari dzawe, a tshi vhudza vhathu vha Juda na vha Jerusalema a ri vha fanela u luvha aḽiṱarini iyi Jerusalema." 
2Kings18:23 Zwino iḓa u betshane na muṋe wanga khosi ya Ashuru: nṋe ndi ḓo u ṋea bere dza 2 000 arali u na vhanameli vhadzo. 
2Kings18:24 Hufha u sa vhuyi wa kona u imedzana na gota zwaḽo ḽa muṋe wanga. U songo ḓitika nga Vhaegipita u tshi ri vha ḓo u ṋea dzigariki na vhanameli vha dzibere! 
2Kings18:25 Kani-ha u vhona unga nṋe ndo ḓa u dia fhethu fhano nda hu phusukanya ndi songo rumiwa nga Yahavee? Ndi Ene Yahavee we a mmbudza uri ndi die shango heḽino ndi ḽi phusukanye.’ ” 
2Kings18:26 Ndi hone Elikana ṅwana wa Hilikia na Shebena na Jua vha tshi vhudza uḽa muḓinḓa muhulwane vha ri, “Nga vha ambe na riṋe nga Tshiaramu, ri a tshi pfa. Vha songo amba Tshiheberu vhathu vho dzulaho kha mutsheṱo vha tshi zwi pfa.”" 
2Kings18:27 Hone muḓinḓa muhulwane a fhindula a ri, “Kani-ha ni ri muṋe wanga o nthuma uri ndi ḓe ndi vhudze inwi na muṋe waṋu fhedzi zwithu izwi? Ho ngo nthumela kha vha re mutsheṱoni naa, hufha na vhone vha tshi ḓo ḓi ḽa mababa avho vha nwa muṱambuluwo wavho unga inwi!”" 
2Kings18:28 Ndi hone uyo muḓinḓa muhulwane a tshi ima a vhidzelela nga Tshiheberu a ri, “Thetshelesani maipfi a thovhele muhulu khosi ya Ashuru!" 
2Kings18:29 Thovhele u ri, ‘Ni songo fhurwa nga Hiskia, a nga si ni lamulele zwanḓani zwanga." 
2Kings18:30 Ni songo tenda Hiskia a tshi ri ni ḓitike nga Yahavee, a tshi ri: Vhukumakuma Yahavee u ḓo ri lamulela, muḓi houno u nga si kumedzwe khosi ya Ashuru.’" 
2Kings18:31 Hiskia ni songo mu thetshelesa. Khosi ya Ashuru i ri, ‘Nga hu vhe na mulalo, ibvani muḓini ni ḓe ni nṱanganedze. Ndi hone muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a tshi ḓo fula munḓirivhe wawe na muhuyu wawe a ḽa, a ka na maḓi tshisimani tshawe a nwa," 
2Kings18:32 ndi vhuye ndi ḓe u ni dzhia nda ni isa shangoni ḽine ḽa nga ḽaṋu, shango ḽa goroi na waini, shango ḽa zwiḽiwa na masimu a minḓirivhe, shango ḽa miri ya miolivi na ṋotshi. Nangani u tshila, hu si u fa! Hiskia ni songo mu thetshelesa, ngauri u khou ni fhura hezwi a tshi ri Yahavee u ḓo ni lamulela." 
2Kings18:33 Ndi lufhio lushaka lwe mudzimu walwo wa vhuya wa lamulela shango ḽawe zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Ashuru? 
2Kings18:34 Midzimu ya Hamathi na Ariphada i ngafhi zwino? Midzimu ya Sefaravaimi na Hena na Iva i ngafhi? Yo vhuya ya lamukisa Samaria zwanḓani zwanga naa? 
2Kings18:35 “ ‘Kha midzimu yoṱhe ya tshakha dzoṱhe ndi ufhio we wa kona u lamulela shango ḽawo zwanḓani zwanga inwi ni tshi vho ri Yahavee u ḓo kona u lamulela Jerusalema?’ ” 
2Kings18:36 Hone vhathu vha sokou tshete vha si fhindule tshithu, nge khosi Hiskia a vha o vha laya uri vha songo mu fhindula." 
2Kings18:37 Ndi hone Eliakimu ṅwana wa Hilikia, mulangi wa pfamo ya musanda, na Shebena muṅwaleli wa khosi, na Jua ṅwana wa Asafu, tshanḓa tsha khosi, vha tshi kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho nga u ṱungufhala, vha ya ha Hiskia vha swika vha mu vhudza zwe mulangammbi wa Ashuru a amba." 
2Kings19:1 Musi khosi Hiskia a tshi tou zwi pfa, a kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe nga u ṱungufhala a ambara madzanganda, a ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
2Kings19:2 A ruma Eliakimu mulangi wa pfamo ya musanda, na Shebena muṅwaleli wa khosi, na vhotshifhe vhahulwane, a ri vha ye ha muporofita Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi vho ambara-vho madzanganda," 
2Kings19:3 vha vhudze Yesaya vha ri, “Khosi Hiskia u ri, ‘Uno ndi musi muvhi, wa u seṅwa, wa u nyadziwa, zwi nga musi musadzi e tsini na u vhofholowa, hone a shaya nungo dza u beba." 
2Kings19:4 Khamusi Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u ḓo pfa maipfi oṱhe a mulangammbi we muṋe wawe khosi ya Ashuru a mu ruma uri a ḓe a nyefule Mudzimu a tshilaho, a mu lifhedze maipfi e a pfiwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho. Zwenezwo nga vha rabelele tsalela dzine dza kha ḓi tshila.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Musi vhaḓinḓa vha khosi Hiskia vha tshi swika ha Yesaya," 
2Kings19:6 ene a vha fhindula a ri vha vhudze muṋe wavho vha ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ni songo ofha zwe na zwi pfa, ndi amba maipfi e magota a khosi ya Ashuru a nnyefula ngao." 
2Kings19:7 Ndi ḓo mu dzhenisa muya une musi a tshi ḓo pfa mafhungo ane a ḓo vhudzwa, a ḓo humela shangoni ḽawe, henefho ndi ḓo ita uri a ḽiwe nga pfumo.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Musi mulangammbi a tshi pfa upfi khosi ya Ashuru yo ṱuwa Lakhishi, a ṱuwa, a wana khosi i tshi khou lwa na vha Libina." 
2Kings19:9 Zwino Sanakheribi a pfa uri Thiraka, khosi ya Mukushu ya Egipita, u khou ḓa u lwa nae. A dovha a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya ha Hiskia khosi ya Juda, a ri" 
2Kings19:10 vha mu vhudze vha ri, “U songo tenda hoyo mudzimu wau ane wa ḓitika ngae a tshi u fhura a ri Jerusalema u nga si kumedzwe khosi ya Ashuru." 
2Kings19:11 Hufha wo ḓipfela nga dzau nḓevhe zwe mahosi a Ashuru a ita mashango oṱhe, vha tshi a phusukanya tshoṱhe vha a kumedza midzimu ya Ashuru. Zwino iwe u ḓo ponyoka hani?" 
2Kings19:12 Midzimu ya mashango e a phusukanywa nga vhomakhulukuku wanga yo a lamulela naa? Ndi amba midzimu ya Gozani na Harani na Retsefe na vhathu vha Edeni vha dzulaho Thelasara. 
2Kings19:13 Mahosi a miḓi ya Hamathi na Ariphada na Sefaravaimi na Hena na Iva a ngafhi?” 
2Kings19:14 Khosi Hiskia a ṱanganedza luṅwalo lu no bva kha avho vhaḓinḓa, a lu vhala. Ndi hone a tshi ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, a lu ṱharamudza phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
2Kings19:15 A rabela Muṋe washu a ri, “Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, Iwe wo dzulaho kha khuluṋoni vhukati ha vhakherube, Iwe u woṱhe u Mudzimu a vhusaho mivhuso ya ḽifhasi. Ndi Iwe wo sikaho ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
2Kings19:16 Yawee Muṋe washu, nthetshelese u mpfe! Yawee Muṋe washu, bonyolola u vhone, thetshelesa maipfi o bvaho kha Sanakheribi a tshi nyefula Iwe Mudzimu a tshilaho." 
2Kings19:17 Yawee Muṋe washu, ndi ngoho uri mahosi a Ashuru o lozwa tshakha hedzi a phusukanya mashango adzo." 
2Kings19:18 Vho fhisa midzimu yadzo nga mulilo vha i lozwa ngauri a si midzimu, i tou vha matanda na matombo yo itwaho nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu." 
2Kings19:19 Yawee Muṋe washu, Mudzimu washu, zwino ri lamulele zwanḓani zwawe, uri mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi i ḓivhe uri Mudzimu ndi Iwe Muṋe washu u woṱhe.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ndi hone Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi a tshi swikisa fhungo ha khosi Hiskia a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndo pfa thabelo yau u tshi amba nga Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru.’" 
2Kings19:21 Yahavee a tshi mu fhindula u ri, “ ‘Musidzana ṅwananyana Tsioni u a u nyadza, u a u sea. Ṅwananyana Jerusalema u a u goḓa iwe u tshi khou shavha." 
2Kings19:22 Wo sema nnyi? Wo nyefula nnyi? Ipfi ḽau wo ḽi takusela nnyi? Wo ḓihudza phanḓa ha nnyi? A si Mukhethwa wa Israele naa? 
2Kings19:23 Wo ruma vhaḓinḓa vhau uri vha ṱongele Muṋe wa zwoṱhe. Iwe u tshi amba wo ri: Ndo gonya miṱumbani ya dzithavha nga gariki dzanga nnzhi, nda swika nṱha-nṱha ha Libanoni. Ndo rema mikedara yayo milapfulapfu, na mipaini yayo yavhuḓivhuḓi. Nda swika ngomu-ngomu hayo, hone tshivhindini tsha maṱaka ayo." 
2Kings19:24 Ndo bwa bidzi mashangoni asili, nda nwa maḓi henefho. Nda ri u kanda milonga ya Nile yoṱhe ya xa." 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘A u athu vhuya wa zwi pfa uri ndo dzula ndo dzudzanya zwoṱhe izwo kale-kale? Ndo zwi dzudzanya maḓuvha aḽa a kale, zwino ndi hone ndo zwi bveledza, zwe wa phusukanya miḓi ya mitsheṱo ya sala i thulwi dza mathukhwi." 
2Kings19:26 Vhathu vha miḓi iyo vha kulea nungo, vha hanganea, vha shona. Vha sala vha tshi nga tsheṋe tsimuni, vha tshi nga maḓadzwane madala matete, vha tshi nga hatsi vhu no mela tshiuludzani tsha nnḓu, vhune ha ri u mela ha mbo ḓi puta." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Na iwe ndi a u ḓivha; ndi ḓivha hune wa dzula, na musi u tshi ḓa na musi u tshi ṱuwa na zwine wa nndyela vhuhali." 
2Kings19:28 Ndo zwi pfa zwa mbiti dzenedzo dzau na u ḓihudza hau. Zwino-ha ndi ḓo u phulela muhala ningoni, nda u longa ḓomu mulomoni, nda u humisa nga nḓila ye wa ḓa ngayo." 
2Kings19:29 “ ‘A vha iwe Hiskia, tshiga tshine nda u ṋea ngetshi: ṋaṅwaha ni ḓo ḽa zwine zwa tou mela nga zwoṱhe, mwakani na ḽa maokha a zwenezwo, nga wa vhuraru na ḓo konou lima na kaṋa, na ṱavha minḓirivhe, na ḽa mitshelo yayo." 
2Kings19:30 Tsalela dza nnḓu ya Juda dzi ḓo dovha dza ṱoka midzi dza aṋwa mitshelo. 
2Kings19:31 Jerusalema hu ḓo vha na tsalela, thavhani ya Tsioni ha bva vho ponyokaho lufu. Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ndi a fulufhedzea, ndi ḓo zwi khunyeledza.’" 
2Kings19:32 “Muṋe washu a tshi amba khosi ya Ashuru u ri, “ ‘U nga si dzhene muḓini hoyu, na musevhe a u nga u posi; a hu na ane a ḓo sendela tsini hawo ó fara tshiṱangu, na u govhelwa a u nga govhelwi." 
2Kings19:33 U ḓo huma nga nḓila ye wa ḓa ngayo, hafhano muḓini a u nga dzheni. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
2Kings19:34 Ndi ḓo pilela muḓi hoyu nda u tshidza, ndi tshi itela Nṋe muṋe na Dafita mulanda wanga.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Vhusiku honoho muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a bva a vhulaha vhanna vha 185 000 mishashani ya Vhaashuru. Vhathu vha tshi vuwa nga matshelo vha wana vho rambalala vhó fa vhoṱhe. 
2Kings19:36 Ndi hone Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru a tshi takuwa a humela Ninive a dzula hone. 
2Kings19:37 Muṅwe musi a tshi khou luvha thembeleni ya mudzimu wawe Nisirokho, vhana vhawe Adiramelekhe na Sharetsere vha mu vhulaha nga mapanga, vha shavhela shangoni ḽa Ararathi. Ṅwana wawe Esarahadoni a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings20:1 Misi yeneyo khosi Hiskia a farwa nga vhulwadze, lwe a ṱoḓou fa. Muporofita Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi a ya khae a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Dzudzanya zwithu zwau zwoṱhe; a u tsha ḓo tshila, u ḓo fa.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Hiskia a rembuluwa a lavhelesa luvhondo a rabela Muṋe washu a ri," 
2Kings20:3 “Yawee Muṋe washu, edzou elelwa zwe nda u shumela ndi tshi fulufhedzea, ndó ḓikumedza Iwe nga mbilu yoṱhe, ndi tshi ita zwi u takadzaho.” Hiskia a lila lu ṱungufhadzaho." 
2Kings20:4 Musi Yesaya a sa athu pfukekanya muṱa wa vhukati, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa khae ḽa ri," 
2Kings20:5 “Huma u yo vhudza Hiskia murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhanga u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa makhulukuku wau Dafita u ri: Thabelo yau ndo i pfa, na miṱodzi yau ndo i vhona; ndi ḓo u fhodza. Mbamatshelo u ḓo gonya thembeleni ya Yahavee." 
2Kings20:6 Ndi ḓo engedza vhutshilo hau nga miṅwaha ya 15. Ndi ḓo u lamulela na muḓi hoyu zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Ashuru. Ndi ḓo tsireledza muḓi hoyu ndi tshi itela Nṋe muṋe na Dafita mulanda wanga.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Ndi hone Yesaya a tshi ri, “Sukani bwindi ḽa mahuyu.” Vha ita nga u ralo vha ḽi ḓodza kha tshitshimbili tshawe, Hiskia a mbo ḓi fhola." 
2Kings20:8 Hiskia a vhudzisa Yesaya a ri, “Tshiga tshi ḓo vha tshifhio tshine tsha ḓo sumbedza uri Muṋe washu u ḓo mphodza nda gonya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu mbamatshelo?”" 
2Kings20:9 Yesaya a fhindula a ri, “Tshiga tshine Muṋe washu a vha sumbedza tshone uri Muṋe washu u ḓo ita zwe a fulufhedzisa ngetshi: Vha funa murunzi u tshi ya phanḓa wa ita maga a fumi kana vha funa u tshi ya murahu wa ita maga a fumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hiskia a fhindula a ri, “Murunzi u tshi ya phanḓa wa ita maga a fumi a zwi konḓi, nga vha ri u humele murahu u ite maga a fumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Ndi hone muporofita Yesaya a tshi rabela Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a ita uri murunzi u humele murahu u ite maga a fumi he wa vha wo tsa fhasi kha nḓila ya zwiṱepisi yo fhaṱwaho nga khosi Ahasi." 
2Kings20:12 Misi yeneyo Mirodakha Baladani ṅwana wa Baladani khosi ya Babele a ruma vhaḓinḓa ha khosi Hiskia vha isa maṅwalo na tshifhiwa nge a vha o zwi pfa uri Hiskia u a lwala. 
2Kings20:13 Hiskia a ṱanganedza vhaḓinḓa avho, a vha sumbedza zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi nḓuni dzawe dza mbulungelo, siliva na musuku na zwilungi na mapfura a songo vangwaho, na zwihali zwawe na zwoṱhe zwine zwa wanala mbulungeloni dzawe. Hiskia ho ngo sia na tshithihi tshe a si vha sumbedze pfamoni yawe kana shangoni ḽawe ḽoṱhe." 
2Kings20:14 Ndi hone muporofita Yesaya a tshi ya ha khosi Hiskia a vhudzisa a ri, “Vhaḽa vhanna vho ri mini nahone vho vha vha tshi bvafhi?” Hiskia a fhindula a ri, “Vho vha vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa kule, vho vha vha tshi bva Babele.”" 
2Kings20:15 Muporofita a vhudzisa a ri, “Vho vhona mini pfamoni yavho?” Hiskia a fhindula a ri, “Vho vhona zwoṱhe zwi re pfamoni yanga. A ho ngo sala tshithu mbulungeloni dzanga tshe nda si vha sumbedze.”" 
2Kings20:16 Ndi hone Yesaya a tshi vhudza khosi a ri, “Nga vha pfe zwine Muṋe washu a amba a ri," 
2Kings20:17 ‘Vhukuma hu ḓo swika tshifhinga tshine zwoṱhe zwi re pfamoni yavho na zwoṱhe zwe vhomakhulukuku wavho vha zwi vhulunga u swika ṋamusi, zwa ḓo hwaliwa zwa iswa Babele. A hu nga sali tshithu, Muṋe washu u ralo." 
2Kings20:18 Vhaṅwe vhaḓuhulu vhavho vha malofha avho, vhane vha ḓo bebelwa vhone, vha ḓo hwaliwa vha luvhedzwa, vha shumela khosi ya Babele pfamoni yawe.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 Hiskia a fhindula a ri, “Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽe vha ḽi amba ndi ḽavhuḓi.” A dovha a ri, “Tenda ha vha na mulalo na vhudziki nṋe ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila.”" 
2Kings20:20 Mafhungo maṅwe a Hiskia na zwoṱhe zwa vhuhali hawe na zwe a fhaṱa damu ḽa u vhulunga maḓi a bwa na mugero wa u ḓisa maḓi muḓini, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings20:21 Hiskia a dzama, ṅwana wawe Manase a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings21:1 Manase a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 12, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 55. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Hefetsiba." 
2Kings21:2 Manase a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a edzisa maitele a nengisaho a tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha afho shangoni musi Vhaisraele vha tshi swika." 
2Kings21:3 Manase a vusa zwitembele zwa zwikwarani zwe khotsi awe a vha o zwi thutha, a ita na u fhaṱa aḽiṱari dza Baali, a imisa thanda ya Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi, a kanda vhuṱalani ha Ahaba khosi ya Israele. A gwadamela ṋaledzi dzoṱhe a dzi luvha." 
2Kings21:4 A fhaṱa na aḽiṱari dza u luvha midzimu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, fhethu he Muṋe washu a vha o ri, “Ndi ḓo vhea dzina ḽanga Jerusalema.”" 
2Kings21:5 Miṱani ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, vhuvhili hayo, a fhaṱa dziaḽiṱari a tshi fhaṱela ṋaledzi dzoṱhe." 
2Kings21:6 A ita na u ṋekedza ṅwana wawe wa mutuka a mu ita nduvho i fhiswaho, a edzisa zwa manditi na u tungula ṱhangu, a yo vhudzisa vhaambeli na vha malombo na vhabvumbi. A tshinya zwihulu zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a mu sinyusa." 
2Kings21:7 A dzhia thanda ya Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi yo vhaḓwaho, ye ene muṋe a tou ḓivhaḓela, a i vhea thembeleni, he Muṋe washu a vha o vhudza Dafita na ṅwana wawe Solomoni a ri, “Thembeleni hei, fhano Jerusalema, fhethu he nda hu nanga kha shango ḽoṱhe ḽa matsinde a 12 a Vhaisraele, ndi hone hune dzina ḽanga ḽa ḓo vha hone lini na lini." 
2Kings21:8 A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda ita uri ṋayo dza Vhaisraele dzi tendeleke kule na shango ḽe nda ḽi ṋea vhomakhulukuku wavho, arali vha ita zwoṱhe zwe nda vha laya, vha vhulunga Mulayo woṱhe we vha ṋewa nga Mushe muḓinḓa wanga.”" 
2Kings21:9 Hone vhathu vha si thetshelese. Manase a vha xedza, vha ita vhuvhi vhu no fhira ha tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi lozwa Vhaisraele vha tshi swika." 
2Kings21:10 Muṋe washu a amba nga milomo ya vhaḓinḓa vhawe vhaporofita a ri," 
2Kings21:11 “Manase khosi ya Juda o ita vhuvhi hovhu vhu nengisaho. O ita vhuvhi vhu no fhira ha Vhaamori vho mu rangaho phanḓa, a ita uri na vhathu vha Juda vha tshinye nga u luvha midzimu yawe i nengisaho." 
2Kings21:12 Zwenezwo Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ḓisela Jerusalema na Juda khombo khulu lune nḓevhe dza muṅwe na muṅwe ane a zwi pfa dza ḓo luma." 
2Kings21:13 Ndi ḓo ita Jerusalema zwenezwo zwe nda ita Samaria, na zwe nda ita Ahaba khosi ya Israele na nnḓu yawe. Ndi ḓo swiela Jerusalema ha sala he swoto unga muthu a tshi phumula ndilo, a ri u i phumula, a i tiba." 
2Kings21:14 Ndi ḓo ṱutshela tsalela dza vhathu vhanga, nda vha kumedza maswina avho. Vha ḓo kundwa, vha ṱangulwa nga maswina avho oṱhe," 
2Kings21:15 nge vha ita zwi sa ntakadzi vha ntsinyusa u bva tshee vhomakhulukuku wavho vha pfuluwa Egipita u swika na ṋamusi.’ ” 
2Kings21:16 Manase o ita na u shulula malofha manzhi a vhathu vha si na mulandu a ḓadza mikoto yoṱhe ya Jerusalema, hu sa vhalwi zwe a ita uri na vhathu vha Juda vha tshinye, vha ite zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu." 
2Kings21:17 Mafhungo maṅwe a Manase na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, hu tshi katelwa na vhuvhi he a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings21:18 Manase a dzama, a swiṱwa ngadeni ya pfamo yawe, ngade ya Uza. Ṅwana wawe Amoni a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 22, a vhusa miṅwaha mivhili e Jerusalema. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Mishulimethe, ṅwananyana wa Harutsi wa muḓi wa Jotoba." 
2Kings21:20 Amoni a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Manase." 
2Kings21:21 A kanda vhuṱalani hoṱhe ha khotsi awe, a luvha midzimu i nengisaho ye ya vha i tshi luvhiwa nga khotsi awe, a i gwadamela." 
2Kings21:22 A landula Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku wawe, a si tshimbile nḓilani yawe." 
2Kings21:23 Magota a Amoni a mu langana, a mu vhulaha e pfamoni." 
2Kings21:24 Vhaḓivhalea vha shango vha vhulaha vhoṱhe vhe vha langana khosi Amoni, vha dzhia ṅwana wawe Josiasi vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings21:25 Mafhungo maṅwe awe na zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings21:26 Amoni o swiṱwa tshaloni tshawe ngadeni ya Uza. Ṅwana wawe Josiasi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe. 
2Kings22:1 Josiasi a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 31. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Jedida, ṅwananyana wa Adaya wa muḓini wa Botsikati." 
2Kings22:2 Josiasi o ita zwe zwa vha zwi tshi takadza Muṋe washu, a kanda vhuṱalani hoṱhe ha makhulukuku wawe Dafita, a si vhuye a pambutshela thungo ya tshauḽa kana tshamonde." 
2Kings22:3 Nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wa khosi Josiasi, a ruma muṅwaleli wa musanda, Shafani ṅwana wa Atsalia, ṅwana wa Mishulamu, a ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, a ri," 
2Kings22:4 “Tshimbilani ni ye ha tshifhe muhulu Hilikia ni mu vhudze uri a kale tshelede yo ḓiswaho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, ye vhalindamiṋango vha i kuvhanganya i tshi bva kha vhathu." 
2Kings22:5 Ni vha vhudze vha i ṋee vhalavhelesi vha mushumo wa u vusa thembele. Vhanna avho vha lambedze ngayo vhashumi vha no khou vusa thembele ya Muṋe washu," 
2Kings22:6 vhavhaḓi na vhafhaṱi na vhatsheṱi vha matombo. Vha renge na matanda na matombo o vhaḓiwaho a u vusa thembele. 
2Kings22:7 Hone vha songo ṱwa vha tshi ṱoḓa vhuṱanzi ha tshelede ine vha vha ṋea, ngauri avho vhanna vha a fulufhedzea.”" 
2Kings22:8 Tshifhe muhulu Hilikia a vhudza Shafani muṅwaleli wa musanda a ri, “Ndo tumbula bugu ya Mulayo thembeleni ya Muṋe washu.” Hilikia a dzhia iyo bugu a i ṋea Shafani, a i vhala." 
2Kings22:9 Ndi hone Shafani muṅwaleli wa musanda a tshi ya ha khosi a swikisa mafhungo a ri, “Magota avho o dzhia iḽa tshelede ye ya vha i thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha i ṋea vhalavhelesi vha mushumo wa u vusa thembele.”" 
2Kings22:10 Ndi hone Shafani muṅwaleli wa musanda a tshi ḓivhadza khosi a ri, “Tshifhe Hilikia o nṋea bugu.” Shafani a i vhalela khosi." 
2Kings22:11 Musi khosi i tshi pfa mafhungo a bugu ya Mulayo, ya kherukanya zwiambaro zwayo." 
2Kings22:12 Josiasi a laya tshifhe Hilikia na Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani na Akhiboro ṅwana wa Mikhaya na Shafani muṅwaleli wa musanda na Asaya ndumi ya khosi a ri," 
2Kings22:13 “Iyani ni mmbudzisele ha Muṋe washu, ni vhudzisele na vhathu, ni vhudzisele na ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda zwo ṅwalwaho buguni hei yo tumbulwaho. Muṋe washu o ri sinyutshela zwihulu nge vhomakhulukuku washu vha si thetshelese maipfi a bugu hei; a vho ngo tevhedza zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho khayo zwi tshi amba riṋe.”" 
2Kings22:14 Tshifhe Hilikia na Ahikamu na Akhiboro na Shafani na Asaya vha ya ha Huluda muporofita wa musadzi, we a vha e musadzi wa Shalumu ṅwana wa Thikiva, ṅwana wa Harahasi, mulondoli wa zwiambaro zwa thembeleni. Huluda o vha a tshi dzula Jerusalema dzinguni ḽa vhuvhili." 
2Kings22:15 Huluda a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Vhudzani munna o ni rumaho ha Nṋe ni ri:" 
2Kings22:16 Yahavee u ri: Fhano fhethu na vhadzulapo vhaho ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo, nga he ha ṅwalwa buguni ye ya vhalwa nga khosi ya Juda." 
2Kings22:17 Ndi uri vhathu vho nndandula vha yo dubisela midzimu miṅwe zwioro, vha ntsinyusa nga zwitungulo zwe vha ḓiitela; ndi ḓo sinyutshela fhano fhethu mbiti dzanga dza tou duga ha si vhe na a dzi dzimaho." 
2Kings22:18 Vhudzani khosi ye ya ni ruma uri ni ḓe ni vhudzise Yahavee ni ri: Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi amba nga maipfi e wa a pfa u ri: 
2Kings22:19 Iwe wo ḓisola wa ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa hanga wa kherukanya zwiambaro zwau, wa tsengisa miṱodzi musi u tshi pfa zwe nda amba ndi tshi teketela afha fhethu na vhapo vhaho. Ndi ḓo ita uri afha fhethu hu ofhise muthu a tshi hu sedza, vhathu vha ḓo teketelana nga dzina ḽaho. Hone thabelo yau ndo i pfa, Yahavee u ralo." 
2Kings22:20 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo u litsha wa fa, wa swiṱwa nga mulalo. A u nga vhoni khombo ine nda ḓo i ḓisa fhethu afha.’ ” Ndi hone vhanna avho vha tshi ṱuwa na phindulo iyo vha i swikisa ha khosi Josiasi." 
2Kings23:1 Khosi Josiasi a vhidza vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema. 
2Kings23:2 A ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu e na vhanna vha Juda na vhathu vha Jerusalema na vhotshifhe na vhaporofita, vhathu vhoṱhe, vha nyadzeaho na vhaḓivhalea. Josiasi a dzhia iḽa bugu ye ya vha yo tumbulwa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, a vhalela vhathu maipfi oṱhe a Bugu ya Mulanga." 
2Kings23:3 Khosi ya ima tsini na phuphu a vhofha mulanga na Muṋe washu, a ri u ḓo tevhela Muṋe washu, a vhulunga ndayo na milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine a vha zwone, u ralo ha vha u khwaṱhisa maipfi a mulanga o ṅwalwaho buguni iyo. Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi fulufhedzisa uri vha ḓo vhulunga mulanga." 
2Kings23:4 Khosi ya laya tshifhe muhulu Hilikia na vhotshifhe vha mu tevhelaho nga vhuimo, na vhalindamuṋango, uri hafho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha bvise zwithu zwoṱhe zwa Baali na Ashera mudzimu wa musadzi, na zwa masambi oṱhe a ṋaledzi. Khosi ya dzhia zwithu izwo ya zwi fhisa nnḓa ha muḓi wa Jerusalema mudavhini tsini ha govha ḽa Kidroni, ya hwala milora yazwo ya isa Bethele." 
2Kings23:5 Khosi ya bvisa vhotshifhe vha vhahedeni mushumoni we vha vha vho vhewa khawo nga mahosi a Juda, wa u dubisa zwioro vha tshi dubisela zwitembeleni zwa zwikwarani zwa miḓi ya Juda na yo tangaho Jerusalema, vhane vha dubisa zwioro vha tshi dubisela Baali na ḓuvha na ṅwedzi na masambi oṱhe a ṋaledzi na zwine dza fanyisa zwone." 
2Kings23:6 Khosi ya bvisa thanda ya Ashera thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a i isa Govhani ḽa Kidroni nnḓa ha muḓi wa Jerusalema, a i fhisela henefho. A i kuya ya vha luvhanda, a hasha buse ḽayo nṱha ha zwalo zwa vhathu zwavho." 
2Kings23:7 Khosi ya ita na u thutha nnḓu ya phombwe dza thembele afho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu. Ndi hone he vhasadzi vha vha vha tshi luka zwiambaro zwe zwa vha zwi tshi ambarwa hu tshi luvhiwa Ashera. 
2Kings23:8 Josiasi a kuvhanganya vhotshifhe vhoṱhe Jerusalema vha tshi bva miḓini ya Juda, vha kumadza zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, u bva Geba u swika Bierisheba, he vhotshifhe vha vha vha tshi fhisa zwioro. A thutha zwitembele zwa midzimu dzikhoroni, muṋangoni wa khoro ya Joshua muvhusi wa muḓi, ye ya vha i thungo ya tshamonde khoroni ya muḓi." 
2Kings23:8 Josiasi a kuvhanganya vhotshifhe vhoṱhe Jerusalema vha tshi bva miḓini ya Juda, vha kumadza zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, u bva Geba u swika Bierisheba, he vhotshifhe vha vha vha tshi fhisa zwioro. A thutha zwitembele zwa midzimu dzikhoroni, muṋangoni wa khoro ya Joshua muvhusi wa muḓi, ye ya vha i thungo ya tshamonde khoroni ya muḓi." 
2Kings23:9 Naho vhotshifhe vha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani vho vha vha sa shumi aḽiṱarini ya Muṋe washu Jerusalema, vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa vho vha vha tshi vhu ḽa-vho na vhaṅwe vhotshifhe vha mutupo wavho." 
2Kings23:10 Khosi Josiasi a ita na u kumadza tshivhaso hune vhathu vha luvha midzimu hone Govhani ḽa Hinomu, uri hu si tsha vha na muthu ane a ṋekedza Molekhe ṅwana wawe a mu ita nduvho i fhiswaho." 
2Kings23:11 Muṋangoni wa thembele ya Muṋe washu a thutha bere dze mahosi a Juda a vha o dzi sumela ḓuvha. Dzo vha dzi muṱani tsini ha kamara ya gota ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi pfi Nathani Melekhe. Josiasi a fhisa gariki dzo sumelwaho ḓuvha. 
2Kings23:12 A thutha aḽiṱari dze dza vha dzo fhaṱwa nga mahosi a Juda nṱha ha ṱhanga tsini ha kamara ya Ahasi ya nṱha, a thutha na aḽiṱari dze dza vha dzo fhaṱwa nga Manase miṱani mivhili ya thembele ya Muṋe washu. A dzi thutha henefho, a dzi pwashekanya dza thuthekana a dzhia mathukhwi adzo a hasha Govhani ḽa Kidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Khosi ya tshinya na thembele dza midzimu dzo fhaṱwaho nga Solomoni khosi ya Israele vhubvaḓuvha ha Jerusalema, tshipembe ha Thavha ya Phusuphusu; dzo fhaṱelwa zwitungulo zwi nengisaho zwa Ashtharotho mudzimu wa musadzi wa Vhasidoni na Khemosho mudzimu u nengisaho wa Muaba na Molekhe mudzimu wa tshika wa Vhaamoni." 
2Kings23:14 Josiasi a pwasha phuphu dza matombo, a remekanya thanda dza Ashera, fhethu afho a hu tibedza nga marambo a vhathu." 
2Kings23:15 Josiasi a thutha na aḽiṱari ya Bethele, na kutembele kwa tshikwarani kwo fhaṱwaho nga Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati we a ita uri Vhaisraele vha tshinye. Josiasi a fhisa aḽiṱari iyo khathihi na kutembele kwa tshikwarani a ku kuya kwa vha luvhanda, a ita na u fhisa thanda ya Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 A rembuluwa a sedza, a vhona zwalo zwe zwa vha zwi zwikwarani, a ita uri marambo a bvisiwe khazwo, a fhisiwe kha aḽiṱari uri i kumale, a tshi khunyeledza zwe Muṋe washu a amba, zwa ḓivhadzwa nga uḽa muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu we a dzula o amba zwithu izwo." 
2Kings23:17 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Tshalo tshiḽa tshine nda tshi vhona ndi tsha nnyi?” Vhathu vha muḓi wa Bethele vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi tshalo tsha muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu we a bva Juda, onoyo o teketela aḽiṱari ya Bethele a bula zwithu zwine vhone vha kha ḓi bva u zwi ita.”" 
2Kings23:18 A ri, “Itsho tshi litsheni. Ni songo tenda na muthihi a tshi kwama marambo awe.” Ndi hone vha tshi litsha marambo awe na a uḽa muporofita we a vha a tshi bva Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 A thutha a kumadza zwitembele zwoṱhe zwa zwikwarani zwo fhaṱwaho nga mahosi a Israele miḓini ya Samaria sa zwe a ita Bethele, ngauri zwo vha zwi tshi sinyusa Muṋe washu." 
2Kings23:20 A shidzha vhotshifhe vha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani vhe vha vha vhe henefho, a vha vhulahela kha aḽiṱari dzavho, a fhisa marambo a vhathu kha aḽiṱari dzoṱhe. Zwo no ralo a vhuelela Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Khosi Josiasi a laya vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Itani vhuṱambo ha Paseka ni tshi hulisa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, nga he ha ṅwalwa ngaho Buguni hei ya Mulanga.”" 
2Kings23:22 Ho vha hu sa athu vhuya ha ḽiwa vhuṱambo ha Paseka nga nḓila yeneyo, u bva misi ya vharangaphanḓa vhe vha endedza Vhaisraele, na misi yoṱhe ya mahosi a Israele na a Juda." 
2Kings23:23 Huno nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wa khosi Josiasi, vhuṱambo uho ha Paseka ha itelwa Muṋe washu muḓini wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:24 Josiasi a dovha a fhelisa zwa vhaambeli na malombo na zwitungulo zwa muṱani na midzimu ya tshika na zwiṅwe zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho zwine zwa vhonala Juda na Jerusalema. Hezwo o zwi itela u khunyeledza mulayo wo ṅwalwaho buguni ye tshifhe Hilikia a i tumbula thembeleni ya Muṋe washu. 
2Kings23:25 Ho vha hu sa athu vha na khosi i no nga Josiasi kha vho mu rangaho phanḓa, na vho ḓaho ngavhuya, we a rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga nungo dzoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine a vha zwone, a tshi tevhedza Mulayo wa Mushe woṱhe." 
2Kings23:26 Naho zwo ralo, Muṋe washu ho ngo humisa mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho, dze dza tou dugela vhathu vha Juda nga zwoṱhe zwo itwaho nga Manase a tshi mu ṱunga." 
2Kings23:27 Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhathu vha Juda na vhone ndi ḓo vha sudzulusa nda si tsha vha vhona, sa zwe nda sudzulusa Vhaisraele, ndi ḓo landula Jerusalema, muḓi we nda u nanga, na thembele hei ye nda amba ngayo nda ri, ‘Dzina ḽanga ḽi ḓo vha henefho.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Mafhungo maṅwe a Josiasi na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings23:29 Musi Josiasi e khosi, Farao Nikho khosi ya Egipita a gonya a yo tikedza khosi ya Ashuru a bva nga nḓila ya mulambo wa Yufuratha. Khosi Josiasi a bva uri a yo ṱangana nae vha lwe, hone Nikho a imedzana nae, a mu vhulaha muḓini wa Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Vhalanda vha Josiasi vha hwala tshitumbu tshawe nga gariki tshi tshi bva Megido vha tshi isa Jerusalema, vha tshi swiṱa tshaloni tshawe. Vhaḓivhalea vha shango vha dzhia Juahasi ṅwana wa Josiasi, vha mu ḓodza mapfura, vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe." 
2Kings23:31 Juahasi a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 23, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru. Mme awe o vha e ṅwananyana wa Jeremia, a no pfi Hamuthali, wa muḓi wa Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Juahasi a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga vhomakhulukuku wawe." 
2Kings23:33 Farao Nikho wa Egipita a mu vhofha nga dzigeḓane a mu vhea muḓini wa Ribila shangoni ḽa Hamathi uri a si kone u vhusa Jerusalema, a thelisa vhathu vha Juda khilogiramu dza 3 400 dza siliva na khilogiramu dza 34 dza musuku." 
2Kings23:34 Farao Nikho a dzhia Eliakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi a mu ita khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Josiasi, a shandukisa dzina ḽa Eliakimu ḽa vho pfi Jehoyakimu. Nikho a hwala Juahasi a mu isa Egipita, a fela hone." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoyakimu a ṋea Farao Nikho siliva na musuku nga he a zwi ṱoḓa ngaho. Izwo o zwi kona nga u thelisa shango, vhathu vha shango vha bvisa siliva na musuku zwi tshi ya nga zwine vha vha nazwo." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakimu a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 11. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Zibida ṅwananyana wa Phedaya, a tshi bva muḓini wa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Jehoyakimu a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga vhomakhulukuku wawe." 
2Kings24:1 Musi Jehoyakimu e khosi, Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a dia shango ḽa Juda, Jehoyakimu a fhedza miṅwaha miraru e gota ḽawe, a konou mu shandukela." 
2Kings24:2 Muṋe washu a ruma mmbi dza Vhababele na Vhaaramu na Vhamuaba na Vhaamoni uri vha ḓe vha mu ṱangule, vha phusukanye shango ḽa Juda, nga he Muṋe washu a ḓivhadza nga milomo ya vhaḓinḓa vhawe vhaporofita." 
2Kings24:3 Vhukuma zwithu izwo zwo itea shangoni ḽa Juda zwi tshi tevhedza ndaela ya Muṋe washu, uri a vha sudzuluse a si tsha vha vhona, nga vhuvhi he Manase a ita," 
2Kings24:4 na nge a shulula malofha a vhathu vha si na mulandu. O ḓadza Jerusalema nga malofha a vhathu vha si na mulandu, zwenezwo Muṋe washu a si tsha funa u mu hangwela." 
2Kings24:5 Mafhungo maṅwe a Jehoyakimu na zwoṱhe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda." 
2Kings24:6 Jehoyakimu a dzama, ṅwana wawe Jehoyakhini a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Kings24:7 U bva zwenezwo khosi ya Egipita ya si tsha dovha ya bva pfumo nge khosi ya Babele ya vha i tshi vho langa shango ḽoṱhe ḽe ḽa vha ḽi ḽa Egipita u bva mulamboni wa Yufuratha u swika masakhani a devhula a Egipita. 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakhini a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 18, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Nehushtha, ṅwananyana wa Elinathani wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 Jehoyakhini a kanda vhuṱalani ha khotsi awe, a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu." 
2Kings24:10 Misi yeneyo magota a Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele vha ḓa muḓini wa Jerusalema, vha u govhela," 
2Kings24:11 Nebukhadnetsara a ḓa muḓini wa Jerusalema nga tsha vhukoma musi magota awe a tshi khou govhela muḓi uyo. 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakhini khosi ya Juda na mme awe na vhalanda vhawe na vhaḓivhalea vhawe na vhakoma vhawe vha mbo bva muḓini, vhoṱhe vha ḓiṋekedza khae. Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuraru wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, Nebukhadnetsara a fara Jehoyakhini a mu ita ḽithubwa." 
2Kings24:13 A dzhia lupfumo lwoṱhe lu re thembeleni ya Muṋe washu na pfamoni ya musanda, a hwala zwithu zwoṱhe zwa musuku zwe Solomoni khosi ya Juda a zwi itela thembele ya Muṋe washu, nga he Muṋe washu a dzula o ḓivhadza." 
2Kings24:14 Nebukhadnetsara a hwala vhathu vha Jerusalema a vha isa vhuthubwani, vhakoma vhoṱhe, vhahali na vhatsila vhoṱhe na vhafhaṱi, vho ṱangana vhoṱhe vha ita 10 000. Ho vha ho tou siwa vhashai vhukuma vha shango." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukhadnetsara a dzhia Jehoyakhini afho Jerusalema a mu isa vhuthubwani Babele, a dzhia na mme a khosi na vhafumakadzi vha khosi na magota awe na vharangaphanḓa vha shango." 
2Kings24:16 A hwala na vhoṱhe vha re na zwavho, vha 7 000, na vhatsila na vhafuli vha tsimbi vha 1 000, na vhoṱhe vho teaho u bva pfumo, a vha isa Babele." 
2Kings24:17 Nebukhadnetsara a dzhia Mathania khotsimunene wa Jehoyakhini, a mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni hawe, a shandukisa dzina ḽawe ḽa vho pfi Tsedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Tsedekia a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 21, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 11. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Hamuthali, ṅwananyana wa Jeremia wa muḓi wa Libina." 
2Kings24:19 Khosi Tsedekia a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khosi Jehoyakimu." 
2Kings24:20 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Jerusalema na Juda, a fhedza nga u vha sudzulusa a si tsha vha vhona." 
2Kings25:1 Zwino Tsedekia a shandukela Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele. Zwenezwo nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi wa ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Tsedekia, Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a ḓa na mmbi yawe yoṱhe a tshi ḓa u dia Jerusalema. Vha ṱoka mishasha nnḓa ha muḓi, vha u govhela nga thulwi dza mavu e vha khokha." 
2Kings25:2 Muḓi wa dzula wo govhelwa u swika ṅwaha wa 11 wa muvhuso wa khosi Tsedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa ḽa ṅwaha wonoyo nḓala ya vha yo no hulela afho muḓini lwe ha vha hu si tshee na zwiḽiwa zwine vhathu vha nga ḽa. 
2Kings25:4 Zwino mutsheṱo wa muḓi wa pwashea wa phorotshedzwa, mmbi yoṱhe ya shavha vhusiku ya bva nga khoro ine ya vha vhukati ha mitsheṱo mivhili tsini ha ngade ya musanda, naho Vhababele vho vha vho govhela muḓi. Vha shavha vho livha govhani ḽa Jorodani." 
2Kings25:5 Hone mmbi ya Vhababele ya pandamedza khosi Tsedekia ya mu fara mudavhini wa Jerikho, vhahali vhawe vhoṱhe vha mu ṱutshela vha balangana." 
2Kings25:6 Tsedekia a fariwa, a iswa ha khosi ya Babele ye ya vha i muḓini wa Ribila, ya mu haṱula henefho." 
2Kings25:7 Vha shidzha vhana vha vhatuka vha Tsedekia a tshi zwi vhona. Zwo no ralo vha mu nongola maṱo, vha mu vhofha nga tsimbi dza musinaseṱha, vha mu isa Babele." 
2Kings25:8 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu wa ṅwaha wa 19 wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, Nebusaradani mulangammbi wa musanda, mukoma wa khosi a dzhena Jerusalema," 
2Kings25:9 a fhisa thembele ya Muṋe washu na pfamo ya musanda na nnḓu dzoṱhe dza vhathu vha Jerusalema, na dza vhaḓivhalea." 
2Kings25:10 Mmbi yoṱhe ya Vhababele ye ya vha i tshi langwa nga mulangammbi wa musanda, ya thutha mitsheṱo u mona na muḓi wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings25:11 Ndi hone Nebusaradani mulangammbi wa musanda a tshi hwala vhathu vhe vha vha vho sala afho muḓini a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele khathihi na vhaṅwe vhathu vhoṱhe na vhe vha vha vho pfukela ha khosi ya Babele. 
2Kings25:12 Hone a sia vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vha tshi tou shaya vhukuma henefho shangoni ḽa Juda uri vha lime masimu a minḓirivhe na maṅwe masimu. 
2Kings25:13 Vhababele vha pwasha phuphu dza musinaseṱha na zwigoloi na thannge ya musinaseṱha zwe zwa vha zwi thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, vha hwala uyo musinaseṱha vha u isa Babele." 
2Kings25:14 Vha hwala na dzikhali na dzifosholo na zwiṱunyathambo na masambelo a u fara malofha a zwiṱhavhelo na zwithu zwoṱhe zwa musinaseṱha zwine zwa shuma thembeleni. 
2Kings25:15 Mulangammbi wa musanda a dzhia na zwidubisazwioro na ndilo dza u handulula, zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwo itwa nga musuku kana siliva." 
2Kings25:16 Musinaseṱha u no bva kha phuphu mbili na thannge na zwigoloi, zwe khosi Solomoni a zwi itela thembele ya Muṋe washu, wo vha u tshi lemelesa u sa koni u kalea." 
2Kings25:17 Phuphu iṅwe na iṅwe yo vha i na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu na tharu. Ṱhoho ya musinaseṱha i re nṱha ha phuphu yo vha i na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 1,5, yo nakiswa nga geḓane dza musinaseṱha na maramba a musinaseṱha u mona nayo. Phuphu iṅwe na geḓane dzayo, yo vha i tshi ḓi nga iyo iṅwe." 
2Kings25:18 Nebusaradani, mulangammbi wa musanda, a hwala tshifhe muhulu Seraya na Tsefania tshanḓa tshawe na vhalindamuṋango vhararu a vha isa vhuthubwani." 
2Kings25:19 Kha vhe vha vha vha tshi kha ḓi vha henefho muḓini a dzhia mulangammbi na vhaeletshedzi vhaṱanu vha musanda na tshanḓa tsha mulangammbi, we a vha a tshi langa zwa maṅwalwa a mmbi, na vhanna vha 60 vha vhaḓivhalea vhe a vha e navho afho muḓini," 
2Kings25:20 a vha dzhia vhoṱhe a vha isa ha khosi ya Babele muḓini wa Ribila. 
2Kings25:21 Henefho muḓini wa Ribila, shangoni ḽa Hamathi, khosi ya ita uri vha vhulawe. Vhathu vha Juda vha iswa vhuthubwani, kule na shango ḽavho." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a dzhia Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani, a mu vhea uri a lange vhathu vhe a vha sia shangoni ḽa Juda." 
2Kings25:23 Musi vhalangammbi vhoṱhe na vhanna vhavho vha tshi pfa uri khosi ya Babele yo vhea Gedalia uri a vhe muvhusi, vha ḓa ha Gedalia e Mitsipha. Vhalangammbi vhenevho vho vha vhe Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania na Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na Seraya ṅwana wa Thanumethe wa muḓi wa Netofa na Jesania wa Maakha." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia a ana a vha vhudza na vhanna vhe vha vha vhe navho a ri, “Ni songo ofha magota a Vhababele, dzulani shangoni ni shumele khosi ya Babele, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela.”" 
2Kings25:25 Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa ṅwaha wonoyo, Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania ṅwana wa Elishama, we a vha e wa malofha a musanda, a ḓa na vhanna vha fumi, a vhulaha Gedalia na vhanna vha Juda na Vhababele vhe vha vha vhe nae henefho Mitsipha." 
2Kings25:26 Vhathu vhoṱhe, vhanyadzea na vhaḓivhalea, khathihi na vhalangammbi, vha ri u vhona zwenezwo vha shavhela Egipita nga u ofha Vhababele." 
2Kings25:27 Nga ṅwaha we Evili Merodakha a vha khosi ya Babele, a itela Jehoyakhini khosi ya Juda vhuthu, a mu vhofholola dzhele. Hezwo zwo itea nga ḓuvha ḽa 27 ḽa ṅwedzi wa 12 wa ṅwaha wa 37 u bva tshee Jehoyakhini a hwalwa a yo hoṋelwa dzhele." 
2Kings25:28 Evili Merodakha a fara Jehoyakhini zwavhuḓi, a mu hulisa u fhira maṅwe mahosi e a iswa vhuthubwani nae henefho Babele." 
2Kings25:29 Jehoyakhini a tendelwa u bvula zwiambaro zwa dzhele, a ḽela ḓafulani ḽa musanda vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
2Kings25:30 Khosi yo vha i tshi ḓi ṋea Jehoyakhini tshelede ya zwine a zwi ṱoḓa ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu o vha e khotsi a Sethe, khotsi a Enosi, khotsi a" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, khotsi a Mahalalele, khotsi a Jarede, khotsi a" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enokho, khotsi a Mathusela, khotsi a Lamekhe, khotsi a Nua." 
1Chronicles1:4 Vhana vha Nua ndi Semu na Hamu na Jafethe. 
1Chronicles1:5 Vhana vha Jafethe ndi Gomere na Magogo na Madai na Javani na Thubala na Meshekhe na Thirasi, vho vha vhomakhulukuku wa tshakha dzine dza vhidzwa nga madzina avho." 
1Chronicles1:6 Vhana vha Gomere ndi Ashkenasi na Rifathi na Thogarama. 
1Chronicles1:7 Vhana vha Javani ndi Elisha na Tharashishi na Vhakhithi na Vharodani. 
1Chronicles1:8 Vhana vha Hamu ndi Kushu na Mitsiraimi na Phuti na Kanana, vho vha vhomakhulukuku wa tshakha dzine dza vhidzwa nga madzina avho." 
1Chronicles1:9 Vhana vha Kushu ndi Seba na Havila na Sabutha na Raama na Sabuthekha. Vhana vha Raama ndi Sheba na Dedani. 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushu o vha e khotsi a Nimirodo, ndi ene muhali muhulu wa u thoma fhano fhasi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Mitsiraimi o vha e khotsi a vhathu vha Ludi na Anamu na Lehaba na Nafuthu 
1Chronicles1:12 na Phathrusi na Khasilu, vhane Vhafilista vha bva khavho, na Khrethe." 
1Chronicles1:13 Vhana vha Kanana ndi Sidoni, ene tanzhe, na Hethe" 
1Chronicles1:14 na Vhajebusi na Vhaamori na Vhagirigashi 
1Chronicles1:15 na Vhahivi na Vhaarakhi na Vhasini 
1Chronicles1:16 na Vhaaravadi na Vhazemari na Vhahamathi. 
1Chronicles1:17 Vhana vha Semu ndi Elamu na Ashuru na Ariphakhadi na Ludi na Aramu. Vhana vha Aramu ndi Utsi na Hulu na Gethere na Meshekhe, vho vha vhomakhulukuku wa tshakha dzine dza vhidzwa nga madzina avho." 
1Chronicles1:18 Ariphakhadi o vha e khotsi a Shela, khotsi a Ebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere o vha na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka, muṅwe o vha a tshi pfi Phelege nge misi yawe vhathu vha mashango vha fhandekana, murathu wawe o vha a tshi pfi Jokotani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Vhana vha Jokotani ndi Alimodadi na Shelefe na Hatsaramavethe na Jera 
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu na Uzali na Dikila 
1Chronicles1:22 na Obala na Abimaele na Sheba 
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri na Havila na Jobaba. 
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiri na Havila na Jobaba. 
1Chronicles1:24 Vha lutsinga lwa Semu u swika kha Abrahamu ndi Semu na Ariphakhadi na Shela 
1Chronicles1:25 na Ebere na Phelege na Reu 
1Chronicles1:26 na Serugu na Nahoro na Thera 
1Chronicles1:27 na Abramu (ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Abrahamu). 
1Chronicles1:28 Vhana vha Abrahamu ndi Isaka na Ishmaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Vhana vha Ishmaele vha tshi tevhekana nga mabebo avho ndi Nebayotho ene wa tanzhe, na Kedara na Adibiele na Mibisamu" 
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishima na Duma na Masa na Hadadi na Thema 
1Chronicles1:31 na Jethuru na Nafishi na Kedema. 
1Chronicles1:32 Vhana vha Abrahamu vhe a bebelwa nga musadzi wawe muṱuku a no pfi Ketura ndi Zimirani na Jokoshani na Medani na Midiani na Ishibaka na Shua. Vhana vha Jokoshani ndi Sheba na Dedani. 
1Chronicles1:33 Vhana vha Midiani ndi Epha na Efere na Hanokho na Abida na Elidaa. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu o vha e khotsi a Isaka. Vhana vha Isaka ndi Esau na Israele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Vhana vha Esau ndi Elifasi na Reuele na Jeushu na Jalamu na Kora. 
1Chronicles1:36 Vhana vha Elifasi ndi Themana na Omara na Tsefo na Gathamu na Kenasi na Thimina na Amaleke. 
1Chronicles1:37 Vhana vha Reuele ndi Nahathi na Zera na Shama na Miza. 
1Chronicles1:38 Vhana vha Seiri ndi Lotani na Shobala na Tsibioni na Ana na Dishoni na Etsere na Dishani. 
1Chronicles1:39 Vhana vha Lotani ndi Hori na Hemamu. Khaladzi a Lotani ndi Thimina. 
1Chronicles1:40 Vhana vha Shobala ndi Alivani na Manahathi na Ebala na Shefi na Onamu. Vhana vha Tsibioni ndi Aya na Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Ṅwana wa Ana ndi Dishoni. Vhana vha Dishoni ndi Hemedani na Eshibani na Ithirani na Kherani. 
1Chronicles1:42 Vhana vha Etsere ndi Bilihani na Zaavani na Jaakani. Vhana vha Dishani ndi Utsu na Arani. 
1Chronicles1:43 Khea mahosi e a vhusa kha ḽa Edomo Vhaisraele vha sa athu vha na khosi. Ndi Bela ṅwana wa Bioro. Musanda wawe wo vha u tshi pfi Dinihaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela o ri u dzama, Jobaba ṅwana wa Zera wa Botsora a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela o ri u dzama, Jobaba ṅwana wa Zera wa Botsora a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobaba a ri u dzama, Hushamu a no bva shangoni ḽa Vhathemana a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobaba a ri u dzama, Hushamu a no bva shangoni ḽa Vhathemana a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu a ri u dzama, a tevhelwa nga Hadadi ṅwana wa Bedadi, we a kunda Vhamidiani shangoni ḽa Muaba. Musanda wawe wo vha u tshi pfi Avithi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi a ri u dzama, Samula a no bva Masareka a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula a ri u dzama, Shaulo a no bva Rehobotho Mulamboni a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaulo a ri u dzama, Baali Hanani ṅwana wa Akhiboro a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali Hanani a ri u dzama, Hadadi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe. Musanda wawe wo vha u tshi pfi Phau, mufumakadzi wawe a tshi pfi Mehetabele, ṅwananyana wa Matirede, ṅwananyana wa Mezahaba." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi na ene a dzama. Vhahulwane vha Edomo ndi Thimina na Aliva na Jethethe 
1Chronicles1:52 na Oholibama na Ela na Phinoni 
1Chronicles1:53 na Kenasi na Themana na Mibitsara 
1Chronicles1:54 na Magadiele na Iramu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Vhana vha Israele ndi Rubeni na Simioni na Livi na Juda na Isakhara na Zebuloni 
1Chronicles2:2 na Dani na Josefa na Benyamini na Nafuthali na Gadi na Ashere. 
1Chronicles2:3 Vhana vha Juda ndi Ere na Onani na Shela. Havho vhararu o vha bebelwa nga Batha Shua, musadzi wawe wa Mukanana. Ere, ene tanzhe ḽa Juda, Muṋe washu o vhona e muvhi, ndi zwe a mu vhulaha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamara, musadzi wa ṅwana wa Juda, o mu bebela Pheretse na Zera. Vhana vha Juda vha vhatuka vhó ṱangana vhoṱhe vho vha vhe vhaṱanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Vhana vha Pheretse ndi Esromu na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Vhana vha Zera ndi Zimiri na Ethani na Hemani na Khalakholo na Darida, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhaṱanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ṅwana wa Kharami ndi Akhani, we a ḓisela Vhaisraele khombo nga u dzhia thundu yo ṱangulwaho ye ya vha yo kumedzwa Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ṅwana wa Ethani ndi Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Vhana vha Esromu ndi Jeramiele na Ramu na Khalebe. 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu o vha e khotsi a Abinadaba, khotsi a Nahashoni, murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vha Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni o vha e khotsi a Salimoni, khotsi a Buasi," 
1Chronicles2:12 khotsi a Obede, khotsi a Isai." 
1Chronicles2:13 Tanzhe ḽa Isai ndi Eliaba, ṅwana wawe wa vhuvhili o vha e Abinadaba, wa vhuraru e Shama," 
1Chronicles2:14 wa vhuṋa e Nathaniele, wa vhuṱanu e Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi e Oseme, wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili e Dafita." 
1Chronicles2:16 Khaladzi dzavho ndi Tseruya na Abigaili. Vhana vha Tseruya vhararu vha vhatuka ndi Abishai na Juaba na Asaele. 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili o vha e musadzi wa Jethere wa Muishmaele vha vha na ṅwana we a vha a tshi pfi Amasa. 
1Chronicles2:18 Khalebe ṅwana wa Esromu o vhinga Azuba, a vha na ṅwana wa musidzana we a vha a tshi pfi Jeriotho. Vhana vhawe vha vhatuka ndi Jeshere na Shobaba na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba a ri u fa, Khalebe a vhinga Efuratha, a mu bebela Huru." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huru o vha e khotsi a Uri, khotsi a Betsaliele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ngavhuya musi Esromu e na miṅwaha ya 60, a dzea ṅwananyana wa Makhiri khotsi a Giliadi, uyo musadzi a mu bebela Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu o vha khotsi a Jairi, we a vha a tshi vhusa miḓi ya 23 shangoni ḽa Giliadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Hone vha mivhuso ya Geshuru na Aramu vha i thuba, vha thuba na Kenathi na miḓi i re henefho tsini, yó ṱangana ya ita miḓi ya 60. Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula henefho vho vha vhe vhaḓuhulu vha Makhiri khotsi a Giliadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Esromu a ri u fa, ṅwana wawe Khalebe a dzea Efuratha, tshilikadzi ya khotsi awe, vha vha na ṅwana wa mutukana we a vha a tshi pfi Ashuhuru. Ndi ene we a fhaṱa muḓi wa Thekua." 
1Chronicles2:25 Vhana vha Jeramiele tanzhe ḽa Esromu ndi Ramu, ene tanzhe ḽawe, na Buna na Orene na Otseme na Ahia." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jeramiele a vha na muṅwe musadzi we a vha a tshi pfi Atara, mme a Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Vhana vha Ramu tanzhe ḽa Jeramiele ndi Maatsi na Jamini na Ekere. 
1Chronicles2:28 Vhana vha Onamu ndi Shamai na Jada. Vhana vha Shamai ndi Nadaba na Abishuru. 
1Chronicles2:29 Musadzi wa Abishuru o vha a tshi pfi Abihaili, ene o mu bebela vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka, Ahabani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Vhana vha Nadaba ndi Selede na Aphaimi. Selede o fa a si na ṅwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Ṅwana wa Aphaimi ndi Ishi, khotsi a Sheshani, khotsi a musidzana we a vha a tshi pfi Ahalai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Vhana vha Jada murathu wa Shamai ndi Jethere na Jonathani. Jethere o fa a si na ṅwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Vhana vha Jonathani ndi Phelethe na Zasa. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vhaḓuhulu vha Jeramiele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani o vha a si na ṅwana wa mutuka, o vha e na vhasidzana fhedzi. O vha e na mushumi wa Muegipita we a vha a tshi pfi Jaraha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani a dzhia ṅwana wawe wa musidzana a mu ṋea mushumi wawe Jaraha, a mu bebela ṅwana we a vha a tshi pfi Athai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Athai o vha khotsi a Nathani, khotsi a Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 khotsi a Efelala, khotsi a Obede," 
1Chronicles2:38 khotsi a Jehu, khotsi a Azaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 khotsi a Heletse, khotsi a Eliasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 khotsi a Sisimai, khotsi a Shalumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 khotsi a Jekamia, khotsi a Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Vhana vha Khalebe murathu wa Jeramiele ndi Mesha tanzhe ḽawe, we a vha makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Zifi, na Maresha makhulukuku wa Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Vhana vha Hebroni ndi Kora na Thaphua na Rekeme na Shema.
