1Chronicles2:44 Shema o vha e khotsi a Rahamu, khotsi a Jorokiamu. Rekeme o vha e khotsi a Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ṅwana wa Shamai o vha a tshi pfi Maoni makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Bethe Tsuru. 
1Chronicles2:46 Epha musadzi wa Khalebe wa phuli o vha mme a Harani na Motsa na Gazese. Harani o vha e khotsi a Gazese. 
1Chronicles2:47 Vhana vha Jahadai ndi Regeme na Jothamu na Geshani na Phelete na Epha na Shaafu. 
1Chronicles2:48 Maakha musadzi wa Khalebe wa phuli o vha mme a Shebere na Thirana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Maakha o beba Shaafu makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Madamana na Sheva makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Makhabena na Gibia. Muḓuhulu wa Khalebe wa musidzana o vha a tshi pfi Akhisa. 
1Chronicles2:50 Ndi vhone vha lutsinga lwa Khalebe. Vhana vha Huru tanzhe ḽa Efuratha ndi Shobala makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Kiriathi Jiarimu 
1Chronicles2:51 na Salima makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Betlehema na Harefe makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Bethe Gedere. 
1Chronicles2:52 Vha lutsinga lwa Shobala makhulukuku wa vhathu vha Kiriathi Jiarimu ndi Reaya na hafu ya vhathu vha dzulaho Menuhothi. 
1Chronicles2:53 Kiriathi Jiarimu ho vha hu tshi dzula vha mitupo ya Jethere na Phuthi na Shuma na Mishira. Vhapo vha Tsora na Eshthaolo vha bva kha vhenevho. 
1Chronicles2:54 Vha lutsinga lwa Salima ndi vhapo vha Betlehema na vha Netofa na vha Atirotho Bethe Juaba na hafu ya vha Manahathi na vha Tsora. 
1Chronicles2:55 Vha mitupo ya vhaḓivhi vha maṅwalwa vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jabetse ndi Vhathira na Vhashimia na Vhasukha. Havho ndi Vhakeni vhane vha bva kha Hamathi makhulukuku wa vha nnḓu ya Rekhaba. 
1Chronicles3:1 Vhana vha Dafita vhe vha bebiwa a tshee Hebroni ngevha: wa tanzhe ndi Amunoni, ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Ahinuamu wa Jesriele, wa vhuvhili ndi Daniele ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Abigaili wa Kharamele," 
1Chronicles3:1 Vhana vha Dafita vhe vha bebiwa a tshee Hebroni ngevha: wa tanzhe ndi Amunoni, ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Ahinuamu wa Jesriele, wa vhuvhili ndi Daniele ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Abigaili wa Kharamele," 
1Chronicles3:2 wa vhuraru ndi Abisalomo ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Maakha ṅwananyana wa khosi Thalamai wa Geshuru, wa vhuṋa ndi Adonia ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Hagithi," 
1Chronicles3:3 wa vhuṱanu ndi Shefatia ṅwana wa musadzi a no pfi Abitala, wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi ndi Ithiriamu ṅwana wa musadzi wawe a no pfi Egila." 
1Chronicles3:4 Vhana havho vhaṱanu na muthihi vho bebiwa Dafita a tshee Hebroni he a vhusa miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili na hafu. Dafita a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 33," 
1Chronicles3:5 vhana vhawe vhe vha bebiwa henefho ndi Shimia na Shobabu na Nathani na Solomoni. Vhana havho vhaṋa ndi vha musadzi a no pfi Batshiba ṅwananyana wa Amiele. 
1Chronicles3:6 Vhana vhaṅwe vha Dafita ndi Ibihara na Elishua na Eliphelete 
1Chronicles3:7 na Noga na Nefege na Jafia 
1Chronicles3:8 na Elishama na Eliada na Elifelete, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhaṱanu na vhaṋa." 
1Chronicles3:9 Vhoṱhe havho ndi vhana vha Dafita, hu sa vhaliwi na vhana vhawe vha vhasadzi vha dziphuli. Khaladzi avho o vha e Thamara." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomoni ndi khotsi a Rehabiamu, khotsi a Abia, khotsi a Asa, khotsi a Josafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 khotsi a Jehoramu, khotsi a Ahasia, khotsi a Juasi," 
1Chronicles3:12 khotsi a Amasia, khotsi a Azaria, khotsi a Jothamu," 
1Chronicles3:13 khotsi a Ahasi, khotsi a Hiskia, khotsi a Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 khotsi a Amoni, khotsi a Josiasi." 
1Chronicles3:15 Vhana vha Josiasi ndi Johanani ene tanzhe, wa vhuvhili ndi Jehoyakimu, wa vhuraru ndi Tsedekia, wa vhuṋa ndi Shalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Vhana vha Jehoyakimu ndi Jehoyakimu na Tsedekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Vha lutsinga lwa Jehoyakhini wa ḽithubwa ndi Salathiele ane a vha ṅwana wawe wa mutuka," 
1Chronicles3:18 na Malakhiramu na Phedaya na Shenatsara na Jekamia na Hoshama na Nedabia. 
1Chronicles3:19 Vhana vha Phedaya ndi Zerubabele na Shimei. Vhana vha Zerubabele ndi Meshulamu na Hanania. Khaladzi avho o vha a tshi pfi Shelomithi. 
1Chronicles3:20 Ha dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhaṱanu, vhone ndi Hashuba na Ohele na Berekhia na Hasadia na Jushabu Hesede." 
1Chronicles3:21 Vhana vha Hanania ndi Phelatia na Jeshaya khotsi a Refaya, khotsi a Arinani, khotsi a Obadia, khotsi a Shekhania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ṅwana wa Shekhania ndi Shemaya khotsi a Hatushi na Igala na Baria na Nearia na Shafati, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhaṱanu na muthihi." 
1Chronicles3:23 Vhana vha Nearia ndi Elihwenai na Hiskia na Azirikamu, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhararu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Vhana vha Elihwenai ndi Hodavia na Eliashibi na Phelaya na Akubu na Johanani na Delaya na Anani, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhaṱanu na vhavhili." 
1Chronicles4:1 Vhana vha Juda ndi Pheretse na Esromu na Kharami na Huru na Shobala. 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobala o vha khotsi a Reaya, khotsi a Jahathi, khotsi a Ahumai na Lahadi. Ndi vhone vha miṱa ya vhapo vha Tsora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Vhana vha Etamu ndi Jesriele na Ishima na Idibashi. Khaladzi avho o vha a tshi pfi Hatseleponi. 
1Chronicles4:4 Phenuele o fhaṱa muḓi wa Gedoro, Ezere a fhaṱa wa Husha. Ndi vhone vhana vha Huru, tanzhe ḽa uḽa musadzi a no pfi Efuratha, ndi ene o fhaṱaho muḓi wa Betlehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuhuru o fhaṱaho muḓi wa Thekua o vha e na vhasadzi vhavhili, Hela na Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a mu bebela Ahuzamu na Hefere na Themeni na Haahashithari. Ndi vhone vhana vha Naara. 
1Chronicles4:7 Vhana vha Hela ndi Tserethe na Tsohara na Ethinani na Kotso. 
1Chronicles4:8 Kotso o vha khotsi a Anubu na Tsobeba, ndi ene makhulu wa miṱa ya vhana vha Aharahele ṅwana wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabetse o vha a tshi hulisea u fhira vhaṅwe vhana vha khotsi awe. Mme awe o ri u pfi Jabetse (Ntshengedzeni) nge a tshi mu beba a pfa vhuṱungu nga maanḓa. 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabetse a rabela Mudzimu wa Israele a ri, “Ngavhe u tshi ntshudufhadza, wa engedza shango ḽanga! Ivha na nṋe u ntsireledze ndi si welwe nga khombo ndi si shengele.” Mudzimu a mu ṋea hezwo zwe a humbela." 
1Chronicles4:11 Khalebe murathu wa Shuha o vha khotsi a Mehiri, khotsi a Eshthoni," 
1Chronicles4:12 khotsi a Bethe Rafa na Phasia na Thehina we a fhaṱa muḓi wa Nahashi. Ndi vhone vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Rekha. 
1Chronicles4:13 Vhaḓuhulu vha Kenasi ndi Othiniele na Seraya. Vhana vha Othiniele ndi Hathathi na Mionothai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Mionothai o vha khotsi a Ofura. Seraya o vha khotsi a Juaba, mufhaṱi wa Govha ḽa Vhatsila; ho vha hu tshi vhidzwa nga u ralo nge vhathu vhaho vha vha vhe vhatsila." 
1Chronicles4:15 Vhana vha Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune ndi Iru na Ela na Naamu. Ṅwana wa Ela ndi Kenasi. 
1Chronicles4:16 Vhana vha Jehalelele ndi Zifi na Zifa na Thiria na Asarele. 
1Chronicles4:17 Vhana vha Esra ndi Jethere na Mirede na Efere na Jaloni. Mufumakadzi muṅwe wa Mirede o beba Miriamu na Shamai na Ishiba khotsi a Eshthemua. 
1Chronicles4:18 Mufumakadzi wa Mirede wa tsinde ḽa Juda o beba Jerede we a fhaṱa muḓi wa Gedoro na Hebere we a fhaṱa Sokho na Jekuthiele we a fhaṱa Zanua. Havhaḽa vhaṅwe vho vha vhe vhana vha ṅwananyana wa Farao a no pfi Bithia we a vha e mufumakadzi wa Mirede. 
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia o dzea khaladzi a Nahaimi, vhana vhawe ndi vha nnḓu ya Garamu vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Keila na vha nnḓu ya Maakha vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Eshthemua." 
1Chronicles4:20 Vhana vha Simoni ndi Amunoni na Rina na Beni Hanani na Thiloni. Vhana vha Ishi ndi Zohethe na Beni Zohethe. 
1Chronicles4:21 Vhana vha Shela ṅwana wa Juda ndi Ere mufhaṱi wa muḓi wa Lekha, na Laada mufhaṱi wa muḓi wa Maresha, na mitupo ya vhaluki vha lukhaha vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula muḓini wa Bethe Ashibia." 
1Chronicles4:22 Vhaṅwe vhaḓuhulu vha Shela ndi Jokimu na vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Khozeba, na Juasi na Sarafu we a vhusa Muaba, na Jashubi Leheme. Mafhungo hayo ndi a kale-kale." 
1Chronicles4:23 Vhathu havho vho vha vhe vhavhumbi vha dzikhali vha tshi shumela khosi, vha tshi dzula miḓini ya Netaimi na Gedera." 
1Chronicles4:24 Vhana vha Simioni ndi Jemuele na Jamini na Jaribi na Zera na Saulo. 
1Chronicles4:25 Saulo o vha khotsi a Shalumu, khotsi a Mibisamu, khotsi a Mishima," 
1Chronicles4:26 khotsi a Hamuele, khotsi a Zakhuru, khotsi a Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei o vha e na vhana vha 16 vha vhatuka na vhananyana vhaṱanu na muthihi, hone vhaṅwe vhana vha Simioni vho vha vha si na vhana vhanzhi, ndi zwe vhathu vha mitupo ya Simioni vha si ande unga vha Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Vha lutsinga lwa Simioni vho vha vha tshi dzula miḓini ya Bierisheba na Molada na Hatsara Shuala 
1Chronicles4:29 na Biliha na Etsemu na Tholadi 
1Chronicles4:30 na Bethuele na Horoma na Tsikilaga 
1Chronicles4:31 na Bethe Marikhabotho na Hatsara Susimu na Bethe Biri na Shaaraimi. Yo vha yone miḓi yavho u vhuya u swika hu tshi vhusa khosi Dafita. 
1Chronicles4:32 Vho vha vha tshi dzula na miḓi ya Etamu na Aini na Rimoni na Thokhene na Ashani, miḓi miṱanu," 
1Chronicles4:33 na miḓanani yoṱhe ya matungo u mona na iyo miḓi u vhuya u swika vhukovhelatshipembe muḓini wa Baalathi. Vho vha vha tshi dzula henefho, vha ita na u ṅwala mutevhe wa vha lutsinga lwa havho." 
1Chronicles4:34 Ho vha ho ṅwalwa Mishobabu na Jamulekhe na Josha ṅwana wa Amatsia 
1Chronicles4:35 na Juele na Jehu ṅwana wa Joshibia, ṅwana wa Seraya, ṅwana wa Asiele," 
1Chronicles4:36 na Elihwenai na Jaakoba na Jeshohaya na Asaya na Adiele na Jesimiele na Benaya 
1Chronicles4:37 na Zisa ṅwana wa Shifi, ṅwana wa Aloni, ṅwana wa Jedaya, ṅwana wa Shimiri, ṅwana wa Shemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Vhanna vho ṅwalwaho afho nga madzina vho vha vhe vharangaphanḓa vha miṱa yavho. Vha miṱa yavho vha anda zwihulu," 
1Chronicles4:39 vha ṱanḓavhuwa vha vhuya vha ṱoḓou swika Gedoro vhubvaḓuvha ha govha vha tshi ṱoḓa pfulo ya masambi avho a nngu. 
1Chronicles4:40 Vha wana pfulo nnzhi yavhuḓi nahone shango iḽo ḽo vha ḽo ṱanḓavhuwa, hu na mulalo, ḽo dzika. Henefho u rangani ho vha hu tshi dzula Vhahamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Vhanna avho vho ṅwalwaho madzina vho ḓa misi ya khosi Hiskia wa Juda, vha dia Vhahamu he vha vha vha tshi dzula hone, vha dia na Vhameunu vhe vha vha vhe henefho, vha vha lozwa tshoṱhe, na ṋamusi a vha athu vhuya. Vha dzula he vhathu avho vha vha vha tshi dzula hone nge ha vha hu na pfulo ya masambi avho a nngu." 
1Chronicles4:42 Maḓana maṱanu a avho vhaḓuhulu vha Simioni vha dia shango ḽa makwara ḽa Seiri, vho rangwa phanḓa nga Phelatia na Nearia na Refaya na Uziele, vhana vha Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Vha vhulaha Vhaamaleke vho salaho vhe vha vha vho shavha, vha dzula henefho, na ṋamusi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ngevha vhana vha Rubeni tanzhe ḽa Israele. (Rubeni o vha e tanzhe, hone a si tsha vha na pfanelo dza tanzhe, dza vho ṋewa vhana vha Josefa ṅwana wa Israele, nge a shata vhulalo ha khotsi awe tshika nga u dzhenisa musadzi wa khotsi awe nḓuni. Naho zwo ralo Josefa ho ngo ṅwalwa kha mutevhe wa vha lutsinga lwa muṱa zwi tshi tevhedza pfanelo dza mabebo," 
1Chronicles5:2 ngauri Juda o vha e na maanḓa u fhira vhana vha khotsi awe, na muvhusi o vha a tshi bva kha lutsinga lwawe, hone pfanelo dza tanzhe dzo vha dzi dza Josefa.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Vhana vha Rubeni tanzhe ḽa Israele ndi Hanokho na Phalu na Esromu na Kharami. 
1Chronicles5:4 Vha lutsinga lwa muḓuhulu wawe Juele ndi Shemaya, khotsi a Gogo, khotsi a Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 khotsi a Mika, khotsi a Reaya, khotsi a Baali," 
1Chronicles5:6 khotsi a Biera. Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru o hwala Biera a mu isa vhuthubwani. Biera o vha e murangaphanḓa wa nnḓu ya Rubeni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Mashaka avho nga mitupo vha ṅwalwaho kha mutevhe wa vha lutsinga lwavho ndi Jeiele ene muhulwane, na Zakaria" 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela ṅwana wa Azasi, ṅwana wa Shema, ṅwana wa Juele. Fhethu he vha dzula hone ndi u bva Aruere u swika Nebo na Baali Mioni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha vho vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi guma nga lumeme lwa phanga ye ya vha i tshi swika mulamboni wa Yufuratha, ngauri zwifuwo zwavho zwo vha zwo anda kha ḽa Giliadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Misi ya khosi Saulo vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni vha dia vhathu vha Hagara, vha vha kunda, vha dzula he ha vha hu tshi dzula vhathu vha Hagara dzinguni ḽoṱhe vhubvaḓuvha ha Giliadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Vha nnḓu ya Gadi vho vha vha tshi dzula tsini navho shangoni ḽa Bashani u vhuya u swika Salekha," 
1Chronicles5:12 vhone ndi Juele ene muhulwane, na Shafamu ene wa vhuvhili, na Janai na Shafati. Avho vho vha vha tshi dzula Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Mashaka avho zwi tshi ya nga miṱa vho vha vhe Mikaele na Mishulamu na Sheba na Jorai na Jakhani na Zia na Ebere, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe vhaṱanu na vhavhili." 
1Chronicles5:14 Havho vho vha vhe vhana vha Abihaili ṅwana wa Huri, ṅwana wa Jarua, ṅwana wa Giliadi, ṅwana wa Mikaele, ṅwana wa Jeshishai, ṅwana wa Jahado, ṅwana wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi ṅwana wa Abidiele, ṅwana wa Guni, o vha e ene ṱhoho ya muṱa wavho." 
1Chronicles5:16 Vha nnḓu ya Gadi vho vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Bashani kha ḽa Giliadi na miḓini ya henefho na mashangoni oṱhe a pfulo a Sharoni u swika he a guma. 
1Chronicles5:17 Zwoṱhe hezwo zwo vha zwo ṅwalwa kha mutevhe wa vha lutsinga lwonolwo misi hu tshi vhusa Jothamu khosi ya Juda na Jerobiamu khosi ya Israele. 
1Chronicles5:18 Vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni na vha tsinde ḽa Gadi na vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha vho vha vhe na vhahali vha 44 760, vha re na nungo, vha tshi kona u pilela nga tshiṱangu, na u runga nga pfumo na u posa musevhe nga vhura, vho gudiswaho zwa nndwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Vha bva pfumo vha yo lwa na matsinde a Hagara, ndi Jethuru na Nafishi na Nodaba." 
1Chronicles5:20 Mudzimu a vha farisa musi vha tshi lwa navho, a vha kumedza matsinde a Hagara na vhoṱhe vhane vha ima navho nge vha ri vhe nndwani vha mu rabela. Mudzimu a fhindula thabelo dzavho nge vha mu fulufhela." 
1Chronicles5:21 Vha thuba zwifuwo zwa matsinde a Hagara, gamela dza 50 000 na nngu dza 250 000 na donngi dza 2 000. Vha ita na u hwala vhathu vha 100 000 vha vha isa vhuthubwani." 
1Chronicles5:22 Vhaṅwe vhanzhi vha vhulawa nge iyo nndwa ya vha i ya Mudzimu. Vha dzula shangoni iḽo vha vhuya vha hwaliwa vha tshi iswa vhuthubwani. 
1Chronicles5:23 Vhathu vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha vho vha vho anda, vha fhaṱa afho shangoni u bva Bashani u swika Baali Heremoni na Seniri na thavhani ya Heremoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ṱhoho dza miṱa yavho vho vha vhe Efere na Ishi na Eliele na Azariele na Jeremia na Hodavia na Jahadiele. Vho vha vhe vhahali vha sa humi, vhe na bvumo, nahone vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa yavho." 
1Chronicles5:25 Huno Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho o vhona vha sa fulufhedzei, vha mu ṱutshela vha yo luvha midzimu ya tshakha dza shango ḽeneḽo, dze Mudzimu a dzi lozwa musi vhone vha tshi swika." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ndi hone Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi ritha muya wa Phulu khosi ya Ashuru (we ḽiṅwe a vha a tshi pfi Thigilathi Philesere khosi ya Ashuru), a ḓa a hwala vha tsinde ḽa Rubeni na vha tsinde ḽa Gadi na vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha a vha isa vhuthubwani. A vha dzhia a vha isa Halaha na Haboro na Hara na mulamboni wa Gozani; na ṋamusi vha kha ḓi vha henefho." 
1Chronicles6:1 Vhana vha Livi ndi Gerisoni na Kehathi na Mirari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Vhana vha Kehathi ndi Amuramu na Izhara na Hebroni na Uziele. 
1Chronicles6:3 Vhana vha Amuramu ndi Aroni na Mushe na Miriamu. Vhana vha Aroni ndi Nadaba na Abihu na Eliasara na Ithamara.

1Chronicles6:14 khotsi a Seraya, khotsi a Jehotsadaka."

1Chronicles6:32 Vho vha vha tshi shuma zwa u imba phanḓa ha hukhethwa, denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, u swika khosi Solomoni a tshi fhaṱa thembele ya Muṋe washu Jerusalema. Vho vha vha tshi shuma mishumo yavho vha tshi tevhedza ndayo dze vha vhetshelwa dzone."

1Chronicles6:49 Aroni na vha lutsinga lwawe vho vha vha tshi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo kha aḽiṱari ya zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na kha aḽiṱari ya zwioro zwi tshi elana na zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi tshi itwa Hukhethwakhethwa, vha tshi pfumelela Vhaisraele, zwi tshi tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a vha laya."

1Chronicles6:52 khotsi a Mirayotho, khotsi a Amaria, khotsi a Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 khotsi a Tsadoko, khotsi a Ahimaatsi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Vhana vha Livi vho kovhelwa miḓi yavho na mafulo, hune vha ṱoka mishasha zwi tshi kovhelwa nga madeṅwa. Ho ranga u mvakiwa vhotshifhe vhana vha Aroni vha mutupo wa Kehathi." 
1Chronicles6:55 Vho ṋewa Hebroni shangoni ḽa Juda na mashango a pfulo u mona naho. 
1Chronicles6:56 Hone masimu na miḓana u mona na uyo muḓi zwa ṋewa Khalebe ṅwana wa Jefune.

1Chronicles6:58 na Holone na Debiri 
1Chronicles6:59 na Ashani na Bethe Shemeshe, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Shangoni ḽa tsinde ḽa Benyamini vho kovhelwa miḓi ya Geba na Alemethe na Anathotho, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo. Miḓi heyo yo kovhelwaho vha mitupo ya Kehathi yo vha i 13 yo ṱangana." 
1Chronicles6:61 Vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha lutsinga lwa Kehathi vho kovhelwa miḓi ya fumi shangoni ḽa vha Manase vha vhukovhela. 
1Chronicles6:62 Vha lutsinga lwa Gerisoni zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho, vho kovhelwa miḓi ya 13 mashangoni a matsinde a Isakhara na Ashere na Nafuthali, na ḽa vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha kha ḽa Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Vha lutsinga lwa Mirari, zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho, vho kovhelwa miḓi ya 12 mashangoni a matsinde a Rubeni na Gadi na Zebuloni."

1Chronicles6:65 Mashangoni a matsinde a Juda na Simioni na Benyamini vho kovha miḓi yo rangaho u bulwa, nga u ita madeṅwa."

1Chronicles6:71 Vha nnḓu ya Gerisoni vho kovhelwa miḓi heino: Shangoni ḽa vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha vho kovhelwa Golani kha ḽa Bashani, vha kovhelwa na Ashtharotho, khathihi na mashango ayo a pfulo."

1Chronicles7:1 Vhana vha Isakhara ndi Thola na Phua na Jashubu na Shimironi, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana ndi vhaṋa." 
1Chronicles7:2 Vhana vha Thola ndi Uzi na Refaya na Jeriele na Jahamai na Ibisamu na Samuele. Vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa yavho. Musi hu tshi vhusa khosi Dafita, vha lutsinga lwa Thola vho ḓiṅwalisaho u vha vhahali nndwani vho vha vhe 22 600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ṅwana wa Uzi ndi Izrahia. Vhana vha Israhia ndi Mikaele na Obadia na Juele na Ishia. Vhoṱhe vhuṱanu havho vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa. 
1Chronicles7:4 Vho vha vhe na vhasadzi vhanzhi na vhana lwe vha lutsinga lwavho vha kona u bvisa vhanna vha 36 000 vha u bva pfumo. 
1Chronicles7:5 Mashaka vhe vha vha vhe vhahali nndwani vha mitupo yoṱhe ya Isakhara nga he ha ṅwalwa vha lutsinga lwavho, vho vha vhe 87 000 vho ṱangana." 
1Chronicles7:6 Vhana vhararu vha Benyamini ndi Bela na Bekere na Jediele. 
1Chronicles7:7 Vhana vha Bela ndi Etsiboni na Uzi na Uziele na Jerimotho na Iri. Vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe vhaṱanu. Vha lutsinga lwavho vho ṅwalwaho vho vha vhe vhanna vha 22 034 vhane vha nga kona u bva pfumo." 
1Chronicles7:8 Vhana vha Bekere ndi Zemira na Juasi na Eliesere na Elihwenai na Omuri na Jeremotho na Abia na Anathotho na Alemethe. 
1Chronicles7:9 Vha lutsinga lwavho vho ṅwalwaho vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa na vhanna vha 20 200 vhane vha nga kona u bva pfumo. 
1Chronicles7:10 Ṅwana wa Jediele ndi Bilihani. Vhana vha Bilihani ndi Jeushu na Benyamini na Ehudu na Khenaana na Zethani na Tharashishi na Ahishahara. 
1Chronicles7:11 Vhana vhoṱhe havho vha Jediele vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa. Ho vha hu na vhanna vha 17 200 vhane vha nga kona u bva pfumo. 
1Chronicles7:12 Vhashuphi na Vhahuphi ndi vha lutsinga lwa Iri, Vhahushi ndi vha lutsinga lwa Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 Vhana vha Nafuthali ndi Jahatsiele na Guni na Jetsere na Shalumu, ndi vhana vhe vha bebwa nga Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Vha lutsinga lwa Manase ngevha: Azariele o vha e wa lutsinga lwawe we a mu bebelwa nga musadzi wawe wa phuli wa Muaramu. Musadzi uyo o beba Makhiri khotsi a Giliadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makhiri a dzea musadzi kha Vhahuphi na Vhashuphi. Khaladzi awe o vha a tshi pfi Maakha. Muṅwe wa lutsinga lwa Makhiri ndi Tselofihadi, ene o beba vhananyana fhedzi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maakha mufumakadzi wa Makhiri a beba mutuka a ri u pfi Phereshe, murathu wawe a pfi Shereshe, khotsi a Ulamu na Rakeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ṅwana wa Ulamu ndi Bedani. Ndi vhone vhana vha Giliadi ṅwana wa Makhiri ṅwana wa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamolekhethe, khaladzi a Giliadi, o beba Ishodo na Abiesere na Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Vhana vha Shemida ndi Ahiani na Shikheme na Likhi na Aniamu. 
1Chronicles7:20 Vha lutsinga lwa Efraimi ndi Shuthela, khotsi a Berede, khotsi a Thahathi, khotsi a Eliada, khotsi a Thahathi," 
1Chronicles7:21 khotsi a Zabadi, khotsi a Shuthela. Ezere na Eliadi vho vhulawa nga vhanna vha re vhadzulapo vha Gathi, musi vho tsela henengei u yo thuba zwifuwo zwavho." 
1Chronicles7:22 Khotsi avho Efraimi a fhedza maḓuvha manzhi a tshi vha lilela, mashaka awe a ḓa a mu fhumudza." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ndi hone a tshi dovha u dzhenisa mufumakadzi wawe nḓuni, uyo a vhifha muvhilini, a beba mutuka. Efraimi a ri uyo ṅwana u pfi Beria (Lufuluvhi) nge vha welwa nga khombo muṱani wawe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efraimi o vha e na ṅwananyana we a vha a tshi pfi Shiera. Musidzana uyo a fhaṱa miḓi ya Bethe Horoni wa Nṱha na wa Fhasi na muḓi wa Uzeni Shiera. 
1Chronicles7:25 Beria a vha na ṅwana we a vha a tshi pfi Refa, na Reshefa khotsi a Thela, khotsi a Thahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 khotsi a Ladani, khotsi a Amihudu, khotsi a Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 khotsi a Nunu, khotsi a Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:27 khotsi a Nunu, khotsi a Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Mashango avho na he vha fhaṱa hone ho vha hu tshi angaredza na Bethele na miḓana yo u tangaho, u ya vhubvaḓuvha hu tshi swika nga Naarani, u ya vhukovhela hu tshi swika nga Gezere na miḓana yawo, na muḓini wa Shikheme na miḓana yawo, u vhuya u swika muḓini wa Aya na miḓana yawo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Miḓi ya Bethe Shiani na Thaanakha na Megido na Doro, na miḓana yo i tangaho ho vha ha tsinde ḽa Manase. Fhethu hafho hoṱhe ho vha hu tshi dzula vha tsinde ḽa Josefa ṅwana wa Israele."

1Chronicles7:32 Hebere o vha e khotsi a Jafuleti na Shomere na Hothamu na khaladzi avho Shua. 
1Chronicles7:33 Vhana vha Jafuleti ndi Phasakha na Bimihali na Ashivathi. Ndi vhone vhana vha Jafuleti. 
1Chronicles7:34 Vhana vha Shomere ndi Ahi na Roga na Huba na Aramu. 
1Chronicles7:35 Vhana vha murathu wawe Hothamu ndi Tsofa na Imina na Sheleshe na Amali.

1Chronicles7:37 na Betsere na Hodo na Shama na Shilisha na Ithirani na Biera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Vhana vha Jethere ndi Jefune na Phisipha na Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Vhana vha Ula ndi Ara na Haniele na Ritsia. 
1Chronicles7:40 Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa Ashere, vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa, vhanna vha fhiraho vhaṅwe, vhahali vha sa humi, vharangaphanḓa vha vhonalaho. Tshivhalo tsha vhanna vhane vha nga bva pfumo, vho ṅwalwaho kha vha lutsinga lwavho, vho vha vhe 26 000."

1Chronicles8:30 Tanzhe ḽawe o vha a tshi pfi Abidoni, a tevhelwa nga Tsuru na Kishi na Baali na Nadaba" 
1Chronicles8:31 na Gedoro na Ahio na Zekhere 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikilotho khotsi a Shimia. Na vhone vho vha vha tshi dzula tsini na mashaka avho muḓini wa Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles8:33 Nere o vha e khotsi a Kishi, khotsi a khosi Saulo, khotsi a Jonathani na Malakhishua na Abinadaba na Eshbaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ṅwana wa Jonathani ndi Meribaali khotsi a Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Vhana vha Mika ndi Phithoni na Melekhe na Tharia na Ahasi. 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahasi o vha khotsi a Jehoada, khotsi a Alemethe na Asimavethe na Zimiri, khotsi a Motsa," 
1Chronicles8:37 khotsi a Binia, khotsi a Rafa, khotsi a Eleasa, khotsi a Atsele." 
1Chronicles8:38 Atsele o vha e na vhana vhaṱanu na muthihi, vha tshi pfi Asirikamu na Bokheru na Ishmaele na Shearia na Obadia na Hanani. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vhana vha Atsele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Vhana vha murathu wawe Esheke ndi Ulamu tanzhe ḽawe, wa vhuvhili a vha Jeushi, wa vhuraru a vha Elifelete." 
1Chronicles8:40 Vhana vha Ulamu vho vha vhe vhahali nndwani, vha tshi kona u posa musevhe. Vho vha vhe na vhana vhanzhi na vhaḓuhulu, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vha tshi swika 150. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa Benyamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho vha vho ṅwalwa kha mutevhe zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho, mafhungo ayo a ṅwalwa buguni ya Mahosi a Israele. Vhathu vha Juda vho hwalwa vha iswa vhuthubwani Babele nge vha vha vha sa fulufhedzei." 
1Chronicles9:2 Zwino vhe vha thoma u dovha vha dzula shangoni ḽavho miḓini yavho vho vha vhaṅwe Vhaisraele na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhashumi vha thembeleni. 
1Chronicles9:3 Vhathu vhane vha bva kha matsinde a Juda na Benyamini na Efraimi na Manase vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema," 
1Chronicles9:4 ndi Uthai ṅwana wa Amihudu, ṅwana wa Omuri, ṅwana wa Imiri, ṅwana wa Bani, wa lutsinga lwa Pheretse ṅwana wa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Vha Shilo ndi Asaya wa tanzhe na vhana vhawe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Vha Zera ndi Jeuele. Vhathu vha no bva kha ḽa Juda vho vha vhe 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 Vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini ndi Salu ṅwana wa Mishulamu, ṅwana wa Hodavia, ṅwana wa Hasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 na Ibinea ṅwana wa Jerohamu na Ela ṅwana wa Uzi, ṅwana wa Mikhiri, na Mishulamu ṅwana wa Shefatia, ṅwana wa Reuele, ṅwana wa Ibinia." 
1Chronicles9:9 Vhathu vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini nga he vha ṅwalwa kha mitevhe zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho vho vha vhe 956. Vhanna vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa yavho. 
1Chronicles9:10 Vha nnḓu ya vhotshifhe ndi Jedaya na Jehoyaribu na Jakhini 
1Chronicles9:11 na Azaria ṅwana wa Hilikia, ṅwana wa Mishulamu, ṅwana wa Tsadoko, ṅwana wa Mirayotho, ṅwana wa Ahitubu ene gota ḽa nnḓu ya Mudzimu," 
1Chronicles9:12 na Adaya ṅwana wa Jerohamu, ṅwana wa Phashuru, ṅwana wa Malikhia, na Maasai ṅwana wa Adiele, ṅwana wa Jasere, ṅwana wa Mishulamu, ṅwana wa Mishilemithi, ṅwana wa Imere." 
1Chronicles9:13 Vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa vho vha vhe 1 760. Vho vha vhe vhomakone mishumoni ya nnḓu ya Mudzimu. 
1Chronicles9:14 Vha nnḓu dza Vhalivi ndi Shemaya ṅwana wa Hashubu, ṅwana wa Azirikamu, ṅwana wa Hashabia wa mutupo wa Mirari," 
1Chronicles9:15 na Bakabakara na Hereshe na Galali na Mathania ṅwana wa Mika, ṅwana wa Zikhiri, ṅwana wa Asafu," 
1Chronicles9:16 na Obadia ṅwana wa Shemaya, ṅwana wa Galali, ṅwana wa Jeduthuni, na Berekhia ṅwana wa Asa, ṅwana wa Elikana we a vha a tshi dzula miḓanani ya Vhanetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Vhalindakhoro ndi Shalumu na Akubu na Talamoni na Ahimani na mashaka avho. Shalumu o vha e ene muhulwane wavho. 
1Chronicles9:18 U swika tshifhinga tshenetsho o vha o vhewa Khoroni ya Musanda thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha. Havho vho vha vhe vhalindakhoro vha mishasha ya Vhalivi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu ṅwana wa Kore, ṅwana wa Ebiasafu, ṅwana wa Kora, na vhalindakhoro ngae vha muṱa wa hawe, vha mutupo wa Kora, vho vha vha tshi linda zwiukhuvha zwa dennde ya Muṋe washu u ḓi nga vhokhotsi avho vhe vha vha vha tshi linda muṋango une wa dzhena hune Muṋe washu a dzula hone." 
1Chronicles9:20 Zwiḽa kale Finiasi ṅwana wa Eliasara o vha a tshi langa vhalindakhoro; Muṋe washu a mu elelwe! 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakaria ṅwana wa Mishelemia o vha e mulindakhoro muṋangoni une wa dzhena denndeni ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Vho nangwaho uri vha vhe vhalindakhoro zwiukhuvhani vhó ṱangana vhoṱhe vho vha vhe 212. Vho vha vho ṅwalwa zwi tshi ya nga miṱa miḓanani yavho. Vhalindakhoro vho vha vho vhewa vhuimoni uho vhune ha ṱoḓa muthu a fulufhedzeaho, nga khosi Dafita na Samuele wa muvhoni." 
1Chronicles9:23 Vhone na vha lutsinga lwavho vho vha vha tshi langa zwa u linda khoro dza nnḓu ya Muṋe washu, nnḓu i no pfi Dennde." 
1Chronicles9:24 Vhalindakhoro vho vha vhe kha masia maṋa, vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela na devhula na tshipembe." 
1Chronicles9:25 Vha havho vha re miḓanani yavho vho vha vha tshi ita vha tshi ḓa, vha kovhekana mishumo yavho vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
1Chronicles9:26 Hone vhalindakhoro vhahulwane vhaṋa vho vha vhe Vhalivi, vhenevho vho vha vho vhewa uri vha ṱwe vha tshi londola dzikamara na zwisiku zwa nnḓu ya Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Vho vha vha tshi ima u mona na nnḓu ya Mudzimu vhusiku hoṱhe ngauri vho vha vha tshi i linda nahone vho vha vha tshi fara khii ya u i vula misi yoṱhe ḽi tshi tsha. 
1Chronicles9:28 Vhaṅwe vhavho vho vha vha tshi londola midzio ine ya shumiswa thembeleni. Iyo midzio vho vha vha tshi i vhala musi i tshi bvisiwa na musi i tshi vhuiswa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Vhaṅwe vho vha vho ṋewa mushumo wa u londola thundu na zwiṅwe zwithu zwa hukhethwa, khathihi na vhukhopfu na waini na mapfura na zwioro na zwilungi." 
1Chronicles9:30 Hone vhaṅwe vhotshifhe mushumo wavho wo vha u wa u vanganya zwilungi. 
1Chronicles9:31 Muṅwe Mulivi we a vha a tshi pfi Mathithia, tanzhe ḽa mutuka ḽa Shalumu wa mutupo wa Kora, o vha o ṋewa mushumo wa u bika vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles9:32 Vhaṅwe vha havho vha mutupo wa Kehathi vho vha vho ṋewa mushumo wa u baga vhurotho vhune ha vhewa ḓafulani nga Sabatha iṅwe na iṅwe. 
1Chronicles9:33 Ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhalivi, vhe vha vha vha tshi sika nyimbo, vho vha vha tshi dzula kamarani dza thembele, vha sa shumi miṅwe mishumo ngauri vho vha vha tshi shuma uyo mushumo vhusiku na masiari." 
1Chronicles9:34 Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhalivi na vhahulwane nga he vha ṅwalwa kha mutevhe wa vha lutsinga lwa havho nahone vho vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeiele o fhaṱa muḓi wa Gibioni a dzula henefho. Mufumakadzi wawe o vha a tshi pfi Maakha," 
1Chronicles9:36 tanzhe ḽawe ḽa mutuka ḽi tshi pfi Abidoni, a tevhelwa nga Tsuru na Kishi na Baali na Nere na Nadaba" 
1Chronicles9:37 na Gedoro na Ahio na Zakaria na Mikilotho. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilotho o vha khotsi a Shimia. Na vhone vho vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema tsini na mashaka avho. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere o vha e khotsi a Kishi, khotsi a Saulo, khotsi a Jonathani na Malakhishua na Abinadaba na Eshbaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ṅwana wa Jonathani ndi Meribaali khotsi a Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Vhana vha Mika ndi Phithoni na Melekhe na Tharia na Ahasi. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi o vha e khotsi a Jada, khotsi a Alemethe na Asimavethe, na Zimiri khotsi a Motsa." 
1Chronicles9:43 Motsa o vha e khotsi a Binia, khotsi a Refaya, khotsi a Eliasa, khotsi a Atsele." 
1Chronicles9:44 Atsele o vha e na vhana vhaṱanu na muthihi, vhone vho vha vha tshi pfi Asirikamu na Bokheru na Ishmaele na Shearia na Obadia na Hanani. Ndi vhone vhana vha Atsele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Zwino Vhafilista vha lwa na Vhaisraele, Vhaisraele vha kundwa, vha shavha, ha vhulawa vhanzhi thavhani ya Gilibua." 
1Chronicles10:2 Vhafilista vha pandamedza Saulo na vhana vhawe, vha vhulaha vhana vhawe Jonathani na Abinadaba na Malikishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Nndwa ya tou hulela hu tshi lwiwa na Saulo, vhapfuli vha misevhe vha mu wana, vha mu pfula." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo a vhudza muhwalazwihali wawe a ri, “Ṱomola banga ḽau u nṱhavhe, vhathu avha vha mashuvhuru vha sa ḓo ḓa vha tamba nga nṋe.” Hone muhwalazwihali wawe a si tende, ngauri o vha a tshi ofha nga maanḓa. Ndi hone Saulo a tshi dzhia pfumo ḽawe a fhufhela nṱha haḽo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Musi muhwalazwihali a tshi vhona uri Saulo o dzama, na ene a fhufhela nṱha ha pfumo ḽawe, a mbo ḓi fa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ha vha u fa ha Saulo na vhana vhawe vhararu, vha nnḓu yawe vhoṱhe vha vha vho fa vho fhela." 
1Chronicles10:7 Musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Govhani ḽa Jesriele vha tshi vhona uri mmbi yo shavha na uri Saulo na vhana vhawe vho fa, vha ṱutshela miḓi yavho vha shavha. Vhafilista vha ḓa vha dzula khayo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Nga matshelo musi Vhafilista vha tshi ḓa u ṱangula vhafu, vha wana Saulo na vhana vhawe vho rambalala thavhani ya Gilibua." 
1Chronicles10:9 Vha ṱangula Saulo, vha dzhia ṱhoho yawe na nguvho yawe ya nndwa, vha ruma vhaḓinḓa shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhafilista u yo anḓadza mafhungo ayo midzimu yavho na vhathu vhoṱhe." 
1Chronicles10:10 Vha dzhia nguvho yawe ya nndwa vha i vhea thembeleni ya midzimu yavho, vha fhahea ṱhoho yawe thembeleni ya mudzimu wavho Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Musi vhadzulapo vhoṱhe vha Jabeshe kha ḽa Giliadi vha tshi pfa zwoṱhe zwe Vhafilista vha ita Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 vhanna vha havho vhoṱhe vha sa ofhi vha yo dzhia zwitumbu zwa Saulo na vhana vhawe, vha zwi isa Jabeshe, vha swiṱa marambo avho fhasi ha muri muhulu u re Jabeshe, vha ḓidzima zwiḽiwa vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saulo o fa nge Muṋe washu a vhona a sa fulufhedzei. O nyadza ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, a ita na u yo vhudzisa mimuya ya vho faho uri i mu eletshedze," 
1Chronicles10:14 a si vhudzise Muṋe washu. Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhulaha, a dzhia muvhuso a u ṋea Dafita ṅwana wa Isai." 
1Chronicles11:1 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ya ha Dafita muḓini wa Hebroni vha swika vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Riṋe ri malofha mathihi na vhone." 
1Chronicles11:2 Zwiḽa kale, na musi Saulo a tshi kha ḓi vha khosi, ndi vhone vhe vha vha vha tshi ranga Vhaisraele phanḓa vha tshi bva pfumo, nahone Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho o vha vhudza a ri, ‘U ḓo lisa vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele, wa vha murangaphanḓa wavho.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele vho vha vho ya ha khosi Dafita muḓini wa Hebroni, ene a vhofha mulanga phanḓa ha Muṋe washu henefho Hebroni, vha ta Dafita a vha khosi ya Israele, nga he Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa nga mulomo wa Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Khosi Dafita na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha bva vha ya muḓini wa Jerusalema (wo vha u tshi pfi Jebusi). Vhajebusi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula henefho 
1Chronicles11:5 vha vhudza Dafita vha ri, “Hafhano u nga si dzhene.” Hone Dafita a thuba dzhavhelo ḽa Tsioni, wone Muḓi wa Dafita." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafita o vha o ri, “Munna ane a ranga u vhulaha Mujebusi u ḓo vha mulangammbi muhulwane!” Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya a vha ene wa u thoma u gonya hone, a vha ene mulangammbi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dafita a yo dzula dzhavheloni ḽeneḽo, ha vho pfi Muḓi wa Dafita." 
1Chronicles11:8 Dafita a fhaṱa muḓi u mona naho, a thoma he shango ḽa linganela u swika nga mutsheṱo wo u tangedzaho, Juaba ene a vusa muḓi woṱhe wo salaho." 
1Chronicles11:9 Maanḓa a Dafita a ḓi hula a tshi ya ngauri Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe o vha e nae. 
1Chronicles11:10 Dafita o vha e na vhahali vha bvumo. Vhenevho khathihi na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vho tikedza vhuhosi hawe ha khwaṱha, nga he Muṋe washu a vha o fulufhedzisa." 
1Chronicles11:11 Asuyu mutevhe wa vhahali vha Dafita, ndi Jashobiamu wa mutupo wa Hakhimoni, ene o vha e ene murangaphanḓa wa vhahali vha 30 vho rangiwaho. O vhuya a lwa na vhanna vha 300 nga pfumo, a vha vhulaha vhoṱhe nndwani nthihi." 
1Chronicles11:12 A mu tevhelaho o vha e Eliasara ṅwana wa Dodo, wa mutupo wa Ahoho, muṅwe wa Vhararu vha Bvumo." 
1Chronicles11:13 O vha e na Dafita musi e Phasi Damimu zwiḽa Vhafilista vho kuvhangana henefho uri vha bve pfumo. Mmbi dza shavha Vhafilista fhethu he ha vha hu na tsimu ya baḽi. 
1Chronicles11:14 Hone vhone vha imedzana navho vhukati ha tsimu. Vha i lwela, vha vhulaha Vhafilista, Muṋe washu a ita uri vha kunde zwihulu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Muṅwe musi vhararu vha vhahulwane vha 30 vha ya tomboni he Dafita a vha a tshi dzula hone tsini ha bako ḽa Adulamu, tshigwada tsha Vhafilista tsho vha tsho ṱoka mishasha Govhani ḽa Refaimi." 
1Chronicles11:16 Tshifhinga tshenetsho Dafita o vha e dzhavheloni, tshigwada tsha Vhafilista tshi Betlehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dafita a pfa ḓora a ri, “Ngavhe muṅwe a tshi yo nkela maḓi a u nwa bidzini ḽi re tsini ha khoro ya Betlehema!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Vhaḽa vhahali vha bvumo vhararu vha fuḓekanya vhukati ha mishasha ya Vhafilista vha fhira, vha yo ka maḓi afho bidzini ḽi re tsini ha khoro ya Betlehema, vha a hwala vha humela nao ha Dafita. Hone Dafita a hana u nwa ayo maḓi, a a shululela fhasi a vha nduvho i ṋekedzwaho Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles11:19 Dafita a ri, “Maḓi aya ndi nga si a nwe! Zwi nga ḓo nga ndi khou nwa malofha a avha vhanna vhe vha ḓifunga vha ṅaledza vhutshilo havho!” Dafita a si nwe ayo maḓi nge avho vhanna vha ḓifunga vha ṅaledza vhutshilo havho vha tshi yo a ka uri vha vhuye nao. Uho ndi hone vhuhali ha avho vhahali vhararu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai murathu wa Juaba o vha e ene muhulwane wa avho vhararu. O lwa na vhanna vha 300 nga pfumo ḽawe a vha vhulaha, ngauralo a vha na bvumo unga avho Vhararu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Kha avho vhararu ndi ene we a vha e na bvumo ḽihulu, a vha ene mulangi wavho, naho o vha a sa swiki kha Vhararu vha Bvumo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada wa Kabusiele o vha e muhali wa bvumo unga khotsi awe Jehoyada, o sumbedza vhuhali vhuhulu. O vhulaha vhahali vhavhili vha Muaba vhe vha vha vha tshi pfi “Ndau dza Muaba”. O vhuya a dzhena mulindini musi hu na gabugu a vhulaha ndau e eṱhe." 
1Chronicles11:23 O vhuya a vhulaha muswonḓa wa Muegipita wa vhulapfu ha mitha mbili na hafu. Naho uyo Muegipita o vha o fara pfumo ḽihulu ḽi no nga luṱanga lwa muluki, Benaya a mu dzhena nga mugopi, a dzhavhulela uyo Muegipita pfumo, a mu vhulaha nga pfumo ḽawe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Uho ndi hone vhuhali ha Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada, na ene o vha e na bvumo unga vhanna vhararu vha bvumo." 
1Chronicles11:25 O vha a tshi huliswa zwihulu u fhira vhoṱhe vha 30, hone o vha a songo katelwa kha Vhararu vha Bvumo. Dafita a mu vhea uri a vhe ene mulangi wa vhalindi vhawe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Vhanna vhaṅwe vha bvumo ndi Asaele murathu wa Juaba na Elihanani ṅwana wa Dodo wa Betlehema 
1Chronicles11:27 na Shamotho wa Harodo na Helese wa Phelethe 
1Chronicles11:28 na Ira ṅwana wa Ikeshe wa Thekua na Abiesere wa Anathotho 
1Chronicles11:29 na Sibekhai wa Husha na Ilai wa Ahoho 
1Chronicles11:30 na Maharai wa Netofa na Helede ṅwana wa Baana wa Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 na Ithai ṅwana wa Ribai wa Gibia kha ḽa Benyamini, na Benaya wa Phirathoni" 
1Chronicles11:32 na Harai wa magovhani a Gaashi na Abiele wa Araba 
1Chronicles11:33 na Asimavethe wa Bahurimu na Eliahaba wa Shaaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 na vhana vha Hasheme wa Gizoni na Jonathani ṅwana wa Shagee wa Harare," 
1Chronicles11:35 na Ahiamu ṅwana wa Sakhara wa Harare na Elifala ṅwana wa Uru," 
1Chronicles11:36 na Hefere wa Mekhera na Ahia wa Pheloni 
1Chronicles11:37 na Hetsiro wa Kharamele na Naarai ṅwana wa Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 na Juele murathu wa Nathani na Mibihare ṅwana wa Hagari 
1Chronicles11:39 na Tseleke wa Amoni na Naharai wa Bierotho, muhwalazwihali wa Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 na Ira wa Jathiri na Garebe wa Jathiri 
1Chronicles11:41 na Uria wa Muhithi na Zabadi ṅwana wa Ahilai," 
1Chronicles11:42 na Adina ṅwana wa Shisa wa tsinde ḽa Rubeni, we a vha e murangaphanḓa wa tsinde ḽa Rubeni, e na tshigwada tshawe tsha vhahali vha 30," 
1Chronicles11:43 na Hanani ṅwana wa Maakha na Josafati wa Mithani 
1Chronicles11:44 na Uzia wa Ashtharotho na Shama na Jeiele vhana vha Hothamu wa Aruere," 
1Chronicles11:45 na Jediele na Joha vhana vha Shimiri vha Thitsi 
1Chronicles11:46 na Eliele wa Mahava na Jeribai na Joshavia vhana vha Elinaamu na Ithima wa Muaba 
1Chronicles11:47 na Eliele na Obede na Jaasiele vha Tsoba. 
1Chronicles12:1 Musi Dafita a tshi dzula Tsikilaga he a ya hone a tshi shavha khosi Saulo ṅwana wa Kishi, a tevhelwa nga vhaṅwe vhahali" 
1Chronicles12:2 vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini mashaka a Saulo. Vho vha vha tshi kona u posa misevhe na u posa matombo nga gatho nga tshanḓa tshauḽa kana tshamonde. 
1Chronicles12:3 Vho vha vha tshi langwa nga Ahiesere na Juasi vhana vha Shemaa wa Gibia. Ndi Jesiele na Phelete vhana vha Asimavethe na Berakha na Jehu vha Anathotho 
1Chronicles12:4 na Ishmaya wa Gibioni, ene muhali wa bvumo kha vha 30, a dovha a vha murangaphanḓa wavho," 
1Chronicles12:5 na Jeremia na Jahasiele na Johanani na Jozabadi wa Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:6 na Elusai na Jerimotho na Bialia na Shemaria na Shefatia vha Harifi na Elikana na Ishia na Asarele na Juesere na Jashobiamu vha mutupo wa Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 na Juela na Zebadia vhana vha Jerohamu vha Gedoro. 
1Chronicles12:8 Ngea madzina a vhahali vha vhahali vha no bva kha tsinde ḽa Gadi vhe vha tevhela mmbi dza Dafita musi e dzhavheloni ḽa phangani. Vho vha vhe vhomakone kha u fara zwiṱangu na u posa mafumo, vha tshi ofhisa unga dzindau, vhe na luvhilo lu no nga lwa tholo dza thavhani." 
1Chronicles12:9 Vho vha vha tshi tevhekana nga u rali zwi tshi ya nga vhuimo havho: Ezere, Obadia, Eliaba," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishimana, Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 Athai, Eliele," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanani, Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremia, Makhabanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Kha avho vhanna vha no bva kha tsinde ḽa Gadi a no fhira vhoṱhe o vha a sa ofhi vhanna vha tshigidi, muṱuku wavho a sa teledzi vha ḓana." 
1Chronicles12:15 Nga ṅwedzi wa u thoma wa ṅwaha, tshifhinga tsha musi mulambo wa Jorodani u tshi ḓala wa fhufha mabama awo, wa ḓadza na magovha vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela, vhone vha u wela vha ḓa ha Dafita." 
1Chronicles12:16 Vhaṅwe vhanna vha matsinde a Benyamini na Juda vho bva vha ya dzhavheloni he Dafita a vha e hone. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dafita a yo vha ṱanganedza a ri, “Arali ni tshi khou ḓa sa dzikhonani uri ni mpfarise, no ṱanganedzwa fhano. Nga ri baḓekane! Hone arali ni tshi ṱoḓa u mpheṱa kha maswina anga, naho ndi songo linga u ni huvhadza, Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku washu u ḓo zwi ḓivha a ni lifhedza.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Muya wa Mudzimu a dzhena muṅwe wavho ane a pfi Amasai, we ngavhuya a vho vha mulangi wa vha 30, a vhidzelela a ri, “Dafita, riṋe ri vhau! Ri ima na iwe, iwe ṅwana wa Isai! Nga zwi u nakele, nga zwi u nakele nandi, zwi nakele na vhane vha u tikedza, ngauri Mudzimu wau u ḓo u tika.” Dafita a vha ṱanganedza, a vha ita vharangaphanḓa vha mmbi yawe." 
1Chronicles12:19 Vhaṅwe vhahali vha Manase vho pfukela siani ḽa Dafita musi o bva na Vhafilista vha tshi yo lwa na khosi Saulo. (Vhukuma Dafita o sala a si tsha tikedza Vhafilista ngauri mahosi avho o vha a tshi ofha uri a nga humela kha muṋe wawe wa u thoma Saulo o fara ṱhoho dzavho, ndi zwe vha ri a humele Tsikilaga.)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Vhahali vha tsinde ḽa Manase vho pfukelaho siani ḽa Dafita musi a tshi khou vhuya ndi Adina na Jozabadi na Jediele na Mikaele na Jozabadi na Elihu na Tsilethai. Kha ḽa Manase vhoṱhe vho vha vhe vhalangi vha vhanna vha tshigidi. 
1Chronicles12:21 Vha farisa Dafita u pandamedza tshiḽa tshigwada tsha Vhaamaleke, ngauri vhoṱhe vho vha vhe vhahali vha bvumo. Ngavhuya vha vha vhalangammbi vha Dafita." 
1Chronicles12:22 Misi yoṱhe ho ḓi ḓa vhanna vhaswa vha ḓibaḓekanya na mmbi dza Dafita, mmbi yawe ya mbo ḓi ṱavhanya ya anda ya vha khulu-khulu." 
1Chronicles12:23 Musi Dafita o no vha Hebroni, ha ḓa vhahali vhanzhi vho gudiswaho vha dzhena mmbini yawe uri vha mu tikedze a vhe khosi vhudzuloni ha Saulo, nga he Muṋe washu a vha o fulufhedzisa. Tshivhalo tshavho ndi hetshino:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Vhanna vha Juda vho faraho zwiṱangu na mafumo vho vha vhe 6 800. 
1Chronicles12:25 Vhanna vha Simioni vho lugelaho u bva pfumo vho vha vhe 7 100. 
1Chronicles12:26 Vhanna vha Livi vho vha vhe 4 600. 
1Chronicles12:27 Vhaṅwe vhavho vho vha vhe vhanna vha 3 700 vho rangwaho phanḓa nga Jehoyada, wa lutsinga lwa Aroni." 
1Chronicles12:28 Tsadoko ene muhali nndwani o vha e na vharangaphanḓa vha muṱa wa hawe vha 22. 
1Chronicles12:29 Vhanna vha Benyamini, mashaka a Saulo, vhe u swika zwenezwo vha vha vha tshi kha ḓi luvha Saulo, vho vha vhe 3 000." 
1Chronicles12:30 Vhanna vha Efraimi, vhahali vha re na bvumo kha vha mutupo wavho, vho vha vhe 20 800." 
1Chronicles12:31 Vhanna vha Manase vha vhukovhela vho nangwaho uri vha ye vha vhumbe Dafita khosi vho vha vhe 18 000. 
1Chronicles12:32 Vhanna vha Isakhara vha vharangaphanḓa vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓivha zwine Vhaisraele vha fanela u ita na tshifhinga tsho teaho tshine vha fanela u zwi ita vho vha vhe 200 khathihi na mashaka avho e a vha a tshi langiwa ngavho. 
1Chronicles12:33 Vhanna vha Zebuloni, vhahali vha re na nzhele vhe vha vha vha tshi kona u lwa nga zwihali zwoṱhe u tikedza Dafita nga mbilu yoṱhe vho vha vhe 50 000." 
1Chronicles12:34 Vhanna vha Nafuthali vho vha vhe magota a 1 000 khathihi na vhanna vhe vha vha vhe navho vho shomaho zwiṱangu na mafumo, vha 37 000." 
1Chronicles12:35 Vhanna vha Dani vho teaho u bva pfumo vho vha vhe 28 600. 
1Chronicles12:36 Vhanna vha Ashere, vhahali vha na nzhele vho ḓiimiselaho u bva pfumo vho vha vhe 40 000." 
1Chronicles12:37 Vhubvaḓuvha ha Jorodani, vhanna vha Rubeni na Gadi na vha Manase wa vhubvaḓuvha, vho shomaho zwihali zwa tshakha dzoṱhe vho vha vhe 120 000." 
1Chronicles12:38 Vhoṱhe havho vhahali vha ya Hebroni vhe kha zwigwada zwavho vho shoma mafumo, vhe na mbilu nthihi vho ḓiimisela u vhumba Dafita khosi ya ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele. Vhaisraele vhaṅwe vhoṱhe na vhone vho vha vhe na mbilu nthihi uri vha vhumbe Dafita khosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Vhanna avho vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu henefho vhe na Dafita, vha tshi khou ḽa vha tshi nwa, ngauri vha havho vho vha vho vha ṋea zwiḽiwa." 
1Chronicles12:40 Na vhahura vhavho vhe vha vha vha tshi bva henengei kha matsinde a Isakhara na Zebuloni na Nafuthali vha ḓa vho hwala zwiḽiwa nga dzidonngi na dzigamela na dzimeila na dziphulu. Vha ḓa vho hwala vhukhopfu na mpale wa mahuyu na wa nḓirivhe na waini na mapfura na kholomo na nngu ngauri shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele ḽo vha ḽi tshi khou pembela. 
1Chronicles13:1 Dafita a eletshedzana na magota awe oṱhe a no langa vhanna vha tshigidi na a no langa vha ḓana. 
1Chronicles13:2 Ndi hone a tshi ḓivhadza vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele a ri, “Arali ni tshi vhona zwi zwavhuḓi nahone zwi zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu a zwi funa, nga ri rume vhaḓinḓa ha vha hashu vhaṅwe vhoṱhe shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele na ha vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vhane vha dzula navho miḓini yavho na mafuloni, vha ḓe vha kuvhangane na riṋe fhano." 
1Chronicles13:3 Nga ri yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu washu i vhuye fhano kha riṋe, ngauri a ro ngo i londa misi ya Saulo.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Vhathu vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganaho vha tenda uri vha ḓo ita nga u ralo ngauri vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi vhona zwi zwone. 
1Chronicles13:5 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi kuvhanganya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, u bva mulamboni wa Shihoro masakhani a Egipita u swika Pharani ya Hamathi, uri vha yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu Kiriathi Jiarimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafita na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vha ya muḓini wa Baala, une ḽiṅwe wa pfi Kiriathi Jiarimu, shangoni ḽa Juda, u yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu, o dzulaho kha khuluṋoni vhukati ha vhakherube, mbulungelo iyo i vhidzwa nga dzina ḽawe." 
1Chronicles13:7 Vha bvisa mbulungelo ya Mudzimu nḓuni ya Abinadaba vha i vhea kha gariki ntswa, ya endedzwa nga Uza na Ahio." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dafita na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi khou pembela nga nungo dzavho dzoṱhe phanḓa ha Mudzimu, hu tshi khou imbwa nyimbo hu tshi lidzwa dziharipa na madende na mirumba na ṋanga na dziphalaphala." 
1Chronicles13:9 Musi vha tshi swika luvhatani lwa Nakhoni phulu dza khukhulwa, Uza a isa tshanḓa a fara mbulungelo uri i si we." 
1Chronicles13:10 Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Uza, a mu vhulaha nge a farelela mbulungelo. A fela henefho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dafita a vhilaela nge Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Uza. Fhethu afho na ṋamusi hu kha ḓi pfi Pheretse Uza (Phandula-Uza), nge Muṋe washu a tou fhandula Uza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafita a ofha Mudzimu musi uyo, a ḓivhudzisa a ri, “Mbulungelo ya Mudzimu ndi nga i ḓisa hani ha nṋe zwino?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Dafita a si dzhie mbulungelo uri a dzule nayo Muḓini wa Dafita. O tou i bvisela nnḓa a i isa nḓuni ya munna we a vha a tshi pfi Obede Edomo we a vha a tshi bva muḓini wa Gathi. 
1Chronicles13:14 Mbulungelo ya Mudzimu ya dzula henefho ya fhedza miṅwedzi miraru, Muṋe washu a shudufhadza muṱa wa uyo munna na zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Zwino Hiramu khosi ya Tiro a ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Dafita, vha ṱuwa na matanda a mukedara na vhatsheṱi vha matombo na vhavhaḓi uri vha mu fhaṱele pfamo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafita a zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu o mu vhumba khosi ya Israele na uri muvhuso wawe o u pfumbisa tshoṱhe a tshi itela vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele. 
1Chronicles14:3 Henefho Jerusalema Dafita a dzea vhafumakadzi vhanzhi a beba vhana vhanzhi vha vhatuka na vhasidzana. 
1Chronicles14:4 Vhana vhe Dafita a vha beba henefho Jerusalema ndi Shamua na Shobaba na Nathani na Solomoni 
1Chronicles14:5 na Ibihara na Elishua na Eliphelete 
1Chronicles14:6 na Noga na Nefege na Jafia 
1Chronicles14:7 na Elishama na Bieliada na Elifelete. 
1Chronicles14:8 Musi Vhafilista vha tshi zwi pfa uri Dafita o vhumbwa khosi ya ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, vha ḓa na mmbi yavho yoṱhe u yo mu ṱoḓa, Dafita a zwi pfa, a bva a yo vha ṱanganedza." 
1Chronicles14:9 Zwino Vhafilista vho vha vho imisa mmbi yavho Govhani ḽa Refaimi. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dafita a vhudzisa Mudzimu a ri, “Ndi ṱuwe ndi yo lwa na Vhafilista? U ḓo nkumedza vhone nda vha kunda?” Muṋe washu a mu fhindula a ri, “Tshimbila u yo lwa navho, ndi ḓo u kumedza vhone wa vha kunda.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Ndi hone Dafita na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi gonya vha ya Baali Pheratsimu, henefho a vha kunda. Dafita a ri, “Mudzimu o kumba maswina anga nga tshanḓa tshanga unga maḓi a muḓalo a tshi kumba.” Fhethu henefho ha mbo ḓi pfi Baali Pheratsimu (Muṋe wa Muḓalo)." 
1Chronicles14:12 Vhafilista vha shavha vha sia midzimu yavho ya zwitungulo henefho, Dafita a ri zwi fhiswe nga mulilo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Vhafilista vha dovha vha ḓa vha imisa mmbi yavho govhani ḽeneḽo. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dafita a dovha a vhudzisa Mudzimu, Mudzimu a mu fhindula a ri, “U songo tou gonya wo livhana navho, itou vha mona u vha die u tshi bva nga matungo u livhana na miri ya maswi." 
1Chronicles14:15 Hezwi u tshi tou pfa mutsindo matavhini a miri ya maswi, u mbo ḓi vha wela ngauri ndi ḓo vha ndo u ranga phanḓa u yo kunda mmbi ya Vhafilista.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dafita a ita zwe Mudzimu a mu laya, vha kunda mmbi ya Vhafilista, vha vha vhilimedza u bva Gibioni u vhuya u swika Gezere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Bvumo ḽa Dafita ḽa swika mashangoni oṱhe, Muṋe washu a ita uri tshakha dzoṱhe dzi mu ofhe." 
1Chronicles15:1 Musi Dafita a tshi ḓifhaṱela dzinnḓu Muḓini wa Dafita, a lugisa na fhethu hune mbulungelo ya Mudzimu ya ḓo dzula hone, a i akhela dennde." 
1Chronicles15:2 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ri, “Mbulungelo ya Mudzimu i nga hwalwa nga Vhalivi fhedzi, e si muṅwe muthu, ngauri Muṋe washu o nanga vhone uri vha hwale mbulungelo yawe, vha mu shumele lini na lini.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dafita a kuvhanganya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe Jerusalema uri vha yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu vha i ḓise fhethu he a i lugisela. 
1Chronicles15:4 Dafita a vhidzisa vhoṱhe vha lutsinga lwa Aroni na Vhalivi vha kuvhangana. 
1Chronicles15:5 Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi ha ḓa vha 120, murangaphanḓa wavho e Uriele." 
1Chronicles15:6 Vha mutupo wa Mirari ha ḓa vha 220, murangaphanḓa wavho e Asaya." 
1Chronicles15:7 Vha mutupo wa Gerisoni ha ḓa vha 130, murangaphanḓa e Juele." 
1Chronicles15:8 Vha mutupo wa Elitsafani ha ḓa vha 200, murangaphanḓa e Shemaya." 
1Chronicles15:9 Vha mutupo wa Hebroni ha ḓa vha 80, murangaphanḓa e Eliele." 
1Chronicles15:10 Vha mutupo wa Uziele ha ḓa vha 112, murangaphanḓa e Aminadaba." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhidza vhotshifhe Tsadoko na Abiathara, na Vhalivi, Uriele na Asaya na Juele na Shemaya na Eliele na Aminadaba." 
1Chronicles15:12 Dafita a vhudza Vhalivi a ri, “Inwi ni ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhalivi, inwi na Vhalivi vha haṋu ḓikumedzeni Mudzimu, ni yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, ni ḓe nayo fhano, ni i vhee fhethu he nda i lugisela." 
1Chronicles15:13 Mudzimu Muṋe washu o ri huvhadza nge lwa u thoma ya si hwalwe nga inwi Vhalivi. A ro ngo mu vhudzisa uri zwi itwa hani nga nḓila yo teaho.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Ndi hone vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha tshi ḓikumedza Mudzimu uri vha yo dzhia mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, vha vhuye nayo." 
1Chronicles15:15 Vhalivi vha hwala mbulungelo ya Mudzimu nga thanda vho dzi vhea kha mahaḓa avho, nga he Mushe a laya zwi tshi tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu a amba." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dafita a vhudza vharangaphanḓa vha Vhalivi uri vha khethe mashaka avho vha vhe vhaimbi vha imbe nyimbo dza u pembela hu tshi lidzwa zwilidzo zwa madende na dziharipa na tshele. 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndi hone Vhalivi vha tshi khetha Hemani ṅwana wa Juele na shaka ḽawe Asafu ṅwana wa Berekhia, na Ethani ṅwana wa Kushaya wa mutupo wa Mirari." 
1Chronicles15:18 Vha tikedzwa nga mashaka avho vhane vha vha tevhela nga vhuimo, vhone vhalindakhoro, Zakaria na Jaasiele na Shemiramotho na Jehiele na Uni na Eliaba na Benaya na Maaseya na Mathithia na Elifelehu na Mikineya na Obede Edomo na Jeiele." 
1Chronicles15:19 Vhasiki vha nyimbo, Hemani na Asafu na Ethani, vho vha vha tshi lidza tshele dza musinaseṱha." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zakaria na Asiele na Shemiramotho na Jehiele na Uni na Eliaba na Maaseya na Benaya vho vha vha tshi lidza madende a mubvumo musekene. 
1Chronicles15:21 Mathithia na Elifelehu na Mikineya na Obede Edomo na Jeiele na Azasia vha tshi lidza madende a mubvumo mudenya. 
1Chronicles15:22 Khenania ene Mulivi muhulwane o vha e ene wa u langa vhahwali vha mbulungelo, ngauri o vha e na nḓivho ya uyo mushumo." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekhia na Elikana vho vha vhe vhalindamuṋango wa hune mbulungelo ya vha hone. 
1Chronicles15:24 Vhotshifhe Shebania na Josafati na Nathaniele na Amasai na Zakaria na Benaya na Eliesere vho vha vha tshi lidza phalaphala phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya Mudzimu, Obede Edomo na Ihia vha tshi i linda." 
1Chronicles15:25 Ndi hone khosi Dafita na vhahulwane vha Israele na vhalangammbi vha vhanna vha tshigidi vha tshi ya nḓuni ya Obede Edomo u yo dzhia mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu, vha tshi khou pembela." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ha ṱhavhiwa mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili dza ṋekedzwa dza vha tshiṱhavhelo nge Mudzimu a farisa Vhalivi vhe vha vha vho hwala mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu. 
1Chronicles15:27 Dafita o vha o ambara phuraphura ya sila ḽa lukhaha lu songo vangiwaho, na Vhalivi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho hwala mbulungelo vho ambara nga u ralo, na vhaimbi na Kenania we a vha a tshi khou langa vhahwali. Dafita o vha o ita na u pakata na luvhemba lwa lukhaha." 
1Chronicles15:28 Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha dzhia mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu vha vhuya nayo vha tshi khou ṱavha mikosi ya dakalo, hu tshi khou lidzwa ṋanga dza thutha na phalaphala na tshele na madende na dziharipa." 
1Chronicles15:29 Musi mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu i tshi khou dzhena Muḓini wa Dafita, Mikhala ṅwananyana wa Saulo a sedza nga fasiṱere, a vhona khosi Dafita a tshi khou tshina a tshi tou ḓiṱhakha, a mu nyadza mbiluni yawe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Vha dzhia mbulungelo ya Mudzimu vha i vhea denndeni ye Dafita a vha o i akhela, vha ṋekedza Mudzimu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles16:2 Musi Dafita o no fhedza u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu, a shudufhadza vhathu nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles16:3 Dafita a ṋea Muisraele muṅwe na muṅwe, wa munna na wa musadzi mukonde wa vhurotho na mpale wa dzideithi na mpale wa nḓirivhe." 
1Chronicles16:4 Dafita a vhea vhaṅwe Vhalivi uri vha shume phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu, vha tshi imbela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, vha tshi mu livhuha vha tshi mu renda." 
1Chronicles16:5 Murangaphanḓa o vha e Asafu, a tevhelwa nga Zakaria, ha konou tevhela Jeiele na Shemiramotho na Jeiele na Mathithia na Eliaba na Benaya na Obede Edomo na Jeiele. Vho vha vha tshi lidza madende na dziharipa, Asafu a tshi lidza tshele," 
1Chronicles16:6 vhotshifhe Benaya na Jahasiele vha tshi dzula vha tshi lidza dziphalaphala phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Mudzimu. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ndi musi wonoyo we Dafita a thoma u ṋea Asafu na mashaka awe mushumo wa u imba phisalema ya u renda Muṋe washu i no ri: 
1Chronicles16:8 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, mu rabeleni, ḓivhadzani dzitshakha mishumo yawe." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mu imbeleni, mu rendeni nga nyimbo, bulani mishumo yawe i kanukisaho." 
1Chronicles16:10 Rendani dzina ḽawe ḽikhethwa, mbilu dza vhane vha ṱoḓa Muṋe washu nga dzi pembele." 
1Chronicles16:11 Iyani ha Muṋe washu, u na maanḓa, lusani u dzula nae misi yoṱhe." 
1Chronicles16:12 Elelwani maḓembe e a ita, na zwiga zwawe, na zwe a amba a tshi haṱula," 
1Chronicles16:13 inwi vhaḓuhulu vha Israele mulanda wawe, vhana vha Jakopo munangiwa wawe." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ndi Ene Mudzimu Muṋe washu, muvhuso wawe u ṱanganya ḽifhasi." 
1Chronicles16:15 Elelwani mulanga wawe, ndi wa lini na lini; zwe a fulufhedzisa zwi dzula zwo ralo ha vhuya ha fhira mirafho ya zwigidi." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ndi mulanga we a vhofha na Abrahamu, a fulufhedzisa Isaka nga muano," 
1Chronicles16:17 a zwi khwaṱhisa a zwi ita mulayo nga tshifhinga tsha Jakopo, wa vha mulanga wa lini na lini we a vhofha na Israele," 
1Chronicles16:18 a tshi ri, “Inwi ndi ḓo ni ṋea shango ḽa Kanana, ḽa vha ifa ḽaṋu ḽe nda ni kovhela.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Zwiḽa vha tshi kha ḓi vha vhathu vha si gathi, vhe vhaṱuku sa muroho, vhe vhatsinda shangoni ḽeneḽo," 
1Chronicles16:20 vho tendeleka na dzitshakha, vha mona na mivhuso," 
1Chronicles16:21 a si tende na muthihi a tshi vha kandeledza, a kaidza mahosi a tshi itela vhone," 
1Chronicles16:22 a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na kwama vhe nda vha shululela Muya wanga, ni songo huvhadza vhaporofita vhanga.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi imbele Muṋe washu! Misi yoṱhe ḓivhadzani uri u a tshidza! 
1Chronicles16:24 Anḓadzani vhugala hawe tshakhani dzoṱhe, ni ḓivhadze vhathu vhoṱhe mishumo yawe i kanukisaho." 
1Chronicles16:25 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, o tewa nga thendo khulu, u fanela u ofhiwa u fhira midzimu yoṱhe." 
1Chronicles16:26 Hufha midzimu yoṱhe ya dzitshakha i si tshithu, hone Muṋe washu o sika ḽiṱaḓulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 O tangwa nga vhugala na vhurena, hune a dzula ho ḓala nungo na dakalo." 
1Chronicles16:28 Inwi tshakha dzoṱhe, iḓani ha Muṋe washu! Mu huliseni, mu luvheni, u na maanḓa." 
1Chronicles16:29 Rendani dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, zwo fanela; ḓisani nduvho nḓuni yawe. Khothani Muṋe washu a tshi vhonadza lupenyo lwawe lukhethwa!" 
1Chronicles16:30 Tetemelani phanḓa hawe inwi noṱhe vha ḽifhasi! Shango ḽo tikwa, ḽi nga si sudzuluswe." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ḽiṱaḓulu nga ḽi takale, ḽifhasi nga ḽi fhululedze, nga zwi vhudzwe dzitshakha hu pfi, “Muṋe washu u a vhusa!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Lwanzhe nga lu bvume na zwoṱhe zwi re khalwo, masimu nga a pembele na zwoṱhe zwi re khao!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Miri ya ḓaka i ḓo imba, i ḓo fhululedza phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, u khou ḓa u haṱula ḽifhasi." 
1Chronicles16:34 Livhuhani Muṋe washu ngauri u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu gumi." 
1Chronicles16:35 Ṱavhani mukosi ni ri, “Ri tshidze, Iwe Mudzimu Mutshidzi washu, ri kuvhanganye u ri lamulele kha dzitshakha, ri luvhe dzina ḽau ḽikhethwa, ri u khoḓe ri u rende.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, u bva tsha kale na kale, na lini na lini. Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi ri, “Amen! Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Dafita a sia Asafu na mashaka awe phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu uri vha dzule vha tshi shuma henefho, vha tshi tevhedza zwine zwa ṱoḓea misi yoṱhe." 
1Chronicles16:38 A sia na Obede Edomo na mashaka awe vha 68 uri vha shume navho. Obede Edomo ṅwana wa Jeduthuni na Hosa vho vha vhe vhalindakhoro. 
1Chronicles16:39 Dafita a vhea tshifhe Tsadoko na mashaka awe uri vha shume Gibioni fhethu he ha vha hu tshi luvhiwa Muṋe washu," 
1Chronicles16:40 uri vha ṋekedze Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho kha aḽiṱari ya tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho nga zwifhinga zwa hone, nga matsheloni na nga madekwana, hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni wa Muṋe washu, we a u ṋea Vhaisraele." 
1Chronicles16:41 Vho vha vhe na Hemani na Jeduthuni na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vhe vha nangiwa vha tou bulwa nga madzina uri vha livhuhe Muṋe washu vha tshi ri, “Lufuno lwawe a lu gumi.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Jeduthuni vho vha vha tshi shuma u vhona uri hu lidzwe dziphalaphala na mirumba na u lidza zwiṅwe zwilidzo hu tshi imbiwa nyimbo dza u hulisa Mudzimu. Vhana vha Jeduthuni vho vha vha tshi linda khoro. 
1Chronicles16:43 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi ṱuwa, muṅwe na muṅwe a livha hayani hawe, Dafita a vhuelela hayani a yo shudufhadza muṱa wawe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Khosi Dafita a tshi vho dzula pfamoni yawe, a vhudza muporofita Nathani a ri, “Eḓonu vhona, nṋe ndi dzula pfamoni yo fhaṱwaho nga mikedara, ngeno mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu i tshi dzula denndeni.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathani a fhindula Dafita a ri, “Zwine vha zwi elekanya nga vha zwi ite; Mudzimu u navho.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Vhusiku honoho ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽa ḓa ha Nathani ḽa ri," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Tshimbila u yo vhudza muḓinḓa wanga Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: A si iwe ane a ḓo mphaṱela nnḓu ine nda ḓo dzula khayo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Hufha ndi sa athu vhuya nda dzula nḓuni tshee nda pfulusa Vhaisraele Egipita, na ṋamusi. Ndo tendeleka ndi tshi bva fhano ndi tshi ya fhaḽa ndi tshi dzula denndeni." 
1Chronicles17:6 Hoṱhe he nda tshimbila na Vhaisraele, ndo no vhuya nda vhudza muṅwe wa vharangaphanḓa vhe nda vha laya uri vha lise vhathu vhanga nda ri: Ndi mini ni songo mphaṱela nnḓu ya mikedara?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Zwino-ha, vhudza muḓinḓa wanga Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Ndo u dzhia pfuloni u tshi khou lisa sambi ḽa nngu nda u ita murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ndo ḓi vha na iwe hoṱhe he wa ya, nda vhulaha maswina au oṱhe a si tsha u dina. Zwino ndi ḓo ita uri u vhe na bvumo unga madzina a vhanna vhahulu vha ḽifhasi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele ndi ḓo vha ṋea vhudzulo, nda vha ṱavha vha vha na haya havho, vha si tsha dinwa nga muthu. Vhavhi a vha tsha ḓo vha kandeledza sa zwiḽa u rangani," 
1Chronicles17:10 vha ḓi ralo u bva tshee nda vhea vharangaphanḓa uri vha vhuse vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele. Ndi ḓo ita na uri maswina au oṱhe a u luvhe. Ndi u ḓivhadza uri Nṋe ndi ḓo fhaṱela iwe nnḓu. 
1Chronicles17:11 Musi tshifhinga tshau tshi tshi swika wa fa, wa yo swiṱwa na vhokhotsi au, ndi ḓo ita uri ṅwana wau a vhe khosi vhudzuloni hau. Ndi ḓo pfumbisa muvhuso wawe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ndi ene ane a ḓo mphaṱela nnḓu, nda khwaṱhisa vhuhosi hawe lini na lini." 
1Chronicles17:13 Nṋe ndi ḓo vha khotsi awe, ene a vha ṅwananga. Thi nga litshi u mu funa unga ndo litsha u funa o u rangaho phanḓa." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ndi ḓo mu ṋea vhudzulo nḓuni yanga na muvhusoni wanga lini na lini.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathani a swikisa ha Dafita mafhungo oṱhe e Mudzimu a mu dzumbululela one. 
1Chronicles17:16 Ndi hone khosi Dafita a tshi dzhena denndeni a dzula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu a rabela a ri, “Yawee Mudzimu Muṋe washu, nṋe ndi tou vha mini, muṱa wanga wone u tou vha mini, zwe wa vhuya wa ntswikisa hafhano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Zwa tou nga wo vhona zwenezwo zwí songo eḓana, wa dovha wa amba na zwa tshifhinga tshi ḓaho zwa nnḓu yanga. Yawee Mudzimu Muṋe washu, wo ntsedza unga muthu a tshi sedza muṅwe muthu, wa mpha vhuimo vhuhulwane." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Zwino nṋe Dafita ndi ḓo u fhindula mini zwe wa nkhulisa? Hufha u tshi nnḓivha," 
1Chronicles17:19 Muṋe washu, wo ita zwingafha nga u funa hau u tshi itela u tonda nṋe, u tshi ri u ḓo zwi ḓivhadza vhathu." 
1Chronicles17:20 Muṋe washu, a hu na ane a nga Iwe, ro zwi pfa nga dzashu nḓevhe ra zwi vhona: Mudzimu ndi Iwe u woṱhe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ndi lufhio lushaka lune lwa nga vhathu vhau Vhaisraele? Ndi lwone lushaka lu lwoṱhe fhano fhasi lwe Mudzimu walwo a bva a yo ḓitshidzela lushaka, wa vha na bvumo, wa ita zwimangadzo zwihulu zwi ofhisaho nga u thatha dzitshakha vhathu vhau vha tshi swika, vhe wa vha lamukisa Egipita." 
1Chronicles17:22 Wo ita uri vhathu vhau Vhaisraele vha vhe vhau lini na lini, Iwe Muṋe washu wa vha Mudzimu wavho." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Zwino-ha, Muṋe washu, ita uri zwe wa fulufhedzisa u tshi amba nṋe na nnḓu yanga zwi vhe zwa lini na lini. Ita nga he wa fulufhedzisa," 
1Chronicles17:24 uri zwi pfumbe, bvumo ḽau ḽi pfale kule lini na lini. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe, Mudzimu ane a vhusa Israele, ndi Mudzimu wa Israele!’ Ndi hone nnḓu yanga nṋe muḓinḓa wau Dafita i tshi ḓo pfumba u tshi zwi vhona." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Mudzimu wanga, wo nnzumbululela uri u ḓo mphaṱela nnḓu. Ndi zwine nda wana nungo dza u u rabela." 
1Chronicles17:26 Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe Mudzimu! Wo mpfulufhedzisa mafhungo haya avhuḓi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Zwino wo takalela u shudufhadza nnḓu yanga uri i ḓi dzula u tshi i vhona. Iwe Muṋe washu wo i shudufhadza, ndi zwine ya ḓo vha na mashudu lini na lini.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ngavhuya khosi Dafita a kunda Vhafilista, vha mu luvha, a vha dzhiela muḓi wa Gathi na miḓana yo u tangaho." 
1Chronicles18:2 Dafita a kunda na Vhamuaba, vha vha vhalanda vhawe, a vha thelisa mithelo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dafita a dovha a lwa na khosi Hadada Ezere wa Tsoba u vhuya u swika shangoni ḽa Hamathi, musi Hadada Ezere a tshi khou ya u dovha u luvhisa iḽo shango u navha na mulambo wa Yufuratha." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dafita a thuba gariki dzawe dza tshigidi na vhatshimbidzi vha dzigariki vha 7 000 na vhahali vha 20 000 vha tshimbilaho nga milenzhe. Dafita a holefhadza bere dzoṱhe, a tou sia dzi no kona u kokodza gariki dza ḓana fhedzi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Musi Vhaaramu vha Damasko vha tshi ḓa u ima na khosi Hadada Ezere wa Tsoba, Dafita a vhulaha Vhaaramu vha 22 000." 
1Chronicles18:6 Dafita a ṱoka mishasha ya mmbi muvhusoni wa Vhaaramu wa Damasko, Vhaaramu vha mu luvha vha thela muthelo. Muṋe washu a ita uri Dafita a kunde hoṱhe he a ya." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dafita a dzhia zwiṱangu zwa musuku zwe zwa vha zwi tshi farwa nga magota a Hadada Ezere a zwi isa Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles18:8 A dzhia na musinaseṱha munzhi miḓini ya Tibihathi na Khunu ye ya vha i tshi vhuswa nga Hadada Ezere. Ndi uyo musinaseṱha we Solomoni a sala a tshi ita ngawo thannge na dziphuphu na midzio ya thembele. 
1Chronicles18:9 Musi Thoi khosi ya Hamathi a tshi zwi pfa uri Dafita o kunda mmbi yoṱhe ya Hadada Ezere khosi ya Tsoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 a ruma ṅwana wawe Joramu ha khosi Dafita u yo mu resha na u mu fhululedza zwe a kunda Hadada Ezere nndwani, ngauri Hadada Ezere o vha a tshi endela u lwa na Thoi. Joramu a isela Dafita zwifhiwa zwa musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha." 
1Chronicles18:11 Khosi Dafita a kumedza Muṋe washu izwo zwithu sa zwe a ita nga siliva na musuku zwe a zwi dzhiela tshakha dzoṱhe dze a dzi kunda, dza Edomo na Muaba na Amoni na Filista na Amaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai ṅwana wa Tseruya o vhulaha Vhaedomo vha 18 000 Govhani ḽa Muṋo 
1Chronicles18:13 a konou ṱoka mishasha ya mmbi shangoni ḽa Edomo, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Edomo vha luvha Dafita. Muṋe washu a ita uri Dafita a kunde hoṱhe he a ya." 
1Chronicles18:14 Dafita a vhusa ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, a tshi tevhedza mulayo, a tshi tonda vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe." 
1Chronicles18:15 Mulangammbi o vha e Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya, Josafati ṅwana wa Ahiludu e tshanḓa tsha khosi," 
1Chronicles18:16 Tsadoko ṅwana wa Ahitubu na Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Abiathara vhe vhotshifhe, Shausha e muṅwaleli wa khosi," 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya ṅwana wa Jehoyada e mulangi wa vhalindi vha Dafita. Vhana vha khosi Dafita na vhone vho vha vhe vhakoma vhahulwane. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ngavhuya khosi Nahashi wa Vhaamoni a dzama, ṅwana wawe Hanunu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles19:2 Khosi Dafita a ri, “Hanunu ṅwana wa Nahashi ndi ḓo mu itela vhuthu nge khotsi awe a nnyitela vhuthu.” Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa ha Hanunu u yo imela nge khotsi awe a dzama. Musi vhanna vhe vha ruṅwa nga Dafita vha tshi swika ha Hanunu shangoni ḽa Vhaamoni uri vha mu ime maṱoni," 
1Chronicles19:3 vhahulwane vha Vhaamoni vha vhudza Hanunu vha ri, “Vha vhona unga Dafita u khou hulisa khotsi avho nga u ruma vhanna khavho u ḓa u imela? Izwi avha vhanna a vho ngo ḓa khavho u tandula shango na u ḽi fhiriṱanya uri vha ḽi kunde?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ndi hone Hanunu a tshi fara vhanna vhe vha rumiwa nga Dafita, a vha vheula, a fhafhula zwiambaro zwavho u guma nga maraho, a vha thatha." 
1Chronicles19:5 Dafita a tshi ḓivhiswa zwe vhaḓinḓa vhawe vha itwa, a ruma vhaḓinḓa u yo vha ṱanganedza, ngauri vho vha vho nyadziswa zwihulu. Khosi Dafita a ri, “Dzulani Jerikho ndebvu dzaṋu dzi vhuye dzi mele, ni konou vhuya.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Musi Vhaamoni vha tshi vhona uri vho no nukhela Dafita nga zwe vha ita, Hanunu na Vhaamoni vha bvisa khilogiramu dza 34 000 dza siliva ya u thola gariki na vhanameli vhadzo dzi tshi bva kha Vhaaramu vha Misopothamia na Vhaaramu vha Maakha na Tsoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Vha thola gariki dza 32 000 na vhanameli vhadzo, khathihi na khosi ya Maakha na mmbi yayo, vha ḓa vha ṱoka mishasha tsini na Medeba, ngeno Vhaamoni vho bva miḓini yavho vha rambana uri vha bve pfumo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dafita a tshi pfa izwo a ruma Juaba na mmbi yoṱhe ya vhahali. 
1Chronicles19:9 Vhaamoni vha bva vha yo ima muṋangoni wa muḓi wavho wa Raba, ngeno mahosi e a vha o ḓa u vha tikedza vho ima vhe vhoṱhe ḓakani." 
1Chronicles19:10 Juaba a vhona uri hu na mmbi dza maswina phanḓa hawe na murahu hawe, ndi hone a tshi nanga vhahali vhomakone vha Israele a vha vhea vho livhana na Vhaaramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Vhaṅwe vhanna vhoṱhe a ri vha langwe nga murathu wawe Abishai, vha vhewa vho livhana na Vhaamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Juaba a ri, “Arali Vhaaramu vha nkunda, ni ḓe ni mphalale, hone arali Vhaamoni vha ni kunda, nṋe ndi ḓo ḓa nda ni phalala." 
1Chronicles19:13 Khwaṱhani ri lwele vhathu vha hashu na miḓi ya Mudzimu washu ri sa ofhi. Muṋe washu u ḓo ita zwine a vhona zwi zwavhuḓi.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Ndi hone Juaba na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi tshoṱhela Vhaaramu, Vhaaramu vha mu shavha." 
1Chronicles19:15 Musi Vhaamoni vha tshi vhona uri Vhaaramu vha khou shavha, na vhone vha shavha murathu wawe Abishai vha dzhena muḓini. Juaba a humela Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Musi Vhaaramu vha tshi vhona uri vho kundwa nga Vhaisraele, vha ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ramba Vhaaramu vha seli ha Yufuratha, Shobakha mulangammbi wa Hadada Ezere ó vha ranga phanḓa." 
1Chronicles19:17 Musi Dafita a tshi zwi pfa, a ramba Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vha wela Jorodani, a yo vha dia, a vhea vhanna vhawe vha mmbi u livhana navho. Dafita a vhekanya mmbi dzawe uri a yo ṱangana na Vhaaramu i lwiwe, vhone vha lwa nae." 
1Chronicles19:18 Hone nndwa i tshi ṱangana Vhaaramu vha shavha Vhaisraele. Dafita a vhulaha vhanameli vhavho vha dzigariki vha 7 000 na vhahali vha tshimbilaho nga milenzhe vha 40 000. A vhulaha na Shobakha mulangammbi wavho. 
1Chronicles19:19 Musi mahosi e a vha a tshi vhuswa nga Hadada Ezere vha tshi vhona uri vho kundwa nga Vhaisraele, vha pfumedzana na Dafita vha mu luvha. Vhaaramu vha si tsha funa u dovha vha tikedza Vhaamoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Nga ṱhumalurere, musi mahosi a tshi bva pfumo, Juaba a ranga mmbi phanḓa a phusukanya shango ḽa Amoni, khosi Dafita a sala Jerusalema. Vha govhela muḓi wa Raba, vha u dia, vha u phusukanya." 
1Chronicles20:2 Milikhomu, mudzimu wa tshitungulo wa Vhaamoni, tsho vha tsho ambara khare ya musuku ya tshileme tsha khilogiramu dza 35, nahone yo vha i na ndalama khayo. Dafita a dzhia iyo ndalama a i lunzhedza kha khare yawe ya vhuhosi. Dafita a ita na u dzhia thundu nnzhi ye a i thuba afho muḓini a ṱuwa nayo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Dafita a dzhia vhathu vha muḓi a vha shumisa nga dzisaha na tshezela dza tsimbi na dzimbaḓo. Na vhaṅwe vhathu vha miḓi yoṱhe ya Amoni a vha ita zwenezwo. Ndi hone ene na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi humela Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles20:4 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha ho bviwa pfumo ha yo lwiwa na Vhafilista muḓini wa Gezere. Zwenezwo Sibekhai wa Husha a vhulaha muṅwe muswonḓa we a vha a tshi pfi Siphai, Vhafilista vha kundwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ha dovha ha lwiwa iṅwe nndwa na Vhafilista, Elihanani ṅwana wa Jairi a vhulaha Lahami wa Gathi, murathu wa Goliada. Pfumo ḽa Lahami ḽo vha ḽi na mufhiṋi wa vhudenya vhu no nga ha luṱanga lwa muhoṱi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ho lwiwa iṅwe nndwa Gathi. Henefho ho vha hu na muswonḓa wa minwe miṱanu na muthihi tshanḓani tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe na zwikunwane zwiṱanu na tshithihi mulenzheni muṅwe na muṅwe, zwo ṱangana zwa ita 24. Uyo na ene o vha e wa lutsinga lwa miswonḓa ya kale." 
1Chronicles20:7 A nyefula Vhaisraele, Jonathani ṅwana wa Shama mukomana wa Dafita a mu vhulaha." 
1Chronicles20:8 Havho vhararu vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa miswonḓa ya Gathi, hone vha vhulawa nga Dafita na vhanna vhawe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Saṱhane a vutshela Vhaisraele a ṱuṱuwedza Dafita uri a vha vhale. 
1Chronicles21:2 Dafita a laya mulangammbi Juaba na maṅwe magota a ri, “Iyani u vhala Vhaisraele u bva Bierisheba u swika Dani. No no fhedza ni ḓe ni mmbudze, ndi ḓivhe uri ndi vhangana.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Hone Juaba a fhindula a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi andisa mmbi dzawe kaḓana! Thovhele muṋe wanga, vhathu avha vhoṱhe a si vhalanda vhavho naa? Izwi vha zwi itelani? Vha hweselani Vhaisraele mulandu?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Hone Dafita a si thetshelese mafhungo a Juaba. Ndi hone Juaba a tshi ṱuwa a buḓekanye ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, a konou vhuya Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Juaba a vhudza khosi Dafita tshivhalo tsha vhanna vho teaho u bva pfumo. Kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele ho vha hu na vhanna vha 1 100 000 vhe vha vha vha tshi kona u bva pfumo, kha ḽa Juda vhe 470 000." 
1Chronicles21:6 Hone Juaba ho ngo vhala vha tsinde ḽa Livi na Benyamini, nge a vha a sa funi ndaela." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ndaela iyo na Mudzimu o vhona yo vhifha, ndi zwe a rwa Vhaisraele." 
1Chronicles21:8 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi amba na Mudzimu a ri, “Ndo khakha zwihulu nga u ita hezwi! Zwino nkhangwele zwe nda tshinya. Ndo ita zwa vhutsilu.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Muṋe washu a vhudza Gadi muporofita wa Dafita a ri," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Tshimbila u yo vhudza Dafita u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Ndi na ṱhamu tharu. Iwe nanga nthihi ine nda nga u rwa ngayo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Gadi a ya ha Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Iwe u nanga zwifhio?" 
1Chronicles21:12 U nanga miṅwaha miraru ya nḓala? Kana u nanga miṅwedzi miraru u tshi khou shavha maswina au a tshi khou u pandamedza o fara mafumo? Kana u nanga maḓuvha mararu Yahavee a tshi khou u tovhola nga pfumo ḽawe, a tshi ḓisa dwadze shangoni ḽau, muruṅwa wawe a tshi vhulaha vhathu shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele?’ Zwino-ha, nga vha elekanye zwine nda ḓo vhudza we a nthuma.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dafita a fhindula Gadi a ri, “Ndo hanganea! Nga ndi wele zwanga zwanḓani zwa Muṋe washu, ngauri Ene u na khathutshelo khulu, hone ndi songo wela zwanḓani zwa vhathu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓisela Vhaisraele dwadze, ha fa Vhaisraele vha 70 000." 
1Chronicles21:15 Mudzimu a ruma muruṅwa u yo phusukanya Jerusalema. Hone musi muruṅwa e vhukati, Muṋe washu a zwi vhona, a pfa vhuṱungu nga mulandu wa iyo khombo, a vhudza muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou lozwa vhathu a ri, “Zwo eḓana! Humisa tshanḓa tshau!” Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o vha o no ima luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dafita a tshi lilala a vhona muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o ima vhukati ha ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, o ṱomola banga o ḽi fara nga tshanḓa, ḽo sumba Jerusalema. Ndi hone Dafita na vhahulwane vha tshi wa nga zwifhaṱuwo vho ambara madzanganda." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dafita a rabela a ri, “Ndi nṋe we nda ri vhanna vho teaho u bva pfumo vha vhaliwe. Ndi nṋe we nda tshinya nda ita tshivhi. Vhathu havha vha tou vha dzinngu. Vho tshinyani? Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, lifhedza nṋe na muṱa wanga, hone dwadze heḽi ḽi songo dzula kha vhathu vhau.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a tshi laya Gadi uri a yo vhudza Dafita a gonye a yo fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Dafita a thetshelesa zwe Gadi a mu vhudza nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, a gonya a ya." 
1Chronicles21:20 Arauna o vha a tshi khou fhula goroi. A tshi rembuluwa a vhona muruṅwa, vhana vhawe vhaṋa vhe a vha e navho vha dzumbama." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi swika, Arauna a sedza a mu vhona, a ṱuwa luvhatani lwa u fhulela, a yo gwadama phanḓa ha Dafita tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha kwama fhasi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dafita a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha nthengisele luvhata lwavho lwa u fhulela ndi fhaṱele Muṋe washu aḽiṱari uri dwadze ḽo faraho vhathu ḽi fhele. Vha nthengisele nga mutengo wo fhelelaho.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Arauna a vhudza Dafita a ri, “Nga vha lu dzhie! Thovhele muṋe wanga nga vha ite zwine vha funa. Nṋe ndi ḓo bvisa dziphulu dza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, zwifhulo zwa vha khuni, goroi ya vha nduvho ya thoro. Zwoṱhe hezwo ndi ḓo vha ṋea.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Huno khosi Dafita a fhindula Arauna a ri, “Aiwa nandi, nga vha litshe ndi renge nga mutengo wo fhelelaho. Ndi nga si ise ha Muṋe washu zwi re zwavho kana nda mu ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho ndi songo bvisa tshithu.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi renga ulwo luvhata kha Arauna nga mangwende a musuku a 600. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dafita a fhaṱela Muṋe washu aḽiṱari henefho, a mu ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhuthihi. Dafita a rabela Muṋe washu, Muṋe washu a mu fhindula nga u ḓisa mulilo u bvaho ḽiṱaḓulu wa wela kha aḽiṱari ya tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba na uḽa muruṅwa a vhuedzedza banga ḽawe kha tshilanda tshaḽo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Zwenezwo musi Dafita o vhona uri Muṋe washu o fhindula thabelo yawe luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi, a ḓi ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo henefho." 
1Chronicles21:29 Dennde ya Muṋe washu ye Mushe a i akha phangani, na aḽiṱari ya tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho misi iyo zwo vha zwi zwikwarani zwa Gibioni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Hone Dafita o vha a sa koni u ya phanḓa hayo u yo vhudzisa Mudzimu ngauri o vha a tshi ofha banga ḽa muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu. 
1Chronicles22:1 Ndi zwe Dafita a ri, “Hafhano ndi hune nnḓu ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu ya fanela u vha hone, khathihi na aḽiṱari ya tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha Vhaisraele.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Ndi hone khosi Dafita a tshi bvisa ndaela ya uri vhatsinda vhoṱhe vha dzulaho kha ḽa Israele vha kuvhangane, kha vhenevho a vhea vhavhaḓi vha matombo vha vhaḓa matombo a u fhaṱa nnḓu ya Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles22:3 A ḓisa tsimbi nnzhi ya u ita zwibigiri zwa mahothi a miṋango na mikungelo na musinaseṱha u si na vhukono. 
1Chronicles22:4 A ḓisa na matanda manzhi a mukedara a sa vhalei, ngauri vhathu vha Sidoni na vha Tiro vho ḓisa matanda manzhi ha Dafita." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dafita a ri, “Ṅwananga Solomoni u tshee muṱuku, ha athu ḓivha tshithu, huno nnḓu ine ya ḓo fhaṱelwa Muṋe washu tshakha dzoṱhe dzi fanela u i vhona i khulu, i na bvumo, i na vhugala. Zwenezwo ndi ḓo mu lugisela.” Ndi zwe Dafita a wana thundu yayo nnzhi ya dzula yo lindela a sa athu dzama." 
1Chronicles22:6 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhidzisa ṅwana wawe Solomoni, a mu hwesa mushumo wa u fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele nnḓu." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dafita a vhudza Solomoni a ri, “Ṅwananga, nṋe ndo vha ndi tshi zwi funa u fhaṱela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga nnḓu." 
1Chronicles22:8 Hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa kha nṋe ḽa ri, ‘Wo shululesa malofha, wa lwa nndwa nnzhi. A si iwe ane wa ḓo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga nnḓu, ngauri wo shululesa malofha fhano fhasi ndi tshi zwi vhona." 
1Chronicles22:9 Hone u ḓo vha na ṅwana ane a ḓo vha munna wa mulalo na vhudziki, ndi ḓo ita uri a vhuse ḽo dzika, maswina awe a re masia oṱhe a sa mu dini. U ḓo pfi Solomoni (Muladzashango), Vhaisraele ndi ḓo vha ṋea mulalo na vhudziki musi a tshi vhusa." 
1Chronicles22:10 Onoyo ndi ene ane a ḓo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga nnḓu. U ḓo vha ṅwananga, Nṋe nda vha khotsi awe. Ndi ḓo pfumbisa khuluṋoni ya muvhuso wawe a vhusa Vhaisraele lini na lini.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 “Zwino ṅwananga, ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha na inwi, ngavhe zwi tshi ni nakela na fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nnḓu, unga o amba uri ni ḓo zwi ita." 
1Chronicles22:12 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ni ṋea nḓivho na vhuṱali musi a tshi ni vhea uri ni vhuse Vhaisraele uri ni vhulunge mulayo wa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. 
1Chronicles22:13 Arali ni tshi tevhedza ndayo na milayo ye Muṋe washu a i fha Mushe uri a fhe Vhaisraele na zwi vhulunga nga vhusedzi, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela. Khwaṱhani-ha, ni vhe na nungo. Ni songo ofha, ni songo kulea nungo." 
1Chronicles22:14 Nṋe ndo ḓidina nda wana thundu ya u fhaṱa thembele ya Muṋe washu, nda kuvhanganya musuku wa thani dzi fhiraho 3 400 na siliva ya thani dzi fhiraho 34 000 na musinaseṱha munzhi na tsimbi nnzhi zwi si na vhukono, na matanda na matombo. Inwi ni nga ḓi engedza zwiṅwe." 
1Chronicles22:15 Ni na vhashumi vhanzhi: vhavhaḓi vha matombo na vhafhaṱi na vhavhaḓi vha thanda khathihi na vhanna vha vhatsila kha mishumo yoṱhe,"
