1Chronicles22:16 kha musuku na siliva, musinaseṱha na tsimbi, ndi vhatsila vha si na mbalo. Zwino thomani mushumo, ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha na inwi.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi laya vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha Israele uri vha farise ṅwana wawe Solomoni. 
1Chronicles22:18 Dafita a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu ho ngo ḓi vha na inwi? Ho ngo ni ladzela shango masia oṱhe? O nkumedza vhadzulapo vha ḽino shango nda vha kunda, shango ḽino ḽa luvha Muṋe washu na vhathu vhawe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ndi zwone, shumelani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine na vha zwone. Thomani u fhaṱa thembele ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu, uri ni kone u isa mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu na zwithu zwikhethwa zwa Mudzimu thembeleni ine ya ḓo fhaṱelwa dzina ḽa Muṋe washu.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Musi Dafita o no kalaha, o no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha, a vhea ṅwana wawe Solomoni a vha khosi ya Israele." 
1Chronicles23:2 Khosi Dafita a kuvhanganya vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele, khathihi na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ha vhaliwa Vhalivi vha re na miṅwaha ya 30 kana u fhira, tshivhalo tshoṱhe tsha vhanna tsha ita 38 000." 
1Chronicles23:4 Dafita a ri, “Kha vhenevha, vha 24 000 vha lange mushumo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu, vha 6 000 vha vhe magota na vhahaṱuli vha milandu." 
1Chronicles23:5 Vha 4 000 vha vhe vhalindakhoro, vha 4 000 vha rende Muṋe washu nga zwilidzo zwe zwa itelwa zwenezwo.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Dafita a khethekanya Vhalivi nga zwigwada zwiraru, zwi tshi tevhedza vhana vha Livi: Gerisoni na Kehathi na Mirari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gerisoni o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Ladani na Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladani o vha e na vhana vhararu. Muhulwane wavho o vha e Jehiele, ha konou tevhela Zethamu na Juele." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shimei o vha e na vhana vhararu, Shelomithi na Haziele na Harani. Vho vha vhe vhone ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Shimei o vha e na vhana vhaṋa, Jahathi na Zisa na Jeushi na Beria," 
1Chronicles23:11 vha tshi tevhekana nga u bebwa havho. Zisa na Jeushi a vho ngo vha na vhana vhanzhi, zwenezwo vho vha vha tshi vhaliwa sa muṱa muthihi." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kehathi o vha e na vhana vhaṋa, Amuramu na Izhara na Hebroni na Uziele." 
1Chronicles23:13 Ṅwana wawe wa tanzhe, Amuramu, o vha e khotsi a Aroni na Mushe. Aroni na vha lutsinga lwawe vho vha vho khethelwa thungo uri vha londole zwithu zwikhethwakhethwa lini na lini, vha fhise zwioro hu tshi luvhiwa Muṋe washu, vha mu shumele, vha shudufhadze vhathu nga dzina ḽawe." 
1Chronicles23:14 Huno vhana vha Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu vho vha vho baḓekana na Vhalivi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Mushe o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Gerisoni na Eliesere." 
1Chronicles23:16 Murangaphanḓa wa vhana vha Gerisoni o vha e Shubaele. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliesere o vha e na ṅwana muthihi fhedzi, Rehabia, hone Rehabia a vha na vhana vhanzhi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ṅwana wa Kehathi wa vhuvhili, Izhara, o vha na ṅwana we a vha a tshi pfi Shelomithi, ene ṱhoho ya uyo mutupo." 
1Chronicles23:19 Ṅwana wa Kehathi wa vhuraru, Hebroni, o vha e na vhana vhaṋa, Jeria na Amaria na Jehasiele na Jekamiamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Ṅwana wa Kehathi wa vhuṋa, Uziele, o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Mika na Ishia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Mirari o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Mahali na Mushi. Mahali na ene o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Eliasara na Kishi," 
1Chronicles23:22 hone Eliasara o fa a si na vhana vha vhatuka, e na vhananyana fhedzi. Vhananyana vhawe vha dzewa nga khaladzi dzavho vhana vha Kishi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ṅwana wa Mirari wa vhuvhili, Mushi, o vha e na vhana vhararu, Mahali na Edere na Jeremotho." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ndi vhone vha lutsinga lwa Livi, zwi tshi ya nga mitupo na miṱa, muṅwe na muṅwe wavho o tou ṅwalwa dzina ḽawe. Muṅwe na muṅwe wa lutsinga lwawe, wa miṅwaha ya 20 na u fhira afho, o vha o kovhelwa mushumo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles23:25 Dafita o vha o ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o ladzela vhathu vhawe shango nahone Ene nga dzawe u ḓo dzula Jerusalema lini na lini." 
1Chronicles23:26 Vhalivi a vha tsha ḓo hwala dennde ya Muṋe washu na zwithu zwoṱhe zwine zwa shumiswa hu tshi luvhiwa.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Vhalivi vha miṅwaha ya 20 na u fhira vho vha vha tshi vhaliwa, hu tshi tevhedzwa ndaela dza u fhiledza dza Dafita." 
1Chronicles23:28 Mushumo wa Vhalivi wo vha u wa u farisa vha lutsinga lwa Aroni kha mushumo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu, vha tshi londola miṱa ya thembele na dzikamara dza nga ngomu na u kumulula zwithu zwikhethwa zwoṱhe na u shuma miṅwe mishumo nḓuni ya Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles23:29 Vho vha vha tshi vhona uri hu vhe na vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu na vhukhopfu ha nduvho dza thoro na vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa na nduvho dzo bagiwaho na vhukhopfu ho vangwaho mapfura a muolivi na u kala na u ela nduvho dza thembeleni. 
1Chronicles23:30 Vho vha vha tshi ita na u ima matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe vha tshi livhuha na u renda Muṋe washu, vha tshi ḓi ita zwenezwo nga madekwana" 
1Chronicles23:31 na musi Muṋe washu a tshi ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho nga Sabatha na nga vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi muswa na nga vhuṱambo ho vhewaho. Ho vha ho vhewa ndayo dzine dza sumba tshivhalo tsha Vhalivi vhane vha fanela u shuma mushumo hoyo tshifhinga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe. Vhalivi vho vha vho ṋewa mushumo wa u luvha Muṋe washu lini na lini. 
1Chronicles23:32 Vhalivi vho vha vha tshi shuma mushumo wavho wa dennde ya u ṱangana na Muṋe washu, vha tshi shuma fhethu hukhethwa, vha tshi langwa nga mashaka avho vha lutsinga lwa Aroni, vha tshi shuma thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ngezwi zwigwada zwa vha lutsinga lwa Aroni. Aroni o vha e na vhana vhaṋa, ndi Nadaba na Abihu na Eliasara na Ithamara." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadaba na Abihu vho fa khotsi avho a tshi kha ḓi tshila, nahone vho vha vha si na vhana vha vhatuka; vharathu vhavho Eliasara na Ithamara vha vha vhotshifhe." 
1Chronicles24:3 Khosi Dafita a vhekanya vha lutsinga lwa Aroni nga zwigwada zwi tshi ya nga mishumo yavho, a zwi ita a tshi fariswa nga Tsadoko wa lutsinga lwa Eliasara na nga Ahimelekhe, wa lutsinga lwa Ithamara." 
1Chronicles24:4 Vha lutsinga lwa Eliasara vho vhekanywa nga zwigwada zwa 16, ngeno vha lutsinga lwa Ithamara vho vhekanywa nga zwigwada zwiṱanu na zwiraru, hezwo zwo itwa nge ha vha hu na vhanna vhanzhi vhe vha vha vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa kha vha lutsinga lwa Eliasara." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ho vha hu na vhakoma vha thembele, vha zwa Mudzimu, kha vha lutsinga lwa Eliasara khathihi na lwa Ithamara, ndi zwe vha kovhelwa mishumo nga u ita madeṅwa." 
1Chronicles24:6 Vha lutsinga lwa Eliasara na lwa Ithamara vho vha vha tshi tou sielisana u ita madeṅwa, hu tshi khethwa zwigwada zwivhili zwa Eliasara na tshithihi tsha Ithamara, zwivhili zwa Eliasara na tshithihi tsha Eliasara, vha konou ṅwalwa nga Shemaya ṅwana wa Nathaniele, muṅwaleli wa Mulivi, khosi na magota ayo na tshifhe Tsadoko na Ahimelekhe ṅwana wa Abiathara na ṱhoho dza miṱa ya vhotshifhe, vhoṱhe vha vha dziṱhanzi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Zwigwada zwavho zwo tevhekana nga nḓila hei vhó khethwa nga madeṅwa: 
1Chronicles24:8 1 Jehoyaribi 13 Hupha 2 Jedaya 14 Jeshebiaba 3 Harimu 15 Biliga 4 Siarimu 16 Imere 5 Malikhiya 17 Heziri 6 Miyamini 18 Haphitsetse 7 Hakotsi 19 Phethahia 8 Abia 20 Esekiele 9 Jeshua 21 Jakhini 10 Shekania 22 Gamuli 11 Eliashibi 23 Delaya 12 Jakimu 24 Maasia 
1Chronicles24:9 Vhanna avho vho ṅwalwa madzina avho zwi tshi tevhedza mishumo yavho musi vha tshi dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, hu tshi tevhedzwa ndayo dzo vhetshelwaho vhone nga makhulukuku wavho Aroni, nga he Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a mu laya." 
1Chronicles24:10 Vhaṅwe ṱhoho dza miṱa vha lutsinga lwa Livi ngevha: Shubaele wa lutsinga lwa Amuramu na Jedia wa lutsinga lwa Shubaele 
1Chronicles24:11 na Ishia wa lutsinga lwa Rehabia 
1Chronicles24:12 na Shelomithi wa lutsinga lwa Izhara na Jahathi wa lutsinga lwa Shelomithi. 
1Chronicles24:13 Vha lutsinga lwa Hebroni ndi vhaṋa, ndi Jeria na Amaria na Jehaziele na Jekamiamu, vha tshi tevhekana nga u bebwa havho." 
1Chronicles24:14 Wa lutsinga lwa Uziele o vha e Mika, wa lutsinga lwa Mika o vha e Shamiri." 
1Chronicles24:15 Murathu wa Mika o vha e Ishia, ṱhoho ya muṱa wa lutsinga lwa Ishia e Zakaria." 
1Chronicles24:16 Vha lutsinga lwa Mirari ndi Mahali na Mushi vhaḓuhulu vha Jaasia. 
1Chronicles24:17 Vhaṅwe vhana vha Jaasia ndi Shohamu na Zakhuru na Ibiri. 
1Chronicles24:18 Mahali o vha e na vhana vhavhili, Eliasara na Kishi, hone Eliasara o vha a si na vhana vha vhatuka." 
1Chronicles24:19 Kishi o vha e na ṅwana muthihi we a vha tshi pfi Jeramiele. 
1Chronicles24:20 Mushi o vha e na vhana vhararu, ndi Mahali na Edere na Jeremotho. Ndi vhone Vhalivi vha tshi ya nga miṱa yavho." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ṱhoho ya muṱa muṅwe na muṅwe wa vharathu vhawe vho vha vha tshi ita madeṅwa a mishumo yavho, u ḓi nga mashaka avho vhotshifhe vha lutsinga lwa Aroni, vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓi ita nga u ralo, vha zwi ita vhe na khosi Dafita na Tsadoko na Ahimelekhe na ṱhoho dza miṱa ya vhotshifhe na ya Vhalivi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Khosi Dafita na vharangaphanḓa vha Vhalivi vha nanga mitupo heino ya Vhalivi uri vha vhe vharangaphanḓa hu tshi luvhiwa Mudzimu, ndi vha Asafu na Hemani na Jeduthuni. Vho vha vha tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu hu tshi lila dziharipa na madende na simbala. Mutevhe wa madzina a vhathu vho nangiwaho uri vha range phanḓa hu tshi luvhiwa, na mushumo une tshigwada tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsha u shuma, ndi hoyu." 
1Chronicles25:2 Vhana vhaṋa vha Asafu vho vha vhe Zakhuru na Josefa na Nethania na Asarela. Vhone vho vha vho rangwa phanḓa nga Asafu, a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu musi khosi yo bvisa ndaela." 
1Chronicles25:3 Vhana vhaṱanu na muthihi vha Jeduthuni vho vha vhe Gedalia na Tseri na Yesaya na Shimei na Hashabia na Mathithia. Vhone vho vha vho rangwa phanḓa nga khotsi avho Jeduthuni, vha tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu, vha tshi imba nyimbo dza u renda na u livhuha Muṋe washu hu tshi lila dziharipa." 
1Chronicles25:4 Vhana vha Hemani vho vha vhe Bukia na Mathania na Uziele na Shubaele na Jerimotho na Hanania na Hanani na Eliatha na Gidalathi na Romamathi Ezere na Joshobekasha na Malothi na Hothiri na Mahasiotho. 
1Chronicles25:5 Mudzimu o ṋea Hemani, muporofita wa khosi, vhana havho vha 14 vha vhatuka na vhananyana vhararu, nga he a vha o fulufhedzisa, uri a ṋee Hemani maanḓa." 
1Chronicles25:6 Vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi lidza simbala na madende na dziharipa vho rangwa phanḓa nga khotsi avho, hu tshi luvhiwa Muṋe washu thembeleni. Asafu na Jeduthuni na Hemani vho vha vha tshi langiwa nga khosi." 
1Chronicles25:7 Vhanna havho vhoṱhe vha 24 vho vha vhe vhomakone, u ḓi nga Vhalivi vha havho vho vha vho gudiswa zwa u imba. Vhanna vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 288." 
1Chronicles25:8 Vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi ita madeṅwa u vhona vhane ḽa vha diso ḽavho, vha nga vha vhe vhahulwane kana vhaṱuku, vhomakone kana vhane vha kha ḓi gudiswa." 
1Chronicles26:1 Na vhalindakhoro vha thembele vho vha vho khethekanywa nga zwigwada. Vha mutupo wa Kora ho vha hu na Meshelemia ṅwana wa Kore, wa muṱa wa Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemia o vha e na vhana vhaṱanu na vhavhili, vho ṅwalwaho nga u tevhekana ha u bebwa havho, ndi Zakaria na Jediele na Zebadia na Jathaniele" 
1Chronicles26:3 na Elamu na Jehohanani na Elihwenai. 
1Chronicles26:4 Ha dovha ha vha na Obede Edomo we Mudzimu a vha o mu shudufhadza nga u mu fha vhana vhaṱanu na vhararu, vho ṅwalwa nga u tevhekana ha u bebwa havho ndi Shemaya na Jehozabadi na Jua na Sakhara na Nathaniele" 
1Chronicles26:5 na Amiele na Isakhara na Pheulethai. 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya tanzhe ḽa Obede Edomo o vha e na vhana vhaṱanu na muthihi, vhe vha vha vhe vharangaphanḓa muṱani wa khotsi avho nge vha vha vhe na vhukoni vhuhulu." 
1Chronicles26:7 Vhana vha Shemaya ndi Othini na Refaele na Obede na Elizabadi na Elihu na Semakhia. Avho vhavhili vha u fhedzisela vho vha vhe na mpho khulu. 
1Chronicles26:8 Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa Obede Edomo, vhone na vhana vhavho na mashaka avho vho vha vhe na vhukoni, vhe na nungo dza u shuma, vha lutsinga lwa Obede Edomo vhoṱhe vho vha vhe 62." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemia o vha e na vhana na mashaka vhe vha vha vhe na vhukoni, vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 18." 
1Chronicles26:10 Vha mutupo wa Mirari ho vha hu na Hosa, we a vha e na vhana vhaṋa, ndi Shimiri – khotsi awe o mu ita murangaphanḓa naho o vha e si tanzhe –" 
1Chronicles26:11 vhaṅwe ndi Hilikia na Tebalia na Zakaria. Vhalindathembele vha muṱa wa Hosa vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 13. 
1Chronicles26:12 Vhalindathembele vho vha vho khethekanywa nga zwigwada, zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho, vha ṋewa mishumo thembeleni, u ḓi nga vhaṅwe Vhalivi." 
1Chronicles26:13 Vho vha vha tshi ita madeṅwa a khoro iṅwe na iṅwe zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho hu sa ṱalulwi muhulwane na muṱuku. 
1Chronicles26:14 Deṅwa ḽa khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha ḽa wela kha Shelemia. Ha itwa madeṅwa a ṅwana wawe Zakaria, we a vha e mueletshedzi wa vhuṱali, ene a welwa nga deṅwa ḽa khoro ya devhula." 
1Chronicles26:15 Deṅwa ḽa khoro ya tshipembe ḽa wela kha Obede Edomo, ḽa nnḓu ya mbulungelo ḽa wela kha vhana vhawe." 
1Chronicles26:16 Madeṅwa a khoro ya vhukovhela na khoro ya Shalekhethe nḓilani ya nṱha a wela kha Shuphimu na Hosa. Mishumo ya u linda yo vha yo khethekanywa nga zwifhinga zwo vhewaho, zwi tshi tou tevhekana." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ho vha hu na Vhalivi vhaṱanu na muthihi ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha, thungo ya devhula ha vha na vhaṋa ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe, thungo ya tshipembe ha vha na vhaṋa, nḓuni ya mbulungelo ha vha na vhavhili nga tshifhinga tshithihi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Tsini na muṱa nga vhukovhela ho vha hu na vhaṋa nḓilani, muṱani wone uṋe hú na vhavhili." 
1Chronicles26:19 Izwo zwo vha zwi zwone zwigwada zwa vhalindakhoro vha lutsinga lwa Kora na Mirari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Vhaṅwe vha Vhalivi vha havho vho vha vha tshi londola tshisiku tsha thembele ya Mudzimu na nnḓu dza mbulungelo dza nduvho dzo kumedzwaho Mudzimu. 
1Chronicles26:21 Ladani, muṅwe wa vhana vha Gerisoni, o vha e makhulukuku wa zwigwada zwa miṱa, hu tshi katelwa na ṅwana wawe Jehiele." 
1Chronicles26:22 Vhaṅwe vhana vhavhili vha Ladani, Zethamu na Juele, vho vha vha tshi londola zwisiku zwa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles26:23 Na vha lutsinga lwa Amuramu na Izhara ha Hebroni na Uziele vho vha vhe na mishumo yavho. 
1Chronicles26:24 Shubaele, wa lutsinga lwa Gerisoni ṅwana wa Mushe, o vha e ene mukoma muhulwane a langaho zwisiku zwa thembele." 
1Chronicles26:25 Vhe vha shumisana nae vho vha vhe vha lutsinga lwa Eliesere nga hei nḓila: Eliesere o vha e khotsi a Rehabia, khotsi a Yesaya, khotsi a Joramu, khotsi a Zikhiri, khotsi a Shelomithi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomithi na mashaka awe vho vha vha tshi londola nduvho dzoṱhe dzo kumedzwaho Mudzimu nga khosi Dafita na ṱhoho dza miṱa na vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane na vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha mmbi. 
1Chronicles26:27 Vha dzhia iṅwe thundu yo thubiwaho nndwani vha i kumedza uri i vuse thembele ya Muṋe washu. 
1Chronicles26:28 Shelomithi na mashaka awe vho vha vha tshi londola zwoṱhe zwo kumedzwaho uri zwi shume thembeleni, hu tshi angaredzwa zwifhiwa zwo ḓiswaho nga muporofita Samuele na nga Saulo ṅwana wa Kishi na nga Abinere ṅwana wa Nere na nga Juaba ṅwana wa Tseruya." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kha vha lutsinga lwa Izhara, Khenania na vhana vhawe vho vha vho hweswa mishumo kule na thembele, vhe vhakoma vha tshi lamukanya Vhaisraele." 
1Chronicles26:30 Kha vha lutsinga lwa Hebroni, Hashabia na mashaka awe vha 1 700, vhanna vha konaho, vho vha vho vhewa uri vha lange mushumo woṱhe wa Muṋe washu na mushumo wa khosi kha ḽa Israele vhukovhela ha mulambo wa Jorodani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Murangaphanḓa wa vha lutsinga lwa Hebroni o vha e Jeria, izwo zwi vhonala kha maṅwalwa a lutsinga lwa miṱa yavho. Nga ṅwaha wa 40 wa muvhuso wa Dafita, ho ṱoḓiseswa kha maṅwalwa, ha wanala vhahali vhomakone vha lutsinga lwa Hebroni vha tshi dzula Jasere kha ḽa Giliadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Jeria o vha e na mashaka a 2 700, vhe vhanna vhomakone nahone vhe ṱhoho dza miṱa, zwino khosi Dafita a vha vhea uri vha lange tsinde ḽa Rubeni na ḽa Gadi na ḽa Manase wa vhubvaḓuvha mafhungoni oṱhe a zwa Mudzimu na a khosi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ho vha hu na mutevhe wa Vhaisraele wa ṱhoho dza miṱa na vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane na vhakoma vhavho, vhe vha vha vha tshi shumela khosi kha zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi tshi kwama zwigwada zwa mmbi dze dza vha dzi mushumoni ṅwedzi nga ṅwedzi ṅwaha woṱhe. Tshigwada tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho vha tshi na vhanna vha 24 000. Ngoyu mutevhe na vharangaphanḓa vhavho:" 
1Chronicles27:2 Ṅwedzi wa u thoma: Jashobiamu ṅwana wa Zabudiele, wa lutsinga lwa Pheretse. O vha e ene muhulwane wa vhalangammbi vhoṱhe vha tshigwada tshawe." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili: Dodai wa lutsinga lwa Ahohi. Murangaphanḓa wa vhalangammbi o vha e Mikilotho. Ṅwedzi wa vhuraru: Benaya ṅwana wa tshifhe Jehoyada. Ene o vha e muṅwe wa Vhahali vha 30. Musi a tshi vha murangaphanḓa wavho ṅwana wawe Amizabadi a vha murangaphanḓa wa itsho tshigwada vhudzuloni hawe. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa: Asaele murathu wa Juaba, ngavhuya ṅwana wawe Zebadia a vha mulangi wa itsho tshigwada vhudzuloni hawe. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu: Shamuhuthu wa lutsinga lwa Izhara. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi: Ira ṅwana wa Ikeshe wa Thekua. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili: Heletse a no bva Pheloni, wa tsinde ḽa Efraimi. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuraru: Sibekhai a no bva Husha, wa mutupo wa Zera. Ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa: Abiesere wa Anathotho kha ḽa Benyamini. Ṅwedzi wa fumi: Maharai wa Netofa, wa mutupo wa Zera. Ṅwedzi wa fumi na vhuthihi: Benaya wa Phirathoni kha ḽa Efraimi. Ṅwedzi wa fumi na vhuvhili: Heledai wa Netofa, wa lutsinga lwa Othoniele." 
1Chronicles27:4 Magota a matsinde a Vhaisraele ndi haya: Rubeni Eliesere ṅwana wa Zikhiri Simioni Shefatia ṅwana wa Maakha 
1Chronicles27:5 Livi Hashabia ṅwana wa Kemuele Aroni Tsadoko 
1Chronicles27:6 Juda Elihu, murathu wa Dafita Isakhara Omuri ṅwana wa Mikaele" 
1Chronicles27:7 Zebuloni Ishimaya ṅwana wa Obadia Nafuthali Jerimotho ṅwana wa Azariele 
1Chronicles27:8 Efraimi Hosia ṅwana wa Azasia Vha Manase vha vhukovhela Juele ṅwana wa Phedaya 
1Chronicles27:9 Vha Manase vha vhubvaḓuvha Ido ṅwana wa Zakaria Benyamini Jaasiele ṅwana wa Abinere 
1Chronicles27:10 Dani Azarele ṅwana wa Jerohamu. Hayo ndi one magota a Vhaisraele. 
1Chronicles27:11 Khosi Dafita a tshi vhala vhathu ho ngo ṅwala vhe vha vha vha sa athu vha na miṅwaha ya 20 kana vhaṱuku kha avho, nge Muṋe washu a vha o fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo andisa Vhaisraele vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni." 
1Chronicles27:12 Juaba, ṅwana wa musadzi we a vha a tshi pfi Tseruya, a thoma u vhala vhanna, hone a si fhedze. Vhaisraele vha welwa nga khombo nga mulandu wa u vhalwa uho ha vhathu, tshivhalo tsha vhathu tsha si ṅwalwe kha bugu ya Histori ya khosi Dafita." 
1Chronicles27:13 Nnḓu dza mbulungelo dza musanda dzo vha dzi tshi langwa nga Asimavethe ṅwana wa Adiele. Nnḓu dza mbulungelo madzinguni a re nnḓa na dziḓoroboni na miḓanani na thawarani dza u linda dzo vha dzi tshi langwa nga Jonathani ṅwana wa Uzia. 
1Chronicles27:14 Vhashumi vha masimuni vho vha vha tshi langwa nga Esri ṅwana wa Khelubu. 
1Chronicles27:15 Masimu a minḓirivhe o vha a tshi langwa nga Shimei wa Rama. Waini i tshee masimuni a minḓirivhe yo vha i tshi langwa nga Zabudi wa Shefamu. 
1Chronicles27:16 Miri ya miolivi na mihuyu zwigodini yo vha i tshi langwa nga Baali Hanani wa Gedere. Mapfura a miolivi o vha a tshi langwa nga Juashi. 
1Chronicles27:17 Masambi a kholomo dzi fulaho mudavhini wa Sharoni o vha a tshi langwa nga Shitirai wa Sharoni. Masambi a kholomo dzi re magovhani o vha a tshi langwa nga Shafati ṅwana wa Adilai. 
1Chronicles27:18 Gamela dzo vha dzi tshi langwa nga Obili wa Muishmaele. Donngi dzo vha dzi tshi langwa nga Jedaya wa Meronotho. 
1Chronicles27:19 Masambi a nngu o vha a tshi langwa nga Jazisi wa Muhagara. Avho vho vha vhe vhone vhalangi vha thundu ya khosi Dafita. 
1Chronicles27:20 Jonathani khotsimunene wa khosi Dafita, o vha e mueletshedzi a re na vhuṱali nahone e muḓivhi wa maṅwalo. Onoyo Jonathani na Jehiele ṅwana wa Hakhamoni vho vha vha tshi funza vhana vha khosi vha vhatuka." 
1Chronicles27:21 Mueletshedzi wa khosi o vha e Ahithofele, ngeno Hushai wa Muarakhi o vha e khonani ya khosi a dovha a vha mueletshedzi." 
1Chronicles27:22 Ahithofele o ri u fa, Jehoyada ṅwana wa Benaya na Abiathara vha vha vhaeletshedzi vhudzuloni hawe. Mulangammbi wa mmbi ya Dafita o vha e Juaba." 
1Chronicles28:1 Khosi Dafita a ramba vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele uri vha kuvhangane Jerusalema. Ha kuvhangana vhahulwana vha matsinde oṱhe na vhalangi vha zwigwada zwi no shumela khosi na vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane na vhakoma vha no langa thundu yoṱhe na zwifuwo zwa khosi na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka, khathihi na vhakoma vha pfamo na vhahali na vhoṱhe vha no bva pfumo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Khosi Dafita a takuwa a ima nga milenzhe a amba navho a ri, “Inwi vha hashu, inwi vhathu vhanga, nthetsheleseni. Mbilu yanga yo vha i tshi zwi funa u fhaṱa nnḓu hune mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu ya ḓo dzula hone, ya vha maalo a Mudzimu washu, nahone ndo dzudzanya uri i fhaṱiwe." 
1Chronicles28:3 Huno Mudzimu o mmbudza a ri, ‘U songo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga nnḓu, ngauri iwe u muhali wa nndwa, wo shululesa malofha.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o nanga nṋe kha muṱa wa hashu woṱhe uri ndi vhe khosi ya Israele lini na lini. O nanga Juda uri a vhe murangaphanḓa, kha nnḓu ya Juda a nanga muṱa wa hashu, kha vhana vha khotsi anga a takalela u vhumba nṋe uri ndi vhe khosi ya Vhaisraele vhoṱhe." 
1Chronicles28:5 Muṋe washu o nṋea vhana vhanzhi vha vhatuka, hone kha vhana vhanga vhoṱhe a nanga ṅwananga Solomoni uri a dzule kha khuluṋoni ya muvhuso wa Muṋe washu a vhuse Vhaisraele." 
1Chronicles28:6 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, ‘Solomoni ṅwana wau ndi ene ane a ḓo fhaṱa nnḓu yanga na miṱa yanga, ndo nanga ene uri a vhe ṅwananga, nṋe ndi ḓo vha khotsi awe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Arali a tevhedza ndaela dzanga na milayo yanga, unga a tshi khou zwi ita zwino, a si vhuye a pambuwa nḓilani, ndi ḓo pfumbisa muvhuso wawe lini na lini.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Zwino-ha ndi ni laya zwi tshi pfiwa nga Vhaisraele vhoṱhe tshivhidzo tsha Muṋe washu, zwi tshi pfiwa na nga Mudzimu washu, ndi ri, ni vhone uri ni tevhedze ndaela dzoṱhe dza Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, uri shango heḽi ḽavhuḓi ḽi vhe ḽaṋu, ni ḽi siele vhana vhaṋu ḽi vhe ḽavho lini na lini." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Inwi Solomoni ṅwananga, ḓivhani Mudzimu wa khotsi aṋu, ni mu shumele nga mbilu yoṱhe, ni tshi tou zwi funa, ngauri Muṋe washu u ṱola mbilu dza vhathu vhoṱhe, u ḓivha mihumbulo yashu na zwine ra zwi tama. Arali na mu ṱoḓa, ni ḓo mu wana, hone arali na mu ṱamba, u ḓo ni landula lini na lini." 
1Chronicles28:10 Elekanyani zwino, ngauri Muṋe washu o nanga inwi uri ni fhaṱe thembele khethwa. Ivhani na nungo, ni shume uyo mushumo.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi ṋea ṅwana wawe Solomoni pulani ya zwifhaṱo zwoṱhe zwa thembele na kamara dza mbulungelo na kamara dza tshitizi na Hukhethwakhethwa, fhethu ha u pfumelelwa." 
1Chronicles28:12 A mu ṋea pulani ya zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi mbiluni yawe zwa miṱa ya thembele ya Muṋe washu na phera dzoṱhe u mona nayo, zwone zwisiku zwa thembele ya Mudzimu na mbulungelo ya zwithu zwo kumedzwaho Mudzimu." 
1Chronicles28:13 Dafita a mu ṋea na ndayo dza u dzudzanya vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na dza mushumo woṱhe wa u shuma thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, khathihi na dza thundu dzoṱhe dzine dza ḓo shuma khayo." 
1Chronicles28:14 Dafita a mu laya uri hu shumiswe musuku mungafhani wa midzio yoṱhe ya musuku ine ya ḓo shuma kha mishumo yo fhambanaho na uri hu shumiswe siliva nngafhani ya midzio yoṱhe ya siliva ine ya ḓo shuma kha mishumo yo fhambanaho," 
1Chronicles28:15 na musuku wa zwivheambone na mbone dzazwo na tshivheambone tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe na mbone dzatsho, zwi tshi ya nga kushumisele kwa tshivheambone tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe," 
1Chronicles28:16 na musuku wa ḓafula iṅwe na iṅwe ya vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu, na siliva ya maḓafula a siliva," 
1Chronicles28:17 na musuku u songo vangiwaho wa dziforogo na ndilo dza u handulula na dzimvuvhelo na musuku wa ndilo iṅwe na iṅwe ya musuku na siliva ya ndilo iṅwe na iṅwe ya siliva," 
1Chronicles28:18 na musuku u songo vangiwaho wa aḽiṱari ya zwioro. A ita na u mu ṋea pulani ya kugoloi kwa vhakherube vha musuku vho ṱharamudza phapha vha tshi tsireledza mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu. 
1Chronicles28:19 Khosi Dafita o tou ṅwala hezwo zwoṱhe na zwidodombedzwa zwazwo, unga Muṋe washu o vha o mu funzedza." 
1Chronicles28:20 Khosi Dafita a vhudza ṅwana wawe Solomoni a ri, “Khwaṱhani, ni vhe na nungo, ni shume mushumo hoyo. Ni songo ofha, ni songo kulea nungo; Mudzimu Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga u na inwi. A nga si ni laṱedze, a nga si ni ṱutshele ha vhuya ha vuledzea mushumo woṱhe wa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles28:21 Zwigwada zwa vhotshifhe na Vhalivi zwo lindela mushumo woṱhe wa thembele ya Mudzimu. Ni na vhomakone vha mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe vhe vha ḓiimisela u ni farisa. Na vhahulwane na vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo thetshelesa ndaela dzaṋu dzoṱhe.” 
1Chronicles29:1 Khosi Dafita a vhudza tshivhidzo tshoṱhe a ri, “Ṅwananga Solomoni, we Mudzimu a mu nanga e eṱhe, u tshee muṱuku, ha athu ḓivha tshithu, huno mushumo une wa fanela u shumiwa ndi muhulu, ngauri heyo a si pfamo ya muthu, ndi thembele ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ndo shuma nga nungo dzoṱhe nda wana thundu ya u fhaṱa thembele ya Mudzimu wanga – musuku wa zwa musuku na siliva ya zwa siliva na musinaseṱha wa zwa musinaseṱha na tsimbi ya zwa tsimbi na matanda a zwa thanda na matombo a onikisi na matombo a mosaiki na matombo matswu na matombo a mivhala yo fhambanaho na matombo a tshakha dzoṱhe a mutengo muhulu, na mmabulu munzhi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Zwi si izwo fhedzi, ndo bvisa na lupfumo lwanga lwa musuku na siliva zwa thembele ya Mudzimu wanga ngauri ndi funa thembele ya Mudzimu wanga. Zwoṱhe zwe nda bvisela thembele khethwa" 
1Chronicles29:4 ndi thani dza ḓana dza musuku u songo vangiwaho na thani dza 240 dza siliva i songo vangiwaho ya u hulunga mbondo dza iyo thembele," 
1Chronicles29:5 zwa musuku na zwa siliva na zwa mushumo woṱhe une wa ḓo shumiwa nga vhatsila. Zwino ane a funa u ḓikumedza Muṋe washu ṋamusi uri a bvise-vho mutendelo ndi nnyi?” 
1Chronicles29:6 Ndi hone ṱhoho dza miṱa na magota a matsinde a Vhaisraele na vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane na vhalangi vha mushumo wa khosi vha tshi bvisa nga u tou zwi funa. 
1Chronicles29:7 Vha bvisela mushumo wa thembele ya Mudzimu thani dza 170 dza musuku na thani dza 340 dza siliva na thani dza 620 dza musinaseṱha na thani dza 3 400 dza tsimbi. 
1Chronicles29:8 We a vha e na nungu dza mutengo muhulu a bvisa zwa dzhena tshisikuni tsha thembele ya Muṋe washu zwa londolwa nga Jehiele wa mutupo wa Vhalivi vha Gerisoni. 
1Chronicles29:9 Vhathu vha pembela vha tshi vhona vharangaphanḓa vhavho vha tshi bvisa vha tshi tou zwi funa, ngauri vho ṋea Muṋe washu nga fhedzi nahone nga mbilu yoṱhe. Khosi Dafita na ene a pembela zwihulu." 
1Chronicles29:10 Khosi Dafita a renda Muṋe washu henefho phanḓa ha tshivhidzo tshoṱhe a ri, “Thendo nga i ye ha Iwe Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa khotsi ashu Israele, zwino na lini na lini." 
1Chronicles29:11 Muṋe washu, vhuhulu na maanḓa na lupenyo na thendo na vhugala ndi zwau, ngauri zwoṱhe zwi re ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi ndi zwau. Muṋe washu, muvhuso ndi wau, u khosi, u vhusa zwoṱhe." 
1Chronicles29:12 Lupfumo na khuliso zwi bva kha Iwe. Ndi Iwe muvhusi wa zwithu zwoṱhe. Nungo na maanḓa zwi zwanḓani zwau, u kona u hulisa vhoṱhe wa vha ṋea nungo." 
1Chronicles29:13 Zwino, Mudzimu washu, ri a u livhuha, ri hulisa dzina ḽau ḽa vhurena." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Huno nṋe ndi tou vha mini, vhathu vhanga vhone vha tou vha mini, zwine ra kona u bvisa zwingafha ri si na vhutshivha? Zwoṱhe zwi bva kha Iwe, ro u ṋea zwi no bva tshanḓani tshau fhedzi." 
1Chronicles29:15 U tshi ri sedza u vhona ri tshi nga vhafhalali na vhatsinda, u ḓi nga vhomakhulukuku washu. Maḓuvha ashu fhano fhasi a nga murunzi u fhiraho, a ri na ndalamo." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu, zwoṱhe hezwi zwe ra kuvhanganya ri tshi itela u fhaṱela dzina ḽau ḽikhethwa thembele, zwi bva tshanḓani tshau, zwoṱhe ndi zwau." 
1Chronicles29:17 Mudzimu wanga, ndi a zwi ḓivha uri Iwe u ṱola mbilu ya muthu, u takalela u fulufhedzea ha muthu. Zwithu zwoṱhe hezwi ndo bvisa nga u tou zwi funa, nga mbilu u fulufhedzeaho. Zwino nda takala ndi tshi vhona vhathu vhau vha re fhano, na vhone vha tshi u ṋea vha tshi tou zwi funa." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi ashu Abrahamu na Isaka na Israele, longa lutamo holu mbiluni dza vhathu vhau lini na lini, u ite uri mbilu dzavho dzi dzule dzi tshi u fulufhela." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ita uri ṅwananga Solomoni a tevhedze ndaela dzau na zwine wa zwi ṱoḓa na ndayo dzau nga mbilu yoṱhe, a fhaṱe thembele ye nda i dzudzanyela.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Ndi hone Dafita a tshi vhudza tshivhidzo tshoṱhe a ri, “Rendani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu!” Ndi hone vhoṱhe vha tshi renda Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, vha gwadama, vha shuvhama phanḓa ha Muṋe washu na khosi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Nga matshelo vha ṱhavhela Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo, vha mu ṋekedza nduvho dzi fhiswaho, vha mu ṱhavhela mboho dza tshigidi na thutha dza tshigidi na zwitutana zwa tshigidi, vha ṋekedza na nduvho dzadzo dzi nwiwaho, na dziṅwe nduvho nnzhi vha tshi itela Vhaisraele vhoṱhe." 
1Chronicles29:22 Musi wonoyo vha ḽa vha nwa, vha pembela phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓivhadza lwa vhuvhili uri Solomoni ṅwana wa Dafita ndi khosi, vha mu ḓodza mapfura nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu uri a vhe muvhusi wavho, Tsadoko a vha tshifhe." 
1Chronicles29:23 Solomoni a mbo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Muṋe washu a vha khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Dafita. Zwa mu nakela, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha mu thetshelesa." 
1Chronicles29:24 Magota oṱhe na vhahali na vhana vhoṱhe vha khosi Dafita vha vhatuka vha fulufhedzisa uri vha ḓo luvha khosi Solomoni. 
1Chronicles29:25 Muṋe washu a hulisa Solomoni zwihulu Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona, a mu ṋea vhugala ha vhuhosi vhu sa athu ṋewa khosi na nthihi yo vhusaho Israele." 
1Chronicles29:26 Dafita ṅwana wa Isai o vha e khosi ya ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele. 
1Chronicles29:27 O vhusa ḽa Israele a fhedza miṅwaha ya 40; o vhusa miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili e Hebroni, Jerusalema a vhusa miṅwaha ya 33." 
1Chronicles29:28 O dzama o no ḓi vha wa maḓuvha vhukuma, o lalama, o pfuma, a tshi huliswa. Ṅwana wawe Solomoni a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Mafhungo a khosi Dafita, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa kha mafhungo a muporofita Samuele na a muporofita Nathani na a muporofita Gadi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Mafhungo ayo a ri anetshela zwa muvhuso wawe na maanḓa awe na zwithu zwo iteaho khae na kha Vhaisraele na kha mivhuso ya maṅwe mashango oṱhe. 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni ṅwana wa khosi Dafita o pfumbisa muvhuso wawe wa khwaṱha nge Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe a vha e nae, a mu hulisa zwihulu." 
2Chronicles1:2 Khosi Solomoni a amba na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane na vhahaṱuli na vharangaphanḓa vha Israele na ṱhoho dza miṱa," 
2Chronicles1:3 Solomoni na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vha gonya tshikwarani tsha Gibioni, ngauri dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu yo fhaṱwaho phangani nga Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu yo vha i henefho." 
2Chronicles1:4 Zwino mbulungelo ya Mudzimu khosi Dafita o vha o i hwala Kiriathi Jiarimu a i isa Jerusalema, a i vhea fhethu he a i lugisela, ngauri o vha o i akhela dennde henefho." 
2Chronicles1:5 Hone aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha yo fhaṱwaho nga Betsaliele ṅwana wa Uri, ṅwana wa Huru, yo vha i muḓini wa Gibioni phanḓa ha dennde ya Muṋe washu. Khosi Solomoni na tshivhidzo vha luvha Muṋe washu henefho." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni a takuwa a ya kha aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha phanḓa ha Muṋe washu a re denndeni ya u ṱangana nae, a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwine zwa swika tshigidi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Vhusiku honoho Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza Solomoni a mu vhudza a ri, “Humbela tshine wa funa ndi tshi u ṋea.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni a fhindula Mudzimu a ri, “Wo itela khotsi anga Dafita vhuthu vhuhulu, nṋe wa nnyita khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles1:9 Zwino, Mudzimu Muṋe washu, khwaṱhisa zwe wa fulufhedzisa khotsi anga Dafita, ngauri wo nnyita khosi uri ndi vhuse vhathu vho andaho unga buse ḽa shango." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mphe vhuṱali na nḓivho, uri ndi kone u ranga vhathu havha phanḓa, ngauri ane a nga kona u vhusa lushaka ulu luhulu a nga vha nnyi?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Mudzimu a fhindula Solomoni a ri, “Vhunga zwi zwenezwo zwe mbilu yau ya tama, ú songo humbela thundu na lupfumo kana khuliso kana lufu lwa maswina au, vhunga ú songo humbela u lalama, wó humbela vhuṱali na nḓivho uri u kone u vhusa vhathu vhanga vhe nda u ita khosi uri u vha vhuse," 
2Chronicles1:12 zwenezwo ndi ḓo u ṋea vhuṱali na nḓivho. Ndi ḓo u ṋea na thundu na lupfumo na khuliso, zwi sa athu vhuya zwa ṋewa iṅwe khosi yo u rangaho phanḓa, na ine ya ḓo u tevhela a i nga fani na iwe.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi takuwa a livha Jerusalema a tshi bva tshikwarani tsha Gibioni, phanḓa ha dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu. Solomoni a vhusa Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni a vhumba mmbi ya gariki dza 1 400 na bere dza 12 000, dziṅwe a dzula nadzo Jerusalema, dziṅwe a dzi vhea miḓini ya dzigariki." 
2Chronicles1:15 A khokha siliva na musuku Jerusalema zwa anda unga matombo, matanda a mukedara a anda unga mihuyu matsindeni a zwikwara." 
2Chronicles1:16 Bere dza Solomoni dzo vha dzi tshi rengwa Egipita na Kue, vhashavhi vha musanda vha tshi dzi renga Kue." 
2Chronicles1:17 Gariki vho vha vha tshi renga Egipita nga mangwende a 600 a siliva, bere i tshi rengwa nga mangwende a 150. Vho vha vha tshi ita na u dzi rengisela mahosi a Vhahithi na Vhaaramu." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomoni a bvisa ndaela dza u fhaṱela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu thembele na pfamo ya musanda ya ene muṋe. 
2Chronicles2:2 A ṋea vhanna vha 70 000 mushumo wa u hwala thundu dza u fhaṱa, na vhanna vha 80 000 a vha ṋea mushumo wa u tsheṱa matombo zwikwarani, a vhea vhanna vha 3 600 vha u langa vhenevho." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomoni a swikisa mafhungo haya ha khosi Hiramu wa Tiro a ri, “Nga vha nthumele matanda a mukedara sa zwe vha itela khotsi anga Dafita zwiḽa vha tshi vha rumela mikedara ya u fhaṱa pfamo ya u dzula khayo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Zwino nṋe ndi ṱoḓa u fhaṱela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga thembele, nda mu kumedza yone uri hu fhiswe zwioro phanḓa hawe, a dzule a tshi ṋekedzwa vhurotho vhune ha kumedzwa Ene, a ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho misi yoṱhe nga matsheloni na nga madekwana na nga Dzisabatha na nga vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi Muswa na nga vhuṱambo ho vhewaho ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu. Heyo ndi ndayo ya Vhaisraele ya lini na lini." 
2Chronicles2:5 Thembele ine nda ḓo i fhaṱa i ḓo vha khulwane, ngauri Mudzimu washu u fhira midzimu miṅwe yoṱhe." 
2Chronicles2:6 Huno ane a nga kona u mu fhaṱela thembele ndi nnyi? Hufha ḽiṱaḓulu naho ḽi ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa nṱha-nṱha a sa koni u fhelela khaḽo. Ndi nga tou fhaṱa nnḓu ine ra nga mu ṋekedza nduvho khayo. 
2Chronicles2:7 “Zwino nga vha nthumele munna wa mutsila kha mushumo wa zwa musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha na tsimbi na zwa masila a tshisumbusumbu na muridili na matswuku, a vhe na nḓivho ya u vhaḓa matombo, onoyo u ḓo shuma na vhatsila vha Juda na Jerusalema vhe vha waniwa nga khotsi anga Dafita." 
2Chronicles2:8 Vha nthumele na matanda a mukedara na mupaini na dziṅwe thanda dzavhuḓi dza Libanoni, ngauri ndi a zwi ḓivha uri vhanna vha havho ndi vhakoni kha u rema miri henefho. Vhanna vha hashu vha ḓo shuma na vha havho," 
2Chronicles2:9 vha nngwanela matanda manzhi, ngauri thembele ine nda i fhaṱa i fanela u vha khulu ya manakanaka." 
2Chronicles2:10 Vhashumi vhavho vha maṱaka vha u rema miri ndi ḓo vha ṋea thani dza 3 300 dza goroi na thani dza 3 300 dza baḽi na ḽitha dza 400 000 dza waini na ḽitha dza 400 000 dza mapfura a muolivi.” 
2Chronicles2:11 Khosi Hiramu wa Tiro a ṅwalela Solomoni luṅwalo a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Yahavee u funa vhathu vhawe, ndi zwe a ita uri vhone vha vhe khosi yavho.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hiramu a dovha a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi! O ṋea khosi Dafita ṅwana wa vhuṱali a re na ṱhalukanyo na vhusedzi, ene u ḓo fhaṱela Yahavee thembele, a dovha a ḓifhaṱela pfamo." 
2Chronicles2:13 Ndi khou ruma Huramu mueletshedzi wanga ha vhone, ndi mutsila vhukuma." 
2Chronicles2:14 Mme awe o vha e wa tsinde ḽa Dani, khotsi awe e wa Tiro. Munna uyo o gudiswa mushumo wa zwa musuku na siliva na musinaseṱha na tsimbi na tombo na thanda na zwa masila a muridili na tshisumbusumbu na sila ḽitswuku na lukhaha. U na nḓivho kha zwa tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwa u vhaḓa matombo nahone a nga bvisa tshifanyiso tshifhio na tshifhio tshe a ṋewa. U ḓo shuma na vhatsila vhavho na vha muṋe wanga, khosi Dafita khotsi avho." 
2Chronicles2:15 Zwino vhone muṋe wanga nga vha rumele vhashumi vhavho goroi na baḽi na mapfura a muolivi na waini sa zwe vha fulufhedzisa. 
2Chronicles2:16 Riṋe ri ḓo gonya thavha dza Libanoni ra rema matanda oṱhe a mukedara ane vha a ṱoḓa, ra a vhofha a ita madzanda, ra a tshimbidza lwanzheni ra a swikisa Jopa, vhone vha konou a dzhia vha gonya nao Jerusalema.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Khosi Solomoni a vhala vhatsinda vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Israele. Izwo zwo tevhela u vhaliwa ha vhathu he ha itwa nga khotsi awe Dafita. Vhatsinda avho vha wanala vhe 153 600. 
2Chronicles2:18 Vha 70 000 a vha hwesa mushumo wa u hwala thundu ya u fhaṱa, vha 80 000 vha vha vha u vhaḓa matombo dzithavhani, na vhanna vha 3 600 vha vha langaho vha tshi ita uri vha shume." 
2Chronicles3:1 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi thoma u fhaṱa thembele ya Muṋe washu Jerusalema, thavhani ya Moria, he Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza Dafita khotsi awe. Ho vha hu luvhatani lwa u fhulela lwa Arauna wa Mujebusi, ndi fhethu he ha dzula ho khethwa nga Dafita." 
2Chronicles3:2 Solomoni a thoma u fhaṱa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wawe. 
2Chronicles3:3 Thembele yo fhaṱwaho nga khosi Solomoni yo vha i na vhunavha ha mitha dza 30 na vhuphara ha mitha dza fumi. 
2Chronicles3:4 Guḓa ḽa phanḓa ha thembele ḽo vha ḽi tshi eḓana na vhuphara hayo ḽi mitha dza fumi, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ḽi mitha dza 60. Nga ngomu a ḽi hulunga nga musuku u songo vangwaho." 
2Chronicles3:5 Holo khulwane a i nambatedza matanda a muṱaululo a i hulunga nga musuku u songo vangwaho, a ola makolo a mutshevho na makolo a khare." 
2Chronicles3:6 Khosi ya nakisa thembele nga matombo a mutengo muhulu na musuku u no bva shangoni ḽa Pharavaimi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Balaga na mihangammbwa na mbondo na mahothi a thembele a zwi fhoma nga musuku, kha mbondo a vhaḓa zwifanyiso zwa vhakherube." 
2Chronicles3:8 Solomoni a fhaṱa Hukhethwakhethwa, vhunavha haho ha eḓana na vhuphara ha thembele, vhu mitha dza fumi, vhuphara vhu mitha dza fumi. A hulunga mbondo dza Hukhethwakhethwa nga musuku u no lemela thani dza 20." 
2Chronicles3:9 Zwibigiri zwo itwa nga musuku u no lemela giramu dza 500, mbondo dza kamara dza nṱha na dzone a dzi hulunga nga musuku." 
2Chronicles3:10 Khosi ya ita vhakherube vhavhili vho itwaho nga tsimbi, ya vha fhoma musuku ya vha vhea Hukhethwakhethwa." 
2Chronicles3:11 Phapha dza vhakherube vhoṱhe dzo vha dzi mitha dza fumi. Lufhafha luthihi lwa mukherube wa u thoma lwo vha lu na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5, lwó kwama luvhondo lwa thembele, ngeno luṅwe lufhafha lwawe, lune na lwone lwa vha na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5 lwó kwama lufhafha lwa muṅwe mukherube." 
2Chronicles3:12 Lufhafha luthihi lwa mukherube wa vhuvhili lwo vha lu na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5, lwó kwama luṅwe luvhondo lwa thembele, luṅwe lufhafha lwawe na lwone lú na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5, lwó kwama lufhafha lwa mukherube wa u thoma." 
2Chronicles3:13 Phapha dza vhakherube havho dzo vha dzi na vhulapfu ha mitha dza fumi dzo ṱangana. Vho vha vho ima nga milenzhe vho lavhelesa muṋango. 
2Chronicles3:14 Solomoni a ita lupila lwa Hukhethwakhethwa nga vhukuse ha muvhala wa lutombo na muridili na mutswuku, na nga maṅwe masila, hó oliwa makolo a vhakherube khalwo." 
2Chronicles3:15 Khosi ya ita phuphu mbili, iṅwe na iṅwe i na vhulapfu ha mitha dza 17,5, ya dzi imisa phanḓa ha thembele. Phuphu iṅwe na iṅwe yo vha i na ṱhoho ya vhulapfu ha mitha dza 2,5." 
2Chronicles3:16 Ṱhodzi dza idzo phuphu dzo vha dzo nakiswa nga makolo a geḓane dzo lukwaho dzo vhofhelelwaho maramba a ḓana a musinaseṱha. 
2Chronicles3:17 Phuphu idzo dzo vha dzo vhewa matungo a muṋango wa thembele, iṅwe i thungo ya tshipembe i tshi pfi Jakhini, iṅwi i thungo ya devhula i tshi pfi Buasi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Khosi Solomoni a fhaṱa aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha ye ya vha i na vhunavha ha mitha dza fumi na vhuphara ha mitha dza fumi na vhulapfu ha mitha ṱhanu u ya nṱha. 
2Chronicles4:2 Solomoni a ita na thannge ya musinaseṱha ya tshitendeledzi, vhulapfu u ya nṱha yo vha i mitha mbili na hafu, u buḓekanya u bva kha lubomo u swika kha luṅwe i mitha ṱhanu, u mona nayo i mitha dza 15." 
2Chronicles4:3 Nga fhasi ha lubomo ho vha hu na makolo a mboho u mona nayo, hafu ya mitha iṅwe na iṅwe i na fumi ḽadzo. Mboho idzo dzo vha dzo fulwa dza ita miduba mivhili dzo momekana na thannge." 
2Chronicles4:4 Thannge yo vha yo ima kha miṱana ya mboho dza 12 dza musinaseṱha, zwikondo zwadzo zwo ela vhukati, tharu dzo lavhelesa devhula, tharu dzo lavhelesa vhukovhela, tharu dzo lavhelesa tshipembe, tharu dzo lavhelesa vhubvaḓuvha." 
2Chronicles4:5 Thannge kha matungo ayo yo vha i na vhudenya ha tshanḓa tsha muthu, lubomo lwayo lu tshi nga lwa tshinwelo, lu tshi nga dzuvha ḽa volenga. Thannge iyo yo vha i tshi kona u fara maḓi a ḽitha dza 60 000." 
2Chronicles4:6 Solomoni a ita na masambelo a fumi, maṱanu a vhewa thungo ya tshipembe ya thembele, maṱanu thungo ya devhula. Henefho ho vha hu tshi ṱukiswa miraḓo ya zwifuwo zwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho; vhotshifhe vhone vho vha vha tshi ṱamba nga maḓi a thannge khulwane." 
2Chronicles4:7 Solomoni a ita zwivheambone zwa fumi zwa musuku zwi tshi ya nga he ha pfi zwi itwe ngaho, a zwi vhea thembeleni, zwiṱanu thungo ya tshipembe, zwiṱanu thungo ya devhula." 
2Chronicles4:8 A ita na maḓafula a fumi a a vhea thembeleni, maṱanu thungo ya tshipembe, maṱanu thungo ya devhula. A ita na ndilo dza ḓana dza musuku dza u handulula." 
2Chronicles4:9 Solomoni a ita muṱa wa vhotshifhe, na muṱa muhulu na mahothi awo, a a fhoma musinaseṱha." 
2Chronicles4:10 Thannge a i vhea thungo ya tshipembe, khuḓani ya vhubvaḓuvhatshipembe ha thembele." 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu a ita na dzikhali na dzifosholo na ndilo dza u handulula. Ha vha hu hone Huramu o fhedza mushumo we a vha a tshi khou u shumela khosi Solomoni thembeleni ya Mudzimu: 
2Chronicles4:12 Phuphu mbili, na ṱhoho mbili dza tshivhumbeo tsha ndilo nṱha ha dziphuphu, na makolo a geḓane mbili dzo lukwaho dza u nakisa idzo ṱhoho mbili dza tshivhumbeo tsha ndilo nṱha ha phuphu," 
2Chronicles4:13 na maḓana maṋa a maramba a musinaseṱha a geḓane idzo mbili dzo lukwaho, geḓane iṅwe na iṅwe yo lukwaho yo vha i na miduba mivhili ya maramba, a tshi nakisa idzo ṱhoho dza tshivhumbeo tsha ndilo nṱha ha idzo phuphu," 
2Chronicles4:14 na zwigoloi na masambelo azwo," 
2Chronicles4:15 na thannge, na mboho dza 12 dzo hwalaho iyo thannge," 
2Chronicles4:16 na dzikhali na dzifosholo na dziforogo na zwithu zwoṱhe zwi shumaho mushumo muthihi. Zwithu zwoṱhe zwe Huramu a ita thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a tshi itela khosi Solomoni zwo vha zwi zwa musinaseṱha wo kulutedzwaho. 
2Chronicles4:17 Khosi ya ri zwi itwe milondoni mudavhini wa Jorodani vhukati ha Sukotho na Tserede. 
2Chronicles4:18 Zwoṱhe hezwo zwithu zwe Solomoni a zwi ita zwo vha zwo ḓala lwe muthu a si kone u ḓivha tshileme tsha musinaseṱha wazwo. 
2Chronicles4:19 Khosi Solomoni a ita na thundu yoṱhe ye ya vha i thembeleni ya Mudzimu: aḽiṱari ya musuku na maḓafula a vhurotho vhune ha ṋekedzwa Mudzimu," 
2Chronicles4:20 na zwivheambone zwa musuku u songo vangwaho na mbone dzazwo dzine dza duga phanḓa ha Hukhethwakhethwa zwi tshi ya nga he zwa dzudzanywa," 
2Chronicles4:21 na makolo a maluvha a musuku na mbone na zwiṱoṱomodzathambo zwa musuku wo dziaho 
2Chronicles4:22 na zwiṱunyathambo zwa musuku u songo vangiwaho na ndilo dza u handulula na ndongo dza u hwala masimbe na zwidongo zwa zwioro na mahothi a musuku a thembele: mahothi a nga ngomu a musi muthu a tshi ya Hukhethwakhethwa na mahothi a holo khulwane. 
2Chronicles5:1 Musi khosi Solomoni o fhedza mushumo woṱhe wa thembele ya Muṋe washu, a dzhenisa zwithu zwe khotsi awe Dafita a zwi kumedza Mudzimu, siliva na musuku na thundu, a zwi longa zwisikuni zwa thembele ya Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles5:2 Ndi hone khosi Solomoni a tshi ramba vhahulwane vha Israele na ṱhoho dza matsinde na vhahulwane vha miṱa ya Vhaisraele, vha kuvhangana Jerusalema uri vha yo dzhia mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu, vha i dzhie Tsioni Muḓini wa Dafita vha i ḓise thembeleni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Israele vha kuvhangana musanda nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha Mishasha nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili. 
2Chronicles5:4 Musi vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele vho no swika, Vhalivi vha hwala mbulungelo," 
2Chronicles5:5 vha i isa thembeleni. Vhotshifhe, Vhalivi, vha hwala dennde ya u ṱangana na Mudzimu na thundu yoṱhe khethwa ye ya vha i ngomu hayo vha zwi isa thembeleni." 
2Chronicles5:6 Khosi Solomoni na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Israele vha kuvhangana phanḓa ha mbulungelo ya mulanga vha tshi khou ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwinzhi zwa nngu na kholomo dzi sa ṅwalei nahone dzi sa vhalei. 
2Chronicles5:7 Ndi hone vhotshifhe vha tshi isa mbulungelo ya mulanga ya Muṋe washu vhudzuloni hayo thembeleni vha i vhea hukhethwa ha nga ngomu, hone Hukhethwakhethwa, fhasi ha phapha dza vhakherube." 
2Chronicles5:8 Vhakherube vho vha vho ṱharamudza phapha dzavho nṱha ha fhethu hu re na mbulungelo, vha tibedza mbulungelo na thanda dza u i hwala." 
2Chronicles5:9 Thanda idzo dzo vha dzo lapfa u fhira mbulungelo lwe ṱhodzi dzadzo dza kona u vhonala muṋangoni wa hukhethwa ha nga ngomu, hone dzi sa vhonali muthu e nnḓa ha Hukhethwakhethwa. Thanda idzo dzi tshee henefho na ṋamusi." 
2Chronicles5:10 Ngomu ha mbulungelo ho vha hu na dziḽa mbaba mbili dza matombo fhedzi dze Mushe a longa khayo musi vhe Horebe, zwiḽa Muṋe washu a tshi vhofha mulanga na Vhaisraele u pfuluwani havho Egipita." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ndi hone vhotshifhe vha tshi bva Hukhethwakhethwa. Vhotshifhe vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe henefho vho vha vho ḓikumedza Mudzimu, hu sa sedzwi uri ndi vha tshigwada tshifhio." 
2Chronicles5:12 Vhalivi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe vhaimbi, Asafu na Hemani na Jeduthuni na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na mashaka avho, vho vha vho ima thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha ya aḽiṱari, vho ambara zwiambaro zwa lukhaha lu songo vangiwaho, vha tshi khou lidza dzitshele na dziharipa na madende, vha tshi bvumelwa nga vhotshifhe vha 120 vha tshi lidza dziphalaphala." 
2Chronicles5:13 Vhalidzi vha dziphalaphala na vhaimbi vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi imba zwithihi sa muthu muthihi, vha tshi renda Muṋe washu vha tshi mu livhuha. Vha takusa maipfi avho vha tshi renda Muṋe washu, vha tshi bvumelwa nga dziphalaphala na mirumba na zwiṅwe zwilidzo, vha tshi imba vha tshi ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu ngauri u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei.” Zwenezwo thembele ya Muṋe washu ya ḓala gole," 
2Chronicles5:14 vhotshifhe vha si tsha kona u shuma mishumo yavho nga iḽo gole, nge lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwa vha lwo ḓadza thembele ya Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles6:1 Ndi hone khosi Solomoni a tshi rabela a ri, “Muṋe washu, wo amba wa ri u ḓo dzula goleni ḽitswu." 
2Chronicles6:2 Zwino nṋe ndo u fhaṱela thembele ya vhugala, hune wa ḓo dzula hone lini na lini.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Israele tsho vha tsho ima henefho. Khosi ya rembuluwa ya vha shudufhadza. 
2Chronicles6:4 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele! Zwe a fulufhedzisa khotsi anga Dafita nga mulomo wawe, o zwi khunyeledza nga maanḓa awe." 
2Chronicles6:5 Ndi uri o ri, ‘U bva tshee nda pfulusa vhathu vhanga Egipita, a tho ngo vhuya nda nanga muḓi kha tsinde ḽiṅwe ḽa Israele uri dzina ḽanga ḽi fhaṱelwe thembele hone nahone a tho ngo vhuya nda nanga muṅwe muthu uri a vhe murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Huno zwino ndo nanga Jerusalema uri dzina ḽanga ḽi vhe henefho, nda nanga Dafita uri a vhuse vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 “Khotsi anga Dafita vho vha vhe nazwo mbiluni yavho uri vha fhaṱele dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele thembele. 
2Chronicles6:8 Hone Muṋe washu o vhudza khotsi anga Dafita a ri, ‘Wo ita zwone u tshi elekanya u fhaṱela dzina ḽanga thembele." 
2Chronicles6:9 Hone a si iwe ane wa ḓo fhaṱa thembele; ṅwana wau wa dzofha ḽau, ndi ene ane a ḓo fhaṱela dzina ḽanga thembele.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Zwino Muṋe washu o khunyeledza zwe a fulufhedzisa. Nṋe ndo vha khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi anga Dafita, zwino ndo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Israele, sa zwe Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa, nda fhaṱela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele thembele." 
2Chronicles6:11 Henefho thembeleni ndo vhea mbulungelo, ngomu hayo hu na mulanga wa Muṋe washu we a vhofha na vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi ima phanḓa ha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu ó lavhelesa tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Israele, a imisa zwanḓa." 
2Chronicles6:13 Zwino Solomoni o vha e na ḓingo ḽa musinaseṱha o ḽi vhea vhukati ha muṱa wa nnḓa. Ḓingo iḽo ḽo vha ḽi na vhunavha ha mitha mbili na hafu na vhuphara ha mitha mbili na hafu na mitha nthihi na hafu vhulapfu u ya nṱha. Solomoni a gonya iḽo ḓingo, a gwadama phanḓa ha tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Israele, a imisa zwanḓa zwawe zwa livha ṱaḓulu," 
2Chronicles6:14 a rabela a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, a hu na Mudzimu ane a nga Iwe ṱaḓulu kana fhano fhasi. Iwe u vhulunga mulanga wau we wa u vhofha na vhathu vhau, wa vha sumbedza lufuno lwau arali vha tshi u thetshelesa nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wo khunyeledza zwe wa fulufhedzisa khotsi anga Dafita muḓinḓa wau, ṋamusi zwe wa fulufhedzisa nga mulomo wau, wo zwi khunyeledza nga tshanḓa tshau." 
2Chronicles6:16 “Zwino Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, khunyeledza zwe wa fulufhedzisa khotsi anga Dafita mulanda wau zwiḽa u tshi ri, ‘A u nga kundwi u wana ṅwana wa mutuka ane a ḓo dzula phanḓa hanga kha khuluṋoni ya Israele arali vhana vhau vhe na vhulondo kha zwoṱhe zwine vha ita, vha tshi tshila phanḓa hanga vha tshi tevhedza mulayo wanga, unga iwe.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Zwino-ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, zwe wa fulufhedzisa Dafita mulanda wau nga zwi vhe hone." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Huno vhukuma Mudzimu u ḓo dzula fhano fhasi na vhathu naa? Ḽiṱaḓulu naho ḽi ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa nṱha-nṱha u nga si fhelele khaḽo. Zwino iyi thembele ye nda fhaṱa u nga fhelela khayo hani? 
2Chronicles6:19 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, naho zwo ralo thetshelesa thabelo yanga na mukosi wanga. Ipfa tshililo na thabelo ine nda khou rabela maṱoni au." 
2Chronicles6:20 Ngavhe maṱo au a tshi dzula o sedza thembele iyi vhusiku na masiari, fhethu hafhano he wa ri dzina ḽau ḽi ḓo luvhiwa hone. Ngavhe u tshi thetshelesa thabelo ine nda rabela ndo sedza fhethu fhano." 
2Chronicles6:21 Thetshelesa thabelo yanga na dza vhathu vhau Vhaisraele musi vha tshi rabela vho sedza fhano fhethu. Ri pfe u ṱaḓulu hune wa dzula hone, musi u tshi ri pfa u ri hangwele." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Arali muthu a khakhela muṅwe, a pfi a ane muano, a ḓa a fulufhedzisa nga muano phanḓa ha aḽiṱari yau thembeleni ino," 
2Chronicles6:23 zwenezwo thetshelesa u ṱaḓulu u haṱule vhalanda vhau, u lifhedze a re na mulandu nga he zwa mu tea, a si na mulandu u mu vhofholole." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Musi vhathu vhau Vhaisraele vho kundwa nga maswina nge vha u khakhela, vha rembulutshela kha Iwe, vha ḓa fhano thembeleni ino vha u renda vha u rabela nga u ḓiṱukufhadza uri u vha hangwele," 
2Chronicles6:25 zwenezwo vha thetshelese u ṱaḓulu, u hangwele vhathu vhau Vhaisraele vhutshinyi havho, u vha vhuedzedze shangoni ḽe wa ḽi ṋea vhone na vhomakhulukuku wavho." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Musi wo vala ḽiṱaḓulu, nge vhathu vhau vha u khakhela, mvula i si tsha na, vhone vha u rabela nga u ḓiṱukufhadza vho sedza fhethu fhano vha tshi ḓisola nge wa vha ṱungufhadza," 
2Chronicles6:27 zwenezwo vha thetshelese u ṱaḓulu, vhalanda vhau Vhaisraele u vha hangwele vhutshinyi havho. Vha funze u ita zwine zwa vha zwone, u nise mvula fhano shangoni ḽe wa ṋea vhathu vhau uri ḽi vhe ḽavho." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Musi fhano shangoni hu tshi wa nḓala kana ha vha na dwadze kana done kana muunda kana magerere kana vhuukhula kana musi vhathu vha tshi govhelwa nga maswina miḓini yavho kana vha welwa nga khombo iṅwe-vho kana vha farwa nga vhulwadze," 
2Chronicles6:29 musi muṅwe wa vhathu vhau Vhaisraele a tshi u humbela nga thabelo, muṅwe na muṅwe nga u vhona u tambula hawe na u pfa vhuṱungu a tshi imisa zwanḓa zwawe zwa livha thembele hei," 
2Chronicles6:30 zwenezwo thetshelesa u ṱaḓulu hune wa dzula hone. Vha hangwele, ṋea muṅwe na muṅwe zwo mu teaho, ngauri u ḓivha mbilu yawe, hufha e Iwe une wa ḓivha mbilu dza vhathu u woṱhe," 
2Chronicles6:31 ndi hone vha tshi ḓo u ofha, vha tshimbila nḓilani dzau misi yoṱhe vha tshi tshila shangoni ḽe wa ṋea vhomakhulukuku washu." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Mutsinda ene ane a si vhe muṅwe wa vhathu vhau Vhaisraele, we a tou ḓa a tshi bva shangoni ḽa kule nge a pfa a dzina ḽau ḽihulu na maanḓa au na mishumo yau, musi a tshi ḓa a rabela o sedza thembele hei," 
2Chronicles6:33 zwenezwo thetshelesa u ṱaḓulu hune wa dzula hone, u ite zwine uyo mutsinda a u humbela, uri tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓivhe dzina ḽau, dzi u ofhe, u ḓi nga vhathu vhau Vhaisraele vha tshi u ofha, dzi ḓivhe uri nnḓu hei ye nda fhaṱa i vhidzwa nga dzina ḽau." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Musi vhathu vhau vha tshi bva pfumo u yo lwa na maswina avho, hoṱhe hune wa vha ruma, musi vha tshi u rabela vho sedza muḓi houno we wa u nanga na thembele hei ye nda i fhaṱela dzina ḽau," 
2Chronicles6:35 zwenezwo thetshelesa thabelo yavho na tshililo tshavho u ṱaḓulu, u ite uri vha kunde." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Musi vha tshi u khakhela – ngauri a hu na ane a si khakhe – Iwe wa vha sinyutshela, wa vha kumedza maswina, vha vha thuba vha vha hwala vha vha isa shangoni ḽa kule kana ḽa tsini," 
2Chronicles6:37 vha ri vhe henengei mbilu dzavho dza sala dzi tshi laṱa vhuvhi vha ḓisola, vha u lilela vha ri, ‘Ro tshinya, ro khakha, ro ita zwo vhifhaho,’" 
2Chronicles6:38 arali vha rembulutshela kha Iwe nga mbilu yoṱhe na muya woṱhe vhe shangoni ḽe vha hwaliwa vha iswa khaḽo vhe mathubwa, vha u rabela vho sedza shango ḽe wa ṋea vhomakhulukuku wavho, vho sedza muḓi we wa u nanga, vho sedza thembele ye nda fhaṱela dzina ḽau," 
2Chronicles6:39 zwenezwo u thetshelese thabelo yavho na zwililo zwavho u ṱaḓulu hune wa dzula hone, u vha khathutshele, u hangwele vhathu vhau vhe vha u khakhela." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Zwino Mudzimu wanga, ngavhe maṱo au a tshi sedza, nḓevhe dzau dza thetshelesa thabelo dzi rabelwaho fhano fhethu." 
2Chronicles6:41 “Mudzimu Muṋe washu, takuwa zwino u ye fhethu hune wa ḓo awela hone, Iwe na mbulungelo i re tshiga tsha maanḓa au. Mudzimu Muṋe washu, ngavhe vhotshifhe vhau vha tshi ambadzwa u tshidzwa, ngavhe vha u funaho nga mbilu nthihi vha tshi pembelela vhuthu hau." 
2Chronicles6:42 Yawee Mudzimu Muṋe washu, u songo landula mutiwa wau. Elelwa vhuthu he wa fulufhedzisa Dafita muḓinḓa wau.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Musi Solomoni a tshi fhedza u rabela, ha wa mulilo u tshi bva ḽiṱaḓulu, wa fhisa nduvho i fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo, lupenyo lu kombodzaho lwa Muṋe washu lwa ḓadza thembele," 
2Chronicles7:2 vhotshifhe vha si kone u dzhena nḓuni ya Muṋe washu nge ya vha yo ḓala lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles7:3 Musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi vhona mulilo u tshi wa u tshi bva ṱaḓulu na lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwo alama kha thembele, vha gwadama kha pheivimennde zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwa kwama fhasi, vha luvha Muṋe washu, vha mu livhuha vha tshi khou ri, “Vhuthu ndi hawe, lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Ndi hone khosi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo. 
2Chronicles7:5 Khosi Solomoni a ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tsha kholomo dza 22 000 na nngu na mbudzi dza 120 000, ngauralo ha vha hu hone khosi na vhathu vhoṱhe vho kumedza Mudzimu thembele yawe." 
2Chronicles7:6 Vhotshifhe vha ima vhuimoni havho, na Vhalivi vha ima vho lavhelesana navho, vha tshi khou renda Muṋe washu nga zwilidzo zwo itwaho nga khosi Dafita, vha tshi imba luimbo vha tshi ri, “Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!” nga he vha laiwa nga Dafita. Vhotshifhe vha lidza dziphalaphala, Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhó ima nga milenzhe." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomoni a kumedza Mudzimu tshipiḓa tsha vhukati tsha muṱa u re phanḓa ha nnḓu ya Muṋe washu, henefho a ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na mapfura a zwiṱhavhelo zwa u konana na Mudzimu, ngauri aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha ye a vha o i fhaṱa yo vha i ṱhukhu, zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza thoro na miraḓo ya mapfura zwi sa fheleli khayo." 
2Chronicles7:8 Solomoni na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ita vhuṱambo ha Mishasha misi yeneyo vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili. Ho vha ho kuvhangana gogo ḽa vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi bva Pharani ya Hamathi thungo ya devhula u vhuya u swika Mulamboni wa Egipita thungo ya tshipembe. 
2Chronicles7:9 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru vha kuvhangana, ngauri vho vha vho ita vhuṱambo ha u kumedza aḽiṱari vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, vha dovha vha ita vhuṱambo ha Mishasha vha fhedza maṅwe maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
2Chronicles7:10 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 23 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili Solomoni a ri vhathu vha ye mahayani avho, vha ṱuwa vha tshi pembela, vho takala mbiluni dzavho nga zwivhuya zwe Muṋe washu a itela Dafita na Solomoni na vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles7:11 Musi khosi Solomoni o no fhedza u fhaṱa thembele ya Muṋe washu na pfamo ya musanda, o no vuledza zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi mbiluni yawe zwa thembele ya Muṋe washu na pfamo yawe," 
2Chronicles7:12 Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza ene vhusiku a mu vhudza a ri, “Thabelo yau ndo i pfa, ndo ḓinangela fhethu afha uri i vhe thembele hune nda ḓo ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Musi ndi tshi vala ḽiṱaḓulu mvula ya si tsha na, kana nda ruma magerere a ḓa a ḽa zwimela masimuni, kana nda ḓisela vhathu vhanga dwadze," 
2Chronicles7:14 arali vhathu vhanga vhane vha vhidzwa nga dzina ḽanga vha ḓiṱukufhadza, vha rabela, vha ṱoḓa tshifhaṱuwo tshanga, vha laṱa vhuvhi havho, zwenezwo ndi ḓo zwi pfa ndi ṱaḓulu, nda vha hangwela vhutshinyi havho, nda fhodza shango ḽavho." 
2Chronicles7:15 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo linda fhethu hafhano, nda thetshelesa thabelo dzi rabelwaho fhano." 
2Chronicles7:16 Zwino thembele hei ndo i nanga, nda i shudufhadza uri dzina ḽanga ḽi vhe henefho lini na lini. Ndi ḓo i linda, nda i funa misi yoṱhe." 
2Chronicles7:17 “Huno iwe, arali wa ntshumela unga khotsi au Dafita, wa ita zwoṱhe zwine nda u laya, wa tevhedza ndayo dzanga na milayo yanga," 
2Chronicles7:18 ndi ḓo pfumbisa khuluṋoni yau ya vhuhosi, nga he nda vhofha mulanga na khotsi au Dafita zwiḽa ndi tshi ri, ‘A u nga kundwi u vha na muḓuhulu ane a ḓo vhusa Israele.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Huno arali na mpfuralela, na ṱutshela ndayo dzanga na milayo yanga ye nda ni ṋea, na yo shumela miṅwe midzimu, na i luvha," 
2Chronicles7:20 zwenezwo ndi ḓo thatha Vhaisraele shangoni ḽanga ḽe nda vha ṋea, nda landula thembele hei ye nda i shudufhadza uri i vhe ya dzina ḽanga. Ndi ḓo ita uri tshakha dzoṱhe dzi tshi i sedza dzi i nyadze." 
2Chronicles7:21 Naho thembele iyi zwino i tshi huliswa, misi yeneyo vhafhiri vha nḓila vhoṱhe vha vho ḓo tshenuwa vha ri, ‘Ndi mini Yahavee o ita zwo raliho shangoni ḽino na thembeleni iyi?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Vhathu vha ḓo konou fhindula vha ri, ‘Ndi nge vha ṱutshela Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, we a vha pfulusa Egipita, vha kuvhatedza miṅwe midzimu, vha i luvha vha i shumela, ndi zwe a vha ḓisela khombo hei.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Solomoni o fhedza miṅwaha ya 20 a tshi fhaṱa thembele ya Muṋe washu na pfamo yawe. 
2Chronicles8:2 Musi o fhedza a konou vusa miḓi ye a vha o ṋewa nga khosi Hiramu, a dzudza Vhaisraele khayo." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomoni a ṱuwa a yo thuba shango ḽa Hamathi na Tsoba," 
2Chronicles8:4 a ita na u vusa muḓi wa Thadimoro u re phangani, na miḓi yoṱhe ya u vhulungela zwiḽiwa ye a vha o i fhaṱa Hamathi." 
2Chronicles8:5 A vusa na miḓi ya Bethe Horoni wa Nṱha na Bethe Horoni wa Fhasi, miḓi ya mitsheṱo na dzikhoro na tswinga dza mabaphathi a tsimbi," 
2Chronicles8:6 na muḓi wa Baalathi na miḓi yoṱhe ya u vhulungela zwiḽiwa na miḓi yoṱhe he a vha a tshi vhea gariki dzawe na bere dzawe, a fhaṱa na tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshe a vha a tshi tou funa Jerusalema na Libanoni na mashangoni oṱhe he a vha a tshi vhusa." 
2Chronicles8:7 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha tsalela dza Vhahithi na Vhaamori na Vhapherisi na Vhahivi na Vhajebusi, vhe vha vha vhe si Vhaisraele," 
2Chronicles8:8 vhaḓuhulu vha vhenevho vhe vha vha vho sala shangoni, vha songo lozwiwaho nga Vhaisraele, Solomoni a vha shumisa nga khombekhombe, na ṋamusi zwi tshee zwo ralo." 
2Chronicles8:9 Hone Vhaisraele Solomoni ho ngo vha shumisa mishumo yeneyo, vhone vho vha vhe vhahali vhawe na vhalangi na vhakoma vhawe na vhalangi vha gariki dzawe na vhatshimbidzi vha dzigariki." 
2Chronicles8:10 Khosi Solomoni o vhea na magota a 250 mivhunduni yo fhambanaho. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoni o vha o dzea ṅwananyana wa Farao. Ene a mu pfulusa Muḓini wa Dafita a mu isa pfamoni ye a vha o mu fhaṱela, nge a ri, “Mufumakadzi wanga ho ngo fanela u dzula pfamoni ya khosi Dafita wa Israele, ngauri fhethu he mbulungelo ya Muṋe washu ya dzhena hone ndi hukhethwa.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Solomoni a ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho kha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu ye a vha o i fhaṱa phanḓa ha guḓa. 
2Chronicles8:13 O ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho a tshi tevhedza Mulayo wa Mushe wa zwi ṱoḓeaho ḓuvha ḽikhethwa ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe, Dzisabatha na vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi Muswa na vhuṱambo ha ṅwaha nga ṅwaha, vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa na vhuṱambo ha Mishasha." 
2Chronicles8:14 Solomoni a tevhedza ndayo dza khotsi awe Dafita, a nanga zwigwada zwa vhotshifhe a vha ṋea mishumo yavho, a nanga na Vhalivi uri vha range phanḓa hu tshi imbiwa thendo na u farisa vhotshifhe kha zwoṱhe zwi ṱoḓeaho misi yoṱhe. A ita na u nanga vhalindakhoro vha ita zwigwada zwa u linda khoro dzo fhambanaho, ngauri izwo yo vha i ndaela ya Dafita muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles8:15 A vho ngo vhuya vha pambuwa kha ndaela dza khosi Dafita dzi kwamaho vhotshifhe kana Vhalivi kha mafhungo oṱhe, hu tshi katelwa na mafhungo a nnḓu dza mbulungelo." 
2Chronicles8:16 Mushumo woṱhe wa Solomoni wa shumiwa, u bva ḓuvha ḽe ha tewa muteo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu ya vhuya ya fhela u fhaṱiwa, thembele ya Muṋe washu ya vha yo fhela." 
2Chronicles8:17 Ndi hone Solomoni a tshi takuwa a ya Etsioni Gebere na Elathi, khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe ya Edomo." 
2Chronicles8:18 Khosi Hiramu a mu rumela zwikepe zwe zwa vha zwi tshi khou langwa nga magota awe, vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓivha lwanzhe. Vhenevho vha tala lwanzheni nga zwikepe vhe na vhanna vha Solomoni vha ya shangoni ḽa Ofiri vha vhuya na musuku we wa vha u tshi nga eḓana thani dza 15 na hafu, vha u isa ha khosi Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Khosi ya musadzi ya Sheba a pfa bvumo ḽa khosi Solomoni a fara lwendo a ya Jerusalema uri a mu linge nga mbudziso dzi konḓaho. O ṱuwa na vhalanda vhanzhi na gamela dzó hwala zwilungi na musuku munzhi na matombo a mutengo muhulu, a swika ha Solomoni a amba nae nga zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi mbiluni yawe." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni a fhindula mbudziso dzawe dzoṱhe, hu si vhe na tshithihi tshe tsha mu konḓela u ṱalutshedza." 
2Chronicles9:3 Mufumakadzi wa Sheba a pfa vhuṱali ha Solomoni, a vhona na thembele ye a i fhaṱa," 
2Chronicles9:4 na zwiḽiwa zwa ḓafulani ḽawe na madzulele a vhahulwane vhawe na vhashumi vhane vha mu shumela vho ambara phuraphura dzavho na vhafari vha zwinwelo vho ambara phuraphura dzavho na muḓalo we vha ḓala vha tshi yo ṋekedza nduvho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, zwa mu akhamadza." 
2Chronicles9:5 Khosi iyo ya musadzi ya vhudza khosi ya ri, “Mafhungo e nda a pfa shangoni ḽanga nga mishumo yavho na vhuṱali havho ndi ngoho!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Hone a tho ngo tenda zwe vha mmbudza, nda vhuya nda swika nda zwi vhona nga anga maṱo. Vhukuma a tho ngo vhuya nda vhudzwa na hafu ya vhuṱali havho, zwine vha vha zwone zwi fhira kule zwe nda zwi pfa." 
2Chronicles9:7 Vhanna vhane vha vha navho vha na mashudu mangafhani! Magota avho vhane vha ḓi ima phanḓa havho vha tshi pfa vhuṱali havho vha na mashudu mangafhani! 
2Chronicles9:8 Nga hu rendwe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, we a vha takalela, a vha dzudza kha khuluṋoni yawe vha vha khosi uri vha vhuse nga dzina ḽa Yahavee Mudzimu wavho. Mudzimu wavho o funa Vhaisraele, a funa u vha tika lini na lini, ndi zwe vhone a vha ita khosi yavho, uri hu ḓi vha na khaṱhulo mbuya, hu itwe zwi re zwone.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Ndi hone mufumakadzi uyo a tshi ṋea khosi Solomoni thwala dze a ḓa nadzo dza musuku we wa vha u tshi nga fhira thani nṋa na zwilungi zwinzhi na matombo a mutengo muhulu. Ho vha hu sa athu vhuya ha vha na zwilungi zwi no nga izwo zwe iyo khosi ya Sheba ya zwi ṋea khosi Solomoni. 
2Chronicles9:10 Vhanna vha khosi Hiramu na vha khosi Solomoni vha ḓisa musuku we wa vha u tshi bva shangoni ḽa Ofiri, vha ḓisa na matanda a mudzhunipha na matombo a mutengo muhulu." 
2Chronicles9:11 Khosi Solomoni a dzhia matanda ayo a mudzhunipha a fhaṱa ngao zwiṱepisi zwa thembele ya Muṋe washu na zwa pfamo ya musanda, a ita dziharipa na madende a vhaimbi ngao. Zwa u ralo zwo vha zwi sa athu vhuya zwa vhonwa Juda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Khosi Solomoni a ṋea khosi ya musadzi ya Sheba zwoṱhe zwe ya vha i tshi zwi tama ya zwi humbela, a mu ṋea zwi no fhira zwe ya mu ḓela nazwo. Ndi hone mufumakadzi uyo a tshi vhuelela shangoni ḽawe na vhalanda vhawe." 
2Chronicles9:13 Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe khosi Solomoni o vha a tshi wana musuku une wa nga vha thani dza 23," 
2Chronicles9:14 hu sa vhalwi mithelo ine ya ḓiswa nga vhashavhi na vhavhambadzi. Mahosi oṱhe a Arabia na vhavhusi vha madzingu a Israele na vhone vho vha vha tshi ḓisa musuku na siliva ha Solomoni. 
2Chronicles9:15 Khosi Solomoni a fula zwiṱangu zwihulu zwa 200 zwa musuku, tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho fhomiwa musuku wo fuliwaho une wa nga vha khilogiramu ṱhanu na mbili." 
2Chronicles9:16 Solomoni a ita na zwiṱangu zwiṱuku zwa 300 zwa musuku wo fuliwaho, tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi na musuku une wa nga vha khilogiramu tharu na hafu. Khosi ya zwi vhea Huvhewazwihali ha Maṱaka a Libanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Ndi hone khosi i tshi fhaṱa khuluṋoni khulu nga ṋanga dza nḓou ya fhomiwa nga musuku u songo vangiwaho. 
2Chronicles9:18 Khuluṋoni iyo yo vha i na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na tshithihi, yo mometshedzwa tshivheamilenzhe tsho fhomiwaho musuku. Masia oṱhe a khuluṋoni ho vha hu na zwitikazwanḓa, hu na tshifanyiso tsha ndau yo imaho ngeno na ngeno hazwo." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ho vha ho ima ndau dza 12 dza zwifanyiso kha izwo zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na tshithihi, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa tshiṱepisi ho ima nthihi. Ho vha hu sa athu vhuya ha vha na khuluṋoni ya u ralo kha muṅwe muvhuso." 
2Chronicles9:20 Zwinwelo zwoṱhe zwa khosi Solomoni zwo vha zwi zwa musuku, na thundu yoṱhe i re Huvhewazwihali ha Maṱaka a Libanoni yo vha i ya musuku u songo vangiwaho. Misi ya Solomoni siliva yo vha i tshi tou nyadziwa." 
2Chronicles9:21 Khosi yo vha i na zwikepe zwa vhushavhi zwe zwa vha zwi tshi tala lwanzheni na zwa vhalanda vha khosi Hiramu zwi tshi ya Tharashishi. Ho vha hu tshi ri ho fhela miṅwaha miraru zwa vhuya zwo hwala musuku na siliva na ṋanga dza nḓou na ṱhoho na mapfeṋe. 
2Chronicles9:22 Khosi Solomoni o vha a tshi fhira maṅwe mahosi oṱhe a ḽifhasi nga lupfumo na vhuṱali. 
2Chronicles9:23 Mahosi oṱhe a ḽifhasi o vha a tshi funa u thetshelesa Solomoni a tshi amba uri vha pfe vhuṱali he Mudzimu a vhu vhea mbiluni yawe. 
2Chronicles9:24 Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe, muṅwe na muṅwe we a mu dalela o vha a tshi ḓa na nduvho, zwithu zwa siliva na musuku, na zwifuko na zwihali na zwilungi na bere na meila." 
2Chronicles9:25 Khosi Solomoni o vha e na madanga a bere na gariki zwi no swika 4 000 na vhanameli vha bere vha 12 000 vhe a vha o vha vhea miḓini ine ya dzula dzigariki, dziṅwe a tshi dzula nadzo Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles9:26 Solomoni o vha a tshi vhusa mahosi oṱhe u bva mulamboni wa Yufuratha u swika shangoni ḽa Vhafilista u vhuya u swika nga masakha a Egipita. 
2Chronicles9:27 Khosi ya khokha siliva Jerusalema ya anda unga matombo, matanda a mikedara a anda unga mihuyu zwigodini." 
2Chronicles9:28 Bere dza Solomoni dzo vha dzi tshi bva Egipita na mashangoni maṅwe oṱhe. 
2Chronicles9:29 Mafhungo maṅwe a Solomoni u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa kha Histori ya Muporofita Nathani na kha Vhuporofita ha Ahia wa Shilo na kha Mabono a muporofita Ido, a tshi porofita nga muvhuso wa khosi Jerobiamu wa Israele, ṅwana wa Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni o vhusa ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 40. 
2Chronicles9:31 Solomoni a dzama, a swiṱwa Muḓini wa Dafita khotsi awe. Ṅwana wawe Rehabiamu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehabiamu a takuwa a ya Shikheme, ngauri Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho vha vho ya henengei uri vha mu vhumbe khosi." 
2Chronicles10:2 Musi Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati a tshi zwi pfa, a vhuya a tshi bva Egipita, ngauri o vha o shavhela Egipita a tshi shavha khosi Solomoni." 
2Chronicles10:3 Vhathu vha vhidzisa Jerobiamu, ene na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ya ha Rehabiamu vha swika vha mu vhudza vha ri," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Khotsi aṋu vho ri hwesa dzhogo ya u lemela, huno zwino ri fhungudzeleni mushumo wa tshiṱuhu na dzhogo i lemelaho ye vha ri hwesa yone, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo vha vhalanda vhaṋu.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehabiamu a fhindula a ri, “Vhuyani hó fhela maḓuvha mararu.” Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ṱuwa." 
2Chronicles10:6 Khosi Rehabiamu a vhudzisa vhakalaha vhe vha vha vha tshi shumela khotsi awe Solomoni vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, vha tshi vha eletshedza, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nnyeletshedzeni uri avha vhathu ndi vha fhindule hani!”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Arali vhathu avha na vha itela vhuthu, na vha takadza, na vha fhindula nga nḓila i takadzaho, vha ḓo vha vhalanda vhaṋu tshoṱhe.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Huno Rehabiamu a landula nyeletshedzo ya vhahulwane, a yo vhudzisa vhaṱhannga vhe vha aluwa nae, vhe vha vha vha tshi khou mu shumela vhe vhone vhaeletshedzi vhawe." 
2Chronicles10:9 Rehabiamu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Inwi ni tshi nnyeletshedza ni ri mini? Vhathu avha ri fanela u vha fhindula hani vhane vha nkhumbela vha ri ndi vha fhungudzele dzhogo ye khotsi anga a vha hwesa yone?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Vhaṱhannga vhe vha aluwa nae vha fhindula vha ri, “Vhudzani vhathu vhe vha ni vhudza vha ri khotsi aṋu o vha hwesa dzhogo ya u lemela, hone inwi ni vha leludzele dzhogo, ni ri, ‘Tshinwaanwane tshanga tsho denyefhala u fhira khundu dza khotsi anga." 
2Chronicles10:11 Khotsi anga vho ni hwesa dzhogo ya u lemela, nṋe ndi ḓo ita uri i lemelese. Khotsi anga vho ni rwa nga zwimebi, nṋe ndi ḓo ni rwa nga mboma.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Ho no fhela maḓuvha mararu Jerobiamu na vhathu vhoṱhe vha vhuelela ha khosi Rehabiamu nga he a vha vhudza a ri, “Vhuyani ho fhela maḓuvha mararu.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Khosi ya vha ḽela vhuhali i tshi vha fhindula, ya landula nyeletshedzo ya vhahulwane," 
2Chronicles10:14 ya tevhela nyeletshedzo ya vhaṱhannga, ya ri, “Khotsi anga vho ni hwesa dzhogo i lemelaho, nṋe ndi ḓo ni hwesa i lemelesaho. Khotsi anga vho ni rwa nga zwimebi, nṋe ndi ḓo ni rwa nga mboma.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Khosi a yo ngo thetshelesa vhathu, ngauri izwo zwo iteaho zwo vha zwi tshi bva kha Mudzimu uri hu khunyelele zwe Muṋe washu a amba a tshi vhudza Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati nga mulomo wa Ahia wa Shilo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Musi Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi vhona uri khosi yo landula zwe vha humbela, vha fhindula khosi vha ri, “Ri na mukovhe-ḓe na Dafita? Riṋe a ri vhathihi na ṅwana wa Isai! Vhaisraele, humelani hayani! Iwe Dafita, sala na vha nnḓu yau!” Ndi hone Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha tshi vhuelela hayani." 
2Chronicles10:17 Hone Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula miḓini ya Juda vha ḓi vhuswa nga Rehabiamu. 
2Chronicles10:18 Khosi Rehabiamu a ruma Adoniramu mulangi wa mushumo wa khombekhombe, hone Vhaisraele vha mu kanḓa nga matombo vha mu vhulaha. Khosi Rehabiamu zwa ri u ralo a ṱavhanya a namela gariki yawe a shavhela Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles10:19 Vhaisraele vha mbo ḓi vha vho shandukela nnḓu ya Dafita, na ṋamusi." 
2Chronicles11:1 Musi Rehabiamu a tshi swika Jerusalema, a kuvhanganya vhahali vhomakone vha 180 000 vha matsinde a Juda na Benyamini, a tshi ri a bve pfumo a yo lwa na Vhaisraele uri muvhuso u vhuelela khae." 
2Chronicles11:2 Hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Shemaya muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu ḽa ri," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Vhudza Rehabiamu ṅwana wa Solomoni khosi ya Juda na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe kha ḽa Juda na ḽa Benyamini u ri," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Yahavee u ri: Ni songo yo lwa na vha haṋu. Muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu nga a ye hayani ngauri izwo zwo itwa nga Nṋe!’ ” Ndi hone vha tshi thetshelesa maipfi a Muṋe washu, vha huma vha si tsha yo lwa na Jerobiamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehabiamu o dzula Jerusalema, a vusa miḓi ya Juda yo tsireledzwaho." 
2Chronicles11:6 Ndi Betlehema na Etamu na Thekua 
2Chronicles11:7 na Bethe Tsuru na Sokho na Adulamu 
2Chronicles11:8 na Gathi na Maresha na Zifi 
2Chronicles11:9 na Adoraimi na Lakhishi 
2Chronicles11:10 na Azeka na Tsora na Ayaloni na Hebroni. Heyo yo vha i yone miḓi yo tsireledzwaho kha ḽa Juda na Benyamini. 
2Chronicles11:11 Miḓi iyo a i fhaṱela mitsheṱo mihulu, a vhea vhalangammbi khayo na zwiḽiwa na mapfura a muolivi na waini," 
2Chronicles11:12 a vhea zwiṱangu na mafumo miḓini yoṱhe, a i khwaṱhisa vhukuma. A vhusa ḽa Juda na ḽa Benyamini nga u ralo." 
2Chronicles11:13 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha madzingu oṱhe a Israele vha ima na Rehabiamu. 
2Chronicles11:14 Vhalivi vha ita na u ṱutshela mashango avho a pfulo na thundu yavho vha ya Juda na Jerusalema nge Jerobiamu na vhana vhawe vha vha landula vha si tende vha tshi shuma vhe vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles11:15 Jerobiamu a vhea vhotshifhe vhawe vha zwitembele zwikwarani na vha zwitungulo zwa madimoni na zwa ṋamana zwe a vha o zwi ita. 
2Chronicles11:16 Matsinde oṱhe a Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vho ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele mbilu dzavho, vha tevhela Vhalivi vha ya Jerusalema u ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho zwiṱhavhelo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Vha khwaṱhisa muvhuso wa Juda, vha tikedza Rehabiamu ṅwana wa Solomoni miṅwaha miraru, vha tshi kanda vhuṱalani ha khosi Dafita na khosi Solomoni misi yeneyo." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehabiamu o dzea Mahalathi ṅwananyana wa Jerimotho, ṅwana wa Dafita. Mme a uyo ṅwananyana o vha e Abihaili, ṅwananyana wa Eliaba ṅwana wa Isai." 
2Chronicles11:19 Vho vha na vhana vhararu vha vhatuka, Jeushi na Shemaria na Zahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ngavhuya a vhinga Maakha ṅwananyana wa Abisalomo, vha vha na vhana vhaṋa vha vhatuka, Abia na Athai na Zisa na Shelomithi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehabiamu o vha a tshi funesa Maakha ṅwananyana wa Abisalomo u fhira vhafumakadzi vhawe vhoṱhe na vhasadzi vhawe vha dziphuli. Vhafumakadzi vhawe vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 18, a dovha a vha na vhasadzi vha 60 vha dziphuli, vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vha vha 28, vha vhananyana vha vha 60." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehabiamu a vhea Abia ṅwana wa Maakha uri a vhe ene ṅwana muhulwane kha vhana vha hawe, a tshi itela uri a mu vhumbe khosi." 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehabiamu a vhamba maano, a balanganya vhana vhawe na madzingu oṱhe a Juda na Benyamini, na miḓi yoṱhe i na mitsheṱo. A vha ṱunḓela zwiḽiwa zwinzhi, a vha dzetshela vhasadzi vhanzhi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Musi Rehabiamu o no pfumbisa vhuhosi hawe, ó no khwaṱha, ene na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha ṱutshela mulayo wa Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles12:2 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu wa muvhuso wa khosi Rehabiamu, Shishaka khosi ya Egipita a dia Jerusalema, nge Muṋe washu a vhona vha si tsha fulufhedzea." 
2Chronicles12:3 Shishaka a takuwa Egipita na gariki dza 1 200 na vhanameli vha dzibere vha 60 000 na mmbi dzi sa vhalei dza Vhalibia na Vhasuki na Vhakushu. 
2Chronicles12:4 A kunda miḓi ya Juda i na mitsheṱo, a vhuya a swika Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles12:5 Ndi hone muporofita Shemaya a tshi ḓa ha khosi Rehabiamu na vharangaphanḓa vha Juda vhe vha vha vho kuvhangana Jerusalema nga u ofha Shishaka, a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘No nṱutshela, zwenezwo, Nṋe zwino ndi a ni ṱutshela nda ni kumedza Shishaka.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Vharangaphanḓa vha Israele na khosi vha ḓiṱukufhadza vha ri, “Muṋe washu u ri ita zwo ri fanelaho.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi vhona uri vha a ḓiṱukufhadza, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Shemaya ḽa ri, “Vhunga vho ḓiṱukufhadza, thi nga vha lozwi, ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi vha lamulela. Mbiti dzanga thi nga dzi shululeli Jerusalema nga Shishaka." 
2Chronicles12:8 Naho zwo ralo, vha ḓo vhuswa ngae, uri vha vhone phambano ya u shumela Nṋe na u shumela mahosi a ḽiṅwe shango.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Musi Shishaka khosi ya Egipita a tshi dia Jerusalema, o hwala lupfumo lwa thembele ya Muṋe washu na lupfumo lwa pfamo ya musanda a ṱuwa nalwo. O dzhia zwoṱhe, hu tshi angaredzwa na zwiṱangu zwa musuku zwe zwa itwa nga khosi Solomoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ndi hone khosi Rehabiamu a tshi ita zwiṱangu zwa musinaseṱha zwa u vhumbela zwenezwo, a zwi kumedza vhalangi vha vhalindi vha no shuma muṋangoni wa pfamo ya musanda." 
2Chronicles12:11 Musi khosi i tshi ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, vhalindi vho vha vha tshi i fhelekedza vho fara zwiṱangu, ngavhuya vha konou zwi vhuedzedza kamarani ya vhalindi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Vhunga Rehabiamu o ḓiṱukufhadza, mbiti dza Muṋe washu dza mu ṱutshela, a si lozwiwe tshoṱhe. Vhukuma, Juda zwivhuya zwo vha zwi tshee hone." 
2Chronicles12:13 Khosi Rehabiamu a vhusa Jerusalema a ṱoka midzi a ḓi dzula e khosi. Rehabiamu a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 41, a vhusa a fhedza miṅwaha ya 17 e Jerusalema, wone muḓi we Muṋe washu a u nanga kha matsinde oṱhe a Vhaisraele a vhea dzina ḽawe hone. Mme a Rehabiamu o vha a tshi pfi Naama, wa Amoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 A ita zwo vhifhaho nge a vha a songo vhea mbilu yawe kha u ita zwine Muṋe washu a zwi funa. 
2Chronicles12:15 Mafhungo a Rehabiamu, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, na a lutsinga lwawe, o ṅwalwa kha Histori ya Muporofita Shemaya na kha Histori ya muporofita Ido. Rehabiamu na Jerobiamu vho vha vha tshi ḓi endela u lwa." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehabiamu a dzama, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita, ṅwana wawe Abia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wa Jerobiamu wa Israele, Abia a vha khosi ya Juda," 
2Chronicles13:2 a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha miraru. Mme a Abia o vha a tshi pfi Mikhaya, ṅwananyana wa Uriele wa muḓi wa Gibia. Ha vuwa nndwa hu tshi lwa Abia na Jerobiamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abia a bva pfumo na vhahali vhomakone vha 400 000, Jerobiamu a yo lwa nae e na vhahali vhomakone vha 800 000." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abia a ima thavhani ya Tsemaraimi zwivhangani zwa Efraimi, a vhidzelela a ri, “Jerobiamu na Vhaisraele noṱhe, nthetsheleseni!" 
2Chronicles13:5 A ni zwi ḓivhi naa uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o ṋea Dafita na vhaḓuhulu vhawe vhuhosi ha Israele lini na lini nga mulanga u sa pfukwi? 
2Chronicles13:6 Naho zwo ralo Jerobiamu ṅwana wa Nebati, mukoma wa Solomoni ṅwana wa Dafita, a shandukela Muṋe wawe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Vhaṅwe vhavhi vha sa ḓivhalei vha ḓibaḓekanya nae vha vutshela Rehabiamu ṅwana wa Solomoni zwiḽa a tshee muṱuku a sa athu kona u ḓihumbulela, a sa athu vha na nungo dza u imedzana navho." 
2Chronicles13:8 Zwino ni ita vhukwila ha u lwa na muvhuso wa Muṋe washu u re zwanḓani zwa vhaḓuhulu vha Dafita. Vhukuma ni tou vha mmbi khulu nahone ni na ṋamana dza musuku dze Jerobiamu a vhumba uri dzi vhe midzimu yaṋu. 
2Chronicles13:9 A thi ri no thatha vhotshifhe vha Muṋe washu vhana vha Aroni na Vhalivi, na vhumbela vhotshifhe vhaṋu sa zwine zwa itwa nga tshakha dza maṅwe mashango! Muṅwe na muṅwe ane a ḓa a ḓikumedza e na mboho na thutha ṱhanu na mbili a nga ḓi vha tshifhe, a vha tshifhe wa zwithu zwi si midzimu."
