2Chronicles13:10 “A vha riṋe, Mudzimu washu ndi Muṋe washu, a ro ngo mu furalela. Vhotshifhe vha no shumela Muṋe washu ndi vhana vha Aroni, vha tshi fariswa nga Vhalivi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe na madekwana maṅwe na maṅwe vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na zwioro zwi nukhelelaho. Vha vhea vhurotho ḓafulani ḽo kunaho ḽa nduvho, vha funga mbone dzi re kha zwivheambone zwa musuku madekwana maṅwe na maṅwe. Ri khou tevhedza zwine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a zwi ṱoḓa. Hone inwi no mu furalela." 
2Chronicles13:12 Mudzimu u na riṋe, ndi Ene murangaphanḓa washu. Vhotshifhe vhawe vha ḓo lidza phalaphala dzavho dza nndwa ra lwa na inwi. Inwi vhanna vha Israele, ni songo lwa na Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu, ni ḓo kundwa.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Zwino Jerobiamu o vha o ruma mmbi dza mona murahu ha mmbi ya Juda uri musi ene o livhana na mmbi ya Juda, dzone dzi vha lalele nga murahu." 
2Chronicles13:14 Mmbi ya Juda ya rembuluwa ya vhona uri i khou diwa hoṱhe nga phanḓa na nga murahu. Ndi hone vha tshi lilela Muṋe washu. Vhotshifhe vha lidza phalaphala dzavho," 
2Chronicles13:15 vhanna vha Juda vha ṱavha mukosi wa nndwa, Mudzimu a kunda Jerobiamu na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha shavha Abia na mmbi ya Juda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Vhaisraele vha shavha mmbi ya Juda i tshi tou swika, Mudzimu a vha lamulela zwanḓani zwavho." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abia na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha kunda mmbi ya Israele, ha vhulawa vhanna vha Israele vha 500 000, vhone vhomakone." 
2Chronicles13:18 Vhanna vha Israele vha kundiwa musi wonoyo, vhanna vha Juda vho kunda nge vha ḓitika nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abia a pandamedza Jerobiamu, a mu dzhiela miḓi ya Bethele na Jeshana na Efroni na miḓana yo i tangaho." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobiamu a si tsha dovha a vha na maanḓa misi ya Abia. Muṋe washu a vhuya a mu rwa, a fa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Maanḓa a Abia a ḓi hulela a tshi ya. A dzea vhafumakadzi vha 14, a vha na vhana vha 22 vha vhatuka na vhananyana vha 16." 
2Chronicles13:22 Mafhungo maṅwe a zwe Abia a ita na zwe a amba, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Muporofita Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Khosi Abia a dzama a zwiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita. Ṅwana wawe Asa a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe, misi yawe shango ḽa lala ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya fumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa a ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe, a ita zwi re zwone." 
2Chronicles14:3 A thutha aḽiṱari dzisili na zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, a pwasha matombo a zwitungulo. A remekanya tshifanyiso tsha thanda tsha Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi." 
2Chronicles14:4 A laya vhathu vha Juda uri vha ite zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho a zwi funa, vha tevhedza milayo yawe na ndaela dzawe." 
2Chronicles14:5 A thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani na aḽiṱari dza u fhisela zwioro miḓini yoṱhe ya Juda, muvhusoni wawe ha vha na mulalo." 
2Chronicles14:6 A vusa miḓi yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo kha ḽa Juda; ngauri ḽo vha ḽo lala. A ho ngo vha na we a lwa nae miṅwaha yeneyo, nge Muṋe washu a ladza shango ḽawe." 
2Chronicles14:7 A vhudza vhathu vha Juda a ri, “Nga ri tsireledze miḓi hei nga u i tangedza nga mitsheṱo na dzithawara na dzigethe na khoṋo dza tsimbi. Shango ḽi kha ḓi vha ḽashu nge ra ita zwine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a zwi funa. Ro mu ṱoḓa, ndi zwe a ri ladzela shango masia oṱhe.” Ndi hone vha tshi fhaṱa, zwa vha nakela." 
2Chronicles14:8 Khosi Asa o vha e na mmbi ya vhanna vha 300 000 vha Juda, vho shoma zwiṱangu zwihulu, vhe na mafumo, na vha Benyamini vha 280 000, vho shoma zwiṱangu zwiṱuku, vhe na vhura. Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vhe vhahali nndwani." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zera wa Kushu a bva a yo lwa navho e na mmbi khulu na gariki dza 300, a vhuya a swika Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa a bva a yo lwa nae, vha imedzana govhani ḽa Tsefathi tsini ha Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Ndi hone Asa a tshi rabela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe a ri, “Muṋe washu, a hu na a no nga Iwe ane a nga farisa a shayaho nungo a tshi lwa na wa maanḓa. Yawee Muṋe washu, Mudzimu washu, ri farise, hufha ri tshi ḓitika nga Iwe, ro ḓa u lwa na mmbi hei khulu nga dzina ḽau. Yawee Muṋe washu, Iwe u Mudzimu washu, u songo tenda muthu a tshi u kunda.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Muṋe washu a kunda Vhakushu vha tshi lwa na Asa na mmbi ya Juda. Vhakushu vha shavha," 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa na mmbi yawe vha vha pandamedza u vhuya u swika Gerara. Ha vhulawa Vhakushu vhanzhi mmbi yavho ya si tsha vha na nungo, vha tou pwashekanywa vha tshi lwa na Muṋe washu na mmbi dzawe. Vhanna vha Juda vha thuba thundu nnzhi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Vha phusukanya miḓi yoṱhe yo tangaho Gerara, nge Muṋe washu a vha o i dzhenisa nyofho. Vha ṱangula miḓi yoṱhe nge henefho ha vha hu na thundu nnzhi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Vha ita na u dia mishasha ya vhalisa, vha thuba nngu nnzhi na mbudzi na dzigamela. Ndi hone vha tshi vhuelela Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles15:1 Muya wa Mudzimu a ḓa kha Azaria ṅwana wa Odede. 
2Chronicles15:2 A takuwa a yo ṱanganedza khosi Asa, a mu vhudza a ri, “Kha vha nthetshelese, vhamusanda Vho-Asa na vhathu vha Juda na vha Benyamini! Muṋe washu u na inwi arali ni khae. Arali na mu ṱoḓa ni ḓo mu wana, hone arali na mu furalela, u ḓo ni furalela-vho." 
2Chronicles15:3 Vhaisraele vho fhedza tshifhinga tshilapfu vha si na Mudzimu wa ngoho, vha si na vhotshifhe vhane vha vha funza, vha si na mulayo." 
2Chronicles15:4 Hone musi vhe khomboni vho rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, vha mu ṱoḓa, a vha ṱanganedza." 
2Chronicles15:5 Misi yeneyo zwo vha zwi tshi ofhisa u sokou fara lwendo, ngauri vhadzulapo vhoṱhe vha mashango vho vha vha tshi tshila hu si na mulalo." 
2Chronicles15:6 Tshakha dzo vha dzi tshi kandeledzana, miḓi ya phusukanyana, ngauri Mudzimu o vha a tshi vha vilinganya nga khombo dzo fhambanaho." 
2Chronicles15:7 Hone inwi ni khwaṱhe, ni songo kulea nungo, ngauri ni ḓo wana pfufho ya mushumo waṋu.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa a tshi pfa ayo maipfi a uyo muporofita ṅwana wa Odede, a pfa e na nungo. A thutha zwitungulo zwi nengisaho shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda na ḽa Benyamini, na miḓini ye a i thuba zwivhangani zwa Efraimi. A vusa aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu ye ya vha i phanḓa ha guḓa ḽa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ndi hone a tshi kuvhanganya vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na vha Benyamini na vhathu vha Efraimi na vha Manase na vha Simioni vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula navho, ngauri vhunzhi ha vhathu vho vha vho no vhuya khae vha tshi bva Israele, nga u vhona uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe u nae." 
2Chronicles15:10 Vha kuvhangana Jerusalema nga ṅwedzi wa vhuraru wa ṅwaha wa 15 wa muvhuso wa Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Musi wonoyo vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwa kholomo dza 700 na nngu na mbudzi dza 7 000 dze vha thuba vha vhuya nadzo. 
2Chronicles15:12 Vha vhofha mulanga wa uri vha ḓo luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, nga mbilu yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine vha vha zwone." 
2Chronicles15:13 Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha sa ḓo luvha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, vha pfi vha vhulawe, muhulwane kana muṱuku, munna kana musadzi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Vha anela Muṋe washu vha tshi tou zwi bula, vha tshi tou ṱavha mukosi, vha tshi lidza dziphalaphala na dziṋanga." 
2Chronicles15:15 Vhathu vha Juda vhoṱhe vha pembelela uyo mulanga nge vha vha vho u vhofha nga mbilu yoṱhe. Vha ṱoḓa Muṋe washu nga mbilu nthihi, Ene a vha ṱanganedza, a ladza shango ḽavho masia oṱhe." 
2Chronicles15:16 Khosi Asa a ita na u sudzulusa makhulu wawe Maakha, vha si tsha vha mufumakadzi makhulu wa khosi, nge vha vha vho ita tshitungulo tsha thanda tsha Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi wa mbebo. Asa a rema itsho tshitungulo tsha thanda tsha wela fhasi, a tshi fhanzekanya, a ya a tshi fhisa Govhani ḽa Kidroni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Naho Asa a songo thutha zwitembele zwoṱhe zwa zwikwarani kha ḽa Israele, mbilu yawe yo vha yo ḓi fulufhela Muṋe washu vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
2Chronicles15:18 Asa a dzhia siliva na musuku na zwithu zwe khotsi awe Abia vha vha vho zwi kumedza Mudzimu a zwi vhea thembeleni ya Mudzimu, ene a engedza dziṅwe khazwo." 
2Chronicles15:19 A ho ngo tsha vha na nndwa u vhuya u swika hu tshi fhela miṅwaha ya 35 ya muvhuso wa Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 36 wa muvhuso wa Asa khosi ya Juda, Baasha khosi ya Israele a dia shango ḽa Juda, a fhaṱeledza muḓi wa Rama nga mutsheṱo uri hu si vhe na ane a bva kana a dzhena shangoni ḽa Asa khosi ya Juda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa zwenezwo a bvisa siliva na musuku mbulungeloni dza thembele ya Muṋe washu na dza pfamo yawe, a isa ha Beni Hadadi khosi ya Aramu, we a vha a tshi vhusa e Damasko. Asa a ri," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Nga ri vhofhe mulanga unga khotsi anga na khotsi avho vho vha vhe na mulanga. Nduvho ya siliva na musuku asiyo. Zwino nga vha vhofholole mulanga we vha vhofha na Baasha khosi ya Israele uri a nnditshe.” 
2Chronicles16:4 Beni Hadadi a pfana na khosi Asa, a ruma vhalangammbi vhawe vha yo dia miḓi ya Israele. Vha thuba Iyoni na Dani na Abele Mayimi, na miḓi yoṱhe ya Nafuthali he ha vha ho vhulungwa zwiḽiwa." 
2Chronicles16:5 Musi Baasha a tshi zwi pfa, a litsha u fhaṱela Rama mutsheṱo, a ṱutshela mushumo wawe." 
2Chronicles16:6 Ndi hone khosi Asa a tshi ramba vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda, vha hwala matombo na matanda afho Rama zwe Baasha a vha a tshi khou fhaṱa ngazwo, a fhaṱa mitsheṱo ya u tsireledza miḓi ya Geba na Mitsipha ngazwo." 
2Chronicles16:7 Misi yeneyo Hanani muporofita a ḓa ha Asa khosi ya Juda, a ri, “Mmbi ya khosi ya Aramu yo vha ponyoka, nge vha ḓitika nga khosi ya Aramu, vha si ḓitike nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho." 
2Chronicles16:8 Vhakushu na Vhalibia vho vha vhe si mmbi khulu ye ya vha i na gariki nnzhi na vhanameli vha dzibere naa? Naho zwo ralo zwiḽa vha tshi ḓitika nga Muṋe washu, o vha kumedza zwanḓani zwavho." 
2Chronicles16:9 Ndi uri Muṋe washu u sedza ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe uri avho vhane mbilu dzavho dza ḓikumedza Ene tshoṱhe a vha tike nga nungo dzawe. Vhone vho ita zwithu zwa vhutsilu, u bva zwino vha ḓo dzula vhe kha nndwa.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa a sinyutshela uyo muporofita nge a amba izwo, a tou duga nga mbiti lwe a mu hoṋela dzhele. Misi yeneyo Asa a ita tshiṱuhu a tshi kandeledza vhaṅwe vhathu." 
2Chronicles16:11 Mafhungo oṱhe a muvhuso wa Asa, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda na a Israele." 
2Chronicles16:12 Nga ṅwaha wa 39 wa muvhuso wa Asa, a holefhadzwa nga vhulwadze ha milenzhe. Naho uho vhulwadze ho vha vhu tshi ofhisa, na musi a tshi lwala ho ngo humbela Muṋe washu uri a mu farise, o vha a tshi lafhiwa nga dziṅanga fhedzi." 
2Chronicles16:13 Nga ṅwaha wa 41 wa muvhuso wa Asa, a dzama," 
2Chronicles16:14 a swiṱwa tshaloni tsha tombo ḽe a ḓikorela Muḓini wa Dafita. Vha mu eḓedza kha vhulalo ho ṋuṋedzwaho zwilungi na zwinukheleli zwo fhambanaho, vha vhasa mulilo muhulu vha tshi itela u mu hulisa." 
2Chronicles17:1 Josafati a vha khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe, a pfumbisa vhuhosi hawe shangoni ḽa Israele," 
2Chronicles17:2 a vhea mmbi miḓini yoṱhe ya Juda yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo, a vhea vhahali kha ḽa Juda na miḓini yo thubiwaho nga khotsi awe shangoni ḽa Efraimi." 
2Chronicles17:3 Muṋe washu o vha e na Josafati nge a kanda vhuṱalani ha makhulukuku wawe Dafita ha musi a tshi thoma u vhusa, a si luvhe midzimu ya Baali." 
2Chronicles17:4 Ene o shumela Mudzimu wa khotsi awe, a thetshelesa ndayo dzawe, a si tevhedze maitele a Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles17:5 Muṋe washu a ita uri muvhuso wawe u ṱoke midzi, vhathu vha Juda vhoṱhe vha isa nduvho ha Josafati, a vha na lupfumo luhulu, a huliswa." 
2Chronicles17:6 A tshila a tshi ita zwine Muṋe washu a zwi funa, a thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani na zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi shangoni ḽa Juda." 
2Chronicles17:7 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuraru wa muvhuso wa Josafati, a ruma magota awe Benihaili na Obadia na Zakaria na Nathaniele na Mikhaya vha yo funza miḓini ya Juda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Vhenevho vho fhelekedzwa nga Vhalivi vhaṱanu na vhaṋa na vhotshifhe vhavhili. Vhalivi vho vha vhe Shemaya na Nethania na Zebadia na Asaele na Shemiramotho na Jehonathani na Adonia na Tobia na Tobadonia, vhotshifhe vho vha vhe Elishama na Jehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Vho dzhia bugu ya Mulayo wa Muṋe washu, vha buḓekanya ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda, vha mona na miḓi yoṱhe ya Juda vha tshi funza vhathu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Muṋe washu a ita uri mivhuso ya mashango oṱhe o tangaho Juda i dzhenwe nga nyofho ya si tsha lwa na khosi Josafati. 
2Chronicles17:11 Vhaṅwe Vhafilista vha isela Josafati zwifhiwa na nduvho ya siliva, Vhaarabia vha mu isela masambi a nngu, thutha dza 7 700, na mbudzi dza 7 700." 
2Chronicles17:12 Maanḓa a Josafati a ḓi hula a tshi ya, a fhaṱa madzhavhelo na miḓi ya u vhulungela zwiḽiwa shangoni ḽa Juda," 
2Chronicles17:13 a shuma mishumo minzhi miḓini ya Juda. Jerusalema a vhea vhahali vhomakone. 
2Chronicles17:14 Vha ṅwalwa zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho. Vha tsinde ḽa Juda, vhalangammbi vha zwigwada zwa 1 000, vho vha vhe na mulangammbi Adina, e na vhahali vha 300 000 vhane a vha langa." 
2Chronicles17:15 Ha tevhela mulangammbi Jehohanani, e na vhahali vha 280 000," 
2Chronicles17:16 ha tevhela Amasia ṅwana wa Zikhiri, ene o tou ḓikumedza u shumela Muṋe washu, e na vha 200 000." 
2Chronicles17:17 Vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vho vha vhe na mulangammbi Eliada, ene muhali nndwani, e na vhanna vha 200 000 vhane a vha langa, vho fara vhura na zwiṱangu." 
2Chronicles17:18 Ha tevhela Jehozabadi, e na vhanna vha 180 000, vho shomaho u bva pfumo." 
2Chronicles17:19 Ndi vhone vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi shumela khosi Jerusalema, ha dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhahali vhe a vha vhea miḓini yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda." 
2Chronicles18:1 Zwino Josafati khosi ya Juda a vha na lupfumo luhulu, a tou vha na bvumo, a dzetshelana na nnḓu ya Ahaba khosi ya Israele." 
2Chronicles18:2 Hó no fhela miṅwahanyana Josafati a takuwa a yo dalela Ahaba muḓini wa Samaria. Ahaba a mu ṱhavhela nngu nnzhi na kholomo, a ṱhavhela na vhathu vhe a ḓa navho, a mu kunga uri a yo dia muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahaba khosi ya Israele a humbela Josafati khosi ya Juda a ri, “Vha nga ṱuwa na nṋe ra yo dia muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi naa?” Josafati a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe na vhone ri tshithu tshithihi, vhathu vhanga ndi vhathu vhavho, ri ḓo baḓekana navho nndwani.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Huno Josafati a dovha a vhudza khosi ya Israele a ri, “Nga vha range u vhudzisa Muṋe washu.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Ndi hone khosi ya Israele i tshi kuvhanganya vhaporofita vha 400 ya vha vhudzisa ya ri, “Ri bve pfumo ri yo lwa na muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi kana ri litshe?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Nga vha ye, Mudzimu u ḓo kumedza uyo muḓi zwanḓani zwavho.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Hone Josafati a vhudzisa a ri, “A hu tshee na muṅwe muporofita wa Muṋe washu fhano ane a nga ri vhudzisela?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Khosi ya Israele ya fhindula Josafati ya ri, “Hu kha ḓi vha na munna muthihi ane a nga ri vhudzisela ha Muṋe washu, hone ndi a mu vhenga ngauri ha vhuyi a porofita zwivhuya nga nṋe, zwi sokou vha zwa khombo misi yoṱhe. Ndi Mikhaya ṅwana wa Imila.” Josafati a fhindula a ri, “Thovhele vha songo ralo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Ndi hone khosi ya Israele i tshi vhidza muṅwe wa vhaḓinḓa vhayo ya ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni ḓe na Mikhaya ṅwana wa Imila.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Khosi ya Israele na Josafati khosi ya Juda vho vha vho ambara phuraphura dzavho dza vhuhosi, vho dzula kha khuluṋoni dzavho, luvhatani lwa u fhulela, tsini ha gethe ya khoro ya Samaria, vhaporofita vhoṱhe vha tshi khou porofita henefho phanḓa havho." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zwino muṅwe wavho, Tsedekia ṅwana wa Khenaana, o vha o ita ṋanga dza tsimbi, a ḓivhadza a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘U ḓo runga Vhaaramu nga ṋanga hedzi wa vhuya wa vha lozwa.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Vhaporofita vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi porofita zwenezwo, vha tshi ri, “Nga vha yo dia muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi, vha ḓo kunda, ngauri Muṋe washu u ḓo u kumedza zwanḓani zwavho.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Muḓinḓa we a vha o ruṅwa u yo vhidza Mikhaya a mu vhudza a ri, “Nga vha vhone, vhaporofita vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha khou amba ḽithihi, vha ri khosi zwi ḓo i nakela, na vhone vha ambe zwithihi navho, zwi takadzaho.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Huno Mikhaya a ri, “Nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho, ndi ḓo mu vhudza zwenezwo zwine Mudzimu wanga a mmbudza.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Musi a tshi swika, khosi ya mu vhudzisa ya ri, “Mikhaya, ri bve pfumo ri yo dia muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi, kana ri songo ya?” Mikhaya a fhindula a ri, “Nga vha ye, vha ḓo kunda, ngauri avho vhathu vha ḓo kumedzwa zwanḓani zwavho.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Khosi ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Ndi ḓo vha anisa lungana nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu uri vha mmbudze ngoho?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Ndi hone Mikhaya a tshi fhindula a ri, “Ndo vhona Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho balangana zwikwarani vha tshi nga nngu dzi si na mulisa, Muṋe washu a ri, ‘Vhathu havha a vha na muṋe wavho. Nndwa yo fhela, nga vha humele hayani.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Khosi ya Israele ya vhudza Josafati ya ri, “A tho ngo vha vhudza uri ha vhuyi a porofita zwivhuya nga nṋe, u porofita zwa khombo fhedzi?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikhaya a dovha a ri, “Zwino nga vha thetshelese zwine Muṋe washu a amba! Ndo vhona Muṋe washu o dzula kha khuluṋoni yawe e na mara oṱhe o ima thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe na tshamonde." 
2Chronicles18:19 Muṋe washu a ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a nga fhura Ahaba khosi ya Israele a yo dia muḓi wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi, a yo fela henengei?’ Muṅwe a amba tshino, muṅwe a amba tshiḽa." 
2Chronicles18:20 Muṅwe muya wa fhedza nga u ḓa wa ima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu wa ri, ‘Nṋe ndi ḓo mu fhura.’ Muṋe washu a vhudzisa a ri, ‘U ḓo mu fhura hani?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Muya wa fhindula wa ri, ‘Ndi ḓo bva nda vha muya wa mazwifhi milomoni ya vhaporofita vhoṱhe.’ Muṋe washu a ri, ‘Tshimbila u yo mu fhura, u ḓo zwi kona.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 “Zwino Muṋe washu o ita uri vhaporofita havha vhavho vha vha zwifhele. Muṋe washu o itela uri vha welwe nga khombo.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Ndi hone Tsedekia ṅwana wa Khenaana a tshi takuwa a ya kha Mikhaya a mu vhanda luṱaha, a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Zwo ḓa hani Muya wa Muṋe washu a tshi bva kha nṋe a ḓa u amba na inwi?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikhaya a fhindula a ri, “Izwo ni ḓo zwi ḓivha musi une na yo dzumbama ni tshi bva kamarani iṅwe na shavhela kha iṅwe.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Khosi ya Israele zwenezwo ya bvisa ndaela ya ri, “Dzhiani Mikhaya ni mu vhuedzedze ha Amoni mulangi wa muḓi na ha Juasi ṅwana wa khosi," 
2Chronicles18:26 ni swike ni ri, ‘Khosi i ri: Hoṋelani muthu hoyu dzhele, ni mu fhe vhurotho vhuṱuku na maḓi fhedzi u swika ndi tshi vhuya ndo takala ndi songo huvhala.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikhaya a ḓivhadza a ri, “Arali vha vhuya vha tshi tshila, izwo Muṋe washu u ḓo vha a songo amba nga mulomo wanga.” Mikhaya a dovha a ri, “Inwi vhathu noṱhe, thetshelesani zwe nda amba!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Ndi hone Ahaba khosi ya Israele na Josafati khosi ya Juda vha tshi takuwa vha livha muḓini wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Khosi ya Israele ya vhudza Josafati ya ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo dzhena nndwani ndo ḓikhakhisa, vhone vha ambare zwiambaro zwavho zwa vhuhosi.” Ndi hone khosi ya Israele i tshi ḓikhakhisa, ya dzhena nndwani." 
2Chronicles18:30 Zwino khosi ya Aramu yo vha yo laya vhalangi vha gariki yayo ya ri, “Ni songo londa muthu na muthihi, a nga vha e muṱuku kana e muhulwane, ni londe khosi ya Israele fhedzi.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Musi vhalangi vha gariki vha tshi vhona khosi Josafati, vha ri, “Vhukuma uyu ndi ene khosi ya Israele.” Vha rembuluwa uri vha mu wele, hone Josafati a ṱavha mukosi, Muṋe washu a mu lamukisa. Mudzimu a ita uri vha mu ṱutshele." 
2Chronicles18:32 Musi vhalangi vha gariki vha tshi zwi vhona uri a si ene khosi ya Israele, vha litsha u mu pandamedza." 
2Chronicles18:33 Muṅwe a sokou posa musevhe wawe a sa londi a pfula khosi ya Israele he zwitsimbi zwa tshiambaro tshawe tsha nndwa zwa ṱanganywa hone. Khosi ya vhudza mutshimbidzi wa gariki ya ri, “Ndo huvhala, tshimbidzani gariki ni mmvise hafhano nndwani!”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Nndwa ya lwiwa ḓuvha ḽoṱhe i tshi tou duga, khosi ya Israele ya ḓitika garikini yayo yo livhana na Vhaaramu ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela. Ḽi tshi kovhela ya dzama." 
2Chronicles19:1 Khosi Josafati wa Juda a vhuelela pfamoni yawe Jerusalema a songo huvhala. 
2Chronicles19:2 Muporofita Jehu, ṅwana wa Hanani, a bva u yo mu ṱanganedza, a vhudza khosi a ri, “Vha vhona zwi zwone u farisa vhavhi, vha ima na vhane vha vhenga Muṋe washu? Muṋe washu o vha sinyutshela nga zwenezwo." 
2Chronicles19:3 Naho zwo ralo, vhone vha kha ḓi vha na zwivhuya, vho thutha zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi fhano shangoni, vha linga u tevhedza zwine Mudzimu a zwi funa.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Josafati o vha a tshi dzula Jerusalema, hone o vha a tshi ita a tshi bva a tshi yo dalela vhathu vhawe, u bva Bierisheba u swika mivhunduni ya Efraimi, a tshi vha vhuedzedza ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles19:5 Josafati a vhea vhahaṱuli shangoni iḽo, miḓini yoṱhe ya Juda yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo." 
2Chronicles19:6 A vha laya a ri, “Ni elekanye zwavhuḓi zwine na ita, ngauri a ni haṱuleli muthu, ni haṱulela Muṋe washu, Ene u na inwi musi ni tshi haṱula." 
2Chronicles19:7 Zwino ofhani Muṋe washu. Haṱulani nga vhusedzi ngauri Mudzimu Muṋe washu ha pfani na vhufhura na tshiṱalula na tshanḓanguvhoni.” 
2Chronicles19:8 Jerusalema na hone, Josafati a vhea Vhalivi na vhotshifhe na ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhaisraele uri vha haṱule nga mulayo wa Muṋe washu na u pfumedzanya vhadzulapo vha uyo muḓi." 
2Chronicles19:9 A vha laya a ri, “Ni shume nga u fulufhedzea na nga mbilu yoṱhe ni tshi ofha Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles19:10 Mulandu muṅwe na muṅwe une wa ḓiswa kha inwi u tshi bva kha vhadzulapo vha haṋu, u nga vha wa u vhulaha muthu kana ho pfukiwa mulayo kana ndayo kana zwidayo, ni vha laye uri vha songo khakhela Muṋe washu, a sa ḓo sinyutshela inwi na vha haṋu. Itani nga u ralo, ndi hone ni sa ḓo tshinya." 
2Chronicles19:11 Tshifhe muhulu Amaria ni ḓo hwedza khae milandu yoṱhe ya zwa Muṋe washu, Zebadia ṅwana wa Ishmaele, murangaphanḓa wa tsinde ḽa Juda, ni ḓo hwedza khae milandu ya zwa shango. Vhalivi vha ḓo shuma vhe vhaṅwaleli vha u vhona uri zwe zwa haṱulwa khoroni zwi tevhedzwe. Shumani ni na nungo, ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha na vhane vha ita zwi re zwone.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ngavhuya mmbi dza Muaba na Amoni, khathihi na vhane vha ima navho, vha Meuni, vha dia Juda vha tshi ḓa u lwa na Josafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Zwa ḓivhiswa khosi Josafati ha pfi, “Hu na mmbi khulu i no ḓa u lwa navho i tshi bva Edomo, i khou bva seli ha Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo. Vho no ḓi swika Hatsatsoni Thamara.” (Iḽo ndi ḽiṅwe dzina ḽa Engedi.)" 
2Chronicles20:3 Josafati a tshenuwa, a rabela a vhudzisa Muṋe washu, a ḓivhadza uri vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vha ḓidzime zwiḽiwa." 
2Chronicles20:4 Vhathu vha miḓi yoṱhe ya Juda vha kuvhangana Jerusalema vha humbela Muṋe washu uri a vha farise. 
2Chronicles20:5 Ndi hone Josafati a tshi takuwa tshivhidzoni tsha Juda na Jerusalema thembeleni ya Muṋe washu phanḓa ha Muṱa Muswa," 
2Chronicles20:6 a rabela a ri, “Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi ashu, kani a u Mudzimu a re ṱaḓulu? Hufha u tshi vhusa mivhuso yoṱhe ya dzitshakha. Iwe u na maanḓa na nungo, a hu na ane a nga imedzana na Iwe." 
2Chronicles20:7 Yawee Mudzimu washu, ndi Iwe wo thathaho vhadzulapo vha ḽino shango u swikani ha vhathu vhau Vhaisraele, wa ḽi ṋea vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu khonani yau uri ḽi vhe ḽavho lini na lini." 
2Chronicles20:8 Vho dzula khaḽo vha fhaṱela dzina ḽau hukhethwa khaḽo, vha tshi ri," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Arali ra welwa nga khombo ya pfumo ḽa u ri lifhedza kana dwadze kana nḓala, ri ḓo ima phanḓa ha thembele yenei ine ya vhidzwa nga dzina ḽau, ra u lilela ro ṱungufhala, Iwe wa ri pfa, wa ri tshidza.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Zwino vhanna vha Amoni na vha Muaba na vha Edomo ngevha vho ḓa. Zwiḽa Vhaisraele vha tshi bva Egipita a wo ngo vha tendela vha tshi dzhena shangoni ḽa avho vhathu, ndi zwe vha vha litsha vha si vha lozwe." 
2Chronicles20:11 Vhona uri vha khou ri lifhedza hani nga u ḓa vha ri thatha shangoni ḽe wa ri ṋea uri ḽi vhe ḽashu. 
2Chronicles20:12 Yawee Mudzimu washu, a vha haṱulwi zwavho naa? Riṋe a ri na maanḓa a u imedzana na mmbi hei khulu ine ya khou ri levhela. Riṋe a ri ḓivhi tshine ra nga tshi ita, ro lavhelesa henengeo.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda na vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vhavho na vhaṱuku, vho vha vho ima henefho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles20:14 Ndi hone Muya wa Muṋe washu a tshi tsa a ḓa kha muṅwe Mulivi we a vha o ima henefho guvhanganoni. O vha a tshi pfi Jahasiele ṅwana wa Zakaria, ṅwana wa Benaya, ṅwana wa Jeiele, ṅwana wa Mathania, wa lutsinga lwa Asafu." 
2Chronicles20:15 Jahasiele a ri, “Thovhele Josafati na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Juda na Jerusalema, thetshelesani! Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ni songo ofha tshithu, ni songo kulea nungo ni tshi vhona mmbi iyo khulu. Nndwa a si yaṋu ndi ya Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles20:16 Matshelo ni bve ni yo lwa navho. Vha ḓo vha vha tshi khou gonya nga Phara ya Tsitsi, ni ḓo vha wana hune govha ḽa guma hone phangani ya Jeruele." 
2Chronicles20:17 Nndwa iyo a ni nga ḓo i lwa. Imani vhuimoni haṋu, ni ime no khwaṱha, ni vhone Yahavee a tshi ni lamulela. Inwi vha Juda na Jerusalema ni songo ofha tshithu, ni songo kulea nungo. Matshelo ni bve ni yo livhana navho, Yahavee u ḓo vha na inwi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Khosi Josafati a kotama tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha kwama fhasi, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema vha gwadama phanḓa ha Muṋe washu vha luvha." 
2Chronicles20:19 Ndi hone vhaṅwe Vhalivi vha mutupo wa Kehathi na Kora vha tshi takuwa vha renda Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, vha tshi tou ṱavha mukosi." 
2Chronicles20:20 Nga matshelo vha fhindutshela phangani ya Thekua. Musi vha tshi takuwa, Josafati a ima a ri, “Inwi vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema, nthetsheleseni! Fulufhelani Muṋe washu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ima na khwaṱha, fulufhelani vhaporofita, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Josafati musi o no eletshedza vhathu, a vhea vhanna vhane vha ḓo imbela Muṋe washu, vha tshi renda vhugala ha vhukhethwa hawe, vho ranga mmbi phanḓa vha tshi ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Lufuno lwawe a lu shanduki!”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Musi vha tshi thoma u imba, vha tshi renda, Muṋe washu a vha o no vhea vhalaleli vha u kovhola vhanna vha Amoni na vha Muaba na vha Edomo vhe vha vha vha tshi khou dia Juda, vha vha kunda." 
2Chronicles20:23 Vhanna vha Amoni na vha Muaba vha vutshela vhanna vha Edomo uri vha vha lozwe tshoṱhe. Musi vho no fhedza u vhulaha vhanna vha Edomo, vha thoma u fhedzana nga tshavho." 
2Chronicles20:24 Musi vhanna vha Juda vha tshi swika fhethu ho livhanaho na phanga, vha tshi sedza mmbi iḽa khulu, vha vhona zwitumbu fhedzi zwo rambalala fhasi, ho vha hu si na we a vhuya a ponyoka." 
2Chronicles20:25 Ndi hone Josafati na vhanna vhe a vha e navho vha tshi yo hwala zwe vha ṱangula vha ṱuwa nazwo, vha wana khazwo hu na thundu nnzhi na zwiambaro na zwithu zwa mutengo muhulu lwe vha si kone u hwala zwoṱhe vha ṱuwa nazwo. Ho vha hu na zwinzhisa zwe vha ṱangula lwe vha fhedza maḓuvha mararu vha tshi zwi kuvhanganya." 
2Chronicles20:26 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa vha kuvhangana Govhani ḽa Berakha, henefho vha renda Muṋe washu. Ndi zwine na ṋamusi ḽa kha ḓi pfi Govha ḽa Berakha (Thendo)." 
2Chronicles20:27 Vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema vha vhuelela Jerusalema vha tshi fhululedza, vho rangwa phanḓa nga Josafati, nge Muṋe washu a vha o vha takadza nga u kunda maswina avho." 
2Chronicles20:28 Vha dzhena Jerusalema vha livha thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha tshi khou lidza dziharipa na zwihwana na dziphalaphala. 
2Chronicles20:29 Mivhuso yoṱhe ya mashango ya ofha Mudzimu musi vha tshi pfa zwe Muṋe washu a lwa na maswina a Vhaisraele. 
2Chronicles20:30 Ha vha na mulalo muvhusoni wa Josafati nge Mudzimu wawe a vha o mu tsireledza masia oṱhe. 
2Chronicles20:31 Josafati o vha khosi ya Juda e na miṅwaha ya 35, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 25. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Azuba, ṅwananyana wa Shilihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 O kanda vhuṱalani ha khotsi awe Asa, a si vhuye a pambuwa khaho, a tshi ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles20:33 Hone zwitembele zwa midzimu zwikwarani zwa si thuthwe, na vhathu vha si livhise mbilu dzavho ha Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles20:34 Mafhungo maṅwe a muvhuso wa Josafati, u bva mathomoni awo u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Jehu ṅwana wa Hanani, eneo o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ngavhuya khosi Josafati a pfana na Ahasia khosi ya Israele we a vha o ita vhuvhi vhunzhi. 
2Chronicles20:36 A pfana nae uri vha fhaṱe zwikepe vhuimazwikepe ha Etsioni Gebere, zwe zwa vha zwi tshi ya Tharashishi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Eliesere ṅwana wa Dodavahu, wa Maresha, a porofita a tshi kaidza Josafati, a ri, “Muṋe washu u ḓo pwashekanya zwe vha ita nge vha pfana na Ahasia.” Nangoho zwikepe izwo zwa pwashekana, zwa si tsha kona u tala zwi tshi ya Tharashishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Josafati a dzama, a yo swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita. Ṅwana wawe Jehoramu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles21:2 Vharathu vha Jehoramu, vhana vha Josafati khosi ya Israele, vho vha vhe vhaṱanu na muthihi, ndi Azaria na Jehiele na Zakaria na Azariahu na Mikaele na Shefatia." 
2Chronicles21:3 Khotsi avho o vha ṋea zwifhiwa zwinzhi zwa siliva na musuku na zwithu zwa mutengo muhulu, khathihi na miḓi yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo kha ḽa Juda, hone vhuhosi a vhu ṋea Jehoramu nge a vha e ene tanzhe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Musi Jehoramu o no ṱoka midzi muvhusoni wa khotsi awe, a vhulaha vharathu vhawe vhoṱhe, a ita na u vhulaha na maṅwe magota a Israele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu o vha khosi e na miṅwaha ya 32, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru." 
2Chronicles21:6 Jehoramu a kanda vhuṱalani ha khosi Ahaba na ha maṅwe mahosi a Israele, nge a dzea ṅwananyana wa Ahaba. A ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles21:7 Naho zwo ralo, Muṋe washu o vha a sa funi u lozwa nnḓu ya Dafita, ngauri o vha o vhofha mulanga na Dafita, a fulufhedzisa uri vhaḓuhulu vhawe vha ḓo vhusa lini na lini." 
2Chronicles21:8 Misi ya Jehoramu Vhaedomo vha shandukela Juda, vha vhea khosi yavho." 
2Chronicles21:9 Jehoramu a takuwa na magota awe na gariki dzawe dzoṱhe a yo dia shango ḽa Edomo. Mmbi ya Vhaedomo ya tanga Jehoramu na vhalangi vhawe vha dzigariki, hone vhukati ha vhusiku vha vuwa vha tshoṱha vha shavha." 
2Chronicles21:10 Vhaedomo vho shandukela Juda u swika na ṋamusi. Misi yeneyo vha muḓi wa Libina na vhone vha shandukela Jehoramu, nge a vha o ṱutshela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi awe." 
2Chronicles21:11 Jehoramu a ita na u fhaṱa zwitembele zwa midzimu mivhunduni ya Juda, a kunga vhathu vha Jerusalema uri vha shandukele Muṋe washu, a xedza vhathu vha Juda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Muporofita Elia a ṅwalela Jehoramu luṅwalo lwe lwa ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa makhulukuku wau Dafita u ri, ‘Iwe a wo ngo kanda vhuṱalani ha khotsi au khosi Josafati, na ha makhulu wau, Asa khosi ya Juda." 
2Chronicles21:13 Wo kanda vhuṱalani ha mahosi a Israele, wa kunga vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema vha shandukela Mudzimu, u ḓi nga zwe zwa itwa nga nnḓu ya Ahaba. Wo ita na u vhulaha vharathu vhau vhana vha khotsi au, vhe vha vha vhe vhavhuya u fhira iwe." 
2Chronicles21:14 Zwino-ha, Muṋe washu u ḓo ṱuwa a tshi ṱungufhadza vhathu vhau na vhana vhau na vhafumakadzi vhau, a phusukanya zwoṱhe zwine wa vha nazwo." 
2Chronicles21:15 Iwe u ḓo farwa nga vhulwadze ha dangani vhune ha ḓo ḓi hulela vhu tshi ya, mala au a vhuya a bvela nnḓa.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Muṋe washu a ritha Vhafilista na Maarabia vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula tsini na Vhakushu, vha vutshela Jehoramu." 
2Chronicles21:17 Vha levhela vhathu vha Juda, vha dia shango, vha ṱangula nnḓu ya khosi, vha hwala thundu yoṱhe vha ṱuwa nayo, vha ita na u thuba vhafumakadzi vhawe na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka vha ṱuwa navho, a tou sala na Ahasia mutukana wawe wa phedzi." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ngavhuya Muṋe washu a ḓisela Jehoramu vhulwadze ha dangani vhu sa lafhei. 
2Chronicles21:19 Musi hu tshi fhela ṅwaha wa vhuvhili, mala awe a bvela nnḓa nga uho vhulwadze, a dzama a tshi tambula zwihulu. Vhathu vho vha vha tshi ḓi vhasa mulilo wa u lila khosi i tshi dzama, hone Jehoramu a vho ngo mu vhasela." 
2Chronicles21:20 Jehoramu o vha khosi e na miṅwaha ya 32, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru. Jehoramu a dzama, ha si vhe na we a vhuya a pfa vhuṱungu, a swiṱwa Muḓini wa Dafita, hone a si swiṱwe zwaloni zwa mahosi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha dzhia Ahasia, phedzi ya Jehoramu, vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe, ngauri iḽa gomane ye ya vha yo ḓa na Maarabia afho mishashani, yo vhulaha vhakomana vhawe vhoṱhe. Ndi hone Ahasia ṅwana wa Jehoramu khosi ya Juda a tshi thoma u vhusa." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahasia o vha khosi e na miṅwaha ya 22, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza ṅwaha muthihi. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Athalia, muḓuhulu wa khosi Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahasia na ene a kanda vhuṱalani ha nnḓu ya Ahaba, nge mme awe vha mu ṱuṱuwedza u ita zwo vhifhaho." 
2Chronicles22:4 Ahasia a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, nga he zwa itwa nga nnḓu ya Ahaba, nge khotsi awe vha ri u dzama ha sala vhenevho vhe vhaeletshedzi vhawe, ha vha u mu lozwa." 
2Chronicles22:5 A ita na u thetshelesa nyeletshedzo yavho musi a tshi ṱuwa na Joramu ṅwana wa Ahaba khosi ya Israele vha bva pfumo u yo lwa na Hazaele khosi ya Aramu muḓini wa Ramotho kha ḽa Giliadi. Vhaaramu vha huvhadza Joramu," 
2Chronicles22:6 a vhuelela Jesriele uri a fhole mbonzhe dze a huvhadzwa muḓini wa Ramotho a tshi lwa na Hazaele khosi ya Aramu. Ahasia ṅwana wa Jehoramu khosi ya Juda a tsela Jesriele u vhona Joramu ṅwana wa Ahaba nge Joramu a vha o huvhala. 
2Chronicles22:7 Ndi Mudzimu we a ita uri Ahasia a lovhe musi a tshi yo dalela Joramu. Musi Ahasia a tshi swika, a bva na Joramu u yo lwa na Jehu ṅwana wa Nimishi, we Muṋe washu a vha o mu ta uri a lozwe nnḓu ya Ahaba." 
2Chronicles22:8 Musi Jehu a tshi khou fhedza nnḓu ya Ahaba nga he a laedzwa ngaho a wana hu na vharangaphanḓa vha Juda na vhana vha vhakomana vha Ahasia vhe vha vha vho fhelekedza Ahasia, a vha vhulaha." 
2Chronicles22:9 Zwenezwo a mbo ḓi ṱuwa a yo ṱoḓa Ahasia, a mu fara o dzumbama Samaria, a iswa ha Jehu, a vhulawa. Vha mu swiṱa, nge vha ri, “O vha e muḓuhulu wa khosi Josafati we a vha a tshi shumela Muṋe washu nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe.” Zwenezwo kha nnḓu ya Ahasia ho vha hu si tshee na o thanyaho we a vha a tshi nga sala a tshi vhusa." 
2Chronicles22:10 Musi Athalia mme a khosi Ahasia a tshi pfa uri ṅwana wawe o vhulawa, a mbo ḓi vhulahisa vhoṱhe vha nnḓu ya musanda wa Juda." 
2Chronicles22:11 We a ponyoka ndi Juasi ṅwana wa Ahasia fhedzi. O vha a tshi ṱoḓou vhulawa na vhaṅwe, hone a lamukiswa nga makhadzi wawe Jehoshiba, ṅwananyana wa khosi Jehoramu, mufumakadzi wa tshifhe Jehoyada, a dovha a vha khaladzi ya Ahasia. Jehoshiba a mu dzhia na muleli wawe a vha dzhenisa kamarani ya u eḓela thembeleni, a mu dzumba uri Athalia a si mu vhone, ndi zwe a si vhulawe." 
2Chronicles22:12 Jehoshiba a mu londola, a mu dzumba na muleli wawe thembeleni ya Muṋe washu ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi, musi Athalia a tshi khou vhusa shango." 
2Chronicles23:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili tshifhe Jehoyada a vha na nungo, a vhofha mulanga na vhalangi vha zwigwada zwa vha ḓana, vhenevho ndi Azaria ṅwana wa Jerohamu na Ishmaele ṅwana wa Jehohanani na Azaria ṅwana wa Obede na Maaseya ṅwana wa Adaya na Elishafati ṅwana wa Zikhiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Vha tshimbila na miḓi yoṱhe ya Juda vha tshi kuvhanganya Vhalivi na ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhaisraele, vha vhuya navho Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles23:3 Vhoṱhe vha kuvhangana thembeleni ya Mudzimu vha vhofha mulanga na khosi Juasi. Jehoyada a vha vhudza a ri, “Hu ḓo vhusa ṅwana wa khosi, sa zwe Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa a tshi amba vhaḓuhulu vha Dafita." 
2Chronicles23:4 Zwino ni ite hezwi: Tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tsha inwi vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vhane vha ḓo dzhena mushumoni nga Sabatha, tshi linde mahothi," 
2Chronicles23:5 tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tshaṋu tshi linde pfamo ya musanda, tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tshi linde Khoro ya Muteo, vhanna vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha vhe miṱani ya thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles23:6 Hu songo vha na ane a dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, hu dzhene vhotshifhe fhedzi na Vhalivi vha re mushumoni, vhone vha nga ḓi dzhena ngauri vho kumedzwa Mudzimu, hone vhanna vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha tevhedze zwe Muṋe washu a vha laya, vha dzule nnḓa." 
2Chronicles23:7 Vhalivi vha linde khosi, munna muṅwe na muṅwe o fara tshihali tshawe nga tshanḓa. Muthu ane a vhuya a dzhena thembeleni a vhulawe. Ni vhe tsini na khosi hoṱhe hune a ya.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Vhalivi na vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda vha thetshelesa zwe tshifhe Jehoyada a vha laya, vha ḓisa khae vhanna vhane vha vha navho, vhane vha si vhe mushumoni nga Sabatha na vhane vha vha mushumoni, ngauri tshifhe Jehoyada o vha a songo vhofholola na tshigwada na tshithihi." 
2Chronicles23:9 Ndi hone Jehoyada a tshi ṋea vhalangagomane mafumo na zwiṱangu na zwiṅwe zwihali zwe zwa vha zwi zwa khosi Dafita, zwo vhulungwaho thembeleni ya Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles23:10 Vhanna avho, muṅwe na muṅwe a fara tshihali, vha ima vho tanga khosi, tsini ha aḽiṱari ya thembele, u bva tshipembe ha thembele u ya devhula hayo." 
2Chronicles23:11 Jehoyada a ḓisa Juasi ṅwana wa khosi, a vhea khare ya vhuhosi ṱhohoni yawe, a mu ṋea kopi ya mulanga, a ḓivhadza uri ndi ene khosi. Jehoyada na vhana vhawe vha mu ḓodza mapfura, vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Thovhele nga a lalame!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Athalia a tshi pfa muhuvho une wa khou huvhiwa nga vhathu vha tshi gidima, vha tshi fhululedza khosi, a ya khavho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles23:13 A tshi sedza, a vhona khosi yo ima vhuimoni hayo muṋangoni wa thembele. Vhalangagomane na vhalidzi vha phalaphala vho vha vhe tsini na khosi, vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha vhathu vha tshi khou pembela vha tshi lidza phalaphala, vhaimbi vho ranga phanḓa thendo nga zwilidzo. Athalia a kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Ndi tshimbevha itshi! Ndi tshimbevha!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Tshifhe Jehoyada a laya vhalangagomane vhe vha vha vha tshi langa dzimmbi a ri, “Mu bviseni nga vhukati ha miduba mivhili ya vhalindi, ni vhulahe muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu tevhela.” Ndi uri tshifhe o vha o ri, “A songo vhulawa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Vha mu fara, vha mu isa pfamoni, vha mu vhulahela Khoroni ya Bere." 
2Chronicles23:16 Zwino tshifhe Jehoyada a ita uri khosi Juasi na vhathu vha vhofhe mulanga na Muṋe washu uri vha ḓo vha vhathu vha Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles23:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe nga shango vha ya thembeleni ya Baali vha i thutha vha i phusukanya. Vha pwasha dziaḽiṱari na zwitungulo, vha ita na u vhulaha Mathani tshifhe wa Baali henefho phanḓa ha aḽiṱari dzenedzo." 
2Chronicles23:18 Zwino Jehoyada a vhea vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vhe Vhalivi uri vha londole thembele ya Muṋe washu, ndi vhe Dafita a vha o vha ṋea mishumo ya thembeleni, uri vha ṋekedze Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho nga he ha ṅwalwa kha Mulayo wa Mushe, hu tshi pembelwa, hu tshi imbiwa, nga he Dafita a vha laya." 
2Chronicles23:19 Jehoyada a ita na u vhea vhalindamiṋango khoroni dza thembele ya Muṋe washu uri hu si vhuye ha dzhena muthu o kumalaho. 
2Chronicles23:20 Jehoyada na vhalangagomane na vhaḓivhalea na vhavhusi vha vhathu na vhapo vhoṱhe vha shango vha fhelekedza khosi i tshi bva thembeleni ya Muṋe washu i tshi ya pfamoni, vha dzhena nga nḓila ya Khoro ya Vhalindi. Ndi hone khosi i tshi dzula vhudzuloni hayo kha khuluṋoni ya musanda." 
2Chronicles23:21 Vhathu vhoṱhe nga shango vha pembela, muḓi wa dzika nge Athalia a vha o vhulawa." 
2Chronicles24:1 Juasi o vha khosi e na miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 40. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Tsibia wa muḓi wa Bierisheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Miṅwaha yoṱhe ya musi tshifhe Jehoyada a tshi kha ḓi tshila, Juasi a ita zwe zwa takadza Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoyada a mu dzetshela vhafumakadzi vhavhili, a vha na vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ngavhuya Juasi a elekanya u vusa thembele ya Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles24:5 A kuvhanganya vhotshifhe na Vhalivi a vha vhudza a ri, “Iyani miḓini ya Juda ni yo kuvhanganya tshelede ine ya bviswa nga Vhaisraele vhoṱhe ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe uri hu vuswe thembele ya Mudzimu waṋu. Zwi iteni zwino.” Hone Vhalivi vha si ṱavhanye u zwi ita." 
2Chronicles24:6 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhidzisa Jehoyada tshifhe muhulu ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Ndi mini vha songo ita uri Vhalivi vha ye Juda na Jerusalema vha yo kuvhanganya mutendelo wo tiwaho nga Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu na nga tshivhidzo tsha Vhaisraele vha tshi itela dennde ya mulanga?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Zwino vha tshigwada tsha uḽa musadzi muvhi Athalia vho vha vho pwasha vha dzhena thembeleni ya Mudzimu, vha ita na u shumisa zwithu zwikhethwa vha tshi luvha Vhobaali." 
2Chronicles24:8 Khosi ya ṋea ndaela, ha itwa bogisi, ḽa vhewa nnḓa, khoroni ya thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles24:9 Ha ḓivhadzwa kha ḽa Juda na Jerusalema uri vhathu vha isele Muṋe washu mutendelo we Mushe muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a tela Vhaisraele musi vhe phangani. 
2Chronicles24:10 Vhakoma vhoṱhe na vhathu vhoṱhe vha isa zwe vha bvisa vho takala, vha longa bogisini iḽo ḽa vhuya ḽa ḓala." 
2Chronicles24:11 Musi Vhalivi vha tshi isa iḽo bogisi ha vhakoma vha khosi, vhone vha vhona uri afho bogisini ho no vha na tshelede nnzhi, muṅwaleli wa musanda na mukoma wa tshifhe muhulu vho vha vha tshi ḓa vha bvisa tshelede bogisini, vha ḽi hwala vha ḽi vhuedzedza vhudzuloni haḽo. Vho vha vha tshi ḓi ita nga u ralo, vha vhuya vha kuvhanganya tshelede nnzhi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Khosi na Jehoyada vha dzhia iyo tshelede vha holela vhe vha vha vha tshi khou lugisa thembele ya Muṋe washu. Vha thola vhafhaṱi vha matombo na vhavhaḓi uri vha lugise thembele ya Muṋe washu, vha ṱoḓa na vhashumi vhane vha shuma nga tsimbi na musinaseṱha uri vha vuse thembele." 
2Chronicles24:13 Vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi khou langa uyo mushumo vho vha vhe vhashumi vha biko, vha shuma uyo mushumo wa bvela phanḓa. Vha vusa thembele ya Mudzimu vha tshi tevhedza pulane yayo ya u thoma, vha i khwaṱhisa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Musi vho fhedza, vha dzhia tshelede yo salaho vha isa ha khosi na Jehoyada, ya shuma u ita thundu ya thembele ya Muṋe washu: thundu ya u shuma thembeleni na ya zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na dzindilo na dziṅwe thundu dza musuku na siliva. Musi Jehoyada a tshi kha ḓi tshila, ho vha hu tshi dzula hu tshi ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles24:15 Zwino Jehoyada o vha o no kalaha, o no vha wa maḓuvha, a fa e na miṅwaha ya 130." 
2Chronicles24:16 Jehoyada a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita nge a vha o itela Mudzimu na thembele yawe zwivhuya kha ḽa Israele. 
2Chronicles24:17 Musi Jehoyada o no fa, vhahulwane vha Juda vha ya ha khosi Juasi vha mu hoya nga u mu losha. Ndi hone a tshi vha thetshelesa." 
2Chronicles24:18 Vha ṱutshela thembele ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, vha yo luvha thanda dza Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi, na zwifanyiso. Mulandu wavho wa vhuvhi uho wa ita uri Mudzimu a sinyutshele Juda na Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles24:19 Muṋe washu a ruma vhaporofita vha ya ha vhathu uri vha vha kaidze, vha vha vhuedzedze khae, hone vhathu vha si thetshelese." 
2Chronicles24:20 Ndi hone Muya wa Mudzimu a tshi dzhena kha Zakaria ṅwana wa tshifhe Jehoyada. Zakaria a ima phanḓa ha vhathu a ri, “Mudzimu u ri, ‘Ndi mini ni tshi nyadza ndaela ya Yahavee? Zwi nga si ni nakele. No ṱutshela Yahavee, zwino u ḓo ni ṱutshela-vho.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Huno vhathu vha mu langana, vha mu kanḓa nga matombo vha mu vhulahela muṱani wa thembele ya Muṋe washu, nge khosi ya ri vha zwi ite." 
2Chronicles24:22 Khosi Juasi o hangwa vhuthu he Jehoyada khotsi a Zakaria a mu itela, a vhulaha ṅwana wawe. Musi Zakaria o rambalala a tshi khou welela a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi zwi vhona, a ni lifhedza.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Musi ṅwaha u tshi fhela, mmbi ya Aramu ya bva ya yo lwa na Juasi, ya dia Juda na Jerusalema, ya vhulaha vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe vha vhathu. Vha hwala zwoṱhe zwe vha ṱangula vha isa ha khosi yavho muḓini wa Damasko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Mmbi ya Aramu yo ḓa na vhanna vha si gathi, hone Muṋe washu a ita uri vha kunde mmbi khulu-khulu ya Juda, nge vhathu vha Juda vha vha vho ṱutshela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, ngauralo ha vha hone u lifhedza khosi Juasi." 
2Chronicles24:25 Musi Vhaaramu vha tshi huma, vha sia Juasi o huvhala zwihulu. Vhakoma vhawe vha mu langana nge a vhulaha ṅwana wa tshifhe Jehoyada, vha mu fhedzisa e vhulaloni hawe. Juasi a dzama, a swiṱwa Muḓini wa Dafita, hone ho ngo swiṱwa zwaloni zwa mahosi." 
2Chronicles24:26 Vhe vha mu langana ndi Zabadi, ṅwana wa musadzi wa Muamoni we a vha a tshi pfi Shimiathi, na Jehozabadi, ṅwana wa musadzi wa Mumuaba we a vha a tshi pfi Shimirithi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Mafhungo a vhana vhawe na vhuporofita vhunzhi vhu no amba ngae na mafhungo a u vuswa ha thembele ya Mudzimu, zwo ṅwalwa kha Maanea a Bugu ya Mahosi. Ṅwana wawe Amasia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amasia a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 29. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Jehuadini, wa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles25:2 Amasia o ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu, hone ho ngo zwi ita nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
2Chronicles25:3 Musi muvhuso wa Amasia u tshi tou khwaṱha, a vhulaha magota vho vhulahaho vhamusanda khotsi awe." 
2Chronicles25:4 Naho zwo ralo ho ngo vhulaha vhana vhavho, o tou tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho buguni ya Mulayo wa Mushe he Muṋe washu a laya a ri, “Vhokhotsi vha songo fela milandu ya vhana vhavho, na vhana vha songo fela milandu ya vhokhotsi avho, muṅwe na muṅwe u fela vhutshinyi hawe ene muṋe.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Khosi Amasia a kuvhanganya vhathu vha Juda, a vha kumedza vhalangammbi na vhalangagomane vha Juda ḽoṱhe na Benyamini, zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho. A vhala vhoṱhe u bva kha vha miṅwaha ya 20 a wana vhe vhanna vha 300 000 vho teaho u bva pfumo, vhane vha kona u fara pfumo na tshiṱangu." 
2Chronicles25:6 Amasia a ita na u thola vhahali vha 100 000 vha no bva Israele a vha holela nga siliva ine ya nga vha khilogiramu dza 3 400. 
2Chronicles25:7 Huno ha ḓa muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu khae a ri, “Thovhela, mmbi hedzi dza Israele dzi songo tshimbila navho, ngauri Muṋe washu ha imi na Vhaisraele, ha imi na muthihi wa vhathu vha Efraimi." 
2Chronicles25:8 Nangwe vha bva vha yo lwa nga nungo dzoṱhe nndwani, Mudzimu u ḓo vha laṱa vha tshi lwa na maswina, ngauri Mudzimu u na maanḓa a u farisa muthu kana u mu laṱa.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amasia a vhudzisa uyo muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a ri, “Zwino iḽa siliva ya khilogiramu dzine dza nga vha 3 400 ye nda ṋea mmbi dza Vhaisraele?” Uyo muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu u a kona u vha ṋea zwi no fhira zwenezwo.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Ndi hone Amasia a tshi humisa idzo mmbi dzi no bva kha ḽa Efraimi, a ri dzi ye hayani. Vhanna avho vha sinyutshela vhathu vha Juda, vha livha hayani vha tshi tou duga nga mbiti." 
2Chronicles25:11 Ndi hone Amasia a tshi vusa nungo dzawe, a ranga mmbi yawe phanḓa ya livha Govhani ḽa Muṋo, henefho a vhulaha vhanna vha Edomo vha 10 000." 
2Chronicles25:12 Mmbi ya Juda ya ita na u thuba vhanna vha 10 000 vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, vha vha isa muṱumbani wa luwa, vha vha sukumedzela fhasi, vhoṱhe vha thathekana." 
2Chronicles25:13 Zwenezwo mmbi dza Vhaisraele dze Amasia a dzi humisa, a si dzi tendele dzi tshi ya nndwani, dza mbo ḓi dia miḓi ya Juda u bva Samaria u swika Bethe Horoni. Vha vhulaha vhathu vha 3 000, vha thuba thundu nnzhi vha i hwala vha ṱuwa nayo." 
2Chronicles25:14 Musi Amasia a tshi vhuya a tshi bva u kunda Vhaedomo, a vhuya na midzimu ya vhathu vha Edomo. Amasia a imisa iyo midzimu ya vho vha yawe, a i gwadamela, a i dubisela zwioro." 
2Chronicles25:15 Muṋe washu a sinyutshela Amasia, a ruma muṅwe muporofita a ya khae a swika a ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi luvha midzimu ya havha vhathu, ye ya kundwa u tshidza vhathu vha hayo zwanḓani zwavho?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Musi a tshi kha ḓi amba khosi ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Vhone ro vha vhea uri vha vhe mueletshedzi wa khosi naa? Nga vha fhumule, nṋe ndi a vha vhulaha!” Ndi hone muporofita uyo a tshi fhumula, hone a ri, “Nṋe ndi a zwi ḓivha uri Mudzimu o ḓiimisela u vha lozwa, nge vha ita hezwo, nahone vha si thetshelese ndi tshi vha eletshedza.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Musi Amasia khosi ya Juda o no vhudzisana na vhaeletshedzi vhawe, a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya ha Juasi, ṅwana wa Juahasi ṅwana wa Jehu khosi ya Israele, a ita khaedu a ri, “Nga vha ḓe ri lwe.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Hone Juasi khosi ya Israele a fhindula Amasia khosi ya Juda a ri, “Mutshutshungu wa Libanoni wo vhuya wa ruma muḓinḓa a ya ha mukedara wa Libanoni a ri, ‘Tenda ṅwananyana wau a dzewe nga ṅwana wanga.’ Hu si kale ha fhira phukha ya Libanoni ya kandekanya uyo mutshutshungu." 
2Chronicles25:19 Vhone vha ri vho kunda Vhaedomo, zwino vha vho ḓihudza. Hone nga vha ḓidzulele zwavho hayani! Ndi mini vha tshi levha? A vha zwi vhoni uri vha ḓiṱulela khombo khathihi na shango ḽa Juda?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Hone Amasia a si zwi thetshelese. Mudzimu o vha o tou zwi funa uri Amasia a kundiwe nga Juasi, nge a gwadamela midzimu ya Edomo." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ndi hone Juasi khosi ya Israele a tshi bva pfumo a yo lwa na Amasia khosi ya Juda, ha lwiwa Bethe Shemeshe kha ḽa Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Vhajuda vha kundwa nga Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe a shavhela hayani hawe." 
2Chronicles25:23 Juasi khosi ya Israele a thuba Amasia khosi ya Juda, ṅwana wa Juasi ṅwana wa Ahasia, henefho Bethe Shemeshe. Ndi hone Juasi a tshi mu isa Jerusalema a swika a pwasha mutsheṱo wa Jerusalema u bva Khoroni ya Efraimi u swika Khoroni ya Khuḓa, tshikhala tshine tsha nga ita mitha dza 200." 
2Chronicles25:24 Juasi a dzhia musuku woṱhe na siliva yoṱhe na zwithu zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi thembeleni ya Mudzimu, zwe zwa vha zwi tshi londolwa nga Obede Edomo, a dzhia na zwa mbulungeloni dza pfamo, a ita na u thuba vhathu vha u farelwa, a vhuelela Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amasia khosi ya Juda, ṅwana wa Juasi, o tshila a fhedza miṅwaha ya 15 musi Juasi khosi ya Israele, ṅwana wa Juahasi, o no dzama." 
2Chronicles25:26 Mafhungo maṅwe a Amasia, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda na Israele." 
2Chronicles25:27 U bva tshee Amasia a furalela Muṋe washu, vha mu langana Jerusalema, ene a shavhela muḓini wa Lakhishi, hone vha ruma vhathu vha mu tevhela Lakhishi vha mu vhulahela henengei." 
2Chronicles25:28 Tshitumbu tsha Amasia tsha iswa Jerusalema tsho hwalwa nga bere, a swiṱwa zwaloni zwa musanda Muḓini wa Dafita." 
2Chronicles26:1 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vha tshi dzhia ṅwana wawe Uzia, vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Amasia. Uzia o vha e na miṅwaha ya 16 a tshi vha khosi." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ndi ene we a vusa muḓi wa Elathi a u vhuedzedza Juda, musi Amasia o no dzama." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia a tshi thoma u vhusa o vha e na miṅwaha ya 16, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 52. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Jekholia wa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles26:4 Uzia o ita zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:5 O shumela Mudzimu misi Zakaria a tshi kha ḓi tshila, ndi ene we a vha a tshi mu laya uri a ofhe Mudzimu. Musi a tshi shumela Muṋe washu, Mudzimu o vha a tshi ita uri zwi mu nakele." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzia a bva pfumo a yo lwa na Vhafilista, a thutha mitsheṱo ya miḓi ya Gathi na Jabune na Ashidodo, a konou vusa miḓi tsini ha Ashidodo na huṅwe vhukati ha Vhafilista." 
2Chronicles26:7 Mudzimu a mu farisa a tshi lwa na Vhafilista na musi a tshi lwa na Maarabia vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Guru Baali na musi a tshi lwa na Vhameuni. 
2Chronicles26:8 Vhaamoni vha isa nduvho ha Uzia, bvumo ḽawe ḽa swika na masakhani a Egipita, nge a vha e na maanḓa." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uzia a fhaṱa dzithawara Jerusalema Khoroni ya Khuḓa na Khoroni ya Govha na khuḓani ya mutsheṱo, a dzi khwaṱhisa." 
2Chronicles26:10 A ita na u fhaṱa dziṅwe phangani, a bwa bidzi nnzhi, nge a vha e na masambi manzhi a kholomo zwilindini na midavhini. O vha e na vhathu vha no shuma masimuni awe na a minḓirivhe mivhunduni na masimuni o nonelaho, ngauri o vha a tshi funa mavu." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uzia o vha e na mmbi ya vhanna vho gudiswaho vhukuma, vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula vho ḓilugisela u bva pfumo nga gomane dzi tshi ya nga tshivhalo tshavho, vha tshi kuvhanganyiwa nga muṅwaleli wawe Jeiele na Maaseya we a vha e ṋegota, vha tshi langwa nga Hanania, muṅwe wa vhakoma vha musanda." 
2Chronicles26:12 Tshivhalo tshoṱhe tsha vharangaphanḓa vha miṱa tshi no langa vhanna vha lwaho tsho vha tshi 2 600. 
2Chronicles26:13 Vho vha vha tshi langa mmbi ya vhanna vha 307 500 vho gudiswaho zwa nndwa, mmbi ya maanḓa ine ya tikedza khosi i tshi lwa na maswina ayo." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzia o vha a tshi ṋea vhahali vhoṱhe zwiṱangu na mafumo na miṅadzi na madzhasi a u ḓipilela na vhura na gatho. 
2Chronicles26:15 Afho Jerusalema vhatsila vhawe vho vha vho ita mitshini ya u posa misevhe na ya u posa matombo i dzithawarani na khuḓani dza mitsheṱo. Bvumo ḽawe ḽa swika kule, a vha na maanḓa mahulu nge a vha a tshi fariswa nga Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles26:16 Huno musi khosi Uzia o no vha na maanḓa, a thoma u ḓihudza, u ralo ha vha u ḓiṱulela khombo. Uzia a nyadza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe nga u dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a dubisa zwioro kha aḽiṱari ya zwioro." 
2Chronicles26:17 Tshifhe Azaria a ṱuwa na vhaṅwe vhotshifhe vha 80 vha sa ofhi vha mu tevhela vha swika vha dzhena. 
2Chronicles26:18 Vha imedzana nae vha ri, “Thovhela Vho-Uzia, a vha na pfanelo ya u dubisela Muṋe washu zwioro. Hoyo ndi mushumo wa vhotshifhe vhaḓuhulu vha Aroni, ndi vhone vhe vha kumedzwa Mudzimu uri vha dubise zwioro. Nga vha bve hafhano hukhethwa, vho khakhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu, ha tsha ḓo vha ṋea vhuhulwane.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Uzia o vha o fara mudzio wa zwioro nga tshanḓa a tshi ṱoḓa u dubisa zwioro, a mbo ḓi sinyuwa. Musi o halifhela vhotshifhe vhe henefho phanḓa ha aḽiṱari ya zwioro thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha mbo ḓi shatwa vhulwadze vhu ofhisaho ha lukanda." 
2Chronicles26:20 Musi tshifhe muhulu Azaria na vhotshifhe vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha tshi mu sedza, vha vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsho shatwa nga vhulwadze ha lukanda, vha mbo ḓi ṱavhanya vha mu bvisela nnḓa. Vhukuma ene muṋe o vha o no ḓilugisela u ṱuwa nge ya vha i ṱhamu ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles26:21 Khosi Uzia o lwala uho vhulwadze ha lukanda a vhuya a dzama. O vha a tshi dzula nḓuni yawe i re thungo, a si tsha dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu. Mishumo yawe yoṱhe o vha a si tsha i shuma, ṅwana wawe Jothamu a tshi dzula pfamoni, a tshi vhusa vhathu vha shango." 
2Chronicles26:22 Mafhungo maṅwe a Uzia, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa nga muporofita Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzia a dzama, a swiṱwa tsini ha zwalo he ha vha hu ha mahosi, a si swiṱwe zwaloni zwa musanda, nge vha ri, “O vha e na vhulwadze vhu ofhisaho ha lukanda.” Ṅwana wawe Jothamu a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jothamu o vha khosi e na miṅwaha ya 25 a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Jerusha ṅwananyana wa Tsadoko. 
2Chronicles27:2 Jothamu o vha a tshi takadza Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Uzia, hone ene ho ngo ita zwa khotsi awe zwe a tshinya nga u dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a dubisa zwioro. Vhathu vha Juda vhone vha ḓi isa phanḓa u tshinya." 
2Chronicles27:3 Jothamu ndi ene we a vusa Khoro ya Nṱha ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, a shuma mushumo muhulu mutsheṱoni tshikwarani tsha Ofele." 
2Chronicles27:4 O fhaṱa na miḓi thavhani dza Juda, maṱakani a fhaṱa madzhavhelo na dzithawara." 
2Chronicles27:5 Jothamu a bva pfumo a yo lwa na khosi ya Vhaamoni, a vha kunda. Ṅwaha wonoyo Vhaamoni vha mu luvha nga siliva ya khilogiramu dza 3 400 na goroi ya thani dza 1 000 na bali ya thani dza 1 000. Vhaamoni vha ḓi mu luvha nga u ralo ha vhuya ha fhela ṅwaha wa vhuvhili na wa vhuraru." 
2Chronicles27:6 Jothamu a vha na maanḓa nge a vha a tshi tshimbila nḓilani ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe a sa pambuwi khayo. 
2Chronicles27:7 Mafhungo maṅwe a Jothamu, hu tshi angaredzwa na nndwa dzoṱhe dze a lwa na zwiṅwe zwe a ita, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele na a Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Jothamu o vha khosi e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16." 
2Chronicles27:9 Jothamu a dzama, a swiṱwa Muḓini wa Dafita. Ṅwana wawe Ahasi a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahasi a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 20, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 16. Ene ho ngo kanda vhuṱalani havhuḓi ha makhulukuku wawe Dafita, o ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles28:2 O kanda vhuṱalani ha mahosi a Israele, a fula zwitungulo zwa zwifanyiso zwa Vhobaali." 
2Chronicles28:3 A dubisa zwioro Govhani ḽa Beni Hinomu, a ita na u ṋekedza vhana vhawe vha vhatuka a vha ita nduvho dzi fhiswaho, a tshi tevhedza maitele a nengisaho a tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha musi Vhaisraele vha tshi lwa navho." 
2Chronicles28:4 O ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo a fhisa zwioro zwitembeleni zwa zwikwarani na miṱumbani ya zwikwara na fhasi ha miri yoṱhe yo bvukaho. 
2Chronicles28:5 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe a mu kumedza zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Aramu. Vhaaramu vha mu kunda, vha thuba vhathu vhawe vhanzhi, vha vha hwala vha vha isa Damasko. Ahasi a dovha a kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Israele, uyo a vhulaha vhathu vhawe vhanzhi." 
2Chronicles28:6 Pheka ṅwana wa Remalia a vhulaha vhahali vha 120 000 vha Juda nga ḓuvha ḽithihi, nge vhathu vha Juda vha ṱutshela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles28:7 Muṅwe muhali wa Efraimi we a vha a tshi pfi Zikhiri a vhulaha ṅwana wa khosi Ahasi we a vha a tshi pfi Maaseya na ṋegota we a vha a tshi pfi Asrikamu na Elikana, we a vha e tshanḓa tsha khosi." 
2Chronicles28:8 Vhaisraele vha thuba vhasadzi na vhana vha vhatuka na vhasidzana vha Juda vha 200 000, naho vho vha vhe mashaka avho, vha vha hwala vha vha isa Samaria, vha ita na u hwala thundu nnzhi ye vha ṱangula vha ṱuwa nayo." 
2Chronicles28:9 Hone henefho muḓini wa Samaria ho vha hu tshi dzula muporofita wa Muṋe washu we a vha a tshi pfi Odede. Onoyo a bva a yo ṱanganedza mmbi musi i tshi vhuya Samaria, a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu o vha o sinyutshela vhathu vha Juda, ndi zwe a vha kumedza zwanḓani zwaṋu. Hone no vha vhulaha nga tshiṱuhu tshe tsha tou swika makoleni." 
2Chronicles28:10 Zwino ni ṱoḓa u dzhia vhanna na vhasadzi vha Juda na Jerusalema na vha ita phuli dzaṋu. Hone a ni zwi ḓivhi uri na inwi no khakhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu naa? 
2Chronicles28:11 Zwino nthetsheleseni! Vhathu havha vha haṋu vhe na vha ita dziphuli, vha litsheni vha ṱuwe, Muṋe washu a sa ḓo ni sinyutshela a ni lifhedza.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Ndi hone vhaṅwe vharangaphanḓa vha Efraimi, Azaria ṅwana wa Jehohanani na Berekhia ṅwana wa Mishilimotho na Jehiskia ṅwana wa Shalumu na Amasia ṅwana wa Hadilai, vha tshi dzivhisa vhe vha vha vha tshi khou swika vha tshi bva nndwani vha ri," 
2Chronicles28:13 “Ni songo ḓa na phuli hedzo fhano, ri sa ḓo ovha mulandu phanḓa ha Muṋe washu. Ro no ḓi tshinya, ro no ḓi vha na mulandu. Kani ni ṱoḓa ri tshi phapha mbulu kha iṅwe? Ndi uri mulandu washu wo no hulela, mbiti dza Muṋe washu dzi ofhisaho dzi ḓo wela Vhaisraele.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Ndi hone vhahali vha tshi kumedza magota na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe idzo phuli na zwe vha ṱangula. 
2Chronicles28:15 Ha tiwa vhaṅwe vhanna uri vha dzhie phuli idzo, vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe fhedzi vha ambadzwa zwiambaro zwi tshi bva kha thundu ye ya ṱangulwa. Vha vha ṋea zwiambaro na navhula na zwiḽiwa na zwinwiwa, vha shela mapfura a muolivi kha mbonzhe dzavho. Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha si tshee na nungo vha vha namedza dzidonngi. Ndi hone vha tshi vha vhuedzedza ha vha havho Jerikho, Muḓini wa Mitshevho, vhone vha humela Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Misi yeneyo khosi Ahasi a ruma vhaḓinḓa ha khosi ya Ashuru uri a mu phalale. 
2Chronicles28:17 Vhaedomo vho vha vho dovha vha yo dia Juda vha thuba vhathu vha ṱuwa navho," 
2Chronicles28:18 ngeno Vhafilista vho dia miḓi zwigodini na Negeve kha ḽa Juda. Vha thuba miḓi ya Bethe Shemeshe na Ayaloni na Gederotho khathihi na miḓi ya Sokho na Thimina na Gimiso na miḓi yo i tangaho, vha dzula khayo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Muṋe washu a nyadzisa vhathu vha Juda nge Ahasi khosi ya Juda a tendela vhuvhi vhu tshi anda Juda, a nyadza Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles28:20 Thigilathi Philisere khosi ya Ashuru a ya ha khosi Ahasi, a si tsha mu phalala, tshawe ha tou vha u mu dina." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahasi a dzhia zwiṅwe zwithu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu na pfamoni ya musanda na mahayani a vhavhusi, a zwi ṋea khosi ya Ashuru, hone na izwo zwa si mu farise tshithu." 
2Chronicles28:22 Musi khosi Ahasi e khomboni, a ḓi khakhela Muṋe washu a tshi ya." 
2Chronicles28:23 Ahasi a ṋekedza midzimu ya Damasko zwiṱhavhelo, ya vhenevho vhathu vhe vha mu kunda, nge a ri, “Vhunga midzimu ya mahosi a Aramu yo vha farisa, ndi ḓo i ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo uri na nṋe i mpfarise.” Hone u ralo ha vha u ḓiṱulela khombo na u ṱulela Vhaisraele vhoṱhe khombo." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahasi a kuvhanganya thundu ya thembele ya Mudzimu a i pwashekanya. A vala miṋango ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, a fhaṱa dziaḽiṱari khuḓani dzoṱhe dza mikoto ya Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles28:25 Muḓini muṅwe na muṅwe wa Juda a fhaṱa zwitembele zwa midzimu zwikwarani uri midzimu isili i dubiselwe zwioro, u ralo ha vha u ṱunga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi awe, a sinyuwa." 
2Chronicles28:26 Mafhungo maṅwe a Ahasi, u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Juda na Israele." 
2Chronicles28:27 Khosi Ahasi a dzama, a swiṱwa muḓini wa Jerusalema, hone a si vhewe zwaloni zwa mahosi a Israele. Ṅwana wawe Hiskia a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hiskia a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 29. Mme awe o vha e Abia ṅwananyana wa Zakaria." 
2Chronicles29:2 O ita zwe zwa vha zwi tshi takadza Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga makhulukuku wawe Dafita." 
2Chronicles29:3 Hiskia o vula miṋango ya thembele ya Muṋe washu nga ṅwedzi wa u ranga wa ṅwaha we a thoma u vhusa, a i vusa." 
2Chronicles29:4 A kuvhanganya vhotshifhe na Vhalivi muṱani wa vhubvaḓuvha wa thembele," 
2Chronicles29:5 a ri, “Inwi Vhalivi, nthetsheleseni! Ḓikumedzeni Mudzimu zwino, ni kumulule thembele ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu, ni bvise na tshika dzoṱhe afho hukhethwa." 
2Chronicles29:6 Vhokhotsi ashu vho vha vha sa fulufhedzei, vho ita zwi sa takadzi Mudzimu Muṋe washu, vha mu ṱutshela, vha lavhelesa thungo, vha furalela fhethu hune a dzula hone." 
2Chronicles29:7 Vha ita na u vala miṋango ya maguḓa, vha dzima mbone. A vho ngo tsha dubisa zwioro kana vha ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho hukhethwa ha Mudzimu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ndi zwe mbiti dza Muṋe washu dza wela vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema, a vha ita zwi ofhisaho, vha nyadzwa nga vhoṱhe; inwi ni khou zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ndi zwe vhokhotsi ashu vha vhulawa nndwani, vhana vhashu na vhasadzi vhashu vha hwaliwa vha iswa vhuthubwani." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Zwino ndo elekanya u vhofha mulanga na Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa Israele, uri mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho dzi ri ṱutshele." 
2Chronicles29:11 Vhananga, ni songo tsha lenga zwino, ngauri Muṋe washu o ni nanga uri ni ime phanḓa hawe ni mu shumele, ni range vhathu phanḓa vha tshi mu luvha, ni mu dubisele zwioro.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Ndi hone Vhalivi havhano vha tshi ḓilugisela u shuma: Vha lutsinga lwa Kehathi ndi Mahathi ṅwana wa Amasai na Juele ṅwana wa Azaria, vha lutsinga lwa Mirari ndi Kishi ṅwana wa Abudi na Azaria ṅwana wa Jehalelele, vha lutsinga lwa Gerisoni ndi Jua ṅwana wa Zima na Edeni ṅwana wa Jua," 
2Chronicles29:13 vha lutsinga lwa Elitsafani ndi Shimiri na Jeiele, vha lutsinga lwa Asafu ndi Zakaria na Mathania," 
2Chronicles29:14 vha lutsinga lwa Hemani ndi Jehiele na Shimei, vha lutsinga lwa Jeduthuni ndi Shemaya na Uziele." 
2Chronicles29:15 Vhanna avho vha kuvhanganya Vhalivi vha havho, vha vha kumedza kha Mudzimu, vha ṱuwa vha yo dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha i kumulula, nga he khosi ya vha laya, vha tshi tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu a amba." 
2Chronicles29:16 Vhotshifhe vha dzhena hukhethwa ha Muṋe washu vha hu kumulula. Vha bvisa tshika dzoṱhe thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha dzi vhea muṱani wa thembele ya Muṋe washu. Vhalivi vha dzi dzhia vha dzi bvisela nnḓa vha yo dzi kudza Govhani ḽa Kidroni. 
2Chronicles29:17 Vha thoma maitele ayo nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru ḽa ṅwedzi vha swika guḓani ḽa Muṋe washu. Vha dovha vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mararu vha tshi khou kumulula thembele ya Muṋe washu yone iṋe, vha fhedza nga ḓuvha ḽa 16 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga." 
2Chronicles29:18 Ndi hone Vhalivi vha tshi ya ha khosi Hiskia vha swikisa mafhungo vha ri, “Ro kumulula thembele yoṱhe ya Muṋe washu na aḽiṱari ya zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na midzio yayo yoṱhe, na ḓafula ḽa u vhea vhurotho ho kumedzwaho Mudzimu na thundu dzaḽo dzoṱhe." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ro lugisa ra kumulula thundu yoṱhe ye khosi Ahasi a i bvisa nga u sa fulufhedzea hawe zwiḽa a tshee khosi. Zwino ro i vhea phanḓa ha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu.” 
2Chronicles29:20 Nga matshelo khosi Hiskia a fhinduwa, a kuvhanganya vhahulwane vha miḓi, a gonya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles29:21 Vha isa mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili na thuthana ṱhanu na mbili na zwibokoṱo zwiṱanu na zwivhili, tsha vha tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo tsha muvhuso na tsha hukhethwa na tsha Juda. Khosi ya laya vhotshifhe, vha lutsinga lwa Aroni, uri vha zwi ṋekedze kha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles29:22 Ndi hone vha tshi shidzha idzo mboho, vhotshifhe vha dzhia malofha vha handulula aḽiṱari ngao, vho no fhedza vha ṱhavha dzithutha vha dzhia malofha vha handulula aḽiṱari ngao, vha konou ṱhavha ngwana vha dzhia malofha adzo vha handulula aḽiṱari ngao." 
2Chronicles29:23 Mbudzi dza tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo dza iswa phanḓa ha khosi, vhone na tshivhidzo vha vhea zwanḓa zwavho khadzo." 
2Chronicles29:24 Ndi hone vhotshifhe vha tshi ṱhavha idzo mbudzi, vha isa malofha adzo kha aḽiṱari ya tshiṱhavhelo uri a pfumelele Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, nge khosi ya vha yo vha laya ya ri hu ṋekedzwe tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho na tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo zwi tshi itelwa Vhaisraele vhoṱhe." 
2Chronicles29:25 Khosi Hiskia a vhea Vhalivi thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vhe na tshele na dziharipa na zwihwana hu tshi tevhedzwa ndayo dza Dafita na Gadi muporofita wa khosi na muporofita Nathani, hezwo ndi zwe Muṋe washu a vha laya nga milomo ya vhaporofita." 
2Chronicles29:26 Ndi hone Vhalivi vha tshi ima vho ḓilugisa vhe na zwilidzo zwa Dafita, vhotshifhe vhe na dziphalaphala." 
2Chronicles29:27 Hiskia a bvisa ndaela ya uri aḽiṱarini hu ṋekedzwe tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho. Musi vha tshi thoma u ṋekedza, vhathu na vhone vha thoma u renda Muṋe washu nga nyimbo, hu tshi lila dziphalaphala na zwilidzo zwa Dafita khosi ya Israele." 
2Chronicles29:28 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha gwadama tsha luvha, vhaimbi vhone vha tshi khou imba, vhalidzi vha phalaphala vha tshi khou dzi lidza. Zwa ḓi ralo tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha vhuya tsha ṱhoṱhela." 
2Chronicles29:29 Musi vho no fhedza u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, khosi na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe henefho nayo vha gwadama vha luvha." 
2Chronicles29:30 Khosi Hiskia na vhakoma vhawe vha vhudza Vhalivi uri vha rende Muṋe washu nga nyimbo dza Dafita na dza muvhoni Asafu; Vhalivi vha mbo renda vho takala, vha konou gwadama vha rabela." 
2Chronicles29:31 Ndi hone Hiskia a tshi ri, “Zwino no ḓikumedza Muṋe washu. Iḓani ni ise zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho dza ndivhuho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu.” Vhathu vha tshivhidzo vha mbo isa zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho dza ndivhuho, na vhoṱhe vhe mbilu dzavho dza vha dzi tshi zwi funa vha isa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho." 
2Chronicles29:32 Tshivhalo tsha zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwo iswaho nga tshivhidzo tsho vha tshi mboho dza 70 na thutha dza ḓana na thuthana dza 200, dzoṱhe dzi dza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshi ṋekedzwaho Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles29:33 Zwifuwo zwa zwiṱhavhelo zwo ṋekedzwaho zwo vha mboho dza 600 na nngu na mbudzi dza 3 000. 
2Chronicles29:34 Fhedzi vhotshifhe vha u via zwiṱhavhelo zwoṱhe zwi fhiswaho vho vha vhe vhaṱuku, ndi zwe vha havho Vhalivi vha vha farisa mushumo uyo wa vhuya wa fhela, na vhaṅwe vhotshifhe vha vhuya vha fhedza u ḓikumedza Mudzimu, ngauri Vhalivi vho vha vho ḓifunga u ḓikumedza Mudzimu u fhira vhotshifhe." 
2Chronicles29:35 Zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwo vha zwo ḓala, khathihi na mapfura a nduvho ya vhuthihi na nduvho ya zwinwiwa zwo fhelekedzaho zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho. Ndi hone mushumo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu u tshi dovha wa pfumbiswa." 
2Chronicles29:36 Khosi Hiskia na vhathu vhoṱhe vha pembela nga u vhona zwe Mudzimu a itela vhathu vhawe, nge zwa ṱavhanya u itea." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hiskia a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele na ḽa Juda, a ita na u ṅwala maṅwalo a iswa ha matsinde a Efraimi na Manase, a vha vhidza uri vha ḓe thembeleni ya Muṋe washu muḓini wa Jerusalema vha ite vhuṱambo ha Paseka, vha tshi itela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles30:2 Khosi na vharangaphanḓa na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe Jerusalema vha dzudzanya uri vha ite vhuṱambo ha Paseka nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili. 
2Chronicles30:3 Vho vha vha songo zwi kona u ita vhuṱambo uho nga tshifhinga tsho teaho, nge ha vha hu si na vhotshifhe vhanzhi vhe vha vha vho ḓikumedza Mudzimu nahone vhathu vho vha vha songo kuvhangana Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles30:4 Khosi na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vha vhona iyo nzudzanyo i yavhuḓi. 
2Chronicles30:5 Vha vhofha ḽa u isa nḓivhadzo kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele, u bva Bierisheba u swika Dani, vha tshi vhidza vhathu uri vha ḓe Jerusalema, vha itele Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele vhuṱambo ha Paseka. Ndi uri vhathu vhanzhi vho vha vha si tsha ita uho vhuṱambo nga he zwa ṅwalwa Maṅwaloni." 
2Chronicles30:6 Vhaḓinḓa vha bva vha tshi tevhedza ndaela ya khosi na vharangaphanḓa, vha gidima vha ṱanganya ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda na ḽa Israele vhe na maṅwalo ane a ri, “Vhathu vha Israele, vhuelelani ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Abrahamu na Isaka na Israele, uri na Ene a vhuye ha inwi no salaho no ponyokaho zwanḓani zwa mahosi a Ashuru." 
2Chronicles30:7 Ni songo nga vhokhotsi aṋu na mashaka aṋu, vhe vha shandukela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho, a vha kumedza maswina vha vha phusukanya unga ni tshi khou zwi vhona." 
2Chronicles30:8 Ni songo vha na tshipimbi unga vhokhotsi aṋu, thetshelesani Muṋe washu. Iḓani hukhethwa he Ene a hu ita hukhethwa ha lini na lini. Shumelani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, uri mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho dzi ni ṱutshele." 
2Chronicles30:9 Arali na rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu, ndi hone mashaka aṋu na vhana vhaṋu vha tshi ḓo khathutshelwa nga vho vha thubaho, vha vhuya fhano shangoni ḽino, ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu u na tshilidzi, u na khathutshelo. Arali na vhuya khae, ha nga ni furaleli.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Vhaḓinḓa vha gidima vha dzhena muḓi nga muḓi shangoni ḽa Efraimi na ḽa Manase vha vhuya vha swika kha ḽa Zebuloni, hone vhathu vha vha sea, vha vha kolela." 
2Chronicles30:11 Naho zwo ralo, vhaṅwe vhanna vha matsinde a Ashere na Manase na Zebuloni vha ḓiṱukufhadza, vha ya Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles30:12 Mudzimu a shuma na shangoni ḽa Juda, a ita uri vhathu vha vhe na mbilu nthihi uri vha khunyeledze ndaela ya khosi na magota, vha tshi tevhedza zwe Muṋe washu a amba." 
2Chronicles30:13 Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili ha kuvhangana gogo ḽa vhathu Jerusalema uri vha ite vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa. Ḽo vha ḽi gogo ḽihulu vhukuma. 
2Chronicles30:14 Vhathu vha dzhia aḽiṱari dze dza vha dzi Jerusalema, vha hwala na aḽiṱari dza u dubisela zwioro, vha dzi kudza Govhani ḽa Kidroni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Vha ṱhavha ngwana ya Paseka nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili. Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha shona, vha ḓikumedza Mudzimu, vha isa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles30:16 Vha ima vhuimoni havho nga he vha laiwa nga Mulayo wa Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu. Vhotshifhe vha handulula aḽiṱari nga malofha e vha ṋewa nga Vhalivi. 
2Chronicles30:17 Vhunga vhunzhi ha vhathu vha re afho gogoni vho vha vha songo ḓikumedza Mudzimu, Vhalivi vha ṱhavha ngwana dza Paseka vha tshi itela vhathu vhoṱhe vha songo ḓikumululaho, vha songo konaho u kumedza Muṋe washu ngwana dzavho." 
2Chronicles30:18 Naho vhunzhi ha vhathu vho ḓaho vha tshi bva kha matsinde a Efraimi na Manase na Isakhara na Zebuloni vho vha vha songo ḓikumulula, vho ḓi ḽa Paseka, vha sa tevhedzi zwo ṅwalwaho. Hone khosi Hiskia a vha rabelela a ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a re na vhuthu a tshi hangwela muṅwe na muṅwe" 
2Chronicles30:19 ane a shumela Mudzimu Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi awe nga mbilu nthihi, naho a songo ḓikumulula a tshi tevhedza ndayo dza hukhethwa.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Muṋe washu a thetshelesa thabelo ya Hiskia, a si huvhadze vhathu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe henefho Jerusalema vha ita vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili vha tshi pembela zwihulu, ngeno Vhalivi na vhotshifhe vha tshi renda Muṋe washu nga nyimbo misi yoṱhe, hu tshi lila zwilidzo zwa u hulisa Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hiskia a amba na Vhalivi vhoṱhe a tshi vha ṱuṱuwedza, nge vha sumbedza vhukoni hu tshi shumelwa Muṋe washu. Vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili vha tshi ḽa mikovhe yavho, vha ṋekedza nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu vha renda Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles30:23 Vhathu vha tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vha pfana uri vha ite vhuṱambo uho vha dovhe vha fhedze maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, nangoho vha ita vhuṱambo uho vha tshi pembela vha dovha vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili," 
2Chronicles30:24 ngauri Hiskia khosi ya Juda o vha o ṋea tshivhidzo mboho dza 1 000 na nngu na mbudzi dza 7 000, vharangaphanḓa vha vha ḓisela mboho dza 1 000 na nngu na mbudzi dza 10 000. Vhotshifhe vhanzhisa vha ḓikumulula." 
2Chronicles30:25 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha vhathu vha Juda tsha pembela, khathihi na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho kuvhangana vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa Israele, hu tshi vhaliwa na vhatsinda vhe vha vha vha tshi bva kha ḽa Israele na vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Juda." 
2Chronicles30:26 Ho vha na dakalo fulu muḓini wa Jerusalema, ndi uri ho vha hu sa athu vhuya ha itea zwo raloho Jerusalema u bva misi ya Solomoni khosi ya Israele, ṅwana wa Dafita." 
2Chronicles30:27 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha takuwa vha shudufhadza vhathu, Mudzimu a vha thetshelesa, nge thabelo yavho ya swika ṱaḓulu, fhethu hawe hukhethwa hune a dzula hone." 
2Chronicles31:1 Musi vhuṱambo ho no fhela, Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha bva vha ya miḓini ya Juda, vha pwasha matombo a zwitungulo, vha remekanya thanda dza zwifanyiso zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi, vha thutha zwitembele zwa zwikwarani, vha thutha na dziaḽiṱari kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda na ḽa Benyamini na ḽa Efraimi na ḽa Manase. Musi Vhaisraele vho no thutha zwoṱhe, vha humela mashangoni avho na miḓini ya havho." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hiskia a vusulusa nzudzanyo ya zwigwada zwa vhotshifhe na Vhalivi, zwi tshi ya nga mishumo ya vhotshifhe kana Vhalivi, uri vha ṋekedze zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho ya u konana na Muṋe washu na u shuma thembeleni hu tshi luvhiwa na u livhuha Mudzimu na u mu renda nga nyimbo khoroni dza hune Muṋe washu a dzula hone." 
2Chronicles31:3 Khosi ya bvisa zwifuwo zwayo kha masambi ayo a zwifuwo i tshi itela zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwa matsheloni na zwa madekwana na zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwa Sabatha na zwa vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi Muswa na zwa vhuṱambo ho vhewaho nga he zwa ṅwalwa kha Mulayo wa Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles31:4 A laya vhathu vha no dzula Jerusalema uri vha fhe vhotshifhe na Vhalivi mikovhe yo vha teaho uri vha kone u ḓikumedza tshoṱhe kha Mulayo wa Muṋe washu. 
2Chronicles31:5 Musi ndaela i tshi tou bviswa, Vhaisraele vha ṋea nga hune vha kona vha isa zwikaṋwa zwa u thoma zwa thoro dzavho na waini ntswa na mapfura a muolivi na ṋotshi na zwoṱhe zwi no bva masimuni, vha isa zwinzhi, vha ita na u isa tshafumi tsha zwoṱhe zwine vha vha nazwo." 
2Chronicles31:6 Vhanna vha Israele na Juda vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula miḓini ya Juda na vhone vha isa tshafumi tsha masambi avho a kholomo na nngu na mbudzi na tshafumi tsha zwikhethwa zwo kumedzwaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho, vha zwi khokha nga dzithulwi dzithulwi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Izwo vho thoma u zwi ita nga ṅwedzi wa vhuraru, vha fhedza nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili." 
2Chronicles31:8 Musi khosi Hiskia na vharangaphanḓa vha tshi vhona idzo thulwi, vha renda Muṋe washu, vha khoḓa vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hiskia a vhudzisa vhotshifhe na Vhalivi nga idzo thulwi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Tshifhe muhulu Azaria, wa lutsinga lwa Tsadoko, a fhindula a ri, “Tshee vhathu vha thoma u ḓisa mitendelo yavho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, ro ḽa ra fura, ra ita na u sia zwinzhi, nge Muṋe washu a shudufhadza vhathu vhawe, ha ita na u sala hezwi zwinzhi.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Khosi Hiskia a bvisa ndaela ya uri hu lugiswe fhethu ha u vhulungela thundu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, nangoho zwa itiwa." 
2Chronicles31:12 Ndi hone vha tshi dzudzanya mitendelo nga u fulufhedzea, khathihi na tshafumi na zwifhiwa zwo kumedzwaho Mudzimu. Mulangi wa izwo zwithu o vha e Mulivi we a vha a tshi pfi Khonania, tshanḓa tshawe e Shimei murathu wawe," 
2Chronicles31:13 fhasi havho vhe na Jehiele na Azasia na Nahathi na Asaele na Jerimotho na Jozabadi na Eliele na Isimakhia na Mahathi na Benaya, vhoṱhe vhó vhewa nga khosi Hiskia. Mulangi wa thembele ya Mudzimu a vha Azaria." 
2Chronicles31:14 Mulangi wa nduvho dzine muthu a bvisa nga u tou funa hawe o vha e Koree ṅwana wa Imina wa Mulivi, mulindi wa Khoro ya Vhubvaḓuvha, a dovha a vha ene mukovhi wa mitendelo na nduvho khethwa-khethwa." 
2Chronicles31:15 Miḓini he ha vha hu tshi dzula vhotshifhe o vha a tshi fariswa nga Edeni na Miniamini na Jeshua na Shemaya na Amaria na Shekania, vha tshi kovhela vhotshifhe vha havho nga u fulufhedzea, zwi tshi ya nga zwigwada zwavho, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku zwi tshi fana." 
2Chronicles31:16 Vha ita na u kovhela vha tshinnani u thoma kha vha miṅwaha miraru vhe madzina avho a ṅwalwa kha mutevhe wavho, vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓo dzhena thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha shuma mishumo yo fhambanaho ya misi, zwi tshi ya nga vhuimo havho na zwigwada zwavho." 
2Chronicles31:17 Vha kovhela vhotshifhe vho ṅwalwaho zwi tshi ya nga miṱa yavho hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho kha mutevhe wavho, na kha Vhalivi u thoma kha vha miṅwaha ya 20 zwa ḓi ralo, zwi tshi ya nga vhuimo havho na zwigwada zwavho." 
2Chronicles31:18 Vha angaredza na zwiṱoma zwoṱhe na vhasadzi na vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vho ṅwalwaho kha mutevhe wa lutsinga lwavho. Ndi uri vho vha vha tshi fulufhedzea kha u ḓikumedza Mudzimu. 
2Chronicles31:19 Vhotshifhe vhone, vha lutsinga lwa Aroni, vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula mashangoni a pfulo u mona na miḓi ya havho kana miḓini miṅwe, vhanna vho vha vha tshi tou vhidzwa nga madzina uri muṅwe na muṅwe wa tshinnani ane vha dzula nae vha mu kovhele mukovhe, vha kovhele na vhoṱhe vho ṅwalwaho kha mutevhe wa Vhalivi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hezwo ndi zwe khosi Hiskia a ita kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda, a tshi ita zwivhuya na zwi re zwone, zwi takadzaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe." 
2Chronicles31:21 Zwoṱhe zwe a ita a tshi shumela thembele ya Mudzimu na u thetshelesa mulayo na dzindayo, o vha a tshi ita zwine Mudzimu wawe a zwi funa, a tshi shuma nga mbilu yoṱhe, ndi zwe zwa mu nakela ngazwo." 
2Chronicles32:1 Musi ho no itea izwo zwoṱhe zwe khosi Hiskia a zwi shuma a tshi fulufhedzea, khosi Sanakheribi wa Ashuru a ḓa a dia Juda. A govhela miḓi yo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo, a tshi ri u ḓo pwasha mitsheṱo a dzhia miḓi iyo." 
2Chronicles32:2 Musi Hiskia a tshi vhona uri Sanakheribi o ḓa u ṱoḓa u lwa na vha Jerusalema," 
2Chronicles32:3 a amba na vharangaphanḓa na mmbi uri hu valiwe maḓi a no bva zwisimani nnḓa ha muḓi, vhone vha mu farisa." 
2Chronicles32:4 Ha kuvhangana vhanna vhanzhi, vha vala zwisima zwoṱhe na mulambwana we wa vha u tshi ela u tshi buḓekanya shango. Vha ri, “Mahosi a Ashuru a tshi ḓa a songo wana maḓi.”"
