2Chronicles32:5 Hiskia a shuma nga maanḓa a tshi vusa fhethu ho pwasheaho mutsheṱoni, a fhaṱa dzithawara nṱha hawo. A fhaṱa muṅwe mutsheṱo wa nnḓa ha hoyo, a khwaṱhisa mirango ya u tikedza ya Muḓi wa Dafita. A ita na zwihali zwinzhi, a fula na mafumo." 
2Chronicles32:6 Hiskia a vhea vhalangammbi uri vha lange vhathu, a vha kuvhanganya phanḓa hawe vanḓani khoroni ya muḓi, a vha ṱuṱuwedza a tshi ri," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Khwaṱhani ni vhe na nungo. Ni songo ofha tshithu, ni songo kulea nungo nga khosi ya Ashuru na mmbi khulu ine a vha nayo, riṋe ri na maanḓa mahulu a no fhira awe." 
2Chronicles32:8 Ene u na maanḓa a vhathu, hone riṋe ri na Mudzimu Muṋe washu. Ene u ḓo ri farisa ra lwa nndwa dzashu.” Vhathu vha vha na fulufhelo nga u pfa zwe Hiskia khosi ya Juda a amba." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ngavhuya musi Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru na mmbi dzawe dzoṱhe vha tshi khou govhela muḓi wa Lakhishi, a ruma vhaḓinḓa Jerusalema ha Hiskia khosi ya Juda na ha vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha isa malaedzwa vha swika vha ri," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru u ri, ‘Tshe wa ḓitika ngatsho ndi tshini, hune wa ḓi dzula zwau Jerusalema hone wo govhelwa?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezwi Hiskia a tshi ri: Mudzimu washu Yahavee u ḓo ri tshidza zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Ashuru, u khou ni xedza uri ni fe nga nḓala na ḓora." 
2Chronicles32:12 A si ene Hiskia we a thutha zwitembele zwa uyo mudzimu zwa zwikwarani, na dziaḽiṱari dzawe, a tshi vhudza vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema a ri vha fanela u luvha phanḓa ha aḽiṱari nthihi vha fhise zwiṱhavhelo khayo?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Kani-ha a ni ḓivhi zwe nṋe na vhokhotsi anga ra ita tshakha dzoṱhe dza maṅwe mashango? Midzimu ya idzo tshakha yo vhuya ya kona u lamulela shango ḽavho zwanḓani zwanga? 
2Chronicles32:14 Midzimu yoṱhe ya tshakha idzo dze vhokhotsi anga vha dzi lozwa ndi ufhio we wa kona u tshidza vhathu vhawo zwanḓani zwanga, inwi ni tshi ri mudzimu waṋu u ḓo kona u ni lamukisa tshanḓani tshanga?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Zwino ni songo tenda Hiskia a tshi ni fhura, a tshi ni xedza nga u ralo. Ni songo tenda zwine a amba, ngauri a hu na mudzimu wa lushaka lufhio na lufhio kana muvhuso ufhio na ufhio we wa vhuya wa kona u lamulela lushaka lwawo zwanḓani zwanga kana zwanḓani zwa vhokhotsi anga. Zwino mudzimu waṋu u nga kona hani u ni lamulela zwanḓani zwanga?’ ”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Vhaḓinḓa vha Sanakheribi vha isa phanḓa vha tshi nyefula Mudzimu Muṋe washu, vha tshi sasaladza na Hiskia mulanda wawe." 
2Chronicles32:17 Khosi ya ita na u ṅwala maṅwalo i tshi nyefula Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, a tshi mu amba a ri, “Midzimu ya tshakha dza maṅwe mashango a yo ngo kona u lamukisa vhathu vhayo zwanḓani zwanga, zwenezwo na mudzimu wa Hiskia u nga si kone u lamukisa vhathu vhawo zwanḓani zwanga.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Ndi hone avho vhaḓinḓa vha tshi ṱavha mukosi nga Tshiheberu uri vha shushedze vhathu vha Jerusalema vho imaho kha mitsheṱo ya muḓi, vha kulee nungo, uri vha kone u thuba muḓi." 
2Chronicles32:19 Vha amba nga Mudzimu wa Jerusalema zwenezwiḽa zwe vha amba nga midzimu ya dziṅwe tshakha dza mashango, zwitungulo zwo itwaho nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ndi hone khosi Hiskia na muporofita Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi vha tshi rabela Mudzimu vha mu lilela uri a vha farise. 
2Chronicles32:21 Muṋe washu a ruma muruṅwa a ya a vhulaha vhahali vhoṱhe na vharangaphanḓa na vhalangammbi mishashani ya khosi ya Ashuru. Khosi ya vhuelela shangoni ḽayo yo shona. Muṅwe musi a tshi khou luvha thembeleni ya mudzimu wawe, vhaṅwe vhana vhawe vhe a vha beba vha mu vhulaha nga mapanga." 
2Chronicles32:22 Ngauralo Muṋe washu a lamukisa khosi Hiskia na vhathu vha Jerusalema zwanḓani zwa Sanakheribi khosi ya Ashuru, na zwanḓani zwa maswina avho maṅwe oṱhe. Muṋe washu a vha tsireledza masia oṱhe." 
2Chronicles32:23 Vhathu vhanzhi vha isela Muṋe washu nduvho Jerusalema, na Hiskia khosi ya Juda vha mu isela nduvho dza mutengo muhulu. U bva zwenezwo Hiskia a huliswa nga tshakha dzoṱhe." 
2Chronicles32:24 Misi yeneyo khosi Hiskia a farwa nga biso, lwe a vhuya a ṱoḓou fa. Hiskia a rabela Muṋe washu, ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mu fhindula, a mu sumbedza tshiga tsha uri u ḓo fhola." 
2Chronicles32:25 Hone mbilu ya Hiskia yo vha i tshi ḓihudza, a si tsha livhuha vhuthu he a itelwa hone, ndi zwe Muṋe washu a mu sinyutshela, a sinyutshela na Juda na Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles32:26 Ndi hone Hiskia na vhathu vha Jerusalema vha tshi ḓiṱukufhadza, zwenezwo Muṋe washu a si tsha vha rwa misi ya Hiskia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Khosi Hiskia o vha e na lupfumo luhulu nahone a tshi huliswa. A ita mbulungelo dza siliva yawe na musuku na matombo a mutengo muhulu na zwilungi na zwiṱangu na zwithu zwoṱhe zwa mutengo muhulu. 
2Chronicles32:28 Hiskia a fhaṱa na maḓulu a u vhulungela khaṋo ya zwiliṅwa zwa thoro na waini ya tuvhu na mapfura a muolivi, a fhaṱa madanga a zwifuwo zwa tshakha dzo fhambanaho na zwitumba zwa masambi a nngu." 
2Chronicles32:29 A fhaṱa miḓana a vha na masambi manzhi a nngu na a kholomo, nge Mudzimu a vha o mu ṋea lupfumo luhulu." 
2Chronicles32:30 Khosi Hiskia ndi ene we a thivha mulonga wa nṱha wa tshisima tsha Gihoni, a livhisa maḓi vhukovhela ha Muḓi wa Dafita. Zwoṱhe zwe a ita zwo mu nakela." 
2Chronicles32:31 Hone musi hu tshi ruṅwa vhaḓinḓa nga vhavhusi vha Babele u ḓa u mu vhudzisa nga tshiga tshi kanukisaho tsho iteaho afho shangoni, Mudzimu a mu litsha uri a mu linge, a ḓivhe zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwi mbiluni yawe." 
2Chronicles32:32 Mafhungo maṅwe a khosi Hiskia na u ḓikumedza hawe Muṋe washu, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Bono ḽa Muporofita Yesaya ṅwana wa Amutsi na kha Histori ya Mahosi a Juda na Israele." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hiskia a dzama, a swiṱwa tshivhangani, hu re na zwalo zwa nnḓu ya Dafita. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema vha mu hulisa musi a tshi dzama. Ṅwana wawe Manase a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 12, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 55." 
2Chronicles33:2 Manase a ita zwe zwa vha zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a edzisa maitele a nengisaho a tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi thatha afho shangoni musi Vhaisraele vha tshi swika." 
2Chronicles33:3 Manase a vusa zwitembele zwa zwikwarani zwe khotsi awe Hiskia a vha o zwi thutha, a ita na u fhaṱa aḽiṱari dza Vhobaali, a vhaḓa thanda ya Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi, a gwadamela ṋaledzi dzoṱhe, a dzi luvha." 
2Chronicles33:4 A fhaṱa na aḽiṱari dza u luvha midzimu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, fhethu he Muṋe washu a vha o ri, “Jerusalema hu ḓo dzula dzina ḽanga lini na lini.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Miṱani ya thembele ya Muṋe washu vhuvhili hayo a fhaṱa dziaḽiṱari a tshi fhaṱela ṋaledzi dzoṱhe. 
2Chronicles33:6 A ita na u ṋekedza vhana vhawe vha vhatuka a vha ita nduvho dzi fhiswaho Govhani ḽa Beni Hinomu, a edzisa na zwa manditi na u tungula ṱhangu, a yo vhudzisa vhaambeli na vhabvumbi. A tshinya zwihulu zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a mu sinyusa." 
2Chronicles33:7 A dzhia tshifanyiso tsha thanda tshe ene muṋe a tou ḓivhaḓela, a tshi vhea thembeleni ya Mudzimu, he Mudzimu a vha o vhudza Dafita na ṅwana wawe Solomoni a ri, “Thembeleni hei fhano Jerusalema, fhethu he nda hu nanga kha matsinde oṱhe a Vhaisraele, ndi ḓo vhea dzina ḽanga hone lini na lini." 
2Chronicles33:8 A thi nga dovhi nda ita uri ṋayo dza Vhaisraele dzi tendeleke dzi ṱuwe shangoni ḽe nda ṋea vhomakhulukuku wavho, arali vha ita zwoṱhe zwe nda vha laya, vha vhulunga Mulayo woṱhe na ndaela na ndayo dze vha ṋewa nga Mushe.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Hone Manase a xedza vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema, vha ita vhuvhi vhu no fhira ha tshakha dze Muṋe washu a dzi lozwa u swikani ha Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles33:10 Muṋe washu a amba na Manase na vhathu vhawe, hone vha si zwi londe." 
2Chronicles33:11 Muṋe washu a vha rambela vhalangammbi vha khosi ya Ashuru, vha thuba Manase, vha mu longa huka ningoni, vha mu vhofha nga tsimbi dza musinaseṱha, vha mu hwala vha mu isa Babele." 
2Chronicles33:12 Musi a tshi vho tambula, a luvhelela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe, a ḓiṱukufhadza zwihulu phanḓa ha Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi awe," 
2Chronicles33:13 a mu rabela. Muṋe washu a mu khathutshela, a thetshelesa tshililo tshawe, a mu vhuedzedza Jerusalema, muvhusoni wawe. Ndi hone Manase a tshi zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ngavhuya Manase a engedza mutsheṱo wa nnḓa wa Muḓi wa Dafita, vhukovhela ha tshisima tsha Gihoni govhani, u vhuya u swika muṋangoni wa Khoro ya Khovhe, wa mona na tshivhanga tsha Ofele, a u lapfisa wa ya nṱha. A vhea vhalangammbi miḓini yoṱhe ya Juda i re na mitsheṱo." 
2Chronicles33:15 Manase a bvisa midzimu isili, a bvisa na tshifanyiso tsha thanda thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, khathihi na aḽiṱari dze a vha o dzi fhaṱa tshikwarani tsha thembele na Jerusalema, a zwi posa nnḓa ha muḓi." 
2Chronicles33:16 Ndi hone a tshi vusa aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu, a ṋekedza nduvho dza u konana na Mudzimu na dza ndivhuho khayo, a vhudza vhathu vha Juda uri vha shumele Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles33:17 Naho zwo ralo vhathu vha ḓi yo ṋekedza nduvho zwitembeleni zwa zwikwarani, hone vha tshi dzi ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho fhedzi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Mafhungo maṅwe a Manase, hu tshi vhaliwa na thabelo ye a rabela Mudzimu wawe na maipfi e vhaporofita vha mu vhudza nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele." 
2Chronicles33:19 Thabelo yawe na zwe Mudzimu a mu khathutshela, khathihi na vhutshinyi hawe hoṱhe na u sa fulufhedzea hawe na fhethu he a fhaṱa zwitembele, a imisa zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi na zwitungulo zwiḽa a sa athu ḓiṱukufhadza, zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Vhaporofita." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manase a dzama, a swiṱwa pfamoni. Ṅwana wawe Amoni a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 22, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha mivhili." 
2Chronicles33:22 Amoni o ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, u ḓi nga khotsi awe Manase. Amoni a luvha zwitungulo zwoṱhe zwo itwaho nga Manase, a zwi ṋekedza nduvho." 
2Chronicles33:23 Hone ene ho ngo nga khotsi awe Manase, ho ngo ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, mulandu wa Amoni wo kalula." 
2Chronicles33:24 Magota a Amoni vha mu langana, vha mu vhulahela pfamoni yawe." 
2Chronicles33:25 Vhahulwane vha shango vha vhulaha vhoṱhe vhe vha langana khosi Amoni, vha dzhia ṅwana wawe Josiasi vha mu vhumba khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiasi a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 31." 
2Chronicles34:2 Josiasi o ita zwe zwa vha zwi tshi takadza Muṋe washu, a kanda vhuṱalani ha makhulukuku wawe Dafita, a si vhuye a pambutshela thungo ya tshauḽa kana tshamonde." 
2Chronicles34:3 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuraru wa muvhuso wa Josiasi, musi a tshi kha ḓi vha nga hawe, a thoma u shumela Mudzimu wa makhulukuku wawe Dafita. Nga ṅwaha wa 12 wa muvhuso wawe a thoma u thutha zwitembele zwa midzimu Juda na Jerusalema, a thutha zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi na zwitungulo zwo vhaḓwaho na zwifanyiso zwo fulwaho nga tsimbi." 
2Chronicles34:4 A bvisa ndaela ha thuthwa aḽiṱari dza Vhobaali, a tumukanya aḽiṱari dza zwioro dze dza vha dzi nṱha hadzo, a pwashekanya zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi na zwitungulo na zwiṅwe zwifanyiso. Hezwo a zwi pwashekanya zwa tshakekana a zwi kuya a dzhia buse ḽazwo a ṋuṋedza zwaloni zwa vhe vha vha vha tshi zwi ṋekedza nduvho." 
2Chronicles34:5 A fhisa marambo a vhotshifhe vhazwo kha aḽiṱari dzazwo, ngauralo a vha o kumulula Juda na Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles34:6 Miḓini ya Manase na Efraimi na Simioni, u vhuya u swika Nafuthali na matumbani u mona nayo," 
2Chronicles34:7 a thutha dziaḽiṱari na zwifanyiso zwa thanda zwa Ashera mudzimu wa tshisadzi, a kuyekanya zwitungulo zwa vha luvhanda, a tumukanya aḽiṱari dzoṱhe dza zwioro shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Israele dza tshakekana. Ndi hone a tshi vhuelela Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles34:8 Nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wa khosi Josiasi, e kha u kumulula shango na thembele, a ruma Shafani ṅwana wa Atsalia na Maaseya ṋegota wa muḓi, vhe na Jua ṅwana wa Juasi, tshanḓa tsha khosi, u yo lugisa thembele ya Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe." 
2Chronicles34:9 Vha ya ha tshifhe muhulu Hilikia, vha mu ṋea tshelede ye ya vha yo ḓiswa thembeleni ya Mudzimu, ndi ye Vhalivi vhe vha vha vhe vhalindamiṋango vha i kuvhanganya i tshi bva kha vhathu vha Manase na Efraimi na tsalela dzoṱhe dza Israele na kha vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na Benyamini na vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ndi hone vha tshi i kumedza vhanna vhararu vhe vha vha vha tshi langa mushumo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu. Avho vhanna vha holela vhashumi vhe vha lugisa thembele ngayo. 
2Chronicles34:11 Iṅwe vha ṋea vhavhaḓi na vhafhaṱi uri vha renge matombo o vhaḓiwaho na matanda a phuphu dza nnḓu dze mahosi a Juda a dzi litsha dzi tshi vha matumba. 
2Chronicles34:12 Avho vhanna vha shuma uyo mushumo vha tshi fulufhedzea. Vho vha vha tshi langwa nga Jahathi na Obadia, Vhalivi vha lutsinga lwa Mirari, na Zakaria na Mishulamu, vha lutsinga lwa Kehathi. Vhalivi vhoṱhe vho vha vhe vhomakone kha u imba nga zwilidzo." 
2Chronicles34:13 Vhenevho vho vha vha tshi langa vhahwali, vha tshi ingamela na vhashumi vhoṱhe vha mushumo muṅwe na muṅwe. Vhaṅwe Vhalivi vho vha vhe vhaṅwaleli na vhamaṅwalo na vhalindamiṋango." 
2Chronicles34:14 Musi vha tshi khou bvisa tshelede ye ya vha yo iswa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, tshifhe Hilikia a tumbula bugu ya Mulayo wa Muṋe washu ye vha vha vho ṋewa nga Mushe." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikia a vhudza Shafani muṅwali wa tsengoni a ri, “Ndo tumbula Bugu ya Mulayo thembeleni ya Muṋe washu.” Hilikia a dzhia iyo bugu a ṋea Shafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Ndi hone Shafani a tshi dzhia iyo bugu a i isa ha khosi, a swikisa mafhungo a ri, “Vhalanda vhavho vha khou ita zwoṱhe zwe ha pfi vha zwi shume." 
2Chronicles34:17 Vho bvisa iḽa tshelede ye ya vha i thembeleni ya Muṋe washu vha i ṋea vhaingameli na vhashumi.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Ndi hone Shafani muṅwali wa tsengoni a tshi ḓivhadza khosi a ri, “Tshifhe Hilikia o nṋea bugu.” Shafani a vhalela khosi iyo bugu." 
2Chronicles34:19 Musi khosi i tshi pfa maipfi a Bugu ya Mulayo, ya kherukanya zwiambaro zwayo." 
2Chronicles34:20 Josiasi a laya tshifhe Hilikia na Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani na Abudoni ṅwana wa Mika na Shafani muṅwali wa tsengoni na Asaya ndumi ya khosi a ri," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Iyani u mmbudzisela ha Muṋe washu, ni vhudzisele na tsalela dza Israele na vhathu vha Juda zwo ṅwalwaho buguni hei yo tumbulwaho. Muṋe washu o ri sinyutshela zwihulu nge vhomakhulukuku washu vha si thetshelese maipfi a Muṋe washu, a vho ngo tevhedza zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho buguni hei.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikia na vhanna vhe khosi ya vha yo vha ruma nae vha yo amba na Huluda muporofita wa musadzi, we a vha e musadzi wa Shalumu ṅwana wa Thokohathi, ṅwana wa Hasina, mulondoli wa zwiambaro zwa thembeleni. Huluda o vha a tshi dzula Jerusalema dzinguni ḽa vhuvhili." 
2Chronicles34:23 Huluda a vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Vhudzani munna o ni rumaho ha Nṋe ni ri:" 
2Chronicles34:24 Yahavee u ri: Fhano fhethu ndi ḓo hu ḓisela khombo, ya wela na vhathu vhaho, vha ḓo welwa nga madeketelo oṱhe o ṅwalwaho buguni yo vhalelwaho khosi ya Juda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ndi uri vhathu vho nndandula, vha nṱunga nga u dubisela miṅwe midzimu zwioro, nda sinyuwa nga mulandu wa midzimu yoṱhe ye vha ḓiitela nga zwanḓa zwavho; ndi ḓo sinyutshela fhano fhethu mbiti dzanga dza tou duga ha si vhe na a dzi dzimaho." 
2Chronicles34:26 Vhudza khosi ya Juda we a u ruma uri u ḓe u vhudzise Yahavee u ri: Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi amba nga maipfi e wa a pfa u ri: 
2Chronicles34:27 Iwe wo ḓisola wa ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa ha Mudzimu musi u tshi pfa zwe a amba a tshi teketela fhano fhethu na vhathu vhaho, zwino nge iwe wa ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa hanga, wa kherukanya zwiambaro zwau, wa tsengisa miṱodzi phanḓa hanga, ndo pfa thabelo yau, Yahavee u ralo." 
2Chronicles34:28 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo u litsha wa fa wa swiṱwa nga mulalo. A u nga vhoni khombo ine nda ḓo i ḓisa fhano fhethu ya wela na vha no dzula fhano.’ ” Ndi hone vhanna avho vha tshi ṱuwa na phindulo iyo vha i swikisa ha khosi Josiasi. 
2Chronicles34:29 Khosi Josiasi a ramba vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema. 
2Chronicles34:30 A ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu e na vhanna vha Juda na vhathu vha Jerusalema na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi, vhathu vhoṱhe, vha nyadzeaho na vhaḓivhalea. Josiasi a dzhia bugu ye ya vha yo tumbulwa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a vhala maipfi oṱhe a Bugu ya Mulanga vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa." 
2Chronicles34:31 Khosi ya ima vhuimoni hayo ya vusulusa mulanga phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, a ri u ḓo tevhela Muṋe washu, a vhulunga ndayo na ndaela dzawe nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe na nga zwoṱhe zwine a vha zwone, na u thetshelesa maipfi a mulanga o ṅwalwaho buguni iyo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Ndi hone a tshi ita uri muṅwe na muṅwe a re Jerusalema na kha ḽa Benyamini a fulufhedzise uri u ḓo vhulunga mulanga, vhathu vha Jerusalema vha zwi ita vha tshi tevhedza mulanga wa Mudzimu, Ene Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles34:33 Khosi Josiasi a thutha zwitungulo zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhaisraele, a kombetshedza uri vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Israele vha shumele Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho. Musi a tshi kha ḓi tshila, a vho ngo kundwa u tevhela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho." 
2Chronicles35:1 Khosi Josiasi a itela Muṋe washu vhuṱambo ha Paseka muḓini wa Jerusalema, ngwana ya Paseka ya ṱhavhiwa nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma." 
2Chronicles35:2 A vhea vhotshifhe mishumoni yavho, a vha ṱuṱuwedza uri vha shume mishumo ya thembele ya Muṋe washu zwavhuḓi." 
2Chronicles35:3 A vhudza Vhalivi vhe vha vha vho ḓikumedza Muṋe washu, vhafunzi vha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe, a ri, “Vheani mbulungelo khethwa thembeleni yo fhaṱwaho nga khosi Solomoni, ṅwana wa khosi Dafita. Ni songo tsha tshimbila no i hwala nga mahaḓa. Zwino shumelani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na vhathu vhawe Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles35:4 Ḓilugiseni zwi tshi ya nga miṱa kha khethekanyo dzaṋu, ni tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho nga Dafita khosi ya Israele na nga ṅwana wawe khosi Solomoni." 
2Chronicles35:5 Imani fhethu hukhethwa, tshigwada tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsha miṱa ya Vhalivi tshi tshi imela tshigwada tsha muṱa wa Vhaisraele." 
2Chronicles35:6 Ṱhavhani ngwana dza Paseka, ni ḓikumulule, ni lugisele vha haṋu idzo ngwana, nga he Muṋe washu a ni laya nga Mushe.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Josiasi a ṋea vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe henefho tshivhalo tsha nngu na mbudzi dza 30 000 dza zwiṱhavhelo zwa Paseka na kholomo dza 3 000, dzoṱhe dzi tshi bva kha masambi a khosi." 
2Chronicles35:8 Vharangaphanḓa na vhone vha bvisavho zwifuwo nga u funa havho vha ṋea vhathu na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi. Hilikia na Zakaria na Jehiele, vhone vhalangi vha thembele ya Mudzimu, vha ṋea vhotshifhe ngwana na mbudzana dza 2 600 na kholomo dza 300 dza zwiṱhavhelo zwa Paseka." 
2Chronicles35:9 Vharangaphanḓa vha Vhalivi, Khonania, na vharathu vhawe Shemaya na Nathaniele, na Hashabia na Jediele na Jozabadi, vhone vha bvisela Vhalivi ngwana dza 5 000 na kholomo dza 500, dza vha zwiṱhavhelo zwa Paseka." 
2Chronicles35:10 Mushumo wa dzudzanywa, vhotshifhe vha ima vhuimoni havho vhe na Vhalivi kha khethekanyo dzavho nga he khosi ya vha laya." 
2Chronicles35:11 Ngwana dza Paseka dza ṱhavhiwa, vhotshifhe vha handulula aḽiṱari nga malofha e vha ṋekedzwa, Vhalivi vhone vha tshi khou via izwo zwifuwo." 
2Chronicles35:12 Vha dzhia zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho vha zwi vhetshela thungo uri vha zwi ṋee vhathu vha zwigwada zwa miṱa uri vha ṋekedze Muṋe washu, vha tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho Buguni ya Mushe. Na kholomo vha dzi ita nga u ralo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Vha ṱhaṱha zwifuwo zwa Paseka nga mulilo, nga he vha laiwa, zwiṱhavhelo zwikhethwa zwone zwa bikwa nga dzikhali na nga dzinkho na nga dongo, vha ṱavhanya vha kovhela vhathu vhoṱhe." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ngavhuya vha ḓibikela vha bikela na vhotshifhe ngauri vhotshifhe, vha lutsinga lwa Aroni, vho vha vha tshi khou ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na miraḓo i re na mapfura ḽa vhuya ḽa kovhela. Ndi zwe Vhalivi vha ḓibikela ṋama, vha bikela na vhotshifhe vha lutsinga lwa Aroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Vhaimbi, vha lutsinga lwa Asafu, vho vha vhe fhethu he khosi Dafita a vha laya a ri vha dzule hone: Asafu na Hemani na Jeduthuni muporofita wa khosi. Vhalindakhoro vha khoro iṅwe na iṅwe a vho ngo sudzuluwa he vha vha vho ima hone ngauri Vhalivi vha havho vho vha bikela ṋama." 
2Chronicles35:16 Musi wonoyo mushumo woṱhe wa Muṋe washu wa u ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka wa shumiwa, ha ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho kha aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu, nga he khosi Josiasi a vha laya." 
2Chronicles35:17 Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe hone vha ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka misi yeneyo, vha ita na vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili." 
2Chronicles35:18 Ho vha hu sa athu vhuya ha vha na vhuṱambo ha Paseka vhu no nga hoho shangoni ḽa Israele, u bva misi ya muporofita Samuele, a hu na muṅwe wa mahosi a Israele we a vhuya a ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka vhu no nga ha khosi Josiasi na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na Vhaisraele vhe vha vha vhe henefho na vhathu vha Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles35:19 Vhuṱambo uho ha Paseka ho itwa nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wa khosi Josiasi. 
2Chronicles35:20 Ngavhuya musi khosi Josiasi o no dzudzanya zwa thembele, Nikho khosi ya Egipita a gonya a yo lwa muḓini wa Kharakhemishi mulamboni wa Yufuratha. Khosi Josiasi a bva uri a yo ṱangana nae vha lwe." 
2Chronicles35:21 Hone Nikho a ruma vhaḓinḓa khae a ri, “Khosi ya Juda, nṋe na vhone ri lwelani? Zwino a thi khou ḓa u lwa na vhone, ndi ḓa u lwa na maswina anga a kale. Mudzimu o mmbudza uri ndi ṱavhanye. Mudzimu u na nṋe, vha songo lwa nae, a sa ḓo vha lozwa.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Josiasi naho zwo ralo, a si mu humele, a ḓikhakhisa a dzhena nndwani. Ho ngo thetshelesa zwe Mudzimu a mu vhudza nga mulomo wa Nikho, a ṱuwa a yo lwa Govhani ḽa Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Vhaposamisevhe vha runga khosi Josiasi, ene a vhudza magota awe a ri, “Mmviseni hafhano, ndo huvhala zwihulu.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Ndi hone vha tshi mu tsisa kha gariki yawe, vha mu vhea kha iṅwe gariki ye a vha e nayo, vha mu isa Jerusalema, a fela hone. A swiṱwa zwaloni zwa vhokhotsi awe, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema vha mu lila." 
2Chronicles35:25 Mupofita Jeremia a sika luimbo lwa u lilela khosi Josiasi. Yo mbo ḓi vha nḓowelo ya vhaimbi shangoni ḽa Israele, na ṋamusi, vha lu imba vha tshi mu lila. Lwo ṅwalwa buguni ya Zwililo." 
2Chronicles35:26 Mafhungo maṅwe a Josiasi na u fulufhedzea hawe kha Muṋe washu, a tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni wa Muṋe washu," 
2Chronicles35:27 mafhungo oṱhe u bva mathomoni u swika magumoni, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele na a Juda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Vhahulwane vha shango vha dzhia Juahasi ṅwana wa Josiasi, vha mu vhumba khosi muḓini wa Jerusalema vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe." 
2Chronicles36:2 Juahasi a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 23, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru." 
2Chronicles36:3 Khosi Nikho wa Egipita a mu bvisa vhuhosini muḓini wa Jerusalema, a thelisa vhathu vha Juda khilogiramu dza 3 400 dza siliva na khilogiramu dza 34 dza musuku." 
2Chronicles36:4 Khosi Nikho wa Egipita a dzhia Eliakimu, murathu wa Juahasi, a mu ita khosi ya Juda na Jerusalema, a shandukisa dzina ḽawe a vho pfi Jehoyakimu. Nikho a hwala Juahasi mukomana wa Eliakimu, a mu isa Egipita." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoyakimu a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 25, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 11. Jehoyakimu o ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a dia shango ḽa Juda, a fara Jehoyakimu a mu vhofha nga geḓane dza musinaseṱha, a mu isa Babele." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukhadnetsara a ita na u dzhia zwiṅwe zwithu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a zwi isa Babele a swika a zwi vhea thembeleni yawe henengei. 
2Chronicles36:8 Mafhungo maṅwe a Jehoyakimu na zwithu zwi nengisaho zwe a ita, na zwe zwa itea misi yawe, o ṅwalwa buguni ya Histori ya Mahosi a Israele na a Juda. Ṅwana wawe Jehoyakhini a vha khosi vhudzuloni hawe." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoyakhini a tshi vha khosi o vha e na miṅwaha ya 18, a vhusa e Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru na maḓuvha a fumi. Jehoyakhini o ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles36:10 Ṅwaha u tshi fhela khosi Nebukhadnetsara a dzhia Jehoyakhini a mu isa Babele, a dzhia na zwithu zwa mutengo muhulu thembeleni ya Muṋe washu. Ndi hone Nebukhadnetsara a tshi dzhia Tsedekia khotsimunene wa Jehoyakhini, a mu vhumba khosi ya Juda na Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles36:11 Tsedekia a tshi vha khosi ya Juda o vha e na miṅwaha ya 21, a vhusa Jerusalema a fhedza miṅwaha ya 11." 
2Chronicles36:12 Khosi Tsedekia a ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe, a si ḓiṱukufhadze a tshi kaidzwa nga muporofita Jeremia, we a vha a tshi mu vhudza ndaela dza Muṋe washu." 
2Chronicles36:13 Zwino Tsedekia a shandukela khosi Nebukhadnetsara, we a vha o mu anisa nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu. Tsedekia a ita tshipimbi, a konḓisa mbilu yawe, a si rembulutshele ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele." 
2Chronicles36:14 Tshiṅwe hafhu, vharangaphanḓa vhoṱhe na vhotshifhe na vhathu, u sa fulufhedzea havho ha tou kalula, vha tshi kanda vhuṱalani ha dzitshakha ha u ita zwi nengisaho, vha shata thembele ya Muṋe washu tshika, ye Muṋe washu Ene muṋe a i ita khethwa muḓini wa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles36:15 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi avho a isa maipfi khavho nga vhaḓinḓa vhawe a dovha, nge a vha a tshi pfela vhathu vhawe na vhudzulo hawe vhuṱungu." 
2Chronicles36:16 Vhone vha ḓi kolela vhaḓinḓa vha Mudzimu, vha nyadza maipfi awe vha nzhonzhowedza vhaporofita vhawe, Muṋe washu a vhuya a sinyutshela vhathu vhawe, ha si tsha vha na u lamulelwa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Muṋe washu a vha ḓisela khosi ya Babele ya lwa navho, ya vhulaha vhaṱhannga vhavho fhethu hukhethwa ya si khathutshele muṱhannga kana musidzana, mulala kana a si na nungo. Mudzimu a vha kumedza vhoṱhe zwanḓani zwa Nebukhadnetsara." 
2Chronicles36:18 A hwala zwithu zwoṱhe zwa thembele ya Mudzimu, zwihulwane na zwiṱuku, a zwi isa Babele, a hwala na lupfumo lwa thembele ya Muṋe washu na lupfumo lwa khosi na lwa vharangaphanḓa." 
2Chronicles36:19 Vha fhisa thembele ya Mudzimu, vha pwashekanya mutsheṱo wa Jerusalema, vha fhisa pfamo dzoṱhe, vha phusukanya tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsha mutengo muhulu henefho." 
2Chronicles36:20 A dzhia tsalela dzo ponyokaho pfumo, a vha hwala a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele, vha vha phuli dzawe na dza vhana vhawe muvhuso wa vhuya wa dzhiwa nga Vhapheresia." 
2Chronicles36:21 Ha vha hone hu tshi khunyelela zwe Muṋe washu a dzula o amba nga mulomo wa muporofita Jeremia a tshi ri, “Shango ḽi ḓo sala ḽi si na vhathu ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 70, ha vhuya ha lixwa vhuawelo ha Sabatha he ha vha vhu si tsha tevhedzwa.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Nga ṅwaha wa u thoma wa muvhuso wa khosi Khoreshe wa Pheresia, Muṋe washu a ita uri zwe a amba nga mulomo wa muporofita Jeremia zwi khunyelele. Muṋe washu a karusa mbilu ya khosi Khoreshe wa Pheresia uri a ḓivhadze muvhusoni wawe woṱhe, a tou zwi ṅwala a ri," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Khosi Khoreshe wa Pheresia u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa ḽiṱaḓulu o nṋea mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi, a mmbea uri ndi mu fhaṱele thembele muḓini wa Jerusalema shangoni ḽa Juda. Zwino ufhio na ufhio wa vhathu vhawe vha no dzula na vhoinwi, mu litsheni a vhuelele hayani. Ngavhe Yahavee Mudzimu wawe a tshi vha nae.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Nga ṅwaha wa u thoma wa Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia Muṋe washu o ita uri hu khunyelele zwe a zwi amba nga mulomo wa muporofita Jeremia. Muṋe washu a ritha mbilu ya Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia uri a ṅwale ndaela hei i tou ḓivhadzwa hoṱhe muvhusoni wawe, ya ri:" 
Ezra1:2 “Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu o nkumedza mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi, a dovha a mmbea uri ndi mu fhaṱele thembele Jerusalema kha ḽa Juda." 
Ezra1:3 Muṅwe na muṅwe wa vhathu vhawe vha re vhukati haṋu, ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi vha nae, a mu litsha a gonya Jerusalema kha ḽa Juda a yo fhaṱa thembele ya Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele, Mudzimu ane a luvhiwa Jerusalema." 
Ezra1:4 Vhathu vha mashango oṱhe hune vho salaho u fa vha dzula hone zwino vho fanela u vha ṋea siliva na musuku na thundu na zwifuwo na zwine muthu a tou funa u ṋea, uri vha fhaṱe ngazwo thembele ya Mudzimu muḓini wa Jerusalema.’ ”" 
Ezra1:5 Ndi hone ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Juda na Benyamini na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi – muṅwe na muṅwe we Mudzimu a karusa mbilu yawe – vha tshi ḓilugisa u yo fhaṱa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu i re Jerusalema. 
Ezra1:6 Vhahura vhoṱhe vha vha ṱhaḓula nga u vha ṋea zwithu zwa siliva na musuku na thundu na zwifuwo na zwifhiwa zwa mutengo muhulu na zwine muthu a tou ṋea nga u funa hawe. 
Ezra1:7 Khosi Khoreshe a dovha a bvisa midzio ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, ye Nebukhadnetsara a i thuba Jerusalema a i vhea thembeleni ya mudzimu wawe." 
Ezra1:8 Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia a i kumedza Mithiridathi, ene mufaragwama, uyo a i vhalela Sheshebatsara muvhusi wa Juda." 
Ezra1:9 Mutevhe wa midzio yeneyo ngoyu: ndilo dza musuku 30 ndilo dza siliva 1 000 zwidongo zwa siliva 29 
Ezra1:10 zwinwelo zwa musuku 30 zwinwelo zwa siliva 410 miṅwe midzio 1 000 
Ezra1:11 Midzio ya musuku na siliva yoṱhe yo ṱangana ndi 5 400. Sheshebatsara o ḓa nayo yoṱhe heyo midzio musi mathubwa vha tshi pfuluwa Babele vha tshi vhuelela Jerusalema. 
Ezra2:1 Misi iyo vhathu vhanzhi vhe vhomakhulukuku wavho vha vha vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa Juda vho vhuelela ha havho vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa Babele. Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele o vha o vha kumba a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele, hone zwino vho huma vha vhuelela Jerusalema na Juda, muṅwe na muṅwe a ya muḓini wa hawe." 
Ezra2:2 Vho vhuya na Zerubabele na Joshua, na Nehemia, na Seraya, na Rielaya, na Maradokai, na Bilishani, na Misiphara, na Bigivai, na Rehumi, na Baana. Mutevhe wa vhathu vha Israele ngoyu:" 
Ezra2:2 Vho vhuya na Zerubabele na Joshua, na Nehemia, na Seraya, na Rielaya, na Maradokai, na Bilishani, na Misiphara, na Bigivai, na Rehumi, na Baana. Mutevhe wa vhathu vha Israele ngoyu:" 
Ezra2:3 vhaḓuhulu vha Pharoshi 2 172 
Ezra2:4 vha Shefatia 372 
Ezra2:5 vha Ara 775 
Ezra2:6 vha Phahathi Muaba (vha lutsinga lwa Jeshua na Juaba) 2 812 
Ezra2:7 vha Elamu 1 254 
Ezra2:8 vha Zathu 945 
Ezra2:9 vha Zakai 760 
Ezra2:10 vha Bani 642 
Ezra2:11 vha Bebai 623 
Ezra2:12 vha Asigadi 1 222 
Ezra2:13 vha Adonikamu 666 
Ezra2:14 vha Bigivai 2 056 
Ezra2:15 vha Adini 454 
Ezra2:16 vha Atere muḓuhulu wa Hiskia 98 
Ezra2:17 vha Betsai 323 
Ezra2:18 vha Jora 112 
Ezra2:19 vha Hashumi 223 
Ezra2:20 vha Gibara 95 
Ezra2:21 Vha miḓi yo fhambanaho ya Juda: Vha Betlehema ndi 123 
Ezra2:22 vha Netofa 56 
Ezra2:23 vha Anathotho 128 
Ezra2:24 vha Asimavethe 42 
Ezra2:25 vha Kiriathi Jiarimu na Khafira na Bierothi 743 
Ezra2:26 vha Rama na Geba 621 
Ezra2:27 vha Mikhimashi 122 
Ezra2:28 vha Bethele na Ai 223 
Ezra2:29 vha Nebo 52 
Ezra2:30 vha Magabishi 156 
Ezra2:31 vha muṅwe Elamu 1 254 
Ezra2:32 vha Harimu 320 
Ezra2:33 vha Lodo na Hadidi na Ono 725 
Ezra2:34 vha Jerikho 345 
Ezra2:35 vha Senaa 3 630 
Ezra2:36 Vhotshifhe: Vhaḓuhulu vha Jedaya (vha muṱa wa Jeshua) 973 
Ezra2:37 vha Imere 1 052 
Ezra2:38 vha Phashuru 1 247 
Ezra2:39 vha Harimu 1 017 
Ezra2:40 Vhalivi: Vhaḓuhulu vha Jeshua na Kadamiele (vha lutsinga lwa Hodavia) 74 
Ezra2:41 Vhaimbi: Vhaḓuhulu vha Asafu 128 
Ezra2:42 Vhalindakhoro vha thembele: Vhaḓuhulu vha Shalumu na Atere na Thalamoni na Akubu na Hatita na Shobai 139 
Ezra2:43 Vhashumi vha thembeleni: Vhaḓuhulu vha Tsiha, Hasufa, Tabaotho," 
Ezra2:44 Kerosi, Siaha, Phadoni," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, Hagaba, Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 Hagaba, Shalamai, Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 Gidele, Gahara, Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 Retsini, Nekoda, Gazamu," 
Ezra2:49 Uza, Phasia, Besai," 
Ezra2:50 Asina, Vhameuni, Vhanefusi," 
Ezra2:51 vha Bakabuku, Hakufa, Harahuru," 
Ezra2:52 Batsaluthi, Mehida, Harasha," 
Ezra2:53 Barakosi, Sisera, Thama," 
Ezra2:54 Netsia, Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Vhaḓuhulu vha vhashumi vha Solomoni: Vhaḓuhulu vha Sotai, Soferethe, Pheruda," 
Ezra2:56 Jaala, Darakoni, Gidele," 
Ezra2:57 Shefatia, Hatili, Phokherethe, Hatsabaimi, Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Vhashumi vha thembeleni na vhaḓuhulu vha vhashumi vha Solomoni vho ṱangana ndi 392. 
Ezra2:59 Avha vha tevhelaho vha bva miḓini ya Thele Mela na Thele Harasha na Kherubi na Adoni na Imere, hone vho vha vha sa koni u sumbedza uri vha miṱa yavho ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Israele." 
Ezra2:60 Ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Delaya na vha Tobia na vha Nekoda, vho ṱangana ndi 652." 
Ezra2:61 Vha no bva kha vhotshifhe ngevha: Ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Hobaya na Hakotsi na Barasilai (ndi uḽa munna we a vha o vhinga ṅwananyana wa Barasilai wa Giliadi, a vho vhidzwa nga dzina ḽa Barasilai)." 
Ezra2:62 Havho vho londolosa he ha ṅwalwa vhubvo ha miṱa ya havho, hone vha si kone u zwi wana, zwenezwo vha pfi vho kumala, vha si dzheniswe kha zwa vhutshifhe." 
Ezra2:63 Muvhusi a vha vhudza uri vha songo ḽa tshiḽiwa tshikhethwakhethwa na tshithihi ha vhuya ha vha na tshifhe a vhudzisa Mudzimu nga madeṅwa makhethwa. 
Ezra2:64 Vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vhe 42 360," 
Ezra2:65 hu sa vhalwi vhashumi vhavho vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi vha 7 337; vha dovha vha vha na vhaimbi vha 200, vhanna na vhasadzi." 
Ezra2:66 Vho vha vhe na bere dza 736 na meila dza 245," 
Ezra2:67 na gamela dza 435 na donngi dza 6 720. 
Ezra2:68 Musi vha tshi swika nḓuni ya Muṋe washu i re Jerusalema, vhaṅwe vhaṋe vha miṱa vha bvisa nduvho nga u tou funa havho uri hu vusiwe nnḓu ya Mudzimu henefhaḽa he ya vha yo ima hone kale." 
Ezra2:69 Vho ṋea gwama ḽa thembele zwifhiwa nga hune vha kona vha tshi itela uyo mushumo, vha bvisa musuku wa khilogiramu dza 500 na siliva ya khilogiramu dza 2 800 na nguvho dza vhotshifhe dza 100." 
Ezra2:70 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhaṅwe vhathu vha yo dzula Jerusalema; vhalindakhoro na vhaimbi na vhashumi vha thembeleni na vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vha yo dzula miḓini ya havho. 
Ezra3:1 Musi ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili u tshi dzula, Vhaisraele vhó no dzula miḓini yavho, vhathu vha mbo kuvhangana Jerusalema, hu si sale na muthihi." 
Ezra3:2 Ndi hone Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka na vhotshifhe ngae na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na khonani dzawe vha tshi thoma u fhaṱa aḽiṱari ya Mudzimu wa Israele uri vha ṋekedze zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho khayo, hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho kha Mulayo wa Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu." 
Ezra3:2 Ndi hone Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka na vhotshifhe ngae na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na khonani dzawe vha tshi thoma u fhaṱa aḽiṱari ya Mudzimu wa Israele uri vha ṋekedze zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho khayo, hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho kha Mulayo wa Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu." 
Ezra3:3 Naho vho vha vha tshi ofha tshakha dzo vha tangaho, vho fhaṱa iyo aḽiṱari kha muteo wayo wa kale vha ṋekedza Muṋe washu zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho khayo, zwa matsheloni na zwa madekwana." 
Ezra3:4 Vha ita vhuṱambo ha Mishasha hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho; ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe vha ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi ṱoḓeaho ḓuvha ḽeneḽo. 
Ezra3:5 Vho no fhedza izwo, vha ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho zwine zwa ṋekedzwa nga tshifhinga tshazwo na zwiṱhavhelo zwa Ṅwedzi Muswa na zwiṱhavhelo zwa vhuṱambo ha Muṋe washu ho vhewaho na nduvho dzine muthu a tou ṋekedza Muṋe washu nga u funa hawe." 
Ezra3:6 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili vha thoma u ṋekedza Muṋe washu nduvho dzi fhiswaho, naho muteo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu yo vha i sa athu tewa." 
Ezra3:7 Vhathu vho bvisa tshelede vha i ṋea vhavhaḓi vha matombo na vhafhaṱi, vha bvisa zwiḽiwa na zwinwiwa na mapfura vha ṋea vhathu vha Sidoni na vha Tiro uri vha ḓise mikedara nga lwanzheni i tshi bva Libanoni i tshi ya Jopa hu tshi tevhedzwa ndaela ya Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia." 
Ezra3:8 Huno nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili wa ṅwaha wa vhuvhili vho no swika nḓuni ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema, Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jotsadaka na vha havho vhoṱhe, vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhoṱhe vho vhuelelaho Jerusalema vha tshi bva vhuthubwani, vha thoma u shuma, vha vhea Vhalivi u bva kha vha miṅwaha ya 20 uri vha sedze hu tshi fhaṱiwa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu." 
Ezra3:8 Huno nga ṅwedzi wa vhuvhili wa ṅwaha wa vhuvhili vho no swika nḓuni ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema, Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jotsadaka na vha havho vhoṱhe, vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhoṱhe vho vhuelelaho Jerusalema vha tshi bva vhuthubwani, vha thoma u shuma, vha vhea Vhalivi u bva kha vha miṅwaha ya 20 uri vha sedze hu tshi fhaṱiwa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu." 
Ezra3:9 Jeshua na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na vhashumi ngae na Kadamiele na vhana vhawe vha vhatuka, vhaḓuhulu vha Hodavia, na Vhalivi vha no bva kha lutsinga lwa Henadadi na vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na mashaka avho, vha ṱangana vhoṱhe vha sedza vhashumi vha no fhaṱa nnḓu ya Mudzimu." 
Ezra3:10 Musi vhafhaṱi vha tshi tea muteo wa thembele ya Muṋe washu, vhotshifhe vha ḓiṱama nga phuraphura dzavho vhó fara phalaphala, Vhalivi vhana vha Asafu vhó fara mirumba, vha renda Muṋe washu vha tshi tevhedza ndayo ya Dafita khosi ya Israele." 
Ezra3:11 Vha renda Muṋe washu vha mu livhuha nga nyimbo vha ri, “Muṋe washu u na vhuthu, u funa Israele lini na lini.” Vhathu vha ṱavha mukosi muhulu vha renda Muṋe washu nga u takalela u tewa ha muteo wa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu." 
Ezra3:12 Hone vhunzhi ha vhotshifhe vha kale na Vhalivi na vhaṋe vha miṱa vha re vhakalaha vhe vha vhona thembele iḽa ya kale, vha lila vha tou ṱavha mukosi vha tshi vhona muteo wa thembele heyo u tshi tewa, ngeno vhaṅwe vhanzhi vho ṱavha mukosi nga dakalo." 
Ezra3:13 Ho vha hu si na ane a kona u fhambanya mukosi wa dakalo na wa tshililo, nge vhathu vha ṱavha mukosi muhulu. Mukosi uyo wa pfala kule." 
Ezra4:1 Musi maswina a Juda na Benyamini a tshi pfa uri mathubwa a khou fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele thembele," 
Ezra4:2 a ḓa ha Zerubabele na ha vhaṋe vha miṱa a ri, “Litshani ri ni farise u fhaṱa, ngauri na riṋe Mudzimu waṋu ri a mu ṱoḓa unga inwi, ro vha ri tshi ḓi mu ṋekedza nduvho u bva zwenezwiḽa hu tshi kha ḓi vhusa Esarahadoni khosi ya Ashuru we a ri ḓisa fhano.”" 
Ezra4:3 Ndi hone Zerubabele na Joshua na vhaṋe vha miṱa ya Israele vhoṱhe vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “A ri funi inwi ni tshi ri farisa u fhaṱela Mudzimu washu thembele. Riṋe ri roṱhe ri ḓo i fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, ri tshi tevhedza ndaela ya Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia.”" 
Ezra4:3 Ndi hone Zerubabele na Joshua na vhaṋe vha miṱa ya Israele vhoṱhe vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “A ri funi inwi ni tshi ri farisa u fhaṱela Mudzimu washu thembele. Riṋe ri roṱhe ri ḓo i fhaṱela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, ri tshi tevhedza ndaela ya Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Zwenezwo tshakha dzo tangaho vhathu vha Juda dza bva dza yo kula nungo dzavho dza ita na u vha shushedza uri vha songo tsha isa phanḓa vha tshi fhaṱa. 
Ezra4:5 Vha thola na vhaeletshedzi vha u vha piringanya. Izwo vho zwi ita misi yoṱhe ya musi hu tshi vhusa Khoreshe khosi ya Pheresia na musi hu tshi vhusa Dariosi khosi ya Pheresia. 
Ezra4:6 Musi hu tshi thoma u vhusa Serekesese vha pomoka vhathu vha Juda na vha Jerusalema. 
Ezra4:7 Musi hu tshi vhusa Arathakhesese khosi ya Pheresia, Bishilamu na Mithiredathi na Tabiele na khonani dzavho dzoṱhe vha ṅwalela Arathakhesese luṅwalo. Ulwo luṅwalo lwo ṅwalwa nga kuṅwalele kwa Tshiaramu na nga luambo lwa Tshiaramu." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumi muvhusi na Shimishai muṅwaleli vha ṅwalela khosi Arathakhesese vha tshi pomoka Jerusalema vha ri," 
Ezra4:9 “Luṅwalo ulu lu bva kha Rehumi muvhusi na Shimishai muṅwaleli na vhashumisani vhavho vhoṱhe na vhahaṱuli na vhavhusi vhahulwane vha no bva Pheresia na Erekhe na Babele, na Vhaelamu vha Shushani," 
Ezra4:10 na vhaṅwe vhathu vhe vha pfuluswa nga muhulwane, muhulisea Ashurubaniphala, a vha dzudza miḓini ya Samaria na huṅwe vunduni ḽa Seli-ha-Yufuratha.”" 
Ezra4:11 Kopi ya luṅwalo lwe vha mu ṅwalela ngei: “Lu ya ha khosi Arathakhesese, lu bva ha vhalanda vhavho, vhanna vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha." 
Ezra4:12 “Thovhele nga vha ḓivhe uri Majuda vhe vha ḓa kha riṋe vha tshi bva ha vhone vho ya Jerusalema nahone vha khou vusa muḓi houḽa muvhi wa mashandukwa. Vha khou vusa mitsheṱo, na miteo i khou tewa." 
Ezra4:13 Tshiṅwe hafhu, thovhele nga vha zwi ḓivhe uri arali uyo muḓi wa vuswa mitsheṱo yawo ya fhaṱwa, a hu tsha ḓo thelwa mithelo, nduvho a dzi tsha ḓo bviswa; zwenezwo gwama ḽa musanda ḽi ḓo fhungudzea." 
Ezra4:14 Zwino vhunga riṋe ri tshi ḽa zwi bvaho pfamoni, ri vhona zwi songo fanela ri tshi vhona khosi i tshi nyadziwa, ri khou swikisa mafhungo haya uri ri ḓivhadze vhone vhamusanda," 
Ezra4:15 hu londoloswe kha maṅwalwa a mafhungo a kale a vhomakhulu wavho. Kha maṅwalwa eneo vha ḓo wana uri muḓi hoyu ndi wa mashandukwa, vha dina mahosi na mavundu, ndi fhethu ha muvhango u bva tsha kale na kale. Ndi zwe uyo muḓi wa phusukanywa." 
Ezra4:16 Ri ḓivhadza vhothovhele uri arali muḓi hoyo wa fhaṱwa, mitsheṱo yawo ya vuswa, vha ḓo sala vha si na shango Seli-ha-Yufuratha.”" 
Ezra4:17 Khosi ya vha ṅwalela luṅwalo ya fhindula ya ri, “Luṅwalo ulu lu ya ha Rehumi muvhusi, na Shimishai muṅwaleli na vhashumisani vhavho vhoṱhe vha no dzula Samaria na huṅwe-vho Seli-ha-Yufuratha. Mulalo!" 
Ezra4:18 “Luṅwalo lwe na nṅwalela lwo ṱalutshedzwa, nda vhalelwa lwone." 
Ezra4:19 Ndo bvisa ndaela, ha londoloswa, ha wanala uri nangoho vhathu vha uyo muḓi vha endela u vutshela mahosi tsha kale na kale nahone ho ḓi vha fhethu ha vhathu vha muvhango na mifhirifhiri." 
Ezra4:20 Jerusalema ho vhuya ha vha na mahosi a maanḓa a tshi vhusa ḽoṱhe ḽa Seli-ha-Yufuratha, a tshi thelisa vhathu mithelo na nduvho dza tshakha-tshakha." 
Ezra4:21 Zwino bvisani ndaela i ye ha avho vhanna, hu pfi vha litshe u shuma uri muḓi uyo u si tsha vuswa ndi vhuye ndi vha vhudze." 
Ezra4:22 Ni songo litsha ayo mafhungo, zwi sa ḓo ṋaṋa u vhaisa thovhele.”" 
Ezra4:23 Musi Rehumi na Shimishai muṅwaleli na vhashumisani navho vha tshi kha ḓi tou bva u vhalelwa luṅwalo lwa khosi Arathakhesese, vha mbo ḓi takuwa vha livha ha Majuda Jerusalema vha vha litshisa nga khani u fhaṱa." 
Ezra4:24 Ngauralo mushumo wa nnḓu ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema wa litshiwa u swika ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa Dariosi khosi ya Pheresia. 
Ezra5:1 Zwino muporofita Hagai na muporofita Zakaria, ṅwana wa Ido, vha khwaṱhisa Majuda vha re Juda na Jerusalema nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Ezra5:2 Ndi hone Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka vha tshi thoma u shuma vha vusa nnḓu ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema. Vhaporofita vha Mudzimu vho vha vhe navho vha tshi khou vha farisa. 
Ezra5:2 Ndi hone Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka vha tshi thoma u shuma vha vusa nnḓu ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema. Vhaporofita vha Mudzimu vho vha vhe navho vha tshi khou vha farisa. 
Ezra5:3 Misi iyo Thathenai muvhusi wa Seli-ha-Yufuratha, na Shethara Boznai na vhashumisani navho vha ya khavho vha vhudzisa vha ri, “No tendelwa nga nnyi u vusa iyi thembele na longa matanda aya?”" 
Ezra5:4 Vha vhudzisa na u ri, “Vhanna vha no khou fhaṱa iyi nnḓu ndi vhonnyi?”" 
Ezra5:5 Hone Mudzimu wavho o vha a tshi khou linda vhahulwane vha Majuda, mushumo u si ime hu vhuye hu ḓivhiswe Dariosi ha wanala phindulo yawe ye ya tou ṅwalwa." 
Ezra5:6 Ngolu luṅwalo lwe lwa ṅwalelwa khosi Dariosi nga Thathenai muvhusi wa Seli-ha-Yufuratha, na Shethara Boznai na vhashumisani vhavho na vhahulwane vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha." 
Ezra5:7 Mafhungo e vha mu ṅwalela a ri, “Thovhele Vho-Dariosi, kha ḽi lale!" 
Ezra5:8 “Thovhele nga vha zwi ḓivhe uri riṋe ro ya dzinguni ḽa Juda, thembeleni ya Mudzimu muhulu. Vhathu vha khou i vusa nga matombo mahulwane, dzimbondoni vha khou longa matanda. Mushumo uyo u khou shumiwa nga vhuronwane, u khou bvela phanḓa nga u ṱavhanya vho ḓifunga." 
Ezra5:9 Ro vhudzisa vhahulwane ra ri, ‘No tendelwa nga nnyi u vusa iyi thembele na u longa matanda aya?’" 
Ezra5:10 Ra vha vhudzisa na uri vha pfi vhonnyi, uri ri kone u ṅwala madzina a vharangaphanḓa vhavho uri vhone vha vha ḓivhe." 
Ezra5:11 “Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, ‘Ri vhalanda vha Mudzimu Muṋe wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, ri khou vusa thembele ye ya vha yo fhaṱwa miṅwaha minzhi yo fhelaho, yo vha yo fhaṱwa nga khosi khulu ya Israele ya i fhedza." 
Ezra5:12 Huno nge vhokhotsi ashu vha sinyusa Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu, o vha kumedza Nebukhadnetsara wa Mukhaladia, khosi ya Babele, ya phusukanya thembele hei, ya hwala vhathu ya vha isa Babele." 
Ezra5:13 Hone nga ṅwaha wa u thoma wa Khoreshe khosi ya Babele, iyo khosi Khoreshe yo bvisa ndaela ya uri iyi nnḓu ya Mudzimu i vusiwe." 
Ezra5:14 A ita na u bvisa midzio ya musuku na siliva ye Nebukhadnetsara a vha o i hwala thembeleni ya Jerusalema a i vhea thembeleni ya Babele. Khosi Khoreshe a dzhia iyo midzio a i ṋea munna a no pfi Sheshebatsara, we a mu vhea uri a vhe muvhusi wa Juda." 
Ezra5:15 A mu vhudza a ri: Dzhia midzio hei u i vhee thembeleni ya Jerusalema. U vuse thembele ya Mudzimu he ya vha yo ima hone kale. 
Ezra5:16 Ndi hone uyo Sheshebatsara a tshi ḓa a tea miteo ya nnḓu ya Mudzimu Jerusalema. U bva musi wonoyo u swika zwino yo vha i tshi khou ḓi fhaṱiwa, hone a i athu fhela.’" 
Ezra5:17 “Zwino arali thovhele a tshi zwi takalela, nga a ite uri zwi ṱoḓiseswe kha maṅwalwa a musanda a mafhungo a kale a Babele u vhona arali vhukuma khosi Khoreshe o bvisa ndaela ya uri hu vuswe nnḓu heyo ya Mudzimu Jerusalema. Zwenezwo thovhele nga a ri vhudze zwe a vhofha nga mafhungo hayo.”" 
Ezra6:1 Ndi hone khosi Dariosi a tshi bvisa ndaela, vha funyungudza kha maṅwalwa a mafhungo a kale o vhulungwaho mbulungeloni dza Babele." 
Ezra6:2 Ha wanala luṅwalo muḓini wa Ekhebathana vunduni ḽa Media, khalwo ho vha ho ṅwalwa hezwino: “Ndaela ya khosi." 
Ezra6:3 Nga ṅwaha wa u thoma wa muvhuso wa khosi Khoreshe, Khoreshe o bvisa ndaela i no amba nga thembele ya Mudzimu i re Jerusalema, a ri thembele nga i fhaṱiwe hu vhe fhethu hune ha ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo, miteo yayo nga i tewe. Vhulapfu ha thembele u ya nṱha ho fanela u vha mithara dza 30, vhuphara i vhe mithara dza 30." 
Ezra6:4 Mbondo dzi fhaṱiwe nga maalo mararu a matombo hu kone u ingwa ḽialo ḽithihi ḽa matanda. Tshinyalelo i bvisiwe kha gwama ḽa musanda. 
Ezra6:5 Midzio ya musuku na siliva ya nnḓu ya Mudzimu, ye Nebukhadnetsara a i hwala thembeleni ya Jerusalema a i isa Babele, i humiselwe vhudzuloni hayo thembeleni ya Jerusalema; nga i dzule nḓuni ya Mudzimu.”" 
Ezra6:6 “Zwino-ha, Thathenai, iwe muvhusi wa Seli-ha-Yufuratha, na Shethara Boznai na inwi magota a havho a vundu ḽeneḽo, litshani havhaḽa vhathu." 
Ezra6:7 Ni songo dzhenelela kha mushumo wa thembele heyo ya Mudzimu. Litshani muvhusi wa Majuda na vhahulwane vha Majuda vha vuse heyo nnḓu ya Mudzimu he ya vha yo ima hone. 
Ezra6:8 Tshiṅwe hafhu, ndi khou bvisa ndaela ya zwine na fanela u itela vhahulwane havho vha Majuda vha tshi fhaṱa nnḓu heyo ya Mudzimu. Tshinyalelo ya vhanna havho i bvisiwe yoṱhe zwi tshi bva kha gwama ḽa musanda, zwi tshi bva kha tshelede ya Seli-ha-Yufuratha, uri mushumo hoyo u si ime." 
Ezra6:9 Zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṱoḓea – mboho, thutha, ngwana dza nduna dza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiselwaho Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu, na goroi na muṋo na waini na mapfura, zwine zwa ṱoḓiwa nga vhotshifhe vha Jerusalema – vho fanela u fhiwa nga misi zwi sa vhuyi zwa ṱahela." 
Ezra6:10 Izwo zwo fanela u itwa uri vha kone u ṋekedza Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu zwiṱhavhelo zwi mu takadzaho, vha rabele uri zwi nakele khosi na vhana vhayo vha vhatuka." 
Ezra6:11 “Ndi dovha nda bvisa ndaela ya uri arali muṅwe a nyadza ndaela iyi, hu ḓo ṱomolwa phuphu ya thanda nḓuni yawe, ene a takulelwa nṱha, a runzhelelwa khayo. Nga mulandu wonoyo, nnḓu yawe i ḓo phusukanywa ya itwa thulwi ya mathukhwi." 
Ezra6:12 Ngavhe Mudzimu we a ita uri dzina ḽawe ḽi dzule henefho a tshi tekula khosi ifhio na ifhio kana lushaka lune lwa imisa tshanḓa lwa shandukisa ndaela hei kana lwa thutha thembele heyo Jerusalema. Ho amba nṋe Dariosi! Zwoṱhe kha zwi vuledzwe nga vhuronwane!” 
Ezra6:13 Zwino nga ndaela ya khosi Dariosi, Thathenai muvhusi wa Seli-ha-Yufuratha, na Shethara Boznai na vhashumisani navho vha tevhedza iyo ndaela nga vhuronwane." 
Ezra6:14 Ndi hone vhahulwane vha Majuda vha tshi fhaṱa vha tshi ya phanḓa zwa tshimbila zwavhuḓi. Vho vha vha tshi ṱuṱuwedzwa nga Hagai muporofita na Zakaria ṅwana wa Ido. Vha fhedza u fhaṱa thembele vha tshi tevhedza ndaela ya Mudzimu wa Israele na ndaela dza Khoreshe na Dariosi na Arathakhesese mahosi a Pheresia. 
Ezra6:15 Thembele iyo yo fhela u fhaṱwa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ḽa ṅwedzi wa Adara, nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi wa khosi Dariosi." 
Ezra6:16 Ndi hone vhathu vha Israele – vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na mathubwa oṱhe – vha tshi ita vhuṱambo ha u hangula nnḓu ya Mudzimu nga dakalo. 
Ezra6:17 Vha tshi hangula iyo nnḓu ya Mudzimu vho ṋekedza mboho dza ḓana na thutha dza 200 na ngwana dza nduna dza 400, vha ṋekedza na mbudzi dza 12 tsha vha tshipfumelo tsha vhutshinyi ha Vhaisraele vhoṱhe. Tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa Vhaisraele ḽa bviselwa mbudzi." 
Ezra6:18 Vha vhumba vhotshifhe nga u khethekana havho na Vhalivi nga zwigwada zwavho uri vha shumele Mudzimu Jerusalema hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho Buguni ya Mushe. 
Ezra6:19 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma, mathubwa vha ita vhuṱambo ha Paseka." 
Ezra6:20 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vho vha vho ḓiṱanzwa tshika vha tshi tevhedza maitele a u ḓikumulula. Vhalivi vha ṱhavha ngwana ya Paseka vha tshi ṱhavhela mathubwa oṱhe na vha havho vhotshifhe na vhone vhaṋe. 
Ezra6:21 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani vha tshi i ḽa, khathihi na vhoṱhe vhe vha ḓikhetha vha si tevhedze maitele a dzitshika a vhannḓa vhahura vhavho, uri vha ṱoḓe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Ezra6:22 Vho ita vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili vho takala, ngauri Muṋe washu o vha o vha ḓadza dakalo nga u shandukisa kuhumbulele kwa khosi ya Ashuru, zwe a vha farisa kha mushumo wa u fhaṱa nnḓu ya Mudzimu, Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Ezra7:1 Musi izwo zwo no fhira, musi hu tshi vhusa Arathakhesese khosi ya Pheresia, ho vha hu na munna a no pfi Esra ṅwana wa Seraya, wa Azaria, wa Hilikia," 
Ezra7:2 wa Shalumi, wa Tsadoko, wa Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 wa Amaria, wa Azaria, wa Mirayotho," 
Ezra7:4 wa Zerakhia, wa Uzi, wa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 wa Abishua, wa Finiasi, wa Eliasara, wa Aroni tshifhe muhulu." 
Ezra7:6 Uyo Esra o vha a tshi bva Babele. O vha e mufunzi ane a ḓivha zwavhuḓi mulayo we Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a u ṋea Mushe. Khosi yo vha yo mu ṋea zwoṱhe zwe a humbela, ngauri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe o vha o mu ṋea mashudu." 
Ezra7:7 Vhaṅwe Vhaisraele, vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhaimbi na vhalindi vha khoro na vhashumi vha thembeleni, na vhone vha gonya Jerusalema vha tshi bva Babele nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa Arathakhesese." 
Ezra7:8 Esra a swika Jerusalema nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu wa ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa iyo khosi. 
Ezra7:9 O takuwa Babele a fara lwendo nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga, a swika Jerusalema nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu, ngauri tshanḓa tsha vhuthu tsha Mudzimu wawe tsho vha tshi nae." 
Ezra7:10 Ndi uri Esra o vha o ḓikumedza zwa u guda na u tevhedza mulayo wa Muṋe washu, na u funza ndaela dzawo na ndayo dzawo kha ḽa Israele." 
Ezra7:11 Ngolu luṅwalo lwe khosi Arathakhesese a ṋea Esra ane a vha tshifhe na mufunzi, munna we a vha a tshi ḓivha milayo na ndaela dze Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele." 
Ezra7:12 “Luṅwalo ulu lu bva kha Arathakhesese, khosi ya mahosi, lu ya ha Esra ane a vha tshifhe, mufunzi wa mulayo wa Mudzimu wa makoleni. Kha ḽi lale!" 
Ezra7:13 “Zwino ndi a ḓivhadza uri Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vha re muvhusoni wanga, na vhone vhotshifhe na Vhalivi, vhane vha funa u ya Jerusalema na iwe, vha nga ḓi ya." 
Ezra7:14 U khou rumiwa nga khosi na vhaeletshedzi vhayo vhaṱanu na vhavhili uri u yo ṱola Juda na Jerusalema u tshi tevhedza Mulayo wa Mudzimu wau, une wa u ḓivha." 
Ezra7:15 Hafhu u ṱuwe na siliva na musuku zwe khosi na vhaeletshedzi vhayo vha zwi bvisa nga u tou funa havho vha zwi ṋea Mudzimu wa Israele a no dzula Jerusalema. 
Ezra7:16 U dzhie na siliva yoṱhe na musuku zwine wa nga zwi wana shangoni ḽa Babele, khathihi na nduvho ine vhathu na vhotshifhe vha thembele ya Mudzimu wavho i re Jerusalema vha tou ṋea nga u funa havho." 
Ezra7:17 “Tshelede iyo ni renge ngayo dzimboho na dzithutha na ngwana dza nduna, khathihi na nduvho dzadzo dza thoro na nduvho dza zwinwiwa, u zwi ṋekedze kha aḽiṱari ya thembele ya Mudzimu wau i re Jerusalema." 
Ezra7:18 Iwe na Majuda vha hau ni nga kona u ita zwine na vhona zwi zwa khwiṋe nga siliva na musuku zwo salaho, ni tshi tevhedza zwine Mudzimu waṋu a zwi funa." 
Ezra7:19 Swikisani ha Mudzimu wa Jerusalema zwithu zwoṱhe zwe na kumedzwa zwa u luvha Mudzimu thembeleni yawe. 
Ezra7:20 Zwiṅwe zwine zwa ṱoḓea thembeleni ya Mudzimu waṋu ni nga zwi wana kha thundu ya musanda. 
Ezra7:21 “Zwino nṋe khosi Arathakhesese, ndi khou vhudza vhafaragwama vhoṱhe vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha uri zwoṱhe zwine tshifhe Esra mufunzi wa mulayo wa Mudzimu wa makoleni a ni humbela, ni mu ṋee nga vhuronwane," 
Ezra7:22 zwi vhuye zwi gume kha khilogiramu dza 3 400 dza siliva na khilogiramu dza 16 000 dza goroi na litha dza 2 000 dza waini na litha dza 2 000 dza mapfura a muolivi na muṋo woṱhe une wa ṱoḓea. 
Ezra7:23 Zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu wa makoleni a ri zwi itiwe, nga zwi itelwe thembele ya Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu nga vhuronwane, uri a si sinyutshele khosi na vhana vhayo." 
Ezra7:24 Nahone ni ḓivhe uri vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhaimbi na vhalindakhoro na vhashumi vha thembeleni na vhaṅwe vhashumi vha nḓuni heyo ya Mudzimu, a ni na maanḓa a u vha thelisa muthelo na sengosengo na mutendelo." 
Ezra7:25 “Nahone iwe Esra, vhunga u na vhuṱali vhu no bva ha Mudzimu wau, vhea vhavhusi na vhahaṱuli vha vhuse Majuda vhoṱhe vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha nga u fulufhedzea, vhoṱhe vhane vha ḓivha mulayo wa Mudzimu wau. Vhane vha si u ḓivhe u vha funze." 
Ezra7:26 Ane a si thetshelese mulayo wa Mudzimu wau na mulayo wa khosi u ḓo lifhedzwa nga tshiṱuhu: u ḓo vhulawa kana a thathiwa kana a dzhielwa thundu kana a hoṋelwa dzhele.” 
Ezra7:27 Esra a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi ashu! O zwi longa mbiluni ya khosi uri i tonde nnḓu ya Muṋe washu i re Jerusalema nga u rali." 
Ezra7:28 O ita uri ndi takalelwe nga khosi na vhaeletshedzi vhawe na magota oṱhe a khosi a maanḓa. Ndo vha na nungo, nda kuvhanganya vharangaphanḓa vha Israele uri vha gonye Jerusalema na nṋe, nge tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga tsha vha tshi na nṋe.”" 
Ezra8:1 Ngevha vhaṋe vha miṱa na vhe vha ṅwalwa navho; vho vhuya na nṋe vha tshi bva Babele hu tshi vhusa khosi Arathakhesese, ndi" 
Ezra8:2 Gerisoni, wa mutupo wa Finiasi; Daniele, wa mutupo wa Ithamara; Hatushi, wa mutupo wa Dafita," 
Ezra8:2 Gerisoni, wa mutupo wa Finiasi; Daniele, wa mutupo wa Ithamara; Hatushi, wa mutupo wa Dafita," 
Ezra8:3 ṅwana wa Shekania; Zakaria, wa mutupo wa Pharoshi; vhe vha vha vhe nae ho vha ho ṅwaliswa vhanna vha 150;" 
Ezra8:4 Elihwenai ṅwana wa Zerakhia, wa mutupo wa Phahathi Muaba, e na vhanna vha 200;" 
Ezra8:5 Shekhania ṅwana wa Jahasiele, wa mutupo wa Zathu, e na vhanna vha 300;" 
Ezra8:6 Ebede ṅwana wa Jonathani, wa mutupo wa Adini, e na vhanna vha 50;" 
Ezra8:7 Jeshaya ṅwana wa Athalia, wa mutupo wa Elamu, e na vhanna vha 70;" 
Ezra8:8 Zebadia ṅwana wa Mikaele, wa mutupo wa Shafatia, e na vhanna vha 80;" 
Ezra8:9 Obadia ṅwana wa Jehiele, wa mutupo wa Juaba, e na vhanna vha 218;" 
Ezra8:10 Shelomithi ṅwana wa Josifia, wa mutupo wa Bani, e na vhanna vha 160;" 
Ezra8:11 Zakaria ṅwana wa Bebai, wa mutupo wa Bebai, e na vhanna vha 28;" 
Ezra8:12 Johanani ṅwana wa Hakatani, wa mutupo wa Asigadi, e na vhanna vha 110;" 
Ezra8:13 Eliphelete na Jeuele na Shemaya, vha mutupo wa Adonikamu, vhe vha vha vho sala Babele, vhe na vhanna vha 60;" 
Ezra8:14 Uthai na Zakhuru, vha mutupo wa Bigivai, vhe na vhanna vha 70." 
Ezra8:15 Avho ndo vha kuvhanganya ḽigeroni ḽine ḽa ela ḽi tshi ya muḓini wa Ahava, ra ṱoka dzidennde henefho maḓuvha mararu. Ndi tshi ṱoḓisesa kha avho vhathu na vhotshifhe, nda wana hu si na Vhalivi." 
Ezra8:16 Ndi hone ndi tshi vhidzisa Eliesere na Ariele na Shemaya na Elinathani na Jaribi na Elinathani na Nathani na Zakaria na Meshulamu, vhe vha vha vhe vharangaphanḓa, na Joyaribi na Elinathani, vhe vha vha vhe vhanna vho funzeaho," 
Ezra8:17 nda vha ruma ha Ido, murangaphanḓa wa vhathu vha Khasifia. Nda vha vhudza zwine vha fanela u vhudza Ido na mashaka awe na vhashumi vha thembeleni vha Khasifia, uri vha ri ḓisele vhashumi vha nḓuni ya Mudzimu washu." 
Ezra8:18 Vhunga tshanḓa tsha Mudzimu washu tsha vhuthu tsho vha tshi na riṋe, vho ri ḓisela Sherebia, munna ane a kona, Mulivi wa mutupo wa Mahali, a ḓa na vhana vhawe na vharathu vhawe, vha ita vhanna vha 18;" 
Ezra8:19 na Hashabia, khathihi na Jeshaya wa mutupo wa Mirari, na vharathu vhawe na vhana vhavho, vha ita vhanna vha 20." 
Ezra8:20 Vha dovha vha ḓa na vhashumi vha thembeleni vha 220, itsho ndi tshigwada tshe Dafita na magota awe vha vhea uri tshi farise Vhalivi. Vhoṱhe vho ṅwalwa madzina avho." 
Ezra8:21 Henefho tsini ha ḽigero ḽa Ahava, ndo ḓivhadza vhathu uri vha ḓidzime zwiḽiwa, uri ri kone u ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa ha Mudzimu washu, ri mu humbele uri a ri tsireledze lwendoni lwashu, riṋe na vhana vhashu na thundu yashu." 
Ezra8:22 Ndo pfa ndi na ṱhoni ndi tshi humbula u humbela khosi uri a ri fhe vhahali na vhanameli vha dzibere uri vha ri tsireledze kha maswina gondoni, nge ra vha ro vhudza khosi ra ri, “Tshanḓa tsha Mudzimu washu tsha vhuthu tshi kha muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu fulufhela, hone mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho dzi wela vhoṱhe vhane vha mu shandukela.”" 
Ezra8:23 Ndi hone ri tshi ḓidzima zwiḽiwa ra humbela Mudzimu washu zwenezwo, Ene a fhindula thabelo yashu." 
Ezra8:24 Ndi hone ndi tshi sedza vharangaphanḓa vha vhotshifhe nda nanga vha 12 khavho, khathihi na Sherebia na Hashabia na Vhalivi ngavho vha fumi;" 
Ezra8:25 nda vha kalela nduvho ya siliva na musuku na midzio yoṱhe ye ya bviswa nga khosi na vhaeletshedzi vhayo na magota ayo na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe hone henefho, zwi tshi bviselwa nnḓu ya Mudzimu washu." 
Ezra8:26 Nda vha kalela 22 000 khilogiramu dza siliva na ḓana ḽa midzio ya siliva ine tshileme tshayo tsha eḓana 60 khilogiramu na khilogiramu dza 3 500 dza musuku 
Ezra8:27 na midzio ya 20 ya musuku ine ya lemela khilogiramu dza 8,4 na midzio mivhili yavhuḓi ya musinaseṱha u songo vangiwaho, ine mutengo wayo wa nga wa musuku." 
Ezra8:28 Nda vha vhudza nda ri, “Inwi no kumedzwa Muṋe washu khathihi na midzio hei. Siliva na musuku ndi nduvho yo ṋewaho Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu, ye muthu a bvisa nga u tou funa hawe." 
Ezra8:29 Zwi londoleni zwavhuḓi ni vhuye ni zwi kale pherani dza nnḓu ya Muṋe washu i re Jerusalema ni tshi vhonwa nga vharangaphanḓa vha vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhaṋe vha miṱa ya Israele.” 
Ezra8:30 Ndi hone vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha tshi ṱanganedza siliva na musuku na midzio mikhethwa ye ya vha yo kaliwa uri i hwaliwe i iswe nḓuni ya Mudzimu washu i re Jerusalema. 
Ezra8:31 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 12 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga ra takuwa ḽigeroni ḽa Ahava ra livha Jerusalema. Tshanḓa tsha Mudzimu washu tsho vha tshi na riṋe, a ri tsireledza kha maswina na mavemu nḓilani." 
Ezra8:32 Ra swika Jerusalema ra awela maḓuvha mararu. 
Ezra8:33 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa ra ya nḓuni ya Mudzimu washu, ra kala siliva na musuku na midzio mikhethwa zwi tshi ṱanganedzwa nga tshifhe Miremotho ṅwana wa Uria. O vha e na Eliasara ṅwana wa Finiasi, na Vhalivi vho vha vhe hone, Jozabadi ṅwana wa Joshua na Nuadia ṅwana wa Binui." 
Ezra8:33 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa ra ya nḓuni ya Mudzimu washu, ra kala siliva na musuku na midzio mikhethwa zwi tshi ṱanganedzwa nga tshifhe Miremotho ṅwana wa Uria. O vha e na Eliasara ṅwana wa Finiasi, na Vhalivi vho vha vhe hone, Jozabadi ṅwana wa Joshua na Nuadia ṅwana wa Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsha vhaliwa tsha kaliwa, zwoṱhe zwa mbo ḓi ṅwaliwa na zwenezwo." 
Ezra8:35 Ndi hone mathubwa o vhuyaho vhuthubwani a tshi ṋekedza Mudzimu wa Israele zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho: mboho dza 12 dza Vhaisraele vhoṱhe na thutha dza 96 na ngwana dza nduna dza 77, vha ṋekedza na tshipfumelo tsha mbokoṱo dza 12. Zwoṱhe hezwo zwo vha zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiselwaho Muṋe washu." 
Ezra8:36 Ndaela dza khosi dza swikiswa na kha magota a musanda na kha vhavhusi vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha, vhenevho vha farisa vhathu, vha tikedza mushumo wa nnḓu ya Mudzimu." 
Ezra9:1 Musi ho no itwa izwo zwithu, vharangaphanḓa vha ḓa ha nṋe vha ri, “Vhathu vha Israele, na vhone vhotshifhe na Vhalivi, a vho ngo ila zwa u dzetshelana na tshakha dza mashango o vha tangaho, vha no nga Vhakanana na Vhahithi na Vhapherisi na Vhajebusi na Vhaamoni na Vhamuaba na Vhaegipita na Vhaamori, vha vho tevhedza maitele adzo a nengisaho." 
Ezra9:2 Vho dzhia vhaṅwe vha vhananyana vha vhenevho vha vha ita vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vhavho, u ralo ha vha u vanganya lushaka lukhethwa na dzitshakha dzo vha tangaho. Nahone vharangaphanḓa na magota vho vha vhone vha u ranga u sa fulufhedzea honoho.”" 
Ezra9:3 Nda ri u pfa zwenezwo nda kherukanya khanzu yanga na phuraphura yanga, nda tupula mavhudzi anga na ndebvu, nda dzula fhasi ndo tshenuwa." 
Ezra9:4 Zwenezwo vhoṱhe vhe vha tetemela vha tshi pfa maipfi a Mudzimu wa Israele vha kuvhangana vha ḓa ha nṋe nga mulandu wa u sa fulufhedzea hoho ha mathubwa. Nṋe nda dzula henefho ndo tshenuwa ha vhuya ha ṋekedzwa nduvho ya madekwana. 
Ezra9:5 Huno musi hu tshi ṋekedzwa nduvho ya madekwana nda takuwa he nda vha ndo ḓiṱukufhadza phanḓa ha Mudzimu, khanzu yanga na phuraphura yanga zwo kherukana, nda gwadama nga magona, nda imisa zwanḓa zwa livha ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga," 
Ezra9:6 nda rabela nda ri, “Yawee Mudzimu wanga, ndi pfa ndo tou niwa nga ṱhoni, ndi shona na u u lavhelesa Mudzimu wanga, ngauri vhuvhi hashu vhu vho ri kumba, mulandu washu u swika makoleni." 
Ezra9:7 U bva misi ya vhokhotsi ashu, na ṋamusi, mulandu washu u ḓi vha muhulu. Riṋe na mahosi ashu na vhotshifhe vhashu ro ḽiwa nga pfumo, ra hwalelwa vhuthubwani ró ṱangulwa, ra nyadziwa, ri tshi vhuswa nga mahosi asili, na ṋamusi, nga mulandu wa vhuvhi hashu." 
Ezra9:8 Huno zwino Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu o ri khathutshela tshifhinganyana nga u lamulela vhaṅwenyana vho salaho a ri ṱokisa midzi fhethu hawe hukhethwa. Mudzimu washu o ri ṋea maanḓa a ri ṋea vhutshilo ngomu vhupulini hashu. 
Ezra9:9 Naho ri dziphuli, Mudzimu washu ho ngo ri ṱutshela vhupulini hashu. O ita uri mahosi a Pheresia a ri tonde. O ri ṋea vhutshilo vhuswa uri ri vuse nnḓu ya Mudzimu washu, ri vuse matumba, a ri vhiela na luhura lwa u ri tsireledza rí Juda na Jerusalema." 
Ezra9:10 “Huno zwino Mudzimu washu, ri nga ri mini ho no bvelela izwi? Ndi uri ro nyadza dzindaela" 
Ezra9:11 dze wa dzi swikisa nga vhaḓinḓa vhau vhaporofita musi u tshi ri, ‘Shango ḽine na khou dzhena khaḽo uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu ndi shango ḽo kumadzwaho nga vhuaḓa ha tshakha dzaḽo. Vho ita zwi nengisaho, vha ḽi ḓadza dzitshika dzavho u bva mugumoni uno u swika kha uḽa." 
Ezra9:12 Zwenezwo ni songo tenda vhananyana vhaṋu vha tshi dzewa nga vhatuka vhavho kana vhatuka vhaṋu vha tshi dzea vhananyana vhavho. Ni songo vha tikedza uri zwi vha nakele kana zwi vha anḓe na kathihi, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha na nungo, na ḽa zwivhuya zwa shango, na ḽi siela na vhana vhaṋu ḽa vha ifa ḽavho ḽa lini na lini.’" 
Ezra9:13 “Zwo ri welaho zwo ḓiswa nga zwiito zwashu zwivhi na mulandu washu muhulu. Naho zwo ralo, Iwe Mudzimu washu wo ri rwa nga ṱhamu ṱhukhu i songo eḓanaho vhuvhi hashu, wa litsha vhaṅwe vha songo fa." 
Ezra9:14 Ri ḓo dovha ra pfuka ndaela dzau, ra vhingana na tshakha dza zwiito zwi nengisaho nga u ralo naa? A ri nga ḓo u sinyusa tshoṱhe wa ri fhedza tshoṱhe hu si sale muthu naa?" 
Ezra9:15 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele, u a fulufhedzea! Wo ri litsha ra si fe vhoṱhe. Rí fhano ṋamusi ri na mulandu, ndi zwine ha si vhe na ane a nga ima phanḓa hau.”" 
Ezra10:1 Musi Esra a tshi khou rabela, a tshi khou bula zwivhi, ó tsengisa miṱodzi, ó ḓiposa fhasi phanḓa ha nnḓu ya Mudzimu, ha kuvhangana gogo ḽihulu ḽa Vhaisraele hune a vha hone, vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana. Na vhone vha lila lu ṱungufhadzaho." 
Ezra10:2 Ndi hone Shekania ṅwana wa Jehiele, muṅwe wa vhaḓuhulu vha Elamu, a tshi vhudza Esra a ri, “Mudzimu washu o vhona ro mu shandukela nga u dzea vhasadzi vhasili vha no bva kha tshakha dzo ri tangaho. Hone naho zwo ralo, Vhaisraele vha kha ḓi vha na tshine vha nga fulufhela." 
Ezra10:3 Nga ri vhofhe mulanga na Mudzimu washu wa uri ri ḓo ṱala vhasadzi havha vhoṱhe vha ṱuwe na vhana vhavho, ri tshi tevhedza nyeletshedzo ya vhone muṋe wanga na ya vhane vha ofha ndaela dza Mudzimu washu. Nga zwi itwe hu tshi tevhedzwa Mulayo." 
Ezra10:4 Nga vha takuwe, mafhungo haya a zwanḓani zwavho. Riṋe ri ḓo vha tikedza, zwenezwo nga vha vhe na nungo vha zwi ite.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ndi hone Esra a tshi takuwa a anisa vharangaphanḓa vha vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na Vhaisraele vhoṱhe uri vha ite zwe zwa ambiwa. Vha ana. 
Ezra10:6 Ndi hone Esra a tshi ṱuwa phanḓa ha nnḓu ya Mudzimu a ya kamarani ya Jehohanani ṅwana wa Eliashibi. Musi e henefho, a si ḽe zwiḽiwa, a si nwe maḓi, ngauri o vha a tshi kha ḓi lilela u shanduka ha mathubwa." 
Ezra10:7 Ha bviswa nḓivhadzo kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Juda na Jerusalema ya uri mathubwa oṱhe a kuvhangane Jerusalema. 
Ezra10:8 Ha pfi ane a vhuya a kundwa u swika musi ho fhela maḓuvha mararu u ḓo dzhielwa thundu yawe yoṱhe, hu tshi tevhedzwa ndaela ya magota na vhahulwane, ene muṋe a thathwa a bviswa tshivhidzoni tsha mathubwa." 
Ezra10:9 Musi ho fhela maḓuvha ayo mararu, vhanna vhoṱhe vha Juda na Benyamini vha kuvhangana Jerusalema. Nga ḓuvha ḽa 20 la ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa, vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vho dzula muṱani phanḓa ha nnḓu ya Mudzimu, vha tshi khou tetemela nga u ofhisa ha fhungo iḽo na nga mvula." 
Ezra10:10 Zwenezwo Esra ene tshifhe a takuwa a vha vhudza a ri, “No shandukela Mudzimu na dzea vhasadzi vhasili, u ralo ha vha u engedza mulandu wa Israele." 
Ezra10:11 Zwino bulani vhuvhi haṋu ni vhu vhudze Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi aṋu, ni ite zwine a zwi funa. Ḓikhetheni ni si vangane na tshakha dzo ni tangaho na vhasadzi vhasili.”" 
Ezra10:12 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha fhindula nga u ṱavha mukosi tsha ri, “Vha amba zwone! Tshashu ndi u ita zwine vha amba." 
Ezra10:13 Hone hu na vhathu vhanzhi fhano nahone ndi tshifhinga tsha mvula, zwenezwo a ri koni u ima nnḓa. Nahone haya a si mafhungo ane a nga dzudzanywa nga ḓuvha ḽithihi kana mavhili, ngauri vhuvhi uvhu vhu kwama vhanzhi vhukati hashu." 
Ezra10:14 Magota ashu nga vha ambele tshivhidzo tshoṱhe. Zwino nga vha ite uri muṅwe na muṅwe a dzulaho miḓini yashu o dzeaho musadzi wa mutsinda a ḓe nga tshifhinga tsho vhewaho, a ḓe na magota na vhahaṱuli vha muḓi muṅwe na muṅwe, mbiti dzi ofhisaho dza Mudzimu washu mafhungoni haya dzi vhuye ri ṱutshele.”" 
Ezra10:15 Ndi Jonathani ṅwana wa Asaele na Jahasiya ṅwana wa Thikiva fhedzi vhe vha hana ayo mafhungo, vha tshi tikedzwa nga Mishulamu na Shabithai wa Mulivi." 
Ezra10:16 Mathubwa vha ṱanganedza nzudzanyo iyo. Esra, ene tshifhe, a nanga vhanna vhane vha vha ṱhoho dza mitupo vha nnḓu iṅwe na iṅwe, vhoṱhe vha ṅwalwa madzina. Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi vha dzula fhasi vha londolosa iyo milandu," 
Ezra10:17 huno nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga vha vha vho fhedza mafhungo a vhanna vhoṱhe vho dzeaho vhasadzi vha vhatsinda. 
Ezra10:18 Kha vhaḓuhulu vha vhotshifhe, vhe vha vha vho dzea vhasadzi vha vhatsinda ndi havhano: Kha vhaḓuhulu vha Joshua ṅwana wa Jotsadaka na vharathu vhawe ndi Maaseya na Eliesere na Jaribi na Gedalia." 
Ezra10:18 Kha vhaḓuhulu vha vhotshifhe, vhe vha vha vho dzea vhasadzi vha vhatsinda ndi havhano: Kha vhaḓuhulu vha Joshua ṅwana wa Jotsadaka na vharathu vhawe ndi Maaseya na Eliesere na Jaribi na Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Vhoṱhe vha ana uri vha ḓo ṱala vhasadzi vhavho, muṅwe na muṅwe a ṋekedza thutha i no bva kha sambi ḽawe ya vha tshipfumelo tsha mulandu." 
Ezra10:20 Kha vhaḓuhulu vha Imere ndi: Hanani na Zebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Vhaḓuhulu vha Harimu ndi Maaseya na Elia na Shemaya na Jehiele na Uzia. 
Ezra10:22 Vhaḓuhulu vha Phashuru ndi Elihwenai na Maaseya na Ishmaele na Nathaniele na Jozabadi na Elasa. 
Ezra10:23 Kha Vhalivi ndi Jozabadi na Shimei na Kelaya (ḽiṅwe u pfi Kelita) na Phethahia na Juda na Eliesere. 
Ezra10:24 Kha vhaimbi ndi Eliashibi. Kha vhalindi vha khoro ndi Shalumu na Telemu na Uri. 
Ezra10:25 Kha vhaṅwe Vhaisraele: Vhaḓuhulu vha Pharoshi ndi Ramia na Izia na Malikhiya na Miyamini na Eliasara na Malikhiya na Benaya. 
Ezra10:26 Vhaḓuhulu vha Elamu ndi Mathania na Zakaria na Jehiele na Abudi na Jeremotho na Elia. 
Ezra10:27 Vhaḓuhulu vha Zathu ndi Elihwenai na Eliashibi na Mathania na Jeremotho na Zabadi na Azisa. 
Ezra10:28 Vhaḓuhulu vha Bebai ndi Jehohanani na Hanania na Zabai na Athilai. 
Ezra10:29 Vhaḓuhulu vha Bani ndi Meshulamu na Malukhu na Adaya na Jashubu na Sheala na Jeremotho. 
Ezra10:30 Vhaḓuhulu vha Phahathi Muaba ndi Adina na Khelala na Benaya na Maaseya na Mathania na Betsaliele na Binui na Manase. 
Ezra10:31 Vhaḓuhulu vha Harimu ndi Eliesere na Ishiya na Malikhiya na Shemaya na Simioni 
Ezra10:32 na Benyamini na Malukhu na Shemaria. 
Ezra10:33 Vhaḓuhulu vha Hashumi ndi Mathenai na Mathatha na Zabadi na Eliphelete na Jeremai na Manase na Shimei. 
Ezra10:34 Vhaḓuhulu vha Bani ndi Maadai na Amuramu na Uele 
Ezra10:35 na Benaya na Bediya na Kheluhi 
Ezra10:36 na Vania na Miremotho na Eliashibi 
Ezra10:37 na Mathania na Mathenai na Jaasai. 
Ezra10:38 Vhaḓuhulu vha Binui ndi Shimei 
Ezra10:39 na Shelemia na Nathani na Adaya 
Ezra10:40 na Makhinadebai na Shashai na Sharai 
Ezra10:41 na Asarele na Shelemia na Shemaria 
Ezra10:42 na Shalumu na Amaria na Josefa. 
Ezra10:43 Vhaḓuhulu vha Nebo ndi Jeiele na Mathithia na Zabadi na Zebina na Jadai na Juele na Benaya. 
Ezra10:44 Vhoṱhe havho vho vha vho dzea vhasadzi vha vhatsinda; vho vha ṱala vha vha ṱuwisa na vhana vhavho. 
Nehemiah1:1 Haya ndi mafhungo a Nehemia ṅwana wa Hakhalia. Nga ṅwedzi wa Khisilevi nga ṅwaha wa 20 Arithakhesese a tshi vhusa Pheresia, nṋe Nehemia ndo vha ndi musanda Shushani." 
Nehemiah1:2 Murathu wanga Hanani a swika a tshi bva Juda e na tshigwada tsha vhanna, nda vha vhudzisa nga Jerusalema na mutakalo wa Majuda vha hashu vhe vha vhuya vha tshi bva vhuthubwani Babele." 
Nehemiah1:3 Vhone vha fhindula uri vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani vha khomboni khulu, na uri vhatsinda vho dzulaho tsini navho vha a vha nyadza. Vha dovha vha mmbudza uri mitsheṱo ya Jerusalema i tshee yo thuthwa, na khoro dzawo dzo fhiswa nga mulilo." 
Nehemiah1:4 Nṋe nda ri u pfa izwo zwithu nda dzula fhasi nda lila. Nda fhedza maḓuvha ndo ṱungufhala ndi sa ḽi tshithu. Nda rabela phanḓa ha Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu nda ri," 
Nehemiah1:5 “Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa ḽiṱaḓulu, Mudzimu muhulu a ofhisaho! Iwe u a fulufhedzea, arali wa vhofha mulanga na vhane vha u funa vha ita zwine wa vha laya, a u vhofhololi." 
Nehemiah1:6 Thetshelesa nandi, nndavhelese nandi, u pfe thabelo yanga ndi tshi rabelela vhathu vha Israele vhalanda vhau vhusiku na masiari. Ndi bula vhutshinyi he riṋe Vhaisraele ra u khakhela ngaho. Nṋe na nnḓu ya khotsi anga ro tshinya." 
Nehemiah1:7 Ro tshinya, ra si tsha ita zwe wa ri laya. A ro ngo tevhedza ndayo dzau na milayo ye wa ṋea Mushe muḓinḓa wau." 
Nehemiah1:8 Elelwa ndayo dze wa ṋea Mushe muḓinḓa wau u tshi ri, ‘Arali inwi vhathu vha Israele ni tshi ntshandukela, ndi ḓo ni balanganya na dziṅwe tshakha." 
Nehemiah1:9 Hone arali na vhuelela kha Nṋe, na ita zwine nda ni laya na zwi tevhedza, ndi ḓo ni vhuedzedza fhethu he nda hu nanga uri dzina ḽanga ḽi dzule hone, naho no balangana u swika mugumoni wa ḽifhasi.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Muṋe washu, hufha vhathu avha vhe vhalanda vhau, hufha vhe vhathu vhau vhukuma. Wo vha lamulela nga maanḓa au mahulu na nga tshanḓa tshau vhukuma." 
Nehemiah1:11 Zwino Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, thetshelesa thabelo yanga na thabelo dza vhaḓinḓa vhau vhoṱhe vhane vha takalela u u hulisa. Ita uri zwi nnakele ṋamusi, u ite uri khosi hei i ntakalele.” Ndi uri misi iyo ndo vha ndi ndumi i ṋekedzaho khosi tshinwelo tsha waini." 
Nehemiah2:1 Ngavhuya ho no fhela miṅwedzi miṋa, nga ṅwedzi wa Nisani, muṅwe musi khosi Arithakhesese a tshi khou swiṱula, nṋe nda dzhia waini nda mu ṋekedza. O vha a sa athu vhuya a mmbona ndo ṱungufhala nga u ralo," 
Nehemiah2:2 ndi hone a tshi mmbudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini tshifhaṱuwo tshaṋu tsho ṱungufhala? A ni lwali? Hai, hu fanela u vha na tshine tsha khou ni ḽisa mbilu.” Nda pfa ndo farwa nga nyofho khulu," 
Nehemiah2:3 nda fhindula nda ri, “Ngavhe thovhele a tshi lalama! Ndi nga kundwa u ṱungufhala hani, hufha muḓi we vhomakhulukuku wanga vha swiṱwa hone e matumba na khoro dzo fhiswa nga mulilo?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Tshine na tshi ṱoḓa ndi tshini?” Nṋe nda rabela Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu," 
Nehemiah2:5 nda konou fhindula khosi nda ri, “Arali thovhele a tshi ntakalela, arali a tshi funa u nṋea zwine nda humbela, kha ndi rumiwe ndi ye shangoni ḽa Juda, muḓini he ha swiṱwa vhomakhulukuku wanga, uri ndi u vuse.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Zwino khosi, na mufumakadzi we a vha e hone-vho, vha tenda zwe nda humbela. A mmbudzisa uri lwendo lu ḓo fhedza tshifhinga tshingafhani na uri ndi ḓo vhuya lini, nṋe nda mu vhudza a tenda." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ndi hone ndi tshi mu humbela uri arali a tshi zwi funa a mphe maṅwalo ndi ise ha vhavhusi vha Seli-ha-Yufuratha a vha vhudze vha ntendele u tshimbila ndi ye Juda. 
Nehemiah2:8 Nda humbela na luṅwalo lu no ya ha Asafu, mulindi wa maṱaka a musanda, a mu vhudze uri a mphe matanda a khoro dza dzhavhelo ḽo tangedzaho thembele, na a mitsheṱo ya muḓi na a nnḓu ine nda ḓo dzula khayo. Khosi ya mpha zwoṱhe zwe nda humbela nge Mudzimu nga tshanḓa tshawe tsha vhuthu a ita uri zwi nnakele." 
Nehemiah2:9 Khosi ya ruma vhahulwane vha mmbi na vhanameli vha dzibere uri vha mphelekedze, nda dzhena nḓilani nda livha Seli-ha-Yufuratha. Henengei nda dzhia aḽa maṅwalo a no bva kha khosi nda a ṋekedza vhavhusi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Hone Sanibalati wa Horoni, na Tobia gota ḽa dzingu ḽa Amoni, vha zwi pfa uri ho swika muthu a no ḓo ita uri zwi nakele Vhaisraele, zwa vha dina nga maanḓa." 
Nehemiah2:11 Nda swika Jerusalema, ha fhela maḓuvha mararu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndi hone ndi tshi vuwa vhukati ha vhusiku nda bvela nnḓa ndi sa vhudzi muthu zwi re mbiluni yanga zwe nda vhudzwa nga Mudzimu wanga uri ndi zwi itele Jerusalema, nda ṱuwa na vhanna vha si gathi. A ro ngo ṱuwa na tshifuwo arali i si donngi nthihi fhedzi ye nda vha ndo i namela." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ro vuwa hu tshee vhusiku ra bva afho muḓini nga Khoro ya Govha thungo ya vhukovhela, nda livha thungo ya tshipembe, nda fhira Tshisima tsha Phunguhwe nda livha Khoroni ya Vhutoko. Nda enda ndi tshi tandula mitsheṱo ya Jerusalema yo thuthwaho na khoro dzo fhiswaho." 
Nehemiah2:14 Zwino vhubvaḓuvha ha muḓi nda livha thungo ya devhula ndi tshi ya Khoroni ya Tshisima na Dzivhani ḽa Khosi. Donngi ye nda vha ndo i namela ya si tsha kona u wana muzwila wa u fhira. 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndi hone ndi tshi tsela Govhani ḽa Kidroni vhusiku, ndi tshi khou tandula mutsheṱo. Nda konou huma nga nḓila ye nda ḓa ngayo, nda vhuelela muḓini nda dzhena nga Khoro ya Govha." 
Nehemiah2:16 A hu na na muthihi wa vhahulwane we a ḓivha he nda vha ndo ya hone kana zwe nda vha ndi tshi khou ita. Ndo vha ndi sa athu zwi vhudza na muthihi wa Majuda vha hashu – vhotshifhe kana vharangaphanḓa kana vhahulwane, kana muṅwe-vho we a vha a tshi ḓo farisa u shuma uyo mushumo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Hone zwino nda vha vhudza nda ri, “Inwi vhaṋe ni a zwi vhona uri ro welwa nga khombo nngafhani; Jerusalema ndi matumba, khoro dzawo dzo swa nga mulilo! Nga ri vuse mitsheṱo ya Jerusalema, ndi hone ri si tsha ḓo nyadziwa.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Nda vha vhudza na zwe Mudzimu a vha na nṋe, a mpfarisa, na zwe khosi ya mmbudza. Vhone vha tenda vha ri, “Nga ri mbo ḓi thoma u fhaṱa!” Vha ḓilugisela u thoma uyo mushumo wavhuḓi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Musi Sanibalati wa Horoni, na Tobia gota ḽa Amoni, na Gesheme muhulwane wa Vhaarabia vha tshi pfa zwe ra vha ri tshi khou dzudzanya u zwi ita, vha ri goḓa vha ri, “Ndi zwithu-ḓe zwine na khou ita? Kani-ha ni khou ṱoḓa u shandukela khosi?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Mudzimu wa ḽiṱaḓulu u ḓo ita uri zwi ri nakele. Riṋe ri vhaḓinḓa vhawe, ri ḓo thoma u fhaṱa. Huno inwi a ni na tshaṋu fhano Jerusalema, a ni na pfanelo na nthihi, tshi tsheetsho a wo ngo vhuya wa vha muḓi waṋu.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Mutsheṱo wo vuswa nga hei nḓila: Tshifhe muhulu Eliashibi na vhotshifhe ngae vho vusa Khoro ya Dzinngu, vha i kumedza Mudzimu, vha kwea dzigethe. Vho fhaṱa u swika Thawara ya vha Ḓana vha u kumedza Mudzimu, vha dovha vha fhirela phanḓa u swika kha Thawara ya Hananele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Vhanna vha Jerikho vha fhaṱa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na tshenetsho, ha tevhela Zakhuru ṅwana wa Imiri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Vhaḓuhulu vha Hasenaa vha fhaṱa Khoro ya Khovhe. Vha fulela, vha kwea dzikhoro, vha longa khoṋo na tswinga." 
Nehemiah3:4 Miremotho, ṅwana wa Uria ṅwana wa Hakotsi, a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, ha tevhela Mishulamu, ṅwana wa Berekhia ṅwana wa Meshesabele, ene a tevhelwa nga Tsadoko ṅwana wa Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Tshipiḓa tshi tevhelaho tsho vuswa nga vhanna vha Thekua, hone vhaḓivhalea vhavho vha hana u shuma mushumo wa Muṋe wavho." 
Nehemiah3:6 Joyada ṅwana wa Phasia na Mishulamu ṅwana wa Besodia vha vusa Khoro ya Jeshana. Vha fulela, vha kwea dzikhoro, vha longa khoṋo na tswinga." 
Nehemiah3:7 Melathia a no bva Gibioni na Jadoni a no bva Mironotho, na vhanna vha no bva Gibioni na Mitsipha vha vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, u swika hune muvhusi wa Vhukovhela-ha-Yufuratha a dzula hone," 
Nehemiah3:8 ha tevhela Uziele ṅwana wa Harahaya, mufuli wa musuku, ha konou tevhela Hanania muiti wa zwiḓolo zwi nukhelelaho, ene a vusa mutsheṱo u swika Mutsheṱoni wo aṱamaho," 
Nehemiah3:9 ha tevhela Refaya ṅwana wa Huru, muvhusi wa hafu ya dzingu ḽa Jerusalema." 
Nehemiah3:10 Jedaya ṅwana wa Harumafu a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, tshe tsha vha tshi tsini na nnḓu yawe, ha tevhela Hatushi ṅwana wa Hashabania." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malakhiya ṅwana wa Harimu na Hashubu ṅwana wa Phahathi Muaba vha dovha vha vusa tshipiḓa tshiṅwe, vha vusa na Thawara ya Dziṋanḓo," 
Nehemiah3:12 ha tevhela Shalumu ṅwana wa Haloheshe, muvhusi wa hafu ya dzingu ḽa Jerusalema. Vhananyana vhawe vha mu farisa kha uyo mushumo." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanunu na vhadzulapo vha muḓi wa Zanua vha vusa Khoro ya Govha. Vha kwea dzigethe, vha longa khoṋo na tswinga, vha vusa mutsheṱo tshikhala tshi no ita mitha dza 440, u vhuya u swika Khoroni ya Mupfudze." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malikhiya ṅwana wa Rekhaba, muvhusi wa dzingu ḽa Bethe Hakhereme, a vusa Khoro ya Mupfudze. A kwea dzigethe, a longa khoṋo na tswinga." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu ṅwana wa Kholohose, muvhusi wa dzingu ḽa Mitsipha, a vusa Khoro ya Tshisima. A fulela muṋango, a kwea dzigethe, a longa khoṋo na tswinga. Dzivhani ḽa Shela a fhaṱa mutsheṱo tsini ha tsimu ya musanda, u vhuya u swika zwiṱepisini zwine zwa tsela fhasi zwi tshi bva Muḓini wa Dafita." 
Nehemiah3:16 Nehemia ṅwana wa Asibuku, muvhusi wa hafu ya dzingu ḽa Bethe Tsuru, a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, u swika tshaloni tsha Dafita na damu na nnḓu ya vhahali." 
Nehemiah3:17 Vhalivi vhe vha vusa zwipiḓa zwa mutsheṱo zwo vhandekanaho na izwo ndi havha: Rehumi ṅwana wa Bani o vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, ha tevhela Hashabia, muvhusi wa hafu ya dzingu ḽa Keila, a vusa a tshi itela dzingu ḽawe;" 
Nehemiah3:18 ha tevhela Binui ṅwana wa Henadada, muvhusi wa hafu ya dzingu ḽa Keila, a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho," 
Nehemiah3:19 ha tevhela Ezere ṅwana wa Jeshua, muvhusi wa Mitsipha, a engedza tshiṅwe tshipiḓa, a vusa tsho vhandekanaho na nnḓu ya zwihali, u swika fhethu hune mutsheṱo wa ita khuḓa," 
Nehemiah3:20 ha tevhela Barukhu ṅwana wa Zabai, a vusa tshiṅwe tshipiḓa u bva khuḓani u swika muṋangoni wa nnḓu ya tshifhe muhulu Eliashibi," 
Nehemiah3:21 ha tevhela Miremotho ṅwana wa Uria ṅwana wa Hakotsi, a dovha a vusa tshiṅwe tshipiḓa u swika magumoni a nnḓu ya Eliashibi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Vhotshifhe vhe vha vusa zwipiḓa zwa mutsheṱo zwo vhandekanaho na izwo ndi havhano: Vhotshifhe vha no bva vhuponi vhu re tsini ha Jerusalema vho vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho," 
Nehemiah3:23 ha tevhela Benyamini na Hashubu, vha vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na nnḓu dzavho; ha tevhela Azaria, ṅwana wa Maaseya ṅwana wa Anania, na ene a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na nnḓu yawe,"
