Nehemiah3:24 ha tevhela Binui ṅwana wa Henadada, a dovha u vusa tshiṅwe tshipiḓa tsha vhuvhili, u bva nḓuni ya Azaria u swika khuḓani ya mutsheṱo;" 
Nehemiah3:25 ha tevhela Phalala ṅwana wa Uzai, a vusa u bva khuḓani ya mutsheṱo na thawara ya pfamo ya nṱha tsini ha muṱa wa vhalindi; ha tevhela Phedaya ṅwana wa Pharoshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 a vusa u swika thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha tsini ha Khoro ya Maḓi na thawara i lindaho thembele. (Hafhu ho vha hu tsini na tshipiḓa tshiḽa tsha muḓi tshine tsha pfi Ofele, hune ha dzula vha shumaho thembeleni.)" 
Nehemiah3:27 Vhanna vha Thekua vha dovha vha vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na itsho, itsho tsho vha tshi tshipiḓa tshavho u bva fhethu ho livhanaho na thawara khulu ine ya linda thembele u swika kha mutsheṱo u re tsini ha Ofele;" 
Nehemiah3:28 ha tevhela tshigwada tsha vhotshifhe, tsha vusa u bva Khoroni ya Bere vha tshi ya thungo ya devhula, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi fhaṱa ho vhandekanaho na nnḓu yawe;" 
Nehemiah3:29 ha tevhela Tsadoko ṅwana wa Imere, a vusa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na nnḓu yawe; ha tevhela Shemaya ṅwana wa Shekhania, mulindi wa Khoro ya Vhubvaḓuvha;" 
Nehemiah3:30 ha tevhela Hanania ṅwana wa Shelemia, na Hanunu ṅwana wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi wa Tsalafu; itsho tsho vha tshipiḓa tshavho tsha vhuvhili; ha tevhela Mishulamu ṅwana wa Berekhia, a fhaṱa tshipiḓa tsho vhandekanaho na vhudzulo hawe;" 
Nehemiah3:31 ha tevhela Malikhiya mufuli wa musuku, a fhaṱa u swika kha nnḓu ine ya dzula vhanna vha no shuma thembeleni na vhashavhi, yone yo vha i tsini na Khoro ya Mifikadi, tsini ha kamara ya nṱha na khuḓa ya vhubvaḓavha-devhula ya mutsheṱo." 
Nehemiah3:32 Vhafuli vha musuku na vhashavhi vha fhaṱa tshipiḓa tsha u fhedzisela, u bva kamarani fhaḽa khuḓani u swika Khoroni ya Dzinngu." 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanibalati a tshi pfa uri Majuda vho thoma u vusa mutsheṱo, a sinyuwa nga maanḓa, a thoma u ri goḓa." 
Nehemiah4:2 A amba na khonani dzawe na mmbi ya Vhasamaria a ri, “Zwijuda hezwi zwi vhona uri zwi khou itani? Vha vhona unga vha ḓo vusa mutsheṱo wavho? Vha vhona unga vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi ṋekedza nduvho dza u hangula naa? Vha vhona unga vha nga kona u fhedza mushumo nga ḓuvha ḽithihi? Vha nga vusa zwidina zwi tshile naa? Hufha zwo swa, e matumba?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia wa Muamoni o vha o ima henefho tsini hawe, a dovha a ri, “Nangwe vha vusa mutsheṱo, na phunguhwe i nga u khurumedza wa wa!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Nṋe nda rabela nda ri, “Yawee Mudzimu, ipfa vha tshi kola! Ngavhe u ri goḓa havho hu tshi wela nṱha ha ṱhoho dzavho. Ngavhe vha tshi ṱangulwa zwoṱhe zwine vha vha nazwo, vha hwalwa vha iswa vhuthubwani shangoni ḽisili." 
Nehemiah4:5 U songo vha hangwela vhuvhi vhune vha ita, u songo vha pfumelela vhutshinyi havho, ngauri vho nyefula riṋe vhane ra khou fhaṱa.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Riṋe ra fhaṱa mutsheṱo ri tshi ya nawo, hu si kale ra vha ro no vusa hafu yawo u ya nṱha, ngauri vhathu vho vha vho ḓiimisela u shuma." 
Nehemiah4:7 Sanibalati na Tobia na vhathu vha Arabia na Amoni na Ashidodo vha pfa uri ri khou isa phanḓa u vusa mutsheṱo wa Jerusalema na uri hoṱhe he mutsheṱo wa pwashiwa hu khou valiwa, zwa vha sinyusa nga maanḓa." 
Nehemiah4:8 Vhoṱhe vha ita tshikungo tsha u dia Jerusalema vha ri thithise. 
Nehemiah4:9 Hone riṋe ra rabela Mudzimu washu, ra vhea vhalindi vhusiku na masiari uri vha ṱanganedzane navho." 
Nehemiah4:10 Vhathu vha Juda vha vha na luimbo lune vha lu imba lu no ri: “Ri fhela nungo nga u hwala mihwalo; mathukhwi ane ra khura ndi manzhi. Mutsheṱo ri nga u fhaṱa hani?” 
Nehemiah4:11 Maswina ashu o vha a tshi ri ri nga si a vhone kana ra ḓivha zwine zwa khou itea vha vhuya vha ri wela vha ri vhulaha vha pfuvhisa mushumo washu. 
Nehemiah4:12 Hone Majuda vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula na maswina ashu vho vha vha tshi anzela u ḓa vha ri sevha vhunwa vhune maswina a ṱoḓa u ri ita. 
Nehemiah4:13 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi ri vhathu vha kungele mapanga na mafumo na vhura nda vha vhea murahu ha mutsheṱo hoṱhe he wa vha u sa athu fhela, nda vha vhea ndi tshi tevhedza miṱa yavho." 
Nehemiah4:14 Nda vhona uri vhathu zwi a vha dina, nda vha vhudza na vharangaphanḓa vhavho na vhakoma nda ri, “Ni songo ofha maswina ashu. Elelwani uri Muṋe wa zwoṱhe ndi mungafhani, na uri u ofhisa hani, ni lwele vhanna vha haṋu na vhana vhaṋu na vhasadzi vhaṋu na mahaya aṋu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Maswina ashu o pfa uri ro zwi wana zwe vha vha vha tshi khou langana, vha vhona uri Mudzimu o pfuvhisa zwe vha dzudzanya. Ndi hone riṋe roṱhe ri tshi vhuelela mushumoni ra yo vusa mutsheṱo." 
Nehemiah4:16 U bva zwenezwo hafu ya vhanna vha hashu vho vha vha u fhaṱa, hafu yavho vha linda, vhó ambara zwiambaro zwa nndwa, vho kungela mafumo na zwiṱangu na vhura. Vharangaphanḓa vhashu vha tikedza vhathu tshoṱhe," 
Nehemiah4:17 vhaḽa vhe vha vha vha tshi khou fhaṱa mutsheṱo. Na vhe vha vha vha tshi hwala matombo a u fhaṱa vho vha vha tshi shuma nga tshanḓa tshithihi, tshiṅwe tsho fara banga." 
Nehemiah4:18 Na vhafhaṱi vho vha vha tshi fhaṱa vho kungela banga khunduni, hone munna we a vha a tshi lidza phalaphala o vha a tshi dzula na nṋe." 
Nehemiah4:19 Nṋe nda vhudza vhathu na vhakoma na vharangaphanḓa nda ri, “Mushumo wo ṱanḓavhuwa, ri shuma ri kule na kule mutsheṱoni." 
Nehemiah4:20 Arali na pfa phalaphala i tshi lila, ni kuvhangane hune nda vha hone. Mudzimu washu u ḓo ri lwela.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Ra shuma ri tshi ya roṱhe, u bva ḽi tshi balangana ṋeledzi dza vhuya dza vhonala vhusiku, hafu yashu i tshi shuma mutsheṱoni iṅwe hafu i ya u linda yo fara mafumo." 
Nehemiah4:22 Misi iyo nda vhudza vhalangi vha mushumo uri vhone na vhoṱhe vhane vha vha farisa vha dzule Jerusalema vhusiku, vha tshi linda muḓi, masiari vha tshi shuma." 
Nehemiah4:23 Nṋe na vhusiku ndo vha ndi sa bvuli zwiambaro, na khonani dzashu na vhashumi vhanga na vhalindi vha muḓi vho vha vha sa bvuli. Roṱhe ro vha ri tshi dzula ro kungela zwihali." 
Nehemiah5:1 Ngavhuya vhathu vhanzhi, vhoṱhe vhanna na vhasadzi vhavho, vha thoma u gungula nga Majuda vha havho." 
Nehemiah5:2 Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Ri na miṱa mihulwane, ri lila goroi uri ri ḽe ri tshile.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Riṋe ri tou pambisa masimu ashu na a minḓirivhe na nnḓu dzashu i vhe pfarela ri wane goroi ri si ṋoke nga nḓala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Nga ngeno vhaṅwe vha ri, “Riṋe ro tou pamba tshelede uri ri thele muthelo wa musanda nga u tou vhetshedzela masimu ashu na masimu a minḓirivhe." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ri lushaka luthihi na Majuda vha hashu. Kani vhana vhashu a vha ngi vhavho? Hone ro kumedza vhana vhashu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha itwa dziphuli. Vhaṅwe vhananyana vhashu vho no ḓi rengiswa vha itwa dziphuli, riṋe a ri na tshine ra nga ita; na masimu ashu na a minḓirivhe zwo no vha zwa vhaṅwe.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ndi tshi pfa vha tshi lila nga u ralo, nda sinyuwa zwihulu" 
Nehemiah5:7 nda elekanya ngavho mbiluni yanga nda konou pomoka vhaḓivhalea na vhakoma, nda vha vhudza nda ri, “Ni khou kandeledza vha haṋu!” Nṋe nda vhidza tshivhidzo uri tshi senge ayo mafhungo" 
Nehemiah5:8 nda ri, “Ri khou linga nga nungo dzashu dzoṱhe u rengulula Majuda vha hashu vhe vha ḓirengisa kha vhatsinda. Zwino ni vho kombetshedza vha haṋu uri vha ḓirengise kha inwi Majuda vha havho!” Vharangaphanḓa vha sokou fhumula, vha wana hu si na tshine vha nga fhindula." 
Nehemiah5:9 Zwino nṋe nda ri, “Zwine na khou ita zwo khakha! No vha no fanela u ofha Mudzimu, na ita zwi re zwone. Zwenezwo vhahedeni maswina ashu, vho vha vha sa nga koni u ri sea." 
Nehemiah5:10 Na nṋe na vha hashu na vhakoma vhanga ro adzima vhathu tshelede na mavhele. Zwino ni songo vha lifhisa. 
Nehemiah5:11 Ṋamusi thuthani milandu yoṱhe ya zwe vha pamba kha inwi – tshelede na mavhoḓa ayo, na mavhele na waini na mapfura a muolivi, ni vha humisele masimu avho na masimu a minḓirivhe na miri ya miolivi na dzinnḓu kathihi fhedzi!”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Vharangaphanḓa vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri ḓo ita zwine vha amba. Ri ḓo humisela thundu kha vhaṋe vhayo ra si tsha vhila mulandu!” Nda vhidza vhotshifhe nda ita uri vharangaphanḓa vha ane phanḓa havho uri vha ite zwe vha fulufhedzisa." 
Nehemiah5:13 Nda ita na u ukhutha phendelo dza khanzu yanga nda ri, “Mudzimu u ḓo ukhutha munna muṅwe na muṅwe nga u ralo, ane a si ite zwe a fulufhedzisa. Mudzimu u ḓo ni dzhiela nnḓu dzaṋu na zwoṱhe zwine na vha nazwo, a ni sia ni si na tshithu.” Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha ri, “Amen!” vha renda Muṋe washu. Vhathu vha ita zwe vha fulufhedzisa." 
Nehemiah5:14 Miṅwaha yoṱhe ya 12 ndi tshi khou vhusa shangoni ḽa Juda, u bva nga ṅwaha wa 20 wa Arithakhesese u swika ṅwaha wawe wa 32, nṋe na vhakoma vhanga a ro ngo vhuya ra ḽa zwiḽiwa zwe zwa vha zwi tshi pfi ndi zwanga zwa muvhusi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Vhavhusi vhoṱhe vhe vha vhusa nṋe ndi sa athu vhusa vho vha vha tshi tou vha muhwalo wa vhathu, vha tshi vha bvisisa mangwende a 40 a siliva nga ḓuvha, na zwiḽiwa na waini. Na vhashumi vhavho vho vha vha tshi kandeledza vhathu. Huno nṋe a tho ngo ita unga vhone ngauri ndo vha ndi tshi ofha Mudzimu." 
Nehemiah5:16 Nda shuma nga nungo dzoṱhe ndi tshi vusa mutsheṱo, nda si vhuye nda ṱoḓa thundu, na tsimu a tho ngo renga, na vhashumi vhanga vhoṱhe, ra fhaṱa roṱhe." 
Nehemiah5:17 Zwiṅwe hafhu, ṱafulani yanga ho vha hu tshi ḽa Majuda vha 150 na magota avho, ndi sa ambi vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha nndalela vha tshi bva kha tshakha dzi re tsini hashu." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ndo vha ndi tshi ṱhavha phulu nthihi na nngu ṱhanu na nthihi dzavhuḓivhuḓi na khuhu nnzhi, nahone hu tshi ri u fhela maḓuvha a fumi nda vha fha waini ya tuvhu. Hone nga u ḓivha mihwalo i lemelaho ine avha vhathu vha i hwala, nda si vhile zwe zwa vha zwo fanela u fhiwa muvhusi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Yawee Mudzimu wanga, u songo nkhangwa, elelwa zwoṱhe zwe nda tonda vhathu havha." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanibalati na Tobia na Gesheme wa Muarabia na vhaṅwe maswina ashu vha zwi pfa uri ro fhedza u vusa mutsheṱo na uri a hu tshee na ho piḓimuwaho, naho ro vha ri sa athu kwea dzigethe miṋangoni." 
Nehemiah6:2 Ndi hone Sanibalati na Gesheme vha tshi ruma muḓinḓa a ḓa ha nṋe na mafhungo a no ri ri ṱangane Khefirimu Govhani ḽa Ono. Ho vha vhu vhukwila fhedzi ha uri vha nkhuvhadze. 
Nehemiah6:3 Nṋe nda ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha vha vhudze vha ri, “Nṋe ndi khakhathini ya mushumo muhulwane, ndi nga si kone u takuwa nda tsela henengei; arali nda litsha mushumo nda ḓa u ni vhona, zwoṱhe zwi ḓo ima.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Vhone vha nthumela malaedzwa o raloho lwa ita luṋa, nṋe ndi tshi ḓi vha fhindula-vho nga u ralo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Ndi hone Sanibalati a tshi ruma muṅwe wa vhakoma vhawe a ḓa ha nṋe lwa vhuṱanu. Ayo o vha o tou ṅwalwa kha luṅwalo lu songo pfuṋelwaho. 
Nehemiah6:6 Luṅwalo ulwo lwo vha lu tshi ri, “Gesheme u mmbudza uri hu khou pfala phungo kha tshakha i no ri inwi na Majuda ni khou ṱoḓa u shandukela khosi, ndi zwine na khou vusa mutsheṱo. Ha dovha ha pfi inwi no dzudzanya uri ni vhe khosi" 
Nehemiah6:7 na uri no no ḓi vhudza vhaṅwe vhaporofita uri vha ḓivhadze Jerusalema uri inwi ni khosi ya Juda. Vhukumakuma khosi i ḓo a pfa mafhungo hayo, ndi zwine nda ri nṋe na inwi ri ṱangane ri ambe ayo mafhungo.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Nṋe nda mu rumela phindulo nda ri, “Zwine vhone vha amba ndi zwitshele fhedzi. Ndi zwitshele zwavho fhedzi.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Vhone vho vha vha tshi tou linga u ri shushedza uri ri litshe mushumo. Nṋe nda rabela nda ri, “Mudzimu, khwaṱhisa zwanḓa zwanga!”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nda yo dalela Shemaya, ṅwana wa Delaya ṅwana wa Mehetabele, we a vha o ḓihoṋela nḓuni. Ene a mmbudza a ri, “Nga ri ṱuwe ri yo dzumbama fhethu hukhethwa ha thembele, ri hoṋe mahothi, vha khou ḓa u vha vhulaha; vha ḓo ḓa vhusiku vha vha vhulaha.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Munna a no nga nṋe a nga shavha a dzumbama naa? Ndi nga ḓitshidza nga u yo dzumbama thembeleni? Izwo ndi nga si zwi ite.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ndo vha ndo zwi vhona uri Mudzimu o vha a songo amba na Shemaya. Ndi Tobia na Sanibalati vhe vha vha vho mu putisa uri a ḓe a mmbudze nga u ralo. 
Nehemiah6:13 Vho mu thola uri a ntshutshedze ndi wele tshivhini, uri vha ntshinye dzina, vha nnyadzise." 
Nehemiah6:14 Nṋe nda rabela nda ri, “Mudzimu, elelwa zwe Tobia na Sanibalati vha ita, u vha lifhedze. Elelwa uḽa muporofita wa musadzi Nuadia na vhaṅwe vhaporofita vhoṱhe vhe vha linga u ntshutshedza.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Mutsheṱo wo fhela u fhaṱwa nga ḓuvha ḽa 25 ḽa ṅwedzi wa Elulu, hó fhela maḓuvha a 52 u tshi fhaṱwa." 
Nehemiah6:16 Musi maswina ashu a tshakha dzo ri tangaho a tshi zwi pfa, vha kulea nungo, nge vha vha vha tshi zwi ḓivha uri uyo mushumo wo shumiwa nge Mudzimu a ri farisa." 
Nehemiah6:17 Vhaṅwe vharangaphanḓa vha Majuda vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi ṅwalelana na Tobia. 
Nehemiah6:18 Vhathu vhanzhi vha Juda vho vha vha tshi ima nae nge khotsi a musadzi wawe a vha e Mujuda, ndi Shekhania ṅwana wa Ara. Ṅwana wawe Jehohanani a dovha a vhinga ṅwananyana wa Mishulamu ṅwana wa Berekhia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Vhathu vho vha vha tshi ḓi mmbudza zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe Tobia a ita, vha ita na u mu sevha zwoṱhe zwe nṋe nda amba. Ene a ḓi dzula a tshi nṅwalela a tshi linga u ntshenusa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Zwino mutsheṱo wo vha wo no vuswa, gethe dzo no kwewa, vhalindi vha thembele na vhaimbi na Vhalivi vho vha vho no vhewa mushumoni wavho." 
Nehemiah7:2 Nṋe nda vhea vhanna vhavhili uri vha lange muḓi wa Jerusalema: ndi murathu wanga Hanani, na Hanania mulangi wa mutsheṱo wa dzhavhelo. Hanania o vha a tshi fulufhedzea, a tshi ofha Mudzimu u fhira vhanna vhanzhi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nda vha vhudza nda ri vha songo vula khoro dza Jerusalema nga matsheloni, vha dzi vule ḽo no ṱavha, nahone dzi valiwe ḓuvha ḽi tshi kovhela dzi longwe khoṋo vhalindakhoro vha tshi kha ḓi vha mushumoni. Nda dovha nda vha vhudza uri vha vhee vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema vha vhe vhalindi, vhaṅwe vha linde he vha telwa hone, vhaṅwe vha linde tsini ha nnḓu dzavho." 
Nehemiah7:4 Jerusalema wo vha u muḓi muhulu, hone ho vha hu si na vhathu vhanzhi vha no dzula ngomu hawo nahone ho vha hu sa athu fhaṱwa nnḓu nnzhi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mudzimu a mbo ḓi zwi dzhenisa mbiluni yanga uri ndi kuvhanganye vharangaphanḓa na vhakoma na vhathu zwavho uri vhathu vha re miṱani vha ṅwaliswe. Nda wana he ha ṅwalwa vhaḽa vhe vha ranga u vhuya vhuthubwani zwi tshi ya nga lutsinga lwavho. Nda wana ho ṅwalwa hezwino: 
Nehemiah7:6 Mathubwa manzhi vho ṱuwa Babele vha vhuelela Jerusalema na Juda, muṅwe na muṅwe a vhuelela muḓini wa hawe. Vhuthubwani vho vha vha tshi khou dzula Babele u bva tshee khosi Nebukhadnetsara a vha thubela hone." 
Nehemiah7:7 Vharangaphanḓa vhavho vho vha vhe Zerubabele na Joshua na Nehemia na Azaria na Raamia na Nahamani na Maradokai na Bilishani na Misipherethe na Bigivai na Nehumi na Baana. Mutevhe wa mitupo ya Israele ngoyu, na mbalo ya mutupo muṅwe na muṅwe zwa vhe vha vhuya vha tshi bva vhuthubwani:" 
Nehemiah7:7 Vharangaphanḓa vhavho vho vha vhe Zerubabele na Joshua na Nehemia na Azaria na Raamia na Nahamani na Maradokai na Bilishani na Misipherethe na Bigivai na Nehumi na Baana. Mutevhe wa mitupo ya Israele ngoyu, na mbalo ya mutupo muṅwe na muṅwe zwa vhe vha vhuya vha tshi bva vhuthubwani:"

Nehemiah7:9 Shefatia – 372

Nehemiah7:13 Zathu – 845

Nehemiah7:25 Gibioni – 95 Vhathu vhe vhomakhulukuku wavho vha vha vha tshi dzula miḓini heino i tevhelaho na vhone vho vhuya: 
Nehemiah7:26 Betlehema na Netofa – 188 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathotho – 128 
Nehemiah7:28 Bethe Asimavethe – 42 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriathi Jiarimu na Khefira na Bierotho – 743

Nehemiah7:34 Muṅwe Elamu – 1 254 
Nehemiah7:35 Harimu – 320 
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikho – 345 
Nehemiah7:37 Lodo na Hadidi na Ono – 721 
Nehemiah7:38 Senaa – 3 930 
Nehemiah7:39 Mutevhe wa mitupo ya vhotshifhe vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani ngoyu: Jedaya (vhaḓuhulu vha Jeshua) – 973 
Nehemiah7:40 Imere – 1 052 
Nehemiah7:41 Phashuru – 1 247 
Nehemiah7:42 Harimu – 1 017 
Nehemiah7:43 Vha mitupo ya Vhalivi vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani: Jeshua na Kadamiele (vhaḓuhulu vha Hodavia) – 74 
Nehemiah7:44 Vhaimbi (vhaḓuhulu vha Asafu) – 148 
Nehemiah7:45 Vhalindathembele (vhaḓuhulu vha Shalumu na Atere na Talamoni na Akubu na Hatita na Shobai) – 138 
Nehemiah7:46 Mitupo ya vhanna vha no shuma thembeleni: Tsiha na Hasupha na Tabaotho," 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosi na Sia na Phadoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana na Hagaba na Shalamai," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanani na Gidele na Gahara," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaya na Retsini na Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazamu na Uza na Phasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai na Vhameuni na Vhanefusi," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakabuku na Hakufa na Harahuru," 
Nehemiah7:54 Batsalithi na Mehida na Harasha," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barakosi na Sisera na Thema," 
Nehemiah7:56 Netsia na Hatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Mitupo ya vhashumi vha Solomoni vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani: Sotai na Soferethe na Pherida," 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala na Darakoni na Gidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatia na Hatili na Phokherethe Hatsebaimi na Amoni. 
Nehemiah7:60 Vhashumi vha thembele na vhaḓuhulu vha vhashumi vha Solomoni vho vhuyaho vha tshi bva vhuthubwani vho vha vhe 392. 
Nehemiah7:61 Ho vha hu na vha 642 vha mitupo ya Delaya na Tobia na Nekoda vhe vha vhuya vha tshi bva miḓini ya Thele Mela na Thele Harasha na Kherubi na Adoni na Imere, hone vho vha vha sa koni u sumbedza uri ndi vhaḓuhulu vha Vhaisraele." 
Nehemiah7:62  
Nehemiah7:63 Vha mitupo ya vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vha sa koni u wana vhuṱanzi ho ṅwalwaho vhu no sumbedza vhubvo havho ngevha: ndi Hobaya na Hakotsi na Barasilai. (Makhulukuku wa mutupo wa vhotshifhe wa Barasilai o vha o vhinga musadzi a no bva kha mutupo wa Barasilai wa Giliadi, a vhidzwa nga dzina ḽa mutupo wa khotsi a musadzi wawe.) Vhunga vho vha vha sa koni u sumbedza uri vhomakhulukuku wavho ndi vhonnyi, a vho ngo tendelwa uri vha vhe vhotshifhe." 
Nehemiah7:64  
Nehemiah7:65 Muvhusi wa Majuda o vha vhudza uri vha nga si kone u ḽa zwiḽiwa zwo ṋekedzwaho Mudzimu hu sa athu vha na tshifhe ane a vhonisa nga madeṅwa makhethwa. 
Nehemiah7:66 Mathubwa oṱhe o vhuyaho ndi 42 360. Vhashumi vhavho vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi ndi 7 337. Vhaimbi vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi ndi 245. Gamela ndi 435. Donngi ndi 6 720. 
Nehemiah7:67  
Nehemiah7:68  
Nehemiah7:69 Vhathu vhanzhi vho bvisa zwine vha vha nazwo hu tshi vuswa thembele: Muvhusi o bvisa: khilogiramu dza 8 dza musuku, ndilo dza 50, phuraphura dza vhotshifhe dza 530. Ṱhoho dza mitupo vha bvisa: khilogiramu dza 168 dza musuku, khilogiramu dza 1 250 dza siliva. Vhathu vhaṅwe vha bvisa: khilogiramu dza 168 dza musuku, khilogiramu dza 140 dza siliva, phuraphura dza vhotshifhe dza 67." 
Nehemiah7:70  
Nehemiah7:71  
Nehemiah7:72  
Nehemiah7:73 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhalindi vha thembele na vhaimbi na vhunzhi ha vhathu zwavho na vhanna vha shumaho thembeleni, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele, vha dzula na miḓini na miḓanani ya Juda." 
Nehemiah8:1 Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili vhathu vha Israele vho vha vha tshi vho dzula miḓini yavho. Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wonoyo lushaka lwoṱhe lwa kuvhangana Jerusalema, tshikweani ngomu ha Khoro ya Maḓi. Vha humbela Esra uri a vha ḓisele bugu ya Mulayo ye Muṋe washu a ṋea Vhaisraele nga Mushe. Esra o vha e tshifhe na muḓivhi wa Mulayo." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ndi hone nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili tshifhe Esra a tshi ḓisa Mulayo tshivhidzoni tsha vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana vho thanyaho. 
Nehemiah8:3 Henefho tshikweani tsini ha khoro a vha vhalela Mulayo, a thoma ḽi tshi tsha a vhala u swika masiari tshivhangalala, vhoṱhe vha thetshelesa zwavhuḓi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Esra o vha o ima nṱha ha ḓingo ḽa matanda ḽe ḽa vha ḽo fhaṱelwa vhuṱambo honoho, thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe ha ima Mathithia na Shema na Anaya na Uria na Hilikia na Maaseya, thungo ya tshamonde ha ima Phedaya na Mishaele na Malikhiya na Hashumi na Hashibadana na Zakaria na Mishulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Esra a ima kha ḓingo ḽeneḽo nṱha ha vhathu, vhoṱhe vha tou mu donolela maṱo. Musi a tshi tou vula iyo bugu, vhoṱhe vha takuwa vha ima nga milenzhe." 
Nehemiah8:6 Esra a ri, “Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, Mudzimu muhulu!” Vhathu vhoṱhe vha imisa zwanḓa vha ri, “Amen! Amen!” Vha gwadama vha luvha, zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwa kwama fhasi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Vha konou takuwa vha ima vhuimoni havho, vhaṅwe Vhalivi vha ṱalutshedza Mulayo. Vhenevho ndi Jeshua na Bani na Sherebia na Jamini na Akubu na Shabithai na Hodia na Maaseya na Kelitha na Azaria na Jozabadi na Hanani na Phelaya." 
Nehemiah8:8 Vhenevho vha ṱalutshedza Mulayo wa Mudzimu nga nḓila i pfalaho, vha u ṱalutshedza uri vhathu vha u pfesese." 
Nehemiah8:9 Musi vhathu vha tshi pfa zwine Mulayo wa zwi ṱoḓa, zwa vha dzhena mbiluni lwe vha thoma u lila. Ndi hone Nehemia we a vha e muvhusi, na tshifhe Esra, muḓivhi wa Mulayo, na Vhalivi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ṱalutshedza Mulayo vha tshi vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe vha ri, “Ḓuvha ḽa ṋamusi ndi ḽikhethwa, ḽo khethelwa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu, zwenezwo ni songo tsengisa miṱodzi kana na lila." 
Nehemiah8:10 Zwino iyani mahayani ni yo ita vhuṱambo. Kovhekanani zwiḽiwa zwaṋu na waini, ni kovhekane na avho vha si na zwo eḓanaho. Ḓuvha ḽa ṋamusi ndi ḽikhethwa, ḽo khethelwa Muṋe washu, zwenezwo ni songo ṱungufhala. Dakalo ḽine Muṋe washu a ni ṋea ḽi ḓo ni ṋea nungo.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Vhalivi vha khuthadza vhathu, vha tshi vha vhudza uri vha songo ṱungufhala nga ḓuvha heḽo ḽikhethwa." 
Nehemiah8:12 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi ya hayani vha ḽa, vha nwa vho takala, zwe vha vha vhe nazwo vha kovhekana na vhaṅwe nge vha pfesesa mafhungo e vha vhalelwa." 
Nehemiah8:13 Nga matshelo ṱhoho dza mitupo, khathihi na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi, vha kuvhangana ha Esra muḓivhi wa Mulayo uri vha gude pfunzo dza Mulayo." 
Nehemiah8:14 Vha wana uri Mulayo we Muṋe washu a vha ṋea nga Mushe wo laya Vhaisraele uri vha dzule mishashani nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha Mishasha nga ṅwedzi wa 7. 
Nehemiah8:15 Vha ḓivhadza Jerusalema na kha miṅwe miḓi vha ri, “Ibvani ni ye mivhunduni ni reme matavhi a mipaini na miolivi na miṱhaḽa na mitshevho na miṅwe miri ni fhaṱe mishasha ni tshi tevhedza ndayo dzo ṅwalwaho kha Mulayo.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi yo dzhia matavhi vha fhaṱa mishasha kha ṱhanga dza nnḓu dzavho na miṱani yavho na miṱani ya thembele na tshikweani tsini ha Khoro ya Maḓi na tsini ha Khoro ya Efraimi. 
Nehemiah8:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani vha fhaṱa mishasha, vha dzula ngomu hayo. Ulwo lwo vha lu lwone lwa u thoma zwi tshi itiwa u bva misi ya Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu. Vho vha vho takala nga maanḓa." 
Nehemiah8:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe vho vhuyaho vhuthubwani vha fhaṱa mishasha, vha dzula ngomu hayo. Ulwo lwo vha lu lwone lwa u thoma zwi tshi itiwa u bva misi ya Joshua ṅwana wa Nunu. Vho vha vho takala nga maanḓa." 
Nehemiah8:18 Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe u bva ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ḽa vhuṱambo u swika ḓuvha ḽa u fhedzisela vho vhala tshipiḓa tsha Mulayo wa Mudzimu. Vha fhedza maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili vha tshi khou ita vhuṱambo, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru ha vha na khuvhangano ya u vala vhuṱambo, nga he zwa ṅwalwa kha Mulayo." 
Nehemiah9:1 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wonoyo, Vhaisraele vha kuvhangana, vha ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, vha ambara madzanganda, vha ḓishela buse ṱhohoni." 
Nehemiah9:2 Vhane vha vha Vhasiraele nga malofha vha si ṱangane na vhatsinda, vha ima fhethu havho, vha bula vhutshinyi havho na zwivhi zwa vhokhotsi avho." 
Nehemiah9:3 Vha vhalelwa Mulayo wa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho ha vhuya ha fhela awara dzine dza nga swika tharu, awara tharu dzi tevhelaho vha bula vhutshinyi havho, vha gwadamela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho." 
Nehemiah9:4 Ho vha hu na ḓingo ḽa Vhalivi, nṱha haḽo ha ima Jeshua na Bani na Kadamiele na Shebania na Buni na Sherebia na Bani na Khenani. Vha rabela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho vha tshi tou ṱavha mukosi." 
Nehemiah9:5 Vhalivi vhe vha ri vhathu vha luvhe ndi Jeshua na Kadamiele na Bani na Hashabania na Sherebia na Hodia na Shebania na Phethahia. Vha ri, “Takuwani ni rende Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu; mu rendeni lini na lini! Muṅwe na muṅwe nga a rende dzina ḽawe ḽa vhugala, naho thendo na zwikhoḓo zwa muthu zwi songo eḓana u mu renda.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi rabela vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe u woṱhe a re Muṋe washu; wo ita ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu na ṋaledzi dza lutomboni. Wo sika shango na lwanzhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo; zwoṱhe zwo fhiwa vhutshilo nga Iwe. Magogo a ṱaḓulu a a u gwadamela a u luvha." 
Nehemiah9:7 “Ndi Iwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wo nangaho Abramu, wa mu endedza u bva Uru kha ḽa Vhakhaladia, wa shandukisa dzina ḽawe ḽa pfi Abrahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Wa wana mbilu yawe i tshi fulufhedzea, wa vhofha mulanga nae. Wa fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo mu ṋea shango ḽa Vhakanana na ḽa Vhahithi na Vhaamori na ḽa Vhapherisi na Vhajebusi na Vhagirigashi, uri ḽi vhe shango ḽine ḽa ḓo dzula vhaḓuhulu vhawe. Wo ita zwe wa fulufhedzisa, ngauri u a fulufhedzea." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Wo vhona u tambula ha vhomakhulukuku washu Egipita; wa vha pfa vha tshi ṱavha mukosi Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga. 
Nehemiah9:10 Wo ita maḓembe a kanukisaho a vhaisa Farao na magota awe na vhathu vha shango ḽawe, ngauri wo vha u tshi zwi ḓivha uri vha kolela vhathu vhau. Zwenezwo wa vha na bvumo ḽine wa kha ḓi vha naḽo na ṋamusi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Wo vulela vhathu vhau nḓila lwanzheni, wa vha endedza vha wela vha tshi kanda ho omaho. Vhe vha vha pandamedza vha nwela khothe mativhani, zwa nga tombo ḽi tshi mbwandamela dzivhani ḽihulu." 
Nehemiah9:12 Masiari wa vha endedza nga gole, vhusiku nḓila yavho wa i vhonetshela nga mulilo." 
Nehemiah9:13 “Wa tsela thavhani ya Sinai u tshi bva makoleni, wa amba na vhathu vhau u ṱaḓulu, wa vha ṋea milayo yavhuḓi na pfunzo i pfalaho, na ndayo na ndaela mbuya." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wa vha funza uri Dzisabatha dzau vha dzi ite khethwa, wa swikisa milayo yau khavho nga muḓinḓa wau Mushe." 
Nehemiah9:15 Musi vho farwa nga nḓala, wa vha ṋea zwiḽiwa zwi bvaho ṱaḓulu, musi vho farwa nga ḓora wa vha ṋea maḓi a bvaho kha tombo. Wa vha vhudza uri vha dzhie shango ḽino ḽe wa vha fulufhedzisa nga muano uri u ḓo vha ṋea ḽone." 
Nehemiah9:16 Hone vhomakhulukuku washu vha ḓihudza, vha ita tshipimbi vha hana u tevhedza ndayo dzau." 
Nehemiah9:17 A vho ngo thetshelesa, zwoṱhe zwe wa ita a vho ngo zwi humbula, vho hangwa maḓembe e wa ita, vha ita tshipimbi vha tou khwaṱhisa vha ri vha ḓo humela vhupulini Egipita. Hone Iwe u Mudzimu ane a hangwela, u na khathutshelo, u na tshilidzi, a u fheli mbilu. Lufuno lwau a la gumi, ndi luhulu, a wo ngo vha laṱa." 
Nehemiah9:18 Vho vhumba tshifanyiso tsha mboho, vha ri ndi tshone mudzimu we wa vha pfulusa Egipita! Muṋe washu, vho u nyefula hani!" 
Nehemiah9:19 Hone Iwe a wo ngo vha ṱutshela henefho phangani, ngauri khathutshelo yau ndi khulu. A wo ngo ṱusa gole kana mulilo zwe zwa vha sumbedza nḓila vhusiku na masiari." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wa vha ṋea Muya wau wa vhuthu uri a vha funze, wa ḓi vha fusha nga mana, wa vha ṋea maḓi a u nwa." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wa vha ṋea zwoṱhe zwine vha zwi lila miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa vhe phangani; zwiambaro zwavho a zwo ngo vhuya zwa ṱahala, na milenzhe yavho ya si vhuye ya zwimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Wo ita uri vha kunde tshakha na mivhuso, mashango e vha ṋekana masakha nao. Vha kunda shango ḽa Hesheboni, he ha vha hu tshi vhusa Sihoni, na shango ḽa Bashani, he Ogo a vha e khosi." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wa vha ṋea vhana vha anda vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni, wa ita uri vha kunde vha dzule afho shangoni ḽe wa fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku wavho uri u ḓo vha ṋea ḽone." 
Nehemiah9:24 Vhana vhavho vha dzhia shango ḽa Kanana, Iwe wa kunda vhathu vha dzulaho henefho, wa ṋea vhathu vhau maanḓa a u ita zwine vha funa nga vhathu na mahosi a Kanana." 
Nehemiah9:25 Vhathu vhau vho thuba miḓi yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo, na masimu o vhibvelaho na nnḓu dzo ḓalaho lupfumo na bidzi dzo dzulaho dzo bwiwa, na masimu a minḓirivhe na miri ya miolivi na ya mitshelo. Vha ḽa zwe vha tou zwi tama, vha khwaṱha; vha ḓiphiṋa nga zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe wa vha ṋea." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Hone vhathu vhau vho u shandukela, vha u nyadza; vha landula Mulayo wau. Vha ita na u vhulaha vhaporofita vhe vha vha kaidza, vhe vha vha vhudza uri vha humele ha Iwe. Vha u nyefula vha dovha," 
Nehemiah9:27 ndi zwe wa litsha vha tshi kundwa nga maswina vha vha vhusa. Musi vhe khomboni vha ḓi ṱavha mukosi uri u vha farise, Iwe wa ḓi vha pfa u ṱaḓulu, wa vha khathutshela zwihulu wa ruma vhalamuleli vha vha lamukisa kha maswina avho." 
Nehemiah9:28 Hone musi ḽo no lala, vha ḓi dovha vha tshinya, Iwe wa ḓi dovha wa litsha maswina avho a tshi vha kunda. Musi vho laṱa vha u humbela uri u vha tshidze, wa ḓi zwi pfa u ṱaḓulu, wa vha itela tshilidzi tshihulu, wa ḓi vha lamukisa wa dovha." 
Nehemiah9:29 Wa ḓi vha laya uri vha tevhedze pfunzo dzau, hone vha ḓi u kolela vha landula milayo yau, vha pfuka ndaela dzau dzine arali muthu a dzi tevhedza a tshila; vha ita tshikhuna na tshipimbi, vha hana u thetshelesa." 
Nehemiah9:30 Wa ḓi vha laya u sa fheli mbilu, miṅwaha i tshi ṱanḓulukana. Wa dzhenisa Muya wau kha vhaporofita vhau uri vha kaidze, hone vhathu vhau vha konyolela matanda nḓevheni, ndi hone u tshi vha litsha uri vha kundwe nga dziṅwe tshakha." 
Nehemiah9:31 Naho zwo ralo, nga khathutshelo yau khulu, a wo ngo vha laṱa kana wa vha lozwa tshoṱhe. U Mudzimu wa tshilidzi na khathutshelo!" 
Nehemiah9:32 “Yawee Mudzimu, Mudzimu washu, wo hula hani! U ofhisa hani, maanḓa au ndi mangafhani! U a fulufhedzea, zwe wa fulufhedzisa u tshi vhofha mulanga, u a zwi ita. U bva tshee mahosi a Vhaashuru a ri kandeledza, u swika na zwino, ro tambula hani! Mahosi ashu na vharangaphanḓa vhashu na vhotshifhe vhashu na vhaporofita na vhomakhulukuku washu na vhathu vhau vhoṱhe vho tambula. Elelwa uri ro tambula zwingafhani, u songo vhona zwi si tshithu!" 
Nehemiah9:33 U tshi ri rwa nga ṱhamu wo ita zwone; wo vha u tshi ḓi fulufhedzea, naho riṋe ro tshinya." 
Nehemiah9:34 Vhomakhulukuku washu na mahosi ashu na vharangaphanḓa na vhotshifhe a vho ngo vhulunga Mulayo wau. A vho ngo thetshelesa ndayo dzau u tshi vha laya. 
Nehemiah9:35 Na zwiḽa vho wana muvhuso, vha tshi ḓiphiṋa nga vhuthu hau vhuhulu he wa vha itela shangoni ḽo aṱamaho ḽa manona ḽe wa vha ṋea ḽone, a vho ngo u shumela kana vha ṱutshela nḓila dzavho mmbi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Hone zwino ri dziphuli shangoni ḽe wa ri ṋea ḽone, shango heḽino ḽo vhibvelaho ḽine ḽa ri ṋea zwiḽiwa." 
Nehemiah9:37 Zwine shango ḽa bveledza zwi dzhiwa nga mahosi vhe wa ita uri vha ri vhuse nge ra tshinya. Vha ita zwine vha funa nga riṋe na kholomo dzashu, ri khomboni khulu!" 
Nehemiah9:38 “Nga zwenezwo zwoṱhe zwo bvelelaho, riṋe Vhaisraele, ri vhofha mulanga wo khwaṱhaho ra tou u ṅwala, vharangaphanḓa vhashu na Vhalivi vhashu na vhotshifhe vhashu vha vhea luswayo lwavho khayo.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 We a thoma u saina ndi muvhusi Nehemia ṅwana wa Hakhalia, ha konou saina Tsedekia. Vhaṅwe vhe vha saina ndi:" 
Nehemiah10:2 Vhotshifhe: Seraya na Azaria na Jeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 na Phashuru na Amaria na Malikhiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 na Hatushi na Shebania na Malukhu," 
Nehemiah10:5 na Harimu na Miremotho na Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 na Daniele na Ginithoni na Barukhu," 
Nehemiah10:6 na Daniele na Ginithoni na Barukhu," 
Nehemiah10:7 na Mishulamu na Abia na Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 na Maasia na Biligai na Shemaya. 
Nehemiah10:9 Vhalivi: Jeshua ṅwana wa Azania na Binui wa mutupo wa Headaba na Kadamiele 
Nehemiah10:10 na khonani dzavho: Shebania na Hodia na Kelitha na Phelaya na Hanani 
Nehemiah10:11 na Mika na Rehobo na Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 na Zakhuru na Sherebia na Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 na Hodia na Bani na Beninu. 
Nehemiah10:14 Vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu: Pharoshi na Phahathi Muaba na Elamu na Zathu na Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 na Buni na Asigadi na Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 na Adonia na Bigivai na Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 na Atere na Hiskia na Azuru," 
Nehemiah10:18 na Hodia na Hashumi na Betsai," 
Nehemiah10:19 na Harifi na Anathotho na Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 na Magapiashi na Mishulamu na Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 na Meshesabele na Tsadoko na Jadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 na Phelatia na Hanani na Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 na Hoshia na Hanania na Hashubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 na Haloheshe na Philiha na Shobeke," 
Nehemiah10:25 na Rehumi na Hashabana na Maaseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 na Ahia na Hanani na Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 na Malukhu na Harimu na Baana. 
Nehemiah10:28 “Riṋe Vhaisraele na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vhalindakhoro na vhaimbi na vhashumi vha thembeleni na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vhane vha thetshelesa Mulayo wa Mudzimu vha ḓikhetha kha vhatsinda vha dzulaho shangoni ḽashu, riṋe, khathihi na vhasadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu vhoṱhe vho no thanyaho lune vha nga vha na ṱhalukanyo," 
Nehemiah10:29 ri ḓibaḓekanya na vharangaphanḓa vhashu ra ana muano, une arali ra u pfuka ri teketelwe zwashu. Ri ri ri ḓo tshila ri tshi tevhedza Mulayo wa Mudzimu, we Mudzimu a u swikisa ha riṋe nga Mushe muḓinḓa wawe; ri ri ri ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine Yahavee Muṋe washu a ri laya; nahone ri ri ri ḓo vhulunga ndayo dzoṱhe na zwi ṱoḓeaho." 
Nehemiah10:30 “Riṋe a ri nga dzetshelani na vhatsinda vha no dzula shangoni ḽashu. 
Nehemiah10:31 “Arali vhatsinda vha ḓisa mavhele kana tshiṅwe-vho vha tshi ri vha ri rengisele nga Sabatha kana nga ḽiṅwe ḓuvha ḽikhethwa, a ri nga rengi khavho. “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili a ri nga limi masimu, na milandu i a thuthiwa." 
Nehemiah10:32 “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe roṱhe ri ḓo bvisa giramu ṱhanu dza siliva u farisa u lifha tshinyalelo ya thembele ya Mudzimu washu. 
Nehemiah10:33 Zwa nduvho ya thembele ri ḓo bvisa hezwino: vhurotho ha u sumela Mudzimu na nduvho dza thoro dza misi yoṱhe na zwifuwo zwine zwa fanela u fhiswa misi yoṱhe zwa ṋekedzwa, na zwa nduvho khethwa dza Dzisabatha na zwa vhuṱambo ha Ṅwedzi Muswa na zwa vhuṅwe vhuṱambo na dziṅwe nduvho khethwa na nduvho dza u pfumelela Israele na zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṱoḓea thembeleni ya Mudzimu washu." 
Nehemiah10:34 “Riṋe na vhathu na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi ri ḓo ita madeṅwa ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe u vhona uri ndi vha mutupo ufhio vhane vha fanela u ḓisa khuni dza u fhisa zwiṱhavhelo zwine zwa ṋekedzwa Mudzimu Muṋe washu, hu tshi tevhedzwa zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni." 
Nehemiah10:35 “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ri ḓo dzhia nduvho ya mavhele ane ra ranga u a kaṋa na mitshelo ya zwiranzhe ine ya ranga u vhibva mirini yashu, ra isa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
Nehemiah10:36 Tanzhe ḽa muṅwe na muṅwe washu ḽa mutuka ḽine ḽa bebwa ri ḓo ḽi isa ha vhotshifhe thembeleni, henefho ri ḓo mu ṋekedza Mudzimu, ri tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni. Ra dovha ra ṋekedza na ṋamana ine ya ranga u dzwaliwa nga kholomo iṅwe na iṅwe yashu, na ngwana ya u ranga kana mbudzana ya u ranga." 
Nehemiah10:37 “Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe ri ḓo dzhia bwindi ḽa zwiḽiwa zwa u thoma zwe ra kaṋa ra isa ha vhotshifhe thembeleni ya Mudzimu washu khathihi na dziṅwe nduvho dzashu dza waini na mapfura a muolivi na tshakha dzoṱhe dza mitshelo. “Vhalivi ri ḓo vha isela tshafumi tsha zwine ra lima masimuni ashu, ngauri Vhalivi ndi vhone vhane vha bviselwa tshafumi miḓanani yoṱhe hune ha limiwa." 
Nehemiah10:38 Vhotshifhe vhane vha vha vha lutsinga lwa Aroni vho fanela u vha vhe na Vhalivi musi hu tshi bviswa tshafumi, Vhalivi vho fanela u dzhia tshafumi kha zwafumi zwoṱhe zwe zwa bvisiwa, tshi tshi dzhiwa kha tshisiku tsha thembele, tshi shumiswe thembeleni ya Mudzimu washu." 
Nehemiah10:39 Vhathu vha Israele na Vhalivi vho fanela u dzhia zwe zwa bviswa zwa mavhele na waini na mapfura a muolivi vha zwi ise zwisikuni hune ha vhulungwa midzio ya thembele, hune vhotshifhe vha re mushumoni na vhalindakhoro na vhaimbi vha dzula hone. “Riṋe a ri nga ṅaledzi nnḓu ya Muṋe washu.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Vharangaphanḓa vho dzula Jerusalema, vhathu vhaṅwe vha ita madeṅwa vha nanga muṱa muthihi kha fumi muthihi kha fumi uri vha ṱuwe vha yo dzula Jerusalema, muḓini mukhethwa, vhaṅwe vha ya vha dzula miḓini miṅwe." 
Nehemiah11:2 Vhathu vha khoḓa vhenevho vhe vha tou funa u yo dzula Jerusalema. 
Nehemiah11:3 Vhathu vhaṅwe vha Israele na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi na vha no shuma thembeleni na vha lutsinga lwa vhashumi vha Solomoni vho tou dzula fhethu havho miḓini ya havho. 
Nehemiah11:4 Mutevhe wa madzina a vhadzulapo vha vhaḓivhalea vha dzingu ḽa Juda vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema ngouno: Vha tsinde ḽa Juda: Athaya ṅwana wa Uzia, ṅwana wa Zakaria. Vhaṅwe vhomakhulukuku wawe vha angaredza na Amaria na Shefatia na Mahalalele, vha lutsinga lwa Pheretse ṅwana wa Juda." 
Nehemiah11:5 Muṅwe ndi Maaseya ṅwana wa Barukhu ṅwana wa Kholohose. Vhaṅwe vhomakhulukuku wawe vha angaredza na Hazaya na Adaya na Joyaribi na Zakaria, vha lutsinga lwa Shela ṅwana wa Juda." 
Nehemiah11:6 Kha vha lutsinga lwa Pheretse, ho vha hu na vhanna vha 468 vha vhaḓivhalea vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema." 
Nehemiah11:7 Vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini: Salu ṅwana wa Mishulamu, ṅwana wa Joede. Vhaṅwe vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vha tshi angaredza na Phedaya na Kolaya na Maaseya na Ithiele na Jeshaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Vhaṅwe ndi Gabai na Salai. Vha Benyamini vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema vho ṱangana vhoṱhe vho vha vhe 928. 
Nehemiah11:9 Murangaphanḓa wavho o vha e Juele ṅwana wa Zikhiri, tshanḓa tshawe afho muḓini o vha e Juda ṅwana wa Hasenua." 
Nehemiah11:10 Vhotshifhe: Jedaya ṅwana wa Joyaribi, na Jakhini," 
Nehemiah11:11 na Seraya ṅwana wa Hilikia, ṅwana wa Mishulamu. Vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vha tshi angaredza na Tsadoko na Mirayotho na Ahitubu, we a vha e tshifhe muhulu." 
Nehemiah11:12 Vha mutupo wonoyo vhe vha vha vha tshi shuma thembeleni vhó ṱangana vhoṱhe vho vha vhe 822. Muṅwe ndi Adaya ṅwana wa Jerohamu, ṅwana wa Phelalia. Vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vha tshi angaredza na Amitsi na Zakaria na Phashuru na Malikhiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 Vha mutupo uyo vhe vha vha vhe vhaṋe vha miṱa vhoṱhe vhó ṱangana vho vha vhe 242. Muṅwe ndi Amasai ṅwana wa Azariele, ṅwana wa Ahasai. Vhomakhulukuku wawe vha angaredza na Meshilemotho na Imere." 
Nehemiah11:14 Ho vha hu na vha 128 vha mutupo uyo vhe vha vha vhe vhanna vha vhaḓivhalea. Murangaphanḓa wavho o vha e Zabudiele, wa muṱa wa vhaḓivhalea." 
Nehemiah11:15 Vhalivi: Shemaya ṅwana wa Hashubu, ṅwana wa Asrikamu. Vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vha tshi angaredza na Hashabia na Buni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Vhaṅwe ndi Shabithai na Jozabadi, Vhalivi vha vhaḓivhalea; vho vha vhe vhalangi vha mushumo nnḓa ha thembele." 
Nehemiah11:17 Muṅwe ndi Mathania ṅwana wa Mika, ṅwana wa Zabudi, wa lutsinga lwa Asafu. O vha e ene malogwane wa vhaimbi vha thembeleni vha tshi imba luimbo lwa ndivhuho. Tshanḓa tsha Mathania o vhe e Bakabukia. Muṅwe ndi Abida ṅwana wa Shamua, ṅwana wa Galali. O vha e wa lutsinga lwa Jeduthuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Vhalivi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula muḓini mukhethwa vhoṱhe vhó ṱangana vho vha vhe 284. 
Nehemiah11:19 Vhalindi vha thembele: Akubu na Talamoni na mashaka avho vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 172. 
Nehemiah11:20 Vhaṅwe Vhaisraele na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vho vha vha tshi dzula fhethu ho kovhelwaho vhomakhulukuku wavho miḓini miṅwe ya Juda. 
Nehemiah11:21 Vhashumi vha thembeleni vho vha vha tshi dzula kha tshiṅwe tshipiḓa tsha Jerusalema tshi no pfi Ofele, vha tshi shuma vha tshi langiwa nga Tsiha na Gishipa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Mulangi wa Vhalivi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema o vha e Uzi, ṅwana wa Bani, ṅwana wa Hashabia. Vhaṅwe vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vhe Mathania na Mika, vha mutupo wa Asafu, ndi vhone vhaimbi vhe vha vha vha tshi imba thabeloni dza thembeleni." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ho vha hu na ndaela dza musanda dzi no sumbedza madiso a vhaimbi misi yoṱhe thembeleni. 
Nehemiah11:24 Phethahia ṅwana wa Mishesabele, wa mutupo wa Zera, wa tsinde ḽa Juda, ndi ene we a vha o imela Vhaisraele khoroni ya Pheresia." 
Nehemiah11:25 Vhathu vhanzhi vho vha vha tshi dzula miḓanani tsini ha mikovhe yavho ya mashango. Vha tsinde ḽa Juda vho vha vha tshi dzula Kiriathi Araba na Diboni na Jekabutsiele na miḓanani i re tsini ha miḓi yeneyo. 
Nehemiah11:26 Vha dzula na miḓini ya Jeshua na Mulada na Bethe Phelete 
Nehemiah11:27 na Hatsara Shuala na Bierisheba na miḓanani i re tsini hawo," 
Nehemiah11:28 na Tsikilaga, na Mikhona na miḓanani yawo," 
Nehemiah11:29 na Eni Rimoni na Tsora na Jaramuthu," 
Nehemiah11:30 na Zanua na Adulamu na miḓanani i re tsini ha miḓi yeneyo, na Lakhishi na mikovheni ya mashango henefho tsini, na Azeka na miḓanani yawo. Ndi u ri, vhathu vha Juda vho vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽi re vhukati ha Bierisheba thungo ya tshipembe na Govha ḽa Hinomu thungo ya devhula." 
Nehemiah11:31 Vhathu vha tsinde ḽa Benyamini vho vha vha tshi dzula Geba na Mikhimashi na Aya na Bethele na miḓanani i re henefho tsini," 
Nehemiah11:32 na Anathotho na Nobo na Anania 
Nehemiah11:33 na Hatsoro na Rama na Githaimi," 
Nehemiah11:34 na Hadidi na Tseboimi na Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 na Lodo na Ono na Govhani ḽa Vhatsila. 
Nehemiah11:36 Zwiṅwe zwigwada zwa Vhalivi vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽa Juda vho pfi vha dzule na vhathu vha Benyamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Mutevhe wa vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vho vhuyaho vha tshi bva vhuthubwani vhe na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na tshifhe muhulu Joshua ndi: Vhotshifhe: Seraya na Jeremia na Esra 
Nehemiah12:1 Mutevhe wa vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vho vhuyaho vha tshi bva vhuthubwani vhe na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na tshifhe muhulu Joshua ndi: Vhotshifhe: Seraya na Jeremia na Esra 
Nehemiah12:2 na Amaria na Malukhu na Hatushi 
Nehemiah12:3 na Shekhania na Rehumi na Miremotho 
Nehemiah12:4 na Ido na Ginethoi na Abia 
Nehemiah12:5 na Miyamini na Maadia na Biliga 
Nehemiah12:6 na Shemaya na Joyaribi na Jedaya 
Nehemiah12:7 na Salu na Amoko na Hilikia na Jedaya. Havho vhanna vho vha vhe vhone vharangaphanḓa vha vhotshifhe, na vhashumisani navho misi ya Joshua." 
Nehemiah12:7 na Salu na Amoko na Hilikia na Jedaya. Havho vhanna vho vha vhe vhone vharangaphanḓa vha vhotshifhe, na vhashumisani navho misi ya Joshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Vhalivi: Vhe vha vha vha tshi sima nyimbo dza ndivhuho ndi: Jeshua na Binui na Kadamiele na Sherebia na Juda na Mathania. 
Nehemiah12:9 Vhe vha vhumba tshigwada tsha vhaimbi vhane vha imba dzimvumiso: Bakabuku na Uni na Vhalivi vha havho. 
Nehemiah12:10 Joshua o vha khotsi a Joyakimu, Joyakimu a vha khotsi a Eliashibi, Eliashibi a vha khotsi a Joyada," 
Nehemiah12:10 Joshua o vha khotsi a Joyakimu, Joyakimu a vha khotsi a Eliashibi, Eliashibi a vha khotsi a Joyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyada a vha khotsi a Jonathani, Jonathani a vha khotsi a Jadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Musi Joyakimu e tshifhe muhulu, vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vhe ṱhoho dza mitupo ya vhotshifhe ndi: Seraya Meraya Jeremia Hanania" 
Nehemiah12:13 Esra Mishulamu Amaria Jehohanani 
Nehemiah12:14 Malukhi Jonathani Shebania Josefa 
Nehemiah12:15 Harimu Adina Miremotho Helekai 
Nehemiah12:16 Ido Zakaria Ginethoni Mishulamu 
Nehemiah12:17 Abia Zikhiri Miniamini na Muadia Philatai 
Nehemiah12:18 Biliga Shamua Shemaya Jehonathani 
Nehemiah12:19 Joyaribi Mathenai Jedaya Uzi 
Nehemiah12:20 Salu Kalai Amoko Ebere 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilikia Hashabia Jedaya Nathaniele 
Nehemiah12:22 Misi ya vhotshifhe vhahulu Eliashibi na Joyada na Jonathani na Jadua ho ṅwalwa mutevhe wa ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhalivi, misi ya Dariosi khosi ya Pheresia ha ṅwalwa mutevhe wa ṱhoho dza miṱa ya vhotshifhe." 
Nehemiah12:23 Hone ṱhoho dza miṱa ya Vhalivi dzo vha dzo ṅwalwa kha maṅwalo a muvhuso u swika fhedzi nga tshifhinga tsha Jonathani muḓuhulu wa Eliashibi. 
Nehemiah12:24 Vhalivi vho vha vho vhekanywa nga zwigwada vha tshi langiwa nga Hashabia na Sherebia na Jeshua na Binui na Kadamiele. Ho vha hu na zwigwada zwivhili zwe zwa renda Mudzimu nga tshifhinga tshithihi zwi tshi bvumelana, vha tshi mu livhuha, vha tshi tevhedza ndayo i no bva ha khosi Dafita muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu." 
Nehemiah12:25 Vhe vha bvumelana na avho ndi Mathania na Bakabukia na Obadia. Vhalindi vha thembele vhe vha vha vha tshi linda nnḓu dza u vhulungela thundu dzi re tsini ha khoro dza thembele ndi: Mishulamu na Talamoni na Akubu. 
Nehemiah12:26 Vhathu avho ndi vha misi ya Joyakimu, ṅwana wa Joshua, ṅwana wa Jotsadaka, na ya muvhusi Nehemia, na ya tshifhe Esra muḓivhi wa Mulayo." 
Nehemiah12:26 Vhathu avho ndi vha misi ya Joyakimu, ṅwana wa Joshua, ṅwana wa Jotsadaka, na ya muvhusi Nehemia, na ya tshifhe Esra muḓivhi wa Mulayo." 
Nehemiah12:27 Musi mutsheṱo wa muḓi wa Jerusalema u tshi kumedzwa Mudzimu, Vhalivi vha rambiwa vha tshi bva mahayani avho, uri na vhone vha vhe hone vhuṱamboni honoho vha imbe nyimbo dza u livhuha vha lidze mirumba na haripa na mbila." 
Nehemiah12:28 Ha kuvhangana vhaimbi vha Vhalivi vha tshi bva mahayani avho u mona na Jerusalema na miḓanani u mona na Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 na Bethe Giligala na Geba na Asimavethe. 
Nehemiah12:30 Vhotshifhe na Vhalivi vha ḓikumulula vha kumulula na lushaka na dzikhoro na mutsheṱo wa muḓi. 
Nehemiah12:31 Nṋe nda kuvhanganya vharangaphanḓa vha Juda nṱha ha mutsheṱo, nda ri vha lange zwigwada zwivhili zwihulu uri zwi mone na muḓi, zwi tshi khou livhuha Mudzimu. Tshigwada tsha u ranga tsha livha thungo ya tshauḽa nṱha ha mutsheṱo u ela Khoroni ya Vhutoko." 
Nehemiah12:32 Murahu ha vhaimbi ha tshimbila Hoshaya, a tevhelwa nga hafu ya vharangaphanḓa vha Juda." 
Nehemiah12:33 Vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou tevhela vhenevho vha tshi khou lidza dziphalaphala ndi Azaria na Esra na Mishulamu 
Nehemiah12:34 na Juda na Benyamini na Shemaya na Jeremia. 
Nehemiah12:35 Ha tevhela Zakaria, ṅwana wa Jonathani, ṅwana wa Shemaya. (Vhomakhulukuku wawe vho vha vha tshi angaredza na Mathania na Mikaya na Zakhuru, wa mutupo wa Asafu.)" 
Nehemiah12:36 Ene a tevhelwa nga vhaṅwe vha mutupo wa hawe, ndi Shemaya na Azariele na Milalai na Gilalai na Maai na Nathaniele na Juda na Hanani, vhoṱhe vhó fara zwilidzo zwi no fana na zwe zwa vha zwi tshi lidzwa nga khosi Dafita muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu. Esra muḓivhi wa Mulayo, ene a ranga vhathu avho phanḓa vha rwa muduba vha tshimbila." 
Nehemiah12:37 Vha tshi swika Khoroni ya Tshisima vha gonya zwiṱepisi zwi no livha Muḓini wa Dafita zwi tshi fhira pfamo ya Dafita zwa humela mutsheṱoni Khoroni ya Maḓi, thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha ha muḓi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Tshiṅwe tshigwada tsha vharendi tsha livha thungo ya tshamonde tsha tshimbila nṱha ha mutsheṱo, nṋe nda tevhela ndi na hafu ya vhathu. Ra tshimbila ra fhira Thawara ya Dziṋanḓo ra livha Mutsheṱoni Mudenya," 
Nehemiah12:39 u bva henefho ra tshimbila ra fhira Khoro ya Efraimi na Khoro ya Jeshana na Khoro ya Khovhe na Thawara ya Hananele na Thawara ya Vhaḓana ra livha Khoroni ya Nngu. Lwendo lwashu lwa guma tsini ha khoro ya thembele. 
Nehemiah12:40 Vhuvhili ha zwigwada zwe zwa vha zwi tshi khou renda Mudzimu zwa swika thembeleni. Kha avho vharangaphanḓa vhe vha vha vhe na nṋe," 
Nehemiah12:41 tshigwada tshanga tsho vha tshi na vhotshifhe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou lidza dziphalaphala. Ndi Eliakimu na Maaseya na Miniamini na Mikaya na Elihwenai na Zakaria na Hanania; 
Nehemiah12:42 vhone vha tevhelwa nga Maaseya na Shemaya na Eliasara na Uzi na Johanani na Malikhiya na Elamu na Ezere. Vhaimbi vha rangwa phanḓa nga Jeserahia, vha tou imbela nṱha." 
Nehemiah12:43 Musi wonoyo ho ṋekedzwa zwiṱhavhelo zwinzhi, vhathu vhó takala zwihulu nge Mudzimu a vha takadza. Vhasadzi na vhana na vhone vho vha vhe hone afho vhuṱamboni, mukosi we vha u ṱavha wa pfala kule-kule." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tshifhinga tshenetsho ha vhewa vhanna uri vha linde nnḓu dza mbulungelo, he ha vha hu tshi vhewa zwo bviselwaho thembele, khathihi na tshafumi na mavhele a u ranga na mitshelo ine ya vhibva ṅwaha nga ṅwaha. Havho vhanna vho vha vha tshi kuvhanganya zwo liṅwaho tsini ha miḓi yo fhambanaho zwi bviselwaho vhotshifhe na Vhalivi zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vho vha vha tshi takalela vhotshifhe na Vhalivi," 
Nehemiah12:45 nge vha vha vha tshi tevhedza maitele a u kumulula vhathu na maṅwe maitele e Mudzimu a laya. Vhaimbi vha thembeleni na vhalindathembele na vhone vha shuma vha tshi tevhedza ndayo dzo vhewaho nga khosi Dafita na ṅwana wawe Solomoni. 
Nehemiah12:46 U bva misi ya khosi Dafita na muimbi Asafu kale-kale, vhaimbi vho vha vha tshi ḓi imba nyimbo dza u livhuha Mudzimu." 
Nehemiah12:47 Misi ya Zerubabele na misi ya Nehemia vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vho vha vha tshi bvisa dzimpho misi yoṱhe dza u tikedza vhaimbi vha thembeleni na vhalindathembele. Vhathu vho vha vha tshi ṋea Vhalivi nduvho khethwa, Vhalivi vhone vha tshi ḓi ṋea na vhotshifhe mukovhe wavho." 
Nehemiah13:1 Musi Mulayo wa Mushe u tshi vhalelwa vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi thetshelesa, vha swika kha kupiḓa kuḽa kune kwa ri Muamoni kana Mumuaba ho ngo tendelwa u ḓibaḓekanya na vhathu vha Mudzimu." 
Nehemiah13:2 Izwo zwo pfalwo nge vhathu vha Amoni na Muaba vha dzima Vhaisraele zwiḽiwa na maḓi zwiḽa vhe lwendoni vha tshi bva Egipita, vha vhuya vha renga Biliamu uri a teketele Vhaisraele. Mudzimu washu o tou shandukisa uho u teketelwa ha vha mashudu." 
Nehemiah13:3 Musi Vhaisraele vha tshi pfa uyo mulayo u tshi vhaliwa, vha pandela vhatsinda vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi dzula navho." 
Nehemiah13:4 Tshifhe Eliashibi, we a vha e ene mulangi wa nnḓu dza u vhulungela thundu thembeleni ya Mudzimu washu, o vha e shaka ḽa Tobia." 
Nehemiah13:5 O vha o tendela Tobia a tshi dzula kamarani khulu ye ya vha i ya u vhulunga nduvho dza mavhele fhedzi na zwioro na thundu dzi shumiswaho thembeleni na nduvho dza vhotshifhe na tshafumi tsha mavhele na waini na mapfura a muolivi ane a ṋewa Vhalivi na vhaimbi vha thembeleni na vhalindathembele. 
Nehemiah13:6 O mu tendela nṋe ndi siho Jerusalema, ngauri nga ṅwaha wa 32 Arithakhesese e khosi ya Babele ndo vha ndo humela khae. Ngavhuya nda wana thendelo yawe," 
Nehemiah13:7 nda vhuelela Jerusalema. Ndi tshi swika hone nda vhona vhuvhi ha Eliashibi a tshi tendela Tobia uri a dzule kamarani ya thembele. 
Nehemiah13:8 Nda vhilaela nga maanḓa nda dzhia thundu dzoṱhe dza Tobia nda dzi posa nnḓa. 
Nehemiah13:9 Nda ṋea ndaela ya uri kamara dzi kumululwe hu tshi tevhedzwa maitele azwo, nda ri thundu ya thembele na nduvho dza thoro na zwioro zwi vhuedzedzwe vhudzuloni hazwo." 
Nehemiah13:10 Nda pfa upfi na vhaimbi vha thembeleni na vhaṅwe Vhalivi vho pfuluwa Jerusalema vha vhuelela masimuni avho, nge vhathu vha vha vha sa tsha vha bvisela mikovhe yavho." 
Nehemiah13:11 Nda kaidza vhakoma nge vha litsha thembele i tshi ṅaledziwa. Nda ya nda dzhia Vhalivi na vhaimbi nda vha vhuedzedza mishumoni yavho. 
Nehemiah13:12 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vha tshi dovha u ḓisa tshafumi tshavho tsha mavhele na waini na mapfura a muolivi nḓuni dza u vhulungela thundu thembeleni. 
Nehemiah13:13 Nda vhea vhaṅwe vhanna uri vha lange nnḓu dza u vhulungela thundu; ndi tshifhe Shelemia na Tsadoko muḓivhi wa Mulayo na Phedaya ane a vha Mulivi; Hanani, ṅwana wa Zakhuru ṅwana wa Mathania a vha tshanḓa tshavho. Ndo vha ndi tshi ḓivha uri avho vhanna vha a fulufhedzea, vha ḓo kovhela vhashumi vha havho mikovhe yavho." 
Nehemiah13:14 Mudzimu wanga, elelwa zwithu hezwo, u songo hangwa zwe nda itela thembele yau na nduvho dzayo." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nda vhona vhathu Juda, vha tshi khou fhonḓa nḓirivhe nga Sabatha, vhaṅwe vha tshi khou hwesa donngi dzavho mavhele na waini na nḓirivhe na mahuyu na zwiṅwe zwithu vha tshi zwi isa Jerusalema. Nṋe nda vha kaidza nda ri vha songo rengisa zwiḽiwa nga Sabatha." 
Nehemiah13:16 Vhaṅwe vhanna vha no bva muḓini wa Tiro vho vha vha tshi dzula Jerusalema, vha ḓisa khovhe na dziṅwe thundu dza tshakha-tshakha afho muḓini uri vha dzi rengisele vhathu vha hashu nga Sabatha." 
Nehemiah13:17 Nṋe nda kaidza vharangaphanḓa vha Majuda nda ri, “Edzonu vhona vhuvhi vhune na ita! Ni khou ita uri Sabatha i si tsha vha khethwa." 
Nehemiah13:18 A si zwenezwo zwe zwa ita uri Mudzimu washu a rwe vhomakhulukuku waṋu na uyu muḓi wa vhuya wa phusukanywa? Naho zwo ralo inwi ni ḓi futelela uri Mudzimu a sinyutshele Vhaisraele nga u kumadza Sabatha.” 
Nehemiah13:19 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi ri khoro dza muḓi dzi ḓi hoṋiwa nga ḽavhuṱanu ḽi tshi mbwanda, dza vulwa Sabatha i tshi fhela. Nda vhea vhaṅwe vhanna vhane nda vha langa uri vha linde dzikhoro uri hu si vhe na tshine tsha dzheniswa afho muḓini nga Sabatha." 
Nehemiah13:20 Vhashavhi vhe vha vha vha tshi rengisa tshakha dzoṱhe dza thundu vha vho ri vha lala nnḓa ha mitsheṱo ya muḓi vhusiku hoṱhe nga ḽavhuṱanu, vha zwi ita luthihi kana luvhili." 
Nehemiah13:21 Nda vha kaidza nda ri, “Ni itelani ni tshi lala henefha nnḓa ha mutsheṱo? Ná dovha ndi ḓo ni halifhela.” U bva zwenezwo vha si tsha dovha vha ḓa nga Sabatha." 
Nehemiah13:22 Nda vhudza Vhalivi uri vha ḓikumulule, vha ṱuwe vha yo linda dzikhoro uri Sabatha i itwe khethwa. Mudzimu wanga, nnyelelwe na nga zwenezwi-vho, u nkhathutshele ngauri u na lufuno luhulu!" 
Nehemiah13:23 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nda wana uri vhanna vha na tshivhalo vha Majuda vho dzea vhasadzi vha no bva Ashidodo na Amoni na Muaba. 
Nehemiah13:24 Hafu ya vhana vhavho vho vha vha tshi amba luambo lwa Ashidodo kana luambo lwa luṅwe lushaka, vha sa koni u amba Tshijuda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Nda kaidza avho vhanna, nda vha teketela, vhaṅwe nda tou vha rwa nda vha tupula na mavhudzi. Nda ita uri vha ane nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu uri vhone kana vhana vhavho a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha dzetshelana na vhatsinda." 
Nehemiah13:26 Nda ri, “Vho wedzaho khosi Solomoni tshivhini a si vhasadzi vha vhatsinda naa? Solomoni o vha e munna muhulu a tshi fhira mahosi oṱhe a dziṅwe tshakha. Mudzimu o vha a tshi mu funa, a mu vhumba khosi ya Israele, naho zwo ralo vhasadzi vha vhatsinda vho mu wedza kha vhutshinyi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Zwino ri vho pfa na inwi ni tshi ita vhuvhi honoho vhungafho, na shandukela Mudzimu washu nga u dzea vhasadzi vha vhatsinda?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Joyada o vha e ṅwana wa tshifhe muhulu Eliashibi, hone ṅwana wa Joyada a dzea ṅwananyana wa Sanibalati, wa Bethe Horoni, ndi zwe nda thatha Joyada Jerusalema." 
Nehemiah13:29 Mudzimu wanga, elelwa zwe avho vha kumadza vhutshifhe na mulanga we wa u vhofha na vhotshifhe na Vhalivi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ngauralo ndo kumulula vhotshifhe na Vhalivi uri hu bve zwoṱhe zwisili, nda vha ṋea mishumo, muṅwe na muṅwe a dzhena mushumoni wawe." 
Nehemiah13:31 Nda dzudzanya uri hu reḓwe khuni dza u honza musi hu tshi fhiswa zwiṱhavhelo uri dzi ḓiswe nga zwifhinga zwo teaho, na uri vhathu vha ḓise nduvho dzavho dza zwiranzhe. Mudzimu wanga, elelwa zwe nda ita u nnyitele vhuthu!" 
Esther1:1 Hezwi ndi zwo iteaho misi ya Serekesese, onouḽa Serekesese we a vha a tshi vhusa madzingu ane a fhira 127 u bva India u swika Kushu." 
Esther1:2 Misi yeneyo khosi Serekesese o vha a tshi vhusa e kha khuluṋoni yawe muḓini wa Shushani musanda wa Pheresia. 
Esther1:3 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuraru wa muvhuso wawe a itela magota awe na vhakoma vhawe vhuṱambo. Vhalangammbi vha Pheresia na Media vho vha vhe hone, khathihi na vhaḓivhalea na magota a madzingu." 
Esther1:4 A ita ṱano ḽa lupfumo lwa muvhuso wawe na maṱeleṱele na vhugala ha vhuhosi hawe, ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi." 
Esther1:5 Khosi ya fhedza nga u itela vhathu vhoṱhe vha musanda wa Shushani tshimima, vhoṱhe vhaḓivhalea na vhathu zwavho. Itsho tshimima tsho itelwa ngadeni dza pfamo ya musanda tsha fhedza vhege yoṱhe." 
Esther1:6 Muṱa henefho wo vha wo ṱamiwa nga mbemba dza lukhaha dzi nembelelaho dza muvhala wa lutombo na mutshena, dzo vhofhelelwa thambo dza lukhaha lwa muridili lu songo vangiwaho kha nkhwe dza siliva nṱha ha phuphu dza mmabulu. Henefho muṱani ho vha ho vhewa zwidzulo zwa musuku na siliva, zwo vhewa nṱha ha mmabulu mutshena na matombo matswuku na nungu dzi penyaho na matombo a lutombo." 
Esther1:7 Waini yo vha i tshi nwiwa nga zwinwelo zwa musuku, hu si na mbili dzi no fana, khosi i tshi vha pakulela waini ya musanda, lwo fanelaho khosi." 
Esther1:8 Ho pfi hu songo vha na khombekhombe; khosi yo vha yo laya vhashumi vha pfamoni uri muṅwe na muṅwe a nwe nga hune a funa. 
Esther1:9 Na mufumakadzi Vashthi o vha a tshi khou itela vhasadzi tshimima ngomu ha pfamo ya musanda ya khosi Serekesese. 
Esther1:10 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽa itsho tshimima khosi Serekesese o vha o no wela mativhani nga waini, a vhidza khombe ṱhanu na mbili vhe vha vha vhe vhaḓinḓa vhawe, Mehumani na Bisitha na Harabona na Bigitha na Abagatha na Zethara na Kharakhasi." 
Esther1:11 A vha laya uri vha ḓise mufumakadzi Vashthi ó ambara khare yawe ya vhuhosi. Mufumakadzi uyo o vha e musadzi o nakaho, khosi yo vha i tshi ṱoḓa u ṱana lunako lwawe uri lu vhonwe nga magota na vhaeni." 
Esther1:12 Hone vhaḓinḓa vha tshi vhudza mufumakadzi Vashthi zwe khosi a vha laya, ene a hana u ya. Hezwo zwa sinyusa khosi a tou duga." 
Esther1:13 Zwino khosi o vha a tshi anzela u vhudzisa vhaeletshedzi vhawe zwa khakhathi dza mulayo na vhudziki, ndi zwe a vhidzisa vhaeletshedzi vhawe, vhane vha ḓivha zwine zwa fanela u itwa." 
Esther1:14 Vhaswikeli vhe a vha a tshi ḓi anzela u vha vhudzisa uri vha mu eletshedze vho vha vhe Kharashena na Sethara na Adimatha na Tharashishi na Merese na Marisena na Memukhani, vhaḓivhalea vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha Pheresia na Media vhe vha vha vhe vhone vhahulwane muvhusoni." 
Esther1:15 Khosi ya vhudza avho vhanna ya ri, “Ndo ruma vhaḓinḓa vhanga ha mufumakadzi Vashthi vha isa ndaela khae, ene a hana u thetshelesa ndaela yanga! Mulayo u ri ro fanela u itani ngae?”" 
Esther1:16 Ndi hone Memukhani a tshi ḓivhadza khosi na magota awe a ri, “Mufumakadzi Vashthi ho ngo khakhela khosi fhedzi, o khakhela na magota awe, o khakhela vhanna vhoṱhe mashangoni oṱhe a Serekesese." 
Esther1:17 Musadzi muṅwe na muṅwe a re muvhusoni uyu u ḓo thoma u nyadza munna wawe hezwi a tshi tou pfa zwe mufumakadzi a ita. Vha ḓo ri, ‘Khosi Serekesese o vhidza mufumakadzi Vashthi uri a ḓe khae, mufumakadzi a hana.’" 
Esther1:18 Musi vhasadzi vha vhaḓivhalea vha Pheresia na Media vha tshi pfa zwiito zwa mufumakadzi vha ḓo mbo ḓi swetha vhanna vhavho nga u ralo-vho. Vhasadzi hoṱhe-hoṱhe a vha tsha ḓo hulisa vhanna vhavho, na vhanna vha vho ḓo sinyutshela vhasadzi vhavho." 
Esther1:19 Arali thovhele a tshi zwi takalela, nga a bvise nḓivhadzo ya musanda ine ya ri Vashthi a songo tsha dovha a ḓa phanḓa ha khosi Serekesese. Nga vha ite uri zwi ṅwaliwe kha milayo ya Pheresia na Media i sa shandukiswi. Zwenezwo vha mu bvise a si tsha vha mufumakadzi, vha dzhie muṅwe musadzi wa khwiṋe." 
Esther1:20 Arali ndaela yavho yo ḓivhadzwa hoṱhe muvhusoni hoyu muhulu, vhasadzi vhoṱhe vha ḓo hulisa vhanna vhavho, vhaḓivhalea na vhathu zwavho.”" 
Esther1:21 Khosi na vhaḓivhalea vhawe vha zwi pfesesa, khosi a ita zwe Memukhani a amba." 
Esther1:22 Dzinguni ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa musanda khosi a swikisa malaedzwa nga luambo na kuṅwalele kwa dzingu ḽeneḽo, ha pfi munna muṅwe na muṅwe nga a pfiwe muṱani wawe, hu tshi tevhedzwa maitele a lushaka lwa hawe." 
Esther2:1 Ngavhuya musi mbiti dza khosi Serekesese dzo no dzika, a elelwa Vashthi na zwe uyo musadzi a ita na zwe a itwa." 
Esther2:2 Vhaṅwe vhaeletshedzi vha khosi vhane vha vha vhadzulatsini vha ḓisa muhumbulo hoyu vha ri, “Ndi mini thovhele vha sa londolosi vha ḓiwanela vhasidzana vho nakaho vha sa athu ḓivha munna?" 
Esther2:3 Thovhele nga vha vhee magota madzinguni oṱhe a muvhuso wavho, vha vha vhudze vha ḓise vhasidzana havho vhoṱhe vhudzuloni ha vhasadzi fhano musanda wa Shushani. Vha ite uri vha londolwe nga Hegai, khombe ya musanda, ane a langa vhasadzi vhavho, avho vhasidzana vha nakiswe." 
Esther2:4 Zwenezwo vha dzhie musidzana ane a vha takadzesa a vhe mufumakadzi vhudzuloni ha Vashthi.” Khosi ya vhona uri iyo ndi nyeletshedzo yavhuḓi, ya ita zwenezwo." 
Esther2:5 Henefho musanda Shushani ho vha hu tshi dzula Mujuda we a vha a tshi pfi Maradokai ṅwana wa Jairi, ene o vha e wa tsinde ḽa Benyamini, e wa lutsinga lwa Kishi na Shimei." 
Esther2:6 Zwiḽa Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a tshi hwala khosi Jehoyakhini wa Juda a tshi mu isa vhuthubwani a tshi bva Jerusalema e na tshigwada tsha mathubwa, vhomakhulu vha Maradokai vho vha vhe na vhenevho." 
Esther2:7 Munna uyo o vha e na muzwala a no pfi Estere, dzina ḽawe ḽa Tshiheberu ḽi tshi pfi Hadasa; o vha e musidzana wa lunako, e na tshivhumbeo tshavhuḓi. Vhabebi vhawe vho ri u fa, Maradokai a mu dzhia a mu alusa sa ṅwana wawe." 
Esther2:8 Musi khosi o no bvisa nḓivhadzo yawe ntswa, ha ḓiswa vhasidzana vhanzhi musanda wa Shushani, ha dzhiwa na Estere. Na ene a iswa pfamoni ya musanda a tshi khou londolwa nga Hegai, we a vha a tshi langa vhudzulo ha vhasadzi." 
Esther2:9 Hegai a vhona Estere a tshi mu takadza, a mu ita nga vhuthu. A mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a mu ṋea zwiḓolo zwa u mu nakisa na zwiḽiwa zwavhuḓi. A mu vhea fhethu ho nakesaho hafho vhudzuloni ha vhasadzi, a nanga vhasidzana vhaṱanu na vhavhili vho tou nanguludzwa pfamoni ya musanda uri vha mu shumele." 
Esther2:10 Zwino Maradokai a eletshedza Estere uri a songo vhuya a bula uri u Mujuda, nazwino ene a si zwi ambe." 
Esther2:11 Misi yoṱhe Maradokai o vha a tshi yo ima khoroni ya vhudzulo ha vhasadzi uri a pfe mutakalo wa Estere, na zwe zwa vha zwi tshi khou itea khae." 
Esther2:12 Musi tshifhinga tsha uri musidzana a ye ha khosi Serekesese tshi tshi vho swika, a thoma a fhedza ṅwaha a tshi khou tevhedza maitele a u ḓinakisa o vhetshelwaho vhasadzi, a tshi fhedza miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi a tshi khou ḓola mapfura a u mu nakisa, a dovha a fhedza miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi a tshi khou ḓola zwiḓolo zwi nukhelelaho." 
Esther2:13 Musi a tshi bva vhudzuloni ha vhasadzi a tshi ya pfamoni ya musanda o vha a tshi ambara tshine a tou funa. 
Esther2:14 O vha a tshi ya nga madekwana, ḽi tshi tsha nga matsheloni a iswa huṅwe hune ha dzula vhasadzi, a londolwa nga Shaashigasi, khombe ine ya langa vhasadzi vha khosi vha dziphuli. Musidzana uyo o vha a si tsha dovha a humela ha khosi arali khosi i songo mu takalela a tou mu vhidzisa nga dzina ḽawe." 
Esther2:15 Ha swika tshifhinga tsha Estere tsha uri a ye ha khosi. Estere, ṅwananyana wa Abihaili, o vha e muzwala wa Maradokai. Maradokai o mu alusa sa ṅwana wawe. Estere o vha a tshi tamiwa nga vhoṱhe vhe vha mu vhona. Musi tshifhinga tshawe tshi tshi swika, a ambara zwenezwiḽa zwe a eletshedzwa nga Hegai, khombe ine ya langa vhudzulo ha vhasadzi." 
Esther2:16 Estere a dzhiwa a iswa ha khosi Serekesese pfamoni ya musanda nga ṅwedzi wa fumi, ṅwedzi wa Thebethe, nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa Serekesese." 
Esther2:17 Zwino khosi a mu funa u fhira vhasidzana vhoṱhe, a mu takalela, a mu tama u fhira vhaṅwe vhoṱhe. A dzhia khare ya vhuhosi a mu ambadza ṱhohoni, a mu ita mufumakadzi vhudzuloni ha Vashthi." 
Esther2:18 Ndi hone khosi a tshi itela Estere vhuṱambo vhuhulu, a vhidza vhaḓivhalea vhawe vhoṱhe na magota. A ḓivhadza uri vhathu vha hangwelwe mithelo muvhusoni wawe woṱhe, a kovhela vhathu zwifhiwa zwo fanelaho khosi." 
Esther2:19 Musi vhasidzana vha tshi kuvhanganyiwa lwa vhuvhili, Maradokai o vha o no vha muhaṱuli khoroni ya musanda." 
Esther2:20 A vha Estere, ene o vha a sa athu bula uri ndi Mujuda. Maradokai o vha o mu vhudza uri a songo vhuya a zwi vhudza muthu, ene a mu thetshelesa kha hezwo, sa zwe a mu thetshelesa a tshi kha ḓi vha muṱuku zwiḽa a tshi mu alusa." 
Esther2:21 Tshifhinga tsha musi Maradokai o no vha muṅwe wa vhahulwane khoroni ya musanda, Bigithana na Thereshe, magota mavhili vhe vha vha vha tshi linda muṋango, vha sinyuwa, vha langana nga tshiphiri uri vha vhulahe khosi Serekesese." 
Esther2:22 Maradokai a zwi pfa, a vhudza mufumakadzi Estere, uyo a vhudza khosi zwe Maradokai a zwi wana." 
Esther2:23 Mafhungo ayo a ṱoḓeseswa, ha wanala uri ndi ngoho, magota ayo mavhili a iswa thamboni. Mafhungo ayo oṱhe a ṅwalwa buguni dza muvhuso khosi i tshi zwi vhona." 
Esther3:1 Ngavhuya ho no fhira izwo, khosi Serekesese a hulisa Hamani a mu ṋea tshiimo tshi no fhira tsha vhaḓivhalea vhoṱhe. Hamani o vha e ṅwana wa Hamidatha, wa lutsinga lwa Agaga." 
Esther3:2 Khosi ya laya uri magota oṱhe ane a i shumela vha hulise Hamani nga u mu gwadamela. Hone Maradokai a si gwadame a tshi mu hulisa. 
Esther3:3 Vhaṅwe vhakoma vha khosi vha mu vhudzisa uri ndi mini a tshi nyadza ndaela ya khosi. 
Esther3:4 Misi yoṱhe vha ḓi amba nae, hone ene a hana. Maradokai a ri, “Nṋe ndi Mujuda, ndi nga si kone u gwadamela Hamani.” Vhone vha vhudza Hamani ayo mafhungo, vha tshi ṱoḓa u vhona arali a tshi nga konḓelela kutshilele kwa Maradokai." 
Esther3:5 Hamani a tou duga nga mbiti a tshi vhona uri Maradokai a nga si mu hulise nga u mu gwadamela. 
Esther3:6 A tshi pfa uri Maradokai ndi Mujuda, a elekanya uri a nga si tou vhulaha Maradokai e eṱhe. A luka vhunwa ha u vhulaha Majuda vhoṱhe vha re muvhusoni woṱhe wa Serekesese." 
Esther3:7 Nga ṅwaha wa 12 wa muvhuso wa khosi Serekesese, nga ṅwedzi wa u ranga, ṅwedzi wa Nisani, Hamani a ri hu itwe madeṅwa (o vha a tshi pfi “phurimi”) uri hu wanale ḓuvha na ṅwedzi wo teaho uri a kone u bveledza tshimbevha tshawe. Deṅwa ḽa wela kha ḓuvha ḽa 13 ḽa ṅwedzi wa 12, ṅwedzi wa Adara." 
Esther3:8 Ndi hone Hamani a tshi vhudza khosi Serekesese a ri, “Hu na luṅwe lushaka lwo balanganaho na dzitshakha madzinguni oṱhe a muvhuso wavho, lune lwa si fune u vangana na vhaṅwe. Maitele avho o fhambana na a dziṅwe tshakha dzoṱhe, nahone vha nyadza milayo ya khosi. A zwo ngo fanela vhamusanda vha tshi zwi konḓelela." 
Esther3:9 Arali thovhele a tshi zwi pfesesa, nga a bvise ndaela ya uri vha vhulawe. Arali vha ita nga u ralo, ndi tou amba ndo khwaṱhisa uri ndi ḓo konou dzhia khilogiramu dza siliva dzine dza fhira 340 000 nda ṋekedza vhafaratshikwama uri vha i vhulunge mbulungeloni ya musanda.”" 
Esther3:10 Khosi ya bvula rinngi ye ya vha i tshi kandisa ndaela uri dzi vhe dza muvhuso, a i ṋea swina ḽa Mujuda, Hamani ṅwana wa Hamedatha, wa lutsinga lwa Agaga." 
Esther3:11 Khosi ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Tshelede ndi yaṋu, vhathu vha iteni zwine na funa.”" 
Esther3:12 Zwenezwo nga ḓuvha ḽa 13 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga Hamani a vhidza vhaṅwaleli vha khosi a vha vhudza ndaela iyo, ya pfi i ṱalutshedzelwe kha nyambo dzoṱhe na kuṅwalele kwa muvhuso muṅwe na muṅwe, uri zwi rumelwe ha vhavhusi vhoṱhe na magota na vhaḓivhalea. Nḓivhadzo iyo ya ṅwalwa nga dzina ḽa khosi Serekesese, ya kandiswa nga rinngi yawe." 
Esther3:13 Ha rumiwa vhagidimi vha isa iyo nḓivhadzo madzinguni oṱhe a muvhuso. Iyo nḓivhadzo yo ri, nga ḓuvha ḽithihi fhedzi, ḽa 13 ḽa Adara, Majuda vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vhasadzi na vhana, vha vhulawe. Vho vha vho fanela u vhulawa vha sa khathutshelwi, vha tou lozwiwa vha ṱangulwe na thundu yavho." 
Esther3:14 Ha pfi hu ṅwalwe kopi dza iyo ndaela; dzi iswe madzinguni oṱhe, uri vhoṱhe vha vhe vho ḓilugisa musi ḓuvha iḽo ḽi tshi swika." 
Esther3:15 Khosi ya laya uri nḓivhadzo iyo i ḓivhadzwe vhathu vhoṱhe musanda wa Shushani, ha rumiwa vhagidimi madzinguni vha isa ayo mafhungo. Khosi na Hamani vha dzula fhasi vha ḓinwela waini, ngeno muḓini wa Shushani hu na vilinga." 
Esther4:1 Musi Maradokai a tshi pfa zwoṱhe zwo itwaho, a kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe nga u ṱungufhala, a ambara madzanganda, a ḓihasha milora ṱhohoni, a buḓekanya muḓi a tshi khou zhamba lwa u ṱungufhadza," 
Esther4:2 a vhuya a swika muṋangoni wa pfamo. Ho ngo dzhena pfamoni ngauri ho vha hu sa tendelwi muthu o ambaraho madzanganda a tshi dzhena. 
Esther4:3 Hoṱhe-hoṱhe madzinguni he ha ḓivhadzwa ndaela ya khosi, Majuda vho vha vha tshi khou ṱavha mukosi, vha tshi ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, vha tshi lila vha tshi tou ongolela, vhanzhi vhavho vha ambara madzanganda, vha vhumbuluwa milorani." 
Esther4:4 Vhashumi vha Estere vha vhasidzana na dzikhombe vha mu vhudza zwe Maradokai a ita, zwa mu dina nga maanḓa. A ruma muḓinḓa a isa zwiambaro ha Maradokai uri a ambare a bvule madzanganda, hone Maradokai a zwi landula." 
Esther4:5 Ndi hone a tshi vhidza Hathakhi, muṅwe wa khombe dza pfamoni we a vhewa nga khosi uri a vhe mushumi wawe, a mu vhudza uri a ye ha Maradokai a mu vhudzise uri ho tshinyalani." 
Esther4:6 Hathakhi a ya ha Maradokai tshikweani tsha muḓi muṋangoni wa pfamo," 
Esther4:7 Maradokai a mu vhudza zwoṱhe zwe zwa mu wela na uri Hamani o fulufhedzisa u dzhenisa tshelede nngafhani mbulungeloni ya musanda arali Majuda vhoṱhe vha vhulawa. 
Esther4:8 A ṋea Hathakhi kopi ya ndaela yo ṅwalwaho Shushani, i tshi ri Majuda vha lozwiwe. Maradokai a ri Hathakhi a ise luṅwalo ulwo ha Estere, a mu ṱalutshedze lwone, uri Estere a yo luvhelela ha khosi, a mu humbele a khathutshele vhathu vha hawe." 
Esther4:9 Hathakhi a vhudza Estere mafhungo a Maradokai," 
Esther4:10 Estere a mu vhudza uri a humise malaedzwa ha Maradokai a ri," 
Esther4:11 “Arali muthu wa munna kana wa musadzi a dzhena muṱani wa nga ngomu a yo amba na khosi á songo vhidzwa, onoyo muthu o fanela u vhulawa. Hoyo ndi mulayo, vhathu vhoṱhe u bva kha vhaeletshedzi vha khosi u swika kha vhathu vha re madzinguni, vha a zwi ḓivha. Hu na nḓila nthihi fhedzi ya u suvha uyo mulayo: Arali khosi a ṋekedza muthu luḓo lwawe lwa musuku, ha vhulawi. Huno ho no ḓi fhela ṅwedzi vhothovhele vha sa mmbidzi.”" 
Esther4:12 Musi Maradokai a tshi pfa mafhungo a no bva ha Estere," 
Esther4:13 a isa malaedzwa ha Estere a u mu laya a ri, “Ni songo humbula uri maṅwe Majuda a tshi vhulawa inwi ni ḓo ponyoka nge na vha pfamoni ya musanda." 
Esther4:14 Arali na fhumula musi zwo rali, hu ḓo ḓi vha na iṅwe nḓila ine Majuda vha ḓo fariswa ngayo vha tshidzwa, hone inwi ni ḓo fa, ha vha hu hone muṱa wa khotsi aṋu wo fhela. Khamusi ni tshi itwa mufumakadzi no vha ni tshi itelwa musi wa zwo raliho, zwi ḓihwa nga nnyi?”" 
Esther4:15 Estere a isa phindulo heino ha Maradokai a ri," 
Esther4:16 “Nga vha kuvhanganye Majuda vhoṱhe vha re muḓini wa Shushani, vha ḓidzime zwiḽiwa, vha nthabelele. Vha fhedze maḓuvha mararu vha sa ḽi tshithu vha sa nwi tshithu na vhusiku. Nṋe na vhashumi vhanga vha vhasidzana ri ḓo ita-vho nga u ralo. Musi ro no ita hezwo, ndi ḓo ya ha khosi, naho mulayo u sa tendi. Arali nda lovha, ndi ḓo ḓi lovha zwanga.”" 
Esther4:17 Ndi hone Maradokai a tshi ṱuwa, a ita zwoṱhe zwe Estere a mu vhudza." 
Esther5:1 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru Estere a tshi khou ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, a ambara zwiambaro zwa vhuhosi, a ya a ima muṱani wa nga ngomu wa pfamo, wo lavhelesanaho na holo ya musanda. Khosi yo vha i henefho ngomu, yo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya vhuhosi, yo lavhelesanaho na muṋango." 
Esther5:2 Musi khosi a tshi vhona mufumakadzi o ima nnḓa, a pfa a tshi mu takalela, a mu sumba nga luḓo lwawe lwa musuku. Estere a sendela a kwama ṱhodzi yalwo." 
Esther5:3 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Mulandu ndi mini, mufumakadzi Estere? Mmbudzeni tshine na tshi ṱoḓa, ndi ḓo ni fha, naho na humbela hafu ya muvhuso wanga.”" 
Esther5:4 Estere a fhindula a ri, “Arali thovhele a tshi zwi takalela, ndo vha ndi tshi funa uri vhone na Hamani vha vhe vhaeni vhanga ṋamusi nga madekwana tshimimani tshe nda vha lugisela.”" 
Esther5:5 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhidzisa Hamani nga u ṱavhanya, uri vha vhe vhaeni vha Estere, khosi na Hamani vha konou ya tshimimani tsha Estere." 
Esther5:6 Musi vha tshi khou nwa waini khosi ya dovha ya vhudzisa Estere ya ri, “Tshine na tshi ṱoḓa mmbudzeni, ni ḓo tshi wana. Tshine na humbela ndi ḓo ni ṋea, naho na humbela hafu ya muvhuso wanga.”" 
Esther5:7 Estere a fhindula a ri," 
Esther5:8 “Arali thovhele a tshi nga nnyitela vhuthu a ita zwine nda humbela, ndo vha ndi tshi funa uri vhone na Hamani vha dovhe vha vhe vhaeni vhanga matshelo kha tshimima tshiṅwe tshine nda ḓo vha lugisela. Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo vha vhudza tshine nda tshi ṱoḓa.”" 
Esther5:9 Musi uyo Hamani o ṱuwa o takala, mbilu yawe yo rula. Huno a tshi vhona Maradokai tshifhingoni tsha pfamo a sa takuwi kana a sumbedza khuliso musi a tshi fhira, a mu sinyutshela zwihulu." 
Esther5:10 Hone a ḓifara, a livha hayani. Ndi hone a tshi vhidza khonani dzawe uri vha ḓe muṱani wawe, a vhidza na musadzi wawe Zereshe." 
Esther5:11 Hamani a vha zuwela lupfumo lwawe na uri u na vhana vhangana na uri khosi yo mu hulisa zwingafhani ya mu vhea kha tshiimo tshingafhani na uri ene ndi muḓivhalea u fhira vhaḓivhalea vhaṅwe vha khosi. 
Esther5:12 Hamani a isa phanḓa a ri, “Tshiṅwe hafhu mufumakadzi Estere o ita tshimima a tshi itela nṋe na khosi fhedzi, a si vhidze na muthihi, nahone ho pfi ri dovhe ri vhuye matshelo." 
Esther5:13 Hone hezwo zwoṱhe a zwi mpfarisi tshithu arali ndi tshi ḓi vhona Mujuda houḽa Maradokai o dzula tshifhingoni tsha pfamo.” 
Esther5:14 Ndi hone musadzi wawe na khonani dzawe dzoṱhe vha tshi ri, “Ndi mini vha sa imisi thanda ine vhathu vha rutshelelwa khayo, ha mitha dza 22 u ya nṱha? Matshelo nga matsheloni vha nga humbela khosi uri Maradokai a rutshelelwe khayo, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo konou ya tshimimani vho takala.” Hamani a vhona uyo u muhumbulo wavhuḓi, a mbo imisa iyo thanda." 
Esther6:1 Vhusiku honoho khosi ya si fare khofhe, a ri hu ḓiswe maṅwalo a muvhuso wawe a vhalelwe one." 
Esther6:2 Fhethu he vha hu vhala ho angaredza na mafhungo a musi Maradokai a tshi dzumbulula tshimbevha tsha u vhulaha khosi, tshimbevha tshe tsha itwa nga Bigithana na Thereshe, khombe mbili dza pfamoni vhe vha vha vha tshi linda muṋango." 
Esther6:3 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Maradokai ro mu hulisa hani? Ro mu pfufha hani nge a ita zwenezwo?” Vhalanda vhawe vha fhindula vha ri, “Ha athu pfufhiwa.”" 
Esther6:4 Khosi ya vhudzisa ya ri, “Hu na magota anga fhano pfamoni?” Zwino Hamani o vha a tshi kha ḓi bva u dzhena muṱani ó ḓa u humbela khosi uri Maradokai a ṱomiwe thandani yo itelwaho zwenezwo." 
Esther6:5 Ndi hone vhalanda vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Vho-Hamani vha fhano, vho lindela u amba na vhone.” Khosi ya ri, “Vha vhudzeni vha dzhene.”" 
Esther6:6 Ndi hone Hamani a tshi dzhena, khosi ya mu vhudza ya ri, “Hu na muṅwe ane nda funa u mu hulisa. Munna uyo ndi nga mu itela mini?” Hamani a elekanya a ri, “Zwino khosi a nga vha a tshi ṱoḓa u hulisa nnyi zwingafho arali e si nṋe?”" 
Esther6:7 A fhindula khosi a ri, “Munna uyo ane thovhele a ṱoḓa u mu hulisa," 
Esther6:8 nga vha ri hu ḓiswe phuraphura dza vhuhosi dzine thovhele a dzi ambara, na bere ine ya namelwa nga vhone, yo ambadzwaho maṱeleṱele a vhuhosi ṱhohoni yayo." 
Esther6:9 Vha wane muṅwe wa vhaḓivhalea vhavho a fhiraho vhoṱhe a ambadze uyo munna phuraphura idzo, a mu endedze ó namela bere, a buḓekanye tshikwea tsha muḓi. Muḓivhalea a ḓivhadze zwenezwi vha tshi khou tshimbila a ri, ‘Vhonani uri khosi i pfufha hani munna ane ya funa u mu hulisa!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Ndi hone khosi a tshi vhudza Hamani a ri, “Ṱavhanyani ni yo dzhia dziphuraphura na bere, zwenezwo zwe na amba ni zwi itele Maradokai wa Mujuta. Ni ḓo mu wana o dzula muṋangoni wa pfamo. Ni songo litsha u ita na tshithihi tsha zwe na amba.”" 
Esther6:11 Hamani a mbo dzhia phuraphura, a dzi ambadza Maradokai, a dzhia bere a endedza Maradokai ó i namela, Hamani a tshi huwelela a ri, “Vhonani uri khosi i pfufha hani munna ane ya funa u mu hulisa.”" 
Esther6:12 Zwo no ralo Maradokai a humela muṋangoni wa pfamo, Hamani a gidimela hayani ó khurumela tshifhaṱuwo nga ṱhoni." 
Esther6:13 Hamani a vhudza musadzi wawe na khonani dzawe zwoṱhe zwe zwa mu wela. Ndi hone musadzi wawe na khonani dziḽa dzawe dza vhuṱali vha tshi mu vhudza vha ri, “Maanḓa avho a khou thoma u dzhiwa nga Maradokai. Maradokai ndi Mujuda, vhone vha nga si mu kunde. Vhukumakuma u ḓo vha kunda.”" 
Esther6:14 Musi vha tshi kha ḓi amba, khombe dza pfamoni dza swika nga luvhilo dza dzhia Hamani a iswa tshimimani tsha Estere." 
Esther7:1 Khosi na Hamani vha ṱuwa vha yo ḽa na Estere 
Esther7:2 lwa vhuvhili. Musi vha tshi khou nwa waini khosi a dovha a vhudzisa Estere a ri, “Zwino mufumakadzi Estere, tshine na tshi funa ndi mini? Mmbudzeni, ni ḓo tshi wana. Ndi ḓo ni fha na hafu ya muvhuso wanga.”" 
Esther7:3 Ndi hone mufumakadzi Estere a tshi fhindula a ri, “Arali zwi tshi takadza thovhele u nṋea tshine nda humbela, ndi funa uri ndi si vhulawe, na vhathu vha hashu vha si vhulawe." 
Esther7:4 Nṋe khathihi na lushaka lwa hashu ro rengiswa uri ri vhulawe. Arali ro vha ro tou rengiswa fhedzi ra itwa phuli ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ḓifhumulela, nda si vha dine ngazwo, hone zwino ri ḓo ṱuwa ri tshi lozwiwa, ra si tsha vha hone!”" 
Esther7:5 Khosi Serekesese a vhudzisa mufumakadzi Estere a ri, “Muthu ane a nga ita zwithu izwo ndi nnyi? Munna uyo u ngafhi?”" 
Esther7:6 Estere a fhindula a ri, “Swina ḽashu, mutovholi washu, ndi munna hoyu muvhi Hamani!” Hamani a sokou lavhelesa khosi na mufumakadzi ó tshenuwa." 
Esther7:7 Khosi ya takuwa yo sinyuwa, a bva afho nḓuni, a bvela nnḓa, a livha ngadeni ya pfamo. Hamani a zwi vhona uri khosi yo ḓiimisela u mu lifhedza, ndi zwe a sala a tshi luvhelela mufumakadzi Estere uri a si vhulawe." 
Esther7:8 O vha a tshi kha ḓi bva u ḓiposa vhulaloni ha Estere uri a luvhelele u khathutshelwa, khosi ya mbo ḓi humela afho nḓuni i tshi bva ngadeni. Khosi ya ri u vhona izwo ya ṱavha mukosi ya ri, “Munna uyu u vhuya a tou tshipa mufumakadzi henefha maṱoni anga, pfamoni yanga?” Khosi ya ri u amba zwenezwo, khombe dza vha dzo no tibedza ṱhoho ya Hamani." 
Esther7:9 Ndi hone muṅwe wavho, Harabona, a tshi ri, “Hamani o swika na hune a imisa thanda nḓuni yawe uri a rutshelele Maradokai khayo, ene we a lamukisa vhone thovhele. Thanda iyo yo lapfa mitha dza 22 u ya nṱha!” Khosi ya vha laya ya ri, “Rutshelelani Hamani khayo!”" 
Esther7:10 Hamani a mbo rutshelelwa kha thanda ye a vha o i imisela Maradokai. Ndi hone mbiti dza khosi dzi tshi dzika. 
Esther8:1 Musi wonoyo khosi Serekesese a dzhia thundu yoṱhe ya Hamani swina ḽa Majuda a i ṋea mufumakadzi Estere. Estere a vhudza khosi uri Maradokai ndi shaka ḽawe, u bva zwenezwo Maradokai a tendelwa u dzhena hune khosi ya vha hone." 
Esther8:2 Khosi ya bvula rinngi yayo ine ya vha na tshigivho tshawe (ndi ye a vha o i dzhiela Hamani) a i ṋea Maradokai. Estere a ri Maradokai a lange thundu dza Hamani. 
Esther8:3 Estere a dovha a amba na khosi, a ḓiposa milenzheni yawe a tshi khou lila, a luvhelela khosi uri i thivhele tshimbevha tsho itelwaho Majuda nga Hamani ṅwana wa Agaga." 
Esther8:4 Khosi ya mu ṋekedza luḓo lwa musuku, zwenezwo a takuwa a ri," 
Esther8:5 “Arali thovhele a tshi zwi pfesesa, arali a tshi ntakalela, arali a tshi vhona zwi zwone, nga a ṅwale nḓivhadzo ine ya thivhela ndaela dza Hamani uri zwe a amba zwi songo tsha itwa, ndi amba ndaela dziḽa dze Hamani ṅwana wa Hamedatha wa lutsinga lwa Agaga a ḓivhadza uri Majuda vhoṱhe vha re muvhusoni wavho vha lozwiwe." 
Esther8:6 Nṋe ndi nga zwi konḓelela hani arali khombo iyo i tshi wela vha hashu, mashaka anga a vhulawa?”" 
Esther8:7 Khosi Serekesese a fhindula mufumakadzi Estere na Maradokai wa Mujuda a ri, “Hamani ndo mu rutshelela kha thanda nge a itela Majuda tshimbevha, thundu dzawe nda dzi ṋea Estere." 
Esther8:8 Hone nḓivhadzo yo ṅwalwaho dzinani ḽa khosi ya kandiswa nga tshigivho tsha musanda, i nga si kone u thivhelwa. Naho zwo ralo ni nga ṅwalela Majuda tshine na tou funa, na ṅwala nga dzina ḽanga, na kandisa nga tshigivho tsha musanda.”" 
Esther8:9 Hezwo zwo itea nga ḓuvha ḽa 23 ṅwedzi wa vhuraru, ṅwedzi wa Sivani. Maradokai a vhidza vhaṅwaleli vha khosi, a amba hu tshi ṅwalelwa Majuda maṅwalo a tshi ya ha vhavhusi, na magota na vhaḓivhalea vha madzingu oṱhe a 127 u bva India u swika Kushu. Maṅwalo o vha o ṅwalelwa dzingu ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe nga luambo lwa dzingu ḽeneḽo na kuṅwalele, ho ṅwalelwa na Majuda nga luambo lwavho na nga kuṅwalele kwavho." 
Esther8:10 Maradokai a ri maṅwalo ayo a ṅwalwe nga dzina ḽa khosi Serekesese, a kandiswe nga tshigivho tsha musanda. A swikiswa nga vhanameli vha dzibere dza luvhilo dzi no bva dangani ḽa musanda." 
Esther8:11 Maṅwalo hayo a ṱalutshedza uri khosi o tendela Majuda vha re muḓini muṅwe na muṅwe vha pfane vha ḓilwele. Arali vha thomiwa nga vhanna vha re na zwihali vha lushaka lufhio na lufhio dzinguni ḽifhio na ḽifhio, vha ḓilifhedzele, vha vha lozwe khathihi na vhasadzi vhavho na vhana vhavho. Vha vha vhulahe hu si sale na muthu na muthihi, vha vha ṱangule thundu yavho." 
Esther8:12 Zwi re kha nḓivhadzo iyo ha pfi zwi itwe muvhusoni woṱhe wa Pheresia nga ḓuvha ḽo tetshelwaho u vhulaha Majuda, ḓuvha ḽa 13 ḽa Adara, ṅwedzi wa 12." 
Esther8:13 Hezwo zwo vha zwo fanela u ḓivhadzwa unga mulayo, zwa ḓivhadzwa vhathu vhoṱhe madzinguni oṱhe, uri Majuda vha vhe vho ḓilugisela u lifhedza maswina avho musi ḓuvha heḽo ḽi tshi swika." 
Esther8:14 Vhanameli vha dzibere vha ri u pfa ndaela ya khosi vha namela bere dza musanda, dza takuwa nga luvhilo luhulu. Ndaela iyo ya ḓivhadzwa na Shushani musanda." 
Esther8:15 Maradokai a ṱuwa afho pfamoni o ambara zwiambaro zwa vhuhosi zwa muvhala wa denga na mutshena na khare khulu ya musuku na phuraphura ya muridili ya lukhaha lu songo vangiwaho. Vha muḓi wa Shushani vha fhululedza vha pembela. 
Esther8:16 Majuda vha pfa vho rulwa, vha takala, vha pembela, vha pfa vho huliswa." 
Esther8:17 Miḓini yoṱhe na madzinguni oṱhe he ha vhalwa ndaela ya khosi, Majuda vha takala vha pembela vha ita vhuṱambo, vha ḽa. Vhathu vhanzhi vha dziṅwe tshakha vha vha Majuda nge vha vha vho farwa nga nyofho dza u ofha Majuda."
