Job32:10 Ndi zwine nda ri ni nthetshelese-vho; litshani ndi ni vhudze zwi re mbiluni yanga. 
Job32:11 Ndo ni lindela ndi sa fheli mbilu ni tshi khou amba, nda thetshelesa ndi tshi nanga maipfi a vhuṱali." 
Job32:12 Ndo tou kolongonya nḓevhe ni tshi amba – a hu na na muthihi waṋu we a ladza Jobo na khani, kana a kona u fhindula zwe a amba." 
Job32:13 Ni songo ri ndi hone no wana vhuṱali ni tshi fhedza nga ḽa u ri, “Muthu a nga si mu kone, u ḓo konwa nga Mudzimu fhedzi.”" 
Job32:14 Vho-Jobo vho vha vha sa athu ṱaṱa khani na nṋe; nṋe a thi nga mu fhinduli unga inwi. 
Job32:15 Vho-Jobo, havha vhathu vho ḓaḓa, a vha tsha kona u fhindula, a vha tshee na tshine vha amba;" 
Job32:16 zwino vhó fhumula, na nṋe ndi fhumule naa, vhó sokou tshenzhemala vha sa fhinduli tshithu?" 
Job32:17 Zwino nṋe-vho ndi ḓo amba, nda ni vhudza-vho zwi re mbiluni yanga." 
Job32:18 Zwino a thi tsha kona u fhumula; mbiluni yanga ho ḓala maipfi. 
Job32:19 Mbilu yanga i nga waini yo shatelwa; i nga mukumba wa waini muswa, une wa ḓo ṱuwa u tshi thuthuba." 
Job32:20 A tshi tsha kona u konḓelela, ndi fanela u amba; ndo fanela u fhindula." 
Job32:21 A thi nga imi na muthu, a thi nga hoyi muthu;" 
Job32:22 ngavhe ndi ite zwa muhoyo, Muvhumbi wanga o vha a sa nga lengi u nndozwa." 
Job33:1 Zwino-ha Vho-Jobo, nga vha thetshelese zwine nda amba, vha kolongonye nḓevhe, vha pfe zwoṱhe zwine nda bula." 
Job33:2 Zwino ndi hone ndi tshi vho ṱoḓou amba; maipfi anga a tou vha ṱhodzini ya lulimi lwanga; 
Job33:3 zwine nda amba zwi bva mbiluni i si na vhufhura; ndi khou amba ngoho ndi sa dzumbi zwine nda ḓivha. 
Job33:4 Ndo vhumbwa nga Muya wa Mudzimu; mufemo wa Ramaanḓaoṱhe u nṋea vhutshilo. 
Job33:5 Nga vha mphindule arali vha tshi kona, vha nkhanedze!" 
Job33:6 Nṋe na vhone ri a fana maṱoni a Mudzimu; roṱhe ro ṅwatiwa kha vumba ḽithihi; 
Job33:7 zwenezwo vha songo ntetemela; vha songo tenda ndi tshi vha kunda nga u vha shushedza. 
Job33:8 Ndo tou zwi pfa zwavhuḓivhuḓi vha tshi amba; maipfi avho a kha ḓi pfala nḓevheni dzanga," 
Job33:9 vha tshi ri, “A thi na mulandu, a tho ngo tshinya tshithu, ndo ṱamba, a thi na tshivhi," 
Job33:10 Mudzimu u tou ita swiswimbadise uri a mmvutshele, a nnyita swina." 
Job33:11 U mpata milenzhe nga zwipato, a londa vhuṱala hanga hoṱhe.”" 
Job33:12 Huno ndi a vha vhudza ndi ri, vha tshi ralo vho khakha; Mudzimu ndi muhulwane, u fhira muthu." 
Job33:13 Ndi mini vha tshi mu gungulela, vha ri ha fhinduli maipfi a muthu?" 
Job33:14 Mudzimu u a ḓi amba a dovha; vhathu vha ro sa mu thetshelesa. 
Job33:15 Vhusiku, muthu ó eḓela e mbwanda nga khofhe, ó lala vhulaloni hawe, Mudzimu u amba nae nga miloro na mabono." 
Job33:16 U a mu nuṅunedza nḓevheni, a mu kaidza a ofha." 
Job33:17 U itela uri a laṱe vhuvhi hawe, a si ḓihudze," 
Job33:18 ha vha u mu tshidza uri a si lovhe, a si wetshele vhudzulavhafu." 
Job33:19 U mu laṱisa nga u mu ladza thovhoni i fhisaho, marambo a rema," 
Job33:20 a si tsha tama zwiḽiwa, na mapfura a si tsha mu ḓifhela," 
Job33:21 muvhili wa ṱahala wa fhelela, ha sala marambo fhedzi," 
Job33:22 a sendela tshaloni, ó livha kha vhaḓinḓa vha lufu." 
Job33:23 Khamusi muruṅwa wa Mudzimu a nga ḓa a mu tika – muṅwe wa vhaḓinḓa vha zwigidigidi, a ḓivhadza muthu zwine a fanela u ita," 
Job33:24 a mu pfela vhuṱungu a ri, “Kha a vhofhololwe, a si tsele dindini, tshipfumelo ngetshi!”" 
Job33:25 Ndi hone muvhili wawe u tshi ḓo dovha wa vha muswa, wa khwaṱha, zwa nga zwiḽa a tshee muṱuku." 
Job33:26 A tshi rabela, Mudzimu u ḓo mu takalela; u ḓo vhona Mudzimu a pembela, Mudzimu a sumbedza uri u a fulufhedzea, a mu nakisela zwoṱhe." 
Job33:27 Ndi hone a tshi ḓo imba vhathuni, a ri, “Ndo tshinya, a tho ngo ita zwi re zwone, hone Mudzimu o nthwa nga ṱhamu ṱhukhu-ṱhukhu;" 
Job33:28 o ntshidza nda si dzhene tshaloni, zwino ndi kha ḓi tshila.”" 
Job33:29 Zwoṱhe hezwo Mudzimu u zwi itela muthu, a dovha a ḓi dovha," 
Job33:30 a tshi itela u humisa muthu dindini, uri a tshile." 
Job33:31 Zwino Vho-Jobo, nga vha thetshelese zwine nda amba, vha ri tshete ndi ambe." 
Job33:32 Hone arali vhe na zwine vha ṱoḓa u amba, kha vha ambe; ndi nga takala arali vha tshi wanala vha si na mulandu." 
Job33:33 Arali vha sa nkhanedzi, vha ri tshete vha thetshelese, ndi ḓo vha funza vhuṱali." 
Job34:1 Inwi vhaṱali, ipfani zwine nda amba! Inwi no funzeaho, nthetsheleseni!" 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 Hufha nḓevhe i tshi nanguludza maipfi unga lulimi lu tshi thetshela zwiḽiwa. 
Job34:4 Riṋe kha ri khethe zwi re zwone, ri gude roṱhe zwi re zwavhuḓi." 
Job34:5 Vho-Jobo vha ri, “A thi na mulandu; Mudzimu u khou tou nkundisa u wana zwo mpfanelaho!" 
Job34:6 Naho ndi ngohoni, ndi pfi ndi a zwifha; nangwe ndi songo tshinya, musevhe wawe u mpfula mbonzhe i sa lafhei.”" 
Job34:7 No no vhuya na vhona muthu a no nga Vho-Jobo, ane a tshi tamba nga Mudzimu, zwa nga ndi u nwa maḓi?" 
Job34:8 U konana na vhaitazwivhi, u ḓowelana na vhavhi." 
Job34:9 Hufha a tshi ri, “Muthu a tshi lingedza u takadza Mudzimu ha wani tshithu.”" 
Job34:10 Zwino nthetsheleseni, inwi ni re na ṱhalukanyo! Mudzimu u a ita vhuvhi naa? Ramaanḓaoṱhe u a khakha naa?" 
Job34:11 U pfufha muthu a tshi tevhedza mishumo yawe; u mu ita zwo teaho zwiito zwawe. 
Job34:12 Vhukumakuma Mudzimu ha khakhi; Ramaanḓaoṱhe ha haṱuleli muthu thungo. 
Job34:13 Ndi nnyi o mu vheaho uri a vhuse ḽifhasi? Ndi nnyi we a ri a lange shango? 
Job34:14 Arali o vha a tshi tou zwi funa, a humisa muya wawe na mufemo wawe," 
Job34:15 vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi ḓo lovha kathihi, muthu a humela buseni." 
Job34:16 Zwino arali vhe na ṱhalukanyo, nga vha pfe, vha thetshelese zwine nda amba." 
Job34:17 A sa funi ḽi tshi lala a nga vhusa naa? A no haṱula a sa ṱaluli, Ene wa maanḓa, ni nga mu vhea mulandu naa?" 
Job34:18 Kani-ha a si Ene a no vhudza mahosi a ri, “A ni tshithu!” a amba na vhahulwane a ri, “Ni vhavhi!”?" 
Job34:19 Ene u na tshiṱalula naa? Hu vhavhusi, hu vhapfumi, hu vhashai, ha vhoni vha tshi fana naa? Hufha o vha vhumba vhoṱhe." 
Job34:20 Muthu a nga ḓi fa kathihi fhedzi vhukati ha vhusiku; Mudzimu u lozwa vhathu, vha lovha; vha maanḓa u vha sudzulusa á songo vhuya a vusa nungo." 
Job34:21 U dzula o vhea iṱo kha zwoṱhe zwine vhathu vha ita; u vhona hoṱhe hune vha kanda. 
Job34:22 A hu na swiswi, na u swifhala haḽo, ḽine muitazwivhi a nga dzumbama khaḽo a si vhonwe nga Mudzimu." 
Job34:23 Ha vhuyi a ṱwa a tshi sengisa muthu a sa athu mu haṱula; 
Job34:24 vha maanḓa u vha tekula a songo ranga u vhudzisa, vhudzuloni havho a vhea vhaṅwe;" 
Job34:25 u sedza zwine vha ita, a vha wisa vhusiku a vha kuyekanya:" 
Job34:26 u vha rwela vhutshinyi havho, zwa vhonwa nga vhathu vhoṱhe." 
Job34:27 Ndi nge vha mu furalela, nḓila dzawe vha si dzi londe." 
Job34:28 Vha kandeledza vhashai vha lilela Mudzimu, Ene a pfa mukosi wa vhaheḓana." 
Job34:29 Huno naho a sokou fhumula, ndi nnyi ane a mu vhea mulandu? Arali a dzumba tshifhaṱuwo, ndi nnyi ane a nga mu vhona? Hu vhathu, hu dzitshakha, vha nga itani" 
Job34:30 arali Ene a litsha muvhi a vhusa lushaka lwa tshipimbi? 
Job34:31 Arali muthu onoyo a vhudza Mudzimu, a ri, “Ndi na mulandu, ndo laṱa!" 
Job34:32 Mpfunze, ndi vhone vhukhakhi hanga vhune nda si kone u vhu vhona; arali ndo khakha, ndi nga si tsha dovha” –" 
Job34:33 zwino zwo ralo vhone vha kha ḓi funa Mudzimu a tshi mu rwa, vhunga vhone vho dzula vho haṱula naa? A hu khethi nṋe, hu khetha vhone: nga vha mmbudze zwine vha ḓivha." 
Job34:34 Vha re na ṱhalukanyo vha a tenda; vha re vhaṱali vha tshi mpfa, vha ḓo ri," 
Job34:35 “Jobo u ambiswa nga u shaya nḓivho; zwine a amba a zwi sumbi ṱhalukanyo.” 
Job34:36 Ngavhe Vho-Jobo vha tshi tou lingwa tshoṱhe nge vha fhindula unga muthu muvhi! 
Job34:37 Vha engedzedza vhutshinyi havho nga u dovha vha vutshela Mudzimu, vha ḓi tamba nga Mudzimu roṱhe ri tshi zwi pfa!" 
Job35:1 Vho-Jobo, nṋa ndi zwone vha tshi ri a vha na mulandu maṱoni a Mudzimu?" 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 Vha vhudziselani Mudzimu vha ri, “Nda ita zwivhuya Iwe u wanani? A zwi fani na musi ndi tshi tshinya naa?”" 
Job35:4 Nṋe ndi ḓo vha fhindula, nda dovha nda fhindula na khonani dzavho." 
Job35:5 Kha vha dzou sedza lutomboni: Kha vha vhone uri makole a kule hani. 
Job35:6 Arali vha tshinya, Mudzimu zwi mu dina ngani? Naho vhutshinyi havho ha anda hani, Ene zwi mu itani?" 
Job35:7 Vhuvhuya havho vhu mu ṋeani? U wanani tshanḓani tshavho? 
Job35:8 Vhuvhi havho vhu dina muthu a no nga vhone; vhuvhuya havho vhu tonda vhathu fhedzi. 
Job35:9 Vhathu vha a gomela nga u kandeledzwa; vha lila u lamulelwa kha vha maanḓa," 
Job35:10 hone a hu na ane a ya ha Mudzimu Muvhumbi wawe, Ene a no ita uri a fhululedze naho o tibwa nga swiswi." 
Job35:11 Ene o ri funza zwinzhi ra fhira phukha, a ri ṱalifhisa ra fhira zwiṋoni." 
Job35:12 Vhathu vha tshi ṱavha mukosi, ha fhinduli; vha a ḓihudza, ndi vhavhi." 
Job35:13 A zwi farisi tshithu, Mudzimu ha vha thetshelesi; Ramaanḓaoṱhe ha zwi londi." 
Job35:14 Vho-Jobo, vhone vha ri a vha koni u mu vhona; vha songo fhela mbilu, mafhungo avho o swika khae." 
Job35:15 Vha vhona unga a sinyuwa ha lifhedzi, na vhutshinyi vhuhulu ha vhuyi a vhu londa," 
Job35:16 ndi zwine vha sokou amba zwi sa farisi tshithu, vha sokou anza maipfi vha si na nḓivho." 
Job36:1 Vha songo fhela mbilu, kha vha thetshelesenyana zwine nda ambela Mudzimu." 
Job36:2  
Job36:3 Nḓivho yanga a si ya zwino, ndi ḓo vha sumbedza uri Muvhumbi wanga ha khakhi." 
Job36:4 Vhukuma, zwine nda vha vhudza, a hu na tshi si tshone; ane vha mu vhona phanḓa havho ndi munna wa vhuṱali ho khunyelelaho." 
Job36:5 Naho maanḓa a Mudzimu e mahuluhulu, ha nyadzi muthu; u na maanḓa, ṱhalukanyo yawe ndi khulu." 
Job36:6 Ha tendi vhavhi vha tshi ḓi tshila; vhashai u ḓi vha ṋea pfanelo dzavho; 
Job36:7 u dzula a tshi londola vhavhuya. U ita uri mahosi a vhuse miṅwaha na miṅwaha, hone vhá vhuya vha ḓihudza," 
Job36:8 vha farwa vha vhoxwa nga dzigeḓane, vha tandwa nga thambo, vha tambudzwa;" 
Job36:9 u vha sumbedza zwe vha ita – uri vho tshinya nga u ḓihudza; 
Job36:10 u ralo ha vha u ita uri vha kolongonye nḓevhe vha tshi laiwa, a vha vhudza uri vha laṱe." 
Job36:11 Arali vha mu thetshelesa vha mu shumela, vha ḓo ḓi tshila nga mulalo, zwa ḓi vha nakela." 
Job36:12 Hone arali vha ita tshipimbi vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vha fa nge vha sa fune u ḓivha Mudzimu." 
Job36:13 Vha no nyadza Mudzimu vha dzulela u mu sinyusa; a tshi vha vhofha a vha ṱavhi mukosi. 
Job36:14 Vha fa vha tshee vhaṱuku, unga phombwe dza vhanna dzi no dzula thembeleni dza midzimu." 
Job36:15 Vha tambulaho u vha tshidza nga ḽone dambudzo, a ita uri maṱungu a vha bonyolose." 
Job36:16 Na vhone Vho-Jobo o vha kunga uri a vha ponyokise mulomoni wa i ḽaho, a ita uri vha ḓiphiṋe vho tsireledzea ḓafula ḽavho ḽí na muṱumba wa zwiḽiwa zwa mapfura." 
Job36:17 Hone zwino vha khou rwiwa nga ṱhamu yo fanelaho muvhi; vho haṱulwa hu sa itwi tshiṱalulo. 
Job36:18 Vha vhone vha sa ḓo ri u sinyuwa vha vho ṱunga Mudzimu; vha vhone vha sa ḓo edzisa u pfumedzana na Mudzimu nga tshanḓanguvhoni. 
Job36:19 Vha vhona unga lupfumo lwavho na maanḓa avho oṱhe zwi nga vha tika vha si wele khomboni naa? 
Job36:20 Vha songo tama vhusiku ha khaṱhulo vhu tshi swika; ndi tshifhinga tshine tshakha dza ḓo thubwa. 
Job36:21 Vha vhone vha sa ḓo pambutshela vhutshinyini, vhune nda vhona vha tshi vhu takalela u fhira dambudzo." 
Job36:22 Vha songo hangwa uri maanḓa a Mudzimu ndi mahulu; ndi nnyi mufunzi ane a nga Ene? 
Job36:23 Ndi nnyi ane a nga mu sengisa? Ndi nnyi ane a nga mu vhudza a ri, “Wo khakha”?" 
Job36:24 U ḓi rendelwa zwine a ita; na vhone kha vha mu rende; 
Job36:25 vhathu vhoṱhe vha a zwi vhona, naho muthu a tshi zwi ṱalela e kule." 
Job36:26 Vhuhulu ha Mudzimu ndi khundaṱhalukanyo; a ri koni u vhala miṅwaha yawe. 
Job36:27 Ndi Ene a no kupula marotha a mvula, shango ḽa oma, a dovha a a ṱuḓa, a vha mvula, a ḓadza milambo." 
Job36:28 U shulula mvula i tshi bva kha makole, ya nela vhathu vhanzhi." 
Job36:29 A no ḓivha kutshimbilele kwa makole ndi nnyi? Ene a tshi ri ngindii, ngindii, e pfamoni yawe, zwi ṱalukanywa nga nnyi?" 
Job36:30 U ita uri lutomboni lwoṱhe hu ri “vhenge”, hone vhudzivha ha lwanzhe a dzula o tiba." 
Job36:31 U vhusa vhathu nga u ralo, a tshi vha ṋea zwiḽiwa, vha ḽa vha laṱa." 
Job36:32 U puta lupenyo nga tshanḓa, a lu sumba hune lwa yo rwa;" 
Job36:33 kholomo dzi ri u pfa mubvumo dza ḓivha uri maḓumbu a mvula a nḓilani, dza fembedza." 
Job37:1 Hezwo zwi karusa mbilu yanga, ya tou sinḓa, ya fhufha ya bva vhudzuloni hayo." 
Job37:2 Noṱhe thetshelesani zwavhuḓi Mudzimu a tshi vhomba! Ipfani a tshi amba ha tou bvuma! 
Job37:3 U vhofholola lupenyo lwa buḓekanya lutombo, lwa ri vhenge u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi;" 
Job37:4 zwenezwo ha pfala ipfi ḽawe ḽi tshi vhomba, a ri ngindii, ha pfala ipfi ḽawe ḽa maanḓa, na lupenyo a sa lu humisi hezwi ipfi ḽawe ḽi tshi bvuma." 
Job37:5 Ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽi tshi bvuma hu itea zwimangadzo; u ita mishumo mihulu ine ra si i ṱalukanye. 
Job37:6 U amba na gabugu a ri, “Wela fhasi!” a amba na mvula a ri, “Shulutshela fhasi hu tou pwaṱa!”" 
Job37:7 U imisa mishumo yoṱhe ya vhathu, uri vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓivhe mishumo yawe." 
Job37:8 Phukha dza ḓaka dzi yo dzumbama, dza dzula vhulaloni hadzo." 
Job37:9 Maḓumbu a vuwa a tshi bva tshisikuni tshao, muya wa ḓa na murotho u lumaho," 
Job37:10 mufemo wa Mudzimu u khaṱhisa maḓi, a oma a tou te." 
Job37:11 U panga makole maḓi a tou pha, a ruma lupenyo lwa buḓekanya lutombo," 
Job37:12 a rembulusa makole, a a sumba hune a ya, a ita zwoṱhe zwine Mudzimu a amba hoṱhe shangoni ḽoṱhe." 
Job37:13 A nga ḓi nisa mvula a tshi itela u lozwa vhathu, kana u vha sumbedza vhuthu hawe, kana u ḓitakadza." 
Job37:14 Vho-Jobo, nga vha thetshelese ndi vha vhudze: nga vha dzou elekanya zwimangadzo zwi itwaho nga Mudzimu." 
Job37:15 Vha a ḓivha uri Mudzimu u langa hani makole, na uri u penyisa hani lupenyo lu tshi bva khao?" 
Job37:16 Vha a ḓivha uri a nembelela hani lutomboni? Zwimangadzo hezwo zwi itwa nga Ene a re na nḓivho yo khunyelelaho. 
Job37:17 Zwino vhone khezwi na zwiambaro zwi tshi vha bvisa mabiko nga biso musi shango ḽoṱhe ḽo netiswa nga muya u bvaho phangani! 
Job37:18 Mudzimu a tshi ṱharamudza lutombo lwa tou oma unga tshivhoni tsha tsimbi, vha nga mu farisa naa?" 
Job37:19 Vhone nga vha ri funze zwine ra fanela u vhudza Mudzimu. Riṋe a ri koni u hanedzana nae, ri swiswini." 
Job37:20 A nga vhudzwa ha pfi ndi ṱoḓa u amba? Muthu a nga tou ri kha ndi govhedzwe? 
Job37:21 Zwino ndi nnyi ane a nga sedza ḓuvha ḽi tshi kombodza nga u rali ḽi lutomboni, lwó swielwa nga muya?" 
Job37:22 U ḓa a tshi bva devhula, e kha vhugala ha musuku; Mudzimu u ḓa o fuka lupenyo lu ofhisaho." 
Job37:23 Maanḓa a Ramaanḓaoṱhe ha swikelwi nga muthu; u haṱula a sa ṱaluli, u na vhuthu vhuhulu, ha kandeledzi muthu." 
Job37:24 Ndi zwine vhathu vha mu ofha. Vhoṱhe vhane vha ḓiita vhaṱali u a vhuya a vha londa naa? 
Job38:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi fhindula Jobo e kha ḓumbu. 
Job38:2 Muṋe washu: Ndi nnyi uyu ane a tsira nzudzanyo yanga nga maipfi a sa sumbi nḓivho? 
Job38:3 Edzou takuwa u ime wo khwaṱha sa munna: Ndi ḓo u vhudzisa mbudziso, iwe wa fhindula." 
Job38:4 Ndi tshi tea ḽifhasi, wo vha u hone? Arali u tshi zwi ṱalukanya, mmbudze." 
Job38:5 Ndi nnyi we a ela ḽifhasi? Hufha u tshi zwi ḓivha. Ndi nnyi we a ḽi ela nga ludzi a tshi ḽi tea? 
Job38:6 Tshi tikaho phuphu dzaḽo nga fhasi ndi mini? Tombo ḽa muteo waḽo ḽo vhewa nga nnyi? 
Job38:7 Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ho fhululedza ṋaledzi dzoṱhe dza mutsho, vharuṅwa vhoṱhe vha pembela." 
Job38:8 We a hoṋela lwanzhe ndi nnyi, zwiḽa lu tshi thuthuba lu tshi bva thumbuni ya shango?" 
Job38:9 Ndi zwiḽa ndi tshi lu tiba nga makole, nda lu putela nga swiswi, unga mme a tshi putela lushie." 
Job38:10 Ndo lu vhetshela mukano nda lu hoṋela thungo dzoṱhe," 
Job38:11 nda lu vhudza nda ri, “U guma henefha, a u tsha pfuka! Hafha ndi hone hune magabelo au a maanḓa a ḓo guma hone!”" 
Job38:12 Jobo, tshee wa bebwa, wo no vhuya wa ri nga ḽi tshe, ḽa tsha naa? Wo no vhuya wa ri ḽi tshe," 
Job38:13 ḽi kwame vhusendekamisi, vhavhi vha ukhuthwe he vha dzumbama hone naa?" 
Job38:14 Ḽi ita uri mivhundu na magovha zwi vhonale zwavhuḓi, unga mutalo wa makolo kha vumba, zwa nga nguvho yo onyana." 
Job38:15 Vhavhi vhone vha dziṅwa tshedza, vha kulwa nungo, vha si tsha huvhadza vhaṅwe." 
Job38:16 Wo no vhuya wa tshimbila wa swika zwisimani zwa lwanzhe? Wo no vhuya wa tshimbila mativhani alwo? 
Job38:17 Wo no vhuya wa sumbedzwa khoro dza lufu? Wo no vhuya wa vhona tshifhingo itsho tshitswu-tshitswu? 
Job38:18 U a vhuya wa ṱalukanya uri ḽifhasi ndi ḽingafhani? Mmbudze arali hezwo zwoṱhe u tshi zwi ḓivha. 
Job38:19 U a ḓivha hune tshedza tsha bva hone? Swiswi ḽone ḽi dzulafhi? 
Job38:20 U nga zwi sumbedza hune zwa fanela u guma hone, kana wa dovha wa zwi humisela hune zwa dzula?" 
Job38:21 Ndi vhona unga u a zwi ḓivha – hufha wo vha wo no bebwa. Wo tshila wa lalama. 
Job38:22 Wo no vhuya wa dzhena tshisikuni tsha gabugu, kana wa vhona ḓulu ḽa tshifhango?" 
Job38:23 Ndo zwi vhulungela musi wa khombo, maḓuvha a govholano na nndwa." 
Job38:24 Wo no vhuya wa ya hune ḓuvha ḽa bva hone, kana hune muya wa vhubvaḓuvha wa vhudzula u tshi bva hone?" 
Job38:25 Ndi nnyi we a phula milonga ya mvula ya mikumbela, maḓumbu a mvula a a swielela nḓila?" 
Job38:26 Ndi nnyi a no nisa mvula sogani, ya na phangani hu sa dzuli muthu?" 
Job38:27 Ndi nnyi a no sheledza shango ḽo omelelaho ha mela hatsi vhutete? 
Job38:28 Mvula i na khotsi naa? Ṅwando u bebwa nga nnyi? 
Job38:29 Tshifhango tshi bva thumbuni ya nnyi? Ndi nnyi a bebaho mahaḓa? 
Job38:30 A no shandukisa maḓi a tou te unga tombo, a khaṱhisa lwanzhe, ndi nnyi?" 
Job38:31 U ḓo kona u vhofhekanya Tshilimela, kana wa vhofholola mbofho dza Maakhala?" 
Job38:32 U nga endedza ṋaledzi dzi no kala ṅwaha, wa tshimbidza Khohamutsho na vhana vhayo naa?" 
Job38:33 U ḓivha milayo i no vhusa lutombo naa? U nga ita uri na fhano fhasi zwi ralo naa? 
Job38:34 U nga ṱavhela makole mukosi a nisa mvula ya u tiba naa? 
Job38:35 Nḓadzi i tshi yo rwa i ruṅwa nga iwe naa? I nga ḓa phanḓa hau ya ri, “Ri fhano!”?" 
Job38:36 Ndi nnyi a no sevha lufhoro uri ḽi tshi tsha hu ḓo vha na mvula ya mibvumbi, kana a ṋea mukuku ṱhalukanyo ya u imba mutsho?" 
Job38:37 A re na vhuṱali ha u vhala makole ndi nnyi? Ndi nnyi a no shulula mvuvhelo dza ṱaḓulu, ya na," 
Job38:38 buse ḽo omelelaho ḽa ṋukala ḽa vhumbana, maḓinga a nambatelana?" 
Job38:39 Ndau dza tsadzi u a dzi zwimela, wa fusha ndau i na nḓala –" 
Job38:40 ndi amba musi dzo dzumbama dzo lalela, dzi tshi dodela maṱakani dzi tshi yo ponda?" 
Job38:41 Ndi nnyi a no posela mahunguvhu tshidu musi vhana vhao vha tshi lilela Mudzimu, a tshi tendeleka nga u shaya zwiḽiwa?" 
Job39:1 U a ḓivha uri ngululu dzi dzwala lini? U a vhuya wa sedza phala i tshi dzwala ṋamana yayo? 
Job39:2 U a vhala miṅwedzi u swika dzi tshi dzwala? Tshifhinga tshadzo u a tshi ḓivha naa? 
Job39:3 Dzi a tumba dza dzwala vhana vhadzo, maṱungu a u dzwala a mbo ḓi vha o fhela." 
Job39:4 Vhana vhadzo vha aluwa vho khwaṱha ngei ḓakani, vha ṱuwa vha si tsha vhuya." 
Job39:5 Ndi nnyi we a litsha mbiḓi ya sokou ḓitshimbilela? Ndi nnyi we a vhofholola thambo dzo i vhofhaho? 
Job39:6 Ndo i ṋea soga uri ḽi vhe hayani hayo, nda i ṋea mavu a muṋo uri i dzule hone." 
Job39:7 I sea vilinga ḽi re muḓini; na mukosi wa musi dzo pana a i u pfi. 
Job39:8 I rambalala mivhunduni uri i wane pfulo, ya ṱoḓa mafulo madala." 
Job39:9 Ṋari i ḓo tenda u u shumela naa? I ḓo lala dangani ḽau naa? 
Job39:10 U nga i fara nga muhala ya lima naa? I nga u limela miṱanga naa? 
Job39:11 Nungo dzayo dzi ḓo u ṋeani? U nga i kumedza mishumo yau i lemelaho naa? 
Job39:12 U nga fulufhela uri i ḓo u kaṋela mavhele naa? Ya a kuvhanganya hune wa fhula hone naa? 
Job39:13 Mphwe i ḓiphiṋa nga u ṱongisa phapha dzayo, hone a i fhufhi unga gololwane." 
Job39:14 I kudzela makumba ayo fhasi, ya a alamela muṱavhani," 
Job39:15 i sa londi uri i nga a pwasha nga milenzhe, na uri phukha dza ḓaka dzi nga a kandekanya." 
Job39:16 I itela vhana vhayo tshiṱuhu, vha nga a si vhayo, ya si londe uri zwe ya shuma o vha e mahandana." 
Job39:17 Mudzimu ho ngo i ṋea vhuṱali, ho ngo i kovhela ṱhalukanyo." 
Job39:18 Nangwe zwo ralo, ya ṱharamudza phapha i a gidima; i sea bere na munameli wayo." 
Job39:19 Bere i ṋewa nungo nga iwe naa? Mudzedze yo ambadzwa nga iwe naa? 
Job39:20 Ndi iwe u no ita uri i fhufhe unga nzie? I tshi ṱonga nga u fumula, zwi a ofhisa." 
Job39:21 I ḓiphiṋa nga maanḓa ayo i tshi pala fhasi, ya tou fhinini nga luvhilo yo livha nndwani." 
Job39:22 I sea nyofho, yone i sa ofhi tshithu; a i shoni pfumo." 
Job39:23 Mukutu u lila matungo ayo, pfumo na banga zwe vhai." 
Job39:24 I ḽa mavu yo nyanyuwa; phalaphala i tshi lila a i tsha dumbelwa. 
Job39:25 I tshi pfa lufhalafhala i a lila ya ri, “Ahaa!” I pfa munukho wa nndwa i tshee kule, ya pfa ndaela na mukosi wa nndwa." 
Job39:26 Kani lurwanzhivha lu fhufha nga vhuṱali hau lu tshi ṱharamudza phapha lwo livha tshipembe? 
Job39:27 Goni ḽi tshi fhufhela nṱha ḽi vhudzwa nga iwe naa? Ndi iwe u no vhudza ḽianga uri ḽi fhaṱe tshiṱaha tshaḽo nṱha ha luwa naa? 
Job39:28 Ḽi dzula luwani vhusiku; ḽi dzumbama muṱumbani wa luwa; 
Job39:29 u bva henefho ḽi ḓiṱoḓela zwiḽiwa; maṱo aḽo a zwi vhona ḽi kule. 
Job39:30 Mafhondo aḽo a ḓiphiṋa nga malofha; ha vhulawa phukha, ḽi henefho." 
Job40:1 Muṋe washu: 
Job40:2 Jobo, u funa u imedzana na Ramaanḓaoṱhe wa mu khakhulula naa? U funa u hanedzana na Mudzimu naa? Ndi zwone, mphindule!" 
Job40:3 Jobo a tshi fhindula: 
Job40:4 A zwo ngo mpfanela. Ndi ḓo fhindula nda ri mini? Zwo ntsomela. 
Job40:5 Hufha ndo no ḓi amba nda pfukisa, a thi tsha dovha." 
Job40:6 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi dovha a amba na Jobo e kha ḓumbu. Muṋe washu: 
Job40:7 Edzou takuwa u ime wo khwaṱha sa munna: Nṋe ndi ḓo u vhudzisa mbudziso, iwe u mphindule." 
Job40:8 Kani-ha u khou ṱoḓa u sumbedza uri a wo ngo khakha, mukhakhi ndi Nṋe, u ralo ha vha u thutha khaṱhulo yanga?" 
Job40:9 Maanḓa au a nga a Mudzimu naa? Ipfi ḽau ḽi nga bvuma unga ḽawe naa? 
Job40:10 Ndi zwone, ḓiṱame nga vhuhulu na vhurena, u ambare vhugala na lupenyo." 
Job40:11 Edzou vhona vhadzia-u-ḓihudza: vha sinyutshele, u vha balanganye u vha ṱukufhadze." 
Job40:12 Edzou sedza vhadzia-u-ḓiḓivha, u vha nyadzise, he vha ima hone u mbo ḓi vha kuya!" 
Job40:13 Vha swiṱe vhoṱhe buseni; tiba zwifhaṱuwo zwavho tshaloni," 
Job40:14 ndi hone na Nṋe ndi tshi ḓo u khoḓa, nda ri wo kunda nga maanḓa au." 
Job40:15 Edzou vhona mvuvhu ye nda i vhumba u ḓi nga ndo vhumba iwe: I fula hatsi unga phulu. 
Job40:16 Edzou vhona uri muṱoḓo wayo wo khwaṱha hani! Misipha ya thumbu yayo i na maanḓa mangafhani! 
Job40:17 Mutshila wayo wo tou tswititi unga mukedara; tsinga dza tshizwa tshayo dzo tou tandekana; 
Job40:18 marambo ayo ndi phaiphi dza musinaseṱha; mbabvu dzayo dzi nga mabaphathi a tsimbi. 
Job40:19 I fhira miṅwe mishumo ya Mudzimu; i nga kundwa nga Muvhumbi wayo fhedzi. 
Job40:20 Hatsi vhune ya fula vhu mela mivhunduni, hune ha tamba phukha dza ḓaka." 
Job40:21 I shuvhama fhasi ha mukhalu, ya dzumbama ṱhangani maṱafani." 
Job40:22 I dzumbama henefho mirunzini yo tangiwa nga miṋengeledzi. 
Job40:23 Mulambo u tshi ḓala a i shavhi; yo tsireledzea naho maḓi a Jorodani a tshi nga i hambela. 
Job40:24 Ndi nnyi ane a nga phuphudza maṱo ayo, a i fara a i phulela muhala?" 
Job40:25 U nga fasha ngweṋa nga tshilazwulo tsha khovhe naa? U nga vhofha lulimi lwayo nga thambo naa? 
Job40:26 U nga i longa muhala wa muṱaṱe naa? U nga phula ṱhaha dzayo nga huka ya mupfa naa? 
Job40:27 U vhona unga i ḓo dzula i tshi u luvhelela? I ḓo amba na iwe nga vhulenda naa? 
Job40:28 I ḓo pfana na iwe ya tenda uri i ḓo vha phuli yau tshoṱhe naa? 
Job40:29 U nga i fuwa unga tshiṋoni naa? U nga i hunga wa takadza ngayo vhasidzana naa? 
Job40:30 Vhavhambadzi vha ḓo i renga nga muṱaṱisano naa? Vha nga i kovhekanya vharengisi naa? 
Job40:31 Misevhe ya huka i nga pfula mukumba wayo naa? Pfumo ḽa khovhe ḽi nga phula ṱhoho yayo naa? 
Job40:32 Edzou vhea tshanḓa tshau khayo: I ḓo vha nndwa khulu; u nga si tsha dovha! 
Job41:1 U songo vhuya wa fulufhela uri u nga i kona; u tou i vhona fhedzi zwi kula nungo. 
Job41:2 A hu na muthu a re na tshiṱuhu tsha u thoma itsho tshivhumbwa tshanga, zwino ane a nga imedzana na Nṋe ndi nnyi?" 
Job41:3 Ndi nnyi ane a ri ndo ḽa mulandu wawe? Hufha zwoṱhe zwi re fhasi ha lutombo zwi zwanga. 
Job41:4 A thi nga litshi u amba miraḓo ya ngweṋa, na nungo dzayo, na u naka ha tshivhumbeo tshayo:" 
Job41:5 Ane a nga i sutula mukumba ndi nnyi? Ndi nnyi ane a nga i longa ḓomo? 
Job41:6 Mulomo wayo wo ḓala maṋo a ofhisaho; ndi nnyi ane a nga u ganulula? 
Job41:7 Muṱana wayo wo phapha ngwasa dza makwanda a no nga zwiṱangu, zwo tou lukekana zwoṱhe," 
Job41:8 makwanda a ṱumana lune muya wa si dzhene; 
Job41:9 o nambatelana a tou kwakwana, ha fhandekanywi nga tshithu." 
Job41:10 I tshi atsamula hu fhufha ṱhase; maṱo ayo o tswuka unga mapfuvhi; 
Job41:11 mulomoni wayo hu duga khavhu dza mulilo, ha thamuwa ṱhase;" 
Job41:12 ningoni dzayo hu duba vhutsi, zwa nga hu khou vhila khali i no vhasedzwa nga ṱhanga;" 
Job41:13 i tshi fema hu bva masimbe, ha duga khavhu mulomoni wayo." 
Job41:14 Nungo dzayo dzi mutsingani; vhoṱhe vha a i ofha vha tou tetemela; 
Job41:15 ṋama dzayo dzo tou vhofhekana; dzo tou te, a dzi sudzuluwi;" 
Job41:16 khana yayo yo khwaṱha unga tombo, i nga lwala." 
Job41:17 Ya vuwa, vha maanḓa na vhone vha a ofha; ya ritha maḓi vha huma nga tsha murahu." 
Job41:18 Pfumo ḽa poswa ḽi nga itani? Hu banga, hu tsanga, hu musevhe, a zwi i iti tshithu." 
Job41:19 I vunḓa tsimbi unga ṱanga, musinaseṱha i vhona ḽi vongori;" 
Job41:20 i tshi vhona musevhe a i shavhi, matombo a gatho ya vhona e mathukhwi;" 
Job41:21 mugopi i vhona u tshi nga ṱanga; vhathu vha tshi posa mafumo, i a sea;" 
Job41:22 makwanda a re thumbuni yayo a nga zwipali zwa khali, a sia mutalo matopeni unga tshilei;" 
Job41:23 i selusa mativha unga khali i tshi vhila, a nga khali ya mapfura i tshi xaxara;" 
Job41:24 ya tala, i sia mutalo u penyaho, wa vhona unga mativha a na mmvi." 
Job41:25 A hu na tshi no vhambedzwa nayo fhano fhasi; ndi tshisikwa tshi sa ofhi tshithu; 
Job41:26 i nyadza na phukha dzoṱhe khulwane; ndi yone khosi ya mabuka oṱhe. 
Job42:1 Jobo: 
Job42:2 Ndi a ḓivha uri u kona u ita zwoṱhe; zwe wa dzudzanya a u kundwi u zwi ita. 
Job42:3 Wo vhudzisa wa ri, “Ndi nnyi uyu a no tsira nzudzanyo yanga nga maipfi a sa sumbi nḓivho?” Vhukumakuma ndo amba zwine nda si zwi ṱalukanye; mishumo yau ndi zwimangadzo, a thi i ṱalukanyi." 
Job42:4 Wo ri, “Zwino thetshelesa, Nṋe ndi ḓo amba; ndi ḓo u vhudzisa mbudziso, iwe wa mphindula.”" 
Job42:5 Ndo vha ndo tou u pfa nga nḓevhe, zwino ndo u vhona nga maṱo." 
Job42:6 Ndi zwine nda ḓinyadza, nda ḓisola ndi tshi vhumbuluwa buseni na milorani." 
Job42:7 Muṋe washu o no vhudza Jobo mafhungo ayo, a amba na Elifasi wa Themana, a ri, “Ndo sinyutshela iwe na khonani dzau mbili; ni tshi nnyamba a no ngo amba zwi re zwone, we a amba zwi re zwone ndi mulanda wanga Jobo." 
Job42:8 Zwino vhonani! Dzhiani mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili, ni ye ha mulanda wanga Jobo, ni ṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tsho fhiswaho ni tshi itela inwi vhaṋe. Mulanda wanga Jobo u ḓo ni rabelela; Nṋe ndi ḓo ṱanganedza thabelo yawe, nda si tsha ni lifhedzela vhutsilu haṋu; ni tshi nnyamba a no ngo amba zwi re zwone, we a amba zwi re zwone ndi mulanda wanga Jobo.”" 
Job42:9 Ndi hone Elifasi wa Themana na Bilidadi wa Shuwa na Tsofara wa Naama vha tshi ya vha ita zwe Muṋe washu a vha vhudza; ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ṱanganedza thabelo ya Jobo. 
Job42:10 Musi Jobo o no rabelela khonani dzawe, Muṋe washu a dovha u mu shudufhadza, a mu ṋea kavhili zwe a vha e nazwo kale." 
Job42:11 Vharathu vhawe na dzikhaladzi na khonani dzawe dzoṱhe vha ḓa vha ḽa nae nḓuni yawe, vha mu fhumudza vha mu khuthadza vha tshi itela khombo dzoṱhe dze Muṋe washu a vha o mu hwesa, muṅwe na muṅwe a mu ṋea ḽingwende ḽa siliva na rinngi ya musuku." 
Job42:12 Muṋe washu a shudufhadza Jobo u fhira zwiḽa zwa u ranga, a vha na nngu dza 14 000, na gamela dza 6 000, na phulu dza 2 000, na donngi dza 1 000," 
Job42:13 a dovha a vha na vhana vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha vhatuka na vhararu vha vhasidzana. 
Job42:14 Ṅwana wa u thoma wa musidzana a mu rina dzina ḽi no pfi Jemima, wa vhuvhili a pfi Kesia, wa vhuraru a pfi Kerene Haphukhu." 
Job42:15 Shangoni ḽoṱhe ho vha hu si na vhasadzi vho nakaho unga vhana vha Jobo vha vhasidzana; khotsi avho a vha kovhela ifa na khaladzi dzavho. 
Job42:16 Ho no fhira izwo, Jobo a tshila a fhedza ḓana ḽa miṅwaha na miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa, a vhona vhana vhawe, na vhana vhavho, u swika kha murafho wa vhuṋa." 
Job42:17 Ndi hone a tshi ḓifela, ó kalaha, ó lalama." 
Psalms1:1 Wa mashudu ndi uyo munna ane muvhi a sa vhe tsumbanḓila yawe, a sa kandi nḓilani ya vhatshinyi, a si na tshitumbe na vha no nyefula zwa Mudzimu," 
Psalms1:2 tshawe ha vha u takalela Mulayo wa Muṋe washu, a u elekanya vhusiku na masiari." 
Psalms1:3 U nga muri wo ṱavhiwaho khunzikhunzini ya mulambo, u sa fhidzi u aṋwa mitshelo, u sa puti maṱari. Zwoṱhe zwine a ita zwi a mu nakela." 
Psalms1:4 Vhavhi vhone a vho ngo ralo, vha nga mungu u hwalwaho nga muya." 
Psalms1:5 Ndi zwine khaṱhulo i tshi ḓa vhavhi vha sa ḓo dziba, vhatshinyi a vha nga dzheni khuvhanganoni ya vhavhuya." 
Psalms1:6 Nḓila ya a no fulufhedzea i lindwa nga Muṋe washu, ya vhavhi yone ndi ya u lovha." 
Psalms2:1 Nṋa gaḓa ḽa vhannḓa ndi ḽa mini? Tshakha dzi langanelani zwa mahandana? 
Psalms2:2 Mahosi a ḽifhasi a ima o ḓilugisela nndwa; vhavhusi nga tshavho vha khou langana u lwa na Muṋe washu na khosi yawe ye a i ta. 
Psalms2:3 Vha ri, “Kha ri ṱhukhukanye mbofho dzavho, thambo dzavho ri dzi laṱe kule!”" 
Psalms2:4 Matsina a dzulaho ngei ṱaḓulu u a vha sea, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u tou tamba ngavho." 
Psalms2:5 A konou amba navho o sinyuwa, a vha tshenusa o halifha," 
Psalms2:6 a ri, “Nṋe ndo vhea khosi yanga thavhani yanga khethwa ya Tsioni.”" 
Psalms2:7 Litshani ndi ni vhudze zwe Muṋe washu a vhofha: O amba na nṋe a ri, “Iwe u murwa wanga, ndo u beba ṋamusi ḽino." 
Psalms2:8 Nkhumbele tshine wa funa. Dzitshakha ndi ḓo u ṋea ḽa vha ifa ḽau, shango u ya he ḽa guma ḽi ḓo vha ḽau." 
Psalms2:9 U ḓo vha vunḓekanya nga luḓo, u ḓo vha pwashekanya unga khali ya vumba.”" 
Psalms2:10 Zwino-ha inwi mahosi, laṱani vhutsilu haṋu ni ṱalifhe, inwi vhavhusi vha ḽifhasi, tendani u eletshedzwa." 
Psalms2:11 Luvhani Muṋe washu ni mu ofhe, mu pembeleleni ni tshi tou tetemela," 
Psalms2:12 shuvhamani mavuni ni mu luvhe, a sa ḓo sinyuwa na vho rwiwa ni songo ṱhaphudza. Ḓivhani uri mbiti dzawe dzi nga mbo ḓi vuwa. Vha mashudu ndi avho vhane vha khuda ngae." 
Psalms3:1 Muṋe washu, vhona uri maswina anga o anda hani! Ndi vhanzhi vha mmvutshelaho," 
Psalms3:2 a si vhaṱuku vhane vha tshi nnyamba vha ri, “Mudzimu a nga si mu lamulele.”" 
Psalms3:3 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu u tshiṱangu tsha u mpilela: vhugala hanga ndi Iwe, ndi Iwe u mmbeaho maṱhakheni." 
Psalms3:4 Ndi ṱavhela Muṋe washu mukosi, a mpfa e thavhani yawe khethwa." 
Psalms3:5 Ndi lala fhasi nda eḓela, nda dovha nda vuwa; ndi tikwa nga Muṋe washu." 
Psalms3:6 Tshakha dzine dza nndia dzi tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe, a thi nga dzi ofhi na u ḓala hádzo." 
Psalms3:7 Takuwa Muṋe washu! Mudzimu wanga, iḓa u ntshidze! Hufha u tshi ḓi bomodza maswina anga, vhavhi u tshi ḓi vha kula maṋo." 
Psalms3:8 U tshidza hu bva kha Iwe Muṋe washu. Dzula u tshi ḓi shudufhadza vhathu vhau. 
Psalms4:1 Aravha ndi tshi vhidzelela Iwe Mudzimu Mulamuleli wanga! Ndo vha ndo khakhedzwa, Iwe wa nndamukisa; zwino nnyitele tshilidzi u pfe thabelo yanga." 
Psalms4:2 Hee inwi vhanna, nṋa ni ḓo litsha lini u shandula vhugala hanga na vhu ita vhuḓabaḓaba? Ni ḓo litsha lini u ḓikumedza mahandana na u tevhela mazwifhi?" 
Psalms4:3 Ḓivhani uri Muṋe washu o ḓikhethela nṋe mulanda wawe a fulufhedzeaho. Muṋe washu u a pfa ndi tshi mu vhidzelela. 
Psalms4:4 Na u sinyuwa háṋu, ni songo tshinya. Na musi ni malaloni, tshi vhe tshilomondundundu." 
Psalms4:5 Bvisani zwiṱhavhelo zwo teaho, ni ḓitike nga Muṋe washu." 
Psalms4:6 Hu na vhanzhi vhane vha ri, “Ngavhe zwi tshi tou dovha zwa ri nakela nandi!” Vha ri, “Iwe Muṋe washu, dovha u ri penyisele tshedza tsha tshifhaṱuwo tshau, u ri farise.”" 
Psalms4:7 Hone nṋe mbilu yanga wo i ḓadza dakalo ḽine ḽa fhira ḽavho naho vho fura zwiḽiwa na waini. 
Psalms4:8 Zwino ndo lala ndo rudza mbilu nda fara khofhe; Iwe Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe u woṱhe une wa nnzudza ho khudaho." 
Psalms5:1 Muṋe washu, thetshelesa zwine nda amba, u pfe u fhihamelwa hanga!" 
Psalms5:2 Iwe Khosi yanga, Mudzimu wanga, ipfa ndi tshi u ṱavhela mukosi! Hufha ndi tshi rabela Iwe." 
Psalms5:3 U mpfe ndi tshi u rabela nga matsheloni. Ndi vhea thabelo yanga phanḓa hau ḽi tshi tsha, nda lindela phindulo yau." 
Psalms5:4 Hufha u si Mudzimu a no takalela vhuvhi. Muvhi a u koni u mu swielela. 
Psalms5:5 Matsilu a u funi u a vhona phanḓa hau, u vhenga vhaitazwivhi." 
Psalms5:6 Vhadziauzwifha u a vha lozwa vhoṱhe. Muṋe washu u nengwa mufhaladzamalofha na pheṱhi. 
Psalms5:7 Hone nṋe nga vhuthu hau ndi ḓo dzhena nḓuni yau, nda gwadama nda fhelela nga u ofha Iwe ndó livhana na thembele yau khethwa." 
Psalms5:8 Muṋe washu, nthange phanḓa nga vhuvhuya hau; maswina anga khea o dzula o lavhelesa. Ntshimbidze nḓilani yau i si ya magombikwa." 
Psalms5:9 Zwine vhathu avha vha amba a zwi fulufhedzei, mbiluni dzavho hu fhufhuma khombo fhedzi. Ndimi dzavho ndi dza u swaledzela, hone zwiambo zwavho zwi tshi bwela muthu tshalo." 
Psalms5:10 Mudzimu, vha lifhedze, khunḓa nga i fashe muvei. Vha kudze kule, mivhango yavho a i fheli, vho u shandukela." 
Psalms5:11 Hone litsha vha khudaho nga Iwe vha pembele, vha litshe vha fhululedze nga hu sa fheli; tsireledza vhane vha funa dzina ḽau uri vha ḓiphiṋe ngaḽo." 
Psalms5:12 Iwe Muṋe washu u ḓo shudufhadza a no fulufhedzea, u ḓo mu tanga nga lufuno lwa tou nga tshiṱangu." 
Psalms6:1 Yawee Muṋe washu, u songo tsha nkaidza wo sinyuwa, u songo nthwa musi u tshi duga nga mbiti." 
Psalms6:2 Muṋe washu, nkhathutshele; ndi khou fhelela ndi tshi ya. Mphodze, miraḓo yanga yo kulekana." 
Psalms6:3 Ndo hanganea tshoṱhe. Yawee Muṋe washu, u ḓo vhuya wa nkhathutshela lini?" 
Psalms6:4 Vhuya Muṋe washu, mmbofholole, ntshidze, hufha u na vhuthu." 
Psalms6:5 Kha vho faho haho ane a kha ḓi u elelwa; ndi nnyi ane a kha ḓi u renda henengei vhudzulavhafu? 
Psalms6:6 U gomela hanga ho no tou nnetisa. Vhusiku hoṱhe ndi rothisa miṱodzi thovho yanga ya vhuya ya ṋukala; vhulalo hanga ndi vhu lovhedza nga miṱodzi. 
Psalms6:7 Maṱo anga o no tou punda nga u lila; ha tsha vhona nga mulandu wa vhakandeledzi vhanga. 
Psalms6:8 Ṱuwani maṱoni anga noṱhe inwi vhaitazwivhi, Muṋe washu o pfa tshililo tshanga!" 
Psalms6:9 Muṋe washu o pfa khumbelo yanga ndi tshi ḓiṱukufhadza, Muṋe washu u ṱanganedza thabelo yanga." 
Psalms6:10 Maswina anga oṱhe a ḓo tou tetemela, a ḓo huma kathihi fhedzi o shona." 
Psalms7:1 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, ndi khuda nga Iwe, vha ntovholaho khevha, ntshidze, nndamukise," 
Psalms7:2 uri vha sa ḓo mponda sa ndau, vha nṱhukhukanya hu si na mulamukisi." 
Psalms7:3 Yawee Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, arali hu na tshe nda tshinya, zwanḓa zwanga zwó ita tshivhi," 
Psalms7:4 arali ndo khakhela a si na nndwa na nṋe, litsha swina ḽanga ḽi nndonde ḽi mpfare, ee, ḽi litshe ḽi ntsikeledzele fhasi, ḽi nkandekanye ndi tsumbudzee mavuni, hu vhe u nnyadzisa tshoṱhe. Hone hezwo a tho ngo zwi ita; hufha na ane a sokou ntswima ndo mu litsha a ṱuwa." 
Psalms7:5  
Psalms7:6 Muṋe washu, takuwa wo halifha, maswina anga khea o sinyuwa, takuwa u nndamulele! Vuwa u nndamukise!" 
Psalms7:7 Tshivhidzo tsha dzitshakha kha tshi u tange, vhuya u dzule kha khuluṋoni yau nṱha havho ngei ṱaḓulu." 
Psalms7:8 Muṋe washu u ḓo haṱula dzitshakha. Nṋe nkhaṱhule u tshi tevhedza vhuvhuya hanga, Muṋe washu, vhunga mulandu ndi si na." 
Psalms7:9 Fhelisa vhuvhi ha vhavhi nandi, vha fulufhedzeaho vhone vha ṱoke midzi, Iwe Mufhenḓi wa mbilu na mihumbulo, Mudzimu a no fulufhedzea." 
Psalms7:10 Ene Mudzimu ndi tshiṱangu tshanga, Mutshidzi wa vha si na vhufhura ndi Ene." 
Psalms7:11 Mudzimu ndi Muhaṱuli a sa ṱaluli, mbiti dzawe a dzi dziki misi yoṱhe." 
Psalms7:12 Arali muvhi a sa rembuluwa Mudzimu u ḓo ṱuṱula banga ḽawe, a akha vhura hawe a dzula o sumba," 
Psalms7:13 zwihali zwa u vhulaha muvhi zwi dzula zwi tsini, u pfula nga misevhe i dugaho mulilo." 
Psalms7:14 Vhonani muvhi khoyo! U kha vhuṱungu ha u beba vhuvhi! O vhifha muvhilini nga hone vhuvhi, a fhedza nga u beba mazwifhi." 
Psalms7:15 O bwa dindi a ita khunḓa, zwino khunḓa yo fasha muvei." 
Psalms7:16 Vhuvhi hawe vhu ḓo vhuya nṱha ha ṱhoho yawe, u levha hawe hu ḓo mu ḽa ṱhoho." 
Psalms7:17 Ndi ḓo renda Muṋe washu ndi tshi itela vhuvhuya hawe. Dzina ḽa Muṋe washu Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, ndi ḓo ḽi renda nga nyimbo." 
Psalms8:1 Muṋe washu Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, dzina ḽau ḽi kanukisa hani ḽifhasini ḽoṱhe, Iwe wo vheaho vhugala hau ngei lutomboni!" 
Psalms8:2 Mishumo yau ya maanḓa ye wa i tea i imbiwa nga vhana na dzitshetshe, uri u shonise vha maṅaṅa, u vale mulomo wa swina ḽau na mulifhedzi." 
Psalms8:3 Musi ndi tshi lavhelesa ngei lutomboni nda vhona mishumo ya zwanḓa zwau, ṅwedzi na ṋeledzi dze wa vhekanya," 
Psalms8:4 ndi ri: muthu u tou vha mini u tshi vhuya wa mu humbula? Ṅwana wa muthu u tou vha mini u tshi vhuya wa mu tonda? 
Psalms8:5 Wo mu hulisa a tou fhirwinyana nga vharuṅwa, wa mu ambadza tshiala tsha vhugala na lupenyo." 
Psalms8:6 Wo mu vhea uri a vhuse zwe wa vhumba nga zwanḓa zwau, zwithu zwoṱhe wo zwi vhea fhasi ha ṋayo dzawe:" 
Psalms8:7 ho dzula nngu dzoṱhe na kholomo, ndi amba na dzone phukha dza ḓaka," 
Psalms8:8 zwiṋoni zwi fhufhaho muyani na khovhe dza lwanzheni, na zwoṱhe zwi talaho mativhani a lwanzhe." 
Psalms8:9 Muṋe washu Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, dzina ḽau ḽi kanukisa hani ḽifhasini ḽoṱhe!" 
Psalms9:1 Ndi ḓo u renda nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe Muṋe washu, maḓembe au oṱhe ndi ḓo a anea." 
Psalms9:2 Ndi ḓo takala nda tou pembela ndi tshi humbula Iwe. Ndi renda dzina ḽau nga nyimbo, Iwe Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu," 
Psalms9:3 ndi tshi vhona maswina anga o no shakuliswa, vha tshi gobagoba vha wa vha lovha phanḓa hau." 
Psalms9:4 Ndi Iwe wo onyolosaho mulandu wanga, mafhungo a naka. Wo ya wa dzula kha khuluṋoni yau, Iwe Muhaṱuli a sa ṱaluli." 
Psalms9:5 Wo tshenusa vhannḓa wa lozwa vhavhi, dzina ḽavho ḽa si tsha dovha ḽa elelwa lini na lini." 
Psalms9:6 Maswina o fhela tshoṱhe, ha sala marubi fhedzi u swika lini na lini, miḓi yavho wo i thuthekanya ya mbo ḓi hangwiwa tshoṱhe." 
Psalms9:7 Hone Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓi dzula e hone lini na lini, khuluṋoni yawe o dzula o i tika uri a haṱule." 
Psalms9:8 Shango u ḓo ḽi haṱula a sa ṱaluli, dzitshakha u ḓo dzi haṱula nga khaṱhulo i sa khakhi." 
Psalms9:9 Muṋe washu ndi dzhavhelo ḽa vho kandeledzwaho, ndi Ene bako ḽa vhukhudo musi wa u khakhedzwa." 
Psalms9:10 Vhane vha u ḓivha nga vha fulufhele Iwe, Iwe Muṋe washu a u laṱedzi vhane vha shavhela kha iwe." 
Psalms9:11 Muṋe washu a dzulaho Tsioni mu rendeni nga nyimbo, ḓivhadzani dzitshakha mishumo yawe." 
Psalms9:12 Ha hangwi tshililo tsha vhaheḓana, u a vha elelwa a vha lifhedzela." 
Psalms9:13 Yawee Muṋe washu, nnyitele tshilidzi, sedza vhutshena vhune nda vha khaho nga mulandu wa vha mmbengaho; ndi Iwe une wa nndamukisa mulomoni wa i ḽaho," 
Psalms9:14 uri ndi u rende phanḓa ha vhathu vhoṱhe vha Tsioni, ndi pembele nge wa ntshidza." 
Psalms9:15 Vhannḓa vhone, khunḓa yo fasha muvei, gwekwe ḽo fasha murei." 
Psalms9:16 Muṋe washu u ḓivhelwa u haṱula hawe; asizwi-ha, kha muvhi vhutulu ho ḽa mufhomi." 
Psalms9:17 Vhavhi vhoṱhe vha ḓo tsetsa vha guma nga vhudzulavhafu, khathihi na tshakha dzoṱhe dzine dza hangwa Mudzimu." 
Psalms9:18 Vhashai a vha nga hangwiwi tshoṱhe, zwe vhaheḓana vha lavhelela zwi ḓo vhuya zwa wanala." 
Psalms9:19 Yawee Muṋe washu, takuwa! U songo tenda hu tshi kunda muthu wa ṋama, vhannḓa nga vha haṱulwe phanḓa hau." 
Psalms9:20 Muṋe washu, vha shele nyofho, dzitshakha dzi ḓivhe uri vha tou vha vhathu vha ṋama." 
Psalms10:1 Muṋe washu, khezwi wo tou ima ngeo kule? U itelani u tshi ḓidzumba musi zwo vhifha?" 
Psalms10:2 Vhavhi vha a ḓihudza vha kandeledza vhaheḓana. Khunḓa nga i fashe muvei. 
Psalms10:3 Muvhi u zuwa nyemulo dza mbilu yawe, wa u ḽeledza vhaṅwe u sanda Muṋe washu a mu nyadza." 
Psalms10:4 Muvhi u dzula o imisa mutsinga. U ri, “Mudzimu ha nga nndifhedzi.” U luka maano awe oṱhe a sa humbuli Mudzimu." 
Psalms10:5 Mishumo yawe i ḓo ḓi ya phanḓa; khaṱhulo dzau dzi fhira ṱhalukanyo yawe; maswina awe oṱhe u vha pfela mare. 
Psalms10:6 Mbiluni yawe u ri, “A hu na tshi ḓaho; mirafho i ḓo ṱanḓulukana ndi sa welwi nga khombo.”" 
Psalms10:7 Haṋwani hawe hu bva a u teketela na vhufhura na u tsikeledza vhaṅwe; lulimi lwawe lwo mara ndozwo na vhuvhi. 
Psalms10:8 U dzula o lalela khuḓani dza miḓi, a zwizwiedza a si na mulandu, vhaheḓana u dzula a tshi vha zwikula nga maṱo." 
Psalms10:9 U dzula o lalela sa ndau yo dzumbama, u lalela muheḓana a tshi ri a mu fashe, a ritha tshifu ha vha u mu fasha," 
Psalms10:10 muheḓana a mbo ḓi fhasi huru o huvhala, ha vha hone u wa hawe a nga o vetekanywa nga ṋala." 
Psalms10:11 Mbiluni yawe muvhi u ri, “Mudzimu o zwi hangwa; ha nga vhuyi a zwi vhona, o tsinya iṱo.”" 
Psalms10:12 Mudzimu Muṋe washu, angaladza tshanḓa tshau: u songo laṱedza muheḓana." 
Psalms10:13 Nṋa muvhi u itwa ngani a tshi nyadza Mudzimu? Mbiluni yawe u ri a u nga mu lifhedzi. 
Psalms10:14 Matsina Iwe wo zwi vhona, a u kundwi u vhona vhuleme na u tambula. Zwi iteaho u zwi dzhiela nzhele. Muheḓana u ḓikumedza Iwe, zwisiwana zwi lilela kha Iwe." 
Psalms10:15 Vunḓekanya tshanḓa tsha muvhi wa vhunwa, vhuvhi hawe u vhu sale murahu u gume nga mudzi waho." 
Psalms10:16 Muṋe washu ndi khosi u ya ho ya, tshakha dza vhannḓa o dzi swiela shangoni ḽawe." 
Psalms10:17 Muṋe washu, Iwe wo pfa zwine muheḓana a zwi lila. U ḓo khwaṱhisa mbilu yawe, u dzula wo thetshelesa," 
Psalms10:18 uri u lamulele zwisiwana na vho kandeledzwaho, muthu wa ṋama wa fhano shangoni a si tsha ḓo ofhisa vhaṅwe." 
Psalms11:1 Nṋe ndi khuda nga Muṋe washu, ni itelani-ha ni tshi mmbudza na ri, “Itou fhufha sa tshiṋoni u shavhele thavhani!" 
Psalms11:2 Vhonani vhavhi vho akha vhura, vho vhea musevhe kha lutsinga uri vha pfule wa mbilu mbuya tshiphirini." 
Psalms11:3 Zwino arali ha thuthekanywa miteo ya vhuladzashango, a no fulufhedzea a nga kha ḓi itani?”" 
Psalms11:4 Mathina Muṋe washu u thembeleni yawe khethwa, khuluṋoni ya Muṋe washu i ṱaḓulu, maṱo awe a vhona vhana vha vhathu a sedzulusa zwi re mbiluni dzavho." 
Psalms11:5 Muṋe washu u ṱola mbilu dza vhavhuya na vhavhi, vhadzianndwa u a vha vhenga." 
Psalms11:6 Vhavhi u ḓo vha nisela masimbe a dugaho na tsevhela, mukovhe wavho ndi ḓumbu ḽi fhisaho shango." 
Psalms11:7 Muṋe washu u a fulufhedzea, u funa vhathu vha tshi fulufhedzea; vha si na vhukwila vha ḓo vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe." 
Psalms12:1 Muṋe washu, ntshidze, a hu tshee na vhathu-vhathu fhano shangoni, u tshi sedza vhathu, a fulufhedzeaho ha sokou wanala." 
Psalms12:2 Ho sala u sokou zwifhelana nga tshavho. Vha tshi amba vha tou swaledzela, ngeno mbiluni zwi siho." 
Psalms12:3 Hone milomo yoṱhe ya u swaledzela Muṋe washu u ḓo ita uri i fhumule; na kha lulimi lwa mazuwo zwi ḓo ralo. 
Psalms12:4 Vha tshi zuwa vha ri, “Ri ḓo kunda nga lulimi lwashu; milomo hufha i yashu – a ri vhusaho ndi nnyi?”" 
Psalms12:5 Zwino-ha Muṋe washu u ri, “Uvhani ndi a takutshedza nga u vhona u kandeledzwa ha vhaheḓana na u pfa zwigomelo zwa vhashai; vho lavhelelaho u lamulelwa vhó fhihamelwa ndi ḓo vha lamulela.”" 
Psalms12:6 Maipfi a Muṋe washu ndi maipfi vhukuma, a nga siliva ye ya bviswa manyelo ṋanḓoni kaṱanu na kavhili." 
Psalms12:7 Iwe Muṋe washu u ḓo vha londola lini na lini, havha vhathu vha tshi vha levhela u ḓo vha tsireledza," 
Psalms12:8 naho vhathu vhavhi vha tshi tou gaba, vhunwa hó ḓibandutshedza vhathuni." 
Psalms13:1 Muṋe washu, nṋa u ḓo nkhangwa u swika lini? U ḓo mpfuralela u swika lini?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndi ḓo ḽa mbilu u swika lini? Mbilu yanga i ḓo ḓi dzula i tshi vhavha naa? Swina ḽanga ḽi ḓo nkunda u swika lini? 
Psalms13:3 Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wanga, vhona zwe zwa nngwela, u mphindule, dovha u nnzivhuluse ndi fhaṱuwe, ndi sa ḓo lala tshoṱhe," 
Psalms13:4 swina ḽanga ḽi sa vho ḓo ri, “Koṱo, ndo mu kona!” mavhanga a sala a tshi pembela nga u vhona ndo tekulwa." 
Psalms13:5 Hone nṋe ndo fulufhela lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, u a ntshidza, mbilu yanga i tou pembela," 
Psalms13:6 ndi ḓo renda Muṋe washu nga luimbo, o nnyonga zwihulu." 
Psalms14:1 Tsilu mbiluni yaḽo ḽi ri, “A hu na Mudzimu, a hu na Muhaṱuli.” Vho tshinyala vha ita zwa vhuṱudzi, a hu na na a itaho zwivhuya." 
Psalms14:2 Muṋe washu u sedza vhathu e ṱaḓulu, uri a vhone arali hu na wa ṱhalukanyo, a ṱoḓaho Mudzimu." 
Psalms14:3 Vhoṱhe vho bva nḓilani, vha vho nengisa vhoṱhe, a hu na na a itaho zwivhuya, na muthihi zwawe." 
Psalms14:4 Kani vhaitazwivhi a vha na ṱhalukanyo hezwi vha tshi ḽa vhathu vhanga unga vhuswa? Na Mudzimu a vha vhuyi vha mu rabela. 
Psalms14:5 A vha zwi vhoni uri vha ḓo welwa nga zwi ofhisaho naa? Mudzimu u ima na vha fulufhedzeaho. 
Psalms14:6 Ni piringanya maano a vhaheḓana, hone vha khuda nga Muṋe washu." 
Psalms14:7 Yawee, ngavhe u tshidzwa ha Israele hu tshi bva Tsioni! Musi Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo dovha a vusa lushaka lwawe, ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ḓo pembela, Israele a takala." 
Psalms15:1 Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi ane a ḓo dzula nḓuni yau? Ndi nnyi o teaho u fhaṱa thavhani yau khethwa?" 
Psalms15:2 Ho tea muitazwivhuya a sa solisei, ane a amba ngoho zwi tshi bva mbiluni." 
Psalms15:3 Lulimi lwawe a lu fheṱi vhaṅwe, ha vhaisi muthu, ha iseli muthu phungo." 
Psalms15:4 Vho landulwaho nga Mudzimu ú a vha nyadza, tshawe ndi u hulisa vha ofhaho Muṋe washu, zwe a amba u a zwi ita, naho zwi tshi vho konḓa." 
Psalms15:5 Ha bindulisi tshelede lwa u ḽa vhaṅwe, ha tendi zwa tshanḓanguvhoni hu tshi laṱwa a si na mulandu. Onoyo u ḓo ima o khwaṱha lini na lini." 
Psalms16:1 Mudzimu nndondole, ndi khuda nga Iwe." 
Psalms16:2 Ndi amba na Muṋe washu nda ri, “Muṋe wanga ndi Iwe; a thi tshee na tshiṅwe tshivhuya, ndi Iwe u woṱhe.”" 
Psalms16:3 Hone midzimu yo ḓalaho fhano shangoni, ye na nṋe nda vha ndi tshi i takalela, ndi vho i vhudza ndi ri:" 
Psalms16:4 Vhane vha gidima murahu hayo vha ḓiovhela khombo nnzhi; vha tshi phasa nga malofha a zwiṱhavhelo nṋe ndi ḓo sendela kule, madzina a midzimu yavho ha nga pfali mulomoni wanga." 
Psalms16:5 Muṋe washu ndi Ene mukovhe wanga u mpfushaho, zwo nndivhaho zwi bva ha Iwe." 
Psalms16:6 Mukovhe we wa nṅwatela lu tou vha ludzula, ifa ḽanga ḽo naka hani!" 
Psalms16:7 Ndi renda Muṋe washu Mulayi wanga, na vhukati ha vhusiku luvalo lu a nnyeletshedza." 
Psalms16:8 Muṋe washu ha ṱuwi mbiluni yanga, thi tseki, u na nṋe." 
Psalms16:9 Ndi zwine mbilu yanga ya takala, muya wanga wa fhululedza, vhukuma ndi ḓo dzula ndo khuda." 
Psalms16:10 U nga si nndaṱe nda milwa nga lufu, nṋe mulanda wau a fulufhedzeaho u nga si tende ndi tshi dzhena tshaloni." 
Psalms16:11 U ntsumbedza nḓila ya vhutshilo; ndí na Iwe, ndi hone ndo fushea, zwine wa mpha zwi dzula zwi tshi ntakadza." 
Psalms17:1 Muṋe washu mpfe! Hufha ndi si na mulandu, ipfa tshililo tshanga! Nḓevhe yau nga i thetshelese thabelo yanga, hufha mulomoni wanga hu si na vhufhura." 
Psalms17:2 Nga a vhe Iwe a nṱanzwaho mulandu, hufha u tshi ḓivha zwi re zwone." 
Psalms17:3 Arali wa ṱola mbilu yanga, wa nndalela vhusiku, wa tou fhenḓa mbilu yanga, u ḓo wana ndi si na vhuvhi; na u amba thi ambi ḽivhi" 
Psalms17:4 ndi tshi vhona mishumo ya vhathu. Ndi tinya nḓila dza vhadzia-u-levha ndi tshi tevhedza zwe wa amba. 
Psalms17:5 Ndo tou longondo nḓilani dzau, a thi vhuyi nda isa mulenzhe ḓakani." 
Psalms17:6 Mudzimu, u a nnyaravha, ndi zwine nda u vhidzelela: tshingamisela nḓevhe yau kha nṋe u pfe zwine nda amba." 
Psalms17:7 Vha khudaho nga Iwe musi vho vutshelwa nga maswina u vha tshidza nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa, ndi zwone, ntsumbedze lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, lu kanukisaho." 
Psalms17:8 Ntsireledze unga tshanga ya iṱo, nkuvhatedze nga phapha dzau," 
Psalms17:9 uri vhavhi vha si nṱangule, maswina o nndanganaho a si ntinge." 
Psalms17:10 Mbilu dzavho dzo fura tshiṱuhu, a si one mazuwo a bvaho milomoni yavho." 
Psalms17:11 Vha ntsala murahu hoṱhe hune nda ya, vho nndalela uri vha ntekule." 
Psalms17:12 Vha tou nga ndau yo lindela u ponda, vha nga ndau ya nduna yo lalela tshiṱakani." 
Psalms17:13 Takuwa Muṋe washu, u imedzane na vhavhi, vha fhedze nga banga ḽau u ntshidze!" 
Psalms17:14 Ndi vhathu vha shango havha, a vha shayi tshithu vhutshiloni vhuno, vha tshi nndevhela u ntshidze. Vha zwimbedze nga zwe wa dzula wo vha khokhela, zwi rathele na kha vhana vhavho, zwi salaho zwi wele vhaḓuhulu." 
Psalms17:15 Hone nṋe ndi a fulufhedzea, ndi ḓo vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshau, ndi tshi vuwa ndi ḓo u vhona ro livhana zwifhaṱuwo nda pfa ndo fushea." 
Psalms18:1 Ndi u funa hani Muṋe washu, maanḓa anga ndi Iwe." 
Psalms18:2 Muṋe washu ndi vhukhudo hanga, ndi dzhavhelo ḽanga, ndi Mutshidzi wanga, Mudzimu wanga, bako ḽanga, Ene ane nda khuda ngae, ndi Ene tshiṱangu tshanga, pfumo ḽi nndwelaho, hone vhushavhelo hanga luwani." 
Psalms18:3 Muṋe washu ndi ḓi mu vhidzelela ndó welwa nga maswina, a ntshidza, nga hu khoḓwe Ene." 
Psalms18:4 Ndo vha ndo tandedzwa nga mambule a lufu, ndó khakhedzwa nga tshirulu tsha ndozwo." 
Psalms18:5 Ndo vha ndo tandedzwa nga mambule a vhudzulavhafu, ndó livhana na milavhu ya lufu," 
Psalms18:6 nda ḓi vhidzelela Muṋe washu ndo khakhedzwa, Mudzimu wanga nda mu ṱavhela mukosi, Ene a pfa ipfi ḽanga e pfamoni yawe, mukosi wanga wa swika nḓevheni dzawe." 
Psalms18:7 Zwenezwo shango ḽa dzinginyea ḽa tetemela, miteo ya dzithavha ya tseka-tseka, ya dzinginyea ó sinyuwa;" 
Psalms18:8 ningoni dzawe ha duba vhutsi, mulomoni ha bva khavhu dza vhuhali, a pfela masimbe a mulilo fhasi;" 
Psalms18:9 lutombo a lu peta a tsela fhasi, swiswi ḽitswu-ḽitswu ḽí fhasi ha ṋayo dzawe;" 
Psalms18:10 a fhufha ó namela mukherube, a tengama nga phapha dza muya," 
Psalms18:11 a dzhia swiswi a fuka ḽone, thumba yawe e makole matswu a mvula," 
Psalms18:12 phanḓa hawe he vhenge, makole awe a shulula tshifhango na masimbe," 
Psalms18:13 Muṋe washu a ritha mubvumo ṱaḓulu he ngindii, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a mbo ṱahisa ipfi ḽawe ha shuluwa tshifhango na masimbe a mulilo," 
Psalms18:14 a posa misevhe yawe a vha balanganya, a thathabisa nḓadzi dzawe vha shavha vhó ḓaḓa." 
Psalms18:15 Zwenezwo miedzi ya lwanzhe ya sala nnḓa miteo ya ḽifhasi ya sala khagala u tshi vha kaidza Iwe Muṋe washu, hu tshi tita muya u bvaho ningoni dzau." 
Psalms18:16 Muṋe washu a onyolosa tshanḓa e ngei ṱaḓulu, a ntakula a nṋula mikumbelani," 
Psalms18:17 a nndamukisa zwanḓani zwa swina ḽanga ḽa maanḓa na vha mmbengaho, ngauri nṋe ndo vha ndi nga si vha kone." 
Psalms18:18 Vho nnzhongondedza ndó welwa nga zwo vhifhaho, hone nda tou fa Muṋe washu," 
Psalms18:19 Ene a nṋula vhukati havho. O ntshidza ngauri u a mpfuna. 
Psalms18:20 Muṋe washu o mpfufha nga zwo fanelaho a no fulufhedzea, a nṋea zwo fanelaho a si na mulandu," 
Psalms18:21 ngauri ndo tevhedza nḓila dza Muṋe washu, a tho ngo tenda vhuvhi vhu tshi mphandekanya na Mudzimu wanga." 
Psalms18:22 Milayo yawe yoṱhe a i ṱuwi mbiluni yanga, zwe a laya a tho ngo zwi sendedza kule;" 
Psalms18:23 Ene muṋe o vhona ndi sa solisei, tshanga ho ḓi vha u ofha u khakha." 
Psalms18:24 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a mpfufha nga zwo fanelaho a no fulufhedzea, nge a vhona ndi si na mulandu." 
Psalms18:25 Vha vhuthu Iwe u ḓi vha itela-vho vhuthu; a sa solisei u mu pfufha nga zwi sa solisei; 
Psalms18:26 vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho vha wana na Iwe u na mbilu tshena, hone vhadziavhumbulu vha wana u swina." 
Psalms18:27 Iwe u tshidza vha ḓiṱukufhadzaho, wa ṱukufhadza vha u ḓihudza." 
Psalms18:28 Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe une wa ntshidza, zwa nga wo mpfungela luvhone wa pandela swiswi ḽo ntibaho, Iwe Mudzimu wanga." 
Psalms18:29 Ndí na Iwe ndi wela mmbi nga pfumo, ndí na Mudzimu wanga ndi fhufha mitsheṱo." 
Psalms18:30 Ndi Ene Mudzimu a sa khakhi, ḽine a amba ḽi ḓi wanala ḽi ngoho. Ndi Ene tshiṱangu tsha vhoṱhe vhane vha khuda ngae." 
Psalms18:31 Nṋa hone Mudzimu ndi nnyi arali e si Ene Muṋe washu? Bako ḽa vhudzumbamo hashu ndi nnyi arali e si Mudzimu washu? 
Psalms18:32 Ndi Ene Mudzimu we a nnyambadza nungo, nda tshimbila ndi sa khukhulwi." 
Psalms18:33 U mpha luvhilo lwa phala, na nṱha ha thavha a thi khukhulwi." 
Psalms18:34 Zwanḓa zwanga u zwi gudisa nndwa, zwa khwaṱha nda akha vhura ha tsimbi tswuku." 
Psalms18:35 U tshidzwa nga Iwe ndi tshone tshiṱangu tshanga, u ntika nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa, wo nṋea vhuhulwane nga vhuthu hau." 
Psalms18:36 Ṋayo dzanga wo dzi ṋea vhukando, nda sa redzemuwe." 
Psalms18:37 Maswina anga ndo a pandamedza nda a fara, nda sa vha humele vha sa athu fhela vhoṱhe." 
Psalms18:38 Ndo vha sukekanya vha si tsha vuwa, nda vha kandekanya nga ṋayo dzanga." 
Psalms18:39 Wo mpha maanḓa a u dzhena nndwa, maswina anga wa a susumedza nga fhasi ha ṋayo dzanga." 
Psalms18:40 Wo ita uri maswina anga a mphe zwitiko, nda fhedza vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi mmbenga." 
Psalms18:41 Vho ṱavha mukosi vha shaya mulamuleli, vha vhidzelela Muṋe washu a si vha aravhe," 
Psalms18:42 nda vha phusukanya sa buse ḽi hwalwaho nga ḓumbu, nda vha kudza nnḓa vha nga lurofhe nḓilani." 
Psalms18:43 Iwe wo nndamukisa vhathu vha tshi mmvutshela, wa mmbumba yone ṱhoho ya dzitshakha, nda luvhiwa na nga vhane ndi si vha ḓivhe." 
Psalms18:44 Vho ri u pfa bvumo ḽanga vha mbo ḓi ḓa vha luvha, vhatsinda vha ḓa vha khotha," 
Psalms18:45 vha kulea miraḓo, vha bva mitsheṱoni yavho vha tshi tou khura nga nyofho." 
Psalms18:46 Muṋe washu u a tshila! Kha hu rendwe Ene bako ḽanga ḽa u khuda, nga hu huliswe Ene Mudzimu a ntshidzaho," 
Psalms18:47 Ene we a mpha maanḓa a u ḓilifhedzela, dzitshakha a dzi ita vhalanda vhanga," 
Psalms18:48 a nndamukisa zwanḓani zwa vha mmbengaho. Ee, ndi Iwe we wa nṋea vhuhulwane nda fhira maswina anga, vhalevhi vha tshi mmvutshela wa ntshidza." 
Psalms18:49 Muṋe washu, ndi zwine nda ḓo u renda vhukati ha dzitshakha, ndi ḓo renda dzina ḽau nga luimbo." 
Psalms18:50 Khosi ye wa i ta wa i sumbedza lufuno lu sa dzinginyei, ya kunda maswina tshoṱhe – ene Dafita na vhaḓuhulu vhawe, zwino na lini na lini." 
Psalms19:1 Ḽiṱaḓulu ḽi ṱanziela vhugala ha Mudzimu, lutombo lu ḓivhadza mishumo ya zwanḓa zwawe," 
Psalms19:2 ḓuvha ḽi tshi tsha ḽi tsha na zwaḽo, vhusiku vhuṅwe na vhuṅwe vhu ḓa na nḓivho." 
Psalms19:3 Maipfi azwo ha bulwi nga mulomo, mafhungo azwo ha pfiwi nga nḓevhe." 
Psalms19:4 Hone mukosi wazwo u swika he shango ḽa kanda, maipfi azwo a guma vhusendekamisi, he ḓuvha ḽa fhaṱelwa thumba yaḽo." 
Psalms19:5 Ḽi bva khayo unga mukwasha a tshi bva nḓuni, ḽi dzhena mudavhini wa mbambe nga dakalo unga munna wa maanḓa." 
Psalms19:6 Ḽi takuwa henengei vhusendekamisi, ḽa fhambanya ḽa yo tota tombo vhusendekamisi, a hu na tshine tsha tinya u fhisa haḽo." 
Psalms19:7 Mulayo wa Muṋe washu a hu na hune wa solisea, u netulusa muya wa muthu; ndayo ya Muṋe washu i a fulufhedzea, i ṱalifhisa vha si na maano;" 
Psalms19:8 milayo ya Muṋe washu yo tou tswititi, i takadza mbilu; ndaela dza Muṋe washu dzo kuna, dzi vhonetshela muthu;" 
Psalms19:9 u ofha Muṋe washu hu sendedza muthu kule na zwa dzitshika, a hu na upfi zwi a fhela; zwe Muṋe washu a laya ndi zwa ngoho, a hu na na tshi soliseaho khazwo;" 
Psalms19:10 zwi takadza u fhira musuku, naho u munzhi wo bviswa manyelo; zwi ḓifha u fhira mutoli, u fhira na tshigili tsha ṋotshi." 
Psalms19:11 Na nṋe mulanda wau ndi laiwa ngazwo, u zwi vhulunga zwi na pfufho khulu." 
Psalms19:12 Ndi nnyi ane a nga vhona vhukhakhi hawe? Nṱanzwe-ha na milandu yo dzumbamaho. 
Psalms19:13 Ntsendedze kule na u ḓiḓivha, u songo tenda ndi tshi vhuswa nga zwo raloho; ndi hone ndi sa nga solisei, ndi si na milandu i lemelaho." 
Psalms19:14 Zwine nda amba na zwine nda humbula nga zwi vhe zwi takadzaho Iwe Muṋe washu, bako ḽanga ḽa u khuda, Mulamuleli wanga." 
Psalms20:1 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi u aravha musi wa khombo, Dzina ḽa Mudzimu wa Jakopo nga ḽi vhe tshiṱangu tshau!" 
Psalms20:2 Ngavhe a tshi u phalala e henengei hukhethwa, a ḓi u tika e Tsioni!" 
Psalms20:3 Nduvho dzau nga a dzi elelwe, a ṱanganedze zwiṱhavhelo zwau." 
Psalms20:4 Ngavhe a tshi u fha zwine mbilu yau ya tama, a vuledze zwoṱhe zwine wa funa u ita," 
Psalms20:5 ra ḓo konou pembela ri tshi vhona wo kunda, ra imisa zwiala ri tshi renda dzina ḽa Mudzimu washu. Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi u fha zwoṱhe zwe wa humbela!" 
Psalms20:6 Zwino ndi vho zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu u ḓo farisa khosi ye a ta, u ḓo mu aravha e ḽiṱaḓulu ḽawe ḽikhethwa, u ḓo mu ṋea gundo ḽihulu nga maanḓa awe." 
Psalms20:7 Vhaṅwe vha zuwa gariki dza nndwa, vhaṅwe vha zuwa dzibere; riṋe tshine ra zuwa ndi dzina ḽa Mudzimu Muṋe washu." 
Psalms20:8 Vhone vha ḓo wela fhasi vhe huru, a nga vha riṋe ri ḓo takuwa ra ima ró khwaṱha." 
Psalms20:9 Ṋea khosi gundo Muṋe washu, ri aravhe ḓuvha ri tshi u vhidzelela!" 
Psalms21:1 Khosi i ḓiphiṋa nga maanḓa au, Muṋe washu; i takala hani i tshi fariswa nga Iwe!" 
Psalms21:2 Wo mu ṋea zwine mbilu yawe ya tama, tshe a humbela nga mulomo wawe a wo ngo mu dzima." 
Psalms21:3 U mu livhanya na mashudu mahulu, ṱhohoni yawe wo mu ambadza khare ya musukusuku." 
Psalms21:4 O u humbela vhutshilo wa mu ṋea, wa mu ṋea ndalamo." 
Psalms21:5 Wo mu hulisa a vha muhulwane vhukuma, wa mu ṋea vhugala na madzanga." 
Psalms21:6 U mu shudufhadza u ya ho ya, ha takali zwone a tshi vhona Iwe u nae." 
Psalms21:7 Ndi zwone, khosi i ḓitika nga Muṋe washu; a i nga tseki, yo tikwa nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei lwa Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu." 
Psalms21:8 Maswina au oṱhe u ḓo a fara, wa thuba vhoṱhe vha u vhengaho, wa vha thuba nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Psalms21:9 Muṋe washu a tshi bvelela vha ḓo swa u tou nga ṋanḓo i fhisaho, khavhu dza mbiti dzawe dzi ḓo vha fhisa dza vha lozwa." 
Psalms21:10 U ḓo lozwa vhana vhavho fhano fhasi, na vhaḓuhulu vhavho vha si tsha vhidzwa." 
Psalms21:11 Naho vha u lukela maano, naho vha u itela vhukwila, zwoṱhe zwi ḓo pfuvha." 
Psalms21:12 Vha ḓo ri u u vhona vha shavha u ḓo vha pfula nga misevhe yau. 
Psalms21:13 Muṋe washu, sumbedza vhuhulu ha maanḓa au; ri ḓo renda mishumo yau mihulu nga nyimbo." 
Psalms22:1 Mudzimu wanga, Mudzimu wanga, wo nndaṱelani? Na u gomela hanga khe u sa ntshidzi?" 
Psalms22:2 Yawee Mudzimu wanga, masiari ndi vhidzelela u si nnyaravhe, vhusiku nda lila wa si nnyawedze." 
Psalms22:3 Hufha Iwe u mukhethwa, khuluṋoni yau i thendo dza Israele." 
Psalms22:4 Vhokhotsi ashu vho vha vha tshi ḓitika nga Iwe, vho fulufhela Iwe, Iwe wa vha tshidza;" 
Psalms22:5 vho u ṱavhela mukosi, Iwe wa vha phalala; a vho ngo sokou u fulufhela vha fhedza vha shona." 
Psalms22:6 A vha nṋe, a thi tshee muthu, ndi tou vha mbungu; ndi goḓwa nga vhathu, vhoṱhe vha a nnyadza." 
Psalms22:7 Vhoṱhe vhane vha mmbona vha a nkolela, vha sokou nkongomedza vha dzungudza dziṱhoho;" 
Psalms22:8 vha ri, “Mafhungo awe o a kumedza Yahavee, zwino nga' mu tshidze-ha, nga' mu lamukise-ha vhunga a tshi mu funa!”" 
Psalms22:9 Ndi Iwe we wa nṋula thumbuni ya mme anga, wa nthudza mbilu nga maḓamu avho." 
Psalms22:10 Ndi tshi bebwa ndo ḓi tou kumedzwa Iwe, tshee nda bebwa Mudzimu wanga o ḓi vha Iwe." 
Psalms22:11 U songo nṱutshela, khakhathi i tou vha muṋangoni; a hu na muṅwe ane a nga mpfarisa." 
Psalms22:12 Ndo tingwa nga mboho nnzhi, maboho a Bashani o ntangela ngomu." 
Psalms22:13 Ndo ita na u semelwa maṋo, unga ndau i vhombaho i tshi khou ponda." 
Psalms22:14 Ndo tou tevhulelwa kule sa maḓi, na zwiendanungo zwanga zwo lunguluwa; mbilu yanga yo ṋoka sa phula, yo tou pwaṱa ngomu khanani yanga." 
Psalms22:15 Maanḓa anga o fhela, ndo no tou vha gamba, lulimi lwanga lwo nambatela marenuni, Iwe u ntsumbudza buseni nda nga mufu." 
Psalms22:16 Mmbwa na dzone dzo ntinga, ndo thathedzwa nga tshigwada tsha vhavhi, vho rumbula zwanḓa zwanga na ṋayo dzanga," 
Psalms22:17 na mbabvu dzanga dzi nnḓa; vha tou zwondolola vhe koṱo," 
Psalms22:18 vha kovhekana zwiambaro zwanga, lupila lwanga lwone vha lu itela mamvaṱe." 
Psalms22:19 Zwino-ha Iwe Muṋe washu, u songo ima ngeo kule, ṱavhanya u mpfarisa Iwe maanḓa anga!" 
Psalms22:20 Nndamukise ndi si rungwe nga pfumo; nda vhulawa nga dzimmbwa ndi nga dovha nda tshila naa? 
Psalms22:21 Nndamukise mulomoni wa i ḽaho, vhunga wo ntshidza ndí ṋangani dza ṋari!" 
Psalms22:22 Vha hashu ndi ḓo vha anetshela zwe wa nnyitela; ndi ḓo u renda tshivhidzo tsho kuvhangana. 
Psalms22:23 Rendani Muṋe washu inwi ni mu ofhaho, mu huliseni inwi vhana vha Jakopo, tetemelani Ene noṱhe vhana vha Israele;" 
Psalms22:24 ho ngo nyadza muheḓana, vhushai hawe ho ngo vhu nengwa, ho ngo mu furalela, o mu pfa a tshi mu lilela." 
Psalms22:25 Ndi tshi u renda tshivhidzoni tshihulu ndi vha ndo tou ṋewa nga Iwe; zwe nda u anela ndi ḓo zwi ita vha u ofhaho vha tshi zwi vhona. 
Psalms22:26 Vhaheḓana vha ḓo ḽa vha fura zwiṱhavhelo; Muṋe washu u ḓo rendwa nga vha mu ṱoḓaho; ngavhe ni tshi ḓi khwaṱha lini na lini. 
Psalms22:27 Ḽifhasi nga he ḽa guma ḽi ḓo mu elelwa, ḽi ḓo rembulutshela ha Muṋe washu; tshakha dzoṱhe dza shango dzi ḓo mu gwadamela." 
Psalms22:28 Muvhuso ndi wa Muṋe washu; muvhusi wa dzithakha ndi Ene. 
Psalms22:29 Madendele a ḽifhasi a ḓo ḓa-vho munyanyani wawe a mu gwadamela, na vhoṱhe vha re tsini na u fa, vha sa koni u ḓitshidza, vha ḓo gwadama phanḓa hawe." 
Psalms22:30 U ḓo shumelwa na nga zwiḓuhulu; Muṋe wa vhoṱhe u ḓo anetshelwa mirafho i ḓaho. 
Psalms22:31 Vhuvhuya hawe vha ḓo vhu ḓivhadza na vha sa athu bebwa. Vha ḓo ri zwo itwa nga Ene. 
Psalms23:1 Muṋe washu ndi Mulisa wanga, tshi shayi tshithu." 
Psalms23:2 U nndadza mafuloni avhuḓi, u nnyisa maḓini, nda nwa nda rudza mbilu." 
Psalms23:3 U a nnetulusa. U ntshimbidza nḓilani yone-yone a tshi itela dzina ḽawe. 
Psalms23:4 Naho nda tshimbila govhani swiswi ḽo tou bodo, a thi ofhi tshithu. Hufha Iwe u na nṋe. U ntsireledza nga thonga na luḓo, mbilu ya rula." 
Psalms23:5 U nkanzwa maswina anga o zwondolola; u nnḓodza mapfura nda nga mueni muḓivhalea; tshinwelo tshanga tsho ḓala lwa u ḓala. 
Psalms23:6 Vhukumakuma hoṱhe hune nda ya u ḓo ntonda wa nnyitela vhuthu nda vhuya nda fa. Ndi ḓo dzula pfamoni ya Muṋe washu lini na lini. 
Psalms24:1 Shango ḽoṱhe u ya he ḽa guma, ḽifhasi na zwi re khaḽo, zwoṱhe ndi zwa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms24:2 Ndi Ene we a ḽi tea nṱha ha malwanzhe, ndi Ene we a ḽi vhea nṱha ha maḓi mahulu." 
Psalms24:3 Ndi nnyi o teaho u gonya thavha ya Muṋe washu? Ndi nnyi ane a nga ima fhethu hawe hukhethwa? 
Psalms24:4 Ndi uyo wa zwanḓa zwi si na tshika, wa mbilu yo ṱambaho, i nengwaho vhumbulu, a sa ani a tshi zwifha." 
Psalms24:5 Ndi ene ane a ḓo shudufhadzwa nga Muṋe washu, a ṋewa zwo mu fanelaho nga Mudzimu Mutshidzi wawe." 
Psalms24:6 Ndi vhone vha no ṱoḓa u dzula na Mudzimu, vha no lila u mu vhona; ndi vhone vhana vha Jakopo." 
Psalms24:7 Hee inwi dzikhoro, aṱamani! Vuleani inwi mahothi a kale-kale, hu dzhene Khosi ya vhugala!" 
Psalms24:8 Nṋa “Khosi iyo ya vhugala” ndi nnyi? Ndi Muṋe washu, Ene Muhali Ramaanḓa, Muṋe washu Muhali nndwani." 
Psalms24:9 Hee inwi dzikhoro, aṱamani! Vuleani inwi mahothi a kale-kale, hu dzhene Khosi ya vhugala!" 
Psalms24:10 Nṋa “Khosi iyo ya vhugala” ndi nnyi nandi? Ndi Muṋe washu Mukundavhoṱhe, ndi Ene Khosi ya vhugala." 
Psalms25:1 Ndi takusela mbilu yanga ha Iwe, Muṋe washu." 
Psalms25:2 Mudzimu wanga, ndi fulufhela Iwe, u songo tenda ndi tshi shoniswa; maswina anga a songo ri, “Koṱo!”" 
Psalms25:3 Vhukuma vha lavhelelaho Iwe a vha nga shoni; hu ḓo shona vha sa fulufhedzei vha no u shandukela. 
Psalms25:4 Muṋe washu, nnḓivhadze nḓila dzau, u mpfunze u ita zwine wa funa." 
Psalms25:5 Mpfunze ngoho yau i nndededze; u Mudzimu wanga, u a ntshidza, ndi ṱwa ndo u ṱulutshela." 
Psalms25:6 Muṋe washu, u songo hangwa u nnyitela tshilidzi, hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei lini na lini." 
Psalms25:7 Nkhangwele vhutshinyi na vhuvhi ha hana hanga, Muṋe washu, nnyelelwe nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei na vhuthu." 
Psalms25:8 Muṋe washu ndi muvhuya, u a fulufhedzea; na vhatshinyi u vha funza nḓila ya ngoho." 
Psalms25:9 Vha ḓiṱukufhadzaho u vha funza u ita zwine a funa, a vha tshimbidza nḓilani ya ngoho." 
Psalms25:10 Vhane vha vhulunga mulanga wa Muṋe washu vha tevhedza ndaela dzawe, u a vha endedza nga vhuthu, u a fulufhedzea." 
Psalms25:11 Muṋe washu, nkhangwele vhutshinyi hanga naho vhu vhuhulu, u tshi itela dzina ḽau!" 
Psalms25:12 Munna a ofhaho Muṋe washu ndi nnyi? Onoyo u ḓo sumbedzwa nḓila ine a ḓo i fara," 
Psalms25:13 a ḓo kona u tshila zwi tshi mu anḓa, shango ḽa vha ifa ḽa vhana vhawe." 
Psalms25:14 Muṋe washu u konana na vhane vha mu ofha; vhenevho u vha dzumbululela mulanga wawe. 
Psalms25:15 Ndi dzula ndo lavhelesa Muṋe washu; u ḓo fashulula milenzhe yanga mambuleni. 
Psalms25:16 Nndavhelese u nkhathutshele; ndi ndoṱhe, thi na vhuyo;" 
Psalms25:17 rula mbilu yanga muhwalo, ndi si tsha ofha." 
Psalms25:18 Sedza vhuṱungu na u tambula hanga, u nkupule vhutshinyi." 
Psalms25:19 Vhona uri maswina anga o anda hani, vhona uri vha mmbenga hani!" 
Psalms25:20 Nndondole u ntshidze, u songo tenda ndi tshi shoniswa, hufha ndi tshi khuda nga Iwe." 
Psalms25:21 Vhuthu hanga na u fulufhedzea nga zwi nndondole, hufha ndo lavhelela Iwe!" 
Psalms25:22 Mudzimu, tshidza Israele khomboni dzoṱhe." 
Psalms26:1 Ntsengele Muṋe washu, a thi na mulandu, ndo fulufhela Muṋe washu ndi sa tseki." 
Psalms26:2 Muṋe washu, edzou nṱola u nndinge; sedzulusa mbilu yanga na muhumbulo wanga." 
Psalms26:3 Hufha vhuthu hau vhu tshi nnyendedza; u fulufhedzea hau hu a nndededza. 
Psalms26:4 A thi anḓani na vhadziamuhoyo, a thi pfani na vha tshiṱavhatsindi." 
Psalms26:5 Ndi nengwa tshikungo tsha vhaitazwivhi, vhavhi ndi a vha tinya." 
Psalms26:6 Ndo ṱamba zwanḓa, thi na mulandu. Ndi mona na aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu," 
Psalms26:7 nda imba luimbo lwa ndivhuho ndi tshi bula mishumo yawe mihulu. 
Psalms26:8 Muṋe washu, pfamo yau ndi i funa hani! Hune ra vhona vhugala hau hu ntakadza hani!" 
Psalms26:9 U songo nndozwa na vhatshinyi, u songo mpaṱekanya na vha shululaho malofha," 
Psalms26:10 vhathu vhane zwanḓa zwavho zwa dzulela u ita vhuvhi, vhathu vha tshanḓanguvhoni." 
Psalms26:11 A vha nṋe ndi a fulufhedzea; nnyitele tshilidzi u ntshidze! 
Psalms26:12 Asizwo! Ndo ima hu si na tshi ofhisaho, ndi renda Muṋe washu tshivhidzoni tsha vhathu vhawe." 
Psalms27:1 Muṋe washu ndi tshedza tshanga, Mutshidzi wanga ndi Ene, ndi kha ḓi ofha nnyi? Muṋe washu ndi dzhavhelo ḽanga, ndi kha ḓi tshenuwa nnyi?" 
Psalms27:2 Maswina anga na vhavhi vha lwaho na nṋe vha tshi nndodela vha tshi ri vha mponde, vha ḓo khukhulwa vha wa." 
Psalms27:3 Naho gomane ya ntinga mbilu yanga a i nga ofhi, naho nda diwa nga mmbi ndi ḓo fulufhela ndo khwaṱha." 
Psalms27:4 Ndi tshithihi fhedzi tshine nda humbela Muṋe washu; tshine nda lila ndi tshithihi fhedzi: ndi u dzula pfamoni ya Muṋe washu maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hanga, ndi tshi takadzwa nga Muṋe washu ndi tshi mu elekanya thembeleni yawe." 
Psalms27:5 U ḓo ntsireledza musi muvhi, a nnzumba pfamoni yawe, a nnyimisa nṱha ha tombo." 
Psalms27:6 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo imisa ṱhoho nda vhona maswina anga o ntingaho e fhasi-fhasi, nda konou ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo pfamoni yawe ho ṱangana mifhululu ya dakalo; ndi ḓo imba nda renda Muṋe washu." 
Psalms27:7 Muṋe washu, ipfa ndi tshi u vhidzelela! Nkhathutshele u mphindule!" 
Psalms27:8 Ndi elelwa zwe wa nndaya u tshi ri, “Iḓa u nnduvhe.” Ndi zwone: ndi ḓo ḓa nda luvha Muṋe washu," 
Psalms27:9 u songo nnzumbama, u songo ntsinyutshela wa nkhumisa; hufha wo ḓi vha Mulamuleli wanga; Mudzimu Mutshidzi wanga, u songo nṱamba, u songo nndaṱa." 
Psalms27:10 Naho khotsi anga na mme anga vha nga nndaṱa, Iwe Muṋe washu u ḓo nkuvhatedza." 
Psalms27:11 Muṋe washu, mpfunze nḓila dzau, u ntshimbidze nga nḓila-nḓila; ndi na maswina." 
Psalms27:12 U songo nkumedza one; ṱhanzi dza u zwifha dzo mmvutshela, vha amba a u nkhuvhadza." 
Psalms27:13 Ngavhe ndi si fulufhele uri ndi ḓo vhona vhuthu ha Muṋe washu ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila... a thi tsha ḓivha! 
Psalms27:14 Lindela Muṋe washu, ima u khwaṱhe, u songo kulea nungo, lindela Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms28:1 Muṋe washu, ndi vhidzelela Iwe, u songo mpfuralela, Iwe bako ḽine nda khuda khaḽo, u sa ḓo ri wo mphumulela nda ḓo nga vhane vha godimela tshaloni." 
Psalms28:2 Thetshelesa ndi tshi u luvhelela, ndi tshi u ṱavhela mukosi ndó imisela zwanḓa nṱha zwó livha pfamoni yau khethwa." 
Psalms28:3 U songo nndaṱa na vhavhi vha lukaho vhutshinyi, vhane nga mulomo vha bula mavhuya ngeno mbilu dzo ḓala vhumbulu." 
Psalms28:4 Vha lifhedze zwe vha ita u tshi tevhedza vhuvhi havho, vha lifhedze mishumo ya zwanḓa zwavho, u vha ṋee pfufho yo vha teaho." 
Psalms28:5 Hufha vha sa londi mishumo ya Muṋe washu kana zwe zwanḓa zwawe zwa shuma; ú ḓo vha khurumedza vha wa, a si tsha vha fhaṱa." 
Psalms28:6 Muṋe washu nga a rendwe; o pfa mukosi wanga. 
Psalms28:7 Muṋe washu ndi Ene nungo dzanga, ndi tshiṱangu tshanga; mbilu yanga i fulufhela Ene; u a mphalala nda takala, nda mu livhuha nga luimbo." 
Psalms28:8 Muṋe washu ndi Ene nungo dza vhathu vhawe, ndi Ene dzhavhelo ḽo khudaho ḽa khosi ye a i ta." 
Psalms28:9 Tshidza lushaka lwau, u shudufhadze vha re vhau, vha lise u vha tike lini na lini." 
Psalms29:1 Rendani Muṋe washu, hee inwi vhahulwane vha re ṱaḓulu, rendani Muṋe washu wa vhugala na maanḓa!" 
Psalms29:2 Rendani dzina ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa vhugala, luvhani Muṋe washu a tshi vhonadza lupenyo lwawe lukhethwa." 
Psalms29:3 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi pfala lwanzheni, Mudzimu wa vhugala u a bvuma e ngindii, Muṋe washu u dzula nṱha ha maḓi mahulu." 
Psalms29:4 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi na maanḓa, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi na vhugala." 
Psalms29:5 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi fhandula mikedara, Muṋe washu u fhandula mikedara ya Libanoni." 
Psalms29:6 U ritha Thavha ya Libanoni ya khana sa ṋamana, Thavha ya Heremoni ya fhufha sa ṋari." 
Psalms29:7 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽá pfala hu vhenge ha bva khavhu. 
Psalms29:8 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi dzinginyisa masoga, Muṋe washu u dzinginyisa phanga dza Kadeshe." 
Psalms29:9 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽá pfala tholo dzi a dzwala, ḽi ṱangula maṱaka ha sala he swoto, hone thembeleni yawe ha pfala mifhululu vha ri, “Thendo!”" 
Psalms29:10 Muṋe washu u vhusa ó thukha kha mativha mahulu, Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓi vhusa e khosi lini na lini." 
Psalms29:11 Muṋe washu u ḓo ṋea vhathu vhawe nungo, Muṋe washu u ḓo shudufhadza lushaka lwawe ḽa lala." 
Psalms30:1 Muṋe washu, ndi a u renda; wo nṋula khomboni, wa si tende maswina anga a tshi ḓiphiṋa nga nṋe." 
Psalms30:2 Mudzimu Muṋe wanga, ndo u ṱavhela mukosi wa mphodza." 
Psalms30:3 Muṋe washu, wo nṋula vhudzulavhafu; ndo vha ndo fara i yaho tshaloni, wa dovha wa nṋea vhutshilo." 
Psalms30:4 Inwi vhalanda vha Muṋe washu vha fulufhedzeaho, mu rendeni nga nyimbo; mu livhuheni, ni elelwe vhukhethwa hawe." 
Psalms30:5 Mbiti dzawe a dzi kovhedzi ḓuvha, vhuthu hawe hone a vhu gumi. Ḽi tshi kovhela hu rothiswa miṱodzi, ḽi tshi tsha ha lila mifhululu." 
Psalms30:6 Zwiḽa zwi tshi nnyanḓa ndo ri, “Ndi ḓo ima ndo khwaṱha lini na lini.”" 
Psalms30:7 Muṋe washu, wo vha wo nkhwaṱhisa nga vhuthu hau nda nga thavha i sa tseki; hone u tshi vho mpfuralela zwa nkula nungo." 
Psalms30:8 Muṋe washu, ndo u ṱavhela mukosi, nda ri, “Muṋe wanga, nkhathutshele!" 
Psalms30:9 Ndá fa zwi ḓo u farisani? U ḓo vhuelwa ngani ndi tshi swiṱwa? U ḓo rendwa nga buse naa? Luruli lu nga ṱanziela u fulufhedzea hau naa? 
Psalms30:10 Muṋe washu, nthetshelese u nkhathutshele! Muṋe washu, nndamulele!”" 
Psalms30:11 Tshililo tshanga wo tshi shandula dakalo; wo mmvula madzanganda a zwililo wa nnyambadza dakalo. 
Psalms30:12 Zwino a thi tsha ḓo fhumula, ndi ḓo u renda nga nyimbo. Mudzimu Muṋe wanga, ndi ḓo u livhuha lini na lini." 
Psalms31:1 Muṋe washu, ndi khuda nga Iwe, u songo vhuya wa tenda ndi tshi shoniswa; hufha u tshi fulufhedzea, nndamulele!" 
Psalms31:2 Mpfe, u si lenge u nndamukisa! Ivha bako ḽanga ḽine nda khuda khaḽo, ivha nnḓu ine nda dzumbama khayo, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo tshila." 
Psalms31:3 Ndi ngoho, u bako ḽanga, u dzhavhelo ḽanga, nnyendedze-ha u nndededze, hufha u Mudzimu wanga." 
Psalms31:4 Mponyokise mambuleni e vha nthetshela, hufha u vhushavhelo hanga." 
Psalms31:5 Ndo kumedza muya wanga zwanḓani zwau; Muṋe washu, wo ntshidza, Iwe Mudzimu a fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms31:6 Ndi vhenga vhane vha luvha midzimu i si tshithu, hone nṋe ndi fulufhela Iwe Muṋe washu." 
Psalms31:7 Wo vhona u tambula hanga wa ḓivha vhuṱungu ha muya wanga; ndi ḓo takala nda pembelela lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei. 
Psalms31:8 A wo ngo nkumedza zwanḓani zwa maswina, wo mmbofholola, ndi vho kona u fema." 
Psalms31:9 Muṋe washu, nkhathutshele, ndo hanganea! Maṱo anga o punda nga miṱodzi, ndo kulekana miraḓo tshoṱhe," 
Psalms31:10 vhutshilo hanga ho fheṱwa nga mbiluvhuṱungu, vhutshilo hanga ho fhungudzwa nga u ḽa mbilu, maanḓa anga o fhedzwa nga milandu yanga, na marambo anga o ṋoka." 
Psalms31:11 Maswina anga oṱhe a a nnyadza, zwihulu vhahura vhanga; khonani dzi vho nnyita dada; vha ṱanganaho na nṋe nḓilani vha a shavha." 
Psalms31:12 Ndo no tou hangwiwa sa o faho, ndi vho nga mudzio wo pwasheaho;" 
Psalms31:13 maswina a ṱolou ntshushedza, nyofho dzo tou ntanga nga hoṱhe; ndi khou langanwa, vha luka maano a u mmbulaha." 
Psalms31:14 Hone nṋe ndi fulufhela Muṋe washu, ndi ri, “U Mudzimu wanga.”" 
Psalms31:15 Zwine nda ṱangana nazwo ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe zwi langwa nga Iwe; nndamulele zwanḓani zwa maswina anga, na zwanḓani zwa vhoṱhe vha ntovholaho." 
Psalms31:16 Hufha ndi mulanda wau, ntsedze nga vhuthu; hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, ntshidze!" 
Psalms31:17 Muṋe washu, ndo u vhidzelela, u songo tenda ndi tshi shoniswa, kha hu shoniswe vhavhi, nga vha valwe milomo nga tshalo!" 
Psalms31:18 Milomo yavho kha i shatelwe, i zwifhelela vha si na mulandu nga u ḓihudza na luswetho na u sasaladza." 
Psalms31:19 Vhuthu hau ho hula hani! U dzula u tshi tonda vha u ofhaho na vhoṱhe vha khudaho nga Iwe, uri vhathu vhoṱhe vha zwi vhone." 
Psalms31:20 U vha dzumba tsini-tsini hau hu si na vhukwila ha vhathu, wa vha vhea he vha tsireledzea, vha si tsha ḓo seṅwa." 
Psalms31:21 Muṋe washu nga a rendwe; o ntsumbedza lufuno lu kanukisaho zwiḽa ndo tingwa unga muḓi wó govhelwa. 
Psalms31:22 Ndo vha ndo tshenuwa nda ri, “Ndo fhandekanywa na Iwe, ndo lovha!” Hone Iwe wo pfa mukosi wanga wa nndamulela." 
Psalms31:23 Funani Muṋe washu noṱhe inwi vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho! Muṋe washu u vhulunga vha na ngoho, ngeno vha u ḓihudza a tshi vha lifhedza zwihulu." 
Psalms31:24 Imani no khwaṱha ni sa neti noṱhe inwi ni fulufhelaho Muṋe washu. 
Psalms32:1 Mashudu we a hangwelwa vhutshinyi, we vhukhakhi hawe ha fukedzwa." 
Psalms32:2 Wa mashudu ndi uyo ane Muṋe washu a si tsha mu vhalela milandu, a si na vhufhura mbiluni." 
Psalms32:3 Nṋe ndo ri ndi sa athu bula vhutshinyi hanga nda lwala lwe nda tou honḓa ḓuvha ḽoṱhe; 
Psalms32:4 tshanḓa tshau tsho nnziamedza vhusiku na masiari, nda fhelelwa nga nungo unga murongwe u tshi fhufha nga biso tshilimo." 
Psalms32:5 Ndi hone ndi tshi bula vhutshinyi hanga, ndi si tsha dzumba mulandu wanga. Ndo ri, “Ndi ḓo bulela Muṋe washu vhukhakhi hanga,” Iwe wa nkhangwela mulandu wa vhutshinyi hanga." 
Psalms32:6 Vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho vhoṱhe nga vha rabele Iwe-ha u tshi kha ḓi wanala. Muḓalo wa maḓi ó sinyuwa u tshi ḓa, u nga si swike khavho." 
Psalms32:7 Iwe u vhudzumbamo hanga; u a ntsireledza ndi si welwe nga khombo. Wo ntshidza, ndo no tangwa nga mifhululu." 
Psalms32:8 Litshani ndi ni laye, ndi ni sumbedze nḓila ine na ḓo i fara, ndi ni eletshedze ndi ni londote:" 
Psalms32:9 Ni songo nga bere, ni songo ḓiita meila ine ya langwa nga muhala na dziḓomo uri i ye hune wa funa." 
Psalms32:10 Vhavhi vha welwa nga khombo nnzhi, hone vha fulufhelaho Muṋe washu vha tsireledzwa nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei." 
Psalms32:11 Inwi vha fulufhedzeaho, pembelelani Muṋe washu, inwi noṱhe vha si na vhufhura, lidzani mifhululu." 
Psalms33:1 Inwi vha fulufhedzeaho, fhululedzani Muṋe washu! Zwo naka hani vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho vha tshi mu imbela!" 
Psalms33:2 Rendani Muṋe washu nga haripa, mu imbeleni nga haripa ya thale dza fumi!" 
Psalms33:3 Mu imbeleni luimbo luswa, ni lidze nga vhuṋambi ni tshi ṱavha mukosi no takala." 
Psalms33:4 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi a fulufhedzea; zwi vhonala nga zwoṱhe zwine a ita. 
Psalms33:5 U funa hu tshi itwa zwi re zwone na zwivhuya; shango ḽo ḓala vhuthu ha Muṋe washu. 
Psalms33:6 Ḽiṱaḓulu ḽo sikwa nga ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, ṋaledzi dzaḽo dzoṱhe dzo sikwa nga mufemo wawe." 
Psalms33:7 O kuvhanganya maḓi a lwanzhe a nga e dzinkhoni; mativha a a shatela zwisikuni. 
Psalms33:8 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe kha ḽi ofhe Muṋe washu, vhathu vhoṱhe nga shango kha vha mu tetemele." 
Psalms33:9 O amba zwa vha hone, a laela zwa ima zwo khwaṱha." 
Psalms33:10 Muṋe washu u piringanya vhutande ha dzitshakha, u phusukanya vhukwila he vha dzudzanya." 
Psalms33:11 Nzudzanyo ya Muṋe washu a i tseki lini na lini, mbofho dzawe dzi ya nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms33:12 Lu na mashudu lushaka lune Mudzimu walwo a vha Muṋe washu, ndi vhathu vhe a vha nanga u vha vhawe vhukuma." 
Psalms33:13 Muṋe washu u lavhelesa fhasi e ṱaḓulu, a vhona vhathu vhoṱhe;" 
Psalms33:14 u vhusa o dzula kha khuluṋoni yawe a tshi sedza vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi. 
Psalms33:15 Ndi Ene Muvhumbi wa mbilu dzoṱhe; u ṱalukanya zwoṱhe zwine vha ita. 
Psalms33:16 Khosi a i tshidzwi nga vhuhulu ha mmbi yayo, na muhali ha tinyi nga maanḓa awe;" 
Psalms33:17 bere ya nndwa a si yone i kundaho; na maanḓa áyo a i koni u tshidza. 
Psalms33:18 Muṋe washu u londota vha mu ofhaho, vhane vha fulufhela lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei," 
Psalms33:19 uri a vha tshidze lufuni, a ḓi vha fusha naho hu nḓalani." 
Psalms33:20 Riṋe ri lindela Muṋe washu, Mutiki washu na Tshiṱangu tshashu;" 
Psalms33:21 mbilu dzashu dzi takalela Ene, tshine ra fulufhela ndi dzina ḽawe ḽikhethwa." 
Psalms33:22 Muṋe washu, ngavhe u tshi ḓi ri funa nga lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, lwonolwo lwe ra lu fulufhela." 
Psalms34:1 Ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi renda Muṋe washu, a thi nga vhuyi nda litsha u mu imbela." 
Psalms34:2 Muya wanga u zuwa Muṋe washu; vhaheḓana vhoṱhe nga vha thetshelese vha takale. 
Psalms34:3 Kha ri hulise Muṋe washu roṱhe! Roṱhe kha ri rende dzina ḽawe! 
Psalms34:4 Ndo vhidzelela Muṋe washu a nnyaravha, a nndamulela kha zwoṱhe zwine nda zwi ofha." 
Psalms34:5 Tshifhaṱuwo tsha vhane vha mu sedza tshi a tsha, a vha nga vhuyi vha shona." 
Psalms34:6 Muheḓana ndi nṋe uno we a vhidzelela Muṋe washu, a mu aravha, a mu tshidza khomboni dzawe dzoṱhe." 
Psalms34:7 Vha ofhaho Mudzimu, Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu u vha fhaṱela danga a vha lamukisa khomboni." 
Psalms34:8 Vhonani uri Muṋe washu u na vhuthu vhungafhani! Vha na mashudu vhane vha dzumbama ngae. 
Psalms34:9 Inwi no ḓikumedzaho Muṋe washu, mu ofheni! Vhane vha mu ofha a vha shayi tshithu." 
Psalms34:10 Na ndawana dzi a fa nga nḓala, hone vha pfaho Muṋe washu a vha shayi tshivhuya." 
Psalms34:11 Vhananga, iḓani ni nthetshelese, ndi ḓo ni funza u hulisa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms34:12 U tama u ḓiphiṋa nga vhutshilo? Wo lavhelela ndalamo na dakalo? 
Psalms34:13 Ndi zwone, u songo tshinya nga lulimi lwau, u songo ṱanganya mulomo wa nṱha na wa fhasi wa zwifha." 
Psalms34:14 Furalela vhuvhi u ite zwivhuya, lwela mulalo nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
Psalms34:15 Maṱo a Muṋe washu a dzula o sedza vha fulufhedzeaho, u pfa zwililo zwavho." 
Psalms34:16 Tshifhaṱuwo tsha Muṋe washu tshi sinyutshela vhaitazwivhi, vha fa, vha mbo ḓi hangwiwa." 
Psalms34:17 Vha fulufhedzeaho vha tshi vhidzelela Muṋe washu u a vha pfa, a vha ṋula khomboni dzavho dzoṱhe." 
Psalms34:18 Muṋe washu u tsini ha vho kuleaho nungo, u tshidza vha mimuya yo pwashekanaho." 
Psalms34:19 A fulufhedzeaho u welwa nga khombo nnzhi, hone Muṋe washu u mu lamukisa khadzo dzoṱhe." 
Psalms34:20 Muṋe washu u tika marambo awe oṱhe, na shambo na ḽithihi ḽa si vunḓee." 
Psalms34:21 Vhavhi vha ḓo vhulawa nga vhuvhi havho; vha vhengaho muvhuya vha ḓo haṱulelwa ṱhamu. 
Psalms34:22 Muṋe washu u tshidza vhalanda vhawe; vhane vha dzumbama ngae a vha nga haṱulelwi ṱhamu. 
Psalms35:1 Muṋe washu, imedzana na vha nthomaho, ilwa na vha lwaho na nṋe." 
Psalms35:2 Fara tshiṱangu na philelo, u ḓe u nndamulele." 
Psalms35:3 Ṱomola pfumo ḽau na tsanga u thivhele vha ntovholaho. Amba na nṋe u ri, “Ndi mutshidzi wau.”" 
Psalms35:4 Vhane vha ṱoḓa u ḽa ṱhoho yanga kha vha shone vha tou niwa nga ṱhoni. Vhalaleli vhanga vha humise vha tshi tou fhufhura nḓevhe. 
Psalms35:5 Nga vha nge mungu u hwalwaho nga ḓumbu vha tshi vhilimedzwa nga Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu, nḓila yavho nga i tou nzwii, i redze." 
Psalms35:6
