Psalms35:7 Vho nthea nga mambule ndí songo vha levhela, vha ita na u mmveela khunḓa ndi si na tshe nda tshinya." 
Psalms35:8 Nga vha tshenuwe vho lozwiwa, mambule a fashe murei, khunḓa i fashe muvei." 
Psalms35:9 A vha nṋe, ndi pembelela Muṋe washu, ndi a takala, o ntshidza." 
Psalms35:10 Ndi amba nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, ndi ri: Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi ane a nga Iwe? U lamulela muheḓana kha wa maanḓa, mutshinyali wa mu lamulela zwanḓani zwa muṱanguli." 
Psalms35:11 Ndi zwifhelelwa nga vhalevhi; ndi sengiswa zwine ndi si zwi ḓivhe; 
Psalms35:12 vha lifhedza zwivhuya nga zwivhi; a thi tshee na ṱhama. 
Psalms35:13 Hone vhone vha tshi lwala o vha lilisaho ndi nṋe, nda ḓiṅala nda ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, nda rabela ndo kotama," 
Psalms35:14 zwa nga ndi rabelela khonani kana murathu, nda ṱungufhala nda tshimbila ndo kotama, ndó hasha milora ṱhohoni, nda nga muthu a lilelaho mme awe." 
Psalms35:15 Zwino nṋe ndó wela-vho khomboni vha nkuvhanganela vha ntsea. Ndi vho nzhonzhowedzwa nga mifhafhara i sa ḓivhalei, vha ntsasaladza vha dovha." 
Psalms35:16 Vha mmbaisa nga u nkholedza vha dovha, vha tshi tou ntshenganyela na maṋo." 
Psalms35:17 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, u ḓo sokou ṱanzwa maṱo wa lavhelesa u swika lini? Nndamulele kha vha nndevhelaho, u mponyokise mulomoni wa i ḽaho." 
Psalms35:18 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo u livhuha ho kuvhangana tshivhidzo tshoṱhe, nda u khoḓa magogo a tshi zwi pfa." 
Psalms35:19 Maswina anga a sokou mmbenga; u songo a litsha a tshi ḓiphiṋa nga nṋe; u songo tenda vha tshi sinyedzana nga u vhona khombo yanga. 
Psalms35:20 A vha ṱoḓi mulalo, tshavho ndi u luka maano a u pomoka vhadziamulalo." 
Psalms35:21 Vha nkholedza vha ri, “Ahaa, ahaa, ro zwi vhona nga ashu maṱo!”" 
Psalms35:22 Iwe Muṋe washu, u songo tsha fhumula wó zwi vhona! Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, u songo nndaṱedza!" 
Psalms35:23 Takuwa u nndamulele Mudzimu wanga! Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ima na nṋe!" 
Psalms35:24 Mudzimu Muṋe wanga, hufha u muhaṱuli muvhuya, u songo vhuya wa tenda vha tshi ntshonedza," 
Psalms35:25 vha tshi ri, “Koṱo, koṱo, ro kona!” kana vha ri, “A ro ngo zwizwiedza-ha!”" 
Psalms35:26 Ngavhe vhane vha takalela u tambula hanga vha tshi shona vha nyadziwa. Vhenevho vha u ḓihudza vha amare ṱhoni vha nyadzee. 
Psalms35:27 Avho vhane vha ntsengela nga vha takale vha fhululedze vha ri, “Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane! Ene u takalela zwi tshi nakela mulanda wawe!”" 
Psalms35:28 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ḓivhadza vhuvhuya hau, nda u renda ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Psalms36:1 Vhuvhi vhu dzula vhu tshi kweta mbilu ya muvhi, a shandukela Mudzimu a si mu ofhe." 
Psalms36:2 U a ḓifhura nga murunzi wa ningo; u vhona unga vhutshinyi hawe vhu nga si dzumbuluwe, vhu nga si lifhedzwe." 
Psalms36:3 U amba mavhi na a vhufhura fhedzi; ha na vhuṱali, ha iti zwivhuya." 
Psalms36:4 Naho o lala u ḓi luka vhunwa; ha bvi nḓilani yawe mmbi, vhuvhi ha vhu nyali." 
Psalms36:5 Muṋe washu, vhuthu hau vhu swika makoleni, u fulufhedzea hau hu ṋanzwa makole." 
Psalms36:6 Vhuvhuya hau ho hula unga thavha khulu; khaṱhulo dzau ndi dzivha ḽihulu; Iwe Muṋe washu u londola vhathu na phukha. 
Psalms36:7 Mudzimu, vhuthu hau vhu tamisa hani! Vhathu vha dzumbama nga phapha dzau." 
Psalms36:8 Vha ḽa mapfura pfamoni yau, u vha nwisa mulamboni wa zwivhuya zwau." 
Psalms36:9 Ndi Iwe tshisima tsha vhutshilo, ri tshila nga tshedza tshau." 
Psalms36:10 U songo vhuya wa ṅaledza vhane vha u ḓivha, u ḓi tonda vha si na vhufhura." 
Psalms36:11 U songo tenda vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha tshi nndevhela kana vhavhi vha tshi nthathela kule. 
Psalms36:12 Vhaitazwivhi ngevhaḽaa vho rambalala, vho tsikeledzwa, vha kundwa u vuwa." 
Psalms37:1 U songo dinalea nga vhaitazwivhi, u songo tama vhutshilo ha vhatshinyi." 
Psalms37:2 Hufha vha tshi ḓo ṱavhanya u puta unga hatsi, vha tshi nga zwimela zwitete zwi sa lengi u fa." 
Psalms37:3 Iwe fulufhela Muṋe washu u ite zwivhuya, ḓidzulele shangoni u tshile nga mulalo." 
Psalms37:4 Takadzwa nga Muṋe washu, Ene u ḓo u ṋea zwine mbilu yau ya tama." 
Psalms37:5 Nḓila dzau u dzi kumedze Muṋe washu. Mu fulufhele, Ene u ḓo shuma." 
Psalms37:6 U ḓo dzumbulula u fulufhedzea hau ha nga tshedza; khaṱhuloni u ḓo bva wo ṱamba, wa penya unga ḓuvha masiari tshivhangalala." 
Psalms37:7 U songo fhela mbilu, lindela Muṋe washu. U tshi vhona vha pfumaho nga vhufhura, u si dinalee." 
Psalms37:8 Litsha mbiti, u furalele u sinyuwa; u songo dinalea, u sa ḓo tshinya." 
Psalms37:9 Hufha vhatshinyi vha tshi ḓo lozwiwa. Vha fulufhelaho Muṋe washu vhone shango ḽi ḓo vha ifa ḽavho. 
Psalms37:10 Hu si kale vhatshinyi a vha tsha ḓo vha hone; wa sedza hune vha dzula u ḓo wana vha si tsheeho. 
Psalms37:11 Hone vho vuḓaho, shango ḽi ḓo vha ḽavho, vha ḓo ḓiphiṋa nga lupfumo, ḽó lala." 
Psalms37:12 Muvhi tshawe ndi u itela muvhuya tshimbevha, a mu zwondolola nga vengo." 
Psalms37:13 Hone Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u sea muvhi; u ḓivha uri ḓuvha ḽawe ḽi a ḓa. 
Psalms37:14 Vhavhi vha ṱomola mapanga avho, vha akha vhura vha tshi ri vha vhulahe vhaheḓana na vhashai, vha shidzhe vha no ita zwivhuya." 
Psalms37:15 Hone banga ḽi ḓo rema muremi, vhura ha vunḓea." 
Psalms37:16 Makoko a no ḽiwa nga vha fulufhedzeaho, zwi fhira lupfumo lwa vhavhi vhanzhi." 
Psalms37:17 Nungo dza vhavhi dzi ḓo kulea, Muṋe washu Ene u tika vha fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms37:18 Muṋe washu u londola vha mu shumelaho nga mbilu nthihi; ifa ḽavho ḽi ḓo dzula ḽi hone lini na lini. 
Psalms37:19 Musi muvhi a vha nga shoni; nḓalani vha ḓo ḽa vha laṱa. 
Psalms37:20 Vhavhi vhone vha ḓo lovha; maswina a Muṋe washu naho a tshi nga pfulo i tamisaho, vha nyamalala unga vhutsi." 
Psalms37:21 Muvhi a pamba ha tsha lifha; muvhuya ndi mapakulile, u a ṋea." 
Psalms37:22 Vho shudufhadzwaho nga Muṋe washu, shango ḽi ḓo vha ḽavho, vhe a vha teketela vha ḓo lovha." 
Psalms37:23 Muṋe washu u endedza ṋayo dza muthu ane a mu takadza, u a mu tika." 
Psalms37:24 Naho a wa, a nga si rambalale; Muṋe washu u a mu vusa." 
Psalms37:25 Ndo vha ndi ṅwana, zwino ndo no vha wa maḓuvha; a thi athu vhona mufulufhedzea o laṱiwa kana vhana vhawe vha tshi humbela zwiḽiwa." 
Psalms37:26 U ḓi ṋea nga fhedzi, a adzima, vhana vhawe vha ḓi vha na mashudu." 
Psalms37:27 Ṱutshela vhuvhi u ite zwivhuya, ndi hone u tshi ḓo lalama." 
Psalms37:28 Muṋe washu u funa khaṱhulo mbuya, vha mu luvhaho nga u fulufhedzea ha vha laṱi, vha ḓo tsireledzwa tshoṱhe; vhana vha muvhi vhone, vha ḓo lovha." 
Psalms37:29 Shango ḽi ḓo vha ḽa vha fulufhedzeaho, vha dzula khaḽo lini na lini." 
Psalms37:30 Mulomo wa muvhuya u bula a vhuṱali, lulimi lwawe lu amba zwa khaṱhulo mbuya." 
Psalms37:31 Mulayo wa Mudzimu a u bvi mbiluni yawe, ha pambuwi khawo." 
Psalms37:32 Muvhi u lalela muvhuya a tshi ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha. 
Psalms37:33 Muṋe washu ha nga mu kumedzi zwanḓani zwa swina; e tsengoni a nga si haṱulelwe ṱhamu. 
Psalms37:34 Fulufhela Muṋe washu u vhulunge milayo yawe, ndi hone a tshi ḓo u hulisa shango ḽa vha ḽau, wa vhona vhavhi vha tshi lovha." 
Psalms37:35 Ndo vhona muvhi e na maanḓa, a tshi tou ṋanzwa makole unga muṱulume," 
Psalms37:36 hone ndi tshi dovha u fhira ngaho nda wana a si tsheeho, nda ri u mu ṱoḓa nda si mu wane." 
Psalms37:37 Vhona a sa solisei, sedza a si na vhufhura: mudziamulalo u ḓo vha na vhaḓuhulu." 
Psalms37:38 Hone vhane vha shandukela Mudzimu vha ḓo fhedzwa vhe tshote, vhavhi vha ḓo swielwa." 
Psalms37:39 Muṋe washu ndi Ene a tshidzaho vhavhuya, musi wa khombo vha shavhela khae." 
Psalms37:40 Muṋe washu u a vha farisa a vha lamulela; u vha lamulela kha maswina a vha tshidza, ngauri vha khuda ngae." 
Psalms38:1 Muṋe washu, u songo nkaidza wo sinyuwa, u songo nthwa u mbitini!" 
Psalms38:2 Wo mpfula nga misevhe yau, wa tou nkanḓa nda zwi pfa!" 
Psalms38:3 Wo nkhalifhela, a hu tshee na hu si na mbonzhe muvhilini wanga, marambo anga a a rema oṱhe nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi hanga." 
Psalms38:4 Ndo no tou mbwandamela dzivhani ḽa vhutshinyi hanga, vhu lemela unga muhwalo u sa hwalei." 
Psalms38:5 Vhutsilu hanga ho mmbangela mbonzhe, dzo sina, dzi vho nukha." 
Psalms38:6 Ndo kandeledzwa tshoṱhe, ndo rambalala, ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi ṱwa ndo ṱungufhala." 
Psalms38:7 Khundu dzanga dzi tou duga nga dali, muvhili wo tou phapha mbonzhe." 
Psalms38:8 Ndo ṱahala tshoṱhe, ndo pwashekana, ndi khou gomela nga vhuṱungu vhu re mbiluni yanga." 
Psalms38:9 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, hufha u tshi ḓivha zwoṱhe zwine nda lila, u femeleka hanga hufha u tshi khou hu pfa." 
Psalms38:10 Mbilu yanga i tou sinḓa, a thi tshee na nungo, na u vhona a thi tsha vhona." 
Psalms38:11 Vha hashu na khonani dzanga vho no nṱamba nga u vhona maṱungu anga, mashaka anga o ima kule." 
Psalms38:12 Vhavhulahi vhanga vha rea zwikwekwe zwavho, vhahuvhadzi vhanga vha ri, “Kha ri mu khokhovhedze!” Vha ṱwa vha tshi nndangana ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Psalms38:13 Hone nṋe ndi nga dzinganḓevhe, thi pfi. A thi ambi, ndi mbevhevhe." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, ndi nga a thi pfi tshithu, na u fhindula a thi fhinduli." 
Psalms38:15 Muṋe washu, ndo lindela Iwe. Mudzimu wanga, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Iwe u ḓo mphindula." 
Psalms38:16 Ndi a rabela ndi ri, “U songo litsha vha tshi ntsea, u songo tenda vha tshi zuwa u kundwa hanga!”" 
Psalms38:17 Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi wa, vhuṱungu hanga a vhu nkhumeli." 
Psalms38:18 Ndi bula vhuvhi hanga, vhukhakhi hanga a vhu nnyawedzi." 
Psalms38:19 Vhane vha tama ndi tshi fa vha na maanḓa, ndi vhanzhi vhane vha sokou mmbenga." 
Psalms38:20 Vha lifhedza zwivhuya nga zwivhi, vha lwa na nṋe nge nda funa u ita zwivhuya." 
Psalms38:21 Muṋe washu, u songo nndaṱedza! Mudzimu wanga, u songo vha kule hanga!" 
Psalms38:22 Ṱavhanya u mphalala, yawee, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Mutshidzi wanga!" 
Psalms39:1 Nṋe ndo ri, “Ndi ḓo linda matshilele anga, ndi si tende lulimi lwanga lu tshi nkhakhisa. Vhavhi vha tshi kha ḓi vha tsini hanga ndi ḓo ambara tshithivhamulomo.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndo nga tshimuma nda fhumula, zwi si mpfarise tshithu, maṱungu anga a ḓi ṋaṋa." 
Psalms39:3 Mbilu yanga yo vha i tshi swa ngomu hanga, ndi tshi elelwa nda pfa ndi tshi tou swa. Nda vhuya nda tou zwi bula nda ri," 
Psalms39:4 “Muṋe washu, ntsumbedze uri vhutshilo hanga ho pfufhifhala hani. Wo ntela maḓuvha mangana? Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ḓivha uri vhutshilo hanga vhu tou fhufha!”" 
Psalms39:5 Vhona, wo mmbetshela maḓuvha a si gathi, miṅwaha yanga Iwe u vhona i si tshithu. Ngoho vhutshilo ha muthu ndi mufemo." 
Psalms39:6 U dzhena a tshi bva, a nga u khou lora, a kuvhanganya, a khokha, a sa ḓivhi muḽi wazwo." 
Psalms39:7 Zwino-ha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, a hu tshee na muṅwe mulamuleli, nṋe ndi fulufhela Iwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ntshidze vhutshinyini hanga hoṱhe, u songo tenda ndi tshi shonedzwa nga mavavhi!" 
Psalms39:9 Ndi nga tshimuna, ndi sokou ṅo, tenda zwo shuṅwa nga Iwe." 
Psalms39:10 U songo tsha nthwa, ndo ṱahala nga matsivha a tshanḓa tshau." 
Psalms39:11 U rwa muthu nga ṱhamu yo teaho vhuvhi hawe, wa mu ḽela lupfumo unga tshifheṱi. Ngoho vhutshilo ha muthu ndi mufemo." 
Psalms39:12 Muṋe washu, ipfa thabelo yanga, thetshelesa tshililo tshanga, u songo sokou fhumula wa litsha ndi tshi lila! Ndi mueni wau u ḓi nga makhulukuku wanga vhoṱhe; ndi ṱhunḓu i si na mulamuleli, dzhavhelo ḽanga ndi Iwe fhedzi." 
Psalms39:13 Nnditshe ndi thome u femuluwa ndi sa athu ṱuwa ndi si tsha vha hone! 
Psalms40:1 Ndo lindela Muṋe washu ndi sa fheli mbilu, Ene a nthetshelesa, a pfa tshililo tshanga," 
Psalms40:2 a nṋula dindini ḽi ofhisaho, a mmvisa kha lunwenwe ndo fashiwa, a nnyimisa nṱha ha dombo, a nnyendedza o ntsireledza." 
Psalms40:3 O mpfunza luimbo luswa, luimbo lwa u renda Mudzimu washu. Vhanzhi vha ḓo zwi vhona vha ofha, vha fulufhela Muṋe washu." 
Psalms40:4 U na mashudu ane a fulufhela Muṋe washu, a si luvhe midzimu i si tshithu kana a kungwa nga vha no luvha midzimu i siho." 
Psalms40:5 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga, zwi kanukisaho zwe wa ita ndi zwinzhi! Ane a nga Iwe haho! Wo ri dzudzanyela zwi kanukisaho; ndi nga si kone na u zwi vhala zwoṱhe, zwo andesa!" 
Psalms40:6 Zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho a zwi u takadzi, hone nṋe wo mphula nḓevhe nda vha phuli yau tshoṱhe. Nduvho dzo fhiswaho na zwifuwo a si zwine wa zwi takalela." 
Psalms40:7 Zwenezwo nṋe nda ri, “Ndi a ḓa! Buguni ho ṅwalwa hu tshi ambiwa nṋe." 
Psalms40:8 Ndi takalela u ita zwine wa zwi funa, Iwe Mudzimu wanga; Mulayo wau ndo u vhulunga mbiluni yanga.”" 
Psalms40:9 U fulufhedzea hau ndo hu ḓivhadza vhathu vhau vhoṱhe vhó kuvhangana; Muṋe washu, Iwe u a ḓivha uri ndi nga si vhuye nda litsha u hu bula nga mulomo wanga." 
Psalms40:10 A tho ngo dzumba mafhungo a vhuvhuya hau mbiluni yanga; ndo bula nda ri, u a fulufhedzea, u a tshidza; vhathu vhau vhoṱhe vhó kuvhangana a tho ngo vha dzumbela vhuthu hau na u fulufhedzea hau." 
Psalms40:11 Muṋe washu, u songo litsha u nkhathutshela! Ngavhe vhuthu hau na u fulufhedzea hau zwi tshi ntsireledza!" 
Psalms40:12 Ndo tangwa nga khombo dzi si na mbalo. Vhuvhi hanga ho mpfara, ndi vhona hone fhedzi. Ho ḓala u fhira mavhudzi a ṱhoho yanga; ho nkula nungo." 
Psalms40:13 Muṋe washu, ngavhe u tshi ntshidza! Yawee, Muṋe washu, wa ṱavhanya u mphalalaa!" 
Psalms40:14 Vhoṱhe vhane vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha nga vha shone vha hanganee. Vhane vha ṱoḓa ndi tshi wela khomboni vha hume vho shona! 
Psalms40:15 Vhane vha tshi mmbona vha ri, “Koṱo, koṱo!” vha tshenuse, vha hanganee vho shona." 
Psalms40:16 Vhoṱhe vhane vha u ṱoḓa, vhone nga vha takale vha ḓiphiṋe; vhoṱhe vhane vha funa u tshidzwa nga Iwe vha dzule vha tshi ri, “Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane!”" 
Psalms40:17 A vha nṋe ndi mushai, a thi na nungo, hone Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a u nkhangwi. Iwe u Mutiki wanga, u Mutshidzi wanga; Mudzimu wanga, u songo lenga!" 
Psalms41:1 U na mashudu ane a londa muheḓana; Muṋe washu u ḓo mu lamulela musi wa khombo. 
Psalms41:2 Muṋe washu u ḓo mu londola a ḓi tshila, vhathu vhoṱhe vha khoḓa mashudu awe. Mudzimu ha nga tendi maswina awe a tshi ita zwine a funa ngae." 
Psalms41:3 E thovhoni i fhisaho Muṋe washu u ḓo mu tika; u ḓo mu fhodza vhulwadzeni. 
Psalms41:4 Nṋe ndo ri, “Muṋe washu, nkhathutshele! Mphodze, ndo u khakhela!”" 
Psalms41:5 Maswina anga a ri ngavhe ndi tshi welwa nga khombo. Vha ri, “U ḓo fa lini dzina ḽawe ḽa lovha?”" 
Psalms41:6 Vha tshi ḓa u nṱola vha nkhoya nga maipfi, ngeno mbilu dzavho dzo khuba vhunwa; vha tshi ri taku vha mbo ḓi nnyisela phungo mmbi." 
Psalms41:7 Vha mmbengaho vha hevhedzana vha tshi nnyamba; vha ri ngavhe ndi tshi welwa nga khombo. 
Psalms41:8 Vha ri, “Dwadze ḽo mu faraho ḽi ḓo mu vhulaha; o lala tshoṱhe, a nga si dovhe a vuwa.”" 
Psalms41:9 Na yone khonani yanga ya mbiluni ane nda mu fulufhela, ane ra ḽa muthathendilo, na ene o mmvutshela." 
Psalms41:10 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu, nkhathutshele; mmvuse, ndi kone u vha lifhedza." 
Psalms41:11 Musi u tshi kaṱudza muḓalo wa maswina anga, ndi ḓivha uri u a ntakalela." 
Psalms41:12 Nṋe wo ntika, a thi na mulandu; u nkuvhatedza tsini hau lini na lini." 
Psalms41:13 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele zwino na lini na lini. AMEN, AMEN!" 
Psalms42:1 Mbilu yanga i ṱulutshela Iwe Mudzimu unga tholo yo ṱulutshela maḓi milambwanani. 
Psalms42:2 Muya wanga wo ṱuvha Mudzimu, wo ṱuvha Mudzimu a tshilaho. Ndi ḓo ya lini nḓuni yawe nda vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe?" 
Psalms42:3 Ndi lila vhusiku na masiari, miṱodzi ndi zwone zwiḽiwa zwanga; vhathu vha dzulela u nngoḓa vha ri, “Mudzimu wau u ngafhi?”" 
Psalms42:4 Mbilu yanga i tou swa ndi tshi elelwa zwithu hezwi: zwiḽa ndi tshi ṱuwa na gogo ndó vha ranga phanḓa ri tshi ya nḓuni ya Mudzimu, vhathu vha tshi pembela, hu tshi pfala mifhululu ya dakalo, ha imbwa dza u livhuha Mudzimu." 
Psalms42:5 Wo ṱungufhalelani, iwe muya wanga? Ndi mini u sa ruli? Lindela Mudzimu, ndi ḓo dovha nda mu renda, Ene Mudzimu wanga a ntshidzaho!" 
Psalms42:6 Muya wanga wo ṱungufhala, ndi zwine nda u elelwa ndi zwisimani zwa Jorodani, thavhani ya Heremoni, ndi Kutavhanani." 
Psalms42:7 Mativha a a vhidzana hu tshi bvuma maguvhukuvhu au; ndo tibwa nga mikumbela yau na magabelo au. 
Psalms42:8 Tenda masiari Muṋe washu a sumbedza lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei, na vhusiku ndi mu imbela luimbo, nda rabela Mudzimu a nṋeaho vhutshilo." 
Psalms42:9 Ndi amba na Mudzimu, Ene dzhavhelo ḽanga, ndi ri, “Wo nkhangwelani? Ndi mini ndi tshi enda ndo ṱungufhala ndi tshi kandeledzwa nga maswina anga?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ndi tou nga ndo rungwa nga pfumo ḽa guma nga marambo; maswina anga a nkolela a sa nkhumeli, a ḓi ri, “Mudzimu wau u ngafhi?”" 
Psalms42:11 Wo ṱungufhalelani, iwe muya wanga? Ndi mini u sa ruli? Lindela Mudzimu, ndi ḓo dovha nda mu renda, Ene Mudzimu wanga a ntshidzaho!" 
Psalms43:1 Mudzimu, ntsengele u ime na nṋe musi ndi tshi lwa na mashandukwa, ndi ponyoke vhalevhi vha vhufhura!" 
Psalms43:2 Mudzimu, vhushavhelo hanga ndi Iwe; u nndaṱelani? Ndi mini ndi tshi enda ndo ṱungufhala ndi tshi kandeledzwa nga maswina anga?" 
Psalms43:3 Kha ndi endedzwe nga tshedza tshau na ngoho yau, zwi ntswikise thavhani yau khethwa hune wa dzula." 
Psalms43:4 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ya aḽiṱarini ya Mudzimu, nda swika ha Mudzimu, Ene dakalo ḽanga, Ene Mufhululedzwa. Ndi ḓo u renda nga haripa, Iwe Mudzimu, Mudzimu wanga." 
Psalms43:5 Wo ṱungufhalelani, iwe muya wanga? Ndi mini u sa ruli? Lindela Mudzimu, ndi ḓo dovha nda mu renda, Ene Mudzimu wanga a ntshidzaho!" 
Psalms44:1 Vhokhotsi ashu vho ri vhudza; ro zwi pfa nga dzashu nḓevhe zwe Iwe Mudzimu wa ita vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, misi iḽa ya kale:" 
Psalms44:2 Wo thatha dzitshakha nga tshau tshanḓa, vhudzuloni hadzo ha dzula vhone. Dzitshakha wo dzi kula nungo ha vha u vhofholola vhone." 
Psalms44:3 A vho ngo wana shango nga ḽavho pfumo, a vho ngo kunda nga tshavho tshanḓa; ndi nga maanḓa au na tshanḓa tshau, ndi nga lupenyo lwa tshifhaṱuwo tshau, nge wa vha takalela." 
Psalms44:4 Iwe u Khosi yanga, u Mudzimu wanga; ita uri Jakopo a kunde." 
Psalms44:5 Ri dida maswina ashu nga Iwe, vha ri levhelaho ri vha kandekanya nga dzina ḽau." 
Psalms44:6 A si vhura hanga vhune nda vhu fulufhela, na pfumo ḽanga ḽi nga si ntshidze;" 
Psalms44:7 ndi Iwe wo ri tshidzaho zwanḓani zwa maswina ashu, wa shonisa vhane vha ri vhenga." 
Psalms44:8 Ri ḓo dzula ri tshi zuwa Mudzimu, ra mu livhuha lini na lini." 
Psalms44:9 Huno zwino wo ri laṱa, wa ri shonisa. Ri tshi bva pfumo a u tsha ri fhelekedza." 
Psalms44:10 Wo ita uri ri shavhe swina ri vhuye ri tshi fhufhura nḓevhe; maswina a thuba zwe zwa vha zwi zwashu. 
Psalms44:11 Wo tenda vha tshi ri ṱhavha unga nngu, wa ri balanganya na mashango." 
Psalms44:12 Wo rengisa vhathu vhau nga mutengo u si gathi, wa vha ita zwithu zwi si na mutengo." 
Psalms44:13 Vhahura vhashu vha ri holedza, vha ri sea vha tshi vhona zwe wa ri ita." 
Psalms44:14 Wo ri nyadzisa nga dzitshakha ra vho tou vha ṱano. 
Psalms44:15 Ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi ṱwa ndi tshi kolelwa, tshifhaṱuwo tshanga tsho tibwa nga ṱhoni" 
Psalms44:16 nga u pfa u goḓwa na maṱamba a maswina na vha no ṱoḓa u lifhedza. 
Psalms44:17 Zwoṱhe hezwo zwo ri wela naho ri songo u hangwa kana ra shandukela mulanga wau. 
Psalms44:18 Mbilu dzashu a dzo ngo u furalela, na milenzhe yashu a yo ngo pambuwa nḓilani yau." 
Psalms44:19 Wo ri sia ri tshi takanyea vhukati ha dziphunguhwe, wa ri tiba nga swiswi ḽihulu ḽa tou bodo." 
Psalms44:20 Arali ro vha ro hangwa dzina ḽa Mudzimu washu, ra luvha muṅwe mudzimu," 
Psalms44:21 Mudzimu o vha a si nga zwi ḓivhi naa? Hufha a tshi ḓivha zwiphiri zwi re mbiluni. 
Psalms44:22 Ri tshi ṱwela u vhulawa ri vhulahelwa Iwe, ri tshi vhalwa sa nngu dzi no khou ya u ṱhavhiwa." 
Psalms44:23 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndi mini u tshi kuvhama? Wá vuwaa! Vuwa! U songo ri laṱa tshoṱhe!" 
Psalms44:24 Ndi mini u tshi tsinya iṱo? Khezwi u sa londi u tambudzwa hashu na u kandeledzwa hashu? 
Psalms44:25 Ro wela fhasi ra tou tsumbudzwa buseni, thumbu dza tou phashaa mavuni!" 
Psalms44:26 Takuwa u ḓe u ri phalale! Ri tshidze! Hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei. 
Psalms45:1 Mbiluni yanga hu ela maipfi a u naka, luimbo lwanga ndi lu sikela khosi, lulimi lwanga ndi muthenga wa muṅwali makone." 
Psalms45:2 Wo naka u fhira vhathu vhoṱhe, u tshi zwa hu pfala maḓifha fhedzi; ndi zwe Mudzimu a u shudufhadza lini na lini." 
Psalms45:3 Muhali, kungela pfumo! Wo ambara vhugala na lupenyo." 
Psalms45:4 Namela u kunde nga vhugala hau, lwela ngoho u tsireledze vhaheḓana; nungo dzau dzi ḓo shuma zwi ofhisaho." 
Psalms45:5 Misevhe yau yo ṱuṱulwa, kha i pfule mbilu dza maswina au, u vhuse dzitshakha." 
Psalms45:6 Khuluṋoni yau ndi ya Mudzimu, i ḓo ima lini na lini. Luḓo lwau lwa vhuhosi wo lu fara nga u fulufhedzea." 
Psalms45:7 U funa khaṱhulo mbuya wa vhenga vhuvhi, ndi zwe Mudzimu, a re Mudzimu wau, a u tela zwone, wa takala u fhira thanga dzau dzoṱhe." 
Psalms45:8 Vhupila hau hoṱhe vhu nukhelela zwiḓolo zwa mere na bindamutshe na khinamoni; u takadzwa nga nyimbo dzi pfalaho pfamoni dzo ṱamiwaho nga ṋanga dza nḓou; 
Psalms45:9 vhaṱanuni vhau ndi vhana vha mahosi, thungo ya tshauḽa tshau ho ima ene mufumakadzi ó ambara dza musuku wa Ofiri." 
Psalms45:10 Edzou pfa iwe muselwa, thetshelesa ndi u vhudze! Hangwa vha hau na nnḓu ya khotsi au." 
Psalms45:11 Thovhele u takadzwa nga lunako lwau; ndi muṋe wau, mu luvhe!" 
Psalms45:12 Vhathu vha Tiro vha ḓo u ḓisela nduvho, ha ḓa vhone vhapfumi vha lushaka vha u unga uri u vha fune." 
Psalms45:13 Muselwa u pfamoni yawe, ndi mukololo, o naka hani! Tshifuko tshawe tsho ṱamiwa nga musuku." 
Psalms45:14 U iswa ha thovhele o ambara maṱeleṱele. U tevhelwa nga pheletshedzi dzawe dza dzikhomba, vha ḓiswa ha iwe." 
Psalms45:15 Vha endedzwa nga dakalo na maseo vha tshi dzhena pfamoni ya thovhele. 
Psalms45:16 Thovhele nga a vhe na vhana vhane vha ḓo vhumbwa vhuhosi unga vhomakhulukuku wau; u ḓo vha vhea vha vhusa shango ḽoṱhe. 
Psalms45:17 Ndi u renda nga nyimbo uri mirafho yoṱhe i si u hangwe, tshakha dzi u rende lini na lini." 
Psalms46:1 Ri khuda nga Mudzimu, ndi Ene maanḓa ashu, ha kundwi u ri lamulela khomboni." 
Psalms46:2 Naho ḽifhasi ḽa dzinginyea, a ri ofhi tshithu, naho thavha dza wela tshivhindini tsha lwanzhe," 
Psalms46:3 naho maḓi alwo a unga a fhufhuma, naho magabelo a dzinginyisa thavha, a ri ofhi." 
Psalms46:4 Hu na mulambo wa milonga u takadzaho muḓi wa Mudzimu hu re na nnḓu khethwa ya Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu. 
Psalms46:5 Mudzimu u vhukati hawo, u nga si thuthiwe; Mudzimu u ḓo u lamulela mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka." 
Psalms46:6 Tshakha kha dzi zhambe zwadzo, mivhuso i dzinginyee. Ipfi ḽawe ḽá bvuma ḽifhasi ḽi a ṋoka." 
Psalms46:7 Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe u na riṋe, Mudzimu wa Jakopo ndi Ene dzhavhelo ḽashu." 
Psalms46:8 Iḓani ni vhone mishumo ya Muṋe washu, edzonu vhona zwimangadzo zwe a ita fhano fhasi." 
Psalms46:9 U fhedza dzinndwa u swika he shango ḽa guma; u vunḓekanya vhura, a thathekanya mafumo, zwiṱangu zwa maswole a zwi fhisa nga mulilo." 
Psalms46:10 “Dzikani ni ḓivhe uri ndi Nṋe Mudzimu, ndi fhira dzitshakha, ndi fhira na ḽifhasi!”" 
Psalms46:11 Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe u na riṋe, Mudzimu wa Jakopo ndi Ene dzhavhelo ḽashu." 
Psalms47:1 Inwi tshakha dzoṱhe vhandani zwanḓa, fhululedzani Mudzimu ni ṱavhe mukosi nga dakalo." 
Psalms47:2 Muṋe washu, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, u ofhisa hani, Ene Khosi khulu ya ḽifhasi!" 
Psalms47:3 O ita uri tshakha dzi ri luvhe, a dzi ita vhukando ha milenzhe yashu." 
Psalms47:4 O ri nangela ifa ḽashu, shango ḽavhuḓi, ḽine Jakopo mufunwa wawe a ḽi zuwa." 
Psalms47:5 Mudzimu o gonya ho ṱangana mifhululu, Muṋe washu o gonya ho ṱangana mibvumo ya dziphalaphala." 
Psalms47:6 Rendani, rendani Mudzimu nga nyimbo! Rendani, rendani Khosi yashu nga nyimbo!" 
Psalms47:7 Mudzimu ndi Khosi ya ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe, mu rendeni nga phisalema!" 
Psalms47:8 Mudzimu u vhusa dzitshakha, Mudzimu u thukha kha khuluṋoni yawe khethwa." 
Psalms47:9 Vhahulwane vha dzitshakha vha ḓo kuvhangana, vha vha vhathu vha Mudzimu wa Abrahamu. Mahosi a shango a vhuswa nga Mudzimu, ndi Ene Ambadzifhele." 
Psalms48:1 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, thendo khulu nga i ye khae musanda wa Mudzimu washu, thavhani yawe khethwa." 
Psalms48:2 Yo ri u naka, ya ri u lapfa, ya ḓisa dakalo shangoni ḽoṱhe. Thavha ya Tsioni ngeiḽaa devhula, wone musanda wa Khosi khulu." 
Psalms48:3 Mudzimu u dzula pfamoni dzawo, u ḓihwa e dzhavhelo ḽawo." 
Psalms48:4 Vhonani mahosi o kuvhangana, vho ḓa u ri dia." 
Psalms48:5 Vho ri u u vhona zwa vha somela, vha dzhenwa nga nyofho vha shavha vha tshi tou fhufhura nḓevhe." 
Psalms48:6 Henefho vha thoma u tetemela nga nyofho, vha kulea nungo unga musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa," 
Psalms48:7 zwa nga zwiḽa u tshi pwashekanya zwikepe zwa Tharashishi nga maḓumbu a vhubvaḓuvha. 
Psalms48:8 Zwe ra zwi pfa ndi zwenezwo zwe ra zwi vhona nga ashu maṱo musanda wa Muṋe washu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, musanda wa Mudzimu washu: u ḓo u tika lini na lini." 
Psalms48:9 Mudzimu, ro humbula lufuno lwau lu sa tseki rí ngomu thembeleni yau." 
Psalms48:10 Mudzimu, dzina ḽau ndi ḽihulu, na thendo i yaho ha Iwe ndi khulu, i swika na mugumoni wa shango. Tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa tshi ita zwivhuya fhedzi." 
Psalms48:11 Thavha ya Tsioni nga i takale, vhananyana vha Juda nga vha pembele; wo ri lamulela nga khaṱhulo yau." 
Psalms48:12 Tshimbilani Tsioni, monani nawo, vhalani thawara dzawo," 
Psalms48:13 sedzani mitsheṱo yo u tangaho, tandulani madzhavhelo awo, ni ḓo konou vhudza vhana vhaṋu, na ri," 
Psalms48:14 “Hoyu ndi Ene Mudzimu, Mudzimu washu wa lini na lini; u ḓo ri endedza ra vhuya ra fa.”" 
Psalms49:1 Hee inwi tshakha dzoṱhe, ipfani! Thetshelesani inwi noṱhe vhadzulapo vha mashango!" 
Psalms49:2 Vhahulwane na vhathu zwavho, vhapfumi na vhashai!" 
Psalms49:3 Haṋwani hanga hu ḓo bva a vhuṱali, zwine nda elekanya zwi sumbedza ṱhalukanyo." 
Psalms49:4 Ndi ḓo kolongonya nḓevhe nda thetshelesa ndayo, nda dzumbulula tshiphiri ndi tshi lidza haripa." 
Psalms49:5 Zwa vhifha ndi ofhani ndó tingwa nga maswina," 
Psalms49:6 vhathu vhane vha ḓitika nga lupfumo lwavho, vha zuwa u anda halwo?" 
Psalms49:7 Hufha hu si na murengululi wa muṅwe, a no bvisa tshipfumelo tsha vhutshilo ha muthu a ṋea Mudzimu." 
Psalms49:8 Vhutshilo ha muthu vhu na mutengo muhulu, a vhu rengululwi." 
Psalms49:9 A hu na a sa fi, a hu na a sa dzheni tshaloni." 
Psalms49:10 Ndi nnyi a sa zwi ḓivhi uri na vhaṱali vha a fa? Na matsilu, na madodo, vhoṱhe vha a ḓi lovha, lupfumo lwavho lwa sala lu tshi ḽiwa nga vhaṅwe." 
Psalms49:11 Zwalo ndi mahaya avho lini na lini, vha dzula henefho ha fhira mirafho na mirafho, naho vho rina mashango madzina avho." 
Psalms49:12 Muthu na u pfuma háwe ha lengi u fa, u a ḓi lovha unga phukha." 
Psalms49:13 Ndi yone nḓila ya vha no ita vhutsilu nga u ḓifulufhela; vha no fushea nga lupfumo lwavho vha fhedza nga u ralo. 
Psalms49:14 Vha livha tshaloni unga nngu, lufu ndi lwone mulisa wavho; vha si na vhufhura vha ḓo vha vhusa ḽi tshi tsha; mivhili yavho i ḓo sinela zwaloni shangoni ḽa vhafu kule na mahaya avho." 
Psalms49:15 A vha nṋe, Mudzimu u ḓo nthengulula, u ḓo nndamukisa maanḓani a lufu." 
Psalms49:16 U songo ḽa mbilu u tshi vhona muṅwe a tshi pfuma, u tshi vhona a tshi khokha lupfumo." 
Psalms49:17 A tshi fa u ḓo ṱuwa na mini? Vhugala hawe vhu ḓo mu tevhela naa? 
Psalms49:18 Naho vhutshiloni vhuno o vhona unga u na mashudu, vhathu vha mu khoḓa nga u vhona a tshi pfuma a tshi ya," 
Psalms49:19 u ḓo ḓi tevhela vhokhotsi awe, a vha tsha ḓo vhona tshedza tsha vhutshilo." 
Psalms49:20 Muthu na u pfuma háwe ha lengi u fa, u a ḓi lovha unga phukha." 
Psalms50:1 Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe u khou amba, u vhidza ḽifhasi u bva vhubvaḓuvha u swika vhukovhela." 
Psalms50:2 Mudzimu u vhonadza lupenyo lwawe e Tsioni, muḓi wa manakanaka." 
Psalms50:3 Mudzimu washu u khou ḓa, ha fhumuli, phanḓa hawe hu na mulilo u lozwaho, o tangwa nga ḓumbu ḽa maanḓa." 
Psalms50:4 U vhidza ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi uri zwi vhe ṱhanzi a tshi haṱula vhathu vhawe. 
Psalms50:5 U ri, “Nkuvhanganyeleni vhathu vhanga vha fulufhedzeaho vhe vha vhofha mulanga na nṋe nga tshiṱhavhelo!”" 
Psalms50:6 Ḽiṱaḓulu ḽi a ṱanziela ḽa ri, “Mudzimu ndi Muhaṱuli, ha khakhi.”" 
Psalms50:7 “Vhathu vhanga, thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze! Iwe Israele, ndi khou u hwesa mulandu! Mudzimu ndi Nṋe, ndi Mudzimu wau." 
Psalms50:8 A thi u kaidzeli zwiṱhavhelo zwau, hufha u tshi ḓi nṋekedza nduvho dzo fhiswaho." 
Psalms50:9 Hone a thi nga ṱanganedzi mbohwana dzi bvaho dangani ḽau, na mbokoṱo dzi bvaho miṱambini yau." 
Psalms50:10 Hufha phukha dzoṱhe dza shango dzi dzanga, na kholomo dzo phaphaho mivhundu ya tshigidi." 
Psalms50:11 Zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi fhufhaho thavhani ndi a zwi londola, na zwoṱhe zwi tshimbilaho ḓakani ndi zwanga." 
Psalms50:12 Ndí na nḓala ndi nga vhudza iwe naa? Hufha ḽifhasi na zwi re khaḽo zwi zwanga. 
Psalms50:13 Kani ndi ḽa ṋama ya dzimboho? Ndi nwa malofha a mbudzi naa? 
Psalms50:14 Tshiṱhavhelo tshi ṋekedzwaho Mudzimu ndi thendo; tshau nga hu vhe u khunyeledza zwe wa anela Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu. 
Psalms50:15 Zwó vhifha u nṱavhele mukosi, ndi ḓo u lamukisa wa konou nkhulisa.”" 
Psalms50:16 Mudzimu a tshi amba na vhavhi u ri, “U itelani u tshi ṱolou nkhumbudza mulanga wanga, wa dubekanya ndaela dzanga nga mulomo?" 
Psalms50:17 Hufha u sa funi u laiwa, u tshi landula maipfi anga." 
Psalms50:18 Wá vhona fobvu u konana naḽo, na dziphombwe ndi khonani dzau." 
Psalms50:19 U endela u amba mavhi, lulimi lwau lu luka vhufhura," 
Psalms50:20 wa dzula wa pomoka murathu wau, wa nyefula ṅwana wa mme au vhukuma.”" 
Psalms50:21 “U tshi ita zwoṱhe zwenezwo ndi fhumule naa? U vhona unga Nṋe ndi nga iwe? Hone zwino ndi a u kaidza, ndi u hwesa mulandu." 
Psalms50:22 “Thetshelesani inwi vhane na hangwa Mudzimu, ndi sa ḓo ni balanganya ha si vhe na a ni lamukisaho!" 
Psalms50:23 Tshiṱhavhelo tshi hulisaho Mudzimu ndi thendo; a thetshelesaho ndi ene a no ḓo tshidzwa nga Mudzimu.” 
Psalms51:1 Mudzimu, nkhathutshele, hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei. Tshilidzi tshau hufha tshi tshihulu, ṱanzwa vhutshinyi hanga;" 
Psalms51:2 ṱanzwa vhuvhi hanga vhu fhele tshoṱhe, ndi bve tshika dza zwoṱhe zwe nda khakha." 
Psalms51:3 Zwe nda tshinya ndi a zwi ḓivha, na zwe nda khakha a thi koni u zwi hangwa." 
Psalms51:4 Ndo u khakhela, ndo khakhela Iwe u woṱhe, ndo ita zwi u nengisaho. Ndi zwine u tshi nkhaṱhula wa si khakhe, u tshi nndaṱa zwa vha zwo tea." 
Psalms51:5 Nṋe ndo bebwa ndi muvhi; mme anga a tshi nṱanganedza muvhilini ndo vha ndi tshi ḓi vha mukhakhi. 
Psalms51:6 Iwe u tama mbilu ya muthu i tshi vha na ngoho, mpfunze vhuṱali, mbilu yanga i kame ngaho." 
Psalms51:7 Nkhandulule nga muhisopo ndi kune, nṱanzwe ndi tshene u fhira mahaḓa." 
Psalms51:8 Kha ndi pfe ndo takala ndi pembele, marambo e wa a vunḓekanya nga a tshine." 
Psalms51:9 U songo tsha sedza zwe nda tshinya, thutha vhuvhi hanga hoṱhe." 
Psalms51:10 Yawee, Mudzimu, ntsikele mbilu yo ṱambaho! Ngomu hanga u longe muya muswa u fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms51:11 U songo nthudzela kule na Iwe, u songo nnzhiela Muya Mukhethwa wau." 
Psalms51:12 Kha ndi dovhe ndi takale nga u ḓivha uri wo ntshidza, u ntike nga muya u takalelaho u ita zwine wa funa." 
Psalms51:13 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo funza vhatshinyi nḓila dzau, vhakhakhi vha konou humela ha Iwe." 
Psalms51:14 Mudzimu, mmbofholole kha mulandu wa u shulula malofha, Iwe Mudzimu Mutshidzi wanga. Ndi hone lulimi lwanga lu tshi ḓo fhululedza zwe wa ntshidza." 
Psalms51:15 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, vula mulomo wanga ndi kone u u renda." 
Psalms51:16 Hufha u sa takadzwi nga zwiṱhavhelo; nda u ṋekedza nduvho yo fhiswaho ndi nga si u takadze. 
Psalms51:17 Tshiṱhavhelo tshi takadzaho Mudzimu ndi u ṱungufhala nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi hau; Iwe Mudzimu a u nyadzi mbilu yo pwashekanaho, i ḓiṱukufhadzaho." 
Psalms51:18 Tonda Tsioni u u itele vhuthu, dovha u vuse mitsheṱo ya Jerusalema;" 
Psalms51:19 ndi hone u tshi ḓo takadzwa nga zwiṱhavhelo zwo teaho: nga nduvho dzo fhiswaho, ha ḓo konou ṋekedzwa mbohwana aḽiṱarini yau." 
Psalms52:1 Iwe munna wa vhuhali, u ṱongiselani vhunwa hau? Tendá lufuno lwa Mudzimu lu sa dzinginyei!" 
Psalms52:2 U ḓi luka vhunwa ha u lozwa vhaṅwe; lulimi lwau ndi luare lu fhiraho; muluki wa vhufhura ndiwe! 
Psalms52:3 U funa zwivhi wa vhenga zwivhuya; u takalela mazwifhi wa sanda ngoho. 
Psalms52:4 U funa zwi no vhaisa vhaṅwe fhedzi; lulimi lwau ndi lwa u fhura. 
Psalms52:5 Mudzimu u ḓo u pwashekanya wa si tsha vuwa; Mudzimu u ḓo u tsimbeledza a u doba a u posa kule wa si tsha vhona haya hau: u ḓo u tupula shangoni ḽa vha tshilaho. 
Psalms52:6 Vha no fulufhedzea vha ḓo zwi vhona vha ofha, vha sea wa vhuhali vha ri," 
Psalms52:7 “Edzonu vhona muthu we a si ḓitike nga Mudzimu, we a fulufhela u anda ha lupfumo lwawe, a ḓitika nga vhufhura hawe!”" 
Psalms52:8 Hone nṋe ndi muolivi mudala wo ṱavhiwaho nḓuni ya Mudzimu; ndi fulufhela lufuno lwa Mudzimu lu sa dzinginyei lini na lini. 
Psalms52:9 Wo ntonda, ndi dzula ndi tshi u livhuha, nda ḓivhadza vhuvhuya hau hó kuvhangana vhathu vha fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms53:1 Tsilu mbiluni yaḽo ḽi ri, “A hu na Mudzimu, a hu na Muhaṱuli.” Vho tshinyala vha ita zwi nengisaho, a hu na na muthihi a no ita zwivhuya." 
Psalms53:2 Mudzimu u sedza vhathu e makoleni, uri a vhone arali hu na wa ṱhalukanyo, a ṱoḓaho Mudzimu." 
Psalms53:3 Vhoṱhe vho bva nḓilani, vha vho nengisa vhoṱhe, a hu na na a itaho zwivhuya, na muthihi zwawe." 
Psalms53:4 Kani vhaitazwivhi a vha na ṱhalukanyo hezwi vha tshi ḽa vhathu vhanga unga vhuswa? Na Mudzimu a vha vhuyi vha mu rabela. 
Psalms53:5 Ngevhaḽaa, vho farwa nga nyofho khulu, vha tshi ofha zwi siho! Mudzimu u ḓo balanganya marambo a maswina a vhathu vhawe; vha ḓo shona, Mudzimu o vha laṱa." 
Psalms53:6 Ngavhe u tshidzwa ha Israele hu tshi bva Tsioni! Musi Mudzimu a tshi ḓo vusa lushaka lwawe, ndi hone Jakopo a tshi ḓo pembela, Israele a takala." 
Psalms54:1 Mudzimu, ntshidze nga dzina ḽau, ntsengele, hufha u na maanḓa." 
Psalms54:2 Mudzimu, ipfa thabelo yanga; thetshelesa zwine nda amba." 
Psalms54:3 Vhatsinda vho mmvutshela, vhathu vha tshiṱuhu vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha, vhathu vha sa londi Mudzimu." 
Psalms54:4 Vhonani, Mudzimu ndi Mulamuleli wanga, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe ndi thikho yanga." 
Psalms54:5 U ḓo lifhedza maswina anga nga vhuvhi havho; u vha lozwe, hufha u tshi fulufhedzea." 
Psalms54:6 Ndi ḓo u ṋekedza nduvho nga mbilu tshena; Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo renda Dzina ḽau, u na vhuthu." 
Psalms54:7 Wo ntshidza khomboni dzoṱhe, nda konou kunda maswina anga." 
Psalms55:1 Yawee Mudzimu, thetshelesa thabelo yanga; u songo mpfuralela ndi tshi lila!" 
Psalms55:2 Nthetshelese u mphindule; zwitumbambiluni zwo tou ntsikeledza; a thi aweli 
Psalms55:3 nga mukosi wa maswina anga, ndo kandeledzwa nga vhavhi; vha ntshoshela nga khombo, vho ntsinyutshela, vha a mmbenga." 
Psalms55:4 Mbilu yanga i pfa vhuṱungu; nyofho dza lufu dzo nngwela. 
Psalms55:5 Ndo farwa nga nyofho, ndi ita na u tetemela, nyofho dzi a nkhokhovhedza." 
Psalms55:6 Ndi ri, “Ngavhe ndi na phapha unga ḽiivha! Ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo fhufha nda yo dzula kule;" 
Psalms55:7 ee, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo shavhela kule nda yo lala phangani," 
Psalms55:8 nda ṱavhanya u wana vhukhudo, nda tinya u pomokwa hu no nga maḓumbu a titaho.”" 
Psalms55:9 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, vha vilinganye, u fhiriṱanye ndimi dzavho! Fhano muḓini ndi vhona u huvhadzana na mufhirifhiri." 
Psalms55:10 Vha u mona vhusiku na masiari vha tshi dadamala nṱha ha mbondo dzawo. Ngomu hawo hu na khombo na mufhirifhiri; 
Psalms55:11 muḓi uyu vho u ṱahadza; u kandeledzana na vhufhura a zwi fheli mikotoni yawo. 
Psalms55:12 Ngavhe a nkolelaho o vha e swina, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo konḓelela; a mmvutshelaho ngavhe ḽo vha ḽi swina, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ḽi dzumbama;" 
Psalms55:13 hone zwi khou itwa nga inwi thanga yanga, inwi ṱhama yanga, inwi khonani yanga ye nda i ḓowela;" 
Psalms55:14 ro vha ri tshi ḓiphiṋa nga u somolana zwa haṋwani, ri tshi ya nḓuni ya Mudzimu u yo mu luvha na magogo." 
Psalms55:15 Ngavhe vha tshi fa, vha tou milwa nga shango vha tshi vhona; hu miṱani yavho, hu mbiluni, ho ḓala vhuvhi." 
Psalms55:16 Hone nṋe ndi rabela Mudzimu, Muṋe washu u ḓo ntshidza." 
Psalms55:17 Nga madekwana, nga matsheloni, na masiari ndi ṱahisa zwililo zwanga ndi tshi gomela; Ene u ḓo ḓi pfa ipfi ḽanga." 
Psalms55:18 U ḓo ntshidza nda si huvhale musi ndi nndwani; vhanzhi vha ḓo ima na nṋe. 
Psalms55:19 Mudzimu, Ene a vhusaho tsha kale na kale, u ḓo vha shonisa; hufha vha sa rembuluwi, na Mudzimu vha sa mu ofhi." 
Psalms55:20 Hufha vha tshi lwa na nṋe khonani yavho, vha tshi laṱa zwe ra vhofha." 
Psalms55:21 Vho vha vhe na haṋwani ha u ḓifha ngeno mbilu yo ḓala nndwa; maipfi avho o vha a tshi suvhelela u fhira mapfura, ngeno e mafumo o angaladzwaho." 
Psalms55:22 “Kumedza Muṋe washu mihwalo yau; Ene u ḓo u londola; ha nga vhuyi a laṱedza a no fulufhedzea.” 
Psalms55:23 Hone Iwe Mudzimu u ḓo vha wisela dindini wa vha lozwa; vhathu vha fhaladzaho malofha, vha vhufhura, a vha nga lalami. Hone nṋe ndi fulufhela Iwe." 
Psalms56:1 Mudzimu, mpfele vhuṱungu, vhathu vho mmvutshela! Maswina ha nkhumeli!" 
Psalms56:2 A ṱwa a tshi nkandekanya; Iwe Mudzimu muhulu, ndi vhanzhi vhane vha lwa na nṋe." 
Psalms56:3 Hone musi wa zwi ofhisaho ndi fulufhela Iwe. 
Psalms56:4 Ndi renda Mudzimu nga u takalela zwe a mpfulufhedzisa, thi ofhi tshithu, ndi fulufhela Mudzimu; muthu a nga nnyitani?" 
Psalms56:5 Vha ṱwa vha tshi piringanya nyambo yanga, vha dzulela u nndangana." 
Psalms56:6 Vha a kuvhangana vha nndalela, vha nndonda hoṱhe hune nda tshimbila vha tshi ṱoḓa u mmbulaha." 
Psalms56:7 Mudzimu, u nga vha litsha vha ponyoka vhó ita vhuvhi vhungafhongafho? Vha rambaladze wo sinyuwa!" 
Psalms56:8 Wo zwi vhona ndi tshi teka-teka; miṱodzi yanga i shele mvuvheloni yau; kani a zwo ngo ṅwalwa buguni yau? 
Psalms56:9 Musi ndi tshi u ṱavhela mukosi ndi hone maswina anga a tshi ḓo huma; Mudzimu u ima na nṋe, hezwo ndi a zwi ḓivha." 
Psalms56:10 Ndi renda Mudzimu nga u takalela zwe a mpfulufhedzisa, iina, ndi renda Muṋe washu nga u takalela zwe a mpfulufhedzisa." 
Psalms56:11 Thi ofhi tshithu, ndi fulufhela Mudzimu; muthu a nga nnyitani?" 
Psalms56:12 Mudzimu, zwe nda u anela thi zwi hangwi, ndi ḓo zwi khunyeledza nga u ṋekedza nduvho." 
Psalms56:13 Wo ntshidza lufuni, wa tika milenzhe yanga ndi si we, ndi tshile ndi na Mudzimu, ndí tshedzani tshi ṋeaho vhutshilo." 
Psalms57:1 Nkhathutshele Mudzimu, yawee, nkhathutshele! Vhukhudo hanga ndi Iwe, ndi khuda nga murunzi wa phapha dzau khombo dza vhuya dza fhira." 
Psalms57:2 Ndi vhidzelela Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu, ndi vhidzelela Mudzimu we a nnyitela zwoṱhe." 
Psalms57:3 U ḓo ntsumbedza lufuno lwawe na u fulufhedzea; u ḓo mphalala e ngei ṱaḓulu, a ntshidza; Mudzimu nga dzawe u ḓo shonisa vha no ṱoḓa u nndoba nga mulenzhe." 
Psalms57:4 Ndo lala vhukati ha dzindau, one mavhanda. Maṋo avho ndi mafumo na misevhe, ndimi dzavho ndi mapanga o ṱuṱulwaho." 
Psalms57:5 Mudzimu, hula u fhire makole, vhugala hau vhu ḓadze ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe!" 
Psalms57:6 Vho nthetshela zwikwekwe, ndo kulekana nga maṱungu. Vho mmveela khunḓa – khunḓa yo fasha muvei!" 
Psalms57:7 Mudzimu, ndo rudza mbilu, yo rula tshoṱhe. Ndi ḓo imba nda u renda." 
Psalms57:8 Mbilu yanga, vuwa! Haripa na mbila, vuwani! Ndi ḓo vusa mapfuvhi!" 
Psalms57:9 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndi ḓo u renda tshakha dzi tshi zwi pfa, ndi ḓo u imbela kha tshakha dzoṱhe." 
Psalms57:10 Lufuno lwau lu ṋanzwa makole, u fulufhedzea hau hu swika lutomboni." 
Psalms57:11 Mudzimu, hula u fhire makole, vhugala hau vhu ḓadze ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe!" 
Psalms58:1 Ngoho inwi vhavhusi ni vhea milayo yo teaho naa? Ni haṱula vhathu ni sa ṱaluli naa? 
Psalms58:2 Hufha mbiluni dzaṋu ni tshi luka vhunwa; zwanḓa zwaṋu zwa huvhadza fhano shangoni. 
Psalms58:3 Vhavhi vha pambuwa vha tshee ḽilani; tshee vha bebwa ndi vhadzia-u-zwifha. 
Psalms58:4 Vha na vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha tshitemahe, vho ḓidzingisa khole unga vuluvulu," 
Psalms58:5 uri ḽi si pfe maipfi a mudambiki, naho e makone a manditi." 
Psalms58:6 Mudzimu, vha kulekanye maṋo, Muṋe washu, swarula ṱhaha dza ndau." 
Psalms58:7 Ngavhe vha tshi nyamalala unga maḓi a ṋwelelaho, vha kandekanywa vha puta unga hatsi." 
Psalms58:8 Ngavhe vha tshi nga khumba i no enda i tshi fhelela, vha nge gambutshela ḽi sa vhuyi ḽa vhona ḓuvha!" 
Psalms58:9 Ngavhe vha tshi tshenuwa vho kumbiwa vha kudzwa kule, mulilo u tshi kha ḓi tou dugu, khali dzi sa athu vhila." 
Psalms58:10 Ndi hone vhavhuya vha tshi ḓo takala vha tshi vhona vhavhi vha tshi lifhedzwa; vha ḓo ṱamba milenzhe nga malofha a vhavhi. 
Psalms58:11 Vhathu vha ḓo ri, “Vha no fulufhedzea ngoho vha a pfufhiwa; ngoho Mudzimu u hone a no haṱula shango.”" 
Psalms59:1 Mudzimu wanga, nndamulele kha maswina anga, ntsireledze kha vhane vha mmvutshela!" 
Psalms59:2 Nndamulele kha vhaitazwivhi, ntshidze kha vha no fhaladza malofha!" 
Psalms59:3 Khevha Muṋe washu, vho nndalela, vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha, vhahali vha vho nnzhena nga pfumo ndi si na tshe nda tshinya, ndi si na tshe nda khakha." 
Psalms59:4 Vha nthathedza, vha ṱoḓou nnzhongondedza ndi si na vhuvhi. Muṋe washu, takuwa! Ima na nṋe u sedze zwine nda itwa." 
Psalms59:5 Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, Mudzimu wa Israele, vuwa u kaidze tshakha dzoṱhe! U songo vhuya wa khathutshela zwifheṱi zwanga hezwi!" 
Psalms59:6 Vha vhuya nga madekwana vha tshi vhuvhula unga mmbwa, vha mona-mona na muḓi." 
Psalms59:7 Vha phukhula bulo, vho khuba mapanga nga milomo, vha ri, “Ri ḓo pfiwa nga nnyi?”" 
Psalms59:8 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu u a vha sea, tshakha dzoṱhe u tamba ngadzo." 
Psalms59:9 Nṋe ndo fulufhela Iwe, maanḓa anga ndi Iwe; iwe Mudzimu u vhushavhelo hanga." 
Psalms59:10 Mudzimu u a fulufhedzea, u khou ḓa, u ḓo mpfarisa nda kunda maswina anga." 
Psalms59:11 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, u songo mbo ḓi vha vhulaha, vhathu vhanga vha sa ḓo mbo ḓi hangwa, vha balanganye nga maanḓa au u vha wisele fhasi, Iwe tshiṱangu tshashu." 
Psalms59:12 Kha vha fashwe nga u ḓihudza havho; vha bula zwivhi, vha tshinya nga maipfi avho, vha a nteketela vha dovha vha nnzwifhelela." 
Psalms59:13 Vha lozwe nga mbiti dzau, vha fhedze vha si tsha vha hone, zwi ḓivhee uri Mudzimu u hone a no vhusa Jakopo, na ḽifhasi u swika he ḽa guma." 
Psalms59:14 Vha vhuya nga madekwana vha tshi udza unga mmbwa. 
Psalms59:15 Vha mona-mona vha tshi ṱoḓa zwiḽiwa, vha ri u sa fura, vha huvha." 
Psalms59:16 Hone nṋe ndi ḓo renda maanḓa au, ḽi tshi tsha ndi ḓo fhululedza vhuthu hau; wo ḓi vha vhushavhelo hanga, wa ntsireledza musi wa khombo." 
Psalms59:17 Maanḓa anga ndi Iwe, ndi ḓo u renda nga nyimbo. Iwe Mudzimu u vhushavhelo hanga, Mudzimu wanga, lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei." 
Psalms60:1 Mudzimu, wo ri laṱa wa ri fhandekanya. Wo vha wo sinyuwa; dovha u ri tonde." 
Psalms60:2 Wo dzinginya ḽifhasi wa ḽi fhandukanya; dovha u thivhe mitwe yaḽo, ḽi kha ḓi dzinginyea!" 
Psalms60:3 Wo ri livhanya na zwi konḓaho, wa ri kambisa ra pepeleka." 
Psalms60:4 Wo ri ṱomela tshiga ra tshi kuvhanganela, mmbi dzashu dza vha na nungo, ra tinya misevhe." 
Psalms60:5 Ri fhindule, u ri tshidze nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa, u lamukise vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms60:6 Mudzimu o amba e fhethu hawe hukhethwa, a ri, “Ndi ḓo kunda maswina nda kovha Shikheme, Govha ḽa Sukotho nda ḽi kovhekanya;" 
Psalms60:7 Giliadi ndi ḽanga, na shango ḽa Manase; Efraimi ndi nguwane yanga, luḓo lwanga lwa vhuhosi ndi Juda;" 
Psalms60:8 Muaba ndi sambelo ḽanga; Edomo ndi posa navhula yanga, ha vha u sumbedza uri ndi ḽanga; inwi Vhafilista, mphululedzeni ni luvhe!”" 
Psalms60:9 Ndi nnyi a no ḓo ntswikisa Edomo, nda dzhena musanda waho wo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo?" 
Psalms60:10 Ndi nnyi arali e si Iwe Mudzimu? Hone zwino wo ri laṱa, Mudzimu, hufha u si tsha tshimbila na mmbi dzashu." 
Psalms60:11 Iḓa u ri phalale musi wa khombo, muthu ha farisi tshithu." 
Psalms60:12 Rí na Mudzimu ri ḓo lwa sa vhahali, Ene u ḓo kandekanya maswina ashu." 
Psalms61:1 Yowee Mudzimu, ipfa tshililo tshanga, thetshelesa thabelo yanga!" 
Psalms61:2 Ndi u ṱavhela mukosi ndi ngeno mugumoni wa ḽifhasi, mbilu yanga yo ṋoka. Nnyendedze ndi gonye tombo ḽi mphiraho." 
Psalms61:3 Ndi Iwe vhukhudo hanga, u mutsheṱo wo khwaṱhaho, maswina a nga si dzhene." 
Psalms61:4 Litsha ndi dzule nḓuni yau lini na lini, ndi khude nga phapha dzau." 
Psalms61:5 Iwe Mudzimu wo pfa zwe nda u anela; wo nṋea ifa ḽi ṋewaho vhane vha ofha dzina ḽau. 
Psalms61:6 Nṋe khosi nṋee ndalamo, ngavhe ndi tshi tshila nda vhona mirafho na mirafho;" 
Psalms61:7 ngavhe ndi tshi dzula ndi khosi maṱoni a Mudzimu lini na lini. Nndinde nga vhuthu hau na u fulufhedzea. 
Psalms61:8 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo u renda nga nyimbo lini na lini, maḓuvha oṱhe nda khunyeledza zwe nda u anela." 
Psalms62:1 Musi ndi na Mudzimu, ndi hone ndo rudza mbilu, ndi Ene a ntshidzaho." 
Psalms62:2 Ndi Ene fhedzi a re bako ḽanga na Mutshidzi wanga; Mutsireledzi wanga ndi Ene, a thi nga sudzuluswi." 
Psalms62:3 Nṋa ni ḓo litsha lini u sala muthu murahu? Noṱhe ni khou mu khokhovhedza na nga ni khou khurumedza luvhondo lwo tshingamaho, ni khou fuḓa luhura lwo waho." 
Psalms62:4 Ni langana u mu dzhiela vhuhulwane hawe; ni takalela mazwifhi; ni shudufhadza nga milomo, mbiluni ni tshi mu teketela." 
Psalms62:5 Musi ndi na Mudzimu, ndi hone ndo rudza mbilu, ndi fulufhela Ene fhedzi." 
Psalms62:6 Ndi Ene fhedzi a re bako ḽanga, na Mutshidzi wanga; Mutsireledzi wanga ndi Ene, a thi nga dzinginyei." 
Psalms62:7 Mudzimu ndi Ene Mutshidzi wanga, u a nkhulisa; tombo ḽanga ḽa maanḓa, vhukhudo hanga, ndi Mudzimu." 
Psalms62:8 Inwi vhathu, fulufhelani Ene misi yoṱhe, mu ṱanzeleni zwoṱhe zwa mbiluni dzaṋu; Mudzimu ndi Ene vhukhudo hashu." 
Psalms62:9 Vhathu vhone vha tou vha mufemo, na vhahulwane a si tshithu; naho vha fhanzhelwa tshikaloni tshithihi, vha kha ḓi fhirwa nga mufemo." 
Psalms62:10 U songo ḓitika nga u kandeledza vhaṅwe; vhuvemu vhu nga si u vhuedze tshithu; arali lupfumo lu tshi anda u songo vhea mbilu yau khalwo. 
Psalms62:11 Ndo pfa Mudzimu a tshi amba a dovha, a tshi ri maanḓa ndi awe." 
Psalms62:12 Lufuno lu sa dzinginyei ndi lwa Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe. Iwe u pfufha muthu u tshi tevhedza mishumo yawe. 
Psalms63:1 Mudzimu, u Mudzimu wanga, ndo u ṱuvha; ndo u ṱulutshela nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, zwa nga nḓala na ḓora, ndí fhano shangoni ḽo omaho, ḽo bvaho, hu si na maḓi." 
Psalms63:2 Ndo ṱuvha u u ṱalela nḓuni khethwa, uri ndi vhone maanḓa au na vhugala." 
Psalms63:3 Lufuno lwau lu ntakadza u fhira na vhutshilo; mulomo wanga u ḓo u renda. 
Psalms63:4 Ndi ḓo u livhuha vhutshilo hanga hoṱhe, nda imisa zwanḓa zwanga ndi tshi u rabela." 
Psalms63:5 Ndi fushea nga Iwe nda nga ndo ḽa mapfura; mulomo wanga u ḓo u renda nga nyimbo. 
Psalms63:6 Ndó lala ndi a u humbula, ndi u elekanya vhusiku hoṱhe." 
Psalms63:7 Iwe wo ḓi vha Mutikedzi wanga; ndi fhululedza nga dakalo ndó khuda nga phapha dzau. 
Psalms63:8 Mbilu yanga i nambatela Iwe, ndi tikiwa nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Psalms63:9 Vhane vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha vha ḓo godimela fhasi-fhasi dindini ḽa ḽifhasi; 
Psalms63:10 vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo vha vha zwiḽiwa zwa dziphunguhwe. 
Psalms63:11 Ndi hone khosi i tshi ḓo pembelela Mudzimu, vhoṱhe vhane vha ana ngae vha mu zuwa, milomo ya mazwifhi yó no fhumudzwa." 
Psalms64:1 Mudzimu, ipfa ipfi ḽanga ndi tshi u lilela, ntsireledze kha maswina haya a ofhisaho;" 
Psalms64:2 nnzumbe ndi si fashwe nga zwikwekwe zwa vhavhi, ndi ponyoke milavhu ya vhaitazwivhi." 
Psalms64:3 Vha ṱuṱula ndimi dzavho unga mapanga, vha pfula nga maipfi avho a no nga misevhe ya vhutulu;" 
Psalms64:4 vha pfula a si na mulandu vhó mu lalela, vha mu pfula kathihi fhedzi vha sa ofhi." 
Psalms64:5 Vha ṱuṱuwedzana u ita vhuvhi, vha langana hune vha ḓo rea zwikwekwe zwavho nga tshiphiri, vha ri, “Ri ḓo vhonwa nga nnyi?" 
Psalms64:6 Ro luka vhukwila hone-hone; u nga si ḓivhe tsha thumbuni ya fuyu.” 
Psalms64:7 Hone Mudzimu u ḓo vha pfula nga wawe musevhe, vha ḓo tshenuwa vho no phulwa mbonzhe;" 
Psalms64:8 u ḓo vha lozwela ndimi dzenedzo dzavho. Vhoṱhe vhane vha vha vhona vha tshi wa vha ḓo dzungudza dziṱhoho dzavho. 
Psalms64:9 Ndi hone vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓo ofha, vha vhudzana zwe Mudzimu a ita vha zwi ṱalukanya." 
Psalms64:10 Vha no fulufhedzea vhone vha ḓo takalela Muṋe washu, vha khuda ngae, vhoṱhe vha si na vhufhura vha ḓo kona u zuwa." 
Psalms65:1 Mudzimu, wo tewa nga thendo Tsioni, zwe ra u anela zwi ḓo khunyeledzwa;" 
Psalms65:2 u pfa thabelo dzashu; vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo ḓa ha Iwe 
Psalms65:3 vha tshi ḓiswa nga milandu yavho. Nangwe vhutshinyi hashu ho ri tsikeledza, Iwe u ri hangwela hone." 
Psalms65:4 Wa mashudu ndi uyo ane wa mu nanga, wa mu sendedza tsini, a dzula pfamoni dzau. U ḓo fushwa nga zwivhuya zwa nḓuni yau, zwa thembele yau khethwa!" 
Psalms65:5 Iwe Mudzimu Mutshidzi washu, u a fulufhedzea; u pfa thabelo dzashu, wa ita zwi ofhisaho. Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga he ḽa guma, na malwanzhe a kule-kule, zwo fulufhela Iwe." 
Psalms65:6 Wo tika dzithavha nga maanḓa au; wo fuka nungo. 
Psalms65:7 Iwe u dzikisa u unga ha malwanzhe na phosho ya magabelo ao, wa ladza mifhirifhiri ya dzitshakha," 
Psalms65:8 uri vha dzulaho kule-kule mugumoni wa ḽifhasi vha ofhe maḓembe au. U ita uri vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela hu pembelwe nga dakalo. 
Psalms65:9 U londola ḽifhasi wa ḽi ṋea ndalo, wa ḽi pfumisa zwihulu; madzambo au o ḓala maḓi, uri vhathu vha kaṋe khaṋo khulu. U zwi ita nga u rali:" 
Psalms65:10 He vha lima u hu nisela mvula, wa hu ṋukadza nga maḓi, mavu u a ṋukadza nga vhusuṱo, wa shudufhadza zwa aluwa." 
Psalms65:11 U ambadza ṅwaha tshiala tsha khaṋo khulu; hune wa fhira hone hu ela mapfura; 
Psalms65:12 na pfulo ya phangani i a anda, mivhundu ya ambara dakalo;" 
Psalms65:13 mafulo a tshatshama miṱambi ya nngu, magovha a ḓala mavhele, a pembela, a imba nga dakalo." 
Psalms66:1 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi pembelele Mudzimu," 
Psalms66:2 hulisani dzina ḽawe nga nyimbo, mu imbeleni thendo!" 
Psalms66:3 Vhudzani Mudzimu ni ri, “Mishumo yau i ofhisa hani! Maanḓa au ndi mahulu; maswina au u a khothisa phanḓa hau a luvha." 
Psalms66:4 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽi a u luvha ḽo gwadama, vha u renda nga nyimbo, vha renda dzina ḽau.”" 
Psalms66:5 Iḓani ni vhone zwimangadzo zwe Mudzimu a ita; zwe a itela vhathu ndi zwihulu: 
Psalms66:6 o xisa lwanzhe ha sala ho oma, vha wela mulambo nga milenzhe. Henefho ndi he ra mu takalela," 
Psalms66:7 Ene a vhusaho nga maanḓa awe lini na lini. Maṱo awe a dzula o sedza dzitshakha; mavhanga a songo tsha ḓihudza. 
Psalms66:8 Inwi dzitshakha, rendani Mudzimu washu, mu imbeleni thendo!" 
Psalms66:9 Ndi Ene a ri tshidzaho, ha litshi milenzhe yashu i tshi redzemuwa." 
Psalms66:10 Mudzimu, wo ri linga nga mulilo, wa ri kulutedza unga siliva." 
Psalms66:11 Wo ri dzhenisa mambuleni, wa ri hwesa mihwalo i lemelaho," 
Psalms66:12 wo litsha vhathu vha tshi ri tumba nṱha ha ṱhoho; ro fhira nga muliloni na maḓini, ra kona u ḓiphiṋa nga zwinzhi." 
Psalms66:13 Ndi ḓo ḓisa nduvho dzi fhiswaho nḓuni yau, nda khunyeledza zwe nda u anela," 
Psalms66:14 zwe nda amba nga mulomo wanga musi ndi khomboni. 
Psalms66:15 Ndi ḓo u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwo nonaho, na thutha dzi nukhelelaho dzi tshi fhiswa, ndi ḓo ṋekedza dzimboho na mbokoṱo." 
Psalms66:16 Iḓani ni pfe, noṱhe ni ofhaho Mudzimu, ndi ḓo ni vhudza zwe a nnyitela:" 
Psalms66:17 ndo mu ṱavhela mukosi, a mbo ḓi nndamulela, lulimi lwanga lwa mu renda." 
Psalms66:18 Ngavhe mbiluni yanga hu na vhuvhi, ndi musi Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a songo nthetshelesa." 
Psalms66:19 Hone ngoho Mudzimu o nthetshelesa a pfa thabelo yanga. 
Psalms66:20 Nga hu rendwe Mudzimu, ho ngo landula thabelo yanga, lufuno lwawe a lwo ngo vhuya lwa dzinginyea." 
Psalms67:1 Ngavhe Mudzimu a tshi ri itela vhuthu a ri shudufhadza, a ri vhonetshela nga tshifhaṱuwo tshawe," 
Psalms67:2 uri ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽi vhone zwine a ita, tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓivhe maanḓa awe a u tshidza." 
Psalms67:3 Mudzimu, vhathu kha vha u rende, tshakha dzoṱhe nga dzi u tende!" 
Psalms67:4 Tshakha nga dzi takale dzi u fhululedze; u haṱula vhathu u sa ṱaluli, wa endedza dzitshakha fhano fhasi." 
Psalms67:5 Mudzimu, vhathu kha vha u tende, tshakha dzoṱhe nga dzi u tende!" 
Psalms67:6 Shango ḽo bveledza khaṋo, Mudzimu, Ene Mudzimu ashu, o ḓi ri shudufhadza." 
Psalms67:7 Mudzimu o ri shudufhadza, ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga he ḽa guma nga ḽi mu ofhe." 
Psalms68:1 Mudzimu u khou vuwa u balanganya maswina, vha mu vhengaho vha shavha vha tshi fhufhura nḓevhe." 
Psalms68:2 U vha balanganya unga vhutsi; Mudzimu a tou bvelele, vhavhi vha a lovha unga phula i tshi ṋoka muliloni." 
Psalms68:3 Vha no fulufhedzea vhone vha a pembela Mudzimu a tshi swika, vha ṱavha mukosi nga dakalo." 
Psalms68:4 Imbelani Mudzimu, rendani dzina ḽawe nga nyimbo, Munamelamakole, mu lugiseleni nḓila! U pfi Muṋe washu, mu fhululedzeni!" 
Psalms68:5 Mudzimu a no dzula fhethu hawe hukhethwa, ndi Khotsi a tsiwana, Mulwelatshilikadzi." 
Psalms68:6 Vha si na vhudzulo Mudzimu u vha fhaṱela mahaya, zwivhotshwa a zwi vhofholola, hone mavhanga a ḓo dzula makwarani." 
Psalms68:7 Mudzimu, zwiḽa u tshi endedza vhathu vhau, u tshi buḓekanya phanga," 
Psalms68:8 ḽifhasi ḽo dzinginyea, ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa shulula mvula, hu tshi swika Mudzimu wa Sinai, hu tshi ḓa Ene Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Psalms68:9 Mudzimu, wo nisa mvula nnzhi, shango ḽau ḽo bvaho ḽa dovha ḽa vuwa," 
Psalms68:10 vhathu vhau vha dzula khaḽo, Iwe Mudzimu wa tonda vhaheḓana nga vhuthu hau." 
Psalms68:11 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o ṋea ndaela, vhasadzi vhanzhi vha mbo ḓi anḓadza ayo mafhungo, vha ri," 
Psalms68:12 “Mahosi a maswina ashu a khou shavha, mmbi dzavho dzo hasekana!” Vhasadzi hayani vha kovhekana zwo thubwaho:" 
Psalms68:13 Zwifanyiso zwa maivha zwo fhomiwaho nga siliva, phapha dzao dzi penya musuku u songo vangiwaho. (Ndi mini vhaṅwe vha tshee vho dzula zwitumbani zwa dzinngu?)" 
Psalms68:14 Zwiḽa Ramaanḓaoṱhe a tshi balanganya mahosi Thavhani ya Tsalimoni, o nisa mahaḓa." 
Psalms68:15 Thavha dza Bashani dzo hula hani, dzi na miṱumba minzhi!" 
Psalms68:16 Ni itelani vivho, inwi dzithavha dza miṱumba minzhi? Ni vhivhelani thavha ye Mudzimu a ḓikhethela uri a dzule khayo? Muṋe washu u ḓo ḓi dzula khayo lini na lini!" 
Psalms68:17 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u bva Sinai a tshi ḓa fhethu hawe hukhethwa, e na gariki dzawe dza nndwa dza maanḓa, dza zwigidi na zwigidi." 
Psalms68:18 O thuba mathubwa manzhi, a gonya nao nṱha, a ṋewa nduvho nga vhathu, na mavhanga a mu luvha; Mudzimu Muṋe washu u ḓo dzula henengei." 
Psalms68:19 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe ḓuvha na ḓuvha; u a ri hwala, ndi Ene Mudzimu Mutshidzi washu." 
Psalms68:20 Mudzimu washu ndi Mudzimu Mutshidzavhathu; ndi Muṋe washu, ndi Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, u ri lamukisa lufuni." 
Psalms68:21 Ngoho Mudzimu u ḓo devhekanya ṱhoho dza maswina awe; vhane vha ṱana milandu yavho u ḓo pwasha dethele ḽavho ḽo lukwaho mavhudzi. 
Psalms68:22 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o amba a ri, “Ndi ḓo vhuisa vhathu vhanga vha tshi bva Bashani, naho vho mbwandamela vhudzivhani ha lwanzhe, ndi ḓo vha ṋula," 
Psalms68:23 uri vha ṱambe milenzhe nga malofha a maswina, mmbwa dzavho dzi a ṋanzwe dzi fure.”" 
Psalms68:24 Mudzimu, wo vhonwa nga vhoṱhe u tshi ḓala muḓalo wó kunda, vha vhona u tshi dzhena fhethu hau hukhethwa, Iwe Mudzimu wanga, Khosi yanga," 
Psalms68:25 wó tangwa nga vhaimbi na vhalidzi vha zwilidzo, vhasidzana vha tshi khou lidza tshele." 
Psalms68:26 Vhumbani dzikhwairi ni imbele Mudzimu, rendani Muṋe washu, inwi vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo!" 
Psalms68:27 Ngoyu Benyamini, ene muṱuku, o vha ranga phanḓa, ha tevhela vhahulwane vha Juda na tshigwada tshavho, na vhahulwane vha Zebuloni, na vha Nafuthali." 
Psalms68:28 Mudzimu, sumbedza maanḓa au, maanḓa e wa ri tshidza ngao," 
Psalms68:29 a tshi bva thembeleni Jerusalema, hune mahosi vha u ḓisela nduvho." 
Psalms68:30 Kaidza Egipita, heḽiḽa buka ḽi dzulaho ṱhangani; kaidza dzitshakha, heḽo sambi ḽa dzimboho na ṋamana dzadzo, vha vhuya vha u khotha vha ṋekedza siliva. Balanganya havho vhathu vha no funa nndwa!" 
Psalms68:31 Hu ḓo ḓa vhaḓinḓa vha tshi bva Egipita, vha luvha Mudzimu nga zwifulwa zwa musinaseṱha; Vhakushu vha ḓo rabela Mudzimu vhó imisa zwanḓa." 
Psalms68:32 Inwi mivhuso ya shango, imbelani Mudzimu, rendani Muṋe wa zwoṱhe nga nyimbo," 
Psalms68:33 Ene Munamelalutombo, lutombo lwa kale-kale! Thetshelesani a tshi bvumisa he ngindii-ngindii." 
Psalms68:34 Ḓivhadzani maanḓa a Mudzimu, u vhusa Israele nga vhugala, maanḓa awe a fhira lutombo." 
Psalms68:35 Mudzimu u ofhisa hani a tshi bva fhethu hawe hukhethwa! Ndi Ene Mudzimu wa Israele; u ṋea vhathu vhawe nungo na maanḓa. Mudzimu nga a rendiwe! 
Psalms69:1 Mudzimu, ntshidze, maḓi o guma nga mukulo wanga!" 
Psalms69:2 Ndo mbwandamela dopeni, a hu na vhukando. Ndo wela dzivhani ḽihulu, lutsinga lu ṱoḓou nkumba." 
Psalms69:3 Ndo neta nga u ṱavha mukosi, mikulo yanga i ita na u rema; maṱo anga o ita na u punda ndó lindela Mudzimu wanga a tshi nndamulela." 
Psalms69:4 Vhane vha sokou mmbenga ndi si na tshe nda tshinya, vho anda u fhira mavhudzi anga. Maswina anga a sokou nnzwifhelela; vha na nungo, vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha. Vha ri ndi vhuedzedze zwe nda si tswe." 
Psalms69:5 Mudzimu, Iwe u ḓivha vhuhwarahwara hanga, milandu yanga a i koni u u dzumbama." 
Psalms69:6 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Muṋe washu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, ngavhe vha u fulufhelaho vha sa shoni vha tshi mmbona; Mudzimu wa Israele, vha u luvhaho ngavhe vha sa shoni nga u vhona zwine nda itwa." 
Psalms69:7 Ndi nyadzelwa Iwe, hezwi ndo ambara ṱhoni." 
Psalms69:8 Vha hashu vha vho nnyita mutsinda, ndi nga asili muṱani wa hashu." 
Psalms69:9 Ndo no tou fhelela nga mbilu i tshi swela nnḓu yau, maṱamba ane a poswa kha Iwe a wela kha nṋe." 
Psalms69:10 Ndi ḓiṱukufhadza nga u ḓidzima, ndi zwine vhathu vha nnyadza." 
Psalms69:11 Ndi tshi ḓivhuedza nga u ambara saga, ndi tou itwa ṱano." 
Psalms69:12 Mikotoni hu pfala dzina ḽanga fhedzi, zwidakwa zwi ita na u nnyimba." 
Psalms69:13 Hone a vha nṋe ndi ḓo rabela Iwe Muṋe washu nga tshifhinga tshine wa funa; Mudzimu, u na lufuno luhulu, ipfa thabelo yanga; Iwe u a fulufhedzea, u ḓo ntshidza." 
Psalms69:14 Mphalale, ndi si mbwandamele dopeni, mponyokise kha maswina anga, u nṋule dzivhani!" 
Psalms69:15 U songo litsha ndi tshi kumbwa nga lutsinga lwa maḓi, nda milwa nga lwanzhe, nda govhedzwa nga dindi." 
Psalms69:16 Muṋe washu, mphindule; lufuno lwau lu takadza hani! Khathutshelo yau ndi khulu, u songo tsha mpfuralela." 
Psalms69:17 U songo dzumbama mulanda wau; ndi khomboni khulu, ṱavhanya u mphindula!" 
Psalms69:18 Iḓa u mmbofholole, nndamulele u fhumudze maswina anga!" 
Psalms69:19 Iwe u ḓivha uri ndi nyadziwa hani; ndí fhano ndo bva mvumbo, ndo shona, tendá maswina anga oṱhe á songo u dzumbama." 
Psalms69:20 Maṱamba o pwashekanya mbilu yanga, ndo kulea nungo; ndo lavhelela u pfelwa vhuṱungu, zwe ndi bva vhubvo; nda ri ndi ḓo fhumudzwa, zwe vhutoto." 
Psalms69:21 Ndi tshi pfa nḓala vho mpha vhutulu; ndó farwa nga ḓora vha mpha viniga. 
Psalms69:22 Vha tshi ḽa nduvho dzine vha u ṋekedza, nga dzi vhe khunḓa vha wele ngomu; ngavhe madzanga avho a tshi vha tshikwekwe tsha vha fasha!" 
Psalms69:23 Nga vha pofule! Miṱoḓo yavho i kulee! 
Psalms69:24 Shululela mbiti dzau nṱha havho! Vha sinyutshele u vha lozwe! 
Psalms69:25 Miḓi yavho nga i sale e matumba, nḓuni dzavho hu si tsha sala muthu!" 
Psalms69:26 Vha khokhovhedza o no ḓi rwiwaho; vha tshi vhona mbonzhe dza we wa mu phula, vha a mu holedza." 
Psalms69:27 Vhuvhi havho nga vhu lifhedzwe nga vhuvhi! Vha songo vhuya vha ṱamba tsengoni! 
Psalms69:28 Madzina avho nga a thuthwe buguni ya vha tshilaho! Kha vha bviswe kha mutevhe wa vhathu vhau vha fulufhedzeaho! 
Psalms69:29 A vha nṋe, ndo kulea nungo, ndi pfa vhuṱungu; Mudzimu, ntakuse u ntsireledze!" 
Psalms69:30 Ndi ḓo renda Mudzimu nga luimbo, nda livhuha, nda ḓivhadza vhuhulu hawe." 
Psalms69:31 Hezwo zwi ḓo takadza Muṋe washu u fhira zwiṱhavhelo zwa dzikholomo, u fhira u mu ṋekedza mboho yo vhinaho." 
Psalms69:32 Vhakandeledzwa vha ḓo ri u zwi vhona vha takala, vha no luvha Mudzimu vha ḓo ṱuṱuwedzea." 
Psalms69:33 Muṋe washu u thetshelesa vha lilaho, vhathu vhawe vho vhoxwaho ha vha hangwi." 
Psalms69:34 Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, rendani Mudzimu na lwanzhe, na zwoṱhe zwi re khalwo!" 
Psalms69:35 Mudzimu u ḓo tshidza Tsioni, a vusa miḓi ya Juda; vhathu vhawe vha ḓo dzula hone, shango ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Psalms69:36 Ḽi ḓo vha ifa ḽa vhaḓuhulu vha vhalanda vhawe; vhane vha mu funa vha ḓo dzula henefho. 
Psalms70:1 Mudzimu, nndamulele! Muṋe washu, ṱavhanya u mphalala!" 
Psalms70:2 Vhane vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha nga vha shone vha nyadziswe. Vhane vha tama ndi tshi welwa nga khombo vha hume vho shona. 
Psalms70:3 Vhane vha tshi mmbona vha ri, “Koṱo, koṱo!” vha hume vho shona." 
Psalms70:4 Ngavhe vhane vha u ṱoḓa vha tshi takala vha pembela. Vhane vha takalela u tshidzwa nga Iwe vha dzule vha tshi ri, “Mudzimu ndi muhulu!”" 
Psalms70:5 A vha nṋe ndi muheḓana, a thi na nungo. Mudzimu, ṱavhanya u ḓa ha nṋe! Iwe Muṋe washu, u Mutiki wanga, u Mutshidzi wanga, u songo vhuya wa lenga!" 
Psalms71:1 Muṋe washu, ndi khuda nga Iwe, u songo vhuya wa litsha ndi tshi shoniswa." 
Psalms71:2 Hufha u tshi fulufhedzea, mphalale u nndamukise! Nthetshelese u ntshidze!" 
Psalms71:3 Ivha vhukhudo vhune nda dzula ngomu, he wa ri ndi ḓi dzula ndi tshi shavhela hone, ndi tshidzwe; u vhushavhelo hanga, u bako ḽanga." 
Psalms71:4 Mudzimu wanga, nndamukise kha vhavhi, mavemu a tshiṱuhu a si nkunde." 
Psalms71:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndo fulufhela Iwe, fulufhelo ḽanga ndi Iwe u bva hanani hanga." 
Psalms71:6 Ndo ḓitika nga Iwe tshee nda bebwa, na musi ndi sa athu vhona tshedza, maanḓa anga o vha e Iwe; ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi u renda." 
Psalms71:7 Vhanzhi vho vhona maanḓa au kha nṋe, nge wa vha vhukhudo hanga vhu sa tseki." 
Psalms71:8 Ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi ṱwa ndi tshi u renda, ndi tshi ḓivhadza vhugala hau." 
Psalms71:9 Ndi songo ri ndo no kalaha wa nṅaledza, u songo nṱutshela zwino ndi si tshee na nungo." 
Psalms71:10 Maswina anga o nndangana, vha ṱoḓa u mmbulaha." 
Psalms71:11 Vha ri, “Mudzimu o mu ṱutshela; kha ri mu sale murahu ri mu fare, ha na mulamukisi.”" 
Psalms71:12 Mudzimu, u songo vha kule na nṋe; Mudzimu wanga, ṱavhanya u mphalale!" 
Psalms71:13 Ngavhe vhane vha nndevhela vha tshi kundwa vha lovha. Vhane vha ṱoḓa u nkhuvhadza ngavhe vha tshi kundwa vha tou niwa nga ṱhoni! 
Psalms71:14 Ndi ḓo dzula ndo u fulufhela, nda u renda nda dovha." 
Psalms71:15 Ndi ḓo bula u fulufhedzea hau. Wo ntshidza lu si na mbalo; ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi zwi zuwa ḓuvha ḽoṱhe. 
Psalms71:16 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo renda maanḓa au. Ndi ḓo ḓivhadza u fulufhedzea hau; a no fulufhedzea ndi Iwe u woṱhe." 
Psalms71:17 Wo ḓi mpfunza u bva hanani hanga; na zwino ndi kha ḓi bula zwimangadzo zwau. 
Psalms71:18 Mudzimu, u songo nṱutshela nga u vhona zwino ndo kalaha, ṱhoho yo tshena! Maanḓa au a u tshidza vhathu ndi kha ḓi tama u a ḓivhadza mirafho i ḓaho." 
Psalms71:19 Mudzimu, u fulufhedzea hau hu ṋanzwa makole; wo ita zwihulu, Mudzimu, ndi nnyi ane a nga Iwe." 
Psalms71:20 Wo nkhwesa khombo nnzhi na dambulo, hone u ḓo dovha wa vusa nungo dzanga, wa nṋula fhasi-fhasi dindini." 
Psalms71:21 U ḓo nkhudza nda vha muhuluhulu, nda dovha nda rudza mbilu." 
Psalms71:22 Ngoho ndi ḓo u renda nga haripa; Mudzimu wanga, ndi ḓo renda u fulufhedzea hau. Ndi ḓo u imbela nga tshihwana, Iwe Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Psalms71:23 Ndi ḓo ṱavha mukosi nga dakalo nda u imbela; wo mmbofholola. 
Psalms71:24 Ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi bula u fulufhedzea hau, nge vhe vha linga u nkhuvhadza vha kundwa vha tou niwa nga ṱhoni." 
Psalms72:1 Mudzimu, funza khosi vhuṱali, a haṱule nga hune wa funa; o bebelwaho vhuhosi mu ṋee maanḓa a khaṱhulo mbuya," 
Psalms72:2 a kone u haṱula vhathu vhau a sa ṱaluli, vhaheḓana vhau a vha vhuse nga u fulufhedzea." 
Psalms72:3 Thavha kha dzi aṋwe lupfumo, mivhundu i bveledze u fulufhedzea." 
Psalms72:4 Ngavhe a tshi haṱula vhaheḓana a sa ṱaluli, a lamulela vha lilaho, a kandekanya vhakandeledzi vhavho." 
Psalms72:5 Nga' lalame unga ḓuvha na ṅwedzi, a vhone mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms72:6 A tonde vhathu unga mvula i tshi na pfuloni, a nge vhusuṱo vhu no shasha mavu." 
Psalms72:7 Ngavhe u fulufhedzea hu tshi anda muvhusoni wawe, ha ḓala mulalo ṅwedzi wa vhuya wa lovha." 
Psalms72:8 Muvhuso wawe u ḓo ḓadza shango u bva kha lwanzhe u guma nga lwanzhe, u bva Yufuratha u swika mugumoni wa ḽifhasi." 
Psalms72:9 Tshakha dza phangani dzi ḓo mu khotha, maswina a ḓo tou shuvhama a ṋanzwiswa buse." 
Psalms72:10 Mahosi a Spania na a kule-kule a ḓo ḓisa zwifhiwa, a Sheba na Seba a ḓo ḓisa nduvho." 
Psalms72:11 Mahosi oṱhe a ḓo mu khotha, tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo vha vhalanda vhawe." 
Psalms72:12 Ú lamulela vhaheḓana vhane vha mu vhidzelela, na vhashai vha si na muphalali." 
Psalms72:13 Vha si na nungo, na vhaheḓana, u vha pfela vhuṱungu; u ḓo tshidza vha lilaho." 
Psalms72:14 Vha tshi kandeledzwa, vha tshi huvhadzwa, u a vha lamulela; u vhona vhutshilo havho vhu ha mutengo muhulu." 
Psalms72:15 Thovhele nga a lalame! Ngavhe vha tshi mu luvha nga musuku wa Sheba, a dzula a tshi rabelelwa, a humbelelwa mashudu nga misi." 
Psalms72:16 Ngavhe shango ḽi tshi vha na ndalo, thavha dza tou phapha mavhele u swika miṱumbani yadzo, a tou vhofhana unga ḓaka ḽa Libanoni, miḓi ya ḓala vhathu unga hatsi." 
Psalms72:17 Ngavhe dzina ḽa khosi ḽi sa hangwiwi, bvumo ḽawe ḽa nga ḓuvha ḽi sa kovheli; vhathu vha tshi shudufhadzana vha ri, “Mudzimu a u shudufhadze unga a tshi shudufhadza khosi yashu!” tshakha dzoṱhe dza khoḓa mashudu awe." 
Psalms72:18 Nga hu rendwe Mudzimu Muṋe washu, Ene Mudzimu wa Israele! Ndi Ene e eṱhe ane a ita zwimangadzo." 
Psalms72:19 Nga hu rendwe dzina ḽawe ḽa vhugala lini na lini! Ngavhe vhugala hawe vhu tshi ḓadza shango ḽoṱhe! AMEN! AMEN! 
Psalms72:20 Thabelo dza Dafita ṅwana wa Isai dzi fhela henefha. 
Psalms73:1 Ngoho Mudzimu u tonda Israele, u thakha vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho." 
Psalms73:2 Hone nṋe ndo ṱoḓou khukhulwa, kaṱukuṱuku ndo redzemuwa." 
Psalms73:3 Ndo vha ndi tshi vhivha vhadzialuswetho, ndi tshi vhona vhavhi zwi tshi vha anḓa." 
Psalms73:4 Vha vhuya vha fa vhá songo pfa vhuṱungu; vho khwaṱha, vho takala," 
Psalms73:5 a vha tambuli unga vhaṅwe, khombo dzi no wela vhaṅwe, a dzi vha weli." 
Psalms73:6 Ndi zwine vha ambara luswetho unga vhulungu, u levha vha hu fuka unga nguvho." 
Psalms73:7 Ludzula lwavho lu beba vhunwa, mbilu dzavho dzi shulula vhukwila." 
Psalms73:8 Vha goḓa vhaṅwe vha amba mavhi, vha shushedza vhathu nga u vha levhela." 
Psalms73:9 Na Mudzimu a vha mu teledzi, vha tshi amba a hu na ane vha mu ofha." 
Psalms73:10 Ndi zwine na vhathu vha Mudzimu vha vho vha tevhela, vha kapula zwiambo zwavho zwoṱhe." 
Psalms73:11 Vha ri, “Mudzimu a nga si zwi ḓivhe; Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a nga vhuya a zwi vhona naa?”" 
Psalms73:12 Vhavhi vho tou ralo: ndi vhapfumi, vha ḓi pfuma vha tshi ya." 
Psalms73:13 Kani-ha nṋe ndi tshi nengwa vhuaḓa, ndi tshi ila vhutshinyi, ho vha hu u sokou ḓinetisa?" 
Psalms73:14 Hufha wo ntambudza ḓuvha ḽoṱhe, ḽa tsha wa nthwa." 
Psalms73:15 Arali ndo vha ndo amba zwo raloho, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo vha ndi tshi khou landula vhathu vha Mudzimu." 
Psalms73:16 Nda edzisa u ṱalukanya maitele a Mudzimu, zwe vhutoto," 
Psalms73:17 nda vhuya nda ya thembeleni. Ha vha hone ndi tshi ṱalukanya vhuyo ha vhavhi: 
Psalms73:18 Iwe u ḓo vha vhea hu redzaho, vha redzemuwa nga vhukwila havho, khunḓa ya fasha muvei." 
Psalms73:19 Iṱo ḽi tshi ri poi, vha vha vho no lovha, vha fhedza nga u godimela hu ofhisaho." 
Psalms73:20 Vha nga muloro une ḽi tshi tsha wa fhufha; Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u tshi vuwa vha a nyamalala. 
Psalms73:21 Zwiḽa ndi tshi khou ḽa mbilu ndó dinalea," 
Psalms73:22 ndo vha ndi tshi nga tshifuwo tshi sa ḓivhi tshithu, ndi tshi nga phukha maṱoni au." 
Psalms73:23 Naho zwo ralo a thi u litshi; u mpfara nga tshauḽa tshanga; 
Psalms73:24 u nnyendedza nga nyeletshedzo yau; magumoni u ḓo nṱanganedza vhugalani hau. 
Psalms73:25 Wa hanga ngei ṱaḓulu ndi nnyi arali e si Iwe? Na fhano shangoni ndi kha ḓi tamani ndí na Iwe? 
Psalms73:26 Naho ṋama na mbilu zwa fhelelwa nga nungo, hone Mudzimu ndi Ene maanḓa a mbilu yanga, ndi Ene mukovhe wanga wa lini na lini." 
Psalms73:27 Vha u ṱutshelaho vha ḓo lovha; u lozwa vhoṱhe vha u shandukelaho. 
Psalms73:28 A vha nṋe, ndi takadzwa nga u vha tsini ha Mudzimu; Muṋe washu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndo mu ita vhukhudo hanga; ndi ḓo ḓivhadza zwoṱhe zwine a ita." 
Psalms74:1 Mudzimu, wo ri laṱelani? U ḓo sinyutshela riṋe sambi ḽau tshoṱhe naa?" 
Psalms74:2 Elelwa vhathu vhau vhe wa ḓinangela kale-kale, hufha wo vha vhofholola vhupulini uri vha vhe lushaka lwau; elelwa thavha ya Tsioni he wa dzula hone." 
Psalms74:3 Edzou tshimbila vhukati ha matumba haya a kale, u vhone uri maswina o thuthekanya hani nnḓu yau khethwa." 
Psalms74:4 Henefho he ra vha ri tshi ṱangana na Iwe maswina vha vho ṱavha mukosi wa gundo, vha ṱoma fulaga dzavho." 
Psalms74:5 Vho pwashekanya zwivhaḓwa zwoṱhe, vha zwi remekanya nga mbaḓo na tsanga, vha tshi nga vha khou haḓa zwiṱaka," 
Psalms74:6  
Psalms74:7 vha fhisa thembele yau ya tou lore, hune wa luvhiwa vho hu kumadza." 
Psalms74:8 Mbiluni dzavho vha ri, “Ri ḓo vha lozwa tshoṱhe!” vha fhisekanya hoṱhe he Mudzimu a vha a tshi luvhiwa." 
Psalms74:9 A ri tsha vhona na tshiga tsha maḓembe; a hu tshee na a no ri ḓivhadza zwine wa funa; a hu na a ḓivhaho uri zwi ḓo fhela lini. 
Psalms74:10 Mudzimu, maswina a ḓo u nyefula u swika lini? Vha ḓo ḓi dzula vha tshi u kolela naa?" 
Psalms74:11 Khefha u tshi sokou ṱanzwa maṱo wa lavhelesa? U ḓo ri phalala lini wa vha lozwa? 
Psalms74:12 Hufha Iwe Mudwimu wo ḓi vha Khosi yanga tsha kale na kale. A si Iwe we wa ri tshidza nga maanḓa au fhano shangoni naa? 
Psalms74:13 Wo ritha lwanzhe nga maanḓa au, wa devhekanya ṱhoho dza maṋowa a lwanzhe." 
Psalms74:14 Ndi Iwe we wa pwashekanya ṱhoho dza Liviathani, wa ḽi ṋea phukha dza phangani dza ḽa." 
Psalms74:15 Ndi Iwe Muphuli wa zwisima; wo elisa milambo, wa xisa milambo i sa xi." 
Psalms74:16 Vhusiku na masiari ndi zwau; wo tea ḓuvha na ṅwedzi. 
Psalms74:17 Ndi Iwe wo vheaho mikano ya shango, wa ri hu vhe na tshilimo na vhuriha." 
Psalms74:18 Muṋe washu, u songo hangwa uri maswina a a u nyefula; ndi matsilu, a a u nyadza." 
Psalms74:19 Ḽiivha ḽau u songo ḽi kovhela zwivhanda; vhathu vhau vha khou tambula, u songo vha hangwa tshoṱhe." 
Psalms74:20 Elelwa mulanga wau; hoṱhe-hoṱhe vhathu vha sokou levhelana. 
Psalms74:21 U songo litsha vhakandeledzwa vha tshi shoniswa, vhaheḓana na vhashai nga vha u rende." 
Psalms74:22 Mudzimu, vuwa u ḓilwele, u songo hangwa uri matsilu a ṱwa a tshi u nyefula;" 
Psalms74:23 mukosi wa maswina au u songo u hangwa, mukosi wa maswina u sa tumuwi!" 
Psalms75:1 Ri a u livhuha, Mudzimu, ri a u livhuha! U ima na riṋe! Nga hu ḓivhadzwe zwimangadzo zwe wa ita!" 
Psalms75:2 Mudzimu u ri, “Ndo nanga tshifhinga tsho teaho; ndi Nṋe ane nda haṱula ndi sa ṱaluli." 
Psalms75:3 Musi ḽifhasi ḽi tshi dzinginyea na vhathu vhaḽo, ndi Nṋe ane nda tika dziphuphu dza khwaṱha." 
Psalms75:4 Ndi vhudza vhadzialuswetho nda ri, ‘Ni songo tsha zuwa.’ Vhavhi nda vha vhudza nda ri, ‘Ni songo takusa ṋanga dzaṋu!" 
Psalms75:5 Ni songo imisa ṋanga dzaṋu na lwa na ḽiṱaḓulu; ni songo amba no ṱoṱomodza mutsinga.’ ” 
Psalms75:6 A no hulisa muthu ha bvi vhubvaḓuvha, ha bvi vhukovhela, ha bvi phangani;" 
Psalms75:7 a no haṱula ndi Mudzimu: u ṱukufhadza muṅwe, muṅwe a mu hulisa." 
Psalms75:8 Muṋe washu o fara tshinwelo nga tshanḓa; tsho ḓala waini i fhufhumaho mbiti dzawe; u a vha shululela, vhavhi vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi vha i nwa, vha nwa na tshidziki tshayo." 
Psalms75:9 A vha nṋe ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi zwi ḓivhadza; ndi ḓo renda Mudzimu wa Jakopo nga nyimbo. 
Psalms75:10 Vhavhi vhoṱhe u ḓo vha kula ṋanga, vhafulufhedzea vhone u ḓo imisa ṋanga dzavho." 
Psalms76:1 Mudzimu u a ḓihwa kha ḽa Juda, dzina ḽawe ndi ḽihulu kha ḽa Israele." 
Psalms76:2 Nnḓu yawe i Salema, u dzula Tsioni." 
Psalms76:3 Ndi he a vunḓekanya misevhe i dugaho, a konyokanya zwiṱangu na mapanga, zwone zwihali zwa nndwani." 
Psalms76:4 Iwe Mudzimu u na vhugala, u na lupenyo; maanḓa au a fhira thavha dzi sa sudzuluwi." 
Psalms76:5 Vhahali vho ṱangulwa vho lala, a hu na na ḽiswole ḽi no kona u imisa tshanḓa." 
Psalms76:6 Iwe Mudzimu wa Jakopo wó tou kaidza, bere na gariki dza nndwa zwi sokou te." 
Psalms76:7 A no ofhisa ndi Iwe u woṱhe; wó sinyuwa, ndi nnyi ane a nga ima phanḓa hau?" 
Psalms76:8 Wo haṱula u makoleni, shango ḽa ofha ḽa tou tshete," 
Psalms76:9 hu tshi takuwa ha haṱula Iwe Mudzimu, uri u tshidze vhoṱhe vho kandeledzwaho." 
Psalms76:10 Vhathu vha tshi halifha ndi hone thendo yau i tshi ṋaṋa; vho ponyokaho mbiti dzau u tou vha kungela sa ludede. 
Psalms76:11 Khunyeledzani zwe na anela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu! Mashango a matungo oṱhe nga a ḓise nduvho, a ṋee Ene a no ofhisa." 
Psalms76:12 U ṱukufhadza vhavhusi vha u ḓiḓivha, u ofhiwa nga mahosi a ḽifhasi." 
Psalms77:1 Ndi ṱavhela Mudzimu mukosi! Ndi ṱavhela Mudzimu mukosi a mpfa. 
Psalms77:2 Musi wa khombo ndi ṱoḓa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe; vhusiku hoṱhe ndi rabela ndó imisa zwanḓa, thabelo i sa tumuwi, hone nda si wane mufhumudzi." 
Psalms77:3 Nda ri u elekanya Mudzimu nda gomela, nda humbula nda pfa ndo kulea nungo." 
Psalms77:4 Wo ita uri ndi lale ndó donola maṱo, nda ḽa mbilu nda kundwa u amba;" 
Psalms77:5 nda humbula maḓuvha aḽa a kale, miṅwaha yo fhiraho." 
Psalms77:6 Vhusiku nda elelwa luimbo lwanga, nda elekanya nda ḓivhudzisa nda ri," 
Psalms77:7 “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o ri laṱa tshoṱhe naa? Nṋa a nga si tsha dovha a ri takalela? 
Psalms77:8 Lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei lwo nyamalala tshoṱhe naa? Nṋa zwe a ri fulufhedzisa a zwi tsheeho? 
Psalms77:9 Kani Mudzimu o hangwa u khathutshela? Tshilidzi tshawe tsho kundwa nga mbiti kani?” 
Psalms77:10 Nda elekanya nda ri, “Tshi no mmbaisesa ndi uri Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu ha tsha sumbedza maanḓa awe.”" 
Psalms77:11 Litshani ndi elekanye mishumo ya Muṋe washu. Ee, ndi ḓo elekanya maḓembe au a kale." 
Psalms77:12 Ndi ḓo elekanya mishumo yau yoṱhe, nda humbula mishumo yau ya maanḓa." 
Psalms77:13 Mudzimu, zwine wa ita ndi zwikhethwa; ndi ufhio mudzimu a no eḓana na Mudzimu washu?" 
Psalms77:14 Iwe u Mudzimu a no ita maḓembe; u ṱanela dzitshakha maanḓa au. 
Psalms77:15 Wo tshidza vhathu vhau nga maanḓa au, vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo na Josefa." 
Psalms77:16 Mudzimu, maḓi o ri u u vhona, o ri u vhona uri ndi Iwe, a ofha, a tetemela, a dzinginyea u swika vhudzivhani hao," 
Psalms77:17 makole a shulula maḓi, mubvumo wa pfala lutomboni, misevhe yau ye vhenge phanḓa na murahu," 
Psalms77:18 milinga ya gariki yau ya nndwa ya bvuma ye ngindii, ngindii, phenyo dzau dza vhonetshela shango, ḽifhasi ḽa tetemela ḽa dzinginyea," 
Psalms77:19 Iwe wa fhira vhukati ha lwanzhe, wa vula nḓila vhukati ha maḓi a maanḓa, nangwe vhuṱala hau vhu songo vhonala." 
Psalms77:20 Wo endedza vhathu vhau unga sambi ḽa nngu, vhó rangwa phanḓa nga Mushe na Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 Vhathu vhanga, ipfani pfunzo yanga! Thetshelesani maipfi ane nda amba." 
Psalms78:2 Ndi ḓo amba nga zwifanyiso, nda bula zwe zwa vha zwo dzumbama u bva kale," 
Psalms78:3 zwithu zwe ra zwi pfa ra zwi ḓivha, zwe ra vhudzwa nga vhokhotsi ashu." 
Psalms78:4 A ri nga zwi dzumbeli vhana vhavho, ri ḓo zwi vhudza murafho u ḓaho, mishumo ya maanḓa ya Muṋe washu i rendeaho, na zwimangadzo zwe a ita." 
Psalms78:5 O vhetshela Jakopo ndaela, a tetshela Israele mulayo we a vhudza vhomakhulukuku washu uri vha vhudze vhana vhavho," 
Psalms78:6 uri mirafho i ḓaho i u ḓivhe, na vhana vha sa athu bebwa, na vhone vha vhudze vhana vhavho." 
Psalms78:7 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo fulufhela Mudzimu, vha si hangwe mishumo yawe, vha vhulunge milayo yawe." 
Psalms78:8 Ndi hone vha sa nga ngi vhomakhulukuku wavho, mavhanga a tshipimbi, vha mbilu dza mashandukwa vhane Mudzimu a vhona vha sa fulufhedzei." 
Psalms78:9 Vhana vha Efraimi naho vho vha vho fara vhura, musi wa nndwa vho shavha." 
Psalms78:10 A vho ngo tevhedza mulanga wa Mudzimu, vho landula zwe a vha laya." 
Psalms78:11 Vho hangwa zwe a ita, zwimangadzo zwe a vha sumbedza." 
Psalms78:12 O ita maḓembe vhokhotsi avho vha tshi zwi vhona, shangoni ḽa Egipita, mudavhini wa Tsuani." 
Psalms78:13 O fhandekanya lwanzhe a vha pfukisa, a imisa maḓi a khwaṱha unga luvhondo." 
Psalms78:14 Masiari a vha endedza nga gole, vhusiku a vha vhonetshela nga mulilo." 
Psalms78:15 O fhandula matombo phangani, a vha fha maḓi a si na vhukono, vha nga vha khou nwa lwanzhe;" 
Psalms78:16 a bveledza milambwana kha tombo, maḓi a ela unga mulambo." 
Psalms78:17 Hone vhone vha ḓi mu khakhela, vha shandukela Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu phangani," 
Psalms78:18 vha linga Mudzimu nga khole, vha ri a vha ṋee zwiḽiwa zwine vha funa;" 
Psalms78:19 vha ṱunga Mudzimu vha ri, “Mudzimu a nga kona u ri ṋea zwiḽiwa phangani?" 
Psalms78:20 Ndi ngoho, o ri u rwa tombo maḓi a gubunyea, milambwana ya ela. Hone na zwiḽiwa a nga kona u ri ṋea naa? Avha vhathu a nga kona u vha ṋea ṋama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Muṋe washu a tshi pfa vha tshi ralo a sinyuwa; a fhisa Jakopo nga mulilo, a sinyutshela Israele," 
Psalms78:22 nge vha si fulufhele Mudzimu, vha si tende uri u na maanḓa a u vha tshidza." 
Psalms78:23 Naho zwo ralo Ene o amba na lutombo, a vula mahothi a ḽiṱaḓulu," 
Psalms78:24 a nisela vhathu mana uri vha ḽe, a vha ṋea thoro dzi bvaho ṱaḓulu;" 
Psalms78:25 muthu wa ṋama a ḽa zwiḽiwa zwa vharuṅwa, vha ṋewa mbuvha i si na vhukono;" 
Psalms78:26 a vulela muya wa vhubvaḓuvha ngei ṱaḓulu, a swoga muya wa tshipembe nga maanḓa awe;" 
Psalms78:27 a vha nisela ṋama ya nga buse, zwiṋoni zwa nga muṱavha khunzikhunzini," 
Psalms78:28 a zwi wisela mitumbani yavho, zwa phapha u mona dennde dzavho;" 
Psalms78:29 vha ḽa vha pfa vha si tsha funa, nge a vha ṋea zwe vha zwi lilela." 
Psalms78:30 Ho ri vha sa athu fura nga zwiḽiwa zwe vha zwi lilela, zwi tshi kha ḓi tou vha haṋwani havho," 
Psalms78:31 mbiti dza Mudzimu dza vha vutshela, a vhulaha vhanna vha havho vha maanḓa, a wisa vhaṱhannga vha Israele." 
Psalms78:32 Nangwe zwo ralo vho ḓi endela u tshinya; naho o vha itela zwimangadzo a vho ngo mu fulufhela. 
Psalms78:33 Ndi zwe a fhedza maḓuvha avho unga mufemo, iṱo ḽi tshi tou poi miṅwaha yavho ya vha yo fhela." 
Psalms78:34 Mudzimu a tshi vha vhulaha vha vho mu ṱoḓa; vha dovha u humela khae vha tshi tou ḓifunga; 
Psalms78:35 vha elelwa uri Mudzimu ndi Ene bako ḽavho, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu ndi Ene Mulamuleli wavho." 
Psalms78:36 Hone ho vha hu u mu hoya nga milomo, vha mu zwifhela nga maipfi avho." 
Psalms78:37 Mbilu dzavho dzo vha dzi siho khae; vho vha vha tshi pambuwa mulangani wawe. 
Psalms78:38 Naho zwo ralo o vha khathutshela; o vha hangwela vhuvhi havho a si tsha vha lozwa. Ndi kanzhi a tshi humisa mbiti dzawe a dzi kanda; 
Psalms78:39 a elelwa uri ndi vhathu vha ṋama, ndi muya une wa sokou vhudzula wa fhira, u si tsha vhuya." 
Psalms78:40 Ndi lungana vha tshi mu shandukela phangani, vha mu ṱungufhadza sogani!" 
Psalms78:41 Vha linga Mudzimu vha dovha, vha levhela Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Psalms78:42 A vho ngo tsha humbula maanḓa awe, zwiḽa a tshi vha vhofholola kha vhatambudzi," 
Psalms78:43 zwiḽa a tshi sumbedza maḓembe awe shangoni ḽa Egipita, a tshi ita zwimangadzo mudavhini wa Tsuani." 
Psalms78:44 Milambo ya Vhaegipita a i shandula malofha, vha si tsha nwa maḓi milongani yavho." 
Psalms78:45 O ruma guma ḽa thunzi dza vha ḽa, a ruma zwiḓula zwa vha konḓisela vhutshilo;" 
Psalms78:46 mavhele avho a ḽiwa nga magerere, zwibveledzwa zwavho zwa fhedzwa nga nzietshikume." 
Psalms78:47 O wisa tshifhango minḓirivhe ye tshote, mihuyu yavho ya kumbiwa;" 
Psalms78:48 kholomo dzavho a dzi ruthutha nga tshifhango, thakha yavho a i fhedza nga nḓadzi." 
Psalms78:49 O vha shoshela nga mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho, na dambudzo, na u dinalea, na zwi konḓaho – tshigwada tshoṱhe tsha vharuṅwa vha lozwaho." 
Psalms78:50 O vulela mbiti dzawe nḓila; ho ngo vhuya a vha litsha vha tshila, o vha kumedza bulayo." 
Psalms78:51 O vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe a Egipita, yone mitshelo ya u thoma ya munna muṱani wa Hamu." 
Psalms78:52 Vhathu vhawe vhone o vha pfulusa unga sambi ḽa nngu, a vha endedza phangani unga miṱambi." 
Psalms78:53 O vha dededza zwavhuḓi uri vha si ofhe, hone maswina avho a milwa nga lwanzhe." 
Psalms78:54 A vhuya a vha swikisa mukanoni wa shango ḽawe ḽikhethwa, mivhundu ye a i wana nga maanḓa awe." 
Psalms78:55 O thatha dzitshakha phanḓa havho, a vha ṋea shango ḽa vha ifa ḽavho, a ṋea matsinde a Israele mahaya avho." 
Psalms78:56 Hone vhone vha linga Mudzimu, vha shandukela Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, vha si tsha tevhedza zwe a vha laya." 
Psalms78:57 Vho vha vha tshi ḓi nga vhokhotsi avho, vha si na vhuluvha, vha sa fulufhedzei, vha tshi nga vhura ho kombamaho, nga u sa fulufhedzea havho." 
Psalms78:58 Vho mu ṱunga nga u yo luvha zwikwarani hune ha luvha vhannḓa, vha vusa mbiti dzawe nga u luvha zwifanyiso." 
Psalms78:59 Mudzimu a ri u vha pfa a sinyuwa zwihulu, a landula Israele tshoṱhe." 
Psalms78:60 O ṱutshela vhudzulo hawe Shilo, dennde ye a vha o i akha vhukati ha vhathu." 
Psalms78:61 O litsha maswina a tshi thuba mbulungelo, tshone tshiga tsha maanḓa awe na vhugala." 
Psalms78:62 O vha o sinyutshela vhathu vhawe vhe a ḓinangela, a vha kumedza pfumo." 
Psalms78:63 Mulilo wa lozwa vhaṱhannga vhavho, vhasidzana vhavho vha si tsha imba dza mbingano;" 
Psalms78:64 vhotshifhe vhavho vha ḽiwa nga pfumo, tshilikadzi dzavho dza si lile."
