Psalms78:65 Ndi hone Muṋe wa zwoṱhe a tshi vuwa khofheni, unga muhali o dzelelaho nga waini a tshi dzivhuluwa;" 
Psalms78:66 a rwa maswina awe vha huma, vha shona lini na lini." 
Psalms78:67 A sala a tshi landula nnḓu ya Josefa, tsinde ḽa Efraimi a si tsha ḽi nanga;" 
Psalms78:68 a nanga tsinde ḽa Juda, na Thavha ya Tsioni ye a i funa." 
Psalms78:69 Ndi hone he a fhaṱa thembele yawe, a i tea ya vha ya lini na lini, ya khwaṱha unga ḽifhasi, ya ṋanzwa makole." 
Psalms78:70 A nanga Dafita muḓinḓa wawe, a yo mu dzhia pfuloni;" 
Psalms78:71 a mu dzhia a tshi khou lisa nngu a ḓa nae, uri a vhe mulisa wa vhathu vhawe Jakopo, a lise Israele lushaka lwa Mudzimu." 
Psalms78:72 Dafita a vha lisa o ḓikumedza, a vha endedza nga vhukoni." 
Psalms79:1 Mudzimu, vhannḓa vho tshoṱhela shangoni ḽau, thembele yau khethwa vho i kumadza, vho phusukanya Jerusalema a sala e matumba." 
Psalms79:2 Zwitumbu zwa vhalanda vhau vho zwi ṋea maanga uri a ḽe, ṋama ya vhathu vhau vha fulufhedzeaho vho i ṋea phukha dza ḓaka;" 
Psalms79:3 vho shulula malofha avho unga maḓi, Jerusalema wa ḓala malofha; a hu na na ane a swiṱa vhafu." 
Psalms79:4 Vhahura vhashu vha a ri holedza, vhe ra ṋekana navho masakha vha a ri sea vha ri goḓa." 
Psalms79:5 Muṋe washu, u ḓo ri sinyutshela u swika lini? Mbiti dzau dzi ḓo duga lini na lini naa?" 
Psalms79:6 Mbiti dzau dzi shululele vhannḓa vha sa u luvhi, na mivhuso i sa u rabeli;" 
Psalms79:7 hufha vho mila Jakopo, vha phusukanya shango ḽa hawe." 
Psalms79:8 U songo ri lifhedzela vhuvhi ha vhokhotsi ashu, ṱavhanya u ri khathutshela, mbilu dzashu dzo ṋoka." 
Psalms79:9 Mudzimu Mutshidzi washu, ri farise, u tshi itela vhuhulu ha dzina ḽau; ri vhofholole, u ri hangwele vhukhakhi hashu, u tshi itela dzina ḽau." 
Psalms79:10 U tendelani vhannḓa vha tshi ri, “Mudzimu wavho u ngafhi?” Vha sumbedze ri tshi zwi vhona uri u lifhedzela hani malofha a vhalanda vhau o shululwaho." 
Psalms79:11 Ngavhe zwigomelo zwa mathubwa zwi tshi swika ha Iwe; nga maanḓa au mahulu, lamukisa vho haṱulelwaho lufu." 
Psalms79:12 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, maṱamba e vhahura vhashu vha a posa ha Iwe, vha lifhedze kaṱanu na kavhili." 
Psalms79:13 Ndi hone riṋe vhathu vhau, dzone nngu dzine wa dzi lisa, ri tshi ḓo u renda lini na lini, ra u renda nga nyimbo zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms80:1 Ri pfe, Iwe Mulisa wa Israele, Iwe une wa endedza Josefa unga sambi ḽa nngu, Iwe une wa dzula kha khuluṋoni vhukati ha vhakherube," 
Psalms80:2 sumbedza Efraimi na Benyamini na Manase lupenyo lwau. Vusa maanḓa au; iḓa u ri tshidze. 
Psalms80:3 Mudzimu, dovha u ri vuse; ri penyisele tshifhaṱuwo tshau uri ri tshidzwe." 
Psalms80:4 Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, mbiti dzau dzi ḓo ḓi nyenga, wa ḓi dzula u tshi sanda thabelo dza vhathu vhau u swika lini?" 
Psalms80:5 Wo vha fusha nga vhuswa ha miṱodzi, wa vha nwisa miṱodzi nga ndilo." 
Psalms80:6 Wo litsha tshakha dzo ri tangaho dzi tshi lwela shango ḽashu; maswina ashu a a ri goḓa. 
Psalms80:7 Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe, ri vuse; ri penyisele tshifhaṱuwo tshau uri ri tshidzwe." 
Psalms80:8 Wo ḓisa munḓirivhe u tshi bva Egipita, wa tupula dzitshakha wa ṱavha wone;" 
Psalms80:9 wo u khurela fhethu hune wa ḓo tanda, wa ṱoka midzi, wa ḓadza shango;" 
Psalms80:10 murunzi wawo wa tiba dzithavha, thavhi dzawo dza tiba mikedara mihulu," 
Psalms80:11 dza adza dza guma lwanzheni, zwifhara zwawo zwa swika Yufuratha." 
Psalms80:12 Ndi mini wo wisa mutsheṱo wo u tangaho, uri vhafhiri vha nḓila vha fule nḓirivhe dzawo, u sale wo tou swoto?" 
Psalms80:13 U kandekanywa nga nguluvhe dza ḓaka, zwipuka zwa ḓaka zwi ḽa wone." 
Psalms80:14 Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe, humela kha riṋe! Sedza u makoleni u vhone! Linda munḓirivhe hoyu," 
Psalms80:15 ndi mudzi we wa simiwa nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa, ndi ḓadzwane ḽe wa tou ḓivusela." 
Psalms80:16 Vho tumula munḓirivhe wau, vha u fhisa nga mulilo; vha ofhise vha lovhe!" 
Psalms80:17 Tsireledza Israele ane wa vhusa ngae, ene mubebwa-nga-muthu we wa ḓivusela." 
Psalms80:18 Ndi hone ri si tsha ḓo u furalela; ri vuse, ri ḓo u rabela." 
Psalms80:19 Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, ri vuse; ri penyisele tshifhaṱuwo tshau uri ri tshidzwe." 
Psalms81:1 Fhululedzani Mudzimu, ndi Ene maanḓa ashu! Mudzimu wa Jakopo mu ṱavheleni mukosi!" 
Psalms81:2 Simani luimbo, lidzani mirumba; imbani luimbo lu takadzaho hu tshi lila haripa na tshihwana!" 
Psalms81:3 Lidzani lufhalafhala vhuṱamboni ha Ṅwedzi muswa, ni lidze nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo hashu ṅwedzi wó tshena." 
Psalms81:4 Hoyo ndi mulayo wa Israele, ndi ndaela ya Mudzimu wa Jakopo." 
Psalms81:5 O u tetshela Josefa, zwiḽa a tshi yo lwa na Egipita. Henefho ndo pfa ipfi ndi sa athu ḽi pfa, ḽi tshi ri," 
Psalms81:6 “Ndo vha rula muhwalo, vha si tsha hwala zwirundu." 
Psalms81:7 Wo ri u khomboni wa mmbidzelela, nda u lamukisa, ndo u fhindula ndi goleni ḽa mubvumo; ndo u linga maḓini a Miriba." 
Psalms81:8 “Vhathu vhanga, thetshelesani ndi ni eletshedze; ngavhe ni tshi nthetshelesa, Israele!" 
Psalms81:9 Ni songo vha na mudzimu usili; ni songo gwadamela mudzimu wa vhatsinda. 
Psalms81:10 Mudzimu Muṋe waṋu ndi Nṋe; ndi Nṋe we nda ni pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita. Aṱamani mulomo unga fhondo, ndi ḓo sokotedza ndodo.”" 
Psalms81:11 “Hone vhathu vhanga a vho ngo nthetshelesa, Vhaisraele vho nyadza zwe nda amba." 
Psalms81:12 Ndi zwe nda vha kumedza tshipimbi tshavho, vha ita zwine vha funa." 
Psalms81:13 Ngavhe vhathu vhanga vha tshi nthetshelesa nandi, Vhaisraele vha si pambuwe nḓilani yanga," 
Psalms81:14 ndo vha ndi sa nga lengi u laṱisa maswina avho, nda a fhedza oṱhe!" 
Psalms81:15 Vhane vha vhenga Muṋe waṋu vho vha vha tshi ḓo mu gwadamela vha sa funi, ṱhamu yavho ya vha ya lini na lini." 
Psalms81:16 Inwi ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ni funda nga mavhele avhuḓi, nda ni fusha nga mutoli u no bva bakoni.”" 
Psalms82:1 Mudzimu u langa khoro ya makoleni; u haṱula vhukati ha midzimu a ri," 
Psalms82:2 “Ni ḓo piringanya khaṱhulo u swika lini? Ni ḓo imelela vhavhi u swika lini? 
Psalms82:3 Lamukisani vhaheḓana na tsiwana; vho tambudzwaho na vhashai vha ṋeeni pfanelo dzavho. 
Psalms82:4 Lamulelani vhaheḓana na vha lilaho; vha vhofhololeni zwanḓani zwa vhavhi. 
Psalms82:5 “Vhathu a vha ḓivhi tshithu, a vha ṱalukanyi tshithu, vha tshimbila swiswini; miteo yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi i a dzinginyea." 
Psalms82:6 Ndi zwone, ndo ri ni pfi midzimu, noṱhe ni vhana vha Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu." 
Psalms82:7 Hone ni ḓo ḓi lovha unga vhathu vha ṋama, ni ḓo ḓi wa unga vhavhusi vhoṱhe.”" 
Psalms82:8 Mudzimu, takuwa u haṱule ḽifhasi, hufha u Muṋe wa tshakha dzoṱhe!" 
Psalms83:1 Yawee, Mudzimu, u songo sokou fhumula! U songo sokou ṱanzwa maṱo wa lavhelesa." 
Psalms83:2 Mudzimu, vhona maswina au o halifha, vha u vhengaho vho imisa dziṱhoho." 
Psalms83:3 Vha lukela vhathu vhau vhunwa, vha langana vhavhavhalelwa vhau." 
Psalms83:4 Vha ri, “Kha ri ḽe lushaka lwoṱhe nga pfumo, dzina ḽa Israele ḽi sa tsha ḓo vhidzwa.”" 
Psalms83:5 Vha u itela tshimbevha vho khwaṱhisa, vho vhofha mulanga wa u lwa na Iwe." 
Psalms83:6 Ndi Edomo na Vhaishmaele, ndi Muaba na Vhahagara," 
Psalms83:7 ndi Gebala na Amoni na Amaleke, ndi Filista na Vhatiro," 
Psalms83:8 hu ḓi nga Vhaashuru, na vhone vha ngomu, vha tikedza vhana vha Loto." 
Psalms83:9 Vha ite zwe wa ita Vhamidiani, zwe wa ita Sisera na Jabini mulamboni wa Kishoni," 
Psalms83:10 vhe vha lozwiwa Endoro, vha vha manyoro a mavu." 
Psalms83:11 Vhahulwane vhavho vha ite zwe wa ita Orebe na Ziebe, vhakololo vhavho vhoṱhe u vha ite sa Zebakha na Tsalimunna," 
Psalms83:12 vhe vha ri, “Nga ri dzhie pfulo ya Mudzimu i vhe yashu.”" 
Psalms83:13 Yawee, Mudzimu wanga, vha ite unga mbeu ya luguli, vha nge mungu u hwalwaho nga muya," 
Psalms83:14 vha fhise vha nge ḓaka ḽi tshi swa nga mulilo, u nge khavhu i tshi fhisa dzithavha." 
Psalms83:15 Vha sale murahu nga ḓumbu ḽau, u vha ofhise nga tshiḓumbumukwe." 
Psalms83:16 Yawee Muṋe washu, nga vha tou niwa nga ṱhoni, vha vhuye vha u ṱoḓe!" 
Psalms83:17 Vha shonise vha ofhe tshoṱhe, vha lovhe vho shona!" 
Psalms83:18 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri u pfi Muṋe washu, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe, ndi Iwe u woṱhe." 
Psalms84:1 Nnḓu yau i takadza hani, Iwe Muṋe washu Ramaanḓaoṱhe!" 
Psalms84:2 Ndo ṱuvha miṱa ya Muṋe washu, ndi ita na u ṋoka; Mudzimu a tshilaho ndi mu fhululedza nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe." 
Psalms84:3 Hufha na lutiitii lwo wana tshiṱaha, ṱhambamaḓi na yone yo ḓiwanela vhudzulo hune ya nga thothonya mafhondo, henefho tsini ha aḽiṱari yau, Iwe Muṋe washu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, Khosi yanga, Mudzimu wanga." 
Psalms84:4 Vha na mashudu vha no dzula nḓuni yau; vha dzula vha tshi u renda. 
Psalms84:5 Vha na mashudu vhane maanḓa avho a bva kha Iwe; a hu na tshi vha takadzaho mbilu u fhira u fara lwendo lwa u ya nḓuni yau. 
Psalms84:6 Vha tshi fhira nga govhani ḽo omaho vha hu ita fhethu ha zwisima, vha welwa nga mashudu a mvula dza tseula." 
Psalms84:7 Vha ḓi pfa mbilu dzo khwaṱha dzi tshi ya, vha vhuya vha swika Tsioni, maṱoni a Mudzimu." 
Psalms84:8 Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, ipfa thabelo yanga! Nthetshelese, Iwe Mudzimu wa Jakopo!" 
Psalms84:9 Mudzimu, londola khosi, ene tshiṱangu tshashu, vhavhalela ene we wa mu ta." 
Psalms84:10 Ndi khwiṋe u ṱwa miṱani yau ḓuvha ḽithihi zwaḽo, u fhira maḓuvha a tshigidi ndi sa hu vhoni; ndi takalela u linda muṋango wa nnḓu ya Mudzimu zwanga, u fhira u dzula nḓuni dza vhavhi." 
Psalms84:11 Mudzimu Muṋe washu ndi ḓuvha ḽashu, ndi tshiṱangu, u ri itela vhuthu, a ri hulisa; vho faraho nḓila ya Muṋe washu vha sa vhuyi vha pambuwa, ha vha dzimi tshivhuya na tshithihi." 
Psalms84:12 Muṋe washu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, u na mashudu ane a fulufhela Iwe." 
Psalms85:1 Muṋe washu, wo tonda shango ḽau, wa dovha wa ita uri Jakopo zwi mu anḓe;" 
Psalms85:2 wo hangwela vhathu vhau milandu yavho, wa tiba zwoṱhe zwe vha khakha;" 
Psalms85:3 wo humisa mbiti dzau wa dzi thudzela thungo. 
Psalms85:4 Mudzimu Mutshidzi washu, dovha u ri vuse, u songo tsha ri sinyutshela." 
Psalms85:5 Ndi hone wo ri sinyutshela tshoṱhe naa? Mirafho i ḓaho i ḓo ḓi vhona mbiti dzau dzi sa dzimi naa? 
Psalms85:6 A u nga dovhi wa ri ṋea vhutshilo, vhathu vhau vha konou u pembelela naa?" 
Psalms85:7 Muṋe washu, ri sumbedze lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, u ri tshidze." 
Psalms85:8 Ndi ḓo thetshelesa zwine Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ḓo amba: vhathu vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho u vha fulufhedzisa mulalo, tenda vha si humele kha zwa vhutsilu." 
Psalms85:9 Ngoho, ha lengi u tshidza vhane vha mu ofha; vhugala hawe vhu ḓo dovha ha dzula shangoni ḽashu." 
Psalms85:10 Ndi hone vhuthu na u fulufhedzea zwi tshi ḓo ṱangana, vhuvhuya na mulalo zwa kuvhatedzana," 
Psalms85:11 u fulufhedzea ha simuwa fhasi, vhuvhuya ha sedza fhasi vhu makoleni," 
Psalms85:12 Muṋe washu a ri ṋea zwivhuya, shango ḽashu ḽa bveledza khaṋo," 
Psalms85:13 vhuvhuya ha mu ranga phanḓa, ha swielela ṋayo dzawe nḓila." 
Psalms86:1 Muṋe washu, mpfe u mphindule, ndi muheḓana, ndi mushai!" 
Psalms86:2 Nndondole, hufha ndi tshi fulufhedzea! U Mudzimu wanga, ndi fulufhela Iwe, ntshidze!" 
Psalms86:3 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, nkhathutshele, ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi vhidzelela Iwe." 
Psalms86:4 Nthudze mbilu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndi livhisa mbilu yanga ha Iwe." 
Psalms86:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, u na vhuthu, u a hangwela, vhane vha u vhidzelela u vha sumbedza lufuno luhulu." 
Psalms86:6 Muṋe washu, ipfa thabelo yanga, thetshelesa mukosi wanga." 
Psalms86:7 Musi wa khombo ndi a u vhidzelela; u ḓo mphindula. 
Psalms86:8 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, kha midzimu yoṱhe a hu na a no nga Iwe; a hu na mishumo ine ya nga vhambedzwa na yau." 
Psalms86:9 Wo vhumba tshakha dzoṱhe; dzi ḓo ḓa dza u luvha, dza renda dzina ḽau, Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe." 
Psalms86:10 Muhuluhulu ndi Iwe, u ita zwimangadzo, ndi Iwe Mudzimu u woṱhe." 
Psalms86:11 Muṋe washu, mpfunze u ita zwine wa zwi funa, ndi ḓo konou tshimbila ngohoni yau; mphe mbilu nthihi, ndi ofhe dzina ḽau." 
Psalms86:12 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Mudzimu wanga, ndi ḓo u renda nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, ndi ḓo hulisa dzina ḽau lini na lini." 
Psalms86:13 A u mpfuni zwone, wo nṋula fhasi-fhasi tshaloni." 
Psalms86:14 Mudzimu, vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha khou nndevhela, vhadzia-tshiṱuhu vha khou mmbulaha; ndi vhathu vha sa u londi." 
Psalms86:15 Hone Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u Mudzimu wa tshilidzi na khathutshelo; a u fheli mbilu, lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei, u a fulufhedzea." 
Psalms86:16 Ntsedze, u nkhathutshele, nṋee nungo dzau; ntshidze, hufha na mme anga o vha mulanda wau." 
Psalms86:17 Ntsumbedze tshiga tsha vhuthu hau, maswina anga a zwi vhone, a shone. Vhukumakuma Iwe Muṋe washu wo mpfarisa wa mphumudza." 
Psalms87:1 Muṋe washu o tea muteo wa muḓi thavhani khethwa; 
Psalms87:2 u funa muḓi wa Tsioni, na khoro dzawo dzavhuḓi, u fhira miḓi yoṱhe ya Jakopo." 
Psalms87:3 Iwe muḓi wa Mudzimu a u khoḓwi zwone, u pfi u na vhugala." 
Psalms87:4 Mudzimu u ri, “Na Egipita, na Babele, ndi ḓo vha vhala na vhane vha nnḓivha, nda si sie na Filista na Tiro na Kushu, nda ri ‘Hoyu o bebwa-vho Tsioni.’" 
Psalms87:5 Ngangoho hu tshi ambiwa Tsioni hu ḓo pfi, ‘Hoyu na houḽa vho bebwa-vho hone. U ḓo tewa nga Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu Ene muṋe.’ ”" 
Psalms87:6 Muṋe washu u ḓo ri a tshi ṅwala dzitshakha a ri, “Hoyu o bebwa Tsioni, na hoyu, na hoyu.”" 
Psalms87:7 Vha ḓo imba vha pembela vha ri, “Ndí Tsioni, ndi hone ndi hayani.”" 
Psalms88:1 Mudzimu Muṋe washu, Iwe Mutshidzi wanga, ndi u lilela vhusiku na masiari." 
Psalms88:2 Ngavhe thabelo yanga i tshi swika ha Iwe; nḓevhe yau nga i thetshelese mukosi wanga. 
Psalms88:3 Ndi neta nga khombo, ndo no tou ingamela tshalo;" 
Psalms88:4 ndi vho vhalwa na vho swiṱwaho, ndi nga munna a si tshee na nungo." 
Psalms88:5 Vho no nṱovhowa, ndi vho nga mufu; ndi nga vho ḽiwaho nga pfumo, vha eḓela tshaloni, wa vha hangwa, wa si tsha vha londa." 
Psalms88:6 Wo ntsukumedzela fhasi-fhasi dindini, vhudzivhani ha swiswi." 
Psalms88:7 Mbiti dzau dzi a ntsikeledza; wo ntiba nga magabelo au oṱhe. 
Psalms88:8 Wo nnzhiela khonani dzanga dzone-dzone, wa ita uri vha nnengwe. Ndo govhelwa, a thi koni u ponyoka." 
Psalms88:9 Maṱo anga o punda nga miṱodzi. Muṋe washu, ndi u vhidzelela ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe, ndi u ṱavhela mukosi ndó imisa zwanḓa." 
Psalms88:10 Vho faho u a vha itela zwimangadzo naa? Vhafu vha nga vuwa vha u renda naa? 
Psalms88:11 Lufuno lwau lu nga ḓivhadzwa tshaloni naa? U fulufhedzea hau hu ḓivhea ndozwoni naa? 
Psalms88:12 Zwimangadzo zwau zwi ḓihwa hu re na swiswi naa? Mishumo yau mivhuya i ḓihwa shangoni ḽa vho hangwiwaho naa? 
Psalms88:13 Muṋe washu, ndi u ṱavhela mukosi, thabelo yanga i swika ha Iwe hu tshee nga matsheloni." 
Psalms88:14 Muṋe washu, ndi mini u tshi nndaṱa wa mpfuralela?" 
Psalms88:15 U bva hanani hanga ndo ḓi ṱungufhadzwa, nda dzula ndo ingamela tshalo; wo ḓi nnyofhisa, ndí fhano ndo kulea nungo." 
Psalms88:16 Mbiti dzau dzo tou ntswiela, wo nṱahadza nga nyofho;" 
Psalms88:17 ḓuvha ḽoṱhe mbiti dzi ntanga unga muḓalo wa maḓi, dzo ntangela ngomu tshoṱhe." 
Psalms88:18 Wo nnzhiela khonani dzanga, wa nnduṱanya na ṱhama dzanga, khonani yone-yone yo salaho ndi swiswi." 
Psalms89:1 Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo imba nda ḓivhadza lufuno lwau lini na lini, mulomo wanga u ḓo hanelela mirafho yoṱhe u fulufhedzea hau." 
Psalms89:2 Ndo ri, “Lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei lini na lini, u fulufhedzea hau ho ima ho khwaṱha unga ḽiṱaḓulu.”" 
Psalms89:3 Wo ri, “Ndo vhofha mulanga na munangiwa wanga, ndo anela Dafita muḓinḓa wanga nda ri," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Vhaḓuhulu vhau vha ḓo ḓi vha hone lini na lini, ndi ḓo khwaṱhisa khuluṋoni yau zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Muṋe washu, ḽiṱaḓulu ḽi renda zwimangadzo zwau, vharuṅwa vha renda u fulufhedzea hau!" 
Psalms89:6 Ndi nnyi makoleni a eḓanaho na Muṋe washu? Ane a nga Muṋe washu kha zwivhumbwa zwa ṱaḓulu ndi nnyi? 
Psalms89:7 Khoroni ya ngei ṱaḓulu hu ofheswa Mudzimu; ndi muhulu, u ofhisa u fhira vhoṱhe vho mu tangaho." 
Psalms89:8 Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, ndi nnyi ane a nga Iwe? Muṋe washu, u na maanḓa mahulu, wo tangwa nga u fulufhedzea hau." 
Psalms89:9 U vhusa lwanzhe lwo sinyuwa, wa dzikisa magabelo alwo a tshi takuwa." 
Psalms89:10 Wo pwashekanya Rahaba ḓiragoni ḽa lwanzhe, ḽa vha khuvhabvu, wa balanganya maswina au nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Psalms89:11 Ḽiṱaḓulu ndi ḽau, na ḽifhasi ndi ḽau; wo tea ḽifhasi, wa sika zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo." 
Psalms89:12 Ndi Iwe wo sikaho devhula na tshipembe, Thaboro na Heremoni dzi fhululedza dzina ḽau." 
Psalms89:13 Tshanḓa tshau tshi na maanḓa, u na nungo, maanḓa au ndi mahulu, tshanḓa tshau tshi fhira zwoṱhe." 
Psalms89:14 Khuluṋoni yau yo tewa kha ngoho na khaṱhulo mbuya, zwoṱhe zwine wa ita zwi vhonala zwi lufuno na u fulufhedzea." 
Psalms89:15 Vha na mashudu vhe vha guda u u renda, vhane vha tshimbila tshedzani tsha tshifhaṱuwo tshau, Iwe Muṋe washu." 
Psalms89:16 Vha fhululedza dzina ḽau ḓuvha ḽoṱhe, vha pembelela vhuvhuya hau." 
Psalms89:17 U vha ṋea vhugala na nungo, wa vha ombela shambo nge wa vha funa." 
Psalms89:18 Ngoho thovhele tshiṱangu tshashu u bva kha Muṋe washu, khosi yashu ro ṋewa nga Iwe Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Psalms89:19 Zwiḽa kale wo amba na vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho, wa amba nga bono wa ri, “Ndi na muhali we nda mu ṋea nungo; ndo hulisa muṱhanngana we nda mu nanga vhukati ha vhathu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndo wana Dafita muḓinḓa wanga, nda mu ḓodza mapfura anga makhethwa, ha vha hone u mu rwela ṱari." 
Psalms89:21 Tshanḓa tshanga tshi ḓo mu tika; ngoho u ḓo khwaṱhiswa nga tshanḓa tshanga tsha maanḓa. 
Psalms89:22 A hu na swina ḽi no ḓo mu kunda nga maano; muvhi a no ḓo mu kandeledza haho. 
Psalms89:23 Hoṱhe hune a ya ndi ḓo pwashekanya maswina awe, nda vhulaha vha mu vhengaho." 
Psalms89:24 Ndi a fulufhedzea, ndi ḓo mu funa nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei, dzina ḽanga ḽi ḓo mu ombela shambo," 
Psalms89:25 a vhusa lwanzhe, muvhuso wawe wa pfuka milambo." 
Psalms89:26 U ḓo mmbidzelela a ri, ‘U Khotsi anga, u Mudzimu wanga, bako ḽi no ntshidza.’" 
Psalms89:27 Nṋe ndi ḓo mu ita tanzhe ḽanga, a vha muhulwane wa mahosi a ḽifhasi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndi ḓo mu londola nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei lini a lini, mulanga we nda vhofha nae a u nga fi;" 
Psalms89:29 vhana vhawe vha ḓo dzula vhe hone lini na lini, khuluṋoni yawe i ḓo lalama unga lutombo." 
Psalms89:30 Hone vhana vhawe vhá laṱa Mulayo wanga, vha si tsha tevhedza zwe nda vha laya," 
Psalms89:31 vha nyadza ndaela dzanga, vha si dzi vhulunge," 
Psalms89:32 ndi ḓo vha laṱisa vhuvhi havho nga luḓo, vhukhakhi havho nda vha laṱisa nga ṱhamu." 
Psalms89:33 Ene a thi nga litshi u mu funa nda si tsha fulufhedzea. 
Psalms89:34 A thi nga vhofhololi mulanga wanga, zwe nda amba thi nga shandukisi." 
Psalms89:35 Ndo ana nga vhukhethwa hanga zwa vha zwo fhela, ndi nga si zwifhele Dafita." 
Psalms89:36 Vhana vhawe vha ḓo dzula vha hone, khuluṋoni yawe i ḓo lalama unga ḓuvha," 
Psalms89:37 i ḓo ima lini na lini unga ṅwedzi, wone ṱhanzi i fulufhedzeaho ya makoleni.”" 
Psalms89:38 Hone zwino wo laṱa khosi ye wa i ta, wa i landula, wa i sinyutshela;" 
Psalms89:39 wo vhofholola mulanga we wa vhofha na mulanda wau, tshiala tshawe tsha vhuhosi wa tshi mbulumbudza buseni." 
Psalms89:40 Wo thutha mitsheṱo yawe yoṱhe, wa phusukanya madzhavhelo awe ha sala matumba." 
Psalms89:41 U ṱangulwa nga vhafhiri vhoṱhe vha gondo, ndi munyadziwa-nga-vhahura." 
Psalms89:42 Wo ṋea maswina awe maanḓa a u mu kunda, wa a takadza oṱhe." 
Psalms89:43 Wo gomadza vhuhali ha pfumo ḽawe; nndwani ha tsha kunda. 
Psalms89:44 Wo tshinya vhuḽa vhugala hawe, khuluṋoni yawe we i thenu ye fhasi huru!" 
Psalms89:45 Wo mu ṱungufhadza, a kalaha a tshi kha ḓi vha nga hawe, wa mu shonisa." 
Psalms89:46 Muṋe washu, zwi ḓo guma lini? U ḓo ḓi ri furalela naa? Mbiti dzau dzi ḓo ḓi duga unga mulilo naa?" 
Psalms89:47 Elelwa uri vhutshilo hanga ho pfufhifhala hani. A u vhoni uri vhathu vhoṱhe vhe wa vha sika ndi mahandana fhedzi? 
Psalms89:48 U hone ane a nga lalama a si fe naa? Ndi nnyi ane a nga ḓitshidza a si dzhene tshaloni? 
Psalms89:49 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, luḽa lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei lu ngafhi? Zwiḽa zwe wa anela Dafita nga u fulufhedzea hau zwi ngafhi?" 
Psalms89:50 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, sedza u nyadziwa ha mulanda wau, zwine mbiluni yanga nda konḓelela u seṅwa nga ditshakha," 
Psalms89:51 ndi tshi ṱambuludzwa nga maswina au, Muṋe washu, a tshi poṋodza khosi ye wa i ta, a i nyadzisa." 
Psalms89:52 Muṋe washu nga a rendwe lini na lini! AMEN! AMEN! 
Psalms90:1 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, wo ḓi vha dzhavhelo ḽashu zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms90:2 Zwiḽa thavha dzi sa athu bebwa, u sa athu sika ḽifhasi na shango, u ḓi vha Mudzimu u bva kale-kale, na lini na lini." 
Psalms90:3 Iwe u vhuedzedza muthu mavuni, wa ri, “Vhuelelani kha zwe na vha ni zwone, inwi vhana vha vhathu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Kha Iwe tshigidi tsha miṅwaha tshi tou nga ḓuvha ḽa mulovha ḽo fhiraho, tshi nga muthu a tshi rembuluwa kathihi vhusiku." 
Psalms90:5 U kumba vhathu, zwa nga muloro une ḽi tshi tsha wa hangwiwa; vha nga hatsi vhu melaho nga matsheloni:" 
Psalms90:6 nga matsheloni vhu a titima, nga madekwana ha puta ha oma." 
Psalms90:7 Ri fhiswa nga mbiti dzau, u tshi dinalea zwi ofhisa hani!" 
Psalms90:8 Milandu yashu a yo ngo u dzumbama; u dzumbulula zwiphiri zwashu nga tshedza tshau. 
Psalms90:9 Maḓuvha ashu oṱhe a nyamaladzwa nga mbiti dzau; vhutshilo hashu vhu nga mufemo, a vhu lengi u fhela." 
Psalms90:10 Ri tshila miṅwaha ya 70, vha lalamaho vha tshila 80, hone zwine ya ri ḓisela zwi zwidini na maṱungu fhedzi; i tou fhufha ra vha ri si tsheeho." 
Psalms90:11 Ndi nnyi o no thetshelaho maanḓa a mbiti dzau? Ndi nnyi a no ḓivha uri wa sinyuwa zwi ofhisa hani? 
Psalms90:12 Ri funze u vhala maḓuvha ashu ri vhone uri ha gathi, mbilu dzashu dzi vhe na vhuṱali." 
Psalms90:13 Muṋe washu, humisa mbiti dzau, zwi ḓo guma lini? Khathutshela vhalanda vhau." 
Psalms90:14 Kha ri vuwe ro fushwa nga lufuno lwau, ri imbe ri takale maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hashu." 
Psalms90:15 Ri takadze zwi eḓane na zwiḽa u tshi ri ṱungufhadza, zwi eḓane na miṅwaha ye ra ṱangana na zwi konḓaho." 
Psalms90:16 Ngavhe vhalanda vhau vha tshi vhona mishumo yau ya maanḓa, vhana vhavho vha vhona vhugala hau." 
Psalms90:17 Ngavhe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Mudzimu washu a tshi ri itela vhulenda, zwe ra shuma zwi si vhe mahandana, ndi zwone, nga a khwaṱhise mishumo ya zwanḓa zwashu." 
Psalms91:1 Ane a khuda nga Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, u ḓo lala murunzini wa Ramaanḓaoṱhe." 
Psalms91:2 Ndi ḓo amba na Muṋe washu nda ri, “Ndi Iwe vhushavhelo hanga, u vhudzumbamo hanga, Mudzimu wanga ane nda mu fulufhela.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ngoho u ḓo u ponyokisa tshikwekweni tshe wa retshelwa, hu tshi ḓa dwadze ḽi vhulahaho, a u tshidza." 
Psalms91:4 U ḓo u kuvhatedza nga mithenga yawe, a u pilela nga phapha dzawe; u fulufhedzea hawe ndi tshone tshiṱangu na philelo." 
Psalms91:5 Na khombo dza vhusiku a u nga dzi ofhi, naho u musevhe u poswaho masiari," 
Psalms91:6 nangwe ḽi dwadze ḽi dodelaho swiswini, naho ḽi bulayo ḽi fhedzaho vhathu masiari tshivhangalala." 
Psalms91:7 Vha tshigidi vha tshi ḓi rambalala thungo ino yau, vha fumi ḽa zwigidi vha tshi wa thungo ya tshauḽa tshau, hone iwe a zwi nga u kwami;" 
Psalms91:8 u ḓo sokou sedza zwau, wa vhona vhavhi vha tshi lifhedzwa." 
Psalms91:9 Hufha Muṋe washu e vhushavhelo hau, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu e vhudzumbamo hau," 
Psalms91:10 a hu na khombo i no ḓo u wela, a hu na phanzi i no ḓo sendela nnḓu yau." 
Psalms91:11 U ḓo ruma vharuṅwa vhawe, vha u londola nḓilani dzau dzoṱhe;" 
Psalms91:12 vha ḓo u takula nga zwanḓa zwavho, u sa ḓo khukhulwa mulenzhe nga tombo." 
Psalms91:13 U ḓo kanda ndau na ṋowa, ndawana na mbeḓa wa zwi kandekanya." 
Psalms91:14 Mudzimu u ri, “Ú a mpfuna, ndi ḓo mu tshidza; ndi ḓo mu tsireledza, u ḓivha dzina ḽanga." 
Psalms91:15 A tshi mmbidzelela ndi ḓo mu aravha; e khomboni ndi ḓo ima nae; ndi ḓo mu lamukisa nda mu hulisa; 
Psalms91:16 ndi ḓo mu tonda a lalama, a vhona uri muthu ndi mu tshidza hani.”" 
Psalms92:1 Muṋe washu, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu, zwo naka hani ri tshi u livhuha, ri tshi renda dzina ḽau nga nyimbo," 
Psalms92:2 ri tshi ḓivhadza lufuno lwau nga matsheloni, nga madekwana ra anḓadza u fulufhedzea hau," 
Psalms92:3 nga tshilidzo tsha thale dza fumi, na nga luimbo lwa mbila, hu tshi lidzwa haripa!" 
Psalms92:4 Muṋe washu, u ntakadza nga mishumo yau, ndi fhululedza zwe wa ita." 
Psalms92:5 Muṋe washu, mishumo yau yo hula hani! Mihumbulo yau yo ṱanḓavhuwa hani!" 
Psalms92:6 A si na ṱhalukanyo ha ḓivhi, tsilu a ḽi pfesesi," 
Psalms92:7 uri naho vhavhi vha tshi simuwa unga hatsi, na vhaitazwivhi zwi tshi vha anḓa, vha ḓo fhedzwa tshoṱhe." 
Psalms92:8 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu u ḓi dzula u muhulwane lini na lini. 
Psalms92:9 Ngoho-ngoho maswina au, Muṋe washu, ngoho-ngoho maswina au a ḓo lovha; vhoṱhe vhaitazwivhi vha ḓo balanganywa." 
Psalms92:10 Wo nnyombela shambo nda nga ṋari, wa nnḓodza mapfura a netulusaho." 
Psalms92:11 Maṱo anga o vhona maswina anga a tshi kundwa, nḓevhe dzanga dzo no ḓi pfa mutsindo wa vhane vha mmvutshela." 
Psalms92:12 Vha fulufhedzeaho zwi ḓo vha anḓa unga mutshevho u tshi ṱuma lurere, vha aluwa unga mukedara wa Libanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Vho ṱavhiwa nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, vha titima miṱani ya Mudzimu washu." 
Psalms92:14 Vha ḓo ḓi aṋwa mitshelo naho vho no ḓi vha vha maḓuvha; vha ḓo dzula vhe vhaswa unga miri midala," 
Psalms92:15 vha tshi ṱanziela uri Muṋe washu u ita zwone, ndi Ene bako ḽanga, ha khakhi." 
Psalms93:1 Muṋe washu ú a vhusa, o ambara vhugala, Muṋe washu o fuka maanḓa, o ḓivhofha khundu ngao. Shango ḽo ṱoka midzi, a ḽi sudzuluswi;" 
Psalms93:2 na khuluṋoni yau ndi kale yo ima, Iwe u wa lini na lini." 
Psalms93:3 Muṋe washu, milambo yo bvuma, milambo yo takusa maipfi, milambo i bvumisa magabelo." 
Psalms93:4 Mubvumo wa maḓi mahulu ndi muhulu; magabelo a lwanzhe ndi mahulu vhukuma; hone muhulusa ndi Muṋe washu a re ṱaḓulu. 
Psalms93:5 Muṋe washu, ndaela dzau a dzi shanduki, vhukhethwa vhu nakisa nnḓu yau lini na lini." 
Psalms94:1 Muṋe washu, u Mudzimu ane a lifhedza; Iwe Mudzimu Mulifhedzi, ḓivhonadze!" 
Psalms94:2 Takuwa, Iwe Muhaṱuli wa ḽifhasi; lifhedza vhadzia-u-ḓihudza u tshi tevhedza zwiito zwavho!" 
Psalms94:3 Muṋe washu, vhavhi vha ḓo ḓiphiṋa u ya ho ya naa? Vha ḓo gumafhi?" 
Psalms94:4 Maṱamba vha tou pfa vha tshi vhea; vhaitazwivhi vhoṱhe vha a ḓikhoḓa. 
Psalms94:5 Vha kandeledza vhathu vhau, Muṋe washu, vha tsikeledza vhanangiwa vhau." 
Psalms94:6 Vha vhulaha tshilikadzi na ṱhunḓu, vha ponda tsiwana." 
Psalms94:7 Vha ri Muṋe washu ha zwi vhoni; Mudzimu wa Jakopo ha zwi londi. 
Psalms94:8 Ni vhone, inwi ni si na ṱhalukanyo; inwi matsilu, ni ḓo ṱalifha lini?" 
Psalms94:9 Kani we a ni ṋea nḓevhe ndi dzinganḓevhe? We a ni fha maṱo ndi bofu kani? 
Psalms94:10 Kani-ha ane a onyolosa dzitshakha ha laṱisi? Ene ane a gudisa vhathu ha na nḓivho kani? 
Psalms94:11 Muṋe washu u ḓivha mihumbulo ya vhathu; u ḓivha uri a vha tshithu. 
Psalms94:12 Muṋe washu, ú na mashudu ane wa mu laya, wa mu funza mulayo wau," 
Psalms94:13 u mu rudza mbilu musi wa khombo, vhavhi vha vhuya vha swiṱwa." 
Psalms94:14 Muṋe washu a nga si laṱe vhathu vhawe, a nga si furalele vhanangiwa vhawe." 
Psalms94:15 Hu ḓo dovha ha vhuya khaṱhulo mbuya; vhoṱhe vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho vha ḓo i tevhela. 
Psalms94:16 Ndi nnyi ane a ḓo nndwela ndi tshi imedzana na vhavhi? Ndi nnyi ane a ḓo nnyimelela vhaitazwivhi vha tshi mmvutshela? 
Psalms94:17 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a si mpfarise, ndi musi ndo fa." 
Psalms94:18 Ndi tshi ri, “Mulenzhe wanga u khou redzemuwa,” Iwe Muṋe washu wa ntika, ngauri u na lufuno." 
Psalms94:19 Musi mbilu yanga i tshi swa, wa nkhuthadza wa nthudza mbilu." 
Psalms94:20 Nṋa vhavhusi vhavhi vhane vha ḓivhetshela milayo ya vhukwila, vha nga konana na Iwe?" 
Psalms94:21 Vha luka vhunwa ha u fasha vha fulufhedzeaho, vha si na mulandu vha haṱulelwa lufu." 
Psalms94:22 Muṋe washu ndi Ene vhushavhelo hanga; Mudzimu wanga ndi Ene bako ḽi ntsireledzaho. 
Psalms94:23 Ú ḓo vha lifhedzela vhutshinyi havho, a vha fhedza nga mulandu wa vhuvhi havho. Mudzimu Muṋe washu u ḓo vha lozwa." 
Psalms95:1 Iḓani ri fhululedze Muṋe washu! Nga ri mu pembelele, Ene bako ḽi ri tshidzaho!" 
Psalms95:2 Nga ri swike phanḓa hawe ri mu rende, nga ri mu imbele ri pembele." 
Psalms95:3 Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu muhulu, ndi Khosi khulu i vhusaho midzimu yoṱhe." 
Psalms95:4 U vhusa u bva zwigodini zwa ḽifhasi u swika miṱombozwiloni ya dzithavha. 
Psalms95:5 Lwanzhe ndi lwawe, ndi Ene o lu sikaho, na shango ndi ḽawe, ḽo vhumbwa nga zwanḓa zwawe." 
Psalms95:6 Iḓani ri khothe ri mu luvhe, nga ri gwadamele Muṋe washu o ri vhumbaho." 
Psalms95:7 Hufha e Ene Mudzimu washu, riṋe rí vhathu vhawe, rí sambi ḽine a ḽi londola. Ngavhe ṋamusi ni tshi pfa ipfi ḽawe nandi!" 
Psalms95:8 U ri, “Ni songo ita tshipimbi unga no ita ni Miriba, ni songo dovha zwa ḽiḽa ḓuvha musi ni Masa phangani," 
Psalms95:9 he vhokhotsi aṋu vha nṱunga, vha nndinga, naho vho vhona zwe nda ita." 
Psalms95:10 Murafho wonouḽa ndo u nyala miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa, nda ri, ‘Ndi vhathu vha mbilu dzo bvaho ngonani, a vha funi u ḓivha nḓila dzanga.’" 
Psalms95:11 Nda ana ndo sinyuwa nda ri, ‘Vha nga si dzhene he nda vha ndi tshi ḓo vha awedza.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbelani Muṋe washu luimbo luswa, ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi imbele Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms96:2 Imbelani Muṋe washu, khoḓani dzina ḽawe, ḓivhadzani u tshidza hawe ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe." 
Psalms96:3 Anḓadzani vhugala hawe tshakhani dzoṱhe, ni ḓivhadze vhathu vhoṱhe mishumo yawe i mangadzaho." 
Psalms96:4 Muṋe washu ndi muhulu, o tewa nga thendo khulu, o fanela u ofhiwa u fhira midzimu yoṱhe." 
Psalms96:5 Hufha midzimu yoṱhe ya dzitshakha i si tshithu; hone Muṋe washu o sika ḽiṱaḓulu. 
Psalms96:6 Vhurena na vhugala zwi khae, fhethu hawe hukhethwa hu na maanḓa na lupenyo." 
Psalms96:7 Inwi tshakha dzoṱhe, iḓani ha Muṋe washu! Mu huliseni, mu luvheni, u na maanḓa." 
Psalms96:8 Rendani dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, zwo tea; ḓisani nduvho nḓuni yawe." 
Psalms96:9 Khothani Muṋe washu a tshi vhonadza lupenyo lwawe lukhethwa! Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi mu tetemele. 
Psalms96:10 Vhudzani dzitshakha ni ri, “Muṋe washu u a vhusa; shango ḽo tikwa, ḽi nga si sudzuluswe; u ḓo haṱula dzitshakha a sa ṱaluli.”" 
Psalms96:11 Ḽiṱaḓulu nga ḽi takale, ḽifhasi nga ḽi fhululedze, lwanzhe nga lu bvume na zwoṱhe zwi re khalwo;" 
Psalms96:12 masimu nga a pembele na zwoṱhe zwi re khao. Ndi hone miri yoṱhe ya ḓaka i tshi ḓo fhululedza; 
Psalms96:13 i ḓo imbela Muṋe washu ngauri u a ḓa; u ḓa u haṱula ḽifhasi. U ḓo haṱula shango a sa ṱaluli, dzitshakha u ḓo dzi haṱula nga khaṱhulo ya ngoho." 
Psalms97:1 Muṋe washu u a vhusa, ḽifhasi nga ḽi fhululedze! Mashango a kule nga a takale!" 
Psalms97:2 O tangwa nga makole na swiswi; khuluṋoni yawe yo tewa kha u fulufhedzea na khaṱhulo mbuya. 
Psalms97:3 Mulilo u mu ranga phanḓa, u fhisa maswina awe thungo dzoṱhe." 
Psalms97:4 Phenyo dzawe dzi tshi ri vhenge dzi vhonetshela shango; ḽifhasi ḽi tshi zwi vhona ḽi a tetemela. 
Psalms97:5 Dzithavha dzi ṋoka sa phula phanḓa ha Muṋe washu, phanḓa ha Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Psalms97:6 Ḽiṱaḓulu ḽi ḓivhadza u fulufhedzea hawe; tshakha dzoṱhe dzi vhona vhugala hawe. 
Psalms97:7 Vhoṱhe vha no rerelela zwifanyiso vha a shona; ndi vha no ṱongisa midzimu i si tshithu. Muṋe washu u gwadamelwa nga midzimu yoṱhe. 
Psalms97:8 Tsioni i tshi zwi pfa i a takala, miḓi ya Juda i a fhululedza, i tshi vhona khaṱhulo yau, Muṋe washu." 
Psalms97:9 Iwe Muṋe washu, u Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a no fhira zwoṱhe fhano fhasi; u muhulwane, u fhira midzimu yoṱhe." 
Psalms97:10 Vha funaho Muṋe washu nga vha nengwe vhuvhi; u londola vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho, a vha lamukisa zwanḓani zwa vhavhi." 
Psalms97:11 Hu si kale ḓuvha ḽa vha fulufhedzeaho ḽi ḓo bva, vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho vha pembela." 
Psalms97:12 Inwi vha fulufhedzeaho, takalelani Muṋe washu, mu rendeni, ḓivhani uri ndi mukhethwa!" 
Psalms98:1 Imbelani Muṋe washu luimbo luswa, o ita zwimangadzo! O kunda nga maanḓa awe, nga tshanḓa tshawe tshikhethwa." 
Psalms98:2 Muṋe washu o ri sumbedza gundo ḽawe, a dzumbululela dzitshakha u fulufhedzea hawe." 
Psalms98:3 U a fulufhedzea; zwe a fulufhedzisa Israele nga lufuno o zwi ita; ḽifhasi nga he ḽa kanda ḽo vhona gundo ḽa Mudzimu washu. 
Psalms98:4 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi ṱavhele Muṋe washu mukosi nga dakalo, nga ḽi mu huvhele mihuvho nga nyimbo." 
Psalms98:5 Imbelani Muṋe washu nga haripa, ni imbe ni tshi lidza haripa!" 
Psalms98:6 Pembelelani Khosi, Muṋe washu, ni tshi lidza porompiṱa na phalaphala!" 
Psalms98:7 Lwanzhe nga lu bvume na zwoṱhe zwi re khalwo; na shango na zwoṱhe zwi dzulaho khaḽo. 
Psalms98:8 Milambo nga i vhande zwanḓa; dzithavha nga dzi fhululedze," 
Psalms98:9 dzi imbele Muṋe washu; u khou ḓa u haṱula ḽifhasi. U ḓo haṱula shango a sa ṱaluli, tshakha u ḓo dzi haṱula nga khaṱhulo ya ngoho." 
Psalms99:1 Muṋe washu u a vhusa, tshakha nga dzi tetemele! O thukha kha khuluṋoni vhukati ha vhakherube; ḽifhasi nga ḽi dzinginyee!" 
Psalms99:2 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane Tsioni, ndi Ene Muvhusi muhulu wa tshakha dzoṱhe." 
Psalms99:3 Nga vha rende dzina ḽau ḽihulu ḽi ofhisaho. Ndí mukhethwa! 
Psalms99:4 U Khosi ya maanḓa i funaho khaṱhulo mbuya, ndi Iwe wo teaho khaṱhulo ya ngoho, wa funza Jakopo zwi re zwone na u fulufhedzea." 
Psalms99:5 Hulisani Mudzimu Muṋe washu, mu luvheni ni he milenzhe yawe ya kanda! Ndí mukhethwa!" 
Psalms99:6 Mushe na Aroni vho vha vhe vhotshifhe vhawe, Samuele na ene o vha a tshi mu rabela; vho vhidzelela Muṋe washu a vha aravha." 
Psalms99:7 O amba navho e kha phuphu ya gole, vha tevhedza zwe a vha laya, na ndaela dze a vha ṋea." 
Psalms99:8 Ndi ngoho, Mudzimu Muṋe washu, wo vha fhindula; wo vha Mudzimu a vha hangwelaho, naho wo vha u tshi vha lifhedzela vhukhakhi havho." 
Psalms99:9 Hulisani Mudzimu Muṋe washu, mu luvheni e thavhani yawe khethwa. Mudzimu Muṋe washu ndi mukhethwa!" 
Psalms100:1 Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe nga ḽi ṱavhele Muṋe washu mukosi nga dakalo. 
Psalms100:2 Shumelani Muṋe washu no takala; iḓani khae ni tshi fhululedza. 
Psalms100:3 Ḓivhani uri Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mudzimu! Ndi Ene o ri vhumbaho, riṋe ri vhathu vhawe, ri nngu dzine a dzi lisa." 
Psalms100:4 Dzhenani nga khoro dzawe ni tshi livhuha, ni dzhene miṱani yawe ni tshi mu renda; mu livhuheni ni rende dzina ḽawe." 
Psalms100:5 Muṋe washu u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu gumi, u ḓi fulufhedzea, zwi tshi ya nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms101:1 Tsha ndi imbe lwa vhuthu hau na khaṱhulo mbuya; tsha ndi u imbele, Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms101:2 Ndi ḓo ḓilonda nda tshila vhutshilo vhu sa solisei. Yowee, u ḓo nndalela lini? Ndi ḓo tshilisana na vha muṱa wanga ndí na luvalo lwo ṱambaho." 
Psalms101:3 Ndi nga si vhuye nda konḓelela zwo vhifhaho; zwiito zwa vhane vha gunea zwi nga si nnambatele. 
Psalms101:4 Ndi ḓo ḓiilisa vhuvhi nda furalela vhadziavhufhura. 
Psalms101:5 Mudziatshisolo ndi ḓo mu vala mulomo, a si tsha dovha; wa u ḓihudza na u ḓiḓivha a thi nga mu konḓeleli." 
Psalms101:6 Ndi ḓo konana na vhane vha fulufhedzea, nda dzula navho; a sa solisei u ḓo vha mulanda wanga." 
Psalms101:7 Ane a fhura ha nga dzuli muṱani wanga, ane a shanda mafhungo a nga si dzule hune nda mu vhona." 
Psalms101:8 Misi yoṱhe ḽi tshi tsha ndi ḓo tupula vhavhi vhoṱhe shangoni; ndi sudzulusa vhavhi vhoṱhe muḓini wa Muṋe washu. 
Psalms102:1 Muṋe washu, ipfa thabelo yanga; ngavhe mukosi wanga u tshi swika ha Iwe!" 
Psalms102:2 U songo mpfuralela musi wa khombo; nḓevhe yau nga i nthetshelese ndi tshi vhidzelela, ṱavhanya u mphindula." 
Psalms102:3 Maḓuvha anga a nyamalala unga vhutsi; muvhili wanga u tou duga," 
Psalms102:4 mbilu yanga yo oma, yo puta unga hatsi; ndi ita na u hangwa u ḽa." 
Psalms102:5 Ndo tou sala ndi lwatsi, nga u ṱavha mukosi ndi tshi gomela." 
Psalms102:6 Ndi nga tshikwitha phangani, gwitha matumbani," 
Psalms102:7 a thi fari khofhe; ndi nga tshiṋoni tsho salaho tshi tshoṱhe tshiuludzani tsha nnḓu. 
Psalms102:8 Maswina anga a nkolela ḓuvha ḽoṱhe; vha teketelana nga dzina ḽanga. 
Psalms102:9 Zwiḽiwa zwanga ndi milora; tshine nda nwa ndi tshi vanga na miṱodzi," 
Psalms102:10 nga ṅwambo wa mbiti dzau dzi ofhisaho. Wo nndoba wa mposa kule. 
Psalms102:11 Vhutshilo hanga vhu nga mirunzi ya nga madekwana i sa lengi u milwa nga vhusiku; ndi puta unga hatsi. 
Psalms102:12 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu wo dzula kha khuluṋoni lini na lini, mirafho na mirafho a i u hangwi." 
Psalms102:13 U ḓo takuwa wa khathutshela Tsioni; ndi tshone tshifhinga tshine wa ḓo u pfela vhuṱungu; tshifhinga tsho tiwaho tsho swika. 
Psalms102:14 Riṋe vhalanda vhau ri kha ḓi funa matombo awo, ri tshi vhona matumba awo ri a ṱungufhala." 
Psalms102:15 Tshakha dzi ḓo ofha dzina ḽau, Muṋe washu, mahosi oṱhe a ḽifhasi a ḓo tata vhugala hau," 
Psalms102:16 nga u vhona Muṋe washu o vusa Tsioni, e bvelele e kha lupenyo lwawe." 
Psalms102:17 Ha nga nyadzi khumbelo dza vho ṱangulwaho, u ḓo pfa thabelo dzavho." 
Psalms102:18 Hezwo nga zwi ṅwalelwe murafho u kha ḓi ḓaho, uri lushaka luswa lwa Muṋe washu lu mu rende lu ri," 
Psalms102:19 “Muṋe washu o sedza fhasi e hukhethwa ngei nṱha, a vhona ḽifhasi e ṱaḓulu," 
Psalms102:20 a pfa zwigomelo zwa mathubwa, a vhofholola vho haṱulelwaho lufu.”" 
Psalms102:21 Ndi zwine dzina ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓo ḓivhadzwa Tsioni, a rendwa Jerusalema," 
Psalms102:22 musi dzitshakha na mivhuso vha tshi kuvhanganela u luvha Muṋe washu. 
Psalms102:23 O mmvunḓa nungo ndi tshi kha ḓi vha nga hanga, a fhungudza maḓuvha anga." 
Psalms102:24 Ndi zwine ndi tshi amba nae nda ri, “Yawee, Mudzimu wanga, u songo nṱuwisa ndi sa athu kalaha; hufha Iwe u tshi tshila lini na lini." 
Psalms102:25 “Ḽifhasi wo ḽi tea kale-kale; ḽiṱaḓulu ndi mushumo wa zwanḓa zwau. 
Psalms102:26 Zwone zwi ḓo lovha, Iwe wa ḓi sala; zwoṱhe zwi ḓo ṱahala unga nguvho, wa bvula wa laṱa;" 
Psalms102:27 hone Iwe u ḓi dzula wo ralo, miṅwaha yau a i gumi." 
Psalms102:28 Vhana vhashu vha ḓo tshila nga mulalo, na vhaḓuhulu vhavho vha ḓo tsireledzwa nga Iwe.”" 
Psalms103:1 Kha ndi rende Muṋe washu nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, ndi khoḓe dzina ḽawe ḽikhethwa nga zwoṱhe zwine nda vha zwone." 
Psalms103:2 Kha ndi rende Muṋe washu nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, ndi si hangwe zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe a nnyitela." 
Psalms103:3 U nkhangwela milandu yanga yoṱhe, a fhodza maṱungu anga oṱhe." 
Psalms103:4 U ntshidza ndó ingamela tshalo; lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei, na tshilidzi, ndi tshone tshiala tshanga." 
Psalms103:5 U mpfusha nga zwivhuya, nda pfa ndo humela hanani, ndi na nungo dzi no nga dza goni ḽi tshi fhufha." 
Psalms103:6 Muṋe washu u lwela vhoṱhe vha kandeledzwaho, vha tshi hwelelwa a vha sengela." 
Psalms103:7 O ḓivhadza Mushe zwe a vha o dzudzanya, a sumbedza Vhaisraele mishumo yawe." 
Psalms103:8 Muṋe washu u na khathutshelo na tshilidzi, ha fheli mbilu, lufuno lwawe ndi luhulu, a lu dzinginyei;" 
Psalms103:9 ha dzuli a tshi sengisa vhathu, ha sinyuwi tshoṱhe;" 
Psalms103:10 ri tshi khakha ha ri rwi nga ṱhamu yo eḓanaho vhutshinyi hashu, ha vhili milandu yashu." 
Psalms103:11 Vhane vha mu ofha u vha funa nga lufuno luhulu, lwo hula unga lutombo lu nṱha-nṱha ha shango." 
Psalms103:12 Vhutshinyi hashu u vhu sudzulusela kule na riṋe, zwa nga vhubvaḓuvha vhu kule na vhukovhela." 
Psalms103:13 Muṋe washu u khathutshela vhane vha mu ofha, unga khotsi a tshi khathutshela vhana." 
Psalms103:14 U ḓivha tsiko yashu, ha hangwi uri ri buse." 
Psalms103:15 A vha muthu, vhutshilo hawe vhu nga hatsi; u aluwa unga dzuvha tsimuni," 
Psalms103:16 muya wa ḽi vhudzula ḽi a fa, he ḽa vha ḽi hone ha hangwiwa." 
Psalms103:17 Vhane vha ofha Muṋe washu u vha funa nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei lini na lini, a lwela na vhana vha vhana vhavho;" 
Psalms103:18 ndi vhane vha si pfuke mulanga wawe, vha ita zwine milayo yawe ya vha laya." 
Psalms103:19 Muṋe washu o imisa khuluṋoni yawe ḽiṱaḓulu, muvhuso wawe u vhusa vhoṱhe." 
Psalms103:20 Rendani Muṋe washu, inwi vharuṅwa vhawe, inwi vhahali vha maanḓa ni itaho zwine a amba, inwi ni mu thetshelesaho!" 
Psalms103:21 Rendani Muṋe washu, inwi mara awe oṱhe a ḽiṱaḓulu, inwi vhaḓinḓa vhawe vha itaho zwine a funa!" 
Psalms103:22 Rendani Muṋe washu, inwi zwisikwa zwawe zwoṱhe, hoṱhe-hoṱhe hune a vhusa. Na nṋe kha ndi rende Muṋe washu nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe!" 
Psalms104:1 Kha ndi rende Mudzimu wanga, u muhuluhulu! Wo ḓiputela nga vhurena na vhugala." 
Psalms104:2 Wo fuka tshedza unga nguvho; u akha lutombo unga dennde," 
Psalms104:3 wa fhaṱa pfamo yau nṱha ha maḓi a makoleni, wa namela makole a nga ndi gariki yau, wa fhufha nga phapha dza muya." 
Psalms104:4 Maḓumbu ndi vhone vhaḓinḓa vhau, khavhu dza mulilo ndi vhashumeli vhau." 
Psalms104:5 Wo fhaṱa shango nṱha ha muteo waḽo, ḽi nga si vhuye ḽa sudzuluswa." 
Psalms104:6 Wo ḽi fukedza lwanzhe lwa nga nguvho, maḓi a tiba dzithavha." 
Psalms104:7 Hone Iwe wo ri u kaidza, maḓi a shavha, a ri u pfa mubvumo wau a ṱuwa nga luvhilo;" 
Psalms104:8 a fhufha dzithavha nga nṱha, a tsela magovhani, fhethu he wa ri a ye hone." 
Psalms104:9 Wo a vhetshela mukano, a nga si u pfuke; ha tsha ḓo dovha a tibedza ḽifhasi." 
Psalms104:10 U ita uri zwisima zwi gubunyee, zwi ele milongani vhukati ha dzithavha." 
Psalms104:11 Zwi ṋea phukha dza ḓaka maḓi, mbiḓi dza dzimula ḓora." 
Psalms104:12 Zwiṋoni zwi fhaṱa zwiṱaha tsini ha maḓi; zwi imba vhukati ha matavhi. 
Psalms104:13 U shasha dzithavha u pfamoni yau ngei ṱaḓulu, ḽifhasi ḽa nwa la kama nga zwe wa ḽi ṋea." 
Psalms104:14 U medzela kholomo hatsi, vhathu wa vha medzela zwimela vha lima, ḽifhasi ḽa bveledza zwiḽiwa:" 
Psalms104:15 waini i no takadza mbilu ya muthu, mapfura a no penyisa tshifhaṱuwo tshawe, na vhuswa vhu no tika mbilu ya muthu." 
Psalms104:16 Miri ya Muṋe washu i sheledzwa ya pfelela, yone mikedara ya Libanoni ye a i ṱavha." 
Psalms104:17 Zwiṋoni zwi fhaṱa zwiṱaha zwazwo henefho, gololwane ḽa dzula ṱhodzini dzayo." 
Psalms104:18 Thavhani ndapfu hu dzula ngululu, mbila dzi dzumbama nngwani." 
Psalms104:19 Wo vhumba ṅwedzi, u kala ṅwaha ngawo; ḓuvha ḽi a ḓivha uri ḽi kovhela lini." 
Psalms104:20 U ḓisa swiswi ha vha vhusiku, phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka dza bvela nnḓa." 
Psalms104:21 Ndau dzi a vhomba dzi tshi zwima; dzi ṱoḓa zwiḽiwa zwadzo kha Mudzimu. 
Psalms104:22 Ḓuvha ḽi tshi bva dzi yo dzumbama, dza humela vhulaloni hadzo." 
Psalms104:23 Muthu u bva a yo shuma, a shuma u swika nga lufhimavhaeni." 
Psalms104:24 Muṋe washu, mishumo yau yo anda hani! Yoṱhe wo i ita nga vhuṱali; ḽifhasi ḽo ḓala zwivhumbwa zwau." 
Psalms104:25 Lwanzhe ngolu, lwo hula hani, lwo aṱama hani! Lu na mutshatshame wa zwivhumbwa zwi si na mbalo, zwi tshilaho, zwihulwane na zwiṱuku." 
Psalms104:26 Henefho zwikepe zwi a tshimbila, zwi tshi ṱuwa, zwi tshi vhuya, na Liviathani ḽe wa ḽi vhumbela u ḓimvumvusa ngaḽo." 
Psalms104:27 Zwoṱhe hezwo zwo lavhelesa Iwe, uri u zwi ṋee zwiḽiwa zwazwo nga tshifhinga tsho teaho." 
Psalms104:28 U tshi zwi ṋea zwi a doba; u tshi zwi pakulela zwi fushea nga zwithu zwavhuḓi. 
Psalms104:29 Arali wa zwi furalela, zwi a ofha; u tshi zwi dzhiela mufemo, zwi a fa, zwa vhuelela mavuni." 
Psalms104:30 U tshi rumela Muya wau, u a zwi sika, ḽifhasi ḽa dovha ḽa vha ḽiswa." 
Psalms104:31 Ngavhe vhugala ha Muṋe washu vhu tshi rendwa lini na lini; ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi takadzwa nga mishumo yawe. 
Psalms104:32 A tshi sedza ḽifhasi, ḽi a tetemela; a tshi kwama dzithavha, dzi duba vhutsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndi ḓo imbela Muṋe washu vhutshilo hanga hoṱhe; ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila ndi ḓo renda Mudzimu wanga nga nyimbo. 
Psalms104:34 Ngavhe zwine nda elekanya zwi tshi takadza Muṋe washu, unga na nṋe a tshi ntakadza." 
Psalms104:35 Vhatshinyi vhone ngavhe vha tshi nyamalala, vhavhi vha si tsha vha hone fhano shangoni. Kha ndi rende Muṋe washu! Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms105:1 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, mu rabeleni, ḓivhadzani dzitshakha mishumo yawe!" 
Psalms105:2 Mu imbeleni, mu rendeni nga dziphisalema, aneani mishumo yawe i kanukisaho!" 
Psalms105:3 Zuwani dzina ḽawe ḽikhethwa; mbilu dza vhane vha mu ṱoḓa nga dzi takale. 
Psalms105:4 Ṱoḓani Muṋe washu, u na maanḓa, lusani u dzula nae misi yoṱhe." 
Psalms105:5 Elelwani maḓembe e a ita, na zwiga zwawe, na zwe a amba a tshi haṱula," 
Psalms105:6 inwi vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu mulanda wawe, vhana vha Jakopo munangiwa wawe." 
Psalms105:7 Ndi Ene Mudzimu Muṋe washu, muvhuso wawe u ṱanganya ḽifhasi." 
Psalms105:8 Ha hangwi mulanga wawe na kathihi, zwe a fulufhedzisa zwi dzula zwo ralo, ha vhuya ha fhira mirafho ya zwigidi." 
Psalms105:9 Ndi mulanga we a vhofha na Abrahamu, a fulufhedzisa Isaka nga muano," 
Psalms105:10 a zwi khwaṱhisa a zwi ita mulayo misi ya Jakopo, wa vha mulanga wa lini na lini we a vhofha na Israele," 
Psalms105:11 a tshi ri, “Inwi ndi ḓo ni ṋea shango ḽa Kanana, ḽa vha ifa ḽaṋu ḽe nda ni kovhela.”" 
Psalms105:12 Zwiḽa vha tshi kha ḓi vha vhathu vha si gathi, vhe vhaṱuku sa muroho, vhe vhatsinda shangoni ḽeneḽo," 
Psalms105:13 vho tendeleka na dzitshakha, vha mona na mivhuso," 
Psalms105:14 a si tende na muthihi a tshi vha kandeledza, a kaidza mahosi a tshi itela vhone," 
Psalms105:15 a ri, “Ni songo kwama vhe nda vha shululela Muya wanga, ni songo huvhadza vhaporofita vhanga.”" 
Psalms105:16 O wisa nḓala shangoni, vha gotsha ḓula." 
Psalms105:17 O vha o no ḓi rangisa Josefa phanḓa, a rengiswa a vha phuli." 
Psalms105:18 Vho mu vhofha milenzhe nga dzigeḓane, vha mu tshipa mukulo nga tsimbi," 
Psalms105:19 ha vhuya ha itea zwe a porofita, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa sumba uri o ima ngohoni." 
Psalms105:20 Khosi yo ri a vhofhololwe, a vhofhololwa nga muvhusi wa dzitshakha," 
Psalms105:21 a mu ita mukoma wa nnḓu yawe, a langa thundu yawe yoṱhe," 
Psalms105:22 vhakoma vhawe a vha langa nga hune a funa, a funza vhahulwane vhuṱali." 
Psalms105:23 Zwenezwo na Vhaisraele vha pfulutshela Egipita, Jakopo a vha ṱhunḓu shangoni ḽa Hamu." 
Psalms105:24 Muṋe washu a andisa vhathu vhawe, vha anda u fhira maswina avho;" 
Psalms105:25 a vhuya a shandula mbilu dzavho, vha vhenga vhathu vhawe, vha itela vhalanda vhawe vhukwila." 
Psalms105:26 Ndi hone a tshi ruma Mushe muḓinḓa wawe, na Aroni we a mu nanga," 
Psalms105:27 vha sumbedza Vhaegipita zwiga nga maḓembe e a amba, vha ita zwimangadzo shangoni ḽa Hamu:" 
Psalms105:28 A ḓisa swiswi, shango ḽa swifhala ḽe nzwii, vhone vha si vhuye vha tenda zwe a amba;" 
Psalms105:29 a shandukisa maḓi a vha malofha, khovhe dzavho dza fa;" 
Psalms105:30 shango ḽavho ḽa ḓala zwiḓula, dza dzhena na pfamoni dza musanda;" 
Psalms105:31 a amba, ha ḓa guma ḽa phuvhe, na vhunyunyu, ha ḓadza shango;" 
Psalms105:32 a vha nisela tshifhango, a ḓisa phenyo dza vhonetshela shango ḽoṱhe;" 
Psalms105:33 a moḓisa minḓirivhe na mihuyu yavho, miri ya shango ḽavho a i vunḓekanya;" 
Psalms105:34 a amba ha wa magerere, ha ḓa vhuukhula vhu si na mbalo," 
Psalms105:35 dza ḽa miri yoṱhe ya shango, dza fhedza khaṋo yavho;" 
Psalms105:36 a fhedza nga u vhulaha matanzhe oṱhe shangoni ḽavho, yone mitshelo ya u ranga ya vhaṱhannga vhavho." 
Psalms105:37 O vhofholola Vhaisraele, vha pfuluwa vho hwala siliva na musuku, hu si vhe na tsaleli na nthihi;" 
Psalms105:38 Vhaegipita vha takalela u ṱuwa havho nge vha vha vha tshi vha ofhesa. 
Psalms105:39 Muṋe washu a vha tsireledza nga gole, vhusiku a vha vhonetshela nga mulilo." 
Psalms105:40 Vha mu humbela a vha ḓisela dzikhwali, a vha fusha nga vhuswa vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu;" 
Psalms105:41 a fhandula tombo, maḓi a gubunyea, ha ela mulambo phangani." 
Psalms105:42 A elelwa mulanga wawe mukhethwa we a vhofha na Abrahamu mulanda wawe. 
Psalms105:43 O endedza vhathu vhawe nga dakalo, vhanangiwa vhawe vha enda vha tshi fhululedza." 
Psalms105:44 A vha ṋea mashango a dzitshakha, vha vha maḽaifa a zwe vhaṅwe vha zwi bvela biko." 
Psalms105:45 Hezwo o zwi itela uri vha nambatele ndaela dzawe, vha vhulunge milayo yawe. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Livhuhani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei lini na lini." 
Psalms106:2 Ndi nnyi ane a nga kona u ḓivhadza mishumo ya Muṋe washu ya maanḓa, kana a mu renda lu sa vhilaedzi?" 
Psalms106:3 Vha na mashudu vha sa fhidzi u ita zwi re zwone, vha no dzula vha tshi fulufhedzea kha zwoṱhe zwine vha ita." 
Psalms106:4 Muṋe washu, nnyelelwe musi u tshi tonda vhathu vhau, nkhumbule-vho musi u tshi vha tshidza," 
Psalms106:5 uri ndi ḓiphiṋe-vho nga mashudu a vhanangiwa vhau, ndi takale na lushaka lwau, ndi u rende ndi na vhathu vhau vhe wa ḓinangela." 
Psalms106:6 Ro tshinya unga vhokhotsi ashu, ro ita zwo vhifhaho, ra ḓiovhela mulandu." 
Psalms106:7 Zwiḽa vhokhotsi ashu vhe Egipita a vho ngo vhuya vha londa maḓembe e wa ita, vho hangwa vhuthu vhuhulu he wa vha itela, vho u shandukela vha tshi swika Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga." 
Psalms106:8 Hone Ene a vha tshidza a tshi itela dzina ḽawe, uri maanḓa awe mahulu a ḓivhiwe." 
Psalms106:9 O kaidza Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga lwa xa, a vha endedza dzivhani ha nga phangani ho omaho." 
Psalms106:10 O vha lamulela zwanḓani zwa maswina, a vha tshidza kha vha no vha vhenga," 
Psalms106:11 maḓi a kumba maswina avho, ha si vhe na a salaho." 
Psalms106:12 Ndi hone vha tshi tenda zwe a vha fulufhedzisa, vha mu renda nga nyimbo." 
Psalms106:13 A vho ngo lenga u hangwa zwe a ita, a vho ngo lindela nyeletshedzo yawe." 
Psalms106:14 Ngei phangani vho lilela zwe vha zwi emula, vha linga Mudzimu sogani;" 
Psalms106:15 Ene a vha ṋea zwe vha zwi lilela, ha vha u ḓiovhela vhulwadze ha vha ṱahadza." 
Psalms106:16 Ngei mishashani yavho vho vhivha Mushe na Aroni we a vha o kumedzwa Mudzimu," 
Psalms106:17 ḽifhasi ḽa mbo aṱama ḽa mila Dathani, ḽa swiṱa tshigwada tsha Abiramu;" 
Psalms106:18 mulilo wa fhisa tshigwada tshavho tshoṱhe, vhavhi vhe lore nga khavhu." 
Psalms106:19 Thavhani ya Horebe vha vhumba mbohwana, vha gwadamela tshifanyiso tsho fulwaho," 
Psalms106:20 vha furalela Muṋe washu, Ene vhugala havho, vha luvha tshifanyiso tsha mboho, ine ya fula hatsi." 
Psalms106:21 Vho hangwa Mudzimu we a vha tshidza, Ene we a vha itela zwihulu shangoni ḽa Egipita," 
Psalms106:22 a vha itela maḓembe shangoni ḽa Hamu, na mishumo i ofhisaho Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga." 
Psalms106:23 Ndi zwe a ri u ḓo vha lozwa; hone Mushe, muḓinḓa wawe we a mu nanga, a tou ima phanḓa hawe, uri a dzikise mbiti dzawe a si vha lozwe." 
Psalms106:24 Zwenezwo vha nyadza shango ḽiḽa ḽavhuḓi, vha si tende zwe a vha fulufhedzisa," 
Psalms106:25 vha gungula vhe ngomu denndeni dzavho, vha si thetshelese Muṋe washu." 
Psalms106:26 Ndi zwe a ana o imisa tshanḓa, a ri u ḓo vha wisa phangani," 
Psalms106:27 vhaḓuhulu vhavho u ḓo vha wisa vhukati ha dzitshakha, a vha balanganya na mashango." 
Psalms106:28 Vha vhuya vha ḓihwesa dzhogo ya Baali wa Phioro, vha ḽa zwiṱhavhelo zwo sumelwaho midzimu i sa tshili;" 
Psalms106:29 vha ṱunga Muṋe washu nga zwiito zwavho zwivhi, a sinyuwa, vha welwa nga dwadze." 
Psalms106:30 Huno Finiasi a takutshedza a vha laṱisa, dwadze ḽa mbo fhufha;" 
Psalms106:31 ndi zwe a pfi u a fulufhedzea, nga mirafho na mirafho, lini na lini." 
Psalms106:32 Musi vhe zwisimani zwa Miriba vho ṱunga Muṋe washu, Mushe a welwa nga khombo nga mulandu wavho;" 
Psalms106:33 nge vha shandukela Muya wa Mudzimu, Mushe a sokou amba a si tsha londa." 
Psalms106:34 A vho ngo tsha lozwa tshakha dza vhannḓa sa zwe Muṋe washu a vha laya," 
Psalms106:35 vha mbo ḓi vangana navho, vha edzisa maitele avho," 
Psalms106:36 vha luvha midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso, ya vho vha tshikwekwe tshavho." 
Psalms106:37 Vha vhuya vha dzhia vhana vhavho vha vhatuka vha vha ita zwiṱhavhelo, vha vhasidzana vha vha ṱhavhela madimoni." 
Psalms106:38 Vha fhaladza malofha a vha si na mulandu, malofha a vhana vhavho, vhatukana na vhasidzana vha vha ita zwiṱhavhelo zwa midzimu ya Kanana, shango ḽa kumadzwa nga malofha." 
Psalms106:39 Vho ḓikumadza nga zwe vha ita, vha vho shandukela Muṋe washu." 
Psalms106:40 Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a sinyutshela vhathu vhawe, a sanda lushaka lwawe," 
Psalms106:41 a vha kumedza tshakha dza vhannḓa, vha vhuswa nga maswina avho;" 
Psalms106:42 maswina a vha tambudza, a vha langa." 
Psalms106:43 Ndi kanzhi a tshi vha lamukisa, vhone vha ḓi mu shandukela, vha mbwandamela vhuvhini havho." 
Psalms106:44 Hone Ene a tshi vhona khombo dzo vha welaho, a tshi pfa tshililo tshavho," 
Psalms106:45 a elelwa mulanga wawe we a vhofha navho, a vha pfela vhuṱungu; u na lufuno luhulu, lu sa tseki;" 
Psalms106:46 a ita uri vhoṱhe vho vha thubaho vha vha khathutshele. 
Psalms106:47 Yawee, Mudzimu Muṋe washu, ri tshidze! Ri bvise vhukati ha dzitshakha, u ri kuvhanganye, ri kone u renda dzina ḽau ḽikhethwa, ri tou ḓiphiṋa nga u u livhuha." 
Psalms106:48 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa Israele, u bva tsha kale na kale, na lini na lini! Vhathu vhoṱhe nga vha ri, “Amen!” Haleluya! Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms107:1 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei lini na lini." 
Psalms107:2 Vho tshidzwaho nga Muṋe washu nga vha ralo; o vha vhofholola zwanḓani zwa maswina," 
Psalms107:3 a vha vhuisa hayani vha tshi bva mashangoni asili, vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela, devhula na tshipembe." 
Psalms107:4 Vhaṅwe vho tendeleka phangani na masogani, vha sa wani nḓila ya u ya muḓini hu no dzula vhathu," 
Psalms107:5 vha farwa nga nḓala na ḓora, vha ṋoka." 
Psalms107:6 Vho vhidzelela Muṋe washu vhe khomboni, a vha tshidza kha zwi konḓaho," 
Psalms107:7 a vha endedza nḓilani yo touho tswititi, a vha swikisa muḓini hu no dzula vhathu." 
Psalms107:8 Nga vha livhuhe lufuno lwa Muṋe washu lu sa dzinginyei, na mishumo yawe i mangadzaho ye a itela vhathu." 
Psalms107:9 O vha dzimula ḓora, vha na nḓala a vha fusha nga zwithu zwavhuḓi." 
Psalms107:10 Vhaṅwe vho dzula swiswini ho tou nzwii, zwivhotshwa zwi tshi teta zwo vhoxwa nga dzigeḓane," 
Psalms107:11 nge vha lwa na milayo ya Mudzimu, vha nyadza nyeletshedzo ya Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu;" 
Psalms107:12 a mbo lemedza mbilu dzavho nga u vha konḓisela vhutshilo, vha wa ha si vhe na a vha vusaho;" 
Psalms107:13 vha vhidzelela Muṋe washu vhe khomboni, a vha tshidza kha zwi konḓaho," 
Psalms107:14 a vha bvisa swiswini ho tou nzwii, a khathula dzigeḓane dzo vha vhofhaho." 
Psalms107:15 Nga vha livhuhe lufuno lwa Muṋe washu lu sa dzinginyei na mishumo yawe i mangadzaho ye a itela vhathu. 
Psalms107:16 O pwashekanya mahothi a musinaseṱha, a vunḓekanya mabaphathi a tsimbi e a vha o vha pata." 
Psalms107:17 Vhaṅwe vho tsilufhala vha shandukela Mudzimu, a vha tambudzela milandu yavho," 
Psalms107:18 vha nengwa zwiḽiwa zwoṱhe vha ṱoḓou fa; 
Psalms107:19 vha vhidzelela Muṋe washu vhe khomboni, a vha tshidza kha zwi konḓaho;" 
Psalms107:20 a vha fhodza nga ipfi ḽawe, a vha tshidza lufuni." 
Psalms107:21 Nga vha livhuhe lufuno lwa Muṋe washu lu sa dzinginyei na mishumo yawe i mangadzaho ye a itela vhathu. 
Psalms107:22 Nga vha mu livhuhe nga u mu ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, vha anḓadze mishumo yawe nga mifhululu." 
Psalms107:23 Vhaṅwe vha enda lwanzheni nga zwikepe, vhavhambadzi vha tshimbila maḓini mahulu." 
Psalms107:24 Ndi hone he vha vhona mishumo ya Muṋe washu, vha vhona zwimangadzo zwawe mativhani." 
Psalms107:25 O ri u amba ḓumbu ḽa vuwa, ḽa takusa magabelo a lwanzhe;" 
Psalms107:26 zwikepe zwa rahiswa nṱha zwa swika makoleni, zwa dovha zwa tsela fhasi tivhani, vha kulea nungo nga nyofho." 
Psalms107:27 Zwa goba-goba zwa pepeleka unga vhathu vho kambiwaho, maano avho oṱhe a dzima;" 
Psalms107:28 vha vhidzelela Muṋe washu vhe khomboni, a vha ṋula kha zwi konḓaho." 
Psalms107:29 A dzikisa ḓumbu he dzokoto, magabelo a lwanzhe e tshete," 
Psalms107:30 ha dzika, vha takala, a vha endedza vha swika hune vha ya." 
Psalms107:31 Nga vha livhuhe lufuno lwa Muṋe washu lu sa dzinginyei, na mishumo yawe i mangadzaho ye a itela vhathu," 
Psalms107:32 vha mu hulise vhathu vho kuvhangana, vha mu rende khoroni ya vhahulwane." 
Psalms107:33 U shandukisa milambo ya vha phanga, zwisima zwa maḓi zwa xa," 
Psalms107:34 tsimu yo nonelaho ya bva nga mulandu wa vhavhi vho dzulaho henefho. 
Psalms107:35 U shandukisa phanga ya vha mihuvhi ya maḓi, mavuni o omaho ha phulea zwisima zwi elaho;" 
Psalms107:36 henefho a vhea vha ṋokaho nga nḓala, vha fhaṱa muḓi vha dzula khawo," 
Psalms107:37 vha lima masimu, vha ṱavha minḓirivhe, vha wana khaṋo khulu;" 
Psalms107:38 a vha shudufhadza vha ḓi anda vha tshi ya, na thakha yavho i si fhungudzee." 
Psalms107:39 Huno musi vha tshi fhungudzea, vha tshi vho shaya nungo nga u kandeledzwa na dzikhombo na maṱungu," 
Psalms107:40 a nyadzisa vhaḓivhalea, a vha balanganya vha sokou tendeleka sogani," 
Psalms107:41 a takusa vhashai vha bva maṱunguni avho, miṱa yavho ya anda unga maṱambi." 
Psalms107:42 Vha sí na vhufhura vha tshi zwi vhona vha a takala, vhavhi zwi tshi vha somela." 
Psalms107:43 Wa vhuṱali nga a zwi dzhiele nzhele, a vhone zwine Muṋe washu a ita nga lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei." 
Psalms108:1 Mudzimu, ndo rudza mbilu. Ndi ḓo imba nda u renda; mbilu yanga i tama zwenezwo." 
Psalms108:2 Haripa na mbila, vuwani! Ndi ḓo vusa mapfuvhi!" 
Psalms108:3 Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo u renda tshakha dzi tshi zwi pfa, ndi ḓo u imbela vhukati ha dzitshakha." 
Psalms108:4 Lufuno lwau lu ṋanzwa makole, u fulufhedzea hau hu swika lutomboni." 
Psalms108:5 Mudzimu, hula u fhire makole, vhugala hau vhu alame ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe!" 
Psalms108:6 Ri fhindule u ri tshidze nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa, u lamukise vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho." 
Psalms108:7 Mudzimu o amba e fhethu hawe hukhethwa a ri, “Ndi ḓo kunda maswina nda kovha Shikheme, Govha ḽa Sukotho nda ḽi kovhekanya;" 
Psalms108:8 Giliadi ndi ḽanga, na shango ḽa Manase; Efraimi ndi nguwane yanga, luḓo lwanga lwa vhuhosi ndi Juda;" 
Psalms108:9 Muaba ndi sambelo ḽanga; Edomo ndi posa navhula yanga, ha vha u sumbedza uri ndi ḽanga; ndi ṱavha mukosi wa gundo ndi Filista.”" 
Psalms108:10 Ndi nnyi a no ḓo ntswikisa Edomo, nda dzhena musanda waho wo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo?" 
Psalms108:11 Ndi nnyi arali e si Iwe Mudzimu? Hone zwino wo ri laṱa, Mudzimu, hufha u si tsha tshimbila na mmbi dzashu." 
Psalms108:12 Iḓa u ri phalale musi wa khombo, muthu ha farisi tshithu." 
Psalms108:13 Rí na Mudzimu ri ḓo lwa sa vhahali, Ene u ḓo kandekanya maswina ashu." 
Psalms109:1 Mudzimu, ndi ḓi u renda, u songa fhumula." 
Psalms109:2 Vhavhi vha vhufhura vha khou mpomoka, a vha nnyambi zwavhuḓi, vha a nnzwifhelela;" 
Psalms109:3 vha ntanga nga maipfi a vengo, vha lwa na nṋe ndi si na tshe nda tshinya." 
Psalms109:4 Vha lifhedza vhukonani hanga nga vhuswina, nṋe ngeno ndi tshi vha rabelela;" 
Psalms109:5 vha lifhedza zwivhuya zwanga nga zwivhi, lufuno vha lu lifhedza nga vengo. Vha ri," 
Psalms109:6 “Mu livhanye na muhaṱuli muvhi, mupomoki a mu ise tsengoni!" 
Psalms109:7 A tshi sengiswa nga a vhonwe mulandu, na thabelo yawe nga i pfi ndi vhukhakhi." 
Psalms109:8 Ngavhe maḓuvha awe a tshi vha mapfufhi, mushumo wawe wa dzhiwa nga muṅwe." 
Psalms109:9 Vhana vhawe ngavhe vha tshi vha tsiwana, musadzi a vha tshilikadzi," 
Psalms109:10 vhana vhawe vha tendeleka naḽo vha singila, vha thathwa matumbani hune vha dzula hone," 
Psalms109:11 ane a mu adzima thundu a mu kumbulula, vhatsinda vha thukhutha mitshelo ya biko ḽawe," 
Psalms109:12 hu si vhe na ane a mu itela vhuthu, kana a khathutshela tsiwana dzawe." 
Psalms109:13 Ngavhe vhana vhawe vha tshi fa vha fhela, dzina ḽavho ḽa si tsha vhidzwa kha mirafho i ḓaho." 
Psalms109:14 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a sa hangwi milandu ya vhokhotsi awe, na vhutshinyi ha mme awe ha si thuthwe," 
Psalms109:15 Muṋe washu a si vhuye a zwi hangwa, a ite uri vha si tsha mu elelwa fhano shangoni." 
Psalms109:16 Ho ngo vhuya a itela vhaṅwe vhuthu, tshawe ho vha hu u tovhola vhaheḓana na vhashai na vho kuleaho nungo vha vhuya vha fa." 
Psalms109:17 O funesa u teketela vhaṅwe, khombo nga i mu wele-vho; ho ngo takalela vhaṅwe vha tshi wana mashudu, na ene a songo a wana." 
Psalms109:18 O ambara maṱamba unga nguvho, eneo ngavhe a tshi nwelela malani awe, a nwelela maramboni awe unga mapfura;" 
Psalms109:19 ngavhe a tshi nga nguvho ye a ambara, a nga muzwa une a ḓivhofha misi yoṱhe.”" 
Psalms109:20 Vha mpomokaho na vhane vha nnyisela phungo, ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha lifhedza nga zwenezwo!" 
Psalms109:21 Hone Iwe Muṋe washu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ntonde u tshi itela dzina ḽau. Hufha u na vhuthu, lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, ntshidze!" 
Psalms109:22 Thi na wanga, ndi mushai, mbilu yanga i na matsivha." 
Psalms109:23 Ndi nyamalala unga murunzi nga madekwana, nda fhufhurwa unga nzie." 
Psalms109:24 Khokhola dzanga dzi a lepalepa nga u ḓidzima zwiḽiwa, ndo ita na u fhelela." 
Psalms109:25 Ndi tou vha tshikonelo tshavho; vha tshi mmbona vha dzungudza ṱhoho. 
Psalms109:26 Wa mpfarisaa, Mudzimu Muṋe washu! Ntshidze, hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei." 
Psalms109:27 Vha sumbedze uri zwo itwa nga Iwe, ndi Iwe Muṋe washu wo zwi itaho." 
Psalms109:28 Vha litshe vha teketele, tenda Iwe u tshi ntshudufhadza. Vha tshi mmvutshela vha shonise, nṋe mulanda wau ndi takale." 
Psalms109:29 Ngavhe vhapomoki vhanga vha tshi nyadzea, vha dzula vho ambara ṱhoni unga tshiambaro." 
Psalms109:30 Ndi ḓo livhuha Muṋe washu zwinzhi, nda mu renda ho kuvhanganiwa." 
Psalms109:31 Ú tika mushai, a mu tshidza zwanḓani zwa vha mu haṱulelaho lufu." 
Psalms110:1 Muṋe washu o vhudza khosi muṋe wanga, a ri, “Dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tshanga, ri vhuse roṱhe, ndi vhuye ndi ite maswina au vhukando ha milenzhe yau.”" 
Psalms110:2 Muṋe washu u ḓo u fha luḓo lwa vhuhosi e Tsioni, ha vha u sumbedza maanḓa au a vhuhosi. Ndi zwone, vhusa maswina au." 
Psalms110:3 Vhathu vhau vha ḓo vha na dzangalelo ḽa u yo lwa musi u tshi bva pfumo. Vhaṱhannga vhau vha ḓo ḓa ha iwe vhó anda unga ṅwando wo bebwaho nga mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka, vhó ḓiṱama nga vhugala vhukhethwa." 
Psalms110:4 Muṋe washu o ana, a nga si tsha shanduka, u ri, “U Tshifhe wa lini na lini nga maitele a Melkitsedeke.”" 
Psalms110:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u u tika nga maanḓa awe; musi wa mbiti dzawe u ḓo kuyekanya mahosi; 
Psalms110:6 u ḓo haṱula dzitshakha, a khokha vhafu, a kuyekanya vhavhusi vha ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Psalms110:7 U ḓo nwa maḓi mulambwanani wa tsini ha nḓila, wa wana maanḓa, wa kunda." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Ndi ḓo livhuha Muṋe washu nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe ndí tshivhidzoni, hó kuvhangana vha si na vhufhura." 
Psalms111:2 Mishumo ya Muṋe washu yo hula hani, i elekanyiwa nga vhane vha i takalela." 
Psalms111:3 Mishumo yawe ndi ya vhurena na vhugala; u a fulufhedzea lini na lini. 
Psalms111:4 O ita uri zwimangadzo zwe a shuma zwi si hangwiwe. Muṋe washu u na tshilidzi na khathutshelo. 
Psalms111:5 Vhane vha mu ofha u vha ṋea zwiḽiwa; ha hangwi mulanga wawe na kathihi. 
Psalms111:6 O sumbedza vhathu vhawe maanḓa awe nga mishumo yawe a tshi vha ṋea mashango a dziṅwe tshakha. 
Psalms111:7 Ú shuma nga u fulufhedzea, ha iti zwa vhufhura, milayo yawe yoṱhe ndi ya ngoho." 
Psalms111:8 A i tseki lini na lini; yo tewa ngohoni, a i khakhi." 
Psalms111:9 O vhofholola vhathu vhawe, a vhofha navho mulanga wa lini na lini. Dzina ḽawe ndi ḽikhethwa, ḽi ofhisa hani!" 
Psalms111:10 U ofha Muṋe washu ndi tshone tshisima tsha vhuṱali; vha no tevhedza milayo yawe vha na ṱhalukanyo. Thendo yawe ndi ya lini na lini. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! U na mashudu ane a ofha Muṋe washu, a takalela milayo yawe." 
Psalms112:2 Vhana vhawe vha ḓo vha vhahulwane shangoni, mirafho yoṱhe ya vha si na vhufhura i ḓo vha na mashudu." 
Psalms112:3 Ú ḓo khokha madzanga na lupfumo nḓuni yawe, u a fulufhedzea lini na lini." 
Psalms112:4 Vha si na vhufhura vha vhonetshelwa nga tshedza swiswini; vha na tshilidzi na khathutshelo, vha a fulufhedzea." 
Psalms112:5 Mapakulile zwi ḓo mu nakela; u tshimbidza mafhungo nga u fulufhedzea. 
Psalms112:6 Ngoho a no fulufhedzea ha tupulei, vha ḓo mu elelwa lini na lini." 
Psalms112:7 A tshi pfa mavhi ha nga ofhi; mbilu yawe a i tseki, i fulufhela Muṋe washu." 
Psalms112:8 Mbilu yawe a i tseki, ha ofhi tshithu; u ḓo fhedza nga u kunda maswina awe." 
Psalms112:9 Ndi mapakulile, u tonda vhashai, u a fulufhedzea lini na lini; u ḓo ombelwa shambo a huliswa." 
Psalms112:10 Muvhi u ḓo ri u zwi vhona, zwa mu dina, a shenganya maṋo nga mbiti, a fhelela. Zwe muvhi a zwi lavhelela a zwi nga vuwi zwo itea." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Rendani, inwi vhalanda vha Muṋe washu, rendani dzina ḽa Muṋe ashu!" 
Psalms113:2 Nga hu rendwe dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, u bva zwino na lini na lini." 
Psalms113:3 Dzina ḽa Muṋe washu nga ḽi rendwe u thoma vhubvaḓuvha u swika vhukovhela! 
Psalms113:4 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, u vhusa tshakha dzoṱhe, vhugala hawe vhu fhira ḽiṱaḓulu." 
Psalms113:5 Ndi nnyi ane a nga Mudzimu Muṋe washu, ane a dzula ngei ṱaḓulu," 
Psalms113:6 a sedza ngeno fhasi kule-kule, a vhona ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi?" 
Psalms113:7 U vusa mutshinyali buseni, a takusa mushai ḓaleḓaleni," 
Psalms113:8 a vha dzudza na vhaḓivhalea, vhaḓivhalea vha vhathu vhawe." 
Psalms113:9 U ṋea muumba haya, a vha mme a vhana, a takala. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms114:1 Zwiḽa Vhaisraele vha tshi pfuluwa Egipita, muṱa wa Jakopo u tshi ṱutshela vhathu vha luambo lusili," 
Psalms114:2 Juda o vha ene hukhethwa ha Mudzimu, Israele a vha muvhuso wawe." 
Psalms114:3 Lwanzhe lwo ri u zwi vhona lwa shavha, Jorodani wa ela u tshi humela murahu," 
Psalms114:4 dzithavha dza thamuwa unga dzithutha, zwikwara zwa khana unga ngwana." 
Psalms114:5 Iwe lwanzhe, u shavhani? Iwe Jorodani, u humelani?" 
Psalms114:6 Inwi dzithavha, ni thamutshelani unga dzithutha? Inwi zwikwara, ni khanelani unga ngwana?" 
Psalms114:7 Iwe ḽifhasi, tetemela u tshi vhona Ene Muṋe wazwo, u tshi vhona Mudzimu wa Jakopo;" 
Psalms114:8 o shandukisa tombo ḽa vha muhuvhi, ḽiangahwe ḽe ḽa vha ḽo tou te, ḽa vha zwisima zwa maḓi." 
Psalms115:1 Hu songo rendwa riṋe, Muṋe washu, hu songo rendwa riṋe, nga hu rendwe dzina ḽau, hu tshi itelwa lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei na u fulufhedzea hau." 
Psalms115:2 U tendelani tshakha dzi tshi ri, “Mudzimu wavho u ngafhi?”" 
Psalms115:3 Hufha Mudzimu washu e ṱaḓulu, a tshi ita zwine a funa." 
Psalms115:4 Yavho midzimu ndi ya siliva na musuku, yo itwa nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu." 
Psalms115:5 I na milomo i sa ambi, na maṱo a sa vhoni;" 
Psalms115:6 i na nḓevhe dzi sa pfi, na ningo dzi sa femi;" 
Psalms115:7 zwanḓa zwayo a zwi koni u fara, milenzhe a i tshimbili, magulokulo ha bvisi ipfi." 
Psalms115:8 Vhavhumbi vhayo vha ḓo fana nayo, na vhoṱhe vhane vha i fulufhela." 
Psalms115:9 Israele, fulufhela Muṋe washu, ndi Ene Mutiki wau na tshiṱangu tshau." 
Psalms115:10 Nnḓu ya Aroni, fulufhelani Muṋe washu, ndi Ene Mutiki waṋu na tshiṱangu tshaṋu." 
Psalms115:11 Inwi ni ofhaho Muṋe washu, mu fulufheleni, ndi Ene Mutiki waṋu na tshiṱangu tshaṋu." 
Psalms115:12 Muṋe washu ha ri hangwi, u ḓo ri shudufhadza; u ḓo shudufhadza nnḓu ya Israele, a shudufhadza nnḓu ya Aroni;" 
Psalms115:13 u ḓo shudufhadza vhane vha ofha Muṋe washu, vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku." 
Psalms115:14 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ita uri ni ande, inwi na vhana vhaṋu." 
Psalms115:15 Ngavhe ni tshi shudufhadzwa nga Muṋe washu, Ene o sikaho ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
Psalms115:16 Ḽiṱaḓulu ndi ḽa Muṋe washu e eṱhe, ḽifhasi ḽone o ḽi ṋea vhathu." 
Psalms115:17 Vhafu, na vho tselaho vhudzulavhafu, a vha tsha renda Muṋe washu." 
Psalms115:18 Hone riṋe ri ḓo renda Muṋe washu zwino na lini na lini. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms116:1 Muṋe washu ndi a mu funa, u pfa mukosi wanga." 
Psalms116:2 O nthetshelesa, ndi ḓo ḓi mu vhidzelela ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila." 
Psalms116:3 Ndo vha ndo tandwa nga thambo dza lufu, ndó no ingamela tshalo, ndó no farwa nga nyofho, na khombo na u ḽa mbilu," 
Psalms116:4 nda ḓi vhidzelela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, nda ri, “Muṋe washu, ntshidze!”" 
Psalms116:5 Muṋe washu u na tshilidzi, u a fulufhedzea, Mudzimu washu u na khathutshelo." 
Psalms116:6 Muṋe washu u tsireledza vha si na nungo; nde ndo rambaladzwa a ḓi ntshidza. 
Psalms116:7 Kha ndi dovhe ndi rudze mbilu, hufha Muṋe washu o nnyitela vhuthu." 
Psalms116:8 Iwe Muṋe washu, wo nṋula lufuni, wa mphumula miṱodzi, wa ntika nda si tsha khukhulwa;" 
Psalms116:9 ndi ḓo tshila ndi tshi vhonwa nga Muṋe washu, ndí shangoni ḽa vhapenyu." 
Psalms116:10 Nangwe ndi tshi ri, “Ndo kuyekanywa tshoṱhe!” a tho ngo litsha u fulufhela." 
Psalms116:11 Zwiḽa ndi nyofhoni ndo ri, “Vhathu vhoṱhe ndi vhadzia-u-zwifha!”" 
Psalms116:12 Zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a nnyitela ndi nga mu lifhela ngani? 
Psalms116:13 Ndi ḓo livhuha zwe Muṋe washu a ntshidza nga u mu ṋekedza nduvho ya tshinwelo tsha waini, nda rabela dzina ḽawe;" 
Psalms116:14 ndi ḓo khunyeledza zwe nda anela Muṋe washu vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona. 
Psalms116:15 Muṋe washu u vhona lufu lwa vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho zwi si zwithu zwiṱuku. 
Psalms116:16 Muṋe washu, ngoho ndi mulanda wau, ndi mushumeli wau, ndo bebwa nga mushumeli wau wa musadzi; wo vhofholola geḓane dze dza vha dzo mmbofha." 
Psalms116:17 Ndi ḓo u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwa ndivhuho, nda rabela dzina ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms116:18 Ndi ḓo khunyeledza zwe nda anela Muṋe washu vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Psalms116:19 miṱani ya nnḓu ya Muṋe washu, ngomu hau, iwe Jerusalema. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms117:1 Rendani Muṋe washu, inwi tshakha dzoṱhe, mu khoḓeni, inwi vhathu noṱhe!" 
Psalms117:2 U ri funa nga lufuno lu sa dzinginyei; Muṋe washu u a fulufhedzea lini na lini. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms118:1 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu fheli." 
Psalms118:2 Vhaisraele kha vha ri, “Lufuno lwawe a lu fheli.”" 
Psalms118:3 Nnḓu ya Aroni nga i ri, “Lufuno lwawe a lu fheli.”" 
Psalms118:4 Vhane vha ofha Muṋe washu nga vha ri, “Lufuno lwawe a lu fheli.”" 
Psalms118:5 Muṋe washu ndo mu ṱavhela mukosi ndó thathedzwa, a mpfa, a mmbofholola." 
Psalms118:6 Muṋe washu u na nṋe, a thi ofhi tshithu; muthu a nga nnyitani?" 
Psalms118:7 Muṋe washu u na nṋe, ndi Ene Mutiki wanga; ndi ḓo vhona maswina anga o kundwa." 
Psalms118:8 Ndi khwiṋe u dzumbama nga Muṋe washu u fhira u fulufhela muthu. 
Psalms118:9 Ndi khwiṋe u khuda nga Muṋe washu u fhira u fulufhela vhavhusi. 
Psalms118:10 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzo ntanga, hone ndi vha shakulisa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms118:11 Vho ntanga matungo oṱhe, hone ndi vha shakulisa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms118:12 Vho phapha matungo oṱhe unga guma ḽa ṋotshi, hone ndi vha shakulisa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, vha swa kathihi fhedzi unga mipfa i tshi duga." 
Psalms118:13 Ndo sukumedzelwa murahu nda ṱoḓou wa, Muṋe washu a ntika." 
Psalms118:14 Muṋe washu ndi Ene maanḓa anga, ndi Ene luimbo lwanga, u tshidzwa hanga ndi Ene." 
Psalms118:15 Nḓuni dza vha fulufhedzeaho hu pfala mifhululu na nyimbo dza gundo. Vha ri, “Tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsha maanḓa tsho ita zwihulu!" 
Psalms118:16 Muṋe washu o angaladza tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa; tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsha maanḓa tsho ita zwihulu!” 
Psalms118:17 A thi nga fi, ndi ḓo tshila, nda ḓivhadza zwe Muṋe washu a ita." 
Psalms118:18 Naho Muṋe washu o nndaṱisa nda pfa vhuṱungu, ho ngo nnditsha ndi tshi fa." 
Psalms118:19 Mmvuleleni dzikhoro dza thembele hune ha dzhena vha fulufhedzeaho, ndi dzhene ndi rende Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms118:20 Hei ndi khoro ya Muṋe washu; vha fulufhedzeaho vha dzhena ngayo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndi ḓo u livhuha, wo mphindula, wa ita uri ndi kunde." 
Psalms118:22 Tombo ḽe ḽa laṱwa nga vhafhaṱi ḽa pfi a ḽi na mushumo, ḽo vha ḽone thikho ya nnḓu." 
Psalms118:23 Hezwo zwo itwa nga Muṋe washu, vhonani uri zwi kanukisa hani!" 
Psalms118:24 Heḽi ndi ḓuvha ḽo vhewaho nga Muṋe washu; nga ri ḽi takalele, ri ḽi pembelele!" 
Psalms118:25 Muṋe washu, wa ri tshidzaa! Muṋe washu, ita uri zwi ri nakele!" 
Psalms118:26 U na mashudu ane a ḓa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu! Ri ni shudufhadza rí nḓuni ya Muṋe washu. 
Psalms118:27 Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu, u ri vhonetshela nga tshedza tshawe. Irwani muduba nó fara matavhi, ni vhuye ni swike ṋangani dza aḽiṱari!" 
Psalms118:28 U Mudzimu wanga, ndi ḓo u livhuha; Mudzimu wanga, ndi ḓo ḓivhadza vhuhulu hau." 
Psalms118:29 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu, lufuno lwawe a lu fheli." 
Psalms119:1 Vha na mashudu vho faraho nḓila i sa solisei, vha tevhedza mulayo wa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms119:2 Vha na mashudu vha no vhulunga nyeletshedzo dzawe, vha ḓidinela Ene nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
Psalms119:3 A vha tshinyi, vha tshimbila nḓilani dzawe." 
Psalms119:4 Wo vhea ndaela dzau, wa ri dzi tevhelwe nga vhuronwane." 
Psalms119:5 Ngavhe ndi tshi tevhedza zwe wa vhofha ndi sa tseki! 
Psalms119:6 Arali milayo yau nda i dzhiela nzhele, ndi hone ndi sa ḓo shona." 
Psalms119:7 Ndi ḓo guda pfanelo dze wa vhea dzi sa khakhi, nda u renda nga mbilu yo ṱambaho." 
Psalms119:8 Ndi ḓo tevhedza zwe wa vhofha; yawee, u songo nṱamba tshoṱhe!" 
Psalms119:9 Mutuka a nga swiela hani nḓila yawe naa? Ndi nga u tevhedza zwine wa amba. 
Psalms119:10 Nṋe ndi ḓo ḓidinela Iwe nga mbilu yoṱhe; nndededze ndi si pambuwe milayoni yau. 
Psalms119:11 Ipfi ḽau ndi ḓo ḽi vhulunga mbiluni yanga, uri ndi si vhuye nda u khakhela na kathihi." 
Psalms119:12 Nga hu rendwe Iwe Muṋe washu! Mpfunze u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha. 
Psalms119:13 Pfanelo dzoṱhe dze wa vhea ndi dzi ḓivhadza nga mulomo wanga. 
Psalms119:14 Ndi takalela u tevhedza nyeletshedzo dzau unga muthu a tshi takalela lupfumo lunzhi. 
Psalms119:15 Ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi elekanya ndaela dzau, nda sedza nḓila dzau." 
Psalms119:16 Ndi ḓo ḓiphiṋa nga u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha, ipfi ḽau ndi nga si ḽi hangwe." 
Psalms119:17 Ntonde nṋe mulanda wau, ndi tshile ndi tshi tevhedza ipfi ḽau." 
Psalms119:18 Mmbonyolose, ndi vhone maanḓa a kanukisaho a mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:19 Nṋe ndi mudali fhano shangoni, u songo nnzumbela milayo yau." 
Psalms119:20 Mbilu yanga i tou swa nga tshiṱuvho, i swela u tevhedza pfanelo dze wa vhea i sa fhidzi." 
Psalms119:21 Iwe u kaidza vhadzia-u-ḓihudza, vho teketelwa, vho nyadza pfanelo dze wa vhea." 
Psalms119:22 Nṱanzwe maṱamba avho na luswetho, hufha ndi tshi tevhedza nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:23 Naho vhavhusi vha dzula vha nndangana, nṋe mulanda wau ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi elekanya milayo yau." 
Psalms119:24 Nṋe ndi takalela nyeletshedzo dzau, ndi vhone vhaeletshedzi vhanga." 
Psalms119:25 Ndo tsumbudzwa buseni, dovha u nṋee maanḓa unga wo amba." 
Psalms119:26 Ndo u vhudza zwi nndemelaho, wa mphalala; mpfunze u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:27 Ndi tama hani u ṱalukanya ndaela dzau, uri ndi dzule ndi tshi elekanya mishumo yau i kanukisaho!" 
Psalms119:28 Ndi lala ndo donola maṱo nga u ḽa mbilu; nkhwaṱhise unga wo mpfulufhedzisa. 
Psalms119:29 Ntsendedze kule na vhufhura, u ntonde nga u mpfunza mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:30 Ndo ḓinangela u tshila nga u fulufhedzea, ndo ṱanganedza pfanelo dze wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:31 Muṋe washu, ndi nambatela nyeletshedzo dzau; u songo vhuya wa ntshonisa." 
Psalms119:32 U nnyengedza ṱhalukanyo; ndi ḓo tevhedza milayo yau nga mbilu yoṱhe. 
Psalms119:33 Muṋe washu, mpfunze u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo zwi vhulunga nda ṱhaphudza." 
Psalms119:34 Nṋee ṱhalukanyo, ndi kone u vhulunga mulayo wau, ndi u tevhedze nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe." 
Psalms119:35 Nnyendedze nḓilani ya milayo yau, ndi a i takalela!" 
Psalms119:36 Tshingamisela mbilu yanga kha nyeletshedzo dzau, hu si kha u ḽeledza vhaṅwe." 
Psalms119:37 Sudzulusa maṱo anga kha zwi si na mushumo, u nnyendedze, ndi kone u tshila." 
Psalms119:38 Khunyeledza zwe wa mpfulufhedzisa, wa zwi fulufhedzisa na vhoṱhe vhane vha u ofha." 
Psalms119:39 Ndi ofha u nyadziwa, ntinyise hone; pfanelo dze wa vhofha dzo naka hani!" 
Psalms119:40 Ndi ṱuvha hani u ita zwe wa laya! Nṋee vhutshilo, hufha u tshi fulufhedzea." 
Psalms119:41 Ntonde Muṋe washu, hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, ntshidze unga wo mpfulufhedzisa." 
Psalms119:42 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo kona u fhindula vha sa nkhumeli; nṋe ndi fulufhela ipfi ḽau. 
Psalms119:43 U songo vhuya wa tenda ndi tshi litsha u amba ngoho; ndo ḓiimisela u tevhedza pfanelo dze wa vhofha. 
Psalms119:44 Ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi vhulunga mulayo wau lini na lini. 
Psalms119:45 Ndi ḓo tshila ndo vhofholowa tshoṱhe, nge nda tevhedza ndaela dzau nga vhuronwane." 
Psalms119:46 Ndi ḓo ḓivhadza mahosi nyeletshedzo dzau, a thi nga vhuyi nda shona." 
Psalms119:47 Milayo yau ndi a i funa, ndi tou ḓiphiṋa ngayo." 
Psalms119:48 Ndi a i hulisa, a thi i funi zwone, ndi dzula ndi tshi elekanya zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:49 Elelwa zwe wa mmbudza; zwo ita uri ndi u fulufhele. 
Psalms119:50 Zwe wa mpfulufhedzisa zwo nṋea vhutshilo, ndi zwone zwi mphumulaho miṱodzi." 
Psalms119:51 Naho vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha sa nngoḓi zwone, nṋe a thi pambuwi mulayoni wau." 
Psalms119:52 Muṋe washu, ndi tshi elekanya pfanelo dze wa vhea kale na kale, ndi rudza mbilu." 
Psalms119:53 Ndi tou nga ndi sa balea ndi tshi vhona vhavhi vha tshi nyadza mulayo wau. 
Psalms119:54 Ndo sika nyimbo dzi no renda zwe wa vhofha, ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila fhano shangoni." 
Psalms119:55 Na vhusiku ndi elelwa dzina ḽau, Muṋe washu, uri ndi vhulunge mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:56 Zwe nda ḓowela ndi u vhulunga ndaela dzau. 
Psalms119:57 Muṋe washu, a hu na tshithu tshi ntakadzaho arali e si Iwe; ndi fulufhedzisa u vhulunga maipfi au." 
Psalms119:58 Ndo u luvhelela nga mbilu yoṱhe; nkhathutshele unga wo amba. 
Psalms119:59 Ndi tshi elekanya zwine nda ḓo ita, ndi ḓiimisela u ita zwe wa nnyeletshedza." 
Psalms119:60 A thi ongolowi u tevhedza milayo yau, ndi a ṱavhanya." 
Psalms119:61 Nangwe vhavhi vho ntanda nga thambo, a thi hangwi mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:62 Vhukati ha vhusiku ndi a vuwa nda u renda, ndi tshi elekanya pfanelo dze wa vhofha, dzi sa khakhi." 
Psalms119:63 Ndi konana na vhoṱhe vhane vha u ofha, vha vhulunga ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:64 Muṋe washu, ḽifhasi ḽo ḓala lufuno lwau; mpfunze zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:65 Muṋe washu, wo ntonda unga wo amba." 
Psalms119:66 Mpfunze, ndi vhe na nḓivho na ṱhalukanyo, nṋe ndi fulufhela milayo yau." 
Psalms119:67 Zwiḽa ndi sa athu pfiswa vhuṱungu ndo vha ndi tshi ḓi pambuwa, huno zwino ndi vhulunga ipfi ḽau." 
Psalms119:68 U na vhuthu, u ita zwivhuya; mpfunze u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:69 Naho vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha tshi ri ndi mudzia-u-zwifha, nṋe ndi vhulunga ndaela dzau nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe." 
Psalms119:70 Naho vhone vhe na mbilu ya mbwane, nṋe ndi ḓiphiṋa nga mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:71 Ndo ita zwone nda tambudzwa; zwo nngudisa zwe wa vhofha. 
Psalms119:72 Mulayo une wa vhea u tou vha dzanga kha nṋe; ú fhira vhunzhi ha musuku na siliva. 
Psalms119:73 Ndo itwa nga zwanḓa zwau, ndi zwone zwo mmbumbaho; mphe ṱhalukanyo ndi kone u guda milayo yau." 
Psalms119:74 Vhane vha u ofha vha ḓo mmbona vha takala, nge nda fulufhela ipfi ḽau." 
Psalms119:75 Muṋe washu, ndi a ḓivha uri khaṱhulo dzau a dzi khakhi; u tshi mpfisa vhuṱungu zwo vha zwo tea." 
Psalms119:76 Ngavhe lufuno lwau lu tshi mphumula miṱodzi, unga wo mpfulufhedzisa." 
Psalms119:77 Nkhathutshele ndi kone u tshila; nṋe ndi ḓiphiṋa nga mulayo wau. 
Psalms119:78 Ngavhe vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha tshi shoniswa nge vha nkhakhela ndi si na mulandu; nṋe tshanga hu ḓo vha u elekanya ndaela dzau. 
Psalms119:79 Ngavhe vhane vha u ofha vha tshi ima na nṋe, vhone vhane vha ḓivha nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:80 Ngavhe mbilu yanga i sa pfuki zwe wa vhofha, ndi sa ḓo shoniswa." 
Psalms119:81 Ndo no tou ṋoka nga u lindela u tshidzwa nga Iwe, huno ndo fulufhela ipfi ḽau." 
Psalms119:82 Maṱo anga o neta nga u lavhelela zwe wa mpfulufhedzisa, ndi ri, “U ḓo mphumudza lini?”" 
Psalms119:83 Naho ndo onyana unga mukumba u vhutsini, thi hangwi zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:84 Ndi ḓo lindela u swika lini? Vha ntovholaho u ḓo vha lifhedza lini? 
Psalms119:85 Vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vhane vha landula mulayo wau, vha a mmveela khunḓa." 
Psalms119:86 Milayo yau yoṱhe i na ngoho; mpfarise, vhathu vha khou ntovhola ndi si na tshe nda tshinya." 
Psalms119:87 Vho ṱoḓou nthutha fhano shangoni, naho zwo ralo a tho ngo furalela ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:88 Ntshidze u tshi itela lufuno lwau, ndi kone u tevhedza nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:89 Muṋe washu, ipfi ḽau ḽo ṱoka midzi ḽiṱaḓulu, a ḽi tseki lini na lini." 
Psalms119:90 U fulufhedzea hau hu vhonala kha mirafho na mirafho; wo sika ḽifhasi ḽa ḓi ima ḽo ralo. 
Psalms119:91 Zwithu zwoṱhe zwo ḓi raḽa na ṋamusi nge wa ri zwi ralo; zwoṱhe zwi pfi zwi shumele Iwe. 
Psalms119:92 Arali ho vha hu si u ḓiphiṋa nga mulayo wau, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ri u tambudzwa nda lovha." 
Psalms119:93 Thi nga vhuyi nda hangwa ndaela dzau; ndi dzone dzo ntshidzaho. 
Psalms119:94 Ntshidze, ndi muthu wau, ndi ṱoṱoredza ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:95 Vhavhi vho nndalela uri vha mmbulahe, hone nṋe ndi tevhedza nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:96 Zwoṱhe zwine ha pfi zwo khunyelela, na u khunyelela házwo ndi vhona zwi tshi guma, hone milayo yau yo ṱanḓavhuwa u pfuka ndinganyo, a i gumi." 
Psalms119:97 Mulayo wau ndi u funa hani! Ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ndi elekanya wone fhedzi. 
Psalms119:98 Milayo yau i nṱalifhisa nda fhira maswina anga; ndi dzula ndi nayo.
