Psalms119:99 Ndi ṱalukanya u fhira vhafunzi vhanga vhoṱhe, nge nda dzula ndi tshi elekanya nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:100 Vhunga ndi tshi vhulunga ndaela dzau nḓivho yanga i fhira ya ṱhoho tshena. 
Psalms119:101 Ndi tata u fara nḓila yo vhifhaho; tshanga ndi u vhulunga ipfi ḽau. 
Psalms119:102 Thi pambuwi kha pfanelo dze wa vhea, hufha wo mpfunza." 
Psalms119:103 Maipfi au ha nnḓifheli zwone, a ḓifha u fhira mutoli." 
Psalms119:104 Ndaela dzau dzi nṋea ṱhalukanyo, ndi zwine nda vhenga nḓila dzoṱhe dza magombikwa." 
Psalms119:105 Ipfi ḽau ḽi vhonetshela hune nda tshimbila, ḽa vha luvhone nḓilani yanga." 
Psalms119:106 Ndo ana nda khwaṱhisa, nda ri ndi ḓo vhulunga pfanelo dzau dzi sa khakhi." 
Psalms119:107 Ndo tambudzwa nda zwi pfa; Muṋe washu, ntshidze unga wo amba." 
Psalms119:108 Muṋe washu, ngavhe nduvho yanga ya tshirendo i tshi u takadza, u mpfunze u tevhela pfanelo dze wa vhea." 
Psalms119:109 Naho ndi tshi dzula ndi khomboni ya lufu, a zwi nndini, mulayo wau a thi u hangwi." 
Psalms119:110 Naho vhavhi vho nthetshela tshikwekwe, a thi pambuwi kha ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:111 Nyeletshedzo dzau ndi ifa ḽanga ḽa lini na lini, ndi dzone dzi takadzaho mbilu yanga." 
Psalms119:112 Ndo ḓiimisela u ita zwe wa vhofha, nda vhuya nda fa." 
Psalms119:113 Ndi nyala vhathu vha no nga muya wa murwelahoṱhe, tshanga ndi u funa mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:114 Iwe u vhudzumbamo hanga, u tshiṱangu tshanga; ndi fulufhela ipfi ḽau." 
Psalms119:115 Inwi vhavhi, nṱutsheleni, ndi kone u vhulunga milayo ya Mudzimu wanga!" 
Psalms119:116 Ntike unga wo mpfulufhedzisa, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo tshila; ndi songo shoniswa nga zwe nda fulufhela." 
Psalms119:117 Ntike ndi tshile, ndi dzule ndi tshi vhulunga zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:118 U landula vhoṱhe vhane vha nyadza zwe wa vhofha; vhumbulu havho a vhu farisi tshithu. 
Psalms119:119 Vhavhi vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi u vha laṱa unga malambelo, zwenezwo nṋe ndi funa nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:120 Muṱoḓo wanga u a tumuwa nga u ofha Iwe; ndi ofha khaṱhulo dzau. 
Psalms119:121 Ndo ita zwi re zwone, zwo teaho; u songo nkovhela vha nkandeledzaho." 
Psalms119:122 Nnyimelele, u songo tenda vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vha tshi ntambudza." 
Psalms119:123 Maṱo anga o neta nga u dzula ndo donolela u tshidzwa hanga nga Iwe, ndó lavhelela zwe wa mpfulufhedzisa, hufha u tshi fulufhedzea." 
Psalms119:124 Hufha lufuno lwau lu sa dzinginyei, ntonde, u mpfunze u tevhedza zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:125 Nṋe ndi mulanda wau, mmbonetshele ndi ṱalukanye nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:126 Muṋe washu, mulayo wau wo pfukiwa, tshifhinga tshau tsha u lifhedza tsho swika." 
Psalms119:127 Ndi funa milayo yau u fhira musuku, musuku u songo vangwaho." 
Psalms119:128 Thi vhuyi nda pambuwa kha ndaela dzau, ndi vhenga nḓila dzoṱhe dza magombikwa." 
Psalms119:129 Nyeletshedzo dzau dzi takadza hani! Ndi zwine nda dzi vhulunga. 
Psalms119:130 Maipfi ane wa bula a a vhonetshela, vha shayaho nḓivho a vha funza u ṱalukanya." 
Psalms119:131 Ndi tou femeleka nga u takalela milayo yau. 
Psalms119:132 Nndavhelese u nkhathutshele, sa zwine wa ḓi ita kha vhane vha u funa." 
Psalms119:133 Nndededze ndi si pambuwe kha zwe wa amba; u songo vhuya wa tenda ndi tshi vhuswa nga vhuvhi. 
Psalms119:134 Ntshidze zwanḓani zwa vha nkandeledzaho, ndi kone u vhulunga ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:135 Ngavhe u tshi nndavhelesa nga vhuthu, wa mpfunza u ita zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:136 Maṱo anga a tou shuluwa nga u vhona vhathu vha sa vhulungi mulayo wau. 
Psalms119:137 Muṋe washu, a u na tshiṱalula, khaṱhulo dzau a dzi khakhi." 
Psalms119:138 Wo vhea milayo yau nga nḓila yo teaho, i fulufhedzea tshoṱhe." 
Psalms119:139 Ndi ḽa mbilu nda fhelela nga u vhona maswina anga a sa londi maipfi au. 
Psalms119:140 Zwe wa amba zwo wanala zwi ngoho fhedzi, ndi zwi funa hani!" 
Psalms119:141 Naho ndi si tshithu, ndi tshi nyadzea, a thi hangwi ndaela dzau." 
Psalms119:142 Iwe u ḓi dzula u tshi fulufhedzea lini na lini; mulayo wau ndi wa ngoho. 
Psalms119:143 Naho ndo welwa nga zwi ofhisaho, ndi ḓi ḓiphiṋa nga milayo yau." 
Psalms119:144 Nyeletshedzo dzau a dzi khakhi lini na lini; mpfunze u dzi ṱalukanya, ndi kone u tshila." 
Psalms119:145 Ndi khou u vhidzelela nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe; Muṋe washu, mphindule, ndi ḓo vhulunga zwe wa vhofha." 
Psalms119:146 Ndi u ṱavhela mukosi, ntshidze, ndi ḓo konou ita zwe wa nnyeletshedza." 
Psalms119:147 Ndi vuwa nda u ṱavhela mukosi mapfuvhi a sa athu tswuka, nda lindela phindulo yau." 
Psalms119:148 Ndi lala ndo donola maṱo vhusiku hoṱhe, nda elekanya zwe wa fulufhedzisa." 
Psalms119:149 Lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei, ipfa ipfi ḽanga! Muṋe washu, ntshidze, hufha u tshi fulufhedzea." 
Psalms119:150 Vha ntovholaho lu shonisaho ngevha, vha vho ṱoḓou nkhovha! Vha nyadza mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:151 A vha Iwe Muṋe washu, u tsini hanga, milayo yau yoṱhe ndi ya ngoho." 
Psalms119:152 Ndi kale ndo guda nyeletshedzo dzau, wo dzi tetshela lini na lini." 
Psalms119:153 Edzou sedza u vhone u shengedzwa hanga – a u nndamukisi? Hufha mulayo wau ndi sa u hangwi. 
Psalms119:154 Ntsengele u mmbofholole; ntshidze unga wo mpfulufhedzisa. 
Psalms119:155 U tshidzwa hu kule na vhavhi; a vha londi zwe wa vhofha. 
Psalms119:156 Muṋe washu, u na khathutshelo i si na vhukono; ntshidze nga khaṱhulo yau i sa khakhi." 
Psalms119:157 Maswina anga ane a ntovhola ndi manzhi, huno nṋe a thi pambuwi kha nyeletshedzo dzau." 
Psalms119:158 Zwifheṱi zwi a nnengisa, vha nyadza zwine wa amba." 
Psalms119:159 Muṋe washu, edzou vhona uri ndaela dzau ndi dzi funa hani; lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei, ntshidze!" 
Psalms119:160 Ngoho ndi yone tshivhindi tsha mulayo wau; khaṱhulo dzau dzi sa ṱaluli ndi dza lini na lini. 
Psalms119:161 Vhavhusi vha ntovhola ndi si na tshe nda tshinya; hone tshine mbilu yanga ya tshi ofha ndi ipfi ḽau. 
Psalms119:162 Ndi takalela ipfi ḽau, nda nga o thubaho lupfumopfumo." 
Psalms119:163 Ndi vhenga vhufhura nda tou vhu nengwa, mulayo wau wone ndi a u funa." 
Psalms119:164 Ndi u renda kaṱanu-na-kavhili nga ḓuvha, ndi tshi itela khaṱhulo dzau dzi sa ṱaluli." 
Psalms119:165 Vha funaho mulayo wau vha na mulalo vhukuma, a hu na tshine tsha vha khukhula." 
Psalms119:166 Ndo lindela u tshidzwa nga Iwe, Muṋe washu, ndi tevhedza milayo yau." 
Psalms119:167 Nyeletshedzo dzau ndi dzi funa u pfuka ndinganyo; ndi a dzi thetshelesa. 
Psalms119:168 Ndi tevhedza ndaela dzau na nyeletshedzo dzau; Iwe u ḓivha nḓila dzanga dzoṱhe. 
Psalms119:169 Muṋe washu, ngavhe tshililo tshanga tshi tshi swika ha Iwe! Nṋee ṱhalukanyo unga wo amba." 
Psalms119:170 Ngavhe khumbelo dzanga dzi tshi swika ha Iwe! Ntshidze unga wo amba. 
Psalms119:171 Ndi ḓo u fhululedza nga wanga mulomo; u mpfunza zwe wa vhofha. 
Psalms119:172 Lulimi lwanga lu ḓo imba ipfi ḽau; milayo yau yoṱhe ndi ya ngoho. 
Psalms119:173 Ngavhe tshanḓa tshau tshi tshi mpfarisa; ndi tevhedza ndaela dzau. 
Psalms119:174 Ndo ṱulutshela u tshidzwa nga Iwe, Muṋe washu; ndi tou ḓiphiṋa nga mulayo wau." 
Psalms119:175 Ngavhe ndi tshi tshila, nda konou u renda; khaṱhulo dzau ngavhe dzi tshi ntika." 
Psalms119:176 Ndi tendeleka unga nngu yo xelaho; iḓa u nṱoḓe, milayo yau a thi i hangwi." 
Psalms120:1 Ndo vhidzelela Muṋe washu ndí khomboni, a mphindula." 
Psalms120:2 Muṋe washu, nndamukise kha vhadzia-u-zwifha, vha ndimi dza u fhura." 
Psalms120:3 Inwi vha ndimi dza u fhura, Mudzimu u ḓo ni itani? U ḓo ni laṱisa hani?" 
Psalms120:4 U ḓo ni pfula nga misevhe ya vhuhali, yo ṱuṱulwaho, a ni fhisa nga masimbe a mudzwiri." 
Psalms120:5 Khombo yanga, nṋe ane nda dzula Misheke hu si na mulalo, ane nda dzula na Vhakedara vhadzianndwa!" 
Psalms120:6 Ndo tshilesa na vhane vha vhenga mulalo! 
Psalms120:7 Nṋe ndi mudziamulalo; ndi tshi amba a mulalo, vhone vha ṱoḓa nndwa." 
Psalms121:1 Ndi liladza maṱo anga dzithavhani, ndi ri, “A mpfarisaho ndi nnyi?”" 
Psalms121:2 A mpfarisaho ndi Muṋe washu, Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
Psalms121:3 Ha nga litshi mulenzhe wau u tshi redzemuwa, Mulindi wau ha kumedzi." 
Psalms121:4 Vhona, Mulindaisraele ha kumedzi, ha eḓeli." 
Psalms121:5 Muṋe washu ndi Ene Mulindi wau; Muṋe washu ndi murunzi wau; u enda o u tika. 
Psalms121:6 Masiari ḓuvha ḽi nga si u fhise, na ṅwedzi vhusiku u nga si u ite tshithu." 
Psalms121:7 Muṋe washu u ḓo u tsireledza khomboni dzoṱhe, a u londola." 
Psalms121:8 Muṋe washu u ḓo u linda u tshi bva, nangwe u tshi dzhena, zwino na lini na lini." 
Psalms122:1 Ndo takala vha tshi mmbudza vha ri, “Nḓarieni nḓuni ya Muṋe washu!”" 
Psalms122:2 Hee Jerusalema, milenzhe yashu yo ima mafhoroni au!" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalema, wo fhaṱwa, wo naka hani! Makolo a a vhidzana, a hu na tshidina tsho bvaho ngonani!" 
Psalms122:4 Ndi hune matsinde a Israele a gonya hone, matsinde a Muṋe washu. Vha yo renda dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, nga he a laya Israele." 
Psalms122:5 Henefho ho ima khuluṋoni dza khaṱhulo, khuluṋoni dza nnḓu ya Dafita." 
Psalms122:6 Rabelani uri Jerusalema hu vhe na mulalo, ni ri, “Ngavhe vhane vha u funa zwi tshi vha nakela.”" 
Psalms122:7 Ngavhe ngomu ha mitsheṱo yau hu tshi vha na mulalo, pfamoni dzau ha vha na pfano." 
Psalms122:8 Ndi ri, “Mulalo u vhe na iwe!” ndi tshi itela mashaka anga na khonani dzanga." 
Psalms122:9 Ndi a u rabelela ndi tshi itela nnḓu ya Mudzimu Muṋe washu. 
Psalms123:1 Ndi sedza Iwe, ndi sedza ṱaḓulu hune wa vhusa hone." 
Psalms123:2 Maṱo ashu a sedza Mudzimu Muṋe washu a vhuye a ri khathutshele, zwa nga maṱo a vhashumeli vha tshi sedza tshanḓa tsha muṋe wavho; zwa nga maṱo a phuli ya musidzana a tshi sedza tshanḓa tsha mufumakadzi." 
Psalms123:3 Ri khathutshele, Muṋe washu, ri khathutshele nandi! Ro nyadzwa lwa u nyadzwa." 
Psalms123:4 Vhadzia-u-ḓiḓivha vho ri nzhonzhowedza ra zwi pfa, ra nyadzwa nga vhadzia-u-ḓihudza." 
Psalms124:1 Ngavhe Muṋe washu a si ime na riṋe – Vhaisraele nga vha ralo – 
Psalms124:2 ngavhe Muṋe washu a si ime na riṋe musi vhathu vha tshi ri levhela 
Psalms124:3 zwiḽa vho ri sinyutshela, ndi musi vho ri mila ri tshi vhona," 
Psalms124:4 ndi musi ro tibwa nga muḓalo wa maḓi, ró kumbwa nga mikumbela," 
Psalms124:5 ró poswa kule nga maḓi o sinyuwaho. 
Psalms124:6 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, ho ngo litsha vha tshi ri ponda;" 
Psalms124:7 ro ponyoka unga tshiṋoni tshi tshi ponyoka tshikwekweni tsha murei; tshikwekwe tsho vunḓea, riṋe ra ponyoka ra shavha." 
Psalms124:8 Ri tikwa nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
Psalms125:1 Vha fulufhelaho Muṋe washu vha nga thavha ya Tsioni; a i sudzuluswi, i ima yo khwaṱha lini na lini." 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalema wo tangwa nga dzithavha; na Muṋe washu u dzula o tanga vhathu vhawe, zwino na lini na lini." 
Psalms125:3 Vhavhi vha nga si vhuse shango ḽe Muṋe washu a kovhela vha fulufhedzeaho, uri na vhone vha sa ḓo longa zwanḓa zwavho vhuvhini." 
Psalms125:4 Muṋe washu, vhavhuya ngavhe zwi tshi vha nakela, na vha si na vhufhura!" 
Psalms125:5 Hone vho faraho nḓila dza magombikwa, Muṋe washu u vha litsha vha tshi kumbwa na vhaitazwivhi. Mulalo u vhe na Israele!" 
Psalms126:1 Musi Muṋe washu o humisela mathubwa Tsioni, ro pfa zwi tshi nga muloro." 
Psalms126:2 Ro vha ro ḓala maseo na mapwapwalala, ri tshi fhululedza. Ndi hone tshakha dzi tshi ri, “Yahavee o vha itela zwihulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Vhukumakuma Muṋe washu o ri itela zwihulu; ro takala lwa u takala. 
Psalms126:4 Muṋe washu, dovha u ri humisele shangoni ḽashu, zwi nge milambwana Phangani ya tshipembe." 
Psalms126:5 Vhane vha zwala vha tshi lila, vha ḓo kaṋa vha tshi fhululedza." 
Psalms126:6 Ane a bva a tshi lila, ó hwala mbeu a tshi yo zwala, u ḓo vhuya a tshi fhululedza, ó hwala zwe a kaṋa." 
Psalms127:1 Nnḓu arali i sa fhaṱwi nga Muṋe washu, vhafhaṱi a vha na tshine vha ita. Muḓi arali u sa lindwi nga Muṋe washu, mulindi a tshi lala o ruḓa maṱo u sokou ḓinetisa." 
Psalms127:2 U tshi bubela mushumoni, wa kovhedza ḓuvha, wa ḽa tsha biko, a zwi u farisi tshithu; Muṋe ashu u fusha vhane a vha funa vhó ḓilalela!" 
Psalms127:3 Vhana ndi tshifhiwa tshi bvaho ha Muṋe washu, mbebo ndi pfufho." 
Psalms127:4 Vhana vhane muthu a vha sika a tshee muswa, vha nga misevhe yo farwaho nga muhali." 
Psalms127:5 U na mashudu ane mukutu wawe wa dzula wo ḓala yone! A tshi imedzana na maswina tshifhingoni, ha nga shoni." 
Psalms128:1 Wa mashudu ndi ane a ofha Muṋe washu, a tshimbila nḓilani dzawe." 
Psalms128:2 U ḓo ḽa zwe zwanḓa zwawe zwa shuma; u na mashudu, zwi ḓo mu nakela." 
Psalms128:3 Musadzi wau u ḓo nga munḓirivhe wo aṋwaho muṱani wau; vhana vhau vha ḓo nga maḓadzwane a muolivi o mona na ḓafula. 
Psalms128:4 Ndi one mashudu a munna a ofhaho Muṋe washu. 
Psalms128:5 Muṋe washu u ḓo u shudufhadza e Tsioni, wa vhona Jerusalema u tshi tondiwa maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hau," 
Psalms128:6 wa vhona na vhana vha vhana vhau. Mulalo u vhe na Israele! 
Psalms129:1 Vho ntsala murahu u bva hanani hanga – Vhaisraele nga vha ralo – 
Psalms129:2 vho ntsala murahu u bva hanani hanga, hone a vho ngo nkona, a vho ngo nkunda." 
Psalms129:3 Vhalimi vho nndima muṱana vha tou randekanya. 
Psalms129:4 Muṋe washu u a fulufhedzea, o tumula thambo dza vhavhi vhó mmbofha." 
Psalms129:5 Ngavhe vhoṱhe vha vhengaho Tsioni vha tshi shoniswa vha sukumedzelwa murahu; 
Psalms129:6 nga vha nge hatsi vhu melaho ṱhangani ya nnḓu, ha puta vhu sa athu aluwa," 
Psalms129:7 mukaṋi a si vhu kaṋe, a si vhu vhofhe khuḽane a vhu hwala," 
Psalms129:8 vhafhiri vha gondo vha sa ḓo ri, “Muṋe washu a vhe na inwi!” Ri ni shudufhadza nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Psalms130:1 Muṋe washu, ndi u vhidzelela ndí ngeno fhasi-fhasi dindini!" 
Psalms130:2 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ipfa ipfi ḽanga! Nthetshelese u pfe mukosi wanga!" 
Psalms130:3 Arali Iwe Muṋe washu wa ri vhalela milandu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, ndi nnyi ane a nga sala o ima?" 
Psalms130:4 Hone Iwe u a hangwela; u luvhelwa zwone. 
Psalms130:5 Ndo lindela Muṋe washu, ndo mu lindela nga mbilu yoṱhe, ndo fulufhela ipfi ḽawe." 
Psalms130:6 Ndo lindela Muṋe washu, u fhira vhalindi vho lindela mutsho, u fhira vhalindi vho lindela mapfuvhi a tshi tswuka." 
Psalms130:7 Israele, fulufhelani Muṋe washu. Lufuno lwa Muṋe washu a lu dzinginyei; Ene u vhofholola tshoṱhe." 
Psalms130:8 Ndi Ene a no ḓo vhofholola Vhaisraele milanduni yavho yoṱhe. 
Psalms131:1 Muṋe washu, mbilu yanga a i ḓihudzi, a thi ḓikukumusi, a thi ḓidzindeli nga zwi mphiraho, zwine nda si zwi swikele." 
Psalms131:2 Vhukuma, ndo dzika, ndo rudza mbilu; ndi nga ṅwana o vuḓaho o takulwa nga mme awe; mbilu yanga i nga ṅwana o vuḓaho." 
Psalms131:3 Israele, fulufhelani Muṋe washu, zwino na lini na lini." 
Psalms132:1 Muṋe washu, u songo hangwa Dafita, na zwoṱhe zwe a konḓelela." 
Psalms132:2 U si hangwe zwe a u fulufhedzisa nga muano, Iwe Ramaanḓa, Mudzimu wa Jakopo," 
Psalms132:3 a ri, “Ngoho thi nga dzheni thumbani yanga, kana nda ya vhulaloni hanga;" 
Psalms132:4 thi nga fari khofhe, thi nga kumedzi" 
Psalms132:5 ndi sa athu wanela Muṋe washu vhudzulo, hune Ramaanḓa Mudzimu wa Jakopo a nga dzula.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ngezwo, ro zwi pfa ri Efratha, ro zwi wana midavhini ya Jaara;" 
Psalms132:7 nga ri ye nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, ri gwadame ri vhukandoni ha milenzhe yawe." 
Psalms132:8 Muṋe washu, vuwa u ye vhuaweloni hau ú na mbulungelo i no sumbedza maanḓa au." 
Psalms132:9 Vhotshifhe vhau nga vha ḓiṱame nga u fulufhedzea, vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho vha pembele." 
Psalms132:10 U songo laṱa khosi ye wa i ta, i tonde u tshi itela Dafita mukoma wau." 
Psalms132:11 Muṋe washu o anela Dafita muano wa ngoho, ha nga vhuyi a shanduka na kathihi; o ri, “Kha khuluṋoni yau ndi ḓo vhea muḓuhulu wau." 
Psalms132:12 Arali vhana vhau vha tshi tevhedza mulanga wanga vha thetshelesa nyeletshedzo dzanga, vhana vhavho na vhone vha ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni yau lini na lini.”" 
Psalms132:13 Muṋe washu o nanga Tsioni, o tama u dzula hone, a ri," 
Psalms132:14 “Hafha ndi ḓo awela tshoṱhe, ndi ḓo dzula henefha, ndo hu tama." 
Psalms132:15 Tsioni ndi ḓo u shudufhadza, wa ḽa wa fura, vhashai vhawo ndi ḓo vha fusha, vha ḽa vha laṱa." 
Psalms132:16 Vhotshifhe vhawo ndi ḓo vha ambadza maanḓa, vha konou tshidza vhathu vhanga; vhalanda vhanga vha fulufhedzeaho vha ḓo fhululedza vha pembela." 
Psalms132:17 Henefho ndi ḓo vhumba muḓuhulu wa Dafita vhuhosi, a vha khosi khulu, nda mu shululela Muya wanga nda mu londola, a nga luvhone lu sa dzimi." 
Psalms132:18 Maswina awe ndi ḓo a ambadza ṱhoni, nguwane yawe ya vhuhosi ya ḓi penya i tshi ya.”" 
Psalms133:1 Edzonu vhona uri zwo naka hani, zwi takadza hani mukomana na murathu vha tshi dzula nga u anḓana!" 
Psalms133:2 Zwi nga mapfura a u nukhelela o ḓodzwa ṱhohoni ya Aroni, a elela kha ndebvu, a swika kha mukulo wa khanzu yawe!" 
Psalms133:3 Zwi nga ṅwando wa Heremoni une wa wela thavhani ya Tsioni! Ndi hone he Muṋe washu a fulufhedzisa mashudu – vhutshilo vhu sa gumi. 
Psalms134:1 Iḓani ni rende Muṋe washu inwi vhaḓinḓa vha Muṋe washu, inwi ni imaho nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, na mu shumela vhusiku hoṱhe!" 
Psalms134:2 Imisani zwanḓa zwaṋu no livha hukhethwa, ni rende Muṋe washu." 
Psalms134:3 Vhotshifhe: “Muṋe washu, Musiki wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, nga a ni shudufhadze e Tsioni.”" 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Rendani dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, inwi vhalanda vha Muṋe washu, mu rendeni," 
Psalms135:2 inwi ni imaho nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, na shumela Mudzimu washu miṱani ya nnḓu yawe." 
Psalms135:3 Rendani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu, imbelani dzina ḽawe, ḽi takadza hani!" 
Psalms135:4 Muṋe washu o ḓinangela Jakopo, a ḓikhethela Israele a ri ndi wawe." 
Psalms135:5 Ndi a ḓivha uri Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, Muṋe washu u fhira midzimu yoṱhe." 
Psalms135:6 Muṋe washu u ita zwine a funa ngei ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi, malwanzheni na mativhani oṱhe." 
Psalms135:7 Ndi Ene a no takusa makole vhusendekamisi, a ita phenyo dzi ḓisaho mvula, a bvisa maḓumbu zwisikuni zwawe." 
Psalms135:8 Ndi Ene we a lozwa matanzhe oṱhe a Egipita, a vhathu na a dziphukha," 
Psalms135:9 a ita maḓembe na zwimangadzo kha iwe Egipita, a laṱisa Farao na vhakoma vhawe vhoṱhe;" 
Psalms135:10 a lozwa tshakha nnzhi, a vhulaha mahosi a maanḓa;" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori, na Ogo khosi ya Bashani, na yoṱhe mivhuso ya Kanana," 
Psalms135:12 shango ḽavho a ḽi ṋea vhathu vhawe Israele, ḽa vha ḽavho." 
Psalms135:13 Dzina ḽau, Muṋe washu, a ḽi nga lovhi lini na lini, u ḓo dzula u tshi humbulwa nga mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms135:14 Muṋe washu u ḓo lamulela vhathu vhawe, u ḓo khathutshela vhalanda vhawe." 
Psalms135:15 Zwitungulo zwa tshakha dza vhannḓa ndi zwa siliva na musuku, zwo fulwa nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu." 
Psalms135:16 Zwi na milomo – a zwi ambi; zwi na maṱo – a zwi vhoni; 
Psalms135:17 zwi na nḓevhe – a zwi pfi; milomo yazwo na u fema a i femi. 
Psalms135:18 Vhavhumbi vhazwo vha ḓo fana nazwo, na vhoṱhe vhane vha zwi fulufhela." 
Psalms135:19 Iwe nnḓu ya Israele, renda Muṋe washu! Iwe nnḓu ya Aroni, renda Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms135:20 Iwe nnḓu ya Livi, renda Muṋe washu! Rendani Muṋe washu, noṱhe inwi ni mu ofhaho!" 
Psalms135:21 Vha Tsioni nga vha rende Muṋe washu, Ene a dzulaho Jerusalema. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms136:1 Livhuhani Muṋe washu, u na vhuthu! Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:2 Livhuhani Mudzimu a re nṱha ha zwoṱhe! Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:3 Livhuhani Muṋe wa vhaṋe! Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:4 Ndi Ene e eṱhe a itaho maḓembe! Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:5 O ita ḽiṱaḓulu nga vhuṱali. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:6 O tea ḽifhasi nṱha ha maḓi. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:7 O ita zwiedza zwihulu. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:8 Ḓuvha a ri ḽi vhuse masiari, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:9 ṅwedzi na ṋaledzi zwi vhuse vhusiku. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:10 O fhedza matanzhe a Egipita, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:11 a bvisa Israele vhukati havho Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:12 nga tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa ó tshi angaladza. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:13 O fhandekanya Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga nga vhukati, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:14 a fhirisa Israele nga vhukati halwo, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:15 a kumbisa Farao na mmbi yawe nga Lwanzhe lwa Dziṱhanga, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:16 a tshimbidza vhathu vhawe phangani. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:17 O lozwa mahosi a maanḓa, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:18 a vhulaha mahosi a re na bvumo: Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni khosi ya Vhaamori, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:20 na Ogo khosi ya Bashani, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:21 mashango avho a a ṋea Israele mulanda wawe, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:22 a vha avho. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:23 O ri elelwa ró kandeledzwa, Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei!" 
Psalms136:24 a ri lamukisa kha maswina. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:25 Zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe u zwi ṋea zwiḽiwa. Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms136:26 Livhuhani Mudzimu wa makoleni! Lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei! 
Psalms137:1 Milamboni ya Babele ro dzula fhasi ra lila ri tshi elelwa Tsioni. 
Psalms137:2 Henefho ro fhahea haripa dzashu kha miṋengeledzi. 
Psalms137:3 Vhathubi vhashu henengei vho ri ri vha imbele nyimbo, vhashengedzi vhashu vha ri ri vha imbele dza dakalo, vha ri, “Edzonu ri imbela luṅwe lwa dza Tsioni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Ri nga imba hani luimbo lwa Muṋe washu ri shangoni ḽisili? 
Psalms137:5 Iwe Jerusalema, nda hangwa iwe, tshanḓa tshanga tshauḽa nga tshi tou kwatsha!" 
Psalms137:6 Nda sa u elelwa, nda sa ri Jerusalema ndi ḽone dakalo fulu ḽanga, izwo lulimi lwanga nga lu nambatele marinini!" 
Psalms137:7 Muṋe washu, u songo hangwa zwe Vhaedomo vha ita musi wa u lozwiwa ha Jerusalema; vho ri, “U thutheni! U thutheni, na miteo yawo!”" 
Psalms137:8 Iwe Babele mme a vhathu, u ḓo phusukanywa! Ú na mashudu a no ḓo u lifhedza, a u ita zwe wa ri ita!" 
Psalms137:9 U na mashudu a no ḓo dzhia vhushie hau a vhu rwisa na tombo. 
Psalms138:1 Ndi u renda nga mbilu yoṱhe. Midzimu nga i zwi pfe zwayo – nṋe ndi imbela Iwe. 
Psalms138:2 Ndi ḓo u gwadamela ndó livhana na thembele yau khethwa, nda renda dzina ḽau; lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei, u a fulufhedzea; wo khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe wa ri fulufhedzisa, zwa fhira kule zwe ra vha ro zwi lavhelela, naho ro vha ri tshi ḓivha maanḓa au." 
Psalms138:3 Ndi tshi u vhidzelela wo mphindula, wa nkhwaṱhisa nda vha na mbilutshinna." 
Psalms138:4 Muṋe washu, mahosi oṱhe a ḽifhasi vha tshi pfa zwine wa amba, nga vha u rende." 
Psalms138:5 Nga vha imbe dza ndaela dza Muṋe washu; vhugala ha Muṋe washu ndi vhuhulu. 
Psalms138:6 Muṋe washu, na vhuhulu háwe ha litshi u londola muheḓana; vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vhone u a vha ṱukufhadza e kule-kule." 
Psalms138:7 Naho ndi tshi tshimbila tshivhindini tsha khombo, u a ntshidza; maswina anga ó ntsinyutshela, u angaladza tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa wa ntshidza." 
Psalms138:8 Muṋe washu u ḓo khunyeledza zwivhuya zwe a nnzudzanyela. Muṋe washu, lufuno lwau a lu dzinginyei lini na lini; u songo litsha u vuledza mishumo ye wa i thoma." 
Psalms139:1 Muṋe washu, wo nṱoolola wa nnḓivha!" 
Psalms139:2 Ndó dzula, kana ndó ima, Iwe u a zwi ḓivha, u ṱanḓulukanya mihumbulo yanga u kule." 
Psalms139:3 Ndi tshi tshimbila, na musi ndi tshi lala, u a zwi vhona; nḓila dzanga dzoṱhe u a dzi ṱalukanya." 
Psalms139:4 Na musi ndi sa athu bula ipfi, Iwe Muṋe washu wo zwi ḓivha zwoṱhe." 
Psalms139:5 U vhea tshanḓa tshau kha nṋe, wa ntsireledza matungo oṱhe." 
Psalms139:6 Nḓivho yeneyo i a nkanukisa, i nṱha-nṱha, a thi i swikeli." 
Psalms139:7 Muya wau ndi ḓo u tinyelafhi? Iwe ndi ḓo u shavhelafhi? 
Psalms139:8 Ndá gonya makoleni, u henengei; ndá adza thovho vhudzulavhafu, ndi wana u henefho." 
Psalms139:9 Ndá fhufhela vhubvaḓuvha, kana nda yo dzula hune lwanzhe lwa guma," 
Psalms139:10 na henengei tshanḓa tshau tshi ḓo nnyendedza, u ḓo mpfara nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa." 
Psalms139:11 Ndá ri, “Swiswi nga ḽi ntibe, tshedza tsho ntangaho tshi vhe vhusiku,”" 
Psalms139:12 matsina na swiswi Iwe u vhona ḽi si swiswi, vhusiku vhu penya unga masiari; hu swiswi, hu tshedza, Iwe u vhona zwi tshi fana." 
Psalms139:13 Miraḓo yanga yoṱhe yo vhumbwa nga Iwe; wo nnduka ndi thumbuni ya mme anga. 
Psalms139:14 Ndi tshi vhona uri wo mmbumba hani, ndi a kanuka, nda ofha, nda u renda; mishumo yau i a akhamadza, hezwo ndi a zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓivhuḓi." 
Psalms139:15 Marambo anga a tshi vhumbiwa tshiphirini, ndi tshi lukiwa tshivhindini tsha mavu, ndo vha ndi songo u dzumbama." 
Psalms139:16 Wo mmbona ndi sa athu vha na tshivhumbeo. Maḓuvha anga oṱhe, e wa ntela zwiḽa a sa athu thoma, o vha o no ḓi ṅwalwa." 
Psalms139:17 Mudzimu, mihumbulo yau a i na muṱalukanyi, yo ṱanḓavhuwa hani!" 
Psalms139:18 Ndi tshi i vhala ndi wana yo ḓala u fhira muṱavha. Ndi tshi vuwa ndi wana ndi tshee na Iwe. 
Psalms139:19 Mudzimu, ngavhe u tshi vhulaha vhavhi! Phondi thi funi na u dzi vhona!" 
Psalms139:20 Vha u isela phungo mmbi, maswina au a tamba nga dzina ḽau." 
Psalms139:21 Muṋe washu, vhane vha u vhenga ndi ḓo kundwa ngani u vha vhenga? Vhane vha u vutshela ndi kundwa ngani u vha nyala?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndi tou vha vhenga vhukumakuma, ndi vha ita maswina anga." 
Psalms139:23 Mudzimu, nṱolole u ḓivhe mbilu yanga; nndinge, u ḓivhe mihumbulo yanga," 
Psalms139:24 u vhone arali ndo bva nḓilani, u nnyendedze nḓilani yo livhaho ha Iwe." 
Psalms140:1 Muṋe washu, ntshidze kha vhathu vhavhi, ntsireledze kha vha nndevhelaho!" 
Psalms140:2 Vha luka vhunwa mbiluni dzavho, vha dzulela u vusa nndwa;" 
Psalms140:3 ndimi dzavho dzo halifha unga dza ṋowa, vho mara vhuṱungu ha mavuluvulu." 
Psalms140:4 Muṋe washu, nndondole, vhavhi vha si nkunde, ntsireledze kha vha nndevhelaho! Vha dzula vho langana u mpiringedza." 
Psalms140:5 Vhadzia-u-ḓihudza vho nthetshela tshikwekwe, vho nthea nga thambo, vha ṱharamudza mambule, vha mmbetshela milavhu nḓilani." 
Psalms140:6 Ndi amba na Muṋe washu nda ri, “Iwe u Mudzimu wanga.” Muṋe washu, ipfa zwililo zwanga!" 
Psalms140:7 Yawee, Muṋe washu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Mutshidzi wanga wa maanḓa, wo mpilela ṱhoho musi wa nndwa." 
Psalms140:8 Muṋe washu, u songo ṋea vhavhi zwine vha tama, u songo tenda zwe vha langana zwi tshi itea, vha sa ḓo ḓihudza." 
Psalms140:9 Vhuṱungu he vho ntangaho vha mphomela, na zwe vha nnyita, ngavhe zwi tshi vha ḽa ṱhoho." 
Psalms140:10 Ngavhe vha tshi welwa nga masimbe; kha vha posiwe muliloni, kha vha poswe dindini, vha si tsha vuwa." 
Psalms140:11 Vhasasaladzi kha vha shaye vhudzulo fhano shangoni; khombo kha i londe vhadzia-u-levha, i vha lozwe!" 
Psalms140:12 Nṋe ndi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu u lamulela vha tambudzwaho, a imelela vha kandeledzwaho." 
Psalms140:13 Ngoho vha fulufhedzeaho vha ḓo renda dzina ḽau, vha si na vhufhura vha ḓo u luvha." 
Psalms141:1 Muṋe washu, ndi a u rabela, ṱavhanya u mphalala, mpfe ndi tshi u ṱavhela mukosi!" 
Psalms141:2 Ngavhe thabelo yanga i tshi swika phanḓa hau unga zwioro; ndi tshi imisa zwanḓa zwi nge nduvho ya nga madekwana. 
Psalms141:3 Muṋe washu, mmbetshele a lindaho lulimi lwanga, linda vothi ḽa mulomo wanga." 
Psalms141:4 U songo litsha mbilu yanga i tshi tshingamela vhuvhini; ndi si ṱwe na vhaitazwivhi, ndi si longe tshanḓa kha zwo vhifhaho, ndi si ḽe mapfura avho." 
Psalms141:5 Muvhuya nga a nndaṱise; a tshi nkaidza nga vhuthu u khou nnḓodza mapfura ṱhohoni, ndi nga si vhuye nda zwi landula; hufha thabelo yanga i tshi dzula i tshi lwa na zwiito zwa vhavhi." 
Psalms141:6 Vhavhusi vhavho vha tshi poswa dzinngwani, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo tenda zwe nda amba." 
Psalms141:7 Marambo avho a ḓo balanganywa mulomoni wa dindi, zwa nga muthu a tshi lima a fhandukanya mavu." 
Psalms141:8 Muṋe washu, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, maṱo anga o sedza Iwe, ndi dzumbama nga Iwe, u songo nnditsha nda fa!" 
Psalms141:9 Ntsireledze, ndi si kande tshikwekwe tshe vha nthetshela, ndi si rithe mulavhu wa vhaitazwivhi!" 
Psalms141:10 Khunḓa nga i fashe muvei, nṋe ndi ponyoke ndi shavhe!" 
Psalms142:1 Ndi vhidzelela Muṋe washu nda tou ṱavha mukosi, nda ri, “Muṋe washu, nkhathutshele!”" 
Psalms142:2 Ndi tou mu ṱanzela zwa mbiluni yanga, nda mu vhudza zwi nndinaho." 
Psalms142:3 Ndi tshi kulekana nungo, ndi Iwe u no ḓivha zwoṱhe zwine nda ṱangana nazwo: Vho nthetshela zwikwekwe nḓilani yanga." 
Psalms142:4 Lavhelesa kha tshauḽa tshanga u vhone: A hu na a nndondaho, a thi na vhuyo, thi na mulondoli." 
Psalms142:5 Ndi lilela Iwe Muṋe washu, ndi ri, ndi Iwe vhushavhelo hanga, u mukovhe wanga shangoni ḽa vha tshilaho." 
Psalms142:6 Thetshelesa tshililo tshanga, ndo hanganea tshoṱhe; nndamukise kha vha ntovholaho, vha a nkunda." 
Psalms142:7 Mmvise dzhele, ndi kone u renda dzina ḽau; ndi hone vha fulufhedzeaho vha tshi ḓo nndalela vhoṱhe, vha tshi vhona vhuthu he wa nnyitela." 
Psalms143:1 Muṋe washu, ipfa thabelo yanga, nthetshelese ndi tshi u lilela; mphindule, u na ngoho, u a fulufhedzea." 
Psalms143:2 U songo vhuya wa ntsengisa; kha vhoṱhe vha tshilaho, ndi nnyi ane wa mu vhona e muvhuya?" 
Psalms143:3 Swina ḽanga ḽo ntsala murahu, ḽo ntsimbeledzela fhasi, ḽo ntsukumedzela swiswini, ha vho faho kale." 
Psalms143:4 Ndi vho ṱoḓa na u ṱovhowa, mbilu yanga yo hanganea." 
Psalms143:5 Ndi elelwa maḓuvha aḽa a kale; ndi elekanya zwoṱhe zwe wa nnyitela, nda humbula zwe zwanḓa zwau zwa shuma." 
Psalms143:6 Ndi livhisa zwanḓa zwanga ha Iwe, nda u rabela; ndo lavhelela phindulo yau, unga mavu o omaho o lindela mvula." 
Psalms143:7 Muṋe washu, ṱavhanya u mphindula, muya wanga u a kundelwa; u songo mpfuralela, ndi sa ḓo fana na vhane vha godimela tshaloni." 
Psalms143:8 Ḽi tshi tsha kha ndi vhone vhuthu hau, nṋe ndi fulufhela Iwe, ndi ḓikumedza Iwe, ntsumbedze nḓila ine nda fanela u i fara." 
Psalms143:9 Muṋe washu, ndi dzumbama nga Iwe, nndamukise kha maswina anga." 
Psalms143:10 U Mudzimu wanga, mpfunze u ita zwine wa funa; Muya wau muvhuya nga a nnyendedze ho linganelaho." 
Psalms143:11 Muṋe washu, ntshidze u tshi itela dzina ḽau; u a fulufhedzea, nṋule khomboni." 
Psalms143:12 Maswina anga a fhedze oṱhe, hufha lufuno lwau lu sa tseki; lozwa vhakandeledzi vhanga, hufha ndi mulanda wau." 
Psalms144:1 Nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu, Ene bako ḽanga! Ndi Ene a gudisaho zwanḓa zwanga u lwa, a funza minwe yanga u fara mafumo." 
Psalms144:2 Muṋe washu, ndi Iwe Mutsireledzi wanga a fulufhedzeaho, vhudzumbamo hanga, Mutshidzi wanga, tshiṱangu tshanga, vhukhudo hanga; ndi Iwe u no ita uri vhathu vhanga vha nnduvhe." 
Psalms144:3 Muṋe washu, nṋa muthu u tou vha mini u tshi vhuya wa mu sedza-vho? Mubebwa-nga-muthu u tou vha mini u tshi vhuya wa mu humbula-vho?" 
Psalms144:4 Muthu u nga mufemo, maḓuvha awe a fhira unga murunzi." 
Psalms144:5 Muṋe washu, tsisa makole au u tsele fhasi, kwama dzithavha dzi dube vhutsi." 
Psalms144:6 Balanganya maswina nga phenyo dzau, posa misevhe yau u vha shakulise." 
Psalms144:7 Onyolosa tshanḓa tshau u ngeo ṱaḓulu, u ntshidze ndi si kumbiwe nga muḓalo wa maḓi, u nndamukise zwanḓani zwa vhatsinda;" 
Psalms144:8 milomo yavho i amba mazwifhi, naho vha tshi ana vha anela mazwifhi." 
Psalms144:9 Mudzimu, ndi ḓo u imbela luimbo luswa, ndi ḓo u lidzela haripa ya thale dza fumi." 
Psalms144:10 Ndi Iwe u no ita uri mahosi a kunde; u lamukisa nṋe Dafita mukoma wau. 
Psalms144:11 Nndamukise kha pfumo ḽa vhuhali, u ntshidze zwanḓani zwa vhatsinda; milomo yavho i amba mazwifhi, naho vha tshi ana vha anela mazwifhi." 
Psalms144:12 Ngavhe vhatuka vhashu u bva hanani havho vha tshi nga zwimela zwi no aluwa zwo khwaṱha; vhasidzana vhashu vha nga phuphu dza guḓani dzo vhaḓelwaho u ṱama pfamo. 
Psalms144:13 Ngavhe zwiṱaṱari zwashu zwi tshi ḓala, zwa wa muwa nga mbeu ya tshakha-tshakha; nngu dzashu mafuloni ashu dza dzwala zwigidi na mahumi a zwigidi," 
Psalms144:14 kholomo dzashu dza vha na maḓamu, hu si vhe na swina ḽi no ri tshoṱhela kana ḽa ri thuba, magondoni ashu hu si pfale zwililo." 
Psalms144:15 Vha na mashudu vha no nga vhenevho. Lu na mashudu lushaka lune Mudzimu walwo a vha Muṋe washu. 
Psalms145:1 Mudzimu wanga, Khosi yanga, ndi ḓo ḓivhadza vhuhulu hau, nda u livhuha lini na lini;" 
Psalms145:2 ndi ḓo u livhuha misi yoṱhe, nda renda dzina ḽau lini na lini." 
Psalms145:3 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, thendo khulu yo mu fanela, vhuhulu hawe a vhu ṱalukanyei." 
Psalms145:4 Mishumo yau i ḓo rendwa nga mirafho na mirafho, vha ḓo ḓivhadza mishumo yau mihulu." 
Psalms145:5 Ndi ḓo dzula ndi tshi elekanya vhugala hau, na vhurena, na lupenyo, na maḓembe e wa ita." 
Psalms145:6 Vhathu vha ḓo ḓivhadza maḓembe au a maanḓa, a ofhisaho, nṋe nda ḓivhadza vhuhulu hau." 
Psalms145:7 Vha ḓo pembelela vhuthu hau vhuhulu, nṋe nda fhululedza u fulufhedzea hau." 
Psalms145:8 Muṋe washu u na tshilidzi na khathutshelo, ha ṱavhanyi u sinyuwa, lufuno lwawe ndi luhulu, a lu dzinginyei." 
Psalms145:9 Muṋe washu u tonda vhoṱhe, vhoṱhe vhe a vha vhumba u vha pfela vhuṱungu." 
Psalms145:10 Muṋe washu, zwisikwa zwau zwoṱhe zwi a u renda, vhalanda vhau vha fulufhedzeaho vha a u livhuha." 
Psalms145:11 Vha ḓivhadza vhurena ha muvhuso wau, vha amba nga mishumo yau mihulu," 
Psalms145:12 u ḓivhadza vhathu mishumo yau ya maanḓa, na vhugala ha vhurena ha muvhuso wau." 
Psalms145:13 Vhuhosi hau a vhu fheli, muvhuso wau a u gumi, u ḓi ima ha fhira mirafho na mirafho." 
Psalms145:14 Muṋe washu u tika vhane vha khou wa, a vusa vho kandeledzwaho." 
Psalms145:15 Maṱo a vhoṱhe o sedza Iwe, u vha ṋea zwiḽiwa nga tshifhinga tsho teaho;" 
Psalms145:16 u putulula tshanḓa tshau nga mbilu tshena, wa fusha zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho." 
Psalms145:17 Muṋe washu u a fulufhedzea kha zwoṱhe zwine a ita, vhuthu hawe vhu vhonala kha mishumo yawe yoṱhe." 
Psalms145:18 Muṋe washu u tsini ha vhoṱhe vhane vha mu rabela, vhane vha mu rabela vhe ngohoni;" 
Psalms145:19 vhane vha mu ofha u vha ṋea zwine vha lila; u pfa na mukosi wavho a vha tshidza. 
Psalms145:20 Muṋe washu u londola vhane vha mu funa, vhavhi vhone u a vha lozwa." 
Psalms145:21 Mulomo wanga u ḓo renda Muṋe washu, vhathu vhoṱhe nga vha rende dzina ḽawe ḽikhethwa, lini na lini." 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Kha ndi rende Muṋe washu." 
Psalms146:2 Ndi ḓo renda Muṋe washu ndi tshi kha ḓi tshila; ndi ḓo renda Mudzimu nga nyimbo ndi tshi kha ḓi vha hone. 
Psalms146:3 U songo fulufhela vhavhusi, ndi vhathu zwavho, a vha tshidzi;" 
Psalms146:4 muya wavho u tshi pfuluwa vha humela mavuni, ha mbo ḓi vha u pfuvha ha maano avho." 
Psalms146:5 Wa mashudu ndi uyo a no ḓitika nga Mudzimu wa Jakopo, a lavhelela Muṋe washu Mudzimu wawe," 
Psalms146:6 o sikaho ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, na lwanzhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo; u fulufhedzea hawe a hu shanduki." 
Psalms146:7 U sengela vho kandeledzwaho, vha na nḓala a vha fusha; Muṋe washu u vhofholola zwivhoxwa." 
Psalms146:8 Muṋe washu u bonyolosa mabofu, Muṋe washu u vusa vho waho, Muṋe washu u funa vha fulufhedzeaho," 
Psalms146:9 Muṋe washu u londola dziṱhunḓu, u tika tshilikadzi na tsiwana, nḓila dza vhavhi dzone u a dzi piringanya." 
Psalms146:10 Muṋe washu u ḓo vhusa lini na lini, Mudzimu wau, iwe Tsioni, ndi wa mirafho yoṱhe. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Ndi zwavhuḓi hani u renda Mudzimu washu nga nyimbo! Zwi takadza hani! O tewa nga thendo." 
Psalms147:2 Muṋe washu u fhaṱa Jerusalema; u kuvhanganya Vhaisraele vho balanganaho. 
Psalms147:3 U fhodza vha mbilu dzi vhavhaho, a pomba mbonzhe dzavho." 
Psalms147:4 U vhea tshivhalo tsha ṋaledzi, iṅwe na iṅwe a i rina dzina." 
Psalms147:5 Muṋe washu ndi muhulwane, maanḓa awe ha konei, ṱhalukanyo yawe a i gumi." 
Psalms147:6 Muṋe washu u vusa vho kandekanywaho, vhavhi vhone u vha posa fhasi." 
Psalms147:7 Livhuhani Muṋe washu nga nyimbo; Mudzimu washu mu rendeni nga mbila. 
Psalms147:8 U pila lutombo nga makole, ḽifhasi a ḽi nisela mvula, mivhunduni a medza hatsi." 
Psalms147:9 U ṋea dziphukha zwiḽiwa zwadzo, na mafhondo a mahunguvhu a tshi lila." 
Psalms147:10 Maanḓa a bere a si one ane a mu takadza, na vhuhali ha vhahali a si hone vhune a vhu takalela;" 
Psalms147:11 Muṋe washu u takadzwa nga vhane vha mu ofha, vhane vha fulufhela lufuno lwawe lu sa dzinginyei." 
Psalms147:12 Iwe Jerusalema, renda Muṋe washu, iwe Tsioni, renda Mudzimu wau!" 
Psalms147:13 Ndi Ene a no khwaṱhisa tswinga dzau, a shudufhadza vhana vhau." 
Psalms147:14 U ladza shango masakhani au, a u fusha nga mavhele avhuḓi." 
Psalms147:15 U vhetshela ḽifhasi mulayo; zwine a amba zwi mbo ḓi itea. 
Psalms147:16 U nisa gabugu ya tshena unga muḓali, a hashekanya mahaḓa a nga milora," 
Psalms147:17 a nisa tshifhango tsha nga thombwana; ndi nnyi ane a nga konḓelela phepho yawe? 
Psalms147:18 A dovha a tou amba fhedzi zwa mbo ḓi ṋoka, a fhungisa mimuya yawe ha ela maḓi." 
Psalms147:19 O dzumbululela Jakopo ipfi ḽawe, a ḓivhadza Israele pfanelo dze a vhofha." 
Psalms147:20 Hezwo ha athu zwi itela dziṅwe tshakha, dzone a dzi ḓivhi milayo yawe. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Rendani Muṋe washu ni makoleni, mu rendeni ngeo ṱaḓulu!" 
Psalms148:2 Mu rendeni, inwi vharuṅwa vhawe noṱhe, mu rendeni, inwi mara awe noṱhe!" 
Psalms148:3 Ḓuvha na ṅwedzi, mu rendeni, mu rendeni noṱhe, inwi ṋaledzi dzi penyaho!" 
Psalms148:4 Mu rendeni, inwi maṱaḓulu a ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu, na inwi maḓi a re nṱha ha lutombo!" 
Psalms148:5 Zwoṱhe nga zwi rende dzina ḽa Muṋe washu; Ene o amba, zwa vha hone!" 
Psalms148:6 O zwi imisa vhudzuloni hazwo lini na lini, a zwi vhetshela mulayo u sa pfukwi." 
Psalms148:7 Zwi re fhano fhasi nga zwi rende Muṋe washu, na inwi mabuka a lwanzhe, na inwi mativha," 
Psalms148:8 na mulilo, na tshifhango, na mahaḓa, na khuli, na maḓumbu, a khunyeledza zwe a amba." 
Psalms148:9 Dzithavha na zwikwara zwoṱhe nga zwi mu rende, na miri ya mitshelo, na maṱaka oṱhe," 
Psalms148:10 na phukha dza ḓaka, na zwifuwo zwoṱhe, na zwikokovhi, na zwiṋoni," 
Psalms148:11 khathihi na mahosi, na tshakha dzoṱhe, na vhakololo, na vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha shango," 
Psalms148:12 na vhaṱhannga, na vhasidzana, na vhakalaha, na vhana!" 
Psalms148:13 Vhoṱhe nga vha rende dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, dzina ḽawe ndi ḽihulu ḽi ḽoṱhe, vhugala hawe vhu alama ḽifhasi na ḽiṱaḓulu!" 
Psalms148:14 U dzula o kuvhatedza vhathu vha Israele, o vha ombela shambo, uri vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho vha mu rende. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Imbelani Muṋe washu luimbo luswa, mu rendeni tshivhidzoni tsha vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho!" 
Psalms149:2 Israele, takalelani Muvhumbi waṋu, vhana vha Tsioni, pembelelani Khosi yaṋu!" 
Psalms149:3 Nga vha rende dzina ḽawe nga u ḓala muḓalo, vha mu imbele hu tshi lila mirumba na mbila!" 
Psalms149:4 Muṋe washu u takalela vhathu vhawe; vha u ḓiṱukufhadza u vha ṱama nga gundo. 
Psalms149:5 Vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho nga vha pembele, o vha ṋea vhugala, vha fhululedze nangwe vho lala." 
Psalms149:6 Nga vha rende Mudzimu vha tou ṱavha mukosi, vhó fara mapanga a mutsheahoṱhe;" 
Psalms149:7 Ene u lifhedza dzitshakha, a laṱisa vhathu," 
Psalms149:8 a vhofha mahosi avho nga dzigeḓane, vharangaphanḓa vha vhoxwa nga tsimbi," 
Psalms149:9 u ralo ha vha u khunyeledza khaṱhulo yo ṅwalwaho, na u pfufha vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho nga vhugala. Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu! Rendani Mudzimu nḓuni yawe khethwa, rendani Ramaanḓa wa ngei lutomboni!" 
Psalms150:2 Mu rendeni, o ita zwihulu! Mu rendeni, vhuhulu hawe a vhu konadzei!" 
Psalms150:3 Mu rendeni nga phalaphala, mu rendeni nga haripa na tshihwana," 
Psalms150:4 mu rendeni nga mirumba ni tshi tshina, mu rendeni nga thale na zwiṱiringo," 
Psalms150:5 mu rendeni no kungela tshwayo, mu rendeni nga tshwayo dzi bvumaho!" 
Psalms150:6 Zwoṱhe zwi femaho, nga zwi rende Muṋe washu! Haleluya, nga hu rendwe Muṋe washu!" 
Proverbs1:1 Iyi ndi mirero ya Solomoni, ṅwana wa Dafita, khosi ya Israele." 
Proverbs1:2 I funza muthu vhuṱali, ya mu laya, a ṱalukanya maipfi a vha re na nḓivho." 
Proverbs1:3 Ndi nyeletshedzo i no funza muthu u tshila nga vhuronwane, e kwae, a tshi ita zwi re zwone, a si na vhufhura," 
Proverbs1:4 mushaanzhele a vha na nzhele, muṱhannga a vha na nḓivho na vhusedzi." 
Proverbs1:5 Na munna wa vhuṱali nga a thetshelese a engedze nḓivho yawe, wa ṱhalukanyo a wane vhutsila," 
Proverbs1:6 a konou ṱalukanya zwine vhaṱali vha amba: mirero yavho, na zwiga, na dzithai." 
Proverbs1:7 U ofha Mudzimu ndi tshone tshisima tsha vhuṱali; matsilu ndi one a no nyadza vhuṱali na u laiwa. 
Proverbs1:8 Ṅwananga, thetshelesa khotsi au a tshi u laya, u si hane mme au a tshi u funza." 
Proverbs1:9 Ndi tshone tshiala tshi tondaho ṱhoho yau, ndi hone vhulungu vhu nakisaho mukulo wau." 
Proverbs1:10 Ṅwananga, arali vhavhi vha tshi u kunga, u songo tenda." 
Proverbs1:11 Arali vha tshi ri, “Nga ri yo lalela vhathu ri vha ponde, ri sokou phuthuma a sa huvhadzi muthu;" 
Proverbs1:12 nga ri tou nga lufu, ri vha mile vha tshi kha ḓi tshila, vha godimele tshaloni vhá songo lwala!" 
Proverbs1:13 Ri ḓo wana lupfumo lwa tshakha-tshakha, ra ḓadza nnḓu dzashu ngalwo." 
Proverbs1:14 Ita madeṅwa na riṋe, ri kovhekane tshelede!”" 
Proverbs1:15 Ṅwananga, u songo tshimbila navho, u songo longa mulenzhe wau nḓilani yavho;" 
Proverbs1:16 milenzhe yavho i gidimela vhuvhini, vha gidimela u shulula malofha." 
Proverbs1:17 Tshenzhela unga tshiṋoni tshine muthu a tshi rea tsho mu sedza. 
Proverbs1:18 Havha vhathu vha lalela malofha a vhone vhaṋe; khunḓa i ḓo fasha muvei. 
Proverbs1:19 Hoho ndi hone vhuyo ha vhane vha bindula nga vhuvemu; ulwo lupfumo lu vha ḽa ṱhoho. 
Proverbs1:20 Vhuṱali vhu khou vhidzelela vhú gondoni," 
Proverbs1:21 vhu ṱavha mukosi ho ḓalaho vhathu, vhu amba vhu mafhoroni a miḓi, vhu ri," 
Proverbs1:22 “Inwi ni si na nzhele, ni ḓo shaya nzhele u swika lini? Vhanyefuli vha ḓo nyefula u swika lini? Matsilu a ḓo vhenga nḓivho u swika lini?" 
Proverbs1:23 Thetshelesani ndi tshi ni kaidza, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni eletshedza, nda ni shululela zwa mbiluni yanga." 
Proverbs1:24 Ndo ni vhidza na lamba u nthetshelesa, nda ni vhidza nga tshanḓa na si zwi dzhiele nzhele." 
Proverbs1:25 A no ngo londa nyeletshedzo dzanga, ndi tshi ni kaidza na si tende." 
Proverbs1:26 Ndi zwone, ní khomboni ndi ḓo ni sea-vho, ni tshi welwa nga nyofho nda ni holedza." 
Proverbs1:27 Musi zwi ofhisaho zwi tshi ni wela unga ḓumbu, khombo i tshi ni swiela unga tshiḓumbumukwe, vhuṱungu na phanzi zwi tshi ni tsikeledza," 
Proverbs1:28 ndi hone ni tshi ḓo nṱavhela mukosi nda si aravhe, na nṱoḓa nga maṱo matswuku na si nngwane." 
Proverbs1:29 Hufha no vhenga nḓivho, na si nange u ofha Muṋe washu." 
Proverbs1:30 A no ngo thetshelesa nyeletshedzo dzanga, no nyadza ndi tshi ni kaidza." 
Proverbs1:31 Ndi zwine na ḓo kaṋa zwe na zwala, na fura vhufhura haṋu." 
Proverbs1:32 Vha si na nzhele vha konyolela matanda nḓevheni, vha fa ngazwo, matsilu a vhulawa nga u ḓiḓivha havho." 
Proverbs1:33 Huno, a no nthetshelesa u ḓo tshila nga mulalo, a sa dinwi nga tshithu, a sa ofhi khombo.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Ṅwananga, arali wa pfa maipfi anga, wa vhulunga ndaela dzanga," 
Proverbs2:2 nḓevhe dzau dza thetshelesa vhuṱali, mbilu yau ya ṱalukanya –" 
Proverbs2:3 ndi ngoho, arali wa vhidzelela nḓivho, wa huwelela ṱhalukanyo," 
Proverbs2:4 wa i ṱoḓa unga siliva, wa i ṱoḓisesa unga lupfumo lwo dzumbwaho," 
Proverbs2:5 ndi hone u tshi ḓo ṱalukanya uri u ofha Muṋe washu zwi amba mini, wa vhona uri u ḓivha Mudzimu ndi mini." 
Proverbs2:6 Vhuṱali ndi mpho ya Muṋe washu, nḓivho na ṱhalukanyo zwi bva mulomoni wawe." 
Proverbs2:7 Vha si na vhufhura u ḓo ita uri zwi vha nakele, ndi Ene tshiṱangu tsha vho faraho nḓila i sa solisei." 
Proverbs2:8 U linda nḓila dza vha no ita zwi re zwone, a tsireledza vhalanda vhawe vha fulufhedzeaho." 
Proverbs2:9 Arali wa nthetshelesa, ndi hone u tshi ḓo ḓivha u ita zwi re zwone, zwi sa khakhi, zwi sa solisei." 
Proverbs2:10 Ndi hone vhuṱali vhu tshi ḓo dzhena mbiluni yau, wa pfa nḓivho i tshi u ḓifhela." 
Proverbs2:11 Vhuronwane vhu ḓo u tsireledza, ṱhalukanyo ya u londola." 
Proverbs2:12 Vhuṱali vhu ḓo u pambusa nḓilani mmbi, wa fhambana na vha nyambo dza u thutha," 
Proverbs2:13 vhane vha pambuwa kha nḓila yo lugaho, vha fara i yaho swiswini," 
Proverbs2:14 vha takalela u ita zwivhi, vha ḓikhoḓa nga nyambo mmbi dza u thutha," 
Proverbs2:15 vhathu vha nḓila dza magombikwa, vho bvaho nḓilani." 
Proverbs2:16 Ndi hone u tshi ḓo kona u tinya musadzi wa phombwe, ane a u fhura nga lulimi lwa u ḓifha, hone e wa muṅwe," 
Proverbs2:17 ó ṱala munna we a mu vhinga a tshee nga hawe, a hangwa mulanga we a vhofha na Mudzimu wawe;" 
Proverbs2:18 u mbwandamela lufuni hune ha ḓo vha hone nnḓu yawe, nḓila dzawe dzi livha hu no dzula vho faho." 
Proverbs2:19 Vhane vha mu dalela a vha tsha vhuya, a vha tsha vhona nḓila i yaho vhutshiloni." 
Proverbs2:20 Zwenezwo tshimbila nḓilani ya vhavhuya, u nambatele ya vha fulufhedzeaho;" 
Proverbs2:21 vha si na vhufhura vha ḓo kovhelwa shango, vha sa solisei vha ḓo sala khaḽo." 
Proverbs2:22 Vhavhi vhone vha ḓo swielwa shangoni, vha vhufhura vha ḓo tupulwa khaḽo." 
Proverbs3:1 Ṅwananga, u songo hangwa pfunzo yanga, mbilu yau nga i vhulunge ndayo dzanga;" 
Proverbs3:2 zwi ḓo engedza vhutshilo hau wa tshila miṅwaha minzhi, wa ḓi vha na mashudu." 
Proverbs3:3 Dzula u tshi funa vhathu u tshi fulufhedzea; hezwo itou zwi kungela mukuloni wau; zwi ṅwale mbiluni yau," 
Proverbs3:4 ndi hone u tshi ḓo vha na phungo mbuya, wa takalelwa nga Mudzimu na vhathu." 
Proverbs3:5 Fulufhela Mudzimu nga mbilu yoṱhe, u songo ḓitika nga nḓivho yau." 
Proverbs3:6 U tshi ita tshithu, ranga u humbula Ene; u ḓo u onyolosela dzinḓila." 
Proverbs3:7 U songo vhona unga wo ṱalifha; ofha Muṋe washu u ile vhuvhi," 
Proverbs3:8 ndi hone muvhili wau u tshi ḓo takala, wa pfa u na nungo." 
Proverbs3:9 Hulisa Muṋe washu nga lupfumo lwau, na nga zwiranzhe zwa khaṋo yau," 
Proverbs3:10 ndi hone zwiṱaṱari zwau zwi tshi ḓo ḓala zwa tou wa muwa, nkho dzau dza tou balea nga waini." 
Proverbs3:11 Ṅwananga, u songo nyadza ndayo dza Muṋe washu, a tshi u kaidza u songo zwi sanda;" 
Proverbs3:12 Muṋe washu u kaidza vhane a vha funa, unga khotsi a tshi kaidza vhana vhane a vha takalela." 
Proverbs3:13 U na mashudu munna ane a wana vhuṱali, ane a kona u ṱalukanya;" 
Proverbs3:14 o pfuma u fhira a re na siliva, u bindula u fhira a re na musuku." 
Proverbs3:15 Vhuṱali vhu fhira nungu dza mutengo muhulu; zwine muthu a zwi tama, na tshithihi a tshiho tshi no vhambedzwa naho." 
Proverbs3:16 Ho puta ndalamo kha tshauḽa, kha tshamonde ho puta lupfumo na khuliso." 
Proverbs3:17 Vhu u ṋea vhutshilo vhu takadzaho, wa ḓi dzula u na mulalo;" 
Proverbs3:18 vhane vha vhu kuvhatedza vha vhona vhu muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo; vha na mashudu vhane vha vhu nambatela. 
Proverbs3:19 Vhuṱali ndi he Muṋe washu a sika ḽifhasi ngaho, ḽiṱaḓulu a ḽi adza nga ṱhalukanyo," 
Proverbs3:20 a fhandekanya mativha nga nḓivho yawe, makole a rothisa ṅwando." 
Proverbs3:21 Ṅwananga, dzula wo dzivhuluwa, u vhe na vhuronwane; zwenezwo zwi songo u ponyoka," 
Proverbs3:22 zwi ḓo u ṋea vhutshilo, zwa nakisa mukulo wau," 
Proverbs3:23 wa tshimbila u sa ofhi tshithu, mulenzhe wau wa si khukhulwe." 
Proverbs3:24 Wó lala a u nga ofhi tshithu, wó eḓela u ḓo pfa u tshi ḓiphiṋa." 
Proverbs3:25 U songo ofha khombo dza tshihaḓu, kana phanzi dzine dza wela vhavhi;" 
Proverbs3:26 Muṋe washu u ḓo vha Ene fulufhelo ḽau, u ḓo tsireledza mulenzhe wau u si fashwe." 
Proverbs3:27 U songo shaisa vhaṅwe zwivhuya zwo vha fanelaho arali zwi zwanḓani zwau. 
Proverbs3:28 U songo ri u na tshithu henefho, wa vhudza muṅwe wa ri, “Tshimbila, u vhuye matshelo, ndi ḓo u ṋea.”" 
Proverbs3:29 U songo lukela muṅwe vhunwa, ngeno a tshi u fulufhela." 
Proverbs3:30 U songo sokou pomoka muthu á songo u khakhela. 
Proverbs3:31 U songo tama vhutshilo ha ḽivemu, u songo vhuya wa edzisa zwiito zwawe;" 
Proverbs3:32 Muṋe washu u nyala phaṱhi; vha si na vhufhura a somolana navho zwa haṋwani. 
Proverbs3:33 Muṋe washu u teketela nnḓu ya muvhi, ya muvhuya a i shudufhadza." 
Proverbs3:34 U goḓa vhagoḓi; vha ḓiṱukufhadzaho a vha itela vhuthu. 
Proverbs3:35 Pfufho ya vhaṱali ndi khuliso; matsilu one a ḓo niwa nga ṱhoni. 
Proverbs4:1 Inwi vhana, thetshelesani ndayo dza khotsi, ni kolongonye nḓevhe uri ni wane ṱhalukanyo;" 
Proverbs4:2 ndi ni ṋea ndayo dzavhuḓi, ni songo furalela pfunzo yanga." 
Proverbs4:3 Zwiḽa ndi tshee mutukana muṱani wa khotsi anga, ndi tshi kha ḓi vha mutete, ndi tshee ṅwana muthihi fhedzi wa mme anga," 
Proverbs4:4 khotsi anga vho mpfunza vha ri, “Mbilu yau nga i nambatele maipfi anga, vhulunga ndayo dzanga, ndi hone u tshi ḓo tshila." 
Proverbs4:5 Wana vhuṱali, wana ṱhalukanyo; u songo hangwa zwine nda amba, u songo zwi nyadza." 
Proverbs4:6 U songo furalela vhuṱali, vhu ḓo u tsireledza; vhu fune, vhu ḓo u londola." 
Proverbs4:7 Tshi no fhira zwoṱhe ndi vhuṱali; vhona uri u vhu wane, renga ṱhalukanyo nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha nazwo." 
Proverbs4:8 Vhu vhone vhu tshi lilelwa, ndi hone vhu tshi ḓo u hulisa ha u gagamisa; arali wa vhu kuvhatedza vhu ḓo u tonda;" 
Proverbs4:9 vhu ḓo u ambadza tshiala ṱhohoni, ha u ṋea khare ya vhugala.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Ṅwananga, thetshelesa u ṱanganedze maipfi anga, ndi hone u tshi ḓo lalama." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndi ḓo u funza nḓila ya vhuṱali, nda u endedza kha nḓilatswititi." 
Proverbs4:12 U tshi tshimbila a u nga kundwi, u tshi gidima a u nga khukhulwi." 
Proverbs4:13 Nambatela ndayo dzi si u ṱutshele, dzi londole, dzi ḓo u ṋea vhutshilo." 
Proverbs4:14 U songo kanda nḓilani ya vhavhi, kana wa fara ya vho furalelaho Mudzimu." 
Proverbs4:15 I tinye, u si tshimbile khayo, pambuwa khayo u i fhire." 
Proverbs4:16 Vhone a vha lali vha songo tshinya, a vha fari khofhe vha sa athu bidigamisa muthu." 
Proverbs4:17 Vhuvhi ndi tshone tshiḽiwa tshavho, vhupondi ndi yone waini yavho." 
Proverbs4:18 Nḓila ya vha no fulufhedzea yone i nga tshedza tsha maḓautsha, tshine tsha ḓi penya tshi tshi ya u swika masiari tshivhangalala." 
Proverbs4:19 Hone nḓila ya vhavhi i nga swiswi ḽihulu, a vha ḓivhi tshine tsha vha khukhula." 
Proverbs4:20 Ṅwananga, kolongonya nḓevhe u pfe maipfi anga, u tshingamisele nḓevhe kha zwine nda amba." 
Proverbs4:21 Maipfi anga a songo u ponyoka, a vhulunge mbiluni yau;" 
Proverbs4:22 ane a a wana, a mu ṋea vhutshilo, na muvhili wawe wa takala woṱhe." 
Proverbs4:23 Tshihulwane tshi no fhira zwoṱhe, linda mbilu yau, ndi yone i no vhumba vhutshilo hau." 
Proverbs4:24 Nyambo dza vhumbulu dzi songo pfala mulomoni wau, zwiambo zwa vhufhura nga zwi vhe kule na iwe." 
Proverbs4:25 Maṱo au nga a sedze phanḓa, u ṱalele zwi re phanḓa hau." 
Proverbs4:26 Dzula wo dzudzanya nga vhuronwane zwine wa ita, ndi hone zwoṱhe zwi tshi ḓo u nakela." 
Proverbs4:27 U songo pambutshela kha tshauḽa kana tsha monde, tinya vhuvhi hoṱhe." 
Proverbs5:1 Ṅwananga, thetshelesa ndi tshi u vhudza zwe nda vhona, ipfa ndi tshi u eletshedza," 
Proverbs5:2 uri u vhe na vhuronwane, zwine wa amba zwi sumbe nḓivho." 
Proverbs5:3 Milomo ya musadzi wa phombwe i ela mutoli, haṋwani hawe hu suvhelela u fhira mapfura," 
Proverbs5:4 a fhedza nga u kalakata unga lunungwane, a halifha unga banga ḽa mutsheahoṱhe." 
Proverbs5:5 U ḓo u hwala a u tsisela lufuni, o livha vhudzulavhafu." 
Proverbs5:6 Nḓila dzi isaho vhutshiloni ha dzi londi, u sokou tendeleka a sa ḓivhi hune a ya." 
Proverbs5:7 Zwino iwe ṅwananga, nthetshelese, u songo pambuwa kha zwine nda u vhudza:" 
Proverbs5:8 Mu shavhe, u vhe kule nae, u songo vhuya wa sendela tsini na vothi ḽa nnḓu yawe," 
Proverbs5:9 hu sa vho ḓo huliswa vhaṅwe, iwe wa nyadziwa, maanḓa au a vho ḓo fhedzwa nga wa tshiṱuhu," 
Proverbs5:10 vhatsinda vha ḽa lupfumo lwau, tsha biko ḽau tsha pfumisa mutsinda," 
Proverbs5:11 wa vho fa u tshi gomela, ṋama yau na muvhili zwo ṱahala," 
Proverbs5:12 wa vho ri, “Ndo ḓiitelani khundavhalai? Mbilu yanga yo nyadzelani u kaidzwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ndo nyadza vhafunzi vhanga vha tshi nndaya, vha tshi mpfunza nda konyolela matanda nḓevheni!" 
Proverbs5:14 Ndo ṱoḓou lovha ndi ṱano!” 
Proverbs5:15 A u vhoni ṅwananga, iwe inwa maḓi a bvaho tshisimani tshau, ane a gubunyea á songo dzikuswa nga muṅwe." 
Proverbs5:16 Kani u tama zwisima zwau zwi tshi ela na shango, maḓi a milambwana yau a ṱuwa na gondo?" 
Proverbs5:17 Nga zwi vhe zwau u woṱhe, u songo ṱanganelana na vhatsinda." 
Proverbs5:18 Tshisima tshau nga tshi shudufhadzwe, u takalele musadzi we wa mu vhinga u tshee nga hau." 
Proverbs5:19 O naka sa ntsana, u tamisa sa ngululu. Ngavhe lunako lwawe lu tshi u nyanyula misi yoṱhe, a dzula o thuba mbilu yau." 
Proverbs5:20 Ṅwananga, ndi mini mbilu yau i tshi nga thubwa nga musadzi wa phombwe, wa kuvhatedzana na musadzi a si wau?" 
Proverbs5:21 Nḓila dza muthu dzi ḓivhiwa nga Muṋe washu, u sedza hoṱhe hune a tshimbila." 
Proverbs5:22 Muvhi u fashwa nga vhuvhi hawe, u vhoxwa nga nnzwa dza vhutshinyi hawe;" 
Proverbs5:23 u vhulawa nga u shaya mulayo, a xedzwa nga vhutsilu hawe vhuhulu." 
Proverbs6:1 Ṅwananga, arali wo ḓivhofha u lifha mulandu wa muṅwe, wa ana wa ri u ḓo lifha mulandu wawe une a nga ita," 
Proverbs6:2 wa tshenuwa wó fashwa nga zwe wa amba, wó ḓifasha nga maipfi au," 
Proverbs6:3 ḓivha uri wo wela zwanḓani zwa muṅwe. Zwenezwo ita hezwi ṅwananga, uri u kone u ḓivhofholola: Iya khae u ḓisole, u mu luvhelele uri a u vhofholole." 
Proverbs6:4 U songo vhuya wa eḓela, u songo vhuya we khofhe zhambu," 
Proverbs6:5 u sa athu ḓivhofholola unga ntsa yo ponyoka muzwimi, unga tshiṋoni tsho ponyoka tshikwekweni tsha murei." 
Proverbs6:6 Mubva ndiwe, edzou sedza lusunzi, edzou sedza maitele alwo u ṱalifhe:" 
Proverbs6:7 A lu na mulangi, a lu na muingameli, a lu na muvhusi," 
Proverbs6:8 naho zwo ralo lu ḓivhulungela mbuvha tshilimo, lwa ḓikuvhanganyela zwiḽiwa zwalwo nga tshifhinga tsha khaṋo." 
Proverbs6:9 Mubva ndiwe, u ḓo lala u swika lini? U ḓo vuwa lini khofheni dzau?" 
Proverbs6:10 “Khofhenyana nandi, ndi tou zhambu kathihi, ndi ḓikuvhatedze ndi awelenyana!”" 
Proverbs6:11 Ndi hone vhushai vhu tshi u ḓela unga ḽivemu ḽi na thonga, vhusiwana ha u ḓela unga muhali o kungelaho zwihali." 
Proverbs6:12 Muthu ane a enda a tshi shanda mafhungo nga lulimi lwawe ndi muthu muvhi a sa ḓivhalei. 
Proverbs6:13 Ú sinyedza nga maṱo, a ita na u kwetedza nga ṋayo, a sumba nga minwe;" 
Proverbs6:14 u dzula a tshi luka vhunwa nga mbilu yawe, a endela u luṱanya vhathu." 
Proverbs6:15 Onoyo ha nga lengi u welwa nga khombo, kathihi fhedzi u ḓo pwashekanywa lu sa lafhei." 
Proverbs6:16 Hu na zwithu zwiṱanu na tshithihi zwine Muṋe washu a zwi vhenga; zwine zwa mu nengisa zwi swika zwiṱanu na zwivhili: 
Proverbs6:17 ndi maṱo a u ḓihudza, ndi lulimi lwa u zwifha, ndi zwanḓa zwi no shulula malofha a vhathu vha si na mulandu," 
Proverbs6:18 ndi mbilu i no luka maano mavhi, ndi milenzhe i no gidimela vhuvhini," 
Proverbs6:19 ndi ṱhanzi i si ya ngoho i no amba mazwifhi, ndi muthu a no luṱanya vhana vha munna." 
Proverbs6:20 Ṅwananga, vhulunga ndayo dza khotsi au, u songo nyadza pfunzo ya mme au;" 
Proverbs6:21 i vhulunge mbiluni misi yoṱhe, i kungele mukuloni wau;" 
Proverbs6:22 u tshi tshimbila, i ḓo u endedza, wó lala i ḓo u londola, u tshi vuwa i ḓo davhidzana na iwe." 
Proverbs6:23 Milayo ndi luvhone, pfunzo ndi tshedza, u kaidzwa na u laiwa ndi yone nḓila ya vhutshilo;" 
Proverbs6:24 zwi u tsireledza kha musadzi muvhi, uri musadzi a si wau a si u fashe nga haṋwani hawe ha u ḓifha." 
Proverbs6:25 Mbilu yau i songo tama lunako lwawe, u songo tenda a tshi u kunga nga u u sinyedza;" 
Proverbs6:26 musadzi wa phombwe u rengwa nga mukonde wa vhurotho, hone musadzi wa muṅwe u lixwa nga ṱhoho yau." 
Proverbs6:27 U nga okela mulilo khanani nguvho dzau dza si swe naa? 
Proverbs6:28 U nga tshimbila nṱha ha masimbe ṋayo dzau dza si rungunye naa? 
Proverbs6:29 Zwo ralo kha muthu a no ya kha musadzi a si wawe: ane a mu kwama a nga si kundwe u lifhedzwa. 
Proverbs6:30 A ri nyadzi fobvu arali ḽi tshi tswiswa nga nḓala," 
Proverbs6:31 hone arali ḽa farwa ḽi ḓo lifha kaṱanu na kavhili; ḽi ḓo lifha ḽa sala ḽi si na tshithu. 
Proverbs6:32 Ane a ita vhupombwe ene ha na ṱhalukanyo; ane a vhuya a ralo u a ḓivhulaha. 
Proverbs6:33 U ḓo vha na mbonzhe a nyadzea; ṱhoni dzawe dzi nga si phumulwe. 
Proverbs6:34 A hu na tshi no sinyusa munna u fhira u pwashelwa muḓi; a tshi lifhedza ha tsha khathutshela; 
Proverbs6:35 ha tsha tenda tshipfumelo; tshifhiwa naho tshi tshingafhani a tshi mu rudzi mbilu. 
Proverbs7:1 Ṅwananga, tevhedza zwine nda amba, zwine nda u vhudza u songo litsha u zwi ita;" 
Proverbs7:2 ita zwine nda u vhudza, ndi hone u tshi ḓo tshila; pfunzo yanga i vhulunge unga tshanga ya iṱo ḽau;" 
Proverbs7:3 itou zwi vhofhelela kha minwe yau, u zwi ṅwale mbiluni yau." 
Proverbs7:4 Amba na Vhuṱali u ri, “U khaladzi anga.” Ṱhalukanyo u i ite khonani yau vhukumakuma;" 
Proverbs7:5 zwi u tsireledza kha musadzi a si wau, wa konou tinya haṋwani ha u ḓifha ha musadzi wa muṅwe." 
Proverbs7:6 Ndo vhuya nda sedza nga fasiṱere ḽa nnḓu yanga," 
Proverbs7:7 nda vhona maitele a vha si na nzhele, nda vhona kha vhaṱhanngana hú na muṅwe a si na ṱhalukanyo." 
Proverbs7:8 O vha a tshi khou tshimbila nga tshiṱaraṱa tshi dzulaho musadzi onoyo, ó fara i fhiraho henefho nḓuni yawe," 
Proverbs7:9 hu nga lufhimavhaeni, nga madekwana, ḽo no sikuwa, hu na swiswi," 
Proverbs7:10 musadzi uyo a mbo bva a mu ṱanganedza ó ambara unga phombwe, wa mbilu ya vhumbulu;" 
Proverbs7:11 ndi musadzi a sa fhiri muthu, a sa shoni, a sa dzuli hayani;" 
Proverbs7:12 u e tshiṱaraṱani, e e hune ha ḓala vhathu, u lalela mafhandeni oṱhe." 
Proverbs7:13 U mbo ḓi kuvhatedza uyo muṱhanngana a mu khisa, a amba nae a sa shoni a ri," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndo vha ndo fanela u ṋekedza midzimu nduvho, ndo vhuya na ṋama ya zwiṱhavhelo," 
Proverbs7:15 zwino ndo ḓa u ni ṱanganedza, ndi ṱoḓa inwi, mbilu yanga i tou swa, zwino ndo ni wana!" 
Proverbs7:16 Ndo adza mmbete wanga nda u fukedza nga lukhaha lwa mivhala lu bvaho Egipita; 
Proverbs7:17 mmbete wanga ndo u shasha nga mishonga i no nukhelela u ḓifha, na bindamutshe, na khinamoni;" 
Proverbs7:18 iḓani ri kuvhatedzane ri pfelele u swika ḽi tshi tsha, ri tou ḓikumedza u ḓiphiṋa nga lufuno;" 
Proverbs7:19 munna wanga a vhaho, vho fara lwendo lulapfu," 
Proverbs7:20 vho ṱuwa na tshelede i si na vhukono, vha ḓo vhuya ṅwedzi u tshi fhela.”" 
Proverbs7:21 A mbo ḓi mu kunga nga vhufhura, uyo muṱhanngana a tenda u fhurwa nga haṋwani ha u ḓifha," 
Proverbs7:22 a mbo ḓi mu tevhela na zwenezwo unga phulu i yaho u ṱhavhiwa, muṱhanngana uyo wa tsilu a yo ṱangana na ṱhamu yawe a nga o vhoxwa milenzhe nga geḓane," 
Proverbs7:23 a rungwa tshivhindi nga musevhe. O vha a tshi nga tshiṋoni tshi tshi gidimela tshikwekweni, a sa ḓivhi uri u ḓo lifha nga ṱhoho yawe." 
Proverbs7:24 Zwino-ha vhananga, nthetsheleseni, ni kolongonye nḓevhe ni pfe zwine nda amba." 
Proverbs7:25 Ni songo litsha uyo musadzi a tshi thuba mbilu yaṋu, ni songo pambutshela nḓilani dzawe;" 
Proverbs7:26 o no wisa vhanna vhanzhi, o vhulaha vha na nungo vha si na mbalo." 
Proverbs7:27 Nnḓu yawe ndi gondo ḽo livhaho tshaloni, ndi nḓila ya u khauledza i tselaho lufuni." 
Proverbs8:1 Kani Vhuṱali a vhu ngi mufumakadzi a no khou vhidzelela? Ṱhalukanyo a i khou huwelela kani? 
Proverbs8:2 Vhu miṱumbani ya zwikwara, tsini ha nḓila, ho ima mafhandeni a dzinḓila." 
Proverbs8:3 Vhu tsini ha mafhoro a miḓi; vhu miṋangoni, vhu huwelela ha ri," 
Proverbs8:4 “Hee inwi vhanna, ndi khou ni vhidzelela, ndi khou vhidza inwi vhathu noṱhe!" 
Proverbs8:5 Inwi ni si na nzhele, ivhani na nzhele, inwi matsilu, wanani ṱhalukanyo!" 
Proverbs8:6 Edzonu tshete ndi ni vhudze mafhungo mahulwane, ndi ḓo amba zwi re zwone." 
Proverbs8:7 Zwine nda amba ndi ngoho fhedzi, ndi ila u amba vhuvhi." 
Proverbs8:8 Maipfi oṱhe ane nda amba a a fulufhedzea, a hu na ḽo shandeaho, a hu na ḽo kombamaho;" 
Proverbs8:9 o tou tswititi kha ane a a ṱalukanya, kha a re na nḓivho a a pfala." 
Proverbs8:10 Nangani ndayo dzanga ni litshe siliva, ni nange nḓivho ni litshe musuku." 
Proverbs8:11 Vhuṱali vhu fhira nungu dza mutengo muhulu; kha zwoṱhe zwine zwa takadza a hu na tshi vhambedzwaho naho. 
Proverbs8:12 “Nṋe Vhuṱali ndi dzula na maano, ndi kona u elekanya nga vhuronwane." 
Proverbs8:13 U ofha Mune washu ndi u vhenga vhuvhi; ndi vhenga u ḓihudza na u ḓiḓivha, na maitele mavhi, na nyambo dzo bvaho nḓilani." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndi nṋe ane nda ni ṋea nyeletshedzo na vhuṱali vhukuma, ṱhalukanyo ndi nṋe, ndi nṋe a re na maanḓa." 
Proverbs8:15 Mahosi a vhusa nga nṋe, vhavhusi vha konou vhea milayo i ladzaho shango;" 
Proverbs8:16 vhahulwane vha vhusa nga nṋe, ndi ita uri magota a vhuse ḽifhasi." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndi funa vhane vha mpfuna, vhane vha nṱoḓa nga nungo dzoṱhe vha a nngwana." 
Proverbs8:18 Ndi ṋea vhathu lupfumo na khuliso, vha wana lupfumo lu sa fheli zwa vha nakela." 
Proverbs8:19 Mutshelo wanga u fhira musuku u songo vangwaho, khaṋo yanga i fhira siliva yó tou nanguludzwa." 
Proverbs8:20 Hune nda tshimbila ndi sia mulalo, hune nda swika ndi ḓa na khaṱhulo mbuya." 
Proverbs8:21 Vhane vha mpfuna ndi vha kovhela lupfumo, nda lu khokha maḓuluni avho." 
Proverbs8:22 “Muṋe washu o ranga nga u sika nṋe; ndi wone mushumo wawe wa u ranga wa zwe a ita kale. 
Proverbs8:23 Ndo vhumbwa kale-kale, u rangani, shango ḽi sa athu vha hone." 
Proverbs8:24 Ndo bebwa malwanzhe a sa athu vha hone, hu sa athu vha na zwisima zwo ḓalaho maḓi," 
Proverbs8:25 thavha dzi sa athu tikwa, zwikwara zwi sa athu bebwa," 
Proverbs8:26 Mudzimu a sa athu sika ḽifhasi na midavhi yaḽo, na mavu na maṱukuṱuku a sa athu vha hone." 
Proverbs8:27 Ndo vha ndi hone a tshi adza ḽiṱaḓulu a tshi ṱharamudza vhusendekamisi nṱha ha lwanzhe," 
Proverbs8:28 musi a tshi vhea makole lutomboni, a tshi phula zwisima zwa mativha mahulu," 
Proverbs8:29 musi a tshi vhea mukano wa lwanzhe, uri maḓi a si pfuke mulayo wawe, a tshi tea ḽifhasi" 
Proverbs8:30 ndo vha ndi nae ndí mutsila wawe. Ndo vha ndi tshi mu takadza misi yoṱhe, ndi tshi ḓiphiṋa ndi nae," 
Proverbs8:31 ndi tshi ḓiphiṋa nga shango ḽe a sika, ndi tshi takadzwa nga vhathu." 
Proverbs8:32 “Zwino-ha vhananga, thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Vha na mashudu vhane vha kanda nḓilani dzanga." 
Proverbs8:33 Thetshelesani ndayo dzanga ni ṱalifhe, ni songo dzi nyadza." 
Proverbs8:34 U na mashudu ane a nthetshelesa, ane a dzula o linda khoro dzanga, o nndindela muṋangoni." 
Proverbs8:35 Ane a nngwana o wana vhutshilo, u ḓo takalelwa nga Muṋe washu;" 
Proverbs8:36 ane a si nngwane ene u a ḓihuvhadza, vhane vha mmbenga vha funa lufu.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Vhuṱali, ene mufumakadzi wa mupfumi, ho ḓifhaṱela nnḓu yaho, ha i tika nga phuphu ṱhanu na mbili dza matombo," 
Proverbs9:2 ha ṱhavha kholomo dzaho, ha ṱuḓa waini yaho, ha ḓeka ḓafula ḽaho," 
Proverbs9:3 ha ruma vhasidzana u yo vhidza vhathu, vha ime miḓini hune vha vhonwa nga vhoṱhe vha ri, “Vhuṱali vhu ri," 
Proverbs9:4 ‘A si na nzhele nga a ḓe!’ Kha a si na ṱhalukanyo vhu ri," 
Proverbs9:5 ‘Iḓani ni ḽe vhuswa hanga, ni nwe waini ye nda i ṱuḓa." 
Proverbs9:6 Ṱutshelani vhutsilu ni tshile, ni tou longondo nḓilani ya ṱhalukanyo.’ ”" 
Proverbs9:7 Ane a laya munyefuli u a ḓinyadzisa, ane a kaidza muvhi u ḓivhidzela maṱamba." 
Proverbs9:8 U songo kaidza munyefuli, a nga ḓo u vhenga, kaidza muṱali, u ḓo u funa." 
Proverbs9:9 Laya muṱali, ndi hone a tshi ḓo ṱalifhesa, funza a fulufhedzeaho, ndi hone a tshi ḓo engedza pfunzo yawe." 
Proverbs9:10 Tshisima tsha vhuṱali ndi u ofha Muṋe washu, u ḓivha Mudzimu, Ene Mukhethwa, ndi yone ṱhalukanyo." 
Proverbs9:11 Ndi nṋe vhuṱali ane nda andisa maḓuvha au, nda u ṋea ndalamo." 
Proverbs9:12 Arali wo ṱalifha wo ṱalifhela iwe muṋe, zwi ḓi nga arali wa nyefula, u ḓo zwi konḓelela u woṱhe." 
Proverbs9:13 Vhutsilu vhu nga musadzi wa luambo, ha shoni, ha ḓivhi tshithu." 
Proverbs9:14 U dzula muṋangoni wa nnḓu yawe, u dzula miḓini hune a vhonwa nga vhathu vhoṱhe," 
Proverbs9:15 a vhidzelela vhafhiri vha nḓila vho livhaho kha zwavho, a ri," 
Proverbs9:16 “A sa ḓivhi tshithu nga a pambutshele ngeno!” A tshi vhudza a si na ṱhalukanyo u ri," 
Proverbs9:17 “Maḓi o tswiwaho ha ḓifhi zwone; vhuswa vhu ḽiwaho muthu o dzumbama vhu takadza hani!” 
Proverbs9:18 Hone vhakungiwa a vha ḓivhi uri henefho ngomu ho dzula mimuya ya vho faho, vhaeni vhawe vha fhasi-fhasi dindini." 
Proverbs10:1 Iyi ndi mirero ya Solomoni. I ri: Ṅwana wa vhuṱali u takadza khotsi awe; ṅwana wa tsilu ene u ḽisa mme awe mbilu. 
Proverbs10:2 Lupfumo lwo wanalaho nga nḓila mmbi a lu na lukuna, hone u pfa Mudzimu zwi tshidza lufuni." 
Proverbs10:3 Muṋe washu ha ladzi muvhuya na nḓala; vhavhi u vha shaisa zwine vha zwi lila. 
Proverbs10:4 Tshanḓa tsha mubva tshi mu ḓisela vhushai, tsha mushumi wa biko tshone tshi tshi mu pfumisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Ṅwana wa maano ndi ane a kuvhanganya mavhele misi ya nḓalo; ane a lala vha tshi kaṋa u a shonisa. 
Proverbs10:6 Mashudu a wanwa nga a fulufhedzeaho; u levha ha mulomo wa muvhi hu mu ḽa ṱhoho. 
Proverbs10:7 Vhathu vha tshi humbula a fulufhedzeaho vha pfa vho takala; dzina ḽa muvhi ḽone ḽi a sina. 
Proverbs10:8 Muṱali u tenda u laiwa; vavhi ḽi sokou lopola, tshaḽo ndi u lovha." 
Proverbs10:9 A sa solisei a tshi tshimbila ha ofhi tshithu; a no ita zwo vhifhaho u ḓo dzumbululwa. 
Proverbs10:10 Vha u sinyedzana vha konḓisela vhaṅwe vhutshilo, vavhi ḽi no sokou lopola tshaḽo ndi u lovha." 
Proverbs10:11 Mulomo wa a fulufhedzeaho ndi tshisima tsha vhutshilo; u levha ha mulomo wa muvhi hu mu ḽa ṱhoho. 
Proverbs10:12 Vengo ḽi vusa nndwa; lufuno lu tsinya iṱo lwa si sedze vhukhakhi. 
Proverbs10:13 Mulomoni wa a na ṱhalukanyo hu na vhuṱali; tsha muṱana wa a si na ṱhalukanyo ndi ṱhamu. 
Proverbs10:14 Vhaṱali vha khokha nḓivho; mulomo wa tsilu u ṱula khombo. 
Proverbs10:15 Muḓi une vhapfumi vha shavhela khawo ndi lupfumo lwavho; vhushai ha vhadziili ndi ḽone bulayo ḽavho. 
Proverbs10:16 A no fulufhedzea u pfufhiwa nga vhutshilo; khaṋo ya muvhi ndi vhuvhi. 
Proverbs10:17 Ane a tenda u laiwa o fara i yaho vhutshiloni; a sa tendi u laiwa ú bva nḓilani. 
Proverbs10:18 Wa luvhengelambiluni u na milomo ya mazwifhi, a no isela vhaṅwe phungo ndi tsilu." 
Proverbs10:19 Wa u ambesa a nga si kundwe u tshinya; a na maano u a fhumula. 
Proverbs10:20 Lulimi lwa a fulufhedzeaho ndi siliva i songo vangwaho; mbilu ya muvhi ndi mahandana. 
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya vha thetshelesaho Mudzimu i fusha vhanzhi, ngeno matsilu a tshi fa nga u shaya ṱhalukanyo." 
Proverbs10:22 Tshine tsha pfumisa ndi mashudu a no bva ha Muṋe washu; u ḓinetisa ha muthu a tshi shuma a zwi engedzi tshithu khao. 
Proverbs10:23 Tsilu ḽi tshi ita zwi shonisaho ḽi vhona u mutambo, ngeno mutambo wa a na ṱhalukanyo vhu vhuṱali." 
Proverbs10:24 Zwine muvhi a zwi ofha, ndi zwone zwine zwa ḓo mu wela; a fulufhedzeaho ene u ḓo ṋewa zwine a zwi tama." 
Proverbs10:25 Ha bvelela ḓumbu ḽi kumba muvhi, ngeno a fulufhedzeaho a tshi ima o khwaṱha lini na lini." 
Proverbs10:26 Mubva u netisa a mu rumaho; u nga viniga i tshi tatisa maṋo, u nga vhutsi vhu tshi kombodza maṱo." 
Proverbs10:27 A no ofha Muṋe washu u a lalama; muvhi ene ha nga yi thambo. 
Proverbs10:28 Tsho fulufhelwaho nga a fulufhedzeaho tshi guma nga dakalo, hone tshe muvhi a lavhelela ha tshi wani." 
Proverbs10:29 Muṋe washu ndi vhushavhelo ha o faraho nḓila i sa solisei, ngeno a tshi lozwa vhaitazwivhi." 
Proverbs10:30 A fulufhedzeaho ha tupuwi na kathihi; muvhi ene ha nga dzuli shangoni. 
Proverbs10:31 A fulufhedzeaho u amba a vhuṱali, hone lulimi lwa a shandaho mafhungo lu ḓo tumulwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Milomo ya a thetshelesaho Mudzimu i ḓivha u amba zwo teaho, ngeno mulomo wa muvhi u tshi amba zwa magombikwa." 
Proverbs11:1 Tshikalo tshi no kala zwi si zwone tshi nengisa Muṋe washu; tsho teaho tshi a mu takadza. 
Proverbs11:2 U ḓihudza hu tevhelwa nga ṱhoni; tsha muṱali ndi u ḓiṱukufhadza. 
Proverbs11:3 U sa solisea ha vha si na vhufhura hu a vha endedza; vha sa fulufhedzei vha ḓo fela nḓila dzavho dza magombikwa. 
Proverbs11:4 Lupfumo a lu farisi tshithu musi wa khaṱhulo; u thetshelesa Mudzimu hu tshidza lufuni. 
Proverbs11:5 U fulufhedzea ha a sa solisei hu mu onyolosela nḓila dzawe, ngeno muvhi a tshi fashwa nga vhuvhi hawe." 
Proverbs11:6 Vhuvhuya ha vha si na vhufhura vhu a vha tshidza, ngeno vha sa fulufhedzei vha tshi fashwa nga nyemulo dzavho." 
Proverbs11:7 Zwe muvhi a zwi fulufhela, a tshi fa zwi lovha nae; maanḓa e a ḓitika ngao ndi mahandana." 
Proverbs11:8 A thetshelesaho Mudzimu u lamukiswa khomboni, ya wela muvhi." 
Proverbs11:9 A no nyadza Mudzimu u vhulaha vhaṅwe nga mulomo wawe, ngeno a thetshelesaho Mudzimu a tshi vha ponyokisa nga nḓivho yawe." 
Proverbs11:10 Musi muvhuya zwi tshi mu nakela, muḓi u huvha mihuvho; vhavhi vha tshi lovha hu pfala mifhululu." 
Proverbs11:11 Muḓi u wana mashudu nga vha si na vhufhura, wa fhaṱwa; mulomo wa muvhi wone u pwasha muḓi." 
Proverbs11:12 A no sasaladza vhaṅwe ha na ṱhalukanyo; munna wa ṱhalukanyo u a fhumula. 
Proverbs11:13 Wa zwitshele ha vhudzwi tshiphiri; ane a fulufhedzea u a tshi vhulunga. 
Proverbs11:14 Lushaka lu a wa nga u shaya nyeletshedzo, hone ho andaho vhaeletshedzi lu dzula lwo kunda." 
Proverbs11:15 Arali wa ḓivhofha u lifhela muṅwe mulandu une a nga u ita, u ḓo ḓisola; ane a lamba u ḓidzhenisa khazwo o ḓirula." 
Proverbs11:16 Musadzi u huliselwa vhulenda, hone vhalevhi vha zuwa lupfumo fhedzi." 
Proverbs11:17 Munna wa vhuthu u a vhuelwa; wa tshiṱuhu u ḓiṱoḓela mafhanza. 
Proverbs11:18 Muvhi u a bindula zwa fhufha; a no zwala mbeu ya vhuvhuya ha nga kundwi u pfufhiwa. 
Proverbs11:19 A sa tseki kha u ita zwi re zwone u ḓo tshila; ane a omelela kha vhuvhi u ḓo fa. 
Proverbs11:20 Muṋe washu u vhenga vha mbilu ya vhufhura; u takalela vha sa solisei. 
Proverbs11:21 Ḓivhani uri: muvhi ha nga kundwi u lifhedzwa; vhana vha vhavhuya vhone vha ḓo wanala vha si na mulandu. 
Proverbs11:22 Musadzi wa lunako a si na ṱhalukanyo, u nga tshiṅina tsha musuku tshi ningoni ya nguluvhe." 
Proverbs11:23 A thetshelesaho Mudzimu u ḓo wana zwivhuya zwine a zwi lila; muvhi ene o lindela ṱhamu fhedzi. 
Proverbs11:24 Mapakulile u ḓi pfuma a tshi ya; a no dzima na zwo fanelaho vhaṅwe ene u ḓi shaya a tshi ya. 
Proverbs11:25 A si na vhutshivha u ḓo pfuma; a no dzimula ḓora ḽa vhaṅwe, na ḽawe ḽi ḓo dzimulwa-vho." 
Proverbs11:26 Ane a hana na mavhele, vhathu vha a mu teketela; hu shudufhadzwa ane a tenda u a rengisa." 
Proverbs11:27 Ane a ḓidinela u ita zwivhuya u ḓo takalelwa; tshilila-u-vhona-khombo tshi ḓo i vhona. 
Proverbs11:28 Ane a ḓitika nga lupfumo lwawe u ḓo wa; ane a fulufhedzea zwi ḓo mu nakela, a nga ṱari ḽidala ḽi titimaho." 
Proverbs11:29 A sa londoli muṱa wawe u ḓo sala na muya; tsilu ḽi ḓo vha phuli ya muṱali. 
Proverbs11:30 Mitshelo ya ane a thetshelesa Mudzimu i a tshidza; muṱali u kona u tswa mbilu dza vhathu. 
Proverbs11:31 Arali na muvhuya a tshi wana zwo mu fanelaho fhano fhasi, kha muvhi na mutshinyi zwi ḓo tou ngani?" 
Proverbs12:1 A funaho u laiwa u funa nḓivho; a sa funi u kaidzwa ndi maphuu. 
Proverbs12:2 Muthu muvhuya u takadza Muṋe washu; mudzia-vhukwila ene u ḓo laṱwa. 
Proverbs12:3 Vhuvhi a vhu khwaṱhisi muthu; vhavhuya vha nga si tupulwe. 
Proverbs12:4 Musadzi wavhuḓi ndi tshiala tsha munna wawe; a no ita zwi shonisaho ndi ṱhahala. 
Proverbs12:5 A thetshelesaho Mudzimu u ṱoḓa zwi sa solisei; maano a muvhi ndi a vhufhura. 
Proverbs12:6 Zwiambo zwa muvhi ndi zwa u lalela vhathu na u fhaladza malofha; maipfi a a si na vhufhura one ndi a u tshidza vhathu. 
Proverbs12:7 Vhavhi vha ḓo tekulwa vha si tsha vha hone; nnḓu ya a thetshelesaho Mudzimu i ḓo sala yo ima. 
Proverbs12:8 Muthu u khoḓelwa ṱhalukanyo yawe; o thanyelaho dubo u a nyadziwa. 
Proverbs12:9 Ndi khwiṋe u pfi mushai u na phuli, u fhira u ḓiita muḓivhalea u si na tshine wa ḽa." 
Proverbs12:10 A no thetshelesa Mudzimu u londola tshifuwo tshawe; muvhi ene u na tshiṱuhu. 
Proverbs12:11 A limaho tsimu yawe u ḓo ḽa a laṱa; a no tevhela zwi sa ḓivhalei ene ha na ṱhalukanyo. 
Proverbs12:12 Muvhi u tama zwo wanalaho nga vhuvemu, hone mitshelo i fulwa nga a thetshelesaho Mudzimu." 
Proverbs12:13 Muvhi u fashwa nga nyambo yawe mmbi; a thetshelesaho Mudzimu ene u tinya khombo. 
Proverbs12:14 Muthu u ḽa zwivhuya zwe a wana nga u amba; u pfufhiwa nga zwe a zwi shumela. 
Proverbs12:15 Tsilu ḽi vhona nḓila ye ḽa i fara i yone-yone; muṱali u thetshelesa nyeletshedzo. 
Proverbs12:16 Zwine zwa dina tsilu a zwi lengi u vhonala; wa vhuṱali u kanda mupfa a tshi u vhona. 
Proverbs12:17 Ṱhanzi ya ngoho i tikedza khaṱhulo mbuya, ya mazwifhi yone i ṱuṱuwedza vhufhura." 
Proverbs12:18 Maipfi a veveru a runga unga pfumo; lulimi lwa muṱali lu a fhodza. 
Proverbs12:19 Ngoho i ḓo ima lini na lini; mazwifhi ha yi thambo. 
Proverbs12:20 Vhufhura ho fhaṱela mbiluni dza vha no luka vhunwa; vha nyeletshedzo dzi ḓisaho mulalo vha dzula vho takala. 
Proverbs12:21 A no thetshelesa Mudzimu ha na mafhanza; vhavhi vha dzula vhe khomboni. 
Proverbs12:22 Muṋe washu u nyala mulomo wa mazwifhi; u takalela vha no fulufhedzea. 
Proverbs12:23 Muthu wa maano u dzumba nḓivho yawe; tsilu ḽi anḓadza vhutsilu haḽo. 
Proverbs12:24 Mushumi wa biko u ḓo vhusa; vhubva vhu guma nga vhupuli. 
Proverbs12:25 U ḽa mbilu lu lemedza muthu; ipfi ḽavhuḓi ḽi a mu khuthadza. 
Proverbs12:26 A thetshelesaho Mudzimu a tshi konana na muthu u ranga u sedza, hone nḓila ya vhavhi i a vha xedza." 
Proverbs12:27 Mubva u shaya na phukha ya u gotsha; mushumi wa biko u wana lupfumopfumo. 
Proverbs12:28 U thetshelesa Mudzimu ndi yone nḓila i isaho vhutshiloni; nḓila yeneyo a i na lufu. 
Proverbs13:1 Ṅwana wa vhuṱali u a thetshelesa khotsi awe a tshi mu laya; mudzia-u-kola ha pfi u kaidzwa. 
Proverbs13:2 Muthu u ḽa zwivhuya zwe a wana nga u amba; wa vhufhura u tshila nga vhuvemu. 
Proverbs13:3 U fara lulimi ndi u vhulunga vhutshilo; u amba u sa londi ndi u ḓilozwa. 
Proverbs13:4 Mubva u tama tshithu a si tshi wane; mushumi wa biko u fushwa nga zwinzhi. 
Proverbs13:5 Ane a thetshelesa Mudzimu u vhenga mazwifhi; muvhi ene u ita zwi shonisaho a niwa nga ṱhoni. 
Proverbs13:6 Muthu a sa solisei u londolwa nga vhuvhuya hawe; muvhi u tekulwa nga vhuvhi hawe. 
Proverbs13:7 Hu na ane a ḓiita mupfumi ngeno a si na tshawe, muṅwe a ḓiita mushai e na lupfumo luhulu." 
Proverbs13:8 Lupfumo lwa mupfumi lu nga vha tshipfumelo tshawe; mushai ene ha londi u shushedzwa. 
Proverbs13:9 Tshedza tsha a thetshelesaho Mudzimu tshi tou penya; luvhone lwa muvhi lwone lu a dzima. 
Proverbs13:10 U ḓihudza hu vusa nndwa; ane a tenda u eletshedzwa u na vhuṱali. 
Proverbs13:11 Lupfumo lune wa sokou lu wana a lu lengi u fhalala; ane a kuvhanganya nga zwiṱuku u andisa lupfumo lwawe. 
Proverbs13:12 Wa kundwa u wana zwe wa zwi lavhelela zwi lwadza mbilu; zwine wa zwi tama zwa khunyelela zwi u ṋea vhutshilo. 
Proverbs13:13 Tshilamba-u-vhudzwa ndi tshilila-u-vhona; ane a tenda u laiwa u ḓo pfufhiwa. 
Proverbs13:14 Pfunzo ya muṱali ndi tshisima tsha vhutshilo; i humisa muthu o livha zwikwekweni zwa lufu. 
Proverbs13:15 Hu takalelwa a na ṱhalukanyo; vha sa fulufhedzei vho fara i isaho lufuni. 
Proverbs13:16 Wa vhuronwane u ita zwithu nga vhusedzi; veveru ḽone ḽi anḓadza vhutsilu haḽo. 
Proverbs13:17 Muḓinḓa muvhi u wedza vhathu khomboni; a fulufhedzeaho ene u a vha fhodza. 
Proverbs13:18 Ane a nyadza u laiwa, u vha mushai, a shona; ane a thetshelesa a tshi kaidzwa, ene u a huliswa." 
Proverbs13:19 Muthu a wana zwine a zwi tama u rudza mbilu; tsilu ḽone a ḽi funi u furalela vhuvhi. 
Proverbs13:20 A tshimbilaho na vhaṱali u a ṱalifha; a konanaho na matsilu u a tsilufhala. 
Proverbs13:21 Vhatshinyi khombo a i vha humeli; vha thetshelesaho Mudzimu vha pfufhiwa nga zwivhuya. 
Proverbs13:22 Muvhuya u siela vhana vha vhana vhawe ifa; lupfumo lwa mutshinyi lwone lu khokhelwa vha thetshelesaho Mudzimu. 
Proverbs13:23 Mukhatho wa mushai u nga bveledza zwiḽiwa zwinzhi, hone ha sa vha na mulayo u a kumbwa." 
Proverbs13:24 A sa rwiho ṅwana wawe u a mu vhenga; ane a mu funa u mu laṱisa a tshee nga hawe. 
Proverbs13:25 A thetshelesaho Mudzimu u ḽa a fura; thumbu ya muvhi yone i ṱwa na nḓala. 
Proverbs14:1 Muḓi u fhaṱwa nga vhuṱali ha musadzi; musadzi wa tsilu ene u a u thutha. 
Proverbs14:2 A si na vhufhura u ofha Muṋe washu; wa nḓila dza magombikwa ene u a mu nyadza. 
Proverbs14:3 Zwiambo zwa tsilu zwi ḽi rwisa muṱana, hone milomo ya muṱali i a mu tsireledza." 
Proverbs14:4 Hu si na phulu a hu na tshinyalelo ya zwiḽiwa zwadzo, hone mavhele manzhi a ḓiswa nga nungo dza phulu." 
Proverbs14:5 Ṱhanzi i fulufhedzeaho a i zwifhi; ya mazwifhi yone i shulula mazwifhi fhedzi. 
Proverbs14:6 Munyefuli u ṱoḓa vhuṱali, he vhutoto; wa ṱhalukanyo a zwi mu konḓeli u wana nḓivho." 
Proverbs14:7 Tinya tsilu, ḽi nga si u funze tshithu." 
Proverbs14:8 Vhuṱali ha wa vhuronwane vhu mu sumbedza nḓila; tshidzingindi tshi fhurwa nga vhutsilu hatsho. 
Proverbs14:9 Tsilu ḽi nyadza u pfumelwa; vha si na vhufhura vha a takalelana. 
Proverbs14:10 Mbilu i ḓivha vhuṱungu hayo, na dakalo ḽayo a i kovhekani na muṅwe." 
Proverbs14:11 Nnḓu ya muvhi i ḓo pwashekanywa; ya a si na vhufhura i ḓo shudufhadzwa. 
Proverbs14:12 Hu na nḓila ine muthu a vhona i yone-yone, ya fhedza nga u mu isa lufuni." 
Proverbs14:13 Naho muthu a tshi sea, mbilu i nga kha ḓi vha yo ṱungufhala; dakalo ḽi nga ḓi fhedza nga u ṱungufhala." 
Proverbs14:14 O pambuwaho nḓilani ya Mudzimu u ḓo kaṋa zwe a zwala; na muvhuya u ḓo pfufhelwa zwivhuya zwawe. 
Proverbs14:15 Tshilendele ndi tendele; wa vhuronwane u sedza hune a ya. 
Proverbs14:16 Wa vhuṱali u na vhusedzi; u furalela vhuvhi; tsilu a ḽi londi, ḽi wela zwithu nga nṱha." 
Proverbs14:17 Wa mbilwana u ita zwa vhutsilu; wa vhumbulu u ḓivhengisa nga vhathu. 
Proverbs14:18 Mukovhe wa a si na maano ndi vhutsilu; tshiala tsha wa vhuronwane ndi nḓivho. 
Proverbs14:19 Vhaitazwivhi vha losha vhavhuya; vhavhi vha luvha khoroni dza vha no thetshelesa Mudzimu. 
Proverbs14:20 Mushai u sandwa na nga vhadzulelani vhawe; mupfumi ene u na khonani nnzhi. 
Proverbs14:21 U nyadza muṅwe ndi u tshinya; u itela mushai vhuthu ndi one mashudu. 
Proverbs14:22 Kani vha no tanda ḽi sa fukwi a vha khou xela? Vha no langana zwivhuya a vha nga shandukelwi, vha ḓo funwa." 
Proverbs14:23 Mushumi wa biko u a vhuelwa; a no sokou amba nga mulomo fhedzi u ḓo shaya. 
Proverbs14:24 Muṱali u ḓo ambadzwa tshiala tsha lupfumo; tsilu ḽo kungela vhutsilu fhedzi. 
Proverbs14:25 Ṱhanzi ya ngoho i tshidza vhathu; ine ya zwifha ndi tshifheṱi. 
Proverbs14:26 Ane a ofha Muṋe washu o wana vhushavhelo ho khwaṱhaho; na vhana vhawe ḽi ḓo vha bako ḽavho. 
Proverbs14:27 U ofha Muṋe washu ndi tshone tshisima tsha vhutshilo, hu tinyisa muthu zwikwekwe zwa lufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Khosi ndi khosi nga vhathu; muvhusi a shaya vhalanda u a lovha. 
Proverbs14:29 Ane a si fhele mbilu u na ṱhalukanyo khulu; wa mbilwana u ṱana vhutsilu. 
Proverbs14:30 Mbilu yo rulaho i ṋea muvhili vhutshilo; vivho ḽone ndi ṱhahala. 
Proverbs14:31 Ane a kandeledza vhashai u nyadza Muvhumbi wavho; u itela vhaheḓana vhuthu ndi u hulisa Mudzimu. 
Proverbs14:32 Muvhi u wiswa nga vhuvhi hawe; wa u thetshelesa Mudzimu u wana vhushavhelo naho hu tshi fiwa. 
Proverbs14:33 A na ṱhalukanyo ha ḓisumbedzi; tsilu ḽone ḽi a ḓiṱana. 
Proverbs14:34 U thetshelesa Mudzimu hu hudza lushaka; vhutshinyi vhu lu ḓisela samba. 
Proverbs14:35 Mukoma ane a shuma nga vhuṱali u takadza khosi; a no ita zwi shonisaho u a i sinyusa. 
Proverbs15:1 Phindulo ya vhulenda i dzikisa mbiti; ipfi ḽa vhuhali ḽone ḽi a sinyusa. 
Proverbs15:2 Lulimi lwa muṱali lu ita uri nḓivho i tamise; mulomo wa tsilu u shulula vhutsilu fhedzi. 
Proverbs15:3 Maṱo a Muṋe washu a hoṱhe-hoṱhe, a sedza vhavhi na vhavhuya." 
Proverbs15:4 Lulimi lwa vhulenda ndi muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo; lwa vhufhura lu pwashekanya mbilu. 
Proverbs15:5 Tsilu ḽi nyadza ndayo dza khotsi aḽo; ane a tenda u kaidzwa u na maano. 
Proverbs15:6 Nḓuni ya a no thetshelesa Mudzimu ho khokhana lupfumo; zwine vhavhi vha zwi wana zwi vha ḓisela khombo. 
Proverbs15:7 Mulomo wa muṱali u anḓadza nḓivho; mbilu dza matsilu a dzi fulufhedzei. 
Proverbs15:8 Tshiṱhavhelo tsha muvhi tshi nengisa Muṋe washu; u takalela thabelo ya a si na vhufhura. 
Proverbs15:9 Muṋe washu u nengwa nḓila ya muvhi; u funa a no ḓidinela u ita zwi re zwone. 
Proverbs15:10 A pambuwaho nḓilani u ḓo laṱiswa nga ṱhamu; ane a si fune u kaidzwa u ḓo fa. 
Proverbs15:11 Muṋe washe u vhona na zwa dindini ḽa vhudzulavhafu, zwino a nga kundwa hani u ḓivha zwi re mbiluni ya muthu?" 
Proverbs15:12 Munyefuli ha funi u kaidzwa, ha ṱoḓi nyeletshedzo kha muṱali." 
Proverbs15:13 Mbilu yo takalaho i tshisa tshifhaṱuwo; u ḽa mbilu hu kulekanya nungo. 
Proverbs15:14 A na nzhele u ṱoḓisesa nḓivho; tsilu ḽi fushea nga vhutsilu fhedzi. 
Proverbs15:15 A ḽaho mbilu u vhona misi yoṱhe i mivhi; o rudzaho mbilu ene u dzula a tshi ḓiphiṋa.
