Jeremiah3:5 U ḓo sokou dzula wo sinyuwa naa? Mbiti dzau a dzi nga gumi naa?’ U tshi amba u ralo, hone wa ḓi ita vhuvhi nga u kona.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Musi hu tshi vhusa khosi Josiasi, Muṋe washu a amba na nṋe a ri, “Wo zwi vhona zwe Israele musadzi a sa fulufhedzei a ita? O namela tshikwara tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi re na muṱumba, a ya na fhasi ha miri yoṱhe yo adzaho a ita vhupombwe henefho." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ndo vha ndi tshi vhona unga u ḓo ri u ita zwoṱhe hezwo a vhuya kha Nṋe, hone a si vhuye; na Juda murathu wawe a sa fulufhedzei o zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Israele musadzi a sa fulufhedzei ndo mu fha luṅwalo lwa vhuṱanzi ha uri ro ṱalana, nda mu thatha nga mulandu wa vhupombwe hawe. Juda, murathu wawe a sa fulufhedzei, a zwi vhona, hone a si ofhe. Na ene a ita vhupombwe," 
Jeremiah3:9 a si vhuye a shona na luthihi. O shata shango tshika, a ita vhupombwe nga u luvha matombo na miri." 
Jeremiah3:10 Naho zwo ralo, Juda murathu wawe a sa fulufhedzei ho ngo vhuya kha Nṋe nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe, wo vha u tshi tou vha muhoyo. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Muṋe washu o mmbudza uri naho Vhaisraele vho mu shandukela, vha tshee khwiṋe kha vha Juda vha sa fulufhedzei." 
Jeremiah3:12 O mmbudza uri ndi ye devhula ndi vhudze Israele ndi ri, “Iwe Israele we wa ntshandukela, vhuya kha Nṋe! Nṋe thi shanduki, a thi tsha ḓo u sinyutshela; a thi nga u sinyutsheli tshoṱhe." 
Jeremiah3:13 Iwe tenda mulandu, u tende uri wo shandukela Yahavee Mudzimu wau wa ḓiṋekedza midzimu isili fhasi ha miri yoṱhe yo adzaho, Nṋe wa si tsha nthetshelesa. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah3:14 Muṋe washu u ri, “Inwi vhana vha sa fulufhedzei, vhuyani kha Nṋe, ni ḓo dovha na vha vhanga. Ndi ḓo ni nanga muthihi-muthihi muḓini na vhavhili-vhavhili kha mutupo nda ni ḓisa Tsioni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni ṋea vhalisa vha ntakadzaho, vha ni endedza nga nḓivho na ṱhalukanyo." 
Jeremiah3:16 “Misi yeneyo musi no no anda shangoni, vhathu a vha tsha ḓo ri, ‘Ri na mbulungelo ya mulanga wa Yahavee!’ A vha tsha ḓo vhuya vha i humbula kana vha i elekanya; vha ḓo vha vha si tsha i ṱoḓa, na u ita iṅwe a vha nga iti." 
Jeremiah3:17 Misi yeneyo vha ḓo ri Jerusalema ndi khuluṋoni ya Yahavee, na tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo kuvhangana Jerusalema dza hulisa dzina ḽa Yahavee. A vha tsha ḓo ita zwine vha vhudzwa nga mbilu dzavho dza tshipimbi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Misi yeneyo nnḓu ya Juda na ya Israele dzi ḓo ṱangana dza vha tshithu tshithihi, vha bva shangoni ḽa devhula vha ḓa shangoni ḽe nda ṋea vhomakhulukuku wavho uri ḽi vhe ḽavho.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 Muṋe washu u ri, “Israele, ndo vha ndi tshi ṱoḓa u u ṱanganedza uri u vhe ṅwananga, ndi u fhe shango ḽi takadzaho, wone mukovhe wo nakaho u fhira ya tshakha dzoṱhe. Ndo vha ndi tshi vhona unga u tshi nnyamba u do ri ‘Baba’, wa si tsha mpfuralela." 
Jeremiah3:20 Hone no ntshandukela, inwi vhathu vha Israele, na nga musadzi a no shandukela munna wawe.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 “Hu khou pfala mukosi miṱumbani ya zwikwara: Ndi vhathu vha Israele vha no khou lila vha tshi luvhelela, nge vha pambuwa nḓilani vha hangwa Yahavee Mudzimu wavho." 
Jeremiah3:22 Vhuyani, inwi vhana vha sa fulufhedzei, ndi ḓo ni ilafha na vho fulufhedzea. “Ni ri, ‘Ee, ri ḓa ha Iwe, u Yahavee Mudzimu washu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Zwe ra luvha midzimu ya vhannḓa miṱumbani ya dzithavha a zwo ngo vhuya zwa ri farisa tshithu. Ngoho u tshidzwa ha Israele hu bva ha Yahavee Mudzimu washu. 
Jeremiah3:24 U tou bva hanani hashu ro vhona midzimu i shonisaho i tshi ḽa mitshelo ya zwe vhokhotsi ashu vha shuma – masambi avho a dzinngu na a kholomo, vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana." 
Jeremiah3:25 Kha ri shone ri tou lala fhasi, ri tou niwa nga ṱhoni. Ro khakhela Yahavee Mudzimu washu, roṱhe riṋe na vhokhotsi ashu; u bva hanani hashu, na ṋamusi a ro ngo thetshelesa Yahavee Mudzimu washu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Arali u tshi funa u vhuya iwe Israele, ndi zwone, vhuelela kha Nṋe. Arali wa laṱa midzimu yau i nengisaho, u songo tsha pambuwa nḓilani." 
Jeremiah4:2 Arali wa ana wa ri, ‘Nga Yahavee a tshilaho’, u ane u ngohoni, u ite zwi re zwone, u haṱule nga khaṱhulo mbuya; ndi hone tshakha dzi tshi ḓo shudufhadzana nga Nṋe dza zuwa Nṋe.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Muṋe washu u amba na vhathu vha Juda na vha Jerusalema, u ri, “Limani mavuvhu aṋu, mbeu yaṋu ni songo zwala mipfani." 
Jeremiah4:4 Ḓifumbiseleni Nṋe Yahavee, ni tou fumba mbilu, inwi vhanna vha Juda na vhathu vha Jerusalema, mbiti dzanga dzi sa ḓo pwashea dza duga unga mulilo nga mulandu wa vhuvhi he na ita, dza ri u duga ha si vhe na a dzi dzimaho.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Zwi ḓivhadzeni Juda, ni zwi ṱavhele mukosi Jerusalema! Lidzani phalaphala shangoni ḽoṱhe! Ṱavhani mukosi zwi pfale ni ri, “Kuvhanganani! Kha ri shavhele miḓini hu re na vhudzumbamo!”" 
Jeremiah4:6 Imisani tshiga tshi sumbaho nḓila i yaho Tsioni! Shavhani ni yo dzumbama, ni songo lenga! Ndi khou ḓisa khombo i bvaho devhula, hu ḓo ḓa ndozwo khulu." 
Jeremiah4:7 Ndau yo no takuwa vhulaloni hayo ya bvela nnḓa, mulozwi wa dzitshakha u nḓilani. O no takuwa, shango ḽaṋu u khou ḓa u ḽi shandula soga; miḓi yaṋu i ḓo sala i matumba i si na muthu." 
Jeremiah4:8 Huno-ha ambarani madzanganda a tshililo, ni lile ni tou ṱavha mukosi; mbiti dza Muṋe washu a dzo ngo ri humela." 
Jeremiah4:9 Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi hoyo mahosi na vhahulwane vha ḓo kulea nungo, vhotshifhe vha ḓo akhamala, vhaporofita zwa vha somela.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 “Zwenezwo vha ḓo ri, ‘Yawee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, wo fhura vhathu vha Jerusalema tshoṱhe u tshi ri ḽi ḓo lala, mathina banga ḽi mikuloni yashu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Musi wonoyo vhathu vha Jerusalema vha ḓo vhudzwa upfi, “Hu khou vhudzula muya u fhisaho u tshi bva miṱumbani ya zwikwara zwa phangani u tshi ḓa kha vhathu vhanga. A si wa u hwala maṱunga na mungu vhathu vha tshi ludza lini," 
Jeremiah4:12 ndi wa u kumba zwoṱhe. Ndi Nṋe ane nda ḓo amba ha ḓa wonoyo muya wa khaṱhulo.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Vhonani maswina a khou swika nga luvhilo unga gole, gariki dzao dzi khou ḓa unga tshiḓumbumukwe, bere dzao dzi na luvhilo lu no fhira lwa goni. Ro welwa nga khombo! Ndi hone ro lovha!" 
Jeremiah4:14 “Iwe Jerusalema, laṱa vhuvhi vhu re mbiluni yau u tshidzwe. U ḓo dzula na vhunwa mbiluni u swika lini?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Vhaḓinḓa vha bvaho muḓini wa Dani na vha bvaho mivhunduni ya Efraimi vha ḓivhadza mavhi," 
Jeremiah4:16 vho ḓa u sevha dzitshakha na u vhudza Jerusalema uri maswina a khou ḓa a tshi bva shangoni ḽa kule. Vha ḓo ṱavhela Juda mukosi wa nndwa. 
Jeremiah4:17 Maswina a u tanga unga vhathu vho lindaho tsimu nge wa shandukela Nṋe. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee. 
Jeremiah4:18 Hezwo wo tou ḓiokela nga kutshilele kwau na zwiito zwau. Heyo ndi ṱhamu yau. I vhavha hani! I phuletshedza u swika mbiluni!” 
Jeremiah4:19 Yawee, ndi khou pfa vhuṱungu, zwi tou vhavha! Mbilu yanga i tou sinḓa ngomu hanga, a thi koni u fhumula. Ndo pfa phalaphala i tshi lila, ndo pfa mukosi wa nndwa." 
Jeremiah4:20 Khombo dzi khou tevhekana; shango ḽoṱhe ndi mutumbu; vhudzulo hanga ho phusukanywa kathihi fhedzi, iṱo ḽi tshi poi nda sala ndi si tshee na vhudzulo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndi ḓo ṱalela nndwa i tshi lwiwa nda pfa phalaphala i tshi lila u swika lini? 
Jeremiah4:22 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhathu vhanga ndi matsilu, Nṋe a vha nnḓivhi; ndi vhana vha sa pfesesi, a vha na ṱhalukanyo; vha konela u ita vhuvhi, u ita zwivhuya zwi a vha kunda.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndo sedza ḽifhasi nda vhona ḽo vilingana, ḽi si na tshithu, nda sedza ḽiṱaḓulu nda vhona tshedza tshaḽo tshi si tsheeho." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndo sedza dzithavha nda vhona dzi tshi dzinginyea; nda sedza zwikwara nda vhona zwi tshi thenge-thenge; 
Jeremiah4:25 nda sedza nda vhona hu si na vhathu; zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwo vha zwo fhufha. 
Jeremiah4:26 Nda sedza nda vhona shango ḽo vhibvelaho ḽo no sala ḽi soga, miḓi yaḽo yo sala i matumba, ngauri Muṋe washu o ḽi sinyutshela." 
Jeremiah4:27 (Muṋe washu o amba uri ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo sala ḽi soga, naho a sa nga ḽi lozwi tshoṱhe.)" 
Jeremiah4:28 Ḽifhasi ḽi ḓo lila, lutombo lwa swifhala. Ho amba Muṋe washu, zwe a vhofha o vhofha. Ha nga ḓisoli, ha nga humeli murahu." 
Jeremiah4:29 Muḓi woṱhe u ḓo shavha vha tshi pfa mukosi wa vhanameli vha dzibere na vhaposi vha misevhe. Vhaṅwe vha shavhela maṱakani, vhaṅwe vha gonya nngwa; miḓi yoṱhe yo ṱangulwa, a hu na a dzulaho khayo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Iwe Jerusalema wo phusukanywaho, u ḓo itani? Ndi mini u tshi ambara dza muridili na nungu dza musuku? Ndi mini u tshi fhoma maṱo au nga phomo unga phombwe? U ḓiṱama hau ndi mahandana fhedzi, vhafunwa vhau vha vho u nyadza, vha ṱoḓa u u vhulaha." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ndi khou pfa mukosi u no nga wa musadzi ane a ṱoḓou vhofholowa; ndi tshigomelo tsha a no nga u khou beba ṅwana wa tanzhe; ndi mukosi wa u fhihamelwa ha Tsioni a tshi onyolosa zwanḓa a tshi ri, “Yawee, ndi khou dzidzivhala, ndo kumedzwa dziphondi!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Inwi vhathu vha Jerusalema, tshimbilani na mikoto ya muḓi waṋu ni tshi gonya ni tshi tsa! Sedzani hoṱhe-hoṱhe ni elekanye! Londolosani zwiṱaraṱani! Arali na wana muthu muthihi zwawe ane a fulufhedzea, a no ita zwi re zwone, zwenezwo Muṋe washu u ḓo hangwela uno muḓi." 
Jeremiah5:2 Hone nangwe ni tshi ana nga dzina ḽa Yahavee, ni ana mazwifhi fhedzi.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 Ngoho zwine Iwe Muṋe washu wa zwi ṱoḓa ndi u fulufhedzea. Wo vha rwa, vhone vha si pfe tshithu; wo vha kuya, vhone vha si tende u laiwa. Mbilu dzavho dzo oma u fhira matombo, vha hana u rembuluwa." 
Jeremiah5:4 Zwenezwo nṋe nda elekanya nda ri: Ndi vhashai fhedzi vha no ita hezwo, a vha na nḓivho, a vha ḓivhi nḓila ya Muṋe washu, a vha ḓivhi zwine Mudzimu wavho a zwi funa," 
Jeremiah5:5 tshani ndi ye ha vharangaphanḓa ndi ambe navho, vhone vha ḓivha nḓila ya Muṋe washu, vha ḓivha zwine Mudzimu a funa. Mathina na vhone vho pfana vhoṱhe, vha vunḓa dzhogo yawe, vha khathula thambo dzawe." 
Jeremiah5:6 Muṋe washu a ri, “Ndi zwine maswina a havha vhathu a ḓo vha fhufhela unga ndau i tshi bva maṱakani, a vha phusukanya unga maṱalerwa a tshi bva phangani, a vha lalela tsini ha miḓi yavho unga nngwe, ya ponda ane a vhuya a linga u bvela nnḓa; ngauri ndi kanzhi vha tshi shandukela Mudzimu vha pambuwa nḓila." 
Jeremiah5:7 Ndi nga ni hangwela hani? Vhana vhaṋu vho nṱamba, vha ana nga midzimu i si tshithu. Ndo vhofha mulanga navho nda tou vha anisa, vhone vha ntshandukela vha ita vhupombwe, vha kuvhangana nḓuni dza dziphombwe." 
Jeremiah5:8 Vha nga bere dza mboho dzo nonaho, vha emula vhasadzi vha vhaṅwe vhanna, muṅwe na muṅwe a lila unga bere i tshi ṱoḓa tsadzi." 
Jeremiah5:9 A tho ngo fanela u vha rwela zwenezwo naa? Lushaka lwo raloho a tho ngo fanela u lu lifhedza naa? 
Jeremiah5:10 Ndi ḓo ruma maswina a remekanya minḓirivhe ya vhathu vhanga, hone a si i remekanye tshoṱhe. Ndi ḓo ri vha ṱangule matavhi, ngauri a si anga." 
Jeremiah5:11 Nnḓu ya Israele na nnḓu ya Juda vho ntshandukela tshoṱhe! Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Vha nyadza Muṋe washu vha ri, “A nga si ri ite tshithu! A hu na tshi no ḓo ri wela; a ri nga fi nga pfumo kana nga nḓala;" 
Jeremiah5:13 vhaporofita vha tou vha muya u fhungaho, zwine vha amba a zwi bvi kha Muṋe washu; zwine vha amba nga zwi vha wele vhone vhaṋe!”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ndi zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe a amba na nṋe a ri, “Jeremia, nge avha vhathu vha amba nga u ralo, ndi ḓo ita uri maipfi anga a nge mulilo u tshi bva mulomoni wau, u fhise havha vhathu unga khuni.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi khou ḓisa lushaka lu no bva kule uri lu ḓe lu ni die, ndi lushaka lwa kale lu re na maanḓa a sa konadzei, lu no amba luambo lune na si lu ḓivhe, zwine vha amba ni nga si zwi pfe." 
Jeremiah5:16 Mikutu yavho i nga zwalo zwo aṱamaho, vhanna vhavho vhoṱhe ndi vhomakone vha nndwa." 
Jeremiah5:17 Vha ḓo ḽa khaṋo yaṋu ya zwiḽiwa, vha vhulaha vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, vha fhedza masambi aṋu a nngu na a kholomo, vha ḽa minḓirivhe yaṋu na mihuyu. Miḓi ya vhushavhelo ine na i fulufhedza vha ḓo i phusukanya nga pfumo.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Muṋe washu u ri, “Na misi yeneyo a thi nga lozwi vhathu vhanga tshoṱhe." 
Jeremiah5:19 Arali vha u vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu washu ndi mini a tshi ri ita nga u rali?’ iwe Jeremia u vha fhindule u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Vhunga no nṱamba na luvha midzimu isili shangoni ḽaṋu, zwino ni vho ḓo shumela vhatsinda shangoni ḽisili.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ḓivhadzani vha nnḓu ya Jakopo, ni vhudze vhathu vha Juda ni ri," 
Jeremiah5:21 ‘Yahavee u ri: Edzonu pfa, inwi matsilu a sa ṱalukanyi tshithu: ni na maṱo, ha vhoni, ni na nḓevhe, a dzi pfi." 
Jeremiah5:22 A ni nnyofhi Nṋe Yahavee? A ni ntetemeli? Ndi Nṋe we nda vhea muṱavha uri u vhe mukano wa lwanzhe; lu nga si pfuke lini na lini. Magabelo a nga ḓi takuwa, a nga si zwi kone; a nga ḓi bvuma, a nga si pfuke." 
Jeremiah5:23 “ ‘Vhathu havha vhone vha na mbilu dza tshipimbi, dza mashandukwa; vho pambutshela thungo vha mbo ḓi ṱuwa." 
Jeremiah5:24 A vha vhuyi vha ri: Nga ri ofhe Yahavee Mudzimu washu ane a ri nisela mvula dza luṱavula na dza tseula nga tshifhinga tshadzo, a ri londola ra kaṋa nga tshifhinga tsho teaho ri sa fhidzi." 
Jeremiah5:25 Huno zwo shanduka nga mulandu wa vhukhakhi haṋu, vhutshinyi haṋu ho ni shaisa zwivhuya." 
Jeremiah5:26 “ ‘Kha vhathu vhanga hu na vhavhi, vha lalelana unga vhathu vha no rea zwiṋoni, vha retshela vhathu zwikwekwe." 
Jeremiah5:27 Nnḓu dzavho dzo ḓala zwe vha wana nga vhufhura, dzi nga kuḓu kwa zwiṋoni kwo ḓala zwiṋoni. Ndi zwe vha pfuma vha vha na maanḓa," 
Jeremiah5:28 vha khwaṱha vha ita na u penya. Vhuvhi havho ho no tou kalula; tsengoni a vha tikedzi tsiwana, a vha ṋei vhashai pfanelo dzavho." 
Jeremiah5:29 “ ‘Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo kundwa ngani u ni rwela zwenezwo? Ndi ḓo kundwa ngani u lifhedza holu lushaka? 
Jeremiah5:30 “ ‘Fhano shangoni heḽi ho itea zwi ofhisaho, zwi nengisaho:" 
Jeremiah5:31 Vhaporofita vha porofita mazwifhi fhedzi, vhotshifhe vha vhusela u ḓipfumisa fhedzi; vhathu vhanga na vhone vha funa zwo tou ralo. Hone musi zwi tshi fhela ni ḓo itani?’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Inwi vhathu vha Benyamini, shavhani Jerusalema! Vha Thekua vha lidze phalaphala! Vhasani mulilo u vhe tshiga ni Bethe Hakhereme. Devhula hu khou ḓa khombo na ndozwo khulu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Iwe muḓi wa Tsioni, u nga musidzana wa lunako, u nga pfulo yavhuḓi." 
Jeremiah6:3 Mahosi vha ḓo ḓa vhe na mmbi dzavho dza nga masambi a fulaho pfulo yeneyo. Vha ḓo akha dennde dzavho dza mona nawo, muṅwe na muṅwe a fulisa hune a funa." 
Jeremiah6:4 Vha ḓo ri, “Kha ri ḓilugise ri die Jerusalema! Nga ri takuwe ri u die masiari tshivhangalala. Hei! Ro no lenga, ḓuvha ḽi vho ṱoḓou kovhela, mirunzi ya madekwana i vho lapfa." 
Jeremiah6:5 Kha ri mbo ḓi vha tshoṱhela vhusiku ri phusukanye vhukhudo ha uyo muḓi.” 
Jeremiah6:6 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe o vhudza mahosi ayo a ri, “Remani miri ni khokhe mavu ni govhele Jerusalema. Muḓi hoyu ndo u vhea mulandu; ngomu hawo ho ḓala u kandeledzana." 
Jeremiah6:7 U shulula vhuvhi unga tshisima tshi tshi shulula maḓi. Ngomu hawo hu pfala u huvhadzana na u lozwana; ndi ṱolou vhona vhulwadze na dzimbonzhe. 
Jeremiah6:8 Iwe Jerusalema, tenda u kaidziwa, ndi sa ḓo u furalela, shango ḽau nda ḽi ita soga ḽi si tsha dzula muthu.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe o amba na nṋe a ri, “Vhenevho Vhaisraele vha si gathi vho salaho kha vha ṱangulwe unga hu tshi ṱalwa ṱhalane; u nge mulimi: dovha u phuphuledze, u pfe arali hu tshee ho sala ṱhalane.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Arali nda amba navho nda vha kaidza, ndi nnyi ane a nga nthetshelesa? Vha na tshipimbi, vha hana u thetshelesa zwine wa vha laedza; ndi tshi vha vhudza ipfi ḽau a vha ḽi funi, vha vhona unga ndi khou vha sema." 
Jeremiah6:11 Mbiti dzau dzi khou duga ngomu hanga, a thi tsha kona u dzi konḓelela.” Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Mbiti dzanga dzi shululele kha vhana zwiṱaraṱani na kha vhaṱhannga vho kuvhanganaho. Vhoṱhe, munna na musadzi, vha ḓo kumbiwa, na vho tshenaho mmvi, vho no vhaho vha maḓuvha." 
Jeremiah6:12 Nnḓu dzavho dzi ḓo ṋewa vhaṅwe, na masimu avho na vhasadzi vhavho, musi ndi tshi angaladza tshanḓa tshanga uri ndi rwe vha dzulaho shangoni." 
Jeremiah6:13 Vhoṱhe vhahulwane na vhaṱuku vha tama u pfuma nga vhufhura; na vhaporofita na vhotshifhe vha fhura vhathu. 
Jeremiah6:14 Vha pomba mbonzhe dza vhathu vhanga vha sa londi, vha dzi ita sa dzi sa dini. Vha ri, ‘Ḽo lala! Ḽo lala!’ ngeno hu si na mulalo." 
Jeremiah6:15 Kani vha a shona nga u vhona zwi nengisaho zwe vha ita? Na kathihi! Ṱhoni a vha dzi ḓivhi. Ndi zwine vha ḓo wa unga vhaṅwe vhoṱhe; ndi tshi vha laṱisa hu ḓo vha hu hone zwo vha fhelela. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.” 
Jeremiah6:16 Muṋe washu u ri, “Imani mafhandeni ni sedze, vhudzisani nḓila dza kale-kale, vhudzisani uri nḓila yone-yone ndi ifhio, ni fare yone, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo pfa mbilu dzaṋu dzo rula.” Hone vhone vha ri, “Aiwa, a ri nga fari yone!”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi nanga vhalindi a ri vhathu vha thetshelese phalaphala dza u vha sevhudza. Vhone vha ri, “A ri nga thetshelesi.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a ri, “Inwi dzitshakha, ipfani, inwi dziṱhanzi, sedzani zwi no ḓo wela vhathu vhanga." 
Jeremiah6:19 Iwe ḽifhasi, thetshelesa! Vhathu havha ndi khou vha ḓisela khombo, ha ḓo vha hu hone vha tshi khou kaṋa zwe vha zwala, nge vha si thetshelese nyeletshedzo yanga, vha landula ndayo yanga." 
Jeremiah6:20 Zwioro zwine vha nnḓisela zwi tshi bva Sheba, kana zwilungi zwine zwa bva mashangoni a kule ndi zwi londelani? Nduvho dzaṋu dzi fhiswaho a dzi ntakadzi; zwiṱhavhelo zwaṋu a thi zwi ṱanganedzi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Ndi zwine nda ḓo ita uri havha vhathu vha khukhulwe vha we. Vhokhotsi na vhana na vhahura na dzikhonani vhoṱhe vha ḓo lovha.” 
Jeremiah6:22 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhonani hu khou ḓa mmbi shangoni ḽa devhula; hu khou rithwa lushaka lwa maanḓa, lu bva mugumoni wa ḽifhasi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vho fara vhura na mafumo; vha na tshiṱuhu, a vha khathutsheli muthu. Vha bvuma unga lwanzhe vha tshi gada nga bere dzavho. Vha ḓa vho ḓivhekanyela u dia iwe Tsioni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha ri, “Mafhungo ayo ro no ḓi a pfa, ro ita na u kulekana nungo. Ro farwa nga nyofho, ro farwa nga vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ri songo vhuya ra ya nnḓa kana ra tshimbila magondoni, maswina o fara mapanga, ro tangwa nga zwi ofhisaho.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 Muṋe washu u amba na vhathu vhawe u ri, “Ambarani madzanganda ni shele milora ṱhohoni ni vuse tshililo; lilani ni tou honḓa ni nge ni khou lilela ṅwana muthihi fhedzi; a no khou ḓa u ni lozwa u ḓo ni dia kathihi fhedzi.”" 
Jeremiah6:27 Muṋe washu o ri, “Jeremia, ndo u ita mulingi wa tsimbi, vhathu vhanga ndi ngweḓi yau, vha sedze u linge mishumo yavho.”" 
Jeremiah6:28 Nṋe nda wana uri vhoṱhe ndi mashandukwa o tilaho, vha konḓa unga musinaseṱha na tsimbi, vha enda vha tshi isela vhaṅwe phungo mmbi; ndi vhatshinyi!" 
Jeremiah6:29 Muvuvha wone u khou furela wo khwaṱha, u tshi fhisa mutobvu nga mulilo, hone malambelo a ro sa bva. U ḓikunisa ha vhathu vhanga a zwi farisi tshithu, ngauri vhavhi a vha khou bviswa vhukati havho." 
Jeremiah6:30 Vha pfi ndi siliva ya malambelo ngauri Muṋe washu o vha lamba. 
Jeremiah7:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽe ḽa ḓa ha nṋe Jeremia ḽi tshi bva kha Muṋe washu, ḽa ri" 
Jeremiah7:2 ndi yo ima muṋangoni wa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu hune vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vha dzhena nga gethe hedzo vha tshi ḓa u luvha Muṋe washu, ndí henefho ndi vha ḓivhadze mafhungo haano ndi ri vha pfe ipfi" 
Jeremiah7:3 ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi ri, “Laṱani vhuvhi haṋu ni ite zwivhuya, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni litsha na dzula fhethu hafha." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ni songo fulufhela vhane vha ni fhura vha ri, ‘Ri na thembele ya Muṋe washu! Thembele ya Muṋe washu! Thembele ya Muṋe washu!’" 
Jeremiah7:5 Arali vhukuma na laṱa vhuvhi haṋu na ita zwivhuya, na tshilisana ni sa fhurani," 
Jeremiah7:6 na si kandeledze vhatsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi, na si vhulahe vhathu vha si na mulandu shangoni heḽino, na si luvhe miṅwe midzimu zwine zwa ḓo sokou vha u ḓilozwa," 
Jeremiah7:7 ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni litsha na ḓi dzula hafha shangoni ḽe nda ṋea vhomakhulukuku waṋu uri ḽi vhe ḽavho tshoṱhe. 
Jeremiah7:8 “Hone inwi ni fulufhela maipfi a vhufhura a sa tshidzi. 
Jeremiah7:9 Ni a tswa, ni vhulaha vhathu, ni ita vhupombwe, ni anela mazwifhi na ṋekedza Baali nduvho yo fhiswaho, na luvha midzimu ye na vha ni sa i ḓivhi." 
Jeremiah7:10 Na ri u ralo na ḓa thembeleni ye nda ri ndi yanga, na ri, ‘Ḽo lala!’ na nga ni khou nnduvha, ngeno ni tshi ita zwoṱhe zwine nda zwi nengwa?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Mathina iyi thembele ye nda ri ndi yanga ni vho i ita bako ḽa mavemu. Hone zwoṱhe zwine na ita ndo zwi vhona. 
Jeremiah7:12 “A ni ḓou ya Shilo, fhethu he nda ranga u hu nanga uri ndi luhwe hone, ni vhone uri ndo hu itani nga mulandu wa vhuvhi ha vhathu vhanga vha Israele." 
Jeremiah7:13 No ita zwivhi zwoṱhe hezwo, nda amba na inwi nda tou khwaṱhisa, na hana u thetshelesa; nda ni vhidza na si aravhe." 
Jeremiah7:14 Zwenezwo zwe nda zwi ita Shilo ndi ḓo zwi ita thembele hei ye nda ri ndi yanga ine na i fululufhela. Fhethu hafhano he nda ṋea inwi na vhomakhulukuku waṋu, ndi ḓo hu ita zwe nda ita Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndi ḓo ni thatha na si tsha mmbona, nda ni ita zwe nda ita mashaka aṋu vhathu vha Efraimi. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 Muṋe washu o ri, “Jeremia, u songa rabelela havha vhathu. U songo vha phuphuthelela kana wa tou sivhelela wa vha humbelela kha Nṋe, a thi nga u thetshelesi." 
Jeremiah7:17 A u zwi vhoni kani zwine vha ita miḓini ya Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema? 
Jeremiah7:18 Vhana vha reḓa khuni, vhanna vha vhasa mililo, vhasadzi vha suka bwindi ḽa vhukhopfu vha baga dzikhekhe dza vhurotho vha tshi bagela mudzimu une wa pfi Mufumakadzi wa Makoleni. Vha ita na u phasela miṅwe midzimu nga waini, vha tshi itela u nndevhela ngazwo." 
Jeremiah7:19 Hone vhukumakuma ane vha khou vhaisa ndi Nṋe naa? Na kathihi, vha khou ḓivhaisa vhone vhaṋe, vha ḓo shona vhone vhaṋe." 
Jeremiah7:20 Huno Nṋe Yahavee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe ndi ḓo shululela mbiti dzanga kha thembele heino. Ndi ḓo dzi shululela kha vhathu na zwifuwo, na kha miri na mavhele. Mbiti dzanga dzi fhisa unga mulilo u sa dzimi.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Ni kha ḓi nṋekedzelani nduvho dzi fhiswaho? Dzi ṱanganyeni na zwiṱhavhelo ni yo zwi ḽa zwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah7:22 Ndi tshi pfulusa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Egipita a tho ngo vhuya nda vha ṋea ndayo nga nduvho dzi fhiswaho kana zwiṅwe zwiṱhavhelo. 
Jeremiah7:23 Tshe nda vha laya ndi uri vha nthetshelese, Nṋe ndi vhe Mudzimu wavho, vhone vha vhe vhathu vhanga, vha tshile nga he nda vha laya, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo vha nakela." 
Jeremiah7:24 Hone a vho ngo vhuya vha thetshelesa vha zwi dzhiela nzhele. Tshavho ho vha u ita zwe vha vhudzwa nga mbilu dzavho mmbi dza tshipimbi, vha ḓi tshinya vha tshi ya, vha si tsha ita zwivhuya." 
Jeremiah7:25 U bva tshee vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha pfuluwa Egipita u swika zwino, ndo ḓi ruma vhaporofita vhaḓinḓa vhanga kha inwi." 
Jeremiah7:26 Naho zwo ralo a hu na na we a vhuya a thetshelesa kana a zwi dzhiela nzhele. Tshe na ita tsho vha tshipimbi na u ntshandukela u fhira na vhomakhulukuku waṋu. 
Jeremiah7:27 “Zwino iwe Jeremia u vhudze vhathu vhanga maipfi haya oṱhe, hone a vha nga u thetshelesi; u tshi vha vhidza a vha nga u aravhi." 
Jeremiah7:28 U ḓo vha vhudza uri ndi vhathu vha sa thetshelesi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, naho vha tshi rwiwa a vha gudi tshithu. U fulufhedzea ho fa, na u pfala a hu tsha vhuya ha pfala hu tshi ambiwa.”" 
Jeremiah7:29 Muṋe washu u ri, “Inwi vhathu vha Jerusalema, lilani; vheulani mavhudzi aṋu ni a laṱe kule. Imbani nyimbo dza zwililo zwa lufuni ni miṱumbani ya zwikwara, ngauri ndo sinyuwa, ndo landula vhathu vhanga, ndo tou vha ṱamba." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Vhathu vha Juda vho ita tshivhi. Vho dzhia midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso ine nda i vhenga vha i vhea thembeleni ye nda ri ndi yanga, u ralo ha vha u i kumadza." 
Jeremiah7:31 Ngei Govhani ḽa Hinomu vho fhaṱa aḽiṱari i no pfi Thofethe, uri vha kone u dzhia vhana vhavho vha vhatukana na vhasidzana vha vha ite zwiṱhavhelo nga u vha fhisa muliloni. Hezwo a vho ngo laiwa nga Nṋe uri vha zwi ite – na mbiluni yanga zwo vha zwi siho." 
Jeremiah7:32 Zwenezwo hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga tshine ya si tsha ḓo pfi Thofethe kana ha pfi Govha ḽa Hinomu, hu vho ḓo tou pfi Govha ḽa Bulayo. Vha ḓo swiṱa vhathu henefho ngauri hu ḓo vha hu si tshee na hune vha nga swiṱwa hone." 
Jeremiah7:33 Zwitumbu zwavho zwi ḓo vha zwiḽiwa zwa zwiṋoni na phukha, nahone a hu nga vhi na ane a ḓo zwi shusha." 
Jeremiah7:34 Shango ḽi ḓo vha soga. Miḓini ya Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema ndi ḓo fhelisa mikosi ya dakalo na mifhululu, ha si tsha vha na u pembelela mbingano.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Misi yeneyo marambo a mahosi na vhahulwane vha Juda na marambo a vhotshifhe na a vhaporofita na a vhathu vha Jerusalema, a ḓo bviswa zwaloni zwavho." 
Jeremiah8:2 A ḓo anewa ḓuvhani, a vhonetshelwa nga ṅwedzi na ṋaledzi dza ṱaḓulu – zwoṱhe zwe vha vha vha tshi zwi funa, vha tshi zwi shumela, vha tshi zwi ita midzimu yavho vha zwi gwadamela vha zwi rabela. Marambo avho ha tsha ḓo dovha a kuvhanganywa kana a swiṱwa, a ḓo tou vha manyoro." 
Jeremiah8:3 Vhathu vha lushaka holu luvhi vhane vha ḓo sala, vha dzula hune nda ḓo ri u vha balanganya vha ya hone, vha ḓo tou ri ngavhe ri si tsha tshila ro fa. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 Muṋe washu o mmbudza uri ndi vhudze vhathu vhawe ndi ri, “Muthu a wa ha vuwi naa? Muthu a xela nḓila ha humi naa?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Zwino vhathu avha ndi mini vha tshi ri u nṱutshela vha si tsha vhuya? Jerusalema ndi mini u tshi ḓi nṱutshela lu sa fheli. Vha nambatela midzimu ya vhufhura vha hana u vhuya kha Nṋe. 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndo thetshelesa zwavhuḓi, hone a vha ambi zwi re zwone. A hu na ane a ri o tshinya a ḓisola a ri, ‘Ndo itani?’ Muṅwe na muṅwe u fara yawe nḓila unga bere ine ya gidimela nndwani." 
Jeremiah8:7 Na gololwane ḽi fhufhaho muyani ḽi ḓivha tshifhinga tshaḽo tsha u humela murahu; ḽiivha na ṱhambamaḓi na ṱhame zwi ḓivha tshifhinga tsha u pfuluwa. Hone vhathu vhanga a vha ḓivhi milayo ine nda vha vhusa ngayo. 
Jeremiah8:8 “Khezwi ni tshi ri no ṱalifha, ni ḓivha milayo yanga? Vhonani, vhaḓivhi vha milayo vha ṅwala zwa vhufhura, vho kanganyedza milayo yanga." 
Jeremiah8:9 Vhaṱali vhaṋu vha ḓo shoniswa; vha ḓo hanganea vha fashiwa. Vho nyadza maipfi anga; vhuṱali vhune vha vha naho zwino ndi vhufhio? 
Jeremiah8:10 Zwenezwo vhasadzi vhavho ndi ḓo vha kovhela vhaṅwe vhanna, masimu avho ndi ḓo a kovhela vhaṅwe. Muṅwe na muṅwe, muhulwane na muṱuku, u linga u pfuma nga vhufhura. Na vhaporofita na vhotshifhe ndi zwithihi, vha na vhufhura." 
Jeremiah8:11 Vha tshi pomba mbonzhe dza vhathu vhanga vha dzi ita dzi sa dini. Vha ri, ‘Ḽo lala, ḽo lala,’ ngeno hu si na mulalo." 
Jeremiah8:12 Vho vhuya vha shona nge vha ita zwi nengisaho naa? A vho ngo shona na kathihi, na u ḓivha ṱhoni a vha dzi ḓivhi! Zwenezwo vha ḓo wa u ḓi nga vhaṅwe vho wa; ṱhamu yanga i ḓo vha wisela fhasi. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi ri ndi ḓo wana khaṋo khavho, matsina ndi minḓirivhe i songo aṋwaho nḓirivhe, ndi mihuyu i songo aṋwaho mahuyu, na maṱari ayo o puta. Zwenezwo ndi ḓo vha kumedza vhakandeledzi." 
Jeremiah8:14 “Vha ri, ‘Ri tshee ro dzulelani fhano? Nga ri kuvhangane ri shavhele miḓini i re na vhukhudo, ri yo lovhela hone! Hufha Mudzimu Muṋe washu o ita uri ri lovhe, o ri ṋea maḓi a re na mulimo uri ri nwe, nge ra mu khakhela." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ro vha ro lavhelela mulalo, hone a hu na tshivhuya tsho ḓaho; ri tshi ri ho swika tshifhinga tsha uri ri fhodzwe ha tou ḓa zwi ofhisaho." 
Jeremiah8:16 Hu pfala u fema ha dzibere dza maswina muḓini wa Dani; mboho dzadzo dzi tshi lila shango ḽoṱhe ḽi a dzinginyea. Vho ḓa u mila shango na zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo, muḓi na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho henefho.’" 
Jeremiah8:17 “Vhonani, ndi ḓo ni ḓisela dziṋowa dzi re na vhuṱungu, mavuluvulu a sa phuphudzwi, dzi ḓo ni luma na si tsha fhola.” Ho amba Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah8:18 Mbilu yanga i a vhavha, i tou ṋoka." 
Jeremiah8:19 Tshililo tsha vhathu vhanga tshi pfala thungo dzoṱhe, vha ri, “Kani Muṋe washu ha tsheeho Tsioni? Khosi ya Tsioni a i tsha dzula hone naa?” Muṋe washu a tshi fhindula u ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi nṱunga nga u luvha midzimu ya zwifanyiso, vha gwadamela midzimu isili i si tshithu?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Vhathu vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Khaṋo yo fhira, tshilimo tsho fhela, hone a ri athu tshidzwa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Mbilu yanga yo pwashekana ngauri vhathu vha hashu vho pwashekana; ndo ṱungufhala, ndo farwa nga nyofho." 
Jeremiah8:22 Giliada a hu tshee na mushonga naa? A hu tshee na ṅanga naa? Hufha mbonzhe dza vhathu vha hashu dzi sa laxwi? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ngavhe ṱhoho yanga i tshisima tsha maḓi, maṱo anga e tshisima tsha miṱodzi. Ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo lila vhusiku na masiari, ndi tshi lilela vhathu vha hashu vhe vha vhulawa nndwani." 
Jeremiah9:2 Ngavhe ndi tshi nga wana thumba ya vhaendi ngei sogani, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ṱutshela vhathu vha hashu nda yo dzula hone nda vha kule navho. Vhoṱhe ndi dziphombwe, ndi gogo ḽa zwifheṱi." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ndimi dzavho vha dzula vho dzi gudisa u zwifha, dzi pfula unga vhura, shangoni a hu vhusi ngoho, hu vhusa u sa fulufhedzea. Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhathu vhanga vha ita vhuvhi vha dovha, Nṋe vha a nndandula." 
Jeremiah9:4 Thanyelani khonani dzaṋu, na vhana vha mme aṋu ni songo vha fulufhedza. Ṅwana wa mme au muṅwe na muṅwe ndi Jakopo, mufhuri muṋe wa dzina, khonani iṅwe na iṅwe ndi munyefuli." 
Jeremiah9:5 Khonani i fhura khonani; a hu na a no amba ngoho. Vho gudisa ndimi dzavho u zwifha; vha shandukelana lwa u tou ḓidina. 
Jeremiah9:6 Vha pwanyeledzana vha dovha; vha phapha vhufhura nṱha ha vhuṅwe; Nṋe a vha nndondi,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah9:7 Nga zwenezwo, Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Zwino-ha vhathu vhanga ndi ḓo vha bvisa malambelo nda vha linga. Vhathu vhanga vho tshinya, ndi tshini tshine nda nga kha ḓi ita?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Ndimi dzavho ndi misevhe i vhulahaho, vha amba zwa vhufhura fhedzi. Vha tshi amba na vhaṅwe vha na haṋwani ha u ḓifha, ngeno mbiluni vha tshi khou vha retshela zwikwekwe." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ndi songo vha laṱisela zwenezwo naa? Lushaka lwo raloho ndi songo lu lifhedza naa? Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.” 
Jeremiah9:10 Ndo ri, “Ndi ḓo lilela dzithavha nda tou honḓa, nda vusa tshililo nga u vhona mafulo a phangani. Ho sala hu soga, a hu tsha fhira muthu, a hu tsha lila kholomo; zwiṋoni zwo fhufha zwa shavha, phukha dza ḓaka dzo pfuluwa.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Muṋe washu u ri, “Jerusalema ndi ḓo hu ita thulwi ya matumba, hu ḓo vha vhudzulo ha dziphunguhwe; miḓi ya Juda ndi i ita soga hu sa dzuli muthu.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Nda vhudzisa nda ri, “Ndi nnyi wa vhuṱali ane a nga ṱalukanya hezwi? Ndi nnyi we a laiwa nga Muṋe washu uri a ri vhudze? A ri vhudze uri ndi mini shango ḽo phusukanywa ḽa oma ḽa sala ḽi soga hu sa fhiri muthu.”" 
Jeremiah9:13 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nge vha furalela mulayo wanga we nda vha vhetshela; a vho ngo nthetshelesa, a vho ngo tevhedza mulayo wanga," 
Jeremiah9:14 tshavho ho vha u tevhedza mbilu dzavho dza tshipimbi, vha rerelela Baali vha tshi tevhedza zwe vha funzwa nga vhokhotsi avho." 
Jeremiah9:15 Zwenezwo Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Vhonani, vhathu havha ndi ḓo ita uri vha ḽe zwiḽiwa zwi kalakataho, vha nwe maḓi a re na mulimo." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndi ḓo vha balanganya na dzitshakha dzine he vhone he vhokhotsi avho vha si dzi ḓivhe, ndi ḓo vha pandamedza nga pfumo vha vhuya vha lovha vhoṱhe.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Elekanyani zwino! Vhidzani vhasadzi vha u lilela vhafu vha ḓe; hu ḓe vhomakone vhazwo.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Litshani vha ṱavhanye u ḓa vha ri lilele, maṱo ashu a vhuye a tevhuwe miṱodzi, ya tou gubunyea." 
Jeremiah9:19 Tsioni hu pfala tshililo, hu pfi, “Vhonani uri ro lozwiwa hani! Vhonani uri ro shona hani! Ro pfuluwa shangoni ḽa hashu, nnḓu dzashu dzo no vha matumba.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Nṋe nda ri, “Zwino inwi vhasadzi ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, a tshi amba ni kolongonye nḓevhe. Funzani vhana vhaṋu tshililo; ni funzane mukosi wa lufu." 
Jeremiah9:21 Lufu lwo ri dzhenela nga mafasiṱere, lwo dzhena pfamoni dzashu; lwo vhulaha vhana zwiṱaraṱani, na vhaṱhannga mikotoni." 
Jeremiah9:22 Zwitumbu zwi ḓo sokou poswa hoṱhe-hoṱhe unga mathukhwi, zwi ḓo nga mavhele ane mukaṋi a ri u a kaṋa a a posa thungo, a si vhe na ane a a kuvhanganya. Ndi zwe Muṋe washu a nndaedza uri ndi ambe.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Muṋe washu u ri, “Muṱali a songo zuwa vhuṱali hawe, muhali a songo khoḓa vhuhali hawe, mupfumi a songo ṱongisa lupfumo lwawe." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ane a zuwa nga a zuwe hezwi: zwauri u a nnḓivha a nṱalukanya, ndi Nṋe Yahavee ane shangoni nda ita vhuthu, nda haṱula nga khaṱhulo mbuya, nda ita zwi re zwone zwi sa solisei; mazuwo eneo ndi one ane nda a takalela. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa maḓuvha ane nda ḓo laṱisa vhoṱhe vhe vha fumba muvhili fhedzi –" 
Jeremiah9:26 vhathu vha Egipita na Juda na Edomo na Amoni na Muaba na vhoṱhe vha no vheula ṱhaha vha dzulaho phangani mashangoni a kule. Tshakha hedzo dzoṱhe a dzo ngo fumba zwa ngoho, Vhaisraele vhone a vho ngo fumba mbiluni.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Inwi Vhaisraele, ipfani zwine Muṋe washu a ni vhudza." 
Jeremiah10:2 U ri, “Ni songo guda maitele a dziṅwe tshakha, ni songo ofha zwiga zwi re lutomboni, unga tshakha dziṅwe dzi tshi zwi ofha." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ḓivhani uri vhurereli ha dziṅwe tshakha a si tshithu; vha rema muri ḓakani, mutsila a u senda nga musendo." 
Jeremiah10:4 Vha u ṱama nga siliva na musuku; vha u ṱanganya nga hamula na zwibigiri uri u si we. 
Jeremiah10:5 Midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso a i koni u amba, i nga tshishushedzazwiṋoni tsimuni ya mabvani; a i koni u tshimbila, i tou hwalwa. Inwi ni songo i ofha, a i huvhadzi, na tshivhuya na tshithihi i nga si ni itele.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Iwe Muṋe washu, a hu na ane a nga Iwe; u muhuluhulu, dzina ḽau ḽi na maanḓa, ḽi fhira zwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ndi nnyi ane a nga si u ofhe, Iwe Khosi ya dzitshakha? Hezwi ndi zwone zwo u teaho. Kha vhaṱali vha tshakha dzoṱhe, mivhusoni yavho yoṱhe, a hu na a no nga Iwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Vhoṱhe a vha na nzhele, vha nga phukha, vha funzwa nga midzimu ya zwifanyiso i si tshithu. Ndi thanda." 
Jeremiah10:9 Siliva yazwo yo fulwaho i bva Tharashishi, musuku u bva Ufasi. Zwe vhatsila na vhafuli vha ita zwo ambadzwa sila ḽa denga na muridili ḽo lukwaho nga vhashumi vhomakone." 
Jeremiah10:10 Huno Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu wa ngoho; ndi Mudzimu a tshilaho, ndi Khosi ya lini na lini. A sinyuwa, ḽifhasi ḽi a dzinginyea; dzitshakha dzi nga si kone u konḓelela mbiti dzawe." 
Jeremiah10:11 (Vha vhudzeni uri midzimu heyo i songo sikaho lutombo na shango i ḓo lovha ya si tsha vha hone fhano shangoni na fhasi ha lutombo). 
Jeremiah10:12 Mudzimu Ene o vhumba ḽifhasi nga maanḓa awe; o tea shango nga vhuṱali hawe, o ṱharamudza lutombo nga ṱhalukanyo yawe." 
Jeremiah10:13 A kaidza, maḓi a ṱaḓulu a a bvuma; u takusa makole migumoni ya ḽifhasi. U ruma lupenyo mvula ya mbo ḓi hwaa, a bvisa muya zwisikuni zwawe." 
Jeremiah10:14 Vhathu vhoṱhe a vha na nzhele, vha nga phukha, a vha na nḓivho; vhafuli vha musuku vha a shona vha tshi vhona zwitungulo zwe vha fula. Midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso ndi ya khole-khole, hufha na u fema zwi sa femi." 
Jeremiah10:15 A zwi na mushumo, ndi matambavhana, hu tshi swika tshifhinga tsha khaṱhulo zwi ḓo lovha." 
Jeremiah10:16 Mudzimu wa Jakopo ha ngi zwone, Ene ndi Musiki wa zwithu zwoṱhe, Israele ndi vhathu vhe a ḓiwanela. U pfi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah10:17 Inwi vhathu vha Jerusalema, no govhelwa, kuvhanganyani thundu yaṋu ni pfuluwe." 
Jeremiah10:18 Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino vhoṱhe vha no dzula shangoni ḽino ndi ḓo vha kudza kule; ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo uri vha thubiwe.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha tshema vha ri, “Ndi na khombo nṋe ndo huvhalaho! Mbonzhe yanga a i lafhei! Nda ḓivhudza nda ri, ‘Uvhu ndi vhulwadze hanga, ndi fanela u vhu konḓelela.’" 
Jeremiah10:20 Dennde yanga yo tupukanywa; thambo dzoṱhe dzo ṱhukhuwa. Vhana vhanga vho nṱutshela, a vha tsheeho; zwino a hu tshee na o salaho a no ḓo akha dennde yanga, kana a ntsongela mutumba." 
Jeremiah10:21 Vhalisa a vha na nzhele, vha vho nga phukha, a vha humbeli Muṋe washu a vha endedza; ndi zwine zwa si vha nakele, masambi a nngu dzavho oṱhe o balangana." 
Jeremiah10:22 Thetshelesani! Hu khou ḓa mafhungo! Ndi mufhirifhiri u bvaho shangoni ḽa devhula! U ḓo ita uri miḓi ya Juda i sale i si na muthu, hu ḓo sala ho dzula phunguhwe fhedzi.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Muṋe washu, ndi a zwi ḓivha uri vhutshilo ha muthu a si hawe; a si ene a tshimbidzaho ṋayo dzawe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Muṋe washu, nkhakhulule nga vhulenda, hu si nga mbiti, u sa ḓo nndozwa nda si tsha vha hone." 
Jeremiah10:25 Shululela mbiti dzau kha tshakha dza vhannḓa dzi sa u luvhi, dzi sa u rabeli. Ndi vhone vhe vha mila Jakopo; vha mu fhedza tshoṱhe, vha phusukanya shango ḽa hawe." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽo ḓaho ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu; ḽo ri 
Jeremiah11:2 a ambe na vhathu vha Juda na vha dzulaho Jerusalema, a ri, “Thetshelesani zwitiwa zwa mulanga we nda vhofha na inwi.”" 
Jeremiah11:3 Ḽa ri a vha vhudze uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Ane a si thetshelese zwitiwa zwa mulanga o teketelwa." 
Jeremiah11:4 Ndi mulanga we nda vhofha na vhomakhulukuku waṋu zwiḽa ndi tshi vha pfulusa Egipita, ndi tshi vha ṋula ṋanḓoni i ṋokisaho tsimbi, nda ri vha nthetshelese vha ite zwoṱhe zwine nda vha vhudza, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho." 
Jeremiah11:5 Na ralo ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo khunyeledza zwe nda anela vhomakhulukuku waṋu, nda ri ndi ḓo vha fha shango ḽi no ela mukhaha na ṋotshi, shango ḽine ṋamusi ḽa vha ḽaṋu.” Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Amen! Ndi zwone Muṋe washu.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri ndi ḓivhadze maipfi haya oṱhe miḓini ya Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema, ndi ri, “Thetshelesani zwitiwa zwa mulanga ni zwi tevhedze." 
Jeremiah11:7 Tshee nda pfulusa vhomakhulukuku waṋu Egipita u swika ṋamusi ndo ḓi vha kaidza ndo khwaṱhisa nda ri, ‘Nthetsheleseni!’" 
Jeremiah11:8 Hone vhone a vho ngo thetshelesa kana vha zwi dzhiela nzhele; tshavho ho vha u ita zwe vha funzedzwa nga mbilu dzavho mmbi dza tshipimbi. Ndi zwone, vhunga vha songo tevhedza ndaela dza mulanga wanga, ndi ḓo vha ita zwoṱhe zwi ofhisaho zwe nda fulufhedzisa u ita a no vhofholola mulanga.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudza a ri, “Vhathu vha Juda na vha no dzula Jerusalema vho nnyitela tshimbevha." 
Jeremiah11:10 Vho vhuelela zwivhini zwa vhomakhulukuku wavho vhe vha lamba u thetshelesa maipfi anga. Vho luvha miṅwe midzimu vha i shumela. Nnḓu dzoṱhe vhuvhili hadzo, ya Israele na ya Juda, vho vhofholola mulanga we nda vhofha na vhomakhulukuku wavho." 
Jeremiah11:11 Zwenezwo Nṋe Yahavee ndi ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo ine vha nga si i ponyoke. Nangwe vha nṱavhela mukosi a thi nga vha thetshelesi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Vhathu vha miḓi ya Juda na vha Jerusalema vha ḓo yo huwelela midzimu ye vha i dubisela zwioro, hone musi khombo i tshi vha wela a i nga vhuyi ya vha farisa tshithu." 
Jeremiah11:13 Iwe Juda, a hu na na muḓi wa Juda u si na mudzimu wawo usili, a hu na na mukoto fhano Jerusalema u si na aḽiṱari ye wa i fhaṱela u fhisa zwioro u tshi dubisela uḽa mudzimu u shonisaho u no pfi Baali.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 Jeremia, vhathu havha u songo vha rabelela, u songo vha luvhelelela kana wa vha humbelela; a thi nga thetshelesi musi vha tshi mmbidzelela zwo vhifha.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Muṋe washu a tshi amba lushaka lwawe u ri, “Mufunwa wanga u khou itani thembeleni yanga, hezwi a tshi khou luka vhunwa na vhanzhi? U vhona unga ṋama ya zwiṱhavhelo i nga mu tinyisa ṱhamu, a mbo ḓi dovha a pembela?”" 
Jeremiah11:16 Muṋe washu o vhuya a ri ni muolivi u titimaho, wa mitshelo ya tshivhumbeo tsho nakaho. Huno u ḓo ruma ḓumbu ḽa maanḓa ḽi titaho, matavhi awo a a fhisa nga nḓadzi a tou vunḓekana." 
Jeremiah11:17 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe we a u ṱavha, u ri u ḓo welwa nga khombo, nge vha nnḓu ya Israele na vha nnḓu ya Juda vha ita vhuvhi vha mu ṱunga nga u dubisela Baali zwioro." 
Jeremiah11:18 Muṋe washu o nnzumbululela zwe vha nndangana, nda zwi ḓivha, nga tshifhinga tshenetsho o ntsumbedza zwe vha vha vha tshi khou zwi ita." 
Jeremiah11:19 Ndo vha ndi tshi nga ngwana ya vhulenda i tshi yo ṱhavhiwa; ndo vha ndi sa ḓivhi uri vho nndangana, vha tshi ri, “Nga ri tupule muri wo takala, nga ri mu tumule shangoni ḽa vha tshilaho, uri dzina ḽawe ḽi si tsha vhuya ḽa humbulwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Huno Iwe Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, u tshi haṱula a u ṱaluli, u ṱola mbilu na muhumbulo, kha ndi vhone u tshi vha lifhedza, hufha ndo ḓikumedza Iwe." 
Jeremiah11:21 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a tshi amba vhanna vha Anathotho vhane vha ṱoḓa u nndya ṱhoho vha tshi ri, “U songo porofita nga dzina ḽa Yahavee; wa vhuya wa porofita, ri a u vhulaha!”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ndi ḓo vha laṱisa. Vhaṱhannga vhavho vha ḓo fa nga pfumo, vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha ḓo ṋoka nga nḓala." 
Jeremiah11:23 A hu nga vhi na a no sala, vhanna vha Anathotho vha ḓo welwa nga khombo musi ndi tshi vha lifhedza.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Muṋe washu, Iwe a u vhuyi wa khakha; mbilaelo dzanga ndi ḓo dzi kumedza Iwe. Hone litsha ndi u vhudzise kuvhusele kwau! Ndi mini vhavhi zwi tshi vha nakela? Ndi mini vha no u shandukela vha si na tshi no vha dina?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Wo vha ṱavha vha ṱoka midzi; vha a aluwa vha aṋwa mitshelo vha ḓi dzula vha tshi u amba zwavhuḓi, ngeno mbilu dzavho dzi kule na Iwe." 
Jeremiah12:3 Hone Muṋe washu, nṋe u a nnḓivha, u a mmbona, wa ḓi vhona ndi tshi fulufhedzea nga mbilu yoṱhe. Vha khwikhwidze unga nngu dzi tshi yo ṱhavhiwa! Vha khethele thungo vha lindele ḓuvha ḽa u ṱhavhiwa!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Shango ḽi ḓo lila nga gomelelo u swika lini? Hatsi ha masimuni ho puta u swika lini? Na dziphukha na zwiṋoni zwi a lovha nga mulandu wa vhuvhi ha vha dzulaho khaḽo. Hone vhone vha khou ri, “Jeremia a nga si vhone riṋe ri tshi lovha.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Muṋe washu a ri, “Jeremia, arali wa gidima mbambe na vhathu vha songo namelaho bere, vha u netisa, u nga kona hani u ita mbambe na bere? Arali u tshi khukhulwa shangoni ḽi tshimbileaho, u nga kona hani u tshimbila maṱakani a Jorodani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Vhana vha mme au, vha muṱa wa hau, na vhone vho u fheṱa; vho u ṱavhela mukosi. U songo vha fulufhedza nangwe vha tshi amba na iwe zwavhuḓi.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Ndo furalela nnḓu yanga, nda ṱutshela vhathu vhanga; ene ane nda mu funa nga mbilu yoṱhe ndo mu kumedza zwanḓani zwa maswina." 
Jeremiah12:8 Vhathu vhanga ndi tshi vha vhona vha vho nga ndau dzi ḓakani. Vha mmbombela; ndi zwine nda vha vhenga. 
Jeremiah12:9 Vhathu vhanga ndi vhona vha tshi nga gwitha ḽine zwiṅwe zwiṋoni zwa ḽi tinga zwa ḽi luma. Kuvhanganya phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka dzi ḓe dzi ḽe. 
Jeremiah12:10 Vhalisa vhanzhi vha dzinngu vho ṱahadza tsimu yanga ya minḓirivhe, vha kandekanya tsimu yanga; tsimu yanga i takadzaho vho i shandula shango ḽa soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Ḽo itwa soga nda vhona ḽi si na muthu; shango ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo vha soga, hone a hu na a no zwi londa." 
Jeremiah12:12 Vhalozwi vho phapha mivhundu yoṱhe ya phangani i sa meli tshithu, pfumo ḽa Yahavee ḽo ḽa u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi, a hu na a no ḓo sala." 
Jeremiah12:13 Vho lima goroi vha kaṋa mipfa; vho shuma vha bva biko vha si wane tshithu. Vha tshi kaṋa vho shona nge Yahavee a sinyuwa zwi ofhisaho.” 
Jeremiah12:14 Muṋe washu u ri, “Tshakha dzoṱhe mmbi dzo ṋekanaho masakha na vhathu vhanga, dze dza tshinya shango ḽe nda ḽi ṋea vhathu vhanga Israele, ndi ḓo vha tupula mashangoni avho, nda dovha nda tupula na nnḓu ya Juda i re vhukati havho." 
Jeremiah12:15 Musi ndo no vha tupula, ndi ḓo dovha nda vha pfela vhuṱungu nda humisela muṅwe na muṅwe kha ifa ḽawe shangoni ḽawe." 
Jeremiah12:16 Vho funza vhathu vhanga u ana nga Baali, hone arali vha guda zwavhuḓi nḓila dza vhathu vhanga, vha vho ana nga dzina ḽanga vha ri, ‘Nga Yahavee a tshilaho’, vha ḓo dzula na vhathu vhanga vha bvela phanḓa." 
Jeremiah12:17 Huno lushaka lufhio na lufhio lu sa thetshelesi ndi ḓo lu tupula tshoṱhe nda lu lozwa.” Muṋe washu u ralo. 
Jeremiah13:1 Muṋe washu o mmbudza a ri, “Iyo renga bannda ya sila u i ambare khunduni, hone i songo vhuya ya kwama maḓi.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Nda mbo ḓi renga bannda, nga he Muṋe washu a amba, nda i ambara khunduni." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi nnḓela lwa vhuvhili, ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Iyo bannda ye wa i renga wa i ambara khunduni, i dzhie zwino u ye Pheratha u i dzumbe hone kha mutwe wa tombo.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Nda mbo ḓi ya nda i dzumba Pheratha nga he Muṋe washu a mmbudza. 
Jeremiah13:6 Ho no fhela maḓuvha manzhi Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Zwino iyo dzhia iḽa bannda ye nda ri u i dzumbe Pheratha.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Zwenezwo nda ya Pheratha nda bwa iḽa bannda nda i dzhia he nda vha ndo i dzumba hone, hone yo vha yo no ṱahala i si tshee na mushumo." 
Jeremiah13:8 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa ha nṋe ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Nṋe Yahavee ndi ri, ‘Ndi ḓo fhedza u ḓihudza ha Juda nga u ralo na u ḓihudza huhulu ha Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah13:10 Vhathu havha vhavhi vhane vha lamba u thetshelesa maipfi anga, vha sokou ita zwine vha funzedzwa nga mbilu dzavho dza tshipimbi, vha sala murahu ha miṅwe midzimu vha i shumela, vha i luvha, vha ḓo nga bannda hei i si na mushumo." 
Jeremiah13:11 Unga bannda i tshi vhofha muthu khundu, na Nṋe ndo enda ndo kungela nnḓu yoṱhe ya Israele na ya Juda uri vha vhe vhathu vhanga, vha rende dzina ḽanga vha ḽi hulise, vha vhe vhugala hanga. Hone vhone vha si thetshelese.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o mmbudza a ri, “Jeremia, vhudza vhathu vha Israele uri tsha nkho iṅwe na iṅwe ya waini ndi u panga waini. Vha tshi fhindula vha ḓo ri, ‘Kani-ha a ri zwi ḓivhi uri tsha nkho iṅwe na iṅwe ndi u panga waini?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Zwenezwo vha vhudze uri vhathu vha shango heḽino khathihi na mahosi vha no dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita, na vhotshifhe na vhaporofita na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Jerusalema, Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo vha panga waini vha vhuya vha kambwa." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndi ḓo vha kuḓanya vha pwashekana, vhokhotsi na vhana. A thi nga vha lileli, a thi nga vha pfeli vhuṱungu, a thi nga vha khathutsheli, a thi nga litshi u vha lozwa.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Hee vhathu vha Israele, Muṋe washu o amba na inwi! Thetshelesani ni zwi dzhiele nzhele, ni songo ḓihudza." 
Jeremiah13:16 Hulisani Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu a sa athu ḓisa swiswi, milenzhe yaṋu i sa athu khukhulwa thavhani dzi no khou swifhala, na ḓo fulufhela tshedza, hone Ene a tshi shandula swiswi ḽa tou bodo." 
Jeremiah13:17 Huno na sa thetshelesa, nṋe ndi ḓo lila tshiphirini, ndi tshi lilela u ḓihudza haṋu; ndi ḓo lila nda tswukisa maṱo, miṱodzi ya tevhukana ngauri sambi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi ḓo iswa vhuthubwani." 
Jeremiah13:18 Muṋe washu a amba na nṋe a ri, “Vhudza khosi na vhakoma mme awe vha tse kha khuluṋoni dzavho, ngauri khare dza vhugala dzi re ṱhohoni dzavho dzi ḓo wela fhasi." 
Jeremiah13:19 Miḓi i re Negeve i ḓo govhelwa ha si vhe na a i phalalaho. Vhathu vha Juda vha ḓo iswa vhuthubwani, a hu na a no ḓo sala.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Jerusalema, lilala u vhone vha no khou bva thungo ya devhula. Miḓi ya Juda, ḽone sambi ḽa nngu ḽe ha pfi u ḽi lise, ḽe wa vha u tshi ḽi zuwa, ḽi ngafhi?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Zwino vhathu vhe wa vha u tshi vha ita khonani dzau vha tshi vho ḓo u kunda vha u vhusa, u ḓo ri mini? A u nga pfi vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa naa?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Arali wa ḓivhudzisa wa ri, “Ndi mini zwo raloho zwo nngwela?” ḓivha uri ndi nga mulandu wa zwivhi zwau nguvho dzau dzi shi vhuya dza pengulwa wa tshipiwa." 
Jeremiah13:23 Muthu wa Kushu a nga shandukisa lukanda lwawe naa? Nngwe i nga shandukisa mavhala ayo naa? Khamusi ndi hone na inwi ni tshi nga kona u ita zwivhuya; no no tou vha na dzema ḽa u ita vhuvhi. 
Jeremiah13:24 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ni balanganya unga mungu u tshi hwalwa nga muya wa phangani." 
Jeremiah13:25 Hezwo ndi zwone zwo u livhaho, ndi wone mukovhe we nda u kovhela, nge wa nkhangwa wa fulufhela midzimu i si ya ngoho." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ndi ḓo pengula nguvho dzau, dza u thivha tshifhaṱuwo, uri vhoṱhe vha u vhonele." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndo nengwa vhupombwe hau na nyemulo dzau na u sa fhira munna hau u sa vhui wa shona! Ndo u vhona u tshi ita zwi nengisaho mivhunduni na shangoni. Iwe Jerusalema u ḓo zwi vhona! U ḓo dzula u ngomu vhuaḓani u swika lini?” 
Jeremiah14:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza Jeremia nga gomelelo, o ri," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Juda ḽi khou vusa tshililo, miḓi yaḽo yo ṋoka; vha lilela shango, Jerusalema hu pfala zwililo." 
Jeremiah14:3 Vhahulwane vha ruma vhashumi vhavho u yo vha kela maḓi; vha tshi swika zwisimani vha wana hu si na maḓi. Vha huma na mvuvhelo dzavho dzi si na tshithu, vha hanganea, vha khurumela nga ṱhoni." 
Jeremiah14:4 A hu na mvula, mavu o balea, vhalimi vho kulea nungo, vho shona." 
Jeremiah14:5 Na phala ngei ḓakani ya dzwala i ṅala ṋamana yayo nga u shaya pfulo. 
Jeremiah14:6 Mbiḓi dzi ima miṱumbani ya mivhundu yo omelelaho, dza femeleka unga phunguhwe; dzo kovhedza maṱo nga u shaya hatsi.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 “Muṋe washu, nangwe milandu yashu i tshi ri hwelela, ri farise u tshi itela dzina ḽau. U u shandukela hashu ndi huhulu; ro khakhela Iwe." 
Jeremiah14:8 Fulufhelo ḽa Israele ndi Iwe; ndi Iwe Mutshidzi wavho musi wa khombo. Khezwi u tshi nga mutsinda shangoni ḽau, u tshi nga mufhiri a no tou lala lwa khofhe?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Khezwi u tshi tou nga munna o ḓaḓaho, u tshi nga muhali a si na maanḓa a u tshidza muthu? Iwe Muṋe washu u dzula na riṋe, ri vhidzwa nga dzina ḽau, u songo ri furalela!”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Muṋe washu a tshi amba vhathu avha u ri, “Vha funesa u bva nḓilani, a vha humisi milenzhe yavho. Ndi zwine nda si vha takalele, zwino ndi ḓo elelwa milandu yavho, nda vha lifhedza vhutshinyi havho.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudza a ri, “U songo tsha rabela uri havha vhathu zwi vha nakele." 
Jeremiah14:12 Naho vha ḓidzima a thi nga thetshelesi tshililo tshavho; nangwe vha nṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na dzinduvho, a thi nga zwi ṱanganedzi. Tshine nda ḓo ita ndi u vha lozwa nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Zwenezwo nṋe nda ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, vhaporofita ndi vhone vhane vha ḓi endela u vha vhudza vha tshi ri, ‘A ni nga ḽiwi nga pfumo kana na fa nga nḓala. Vhukuma ndi ḓo ni ṋea mulalo muhulu hafhano fhethu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Vhaporofita vha khou porofita mazwifhi nga dzina ḽanga. A tho ngo vha ruma, a tho ngo vha laedza, a tho ngo vhuya nda amba navho. Vha khou ni porofitela mabono a si a ngoho, vha ni bvumbela zwi sa tshidzi, ndi miloro ya u ḓihumbulela." 
Jeremiah14:15 Huno Nṋe Yahavee ndi tshi amba havho vhaporofita vha no khou porofita nga dzina ḽanga ndí songo vha ruma, naho vha tshi ri, ‘A hu na pfumo ḽi no ḓo ḽa vhathu, shangoni a hu nga wi nḓala,’ ndi ri vhenevho vhaporofita vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vha fa nga nḓala." 
Jeremiah14:16 Na vhathu vhane vha khou pfa vhuporofita havho vha ḓo poswa mikotoni ya Jerusalema vhó fa nga nḓala na pfumo. A hu nga vhi na a no ḓo vha swiṱa, hu vhasadzi vhavho, hu vhana vhavho vha vhatuka, hu vha vhasidzana a vha nga swiṱwi. Ndi ḓo vha shululela khombo dzo vha teaho.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Muṋe washu o nndaya uri ndi vhudze vhathu nga maṱungu anga ndi ri, “Maṱo anga nga a bve miṱodzi i sa imi vhusiku na masiari, ngauri lushaka lwa hashu lwe lwa vha lu tshi nga musidzana a sa ḓivhi munna lwo pfulwa mbonzhe khulu, lwo huvhala zwi si na vhukono." 
Jeremiah14:18 Arali nda bva muḓini ndi vhona vhe vha ḽiwa nga pfumo; arali nda dzhena muḓini ndi vhona vhathu vha no khou ṋoka nga nḓala. Hu vhaporofita, hu vhotshifhe, vhoṱhe vho hanganea, vha khou tendeleka na shango unga vhashavhi.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Muṋe washu, wo laṱa Juda tshoṱhe naa? Nṋa u vho nengwa Tsioni? Khezwi wo ri huvhadza lu sa lafhei? Ro vha ro lavhelela mulalo, hone a hu na na tshivhuya tsho ḓaho, ra lavhelela u laxwa ha ḓa zwi ofhisaho fhedzi." 
Jeremiah14:20 Muṋe washu, vhuvhi hashu ri a vhu vhona, milandu ya vhokhotsi ashu ri a i ḓivha, ngoho ro u khakhela." 
Jeremiah14:21 U songo ri nyadza, ri hangwele u tshi itela dzina ḽau; u songo litsha u hulisa khuluṋoni yau ya vhugala. Elelwa mulanga we wa vhofha na riṋe, u songo u vhofholola." 
Jeremiah14:22 Nṋa midzimu ya dzitshakha i si tshithu i a kona u nisa mvula? Lutombo lu a suṱisa vhusuṱo nga lwoṱhe naa? A si Iwe Muṋe washu, Mudzimu washu, a no shuma hezwo naa? Ndi zwine ra lavhelela Iwe, ngauri ndi Iwe a no ita zwoṱhe hezwo." 
Jeremiah15:1 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu a mphindula a ri, “Naho Mushe na Samuele vho vha vha tshi nga pfumelela vhathu havha, ndo vha ndi sa nga vha khathutsheli. A thi tsha funa u vha vhona! Vha thathe vha ṱuwe!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Arali vha u vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Ri ḓo yafhi?’ vha vhudze uri, ‘Vho livhanywaho na lufu nga vha fe, vho livhanywaho na pfumo nga ḽi vha ḽe; vho livhanywaho na nḓala nga vha ṋoke; vho livhanywaho na u thubwa nga vha thubiwe.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo vha ḓisela ndozwo dza tshakha nṋa: Vha ḓo fhela nga pfumo, zwitumbu zwavho zwa khwikhwidzwa nga mmbwa, zwa ḽiwa nga maanga, vha pondiwa nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka zwa vha lozwa." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndi ḓo ita uri mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi i tshenuwe i tshi vhona zwine nda vha ita ndi tshi lifhedza zwe Manase ṅwana wa Hiskia khosi ya Juda a ita e Jerusalema.” 
Jeremiah15:5 Muṋe washu u ri, “Iwe Jerusalema, ane a ḓo u lilela ndi nnyi? A no ḓo u pfela vhuṱungu ndi nnyi? A no ḓo u vhudzisa mulalo ndi nnyi?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Ndi iwe wo nndaṱaho wa ḓi mpfuralela. Zwenezwo ndo u fara nda u lozwa; a tho ngo tsha kona u kandeledza mbiti dzanga. 
Jeremiah15:7 Ndo vha fhefhera nga luselo nda vha hashekanya khoroni dza miḓi ya shango. Vhathu vhanga ndo vha fhedzela vhana nda vha lozwa, nge vha si laṱe nḓila dzavho mmbi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Nda andisa tshilikadzi dzavho dza fhira muṱavha wa lwanzhe. Masiari ḽí nṱha ha ṱhoho nda ḓisa mulozwi a lozwa vhaṱhannga kathihi fhedzi, vhomme avho vha sala vha tshi ofha vha tou tetemela." 
Jeremiah15:9 Mme a vhana vhaṱanu na vhavhili o ṋoka a tou fhihamelwa. Ḓuvha ḽawe ḽo mu kovhelela hu tshee masiari, a shoniswa a tou hanganea. Vha salaho u fa vho ḽiwa nga pfumo ḽa maswina avho. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Mmawee, vho mmbebelani wee! Ndo rano ndi ṱwa ndi tshi hwelela shango nda ḽi isa khoroni. A thi athu vhuya nda adzima muṅwe tshi re tshanga, kana nda ḽa tsha muthu, naho zwo ralo ndi dzulela u teketelwa." 
Jeremiah15:11 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Ngoho ndi tshi u luṱanya na vhathu ndi itela uri zwi bveledze zwivhuya, ngoho ndi ḓo u farela lufhanga kha maswina au musi wa khombo na musi zwo vhifha." 
Jeremiah15:12 Munna a nga kona u vunḓa tsimbi – tsimbi i bvaho devhula – kana musinaseṱha? 
Jeremiah15:13 Israele, lupfumo lwau lwe wa khokha ndi ḓo lu ṋea vhaṅwe nga fhedzi vha lu thuba, nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi hau hoṱhe ho ḓadzaho shango ḽa haṋu." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndi ḓo u ita phuli ya maswina au shangoni ḽine wa si ḽi ḓivhe, mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo funga mulilo u sa dzimi lini na lini.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Zwenezwo nṋe nda ri, “Iwe Muṋe washu u a ṱalukanya; nnyelelwe u nndondole. Nndifhedzele vha ntovholaho. U songo mphelela mbilu wa nnzhavhula nga mbiti dzau. Edzou vhona zwine nda nyadzelwa u ima na Iwe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Maipfi au o ri u wanala nda a ḽa, o vha one dakalo ḽanga; ndi tshi pfi ndi muḓinḓa wau, Iwe Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe, nda pfa zwi tshi takadza mbilu yanga." 
Jeremiah15:17 A tho ngo kona u dzula na vhathu vhe kha madakalo avho nda takala navho; ndo dzula ndi ndoṱhe ngauri tshanḓa tshau tsho vha tshi kha nṋe, wa ri ndi muḓinḓa wau, wa ita uri ndi dinalee nga zwe nda vhona." 
Jeremiah15:18 Ndi mini vhuṱungu hanga vhu sa fheli, na mbonzhe yanga i tshi rema i sa lafhei? Khezwi u tshi vho nga mulambwana une wa mphura, wa nga tshisima tshi no xa?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Arali wa vhuya kha Nṋe, ndi ḓo u vhuedzedza mushumoni wau wa ntshumela. Arali wa amba zwo teaho, wa si tsha amba maipfi a si na mushumo, u ḓo vha mulomo wanga. Vhathu havha nga vha tevhele iwe, iwe u songo tevhela vhone." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndi ḓo u ita mutsheṱo wa vhathu havha, mutsheṱo wa musinaseṱha. Vha ḓo lwa na iwe vha si u kunde, ngauri Nṋe ndi ḓo vha na iwe, ndi ḓo u lamukisa nda u tshidza." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndi ḓo u lamulela zwanḓani zwa vhavhi, nda u tshidza zwanḓani zwa vha tshiṱuhu. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Muṋe washu a dovha a amba na nṋe a ri," 
Jeremiah16:2 “U songo vhinga wa vha na vhana fhano. 
Jeremiah16:3 Ndi ḓo u vhudza zwi no ḓo itea kha vhana vha no ḓo bebwa fhano shangoni ḽino na kha vhabebi vhavho. 
Jeremiah16:4 Vha ḓo fa nga malwadze a ofhisaho. A hu na a no ḓo vha lilela, a vha nga swiṱwi nga muthu, zwitumbu zwavho zwi ḓo lala mavuni unga manyoro. Vha ḓo fhela nga pfumo na nḓala, zwitumbu zwavho zwi ḓo ḽiwa nga zwiṋoni na zwivhanda." 
Jeremiah16:5 “U songo dzhena nḓuni hune ha ḽiwa zwiḽiwa zwo bikelwaho vha no swiṱa mufu; u songo ya wa lila, u songo vha ima maṱoni, ngauri ndo fhedza mulalo wa havha vhathu, a thi tsha ḓo vha funa kana nda vha khathutshela." 
Jeremiah16:6 Vhoṱhe vhapfumi na vhashai vha ḓo fa shangoni heḽino. A vha nga swiṱwi, a vha nga lilelwi, a hu na ane a ḓo ḓigegenedzela vhone kana a palula ṱhoho a tshi vha lilela." 
Jeremiah16:7 A hu na a no ḓo lilisa vhaṅwe nga u vha ḓisela zwiḽiwa; hu o felwaho nga khotsi, he o felwaho nga mme, a hu na a no ḓo mu khuthadza nga u mu ṋea tshinwiwa." 
Jeremiah16:8 “U songo dzhena nḓuni hune vha khou ḓiphiṋa nga zwiḽiwa wa dzula fhasi wa ḽa, wa nwa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Ipfa zwine Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele nda amba: Ndi ḓo fhelisa mihuvho na dakalo u tshi zwi vhona, u tshi kha ḓi tshila, ha si tsha pfala nyimbo dza mukwasha na muselwa hafhano fhethu." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Arali wa ri u tshi vhudza vhathu havha zwoṱhe hezwi vha u vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Ndi mini Yahavee a tshi amba khombo nngafha i no ḓo ri wela? Ro tshinyani? Yahavee Mudzimu washu ro mu khakhela ngafhi?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Iwe vha vhudze uri Yahavee u ri, ‘Ndi nge vhokhotsi aṋu vha ntshandukela, vha sala murahu ha miṅwe midzimu, vha i shumela, vha i luvha, vha shandukela Nṋe vha si tsha tevhedza mulayo wanga." 
Jeremiah16:12 Huno inwi na dovha na ita vhuvhi vhu no fhira ha vhokhotsi aṋu; a no ngo nthetshelesa, muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu o tevhela zwine a funzedzwa nga mbilu yawe mmbi ya tshipimbi." 
Jeremiah16:13 Zwino vhonani, ndi ḓo ni thatha shangoni heḽino na ya shangoni ḽine he inwi he vhokhotsi aṋu ha si vhe na we a vhuya a ḽi ḓivha, henengei ndi hune na ḓo shumela miṅwe midzimu vhusiku na masiari, ngauri Nṋe a thi tsha ḓo ni pfela vhuṱungu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa maḓuvha ane vhathu vha si tsha ḓo ri vha tshi ana vha ri, ‘Nga Yahavee a tshilaho, Ene we a pfulusa Vhaisraele Egipita.’" 
Jeremiah16:15 Vha vho ḓo ri, ‘Nga Yahavee a tshilaho, we a pfulusa Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa devhula na mashangoni oṱhe he a vha o vha thathela hone.’ Ndi uri ndi ḓo vha humisela shangoni ḽe nda ḽi ṋea vhokhotsi avho. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ruma vharei vha khovhe vhanzhi vha ḓa vha fasha havha vhathu. Ngavhuya ndi ḓo ruma vhazwimi vhanzhi vha ḓa vha vha zwima dzithavhani dzoṱhe na mivhunduni na mapakoni vhukati ha nngwa." 
Jeremiah16:17 Maṱo anga o sedza nḓila dzavho dzoṱhe; a dzo ngo nnzumbama, na vhutshinyi havho a ho ngo nnzumbama." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ndi ḓo thoma u vha lifhedzela milandu yavho na vhutshinyi havho nda dovha, nge vha kumadza shango ḽanga nga zwifanyiso zwi sa tshili vha ḽi ḓadza midzimu ya zwifanyiso i nengisaho!”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Muṋe washu, Iwe u maanḓa anga, u vhukhudo hanga, u vhushavhelo hanga musi zwo vhifha, dzitshakha dzi ḓo ḓa ha Iwe dzi tshi bva migumoni ya ḽifhasi dza ri, “Vhokhotsi ashu vho vhe na midzimu i si tshithu fhedzi, midzimu i si na mushumo i sa tshidzi." 
Jeremiah16:20 Nṋa muthu u tou ḓiitela midzimu? Vhukuma iyo a si midzimu!” 
Jeremiah16:21 Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwenezwo ndi ḓo vha funza – zwino ndi ḓo vha funza u ḓivha maanḓa anga na nungo dzanga. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhutshinyi ha Juda tsho ṅwalwa nga peni ya tsimbi, tsho korwa nga peni ya ṱhodzi ya daimani mbiluni dzavho na kha ṋanga dza aḽiṱari dzavho." 
Jeremiah17:2 Vha ḓidinela dziaḽiṱari dzavho na phuphu dza Ashera mudzimutshisadzi fhasi ha miri yo adzaho na nṱha ha zwikwara dza nga ndi vhana vhavho. 
Jeremiah17:3 Zwenezwo lupfumo lwavho lwe vha khokha ndi ḓo lu ṋea vhaṅwe vha lu thuba, khathihi na zwikwara zwa dziaḽiṱari, nga vhutshinyi ho ḓadzaho shango ḽavho." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ndi mulandu wavho vhone vhaṋe ndi tshi ḓo vha dzhiela. Ndi ḓo vha ita phuli dza maswina avho shangoni ḽine vha si ḽi ḓivhe; mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo funga mulilo u sa dzimi lini na lini!” 
Jeremiah17:5 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ane a fulufhela muthu wa ṋama, a ḓitika nga nungo dza muthu a faho, mbilu yawe ya furalela Nṋe Yahavee, onoyo o teketelwa." 
Jeremiah17:6 Onoyo u ḓo nga tshiṱaka tshi re phangani, mashudu a tshi ḓa a nga si a vhone. U ḓo dzula phangani ho swaho nga ḓuvha, shangoni ḽa muṋo hu sa tshili muthu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Hone wa mashudu ndi muthu ane a fulufhela Yahavee, ane fulufhelo ḽawe ḽa vha Nṋe." 
Jeremiah17:8 Onoyo u ḓo nga muri wo simiwaho tsini na maḓi, midzi yawo ya adza ya swika kudamboni. Biso ḽi nga si u ite tshithu, maṱari awo a dzula e madala. Ṅwaha wa gomelelo a hu na tshi u dinaho, a u fhidzi u aṋwa mitshelo." 
Jeremiah17:9 Ndi nnyi ane a nga ṱalukanya mbilu ya muthu? I fhura u fhira zwoṱhe, a i konadzei." 
Jeremiah17:10 Nṋe Yahavee ndi ṱola mbilu nda linga muhumbulo, uri ndi pfufhe muthu ndi tshi tevhedza kutshilele kwawe, nga he zwa tea mishumo yawe.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Muthu ane a pfuma nga u fhura u nga khwali ine ya alamela makumba e ya si a kudzele. Zwi a mu ṱutshela a tshee vhukati ha vhutshilo hawe, a fhedza nga u vhonala e tsilu." 
Jeremiah17:12 Thembele yashu ndi khuluṋoni ya vhugala ye ya ima nṱha ha thavha u bva mathomoni. 
Jeremiah17:13 Iwe Muṋe washu ndi Iwe fulufhelo ḽa Israele, vhoṱhe vhane vha u ṱutshela vha ḓo shona. Vhane vha u furalela vha ḓo nyamalala unga madzina o ṅwalwaho buseni, nge vha ṱutshela Yahavee, Ene tshisima tsha maḓi a ṋeaho vhutshilo." 
Jeremiah17:14 Muṋe washu, nnyalafhe, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo fhola, nndamulele, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo tshila, hufha ane nṋe nda mu renda e Iwe!" 
Jeremiah17:15 Vha endela u mmbudza vha tshi ri, “Zwe Yahavee a amba zwi ngafhi? Zwino nga zwi khunyelele-ha!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Nṋe a tho ngo shavha nda litsha u vha mulisa wa nngu dzau. U a ḓivha uri nṋe a tho ngo takalela ḓuvha ḽa khombo ḽi tshi ḓa. Zwoṱhe zwe nda amba u a zwi ḓivha, zwi khagala phanḓa hau." 
Jeremiah17:17 U songo nnyofhisa; musi wa khombo vhushavhelo hanga ndi Iwe. 
Jeremiah17:18 Ngavhe hu tshi shona vhane vha ntovhola, hu si nṋe; nga hu tshenuswe vhone, hu si nṋe. Ita uri vha welwe nga khombo, u vha rwe nga ṱhamu kavhili." 
Jeremiah17:19 Muṋe washu o mmbudza a ri, “Jeremia, iyo ima khoroni hune ha dzhena vhathu, hune mahosi a Juda a dzhena a tshi bva, u dovhe u ime khoroni dzoṱhe dza Jerusalema," 
Jeremiah17:20 u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Inwi mahosi a Juda na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Jerusalema vhane vha dzhena nga khoro hedzi, ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah17:21 Arali ni sa funi u fa ni vhone, ni songo hwala muhwalo nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha kana na dzhena nawo nga khoro dza Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah17:22 Ni songo bvisa muhwalo nḓuni dzaṋu kana na vhuya na shuma mushumo nga Sabatha, ni ḽi ite ḓuvha ḽikhethwa, sa zwe nda laya vhomakhulukuku waṋu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Nangwe zwo ralo a vho ngo thetshelesa, a vho ngo zwi londa, vho ita tshipimbi vha si thetshelese, vha si ite zwine vha laiwa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah17:24 Hone Muṋe washu u ri, “Arali ni tshi nthetshelesa zwavhuḓi, na si dzhene na muhwalo nga khoro dza muḓi hoyu nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha, na ḽi ita ḽikhethwa nga u sa vhuya na shuma ngaḽo," 
Jeremiah17:25 ndi hone mahosi ane a dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita a tshi ḓo dzhena nga khoro dza muḓi hoyu a na vhahulwane vhao. Vhone na vhahulwane vhavho vha ḓo ḓa vho namela dzigariki na dzibere, vha tshi khou fhelekedzwa nga vhanna vha Juda na vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema, ndi hone hoyu muḓi u tshi ḓo dzula vhathu tshoṱhe." 
Jeremiah17:26 Vhathu vha ḓo ḓa vha tshi bva miḓini ya Juda na miḓanani yo vhandekanaho na Jerusalema, vha ḓo ḓa vha tshi bva shangoni ḽa Benyamini na zwigodini na dzithavhani na Negeve. Vha ḓo ḓisa nduvho dzi fhiswaho na zwiṱhavhelo na nduvho dza thoro na zwioro na nduvho dza ndivhuho, vha zwi ḓisa nḓuni yanga." 
Jeremiah17:27 Huno arali na sa nthetshelesa, na landula u ita Sabatha ḓuvha ḽikhethwa, na vho hwala mihwalo ni tshi dzhena nga khoro dza Jerusalema nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha, zwenezwo Nṋe ndi ḓo funga mulilo u sa dzimi khoroni dza Jerusalema, wa fhisa pfamo dzawo he lore.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Muṋe washu o vhudza nṋe Jeremia a ri," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tsela nḓuni ya muvhumbi wa khali, ú henengei ndi ḓo u vhudza mafhungo anga.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ndi hone ndi tshi tsela nḓuni ya muvhumbi wa khali, nda wana a tshi khou vhumba." 
Jeremiah18:4 Hone khali ye a vha a tshi khou vhumba nga vumba ya wanala yo vhifha, ene a ḓi ḽi dzhia a vhumba iṅwe khali, a i vhumba uri a vhone yo mu nakela." 
Jeremiah18:5 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudza a ri," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Inwi vhathu vha Israele, Nṋe ndi nga si ni ite unga uyo muvhumbi naa? Na inwi ní zwanḓani zwanga ni nga vumba ḽi zwanḓani zwa muvhumbi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Tshiṅwe tshifhinga ndi a ḓivhadza uri lushaka kana muvhuso u ḓo tupulwa wa tekuwa wa lozwiwa," 
Jeremiah18:8 hone arali lushaka lwonolwo lwe nda lu kaidza lwa laṱa vhuvhi halwo, zwenezwo ndi ḓo lu khathutshela nda si tsha lu ḓisela khombo ye nda vha ndo i humbula." 
Jeremiah18:9 Tshiṅwe tshifhinga nda ḓivhadza uri muvhuso kana lushaka lu ḓo fhaṱiwa, lwa simiwa," 
Jeremiah18:10 hone arali nda vhona lu tshi tshinya, lu sa nthetshelesi, zwenezwo ndi nga si tsha lu itela zwivhuya zwe nda vha ndi tshi ri ndi ḓo lu itela." 
Jeremiah18:11 Zwino-ha vhudza vhathu vha Juda na vha dzulaho Jerusalema u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Vhonani! Ndi khou ni kela ṱhamu, ndi khou ni dzudzanyela ndozwo. Zwenezwo laṱani maitele aṋu mavhi, nga muthihi nga muthihi, kutshilele kwaṋu na zwiito zwaṋu zwi vhe zwivhuya.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Hone vhone vha ḓo fhindula vha ri, ‘Zwi farisa mini? Riṋe ri ḓo ḓi isa phanḓa zwe ra ḓidzudzanyela, roṱhe ri ḓo ita zwe ra funzedzwa nga mbilu dzashu mmbi dza tshipimbi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhudzisani dzitshakha arali vho no vhuya vha pfa zwi no nga sa hezwi. Israele o vha a tshi nga musidzana a sa ḓivhi munna, hone zwino o ita zwi nengisaho." 
Jeremiah18:14 Miṱumba ya Libanoni ya matombo yo no vhuya ya dzula i si na gabugu naa? Maḓi ayo a rotholelaho a no bva zwisimani zwa kule o no vhuya a xa naa? 
Jeremiah18:15 Naho zwo ralo vhathu vhanga vho nkhangwa, vha vho dubisela midzimu i sa tshidzi zwioro, yeneyo midzimu ye ya vha khukhula nḓilani dzavho dze vha tshimbila ngadzo kale. Yo ita uri vha tshimbile nḓilani dza nga matungo na magondoni a songo khurwaho." 
Jeremiah18:16 Shango ḽavho ḽi ḓo sala ḽi soga, ḽa vha tshinyadziwa tsha lini na lini; vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha nḓila zwi ḓo vha tshenusa vha dzinginyisa dziṱhoho." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndi ḓo vha balanganya phanḓa ha maswina avho vha nga buse ḽi tshi vhudzulwa nga muya wa vhubvaḓuvha; ndi ḓo vha furalela vha si vhone tshifhaṱuwo tshanga musi vho welwa nga khombo.” 
Jeremiah18:18 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ri, “Nga ri langane Jeremia! Hu ḓo ḓi dzula hu na vhotshifhe vhane vha ri laya, vhaṱali vha ḓo ḓi ri eletshedza, vhaporofita vha ḓo ri vhudza ipfi ḽa Midzimu. Nga ri mu fashe nga maipfi awe, nahone zwine a amba ri songo tsha zwi londa.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Muṋe washu, nthetshelese, ipfa zwine vhapomoki vhanga vha amba!" 
Jeremiah18:20 Zwivhuya zwo fanela u lifhedzwa nga zwivhi naa? Hone vho mmveela khunḓa uri ndi fashwe. Elelwa zwe nda ima phanḓa hau ndi tshi vha imelela uri mbiti dzau dzi si vha wele. 
Jeremiah18:21 Zwenezwo vhana vhavho nga vha fe nga nḓala, vha kudze u vha kumedze pfumo. Vhasadzi vhavho nga vha sale vha si na vhana, vhe dzitshilikadzi, vhanna vhavho nga vha vhulawe, vhaṱhanngana vhavho vha ḽiwe nga pfumo nndwani." 
Jeremiah18:22 Nḓuni dzavho nga hu pfala tshililo, musi u tshi ruma vhaṱanguli, vha sokou tshenuwa vho tshoṱhelwa, nge vha mmveela khunḓa uri vha mpfashe, vha ita na u nthetshela zwikwekwe." 
Jeremiah18:23 Huno Iwe Muṋe washu u a ḓivha zwoṱhe zwe vha nndangana uri vha mmbulahe. U songo vha hangwela milandu yavho, u songo thutha vhutshinyi havho wa si tsha vhu vhona. Nga vha tekulwe u tshi zwi vhona, tshine wa vha ita vha ite wo sinyuwa." 
Jeremiah19:1 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Iyo renga mvuvhelo yo vhumbwaho nga vumba, u i renge kha muvhumbi wa dzikhali. Ṱuwa na vhaṅwe vha vhahulwane vha vhathu na vha vhotshifhe," 
Jeremiah19:2 u livhe Govhani ḽa Murwa wa Hinomu, tsini na Khoro ya Makwati. Henefho u ḓivhadze maipfi ane nda ḓo u vhudza," 
Jeremiah19:3 u ri, ‘Inwi mahosi a Juda na vhathu vha Jerusalema, ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee. Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Thetshelesani! Ndi ḓo ḓisa khombo hafhano fhethu, i ḓo bvumisa nḓevhe dza muṅwe na muṅwe ane a pfa ngayo." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ndi uri vho nṱamba vha dzhia fhethu hafhano vha hu ita ha midzimu isili; henefha vho fhisa nduvho vha tshi itela midzimu ye vhone na vhokhotsi avho na mahosi a Juda vha vha vha sa i ḓivhi, fhethu hafhano vha hu ḓadza malofha a vha si na mulandu." 
Jeremiah19:5 Vho fhaṱela Baali dziaḽiṱari, vha fhisa vhana vhavho vha vhatuka nga mulilo vha tshi vha ṋekedza Baali – hezwo a tho ngo vhuya nda ri zwi itwe, a tho ngo vhuya nda zwi amba, na u tou zwi elekanya a thi athu vhuya nda zwi elekanya." 
Jeremiah19:6 Huno-ha ni vhone, hu khou ḓa maḓuvha ane vhathu vha si tsha ḓo ri hafhano hu pfi Thofethe kana Govha ḽa Murwa wa Hinomu, vha ḓo ri hu pfi Govha ḽa Bulayo." 
Jeremiah19:7 Hafhano fhethu ndi ḓo piringanya maano oṱhe a Juda na Jerusalema. Ndi ḓo ita uri vha ḽiwe nga pfumo ḽa maswina avho, ndi ḓo vha kumedza zwanḓani zwa vhane vha ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha, zwitumbu zwavho ndi ḓo zwi ṋea maanga na phukha." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ndi ḓo phusukanya hoyu muḓi, wa tou vha ṱano wa nyadzea; vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha nḓila vha ḓo tshenuwa vha akhamala vha tshi vhona mbonzhe dzawo." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndi ḓo vha ḽisa ṋama ya vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, vha dovha vha ḽana nga tshavho musi zwo vhifha vhó govhelwa nga maswina avho vha tshi ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Zwenezwo u pwashe mvuvhelo heyo vhoṱhe vha no khou tshimbila na iwe vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Jeremiah19:11 u vha vhudze uri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Ndi ḓo pwasha lushaka holu na muḓi hoyu unga mvuvhelo heyo ya muvhumbi wa khali i tshi pwashiwa, ya si tsha kona u mometshedzwa. Vha ḓo swiṱa vhafu ngei Thofethe nga u shaya zwalo." 
Jeremiah19:12 Zwine nda ḓo ita hafhano fhethu, nda zwi ita na vha no dzula hone ndi hezwi: Hoyu muḓi ndi ḓo u kumadza unga Thofethe." 
Jeremiah19:13 Nnḓu dza Jerusalema na dza mahosi a Juda dzi ḓo ḓala dzitshika unga hafhano fhethu, Thofethe – nnḓu dzoṱhe dze vha vha vha tshi dubisela ṋaledzi zwioro kha ṱhanga dzadzo, vha ita na u tevhulela miṅwe midzimu thevhula ya mahalwa vha tshi i luvha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vhuya a tshi bva Thofethe he Muṋe washu a vha o mu ruma uri a yo ḓivhadza mafhungo a Muṋe washu, a ima muṱani wa thembele ya Muṋe washu a vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a ri," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Khombo dzoṱhe dze nda bula uri dzi ḓo wela vhathu havha, ndi khou dzi ḓisa muḓini houno na miḓini yo vhandekanaho nawo, nge vha ita tshipimbi vha si thetshelese maipfi anga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Musi tshifhe Phashuru ṅwana wa Imere, muingameli muhulwane thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, a tshi pfa Jeremia a tshi porofita zwithu izwo," 
Jeremiah20:2 a ita uri muporofita Jeremia a rwiwe, a patwe nga matanda Khoroni ya Nṱha ya Benyamini thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ḽi tshi tsha Phashuru a mu patulula, Jeremia a mu vhudza a ri, “Dzina ḽine Muṋe washu a u rina a si Phashuru, u vho pfi ‘Nyofho-thungo-dzoṱhe’." 
Jeremiah20:4 Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo u rwa lu ofhisaho, lune wa ḓo ofha khathihi na khonani dzau dzoṱhe; u ḓo tou vha vhona nga au maṱo musi maswina avho a tshi vha fhedza nga pfumo. Juda ḽoṱhe ndi ḓo ḽi kumedza khosi ya Babele, a vha hwala a vha isa Babele kana a vha vhulaha nga pfumo." 
Jeremiah20:5 Lupfumo lwoṱhe lwa muḓi hoyu ndi ḓo lu ṋea maswina avho – zwibveledzwa zwawo zwoṱhe, zwoṱhe zwa mutengo muhulu na lupfumo lwoṱhe lwa mahosi a Juda. Vha ḓo zwi thuba vha ṱuwa nazwo vha zwi isa Babele." 
Jeremiah20:6 Huno iwe Phashuru na vhoṱhe vha no dzula nḓuni yau ni ḓo ya vhuthubwani Babele. U ḓo fela henengei wa swiṱwa hone, iwe na khonani dzau dzoṱhe dze wa dzi porofitela mazwifhi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Iwe Muṋe washu wo mphura nda mbo ḓi fhurea; wo nkunda, nungo dzau dzi fhira dzanga. Zwino ndi vho ṱwa ndi tshi nzhonzhowedzwa, vhoṱhe vha a nkolela." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ndi tshi amba, ndi huwelela nda ri, “Vha a huvhadzana, vha a lozwana!” Zwenezwo ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi ṱwa ḽi tshi nnyadzisa ḽi tshi ntsemisa ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Jeremiah20:9 Hone arali nda ri, “Muṋe washu a thi tsha ḓo mu humbula, a thi tsha ḓo amba nga dzina ḽawe,” ipfi ḽawe ḽone mbiluni yanga ḽi nga mulilo u dugaho wo shatelwaho maramboni anga. Ndo neta nga u ḽi dzumba ngomu hanga, zwa kunda." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ndi pfa mahevhehevhe a vhanzhi ndi tshi vho pfi, “Vho-Nyofho-thungo-dzoṱhe” vha ri, “Nga a hwelelwe!” Ha pfi, “Ndi zwone, nga ri mu hwelele!” Na dzone khonani dzanga dzo lindela ndi tshi redzemuwa, vha ri, “Khamusi u ḓo kanda tshikwekwe; ndi hone ri tshi ḓo mu kona ra mu lifhedza.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Hone Muṋe washu u ima na nṋe unga muhali a ofhisaho; zwenezwo vhatovholi vhanga vha ḓo khukhulwa, a vha nga koni tshithu. Vha ḓo kundwa vha shona tshoṱhe; u nyadziwa havho a hu nga vhuyi ha hangwiwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Iwe Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, Iwe ane wa ṱola vha fulufhedzeaho, wa sedza mbilu na mihumbulo yo dzumbamaho, kha ndi vhone u tshi vha lifhedza; nndwa yanga ndo i kumedza Iwe." 
Jeremiah20:13 Haleluya! Imbelani Muṋe washu! U lamukisa muheḓana zwanḓani zwa maswina awe. 
Jeremiah20:14 Nga hu teketelwe ḓuvha ḽe nda bebwa ngaḽo! Ḓuvha ḽe mme anga vha mmbeba ngaḽo ḽi songo pfi ḽa mashudu! 
Jeremiah20:15 Nga hu teketelwe munna we a ḓivhadza khotsi anga ayo mafhungo, a vha takadza a tshi ri, “Vho bebelwa ṅwana wa mutukana!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Onoyo munna ngavhe a tshi nga miḓi ya Sodoma na Gomora ye Muṋe washu a i phusukanya a sa i khathutsheli. Ngavhe a tshi pfa tshililo nga matsheloni, na mukosi wa nndwa masiari tshivhangalala." 
Jeremiah20:17 Ndi mini a songo mmbulahele thumbuni, mme anga vha vha tshalo tshanga, vha dzula vho vhifha muvhilini." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ndi mini ndo vhuya nda bva thumbuni nda vhona khombo na maṱungu, nda ṱwa ndo shona nda vhuya nda fa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Khosi Tsedekia o vhuya a ruma Phashuru ṅwana wa Malikhiya na tshifhe Tsefania ṅwana wa Maaseya ha Jeremia, vha ri," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Kha vha dzou ri vhudzisela ha Muṋe washu; Nebukhadnetsara Khosi ya Babele u khou ri dia. Khamusi Muṋe washu u ḓo ri itela maḓembe unga zwiḽa kale, Nebukhadnetsara a ri humela.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Vhudzani Tsedekia ni ri," 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Zwihali zwa nndwa zwe na fara, zwine na khou lwa ngazwo na khosi ya Babele na Vhakhaladia vhane vha ḓo ni govhela nnḓa ha mutsheṱo, ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi zwi rembulusa zwa ḽa inwi. Ndi ḓo kuvhanganya maswina ngomu ha muḓi houno," 
Jeremiah21:5 Nṋe muṋe nda angaladza tshanḓa nda lwa na inwi nga maanḓa anga, ndó sinyuwa, ndó dinalea, ndí mbitini khulu." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ndi ḓo vhulaha vha no dzula muḓini uno, vhathu na phukha; vha ḓo fa nga dwadze ḽi ofhisaho." 
Jeremiah21:7 Hu ḓo ri ho no fhira izwo, nda dzhia Tsedekia khosi ya Juda na vhahulwane vhawe na vhathu vha muḓi houno vhe vha sala u fa hu tshi ḓa dwadze na pfumo na nḓala, nda vha kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele na maswina avho ane a ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha. U ḓo vha vhulaha nga pfumo; ha nga vha khathutsheli, ha nga iti nga tshilidzi, ha nga vha pfeli vhuṱungu. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee!’" 
Jeremiah21:8 “Dovha u vhudze vhathu u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Vhonani, ndi khou ni vhetshela nḓila i isaho vhutshiloni na i yaho lufuni." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ane a sala o dzula muḓini houno u ḓo fa nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze. Hone ane a bvela nnḓa a yo ḓikumedza Vhakhaladia vho ni govhelaho, onoyo u ḓo tshila; tshine a ḓo shavha natsho ndi vhutshilo hawe." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ndo vhofha ḽa u huvhadza muḓi hoyu, a thi nga u tondi. U ḓo kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Babele, a u fhisa nga mulilo. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Hafhu u vhudze nnḓu ya vhuhosi ya Juda u ri, ‘Ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee:" 
Jeremiah21:12 Inwi vha nnḓu ya Dafita, Yahavee u ri: Misi yoṱhe ḽi tshi tsha nga hu haṱulwe nga khaṱhulo mbuya, we a ṱangulwa nga a lamulelwe zwanḓani zwa mutambudzi wawe; na sa ralo mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo pwashea dza fhisa unga mulilo nga vhuvhi he na ita, dza fhisa ha si vhe na a dzi dzimaho." 
Jeremiah21:13 Iwe Jerusalema u no dzula nṱha ha muvhundu wa makwara wo ingamela govha, wa ri: Ndi nnyi ane a nga kona u lwa na Nṋe? Ndi nnyi ane a nga kona u dzhena vhushavheloni hashu? Nṋe muṋe ndi lwa na iwe. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah21:14 Ndi ḓo u lifhedza ndi tshi tevhedza zwiito zwau. Ndi ḓo vhasa mulilo maṱakani au wa fhisa zwoṱhe zwo u tangaho zwe lore.’ ” 
Jeremiah22:1 Muṋe washu o ri ndi tsele pfamoni ya khosi ya Juda ndi ḓivhadze mafhungo haya henengei, ndi ri," 
Jeremiah22:2 “Iwe khosi ya Juda yo dzulaho kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita, ipfa ipfi ḽa Yahavee, iwe na vhahulwane vhau na vhathu vhau vhane vha dzhena nga khoro hedzi." 
Jeremiah22:3 Yahavee u ri, ‘Haṱulani nga khaṱhulo mbuya ni ite zwi re zwone. We a ṱangulwa mu lamuleleni zwanḓani zwa mukandeledzi wawe. Ni songo khakhela mutsinda na tsiwana na tshilikadzi kana na vha huvhadza, nahone ni songo shulula malofha a a si na mulandu fhethu hafhano." 
Jeremiah22:4 Huno arali na khunyeledza ndaela idzo nga vhuronwane, ndi hone mahosi a no dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita a tshi ḓo dzhena nga khoro dza pfamo heino vhó namela dzigariki na dzibere vha tshi khou fhelekedzwa nga vhahulwane vhavho na vhathu vhavho." 
Jeremiah22:5 Hone na sa thetshelesa ndaela hedzo, ndi ana nga Nṋe muṋe ndi ri, pfamo heino i ḓo sala i dumba. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee!’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Muṋe washu a tshi amba nga pfamo ya khosi ya Juda u ri, “Nangwe ndi tshi vhona u tshi nga Giliadi, u tshi nga muṱumba wa Libanoni, ngoho ndi ḓo u phusukanya wa nga phanga, wa nga miḓi i sa dzuli muthu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndi ḓo ruma vhalozwi vha lwa na iwe, munna muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo vha o fara zwihali zwawe. Vha ḓo rema phuphu dzau dzavhuḓi dza mikedara vha dzi posa muliloni." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Vhathu vha tshakha nnzhi vha ḓo fhira nga henefha muḓini, vha vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Yahavee ndi mini o ita zwo raliho kha muḓi uyu muhulu?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Phindulo i ḓo ri, ‘Ndi nge vha pfuka mulanga wa Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, vha luvha miṅwe midzimu vha i shumela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 “Ni songo lilela khosi yo faho, ni songo mu lila; inwi itani u lila ni ḓiphiṋe ni tshi lilela o thubwaho, ngauri ha tsha ḓo vhuya, ha tsha ḓo dovha a vhona shango ḽa hawe.”" 
Jeremiah22:11 Muṋe washu a tshi amba Shalumu ṅwana wa Josiasi, we a tevhela khotsi awe a vha khosi ya Juda, a sala a tshi ṱuwiswa afho fhethu, u ri, “A nga si tsha vhuya." 
Jeremiah22:12 U ḓo fela he vha mu thubela hone; ha tsha ḓo dovha a vhona shango heḽi.” 
Jeremiah22:13 “U ḓo zwi vhona onoyo ane a fhaṱa pfamo yawe nga zwi si zwivhuya, kamara dzawe dza nṱha a dzi fhaṱa nga khaṱhulo mmbi, a tshi sokou shumisa vhathu vha shango ḽa hawe vha sa holi, mushumo wavho a sa u lifhi nga tshithu." 
Jeremiah22:14 U ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ḓifhaṱela pfamo khulu i re na kamara khulu dza nga nṱha.’ Zwenezwo a longa mafasiṱere mahulu khayo a ṱama nga matanda a mukedara a i fhoma nga phomo tswuku. U andisa thanda dza mikedara ndi zwone zwi no u ita khosi naa?" 
Jeremiah22:15 U andisa thanda dza mikedara ndi zwone zwi no u ita khosi naa? Khotsi au vho vha vha sa ḽi, vha sa nwi naa? Vho vha vha tshi haṱula nga khaṱhulo mbuya vha tshi ita zwi re zwone, ndi zwe zwoṱhe zwa vha nakela."
