Jeremiah22:16 Vho lamulela vhashai na vhaheḓana, ndi zwe zwoṱhe zwa naka. Hu tshi pfi u nnḓivha a hu ambiwi zwenezwo naa?” U ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah22:17 “Hone iwe maṱo au na mbilu yau zwi kha u bindula nga u ḽa vhathu na u shulula malofha a vha si na mulandu na u tambudza vhaṅwe na u fara lushaka nga tshiṱuhu.” 
Jeremiah22:18 Huno-ha Muṋe washu a tshi amba Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, u ri, “A vha nga mu lili vha ri, ‘Yawee, mukomana wanga! Khosi yashu-wee! Yawee, vhugala hawe!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 U ḓo swoṱwa unga donngi; u ḓo khwikhwidzelwa kule, a poswa nnḓa ha khoro dza Jerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Jerusalema, gonya Libanoni u ṱavhe mukosi, ipfi ḽau nga ḽi pfale Bashani, lila u thavhani dza Abarimu; vhafunwa vhau vhoṱhe vho kuiwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ndo u kaidza zwiḽa hu sa athu vha na khombo, fhedzi iwe wa ri, “A thi nga thetshelesi!” Wo ḓi ralo na hanani hau, a wo ngo vhuya wa nthetshelesa." 
Jeremiah22:22 Muya u ḓo vhudzulela vhalisa vhau vhoṱhe kule, vhafunwa vhau vha ḓo iswa vhuthubwani. Zwenezwo u ḓo tou niwa nga ṱhoni wa nyadzea nga mulandu wa vhuvhi hau." 
Jeremiah22:23 Inwi ni dzulaho Libanoni, ni lalaho vhukimvini nḓuni dzo fhaṱwaho nga mikedara, ni ḓo gomela no gomela musi ni tshi welwa nga vhuṱungu kathihi fhedzi, vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Muṋe washu u ri, “Iwe Jehoyakhini ṅwana wa Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda, ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga, nangwe wo vha u tshi nga vha rinngi ya luswayo i re tshanḓani tshanga tshauḽa, ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo ḓi u bvula." 
Jeremiah22:25 Ndi ḓo u kumedza vhane vha ṱoḓa u u vhulaha, vhone vhane wa vha tetemela; ndi ḓo u kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, nda u kumedza Vhakhaladia." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe na mme au ndi ḓo ni posa kha ḽiṅwe shango, he na muthihi waṋu a si bebwe hone, noṱhe vhuvhili haṋu ni ḓo fela henengei." 
Jeremiah22:27 A ni tsha ḓo vhuelela shangoni ḽine na ṱuvha u humela khaḽo.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Nṋa uyu munna Jehoyakhini ndi khali yo pwasheaho yo laṱwaho? Ndi mudzio une na muthihi a si u fune naa? Ndi mini ene na vhana vhawe vha tshi ḓo poswa nnḓa, vha poswa shangoni ḽine vha si ḽi ḓivhe?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Hee shango, shango-wee, ipfa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Muṋe washu u ri, “Munna hoyu nga a ṅwaliwe e muthu a si na vhana, e munna ane vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe zwa si ḓo vhuya zwa mu nakela, ngauri a hu na na muthihi wa vhana vhawe ane zwa ḓo mu nakela, a dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita, kana a dovha a vhusa ḽa Juda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhalisa vhane vha khou lozwa sambi ḽa nngu dzanga vha dzi balanganya, vha ḓo zwi vhona!”" 
Jeremiah23:2 Zwino-ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi amba na vhalisa vha vhathu vhawe u ri, “Ndi ḓo ni lifhedzela vhuvhi haṋu; no balanganya sambi ḽa nngu dzanga na dzi khadela kule na si dzi londole." 
Jeremiah23:3 Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo kuvhanganya nngu dza sambi ḽanga dzo salaho nda dzi bvisa mashangoni oṱhe he nda dzi thathela hone, nda dzi humisela pfuloni yadzo, dza dzwala dza anda henefho." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndi ḓo dzi ṱoḓela vhalisa vhane vha ḓo dzi londola, a dzi tsha ḓo ofha, a dzi tsha ḓo ofhiswa, a hu tsha ḓo vha na i xelaho.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Muṋe washu u ri, “Maḓuvha a khou ḓa ane nda ḓo ita uri hu simuwe ḓadzwane ḽa Dafita ḽi tshidzaho, i ḓo vha khosi ine ya ḓo vhusa nga vhuṱali, a haṱula nga khaṱhulo mbuya, a ita zwi re zwone shangoni." 
Jeremiah23:6 Misi yawe Juda ḽi ḓo tshidzwa, Israele ḽa lala. U ḓo pfi, ‘U tshidzwa ndi Muṋe washu’.”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa misi ine vhathu vha si tsha ḓo ri, ‘Ri ana nga Yahavee a tshilaho we a pfulusa Vhaisraele Egipita,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 vha vho ḓo ri, ‘Ri ana nga Yahavee a tshilaho, we a pfulusa Vhaisraele shangoni ḽa devhula na mashangoni oṱhe he a vha o vha thathela hone.’ Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo dzula shangoni ḽavho.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Ndi tshi amba nga vhaporofita ndi ri: Mbilu yanga yo pwashea ngomu hanga; miraḓo yanga yoṱhe yo kulekana. Ndi nga muthu o kambwa, ndi nga munna o wiswa nga waini, zwo shuṅwa nga Muṋe washu na maipfi awe makhethwa." 
Jeremiah23:10 Shango ḽo ḓala dziphombwe; shango ḽo oma, ḽi nga ḽi khou lilela mufu nge ḽa teketelwa, pfulo ya sogani yo puta. Vhaporofita vho fara nḓila mmbi, maanḓa avho vha a shumisela dubo." 
Jeremiah23:11 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu vhaporofita, hu vhotshifhe, vhoṱhe vho ṱamba Mudzimu; vhuvhi havho ndi vhu vhona na thembeleni yanga." 
Jeremiah23:12 Zwenezwo nḓila ine vha tshimbila ngayo i ḓo redzemusa; vha ḓo thathelwa swiswini, henefho vha ḓo wa. Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo, nga ṅwaha une vha ḓo lifhedzwa ngawo. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah23:13 “Zwe nda vhona kha vhaporofita vha Samaria zwi a nengisa: vho porofita nga Baali, vha xedza vhathu vhanga Israele." 
Jeremiah23:14 Hone zwe nda vhona kha vhaporofita vha Jerusalema zwi tou nengisa u fhirisisa. Vha ita vhupombwe vha tevhela mazwifhi, vha ṱuṱuwedza vhaitazwivhi uri vha si furalele vhuvhi havho. Vhoṱhe ndi vhona vha tshi nga Sodoma; vhathu vha Jerusalema vha nga Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe a tshi amba nga vhaporofita u ri, “Ndi ḓo ita uri vha ḽe zwiḽiwa zwa u kalakata, vha nwe maḓi a re na vhutulu, ngauri vhaporofita vha Jerusalema ndi vhone vho fhuraho vhathu vhoṱhe uri vha ṱambe Mudzimu.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ni songo thetshelesa zwine vhaporofita vha ni porofitela; vha ni fulufhelisa zwi si zwone. Vha amba mabono a no bva mihumbuloni yavho a songo ambiwa nga Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah23:17 Vha ṱolou vhudza vhane vha nnyadza vha ri: ‘Muṋe washu u ri: Ni ḓo vha na mulalo.’ Vhane vha tshila vha tshi tevhedza zwine vha funzedzwa nga mbilu dzavho dza tshipimbi, vha vha vhudza vha ri, ‘A ni nga welwi nga khombo!’" 
Jeremiah23:18 Hone ndi nnyi wavho we a ima khoroni yanga uri a vhone kana a pfe ipfi ḽanga? Ndi nnyi we a thetshelesa a pfa ipfi ḽanga? 
Jeremiah23:19 Vhonani, mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo pwashea dza vha ḓumbu, dza vha tshiḓumbumukwe tsha swiela ṱhoho dza vhavhi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Mbiti dzanga a dzi nga humi dzi sa athu khunyeledza zwi re mbiluni yanga. Misi i ḓaho ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ṱalukanya zwavhuḓi. 
Jeremiah23:21 “Havha vhaporofita a vho ngo ruṅwa nga Nṋe, vho sokou bva nga vhoṱhe; Nṋe a tho ngo amba navho, vho sokou ḓiporofitela." 
Jeremiah23:22 Hone arali vho vha vho dzhena khoroni yanga, vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vho ḓivhadza vhathu vhanga maipfi anga vha vha humisa nḓilani dzavho mmbi, vha vha laṱisa zwiito zwivhi.”" 
Jeremiah23:23 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ni vhona unga Nṋe ndi Mudzimu a re tsini ane na nga mu langa naa? A thi Mudzimu a re kule na inwi naa?" 
Jeremiah23:24 U hone ane a nga dzumbama ho khudaho hune nda nga si mu vhone? Kani-ha a thi ḓadzi ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi? 
Jeremiah23:25 Ndo zwi pfa zwe vhaporofita vha amba vha tshi porofita mazwifhi nga dzina ḽanga, vha tshi ri, ‘Ndo lora! Ndo lora!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Nṋa izwi zwi ḓo guma lini mbiluni dza vhaporofita havha vha u zwifha vha no porofita zwa vhufhura vha tshi sokou ḓihumbulela? 
Jeremiah23:27 Vha tshi hanelelana miloro yavho vha itela uri vhathu vhanga vha hangwe dzina ḽanga, u ḓi nga na vhokhotsi avho vhó hangwa dzina ḽanga nga u luvha Baali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Litshani muporofita a re na muloro a vhudze vhathu muloro wawe, hone a re na ipfi ḽanga mu litsheni a ḽi vhudze vhathu a tshi amba ngoho. Mungu u a vhuya wa vhewa huthihi na thoro naa? Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ipfi ḽanga a ḽi ngi mulilo? A ḽi ngi hamula ine ya pwashekanya tombo naa? 
Jeremiah23:30 Huno-ha Nṋe ndi lwa na vhaporofita vhane vha tswelana maipfi ane ha pfi a bva kha Nṋe. 
Jeremiah23:31 Ee, ndi lwa na vhaporofita vhane vha amba zwe vha sokou humbula vha ri, ‘Hu amba Yahavee!’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Vhukumakuma ndi lwa na vhane vha porofita miloro i si yone. Vha i vhudza vhathu vha xedza vhathu nga mazwifhi avho na nga mazuwo avho, ngeno Nṋe ndi songo vha ruma kana nda vha vhea. A vha vhuyi vha farisa vhathu havha nga tshithu. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 Muṋe washu o mmbudza a ri, “Jeremia, arali vhathu havha kana muporofita kana tshifhe a u vhudzisa a ri, ‘Ndi mini tshine Muṋe washu a ri hwesa zwino nga ndaedzo yawe?’ vha fhindule u ri, ‘Muhwalo wa Muṋe washu ndi inwi; u ḓo ṱuwa a tshi ni kudza kule!’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Arali muporofita kana tshifhe kana muṅwe-vho a ri, ‘Yahavee u khou ni hwesa muhwalo hoyo,’ ndi ḓo laṱisa onoyo muthu na muṱa wawe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Tshine nda tenda ni tshi vhudzisa khonani dzaṋu kana mashaka ni tou ri, ‘Phindulo ya Yahavee i ri mini?’ kana na ri, ‘Yahavee o ri mini?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Hone ni songo tsha vhudzisa na ri, ‘Yahavee u khou ri hwesa mini?’ Ane a ralo, ndaedzo yanga i ḓo tou vha muhwalo wawe vhukuma, ngauri u khou shanda maipfi a Mudzimu a tshilalo, Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu waṋu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Ni ṱolou vhudzisa muporofita ni tshi ri, ‘Yahavee o u fhindula a ri mini?’ Kana, ‘Yahavee o amba mini?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Hone ane a dovha a vhudzisa uri, ‘Ri ḓo hweswa mini nga Yahavee?’ ndo vha laedza uri vha songo dovha vha ralo." 
Jeremiah23:39 Zwenezwo, vhukumakuma ndi ḓo ni thubela kule nda ni doba nda ni posa kule hanga khathihi na miḓi ye nda ṋea inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ndi ḓo ni nyadzisa lini na lini, ni ḓo shona lini na lini zwa si vhuye zwa hangwiwa.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Musi Jehoyakhini ṅwana wa Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda, na vhahulwane na vhatsila na vhafhaṱi vha Juda vho no hwalwa vha tshi bva Jerusalema vha iswa vhuthubwani Babele nga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, Muṋe washu a ntsumbedza zwirundu zwivhili zwo vhewa muṋangoni wa thembele ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah24:2 Tshiṅwe tshirundu tsho vha tshi na mahuyu avhuḓi, ane a nga aḽa a no ranga u vhibva; tshiṅwe tshirundu tsho vha tshi na mahuyu a si avhuḓi, o tshinyala lune a sa tsha ḽea." 
Jeremiah24:3 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudzisa a ri, “Jeremia, u khou vhona mini?” Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Ndi khou vhona mahuyu. Avhuḓi o naka nga maanḓa, hone a si avhuḓi o tshinyala lune a nga si ḽee.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa kha nṋe ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Ndi tshi sedza mathubwa a no bva Juda, vhe nda vha pfulusa fhano fhethu nda vha isa shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia, ndi vhona vhe vhavhuḓi vha tshi nga mahuyu avhuḓi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndi ḓo vha londola uri zwi ḓi vha nakela, nda dovha nda vha humisela shangoni heḽino. Ndi ḓo vha fhaṱa vha ima, nda si vha wise; ndi ḓo vha sima, nda si vha tupule." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndi ḓo vha ṋea mbilu ine ya ḓo nnḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. Vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho, ngauri vha ḓo vhuya kha Nṋe nga mbilu yavho yoṱhe." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Tsedekia ene na vhahulwane vhawe na vho salaho Jerusalema vho ponyokaho lufu, vha nga kha ḓi vha vho sala fhano shangoni ḽino kana vha tshi dzula Egipita, ndi ḓo vha ita unga mahuyu a si avhuḓi, o tshinyalaho lune a sa tsha ḽea." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo lune tshakha dzoṱhe dza mashango dza ḓo ofha. Hoṱhe hune nda ḓo vha balanganya vha ḓo kolelwa nga vhathu, vha ita miswaswo ngavho, vha vha nyadza; vha tshi teketela muthu vha ḓo ri ngavhe a tshi welwa nga khombo yeneyo ye ya wela vhathu vha Juda." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela pfumo na nḓala na dwadze, vha si tsha vha hone shangoni ḽe nda ṋea vhone na vhokhotsi avho.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda – ndi ṅwaha wa u thoma wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele – ha ḓa ipfi kha Jeremia ḽi tshi amba nga vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda. 
Jeremiah25:2 Ndi hone Jeremia muporofita a tshi vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Jerusalema a ri: 
Jeremiah25:3 Zwo no ita miṅwaha ya 23, u bva ṅwaha wa 13 wa muvhuso wa Josiasi ṅwana wa Amoni khosi ya Juda u swika ṋamusi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽó ḓa ha nṋe, nda ni vhudza ndo tou khwaṱhisa, hone inwi na si thetshelese." 
Jeremiah25:4 Naho hu uri Muṋe washu o ruma vhaḓinḓa vhawe vhaporofita ha inwi a ḓi dovha, a no ngo thetshelesa, a no ngo zwi londa." 
Jeremiah25:5 Vho ri, “Rembuluwani zwino, nga muthihi nga muthihi, ni laṱe nḓila dzaṋu mmbi na zwiito zwaṋu zwivhi, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo kona u dzula tshoṱhe shangoni ḽe Muṋe washu a ṋea inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu uri ḽi vhe ḽaṋu lini na lini." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ni songo tevhela miṅwe midzimu na i shumela na i luvha; ni songo ntsinyusa nga zwe na tou vhumba nga zwanḓa zwaṋu. Ndi hone ndi sa nga ni ḓiseli khombo. 
Jeremiah25:7 Hone inwi a no ngo nthetshelesa, no ntsinyusa nga zwe na tou vhumba nga zwanḓa zwaṋu, ha vha u ḓihuvhadzisa.”" 
Jeremiah25:8 Huno-ha Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Nge na si thetshelese maipfi anga," 
Jeremiah25:9 ndi ḓo vhidza tshakha dzoṱhe dza Devhula na mukoma wanga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, vha ḓa vha lwa na vhathu vha dzulaho shangoni heḽi, vha lwa na tshakha dzoṱhe dzo vha tangaho. Ndi ḓo vha lozwa tshoṱhe nda vha ita ṱano ḽa zwi ofhisaho na u nyadzea, ha sala hu matumba lini na lini. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ndi ḓo pfuvhisa u pembela na dakalo na maipfi a muselwa na mukwasha na mubvumo wa guyo na tshedza tsha luvhone. 
Jeremiah25:11 Shango iḽi ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo vha matumba, ḽa sala ḽi soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu, tshakha idzi dzi ḓo shumela khosi ya Babele miṅwaha ya 70." 
Jeremiah25:12 Huno musi iyo miṅwaha ya 70 yo no khunyelela, ndi ḓo rwa khosi ya Babele na lushaka lwawe na shango ḽa Vhakhaladia ndi tshi vha rwela vhutshinyi havho, shango ḽavho ḽa sala ḽi soga lini na lini." 
Jeremiah25:13 Shango ḽeneḽo ndi ḓo ita uri ḽi welwe nga zwoṱhe zwe nda ri zwi ḓo ḽi wela, zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho buguni hei, zwó porofitwa nga Jeremia a ri zwi ḓo wela tshakha idzo dzoṱhe," 
Jeremiah25:14 dzone dziṋe dza itwa dziphuli nga dziṅwe tshakha nnzhi na mahosi mahulwane; ndi ḓo vha lifhedza ndi tshi tevhedza zwiito zwavho, zwoṱhe zwe vha ita vhaṅwe zwa vho itwa vhone.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele o mmbudza a ri, “Ṱanganedza tshinwelo hetshi tsho ḓadzwaho waini ya khaṱhulo dzanga, u nwise tshakha dzoṱhe dzine nda u ruma khadzo." 
Jeremiah25:16 Vha ḓo ri u nwa vha pepeleka, vha penga vha tshi pengiswa nga pfumo ḽine nda ḓo ḽi ḓisa khavho.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Ndi hone kha bono ndi tshi ṱanganedza itsho tshinwelo tshanḓani tsha Muṋe washu nda nwisa tshakha dzoṱhe dze a nthuma khadzo: 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerusalema na miḓi ya Juda na mahosi avho na vhahulwane, ha vha u vha ita matumba, vha vha ṱano ḽa zwi ofhisaho na u nyadzea na u teketelwa, sa zwine vha vha zwone ṋamusi." 
Jeremiah25:19 Ha ḓo tevhela Farao khosi ya Egipita na vhashumeli vhawe na vhahulwane vhawe na vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe," 
Jeremiah25:20 na vhatsinda vhoṱhe vha re henengei; ha tevhela mahosi oṱhe a Utsi, na mahosi oṱhe a Vhafilista (vha Ashkeloni, na Gaza, na Ekroni, na vhathu vho salaho Ashidodo);" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edomo, Muaba, Amoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 mahosi oṱhe a Tiro na Sidoni; mahosi a miḓi ye vha fhaṱa seli ha lwanzhe; 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedani, Thema, Busu na tshakha dzoṱhe dzi no vheula ndebvu ṱhahani;" 
Jeremiah25:24 mahosi oṱhe a Arabia na mahosi oṱhe a tshakha dzo ṱanganaho dzi no dzula phangani; 
Jeremiah25:25 mahosi oṱhe a Zimiri na Elamu na Media; 
Jeremiah25:26 mahosi oṱhe a Devhula, kule na tsini nga muthihi nga muthihi – mivhuso yoṱhe i re shangoni. Musi avho vho no fhelela, na khosi ya Sheshakha i ḓo nwa-vho." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Inwani, kambiwani ni ṱanze, ni we ni si tsha vuwa; ndi ḓo ni ḓisela pfumo.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Hone arali vha hana u ṱanganedza itsho tshinwelo vha nwa, vha vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: No fanela u nwa!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Vhonani, ndi tshi ḓisa khombo ndi thoma nga muḓi une wa vhidzwa nga dzina ḽanga, zwino ni vhona unga inwi ni ḓo litsha u rwiwa? A ni nga litshi u rwiwa, ndi khou vhidza pfumo uri ḽi runge vhoṱhe vhane vha dzula shangoni, u ralo Yahavee.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “ ‘Zwino porofita mafhungo haya oṱhe u vha vhudze u ri, “ ‘Yahavee u ḓo vhomba e ṱaḓulu; u ḓo bvumisa ipfi ḽawe e ngindii, ngindii e fhethu hawe hukhethwa, a vhomba nga maanḓa a tshi tshenusa shango ḽawe. U ḓo ṱavha mukosi unga vhane vha fhonḓa nḓirivhe, vhoṱhe vha no dzula shangoni u ḓo lwa navho." 
Jeremiah25:31 Hu ḓo pfala mubvumo wa swika magumoni a ḽifhasi, Muṋe washu u ḓo sengisa dzitshakha; u ḓo haṱula vhathu vhoṱhe, vhavhi vha ḽiwa nga pfumo,’ ” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah25:32 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhonani! Hu ḓo ḓa khombo ya ṱanganya dzitshakha; hu khou vuwa ḓumbu ḽa maanḓa ḽi tshi bva magumoni a ḽifhasi.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Tshifhinga tshenetsho vho vhulawaho nga Muṋe washu vha ḓo ḓadza shango u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi. A vha nga lilwi, a vha nga kuvhanganywi, a vha nga swiṱwi, vha ḓo nga mupfudze mavuni." 
Jeremiah25:34 Lilani ni tou ṱavha mukosi, inwi vhalisa vha dzitshakha, vhumbuluwani mavuni, inwi vharangaphanḓa vha maanḓa vha sambi ḽa nngu. Tshifhinga tshaṋu tsha u shidzwa tsho swika; ni ḓo wa na pwashekana na nga zwikengevheḓa zwa mvuvhelo yavhuḓi." 
Jeremiah25:35 Vhalisa a vha nga vhi na vhushavhelo, vhaendedzi vha maanḓa vha sambi ḽa nngu a vha nga vhi na hune vha ḓo shavhela hone." 
Jeremiah25:36 Ipfani mukosi wa vhalisa, ndi u honḓa ha vhaendedzi vha sambi ḽa nngu; Muṋe washu u khou tshinyadza pfulo yavho." 
Jeremiah25:37 Pfulo yavhuḓi yo lovha nga mbiti dza Muṋe washu dzi ofhisaho. 
Jeremiah25:38 U ḓo takuwa vhulaloni hawe unga ndau, shango ḽavho ḽa sala ḽi si na muthu, zwó vhangwa nga pfumo ḽi ofhisaho na nga mbiti dza Muṋe washu dzi ofhisaho." 
Jeremiah26:1 Musi hu tshi kha ḓi bva u thoma u vhusa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, ho ḓa ipfi heḽi ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Yahavee u ri, ‘Ima muṱani wa nnḓu yanga u ambe na vhathu vhoṱhe vha miḓi ya Juda vhane vha ḓa vha tshi luvha nḓuni yanga. Vha vhudze zwoṱhe zwe nda ri u zwi ambe; u songo siedza na ipfi na ḽithihi." 
Jeremiah26:3 Khamusi vha ḓo thetshelesa, muṅwe na muṅwe a laṱa nḓila dzawe mmbi, Nṋe nda konou vha khathutshela nda si tsha vha ḓisela khombo dze nda vha ndi khou humbula u dzi ita nga mulandu wa vhuvhi vhune vha ita." 
Jeremiah26:4 Vha vhudze u ri: Yahavee u ri: Thetshelesani ndayo yanga ye nda ni vhetshela, ni i tevhedze," 
Jeremiah26:5 ni thetshelese maipfi a vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita vhane nda vha ruma ha inwi nda ḓi dovha, nangwe ni songo thetshelesa." 
Jeremiah26:6 Na sa thetshelesa, nnḓu hei ndi ḓo i ita zwe nda ita Shilo, muḓi houno wa tou vha tshiga tshine tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dza teketelana ngatsho.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Vhotshifhe na vhaporofita na vhathu vhoṱhe vha pfa Jeremia a tshi amba maipfi ayo nḓuni ya Muṋe washu. 
Jeremiah26:8 Hone Jeremia a tshi tou fhedza u vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhudza uri a zwi ambe, vhotshifhe na vhaporofita na vhathu vhoṱhe vha mu fara vha ri, “U fanela u fa!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Ndi mini u tshi porofita nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu wa ri nnḓu ino i ḓo itwa zwe zwa itwa Shilo, muḓi uno u ḓo sala u matumba u si na muthu?” Vhathu vhoṱhe vha kuvhanganela Jeremia nḓuni ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah26:10 Musi vhahulwane vha Juda vha tshi pfa ayo mafhungo, vha gonya vha tshi bva musanda vha livha nḓuni ya Muṋe washu vha dzula tshifhingoni tsha Khoro Ntswa ya nnḓu ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah26:11 Ndi hone vhotshifhe na vhaporofita vha tshi amba na vhahulwane na vhathu vhoṱhe vha ri, “Hoyu munna o fanela u haṱulelwa lufu, o porofita uri muḓi hoyu u ḓo welwa nga khombo. No zwi pfa nga dzaṋu nḓevhe!”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi amba na vhahulwane vhoṱhe na vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Muṋe washu o nthuma uri ndi ambe zwoṱhe zwe na zwi pfa ndi porofite khombo i no ḓo wela nnḓu hei na muḓi hoyu." 
Jeremiah26:13 Zwino-ha shandukani ni laṱe nḓila dzaṋu na zwiito zwaṋu, ni thetshelese Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu. Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo ni khathutshela a si tsha ni ḓisela khombo ye a ri i ḓo ni wela." 
Jeremiah26:14 A vha nṋe ndi zwanḓani zwaṋu; nnyiteni zwine na vhona zwi zwavhuḓi zwi zwone-zwone. 
Jeremiah26:15 Hone zwi ḓivheni uri na mmbulaha ni ḓo vha no ḓihwesa mulandu wa malofha a muthu a si na mulandu, na hwesa na muḓi hoyu na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho khawo, ngauri ngoho Muṋe washu o nthuma ha inwi uri ndi ambe maipfi haya oṱhe ni tshi zwi pfa.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Ndi hone vhahulwane na vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi amba na vhotshifhe na vhaporofita vha ri, “Hoyu munna a songo haṱulelwa lufu! O amba na riṋe nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu Muṋe washu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Vhaṅwe vha vhahulwane vha shango vha takuwa vha amba na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha vhathu vha ri," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika wa Moreshethe o porofita misi ya Hiskia khosi ya Juda. O vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda a ri, ‘Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: “ ‘Tsioni hu ḓo liṅwa unga tsimu, Jerusalema hu ḓo sala hu thulwi ya matumba, muvhundu wa thembele u ḓo mela maṱaka.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Huno Hiskia khosi ya Juda kana muṅwe-vho kha ḽa Juda o vhuya a mu vhulaha haa? A thi ri Hiskia o vha a tshi ofha Muṋe washu a tshi ṱoḓa u mu takadza? Muṋe washu ho ngo vha khathutshela a si tsha vha ḓisela khombo ye a ri i ḓo vha wela naa? Ri ḓo ṱuwa ri tshi ḓihwesa khombo i ofhisaho nga u ita vhuvhi vhungafha!” 
Jeremiah26:20 Uria ṅwana wa Shemaya a no bva Kiriathi Jiarimu o vha e muṅwe munna we a porofita nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu, o ḓi porofita zwi fanaho na zwenezwo zwa khombo ine ha pfi i ḓo wela muḓi hoyu na shango heḽi nga he Jeremia a amba." 
Jeremiah26:21 Musi Jehoyakimu na magota awe na vhahulwane vha tshi pfa maipfi ayo, khosi ya ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha. Huno Uria a ri u zwi pfa a shavhela Egipita nga nyofho." 
Jeremiah26:22 Khosi Jehoyakimu a ruma Elinathani ṅwana wa Akhiboro a ṱuwa na vhaṅwe vhanna vha ya Egipita. 
Jeremiah26:23 Vha dzhia Uria ngei Egipita vha mu isa ha khosi Jehoyakimu, ene a ita uri a vhulawe nga pfumo, tshitumbu tshawe tsha poswa fhethu ha zwalo zwa vhathu zwavho." 
Jeremiah26:24 Hone Jeremia o vha a tshi tsireledzwa nga Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani, zwenezwo ene a si kumedzwe vhathu uri vha mu vhulahe." 
Jeremiah27:1 Musi Tsedekia ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda a tshi kha ḓi bva u thoma u vhusa, ipfi ḽa amba na Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Muṋe washu o mmbudza a ri, “Ḓivhaḓele dzhogo u i itele pfuṋelo dza nnzwa u i vhee mutsingani wau." 
Jeremiah27:3 Zwenezwo u rume vhaḓinḓa vho ḓaho Jerusalema ha Tsedekia khosi ya Juda vha swikise mafhungo ha mahosi a Edomo na Muaba na Amoni na Tiro na Sidoni. 
Jeremiah27:4 Vha vhudze vhaṋe vhavho uri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Vhudzani vhaṋe vhaṋu ni ri:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ndi Nṋe ndo vhumbaho ḽifhasi na vhathu vhaḽo na phukha dzi re khaḽo nga maanḓa anga mahulu na nga tshanḓa tshó angalala; ndi ḽi ṋea ane nda funa. 
Jeremiah27:6 Zwino mashango aṋu oṱhe ndi ḓo a ṋea gota ḽanga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele; ndi ḓo ita uri a vhuse na phukha dza ḓaka. 
Jeremiah27:7 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo shumela ene na ṅwana wawe na muḓuhulu wawe ha vhuya ha swika tshifhinga tshine shango ḽawe ḽa phusukanywa; ndi hone na ene a tshi vho ḓo vhuswa nga tshakha nnzhi na mahosi mahulwane. 
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘Huno arali luṅwe lushaka kana muṅwe muvhuso wa sa shumela Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, lwa sa tenda u ṋekedza mutsinga uri a lu vhee dzhogo, lwonolwo lushaka ndi ḓo lu vhulaha nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze ndi vhuye ndi lu lozwe tshoṱhe nga tshanḓa tshawe." 
Jeremiah27:9 Zwenezwo ni songo thetshelesa vhaporofita vhaṋu na mingome yaṋu na vhaṱalutshedzi vha miloro na vha no vhidza mimuya ya vho faho na ṅanga dzaṋu vhane vha ni vhudza vha ri: Ni nga si shumele khosi ya Babele. 
Jeremiah27:10 Vha ni porofitela mazwifhi ane a ḓo ita uri ni thubelwe kule na mashango aṋu; ndi ḓo ni thatha na lovha. 
Jeremiah27:11 Hone lushaka lune lwa ṋekedza mutsinga lwa vhewa dzhogo ya khosi ya Babele lwa mu shumela, lwonolwo lushaka ndi ḓo lu litsha lwa sala shangoni ḽalwo lwa lima masimu lwa dzula hone. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Na Tsedekia khosi ya Juda ndo mu fha ndaela yeneyo. Ndo ri, “Ṋekedzani mitsinga yaṋu ni vhewe dzhogo ya khosi ya Babele; shumelani ene na vhathu vhawe, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila." 
Jeremiah27:13 Iwe na vhathu vhau ni felani nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze zwe Muṋe washu a ri zwi ḓo wela lushaka lune lwa sa ḓo shumela khosi ya Babele? 
Jeremiah27:14 Ni songo thetshelesa maipfi a vhaporofita vhane vha ni vhudza vha ri, ‘A ni nga vhuyi na shumela khosi ya Babele’; vha khou ni porofitela mazwifhi." 
Jeremiah27:15 Muṋe washu u ri, ‘A tho ngo vha ruma. Vha khou porofita mazwifhi nga dzina ḽanga. Na vha thetshelesa ndi ḓo ni thatha na lovha, khathihi na vhaporofita vhane vha khou ni porofitela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Ndi hone ndi tshi vhudza na vhotshifhe na vhathu vhoṱhe nda ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ni songo thetshelesa vhaporofita vhaṋu vhane vha ri: Hu si kale lupfumo lwa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu lu ḓo humiswa lu tshi bva Babele. Vha khou ni porofitela mazwifhi." 
Jeremiah27:17 Ni songo vha thetshelesa. Inwi shumelani khosi ya Babele, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila. Zwi farisani muḓi uyu u tshi ḓo sala u matumba?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Arali nangoho vhe vhaporofita, arali vhe na ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, nga vha humbele Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe uri thundu dzo salaho nḓuni ya Muṋe wa zwoṱhe na yo salaho pfamoni ya khosi ya Juda a re Jerusalema i si hwalwe-vho ya iswa Babele." 
Jeremiah27:19 Muṋe washu u ri thikho na sambelo ḽihulu na zwigoloi na dziṅwe thundu dza thembeleni ni tshee nadzo fhano muḓini. 
Jeremiah27:20 Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele ho ngo ṱuwa nadzo zwiḽa a tshi kumba Jehoyakhini ṅwana wa Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda a tshi bva Jerusalema a mu isa vhuthubwani Babele, e na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Juda na Jerusalema.’" 
Jeremiah27:21 Hone zwino Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi amba nga zwithu zwo salaho nḓuni ya Muṋe washu na pfamoni ya khosi ya Juda na muḓini wa Jerusalema, u ri," 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Na zwone zwi ḓo hwalwa zwa iswa Babele zwa dzula hone u swika ḓuvha ḽine nda ḓo zwi tevhelela. Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo zwi dzhia nda zwi vhuedzedza hafhano fhethu. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ” 
Jeremiah28:1 Nga ṅwaha wonoyo, Tsedekia khosi ya Juda a tshi kha ḓi bva u thoma u vhusa, nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu wa ṅwaha wa vhuṋa, muporofita Hanania ṅwana wa Asuru, we a vha a tshi bva Gibioni, a nngwana ndi nḓuni ya Muṋe washu hu na vhotshifhe na vhathu vhoṱhe, a amba na nṋe a ri," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vunḓa dzhogo ya khosi ya Babele." 
Jeremiah28:3 Hu sa athu fhela miṅwaha mivhili ndi ḓo humisa thundu dza nnḓu ya Muṋe washu nda dzi ḓisa hafhano, hedziḽa dze Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a dzi hwala hafhano a dzi isa Babele." 
Jeremiah28:4 Na khosi ya Juda, Jehoyakhini ṅwana wa Jehoyakimu ndi ḓo mu vhuedzedza hafhano, na mathubwa oṱhe a bvaho Juda e a hwalwa a iswa Babele; ndi ḓo vunḓa dzhogo ya khosi ya Babele. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Ndi hone muporofita Jeremia a tshi fhindula muporofita Hanania a tshi pfiwa nga vhotshifhe na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho ima ngomu nḓuni ya Muṋe washu. 
Jeremiah28:6 A ri, “Amen! Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi ita nga u ralo! Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi khunyeledza maipfi e na a porofita! Ngavhe a tshi dzhia thundu ya nnḓu ya Muṋe washu ngei Babele a i vhuedzedze fhano khathihi na mathubwa oṱhe." 
Jeremiah28:7 Huno thetshelesani zwine nda ḓo amba inwi na vhathu vhoṱhe ni tshi zwi pfa, ndi ri:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Vhaporofita vhe vha ri ranga phanḓa nṋe na inwi, tsha kale-kale vho ḓi porofita a nndwa na khombo na dwadze zwe zwa pfi zwi ḓo wela mashango manzhi na mivhuso mihulu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Hone muporofita ane a porofita uri hu ḓo vha na mulalo, u ḓo pfi nangoho o ruṅwa nga Muṋe washu arali zwe a ḓivhadza zwa itea.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Ndi hone muporofita Hanania a tshi rula dzhogo i re mutsingani wa muporofita Jeremia a i vunḓekanya," 
Jeremiah28:11 a amba a tshi pfiwa nga vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vunḓekanya dzhogo ya Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele nga u ralo, nda i rula mutsingani wa tshakha dzoṱhe hu sa athu fhela miṅwaha mivhili.’ ” Ndi hone muporofita Jeremia a tshi ḓiṱutshela." 
Jeremiah28:12 Musi muporofita Hanania a tshi kha ḓi bva u vunḓa dzhogo ye a i rula mutsingani wa muporofita Jeremia, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Iyo vhudza Hanania u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Wo vunḓa dzhogo ya thanda, vhudzuloni hayo u ḓo wana dzhogo ya tsimbi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Tshakha dzoṱhe hedzi ndi ḓo dzi hwesa dzhogo ya tsimbi mitsingani nda dzi ita phuli dza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, dzi ḓo mu shumela. Ndi ḓo ita uri a vhuse na dzone phukha dza ḓaka!’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Ndi hone muporofita Jeremia a tshi ya a vhudza muporofita Hanania a ri, “Inwi Hanania thetshelesani! A no ngo rumiwa nga Muṋe washu, nangwe zwo ralo no ita uri lushaka holu lu fulufhele mazwifhi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Zwenezwo, Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi u sudzulusa shangoni. Ṋaṅwaha u ḓo fa, nge wa funzedza vhathu u shandukela Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa ṅwaha wonoyo, muporofita Hanania a mbo ḓi fa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Ngolu luṅwalo lwe Jeremia a lu ṅwala e Jerusalema a tshi ṅwalela vhahulwane vhe vha vha vhe mathubwa-vho, na vhotshifhe na vhaporofita na vhathu vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vhe Nebukhadnetsara a vha hwala vha tshi bva Jerusalema a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele." 
Jeremiah29:2 (Khosi Jehoyakhini na mme awe na vhahulwane vha khoro na vharangaphanḓa vha Juda na Jerusalema, na vhatsila na vhafhaṱi vho vha vho no pfuluswa Jerusalema vha iswa vhuthubwani.)" 
Jeremiah29:3 Luṅwalo ulwo o lu ṋea Elasa ṅwana wa Shafani e na Gemaria ṅwana wa Hilikia, musi Tsedekia khosi ya Juda a tshi vha ruma ha khosi Nebukhadnetsara e Babele. Lwo ri:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u amba na vhoṱhe vhe a vha hwala Jerusalema a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele, u ri," 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Fhaṱani dzinnḓu ni dzule; limani masimu ni ḽe zwine na vhibvisa khao. 
Jeremiah29:6 Vhingani ni bebe vhana; vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka vha ṱoḓeleni vhasidzana, vha vhasidzana ni vha dzekise, uri na vhone vha bebe vhana. Andani henefho, ni songo fhungudzea." 
Jeremiah29:7 Ni shumele uri muḓi we nda ni hwala nda ni isa khawo u vhe na mulalo zwi u nakele. Nthabeleni uri ndi u tonde, ngauri zwa u nakela, na inwi zwi ḓo ni nakela.’" 
Jeremiah29:8 Ee, Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ni songo tenda u fhurwa nga vhaporofita na vhabvumbi vhane na dzula navho. Ni songo thetshelesa miloro ine na vha ṱuṱuwedza uri vha i lore;" 
Jeremiah29:9 vha khou ni porofitela mazwifhi nga dzina ḽanga. A tho ngo vha ruma. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ 
Jeremiah29:10 “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Hu ḓo ri ho no fhela miṅwaha ya 70 ni Babele, nda ḓa nda khunyeledza ḽivhuya ḽe nda ni fulufhedzisa nda ri ndi ḓo ni vhuedzedza hafhano fhethu." 
Jeremiah29:11 Zwe nda ni dzudzanyela ndi a zwi ḓivha, ndo dzudzanya uri zwi ni nakele, hu si uri ndi ni huvhadze, ndo ni dzudzanyela zwi no ḓo ni ṋea fulufhelo, na nga tshifhinga tshi ḓaho na ḓi wanala ni hone." 
Jeremiah29:12 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo mmbidzelela na ḓa na nthabela, Nṋe nda ni thetshelesa." 
Jeremiah29:13 Ni ḓo nṱoda na nngwana, ngauri ni ḓo nṱoḓa nga mbilu yoṱhe." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ni ḓo nngwana, nda ni bvisa vhupulini nda ni vhuisa. Ndi ḓo ni bvisa kha tshakha dzoṱhe na fhethu hoṱhe he nda vha ndo ni thathela hone, nda ni kuvhanganya nda ni humisela fhethu he nda ni hwala hone ndi tshi ni isa vhuthubwani.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Ni nga ḓi ri, ‘Muṋe washu o ri vusela vhaporofita ri Babele.’" 
Jeremiah29:16 Hone Muṋe washu a tshi amba nga khosi yo dzulaho kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita na vhathu vhoṱhe vho salaho muḓini hoyu, vhathu vha haṋu vha songo yaho na inwi vhuthubwani –" 
Jeremiah29:17 ee, Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vha ḓisela pfumo na nḓala na dwadze, nda vha ita unga mahuyu o sinaho o tshinyalaho lune a sa tsha ḽea." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndi ḓo vha pandamedza nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze nda ita uri mivhuso yoṱhe ya shango i tshenuwe i tshi vhona zwe nda vha ita, vha vha ṱano ḽa u teketelwa na zwi ofhisaho, na u nyadziwa na u shona vhukati ha tshakha dzoṱhe hune nda ḓo vha balanganyela hone." 
Jeremiah29:19 Zwi ḓo ralo nge vha si thetshelese maipfi anga, maipfi e nda a swikisa khavho nga vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita nda ḓi dovha.’ ” U ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah29:20 “Zwenezwo inwi mathubwa noṱhe vhe Muṋe washu a ni pfulusa Jerusalema a ni isa Babele, ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah29:21 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi amba nga Ahabu ṅwana wa Kolaya na nga Tsedekia ṅwana wa Maaseya vhane vha khou ni porofitela mazwifhi nga dzina ḽawe u ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vha kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, a vha vhulaha ni tshi zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah29:22 Mathubwa oṱhe a no bva Juda a re Babele vha tshi teketela muthu vha ḓo mu teketela nga madzina avho vha ri: Ngavhe Yahavee a tshi u ita zwe a ita Tsedekia na Ahabu, vhe khosi ya Babele ya vha fhisa nga mulilo." 
Jeremiah29:23 Ndi uri vho ita zwi shonisaho kha ḽa Israele; vho ita vhupombwe na vhasadzi vha vhaṅwe, vha dovha vha zwifha nga dzina ḽanga, vha amba zwe nda si vha vhudze. Nṋe ndi a zwi ḓivha, ndi ṱhanzi yazwo.’ U ralo Muṋe washu.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Muṋe washu o ri ndi vhudze Shemaya wa Nehelamu ndi ri," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Wo ṅwalela vhathu vhoṱhe vha Jerusalema maṅwalo nga dzina ḽau, wa ṅwalela na Tsefania ṅwana wa Maaseya tshifhe, wa ṅwalela na vhotshifhe vhoṱhe, wa ri:" 
Jeremiah29:26 Yahavee o nanga iwe uri u vhe tshifhe vhudzuloni ha Jehoyada, uri u lange nnḓu ya Muṋe washu; zwo u fanelaho ndi uri u ite uri ane a ḓipengisa a ḓiita muporofita u mu pate nga matanda u mu vhofhe mukulo nga tsimbi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Zwino ndi mini u songo kaidza Jeremia a no bva Anathotho, ane a ḓiita muporofita vhukati haṋu?" 
Jeremiah29:28 O ruma muthu ri ngeno Babele a ḓa a ri vhudza a ri: Zwi ḓo ita tshifhinga tshilapfu. Zwenezwo fhaṱani dzinnḓu ni ḓidzulele, limani masimu ni ḽe zwine a vhibvisa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Tshifhe Tsefania a vhalela muporofita Jeremia ulwo luṅwalo. 
Jeremiah29:30 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Ḓivhadza mathubwa oṱhe mafhungo haya u ri, ‘Yahavee a tshi amba nga Shemaya wa Nehelamu u ri: Nge Shemaya a ni porofitela mazwifhi, nangwe ndi songo mu ruma, a ita uri ni ḓitike nga mazwifhi," 
Jeremiah29:32 Yahavee u ri: Ngoho ndi ḓo rwa Shemaya wa Nehelamu na vhana vhawe. Vhathu vha hawe a hu tsha ḓo sala na muthihi, na zwivhuya zwine nda ḓo itela vhathu vhanga ha nga zwi vhoni, nge a ṱuṱuwedza vhathu uri vha ntshandukele. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Muṋe washu o amba na Jeremia a ri," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Zwoṱhe zwe nda u vhudza zwi ṅwale buguni." 
Jeremiah30:3 Hu khou sendela maḓuvha ane nda ḓo bvisa vhathu vhanga Israele na Juda vhuthubwani nda vha vhuedzedza shangoni ḽe nda ḽi ṋea vhokhotsi avho uri ḽi vhe ḽavho. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ” 
Jeremiah30:4 Khea mafhungo e Muṋe washu a vhudza vhathu vha Israele na Juda: 
Jeremiah30:5 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndo pfa mukosi wa vha ofhaho, mukosi wa nyofho u si wa mulalo." 
Jeremiah30:6 Zwino edzonu elekanya! Muthu wa munna a nga vhofholowa a beba ṅwana naa? Zwino khezwi ndi tshi vhona munna muṅwe na muṅwe o farelela tshiḽelo unga musadzi a tshi khou pfa vhuṱungu a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa? Khezwi muṅwe na muṅwe o tswukuluwa lwa u fa? 
Jeremiah30:7 Ḓuvha iḽo ḽi ḓo ofhisa hani! A hu tsha ḓo vha na ḽi no fana naḽo. Ndi tshifhinga tshine Jakopo a ḓo welwa nga khombo. Hone u ḓo ponyokiswa khazwo.” 
Jeremiah30:8 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ndi ḓo vunḓa dzhogo i re mitsingani yavho, nda ṱhukhula mbofho dzo vha vhofhaho; a vha tsha ḓo itwa phuli nga vhatsinda." 
Jeremiah30:9 Tshavho hu ḓo vha u shumela Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho na Dafita khosi yavho ane nda ḓo vha vhumbela. 
Jeremiah30:10 “Iwe Jakopo mulanda wanga, u songo ofha tshithu; Israele, u songo hanganea. Ndi ḓo u lamulela nda u bvisa shangoni ḽa kule, nda bvisa vhaḓuhulu vhau shangoni ḽe vha thubelwa khaḽo. Jakopo u ḓo dovha a vha na mulalo a pfa a si tsha ofha tshithu, shango ḽi ḓo lala, a hu na a no ḓo mu ofhisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ndi na iwe, ndi ḓo u tshidza. Naho tshakha dze nda ni balanganyela khadzo ndi tshi ḓo dzi lozwa tshoṱhe, iwe ndi nga si u lozwe tshoṱhe. Ndi ḓo u laya nga khaṱhulo mbuya, a thi nga u litshi u tshi bva ú songo wana ṱhamu. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Muṋe washu a tshi amba na vhathu vhawe u ri, “Mbonzhe dzau a dzi lafhei, fuvhalo ḽau a ḽi fhodzei." 
Jeremiah30:13 A hu na ane a u imelela khoroni; a hu na mushonga une wa nga fhodza mbonzhe dzau, a u lafhei." 
Jeremiah30:14 Vhafunwa vhau vhoṱhe vho u hangwa; a vha u londi. Ndo u dia zwa nga wo diwa nga swina, ndo u pfisa vhuṱungu zwa nga u khou vhu pfiswa nga wa tshiṱuhu, ndi nge milandu yau ya hula na vhutshinyi hau ha anda." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ndi mini u tshi lilela mbonzhe dzau, mafuvhalo a sa lafhei? Ndo u ita zwithu hezwo nge milandu yau ya hula, vhutshinyi hau ha anda." 
Jeremiah30:16 Hone vhoṱhe vhane vha u mila vha ḓo milwa, maswina au oṱhe a ḓo iswa vhuthubwani. Vhane vha u ṱangula vha ḓo ṱangulwa-vho vhoṱhe vhane vha u kandeledza vha ḓo kandeledzwa-vho." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ndi ḓo dovha nda u fhodza nda lafha mbonzhe dzau, ngauri u pfi Mulaṱwa, Tsioni i sa londwi nga muthu.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo humisela vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo shangoni ḽavho, nda khathutshela muṱa muṅwe na muṅwe. Muḓi u ḓo dovha wa vuswa shubini ḽawo, na pfamo ya dovha ya ima fhethu hayo ho teaho." 
Jeremiah30:19 Henefho hu ḓo pfala nyimbo dza ndivhuho, ha dovha ha pfala na vhathu vha tshi sea. Ndi ḓo vha andisa, a vha nga fhungudzei; ndi ḓo ita uri vhathu vha vha hulise, a vha nga nyadzwi." 
Jeremiah30:20 Vhana vhavho vha ḓo nga vha maḓuvha a kale, nda dovha nda vha imisa vho khwaṱha, vhoṱhe vhane vha vha kandeledza ndi ḓo vha laṱisa." 
Jeremiah30:21 Vha ḓo vha na murangaphanḓa a re muṅwe wavho; muvhusi wavho u ḓo bva khavho. Ndi ḓo mu ḓisa tsini a sendela tsini hanga, ngauri ndi nnyi ane a nga luma mbilu a ntsendela nga eṱhe?" 
Jeremiah30:22 Zwenezwo ni ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu waṋu.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Vhonani, ḓumbu ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi ḓo tita nga mbiti, ṱhoho dza vhavhi dzi ḓo vhudzulwa nga muya u ofhisaho wó sinyuwa." 
Jeremiah30:24 Mbiti dza Muṋe washu dzi ofhisaho dzi nga si hume a vhuye a khunyeledze zwe a humbula. Hezwi zwithu vhathu vhawe vha ḓo zwi ṱalukanya ngavhuya. 
Jeremiah31:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Misi yeneyo ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wa matsinde oṱhe a Israele, vhone vha vha vhathu vhanga.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 “Vhathu vhane vha ponyoka pfumo vha ḓo khathutshelwa phangani; ndi ḓo ḓa nda awedza Vhaisraele.” 
Jeremiah31:3 Muṋe washu o ḓisumbedza nṋe a tshi bva kule a ri, “Ndo ḓi ni funa nga lufuno lwa lini na lini, lu sa fheli, lu no dzula lu hone." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndi ḓo dovha nda ni fhaṱa, miḓi yau ya dovha ya fhaṱwa iwe musidzana Israele. U ḓo dovha wa dzhia murumba wau wa tshina wo takala." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ni ḓo dovha na lima masimu a minḓirivhe mivhunduni ya Samaria; vhalimi vhe vha i lima vha ḓo ḓiphiṋa nga mitshelo yayo. 
Jeremiah31:6 Hu ḓo vha na musi une vhalindi vha ḓo huwelelana vhe mivhunduni ya Efraimi vha ri, ‘Iḓani ri gonye Tsioni ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Muṋe washu u ri, “Imbelani Jakopo nga dakalo, pembelelani lushaka lu fhiraho dzoṱhe. Thendo dzaṋu nga dzi pfale, ni ri, ‘Yahavee o tshidza vhathu vhawe, vhone Vhaisraele vho salaho.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Vhonani, ndi ḓo vha vhuisa shangoni ḽa devhula, nda vha kuvhanganya vha tshi bva magumoni a ḽifhasi. Khavho hu ḓo vha hu na mabofu na zwihole, vhasadzi vho vhifhaho muvhilini na vhane vha ṱoḓou vhofholowa; vha ḓo vhuya vhe gogo ḽihulu." 
Jeremiah31:9 Vha ḓo vhuya vha tshi lila; ndi ḓo vha vhuisa vha tshi vho tou nnduvhelela. Ndi ḓo vha endedza tsini ha milambwana ya maḓi, nḓilani yo linganelaho hune vha sa ḓo khukhulwa, ngauri Nṋe ndi khotsi a Israele, Efraimi ndi tanzhe ḽanga.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Muṋe washu u ri, “Inwi dzitshakha nthetsheleseni, ḓivhadzani ipfi ḽanga mashangoni a seli ha lwanzhe ni ri, ‘Onoyo we a balanganya Vhaisraele u ḓo dovha a vha kuvhanganya, a vha lisa unga mulisa a tshi lisa sambi ḽa nngu.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Muṋe washu u ḓo vhofholola vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo, a vha tshidza zwanḓani zwa vhane vha vha kunda nga maanḓa." 
Jeremiah31:12 Vha ḓo ḓa vha fhululedza vhe muṱumbani wa Tsioni, zwifhaṱuwo zwó tsha nga zwivhuya zwine Muṋe washu a ḓo vha itela – goroi ntswa na waini ntswa na mapfura na nngu na kholomo. Vha ḓo nga muṱanga, a vha tsha ḓo ṋoka." 
Jeremiah31:13 Ndi hone vhasidzana vha tshi ḓo takala, vha tou tshina, vhaṱhannga na vhakalaha vha pembela. Tshililo tshavho ndi ḓo tshi shandula dakalo; ndi ḓo vha rudza mbilu vha takala, vha si tsha ṱungufhala." 
Jeremiah31:14 Vhotshifhe ndi ḓo vha fusha nga mapfura, vhathu vhanga vha ḓo fura vhuthu hanga. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Muṋe washu u ri, “Rama hu pfala mukosi, ndi mukosi wa tshililo tshi ṱungufhadzaho. Ndi Rahele a no khou lilela vhana vhawe; ha tsha tenda u fhumudzwa, vhana vhawe a vha tsheeho!”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Muṋe washu u ri, “Fhumula, u songo tsha lila, fhuluṱa miṱodzi, u ḓo pfufhelwa mushumo we wa itela vhana vhau, vha ḓo vhuya shangoni ḽa swina." 
Jeremiah31:17 Lavhelela zwivhuya zwa matshelo, vhana vhau vha ḓo vhuya hayani. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah31:18 “Ndo pfa tshililo tsha Efraimi a tshi ri, ‘Wo nngudisa u ḓivha dzhogo unga ṋamana i sa athu guda, na zwino ndo guda. Nthembulusele ha Iwe, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo rembuluwa; ngauri Iwe Muṋe washu u Mudzimu wanga." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ndo ri u pambuwa nḓilani, nda ḓisola; wa ri u nndaṱisa nda ṱunya mavhudzi nga u ṱungufhala. Ndo pfa ndo shona ndi tshi nyadzea, ndi tshi humbula zwe nda tshinya ndi tshee muswa.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Khezwi Efraimi a tshi nga ṅwana wanga ane nda mu funa. Khezwi a tshi nga u takadza mbilu yanga! Ndi tshi mu amba a thi tsha kona u mu hangwa. Mbilu yanga yo mu ṱuvha hani; vhukuma ndi ḓo mu khathutshela.” 
Jeremiah31:21 “Vhea zwiga zwa gondo, ṱoka thanda dza tsumbavhuyo. Sedza gondo ḽine wa fanela u ḽi fara. Dovha u wane nḓila ye wa ṱuwa ngayo. Vhuya Israele, musidzana wanga, humela miḓini yau." 
Jeremiah31:22 Iwe ṅwana a sa fulufhedzei, u ḓo tendeleka u swika lini? Yahavee u ḓo sika tshithu tshiswa fhano fhasi, musadzi u vho ḓo tsireledza munna.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Musi ndi tshi vha vhuisa vhuthubwani, vhathu vha re shangoni ḽa Juda na miḓini yaḽo vha ḓo dovha vha ri, ‘Iwe vhudzulo ha vhuvhuya, iwe thavha khethwa, ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi u shudufhadza.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Vhathu vha ḓo dzula vhoṱhe kha ḽa Juda na miḓini yaḽo yoṱhe – vhalimi na vhane vha enda vha tshi fulisa maṱambi avho a dzinngu. 
Jeremiah31:25 Ndi ḓo netulusa vho netaho, vho ṋokaho nga nḓala nda vha fusha." 
Jeremiah31:26 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo ri, ‘Kha ndi fhaṱuwe ndi zwi vhone, naho khofhe dzo nnḓifhela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:27 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa maḓuvha ane nda ḓo ḓadza shango ḽa Israele na ḽa Juda nga vhathu na zwifuwo, vha nga vho tou zwaliwa." 
Jeremiah31:28 Vhunga ndo vha ndo tou fungelela u vha tupula na u vha pwashekanya na u vha thutha na u vha lozwa na u vha ḓisela khombo, zwino ndi vho ḓo fungelela u vha fhaṱa na u vha ṱavha." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Misi yeneyo vhathu a vha tsha ḓo ri, ‘Vhokhotsi vho ḽa nḓirivhe dza magaga, hadzila ya fara vhana.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 “Muṅwe na muṅwe u vho ḓo tou fela vhuvhi hawe; ane a vhuya a ḽa nḓirivhe dza magaga, hadzila ḽi ḓo fara maṋo awe.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa musi une nda ḓo vhofha mulanga muswa na vhathu vha nnḓu ya Israele na vha nnḓu ya Juda." 
Jeremiah31:32 A u nga ḓo vha mulanga u no nga uḽa we nda vhofha na vhomakhulukuku wavho zwiḽa ndi tshi vha fara nga tshanḓa nda vha pfulusa Egipita; vho tshinya mulanga wanga uḽa naho ndo vha ndo khwaṱhisa unga munna o vhinga musadzi. 
Jeremiah31:33 Mulanga une nda ḓo vhofha na nnḓu ya Israele hó no fhela tshifhinga hetsho, ndi hoyu: “Ndi ḓo vhea milayo yanga mihumbuloni yavho nda tou i ṅwala mbiluni dzavho. Nṋe ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wavho, vhone vha vha vhathu vhanga." 
Jeremiah31:34 A hu tsha ḓo vha na a no ḓo funza muṅwe kana murathu wawe a ri, ‘Ḓivha Muṋe washu!’; vhoṱhe vha vho ḓo nnḓivha, u thoma nga muṱuku u swika nga muhulwane. Ndi uri ndi ḓo vha hangwela vhutshinyi havho nda si tsha vhu elelwa. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Muṋe washu o vhea ḓuvha uri ḽi vhonetshele masiari, o vhudza ṅwedzi na ṋaledzi uri zwi penye vhusiku; u ritha lwanzhe uri magabelo alwo a unge – u pfi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, u ri," 
Jeremiah31:36 “Arali milayo heyo ya ḓuvha na ṋaledzi i tshi ḓo thuthwa nda si tsha zwi vhona, ndi hone ndi sa tsha ḓo vhona vhaḓuhulu vha Israele vhe lushaka." 
Jeremiah31:37 Arali lutombo hangei nṱha lwa kona u eliwa, muteo wa ḽifhasi ngei fhasi wa tandulwa, ndi hone na Nṋe ndi tshi nga landula vhaḓuhulu vha Israele nga mulandu wa zwoṱhe zwe vha ita.” Ho amba Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah31:38 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa maḓuvha ane nda ḓo ḓivusela muḓi hoyu wa Jerusalema, u bva Thawarani ya Hananele u swika Khoroni ya Khuḓani." 
Jeremiah31:39 Mukano u ḓo thoma henefho wa swika tshivhangani tsha Garebe wa livha Gua. 
Jeremiah31:40 Govha ḽoṱhe hune ha laṱwa vhafu na milora, na zwalo zwoṱhe u swika Govha ḽa Kidroni nga vhubvaḓuvha u swika nga khuḓa ya Khoro ya Bere, hu ḓo vha hukhethwa ha Yahavee. Muḓi a u tsha ḓo phusulwa, a u tsha ḓo lozwiwa.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Ngeḽi fhungo ḽe ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu nga ṅwaha wa fumi wa musi khosi Tsedekia a tshi vhusa ḽa Juda, ú wa 18 wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara." 
Jeremiah32:2 Zwenezwo mmbi ya khosi ya Babele yo vha i tshi khou govhela Jerusalema, muporofita Jeremia ó valelwa muṱani wa vhalindi vha pfamo ya musanda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Tsedekia khosi ya Juda o vha o mu valela henefho, a tshi ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi porofita nga u ralo? Ni ri, ‘Muṋe washu u ri: Muḓi uyu ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi u kumedza khosi ya Babele ya u thuba." 
Jeremiah32:4 Tsedekia khosi ya Juda a nga si ponyoke Vhakhaladia a shavha, tshawe hu ḓo tou vha u kumedzwa khosi ya Babele, a amba nae vho livhana zwifhaṱuwo, a mu vhona nga awe maṱo." 
Jeremiah32:5 U ḓo hwala Tsedekia a mu isa Babele, a dzula hone ndi vhuye ndi ite zwine nda funa u mu ita. Nangwe a lwa na Vhakhaladia a nga si vha kunde. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Nga hetsho tshifhinga Jeremia a ri, “Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo ḓa ha nṋe ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah32:7 ‘Hanamele ṅwana wa malume au Shalumu u ḓo ḓa ha iwe a ri: Rengani tsimu yanga i re Anathotho, vhunga inwi ni shaka ḽa tsini, zwo fanela uri inwi ni i rengulule.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 “Nangoho muzwala wanga Hanamele a ḓa ha nṋe henefho muṱani wa pfamo ya musanda nga he Muṋe washu a dzula o amba, a ri, ‘Rengani tsimu yanga i re Anathotho shangoni ḽa Benyamini; vhunga zwo ni fanela uri i vhe yaṋu, i rengululeni.’ Nṋe nda zwi ḓivha uri ipfi iḽo ndi ḽa Muṋe washu;" 
Jeremiah32:9 ndi hone ndi tshi rengulula iyo tsimu ya muzwala wanga Hanamele i re Anathotho, nda mu kalela tshelede i no ita mangwende a 17 a siliva." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nda saina luṅwalo lwa pfano nda vhea luswayo, nda ṱoḓa ṱhanzi, nda kala iyo siliva tshikaloni." 
Jeremiah32:11 Nda dzhia luṅwalo lwa vhuṱanzi ha u ri ndo renga – luṅwalo lwo swaiwaho lu re na pfano na nzudzanyo, na luṅwe lu si na luswayo –" 
Jeremiah32:12 nda lu ṋea Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria, ṅwana wa Maaseya, hu na muzwala wanga Hanamele na ṱhanzi dzo sainaho luṅwalo lwa pfano, na Majuda vhoṱhe vha re muṱani wa vhalindi vha pfamo ya musanda vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Jeremiah32:13 nda laya Barukhu vha tshi zwi pfa nda ri," 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Dzhia maṅwalo haya vhuvhili hao, lwo swaiwaho na lu songo swaiwaho, a pfano na a thengiso, u a longe mvuvheloni ya vumba uri a si ṱavhanye u ṱahala." 
Jeremiah32:15 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Hu ḓo dovha ha rengwa nnḓu na masimu na zwikovha zwa minḓirivhe shangoni heḽino.’ 
Jeremiah32:16 “Musi ndo no ṋea Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria ulwo luṅwalo lwa vhuṱanzi, nda rabela Muṋe washu nda ri:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Muṋe washu Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, wo vhumba ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi nga maanḓa au mahulu na nga tshanḓa tshau tshó angalala. A hu na tshine wa kundwa u tshi ita." 
Jeremiah32:18 Vhathu vhane wa vha funa ndi zwigidi na zwigidi, hone wa rwa vhana u tshi vha rwela vhutshinyi ha vhokhotsi avho. Iwe u Mudzimu wa maanḓa a sa kondadzei, u pfi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah32:19 Nzudzanyo dzau dzo hula hani, mishumo yau a i konadzei. Maṱo au a vhona nḓila dzoṱhe dza vhathu; u pfufha muṅwe na muṅwe u tshi tevhedza kutshilele kwawe nga he zwa tea mishumo yawe." 
Jeremiah32:20 Wo ita zwiga zwa maḓembe na zwimangadzo shangoni ḽa Egipita, na ṋamusi u kha ḓi zwi ita kha ḽa Israele na kha vhathu vhoṱhe, wa vha na bvumo, na ṋamusi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Wo pfulusa vhathu vhau Israele wa vha bvisa Egipita nga zwiga na zwimangadzo nga tshanḓa tshau tsha maanḓa wó tshi angaladza nga maanḓa a ofhisaho. 
Jeremiah32:22 Wo vha ṋea shango heḽino ḽe wa ana wa ri u ḓo ḽi ṋea vhokhotsi avho, shango ḽi no ela mukhaha na ṋotshi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Vho dzhena vha ḽi dzhia ḽa vha ḽavho, hone a vho ngo u thetshelesa, a vho ngo tevhedza milayo yau, a vho ngo ita zwe wa vha vhudza uri vha zwi ite. Ndi zwe wa vha ḓisela khombo hei yoṱhe." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Edzou vhona uri Vhakhaladia vho govhela hani muḓi, vha ṱoḓa u u dzhia. Muḓi u ḓo kumedzwa vhone vha no khou u dia nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze. Zwe wa amba zwo itea unga zwino u tshi khou zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah32:25 Naho muḓi u tshi ḓo kumedzwa Vhakhaladia, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, u mmbudza wa ri, ‘Renga tsimu nga siliva, mafhungo ayo a vhe na ṱhanzi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mphindula a ri," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa vhathu vhoṱhe. Hu na tshine tsha nkunda naa? 
Jeremiah32:28 Zwenezwo, Nṋe Yahavee ndi ri: Hoyu muḓi ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi u kumedza Vhakhaladia na Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, a u thuba." 
Jeremiah32:29 Vhakhaladia vhane vha khou dia hoyu muḓi vha ḓo u dzhena vha u fhisa nga mulilo; vha ḓo u fhisa we lore, vha fhisa na nnḓu he vhathu vha nṱunga nga u dubisela Baali zwioro nṱha ha ṱhanga dzadzo, vha dovha vha tevhulela midzimu thevhula henefho." 
Jeremiah32:30 “Vhathu vha Israele na Juda tshe vha ita ndi tshi ḓi zwi vhona ndi vhuvhi fhedzi, u bva hanani havho; ngoho vhathu vha Israele tshe vha ita ho vha u nṱunga nga u rabela zwe vha ita nga zwanḓa zwavho." 
Jeremiah32:31 Tshee hoyu muḓi wa fhaṱwa u swika zwino wa ḓi ṱunga mbiti dzanga wa ntsinyusa, lune nda fanela u u sudzulusa nda si tsha u vhona." 
Jeremiah32:32 Vhathu vha Israele na Juda vho nṱunga nga vhuvhi hoṱhe he vha ita – vhone na mahosi avho na vhahulwane, na vhotshifhe vhavho na vhaporofita vhavho, vhanna vha Juda na vhathu vha Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah32:33 Vho mpfuralela vha si tsha nndavhelesa; naho ndo vha funza nda dovha, a vho ngo thetshelesa kana vha ita zwe nda vha laya." 
Jeremiah32:34 Vho vhea midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso i nengisaho nḓuni ine ya pfi ndi yanga vha i shata tshika. 
Jeremiah32:35 Vho fhaṱela Baali dziaḽiṱari Govhani ḽa Hinomu, uri vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha vha ite zwiṱhavhelo zwa Molekhe, naho ndi songo vha vhudza uri vha ite nga u ralo, na u zwi humbula ndi songo vhuya nda zwi humbula uri vha ite zwi no nengisa nga u ralo; zwe vha ita ho vha hu u tou itisa vhathu vha Juda tshivhi." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Ni tshi amba muḓi uno ni ri, ‘U ḓo kumedzwa khosi ya Babele nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze’; hone Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Vhukumakuma ndi ḓo kuvhanganya vhathu vhanga vha tshi bva mashangoni e nda vha balanganyela khao nga mbiti khulu ndo sinyuwa zwihulu; ndi ḓo vha vhuisa hafhano fhethu vha dzula vha sa ofhi tshithu. 
Jeremiah32:38 Vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndi ḓo vha ṋea mbilu nthihi na maitele mathihi uri vha dzule vha tshi nnyofha, zwi tshi vha nakela na vhana vhavho." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga navho u no ḓo vha wa lini na lini: A thi nga vhuyi nda litsha u vha tonda, ndi ḓo vha ṋea mbilu ya uri vha nnyofhe, uri vha si tsha ntshandukela." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndi ḓo takalela u vha tonda, ndi a fulufhedzea, ndi ḓo vha sima shangoni ḽino nga mbilu yanga yoṱhe, vha ṱoka midzi.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ḓisela vhathu avha zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwine nda vha fulufhedzisa, zwa nga zwiḽa ndi tshi vha ḓisela khombo khulu." 
Jeremiah32:43 Hafhano shangoni heḽino ḽine inwi na ri, ‘Ndi soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu kana tshifuwo, ngauri ḽo kumedzwa Vhakhaladia,’ hu ḓo dovha ha rengwa masimu." 
Jeremiah32:44 A ḓo rengwa nga siliva, ha sainwa vhuṱanzi, ha vhewa luswayo, ha vha na ṱhanzi fhano shangoni ḽa Benyamini na miḓini yo tangaho Jerusalema na miḓini ya Juda, na miḓini i re mivhunduni na i re thungo ya lwanzhe, na Negeve, ngauri ndi ḓo ita uri zwi dovhe zwi vha nakele. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Musi Jeremia a tshee o hoṋelwa muṱani wa vhalindi vha pfamo ya musanda, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa khae lwa vhuvhili ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Yahavee, Ene we a ita ḽifhasi, a ḽi vhumba, a ḽi imisa, u pfi Yahavee, u ri," 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Mmbidzeleleni, ndi ḓo ni aravha nda ni vhudza zwihulu zwo dzumbamaho zwine na sa zwi ḓivhe." 
Jeremiah33:4 Ndi ri: Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha ḓo ḓi lwa na Vhakhaladia, avho vha ḓi govhela muḓi vha u dia vha thutha nnḓu dza muḓi na pfamo dza musanda, matumbani adzo vha khokha zwitumbu zwa vhathu vhe nda vha vhulaha nga mbiti ndo sinyuwa. Ndo vha ndo vha furalela nga mulandu wa vhuvhi havho hoṱhe." 
Jeremiah33:5  
Jeremiah33:6 “ ‘Naho zwo ralo, muḓi uno ndi ḓo dovha nda u lafha nda u fhodza; ndi ḓo fhodza vhathu vhanga vha ḓiphiṋa ḽo lala tshoṱhe vha sa ofhi tshithu." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndi ḓo vhuisa Juda na Israele vhuthubwani nda dovha nda vha fhaṱa vha nga zwe vha vha vhe zwone kale. 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndi ḓo vha ṱanzwa tshika dza vhutshinyi hoṱhe he vha nkhakhela, nda vha hangwela vhutshinyi havho hoṱhe ha u ntshandukela." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ndi hone muḓi uno wa Jerusalema u tshi ḓo ita uri ndi vhe na bvumo, ndi pembelelwe, ndi rendiwe, vhugala hanga vhu vhonwe nga tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzine dza pfa zwivhuya zwoṱhe zwine nda u itela; dza ḓo konou ofha dza tetemela dzi tshi vhona ndi tshi u ladzela shango tshoṱhe zwa u nakela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ni tshi amba fhethu fhano ni ri, ‘Ḽo vha ḽi soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu, hu si na vhathu, hu si na na tshifuwo.’ Naho zwo ralo miḓi ya Juda na mikoto ya Jerusalema yo ṱutshelwaho, hu sa dzuli vhathu kana phukha," 
Jeremiah33:11 hu ḓo dovha ha pfala mikosi hu tshi pembelwa ho takalwa, na maipfi a mukwasha na muselwa na maipfi a vhane vha ḓisa nduvho dza ndivhuho nḓuni ya Yahavee vha tshi ri, “ ‘Livhuhani Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe, Yahavee u na vhuthu; lufuno lwawe a lu dzinginyei lini na lini.’ “Ndi ḓo ita uri shango heḽi zwi dovhe zwi ḽi nakele unga kale. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Fhethu hafhano hu re soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu, hu si na vhathu, hu si na na tshifuwo, na miḓi yaho yoṱhe i ḓo dovha ya vha na pfulo hune vhalisa vha ḓo awedza masambi avho a dzinngu." 
Jeremiah33:13 Miḓini i re mivhunduni na thungo ya lwanzhe na miḓini ya Negeve na shangoni ḽa Benyamini, na miḓini yo tangaho Jerusalema, na miḓini ya Juda, hu ḓo dovha ha vha na vhalisa, vha ḓo dovha vha vhala nngu dzavho. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa misi ine nda ḓo khunyeledza zwe nda fulufhedzisa vhathu vha Israele na vhathu vha Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 “Misi yeneyo, tshifhinga tshenetsho ndi ḓo ita uri hu simuwe Ḓadzwane ḽi tshidzaho, kha lutsinga lwa Dafita; onoyo, khaṱhulo yawe i ḓo vha mbuya, a ita zwi re zwone shangoni." 
Jeremiah33:16 Misi yeneyo vha Juda vha ḓo tshidzwa, na Jerusalema u ḓo dzula u sa ofhi tshithu. U ḓo pfi: ‘U tshidzwa hashu ndi Yahavee’.”" 
Jeremiah33:17 Muṋe washu u ri, “Dafita ha nga kundwi u vha na munna a no ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Israele," 
Jeremiah33:18 nahone hu ḓo ḓi dzula hu na Vhalivi vha re vhotshifhe vha no nṋekedza nduvho dzi fhiswaho, vha fhisa nduvho ya thoro, vha nṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Nṋe Yahavee ndi ri: Arali wa kona u vhofholola mulanga we nda vhofha na masiari na vhusiku, masiari na vhusiku zwa si tsha ḓa nga tshifhinga tshazwo," 
Jeremiah33:21 ndi hone hu tshi nga vhofhololwa mulanga we nda vhofha na Dafita muḓinḓa wanga, na mulanga we nda vhofha na Vhalivi vha re vhotshifhe vha no ntshumela, Dafita a si tsha vha na muḓuhulu a no ḓo vhusa o dzula kha khuluṋoni yawe." 
Jeremiah33:22 Vhaḓuhulu vha Dafita muḓinḓa wanga na Vhalivi vhane vha nṋekedza nduvho ndi ḓo vha andisa vha nga ṋaledzi dza lutomboni dzi sa vhalei, vha ḓala unga muṱavha wa lwanzhe u sa kalei.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah33:24 “A wo ngo zwi pfa avha vhathu vha tshi ri, ‘Muṋe washu o laṱa mivhuso mivhili ye a i nanga’? U ralo ndi u nyadza vhathu vhanga, a vha tsha vha vhona vhe lushaka." 
Jeremiah33:25 Ndi zwine Nṋe Yahavee nda ri: Arali ndi songo vhofha mulanga na masiari na vhusiku, ndi songo vhea milayo ya ṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi," 
Jeremiah33:26 izwo na vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo na Dafita muḓinḓa wanga ndi ḓo vha landula, nda si tsha nanga muṅwe wa vhana vhawe uri a vhuse vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo. Ndi uri ndi ḓo vha khathutshela zwa dovha zwa vha nakela.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Musi Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele na mmbi yawe yoṱhe na mivhuso yoṱhe na tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dze a vha a tshi dzi vhusa vha tshi khou lwa na Jerusalema na miḓi i re tsini hawo, ha ḓa ipfi heḽi kha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah34:2 “Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Iyo vhudza Tsedekia khosi ya Juda u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Muḓi hoyu ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi u kumedza khosi ya Babele a u fhisa we lore." 
Jeremiah34:3 Na iwe a u nga vhuyi wa mu ponyoka, vhukumakuma u ḓo thubiwa wa kumedzwa ene. U ḓo vhona khosi ya Babele nga au maṱo, ú ḓo amba na iwe no livhana zwifhaṱuwo. U ḓo iswa Babele." 
Jeremiah34:4 “ ‘Nangwe zwo ralo iwe Tsedekia khosi ya Juda, thetshelesa zwine Yahavee a u fulufhedzisa. Yahavee a tshi amba iwe u ri: A u nga fi nga pfumo;" 
Jeremiah34:5 u ḓo fa nga mulalo. U tshi zwiṱwa vhathu vha ḓo vhasa mililo ya u u hulisa, sa zwe vha ita vha tshi hulisa vhokhotsi au na vhe vha vha mahosi iwe u sa athu, vha ḓo u lilela vha ri: Yawee, khosi yashu yo dzama! Nṋe nga dzanga ndi khou ana, ndi ralo. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ndi hone muporofita Jeremia a tshi vhudza Tsedekia khosi ya Juda zwoṱhe hezwo, vhe Jerusalema," 
Jeremiah34:7 musi mmbi ya khosi ya Babele i tshi khou dia muḓi wa Jerusalema na miṅwe miḓi ya Juda ye ya vha i tshi kha ḓi lwa, ndi Lakhishi na Azeka. Heyo miḓi mivhili ndi yone fhedzi yo tangedzwaho nga mitsheṱo ye ya vha yo sala kha ḽa Juda." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ho ḓa ipfi ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu musi khosi Tsedekia o no ita mulanga na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Jerusalema uri hu ḓivhadzwe uri phuli dzi vhofhololwe. 
Jeremiah34:9 Muṅwe na muṅwe o ita mulanga wa u vhofholola phuli dzawe dza Vhaheberu, dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi, ha pfi hu songo tsha wanala muthu a no ita Mujuda ngae phuli." 
Jeremiah34:10 Zwenezwo vhahulwane vhoṱhe na vhathu vhe vha dzhena kha uyo mulanga vha pfana uri vha ḓo vhofholola phuli dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi vha si tsha vha fareledza vhupulini; vha pfana, nangoho vha vha vhofholola." 
Jeremiah34:11 Hone ngavhuya vha shanduka, vha dzhiulula dziḽa phuli dze vha vha vho dzi vhofholola, vha dovha vha dzi dzhenisa vhupulini." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Ndo vhofha mulanga na vhomakhulukukuku waṋu musi ndi tshi vha pfulusa Egipita shangoni ḽe vha vha vhe dziphuli. Ndo ri," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu o fanela u vhofholola Muheberu wa hawe ufhio na ufhio we a ḓirengisa khae. Arali o no u shumela miṅwaha miṱanu na muthihi, u mu litshe a ḓiṱutshele.’ Huno vhokhotsi aṋu a vho ngo nthetshelesa, a vho ngo zwi londa." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ni kha ḓi bva u ḓisola na ita zwe nda vhona zwi zwone: Muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu o ḓivhadza uri u ḓo vhofholola wa hawe, na vhuya na vhofha mulanga ndi tshi zwi vhona, nḓuni ine ya pfi ndi yanga." 
Jeremiah34:16 Hone zwino no no shanduka na nyadzisa dzina ḽanga; muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu o dzhiulula phuli dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi dze a vha o dzi vhofholola uri dzi ye hune dza funa. No vha kombetshedza uri vha dovhe vha vhe phuli dzaṋu. 
Jeremiah34:17 “Huno-ha, Nṋe Yahavee ndi ri: A no ngo nthetshelesa; a no ngo ḓivhadza uri ni ḓo vhofholola vha haṋu. Zwino-ha Nṋe ndi ni ḓivhadza mbofholowo, Nṋe Yahavee ndi khou ralo – ndi mbofholowo ya u yo fa nga pfumo na dwadze na nḓala. Ndi ḓo ita uri mivhuso yoṱhe ya ḽifhasi i ofhe i tshi vhona zwe nda ni ita." 
Jeremiah34:18 Vhanna vho vhofhololaho mulanga, vha si khunyeledze zwine wa amba, uyo mulanga we vha u vhofha ndi tshi zwi vhona, ndi ḓo vha ita unga ṋamana ye vha i fhandula nga vhukati vha fhira vhukati ha lurumbu na lurumbu." 
Jeremiah34:19 Vharangaphanḓa vha Juda na Jerusalema, vhahulwane vha pfamo ya musanda, vhotshifhe na vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango vhe vha fhira vhukati ha zwipiḓa zwa ṋamana," 
Jeremiah34:20 ndi ḓo vha kumedza maswina ane a ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha. Zwitumbu zwavho zwi ḓo ḽiwa nga zwiṋoni na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka. 
Jeremiah34:21 Tsedekia khosi ya Juda na vhahulwane vhawe ndi ḓo vha kumedza maswina ane a ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha, ndi ḓo vha kumedza mmbi ya khosi ya Babele. Vha tshee vho ni ṱutshela," 
Jeremiah34:22 hone ndi ḓo vha vhidza, Nṋe Yahavee ndi khou ralo, ndi ḓo vha vhuisa hafhano muḓini houno. Vha ḓo lwa nawo, vha u kunda vha u fhisa we lore. Miḓi ya Juda ndi ḓo i phusukanya ha si tsha dzula muthu.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽe ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu musi hu tshi vhusa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, ḽo ri," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Iyo vhidza vha muṱa wa Vharekhaba vha ḓe kha luṅwe lufhera lwa nnḓu ya Yahavee u vha fhe waini vha nwe.” 
Jeremiah35:3 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi yo dzhia Jaasania ṅwana wa Jeremia, ṅwana wa Habatsinia, na vharathu vhawe na vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vha vhatuka – muṱa woṱhe wa Vharekhaba," 
Jeremiah35:4 nda vha ḓisa nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, nda vha dzhenisa lufherani lwa vhana vha Hanani ṅwana wa Igidalia muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu. Ho vha hu tsini na lufhera lwa vhahulwane lwe lwa vha lu nṱha ha lwa Maaseya ṅwana wa Shalumu mulindamuṋango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Nda vhea midzio yo ḓala waini, nda vhea na zwinwelo phanḓa ha vhanna vha muṱa wa Vharekhaba, nda vha vhudza nda ri, “Inwani iyi waini.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe a ri nwi waini; makhulukuku washu Jonadaba ṅwana wa Rekhaba o ri laya a ri, ‘Inwi na vhaḓuhulu vhaṋu, ni songo vhuya na nwa waini." 
Jeremiah35:7 Hafhu ni songo vhuya na fhaṱa nnḓu, ni songo lima masimu kana na sima minḓirivhe; zwithu zwo raloho ni songo vhuya na vha nazwo, tshaṋu hu vhe u dzula dzidenndeni. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo lalama shangoni ḽine na tendeleka khaḽo.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Ro ḓi thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwe makhulukuku washu Jonadaba ṅwana wa Rekhaba a ri laya. Riṋe na vhafumakadzi vhashu na vhana vhashu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana a ri athu vhuya ra nwa waini," 
Jeremiah35:9 a ri athu vhuya ra fhaṱa nnḓu dza u dzula ngomu kana ra vha na masimu a minḓirivhe kana masimu a goroi, a ri athu lima tsimu." 
Jeremiah35:10 Tshashu ho ḓi vha u dzula dzidenndeni ra tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe makhulukuku washu Jonadaba a ri laya. 
Jeremiah35:11 Ho tou ri musi Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a tshi dia shango ḽashu ra ri, ‘Nḓarieni ri ye Jerusalema ri shavhe mmbi dza Vhakhaladia na dza Vhaaramu.’ Ndi zwine ra vho dzula Jerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Zwenezwo ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Iyo vhudza vhathu vha Juda na vha Jerusalema u ri, ‘Ndi mini ni tshi lamba u nthetshelesa, ndi tshi ni laya ni sa pfi? Nṋe Yahavee ndi khou ralo." 
Jeremiah35:14 Jonadaba ṅwana wa Rekhaba o laya vhana vhawe uri vha si nwe waini, iyo ndayo vha ḓi i vhulunga. A vha nwi waini, na ṋamusi, ngauri vha thetshelesa zwe makhulukuku wavho a vha laya. Hone Nṋe ndo amba na inwi nda dovha, ni si nthetshelese." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ndo ruma vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhoṱhe vhaporofita ha inwi nda dovha. Vho ni vhudza vha ri, muṅwe na muṅwe nga a laṱe vhuvhi hawe a shandukise maitele awe; ni songo tevhela midzimu miṅwe na i shumela, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo dzula shangoni ḽe nda ṋea inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu. Hone izwo a no ngo zwi londa, a no ngo nthetshelesa." 
Jeremiah35:16 Vhaḓuhulu vha Jonadaba ṅwana wa Rekhaba vho tevhedzela zwe makhulukuku wavho a vha laya, hone vhathu avha vhone a vho ngo nthetshelesa.’" 
Jeremiah35:17 “Zwenezwo Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Thetshelesani! Vhathu vha Juda na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Jerusalema ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo dzoṱhe dze nda ri dzi ḓo vha wela. Ndo amba navho vha si thetshelese; ndo ḓi vha vhidza vha si aravhe.” 
Jeremiah35:18 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vhudza Vharekhaba a ri, “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘No thetshelesa zwe makhulukuku waṋu Jonadaba a ni laya, na tevhedza ndayo dzawe, na ita zwoṱhe zwe a ni vhudza.’" 
Jeremiah35:19 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Jonadaba ṅwana wa Rekhaba ha nga vhuyi a kundwa u vha na muḓuhulu ane a ntshumela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, ho ḓa ipfi ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Dzhia bugu u ṅwale maipfi oṱhe e nda u vhudza ndi tshi amba Israele na Juda na tshakha dziṅwe dzoṱhe tshee nda thoma u amba na iwe misi ya Josiasi u swika zwino. 
Jeremiah36:3 Khamusi vhathu vha Juda vha ḓo ri vha tshi pfa khombo dzoṱhe dze nda dzudzanya uri dzi vha wele, muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a litsha nḓila yawe mmbi, nda ḓo konou vha hangwela milandu yavho na vhutshinyi havho.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vhidza Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria, Jeremia a amba maipfi oṱhe e a vhudzwa nga Muṋe washu, Barukhu a konou a ṅwala kha yeneyo bugu." 
Jeremiah36:5 Zwino Jeremia a vhudza Barukhu a ri, “Nṋe ndo dzivhiswa; a thi koni u ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah36:6 Zwenezwo inwi ni ye nḓuni ya Muṋe washu nga ḓuvha ḽa u ḓidzima ni vhalele vhathu maipfi a Muṋe washu kha bugu iyi, e na a ṅwala nṋe ndi tshi khou amba. Ni a vhalele na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Juda vhane vha dzhena vha tshi bva miḓini ya havho." 
Jeremiah36:7 Khamusi vha ḓo luvhelela Muṋe washu, muṅwe na muṅwe a litsha nḓila dzawe mmbi, ngauri mbiti na ṱhamu dze Muṋe washu a ri dzi ḓo wela vhathu havha ndi khulu.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria o ita zwoṱhe zwe muporofita Jeremia a mu vhudza uri a ite; o ya thembeleni ya Muṋe washu a vhala maipfi a Muṋe washu e a vha o ṅwalwa buguni. 
Jeremiah36:9 Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu wa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, ha ḓivhadzwa tshifhinga tsha u ḓidzima phanḓa ha Muṋe washu hu tshi vhudzwa vhathu vhoṱhe vha re Jerusalema na vhane vha bva miḓini ya Juda." 
Jeremiah36:10 Barukhu a vhalela vhathu vhoṱhe maipfi a Jeremia o ṅwalwaho buguni vhe thembeleni ya Muṋe washu ene e lufherani lwa Gemaria ṅwana wa Shafani muṅwaleli, lwe lwa vha lu muṱani wa nṱha muṋangoni wa Khoro Ntswa ya thembele." 
Jeremiah36:11 Musi Mikaya ṅwana wa Gemaria, ṅwana wa Shafani, a tshi pfa maipfi oṱhe a Muṋe washu o ṅwalwaho kha bugu a tshi vhalwa," 
Jeremiah36:12 a tsela lufherani lwa muṅwaleli pfamoni ya musanda. Henefho ho vha ho kuvhangana vhahulwane vhoṱhe: Elishama muṅwaleli na Delaya ṅwana wa Shemaya na Elinathani ṅwana wa Akhiboro na Gemaria ṅwana wa Shafani na Tsedekia ṅwana wa Hanania na vhaṅwe vhahulwane vhoṱhe. 
Jeremiah36:13 Musi Mikaya o no vha vhudza zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho buguni zwe a pfa Barukhu a tshi vhalela vhathu," 
Jeremiah36:14 vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha ruma Jehudi ṅwana wa Nethania, ṅwana wa Shelemia ṅwana wa Khusi uri a vhudze Barukhu a ri, “Ḓisani bugu ye na vhalela vhathu, na inwi ni ḓe.” Zwenezwo Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria a ya khavho na bugu o i fara nga tshanḓa." 
Jeremiah36:15 Vha amba nae vha ri, “Edzonu dzula ni ri vhalele nandi!” Ndi hone Barukhu a tshi vha vhalela." 
Jeremiah36:16 Musi vha tshi pfa maipfi ayo oṱhe, vha ofha vha lavhelesana vha amba na Barukhu vha ri, “Ro fanela u ḓivhadza vhamusanda maipfi haya oṱhe.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Vha vhudzisa Barukhu vha ri, “Edzonu ri vhudza, zwo ḓa hani uri ni vhuye ni ṅwale zwoṱhe hezwi? Zwo ambiwa nga Jeremia?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Barukhu a fhindula a ri, “Ee, ndi ene o mmbudzaho maipfi oṱhe haya, nṋe nda a ṅwala buguni nga ennge.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Ndi hone vhahulwane vha tshi vhudza Barukhu vha ri, “Iwe na Jeremia iyani u dzumbama. Hu songo vha na muṅwe ane a ḓivha hune na vha hone.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Ndi hone vha tshi vhea iḽa bugu lufherani lwa Elishama muṅwaleli, vha ya ha khosi muṱani wa pfamo ya musanda vha mu vhudza zwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah36:21 Khosi ya ruma Jehudi uri a yo dzhia iyo bugu, Jehudi a yo i dzhia lufherani lwa Elishama muṅwaleli, a i vhalela khosi na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vho ima henefho tsini hawe." 
Jeremiah36:22 Ho vha hu nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa, khosi yo vha yo dzula pfamoni ya vhuriha, i tshi khou ora mulilo we vha vha vho vhasa ndongoni ya mulilo henefho phanḓa hawe." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi o vha tshi ri u vhala zwipiḓa zwiraru kana zwiṋa zwa iyo bugu, khosi ya zwi tshea nga kupanga ya zwi posa henefho ndongoni ya mulilo, bugu yoṱhe ya vhuya ya fhiswa muliloni." 
Jeremiah36:24 Khosi na vhaḓinḓa vhawe vhoṱhe vhe vha pfa maipfi ayo oṱhe a vho ngo vhuya vha tshenuwa, a vho ngo vhuya vha kherukanya nguvho dzavho." 
Jeremiah36:25 Naho Elinathani na Delaya na Gemaria vho luvhelela khosi uri a songo fhisa iyo bugu, ho ngo vhuya a vha thetshelesa," 
Jeremiah36:26 ene o sokou vhudza Jeramiele, ṅwana wa khosi, na Seraya ṅwana wa Azariele na Shelemia ṅwana wa Abidiele uri vha fare Barukhu muṅwali na Jeremia muporofita. Hone Muṋe washu o vha o vha dzumba." 
Jeremiah36:27 Musi khosi yo no fhisa bugu i re na maipfi o ṅwalwaho nga Barukhu a tshi tou vhudzwa nga Jeremia, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Dzhia iṅwe bugu u ṅwale maipfi aḽa oṱhe e a ṅwalwa kha bugu iḽa ya u thoma, ye Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda a fhisa." 
Jeremiah36:29 U vhudze Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Wo fhisa iḽa bugu wa ri: Ndi mini wo ṅwala khayo uri vhukumakuma khosi ya Babele i ḓo ḓa ya phusukanya shango ḽino ya lozwa vhathu na zwifuwo?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Zwenezwo Yahavee a tshi amba Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda u ri: Ha nga vhi na a no ḓo sala o dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Dafita; tshitumbu tshawe tshi ḓo poswa nnḓa tsha swa nga ḓuvha masiari, vhusiku tsha welwa nga mahaḓa." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndi ḓo pfisa ene vhuṱungu na vhana vhawe na vhaḓinḓa vhawe nga mulandu wa vhuvhi havho: vhone na vha no dzula Jerusalema na vhathu vha Juda ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo dzoṱhe dze nda bula uri dzi ḓo vha wela, nge vha si thetshelese.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi dzhia iṅwe bugu a i ṋea muṅwaleli wawe Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria, Jeremia a amba, Barukhu a ṅwala khayo maipfi oṱhe a iḽa bugu ye Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda a i fhisa muliloni. Ha engedzwa maṅwe maipfi manzhi ane a fana nao." 
Jeremiah37:1 Tsedekia ṅwana wa Josiasi o vhumbwa khosi ya Juda nga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele; o vhusa vhudzuloni ha Jehoyakhini ṅwana wa Jehoyakimu. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ene na magota awe na vhathu vha shango a vho ngo vhuya vha londa maipfi e Muṋe washu a amba nga muporofita Jeremia. 
Jeremiah37:3 Naho zwo ralo, khosi Tsedekia a ruma Jehukhala ṅwana wa Shelemia e na tshifhe Tsefania ṅwana wa Maaseya ha muporofita Jeremia na fhungo ḽi no ri, “Ri humbela uri u ri rabelele ha Mudzimu Muṋe washu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Nga hetsho tshifhinga Jeremia o vha o vhofholowa a tshi kha ḓi kona u ya hune a funa; o vha a sa athu hoṋelwa dzhele. 
Jeremiah37:5 Mmbi ya Babele yo vha i tshi khou govhela muḓi wa Jerusalema, hone vho ri u pfa uri mmbi ya Farao yo pfuka mukano wa Egipita, vha ṱuwa Jerusalema vha yo lwa na Vhaegipita." 
Jeremiah37:6 Zwenezwo ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha muporofita Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Vhudza khosi ya Juda we a u ruma uri u ḓe u mmbudzise, u ri, ‘Mmbi ya Farao, ye ya bva i tshi ḓa u ni lamulela, i ḓo humela shangoni ḽa hayo ḽa Egipita." 
Jeremiah37:8 Zwenezwo Vhababele vha ḓo vhuya, vha ḓa u dia uno muḓi; vha ḓo u thuba vha u fhisa we lore.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 Yahavee u ri: Ni songo ḓifhura na humbula na ri, ‘Vhukumakuma Vhababele vha ḓo ri ṱutshela.’ A vha nga ni ṱutsheleli!" 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangwe no vha ni tshi nga kunda mmbi ya Babele yoṱhe ine ya khou ni dia, ha tou sala dzikhuvhabvu fhedzi dzidenndeni, vho vha vha tshi ḓo ḓi bva vha ḓa u fhisa muḓi houno we lore.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Musi mmbi ya Babele yo no huma i tshi bva Jerusalema i tshi yo lwa na mmbi ya Farao," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia a ṱuwa afho muḓini a ya shangoni ḽa Benyamini u yo wana mukovhe wawe wa thundu kha vhathu vha henengei. 
Jeremiah37:13 Hone musi a tshi swika Khoroni ya Benyamini, muhulwane wa vhalindi, we a vha a tshi pfi Iriya ṅwana wa Shelemia, ṅwana wa Hanania, a mu fara a ri, “Iwe u khou shavhela kha Vhababele!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia a ri, “A si zwone! A thi khou shavhela ha Vhababele.” Hone Iriya a si mu thetshelese; a fara Jeremia a mu isa ha vhahulwane." 
Jeremiah37:15 Vha sinyutshela Jeremia vha ita uri a rwiwe, a hoṋelwe nḓuni ya muṅwaleli Jonathani, ngauri vho vha vho i ita dzhele." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jeremia a longwa dzhele ya fhasi ha mavu, a dzula hone tshifhinga tshilapfu." 
Jeremiah37:17 Ndi hone khosi Tsedekia a tshi mu vhidzisa, a ita uri a ḓiswe pfamoni, a mu vhudzisa nga tshiphiri a ri, “Hu na tshe Muṋe washu a vhuya a amba?” Jeremia a fhindula a ri, “Tshi hone: vhone vha ḓo kumedzwa khosi ya Babele.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vhudzisa khosi Tsedekia a ri, “Vhone kana magota avho kana vhathu avho ndo vha tshinyani, zwe nda vhuya nda hoṋelwa dzhele?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Vha ngafhi vhaḽa vhaporofita vhavho vhe vha vha porofitela vha ri, ‘Khosi ya Babele i nga si vha die, na shango heḽi i nga si ḽi die’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Huno zwino, vhone muṋe wanga vhamusanda nga vha thetshelese. Nga vha litshe ndi swikise khumbelo yanga khavho: Vha songo nkhumisela nḓuni ya muṅwaleli Jonathani; vha nkhumisela hone vhukuma ndi ḓo fa.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Zwenezwo khosi Tsedekia a ri Jeremia a vhewe muṱani wa vhalindi pfamoni ya vhamusanda, a ṋewe mukonde wa vhurotho ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na liṅwe u tshi bva tshiṱaraṱani tsha vhabiki vha vhurotho, vhurotho hoṱhe afho muḓini vhu vhuye vhu fhele. Jeremia a ḓi dzula muṱani wa vhalindi, pfamoni ya musanda." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatia ṅwana wa Mathani na Gedalia ṅwana wa Phashuru na Jehukhala ṅwana wa Shelemia na Phashuru ṅwana wa Malikia vho pfa zwe Jeremia a vha a tshi khou vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe a tshi ri," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ane a vhuya a sala muḓini houno u ḓo fa nga pfumo kana nḓala kana dwadze, huno ane a shavhela kha Vhababele ha nga fi, u ḓo ponyoka a tshila.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Vhukumakuma muḓi houno u ḓo kumedzwa mmbi ya khosi ya Babele, vha u thuba.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Ndi hone vhaḽa vhahulwane vha tshi vhudza khosi vha ri, “Hoyu munna ngavhe a tshi vhulawa. Vhahali vho salaho fhano muḓini na vhathu vhoṱhe u khou vha kula nungo nga zwine a vha vhudza. Hoyu munna ha ṱoḓi vhathu havha zwi tshi vha nakela, u ṱoḓa vha tshi welwa nga khombo.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Khosi Tsedekia a fhindula a ri, “U zwanḓani zwaṋu. A hu na tshine khosi ya ni dzivhisa.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ndi hone vha tshi dzhia Jeremia vha mu longa bidzini ḽa Malakhiya, ṅwana wa khosi, ḽe ḽa vha ḽi muṱani wa vhalindi pfamoni ya musanda. Vha tsisela Jeremia bidzini nga dzithambo; ḽo vha ḽi si na maḓi ngomu haḽo, hu tshi tou vha matope fhedzi, Jeremia a mbwandamela matopeni." 
Jeremiah38:7 Pfamoni ya musanda ho vha hu na muṅwe munna wa Mukushu o luvhedzwaho we a vha a tshi pfi Ebede Melekhe. Ene a zwi pfa uri vho longa Jeremia bidzini. Khosi yo vha i tshee yo dzula Khoroni ya Benyamini," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebede Melekhe a bva pfamoni a yo amba nae a ri," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Thovhele muṋe wanga, havha vhathu vho tshinya nga zwe vha ita muporofita Jeremia. Vho mu posa bidzini; u ḓo fa nga nḓala, a hu tshee na zwiḽiwa fhano muḓini.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Ebede Melekhe ya ri, “Dzhia vhanna vhararu u ṱuwe navho, ni yo bvisa muporofita Jeremia dindini a sa athu fa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebede Melekhe a mbo ḓi dzhia vhaḽa vhanna a ṱuwa navho, a livha lufherani lwa mbulungelo ya pfamo. A dzhia malakanṱhana na madzanganda henefho, a zwi tsisa nga thambo zwa tsela ha Jeremia dindini." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebede Melekhe wa Mukushu a amba na Jeremia a ri, “Kha vha dzhie malakanṱhana haya na madzanganda vha somedze magopwani avho uri thambo dzi si vha vhaise.” Jeremia a ita nga u ralo," 
Jeremiah38:13 vha mu kokodza nga dzithambo, vha mu bvisa bidzini, Jeremia a dzula muṱani wa vhalindi pfamoni ya musanda." 
Jeremiah38:14 Ndi hone khosi Tsedekia a tshi vhidzisa muporofita Jeremia, a ri a ḓiswe tshifhingoni tsha vhuraru tshi yaho thembeleni ya Muṋe washu. Khosi ya amba na Jeremia ya ri, “Ndi ṱoḓa u u vhudzisa tshiṅwe tshithu. U songo nnzumbela tshithu.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia a amba na Tsedekia a ri, “Arali nda vha fhindula a vha nga mmbulahi naa? Nangwe nda vha eletshedza, a vha nga nthetshelesi.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Hone khosi Tsedekia a anela Jeremia tshiphirini a ri, “Ndi ana nga Muṋe washu a tshilaho we a ri ṋea mufemo, ndi ri, ndi nga si u vhulahe, ndi nga si u kumedze vhane vha khou ṱoḓa u u vhulaha.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Huno Jeremia a vhudza Tsedekia a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Arali vha luvha magota a khosi ya Babele, a vha nga fi, na muḓi houno a u nga fhiswi; vhone na muṱa wavho ni ḓo tshila." 
Jeremiah38:18 Hone arali vha sa luvha magota a khosi ya Babele, muḓi houno u ḓo kumedzwa Vhababele vha u fhisa we lore; vha vha vhone vhamusanda, vha nga si ponyoke vha shavha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Khosi Tsedekia a vhudza Jeremia a ri, “Ndi ofha Majuda vhe vha shavhela kha Vhababele, ngauri Vhababele vha nga ḓo nkumedza vhone vha ntambudza.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia a fhindula a ri, “Vha nga si vha kumedze khavho. Vhone nga vha thetshelese Muṋe washu vha ite zwine nda vha vhudza. Ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo vha nakela, vha si vhulawe." 
Jeremiah38:21 Hone Muṋe washu o nnzumbululela a ri: Arali vha lamba u ḓikumedza," 
Jeremiah38:22 vhafumakadzi vhoṱhe vho salaho pfamoni ya khosi ya Juda vha ḓo bviswa vha ṋewa magota a khosi ya Babele. Vhafumakadzi vha ḓo vha rovhedza vha ri, “ ‘Khonani dzavho dze vha vha vha tshi dzi fulufhela dzo vha xedza, dza vha kunda. Milenzhe yavho yo mbwandamela matopeni; khonani dzavho dzo vha ṱutshela.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 “Vhafumakadzi vhavho vhoṱhe na vhana vhavho vha ḓo hwalwa vha iswa ha Vhababele. Vha vha vhone vha nga si ponyoke vha shavha, vha ḓo thubiwa nga khosi ya Babele; muḓi houno u ḓo fhiswa we lore.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Huno Tsedekia a vhudza Jeremia a ri, “U songo vhuya wa vhudza na muthu na muthihi hezwi zwe ra amba; wa amba u ḓo fa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Arali magota a zwi pfa zwauri ndo amba na iwe, vha ḓa ha iwe vha ri, ‘Ri vhudze zwe wa amba na vhamusanda; u songo ri dzumbela, wa ri dzumbela ri ḓo u vhulaha; vhamusanda vho u vhudzani?’" 
Jeremiah38:26 iwe u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Ndo vha ndi tshi khou luvhelela khosi uri a si nkhumisele nḓuni ya Jonathani nda yo fela hone.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Vhukuma magota oṱhe a ḓa ha Jeremia a mu vhudzisa, a vha vhudza zwenezwo zwe khosi ya ri a vha vhudze; vha si tsha mu vhudza tshithu, ngauri ho vha hu si na we a mu pfa a tshi amba na khosi." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jeremia a dzula muṱani wa vhalindi pfamoni ya musanda u swika Jerusalema u tshi thubiwa. 
Jeremiah39:1 Jerusalema wo thubiwa nga u rali: Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa Tsedekia khosi ya Juda, nga ṅwedzi wa fumi, Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele o ḓa na mmbi yawe yoṱhe a dia Jerusalema, a u govhela." 
Jeremiah39:2 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa wa ṅwaha wa 11 wa muvhuso wa Tsedekia mutsheṱo wa muḓi wa pwashiwa wa phuletshedzwa.
