Jeremiah39:3 Magota oṱhe a khosi ya Babele vha ḓa vha dzula Khoroni ya Vhukati. Ndi Neregala Saresere wa Sinimagiri, muhulwane wa dzigariki, ndi Nebo Sarisekhimu gota ḽihulwane, ndi muṅwe Neregala Saresere gota ḽa muḓivhalea, na magota maṅwe oṱhe a khosi ya Babele." 
Jeremiah39:4 Musi Tsedekia khosi ya Juda na vhahali vhoṱhe vha tshi vhona mutsheṱo wo phuletshedzwa, vha shavha, vha ṱutshela muḓi vhusiku vha bva nga nḓila ya ngadeni ya khosi, vha fhira nga khoro i re vhukati ha mitsheṱo mivhili, vhó livha Govhani ḽa Jorodani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Hone mmbi ya Vhababele ya vha pandamedza ya fara Tsedekia midavhini ya Jeriko. Vha mu fara vha mu isa ha Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele e Ribila shangoni ḽa Hamathi, a mu haṱula hone." 
Jeremiah39:6 Henefho Ribila khosi ya Babele ya vhulahisa vhana vha Tsedekia a tshi zwi vhona, a ita na u vhulaha vhahulwane vha Juda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Ndi hone a tshi nongola maṱo a Tsedekia, a mu vhofha nga tsimbi dza tshiṱhomola a mu isa Babele." 
Jeremiah39:8 Vhababele vha fhisa pfamo ya musanda na nnḓu dza vhathu, vha thutha mitsheṱo ya Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah39:9 Nebusaradani, ene mulangammbi, a hwala vhathu vho salaho muḓini a vha isa vhuthubwani Babele, vha ṱuwa na vhaḽa vhe vha shavhela khae, na vhaṅwe vhathu vhoṱhe." 
Jeremiah39:10 Hone Nebusaradani mulangammbi a sia vhaṅwe vhashai shangoni ḽa Juda, vhe vha vha vha si na tshavho; nga tshifhinga tshenetsho a vha ṋea masimu a minḓirivhe na maṅwe masimu." 
Jeremiah39:11 Zwino Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele o vha o vhudza Nebusaradani mulangammbi a tshi amba Jeremia a ri," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mu dzhie u mu londole; u songo mu huvhadza, u mu itele zwoṱhe zwine a humbela.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Zwenezwo Nebusaradani mulangammbi na Nebushasabani gota ḽihulwane na Neregala Saresere a re muḓivhalea na maṅwe magota oṱhe a khosi ya Babele 
Jeremiah39:14 vha ruma vhaḓinḓa vha yo dzhia Jeremia muṱani wa vhalindi. Vha mu isa ha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu, ṅwana wa Shafani, uri a mu vhuedzedze hayani ha hawe. Zwenezwo a dzula na vhathu vha hawe." 
Jeremiah39:15 Zwiḽa Jeremia a tshee o vhewa muṱani wa vhalindi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo ḓa khae ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Iyo vhudza Ebede Melekhe munna wa Mukushu u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi khunyeledza maipfi anga e nda amba nga muḓi houno; u ḓo welwa nga khombo, zwi nga si u nakele. Musi wonoyo zwi ḓo khunyelela u tshi zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah39:17 Huno musi wonoyo ndi ḓo u lamulela, u ralo Yahavee, a u nga kumedzwi vhane wa vha ofha." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ndi ḓo u tshidza; a u nga ḽiwi nga pfumo, u ḓo ponyoka wa tshila, ngauri u a mpfulufhela, u ralo Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ho ḓa ipfi ha Jeremia ḽi tshi bva ha Muṋe washu musi Nebusaradani mulangammbi o no mu vhofholola vhe Rama. O wana Jeremia o vhoxwa nga dzigeḓane e na mathubwa oṱhe a no bva Jerusalema na Juda vhe vha vha vha tshi khou hwalwa vha tshi iswa vhuthubwani Babele. 
Jeremiah40:2 Musi mulangammbi a tshi wana Jeremia a mu vhudza a ri, “Yahavee Mudzimu wau o amba uri fhano fhethu hu ḓo bvelela khombo hei." 
Jeremiah40:3 Zwino-ha Yahavee o ita uri i bvelele; o ita zwenezwiḽa zwe a ri u ḓo zwi ita. Zwoṱhe hezwi zwo bvelela nge inwi Majuda na khakhela Yahavee na si mu thetshelese. 
Jeremiah40:4 Huno ṋamusi ndi a u vhofholola geḓane dzo u vhofhaho zwanḓa. Arali u tshi zwi takalela u nga ṱuwa na nṋe ra ya Babele, nṋe ndi ḓo u londola; hone arali u sa funi u nga sala zwau. Vhona, shango ngeli, u nga ḓi ya hune wa funa.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Huno Jeremia a tshi kha ḓi timatima, Nebusaradani a dovha a ri, “Huma zwau u ye ha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani, we khosi ya Babele ya mu vhea uri a vhuse miḓi ya Juda, u dzule nae na vhathu, kana u ye hune wa funa.” Ndi hone mulangammbi a tshi mu ṋea na mbuvha na tshifhiwa a mu litsha a ḓiṱutshela." 
Jeremiah40:6 Huno Jeremia a ya ha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu e Mitsipha a dzula nae na vhathu vhe vha siwa henefho shangoni. 
Jeremiah40:7 Musi vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha mmbi na vhahali vhavho vhe vha vha vha tshee shangoni vha tshi zwi pfa uri khosi ya Babele yo vhea Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu uri a vhuse shango iḽo na uri a lange vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana – vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe vhashai vha vhashai shangoni, vhe vha vha vha songo hwaliwa vha iswa vhuthubwani Babele," 
Jeremiah40:8 vha ḓa ha Gedalia henefho Mitsipha – ndi Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania, na Johanani na Jonathani vhana vha Karia, na Seraya ṅwana wa Thanumethe na vhana vha Efai wa Netofa na Jesania a no bva Maakha na vhahali vhavho." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu, ṅwana wa Shafani, a vha fulufhedzisa nga muano a ri, “Ni songo ofha u shumela Vhababele. Dzulani shangoni heḽi ni shumele khosi ya Babele, ndi hone zwi tshi ḓo ni nakela." 
Jeremiah40:10 A vha nṋe ndi ḓo dzula Mitsipha nda ni imelela kha Vhakhaladia vhane vha ḓa ha riṋe, fhedzi inwi no fanela u fula nḓirivhe na mitshelo ya tshilimo na nyolivi, ni dzi hamule, mapfura ni shele nkhoni dzaṋu dza u vhulungela, na ḓidzulela miḓini ine na funa u dzula khayo.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Musi Majuda vha re Muaba na Amoni na Edomo na mashangoni maṅwe oṱhe vha tshi pfa uri khosi ya Babele yo sia tsalela kha ḽa Juda, a vhea Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani uri a vha vhuse," 
Jeremiah40:12 vhoṱhe vha humela shangoni ḽa Juda, ha Gedalia e Mitsipha, vha tshi bva mashangoni e vha vha vho balangana nao. Vha fula nḓirivhe nnzhi na mitshelo ya tshilimo." 
Jeremiah40:13 Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vha mmbi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi kha ḓi vha shangoni vha ḓa ha Gedalia e Mitsipha," 
Jeremiah40:14 vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “A vha zwi ḓivhi uri Baalisi khosi ya Vhaamoni o ruma Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania uri a vha vhulahe?” Hone Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu a si tende zwe vha amba." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ndi hone Johanani ṅwana wa Karia a tshi amba na Gedalia nga tshiphiri vhe Mitsipha a ri, “Nga vha litshe ndi yo vhulaha Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania, a hu nga vhi na a no ḓo zwi ḓivha. U ṱoḓa u vha vhulahelani, Majuda vhoṱhe vhane vha dzula navho vha tshi ḓo balangana, tsalela dza Juda dza lovha?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Hone Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu a fhindula Jonathani ṅwana wa Karia a ri, “U songo ita zwo raloho! U khou zwifhelela Ishmaele.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania ṅwana wa Elishama o vha e wa malofha a vhuhosini nahone e muṅwe wa vhahulwane vha khosi. Ene o ya ha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu e Mitsipha nga ṅwedzi wa 7 e na vhanna vha fumi. Huno musi vha tshi khou ḽa vhoṱhe henengei," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania na vhaḽa vhanna vha fumi vhe vha vha vhe nae vha mbo ḓi takuwa vha vhulaha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani nga pfumo, vha vhulaha ene we khosi ya Babele ya mu vhea uri a vhuse shango." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmaele a vhulaha na Majuda vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe na Gedalia henefho Mitsipha, a vhulaha na vhahali vha Vhababele vhe vha vha vhe henefho." 
Jeremiah41:4 Gedalia o ri u vhulawa, ḽi tshi tsha zwi sa athu ḓihwa nga muthu," 
Jeremiah41:5 ha ḓa vhanna vha 80 vhe vha vha vho vheula ndebvu vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho vha ḓitshetshekanya. Vho ḓa vha tshi bva Shikheme na Shilo na Samaria, vha tshi ḓisa nduvho dza mbeu na zwioro nḓuni ya Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania a ṱuwa Mitsipha u yo vha ṱanganedza, a enda a tshi lila. A ri u ṱangana navho a ri, “Iḓani ha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Vha tshi dzhena muḓini, Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania na vhanna vhe vha vha vhe nae vha mbo vha vhulaha, vha vha posa dindini." 
Jeremiah41:8 Hone vhaṅwe vhavho vha fumi vha amba na Ishmaele vha ri, “Vha songo ri vhulaha! Ri na goroi na baḽi na mapfura na mutoli, zwo dzumbiwa tsimuni.” Zwenezwo a mbo ḓi vha litsha, a si vha vhulahe na vhaḽa." 
Jeremiah41:9 Zwino dindi ḽe a posa zwitumbu zwoṱhe zwa vhanna vhe a vha vhulaha khathihi na Gedalia ndi ḽe ḽa vha ḽo bwiwa nga khosi Asa uri ḽi vhe ḽa u ḓitsireledza zwiḽa a tshi lwa na Baasha khosi ya Israele. Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania a tou ḽi ḓadza nga zwitumbu. 
Jeremiah41:10 Ishmaele a thuba vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe Mitsipha – vhananyana vha khosi khathihi na vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho sala henefho, vhe Nebusaradani mulangammbi a vhea Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu uri a vha vhuse. Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania a vha thuba, a fara lwendo uri a pfukele ha Vhaamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Musi Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha mmbi vhe vha vha vhe nae vha tshi pfa zwa vhugevhenga hoṱhe ho itwaho nga Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania," 
Jeremiah41:12 vha dzhia vhahali vhavho vhoṱhe vha yo lwa na Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania. Vha mu wana tsini ha isha ḽihulu ḽa Gibioni. 
Jeremiah41:13 Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe Ishmaele a vha e navho vha tshi vhona Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vha mmbi vhe vha vha vhe nae, vha takala." 
Jeremiah41:14 Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe Ishmaele a vha thuba Mitsipha vha rembuluwa vha ya ha Johanani ṅwana wa Karia. 
Jeremiah41:15 Hone Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania na vhahali vhawe vhaṱanu na vhararu vha ponyoka Johanani vha shavhela ha Vhaamoni. 
Jeremiah41:16 Ndi hone Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vha mmbi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vha tshi endedza tsalela dzoṱhe dza vhathu vhe Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania a vha hwala vha tshi bva Mitsipha musi o no vhulaha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu: vhanna na vhahali na vhasadzi na vhana na vhanna vho luvhedzwaho, vhe Johanani a vha vhuisa vha tshi bva Gibioni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Vha tshimbila, vha awela Geruthi Khimihamu tsini ha Betlehema nḓilani i no ya Egipita," 
Jeremiah41:18 uri vha shavhe Vhababele. Vho vha vha tshi vha ofha ngauri Ishmaele ṅwana wa Nethania o vha o vhulaha Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu, we khosi ya Babele a vha o mu vhea uri a vhuse iḽo shango." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ndi hone vhahulwane vha mmbi vhoṱhe, khathihi na Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na Jesania ṅwana wa Hoshaya, na vhathu vhoṱhe, vhaṱuku na vhahulwane vha tshi ḓa" 
Jeremiah42:2 ha muporofita Jeremia vha mu humbela vha ri, “Nga vha dzou thetshelesa khumbelo yashu, vha rabele Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho vha tshi rabelela tsalela hedzi dza vhathu dzoṱhe. Na vhone vha khou tou zwi vhona uri nangwe kale ro vhuya ra vha vhanzhi, zwino ro no tou sala ri vha si gathi." 
Jeremiah42:3 Nga vha rabele uri Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a ri vhudze hune ra fanela u livha hone na zwine ra fanela u zwi ita.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Muporofita Jeremia a fhindula a ri, “Ndo zwi pfa zwine na amba. Vhukumakuma ndi ḓo rabela Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu unga no humbela; ndi ḓo ni vhudza zwoṱhe zwine Muṋe washu a amba, a thi nga ni dzumbi tshithu.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Zwenezwo vha amba na Jeremia vha ri, “Ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi vha ṱhanzi i fulufhedzeaho ya ngoho, a ri vutshela arali ra sa tevhedza zwoṱhe zwine Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho a vha ruma uri vha ri vhudze." 
Jeremiah42:6 Arali zwi tshi takadza kana zwi sa takadzi, ri ḓo thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu ane ra khou vha ruma khae uri zwi ri nakele; ri ḓo thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Musi ho fhela maḓuvha a fumi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia. 
Jeremiah42:8 Ndi hone a tshi vhidza Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhoṱhe vhahulwane vha mmbi vhe vha vha vhe nae na vhathu vhoṱhe, vhaṱuku na vhahulwane, a vha kuvhanganya." 
Jeremiah42:9 A vha vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele we na nthuma khae uri ndi swikise khumbelo yaṋu, u ri," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Arali na dzula shangoni heḽi, ndi ḓo ni fhaṱa, a thi nga ni thuthi; ndi ḓo ni ṱavha, a thi nga ni tupuli, ngauri ndi pfa vhuṱungu zwe nda fanela u ni ḓisela khombo." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ni songo ofha khosi ya Babele ane zwino na mu ofha. Ni songo mu ofha, Nṋe ndi na inwi, ndi ḓo ni tshidza nda ni vhofholola zwanḓani zwawe. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndi ḓo ni pfela vhuṱungu uri na ene a ni khathutshele mbilu a ni humisele shangoni ḽaṋu.’ 
Jeremiah42:13 “Hone arali na ri, ‘A ri nga dzuli shangoni ḽino,’ na litsha u thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu," 
Jeremiah42:14 arali na ri, ‘Aiwa, ri ḓo pfulutshela Egipita, hune ra sa ḓo vhona nndwa kana ra pfa phalaphala ya nndwa kana ra pfa nḓala nga u shaya zwiḽiwa, ri yo dzula hone,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 zwino ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu inwi tsalela dza vhathu vha Juda. Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Arali no ḓiimisela u ya Egipita, na pfuluwa na yo dzula hone," 
Jeremiah42:16 zwenezwo pfumo ḽine na ḽi ofha ḽi ḓo ni ḽa henengei, na nḓala ine na i ofha i ḓo ni tevhela henefho Egipita, ni ḓo fela henengei." 
Jeremiah42:17 Vhoṱhe vho ḓiimiselaho u pfulutshela Egipita vha yo dzula hone vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vha fa nga nḓala na dwadze, a hu na na muthihi wavho a no ḓo sala a tshi tshila kana a ponyoka khombo ine nda ḓo vha ḓisela yone.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Vhunga mbiti dzanga na u sinyuwa hanga zwo shulutshela kha vha dzulalo Jerusalema, zwenezwo u sinyuwa hanga hu ḓo shulutshela kha inwi arali na ya Egipita. Vhathu vha ḓo ni sanda, vha ni nyadza, vha teketelana nga dzina ḽaṋu, vha ni sea; fhethu hafhano a ni tsha ḓo dovha na hu vhona.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Inwi tsalela dza vhathu vha Juda, Muṋe washu o ni vhudza a ri, ‘Ni songo ya Egipita.’ Ḓivhani uri: ṋamusi ndi a ni kaidza" 
Jeremiah42:20 ndi ri ni khou ḓifhura ni tshi nthuma ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu na ri, ‘Ri rabelele ha Muṋe washu Mudzimu washu; ri vhudze zwoṱhe zwine a amba, ri ḓo zwi ita.’ Ni ḓo ḓilozwa!" 
Jeremiah42:21 Ndo ni vhudza ṋamusi, naho zwo ralo a no ngo thetshelesa Muṋe washu Mudzimu waṋu kha tshithu na tshithihi tshe a nthuma uri ndi ni vhudze." 
Jeremiah42:22 Zwino-ha, ḓivhani uri: Ni ḓo fa nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze fhethu hune na tama u yo dzula hone.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Musi Jeremia a tshi fhedza u vhudza vhathu maipfi oṱhe a Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho – zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a mu ruma uri a vha vhudze – 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria ṅwana wa Hoshaya na Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhanna vhoṱhe vha u ḓihudza vha vhudza Jeremia vha ri, “U khou zwifha! Mudzimu Muṋe washu ho ngo u ruma u ḓa u amba uri ri songo ya Egipita ra yo dzula hone." 
Jeremiah43:3 Ndi Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria ane a khou u luṱanya na riṋe uri u ri kumedze Vhababele vha ri vhulahe kana vha ri hwale vha ri ise vhuthubwani Babele.” 
Jeremiah43:4 Huno Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vha mmbi vhoṱhe na vhathu vhoṱhe vha nyadza zwe Muṋe washu a amba a tshi ri vha dzule shangoni ḽa Juda. 
Jeremiah43:5 Johanani ṅwana wa Karia na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha mmbi vha pfulusa tsalela dzoṱhe dza vhathu vha Juda vhe vha vha vho vhuelela u yo dzula shangoni ḽa Juda vha tshi bva kha tshakha dzoṱhe he vha vha vho balanganela hone – 
Jeremiah43:6 vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana na vhananyana vha khosi vhe Nebusaradani mulangammbi a vha o vha sia na Gedalia ṅwana wa Ahikamu ṅwana wa Shafani, vha dzhia na muporofita Jeremia na Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Vha swika Egipita nga u sa thetshelesa Muṋe washu vha vhuya vha swika Thaphanese. 
Jeremiah43:8 Henengei Thaphanese ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha Jeremia ḽa ri," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Dzhia maṅwe matombo mahulu u a fukedze vumbani luḓilanani lwo fhaṱwaho nga zwidina tshifhingoni tsha pfamo ya Farao fhano Thaphanese, u zwi ite Majuda vha tshi khou sedza." 
Jeremiah43:10 Zwenezwo u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Ndi ḓo vhidzisa muḓinḓa wanga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, nda tea khuluṋoni yawe nṱha ha matombo haya e nda a bwela hafhano; u ḓo akha dennde yawe ya vhuhosi nṱha hao." 
Jeremiah43:11 U ḓo ḓa a dia Egipita, a vhulaha vho livhanywaho na lufu, a thuba vho livhanywaho na u thubiwa, vho livhanywaho na pfumo a vha runga nga pfumo." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndi ḓo funga thembele dza midzimu ya Egipita nga mulilo; u ḓo fhisa thembele dza midzimu, yone a i hwala a i isa vhuthubwani. U ḓo ṱangula shango ḽa Egipita unga mulisa a tshi tanya nnda dza nguvho yawe, a ṱuwa hu si na tshi no mu thithisa." 
Jeremiah43:13 Thembeleni ya Ḓuvha ngei Egipita u ḓo thutha phuphu dza midzimu, a fhisa thembele dza midzimu ya Egipita dze lore.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Ipfi heḽi ḽo ḓela Jeremia ḽi tshi amba Majuda vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Egipita, miḓini ya Migidolo na Thaphanese na Memfisi na thungo ya tshipembe ya shango, ḽi ri," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Inwi vhaṋe no vhona khombo khulu ye nda i ḓisa Jerusalema na miḓini ya Juda. Ṋamusi a i tsha dzula vhathu, ndi matumba" 
Jeremiah44:3 nga mulandu wa vhuvhi he vha ita. Vho ntsinyusa nga u fhisa zwioro na nga u luvha midzimu isili ye vhone vhaṋe na inwi na vhokhotsi avho vha si vhuye vha i ḓivha. 
Jeremiah44:4 Ndo ruma vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita nda dovha ndi tshi ri, ‘Ni songo ita zwithu hezwi zwi nengisaho zwine nda zwi vhenga!’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Hone a vho ngo thetshelesa, a vho ngo zwi londa, a vho ngo laṱa vhutshinyi havho, a vho ngo litsha u fhisela miṅwe midzimu zwioro." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ndi zwe mbiti dzanga dzi ofhisaho dza shuluwa; ndo sinyutshela miḓi ya Juda na magondo a Jerusalema nda zwi ita matumba a sa dzuli muthu sa zwine ṋamusi zwa vhonala zwo ralo. 
Jeremiah44:7 “Zwino Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ri: Ndi mini ni tshi ḓihwesa khombo nngafhangafha nga u lozwa vhanna na vhasadzi na vhana na dzitshetshe kha ḽa Juda, na sala ni si tshee na tsalela dza vhathu?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ndi mini ni tshi ntsinyusa nga midzimu ye na ita nga zwanḓa zwaṋu, na dubisela miṅwe midzimu zwioro fhano Egipita, he na yo dzula hone? Ni ḓo ḓilozwa, vhathu vha teketelana nga dzina ḽaṋu, na nyadziwa nga tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi." 
Jeremiah44:9 No no hangwa vhuvhi ho itwaho nga vhokhotsi aṋu na nga mahosi na vhafumakadzi vha Juda na vhuvhi he inwi na vhasadzi vhaṋu na ita shangoni ḽa Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema naa? 
Jeremiah44:10 Na ṋamusi a vha athu ḓiṱukufhadza kana vha nnyofha, a vha athu tevhedza mulayo wanga na ndayo dze nda vhetshela inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu.”" 
Jeremiah44:11 “Zwenezwo, Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, ‘Ndo ḓiimisela u ni ḓisela khombo, nda lozwa ḽa Juda ḽoṱhe." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ndi ḓo lozwa tsalela dza vhathu vha Juda vho ḓiimiselaho u ya Egipita u yo dzula hone. Vhoṱhe vhahulwane na vhaṱuku vha ḓo lovhela Egipita; vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vha fa nga nḓala. Vhathu vha ḓo vha sanda, vha vha nyadza, vha teketelana nga dzina ḽavho, vha vha sea." 
Jeremiah44:13 Vha no dzula Egipita ndi ḓo vha vhulaha nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze, nda vha ita zwe nda ita vha Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah44:14 A hu na na muthihi wa tsalela dza vhathu vha Juda vhe vha yo dzula Egipita a no ḓo ponyoka kana a tshila a dovha a humela shangoni ḽa Juda ḽine vha ṱuvha u humela khaḽo vha dzula khaḽo; a hu na a no ḓo humela hone, hu ḓo tou vhuelela tshavhi dzi si gathi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Huno vhanna vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓivha uri vhasadzi vhavho vha dubisela miṅwe midzimu zwioro, khathihi na vhasadzi vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe henefho – gogo ḽihulu – na vhathu vhoṱhe vhane vha dzula tshipembe ha Egipita, vha amba na Jeremia vha ri," 
Jeremiah44:16 “A ri nga thetshelesi zwe wa ri vhudza nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu! 
Jeremiah44:17 Vhukumakuma ri ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwe ra ri ri ḓo ita: Ri ḓo dubisela Mufumakadzi wa ṱaḓulu zwioro, ra mu tevhulela thevhula sa zwe riṋe na vhokhotsi ashu na mahosi ashu na vhahulwane vhashu ra ita miḓini ya Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema. Misi yeneyo ro vha ri na zwiḽiwa zwinzhi, ro pfuma, ri sa vhoni khombo." 
Jeremiah44:18 Hone tshee ra litsha u dubisela Mufumakadzi wa ṱaḓulu zwioro, ra si tsha mu tevhulela thevhula, ri vho shaya, ri khou lovha nga pfumo na nḓala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Vhasadzi vha ḓadzisa vha ri, “Zwiḽa ri tshi dubisela Mufumakadzi wa ṱaḓulu zwioro, ra mu tevhulela thevhula, vhanna vhashu vho vha vha sa zwi ḓivhi kani uri ro vha ri tshi bika khekhe ra mu fanyisa ngadzo, ra mu tevhulela thevhula?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Ndi hone Jeremia a tshi vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe, vhanna na vhasadzi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou mu fhindula, a ri," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Zwiḽa zwioro zwe zwa vha zwi tshi fhiswa nga inwi na vhokhotsi aṋu na mahosi aṋu na vhahulwane vhaṋu na vhathu zwavho miḓini ya Juda na mikotoni ya Jerusalema, ni vhona unga Muṋe washu o vha a sa zwi ḓivhi, o zwi hangwa naa?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Musi Muṋe washu a si tsha kona u konḓelela zwiito zwaṋu zwivhi na zwi nengisaho zwe na ita, a phusukanya shango ḽaṋu ḽa sala ḽi soga ḽi sa dzuli muthu, vhathu vha vho teketelana ngaḽo sa zwine ḽa vha zwone ṋamusi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Vhunga ni tshi khou zwi vhona, no welwa nga khombo nge na dubisa zwioro na khakhela Muṋe washu na si thetshelese mulayo wawe na ndaela dzawe dze a ri dzi itwe.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Zwenezwo Jeremia a amba na vhathu vhoṱhe khathihi na vhasadzi a ri, “Inwi vhathu vha Juda noṱhe ni re Egipita, ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu!" 
Jeremiah44:25 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Inwi na vhasadzi vhaṋu no sumbedza nga zwiito zwaṋu zwe na ana zwiḽa ni tshi ri, ‘Vhukumakuma ri ḓo khunyeledza zwe ra ana ra ri ri ḓo dubisa zwioro ra tevhulela Mufumakadzi wa ṱaḓulu thevhula.’ Zwenezwo isani phanḓa, itani zwe na ana! Khunyeledzani muano waṋu!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Hone inwi Majuda noṱhe ni no dzula Egipita, ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Nṋe Yahavee ndi ana nga dzina ḽanga ḽihulu, ndi ri a hu na na muthihi a no bva kha ḽa Juda a no khou dzula huṅwe Egipita a no ḓo dovha a ana nga dzina ḽanga a ri: Nga Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a tshilaho." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ndi dzula ndo vha vhea iṱo uri ndi vha huvhadze, a thi nga vha takadzi; Majuda vha re Egipita vha ḓo lovha nga pfumo na nḓala vha vhuye vha lozwiwe vhoṱhe." 
Jeremiah44:28 Vhane vha ponyoka pfumo, vha humela shangoni ḽa Juda vha tshi bva Egipita vha ḓo vha vha si gathi. Ndi hone tsalela dzoṱhe dza vhathu vha Juda vhe vha pfulutshela Egipita vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ipfi ḽi sa weli fhasi ndi ḽanga kana ndi ḽavho." 
Jeremiah44:29 “ ‘Hetshi tshi ḓo vha tshone tshiga tshine na ḓo vhona ngatsho uri ndi dzula ndo ni vhea iṱo, ndi ḓo ni pfisa vhuṱungu hafhano fhethu,’ u ralo Muṋe washu, ‘uri ni ḓivhe uri zwe nda ri ndi ḓo ni huvhadza, vhukumakuma a zwi nga weli fhasi.’" 
Jeremiah44:30 Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Farao Hofra khosi ya Egipita ndi ḓo mu kumedza maswina awe vhane vha ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha, sa zwe Tsedekia khosi ya Juda nda mu kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, ḽone swina ḽawe ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Hezwi ndi zwe muporofita Jeremia a vhudza Barukhu ṅwana wa Neria nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda zwiḽa Barukhu a tshi ṅwala kha bugu maipfi e a vha a tshi khou vhudzwa nga Jeremia, a ri," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele a tshi vhudza inwi Barukhu u ri," 
Jeremiah45:3 ‘Wo ri: A thi tsha kona! Yahavee o engedza u ṱungufhala kha vhuṱungu vhune nda vhu pfa; ndo fhelela nga tshigomelo, a thi vhuyi nda awela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Mu vhudze u ri: Nṋe muṋe ndi khou thutha zwe nda fhaṱa, nda tupula zwe nda ṱavha, shangoni ḽoṱhe." 
Jeremiah45:5 Zwino iwe wo fanela u ḓiṱodela zwithu zwihulwane naa? U songo zwi ṱoḓa. Ndi ḓo ḓisela vhathu vhoṱhe khombo, hone iwe hoṱhe hune wa ya ndi ḓo u litsha wa ponyoka wa tshila. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽe ḽa ḓa ha muporofita Jeremia ḽi tshi amba dzitshakha: 
Jeremiah46:2 Hu tshi ambiwa Egipita hu pfi: Ngea mafhungo a no amba mmbi ya Farao Nikho khosi ya Egipita, ye ya kundwa i Kharakhemishi mulamboni wa Yufuratha, i tshi kundwa nga Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Jehoyakimu ṅwana wa Josiasi khosi ya Juda, hu pfi, “Vhalangammbi vha Egipita vha vhidza vhahali vhavho vha ri," 
Jeremiah46:3 “ ‘Lugisani zwiṱangu zwaṋu, zwihulwane na zwiṱuku!’ ‘Ibvani pfumo!’" 
Jeremiah46:4 ‘Bere nga dzi longwe ḓomo!’ ‘Dzi nameleni!’ ‘Imani vhuimoni haṋu!’ ‘Ambarani nguwane!’ ‘Ṱuṱulani mafumo!’ ‘Ambarani philamuvhili!’ 
Jeremiah46:5 Ndi khou vhona mini? Vho farwa nga nyofho, vha khou humela murahu, vhahali vhavho vho kundwa, vha khou shavha nga luvhilo, a vha tsha sedza murahu, vho no tou tangwa nga zwi ofhisaho,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Vha luvhilo a vha koni u shavha, vhahali a vha koni u ponyoka. Ngei devhula mulamboni wa Yufuratha vha khukhulwa vha wa." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Ndi nnyi uyo a no raha unga Nile, a nga milambo yo ḓalaho ya unga?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ndi Egipita ḽi no raha unga Nile, ḽi nga milambo yo ḓalaho ya unga. Ḽi ri, ‘Ndi ḓo raha nda ḓadza ḽifhasi; ndi ḓo lozwa miḓi na vhathu vhayo.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Inwi dzibere, vha weleni! Inwi dzigariki, kunguluwani! Inwi vhahali, kandelani phanḓa, inwi vhanna vha Kushu na Phuthi no faraho zwiṱangu, inwi vhanna vha Lidia no akhaho vhura!" 
Jeremiah46:10 “Ḓivhani uri heḽo ḓuvha ndi ḽa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Ene Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, ndi ḓuvha ḽa ndifhedzo, u lifhedza maswina awe. Pfumo ḽi ḓo ḽa ḽa fura, ḽa tou dzimula ḓora nga malofha. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Ene Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ḓo ṱhavha tshiṱhavhelo shangoni ḽa devhula, mulamboni wa Yufuratha.”" 
Jeremiah46:11 “Iwe musidzana Egipita wee, gonya Giliadi u yo dzhia mushonga. U andisa hau mishonga ndi mahandana; mbonzhe dzi nga si fhole." 
Jeremiah46:12 Tshakha dzo zwi pfa u tshi shoniswa, zwililo zwau zwo ṱanganya ḽifhasi. Vhahali vha ḓo khukhulana vhuvhili havho vha wela fhasi.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Ngea mafhungo e Muṋe washu a vhudza muporofita Jeremia a tshi amba u ḓa ha Nebukhadnetsara a tshi ḓa u dia Egipita, hu pfi:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Zwi ḓivhadze kha ḽa Egipita, u zwi anḓadze Migidolo; ṱavha mukosi u pfale Memfisi na Thaphanese u ri, ‘Imani vhuimoni haṋu ni ḓilugise, pfumo ḽi vho ḽa vhe na ṋekana masakha navho.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Khezwi Apisi o shavha? Mudzimu waṋu wa mboho wo shavha? Muṋe washu o u pandela. 
Jeremiah46:16 Vhahali vhe Farao a vha thola kha tshakha dziṅwe vha khou khukhulwa vha dovha; vha khou welana nṱha. Vha khou vhudzana vha ri, ‘Takuwa, nga ri humele murahu, ri ye ha hashu, mashangoni a hashu, ri shavhe pfumo ḽi ri ḽaho.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Henengei vha ḓo ṱavha mukosi vha ri, ‘Farao khosi ya Egipita mu rineni dzina: kha tou pfi Luambo! O wana mbulu e mbu-mbu-mbu, tshifhinga tsha fhela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:18 Khosi, ine dzine ḽayo ḽa pfi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, i ri, “Ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga ndi ri, hu ḓo ḓa ane a nga Thaboro vhukati ha dzithavha, a nga Kharamele tsini ha lwanzhe." 
Jeremiah46:19 Iwe Egipita, musidzana o ṱangulwaho, hwala thundu dzau u ye vhuthubwani, Memfisi u ḓo sala u soga, ú matumba a sa dzuli muthu." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Egipita ndi tholehadzi yo nakaho, i khou ḓelwa nga phuvhe i tshi bva devhula." 
Jeremiah46:21 Vhahali vhaḽo vho rendelwaho vha nga ṋamana dzo noniswaho. Na vhone vha ḓo rembuluwa vha shavha vhoṱhe, vha nga si ime vha khwaṱha, vha khou welwa nga musi wa khombo, ndi tshifhinga tshine vha fanela u lifhedzwa." 
Jeremiah46:22 Egipita ḽi ḓo xuxudza unga ṋowa i tshi shavha, musi mmbi ya maswina i tshi sendela; vha ḓo ḽi wela nga dzitsanga, zwa nga vhanna vha tshi rema miri." 
Jeremiah46:23 Vha ḓo rema maṱaka aḽo, naho o pinzana hani,” u ralo Muṋe washu. “Vho anda u fhira lutsinga lwa nzie, a vha vhalei." 
Jeremiah46:24 Vhathu vha Egipita vha ḓo shoniswa, vha ḓo kumedzwa vhathu vha Devhula.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi lifhedza Amoni mudzimu wa Thebese, na Farao na Egipita na midzimu yaḽo na mahosi aḽo na vhane vha ḓitika nga Farao." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndi ḓo vha kumedza vhane vha ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha, ndi ḓo vha kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele na magota awe. Nangwe zwo ralo, ngavhuya Egipita ḽi ḓo dovha ḽa dzulwa unga kale.” U ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Iwe Jakopo muḓinḓa wanga, u songo ofha tshithu; Iwe Israele, u songo hanganea. Vhona, ndi ḓo u lamulela nda u bvisa shangoni ḽa kule, nda bvisa vhaḓuhulu vhau shangoni ḽe vha thubelwa khaḽo. Jakopo u ḓo dovha a vha na mulalo, a pfa a si tsha ofha tshithu, shango ḽi ḓo lala, a hu na a no ḓo ofhisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Iwe Jakopo muḓinḓa wanga, u songo ofha tshithu, Nṋe ndi na iwe,” u ralo Muṋe washu. “Naho tshakha dze nda ni balanganyela khadzo ndo dzi lozwa dzoṱhe, iwe a thi nga u lozwi tshoṱhe. Ndi ḓo tou u laya nga khaṱhulo mbuya, a thi nga u litshi u tshi bva ú songo wana ṱhamu.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽe ḽa ḓa ha muporofita Jeremia ḽi tshi amba Vhafilista zwiḽa Farao a sa athu dia Gaza, ḽi ri:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Muṋe washu u ri, “Maḓi ngeaḽaa a khou fhufhuma a tshi bva devhula; a ḓo ḓadza milambo ya fhalala ya kumba zwoṱhe. A ḓo tiba shango na zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo, miḓi na vha no dzula khayo. Vhathu vha ḓo ṱavha mukosi; vhoṱhe vha no dzula shangoni vha ḓo ongolela" 
Jeremiah47:3 vha tshi pfa mutsindo wa bere dzi tshi gada, vha tshi pfa phosho ya gariki dza maswina na u kunguluwa ha malinga. Vhokhotsi a vha nga rembuluwi vha farisa vhana vhavho; zwanḓa zwavho zwi ḓo kulea nungo zwa nembelela." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ḓuvha ḽa u lozwa Vhafilista ḽo swika, ḽa u vhulaha tsalela dzoṱhe dza vhathu vhane vha nga farisa Tiro na Sidoni. Yahavee u ḓo ṱuwa a tshi lozwa Vhafilista, dzone tsalela dza vhathu vha no bva khunzikhunzini dza Khrita." 
Jeremiah47:5 Muḓi wa Gaza u ḓo ṱungufhala wa palula ṱhoho; Ashkeloni a hu tsha ḓo pfala ipfi. Inwi tsalela dza vhathu vha mudavhini ni ḓo lila na tou ḓitshetshekanya u swika lini? 
Jeremiah47:6 Ni a lila na ri, ‘Yawee, pfumo ḽa Yahavee! U ḓo litsha lini u runga? Humela kha mukutu wau u awele u tshetee!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Huno ḽi nga awela hani ḽó ruṅwa nga Yahavee, Ene ó ḽi vhudza uri ḽi die Ashkeloni na khunzikhunzi?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Hu tshi ambiwa Muaba hu pfi: Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Muḓi wa Nebo u ḓo zwi vhona, u ḓo sala u matumba. Kiriathaimi u ḓo thubiwa wa shona; vhushavhelo vhu ḓo phusukanywa ha shona." 
Jeremiah48:2 Muaba a ḽi tsha ḓo khoḓwa; vhathu vha langana u ḽi phusukanya vhe Hesheboni vha ri, ‘Iḓani ri yo fhedza lushaka holuḽa.’ Na kha iwe Mademene a hu tsha ḓo pfala ipfi; pfumo ḽi ḓo u sala murahu." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ipfani mikosi ya Horonaimi, ndi mikosi ya phusuphusu na ndozwo khulu." 
Jeremiah48:4 Muaba ḽo phusukanywa; tshililo tshi pfala u swika Tsuara. 
Jeremiah48:5 Vho fara nḓila ya Luhithi, vha enda vha tshi tswimila lu ṱungufhadzaho; nḓilani i no tsela Horonaimi hu pfala zwililo zwa vhuṱungu hu tshi lilelwa iyo ndozwo." 
Jeremiah48:6 Shavhani! Gidimani ni sa ḓo fa; ni nge mbiḓi ya phangani. 
Jeremiah48:7 Vhunga ni tshi fulufhela lupfumo lwaṋu na mitsheṱo ye na fhaṱa, na inwi ni ḓo thubiwa. Khemosho mudzimu waṋu u ḓo hwalwa wa iswa vhuthubwani khathihi na vhotshifhe vhawo na vhahulwane vhawo." 
Jeremiah48:8 Miḓi yoṱhe i ḓo welwa nga mulozwi, a hu na na muḓi u no ḓo ponyoka. Govha ḽi ḓo phusukanywa, mudavhi u ḓo ṱangulwa. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah48:9 Hashani muṋo masimuni a Muaba, uri a si tsha liṅwa; hu si kale ḽi ḓo vha soga; miḓi yaḽo i ḓo ṱutshelwa, ya si tsha dzula muthu." 
Jeremiah48:10 “A sa iti mushumo wa Yahavee nga mbilu nthihi nga a teketelwe! Nga hu teketelwe a sa shululi malofha nga pfumo ḽawe!” 
Jeremiah48:11 “Muaba a ḽi athu vhuya ḽa iswa vhuthubwani; ḽo vha ḽo ḓi dzika u bva hanani haḽo, ḽi tshi nga waini yo dzikaho i songo shululwaho i tshi bva kha ino mvuvhelo ya shelwa kha iḽa; muḓifho waḽo u kha ḓi vha wonouḽa wa kale, u nukhelela haḽo a ho ngo shanduka.”" 
Jeremiah48:12 Hone Muṋe washu u ri, “Hu khou ḓa misi ine nda ḓo ruma vhathu vha no shulula dzimvuvhelo, vha ḓo ḽi shulula vha pwasha madzhomela aḽo." 
Jeremiah48:13 Zwenezwo Muaba ḽi ḓo shona nga Khemosho, unga nnḓu ya Israele yo shona zwiḽa vha tshi fulufhela Bethele." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Ndi mini ni tshi ri, ‘Ri vhahali nndwani, govholanoni ri na tshivhindi, a ri ofhi tshithu’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Muaba ḽi ḓo phusukanywa, vhaphusukanyi vhaḽo vha nḓilani; vhaṱhanngana vhavho vhone-vhone vha ḓo shidzhwa,” i ralo Khosi ine ya pfi Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Muaba ḽi ḓo ṱuwa ḽi tshi fhalala; khombo yaḽo a i nga lengi u ḓa. 
Jeremiah48:17 Inwi noṱhe no ḽi tangaho, noṱhe ni no ḓivha bvumo ḽaḽo, ḽi lileleni ni ri, ‘Yawee, luḓo lwa maanḓa lwo vunḓea, muvhuso wa vhugala wo phusukanywa!’ ”" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Inwi vhathu vha Diboni, itsani kha vhugala haṋu, dzulani fhasi mavuni o omaho; mulozwi wa Muaba u ḓo ni ḓela, a phusukanya miḓi yau ya vhushavhelo." 
Jeremiah48:19 Inwi ni no dzula Aruere, imani gondoni ni sedze. Vhudzisani vhanna vha no khou shavha na vhasadzi vha ponyokaho ni ri, ‘Ho iteani?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Vha ḓo fhindula vha ri, ‘Muaba ḽo phusukanywa ḽa shona.’ Honḓani ni tou ṱavha mukosi! Ḓivhadzani mulamboni wa Arinoni uri Muaba ḽo phusukanywa." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Khaṱhulo yo ḓa miḓini ya zwivhangani: Holoni na Jahasa na Mifaathi," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni na Nebo na Bethe Dibulathaimi," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaimi na Bethe Gamulu na Bethe Mioni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriotho na Botsora. Khaṱhulo yo ḓela miḓi yoṱhe ya Muaba, ya kule na ya tsini." 
Jeremiah48:25 “Nungo dza Muaba dzo kulea, tshanḓa tshaḽo tsho vunḓea,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Ḽi kambiseni, ḽo nyadza Yahavee. Muaba nga ḽi vhumbuluwe maṱanzani aḽo; vhathu nga vha ḽi shonedze." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israele wo vha u sa khou ḽi shonedza naa? Kani ḽo vha ḽo farwa na mafobvu, hezwi u tshi ḽi nyadza wa ita na u dzungudza ṱhoho misi yoṱhe u tshi ḽi amba?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Inwi ni dzulaho Muaba, ṱutshelani miḓi yaṋu ni yo dzula dzinngwani. Ni nge ḽiivha ḽi no fhaṱa tshiṱaha tshaḽo mulomoni wa bako.”" 
Jeremiah48:29 “Ro zwi pfa uri Muaba ḽi a ḓihudza! Ḽi ḓihudza lwa u kalula, ḽi a ḓipfa, ḽi a ḓigagamisa, ḽi a ḓiḓivha, ḽi na mbilu ya u ṱonga." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ndi ḓivha swili yaḽo, hone i ḓo pfuvha, mazuwo aḽo ndi mahandana,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:31 “Ndi zwine Muaba nda ḽi lilela, ndi tou honḓa ndi tshi honḓela Muaba ḽoṱhe, vhathu vha Kiri Herese ndi vha pfela vhuṱungu." 
Jeremiah48:32 Inwi minḓirivhe ya Sibima, ndi ni lilela unga Jazere u tshi lila. Matavhi aṋu o adza a swika lwanzheni; a guma nga Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo henengei Jazere. Mitshelo yaṋu na nḓirivhe dzo vhibvaho zwo welwa nga mulozwi." 
Jeremiah48:33 Mirini ya mitshelo na masimuni a Muaba a hu tshee na dakalo na mifhululu. Ndo kaṱudza waini i no ela i tshi bva bonḓeloni; a hu na ane a dzi suka o takala a tshi fhululedza. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Mukosi wa tshililo tshavho u a hulela, u ṱavhiwa Hesheboni wa pfala Eliali na Jahatsi, wa ṱavhiwa Tsuara wa pfala Horonaimi na Eligathi Shelishiya. Na maḓini a Nimirimu muḓi wo phusukanywa." 
Jeremiah48:35 Kha ḽa Muaba ndi ḓo fhelisa vha no gonya zwivhanga vha yo ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo, vha dubisela midzimu yavho zwioro,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Mbilu yanga i lilela Muaba unga tshiṱiringo; i lila unga tshiṱiringo i tshi lilela vhathu vha Kiri Herese. Lupfumo lwe vha lu kuvhanganya lwo ṱuwa. 
Jeremiah48:37 Ṱhoho dzoṱhe dzo palulwa, ndebvu dzoṱhe dzo vheulwa, zwanḓa zwoṱhe zwo tshetshekanywa, khundu dzoṱhe dzo pilwa nga saga, u sumbedza u ṱungufhala." 
Jeremiah48:38 Zwiludzani zwa dzinnḓu kha ḽa Muaba na mikotoni yaho ndi zwililo fhedzi, Muaba ndo ḽi vunḓa unga dzhomela ḽi sa ṱoḓwi nga muthu,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:39 “Ḽo pwashea ḽa balangana! Vha honḓa hani! Muaba ḽo furalela ḽó furalela ḽó shona! Muaba ḽi a shonedzwa, vhoṱhe vho ṋekanaho masakha naḽo vha a ḽi nyala.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhonani! Hu khou kavha goni, ḽi ṱharamudza phapha ḽa godimela Muaba." 
Jeremiah48:41 Miḓi i ḓo thubiwa, ni ḓo dzhielwa vhushavhelo. Musi wonoyo mbilu dza vhahali vha Muaba, dzi ḓo nga mbilu ya musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa." 
Jeremiah48:42 Muaba ḽi ḓo phusukanywa, vhathu vhaḽo a vha tsha ḓo vha lushaka, nge vha nyadza Nṋe Yahavee." 
Jeremiah48:43 No lindelwa nga zwi ofhisaho na dindi na mulavhu inwi vhathu vha Muaba,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Ane a vhuya a shavha izwo zwi ofhisaho u ḓo wela dindini, ane a gonya a bva dindini u ḓo fashwa nga mulavhu; Muaba ndi ḓo ḽi ḓisela ṅwaha wa ṱhamu yaḽo,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Tshavhi dzi ima murunzini wa Hesheboni dzó kulea nungo. Hesheboni ho bva mulilo, tshivhindini tsha Sihoni ho bva khavhu ya mulilo; i fhisa mivhombo ya Muaba, i fhisa madethele a vhadziamazuwo." 
Jeremiah48:46 Iwe Muaba u ḓo zwi vhona! Vhathu vha Khemosho vho lozwiwa; vhaṱhannga vhau vho hwaliwa vha iswa vhuthubwani, vhananyana vhau vho thubiwa." 
Jeremiah48:47 Naho zwo ralo misi i ḓaho ndi ḓo dovha nda ladza ḽa Muaba,” u ralo Muṋe washu. Khaṱhulo ya Muaba i guma henefha." 
Jeremiah49:1 Hu tshi ambiwa Vhaamoni hu pfi: Muṋe washu u ri, “Israele a ḽi na vhatuka naa? A ḽi na maḽaifa naa? Zwino ndi mini Molekhe o dzhia ḽa Gadi? Khezwi vhathu vha Amoni vha tshi dzula miḓini yawo?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Hone hu khou ḓa misi ine muḓi wa Raba wa Vhaamoni nda ḓo u ṱavhela mukosi wa nndwa,” u ralo Muṋe washu. “U ḓo sala u gokho ḽa matumba, miḓana yo u tangaho nda i fhisa nga mulilo. Ndi hone Vhaisraele vha tshi ḓo pandamedza vho vha pandamedzaho.” U ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Iwe Hesheboni, honḓa, Ai wo phusukanywa! Inwi ni dzulaho Raba, lilani ni tou ṱavha mukosi! Ambarani madzanganda ni vuse tshililo; gidimelani ngeno na ngei ngomu mitsheṱoni, ngauri Molekhe u ḓo iswa vhuthubwani, khathihi na vhotshifhe vhawo na vhahulwane vhawo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ndi mini u tshi zuwa magovha au, u tshi zuwa magovha au o vhibvelaho? Iwe ṅwananyana a sa fulufhedzei, u fulufhela lupfumo lwau wa ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a nga nthoma?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ndi ḓo u ḓisela zwi ofhisaho, vhoṱhe vho u tangaho vha ḓo u ita zwi ofhisaho,” u ralo Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe. “Muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu u ḓo thathiwa, a hu na na muthihi a no ḓo kuvhanganya dzitshavhi." 
Jeremiah49:6 Naho zwo ralo, ngavhuya ndi ḓo dovha nda ladza ḽa Amoni,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:7 Hu tshi ambiwa Edomo hu pfi: Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Themana a hu tshee na vhuṱali naa? Vha maano a vha tsha kona u eletshedza? Vhuṱali havho ho sina?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Inwi ni no dzula Dedani, rembuluwani ni shavhe, dzumbamani mapakoni. Esau ndi ḓo mu ḓisela khombo musi une nda mu lifhedza." 
Jeremiah49:9 Arali vhafuli vha nḓirivhe vha ḓa ha iwe, a vha fuli vha sia dziṅwe naa? Arali mafobvu a ḓa vhusiku, a vha tswi zwine vha zwi funa fhedzi naa?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Hone Esau ndi ḓo mu bvula zwiambaro a sala e fhedzi; ndi ḓo fukula vhudzumbamo hawe, uri a si kone u dzumbama. Vhana vhawe na mashaka awe na vhahura vhawe vha ḓo lovha, ha tsha ḓo vha hone ane a nga ri," 
Jeremiah49:11 ‘Litsha tsiwana dzawe, ndi ḓo vha tsireledza vha si fe. Tshilikadzi dzau na dzone nga dzi fulufhele nṋe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Muṋe washu u ri, “Arali vha songo teaho u nwa tshinwelo tsha khaṱhulo vha tshi fanela u tshi nwa, iwe u nga bva hani u songo tshi nwa? A u nga bvi u songo tshi nwa, tshau ndi u nwa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ndi ana nga Nṋe muṋe ndi ri, muḓi wa Botsora u ḓo sala u matumba, u ḓo goḓiwa, u ḓo sala u phanga, vhathu vha ḓo teketelana nga dzina ḽawo; miḓi yawo yoṱhe i ḓo phusukanywa tshoṱhe,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndo pfa mafhungo a no bva ha Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Ho ruṅwa muḓinḓa kha dzitshakha a ri, ‘Kuvhanganani ni u die! Takuwani ni bve pfumo!’" 
Jeremiah49:15 Zwino ndi ḓo u ita muṱuku kha tshakha dzoṱhe, vhoṱhe vha ḓo u nyadza." 
Jeremiah49:16 U vhona unga u a ofhisa, u ḓihudza ha mbilu yau ho u fhura, wa ḓifhura nga mbilu yau ya u ḓihudza, iwe ane wa dzula dzinngwani, u no dzula miṱumbani ya dzithavha. Naho u tshi fhaṱa tshiṱaha tshau nṱha-nṱha unga goni, ndi ḓo u wisela fhasi u tshi bva henefho,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomo ḽi do sala ḽi matumba, vhoṱhe vhane vha fhira ngaho zwi ḓo vha tshenusa zwa vha ofhisa vha tshi vhona ṱhamu dzaḽo." 
Jeremiah49:18 A hu nga vhi na a no dzula hone, a hu nga dzuli muthu, hu ḓo nga Sodoma na Gomora yo phusukanywaho khathihi na midi i re tsini nayo,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Ndi ḓo pandela Vhaedomo shangoni ḽavho kathihi fhedzi, unga ndau i tshi bva maṱakani a Jorodani i tshi yo zwima shangoni ḽi re na pfulo i sa omi. Zwenezwo ndi ḓo vhea muvhusi we nda mu nanga. Ndi nnyi ane a nga Nṋe? Ane a nga pikisana na Nṋe ndi nnyi? Ndi ufhio mulisa ane a nga imedzana na Nṋe?”" 
Jeremiah49:20 Zwino-ha ipfani zwe Muṋe washu a dzudzanyela Edomo, zwe a dzudzanyela u vhaisa vha no dzula Themana, ngezwi: Ngoho vha ḓo khwikhwidzwa unga ngwana; na shango ḽavho ḽi ḓo tshenuwa ḽi tshi zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah49:21 Hu ḓo ri hu tshi pfala mubvumo wa u wa havho ḽifhasi ḽa dzinginyea, ha pfala mukosi wa tshililo tshavho wa swika Lwanzheni lwa Dziṱhanga." 
Jeremiah49:22 Vhonani! Hu ḓo fhufha goni ḽa kavha fhasi, ḽa ṱharamudza phapha dzaḽo ḽa godimela Botsora. Musi wonoyo mbilu dza vhahali vha Edomo dzi ḓo nga mbilu ya musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa." 
Jeremiah49:23 Hu tshi ambiwa Damasko hu pfi: “Vhathu vha miḓi ya Hamathi na Ariphada vho hanganea, vho pfa mafhungo mavhi. A vha koni u rudza mbilu, na khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe vha a tetemela, vha khou ḽa mbilu." 
Jeremiah49:24 Vha Damasko vho kulea nungo, vho rembuluwa, vha a shavha, vho farwa nga nyofho; vha a teta, vha pfa vhuṱungu, ndi vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa." 
Jeremiah49:25 Yowee, uḽa muḓi wa bvumo khezwi wo ṱutshelwa, wone muḓi une nda u takalela?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Vhukumakuma vhaṱhanngana vhawo vha ḓo fa mikotoni yawo; musi wonoyo vhahali vhawo vhoṱhe vha ḓo lovha,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Mitsheṱo ya Damasko ndi ḓo i funga nga mulilo; u ḓo fhisa pfamo ya Beni Hadadi khosi yawo.” 
Jeremiah49:28 Hu tshi ambiwa Kedara na mivhuso ya Hatsoro ye Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a i dia hu pfi: Muṋe washu u ri, “Takuwani ni lwe na Kedara, ni lozwe vhathu vha Vhubvaḓuvha." 
Jeremiah49:29 Vha ḓo dzhielwa dennde dzavho na masambi a nngu dzavho; mishasha yavho i ḓo hwalelwa kule khathihi na thundu dzavho na dzigamela. Vhathu vha ḓo vha ṱavhela mukosi vha ri, ‘No tangwa nga zwi ofhisaho thungo dzoṱhe!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Ṱavhanyani ni shavhele kule! Inwi ni dzulaho Hatsoro, dzumbamani mapakoni,” u ralo Muṋe washu. “Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele o ni itela tshimbevha; u ṱoḓa u lwa na inwi." 
Jeremiah49:31 Takuwani-ha ni yo dia lushaka lwo ḓidzulelaho lwo vhofhololwa lune lwa ḓifulufhela, lushaka lu si na tswinga; vhathu vhalwo vha dzula thungo vhe vhoṱhe,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Gamela dzavho dzi ḓo kumbululwa, masambi avho a kholomo a ḓo thubiwa. Ndi ḓo vha balanganya na khuḓa nṋa dza shango, havho vhathu vha no palula mavhudzi, ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo i tshi bva matungo oṱhe,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Hatsoro hu ḓo vha vhudzulo ha dziphunguhwe, hu ḓo dzula hu soga lini na lini. A hu tsha ḓo dzula muthu; a hu tsha ḓo vha hayani ha muthu.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽe ḽa ḓa ha muporofita Jeremia ḽi tshi amba Elamu, hu tshi kha ḓi tou bva u thoma u vhusa Tsedekia khosi ya Juda, ḽi ri:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhonani, ndi ḓo vunḓa vhura ha Elamu, yone thikho ya maanḓa avho." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndi ḓo ruma mimuya miṋa ya lwa na Elamu, i tshi bva khuḓani nṋa dza shango; ndi ḓo vha balanganya na mimuya yeneyo miṋa, a hu nga vhi na lushaka lune vha sa ḓo fhalalela khalwo." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndi ḓo ita uri Vhaelamu vha tetemele maswina avho, vha tshi vhona vhane vha ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha; ndi ḓo vha ḓisela khombo, na mbiti dzanga dzi ofhisaho,” u ralo Muṋe washu. “Ndi ḓo vha pandamedza nga pfumo ndi vhuye ndi vha fhedze." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndi ḓo vhea khuluṋoni yanga Elamu, nda lozwa mahosi avho na vhahulwane vhavho,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Naho zwo ralo ndi ḓo dovha nda ladza ḽa Elamu misi i ḓaho,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ngeḽi ipfi ḽe Muṋe washu a amba nga mulomo wa muporofita Jeremia a tshi amba Babele na shango ḽa Vhakhaladia. 
Jeremiah50:2 Ḽi ri, “Mafhungo haya a ḓivhadze dzitshakha, vha anḓadzele one, imisa tshiphuga, a anḓadze; u songo siedza tshithu, amba u ri, ‘Babele u ḓo thubiwa; Bele u ḓo shona, Maradukhu o farwa nga nyofho. Midzimu yawo ya zwifanyiso yo shona, zwitungulo zwawo zwi nengisaho zwo farwa nga nyofho.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 U ḓo diwa nga lushaka lu no bva devhula, shango ḽawo ḽa sala ḽi soga. A ḽi tsha ḓo dzula muthu, hu ḓo shavha vhathu khathihi na dziphukha." 
Jeremiah50:4 Misi yeneyo, nga tshifhinga tshenetsho, vhathu vha Israele na vhathu vha Juda vha ḓo dovha vha ṱangana, vha ṱoḓa Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho vha tshi lila,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:5 “Vha ḓo vhudzisa nḓila i no ya Tsioni, vha fara yone. Vha ḓo ḓa vha vhofha mulanga na Nṋe Yahavee, mulanga wa lini na lini, une wa si tsha ḓo hangwiwa." 
Jeremiah50:6 Vhathu vhanga vho vha vhe nngu dzo xelaho; vhalisa vhavho vho vha xedza, vha sala vha tshi tendeleka na mivhundu. Vho tendeleka na dzithavha na zwivhanga, vha hangwa danga ḽavho." 
Jeremiah50:7 We a vha wana o vha a tshi vha ponda; maswina avho o ri, ‘A ri na mulandu, hufha vho khakhela Yahavee, Ene pfulo yavho ya vhukuma, Yahavee, Ene fulufhelo ḽa vhokhotsi avho.’ ”" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Ibvani Babele ni shavhe; ṱutshelani shango ḽa Vhakhaladia, ni nge khwalasambi dzo rangaho sambi ḽa nngu phanḓa." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ndi ḓo ritha tshakha dza maanḓa dzo vhumbanaho dzi no bva shangoni ḽa devhula, dza ḓa dza lwa na Babele, Vha ḓo vhekanya maswole vha lwa nawo, wa thubiwa henefho. Misevhe yavho i ḓo nga ya vhahali vhukuma, vha sa humi vha si na tshe vha thuba." 
Jeremiah50:10 Zwenezwo Babele ḽi ḓo ṱangulwa; vhaṱanguli vhaḽo vha ḓo fura,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Pembelani zwaṋu ni takale, inwi ni no kumbulula shango ḽanga, khanani zwaṋu unga mavhoḓa ó vulelwa a yo fula, ni lile unga bere dza mboho," 
Jeremiah50:12 ndi zwone, hu si kale mme aṋu ha nga shoni zwone; ene we a ni beba u ḓo tou niwa nga ṱhoni. U ḓo vha ene muṱuku kha tshakha dzoṱhe, u ḓo vha soga, shango ḽo omaho ḽa phanga." 
Jeremiah50:13 A ḽi nga dzuli muthu, ḽi ḓo tou vha soga tshoṱhe, nge Yahavee a ḽi sinyutshela. Vhoṱhe vha no fhira nga Babele vha ḓo tshenuwa vha u holedza vha tshi vhona mbonzhe dzawo." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Govhelani Babele ni u die thungo dzoṱhe, noṱhe inwi ni akhaho vhura. U pfuleni! Ni songo sia na musevhe na muthihi, ngauri o khakhela Yahavee." 
Jeremiah50:15 U ṱavheleni mukosi wa nndwa thungo dzoṱhe! U a luvha, thawara dzawo dzi a wa, mitsheṱo yawo yo thuthea. Vhunga iyi i ndifhedzo ya Yahavee, u lifhedzeni; u iteni zwe wone wa ita vhaṅwe." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babele hu songo tsha vha na a zwalaho, hu songo tsha vhonala a kaṋaho, Muṅwe na muṅwe nga a humele ha vha hawe, a ponyoke pfumo ḽi lozwaho; muṅwe na muṅwe nga a shavhele shangoni ḽa hawe." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israele ndi sambi ḽa nngu dzo pandamedzwaho nga ndau dza balangana. O thoma u pondwa nga khosi ya Ashuru; wa u fhedzisela we a mu kuekanya marambo ndi Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele.” 
Jeremiah50:18 Zwenezwo Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Ndi ḓo rwa khosi ya Babele na shango ḽawe, sa zwe nda rwa khosi ya Ashuru." 
Jeremiah50:19 Hone ndi ḓo dovha nda humisela Israele pfuloni yawe, a fula thavhani ya Kharamele na kha ḽa Bashani; u ḓo dzikisa nḓala mivhunduni ya Efraimi na kha ḽa Giliadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Misi yeneyo, tshifhinga tshenetsho, mulandu wa Israele u ḓo londoloswa, wa wanala u siho, ha londoloswa na vhutshinyi ha Juda, ha wanala vhu siho, ngauri ndi ḓo hangwela tsalela dza vhathu vhe nda vha sia,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Dia shango ḽa Merathaimi, u die na vha no dzula Phekodo. Vha vhulahe u vha lozwe tshoṱhe. Khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe nda u vhudza,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:22 “Shangoni hu pfala mukosi wa nndwa, ndi mukosi wa ndozwo khulu!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Nundo ye ya vha i tshi pwasha ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe yo pwashea ya balangana! Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi vhona Babele e matumba. 
Jeremiah50:24 Iwe Babele, ndo u retshela tshikwekwe, wa fashwa u sa athu zwi ḓivha; wo waniwa wa thubiwa nge wa lwa na Yahavee." 
Jeremiah50:25 Yahavee o vula tshisiku tshawe tsha zwihali, a bvisa zwihali zwa mbiti dzawe, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u na zwine a ḓo shuma shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia." 
Jeremiah50:26 Ḽi weleni ni tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe! Pwashani mvari dza zwisiku zwaḽo zwi vulee; zwe na kumbulula ni zwi khokhe unga thulwi ya mavhele. Ḽi phusukanyeni tshoṱhe hu si vhe na tshi salaho. 
Jeremiah50:27 Vhulahani mbohwana dzaḽo dzoṱhe; nga dzi ye u ṱhavhiwa! Yawee, vha ḓo zwi vhona! Ḓuvha ḽavho ḽo swika, ndi tshifhinga tshavho tsha u lifhedzwa." 
Jeremiah50:28 Thetshelesani tshavhi na vhafhalali vha no bva Babele vha tshi ḓivhadza Tsioni zwe Yahavee Mudzimu washu a vha lifhedza, a tshi lifhedzela thembele yawe.”" 
Jeremiah50:29 “Vhidzani vhapfuli vha lwe na Babele, vhoṱhe vhane vha akha vhura. U govheleni, hu songo vha na a ponyokaho. U lifhedzeni zwe wa ita; u iteni zwoṱhe zwe wone wa ita vhaṅwe. Wo nyadza Yahavee, Ene Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ndi zwine vhaṱhanngana vhawo vha ḓo wa mikotoni; vhahali vhawo vha ḓo lovha musi hoyo,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Inwi vhadzia-u-ḓiḓivha, vhonani, ndi khou lwa na inwi, ngauri ḓuvha ḽaṋu ḽo swika, ndi tshone tshifhinga tshine na fanela u lifhedzwa,” u ralo Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah50:32 “Mudzia-u-ḓiḓivha u ḓo khukhulwa a wa, a hu na ane a ḓo mu vusa; ndi ḓo funga miḓi yawe nga mulilo, wa fhisa zwoṱhe zwo mu tangaho.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhathu vha Israele vho kandeledzwa, khathihi na vhathu vha Juda. Vhathubi vhavho vhoṱhe vha a vha linda, a vha tendi vha tshi ṱuwa." 
Jeremiah50:34 Naho zwo ralo Mutshidzi wavho u na maanḓa, u pfi Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe. Ha nga kundwi u vha lamulela, u ḓo ladza shango ḽavho, hone vha no dzula Babele u ḓo vha ḓisela mufhirifhiri." 
Jeremiah50:35 Vhakhaladia vha no dzula Babele na vhahulwane vhawo na vhaṱali, tshavho ḽi ḓo vha pfumo,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:36 “Mingome yavho yo livhiwa nga pfumo, i ḓo vha matsilu. Vhahali vho livhanwa nga pfumo! Vha ḓo farwa nga nyofho khulu." 
Jeremiah50:37 Bere dzi kokodzaho gariki dzi ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, na vhahali vhavho vha u rendelwa! Vha ḓo nga vhasadzi. Lupfumo lwavho lu ḓo fhedzwa nga pfumo! Lu ḓo kumbululwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Migero ya Babele i ḓo xa nga gomelelo. Ndi shango ḽa midzimu ya zwifanyiso; i ḓo penga nga nyofho. 
Jeremiah50:39 Hu ḓo dzula thuri na phele, hu ḓo vha hayani ha mphwe. A ḽi tsha ḓo dzulwa, a hu tsha ḓo fhaṱa muthu ha fhela mirafho na mirafho." 
Jeremiah50:40 Zwi ḓo nga zwiḽa Mudzimu ó phusukanya Sodoma na Gomora, khathihi na miḓi i re tsini nayo: na henefho a hu nga dzuli muthu, a ḽi tsha ḓo dzulwa,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Vhonani! Hu khou ḓa mmbi i tshi bva devhula; lushaka lwa maanḓa na mahosi manzhi vha khou rithwa vha tshi bva migumoni ya ḽifhasi. 
Jeremiah50:42 Vha lwa nga vhura na mafumo; vha na tshiṱuhu, a vha na khathutshelo. Mubvumo wavho u nga wa lwanzhe lu ungaho musi vho namela bere dzavho; vha ḓa vho vhambela unga vhanna vha nndwa, uri vha u kovhole iwe Babele, u sa athu phusukanywaho." 
Jeremiah50:43 Khosi ya Babele yo no zwi pfa uri vha khou ḓa, zwanḓa zwawe zwi sokou nembelela zwo kulea nungo. U ofha lwa u tou hanganea, u pfa vhuṱungu vhu no nga ha musadzi a tshi ṱoḓou vhofholowa." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ndi ḓo pandela Vhakhaladia shangoni ḽavho kathihi fhedzi, unga ndau i tshi bva maṱakani a Jorodani i tshi yo zwima pfuloni i sa omi. Zwenezwo ndi ḓo vhea muvhusi we nda mu nanga. Ndi nnyi ane a nga Nṋe? Ane a nga mpikisa ndi nnyi? Ndi ufhio mulisa ane a nga imedzana na Nṋe?”" 
Jeremiah50:45 Zwino-ha, ipfani zwe Muṋe washu a dzudzanyela Babele uri zwi ḽi wele. Zwe a dzudzanyela shango ḽa Vhababele uri zwi ḽi wele ngezwi: Ngoho vha ḓo khwikhwidzwa unga ngwana; na shango ḽavho ḽi ḓo tshenuwa ḽi tshi zwi vhona." 
Jeremiah50:46 Musi hu tshi pfala mubvumo wa u wa ha Babele ḽifhasi ḽi ḓo dzinginyea; mukosi wavho u ḓo pfala vhukati ha dzitshakha. 
Jeremiah51:1 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhonani, ndi ḓo ritha muya u lozwaho wa vutshela ḽa Babele na vhathu vhaḽo, avho vhaṱuṱuwedzi vha maswina anga." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndi ḓo ruma vhafhefheri Babele vha u fhefhera, vha tshinyadza shango ḽawo; vha ḓo u wela vha tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe musi wa khombo yawo." 
Jeremiah51:3 Ni songo vhuya na fha mupfuli tshifhinga tsha u akha vhura hawe, kana a ambara tshipilamuvhili. Ni songo vhuya na sia na vhaṱhanngana vhawo; mmbi yawo ni i lozwe tshoṱhe." 
Jeremiah51:4 Vha ḓo rungwa vha rambalala Babele, mikoto yawo i ḓo ḓala vhafu." 
Jeremiah51:5 Vhukuma Israele na Juda a vho ngo ṱutshelwa nga Mudzimu wavho Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe, ngauri Vhababele vho khakhela zwihulu Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Shavhani ni bve Babele! Shavhani ni si fe! Ni songo lozwiwa nga mulandu wa zwivhi zwawo. Ndi wone musi wa Yahavee wa u lifhedza, u ḓo u lifhedza nga zwo u teaho." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babele wo vha u tshinwelo tsha musuku tshi re tshanḓani tsha Yahavee, wo kambisa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe. Dzitshakha dzo nwa waini yawo, ndi zwe zwino dza vho penga." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babele wo wa kathihi fhedzi wa vunḓekana. U lileleni! U ṱoḓeleni mishonga ya u ilafha vhuṱungu hawo; khamusi u nga fhola. 
Jeremiah51:9 Babele ro vha ri tshi ḓo vha ro u lafha, hone a u tsha lafhea; nga ri u ṱutshele, muṅwe na muṅwe a ye shangoni ḽa hawe, ngauri khaṱhulo yawo i swika lutomboni, yo lapfa u guma makoleni.”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Muṋe washu o ri sengela; iḓani ri vhudze Tsioni zwe Yahavee Mudzimu washu a ita. 
Jeremiah51:11 Muṋe washu o ritha mahosi a Vhamedia uri a phusule Babele. Muṋe washu u ḓo lifhedza a tshi lifhedzela vhathu vhawe. Vha vhidzana vha ri, “Ṱuṱulani mafumo! Dzhiani zwiṱangu!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Imisani tshiphuga ni thuthe mitsheṱo ya Babele! Vheani vhalindi, vheani ṱholi, vheani vhalaleli!” Muṋe washu u ḓo ita zwe a dzudzanya, vhathu vha Babele u ḓo vha ita zwe a ri u ḓo zwi ita." 
Jeremiah51:13 Inwi ni no dzula milamboni minzhi, no khokhaho lupfumo, vhufhelo haṋu ho swika, tshone tshifhinga tshine na fanela u fa." 
Jeremiah51:14 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe o ana nga Ene muṋe a ri, “Vhukumakuma ndi ḓo ni ḓisela vhathu vha tou ḓala, vha nga lutsinga lwa nzie, vha ḓo ni ṱavhela mukosi wa gundo.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Muṋe washu o ita ḽifhasi nga maanḓa awe; o sika shango nga vhuṱali hawe, a ṱharamudza lutombo nga ṱhalukanyo yawe." 
Jeremiah51:16 A amba, maḓi a ḽiṱaḓulu a a bvuma; u takusa makole migumoni ya ḽifhasi. U penyisa lupenyo, mvula ya mbo ḓi na. U bvisa muya zwisikuni zwawe." 
Jeremiah51:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha shaya nzhele, vha nga phukha, a vha na nḓivho; vhafuli vha musuku vha a shona vha tshi vhona zwitungulo zwe vha fula. Midzimu yavho ya zwifanyiso ndi ya khole-khole, hufha na u fema i sa femi." 
Jeremiah51:18 A zwi na mushumo, zwo fanela u tambiwa ngazwo; hu tshi swika tshifhinga tsha khaṱhulo zwi ḓo lovha." 
Jeremiah51:19 Mudzimu wa Jakopo ha ngi zwone, Ene ndi Musiki wa zwithu zwoṱhe, o sika na matsinde a lushaka lwawe, u pfi Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah51:20 Muṋe washu u ri, “Iwe u nundo yanga ya nndwa, u tshihali tshanga tsha nndwani, ndi pwasha dzitshakha nga iwe dza balangana, ndi lozwa mivhuso nga iwe," 
Jeremiah51:21 ndi pwasha bere na munameli nga iwe, ndi pwasha gariki ya nndwa na mureili nga iwe," 
Jeremiah51:22 ndi pwasha munna na musadzi nga iwe, ndi pwasha mukalaha na muṱhannga nga iwe, ndi pwasha muṱhanngana na musidzana nga iwe," 
Jeremiah51:23 ndi pwasha mulisa na sambi ḽa nngu nga iwe, ndi pwasha mulimi na dziphulu nga iwe, ndi pwasha mivhuso na magota ayo nga iwe." 
Jeremiah51:24 “Hone zwino ndi ḓo lifhedza Babele ni tshi zwi vhona, nda lifhedza na vhoṱhe vhane vha dzula khaḽo, ndi tshi vha lifhedzela vhutshinyi hoṱhe he vha vhu ita Tsioni,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Iwe thavha i lozwaho, ndi lwa na iwe, iwe ane wa lozwa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe, ndo u angaladzela tshanḓa nda u kungulusa nngwani, nda u ita thavha yo fhiswaho,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:26 “A hu na tombo ḽi no ḓo dzhiwa kha iwe ḽa itwa thikho, kana ḽa itwa muteo, u ḓo dzula u soga lini na lini,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Imisani tshiphuga tsha nndwa shangoni! Lidzani phalaphala vhukati ha dzitshakha! Lugisani tshakha dzi yo lwa nawo, u rambeleni mivhuso heino: Ararathi na Mini na Ashkenasi. Nangani mulangammbi a lwe nawo; rumelani dzibere dzi ande unga guma ḽa nzie." 
Jeremiah51:28 Lugisani tshakha dzi yo lwa nawo, mahosi a Media na vhavhusi vhavho na magota avho oṱhe, na mashango oṱhe ane vha a vhusa." 
Jeremiah51:29 Shango ḽi a tetemela, ḽi a dzinginyea, ngauri Yahavee u khou khunyeledza zwe a dzudzanyela Babele, uri shango ḽa Babele ḽi sale ḽi soga, ḽi si tsha dzula muthu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Vhahali vha Babele a vha tsha lwa; vha sokou dzula vhushavheloni havho. Nungo dzavho dzo fhela, vha vho nga vhasadzi. Nnḓu dzawo dzo fungwa nga mulilo, tswinga dza mafhoro awo dza tsimbi dzo vunḓea." 
Jeremiah51:31 Zhendedzi ḽi tevhela ḽiṅwe, muḓinḓa u tevhela muṅwe, vha yo ḓivhadza khosi ya Babele, uri muḓi wawe woṱhe wo thubiwa," 
Jeremiah51:32 maḓambuwo o dzhiwa, vhushavhelo ho fhiswa, vhahali vho farwa nga nyofho.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “Vhathu vha Babele vha nga luvhata, ho swika tshifhinga tshavho tsha u kandekanywa; vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi kaṋiwa unga khaṋo.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele o ri mila, o ri ḓaḓisa, o ri ita mvuvhelo i si na tshithu ngomu. O ri mila unga ṱharu, a fura nga zwiḽiwa zwashu, zwino o ri ṱanza." 
Jeremiah51:35 Ngavhe fuvhalo ḽe ḽa itwa mivhili yashu ḽi tshi wela Babele,” vha ralo vha no dzula Tsioni. “Ngavhe malofha ashu a tshi vhilwa kha vha no dzula Babele,” vha ralo vha Jerusalema." 
Jeremiah51:36 Ndi zwine Muṋe washu a ri, “Vhonani, ndi ḓo ni sengela, nda ni lifhedzela; ndi ḓo xisa mulambo wa Babele, nda omisa zwisima zwaḽo." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babele hu ḓo vha thulwi ya matumba, hu ḓo vha vhudzulo ha phunguhwe, hu ḓo vha na zwi ofhisaho ha nyadzea, a hu nga dzuli muthu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Vhathu vhaho vha ḓo vhomba unga ndau, vha lila unga ndawana." 
Jeremiah51:39 Vha ḓo ri vha tshee vho nyanyuwa, nda vha itela vhuṱambo nda vha kambisa, vha vusa maseo na mapwapwalala, vha mbo ḓi eḓela tshoṱhe vha si tsha vuwa,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ndi ḓo vha ṱanamisa unga ngwana dzi tshi yo ṱhavhiwa, unga thutha na mbudzi.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 “Babele wo thubiwa hani, wone goliso ḽa shango ḽoṱhe wo kundiwa! Izwo zwa Babele zwi ḓo ofhisa tshakha dzoṱhe!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Lwanzhe lu ḓo raha lwa kumba Babele; magabelo alwo a ungaho a ḓo u tibedza. 
Jeremiah51:43 Miḓi yawo i ḓo sala i soga ḽi ofhisaho, ḽi ḓo sala ḽi shango ḽo omaho ḽa phanga, shango ḽi sa dzuli muthu, hu si vhe na a no fhira ngaho." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndi ḓo rwa Bele mudzimu wa Babele henefho muḓini wawo, nda ita uri zwe a zwi mila a zwi ṱanze. Tshakha a dzi tsha ḓo rwa muduba dzi tshi ya khawo. Na mitsheṱo ya Babele i ḓo wa." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Inwi vhathu vhanga, ibvani khawo! Shavhani ni si fe! Shavhani mbiti dza Yahavee dzi ofhisaho.”" 
Jeremiah51:46 “Ni songo kulea nungo, ni songo ofha ni tshi pfa mavharivhari shangoni; maṅwe mavharivhari a tshi pfala ṋaṅwaha, maṅwe a pfala ṅwakani, mavharivhari a u huvhadzana, na a muvhusi a tshi lwa na muṅwe muvhusi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Vhukumakuma hu ḓo ḓa misi ine nda ḓo rwa midzimu ya Babele ya zwifanyiso, shango ḽawo ḽoṱhe ḽa shona, zwitumbu zwa vho vhulawaho zwi ḓo rambalala hoṱhe-hoṱhe ngomu hawo." 
Jeremiah51:48 “Ndi hone ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo zwi tshi ḓo pembelela izwo zwo welaho Babele, ngauri vhalozwi vha ḓo u dia vha tshi bva thungo ya devhula,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:49 “Babele wo fanela u wa-ho nge wa vhulaha Vhaisraele, u ḓi nga vho vhulawaho mashangoni oṱhe vhó vhulawa nga wone Babele." 
Jeremiah51:50 Inwi no ponyokaho pfumo, ṱuwani, ni songo tsha lenga! Ni elelwe Muṋe washu ni shangoni ḽa kule, na Jerusalema ni songo u hangwa.”" 
Jeremiah51:51 “Ro shona nge ra nyadziwa, ro tou niwa nga ṱhoni, nge vhatsinda vha dzhena fhethu hukhethwa nḓuni ya Muṋe washu.”" 
Jeremiah51:52 Hone Muṋe washu a tshi fhindula u ri, “Hu ḓa misi ine nda ḓo rwa midzimu yawo ya zwifanyiso, shangoni ḽoṱhe ha gomela dzikhuvhabvu." 
Jeremiah51:53 Naho Babele wa swika lutomboni, wa khwaṱhisa vhushavhelo hawo ha lapfela nṱha, ndi ḓo ruma vhalozwi vha lwa nawo,” u ralo Muṋe washu." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Babele hu pfala mukosi wa tshililo, ndi mukosi wa ndozwo khulu u no pfala shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia." 
Jeremiah51:55 Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo thutha Babele; ndi ḓo fhelisa u zhamba hawo. Magabelo a maswina a ḓo vuwa unga maḓi mahulu; hu ḓo pfala u vhomba ha maipfi avho. 
Jeremiah51:56 Hu ḓo ḓa mulozwi a dia Babele; vhahali vhawo vha ḓo thubiwa, vhura havho vhu ḓo vunḓekanywa. Nṋe Yahavee ndi Mudzimu a no lifhedza vhuvhi; ndi ḓo lifhedza tshoṱhe." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndi ḓo kambisa vhahulwane vhawo na vhaṱali vhawo, khathihi na vhavhusi na magota na vhahali vhawo; vha ḓo eḓela tshoṱhe vha si tsha vuwa,” i ralo Khosi i no pfi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Jeremiah51:58 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Mutsheṱo mudenya wa Babele u ḓo thuthwa, gethe dzawo ndapfu dzi ḓo fungwa nga mulilo. Tshakha dzi sokou ḓinetisa nga zwifhaṱo zwadzo, mushumo wa dzitshakha wo no sokou vha mapfura a khavhu.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ngea mafhungo e Jeremia muporofita a laedza Seraya ṅwana wa Neria, ṅwana wa Mahasea, musi a tshi ya Babele na Tsedekia khosi ya Juda nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wawe. Seraya o vha e gota ḽa u langa vhulalo lwendoni." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia o vha o ṅwala kha bugu, ó ṅwala khombo dzoṱhe dze dza pfi dzi ḓo wela Babele, zwoṱhe zwe zwa vha zwo ṅwalwa nga Babele." 
Jeremiah51:61 O vhudza Seraya a ri, “U tshi swika Babele, u vhale maipfi haya oṱhe zwi tshi pfala." 
Jeremiah51:62 Zwenezwo u ri, ‘Yawee Muṋe washu, wo ri u ḓo lozwa fhethu hafhano, uri hu si tsha dzula muthu, hu si tsha dzula tshifuwo, hu dzule hu soga lini na lini.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Wó no fhedza u vhala bugu iyi, u i vhofhelele na tombo u i pose mulamboni wa Yufuratha." 
Jeremiah51:64 Zwenezwo u ri, ‘Babele u ḓo ṋupela nga u ralo wa si tsha thunyuwa, nga khombo ine Muṋe washu a ḓo u ḓisela. Vhathu vhawo vho sokou ḓinetisa.’ ” Maipfi a Jeremia a fhelela henefha." 
Jeremiah52:1 Tsedekia o vhumbwa khosi e na miṅwaha ya 21, a vhusa Jerusalema miṅwaha ya 11. Mme awe o vha a tshi pfi Hamutali, ṅwananyana wa Jeremia wa muḓi wa Libina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Khosi Tsedekia o ita zwi sa takadzi Muṋe washu, a ḓi ita zwa Jehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah52:3 Zwoṱhe hezwi zwi tshi vhuya zwa wela Jerusalema na Juda ndi nge Muṋe washu a vha o sinyuwa, a fhedza nga u vha thathela kule nae. Zwo itea Tsedekia a tshi shandukela khosi ya Babele." 
Jeremiah52:4 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa Tsedekia, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhufumi, Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a ḓa na mmbi yawe yoṱhe a tshi ḓa u dia Jerusalema. Vha ṱoka mishasha yavho nnḓa ha muḓi vha u govhela nga thulwi dza mavu e vha khokha." 
Jeremiah52:5 Muḓi wa dzula wo govhelwa u swika ṅwaha wa 11 wa khosi Tsedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa nḓala afho muḓini yo vha yo no hulela lwe ha vha hu si tshee na zwiḽiwa zwine vhathu vha nga ḽa. 
Jeremiah52:7 Zwenezwo mutsheṱo wa muḓi wa pwashea wa phuletshedza, mmbi yoṱhe ya shavha. Vho ṱuwa afho muḓini vhusiku vha bva nga khoro ine ya vha vhukati ha mitsheṱo mivhili tsini ha tsimu ya musanda, naho hu uri Vhababele vho vha vho govhela muḓi. Vha shavha vho livha govhani ḽa Jorodani," 
Jeremiah52:8 hone Vhababele vha pandamedza khosi Tsedekia vha mu fara mudavhini wa Jerikho. Vhahali vhawe vhoṱhe vha fhandekanywa nae vha balangana," 
Jeremiah52:9 ene a thubiwa. A dzhiwa a iswa ha khosi ya Babele muḓini wa Ribila shangoni ḽa Hamathi, ya mu haṱula henefho." 
Jeremiah52:10 Henefho Ribila khosi ya Babele ya shidzha vhana vha Tsedekia vha vhatuka a tshi zwi vhona; a vhulaha na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Juda. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ndi hone a tshi nongola maṱo a Tsedekia, a mu vhofha nga dzigeḓane, a mu isa Babele, a mu hoṋela dzhele a vhuye a fe." 
Jeremiah52:12 Nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu, nga ṅwaha wa 19 wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele, Nebusaradani mulangammbi, muḓinḓa wa khosi ya Babele, a dzhena Jerusalema," 
Jeremiah52:13 a fhisa thembele ya Muṋe washu nga mulilo, na pfamo ya musanda na nnḓu dzoṱhe dza Jerusalema. Nnḓu khulu iṅwe na iṅwe a i fhisa." 
Jeremiah52:14 Mmbi yoṱhe ya Babele ye ya vha i tshi langwa nga mulangammbi wa musanda ya thutha mitsheṱo u mona na muḓi wa Jerusalema. 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebusaradani mulangammbi wa musanda a hwala vhaṅwe vha vhatshinyali na vhe vha vha vho sala muḓini khathihi na vhatsila na vhe vha vha vho pfukela ha khosi ya Babele, a vha isa vhuthubwani." 
Jeremiah52:16 Hone a sia vhaṅwe vha vhashai vhukuma vha shango uri vha lime masimu a minḓirivhe na maṅwe masimu. 
Jeremiah52:17 Vhababele vha pwasha phuphu dza tshirongana na masambelo a re na milinga na thannge ya tshirongana zwe zwa vha zwi thembeleni ya Muṋe washu, vha hwala zwirongana zwoṱhe vha zwi isa Babele." 
Jeremiah52:18 Vha hwala na dzikhali na dzifosholo na zwiṱunyathambo na midzio ya u handulula malofha na midzio ya u dubisa zwioro na midzio ya u fara nduvho ya thevhula, ine ya shumiswa thembeleni." 
Jeremiah52:19 Mulangammbi wa musanda o dzhia na zwidongo na midzio ya u hwala masimbe na midzio ya u handulula malofha na dzikhali na zwivheambone na midzio ya zwioro na midzio ya u fara nduvho ya thevhula, midzio yoṱhe ya musuku na siliva." 
Jeremiah52:20 Tshirongana tshi no bva kha phuphu mbili na thannge ya tshirongana na mboho dza 12 dza tshirongana dzi re fhasi hayo na masambelo a re na milinga, zwe khosi Solomoni a vha o zwi itela thembele ya Muṋe washu, tsho vha tshi sa kalei." 
Jeremiah52:21 Phuphu iṅwe na iṅwe yo vha i na vhulapfu ha mithara ṱhanu na tharu, u monisa dzí mithara ṱhanu na hafu; iṅwe na iṅwe í na mulindi vhukati, i na vhudenya vhu no eḓana minwe miṋa." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ṱhoho ya tshirongana ya phuphu yo vha i na vhulapfu ha mithara mbili na hafu, nahone yo ṱamiwa nga magranada a tshirongana u mona nayo. Iṅwe phuphu na magranada ayo yo vha i tshi ḓi nga yone-vho." 
Jeremiah52:23 Nga matungo ho vha hu tshi vhonala magranada a 96; magranada oṱhe o ṱangana nga nṱha ha ayo o monaho nayo o vha e ḓana. 
Jeremiah52:24 Mulangammbi wa musanda o dzhia Seraya tshifhe muhulu na Tsefania tshanḓa tshawe na vhalindamuṋango vhararu a vha hoṋela dzhele. 
Jeremiah52:25 Kha vhe vha vha vha tshee vho sala muḓini, o dzhia mulangavhahali na vhaeletshedzi vha musanda vhaṱanu na vhavhili. A dovha a dzhia muṅwaleli wa u ramba vhanna musi wa nndwa na vhanna vhawe vha 60 vhe vha wanala henefho muḓini." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebusaradani mulangammbi o vha dzhia vhoṱhe a vha isa ha khosi ya Babele muḓini wa Ribila. 
Jeremiah52:27 Henefho Ribila shangoni ḽa Hamathi khosi ya ita uri vha vhulawe. Zwenezwo vhathu vha Juda vha hwalwa vha iswa vhuthubwani kule na shango ḽa havho. 
Jeremiah52:28 Mbalo ya vhathu vhe Nebukhadnetsara a vha hwala a vha isa vhuthubwani ngeino: nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili wa muvhuso wawe o hwala Majuda vha 3 023; 
Jeremiah52:29 nga ṅwaha wa 18 wa muvhuso wawe o hwala vhathu vha 832 vha no bva Jerusalema; 
Jeremiah52:30 nga ṅwaha wa 23 wa muvhuso wawe Nebusaradani mulangammbi wa musanda o hwala Majuda vha 745 a vha isa vhuthubwani. Vhathu vhoṱhe vho ṱangana vho vha vhe 4 600. 
Jeremiah52:31 Nga ṅwaha we Evili Merodakha a vha khosi ya Babele, a khathutshela Jehoyakhini khosi ya Juda, a mu vhofholola dzhele. Hezwo zwo itea nga ḓuvha ḽa 25 nga ṅwedzi wa 12 Jehoyakhini o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 37 vhuthubwani." 
Jeremiah52:32 Evili Merodakha o amba nae zwavhuḓi a mu ṋea tshidzulo tsha khuliso tshi no fhira zwa maṅwe mahosi vhe vha vha vhe nae Babele. 
Jeremiah52:33 Ndi hone Jehoyakhini a tshi bvula zwiambaro zwawe zwa dzhele a zwi vhea kule, misi yoṱhe a ḽa ḓafulani ḽa khosi vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe." 
Jeremiah52:34 Misi yoṱhe khosi ya Babele yo vha i tshi ṋea Jehoyakhini zwa u renga zwine a zwi ṱoḓa, vhutshilo hawe hoṱhe a vhuya a fa." 
Lamentations1:1 Yowee! Uḽa muḓi we wa vha wo ḓala vhathu, a u tsha dzula muthu! Wo vha u muhulwane vhukati ha dzitshakha, zwino u vho tou nga tshilikadzi! O vha e mufumakadzi vhukati ha mashango, zwino o no vha phuli!" 
Lamentations1:2 Vhusiku u lila lu ṱungufhadzaho, marama awe o ḓala miṱodzi. Kha vhafunwa vhawe vhoṱhe a hu na ane a mu fhumudza. Khonani dzawe dzoṱhe dzo mu fheṱa; vho no vha maswina awe." 
Lamentations1:3 Vhathu vha Juda vho thubiwa vha tambudzwa vha shumiswa nga tshiṱuhu, vha vho dzula vhukati ha dzitshakha; a hu na hune vha awela hone. Vhoṱhe vhane vha vha pandamedza vho vha fara vha vha thathedza." 
Lamentations1:4 Nḓila dzi yaho Tsioni dzo ṱungufhala, a hu na ane a ḓa minyanyani yawe. Khoro dzawe ndi soga, vhotshifhe vhawe vha a gomela, vhasidzana vhawe vha pfa vhuṱungu, ene muṋe u vhuṱunguni vhuhulu." 
Lamentations1:5 Maswina awe a vho mu vhusa; ḽa maswina awe ḽo lala. Muṋe washu o mu ḓisela vhuṱungu nge a mu shandukela lunzhi. Vhana vhawe vho iswa vhuthubwani, vho thubwa nga swina." 
Lamentations1:6 Tsioni, musidzana wa lunako o dzhielwa vhugala hawe hoṱhe. Vhavhusi vhawe vha nga tholo dzi si na pfulo; vho shavha mupandamedzi wavho nga u shaya nungo." 
Lamentations1:7 Misi ya u ṱungufhadzwa na u tambudzwa Jerusalema u elelwa lupfumo lwoṱhe lwe lwa vha lu lwawe misi iḽa ya kale. Zwiḽa vhana vhawe vha tshi wela zwanḓani zwa maswina, ho vha hu si na ane a nga mu tikedze. Maswina awe o mu sedza, a sea zwe zwa mu wela." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalema o tshinya zwihulu. Zwenezwo zwa mu kumadza unga musadzi a no khou vhona ṅwedzi. Vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi mu hulisa vha vho mu nyadza nge vha mu vhonela; ene muṋe u a gomela a sedza thungo nga ṱhoni. 
Lamentations1:9 O vha a songo elekanya zwa matshelo, zwino tshika yawe yo nambatela zwiambaro zwawe. O wa lu ofhisaho; a hu na ane a nga mu khuthadza. “Yawee Muṋe washu, edzou sedza u ṱungufhadzwa hanga, vhona, swina ḽo kunda.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Swina ḽo dzhia lupfumo lwawe lwoṱhe; o vhona tshakha dza vhannḓa dzi tshi dzhena hukhethwa hawe, vhe Muṋe washu a vha o vha ilisa uri vha songo dzhena tshivhidzoni tshawe." 
Lamentations1:11 Vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vha a gomela vha tshi ṱoḓa zwiḽiwa, vha renga zwiḽiwa nga nungu dzavho uri vha si fe tshoṱhe. “Yawee Muṋe washu, edzou sedza u vhone uri ndi nyadziwa hani.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Inwi noṱhe ni no fhira henefha, a ni zwi londi? Edzonu livha-livha ni vhone. Hu na u tambula hu no nga uhu hanga he nda ṱungufhadzwa ngaho, he a nnḓisela uḽa musi wa mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho naa?" 
Lamentations1:13 O wisa mulilo u tshi bva ṱaḓulu, a u tsisela fhasi wa dzhena maramboni anga. O ṱharamudza mambule a mpfasha milenzhe a nṱanamisa. O ita uri ndi sale ndi ndoṱhe, nda ṱwa ndi tshi lwala." 
Lamentations1:14 Zwivhi zwanga o zwi luka nga zwanḓa zwawe, zwa vhofhekana zwa vha dzhogo; zwa dzula nṱha ha mutsinga wanga. Muṋe washu o nkhamula nungo o nkumedza vhane nda si vha kone." 
Lamentations1:15 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o landula vhahali vhanga vhoṱhe; o vhidza mmbi ya ḓa ya lwa na nṋe ya kuya vhaṱhanngana vhanga, ya ḽa munyanya. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o sukekanya Juda musidzana wa lunako bonḓeloni ḽawe." 
Lamentations1:16 Ndi zwine nda lila, maṱo anga a bva miṱodzi. A hu na a re tsini ane a nkhuthadza, a hu na ane a rudza mbilu yanga. Vhana vhanga vho ṱovhowa, swina ḽo kunda.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Tsioni a ṱharamudza zwanḓa zwawe a tshi vhidza khonani dzawe, hone a hu na ane a mu khuthadza. Muṋe washu o rambela Jakopo maswina a no bva masia oṱhe. Vha vhona Jerusalema a tshi nga musadzi e maḓuvhani awe." 
Lamentations1:18 “Muṋe washu u a fulufhedzea, ngauri nṋe ndo nyadza zwe a amba. Thetshelesani inwi tshakha dzoṱhe! Edzonu vhona u tambula hanga. Vhana vhanga, vhaṱhannga na vhasidzana, vho hwalwa vha iswa vhuthubwani." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndo vhidzelela khonani dzanga, hone vho nndaṱedza. Vhotshifhe vhanga na magota anga vha lovhela henefha muḓini vha tshi khou ṱoḓa zwiḽiwa uri vha tshile." 
Lamentations1:20 “Muṋe washu, edzou vhona uri zwi khou mmbavha hani! Ngomu hanga hu tou duga, mbilu yanga i a vhavha; ndo vha ḽishandukwa vhukuma. Nnḓa pfumo ḽi a vhulaha, ngomu nḓuni ndi lufu fhedzi." 
Lamentations1:21 Vhathu vho pfa tshigomelo tshanga, hone a hu na ane a nkhuthadza. Maswina anga oṱhe o pfa uri zwo mmbifhela, a pembelela zwe wa nnyita. Ngavhe u tshi ḓisa ḓuvha ḽe wa ḽi ḓivhadza, uri na vhone vha itwe zwe nṋe nda itwa." 
Lamentations1:22 Ngavhe vhuvhi havho hoṱhe vhu tshi swika maṱoni au! Vha lifhedze unga wo lifhedze nṋe nga vhuvhi hanga hoṱhe. Zwigomelo zwanga ndi zwinzhi, ndo kulea nungo.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Muṋe washu o tiba Tsioni, ṅwananyana wa lunako, nga gole ḽa mbiti dzawe! Vhugala ha Israele o vhu posa fhasi, ha bva ṱaḓulu ha wela mavuni; musi wa mbiti dzawe ho ngo tsha elelwa thembele yawe, vhukando ha milenzhe yawe." 
Lamentations2:2 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe o mila vhudzulo ha Jakopo hoṱhe a sa khathutsheli; o phusula vhushavhelo ha ṅwananyana wawe Juda ó sinyuwa. O wisa muvhuso na vhavhusi vhawo a vha shonisa. 
Lamentations2:3 O kula nungo dzoṱhe dza Israele e mbitini dzi ofhisaho! Swina ḽo ri ḽi tshi swika a humisa tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa, mbiti dzawe dza dugela Jakopo unga khavhu ya mulilo ine ya fhisa zwoṱhe zwo i tangaho." 
Lamentations2:4 O akha vhura hawe unga swina; tshanḓa tshawe tshauḽa tsho angalala. Vhoṱhe vhane muthu a vhona vha tshi takadza, o vha vhulaha unga swina; o shulula mbiti dzawe unga mulilo, dza shulutshela kha vhudzulo ha ṅwananyana wawe Tsioni." 
Lamentations2:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u nga swina; o mila Israele. O mila pfamo dzaḽo dzoṱhe, a thutha vhushavhelo haḽo. Ṅwananyana wawe Juda o mu andisela maṱungu na zwililo." 
Lamentations2:6 O thutha fhethu hawe hune ha kuvhanganiwa. Muṋe washu o ita uri vha Tsioni vha hangwe zwa minyanya mikhethwa na Dzisabatha; o ṱamba vhoṱhe khosi na tshifhe, e mbitini dzi ofhisaho." 
Lamentations2:7 Muṋe washu o landula aḽiṱari yawe, a ṅaledza thembele yawe khethwa ya kandekanywa. Mitsheṱo ya pfamo dzayo o dzi kumedza maswina; vho ṱavha mukosi nḓuni ya Muṋe washu, zwa nga ḓuvha ḽa minyanya mikhethwa." 
Lamentations2:8 Muṋe washu o vha o ḓiimisela u thutha mutsheṱo wo tangeledzaho ṅwananyana wawe Tsioni. O ṱharamudza thambo ya u ela uri hu si sale tombo, a si humise tshanḓa tshawe uri tshi si lozwe. O ita uri dzithawara na mitsheṱo zwi lile; zwino zwo sala zwi matumba." 
Lamentations2:9 Khoro dzawe dzo wa, dzo no tou fukedzwa nga mavu; tswinga dzadzo o dzi vunḓekanya a dzi posa kule. Khosi yawe na vhavhusi vhawe vho thubwa nga dzitshakha, a hu tsha funzwa mulayo, vhaporofita vhawe a vha tsha wana mabono a bvaho kha Muṋe washu." 
Lamentations2:10 Vhahulwane vha Tsioni vha dzula mavuni vho sokou tshete; vho ḓishela mavu ṱhohoni vha ambara madzanganda. Vhasidzana vha kotamisa dziṱhoho. 
Lamentations2:11 Maṱo anga o neta nga u lila, ngomu hanga hu tou duga. Mbilu yanga yo tevhutshela fhasi nge vhathu vhanga vha lozwiwa. Vhana na dzitshetshe vha ṋokela mikotoni ya muḓi," 
Lamentations2:12 vha vhudzisa vhomme avho vha ri, “Vhurotho na waini zwi ngafhi?” vha tshi ṋoka mikotoni ya muḓi unga vhanna vho rungwaho nga pfumo; vha fela ngozwini." 
Lamentations2:13 Iwe Jerusalema, ndi nga u vhudzani? Ndi nga u vhambedza na mini? Iwe Tsioni, ṅwananyana wa lunako, ndi nga u fanyisa na mini uri ndi u fhumudze? Mbonzhe yau yo tsesa unga lwanzhe, u nga fhodzwa nga nnyi?" 
Lamentations2:14 Vhaporofita vhau vho u hanelela mabono a mahandana, a sa tshidzi; a vho ngo u dzumbululela vhuvhi hau uri u laṱe u si thubiwe nga dzitshakha. Milomo ya midzimu yau yo u vhudza mazwifhi fhedzi, ndi yone ye ya u lozwa." 
Lamentations2:15 Vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha nḓila vha vhanda zwanḓa vha ri, “Koṱo!” vha u nzhonzhowedza, vha u dzungudzela dziṱhoho iwe Jerusalema. Vha ri, “Nṋa uyu ndi uḽa muḓi we wa vha u tshi pfi u khunyelela ha lunako, dakalo ḽa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Maswina au oṱhe a a u kolela, vha a u nzhonzhowedza vha tshi shenganya maṋo vha ri, “Ro mu mila. Heḽi ndi ḓuvha ḽe ra ḽi lindela; ḽo swika, ro ḽi vhona.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Muṋe washu o ita zwe a dzudzanya; o khunyeledza ipfi ḽawe, ḽe a ḓivhadza kale-kale. O u lozwa a sa khathutsheli, o takadza swina nga u wa hau, a ombela maswina au shambo." 
Lamentations2:18 Mbilu dza vhathu dzi ṱavhela Muṋe wa zwoṱhe mukosi. Iwe mutsheṱo wa Tsioni, miṱodzi yau nga i ele unga mulambo vhusiku na masiari; u songo vhuya wa ḓirula, maṱo au a songo awela." 
Lamentations2:19 Vuwa vhukati ha vhusiku, u ṱavhe mukosi sa vhalindi u tshi dovha ḽi vhuye ḽi tshe. Shulula zwa mbiluni yau unga maḓi u tshi pfiwa nga Muṋe wa zwoṱhe. Takusa zwanḓa zwau u mu rabele uri vhana vhau vha no khou ṋoka nga nḓala mafhandeni a mikoto vha tshile." 
Lamentations2:20 “Yawee Muṋe washu, edzou sedza u elekanye uri: We wa vhuya wa mu ita nga u rali ndi nnyi? Vhasadzi vha vho ḽa zwibebwa zwavho, vhana vhavho vhe vha tou vha mamisa vha vha alusa. Tshifhe na muporofita vha vhulawa thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
Lamentations2:21 Muhulwane na muṱuku vha fa vhoṱhe mavuni a mikoto; vhaṱhannga vhanga na vhasidzana vho ḽiwa nga pfumo. Wo vha vhulaha musi wa mbiti dzau; wo vha shidzha u sa vhuyi wa vha khathutshela. 
Lamentations2:22 Wo nthambela zwi ofhisaho zwi tshi bva masia oṱhe, unga u tshi vhidza vhathu musi wa munyanya. Musi wa mbiti dza Muṋe washu a hu na we a ponyoka kana a sala a tshi tshila; vhe nda vha londola nda vha alusa vho lozwiwa nga maswina anga.”" 
Lamentations3:1 Nṋe ndi munna we a pfiswa vhuṱungu Muṋe washu a tshi nthwa nga mbiti. 
Lamentations3:2 O nthathela kule a ita uri nṋe ndi tshimbile swiswini hu si na tshedza; 
Lamentations3:3 ngangoho o khetha nṋe uri a ntsukumedzele kule, a dovha, ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Lamentations3:4 O kalahisa lukanda lwanga a nnyondisa, a mpwasha marambo." 
Lamentations3:5 O nngovhela a ntangela ngomu nga vhutulu na zwi konḓaho. 
Lamentations3:6 O ita uri ndi dzule swiswini unga vho faho kale. 
Lamentations3:7 O ntangela ngomu nga mutsheṱo, a thi koni u ponyoka; o mmbofha nga geḓane dzi lemelaho." 
Lamentations3:8 Naho ndi tshi ṱavha mukosi nda ri, “Mphalale!” ha thetshelesi thabelo yanga." 
Lamentations3:9 O thivha nḓila yanga nga murango, o kombamisa nḓila dzanga." 
Lamentations3:10 O vha a tshi nga biara yo lalelaho, a tshi nga ndau yo dzumbamaho," 
Lamentations3:11 a nkhwikhwidza a mmvisa nḓilani a ntumukanya a ntsia ndi khuvhabvu. 
Lamentations3:12 O akha vhura hawe a nnyita tshipfulwa tsha misevhe yawe. 
Lamentations3:13 O ṱomola misevhe yawe mukutuni a tou rumbula mbilu yanga ngayo. 
Lamentations3:14 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha hashu vha a ntsea, vha nngoḓa nga zwiimbo zwavho ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Lamentations3:15 O nndyisa miri i kalakataho, a nthamisa nga ndulu." 
Lamentations3:16 O mpwasha maṋo nga thombwana nga u nkhurudzha mavuni. 
Lamentations3:17 Ndo vha ndi tshi khou kundiswa mulalo; ndo no hangwa na uri mashudu ndi mini. 
Lamentations3:18 Ndi zwine nda ri, “Ndi hone ndo lovha na zwoṱhe zwe nda vha ndo lavhelela uri Muṋe washu u ḓo nnyitela.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Ndi tshi elelwa u tambula hanga na u tendeleka hanga, zwi kalakata unga ndulu na vhutulu." 
Lamentations3:20 Nda zwi elekanya nda dovha, nda kulea nungo." 
Lamentations3:21 Naho zwo ralo ndi dovha nda fulufhela ndi tshi elelwa uri 
Lamentations3:22 lufuno lwa Muṋe washu a lu fheli. Ndi zwe ra si nyenge; khathutshelo yawe a i gumi. 
Lamentations3:23 Matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe i a vusuluswa; u fulufhedzea hau ndi huhulu. 
Lamentations3:24 Ndi ḓivhudza nda ri, “Muṋe washu ndi Ene mukovhe wanga, zwenezwo ndi ḓo fulufhela Ene.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Vhane vha mu fulufhela vha mu ṱoḓa, Muṋe washu u a vha tonda." 
Lamentations3:26 Ndi zwavhuḓi u lindela u tshidzwa nga Muṋe washu wo dzika. 
Lamentations3:27 Ndi zwavhuḓi muthu a tshi hwala dzhogo a tshee nga hawe. 
Lamentations3:28 Nga a dzule e eṱhe e tshete; o i hweswa nga Muṋe washu. 
Lamentations3:29 Nga a ḓiṱukufhadze, zwe a lavhelela zwi nga kha ḓi ḓa." 
Lamentations3:30 Luṱaha lwawe nga a lu ṋekedze ane a mu rwa, nga' niwe zwawe nga ṱhoni." 
Lamentations3:31 Muṋe washu ha laṱi vhathu lini na lini. 
Lamentations3:32 Naho a tshi vha ḓisela zwi vhavhaho, u ḓo vha khathutshela; lufuno lwawe ndi luhulu, a lu fheli." 
Lamentations3:33 A tshi tambudza vhana vha vhathu ha itwi nga u takalela u vha vhaisa. 
Lamentations3:34 Zwivhotshwa zwoṱhe zwi tshi kandeledzwa shangoni," 
Lamentations3:35 muthu a tshi kundiswa u wana pfanelo dzawe dzine Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a vhona zwo mu fanela," 
Lamentations3:36 muthu a sa wani zwo mu fanelaho tsengoni, zwo raloho Muṋe washu ha zwi vhoni naa?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ndi nnyi ane a nga ri u amba tshithu tsha vha hone arali Muṋe washu a songo ri zwi ralo? 
Lamentations3:38 Hu tshi ḓa khombo na zwivhuya, a si nge Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a ri zwi vhe hone naa?" 
Lamentations3:39 Muthu a nga gungulelani? Hufha a tshi kha ḓi tshila naho e mutshinyi! 
Lamentations3:40 Nga ri dzou sedza nḓila dzashu nga nthihi nga nthihi, ri humele ha Muṋe washu."
