Lamentations3:41 Nga ri livhise mbilu dzashu na zwanḓa zwashu ha Mudzimu a re ṱaḓulu ri ri," 
Lamentations3:42 “Ro tshinya ra u shandukela, Iwe wa si ri hangwele.”" 
Lamentations3:43 Wo ḓiputela nga mbiti dzau wa ri pandamedza, wa ri vhulaha u sa khathutsheli." 
Lamentations3:44 Wo ḓiputela nga gole, uri hu si vhe na thabelo ine ya phuletshedza ya swika ha Iwe." 
Lamentations3:45 Wo ri ita mathukhwi na malambelo vhukati ha dzitshakha. 
Lamentations3:46 Maswina ashu oṱhe o ri nyadza a ri holedza. 
Lamentations3:47 Ri ofha ra tou tetemela, ro lovha, ro pwashekana." 
Lamentations3:48 Maṱo anga a shuluwa milambo ya miṱodzi nge vhathu vhanga vha lozwiwa. 
Lamentations3:49 Maṱo anga a ḓo ḓi shuluwa miṱodzi i sa fheli, a sa litshi," 
Lamentations3:50 Muṋe washu a vhuye a lavhelese fhasi e ṱaḓulu a zwi vhona. 
Lamentations3:51 Mbilu yanga i a vhavha ndi tshi vhona zwi itwaho vhasadzi vhoṱhe vha muḓi wa hashu. 
Lamentations3:52 Vhe vha vha vha tshi sokou mmbenga vho vha vha tshi nnzwima unga tshiṋoni. 
Lamentations3:53 Vho mposa dindini vha khokhela matombo; 
Lamentations3:54 maḓi a ntibedza ṱhoho, nda vhona unga ndi hone ndo fa." 
Lamentations3:55 Ndo vhidzelela dzina ḽau, Iwe Muṋe wanga, ndi fhasi-fhasi dindini." 
Lamentations3:56 Iwe wa pfa khumbelo yanga ndi tshi ri, “U songo litsha u thetshelesa ndi tshi u ṱavhela mukosi uri u nthule.”" 
Lamentations3:57 Ndi tshi u vhidza, wo ḓa tsini hanga wa ri, “U songo ofha tshithu.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, wo ntsengela wa ntshidza." 
Lamentations3:59 Iwe Muṋe washu wo vhona u khakhelwa hanga. Ima na nṋe! 
Lamentations3:60 Wo vhona he ndifhedzo yavho ya guma hone, na zwoṱhe zwine vha nndangana." 
Lamentations3:61 Iwe Muṋe washu, wo pfa maṱamba avho, na zwoṱhe zwine vha nndangana," 
Lamentations3:62 zwine maswina anga a hevhedza, a ntsatsaladza ḓuvha ḽoṱhe." 
Lamentations3:63 Edzou vha vhona! Arali vho dzula kana vho ima, vha nkolela nga nyimbo dzavho." 
Lamentations3:64 Iwe Muṋe washu, u lifhedza muthu nga zwo mu teaho; ndi zwone, vha lifhedze zwe vha zwi ita vhone vhaṋe." 
Lamentations3:65 Vha na mbilu dza u ḓihudza – ngavhe vha tshi teketelwa nga yone swili yavho. 
Lamentations3:66 Vha pandamedze wo sinyuwa u vha lozwe, u vha tupule vha si tsha vha hone fhasi ha lutombo lwa Muṋe washu." 
Lamentations4:1 Yowee, musuku a u tsha penya, musuku u songo vangwaho wo rivha! Nungu khethwa dzo balangana na mikoto!" 
Lamentations4:2 Vhathu vha Tsioni vhe vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓiwa nga vhoṱhe, vhe vha vha vha sa rengwi na nga musuku, zwino vha vho itwa unga khali dza vumba dzo vhumbwaho nga zwanḓa zwa muvhumbi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Phunguhwe na dzone dzi mamisa vhana vhadzo, hone vhathu vhanga vho no vha na tshiṱuhu unga dzimphwe dza phangani." 
Lamentations4:4 Lushie lu pfa ḓora, lulimi lwalwo lwa tou nambatela marinini; vhana vha humbela vhuswa, hone a hu na ane a vha ṅwatela." 
Lamentations4:5 Vhe vha vhuya vha ḽa zwiṋu, vha fa nga nḓala mikotoni ya muḓi. Vhe vha vha vha tshi siamedza ṱhoho kha dza muridili zwino vho lala ḓaleḓaleni." 
Lamentations4:6 Vhutshinyi ha vhathu vhanga vhu fhira vhuḽa ha Sodoma, we wa sokou phusukana kathihi fhedzi hu si na we a isa tshanḓa." 
Lamentations4:7 Vhavhusi vhavho vho vha vha tshi penya u fhira mahaḓa, vhó tshena u fhira mafhi, mivhili yavho yó tswuka u fhira rubi, zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwo tsha zwi tshi nga safire." 
Lamentations4:8 Hone zwino zwifhaṱuwo zwo swifhala u fhira tshinyai, dzinḓilani a vha ḓihwi. Lukanda lwavho lwo onyana nṱha ha marambo avho; lwo oma unga thanda." 
Lamentations4:9 Vhe vha vhulawa nga pfumo vha khwiṋe u fhira vhe vha fa nga nḓala. Vhe vha ṱahadzwa nga nḓala vha fhelela nga u shaya zwiḽiwa zwi bvaho masimuni. 
Lamentations4:10 Vhasadzi vha lufuno vho bika vhana vhavho nga zwavho zwanḓa, ndi zwone zwiḽiwa zwavho zwiḽa vhathu vhanga vha tshi lozwiwa." 
Lamentations4:11 Muṋe washu o vusa mbiti dzawe dzoṱhe; o shulula mbiti dzawe dzi ofhisaho. O funga mulilo Tsioni wa fhisa miteo yawo. 
Lamentations4:12 Mahosi a ḽifhasi a vho ngo vhuya vha zwi fulufhela, vhathu vha shango a vho ngo vhuya vha zwi tenda, uri maswina na vhakandeledzi vha nga vhuya vha dzhena nga khoro dza Jerusalema." 
Lamentations4:13 Mulandu u na vhaporofita vhawo; ndi vhutshinyi ha vhotshifhe vhawo vhe vha fhaladza malofha a vha si na mulandu ngomu hawo. 
Lamentations4:14 Zwino vha tendeleka na dzinḓila unga mabofu, vho khakhaṱhela na tshikha dza malofha, nguvho dzavho a dzi tsha kwamea." 
Lamentations4:15 Vhathu vha vha ṱavhela mukosi vha ri, “Ṱuwani! No kumala! Ṱuwani! Ṱuwani! Ni songo ri kwama!” Musi vha tshi shavha vha tshi tendeleka na vha dzitshakha dza vhannḓa vha ri, “Vha songo dzula fhano!”" 
Lamentations4:16 Muṋe washu Ene muṋe o vha balanganya; ha tsha vha londa. Vhotshifhe a vha tsha huliswa, na vhakalaha a vha khathutshelwi." 
Lamentations4:17 Ro lavhelela u fariswa, maṱo a vhuya a neta, mathina ndi mahandana fhedzi. Rí thawarani dzashu ro vha ro sedza lushaka, lwe lwa vha lu sa koni u ri tshidza." 
Lamentations4:18 Maswina o ri zwima hoṱhe he ra vha ri tshi kanda hone, uri ri si kone u tshimbila mikotoni ya muḓi washu, vhufhelo hashu ho vha vhu tsini, maḓuvha ashu o vha o vhaliwa, vhufhelo hashu ho vha ho swika." 
Lamentations4:19 Vhatovholi vhashu vho vha vhe na luvhilo lu no fhira lwa magoni; vho ri pandamedza dzithavhani, vha ri lalela phangani." 
Lamentations4:20 Mufemo wa vhutshilo hashu, ene mutiwa wa Muṋe washu, vho mu fasha nga khunḓa dzavho. Ro vha ri tshi vhona unga ri ḓo tshila rí vhukati ha dzitshakha, rí fhasi ha murunzi wawe." 
Lamentations4:21 Iwe Edomo, pembela zwau, takala zwau iwe u no dzula shangoni ḽa Utsi. Na iwe tshinwelo u ḓo tshi nwa-vho, wa tou kambwa wa bvula zwiambaro wa sala fhedzi." 
Lamentations4:22 Iwe Tsioni, ṱhamu yau i ḓo guma, Muṋe washu ha nga lapfisi u thubwa hau. Hone iwe ṅwananyana wa Edomo, u ḓo u rwela vhukhakhi hau, a ṱana vhutshinyi hau." 
Lamentations5:1 Muṋe washu, elelwa zwo ri welaho, edzou sedza u vhone ṱhoni dzashu." 
Lamentations5:2 Shango ḽashu ḽo dzhiwa nga vhatsinda, mahaya ashu o ṋewa vhasili." 
Lamentations5:3 Ro no vha tsiwana dzi si na vhokhotsi, vhomme ashu ndi dzitshilikadzi." 
Lamentations5:4 Maḓi a u nwa ri tou renga; khuni ri tou rengiselwa. 
Lamentations5:5 Vha ri poṋodza zwirethe, a vha ri humeli; ro neta, a ri vhuyi ra awela." 
Lamentations5:6 Ro humbela Egipita na Ashuru uri ri wane zwiḽiwa. 
Lamentations5:7 Vhokhotsi ashu vho tshinya, a vha tsheeho, zwino riṋe ro hwala milandu yavho." 
Lamentations5:8 Ri vho vhuswa na nga dziphuli, a hu na ane a nga ri lamukisa zwanḓani zwavho." 
Lamentations5:9 Ri wana zwiḽiwa nga u tou ḓifunga nga ṅwambo wa pfumo ḽo ri lalelaho sogani. 
Lamentations5:10 Lukanda lwashu lu fhisa unga ṋanḓo, ri vho songololwa nga nḓala." 
Lamentations5:11 Vhasadzi vho tshipiwa Tsioni, vhasidzana vho batiwa miḓanani ya Juda." 
Lamentations5:12 Vhavhusi vhashu vho fhahewa vhó vhoxwa zwanḓa; na vhakalaha maswina ha vha hulisi. 
Lamentations5:13 Vhaṱhannga vha shuma vha bva biko guyoni; vhatukana vha pepeleka na madzanda a khuni. 
Lamentations5:14 Vhahulwane a vha tsha dzula khoroni ya muḓi; vhaṱhannga a vha tsha lidza nyimbo dzavho. 
Lamentations5:15 Dakalo ḽo pfuluwa mbiluni dzashu; a ri tsha tshina, ri vho lila." 
Lamentations5:16 Ṱhohoni a ri tshee na tshiala, tsho wa. Ro tshinya, ro zwi vhona!" 
Lamentations5:17 Ndi zwe mbilu dzashu dza ṋoka. Ndi nga mulandu wa hezwi zwithu maṱo ashu a tshi vho vha na luswiswi," 
Lamentations5:18 ndi nge thavha ya Tsioni ya sala i soga, phunguhwe dzi tshi sokou tendeleka nayo." 
Lamentations5:19 Iwe Muṋe washu u vhusa lini na lini, khuluṋoni yau i ḓi dzula i hone ha vhuya ha fhira mirafho na mirafho." 
Lamentations5:20 Ndi mini u si tsha vhuya wa ri elelwa? Ndi mini u tshi ri furalela tshifhinga tshingafha? 
Lamentations5:21 Yawee Muṋe washu, ri humisele ha Iwe muṋe, uri ri kone u vhuelela, zwi dovhe zwi nge zwa kale!" 
Lamentations5:22 Kani-ha wo ri laṱa tshoṱhe? Wo ri sinyutshela lwa u kalula naa? 
Ezekiel1:1 Muṋe washu a tshi thoma u amba na Esekiele ḽo vha ḽi ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa wa ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu tshee khosi Jehoyakhini a thubelwa Babele. Esekiele ndi ṅwana wa tshifhe a no pfi Buzi. Vhukuma, Muṋe washu a amba nae henefho shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia he Vhaisraele vha thubelwa hone, khunzikhunzini ya mulambo wa Khebara; lutombo lwa vulea Mudzimu a mu sumbedza mabono, Muṋe washu a vhea tshanḓa tshawe khae a mu ita muḓinḓa wawe. Zwenezwo Esekiele o vha e na miṅwaha ya 30." 
Ezekiel1:2  
Ezekiel1:3  
Ezekiel1:4 Ndo sedza nda vhona muya wa maḓumbu u tshi tita u tshi bva devhula, gole ḽihulu ḽo tangwaho nga tshedza, mulilo u re na ṱhase dza phenyo dza nḓadzi dzi tshi penya ngeno na ngeno, vhukati ha uyo mulilo hu tshi nga tsimbi i penyaho nga mulilo." 
Ezekiel1:5 Vhukati ha mulilo nda vhona zwi no nga zwivhumbwa zwiṋa. Zwo vha zwi na tshivhumbeo tshi no nga tsha muthu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho vha tshi na zwifhaṱuwo zwiṋa, na phapha nṋa." 
Ezekiel1:7 Milenzhe yazwo yo vha yo tou tswititi, zwi na khwanḓa dzi no nga dza phulu, zwi tshi penya unga musinaseṱha wo kulutedzwaho." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ho vha hu tshi vhonala zwanḓa zwa vhathu fhasi ha phapha dzazwo; zwoṱhe vhuṋa hazwo zwo vha zwi na zwifhaṱuwo na phapha. 
Ezekiel1:9 Phapha dzazwo dzo vha dzo kwamana. Zwi tshi tshimbila zwo vha zwi sa rembuluwi, tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi tshi tshimbila tshó livha phanḓa tsho tou tswi." 
Ezekiel1:10 Zwifhaṱuwo zwazwo zwo vha zwo tou rali: zwo vha zwi na zwifhaṱuwo zwi no nga zwa vhathu, vhuṋa hazwo zwo vha zwi na tshifhaṱuwo tshi no nga tsha ndau thungo ya tshauḽa, vhuṋa hazwo zwí na tshifhaṱuwo tshi no nga tsha mboho thungo ya tshamonde, vhuṋa hazwo zwí na tshifhaṱuwo tshi no nga tsha goni." 
Ezekiel1:11 Phapha dzazwo dzo vha dzo ṱharamuwa dzo imela nṱha; tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho vha tshi na phapha mbili, dzo kwama dza tshiṅwe, na phapha mbili dzo fukedzaho muvhili watsho." 
Ezekiel1:12 Zwo vha zwi tshi tshimbila zwo tou tswi, zwo livha phanḓa; zwo vha zwi tshi ya he muya wa zwi khadela hone; zwi tshi tshimbila zwo vha zwi sa rembuluwi." 
Ezekiel1:13 Zwivhumbwa izwo zwo vha zwi tshi nga masimbe a dugaho, zwi na khavhu dzi no penya phanḓa na murahu vhukati ha izwo zwivhumbwa; mulilo wa vhonetshela, lupenyo lu no nga lwa nḓadzi lu tshi bva kha uyo mulilo," 
Ezekiel1:14 zwisikwa zwi tshi gidimela phanḓa na murahu unga phenyo dza mubvumo. 
Ezekiel1:15 Nṋe nda sedza izwo zwivhumbwa, nda vhona hu na mulinga wo kwama fhasi tsini ha tshivhumbwa tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe, vhuṋa hazwo." 
Ezekiel1:16 Iyo milinga yo vha i tshi penya unga tombo ḽa mutengo muhulu. Vhuṋa hayo yo vha i tshi fana, muṅwe na muṅwe wo itwa unga mulinga u na muṅwe wó rambalala ngomu hawo." 
Ezekiel1:17 I tshi tshimbila yo vha i tshi kona u livha masia maṋa, he izwo zwivhumbwa zwa sedza hone, i si vhuye ya peamela thungo." 
Ezekiel1:18 Lubomo lwayo lwo vha lwo hula lwa u tou ofhisa, mbomo dzoṱhe vhuṋa hadzo dzo vha dzi na maṱo hoṱhe-hoṱhe u mona nadzo." 
Ezekiel1:19 Musi zwivhumbwa izwo zwi tshi tshimbila, na milinga yo vha i tshi tshimbila i tsini hazwo; musi zwivhumbwa izwo zwi si tsha kanda fhasi, na iyo milinga yo vha i sa kandi fhasi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Milinga yo vha i tshi ya he muya wa i isa hone ngauri muya wa izwo zwivhumbwa wo vha u kha milinga. 
Ezekiel1:21 Musi zwivhumbwa zwi tshi tshimbila, na yone i a tshimbila, musi zwivhumbwa zwi tshi ima, na yone yo vha i tshi ima; musi zwivhumbwa zwi sa kandi fhasi, na yone yo vha i sa kandi fhasi, ngauri muya wa zwivhumbwa wo vha u kha milinga." 
Ezekiel1:22 Nṱha ha ṱhoho dza izwo zwivhumbwa ho vha hu na tshithu tshi no nga lutombo tshi tshi nga gambogo i penyaho lu ofhisaho tsho akha nṱha ha ṱhoho dzazwo. 
Ezekiel1:23 Fhasi ha lutombo lwonolwo phapha dzazwo dzo vha dzo ṱharamuwa dzo livha dza tshiṅwe, tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi na mbili dzine dza pila muvhili watsho." 
Ezekiel1:24 Nda pfa u unga ha phapha dzazwo musi zwi tshi khou tshimbila, hu tshi nga u unga ha guvhukuvhu ḽihulu, hu tshi pfala unga ipfi ḽa Ramaanḓaoṱhe, mubvumo u no nga wa ḓumbu, u tshi nga mubvumo wa mmbi khulu; musi zwi tshi ima, zwo vha zwi tshi peta phapha dzazwo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Musi zwi tshi ima zwa peta phapha dzazwo, ho pfala mubvumo u tshi bva nṱha ha lutombo lwo akhaho nṱha ha ṱhoho dzazwo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Nṱha ha ulwo lutombo lu re nṱha ha ṱhoho dzazwo ho vha hu na tshithu tshi no nga safire; tsho vha tsho vhumbwa unga khuluṋoni, nṱha-nṱha ha khuluṋoni yeneyo ho vha hu na muṅwe a no nga muthu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ndo mu vhona a tshi penya unga musinaseṱha, tsini hawe na u mona nae fhaḽa he ha vha hu tshi tou nga ndi khunduni dzawe u ya nṱha ho vha hu tshi vhonala zwi no nga mulilo, na tshedza tsho mu tanga u mona hoṱhe" 
Ezekiel1:28 tshi tshi nga musingavhadzimu u makoleni misi ya mvula; tshedza tsho mu tangaho tsho vhonala tsho tou ralo. Tsho vha tshi tshithu tshi no tou nga lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu. Nda lavhelesa, nda mbo shuvhama, nda pfa ipfi ḽi tshi amba." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ipfi ḽa ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, takuwa u ime, ndi konou amba na iwe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 A tshi khou amba maipfi ayo Muya a mbo ḓi dzhena kha nṋe, a ntakusa nda ima, nda mu pfa a tshi khou amba na nṋe" 
Ezekiel2:3 a tshi ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndi khou u ruma kha Vhaisiraele, havhaḽa mashandukwa vho ntshandukelaho. U swika zwino vhone na vhomakhulukuku wavho vha kha ḓi vha vho ntshandukela." 
Ezekiel2:4 Vhathu vhane nda u ruma khavho vha na tshipimbi na tshikhuna. Iyo vha vhudza u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ralo.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Havha vhathu ndi mashandukwa, hone naho vha thetshelesa kana vha si thetshelese, tenda vha ḓivha uri ho vha hu na muporofita khavho." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Huno iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u songo vha ofha, u songo ofha nangwe zwa nga wo fashwa nga mipfa ya muluwa, wo kanda phame! Havha vhathu ndi mashandukwa, hone u songo vhuya wa ofha zwine vha amba." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ndi mashandukwa, hone naho vha thetshelesa kana vha sa thetshelesi, iwe u vha vhudze maipfi anga." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, thetshelesa zwine nda u vhudza: u songo vha ḽishandukwa na iwe wa nga havhaḽa vha mashandukwa. Aṱama mulomo wau u ḽe zwine nda ṱoḓa u u ṋea.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Nṋe nda sedza nda vhona tshanḓa tshi tshi khou onyolowa tshi tshi ḓa ha nṋe tsho fara kubugu. 
Ezekiel2:10 A ku petulula henefho phanḓa hanga; kwo vha kwo ṅwalwa phanḓa na murahu; kwo vha kwo ṅwalwa upfi, “Zwililo, u honḓa, u ṱungufhala.”" 
Ezekiel3:1 Huno a mmbudza a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, iḽa zwe wa ṋewa; iḽa kubugu hoku u kone u yo amba na vhathu vha Israele.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi aṱama mulomo, a nṋea kubugu uri ndi ḽe," 
Ezekiel3:3 a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, iḽa u fure nga kubugu kune nda khou u ṋea.” Nṋe nda ku ḽa, nda pfa ku tshi ḓifha unga mutoli." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ndi hone a tshi amba na nṋe a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, iya kha vhathu vha Israele u vha vhudze zwe nda u vhudza." 
Ezekiel3:5 A thi khou u ruma kha lushaka lu no amba luambo lusili lu konḓaho, ndi khou u ruma kha vha hau vha Israele." 
Ezekiel3:6 A thi khou u ruma kha tshakha khulwane dzine dza amba nyambo dzisili dzi konḓaho, dzine wa sa ḓo ṱalukanya maipfi adzo. Arali ndo vha ndo u ruma khavho, vho vha vha tshi ḓo u thetshelesa;" 
Ezekiel3:7 hone vha hau vha Israele vha nga si u thetshelese, ngauri na Nṋe a vha tendi u nthetshelesa. Vhoṱhe vhathu vha Israele vha na tshipimbi na tshikhuna." 
Ezekiel3:8 Hone zwino, ndi ḓo ita uri na iwe u vhe na tshipimbi na tshikhuna unga vhone." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ṱhoho yau ndi ḓo i konḓisa ya nga daimane; daimane yo khwaṱha u fhira ḽihangahwe. Zwenezwo u songo vha ofha, u songo vha tetemela ngauri ndi vhathu vha mashandukwa.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u elelwe zwoṱhe zwine nda u vhudza, thetshelesa zwavhuḓi," 
Ezekiel3:11 u kone u ya ha vha hau vho thubwaho. U vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ralo!’ nangwe vha thetshelesa kana vha si thetshelese!”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Muya a ntakula, murahu hanga nda pfa mubvumo muhulu wa ipfi ḽi tshi ri, “Nga hu rendwe vhugala ha Muṋe washu henefho hune a dzula hone.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Wo vha u mukosi wa phapha dza zwiḽa zwivhumbwa zwi tshi khou rwana, na mubvumo wa milinga i re tsini hazwo, mukosi muhulu." 
Ezekiel3:14 Muya a ntakula a ṱuwa na nṋe, nda ṱuwa mbilu yanga yo dinalea nda pfa ndo ḓalelwa, tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsho vha tshi tshee tsho ntsikeledza." 
Ezekiel3:15 Nda swika Thele Avivi, mathubwani tsini na mulambo wa Khebara he vha vha vha tshi dzula hone; nda dzula navho maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ndó hanganea." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ho no fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe la ri," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndo u vhea uri u vhe mulindi wa vhathu vha Israele. Misi yoṱhe u tshi pfa ipfi ḽanga, u vha kaidze nga dzina ḽanga." 
Ezekiel3:18 Arali nda amba na muvhi nda ri: ‘U ḓo fa,’ iwe wa si mu kaidze wa si ambe wa mu kaidza a laṱa maitele awe o vhifhaho uri a tshile, zwenezwo ene u ḓo fela vhuvhi hawe, hone a fa ndi ḓo ri ndi mulandu wau." 
Ezekiel3:19 Huno arali wa kaidza muvhi, ene a si laṱe vhuvhi hawe, zwenezwo ene u ḓo fela vhuvhi hawe, iwe wa vha wo ḓitshidza." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Arali muvhuya a si tsha fulufhedzea a vho ita vhuvhi a ḓiretshela tshikwekwe, na onoyo u ḓo fa; nge wa kundwa u mu kaidza, u ḓo fela vhuvhi hawe, zwe a ita a tshi kha ḓi fulufhedzea a zwi tsha ḓo humbulwa, hone Nṋe a fa ndi ḓo ri ndi mulandu wau." 
Ezekiel3:21 Huno arali wa kaidza muvhuya a si tshinye, ene a ḓiilisa vhutshinyi, vhukuma u ḓo tshila nge a kaidzwa, na iwe-vho wa vha wo ḓitshidza.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Musi ndi tshee henengei tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tsha mpfara, a ri, “Takuwa, ibva u ye govhani; ndi ḓo amba na iwe henefho.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Nṋe nda takuwa nda ya govhani; henefho ho vha hu na vhugala ha Muṋe washu, vhu tshi nga vhugala he nda vhu vhona mulamboni wa Khebara; nṋe nda wa nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
Ezekiel3:24 Muya wa Muṋe washu a dzhena kha nṋe a nnyimisa, a amba na nṋe. Muṋe washu a amba na nṋe a ri, “Iyo ḓihoṋela nḓuni yau." 
Ezekiel3:25 Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, zwino u ḓo ṱuwa u tshi vhofhiwa; vha ḓo u vhofha wa si tsha ṱangana na vhaṅwe." 
Ezekiel3:26 Ndi ḓo ita uri lulimi lwau lu nambatele marinini; u ḓo vha tshimuma wa kundwa u vha kaidza, ngauri ndi vhathu vha mashandukwa." 
Ezekiel3:27 Musi ndi tshi amba na iwe, ndi ḓo u vula mulomo, iwe wa vha vhudza wa ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ralo.’ Ane a ḓo thetshelesa, litsha a thetshelese; ane a si thetshelese, litsha a si thetshelese; hufha vhe vhathu vha mashandukwa." 
Ezekiel4:1 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, dzhia lubaba lwa vumba u lu vhee phanḓa hau; u ole muḓi wa Jerusalema khalwo." 
Ezekiel4:2 Wo no ralo u u govhele, u u tange nga mutsheṱo, u u khokhele thulwi dza mavu, u fhaṱe mishasha, u vhaḓe na thanda ndenya dza u thutha mitsheṱo yawo," 
Ezekiel4:3 u konou dzhia tsimbi ya baphathi u ite mutsheṱo wa tsimbi vhukati hau na muḓi. U lwe nawo u u govhele iwe muṋe. Hetsho ndi tshiga tsha vhathu vha Israele. 
Ezekiel4:4 “Lala nga lurumbu lwa tshamonde, u hwale vhuvhi ha vhathu vha Israele. Ndi funa uri u hwale vhuvhi havho maḓuvha manzhi wo lala henefho." 
Ezekiel4:5 A vha Nṋe ndo vhea maḓuvha a vhuvhi havho a ita 390; maḓuvha eneo iwe u ḓo hwala vhuvhi ha vhathu vha Israele. 
Ezekiel4:6 Musi maḓuvha eneo o no fhela, u dovhe u lale nga lurumbu lwa tshauḽa wa hwala vhuvhi ha vhathu vha Juda wa fhedza maḓuvha a 40. Ndo u vhetshela uri ḓuvha ḽithihi ḽi imele ṅwaha muthihi." 
Ezekiel4:7 U lwe na muḓi wa Jerusalema u u govhele, u u finyele zwanḓa u u ṱunge, u porofite zwi no ḓo u wela." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ndi ḓo u vhofha nga thambo wa si kone u rembuluwa u swika maḓuvha a u govhelwa hawo a tshi fhela. 
Ezekiel4:9 “Zwenezwo u dzhie goroi na bali na ṋawa na ṱhumbe na mufhoho na luvhele, u zwi bike nga khali nthihi zwi vhe zwiḽiwa zwau. U zwi ḽe maḓuvha eneo oṱhe wo lala nga lurumbu, maḓuvha a 390." 
Ezekiel4:10 U ḽe zwiḽiwa zwi no eḓana dzigiramu dza 230 nga ḓuvha. 
Ezekiel4:11 U nwe maḓi a si gathi, khavho mbili nga ḓuvha u tshi nwa nga zwiṱuku nga zwiṱuku." 
Ezekiel4:12 Iḽa izwo zwiḽiwa unga u tshi ḽa mukonde wa bali, u zwi bike hune vhathu vha u vhona, u zwi bike nga mupfudze wa vhathu." 
Ezekiel4:13 U ambe u ri, ‘Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele u ri: Vhaisraele vha ḓo ḽa zwiḽiwa zwavho zwo kumalaho nga u ralo, hoṱhe hune nda ḓo vha balanganya na dzitshakha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Ndi hone nṋe tshi ri, “Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Muṋe washu, nṋe a thi athu vhuya nda ḓikumadza. U bva hanani hanga u swika zwino, a thi athu vhuya nda ḽa tshidu kana tsho vhulawaho nga zwivhanda; mulomoni wanga a hu athu vhuya ha dzhena ṋama yo tshinyalaho.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Ene a ri, “Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo u litsha wa bika zwiḽiwa zwau nga mupfudze wa kholomo, wa si tsha zwi bika nga wa vhathu.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndi ḓo ita uri Jerusalema hu we nḓala; vha ḓo ḽa zwiḽiwa zwi no tou eliwa vha tshi ḽa mbilu, vha ḓo nwa maḓi o tou eliwa vha tshi tetemela." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ndi uri zwiḽiwa na maḓi zwi ḓo shaea; vha ḓo fhela nga muthihi nga muthihi nga vhuvhi havho.” 
Ezekiel5:1 Muṋe washu a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, dzhia banga ḽa vhuhali ḽi no fhira unga luare lwa muvheuli, u vheule mavhudzi au na ndebvu dzau ngaḽo. U konou dzhia zwikalo u kale ayo mavhudzi, u a fhandekanye a ite zwiputu zwiraru." 
Ezekiel5:2 U fhise kuputu kuthihi u vhukati ha muḓi, musi maḓuvha a u govhelwa hawo o no fhela. Kuṅwe u ku remekanye nga banga u mona na muḓi; mavhudzi a kuṅwe kuputu kuthihi u a balanganye muyani, Nṋe ndi ḓo a pandamedza nga banga ḽanga." 
Ezekiel5:3 U dzhie mavhudzi a si gathi u a pute nga lupendelo lwa khanzu yau. 
Ezekiel5:4 Kha eneo u dovhe u dzhie a si gathi u a pose muliloni a swe. Hu ḓo bva mulilo khao, wa ṱanganya vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Hoyu ndi muḓi wa Jerusalema, ndo u vhea vhukati ha dzitshakha, wo tangwa nga mashango asili." 
Ezekiel5:6 U na luswetho, wo shandukela ndayo dzanga u fhira tshakha dza vhannḓa; wo shandukela milayo yanga u fhira mashango o u tangaho; wo landula ndayo dzanga, wa hana u vhulunga milayo yanga.”" 
Ezekiel5:7 Zwenezwo Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga no ntshandukela u fhira tshakha dzo ni tangaho, vhunga ni songo vhulunga milayo yanga kana na tevhedza ndaela dzanga, ni sa tevhedzi na ndaela dza tshakha dzo ni tangaho," 
Ezekiel5:8 zwino-ha Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Zwino ndi lwa na inwi, ndi ḓo ni lifhedza tshakha dzoṱhe dzi tshi zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndi ḓo ni ita zwine nda sa athu ni ita, zwine nda si tsha ḓo dovha nda zwi ita, nga zwi nengisaho zwe na ita." 
Ezekiel5:10 Vhokhotsi aṋu vha ḓo ḽa vhana vhavho, vhana vha ḽa vhokhotsi avho. Ndi ḓo ni lifhedza, tsalela dzaṋu nda dzi balanganya muyani." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Zwino-ha, ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga,” – hu amba Muṋe washu – “vhunga vhukuma no kumadza fhethu hanga hukhethwa nga zwi nengisaho na zwiito zwaṋu zwa mashika, na Nṋe ndi ḓo ni ṱangula ndi sa khathutsheli; a thi nga litshi muthu." 
Ezekiel5:12 Tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tsha vhathu vha haṋu vha ḓo fa nga dwadze kana vha fhela nga nḓala henefha ngomu muḓini; tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tsha vhathu vha haṋu vha ḓo fa nga pfumo ngei nnḓa ha mutsheṱo; tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru ndi ḓo tshi balanganya muyani ndi tshi khou vha pandamedza nga pfumo. 
Ezekiel5:13 Ndi hone mbiti dzanga dzi tshi ḓo fhela, nda rudza mbilu nda si tsha vha sinyutshela, nda vha ndo ḓilifhedzela. Musi mbiti dzanga dzo no fhelela khavho, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndo amba ndi mbitini." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndi ḓo vha phusukanya ha sala matumba, vha nyadzwa nga tshakha dzo vha tangaho, vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha gondo vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Ni ḓo nyadzwa na shona, na tou vha ndayo na tsumbo ya zwi ofhisaho kha tshakha dzoṱhe dzo ni tangaho musi ndi tshi ni haṱula ndi mbitini, ndó sinyuwa, ndi tshi ni rwa nga ṱhamu i vhavhaho. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel5:16 “Ndi ḓo ni ḓisela misevhe i vhulahaho nga nḓala; i ḓo ni lozwa, vhunga ndi tshi ḓo i ḓisa uri i ni lozwe; ndi ḓo ni wisela nḓala khulu ha sala hu si tshee na zwiḽiwa." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndi ḓo ita uri hu we nḓala, nda ruma na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka zwa ni vhulahela vhana; ndi ḓo ni ḓisela dwadze, ha shuluwa malofha. Ndi ḓo ni rambela pfumo. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽi tshi ri," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, sedza thavha dza Israele u porofite zwine zwa ḓo dzi wela." 
Ezekiel6:3 U ambe u ri, ‘Inwi thavha dza Israele, ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a tshi amba na dzithavha na mivhundu na milambo na magovha u ri: Thetshelesani, ndi ḓo ni rambela pfumo, nda phusukanya vhurerelo haṋu miṱumbani." 
Ezekiel6:4 Aḽiṱari dzaṋu dzi ḓo thuthekanywa, aḽiṱari dza u dubisela zwioro dza pwashekanywa, nda posa zwitumbu zwa vhathu vha rerelelaho kha inwi henefho phanḓa ha midzimi yaṋu ya mathukhwi," 
Ezekiel6:5 marambo avho a ḓo balanganywa u mona na aḽiṱari dzaṋu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Shangoni ḽaṋu ḽoṱhe miḓi i ḓo phusukanywa, aḽiṱari dzaṋu dza thuthwa, zwivhanga zwa sala zwi si na muthu, e matumba, midzimu yaṋu ya zwifanyiso ya pwashiwa i si tsha vha hone, dziaḽiṱari dzaṋu dza u fhisela zwioro dza pwashekanywa, zwithu zwoṱhe zwe na ḓiitela zwa lozwiwa tshoṱhe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Vhukati haṋu hu ḓo wa vho vhulawaho nga pfumo. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘Hone vhaṅwe vhaṋu ndi ḓo vha tshidza; vha ḓo ponyoka pfumo, nda vha balanganya na dzitshakha." 
Ezekiel6:9 Tsalela dzaṋu dzi ḓo nnyelelwa dzi vhukati ha dzitshakha he vha hwalwa vha iswa hone. Ndi ḓo vha ndo vunḓekanya mbilu dzavho dzi no ṱolou ntshandukela, nda swingisa maṱo avho a no ṱolou ntshandukela ane a emula midzimu ya dzitshikha unga phombwe i tshi emula munna a si wayo. Vha ḓo ḓinengwa vha tshi humbula vhutshinyi hoṱhe na zwi nengisaho zwe vha ita." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee; ndo amba, thi swaswi, ndi ri khombo hedzo dzoṱhe dzi ḓo vha wela.’ ”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhandani zwanḓa, giḓani fhasi nga milenzhe, ni ri, ‘Ri lilela vhuvhi hoṱhe vhu nengisaho ha vhathu vha Israele vhane vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi ḽiwa nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze.’" 
Ezekiel6:12 Vha re kule vha ḓo fa nga dwadze, vha re tsini vha ḓo vhulawa nga pfumo, vho salaho vho govhelwa vha ḓo fa nga nḓala; mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo fhelela khavho nga u ralo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi vho faho nga pfumo vho lala henefho vhukati ha midzimu yavho ya dzitshika u mona na aḽiṱari dzavho, muvhunduni muṅwe na muṅwe, muṱumbani wa thavha iṅwe na iṅwe, fhasi ha muri muṅwe na muṅwe wo adzaho, fhasi ha muri muṅwe na muṅwe wa tshimvingimvingi, hoṱhe hune vha dubisa zwioro vha tshi itela midzimu yavho yoṱhe ya dzitshika." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda vha rwa, nda phusukanya shango ḽa sala ḽi si na muthu u bva phangani u swika Ribila, hoṱhe hu no dzula vhathu; ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi vhudza shango ḽa Israele ndi ri: Zwo fhela! Vhufhelo vhu ḓela ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Ezekiel7:3 “Zwino ndi hone zwo fhela iwe shango ḽa Juda; mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo fhelela kha iwe, nda u haṱula ndi tshi tevhedza zwiito zwau nda u sengisela mishumo yau yoṱhe i nengisaho." 
Ezekiel7:4 A thi nga u khathutsheli, a thi nga u sieli muthu; ndi ḓo u sengisela zwiito zwau na mishumo yau i nengisaho; ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino khombo dzi ḓo ṱanḓulukana, a dzi nga kundwi u ḓa." 
Ezekiel7:6 Vhufhelo vhu khou ḓa, vhufhelo vhu khou ni ḓela; vhu khou ḓa zwino." 
Ezekiel7:7 Zwino khombo yo ni wela inwi ni dzulaho shangoni heḽino. Tshifhinga tsho swika, ḓuvha ḽo sendela; zwino a hu tshee na mifhululu, hu pfala mikosi fhedzi nṱha ha dzithavha." 
Ezekiel7:8 Hu si kale ndi ḓo shululela mbiti dzanga kha inwi, u sinyuwa hanga ha tou fhelela kha inwi; ndi ḓo ni haṱula ndi tshi tevhedza mishumo yaṋu, nda ni lifhedzela mishumo yaṋu yoṱhe i nengisaho." 
Ezekiel7:9 A thi nga ni khathutsheli, a thi nga ni pfeli vhuṱungu, ndi ḓo ni lifhedzela mishumo yaṋu na zwiito zwaṋu zwi nengisaho; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, ndi a lifhedza." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Ḓuvha ngeḽi! Ḽo no swika; khombo yo ni wela; no ri u wana maanḓa, na u ḓihudza ha kalula." 
Ezekiel7:11 U levhelana ho no ḓiṋea maanḓa; ndi zwone, hu vhone, ha ri thundu dzavho, he lupfumo lwavho kana vhugala havho a hu na tshi no ḓo sala." 
Ezekiel7:12 “Tshifhinga tsho swika, ḓuvha ḽo sendela. Murengi a songo takalela tshe a renga, murengisi a songo tsha nga u a ḓisola nge a rengisa, ngauri mbiti dzi ḓo vha wela vhoṱhe." 
Ezekiel7:13 Murengisi a nga si tsha dovha a wana zwe a rengisa, naho murengisi na murengi vha tshi kha ḓi tshila vhoṱhe; khaṱhulo ye nda vha vhetshela a i nga kundwi u ḓa, vhoṱhe vha na mulandu, a hu na a no ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel7:14 “Phalaphala i ḓo lila, vhoṱhe vha ḓilugisa, hone ha si vhe na a no ḓo bva pfumo, ngauri mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo vha wela vhoṱhe." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Ngei nnḓa ha muḓi vhathu vha fhela nga pfumo; ngomu muḓini vhathu vha fhela nga dwadze na nḓala. Ane a wanala nnḓa u ḓo fa nga pfumo; ane a wanala muḓini u ḓo fa nga nḓala na dwadze. 
Ezekiel7:16 Tshavhi dzavho dzi ḓo shavhela dzithavhani; muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo lilela milandu yawe unga maivha a govhani. 
Ezekiel7:17 Zwanḓa zwavho zwi ḓo kulea nungo, vha ṋukadza vhurukhu nga nyofho," 
Ezekiel7:18 vha ambara madzanganda, vha tetemela nga nyofho. Vha ḓo tou niwa nga ṱhoni, vhoṱhe vha palula ṱhoho." 
Ezekiel7:19 Vha ḓo hashekanya siliva yavho dzinḓilani, musuku wavho vha ḓo u laṱa unga thiḓo, siliva yavho na musuku zwi nga si vha lamulele nga ḓuvha ḽa mbiti dza Yahavee; zwi nga si vha fushe, vha ḓo ṱwa na nḓala vhe nazwo, ngauri ndi zwone zwo itaho uri vha tshinye." 
Ezekiel7:20 Vho vha vha tshi ṱongisa lunako lwa nungu dzavho vha tshi ita ngazwo zwifanyiso na zwitungulo zwi nengisaho. Ndi zwine nda ḓo ita uri zwi vha nengise unga thiḓo. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndi ḓo ita uri zwi thubiwe nga vhatsinda, zwi ṱangulwe nga vhavhi vha shango vha zwi kumadze." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndi ḓo vha furalela, fhethu hanga hukhethwa hu ḓo kumadzwa; mavemu a ḓo dzhena a hu kumadza." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Vha itele geḓane ya u vha vhofha, ngauri vhahaṱuli vha shango ndi phondi dzi no shulula malofha, muḓini ho anda u huvhadzana." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ndi ḓo vhidza dzone tshakha dzi no fhira dzoṱhe nga vhuvhi dza thuba nnḓu dzavho. Ndi ḓo fhedza u ḓihudza ha vha maanḓa, fhethu havho hukhethwa hu ḓo kumadzwa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ho swika ḓuvha ḽi ofhisaho; vha ḓo ṱoḓa mulalo vha si u wane. 
Ezekiel7:26 Khombo dzi ḓo ṱanḓulukana, phungo i ḓo tevhela phungo, vha ḓo ṱoḓa bono kha muporofita, hone tshifhe ha tsha ḓo ḓivha pfunzo, vhahulwane a vha tsha ḓo kona u eletshedza vhathu." 
Ezekiel7:27 Khosi i ḓo lila, muvhusi u ḓo hanganea tshoṱhe, zwanḓa zwa vhathu vha shango zwi ḓo tetemela nga nyofho. Ndi ḓo vha ita zwo teaho mishumo yavho, nda vha haṱula nga khaṱhulo dze vha haṱula vhaṅwe ngadzo; ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi, ndó dzula hayani na vhahulwane vha Juda, tshanḓa tsha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu tsha nnziamedza." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndi tshi sedza nda vhona tshithu tshi no nga munna. U bva he ha vha hu tshi nga ndi khundu dzawe u tsela fhasi a tshi tou vha mulilo; u bva khunduni dzawe u ya nṱha o vha a tshi penya unga musinaseṱha wo kulutedzwaho. 
Ezekiel8:3 A ḓisa tshe tsha vha tshi tshi nga tshanḓa tshawe a mpfara nga mavhudzi; Muya a ntakulela nṱha a nkhwala a nnyisa Jerusalema ndi kha mabono a Mudzimu, a nnyisa tshifhingoni tsha khoro ya thungo ya devhula ya nga ngomu, ho imaho tshifanyiso tsha mudzimu usili wa u ṱunga mbiti dza Muṋe washu." 
Ezekiel8:4 Henefho nda vhona vhugala ha Mudzimu wa Israele, sa zwe nda vhu vhona ngei govhani." 
Ezekiel8:5 A ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, lilala u sedze devhula.” Nda lilala nda sedza devhula, henefho thungo ya devhula ha khoro ya aḽiṱari, ho vha ho ima mudzimu wa tshifanyiso u tshi ṱunga Muṋe washu henefho tshifhingoni." 
Ezekiel8:6 A ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u khou zwi vhona zwine vha khou ita? U khou vhona zwi nengisaho zwine vhathu vha Israele vha khou ita fhano uri vha kundise vhathu u dzhena fhethu hanga hukhethwa? U kha ḓi ḓo vhona zwiṅwe zwihulu zwi nengisaho.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 U bva henefho a nnyisa tshifhingoni tsha muṱa wa thembele. Nda sedza, nda vhona luvhondoni hu na buli." 
Ezekiel8:8 A ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, pwasha luvhondo u phuletshedze.” Nṋe nda pwasha luvhondo nda phuletshedza, nda wana hu na vothi." 
Ezekiel8:9 A ri, “Dzhena u vhone zwi nengisaho zwine vha khou ita hafho ngomu.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Nṋe nda dzhena nda sedza, nda vhona tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwifanyiso zwa dziṋowa na zwipuka zwi nengisaho na midzimu yoṱhe ya zwifanyiso ya vhathu vha Israele yo olwa luvhondoni u mona nalwo." 
Ezekiel8:11 Phanḓa ha iyo midzimu ya zwifanyiso ho vha ho ima vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha 70 vha Vhaisraele, muṅwe na muṅwe o fara mudzio wa zwioro zwi dubiswaho, mutsi u nukhelelaho na zwioro u tshi khou duba. Na Jaasania ṅwana wa Shafani o vha e navho." 
Ezekiel8:12 A ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, wo vhona zwine vhahulwane vha vhathu vha Israele vha zwi ita tshiphirini, muṅwe na muṅwe e kamarani yawe ya midzimu ya zwifanyiso? Vha ri, ‘Yahavee ha ri vhoni; Yahavee o ṱutshela shango heḽino.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 A ri, “U kha ḓi ḓo vhona zwiṅwe zwi no nengisesa zwine vha ita.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ndi hone a tshi nnzhia a nnyisa tshifhingoni tsha khoro ya devhula ya thembele ya Muṋe washu. Henefho ho vha ho dzula vhasadzi vha tshi khou lilela Thamusu. 
Ezekiel8:15 A ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u khou zwi vhona? U kha ḓi ḓo vhona zwi nengisaho u fhira izwo.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ndi hone a tshi nnyendedza a nnyisa muṱani wa nga ngomu wa thembele ya Muṋe washu. Henefho tshifhingoni tsha hukhethwa ha Muṋe washu, vhukati ha lufhera na aḽiṱari, ho vha hu na vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi nga swika 25, vhó furalela hukhethwa ha Muṋe washu, vhó lavhelesa vhubvaḓuvha. Vho vha vho kotamela vhubvaḓuvha vha tshi khou rabela ḓuvha." 
Ezekiel8:17 A mmbudza a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u khou zwi vhona? Zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho zwine vhathu vha Juda vha ita a zwi athu vha fusha. Vho phapha mbulu kha iṅwe vha ḓadza shango nga vhuvemu vha ḓi ṱunga mbiti dzanga zwa nga vha nṱunga nga davhi ḽa munḓirivhe." 
Ezekiel8:18 Mbiti dzanga dzi fuḓa dzi tshi ya khavho; a thi nga khathutsheli muthu, a thi nga vha pfeli vhuṱungu. Vha nga ḓi ṱavha mukosi nga hune vha kona, ndi nga si vha thetshelese.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Huno ndi tshi thetshelesa nda pfa Muṋe washu a tshi khou vhidzelela a tshi ri, “Inwi vhalifhedzi vha muḓi, tshifhinga ndi tshone, iḓani hafha no fara zwihali zwaṋu zwa u lozwa.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Kathihi fhedzi ha mbo ḓi swika vhanna vhaṱanu na muthihi vha tshi bva khoroni ya nṱha ya devhula, muṅwe na muṅwe e na tshihali tsha u vhulaha. Vhukati havho ho vha hu na munna o ambaraho tshena, o kungela zwa u ṅwala ngazwo kha bannda yawe. Vha dzhena vha ima phanḓa ha aḽiṱari ya musinaseṱha." 
Ezekiel9:3 Vhugala ha Mudzimu wa Israele ha raha vhu tshi bva nṱha ha vhakherube he ha vha vhu hone, ha ya tshifhingoni tsha thembele. Muṋe washu a vhidza uḽa munna o ambaraho tshena o kungelaho zwa u ṅwala ngazwo kha bannda yawe," 
Ezekiel9:4 a ri, “Tshimbila na muḓi woṱhe wa Jerusalema, vhoṱhe vhane vha lila vha tshi vhona zwi nengisaho zwi itwaho khawo vha tou gomela, u vha vhee luswayo kha phanḓa.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Nda pfa a tshi vhudza vhaṅwe a tshi ri, “Mu tevheleni a tshi tshimbila na muḓi ni vha lozwe. Ni songo khathutshela muthu, ni songo vha pfela vhuṱungu;" 
Ezekiel9:6 vhakalaha, vhaṱhanngana, vhasidzana, vhana, vhasadzi, vha vhulaheni vhoṱhe ni vha fhedze. Hone a re na luswayo kha phanḓa ni songo mu kwama. Ni thome nga fhethu hanga hukhethwa.” Vha mbo ḓi thoma nga vhahulwane vhe vha vha vho gwadama fhaḽa phanḓa ha thembele." 
Ezekiel9:7 A vha vhudza a ri, “Miṱa ya thembele i ḓadzeni zwitumbu, ni songo tata u kumadza thembele.” Vha mbo ḓi tshimbila na muḓi vha tshi vhulaha vhathu." 
Ezekiel9:8 Musi vha tshi khou vha vhulaha nṋe ndo vha ndo sala ndi ndoṱhe. Nda wa nga tshifhaṱuwo nda ṱavha mukosi nda ri, “Yawee, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, Muṋe washu, wo sinyutshela Jerusalema lune wa vho ṱoḓa u lozwa Vhaisraele vhoṱhe vho salaho u fa naa?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Ene a ri, “Mulandu wa vhathu vha Israele na Juda wo no hulela, wo no kalula; shango ḽo ḓala malofha e vha fhaladza, muḓini ho ḓala u piringanya khaṱhulo, ngauri vha ri, ‘Yahavee o ṱutshela shango, Yahavee ha vhoni tshithu!’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Zwino ndi zwone, na Nṋe a thi nga vha pfeli vhuṱungu, na Nṋe ndi ḓo vha fhedza. Zwe vha ita vhaṅwe, na vhone zwi ḓo vha wela-vho.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Uḽa munna o ambaraho tshena o kungelaho zwa u ṅwala ngazwo kha bannda yawe, a vhuya, a vhika a ri, “Ndo ita zwe wa ri ndi ite.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Nda sedza, nda vhona nṱha ha lutombo lu re nṱha ha ṱhoho dza vhakherube hu na tshithu tshine tsha nga safire, nṱha havho hu tshi vhonala tshi no nga khuluṋoni." 
Ezekiel10:2 Muṋe washu a amba na uḽa munna o ambaraho nguvho tshena a ri, “Dzhena vhukati ha milinga ya gariki, fhasi ha vhakherube; dzhia masimbe a mulilo a re vhukati ha vhakherube, a dzhie nga zwanḓa zwivhili u a hashekanye afho muḓini.” Nda ri ndi tshee ndo sedza a dzhena." 
Ezekiel10:3 Vhakherube vho vha vho ima thungo ya tshauḽa tsha thembele hezwi hoyo munna a tshi dzhena, gole ḽa mbo ḓi ḓadza muṱa wa ngomu wa thembele." 
Ezekiel10:4 Lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwa takuwa lu tshi bva nṱha ha vhakherube lwa ela muṱani wa thembele; thembele ya ḓala gole, muṱa wa ḓala tshedza tsha lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu." 
Ezekiel10:5 Mubvumo wa phapha dza vhakherube wo vha u tshi pfala u swika muṱani wa nnḓa wa thembele, u tshi nga mubvumo wa Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe a tshi amba." 
Ezekiel10:6 Musi a tshi vhudza uḽa munna o ambaraho nguvho tshena uri a dzhie mulilo vhukati ha milinga ya gariki vhukati ha vhakherube, uyo munna a yo ima tsini ha mulinga," 
Ezekiel10:7 muṅwe mukherube a isa tshanḓa kha mulilo we wa vha u vhukati ha vhakherube, a u dzhia a u vhea zwanḓani zwa uḽa munna o ambaraho nguvho tshena, uyo a u dzhia a ṱuwa." 
Ezekiel10:8 Zwenezwo nda vhona uri vhakherube vha na tshine tsha tou nga tshanḓa tsha muthu fhasi ha phapha dzavho. 
Ezekiel10:9 Nda sedza, nda vhona milinga miṋa siani ḽiṅwe ḽa vhakherube, mulinga muthihi siani ḽiṅwe ḽa mukherube muṅwe na muṅwe, iyo milinga yo vha i tshi penya ya nga yo itwa nga tombo ḽa mutengo muhulu." 
Ezekiel10:10 Vhuṋa hayo yo vha i tshi fana, i tshi nga mulinga u re na muṅwe ngomu." 
Ezekiel10:11 Yo vha i tshi kona u tshimbilela masia maṋa, i tshi tshimbila i sa vhuyi ya pambutshela thungo, i tshi ya he ya livha hone, i sa vhuyi ya rembuluwa." 
Ezekiel10:12 Mivhili yavho na miṱana yavho na zwanḓa zwavho na phapha dzavho na milinga – milinga yavho vhuṋa havho – ho vha ho tou phapha maṱo hoṱhe. 
Ezekiel10:13 Nda pfa upfi iyo milinga i pfi “milinga i kunguluwaho.” 
Ezekiel10:14 Mukherube muṅwe na muṅwe o vha e na zwifhaṱuwo zwiṋa: tshifhaṱuwo tsha u thoma tsho vha tshi tshifhaṱuwo tsha mukherube, tshifhaṱuwo tsha vhuvhili tshi tsha muthu, tsha vhuraru tshi tsha ndau, tsha vhuṋa tshi tsha goni." 
Ezekiel10:15 Vhakherube vha takuwa vha fhufhela nṱha; vhakherube ndi amba zwenezwiḽa zwisikwa zwe nda zwi vhona mulamboni wa Khebara. 
Ezekiel10:16 Musi vhakherube vha tshi tshimbila, na milinga ya ḓi tshimbila navho; iyo milinga a yo ngo pambutshela thungo; na musi vhakherube vha tshi ṱharamudza phapha vha tshi ṱoḓa u fhufha, milinga yo vha i tshi ḓi tshimbila navho." 
Ezekiel10:17 Musi vhakherube vha tshi ima, na milinga ya ima; musi vhakherube vha tshi takuwa vha tshi fhufha, na milinga ya takuwa ya fhufha navho, ngauri muya wa izwo zwivhumbwa wo vha u ngomu hayo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwa ṱuwa muṱani wa thembele lwa ima nṱha ha vhakherube. 
Ezekiel10:19 Vhakherube vha ṱharamudza phapha dzavho vha fhufhela nṱha, ndi tshi sedza nda vhona milinga i tshi fhufha navho. Vha ima tshifhingoni tshi bvelaho khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, lupenyo lwa Mudzimu wa Israele lwo vha lu nṱha havho." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hezwo ndi zwenezwiḽa zwivhumbwa zwe nda zwi vhona zwo tika Mudzimu wa Israele ngei mulamboni wa Khebara, nda konou vha na ngoho ya uri vho vha vhe vhakherube." 
Ezekiel10:21 Muṅwe na muṅwe o vha e na zwifhaṱuwo zwiṋa na phapha nṋa, fhasi ha phapha dzawe hú na zwine zwa nga zwanḓa zwa vhathu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwo vha zwi tshi nga zwenezwiḽa zwe nda zwi vhona mulamboni wa Khebara. Muṅwe na muṅwe o vha a tshi tshimbila o livha phanḓa. 
Ezekiel11:1 Muya a ntakulela nṱha a nkhwala a nnyisa khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha ya thembele ya Muṋe washu, khoro yo lavhelesaho vhubvaḓuvha. Henefho tshifhingoni tsha khoro ho vha ho ima vhanna vha 25, vhukati havho nda vhona Jaasania ṅwana wa Asuru na Phelatia ṅwana wa Benaya, vhone vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Muṋe washu a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, havha ndi vhone vha no luka vhunwa, vha enda vha tshi anḓadza nyeletshedzo dzavho mmbi na Jerusalema." 
Ezekiel11:3 Vha ri, ‘Ndi nnyi ane a ri tshino a si tshifhinga tsha u fhaṱa dzinnḓu? Khali ya u bika ndi muḓi houno, ṋama ndi riṋe.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Zwenezwo porofita u tshi vha hanedza, porofita, iwe ṅwana wa muthu.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Muya wa Muṋe washu a mbo wela kha nṋe, a mmbudza a ri, “Amba u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓivha zwine na khou zwi amba inwi vhathu vha Israele, ndi ḓivha zwine na elekanya mbiluni dzaṋu." 
Ezekiel11:6 No ḓadza muḓi houno nga zwitumbu zwi si na mbalo zwa vhanna vho vhulawaho, na ḓadza mikoto yawo nga vhe na vha vhulaha." 
Ezekiel11:7 Zwino-ha, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Zwitumbu zwe na posa ngomu hawo ndi yone ṋama, khali ya u bika ndi muḓi; hone inwi ndi ḓo ni thatha na bva ngomu hawo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Inwi ni ofha pfumo, Nṋe ndi ḓo ḽi vhidza ḽa ḓa ḽa ni ḽa – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndi ḓo ni thatha na bva muḓini nda ni kumedza vhatsinda, ndi ḓo ni rwa nga ṱhamu ye nda ni vhetshela yone;" 
Ezekiel11:10 ni ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo ngei masakhani a Israele; ndi ḓo ni ita zwo ni teaho; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel11:11 Muḓi houno a u nga ḓo vha khali ya u ni tsireledza, na inwi a ni nga vhi ṋama ngomu hawo; ndi ḓo ni ita zwo ni teaho ngei masakhani a Israele;" 
Ezekiel11:12 ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee we na si tevhedze milayo yawe, na si thetshelese ndaela dzawe; tshaṋu ho vha u edzisa maitele a tshakha dzo ni tangaho.’ ”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Zwino musi ndi tshi khou porofita, Phelatia ṅwana wa Benaya a mbo ḓi wa a fa. Nṋe nda shuvhama nda lila nda tou ṱavha mukosi nda ri, “Yawee Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu, u ṱoḓa u swiela tsalela dzoṱhe dza Israele naa?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vha hau, mashaka au, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vha re fhano Babele, vha ambiwa nga vho salaho Jerusalema vha pfi, ‘Inwi no no vha kulesa na Muṋe washu; shango ḽo ṋewa rine ḽa vha ḽashu.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Zwenezwo ambani ni ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi zwone, ndo vha isa kule vhukati ha dzitshakha, nda vha balanganya na mashango a kule; zwenezwo Nṋe nda vha hukhethwa havho tshifhinganyana henengei mashangoni e vha ya khao.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Ni ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓo ni kuvhanganya nda ni bvisa mashangoni e na vha no balanganywa nao, nda ni ṋea shango ḽa Israele.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Vha ḓo humela khaḽo, vha ḓo thutha midzimu yaḽo yoṱhe i nengisaho na zwitungulo zwa dzitshika." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndi ḓo vha ṋea mbilu nthihi, nda longa muya muswa khavho. Ndi ḓo sudzulusa mbilu ya tombo mivhilini yavho, nda vha ṋea mbilu ya ṋama," 
Ezekiel11:20 uri vha vhulunge milayo yanga, vha thetshelese ndaela dzanga vha dzi tevhedze. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho." 
Ezekiel11:21 Hone vhane mbilu dzavho dza luvha midzimu ya zwifanyiso i nengisaho na zwitungulo zwa tshika zwe vha ita, ndi ḓo ita uri zwi vha ḽe ṱhoho, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Ndi hone vhakherube vha tshi ṱharamudza phapha dzavho, milinga ya takuwa navho, lupenyo lwa Mudzimu wa Israele lu nṱha havho." 
Ezekiel11:23 Lupenyo lwa Muṋe washu lwa takuwa lwa ṱuwa muḓini, lwa ima nṱha ha thavha vhubvaḓuvha ha muḓi." 
Ezekiel11:24 Muya a ntakulela nṱha ndi kha bono, ndi Muyani wa Mudzimu, a nnyisa ngeno ha Vhakhaladia hu dzulaho mathubwa, ḽiḽa bono ḽe nda ḽi vhona ḽa mbo ḓi nṱutshela;" 
Ezekiel11:25 ndi hone ndi tshi vhudza mathubwa zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ntsumbedza. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u khou dzula na vhathu vha mashandukwa; vha na maṱo hone a vha vhoni, vha na nḓevhe hone a vha pfi, ndi vhathu vha mashandukwa." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ndi zwone, iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhofha muhwalo wa vhuthubwa, u pfuluwe masiari hune vhathu vha kona u u vhona, u pfuluwe henefho hune wa vha hone u pfulutshele huṅwe vha tshi khou zwi vhona. Khamusi ndi hone vha tshi nga dzivhuluwa naho vhe vhathu vha mashandukwa." 
Ezekiel12:4 Vhekanya thundu yau unga muhwalo wa ḽithubwa, hu masiari uri vha zwi vhone, u ṱuwe nga madekwana unga ḽithubwa, ú na ngoho ya uri vha khou sedza." 
Ezekiel12:5 Phula buli luvhondoni lwa nnḓu yau vho sedza, u bve ngaḽo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Hezwo vha tshi khou sedza, u hwale buto ḽau u bvele nnḓa ḽo no kovhela; u khurumele uri u si kone u vhona shango, ngauri ndo u ita tshiga tsha vhathu vha Israele.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Nṋe nda ita zwe nda vhudzwa. Nda kuvhanganya thundu yanga ya nga buto ḽa ḽithubwa, masiari; nga madekwana nda phula buli luvhondoni nga tshanḓa tshanga. Nda bvela nnḓa ḽo no kovhela, nda hwala buto ḽanga vha tshi khou zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ḽi tshi tsha ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhathu vha Israele, vhathu vha mashandukwa, a thi ri vho u vhudzisa zwe wa vha u tshi khou ita?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Mafhungo haya a lwa na khosi ya Jerusalema na vhoṱhe vha Israele vha dzulaho hone.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Vhonani nga nṋe, vha Jerusalema vha ḓo itwa zwe nṋe nda itwa; vha ḓo thathiwa vha ya vhuthubwani." 
Ezekiel12:12 Muvhusi wavho u ḓo hwala buto ḽawe ḽo kovhela, vha bva nga mutsheṱoni; hu ḓo phulwa buli ḽine vha ḓo bva ngaḽo; u ḓo khurumela uri a si vhone shango.’" 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndi ḓo ṱharamudza mambule anga nda a posa nṱha hawe, nda mu fasha nga mambule anga; ndi ḓo mu hwala nda mu ḓisa Babele shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia, hone maṱo awe a nga si ḽi vhone; u ḓo fela henefhano Babele." 
Ezekiel12:14 Magota oṱhe a khoro yawe, vhalindi na mmbi yawe yoṱhe, ndi ḓo vha balanganya na shango nda vha pandamedza nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi ndi tshi vha balanganya na dzitshakha ndi tshi vha hasekanya na mashango asili. 
Ezekiel12:16 Naho zwo ralo ndo vha ndi tshi funa u litsha vhaṅwe vha si balanganywe nga pfumo na nḓala na dwadze uri zwiito zwavho zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho vha zwi anetshele vhathu vhane vha ḓo dzula navho, uri na vhenevho vha zwi ḓivhe uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u tshi ḽa zwiḽiwa zwau u ḽe u tshi tetemela nga nyofho, u tshi nwa maḓi u nwe wo hanganea u tshi ḽa mbilu," 
Ezekiel12:19 u konou vhudza vhathu vha shango ḽeneḽo u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u vhudza vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema na shango ḽa Israele u ri: Vha ḓo ḽa zwiḽiwa zwavho vho hanganea, vha nwa maḓi vho tshenuwa; shango ḽi ḓo sala ḽi soga nga mulandu wa vhadzulapo vhaḽo vha tshi ḽi ḓadza vhulevhi." 
Ezekiel12:20 Miḓi i re na vhathu i ḓo phusukanywa, shango ḽa sala ḽi phanga; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, nṋa uyo murero une wa ḓivheswa shangoni ḽa Israele u amba mini? Ni ri, ‘Maḓuvha a ḓi ṱanḓulukana a tshi ya, mabono a sa bveleli.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Ndi zwone, vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Murero hoyu ndi ḓo u fhelisa; a u tsha ḓo dovha wa pfala kha ḽa Israele.’ Iwe vha vhudze u ri, ‘Ḓuvha ḽi tsini, mabono a ḓo ṱuwa a tshi khunyelela." 
Ezekiel12:24 U bva zwino a hu tsha ḓo vha na bono ḽi siho, na vhuporofita ha u sokou takadza vhathu a vhu tsha ḓo vha hone kha vhathu vha Israele;" 
Ezekiel12:25 hu ḓo amba Nṋe Yahavee. Zwine nda amba ndo amba, zwi ḓo khunyelela hu si kale; zwine nda zwi bula zwi ḓo khunyelela ni tshi kha ḓi tshila, inwi vhathu vha mashandukwa’ – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhathu vha Israele vha ri, ‘Bono ḽine hoyu munna a ḽi vhona ḽi amba zwi kha ḓi ḓaho zwine zwa kha ḓi vha kule; u khou porofita zwa tshifhinga tshine tsha kha ḓi vha kule.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Ndi zwone, vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: A thi tsha ḓo lenga u khunyeledza maipfi anga oṱhe. Zwine nda amba ndo amba, zwi ḓo khunyelela – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u tshi kaidza vhaporofita vha Israele; porofita u vhudze vhane vha sokou porofita zwine vha ḓihumbulela u ri," 
Ezekiel13:2 ‘Ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee.’ 
Ezekiel13:3 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Vhaporofita vha matsilu vhane vha tevhela zwa mihumbulo yavho ngeno vha songo vhona bono, vha ḓo zwi vhona!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Iwe Israele, vhaporofita vhau vha nga phunguhwe dzi re matumbani." 
Ezekiel13:5 A vha athu vhuya vha sedza he mitsheṱo ya wa vha i vusela vhathu vha Israele uri i khwaṱhe hu tshi lwiwa musi ḓuvha ḽa Yahavee ḽi tshi ḓa. 
Ezekiel13:6 Vha na mabono a si na tshithu ngomu, vha bvumba mazwifhi vha ri, ‘Hu amba Yahavee,’ naho Nṋe ndi songo vha ruma; nahone vha kha ḓi lavhelela ndi tshi khunyeledza vhuporofita havho." 
Ezekiel13:7 Ndi zwenezwo, ni na mabono a si na tshithu ngomu, ni ḓivhadza mazwifhi ni tshi ri, ‘Hu amba Yahavee,’ ngeno Nṋe ndi songo amba tshithu.”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Ndi zwone, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri, “Zwino ndi khou lwa na inwi nga mulandu wa maipfi aṋu a si na tshithu ngomu, na mabono aṋu a mazwifhi – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda rwa vhaporofita vha mabono a si na tshithu ngomu, vha bvumba mazwifhi; a vha nga ṱanganedzwi khoroni ya vhathu vhanga, madzina avho a nga si ṅwalwe Buguni ya vhathu vha Israele, a vha nga kandi mavuni a ḽa Israele; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ndi uri vho xedza vhathu vhanga nga u ri, ‘Ḽo lala!’ ngeno hu si na mulalo. Vhathu vhanga vha tshi vusa luvhondo nga matope, vhanna havha vha lu fhoma nga phomo tshena." 
Ezekiel13:11 Vhudza vhafhomi havho u ri, ‘Hu ḓo na mvula khulu, hu ḓo wa tshifhango, hu ḓo ḓa ḓumbu," 
Ezekiel13:12 mutsheṱo uyo we fhasi huru. Vhathu a vha nga ḓo vhudzisa vha ri: Phomo ye na u fhoma ngayo i ngafhi?’ ” 
Ezekiel13:13 Zwino-ha, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo vusa ḓumbu nga mbiti, nda nisa mvula ya mukumbela ndo sinyuwa, nda wisa matombo a tshifhango ndo halifha tsha pwashekanya zwoṱhe." 
Ezekiel13:14 Luvhondo lwe na lu fhoma nga phomo ndi ḓo lu pwasha, nda lu posa fhasi lwe huru, miteo yalwo ya sala ye swoto. Lu ḓo wa, inwi na lovha fhasi halwo; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Musi mbiti dzanga dza u lwa na luvhondo na vhathu vho lu fhomaho dzo no fhela, ndi ḓo ni vhudza nda ri, ‘Mutsheṱo a u tsheeho, na vho lu fhomaho nga phomo a vha tsheeho –" 
Ezekiel13:16 vhenevho vhaporofita vha Israele vhane vha porofita zwa Jerusalema, mabono avho a ri ḽo lala, ngeno hu si na mulalo’ – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel13:17 “Huno iwe ṅwana wa muthu, livhana na vhasadzi vha vhathu vha hau vhane vha sokou porofita zwe vha ḓihumbulela; porofita u tshi lwa navho" 
Ezekiel13:18 u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Khombo i khou ḓela vhasadzi vhane vha rungelela phamba dza manditi zwanḓani, vha no rungela vhathu miṅwenda ya u khurumela ya mielo yo fhambanaho, uri vha kone u fasha vhathu! Nṋa ni vhona unga ni nga lozwa vhathu vhanga na ḓitshidza inwi vhaṋe?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ni nnyadza vhathu vhanga vha tshi zwi vhona ni tshi itela zwifhaho zwi si gathi zwa baḽi na zwigaku zwa vhurotho, na vhulaha vha songo fanelaho u fa, na litsha vha songo fanelaho u tshila, na zwifhela vhathu vhanga vhane vha funa u thetshelesa mazwifhi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Zwino-ha, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Phamba hedzo dza manditi dzine na fasha ngadzo vhathu unga zwiṋoni, ndi ḓo dzi ṱhukhula hafho zwanḓani zwaṋu, nda vhofholola havho vhane na linga u vha fasha unga zwiṋoni." 
Ezekiel13:21 Miṅwenda yaṋu ya u khurumela ndi ḓo i kherukanya nda lamukisa vhathu vhanga zwanḓani zwaṋu; a vha tsha ḓo vha phukha dzine na dzi fasha. Zwenezwo ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel13:22 “Vhunga a fulufhedzeaho ane Nṋe nda si mu vhaise, inwi ni tshi vhaisa mbilu yawe nga mazwifhi aṋu, muvhi na mu ṱuṱuwedza uri a si laṱe vhuvhi hawe a dovha a tshila," 
Ezekiel13:23 ndi zwone, a ni tsha ḓo vhona mabono a mazwifhi, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na ita zwa u bvumba. Ndi ṱoḓa u lamukisa vhathu vhanga zwanḓani zwaṋu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha Israele vho ḓa nḓuni yanga vha dzula na nṋe," 
Ezekiel14:2 ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, havha vhathu vho vhea mbilu dzavho kha midzimu yavho ya tshika, zwi vha itisa vhuvhi vha zwi nambatela nga mbilu yoṱhe. Ndi nga vhuya nda tenda vha tshi mmbudzisa?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Zwino-ha, amba navho u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Muisraele muṅwe na muṅwe ane a vhea mbilu yawe kha midzimu yawe ya tshika kana a nambatela zwi mu khakhisaho, a yo ṱoḓa muporofita, phindulo yawe u ḓo i wana kha Nṋe Yahavee, zwi tshi tevhedza midzimu yawe i sa fheli ya tshika." 
Ezekiel14:5 Vhathu vha Israele vhe vha ntshandukela vha nambatela midzimu yavho i sa fheli ya tshika, ndi vhona uri ndi ḓo vha laṱisa nga u ralo.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Zwenezwo vhudza vhathu vha Israele u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Vhuyani! Landulani midzimu yaṋu ya tshika! Laṱani zwiito zwaṋu zwi nengisaho," 
Ezekiel14:7 ngauri arali ufhio na ufhio wa vhathu vha Israele, kana mutsinda a dzulaho kha ḽa Israele, a ntshandukela a vhea mbilu yawe kha midzimu yawe ya tshika, a nambatela zwine zwa mu itisa vhuvhi, a yo ṱoḓa muporofita uri a ḓe a vhudzise Nṋe, phindulo yawe u ḓo i wana wana kha Nṋe, Yahavee." 
Ezekiel14:8 Onoyo ndi ḓo lwa nae; ndi ḓo mu ita tsumbo na tshianeo. Ndi ḓo mu bvisa kha vhathu vhanga; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel14:9 Arali muporofita a tenda u xedzwa a amba ḽiṅwe fhungo ḽa dubo, ndi Nṋe Yahavee ndi mu xedzaho, ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda mu rwa, nda mu bvisa kha vhathu vhanga Vhaisraele." 
Ezekiel14:10 Vha ḓo hwala muhwalo wa milandu yavho, mulandu wa muporofita na wone u ḓo hula wa nga wa munna ane a yo mu vhudzisa." 
Ezekiel14:11 Ndi hone vhathu vha Israele vha si tsha ḓo ntshandukela; a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha ḓishata mashika nga vhuvhi honoho. Vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, arali shango ḽa nkhakhela nga u sa fulufhedzea, Nṋe nda angaladza tshanḓa nda ḽi rwa, nda lozwa mavhele a zwiḽiwa zwaḽo, nda ḽi ḓisela nḓala ya vhulaha vhathu vhaḽo na zwifuwo," 
Ezekiel14:14 zwino naho shangoni ḽeneḽo hu tshi dzula vhanna havhano vhararu, Nua na Danele na Jobo, havho vhanna vho vha vha tshi ḓo tshidzwa vhe vhararu fhedzi nga u fulufhedzea havho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel14:14 zwino naho shangoni ḽeneḽo hu tshi dzula vhanna havhano vhararu, Nua na Danele na Jobo, havho vhanna vho vha vha tshi ḓo tshidzwa vhe vhararu fhedzi nga u fulufhedzea havho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel14:15 Arali ndo vha ndi tshi nga ḓisa zwivhanda shangoni ḽeneḽo zwa ponda vhanna vhaḽo ḽa sala ḽi soga, ha si vhe na a fhiraho nga henefho nga u ofha izwo zwivhanda," 
Ezekiel14:16 zwino naho avho vhanna vhararu vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽeneḽo, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – vho vha vha sa ḓo lamukisa ṅwana wavho wa mutukana kana wa musidzana; ho vha hu tshi ḓo tshidzwa vhone vhe vhoṱhe, shango ḽone ḽa sala ḽi soga." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Arali ndo vha ndi tshi nga ḓisa pfumo shangoni ḽeneḽo nda ri: Pfumo nga ḽi buḓekanye shango; ndi ḓo vhulaha vhathu na zwifuwo ngaḽo," 
Ezekiel14:18 zwino naho avho vhanna vhararu vha tshi nga dzula shangoni ḽeneḽo, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – vho vha vha sa ḓo kona u lamukisa ṅwana wavho wa mutukana kana musidzana; ho vha hu tshi ḓo tshidzwa vhone vhe vhoṱhe." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Arali ndo vha ndi tshi nga ḓisa dwadze shangoni ḽeneḽo, nda dzikisa mbiti dzanga nga u shulula malofha avho ndi tshi vhulaha vhathu na zwifuwo," 
Ezekiel14:20 naho Nua na Danele na Jobo vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽeneḽo, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – vho vha vha sa ḓo lamukisa ṅwana wavho wa mutukana kana wa musidzana, vho vha vha tshi ḓo ḓitshidza vhone vhaṋe nga u fulufhedzea havho.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 naho Nua na Danele na Jobo vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽeneḽo, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – vho vha vha sa ḓo lamukisa ṅwana wavho wa mutukana kana wa musidzana, vho vha vha tshi ḓo ḓitshidza vhone vhaṋe nga u fulufhedzea havho.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino zwi ḓo vhifha hani arali nda rwa Jerusalema nga ṱhamu dzanga nṋa dzi ofhisaho, pfumo na nḓala na zwivhanda na dwadze, nda lozwa vhathu vhawo na zwifuwo zwavho!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Naho zwo ralo hu ḓo vha na vha salaho henefho, vha vhamba maano vha ponyokisa vhaṅwe vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, vha ḓa ha inwi uri ni vhone kutshilele kwavho na maitele avho, na pfa no rudza mbilu naho ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo rwa Jerusalema nga ṱhamu, ndo u ḓisela khombo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Vha ḓo ni rudza mbilu musi ni tshi vhona kutshilele kwavho kuvhi na maitele avho mavhi, na ḓo konou ḓivha uri zwoṱhe zwe nda vha ita a tho ngo sokou zwi ita lwa fhedzi, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, thanda ya munḓirivhe i fhira thanda ya davhi ḽa muri wa ḓaka ngani?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Vhathu vha a vhuya vha vhaḓa tshithu ngawo? Vhathu vha a vhuya vha ita muthambi vha fhahea zwithu khawo? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ngoyo u tshi khou vhaswa wa ita khuni. Mulilo u duga tshirahoni na ṱhodzini, vhukati wo vhavhiwa wa swifhala, muthu a nga kha ḓi vhaḓa tshithu ngawo?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Na musi u tshi kha ḓi vha wavhuḓi, wo vha u sa vhaḓei; zwino wó swa wó no vhavhea wa swifhala, u kha ḓi vhaḓea naa?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Zwenezwo Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi litsha miri yoṱhe nda dzhia matavhi a munḓirivhe nda a posa muliloni a vha khuni, na vhathu vha Jerusalema ndi ḓo vha ita nga u ralo." 
Ezekiel15:7 Vha ri vho ponyoka mulilo, hone mulilo u kha ḓi ḓo vha fhisa. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, ngauri Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo lwa navho," 
Ezekiel15:8 nda phusukanya shango ḽa sala ḽi soga, nda vha rwa nga u vhona vha tshi ḓi ntshandukela, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓa ha nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, sumbedza Jerusalema zwiito zwawo zwi nengisaho." 
Ezekiel16:3 Amba u ri: Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Vhubvo hau he wa bebwa hone ndi Kanana. Khotsi au ndi Muamori, mme au ndi Muhithi." 
Ezekiel16:4 U tshi bebwa, wonoyo musi we wa bebwa, ho vha hu si na ane a nga u tsheula, kana a u ṱanzwa, kana a u phupha nga muṋo, kana a u putela nga miṅwenda." 
Ezekiel16:5 A hu na we a vhuya a u londola a u tonda nga u u itela zwenezwo. Vho u nengwa vha u laṱa nnḓa, ḽeneḽo ḓuvha ḽe wa bebwa." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ndi hone Nṋe ndi tshi fhira, nda vhona u tshi khou takanyea malofhani au, nda u vhudza wo shuvhama malofhani au nda ri, ‘Tshila," 
Ezekiel16:7 u aluwe unga zwimela zwa ḓaka!’ Nangoho wa vhumbea wa aluwa, wa vhuya wa swika murole wa u vhingwa. Wa tunga maḓamu, mavhudzi au a aluwa, hone wo vha u fhedzi u si na tshe wa ambara." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ndi tshi fhira nda u vhona. Nda vhona tshifhinga tshau tshó swika, tshifhinga tsha uri u funwe. Nda ṱharamudza sia ḽiṅwe ḽa nguvho yanga nda u fukedza nda u vhinga nda u fukedza wa si tsha vhonala u fhedzi; nda ḓivhofha nga muano, nda vhofha mulanga na iwe – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – iwe wa konou vha wanga." 
Ezekiel16:9 Nda u ṱanzwa nga maḓi, nda u ṱanzwa malofha, nda u ḓodza mapfura." 
Ezekiel16:10 Nda u ambadza tshiambaro tsha makolokolo na zwienda zwa mukumba wo sukwaho na dugu ya lukhaha na khanzu ya siliga. 
Ezekiel16:11 Nda u ṱama nga dzinungu, nda u ṋea vhukunda ha zwanḓani na vhulungu ha mukuloni," 
Ezekiel16:12 nda u ṋea tshiṅina tsha ningoni na zwiṅina zwa nḓevheni, nda u ambadza khare ya u naka ṱhohoni." 
Ezekiel16:13 Wo vha wo ṱamiwa nga musuku na siliva, wa ambadzwa lukhaha lwavhuḓi na siliga ya mivhalavhala. Zwiḽiwa zwau zwo vha zwi vhukhopfu vhutshenatshena na ṋotshi na mapfura. Wa ḓi naka u tshi ya, wa vhuya wa tea u vha mufumakadzi wa musanda." 
Ezekiel16:14 Bvumo ḽa lunako lwau ḽa pfala kha tshakha dzoṱhe nge lwa vha lwo khunyelela, ngauri ndo vha ndo u ambadza vhugala hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Huno iwe wa ḓitika nga lunako lwau, bvumo ḽau ḽa u farisa u ita vhupombwe, wa ḓikumedza vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha nḓila vha u ita musadzi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wo dzhia nguvho dzau wa ṱama aḽiṱari dza zwikwara zwau, henefho wa ita vhupombwe – zwithu zwi sa itwi." 
Ezekiel16:17 Wa dzhia zwifhiwa zwe Nṋe nda u ṱama ngazwo, zwa musuku na siliva, wa ḓivhumbela zwifanyiso zwa vhanna wa ita vhupombwe nazwo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Wa dzhia nguvho dzau dza mivhalavhala wa ambadza izwo zwifanyiso, wa zwi ṋekedza nduvho yo teaho u ṋekedzwa Nṋe, ya mapfura na zwioro." 
Ezekiel16:19 Zwiḽiwa zwe nda u ṋea, vhukhopfu vhu si na madzhoro, na mapfura na ṋotshi zwe nda vha ndi tshi u fusha ngazwo, wo zwi ṋekedza midzimu ya zwifanyiso ya vha nduvho i nukhelelaho. Hezwo ndi zwone zwo iteaho, hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel16:20 Wo dzhia vhana vhau vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vhe wa mmbebela wa vha ita tshiṱhavhelo vha vha zwiḽiwa zwa midzimu isili. U vhuya wa ḓiita phombwe zwo vha zwi songo eḓana naa," 
Ezekiel16:21 u tshi dovha wa shidzha na vhana vhanga wa vha ita tshiṱhavhelo tsho fhiswaho tsha midzimu ya zwifanyiso? 
Ezekiel16:22 Kha zwiito zwau zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho na zwa vhupombwe hau a wo ngo vhuya wa elelwa zwa hanani hau kana zwa misi iḽa u tshi kha ḓi vha fhedzi, u tshi khou takanyea ngomu malofhani au." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee, ndi ri: U ḓo zwi vhona! Wo phapha mbulu kha iṅwe" 
Ezekiel16:24 wa ḓifhaṱela guvha na aḽiṱari mafhandeni oṱhe a magondo. 
Ezekiel16:25 Hoṱhe hune magondo a thoma hone wo ḓifhaṱela aḽiṱari, lunako lwau wa lu shata tshika henefho, muvhili wau wa u kumedza vhafhiri vha nḓila vhoṱhe, wa phapha vhupombwe kha vhuṅwe." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wa ita vhupombwe na Vhaegipita, vhone vhahura vhau vha na vhudzimu vhuhulu, u ralo ha vha u phapha vhupombwe kha vhuṅwe wa ntsinyusa." 
Ezekiel16:27 Nṋe nda angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda u rwa, nda fhungudza shango ḽau, nda u kumedza maswina au vhananyana vha Vhafilista, uri vha ite tshine vha funa nga iwe; na vhenevho vha nengiswa nga zwiito zwau zwa mashika." 
Ezekiel16:28 Wa dovha wa ita vhupombwe na Vhaashuru nga u pfa u songo pfelela, wa ri u ita vhupombwe wa ḓi pfa u songo pfelela." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wa phapha vhupombwe kha vhuṅwe na mushavhi wa Mubabele, naho zwo ralo wa ḓi pfa u songo pfelela." 
Ezekiel16:30 “U na nyemulo nngafhani!” – hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu – “Wo vha u tshi ḓifara unga phombwe ya dziphombwe! 
Ezekiel16:31 Musi u tshi ḓifhaṱela maguvha hoṱhe hune magondo a thoma hone, wa ḓifhaṱela dziaḽiṱari mafhandeni oṱhe a magondo, wo vha u sa ngi phombwe dziṅwe, wo tou landula na tshelede ya vhanna." 
Ezekiel16:32 U phombwe ine ya ṱanganedza vhatsinda, ya landula munna wayo." 
Ezekiel16:33 Phombwe i a badelwa, hone iwe u tshi ita vhupombwe, wo vha iwe we wa badela vhanna uri vha u dzhenise nḓuni; wo vha kunga nga zwifhiwa vha tshi bva hoṱhe-hoṱhe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Iwe u tshi ita vhupombwe wo ita zwi sa fani na zwa vhaṅwe vhasadzi; a hu na we a vha a tshi u tevhelela, ndi iwe we wa ya wa vha badela, vhone a vho ngo u fha tshithu. Ngauralo wo ita zwi no fhambana na zwa vhaṅwe, wa tou paṱa tshoṱhe.”" 
Ezekiel16:35 Zwino-ha iwe phombwe, ipfa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Ezekiel16:36 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Wo bvula zwiambaro wa vhonwa u fhedzi u tshi khou ita vhupombwe na vhafunwa vhau midzimu yau ya zwifanyiso ya tshika, u tshi i ṋea malofha a vhana vhau –" 
Ezekiel16:37 zwenezwo ndi ḓo kuvhanganya vhafunwa vhau vhoṱhe vhe wa ḓiphiṋa navho, vhoṱhe vhe wa vha u tshi vha funa, na vhe wa vha u sa vha funi, ndi ḓo vha kuvhanganya vhoṱhe vha u vutshela vha u tingeledza vha tshi bva matungo oṱhe; ndi ḓo u ṱangula vha tshi zwi vhona, nda ita uri vha u vhonele." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndi ḓo u haṱulela ṱhamu ya vhasadzi vhane vha ita vhupombwe vha fhaladza malofha. Ndi ḓo u sinyutshela nda u lifhedzela malofha e wa a fhaladza, ndí na mbiti." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndi ḓo u kumedza vhafunwa vhau, vha ḓo thutha maguvha au, vha pwasha aḽiṱari dze wa fhaṱa khadzo, iwe vha u bvula zwiambaro, vha u dzhiela nungu dzau vha u sia u fhedzi u si na tshe wa ambara." 
Ezekiel16:40 Vha ḓo u ḓisela gogo ḽa vhathu, vha u haṱula vha u kanḓa nga matombo vha u remekanya nga mapanga," 
Ezekiel16:41 vha fhisa nnḓu dzau nga mulilo vha u lifhedza nga zwo u teaho gogo ḽa vhasadzi ḽi tshi zwi vhona. Ndi ḓo fhelisa vhupombwe hau nga u ralo, a u tsha ḓo badela vhanna vha ita vhupombwe na iwe." 
Ezekiel16:42 Mbiti dzanga dzi ḓo fhelela kha iwe. Ndi hone mbiti dzanga dzi tshi ḓo u ṱutshela, nda dzika nda si tsha sinyuwa." 
Ezekiel16:43 Vhunga wo hangwa zwe nda u tonda hanani hau, iwe tshau ha vha u nṱunga nga zwoṱhe hezwo zwe wa ita, zwino Nṋe ndi ḓo ita uri zwe wa ita zwi u ḽe ṱhoho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. A thi ri wo vha u tshi khou nnengisa nga zwiito zwau zwoṱhe zwi shonisaho?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Zwino vhakoni vha mirero vhoṱhe vha ḓo ita murero nga iwe vha ri, ‘Ṅwana wa mbevha ha hangwi mukwita’." 
Ezekiel16:45 Ee, wo tou mme au kokotolo, vho vha vha tshi nengwa munna wavho na vhana vhavho; wo tou vhakomana vhau kokotolo; na vhone vho vha vha tshi nengwa vhanna vhavho na vhana vhavho. Mme aṋu noṱhe o vha e Muhithi, khotsi aṋu e Muamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukomana wau ndi Samaria, u dzula thungo ya devhula hau na vhananyana vhawe. Murathu wau ndi Sodoma, u dzula thungo ya tshipembe hau na vhananyana vhawe." 
Ezekiel16:47 U tshi tevhedza kutshilele kwavho ho vha hu si u tou edzisa lini; wo tou vha fhira kha vhuvhi havho hoṱhe. 
Ezekiel16:48 Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – vhutshinyi ha murathu wau Sodoma na vhananyana vhawe a ho ngo vhuya ha swika kha hau na ha vhananyana vhau. 
Ezekiel16:49 Vhutshinyi ha murathu wau Sodoma ho vha hu u ḓihudza na u ḽesa na u ḓiḓivha na u sa londa vha sa farisi vhashai na vhaheḓana. 
Ezekiel16:50 Vho vha vha tshi ḓihudza vha tshi ita zwi nnengisaho, ndi zwe nda vha swielela kule, na iwe wo zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel16:51 Hone Samaria ho ngo vhuya a swikisa na hafu ya vhuvhi he iwe wa ita. Iwe wo ita zwi nengisaho zwi no fhira zwavho, lwe mukomana wau na murathu wau vha tshi vhambedzwa na iwe vha vho nga a vha na tshe vha tshinya." 
Ezekiel16:52 Huno zwino u ḓo nyadzea wa tou niwa nga ṱhoni nge wa ita uri vhakomana vhau na vharathu vhau vha nge vho ṱamba mulandu wa vhutshinyi havho hoṱhe. Vhone vha vho nga ndi vhavhuya nge vhutshinyi hau ha vha ho hulela u fhira havho. Zwino-ha, shona u nyadzee nge wa ita uri vhakomana vhau na vharathu vhau vha nge a vha na tshe vha tshinya." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ndi ḓo ita uri vhaḽa zwi dovhe zwi vha nakele. Ndi ḓo ita uri Sodoma na vhananyana vhawe zwi dovhe zwi vha nakele. Ndi ḓo ita uri Samaria na vhananyana vhawe zwi dovhe zwi vha nakele; musi ndo no fhedza ndi ḓo ita uri na iwe zwi dovhe zwi u nakele unga vhone," 
Ezekiel16:54 uri u nyadzee u tou niwa nga ṱhoni nga zwe wa ita, u vha khuthadze." 
Ezekiel16:55 Murathu wau Sodoma na vhananyana vhawe zwi ḓo dovha zwa vha nakela vha nga zwe vha vha vhe zwone. Samaria na vhana vhawe zwi ḓo dovha zwa vha nakela vha vha zwe vha vha vhe zwone. Iwe na vhananyana vhau zwi ḓo dovha zwa ni nakela na vha zwe na vha ni zwone. 
Ezekiel16:56 A thi ri wo vha u tshi sola murathu wau Sodoma wa mu ita tsumbo ya vhuvhi zwiḽa u tshi kha ḓi ḓihudza," 
Ezekiel16:57 vhuvhi hau vhu sa athu dzumbululwa? Zwino vhasadzi vha Edomo na vhoṱhe vho u tangaho vha vho u nzhonzhowedza, vhasadzi vha Vhafilista na vhahura vhau vhoṱhe vha a u nyadza." 
Ezekiel16:58 Iwe muṋe wo tou ḓiovhela hezwo nga u sa shona hau na nga zwiito zwau zwi nengisaho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.” 
Ezekiel16:59 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo u ita zwenezwo zwe wa ita u tshi nyadza muano wau wa swika he wa tshinya mulanga." 
Ezekiel16:60 Hone Nṋe ndi ḓo elelwa mulanga we nda vhofha na iwe u tshi kha ḓi vha musidzana, nda khunyeledza mulanga na iwe une wa ḓo vha wa lini na lini." 
Ezekiel16:61 Na iwe u ḓo elelwa maitele au a kale wa tou niwa nga ṱhoni musi ndi tshi dzhia mukomana wau na murathu wau nda vha ita vhananyana vhau, naho ndo vha ndi songo u fulufhedzisa hezwo zwiḽa ndi tshi vhofha mulanga na iwe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndi ḓo vusulusa mulanga we nda vhofha na iwe; ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee," 
Ezekiel16:63 zwenezwo wa elelwa wa shona, wa niwa nga ṱhoni wa sokou tshete musi ndo pfumedzana na iwe nda u hangwela zwoṱhe zwe wa ita – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vha thaidzele thai; vhathu vha Israele vha vhudze tshifanyiso," 
Ezekiel17:3 u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Ngei Libanoni ho vhuya ha ḓa goni ḽihulu, ḽa phapha khulu, dzo ṱharamuwaho, dza mithenga ya u naka, ḽa fara ṱhodzi ya mukedara," 
Ezekiel17:4 ḽa paḓula davhi ḽa ṱhodzini, ḽa ṱuwa naḽo ḽa ḽi isa shangoni ḽa vhashavhi, ḽa ḽi ṱavha muḓini wa vhavhambadzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Ḽa hwala kutavhi kwa munḓirivhe kha ḽa Israele, ḽa ku ṱavha mavuni o vhibvelaho, tsini ha kudambwana kwo aṱamaho, ḽa ku ṱavha unga muṋengeledzi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Kutavhi kwa mela, kwa vha munḓirivhe; wo vha u songo lapfa, wo tou ita tshimvingimvingi; matavhi awo a aluwa o sumba thungo hu re na goni, midzi yawo ya ṱoka fhasi. Wa vha munḓirivhe; wa mela maḓadzwane, wa vha na maṱari." 
Ezekiel17:7 “ ‘Ha ḓa ḽiṅwe goni ḽihulu, ḽi na phapha khulu na mithenga minzhi. Munḓirivhe wa mbo somba midzi ya livha khaḽo, wa ṱharamudza matavhi a sumba khaḽo, uri ḽone ḽi u sheledze, u fhira he wa vha wo ṱavhiwa." 
Ezekiel17:8 Uyo munḓirivhe wo vha wo ṱavhiwa mavuni o vhibvelaho, tsini ha mulambwana wo aṱamaho, uri u adze maḓadzwane, u aṋwe mitshelo, u vhe munḓirivhe muhulu wa u naka.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 “Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Uyo munḓirivhe u ḓo tshila naa? Goni a ḽi nga tupuli midzi yawo, ḽa kulula mitshelo, u tshi ṱuma lurere maṱari oṱhe a puta naa? Hu nga si tsha ṱoḓea nungo kana vhathu vhanzhi uri vha u fare vha u tupule." 
Ezekiel17:10 Wo simiwa henefho; u ḓo tshila naa? Arali wa rwiwa nga muya u no bva phangani, a u nga puti henefho mavuni e wa mela khao naa?’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Vhudza havho vhathu vha mashandukwa u ri, ‘A ni ḓivhi uri izwi zwi amba mini?’ Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Thetshelesani, khosi ya Babele yo ḓa Jerusalema, ya hwala khosi na vhavhusi ya ṱuwa navho, ya vha isa Babele hune ya dzula hone." 
Ezekiel17:13 A dzhia muṅwe wa vhakololo a vhofha mulanga nae, a mu anisa uri a mu luvhe; izwo ndi musi o no thuba vhaḓivhalea vha iḽo shango," 
Ezekiel17:14 uri muvhuso u si khwaṱhe, u si tsha vha na nungo, uri a vhulunge uyo mulanga a si u pfuke." 
Ezekiel17:15 Hone khosi ye a vhea ya mu shandukela ya ruma vhaḓinḓa Egipita, vha yo humbela dzibere na mmbi khulu. A nga tshila naa? Munna o itaho zwenezwo a nga ponyoka ṱhamu naa? A nga tshinya mulanga a si rwiwe nga ṱhamu?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – u ḓo fela henefho Babele, shangoni ḽa khosi yo mu vheaho kha khuluṋoni ene a si tsha londa muano wawe, a vho tshinya mulanga wawe." 
Ezekiel17:17 Naho Farao a ḓa na mmbi khulu na mara a vhanna, a nga si kone u mu tshidza nndwani musi ho no khokhwa thulwi dza mavu, ho no bwiwa madindi uri hu vhulawe vhathu vhanzhi." 
Ezekiel17:18 O nyadza muano, a tshinya mulanga we wa vha wo mu vhofha. O ita zwoṱhe hezwo, ha nga tinyi ṱhamu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Zwino-ha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Nga vhutshilo hanga, muano wanga we a u nyadza, mulanga wanga we a u tshinya vhuvhili hazwo zwi ḓo mu ḽa ṱhoho." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndi ḓo posa mambule anga nṱha hawe nda mu fasha nga mulavhu wanga, nda mu isa Babele nda mu lifhedza henengei nge a pfuka muano wawe we a nnyanela." 
Ezekiel17:21 Vhanna vha mmbi vhane vha ḓo shavha nae vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vha salaho vha si fe vha ḓo balanganywa thungo dzoṱhe. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ka ḓadzwane ṱhodzini ya mukedara, ndi khwathela davhi ḽi re nṱha-nṱha, nda ḽi sima nga ndoṱhe thavhani ndaphu-ndapfu." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ndi ḓo ḽi sima nṱha ha thavha ndapfu ya Israele. Ḽi ḓo mela matavhi ḽa aṋwa mitshelo, ḽa vha mukedara muhulu. Zwiṋoni zwa tshakha dzoṱhe zwi ḓo dzula khawo, zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwa phapha zwa awela murunzini wa matavhi awo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Miri yoṱhe ya ḓaka i ḓo ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi Nṋe ane a wisa miri milapfu, nda ita uri miṱuku i aluwe; ndi putisa miri midala, yo putaho nda ita uri i ṱume lurere. Nṋe Yahavee ndo amba, ndi ḓo zwi ita.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ndi mini ni tshi ḓi dovholola murero uyu fhano shangoni ḽa Israele ni tshi ri, “ ‘Vhokhotsi vho ḽa nḓirivhe dza magaga, hadzila ya fara maṋo a vhana’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – a hu tsha ḓo ṱwa hu tshi dovhololwa murero uyo kha ḽa Israele. 
Ezekiel18:4 Zwino vhonani, vhutshilo ha vhathu vhoṱhe ndi hanga; vhutshilo ha khotsi na ha ṅwana, hoṱhe ndi hanga. Muthu we a tshinya ndi ene a no ḓo fa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “A fulufhedzeaho u tevhedza mulayo nga u fulufhedzea; 
Ezekiel18:6 ha ḽi zwiṱhavhelo nṱha ha dzithavha kana a fulufhela midzimu ya tshika ya vhathu vha Israele, ha ṱonḓoli musadzi wa muṅwe kana a dzhenisa musadzi nḓuni a tshi khou vhona ṅwedzi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Ha kandeledzi vhaṅwe, u humisa tsho farelwaho thundu ye muṅwe a pamba, ha tswi, vha re na nḓala u vha ṋea zwiḽiwa zwawe, vha na tsiku a vha fha zwiambaro zwawe." 
Ezekiel18:8 A tshi adzima muṅwe tshelede ha bindulisi, ha ṱanganedzi mavhoḓa a tshelede, u ḓiilisa vhuvhi, u haṱula vhathu a sa ṱaluli," 
Ezekiel18:9 u vhulunga milayo yanga, a fulufhedzea a si pfuke ndayo dzanga – onoyo munna, vhukuma ha na mulandu, u ḓo tshila. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Huno arali e na ṅwana a sa ḓivhalei ane a shulula malofha, a ita vhuṅwe ha vhuvhi honoho," 
Ezekiel18:11 ngeno khotsi awe vha sa athu vhuya vha ita vhuvhi honoho, ṅwana a ḽa zwiṱhavhelo zwa midzimu nṱha ha thavha, a ṱonḓola musadzi wa muṅwe," 
Ezekiel18:12 a kandeledza vhashai na vhaheḓana, a tswa, a si humise tsho farelwaho thundu ye ya pambiwa, a fulufhela midzimu ya tshika, a ita zwi nengisaho," 
Ezekiel18:13 a tshi adzimisa tshelede a bindulisa, a ṱanganedza nzwalelo yayo, vhukumakuma ṅwana onoyo a nga si tshile; a ita vhutshinyi honoho vhu ofhisaho vhukuma u ḓo fa, malofha awe a vha nṱha ha ṱhoho yawe ene muṋe." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Huno arali uyo muthu e na ṅwana wa mutukana, ane naho a tshi vhona vhuvhi hoṱhe he khotsi awe a ita, a si mu edzise," 
Ezekiel18:15 a si ḽele zwiṱhavhelo zwa midzimu nṱha ha thavha kana a fulufhela midzimu ya tshika ya vhathu vha Israele, a si ṱonḓole musadzi wa muṅwe," 
Ezekiel18:16 a si kandeledze vhaṅwe, a si dzhie tsho farelwaho thundu yo pambiwaho, a si tswe, a dzhia zwiḽiwa zwawe a zwi ṋea vha re na nḓala, vha na tsiku a vha shavhedza," 
Ezekiel18:17 a ḓiilisa vhuvhi, a tshi adzimisa thundu a si bindulise kana a ṱanganedza nzwalelo ya tshelede, a tevhedza ndayo dzanga, a vhulunga milayo yanga, onoyo ha nga feli vhuvhi ha khotsi awe, vhukumakuma ṅwana onoyo u ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel18:18 Zwino nge khotsi a vha ḽivemu, a ṱangula vhaṅwe, a si vhuye a ita zwivhuya vhathuni, onoyo u ḓo fela vhuvhi hawe." 
Ezekiel18:19 Hone inwi ni a hanedza ni ri, ‘Ndi mini ṅwana a sa tambudzelwi vhuvhi ha khotsi awe?’ Nṋe ndi ri: Hufha uyo ṅwana o vha a tshi ita zwi re zwone, a tshi fulufhedzea, a tshi vhulunga milayo yanga yoṱhe a i tevhedza, vhukumakuma onoyo u ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel18:20 Muthu we a tshinya ndi ene ane a fanela u fa; ṅwana ho ngo fanela u tambulela vhutshinyi ha khotsi awe, na khotsi ho ngo fanela u tambulela vhutshinyi ha ṅwana wawe. A no fulufhedzea u ḓo tondelwa u fulufhedzea hawe, muvhi a lifhedzelwa vhuvhi hawe." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Huno arali muvhi a laṱa vhuvhi hawe hoṱhe he a ita, a vhulunga milayo yanga, a ita zwi re zwone a fulufhedzea, vhukumakuma u ḓo tshila, a nga si fe." 
Ezekiel18:22 Zwoṱhe zwe a nkhakhela ndi ḓo zwi hangwa; u ḓo tshila nge a tshila nga u fulufhedzea. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ni vhona unga Nṋe ndi takalela lufu lwa muvhi? Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. A thi ri ndi funa a tshi laṱa vhuvhi hawe a tshila? 
Ezekiel18:24 “Huno arali a fulufhedzeaho a shanduka a si tsha fulufhedzea, a ita vhuvhi, a ita zwi nengisaho zwoṱhe zwine muvhi a ita, onoyo o fanela u tshila naa? Zwoṱhe zwe a ita a tshi fulufhedzea ndi ḓo zwi hangwa nge ene muṋe a ntshandukela a tshinya, u ḓo fela zwenezwo." 
Ezekiel18:25 Hone inwi ni a hanedza na ri, ‘Zwine Muṋe washu a ita a si zwone.’ Inwi vhathu vha Israele, thetshelesani: Kani-ha zwine nda ita a si zwone? Zwi si zwone a si zwine inwi na ita?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Arali a fulufhedzeaho a shanduka a ita vhuvhi a fa nga zwenezwo, u ḓo vha a tshi khou fela vhuvhi he ene muṋe a ita." 
Ezekiel18:27 Arali muvhi a tshi laṱa vhuvhi he a ita, a ita zwi re zwone, a fulufhedzea, u ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel18:28 Zwino ngauri o dzivhuluwa a laṱa vhutshinyi hawe hoṱhe ha kale; vhukuma a nga si fe, u ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel18:29 Naho zwo ralo vhathu vha Israele vha a hanedza vha ri, ‘Zwine Muṋe washu a ita a si zwone.’ Inwi vhathu vha Israele, zwine nda ita a si zwone? Zwi si zwone a si zwine inwi na ita?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ndi ḓo haṱula muṅwe na muṅwe ndi tshi tevhedza zwine a ita, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Rembuluwani! Laṱani vhutshinyi haṋu hoṱhe! Ndi hone ni sa ḓo lovha nga vhuvhi haṋu!" 
Ezekiel18:31 Laṱani vhuvhi hoṱhe he na ntshandukela ngaho, ni ḓisikele mbilu ntswa na muya muswa! Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ni felani?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nṋe a thi takaleli lufu lwa muthu na muthihi, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Rembuluwani ni tshile!”" 
Ezekiel19:1 A vha iwe, imbela vhavhusi vha Israele luimbo lwa zwililo," 
Ezekiel19:2 u ri, “Mme au o vha e mini? O vha e ndaukadzi yo tangwaho nga dzindaunduna, yo shuvhama vhukati ha ndawana i tshi lela ndawana dzayo." 
Ezekiel19:3 Yo lela iṅwe ndawana yayo, ya aluwa ya vha ndau ya nduna; ya guda u zwima na u ponda, ya vha ḽidyavhathu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Tshakha dza pfa bvumo ḽayo dza yo lwa nayo, ya fashwa nga khunḓa yavho; vha i khwikhwidzela kule nga zwihovhi vha i isa shangoni ḽa Egipita.”" 
Ezekiel19:5 “Ndaukadzi ya lavhelela ya ṱovhowa, ya fulufhuwa, ya dzhia iṅwe ndawana yayo, ya i ita ndau ya maanḓa." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ya aluwa ya yo zwima na dziṅwe ndau, ya aluwa ya vha ndau ya maanḓa; ya guda u zwima na u ponda, ya vha ḽidyavhathu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ya tshoṱhela pfamo dzavho, ya phusukanya miḓi yavho; shango na vhathu vhaḽo vha tshenuswa nga mubvumo wa u vhomba hayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Tshakha dza bva dza yo lwa nayo, vha tshi bva mashangoni o i tangaho, vha i ṱharamudzela mambule, ya fashwa nga khunḓa yavho."
