Ezekiel19:9 Vha i kokodzela dangani nga zwihovhi, vha i isa ha khosi ya Babele; vha i longa ngomu ha mutsheṱo, uri ipfi ḽayo ḽi si tsha dovha ḽa pfala nṱha ha thavha dza Israele.”" 
Ezekiel19:10 “Mme au o vha a tshi nga munḓirivhe wo ṱavhiwaho tsini ha maḓi, u tshi aṋwa mitshelo, wó ita tshimvingimvingi, nge maḓi a vha a tshi ela e manzhi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Wa bva matavhi o khwaṱhaho a vha luḓo lwa musanda; a lapfa a swika nṱha-nṱha, a guma nga makole, vhathu vha takalela u lapfa hao, vha takalela vhumvingimvingi hao." 
Ezekiel19:12 Hone vho u sinyutshela vha u tupula vha u posa fhasi, mitshelo yawo ya swa nga muya u no bva phangani wa vunḓekanywa, matavhi awo a u khwaṱha a puta, mulilo wa u fhisa woṱhe." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zwino wa ṱavhiwa phangani, shangoni ḽa gomelelo ḽi si na maḓi," 
Ezekiel19:14 tsindeni ḽawo ho bva mulilo, wa fhisa matavhi awo na mitshelo, a u tshee na matavhi o khwaṱhaho, a u tshee na luḓo lwa vhuhosi.” Holu ndi luimbo lwa tshililo; lwo vha lu tshi imbwa nga u ralo." 
Ezekiel20:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu, vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha Israele vha ḓa vha vhudzisa Muṋe washu, vha dzula fhasi phanḓa hanga." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, amba na vhahulwane vha Israele, u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: No ḓa u mmbudzisa? Nga vhutshilo hanga ndi ri, a thi nga tendi vha tshi mmbudzisa tshithu – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 Vha haṱule iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vha haṱule! Vha rovhedze zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho zwe vhokhotsi avho vha ita," 
Ezekiel20:5 u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Musi we nda nanga Israele, misi ndi tshi anela vhaḓuhulu vha muṱa wa Jakopo, ndo ḓidzumbululela vhone vhe shangoni ḽa Egipita; ndo vha anela nda ri: Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Musi wonoyo ndo vha anela uri ndi ḓo vha pfulusa shangoni ḽa Egipita, nda vha isa shangoni ḽe nda vha ndo vha tandulela ḽone, shango ḽine ḽa ela mukhaha na ṋotshi, ḽi no fhira mashango oṱhe." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ndo ri: Muṅwe na muṅwe nga a laṱe midzimu ya zwifanyiso i nengisaho ine ya ni kunga, ni songo ḓishata tshika nga midzimu ya tshika ya Egipita, ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Hone vhone vho ntshandukela vha hana u thetshelesa. A hu na na muthihi wavho we a laṱa hezwo zwi nengisaho zwine zwa vha kunga; a vho ngo laṱa midzimu ya tshika ya Egipita. Nṋe nda ri ndi ḓo shululela mbiti dzanga khavho dza tou fhelela khavho ngei Egipita. 
Ezekiel20:9 Hone Nṋe nda si zwi ite, ndi tshi ri tshakha dze vha vha vha tshi dzula nadzo dzi si nyadze dzina ḽanga, ngauri ndo vha ndo no ḓi amba nda ri ndi ḓo pfulusa vhathu vhanga Egipita nda vha endedza tshakha hedzo dzi tshi zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel20:10 Zwenezwo nda vha pfulusa Egipita nda vha endedza sogani. 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndo vha ṋea milayo yanga nda vha funza ndayo dzanga uri dzi tevhedzwe nga vhoṱhe vhane vha funa u tshila. 
Ezekiel20:12 Nda vha ṋea na Dzisabatha dzanga uri tshi vhe tshiga vhukati hanga na vhone, uri vha gude uri Nṋe, Yahavee, ndi Nṋe ane nda vha ita vhakhethwa." 
Ezekiel20:13 Naho zwo ralo vhathu vha Israele vho ntshandukela sogani; vho hana u vhulunga milayo yanga, vha nyadza ndayo dzanga dzine dza fanela u tevhedzwa nga vhoṱhe vhane vha funa u tshila, vha nyadza Sabatha dzanga. Nṋe nda ri ndi ḓo tevhulela mbiti dzanga khavho phangani nda vha lozwa." 
Ezekiel20:14 Hone Nṋe ndo ita zwe zwa hulisa dzina ḽanga, uri ḽi si nyadziwe nga tshakha dze dza vhona ndi tshi pfulusa vhathu vhanga." 
Ezekiel20:15 Nangwe zwo ralo ndo vha anela ngei sogani uri a thi nga vha tshimbidzi nda vha isa shangoni ḽe nda vha ṋea, shango ḽi no ela mukhaha na ṋotshi, ḽi no fhira mashango oṱhe," 
Ezekiel20:16 ngauri vho nyadza ndayo dzanga, vha hana u vhulunga milayo yanga, vha nyadza Sabatha dzanga, mbilu dzavho dzo vha dzo nambatela midzimu yavho ya tshika." 
Ezekiel20:17 Nangwe zwo ralo nda vha khathutshela, nda si vha lozwe, nda si vha vhulahe ngei sogani." 
Ezekiel20:18 “ ‘Nda vhudza vhana vhavho ngei sogani nda ri: Ni songo tshila unga vhokhotsi aṋu, ni songo tevhedza zwidayo zwe vha zwi tevhedza, ni songo ḓiḓodza tshika nga midzimu yavho ya tshika." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu. Vhulungani milayo yanga, tevhedzani ndayo dzanga." 
Ezekiel20:20 Sabatha dzanga dzi iteni khethwa, nga dzi vhe tshiga tsha pfano yanga na inwi, uri vhathu vha ḓivhe uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Hone na vhone vhana vha ntshandukela; vho hana u vhulunga milayo yanga, a vho ngo tevhedza ndayo dzanga, dzine dza funa u tevhedzwa nga vhoṱhe vhane vha funa u tshila; a vho ngo vhulunga Dzisabatha dzanga. Nṋe nda ri ndi ḓo vha tevhulela mbiti dzanga, dza tou khunyelela khavho ngei phangani." 
Ezekiel20:22 Hone nda humisa tshanḓa tshanga nda si zwi ite, ndi tshi itela uri dzina ḽanga ḽi huliswe ḽi si nyadziwe nga tshaka dze dza zwi vhona ndi tshi vha pfulusa." 
Ezekiel20:23 Naho zwo ralo nda dovha nda vha anela ngei phangani nda ri ndi ḓo vha balanganya na dzitshakha nda vha isa mashangoni asili," 
Ezekiel20:24 nge vha si tevhedze ndayo dzanga, vha landula milayo yanga, vha si vhulunge Sabatha dzanga, vha nambatela midzimu ya tshika ya vhokhotsi avho." 
Ezekiel20:25 Nda vhuya nda vha ṋea milayo ye ya vha i si yavhuḓi na ndayo dze vha vha vha si nga kone u tshila vha tshi dzi tevhedza; 
Ezekiel20:26 nda vhuya nda ri vha ḓishate tshika nga nduvho dzavho, nda vha kumedza kha u ita zwiṱhavhelo nga matanzhe avho oṱhe; ndi tshi ralo ndo vha ndi tshi khou vha tshenusa uri vha ḓivhe uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee!’" 
Ezekiel20:27 “Zwenezwo iwe ṅwana wa muthu, amba na vhathu vha Israele. Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Zwiṅwe zwe vhokhotsi aṋu vha nnyadzisa ngazwo ngezwi, ndi u ṱolou ntshandukela," 
Ezekiel20:28 naho hu uri ndo vha endedza nda vha swikisa shangoni ḽe nda vha fulufhedzisa nga muano uri ndi ḓo vha ṋea. Henefho vho vhona mivhundu ya tshakha-tshakha na miri ya zwimvingimvingi ya tshakha-tshakha; vha vho ita zwiṱhavhelo zwavho vha ṋekedza nduvho henefho vha tshi itela u nṱunga; vho dubisa zwioro vha tevhula thevhula henefho. 
Ezekiel20:29 Nda vha vhudzisa nda ri: Tshikwara tshine na ya khatsho tshi pfi mini?’ Na ṋamusi tshi kha ḓi pfi Tshikwara. 
Ezekiel20:30 Ndi zwone, vhudza vhathu vha Israele u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yavahee u ri: Vhunga ni tshi ḓi fungelela u ḓishata tshika nga u tshila unga vhokhotsi aṋu, na ḓikumedza midzimu i nengisaho unga musadzi wa phombwe a tshi ḓiṋekedza vhanna vha si vhawe," 
Ezekiel20:31 na i ṋekedza nduvho dzaṋu na fhisa vhana vhaṋu na vha ita zwiṱhavhelo, ni tshi ḓishata tshika nga midzimu yaṋu ya tshika i sa fheli u swika ṋamusi, zwino ndi nga ni tendela hani ni tshi mmbudzisa inwi vhathu vha Israele? Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – a thi nga tendi u vhudziswa nga inwi." 
Ezekiel20:32 Zwe na ḓihumbulela zwi nga si vhuye zwa bvelela, zwine na ri: Ri ḓo nga vha dzitshakha, ra nga matsinde a vhasili vhane vha luvha thanda na tombo." 
Ezekiel20:33 “ ‘Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – ndi Nṋe ane nda ḓo ni vhusa; ndi ḓo vhusa nga tshiṱuhu ndó angaladza tshanḓa ndi tshi tevhula mbiti dzanga. 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndi ḓo ni pfulusa kha dzitshakha nda ni kuvhanganya ni tshi bva mashangoni asili he na balanganela hone, izwo ndi ḓo zwi ita nga tshanḓa tshanga tsha maanḓa ndó tshi angaladza ndi tshi tevhula mbiti dzanga." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndi ḓo ni endedza na swika Phangani ya vhukati ha Israele na Babele, nda ni sengisa henefho ro livhana zwifhaṱuwo." 
Ezekiel20:36 Ndi ḓo ni sengisa unga zwiḽa ndi tshi sengisa vhokhotsi aṋu ngei phangani ya Egipita, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndi ḓo ita unga mulisa a no serisa nngu fhasi ha lubaḓa a tshi dzi vhala uri hu si ṱahele na nthihi, nda tevhedza mulanga we nda vhofha na inwi," 
Ezekiel20:38 mashandukwa o mmvutshelaho nda a nanguludza. Ndi ḓo vha pfulusa shangoni ḽine vha dzula khaḽo, hone shangoni ḽa Israele a vha nga dzheni; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Inwi vhathu vha Israele, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Noṱhe ni nga ḓi ita nga u ralo, luvhani midzimu yaṋu ya tshika, hone ndi a ana ndi ri, ni ḓo fhedza nga u nthetshelesa. Ni ḓo litsha u nyadzisa dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa nga nduvho dzaṋu na midzimu yaṋu ya tshika." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ndi uri hafho nṱha ha thavha yanga khethwa, thavhani ndapfu ya Israele – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – ndi hone hune vhoṱhe vhathu vha Israele vha ḓo nnduvha vhó no dovha u dzula shangoni. Ndi ḓo ni ṱanganedza henefho nga mbilu tshena, nda takalela nduvho dzaṋu na matanzhe aṋu na zwoṱhe zwine na luvha ngazwo hukhethwa hanga." 
Ezekiel20:41 Na zwioro zwaṋu ndi ḓo zwi ṱanganedza hezwi ndi tshi ni pfulusa vhukati ha dzitshakha; ndi ḓo ni kuvhanganya ni tshi bva mashangoni asili e na balangana nao; ndi ḓo sumbedza vhukhethwa hanga nga inwi uri tshakha dzoṱhe dzi zwi vhone; 
Ezekiel20:42 ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, musi ndi tshi ni vhuedzedza mavuni a Israele, shango ḽe nda ana ndo khwaṱhisa uri ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea vhokhotsi aṋu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Henefho ndi hune na ḓo elelwa kutshilele kwaṋu kwa kale na vhuaḓa hoṱhe he na ḓishata tshika ngaho, na pfa ni tshi ḓinengwa nga mulandu wa vhuvhi he na vhu ita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, musi ndi tshi ni ita zwo teaho dzina ḽanga, ndi sa tevhedzi zwo teaho zwiito zwaṋu zwivhi na maitele aṋu a vhutshinyi. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, sedza tshipembe; funza u tshi kaidza vha tshipembe, porofita u tshi kaidza maṱaka a Negeve." 
Ezekiel20:47 Vhudza vha maṱaka a Negeve u ri, ‘Ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi ni funga nga mulilo, u ḓo fhisa miri yaṋu yoṱhe, yoṱhe midala na yo omaho. Iyo khavhu i dugaho a i nga dzimiwi nga muthu, i ḓo fhisa zwifhaṱuwo zwoṱhe u bva tshipembe u swika devhula." 
Ezekiel20:48 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo zwi vhona uri Nṋe Yahavee ndi Nṋe ndo u fungaho; a u nga dzimiwi.’ ” 
Ezekiel20:49 Ndi hone nṋe ndi tshi fhindula nda ri, “Yawee, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu! Vha tshi nnyamba vha ri, ‘Uyu munna u ṱolou ri thaidzela dzithai.’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, sedza Jerusalema u funze u tshi kaidza fhethu hukhethwa. Porofita u tshi kaidza shango ḽa Israele," 
Ezekiel21:3 u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: Ndi lwa na inwi. Ndi ḓo ṱomola banga ḽanga kha tshilanda nda vhulaha vhoṱhe vhavhuya na vhavhi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Vhunga ndi tshi ḓo vhulaha vhoṱhe, vhavhuya na vhavhi, banga ḽanga ḽi ḓo ṱomolwa kha tshilanda ḽa rema muṅwe na muṅwe u bva tshipembe u swika devhula." 
Ezekiel21:5 Ndi hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndo ṱomola banga kha tshilanda; a thi tsha ḓo ḽi vhuedzedza.’ 
Ezekiel21:6 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, zwenezwo gomela zwi nge mbilu yau i khou pwashekana. Bula zwigomelo zwau ú hune vha kona u u vhona." 
Ezekiel21:7 Arali vha u vhudzisa vha ri, ‘U gomelelani?’ u vha fhindule u ri, ‘Ndi mafhungo a no khou ḓa a no ḓo ita uri mbilu dzoṱhe dzi ṋoke, zwanḓa zwi kulee nungo, mbilu dzi vhavhe, vhoṱhe vha ḓiṱambulutshele zwi tse na milenzhe. Zwino zwo swika, zwo no vha fhano –’ hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ḓivhadza vhathu u ri, ‘Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Banga! Banga ḽo ṱuṱulwa, ḽo kulutedzwa!" 
Ezekiel21:10 Ḽo ṱuṱulelwa u vhulaha, ḽo penyiswa, ḽi penya unga lupenyo! Iwe ṅwananga, u songo ri ri takale wa ri hufha khosi yashu i tshi nyadza mahosi oṱhe." 
Ezekiel21:11 Banga ḽo pfi ḽi penyiswe, ḽi farwe nga tshanḓa; ḽo ṱuṱulwa ḽa kulutedzwa, ḽa lugiselwa tshanḓa tsha muvhulahi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, lila u tou honḓa, ḽi khou ḓa u ḽa vhathu vhanga; ḽi khou ḓela vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha Israele. Vhone na vhathu vhanga vho kumedzwa banga. Zwenezwo irwa khana yau nga u dinalea." 
Ezekiel21:13 Khosi yaṋu ndo mu linga, a nga si tsha dovha a nyadza iṅwe. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel21:14 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u vhande zwanḓa nga u dinalea. Banga nga ḽi reme kavhili na kararu. Ndi banga ḽa bulayo ḽihulu ḽi no vha ganedza masia oṱhe." 
Ezekiel21:15 Zwo itelwa uri mbilu dzi ṋoke, vha no wa vha vhe vhanzhi, ndo vhea banga ḽa u vhulaha khoroni dzavho dzoṱhe. Yawee! Ḽo itelwa u penya unga lupenyo, ḽo farelwa u vhulaha." 
Ezekiel21:16 Iwe banga, rema sia ḽa tshauḽa, rema sia ḽa tshamonde, rema hoṱhe hune wa rembuluselwa hone." 
Ezekiel21:17 Na Nṋe ndi ḓo vhanda zwanḓa zwanga ndo sinyuwa, ndi hone mbiti dzanga dzi tshi ḓo dzika. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, tala magondo mavhili ane banga ḽa khosi ya Babele ḽa ḓo tshimbila ngao oṱhe a tshi thoma shangoni ḽithihi. U ite tshiga tsha tsumbo hune gondo ḽa ita mafhande ḽa livha muḓini." 
Ezekiel21:20 Tala gondo ḽithihi ḽine banga ḽa ḓo tshimbila ngaḽo ḽi tshi ya muḓini wa Raba wa Vhaamoni, u tale ḽiṅwe gondo ḽi ye Juda na Jerusalema wo tangwaho nga mitsheṱo." 
Ezekiel21:21 Ndi uri khosi ya Babele i ḓo ima hune gondo ḽa ita mafhande, uri a range u tungula ṱhangu mafhandeni a magondo mavhili. U ḓo ita madeṅwa nga misevhe, a vhudzisa zwitungulo zwawe a vhanḓa tshivhindi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Kha tshauḽa tshawe hu ḓo ḓa deṅwa ḽa Jerusalema. Henefho u ḓo ita thulwi dza mavu, a ri vhathu vha vhulawe, a ṱavhe mukosi wa nndwa a khokhe thulwi dza mavu, a fhaṱe mitsheṱo ya u govhela muḓi." 
Ezekiel21:23 Vhathu vha Jerusalema vha ḓo nyadza madeṅwa ayo ngauri vho mu anela muano vha ri vha ḓo mu luvha, hone u ḓo vha humbudza mulandu wavho a vha hwala a vha isa vhuthubwani." 
Ezekiel21:24 Zwenezwo Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Zwino ngauri inwi no ḓidzumbulula nga u ntshandukela vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona, na dzumbulula vhuvhi haṋu nga zwoṱhe zwine na ita – nge na ita zwenezwo, ni ḓo kumedzwa maswina." 
Ezekiel21:25 Iwe muvhusi muvhi wa Israele, u no pfuka zwe wa ana, ḓuvha ḽau ḽo swika; zwo fhela, tshifhinga tsha khaṱhulo tsho swika." 
Ezekiel21:26 Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Bvula dugu yau ya ṱhohoni, bvula khare yau ya vhuhosi. A zwi tsha ḓo nga kale: Vha no nyadzea vha ḓo huliswa, vhahulwane vha ḓo ṱukufhadzwa." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ndozwo! Ndozwo! Ndi ḓo ḓisa ndozwo! Huno izwo a zwi nga itei hu sa athu swika we nda mu nanga uri a lifhedze uyu muḓi. Ndi ḓo mu kumedza wone.” 
Ezekiel21:28 “Huno iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a tshi amba Vhaamoni na zwine vha goḓa vhaṅwe ngazwo, u ri: “ ‘Banga! Banga ḽo ṱomolelwa u vhulaha! Ḽo kulutedzelwa u vhaimedza na u penya unga lupenyo!" 
Ezekiel21:29 Naho vho vhona mabono a si na tshithu ngomu nga iwe banga, naho vho bvumba mazwifhi fhedzi, banga u vho shidzha mikulo ya vhane vha ḓo fa nga vhuvhi havho, vhe ḓuvha ḽavho ḽa swika, tshifhinga tshavho tsha u lifhedzwa." 
Ezekiel21:30 Hone humisela banga ḽau kha tshilanda tshaḽo! Ndi ḓo u lifhedza fhethu he wa sikwa hone shangoni ḽa vhomakhulukuku wau. 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndi ḓo shululela mbiti dzanga kha iwe nda u vhudzulela khavhu dza u sinyuwa hanga; ndi ḓo u kumedza vhanna vha tshiṱuhu, vhone vhomakone vha u lozwa." 
Ezekiel21:32 U ḓo swa nga mulilo, malofha au a ḓo fhaladzwa shangoni ḽa hau, a u tsha ḓo dovha wa humbulwa; ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, wo ḓilugisela u haṱula naa? Wo ḓilugisela u haṱula muḓi wa dziphondi naa? Vha kaidzele vhuvhi havho hoṱhe vhu nengisaho!" 
Ezekiel22:3 Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Iwe muḓi une wa shulula malofha ngomu hau uri tshikhathi tshau tsha u lovha tshi swike nga u ṱavhanya, wa ḓiitela midzimu ya tshika mavuni au wa ḓishata tshika ngayo," 
Ezekiel22:4 wo ovha mulandu nga malofha e wa a fhaladza, wa ḓishata tshika nga midzimu ya tshika ye wa ita, wa ita uri tshikhathi tshau tsha u haṱulwa tshi swike nga u ṱavhanya, ndi hone tshifhinga tshau tsho fhela. Ndi ḓo u nyadzisa nga dzitshakha, mashango oṱhe a ḓo u sea." 
Ezekiel22:5 Vha kule na vha tsini vha ḓo u holedza, vha tshi vhona wo ḓala mifhirifhiri lwe na dzina ḽau ḽa vha ḽa tshika." 
Ezekiel22:6 Vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha Israele vhe vha vhuya vha dzula ngomu hau vho ḓiṋea maanḓa, vha tshi vhusela u fhaladza malofha fhedzi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Vhathu vhau vha nyadza vhokhotsi avho na vhomme avho, vha tambudza dziṱhunḓu, vha kandeledza tshilikadzi na tsiwana," 
Ezekiel22:8 a u hulisi fhethu hanga hukhethwa, wo nyadza Sabatha dzanga;" 
Ezekiel22:9 ngomu hau hu na vhane vha vhulahisa vha si na mulandu nga u vha pomoka; hu na vhathu vha no ḽela thavhani aḽiṱarini dza midzimu isili, vha ita zwi nengisaho;" 
Ezekiel22:10 ṅwana u dzhia mmane musadzi wa khotsi awe a mu dzhenisa nḓuni, vha tshipa vhasadzi vha tshi kha ḓi ṱamba;" 
Ezekiel22:11 munna u ita vhuaḓa na musadzi wa muṅwe, munna a ḓishata tshika nga u tshinya musadzi wa ṅwana wawe, muṅwe a tshinya khaladzi awe ṅwana wa khotsi awe;" 
Ezekiel22:12 vhathu vha ṱanganedza tshanḓanguvhoni vha tshi itela u fhaladza malofha; vha ṱoḓa mavhoḓa a tshelede ine vha adzimisa, vha fhura vhaṅwe nga u bindula nga nḓila i si yone, Nṋe vha nkhangwa tshoṱhe – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Zwino vhufhura hau na vhupondi hau ndi ḓo u rwela hone nga vili. 
Ezekiel22:14 Mbilu yau i ḓo konḓelela naa, zwanḓa zwau zwi ḓo konḓelela naa musi une nda u ita zwenezwo? Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee, ndi ḓo zwi ita." 
Ezekiel22:15 “ ‘Ndi ḓo u balanganya na dzitshakha nda u u phaḓaladza mashangoni asili nda fhelisa zwiito zwau zwa tshika. 
Ezekiel22:16 Ndi ḓo u nyadzisa tshakha dzi tshi zwi vhona, ndi hone u tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndi tshi sedza vhathu vha Israele ndi vhona vha tshi nga manyelo a tsimbi; vhoṱhe vha nga musina na thini na ngweḓi na mutobvu zwi khalini ine zwa ṋokiswa ngayo; vha nga siliva i tshee yo vangana na manyelo." 
Ezekiel22:19 Zwino-ha, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Vhunga noṱhe ni manyelo a tsimbi, ndi ḓo ni kuvhanganya muḓini wa Jerusalema." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ndi ḓo ni kuvhanganya ndo sinyuwa nda ni ṋokisa unga siliva na musina na ngweḓi na mutobvu na thini zwi tshi poswa zwoṱhe khalini ya u ṋokisa, nda honzedza mulilo nga fhasi zwoṱhe zwa swa zwa ṋoka." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndi ḓo ni kuvhanganya nda ni honzedzela mulilo wa mbiti dzanga, nda ni ṋokisela henefho muḓini." 
Ezekiel22:22 Ni ḓo fhiselwa ngomu muḓini na ṋoka unga siliva i tshi fhiswa ya ṋoka khalini ya u ṋokisa; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, ndi Nṋe we nda shululela mbiti dzanga kha inwi.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza Jerusalema u ri, ‘Wo kumala lune nda si tsha tenda u tshi nelwa nga mvula kana vhusuṱo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Vhavhusi vhau ngomu hau vha nga ndau i no khou fhandula tshe ya vhulaha. Vho ḽa vhathu, vha dzhia lupfumo na dzinungu, vhupondi havho ha ita uri vhasadzi vhanzhi vha sale vhe dzitshilikadzi ngomu muḓini." 
Ezekiel22:26 “ ‘Vhotshifhe vhau vho shanda mulayo wanga, hukhethwa hanga vha hu kumadza; a vha koni u vhona phambano ya zwikhethwa na zwi si zwikhethwa, a vho ngo funza vhathu u vhona phambano ya zwo kunaho na zwo kumalaho; vho nyadza Dzisabatha; zwo ita uri vhathu vha nnyadze." 
Ezekiel22:27 “ ‘Vharangaphanḓa vha vhathu afho muḓini vha nga maṱalerwa a tshi khou fhandula zwe a vhulaha, vha fhaladza malofha, vha vhulaha vhathu uri vha pfume nga thundu yavho." 
Ezekiel22:28 “ ‘Vhaporofita vhau vho fhoma vhuvhi uho nga mabono avho a si na tshithu ngomu na u ḓivhadza mazwifhi. Vha ri: Yahavee u ralo; naho hu uri Yahavee ho ngo zwi amba. 
Ezekiel22:29 “ ‘Vhathu vha shango heḽi vha na tshanḓanguvhoni na vhuvemu; vha kandeledza vhashai na vhaheḓana, vha sokou tambudza dziṱhunḓu." 
Ezekiel22:30 “ ‘Ndo ṱoḓa muṅwe vhukati havho uri a vuse mutsheṱo, a ime phanḓa hanga he mutsheṱo wa wa, a lwele shango, a nkundise u ḽi lozwa; hone a hu na na we nda mu wana." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi tevhulela mbiti dzanga khavho; ndi ḓo vha lozwa nga mulilo wa mbiti dzanga. Zwoṱhe zwe vha ita ndi ḓo ita uri zwi vha fhedze. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’ ” 
Ezekiel23:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ho vhuya ha vha na vhasadzi vhavhili, vhana vha musadzi." 
Ezekiel23:3 Vho ita vhupombwe ngei Egipita vha tshi kha ḓi vha vhasidzana. Henefho ṱhungu dzavho dza phuphuledzwa, henefho ndi he vha ri u tunga maḓamu vha mbo ḓi phuphuledzwa nga vhanna." 
Ezekiel23:4 Vho vha vha tshi pfi Ohola, ene mukomana, na Oholiba murathu wawe. Nṋe ndo vha vhinga, vha beba vhana vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana. Zwino hu tshi ḓiwa kha madzina, Samaria ndi Ohola, Jerusalema ndi Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Zwino Ohola o shandukela Nṋe munna wawe a ita vhupombwe; o emula vhafunwa vhawe Vhaashuru. Vho vha vhe vhadziammbi," 
Ezekiel23:6 vho ambaraho dza maṱeleṱele, vhavhusi na vhahulwane vha maswole, vhoṱhe vha tshi kha ḓi vha nga havho vha tshi tamisa, vhomakone kha u namela dzibere." 
Ezekiel23:7 O ḓikumedza vhone a ita vhupombwe navho, vhoṱhe vha tshi tou vha ḽone goliso ḽa Vhaashuru, a emula midzimu yavho yoṱhe ya tshika a ḓishata tshika ngayo." 
Ezekiel23:8 Na vhaḽa Vhaegipita vhe vha thoma u ita vhupombwe nae zwiḽa a tshi kha ḓi vha musidzana, a farwa ḓamu ḽawe ḽo tungaho, na vhone ho ngo vha litsha; o ḓi konana navho vha mu shululela nyemulo dzavho." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Ndi zwe nda mu kumedza vhafunwa vhawe, havho Vhaashuru vhe a vha emula." 
Ezekiel23:10 Vho mu ṱangula a vhonelwa, vha dzhia vhana vhawe vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha vha vhulaha nga pfumo. Ngauralo o wana zwo mu teaho, ya vha tsumbo ya u laya vhasadzi." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Naho murathu wawe Oholiba o zwi vhona zwoṱhe hezwo, nyemulo dzawe na vhupombwe hawe zwo shonisa u fhira zwa mukomana wawe." 
Ezekiel23:12 O emula Vhaashuru, vhavhusi na vhaḓivhalea, vhahali vho ambaraho dza maṱeleṱele, vhone vhomakone kha zwa u namela dzibere, vhane vha kha ḓi vha nga havho vha tamisaho." 
Ezekiel23:13 Nda vhona uri o no ḓishata tshika; vhuvhili havho mukomana na murathu vho vha vha tshi fana nga vhuvhi. 
Ezekiel23:14 A thoma u ita vhupombwe lwa u tou kalula; a ri u vhona zwifanyiso zwa vhanna vha Vhakhaladia zwo koriwaho kha luvhondo zwo fhomiswaho nga phomo tswuku," 
Ezekiel23:15 vhanna vho ambaraho bannda khunduni, na miṅwenda i nembelelaho ṱhohoni, vhoṱhe vha tshi nga magota a Babele, vhone vhadzulapo vha Khaladia –" 
Ezekiel23:16 a ri u vhona zwifanyiso zwavho a mbo ḓi vha emula, a ruma vhaḓinḓa vha ya khavho ngei Khaladia." 
Ezekiel23:17 Vhababele vha ḓa khae, vha mu dzhenisa nḓuni, vha mu shata tshika nga vhupombwe. Musi vho no mu shata tshika a vho vha nengwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ene a ṱana vhupombwe hawe, a bvula a sala e fhedzi; zwenezwo Nṋe nda mu nengwa sa zwe nda nengwa mukomana wawe." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ene a vho ita vhupombwe lwa u kalula, a tshi elelwa zwiḽa a tshee musidzana, a tshi ita vhupombwe shangoni ḽa Egipita," 
Ezekiel23:20 musi a tshi emula vhafunwa vhawe vha vhudzimu vhu no nga ha donngi, vha mbeu i no shuluwa unga ya bere." 
Ezekiel23:21 Iina, wo dovha wa emula zwi shonisaho zwe wa ita zwiḽa u tshee musidzana, zwiḽa vha tshi ṱolou phuphuledza ṱhungu dzau vha u fara maḓamu a tshi kha ḓi tou tunga.”" 
Ezekiel23:22 Zwino-ha iwe Oholiba, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo u rambela vhaḽa vhafunwa vhau vhane wa vho vha nengwa; ndi ḓo vha ritha vha u ḓela vha tshi bva hoṱhe-hoṱhe," 
Ezekiel23:23 Vhababele na Vhakhaladia vhoṱhe, vhanna vha Phekodo na Shua na Kua, vhe na Vhaashuru vhoṱhe, vhane vha kha ḓi vha nga havho, vha tamisaho, na vhavhusi vhoṱhe na vhaḓivhalea, na magota oṱhe a re na bvumo, vhanameli vha dzibere." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vha ḓo u ḓela vha tshi bva devhula, vhe na gariki dza nndwa na dzigoloi, vhe na magogo a dzitshakha. Vha ḓo u tinga matungo oṱhe vhe na philelo na zwiṱangu na dzinguwane dza u pilela ṱhoho. Ndo vha vhudza uri vha u haṱule; vha ḓo u haṱula nga khaṱhulo ine vha vhona yo u tea." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndi ḓo u lifhedzela zwe wa ntshandukela; vha ḓo u sinyutshela; vha ḓo u tumula ningo na nḓevhe, vho salaho muṱani wau vha ḓo fa nga pfumo; vhana vhau vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vha ḓo vha hwala, zwo salaho vha zwi fhisa nga mulilo." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vha ḓo u ṱangula vha u dzhiela nungo dzau nga khani. 
Ezekiel23:27 Ndi ṱoḓa u fhelisa vhuaḓa hau na vhupombwe he wa vhu thoma Egipita; Vhaegipita a u tsha ḓo dovha wa vha sedza, a u tsha ḓo elelwa." 
Ezekiel23:28 Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Zwino ndi u kumedza vhane wa vha vhenga, vhane wa vha nengwa." 
Ezekiel23:29 Vha ḓo u vhenga, vha u dzhiela zwoṱhe zwe wa shuma, vha u sia u fhedzi. Ndi hone vhupombwe hau vhu shonisaho vhu tshi ḓo vhonala. Vhuaḓa hau na vhupombwe hau" 
Ezekiel23:30 ndi zwone zwo u vhangelaho u tambula, vhunga wo ita vhupombwe na dzitshakha wa ḓishata tshika nga midzimu yavho ya tshika." 
Ezekiel23:31 Vhunga wo edzisa maitele a mukomana wau, ndi ḓo u nwisa tshinwelo tsha khaṱhulo tshe nda nwisa ene.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri: “U ḓo nwa tshinwelo tsha khaṱhulo tshe nda nwisa mukomana wau; ndi tshinwelo tsho aṱamaho tsha tsisa, tsho ḓala tsho tou pha. Vha ḓo u holedza vha u nyadzisa." 
Ezekiel23:33 U ḓo nwa wa tou kambiwa nga hone u tambula. Tshinwelo tsha mukomana wau Samaria ndi tshinwelo tsha nyofho na u tetemela. 
Ezekiel23:34 U ḓo tshi nwa wa tshi fhedza, wa konou tshi pwasha wa kukuna zwipiḓa zwatsho, wa tshetshekanya maḓamu au ngazwo. Hu amba Nṋe.” Ndi Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu a no khou ralo." 
Ezekiel23:35 Zwino-ha, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga wo nkhangwa wa mpfuralela, na iwe wo fanela u rwiwa ṱhamu ya vhupaṱi na vhupombwe hau.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, haṱula Ohola na Oholiba u vha vhee mulandu wa vhutshinyi havho vhu nengisaho." 
Ezekiel23:37 Vho vha dziphombwe, zwanḓa zwavho zwi rotha malofha, vho ita vhupombwe na midzimu yavho ya tshika. Na vhana vhe vha mmbebela vho vha fhirisa vhukati ha mulilo uri vha swe, vha ḽiwe nga midzimu yavho." 
Ezekiel23:38 Tshiṅwe tshe vha nkhakhela ngatsho ngetshi: fhethu hanga hukhethwa vho hu shata tshika musi wonoyo, vha kumadza Dzisabatha dzanga." 
Ezekiel23:39 Musi wonoyo vha tshi khou vhulaha vhana vhavho vha tshi vha ṱhavhela midzimu yavho ya tshika, vho dovha vha dzhena fhethu hanga hukhethwa vha hu kumadza. Ee, hezwo vhukuma ndi zwe vha ita nḓuni yanga." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Vha ita na u ruma vhaḓinḓa vha yo vhidza vhanna vha ḓa vha tshi bva kule, vha tshi swika iwe Jerusalema wa vha ṱambela, wa fhoma maṱo au, wa ambara nungu dzau," 
Ezekiel23:41 wa dzula nṱha ha vhulalo ha maṱeleṱele, henefho tsini hu na ḓafula, nṱha hayo wo vhea zwioro zwanga na mapfura anga." 
Ezekiel23:42 Ha pfala mukosi wa maipfi a vhathu vha mahwarahwara – gogo ḽa vhanna vho ḓiswaho vha tshi bva phangani; vhenevho vha ambadza vhasadzi vhukunda zwanḓani, vha vha ambadza na khare dza maṱeleṱele ṱhohoni." 
Ezekiel23:43 Nda elekanya nda ri: Phombwe dzi ita vhupombwe nḓuni ya musadzi o no ṱahadzwaho nga vhupombwe. Na ene u kha ḓi ita vhupombwe," 
Ezekiel23:44 vhanna vha ḓi mu dalela unga phombwe, u ḓi nga vha tshi ya kha havhaḽa vhasadzi vha sa fulufhedzei Ohola na Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:45 Hone vha fulufhedzeaho vha ḓo vha haṱula nga khaṱhulo yo teaho dziphombwe na dziphondi; hufha vhe dziphombwe, na zwanḓa zwavho zwi tshi khou rotha malofha.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhidza gogo ḽi vha kuvhanganele ḽi vha tambudze ḽi vha ṱangule;" 
Ezekiel23:47 vha vha kanḓe nga matombo, vha vha reme nga mapanga avho vha fe, vha shidzhe vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana, vha fhise nnḓu dzavho nga mulilo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ndi ḓo fhelisa u sa fulufhedzea shangoni heḽo, ngauralo vhasadzi vhoṱhe vha ḓo vha vho kaidzwa, vha si tsha edzisa u sa fulufhedzea haṋu." 
Ezekiel23:49 U sa fulufhedzea haṋu hu ḓo ni vhulaha, ni ḓo hwala muhwalo wa vhuvhi haṋu ha u luvha midzimu ya dzitshika; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ṅwala ḓuvha ḽa ṋamusi, ngauri nga ḓuvha heḽino khosi ya Babele i khou thoma u govhela muḓi wa Jerusalema." 
Ezekiel24:3 Zwenezwo vhathu havha vha mashandukwa vha vhudze tshifanyiso u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Vheani khali muliloni; i vheeni; i ṱadzieni." 
Ezekiel24:4 Longani miraḓo ya ṋama ngomu hayo, miraḓo i fhiraho yoṱhe, tshizwa na voho, ni i ḓadze nga marambo a fhiraho oṱhe." 
Ezekiel24:5 Nangani nngu dzi no fhira dzoṱhe sambini. Zwenezwo ni khokhe khuni nga fhasi, khali i vhile i xaxare marambo a vhuye a vhibve.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Khombo i ḓo wela muḓi hoyo wo khakhaṱhelaho malofha, heyo khali ya u bika yo ḓalaho vhulali, ine vhulali hayo vhu si fhalee! Ṋulani thango nga thango i sale i si na tshithu, ni sa vhuyi na ita madeṅwa." 
Ezekiel24:7 Malofha e wa a fhaladza a ngomu hawo; wo a shululela nṱha ha tombo, a wo ngo a shululela mavuni uri a tibedzwe nga buse." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ndo litsha malofha awo kha tombo, uri a si fukedzwe, ndi tshi itela u ritha mbiti dzanga, ndi lifhedze.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Zwino-ha, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Khombo i ḓo wela muḓi wo khakhaṱhelaho malofha! Na Nṋe ndi ḓo vhasa mulilo muhulu." 
Ezekiel24:10 Khokha khuni, funga mulilo, bika ṋama, ṱanganya na zwilungi, u vhasedze marambo a vhuye a swe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Zwino vhea khali i si na tshithu nṱha ha masimbe i swe; u litshe musina wayo u swe u tou tswuka, mashika a re ngomu hayo a ṋoke, vhulali vhu re ngomu hayo vhu swe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Hone ndi u sokou ḓinetisa, vhulali hoho ndi vhunzhisa, vhu nga si bviswe nga khavhu ya mulilo." 
Ezekiel24:13 “Ndo linga u u ṱanzwa tshika ya u sa fulufhedzea hau, hone wa si tende u ṱanzwiwa iyo tshika yau. Zwino-ha, a u tsha ḓo ṱanzwiwa ndi vhuye ndi tevhulele mbiti dzanga kha iwe." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee; zwine nda amba zwi ḓo itea; ndi ḓo zwi ita, a thi nga humeli murahu; a thi nga u khathutsheli, a thi nga u pfeli vhuṱungu. Ndi ḓo u haṱula ndi tshi tevhedza kutshilele kwau na zwiito zwau – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi u dzhiela mufarisi wau, ḽone dakalo ḽa maṱo au; ndi ḓo zwi ita kathihi fhedzi. Hone u songo vhuya wa ṱavha mukosi, u songo lila, u songo vhuya wa rothisa miṱodzi." 
Ezekiel24:17 U gomele zwau u woṱhe, u songo lila mufu. U vhofhe ṅwenda ṱhohoni, u ambare navhula dzau milenzheni, u songo pila ndebvu dzau, u songo ḽa zwiḽiwa zwi no ḽiwa nga vha no lila mufu.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Nda amba na vhathu sa misi nga matsheloni, nga madekwana musadzi wanga a fa, ḽi tshi dovha u tsha nga matsheloni nda ita zwe nda vhudzwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Vhathu vha mmbudzisa vha ri, “A vha ri ṱalutshedzi uri izwo zwithu zwine vha khou ita zwi ri vhudzani?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Vhudza vhathu vha Israele u ri: Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi kumadza fhethu hanga hukhethwa, ḽone goliso ḽa maanḓa aṋu, ḽone dakalo ḽa maṱo aṋu, tshone tshitaṅwa tsha mbilu dzaṋu. Vhana vhaṋu vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vhe na vha sia vha ḓo fa nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Huno inwi ni ḓo ita zwe nṋe Esekiele nda ita. A ni nga pili ndebvu dzaṋu, a ni nga ḽi zwiḽiwa zwi no ḽiwa nga vha no lila mufu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ni ḓo ambara miṅwenda yaṋu ṱhohoni dzaṋu, na navhula dzaṋu milenzheni; a ni nga ṱavhi mukosi, a ni nga lili. Ni ḓo onda nga mulandu wa vhutshinyi haṋu, na gomela nga tshaṋu." 
Ezekiel24:24 Esekiele u ḓo vha ene tshiga tshaṋu. Ni ḓo ita zwe a ita. Hu tshi itea zwenezwo, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 “Huno iwe ṅwana wa muthu, musi une nda vha dzhiela vhana vhavho vha vhatuka na vha vhasidzana vhane vha vha vhone thikho yavho, ḽone goliso ḽavho na vhugala havho, ḽone dzanga ḽa maṱo avho, ḽone dakalo ḽa mbilu dzavho –" 
Ezekiel24:26 musi wonoyo hu ḓo ḓa tshavhi ya u vhudza mafhungo eneo. 
Ezekiel24:27 Musi wonoyo mulomo wau u ḓo vulea wa amba na iyo tshavhi; u vho ḓo amba, a u tsha ḓo vha tshimuma; iwe u ḓo vha tshone tshiga tshavho, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, livhana na Vhaamoni u porofite u tshi vha kaidza," 
Ezekiel25:3 u ri, ‘Ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ni ri: Koṱo! ni tshi vhona fhethu hanga hukhethwa ho kumadzwa, shango ḽa Israele ḽo phusukanywa, vhathu vha Juda vha tshi iswa vhuthubwani." 
Ezekiel25:4 Nga zwenezwo shango ḽaṋu ndi ḓo ḽi ṋea tshakha dza Vhubvaḓuvha ḽa vha ḽavho; vha ḓo ṱoka mishasha yavho shangoni ḽaṋu, vha dzula khaḽo. Vha ḓo ḽa mitshelo yaṋu, vha nwa mukhaha waṋu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Muḓi wa Raba ndi ḓo u ita pfulo ya dzigamela, miḓi ya Amoni nda i ita vhuawelo ha dzinngu. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:6 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga no vhanda zwanḓa na tou tshina nga u takalela khombo yo welaho shango ḽa Israele, na vha nyala nga mbilu yoṱhe," 
Ezekiel25:7 ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda ni rwa ndi tshi itela zwenezwo; ndi ḓo ni kumedza dzitshakha dza ni ṱangula, nda ni lozwa na si tsha vha lushaka, nda ni swiela na si tsha vha hone shangoni. Ndi ḓo ita uri ni si tsha vha tshithu; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga Vhamuaba na Vhaseiri vho ri, ‘Edzonu vhona vhathu vha Juda; vho fhambana ngafhi na dziṅwe tshakha?’" 
Ezekiel25:9 Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo ṱangula mivhundu ya Muaba ya sala i si na miḓi, nda phusukanya miḓi yaḽo shangoni ḽoṱhe, na ine ya tou vha yone ine vha i ṱongisa, Bethe Jeshimothi na Baali Mioni na Kiriathaimi." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndi ḓo ḽi kumedza tshakha dza Vhubvaḓuvha, maswina a Vhaamoni, ḽa vha ḽavho uri Vhaamoni vha si tsha vhuya vha ḓivhea vhe lushaka." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ndi ḓo lifhedza na Muaba nga u ralo, ndi hone muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga Vhaedomo vho lifhedza vhathu vha Juda, u ralo ha vha u ḓiovhela mulandu muhulu," 
Ezekiel25:13 ndi zwone, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda rwa na Vhaedomo nda fhedza vhathu vhoṱhe na zwifuwo shangoni. Ndi ḓo ita uri ḽi sale ḽi phanga; vhathu vha ḓo vhulawa nga pfumo u bva Themana u swika Dedani." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndi ḓo lifhedza Vhaedomo nga Vhaisraele vhathu vhanga. Vha ḓo ita Edomo zwine zwa tshimbilelana na mbiti dzanga na u sinyuwa hanga, muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi yone ndifhedzo yanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhafilista vho lifhedza Juda nga tshiṱuhu; vho tou ḓiimisela u vha lozwa tshoṱhe zwi tshi bva kha vhuswina havho ha kale na kale." 
Ezekiel25:16 Ndi zwone, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee, ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda rwa Vhafilista nda lozwa vhenevho Vhakhrita hu si sale na muthihi henefho khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndo vha sinyutshela, ndi ḓo vha lifhedza. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, musi ndi tshi vha lifhedza.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuthihi ri vhuthubwani Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhunga vha Tiro vho nzhonzhowedza Jerusalema vha ri, ‘Ahaa! Uḽa muḓi we wa vha u tshi pfi Khoro ya Dzitshakha wo phusukanywa, wo sala u matumba; zwino ro vulelwa khoro, lupfumo lu ḓo vha lwashu!’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “Ndi zwone, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri, ‘Zwino Tiro, ndi lwa na iwe. Ndi ḓo u rambela tshakha nnzhi dza u vutshela unga lwanzhe lu tshi fhufhisa magabelo alwo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Vha ḓo thutha mutsheṱo wa Tiro, vha ḓo wisa dzithawara dzawo; ndi ḓo swiela mavu awo, nda u sia u lutombo fhedzi." 
Ezekiel26:5 U ḓo vha kuṱangadzime vhukati ha lwanzhe hune ha anewa mambule. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee, ndi ri, tshakha dzi ḓo u ṱangula." 
Ezekiel26:6 Vhananyana vha Tiro ndi miḓi i re shangoni, vhone vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, uri vha kone u ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ruma Nebukadnetsara khosi ya Babele a tshi bva devhula, ene khosi ya mahosi, a ḓa a lwa na Tiro e na bere na gariki dza nndwa na vhanameli vha dzibere, u ḓo ḓa na magogo a tshakha." 
Ezekiel26:8 “Vhananyana vhau – yone miḓi i re nnḓa shangoni – u ḓo vha fhedza nga pfumo. Iwe u ḓo u govhela, a u khokhela thulwi dza mavu, a u tanga nga mitsheṱo." 
Ezekiel26:9 U ḓo pwasha mitsheṱo yau nga matanda, a thutha dzithawara dzau nga migwala yawe." 
Ezekiel26:10 Bere dzawe dzo ḓalesa, dzi ḓo ni tiba nga buse ḽadzo. Mukosi wa dzibere na milinga ya gariki dzawe dza nndwa zwi ḓo dzinginyisa mitsheṱo yau a tshi fhira khoroni dzau unga munna a tshi dzhena muḓini we a thutha mitsheṱo yawo." 
Ezekiel26:11 Khwanḓa dza bere dzawe dzi ḓo pfala mikotoni yau; vhathu vhau u ḓo vha fhedza nga pfumo, phuphu dzau ndenya a dzi wisela fhasi." 
Ezekiel26:12 U ḓo dzhielwa lupfumo lwau, thundu ine wa rengisa ya dzhiwa, mitsheṱo yau ya thuthwa, nnḓu dzau dza vhugala dza pwashiwa, matombo au na matanda au na mavu au zwa poswa lwanzheni." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndi ḓo fhelisa nyimbo dzau na mafhuwe; mubvumo wa mbila dzau a u tsha ḓo pfala. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndi ḓo ita uri u sale u lutombo lu si na tshithu khalwo, nda u ita kuṱangadzime kune ha anewa mambule khakwo; a u tsha ḓo dovha wa vuswa; ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.” Hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu." 
Ezekiel26:15 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u vhudza Tiro u ri, “Musi vha tshi pfa mutsindo wa u wa hau na zwigomelo zwa vhathu vhau vho huvhadzwaho, na bulayo ḽihulu ngomu ha mitsheṱo yau, zwiṱangadzime a zwi nga dzinginyei naa?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha lwanzhe vha ḓo takuwa kha khuluṋoni dzavho vha vhea khanzu dzavho nga thungo, vha bvula nguvho dzavho dza maṱeleṱele. Vha ḓo fuka nyofho, vha dzula fhasi vha ṱwa vha tshi tetemela, vho tshenuswa nga zwo u welaho." 
Ezekiel26:17 “Vha ḓo vusa luimbo lwa tshililo vha u imbela vha ri, “ ‘Zwino ndi hone wo phusukanywa, iwe wo ḓalaho thundu dzi no bva seli ha lwanzhe, iwe muḓi wa bvumo, iwe we wa vha u na maanḓa lwanzheni, iwe na vhadzulapo vhau, vhe vha vha vha tshi ofhisa tshakha dzoṱhe dzo tangaho lwanzhe." 
Ezekiel26:18 Zwino musi wa u wa hau zwiṱangadzime zwi khou tetemela, zwiṱangadzime zwa lwanzhe zwi a ofha zwi tshi vhona zwo u welaho.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi ndi tshi ita uri u sale u si na muthu, u shubi, musi ndi tshi u tiba nga maḓi mahulu a lwanzhe," 
Ezekiel26:20 ndi ḓo u posa fhasi na vhane vha dzhena tshaloni wa ya kha vha kale; ndi ḓo ita uri u dzule madzinguni a fhasi ha mavu, wa dzula u woṱhe lini na lini, ú na vhe vha godimela tshaloni, uri u si tsha kona u vhuya wa dzula shangoni ḽa vha tshilaho kana wa vha na vhugala." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndi ḓo u ita tsumbo ya tshithu tsho welwaho nga zwi ofhisaho; a u tsha ḓo vha hone. Vhathu vha ḓo u ṱoḓa vha si tsha dovha vha u wana – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.” 
Ezekiel27:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vusa luimbo lwa tshililo lwa u lilela Tiro." 
Ezekiel27:3 Vhudza Tiro, houḽa muḓi u re lumemeni lwa lwanzhe, u no ita bindu na mashango a seli ha lwanzhe a si na mbalo, u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Iwe Tiro, wo vha u tshi ḓi ri: Ndi nṋe tshikepe tsha lunako lwo khunyelelaho." 
Ezekiel27:4 Mikano yau yo vha i tshi mona na lwanzhe; vhe vha u fhaṱa vho u nakisa lwo khunyelelaho. 
Ezekiel27:5 Matanda e vha u fhaṱa ngao ndi miṱaululo i bvaho Seniri. Vho dzhia mikedara i no bva Libanoni vha u itela phuphu dza zwikepe. 
Ezekiel27:6 Vho vhaḓa khwea dzau nga miri milapfu ya Bashani. Vhukando ha zwikepe zwau vha fhaṱa nga mipaini i bvaho zwiṱangadzimeni zwa Magiriki, vha adzela nga ṋanga dza nḓou." 
Ezekiel27:7 Seila yau yo vha i ya lukhaha lwa mivhalavhala lu no bva Egipita, wa vhonala ngayo u tshee kule. Tshitsiraḓuvha tshau tsho vha tshi tsha muridili na mutswuku zwa zwiṱangadzime zwa Elisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Zwikepe zwau zwo vha zwi tshi tshimbidzwa nga vhanna vha Sidoni na Aravadi. Vhatsila vhau, iwe Tiro, vho vha vhe vhone vha namelaho zwikepe vha tala ngazwo lwanzheni." 
Ezekiel27:9 “ ‘Mbomo dza zwikepe zwau dzo vha dzi tshi namiwa nga vhahulwane na vhatsila vha Gebala. Zwikepe zwoṱhe zwa lwanzheni na vhanameli vha talaho ngazwo vho vha vha tshi u dalela ni tshi vhambadzelana thundu. 
Ezekiel27:10 Vhahali vha mmbi yau vho vha vha vha tshi bva Pheresia na Lidia na Phuthi. Vho vha vha tshi fhahea zwiṱangu zwavho na nguwane dzavho kha mitsheṱo yau, u ralo ha vha u u ḓisela vhugala." 
Ezekiel27:11 Vhanna vha Aravadi vho vha vha tshi linda u mona na mitsheṱo yau vhe na vhahali vhau, thawara dzau dza lindwa nga vhanna vha Gamadi. Vho vha vha tshi fhahea zwiṱangu zwavho hoṱhe-hoṱhe kha mitsheṱo yau vha ita uri lunako lwau lu vhe lwo khunyelelaho." 
Ezekiel27:12 Vha Tharashishi vho vha vha tshi renga thundu kha iwe, vha tshi bindula nga lupfumo lwau lu si na vhukono. Vhathu vho vha vha tshi renga thundu yau nga siliva na tsimbi na thini na mutobvu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Vha Giriki na vha Thubala na vha Meshekhe wo vha u tshi vhambadzelana thundu navho, vha tshi renga thundu yau nga dziphuli na nga zwithu zwo fulwaho nga musinaseṱha." 
Ezekiel27:14 Vhathu vha Bethe Thogarama vho vha vha tshi renga thundu yau nga dzibere dza u lima na dza nndwani na dzimeila. 
Ezekiel27:15 Vhanna vha Dedani vho vha vha tshi vhambadzelana na iwe; vhathu vha mashango manzhi a seli ha lwanzhe vho vha vha tshi renga thundu kha iwe nga ṋanga dza nḓou na muonze. 
Ezekiel27:16 Vha Aramu vho vha vha tshi renga kha iwe nge wa vha u na thundu dzo fhambanaho dzi sa fheli; vho vha vha tshi dzi renga nga masila a muroxwe na muridili na a mivhalavhala na lukhaha na khorala na dzirubi. 
Ezekiel27:17 Vha Juda na vha shango ḽa Israele na vhone vho vha vha tshi vhambadzelana na iwe, vha tshi u ṋea goroi i no bva Minithi na dzikhekhe na ṋotshi na mapfura na mishonga i no thivhela tshitumbu u sina." 
Ezekiel27:18 Vha Damasko vho vha vha tshi renga thundu kha iwe nge wa vha u na thundu nnzhi na lupfumo lu si na vhukono, vha tshi u ṋea waini i no bva Heleboni na vhukuse vhu no bva Tsahara." 
Ezekiel27:19 “ ‘Vha Dani na vha Giriki na vha no bva Usala u ya nṱha, thundu yau vho vha vha tshi i renga nga tsimbi yo khavhiswaho na zwilungi zwa khasia na khalamusi." 
Ezekiel27:20 Vha Dedani vho vha vha tshi renga thundu yau nga masila a u vhea kha bere fhasi ha sala. 
Ezekiel27:21 Vha Arabia na vhavhusi vha shango ḽa Kedara vho vha vha tshi renga thundu kha iwe; vho dzi renga nga ngwana na thutha na mbokoṱo. 
Ezekiel27:22 Vhashavhi vha Sheba na vha Raama vho vha vha tshi vhambadzelana na iwe; u tshi wana zwilungi zwavhuḓi zwi fhiraho zwoṱhe na matombo a mutengo muhulu na musuku vha tshi renga thundu dzau. 
Ezekiel27:23 Vha Harani na vha Khane na vha Edeni na vhashavhi vha Sheba na vha Ashuri na vha Khilimadi vho vha vha tshi vhambadzelana na iwe. 
Ezekiel27:24 Vho vha vha tshi vhambadza zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele na tshali dza vhukuse ha tshisumbusumbu na nguvho dza mivhalavhala na ndede dzi na mashaphu o lukwaho o vhoxwa mapfundo a khwaṱhiswa. 
Ezekiel27:25 Zwikepe zwa Tharashishi zwo wela malwanzhe zwo hwala thundu yaṋu ya u vhambadza. “ ‘Zwenezwo wo vha wo pfuma wa vha na vhugala u vhukati ha malwanzhe, iwe Tiro, tshikepe tshihulu." 
Ezekiel27:26 Vhatshimbidzi vhau vho u tshimbidza wa swika he lwanzhe lwa aṱama. “ ‘Hone muya wa vhubvaḓuvha u ḓo u pwashekanya tshivhindini tsha lwanzhe. 
Ezekiel27:27 “ ‘Lupfumo lwau na thundu yau na muhwalo wau woṱhe khathihi na vhatshimbidzi vhau na vhashumi vhau na vhanami vhau na vhashavhi vhau na vhahali vhoṱhe vhane wa vha hwala wa tshimbila navho na mmbi yoṱhe yo namelaho – vhoṱhe vha ḓo ṋupela vhukatikati ha lwanzhe musi u tshi pwashekana. 
Ezekiel27:28 “ ‘Khunzikhunzi dzi ḓo ri u pfa mukosi wa vhatshimbidzi vhau dza tetemela. 
Ezekiel27:29 Vhatshimbidzi vha zwikepe vhoṱhe vha ḓo zwi ṱutshela. Vhane vha tala nga zwikepe na vha endaho lwanzheni vha ḓo dzula henefho khunzikhunzini. 
Ezekiel27:30 Vha ḓo u ṱavhela mukosi vha lila lu ṱungufhadzaho. Vha ḓo ḓishela buse ṱhohoni, vha vhumbuluwa milorani;" 
Ezekiel27:31 vha ḓo ḓipalula ṱhoho vha ambara madzanganda, vha u lilela tshililo tshi ṱungufhadzaho, vha lila vha tou honḓa;" 
Ezekiel27:32 vha ḓo vusa luimbo lwa tshililo vha u lilela, vha ongolela vha ri: Ndi nnyi we a vha a tshi nga ḓivhambedza na Tiro wo tangwaho nga malwanzhe? Zwino a u tsha pfala!" 
Ezekiel27:33 Zwiḽa u tshi rula thundu dzau wo vha u tshi fusha tshakha nnzhi, wa pfumisa mahosi a ḽifhasi nga lupfumo lwau lu si na vhukono, na thundu." 
Ezekiel27:34 Zwino wo pwashekanywa nga magabelo, wo ṋupela fhasi-fhasi lwanzheni. Mihwalo yau ya zwikepe na vhatshimbidzi vhau vhoṱhe vho ṋupela na iwe." 
Ezekiel27:35 Vhoṱhe vha no dzula mashangoni a seli ha lwanzhe vho tshenuswa nga zwo u welaho. Mahosi avho vho pfa mavhudzi a tshi ima, zwifhaṱuwo zwavho zwo tshenuluwa nga nyofho." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vhashavhi vha dzitshakha vho lidza muludzi nga u kanuka vha tshi vhona zwo u welaho, u tou vha tshiga tsha zwi ofhisaho, wo ṱuwa tshoṱhe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza muvhusi wa Tiro u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Wo amba wo huduluwa wa ri: Ndi mudzimu; ndo dzula kha khuluṋoni ya Mudzimu ndo tangwa nga malwanzhe. Naho u muthu u si mudzimu, u vhona unga u eḓana na Mudzimu." 
Ezekiel28:3 Zwino u vhona unga wo no ṱalifha u fhira Danele; a hu na tshiphiri tshine wa si tshi ḓivhe. 
Ezekiel28:4 Wo ḓiwanela lupfumo nga vhuṱali hau na ṱhalukanyo yau; wo khokha musuku na siliva zwisikuni zwau. 
Ezekiel28:5 “ ‘Uho ndi hone vhutsila hau ha u vhambadza thundu; lupfumo lwau lwo ḓi anda lu tshi ya, ndi zwe mbilu yau ya vho ḓihudza!" 
Ezekiel28:6 Ndi zwine Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a amba a ri, U vhona unga u eḓana na Mudzimu," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndi zwone, ndi ḓo u ḓisela vhatsinda vha lwa na iwe, lwone lushaka lwa tshiṱuhu. Vha ḓo lwa na iwe nga pfumo vha phusukanya madzanga e wa ḓiwanela nga vhuṱali; vhugala hau vha ḓo vhu shata tshika;" 
Ezekiel28:8 vha ḓo u posa fhasi dindini, u ḓo fa nga u vhulawa vhukatikati ha lwanzhe." 
Ezekiel28:9 U kha ḓi ḓo ri: Ndi mudzimu, musi vhavhulahi vhau vho livhana na iwe naa? Aiwa nandi, hezwo ú zwanḓani zwa vhavhulahi vhau u ḓo vhonala u muthu, u si mudzimu." 
Ezekiel28:10 U ḓo fa lu nyadzisaho zwanḓani zwa vhatsinda unga shuvhuru ḽi songo fumbaho. Ndo amba – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee!’ ” 
Ezekiel28:11 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe a ri," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vusa luimbo lwa tshililo u imbele khosi ya Tiro. Mu vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Wo vhuya wa vha tsumbo ya o khunyelelaho, ú na vhuṱali, lunako lwau lwó khunyelela." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wo vha wo dzula Edeni ngadeni ya Mudzimu. Khanzu yau yo vha yo ṱamiwa nga matombo oṱhe-oṱhe a mutengo muhulu: saradi na tshirulwane na daimane na khrisoli na onikisi na jasipere na safire na matswuku na a muroxwe; ḓuvha ḽe wa bebwa wo wana wo dzula wo ṱamelwa maṱeleṱele a musuku. 
Ezekiel28:14 Wo oliwa unga mukherube a ofhisaho ane a linda thavha khethwa ya midzimu, u tshi tshimbila vhukati ha matombo a no penya unga masimbe." 
Ezekiel28:15 Kutshilele kwau kwo vha ku kwone-kwone tshee wa sikwa, u swika musi we vhuvhi ha thoma u simuwa kha iwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Vhushavhi hau vhu sa u tumbisi fhasi ho u ḓadza vhuvemu na vhutshinyi. Nda u doba thavhani ya midzimu nda u posa fhasi, iwe mukherube wa u linda nda u lozwa nda u bvisa vhukati ha matombo a no penya unga masimbe a mulilo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Lunako lwau lwo kukumusa mbilu yau, wa ḓihudza. Wo sinisa vhuṱali hau nge wa vha na vhugala. Ndo u posa fhasi mavuni; ndo u ita ṱano uri maṅwe mahosi a ḓiphiṋe nga u vhona khombo yau." 
Ezekiel28:18 Hukhethwa hau wo hu shata tshika nga u anda ha vhuvhi hau na nga u ṱolou fhura vhathu u tshi ita zwa vhushavhi. Ndo ḓisa mulilo kha iwe uri u swe u tou lore. Ndo u ita milora mavuni vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Ezekiel28:19 vha tshakha dzoṱhe vhane vha u ḓivha vha vhona zwo u welaho zwi tshi akhamadza. U tou vha ṱano ḽa o welwaho nga zwi ofhisaho ḽa u laya vhaṅwe; a u tsha ḓo vha hone lini na lini!’ ” 
Ezekiel28:20 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, lavhelesa Sidoni u porofite u tshi u haṱula," 
Ezekiel28:22 u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Iwe Sidoni, zwino ndi khou lwa na iwe; ndi ḓo sumbedza vhugala hanga nga zwine nda ḓo u ita. Vhathu vha ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi ndi tshi u haṱula, nda vhonadza vhukhethwa hanga ngomu hawe." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndi ḓo u ḓisela dwadze; malofha a ḓo ela mikotoni yau, ngomu hau vhafu vha ḓo rambalala vho ḽiwa nga pfumo, ḽa u tanga masia oṱhe, ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel28:24 “Tshakha dzoṱhe dzo ṋekanaho masakha na vhathu vha Israele a dzi tsha ḓo vha nyadza na kathihi, unga mupfa une wa vaya wa huvhadza, kana mutshutshungu une wa randa; ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi ndi tshi kuvhanganya vhathu vha Israele vho balanganaho na dzitshakha, ndi ḓo sumbedza vhukhethwa hanga tshakha dzoṱhe dzi tshi zwi vhona. Vha ḓo dzula mavuni avho e nda ṋea mulanda wanga Jakopo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vha ḓo dzula henefho vho rudza mbilu, vha fhaṱa dzinnḓu, vha lima masimu a minḓirivhe; vha ḓo dzula henefho vho rudza mbilu. Musi ndi tshi lifhedza tshakha dzoṱhe dzi dzulaho tsini havho dzine dza vha nyadza, ndi hone vhathu vhanga vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi na vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, livhana na Farao khosi ya Egipita u porofite u tshi mu haṱula, u haṱule na vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango ḽa Egipita." 
Ezekiel29:3 Mu vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Iwe Farao khosi ya Egipita zwino ndi khou lwa na iwe, hewe ḽigweṋa ḽihulu ḽi lalelaho milambwanani yau ya Nile, wo ri: Milambwana yanga ya Nile ndi yanga, ndi nṋe ndo i vhumbaho." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ndi ḓo u longa tshilazwulo ṱhahani, khovhe dza Nile nda dzi nambatedza kha makwanda au, nda u kokodza wa bva mulamboni wau wa Nile, na khovhe dza Nile wau dzoṱhe dzó nambatela kha makwanda au." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndi ḓo u posa phangani na khovhe dzoṱhe dza Nile wau. U ḓo wela fhasi mavuni ha si vhe na ane a u hwala a yo u swiṱa. Ndi ḓo u kumedza zwivhanda na zwiṋoni, zwa u ḽa." 
Ezekiel29:6 Ndi hone vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Egipita vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, nge wa ri u tshi tikedza Vhaisraele, wa nga luṱanga lu tepaho;" 
Ezekiel29:7 musi vha tshi gogoḓela nga iwe, wo vunḓea zwanḓani zwavho, wa vha runga magopwa. Musi vha tshi ḓitika nga iwe, iwe wo vunḓea wa litsha khundu dzavho dzi tshi tepa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:8 Ndi zwine Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a ri, “Ndi khou u ḓisela pfumo, ḽi ḓo vhulaha vhanna vhau na zwifuwo zwau." 
Ezekiel29:9 Egipita ḽi ḓo sala ḽi phanga ḽi si na muthu, ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. Ndi yone ṱhamu yau nge wa amba wa ri, ‘Nile ndi wanga, ndo tou u vhumba.’" 
Ezekiel29:10 “Ndi zwone, zwino ndi lwa na iwe na milambwana yau ya Nile. Ndi ḓo ita uri Egipita ḽi sale ḽi phanga ḽi si na muthu, u bva Migidolo u swika Aswani u vhuya u fhira mikano ya Kushu." 
Ezekiel29:11 Henefho a hu tsha ḓo kanda mulenzhe wa muthu kana wa phukha. Hu ḓo fhela miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa hu sa dzuli muthu. 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndi ṱoḓa u phusukanya shango ḽa Egipita ḽó tangwa nga mashango o phusukanywaho; hu ḓo fhela miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa miḓi yaḽo i sa dzuli muthu, yó tangwa nga miḓi yo phusukanywaho. Ndi ḓo balanganya Vhaegipita na dzitshakha nda vha thalanganya na mashango.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi ho no fhela miṅwaha ya mahumi maṋa ndi ḓo kuvhanganya vhathu vha Egipita vho balanganaho na dzitshakha." 
Ezekiel29:14 Mathubwa a Vhaegipita ndi ḓo vha vhuisa nda dovha nda vha dzudza shangoni ḽa Phathirosi ḽine vha bva khaḽo. Henefho vha ḓo vhumba muvhuso u songo khwaṱhaho. 
Ezekiel29:15 Egipita u ḓo vha wone muvhuso u shayaho nungo u no fhira yoṱhe, a u tsha ḓo dovha wa ḓihudza kha dziṅwe tshakha; ndi ḓo ḽi fhungudza, a ḽi tsha ḓo vhusa dziṅwe tshakha." 
Ezekiel29:16 Vhathu vha Israele a vha tsha ḓo ḽi fulufhela, ḽi ḓo vha ḽone tsumbo i vhonalaho ya vhuvhi ha Israele, zwiḽa Vhaisraele vha tshi kha ḓi ḓitika ngaḽo. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Nga ṅwaha wa 27 ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, mmbi ya Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele yo ṱoḓa u dia muḓi wa Tiro. O hwesa vhahali vhawe mihwalo i lemelaho lwe mavhudzi avho a guvhuwa na mahaḓa avho a swotowa, hone ene khosi na vhahali vhawe a vho ngo vhuelwa nga tshithu kha u tambula havho vha tshi dia Tiro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Vhunga zwo ralo, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Shango ḽa Egipita ndi ḓo ḽi kumedza Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele. U ḓo hwala lupfumo lwaḽo, a thuba thundu yaḽo, a ḽi ṱangula, a hwala thundu iyo a yo holela vhahali vhawe ngayo." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndi khou mu kumedza shango ḽa Egipita, ndi yone pfufho yawe, nge a ḓidina a tshi dia Tiro, ngauri o vha a tshi khou shumela Nṋe, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Musi wonoyo vhathu vha Israele ndi ḓo vha ombela shambo, iwe Esekiele nda u tendela uri u ambe vhoṱhe vha zwi pfe. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ṱavhani mukosi ni ri: Yawee, ḓuvha ḽa zwi ofhisaho!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ndi uri ḓuvha ḽo sendela, ḓuvha ḽa Yahavee ḽi tsini; ḽi ḓo vha ḓuvha ḽo tibwaho nga gole, ḓuvha ḽa u sengisa dzitshakha." 
Ezekiel30:4 “ ‘Pfumo ḽi ḓo ḓela Egipita, vhathu vha Kushu vha ḓo tetemela nga nyofho musi vho vhulawaho vho rambalala ngei Egipita, lupfumo lwaḽo lu tshi hwalwa, miteo i tshi thuthwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Vha Kushu na vha Phuthi na vha Ludi na vhahali vho tholiwaho na vha Kubu na vhoṱhe vhane vha ima na Vhaegipita, na vhone vha ḓo vhulawa navho nga pfumo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Muṋe washu u ri: “Vhane vha tikedza Egipita vha ḓo fa; nungo dzine ḽa dzi ṱongisa dzi ḓo kulea; vhathu vha ḓo wiswa nga pfumo u bva Migidolo u swika Aswani, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel30:7 “Mashango avho a ḓo phusukanywa unga maṅwe mashango oṱhe o phusukanywaho; miḓi yavho i ḓo thuthekanywa unga miṅwe miḓi yoṱhe. 
Ezekiel30:8 Musi ndi tshi funga Egipita nga mulilo, vhatikedzi vhaḽo vhoṱhe vhó pwashea vha balangana, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel30:9 Musi wonoyo vhaḓinḓa vhe nda vha ruma vha ḓo ṱuwa nga magungwa vha yo tshenusa vhathu vha Kushu vhane vha vhona unga vho ṱoka midzi. Vha ḓo farwa nga nyofho musi vhathu vha Egipita vha tshi lifhedzwa – ḓuvha iḽo ḽi khou ḓa!” 
Ezekiel30:10 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo lozwa vhunzhi ha vhathu vha Egipita nga tshanḓa tsha Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ene na vhathu vhawe, vhone vha na tshiṱuhu tshi no fhira tsha tshakha dzoṱhe, vha ḓo ruṅwa vha ḓa vha phusukanya shango iḽo. Vha ḓo vhulaha vhathu vha Egipita, shango ḽa ḓala zwitumbu." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndi ḓo xisa milonga ya Nile, Egipita nda ḽi kumedza vhavhi, nda phusukanya shango ḽoṱhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo nga zwanḓa zwa vhatsinda. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo lozwa midzimu ya tshika nda fhelisa midzimu i si tshithu ya Memfisi. Shango ḽa Egipita ḽi ḓo sala ḽi si na muvhusi. Ndi ḓo dzhenisa nyofho shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndi ḓo phusukanya Phathirosi, nda fhisa Tsuani, nda lifhedza Thebese." 
Ezekiel30:15 Mbiti dzanga ndi ḓo dzi shululela Sini, ḽone dzhavhelo ḽo khwaṱhaho ḽa Egipita; ndi ḓo swiela vhathu vho tsitsikanaho vha Thebese." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndi ḓo fhisa Egipita nga mulilo; vha Sini vha ḓo tswukunyea nga u pfa vhuṱungu; mitsheṱo ya Thebese i ḓo vozhiwa, Memfisi wa govhelwa masiari tshivhangalala." 
Ezekiel30:17 Vhaṱhanngana vha Ono na Phibesethe vha ḓo vhulawa nga pfumo, miḓi yone ya thubiwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ngei Thaphanese ḓuvha ḽi ḓo swifhala masiari musi ndi tshi vunḓa dzhogo ya Egipita henefho, musi maanḓa ane vha a ṱongisa a tshi fhela. Shango ḽi ḓo tibwa nga gole, miḓi yaḽo ya thubiwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ndi dzone ṱhamu dzine nda ḓo rwa Egipita ngadzo. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuthihi ri vhuthubwa Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ndo vunḓa tshanḓa tsha Farao khosi ya Egipita; a hu na we a tshi lafha a tshi pomba kana a tshi tika uri tshanḓa tshi khwaṱhe tshi kone u dovha tsha fara pfumo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Zwino-ha, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Ndi lwa na Farao khosi ya Egipita; ndi ṱoḓa u vunḓa zwanḓa zwawe, tsho takalaho na tsho no vunḓeaho, pfumo ḽe a ḽi fara ḽi wele fhasi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Vhaegipita ndi ḓo vha balanganya na dzitshakha, nda vha thalanganya na mashango." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndi ḓo khwaṱhisa zwanḓa zwa khosi ya Babele, nda longa pfumo ḽanga tshanḓani tshawe. Ndi ḓo vunḓa zwanḓa zwa Farao, musi o imedzana na swina ḽawe, u ḓo gomela unga munna ane a khou fa ó rungwa nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndi ḓo khwaṱhisa zwanḓa zwa khosi ya Babele, zwanḓa zwa Farao zwone zwi ḓo kulea nungo. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, musi ndi tshi longa pfumo ḽanga zwanḓani zwa khosi ya Babele, a ḽi sumba shangoni ḽa Egipita." 
Ezekiel30:26 Vhathu vha Egipita ndi ḓo vha balanganya na dzitshakha, nda vha thalanganya na mashango; ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuthihi ri Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuraru, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza Farao khosi ya Egipita na vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe u ri, “ ‘Vhuhulu hau ndi ḓo vhu fanyisa na mini?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Vhukuma ndi ḓo u fanyisa na Ashuru, wo vha u mukedara wa Libanoni; matavhi awo a zwimvingimvingi o tibedza maṱaka, wa lapfa ṱhodzi yawo ya ṋanzwa makole." 
Ezekiel31:4 Maḓi o u alusa, zwisima zwa fhasi ha mavu zwo u lapfisa, zwi tshi shululela milambo yazwo u mona na he wa zwaliwa hone, zwa swikisa milambwana yazwo kha miri yoṱhe." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ndi zwe tsinde ḽawo ḽa lapfa u fhira miri yoṱhe; matavhi awo a anda, maḓadzwane awo a adza, nge wa wana maḓi manzhi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi tshi fhaṱa zwiṱaha matavhini awo; phukha dzoṱhe dza ḓaka dzo vha dzi tshi dzwala fhasi ha maḓadzwane awo; vhathu vha tshakha dzoṱhe vho vha vha tshi dzula murunzini wawo. 
Ezekiel31:7 Wo vha wo naka wo hula, u na maḓadzwane o adzaho; midzi yawo yo vha yo tsa fhasi ya swika maḓini manzhi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Ho vha hu si na mukedara u no eḓana nawo tsimuni ya Mudzimu; ho vha hu si na mupaini u re na matavhi a no nga awo; ho vha hu si na murovherovhe wa maḓadzwane a no nga awo; tsimuni yoṱhe ya Mudzimu ho vha hu si na muṅwe muri we wa vha u tshi fana nawo nga u naka. 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndo u ita uri u tamise nga matavhi manzhi o adzaho. Wo vha u tshi vhivhiwa nga miri yoṱhe ngei Edeni, tsimuni ya Mudzimu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel31:10 Zwino ndi zwone, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga wo lapfa wa vhina, ṱhodzi yawo ya ṋanzwa makole, wa ḓihudza nge wa lapfa," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndo u kumedza muvhusi wa dzitshakha, uri a u ite zwo teaho vhuvhi hawo. Ndo u laṱa" 
Ezekiel31:12 ha ḓa vhatsinda, vha re na tshiṱuhu tshi no fhira tsha tshakha dzoṱhe, vhone vha u rema wa wela fhasi. Matavhi awo o wela dzithavhani na magovhani oṱhe; milambwana yoṱhe shangoni ḽoṱhe ya ḓala maḓadzwane awo o vunḓekanaho; tshakha dzoṱhe dza shango dza bva murunzini wawo dza u sia wo lala henefho." 
Ezekiel31:13 Zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwa dzula kha tsinde ḽawo, vhukati ha matavhi awo ha vha vhudzulo ha phukha dza ḓaka." 
Ezekiel31:14 Hu songo tsha vha na muri une na u ṱavhiwa hawo tsini na maḓi wa lapfa wa ḓihudza wa ima nga woṱhe, ṱhodzi yawo ya ṋanzwa makole; naho wa sheledzwa zwavhuḓi a u nga ḓo vhuya wa lapfa wa ralo. Ndi uri yoṱhe i ḓo fa, ya dzhena fhasi mavuni, fhethu ha vhathu vho faho, vhe vha godimela dindini.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi une nda tupula mukedara nda u posa dindini, ndi ḓo ri zwisima zwa fhasi ha mavu zwi u lilele, nda thivha milambo yawo, maḓi manzhi a xa, ndi ḓo ambadza thavha ya Libanoni nguvho ntswu ya lila mufu, miri yoṱhe ya ḓaka ya puta nga u lilela mukedara." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndi ḓo ita uri tshakha dzi tetemele nga mutsindo wa u wa hawo, musi ndi tshi u posa fhasi dindini na vhe vha godimela tshaloni. Fhasi ha mavu miri yoṱhe ya Edeni yo dzika, miri yoṱhe mihuluhulu yo nakesaho ya Libanoni ye ya vha yo mela tsini na maḓi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Tshakha dzoṱhe dze dza vha dzi tshi ima nawo, dzi tshi dzula murunzini wawo dzi godimela nawo fhasi-fhasi dindini, hu re na vho vhulawaho nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Ndi ufhio wa miri ya Edeni une wa nga vhambedzwa na iwe nga vhugala na vhuhulu? Naho zwo ralo, na iwe u ḓo dzheniswa fhasi na miri ya Edeni, fhasi-fhasi ha mavu. U ḓo lala na mashuvhuru, hu re na vho vhulawaho nga pfumo vha si swiṱwe. Hoyo muri ndi Farao na vhalanda vhawe vhoṱhe. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuvhili ri Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi na vhuvhili, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vusa luimbo lwa tshililo lwa u lilela Farao khosi ya Egipita. Mu vhudze u ri, “ ‘U nga ndau vhukati ha dzitshakha, hone u ḓo thivhiwa mulomo. Wo vha u tshi nga ḽigweṋa maḓini; wo vha u tshi vhudzula maḓi nga ningo dzau, u tshi dzikusa maḓi nga milenzhe yau, milambwana yao ya vha thophe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:3 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri, “Ndi ḓo u rambela dzitshakha, nda posa mambule anga nṱha hau, vhathu vha u kokodzela nnḓa nga mambule anga." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndi ḓo u posa shangoni, nda u gegenedza fhasi; nda ita uri zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi kavhe nṱha hau, zwivhanda zwoṱhe zwa ḓaka zwi ḽe ṋama yau zwa fura." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ṋama yau ndi ḓo i balanganya dzithavhani, nda ḓadza magovha nga tshitumbu tshau." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndi ṱoḓa u sheledza shango nga malofha au, nda ṋukadza dzithavha nga malofha a no ela a tshi bva kha iwe, magovha a ḓala ngao." 
Ezekiel32:7 Musi ndi tshi dzima tshedza tshau ndi ḓo tiba lutombo, nda swifhadza ṋaledzi. Ndi ḓo tiba ḓuvha nga makole ṅwedzi wa si tsha vhonetshela." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ndi ḓo dzima zwiedza zwoṱhe zwa ṱaḓulu zwa u lilela, shango ḽau nda ḽi tiba nga swiswi, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel32:9 “ ‘Ndi ḓo dina tshakha nnzhi – na dzine u sa athu dzi pfa – musi dzi tshi pfa mafhungo a u wa hau. 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndi ḓo akhamadza tshakha nnzhi dzi tshi vhona zwo u welaho, mahosi avho vha ḓo pfa mavhudzi a tshi ima vha tshi vhona zwo u welaho musi ndi tshi dzungudza pfumo ḽanga maṱoni avho. Wonoyo musi wa u wa hau, muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo sokou dzula a tshi tetemela nga nyofho dza u ofha u fa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Pfumo ḽa khosi ya Babele ḽi khou ḓa u u dia." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndi ḓo ita uri magogo a vhalanda vhau a vhulawe nga pfumo ḽa vhahali, vha no fhira tshakha dzoṱhe nga tshiṱuhu. Vha ḓo pwashekanya vhugala ha Egipita, vhathu vhaḽo vhoṱhe vha ḓo lozwiwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndi ḓo lovhisa na kholomo dzaḽo khunzikhunzini dza maḓi mahulu. A hu na mulenzhe wa muthu kana wa phukha u no ḓo dovha wa a dzikusa. 
Ezekiel32:14 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo dzikisa maḓi a Egipita, nda ita uri milambo yaḽo i ele unga mapfura – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel32:15 Musi ndi tshi ḓo ita uri Egipita ḽi sale ḽi soga, nda ḽi dzhiela zwoṱhe zwine ḽa vha nazwo, nda lozwa vhoṱhe vha dzulaho henefho, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Holwo ndi lwone luimbo lwa tshililo lune vhananyana vha dzitshakha vha ḓo lu vusa. Vha ḓo lu imbela Egipita na mavhuthu aḽo. Ndi tshone tshililo tshine vha ḓo tshi vusa – hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.” 
Ezekiel32:17 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuvhili ri Babele, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi na vhuṱanu ḽa ṅwedzi wa u thoma, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vusa luimbo lwa tshililo u imbele mavhuthu a Egipita. “Vha godimisele fhasi, khathihi na dziṅwe tshakha dza maanḓa, vha godimele fhasi-fhasi mavuni, vha ṱuwe na vha no godimela dindini." 
Ezekiel32:19 Nṋa u vhona unga wo naka u fhira dziṅwe tshakha? Tsela fhasi u yo ladzwa na mashuvhuru. 
Ezekiel32:20 Vhathu vhau vha ḓo ya huthihi na vho vhulawaho nga pfumo; shango nga ḽi kumedzwe pfumo, nga ḽi khwikhwidzelwe kule na mavhuthu aḽo." 
Ezekiel32:21 Henefho tshaloni vhahali vha maanḓa vha ḓo amba na Egipita na vhane vha ima naḽo vha ri, ‘Vho tsela ngeno fhasi, vho eḓela na mashuvhuru vhe vha fa nga pfumo vha si swiṱwe.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Ashuru ḽi henefho na mmbi dzaḽo dzoṱhe, zwalo zwavho zwo ḽi tanga, vhoṱhe vho vhulawaho, vhoṱhe vho ḽiwaho nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel32:23 Zwalo zwavho zwi fhasi-fhasi ha dindi, mmbi yaḽo yo lala u mona na tshalo tshaḽo, vhoṱhe vho vhulawaho, vhoṱhe vho ḽiwaho nga pfumo, naho ḽo vhuya ḽa ofhisa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa vha tshilaho." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu ḽi henefho; mmbi dzaḽo dzoṱhe dzo tanga tshalo tshaḽo; vhoṱhe vho vhulawaho, vhoṱhe vho ḽiwaho nga pfumo, vho dzhena mavuni vhe mashuvhuru, naho vho vhuya vha ofhisa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa vha tshilaho. Vha vho konḓelela ṱhoni dza vhe vha godimela tshaloni." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ḽo adzelwa vhulalo vhukati ha vho vhulawaho, mmbi dzaḽo dzoṱhe dzo tanga tshalo tshaḽo; vhoṱhe a vho ngo fumba, vho vhulawa nga pfumo, naho ḽo vhuya ḽa ofhisa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa vha tshilaho. Vha vho konḓelela ṱhoni dza vhe vha godimela tshaloni. Vho poswa vhukati ha vho vhulawaho nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Meshekhe na Thubala ḽi henefho, na mmbi dzaḽo dzoṱhe dzó tanga tshalo tshaḽo; vhoṱhe a vho ngo fumba, vho vhulawa nga pfumo nge vha ofhisa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa vha tshilaho." 
Ezekiel32:27 A vha eḓeli na vhahali vho faho kale, vhe vha dzhena tshaloni vho ḓiṱama nga zwihali, vhe vha siamela mafumo avho, zwiṱangu zwavho zwa tiba marambo avho, ngauri vhahali vhavho vho dzhenisa nyofho shangoni ḽa vha tshilaho." 
Ezekiel32:28 Iwe Egipita tshau u ḓo lovha na mashuvhuru, wa lala na vhe vha rambaladzwa nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edomo ḽi henefho, na mahosi aḽo na vhavhusi vhaḽo; naho vho vha vhe na maanḓa, vho swiṱwa na vhe vha rambaladzwa nga pfumo. Vho eḓela na mashuvhuru, vhe vha godimela dindini." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Vhavhusi vhoṱhe vha Devhula na Vhasidoni vha henefho, vho dzhena tshaloni na vho vhulawaho nga pfumo, naho maanḓa avho o ḓisa nyofho. Zwino vho shona, vho fa vha songo fumba, vha eḓela na vho vhulawaho nga pfumo. Vha konḓelela ṱhoni dza vhe vha godimela dindini." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Farao u ḓo vha vhona a rudza mbilu a tshi vhona mara eneo e a vhulawa nga pfumo, ene Farao na mmbi yawe yoṱhe – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel32:32 Uḽa we a dzhenisa nyofho shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa vha tshilaho zwino o eḓela na vha songo fumbaho, vhe vha vhulawa nga pfumo, ene Farao na mmbi yawe yoṱhe. Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, amba na vha lushaka lwa hau. Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Misi ndi tshi ḓisa pfumo shangoni, vhathu vha shango ḽeneḽo vha nanga muṅwe wavho vha mu ita mulindi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Arali a tshi vhona swina ḽi tshi ḓa u dia shango, tshawe ndi u lidza phalaphala u karusa vhathu." 
Ezekiel33:4 Zwino arali muṅwe a ri u pfa phalaphala i tshi lila a si zwi londe, u ḓo wanwa nga pfumo ḽa mu lozwa; u fa hawe u ḓo vha u mulandu wawe." 
Ezekiel33:5 O pfa phalaphala i tshi lila a si zwi londe; u fa hawe u ḓo vha u mulandu wawe. Ane a ri u pfa phalaphala a zwi dzhiela nzhele u ḓo tshila. 
Ezekiel33:6 “ ‘Hone arali mulindi a ri u vhona swina ḽi tshi ḓa u dia shango a si lidze phalaphala yawe, vhathu vha si karuswe, swina ḽa vha wana ḽa vhulaha muṅwe wavho, uyo muthu vhukuma u ḓo fela vhutshinyi hawe, hone mulandu wa lufu lwa uyo muthu Nṋe ndi ḓo u hwesa mulindi.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, nṋe ndo u vhea uri u vhe mulindi wa vhathu vha Israele. Musi u tshi pfa ipfi ḽi bvaho mulomoni wanga, vha karuse nga dzina ḽanga." 
Ezekiel33:8 Arali nda vhudza muvhi nda ri, ‘Iwe muvhi, vhukuma u ḓo fa,’ iwe wa si ambe wa kaidza uyo muvhi uri a laṱe nḓila dzawe, onoyo u ḓo fela vhutshinyi hawe, hone mulandu wa lufu lwawe ndi ḓo hwesa iwe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Hone arali wa kaidza muvhi uri a late nḓila dzawe a rembuluwe, ene a si rembuluwe, zwenezwo u ḓo fela vhutshinyi hawe, hone iwe wa tshila." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza vhathu vha Israele u ri, ‘Ni ḓi ri: Vhuvhi hashu na vhutshinyi hashu zwi a ri lemela; zwi khou ri ṱahadza. Ri kha ḓi ḓo tshila hani?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – ndi ri, a thi takaleli lufu lwa muvhi, ndi takalela muvhi a tshi laṱa vhuvhi hawe uri a tshidzwe. Vhuyani, vhuyani ni laṱe vhuvhi haṋu! Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ndi mini ni tshi funa u fa?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Zwino iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza vha lushaka lwa hau u ri, ‘U fulufhedzea ha muvhuya hu nga si mu tshidze arali a dovha a ntshandukela; vhuvhi ha muvhi vhu nga si tsha ita uri a laṱwe arali a laṱa vhuvhi hawe, na muvhuya a nga si tshile nga u fulufhedzea hawe arali o sala a tshi tshinya." 
Ezekiel33:13 Arali nda vhudza a fulufhedzeaho nda ri: Vhukuma u ḓo tshila, zwino ene nga u fulufhela u fulufhedzea hawe, a pambutshela vhuvhini, a thi tsha ḓo elelwa u fulufhedzea hawe hoṱhe; u ḓo fela vhuvhi hawe." 
Ezekiel33:14 Huno arali nda vhudza muvhi nda ri: U ḓo fa, ene a laṱa vhutshinyi hawe, a ita zwi re zwone na zwivhuya," 
Ezekiel33:15 arali a humisa thundu ya muṅwe ye a i farela mulandu we onoyo a ḽa, a vhuedzedza tshe a tswa, a vhulunga milayo ine ya ṋea muthu vhutshilo, a si tsha ita vhuvhi, vhukuma ha nga fi, u ḓo tshila." 
Ezekiel33:16 Vhuvhi hawe hoṱhe ha kale a thi tsha ḓo vhu elelwa – o ita zwine zwa vha zwone na zwivhuya; vhukuma u ḓo tshila.’ 
Ezekiel33:17 “Vhathu vha lushaka lwa hau vha a hanedza vha ri, ‘Zwine Yahavee a ita a si zwone,’ hu uri zwi si zwone ndi zwine vhone vha ita." 
Ezekiel33:18 Arali muvhuya a tshi furalela u fulufhedzea hawe, a ita vhuvhi, u fela hone." 
Ezekiel33:19 Huno arali muvhi a tshi laṱa vhuvhi hawe a tevhedza mulayo, a ita zwivhuya, u ḓo tshila nge a ita nga u ralo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ni a hanedza na ri, ‘Zwine Yahavee a ita a si zwone.’ Inwi vhathu vha Israele, Nṋe ndi ḓo haṱula muṅwe na muṅwe ndi tshi tevhedza zwine a ita.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Nga ṅwaha wa fumi na vhuvhili ri vhuthubwani, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu ḽa ṅwedzi wa fumi, ha swika tshavhi i tshi bva Jerusalema ya ri vhudza ya ri, “Muḓi wo dzhenwa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Zwino nga madekwana a musi iyo tshavhi i tshi ḓo vuwa i tshi swika, ndo vha ndo pfa ndi tshi tsikeledzwa nga tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu; o no ḓi mmvula mulomo iyo tshavhi i sa athu swika ha nṋe nga matsheloni a nga ḽa matshelo; mulomo wanga wo vha wo vulwa, ndi si tshee tshimuma." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhathu vha no khou dzula matumbani shangoni ḽa Israele vha ri, ‘Abrahamu o vha e eṱhe musi a tshi ṋewa shango heḽi uri ḽi vhe ḽawe. Zwino riṋe hufha ri vhanzhi, shango heḽi ḽo ṋewa riṋe uri ḽi vhe ḽashu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Ndi zwone, vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ni ḽa ṋama i tshi kha ḓi vha na malofha, ni luvha midzimu ya tshika, ni shulula malofha a vhathu; zwino ni vhona unga shango ḽi nga vha ḽaṋu naa?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Ni fulufhela mafumo aṋu, ni ita zwi nengisaho, muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu u ita vhupombwe na musadzi wa muṅwe; ni vhona unga shango ḽi nga vha ḽaṋu naa?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 Vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Nga vhutshilo hanga ndi ri, vha re matumbani vha ḓo vhulawa nga pfumo, vha re shangoni ndi ḓo vha kumedza zwivhanda uri zwi vha ḽe, vha re vhushavheloni na mapakoni vha ḓo fa nga dwadze." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndi ṱoḓa uri shango heḽo ndi ḽi ite phanga ḽi sale ḽi si na muthu, nahone a ḽi tsha ḓo ṱongisa maanḓa aḽo. Thavha dza Israele dzi ḓo sala dzi si na vhathu nahone a hu na a no ḓo dovha a fhira henefho." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi shango ndi tshi ḽi ita soga ḽa sala ḽi si na muthu, nga mulandu wa zwoṱhe zwi nengisaho zwine vha ita.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhathu vha lushaka lwa hau vha khou amba iwe vho ima nnḓa ha nnḓu dzavho na miṋangoni ya dzinnḓu. Vha endela u ri, ‘Iḓani ri pfe ipfi ḽi no bva kha Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Vha a u kuvhanganela; vhathu vhanga vha dzula fhasi phanḓa hau, vha thetshelesa maipfi au, hone a vha tevhedzi zwine wa amba. Vha amba zwa vhuhwavho, hone mbilu dzavho vho dzi vhea kha zwa u pfuma nga vhufhura." 
Ezekiel33:32 Vhone vha vhona iwe u tshi nga muthu ane a imba luimbo lwa lufuno nga ipfi ḽa u naka a tshi lidza haripa zwavhuḓi. Vha pfa maipfi au, hone a hu na ane a tevhedza zwine wa amba." 
Ezekiel33:33 Musi zwe wa amba zwi tshi bvelela – huno zwino ndi hone zwi tshi thoma – ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ho vha hu na muporofita vhukati havho.” 
Ezekiel34:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u tshi haṱula vhalisa vha Israele; porofita u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Inwi vhalisa, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Khombo i ḓo wela vhalisa vha Israele vhane vha ḓifusha vhone vhaṋe! Tsha mulisa a si u lisa sambi ḽawe ḽa dzinngu naa?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Hone inwi no ḓifusha nga mafhi, na ḓiitela zwiambaro nga vhukuse hadzo, na ṱhavha dzo nonesaho, hone na kundwa u lisa sambi ḽa nngu." 
Ezekiel34:4 A no ngo farisa dzi si na nungo, kana u lafha dzi lwalaho, kana u pomba mbonzhe dza dzo huvhalaho. A no ngo humisa dzo pambuwaho, kana u ṱoḓa dzo xelaho. Tshaṋu ho vha u dzi vhusa nga tshiṱuhu ni tshi dzi huvhadza." 
Ezekiel34:5 Dzo balangana nge dza kundwa mulisa, dza pondwa nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka; dzo balangana dza zwika kule." 
Ezekiel34:6 Sambi ḽa nngu dzanga ḽo sokou tendeleka na dzithavha na mivhundu; sambi ḽanga ḽa nngu ḽo balangana na shango ḽoṱhe; a hu na ane a dzi londa, a hu na ane a yo dzi ṱoḓa." 
Ezekiel34:7 Zwino ndi zwone, inwi vhalisa, ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee!" 
Ezekiel34:8 Nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – ndi ri vhunga sambi ḽa nngu dzanga ḽo fhaḓiwa nge dza kundwa mulisa zwino dzi khou ḽiwa nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka, vhunga vhalisa vhanga vha si tsha londa sambi ḽa nngu dzanga, vha tshi vho ḓifusha vha si tsha fusha sambi ḽa nngu dzanga, –" 
Ezekiel34:9 zwenezwo inwi vhalisa ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee. 
Ezekiel34:10 Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Ndi ḓo sengisa vhalisa. Ndi ḓo vha dzhiela sambi ḽa nngu dzanga, a thi tsha ḓo vha tendela vha tshi lisa sambi ḽa nngu dzanga. Ngauralo vhalisa a vha tsha ḓo ḓifusha. Ndi ḓo ponyokisa nngu dzanga milomoni yavho; a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha dzi ḽa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel34:11 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo lisa sambi ḽa nngu dzanga Nṋe muṋe, nda dzula ndi tshi dzi londola." 
Ezekiel34:12 Ndi ḓo londola nngu dzanga unga mulisa a tshi londola nngu dzawe dzo balanganaho musi e nadzo. Ndi ḓo dzi lamukisa hoṱhe he dza balanganela hone musi wa khuli na swiswi. 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndi ḓo dzi pfulusa mashangoni ane dza vha khao; ndi ḓo dzi kuvhanganya mashangoni asili nda dzi humisela shangoni ḽa hadzo. Ndi ḓo dzi lisa thavhani dza Israele, milambwanani na hoṱhe hune ha dzula vhathu shangoni." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndi ḓo dzi lisa pfuloni yavhuḓi; dzi ḓo fula miṱumbani ya thavha dza Israele. Dzi ḓo awela pfuloni yavhuḓi; dzi ḓo fula pfuloni ya manona thavhani dza Israele. 
Ezekiel34:15 Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo lisa nngu dzanga, Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo dzi isa hune dza awela hone – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndi ḓo ṱoḓa dzo xelaho, dzo pambuwaho nda dzi humisa, nda pomba dzi re na mbonzhe, nda lafha dzi lwalaho. Dzo nonaho dzone na dzo khwaṱhaho ndi ḓo dzi lozwa. Ndi ḓo dzi lisa nga pfanelo." 
Ezekiel34:17 “A vha inwi, nngu dzanga,” Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “ndi ḓo haṱula nngu na nngu, nda fhandekanya mmbi na mbuya, nda haṱula thutha na mbokoṱo nda dzi khethekanya." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ni tshi fula pfuloni yavhuḓi ni pfa ni songo rudza mbilu naa? Zwino no vha no fanela u dovha na kandekanya pfulo ya dziṅwe naa? Ni tshi nwa maḓi avhuḓi no pfa ni songo rudza mbilu naa? 
Ezekiel34:19 Zwino no vha no fanela u dovha na dzikusa a dziṅwe nga khwanḓa dzaṋu naa?” 
Ezekiel34:20 Zwino ndi zwone, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo ṱuwa ndi tshi haṱula nngu dzo nonaho na dzo ondaho nda dzi khethekanya." 
Ezekiel34:21 No khurumedza nngu dzoṱhe dzi si na nungo nga lurumbu na mahaḓa, na dzi runga nga maṋanga na vhuya na dzi thathela kule." 
Ezekiel34:22 Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo ḓa nda lamulela nngu dzanga dza si tsha fhuriwa; ndi ḓo haṱula nngu na nngu nda dzi khethekanya." 
Ezekiel34:23 “Ndi ḓo vhea mulisa muthihi, ene mulanda wanga Dafita, nda mu vhea uri a dzi lise, u ḓo dzi fulisa a vha mulisa wadzo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wavho, mulanda wanga Dafita a vha muvhusi wavho. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndi ḓo vhofha navho mulanga wa mulalo; ndi ḓo fhedza zwivhanda zwa ḓaka shangoni. Vha ḓo dzula sogani vha sa ofhi tshithu, vha yo eḓela ḓakani." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndi ḓo vha dzudza muvhunduni wanga vha u tanga; ndi ḓo nisa mvula nga tshifhinga tshayo; i ḓo vha mvula i ḓisaho nḓalo. 
Ezekiel34:27 Miri ya shangoni i ḓo aṋwa mitshelo yayo, shango ḽa bveledza zwimela zwaḽo; vha ḓo dzula shangoni ḽa havho vho rudza mbilu, ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee musi ndi tshi ṱhukhula nnzwa dza dzhogo dzavho, nda vha vhofholola kha vho vha thubaho." 
Ezekiel34:28 A vha tsha ḓo thubiwa nga tshakha dzisili, a vha tsha ḓo ḽiwa nga zwivhanda. Vha ḓo tshila vho rudza mbilu, hu si na ane a ḓo dovha a vha ofhisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndi ḓo vha medzela zwiliṅwa zwivhuya shango ḽavho ḽa tou vha na bvumo ngazwo; a hu tsha ḓo wa nḓala shangoni; a vha tsha ḓo nyadziwa nga dziṅwe tshakha. 
Ezekiel34:30 Vhathu vha ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, ndi navho, na uri Israele ndi vhathu vhanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel34:31 Huno inwi nngu dzanga, ni sambi ḽine nda ḓo ḽi lisa, ndi Mudzimu waṋu – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee!”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, livhana na thavha ya Seiri, u porofite u tshi i haṱula." 
Ezekiel35:3 I vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: “ ‘Zwino ndi lwa na iwe thavha ya Seiri, ndi khou angaladza tshanḓa tshanga uri ndi u rwe; ndi ḓo ita uri u sale u soga u si na vhathu." 
Ezekiel35:4 Miḓi yau i ḓo sala i matumba, u ḓo sala u si na vhathu, ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel35:5 “ ‘Wo ḓi vha na vengo u bva kale, wo fheṱa Vhaisraele wa vha vhulahisa nga pfumo musi vhe khomboni, musi wa ṱhamu yavho ya u fhedzisa vha tshi rwelwa vhuvhi havho." 
Ezekiel35:6 Ndi zwone, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – wo livhana na bulayo, vhupondi hau vhu ḓo u ḽa ṱhoho. Hezwo ndi a zwi anela: wo takalela u shulula malofha, zwino hu ḓo fhaladzwa au malofha." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndi ḓo ita uri thavha ya Seiri i sale i soga ḽi si na muthu, ndi ḓo fhedza vhoṱhe vhane vha kha ḓi tendeleka henefho shangoni." 
Ezekiel35:8 Thavha dzaḽo ndi ḓo dzi ḓadza zwitumbu; vhathu vha ḓo rambalala vho vhulawa nga pfumo mivhunduni yau na magovhani au na milambwanani yau yoṱhe. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndi ḓo ita uri u sale u si na muthu, miḓi yau i ḓo dzula i si na muthu u ya ho ya; ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel35:10 “ ‘Vhunga wo amba tshakha mbili na mashango mavhili, Edomo na Israele, wa ri: Ndi vhanga; ri ḓo dzhia hafha he ha vha hu na Yahavee –"
