Ezekiel35:11 ndi zwone, nga vhutshilo hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri, ndi ḓo u ita zwenezwiḽa zwe iwe wa ita Israele nga mbiti na nga vivho na nga u vha vhenga. Ndi hone u tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe nnyi musi ndi tshi u rwela zwenezwo." 
Ezekiel35:12 Zwino u ḓo ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndo pfa zwoṱhe zwa lunyadzo zwe wa zwi amba nga thavha dza Israele, u tshi ri: Dzo ṱutshelwa, dzo sielwa riṋe uri ri dzi ḽe." 
Ezekiel35:13 Na Nṋe wo nnyamba u tshi nṱongela, wa ntsatsaladza wa dovha, ndo u pfa!’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:14 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ita uri u sale u phanga, ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽa pembela." 
Ezekiel35:15 Vhunga iwe wo pembela zwiḽa shango ḽa vhathu vha Israele ḽo sala ḽi soga, na iwe ndi ḓo u ita zwenezwo, iwe thavha ya Seiri; u ḓo sala u soga, na ḽoṱhe ḽa Edomo ḽi ḓo sala ḽi phanga; ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel36:1 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ḓivhadza thavha dza Israele hezwi. Amba u ri, ‘Inwi thavha dza Israele, ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee." 
Ezekiel36:2 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Vhunga maswina aṋu o takala a ri: Ahaa! Miṱumba ya dzithavha dza kale na kale zwino yo no vha shango ḽashu,’" 
Ezekiel36:3 iwe porofita! Amba u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Vhunga mashango oṱhe o ni lalela, a takalela ni tshi welwa nga khombo, na dzhiwa nga tsalela dza dziṅwe tshakha, na ṱwa ni tshi ambiwa ni tshi sasaladzwa," 
Ezekiel36:4 zwino inwi thavha dza Israele ipfani ipfi ḽa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee: Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u amba na dzithavha na zwivhanga, milambwana na magovha, matumba o ṱutshelwaho na miḓi yo phusukanywaho i si na muthu ine ya sewa nga tshakha dzoṱhe dzo i tangaho." 
Ezekiel36:5 Ee, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi khou amba ndo sinyuwa tshoṱhe, ndi khou amba na tshakha dzoṱhe na vhoṱhe vha ḽa Edomo vhe vha dzhia shango ḽanga vha tshi pembela nga lunyadzo luhulu, vha thatha vhathu shango ḽa vha ḽavho.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 Zwino-ha, iwe porofita hezwi nga shango ḽa Israele. Vhudza dzithavha na mivhundu na milambwana na magovha u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi khou amba ndo sinyuwa ndi na mbiti ndi tshi vhona uri tshakha dzi ni nyadza hani." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ndi zwone, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: ndi ana ndo imisa tshanḓa tshanga ndi ri tshakha dzo ni tangaho na dzone dzi ḓo nyadziwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 Inwi dzithavha dza Israele, melani miri i aṋwe mitshelo i no ḓo ḽiwa nga vhathu vhanga vha Israele, ngauri hu si kale vha ḓo vhuya." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ee, ndi khou ḓa ha inwi, ndi ḓo ni vhavhalela; ni ḓo dovha na liṅwa na zwalwa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndi ḓo andisa vhathu vhane vha dzula kha inwi, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele, ee, vhoṱhe. Miḓi i ḓo dovha ya dzula vhathu, matumba a vuswa." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndi ḓo andisa vhathu vhane vha dzula kha inwi na zwifuwo zwine zwa dzula kha inwi; vhathu vha ḓo beba vha vha vhanzhi, na zwifuwo zwa dzwala zwa vha zwinzhi. Ndi ḓo dzudza vhathu kha inwi zwa nga zwiḽa kale; zwi ḓo ni nakela u fhira zwiḽa kale, ndi hone na inwi dzithavha ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndi ḓo ḓisa vhathu vha dovha vha kanda mavu aṋu, ndi vhathu vhanga vha Israele; vha ḓo hu dzhia na vha shango ḽavho, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na vha vhulahela vhana vhavho.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:13 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhunga vhathu vho ni vhudza vha ri, ‘Ni madyavhathu, no vhulahela lushaka lwaṋu vhana vhalwo,’" 
Ezekiel36:14 ndi zwone, a ni tsha ḓo ḽa vhathu, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na vhulahela lushaka lwaṋu vhana vhalwo – hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel36:15 A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda tenda ni tshi kolelwa nga dzitshakha, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na nyadziswa nga vhatsinda, a ni tsha ḓo dovha na vhulahela lushaka vhana vhalwo – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhathu vha Israele vho vha vha tshi dzula shangoni ḽavho, hone vho ḽi shata tshika nga kutshilele kwavho na maitele avho; Nṋe ndo vha ndi tshi vhona kutshilele kwavho ku kwa tshika ku tshi nga maṱambo a musadzi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ndi zwe nda shululela mbiti dzanga khavho nga mulandu wa malofha e vha a shulula shangoni ḽavho na nga midzimu yavho ya tshika ye vha ḽi shata tshika ngayo. 
Ezekiel36:19 Ndo vha balanganya na dzitshakha, nda vha thalanganya mashangoni asili; ndo vha rwa nga ṱhamu yo teaho kutshilele kwavho na maitele avho." 
Ezekiel36:20 Zwino dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa vho ḽi shata tshika vhukati ha tshakha dze vha ya khadzo, vhathu vha tshi vha amba vha tshi ri, ‘Havha ndi vhathu vha Yahavee, vho thathwa shangoni ḽawe.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Hone zwa dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa zwo vha zwi tshi nndina, dzina ḽanga ḽe vhathu vha Israele vha ḽi shata tshika vhukati ha dzitshakha he vha ya hone." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Zwino-ha, vhudza vhathu vha Israele u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ndi tshi ita hezwi a thi iteli inwi, ndi itela dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa, ngauri no ḽi shata tshika vhukati ha dzitshakha dze na ya khadzo." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndi ṱoḓa u sumbedza vhukhethwa ha dzina ḽanga ḽihulu ḽe ḽa shatwa tshika vhukati ha dzitshakha ḽe na ḽi shata tshika vhukati havho. Ndi hone dzitshakha dzi tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – musi ndi tshi sumbedza vhukhethwa hanga nga inwi, tshakha dzi tshi zwi vhona." 
Ezekiel36:24 Zwenezwo ndi ḓo ni bvisa vhukati ha dzitshakha nda ni kuvhanganya noṱhe ni tshi bva mashangoni oṱhe asili, nda ni ḓisa hayani shangoni ḽa haṋu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndi ḓo ni handulula nga maḓi o kunaho nda ni ṱanzwa tshika, ndi ḓo ni ṱanzwa tshika dzaṋu dzoṱhe dze na ḓishata nga midzimu yaṋu yoṱhe ya tshika." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndi ḓo ni ṋea mbilu ntswa, nda dzhenisa muya muswa ngomu haṋu; ndi ḓo bvisa mbilu ya tombo muvhilini waṋu, nda ni ṋea mbilu ya ṋama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndi ḓo dzhenisa Muya wanga ngomu haṋu, nda ita uri ni vhulunge milayo yanga, na hulisa ndayo dzanga na dzi tevhedza." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ni ḓo dzula shangoni ḽe nda ḽi ṋea vhokhotsi aṋu. Inwi ni ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu waṋu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndi ḓo ni ṋula tshikani dzaṋu dzoṱhe. Ndi ḓo vhidza mavhele a vha manzhi, nda si tsha ni ḓisela nḓala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndi ḓo ita uri miri yaṋu i ni aṋwele mitshelo minzhi, masimuni ni wane khaṋo khulu, uri ni si tsha welwa nga nḓala vhukati ha dzitshakha na shona." 
Ezekiel36:31 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo elelwa kutshilele kwaṋu kuvhi na maitele aṋu mavhi. Ni ḓo ḓinengwa ni tshi elelwa vhuvhi haṋu na maitele aṋu a nengisaho. 
Ezekiel36:32 Ndi ṱoḓa ni tshi zwi ḓivha uri ndi tshi ita nga u rali a thi iteli inwi – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Inwi vhathu vha Israele, a ni shoni naa? A ni soli kutshilele kwaṋu?’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:33 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi une nda ni ṱanzwa vhutshinyi haṋu hoṱhe, ndi ḓo dovha nda dzudza vhathu muḓini, nda ita uri matumba a dovhe a vuswe." 
Ezekiel36:34 Shango ḽa soga, ḽe vhafhiri vha gondo vhoṱhe vha vhuya vha vhona ḽi sa dzuli muthu, zwino ḽi ḓo dovha ḽa liṅwa." 
Ezekiel36:35 Muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo ri: Shango heḽi a si kale ḽi tshee soga, zwino ḽi vho nga tsimu ya Edeni; miḓi ye ya vhuya ya ṱutshelwa ya sala i matumba, ya phusukanywa, zwino yo no vha vhushavhelo, i vho dzula vhathu." 
Ezekiel36:36 Ndi hone tshakha dzo salaho dzo ṋekanaho masakha na inwi dzi tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Nṋe Yahavee ndo dovha nda vusa zwe zwa vha zwo phusukanywa, nda dovha nda ṱavha zwe zwa vha zwo tupulwa. Ho amba Nṋe Yahavee, ndi ḓo zwi ita.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo ṱuṱuwedza vhathu vha Israele uri vha nṱoḓe uri ndi dovhe ndi vha tonde, ndi ḓo vha andisa unga masambi a nngu," 
Ezekiel36:38 vha nga sambi ḽa nngu dza tshiṱhavhelo, vha nga sambi ḽa nngu Jerusalema musi wa vhuṱambo ho vhetshelwaho maḓuvha aho. Miḓi yaṋu yo phusukanywaho i ḓo ḓala vhathu vha anda unga masambi a nngu. Ndi hone vhathu vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Ndo pfa tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu tshi tshi khou ntsikeledza, a nkhwala a ṱuwa na nṋe nga Muya wa Muṋe washu, a mmbea fhasi vhukati ha govha; ḽo vha ḽo ḓala marambo." 
Ezekiel37:2 A ntshimbidza ndi tshi ya nṱha na fhasi vhukati hao. Marambo ayo o vha o ḓala na govha; o vha o oma o tou kwatsha. 
Ezekiel37:3 A mmbudzisa a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, aya marambo a nga tshila naa?” Nṋe nda ri, “Hu ḓivha Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Ene a ri, “Porofita u tshi amba na marambo haya, u a vhudze u ri, ‘Inwi marambo o omaho, ipfani ipfi ḽa Yahavee." 
Ezekiel37:5 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee a tshi vhudza marambo aya u ri: Zwino ndi ḓo longa mufemo ngomu haṋu na tshila. 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndi ḓo longa misipha kha inwi, nda medza ṋama kha inwi, nda ni ambadza lukanda, nda ni ṋea mufemo na tshila, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Nṋe nda mbo porofita nga he nda vhudzwa. Musi ndi tshi khou porofita ha pfala phosho, mubvumo wa zwithu zwi tshi kuḓana, aḽa marambo a mbo ḓi ṱumekana." 
Ezekiel37:8 Nda sedza, nda vhona o tibedzwa nga misipha, ha mela ṋama khao, a ambara lukanda, hone o vha a si na mufemo ngomu hao." 
Ezekiel37:9 Mudzimu a amba na nṋe a ri, “Amba na muya wa vhutshilo, iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita! Vhudza muya u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Iwe muya, iḓa u tshi bva kha mimuya ya khuḓa nṋa, vhudzulela kha vhafu havha vha tshile!’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Nṋe nda porofita nga he nda vhudzwa, muya wa dzhena khao; vha dovha vha tshila, vha takuwa vha ima nga milenzhe yavho, ya vha mmbi khulu-khulu." 
Ezekiel37:11 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, haya marambo ndi vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele. Vha ḓi ṱolou ri, ‘Marambo ashu o oma o tou kwatsha, a ri tshee na tshe ra fulufhela, zwi ḓi fana na musi ro fa.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Zwenezwo porofita u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Zwino ndi ḓo vula zwalo zwaṋu, inwi vhathu vhanga, nda ni tshimbidza na humela mavuni a Israele." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, musi ndi tshi vula zwalo zwaṋu, nda ni vusa na bva zwaloni zwaṋu, inwi vhathu vhanga." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndi ḓo longa Muya wanga ngomu haṋu na tshila, nda ni dzudza shangoni ḽa haṋu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. Hezwi ndo zwi amba, ndi ḓo zwi ita – hu amba Nṋe Yahavee.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, dzhia lubaḓa u ṅwale khalwo u ri, ‘Juda na havhaḽa Vhaisraele vhane vha ima nae.’ Dovha u dzhie luṅwe lubaḓa u ṅwale khalwo u ri, ‘Josefa, ene Efraimi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele vhane vha ima nae.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Ṱumekanya vhutanda uho vhu nge tshipiḓa tshithihi tsha thanda, lu nge lubaḓa luthihi lwe wa lu fara nga tshanḓa." 
Ezekiel37:18 Musi vha lushaka lwa hau vha tshi ri, ‘Ri vhudze zwine wa amba zwone,’" 
Ezekiel37:19 iwe u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi khou dzhia lubaḓa lwa Josefa, lune zwino lwa vha tshanḓani tsha Efraimi, na vha matsinde haaḽa a Israele vhane vha ima nae, ndi ḓo vhea lubaḓa lwa Juda navho. Mbaḓa idzo mbili ndi ḓo dzi ita lubaḓa luthihi, nda dzi fara dza vha lubaḓa luthihi tshanḓani tshanga.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 Idzo mbaḓa mbili dze wa dzi ṅwala dzi fare nga tshanḓa uri vha kone u dzi vhona," 
Ezekiel37:21 u vha vhudze u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓo dzhia Vhaisraele nda vha bvisa kha dzitshakha dze vha ya khadzo. Ndi ḓo vha kuvhanganya vha tshi bva hoṱhe-hoṱhe, nda vha vhuisa hayani mavuni avho." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndi ḓo vha ita lushaka luthihi shangoni, thavhani dza Israele, vhoṱhe vha vha na khosi nthihi, a vha tsha ḓo vha tshakha mbili, a vha tsha ḓo fhambana vha vha na mivhuso mivhili," 
Ezekiel37:23 a vha tsha ḓo ḓishata tshika nga midzimu yavho ya tshika na zwiito zwavho zwi nengisaho na zwivhi zwavho zwoṱhe. Ndi ḓo vha lamukisa kha vhutshinyi havho hoṱhe he vha ntshandukela ngaho. Ndi ḓo vha ṱanzwa tshika; vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho." 
Ezekiel37:24 Mulanda wanga Dafita u ḓo vha vhusa, u ḓo vha mulisa wavho vhoṱhe; vha ḓo tevhedza ndayo dzanga, vha vhulunga milayo yanga vha i pfa." 
Ezekiel37:25 Vha ḓo dzula shangoni ḽe nda ḽi ṋea mukoma wanga Jakopo, shango ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi dzula vhokhotsi aṋu. Vha ḓo dzula khaḽo lini na lini, vhone na vhana vhavho na vhana vha vhana vhavho. Dafita mukoma wanga u ḓo vha muvhusi wavho lini na lini." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndi ḓo vhofha mulanga wa mulalo navho, u ḓo vha mulanga wa lini na lini. Ndi ḓo dovha nda vha dzudzanya, nda vha andisa; ndi ḓo vhea nnḓu yanga khethwa vhukati havho ya ima lini na lini." 
Ezekiel37:27 Vhudzulo hanga vhu ḓo vha henefho khavho; ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wavho, vhone vha vha vhathu vhanga." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ndi hone tshakha dzi tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee we nda ḓikhethela Israele, musi nnḓu yanga khethwa i navho lini na lini.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽo amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, livhana na Gogo wa shango ḽa Magogo, ene muvhusi muhulu wa Meshekhe na Thubala, u porofite u tshi amba ene" 
Ezekiel38:3 u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Ndi lwa na iwe Gogo muvhusi wa Roshi na Meshekhe na Thubala." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ndi ḓo u humisa ndó longa zwilazwulo ṱhahani dzau, nda u khwikhwidza na mmbi dzau na bere dzoṱhe na vhanameli vhadzo vho ḓiṱamaho zwavhuḓi na mmbi yoṱhe heyo khulu yo hwalaho zwiṱangu na zwipileli na mafumo." 
Ezekiel38:5 Vha Pheresia na vha Kushu na Phuthi vha navho, vhoṱhe vha na zwipileli na nguwane." 
Ezekiel38:6 Vha Gomere na mmbi dzavho dzoṱhe, vha Bethe Thogarama vha devhula-devhula na mmbi dzavho dzoṱhe, na tshakha nnzhi dzine wa vha nadzo." 
Ezekiel38:7 Ḓilugiseni vhukumakuma, iwe na mmbi dzau dzoṱhe na vhaṅwe vhe wa vha kuvhanganya, iwe u vhe mulangi wavho." 
Ezekiel38:8 Hu ḓo fhela maḓuvha manzhi ndi sa athu u ramba uri u ḓe, hone nga miṅwaha ya vhufhelo u ḓo ḓa wa dia shango heḽi. Vhathu vhaḽo vho vha vho fhela nga pfumo, shango ḽa fhedza miṅwaha na miṅwaha ḽi soga, ḽi si na vhathu, vha vhuya vha vhuelela thavhani dza Israele vha tshi bva he vha dzula vhukati ha tshakha nnzhi. Musi vha tshee vho dzula vho ḓitakalela," 
Ezekiel38:9 iwe na mmbi yau na tshakha nnzhi dzine wa ḓo vha u nadzo, ni ḓo gonya na tshimbila unga ḓumbu, na tiba shango unga gole.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi wonoyo u ḓo ḓelwa nga muhumbulo wa luka vhunwa." 
Ezekiel38:11 U ḓo ri, ‘Ndi ḓo dia shango heḽi ḽi songo tsireledzwaho, nda tshoṱhela lushaka holu lwa mulalo lu no tshila ḽo lala. Vhoṱhe vha dzula miḓini i si na mitsheṱo kana khoro kana tswinga." 
Ezekiel38:12 Ndi ḓo vha thuba nda vha ṱangula, ndi ḓo swikisa tshanḓa tshanga matumbani ane vha dzula khao, nda rwa lushaka holu lwo kuvhanganywaho lu tshi bva kha dziṅwe tshakha, havha vho pfumaho zwifuwo na thundu, vha dzulaho vhukatikati ha ḽifhasi.’" 
Ezekiel38:13 Vha Sheba na vha Dedani, vhone vhashavhi vha Tharashishi na miḓi yawo yoṱhe vha ḓo u vhudzisa vha ri, ‘Wo ḓa u thuba naa? Wo ḓisa mmbi dzau u tshi dzi ḓisela u ṱangula vhathu naa? U ṱoḓa u ṱuwa na musuku na siliva, wa thuba kholomo na thundu, wa thuba thundu i si na vhukono wa ṱuwa nayo naa?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 Zwino-ha, iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u vhudze Gogo u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: A si ngoho naa uri u khou luka ḽa u bva pfumo tshifhinga tsha musi vhathu vhanga vha Israele vha tshi khou tshila ḽo lala?" 
Ezekiel38:15 U khou luka ḽa u takuwa hayani hau ngei devhula-devhula, iwe na tshakha nnzhi dzi no ḓo vha dzi na iwe na mmbi khulu ya gomane dzi si na mbalo, vhoṱhe vhó namela dzibere?" 
Ezekiel38:16 U khou luka ḽa u tshoṱhela vhathu vhanga vha Israele. U ḓo nga gole ḽo tiba ḽifhasi. Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo u ḓisa nga maḓuvha a vhufhelo, wa ḓa wa dia shango ḽanga; ndi itela uri tshakha dzi ḓivhe zwine nda vha zwone, musi ndo sumbedza vhukhethwa hanga nga iwe Gogo, uri vha vhu vhone.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:17 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Misi ya kale ndo vha ndi tshi amba iwe, ndi tshi amba nga milomo ya vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita vha Israele, vhe vha porofita vha fhedza miṅwaha vha tshi amba zwa mudio uyo." 
Ezekiel38:18 Musi une Gogo a dia shango ḽa Israele – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – ndi ḓo sinyuwa. Musi ndo sinyuwa," 
Ezekiel38:19 ndi ḓo ana nga mbiti khulu nda ri: Musi wonoyo hu ḓo vha na mudzinginyo u ofhisaho shangoni ḽa Israele. 
Ezekiel38:20 Khovhe dza lwanzheni na zwiṋoni na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka na zwoṱhe zwi kokovhaho fhasi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi, zwi ḓo tetemela zwi tshi mmbona. Dzithavha dzi ḓo wa, nngwa dza petekana, mitsheṱo ya wela fhasi;" 
Ezekiel38:21 ndi ḓo luṱanya mmbi dza Gogo thavhani dzanga vha mbo rungana nga mafumo – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndi ḓo fhaladza malofha a mmbi dza Gogo, dza fa nga dwadze; ndi ḓo vha nisela mikumbela na tshifhango na mulilo na tsevhela, zwa vhaisa ene na mmbi dzawe na tshakha nnzhi dzine dza ḓo vha dzi nae." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ndi ḓo sumbedza vhuhulwane hanga na vhukhethwa hanga zwa ita uri tshakha nnzhi dzi nnḓivhe; ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel39:1 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, porofita u tshi haṱula Gogo u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Zwino ndi lwa na iwe Gogo, muvhusi muhulu wa Meshekhe na Thubala." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ndi ḓo u dzungulusa, nda u swoga nda u bvisa devhula-devhula nda u isa u dia thavha dza Israele." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ndi ḓo vunḓa vhura he wa vhu fara nga tshanḓa tsha monde, nda wisa misevhe ye wa i fara nga tshanḓa tshauḽa." 
Ezekiel39:4 Iwe u ḓo vhulawa dzithavhani dza Israele, iwe na mmbi dzau dzoṱhe na tshakha dzine wa vha nadzo. Ndi ḓo u ita zwiḽiwa zwa zwiṋoni zwa tshakha dzoṱhe na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka." 
Ezekiel39:5 U ḓo fela nnḓa ḓakani, ngauri ho amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel39:6 Shangoni ḽa Magogo ndi ḓo posa mulilo, na kha vha no tshila ḽo lala zwiṱangadzimeni, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ndi ḓo ita uri dzina ḽanga ḽi ḓivhiwe vhukati ha vhathu vha Israele, a thi tsha ḓo tenda dzina ḽanga ḽi tshi shatwa tshika; tshakha dzi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee, Mukhethwa wa Israele." 
Ezekiel39:8 Zwoṱhe hezwi zwi ḓo itea, zwoṱhe hezwi zwi ḓo vha hone, hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. Heḽi ndi ḓuvha ḽe nda dzula ndo ḽi amba." 
Ezekiel39:9 “ ‘Vha no dzula miḓini ya Israele vha ḓo bva vha yo dzhia izwo zwihali vha zwi ita khuni vha vhasa mulilo ngazwo: zwiṱangu na zwipileli na vhura na misevhe na migopi na mafumo. Vha ḓo zwi vhasa ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha miṱanu na mivhili. 
Ezekiel39:10 Vhathu a vha tsha ḓo yo reḓa khuni ḓakani kana vha yo dzi rema maṱakani; vha ḓo vha vha tshi khou vhasa zwihali. Vha ḓo ṱangula vhaṱanguli vhavho, vha thubela vhathubeli vhavho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel39:11 “ ‘Musi wonoyo, Gogo ndi ḓo mu ṋea fhethu kha ḽa Israele uri a swiṱwe hone; ndi Govha ḽa Dzikharavani, vhubvaḓuvha ha Lwanzhe lwa Muṋo. Gogo u ḓo swiṱwa henefho na mmbi yawe yoṱhe, govha ḽa ḓala lune zwalo zwa thivhela vhafhiri vha nḓila; ḽi vho ḓo pfi Govha ḽa Mmbi ya Gogo." 
Ezekiel39:12 Vhathu vha Israele vha ḓo swiṱa avho vhathu ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwedzi miṱanu na mivhili, vha kumulula shango." 
Ezekiel39:13 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango vha ḓo bwa zwalo, vha huliselwa zwenezwo musi ndi tshi dzumbulula vhugala hanga – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel39:14 Hu ḓo nangwa vhanna vha ḓi dzula vha tshi tandula shango thungo dzoṱhe u swiṱa vha sa athu swiṱwa na u kumulula shango. Vha ḓo thoma u londa hu tshi fhela ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili. 
Ezekiel39:15 Arali muṅwe wavho a vhona marambo a muthu vha tshi khou ḓi tandula shango, u ḓo vhea luswayo tsini nao vhaswiṱi vha vhuye vha a swiṱe Govhani ḽa Mmbi ya Gogo –" 
Ezekiel39:16 hu ḓo vha na muḓi henefho tsini u no ḓo pfi Mmbi – u ralo ha vha hone vho kumulula shango.’ 
Ezekiel39:17 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Vhudza zwiṋoni zwa tshakha dzoṱhe na zwivhanda zwa ḓaka zwa tshakha dzoṱhe u ri, ‘Kuvhanganani, iḓani fhano, ṱanganani ni tshi bva hoṱhe-hoṱhe ni ḓe tshiṱhavheloni tshine nda khou ni lugisela tshone, ndi tshiṱhavhelo tshihulwane tshine nda ita thavhani dza Israele; ni ḓo ḽa ṋama na nwa malofha." 
Ezekiel39:18 Ni ḓo ḽa ṋama ya vhahali na nwa malofha a vhavhusi vha mashango. Vhoṱhe vho nona unga thutha na ngwana na mbudzi na mboho dzo nonaho dza Bashani. 
Ezekiel39:19 Ni ḓo ḽa mapfura na fura, na nwa malofha na tou kambwa, kha tshiṱhavhelo hetshi tshine nda khou ni lugisela tshone." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ni ḓo dzula ḓafulani yanga na ḽa na fura nga dzibere na vhanameli vhadzo, nga vhahali na maswole avho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.’" 
Ezekiel39:21 “Vhugala hanga ndi ḓo vhu sumbedza dzitshakha nga u ralo, tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo pfa ṱhamu yanga musi ndi tshi haṱula, vha pfa maanḓa a tshanḓa tshanga musi ndi tshi vha rwa." 
Ezekiel39:22 Vhathu vha Israele vha ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, musi wonoyo na misi i ḓaho." 
Ezekiel39:23 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri vhathu vha Israele vha tshi iswa vhuthubwani ndi nga mulandu wa zwivhi zwavho vha tshi ntshandukela nda vhuya nda vha furalela nda vha kumedza maswina avho, vhoṱhe vha lovha nga pfumo." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ndo vha ita zwo teaho zwivhi zwavho zwi nengisaho vha tshi ntshandukela, nda vha furalela.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Zwino-ha, Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino ndi ḓo ita uri zwi dovhe zwi nakele vhaḓuhulu vha Jakopo, vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele ndi ḓo vha pfela vhuṱungu, nda lwela dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa." 
Ezekiel39:26 Vha ḓo hangwa ṱhoni dza musi ndi tshi vhona vha tshi anzela u sa fulufhedzea musi vho dzula shangoni ḽavho ḽo lala, hu si na ane a vha dina." 
Ezekiel39:27 Musi ndi tshi vha vhuedzedza hayani vha tshi bva dzitshakhani, musi ndi tshi vha humisela hayani vha tshi bva mashangoni a maswina avho, musi ndi tshi dzumbulula vhukhethwa hanga khavho uri tshakha nnzhi dzi zwi vhone," 
Ezekiel39:28 ndi hone vha tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri ndi Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wavho, ngauri naho ndo vha isa vhuthubwani kha dzitshakha, ndi ḓo dovha nda vha kuvhanganya nda vha vhuisa shangoni ḽa havho, nda si sie na muthihi." 
Ezekiel39:29 A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda vha furalela, vhunga ndo shululela Muya wanga kha vhathu vha Israele – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Nga ṅwaha wa 25 ri vhuthubwa Babele, mathomoni a ṅwaha, nga ḓuvha ḽa fumi ḽa ṅwedzi, hó no fhela miṅwaha ya 14 tshee Jerusalema wa phusukanywa, nda pfa ndo tsikeledzwa nga tshanḓa tsha Muṋe washu." 
Ezekiel40:2 O nkhwala ndi kha bono ḽa Mudzimu a nnyisa shangoni ḽa Israele, a mmbea fhasi nṱha ha thavha ndapfu-ndapfu, thungo ya tshipembe tshayo hu tshi nga hu khou fhaṱiwa muḓi." 
Ezekiel40:3 A nnyisa hone, henefho nda vhona munna we a vha a tshi nga o vhumbwa nga musinaseṱha. O vha o fara thambo ya muḓali na luṱanga lwa u ela, o ima khoroni." 
Ezekiel40:4 Uyo munna a amba na nṋe a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, sedza zwavhuḓi, kolongonya nḓevhe, zwoṱhe zwine nda u sumbedza u zwi dzhiele nzhele, vhunga wo ḓiswa fhano uri ndi u sumbedze zwone. Vhudza vhathu vha Israele zwoṱhe zwine wa zwi vhona.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Thembele yo vha yo tingeledzwa nga mutsheṱo. Uyo munna o vha o fara luṱanga lwa u ela, vhulapfu halwo ho vha hu maga maṱanu na ḽithihi. A ela uyo mutsheṱo, vhuphara ha ita luṱanga luthihi, u ya nṱha ha ita luṱanga luthihi." 
Ezekiel40:6 Uyo munna a ya khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha, a namela zwiṱepisi, a ela tshiukhuvha tshayo, vhuphara hatsho ha ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Rumu iṅwe na iṅwe ya vhalindi yo vha i maga maṱanu na ḽithihi vhulapfu na vhuphara, luvhondo lwa vhukati ha rumu dza vhalindi lwo vha lu na vhuphara ha maga maṱanu. Nga phanḓa ha rumu dza vhalindi ho vha hu na vanḓa ḽo lavhelesanaho na thembele. Uyo munna a ela tshiukhuvha tsha muṋango, wa u bva khaḽo u dzhena thembeleni, tsha ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi." 
Ezekiel40:8  
Ezekiel40:9 A konou ela vanḓa ḽone ḽiṋe ḽa ita maga maṱanu na mararu, luvhondo lwaḽo thungo ya thembele lwa ita maga mavhili vhudenya halwo." 
Ezekiel40:10 Ho vha hu na rumu tharu dza vhalindi ngeno na ngeno ha khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha, vhuraru hadzo dzi tshi eḓana; luvhondo lu re vhukati hadzo lu tshi eḓana nga vhudenya sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe." 
Ezekiel40:11 A ela vhuphara ha khoro ha ita maga a fumi, vhulapfu hoṱhe u tsela khoroni ha ita maga a fumi na mararu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Phanḓa ha rumu dza vhalindi ho vha hu na guvha; guvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe masia oṱhe ḽo vha ḽi tshi ita ḽiga ḽithihi vhudenya haḽo. Rumu dza vhalindi masia oṱhe dzo vha dzi maga maṱanu na ḽithihi masia oṱhe. 
Ezekiel40:13 Uyo munna a ela vhuphara ha khoro u bva hune ṱhanga ya kwama luvhondo lwa ngeno u swika hune ya kwama lwa ngei, ha ita maga a 25; miṋango ya rumu dza vhalindi yo vha yo livhana, tharu ngeno, tharu ngeno." 
Ezekiel40:14 A ela phuphu dzo vhandekanaho na luvhondo, dza ita maga a 60 u ya nṱha. Vanḓa ḽo vha ḽo tingeledzwa tshoṱhe nga muṱa wa thembele." 
Ezekiel40:15 Vhulapfu ha vanḓa ḽoṱhe u bva muṋangoni wa nnḓa u swika kha wa ngomu zwa ita maga a 50. 
Ezekiel40:16 Masiani oṱhe a khoro, rumuni dza vhalindi na mbondoni dza vhukati, ho vha hu na mabuli o lavhelesaho ngomu ha khoro. Ho vha ho oliwa miri ya mitshevho kha dzenedzo mbondo." 
Ezekiel40:17 Uyo munna a nnzhia ra fhirela muṱani wa nnḓa. Wone wo vha u na dzirumu wo ridelwa u mona hoṱhe; ho vha hu na rumu dza 30. 
Ezekiel40:18 Ho ridelwaho ho vha ho adza ha guma nga khoro, phevimennde u aṱama hayo hu tshi lingana na vhunavha hayo; ho ridelwaho honoho hu fhasinyana kha ha ngomu." 
Ezekiel40:19 A ela u buḓekanya muṱa wa nnḓa u bva khoroni u swika muṱani wa ngomu, zwa ita maga a ḓana kha masia a vhubvaḓuvha na devhula." 
Ezekiel40:20 Uyo munna a ela vhunavha na vhuphara ha khoro ya devhula ya muṱa wa nnḓa. 
Ezekiel40:21 Yo vha i na rumu tharu dza vhalindi ngeno na ngeno; vhuphara ha mbondo vhukati hadzo, na guḓa ḽayo, zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi na mielo i no eḓana na ya khoro iḽa ya u thoma, zwi tshi ita maga a 50 vhunavha na maga a 25 vhuphara." 
Ezekiel40:22 Mafasiṱere ayo na guḓa ḽayo na miri yayo ya makolo a muri wa mutshevho zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi na mielo i no eḓana na ya khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha. Ho vha hu na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na zwivhili zwi no gonya khayo, vanḓa ḽayo ḽi magumoni nga ngomu." 
Ezekiel40:23 Muṱani wa ngomu u lavhelesana na khoro ya devhula, ho vha hu na vanḓa ḽi no fana na ḽo lavhelesanaho na ya vhubvaḓuvha. A ela tshikhala u bva kha iṅwe khoro u swika kha iṅwe zwa ita maga a ḓana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa sia ḽa tshipembe he ha vha hu na khoro ya tshipembe, a ela rumu dzayo dza vhalindi na vhuphara ha mbondo na guḓa; dzo vha dzi na muelo u no eḓana na dziṅwe." 
Ezekiel40:25 Hoṱhe u mona nayo na guḓa ḽayo ho vha hu na mafasiṱere a no fana na maṅwe mafasiṱere; yo vha i na vhunavha ha maga a 50 na vhuphara ha maga a 25," 
Ezekiel40:26 nahone yo vha i na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na zwivhili zwi no gonya khayo, guḓa ḽayo ḽo vha ḽi magumoni nga ngomu, ḽi na makolo a miri ya mitshevho mbondoni dzaḽo, muthihi nga ngeno, muthihi nga ngei." 
Ezekiel40:27 Muṱa wa ngomu wo vha u na khoro ya tshipembe. A ela tshikhala itsho a tshi ya thungo ya tshipembe u bva kha iṅwe khoro u swika kha iṅwe zwa ita maga a ḓana. 
Ezekiel40:28 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa muṱani wa ngomu tsini na khoro ya tshipembe, a ela khoro ya tshipembe; yo vha i tshi eḓana na dziṅwe." 
Ezekiel40:29 Rumu dzayo dza vhalindi na vhuphara ha mbondo na guḓa, zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi na mielo i no eḓana na zwiṅwe. Yone na guḓa ḽayo zwo vha zwi na mafasiṱere u mona hoṱhe. Vhunavha hayo ho vha hu tshi ita maga a 50, vhuphara hayo hu tshi ita maga a 25." 
Ezekiel40:30 Guḓa ḽayo u mona hoṱhe ḽo vha ḽi na vhunavha ha maga a 25 na vhuphara ha maga maṱanu. 
Ezekiel40:31 Guḓa ḽo vha ḽo lavhelesa muṱa wa nnḓa. Ḽo vha ḽo oliwa miri ya mitshevho kha phuphu dzaḽo masia oṱhe, ha vha na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na zwiraru zwi no gonya khaḽo." 
Ezekiel40:32 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha a i ela. Yo vha i na mielo i no fana na ya dziṅwe. 
Ezekiel40:33 Rumu dzayo na vhudenya ha mbondo dzayo na guḓa ḽayo zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi na mielo i no ḓi nga ya zwiṅwe. Yone na guḓa ḽayo zwo vha zwi na mafasiṱere u mona hoṱhe. He ya adza hone ho vha hu tshi ita vhunavha ha maga a 50, vhuphara vhu tshi ita maga a 25." 
Ezekiel40:34 Guḓa ḽayo ḽo vha ḽo lavhelesa muṱa wa nnḓa. Ho vha ho oliwa miri ya mitshevho kha phuphu dzaḽo, masia oṱhe ha vha na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na zwiraru zwi tshi gonya khayo." 
Ezekiel40:35 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa khoroni ya devhula a i ela. 
Ezekiel40:36 Rumu dzayo dza vhalindi na vhudenya ha mbondo dzayo na guḓa ḽayo, zwoṱhe zwo vha zwi na mielo i no nga ya zwiṅwe. Yo vha i na mafasiṱere u mona hoṱhe. He ya adza hone ho vha hu tshi ita maga a 50 vhunavha na maga a 25 vhuphara." 
Ezekiel40:37 Guḓa ḽayo ḽo vha ḽo lavhelesa muṱa wa nnḓa. Ho vha ho oliwa miri ya mitshevho kha phuphu dzaḽo, masia oṱhe, ha vha na zwiṱepisi zwiṱanu na zwiraru zwi no gonya khayo." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ho vha hu na rumu i na muṋango, ye muthu a vha a tshi dzhena khayo a tshi bva guḓani ḽa dzikhoro. Henefho ho vha hu tshi ṱanzwiwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho." 
Ezekiel40:39 Masia oṱhe a guḓa ḽa khoro ho vha hu na maḓafula mavhili sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe hune ha shidzhelwa zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na zwa u hangwelwa vhutshinyi na zwipfumelo. 
Ezekiel40:40 U ya devhula u swika nga khoro, ho vha hu na maḓafula mavhili nnḓa na maṅwe hafhu maḓafula mavhili magumoni a guḓa ḽa khoro." 
Ezekiel40:41 Ho vha hu na maḓafula maṋa ngomu ha guḓa na maḓafula maṋa nnḓa ha guḓa, oṱhe o ṱangana o vha e maḓafula maṱanu na mararu e zwiṱhavhelo zwa vha zwi tshi ṋekedzelwa nṱha hao." 
Ezekiel40:42 Ha dovha ha vha na maḓafula maṋa a matombo o vhaḓiwaho a zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho. Ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽo vha ḽi na vhunavha vhu no ita ḽiga na hafu na vhuphara ha ḽiga na hafu na vhulapfu u ya nṱha ha ḽiga ḽithihi. Nṱha hao ho vha hu tshi vhewa zwoṱhe zwi ṱoḓeaho hu tshi shidzhwa tshiṱhavhelo na dziṅwe nduvho. 
Ezekiel40:43 Ho vha hu na lubomo lwa vhuphara ha hafu ya ḽiga, lwo mona na nga nṱha hao, nahone nṱha ha maḓafula ayo hu tshi vhewa ṋama ya zwiṱhavhelo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Muṱani wa ngomu ho vha hu na rumu mbili nnḓa ha khoro; iṅwe yo vha yo vhandekana na khoro ya devhula, muṋango wayo wo lavhelesa tshipembe; iṅwe yo vha yo vhandekana na khoro ya tshipembe, muṋango wayo wo lavhelesa devhula." 
Ezekiel40:45 Uyo munna a mmbudza a ri, “Nnḓu yo lavhelesaho tshipembe ndi ya vhotshifhe vhane vha shuma thembeleni," 
Ezekiel40:46 nnḓu yo lavhelesaho devhula ndi ya vhotshifhe vhane vha shuma aḽiṱarini. Havho ndi vhana vha Tsadoko; ndi vhone vhana vha Livi vhe vhoṱhe vhane vha sendela tsini ha Muṋe washu vha mu shumela.” 
Ezekiel40:47 Uyo munna a ela muṱa wa ngomu. Masia awo oṱhe o vha a tshi eḓana, vhunavha vhu maga a ḓana na vhuphara vhu maga a ḓana, ho ima aḽiṱari phanḓa ha thembele." 
Ezekiel40:48 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa vanḓani ḽa thembele a ela mihangammbwa ya vothi ḽayo, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽo vha ḽi maga maṱanu, u aṱama ha muṋango ho vha hu maga a fumi na maṋa, ha vha na mutsheṱo wa maga mararu nga vhudenya, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe." 
Ezekiel40:49 Vhunavha ha vanḓa ho vha hu maga a 20, vhuphara vhu maga a 12. Ho vha hu na zwiṱepisi zwa fumi zwine zwa gonya khaḽo, nahone phanḓa ha thikho dza muṋango ho vha hu na phuphu mbili, iṅwe kha ḽino sia, iṅwe kha ḽiḽa." 
Ezekiel41:1 U bva afho uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa nḓuni khethwa, a ela mihangammbwa ya muṋango waho zwa ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi vhudenya kha ḽiṅwe sia, na kha ḽiṅwe sia zwa ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi." 
Ezekiel41:2 U aṱama ha muṋango ho vha hu maga a fumi. Vhudenya ha mbondo sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa muṋango ho vha vhu maga maṱanu sia ḽino na maga maṱanu sia ḽiḽa. A ela vhunavha ha henefho ha ita maga a 40, vhuphara ha ita maga a 20." 
Ezekiel41:3 Uyo munna a sendela rumuni ya bvungwi a yo ela phuphu dza vothi muṋangoni wayo dza ita maga mavhili, zwino ha ḓa muṋango wa ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi, vhunavha ha mbondo sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa muṋango ha ita maga maṱanu na mavhili." 
Ezekiel41:4 Ndi hone a tshi ela vhunavha ha Hukhethwakhethwa ha ita maga a 20, na vhuphara haho ha ita maga a 20 u fana na ha nnḓu khethwa. Zwenezwo a mmbudza a ri, “Hafha ndi hone Hukhethwakhethwa.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Uyo munna a ela vhudenya ha luvhondo lwa thembele ha ita maga maṱanu na ḽithihi. U mona na thembele yoṱhe ho vha hu na rumu dzo kwamaho luvhondo lwayo, vhuphara hadzo ndi maga maṋa." 
Ezekiel41:6 Idzo rumu dzo vha dzo ṱanḓekana u ya nṱha, dzi 30 kha tshitizi, zwitizi zwi zwiraru. Thikho dza idzo rumu dzo monaho hoṱhe dzo vha dzi songo longwa luvhondoni lwa thembele; ndi uri luvhondo lwa thembele lwo vha lu tshi fhungudzea sia ḽa nnḓa u ya nṱha, kha tshitizi tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe lwa sia lumeme, tshitizi tsha tou dzula nṱha ha lumeme lwonolwo sia ḽa ngomu," 
Ezekiel41:7 zwa ita uri vhuphara ha dzirumu vhu ḓi engedzea vhu tshi ya nṱha, nga luvhondo lwa thembele lu tshi ḓi sekena lu tshi ya nṱha tshitizi nga tshitizi, lwo tangiwa nga dziḽa rumu ha vha na zwiṱepisi zwi no bva kha tshitizi tsha fhasi zwi tshi gonyela kha tsha nṱha." 
Ezekiel41:8 Vhudenya ha mbondo dza nnḓa dza lufhera lwo monaho na thembele ndi maga maṱanu. U mona na lwonolwo lufhera ho vha hu na luḓila lwa matombo; vhuphara halwo ndi maga maṱanu, vhulapfu u ya nṱha ndi maṱanu na ḽithihi. Miṋango ya lufhera lwo monaho na thembele yo vha yo lavhelesa luḓila holwo, muṅwe wo lavhelesa devhula, muṅwe tshipembe. Vanḓa ḽo vha ḽo tangiwa nga luvhanḓe lune vhuphara halwo ha ita maga a 20." 
Ezekiel41:9  
Ezekiel41:10  
Ezekiel41:11  
Ezekiel41:12 Vhukovhela ha tshikhala hetsho tshi si na tshithu ho vha hu na nnḓu ya vhunavha ha maga a 90 na vhuphara ha maga a 70, vhudenya ha luvhondo lwa nnḓu hu tshi ita maga maṱanu u mona hoṱhe." 
Ezekiel41:13 A ela vhunavha ha thembele ha ita maga a ḓana. A konou ela muṱa wa murahu ha thembele khathihi na nnḓu ya vhukovhela na mbondo dzayo, na wone wa ita maga a ḓana." 
Ezekiel41:14 Vhuphara ha phanḓa ha thembele na tshikhala tshi si na tshithu ho vha hu maga a ḓana. 
Ezekiel41:15 A ela vhunavha ha iyo nnḓu ya vhukovhela murahu ha itsho tshikhala tshi si na tshithu tsho monaho hoṱhe, khathihi na phera dzo monaho na nnḓu, zwa ita maga a ḓana. Matungo a Hukhethwakhethwa na mavanḓa a muṱa," 
Ezekiel41:16 na zwiukhuvha zwao na zwitsireledzi zwa mafasiṱere na mahothi, mavhili mavhili, ḽithihi kha guvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe, zwoṱhe zwo vha zwo tibedzwa nga matanda, u bva fhasi u swika kha mafasiṱere, mafasiṱere ó tsireledzwa nga matanda." 
Ezekiel41:17 U bva vothini u swika ngomu ha thembele na u mona luvhondo lwoṱhe lwa rumu ya ngomu, nga ngomu na nga nnḓa, ho vha hu na makolo a zwithu zwo vhaḓwaho," 
Ezekiel41:18 vhakherube na mitshevho, mitshevho na vhakherube zwi tshi sielana, mukherube muṅwe na muṅwe o vha e na zwifhaṱuwo zwivhili," 
Ezekiel41:19 tshifhaṱuwo tsha muthu o lavhelesa mutshevho, sia ḽiṅwe e na tshifhaṱuwo tsha ndau yo lavhelesa mutshevho sia ḽiṅwe, u mona na thembele yoṱhe." 
Ezekiel41:20 Vhakherube na mitshevho zwo vha zwo vhaḓiwa u bva fhasi u swika nṱha ha muṋango, na mbondoni dza Hukhethwakhethwa." 
Ezekiel41:21 Mihangammbwa ya Hukhethwa khathihi na ya Hukhethwakhethwa yo vha i na vhuphara na vhulapfu vhu eḓanaho. 
Ezekiel41:22 Phanḓa ha Hukhethwakhethwa ho vha hu na aḽiṱari ya matanda, vhulapfu u ya nṱha i tshi ita maga mararu, vhunavha na u aṱama zwi tshi ita maga mavhili. Khuḓa dzayo na muteo na nga matungo ho vha hu matanda. Uyo munna a mmbudza a ri, “Heḽi ndi ḓafula ḽo imaho phanḓa ha Muṋe washu.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Muṋango wa Hukhethwa wo vha u na mahothi mavhili, na wa Hukhethwakhethwa wo vha u na mahothi mavhili." 
Ezekiel41:24 Mahothi ayo o vha e na hinzhi mbili, vothi ḽithihi ḽi na hinzhi mbili, ḽiṅwe-vho ḽi na hinzhi mbili." 
Ezekiel41:25 Nṱha ha hayo mahothi a Hukhethwa ho vha ho vhaḓiwa makolo a vhakherube na mitshevho a no fana na a re mbondoni. Phanḓa ha vanḓa ḽa thembele ho vha hu na ṱhanga ya matanda. 
Ezekiel41:26 Kha mbondo dza matungo a guḓa ho vha hu na vhubuli vhu re na makolo a mitshevho masia oṱhe. Rumu dza matungo a thembele na dzone dzo vha dzo fulelwa. 
Ezekiel42:1 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa muṱani wa nnḓa thungo ya devhula a nnzhenisa muṱani a ntshimbidza nda ya rumuni yo lavhelesaho muṱa wa nnḓa, i re devhula ha iyo nnḓu." 
Ezekiel42:2 Vhunavha hayo ho vha hu maga a ḓana sia ḽa devhula, u aṱama e maga a 50." 
Ezekiel42:3 Nnḓu iyo yo vha yo vhandekana na tshikhala tsha maga a 20 tshi re tsini ha guḓa ḽa ngomu, na tshipiḓa tsha muṱa wa thembele tsho vhandekanaho na guḓa ḽa nnḓa. Yo vha i na zwitizi zwiraru." 
Ezekiel42:4 Phanḓa ha dzirumu ho vha hu na mukoto wa vhuphara ha maga a fumi nga ngomu na vhunavha ha maga a ḓana, vothi ḽawo ḽo vha ḽo sedza devhula." 
Ezekiel42:5 Rumu dza nṱha dzo vha dzo sekena ngauri idzo nnḓu dzo vha dzo dzhielwa vhuphara nga zwitizi, dza sekena u fhira dza fhasi kana dzi re vhukati ha nnḓu," 
Ezekiel42:6 vhunga dzo vha dzo fhandekanywa nga zwitizi zwiraru, dzi si na phuphu dzi no nga dza muṱa. Ndi zwe dza vha dzo sekena u fhira dza fhasi kana dza vhukati dzi re fhasi hadzo." 
Ezekiel42:7 Luvhondo lwa nnḓa lwo vhambelaho na idzo rumu, lwa lavhelesana nadzo sia ḽiḽa ḽa muṱa wa nnḓa, vhunavha halwo ho vha hu maga a 50." 
Ezekiel42:8 Vhunavha ha dzirumu dzo lavhelesaho muṱa wa nnḓa dzo ṱangana ho vha vhu maga a 50, ngeno sia ḽo lavhelesaho thembele vhu maga a ḓana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Rumu dza fhasi dzo vha dzi na muṋango sia ḽa vhubvaḓuvha u tshi dzhena u tshi bva muṱani wa nnḓa. 
Ezekiel42:10 Ngomu ha luvhondo ludenya lwa muṱa wa nnḓa, sia ḽa tshipembe u lavhelesana na muṱa wa nnḓu, ho vha hu na dzirumu." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ho vha hu na luḓila lu re phanḓa hadzo, u ḓi nga dzirumu dzo fhaṱwaho sia ḽa devhula; dzo vha dzi na vhunavha na vhuphara vhu eḓanaho, dzi tshi fana miṋango na mahothi adzo, ngomu na nnḓa." 
Ezekiel42:12 Dzo vha dzi tshi nga miṋango ya rumu dza devhula, hú na muṋango muthihi magumoni a luḓila luṅwe na luṅwe, u vhambela na mutsheṱo wa vhubvaḓuvha musi muthu a tshi dzhena." 
Ezekiel42:13 Uyo munna a mmbudza a ri, “Dzirumu dza devhula na dza tshipembe dzo lavhelesaho muṱa ndi rumu khethwa, hune vhotshifhe vhane vha swika phanḓa ha Yahavee vha ḓo ḽa zwikhethwakhethwa. Ngomu hadzo hu ḓo vhewa zwikhethwakhethwa: nduvho ya thoro na nduvho ya u pfumelelwa vhutshinyi na nduvho ya ndifho, ngauri fhethu hafho ndi hukhethwa." 
Ezekiel42:14 Vhotshifhe vha vhuya vha dzhena Hukhethwa a vha bvi kana vha dzhena muṱani wa nnḓa vha sa athu bvula zwiambaro zwine vha shumela vhathu vho zwi ambara, ngauri izwo zwiambaro ndi zwikhethwa; vha fanela u ambara zwiṅwe vha sa athu ya fhethu ho itelwaho vhathu.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Musi uyo munna o no fhedza u ela thembele nga ngomu, a nnzhia a nnyisa khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha, a ela u adza hoṱhe ha muṱa." 
Ezekiel42:16 A thoma u ela sia ḽa vhubvaḓuvha nga luṱanga lwawe lwa u ela: zwo ṱangana zwoṱhe zwa ita maga a 500 nga luṱanga lwa u ela. 
Ezekiel42:17 A konou ela sia ḽa devhula: zwa ita maga a 500 nga luṱanga lwa u ela. 
Ezekiel42:18 A konou ela sia ḽa tshipembe: zwa ita maga a 500 nga luṱanga lwa u ela. 
Ezekiel42:19 A monela sia ḽa vhukovhela a ela maga a 500 nga luṱanga lwa u ela. 
Ezekiel42:20 A ela mutsheṱo woṱhe wo fhaṱeledzaho masia oṱhe maṋa: vhunavha maga a 500, vhuphara maga a 500, u tshi fhandekanya zwikhethwa na swi si zwikhethwa." 
Ezekiel43:1 Uyo munna a nnzhia a nnyisa khoroni yo lavhelesaho vhubvaḓuvha. 
Ezekiel43:2 Nda vhona vhugala ha Mudzimu wa Israele vhu tshi ḓa vhu tshi bva vhubvaḓuvha. Ha pfala mubvumo u no nga mubvumo wa maguvhukuvhu manzhi, ḽifhasi ḽa penya nga vhugala hawe." 
Ezekiel43:3 Bono heḽo ḽo vha ḽi tshi nga ḽe nda ḽi vhona musi ndo ḓela zwa u phusukanywa ha muḓi, na ḽe nda ḽi vhona tsini ha mulambo wa Khebara. Zwenezwo nda wa nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
Ezekiel43:4 Vhugala ha Muṋe washu ha dzhena thembeleni nga khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha. 
Ezekiel43:5 Muya a ntakulela nṱha, a mmbea muṱani wa ngomu; nda vhona vhugala ha Muṋe washu ho tou ḓadza thembele." 
Ezekiel43:6 Nda pfa muṅwe a tshi amba na nṋe e thembeleni, uyo munna a tshee o ima tsini hanga." 
Ezekiel43:7 Ipfi ḽa ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, hafhano ndi fhethu ha khuluṋoni yanga, ndi hune nda kanda nda awedza milenzhe yanga. Ndi ḓo dzula henefha vhukati ha Vhaisraele lini na lini; nahone vhathu vha Israele, vhone na mahosi avho, a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha shata dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa tshika nga vhupombwe havho na zwitumbu zwa mahosi avho vha tshi vha swiṱa fhano" 
Ezekiel43:8 nga u vhandekanya zwiukhuvha zwavho na zwanga, vha vhandekanya mihangammbwa yanga na yavho, ha tou sala mutsheṱo fhedzi wa u fhandekanya Nṋe na vhone. Vho vha vha tshi ṱolou shata dzina ḽanga ḽikhethwa tshika nga zwiito zwavho zwi nengisaho, ndi zwe nda vha lozwa ndo sinyuwa." 
Ezekiel43:9 U bva zwino vha ḓo laṱa vhupombwe na zwitumbu zwa mahosi avho nda si tsha zwi vhona, Nṋe nda ḓo konou dzula vhukati havho lini na lini." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, vhudza vhathu vha Israele nga thembele hei vha sedze nzudzanyo yayo, uri vha shone vha tshi elelwa zwe vha tshinya." 
Ezekiel43:11 Zwino arali vha tshi shona nga u elelwa maitele avho, vha sumbedze nzudzanyo ya thembele: kufhaṱelwe kwayo, miṋango yayo ya u bva na ya u dzhena, tshivhumbeo tshayo, milayo yayo yoṱhe na ndaela dzayo. Hezwo zwoṱhe itou vha ṅwalela zwone uri vha kone u zwi vhona vha tevhedze nzudzanyo yayo na ndaela dzayo dzoṱhe." 
Ezekiel43:12 Hoyu ndi mulayo wa thembele: U mona hoṱhe nṱha ha thavha ndi hukhethwakhethwa. Mulayo wa thembele wo tou ralo.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Mielo ya aḽiṱari ngei, hu tshi eliwa nga muelo wonouḽa we wa ela thembele. Hoṱhe u mona na muteo wa aḽiṱari ho vha hu na gathara ine ya ita ḽiga ḽithihi u tsa fhasi na ḽiga ḽithihi u aṱama, na lubomo lumemeni lwa nnḓa lu tshi ita hafu ya ḽiga." 
Ezekiel43:14 U bva lubomoni lwa gathara u swika nṱha ha muteo, ho vha hu maga mavhili u lapfela nṱha. Sia ḽi tevhelaho ḽo vha ḽo humela murahu ha lumeme nga ḽiga ḽithihi u mona hoṱhe ḽa gonya nga maga maṋa. Sia ḽi tevhelaho iḽo na ḽone ḽo vha ḽo humela murahu u bva lumemeni nga ḽiga ḽithihi u mona hoṱhe." 
Ezekiel43:15 Tombo ḽa nṱha hune ha fhiswa zwiṱhavhelo, na ḽone ḽo vha ḽi maga maṋa u ya nṱha. Nga nṱha ḽo guma nga ṋanga dza aḽiṱari." 
Ezekiel43:16 Iḽo tombo ḽa nṱha ḽo vha ḽi tshi eḓana masia oṱhe maṋa, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi maga a 12." 
Ezekiel43:17 Tombo ḽa vhukati na ḽone ḽo vha ḽi tshi eḓana masia oṱhe maṋa, sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi maga a 14, na lubomo lwa lumemeni lwa nnḓa lu tshi ita hafu ya ḽiga u ya nṱha. (Gathara yo vha i ḽiga ḽithihi u aṱama.) Zwiṱepisi zwi no gonya aḽiṱarini zwo vha zwi sia ḽa vhubvaḓuvha." 
Ezekiel43:18 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, Nṋe ndi ri: Musi aḽiṱari yo fhela u fhaṱwa, milayo ya zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na u handulula nga malofha nṱha ha aḽiṱari ndi heino:" 
Ezekiel43:19 Vhotshifhe vha Vhalivi, vha lutsinga lwa Tsadoko vhane vha sendela tsini hanga uri vha ntshumele – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee – no fanela u vha ṋea mbohwana i vhe tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo." 
Ezekiel43:20 Ni dzhie malofha ayo ni a vhee kha ṋanga nṋa na khuḓani nṋa dza tombo ḽa vhukati ḽa aḽiṱari na lumemeni lwo monaho hoṱhe. U ralo hu ḓo vha u kumulula aḽiṱari ya sa tsha hwala vhutshinyi. 
Ezekiel43:21 Ni kone-ha u dzhia mboho ya tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo ni i fhise nnḓa ha thembele kule na hukhethwa. 
Ezekiel43:22 Nga ḓuvha ḽi tevhelaho ni ṋekedze mbokoṱo i si na badzi, na i ita tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo, aḽiṱari ya dovha ya kumululwa unga zwiḽa i tshi kumululwa nga mboho." 
Ezekiel43:23 Musi no no fhedza u kumulula ni ṋekedze mbohwana i si na badzi na thutha i si na luvhadzi yó nangwa kha sambi ḽa nngu. 
Ezekiel43:24 Zwenezwo ni zwi ṋekedze Nṋe Yahavee, vhotshifhe vha zwi shele muṋo vha zwi ṋekedze Nṋe tshi vhe tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ni ṋekedze mbokoṱo na mboho na thutha i si na luvhadzi i no bva kha sambi ḽa nngu, tshi vhe tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo, musi muṅwe na muṅwe zwi vhuye zwi ite maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili" 
Ezekiel43:26 hu vhuye hu fhele vhege. Ngauralo aḽiṱari i ḓo vha yo kumululwa ya sa tsha hwala vhutshinyi, yo hangulwa." 
Ezekiel43:27 Maḓuvha eneo o no fhela, u thoma nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuraru u ya phanḓa, vhotshifhe vha ṋekedze zwiṱhavhelo zwaṋu zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhukonani nṱha ha aḽiṱari, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni takalela – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Uyo munna a nkhumisela khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha ya nnḓa ya hukhethwa. Yo vha yo valwa. 
Ezekiel44:2 Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “Khoro hei i dzule yo valwa. Hu songo vha na ane a i vula kana a dzhena ngayo, vhunga Nṋe Yahavee Mudzimu wa Israele ndo dzhena ngayo. Zwenezwo i dzule yo valwa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Hone muvhusi ndi ene e eṱhe ane a nga ḓi dzula muṋangoni henefho a ḽa Nṋe Yahavee ndi tshi mu vhona, hufha e muvhusi. Ene u dzhena nga muṋango wa vanḓa ḽa khoro ya vhukovhela a dovha a bva ngawo.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Uyo munna a ntshimbidza nda fhira khoro ya devhula nda ya phanḓa ha thembele. Nda sedza, nda vhona vhugala ha Muṋe washu ho ḓadza thembele ya Muṋe washu, nda wa nga tshifhaṱuwo." 
Ezekiel44:5 Muṋe washu a amba na nṋe a ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, ivha na nzhele, sedza zwavhuḓi, u thetshelese zwavhuḓi zwoṱhe zwine nda u ṱalutshedza; hezwi ndi zwone zwo vhekanyelwaho thembele ya Yahavee na milayo yayo yoṱhe. U sedzese uri vhathu vha no tendelwa u dzhena thembeleni ndi vhonnyi, na uri vha ḓo bva nga ngafhi." 
Ezekiel44:6 U vhudze Vhaisraele vhadzia-u-ntshandukela u ri, ‘Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri: Inwi vhathu vha Israele, zwiito zwaṋu zwi nengisaho a zwi athu lingana naa," 
Ezekiel44:7 ni tshi phapha mbulu kha iṅwe na tendela vhatsinda vha songo fumbaho mbilu na mivhili vha tshi anzela u dzhena hukhethwa hanga, vha shata thembele yanga tshika musi ni tshi khou ṋekedza vhurotho hanga na mapfura na malofha, na vhofholola mulanga wanga nga zwiito zwaṋu zwi nengisaho." 
Ezekiel44:8 A no ngo tsha ita pfanelo dzaṋu fhethu hukhethwa, no tou ruma vhatsinda u yo ita pfanelo dzaṋu hukhethwa hanga." 
Ezekiel44:9 Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee ndi ri: Na mutsinda na muthihi a songo fumbaho mbilu na muvhili a songo vhuya a dzhena hukhethwa hanga – ndi amba na mutsinda muthihi zwawe a no dzula na Vhaisraele. 
Ezekiel44:10 “ ‘Vhalivi vhone vhe vha mpfuralela musi Vhaisraele vha tshi pambuwa vha ṱutshela kule na Nṋe vha tevhela midzimu yavho ya dzitshikha, vho fanela u hwala muhwalo wa zwivhi zwavho." 
Ezekiel44:11 Vha ḓo vha vhashumi vha hukhethwa hanga, vha ḓo linda khoro dza thembele vha shumela thembele. Vha ḓo shidzha zwiṱhavhelo zwa u fhiswa na zwiṅwe zwa vhathu, vha shumela vhathu." 
Ezekiel44:12 Vhunga vho vha vha tshi ḓi vha shumela phanḓa ha midzimu yavho ya tshika, u ralo ha vha u dzhenisa vhathu vha Israele vhuvhini, ndi zwone, Nṋe ndi angaladza tshanḓa tshanga uri ndi vha rwe – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee; vho fanela u hwala muhwalo wa vhuvhi havho." 
Ezekiel44:13 A vha tsha ḓo dovha vha sendela tsini hanga vha ita mushumo wavho wa vhutshifhe kana vha kwama zwithu zwanga zwikhethwa na zwithu zwanga zwikhethwakhethwa; vho fanela u ambara ṱhoni dza mishumo yavho i nengisaho. 
Ezekiel44:14 Ndi ḓo vha ita vhashumi vha thembeleni vha ite zwoṱhe zwine zwa fanela u itwa henefho. 
Ezekiel44:15 “ ‘Huno vhotshifhe vha Vhalivi, vhana vha Tsadoko, vhe vha ntshumela fhethu hukhethwa musi vhaṅwe Vhaisraele vho mpfuralela, ndi vhone vhane vha ḓo sendela tsini hanga vha ntshumela; vha ḓo ima phanḓa hanga vha ṋekedza nduvho ya mapfura na malofha – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel44:16 Vhone vha ḓo dzhena fhethu hanga hukhethwa vha swika ḓafulani ḽanga vha ntshumela; vha ḓo ita mishumo yanga. 
Ezekiel44:17 Vha vhuya vha dzhena nga khoro dza muṱa wa ngomu, vha fanela u ambara zwiambaro zwa lukhaha. Vha songo ambara dza vhukuse musi vha tshi ntshumela ngomu ha khoro dza muṱa wa ngomu na thembeleni." 
Ezekiel44:18 Vha fanela u ambara miṅadzi ya lukhaha ṱhohoni, na zwiambaro zwa ngomu zwa lukhaha khunduni; vha songo vhofha bannda, vha sa ḓo bva biko." 
Ezekiel44:19 Musi vha tshi bvela vhathuni muṱani wa nnḓa, vha fanela u bvula zwiambaro zwe vha vha vha tshi ntshumela vho zwi ambara, vha zwi sie rumuni dza fhethu hukhethwa, vha ambare zwiṅwe zwiambaro, vha sa ḓo vhangela vhathu khombo nga zwiambaro zwikhethwa." 
Ezekiel44:20 “ ‘Vha songo palula ṱhoho dzavho, nahone vha songo litsha mavhudzi avho a tshi lapfesa; vha fanela u a tumelela lwo eḓanelaho." 
Ezekiel44:21 Hu songo vha na tshifhe ane a nwa waini musi une a dzhena muṱani wa nga ngomu. 
Ezekiel44:22 Vha songo vhinga tshilikadzi kana vhasadzi vho ṱalwaho, vha vhinge vhasidzana fhedzi vha lutsinga lwa Israele; hone naho zwo ralo vha nga ḓi vhinga tshilikadzi arali i tshilikadzi yo siwaho nga tshifhe." 
Ezekiel44:23 “ ‘Vha funze vhathu vhanga uri zwikhethwa na zwi si zwikhethwa ndi zwifhio, vha vha funze u ṱalukanya zwo kunaho na zwi songo kunaho." 
Ezekiel44:24 Vha vhe vhahaṱuli musi vhathu vho luṱana, vha haṱule vha tshi tevhedza milayo yanga; vha tevhedze milayo yanga na ndaela dzanga vhuṱamboni hoṱhe, Sabatha dzanga vha dzi ite khethwa." 
Ezekiel44:25 “ ‘Vha songo sendela tsini na mufu, vha sa ḓo kumala, hune vha tendelwa u ḓikumadza ndi musi mufu e khotsi kana mme kana ṅwana wavho kana mukomana kana murathu kana khaladzi a sa athu vhingwa." 
Ezekiel44:26 Musi muṅwe wavho o no kumululwa, hu range u fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili;" 
Ezekiel44:27 ndi hone musi une a dzhena fhethu hukhethwa, a tshi dzhena muṱani wa ngomu u ita pfanelo dzawe fhethu hukhethwa, u fanela u ṋekedza nduvho ya tshipfumelo – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel44:28 A vha nga vhi na shango; Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha ifa ḽavho. Ni songo vha ṋea shango kha ḽa Israele; Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha mukovhe wavho. 
Ezekiel44:29 Zwiḽiwa zwavho zwi ḓo vha nduvho ya thoro na tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo na tshiṱhavhelo tsha mulifho. Zwoṱhe kha ḽa Israele zwo ṋekedzwaho Nṋe zwi ḓo vha zwavho. 
Ezekiel44:30 Mitshelo yaṋu yoṱhe ya zwiranzhe i fhiraho yoṱhe, na tshakha dzoṱhe dza nduvho na zwoṱhe zwine na zwi ṋekedza, zwi ḓo vha zwa vhotshifhe, na mikonde i fhiraho yoṱhe ni i ṋee vhotshifhe, uri muṱani waṋu hu vhe na mashudu." 
Ezekiel44:31 Vhotshifhe vha songo vhuya vha ḽa nyamafu, kana phukha yo pondiwaho nga zwivhanda zwa ḓaka kana tshiṋoni tsho vhulawaho nga iṅwe phukha." 
Ezekiel45:1 “ ‘Musi ni tshi kovhekanya shango nga madeṅwa, ni kovhele Yahavee mukovhe mukhethwa wa shango: vhulapfu ḽi vhe maga a 25 000, u aṱama ḽi vhe maga a 20 000. Shango heḽo ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo vha ḽikhethwa." 
Ezekiel45:2 Shangoni ḽeneḽo hu vhe na fhethu ha vhulapfu ha maga a 500 na u aṱama ha maga a 500 ha thembele, ho tangwa nga tshikhala tsha vhuphara ha maga a 50." 
Ezekiel45:3 Henefho ni ele fhethu ha vhunavha ha maga a 25 000 na vhuphara ha maga a 10 000, hune ha ḓo ima thembele. Henefho ndi hukhethwakhethwa." 
Ezekiel45:4 Hafho ndi hone hune ha ḓo vha wone mukovhe mukhethwa wa shango; hu ḓo vha ha vhotshifhe vhane vha shuma thembeleni, vha sendela tsini ha Yahavee vha tshi mu shumela. Vha ḓo vha na nnḓu dzavho henefho na fhethu hukhethwa ho khethelwaho thembele." 
Ezekiel45:5 Tshipiḓa tsho salaho tsha vhulapfu ha maga a 25 000 na vhuphara ha maga a 10 000 tshi ḓo vha tsha Vhalivi vhane vha shumela thembele, hu vhe ha miḓi ine vha ḓo dzula khayo." 
Ezekiel45:6 Muḓi ni u siele fhethu hune ha vha na vhulapfu ha maga a 25 000 na vhuphara ha maga a 5 000, ho ṋekanaho masakha na tshipiḓa tsha ḽa thembele, afho hu ḓo vha ha vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele." 
Ezekiel45:7 “ ‘Muvhusi u fanela u vha na fhethu ho kanukanaho na tshipiḓa tsha fhethu hukhethwa na ho khethelwaho muḓi, ho fhandekanaho na shango ḽa fhethu hukhethwa na ḽa muḓi, u ela vhukovhela na vhubvaḓuvha ḽi ḓo eḓana na ḽa tsinde ḽithihi ḽa vhathu vha Israele." 
Ezekiel45:8 Hoyo u ḓo vha wone mukovhe wawe kha ḽa Israele; ndi hone vhavhusi vhanga vha si tsha ḓo kandeledza vhathu vhanga; shango ḽiṅwe vho fanela u ḽi siela vhathu vha Israele ḽa vha ḽa matsinde avho.’ ” 
Ezekiel45:9 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Inwi vhavhusi vha Israele, zwino no guma! Ni songo tsha huvhadza vhaṅwe, ni songo tsha vha ṱangula, itani zwi re zwone ni fulufhedzee, ni songo tsha thatha vhathu vhanga mukovheni wavho! Hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel45:10 Ivhani na mielo yone-yone na zwikalo zwone-zwone. 
Ezekiel45:11 Mielo ya vhukhopfu na ya maḓi nga i eḓane: homere ndi bathi dza fumi, ndi epha dza fumi. Mielo yoṱhe muteo wayo nga i vhe homere." 
Ezekiel45:12 Gera dza 20 ndi shekele dza 60, ndi mina nthihi." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Mitendelo ine na fanela u bvisa ngei: tshipiḓa tshithihi kha 60 tsha goroi na bali," 
Ezekiel45:14 tsha mapfura a miolivi ni bvise tsha ḓana. 
Ezekiel45:15 Ni bvise nngu nthihi kha 200. Ndi dzone nduvho dza thoro na zwiṱhavhelo zwi fhiswaho na nduvho dza vhukonani. Hezwo zwi ḓo vha zwone zwipfumelo zwaṋu – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee. 
Ezekiel45:16 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango vha bvise nduvho iyo i vhe ya muvhusi wa Israele. 
Ezekiel45:17 Muvhusi ene muṋe a vhone uri hu vhe na tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho na nduvho ya thoro na waini ya thevhula ya vhuṱambo na Ṅwedzi muswa na Dzisabatha na vhuṱamboni hoṱhe hune ha itwa nga vhathu vha Israele. O fanela u bvisa nduvho ya tshipfumelo na nduvho ya thoro na tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho na nduvho ya vhukonani tsha vha tshipfumelo tsha vhathu vha Israele.” 
Ezekiel45:18 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ri, “Nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga, ni dzhie mbohwana i si na luvhadzi, i kumulule thembele." 
Ezekiel45:19 Tshifhe u fanela u dzhia malofha a nduvho ya tshipfumelo a ḓodze mihangammbwa ya thembele na masia oṱhe maṋa a tombo ḽa aḽiṱari na mihangammbwa ya khoro ya muṱa wa ngomu. 
Ezekiel45:20 Ni dovhe ni ite nga u ralo nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili ḽa ṅwedzi ni tshi itela vhoṱhe vhe vha tshinya vha sa iti nga khole kana vha sa zwi ḓivhi. Hetsho tshi ḓo vha tshipfumelo tsha thembele. 
Ezekiel45:21 “Nga ḓuvha ḽa 14 ḽa ṅwedzi wa u ranga ni ite vhuṱambo ha Paseka. Hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ḽa mikonde ya vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa. 
Ezekiel45:22 Musi wonoyo, muvhusi a ṋekedze mboho i vhe tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo tsha u pfumelela ene muṋe na vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango." 
Ezekiel45:23 Maḓuvha hayo maṱanu na mavhili a vhuṱambo, ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a ṋekedze Yahavee tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tsha mboho ṱhanu na mbili na thutha ṱhanu na mbili dzi si na luvhadzi, musi muṅwe na muṅwe hu vhuye hu fhele vhege, na mbokoṱo nthihi musi muṅwe na muṅwe i vhe tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo." 
Ezekiel45:24 U ṋekedza nduvho ya epha nthihi na mboho iṅwe na iṅwe, na epha nthihi na thutha iṅwe na iṅwe, na litha nṋa dza mapfura na epha iṅwe na iṅwe, i vhe nduvho." 
Ezekiel45:25 “Vhuṱamboni vhune ha itwa nga ḓuvha ḽa 15 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili, u fanela u ita zwi fanaho na zwenezwo hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili, a ṋekedze nduvho ya tshipfumelo na tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho, na nduvho ya thoro na mapfura.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha ya muṱa wa ngomu i fanela u dzula yo valwa maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi ane vhathu vha shuma ngao. I vulwe nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha na nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo ha ṅwedzi u tshi dzula." 
Ezekiel46:2 Muvhusi a dzhene nga vanḓani ḽa khoro ya nnḓa a dzule tsini na mihangammbwa ya khoro. Vhotshifhe zwenezwo vha ṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tshawe tsha u fhiswa na nduvho yawe ya vhukonani. O fanela u luvha e kha tshiukhuvha tsha khoro, a konou bvela nnḓa; iyo khoro i songo tsha dovha ya valwa ḽi vhuye ḽi kovhele." 
Ezekiel46:3 Vhathu vha shango vha gwadame phanḓa ha Muṋe washu henefho muṋangoni wa khoro nga maḓuvha a Sabatha na nga maḓuvha a ṅwedzi u tshi dzula. 
Ezekiel46:4 Tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshine muvhusi a ṋekedza Yahavee nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha tshi vhe tsha ngwana ṱhanu na nthihi dzi si na luvhadzi na thutha i si na luvhadzi 
Ezekiel46:5 na nduvho ya thoro ya epha nthihi i ṋekedzwaho na iyo thutha na nduvho dza thoro dzine a tou funa dzi ṋekedzwaho na idzo ngwana, na litha nṋa dza mapfura a ṋekedzwaho na epha iṅwe na iṅwe." 
Ezekiel46:6 Musi wa vhuṱambo ha ṅwedzi u tshi dzula, tshiṱhavhelo tshi vhe mbohwana i si na luvhadzi na ngwana ṱhanu na nthihi dzi si na luvhadzi na thutha nthihi i si na luvhadzi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Mboho na thutha dzi ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya epha nthihi ya thoro, ngwana dzi ṋekedzwe na nduvho ya thoro ine a tou funa, epha iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na litha nṋa dza mapfura." 
Ezekiel46:8 “Musi muvhusi a tshi dzhena, a dzhene nga vanḓani ḽa khoro, a dovhe a bve nga nḓila yeneyo." 
Ezekiel46:9 Vhathu vha shango musi vhone vha tshi ḓa phanḓa ha Yahavee vhuṱamboni ho vhewaho, vho dzhenaho nga khoro ya devhula vha tshi ḓa u luvha, vha bve nga khoro ya tshipembe, vho dzhenaho nga khoro ya tshipembe vha bve nga khoro ya devhula. Hu songo vha na ane a humela murahu a bva nga khoro ye a dzhena ngayo, nga a bve nga ḽiṅwe sia." 
Ezekiel46:10 Muvhusi a ḓe navho, a dzhene unga vhone, a bve unga vhone." 
Ezekiel46:11 “Nga maḓuvha a vhuṱambo ho fhambanaho mboho iṅwe na iṅwe na thutha iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na epha nthihi ya thoro, ngwana i ṋekedzwe na zwine a tou funa; epha iṅwe na iṅwe i ṋekedzwe na litha nṋa dza mapfura." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Musi muvhusi a tshi ṋekedza tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho tshine a tou funa kana nduvho ya vhukonani ine a tou funa, a vulelwe khoro ya vhubvaḓuvha, a ṋekedze tshiṱhavhelo tshawe tshi fhiswaho na nduvho yawe ya vhukonani sa zwine a ita nga ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha; musi o no bva, khoro i mbo ḓi valwa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Musi muṅwe na muṅwe a nṋekedze ngwana i si na luvhadzi ya ṅwaha muthihi tshi vhe tshiṱhavhelo tshi fhiswaho; hetsho a tshi ṋekedze matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe. 
Ezekiel46:14 Matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe a engedze a ṋekedze nduvho ya thoro: khilogiramu tharu dza vhukhopfu ha goroi na litha nthihi ya mapfura, a vanganywe na vhukhopfu. Heyo ndi nduvho ya thoro i ṋekedzwaho Nṋe, hoyo ndi mulayo wa lini na lini, a u gumi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Ngwana na nduvho ya mbeu na mapfura zwi ṋekedzwe matsheloni maṅwe na maṅwe lini na lini.” 
Ezekiel46:16 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Arali muvhusi a ṋea muṅwe ṅwana wawe mukovhe wa shango ḽawe, iḽo shango ḽi ḓo vha ḽa onoyo ṅwana wawe, ḽa vha ifa ḽa muṱa wawe." 
Ezekiel46:17 Huno arali a ṋea muṅwe mushumi wawe mukovhe wa shango ḽawe, iḽo shango ḽi ḓo vha ḽa uyo munna u swika ṅwaha une a vhofhololwa ngawo, ḽa konou dovha ḽa humela ha muvhusi. Ndi vhana vhawe fhedzi vhane vha nga dzula na mukovhe wa vha wavho tshoṱhe." 
Ezekiel46:18 Muvhusi a songo dzhia na tshipiḓa zwatsho tsha mukovhe wa ifa ḽa vhathu, u ralo ha vha u vha dzhiela thundu yo vha fanelaho; ifa ḽine a ṋea vhana vhawe kha ḽi bve kha thundu yawe, uri hu si vhe na muthihi wa vhathu vhanga a no dzhielwa thundu yawe yo mu fanelaho, vhathu vha balangana na shango.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Uyo munna a nnzhia nda dzhena nga muṋango sia ḽa khoro ya devhula yo livhaho rumuni khethwa dzo fhaṱelwaho vhotshifhe. Henefho phanḓa hashu, sia ḽa vhukovhela, ho vha hu na tshikhala magumoni." 
Ezekiel46:20 Uyo munna a mmbudza a ri, “Hafha ndi hone hune vhotshifhe vha ḓo bika phukha dzo shidzhwaho dza tshiṱhavhelo tsha tshipfumelo na nduvho ya ndifho na nduvho ya thoro, vha si ṱwe vha tshi zwi hwalela muṱani wa nnḓa vha vhangela vhathu khombo nga vhukhethwa hazwo.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 A nnzhia a nnyisa muṱani wa nnḓa, a ntshimbidza khuḓani nṋa dzoṱhe; khuḓani iṅwe na iṅwe ya muṱa wa nnḓa ho vha hu na muṅwe muṱa muṱuku." 
Ezekiel46:22 Ndi uri khuḓa nṋa dza muṱa dzo vha dzi na miṱa miṱuku miṋa, vhunavha vhu tshi ita maga a 40, vhuphara ha ita maga a 30, vhuṋa hayo i tshi eḓana." 
Ezekiel46:23 Muṅwe na muṅwe wa iyo miṱa miṋa wo vha wo tangeledzwa nga mutsheṱo wa matombo, hu na zwivhaso hoṱhe u mona na tsinde ḽa mutsheṱo." 
Ezekiel46:24 Uyo munna a mmbudza a ri, “Hezwi ndi zwiṱanga zwine vhashumi vha thembele vha ḓo bika khazwo zwiṱhavhelo zwine zwa ṋekedzwa nga vhathu.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Uyo munna a dovha a nkhumisela muṋangoni wa thembele, nda vhona tshisima tsha maḓi a tshi bva nga fhasi ha tshiukhuvha tsha thembele a tshi ela a tshi ya vhubvaḓuvha, vhunga thembele yo vha yo lavhelesa vhubvaḓuvha. Maḓi o vha a tshi khou ela a tshi bva sia ḽa tshauḽa ḽa thembele, thungo ya tshipembe ya aḽiṱari." 
Ezekiel47:2 A mmvisela nnḓa nga khoro ya devhula a ntshimbidza u mona hoṱhe nnḓa u vhuya u swika khoroni ya vhubvaḓuvha ya nnḓa, nda wana maḓi a tshi khou ela a tshi bva hone, thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa tsha khoro." 
Ezekiel47:3 Uyo munna a livha vhubvaḓuvha o fara thambo yawe ya u ela ngayo, a ela maga a 1 000 u bva henefho, a konou nngwedza mulambo; maḓi o vha a tshi guma nga maṱo a milenzhe." 
Ezekiel47:4 A ela maṅwe maga a 1 000 u bva henefho, a dovha a nngwedza mulambo, nda wana maḓi a tshi guma nga magona anga. A ela maṅwe maga a 1 000 u bva henefho, a dovha a nngwedza mulambo, nda wana maḓi a tshi guma nga khundu dzanga." 
Ezekiel47:5 A ela maṅwe maga a 1 000 u bva henefho, zwino wo vha wo no vha mulambo une nda nga si kone u wela, uyo mulambo wo vha wo no hula, wo no vha na maḓi o tsaho, wo vha wo no vha mulambo une muthu a si kone u u wela." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi ri, “Iwe ṅwana wa muthu, u khou zwi vhona?” A mphirisela phanḓa, a kona u ntshimbidza a nkhumisela khunzikhunzini ya mulambo." 
Ezekiel47:7 Musi ndi tshi swika henefho nda vhona miri minzhi khunzikhunzini ino na iḽa ya mulambo. 
Ezekiel47:8 Uyo munna a ri, “Maḓi haya a ela a tshi ya vhubvaḓuvha a tshi tsela Govhani ḽa Jorodani, a swika Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo, a tshi ela a tshi dzhena lwanzheni a ḓifhisa maḓi alwo." 
Ezekiel47:9 Hoṱhe hune uyo mulambo wa ela, hu ḓo dzula zwisikwa zwi tshilaho zwa tshakha dzoṱhe zwi no tshatshama ngomu hawo. Khovhe dzi ḓo anda ngauri hoṱhe hune ayo maḓi a ela a ḓisa mutakalo, hoṱhe hune uyo mulambo wa ela hu ḓo tshatshama phukha dza tshakha-tshakha." 
Ezekiel47:10 “Hu ḓo vha na vharei vha khovhe khunzikhunzini. Mambule a u fasha khovhe a ḓo ṱharamudzwa u bva Engedi u swika Enigilaimi. Khovhe dzi ḓo vha dza tshakha dzo fhambanaho, dza dovha dza anda unga khovhe dza Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango." 
Ezekiel47:11 Hone maḓi a maṱafa na lunwenwe a nga si ḓifhiswe, a ḓo vha e fhethu hune ha wanala muṋo." 
Ezekiel47:12 U tsa na mulambo, khunzikhunzini ino na iḽa, hu ḓo mela miri ya mitshelo ya tshakha dzoṱhe, na maṱari ayo ha nga puti, a i nga fhidzi u aṋwa mitshelo; i ḓo aṋwa mitshelo miswa ṅwedzi muṅwe na muṅwe, ngauri maḓi ayo a bva thembeleni. Mitshelo yayo i ḓo ḽiwa, maṱari ayo a alafha vhathu.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu u ri, “Mikano ine matsinde a Israele a 12 a ḓo kovhekana mashango ngayo ngeino. Josefa u ḓo wana mikovhe mivhili." 
Ezekiel47:14 Noṱhe ni kovhekane nga u eḓana vhunga ndo anela vhokhotsi aṋu uri ndi ḓo vha ṋea shango heḽino ḽine zwino ḽa vha ifa ḽaṋu. 
Ezekiel47:15 Mukano wa shango ngouno. Thungo ya devhula u thoma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango wa fhira nga Hetheloni, Tsedada, Hamathi," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berothai, Sibiraimi vhukati ha shango ḽa Damasko na ḽa Hamathi, u swika na Hasere Hathikhoni mukanoni wa Haurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Mukano u ḓo thoma Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango wa swika Hasere Enoni, u tshi tshimbila na mukano wa Damasko u ya devhula hawo na mukano wa Hamathi thungo ya devhula. Hoyo u ḓo vha mukano wa thungo ya devhula." 
Ezekiel47:18 Thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha mulambo wa Jorodani u ḓo vha wone mukano vhukati ha Haurani na Damasko, na vhukati ha Giliadi na shango ḽa Israele, u tsela Lwanzheni lwa Muṋo u vhuya u swika Thamara. Hoyo u ḓo vha wone mukano wa thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha." 
Ezekiel47:19 Thungo ya tshipembe, u bva Thamara u livha tshipembe u ya maḓini a Miriba na Kadeshe u ya Mulamboni wa Egipita na Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango. Uyo u ḓo vha wone mukano wa thungo ya tshipembe." 
Ezekiel47:20 Thungo ya vhukovhela Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango lu ḓo vha lwone mukano u vhuya u swika u livhana na Phara ya Hamathi. Uyo u ḓo vha wone mukano wa thungo ya vhukovhela. 
Ezekiel47:21 Ni kovhekane iḽo shango, hu kovhekane matsinde a Israele." 
Ezekiel47:22 Ni kovhekane ḽi vhe ifa ḽaṋu na ḽa vhatsinda vhe na dzula navho vha vhuya vha beba vhana, vhunga no fanela u vha fara sa vhadzulapo vha Israele. Na vhone vha wane mikovhe na inwi ḽi vhe ifa ḽavho, vha kovhekane na matsinde a Israele." 
Ezekiel47:23 Ni ṋee mutsinda ifa ḽawe henefho kha tsinde ḽa vhathu vhane a dzula navho – hu amba Nṋe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee.” 
Ezekiel48:1 Thungo ya devhula mukano u ṱuwa nga Hetheloni na Pharani ya Hamathi u swika Hesere Enoni. Henefho shango ḽo ṋekana masakha na ḽa Damasko na Hamathi. Vha tsinde ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe vha ḓo wana shango ḽine ḽa thoma nga Lwanzhe lwa Phandamashango thungo ya vhukovhela, ḽa guma nga mukano wa vhubvaḓuvha, matsinde a vhathu a tshi tevhekana nga nḓila hei u bva devhula u ya tshipembe: Dani, Ashere, Nafuthali, Manase, Efraimi, Rubeni, Juda." 
Ezekiel48:2  
Ezekiel48:3  
Ezekiel48:4  
Ezekiel48:5  
Ezekiel48:6  
Ezekiel48:7  
Ezekiel48:8 “Thungo ya tshipembe ya mukovhe wa Juda, u thoma mukanoni wa vhubvaḓuvha u swika mukanoni wa vhukovhela, ndi mukovhe une na fanela u u sia, ndi maga a 25 000 u aṱama, vhunavha vhu tshi ḓi eḓana na ha mikovhe miṅwe, muthihi nga muthihi u thoma mukanoni wa vhubvaḓuvha u swika mukanoni wa vhukovhela, thembele ya vha vhukati ha wonoyo mukovhe." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Mukovhe une na fanela u u siela Nṋe Yahavee u vhe maga a 25 000 vhunavha na maga a 10 000 u aṱama. 
Ezekiel48:10 Mukovhe mukhethwa u vhe wa vhotshifhe, thungo ya devhula u vhe maga a 25 000, thungo ya vhukovhela u vhe maga a 10 000 u aṱama, thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha a vhe maga a 10 000 u aṱama, thungo ya tshipembe a vhe maga a 25 000 u navha, thembele i vhe vhukati hao. U ḓo vha mukovhe mukhethwa u nge ndi nduvho yo ṋekedzwaho Nṋe." 
Ezekiel48:11 Hafho hu vhe ha vhotshifhe vhakhethwa, vhana vha Tsadoko vhe vha ntshumela vha tshi fulufhedzea, zwiḽa vhaṅwe Vhaisraele na Vhalivi vha tshi ntshandukela, vhone vha si ntshandukele." 
Ezekiel48:12 Zwenezwo vha ḓo ṋewa mukovhe wavho kha mukovhe mukhethwa wo ṋekanaho masakha na wa Vhalivi, wone wa tou vha mukhethwakhethwa." 
Ezekiel48:13 Shango ḽa Vhalivi ḽi ḓo ṋekana masakha na ḽa vhotshifhe; vhunavha haḽo ho fanela u vha maga a 25 000, vhuphara ḽi vhe maga a 10 000 – vhunavha hoṱhe vhu vhe 25 000, vhuphara vhu vhe 10 000." 
Ezekiel48:14 Vha songo vhuya vha rengisa kupiḓa kwaḽo na kuthihi kana vha renganyisa kuṅwe, nahone iḽo shango ḽi songo ṋewa muṅwe, vhunga ḽi ḽikhethwa, ndi ḽanga." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Shango ḽo salaho ḽone, tshipiḓa tsha vhunavha ha maga a 25 000 na vhuphara ha maga a 5 000, iḽo ndi ḽa vhathu vha muḓi ḽa dzinnḓu na pfulo. Muḓi u fhaṱwe vhukati haḽo." 
Ezekiel48:16 Mielo yaḽo ngeino: thungo dzoṱhe, devhula na tshipembe na vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela, ḽi vhe maga a 4 500." 
Ezekiel48:17 Thungo dzoṱhe u mona na muḓi, devhula, tshipembe, vhubvaḓuvha, vhukovhela, hu vhe na tshikhala tshi sa fhaṱwi nnḓu tsha maga a 250 u aṱama." 
Ezekiel48:18 Luvhedzhegu luthihi lwa shango ḽo salaho, lwo ṋekanaho masakha na shango ḽikhethwa, lu tshi lapfa naḽo, lu sale, lu vhe maga a 10 000 u ya vhubvaḓuvha, maga a 10 000 u ya vhukovhela, lu tshi navha na shango ḽikhethwa; hafho hu ḓo liṅwa zwiḽiwa zwa vha no shumela muḓi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Vhathu havho vha no shumela muḓi vho fanela u bva kha matsinde oṱhe a Israele. 
Ezekiel48:20 “Mukovhe hoyo wo khethelwaho thungo u vhe fhethu ha maga a 25 000 masia oṱhe. Ni ḓo u kumedza Nṋe wa nga ndi nduvho khethwa. Na muḓi u vhe ngomu. 
Ezekiel48:21 Tshipiḓa tsho salaho thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela ya mukovhe mukhethwa hu re na thembele na muḓi na mukovhe wa Vhalivi, itsho ndi tsha muvhusi. Tshi guma nga mukano wa vhubvaḓuvha wa shango, vhukovhela tshi guma nga lwanzhe; tshi vhukati ha shango ḽa Juda na ḽa Benyamini." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 “Matsinde a vhathu o salaho oṱhe a ḓo wana mukovhe une wa ḓo bva mukanoni wa vhubvaḓuvha wa guma nga lwanzhe thungo ya vhukovhela. Nga u tevhekana u bva kha mukovhe mukhethwa u ṱutshela tshipembe ndi wa Benyamini," 
Ezekiel48:24 Simioni," 
Ezekiel48:25 Isakhara," 
Ezekiel48:26 Zebuloni," 
Ezekiel48:27 Gadi. 
Ezekiel48:28 Masakha a Gadi a thungo ya tshipembe a fhira nga Thamara na maḓini a Miriba-Kadeshe u vhuya u swika Mulamboni wa Egipita, a tsa na mulambo u swika Lwanzheni lwa Phandamashango." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ni fanela u kovhekana shango nga u ralo ḽi vhe ifa ḽa matsinde a Israele, heyo i vhe mikovhe yavho – hu amba Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Miṋango i no bva muḓini ngei. Thungo ya devhula, hu ḓo vha maga a 4 500 u navha," 
Ezekiel48:31 ha vha na khoro tharu: khoro ya Rubeni, khoro ya Juda, khoro ya Livi. Khoro dza muḓi dzi ḓo vhidzwa nga madzina a matsinde a Israele." 
Ezekiel48:32 Thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha, hu ḓo vha na maga a 4 500 u navha, ha vha na khoro tharu: khoro ya Josefa, khoro ya Benyamini, khoro ya Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Thungo ya tshipembe, hu ḓo vha maga a 4 500 u navha, ha vha na khoro tharu: khoro ya Simioni, khoro ya Isakhara, khoro ya Zebuloni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Thungo ya vhukovhela, hu ḓo vha maga a 4 500 u navha, ha vha na khoro tharu: khoro ya Gadi, khoro ya Ashere, khoro ya Nafuthali." 
Ezekiel48:35 U mona hoṱhe hu ḓo vha maga a 18 000. Dzina ḽa muḓi u bva musi wonoyo ḽi ḓo pfi: Muṋe-washu-u-hone.” 
Daniel1:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuraru wa muvhuso wa Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda, Nebukhadnetsara khosi ya Babele a ya Jerusalema a u govhela." 
Daniel1:2 Muṋe washu a mu kumedza Jehoyakimu khosi ya Juda khathihi na iṅwe thundu ya thembele ya Mudzimu. A dzi hwala a dzi isa shangoni ḽa Shinari, a vhea iyo midzio mikhethwa thembeleni ya midzimu yawe hune ha khokhwa lupfumo." 
Daniel1:3 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza Ashphenasi, ḽone gota ḽawe ḽihulwane, uri a nange vhaṅwe vhaṱhanngana vha Vhaisraele vhane vha bva muṱani wa musanda kana vhana vha vhaḓivhalea," 
Daniel1:4 vhaṱhanngana vha si vhahoṱa, vho nakaho, vha no kona u ṱalukanya zwa vhuṱali hoṱhe, vha re na nḓivho, vhane vha ṱavhanya u ṱalukanya, vho fanelaho u shuma pfamoni ya musanda. Uyo Ashphenasi a dovha a pfi a vha funze luambo lwa Vhakhaladia na maṅwalo avho." 
Daniel1:5 Khosi ya ri vha ṋewe zwiḽiwa zwa nga misi na waini zwi bvaho ḓafulani ḽa musanda. Ha pfi vha aluswe vha funzwe hu vhuye hu fhele miṅwaha miraru, vhó no fhedza vha konou dzhena mushumoni wa musanda." 
Daniel1:6 Vhukati havho ho vha hu na Daniele na Hanania na Mishaele na Azaria; vhenevho vho vha vhe vha tsinde ḽa Juda. 
Daniel1:7 Iḽo gota ḽa vha ira maṅwe madzina, Daniele a pfi Beletheshatsara, Hanania a pfi Shadraka, Mishaele a pfi Mishaka, Azaria a pfi Abedenego." 
Daniel1:8 Daniele o vha o vhofha ḽa uri ha nga ḓishati tshika nga zwiḽiwa na waini zwi bvaho ḓafulani ḽa musanda, ndi zwe a humbela iḽo gota ḽihulwane uri a ḓiilise zwone." 
Daniel1:9 Mudzimu a ita uri iḽo gota ḽihulwane ḽi itele Daniele vhuthu ḽi mu khathutshele. 
Daniel1:10 Hone a vhudza Daniele a ri, “Ndi ofha khosi muṋe wanga: o amba zwine na fanela u zwi ḽa na zwine na fanela u zwi nwa, zwino arali a vhona khofheni haṋu ho onda hu sa ngi ha vhaṅwe vhaṱhanngana vha murole waṋu? Khosi i ḓo ntumula ṱhoho nga mulandu waṋu.”" 
Daniel1:11 Daniele a tshi pfa zwenezwo a amba na mulindi we gota ḽihulwane ḽa ri a lange Daniele na Hanania na Mishaele na Azaria, a ri," 
Daniel1:12 “A vha ri lingi zwavho maḓuvha a fumi, maḓuvha eneo vha ri fhe muroho na maḓi fhedzi tshi vhe tshone tshiḽiwa tshashu?" 
Daniel1:13 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo kona u vhambedza khofheni hashu na ha vhaṱhanngana vhane vha ḽa zwiḽiwa zwa musanda, vha ḓo konou ita nga hune vha vhona.”" 
Daniel1:14 Uyo munna a tenda u ita zwe vha mu humbela, a vha linga maḓuvha a fumi." 
Daniel1:15 Musi maḓuvha a fumi o no fhela vha sedzea vho takala u fhira vhaṱhanngana vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi ḽa zwi bvaho ḓafulani ḽa musanda. 
Daniel1:16 Ndi hone mulindi a si tsha vha ṋea zwiḽiwa zwe vha pfi vha ṋewe na waini ye vha pfi vha i nwe, a vha ṋea miroho." 
Daniel1:17 Avho vhaṱhanngana vhaṋa Mudzimu a vha ṋea nḓivho na ṱhalukanyo ya zwoṱhe zwa maṅwalwa na zwa vhuṱali, Daniele a dovha a ṋewa na mpho ya u kona u ṱalutshedza mabono oṱhe na miloro." 
Daniel1:18 Musi tshifhinga tsho vhewaho nga khosi tsho no fhela, gota ḽihulwane ḽa vha isa ha Nebukhadnetsara." 
Daniel1:19 Khosi ya amba navho, a wana kha vhaṱhanngana vhoṱhe hu si na ane a nga eḓanyiswa na Daniele na Hanania na Mishaele na Azaria. U bva zwenezwo vha shumela khosi musanda." 
Daniel1:20 Kha mafhungo oṱhe a zwa vhuṱali na zwa ṱhalukanyo zwe a vha a tshi vha vhudzisa o wana vha tshi fhira vhadziamanditi na vhabvumbi vha re muvhusoni wawe woṱhe kafumi. 
Daniel1:21 Daniele o dzula henefho u swika ṅwaha wa u thoma wa muvhuso wa khosi Khoreshe. 
Daniel2:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Nebukhadnetsara, Nebukhadnetsara a lora miloro; mbilu yawe ya pfa u vhavha, a si tsha fara na khofhe." 
Daniel2:2 Khosi ya vhidzisa vhadziamanditi na vhabvumbi na mingome na vhaḓivhi vha zwa dziṋaledzi uri vha mu vhudze zwine miloro yawe ya amba. Vha swika vha ima phanḓa ha khosi. 
Daniel2:3 Khosi ya vha vhudza ya ri, “Ndo lora muloro, mbilu yanga i a vhavha, ndi funa u ḓivha zwine uyo muloro wa amba.”" 
Daniel2:4 Vha vhuṱali vha fhindula khosi vha ri, “Ngavhe thovhela a tshi lalama! Nga vha ri vhudze uyo muloro, ri konou vha ṱalutshedza zwine wa amba.”" 
Daniel2:5 Khosi ya fhindula Vhakhaladia ya ri, “Zwe nda khwaṱhisa ngezwi: Arali na sa mmbudza zwe nda lora, na si nṱalutshedze uri zwi amba mini, ndi ḓo ita uri ni paḓukanywe miraḓo, nnḓu dzaṋu dzi thuthwe hu sale matumba." 
Daniel2:6 Huno arali na mmbudza zwe nda lora, na nṱalutshedza uri zwi amba mini, ndi ḓo ni ṋea zwifhiwa na pfufho nda ni hulisa zwihulu. Zwino-ha mmbudzeni zwe nda lora na uri zwi amba mini.”" 
Daniel2:7 Vhone vha dovha vha ri, “Thovhele nga vha ri vhudze zwe vha lora, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo kona u vha ṱalutshedza.”" 
Daniel2:8 Huno khosi ya fhindula ya ri, “Ndi khou zwi vhona uri ni khou ntikisa luwa, nga u ḓivha uri zwe nda amba ndo khwaṱhisa:" 
Daniel2:9 na sa mmbudza zwe nda lora, ṱhamu ndi nthihi. Hone inwi no langana u mmbudza zwithu zwi xedzaho zwo vhifhaho ngeno ni tshi khou ntikisa luwa. Zwino-ha mmbudzeni zwe nda lora, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo kona u ḓivha arali ni tshi kona u zwi ṱalutshedza kana ni sa koni.”" 
Daniel2:10 Vhakhaladia vha fhindula khosi vha ri, “A hu na na muthu na muthihi shangoni ḽoṱhe ane a nga ṱalutshedza zwine thovhele vha zwi ṱoḓa; a hu na na khosi na nthihi, naho e na vhuhulwane na maanḓa mangafhani, we a vhuya a vhudzisa vhadziamanditi kana vhabvumbi kana Vhakhaladia mbudziso yo raloho." 
Daniel2:11 Mbudziso ine thovhele vha vhudzisa i a konḓa, a hu na ane a nga kona u fhindula thovhele, arali i si midzumi, i sa dzuli na vhathu vha ṋama.”" 
Daniel2:12 Khosi i tshi pfa zwenezwo a sinyuwa a tou halifha, a ri vhaṱali vhoṱhe vha Babele vha vhulawe." 
Daniel2:13 Musi hu tshi vhewa mulayo wa uri vhaṱali vha vhulawe, ha ruṅwa vhathu vha yo londa na Daniele na khonani dzawe uri vha vhulawe." 
Daniel2:14 Huno musi Ariokho mulangammbi wa u linda khosi a tshi bva a tshi yo vhulaha vhaṱali vha Babele, Daniele a ya khae a amba nae nga maipfi a vhuṱali, a ṱhalukanyo." 
Daniel2:15 Daniele a vhudzisa Ariokho a ri, “Ndi mini khosi yo vhofha zwa tshiṱuhu tshingafhangafha?” Ariokho a ṱalutshedza Daniele ayo mafhungo," 
Daniel2:16 Daniele a konou ya ha khosi a humbela uri a thome u wana tshifhinga tsha u dzumbululela khosi zwine muloro wa amba. 
Daniel2:17 Ndi hone Daniele a tshi ya hayani a yo vhudza khonani dzawe Hanania na Mishaele na Azaria zwe zwa itea," 
Daniel2:18 a vha ṱuṱuwedza uri vha humbele Mudzimu wa makoleni a sumbedze khathutshelo yawe kha mafhungo ayo a tshiphiri, uri Daniele na khonani dzawe vha si vhulawe na vhaṅwe vhaṱali vha Babele." 
Daniel2:19 Itsho tshiphiri tsha dzumbululelwa Daniele kha bono vhusiku; Daniele a renda Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu 
Daniel2:20 a ri, “Dzina ḽa Mudzimu nga ḽi rendwe lini na lini! Vhuṱali na maanḓa ndi zwawe e eṱhe." 
Daniel2:21 A no langa kutshimbilele kwa tshifhinga na khalaṅwaha, ndi Ene; u vhumba mahosi a a sudzulusa, vhaṱali ndi Ene a vha ṋeaho vhuṱali, vha re na ṱhalukanyo ndi Ene a no vha ṋea nḓivho." 
Daniel2:22 Ndi Ene a no dzumbulula zwo dzumbamaho na zwiphiri, u ḓivha zwo dzumbamaho swiswini; u dzula tshedzani." 
Daniel2:23 Iwe Mudzimu wa vhokhotsi anga ndi a u livhuha, ndi a u renda zwe wa nṋea vhuṱali na maanḓa. Zwino wo ntsumbedza zwe ra u humbela, wo ri dzumbululela zwi dinaho khosi.”" 
Daniel2:24 Ndi hone Daniele a tshi ya ha Ariokho, we a vhewa nga khosi uri a vhulahe vhaṱali vha Babele, a mu vhudza a ri, “Vha songo vhulaha vhaṱali vha Babele. Nga vha ntswikise ha thovhele, ndi ḓo ṱalutshedza thovhele zwine muloro wa amba.”" 
Daniel2:25 Ariokho a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya a swikisa Daniele ha thovhele, a ri, “Kha mathubwa a no bva Juda ndo wana munna ane a nga kona u ṱalutshedza thovhele zwine muloro wa amba.”" 
Daniel2:26 Khosi ya amba na Daniele (we a vha a tshi pfi Beletheshatsara) ya ri, “Ni nga mmbudza zwe nda lora na uri zwi amba mini naa?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniele a lavhelesana na khosi a fhindula a ri, “A hu na na muṱali na muthihi kana mubvumbi kana mudziamanditi kana mungome we a kona u vhudza thovhele ngoho ya tshiphiri tshe thovhele a vhudzisa," 
Daniel2:28 hone hu na Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu ane a dzumbulula zwiphiri, ndi Ene o sumbedzaho khosi Nebukhadnetsara zwine zwa ḓo itea misi i ḓaho. Zwino-ha muloro na mabono zwe vha zwi vhona vho fama vhulaloni ngezwi:" 
Daniel2:29 Musi thovhele vho fuma vhulaloni havho, mihumbulo yavho ya vhona zwine zwa kha ḓi ḓo itea, Mudzumbululi wa zwiphiri o vha sumbedza zwine zwa ḓo itea." 
Daniel2:30 Tshiphiri itsho tshó dzumbululelwa nṋe, a si uri ndo ṱalifha u fhira vhathu vhoṱhe, zwo itelwa uri thovhele vha ḓivhe ṱhalutshedzo yazwo, vha ṱalukanye zwine vha elekanya mbiluni." 
Daniel2:31 Thovhele vho vhona bono, zwe vha zwi vhona ngezwi: ndi tshifanyiso tsho vhumbwaho, tshifanyiso tshihulu tshi no penya lwa u kalula, tshó ima phanḓa havho, tsha tou ofhisa muthu a tshi tshi vhona." 
Daniel2:32 Ṱhoho ya itsho tshifanyiso yo vha i ya musuku wavhuḓi, khana na zwishasha zwi siliva, tshiḽelo na zwirumbi zwi musinaseṱha," 
Daniel2:33 milenzhe i ya tsimbi, ṋayo dzi tsimbi yo vanganaho na vumba." 
Daniel2:34 Musi vha tshee vho sedza, ha kunguluwa tombo ḽi songo kwamiwa nga tshanḓa, ḽa rwa tshiḽa tshifanyiso kha ṋayo dza tsimbi yo vanganaho na vumba ya dzi kuekanya." 
Daniel2:35 Ndi hone tsimbi yo vanganaho na vumba, na musinaseṱha, na siliva, na musuku, zwoṱhe zwi tshi pwashea zwa tou kuekanywa zwa nga mungu u luvhanḓeni lwa u fhulela tshilimo. Muya wa zwi vhudzulela kule, ha sala hu si tsha vhonala tshithu. Tombo ḽiḽa ḽe ḽa rwa tshiḽa tshifanyiso ḽa aluwa ḽa vha thavha khulu, ya ḓadza ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Daniel2:36 Hoyo ndi wone muloro, zwino ri ḓo ṱalutshedza thovhele zwine wa amba." 
Daniel2:37 “Thovhele ndi vhone khosi ya mahosi, Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu o vha ṋea muvhuso na nungo na maanḓa na vhugala," 
Daniel2:38 a ita uri vha lange vhathu na phukha dza shango na zwiṋoni zwi fhufhaho, hoṱhe hune zwa dzula hone, a zwi kumedza vhone, a vha ita khosi yazwo zwoṱhe. Vhone ndi vhone heyo ṱhoho ya musuku." 
Daniel2:39 Vhone vha ḓo ri u fhedza u vhusa ha vuwa muṅwe muvhuso, wone a u nga vhi na bvumo ḽi no nga ḽa wavho, ha dovha ha vha na wa vhuraru, wa musinaseṱha; wonoyo u ḓo vhusa shango ḽoṱhe." 
Daniel2:40 Hu ḓo vha na muvhuso wa vhuṋa wo khwaṱhaho unga tsimbi, ngauri yone i pwashekanya ya kuya zwoṱhe. Zwino unga tsimbi i tshi pwashekanya zwoṱhe, na wone u ḓo pwasha wa kuekanya mivhuso yoṱhe ya u ranga." 
Daniel2:41 Ṋayo na zwikunwe dze vha dzi vhona dza vumba ḽo vanganaho na tsimbi, ndi muvhuso une wa ḓo fhandekana wa vha zwipiḓa zwipiḓa; hone u ḓo ḓi vha na u khwaṱha ha tsimbi sa zwenezwo, sa zwe vha vhona vumba ḽo vangana na tsimbi." 
Daniel2:42 Ṋayo na zwikunwe í tsimbi yo vanganaho na vumba, zwi amba uri muvhuso wa hone u ḓo khwaṱha nga ḽiṅwe sia, nga ḽiṅwe wa tseka." 
Daniel2:43 Vhunga vho vhona tsimbi yo vangana na vumba, zwenezwo izwo zwivhili zwi ḓo vangana nga u dzetshelana ha vhathu, hone a zwi nga nambatelani, unga na tsimbi i sa nambatelani na vumba." 
Daniel2:44 “Misi ya mahosi eneo Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu u ḓo vusa muvhuso une wa sa ḓo phusukana, muvhuso hoyo a u nga dzhiwi nga luṅwe lushaka: u ḓo phusukanya mivhuso yoṱhe ya u ranga wa i mila, wone wa ima lini na lini," 
Daniel2:45 sa zwe vha vhona tombo ḽi songo kwamiwaho nga tshanḓa ḽi tshi kunguluwa ḽi tshi bva thavhani ḽa pwashekanya tsimbi na musinaseṱha na vumba na siliva na musuku. Mudzimu muhulu o sumbedza thovhele zwine zwa ḓo itea misi i ḓaho. Muloro uyo ndi wa ngoho, ṱhalutshedzo ndi yone-yone.”"
