Habakkuk2:5 “Vhukuma muthu wa u ḓihudza a sa pfeleli u ḓo fhurwa nga lupfumo. U na tseḓa i no nga ya tshalo, u nga lufu, ha fushei u ḓikuvhanganyela tshakha dzoṱhe, vhathu vhoṱhe u vha ita mathubwa." 
Habakkuk2:6 Zwenezwo vha ḓo mu goḓa vhoṱhe, vha mu kolela vha mu holedza vha ri, ‘U ḓo zwi vhona hoyu ane a khokha thundu ye a tswa, a pfuma nga u lifhisa vhathu milandu! Zwi ḓo guma zwenezwino!’" 
Habakkuk2:7 Vho ḽaho milandu yau vha ḓo u vutshela kathihi fhedzi. Vha ḓo u vutshela ha vho tetemela iwe nga nyofho, vha mbo ḓi u ṱangula na zwenezwo." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ndi uri wo ṱangula tshakha nnzhi, ndi zwone, vhathu vho salaho vha ḓo ṱangula iwe; ngauri wo shulula malofha a vhathu, wa phusukanya mashango na miḓi wa lozwa vhoṱhe vha dzulaho hone." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Khombo i ḓo u wela, ngauri wo ḓipfumisa nga thundu ye wa i wana nga vhuvemu, wa fhaṱa tshiṱaha tshau nṱha uri u tinye tshanḓa tshi ḓisaho khombo! Thundu yeneyo i ḓo ḓisela muṱa wau khombo." 
Habakkuk2:10 Vhunwa he wa vhu luka ho ḓisa ṱhoni muṱani wau; wo huvhadza tshakha nnzhi, u ralo ha vha u ḓilozwa." 
Habakkuk2:11 Matombo a mitsheṱo na one a ḓo ṱavha mukosi, matanda a humisa uyo mukosi." 
Habakkuk2:12 “Khombo i ḓo u wela ngauri wo fhaṱa muḓi nga u shulula malofha, wa tea ḓorobo nga vhugevhenga!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Kani-ha zwe vhathu vha shuma zwi tshi fhedza nga u swa nga mulilo, zwe tshakha dza ḓinetisela, zwa sala zwi si tshithu, a si Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe we a ri kha zwi ralo naa?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Shango ḽi ḓo ḓala nḓivho ya vhugala ha Muṋe washu zwa nga lwanzhe lwo ḓala maḓi. 
Habakkuk2:15 “Khombo i ḓo u wela ngauri wo nwisa dziṅwe tshakha khavho yo ḓalaho vhuhali vhu kambaho, uri u kone u vha vhonela." 
Habakkuk2:16 A u tsha ḓo vha na vhugala, tshau dzi ḓo vha ṱhoni. Zwino ndi tshifhinga tshau! Inwa u pepeleke! Tshinwelo tshi no bva tshanḓani tsha maanḓa tsha Yahavee tshi ḓo mona tsha vhuya tsha swika ha iwe, vhugala hau vhu vho ḓo tibwa nga ṱhoni." 
Habakkuk2:17 Wo rema miri ya Libanoni, zwino hu ḓo reṅwa iwe, wo vhulaha dziphukha, zwino dzi vho ḓo u pandamedza. Wo shulula malofha a vhathu, wo phusukanya mashango na miḓi, wa lozwa vhoṱhe vha dzulaho henefho." 
Habakkuk2:18 “Mudzimu wa tshitungulo u na mushumo-ḓe? Hufha wo vhaḓwa nga muthu! Ndi tshifanyiso, tshi gudisa vhathu vhufhura fhedzi. Muthu zwi mu farisani a tshi fulufhela tshithu tshe a vhaḓa nga zwanḓa zwawe? Hufha o ita mudzimu u sa tshidzi, na u amba u sa ambi?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Khombo i ḓo wela muthu ane a vhudza tshitanda a ri, ‘Vuwa!’ Kana a vhudza tombo ḽi sa ambi a ri, ‘Takuwa!’ Ḽi nga u dzumbululela mini? Naho ḽo fhomiwa nga musuku na siliva, a ḽi nga vhuyi ḽa fema." 
Habakkuk2:20 Hone Muṋe washu u thembeleni yawe khethwa, ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽi tou tshete phanḓa hawe.”" 
Habakkuk3:1 Iyi ndi thabelo ya muporofita Habakuku. I imbiwa sa luimbo lwa tshililo. 
Habakkuk3:2 Muṋe washu, ndo pfa zwa bvumo ḽau, mishumo yau i a nnyofhisa Muṋe washu. Dovha u ite mishumo yeneyo misi ino yashu, i dzumbulule tshifhinga tshino tshashu. Naho wa sinyuwa u elelwe u khathutshela." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mudzimu u khou ḓa a tshi bva Themana, Mukhethwa u khou ḓa a tshi bva Thavhani ya Pharani. Vhugala hawe vhu tiba ḽiṱaḓulu, ḽifhasi ḽo ḓala lupenyo lwawe." 
Habakkuk3:4 Vhugala hawe vhu penya unga ḓuvha ḽi tshi bva, zwanḓani zwawe hu bva maṱalazaza, lupenyo lwawe lu nga mapfuvhi." 
Habakkuk3:5 U rangwa phanḓa nga dwadze, a tevhelwa nga lufu." 
Habakkuk3:6 A tshi takuwa, ḽifhasi ḽi a dzinginyea, a tshi ri hali tshakha dzi a tetemela nga nyofho. Thavha dza kale-kale dzi a wa, mivhundu i a mbombomela. Ndo vhona a tshi bva u yo lifhedza vhuvhi, zwe a ḓi ita tsha kale na kale. Dennde dza Khushani dza dzinginyea, khathihi na seila dza dennde dza Midiani." 
Habakkuk3:7  
Habakkuk3:8 Muṋe washu, wo sinyutshela milambo naa? Wo sinyuswa nga lwanzhe naa, u tshi ḓa wó pana bere dzau, wó namela gariki yau ya nndwa i no kunda maswina." 
Habakkuk3:9 U bvisa vhura hau kathihi fhedzi, wa teketela maswina a welwa nga phanzi. U fhandula ḽifhasi ha phulea milambo," 
Habakkuk3:10 dzithavha dzi tshi u vhona dzi a tetemela nga nyofho, ya na i tshi ngindii, ngindii, ḓuvha ngei ṱaḓulu ḽa imisa zwanḓa." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ḓuvha na ṅwedzi zwi dzula nḓuni dzazwo ngei ṱaḓulu, zwi tshi tinya u penya ha misevhe yau, na mafumo au a tshi vhaimedza." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wo buḓekanya ḽifhasi nga mbiti, wa kandekanya dzitshakha wo sinyuwa." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wo bva wa yo lamulela vhathu vhau, u tshi yo tshidza khosi ye wa ta. Wo pwasha ṱhoho ya muvhi, wa ṱangula miteo ya nnḓu yawe u swika kha tombo." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wo teketela vhalangammbi vhawe musi yo ṱangana. Vho vha vha tshi ḓi ri tshoṱhela, vha tshi ri vha ḓo ri balanganya, hone u ḓihudza havho ha sala hu si tshithu, vhoṱhe vha khotha vha yo dzumbama." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wo kandekanya bere dzavho maḓini mahulu a fhufhumaho. 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndo ri u zwi pfa, mbilu yanga ya tou sinḓa, milomo yanga ya tetemela ndi tshi zwi pfa, marambo anga a thoma u oma, milenzhe yanga ya tetemela. Ndi tou gomela musi wa khombo, ndi tshi humbula zwo livhaho vha no khou ri tshoṱhela." 
Habakkuk3:17 Naho muhuyu u sa kulukushi, munḓirivhe u sa aṋwi mitshelo, muolivi u sa vhibvisi tshithu, masimu a si na zwiḽiwa, nngu dzi sa tsha vha hone, madanga a kholomo a sala a si na tshithu," 
Habakkuk3:18 nṋe ndi ḓo ḓi takalela Muṋe washu, ndi ḓo pembelela Mudzimu Mutshidzi wanga." 
Habakkuk3:19 Muṋe washu Muṋe wa zwoṱhe ndi Ene maanḓa anga, u ita uri milenzhe yanga i leluwe unga ya phala, u ita uri ndi kone u gonya zwivhanga. (Lwo sikelwa malogwane. Lu imbiwa hu tshi lidzwa tshilidzo tsha thale.)" 
Zephaniah1:1 Heḽi ndi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽe a amba na Tsefania ṅwana wa Khushi, ṅwana wa Gedalia, ṅwana wa Amaria, ṅwana wa Hiskia, musi hu tshi vhusa Josiasi ṅwana wa Amoni, khosi ya Juda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Muṋe washu o ri, “Zwithu zwoṱhe zwi re shangoni ndi ḓo zwi swielela kule." 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndi ḓo swiela vhathu na dziphukha na zwiṋoni na khovhe dzi re lwanzheni, na vha no khakhisa vhaṅwe, na vhavhi, vhathu vha re shangoni nda vha swielela kule.” Hu amba Muṋe washu." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda rwa vhathu vha Juda na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho Jerusalema. Hafha fhethu ndi ḓo ita uri hu si tsha luvhiwa Baali na kathihi, na madzina a vhotshifhe vha vhannḓa vha midzimu iyo ha tsha ḓo pfala." 
Zephaniah1:5 Ndi ḓo lozwa vhane vha shuvhama nṱha ha ṱhanga vha luvha ḓuvha na ṅwedzi na dziṋaledzi. Ndi ḓo lozwa vhane vha gwadama phanḓa hanga vha ana nga Nṋe Yahavee vha dovha vha ana nga mudzimu Molekhe. 
Zephaniah1:6 Ndi ḓo lozwa vho humelaho murahu vha si tsha ntevhela vha si tsha nṱoḓa, vha sa humbeli nyeletshedzo kha Nṋe.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Ni tshete phanḓa ha Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Muṋe washu! Ḓuvha ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tsini. Vhukuma Muṋe washu o lugisa tshiṱhavhelo, o ḓikhethela vhahali a vha ramba." 
Zephaniah1:8 Musi wonoyo wa tshiṱhavhelo tsha Muṋe washu u ḓo lifhedza vhavhusi na vhakololo na vhoṱhe vha edzisaho maitele a vhasili. 
Zephaniah1:9 Musi wonoyo u ḓo lifhedza vhoṱhe vha no ila u kanda tshiukhuvha, havho vhane vha ḓadza pfamo ya khosi yavho nga zwe vha wana nga vhuvemu na vhufhura." 
Zephaniah1:10 Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi wonoyo hu ḓo pfala mukosi u tshi bva Khoroni ya Khovhe, hu ḓo pfala u honḓa hu tshi bva muḓini muswa, hu ḓo pfala u tshema mivhunduni." 
Zephaniah1:11 Lilani inwi vha dzingu ḽa Mutuli; vhashavhi vhaṋu vhoṱhe vha ḓo lovha, vhoṱhe vha funaho tshelede vha ḓo swielelwa kule." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo fhenḓa hoṱhe Jerusalema ndó fara mbone, nda lifhedza vhathu vhane vha ḓifulufhela, vha no dzula kha mvuvhelo dza waini yavhuḓi vhó wela mativhani, vhane mbiluni dzavho vha ri, ‘Yahavee ha na maanḓa a u ita tshivhuya kana tshivhi.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Vha ḓo ṱangulwa lupfumo lwavho, nnḓu dzavho dza thuthiwa. Vha ḓo fhaṱa dzinnḓu vha si dzule khadzo; vha ḓo ṱavha minḓirivhe vha si nwe waini yayo.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Ḓuvha ḽihulu ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tsini; ḽi tsini, ḽi khou ḓa nga luvhilo! Tshililo nga ḓuvha ḽa Muṋe washu tshi ḓo ṱungufhadza; vhahali vha ḓo ṱavha mukosi wa nndwa!" 
Zephaniah1:15 Iḽo ḓuvha ḽi ḓo vha ḓuvha ḽa mbiti, ḽi ḓo vha ḓuvha ḽa u hanganea na vhuṱungu, ḓuvha ḽa phusuphusu na ndozwo, ḓuvha ḽa swiswi ḽitswu-ḽitswu, ḓuvha ḽa makole ḽo swifhalaho," 
Zephaniah1:16 ḓuvha ḽa phalaphala i tshi lila hu tshi pfala mukosi wa nndwa, hu tshi diwa miḓi yo tingeledzwaho nga mutsheṱo, na thawara ndapfu." 
Zephaniah1:17 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhathu ndi ḓo ri zwi vha konḓele, vha ḓo tshimbila unga mabofu, nge vha khakhela Nṋe. Malofha avho a ḓo shululwa zwi sa londwi, zwa nga ndi buse, zwitumbu zwavho zwa nga mupfudze." 
Zephaniah1:18 Siliva yavho na musuku wavho zwi nga si vha tshidze musi wa mbiti dzanga. Shango ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo fhiswa nga mulilo wa mbiti dzanga ndi tshi ḓilwela, vhathu vhoṱhe vha dzulaho shangoni ndi ḓo vha lozwa nda vha fhedza kathihi fhedzi.”" 
Zephaniah2:1 Inwi lushaka lu si na ṱhoni, kuvhanganani ni ḓiṱukufhadze ni ḓidzime" 
Zephaniah2:2 Muṋe washu a sa athu ita zwe a vhofha, ni sa ḓo pwanyeledzwa kathihi fhedzi, mbiti dza Muṋe washu dzi ofhisaho dzi sa athu ni wela, ni sa athu ḓelwa nga ḓuvha ḽa mbiti dza Muṋe washu." 
Zephaniah2:3 Ṱoḓani Muṋe washu, inwi noṱhe ni ḓiṱukufhadzaho, inwi vhane na ita zwine a zwi amba. Itani zwi re zwone, ni ḓiṱukufhadze phanḓa ha Muṋe washu; khamusi ni ḓo ponyoka ṱhamu musi Muṋe washu a tshi sumbedza mbiti dzawe." 
Zephaniah2:4 Vhukuma muḓi wa Gaza u ḓo sala u soga, Ashkeloni u ḓo sala u matumba. Vhathu vha Ashidodo vha ḓo thubiwa masiari tshivhangalala, vha Ekroni vha ḓo tupulwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Inwi Vhakhreta ni no dzula tsini ha lwanzhe ni ḓo zwi vhona. Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi kaidza iwe Kanana shango ḽa Vhafilista, ḽi ri, “Ndi ḓo u phusukanya ha si sale muthu kha iwe.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Shango ḽi dzulaho Vhakhreta ḽi re tsini ha lwanzhe ḽi ḓo vha fhethu ha vhalisa, ḽi ḓo vha zwitumba zwa dzinngu," 
Zephaniah2:7 ḽi ḓo dzhiwa nga vhathu vha Juda vho ponyokaho lufu; vha ḓo wana pfulo henefho. Nga madekwana vha ḓo eḓela nḓuni dza Ashkeloni. Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho u ḓo vha londola, u ḓo ita uri zwi dovhe zwi vha nakele." 
Zephaniah2:8 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndo pfa lunyadzo lwa vha Muaba, ndo pfa maṱamba a Vhaamoni vha tshi sema vhathu vhanga, vha zuwa uri vha nga vha dzhiela shango." 
Zephaniah2:9 Zwenezwo Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wa Israele ndi ana nga vhutshilo hanga ndi ri: Vhukuma Muaba ḽi ḓo nga Sodoma, Vhaamoni vha ḓo nga Gomora, hu ḓo mela tsheṋe ha vha migodi ya muṋo, ha vha soga lini na lini. Vhathu vhanga vho ponyokaho lufu vha ḓo vha ṱangula, lushaka lwanga lwo salaho lu ḓo dzhia shango ḽavho.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Hetsho ndi tshine vha ḓo wana nge vha ḓihudza, nge vha nyadza vhathu vha Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe vha vha kolela." 
Zephaniah2:11 Muṋe washu u ḓo vha ita zwi ofhisaho musi a tshi pwashekanya midzimu yoṱhe ya iḽo shango. Lushaka luṅwe na luṅwe lu ḓo mu luvha lu shangoni ḽalwo, u ḓo luvhiwa nga tshakha dza mashango a seli ha lwanzhe." 
Zephaniah2:12 Na inwi Vhakushu, ni ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Zephaniah2:13 Muṋe washu u ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshawe a rwa devhula; u ḓo lozwa Ashuru, a sia Ninive hu si na muthu, hó oma unga phanga." 
Zephaniah2:14 Vhukati hawo hu ḓo awela masambi na phukha dza ḓaka. Tshiruxwe na magwitha zwi ḓo kavha phuphuni dzawo vhusiku, muya u ḓo nuṅunedza mafaseṱereni; na zwone zwiukhuvha zwi ḓo pwashiwa; matanda a mikedara a re kha luvhondo a ḓo kwatulwa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ndi zwone zwine zwa ḓo wela muḓi uḽa wa mifhululu, we wa vha u tshi dzula u sa ofhi tshithu. Wo amba nga mbilu wa ri, “Muḓi ndi nṋe, a hu na muṅwe u no nga nṋe.” Zwino wo no vha matumba, wo no vha vhudzulo ha phukha dza ḓaka! Vhoṱhe vhafhiri vha nḓila vha lidza muludzi, vha dzungudza mavili vha tshi u holedza." 
Zephaniah3:1 Khombo i ḓo wela muḓi wa mashandukwa, wo ḓalaho dzitshika, wa vhakandeledzi!" 
Zephaniah3:2 U tshi vhidzwa a wo ngo thetshelesa, wo vha khundavhalai. A wo ngo fulufhela Muṋe washu, a wo ngo sendela tsini ha Mudzimu wawo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Magota awo ndi ndau dzi vhombaho, vhavhusi vhawo ndi maṱalerwa a zwimaho vhusiku, ḽa ḓi tsha ḽa wana a tshi kha ḓi ponda." 
Zephaniah3:4 Vhaporofita vhawo vha a ḓihudza, vha na vhufhura. Vhotshifhe vhawo vha kumadza hukhethwa, vha pfuka mulayo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Muṋe washu a re ngomu hawo u ita zwi re zwone, ha khakhi. Musi muṅwe na muṅwe ḽi tshi tsha mulayo wawe u ḓi ima wo ralo, a u pfukwi. Naho zwo ralo vhatshinyi a vha shoni." 
Zephaniah3:6 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi lozwa dzitshakha, ndo wisa mitsheṱo yavho. Ndo sia mikoto yavho i si na muthu, a hu tshee na ane a fhira nga henefho. Miḓi yavho yo fhalala, a ho ngo sala muthu, na muthihi zwawe." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndo vhudza Jerusalema nda ri, ‘Vhukuma u ḓo nnyofha, wa thetshelesa ndi tshi u laya!’ Zwa ralo vhudzulo havho a vhu nga phusukanywi, na ṱhamu dzanga a dzi nga vhi khavho, hone vho ḓi futelela u tshinya vha tshi ya kha zwoṱhe zwe vha ita.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino-ha nndavheleleni hu vhuye hu swike ḓuvha ḽine nda ḓo takuwa nda sengisa dzitshakha. Ndo elekanya u kuvhanganya dzitshakha na mivhuso uri ndi shululele mbiti dzanga khavho, mbiti dzanga dzoṱhe dzi ofhisaho. Ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo swa nga mulilo wa mbiti dzanga." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Ndi hone milomo ya tshakha ndi tshi ḓo i ṱanzwa tshika, uri vhoṱhe vha rabele Nṋe, vha ntshumele sa vhana vha munna." 
Zephaniah3:10 Vhathu vhanga vho balanganaho vhane vha nnduvha, vha ḓo nnḓisela nduvho vha tshi bva seli ha milambo ya Kushu." 
Zephaniah3:11 Musi wonoyo a ni tsha ḓo shona ni tshi humbula zwoṱhe zwe na nkhakhela ngazwo, ngauri vhaṱongi vhau vhoṱhe vha u ḓihudza ndi ḓo vha ndo vha bvisa muḓini. Thavhani yanga khethwa a ni tsha ḓo dovha na ḓihudza." 
Zephaniah3:12 Hone vhukati haṋu ndi ḓo sia vhane vha ḓiṱukufhadza na vha no ḓinyadza; vhone vha ḓo fulufhela dzina ḽanga. 
Zephaniah3:13 Vhathu vha Israele vhane vha ḓo ponyoka lufu a vha tsha ḓo khakhela muṅwe muthu, a vha tsha ḓo zwifha, na vhufhura a vhu tsha ḓo wanala milomoni yavho. Vha ḓo nga sambi ḽine ḽa fula ḽa awela, hu si na tshine tsha vha shushedza.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Hee iwe ṅwananyana Tsioni, fhululedza! Inwi vhathu vha Israele, ṱavhani mukosi! Hee iwe ṅwananyana Jerusalema, takala u pembele nga mbilu yau yoṱhe!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Muṋe washu o humisa ṱhamu yau, o thatha maswina au. Muṋe washu Khosi ya Israele u na iwe, a hu tshee na khombo ine wa nga i ofha." 
Zephaniah3:16 Musi wonoyo vha ḓo vhudza Jerusalema vha ri, “Iwe Tsioni, u songo ofha tshithu, u songo kulea nungo," 
Zephaniah3:17 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau u na iwe, ndi muhali a u tshidzaho. U ḓo u takalela zwihulu, u ḓo u khuthadza nga lufuno lwawe, u ḓo u pembelela nga nyimbo," 
Zephaniah3:18 zwa nga musi wa vhuṱambo.” Muṋe washu u ri, “Vho nyadziwaho, vho thubiwaho shangoni ḽa havho, vhe vha pfuluwa vho shona, ndi ḓo vha kuvhanganya." 
Zephaniah3:19 Tshifhinga tshenetsho u ḓo vhona ndi tshi lifhedza vhane vha u kandeledza zwino; ndi ḓo lamulela zwihole, nda kuvhanganya vho balanganaho. Ndi ḓo ita uri vha khoḓiwe vha vhe na bvumo mashangoni oṱhe he vha vha vha tshi shoniswa." 
Zephaniah3:20 Musi tshifhinga tshenetsho tshi tshi swika, ndi ḓo vha Mutshimbidzi waṋu, ndi ḓo kuvhanganya vhathu vhau. Ndi ḓo ita uri ni khoḓiwe ni vhe na bvumo vhukati ha vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽifhasi musi ndi tshi ita uri zwi dovhe zwi ni nakele ni tshi zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo.” Hu amba Muṋe washu." 
Haggai1:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa khosi Dariosi, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba nga muporofita Hagai, ḽi tshi amba na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na tshifhe muhulu, Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ḽa ri:" 
Haggai1:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa khosi Dariosi, nga ḓuvha ḽa u ranga ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba nga muporofita Hagai, ḽi tshi amba na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na tshifhe muhulu, Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ḽa ri:" 
Haggai1:2 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhathu havha vha ri, ‘Tshifhinga tsha u vusa nnḓu ya Yahavee a tshi athu swika.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi amba nga mulomo wa muporofita Hagai ḽa ri," 
Haggai1:4 “Tshi kha ḓi vha tshifhinga tshine inwi na fanela u dzula nḓuni dzo fhaṱwaho zwavhuḓi, ngeno nnḓu yanga i tshee dumba naa?”" 
Haggai1:5 Zwino-ha Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Sedzani zwavhuḓi zwo ni welaho." 
Haggai1:6 “No lima zwinzhi, na kaṋa zwi si gathi. Ni a ḽa, hone na si fure. Ni a nwa, hone na si pfelele. Ni ambara zwiambaro, hone na ḓi pfa phepho. Ni a hola, na a longa tshipatshini tshine tsha bvuḓa.”" 
Haggai1:7 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Sedzani zwavhuḓi zwo ni welaho." 
Haggai1:8 Gonyani dzithavha, ni vhuye na matanda, ni vuse nnḓu heyo, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni takalela nda huliswa henefho.” Hu amba Muṋe washu." 
Haggai1:9 “No vha no lavhelela zwinzhi, na wana zwi si gathi. Zwe na zwi ḓisa hayani ndo zwi vhudzulela kule. Ngani?” Hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe. “Mulandu ndi nnḓu yanga ine ya kha ḓi vha dumba, ngeno muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a tshi khou ḓinetisela yawe nnḓu." 
Haggai1:10 Zwenezwo mulandu ndi waṋu lutombo lu sa wisi ṅwando, mavu a sa tsha bveledza zwiḽiwa." 
Haggai1:11 Ndo ri hu vhe na gomelelo masimuni na dzithavhani, ni kundwe u wana waini ya tuvhu na mapfura na zwoṱhe zwi bveledzwaho nga mavu na vhathu na kholomo na zwine zwanḓa zwa shuma.”" 
Haggai1:12 Ndi hone Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ene tshifhe muhulu, na vhathu vhoṱhe vho salaho u fa, vha tshi thetshelesa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho na mafhungo a muporofita Hagai, nge a vha o ruṅwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho. Vhathu vha ofha Muṋe washu." 
Haggai1:12 Ndi hone Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ene tshifhe muhulu, na vhathu vhoṱhe vho salaho u fa, vha tshi thetshelesa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho na mafhungo a muporofita Hagai, nge a vha o ruṅwa nga Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho. Vhathu vha ofha Muṋe washu." 
Haggai1:13 Ndi hone Hagai muḓinḓa wa Muṋe washu a tshi vhudza vhathu malaedzwa a Muṋe washu a ri, “Muṋe washu u ri, ‘Ndi na inwi!’ ”" 
Haggai1:14 Muṋe washu a ritha muya wa Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na muya wa Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ene tshifhe muhulu, na ya vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vho salaho u fa. Vha ḓa vha thoma u fhaṱa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, Mudzimu wavho," 
Haggai1:14 Muṋe washu a ritha muya wa Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na muya wa Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, ene tshifhe muhulu, na ya vhathu vhawe vhoṱhe vho salaho u fa. Vha ḓa vha thoma u fhaṱa nnḓu ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, Mudzimu wavho," 
Haggai1:15 vha thoma mushumo nga ḓuvha ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuthihi. 
Haggai2:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa khosi Dariosi, nga ḓuvha ḽa 21 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili Muṋe washu a amba nga muporofita Hagai a ri," 
Haggai2:2 “Amba na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, tshifhe muhulu, na vhathu vho salaho u fa. Vha vhudzise u ri," 
Haggai2:2 “Amba na Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, muvhusi wa ḽa Juda, na Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, tshifhe muhulu, na vhathu vho salaho u fa. Vha vhudzise u ri," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Kha inwi no salaho ndi nnyi we a vhona iyi nnḓu i tshee na vhugala vhuḽa hayo ha u ranga? Zwino ni vhona yo tou ita hani? A thi ri ni khou vhona i tshi nga a si tshithu? 
Haggai2:4 Hone zwino, iwe Zerubabele, u songo kulea nungo,’ hu amba Yahavee. ‘Iwe Joshua tshifhe muhulu ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, u songo kulea nungo. Noṱhe inwi vhathu vha shango ni songo kulea nungo, shumani,’ hu amba Yahavee. U ri, ‘Nṋe ndi na inwi,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Haggai2:4 Hone zwino, iwe Zerubabele, u songo kulea nungo,’ hu amba Yahavee. ‘Iwe Joshua tshifhe muhulu ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka, u songo kulea nungo. Noṱhe inwi vhathu vha shango ni songo kulea nungo, shumani,’ hu amba Yahavee. U ri, ‘Nṋe ndi na inwi,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Haggai2:5 ‘Musi ni tshi pfuluwa Egipita ndo ni fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo ni fhelekedza. Na ṋamusi Muya wanga u tshee na inwi. Ni songo ofha tshithu.’ 
Haggai2:6 “Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Hu si kale ndi ḓo dovha nda dzinginyisa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na lwanzhe na shango ḽo omaho." 
Haggai2:7 Ndi ḓo dzinginyisa dzitshakha, zwine zwa tamisa zwa tshakha dzoṱhe ndi ḓo zwi ḓisa zwa ḓadza nnḓu heino nga vhugala,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Haggai2:8 “ ‘Siliva yoṱhe ndi yanga, musuku woṱhe ndi wanga,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Haggai2:9 ‘Vhugala ha nnḓu heino ya zwino vhu ḓo fhira ha iḽa ya u ranga,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe. ‘Hafhano fhethu ndi ḓo ḓisa mulalo,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe.”" 
Haggai2:10 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa, nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili hu tshi vhusa Dariosi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na muporofita Hagai ḽa ri," 
Haggai2:11 “Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ndi ri, ‘Humbela nyeletshedzo kha vhotshifhe u ri:" 
Haggai2:12 Arali muthu a putela ṋama yo sumelwaho Mudzimu nga lupendelo lwa nguvho yawe, ulwo lupendelo lwa kwama vhurotho kana muroho kana waini kana mapfura kana zwiṅwe zwiḽiwa, na zwone zwi a vha zwikhethwa naa?’ ” Vhotshifhe vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “A zwi nga vhi zwikhethwa.”" 
Haggai2:13 Ndi hone Hagai a tshi vhudzisa a ri, “Arali muthu o kumala nga u kwama tshitumbu, a dovha a kwama tshiṅwe tsha izwo zwithu, tshi a vha tsho kumala naa?” Vhotshifhe vha fhindula vha ri, “Ee, tshi a kumala.”" 
Haggai2:14 Ndi hone Hagai a tshi ri, “ ‘Nṋe ndi vhona vhathu havha vho tou ralo, ndi vhona lushaka holu lwo tou ralo,’ hu amba Yahavee. ‘Zwoṱhe zwine vha ita, zwoṱhe zwine vha zwi ṋekedza henefho zwo kumala.’ ”" 
Haggai2:15 Muṋe washu u ri, “Zwino sedzani zwavhuḓi u bva ṋamusi, humbulani uri zwiḽa tombo ḽi sa athu ingwa nṱha ha ḽiṅwe ngei thembeleni yanga, zwithu zwo vha zwo tou ita hani." 
Haggai2:16 Muthu o vha a tshi ri a tshi fhula thulwi ya goroi a wana gonyongo fhedzi ḽa zwe a vha o fulufhela. Muthu a ri a tshi yo ka mielo ya mahumi maṱanu bonḓeloni ḽa waini a wana i mielo ya mahumi mavhili fhedzi. 
Haggai2:17 Ndo tshinyadza zwiliṅwa zwaṋu nga vhuri na done na tshifhango, naho zwo ralo inwi a no ngo vhuya kha Nṋe." 
Haggai2:18 U bva ṋamusi, u bva ḓuvha heḽino ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa, ni sedze zwavhuḓi musi we ha tewa muteo wa thembele yanga. Ni sedze zwavhuḓi:" 
Haggai2:19 Hu tshee ho sala mbeu ḓuluni naa? U swika zwino munḓirivhe na muhuyu na mugranada na muolivi a i athu aṋwa mitshelo. Hone u bva ṋamusi ndi ḓo ni shudufhadza.” 
Haggai2:20 Muṋe washu a dovha a amba na Hagai lwa vhuvhili, nga ḓuvha ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wonoyo a ri," 
Haggai2:21 “Vhudza Zerubabele muvhusi wa Juda uri ndi ḓo dzinginyisa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi. 
Haggai2:22 Ndi ḓo tekula khuluṋoni dza mahosi nda pwashekanya maanḓa a mivhuso isili. Ndi ḓo thudza gariki dza nndwa na vhatshimbidzi vhadzo, nda rambaladza dzibere na vhanameli vhadzo, vha fhedza nga u vhulahana nga pfumo.”" 
Haggai2:23 Muṋe washu u ri, “Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo dzhia iwe mulanda wanga Zerubabele ṅwana wa Salathiele, nda u ita unga rinngi yanga ya luswayo, ngauri ndo u nanga.” Hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah1:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Dariosi, nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuraru, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na muporofita Zakaria ṅwana wa Berekhia ṅwana wa Ido ḽa ri," 
Zechariah1:2 “Ndo vha ndo sinyutshela vhomakhulukuku waṋu zwihulu. 
Zechariah1:3 Zwenezwo vhudza vhathu u ri: Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Vhuyani kha Nṋe, na Nṋe ndi ḓo konou vhuela ha inwi,’ hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah1:4 Ni songo nga vhomakhulukuku waṋu; vhaporofita vha u ranga vho vha ḓivhadza vha ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Laṱani nḓila dzaṋu mmbi, na zwiito zwaṋu zwivhi, hone vhone vha si nthetshelese, vha si zwi londe,’ hu amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Zechariah1:5 Vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha ngafhi zwino? Vhaporofita avho vhone vha tshee hone naa? 
Zechariah1:6 A thi ri vhomakhulukuku waṋu vho nyadza maipfi anga na ndaela dzanga dze nda vha vhudza nga milomo ya vhaḓinḓa vhanga vhaporofita, vha fhedza nga u tambula? Ngavhuya vho ḓisola vha ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe o ri ita zwe a ḓiimisela u zwi ita, a ri ita zwo fanelaho nḓila dzashu na zwiito zwashu.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Nga ḓuvha ḽa 24 ḽa ṅwedzi wa 11, wone ṅwedzi wa Shebathi, nga ṅwaha wa vhuvhili wa muvhuso wa Dariosi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na muporofita Zakaria ṅwana wa Berekhia, ṅwana wa Ido. Zwo ḓa nga hei nḓila:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ndo vhona bono vhusiku. Nda vhona munna o namela bere khunweu! O vha o ima vhukati ha miṱhaḽa govhani, murahu hawe hú na dziṅwe bere, khunweu na dzothwa na tshweu." 
Zechariah1:9 Nda vhudzisa nda ri, “Izwi ndi mini, muṋe wanga?” Muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe a fhindula a ri, “Ndi ḓo u sumbedza uri ndi mini.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Ndi hone munna o imaho vhukati ha miṱhaḽa a tshi ṱalutshedza a ri, “Ndi vhone vhe Yahavee a vha ruma u tandula ḽifhasi.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Ndi hone vha tshi vhika kha muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o imaho vhukati ha miṱhaḽa vha ri, “Ro vha ri tshi khou tandula ḽifhasi, ra wana ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe ḽo dzika ḽi na mulalo.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Zwenezwo Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a amba a ri, “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe, u ḓo litsha u khathutshela Jerusalema na miḓi ya Juda u swika lini? Hufha wo i sinyutshela ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 70!”" 
Zechariah1:13 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi fhindula uyo muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe, a mu vhudza maipfi a takadzaho a rudzaho mbilu." 
Zechariah1:14 Uyo muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe ndi hone a tshi mmbudza a ri, “Ḓivhadza u ri, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Jerusalema na Tsioni ndi pfa ndi tshi hu funesa," 
Zechariah1:15 hone tshakha dzine dza pfa dzo tsireledzea ndo dzi sinyutshela nga mbiti. A vha Nṋe ndo vha ndo tou sinyuwanyana, hone vhone vha tshi dia vhathu vha vho tou kalula." 
Zechariah1:16 Zwenezwo Yahavee u ri: Ndi ḓo khathutshela Jerusalema nda vhuelela khawo, henefho hu ḓo vuswa thembele yanga. Jerusalema u ḓo dovha wa fhaṱiwa.’ Hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah1:17 “Dovha u ḓivhadze, ‘Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Miḓi yanga zwi ḓo dovha zwa i nakela zwivhuya zwa tou fhalala, Yahavee u ḓo dovha a khathutshela Tsioni, Jerusalema a dovha a u ita muḓi wawe.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Zwenezwo ndi tshi lavhelesa nda vhona ṋanga nṋa! 
Zechariah1:19 Nda vhudzisa muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe nda ri, “Izwi ndi mini?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Hedzi ndi ṋanga dzo balanganyaho Juda na Israele na Jerusalema.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ntsumbedza vhafuli vhaṋa vha tsimbi. 
Zechariah1:21 Nṋe nda vhudzisa nda ri, “Avha vhathu vha khou ḓa u itani?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Hedzi ndi ṋanga dze dza balanganya Juda, ha si vhe na we a linga u vusa ṱhoho, hone avha vho ḓa u tshenusa dzitshakha na u kula ṋanga dzadzo dza wela fhasi, ha si tsha sala lushaka lune lwa nga imisa luṋanga lwa lwa na Juda lwa balanganya vhathu vhaḽo.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Nda dovha nda lavhelesa, nda vhona munna o fara muelo nga tshanḓa!" 
Zechariah2:2 Nda mu vhudzisa nda ri, “Vha khou ya ngafhi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi khou ya u ela Jerusalema, ndi ṱoḓa u wana vhunavha hawo na vhuphara hawo.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Ndi hone muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe a tshi bvelela, ha ḓa muṅwe muruṅwa u mu ṱanganedza." 
Zechariah2:4 Uḽa wa u ranga a vhudza wa vhuvhili a ri, “Gidima u yo vhudza uyo muṱhannga o faraho muelo u ri, ‘Jerusalema u ḓo vha muḓi u si na mitsheṱo, nga u anda ha vhathu na thakha ngomu hawo." 
Zechariah2:5 Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha mutsheṱo wa mulilo wo monaho nawo, nda vha lupenyo lwawo ngomu hawo.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:6 Muṋe washu u ri, “Iḓani! Iḓani! Shavhani ni ṱuwe shangoni ḽa devhula, na khuḓani nṋa dza shango he nda ni balanganyela hone! Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee." 
Zechariah2:7 Vhuya! Ponyoka u shavhele Tsioni, iwe u dzulaho Babele!”" 
Zechariah2:8 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe we a nthuma uri ndi thube vhugala ha dzitshakha u ri, “Ane a vhuya a ni kwama o nndonga munwe iṱoni.” A tshi amba tshakha dze dza ni ṱangula, u ri," 
Zechariah2:9 “Vhukuma ndi ḓo angaladza tshanḓa tshanga nda vha rwa, vha vhuya vha ṱangulwa na nga phuli dzavho.” Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ndi muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah2:10 Muṋe washu u ri, “Iwe Ṅwananyana Tsioni, ṱavha mukosi u takale. Nṋe ndi khou ḓa, ndi ḓo dzula na inwi." 
Zechariah2:11 Tshakha nnzhi musi wonoyo dzi ḓo ḓibaḓekanya na Nṋe, dza vha vhathu vhanga. Ndi ḓo dzula na inwi.” Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe o nthuma ha inwi." 
Zechariah2:12 Muṋe washu u ḓo dzhia Juda wa vha mukovhe wawe shangoni ḽikhethwa, Jerusalema wa dovha wa vha muḓi une a u funesa." 
Zechariah2:13 Fhumulani phanḓa ha Muṋe washu inwi vhathu noṱhe vha ḽifhasi, ngauri u khou ḓa a tshi bva vhudzuloni hawe vhukhethwa." 
Zechariah3:1 Ndi hone a tshi ntsumbedza Joshua tshifhe muhulu o ima phanḓa ha muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu, Saṱhane ó ima thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe uri a mu pomoke." 
Zechariah3:1 Ndi hone a tshi ntsumbedza Joshua tshifhe muhulu o ima phanḓa ha muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu, Saṱhane ó ima thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe uri a mu pomoke." 
Zechariah3:2 Muṋe washu a amba na Saṱhane a ri, “Nṋe Yahavee ndi a u kaidza iwe Saṱhane! Nṋe Yahavee ane nda funa Jerusalema ndi a u kaidza! Uyu munna a si luhuni lu khou dugaho lwe lwa fungulwa muliloni naa?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua o vha o ima phanḓa ha muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o ambara zwiambaro zwa tshika. 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua o vha o ima phanḓa ha muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o ambara zwiambaro zwa tshika. 
Zechariah3:4 Muruṅwa a amba na vhe vha vha vho ima phanḓa hawe a ri, “Mu bvuleni zwiambaro zwa dzitshika.” Ndi hone a tshi amba na Joshua a ri, “Vhona, ndo u rula milandu yau, ndi ḓo u ambadza zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele.”" 
Zechariah3:4 Muruṅwa a amba na vhe vha vha vho ima phanḓa hawe a ri, “Mu bvuleni zwiambaro zwa dzitshika.” Ndi hone a tshi amba na Joshua a ri, “Vhona, ndo u rula milandu yau, ndi ḓo u ambadza zwiambaro zwa maṱeleṱele.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Nṋe nda ri, “Ṱhohoni mu ambadzeni muṅadzi u si na tshika.” Ndi hone vha tshi mu ambadza muṅadzi u si na tshika, vha mu ambadza zwiambaro, muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu ó ima henefho tsini." 
Zechariah3:6 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a laya Joshua a ri," 
Zechariah3:6 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a laya Joshua a ri," 
Zechariah3:7 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Arali wa tshimbila nḓilani dzanga, wa ita zwine nda zwi ṱoḓa, u ḓo vhusa nnḓu yanga, wa langa thembele yanga, nahone u ḓo vha muswikeli unga avha vharuṅwa vha ntshumelaho." 
Zechariah3:8 “ ‘Iwe Joshua tshifhe muhulu thetshelesa, na avha vhotshifhe nga iwe vhane wa vha navho ndi vhavhulungi vha tshiga tsha zwithu zwi kha ḓi ḓaho, zwauri ndi ḓo ḓisa muḓinḓa wanga a no pfi Ḓadzwane ḽa Dafita." 
Zechariah3:8 “ ‘Iwe Joshua tshifhe muhulu thetshelesa, na avha vhotshifhe nga iwe vhane wa vha navho ndi vhavhulungi vha tshiga tsha zwithu zwi kha ḓi ḓaho, zwauri ndi ḓo ḓisa muḓinḓa wanga a no pfi Ḓadzwane ḽa Dafita." 
Zechariah3:9 Vhonani tombo ḽe nda ḽi vhea phanḓa ha Joshua! Tombo ḽeneḽo ḽa u thoma-thoma ḽi ḽavheleswa nga maṱo maṱanu na mavhili. Ndi ḓo phula tshisima khaḽo. Ndi ḓo rula milandu ya shango heḽino nga ḓuvha ḽithihi fhedzi, Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah3:9 Vhonani tombo ḽe nda ḽi vhea phanḓa ha Joshua! Tombo ḽeneḽo ḽa u thoma-thoma ḽi ḽavheleswa nga maṱo maṱanu na mavhili. Ndi ḓo phula tshisima khaḽo. Ndi ḓo rula milandu ya shango heḽino nga ḓuvha ḽithihi fhedzi, Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah3:10 “ ‘Musi wonoyo muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu u ḓo vhidza muhura wawe uri a ḓe a dzule fhasi ha munḓirivhe wawe na muhuyu wawe,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe a dovha a mmvusa unga muthu a tshi vusa muṅwe khofheni. 
Zechariah4:2 A mmbudzisa a ri, “U khou vhona mini?” Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Ndi khou vhona tshivheambone tsha musuku tshoṱhe, nṱha hatsho hu na mudzio wa mapfura, tshi na mbone ṱhanu na mbili, luvhone luṅwe na luṅwe lu na thambo ṱhanu na mbili." 
Zechariah4:3 Tsini hatsho hu na miri mivhili ya miolivi, muṅwe u thungo ya tshauḽa tsha mudzio wa mapfura, muṅwe thungo ya tshamonde.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Nṋe nda vhudzisa muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe nda ri, “Muṋe wanga, izwi ndi mini?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Ene a fhindula a ri, “A u ḓivhi uri izwi ndi mini?” Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “A thi zwi ḓivhi, muṋe wanga.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi amba na nṋe a ri, “Heḽi ndi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi no amba na Zerubabele ḽi ri, “ ‘A ni nga zwi koni nga maanḓa a mmbi kana nga nungo dzaṋu, zwi ḓo itwa nga Muya wanga,’ hu amba Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah4:7 Iwe thavha khulu, nangwe wo hula hani, Zerubabele u ḓo vhona u mavu o linganelaho. Ú ḓo inga tombo ḽa tshiuludza ha ṱavhiwa mukosi ha pfi, ‘Ḽo naka hani! Ḽo naka hani!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ndi hone ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Zechariah4:9 “Zwanḓa zwa Zerubabele zwo tea muteo wa thembele hei, zwenezwo zwanḓa zwawe zwi ḓo i ṱhaphudza. Ndi hone u tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe o nthuma ha inwi." 
Zechariah4:10 Ndi nnyi ane a nyadza musi wa mishumo miṱuku? Vhathu vha ḓo pembela vha tshi vhona Zerubabele o fara tombo ḽa tshiuludza. “Mbone hedzi ṱhanu na mbili ndi maṱo a Yahavee, a vhona zwoṱhe zwi re kha ḽifhasi.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Nṋe nda vhudzisa muruṅwa nda ri, “Miri iyi mivhili ya miolivi, muṅwe u re thungo ya tshauḽa tsha tshivheambone, muṅwe u re thungo ya tshamonde, i amba mini?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Nda dovha nda mu vhudzisa nda ri, “Matavhi aya mavhili a muolivi ane a khou shulula mapfura nga phaiphi mbili dza musuku a amba mini?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Ene a mmbudzisa a ri, “A u ḓivhi uri izwi zwi amba mini?” Nṋe nda ri, “Muṋe wanga, a thi zwi ḓivhi.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Havha ndi vhavhili vhe vha tiwa vha ḓodzwa uri vha shumele Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ndi tshi dovha u lavhelesa, nda vhona bugu i fhufhaho." 
Zechariah5:2 Muruṅwa a mmbudzisa a ri, “U khou vhona mini?” Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, “Ndi khou vhona bugu i fhufhaho, vhunavha hayo ndi mitha dza fumi, vhuphara ndi mitha ṱhanu.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Ndi hone a tshi mmbudza a ri, “Zwo ṅwalwaho khayo zwi teketela shango ḽoṱhe. Fobvu ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi ḓo lifhedzwa hu tshi tevhedzwa deketelo ḽeneḽo zwa ḓi nga ane a anela mazwifhi, na ene u ḓo lifhedzwa hu tshi tevhedzwa ḽone." 
Zechariah5:4 Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Deketelo iḽo ndi ḓo ḽi ruma ḽa dzhena nḓuni ya fobvu na nḓuni ya ane a anela mazwifhi nga dzina ḽanga. Ḽi ḓo dzula henefho nḓuni ḽa i ṱahadza, ḽa fheṱa matanda ayo na matombo ayo.’ ”" 
Zechariah5:5 Ndi hone muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe a tshi ḓa a mmbudza a ri, “Lavhelesa u vhone uri tshi no khou bvelela ndi mini.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Nṋe nda vhudzisa nda ri, “Ndi tshithu-ḓe?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi tshirundu tsha u ela.” A dovha a ri, “Tshirundu hetshi ndi milandu ya vhathu vha re shangoni heḽi ḽoṱhe.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ha mbo ḓi tibulwa tshitibo tsha mutobvu, nda vhona musadzi o dzula ngomu ha uyo mufaro!" 
Zechariah5:8 Muruṅwa a ri, “Hovhu ndi vhuvhi.” A mbo ḓi mu sukumedzela tshirunduni, a tshi tiba nga tshitibo tshatsho tsha mutobvu." 
Zechariah5:9 Ndi tshi lavhelesa nda vhona vhasadzi vhavhili vha tshi bvelela, muya wa ṱharamudza phapha dzavho! Vho vha vhe na phapha dzi no nga dza gololwane, vha takula tshiḽa tshirundu tsha vha vhukati ha ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi." 
Zechariah5:10 Nṋe nda vhudzisa uḽa muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe nda ri, “Vha khou isafhi uyo mufaro?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Tshirundu itsho tshi khou yo fhaṱelwa thembele shangoni ḽa Babele. I ḓo ri u fhela, tshirundu tsha vhewa henefho nṱha ha khuluṋoni.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Nda dovha u lavhelesa, nda vhona gariki nṋa dza nndwa dzi tshi bva vhukati ha thavha mbili, thavha dza musinaseṱha!" 
Zechariah6:2 Gariki ya u thoma yo vha i tshi khou kokodzwa nga bere khunweu, ya vhuvhili nga bere ntswu," 
Zechariah6:3 ya vhuraru nga tshweu, ya vhuṋa nga phaswa, bere dzoṱhe dzí na maanḓa." 
Zechariah6:4 Nda vhudzisa muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba na nṋe nda ri, “Muṋe wanga, izwi zwi amba mini?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Muruṅwa a fhindula a ri, “Hei ndi mimuya miṋa ya ṱaḓulu, i bva he ya vha yo ima phanḓa ha Muṋe wa ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Zechariah6:6 Gariki i no khou kokodzwa nga bere ntswu i khou ya shangoni ḽa devhula, i no khou kokodzwa nga tshweu i khou ya vhukovhela, i no khou kokodzwa nga phaswa i khou ya tshipembe, i no khou kokodzwa nga khunweu i khou ya shangoni ḽa vhubvaḓuvha.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Bere dza nungo dza bva dzi tshi yo buḓekanya ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe. Muruṅwa a ri, “Iyani u buḓekanya ḽifhasi!” Dza mbo ḓi yo buḓekanya ḽifhasi." 
Zechariah6:8 Ndi hone a tshi mmbidzelela a ri, “Vhona, dziḽa dzi no ya shangoni ḽa devhula dzi yo bveledza u tshidza hanga dza dzikisa muya wanga shangoni ḽa devhula.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Zechariah6:10 “U mbo ḓi ya hayani ha Josia ṅwana wa Tsefania. Henefho u ḓo wana Heledai na Tobia na Jedaya, vha tshi kha ḓi bva u swika vha tshi bva Babele. Vho ḓa na nduvho" 
Zechariah6:11 ya siliva na musuku. I dzhie, u ite khare ya vhuhosi, u i ṋee tshifhe muhulu, Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka." 
Zechariah6:11 ya siliva na musuku. I dzhie, u ite khare ya vhuhosi, u i ṋee tshifhe muhulu, Joshua ṅwana wa Jehotsadaka." 
Zechariah6:12 U mu vhudze uri Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Hu na munna ane a pfi Ḓadzwane ḽa Dafita; u ḓo bvela phanḓa nga u ṱavhanya, a vusa thembele ya Yahavee." 
Zechariah6:13 Ndi ene a no ḓo vusa thembele ya Yahavee. U ḓo ambadzwa maanḓa a vhuhosi, a dzula kha khuluṋoni a vhusa. U ḓo vhusa na tshifhe, avho vhavhili vha anḓana ha vha na mulalo." 
Zechariah6:14 Iyo khare i ḓo vhewa thembeleni yanga ya vha tshihumbudzo tsha Heledai na Tobia na Jedaya na tsha vhuthu ha ṅwana wa Tsefania. 
Zechariah6:15 “ ‘Vhathu vha ḓo ḓa vha tshi bva kule, vha farisa u vusa thembele ya Yahavee. Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe o nthuma ha inwi. Hezwo zwi ḓo itea arali ni tshi thetshelesa Yahavee Mudzimu waṋu nga mbilu yoṱhe.’ ”" 
Zechariah7:1 Nga ṅwaha wa vhuṋa wa muvhuso wa khosi Dariosi, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṋa ḽa ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na vhuṋa, ṅwedzi wa Khisilevi, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa amba na Zakaria." 
Zechariah7:2 Vhathu vha Bethele vho vha vho ruma Sharetsere na Regemu Melekhe khathihi na vhanna vhavho, u yo humbela Muṋe washu mashudu," 
Zechariah7:3 na u vhudzisa vhotshifhe vha thembele ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, na vhaporofita, vha ri, “Nṋa ndo fanela u ḓi lila nda ḓidzima nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu, sa zwe nda vha ndi tshi ḓi ita miṅwaha minzhi yo fhelaho naa?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Zechariah7:5 “Vhudzisa vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango na vhotshifhe u ri, ‘Musi ni tshi ḓidzima ni tshi lila nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṱanu na wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili miṅwaha ya 70 yo fhelaho, vhukuma no vha ni tshi itela u hulisa Nṋe naa?" 
Zechariah7:6 Zwiḽa ni tshi khou ḽa dzinduvho ni tshi nwa, no vha ni sa khou ḓiḽela na ḓinwela inwi vhaṋe naa?" 
Zechariah7:7 A thi ri aya ndi one maipfi e nda a ḓivhadza nga vhaporofita vha u ranga musi vhathu vha Jerusalema na miḓi yo u tangaho vhe na mulalo zwi tshi vha nakela, zwiḽa Negeve na midavhini ya vhukovhela hu tshee na vhathu naa?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:8 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa dovha ḽa amba na Zakaria ḽa ri," 
Zechariah7:9 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Ni vhone hu sa ḓo vha na tshiṱalula, ni itelane vhuthu ni pfelane vhuṱungu." 
Zechariah7:10 Ni songo kandeledza tshilikadzi na tsiwana na mutsinda na mushai. Mbiluni dzaṋu ni songo lukelana vhunwa.’ 
Zechariah7:11 “Hone a vho ngo funa u zwi londa, vho zwi furalela vha konyolela matanda nḓevheni." 
Zechariah7:12 Vho omisa mbilu dzavho dza nga mbwane, vha si thetshelese ndayo kana maipfi e Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe a a ḓisa nga Muya wawe, a swikiswa nga vhaporofita vha u ranga. Ndi zwe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe a sinyuwa zwihulu." 
Zechariah7:13 Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Ndo ḓi vha vhidza vha si thetshelese, ndi zwe vhone vha tshi mmbidzelela Nṋe-vho nda si thetshelese." 
Zechariah7:14 Ndo vha balanganya na dzitshakha nga tshiḓumbumukwe, henefho vha vha vhatsinda, shango ḽavho ḽa sala ḽi si na muthu, hu si na a ḓaho na a ṱuwaho. Shango ḽi tamisaho ndi vhone vho ḽi phusukanyaho ḽa sala ḽi soga.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:1 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe ḽa dovha ḽa ḓa kha nṋe ḽa ri," 
Zechariah8:2 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri: Tsioni ndi a hu funa lwa u tou sinyuwa, mbilu yanga i tou hu swela.”" 
Zechariah8:3 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndi ḓo vhuelela Tsioni nda dzula Jerusalema. Ndi hone Jerusalema u tshi ḓo pfi ‘Muḓi u fulufhedzeaho’, thavha ya Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ya pfi ‘Thavha Khethwa.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:4 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Mikotoni ya Jerusalema hu ḓo dovha ha dzula vhakalaha na vhakegulu, muṅwe na muṅwe o fara mugo nga u lalama." 
Zechariah8:5 Mikoto ya muḓi i ḓo ḓala vhatukana na vhasidzana vha tshi khou tamba henefho.” 
Zechariah8:6 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Arali tsalela dza vhathu avha vha tshi vhona izwo zwa misi yeneyo zwi tshi nkunda, kani-ha zwi amba uri na Nṋe ndi ḓo vhona zwi tshi nkunda?” Hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Zechariah8:7 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ndi ḓo tshidza vhathu vhanga nda vha bvisa mashangoni a vhubvaḓuvha na a vhukovhela." 
Zechariah8:8 Ndi ḓo vha vhuisa vha dzula Jerusalema. Vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga, Nṋe nda vha Mudzimu wavho a fulufhedzeaho a sa ṱaluli.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Inwi vhane zwino na khou pfa maipfi haya o ambiwaho nga vhaporofita musi hu tshi tewa muteo wa nnḓu ya Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe, khwaṱhisani zwanḓa zwaṋu uri thembele i fhaṱiwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Muteo u sa athu tewa, munna a tshi shuma o vha a sa wani malamba, na phukha dzo vha dzi tshi shuma nga fhedzi, mulimi o vha a sa koni u shuma mishumo yawe o tsireledzea, nga u anda ha maswina. Ndo vha ndi tshi luṱanya muthu na muṅwe." 
Zechariah8:11 Huno zwino tsalela dza lushaka ulu a thi nga dzi iti zwe nda ita u rangani.” Hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe. 
Zechariah8:12 “Mbeu i vho ḓo aluwa zwavhuḓi, minḓirivhe i ḓo aṋwa mitshelo yayo, mavu a ḓo bveledza zwimela zwao, ḽiṱaḓulu ḽi ḓo wisa ṅwando waḽo. Mashudu oṱhe hayo ndi ḓo a ṋea tsalela dza lushaka holu." 
Zechariah8:13 Inwi vhathu vha Juda na Israele, vhunga tshakha dzo vha dzi tshi teketelana nga dzina ḽaṋu, zwino ndi ḓo ni tshidza, vhathu vha vho ḓo shudufhadzana nga dzina ḽaṋu. Ni songo ofha tshithu, ni songo kulea nungo.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ndo vhuya nda elekanya u ni ḓisela khombo, nda si ni pfele vhuṱungu, zwiḽa vhokhotsi aṋu vho ntsinyusa,” hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe," 
Zechariah8:15 “zwino-ha ndo elekanya u itela vhathu vha Jerusalema na Juda zwivhuya. Ni songo ofha tshithu. 
Zechariah8:16 Zwine na fanela u zwi ita ngezwi: Vhudzanani ngoho, tsengoni dzaṋu hu vhe na khaṱhulo ya ngoho i pfalaho;" 
Zechariah8:17 ni songo lukelana vhunwa, ni songo anela mazwifhi. Zwoṱhe hezwo ndi a zwi vhenga.” Hu amba Muṋe washu." 
Zechariah8:18 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe ḽa dovha ḽa amba na nṋe ḽa ri," 
Zechariah8:19 “Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, ‘Nga ṅwedzi wa vhuṋa na wa vhuṱanu na wa vhuṱanu na vhuvhili na wa fumi vhathu vha Juda a vha tsha ḓo ḓidzima swiḽiwa; maḓuvha eneo a vho ḓo vha vhuṱambo ha dakalo na u pembela. Hone tshaṋu ndi u funa ngoho na mulalo.’ ”" 
Zechariah8:20 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Hu kha ḓi ḓo ḓa tshakha nnzhi na vhadzulapo vha miḓi minzhi." 
Zechariah8:21 Vhadzulapo vha muṅwe muḓi vha ḓo ya kha muṅwe vha ri, ‘Nḓarieni zwino ri yo luvha Yahavee, ri yo vhudzisa Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe; nṋe thi sali.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Tshakha nnzhi na tshakha dza maanḓa dzi ḓo ḓa Jerusalema dza vhudzisa Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe dza mu luvha.” 
Zechariah8:23 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Misi yeneyo vhathu vha fumi vha no bva kha vhathu vha nyambo dzoṱhe na tshakha dzoṱhe vha ḓo nambatela Mujuda muthihi vha mu fara nga lupendelo lwa khanzu yawe vha ri, ‘Ri a ṱuwa-vho na inwi; ro pfa upfi Mudzimu u na inwi!’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Malaedzwa-nga-Mudzimu: Yahavee o buḓekanya shango ḽa Hadarakha, Damasko ndalama ya vhathu ndi wa Yahavee, ndi vhudzulo hawe, khathihi na tshakha dza Vhaisraele;" 
Zechariah9:2 na Hamathi ḽine ḽa ṋekana masakha naḽo ndi ḽanga, khathihi na miḓi ya Tiro na Sidoni na vhutsila hayo hoṱhe." 
Zechariah9:3 Vha Tiro vho ḓifhaṱela mutsheṱo, vha khokha siliva ya anda unga buse, vha kuvhanganya musuku wa anda unga mathukhwi mikotoni." 
Zechariah9:4 Huno Muṋe wa zwoṱhe u ḓo dzhia lupfumo lwa Tiro, a pwashekanya mitsheṱo yawo a i posa lwanzheni, wone wa fhiswa nga mulilo." 
Zechariah9:5 Vha Ashkeloni vha ḓo ri u zwi vhona vha farwa nga nyofho, vha Gaza vha tetemela nga nyofho, na vha Ekroni vha ḓo ralo ngauri zwe vha zwi fulufhela zwi ḓo balangana. Gaza a hu tsha ḓo vha na khosi, Ashkeloni hu ḓo sala hu si na muthu." 
Zechariah9:6 Ashidodo hu ḓo dzula vhathu vhe vha bebwa nga vhuṱudzi fhedzi, nda lozwa muḓi une Vhafilista vha u zuwa." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndi ḓo ṱanzisa vha Ashidodo ṋama dza malofha, nda vha somola zwiḽiwa zwo iledzwaho. Vha salaho u fa vha ḓo vha vha Mudzimu wa Israele, vha vha khonani dza vha Juda, vha Ekroni vha ḓo vha vhathihi na vhathu vhanga unga Vhajebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Hone vhathu vhanga ndi ḓo vha lamulela uri vha si tsha diwa nga maswina. Vhakandeledzi a vha tsha ḓo fhira ngaho, ngauri vhathu vhanga ndi vho ḓo vha vhavhalela." 
Zechariah9:9 Iwe ṅwananyana Tsioni, pembela nga mbilu yoṱhe! Iwe ṅwananyana Jerusalema, itou ṱavha mukosi nga dakalo! Khosi yau i khou ḓa ha iwe, i ḓa na gundo nga u fulufhedzea ha Mudzimu, i na vhulenda, a yo ngo namela meila, yo namela donngi mbelesa ya khosi." 
Zechariah9:10 Ndi ḓo ṱuwisa gariki dza nndwa kha ḽa Efraimi, nda thatha bere dza nndwa Jerusalema, vhura ha nndwani vhu ḓo vunḓekana. U ḓo ḓivhadza dzitshakha a mulalo. U ḓo vhusa u bva kha luṅwe lwanzhe u swika kha luṅwe, na u bva Yufuratha u swika hune ḽifhasi ḽa guma." 
Zechariah9:11 A vha iwe Jerusalema ndo vhofha mulanga na iwe wa siṱelwa nga malofha, zwenezwo ndi ḓo vhofholola mathubwa au nda a bvisa dindini." 
Zechariah9:12 Inwi mathubwa, tshine na nga fulufhela tsho no vha hone, humelani-ha vhushavheloni haṋu. Vhukuma ndi khou ni vhudza ṋamusi ndi ri: Ndi ḓo ni pfufha kavhili." 
Zechariah9:13 Ndi ḓo khotha Juda unga ndi tshi khotha vhura, Efraimi nda mu ita musevhe waho. Ndi ḓo dzungudza vhana vhau iwe Tsioni unga banga, vha lwa na vhana vhau iwe Giriki, nda u ita unga pfumo ḽa muhali." 
Zechariah9:14 Vha ḓo vhona Muṋe washu a tshi bva ṱaḓulu; musevhe wawe u ḓo pfula unga nḓadzi i tshi rwa. Muṋe wa zwoṱhe Yahavee u ḓo lidza phalaphala, a ḓa e kha maḓumbu a tshipembe." 
Zechariah9:15 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ḓo vha pilela! Vha ḓo lozwa maswina avho, vha kandekanya vhapfuli vha misevhe unga matope, vha ḓihandulula nga malofha a maswina avho, vha ḓala malofha unga ndilo ya u handulula ṋanga dza aḽiṱari." 
Zechariah9:16 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wavho u ḓo vha tshidza musi wonoyo; u ḓo lisa vhathu vhawe unga sambi ḽa nngu. Vha ḓo penya vhe shangoni ḽawe unga nungu dza khare ya vhuhosi. 
Zechariah9:17 Mashudu avho a ḓo vha mangafhani! Vha ḓo naka hani! Vhaṱhannga na vhasidzana vha ḓo aluwa nga mavhele na tuvhu. 
Zechariah10:1 Humbelani Muṋe washu mvula nga tshifhinga tsha mvula dza tseula. Muṋe washu ndi Ene a no ruma makole a nisa mvula. U ṋea vhathu zwiḽiwa, kholomo a dzi medzela hatsi." 
Zechariah10:2 Midzimu ya zwitungulo i bula zwi sa tshidzi, mingome i vhona mabono a mazwifhi, vha anḓadza miloro i si na tshithu ngomu, vha khuthadza vhathu lwa mahandana. Ndi zwine vhathu vha xela unga nngu, vha tendeleka ngauri a vha na mulisa." 
Zechariah10:3 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndo sinyutshela vhatsinda vha lisaho vhathu vhanga, ndi ḓo lifhedza khwali. Vhukuma Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ndi ḓo londola sambi ḽa nngu dzanga, wone muṱa wa Juda, nda vha ita unga bere i ṱongaho nndwani." 
Zechariah10:4 Tombo ḽa thikho ḽi ḓo bva kha Juda, khokho ya dennde i ḓo bva khae, na tshiṱangu tsha nndwa tshi ḓo bva kha ene, vhakandeledzi vhoṱhe vha ḓo thathwa ngae." 
Zechariah10:5 Nndwani vha ḓo nga vhahali vhane vha kandekanya matope a mikotoni: vha ḓo lwa vha kunda vhanameli vha dzibere, ngauri Yahavee u navho." 
Zechariah10:6 Vhathu vha Juda ndi ḓo vha ṋea maanḓa, vha muṱa wa Josefa ndi ḓo vha ṋea gundo. Ndi ḓo vha vhuedzedza hayani ngauri ndi vha pfela vhuṱungu. Zwi ḓo nga a tho ngo vhuya nda vha landula. Ndi uri Mudzimu wavho ndi Nṋe Yahavee, ndi ḓo fhindula thabelo dzavho." 
Zechariah10:7 Vhathu vha Efraimi vha ḓo nga vhahali; mbilu dzavho dzi ḓo takala vha nga vho nwa waini. Vhana vhavho vha ḓo zwi vhona vha pembela, mbilu dzavho dzi ḓo fhululedza Yahavee." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndi ḓo vha vhidza nga muludzi nda vha kuvhanganya. Vhukuma ndi ḓo vha tshidza, vha dovha vha anda unga kale." 
Zechariah10:9 Naho ndo vha balanganya na dzitshakha, vha ḓo ḓi nnyelelwa vhe mashangoni a kule. Vhone na vhana vhavho vha ḓo tshila, vha vhuya hayani." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndi ḓo vha pfulusa Egipita nda vha vhuisa, nda vha kuvhanganya vha tshi bva Ashuru, nda vha ḓisa shangoni ḽa Giliadi na Libanoni, na henefho hu nga si vha eḓane nga u anda." 
Zechariah10:11 Ndi ḓo shusha lwanzhe, nda rwa magabelo alwo; nda xisa mativha oṱhe a Nile, nda thutha zwoṱhe zwine Vhaashuru vha ḓitika ngazwo, nda dzhiela Egipita luḓo lwa vhuhosi." 
Zechariah10:12 Nṋe Yahavee ndi ḓo vha ṋea maanḓa, vha tshila nga maanḓa a dzina ḽanga.” Hu amba Muṋe washu!" 
Zechariah11:1 Iwe Libanoni vula mahothi au, mulilo u kone u fhisa mikedara yau!" 
Zechariah11:2 Inwi mipaini honḓani ngauri mukedara wo wa, ya vhugala yo wiselwa fhasi! Inwi mivhula ya Bashani vusani tshililo, ngauri maṱaka o pinzanaho o reṅwa!" 
Zechariah11:3 Ipfani mukosi wa vhalisa vha nngu; pfulo yavho i titimaho yo swa! Ipfani ndau dzi tshi vhomba; maṱaka a Jorodani o haḓiwa! 
Zechariah11:4 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga o amba na nṋe a ri, “Iyo fulisa sambi ḽa nngu dze dza pfi ndi dza u ṱhavha." 
Zechariah11:5 Vharengi vhadzo vha a dzi ṱhavha vha si lifhedzwe. Vharengisi vhadzo vha ri, ‘Yahavee nga a rendiwe, ndo pfuma!’ Vhalisa vhadzo a vha dzi pfeli vhuṱungu.”" 
Zechariah11:6 Muṋe washu u ri, “Vhadzulapo vha shango a thi tsha ḓo dovha nda vha itela vhuthu. Tshine nda ḓo ita ndi u dzhia muthu nda mu kumedza muṅwe kana nda mu kumedza khosi yawe. Vhavhusi vhavho vha ḓo kandeledza vhathu vha shango, hone Nṋe a thi nga vha lamuleli khavho.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Ndi hone ndi tshi fulisa idzo nngu dze dza pfi ndi dza u ṱhavha; nngu ndi amba Vhakanana. Nda dzhia mbaḓa mbili: luṅwe nda ri lu pfi Tshitakadzi luṅwe nda ri lu pfi Mbumbano. Zwenezwo nda thoma u fulisa nngu. 
Zechariah11:8 Nda thatha vhalisa vhararu nga ṅwedzi muthihi. Huno nda thoma u nyala nngu idzo, na dzone dza nnengwa." 
Zechariah11:9 Ndi hone ndi tshi ri, “A thi tsha ḓo vha mulisa waṋu. Dzine dza ṱoḓou fa nga dzi fe zwadzo; dzine dza ṱoḓou lovha nga dzi lovhe zwadzo; dzo salaho nga dzi ḽane ṋama!”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ndi hone ndi tshi dzhia lubaḓa lu no pfi Tshitakadzi nda lu vunḓa nga vhukati, u ralo ha vha u vunḓa mulanga we Muṋe washu a ita na tshakha dzoṱhe." 
Zechariah11:11 Musi wo vunḓea, musi wonoyo, nngu dzi re Vhakanana dze dza vha dzo ntsedza dza zwi vhona uri heḽo ḽo vha ḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu." 
Zechariah11:12 Zwenezwo nda vha vhudza nda ri, “Arali ni tshi vhona zwi zwone, mpheni malamba anga; arali zwi songo ralo ni songo zwi londa.” Ni hone vha tshi nkholela malamba a no nyadzea: mangwende a 30 a siliva." 
Zechariah11:13 Hone Muṋe washu a mmbudza a ri, “A pose mufuli wao, ndi mutengo ufhio wonoyu une vha vhona unga Nṋe ndi rengwa ngawo?” Nṋe nda dzhia mangwende a 30 a siliva nda a posa mufuli thembeleni ya Muṋe washu." 
Zechariah11:14 Ndi hone ndi tshi vunḓa lubaḓa lwanga lwa vhuvhili nga vhukati, luḽa lune lwa pfi Mbumbano, u ralo ha vha u vunḓa vhuthihi ha Juda na Israele." 
Zechariah11:15 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi mmbudza a ri, “Zwino ḓiite mulisa a sa ḓivhalei." 
Zechariah11:16 Ndi uri zwino ndi vho ḓo vhea mulisa a sa ḓivhalei shangoni heḽino. Ene ha nga londi dzo xelaho, dzo netaho ha nga dzi ṱoḓi, dzi re na mbonzhe ha nga dzi lafhi, dzo takalaho ha nga dzi vhavhaleli, tshawe hu ḓo vha u ṱhavha dzo nonaho, a dzi kwatula na khwanḓa." 
Zechariah11:17 “Mulisa onoyo a sa ḓivhalei ane a ṱutshela sambi ḽa nngu, u ḓo zwi vhona! Ngavhe pfumo ḽi tshi mu runga tshishasha, ḽa nongola ḽiṱo ḽawe ḽa tshauḽa! Ngavhe tshishasha tshawe tshi tshi oma tshoṱhe, ḽiṱo ḽawe ḽa swinga tshoṱhe!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Malaedzwa-nga-Mudzimu: Ngeḽi ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽine ḽa amba Israele. Hu amba Muṋe washu, Ene we a ṱharamudza lutombo, a tea ḽifhasi, a vhumba muya wa muthu ngomu hawe, u ri," 
Zechariah12:2 “Vhonani, Jerusalema ndi ḓo u ita tshinwelo tshi no ḓo kamba tshakha dzoṱhe dzo u tangaho. Hu ḓo ri hu tshi govhelwa Jerusalema, na miḓi ya Juda ya diwa." 
Zechariah12:3 “Musi wonoyo, Jerusalema ndi ḓo u ita tombo ḽine ḽa ḓo takulwa nga tshakha dzoṱhe. Vhoṱhe vhane vha linga u ḽi takula vha ḓo ḓihuvhadza nga maanḓa.” (Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo vha dzo kuvhanganela u lwa naḽo)." 
Zechariah12:4 Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo rwa dzibere dzoṱhe dza hanganea, vhanameli vhadzo nda vha dzhenisa tshipengo. Hone vha Juda ndi ḓo vha sedza nga vhuthu. Bere dza vhathu vha dzitshakha ndi ḓo dzi swingisa." 
Zechariah12:5 Ndi hone vha mitupo ya Juda vha tshi ḓo amba nga mbilu vha ri, “Nungo dza vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema dzi bva kha Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe Mudzimu wavho, dzi fhira dzanga.”" 
Zechariah12:6 “Musi wonoyo vha mitupo ya Juda ndi ḓo vha ita unga khali ya mulilo une wa fhisa dzanda ḽa khuni, vha ḓo nga mulilo une wa fhisa maṱanga, vha ḓo fhisa tshakha dzo vha tangaho matungo oṱhe. Jerusalema u ḓo ima fhethu hawo u sa dzinginyei.”" 
Zechariah12:7 Muṋe washu u ḓo ranga nga u lamukisa vhudzulo ha Juda uri khuliso ya muṱa wa Dafita na ya vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema i si fhire ya Juda. 
Zechariah12:8 Musi wonoyo Muṋe washu u ḓo tsireledza vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema, ane a shaya nungo khavho u ḓo vha na nungo dzi no nga dza Dafita, vha muṱa wa Dafita vha ḓo nga vharuṅwa vha Mudzimu, vha ḓo nga Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o vha rangaho phanḓa." 
Zechariah12:9 Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo lozwa tshakha dzoṱhe dzine dza ḓa u lwa na Jerusalema. 
Zechariah12:10 “Hone vha muṱa wa Dafita na vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema ndi ḓo vha shululela muya wa vhulenda na u ḓivhuedza. Vha ḓo nṱoḓa vha tshi ḓisolela zwiḽa zwe vha runga muḓinḓa wanga a fa, vha mu lilela unga muthu a tshi lilela ṅwana muthihi fhedzi wa mutuka, vha vusa tshililo zwa nga muthu a tshi lilela ṅwana wa tanzhe." 
Zechariah12:11 Musi wonoyo hu ḓo vha na tshililo tshihulu kha ḽa Juda, zwa nga musi hu tshi lilelwa Hadada Rimoni govhani ḽa Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Vhathu vha shango vha ḓo lila zwi tshi ya nga mitupo yavho, vha lutsinga lwa Dafita vha ḓo vha vhe thungo, na vhasadzi vhavho vhe nga tshavho; vha lutsinga lwa Nathani vhe thungo, na vhasadzi vhavho vhe nga tshavho;" 
Zechariah12:13 vha lutsinga lwa Livi vhe thungo, na vhasadzi vhavho vhe nga tshavho; vha lutsinga lwa Shimei vhe thungo, na vhasadzi vhavho vhe nga tshavho." 
Zechariah12:14 Vha tsinga dzoṱhe dzo salaho vha ḓo lila zwi tshi ya nga mitupo na vhasadzi vhavho vhe nga tshavho.” 
Zechariah13:1 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Musi ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ḽi tshi swika hu ḓo phulea tshisima tsha u ṱanzwa nnḓu ya Dafita na vhadzulapo vha Jerusalema, tsha vha ṱanzwa vhutshinyi na dzitshika." 
Zechariah13:2 Musi wonoyo ndi ḓo tupula madzina a midzimu ya zwifanyiso shangoni, a si tsha dovha a buliwa. Ndi ḓo fhelisa vhaporofita na mimuya ya dzitshika ine vha porofita ngayo." 
Zechariah13:3 Arali hu na muthu ane a ḓi funa u porofita, khotsi awe na mme awe vho mu bebaho vha ḓo mu vhudza vha ri, ‘A wo ngo fanela u tshila ngauri u amba mazwifhi nga dzina ḽa Yahavee.’ Nahone hu ḓo ri a tshi kha ḓi porofita khotsi awe na mme awe vho mu bebaho vha mbo mu runga a fa." 
Zechariah13:4 Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ḽi tshi swika muporofita muṅwe na muṅwe u ḓo shonela bono ḽawe ḽa vhuporofita. Ha tsha ḓo ambara nguvho ya vhukuse ya muporofita uri a fhure vhathu. 
Zechariah13:5 A tshi amba u ḓo ri, ‘A thi muporofita, ndi mulimi, ndo ḓi tshila nga u lima u bva hanani hanga.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Huno arali muthu a mu vhudzisa a ri, ‘Mavhadzi ayo a re muṱanani wau ndi a mini?’ ene u ḓo fhindula a ri, ‘Mavhadzi haya ndo a wana nḓuni ya khonani dzanga.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Iwe pfumo, vuwa u runge mulisa wa nngu dzanga! Vhulaha mulisa, nngu dzi balangane! Tshanḓa tshanga tshi ḓo rwa na dzone ngwana.”" 
Zechariah13:8 Muṋe washu u ri, “Shangoni ḽoṱhe hu ḓo vhulawa zwipiḓa zwivhili kha zwiraru zwa vhathu vha dzulaho khaḽo, ha sala tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru." 
Zechariah13:9 Tshipiḓa tshenetsho tshithihi ndi ḓo dovha nda vha longa muliloni, nda vha ṱanzwa unga siliva i tshi bviswa manyelo, nda vha linga unga musuku u tshi lingiwa. Vha ḓo rabela dzina ḽanga, Nṋe nda vha thetshelesa; nda ri, ‘Ndi vhathu vhanga,’ vhone vha ri, ‘Yahavee ndi Mudzimu washu!’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Ḓuvha ḽi a ḓa ḽine Muṋe washu a ḓo ita uri maswina aṋu a ni ṱangule thundu a dzi kovhekane henefho muḓini. 
Zechariah14:2 Muṋe washu u ḓo kuvhanganya tshakha dzoṱhe Jerusalema uri dzi lwe nawo. Muḓi u ḓo thubiwa, nnḓu dza ṱangulwa, vhasadzi vha tshipiwa, hafu ya vhathu vha re afho muḓini vha ḓo hwalwa vha iswa vhuthubwani, hone vha salaho a vha nga bviswi afho muḓini." 
Zechariah14:3 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ḓo bva a yo lwa na idzo tshakha unga a tshi lwa musi wa nndwa. 
Zechariah14:4 Musi wonoyo milenzhe yawe i ḓo kanda Thavhani ya Miolivi, yo lavhelesanaho na Jerusalema thungo ya vhubvaḓuvha. Thavha ya Miolivi i ḓo fhandulwa ya bva zwipiḓa zwivhili, u bva vhubvaḓuvha u ya vhukovhela, ya ita govha ḽihulu, hafu ya thavha i ḓo redzemuwa ya ya devhula, iṅwe hafu ya ya tshipembe." 
Zechariah14:5 Ni ḓo shavha nga govha ḽa thavha yanga ngauri ḽi ḓo vha ḽi tshi swika Atsele. Ni ḓo shavha unga zwiḽa ni tshi shavha mudzinginyo wa shango musi hu tshi vhusa Uzia khosi ya Juda. Ndi hone Muṋe washu Mudzimu wanga a tshi ḓo ḓa e na vharuṅwa vhoṱhe, vha ḓa ha inwi." 
Zechariah14:6 Musi wonoyo ḓuvha a ḽi tsha ḓo tsha; a hu tsha ḓo vha na murotho, a hu tsha ḓo vha na mahaḓa." 
Zechariah14:7 A ḓo dzula e masiari – heḽo ḓuvha ḽi ḓihwa nga Muṋe washu – masiari kana vhusiku a zwi tsha ḓo tevhekana; na vhusiku hu ḓo vha na tshedza. 
Zechariah14:8 Musi wonoyo hu ḓo ela maḓi a tshilaho a tshi bva Jerusalema, hafu yao a ela a tshi ya lwanzheni lwa vhubvaḓuvha, hafu yao a ela a tshi ya lwanzheni lwa vhukovhela, a ḓo ela tshilimo na vhuriha." 
Zechariah14:9 Muṋe washu u ḓo vha Ene khosi ya ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe. Musi ḓuvha iḽo ḽi tshi swika, Muṋe washu u ḓo vha Ene Mudzimu e eṱhe, a hu tsha ḓo rabelwa muṅwe." 
Zechariah14:10 Shango ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo shanduka ḽa vha mudavhi u bva Geba u swika Rimoni thungo ya tshipembe. Jerusalema u ḓo takulelwa nṱha, naho u tshi ḓo vha u tshee henefhaḽa ha kale, u bva Khoroni ya Benyamini u swika Khoroni ya u ranga (zwine zwa amba khoro ya Khona) na u bva Thawarani ya Hananele u swika bonḓeloni ḽa waini ḽa musanda." 
Zechariah14:11 Vhathu vha ḓo dzula hone, a hu tsha ḓo phusukanywa. Jerusalema hu ḓo vha fhethu hune vhathu vha dzula vha sa ofhi tshithu." 
Zechariah14:12 Dwadze ḽine Muṋe washu a ḓo ḽi ḓisela tshakha dzoṱhe dzo lwaho na Jerusalema ndi heḽi: ṋama yavho i ḓo sina vha tshi kha ḓi tshimbila nga milenzhe, maṱo avho a ḓo sina e ṱhohoni dzavho, ndimi dzavho dzi ḓo sina dzi milomoni yavho." 
Zechariah14:13 Musi wonoyo vhathu avho vha ḓo welwa nga nyofho khulu i tshi bva ha Muṋe washu. Muthu u ḓo fara muṅwe nga tshanḓa, vha rwana." 
Zechariah14:14 Na vhathu vha Juda vha ḓo lwa vha lamulela Jerusalema. Lupfumo lwa tshakha dzoṱhe dzi re nga matungo lu ḓo kuvhanganywa: musuku na siliva na zwiambaro, zwa tou khokhana." 
Zechariah14:15 Dwadze ḽi no nga ḽeneḽo ḽi ḓo wela dzibere na dzimeila na dzigamela na dzidonngi na phukha dzoṱhe dzine dza dzula gammbani yeneyo. 
Zechariah14:16 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ponyokaho lufu vha tshakha dzoṱhe dze dza yo lwa na Jerusalema, vha ḓo gonya ṅwaha nga ṅwaha vha yo luvha Khosi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, vha ita vhuṱambo ha Mishasha." 
Zechariah14:17 Arali vhathu vha luṅwe lushaka lwa ḽifhasi vha kundwa u gonya Jerusalema u yo luvha Khosi Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe, vhathu vha lwonolwo lushaka a vha nga wani mvula." 
Zechariah14:18 Arali vhathu vha Egipita vha sa yi u luvha, a vha nga welwi nga dwadze ḽine Muṋe washu a ḓo ḽi ḓisela tshakha dzoṱhe dzine dza si gonye u yo ita Vhuṱambo ha Mishasha, vhone hu ḓo tou oma masimu avho." 
Zechariah14:19 Heyo i ḓo vha yone ṱhamu ya vhathu vha Egipita na ya tshakha dzoṱhe dzine dza si gonye u yo ita vhuṱambo ha Mishasha. 
Zechariah14:20 Musi ḓuvha iḽo ḽi tshi swika, ḓilogo dza bere dzi ḓo ṅwalwa maipfi a no ri, “Ndi khethwa, ndi ya Muṋe washu”, nahone khali dzoṱhe dza u bika dzi re thembeleni ya Muṋe washu dzi ḓo fana na midzio ya u handulula i re phanḓa ha aḽiṱari, dza fana nayo nga vhukhethwa." 
Zechariah14:21 Khali dzoṱhe dza u bika dzi re Jerusalema na Juda, dzi ḓo vha khethwa, dzi ḓo pfi ndi dza Muṋe washu, vhoṱhe vhane vha ṱoḓa u ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo vha ḓo ḓa vha ḓibikela ngadzo. Musi wonoyo a hu tsha ḓo vha na vhashavhi thembeleni ya Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:1 Haya ndi malaedzwa a Mudzimu. Ndi ipfi ḽe Muṋe washu a vhudza Vhaisraele nga mulomo wa Malakia. 
Malachi1:2 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ndo ni funa, hone inwi na vhudzisa na ri, ‘Wo ri funa nga zwifhio?’ ” Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, “Esau o vha e si mukomana wa Jakopo kani? Naho zwo ralo ndo funa Jakopo," 
Malachi1:3 Esau nda mu vhenga, nda phusukanya shango ḽawe, thavha dzawe dza sala ḽi soga, shango ḽawe ḽa vha ḽa phunguhwe dza phangani.”" 
Malachi1:4 Vhathu vha Edomo vha nga ḓi ri, “Naho ro kuyekanywa ri ḓo dovha ra vusa matumba ashu.” Huno Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhone nga vha a vuse zwavho, Nṋe ndi ḓo dovha nda a thutha. Vha ḓo pfi ‘Shango Ḽivhi, vhathu vhe Yahavee a dzula o vha nengwa.’" 
Malachi1:5 Ni ḓo zwi vhona nga aṋu maṱo, na konou ri, ‘Maanḓa a Yahavee a pfuka na mikano ya Israele!’ ”" 
Malachi1:6 Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe u amba na inwi vhotshifhe vha nyadzaho dzina ḽawe, u ri, “Ṅwana u hulisa khotsi awe, mushumi u hulisa muṋe wawe. Arali Nṋe nangoho ndi khotsi aṋu, khezwi ni sa nkhulisi? Arali nangoho ndi Muṋe waṋu, khezwi ni sa nnyofhi? “Hone ni vhudzisa na ri, ‘Dzina ḽau ro ḽi nyadza nga zwifhio?’" 
Malachi1:7 “Ni vhea zwiḽiwa zwo kumalaho aḽiṱarini yanga. Hone ni vhudzisa na ri, ‘Ro u sinyusa nge ra itani?’ Izwo no zwi ita nga u amba na ri ḓafula ya Yahavee i a nyadzea." 
Malachi1:8 Musi ni tshi ḓisa phukha dzo pofulaho na dzo holefhalaho na dzi lwalaho na dzi ita tshiṱhavhelo, a zwo ngo vhifha naa? Edzonu linga u dzi ṋekedza muvhusi waṋu! A nga ni takalela naa? A nga pfesesa zwine na humbela naa?” Hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:9 “No no ralo na dovha na ri, ‘Zwino lingani u kwengweledza Mudzimu uri a ri itele vhuthu.’ Ni tshi mu ṋekedza zwiṱhavhelo zwo raloho nga zwanḓa zwaṋu, ni vhona unga u ḓo ni ṱanganedza naa? Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:10 Ngavhe muṅwe waṋu a tshi nga tou vala miṋango ya thembele, uri ni si kone u funga mililo yaṋu i si na mushumo aḽiṱarini yanga! A thi ni takaleli, a thi nga vhuyi nda ṱanganedza tshiṱhavhelo tshine na nṋekedza. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:11 Vhukuma dzina ḽanga ndi ḽihulu vhukati ha dzitshakha, u bva vhubvaḓuvha u swika vhukovhela. Hoṱhe-hoṱhe ndi dubiselwa zwioro nda ṋekedzwa nduvho dzi si na tshika, ngauri dzina ḽanga ndi ḽihulu vhukati ha dzitshakha. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:12 Hone inwi ni shata dzina ḽanga tshika nge na amba na ri, ‘Ḓafula ḽa Muṋe wa zwoṱhe nga ḽi kumale zwaḽo,’ ni tshi amba zwiḽiwa zwaḽo na ri, ‘Nga zwi nyadzee zwazwo!’" 
Malachi1:13 Na dovha na ri, ‘U mu luvha zwi a netisa!’ Ni a nnyadza musi ni tshi ḓisa zwifuwo zwo tswiwaho na zwo holefhalaho kana zwi lwalaho na zwi ita tshiṱhavhelo na nṋekedza, ni vhona unga ndi nga zwi ṱanganedza zwi tshi bva zwanḓani zwaṋu? Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi1:14 Mudzia-u-fhura ane a vha na thutha i tamisaho sambini ḽawe, a ana uri u ḓo i ṋekedza, hone a vho dzhia i re na badzi a i ita tshiṱhavhelo a ṋekedza Nṋe Yahavee, onoyo o teketelwa. Ndi uri Nṋe ndi Khosi khulu, dzina ḽanga ḽi a ofhiwa vhukati ha dzitshakha. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe.”" 
Malachi2:1 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Inwi vhotshifhe, zwino ndi khou laya inwi." 
Malachi2:2 Zwe na pfi ni zwi thetshelese, ni zwi sedze nga vhuronwane, ndi u hulisa dzina ḽanga. Zwino na sa zwi ita ndi ḓo ni teketela, ndi ḓo shandukisa mashudu aṋu a vha u teketelwa. Vhukuma ndo no ḓi ni teketela ngauri a no ngo sedza nga vhuronwane uri ni nkhulise." 
Malachi2:3 Ndi ḓo pfisa vhana vhaṋu vhuṱungu nga mulandu waṋu; ndi ḓo ni shata khofheni nga muswane wa zwiṱhavhelo zwa vhuṱambo haṋu, nahone ndi ḓo bvisa Livi tshiimoni tshawe." 
Malachi2:4 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri o ni ṋeaho ndaela iyi ndi Nṋe, nge nda vhofha mulanga na Livi. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi2:5 Ndo vhofha mulanga nae: ndo mu ṋea vhutshilo na mulalo, o vha a tshi nkhulisa a nnyofha, a dzula a tshi tetemela dzina ḽanga." 
Malachi2:6 Mulomoni wawe ho vha hu na ndayo ya ngoho, ho ngo vhuya a wanala a tshi amba zwa vhufhura. O tshila a tshi konana na Nṋe nga mulalo, a si na vhufhura, a rembulusa vhanzhi vha laṱa vhuvhi." 
Malachi2:7 Ndi uri mulomo wa tshifhe wo fanela u funza vhathu vha nnḓivhe, a laya vhathu zwine nda funa, ngauri ndi ene muḓinḓa wa Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi2:8 Hone inwi no pambuwa nḓilani, na khukhula vhathu vhanzhi nga pfunzo yaṋu; no pfuka mulanga we nda vhofha na Livi." 
Malachi2:9 Ndi zwe nda ita uri ni nyadziwe, vhathu vhoṱhe vha vhone ni si tshithu, nge na si tshimbile nḓilani dzanga tshaṋu ha vha u ita tshiṱalula musi ni tshi ḓa kha zwa mulayo wanga.”" 
Malachi2:10 Roṱhe a ri na Khotsi muthihi naa? A ro ngo vhumbwa nga Mudzimu muthihi naa? Ndi mini ri tshi shata mulanga wa vhokhotsi tshika nga u shandukelana? 
Malachi2:11 Vhathu vha Juda vho shandukela Muṋe washu; ho itwa zwi nengisaho kha ḽa Israele na Jerusalema: Vhathu vha Juda vho kumadza hukhethwa hune ha funwa nga Muṋe washu nga u funana na vhasadzi vha no luvha midzimu isili, vha ita na u vha vhinga." 
Malachi2:12 Munna ane a ita zwenezwo ngavhe Muṋe washu a tshi mu bvisa kha vhathu vha Jakopo, khathihi na vhana vhawe na vhaḓuhulu, naho a tshi ṋekedza Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe nduvho." 
Malachi2:13 Tshiṅwe tshine na ita ngetshi: Ni ḓadza aḽiṱari ya Muṋe washu nga miṱodzi. Ni tsengisa miṱodzi na honḓa ngauri nduvho dzaṋu ha tsha dzi londa, ha tsha dzi ṱanganedza kha inwi o takala." 
Malachi2:14 Zwino na vhudzisa na ri, “Ndi ngani?” Ndi uri Muṋe washu u a u haṱulela zwe wa ita musadzi we wa mu vhinga u tshi kha ḓi vha muṱhannga, wa sala u tshi mu shandukela naho e mufarisi wau, e musadzi we wa vhofha nae mulanga wa mbingano." 
Malachi2:15 Muṋe washu ho ngo ni ita muthihi lwa muvhili na muya naa? Ndi mini o ni ita muthihi? Ndi uri u ṱoḓa ni tshi beba vhana vha re vhana vha Mudzimu. Zwenezwo ḓilondole, u songo shandukela musadzi we wa mu vhinga u tshi kha ḓi vha muṱhannga." 
Malachi2:16 Muṋe washu Mudzimu wa Israele u ri, “U ṱalana ndi a hu vhenga, ndi a zwi vhenga arali muṅwe waṋu a tshi itela musadzi wawe tshiṱuhu tsho raloho.” Hu amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe. Zwenezwo ḓilondole, ni songo shandukelana." 
Malachi2:17 No dina Muṋe washu nga zwiambo zwaṋu. Ni vhudzisa na ri, “Ro mu dina nga zwifhio?” No mu dina nga u ri, “Vhane vha ita vhuvhi Muṋe washu u ḓi vhona vhe vhavhuya, u a vha takalela,” kana na ri, “Mudzimu a sa ṱaluli u ngafhi?”" 
Malachi3:1 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhonani, ndi ḓo ruma muḓinḓa wanga ane a ḓo nndugisela nḓila. Zwenezwo Muṋe waṋu ane na mu lila u ḓo ḓa thembeleni yawe kathihi fhedzi; Ene Muruṅwa wa mulanga we na mu ṱulutshela. U nḓilani.”" 
Malachi3:2 Huno ane a nga kona u konḓelela ḓuvha ḽa u ḓa hawe ndi nnyi? Ndi nnyi ane a nga ima musi a tshi bvelela? U ḓo nga mulilo wa u bvisa manyelo, u ḓo nga tshisibe tsha u kuvha." 
Malachi3:3 U ḓo nga ane a bvisa manyelo a siliva a i kunisa; u ḓo kunisa Vhalivi a vha bvisa manyelo unga musuku na siliva. Zwenezwo Muṋe washu ndi hone a tshi ḓo wana vhanna vhane vha ḓo mu ṋekedza nduvho vha sa solei. 
Malachi3:4 Ndi hone nduvho dza vhathu vha Juda na Jerusalema dzi tshi ḓo ṱanganedzwa nga Muṋe washu, zwa nga sa misi iḽa ya kale, sa miṅwaha iḽa ya u ranga." 
Malachi3:5 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ndi ḓo ḓa nda ni haṱula. A thi nga lengi u sengisa mingome na dziphombwe na vha anelaho mazwifhi na vhane vha dzima vhashumi vhavho malamba avho na vha no kandeledza tshilikadzi na vha si na vhokhotsi, na vhatsinda, Nṋe vha sa nnyofhi.”" 
Malachi3:6 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yahavee, NDI ANE NDA VHA ENE, a thi shanduki. Hone inwi-vho ni ḓi dzula ni vhana vha Jakopo, mudziavhufhura muṋe wa dzina." 
Malachi3:7 U bva misi ya vhokhotsi aṋu no ḓi furalela ndayo dzanga na si dzi tevhedze. Humelani ha Nṋe, na Nṋe ndi ḓo konou humela ha inwi. Hone ni vhudzisa na ri, ‘Ri ḓo huma hani?’" 
Malachi3:8 Ndi ri: Muthu a nga fhura Mudzimu naa? Hone inwi ni a mphura. Na dovha na vhudzisa na ri, ‘Ri u fhura nga zwifhio?’ Ni mphura nga u sa bvisa tshafumi na mitendelo." 
Malachi3:9 No teketelwa tshoṱhe ngauri ndi Nṋe ane na ḓi mphura, inwi noṱhe." 
Malachi3:10 Ḓisani tshafumi tshoṱhe nḓuni ya u vhulungela uri nḓuni yanga hu vhe na zwiḽiwa. Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe ndi ri: Nndingeni nga zwenezwo; ngoho ndi ḓo vula miṋango ya ṱaḓulu nda tou ni nisela mashudu. 
Malachi3:11 Ndi ḓo kaidza nzie dzi si ḽe zwiliṅwa zwaṋu; minḓirivhe masimuni aṋu a i nga moḓisi. Hu amba Nṋe Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe. 
Malachi3:12 Zwenezwo tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo ri ni na mashudu, ngauri shango ḽaṋu ḽi ḓo vha ḽi tshi takadza.” Ho amba Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe." 
Malachi3:13 Muṋe washu u ri, “Ni vho tou ntswetha. Hone inwi ni vhudzisa na ri, ‘Ro u swetha nga zwifhio?’" 
Malachi3:14 No ri, ‘U shumela Mudzimu a zwi farisi tshithu. Ro wana mini nga u tevhedza ndayo dzawe, ri tshi tshimbila ro ambara madzanganda sa vha lilaho maṱoni a Yahavee Mulangazwoṱhe?" 
Malachi3:15 Hone zwino vhane vha ḓihudza ri ri vha na mashudu. Vhukuma vhaitazwivhi zwi a vha nakela, vhane vha levhela Mudzimu u a vha litsha.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Vhane vha ofha Muṋe washu vha tshi amba nga tshavho, Muṋe washu a thetshelesa a zwi pfa. A ri hu ṅwalwe bugu ya tshihumbudzo, ya avho vhane vha ofha Muṋe washu vha hulisa dzina ḽawe." 
Malachi3:17 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Nga ḓuvha heḽo ḽine nda khou ḽi ḓisa, vha ḓo vha vhathu vhanga vhane nda vha takalela. Ndi ḓo vha khathutshela unga khotsi a tshi khathutshela ṅwana wawe ane a mu shumela." 
Malachi3:18 Ni ḓo dovha na vhona phambano vhukati ha vhavhuya na vhavhi, vhukati ha vha no shumela Mudzimu na vha sa mu shumeli.”" 
Malachi4:1 Muṋe washu Mulangazwoṱhe u ri, “Vhukuma ḓuvha ḽi khou ḓa; ḽi ḓo fhisa unga ṋanḓo. Vhoṱhe vhadzia-u-ḓihudza na vhaitazwivhi vha ḓo nga maṱanga, ḓuvha heḽo ḽi no khou ḓa ḽi ḓo vha fhisa nga mulilo. A hu nga sali mudzi wavho kana davhi ḽavho." 
Malachi4:2 Hone inwi vhane na ofha dzina ḽanga ni ḓo penyelwa nga ḓuvha ḽi re u fulufhedzea, ḽa ni fhodza nga maṱalazaza aḽo. Ni ḓo khana unga ṋamana dzi tshi bva dangani." 
Malachi4:3 Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo kandekanya vhavhi, vha ḓo nga milora ine na i kanda nga ṋayo musi une nda ita zwithu hezwo.”" 
Malachi4:4 “Ni songo hangwa mulayo wa muḓinḓa wanga Mushe, ndayo na milayo ye nda mu ṋea thavhani ya Horebe uri i vhuse Vhaisraele vhoṱhe." 
Malachi4:5 Vhonani, ndi ḓo ruma muporofita Elia a ḓa ha inwi, ḓuvha ḽanga iḽo ḽihulu ḽi ofhisaho ḽi sa athu ḓa." 
Malachi4:6 U ḓo dovha a pfumedzanya vhokhotsi na vhana vhavho, mbilu dza vhana dza livha kha vhokhotsi avho, vha sala vha tshi pfana ndi sa ḓo ḓa nda lozwa shango ḽoṱhe.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Musi ni tshi vhona ‘Vhuṱudzi vhu ḓisaho mutshinyalo’ ho ambiwaho nga muporofita Daniele ho imiswa fhethu hukhethwa (muvhali nga a pfesese)," 
Luke3:25 wa Mathathiasi, wa Amusi, wa Nahumi, wa Esele, wa Nagai," 
Luke3:29 wa Joshua, wa Eliesere, wa Jorimu, wa Mathathi, wa Livi," 
Acts7:45 Ngavhuya vhomakhulukuku washu vha sielwa iyo Dennde nga vhokhotsi avho, vha i hwala vho rangwa phanḓa nga Joshua, Mudzimu a konou pandela dzitshakha, vhone vha thuba shango ḽadzo. Vha ḓi sielana yeneyo Dennde nga u ralo u swika tshifhinga tsha Dafita." 
Acts13:6 Vha buḓekanya tshiṱangadzime vha vhuya vha swika Phafosi. Henefho vha wana muṅwe munna wa Mujuda a no pfi Bara-Joshua, we a vha e na manditi nahone a tshi ḓiita muporofita." 
Colossians4:11 Na Joshua ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Justosi u ri ni vhe hone. Avho ndi vhone Majuda vhe vhoṱhe kha vhane ra shumela muvhuso wa Mudzimu roṱhe; ndi tshi vha vhona ndi pfa mbilu yo tou rula. 
Hebrews4:8 Ngavhe Joshua a dzhenise vhathu vhuaweloni, ndi musi Mudzimu a sa ḓo ri ngavhuya a dovha a amba zwa ḽiṅwe ḓuvha." 
James5:11 Vhe vha konḓelela zwingafhangafha ri ri vha na mashudu. Na inwi no no ḓi pfa zwa u konḓelela ha Jobo, na dovha na vhona zwivhuya zwe Mudzimu a fhedza nga u mu itela. Khezwo-ha: Muṋe washu u na khathutshelo na mbilutshilidzi."
